Genesis1:1 Ubga mbere na mbere Imana yaremye ijuru n’isi. 
Genesis1:2 Isi yar’ ikir’ i buziba, yarik’ ubusa gusa, kand’ umwiza war’ upfutse idamba: kandi Mpwemu w’Imana yatambatamba hejuru y’amazi." 
Genesis1:3 Imana iravuga, iti Ni habeh’ umuco: umuco ubaho." 
Genesis1:4 Imana ibona umuco kw ari mwiza: iraheza itandukanya umuco n’umwiza. 
Genesis1:5 Imana yita umuco umurango, umwiza iwita ijoro. Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’umusi wa mbere." 
Genesis1:6 Imana iravuga, iti Ni habeh’ itāzānure hagati y’amazi, ritandukanye amazi n’ayandi." 
Genesis1:7 Imana iraritāzānura, itandukanya amazi yo musi y’itāzānure n’ayo hejuru yaryo: biba kuno." 
Genesis1:8 Maz’ iryo tāzānure Imana iryita Ijuru. Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’umusi ugira kabiri." 
Genesis1:9 Imana iravuga, it’ Amazi yo musi y’ijuru n’akoranire hamwe, i musozi na ho ni haboneke: biba kuno." 
Genesis1:10 Maz’ i musozi Imana ihita Isi, ikoraniro ry’amazi na ryo iryita Ibiyaga: Imana ibona kw ari vyiza." 
Genesis1:11 Imana iravuga, it’ Isi n’imere ivyatsi, n’ibimera vyose vyama utubuto, n’ibiti vyama ivyamwa vyavyo ukw amoko yavyo ari, birimw’ imbuto zavyo, kw isi nyene: biba kuno." 
Genesis1:12 Nukw isi imera ivyatsi n’ibimera vyose vyama utubuto ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ibiti vyama ivyamwa birimw’ imbuto zavyo, ukw amoko yavyo ari: nukw Imana ibona kw ari vyiza." 
Genesis1:13 Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’umusi ugira gatatu." 
Genesis1:14 Imana iravuga, iti Mw itāzānure ry’ijuru ni habeh’ ivyāka vyo gutandukanya umurango n’ijoro; bibēreho kuba ibimenyetso, no kwerekana ibihe, n’imisi n’imyaka:" 
Genesis1:15 kandi bibe ivyāka vyo mw itāzānure ry’ ijuru vyo kwākira isi: biba kuno. 
Genesis1:16 Imana irema ivyāka bibiri binini, icaka kinini co kuganza umurango, n’icaka gitoya co kuganza ijoro, bo n’inyenyeri." 
Genesis1:17 Imana ibishira mw itāzānure ry’ijuru kugira ngo vyākire isi," 
Genesis1:18 biganze umurango n’ijoro, bitandukanye umuco n’umwiza; Imana ibona kw ari vyiza." 
Genesis1:19 Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’umusi ugira kane." 
Genesis1:20 Imana iravuga, iti Mu mazi ni hasegenyuke isegenya ry’ibifise ubugingo, kand’ ibiguruka ni biguruke hejuru y’isi mu kirere c’ijuru." 
Genesis1:21 Imana irema ibifi binini‐binini, n’ibifise ubugingo vyose bigendagenda, ivyasegenyutse mu mazi, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ibiguruka vyose bifise ivyubi, ukw amoko yavyo ari: Imana ibona kw ari vyiza." 
Genesis1:22 Imana irabihezagira, iti Ni murondoke, mugwire, mwuzure mu mazi yo mu biyaga, n’ ibiguruka ni bigwire mw isi." 
Genesis1:23 Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’ umusi ugira gatanu." 
Genesis1:24 Imana iravuga, it’Isi n’izane ibiri n’ubugingo, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, vy’ ibitungano n’ivyikwega hasi n’ibikōko vyo mw isi, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari: biba kuno." 
Genesis1:25 Nukw Imana irema ibikōko vyo mw isi, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ibitungano, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ivyikwega hasi vyose, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari: Imana ibona kw ari vyiza." 
Genesis1:26 Imana iravuga, iti Tureme umuntu mw ishusho yacu, ase natwe: aganze amafi yo mu kiyaga, n’ibiguruka mu kirere, n’ ibitungano, n’isi yose, n’ivyikwega vyose, bigenda bikwega inda hasi." 
Genesis1:27 Nukw Imana irema umuntu mw ishusho yayo, mw ishusho y’Imana ni ho yamuremye; irema abantu bar’ uburyo bubiri." 
Genesis1:28 Maz’ Imana irabahezagira, iti Ni murondoke, mugwire, mwuzure isi muyiganze; mugabe amafi yo mu kiyaga, n’ibiguruka mu kirere, n’ibifise ubugingo vyose bigendagenda kw isi." 
Genesis1:29 Imana irababgira, it’Ehe ndabahaye ivyatsi vyose vyama utubuto biri kw isi yose, n’igiti cose cama ivyamwa birimw’ imbuto zavyo: bibabere ivyo kurya vyanyu." 
Genesis1:30 Kand’ ibikōko vyose vyo kw isi, n’ibiguruka mu kirere vyose, n’ivyikwega hasi vyose birimw’ ubugingo, mbihaye ivyatsi bitotahaye vyose, ngo bibe ivyo kurya vyavyo: biba kuno." 
Genesis1:31 Nukw Imana yihweza ivyo yaremye vyose, kandi vyari vyiza cane. Buragoroba, buraca: uwo n’umusi ugira gatandatu." 
Genesis2:1 Ijuru n’isi binonosorwa kuremwa, bo n’ibirimwo vyose vy’ isinzi." 
Genesis2:2 Ku musi ugira indwi Imana inonosora ibikorwa vyayo yakoze; iruhuka ku musi ugira indwi ibikorwa vyayo vyose yakoze. 
Genesis2:3 Nukw Imana ihezagira uwo musi w’indwi, iraweza: kukw ari wo Imana yaruhukiyekw ibikorwa vyayo vyose, ivyo yaremye kandi yakoze." 
Genesis2:4 Aya ni yo mamo y’ijuru n’isi igihe vyaremwa, umusi Uhoraho Imana yaremeyekw isi n’ijuru." 
Genesis2:5 Kandi nta gati ko ku misozi karibgabeho kw isi, nta n’akatsi ko ku misozi karibgamere, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana ataribgarekurire imvura kw isi, kandi nta muntu yariho wo kuyirima;" 
Genesis2:6 arikw igipfungu cadūga kiva kw isi kigatosa isi yose. 
Genesis2:7 Uhoraho Imana abumba umuntu mu mukungugu wo hasi, amuhumekera mu mazuru impwemu y’ubugingo; umuntu aca aba ūfise ubugingo." 
Genesis2:8 Uhoraho Imana atunganya itongo muri Edeni, mu ruhande rw’i burasirazuba: arishiramw’ uwo muntu yabumvye." 
Genesis2:9 Uhoraho Imana ahameza igiti cose c’igikundiro kibereye kuribga, ameza n’igiti c’ubugingo hagati mur’ iryo tongo, ameza n’igiti kimenyekanisha iciza n’ikibi." 
Genesis2:10 Kand’ uruzi ruturuka muri Edeni rwo kunywesha iryo tongo; ruharenganye, rwigabanyamwo kune." 
Genesis2:11 Urwa mbere rwitwa Pishoni: ni rwo rukīkūje igihugu cose c’i Havila, kirimw’ izahabu:" 
Genesis2:12 kand’ izahabu yo mur’ ico gihugu ni nziza; aho ni ho haba ivyitwa budola n’utubuyenge twitwa shohamu. 
Genesis2:13 Uruzi rwa kabiri rwitwa Gihoni: ni rwo rukīkūje igihugu cose c’i Kushi. 
Genesis2:14 Uruzi rwa gatatu rwitwa Hidekeli, ni rwo ruca hino y’igihugu citwa Ashuri. Uruzi rwa kane rwitwa Efurate." 
Genesis2:15 Uhoraho Imana ajana wa muntu, amushira mur’ iryo tongo ryo muri Edeni, ngw aririme, arizigame." 
Genesis2:16 Uhoraho Imana abarira uwo muntu, at’ Igiti cose co mur’ iryo tongo ukiryek’ uk’ ugomba;" 
Genesis2:17 arikw igiti kimenyekanisha iciza n’ikibi ntuz’ ukiryeko: kuk’ umusi wakiriyeko, uzopfa nta kabuza." 
Genesis2:18 Uhoraho Imana aravuga, ati Si vyiza k’uyu muntu yibana wenyene; hinge ndamuronderere umufasha bikwiranye." 
Genesis2:19 Nukw ibikōko vyose vyo ku misozi n’ibiguruka mu kirere vyose, ivyo Uhoraho Imana yari yabumvye mw ivu, abizanira uwo muntu ngw arābe ingen’ avyita amazina: kand’ uwo muntu uko yise ikiri n’ubugingo cose, rica riba izina ryaco." 
Genesis2:20 Uwo muntu avyita amazina uhereye ku bitungano vyose no ku biguruka mu kirere no ku bikōko vyo mw ishamba vyose: ariko ntihabonekamw’ umufasha akwiranye n’umuntu. 
Genesis2:21 Maz’ Uhoraho Imana asinziriza uwo muntu ubutikoma, arasinzira: amukūramw’ urubavu rumwe, ahōmeka inyama mu gishingo carwo." 
Genesis2:22 Urwo rubavu Uhoraho Imana akūye mur’ uwo muntu, arukūramw’ umugore, amuzanira uwo muntu." 
Genesis2:23 Maz’ uwo muntu aravuga, at’ Uyu n’ igufa ryo mu magufa yanje, n’akara ko mu mara yanje: azokwitwa Umugore kuko yakūwe mu Mugabo." 
Genesis2:24 Ni co gituma umuntu azosiga se na nyina, akabana n’ umugore wiwe akaramata, bakaba umubiri umwe." 
Genesis2:25 Kand’ uwo mugabo n’umugore wiwe bompi bāgenda amēnya, ariko ntivyabatera isoni." 
Genesis3:1 Inzoka yarusha ubugunge ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba Uhoraho Imana yaremye. Ibaza uwo mugore, iti Mbega n’ivy’ ukuri koko yukw Imana yavuze, ngo Ntimurye ku giti na kimwe co mur’ iri tongo?" 
Genesis3:2 Umugore yishura iyo nzoka, at’ Ivyama ku biti vyo mur’ iri tongo twemererwa kubirya:" 
Genesis3:3 arikw ivyama ku giti kiri hagati mw itongo, ni vy’Imana yatubujije, ngo ntitubiryeko, canke ngo tunabikoreko, kugira ngo twoye gupfa." 
Genesis3:4 Iyo nzoka yishura uwo mugore, iti Haba n’intete ntimuzopfa;" 
Genesis3:5 kukw Imana izi yuk’ umusi mwabiriyeko, amaso yanyu azokwihweza, mukamera nk’ Imana ku vyo kumenya iciza n’ikibi." 
Genesis3:6 Uwo mugore abonye ico giti yukw ar’ ikibereye kuribga, kandi ko gihimbaye mu jisho, ar’ igiti co kwifuzwa kimenyesha ubgenge, yamura ku vyo camye, arabirya, ahako n’umugabo wiwe bāri kumwe, na we ararya." 
Genesis3:7 Amaso yabo bompi arihweza, bamenya yuko bagenda amēnya, badandikanya ibibabi vy’imisukoni, bīronkeramw’ uducocerwa." 
Genesis3:8 Bumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana agendagenda mur’ iryo tongo mu gihe c’akayaga ko ku kagoroba: uwo muntu n’umugore wiwe binyegeza mu biti vyo mur’ iryo tongo, ng’Uhoraho Imana ntababone." 
Genesis3:9 Uhoraho Imana ahamagara uwo muntu, aramubaza, at’ Uri hehe?" 
Genesis3:10 Aramwishura, ati Numvise ijwi ryawe mw itongo, ndatinya, kuko ndi gusa, ndinyegeza." 
Genesis3:11 Aramubaza, ati Ni nde yakubariye ko wambaye ubusa? Mbega wariye kuri ca giti nakubujije kuryako?" 
Genesis3:12 Uwo muntu aramwishura, at’ Umugore wampaye ngo tubane, ni we yampaye ku vya ca giti, ndarya." 
Genesis3:13 Uhoraho Imana abaza uwo mugore, at’ Ico wakoze ico n’igiki? Uwo mugore aramwishura, at’ Inzoka yampenze, ndabirya." 
Genesis3:14 Uhoraho Imana abarira iyo nzoka, ati K’ukoze ivyo, ubaye ikivume mu bitungano vyose no mu bikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba: uzohora ukwega inda hasi, uzorya umukungugu imisi yose y’ukubaho kwawe." 
Genesis3:15 Nzoshira inyankane hagati yawe n’uyu mugore, no hagati y’uruvyaro rwawe n’urwiwe: ruzogukomeretsa umutwe, nawe uzorukomeretsa igitsintsiri." 
Genesis3:16 Kand’ abarira uwo mugore, ati Nzogwiza rwose umubabaro wawe ufise inda; uzokwama uvyara abana ubabara; kand’ umugabo wawe uzomuhoranira inyota, na we azokuganza." 
Genesis3:17 Abarira Adamu na we, ati Ko wumviye umugore wawe, ukarya ku giti nari narakubujije, nti Ntuze ukiryeko: uzaniye ivu umuvumo; uzokwama urya ibirivamwo ubiruhiye, imisi yose y’ukubaho kwawe;" 
Genesis3:18 rizohora rikumerera imikere n’ibitovu, arik’ uzotungwa n’ibirimano vyo mu ndimiro;" 
Genesis3:19 kwirirwa urabira akuya ni kwo kuzoguhesha ivyo kurya uz’ urinde usubira mw ivu, kukw ari ryo wakūwemwo: ur’umukungugu, kand’ umukungugu ni wo uzosubiramwo." 
Genesis3:20 Uwo muntu yita umugore wiwe Eva, kukw ari we nyina w’abari n’ubugingo bose." 
Genesis3:21 Uhoraho Imana aronkera Adamu n’umugore wiwe imyambaro y’insāto, arabambika." 
Genesis3:22 Uhoraho Imana aravuga, at’ Eh’ uyo muntu ahindutse nk’imwe muri twebge, ku vyo kumenya iciza n’ikibi: none rero yohava atuma ukuboko, akamura no ku giti c’ubugingo, akarya, akazokwamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Genesis3:23 Ni co catumye Uhoraho Imana amukūra mur’ iryo tongo ryo muri Edeni, ngw aje kurima ivu yakūwemwo." 
Genesis3:24 Nuko yirukana uwo muntu; kandi mu ruhande ruhera i burasirazuba rw’iryo tongo ryo muri Edeni, ahashira Abakerubi, bo n’inkota yaka umuriro, itangatanze impande zose, ngw itangīre inzira ija kuri ca giti c’ubugingo." 
Genesis4:1 Kand’ uwo mugabo abana na Eva umugore wiwe; nukw asama inda, avyara Kayini, aravuga, ati Ndonse umuhungu kubg’ Uhoraho." 
Genesis4:2 Asubizako, avyara murumuna we Abeli. Abeli aba umwungere w’intama, Kayini aba umurimyi." 
Genesis4:3 Igihe kiragera, Kayini azana ishikanwa ku vyeze mu ndimiro, ngw abishikanire Uhoraho." 
Genesis4:4 Abeli na we azana ku ntungwa z’uburiza zo mu mukuku wiwe, no ku binure vyazo. Uhoraho yākīrira Abeli ishikanwa ryiwe," 
Genesis4:5 ariko ntiyākīrira Kayini ishikanwa ryiwe. Maze Kayini araraka cane, mu maso hiwe harijirwa." 
Genesis4:6 Uhoraho abaza Kayini, ati N’iki kikurakije, kandi n’iki gitumye wijiriwe mu maso?" 
Genesis4:7 Ni wakora neza ntuzokwemerwa? ariko n’utākora neza, icaha kibunze ku rugi: kandi ni wewe cifuza, arik’ ukwiye kukinesha." 
Genesis4:8 Nuko Kayini abarira Abeli murumuna we, ati Ngo dusohoke tuje mu gahinga. Maze bari mu gahinga, Kayini agurukira kuri Abeli murumuna we, aramwica." 
Genesis4:9 Uhoraho abaza Kayini, ati Abeli murumunawe ari hehe? Aramwishura, ati Ndabizi? Nar’ umwungere wa murumunanje?" 
Genesis4:10 Na we aramubaza, at’ Ico wakoze ico n’igiki? Ijwi ry’amaraso ya murumunawe ririko rirantakambirira kw isi." 
Genesis4:11 Uhereye none ubaye ikivume, ugerewe kuyerēra kure y’aho hantu hasamitse akanwa kaho kwākīra amaraso ya murumunawe ukuboko kwawe kwavishije." 
Genesis4:12 Kuva ubu ni warima isi ntizogira ico ikumerera; uzogenda urāraguza, ur’ inyererezi mw isi." 
Genesis4:13 Kayini abgira Uhoraho, at’ Igihano umpaye kirenze ico nokwihanganira." 
Genesis4:14 Rāba, uyu musi unyirukanye kw isi, nshiburiwe kure yo mu nyonga hawe; nzogenda ndāraguza, nd’ inyererezi mw isi, kand’ ūzombona wese azonyica." 
Genesis4:15 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Ni co gituma uwokwica Kayini azobihanirwa kurenza we ibihetangabo ndwi. Uhoraho ashira ikimenyetso kuri Kayini, kugira ng’ ūzomubona ntamwice." 
Genesis4:16 Nuko Kayini ava imbere y’Uhoraho, aba mu gihugu c’i Nodi, ku ruhande rwa Edeni ahahera i burasirazuba." 
Genesis4:17 Maze Kayini abana n’umugore wiwe, asama inda, avyara Henoki, yubaka igisagara, acita Henoki, acitiranije n’ umwana wiwe." 
Genesis4:18 Henoki avyara Iradi: Iradi avyara Mehuyayeli: Mehuyayeli avyara Metushayeli: Metushayeli avyara Lameki. 
Genesis4:19 Lameki yābīra abagore babiri: umwe yitwa Ada uwundi Zila. 
Genesis4:20 Ada avyara Yabalu, ni we sekuruza w’abungere b’inka bagenda baba mu mahema." 
Genesis4:21 Murumuna we yitwa Yubalu, ni we sekuruza w’abavuzi b’inanga n’imyironge." 
Genesis4:22 Zila na we avyara Tubali‐Kayini, umucuzi w’ikintu cose c’ubugi kiva mu miringa no mu vyuma. Mushiki wa Tubali‐Kayini ni Nayama." 
Genesis4:23 Lameki abarira abagore biwe, at’ Ewe Ada na Zila, ni munyumve, Bagore ba Lameki, ni mwumvirize amajambo yanje! Kuko nishe umugabo ndamwihōye uruguma ankomerekeje, N’umusore ndamwihōye igipfupfuri." 
Genesis4:24 Asangwa uwokwishe Kayini yobihaniwe ibihetangabo ndwi, N’ukuri uwokwica Lameki yobihanirwa ibihetangabo mirongwirindwi n’indwi!" 
Genesis4:25 Adamu yongera kubana n’ umugore wiwe, avyara umuhungu, amwita Seti, ati Kukw Imana inshumbushije urundi ruvyaro mu gishingo ca Abeli, kuko Kayini yamwishe." 
Genesis4:26 Seti na we arahava avyara umuhungu, amwita Enoshi: ico gihe abantu ni ho batanguriye kwambaza izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Genesis5:1 Iki n’igitabo kidōndōra uruvyaro rwa Adamu. Ku musi Imana yaremeyek’ umuntu, mw ishusho yayo ni ho yamuremye;" 
Genesis5:2 irema abantu bar’ uburyo bubiri: irabahezagira, ibita Abantu, ku musi bāremeweko." 
Genesis5:3 Nuko Adamu amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwitatu avyara umuhungu afise ishusho yiwe, asa na we, amwita Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Adamu amaze kuvyara Seti, amara imyaka amajana munani, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:5 Imisi yose Adamu yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitatu: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:6 Seti amaze imyaka ijana n’iyindi itanu avyara Enoshi. 
Genesis5:7 Seti amaze kuvyara Enoshi, amara imyaka amajana munani n’indwi, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:8 Imisi yose Seti yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’icumi n’ibiri: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi amaze imyaka mirongwicenda avyara Kenani. 
Genesis5:10 Enoshi amaze kuvyara Kenani, amara imyaka amajana munani n’icumi n’itanu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’ abakobga." 
Genesis5:11 Imisi yose Enoshi yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’iyindi itanu: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:12 Kenani amaze imyaka mirongwirindwi avyara Mahalaleli. 
Genesis5:13 Kenani amaze kuvyara Mahalaleli, amara iyindi myaka amajana munani na mirongwine, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:14 Imisi yose Kenani yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda n’ icumi: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:15 Mahalaleli amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu n’itanu avyara Yeredi. 
Genesis5:16 Mahalaleli amaze kuvyara Yeredi, amara iyindi myaka amajana munani na mirongwitatu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:17 Imisi yose Mahalaleli yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana munani na mirongwicenda n’itanu: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:18 Yeredi amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwitandatu n’ibiri avyara Henoki. 
Genesis5:19 Yeredi amaze kuvyara Henoki, amara iyindi myaka amajana munani, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:20 Imisi yose Yeredi yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitandatu n’ibiri: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:21 Henoki amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu n’itanu avyara Metusela. 
Genesis5:22 Henoki amaze kuvyara Metusela agendana n’Imana imyaka amajana atatu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:23 Imisi yose Henoki yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu n’itanu. 
Genesis5:24 Kandi Henoki yagendana n’Imana: araheza ntiyaba akiboneka, kukw Imana imujanye." 
Genesis5:25 Metusela amaze imyaka ijana na mirongumunani n’indwi avyara Lameki. 
Genesis5:26 Metusela amaze kuvyara Lameki amara iyindi myaka amajana ndwi na mirongumunani n’ibiri, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’ abakobga." 
Genesis5:27 Imisi yose Metusela yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitandatu n’ icenda: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:28 Lameki amaze imyaka ijana na mirongumunani n’ibiri avyara umwana w’umuhungu: 
Genesis5:29 amwita Nowa, at’ Uyu azoturuhura mu bikorwa vyacu no mu butame bg’ amaboko yacu butewe n’iri vu Uhoraho yavumye." 
Genesis5:30 Lameki amaze kuvyara Nowa amara iyindi myaka amajana atanu na mirongwicenda n’itanu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis5:31 Imisi yose Lameki yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi n’indwi: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis5:32 Nowa amaze imyaka amajana atanu avyara Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti. 
Genesis6:1 Maz’ abantu batanguye kugwira kw isi, bavyara abakobga," 
Genesis6:2 abana b’Imana bitegereje abakobga b’abantu babona ari beza; barongora muri bo abo bitoranirije bose. 
Genesis6:3 Uhoraho aravuga, ati Mpwemu wanje ntazokwama aranyinyūrana n’umuntu ibihe vyose, kukw ar’ uw’ inyama gusa: nuko rer’ imisi yiwe izoba imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri." 
Genesis6:4 Mur’ ico gihe hār’ibigatanya mw isi, no mu gihe co hanyuma, abana b’Imana bamaze kurongora abakobga b’abantu, bakavyarana na bo abana: ni bo ba bahizi ba kera bābaye ba rurangiranwa." 
Genesis6:5 Nuk’ Uhoraho abona ibibi vy’abantu ingen’ ari vyinshi mw isi, kandi kw ivyiyumviro vy’imitima yabo vyamogoreye gukora ibibi gusa na ntaryo." 
Genesis6:6 Uhoraho yicuza ico yaremeye abantu mw isi, bimutera intuntu mu mutima." 
Genesis6:7 Uhoraho aravuga, at’ Abantu naremye nzobamara mw isi, uhereye ku muntu n’igikōko n’ icikwega n’ikiguruka mu kirere: kuko nicujije ico nabiremeye." 
Genesis6:8 Ariko Nowa we Uhoraho aramushima. 
Genesis6:9 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Nowa. Nowa yar’ umugororotsi, ntiyagira agasembga mu gihe c’urunganwe rwiwe: kandi Nowa yagendana n’ Imana." 
Genesis6:10 Yavyaye abahungu batatu, Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Kand’ isi yari yononekaye imbere y’Imana, yuzuye umuryano." 
Genesis6:12 Imana yitegereza isi, ibona ko yononekaye, kukw abari n’umubiri bose bo mw isi bāri bononye ingeso zabo." 
Genesis6:13 Imana ibarira Nowa, iti Ndamaramaje guherengeteza abari n’ umubiri bose, kukw isi yuzuye umuryano kubgabo; nuko nzobarandurana n’isi." 
Genesis6:14 Wibāzire ubgato mu biti vyitwa goferu, ubucemw’ utwumba, ubuhome ishīshi imbere n’inyuma." 
Genesis6:15 Uz’ ububāze urtya: uburebure bg’umurambararo bg’ubgo bgato buze bube amatambge amajana atatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, amakika na yo az’ abe amatambge mirongwitanu, uburebure bg’igihagararo buze bube amatambge mirongwitatu." 
Genesis6:16 Kand’ ubgo bgato uz’ ubuce amadirisha, az’ asigaze itambge rimwe kuva ku musozo ahahera hejuru; umuryango w’ubgo bgato na wo uz’ uwushire mu rubavu rwabgo; kand’ uz’ ugerekeranye utwo twumba gatatu: utwo hasi n’utwo hagati n’utwo hejuru." 
Genesis6:17 Maze nanje nzozana umwuzure w’amazi mw isi, ngo mperengeteze musi y’ijuru ibifise umubiri vyose, biri n’ubugingo bihumeka; ibiri mw isi vyose bizopfa." 
Genesis6:18 Ariko nzoshinga isezerano nzogusezeranira: uzokwinjirana mur’ubgo bgato n’ abana bawe n’umugore n’abakazana bawe. 
Genesis6:19 Kandi mu bgoko bgose bg’ibiri n’ubugingo bifise umubiri, uze winjize mur’ ubgo bgato bibiri‐bibiri, kugira ngo birokokane nawe; ivyo bibe ikigabo n’ikigore." 
Genesis6:20 Mu biguruka, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, no mu bitungano, nk’ ukw amoko yavyo ari, no mu vyikwega hasi vyose, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, bibiri‐bibiri vy’amoko yose bizoza ah’ uri, ngo birokoke." 
Genesis6:21 Kand’ uze wijanire mu biribga vyose, ubiziganye, kuko bizoba ivyo kubatunga, mwe n’ivyo muri kumwe." 
Genesis6:22 Nuko Nowa abigenza artyo: ukw Imana yamubariye kwose ni ko yakoze. 
Genesis7:1 Maz’ Uhoraho abgira Nowa, ati Ni mwinjire mu bgato, mwe n’abo mu nzu yawe bose; kuko mu runganwe rw’ubu ari wewe wenyene nabonye ugororotse imbere yanje." 
Genesis7:2 Mu bitungano vyose bitazira no mu bikōko vyose bitazira, utwaremw’ ibigabo ndwindwi n’ibigore ndwi‐ndwi vyavyo; mu bikōko bizira na ho, utwaremwo bibiri‐bibiri, ikigabo n’ikigore caco;" 
Genesis7:3 no mu biguruka mu kirere, utwaremw’ ibigabo ndwi‐ndwi n’ ibigore ndwi‐ndwi, kugira ng’uruvyaro rwavyo ruze rurokoke, rubone gusubira kubaho mw isi yose." 
Genesis7:4 Kukw imisi ndwi ishize, nzorekurira imvura kw isi imare imisi mirongwine igwa umurango n’ijoro, ibifise ubugingo vyose naremye ndabimare mw isi." 
Genesis7:5 Nuko Nowa abigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabimugeze vyose. 
Genesis7:6 Igihe umwuzure w’amazi waza kw isi, Nowa yar’ amaze imyaka amajana atandatu." 
Genesis7:7 Nowa aca yinjirana mur’ ubgo bgato n’abana biwe n’umugore wiwe n’abakazana biwe, ngw ahunge ayo mazi y’ umwuzure." 
Genesis7:8 Mu bitungano bitazira no mu bikōko bitazira, no mu bizira na vyo, no mu biguruka, no mu vyikwega hasi vyose," 
Genesis7:9 bibiri‐bibiri vyinjirana na Nowa mur’ ubgo bgato, ikigabo n’ikigore, nk’ ukw Imana yamugeze." 
Genesis7:10 Maz’ iyo misi ndwi ishize, amazi y’umwuzure asendanisha kw isi." 
Genesis7:11 Mu mwaka ugira amajana atandatu Nowa abayeho, mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku musi wakwo w’icumi n’indwi, amasōko yose y’i kuzimu arapumuka, ingomero zo mw ijuru zose ziragomororwa." 
Genesis7:12 Imvura imara imisi mirongwine igwa kw isi umurango n’ijoro. 
Genesis7:13 Kur’ uwo musi nyene Nowa yinjira mur’ubgo bgato, bo na Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti abana biwe, n’umugore wiwe, n’abakazana biwe ukw ari batatu;" 
Genesis7:14 binjirana n’ibikōko vyose nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ibitungano nk’ ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ivyikwega hasi vyose nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, n’ibiguruka mu kirere vyose nk’ ukw amoko yavyo ari, ibifise ivyubi vy’uburyo bgose." 
Genesis7:15 Vyinjirana na Nowa mu bgato, bibiri‐bibiri mu bifise umubiri vyose, biri n’ubugingo bihumeka." 
Genesis7:16 Ivyinjiye vyar’ ikigabo n’ikigore vyo mu bifise umubiri vyose, nk’ukw Imana yamugeze: maz’ Uhoraho amwugaranira imbere." 
Genesis7:17 Umwuzure umara kw isi imisi mirongwine, amazi aragāra, aterura bga bgato, buva kw isi burareremba." 
Genesis7:18 Amazi arīganza, yiyongeranya cane kugāra kw isi; maz’ ubgo bgato buzengerera hejuru ku mazi." 
Genesis7:19 Amazi arushiriza cane kwiganza kw isi, imisozi miremire yose yo musi y’ijuru iyo riva rikagera irarengerwa." 
Genesis7:20 Amazi arīganza asumba imisozi, ayirenga amatambge cumi n’atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Genesis7:21 Ibifise umubiri vyose bigenda kw isi birapfa, uhereye ku biguruka no ku bitungano no ku bikōko no ku vyikwega hasi vyose, no ku bantu bose." 
Genesis7:22 Ibihumeka impwemu z’ubugingo mu mazuru vyose, vyaba i musozi, birapfa." 
Genesis7:23 Ibifise ubugingo vyose biri kw isi biraherengetezwa, uhereye ku bantu no ku bitungano no ku vyikwega hasi no ku biguruka mu kirere: biherengetezwa kw isi; Nowa aba ari we asigara wenyene, bo n’ivyari kumwe na we muri bga bgato." 
Genesis7:24 Amazi amara imisi ijana na mirongwitanu yīganziye kw isi. 
Genesis8:1 Imana yibuka Nowa n’ibifise ubugingo vyose, n’ibitungano vyose vyari kumwe na we mu bgato: Imana ihūhīsha umuyaga kw isi, amazi atangura kugabanuka." 
Genesis8:2 Amasōko y’i kuzimu arazibirwa, n’ingomero zo mw ijuru ziragomerwa, imvura iva mw ijuru irabogozwa;" 
Genesis8:3 amazi agenda ahōka kw isi ubudasiba: ya misi ijana na mirongwitanu ishize, amazi atangura kugeruka." 
Genesis8:4 Mu kwezi kw’ indwi, ku musi wakwo w’icumi n’ indwi, bga bgato buhagarara ku misozi yo muri Ararati." 
Genesis8:5 Amazi agenda arageruka ubudasiba, gushitsa mu kwezi kw’icumi: mu kwezi kw’icumi, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, udutwe tw’ imisozi turaboneka." 
Genesis8:6 Imisi mirongwine ishize, Nowa yugurura idirisha ry’ubgato yabāje;" 
Genesis8:7 arekura igikōna, kiragenda kirajarajara gushitsa aho amazi yakamiye kw isi." 
Genesis8:8 Maz’ arekura inuma kugira ngw amenye kw amazi yoba agabanutse kw isi. 
Genesis8:9 Maze ntiyabona aho ishinga ikirenge, imugarukako mu bgato, kukw amazi yar’agikwiye kw isi yose: atuma ukuboko arayifata, ayizana mu bgato." 
Genesis8:10 Asiba iyindi misi ndwi, yongera kurekura iyo numa ngw ive mu bgato;" 
Genesis8:11 igaruka kuri we ku mugoroba, ifise akababi kabisi k’umwelayo mu kanwa. Nuko Nowa aca amenya kw amazi agabanutse kw isi." 
Genesis8:12 Asība iyindi misi ndwi, arekura iyo numa, ntiyasubira kumugarukak’ ukundi." 
Genesis8:13 Maze mu mwaka w’amajana atandatu na rimwe, mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, amazi akama kw isi. Nowa akūrah’ igisakaye ubgo bgato, aritegereza, abona isi yūmūtse." 
Genesis8:14 Mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri n’ indwi, isi irūma." 
Genesis8:15 Imana ibarira Nowa," 
Genesis8:16 iti Sohoka mu bgato, mwe n’umugore wawe n’abana bawe n’abakazana bawe." 
Genesis8:17 Kand’ usohokane ibiri n’ubugingo vyose bifise umubiri, biri kumwe nawe, ibiguruka n’ibitungano n’ivyikwega hasi vyose, kugira ngo bisegenyukire cane mw isi, birondoke, bigwirire mw isi." 
Genesis8:18 Nuko Nowa arasohoka, bo n’ abana biwe n’umugore wiwe n’ abakazana biwe," 
Genesis8:19 n’ibitungano n’ibikōko vyose n’ivyikwega hasi n’ibiguruka vyose, mbere n’ibigenda kw isi vyose, nk’ukw amoko yavyo ari, birasohoka biva mur’ ubgo bgato." 
Genesis8:20 Maze Nowa yubakira Uhoraho igicaniro, yābīra mu bitungano vyose no mu bikōko vyose bitazira, no mu biguruka vyose bitazira, abitangira kur’ ico gicaniro kw ibimazi vyo kwoswa." 
Genesis8:21 Uhoraho amoterwa n’umubabge mwiza wavyo, maz’ Uhoraho yiyumvira mu mutima wiwe, ati Sinzokwongera kuvuma isi ukundi kubg’ abantu, kukw imitima y’abantu yamogoreye gukora ibibi uhereye mu bgana bgabo: kandi sinzokwongera kwica ukundi ibifise ubugingo vyose, nk’uko nakoze." 
Genesis8:22 Isi ikiriho, ibiba n’iyimbura, n’imbeho n’ubushuhe, n’ici n’agatāsi, n’umurango n’ijoro ntibizovaho." 
Genesis9:1 Maz’ Imana ihezagira Nowa n’ abana biwe, irababarira, iti Ni murondoke, mugwire, mwuzure isi." 
Genesis9:2 Ibikōko vyose vyo mw isi n’ibiguruka mu kirere vyose muzobitera ubgoba, bizobatinya; murabihawe, bo n’ibinyagara kw isi vyose, n’amafi yose yo mu kiyaga." 
Genesis9:3 Kand’ ibigenda vyose bifise ubugingo bizoba ivyo kurya vyanyu, mbibahaye vyose, nk’uko nabahaye ibimera bitotahaye." 
Genesis9:4 Ariko ntimukarye inyama zikirimw’ ubugingo bgazo, ni bgo maraso yazo." 
Genesis9:5 Kand’ amaraso yanyu, ari bgo bugingo bganyu, sinzobura kuyahōra: ar’ igikōko cose, ar’ umuntu, nzoyabihōra: ubugingo bg’umuntu nzobuhōra mugenzi we wese yabikoze." 
Genesis9:6 Ūzovisha amaraso y’ umuntu, n’ayiwe azovishwa n’abandi: kuk’ umuntu namuremye mw ishusho yanje, jewe Imana." 
Genesis9:7 Nuko namwe, ni murondoke, mugwire, muvyarire cane kw isi, muyigwiriremwo." 
Genesis9:8 Imana ibarira Nowa n’abana biwe," 
Genesis9:9 iti Rāba jewe ubganje nshinze isezerano mbasezeraniye, mwe n’uruvyaro rwanyu ruzobakomōkako," 
Genesis9:10 n’ibifise ubugingo vyose biri kumwe namwe, ibiguruka n’ibitungano n’ibikōko vyo kw isi muri kumwe: ek’ ibisohotse mu bgato vyose, ibikōko vyose vyo kw isi." 
Genesis9:11 Nuko nshinze isezerano mbasezeraniye: ibifise umubiri vyose ntibizosubira kurandurwa n’amazi y’umwuzure ukundi, kandi ntihazobah’ umwuzure wo gutikiza isi ukundi." 
Genesis9:12 Imana iravuga, it’ Iki ni co kimenyamenya c’isezerano mbasezeraniye, mwe n’ibifise ubugingo vyose muri kumwe, uk’ urunganwe rwanyu ruzogenda rukurikirana gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Genesis9:13 Nshize umuheto wanje ku gicu, ni wo munywamazi, uzoba ikimenyamenya c’isezerano nsezeraniye isi." 
Genesis9:14 Nuk’ uko nzozana igicu hejuru y’isi, uwo muheto w’umunywamazi uzobonekera kuri co," 
Genesis9:15 nanje nzokwibuka iryo sezerano ryanje nshize hagati yanje namwe bo n’ibiri n’ ubugingo vyose bifise umubiri: kand’ amazi ntazokwongera ukundi kuba umwuzure wo guhonnya ibifise umubiri vyose. 
Genesis9:16 Nuk’ uwo munywamazi ubaye ku gicu, nanje nzowitegereza nibuke iryo sezerano ry’intahava riri hagati yanje n’ibiri n’ubugingo bifise umubiri vyose biri kw isi." 
Genesis9:17 Imana ibarira Nowa, it’ Ico ni co kimenyamenya c’isezerano nashinze hagati yanje n’ibiri n’umubiri vyose biri kw isi." 
Genesis9:18 Bene Nowa bāsohotse mu bgato ni Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti: Hamu ni we se wa Kanani. 
Genesis9:19 Abo, ukw ari batatu, ni bo Nowa yavyāye: ni bo bākomōtsweko n’ abakwiye isi yose." 
Genesis9:20 Nowa atangura kurima, atera uruzabibu:" 
Genesis9:21 anywa vino y’izo nzabibu, araborerwa; impuzu zimuvako ari mw ihema ryiwe." 
Genesis9:22 Hamu, se wa Kanani, abona ubgambure bga se, abibarira bene nyina bompi bari hanze." 
Genesis9:23 Shemu na Yafeti bābīra umwambaro, bawukika ku bitugu vyabo bompi, bagenza imigongo, bapfuka ubgambure bga se: kand’ amaso yabo, kuko yar’ aroye irya, ntibabona ubgambure bga se." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa vino imuvuyeko, amenya ivyo umuhungu wiwe muto yamukoreye." 
Genesis9:25 Aravuga, ati Kanani abaye ikivume! Azoba umuja w’abaja kuri bene nyina." 
Genesis9:26 Kand’ at’ Uhoraho aragahezagirwa, ni yo Mana ya Shemu; Kanani we n’abe umuja wiwe." 
Genesis9:27 Imana yāgurire Yafeti, Abe mu mahema ya Shemu; Kanani we n’abe umuja wiwe." 
Genesis9:28 Wa mwuzure uhise, Nowa amara imyaka amajana atatu na mirongwitanu." 
Genesis9:29 Imisi yose Nowa yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana cenda na mirongwitanu: araheza arapfa. 
Genesis10:1 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa bene Nowa, ni bo Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti: bavyaye abana, wa mwuzure uvuyeho." 
Genesis10:2 Aba Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi na Yavani na Tubali na Mesheki na Tirasi. 
Genesis10:3 Aba Gomeri ni Ashikenazi na Rifati na Togaruma. 
Genesis10:4 Aba Yavani ni Elisha na Tarushishi na Kitimu na Dodanimu. 
Genesis10:5 Abo ni bo bandurutsweko n’amahanga aba ku kiyaga, umuntu wese nk’uk’ ururimi rwabo rumeze, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amahanga yabo ari." 
Genesis10:6 Aba Hamu ni Kushi na Misirayimu na Puti na Kanani. 
Genesis10:7 Aba Kushi ni Seba na Havila na Sabuta na Rama na Sabuteka; aba Rama ni Sheba na Dedani. 
Genesis10:8 Kandi Kushi yavyaye na Nimurodi: ni we wa mbere yabaye cihabugabo mw isi. 
Genesis10:9 Yar’ umuhigi w’agahebuza imbere y’Uhoraho, bituma acibgakw akagani, ngo Ni nka Nimurodi, yar’ umuhīgi w’agahebuza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Genesis10:10 Ubgami bgiwe bga mbere bgagarukira i Babeli no muri Ereki no muri Akadi n’i Kalune, mu gihugu c’i Shinari." 
Genesis10:11 Yāgāmba ico gihugu, ashika muri Ashuri, yubaka i Ninewe n’i Rehobot‐Iru n’i Kala," 
Genesis10:12 n’i Reseni hari hagati y’i Ninewe n’i Kala (ni co ca gisagara kinini). 
Genesis10:13 Misirayimu yakomōtsweko n’Abaludi n’Abanami n’ Abalehabi n’Abanafutuhi 
Genesis10:14 n’ Abapatirusi n’Abakasiluhi (ni bo bākomōtsweko n’Abafilisitiya), kandi yakomōtsweko n’Abakafutori." 
Genesis10:15 Kanani yavyaye imfura yiwe Sidoni, akurikizako Heti:" 
Genesis10:16 kandi Kanani ni we yakomōtsweko n’Abayebusi n’Abamori n’Abagirugashi 
Genesis10:17 n’Abahiwi n’Abaruki n’Abasini 
Genesis10:18 n’Abaruvadi n’Abasemari n’Abahamati: hanyuma imiryango y’Abanyakanani igenda irakwira. 
Genesis10:19 Urugabano rw’Abanyakanani rwahēra i Sidoni, rukagenda rurābana n’i Gerari, rugashika i Gaza: rukagenda rurābana n’i Sodomu n’i Gomora n’i Adima n’i Seboyimu, rukagarukira i Lesha." 
Genesis10:20 Urwo ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Hamu, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw indimi zabo ziri, nk’ukw ibihugu vyabo biri, nk’ ukw amahanga yabo ari." 
Genesis10:21 Na Shemu, mukuru wa Yafeti, na we avyara abana; kandi ni we yakomōtsweko n’uruvyaro rwose rwa Eberi." 
Genesis10:22 Aba Shemu ni Elamu na Ashuri na Arupakisadi na Ludi na Aramu. 
Genesis10:23 Aba Aramu ni Uzi na Huli na Geteri na Mashi. 
Genesis10:24 Arupakisadi yavyaye Shela; Shela yavyaye Eberi. 
Genesis10:25 Eberi yavyaye abahungu babiri: umwe yitwa Pelegi, kuko mu gihe ciwe ari ho isi yagabanganirijwe; murumuna we yitwa Yokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Yokitani yavyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu na Hasarumaweti na Yera 
Genesis10:27 na Hadoramu na Uzalu na Dikila 
Genesis10:28 na Obalu na Abimayeli na Sheba 
Genesis10:29 na Ofiru na Havila na Yobabu; abo bose ni bene Yokitani. 
Genesis10:30 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Mesha, kikagenda kirābana n’i Sefaru, gushitsa ku musozi w’i burasirazuba." 
Genesis10:31 Abo ni bo ruvyaro rwa Shemu, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw indimi zabo ziri, uko bari mu bihugu vyabo, nk’ukw amahanga yabo ari." 
Genesis10:32 Iyo ni yo miryango ya bene Nowa, nk’uko yagiye ivyarirana, ukw amahanga yabo ari: kand’ amahanga yabakomōtseko ni yo yakwiye isi yose, wa mwuzure uvuyeho." 
Genesis11:1 Abo mw isi yose bari bafise ururimi rumwe n’ukuvuga kumwe. 
Genesis11:2 Nuko bariko baragenda berekeye i burasirazuba, babona ikiyaya mu gihugu c’i Shinari; bagerēraho." 
Genesis11:3 Baravugana, bati Ngo tubumbe amatafari, tuyaturire neza. Nuko bakoresha amatafari mu gishingo c’amabuye, na kaburimbi mu gishingo c’ubudongo." 
Genesis11:4 Baravuga, bati Ngo twiyubakire igisagara, n’umunara uz’ ushikīre ijuru, kugira ngo twironkere izina rya rurangiranwa, twoye gusābagira mw isi yose." 
Genesis11:5 Maz’ Uhoraho amanukanwa no kurāba ico gisagara n’uwo munara, abana b’abantu bubatse." 
Genesis11:6 Uhoraho aravuga, ati Rāba n’ihanga rimwe, kandi bose basangiye ururimi rumwe; non’ iki ni co batanguye gukora: erega nta kizobananira noneho ku co bazogabira gukora cose." 
Genesis11:7 Nuko ngo tumanuke tuyoberanye ururimi rwabo, boye kwumvikana mu kuvuga kwabo." 
Genesis11:8 Nuk’ Uhoraho abasābagiriza mw isi yose: baca baheba kwubaka ca gisagara. 
Genesis11:9 Ni co catumye izina ryaco citwa Babeli; kukw ari h’Uhoraho yayoberanirije ururimi rw’abo mw isi yose; kand’ ari h’Uhoraho yabasābagirije mw isi yose. 
Genesis11:10 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Shemu. Shemu amaze imyaka ijana avyara Arupakisadi, wa mwuzure umaze imyaka ibiri uhavuye." 
Genesis11:11 Shemu amaze kuvyara Arupakisadi, amara imyaka amajana atanu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’ abakobga." 
Genesis11:12 Arupakisadi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’itanu avyara Shela: 
Genesis11:13 Arupakisadi amaze kuvyara Shela, amara imyaka amajana ane n’iyindi itatu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis11:14 Shela amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Eberi. 
Genesis11:15 Shela amaze kuvyara Eberi, amara imyaka amajana ane n’iyindi itatu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis11:16 Eberi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ine avyara Pelegi. 
Genesis11:17 Eberi amaze kuvyara Pelegi, amara imyaka amajana ane na mirongwitatu, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis11:18 Pelegi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Reyu. 
Genesis11:19 Pelegi amaze kuvyara Reyu, amara imyaka amajana abiri n’icenda, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis11:20 Reyu amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ibiri avyara Serugi. 
Genesis11:21 Reyu amaze kuvyara Serugi, amara imyaka amajana abiri n’ indwi, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’ abakobga." 
Genesis11:22 Serugi amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avyara Nahori. 
Genesis11:23 Serugi amaze kuvyara Nahori, amara imyaka amajana abiri, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’icenda avyara Tera. 
Genesis11:25 Nahori amaze kuvyara Tera, amara imyaka ijana n’icumi n’ icenda, ayivyaramw’ abahungu n’ abakobga." 
Genesis11:26 Tera amaze imyaka mirongwirindwi avyara Aburamu na Nahori na Harani. 
Genesis11:27 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Tera: Tera yavyaye Aburamu na Nahori na Harani; Harani yavyaye Loti. 
Genesis11:28 Harani apfira mu gihugu yavukiyemwo, ahitwa Uri i Bukaludaya, se Tera akiriho." 
Genesis11:29 Aburamu na Nahori bararongora: muka Aburamu yitwa Sarayi, muka Nahori yitwa Miluka, mwene Harani, Harani se wa Miluka na Yisika." 
Genesis11:30 Sarayi yar’ intavyara, ntiyagira umwana." 
Genesis11:31 Tera ajana Aburamu umwana wiwe, na Loti mwene Harani umwuzukuru wiwe, na Sarayi umukazana wiwe, muka Aburamu umwana wiwe; bava muri Uri i Bukaludaya ngo baje mu gihugu c’i Kanani; bashika i Harani, bagerēraho." 
Genesis11:32 Imisi Tera yamaze yabaye imyaka amajana abiri n’iyindi itanu: Tera araheza apfira i Harani. 
Genesis12:1 Uhoraho abarira Aburamu, ati Va mu gihugu canyu, no mu muryango wanyu, no mu nzu ya so, uje mu gihugu nzokwereka." 
Genesis12:2 Nanje nzoguhindura ubgoko bukomeye, nzoguha umugisha, izina ryawe ndarigire rurangiranwa; n’abandi baze bagire umugisha kubgawe." 
Genesis12:3 Abazoguhezagira nzobahezagira, kand’ ūzokuvuma nzomuvuma: kandi muri wewe ni ho imiryango yose yo mw isi izohērwa umugisha." 
Genesis12:4 Nuko Aburamu aragenda, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho amubariye; Loti ajana na we. Aburamu yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwirindwi n’itanu igihe yava i Harani." 
Genesis12:5 Aburamu ajana Sarayi umugore wiwe na Loti umuhungwabo, n’itunga ryabo ryose bari batungiye i Harani, bo n’abantu bāronkeyeyo; bavaho ngo baje mu gihugu c’i Kanani; nuko bashika i Kanani nyene." 
Genesis12:6 Aburamu adwēbēra ico gihugu, ashika ahantu hitwa i Shekemu, ku giti c’umweloni ca More. Ico gihe Abanyakanani ni bo bāba mur’ ico gihugu." 
Genesis12:7 Uhoraho yiyereka Aburamu, aramubarira, at’ Uruvyaro rwawe nzoruha iki gihugu. Aca ahubaka igicaniro, yubakiye Uhoraho amwiyeretse." 
Genesis12:8 Arikora avayo, aja ku musozi wo ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba rw’i Beteli, ahashinga amahema; i Beteli hasigara i burengerazuba bgiwe, i Hayi hakaba i burasirazuba bgiwe: na ho nyene ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro, yambaza izina ryiwe." 
Genesis12:9 Nuko Aburamu akomeza kugenda aratāhīra, yerekeye i Negebu." 
Genesis12:10 Maz’ inzara itera mur’ ico gihugu: nuko Aburamu aramanuka, aja muri Egiputa, ngw asuhukireyo, kukw inzara yari nyinshi mur’ ico gihugu." 
Genesis12:11 Ari hafi gushika muri Egiputa, abarira Sarayi umugore wiwe, at’ Umve ndazi k’ur’ umugore w’igikundiro:" 
Genesis12:12 nukw Abanyegiputa ni bakubona, bazovuga, bat’ Uyo n’umugore wiwe, baheze banyice, nawe bakureke." 
Genesis12:13 Ndakwinginze, uz’ uvuge k’uri mushikanje, kugira ngo ndābge neza kubgawe, ubugingo bganje ubukirishe ivy’ uvuze." 
Genesis12:14 Nuko Aburamu ashitse muri Egiputa, Abanyegiputa babona yuk’ uwo mugore ari mwiza cane." 
Genesis12:15 Abamenyekana ba Farawo bamubonye, bamushimira Farawo: nuk’ uwo mugore ajanwa kwa Farawo." 
Genesis12:16 Farawo agirira Aburamu neza kubg’ uwo, aharonkera intama n’ inka n’indogoba z’amapfizi n’abagurano b’abahungu n’abakobga n’indogoba zivyara n’ingamiya." 
Genesis12:17 Uhoraho ateza Farawo ivyago bihambaye, bo n’urugo rwiwe, amuhōra Sarayi muka Aburamu." 
Genesis12:18 Maze Farawo ahamagaza Aburamu, aramubaza, at’ Ico wankoreye ico n’iki? k’utāmbariye kw ar’umugore wawe?" 
Genesis12:19 N’iki catumye uvuga kw ari mushikawe? nanje nkamujana nkamugira umugore wanje: nuko nguyo umugore wawe, mujane wīgīre." 
Genesis12:20 Farawo abarira abantu kumuherekeza, bamuherekezanya n’umugore wiwe n’ivyo yar’ afise vyose." 
Genesis13:1 Aburamu aradūga ava muri Egiputa, bo n’umugore wiwe n’ivyiwe vyose, na Loti ajana na we, baja i Negebu." 
Genesis13:2 Kandi Aburamu yar’ umutunzi cane w’amasho n’imikuku n’amafeza n’amazahabu. 
Genesis13:3 Nukw agenda aratāhīra, ava i Negebu arinda ashika i Beteli, ha hantu yashinze ihema ryiwe ubga mbere, hagati y’i Beteli n’i Hayi," 
Genesis13:4 hamwe hahora igicaniro yubatse ubga mbere: Aburamu yambarizay’ izina ry’Uhoraho. 
Genesis13:5 Kandi na Loti yagendana na Aburamu na we yar’ afise imikuku n’amasho n’amahema. 
Genesis13:6 Ico gihugu nticabakwira ngo babangikane, kukw itunga ryabo ryari ryinshi, bituma badashobora kubangikana." 
Genesis13:7 Haba intonganya hagati y’abungere ba Aburamu n’abungere ba Loti; kand’ ico gihe Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi ni bo bāba mur’ ico gihugu. 
Genesis13:8 Aburamu abarira Loti, ati Ndakwinginze, hoye kuba intonganya hagati yanje nawe, no hagati y’abungere banje n’abawe, kuko tuvukana." 
Genesis13:9 Ereg’ igihugu cose kir’ imbere yawe! Ndakwinginze ngo duhāne inta: ni wahitamwo kuja i bumoso nanje ndaja i buryo; ni waja i buryo ndaja i bumoso. 
Genesis13:10 Loti yunamura amaso, yitegereza ikiyaya cose co kuri Yorodani, abona ko har’ibigera vy’amazi hose. Uhoraho atararandura Sodomu na Gomora, ico kiyaya cari kimeze nka rya tongo ry’ Uhoraho, canke nk’ igihugu ca Egiputa ugiye werekeye i Sowari." 
Genesis13:11 Nuko Loti ahitamw’ ico kiyaya cose co kuri Yorodani; aragenda aja i burasirazuba, bahāna inta." 
Genesis13:12 Aburamu aba mu gihugu c’i Kanani, Loti aba mu bisagara vyo muri ca kiyaya, agenda arunguruza amahema arinda ashika i Sodomu." 
Genesis13:13 Kand’ Abanyesodomu bār’ abanyavyaha, bacumura k’Uhoraho birengeje urugero." 
Genesis13:14 Loti amaze gutandukana na Aburamu, Uhoraho abarira Aburamu, at’ Unamura amaso yawe, uhēre ah’ uhagaze aho, witegereze i burārūko n’i bumanuko n’i burasirazuba n’i burengerazuba:" 
Genesis13:15 iki gihugu cose ubonye ni wewe nzogiha, n’uruvyaro rwawe, gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Genesis13:16 Kandi nzogwiza uruvyaro rwawe rungane n’umukungugu wo hasi: namb’ umuntu yoshobora guharūra umukungugu wo hasi, n’uruvyaro rwawe na rwo rwoharūrwa." 
Genesis13:17 Va hasi, ugēndūre iki gihugu iyo kiva kikagera, kukw ari wewe nzogiha." 
Genesis13:18 Aburamu yunguruza amahema, aragenda, aba i ruhande y’ibiti vya Mamure vyitwa imyeloni, bir’ i Heburoni, ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro." 
Genesis14:1 Mu gihe ca Amurafeli umwami w’i Shinari, na Ariyoki umwami w’i Elasari, na Kedolawoma umwami w’i Elamu, na Tidali umwami w’i Goyimu," 
Genesis14:2 abo bami bāteye Bera umwami w’i Sodomu na Birusha umwami w’i Gomora, na Shinabu umwami w’i Adima, na Shemeberi umwami w’i Seboyimu, n’umwami w’i Bela (ari ho Sowari)." 
Genesis14:3 Abo bose bakoranira hamwe mu kiyaya c’i Sidimu (ni ho habaye Ikiyaga c’ Umunyu). 
Genesis14:4 Bari bamaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri baganzwa na Kedolawoma, maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatatu baragarariza." 
Genesis14:5 Nuko mu mwaka ugira icumi na kane Kedolawoma n’abami bīfatanije na we ni kwo kuza, bazingazingira Abarefa muri Ashiteroti‐karunayimu, n’Abasuzi i Hamu, n’Abemi i Shave‐kiriyatayimu," 
Genesis14:6 n’Abahori babazingazingira i wabo mu mugamba i Seyiri, barabakinagiza babashitsa Eliparani hahereranye n’ubugaragwa." 
Genesis14:7 Barakevya, bashika Eni‐mishipati (ari h’i Kadeshi), bazingazinga igihugu cose c’Abamaleki, bo n’ Abamori baba i Hasasoni‐tamari." 
Genesis14:8 Maz’ umwami w’i Sodomu arashikuka, bo n’uw’i Gomora n’uw’i Adima n’uw’i Seboyimu n’uw’i Bela (ari ho Sowari); batondera urugamba mu kiyaya c’i Sidimu;" 
Genesis14:9 barwanya Kedolawoma umwami w’i Elamu, na Tidali umwami w’i Goyimu, na Amurafeli umwami w’i Shinari, na Ariyoki umwami w’i Elasari; abo bami ukw ari bane barwanya batanu." 
Genesis14:10 Kand’ ico kiyaya c’i Sidimu cari cuzuye ivyobo vyimbgemwo kaburimbi, maz’ ingabo z’abami b’i Sodomu n’i Gomora zirahunga, zimwe zibikorokeramwo, izisigaye zihungira ku musozi muremure." 
Genesis14:11 Basahura ibintu vyose vy’i Sodomu n’i Gomora, n’ivyo bāzigak’ uburamuko vyose, barīgīra." 
Genesis14:12 Bahitana na Loti umuhungwabo wa Aburamu, yaba i Sodomu, hamwe n’ibintu vyiwe, baraheza barīgīra." 
Genesis14:13 Haza umwe mu bahunze, abibarira Aburamu Umuheburayo: yaba i ruhande y’ibiti vy’imyeloni vy’Umwamori yitwa Mamure, mwene wabo wa Eshikoli na Aneri; kand’ abo bari bifatanije na Aburamu." 
Genesis14:14 Aburamu yumvise yuk’ uw’ i wabo yafashwe mpiri, ajana abanyarugo biwe bize kurwana, bāvukiye i we, amajana atatu n’icumi n’umunani, barabakurikira, babahambiriza i Dani." 
Genesis14:15 Aburamu ahenga mw ijoro, abantu biwe abacamw’ ibico, barabatera barabanesha, barabakinagiza gushitsa i Hoba, ahahera i bumoso bg’i Damasiko." 
Genesis14:16 Agarura ibintu vyose, agarura n’uw’i wabo Loti, n’ibintu vyiwe, n’abagore n’abakobga na bo, n’abandi bantu." 
Genesis14:17 Atabarutse, avuye kunesha Kedolawoma n’abandi bami bāri kumwe, umwami w’i Sodomu amusanganirira mu kiyaya c’i Shave, (ni co kiyaya c’umwami)." 
Genesis14:18 Kandi Melekisedeki umwami w’i Salemu, umuherezi w’Imana Isumba vyose, azana imitsima na vino." 
Genesis14:19 Ahezagira Aburamu, at’ Uragahabga umugisha n’Imana Isumba vyose, Nyen’ ijuru n’isi:" 
Genesis14:20 kand’ Imana Isumba vyose iragahezagirwa, yagushize abansi mu maboko! Nuko Aburamu amuha ikigiracumi muri vyose." 
Genesis14:21 Umwami w’i Sodomu abarira Aburamu, ati Ndekerana abantu, ibintu ubitware." 
Genesis14:22 Aburamu yishura umwami w’i Sodomu, ati Narahiye Uhoraho mmanitse ukuboko, ni we Mana Isumba vyose, Nyen’ ijuru n’isi," 
Genesis14:23 yuko ntazogira ikintu na kimwe co mu vyawe ntwara, naho koba akanyuzi cank’ akagozi k’inkweto, kugira ngo ntuz’ uvuge, uti Ni jewe natungishije Aburamu." 
Genesis14:24 Jeho nta co ngomba, atar’ impamba abantu banje bariye, n’abo twatabaranye ubagabanganye imigabane yabo, ni bo Aneri na Eshikoli na Mamure, bo ni bajane imigabane yabo." 
Genesis15:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, ijambo ry’ Uhoraho riza kuri Aburamu nko mu nzozi, riti Aburamu, nta co utinya: ni jewe nkinzo yawe, uzohabga impēra ikomeye cane." 
Genesis15:2 Aburamu aramubaza, ati Mwami Uhoraho, uzompa iki, ko ngiye gupfa ata kana nsize, kand’ ūzotorana urugo rwanje akaba ari Eliyezeri Umunyadamasiko?" 
Genesis15:3 Arongera, at’ Erega nta ruvyaro wampaye, kand’ umunyarugo yavukiye i wanje ni we azotora ivyanje." 
Genesis15:4 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kuza kuri we, rit’ Uyo si we azotora ivyawe, arik’ ūzova mu kara kawe ni we azobitora." 
Genesis15:5 Amusohokana hanze, aramubgira, ati Rangamiza, urābe mw ijuru, uharūre inyenyeri, namba woshobora kuziharūra. At’ Uruvyaro rwawe ni ko ruzongana." 
Genesis15:6 Yizera Uhoraho, Uhoraho abimuharūrako nk’ ukugororoka." 
Genesis15:7 Aramubarira, ati Ni jewe Uhoraho nagukūye muri Uri i Bukaludaya kugira ngo nze nguhe iki gihugu ucegukire." 
Genesis15:8 Aramubaza, ati Mwami Uhoraho, icommenyesha yuko nzocegukira n’iki?" 
Genesis15:9 Aramwishura, at’ Abīra inka y’ishashi imaze imyaka itatu, n’impene ivyara imaze imyaka itatu, n’impfizi y’intama imaze imyaka itatu nyene, n’intunguru imwe n’icana c’inuma." 
Genesis15:10 Yābīra ivyo vyose, abihimburamwo kubiri‐kubiri, igihimba cose agitumberanya na kigenzi caco: arikw inyoni zo ntiyazihimbagura." 
Genesis15:11 Ibisīga vy’amērwe ngo bigwe kur’ iyo mivyimba, Aburamu akabigurura." 
Genesis15:12 Ku kirengazuba, Aburamu itiro riramuhwikira, asinzira ubutikoma; maz’ ubgoba butewe n’ umwiza w’umuzitanya buramufata." 
Genesis15:13 Uhoraho abarira Aburamu, at’ Umenye neza yuk’ uruvyaro rwawe ruzoba inyambukīra mu gihugu kitar’ icabo, kandi bazokorera bene co, na bo bazobagirira nabi imyaka amajana ane;" 
Genesis15:14 maz’ iryo hanga bazokorera nzoricirakw iteka: arikw amaherezo bazorivamwo, bakūyey’ ubutunzi bginshi." 
Genesis15:15 Ariko weho uzohamvya ba sogokuruza amahoro, uzohambga wisāziye neza." 
Genesis15:16 Kand’ abuzukururuza b’abazojayo ni bo bazogaruka ino: kuko kugabitanya kw’ Abamori kutaruzura. 
Genesis15:17 Maz’ izuba rirenze, bumaze gukorana, haboneka ikibengebenge c’umuriro gipfūndūka umwotsi n’ urumuri rwaka, bica hagati y’ivyo bihimba." 
Genesis15:18 Kur’ uwo musi nyene Uhoraho asezeranira Aburamu isezerano, at’ Uhereye ku ruzi rwo muri Egiputa, ugashitsa ku ruzi runini ari rwo Efurate, uruvyaro rwawe ndaruhaye iki gihugu," 
Genesis15:19 ari co c’Abanyakeni n’ic’ Abakenizi n’ic’ Abakadimoni," 
Genesis15:20 n’ic’ Abaheti n’ic’ Abaferizi n’ic’ Abarefa," 
Genesis15:21 n’ic’ Abamori n’ic’ Abanyakanani n’ic’ Abagirugashi n’ic’ Abayebusi. 
Genesis16:1 Sarayi muka Aburamu ntiyari yaravyaye, kandi yar’ afise incoreke y’Umunyegiputakazi yitwa Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi abarira Aburamu, ati Rāba, Uhoraho yanyimye ivyara; enda vyara ku ncoreke yanje: kumbure nzoronkera akana kuri we. Nuko Aburamu yumvira Sarayi." 
Genesis16:3 Aburamu amaze imyaka cumi mu gihugu c’i Kanani, Sarayi umugore wiwe yābīra Hagari Umunyegiputakazi incoreke yiwe, amuha Aburamu umugabo wiwe." 
Genesis16:4 Nukw arārira Hagari, asama inda: maz’ abonye kw asamye inda, bimutera gukēngēra inabuja." 
Genesis16:5 Sarayi abarira Aburamu, at’ Aka gakēngērwe nkēngerewe kazoba ku mutwe wawe! Ko nashize incoreke yanje mu gikiriza cawe, maz’ ibonye kw ifise inda ica irankēngēra! Uhoraho n’aducire urubanza twe nawe!" 
Genesis16:6 Aburamu yishura Sarayi, at’ Ereg’ incoreke yawe ni wewe uyigaba ukayiganza: n’umugire uk’ugomba kwose. Nuko Sarayi amukoresha agatuzo, araruha aramuhunga." 
Genesis16:7 Umumarayika asanga ageze i ruhande y’isōko y’amazi mu bugaragwa, ni yo sōko iherereye ku nzira ija i Shura." 
Genesis16:8 Aramubaza, ati Hagari, ncoreke ya Sarayi, uva he ukaja he? Aramwishura, ati Mpunze mabuja Sarayi." 
Genesis16:9 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho aramubgira, ati Subira kwa nyokobuja, uce bugufi musi yiwe." 
Genesis16:10 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho atakw aramubgira, ati Nzosegenyura cane uruvyaro rwawe, bitume rutoharūrika kubgo kuba isinzi." 
Genesis16:11 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho arongera aramubgira, ati Rāba ufise inda, uzovyara umuhungu, kand’ uz’ umwite Ishimayeli, kuk’ Uhoraho yumvise kubabazwa kwawe." 
Genesis16:12 Mu bandi bantu azomera nk’indogoba y’inyeshamba, azohanga abantu bose, na we ahangwe na bose; azopfa aho yishingiye amahema yo gusita bene wabo bose." 
Genesis16:13 Uhoraho avuganye na we, Hagari amwita izina, at’ Ur’ Indavyi; ati Mbeg’ aha hantu koko ndahaboneye Iyimbona?" 
Genesis16:14 Ni co catumye iryo riba ryitwa Iriba ry’i Lahayi‐royi; riri hagati y’i Kadeshi n’i Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari avyarana na Aburamu umwana w’ umuhungu: Aburamu yita umwana wiwe yavyaranye na Hagari Ishimayeli. 
Genesis16:16 Aburamu yar’ amaze imyaka mirongumunani n’ itandatu igihe Hagari yavyarana na we Ishimayeli. 
Genesis17:1 Aburamu amaze imyaka mirongwicenda n’icenda, Uhoraho aramubonekera, aramubarira, ati Ni jewe Mana Ishobora vyose; uhore ugendera imbere yanje, kand’ utungane rwose." 
Genesis17:2 Nanje ngusezeraniye isezerano, nzokugwiza cane." 
Genesis17:3 Aburamu arapfukama, arūnama, Imana iramubgira," 
Genesis17:4 iti Rāba jewe ubganje ndagusezeraniye isezerano: uzoba sekuruza w’amahanga menshi. 
Genesis17:5 Kandi ntucitwa Aburamu ukundi, arik’ uzokwitwa Aburahamu; kuko nkugize sekuruza w’amahanga menshi." 
Genesis17:6 Kandi nzoguha kurondoka cane, nzotuma amahanga agukomōkako, n’abami bazokwandurukako." 
Genesis17:7 Kandi nshinze isezerano ryanje ngusezeraniye, wewe n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzovuka hanyuma, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana, ribe isezerano ridashira, kugira ngo nkubere Imana, wewe n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzovuka hanyuma." 
Genesis17:8 Kandi wewe n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzovuka hanyuma, nzobaha iki gihugu wabayemw’ ur’ inyambukīra, ni co gihugu cose c’i Kanani, kuba ishamvu y’ibihe vyose: na bo nzoba Imana yabo." 
Genesis17:9 Imana itakw ibarira Aburahamu, iti Nawe uz’ ushitse isezerano ryanje, wewe n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzovuka hanyuma, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Genesis17:10 Iri ni ryo sezerano ryanje muzokwama mushitsa, riri hagati yanje namwe n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzovuka hanyuma: izinamuhungu wese muri mwebge az’ akebge." 
Genesis17:11 Muze mukebge ku munwa w’ico mwambariye; kizoba ikimenyetso c’ isezerano riri hagati yanje namwe. 
Genesis17:12 Ūmaze imisi munani avutse az’ akebge, izinamuhungu wese, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, ar’ ūvukiye mu rugo rwawe, ar’ uwo waguze n’umunyamahanga amahera, atākomōtse mu ruvyaro rwawe." 
Genesis17:13 Ūvukiye mu rugo rwawe n’ uwo waguze amahera, bakwiye gukebga; kand’isezerano ryanje rizoba ku mibiri yanyu, ribe isezerano ridashira." 
Genesis17:14 Kandi ni hagira izinamuhungu atākebge ku munwa w’ico yambariye, az’ arandurwe mu bgoko bgabo: kukw azoba yishe isezerano ryanje." 
Genesis17:15 Imana ibarira Aburahamu, iti Sarayi umugore wawe ntube ukimwita Sarayi ukundi, arik’ uz’ umwite Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Nzomuha umugisha, nteko nguhe umwana kuri we: ni koko nzomuha umugisha, kand’azoba inakuruza w’amahanga; abami b’amoko bazokomōka kuri we." 
Genesis17:17 Maze Aburahamu arapfukama, arūnama aratwenga, yivuganiriza mu mutima, ati Mbeg’ umwana yovyarwa n’ūmaze imyaka ijana? Na Sara amaze imyaka mirongwicenda yoba akivyara?" 
Genesis17:18 Aburahamu abgira Imana, at’ Icompa Ishimayeli agakomera, akaba imbere y’inyonga zawe!" 
Genesis17:19 Imana iramwishura, it’ Oya, ariko kuri Sara umugore wawe ni ho uzovyara umwana. Kand’ uz’ umwite Isaka; nanje nzokomeza isezerano ryanje na we, ngo ribe isezerano ridashira ku ruvyaro rwiwe ruzovuka hanyuma." 
Genesis17:20 Kandi no ku vya Ishimayeli ndakwumviye: rāba ndamuhaye umugisha, kandi nzomuha kurondoka, ndamugwize cane; azovyara abatware cumi na babiri, kandi nzomuhindura ubgoko bukomeye." 
Genesis17:21 Ariko, isezerano ryanje nzorikomeza na Isaka, uwo muzovyarana na Sara mu gihe nk’iki c’ umwaka utaha." 
Genesis17:22 Imana ihejeje kuvugana na we, ica iradūga, iva aho Aburahamu ari." 
Genesis17:23 Aburahamu aca ajana Ishimayeli umwana wiwe, bo n’abanyarugo bose bāvukiye i we, n’abo yaguze amahera bose, izinamuhungu wese mu bo mu rugo rwiwe, abakeba kur’ iryo zuba nyene, nk’ukw Imana yamubariye." 
Genesis17:24 Aburahamu yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwicenda n’icenda igihe yakebga. 
Genesis17:25 Ishimayeli umuhungu wiwe na we yar’ amaze imyaka cumi n’itatu igihe yakebga. 
Genesis17:26 Aburahamu akebanwa na Ishimayeli umuhungu wiwe ku zuba rimwe. 
Genesis17:27 N’abanyarugo biwe bose, ar’ abavukiyeho, ar’ abo yaguze n’abanyamahanga amahera, bakebanwa na we." 
Genesis18:1 Uhoraho abonekera Aburahamu ari kuri vya biti vya Mamure vyitwa imyeloni; yari yicaye mu muryango w’ihema ryiwe mu ndugumba yo mu gihe c’amashōka; 
Genesis18:2 yunamuye amaso abona abagabo batatu bahagaze bamutumbereye: ababonye, ava mu muryango w’ihema, yirukanga kubasanganira, akubita inkoro hasi," 
Genesis18:3 ati Mutungwa, namba nogira amahirwe imbere yawe, ukemera, ndakwinginze nturengane umusavyi wawe:" 
Genesis18:4 nuko bazane utuzi mwoge ibirenge, muruhukire musi y’igiti:" 
Genesis18:5 nanje nzane utwo kurya, mwihēmbūre, muheze mubone kugenda, ko mugendeye umusavyi wanyu. Bati Kora uko uvuze." 
Genesis18:6 Aburahamu yitera mw ihema aho Sara ari, ati Tunganya n’ingoga ivyibo bitatu vy’ifu igogōretse, urondere umutsima." 
Genesis18:7 Aburahamu arabandanya, aja mu busho, ahinda ishuri y’igitegetera nziza, ayiha umusuku wiwe, aca ayibāga n’ingoga." 
Genesis18:8 Yābīra amata y’urubu n’amakamano, n’inyama za ya shuri yabāze, abitereka imbere yabo; abahagarara mu mbavu musi ya ca giti, bararya." 
Genesis18:9 Baramubaza, bati Sara umugore wawe ari hehe? arabishura, at’ Ari mw ihema." 
Genesis18:10 Aramubgira, at’ Umwaka ugeze ah’ uyu ugeze, sinzobura kugaruka i wawe, Sara umugore wawe yavyaye umuhungu. Sara avyumviririza mu muryango w’ihema, ahahera inyuma yabo." 
Genesis18:11 Kandi Aburahamu na Sara bari bashaje, bageze mu zabukuru: kandi Sara yari yaraciye." 
Genesis18:12 Maze Sara atwengera mu mutima, ati Ko mmaze gukecura noba nkigomba umugabo, kand’ umwami wanje akaba ashaje?" 
Genesis18:13 Uhoraho abaza Aburahamu, ati N’iki gitumye Sara atwenga, akavuga ngw Aho n’ivy’ ukuri, noba nkivyara umwana nkecuye?" 
Genesis18:14 Mbega har’ ikinanira Uhoraho? Igihe gishinzwe, umwaka ugeze ah’ uyu ugeze, nzogaruka i wawe Sara yavyaye umuhungu." 
Genesis18:15 Maze Sara arahakana, at’ Eka sintwenze: kukw atinye. Aramubarira, at’ Oya uratwenze." 
Genesis18:16 Abo bagabo barahaguruka, baragenda, batumbereye i Sodomu: Aburahamu abaja inyuma arabaherekeza." 
Genesis18:17 Maz’ Uhoraho arivuganya, ati Mbega Aburahamu nomuhisha ico ngira nkore," 
Genesis18:18 kand’ ari we azohinduka ihanga rinini rikomeye, amahanga yose yo mw isi akazohērwa umugisha muri we?" 
Genesis18:19 Kukw ari we nahisemwo kugira ngw aze yihanikirize abana biwe n’ab’ inzu yiwe bazokwaruka hanyuma, ngo bakomeze inzira yanje, bakore ibiroranye n’ibigororotse; kugira ngo jewe Uhoraho nshitse kuri Aburahamu ivyo namuvuzeko." 
Genesis18:20 Maz’ Uhoraho aravuga, at’ Induru zir’i Sodomu n’i Gomora kw ari nyinshi, kand’ ivyaha vyaho bikaba vyabaye ikirenga," 
Genesis18:21 ndamanutse ndābe yuko bakora ibihwanye rwose n’ukw induru zaho zanshikiriye; kandi namb’ atari ko biri, ndabimenye." 
Genesis18:22 Abo bagabo barijura, bagenda batumbereye i Sodomu: ariko Aburahamu asigara ahagaze imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Genesis18:23 Maze Aburahamu aramwegera, aramubaza, ati Mbega none worandurana abagororotsi n’abanyavyaha?" 
Genesis18:24 Kumbure mur’ ico gisagara hobamw’ abagororotsi mirongwitanu: none wokirandura ntugitunge, kandi kirimw’ abagororotsi mirongwitanu?" 
Genesis18:25 Icompa bikaba kure yawe, gukora ikintu nk’ico, kwicana abagororotsi n’abanyavyaha, abagororotsi n’abanyavyaha bakaringanira: icompa bikaba kure yawe! Non’ Umucamanza w’isi yose ntiyokora ibigororotse?" 
Genesis18:26 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Ni nabona abagororotsi mirongwitanu mur’ ico gisagara c’i Sodomu, nzotunga aho hantu hose kubgabo." 
Genesis18:27 Aburahamu arongera aramubgira, at’ Eh’ ingene mpāngāye gusiguza Umwami wanje, naho nd’ umukungugu n’umunyota gusa:" 
Genesis18:28 kumbure mu bagororotsi mirongwitanu hazoburamwo batanu, none worandura igisagara cose, kuko habuze batanu? Aramwishura, ati Sinzokirandura, mbonyeyo mirongwine na batanu." 
Genesis18:29 Arongera aramubgira, ati Kumbure hobonekamwo mirongwine. Aramwishura, ati Na ho nyene nta co nzokora kubg’ abo mirongwine." 
Genesis18:30 Arongera, ati Mwami ntumpambarire, ntunga mvuge n’iri: kumbure hobonekamwo mirongwitatu. Aramwishura, ati Na ho nyene nta co nzokora mbonyeyo mirongwitatu." 
Genesis18:31 Arongera, at’ Eh’ ingene mpāngāye gusiguza Umwami wanje: kumbure hobonekamwo mirongwibiri. Aramwishura, ati Na ho nyene sinokirandura kubg’ abo mirongwibiri." 
Genesis18:32 Arongera, ati Mwami ntumpambarire, ntunga nongere mvuge iri rimwe gusa: kumbure hobonekamw’ icumi. Aramwishura, ati Na ho nyene sinokirandura kubg’ abo cumi." 
Genesis18:33 Uhoraho aca arīgīra, ahejeje kuvugana na Aburahamu; Aburahamu na we asubira i we." 
Genesis19:1 Ba bamarayika bompi bashika i Sodomu ku kagoroba: kandi Loti yari yicaye kw irembo ry’igisagara c’i Sodomu. Loti ababonye, ava hasi kubasanganira, akubita inkoro hasi," 
Genesis19:2 arababarira, ati Batungwa, ndabinginze ni muze i wanje ku musavyi wanyu, muharāre iri joro, mwoge ibirenge, buce mwizindukira, mufate inzira, mugende. Baramwishura, bat’ Oya, turarāra mw ibarabara buce." 
Genesis19:3 Arabagōbēra cane, barakevya, binjira mu nzu i we, abarondereza amazimano, abacumbishiriza imitsima itambiwe, bararya." 
Genesis19:4 Maze batararyama, abagabo bose bo mur’ ico gisagara c’i Sodomu bakikiza iyo nzu, uhereye ku bakuru n’abato, abantu bose bavuye impande zose." 
Genesis19:5 Bahamagara Loti, baramubaza, bat’ Abagabo binjiye i wawe mur’ iri joro bari hehe? basohore, tubonone." 
Genesis19:6 Loti arasohoka aja aho bari ku muryango, akinga urugi inyuma yiwe." 
Genesis19:7 Arababgira, ati Bene data, ndabinginze, ntimukore icaha kingana girtyo." 
Genesis19:8 Ehe rāba, mfise abigeme babiri, batazi icitwa umugabo; reka ndabasohore aho muri, namwe mubagenze uko mugomba kwose. Arikw abo bagabo mwoye kugira ico mubakorako, kuko bashitse mu nzu yanje." 
Genesis19:9 Baramubgira, bati Va ngaho! Bat’ Uru rugabo rw’inyakamwe, rwaje ar’ inyambukira, none rwīgize umucamanza! None rero turakugirira nabi birenze uko twari kugirira abo. Basunika Loti cane, begera urugi ngo barusāvye." 
Genesis19:10 Maze ba bagabo batuma amaboko, bashīngira Loti bamwinjiza mu nzu, bugara urugi." 
Genesis19:11 Basuka uruhumyi kur’ abo bagabo bo ku rugi, uhereye ku bakuru n’abato; bacumukura barondera urwo rugi." 
Genesis19:12 Abo bagabo babaza Loti, bati Har’ abandi bantu ufise hano? abakwe bawe n’abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe n’ab’ufise bose mur’ iki gisagara, bakūre aha hantu." 
Genesis19:13 Kuko tugira tuhahonnye, kukw induru zihavugirizwa zibaye nyinshi cane imbere y’Uhoraho, kand’ akaba adutumye kuharandura." 
Genesis19:14 Nuko Loti arasohoka, abarira abakwe biwe basavye abakobga biwe, ati Vyuka, muve aha hantu, kuk’ Uhoraho agira arandure iki gisagara. Ariko ku bakwe biwe yar’ ameze nk’uwizāgira." 
Genesis19:15 Umutwenzi utambitse, ba bamarayika bahutagiza Loti, bati Va hasi, ujane umugore wawe n’aba bakobga bawe bompi bari hano, kugira ngo woye kurandukira mu guhanwa kw’iki gisagara." 
Genesis19:16 Maze akijujura, abo bagabo bamufata ukuboko, n’ukw’ umugore wiwe n’abakobga biwe bompi. Uhoraho amugiriye ikigongwe, bamukūrayo, bamuterera inyuma y’igisagara." 
Genesis19:17 Bamaze kubakūrayo, umwe muri bo aravuga, ati Hunga ntupfe! Ntukebēre inyuma, kandi nturuhe uhagarara utararangiza iki kiyaya cose; hungira kur’ iriya misozi, woye kuranduka." 
Genesis19:18 Loti arabishura, at’ Oyaye mugenzi, s’ uko!" 
Genesis19:19 Rāba umusavyi wawe ko ngiriwe akagongwe imbere yawe, kand’ ukaba ungwijijekw imbabazi zawe, izo ungiriye ng’ ukize ubugingo bganje: erega sinoba ngihunga ngo nshike kur’ iriya misozi, ico cago kitanshitseko, kikanyica:" 
Genesis19:20 rāba, kariya gasagara ni ko kari hafi ko guhungirako, kandi ni na gato, nyemerera se mpungireyo, — mbega si gato nyene? — mbone gukiza ubugingo." 
Genesis19:21 Aramwishura, ati Nuko ndakwemereye no ku co uvuze ico, kutarandura igisagara uvuze;" 
Genesis19:22 arikw ihute, uhungireyo; kukw ata co nshobora gukora utarashikayo. Ni co catumye ico gisagara citwa Sowari." 
Genesis19:23 Loti ashika i Sowari izuba rirashe. 
Genesis19:24 Uhoraho atiburira kuri Sodomu na Gomora umuriro n’ amazuku, bivuye kuri we mw ijuru;" 
Genesis19:25 akomvomvora ivyo bisagara n’ ico kiyaya cose, n’ababa mur’ ivyo bisagara bose, n’ivyari vyarahameze vyose." 
Genesis19:26 Ariko muka Loti amukurikiye, akebuka inyuma, aca ahinduka inkingi y’umunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Aburahamu ahenga mu gatondo arazinduka, aja ha handi aho yar’ ahagaze imbere y’Uhoraho:" 
Genesis19:28 yerekeza amaso ahahera i Sodomu n’i Gomora n’igihugu cose ca ca kiyaya, aritegereza, abona imyotsi y’ico gihugu ipfūndūka nk’ imyotsi y’itanure." 
Genesis19:29 Igihe Imana yarandura ibisagara vyo mur’ ico kiyaya, yibutse Aburahamu, irungika Loti ngw ave mur’ ako gatikizo, igihe yakomvomvora ibisagara Loti yabamwo." 
Genesis19:30 Maze Loti ava i Sowari, adūga ku musozi, abayo, bo n’abigeme biwe bompi; kuko yatinya kuba i Sowari: nukw abana mw isenga n’abo bigeme biwe bompi." 
Genesis19:31 Maz’ umukuru abgira murumuna we, ati Data arashaje, kandi nta muntu agisigaye kw isi wo kuturongora, nk’uk’ umugenzo wo mw isi yose uri." 
Genesis19:32 Enda dutereke data vino, turyamane na we, kugira ngo duhonore data." 
Genesis19:33 Batereka se vino mur’ iryo joro, umukuru aragenda, aryamana na se; se ntiyamenya ingen’ uwo mukobga yaje kuryama n’ingene yavyutse." 
Genesis19:34 Bukeye bg’aho, umukuru abgira murumuna we, at’ Iri joro ryakeye naryamanye na data: twongere tumutereke n’iri joro, nawe ugende uryamane na we, duhonore data." 
Genesis19:35 Iryo joro na ryo bongera gutereka se, umutoya ava hasi, aryamana na we; maze ntiyamenya ingen’ uyo na we yaje kuryama n’ingene yavyutse." 
Genesis19:36 Uko ni kw abakobga ba Loti bompi batwaye inda bakūye kuri se. 
Genesis19:37 Umukuru avyara umuhungu, amwita Mowabu: uwo ni we yandurutsweko n’Abanyamowabu na bugingo n’ubu." 
Genesis19:38 Umutoya na we avyara umuhungu nyene, amwita Benami: uwo ni we yandurutsweko n’Abamoni na bugingo n’ubu." 
Genesis20:1 Aburahamu ava aho yar’ ari, agenda yerekeye igihugu c’i Negebu; aja kuba hagati y’i Kadeshi n’i Shura, yikubita n’i Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Aburahamu avuga ko Sara umugore wiwe ari mushiki we; Abimeleki, umwami w’i Gerari, atumiza Sara, aramutwara." 
Genesis20:3 Ariko mw ijoro Imana ibonekera Abimeleki mu nzozi, iramubarira, it’ Urapfuye, kubg’ uwo mugore watwaye: kukw afise ina we." 
Genesis20:4 Mugabo, Abimeleki ntiyaribgamwēgēre: nukw arabaza, ati Mwami, wogeseza abantu kand’ ata co bacumuye?" 
Genesis20:5 Ubgiwe si we yambariye ngo ni mushiki we? Na nya mugore nyene yavuze kw ari musaza we. Ico nakoze nagikoze ata mutima undega ikibi, ata maboko yanje nanduje." 
Genesis20:6 Imana imwishurira mu nzozi, iti Koko, nzi yuko wakoze ivyo ufise umutima utakurega ikibi, kandi nanje nakubujije kuncumurako: ni co catumye ntagukundiye kumukorako." 
Genesis20:7 None rero subiza uwo mugabo umugore wiwe, kukw ar’ūvugishwa nanje; na we azogusengera, ubone kubaho. Ariko n’utamumusubiza, umenye yuk’ utazobura gupfa, mwe n’abawe bose." 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleki akoroka kare mu gatondo, ahamagaza abanyarugo biwe bose, abiganira ivyo vyose: abo bagabo baratinya cane." 
Genesis20:9 Maze Abimeleki ahamagaza Aburahamu, aramubaza, ati Watugize ibiki? Nagukoreye icaha ki, catumye undemeka icaha kingana girtyo, twe n’igihugu canje? Wankoreye ibidakwiye gukorwa." 
Genesis20:10 Abimeleki arongera abaza Aburahamu, at’ Ivyo wabitewe n’iki?" 
Genesis20:11 Aburahamu aramwishura, ati N’uko nibgiye rwose yukw ata gutinya Imana kuriho ino; nti Kandi bazonyica bampora umugore wanje." 
Genesis20:12 Kandi koko ni mushikanje: ni mwene data ariko si mwene mama, maze namugize umugore wanje." 
Genesis20:13 Nuko rero, uhereye ah’ Imana yankūriye mu rugo kwa data, ikankwiragiza, naramubariye, nt’ Uku ni k’ukwiye kuzogenda untabara: aho tuzoshika hose, uz’ uvuge, uti Ni musazanje." 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleki yābīra intama n’ inka n’abagurano b’abahungu n’ abakobga, abiha Aburahamu amusubiza na Sara umugore wiwe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleki aramubarira, at’Eh’ igihugu canje ngico: genda ube ah’ugomba hose." 
Genesis20:16 Abarira na Sara, ati Rāba mpaye musazawe intete z’ifeza igihumbi; zizoba ico kugutēturura imbere y’abo muri kumwe bose; ngukūyekw iceyi kuri bose." 
Genesis20:17 Maze Aburahamu asenga Imana, ikiza Abimeleki n’ umwamikazi wiwe n’incoreke ziwe; baravyara." 
Genesis20:18 Kuk’ Uhoraho yari yazivye inda z’abo mu rugo rwa Abimeleki bose, abahōye Sara umugore wa Aburahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Uhoraho agendera Sara nk’ uko yavuze, kand’ amugirira nk’uko yamubariye." 
Genesis21:2 Sara asama inda, avyarana na Aburahamu umuhungu mu butāma bgiwe, mu gihe cāshinzwe, kimwe Imana yari yaramubariye nyene." 
Genesis21:3 Umwana Aburahamu yavyaye amwita Isaka, uwo yavyaranye na Sara." 
Genesis21:4 Aburahamu akeba Isaka umwana wiwe amaze imisi munani avutse, nk’ ukw Imana yamubariye." 
Genesis21:5 Aburahamu yar’ amaze imyaka ijana igihe yavyara umwana wiwe Isaka. 
Genesis21:6 Sara aravuga, at’ Imana irantwengeje; kand’ abazovyumva bose bizobatwenza nkanje." 
Genesis21:7 Ati Har’ uwogize ico abarira Aburahamu, ngo Sara azokwonsa abana? yamar’ amvyayek’ umwana w’umuhungu mu butāma bgiwe." 
Genesis21:8 Umwana arakura, aracuka; ku musi Isaka yacutseko Aburahamu atumirira abantu benshi amazimano." 
Genesis21:9 Maze Sara abona wa mwana wa Hagari Umunyegiputakazi, uwo yavyaranye na Aburahamu, arikw aratwenga." 
Genesis21:10 Bituma abarira Aburahamu, at’ Irukana iyi ncoreke n’umwana wayo, kuk’ umwana w’iyi ncoreke atazoraganwa n’umwana wanje Isaka." 
Genesis21:11 Aburahamu ababazwa cane n’ ivy’ uwo mwana wiwe. 
Genesis21:12 Imana ibarira Aburahamu, iti Reka kubabazwa n’ivy’ uwo mwana n’incoreke yawe: ivyo Sara akubariye vyose n’uvyemere: kuko kuri Isaka ari ho uruvyaro rwawe ruzokwītīrirwa." 
Genesis21:13 Kandi n’uwo mwana nyene w’iyo ncoreke nzomuhindura ihanga, kuko na we ar’ ubura bgawe." 
Genesis21:14 Aburahamu akoroka kare, yābīra impamba n’ umukuza w’urusato wuzuye amazi, abitekerera Hagari, abishira ku rutugu rwiwe, amuha n’uwo mwana, aramwirukana; aragenda, azimagirika mu bugaragwa bg’i Beri‐sheba." 
Genesis21:15 Amazi yari muri wa mukuza arashira; arambika umwana musi y’igisaka caho. 
Genesis21:16 Aragenda, yicara amutumbereye amwitanguye, nk’ahoraswa umwampi; kuko yari yibgiye, ati Noye kurāba ipfa ry’ umwana wanje. Nuko yicara amutumbereye, araturika ararira." 
Genesis21:17 Imana yumva ijwi ry’uwo muhungu; maz’ umumarayika w’ Imana ari mw ijuru, ahamagara Hagari, aramubaza, at’ Ubaye iki ga Hagari? Nta co utinya! kukw Imana yumvise ijwi ry’uwo muhungu ah’aryamye." 
Genesis21:18 Va hasi, uvyure uwo muhungu, umuramire mu maboko, kuko nzomuhindura ihanga rikomeye." 
Genesis21:19 Imana ihumūra amaso yiwe, abona iriba ry’amazi; aragenda, yuzuza wa mukuza amazi, aramiza uwo muhungu." 
Genesis21:20 Nukw Imana ibana n’uwo muhungu, arakura; agerēra mu bugaragwa, aba umurashi." 
Genesis21:21 Aba mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani; nyina amusabira umugeni mu gihugu ca Egiputa. 
Genesis21:22 Mur’ iyo misi, Abimeleki azanana na Fikoli umugabisha w’ ingabo ziwe, abarira Aburahamu, at’ Imana iri kumwe nawe mu vyo ukora vyose;" 
Genesis21:23 none rer’ enda n’undahirire Imana aha nyene yuk’ utazongunga, cank’ umwana wanje, cank’ umwuzukuru wanje: ariko k’uzonyishura ivyiza, twe n’iki gihugu wabayemw’ ur’ inyambukīra, nk’uko nabikugiriye nanje." 
Genesis21:24 Aburahamu aramwishura, ati Ndarahira." 
Genesis21:25 Maze Aburahamu ahishuka Abimeleki ku vy’iriba ry’amazi abantu ba Abimeleki bamunyaze ku manyama. 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleki aramwishura, at’ Ivyo sinzi uwabikoze, kandi nawe ntiwigeze kubimbgira, kandi sinigeze no kuvyumva, atar’ uyu musi." 
Genesis21:27 Nuko Aburahamu yābīra intama n’inka, abiha Abimeleki; bompi bacana amatigu." 
Genesis21:28 Aburahamu arobanura imyagazi y’intama ndwi ivyara yo mu mukuku wiwe. 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleki abaza Aburahamu, ati Mbeg’ iyo myagazi ndwi urobanuye, bisobanurwa ngw iki?" 
Genesis21:30 Aramwishura, at’ Enda nyakīrira iyi myagazi ndwi ntanze, kugira ngo bimbere icabona yukw ari jewe nimbishije iri riba." 
Genesis21:31 Ni co catumye yita aho hantu Beri‐sheba, kukw ari ho barahiriye bompi." 
Genesis21:32 Uko ni ko bācaniye amatigu i Beri‐sheba: maze Abimeleki arahaguruka, bo na Fikoli umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe, basubira mu gihugu c’i Bufilisitiya." 
Genesis21:33 Aburahamu atera igiti citwa umwesheri i Beri‐sheba, yambarizay’ izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana ihoraho." 
Genesis21:34 Aburahamu amara imisi myinshi ar’ inyambukīra mu gihugu c’i Bufilisitiya. 
Genesis22:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, Imana igeza Aburahamu; iramuhamagara, iti Aburahamu! Aritaba, ati Sabge." 
Genesis22:2 Iramubgira, it’ Enda jana umwana wawe, umwana wawe w’ikinege ukunda, Isaka nyene, uje mu gihugu c’i Moriya; umutangireyo kw ikimazi co kwoswa, ku musozi nzokubarira." 
Genesis22:3 Aburahamu azinduka kare mu gatondo, ashira amatandiko ku ndogoba yiwe, ajana na babiri bo mu mikangara yiwe, na Isaka umwana wiwe; nukw asatuje inkwi zo kwosa ikimazi, ava hasi, aja ha hantu Imana yamubariye." 
Genesis22:4 Ku musi ugira gatatu, Aburahamu atuma amaso, abona aho hantu hakiri kure." 
Genesis22:5 Nuko Aburahamu abgira iyo mikangara yiwe, ati Ni musigarane iyi ndogoba hano, twe n’ uyu mwana tugiye hariya gusenga, turaheza tugaruke." 
Genesis22:6 Aburahamu yābīra za nkwi zo kwosa ikimazi, azikorera Isaka umwana wiwe; na we yitwarira umuriro n’imbugita; nuko bompi barajana." 
Genesis22:7 Isaka abaza se Aburahamu, ati Mbega da? Aramwitaba, ati N’iki ga mwana wanje? Ati Mbeg’ umuriro n’inkwi kw ari ngibi, non’ umwagazi w’intama uri hehe, wo gutanga kw ikimazi co kwoswa?" 
Genesis22:8 Aburahamu aramwishura, at’ Erega mwananje, Imana ni yo iribgironkere umwagazi w’ikimazi co kwoswa. Nuko bompi barajana." 
Genesis22:9 Bashika ahantu Imana yamubariye; Aburahamu ahubaka igicaniro, akinyuranyako za nkwi, aboha Isaka umwana wiwe, amurambika kur’ ico gicaniro hejuru y’inkwi." 
Genesis22:10 Aburahamu atuma ukuboko, yābīra ya mbugita, ngw akerere umwana wiwe." 
Genesis22:11 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho amuhamagara ari mw ijuru, at’ Ewe Aburahamu, Aburahamu! Aritaba, ati Sabge." 
Genesis22:12 Aramubarira, ati Ntukoze ukuboko kur’ uwo muhungu, ntugire ico umugira: kuko noneho mmenye ko wubaha Imana, kuk’ utanyimye umwana wawe, kand’ ar’ ikinege." 
Genesis22:13 Maze Aburahamu yunamuye amaso, areraguza, inyuma yiwe ahabona impfizi y’intama ifashwe mu mahembe mu gisaka c’inzitane. Aburahamu aragenda, afata ino ntama, ayitanga kw ikimazi co kwoswa mu gishingo c’umwana wiwe." 
Genesis22:14 Aburahamu yita aho hantu Yehova‐yire, nk’uko bavuga na bugingo n’ubu, bati Ku musozi w’Uhoraho ni ho bironkeka." 
Genesis22:15 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho ari mw ijuru arongera ahamagara Aburahamu," 
Genesis22:16 ati Ndirahiye, ni k’Uhoraho agize, k’ukoze ivyo, ntunyime umwana wawe, kand’ ar’ ikinege," 
Genesis22:17 eka mbere no kuguha umugisha nzowuguha, kandi no kugwiza nzogwiza uruvyaro rwawe, rungane n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru, canke n’umusenyi wo mw isēsero ry’ikiyaga; kandi ruzokwegukira amarembo y’abansi barwo;" 
Genesis22:18 kandi mu ruvyaro rwawe ni ho amahanga yose yo mw isi azohērwa umugisha, kuko wanyumviye." 
Genesis22:19 Aburahamu asubira aho ya mikangara yiwe iri, barikora, basubirana na we i Beri‐sheba; kuko Aburahamu ari ho yaba nyene." 
Genesis22:20 Hanyuma y’ivyo babarira Aburahamu, bat’ Erega Miluka na we yavyaranye abana na murumunawe Nahori." 
Genesis22:21 Imfura yiwe ni Usi, murumuna we ni Buzi, na we akurikirwa na Kemuweli, ari we se wa Aramu;" 
Genesis22:22 na bo bakurikirwa na Kesedi na Hazo na Piludashi na Yidilafu na Betuweli. 
Genesis22:23 Kandi Betuweli yavyaye Rebeka: abo ukw ar’ umunani Miluka yabavyaranye na Nahori murumuna wa Aburahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Kand’ incoreke yiwe yitwa Reyuma, na yo yavyaranye na we Teba na Gahamu na Tahashi na Mayaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara yamaze imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri n’indwi: iyo ni yo myaka Sara yamaze. 
Genesis23:2 Sara araheza apfira i Kiriyati‐Araba (ari ho Heburoni), mu gihugu c’i Kanani: Aburahamu aza kuririra Sara, no kumuborogera." 
Genesis23:3 Aburahamu ava hasi, ava i ruhande y’ uwo muvyimba, abgira Abaheti," 
Genesis23:4 ati Jewe ko nd’akavantara n’inyambukīra muri mwebge; none ni mumpe i wanyu aho nokwīzīzira ho guhamba, kugira ngo mpambe umuntu wanje amve mu maso." 
Genesis23:5 Abaheti bishura Aburahamu," 
Genesis23:6 bati Mugenzi, n’utwumve: ur’ umuntu ahambaye cane muri twebge; mu masenga yacu duhambamwo, iyo wohitamwo yose abe ari yo uhambamw’ umuntu wawe: nta wo muri twebge yokwima isenga yiwe, ngo woye guhamba umuntu wawe." 
Genesis23:7 Aburahamu ava hasi, yikubita imbere ya ben’ igihugu, ari bo Baheti." 
Genesis23:8 Arababgira, at’ Asangwa mwemeye ko mpamba umuntu wanje ngw amve mu maso, ni muntabare, munyingingire Efuroni mwene Sohari," 
Genesis23:9 ampe isenga y’i Makipela afise, iri ku mpera y’itongo ryiwe; ayingurire hagati yanyu ibiguzi bikwiranye biyiciye, habe aho nīzīziye, ho guhamba." 
Genesis23:10 Nuko Efuroni yari yicaye hagati mu Baheti: Efuroni Umuheti abarira Aburahamu, Abaheti bumva, bo n’abariko baraca mw irembo ry’igisagara cabo bose," 
Genesis23:11 ati Mushingantahe, oyaye, enda umviriza: iryo tongo ndariguhaye, bo n’isenga irimwo ndayiguhaye; mbiguhereye imbere y’ubgoko bgacu: hamba umuntu wawe." 
Genesis23:12 Aburahamu yikubita imbere ya ben’ igihugu. 
Genesis23:13 Abarira Efuroni, ben’ igihugu bumva, at’ Enda se ndakwinginze, nyumviriza! ndaguha igiciro c’iryo tongo; emera nkiguhe, mpahambe umuntu wanje." 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni yishura Aburahamu," 
Genesis23:15 ati Mushingantahe, ni wumve: non’ agatongo gaciye shekeli z’ifeza amajana ane konteranya nawe? nuko hamba umuntu wawe." 
Genesis23:16 Aburahamu yumvise ivya Efuroni, amugerera ku munzane za feza yaciriye, Abaheti bumva, shekeli amajana ane z’ifeza, kimwe n’izo abadandaza bācurūza." 
Genesis23:17 Nukw iryo tongo rya Efuroni ryar’ i Makipela, aharābana n’i Mamure, bo n’isenga yarimwo, n’ ibiti vyose vyari mur’ iryo tongo birizengutse impande zose, vyegukira Aburahamu" 
Genesis23:18 kuba aho yīzīziye, imbere y’Abaheti no mu maso y’abaca mw irembo ry’igisagara cabo bose." 
Genesis23:19 Ivyo biheze, Aburahamu aca ahamba Sara umugore wiwe mur’ iyo senga yo mw itongo ry’i Makipela, aharābana n’i Mamure, (ari ho Heburoni), mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis23:20 Nukw iryo tongo n’iyo senga irimwo, Abaheti barabirundura ngo Aburahamu ahegukire kuba aho yīzīziye ho guhamba." 
Genesis24:1 Aburahamu yar’ ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru: kand’ Uhoraho yari yarahaye Aburahamu umugisha muri vyose." 
Genesis24:2 Aburahamu abarira umubgiriza wiwe, umukuru wo mu rugo rwiwe, yabgiriza ivyo yar’ afise vyose, at’ Enda n’ushire ukuboko kwawe musi y’ikibero canje," 
Genesis24:3 ndakurahize Uhoraho, ni we Mana Nyen’ ijuru, ni we Mana Nyen’ isi, yuk’ utazosabira umwana wanje umugeni wo mu Banyakananikazi, abo mbamwo;" 
Genesis24:4 ariko k’uzoja mu gihugu cacu, muri bene wacu, kuba ari ho usabira umwana wanje Isaka umugeni." 
Genesis24:5 Uwo mubgiriza aramwishura, ati Kumbure uwo mwigeme ntazokwemera ko tuzanana mur’ iki gihugu: none bibaye birtyo, noba nkwiye gusubiza umwana wawe mu gihugu wavuyemwo?" 
Genesis24:6 Aburahamu aramwishura, at’ Uz’ uzire akaziri, ntuz’ usubizey’ umwana wanje!" 
Genesis24:7 Uhoraho, Imana Nyen’ ijuru, umwe yankūra mu nzu ya data no mu gihugu navukiyemwo, akambarira, akandahira, at’ Uruvyaro rwawe nzoruha iki gihugu; uyo ni we ubgiwe azotuma umumarayika wiwe akuje imbere, nawe az’ abe ari ho usabira umwana wanje umugeni." 
Genesis24:8 Kand’ uwo mukobga ni yaramuka yanse kuzanana nawe, ntuzoba ugifatwa n’iyo ndahiro nkurahije; mugabo ntuz’ usubizey’ umwana wanje." 
Genesis24:9 Nuk’ uwo mubgiriza ashira ukuboko musi y’ ikibero ca shebuja Aburahamu, amurahira nk’ukw ivyo biri." 
Genesis24:10 Uwo mubgiriza yābīra ingamiya cumi zo mu ngamiya za shebuja, aragenda; ajana ibintu vyiza‐vyiza vy’uburyo bgose shebuja amurungikanye; nukw arīkora, aja muri Aramu‐Naharayimu, ashika ku gisagara Nahori yabamwo." 
Genesis24:11 Abarira izo ngamiya zipfukama inyuma y’igisagara kw iriba, hāri ku mugoroba, mu gihe c’amavoma." 
Genesis24:12 Arasenga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya databuja Aburahamu, ndakwinginze, mpa kugira amahirwe uyu musi, ugirire neza databuja Aburahamu." 
Genesis24:13 Ehe mpagaze kw iriba, kand’ abakobga b’ abo mu gisagara bahava basokoroka baze kuvoma;" 
Genesis24:14 enda se bibe birtya: umwigeme ndibubgire, nti Ndakwinginze, ururutsa umubindi wawe, nnyweko; akanyishura, ati Nywako, n’ingamiya zawe ndaziha zinywe: uyo abe ari we watoranirije Isaka umusavyi wawe; ivyo ni vyo bimmenyesha yuk’ ugiriye neza databuja." 
Genesis24:15 Nukw akirikw aravuga, Rebeka arasokoroka, afise umubindi ku rutugu; yari mwene Betuweli, uwo Miluka yavyaranye na Nahori umugabo wiwe, murumuna wa Aburahamu." 
Genesis24:16 Kand’ uwo mwigeme yari mwiza cane w’umunyakaranga, yar’ inkumi, atigeze kumenyana n’icitwa umugabo: aramanuka, aja kw iriba, yuzuza umubindi wiwe, aradūga." 
Genesis24:17 Uwo mubgiriza arīkānya, aramusanganira, aramubgira, ati Ntabaza se utuzi two kunywa kur’ uwo mubindi wawe." 
Genesis24:18 Aramwishura, ati Nywako, mutungwa. Anyarutsa kwururukiriza umubindi wiwe ku kiganza, aramuha, aranywa." 
Genesis24:19 Ahejeje kumuha, aramubgira, ati Hinge mvomere n’ingamiya zawe, zihodoke." 
Genesis24:20 Aranyaruka, asuka umubindi wiwe mu bgato, ariruka, asubira kw iriba kuvoma, avomera ingamiya ziwe zose." 
Genesis24:21 Uwo mugabo amushinga ijisho anumye, kugira ngw amenye yuk’ Uhoraho yahaye urugendo rwiwe umugisha, cank’ ata wo." 
Genesis24:22 Nukw izo ngamiya zimaze guhodoka, uwo mugabo yābīra impeta y’izahabu, kuriba kwayo kwar’ igihimba ca shekeli, n’ivyo kumwambika ku maboko bibiri vy’ izahabu, kuriba kwavyo kwari shekeli cumi;" 
Genesis24:23 aramubaza, at’ Uri mwene nde? Ndakwinginze, nyibarira. Kandi mbeg’ i wanyu har’ indāro tworonka?" 
Genesis24:24 Aramwishura, ati Ndi mwene Betuweli, uwo Miluka yavyaranye na Nahori." 
Genesis24:25 Yungamwo, aramubarira, ati Turi n’ivyarire n’ivyo kurya bizihāgije, dufise n’aho kurāra." 
Genesis24:26 Uwo mugabo yunamika amaso, ahimbaza Uhoraho," 
Genesis24:27 aravuga, at’ Uhoraho ashemagizwe, Imana ya databuja Aburahamu, itāretse kugirira imbabazi databuja, no kumubera umwizigirwa! nanje nyene, Uhoraho yandōngōye inzira ija kwa bene wabo wa databuja." 
Genesis24:28 Maz’ uwo mwigeme arirukanga, abarira abo mu nzu kwa nyina ayo majambo." 
Genesis24:29 Kandi Rebeka yar’ afise musaza we yitwa Labani: Labani uwo arasohoka, abandanya ah’uwo mugabo ari, kw iriba." 
Genesis24:30 Yari yitegereje impeta na vya bindi vyo ku maboko, ivyo mushiki we yari yambaye, yumvise n’amajambo Rebeka mushiki we amudōndeye, at’ Ivyo ni vyo uwo mugabo ambariye; ni kwo guca aja ah’uwo mugabo ari. Asanga agihagaze i ruhande ya za ngamiya, kw iriba." 
Genesis24:31 Aramubgira, ati Ngwino, nyaguhabga n’ Uhoraho! n’iki kikugumije ku gahinga? ko nteguye inzu, bo n’ah’ ingamiya."
