Genesis24:32 Nuk’ uwo mugabo ashika mu rugo; Labani akūra ibintu ku ngamiya, atanga icarire n’ ivyo kurya vy’ingamiya, n’amazi y’uwo yo kwoga ibirenge, bo n’abo bari kumwe." 
Genesis24:33 Bamuzanira izimano ngw arye: maz’ aravuga, ati Sindya, ntaravuga ivyo natumwe. Uwundi ati Vuga." 
Genesis24:34 Ati Jewe nd’ umuntu wa Aburahamu. 
Genesis24:35 Kand’ Uhoraho yahaye databuja umugisha mwinshi, ahinduka ūhambaye; kandi yamuhaye imikuku n’amasho n’amafeza n’amazahabu n’abatungano b’abahungu n’abakobga n’ingamiya n’indogoba." 
Genesis24:36 Kandi na Sara muka databuja yavyaye umuhungu ashaje, ni we databuja yaraze ivyiwe vyose." 
Genesis24:37 Kandi databuja yarandahije ngo sinze nsabire umwana wiwe umugeni mu Banyakananikazi, ben’ igihugu abamwo:" 
Genesis24:38 ariko ngo nze nje mu b’inzu ya se no muri bene wabo, ngw abe ari ho nsabira umwana wiwe umugeni." 
Genesis24:39 Maze nishura databuja, nti Kumbure uwo mwigeme ntazokunda ko tuzanana." 
Genesis24:40 Aranyishura, at’ Uhoraho, nama ngendera imbere, azotuma umumarayika wiwe ajane nawe, azoha urugendo rwawe umugisha; maze nawe uz’ usabire umwana wanje umugeni muri bene wacu, mu b’ inzu ya data." 
Genesis24:41 Nuko ni washika muri bene wacu, ni ho iyo ndahiro nkurahije itazogufata: na bo baramutse bamukwimye, ntuzoba ugifatwa n’iyo ndahiro." 
Genesis24:42 Maz’ uyu musi nshitse kw iriba, ndasenga, nt’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya databuja Aburahamu, ni waba uhaye urugendo rwanje nagenze umugisha," 
Genesis24:43 ehe mpagaze kw iriba: nt’ Enda se ni bibe birtya: umwigeme asokoroka kuvoma, nkamubgira, nti Ntabaza se utuzi two kunywa kur’ uwo mubindi wawe," 
Genesis24:44 akanyishura, ati Nywako, nteko mvomere n’ingamiya zawe: uyo abe ari we, wewe Uhoraho utoranirije mwene databuja." 
Genesis24:45 Maze ngisengera mu mutima wanje, ngize ntya mbona Rebeka arasokorotse, afise umubindi ku rutugu; amanuka kw iriba, aravoma; ndamubarira, nti Ntabaza utwo kunywa." 
Genesis24:46 Anyarutsa kwururutsa umubindi wiwe ku rutugu, at’ Enda nywa, n’ingamiya zawe ndaziha zinywe. Nuko ndanywa, aha n’ingamiya na zo." 
Genesis24:47 Nca ndamubaza, nt’ Uri mwene nde? ati Ndi mwene Betuweli, uwo Nahori yavyaranye na Miluka. Nca ndamwambika impeta ku zuru, n’ ivyambarwa ku maboko." 
Genesis24:48 Nca nunamika amaso, mpimbaza Uhoraho, nshemagiza Uhoraho Imana ya databuja Aburahamu, yandōngōye inzira ikwiye, ngo nsabire umwana wiwe umugeni ku muhungwabo wa databuja." 
Genesis24:49 Nuko ni mwemera kugirira databuja ivyiza mu buryo bukwiye, ni mumbarire; mutavyemeye, na ho nyene mumbarire, ngo mmenye ico nkora." 
Genesis24:50 Labani na Betuweli baca baramwishura, bat’ Ivyo bivuye k’Uhoraho: nta kindi twoshobora kukubarira ic’ ari co cose." 
Genesis24:51 Ehe rāba Rebeka nguyo, n’umujane wīgīre, abe umugore w’umwana wa shobuja, nk’uk’ Uhoraho abigize." 
Genesis24:52 Nuk’ uwo muntu wa Aburahamu yumvise ayo majambo, akubita inkoro hasi imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Genesis24:53 Uwo muntu asokorora utugenegene tw’ifeza n’utw’ izahabu, n’impuzu, abiha Rebeka: kand’ aha na musaza we na nyina ibintu vy’igiciro." 
Genesis24:54 Baraheza bararya, baranywa, bo n’abo bāzananye, barāra ngaho buraca: bavyuka mu gatondo, aravuga, ati Ni munsezere, nsubire kwa databuja." 
Genesis24:55 Musaza wa Rebeka na nyina baramwishura, bati Hinge uyu mwigeme tumarane iyindi misi nk’ icumi cank’ isaga, muheze mubone kugenda." 
Genesis24:56 Arabishura, ati Nta co muntebereza, kuk’ Uhoraho yahaye urugendo rwanje umugisha: ni munsezere, nsubire kwa databuja." 
Genesis24:57 Baramwishura, bati Hinge duhamagare uwo mwigeme, twumve irimuva mu kanwa." 
Genesis24:58 Bahamagara Rebeka, baramubaza, bat’ Uremera kujana n’uyu mugabo? arabishura, ati Ndemeye." 
Genesis24:59 Basezera Rebeka mushiki wabo, bamurungikana n’umurezi wiwe, basezera na wa muntu wa Aburahamu n’abantu biwe." 
Genesis24:60 Bahezagira Rebeka, baramubgira, bat’ Ewe mushiki wacu, uz’ uvyare usasagare, ugire ibihumbi n’ibihumbi, kand’ uruvyaro rwawe ruze rwegukire amarembo y’abansi barwo." 
Genesis24:61 Nuko Rebeka arīkora, bo n’incoreke ziwe, bagendera kuri za ngamiya, bajana n’uwo mugabo. Uko ni k’uwo muntu yajanye Rebeka, aragenda." 
Genesis24:62 Kandi Isaka yari yaravuye kw Iriba ry’i Lahayi‐royi, yaba mu gihugu c’i Negebu." 
Genesis24:63 Bukeye Isaka arasohoka, aja mu gahinga kwiherēra, hāri ku kagoroba: yunamura amaso, agize artya abona ingamiya zije." 
Genesis24:64 Maze Rebeka yunamura amaso; abonye Isaka, ava ku ngamiya," 
Genesis24:65 abaza wa muntu, at’ Uriya muntu ni nde, agiye guhūra natwe, aza mu gahinga? Uwo muntu aramwishura, ati Ni databuja. Rebeka aca yābīra umwitwikiro wiwe, yitwikira mu maso." 
Genesis24:66 Uwo muntu yīgānira Isaka ivyo yakoze vyose. 
Genesis24:67 Isaka ajana Rebeka mw ihema risiga nyina wiwe Sara, aramurongora, aba umugore wiwe, aramukunda. Isaka ivyo bimwirura umubabaro wa nyina." 
Genesis25:1 Aburahamu arongora uwundi mugore, yitwa Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Bavyarana Zimurani na Yokishani na Medani na Midiyani na Yishibaki na Shuwa. 
Genesis25:3 Yokishani avyara Sheba na Dedani. Abakomōtse kuri Dedani n’Abashuri n’Abaletushi n’Abaleyumi. 
Genesis25:4 Bene Midiyani ni Efa na Eferi na Hanoki na Abida na Eludaya. Abo bose n’uruvyaro rwa Ketura. 
Genesis25:5 Aburahamu araga Isaka ivyo yar’ afise vyose. 
Genesis25:6 Arikw abana bo ku ncoreke Aburahamu yar’ afise, arabagabira; araheza arabarungika, akiriho, ngw abatandukanye na Isaka umwana wiwe, bagende berekeye i burasirazuba, baje mu gihugu c’i burasirazuba nyene." 
Genesis25:7 Nukw imisi Aburahamu yamaze n’imyaka ijana na mirongwirindwi n’itanu. 
Genesis25:8 Aburahamu aracīkāna, atāmbūra ageze mu zabukuru, apfa yisāziye neza; ahamvya ababo." 
Genesis25:9 Isaka na Ishimayeli abana biwe bamuhamba mw isenga y’i Makipela, iri mw itongo ryar’ irya Efuroni mwene Sohari Umuheti, aharābana n’i Mamure;" 
Genesis25:10 ari ryo tongo Aburahamu yaguze n’Abaheti: ni ho Aburahamu yahambge, bo na Sara umugore wiwe." 
Genesis25:11 Aburahamu amaze gupfa, Imana iha umugisha Isaka umwana wiwe; kandi Isaka yaba hafi y’Iriba ry’i Lahayi‐royi." 
Genesis25:12 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Ishimayeli mwene Aburahamu, uwo yavyaranye na Hagari Umunyegiputakazi, incoreke ya Sara." 
Genesis25:13 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Ishimayeli, ayo bitwa nk’uko bakurikiranye: imfura ya Ishimayeli ni Nebayoti, hakurikira Kedari na Adibeli na Mibusamu," 
Genesis25:14 na Mishima na Duma na Masa," 
Genesis25:15 na Hadadi na Tema na Yeturi na Nafishi na Kedema: 
Genesis25:16 abo ni bo bana ba Ishimayeli, ayo ni yo mazina yabo, nk’ukw ibisagara vyabo biri, nk’ukw ingo zabo ziri; baba abatware cumi na babiri, nk’ukw amoko yabo ari." 
Genesis25:17 Iyi ni yo myaka Ishimayeli yamaze: n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’indwi; araheza aracīkāna, ahamvya ababo." 
Genesis25:18 Abiwe bahēra i Havila basagaza gushitsa i Shura, aharābana na Egiputa, mu nzira ija muri Ashuri; kandi Ishimayeli yari yapfuye aho yishingiye amahema asita bene wabo bose." 
Genesis25:19 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Isaka mwene Aburahamu: Aburahamu yavyaye Isaka. 
Genesis25:20 Isaka yar’amaze imyaka mirongwine igihe yarongora Rebeka mwene Betuweli Umwaramu w’i Padan‐aramu, mushiki wa Labani Umwaramu." 
Genesis25:21 Isaka atakambira Uhoraho kubg’ umugore wiwe, kukw atāvyara: Uhoraho yumva gutakamba kwiwe, Rebeka umugore wiwe asama inda." 
Genesis25:22 Abana basitanira mu nda yiwe: maz’ aribaza, ati Ko bimeze birtya, igituma nkiriho n’iki? Aragenda aja kubisiguza Uhoraho." 
Genesis25:23 Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Inda yawe irimw’ amahanga abiri, Amoko abiri azokwitandukanya uhereye bakiva mu bura bgawe: Ubgoko bumwe buzorusha ubundi inkomezi, Kandi Bukuru azoshumbira Butoyi." 
Genesis25:24 Maz’ igihe ciwe co kuvyara kigeze, basanga yar’ atwaye inda y’ amahasa." 
Genesis25:25 Bukuru avuka ar’ inzobe y’umuyugubge, yar’akatse wese nk’impuzu y’ivyoya, bamwita Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Hakurikira Butoyi, afashe igitsintsiri ca Esau; bamwita Yakobo; kandi Isaka yar’amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu, igihe bāvuka." 
Genesis25:27 Abo bahungu barakura; Esau aba umuhigi w’umuhinga, w’ umunyeshamba; Yakobo we yaratekereza, yībēra mu mahema." 
Genesis25:28 Kandi Isaka yakunda Esau, kuko yama arya ku nyama yahīgūkanye; Rebeka we yakunda Yakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Umusi ur’ izina, Yakobo ateka ivyo kurya; Esau arinjira, avuye mw ishamba, ashonje, acitse intege." 
Genesis25:30 Esau abarira Yakobo, ati Mpa se utwo ntamira kur’ ivyo bitukura, ku bitukura utetse, kuko numva ncitse intege. Ni co catumye yitwa Edomu." 
Genesis25:31 Yakobo aramwishura, ati Shit’ ubanje kungurira, nkegukira kuba samuragwa mu gishingo cawe." 
Genesis25:32 Esau aramwishura, ati Rāba ngira mpfe! non’ ivyo kuba samuragwa bizommarira iki?" 
Genesis25:33 Yakobo aramwishura, ati Banza undahire. Aramurahira, agura na Yakobo ivyo kuba samuragwa kwiwe." 
Genesis25:34 Yakobo araheza aha Esau umutsima n’ibiharage; nukw ararya aranywa, yivira hasi, arīgīra. Uko ni ko Esau yakēngereye ivyo kuba samuragwa." 
Genesis26:1 Hatera iyindi nzara ya kabiri mur’ ico gihugu, itar’ imwe ya mbere yo mu gihe ca Aburahamu. Isaka aja i Gerari kwa Abimeleki umwami w’Abafilisitiya." 
Genesis26:2 Uhoraho aramwiyereka, ati Ntumanuke ng’uje muri Egiputa: uz’ ube mu gihugu nzokubarira." 
Genesis26:3 Ba urasuhukiye mur’ iki gihugu, nanje nzobana nawe, nguhe umugisha; kuko wewe n’ uruvyaro rwawe nzobaha ibi bihugu vyose; kandi nzokomeza indahiro narahiye Aburahamu so;" 
Genesis26:4 nzogwiza uruvyaro rwawe, rungane n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru, kand’ uruvyaro rwawe nzoruha ibi bihugu vyose; kandi mu ruvyaro rwawe ni ho amahanga yose yo mw isi azohērwa umugisha;" 
Genesis26:5 kuko Aburahamu yanyumviye, agashitsa ivyo namwihanikirije n’ amabgirizwa yanje n’ivyo nashinze n’ivyagezwe vyanje." 
Genesis26:6 Nuko Isaka aba i Gerari: 
Genesis26:7 abantu baho bamubaza ivy’ umugore wiwe; arabishura, ati Ni mushikanje; kuko yatinye kuvuga kw ar’umugore wiwe, ngw abantu baho bomwica kubga Rebeka, kuko yari mwiza w’umunyakaranga." 
Genesis26:8 Amazey’ igihe kirekire, Abimeleki umwami w’Abafilisitiya arungurukira mw idirisha, abona Isaka akinisha Rebeka umugore wiwe." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki ahamagaza Isaka, aramubarira, at’ Erega biraboneka kw ar’ umugore wawe! None n’iki cakuvugishije kw ari mushikawe? Isaka aramwishura, ati N’uko natinye ko bonyica kubgiwe." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleki aramwishura, at’ Ico wadukoreye ico n’ iki? Ereg’ umwe mu bantu banje yari kuryamana n’umugore wawe ata co yicura, ukaba uturemētse icaha." 
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki yihanikiriza abantu biwe bose, at’ Ūzokora kur’ uyu mugabo canke ku mugore wiwe, ntibizobura kumucisha umutwe." 
Genesis26:12 Maze Isaka abiba mur’ ico gihugu, mur’ uwo mwaka nyene yimbura ibirenze ivyo yabivye ingero ijana. Uhoraho amuha umugisha." 
Genesis26:13 Uwo mugabo aba umutunzi, agenda arushiriza, gushitsa aho yabereye umutunzi bihebuje." 
Genesis26:14 Kandi yar’ afise ibitayega vy’imikuku n’amasho, n’abantu bahinda: atera Abafilisitiya ishari," 
Genesis26:15 bituma basivya amariba yose, bayuzuza ivu, ayo abantu ba se bari barimvye, mu gihe ca se nyene Aburahamu." 
Genesis26:16 Maze Abimeleki abarira Isaka, ati Genda utuvemwo, kuk’ uturuta." 
Genesis26:17 Nuko Isaka avayo, ashinga amahema yiwe mu kibande c’i Gerari, abayo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaka asibūza ya mariba, amwe bāri bārimvye mu gihe ca se Aburahamu, kukw Abafilisitiya bari bayashibije, Aburahamu amaze gupfa. Ayita amazina nyene se yari yarayise." 
Genesis26:19 Bukeye abantu ba Isaka bimba mur’ ico kibande, babonamw’ iriba ry’amazi adudubiza." 
Genesis26:20 Abungere b’i Gerari batonganira ayo mazi n’ abungere ba Isaka, bat’ Aya mazi n’ayacu! Isaka yita iryo riba Eseki, kuko bāritātiye." 
Genesis26:21 Bongera kwimba irindi riba, na ryo bararitonganira: aca aryita Sitina." 
Genesis26:22 Avayo arunguruza, yimbisha irindi riba, ryo ntibaritonganira: aca aryita Rehoboti; aravuga, ati Noneh’ Uhoraho adushize ahiyaguye, tuzogasāra mu gihugu." 
Genesis26:23 Avayo aradūga, aja i Beri‐sheba." 
Genesis26:24 Uhoraho amwiyereka iryo joro, aramubgira, ati Nd’ Imana ya so Aburahamu: ntutinye, kuko ndi kumwe nawe, kandi nzoguha umugisha, ngwize uruvyaro rwawe, kubg’ umusavyi wanje Aburahamu." 
Genesis26:25 Yubakay’ igicaniro, yambaza izina ry’ Uhoraho, ashingayo amahema yiwe; na ho nyene abantu ba Isaka bahimba iriba." 
Genesis26:26 Maze Abimeleki ava i Gerari, aja iy’ari, ari kumwe na Ahuzati umumenyekana wiwe na Fikoli umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe." 
Genesis26:27 Isaka arababaza, ati N’iki kibazanye iyo ndi, kandi munyanka, mwaranyirukanye i wanyu?" 
Genesis26:28 Baramwishura, bati Twabonye rwose yuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe; tuti Hinge tuje gushira indahiro hagati yacu na we, dusezerane isezerano na we;" 
Genesis26:29 kugira ngo nawe ntuz’ utugirire nabi, nk’uko natwe tutakuriye n’urwara, ata co twakugize atar’ ivyiza gusa, kandi tukaba twagusēzeye amahoro. Tubonye k’Uhoraho yaguhaye." 
Genesis26:30 Nuko Isaka abarondereza amazimano, bararya, baranywa." 
Genesis26:31 Bakoroka kare, bashirah’ indahiro. Maze Isaka arabasēzera, bavayo bagenda amahoro." 
Genesis26:32 Kur’ uwo musi abantu ba Isaka baraza, bamubarira ivya rya riba bimvye, bati Turabonye amazi." 
Genesis26:33 Aryita Shiba: ni co gituma ico gisagara citwa Beri‐sheba na bugingo n’ubu. 
Genesis26:34 Esau amaze imyaka mirongwine arongora Yuditi mwene Beyeri Umuheti, na Basemati mwene Eloni Umuheti:" 
Genesis26:35 batuntuza imitima ya Isaka na Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 Isaka ashaje, amaso yiwe asigaye abona ivyijiji, ahwihwisha gusa, ahamagara imfura yiwe Esau, at’ Ewe mwana wanje! Aritaba, ati Sabge!" 
Genesis27:2 Aramubgira, ati Rāba ndashaje, sinzi umusi ruzompitana." 
Genesis27:3 Non’ enda rero, ni wābīre ivyo uhīgisha, umutana wawe n’umuheto wawe, ugende mw ishamba uhīge, undonderere akanyama," 
Genesis27:4 uheze uteke zīcumbe, nk’izo nsanzwe nkunda, uzinzanire ndye, mbone kuguhezagira ntarapfa." 
Genesis27:5 Rebeka yumviriza Isaka ivyo abarira Esau umwana wiwe. Nuko Esau aja mw ishamba kurondera ico ahīga ngw akizanire se. 
Genesis27:6 Maze Rebeka abarira Yakobo umwana wiwe, ati Numvise so abarira Esau mukurwawe," 
Genesis27:7 ngw agende amuzanire ico ahize, amutekere zīcumbe, arye, amuhezagirire imbere y’Uhoraho atarapfa." 
Genesis27:8 Nuko rero mwana wanje, enda ni wumve ivyo nkubarira:" 
Genesis27:9 genda mu mukuku, unzanirey’ amasuguru y’impene abiri meza‐meza; nanje ndonderere so, mmutekere zīcumbe, nk’ iz’ asanzwe akunda:" 
Genesis27:10 nawe uheze uzishīre so, arye, kugira ngw aguhezagire atarapfa." 
Genesis27:11 Yakobo yishura Rebeka nyina wiwe, at’ Ehe rāba, Esau mukurwanje n’umuntu yakatse ivyoya, nanje umubiri wanje n’inkūte." 
Genesis27:12 Kumbure data yonkorakora, ngasa n’ingunge kuri we, nkikwegera umuvumo mu gishingo c’umuhezagiro." 
Genesis27:13 Nyina aramwishura, ati Mwana wanje, umuvumo wovumwe uz’ube kuri jewe; pfa kunyumvira gusa, ugende uzinzanire." 
Genesis27:14 Aragenda arazizana, aziha nyina; nyina ateka inyama zazo, zirīcumba, ziba nk’ izo se asanzwe akunda." 
Genesis27:15 Rebeka yābīra imyambaro myiza ya Esau imfura yiwe, iyo yar’ afise mu nzu, ayambika Yakobo ari we Butoyi." 
Genesis27:16 Kand’ ashira insāto za ya masuguru y’impene ku bikonjo vyiwe, no kw izosi ah’ar’ inkūte." 
Genesis27:17 Ahereza uwo mwana wiwe Yakobo za nyama zīcumvye, n’umutsima yacumvye," 
Genesis27:18 na we aja iyo se ari, aramuhamagara, ati Data! aritaba, at’ Ee? at’ Uri nde ga mwana wanje?" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobo yishura se, ati Ni jewe Esau imfura yawe; nkoze ivyo wambariye; enda se vyuka wicare, urye ku vyo nahīze, kugira ng’umpezagire." 
Genesis27:20 Isaka abaza umwana wiwe, ati Ko waronse n’ingoga, ga mwana wanje? Ati N’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yawe ampaye kugira ibakwe." 
Genesis27:21 Isaka abarira Yakobo, at’ Enda īgira hino mwana wanje, ngukorakore, mmenye k’uri Esau umwana wanje koko, canke k’ utari we." 
Genesis27:22 Nuko Yakobo yegera se wiwe Isaka; aramukorakora, aravuga, at’ Ijwi n’irya Yakobo, arikw ibikonjo n’ivya Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Ntiyamenya uw’ari we, kukw ibikonjo vyiwe vyarik’ ubgoya, nk’ ivya mukuru we Esau: nukw aramuhezagira." 
Genesis27:24 Aramubaza, ati Mbeg’ uri Esau umwana wanje koko? Aramwishura, ati Ndi we." 
Genesis27:25 Aramubarira, ati Vyīgize hino, nanje ndye ku vyo wahīze, mwana wanje, kugira ngo nguhezagire. Arabimwegereza, ararya: amuzanira vino, arashōza." 
Genesis27:26 Maze se wiwe Isaka aramubarira, ati Nyegera mwana wanje, ungūmbīre." 
Genesis27:27 Aramwegera, aramugūmbīra: yumva ubutāmirane bg’imyambaro yiwe, aramuhezagira, at’ Ubutāmirane bg’umwana wanje Bumeze nk’ubg’ umurima Uhoraho yahaye umugisha:" 
Genesis27:28 Nukw Imana iguhe ku kime kiva mw ijuru, No ku biboribori vyo mu ndimiro, Hakikimbe impeke na vino:" 
Genesis27:29 Amoko az’ agukorere, Amahanga az’ akwikubite imbere: Uz’ uganze abo muvukana, Bene nyoko bakwikubite imbere; Ūzokuvuma wese avumwe, Ūzoguhezagira wese ahezagirwe." 
Genesis27:30 Nuko Isaka arangije guhezagira Yakobo, Yakobo akiva imbere ya se wiwe Isaka, Esau mukuru we aca arahīgūka." 
Genesis27:31 Na we ateka inyama zirīcumba, azizanira se; abarira se, ati Data, n’uvyuke urye ku vyo nahīze, jewe umwana wawe, kugira ng’umpezagire." 
Genesis27:32 Isaka se aramubaza, at’ Uri nde? Aramwishura, ati Ni jewe Esau, umwana wawe w’imfura." 
Genesis27:33 Isaka aca ahinda agashitsi kenshi cane, ati None ni nde yahīze, akanzanira kuri vyo, nkaba nariye, kuri vyose utaraza, nkamuhezagira? Kandi nta kabuza, umuhezagiro azowugira." 
Genesis27:34 Esau yumvise amajambo ya se, araturikisha, aborogana umubabaro mwinshi cane, abarira se, ati Mpezagira nanje se muvyeyi wanje!" 
Genesis27:35 Aramwishura, ati Murumunawe yaciye mu bugunge, atwara umuhezagiro wawe." 
Genesis27:36 Aramwishura, ati Yakobo ni Yakobo koko; izina ni ryo muntu! Yambereye intōnyōtsi kabiri kose: yannyaze kuba samuragwa, non’ asubiriye n’umuhezagiro wanje! Arongera aramubaza, ati Nta muhezagiro wansigarije na mba?" 
Genesis27:37 Isaka yishura Esau, at’ Erega namaze kumuha kukuganza, kand’ ab’i wabo nabamuhaye ngo bamusabe; kandi namweguriye ingano na vino; none nogukorera iki ga mwana wanje?" 
Genesis27:38 Esau abaza se, ati Mbega muvyeyi, war’ ufise umuhezagiro umwe gusa? Mpezagira nanje se muvyeyi wanje! Esau araturika ararira." 
Genesis27:39 Se wiwe Isaka aramwishura, at’ Uzoba kure y’ibiboribori vyo mu ndimiro, Uzoba kure y’ikime kiva mw ijuru;" 
Genesis27:40 Inkota yawe ni yo izokubeshaho, kand’ uzokorera murumunawe; Kand’ igihe kizogera uzokwigobōtora, Wikunkumure ingōgo yakwambitse mw izosi." 
Genesis27:41 Esau agirira Yakobo urwanko, kubg’ umuhezagiro se yamuhezagiye: maze Esau arivuganya mu mutima, ati Data ashigaje igihe gito tukaja ku kigandaro: ni ho nzokwica murumunanje Yakobo." 
Genesis27:42 Babarira Rebeka amagambo ya Esau imfura yiwe; ahamagaza Yakobo ari we Butoyi, aramubgira, at’ Umve, Esau mukurwawe agira yimare ishavu wamuteye, akwice." 
Genesis27:43 None rero mwana wanje, umve nkubarire: kūra hasi, uhunge, uje i Harani kwa Labani musazanje," 
Genesis27:44 ube uramazey’ imisi mikeya, gushitsa ah’ ishavu rya mukurwawe rizoshirira," 
Genesis27:45 akazika agufitiye kagashira kuri wewe, akibagira ivyo wamukoreye: maze nzoca ngutumako, ugaruke: none nobaburira rimwe mwempi?" 
Genesis27:46 Maze Rebeka abarira Isaka, ati Numva ndundumiwe kubg’ abo Bahetikazi, nopfuma mpfa! Yakobo yorongora Umuhetikazi nka ba bandi, noba nkibēreyeh’ iki?" 
Genesis28:1 Nuko Isaka ahamagara Yakobo, aramuhezagira, aramwihanikiriza, ati Ntuz’ usabe Umunyakananikazi." 
Genesis28:2 Va hasi, uje i Padan‐aramu kwa Betuweli sogokuru; uz’ usabey’ umugeni mu bakobga ba Labani nyokorome." 
Genesis28:3 Kand’ Imana Ishobora vyose iguhe umugisha, iguhe kurondoka, ikugwize, kugira ng’uhindukemw’ isinzi ry’amahanga." 
Genesis28:4 Kand’ iguhe umugisha yahaye Aburahamu, wewe n’uruvyaro rwawe na rwo, kugira ngo wegukire iki gihugu wabayemwo kitār’ icanyu, ico Imana yemereye guha Aburahamu." 
Genesis28:5 Nuko Isaka arungika Yakobo: aragenda, aja i Padan‐aramu kwa Labani mwene Betuweli Umwaramu, musaza wa Rebeka, nyina wa Yakobo na Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Maze Esau abona yuko Isaka ahezagiye Yakobo, akamurungika i Padan‐aramu gusabay’ umugeni; kandi ko yamwihanikirije akimuhezagira, ati Ntuz’ usabe Umunyakananikazi;" 
Genesis28:7 kandi ko Yakobo yumviye se na nyina, akaja i Padan‐aramu." 
Genesis28:8 Nuko Esau abonye yukw Abanyakananikazi batanezereye se wiwe Isaka," 
Genesis28:9 aca aja kwa Ishimayeli, asabayo Mahalati mushiki wa Nebayoti, umukobga wa Ishimayeli, Ishimayeli mwene Aburahamu, amuharika ba bagore yar’asanganywe." 
Genesis28:10 Yakobo ava i Beri‐sheba, agenda atumbereye i Harani." 
Genesis28:11 Ashika ahantu araharāra, kukw izuba ryari ricokeye: yābīra ibuye mu mabuye yaho, araryisegura, aryama aho hantu arasinzira." 
Genesis28:12 Ararota, abona icuririzo gishinzwe hasi, umutwe waco ugashika mw ijuru: abona abamarayika b’ Imana bakidūgako, bakimanukako." 
Genesis28:13 Kand’ Uhoraho yar’ ahagaze hejuru yaco, aramubarira, ati Nd’ Uhoraho, Imana ya Aburahamu sogokuru, Imana ya Isaka: iki gihugu uryamyemwo, nzokiguha, mwe n’uruvyaro rwawe;" 
Genesis28:14 kand’ uruvyaro rwawe ruzongana n’umukungugu wo hasi, ruzogasāra i burengerazuba n’i burasirazuba n’i burārūko n’i bumanuko: kandi muri wewe no mu ruvyaro rwawe ni ho imiryango yose yo mw isi izohērwa umugisha." 
Genesis28:15 Kand’ ehe rāba ndi kumwe nawe, nzokuzigamira ah’uzoja hose, kandi nzokugarukana mur’ iki gihugu; kuko ntazokureka ntarakora ivyo nkubariye." 
Genesis28:16 Yakobo arikangura, aravuga, ati N’ukuri Uhoraho ar’ aha hantu; nanje sinari ndabizi." 
Genesis28:17 Aratinya, aravuga, at’ Ereg’ aha hantu hateye ubgoba! At’ Aha n’inzu y’Imana s’ikindi, aha ni ho rembo ry’ijuru." 
Genesis28:18 Yakobo azinduka kare mu gatondo, yābīra rya buye yiseguye, ararishinga ngo ribe inkingi, arisukakw amavuta ya elayo." 
Genesis28:19 Aho hantu aca ahita Beteli, arik’ ubga mbere ico gisagara citwa Luzi." 
Genesis28:20 Yakobo asezerana isezerano, at’ Imana ni yabana nanje, ikanzigamira mur’ uru rugendo ndimwo, ikampa ivyo kurya n’ivyo kwambara," 
Genesis28:21 nkazogaruka kwa data nkir’ amahoro, Uhoraho azoba Imana yanje," 
Genesis28:22 n’iri buye nshinze kw inkingi rizoba inzu y’ Imana: ati Kandi ku vy’uzohora umpa vyose, sinzobura kuguhamw’ ikigiracumi." 
Genesis29:1 Yakobo araheza akomeza urugendo, ashika mu gihugu c’ababa i burasirazuba." 
Genesis29:2 Agize artya, abona iriba ku musozi, ririkw imikuku y’intama iri gutatu, ziryamye; kuko kur’ iryo riba ari ho bāshōra imikuku. Kand’ ikibuye gipfundikiye umunwa w’iriba cari kinini." 
Genesis29:3 Aho ni ho imikuku yose yakoranira, bagatembagaza ico kibuye, bakagikūra ku munwa w’iriba, bakavomera intama, bagaheza bakagisubiza ku munwa w’ iriba, aho cahora." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobo abaza abungere, ati Bagenzi, mbega mur’ aba hehe? Baramwishura, bati Tur’ Abanyaharani." 
Genesis29:5 Arababaza, ati Mbega Labani mwene Nahori muramuzi? Bati Turamuzi." 
Genesis29:6 Arababaza, at’ I we n’ amahoro? Baramwishura, bati N’ amahoro; kandi ngurya n’umwigeme wiwe Rakeli azanye intama." 
Genesis29:7 Arababgira, at’ Ehe rāba, izuba riracariho, amataha ntaragera ngo mwegeranye intama: ni muzishōre, muje kuba muraziragiye." 
Genesis29:8 Baramwishura, bati Ntitubishobora, imikuku yose itarakorana; kukw ikoranye, ni ho batembagaza ikibuye, bakagikūra ku munwa w’ iriba, tukabona kuvomera intama, zigashōka." 
Genesis29:9 Akivugana na bo, Rakeli arashika, azanye intama za se, kukw ari we yaziragira." 
Genesis29:10 Nuko Yakobo abonye Rakeli mwene Labani inarume, n’intama za inarume nyene Labani, aca yegera iriba, atembagaza ca kibuye agikūra ku munwa w’iriba, avomera umukuku wa Labani inarume, zirashōka." 
Genesis29:11 Yakobo agūmbīra Rakeli, araheza araturika ararira." 
Genesis29:12 Yakobo yibarira Rakeli kw afitanye akamwe na se, kw ar’ umwana wa Rebeka: na we aca arirukanga, abibgira se." 
Genesis29:13 Nuko Labani yumvise inkuru ya Yakobo mwishwa we, arirukanga, aramusanganira, amugwa mu nda aramugūmbīra, amujana i we. Na we adondera Labani ivyabaye vyose." 
Genesis29:14 Labani aramubgira, ati N’ukuri ur’ ubura bganje, ur’ amaraso yanje. Bamaranye ukwezi kumwe," 
Genesis29:15 Labani abarira Yakobo, ati Mbega kuko dufitaniye akamwe, ico cotuma unkorera ku busa? Enda mbarira: nze nkugerere iki?" 
Genesis29:16 Kandi Labani yar’ afise abakobga babiri: umukuru yitwa Leya, umutoya yitwa Rakeli." 
Genesis29:17 Leya yar’ afise amaso atarābika neza, ariko Rakeli yari mwiza wese w’umunyakaranga." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobo agomwa Rakeli; yishura Labani, ati Nzogukorera imyaka ndwi, uz’ umpe umwigeme wawe mutoya Rakeli." 
Genesis29:19 Labani aramwishura, ati Kumuha wewe biruta kumuha uwundi muntu wese: igumire ngaho." 
Genesis29:20 Nuko Yakobo akora imyaka ndwi kugira ngw ahabge Rakeli; imuhindukira nk’imisi mikeya, kubg’ urukundo amukunda." 
Genesis29:21 Maze Yakobo abarira Labani, ati Mpa umugeni wanje, ndamurongore, kukw imisi wanciriye yashitse." 
Genesis29:22 Labani atorera ubukwe abantu bose b’aho hantu, atereka amazimano." 
Genesis29:23 Ahenga mu kagoroba, azana Leya umwana wiwe aramumuha, aramurongora." 
Genesis29:24 Labani atanga Zilupa incoreke yiwe, amuha Leya umwana wiwe ngw amucorekere." 
Genesis29:25 Bukeye Yakobo agize artya, asanga ni Leya: abaza Labani, at’ Ivyo wangize n’ ibiki? Sinagukoreye kuri Rakeli? Icatumye umpenda n’iki?" 
Genesis29:26 Labani aramwishura, at’ I wacu ntibagenza bartyo, gutanga umutoya umukuru akir’ aho." 
Genesis29:27 Mara imisi ndwi yo mu nkinga, mwe n’ uyo, duheze tuguhe uwundi na we, nawe uz’unkorere iyindi myaka ndwi." 
Genesis29:28 Yakobo abigenza artyo, amara iyo misi ndwi y’inkinga; Labani araheza amushingira Rakeli umwana wiwe wundi." 
Genesis29:29 Labani aha uwo mwana wiwe Rakeli incoreke yiwe Biluha, ngw amucorekere." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobo arongora Rakeli na we, maz’ aramukundwakaza amurutisha Leya; nuko akorera Labani iyindi myaka ndwi." 
Genesis29:31 Maz’ Uhoraho abona yuko Leya yanswe, aca azibūra inda yiwe; ariko Rakeli aragumbaha." 
Genesis29:32 Leya asama inda, avyara umuhungu, amwita Reyubeni, ati N’uk’ Uhoraho yabonye umubabaro wanje; noneh’ umugabo wanje azonkunda." 
Genesis29:33 Asama inda y’ubuheta, avyara umuhungu, at’ Uhoraho kuko yumvise ko nanswe, ni co gitumye anyongera n’uyu: amwita Simeyoni." 
Genesis29:34 Yongera gusama inda, avyara umuhungu; ati Noneh’ umugabo wanje arifatanya nanje, kuko mmuvyariye abahungu batatu: ni co catumye yitwa Lewi." 
Genesis29:35 Yongera gusama inda, avyara umuhungu; at’ Ubuho ndashima Uhoraho: ni co catumye amwita Yuda. Nukw aba araretse kuvyara." 
Genesis30:1 Rakeli abonye atavyaranye na Yakobo akana, agirira ishari mukuru we; abarira Yakobo, ati Mpa abana; utabampaye, mpfuma mpfa." 
Genesis30:2 Maz’ uburake bga Yakobo buziriringira Rakeli, ati Mbega jewe ndi mu gishingo c’ Imana, kw ari yo yakwimye ivyara?" 
Genesis30:3 Aramwishura, at’ Ehe nguyo incoreke yanje: n’umurārire, kugira ngw amvyarire abana, ndonkere ivyara kuri we." 
Genesis30:4 Amuha Biluha incoreke yiwe: nuko Yakobo aramurārira. 
Genesis30:5 Biluha asama inda, avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu." 
Genesis30:6 Rakeli aravuga, at’ Imana inciriye urubanza, ndatsinda, kandi yumvise ijwi ryanje, impa umuhungu: ni co catumye amwita Dani." 
Genesis30:7 Maze Biluha, incoreke ya Rakeli araheta, asama inda, avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu wa kabiri." 
Genesis30:8 Rakeli aravuga, ati Nniganye na mwene mama bikomeye, ndamunesha: amwita Nafutali." 
Genesis30:9 Leya abonye aretse kuvyara, yābīra Zilupa incoreke yiwe, amuha Yakobo." 
Genesis30:10 Zilupa incoreke ya Leya avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu. 
Genesis30:11 Leya aravuga, ati Ngize imana! Amwita Gadi." 
Genesis30:12 Maze Zilupa incoreke ya Leya avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu wa kabiri. 
Genesis30:13 Leya aravuga, ati Ndahiriwe! Kukw abandi bagore bazonyita umuhirwa: amwita Asheri." 
Genesis30:14 Maze mw igenya ry’ingano, Reyubeni aragenda, ahūmuka ku madudayimu mu ndimiro, ayazanira nyina Leya. Rakeli asaba Leya, ati Mpa se ku tududayimu umwana wawe azanye." 
Genesis30:15 Leya aramwishura, at’ Uvyise ivyoroshe kuntwara umugabo? Non’ ugomba kuntwara amadudayimu umwana wanje azanye? Rakeli aramwishura, ati None rero, iri joro arakurārira, n’umpe utududayimu tw’umwana wawe." 
Genesis30:16 Ku mugoroba Yakobo atashe, avuye mu ndimiro, Leya arasohoka aja kumutega, aramubgira, ati Ni jewe ukwiye kurārira, kuko nagutangiye ingero y’amadudayimu y’umwana wanje. Nukw amurārira iryo joro." 
Genesis30:17 Imana yumvira Leya, asama inda, avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu agira gatanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leya aravuga, at’ Imana irangereye, kuko nahaye umugabo wanje incoreke yanje. Amwita Isakari." 
Genesis30:19 Leya asama iyindi nda, avyarana na Yakobo umuhungu agira gatandatu." 
Genesis30:20 Leya aravuga, at’ Imana ingabiye ingabire nziza, noneh’ umugabo wanje azobana nanje, kuko mmuvyariye abahungu batandatu. Amwita Zebuloni." 
Genesis30:21 Hanyuma avyara umukobga, amwita Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Maz’ Imana yibuka Rakeli, iramwumvira, izibūra inda yiwe." 
Genesis30:23 Asama inda, avyara umuhungu, at’ Imana irantēturuye:" 
Genesis30:24 amwita Yosefu, at’ Uhoraho ampetere uwundi muhungu." 
Genesis30:25 Nuko Rakeli amaze kuvyara Yosefu, Yakobo abarira Labani, ati Ndekura ngende, nsubire i wacu mu gihugu cacu." 
Genesis30:26 Mpa abagore banje n’abana banje, abo nakoreye, nīgīre; kuk’ uzi ukuntu nagukoreye." 
Genesis30:27 Labani aramwishura, at’ Icompa ukanezererwa kugumana nanje! Kuko nabonye rwose yuk’ Uhoraho yampaye umugisha kubgawe." 
Genesis30:28 Ati Ncira ingero nzokugerera, nanje nzoyitanga." 
Genesis30:29 Aramwishura, at’ Urazi ingene nagukoreye, n’ukuntu nagendanye imikuku yawe." 
Genesis30:30 Kukw ivyo war’ ufise ntaraza vyari bike, none vyaragwiriye biba ibitayega; kand’ Uhoraho yaguhaye umugisha uhereye aho nashinze ikirenge hose: none jeho nzokwironderera ryari ivy’ urugo rwanje na rwo?" 
Genesis30:31 Aramubaza, ati None nokugerera iki? Yakobo aramwishura, ati Nta co nkwātse: ndemeye gukomeza kukuragirira umukuku wawe no kuwuzigama, ni wemera kunkorera kino:" 
Genesis30:32 ko nogendagenda mu mukuku wawe wose uyu musi, ngasobanuramw’ igitungwa cose c’umufumberi n’ic’ amabara y’ibigabo, ar’ intama yose y’ikiyumbu, ar’ impene z’amabara y’ibigabo n’iz’ imifumberi: ben’ izo ni zo zizoba ingero yanje." 
Genesis30:33 Uku ni k’ukuri kwanje kuzontsindira mu gihe c’imbere: ni waza kwitegereza ingero zanje zivuye i wawe, hakaramuka habonetsemw’ impene itar’ iy’ umufumberi cank’ iy’ amabara y’ibigabo, cank’ intama itar’ ikiyumbu, mu z’iwanje, uz’ uyite inyibano." 
Genesis30:34 Labani aramwishura, ati Ndavyemeye: bize bibe nk’uk’ uvuze." 
Genesis30:35 Ariko Labani ahenga uwo musi nyene, arobanura amapfizi y’impene y’ibibaba n’ay’ amabara y’ibigabo, n’izivyara zose z’imifumberi n’iz’ ibigabo, impene yose y’ibara ryera, n’intama zose z’ibiyumbu, aziragiza abahungu biwe." 
Genesis30:36 Ashira itandukaniro hagati yabo na Yakobo ry’urugendo rw’imisi itatu. Nuko Yakobo aragira imikuku ya Labani isigaye. 
Genesis30:37 Yakobo aca inkoni mbisi zitwa imilebeni n’izitwa shakedi n’ izitwa imyarumoni, azicakw amabara yera asa n’imisengo, agaragaza ahēra h’imbere ku nkoni." 
Genesis30:38 Ashira izo nkoni yaciyekw amabara imbere y’imikuku ku migende no ku ngomero ah’imikuku iza kunywera: kand’ iyo zije kunywa zaca zima. 
Genesis30:39 Imikuku yimira imbere y’izo nkoni, ikavyara iz’ ibibaba n’iz’ imifumberi n’iz’ amabara y’ibigabo." 
Genesis30:40 Izivutse Yakobo yazishira ukwazo, maz’ imikuku akayibangurira iz’ ibibaba n’iz’ ibiyumbu zose mu mukuku wa Labani; agashira imikuku yiwe ukwayo, ntayisukiranye n’iya Labani." 
Genesis30:41 Kand’ ukw inziza zo mu mukuku zirinze, Yakobo yashira za nkoni imbere y’umukuku ku migende, kugira ngo zimire hagati y’izo nkoni." 
Genesis30:42 Arikw iyo zibaye mbi‐mbi ntazishireho: bituma imbi ziba iza Labani, inziza ziba iza Yakobo." 
Genesis30:43 Uwo mugabo agwiza itunga cane, agira imikuku myinshi n’abatungano b’abakobga n’abahungu n’ingamiya n’ indogoba." 
Genesis31:1 Bukeye Yakobo yumva amagambo y’abahungu ba Labani, bat’ Ivyar’ ivya data Yakobo yavyinyagiye vyose, mbere mu vya data ni ho yakūye ubgo butunzi bgose." 
Genesis31:2 Yakobo abona yuko Labani atakimurāba ijisho ryiza nka mbere. 
Genesis31:3 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yakobo, ati Ngo usubire mu gihugu ca ba sogokuruza muri bene wanyu: nanje nzobana nawe." 
Genesis31:4 Nuko Yakobo atuma guhamagaza Rakeli na Leya ngo bamusange mu mukuku wiwe iy’ aragiye. 
Genesis31:5 Arababgira, ati Nabonye so atakindāba ijisho ryiza nka mbere; arikw Imana ya data yagumanye nanje." 
Genesis31:6 Namwe murazi yuko nakoreye so uko nashoboye kwose. 
Genesis31:7 Kandi so yagiye angunga, ahindura ingero zanje ibihetangabo cumi; arikw Imana ntiyamukundiye kugira ico ankorako." 
Genesis31:8 Iy’ ambariye, at’ Iz’ imifumberi ni zo zizoba ingero yawe, umukuku wose waca uvyara imifumberi; yambarira, ngw Iz’ ibibaba ni zo zizoba ingero yawe, umukuku wose ugaca uvyara iz’ ibibaba." 
Genesis31:9 Uko ni kw Imana yanyaze so ibitungwa vyiwe, ikabimpa." 
Genesis31:10 Kand’ igihe umukuku war’urinze, nunamuye amaso ndi mu nzozi, ndota mbona impfizi z’impene zūrira umukuku zar’iz’ ibibaba n’iz’ imifumberi n’iz’ ibidorodonzi." 
Genesis31:11 Maz’ umumarayika w’ Imana ampamagarira mur’ izo nzozi, ati Yakobo! Nti Sabge!" 
Genesis31:12 Arambarira, at’ Unamura amaso yawe, urābe: eh’ impfizi z’ impene zose zūriye umukuku n’iz’ ibibaba n’iz’ imifumberi n’iz’ ibidorodonzi: kuko nabonye ivyo Labani akugirira vyose." 
Genesis31:13 Ni jewe Mana yakubonekeye i Beteli, hamwe wasiga amavuta ku nkingi y’ibuye, ukahansezeranira isezerano: nuko none va hasi, uve mur’ iki gihugu, usubire mu gihugu wavukiyemwo." 
Genesis31:14 Rakeli na Leya baramwishura, bati Mbega mu rugo rwa data har’ umugabane tuhafise, cank’ ivyo tuzoragwa?" 
Genesis31:15 Ntaduharūra nk’abanyamahanga? Ko yatuguze, akaba yarahejeje inkwano zacu." 
Genesis31:16 Ubutunzi bgose Imana yanyaze data n’ubgacu n’abana bacu: nukw ico Imana ikubgiye cose, ugikore." 
Genesis31:17 Maze Yakobo ava hasi, ashira abana biwe n’abagore biwe ku ngamiya;" 
Genesis31:18 ashorera n’ubusho bgiwe bgose n’ubutunzi bgose yaronse, ubusho yaronkeye i Padan‐aramu, kugira ngw aje kwa se Isaka mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis31:19 Maze Labani yari yagiye gukemuza intama ziwe; nuko Rakeli yiba ibigirwamana vya se. 
Genesis31:20 Yakobo yiyiba Labani Umwaramu mu gucika, kukw ata co yarinze kumubarira." 
Genesis31:21 Nukw acikana ivyo yar’ afise vyose; arīkora, ajabuka uruzi, agenda atumbereye umusozi w’i Gileyadi." 
Genesis31:22 Ku musi ugira gatatu babūrira Labani yuko Yakobo yacitse. 
Genesis31:23 Ajana na bene wabo, amara imisi ndwi amwometse inyuma, araruha amuhambiriza ku musozi w’i Gileyadi." 
Genesis31:24 Mw ijoro, Imana iza kuri Labani Umwaramu mu nzozi, iramubarira, iti Wirinde, ntugire iryo ubarira Yakobo iry’ ari ryo ryose." 
Genesis31:25 Nuko Labani ashikīra Yakobo. Yakobo yar’ashinze amahema ku musozi, Labani na bene wabo na bo bashinga ku musozi w’i Gileyadi." 
Genesis31:26 Labani abaza Yakobo, at’ Ico wakoze ico n’iki, catumye unyiyiba, ukajana abana banje nk’inyagano?" 
Genesis31:27 Wabitewe n’iki gucika mu mpisho, ukanyiyiba, ntumbarire ngo ngusēzeze ikiyāgo c’umunezero no kuririmba no kuvuza agashāko k’ingoma n’inanga," 
Genesis31:28 ntunkundire kugūmbīra abuzukuru banje n’abana banje? Wakoze ivy’ ubupfu. 
Genesis31:29 Nari kugira ico mbakorako, arikw Imana ya so yambariye mur’ iri joro, iti Wirinde ntugire iryo ubarira Yakobo iry’ ari ryo ryose." 
Genesis31:30 None ko war’ ugomvye kugenda ni koko, kuk’ ukumbuye cane i wanyu; ariko n’iki catumye wiba imana zanje?" 
Genesis31:31 Yakobo yishura Labani, at’ Irya mbere, n’uko natinye ko wonnyaga abakobga bawe;" 
Genesis31:32 irya kabiri, uwo uribubonane imana zawe, akwiye gupfa: enda n’usake icawe coba mu vyanje, ngaha imbere ya bene wacu, ukijane! Kuko Yakobo atar’ azi ko Rakeli yazivye." 
Genesis31:33 Nuko Labani yinjira mw ihema rya Yakobo, no mu rya Leya, no mu rya za ncoreke zompi; arazibura. Ava mw ihema rya Leya, yinjira mu rya Rakeli." 
Genesis31:34 Ariko Rakeli yari yabiriye vya bigirwamana, abishira mu matandiko y’ingamiya, avyicarako. Labani asaka mw ihema hose, arabura." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeli abgira se, ati Ntungirire umwikomo ko ntaguhagurukiye, nyakwubahwa, n’uke ndi mu mihango y’abagore. Nukw arasaka, ariko ntiyabona vya bigirwamana." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobo araraka, atonganya Labani; aramubaza, ati Nagucumuyekw iki, nakoze icaha ki, catumye uzinga bufuri ukanyoma inyuma?" 
Genesis31:37 None k’usatse mu bintu vyanje vyose, ubonye iki co mu vyo mu rugo rwawe? Kizane hano, ugishire hagati y’izi ncuti zanje n’izawe, badutātūre." 
Genesis31:38 Mur’ iyi myaka mirongwibiri twamaranye, intama zawe n’impene zawe ntizaramburuye, amapfizi y’intama yo mu mukuku wawe sinayariye." 
Genesis31:39 Iyatabaguwe n’igikōko sinakuzanira ikirangara, yapfira jewe; izibge warazindihisha, ar’izo ku murango canke mw ijoro." 
Genesis31:40 Eh’ ayo nabonye: ku murango nicwa n’indugumba, mw ijoro nkicwa n’ imbeho; itiro rikaguruka ku maso." 
Genesis31:41 Mur’ iyi myaka ukw ari mirongwibiri naba i wawe, nagukoreye imyaka cumi n’ine nca abakobga bawe bompi, n’iyindi itandatu ngucak’ umukuku w’intungwa: kandi wahinduye ingero zanje ibihetangabo cumi." 
Genesis31:42 Iy’ itaba Imana ya data yarabanye nanje, Imana ya Aburahamu, iyo Isaka nyene yubaha, ntiwari kubura kundungika nd’inkokore. Imana yabonye umubabaro wanje n’ubutame bganje, maz’ iri joro yarāye irwahukanije." 
Genesis31:43 Maze Labani yishura Yakobo, at’ Ereg’ aba bakobga n’abanje, n’aba bana n’abanje, n’iyi mikuku n’iyanje, n’ivyo ubona ibi vyose n’ivyanje: none noshobora nte kugira ico ngirira aba bakobga banje, cank’ abana bāvyaye?" 
Genesis31:44 None rero ngo ducane urusāgi twe nawe, habe icabona hagati yanje nawe." 
Genesis31:45 Yakobo yābīra ibuye, arishinga nk’inkingi." 
Genesis31:46 Yakobo abarira incuti ziwe, ati Ni mukoranye amabuye; nuko barayazana, bayagira ikigūngūzi; basangirira aho nyene kur’ ico kigūngūzi." 
Genesis31:47 Labani acita Yegari‐sahaduta: Yakobo na we acita Galedi. 
Genesis31:48 Labani aravuga, at’ Iki kigūngūzi kibaye icabona hagati ya twe nawe uyu musi. Ni co catumye citwa Galedi:" 
Genesis31:49 bo na Mizipa, kuko Labani yavuze, at’ Uhoraho yame ahagaze hagati ya twe nawe tumaze gutandukana." 
Genesis31:50 Ni waramuka ugiriye nabi abakobga banje, canke ni wabaharika, umenye yuko, nah’ ata wundi muntu azoba ariho, Imana izoba ari yo cabona hagati ya twe nawe." 
Genesis31:51 Kandi Labani abarira Yakobo, ati Ngiki ikigūngūzi n’iyi nkingi nshinze hagati yacu." 
Genesis31:52 Iki kigūngūzi ni kibe icabona, n’iyi nkingi na yo nyene n’ibe icabona, yuko ntazorenga iki kigūngūzi nzanywe no kukugirira nabi, nawe k’utazorenga iki kigūngūzi n’iyi nkingi uzanywe no kungirira nabi." 
Genesis31:53 Imana ya Aburahamu, Imana ya Nahori, Imana ya se w’abo bompi, n’ibe kamaramagambo hagati yacu. Yakobo arahira Iyo se Isaka yubaha." 
Genesis31:54 Yakobo atangira ikimazi kur’ uwo musozi, ahamagara izo ncuti ziwe ngo basangire: nuko bararya, barāra iryo joro kur’ uwo musozi." 
Genesis31:55 Labani azinduka kare mu gatondo, agūmbīra abuzukuru biwe n’abakobga biwe, arabahezagira: nuko Labani arataha, asubira i wabo." 
Genesis32:1 Nuko Yakobo akomeza urugendo, maz’ abamarayika b’ Imana bahūra na we." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobo ababonye, aravuga, at’ Aha ni ho ingabo z’Imana zishagaje: yita aho hantu Mahanayimu." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobo atuma intumwa ngo zimwītangire imbere zije kwa Esau mukuru we mu gihugu c’i Seyiri, mu ntāra ya Edomu." 
Genesis32:4 Arababarira, at’ Uku abe ari ko muzobgira nyakwubahwa Esau, mut’ Umusavyi wawe Yakobo, muti Yabana na Labani kugeza ubu;" 
Genesis32:5 muti Kand’ afise inka n’indogoba n’imikuku n’abatungano b’abahungu n’abakobga: muti Non’ adutumye kubikumenyesha, mugenzi, kugira ngw agirirwe akagongwe imbere yawe." 
Genesis32:6 Izo ntumwa zigaruka kuri Yakobo, ziti Twarashitse kwa mukurwawe Esau, non’ araje kugusanganira, kand’ azananye n’ingabo amajana ane." 
Genesis32:7 Yakobo aca aranduka umutima, arihebūra; maz’ agabanyamwo kubiri abantu bāri kumwe na we, n’imikuku n’amasho n’ingamiya;" 
Genesis32:8 ati Esau ni yaramuka aserukiye ku muce umwe akawunyaga, ūsigaye wokira." 
Genesis32:9 Maze Yakobo aratakamba, ati Mana ya sogokuru Aburahamu, Mana ya data Isaka, ewe Uhoraho, si wewe wambariye, uti Subira mu gihugu canyu, no muri bene wanyu, uti Nanje nzokugirira neza?" 
Genesis32:10 Izo mbabazi zose wagiriye umusavyi wawe, n’ukuntu utampemukiye, sinari mbereye kugirirwa na bikeya; kuko najabutse Yorodani uru nitwaje akoho gusa, none nahindutse imice ibiri." 
Genesis32:11 Ndakwinginze, n’unkize, unkūre mu maboko ya mukurwanje Esau: kuko ndamutinya, yoye kuza akanyicana n’abana na ba nyina." 
Genesis32:12 Kand’ ari wewe wambariye, uti Sinzobura kukugirira neza, uti Nzohindura uruvyaro rwawe, rungane n’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga, w’isinzi utōharūrika." 
Genesis32:13 Arāra ngaho iryo joro; yābīra ku vyo yar’ afise, ngw abihe Esau mukuru we kw indamukanyo:" 
Genesis32:14 impene zivyara amajana abiri, n’iz’ amasuguru mirongwibiri, n’ intama zivyara amajana abiri, n’iz’ amasuguru mirongwibiri," 
Genesis32:15 n’ ingamiya zonsa mirongwitatu n’ ivyana vyazo, n’inka mirongwine n’amapfizi cumi, n’indogoba zivyara mirongwibiri n’ivyana cumi." 
Genesis32:16 Abiha abantu biwe, ubusho bgose ukwabgo; arababarira, ati Ni munyītangire imbere mujabuke, kandi mugende muhānye inta hagati y’ubusho n’ubundi." 
Genesis32:17 Abgira uwa mbere, ati Mukurwanje Esau ni mwahūra, akakubaza, at’ Ur’ uwa nde, kand’ uja hehe? n’ ivyo ushoreye n’ivya nde?" 
Genesis32:18 uheze umwishure, uti N’ivy’ umusavyi wawe Yakobo, n’indamukanyo akurungikiye, databuja Esau; uti Kandi na we nyene ar’ inyuma yacu." 
Genesis32:19 Maz’ abarira n’ uwa kabiri n’uwa gatatu kuno nyene, n’abashoreye ayo masho bose, at’ Ukw abe ari ko mubarira Esau, ni mwamubona:" 
Genesis32:20 kandi muvuge, muti Mbere n’umusavyi wawe Yakobo ar’ inyuma yacu. Kuko yiyumviriye, ati Reka ndamuhōyahōyeshe indamukanyo zinyītangiye imbere, mpeze mbone guseruka imbere yiwe: kumbure yondeka akampangaza." 
Genesis32:21 Nukw izo ndamukanyo zimwītangira imbere, ziragenda; ariko we arāra ngaho iryo joro ah’ abiwe bashagaje." 
Genesis32:22 Avyuka mur’ iryo joro, ahitana abagore biwe bompi n’incoreke ziwe zompi n’abana biwe ukw ar’ icumi n’umwe, ajabuka icambu ca Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 Arabajana, abajabutsa uwo mugezi, ajabutsa n’ivyo yar’ afise vyose." 
Genesis32:24 Maze Yakobo asigarayo wenyene. Haza umugabo, baranigana, bashitsa mu mutwenzi." 
Genesis32:25 Uwo mugabo abonye yukw atamushoboye, akora ku mutsi wo ku nyonga y’itako ryiwe, umutsi wo ku nyonga y’itako rya Yakobo urahinyagara bakiriko baranigana." 
Genesis32:26 Uwo mugabo aramubarira, ati Ndekura, kuk’ umutwenzi utambitse. Aramwishura, ati Sinkurekura, utampezagiye." 
Genesis32:27 Na we aramubaza, ati Witwa nde? Ati Ndi Yakobo." 
Genesis32:28 Aramubarira, ati Ntucitwa Yakobo ukundi, ariko wiswe Isirayeli; kuko waniganye n’Imana n’abantu, ukanesha." 
Genesis32:29 Yakobo aramubgira, ati Ndakwinginze, nyibarira. Aramubaza, at’ Umbariza iki izina ryanje? Amuhezagirira aho hantu." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobo yita aho hantu Peniyeli: ati Mbonye Imana imbonankubone, non’ ehe ndacariho!" 
Genesis32:31 Izuba rirasa akirenga Peniyeli, agenda acumbagira itako ryiwe." 
Genesis32:32 Ico ni co gituma Abisirayeli batarya umutsi w’ifyinga uri ku nyonga y’itako, na bugingo n’ubu; kuko wa mugabo yakoze ku mutsi wo ku nyonga y’itako rya Yakobo." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobo yunamura amaso, agize artya abona Esau aje, ari kumwe n’abantu amajana ane. Atandukanya abana, abaha Leya na Rakeli na za ncoreke zompi." 
Genesis33:2 Atanguza imbere izo ncoreke n’ abana bazo, akurikizako Leya n’ abana biwe, Rakeli na Yosefu abashira inyuma." 
Genesis33:3 Maz’ ubgiwe abaja imbere, akubita inkoro hasi ibihetangabo ndwi, kugeza yegereye mukuru we." 
Genesis33:4 Esau ariruka aramusanganira, amugwa mu gikiriza, amurenganyakw amaboko, aramugūmbīra: baca bararira." 
Genesis33:5 Esau yunamura amaso, abona ba bagore n’abana, aramubaza, ati Barya muri kumwe n’aba hehe? Aramwishura, at’ Abo n’abana Imana yahereye ubuntu umusavyi wawe." 
Genesis33:6 Maze za ncoreke bo n’abana bazo bīgira hafi, baramwunamira." 
Genesis33:7 Na Leya n’abana biwe bīgira hafi, baramwunamira; hakurikirako Yosefu na Rakeli bīgira hafi, baramwunamira." 
Genesis33:8 Aramubaza, at’ Ayo masho yose twahūye, yo n’ay’ iki? Aramwishura, ati N’ayo kugira ngo ngirirwe akagongwe imbere yawe, mugenzi." 
Genesis33:9 Esau aramwishura, ati Mfise ibimpāgije: mwana wa mama, ivyo ufise uvyigumirize." 
Genesis33:10 Yakobo aramwishura, at’ Oyaye! Ni naba ngiriwe akagongwe imbere yawe, ndakwinginze, emera indamukanyo nguhaye: kuko kukubona, n’ingen’ unyakiriye neza, ni nko kubona Imana." 
Genesis33:11 Nuko ndakwinginze, akīra iyo ngabire nkurungikiye; kukw Imana yangiriye ubuntu, kandi mfise ibimpāgije. Aramugōbēra, aravyākīra." 
Genesis33:12 Esau aramubarira, ati Ngo dufate inzira, tugende, nanje ndakuja imbere." 
Genesis33:13 Yakobo aramwishura, ati Databuja, urazi kw abana batagira intege, kandi kw imikuku n’amasho mfise vyonsa: bobishorera ihutihuti, naho woba umusi umwe gusa, vyopfa vyose." 
Genesis33:14 Ndakwinginze, databuja, ni witangire imbere y’umusavyi wawe, nanje ndaza buhoro, nk’uko kugenda kw’ivyo nshoreye kuri, kandi nk’uko kugenda kw’abana kuri, nshirwe nshitse i wawe i Seyiri, databuja." 
Genesis33:15 Esau aramubarira, ati Reka ngusigarane bamwe mu bo turi kumwe. Yakobo aramwishura, ati Nta co biriko: kizima ngiriwe akagongwe imbere yawe, databuja." 
Genesis33:16 Nuk’ uwo musi nyene, Esau arahindukira, yisubirira i Seyiri." 
Genesis33:17 Ariko Yakobo aja i Sukoti yiyubakiray’ inzu, aca n’ ibirāro vy’imikuku yiwe n’amasho: ni co catumye aho hantu hitwa Sukoti." 
Genesis33:18 Nuko Yakobo avuye i Padan‐aramu ashika amahoro mu gisagara ca Shekemu, co mu gihugu c’i Kanani; ashinga amahema imbere y’igisagara." 
Genesis33:19 Ikibanza yashinzemw’ amahema yiwe akigura na bene Hamori, ari we se wa Shekemu, amahera ijana y’ifeza yitwa kesita." 
Genesis33:20 Yubakay’ igicaniro, acita El‐elohe‐Isirayeli." 
Genesis34:1 Dina, umukobga Leya na Yakobo bavyaranye, aragenda aja kuramutsa abakobga bo mur’ ico gihugu." 
Genesis34:2 Maze mwene Hamori Umuhiwi, atwara ico gihugu, yitwa Shekemu, aramubona; aramufata, aramusindira, aryamana na we." 
Genesis34:3 Ahereza umutima kuri Dina mwene Yakobo; akunda uwo mwigeme, amubarira amagambo asosa." 
Genesis34:4 Shekemu abarira se Hamori, ati Nsabira uyu mukobga." 
Genesis34:5 Nuko Yakobo yumva yuko Shekemu yononye Dina umwana wiwe; arikw abahungu biwe bari mu musozi baragiye. Nuko Yakobo arihorera gushitsa baje. 
Genesis34:6 Maze Hamori se wa Shekemu aja kwa Yakobo ngo babonane. 
Genesis34:7 Bene Yakobo bumvise ivyabaye, bava iyo baragiye, barataha: kandi barababara, bararaka cane, kuko yakoze ikizira ku Bisirayeli, ni co kuryamana n’umukobga wa Yakobo, ar’ikidakwiye gukorwa." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori avugana na bo, at’ Umutima w’umwana wanje wazimiriye ku mukobga wanyu: ndabinginze, ni mumumuhe." 
Genesis34:9 Kandi mushingirane natwe: mudushingire abakobga banyu, namwe murongore abacu." 
Genesis34:10 Kandi mubane natwe, n’igihugu ngico, muraja aho mugomba; mukibemwo, mukidandazemwo, mwikūriremw’ amaronko." 
Genesis34:11 Na Shekemu abarira se wa Dina na basaza be, ati Ni munkunde, munyemere, maz’ ico muncira cose ndakibaha." 
Genesis34:12 Inkwano mwoncira n’ingabire mwonsaba, uko biribungane kwose, ndabibaha uko mubinyatse: ariko mumpe uwo mwigeme." 
Genesis34:13 Bene Yakobo bishura Shekemu na se wiwe Hamori mu buryarya, kuko Shekemu yononye Dina mushiki wabo." 
Genesis34:14 Baramubgira, bati N’ikintu tutoshobora, gushingira mushiki wacu umuntu atākebge; kukw ico coba akamāramāza kuri twebge." 
Genesis34:15 Icobitwemeza n’iki kimwe gusa, n’uko mwoba nkatwe, umuntu wese muri mwebge agakebga;" 
Genesis34:16 ni ho twobashingira abakobga bacu, tukarongora abanyu, tukabana namwe, tugahinduka ubgoko bumwe." 
Genesis34:17 Ariko ni mutatwumvira, ngo mukebge, tuzohitana umukobga wacu, twīgīre." 
Genesis34:18 Amajambo yabo anezereza Hamori na Shekemu umwana wiwe. 
Genesis34:19 Uwo muhungu ntiyatebagana kubikora, kuko yakunda umukobga wa Yakobo: kandi Shekemu yarubahwa gusumba abo mu nzu ya se bose." 
Genesis34:20 Nuko Hamori n’ umwana wiwe Shekemu baja kw irembo ry’igisagara cabo, baja inama n’abagabo bo mur’ ico gisagara," 
Genesis34:21 bat’ Abo bantu n’abagwaneza; enda ni tubareke babe mu gihugu, bakidandazemwo; kukw igihugu cagutse, bagikwirwamwo; turongore abakobga babo, natwe tubashingire abacu." 
Genesis34:22 Arikw icobemeza kubana natwe, no guhinduka ubgoko bumwe, n’iki kimwe gusa, n’uk’ umuntu wese muri twebge yokebga, nk’uko na bo bakebga." 
Genesis34:23 Mbeg’ inka zabo n’ibintu vyabo n’ibiyevera vyabo vyose ntibizoba ivyacu? Mugabo tubemerere gusa, na bo babane natwe." 
Genesis34:24 Abaca mw irembo ry’igisagara cabo bose bumvira Hamori n’umwana wiwe Shekemu; izinamuhungu wese arakebga, uwaca mw irembo ry’igisagara cabo wese." 
Genesis34:25 Maze ku musi ugira gatatu, abo bagikanashijwe, bene Yakobo babiri, Simeyoni na Lewi, basaza ba Dina, bahitana inkota zabo, batera igisagara giturumbuka, bica abagabo baho bose." 
Genesis34:26 Bicisha Hamori inkota, n’umuhungu wiwe Shekemu, bahitana Dina mu nzu ya Shekemu, bavayo." 
Genesis34:27 Bene Yakobo bakoba imivyimba, basahura igisagara, babahōra kwonona mushiki wabo." 
Genesis34:28 Banyaga imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo n’indogoba zabo, n’ivyari mu gisagara n’ivyari mu misozi;" 
Genesis34:29 banyaga ubutunzi bgabo bgose, bafata mpiri abana babo bose n’abagore babo, n’ivyari mu nzu vyose." 
Genesis34:30 Maze Yakobo abarira Simeyoni na Lewi, ati Munkwegeye ibara, kuko mutumye nzinukwa na ben’ igihugu, Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi; kandi ko tur’ inkehwa, bazokwikoraniriza hamwe, bantere, mpeze ndanduke, ndanduranwe n’inzu yanje." 
Genesis34:31 Baramwishura, bati Mbega vyari bibereye kw agirira mushiki wacu artyo, nk’ aho yari maraya?" 
Genesis35:1 Imana ibarira Yakobo, iti Va hasi, udūge i Beteli, ugerēreyo: unyubakire igicaniro, jewe Imana nakubonekeye igihe wahunga Esau mwene nyoko." 
Genesis35:2 Maze Yakobo aca abarira abiwe n’ abari kumwe na we bose, ati Ni mukūreh’ ibigirwamana vy’abanyamahanga biri muri mwebge, mwihumanure, mwambare izindi mpuzu:" 
Genesis35:3 tuve hasi, tudūge, tuje i Beteli, nanje nubakirey’ Imana igicaniro, imwe yanyumvira ku musi w’ivyago vyanje, kandi yagendanye nanje mu nzira nagenzemwo zose." 
Genesis35:4 Baha Yakobo ibigirwamana vy’abanyamahanga vyose bari bafise, n’impeta zari ku matwi yabo; Yakobo abizīka musi y’ igiti citwa umweloni cari hafi y’i Shekemu." 
Genesis35:5 Nuko baragenda; Imana itera ubgoba ibisagara bibakikije, ntibakurikira bene Yakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Nuko Yakobo ashika i Luzi, ari ho Beteli, ho mu gihugu c’i Kanani, bo n’abantu bose bāri kumwe." 
Genesis35:7 Ahubaka igicaniro, yita aho hantu Eli‐beteli: kukw ari ho Imana yamwiyerekeye, igihe yahunga mukuru we." 
Genesis35:8 Kandi Debora, umurezi yari yarareze Rebeka arapfa; bamuhamba hepfo y’i Beteli, musi y’igiti citwa umweloni: bacita Aloni‐bakuti." 
Genesis35:9 Igihe Yakobo yar’ agarutse avuyei Padan‐aramu, Imana yongeye kumwiyereka, iramuhezagira." 
Genesis35:10 Imana iramubarira, it’ Izina ryawe ryari Yakobo; ariko ntucitwa Yakobo ukundi, wiswe Isirayeli. Nukw imwita Isirayeli." 
Genesis35:11 Imana iramubarira, iti Ni jewe Mana Ishobora vyose; urondoke, ugwire; ihanga rizogukomōkako, mbere n’igugu ry’amahanga, n’abami bazokomōka mu rura rwawe;" 
Genesis35:12 kand’ igihugu nemeye ko mpaye Aburahamu na Isaka nzokiguha nawe, n’uruvyaro rwawe ruzogukurikira nzorugiha." 
Genesis35:13 Imana imusiga aho bivuganiye, iradūga." 
Genesis35:14 Yakobo ashinga inkingi y’ibuye ah’avuganiye na yo: ayisukakw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire, ayisukako n’amavuta ya elayo." 
Genesis35:15 Aho hantu Imana ivuganiye na we, Yakobo ahita Beteli." 
Genesis35:16 Bava i Beteli, baragenda; bari bashigaje akarere, bagashika muri Efurata, Rakeli araramukwa, aragumirwa." 
Genesis35:17 Maz’ akigumiwe, umwākirizi aramubarira, ati Nta co utinya, kuk’ uhava uvyara uwundi muhungu." 
Genesis35:18 Maz’ arikw aracīkāna, kuko yaciye ahwera, yita uwo mwana Benoni, ariko se amwita Benyamini." 
Genesis35:19 Nuko Rakeli arapfa, bamuhamba ku nzira ija muri Efurata, ari ho Betelehemu." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobo ashinga inkingi ku mva yiwe: ni yo nkingi y’imva ya Rakeli, ikiriho na bugingo n’ ubu." 
Genesis35:21 Isirayeli akomeza inzira, ashinga amahema hirya y’umunara wo muri Ederi." 
Genesis35:22 Maze Isirayeli akiri mur’ ico gihugu, Reyubeni aragenda asambana na Biluha incoreke ya se: Isirayeli arabimenya. Nukw abahungu ba Yakobo bari cumi na babiri:" 
Genesis35:23 aba Leya ni Reyubeni imfura ya Yakobo, na Simeyoni, na Lewi, na Yuda, na Isakari, na Zebuloni;" 
Genesis35:24 aba Rakeli ni Yosefu na Benyamini; 
Genesis35:25 aba Biluha incoreke ya Rakeli, ni Dani na Nafutali;" 
Genesis35:26 aba Zilupa incoreke ya Leya, ni Gadi na Asheri: abo ni bo bahungu ba Yakobo yavyariye i Padan‐aramu." 
Genesis35:27 Yakobo ashika kwa se Isaka, i Mamure, i Kiriyati‐Araba, ari ho Heburoni, aho Aburahamu na Isaka bāba nk’abashitsi." 
Genesis35:28 Imisi Isaka yamaze n’imyaka ijana na mirongumunani. 
Genesis35:29 Isaka aracīkāna, apfa yisāziye neza, ageze mu zabukuru, ahamvya ababo: Esau na Yakobo abana biwe baramuhamba." 
Genesis36:1 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Esau, ari we Edomu." 
Genesis36:2 Esau yarongoye Abanyakananikazi, Ada umukobga wa Eloni Umuheti, na Oholibama umukobga wa Ana, Ana mwene Sibeyoni Umuhiwi;" 
Genesis36:3 na Basemati mushiki wa Nebayoti, umukobga wa Ishimayeli." 
Genesis36:4 Esau avyarana na Ada Elifazi; Basemati na we bavyarana Ruweli; 
Genesis36:5 Oholibama bavyarana Yushi na Yalamu na Kora: abo ni bo bahungu ba Esau, yavyariye mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis36:6 Esau akora abagore biwe n’abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe, n’ abantu bose bo mu rugo rwiwe, n’ inka ziwe, n’ibiyevera vyiwe vyose, n’ibintu vyiwe vyose, yaronkeye mu gihugu c’i Kanani; aja mu kindi gihugu, atandukana na mwene nyina Yakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Kukw itunga ryabo ryari ryinshi, bigatuma badashobora kubangikana; kand’ igihugu bari bararoyemw’ ar’ inyambukīra, nticabakwira kubg’ amasho yabo." 
Genesis36:8 Nuko Esau aja kuba ku musozi Seyiri: Esau ni we Edomu. 
Genesis36:9 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Esau sekuruza w’Abanyedomu bo ku musozi Seyiri. 
Genesis36:10 Bene Esau aya ni yo mazina yabo: uwa Ada muka Esau ni Elifazi, n’uwa Basemati muka Esau ni Ruweli." 
Genesis36:11 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefo na Gatamu na Kenazi. 
Genesis36:12 Kandi Timuna yar’ incoreke ya Elifazi mwene Esau: Elifazi avyarana na we Amaleki: abo ni bo buzukuru ba Ada, muka Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Ruweli: Nahati na Zera na Shama na Miza: abo ni bo buzukuru ba Basemati, muka Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Oholibama muka Esau, umukobga wa Ana, Ana mwene Sibeyoni: Esau avyarana na Oholibama Yushi na Yalamu na Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Aba ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse ku bahungu ba Esau. Bene Elifazi imfura ya Esau, abakuru b’imiryango, n’aba: Temani, na Omari, na Sefo, na Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 na Kora, na Gatamu, na Amaleki: abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yandurutse kuri Elifazi mu gihugu ca Edomu; abo ni bo buzukuru ba Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Kandi bene Ruweli mwene Esau, abakuru b’imiryango, n’aba: Nahati, na Zera, na Shama, na Miza: abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yandurutse kuri Ruweli mu gihugu ca Edomu; abo ni bo buzukuru ba Basemati muka Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Abo Esau yavyaranye na Oholibama umugore wiwe, abakuru b’imiryango n’aba: Yushi na Yalamu na Kora: abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yandurutse kuri Oholibama muka Esau, mwene Ana." 
Genesis36:19 Abo ni bo bo mu nda ya Esau, ari we Edomu; abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yabo." 
Genesis36:20 Aba ni bo bene Seyiri Umuhori, ben’ ico gihugu: Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni na Ana," 
Genesis36:21 na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani: abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori, ari bo bene Seyiri, mu gihugu ca Edomu." 
Genesis36:22 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Hemamu; kandi mushiki wa Lotani yari Timuna. 
Genesis36:23 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Shobali: Alivani na Manahati na Ebali na Shefo na Onamu. 
Genesis36:24 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Sibeyoni: Aya na Ana: Ana uwo ni we yahūmutse ku mbizi y’amashuha mu bugaragwa, aragiye indogoba za se Sibeyoni." 
Genesis36:25 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Ana: Dishoni na Oholibama, umukobga wa Ana nyene." 
Genesis36:26 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Dishoni: Hemudani na Eshibani na Yitirani na Kerani. 
Genesis36:27 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Etseri: Biluhani na Zavani na Akani. 
Genesis36:28 Kand’ aba ni bo bene Dishani: Uzi na Arani. 
Genesis36:29 Aba ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori: Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni na Ana," 
Genesis36:30 na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani; abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango bākomōtse mu Bahori, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri mu gihugu c’i Seyiri." 
Genesis36:31 Aba ni bo bami babaye ku ngoma mu gihugu ca Edomu, hatarīma umwami mu Bisirayeli." 
Genesis36:32 Bela mwene Beyori yaganza muri Edomu; umurwa wiwe witwa Dinihaba. 
Genesis36:33 Bela atanze, Yobabu mwene Zera w’i Bosira asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Genesis36:34 Yobabu atanze, Hushamu wo mu gihugu c’Abatemani asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Genesis36:35 Hushamu atanze, Hadadi mwene Bedadi, umwe yaneshereza Abamidiyani mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, asubira ku ngoma yiwe; umurwa wiwe witwa Aviti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadadi atanze, Samula w’i Masireka asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Genesis36:37 Samula atanze, Sauli w’i Rehoboti ahahera kuri rwa Ruzi, asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Genesis36:38 Sauli atanze, Bayali‐hanani mwene Akibori asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Genesis36:39 Bayali‐hanani mwene Akibori atanze, Hadari asubira ku ngoma yiwe; umurwa wiwe witwa Pawu; umwamikazi wiwe yitwa Mehetabeli, umukobga wa Matiredi, Matiredi umukobga wa Mezahabu." 
Genesis36:40 Aya ni yo mazina y’abakuru b’ imiryango bandurutse kuri Esau, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ ukw ibihugu vyabo biri, nk’ukw amazina yabo ari: abakuru b’imiryango ni Timuna na Aliwa na Yeteti," 
Genesis36:41 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni," 
Genesis36:42 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari," 
Genesis36:43 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu ari we Esau, sekuruza w’ Abanyedomu, nk’ukw amashamvu yabo ari mu gihugu bīzīziye." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobo aba mu gihugu se yabayemw’ ar’ inyambukīra, ni co gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis37:2 Ivy’ uruvyaro rwa Yakobo n’ibi. Yosefu, amaze imyaka cumi n’ indwi, yaragirana umukuku na bene se; kandi yar’ akir’ umwana kuri bene Biluha na bene Zilupa baka se: kandi yama abarira se inkuru z’ibibi bakora." 
Genesis37:3 Isirayeli yafyinisha Yosefu kuruta abana biwe bose, kuko yamuvyaye ashaje: amubarīriza umwambaro muremure w’amaboko." 
Genesis37:4 Bene se babona yuko se amukunda kumubarutisha bose; baramwanka, ntibaba bakimubarira neza atar’ ukumuhirika." 
Genesis37:5 Yosefu arota inzozi, azirotorera bene se, barushiriza kumwanka." 
Genesis37:6 Arababarira, at’ Enda ni mwumve inzozi narose:" 
Genesis37:7 narose dutekera imikama y’ingano, uwanje mukama uriyegura, urēma; maz’ iyanyu mikama iraza, ikikiza uwanje, irawunamira." 
Genesis37:8 Bene se baramubaza, bat’ Aho ni wewe uzotuganza? ni wewe uzodutwara? Izo nzozi ziwe n’ayo majambo yiwe bituma barushiriza kumwanka." 
Genesis37:9 Yongera kurota izindi nzozi, azirotorera bene se, ati Nongeye kurota izindi nzozi; narose izuba n’ ukwezi n’inyenyeri cumi n’imwe binyunamira." 
Genesis37:10 Azirotorera se na bene se. Se aramukankamira, at’ Izo nzozi n’inzozi ki? Aho jewe na nyoko na bakuru bawe tuzoza dukubite inkoro hasi imbere yawe?" 
Genesis37:11 Bene se bamugirira ishari, ariko se azigama ayo majambo mu mutima wiwe." 
Genesis37:12 Maze bene se baja kuragira umukuku wa se i Shekemu. 
Genesis37:13 Isirayeli abarira Yosefu, ati Harya bakuru bawe ntibaragiye umukuku i Shekemu? Enda ngwino ngutume kuri bo. Aramwishura, ati Ntuma." 
Genesis37:14 Aramubarira, ati Genda urābe ko bakuru bawe bar’ amahoro, n’umukuku k’ur’ amahoro, uheze ugaruke umbarire. Nukw aramutuma, ava mu kiyaya c’i Heburoni, ashika i Shekemu." 
Genesis37:15 Arikw arazimagirika ku misozi, bahūra bukwi na bukwi n’umugabo. Uwo mugabo aramubaza, at’ Urondera iki?" 
Genesis37:16 Aramwishura, ati Ndondera abo tuvukana: ntabara undangire aho baragiye." 
Genesis37:17 Uwo mugabo aramwishura, ati Baravuye ino, kuko numvise bavugana, bati Tuje i Dotani. Nuko Yosefu akurikira bene se, abasanga i Dotani." 
Genesis37:18 Bamubona akiri kure, maz’ atarabashikīra, bamugīra inama yo kumwica." 
Genesis37:19 Baravugana, bati Nguriya karosi araje!" 
Genesis37:20 Ni muze tumwice, tumuterere mu rwobo rumwe mur’ ibi, duheze tuvuge, tut’ Igikōko c’inkazi caramuriye: tuze turābe inzozi ziwe uko zizoba!" 
Genesis37:21 Reyubeni avyumvise, arondera uburyo bgo kumubakiza, arababgira, at’ Enda tureke kumwica." 
Genesis37:22 Kand’ ati Ntimuvishe amaraso, ariko mumuterere mur’ uru rwobo rur’ aha mu bugaragwa, ariko ntimumukozekw amaboko. Kwar’ ukugira ngw amurokore, amukūre mu maboko yabo, amusubize se." 
Genesis37:23 Maze Yosefu ashikiriye bene se, bamukiza wa mwambaro wiwe muremure w’amaboko yari yambaye," 
Genesis37:24 baramukwega, bamuterera muri rwa rwobo rwimbiwe kubikamw’ amazi; ariko rwari gusa, nta mazi yarimwo." 
Genesis37:25 Baraheza baricara ngo barye; bunamuye amaso babona igugu ry’Abishimayeli bavuye i Gileyadi, bari n’ingamiya zīremētse imibavu n’imiti yo gusomōra n’isenga, babimanukana muri Egiputa." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda abarira abo bavukana, ati Vyotumarira iki kwica mwene data, no kumuzimanganya?" 
Genesis37:27 Enda ni muze tumugure na barya Bishimayeli, amaboko yacu yoye kumukorako, kukw ari mwene data, tukaba akara kamwe. Baca baramwumvira." 
Genesis37:28 Hahita Abamidiyani b’abadandaza; bakwega Yosefu, bamukūra muri rwa rwobo, bamugura na ba Bishimayeli amahera y’ifeza mirongwibiri. Bashōra Yosefu muri Egiputa." 
Genesis37:29 Reyubeni agaruka kuri rwa rwobe, asanga Yosefu atarimwo; yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe." 
Genesis37:30 Asubira kuri barumuna be, at’ Umwana ntakiriyo; none jeho ndakwirwa hehe?" 
Genesis37:31 Bābīra wa mwambaro wa Yosefu, babāga isuguru y’impene, bawujobeka mu maraso yayo;" 
Genesis37:32 barungikira se wa mwambaro muremure w’amaboko, bamutumako, bat’ Uwo mwambaro twarawutoye: rāba ko woba uw’ umwana wawe, canke kw atari wo." 
Genesis37:33 Arawumenya, aravuga, ati N’umwambaro w’umwana wanje! Igikōko c’inkazi caramuriye! Yosefu yaratabaguwe, nta kindi!" 
Genesis37:34 Yakobo yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, akenyera amagunira, amara imisi myinshi agandariye umwana wiwe." 
Genesis37:35 Abahungu biwe bose n’abakobga biwe bose baza kumwirura; ariko yanka kwirurwa; ati Nzorinda mpamvya umwana wanje i kuzimu nkirira. Nuko se amuririra artyo. 
Genesis37:36 Ba Bamidiyani, bashikanye Yosefu muri Egiputa, bamugura na Potifari, umugendanyi wa Farawo, yaganza abamushibamira." 
Genesis38:1 Mur’ iyo misi Yuda avana n’abo bavukana, aramanuka, asembera ku Munyadulamu yitwa Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Yuda abonay’ umukobga wa Shuwa Umunyakanani; aramujana, aramurongora." 
Genesis38:3 Asama inda, avyara umuhungu, amwita Eri." 
Genesis38:4 Asama inda y’ubuheta, avyara umuhungu, amwita Onani." 
Genesis38:5 Yongera kuvyara uwundi muhungu, amwita Shela; kand’ uyo yamuvyaye Yuda ar’ i Kezibu." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda asabira imfura yiwe Eri umugeni yitwa Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Eri, imfura ya Yuda, yar’ umunyavyaha mu nyonga z’Uhoraho; nuk’ Uhoraho aramwica." 
Genesis38:8 Yuda abarira Onani, ati Cūra umugoranyu, umugirire nk’uko bibereye muramu w’umuntu, uhonore mwene nyoko." 
Genesis38:9 Onani amenya yuk’ umwana atazoba uwiwe; nukw iy’ aryamanye n’umugorabo, akarekurira hasi intanga, kugira ngo ntahonore mwene nyina." 
Genesis38:10 Ico kintu yakoze cari kibi mu nyonga z’Uhoraho, na we nyene aramwica." 
Genesis38:11 Maze Yuda abarira Tamari umukazana wiwe, ati Genda ube uragumye kwa so ur’ umupfakazi, ushitse ah’ umwana wanje Shela azokurira: kuko yivuganya, at’ Uyo na we ntahave apfa nka bene nyina. Tamari aragenda aguma kwa se." 
Genesis38:12 Haciye igihe, muka Yuda arapfa, umukobga wa Shuwa. Yuda amaze kuganduka, aradūga aja i Timuna, ku bamukemurira intama, ari kumwe n’umugenzi wiwe Hira Umunyadulamu." 
Genesis38:13 Babarira Tamari, bati Sobukwe aradūze, agiye i Timuna gukemuza intama ziwe." 
Genesis38:14 Yiyambura imyambaro y’ubupfakazi, yitwikira umwitwikiro wiwe, yipfuka mu maso, aja kwicara kw irembo ry’igisagara Enayimu, ku nzira ija i Timuna; kuko yabonye ko Shela amaze gukura, ntibamumuha ngw amucūre." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda amubonye, agira ngo ni maraya, kuko yari yitwikiriye mu maso." 
Genesis38:16 Akebereza ah’ ari i ruhande y’inzira, ati Ndakwinginze, n’umpe turyamane: kukw atāmenye kw ar’umukazana wiwe. Aramwishura, ati Ni naguha ngo turyamane, urampēra iki?" 
Genesis38:17 Aramwishura, ati Ndakurungikira isuguru y’impene nkūye mu mukuku. Aramubaza, at’ Urampa ingwati, kugeza ah’ uzoyirungikira?" 
Genesis38:18 Na we aramubaza, at’ Ugomba ko ndaguha ingwati ki? Aramwishura, ati Mpa impeta yawe irikw ikimenyetso, hamwe n’umugozi wayo, n’iyo nkoni witwaje. Arabimuha, bararyamana, amutera inda." 
Genesis38:19 Tamari aca ava hasi, arīgīra, yiyambura wa mwitwikiro, yambara imyambaro yiwe y’ubupfakazi." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda arungikana wa mugenzi wiwe w’Umunyadulamu ya suguru y’impene, kugira ngw acungure za ngwati kuri wa mugore: arikw aramubura." 
Genesis38:21 Aca abaza abagabo b’aho hantu, ati Maraya ari hehe, yar’i ruhande y’ inzira ya Enayimu? Baramwishura, bati Nta maraya yigeze ino." 
Genesis38:22 Asubira kuri Yuda, aramubgira, ati Nta we nabonye, kandi n’abagabo baho bampakaniye, ngo Nta maraya yigezeyo." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda aramwishura, ati N’abitware! Enda tureke kwiyambika ibara: rāba namurungikiye ya suguru, ntiwamubona." 
Genesis38:24 Hahise amezi nk’atatu, babarira Yuda, bati Tamari umukazana wawe yarasambanye, mber’ afise n’inda. Yuda arababgira, ati Ni mugende mumusohokane, mumute mu muriro." 
Genesis38:25 Bakimusohokana, atuma kuri sebukwe, ati Nyen’ ibi bintu ni we yanteye inda; kand’ ati Ndakwinginze, itegereze ivyo, inavyo uw’ari we: iyo mpeta irikw ikimenyetso, n’imigozi yayo, n’iyo nkoni." 
Genesis38:26 Yuda yemera kw ar’ ivyiwe, at’ Arantsinze, kuko ntamuhaye Shela umwana wanje. Nuko Yuda ntiyongera kumwegera ukundi." 
Genesis38:27 Maz’ igihe ciwe co kuvyara kigeze, inda yiwe yar’ amahasa." 
Genesis38:28 Ari ku rwahi, umwe atangura kuzana igikonjo; umwākirizi aragifata, akizingirakw akanyuzi gasa n’agahama, at’ Uyu ni we Bukuru." 
Genesis38:29 Igikonjo ciwe citeye, uwar’ inyuma aravuka: umwākirizi aravuga, ati N’iki gitumye wīcīra icuho? Ni co catumye bamwita Peresi." 
Genesis38:30 Hanyuma mugenzi we aravuka, afise rwa runyuzi rusa n’agahama ku gikonjo: bamwita Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Yosefu bamumanukana muri Egiputa; maze Potifari, Umunyegiputa, umugendanyi wa Farawo, yaganza abamushibamira, amugura n’Abishimayeli bamumanukanyeyo." 
Genesis39:2 Uhoraho abana na Yosefu, bituma aroranirwa; aba mu rugo rwa shebuja Umunyegiputa." 
Genesis39:3 Shebuja abona yuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe na we, kandi k’Uhoraho yamuhaye kugira ikiganza ciza ku co akoze cose." 
Genesis39:4 Yosefu atona kuri we, aba ingendanyi yiwe; maz’ amuhindura umubgiriza wo mu rugo rwiwe, amuzeza ivy’ afise vyose." 
Genesis39:5 Maz’ uhereye igihe yamugize umubgiriza wo mu rugo rwiwe, akamuzeza ivy’ afise vyose, Uhoraho aca aha umugisha urugo rw’uwo Munyegiputa, kubga Yosefu; umugisha w’Uhoraho uba ku vyo yar’ afise vyose, vyo mu rugo n’ivyo mu ndimiro." 
Genesis39:6 Yegurira Yosefu ivyo yar’ afise vyose; ntiyagira ikindi yibaza, atar’ ivy’ arya gusa. Kandi Yosefu yari mwiza w’umunyakaranga." 
Genesis39:7 Hanyuma y’ivyo, inabuja agomwa Yosefu, aramubgira, ati Ngo turyamane." 
Genesis39:8 Maz’ ariyankira, yishura inabuja, at’ Erega databuja nta co yibazako ku vyo ngaba vyo mu rugo, mbere yanjeje ivy’ afise vyose;" 
Genesis39:9 nta wunduta mur’ uru rugo, kandi nta co yisigarije ngw akinyime atari wewe, kuk’ ur’ umugore wiwe: none noshobora nte gukora icaha kingana girtyo, ngacumura ku Mana?" 
Genesis39:10 Akama abibgira Yosefu uko bukeye, na we ntamwumvire, ngw aryamane na we, canke ngw agumane na we." 
Genesis39:11 Umusi ur’ izina yinjira mu nzu gukora igikorwa ciwe, ata bandi bagabo bo mur’ urwo rugo bari mu nzu." 
Genesis39:12 Uwo mugore asūmira impuzu yiwe, aramubgira, ati Ngo turyamane. Amutana impuzu yiwe, arahunga, arasohoka." 
Genesis39:13 Maz’ abonye kw amutanye impuzu yiwe agahunga agasohoka," 
Genesis39:14 atabaza abagabo b’abanyarugo, arababarira, at’ Ehe rāba yatuzaniye Umuheburayo wo kudukēngēra! Yaje iyo ndi ngw aryamane nanje, ndaheza ntabaza n’ijwi rirenga:" 
Genesis39:15 maz’ abonye nshize ijwi hejuru ntabaje, antana impuzu yiwe, arahunga, arasohoka." 
Genesis39:16 Arekera iyo mpuzu i ruhande yiwe, gushitsa aho shebuja wa Yosefu atahiye." 
Genesis39:17 Maz’ amubgira amagambo amwe n’ayo, ati Wa mugurano w’ Umuheburayo watuzanira yazanywe iyo ndi n’agakēngērwe." 
Genesis39:18 Maze nanje nshize ijwi hejuru ntabaje, antana impuzu yiwe, arahunga, arasohoka." 
Genesis39:19 Maze shebuja yumvise amagambo umugore wiwe amubariye, y’ingen’ uwo mugurano wiwe yamugiriye, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa." 
Genesis39:20 Nuko shebuja wa Yosefu aramufata, amushira mw ibohero, aho bārindira abo umwami aboshe: nukw aba ngaho mu nzu y’imbohe." 
Genesis39:21 Arik’ Uhoraho aba kumwe na Yosefu, amugirira neza, amuha gutona ku murinzi w’ibohero." 
Genesis39:22 Uwo murinzi aha Yosefu kugaba imbohe zose zari mur’ iryo bohero; ivyo bākorayo vyose, ni we yabikoresha." 
Genesis39:23 Umurinzi w’ ibohero ntiyagira ikintu yibaza ku vyo yamushikirije, kuk’ Uhoraho yari kumwe na we; kand’ Uhoraho amuha kugira ikiganza ciza ku co akoze cose." 
Genesis40:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, umukevyi ahēreza igiturire umwami wa Egiputa, n’umusukūzi wiwe bacumura kuri shebuja, umwami wa Egiputa." 
Genesis40:2 Farawo arakira abo banyarugo biwe bompi, umukevyi mukuru n’umusukūzi mukuru." 
Genesis40:3 Abashirisha mw ibohero ryari mu rugo rw’uwaganza abashibamyi, aho Yosefu yar’ arindiwe." 
Genesis40:4 Uwaganza abashibamyi b’umwami abahēreza Yosefu, na we arabakorera. Bamaze igihe bari mw ibohero," 
Genesis40:5 wa mukevyi w’umwami wa Egiputa na wa musukūzi wiwe, barindiwe mur’ iryo bohero, bompi barotera ijoro rimwe, umwe iziwe uwundi iziwe, zigasobanurwa zimwe ukwazo izindi ukwazo." 
Genesis40:6 Maze mu gitondo Yosefu yinjira aho bari; abarāvye, abona bajonjogoye." 
Genesis40:7 Abaza abo banyarugo ba Farawo barindanywe mw ibohero ryo mu rugo rwa shebuja wiwe, ati Mbeg’ uyu musi ko mujonjogoye n’iki?" 
Genesis40:8 Baramwishura, bati N’uko twarose inzozi, kand’ akaba ata wushobora kuzidusobanurira. Yosefu arabishura, ati Mbeg’ Imana si yo Nyene gusobanura? Enda ni muzindotorere." 
Genesis40:9 Umukevyi mukuru arotorera Yosefu inzozi ziwe, ati Narose mbona umuzabibu imbere yanje," 
Genesis40:10 kand’ uwo muzabibu war’ ufise amashami atatu: mbona usa n’ūpfunditse, usambura amashurwe, amahando yawo arahishira;" 
Genesis40:11 maz’ igikombe ca Farawo nari ngifise mu minwe, nuko nābīra izo nzabibu, nzikānyira muri co, ndaheza ngihēreza Farawo." 
Genesis40:12 Yosefu aramubarira, at’ Uku ni ko zisobanurwa: ayo mashami atatu n’imisi itatu;" 
Genesis40:13 imisi itatu itarashira Farawo azokubohora, agusubize kw ibango ryawe: kand’ uzohēreza Farawo igikombe nk’uko wahora ukora ur’umukevyi wiwe." 
Genesis40:14 Maz’ uz’ unyibuke, ni wamara kumererwa neza, uz’ untabare, ndakwinginze, umvugire kuri Farawo, unkūze mur’ iyi nzu." 
Genesis40:15 Kuko nasahuwe, nkūwe mu gihugu c’Abaheburayo: n’ino na ho nta caha nakoze cotumye banshira mur’ iri bohero." 
Genesis40:16 Wa musukūzi mukuru abonye kw amusobanuriye ivyiza, abarira Yosefu, ati Nanje narose nikoreye intimbiri zitatu z’imitsima y’ifu igogōretse;" 
Genesis40:17 kand’ intimbiri yo hejuru y’izindi yarimw’ ivyo kurya bikaranze vy’uburyo bgose nshīra Farawo; maz’ ibisīga bibindīra ku mutwe, mur’ iyo ntimbiri." 
Genesis40:18 Yosefu aramwishura, at’ Uku ni ko zisobanurwa: izo ntimbiri zitatu n’imisi itatu;" 
Genesis40:19 imisi itatu itarashira, Farawo azokubohora akumanike, ibisīga bikugabangane." 
Genesis40:20 Ku musi ugira gatatu, ari wo musi wo kwibuka ukuvuka kwa Farawo, atumirira amazimano abamenyekana biwe bose; araheza abohora wa mukevyi mukuru na wa musukūzi mukuru hagati y’abo bamenyekana." 
Genesis40:21 Asubiza umukevyi mukuru mw ibango ryiwe, ahēreza Farawo igikombe;" 
Genesis40:22 maz’ amanika wa musukūzi mukuru, nk’uko Yosefu yabasobanuriye inzozi zabo." 
Genesis40:23 Ariko wa mukevyi mukuru ntiyaruha yibuka Yosefu: aramwibagira. 
Genesis41:1 Hahise imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye, Farawo arota ahagaze i ruhande y’uruzi." 
Genesis41:2 Agize artya abona mu ruzi havuye inka ndwi z’inyambo zivyibushe; zirisha mu rufunzo. 
Genesis41:3 Maz’ izindi nka ndwi zinanutse z’umwaku ziva mu ruzi, zirazikurikira; zihagararana na za zindi ku nkombe y’uruzi." 
Genesis41:4 Maze za nka zinanutse z’ umwaku zirya za zindi z’inyambo zivyibushe, ukw ari ndwi. Farawo araheza aribambura." 
Genesis41:5 Arongera aribikira, arota inzozi za kabiri; agize artya, abona imihuruhumbi ndwi y’ingano imeze ku giti kimwe, zitunungutse, nziza." 
Genesis41:6 Maze mu nyuma zayo haca hamera iyindi mihuruhumbi ndwi y’ibihumbirane, yumishijwe n’umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba." 
Genesis41:7 Iyo mihuruhumbi y’ibihumbirane iyongobeza ya mihuruhumbi itunungutse itengengeye, ukw ari ndwi. Nuko Farawo aribambura, amenya kw ar’ inzozi." 
Genesis41:8 Bukeye, ahagarika umutima, atuma guhamagaza abanyamareba bose bo muri Egiputa n’abanyabgenge baho bose: Farawo abarotorera inzozi ziwe: ariko ntihagira ūshobora kuzimusobanurira." 
Genesis41:9 Maze wa mukevyi mukuru abarira Farawo, at’ Uyu musi nibutse ivyaha vyanje!" 
Genesis41:10 Ca gihe waturakira, twebge abasavyi bawe, ga Nyaguhora ku ngoma, ukanshirisha mw ibohero ryo mu rugo rw’ ūganza abashibamyi, twe n’umusukūzi mukuru;" 
Genesis41:11 nuko twaroteye ijoro rimwe twempi; turota inzozi zisobanurwa kubiri. 
Genesis41:12 Twari kumwe n’umuhungu w’Umuheburayo aho hantu, umugurano w’ūganza abashibamyi; tumurotorera inzozi zacu, arazidusobanurira; nk’uko twazirose, azidusobanurira, umwe ukwiwe uwundi ukwiwe." 
Genesis41:13 Kand’ uko yazidusobanuriye ni ko vyashitse: jewe nashubijwe kw ibango ryanje, uwundi na we aramanikwa." 
Genesis41:14 Maze Farawo atuma guhamagaza Yosefu, bamuturumbura mw ibohero n’ingoga, arimosha, yambara izindi mpuzu, arenguka kwa Farawo." 
Genesis41:15 Farawo abarira Yosefu, ati Narose inzozi, none nta wushobora kuzinsobanurira: maze numvise bavuga ko wewe, bakurotorera inzozi gusa, ugashobora kuzisobanura." 
Genesis41:16 Yosefu yishura Farawo, ati Si jewe mbishobora, Nyaguhora ku ngoma, Imana ni yo ija kukwishura ivy’amahoro." 
Genesis41:17 Nuko Farawo abarira Yosefu, ati Narose mpagaze ku nkombe y’uruzi:" 
Genesis41:18 ngize ntya mbona mu ruzi havamw’ inka ndwi z’inyambo zivyibushe, zirisha mu rufunzo;" 
Genesis41:19 maze zikurikirwa n’ izindi nka ndwi mbi‐mbi, zinanutse z’umwaku rwose; sinaribgabone inka zinganya ububi n’izo mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:20 Izo nka zinanutse z’umwaku zirya za nka zivyibushe zabanje, ukw ari ndwi;" 
Genesis41:21 zimaze kuzirya, ntiwomengo zaziriye, zikomeza kuba umwaku kwa kundi. Nuko ndikangura." 
Genesis41:22 Kandi nongera kurota, mbona imihuruhumbi ndwi y’ingano imeze ku giti kimwe, zitengengeye nziza;" 
Genesis41:23 maze mu nyuma zayo haca hamera iyindi mihuruhumbi ndwi ikabiranye y’ibihumbirane, yumishijwe n’umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba:" 
Genesis41:24 iyo mihuruhumbi y’ibihumbirane iyongobeza ya mihuruhumbi myiza, ukw ari ndwi. Maze nzirotorera abanyamareba, ariko ntihagira ūshobora kuzinsobanurira." 
Genesis41:25 Yosefu abarira Farawo, at’ Inzozi zawe ni zimwe, Nyaguhora ku ngoma: ivyo Imana igira ikore yabikumenyesheje." 
Genesis41:26 Za nka ndwi nziza n’imyaka ndwi, na ya mihuruhumbi myiza n’imyaka ndwi nyene: inzozi ni zimwe." 
Genesis41:27 Na za nka zinanutse z’umwaku zazikurikiye n’imyaka ndwi, na ya mihuruhumbi ndwi y’imishīshi yumishijwe n’umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba, na yo n’uko: izoba imyaka ndwi y’ikigoyi." 
Genesis41:28 Ico ni co nakubariye, Nyaguhora ku ngoma, nt’ Ivyo Imana igira ikore yabikumenyesheje." 
Genesis41:29 Hazoba imyaka ndwi y’uburumbuke bginshi mu gihugu ca Egiputa iyo kiva kikagera: 
Genesis41:30 hanyuma hazokurikirakw imyaka ndwi y’ikigoyi, ubgo burumbuke bgose bgibagirane mu gihugu ca Egiputa; ico kigoyi kizokumba igihugu;" 
Genesis41:31 ubgo burumbuke ntibuzoba bucibukwa, kubg’ ikigoyi kibukurikiye: kuko kizoba ari cinshi cane." 
Genesis41:32 Kand’ icatumye urota izo nzozi kabiri n’ukw ivyo vyashinzwe n’ Imana, kand’ izobishitsa vuba." 
Genesis41:33 Nuko rero Nyaguhora ku ngoma, n’urondere umuntu w’umunyabgenge w’umuhanga, umuhe ubutware mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:34 Kandi mugenzi, ushireho n’ abimburisha, bimburishe ikigira gatanu c’ivyera mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mur’ iyo myaka y’uburumbuke ukw ari ndwi." 
Genesis41:35 Bakoranye ivyo vyimburwa vyose vy’iyo myaka myiza igiye kuza, babungabunge mu bisagara imihure y’ impeke yo gutunga abantu, bayibike, igabge nawe, Nyaguhora ku ngoma." 
Genesis41:36 Kand’ izo ndya zizobera igihugu ibiziganirijwe iyo myaka ndwi y’ikigoyi kizotera mu gihugu ca Egiputa, kugira ngw igihugu coye guhona kubg’ ikigoyi." 
Genesis41:37 Iyo nama ishimwa na Farawo n’abishikira biwe bose. 
Genesis41:38 Farawo abaza abo bishikira biwe, ati Twobona hehe umuntu ameze nk’ uyu, arimw’ impwemu y’Imana?" 
Genesis41:39 Farawo abarira Yosefu, ati Kw Imana ikweretse ivyo vyose, nta wundi munyabgenge w’umuhanga muhwanye;" 
Genesis41:40 nguhaye kugaba urugo rwanje, kand’ abantu banje bose baze bumvire ico uzovuga: ku ngoma yanje yonyene ni ho nzogusumba." 
Genesis41:41 Kandi Farawo yungamw’ abarira Yosefu, ati Rāba nguhaye kugaba igihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:42 Nuko Farawo aca yiyambura impeta irikw ikimenyetso, yo ku rutoke rwiwe, ayambika Yosefu ku rutoke, amwambika impuzu zera nziza, amwambika n’umugufu w’izahabu mw izosi," 
Genesis41:43 amuha kugendagendera mu mukogote wa kabiri ku wiwe; bakagenda barasemererera imbere yiwe, bati Ni mumupfukamire! Nukw amuha kugaba igihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:44 Farawo abarira Yosefu, ati Jewe Farawo ndabivuze: nta wuzotaramura ukuboko canke ngw ashingure ikirenge mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, utavyemeye." 
Genesis41:45 Farawo yita Yosefu irindi zina, Safenati‐paneya: amushingira Asenati mwene Potifera, umuherezi wo mu gisagara Oni. Yosefu araheza agendagenda igihugu ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:46 Yosefu yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu igihe yarenguka imbere ya Farawo. Nukw arijura, ava imbere ya Farawo, agendagenda igihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Genesis41:47 Maze mu myaka y’uburumbuke, ukw ari ndwi, igihugu kirera, gisegenyura ivyo kurya." 
Genesis41:48 Akoranya imyimbu yose yo mur’ iyo myaka ndwi y’uburumbuke yo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ayimburira mu bisagara: kand’ imirima ikikije igisagara cose akayimburira muri co." 
Genesis41:49 Nuko Yosefu abīka imihure y’impeke y’isinzi, nk’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga, gushitsa aho yarekeye guharūra, kuko bitari bigiharūrika." 
Genesis41:50 Yosefu avyara abahungu babiri ikigoyi kitaratera, abavyara kuri Asenati mwene Potifera umuherezi wo mu gisagara Oni." 
Genesis41:51 Yosefu uw’imfura amwita Manase, ati Kukw Imana yanyibagije ubutame bganje bgose n’abo mu nzu ya data bose." 
Genesis41:52 Uwa kabiri amwita Efurayimu, ati Kukw Imana yampaye kurondokera mu gihugu nagorewemwo." 
Genesis41:53 Nuko ya myaka ndwi y’uburumbuke bgabaye mu gihugu ca Egiputa irarangira. 
Genesis41:54 Ya myaka ndwi y’ikigoyi itangura gushirako, nk’uko Yosefu yavuze: ikigoyi gitera mu bihugu vyose, ariko mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa ho hār’ ivyo kurya." 
Genesis41:55 Maz’ igihe igihugu cose ca Egiputa gitewe n’ inzara, abantu batakambira Farawo ngw abahe ivyo barya. Farawo abarira Abanyegiputa bose, ati Ni muje kuri Yosefu: ico ababarira mugikore." 
Genesis41:56 Ikigoyi gisāngānya isi yose: maze Yosefu yugurura ibigega vyose, agurira Abanyegiputa; ikigoyi kirushiriza kuba cinshi mu gihugu ca Egiputa."
