Genesis41:57 Abo mu bihugu vyose baja muri Egiputa kuri Yosefu gusuma imihure y’impeke, kukw ikigoyi cari cinshi mw isi yose." 
Genesis42:1 Maze Yakobo yumva ko muri Egiputa har’ amasumo; abaza abana biwe, ati N’iki gituma murābana?" 
Genesis42:2 Kand’ ati Numvise yuko muri Egiputa har’ amasumo: enda ni mumanuke mujeyo, mudusumire, kugira ngo tubeho, twoye gupfa." 
Genesis42:3 Bene se ba Yosefu ukw ari cumi baramanuka, baja gusuma imihure y’impeke muri Egiputa." 
Genesis42:4 Ariko Benyamini, mwene nyina wa Yosefu, Yakobo ntiyamutumana na bakuru be, kuko yiyumvira, ati Kumbure yogira ic’ aba." 
Genesis42:5 Nuko bene Isirayeli bajana n’ abandi gusuma, kuko kigoyi cāteye mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis42:6 Kandi Yosefu yari yagizwe segaba w’igihugu ca Egiputa; ni we yasumira abo mur’ ico gihugu bose; nuko bene se ba Yosefu baraza, bakubita inkoro hasi, baramwunamira." 
Genesis42:7 Maze Yosefu abonye bene se arabamenya, yihindura nka murundi kuri bo, abatera imirarwe, ati Muva hehe? Baramwishura, bati Tuva mu gihugu c’i Kanani tuje gusuma." 
Genesis42:8 Yosefu amenya bene se, ariko bo ntibamumenya." 
Genesis42:9 Maze Yosefu yibuka za nzozi yarose kuri bo, arababarira, ati Mur’ abatasi! Muje kurāba ah’ igihugu coroshe!" 
Genesis42:10 Baramwishura, bati Haba na mba, mugenzi: abasavyi bawe twangajwe no gusuma." 
Genesis42:11 Twese tuvuka kur’ umwe; tur’ abanyakuri, abasavyi bawe ntitur’ abatasi na gatoya." 
Genesis42:12 Arabishura, ati Na mba! Kurāba ah’ igihugu coroshe ni co kibazanye." 
Genesis42:13 Baramwishura, bati Twebge abasavyi bawe twavukana tur’ icumi na babiri, tur’ ab’umuntu umwe wo mu gihugu c’i Kanani; umuhererezi yasigaranye na data, uwundi na we ntakiriho." 
Genesis42:14 Yosefu arabishura, at’ Aho rero, sinavuze ko mur’ abatasi?" 
Genesis42:15 Iki ni co kizobeza: ndabarahiye Farawo mukazova ino umuhererezi wanyu adashitse aha! 
Genesis42:16 Ni mutume umwe muri mwebge, agende azane murumuna wanyu, namwe musigare mur’ imbohe, kugira ngw amagambo yanyu aseruke kw ar’ay’ ukuri: biramutse bitabaye birtyo, muzoba mur’ abatasi, ndabarahiye Farawo!" 
Genesis42:17 Bose abamaza gatatu mw ibohero. 
Genesis42:18 Ku musi ugira gatatu, Yosefu arababarira, at’ Enda genza murtya, mwoye gupfa, kuko ntinya Imana:" 
Genesis42:19 namba mur’ abanyakuri, umwe muri mwebge asigare hano mw ibohero; abandi mugende, mujane imihure y’impeke yo kubamara inzara mu ngo zanyu:" 
Genesis42:20 muheze munzanire umuhererezi wanyu; ni ho amagambo yanyu azomenyekana kw ar’ay’ ukuri, bikabakiza ntimupfe. Baca bagenza bartyo." 
Genesis42:21 Maze baravugana, bati Turikw inkurikizi ya murumuna wacu, s’ikindi, kuko twabonye intuntu yar’ afise mu mutima, hamwe yatwinginga, tukanka kumwumviriza; ni vyo bituzaniye ibi vyago." 
Genesis42:22 Maze Reyubeni arababgira, ati Sinababariye, nti Ntimugire ico mugira uwo mwana, mukanka kunyumvira? ni co gitumye amaraso yiwe aturondererwako." 
Genesis42:23 Ariko ntibamenya ko Yosefu abumva, kuko yasobanurirwa n’uwundi." 
Genesis42:24 Arora irya, ararira; araheza agaruka kuri bo, arabasigurira, abakūramwo Simeyoni, amubohera mu maso yabo." 
Genesis42:25 Maze Yosefu agera ko babuzuriza impeke amagunira yabo, kandi ngo basubize amahera y’umuntu wese mw igunira ryiwe, kandi ngo babahe n’impamba: babagirira bartyo." 
Genesis42:26 Baremēka indogoba zabo izo mpeke, bavayo baragenda." 
Genesis42:27 Maz’ aho barāye, umwe muri bo ahamburuye igunira ryiwe ngw agaburire indogoba yiwe, abona ya mahera yiwe, ari mu munwa w’igunira." 
Genesis42:28 Abarira bagenzi biwe, at’ Amahera yanje aragarutse! Eh’ ari mw igunira ryanje! Baranduka imitima, barābana bahinda agashitsi, bat’ Ibi n’ibiki, Imana itugiriye?" 
Genesis42:29 Bashitse i muhira kwa se Yakobo, mu gihugu c’i Kanani, bamudōndera ivyababayeko vyose," 
Genesis42:30 bat’ Umugabo aganza ico gihugu yatubariye adutera imirarwe, atugirira nk’aho tur’ abatasi batata igihugu." 
Genesis42:31 Turamubarira, tuti Tur’ abanyakuri, ntitugira gutata na gatoya." 
Genesis42:32 Tuti Twavukana tur’icumi na babiri, dusangiye data umwe; tut’ Umwe ntakiriho, umuhererezi na we yasigaranye na data, mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Genesis42:33 Uwo mugabo aganza ico gihugu, aratubarira, at’ Iki ni co kizommenyesha ko mur’ abanyakuri: ati Ni munsigarane umwe mu bo muvukana, mujane ivyo kubamara inzara mu ngo zanyu, mugende." 
Genesis42:34 Ati Muheze munzanire umuhererezi wanyu; ati Ni ho nzomenya ko mutar’ abatasi, ariko ko mur’ abanyakuri; mpeze mbasubize mugenzi wanyu, mubone kugenda uburarame mur’ iki gihugu." 
Genesis42:35 Maze bacuranuye ibiri mu magunira yabo, basanga itu ry’amahera ry’umuntu wese riri mw igunira ryiwe: abo bose bo na se babonye ayo matu yabo y’ amahera, baratinya." 
Genesis42:36 Se Yakobo arababarira, ati Muntōtōyekw abana: ehe Yosefu ntakiriho, na Simeyoni ntakiriho, none mugomba kunyaka na Benyamini: ivyo vyose ni jewe vyeguriweko!" 
Genesis42:37 Reyubeni abarira se, ati Ni ntamukugarukanira, uze wice abahungu banje bompi; n’ umumpe, nzomukugarukanira." 
Genesis42:38 Aramwishura, at’ Umwana wanje ntazomanukana namwe; kuko mukuru we yapfuye, akaba asigaye ar’ ikinege: yogira ic’ aba mu nzira, mugatuma imvi zanje zimanukana umubabaro i kuzimu." 
Genesis43:1 Kigoyi kirushiriza kuba cinshi mu gihugu. 
Genesis43:2 Bamaze za mpeke bakuye muri Egiputa, se arababgira, at’ Enda ni musubireyo, mudusumire utwo kurya." 
Genesis43:3 Yuda aramwishura, ati Wa mugabo yararenzwe, avuga ko tutazomugaruka mu maso tutajanye na murumuna wacu." 
Genesis43:4 Ni waturungikana na murumuna wacu turamanukayo, tugusumire;" 
Genesis43:5 ariko n’utamuturungikana, ntitumanukayo: kuk’ uwo mugabo yatubariye, ati Ntimuzongaruka mu maso mutazananye na murumuna wanyu." 
Genesis43:6 Isirayeli arababaza, ati N’iki catumye mungirira nabi murtyo, mukabarira uwo mugabo ko mufise uwundi muvukana?" 
Genesis43:7 Baramwishura, bat’ Uwo mugabo yaratubazaguje ku vyacu, no ku vya bene wacu, ati Mbega so aracariho? Har’ uwundi muvukana? Tumwishura nk’uko yatubajije: twari gushobora dute kumenya kw atubarira kumanukana murumuna wacu?" 
Genesis43:8 Yuda abarira se Isirayeli, ati Rekura uwo muhungu ajane nanje, duheze tuve hasi, tugende; tubone kubaho, twoye gupfa, twe nawe n’abana bacu." 
Genesis43:9 Jewe ndamwishinze, abe ari jewe uzomubaza: ni ntamukugarukanira, ngo mmugushikirize, nzoba ngukoreye icaha kitazomvako gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Genesis43:10 Ereg’ iyo tudateba, none tuba tugarutse ubga kabiri." 
Genesis43:11 Se Isirayeli arababgira, at’ Enda ko bimeze birtyo, ni mugenze murtya: mujane mu magunira yanyu ibiba mur’ iki gihugu birusha ibindi kuba vyiza, mubishīre uwo mugabo kw ingemurano: umuti wo gusomōra ugeze, n’ ubūki bugeze, n’imibavu, n’isenga, n’ibiyoba, na shakedi;" 
Genesis43:12 kandi ku mahera ya mbere mugerekekw ayandi angana cabugerwe, kugira ngo musubiraney’ amwe yagaruka mu magunira yanyu: kumbure babaye kubiyoberwa;" 
Genesis43:13 muheze mujane murumuna wanyu, muhaguruke, musubire kuri wa mugabo;" 
Genesis43:14 Imana Ishobora vyose ibahe guhāngazwa na we, ngw abarekurire mwene nyoko wundi, arekure na Benyamini. Nanje namba nzoba nyakamara, mbe ko!" 
Genesis43:15 Abo bagabo bābīra za ngemurano, bajana ya mahera n’ayandi angana na yo cabugerwe, bajana na Benyamini; barahaguruka, baramanuka, bashika muri Egiputa, bahagarara imbere ya Yosefu." 
Genesis43:16 Yosefu abonye Benyamini ari kumwe na bo, abarira umubgiriza wiwe, ati Jana aba bantu i wanje, utek’ ubabāgire, urondeze, kuko turiburīre hamwe ku murango." 
Genesis43:17 Uwo mugabo agenza nk’uko Yosefu amubariye; ajana abo bantu mu nzu ya Yosefu. 
Genesis43:18 Baratinya kukw abinjije mu nzu ya Yosefu: baravugana, bati Ya mahera yagaruka mu magunira yacu, hamwe twaza mbere, ni yo atumye twinjizwa, ngw atwidandagazeko, adusūmire, atugire abaja, anyage n’indogoba zacu." 
Genesis43:19 Begera uwo mubgiriza wa Yosefu, bavuganira na we ku muryango w’inzu," 
Genesis43:20 bat’ Udutunge mugenzi, mbere twaramanutse tuje gusuma;" 
Genesis43:21 hanyuma rero dutāhūtse, dushitse ku ndāro, dutekurura amagunira yacu, maz’ umuntu wese asanga amahera yiwe ari mu munwa w’ igunira ryiwe, amahera yacu uko yakanganye kwose: none turayagarukanye." 
Genesis43:22 Kandi twazanye n’ayandi mahera yo gusumisha. Ariko ntituzi uwashubije ayo mahera yacu mu magunira. 
Genesis43:23 Arabishura, ati Ni musubize imitima mu nda, mureke gutinya: Imana yanyu, Imana ya so, ivyo n’ivyo yabihēreye mu magunira yanyu: jeho amahera yanyu narayahawe. Asohora Simeyoni, aramubazanira." 
Genesis43:24 Nuko wa mugabo yinjiza abo bantu mu nzu ya Yosefu, abaha amazi, boga ibirenge, agaburira n’ indogoba zabo." 
Genesis43:25 Batunganya za ngemurano, kugira ngo bazishikirize Yosefu ah’ azira ku murango, kuko bari bumvise yuko bariburīre aho." 
Genesis43:26 Yosefu atashe, binjirana za ngemurano bazanye, barazimushikiriza, bakubita inkoro hasi imbere yiwe." 
Genesis43:27 Na we arabagumisha, arababaza, ati Mbega so aragumye, wa mutāma mwavuga? Aracariho?" 
Genesis43:28 Baramwishura, bat’ Ego me, umusavyi wawe aracariho, aragumye. Bicisha bugufi, baramwunamira." 
Genesis43:29 Maze Yosefu, ashikije amaso kuri Benyamini murumuna we, uwo basangiye nyina, arababaza, at’ Uwo ni we muhererezi wanyu mwambariye? Maz’ aramubarira, at’ Imana ikugirire neza, mwana wanje." 
Genesis43:30 Nuko Yosefu arinyusha, kuko mu mutima yari n’ikigumbagumba ca mwene nyina, arondera ah’ aririra, yikebereza haruguru, aririrayo." 
Genesis43:31 Araheza yiyuhagira mu maso, aragaruka, ariyumanganya, aravuga, ati Ni muzane ivyo kurya." 
Genesis43:32 Bamuha ukwiwe, abo bandi ukwabo, n’Abanyegiputa bārīra hamwe na we ukwabo, kukw Abanyegiputa batāsangira n’Abaheburayo, kuko car’ umuziro ku Banyegiputa." 
Genesis43:33 Babicarika imbere yiwe uko bakurikirana, uhereye ku mfura ugashitsa ku muhererezi; abo bagabo bararābana, baratangara." 
Genesis43:34 Yosefu avuga ko babakamatira no ku bindi biryoshe bir’ imbere yiwe; ariko kw ivya Benyamini bisumba ivyabo gatanu. Nuko baranywa, barahimba, banezeranwa na we." 
Genesis44:1 Maze Yosefu abarira umubgiriza wiwe, ati Ni mwuzuze amagunira y’abo bantu impeke, nk’izo bashobora gutwara, kand’ ushire n’amahera y’umuntu wese mu munwa w’igunira ryiwe." 
Genesis44:2 Ushire n’igikombe canje c’ifeza mu munwa w’igunira ry’umuhererezi wabo, hamwe n’amahera yazanye gusumisha. Abikora nk’uko Yosefu yamubariye." 
Genesis44:3 Bukeye mu gasisira barungika abo bantu, hamwe n’indogoba zabo." 
Genesis44:4 Bavuye mu gisagara, batarashika kure, Yosefu abarira umubgiriza wiwe, ati Va hasi, ukurikire ba bagabo, maze ni wabashikīra, ubabaze, uti N’iki catumye mugirira nabi uwabagiriye neza?" 
Genesis44:5 Mbeg’ ico mwivye s’ico databuja anywesha, kand’ akakiragurisha? Uti Ko mwakoze murtyo, mwakoze icaha." 
Genesis44:6 Arabashikīra, ababarira ayo majambo." 
Genesis44:7 Baramwishura, bati Mugenzi, utewe n’iki kutubarira ben’ ivyo? Biragahera abasavyi bawe ko twokora nk’ivyo!" 
Genesis44:8 Ereg’ amahera twasanze mu minwa y’ amagunira yacu twarayakugarukaniye tuyakūye mu gihugu c’i Kanani: none twoshobora dute kwiba ifeza cank’ izahabu vyo mu nzu ya shobuja? 
Genesis44:9 Uwo wokibonana wese muri twebge abasavyi bawe, akwiye gupfa, natwe duhinduke abaja ba shobuja." 
Genesis44:10 Arabishura, ati Nuko rero, birakora bibe nk’uko mubivuze. Uwo kija kubonekako ni we azohinduka umuja wanje, namwe abandi muzoba mweze." 
Genesis44:11 Baca bakūra amagunira yabo ku ndogoba n’ ingoga, bayashira hasi, umuntu wese atekurura iryiwe." 
Genesis44:12 Arasaka, ahera k’uw’imfura ashitsa ku muhererezi: ca gikombe kiboneka mw igunira rya Benyamini." 
Genesis44:13 Baca bitantamurirakw impuzu zabo, umuntu wese asubiza ibintu vyiwe ku ndogoba, basubira mu gisagara." 
Genesis44:14 Nuko Yuda na bagenzi be bashika kwa Yosefu, basanga ari ho akiri: baca bamwitembagaza imbere." 
Genesis44:15 Yosefu arababaza, at’ Ico mwakoze ico n’igiki? Ntimuzi yuk’ umuntu ameze nkanje ashobora kuragura koko?" 
Genesis44:16 Yuda aramwishura, ati None twovuga iki ga mugenzi? canke twokwishura iki, canke twokwiregura dute? Imana yamenye ibigabitanyo vy’ abasavyi bawe: ehe tubaye abaja bawe, databuja, twe n’uwo igikombe kibonetseko." 
Genesis44:17 Aramwishura, ati Biragahera ko nokora ntyo! Uwo igikombe kibonetseko ni we azoba umuja wanje; ariko mweho ni mwīgīre, mudūge kwa so amahoro." 
Genesis44:18 Maze Yuda aramwegera, aramubarira, ati Mugenzi, zirikana, ndagusabe ijambo mvuga, ntumpambarire, jewe umusavyi wawe: kuk’ umeze nka Farawo." 
Genesis44:19 Erega mugenzi, ni wewe watubajije, uti Muracafise so, canke har’ uwundi muvukana?" 
Genesis44:20 Natwe turakwishura, mugenzi, tuti Dufise data w’umutāma, hariho n’ uwundi muhungu yavyaye ashaje; na we mukuru we yarapfuye, none ni we asigaye ar’ikinege mu nda ya nyina, kandi se amukunda cane." 
Genesis44:21 Nawe uratubarira abasavyi bawe, uti Muramunzanira ndamurābe." 
Genesis44:22 Natwe turakubarira, mugenzi, tut’ Uwo muhungu ntivyoshoboka kw atandukana na se, kuko botandukana se yopfa." 
Genesis44:23 Nawe uratubgira, twebge abasavyi bawe, ut’ Umuhererezi wanyu ni mutamumanukana, ntimuzosubira kungaruka mu maso." 
Genesis44:24 Nuko tudūze, dushikiriye data umusavyi wawe, tumubarira amajambo yawe, mugenzi." 
Genesis44:25 Hanyuma data atubariye, ati Subira mugende, mudusumire utwo kurya;" 
Genesis44:26 turamuhakanira, tuti Ntidushobora kumanuka; arik’ umuhererezi wacu ni twajana, turamanuka: kuko bidashoboka guseruka uwo muntu mu maso, umuhererezi wacu tutari kumwe." 
Genesis44:27 Maze data umusavyi wawe aratubarira, ati Murazi yuk’ umugore wanje twavyaranye abahungu babiri:" 
Genesis44:28 umwe akaba yaragiye amazimayongo, nkibgira, nt’ Igikōko caramutabaguye, nta kindi; nanje nkaba ntasubiye kumubona;" 
Genesis44:29 ati None ni mwanyaka n’uyu, akagira ico aba, muzoba mutumye imvi zanje zimanukana umubabaro i kuzimu." 
Genesis44:30 Nuko none ni naramuka nshikiriye data umusavyi wawe tutari kumwe n’uwo muhungu, n’ukuntu umutima wiwe yawuhereje kur’ uwo muhungu," 
Genesis44:31 akabona tutazananye, yoca apfa: twebge abasavyi bawe twoba dutumye imvi za data umusavyi wawe zimanukana umubabaro i kuzimu." 
Genesis44:32 Kuko jewe umusavyi wawe nishinze uyo muhungu kuri data, nti Ni ntamukugarukanira, nzoba ngukoreye icaha kitazomvako gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Genesis44:33 None rero ndakwinginze, ndasavye nsigare mu gishingo c’uyu muhungu, mbe umuja wawe, mugenzi; uyu muhungu atahane na bagenzi be." 
Genesis44:34 Mbega nosubira nte kuri data, ntari kumwe n’uwo muhungu? Reka noye kuzobona ivyago bizoba kuri data." 
Genesis45:1 Maze Yosefu ntiyaba agishobora kwiyumanganya imbere y’abo bahagararanye bose; aca avuga n’ijwi rirenga, ati Ni mutaramure abantu bose. Nuko ntihagira uwundi muntu n’umwe asigarana na Yosefu, igihe yibarira bene se." 
Genesis45:2 Araturikisha ararira, Abanyegiputa baravyumva, no kwa Farawo baravyumva." 
Genesis45:3 Yosefu abarira bene se, at’ Erega ni jewe Yosefu! Aho data aracariho? Bene se babura ico bovuga, kuko barandutse imitima kubona bar’ imbere yiwe." 
Genesis45:4 Yosefu abarira bene se, at’ Enda ni munyegere. Baramwegera; aravuga, ati Ni jewe Yosefu mwene so, umwe mwaguze ngashōrwa muri Egiputa." 
Genesis45:5 None ntimubabare ngo mwirakire kuko mwanguze ngashōrwa ino: kukw Imana ari yo yatumye mbītangira imbere ngo mbe kirokora. 
Genesis45:6 Ikigoyi kimaze imyaka ibiri mu gihugu, kandi haracasigaye iyindi myaka itanu batazoruha barimamwo canke ngo bimbure." 
Genesis45:7 Imana ni yo yatumye mbītangira imbere kugira ngw ibabogore, mugire ico musiga mw isi, ibarokoze agakiza gakomeye." 
Genesis45:8 None rero si mwebge mwandungitse ino, n’Imana: kandi yampinduye nka se wa Farawo, n’umuzezwarugo wiwe wa vyose, no kuba umugaba w’igihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Genesis45:9 Ni mwihute, mudūge kwa data, muze mushike mumubarira, mut’ Umwana wawe Yosefu yadutumye ngw Imana yamugize umugaba w’igihugu cose ca Egiputa: muti Manuka uze iy’ari, ntutebe." 
Genesis45:10 Muti Kand’ uzoshika uba mu gihugu c’i Gosheni, ube hafi yiwe, mwe n’abana bawe n’abuzukuru bawe, n’imikuku yawe n’amasho yawe, n’ivy’ ufise vyose." 
Genesis45:11 Kandi mut’ Azogutungirayo, kuko hagisigaye imyaka itanu y’ikigoyi, woye kuzohava ufūtāna, mwe n’inzu yawe n’ab’ ufise bose." 
Genesis45:12 Kandi muravyibonera n’amaso yanyu, na mwene mama Benyamini aravyibonera, yukw ari jewe ubganje mvyikūriye mu kanwa." 
Genesis45:13 Kandi muze mubarire data icubahiro canje cose mfise muri Egiputa, n’ivyo mwiboneye vyose, kandi muze munyarukane data kumushikana ino." 
Genesis45:14 Yosefu araheza agwa mw izosi Benyamini mwene nyina, ararira; Benyamini na we aririra kw izosi rya Yosefu." 
Genesis45:15 Agūmbīra bene se bose, abaririrako; hanyuma y’ ivyo bene se bararemerana, bayāga na we." 
Genesis45:16 Inkuru y’ivyo ishika kwa Farawo, bat’ Ab’i wabo wa Yosefu baje; binezereza Farawo n’abantu biwe cane." 
Genesis45:17 Farawo abgira Yosefu, ati Barira ab’i wanyu bagenze bartya: baremēke ibintu vyabo indogoba, bagende, baje mu gihugu c’i Kanani;" 
Genesis45:18 bazane so n’abo mu ngo zabo, baze i wanje: nanje nzobaha ku vyiza‐vyiza vyo mur’iki gihugu ca Egiputa, bazorya ku biryoshe vyo mu gihugu." 
Genesis45:19 Nuko none ndabikugeze: ubabarire, bagenze bartya: bajane imikogote imwe yo mur’ iki gihugu ca Egiputa ikwegwa n’amafarasi, yo kuzana abana babo bato n’abagore babo, bazane na so, baze ino." 
Genesis45:20 Kandi ntibababazwe n’ ibintu vyabo: kukw ivyiza‐vyiza vyo mur’ iki gihugu cose ca Egiputa bizoba ivyabo. 
Genesis45:21 Nuko bene Isirayeli babigenza bartyo; Yosefu abaha imikogote, nk’uko Farawo yabigeze, abaha n’ impamba." 
Genesis45:22 Kand’ uko bangana, aha umuntu wese imyambaro yo gukūranya; arikw aha Benyamini intete z’ifeza amajana atatu, amuha n’imyambaro yo gukūranya itanu." 
Genesis45:23 Se na we iganuke yamurungikiye n’iri: indogoba cumi zigiye zīremētse ku vyiza‐vyiza vyo muri Egiputa, n’indogoba zivyara cumi zīremētse imihure y’impeke n’ivyo kurya n’impamba se azorīra mu nzira." 
Genesis45:24 Nukw asēzera bene se: bakiriko baragenda, arababgira, ati Mwirinde, ntimutanekw ibirake muri mu nzira!" 
Genesis45:25 Nuko bava muri Egiputa, badūga mu gihugu c’i Kanani, bashika i muhira kwa se Yakobo." 
Genesis45:26 Baramubarira, bati Yosefu aracariho, ni we wa mugaba w’igihugu cose ca Egiputa. Umutima wiwe uca ugwa igihumura, ntiyavyemera." 
Genesis45:27 Bamudōndera amajambo yose Yosefu yabatumye; se Yakobo abonye ya mikogote Yosefu yarungitse kumujana, umutima wiwe urarabūka." 
Genesis45:28 Isirayeli aravuga, ati Ni vyo bizi, ko Yosefu umwana wanje akiriho! Ndagenda nje kumubona ntarapfa!" 
Genesis46:1 Nuko Isirayeli afata urugendo, arajonjora n’utwiwe twose, ashika i Beri‐sheba, aha Imana ibimazi arabikerera, Imana ya se Isaka." 
Genesis46:2 Maze mw ijoro Imana ihamagara Isirayeli ari nko mu nzozi, iti Yakobo we! ewe Yakobo! Aritaba, ati Sabge!" 
Genesis46:3 Iramubarira, iti Nd’Imana, Imana ya so; ntutinye kumanuka muri Egiputa, kukw ari ho nzoguhindurira ihanga rikomeye." 
Genesis46:4 Jewe ubganje nzomanukana nawe muri Egiputa, kandi ni jewe nzogukūrayo; kandi Yosefu ni we azohwamikira ingohe ku maso yawe igihe uzopfa." 
Genesis46:5 Yakobo arahaguruka, ava i Beri‐sheba: bene Isirayeli bajana se Yakobo n’abana babo bato n’ abagore babo muri ya mikogote ikwegwa n’amafarasi Farawo yarungitse kumwimura." 
Genesis46:6 Yakobo bo n’uruvyaro rwiwe rwose baja muri Egiputa, bajanye ibiyevera vyabo n’ibintu vyabo baronkeye mu gihugu c’i Kanani;" 
Genesis46:7 ashikana muri Egiputa n’abahungu biwe n’abuzukuru biwe b’abahungu, n’ abakobga biwe n’abuzukuru biwe b’abakobga, n’uruvyaro rwiwe rwose." 
Genesis46:8 Aya ni yo mazina y’Abisirayeli bagiye muri Egiputa, ni we Yakobo n’abana biwe. Imfura yiwe ni Reyubeni;" 
Genesis46:9 bene Reyubeni ni Henoki, na Palu, na Hesironi, na Karumi." 
Genesis46:10 Bene Simeyoni ni Yemuweli, na Yamini, na Ohadi, na Yakini, na Sohari, bo na Sauli umwana yavyaye ku Munyakananikazi." 
Genesis46:11 Bene Lewi ni Gerushoni na Kohati na Merari. 
Genesis46:12 Bene Yuda ni Eri, na Onani, na Shela, na Peresi na Zera: ariko Eri na Onani bapfiriye mu gihugu c’i Kanani. Bene Peresi ni Hesironi na Hamuli." 
Genesis46:13 Bene Isakari ni Tola, na Puva, na Yobu, na Shimuroni." 
Genesis46:14 Bene Zebuloni ni Seredi na Eloni na Yakileli. 
Genesis46:15 Abo ni bo bamutse ku bo Leya yavyaranye na Yakobo bakir’ i Padan‐aramu, bavyara n’umukobga yitwa Dina: nukw abana biwe bose b’abahungu n’abakobga ni mirongwitatu na batatu." 
Genesis46:16 Bene Gadi ni Sifiyoni, na Hagi, na Shuni, na Esiboni, na Eri, na Arodi, na Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Bene Asheri ni Imuna, na Ishiva, na Ishivi, na Beriya, na mushiki wabo Sera; bene Beriya ni Heberi na Malukiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Abo ni bo bamutse ku bo Zilupa yavyaranye na Yakobo, Zilupa ari we Labani yahaye Leya umukobga wiwe kumucorekera: n’ icumi na batandatu." 
Genesis46:19 Bene Rakeli muka Yakobo, ni Yosefu na Benyamini." 
Genesis46:20 Yosefu yavyaye Manase na Efurayimu, ari mu gihugu ca Egiputa, abavyara kuri Asenati umukobga wa Potifera, umuherezi wo mu gisagara Oni." 
Genesis46:21 Bene Benyamini ni Bela, na Bekeri, na Ashibeli, na Gera, na Namani, na Ehi, na Roshi, na Mupimu, na Hupimu, na Arudi." 
Genesis46:22 Abo ni bo bamutse ku bo Rakeli yavyaranye na Yakobo: bose n’ icumi na bane. 
Genesis46:23 Mwene Dani ni Hushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Bene Nafutali ni Yakiseli, na Guni, na Yeseri, na Shilemu." 
Genesis46:25 Abo ni bo bamutse ku bo Biluha yavyaranye na Yakobo, Biluha ari we Labani yahaye Rakeli umukobga wiwe kumucorekera: bose n’ indwi." 
Genesis46:26 Abantu bose bajanye na Yakobo muri Egiputa, bakomōtse kuri we, udashizemw’ abakazana biwe, bose na bose bari mirongwitandatu na batandatu." 
Genesis46:27 Abahungu Yosefu yavyaye ari muri Egiputa ni babiri; nukw abantu bose b’inzu ya Yakobo bagiye muri Egiputa bari mirongwirindwi. 
Genesis46:28 Yakobo atuma Yuda ngw amwītangire imbere aje kwa Yosefu, ngw amurangire inzira ija i Gosheni: nuko bashika mu gihugu c’i Gosheni." 
Genesis46:29 Yosefu azirikisha umukogote wiwe ku mafarasi, adūga i Gosheni ngw asanganire se Isirayeli; aramwibarira, amugwa mw izosi, aririra kw izosi ryiwe umwanya munini." 
Genesis46:30 Isirayeli abarira Yosefu, ati Ni vyo bizi, naho nopfa, ko nkubonye ukiriho!" 
Genesis46:31 Maze Yosefu abarira bakuru be n’ab’i wabo, ati Ngiye kubgira Farawo yuko bakuru banje n’ab’i wacu bahora mu gihugu c’i Kanani bashitse ino," 
Genesis46:32 kandi kw ar’ abama baragira, kukw ar’ abanyenka; kandi ko bazanye imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo, n’ivyo bafise vyose." 
Genesis46:33 Nuko Farawo ni yabahamagaza, akababaza," 
Genesis46:34 at’ Umwuga wanyu n’umuki? muze mumwishure, mut’ Abasavyi bawe tur’ abanyenka, guhera mu buto bgacu kugeza n’ubu, twebge ubgacu uhereye no kuri ba sogokuruza. Muvuge murtyo kugira ngo mugerērwe mu gihugu c’i Gosheni, kuk’ ūragira wese ar’ umunenwa ku Banyegiputa." 
Genesis47:1 Yosefu araheza aragenda, abgira Farawo, ati Data n’abo tuvukana bashitse ino bavuye mu gihugu c’i Kanani, bo n’imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo n’ivyo bafise vyose; none bari ngaho mu gihugu c’i Gosheni." 
Genesis47:2 Maz’ arobanura batanu muri bene se, abashīra Farawo." 
Genesis47:3 Farawo abaza bene se ba Yosefu, at’ Umwuga wanyu n’umuki? Bishura Farawo, bat’ Abasavyi bawe tur’ abama baragira, twebge ubgacu uhereye no kuri ba sogokuruza." 
Genesis47:4 Kandi baramubarira, bati Tuzanywe no gusuhukira mur’ iki gihugu, kukw abasavyi bawe twabuze ubgatsi bg’ imikuku yacu, kukw ikigoyi ari cinshi cane mu gihugu c’i Kanani; none rero turasavye, wemerere abasavyi bawe, tube mu gihugu c’i Gosheni." 
Genesis47:5 Farawo abarira Yosefu, ati So n’abo muvukana ko baje kuri wewe," 
Genesis47:6 igihugu ca Egiputa ngico: ubagerēre aharuta ahandi ubgiza, babe mu gihugu c’i Gosheni; kandi namb’ uzi abahanga muri bo, ubagire abatongore b’ inka zanje." 
Genesis47:7 Yosefu araheza yinjiza na se Yakobo, amushikana imbere ya Farawo: Yakobo ahezagira Farawo." 
Genesis47:8 Farawo abaza Yakobo, at’ Imyaka umaze n’ingahe?" 
Genesis47:9 Yakobo yishura Farawo, at’ Imyaka y’ukuyerera kwanje kw isi n’ijana na mirongwitatu: iyo myaka mbayeho ibaye mike kandi mibi, ntingana n’imyaka ba sogokuruza bamaze, mu misi y’ukuzenzagira kwabo." 
Genesis47:10 Yakobo ahezagira Farawo, araheza ava imbere yiwe." 
Genesis47:11 Yosefu agerēra se n’abo bavukana, abaha ishamvu mu gihugu ca Egiputa, aharuta ahandi ubgiza, mu ntāra y’i Ramesesi, nk’uko Farawo yageze." 
Genesis47:12 Yosefu aha se n’abo bavukana n’abo mu rugo rwa se bose ivyo kubatunga, uko mu nzu zabo bangana." 
Genesis47:13 Nuko mu gihugu cose ntihaba hakiboneka ivyo kurya, kukw ikigoyi cari cinshi cane, bituma abo mu gihugu ca Egiputa n’abo mu gihugu c’i Kanani bagwa isari kubg’ inzara." 
Genesis47:14 Yosefu akoranya amahera yose yari mu gihugu ca Egiputa no mu gihugu c’i Kanani bazanye gusumisha, ayajana kwa Farawo." 
Genesis47:15 Amahera yose ashize mu gihugu ca Egiputa no mu gihugu c’i Kanani, Abanyegiputa bose baja kuri Yosefu, bati Duhe ivyo kurya, twoye kugwa imbere yawe, kukw amahera yacu ashize." 
Genesis47:16 Yosefu arabishura, ati Ni muzane amatungo yanyu, nanje ndabagurira ivyo kurya ku matungo yanyu, asangwa amahera yashize." 
Genesis47:17 Bazanira Yosefu amatungo yabo; Yosefu abagurira ivyo kurya ku mafarasi n’imikuku n’amasho n’indogoba: abasumira ivyo kurya uwo mwaka, abibaguriye ku matungo yabo yose." 
Genesis47:18 Uwo mwaka ushize, mu mwaka ugira kabiri, baza kuri we, baramubarira, bati Mugenzi, ntitwoguhisha yukw amahera yacu yose yashize, kand’ amasho yacu yose yacitse ayawe, mugenzi. Non’ urabona kw ata co tugisigaranye, mugenzi, atar’ imibiri yacu n’amatongo yacu:" 
Genesis47:19 none twoye kugwa imbere yawe, amatongo yacu ngw ahinduke imisaka, n’uduhe utwo kurya, ube utuguranye n’amatongo yacu, ducike abagurano ba Farawo, atuganzanye n’amatongo yacu: uduhe n’imbuto, ntidupfe, tubeho, igihugu coye guhinduka imisaka." 
Genesis47:20 Nuko Yosefu agurira Farawo amatongo yose yo muri Egiputa, kuk’ Umunyegiputa wese yagura indimiro yiwe, kukw ikigoyi cabateye cane: nukw igihugu cose gicika ishamvu ya Farawo." 
Genesis47:21 Abantu na bo abagira abagurano, mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, iyo kiva kikagera." 
Genesis47:22 Amatongo y’ abaherezi ni yo yonyene atāguze: kukw abaherezi bari bafise ivyo kubatunga bagerewe na Farawo, bikaba ari vyo barya: ni co catumye batagura amatongo yabo." 
Genesis47:23 Yosefu abarira abantu, at’ Eh’ uyu musi ndabaguze, mubaye aba Farawo, mwe n’amatongo yanyu: none ngizi imbuto zo kuja kubiba." 
Genesis47:24 Arik’ uko muzokwimbura kwose, muzokwama muha Farawo igihimba ca gatanu c’ivyo mwimbuye; namwe ibihimba bine bizoba ivyanyu, ngo mubikūrekw imbuto, bibe n’ivyo kurya vyanyu n’abo mu ngo zanyu n’abana banyu." 
Genesis47:25 Baramubarira, bat’ Udukijije urupfu! Komeza uduhangaze, mugenzi, natwe tuzoba abagurano ba Farawo." 
Genesis47:26 Nuko Yosefu abigira icagezwe, kikiriho na bugingo n’ubu, yukw igihimba ca gatanu c’ivyimburwa vyo mu gihugu ca Egiputa kizoba ica Farawo: amatongo y’abaherezi yonyene ni yo atabaye aya Farawo." 
Genesis47:27 Abisirayeli baba mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu ntāra y’i Gosheni; baronkeray’ ibintu, bararondoka, baragwira cane." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobo amara imyaka cumi n’indwi ari mu gihugu ca Egiputa: nukw imyaka Yakobo yamaze n’ ijana na mirongwine n’indwi, iyo ni yo myaka y’ukubaho kwiwe." 
Genesis47:29 Nukw igihe co gupfa kwa Isirayeli kiri hafi, ahamagaza umwana wiwe Yosefu, aramubarira, ati Ni waba uzongirira neza, ndakwinginze, n’ushire ukuboko kwawe musi y’ikibero canje, wemere kunyobokera, no kumbera umwizigirwa. Ndakwinginze, ntuz’ umpambe muri Egiputa:" 
Genesis47:30 ariko ni nagera guhamvya ba sogokuru, uz’ unkūre muri Egiputa, umpambe mw isenga yabo bāhambgemwo. Aramwishura, ati Nzogenza uk’ umbariye." 
Genesis47:31 Aramubarira, ati Ndahira: aramurahira. Isirayeli araheza yūnama ku musego wo ku buriri bgiwe." 
Genesis48:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo babarira Yosefu, bat’ Umuvyeyi wawe ararwaye. Aca ahitana abana biwe bompi, Manase na Efurayimu." 
Genesis48:2 Babarira Yakobo, bat’ Ehe umwana wawe Yosefu araje. Isirayeli aca arinanata, yicara ku buriri." 
Genesis48:3 Yakobo abarira Yosefu, at’ Imana Ishobora vyose yanyiyerekeye i Luzi ho mu gihugu c’i Kanani, irampezagira;" 
Genesis48:4 irambarira, it’ Ehe nzokurondora, nkugwize, nguhindure igugu ry’amahanga; kand’ iki gihugu nzogiha uruvyaro rwawe ruzogukurikira, kibe ishamvu yarwo ibihe vyose." 
Genesis48:5 Non’ aba bahungu bawe bompi wavyaye n’abanje, abo wavyariye ino mu gihugu ca Egiputa ntaraza iy’ uri: mbere Efurayimu na Manase babaye abanje, babaye kimwe na Reyubeni na Simeyoni." 
Genesis48:6 Ni hagira abandi bana uvyara hanyuma bazoba abawe, maze mw iragwa ryabo bazoja mu gishingo ca bakuru babo." 
Genesis48:7 Kand’ igihe nava i Padani nabonye amagorwa, Rakeli arapfa, turi mu rugendo mu gihugu c’i Kanani, twari dushigaje akarere tugashika muri Efurata; ndamuhamba ku nzira ija muri Efurata, ari ho Betelehemu." 
Genesis48:8 Isirayeli abona bene Yosefu, aramubaza, at’ Aba ni ba nde?" 
Genesis48:9 Yosefu yishura se, ati N’abana banje, bamwe Imana yampereye ino. Aramubarira, at’ Enda banyegereze, ndabahezagire." 
Genesis48:10 Kand’ amaso ya Isirayeli yar’ asigaye abona ivyijiji kubgo gusāza, ntiyar’ acihweza. Arabamwēgereza, na we arabasoma, arabagūmbīra." 
Genesis48:11 Isirayeli abarira Yosefu, ati Sinari ncibgira yuko nzosubira kugukubita ijisho; ariko non’ Imana inyeretse n’uruvyaro rwawe." 
Genesis48:12 Yosefu abakūra hagati y’ amavi ya se, arunama akubita inkoro hasi." 
Genesis48:13 Yosefu arabafata bompi, arabamwēgereza; afatisha Efurayimu ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo, amutumbereza ukuboko kw’i bubamfu kwa Isirayeli, afatisha Manase ukuboko kwiwe kw’i bubamfu, amutumbereza ukuboko kwa Isirayeli kw’i buryo." 
Genesis48:14 Isirayeli aramvura ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo, arambika ikiganza ku mutwe wa Efurayimu, ari we muhererezi, arambika ikiganza ciwe c’i bubamfu ku mutwe wa Manase: anyuranya amaboko yiwe ibigirankana, kuko Manase ari we yar’ imfura." 
Genesis48:15 Ahezagira Yosefu, at’ Imana, iyo sogokuru Aburahamu na data Isaka bagendera imbere, Imana yandagiye mu kubaho kwanje kwose igashitsa n’ubu," 
Genesis48:16 umumarayika yandokoye mu vyago vyose, ihe aba bahungu umugisha; ni bitirirwe izina ryanje, n’irya sogokuru Aburahamu n’irya data Isaka; barakarondoka, babe benshi cane mw isi." 
Genesis48:17 Maze Yosefu abonye yuko se arambitse ikiganza ciwe c’i buryo ku mutwe wa Efurayimu, biramubabaza; aterura ukuboko kwa se, ngw agukūre ku mutwe wa Efurayimu, agushire ku wa Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Yosefu abarira se, at’ Oyaye muvyeyi, s’uko: uyu ni we mfura, ba ari we urambika ikiganza c’i buryo ku mutwe." 
Genesis48:19 Se aranka, ati Ndabizi mwananje, ndabizi: uwo na we azohinduka ubgoko, bitayekw azoba agakomeye; yamara murumuna we azomurusha, kand’ uruvyaro rwiwe ruzohinduka amahanga menshi." 
Genesis48:20 Abahezagira kur’ uwo musi, at’ Abisirayeli iyo bahezagirana, bazovuga kuri mwebge, bat’ Imana irakakugira nka Efurayimu na Manase. Na ho nyene yabanje Efurayimu ataravuga Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Isirayeli abarira Yosefu, at’ Ehe ngiye gupfa: arikw Imana izobana namwe, izobasubiza mu gihugu ca ba sogokuruza banyu." 
Genesis48:22 Kand’ umusozi w’i Shekemu ndawuguhayek’ ubuheta muri bagenzi bawe, uwo nanyagishije Abamori inkota yanje n’umuheto wanje." 
Genesis49:1 Yakobo ahamagaza abana biwe, arababarira, ati Ni mukoranire hamwe, ndabamenyeshe ibizobabako mu misi izoza." 
Genesis49:2 Ni mukorane, mutege amatwi, bana banje, Munyumve, ndi so Isirayeli." 
Genesis49:3 Reyubeni, ur’ imfura yanje, n’inkomezi zanje, n’ubuzibūra bganje: War’ akarenzo mu cubahiro, war’ akarenzo mu bubasha;" 
Genesis49:4 Nk’ukw amazi asūriranya, ni ko nawe umeze, nuko ntukibaye akarenzo, Kuko wūriye uburiri bga so, Ukabuhumanya: mbere yūriye aja mu buryamo bganje!" 
Genesis49:5 Simeyoni na Lewi baravukana; Ibirwanishwa vyabo n’ivyicanyi bakoresha ku manyama. 
Genesis49:6 Mushaha wanje, ntukaje mu nama zabo; Mutima wanje, ntugafatanye n’ikoraniro ryabo: Kuk’ uburake bgabo bgabateye kwica abantu, Bagatema n’ibitsi vy’inka kugira ngo bīmare ishavu." 
Genesis49:7 Uburake bgabo burakavumwa, kukw ari bginshi, N’ubushangashirwe bgabo, kukw ar’ubg’ agashinyaguro. Nzobakwiragiza mu ba Yakobo, Mbashwiragirize mu Bisirayeli." 
Genesis49:8 Weho, Yuda, abo muvukana bazogushima: Ukuboko kwawe kuzogwa abansi bawe mu gahogo; Bene nyoko bazokwikubita imbere." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda n’ikibunda c’intambge: Uradūze, mwana wanje, uvuye mu ruhīgi. Arūnamye, abunda nk’intambge, Mbere nk’intambge y’ingore: ni nde yohangāra kuyūbura?" 
Genesis49:10 Icumu ry’ubugabe ntirizova kuri Yuda, Inkoni yo kuganza ntizova hagati y’ibirenge vyiwe, Nyene vyo ataraza: Uwo ni we amahanga azokwumvira." 
Genesis49:11 Aziritse inyana yiwe y’indogoba ku muzabibu, N’umukangara w’indogoba awuziritse ku muzabibu wiwe w’indobanurwa; Amesuza impuzu ziwe vino, Imyambaro yiwe ayimesuza amaraso y’inzabibu." 
Genesis49:12 Amaso yiwe atukujwe na vino, Amenyo yiwe yagizwe akāmenge n’amata." 
Genesis49:13 Zebuloni azoba kw isēsero ry’ ikiyaga, I wabo hazoba kw isēsero ah’ amato ashikira; Azohāna urubibe n’i Sidoni." 
Genesis49:14 Isakari n’indogoba y’inyenkomezi, Iryamye hagati y’impongore." 
Genesis49:15 Abona uburuhukiro kw ari bgiza, N’igihugu ko kimuhimbaye; Ategera urutugu kwikorera, Ahinduka umuja wo gushingwa igikebere." 
Genesis49:16 Dani mu gucira abantu biwe imanza, Imiryango y’Abisirayeli nta co izomurusha." 
Genesis49:17 Dani azoba inzoka mu nzira, Azoba imvuvyi ku kayira, Ikomora ifarasi ku binōno, Bigatuma ūyigenderakw akoroka, akagwa agaramye." 
Genesis49:18 Ewe Uhoraho, niteze agakiza kawe!" 
Genesis49:19 Gadi, igitero kizomutera, Ariko na we azogihindukirana, agice ibitsi." 
Genesis49:20 Kuri Asheri hazova ivyo kurya biryoshe, Azotanga ivyo kurya vyiza bikwiye abami." 
Genesis49:21 Nafutali n’ishashi y’impongo irekuwe: Avuga amajambo meza. 
Genesis49:22 Yosefu n’ishami ry’igiti cama cane, Ishami ry’igiti cama cane kiri hafi y’isōko: Amashami yaco arenga uruzitiro rw’amabuye." 
Genesis49:23 Abarashi bamuteye kubabara, Bamurashe imyampi, baramuvumbukira." 
Genesis49:24 Arik’ umuheto wiwe wama ubanze, Ari n’ubukuba mu maboko, Abihawe n’amaboko y’Inyenkomezi ya Yakobo, Ari yo Mwungere, Igitandara ca Isirayeli," 
Genesis49:25 Ni yo Mana ya so, izogufasha. Īshobora vyose izoguha imigisha, Imigisha iva iyo mw ijuru hejuru, N’imigisha iva mu mazi y’i kuzimu, Izoguha umugisha w’ibere ryiza n’inda ishira imbere." 
Genesis49:26 Imihezagiro yanje so Irengeye iyo ba sogokuru bāhezagira, Ishika ah’imisozi y’intahava igarukira: Izoba ku mutwe wa Yosefu, Mu gitwariro c’uwagizwe umukuru muri bene se." 
Genesis49:27 Benyamini n’ibingira ry’amero; Mu gitondo arotsa ico yahize, Ku mugoroba akagabanganya isahu." 
Genesis49:28 Abo bose ni bo miryango y’ Abisirayeli, ukw ar’icumi n’ibiri: ivyo ni vyo se yababgiye, abahezagira, umuntu wese amuhezagira umuhezagiro ukwiranye na we." 
Genesis49:29 Arabihanikiriza, arababarira, ati Ngira mpamvye abacu: muze mumpambe hamwe na data na sogokuru mw isenga iri mw itongo ryar’ irya Efuroni Umuheti;" 
Genesis49:30 ari yo senga yo mw itongo ry’i Makipela, aharābana n’i Mamure, mu gihugu c’i Kanani, ni yo Aburahamu yaguze hamwe n’iryo tongo, kuba aho yīzīziye ho guhamba, ahaguze na Efuroni Umuheti." 
Genesis49:31 Ni ho bahamvye Aburahamu na Sara umugore wiwe; ni ho bahamvye Isaka na Rebeka umugore wiwe, kandi ni ho nahamvye Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Iryo tongo n’isenga iri muri ryo vyaguzwe mu Baheti. 
Genesis49:33 Yakobo arangije kwihanikiriza abana biwe, arikwega asubiza amaguru ku buriri, araheza aracīkāna, ahamvya ababo." 
Genesis50:1 Yosefu yubama kuri se mu maso, amuririrako, aramugūmbīra." 
Genesis50:2 Yosefu agera abantu biwe b’abaganga ngo bose se: nukw abo baganga bosa Isirayeli. 
Genesis50:3 Bamara imisi mirongwine bamwosa, uko ni kw imisi yo kwosa ingana: Abanyegiputa bamara imisi mirongwirindwi bamugandariye." 
Genesis50:4 Imisi y’ikigandaro ishize, Yosefu abarira abo mu rugo rwa Farawo, ati Ni mwaba mumbabaye, ndabasavye mumbaririre Farawo," 
Genesis50:5 muti Se yaramurahije, at’ Ehe ngiye gupfa: uz’ umpambe mu cobo niyimbiye mu gihugu c’i Kanani. None mut’ Aragusavye, umurekure adūge, ahambe se, aheze agaruke." 
Genesis50:6 Nuko Farawo aramwishura, ati Dūga, ugende uhambe so, nk’uko yakurahije." 
Genesis50:7 Nuko Yosefu aradūga, aja guhamba se; abagendanyi ba Farawo bose, n’abakuru bo mu rugo rwiwe, n’abakuru bose bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, baramuherekeza," 
Genesis50:8 bo n’abo kwa Yosefu bose, na bene se, n’abo kwa se: ivyo basize gusa mu gihugu c’i Gosheni n’abana babo bato, n’ imikuku yabo, n’amasho yabo." 
Genesis50:9 Ajana n’imikogote y’intambara n’ abagendera ku mafarasi: bagenda ar’ igugu rinini cane. 
Genesis50:10 Bashika ku mbuga y’igosorero yo muri Atadi, hāri hakurya ya Yorodani: baborogeray’ amaborogo menshi cane y’akabonge: Yosefu ashinga ko bahamara imisi ndwi bagandariye se." 
Genesis50:11 Ben’ igihugu b’Abanyakanani babonye ingene baririra ku mbuga yo muri Atadi, baravuga, bat’ Ehe kugandara kw’Abanyegiputa kw’ igitangaza! Ni co catumye bahita Abeli‐misirayimu; hāri hakurya ya Yorodani." 
Genesis50:12 Bene Yakobo bamugirira uko yabageze: 
Genesis50:13 bamujana mu gihugu c’i Kanani, bamuhamba mw isenga yo mw itongo ry’i Makipela, aharābana n’i Mamure, iyo Aburahamu yaguze hamwe n’iryo tongo, kuba aho yīzīziye ho guhamba, ahaguze na Efuroni Umuheti." 
Genesis50:14 Yosefu amaze guhamba se, asubirana muri Egiputa na bene se n’abandi bose bajanye na we kuja guhamba se." 
Genesis50:15 Bene se ba Yosefu babonye ko se apfuye, baravugana, bati Kumbure Yosefu azotwanka, adusubirize mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ibibi vyose twamukoreye." 
Genesis50:16 Batuma kuri Yosefu, bati Data atarapfa yaratubariye," 
Genesis50:17 ati Muze mubgire Yosefu, mut’ Arakwinginze, harira bakuru bawe igicumuro cabo n’icaha cabo, kuko bakugiriye nabi. Nuko none turakwinginze, uduharire twebge abashumba b’Imana ya data igicumuro cacu. Yosefu yumvise amajambo yabo, aca ararira." 
Genesis50:18 Maze bene se batako bariyizira, bamwitembagaza imbere, baramubgira, bati Rāba, tur’ abasavyi bawe!" 
Genesis50:19 Yosefu arababarira, ati Nta co mutinya! Mbega jewe ndi mu gishingo c’Imana?" 
Genesis50:20 Kubganyu mwagabiye kungirira nabi, arikw Imana yo yagabiye kubizanisha ivyiza, kugira ngw ishitse ibiriho mur’ iyi misi, ikize abantu benshi, boye gupfa." 
Genesis50:21 None rero mureke gutinya: nzobaha ivyo kubatunga, mwe n’abana banyu. Nukw arabaremēsha, ababarira neza." 
Genesis50:22 Yosefu aba muri Egiputa, bo n’inzu ya se. Yosefu amara imyaka ijana n’icumi;" 
Genesis50:23 yibonera abuzukuru ba Efurayimu; n’abana ba Makiri mwene Manase abahindura abana biwe. 
Genesis50:24 Yosefu abarira ab’i wabo, ati Ndi hafi gupfa; arikw Imana ntizobura kubagendera, ikabakūra mur’ iki gihugu, ikabajana mu gihugu yarahiye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo kw izobaha." 
Genesis50:25 Yosefu arahiza Abisirayeli, at’ Imana ntizobura kubagendera, namwe muze mukūre amagufa yanje ino, muyadūgane." 
Genesis50:26 Nuko Yosefu ahwera amaze imyaka ijana n’icumi: baramwosa, bamubīka mw isandugu yo kumuhambamwo, aho nyene muri Egiputa." 
Exodus1:1 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Isirayeli bagiye muri Egiputa, bajanye na Yakobo, umuntu wese ajana n’abo mu rugo rwiwe:" 
Exodus1:2 Reyubeni, na Simeyoni, na Lewi, na Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 na Isakari, na Zebuloni, na Benyamini," 
Exodus1:4 na Dani, na Nafutali, na Gadi, na Asheri." 
Exodus1:5 Abantu bose bāndurutse mu rura rwa Yakobo bari mirongwirindwi, hakora Yosefu yar’ asanzwe ari muri Egiputa." 
Exodus1:6 Nuko Yosefu arapfa, n’abo bavukana bose barapfa, bo n’ urunganwe rwose rw’ico gihe." 
Exodus1:7 Abisirayeli bararondoka, baravyara cane, baragwira, baba igisata; buzura ico gihugu." 
Exodus1:8 Nuko muri Egiputa hima uwundi mwami, atigeze kumenya ivya Yosefu." 
Exodus1:9 Maz’ abarira abantu biwe, ati Rāba Abisirayeli bahindutse ihanga rituruta mu bginshi riturusha n’inkomezi." 
Exodus1:10 Enda tubaronderere inama y’ubgenge, kugira ngo boye kugwira, bakazohava bīfatanya n’abansi bacu, haramutse habaye intambara, bakaturwanya, bakava mur’ iki gihugu." 
Exodus1:11 Nuko babaha abo kubakebera ibikebere ngo babatwaze ituntu babīkoreze ibiremereye. Bubakira Farawo ibisagara vyitwa Pitomu na Ramusesi vy’ibigega. 
Exodus1:12 Ariko, uko barushiriza kubatwaza ituntu, na bo ni ko barushiriza kugwira no kugasāra; nukw Abanyegiputa karabarya mu nda kubg’ Abisirayeli." 
Exodus1:13 Bacuranguza Abisirayeli barabacumukuza," 
Exodus1:14 batuntuza imitima yabo kubgo kubakoresha ibikorwa bitamisha, vyo mu rwondo no mu matafari n’ibikorwa vyose vyo mu ndimiro, ivyo babakoresha vyose, babacuranguza babacumukuza." 
Exodus1:15 Hārih’ abākirizi bākīra Abaheburayokazi, umwe yitwa Shifura, uwundi yitwa Puwa: nuk’ umwami wa Egiputa arababarira," 
Exodus1:16 ati Ni mwākīra abagore b’Abaheburayo, mwitegereze neza ikivutse: ni havuka umuhungu, muze mwame mumuniga, ariko ni yaba umukobga mumureke." 
Exodus1:17 Arikw abo bākirizi bubaha Imana, ntibagira nk’uk’ umwami wa Egiputa yabageze, bareka n’ abana b’abahungu." 
Exodus1:18 Maz’ umwami wa Egiputa ahamagaza abo bākirizi, arababaza, ati N’iki catumye mukora murtyo, mukareka abana b’abahungu?" 
Exodus1:19 Abākirizi bishura Farawo, bati N’ ukw abagore b’Abaheburayo batamera nk’ab’ Abanyegiputa, kuko banyarutsa, bakavyara umwākirizi atarabashikīra." 
Exodus1:20 Imana igirira neza abo bākirizi; iryo hanga rica riragwira, riba igisata." 
Exodus1:21 Kandi kukw abo bākirizi bubashe Imana, ibaha uruvyaro." 
Exodus1:22 Farawo araheza abarira abantu biwe bose, at’ Umuhungu wese azovuka, muze mumute mu ruzi, arik’ umukobga mumureke." 
Exodus2:1 Umuntu wo mu muryango wa Lewi aragenda, arongora umukobga wo mu Balewi nyene." 
Exodus2:2 Uwo mugore asama inda, avyara umuhungu: maz’ abonye uwo mwana kw ari mwiza, aramunyegeza kumara amezi atatu." 
Exodus2:3 Atagishoboye kumuhisha, yābīra agatebo kajishwe mu nkorogoto, agahoma kaburimbi n’ishīshi; ashiramw’ uwo mwana, agashira mu rufunzo mu munyika ku ruzi." 
Exodus2:4 Mushiki we aramwitangūra, ngw arābe ico yoba." 
Exodus2:5 Maz’ umukobga wa Farawo amanuka kwiyuhagira mu ruzi, incoreke ziwe zigendagenda ku nkombe y’uruzi. Abona ka gatebo mu rufunzo, atuma incoreke yiwe kukazana." 
Exodus2:6 Arakarumūra, asanga karimw’ umwana: kand’ uwo mwana yarikw ararira. Amutera akagongwe, at’ Uyu n’umwana wo mu Baheburayo." 
Exodus2:7 Maze mushiki we abaza uwo mukobga wa Farawo, ati Mbega sinoja kukuronderera umugore wo mu Baheburayo ngw amukwonkereze?" 
Exodus2:8 Umukobga wa Farawo aramwishura, at’ Ego me, genda. Nuk’ uwo mukobga aragenda, ahamagara nyina w’uwo mwana." 
Exodus2:9 Umukobga wa Farawo aramubarira, ati Jana uyu mwana, umunyonkereze, nzokugerera. Uwo mugore ajana uwo mwana, aramwonsa." 
Exodus2:10 Umwana amaze gukura, amushīra umukobga wa Farawo, acika umwana wiwe. Amwita Mose, ati N’uko namukūye mu mazi." 
Exodus2:11 Maze Mose amaze gukura, umusi ur’ izina agendera bene wabo, yitegereza ubugene batwazwa ituntu; abona Umunyegiputa akubita Umuheburayo w’i wabo." 
Exodus2:12 Yeraguza hirya no hino, maz’ abonye kw ata wumubona, yica uwo Munyegiputa, umuvyimba awuhisha mu musenyi." 
Exodus2:13 Bukeye bgaho, asubiye kwanduruka, agize artya aseruka ku bagabo babiri b’Abaheburayo barwana: abaza ūsindiye uwundi, ati N’iki gitumye ukubita mugenzawe?" 
Exodus2:14 Aramwishura, ati Ni nde yakugize umukuru cank’ umucamanza wacu? Mbeg’ ugomba kunyica nk’uko wishe wa Munyegiputa? Mose aratinya, arivuganya, ati N’ukuri vyaramenyekanye." 
Exodus2:15 Farawo avyumvise, arondera uko yokwica Mose. Ariko Mose aramuhunga, ahungira mu gihugu c’i Midiyani: yicara i ruhande y’ iriba." 
Exodus2:16 Kandi hār’ umuherezi w’i Midiyani yar’ afise abakobga ndwi: baraza, baravoma, buzuza ingomero, ngo bashore umukuku w’ intama wa se." 
Exodus2:17 Haza abungere, barabirukana: ariko Mose ava hasi, arabatabara, ashora umukuku wabo." 
Exodus2:18 Bashitse kwa se Ruweli, arababaza, ati Ko muje n’ ingoga uyu musi?" 
Exodus2:19 Bati N’ uk’ umuntu w’Umunyegiputa yadutabaye abungere, atakw atuvomera n’amazi, ashora umukuku." 
Exodus2:20 Abaza abo bakobga, ati Non’ ari hehe? N’iki catumye musiga uwo muntu? Ni mumuhamagare, tumufungurire." 
Exodus2:21 Maze Mose ashima kubana n’uwo muntu: na we arahava amuha umwigeme wiwe Zipora. 
Exodus2:22 Avyara umuhungu, se amwita Gerushomu, ati Nabaye inyambukīra mu gihugu kitar’ icacu." 
Exodus2:23 Hashize igihe kirekire, umwami wa Egiputa aratanga: Abisirayeli banihishwa no kuba mu buja, barataka; ugutaka batakishwa n’ubgo buja kuradūga, gushika ku Mana." 
Exodus2:24 Imana yumva amaborogo yabo, yibuka isezerano ryayo yasezeraniye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Imana yitegereza Abisirayeli, ibona uko bameze." 
Exodus3:1 Ico gihe Mose yaragira umukuku w’intama za Yetiro sebukwe, umuherezi w’i Midiyani: aturukiriza umukuku hirya y’ ubugaragwa, ashika ku musozi w’Imana, i Horebu." 
Exodus3:2 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho amubonekerera mu rubeya rw’umuriro uva hagati mu gisaka c’amahwa: aritegereza, abona ico gisaka cakamw’ umuriro, ariko nticatemuka." 
Exodus3:3 Mose arīvuganya, ati Hinge nkīkame ndābe karya katābonetse, mmenye igituma igisaka kidatemutse." 
Exodus3:4 Uhoraho abonye yukw akīkamishwa no kubirāba, Imana imuhamagara iri hagati mur’ ico gisaka, iti Mose, Mose! Aritaba, ati Sabge!" 
Exodus3:5 Iramubarira, iti Reka kwēgēra hano, kandi kūra inkweto mu birenge vyawe, kukw aho hantu uhagaze ar’ahēra." 
Exodus3:6 Kand’ iti Nd’ Imana ya so, Imana ya Aburahamu, Imana ya Isaka, Imana ya Yakobo. Mose aca yipfuka mu maso, kukw atinye kwitegereza Imana." 
Exodus3:7 Uhoraho aramubarira, ati N’ukuri abantu banje bari muri Egiputa nabonye amarushwa barimwo, numvise gutaka kwabo batakishwa n’ababakoresha babahindagiza; kuko nzi imibabaro yabo," 
Exodus3:8 kandi mmanukanywe no kubarokora, mbakūre mu maboko y’ Abanyegiputa, mbadūgane, mbakūre mur’ ico gihugu, mbajane mu gihugu ciza cāgutse, gitemba amata n’ubūki, kibamw’ Abanyakanani, n’Abaheti, n’Abamori, n’Abaferizi, n’Abahiwi, n’Abayebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Nuko none ehe rāba, ugutaka kw’Abisirayeli kwanshitseko, kandi nabonye agahahazo Abanyegiputa babahahaza." 
Exodus3:10 Nuko none ngwino, ngutume kuri Farawo, ukūre abantu banje b’Abisirayeli muri Egiputa." 
Exodus3:11 Mose yishura Imana, ati Mbega ubona nd’ iki, guhangara kuja kwa Farawo, no gukūra Abisirayeli muri Egiputa?" 
Exodus3:12 Iramwishura, it’ Erega nzoba ndi kumwe nawe, kand’ iki ni co kizokubera ikimenyamenya kw ari jewe nagutumye: ni wamara gukūra ubgo bgoko muri Egiputa, kur’ uyu musozi nyene ni ho muzonsabira." 
Exodus3:13 Mose abaza Imana, ati Ni nashika ku Bisirayeli, nkababarira nt’ Imana ya ba sogokuruza yabantumyeko; bakambaza, bati Yitwa nde? nzobishura iki?" 
Exodus3:14 Imana yishura Mose, iti NDI UWO NDI WE: kandi, it’ Ukw abe ari k’uzobgira Abisirayeli, uti NDIHO yabantumyeko." 
Exodus3:15 Imana yongera kubarira Mose, it’ Ukw abe ari k’uzobgira Abisirayeli, ut’ UHORAHO, Imana ya ba sogokuruza, yabantumyeko, ni yo Mana ya Aburahamu, Imana ya Isaka, Imana ya Yakobo: iryo ni ryo zina ryanje ry’ibihe bitazoshira, iryo ni ryo rizobabera icibutso canje, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus3:16 Genda, uz’ ukoranye abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli, ubabgire, ut’ Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sogokuruza, yaranyiyeretse, ari yo Mana ya Aburahamu, Imana ya Isaka, Imana ya Yakobo, irambarira, iti N’ukuri nabagendeye, mbona ivyo babagirira muri Egiputa:" 
Exodus3:17 ndavuga, nti Nzobakūra mu marushwa barimwo muri Egiputa, mbadūgane mu gihugu c’ Abanyakanani, n’Abaheti, n’Abamori, n’Abaferizi, n’Abahiwi, n’ Abayebusi, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Exodus3:18 Na bo bazokwumvira: kand’ uz’ ugende ku mwami wa Egiputa, mwe n’ abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli, mumubarire, mut’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abaheburayo, yaratwiyeretse: none turakwinginze, turekure tuje mu bugaragwa, tugende urugendo rw’imisi itatu, kugira ngo tuze dushikanire Uhoraho Imana yacu ibimazi." 
Exodus3:19 Kandi ndazi yuk’ umwami wo muri Egiputa atazobakundira ko mugenda, shit’ ukuboko kw’inkomezi kumugondoje." 
Exodus3:20 Nuko nzobangura ukuboko kwanje, nkubitishe Egiputa ibitangaza vyanje vyose, ivyo nzokorera hagati muri ho: hanyuma y’ivyo azobarekura." 
Exodus3:21 Kandi nzotuma ubu bgoko bugirira amahirwe ku Banyegiputa: ni mwagenda, ntimuzogenda iminwe misa;" 
Exodus3:22 arik’ umugore wese azosaba umubanyi wiwe, mber’ azosaba n’umugore yashembereje, utugenegene tw’ifeza n’ utw’ izahabu, bo n’imyambaro: kandi muzovyambika abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu; uko ni ko muzonyaga Abanyegiputa." 
Exodus4:1 Mose arayishura, at’ Erega ntibazonyemera, canke ngo banyumvire, kuko bazombarira, bat’ Uhoraho ntiyakwiyeretse." 
Exodus4:2 Uhoraho aramubaza, at’ Ico ufise mu kuboko n’iki? Aramwishura, ati N’inkoni." 
Exodus4:3 Aramubarira, ati Yiterere hasi. Ayiterera hasi, ihinduka inzoka; Mose arayihunga." 
Exodus4:4 Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Ramvura ukuboko, uyifate umurizo: aramvura ukuboko, arayifata, irongera ihindukira inkoni mu kuboko kwiwe." 
Exodus4:5 At’ Ivyo n’ukugira ngo baze bemere yuko jewe Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sekuruza, nakwiyeretse, ari jewe Mana ya Aburahamu, Imana ya Isaka, Imana ya Yakobo." 
Exodus4:6 Uhoraho atakw aramubarira, ati Shira igikonjo cawe mu gikiriza. Agishira mu gikiriza; agisokoroye, asanga kijējēta imibembe, cera nka shelegi." 
Exodus4:7 Aramubarira, ati Gisubize mu gikiriza. Agisubizayo; maz’ agisokoroye, asanga gisubiye kumera nk’ahandi hose ku mubiri wiwe." 
Exodus4:8 Ati Kandi ni batakwemera, ngo bemezwe n’ ikimenyetso ca mbere, bazokwemezwa n’ica kabiri." 
Exodus4:9 Kandi ni baramuka batemejwe n’ivyo bimenyetso vyompi, canke ngo bumvire amajambo yawe, uz’ udahe amazi mu ruzi, uyasuke i musozi; maz’ ayo mazi ukūye mu ruzi, ashitse i musozi azohinduka amaraso." 
Exodus4:10 Mose abarira Uhoraho, ati Mwami, mbega ko ntar’ imvuzi, bikaba bitantanguyeko ejo canke hirya y’ejo, cank’ ubu aho tuvuganiye, jewe umusavyi wawe: kuko ntabangutse mu mvugo canke mu rurimi." 
Exodus4:11 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Ni nde yaremye akanwa k’umuntu? canke ni nde atera uburagi, cank’ ubupfamatwi, cank’ aha umuntu kubona, cank’ amuhumisha? Si jewe, Uhoraho?" 
Exodus4:12 Nuko none genda, nanje nzobana n’akanwa kawe, nkwigishe ivyo ukwiye kuvuga." 
Exodus4:13 Aramwishura, ati Mwami, ndakwinginze, rāba uwundi wese utuma." 
Exodus4:14 Mose atuma uburake bg’ Uhoraho buziriringa; Uhoraho aramubgira, ati Mbega Aroni mukurwawe, Umulewi, si h’ari? Kandi nzi kw ar’ imvuzi. Nuko rero, agiye kuza kugusanganira; ni yakubona, azonezerwa mu mutima wiwe." 
Exodus4:15 Nawe uzohora umubarira, ushire amajambo mu kanwa kiwe: nanje nzobana n’ akanwa kawe n’akiwe, mbigishe ivyo mukora." 
Exodus4:16 Kand’ azokubera umusiguzi wo gusigurira abantu, akubere akanwa, nawe uzomubera nk’Imana." 
Exodus4:17 Kand’ uze witwaze iyo nkoni, ni yo uzokoresha vya bimenyetso." 
Exodus4:18 Mose aragenda, asubira kwa Yetiro sebukwe, aramubarira, ati Ndagusavye, undekure, nsubire ku b’i wacu bari muri Egiputa, ndābe yuko bakiriho. Yetiro yishura Mose, ati Genda amahoro." 
Exodus4:19 Uhoraho abarira Mose ar’ i Midiyani, ati Genda subira muri Egiputa, kukw abantu bose bāgomba kukwica bapfuye." 
Exodus4:20 Mose akora umugore n’abana, abashira ku ndogoba, asubira mu gihugu ca Egiputa, yitwaje na ya nkoni y’ Imana." 
Exodus4:21 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ni wasubira muri Egiputa, ntuz’ ubure gukorera imbere ya Farawo ibitangaza vyose nguhaye gukora: mugabo nzokomantaza umutima wiwe, ntazorekura abantu ngo bagende." 
Exodus4:22 Kand’ uz’ ubarire Farawo, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Isirayeli n’umwana wiwe w’imfura:" 
Exodus4:23 kandi yarakubariye, ngo Rekura umwana wiwe agende, aje kumusaba; ariko wanse kumurekura; uti Nuko rero na we azokwica umwana wawe w’imfura." 
Exodus4:24 Maze Mose akiri mu rugendo, ari ku ndaro, Uhoraho amusangaho, ashaka kumwica." 
Exodus4:25 Maze Zipora yābīra ibuye ry’ isare, akeba umutwe w’ico umwana wiwe yambariye, aterera imbere y’ibirenge vya Mose, ati N’ukuri umbereye umugabo avisha amaraso." 
Exodus4:26 Nuk’ Uhoraho aramureka; maze Zipora aramubgira, at’ Umbereye umugabo avisha amaraso! Gukeba abana ni kwo nkwitiye ntyo." 
Exodus4:27 Uhoraho abarira Aroni, ati Ja mu bugaragwa, usanganire Mose. Aragenda, bahūrira ku musozi w’Imana, aramugumbira." 
Exodus4:28 Mose abarira Aroni amajambo yose Uhoraho yamutumye, n’ibimenyetso vyose yamugeze gukora." 
Exodus4:29 Mose na Aroni baragenda, bakoraniriza hamwe abakuru bose bo mu Bisirayeli:" 
Exodus4:30 Aroni ababarira amajambo yose Uhoraho yatumye Mose, akorera vya bimenyetso imbere y’abantu." 
Exodus4:31 Abantu baca baremera: maze bumvise yuk’ Uhoraho yagendeye Abisirayeli, akabona amarushwa barimwo, bunamika amaso, barasenga." 
Exodus5:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, Mose na Aroni baragenda babarira Farawo, bat’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, igize ngo Rekura abantu bayo, bagende, bayigirire imisi mikuru mu bugaragwa." 
Exodus5:2 Farawo arababaza, at’ Uhoraho ni nde, ngo ndamwumvire, ndekure Abisirayeli? Uhoraho sindamuzi, kandi sindekura Abisirayeli." 
Exodus5:3 Baramubgira, bat’ Imana y’Abaheburayo yaratwiyeretse: none turasavye, uturekure tuje mu bugaragwa, tugende urugendo rw’ imisi itatu, kugira ngo tuze dushikanire Uhoraho Imana yacu ibimazi, yoye kuzohava idutērēra ikīza cank’ inkota." 
Exodus5:4 Umwami wa Egiputa arababaza, ati Mbega Mose na Aroni, n’iki gitumye mutesha abo bantu ibikorwa vyabo? Ni mugende musubire ku bikebere vyanyu!" 
Exodus5:5 Farawo atakw aravuga, ati Rāba, abantu bo mu gihugu ingen’ ari benshi: none namwe mugomba kubakūra ku bikebere vyabo!" 
Exodus5:6 Kur’ uwo musi nyene Farawo abarira abakoresha abo bantu, n’abarōngōzi babo," 
Exodus5:7 ati Ntimwongere guha abantu ibiganogano vyo kubumbana n’amatafari nka mbere: ni bagende bavyironderere ubgabo. 
Exodus5:8 Kand’ igitigiri c’amatafari basanzwe babumba, bakigumeko; ntimubagabanye na makeya: kukw ar’ abanebge, ni co kibatakisha ngo ni bagende, bashikanire Imana yabo ibimazi." 
Exodus5:9 Abo bantu ni babazigire ku bikorwa bikomeye, abe ari vyo bitwaririka, boye gushira imitima ku magambo y’ibinyoma." 
Exodus5:10 Abakoresha ubgo bgoko barasohoka, bo n’abarōngōzi babo, babarira abantu, bati Farawo agize ngo ntakibaha ibiganogano." 
Exodus5:11 Ni mugende ubganyu, mwironderere ibiganogano aho mwobibona hose; kandi ntimuzogabanywa igitigiri mwaciriwe na gatoya." 
Exodus5:12 Nukw abantu bakwiragira mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa kwironderera udushingweshingwe mu mwanya w’ibiganogano. 
Exodus5:13 Kand’ ababakoresha barabasunika, bati Mushitse ibikorwa vyanyu, ivyo mwagerewe vy’imisi yose, nk’uko mwari musanzwe mukora mukibona ibiganogano." 
Exodus5:14 Abarōngōzi b’Abisirayeli, bāshizweho kurōngōra n’abakoresha ba Farawo, barakubitwa, barababaza, bati N’iki catumye mudashitsa ivyo mwagerewe ejo n’ uyu musi, ngo mukwize amatafari nk’uko mwahora?" 
Exodus5:15 Maz’ abo barōngōzi b’Abisirayeli baragenda batakambira Farawo, bati Mbeg’ uduhoye iki, twebge abasavyi bawe?" 
Exodus5:16 Nta biganogano duhabga, maze bakatubgira ngo ni tubumbe amatafari: kandi none rāba, twebge abasavyi bawe turakubitwa; ariko ni mwebge mugiriye nabi abantu bawe!" 
Exodus5:17 Arabishura, ati Mur’ abanebge, mur’ abanebge! Ni co kibatera kuvuga ngo mugende gushikanira Uhoraho ibimazi." 
Exodus5:18 Nuko ni mugende mukore: ariko nta biganogano muzohabga: yamara ntimuzobura gushitsa igitigiri c’amatafari. 
Exodus5:19 Abo barōngōzi b’Abisirayeli bamenya ko babonye ibara, kuko babariwe kutazohaza itafari na rimwe ku yo baciriwe ku musi n’ umusi." 
Exodus5:20 Bakiva kwa Farawo, basanga Mose na Aroni babategereje mu nzira;" 
Exodus5:21 barababarira, bat’ Uhoraho n’arābe ico mudukoreye, abahane, kuko mutumye Farawo n’abantu biwe batwanka urunuka, mukabaha inkota yo kutwica." 
Exodus5:22 Mose asubira k’Uhoraho, aramubaza, ati Mwami, n’iki gitumye ugirira nabi ubu bgoko? kandi n’iki catumye untuma?" 
Exodus5:23 Kuk’ uhereye aho nashikiye kwa Farawo, nkamubarira mw izina ryawe, yaciye agirira nabi ubu bgoko: nawe nta co watabaye abantu bawe na gatoya." 
Exodus6:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uhereye none uzorāba ivyo nzogirira Farawo: ukuboko kw’ ubushobozi kuzomugondōza, abarekure, mber’ ukuboko kw’ubushobozi kuzomugondōza, abirukane mu gihugu ciwe." 
Exodus6:2 Imana ibarira Mose, iti Nd’ UHORAHO;" 
Exodus6:3 kandi niyeretse Aburahamu, na Isaka, na Yakobo, ko nd’ Imana Ishobora vyose, ariko sinabīmenyesha mur’ iryo zina ryanje UHORAHO." 
Exodus6:4 Kandi nakomeje isezerano ryanje na bo, ko nzobaha igihugu c’i Kanani, igihugu bābayemw’ ar’ inyambukīra." 
Exodus6:5 Kandi numvise amaborogo y’Abisirayeli, Abanyegiputa bazigiye mu buja; nibuka isezerano ryanje." 
Exodus6:6 Nuko barira Abisirayeli yuko nd’ Uhoraho, kandi nzobakūra ku bikebere Abanyegiputa babakebera, mbakūre mu buja barimwo, mbacunguze ukuboko kuramvuye, n’ibihano bikomeye:" 
Exodus6:7 kandi nzobagira abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yanyu; ni ho muzomenya ko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ibakūye ku bikebere Abanyegiputa babakebera." 
Exodus6:8 Kandi nzobajana mu gihugu narahiye mmanitse ukuboko ko nemeye kuzogiha Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo; nzokibaha kibe ishamvu yanyu; nd’ Uhoraho. 
Exodus6:9 Mose abibarira Abisirayeli nk’uko nyene; ariko ntibāmwumvira kubg’ ubgihebe bgo mu mitima, no kubg’ ubuja bārimwo bg’agahahazo." 
Exodus6:10 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus6:11 ati Genda kwa Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, umubarire arekure Abisirayeli bave mu gihugu ciwe." 
Exodus6:12 Mose arishura ar’ imbere y’ Uhoraho, ati Rāba, Abisirayeli ntibanyumviye, none Farawo yonyumvira ate, kand’ iminwa yanje ihumanye?" 
Exodus6:13 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni, abatuma ku Bisirayeli no kuri Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, ngo bakūre Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus6:14 Aba ni bo bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza. Bene Reyubeni imfura ya Isirayeli ni Henoki na Palu na Hesironi na Karumi: abo ni bo mazu ya Reyubeni. 
Exodus6:15 Bene Simeyoni ni Yemuweli na Yamini na Ohadi na Yakini na Sohari, bo na Sauli umwana yavyaye ku Munyakananikazi: abo ni bo mazu ya Simeyoni." 
Exodus6:16 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Lewi, nk’ uko bagiye bavyarana: bene Lewi ni Gerushoni na Kohati na Merari; imyaka Lewi yamaze n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’indwi." 
Exodus6:17 Bene Gerushoni ni Libuni na Shimeyi, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Exodus6:18 Bene Kohati ni Amuramu na Isihari na Heburoni na Uziyeli: imyaka Kohati yamaze n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’itatu. 
Exodus6:19 Bene Merari ni Mahili na Mushi; abo ni bo mazu y’Abalewi, nk’uko bagiye bavyarana." 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu arongora Yokebedi inasenge: bavyarana Aroni na Mose; imyaka Amuramu yamaze n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’indwi. 
Exodus6:21 Bene Isihari ni Kora na Nefegi na Zikiri. 
Exodus6:22 Bene Uziyeli ni Mishayeli na Elisafani na Sitiri. 
Exodus6:23 Aroni arongora Elisheba, umukobga wa Aminadabu, mushiki wa Nahashoni; bavyarana Nadabu na Abihu na Eleyazari na Itamari." 
Exodus6:24 Bene Kora ni Asiri na Elikana na Abiyasafu; abo ni bo mazu y’ Abakora. 
Exodus6:25 Eleyazari mwene Aroni arongora umwe mu bakobga ba Putiyeli; bavyarana Finehasi. Abo ni bo bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abalewi, nk’ukw inzu zabo ziri." 
Exodus6:26 Abo ni bo ba bandi Aroni na Mose, Uhoraho yabariye, ati Ni mukūre Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mubakurikiranye mu mice yabo." 
Exodus6:27 Mose na Aroni abo, ni bo bavuganye na Farawo umwami wa Egiputa ivy’ ugukūra Abisirayeli muri Egiputa." 
Exodus6:28 Ku musi Uhoraho yabaririye Mose mu gihugu ca Egiputa," 
Exodus6:29 yaramubariye, ati Nd’ Uhoraho: bgira Farawo umwami wa Egiputa ico nkubarira cose." 
Exodus6:30 Ariko Mose yishura ar’ imbere y’Uhoraho, ati Rāba, iminwa yanje imeze nk’umubiri utākebge: none Farawo yonyumvira ate?" 
Exodus7:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Rāba, nkugize nk’imana kuri Farawo, kandi Aroni mwene nyoko azokuvugira." 
Exodus7:2 Uz’ uvuge ico nkubarira cose, maze Aroni mwene nyoko abibarire Farawo, kugira ngw arekure Abisirayeli bave mu gihugu ciwe." 
Exodus7:3 Ariko nzokomantaza umutima wa Farawo, mpeze ngwize ibimenyetso vyanje n’ibitangaza vyanje mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus7:4 Yamara Farawo ntazobumvira; maze nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje kuri Egiputa, nkūrey’ ingabo zanje, ni bo bantu banje b’Abisirayeli, mbakūze mur’ ico gihugu ca Egiputa ibihano bikomeye." 
Exodus7:5 Igihe nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje kuri Egiputa, ngakūra Abisirayeli muri bo, Abanyegiputa bazomenya ko nd’ Uhoraho." 
Exodus7:6 Nuko Mose na Aroni bagenza bartyo, uk’ Uhoraho yabageze, aba ari ko bakora." 
Exodus7:7 Mose yar’ amaze imyaka mirongumunani, igihe babarira Farawo, Aroni na we yar’ amaze mirongumunani n’itatu." 
Exodus7:8 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Exodus7:9 ati Farawo ni yabaronderakw ikimenyetso kibamenyekanisha, ubgire Aroni, uti Zana iyo nkoni witwaje, uyiterere hasi imbere ya Farawo, kugira ngw ihinduke inzoka." 
Exodus7:10 Nuko Mose na Aroni binjira kwa Farawo, bagira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yababariye: Aroni aterera inkoni yiwe hasi imbere ya Farawo n’abantu biwe, ihinduka inzoka." 
Exodus7:11 Farawo na we ahamagaza abanyabgenge n’abapfumu: abo ni bo banyamarēba bo muri Egiputa, na bo babigira bartyo, babikoresheje amarēba yabo." 
Exodus7:12 Umuntu wese muri bo aterera inkoni yiwe hasi, iba inzoka; maz’ inkoni ya Aroni imira izabo." 
Exodus7:13 Umutima wa Farawo urakomantara, ntiyabumvira, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze." 
Exodus7:14 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Umutima wa Farawo urakomeye, yanse kureka abo bantu ngo bagende." 
Exodus7:15 Mu gatondo uz’ uje iyo Farawo ari; eh’ azoba aja ku ruzi, nawe uz’ uhagarare ku nkombe y’uruzi, umurorēre; kand’ uze witwaze ya nkoni yahinduka inzoka." 
Exodus7:16 Umubarire, ut’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abaheburayo, yakuntumyeko, ngo Reka abantu biwe bagende, bamusabire mu bugaragwa: uti Kandi none gushitsa ubu nturamwumvira." 
Exodus7:17 Ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Iki ni co kizokumenyesha yukw ar’ Uhoraho: ut’ Ehe ngira nkubitishe inkoni nitwaje amazi y’ uruzi, ahinduke amaraso:" 
Exodus7:18 amafi yo mu ruzi apfe, uruzi runuke; Abanyegiputa babihirwe n’amazi yo mu ruzi." 
Exodus7:19 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Bgira Aroni, uti Jana inkoni witwaje, uramvure ukuboko kwawe hejuru y’amazi yo muri Egiputa, ku nzūzi zabo, no ku migende y’amazi yabo, no ku bidengeri vyabo, n’ah’ amazi ateze hose, ahinduke amaraso; kandi mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa haraba amaraso, ari mu māto, canke mu mpange zābājwe mu mabuye." 
Exodus7:20 Nuko Mose na Aroni bagira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yababariye; amanika iyo nkoni, akubitira amazi yo mu ruzi imbere ya Farawo n’ imbere y’abantu biwe; amazi yose yo mu ruzi ahinduka amaraso." 
Exodus7:21 Amafi yo mu ruzi arapfa; uruzi ruranuka, Abanyegiputa ntibashobora kunywa amazi yo mu ruzi; amaraso aba mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Exodus7:22 N’abanyamarēba bo muri Egiputa na bo babigira bartyo babikoresheje amarēba yabo: umutima wa Farawo urakomantara, ntiyumvira Mose na Aroni, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze." 
Exodus7:23 Farawo arahindukira, yīgīra i we, n’ivyo ntiyabibabara." 
Exodus7:24 Abanyegiputa bose bimba hafi y’ uruzi, kugira ngo baronke amazi yo kunywa, kuko batāshobora kunywa amazi yo mu ruzi." 
Exodus7:25 Uhoraho yononye uruzi, hashira imisi ndwi." 
Exodus8:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ja kwa Farawo, umubarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Reka abantu biwe bagende, bamusabe." 
Exodus8:2 Ngo Na ho ni wanka kubarekura, igihugu cawe arakigomorera ibikere iyo kiva kikagera:" 
Exodus8:3 uruzi ruruzura ibikere, bidūge bije mu nzu yawe no haruguru, no ku buriri bgawe, no mu nzu z’abanyarugo bawe no mu z’abantu bawe, no mu dutanure twawe two kwotsamw’ imitsima, no mu mato yawe yo gucumba;" 
Exodus8:4 ibikere bizodūga binyagare kuri wewe no ku bantu bawe no ku banyarugo bawe bose. 
Exodus8:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Barira Aroni, uti Ramvura ukuboko kwawe gufise ya nkoni yawe hejuru y’inzūzi no ku migende y’ amazi no ku bidengeri, udūze ibikere bije mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus8:6 Aroni aramvura ukuboko kwiwe hejuru y’amazi ya Egiputa; ibikere biradūga, bizimanganya igihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus8:7 Na ba banyamarēba babigira bartyo babikoresheje amarēba yabo, badūza ibikere, bija mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus8:8 Farawo aca ahamagaza Mose na Aroni, arababgira, ati Ni munyingingire Uhoraho, ankize ibi bikere, abikūre no mu bantu banje, nanje mpeze ndekure abantu biwe bagende, baje gushikanira Uhoraho ibimazi." 
Exodus8:9 Mose yishura Farawo, ati Pfa kunsigūrira gusa, umbarire igihe nogusabira, mwe n’ abanyarugo bawe n’abantu bawe, kw ibikere vyotikizwa bikakuvako, bikava no mu ngoro zawe, bigasigara mu ruzi honyene." 
Exodus8:10 Aramwishura, ati Hoba ejo. Na we aramubarira, ati Bizoba uk’ uvuze, kugira ng’ umenye yukw ata wuhwanye n’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Exodus8:11 Ibikere bizokuvako, bive no mu ngoro zawe, no ku banyarugo bawe, no ku bantu bawe, bisigare mu ruzi honyene." 
Exodus8:12 Nuko Mose na Aroni barasohoka, bava imbere ya Farawo; Mose atakambira Uhoraho kubg’ ivyo bikere yagomoreye Farawo." 
Exodus8:13 Uhoraho abigira nk’uko Mose yavuze; vya bikere bipfira mu mazu no mu ngo no mu mirima, biraherengetera." 
Exodus8:14 Babirunda ibirundo, igihugu kiranuka." 
Exodus8:15 Maze Farawo abonye ko habaye impore, yikomantaza umutima, ntiyabumvira, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze." 
Exodus8:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Bgira Aroni, uti Manika inkoni yawe, ukubite umukungugu wo hasi, uhinduke imibu mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Exodus8:17 Babigira bartyo; Aroni amanika ukuboko kwiwe gufashe ya nkoni, akubita umukungugu wo hasi, imibu iba ku bantu no ku bitungwa; umukungugu wose wo mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa uhinduka imibu." 
Exodus8:18 Abanyamarēba bakoresha amarēba yabo ngo barekure imibu, ntibabishobora; nukw imibu iba ku bantu no ku bitungwa." 
Exodus8:19 Maz’ abo banyamarēba babarira Farawo, bat’ Ibi bitewe n’ urutoke rw’Imana. Arik’ umutima wa Farawo urakomantara, ntiyumvira Mose na Aroni, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze." 
Exodus8:20 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uz’ uzinduke kwa Farawo mu gaturuturu, uhagarare imbere yiwe; eh’ azoba yīkoze aja ku ruzi; umubarire, ut’ Uhoraho agize ngo Reka abantu biwe bagende, bamusabe." 
Exodus8:21 Na ho n’utabarekura, ngw azogutēza amasinzi y’ibibugu, bibe kuri wewe no ku banyarugo bawe no ku bantu bawe no mu ngoro zawe: amazu y’ Abanyegiputa azokwuzura amasinzi y’ibibugu, bizimanganye no hasi aho bahagaze." 
Exodus8:22 Kur’ uwo musi ngw azorobanura igihugu c’i Gosheni, ah’ abantu biwe baba, ayo masinzi y’ibibugu ngo ntabeyo; kugira ng’umenye yukw ar’ Uhoraho ari hagati mur’ iki gihugu." 
Exodus8:23 Kandi ngw azoshira itandukaniro hagati y’abantu biwe n’abawe: ejo ni h’ico kimenyetso kizobaho. 
Exodus8:24 Uhoraho abigira artyo: amasinzi y’ibibugu aza ar’ icago mu ngoro ya Farawo no mu nzu z’abanyarugo biwe; kand’ igihugu cose ca Egiputa cononekara kubg’ ayo masinzi y’ibibugu. 
Exodus8:25 Farawo ahamagaza Mose na Aroni, ati Ni mugende, mushikanire Imana yanyu ibimazi ngaha mur’ iki gihugu." 
Exodus8:26 Mose aramwishura, ati Ntibibereye ko twokora durtyo, kuko twoba dushikaniye Uhoraho Imana yacu ivyitwa umuziro ku Banyegiputa; mbeg’ ivyo Abanyegiputa bīta umuziro twobishikana babona, ntibotwicisha amabuye?" 
Exodus8:27 Dukwiye kugenda urugendo rw’imisi itatu tuje mu bugaragwa, tubone gushikanira Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’ ukw izotubarira." 
Exodus8:28 Farawo aramwishura, ati Ndabaretse mugende, kugira ngo mushikanire Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibimazi mu bugaragwa: mugabo ntimuje kure cane; kandi munsabire." 
Exodus8:29 Mose aramwishura, at’ Ehe ndagiye; ndasaba Uhoraho, ejo az’ akūre ayo masinzi y’ibibugu kuri wewe, mwe n’abanyarugo bawe n’ abantu bawe. Ariko Nyaguhora ku ngoma, woye kwongera kuduhenda, ngo wanke kurekura abantu ngo bagende bashikanire Uhoraho ibimazi." 
Exodus8:30 Mose arasohoka, ava imbere ya Farawo, atakambira Uhoraho." 
Exodus8:31 Uhoraho abigira nk’ uko Mose yavuze; akūra ayo masinzi y’ibibugu kuri Farawo, no ku banyarugo biwe no ku bantu biwe: ntihasigara na kimwe." 
Exodus8:32 Ariko Farawo asubira kwikomantaza umutima ico gihe na co, ntiyarekura ubgo bgoko ngo bugende." 
Exodus9:1 Uhoraho araheza abgira Mose, ati Ja kwa Farawo, umubarire, ut’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abaheburayo, agize ngo Reka abantu biwe bagende, bamusabe." 
Exodus9:2 Na ho ni wanka kubarekura, ugashishikara kubagumya," 
Exodus9:3 eh’ ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho guhanamiye ivyo utunze bigandagaje ku misozi: ku mafarasi, no ku ndogoba, no ku ngamiya, no ku nka, no ku mikuku: akaryama k’icago kazobitera." 
Exodus9:4 Kand’ Uhoraho azoshirah’ itandukaniro hagati y’amasho y’Abisirayeli n’ay’ Abanyegiputa: mu y’Abisirayeli yose ntihazopfa na kimwe. 
Exodus9:5 Uhoraho ashinga igihe, ati Jewe Uhoraho, ejo ni ho nzokora ivyo mu gihugu." 
Exodus9:6 Bukeye bgaho Uhoraho abikora kuno nyene, ibitungano vyose vy’ Abanyegiputa birapfa: ariko mu vy’Abisirayeli ntihapfa na kimwe." 
Exodus9:7 Farawo atuma kurāba, asanga hatapfuye na kimwe mu bitungano vy’Abisirayeli. Maz’ umutima wa Farawo urakomantara, ntiyarekura ubgo bgoko ngo bugende." 
Exodus9:8 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni, ati Ni mwābīre amashi y’ umunyota wo mw itanure, Mose awutumūrire hejuru imbere ya Farawo." 
Exodus9:9 Urahinduka umukungugu wārāre ku gihugu cose ca Egiputa, uhinduke ibihute bivamw’ ibimungu, bifate abantu n’ibitungano mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Exodus9:10 Bajana wa munyota wo mw itanure, bahagarara imbere ya Farawo, Mose awutumūrira hejuru; uhinduka ibihute bivamw’ ibimungu, bifata abantu n’ibitungano." 
Exodus9:11 Ba banyamarēba ntibashobora guhagarara imbere ya Mose kubg’ ivyo bihute; kuko vyari bifashe abo banyamarēba, bo n’Abanyegiputa bose." 
Exodus9:12 Uhoraho akomantaza umutima wa Farawo, ntiyumvira Mose na Aroni, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabgiye Mose." 
Exodus9:13 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uz’ uzinduke kwa Farawo mu gaturuturu, uhagarare imbere yiwe, umubarire, ut’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abaheburayo, agize ngo Reka abantu biwe bagende, bamusabe." 
Exodus9:14 Ut’ Ubu rero, agira agomore ivyago vyiwe vyose bitere umutima wawe, n’abanyarugo bawe, n’abantu bawe, kugira ng’ umenye yukw ata wuhwanye na we mw isi yose." 
Exodus9:15 Ut’ Ereg’ ubu aba abanguye ukuboko kwiwe, akakurekurirakw ikīza, mwe n’ abantu bawe, ukarandurwa mw isi:" 
Exodus9:16 ut’ Ariko, icatumye aba arakuretse, n’ukugira ngo akwereke ubushobozi bgiwe, kandi ngw izina ryiwe ryāmāmare mw isi yose." 
Exodus9:17 Uti Mbega n’ubu uracatangīra abantu biwe, ukanka kubarekura?" 
Exodus9:18 Uti Rāba, ejo nka bugingo ubu azosegenyura urubura rw’icago, rutigeze kuboneka muri Egiputa, uhereye igihe hitiwe izina, ukageza n’ubu." 
Exodus9:19 Enda none tuma gucūza inka zawe n’ibitungwa n’ivyo ufise vyose biri ku gahinga, kuk’ urubura ruzonyukura umuntu wese cank’ igitunzwe cose bizosangwa ku gahinga bitugamye, bizopfa." 
Exodus9:20 Nuk’ ūtinye ijambo ry’Uhoraho wo mu basavyi ba Farawo ahungishiriza abantu biwe n’ ivyo atunze mu mazu; 
Exodus9:21 arik’ ūneneje kw ijambo ry’Uhoraho arekera abantu biwe n’ivyo atunze ku gahinga. 
Exodus9:22 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Tunga ukuboko kwawe mw ijuru, urubura rugwe mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, ku bantu no ku bitunzwe no ku cameze cose co ku misozi, mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Exodus9:23 Mose atunga inkoni yiwe mw ijuru: Uhoraho arekura inkuba n’urubura, umuriro utibukira kw isi: Uhoraho asegenyurira urubura ku gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus9:24 Nuko hagwa urubura rurabagizamw’ umuriro, rw’icago rutigeze kuboneka mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, uhereye igihe hatanguriye kuba ihanga." 
Exodus9:25 Mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, urwo rubura rwica icari ku gahinga cose, ar’ umuntu, ar’ igitunzwe, ar’ igikōko; kandi rwica n’icameze cose co ku gahinga, ruvuna n’ibiti vyose." 
Exodus9:26 Mu gihugu c’i Gosheni honyene ni ho rutāgūye, ah’ Abisirayeli baba." 
Exodus9:27 Farawo atuma guhamagaza Mose na Aroni, arababgira, at’ Ubu ho nkoze icaha: Uhoraho aratsinze, twe n’abantu banje turatsinzwe." 
Exodus9:28 Munyingingire Uhoraho, kukw iyi mituragaro iteye ubgoba n’uru rubura bimpotoye; nanje ndabarekura, mugende, ntimuzokwongera kugumizwa ino." 
Exodus9:29 Mose aramwishura, ati Ni namara kuva mu gisagara, ndayira amaboko Uhoraho, imituragaro ishire, n’urubura ntirwongere kugwa: kugira ng’umenye yukw isi ar’iy’ Uhoraho." 
Exodus9:30 Mugabo nzi yuko wewe n’abantu bawe mutarubaha Uhoraho Imana. 
Exodus9:31 (Kandi hāpfuye ivyitwa pishita na sayiri; kuko sayiri zar’ umuyange, na pishita zari zishuritse." 
Exodus9:32 Arikw ingano na kusemeti ntivyapfuye, kuko vyari bikir’ ikinyovu.)" 
Exodus9:33 Nuko Mose ava imbere ya Farawo, asokoroka mu gisagara, yayira amaboko Uhoraho, ya mituragaro n’urubura birashira, imvura ntiyongera kugwa kw isi." 
Exodus9:34 Maze Farawo abonye imvura n’ urubura n’imituragaro ko bishize, arushiriza gukora icaha, yikomantaza umutima, bo n’abantu biwe." 
Exodus9:35 Umutima wa Farawo urakomantara, ntiyarekura Abisirayeli ngo bagende, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavugishije Mose." 
Exodus10:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ja kwa Farawo; kuko nkomantaje umutima wiwe, n’iy’ abantu biwe, kugira ngo nerekanire ibi bimenyetso vyanje hagati muri bo," 
Exodus10:2 no kugira ngo nawe uz’ udondere umwana wawe n’umwuzukuru wawe ukuntu namāramāje Abanyegiputa, n’ibimenyetso vyanje nakoreye hagati muri bo; mumenye yuko nd’ Uhoraho." 
Exodus10:3 Mose na Aroni baja kwa Farawo, baramubgira, bat’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abaheburayo, agize, ng’ Uzogeza ryari kwanka kwicisha bugufi imbere yiwe? Ngo Reka abantu biwe, bagende bamusabe." 
Exodus10:4 Ngo Na ho ni wanka kubarekura, ejo ngw azorekura inzige, zihēre ku rubibe rwawe," 
Exodus10:5 zizimanganye igihugu, umuntu ntashobore kubona hasi: zizorya ivyasigaye vyakize, ivyo rwa rubura rwabasigarije, zirye n’igiti canyu cose cameze ku gahinga." 
Exodus10:6 Zizokwuzura ingoro zawe, n’inzu z’abanyarugo bawe bose, n’iz’ Abanyegiputa bose: izo ba so na ba sogokuru batigeze kubona, uhereye igihe babereyeho, ukageza n’ubu. Nuko Mose arahindukira, ava imbere ya Farawo." 
Exodus10:7 Maz’ abantu ba Farawo baramubaza, bati Mbeg’ uriya azogeza ryari kutubera icago? Reka abo bantu bagende, baje gusaba Uhoraho Imana yabo: aho nturabona ko Egiputa hapfuye?" 
Exodus10:8 Bagarura Mose na Aroni kuri Farawo; arababgira, ati Ni mugende, muje gusaba Uhoraho Imana yanyu: arikw abazogenda n’abaki n’abaki?" 
Exodus10:9 Mose aramwishura, ati Tuzojana n’abana n’abatāma, n’abahungu bacu n’ abakobga, mbere n’imikuku yacu n’amasho tuzobijana: kuko dukwiye kugirira Uhoraho umusi mukuru." 
Exodus10:10 Arabishura, ati Yemwe ga ye, Uhoraho abane namwe nkabarekura, ngo mujane n’abana banyu! Ni mwiyubare, kukw ivyo mugabiye ari bibi!" 
Exodus10:11 Ivyo ntibishoboka; mwebge abagabo ni mugende, muje gusaba Uhoraho, kukw ar’ ico murondera! Babirukana imbere ya Farawo." 
Exodus10:12 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ramvura ukuboko kwawe hejuru y’igihugu ca Egiputa, haze inzige, zize mu gihugu ca Egiputa, zirye icameze cose mu gihugu, mber’ ivyo rwa rubura rwasize vyose." 
Exodus10:13 Mose atunga ya nkoni yiwe hejuru y’igihugu ca Egiputa, Uhoraho azana umuyaga mur’ ico gihugu uvuye i burasirazuba, wiriza umusi ukesha ijoro; bukeye, uwo muyaga uvuye i burasirazuba uzana inzige." 
Exodus10:14 Zirasenyuka ziza mu gihugu ca Egiputa hose, zigwa mu gihugu iyo kiva kikagera; zar’ icago gikomeye cane: uhereye kera hose ntihigeze kubah’ inzige nk’izo, kandi ntihazokwongera kuboneka izingana na zo." 
Exodus10:15 Zizimanganya igihugu cose, bituma igihugu gicura umwiza; zirya icameze cose mu gihugu, n’ivyamye ku biti vyose, ivyo rwa rubura rwashigaje: mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa ntihasigara ikintu na kimwe gitotahaye, naho coba igiti cank’ ikindi cose cameze ku gahinga." 
Exodus10:16 Farawo ni kwo guhamagaza Mose na Aroni vuba; arababarira, ati Nacumuye k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu no kuri mwebge." 
Exodus10:17 None rero ndakwinginze, icaha canje ukimparire iri rimwe gusa, munyingingire Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ankūrek’ uru rupfu iri rimwe gusa." 
Exodus10:18 Nuko Mose arasohoka, ava imbere ya Farawo, atakambira Uhoraho." 
Exodus10:19 Uhoraho ahindura umuyaga uva i burengerazuba, w’igihuhuta gikomeye cane, utwara za nzige, uzisuka mu Kiyaga Gitukura: ntihasigara na rumwe mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa." 
Exodus10:20 Yamar’ Uhoraho akomantaza umutima wa Farawo, ntiyarekura Abisirayeli ngo bagende." 
Exodus10:21 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Tunga ukuboko kwawe mw ijuru, umwiza ucure mu gihugu ca Egiputa, umwiza umeze nk’ikintu cokabakabga." 
Exodus10:22 Mose atunga ukuboko mw ijuru, umwiza w’ umuzitanya ucura mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, umara gatatu;" 
Exodus10:23 ntihāgira ūbona uwundi, canke ngo hagire ūhaguruka ngw ave ah’ ari, bimara gatatu: ariko mu mazu y’ Abisirayeli bose ho hārabona." 
Exodus10:24 Farawo ahamagaza Mose, aramubarira, ati Nuko ni mugende, muje gusaba Uhoraho; n’abana banyu na bo mubajane: mugabo imikuku yanyu n’amasho yanyu vyo bisigare." 
Exodus10:25 Mose aramwishura, at’ Ukwiye no kutwemerera ivyo tuzokūramw’ ibimazi vyo gushikana n’ivyo kwosa, ngo tubone guha Uhoraho Imana yacu ibimazi." 
Exodus10:26 Itunga ryacu rikwiye kujana natwe: ntihazosigara n’ urwara; kukw ari ryo dukwiye kuzokwābirakw ivyo guhēreza Uhoraho Imana yacu. Kandi ntituzi ivyo tuzohēreza Uhoraho uko bingana tutarashikayo. 
Exodus10:27 Arik’ Uhoraho akomantaza umutima wa Farawo, ntiyemera kubarekura ngo bagende." 
Exodus10:28 Farawo abarira Mose, ati Mva i ruhande! Uzire akaziri, ntuze wongere kungaruka mu maso, kuk’ umusi uzosubira kungaruka mu maso uzopfa!" 
Exodus10:29 Mose aramwishura, at’ Uvuze ko: sinzosubira kukugaruka mu maso ukundi." 
Exodus11:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Hasigaye icago kimwe nzorekurira kuri Farawo no ku Banyegiputa: hanyuma azobarekura mugende. Kand’ igihe azobarekura, mber’ azonabirukana." 
Exodus11:2 None rero barira abantu, umugabo wese asabe umubanyi wiwe, n’umugore wese asabe umubanyi wiwe, babasabe utugenegene tw’ ifeza n’utw’ izahabu." 
Exodus11:3 Uhoraho aha ubgo bgoko kurābga neza n’Abanyegiputa. Bitayeko uwo mugabo Mose na we yar’ umuntu ahambaye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu maso y’abanyarugo ba Farawo, no mu maso y’abandi bantu." 
Exodus11:4 Mose aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Nko mu gicugu azonyuranganya hose muri Egiputa:" 
Exodus11:5 abana b’imfura bose bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa bapfe, uhereye ku mfura ya Farawo nyen’ ingoma, ukageza ku mfura y’umuguranokazi w’umusyi; kandi n’ivy’ uburiza vyose vy’ ibitunzwe bizopfa." 
Exodus11:6 Hazocura umuborogo mwinshi mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, utigeze kubaho, kandi ntihazokwongera kuba ūngana nk’uwo." 
Exodus11:7 Ariko mu Bisirayeli nta n’umwe azogira ico aba, ar’ umuntu cank’ igitungano, haba n’uwo imbga izogwangwarira: kugira ngo mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho yashizeh’ itandukaniro hagati y’ Abanyegiputa n’Abisirayeli." 
Exodus11:8 Kand’ aba banyarugo bawe bose bazomanuka baze iyo ndi, bankomere ibōbo, bati N’ugende, mwe n’abantu bose bagukondoreye inyuma. Aho ni ho nzoca ngenda. Nuko Mose arasohoka ava imbere ya Farawo, aratse cane." 
Exodus11:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Farawo ntazobumvira; kand’ ivyo bizotuma ibitangaza vyanje bigwira mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus11:10 Kandi Mose na Aroni bakoreye ivyo bitangaza vyose imbere ya Farawo: arik’ Uhoraho akomantaza umutima wa Farawo, ntiyarekura Abisirayeli ngo bagende, bave mu gihugu ciwe." 
Exodus12:1 Uhoraho abaririra Mose na Aroni mu gihugu ca Egiputa," 
Exodus12:2 at’ Uku kwezi kuzobabera imfura y’amezi: kuzobabera ukwezi kwa mbere mu mwaka. 
Exodus12:3 Ni mubarire ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, ku musi ugira icumi w’ uku kwezi, umuntu wese yiyabīrire umwagazi w’intama, ukw amazu ya ba se angana, umwagazi umwe‐umwe mu nzu yose." 
Exodus12:4 Kand’ iyo nzu ni yaba irimw’ inkehwa, batomara uwo mwagazi, uwo muntu afatanye n’umubanyi wiwe bahereranye, bawusangire, ukw igitigiri c’abantu kiri; ukw igisa c’umuntu wese kiri, abe ari ko muzoharūra igitigiri c’abakwiye kuwusangira." 
Exodus12:5 Umwagazi wanyu uz’ ube ūtagira agasembga, w’isuguru itarengeje umwaka: muze muwukūre mu ntama canke mu mpene." 
Exodus12:6 Muze muwurorereze umusi ugira icumi na kane w’uku kwezi nyene; ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli baze bakerere imyagazi yabo ku mugoroba. 
Exodus12:7 Baheze bābīre ku maraso, bayasīge ku bishimaryango vyompi no hejuru y’umuryango w’inzu yose bawuririyemwo." 
Exodus12:8 Barye inyama zawo mur’ iryo joro nyene, zitaze, bazikoze imitsima itambiwe n’imboga zirura."
