Exodus12:9 Ntimuze muzirye mbisi, canke zitetse, shiti zitaze; hamwe n’umutwe wawo n’ibinōno n’ivyo mu nda." 
Exodus12:10 Ntimuze mugire ico musiga ngo kirāre: hagize ikirāye mugiturire. 
Exodus12:11 Uku abe ari ko muzozirya: muze muzirye mukenyeye, mwambaye inkweto, mufashe inkoni mu minwe; muze muzirye vuba na vuba: iyo ni yo Pasika yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus12:12 Kuko mur’ iryo joro nyene nzoca mu gihugu ca Egiputa, nkica abana bose b’ imfura bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, uhereye ku muntu no ku gitunzwe; kand’ imana z’Abanyegiputa zose, amatēka nziciriyeko zose nzoyashitsa: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Exodus12:13 Ayo maraso azobabera ikimenyetso ku mazu murimwo: nanje aho nzobona ayo maraso, nzobarengana, nta cago kizobazako ngo kibarandure, igihe nzotera igihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus12:14 Kand’ uwo musi uz’ ubabere umusi w’icibutso, muze muwugire umusi mukuru wanje Uhoraho: ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, muze mwame muwugira mukuru, kibe icagezwe c’intahava." 
Exodus12:15 Muze mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe; ku musi w’intangamarāra muze mukūre umwambiro n’icambiwe cose mu mazu yanyu; kuk’ umuntu azorya ku mutsima wambiwe, uhereye ku musi w’ intangamarāra ugashitsa ku musi ugira indwi, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu Bisirayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Kandi ku musi w’intangamarāra mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera, no ku musi ugira indwi haze habe irindi nyene; ntihaze hagire igikorwa na kimwe gikorwa kur’ uwo musi, atar’ igikorwa c’inda gusa, ico conyene kize kibe ari co mukora." 
Exodus12:17 Uwo musi w’imitsima itambiwe muze mwame muwugira mukuru, kuko kur’ uwo musi nyene ari ho nzoba narabakūriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa mur’ amasinzi y’ingabo: ni co gituma uwo musi mukwiye kwama muwugira mukuru ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, kibe icagezwe c’intahava." 
Exodus12:18 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi na kane, ku mugoroba, abe ari ho mutangura kurya imitsima itambiwe, gushitsa ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri na rimwe ku mugoroba nyene." 
Exodus12:19 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi ntihaze haboneke umwambiro mu mazu yanyu: umuntu azorya icambiwe, aracibga mw ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli, naho yoba umunyamahanga cank’ uw’ imvukira yo mu gihugu canyu." 
Exodus12:20 Ntimuze mugire icambiwe na kimwe murya: muze murye imitsima itambiwe mu ngo zanyu zose. 
Exodus12:21 Nuko Mose ahamagaza abakuru bose bo mu Bisirayeli, arababarira, ati Ni mwirobanurire imyagazi, ukw amazu yanyu angana, muyibāgire Pasika." 
Exodus12:22 Mwiyabīrire agakama ka ezobu, mukajōbeke mu maraso ari mu rwavya, mumijagire ayo maraso hejuru y’umuryango no ku bishimaryango vyompi, ntihaze hagire umuntu n’umwe muri mwebge asohoka mu nzu yiwe gushitsa mu gitondo." 
Exodus12:23 Kuk’ Uhoraho azohaca, azanywe no kwica Abanyegiputa: kand’ ah’ azobona ayo maraso hejuru y’umuryango no ku bishimaryango vyompi, Uhoraho azorengana iyo nzu, ntazokundira umuranduzi kwinjira mu nzu zanyu ngw abice." 
Exodus12:24 Kand’ ivyo, muze mwame muvyitondera bibe icagezwe c’intahava kuri mwebge no ku bana banyu." 
Exodus12:25 Kandi ni mwamara gushika mu gihugu Uhoraho azobaha, nk’uko yasezeranye, muze mwame mwitondera uwo muhango." 
Exodus12:26 Kand’ ukw abana banyu bazobabaza, bat’ Uyu muhango wanyu n’uw’ iki?" 
Exodus12:27 muze mubishure, mut’ Iki ni co kimazi citwa Pasika y’Uhoraho, kuko yarenganye amazu yacu Abisirayeli, turi muri Egiputa, akayaziguriza, igihe yica Abanyegiputa. Abantu barunama, barasenga." 
Exodus12:28 Abisirayeli baragenda, bakora nk’uko nyene; uk’ Uhoraho yageze Mose na Aroni, aba ari ko bakora." 
Exodus12:29 Nuko mu gicugu Uhoraho yica abana bose b’imfura bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, uhereye ku mfura ya Farawo nyen’ ingoma, ukageza ku mfura y’imbohe ipfungiwe mw ibohero, n’ivy’ uburiza vyose vy’ibitunzwe." 
Exodus12:30 Mur’ iryo joro Farawo ararandamuka, n’ abanyarugo biwe bose, n’Abanyegiputa bose: muri Egiputa hacura umuborogo mwinshi, kukw ata nzu n’imwe itapfuyemw’ umuntu." 
Exodus12:31 Ahamagaza Mose na Aroni mur’ iryo joro nyene, arababarira, ati Ni mukūre hasi, mujonjore, muve mu bantu banje, mwe n’Abisirayeli; mugende, muje gusaba Uhoraho, nk’uko mwavuze." 
Exodus12:32 Mujane n’ imikuku yanyu n’amasho yanyu, nk’uko mwavuze, mwīgīre; nanje munsabire umugisha." 
Exodus12:33 Abanyegiputa bahīhīta ubgo bgoko, ngo babavire mu gihugu vuba; kuko bāvuga, bati Turapfuye twese." 
Exodus12:34 Abo bantu bajana amarobe yabo atarajamw’ umwambiro, atarotswa, utwato twabo bacumbamwo bari baduhambiriye mu mpuzu zabo batwikoreye ku bitugu." 
Exodus12:35 Abisirayeli bakora nk’uko Mose yavuze; basaba Abanyegiputa utugenegene tw’ifeza n’utw’ izahabu n’imyambaro: 
Exodus12:36 Uhoraho aha abo bantu kurābga neza n’Abanyegiputa, babaha ivyo babasavye: uko ni ko bīnyagiye Abanyegiputa." 
Exodus12:37 Abisirayeli baragenda, bava i Ramesesi, bataha i Sukoti: abāgiye n’amaguru bār’ abagabo ibihumbi amajana atandatu, ukūyemw’ abana." 
Exodus12:38 Kandi n’igugu ry’ikivange c’abanyamahanga rijana na bo, n’imikuku n’amasho vy’ibitayega." 
Exodus12:39 Ya mitsima bākūye muri Egiputa ikir’ ivyanga, barayihīsha, bayigira imitsima itambiwe, kukw ata mwambiro baribgayishiremwo: kuko birukanywe muri Egiputa ntibashobore gutebagana, ata n’agahamba baribgironderere." 
Exodus12:40 Imyaka Abisirayeli bamaze muri Egiputa n’amajana ane na mirongwitatu. 
Exodus12:41 Iyo myaka ukw ar’ amajana ane na mirongwitatu ishize, kur’ uwo musi nyene, amasinzi yose y’ ingabo z’Uhoraho ava mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus12:42 Iryo joro n’iryo kurārako maso, kwibuka uk’ Uhoraho yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: iryo ni rya joro ry’ Uhoraho, Abisirayeli bose bakwiye kwama barirārako maso, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus12:43 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni, at’ Iri ni ryo bgirizwa ryo kuri Pasika: ntihaze hagire umunyamahanga arya ku vyayo;" 
Exodus12:44 arik’ umugurano w’umuntu wese yaguzwe amahera, ni yamara kumukeba, abone kubiryako." 
Exodus12:45 Inyambukīra cank’ umucangero ntibaze babiryeko. 
Exodus12:46 Bize birīrwe aho biri mu nzu nyene; ntimuze musohokane n’agashītwa k’izo nyama, kandi ntimuze muvune n’igufa na rimwe ryayo." 
Exodus12:47 Ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli ryose baze bame bagira bartyo. 
Exodus12:48 Kand’ umunyamahanga ni yaza kuba muri mwebge, akagomba kuja mu vya Pasika yanje, jewe Uhoraho, izinamuhungu wese wo mu nzu yiwe akebge, aheze abone kwegera ivya Pasika, abijemwo; maz’ azoca amera nk’imvukira: ariko ntihaze hagire umuntu n’ umwe atākebge abiryako." 
Exodus12:49 Icagezwe ni kimwe ku mvukira no ku munyamahanga yaje kuba muri mwebge. 
Exodus12:50 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bose bākoze; uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose na Aroni ni ko bākoze. 
Exodus12:51 Nuko kur’ uwo musi nyene, Uhoraho akūra Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ukw imitwe y’ingabo zabo yangana." 
Exodus13:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus13:2 ati Mundobanurire imfura zose n’ivy’ uburiza: ic’ ubuzibūra cose co mu Bisirayeli n’icanje, ari mu bantu, ari mu bitunzwe." 
Exodus13:3 Mose abarira abantu, ati Muze mwame mwibuka uyu musi muviriye muri Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja; kuk’ Uhoraho abakūje ino ubushobozi bginshi. Ntihaze hagire imitsima yambiwe murya." 
Exodus13:4 Uyu musi muviriyeyo n’uwo mu kwezi kwa Abibu. 
Exodus13:5 Nuko rer’ Uhoraho ni yamara kubashikana mu gihugu c’Abanyakanani n’Abaheti n’Abamori n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi, ico yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, muze mwame mwitondera uyo muhango mur’ uku kwezi, iyo gutashe hose." 
Exodus13:6 Muze mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe, maz’ umusi ugira indwi uz’ ube umusi mukuru w’Uhoraho." 
Exodus13:7 Imitsima itambiwe iz’ ibe ari yo iribga mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi. Ntihaze hagire imitsima yambiwe ibabonekamwo, cank’ umwambiro, mu gihugu canyu cose." 
Exodus13:8 Kandi kur’ uwo musi umuntu wese az’ abarire umwana wiwe, at’ Ibi mbikorera kwibuka ivyo Uhoraho yadukoreye, igihe twava muri Egiputa." 
Exodus13:9 Ivyo bize bibabere nk’ikimenyetso gishizwe ku maboko yanyu, n’icibutso gishizwe hagati y’amaso yanyu, kugira ngw ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho vyame mu kanwa kanyu: kuk’ Uhoraho yabakūje muri Egiputa ubushobozi bgiwe." 
Exodus13:10 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwama mwitondera iryo bgirizwa mu gihe caryo, uk’ umwaka utashe." 
Exodus13:11 Kand’ Uhoraho ni yamara kubashikana mu gihugu c’Abanyakanani, nk’uko yabarahiye mwe na ba sogokuruza kw azokibaha," 
Exodus13:12 muze musobanurire Uhoraho icitwa ubuzibūra cose, n’ic’ uburiza co mu vyo mutunze: ubuzibūra bg’icitwa ikigabo cose buzoba ubg’Uhoraho." 
Exodus13:13 Kand’ icana c’indogoba cose c’uburiza muze mugicunguze umwagazi w’intama; na ho ni mutāgomba kuyicungura, muze muyivune izosi; kand’ imfura yose y’umuhungu yo mu bana banyu muze muyicungure." 
Exodus13:14 Kandi mu bana banyu ni hagira ūbaza se, mu gihe kizoza, at’ Ibi n’ibiki? az’ amwishure, at’ Uhoraho yadukūye muri Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja, adukūjeyo ubushobozi bginshi." 
Exodus13:15 Igihe Farawo yari yanse kugondwa ngw aturekure, Uhoraho yishe icitwa uburiza cose co mu gihugu ca Egiputa, imfura z’abantu n’uburiza bg’ ibitunzwe: ni co gituma ic’ ubuzibūra cose c’ikigabo tugitangakw ikimazi k’Uhoraho; arikw imfura zacu zose z’abahungu turazicungura." 
Exodus13:16 Ivyo bize bibe nk’ ikimenyetso gishizwe ku maboko yanyu, kandi nk’ibishizwe mu ruhanga hagati y’amaso yanyu: kuk’ Uhoraho yadukūje muri Egiputa ubushobozi bginshi." 
Exodus13:17 Nuko rero, Farawo amaze kurekura abo bantu, Imana ntiyabacisha mu nzira ica mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya, nah’ ari yo yar’ irashe; kukw Imana yivuganije, it’ Abantu boye kuzohava bīcuza babonye intambara, bagasubira muri Egiputa." 
Exodus13:18 Arikw ibajana izinguzingu, ibacishije mu nzira ica mu bugaragwa, ahabangikanye n’Ikiyaga Gitukura; nukw Abisirayeli bādūze bītwaje ibirwanishwa bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus13:19 Kandi Mose ajanisha amagufa ya Yosefu, kuko Yosefu yari yararahije bene Isirayeli bikomeye, at’ Imana ntizobura kubagendera, namwe muze mukūre amagufa yanje ino, muyadūgane." 
Exodus13:20 Bava i Sukoti, bashika basagaza i Etamu, ah’ubugaragwa butangurira." 
Exodus13:21 Uhoraho ku murango yabaja imbere ari mu nkingi y’igicu, ngw abarōngōre mu nzira; mw ijoro yabaja imbere ari mu nkingi y’umuriro, ngw ababoneshereze, kugira ngo babone uko bagenda ku murango no mw ijoro." 
Exodus13:22 Ya nkingi y’igicu ntiyava imbere y’ubgo bgoko ku murango, n’iyo nyene y’umuriro ntiyabava imbere mw ijoro." 
Exodus14:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus14:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli bakebanuke, basagaze imbere y’i Pi‐hahiroti, hagati y’i Migidoli n’ikiyaga, aharābana n’i Bayali‐sefoni: aharābana n’aho hantu abe ari ho musagaza, i ruhande y’ikiyaga." 
Exodus14:3 Farawo ahava yiyumvira ku Bisirayeli, ngw igihugu baciyemwo bāhuvye: ubugaragwa bubataye mu mbombane." 
Exodus14:4 Maz’ umutima wa Farawo ngira ndawukomantaze, abakurikire; nanje nzokwiheshereza icubahiro kuri Farawo no ku ngabo ziwe zose, kand’ Abanyegiputa bazomenya ko nd’ Uhoraho. Nukw Abisirayeli babigenza bartyo." 
Exodus14:5 Maz’ umwami wa Egiputa bamubarira yukw abo bantu bacitse. Farawo n’abamenyekana biwe baragarwa kubg’ abo bantu, barabazanya, bati Mbega twakoze ibiki, kurekura Abisirayeli ngo bagende, ntibabe bakidukorera?" 
Exodus14:6 Azirikisha umukogote wiwe ku mafarasi, ajana n’ingabo ziwe;" 
Exodus14:7 ajana n’imikogote amajana atandatu y’indobanurwa, n’iyindi mikogote yose yo muri Egiputa, n’ abagabisha bagaba abagendera muri yo baja mu ntambara." 
Exodus14:8 Nuk’ Uhoraho akomantaza umutima wa Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, akurikira Abisirayeli: kand’ abo Bisirayeli bāri bavuyeyo babakobagurije." 
Exodus14:9 Nukw Abanyegiputa barabakurikira, bari n’amafarasi n’ imikogote vyose vya Farawo, n’ abagendera ku mafarasi, n’izindi ngabo ziwe, babahambiriza aho bashagaje hafi y’ikiyaga, i ruhande y’i Pi‐hahiroti, aharābana n’i Bayali‐sefoni." 
Exodus14:10 Farawo abegereje, Abisirayeli bunamura amaso, babona Abanyegiputa babōmye inyuma, baranduka imitima; maze batakambira Uhoraho." 
Exodus14:11 Babaza Mose, bati Mbega nta mva zari muri Egiputa, mu kutuzana gupfira mu bugaragwa? N’iki catumye utugirira urtyo, kudukūra muri Egiputa?" 
Exodus14:12 Iki si co twakubgira tukiri muri Egiputa, tuti Tureke, dukorere Abanyegiputa? Kukw iciza, kwar’ uko dukorera Abanyegiputa, hāko dupfira mu bugaragwa." 
Exodus14:13 Mose yishura abantu, ati Nta co mutinya: mwihagararire gusa, murābe agakiza Uhoraho agira ngw abazanire uyu musi: kukw Abanyegiputa mubonye uyu musi mutazokwongera kubabona ukundi." 
Exodus14:14 Uhoraho ni we agira ngw abarwanire, namwe ni mwinumire gusa." 
Exodus14:15 Uhoraho abaza Mose, ati N’iki gitumye untakira? Barira Abisirayeli bakomeze bagende." 
Exodus14:16 Nawe umanike inkoni yawe, uramvure ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga, ugitandukanye: Abisirayeli bace hagati mu kiyaga nko ku musozi." 
Exodus14:17 Nanje rāba, ndakomantaza imitima y’Abanyegiputa, na bo bahace, babakurikire; maze mbone kwihesha icubahiro kuri Farawo no ku ngabo ziwe zose, no ku mikogote yiwe, no ku bagendera ku mafarasi biwe." 
Exodus14:18 Abanyegiputa ni ho bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho, ni namara kwihesha icubahiro kuri Farawo no ku mikogote yiwe, no ku bagendera ku mafarasi biwe." 
Exodus14:19 Maz’ umumarayika w’Imana yahora abagenda imbere, avayo, agaruka inyuma yabo; ya nkingi y’igicu iva imbere yabo, iraza ihagarara inyuma yabo," 
Exodus14:20 ija hagati y’ingabo z’Abanyegiputa n’iz’ Abisirayeli; ku ruhande rwa bamwe hubikiza igicu, hacura umwiza, ku ruhande rw’abandi haba umuco wo kubonesha mw ijoro: ntibāruha bēgerana iryo joro ryose." 
Exodus14:21 Nuko Mose aramvura ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga; Uhoraho ahuhutisha umuyaga mwinshi uvuye i burasirazuba, ukēsha ijoro ryose, usubiza ikiyaga inyuma, amazi ayagabanyamwo kubiri, ahindura ikiyaga ahūmūtse." 
Exodus14:22 Maz’ Abisirayeli baca hagati mu kiyaga nk’abaca ku musozi; amazi ababera nk’umurombero i buryo n’i bumoso. 
Exodus14:23 Abanyegiputa na bo babakurikira hagati mu kiyaga babōmye inyuma, n’amafarasi ya Farawo yose, n’imikogote yiwe, n’abagendera ku mafarasi biwe." 
Exodus14:24 Nuko mu gicugu ca nyuma Uhoraho acishiriza ari mu nkingi y’umuriro n’igicu, arunguruka ingabo z’Abanyegiputa, azica ivutu." 
Exodus14:25 Atuma amagurudumu y’ imikogote yabo afata, ntiyaba igikwegeka neza. Maz’ Abanyegiputa baravugana, bat’ Enda duhunge, tureke Abisirayeli, kuk’ Uhoraho abatabara, ari we aturwanya." 
Exodus14:26 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ramvura ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga, amazi ateranire ku Banyegiputa no ku mikogote yabo no ku bagendera ku mafarasi bo muri bo." 
Exodus14:27 Nuko Mose aramvura ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga; umutwenzi utambitse, ikiyaga gisubira muri nyina; maz’ Abanyegiputa bagize ngo barahunga, Uhoraho abacurikiraniriza hagati mu kiyaga." 
Exodus14:28 Nukw amazi asubirayo, arengera imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi, mbere n’ingabo za Farawo zose zāri zigiye mu kiyaga zikurikiye Abisirayeli; ntihārokoka n’umwe muri bo." 
Exodus14:29 Arikw Abisirayeli bāciye hagati mu kiyaga nk’abaca ku musozi, amazi ababera nk’umurombero i buryo n’i bumoso." 
Exodus14:30 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yakijije Abisirayeli kur’ uwo musi, abakūra mu maboko y’Abanyegiputa. Maz’ Abisirayeli bībonera imivyimba y’Abanyegiputa irambaraye kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga." 
Exodus14:31 Nukw Abisirayeli babona ibihambaye Uhoraho yakoreye Abanyegiputa: baca batinya Uhoraho, baramwizera, bo n’umusavyi wiwe Mose." 
Exodus15:1 Maze Mose n’Abisirayeli baririmbira Uhoraho iyi ndirimbo, bati Ndaririmbira Uhoraho, kukw ari n’intsinzi y’agahebūza. Ifarasi n’ūyigenderako yabinuze mu kiyaga." 
Exodus15:2 Uhoraho n’inkomezi zanje n’indirimbo yanje, Ampindukiye agakiza. Uwo ni we Mana yanje, nanje ndamuhimbaza; Ni yo Mana ya data, nanje ndayishira hejuru." 
Exodus15:3 Uhoraho n’intōre mu ntambara, Uhoraho ni ryo zina ryiwe." 
Exodus15:4 Imikogote ya Farawo n’ingabo ziwe yabinuze mu kiyaga, Abagabisha biwe b’intorwa badobeye mu Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Exodus15:5 Amazi yo mw idamba arabarengeye, Barokeye i bgina nk’ibuye." 
Exodus15:6 Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo, ewe Uhoraho w’icubahiro kivuye mu bubasha, m Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo, ewe Uhoraho, kujanjaguye abamenja." 
Exodus15:7 Ubugabe bgawe buhambaye bgatumye utūra hasi abakwināntājeko. Warekuye uburake bgawe, bubatōngōra nk’ibishingwe." 
Exodus15:8 Gufuha kwo mu mazuru yawe kwarundanije amazi, Imipfunda yema nk’ikirundo; I bgina muri nyina w’ikiyaga haravura." 
Exodus15:9 Umubisha yaravuze, Ati Ndabakurikira, ndabashikīre, ngabanganye iminyago, Ndabīmarekw ishavu; Nsokōre inkota, mbaranduze ukuboko kwanje!" 
Exodus15:10 Wahuhutishije umuyaga wawe, ikiyaga kirabarengera: Badobera nk’icuma c’isāsu mu mazi ahambaye." 
Exodus15:11 Uhoraho, mu vyitwa imana n’iyihe ihwanye nawe? N’iyihe ihwanye nawe, wewe w’icubahiro kivuye mu kwera, Wewe uteye ubgoba kubg’ ibihambaye ukora, wewe ukora ibitangaza?" 
Exodus15:12 Waramvuye ukuboko kw’i buryo, Isi irabamira." 
Exodus15:13 Kubg’ imbabazi zawe warōngōye abantu wacunguye: Wabarōngōje inkomezi zawe mu nzira ija ahantu hēra, ah’ uba." 
Exodus15:14 Amahanga yaravyumvise, ahinda agashitsi; Ab’i Bufilisitiya, ubgoba bubafata nk’ibise." 
Exodus15:15 Ico gihe abakuru b’imiryango yo muri Edomu barumirwa; Intōre z’i Mowabu zija mu gatengo; Ab’i Kanani bose bagwa igihumura. 
Exodus15:16 Ubgoba no gutinya bizobafata, Ububasha bg’ukuboko kwawe butumye bazojunja nk’ibuye, Gushitsa ah’abantu bawe bazorenganira, ewe Uhoraho, Gushitsa ah’abantu wiguriye bazorenganira." 
Exodus15:17 Uzobashikanayo, ubashimangire ku musozi w’ishamvu yawe, Ahantu witunganirije ngo habe i wawe, ewe Uhoraho, Ahēra hāshizweho n’amaboko yawe, Mwami." 
Exodus15:18 Uhoraho azokwama ahangamye ibihe bitazoshira. 
Exodus15:19 Kuko hamwe amafarasi ya Farawo, n’imikogote yiwe, n’ abagendera ku mafarasi, vyari bimanutse mu kiyaga, Uhoraho abiteranirizakw amazi y’ikiyaga; arikw Abisirayeli bo bāciye hagati mu kiyaga nk’ abaca ku musozi." 
Exodus15:20 Kandi Miriyamu yavugishwa n’Imana, mushiki wa Aroni, ahitana agashāko k’ingoma; abagore bose barasohoka, baramukurikira bari n’udushāko tw’ingoma, bagenda baravyina;" 
Exodus15:21 Miriyamu akabaterera, ati Ni muririmbire Uhoraho, kukw ari n’intsinzi y’agahebūza: Ifarasi n’ūyigenderako yabinuze mu kiyaga." 
Exodus15:22 Mose ajana Abisirayeli, bararamvura, bava ku Kiyaga Gitukura, bataha mu bugaragwa bg’i Shura, bagenda imisi itatu mur’ ubgo bugaragwa, babura amazi." 
Exodus15:23 Bashitse i Mara, ntibāshobora kunywa amazi yaho, kuko yar’ umururazi; ni co catumye hitwa Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Maz’ abantu bidodombera Mose, bati Turanywa iki?" 
Exodus15:25 Na we atakambira Uhoraho: Uhoraho amwereka igiti, agiterera mur’ ayo mazi, aca ahinduka meza. Aho ni ho Uhoraho yabashingiye icagezwe n’ibgirizwa, kand’ aho ni ho yabageragereje." 
Exodus15:26 Arababarira, ati Ni mwagira umwete wo kwumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugakora ibitunganye mu nyonga ziwe mukumvira ivyagezwe vyiwe, mukitondera ivyo yihanikirije vyose, ngo Nta ndwara azobateza nk’ izo yateje Abanyegiputa; ngo Kukw ari we Uhoraho, abakiza indwara." 
Exodus15:27 Bashika i Elimu, hār’ amariba cumi n’abiri, n’ibigazi mirongwirindwi: basagaza aho nyene kur’ ayo mazi." 
Exodus16:1 Ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli bavuduka i Elimu, bataha mu bugaragwa bg’i Sini, buri hagati ya Elimu na Sinayi, hari ku musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ukwezi gukurikira ukwo baviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus16:2 Ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli bidodombera Mose na Aroni mur’ ubgo bugaragwa," 
Exodus16:3 barababarira, bat’ Uhoraho iy’ apfuma atwicira mu gihugu ca Egiputa, tucīteretse inkono z’inyama, tukirya ivyo kurya tugahāga; none mwadukūyeyo mutuzana mur’ ubu bugaragwa kugira ngw iri shengero ryose mutwicishe inzara." 
Exodus16:4 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Rāba, ngira ngo ndabacuncuburire umutsima uvuye mw ijuru: uko bukeye abantu baze bame baja kwegeranya ivy’ uwo musi, kugira ngo mbagerageze ndābe yuko bitondera ivyagezwe vyanje, canke ko batavyitondera." 
Exodus16:5 Kandi ku wa gatandatu, igihe basorongora ivyo bazanye, bazosanga harimw’ ibingana kabiri n’ivyo bahora bazana." 
Exodus16:6 Nuko Mose na Aroni babarira Abisirayeli bose, bati Ku mugoroba ni ho muja kumenya yuk’ Uhoraho ari we yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa;" 
Exodus16:7 kandi mu gitondo ni ho muzobona icubahiro c’Uhoraho: kuko yumvise ingene mumwidodombera; natwe ga twar’ iki, aho mutwidodombera?" 
Exodus16:8 Mose arababgira, at’ Ivyo murabibona igihe Uhoraho aja kubaha inyama zo kurya kur’ uyu mugoroba, mu gitondo akazobaha umutsima, mukarya mugahāga; kuk’ Uhoraho yumvise imyidodombo yanyu mumwidodombera; natwe twar’ iki? erega si twebge mwidodombera, mwidodombera Uhoraho." 
Exodus16:9 Maze Mose abarira Aroni, ati Barira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwīgire hafi imbere y’ Uhoraho, uti Kuko yumvise imyidodombo yanyu." 
Exodus16:10 Nuko Aroni akirikw aravugana n’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, bahindukiye babona mu bugaragwa ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho bgiyerekaniye muri ca gicu." 
Exodus16:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus16:12 ati Numvise imyidodombo y’ Abisirayeli; non’ ubabarire, uti Kur’ uyu mugoroba murarya inyama, kandi mu gitondo muzorya umutsima, muhāge: uti Muzoca mumenya kw ari we Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Exodus16:13 Nuko ku mugoroba inkware ziraza, zigwa aho bashagaje, zirahazimya; mu gitondo buca ikime gitonze impande zaho zose." 
Exodus16:14 Ikime kimaze guta, hasi aho mu bugaragwa haboneka utuntu duto‐duto nk’utuvunguka, duto‐duto nk’ikime cavuze." 
Exodus16:15 Abisirayeli babibonye, barabazanya, bat’ Ibi n’ibiki? kuko batāmenye ivy’ ari vyo. Mose arababgira, at’ Uwo n’umutsima Uhoraho abahaye kw ivyo kurya." 
Exodus16:16 Ibi ni vyo Uhoraho yavuze, at’ Umuntu wese yegeranye ibihwanye n’igisa ciwe, kand’ ajanire abo mw ihema ryiwe ingero yitwa omeru imwe‐imwe ku muntu ku muntu, nk’ ukw igitigiri c’abantu banyu kingana." 
Exodus16:17 Abisirayeli babigenza bartyo, baravyegeranya, bamwe begeranya vyinshi, abandi bike." 
Exodus16:18 Babigeze kuri ya ngero yitwa omeru, uwegeranije vyinshi asanga nta co asāguye; uwegeranije bike asanga nta co akehaniwe: umuntu wese asanga yegeranije ibihwanye n’igisa ciwe." 
Exodus16:19 Maze Mose arabīhaniza, ati Ntihagire umuntu abirāza." 
Exodus16:20 Yamara Mose ntibamwumvira: bamwe babirāzako, basanga vyaboze, binyagara inyo. Mose arabarakira." 
Exodus16:21 Nuko bama bavyegeranya uko bukeye, umuntu wese ibihwanye n’igisa ciwe: izuba ngo risasike, bikayaga." 
Exodus16:22 Maze ku wa gatandatu begeranya ivyo kurya bingana kabiri n’ivyo bahora bazana: umuntu wese agira omeru zibiri‐zibiri; abakuru bose b’iryo shengero baraza babibarira Mose. 
Exodus16:23 Arababarira, at’ Ivyo ni vyo Uhoraho yavuze, at’ Ejo uzoba umusi wo kuruhūka, w’isabato irobanuriwe Uhoraho; ni bagende barondere ivyo bagomba, bateke ivyo bagomba; ibisāgutse babibīke, babirāze." 
Exodus16:24 Nuko barabirāza nk’uko Mose yabageze; ntivyabora, ntivyagwa urunyo na rumwe." 
Exodus16:25 Mose arababgira, at’ Uyu musi murye ivyo, kuk’ uyu musi ar’ uw’ isabato y’Uhoraho; uyu musi ntimubibona ku musozi." 
Exodus16:26 Mu misi itandatu muzokwama muvyegeranya, arik’ ūgira indwi n’ uw’ isabato: kuri wo ntibizoboneka." 
Exodus16:27 Ariko kur’ uwo musi ugira indwi bamwe mu bantu baja kuvyegeranya, barabibura." 
Exodus16:28 Uhoraho abaza Mose, ati Muzogeza hehe kwanka kwitondera ivyagezwe vyanje n’amabgirizwa yanje?" 
Exodus16:29 Rāba, jewe Uhoraho ko nabahaye isabato, ni co catumye mbaha ivyo kurya vy’imisi ibiri ku wa gatandatu. Umuntu wese n’agume ah’ ari, ntihagire umuntu ayegayega ku musi ugira indwi." 
Exodus16:30 Nuko ku w’indwi abantu bararuhuka. 
Exodus16:31 Ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bita utwo tuntu manu: twasa n’utubuto tw’agati kitwa gadi, kandi twera de: twasōsa nk’udutsima turimw’ ubūki." 
Exodus16:32 Mose arababgira, at’ Iki ni co Uhoraho yabageze, at’ Ingero ya omeru yuzuye manu ibīkirwe ab’ urunganwe rwanyu uko ruzogenda rukurikirana, kugira ngo baze barābe umutsima yabagaburiye mu bugaragwa, igihe yabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus16:33 Mose abarira Aroni, ati Jana urwavya, urusukemwo manu yuzuye omeru imwe, urutereke imbere y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo rubīkirwe ab’urunganwe rwanyu uko ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Exodus16:34 Nuko Aroni arutereka imbere y’ Ibishinga intahe, ngo rwameho, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus16:35 Abisirayeli bamara imyaka mirongwine barya manu, bageza aho bashikiye mu gihugu kirimw’ abantu; barya manu bashitsa aho bagereye ku rugabano rw’igihugu c’i Kanani." 
Exodus16:36 Ingero yitwa efa irimw’ izitwa omeru cumi. 
Exodus17:1 Ishengero ryose ry’ Abisirayeli riva mu bugaragwa bg’i Sini, bagenda baratāhīra, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yabageze, barinda bashika i Refidimu, basagazayo. Abantu basanga nta mazi ariho yo kunywa." 
Exodus17:2 Maz’ abantu batonganya Mose, bati Duhe amazi, tunywe. Mose arababaza, ati Muntonganiriza iki? N’iki kibateye kugerageza Uhoraho?" 
Exodus17:3 Abantu bahicirwa n’inyota, bidodombera Mose, bati Wadukūriye iki muri Egiputa kutwicisha inyota, twe n’abana bacu n’ibitungwa vyacu?" 
Exodus17:4 Maze Mose atakambira Uhoraho, ati Mbeg’ aba bantu ndabagire nte? ko bashigaje gatoya bakantera amabuye." 
Exodus17:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ca imbere y’abantu, ujane bamwe mu bakuru b’Abisirayeli; witwaze na ya nkoni wakubitishije rwa ruzi, ugende." 
Exodus17:6 Ehe rāba nanje ndahagarara imbere yawe hariya ku gitandara c’i Horebu; nawe uheze uje gukubita ico gitandara, amazi aca yisuka avuye muri co, abantu banywe. Nuko Mose abikora artyo imbere y’abakuru b’Abisirayeli." 
Exodus17:7 Yita aho hantu Masa na Meriba kukw Abisirayeli bamutonganije, kandi kuko bagerageje Uhoraho, bakabaza ngo Mbeg’ Uhoraho ari muri twebge, canke ntari muri twebge?" 
Exodus17:8 Maze haza Abamaleki, baterera Abisirayeli i Refidimu." 
Exodus17:9 Mose abarira Yosuwa, ati Dusobanurire abantu, ubajane murwanye Abamaleki; nanje ejo nzohagarara ku mpinga y’umusozi, nitwaje ya nkoni y’Imana." 
Exodus17:10 Yosuwa agira nk’uko Mose yamubariye nyene, aja kurwanya Abamaleki: Mose na Aroni na Huri baradūga, baja ku mpinga y’uwo musozi." 
Exodus17:11 Maze Mose iy’ amanitse amaboko Abisirayeli baranesha: ngw ayamanure, Abamaleki bakanesha." 
Exodus17:12 Maz’ amaboko ya Mose araruha; bābīra ibuye, bararimutega, aryicarako; Aroni na Huri bagumya amaboko yiwe, umwe ku ruhande rumwe, uwundi ku rundi: amaboko yiwe araguma gushitsa izuba rirenze." 
Exodus17:13 Yosuwa aririkisha inkota abantu bose b’Abamaleki. 
Exodus17:14 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ni wandike ivyo mu gitabo, bibe icibutso; ubibarire Yosuwa, ubimwumvishe, yuko nzozimanganya ukumenyekana kw’Abamaleki, bībagirane mu bo musi y’ijuru bose." 
Exodus17:15 Maze Mose yubaka igicaniro, acita Yehovanisi:" 
Exodus17:16 aravuga, at’ Uhoraho yamanitse ukuboko arahira kw azorwanya Abamaleki, kuva ku runganwe rumwe gushitsa ku rundi, birtyo birtyo." 
Exodus18:1 Yetiro umuherezi w’i Midiyani, sebukwe wa Mose, yumva ivyo Imana yakoreye Mose n’Abisirayeli abantu bayo, kandi n’ingen’ Uhoraho yakūye Abisirayeli muri Egiputa." 
Exodus18:2 Nuko Yetiro sebukwe wa Mose azana Zipora muka Mose, uwo Mose yari yarashubije i wabo," 
Exodus18:3 n’abahungu biwe bompi; umwe muri bo se yari yamwise Gerushomu, kuko yavuga, ati Nabaye inyambukīra mu gihugu kitar’ icacu;" 
Exodus18:4 uwundi yamwise Eliyezeri, kuko yavuga, at’ Imana ya data yabaye umutabazi wanje, inkiza inkota ya Farawo." 
Exodus18:5 Nuko Yetiro sebukwe wa Mose aza aho Mose ari, amuzaniye abana n’umugore, amusanga muri bga bugaragwa, aho yar’ ashinze ihema, ku musozi w’Imana." 
Exodus18:6 Atuma ngo baje kubibarira Mose yuko sebukwe Yetiro aje, amuzaniye umugore wiwe n’abana biwe bompi." 
Exodus18:7 Mose arasohoka, aja gusanganira sebukwe, akubita inkoro hasi, amugwa mu nda, babazanya amakuru, binjira mw ihema." 
Exodus18:8 Mose adondera sebukwe ivyo Uhoraho yakoze vyose kuri Farawo n’Abanyegiputa, abahōra Abisirayeli, n’ivyabagoreye mu nzira vyose, n’ingen’ Uhoraho yabakijije." 
Exodus18:9 Maze Yetiro anezerezwa n’ivyiza vyose Uhoraho yakoreye Abisirayeli, kuko yabarokoye, akabakūra mu maboko y’Abanyegiputa." 
Exodus18:10 Yetiro aravuga, at’ Uhoraho ashemagizwe, yabarokoye, akabakūra mu maboko y’Abanyegiputa no mu maboko ya Farawo, agakiza abantu biwe ububasha bg’Abanyegiputa." 
Exodus18:11 Noneho mmenye yuk’ Uhoraho aruta izindi mana zose, ko yatsinze Abanyegiputa bāhora babihayagizako." 
Exodus18:12 Nuko Yetiro, sebukwe wa Mose, ajana ikimazi co kwosa n’ibindi bimazi vyo gushikanira Imana: Aroni n’abakuru bose b’Abisirayeli baraza, ngo basangirire na sebukwe wa Mose imbere y’Imana." 
Exodus18:13 Bukeye bgaho, Mose aricara ngw acire abantu imanza: abantu bahagarara bakikije Mose guhēra mu gitondo gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Exodus18:14 Sebukwe wa Mose, amaze kwitegereza ivyo vyose Mose akorera abantu, aramubaza, at’ Ivyo ukora n’ibiki, ukorera abantu? N’iki gituma wicara ngaho ur’ umwe, abantu bose bagahagarara bagukikije, guhera mu gitondo ugashitsa ku mugoroba?" 
Exodus18:15 Mose yishura sebukwe, ati Ni kukw abantu baza kuri jewe ngo ndabasigūrize Imana." 
Exodus18:16 Kand’ iyo bafise ico bapfa, baza kuri jewe, ngacira urubanza umuntu na mugenzi we, nkabamenyesha amabgirizwa y’ Imana, n’ivyagezwe vyayo." 
Exodus18:17 Sebukwe aramwishura, at’ Ivyo ukora ivyo si vyiza." 
Exodus18:18 Ntibizobura kuguca intege, mwe n’aba bantu muri kumwe; kukw ivyo bikurengeye, n’ivyo utoshobora gukora wenyene." 
Exodus18:19 None rero, enda nyumviriza, ndakugīre inama, Imana iyigufashemwo. Ube ari wewe mushikirwa w’amajambo y’abantu wo kuyajana ku Mana, kand’ abe ari wewe ujana imanza zabo ku Mana." 
Exodus18:20 Kand’ abe ari wewe ubigisha amabgirizwa n’ivyagezwe, no kubereka inzira bakwiye gucamwo, n’ibikorwa bakwiye gukora." 
Exodus18:21 Ikindi, utoranye mu bantu bose abashoboye guca imanza, bubaha Imana, b’abanyakuri, banka ingurire; uheze ubakuze, babe bakuru bo kuganza abantu, bamwe igihumbi‐igihumbi, abandi ijana‐ijana, abandi mirongwitanu‐itanu, abandi cumi‐cumi." 
Exodus18:22 Abe ari bo bacira abantu imanza ibihe vyose, nawe baze bahore bakuzanira urubanza rugoye, arik’ urubanza rwose rutagoye abe ari bo baruca ubgabo. Ico ni co kizokuremurura, na bo bazokugabanura ibikorwa." 
Exodus18:23 Nuko ni wabigenza urtyo, Imana ikabikwemerera, bizogushobokera, n’ aba bantu bose bazohora bataha i wabo ata mwikomo." 
Exodus18:24 Nuko Mose yumvira sebukwe, akora ivyo yamubariye vyose." 
Exodus18:25 Atoranya mu Bisirayeli bose abantu b’abahanga, abagira bakuru mur’ abo bantu, abaha kuganza abantu, bamwe igihumbi‐igihumbi, abandi ijana‐ijana, abandi mirongwitanu‐itanu, abandi cumi‐cumi." 
Exodus18:26 Nuko bacira abantu imanza ibihe vyose: imanza zigoye bazizanira Mose, arikw izitagoye zose bakazica ubgabo." 
Exodus18:27 Maze Mose asezera sebukwe, sebukwe na we asubira mu gihugu c’i wabo." 
Exodus19:1 Mu kwezi kugira gatatu Abisirayeli bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ku musi wakwo wa mbere ni ho bashika mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi." 
Exodus19:2 Bavuye i Refidimu bataha mur’ ubgo bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi nyene, bashingah’ amahema, Abisirayeli basagaza ngaho, imbere y’uwo musozi." 
Exodus19:3 Mose adūze ah’ Imana iri, Uhoraho amubarira n’ijwi rirenga ari kur’ uwo musozi, at’ Uku abe ari k’ubarira ab’ inzu ya Yakobo, ubgire Abisirayeli," 
Exodus19:4 uti Mwarabonye ivyo yakoreye Abanyegiputa, n’ingene mweho yabateruye ku mababa nk’ay’ inkukuma akabazana iy’ ari." 
Exodus19:5 Uti None rero, ni mwamwumvira vy’ ukuri, mukitondera isezerano ryiwe, muzomubera inyegu yiharije, yitoranirije mu mahanga yose: uti Kukw isi yose ar’ iyiwe;" 
Exodus19:6 kandi muzomubera ubgami, ubgoko bg’abaherezi, ihanga ryera. Ayo majambo abe ari yo ubgira Abisirayeli." 
Exodus19:7 Nuko Mose araza, ahamagara abakuru bo mu bantu, abashikiriza ayo majambo yose Uhoraho yamutumye." 
Exodus19:8 Abantu bose bamwishurira icarimwe, bat’ Ivyo Uhoraho avuze vyose tuzobikora. Nuko Mose asubirana k’Uhoraho amajambo y’abantu." 
Exodus19:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Rāba ndaza iy’ uri, ndi mu gicu c’igipfungu c’ inzitane, kugira ngw abantu bumve aho ndiko ndavugana nawe, baheze bakwemere ibihe vyose. Mose abarira Uhoraho amajambo y’abantu." 
Exodus19:10 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Genda ku bantu, ubabgire biyeze uyu musi n’ejo, bamesure impuzu zabo," 
Exodus19:11 umusi ugira gatatu uz’ ushike bīteguye: kuko jewe Uhoraho ku musi ugira gatatu nzomanuka nze kur’ uyu musozi Sinayi imbere y’abantu bose. 
Exodus19:12 Nawe uz’ ubashingire akarimbi k’aho bagarukira impande zose, ubabarire, uti Mwiyubare, mwoye kudūga kur’ uyo musozi canke gukora ku rubibe rwawo: ūzokora kur’ uyo musozi ntazobura kwicwa." 
Exodus19:13 Ntihaze hagire ūmukozak’ ukuboko, ariko bamwicishe amabuye, canke bamurase imyampi; naho coba igitungwa kiwukozeko, cank’ umuntu, ivyo ntibize bisubire kubaho. Arikw inzamba ni yaramuka irandishije ijwi, ni ho bazobona gushika kur’ uyu musozi." 
Exodus19:14 Nuko Mose aramanuka, ava kur’ uwo musozi, aja iy’ abantu bari, arababgira bariyeza, bamesura impuzu zabo." 
Exodus19:15 Abarira abantu, at’ Umusi ugira gatatu uz’ ushike mwiteguye, kandi ntihaze hagire uwegerana n’umugore." 
Exodus19:16 Ku musi ugira gatatu mu gatondo haba imituragaro n’imiravyo, n’igicu c’igipfungu kizitanye kur’ uwo musozi, humvikana n’ijwi ry’inzamba rirengēra cane; abantu bose bar’ aho bashagaje bahinda agashitsi." 
Exodus19:17 Maze Mose akūra abantu aho bashagaje ngo baze gusanganira Imana; bahagarara musi y’uwo musozi. 
Exodus19:18 Uwo musozi Sinayi upfūndūka umwotsi wose, kuk’ Uhoraho yamanutse, aje kuri wo ari mu muriro: umwotsi wawo upfūndūka nk’uw’itanure, umusozi wose utigita birengeje." 
Exodus19:19 Ijwi ry’ inzamba rirushirije kurengēra, Mose aravuga, Imana imwishura mw ijwi rirenga." 
Exodus19:20 Nuk’ Uhoraho aramanuka, aza kur’ uwo musozi Sinayi, ku mpinga yawo. Uhoraho ahamagara Mose ngw adūge uwo musozi ashike ku mpinga, Mose aradūga." 
Exodus19:21 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Manuka, wihanikirize abantu boye gutwaza ngo baze iyo ndi, bampange amaso, benshi muri bo bagatikira." 
Exodus19:22 Kandi n’abaherezi na bo, basanzwe bīgira hafi yanje, jewe Uhoraho, ni biyeze, kugira ngo simbatsindeho." 
Exodus19:23 Mose yishura Uhoraho, at’ Abantu ntibashobora kudūga kur’ uyu musozi Sinayi, kuko watubariye ngo tubashingire akarimbi k’aho bagarukira impande zose z’uyu musozi, ngo tuweze." 
Exodus19:24 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Genda umanuke, uheze uje kudūgana na Aroni: arikw abaherezi n’abandi bantu boye gutwaza ngo baze iyo ndi, kugira ngo simbatsindeho." 
Exodus19:25 Nuko Mose aramanuka, aja ku bantu, arabibashikiriza." 
Exodus20:1 Imana ivuga aya majambo yose," 
Exodus20:2 iti Nd’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, yagukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja." 
Exodus20:3 Ntukagire izindi mana umbangikanya. 
Exodus20:4 Ntukibāzire igishushanyo, cank’ igisa n’ishusho y’ikintu na kimwe kiri hejuru mw ijuru, canke hasi kw isi, canke mu mazi yo mu biyaga;" 
Exodus20:5 ntuz’ uvyikubite imbere, ntuz’ ubisabe, kuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nd’ Imana ifuha, mpōra abana ibigabitanyo vya ba se, nkageza ku runganwe rugira gatatu no ku rugira kane rw’abanyanka," 
Exodus20:6 nkagirira ikigongwe abankunda, bakitondera ivyagezwe vyanje, nkageza ku runganwe rwabo uko ruzogenda rukurikirana gushitsa igihumbi." 
Exodus20:7 Ntugapfe kuvuga izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, ku vy’ ubusābusa; kuk’ uworivuga ku vy’ubusābusa, jewe Uhoraho ntobura kubimuhōra." 
Exodus20:8 Wibuke kuziririza umusi w’ isabato. 
Exodus20:9 Mu misi itandatu uz’ ukore, abe ari yo ukoreramw’ ibikorwa vyawe vyose:" 
Exodus20:10 arik’ umusi ugira indwi ni wo sabato yanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntukagire igikorwa na kimwe ukora kuri wo, wewe ubgawe, cank’ umuhungu wawe, cank’ umukobga wawe, cank’ umugurano wawe, cank’ umuguranokazi wawe, cank’ inka zawe, cank’ uw’ inyambukīra aba i wawe:" 
Exodus20:11 kukw imisi itandatu ari yo jewe Uhoraho naremyemw’ ijuru n’isi n’ikiyaga n’ ibiri muri vyo vyose, nkaruhuka ku musi ugira indwi: ni co catumye jewe Uhoraho mpezagira umusi w’isabato, nkaweza." 
Exodus20:12 Wubahe so na nyoko, kugira ng’urambire mu gihugu jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nzoguha." 
Exodus20:13 Ntukice. 
Exodus20:14 Ntugasambane. 
Exodus20:15 Ntukibe. 
Exodus20:16 Ntukāgirize ibinyoma mugenzawe. 
Exodus20:17 Ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzawe, ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzawe, cank’ umugurano wiwe, cank’ umuguranokazi wiwe, cank’ inka yiwe, cank’ indogoba yiwe, cank’ ikintu na kimwe ca mugenzawe." 
Exodus20:18 Abantu bose bumvise ya mituragaro, babonye ya miravyo, bumvise n’ijwi rya ya nzamba, babonye na wa musozi upfūndūka umwotsi, baterwa n’ubgoba bahinda agashitsi, barasuha bahagarara kure." 
Exodus20:19 Babgira Mose, bati Ba ari wewe utubarira, ni ho twovyumva: arikw Imana yoye kuba ari yo itwibaririra, ntiduhave dupfa." 
Exodus20:20 Mose yishura abantu, ati Ni muhūmure: kukw Imana ije kubagerageza, kugira ngw igitinyiro cayo came imbere yanyu, mwoye gukora icaha." 
Exodus20:21 Nukw abantu baguma ngaho aho bahagaze kure, ariko Mose yegera wa mwiza w’umuzitanya ah’ Imana iri." 
Exodus20:22 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uku abe ari k’ubarira Abisirayeli, ut’ Ubganyu murīboneye kw avuganye namwe ari mw ijuru." 
Exodus20:23 Uti Ntimukarondere izindi mana ngo muzibangikanye na we: ntihakagire ivyitwa imana mucura, ari mw ifeza canke mw izahabu." 
Exodus20:24 Igicaniro muzongirira, muze mukirundarunde mw ivu, abe ari ho mutangira ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe, ar’ ivyo mu ntama zanyu canke mu nka: ahantu hose izina ryanje rizokwibukirwa nzohabasanga, mbahe umugisha." 
Exodus20:25 Kandi ni mwangirira igicaniro c’amabuye, ntimuze mucubakishe amabuye abājwe, kukw ibuye murikojejekw icuma canyu mwoba murihumānije." 
Exodus20:26 Kandi ntimuze mugire ico kwūririrako ngo muje ku gicaniro canje, kugira ng’ubgambure bganyu bgoye kukibonekako." 
Exodus21:1 Ibi ni vyo vyagezwe uzobashikiriza. 
Exodus21:2 Ni hagira ūgura umugurano w’Umuheburayo nka we, az’ amujākarire imyaka itandatu: mu mwaka ugira indwi az’ arekurwe, yībēre mu mwidegemvyo, ata co yicunguje." 
Exodus21:3 Namb’ azoba yaraje wenyene, agende wenyene; namb’ azoba yazananye n’umugore, ajane na we." 
Exodus21:4 Kandi shebuja namba yaramuhaye umugore, bakavyarana abahungu cank’ abakobga, nya mugore n’abana biwe bazosigara ar’ aba shebuja, na we agende wenyene." 
Exodus21:5 Arik’ uwo mugurano ni yavuga amaramaje, ati Nkunda databuja n’umugore wanje n’abana banje, singomba kurekurwa ngo nje mu mwidegemvyo:" 
Exodus21:6 shebuja amuzane aho ndi, jewe Imana, aheze amuhagarike ku rugi canke ku gishimaryango, amutoboze ugutwi umugera; uwo az’ arinde apfa akimujākariye." 
Exodus21:7 Umuntu ni yashōra umwana wiwe w’umukobga akaja kuba umugurano, igihe kigeze ntaz’ arekurwe nk’uko barekura abagurano b’abagabo." 
Exodus21:8 Ariko n’atātunganira shebuja, yari yaramurongoye, shebuja aze yemere acungurwe. Ariko kumugura n’abanyamahanga ntivyemerwa, kukw azoba yaramwononye." 
Exodus21:9 Canke ni yamuha umuhungu wiwe, amutere itēka nk’uko yogiriye umukobga wiwe." 
Exodus21:10 Na ho ni yamuharika uwundi, ntaz’ ahaze umutēko wiwe w’ inyama yamugereye cank’ imyambaro yiwe, cank’ imbu ziwe." 
Exodus21:11 Ni yaramuka atiriganye mur’ ivyo ukw ari bitatu, uwo mugore az’ arekurwe gusa, ata mahera atanzwe." 
Exodus21:12 Ūkubise uwundi, agapfa, ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Exodus21:13 Arik’ uwobigira atavyitumye, ari jewe Imana ntumye amugwa mu maboko, nzokurangira ah’ azohungira." 
Exodus21:14 Arik’ umuntu ni yatera mugenzi we ibigirankana, ngw amwice mu bugunge, muze mumukūre ku gicaniro canje, kugira ngo yicwe." 
Exodus21:15 Ūkubise se canke nyina, ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Exodus21:16 Uwivye umuntu ngw amushōre, ar’ ūmaze kumugura, cank’ ar’ ūmufatanywe, ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Exodus21:17 Ūvumye se canke nyina, ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Exodus21:18 Abantu ni barwana, umwe agatera uwundi ibuye, cank’ akamusekura igipfunsi, akamara imisi arwaye, ariko ntapfe:" 
Exodus21:19 amaze gusubira kuvyuka, akāndārira ku kibando, uwamukubise ntaze yicwe, arikw az’ amurihe imisi amaze arwaye, atekw amuvūze, kugeza akize neza." 
Exodus21:20 Umuntu ni yakubita inkoni umugurano wiwe, cank’ umuguranokazi, akamugwa mu maboko, ntaz’ abure guhanwa;" 
Exodus21:21 ariko ni yasība rimwe canke kabiri atarahwera, ntaz’ abihanirwe: kuko vyar’ ibintu vyiwe." 
Exodus21:22 Abantu ni barwana, bagaca ku mugore akuriwe, bigatuma inda yiwe ikoroka, ariko ntāgire ikindi aba: ūmuciyeko ntaz’ abure kuriha ico umugabo w’uno mugore azomucira cose; az’ arihe nk’ ukw abacamanza bazoshinga." 
Exodus21:23 Ariko ni yagira ikindi aba, uz’ ugere k’ubugingo buhōrwa ubundi," 
Exodus21:24 ijisho rihōrwe irindi, iryinyo rihōrwe irindi, igikonjo gihōrwe ikindi, ikirenge gihōrwe ikindi," 
Exodus21:25 ubushe buhōrwe ubundi, uruguma ruhōrwe urundi, umushishu w’inkoni uhōrwe uwundi." 
Exodus21:26 Umuntu ni yakubita umugurano wiwe cank’ umuguranokazi, akamumena ijisho, amurekure yidegemvye kukw amumennye ijisho." 
Exodus21:27 Kandi ni yakubita umugurano wiwe cank’ umuguranokazi, akamuhongora iryinyo, amurekure yidegemvye kukw amuhongoye iryinyo." 
Exodus21:28 Ni hagira inka yica umugabo cank’ umugore, agashika, iyo nka ntiz’ ibure kwicishwa amabuye, kandi ntiz’ iribge; ariko nyene yo ntaz’ ashirwe mu rukinja." 
Exodus21:29 Arikw iyo nka ni yaba yar’ isanzwe yica, nyene yo bakaba baramwihanije, ntayizigame, ikica umugabo cank’ umugore, agashika, iyo nka ize yicishwe amabuye, na nyene yo na we bamwice." 
Exodus21:30 Na ho ni bamwaka indihano, atange ico bazomucira cose, kugira ngw acungure ubugingo bgiwe." 
Exodus21:31 Naho yokwica umwana w’umuntu, ar’ umuhungu cank’ umukobga, nyene yo agirwe nk’ukw ico cagezwe kivuga." 
Exodus21:32 Arikw inka ni yica umugurano cank’ umuguranokazi, nyene yo az’ arihe shebuja w’uno shekeli z’ifeza mirongwitatu, iyo nka na yo ize yicishwe amabuye." 
Exodus21:33 Umuntu ni yarumūra urwobo rwo kubīka amazi, canke ni yarwimba ntarurumye, inka ikarukorokeramwo cank’ indogoba;" 
Exodus21:34 nyene rwo az’ arihe ico yar’ imaze, ahe nyene yo amahera, umuvyimba ube uwa nyen’ urwobo." 
Exodus21:35 Inka y’umuntu ni yica iy’ uwundi, igahwera, iyishe iyindi bayigure, bagabure ivyo iguzwe, n’ umuvyimba na wo nyene bawugabure." 
Exodus21:36 Na ho ni vyaba bizwi kw iyo nka yar’ isanzwe yica, nyene yo ntayizigame, ntaz’ abure kuyiriha iyindi, umuvyimba ukaba uwiwe." 
Exodus22:1 Umuntu ni yiba inka cank’ intama, akayibāga cank’ akayishōra, inka az’ ayirihe zitanu, intama ayirihe zine." 
Exodus22:2 Umusuma ni basanga amena, bakamutsindaho, uwamwishe amaraso yiwe ntaz’ amukore." 
Exodus22:3 Arik’ ūzomwica izuba rirashe, amaraso yiwe azomukora. Umusuma akwiye kuriha; na ho ni yaba adafise ico ariha, agurwe ahōrwa ubusuma bgiwe." 
Exodus22:4 Ni yaramuka afatanywe inyibano ikibona, ar’ inka cank’ indogoba cank’ intama, az’ ayitangane n’iyindi y’imperekeza." 
Exodus22:5 Umuntu ni yōnēsha umurima cank’ imizabibu, akareka ico atunze kikōna umurima w’uwundi, az’ amurihe ku murima wiwe ibirusha ibindi kuba vyiza, canke ku mizabibu yiwe irusha iyindi kuba myiza." 
Exodus22:6 Umuriro ni waccroka, ugafata uruzitiro rw’amahwa, ukarandagata, hagasha imikama y’ ingano, cank’ izigihagaze, cank’ umurima wose, uwacanye uwo muriro ntaz’ abure kubiriha." 
Exodus22:7 Umuntu ni yabītsa mugenzi we amahera cank’ ibindi bintu, bikībirwa i we, uwavyivye ni yaboneka az’ arihe ibingana na vyo kabiri." 
Exodus22:8 Uwavyivye n’ataboneka, nyen’ urwo rugo aze imbere y’ Imana, kugira ngo bamurahize kw atākojeje ukuboko ku bintu vya mugenzi we." 
Exodus22:9 Mu vyo kugungana vyose, naho yoba inka, cank’ indogoba, cank’ intama, cank’ impuzu, cank’ ikindi kintu cose cazimiye, umuntu akagifata, akavuga, ati Ngiki! urubanza rw’ abo bompi rujanwe ku Mana, uwo Imana izocira urubanza kw’ atsinzwe, az’ arihe uwo wundi ikingana na co kabiri." 
Exodus22:10 Umuntu ni yabītsa mugenzi we indogoba cank’ inka cank’ intama cank’ ikindi gitungwa cose, kigapfa canke kikavunika canke kikanyagwa, ata muntu abibona;" 
Exodus22:11 indahiro aja kurahira izina ry’ Uhoraho iz’ abe ari yo ibarangiriza, yukw atākojeje ukuboko ku bintu vya mugenzi we; nyene vyo ayemere, uwo ntārinde kumuriha." 
Exodus22:12 Ariko ni hagira icībirwa i we, az’ akirihe nyene co." 
Exodus22:13 Na ho ni catabagurwa n’igikōko, azane ikirangara kibishingira intahe; ntārinde kuriha iyatabaguwe." 
Exodus22:14 Canke ni hagira igitungano umuntu atīra mugenzi we, kikavunika canke kigapfa, nyene co atari ho ari, uwo ntaz’ abure kukiriha." 
Exodus22:15 Ariko nyene co ni yahaba, uwo ntaz’ akirihe, ni yaba yagitanze ku mpēra, iyo mpēra nyene izoba ibaye indihano." 
Exodus22:16 Umuntu ni yahendagiza umwigeme ataribgasabge, akaryamana na we, ntaz’ abure kumukwa ngw abe umugore wiwe." 
Exodus22:17 Ariko se ni yanka kumumushingira, na ho nyene atange inkwano nk’uko bahora bakwa abandi bigeme." 
Exodus22:18 Umurozikazi ntimuze mumureke ngw abeho. 
Exodus22:19 Ūzoryamana n’igitungano ntaz’ abure kwicwa. 
Exodus22:20 Ūzotanga ikimazi, akagiha iyindi mana, atari jewe Uhoraho jenyene, az’ arandurwe rwose." 
Exodus22:21 Umunyamahanga ntimuze mumugirire nabi, canke ngo mumuhahaze, kuko namwe mwar’ abanyamahanga mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus22:22 Ntihaze hagire umupfakazi cank’ impfuvyi mucuranguza. 
Exodus22:23 Ni mwagira ico mubacuranguzako na gitoya, bakantakambira, sinzobura kwumviriza ugutakamba kwabo;" 
Exodus22:24 maz’ uburake bganje bukaziriringa, nkabīcīsha inkota, abagore banyu bagasigara ar’ abapfakazi, n’abana banyu bakaba impfuvyi." 
Exodus22:25 Ni hagira ūgurāna amahera umuntu uw’ ari we wese wo mu bantu banje, w’umubanyi wiwe w’umworo, ntaz’ amwugarize mu kumwishuza, kandi ntaz’ amucire ay’ inyungu." 
Exodus22:26 Ni hagira ūkīzūra impuzu ya mugenzi we kukw amuheraniye, izuba ntirirenge atayimushubije:" 
Exodus22:27 kukw ari yo yipfuka yonyene, ari wo mwambaro wo ku mubiri wiwe; none yokwiyorosa iki? Ni yantakambira, nzomwumviriza, kuko nd’ umunyembabazi." 
Exodus22:28 Ntihaze hagire ūrogota kuri jewe Imana, canke ngw avume umukuru wo mu bgoko bganyu." 
Exodus22:29 Ntimuze mutebagane kunshikanira ku vyo mwakikinyuye, ari ku vyo mwejeje, ari ku binyobga vyanyu. Imfura zanyu z’ abahungu muze muzimpe." 
Exodus22:30 Abe ari ko muzokora no ku nka zanyu no ku ntama zanyu: iy’ uburiza iz’ imarane na nyina imisi ndwi, ku musi ugira umunani muze muyimpe." 
Exodus22:31 Muzoba abantu b’abagabo nirobanuriye; kandi ntimuze murye ku nyama z’ikirangara kiri mu gahinga, iz’ ari zo zose, ariko muze muziterere imbga." 
Exodus23:1 Ntimuze mwāmāmaze inkuru z’ibinyoma; ntihaze hagire uwifatanya n’ikigāba kuba icabona c’ibinyoma. 
Exodus23:2 Ntimuze muherēre ku ruhande rwa benshi bari mu nama y’ibibi, kand’ ūshinga intahe mu manza, ntaz’ aje iyo benshi bari, bigatuma bagoreka urubanza;" 
Exodus23:3 kandi ntimuze mutsindanishirize umuntu mubitewe n’ukw ar’ umworo. 
Exodus23:4 Ni hagira ūhūra n’inka y’ umwansi wiwe izimiye, cank’ indogoba yiwe, ntaz’ abure kuyimugarurira." 
Exodus23:5 Kandi hagize ūbona indogoba y’ūmwanka ifyāritswe n’umutwaro, ntapfe kumurengana, akwiye kumufasha kuyiremurura." 
Exodus23:6 Ntihaze hagire ūgoreka urubanza rw’umworo wo mu b’i wanyu. 
Exodus23:7 Mwitandukanye n’urubanza rw’ibinyoma, kandi ntihakagire uwo mwica atācumuye kand’ ar’ umugororotsi, kuko jewe ntazotsindanishiriza uwacumuye." 
Exodus23:8 Ntimuze mwemere ingurire: kukw ingurire ihuma amaso y’ ababona, kand’ igoreka imanza z’ abagororotsi." 
Exodus23:9 Ntimuze muhahaze umunyamahanga, kuko muzi umutima w’ umunyamahanga, kuko namwe mwar’ abanyamahanga mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus23:10 Mu myaka itandatu mwame murima indimiro zanyu, mwimbure ivyimburwa vyazo;" 
Exodus23:11 arik’ umwaka ugira indwi muzireke zirāre, zibe imisito, kugira ngw abakene bo mu bgoko bganyu barye ivyimeza, maz’ uduhūmbga basize turibge n’ibikōko vyo ku misozi. N’uruzabibu rwanyu n’ibiti vyanyu vy’imyelayo abe ari ko muzobigenza." 
Exodus23:12 Mu misi itandatu muze mukore ibikorwa vyanyu, maze ku musi ugira indwi muze muruhuke, kugira ngw inka zanyu n’indogoba zanyu mukoresha na zo zibone kuruhuka, n’abana b’abaguranokazi banyu n’ab’ akavantara bari muri mwebge babone guta akuya." 
Exodus23:13 Kand’ ivyo nababgiye vyose muze muvyitondere; ntimukagire amazina y’izindi mana muvuga, ntakumvikane mu kanwa kanyu." 
Exodus23:14 Muze mungirire imisi mikuru gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka: 
Exodus23:15 muze mugire imisi mikuru y’ imitsima itambiwe: nk’uko nababariye, mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe, mu gihe cashinzwe co mu kwezi Abibu, kukw ari kwo mwaviriyemwo muri Egiputa: ntihaze hagire ūrenguka iminwe misa imbere yanje." 
Exodus23:16 Kand’ umusi wo gusoroma ivy’ akera, muze muwugire mukuru, ari wo w’intangamarāra w’ivyo mwacumukuriye, murima mu ndimiro. Kandi n’umusi w’iyimbura rya vyose na wo muze muwugire mukuru, igihe muzokwimbura ivyabatamije vyo mu ndimiro zanyu, ku mpera y’umwaka." 
Exodus23:17 Nuko haze harenguke izinamuhungu wese imbere yanje, jewe Umwami Uhoraho, gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka." 
Exodus23:18 Amaraso y’ikimazi nshikaniwe ntimuze muyahēreze hamwe n’ imitsima yambiwe; ibinure vy’ icābāzwe ku musi wanje mukuru ntibize birāre ngo bishitse mu gatondo. 
Exodus23:19 Ivy’ intangamarāra vyo mu vy’imishuzo yo mu mirima yanyu muze mwame mubizana mu ngoro yanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Ntimuze mutekeshe umwagazi w’impene amata ya nyina." 
Exodus23:20 Ehe ngira ntume umumarayika imbere yanyu, abazigame mu nzira, abashikane aho nateguye." 
Exodus23:21 Muze mumwubahe, mumwumvire, ntimuze mumugararize, kukw atazobaharira ibicumuro vyanyu, kukw izina ryanje riri muri we." 
Exodus23:22 Ariko ni mwamwumvira vy’ukuri, mugakora ivyo nzovuga vyose, nanje nzoba umwansi w’abansi banyu, nzoba umurwanizi w’ababarwanya." 
Exodus23:23 Kuk’ uwo mumarayika wanje azoja imbere yanyu, gushitsa no mu Bamori, no mu Baheti, no mu Baferizi, no mu Banyakanani, no mu Bahiwi, no mu Bayebusi, nanje nzogenda ndabarandura." 
Exodus23:24 Kandi ntimukikubite imbere y’ibigirwamana vyabo, canke ngo mubisabe, canke ngo mwīgāne ingeso zabo: ariko muze mubihenebereze rwose, mumenagure amabuye yavyo bāshinze kw inkingi." 
Exodus23:25 Ariko jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu abe ari jewe musaba, nanje nzohezagira ivyo kurya vyanyu n’amazi yanyu, kandi nzokūra indwara muri mwebge." 
Exodus23:26 Mu gihugu canyu nta wuzokorokesha inda, nta wuzoba intavyara: ibitigiri vy’imisi y’ukubaho kwanyu nzobishitsa, ntimuzokenyuka." 
Exodus23:27 Nzotuma igitinyiro canje kibītangire imbere, nce ivutu abantu bose muzoshikamwo, ntume abansi banyu babaha ibitugu, babahunge." 
Exodus23:28 Nzogomora amavubi abītangire imbere, yirukane Abahiwi n’Abanyakanani n’Abaheti imbere yanyu." 
Exodus23:29 Sinzogīrako ngo mbirukane imbere yanyu mu mwaka umwe, kugira ngw igihugu coye guhinduka amatongo, ibikōko vyo mw ishamba bikagwira bikabatera." 
Exodus23:30 Ariko nzobirukana imbere yanyu si ruto si ruto, gushitsa aho muzogwirira, mukegukira ico gihugu." 
Exodus23:31 Nzobashirirah’ urugabano guhēra ku Kiyaga Gitukura gushitsa ku kiyaga c’Abafilisitiya, no guhēra ku bugaragwa gushitsa ku ruzi Efurate; kukw ababa mur’ ico gihugu nzobashira mu maboko yanyu, mubirukane." 
Exodus23:32 Ntimuze mugire isezerano musezerana na bo, canke n’imana zabo." 
Exodus23:33 Ntibaze bakomeze kuba mu gihugu canyu, kugira ngo ntibaze babacumuze kuri jewe; kuko muramutse musavye imana zabo bitobura kubabera umutego." 
Exodus24:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Dūga aho ndi, mwe na Aroni na Nadabu na Abihu, n’abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli mirongwirindwi, musenge mukiri kure:" 
Exodus24:2 Mose abe ari we yīgira hafi yanje wenyene, arikw abo bari kumwe ntibanyegēre, cank’ abandi bantu ngo badūgane na we." 
Exodus24:3 Mose araza, abgira abantu amajambo yose y’Uhoraho n’ amabgirizwa yiwe yose: abantu bose bamwishurira icarimwe, bat’ Ivyo Uhoraho avuze vyose tuzobikora." 
Exodus24:4 Nuko Mose yandika amajambo yose y’Uhoraho, maze bukeye akoroka kare, yubaka igicaniro musi y’uwo musozi, ashinga inkingi z’amabuye cumi na zibiri, nk’ukw imiryango y’Abisirayeli ari cumi n’ibiri." 
Exodus24:5 Atuma imisore yo mu Bisirayeli ija gutanga ibimazi, iravyosa, no kubāgira Uhoraho amashuri y’imikangara kw ibimazi vy’ishimwe." 
Exodus24:6 Mose yābīra igice ca kabiri c’amaraso, agisuka mu nzavya, ikindi na co akimija ku gicaniro." 
Exodus24:7 Araheza yābīra igitabo c’isezerano, agisomera abantu; baramubarira, bat’ Ivyo Uhoraho avuze vyose tuzobikora, kandi tuzomwumvira." 
Exodus24:8 Maze Mose yābīra ya maraso, ayamija abantu, arababarira, ati Ngayo amaraso y’isezerano Uhoraho asezeranye namwe, nk’ukw ayo majambo yose ari." 
Exodus24:9 Maze Mose adūgana na Aroni na Nadabu na Abihu, na ba bakuru b’Abisirayeli mirongwirindwi:" 
Exodus24:10 babona Imana y’ Abisirayeli; musi y’ibirenge vyayo hameze nk’umusezero w’amabuye yitwa safiro, usa n’ijuru ubgaryo iyo ryiharanguye." 
Exodus24:11 Kandi ba bakuru b’Abisirayeli ntihagira ico ibagira; nuko bīrābira Imana, bararya, baranywa." 
Exodus24:12 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Dūga, uze aho ndi kur’ uyu musozi, ugumeho; nanje nzoguha ibisate vy’amabuye birikw ivyagezwe n’amabgirizwa, ivyo nanditse ng’ uvyigishe." 
Exodus24:13 Mose avana hasi na Yosuwa umufasha wiwe, adūga ku musozi w’Imana." 
Exodus24:14 Abarira ba bakuru, ati Muturorērere hano, mushitse aho tuzogarukira aho muri; kandi rāba, musigaranye Aroni na Huri; ni hagira ūpfa ikintu n’uwundi, az’ aze kuri bo, yitware." 
Exodus24:15 Nuko Mose adūga kur’ uwo musozi, ca gicu c’igipfungu kirawutwīkīra." 
Exodus24:16 Ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buguma kur’ uwo musozi Sinayi, ico gipfungu kiwutwīkīra imisi itandatu; ku musi ugira indwi, Uhoraho ahamagara Mose n’ijwi rirenga ari mur’ ico gicu c’igipfungu." 
Exodus24:17 Ishusho y’ubgiza bg’Uhoraho, Abisirayeli bayibona isa n’umuriro utōngōra, ku gatwe k’uyo musozi." 
Exodus24:18 Nuko Mose adwēbēra hagati mur’ ico gipfungu, adūga kur’ uwo musozi; awumarakw imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine." 
Exodus25:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus25:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli bankoranirize amashikanwa; muze mwākīrire umuntu wese aritanze rivuye ku mutima. 
Exodus25:3 Kand’ amashikanwa muzobākīrira az’ abe aya: amazahabu, n’amafeza, n’imiringa," 
Exodus25:4 n’inyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’ izera derere, n’ubushenza bg’ impene;" 
Exodus25:5 n’insāto z’impfizi z’ intama zazizwe mu gahama, n’ insāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, n’imbaho z’ibiti vyitwa imishita," 
Exodus25:6 n’amavuta y’amatara, n’ibintu bimoga vyo kuvanga n’amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, n’ ibindi vyo kwosa bitamirana;" 
Exodus25:7 n’utubuyenge twitwa shohamu, n’utundi tubuyenge two gutēra ku mwambaro witwa efodi no ku mwambaro wo mu gikiriza." 
Exodus25:8 Kandi bangirire ahēra ho kuba, kugira ngo nze ngerēre hagati muri bo." 
Exodus25:9 Nk’ukw ivyo ngira nkwereke vyose bimeze, mu vy’ikigereranyo c’iryo hema nzobamwo, no mu vy’ikigereranyo c’ibintu vyaryo vyose, abe ari ko muzobikora." 
Exodus25:10 Nuko baze babāze isandugu mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bg’umurambararo bgayo buze bube amatambge abiri n’igice y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubaguke bgayo bube itambge rimwe n’igice, uburebure bg’igihagararo bube itambge rimwe n’igice nyene." 
Exodus25:11 Uz’ uyomekekw izahabu iramuye imbere n’inyuma, kand’ uz’ uyikīkūzek’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus25:12 Kand’ uz’ uvugutire izahabu, ukūremw’ ibigombo bine vyo kuyitērako, ubitēre ku maguru yayo ukw ar’ ane, ibigombo bibiri bibe ku ruhande rumwe, bindi bibiri bibe ku rundi." 
Exodus25:13 Kand’ uz’ ubāze iminiho mu mushita, uyomekekw izahabu." 
Exodus25:14 Uheze winjize iyo miniho yo kurerura iyo sandugu mur’ ivyo bigombo vyo ku mpande zayo. 
Exodus25:15 Iyo miniho yame mu bigombo vy’isandugu, ntiz’ isokōrwe." 
Exodus25:16 Kand’ uz’ ushire mur’ iyo sandugu Ibishinga intahe nzoguha. 
Exodus25:17 Uz’ ucure n’umutemere wo guhongerako mw izahabu iramuye; uburebure bgawo bg’ umurambararo buze bube amatambge abiri n’igihimba y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgawo bube itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus25:18 Kand’ uz’ ukore abakerubi babiri mw izahabu, mu mitwe yompi y’uwo mutemere wo guhongerako, ubakoze mu buryo bgo gucura." 
Exodus25:19 Kand’ umukerubi umwe abe mu mutwe umwe, uwundi abe mu wundi; kand’ abo bakerubi ubashamike kur’ uwo mutemere wo guhongerako mu mitwe yawo yompi, babe kimwe na wo." 
Exodus25:20 Abo bakerubi babe abashanje amababa hejuru, ayo mababa yabo ngw akingīre uwo mutemere wo guhongerako, barābane; bashire amaso kur’ uwo mutemere." 
Exodus25:21 Uheze urumye uwo mutemere wo guhongerako kuri ya sandugu, uyishizemwo vya Bishinga intahe nzoguha." 
Exodus25:22 Aho ni ho nzohora mbonanira nawe, nkakubarira ivyo ngushikirije vyose vy’ivyagezwe ngeze Abisirayeli, ndi hejuru y’uwo mutemere wo guhongerako, hagati y’abo bakerubi bo kw isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe." 
Exodus25:23 Kand’ uz’ ubāze ameza mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bgayo bg’umurambararo bube amatambge abiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bube itambge rimwe, uburebure bg’igihagararo bube itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus25:24 Uz’ uyomekekw izahabu iramuye, uyakīkūze umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus25:25 Uz’ uyabāzire ibizingiti vyo kugumya amaguru biyakīkūze impande zose, ubgaguke bgavyo bungane n’urushi, ubikīkūzek’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus25:26 Kand’ uz’ uyacurire ibigombo bine mw izahabu, ubitēre ku nkokora ukw ari zine zo ku maguru yayo ukw ar’ ane." 
Exodus25:27 Ivyo bigombo bibe hafi ya vya bizingiti, bibe ivyo kwinjizamw’ iminiho yo kurerura ayo meza." 
Exodus25:28 Kand’ uz’ ubāze iminiho mu mushita, uyomekekw izahabu, ibe iyo kurerura ameza." 
Exodus25:29 Kand’ uz’ ucure amasahani n’udukombe vy’ayo meza, bo n’amakarabo n’imibehe vyayo vyo gusukisha ibiturire ku gicaniro: uz’ ubicure mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus25:30 Uz’ utereke kur’ ayo meza imitsima y’ibiterekērwa, yame imbere yanje na ntaryo." 
Exodus25:31 Kand’ uz’ ukore ico guterekakw amatara mw izahabu iramuye; ico gitereko cose, hamwe n’intebe yaco n’umutumba waco, kize kibe igicurano; ibikombe vyaco, bigizwe bga mapfundo apfundikiyekw amashurwe, bize bicurirwe kuri co, bibe kimwe na co." 
Exodus25:32 Kandi kize kigire amashami atandatu mu mbavu zaco: mu ruhande rumwe rw’ico gitereko haze habe amashami atatu, mu rundi ruhande rwaco habe yandi atatu." 
Exodus25:33 Ishami rimwe rize rigire ibikombe bitatu bisa n’amashurwe y’igiti citwa shakedi, igikombe cose kigirwe bga pfundo ripfundikiyekw ishurwe; n’irindi shami n’uko: amashami yose ukw ar’ atandatu ashamitse kur’ ico gitereko abe ari kw amera." 
Exodus25:34 Kand’ umutumba w’ico gitereko uz’ ugire ibikombe bine, bisa n’ayo mashurwe ya shakedi nyene, bigizwe bga mapfundo apfundikiyekw amashurwe;" 
Exodus25:35 ah’ amashami ashamikiye kur’ ico gitereko hose ukw ar’ atandatu, haze habe ipfundo ahahera musi ah’ amashami ahūrira bicuriwe kuri co, bibe kimwe." 
Exodus25:36 Amapfundo yaco n’ amashami yaco bicurirwe kuri co, bibe kimwe na co: cose hamwe kibe igicurano gicuzwe mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus25:37 Uheze uz’ ugicurire amatara ndwi, ayo matara az’ aterekwe kuri co uburyo butuma abonesha imbere yaco." 
Exodus25:38 Imakasi zaco zo gutunganya urutambi, bo n’udusahani two gushirwak’ umunyota warwo, bize bicurwe mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus25:39 Ico gitereko, bo n’ivyo bintu vyaco vyose, bize bikorwe mw izahabu iramuye, inganye kuriba n’italanto imwe." 
Exodus25:40 Uz’ ugire umwete wo kubikoresha, ubigereranije n’ikigereranyo cavyo werekewe kur’ uyu musozi." 
Exodus26:1 Maz’ ihema ry’imbere uz’ urikore urtya: urikoreshe impuzu cumi; izo mpuzu zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, no mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama; zize zijishwekw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi, bijishwe n’abahinga bavyo." 
Exodus26:2 Uburebure bg’impuzu yose buze bube amatambge mirongwibiri n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bube amatambge ane: impuzu zose zibe cabugerwe." 
Exodus26:3 Impuzu zitanu zirōngōranywe ukwazo, zindi zitanu zirōngōranywe ukwazo." 
Exodus26:4 Kand’ uz’ utēre utugombo tw’udutambara tw’amasufe ku ruhande rumwe rw’impuzu iherera izarōngōranijwe za mbere; uheze utēre n’utundi tugombo nk’utwo ku ruhande rw’ impuzu iherera izindi mu zārōngōranijwe za kabiri. 
Exodus26:5 Utugombo tuze tube mirongwitanu utwo utēye ku mpuzu imwe, no mu zindi za kabiri zārōngōranijwe, utēre utundi mirongwitanu nyene ku ruhande rw’īherera izindi; utwo tugombo dutumberane." 
Exodus26:6 Uz’ ucure uturinda mirongwitanu mw izahabu, udufatanishe izo mpuzu zārōngōranijwe: kugira ngw iryo hema ricike rimwe ryiramvuriye." 
Exodus26:7 Kand’ uz’ ujishe impuzu mu bushenza bg’impene, zibe ihema ryo hejuru ryo gupfuka iryo hema ry’imbere: ujishe impuzu cumi n’imwe." 
Exodus26:8 Uburebure bg’ impuzu yose bube amatambge mirongwitatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bube amatambge ane; izo mpuzu ukw ar’ icumi n’imwe zibe cabugerwe." 
Exodus26:9 Urōngōranye impuzu zitanu ukwazo, zitandatu na zo ukwazo: iya gatandatu uyikubemwo kubiri ku rwinjiriro rw’ihema." 
Exodus26:10 Kand’ uz’ utēre utugombo mirongwitanu ku ruhande rw’impuzu iherera izarōngōranijwe za mbere, uheze utēre n’utundi mirongwitanu nyene ku ruhande rw’impuzu iherera izindi mu zārōngōranijwe za kabiri." 
Exodus26:11 Kand’ uz’ ucure uturinda mirongwitanu mu miringa, utwinjize mur’ utwo tugombo, ufatanye ivyo bihimba vy’iryo hema, ricike rimwe ryiramvuriye." 
Exodus26:12 Ikizosāguka mu mpuzu z’ihema ryo hejuru, igihimba kizosāguka, kize cēnēnere ahahera inyuma kur’ iryo hema ry’imbere." 
Exodus26:13 Ku mpuzu z’ihema ryo hejuru, ibihimba bizorenga vy’itambge rimwe‐rimwe ku mpande zompi, bize vyēnēnere mu mbavu z’iryo hema ry’imbere, biritwikire." 
Exodus26:14 Kand’ uz’ ubarīranye ico kurenza hejuru y’iryo hema ryo hejuru mu nsāto z’amapfizi y’ intama zizizwe mu gahama, hejuru yaco uz’ ukirenzekw ikindi gikozwe mu nsāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi." 
Exodus26:15 Kand’ uz’ ubāze imbaho mu giti c’umushita zo guhagarika iryo hema ry’imbere, uzishinge." 
Exodus26:16 Uburebure bg’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe buze bube amatambge cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgarwo bube itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus26:17 Kandi ku rubaho rumwe‐rumwe haze habe inkago zibiri zirume kuri rwo: ukw abe ari k’uzokora ku mbaho zose z’iryo hema. 
Exodus26:18 Nuko rer’ uz’ ubāze izo mbaho z’iryo hema, izo mu ruhande ahahera i bumanuko zibe mirongwibiri." 
Exodus26:19 Kand’ uz’ ucure ibitereko mirongwine mw ifeza, bije musi y’izo mbaho ukw ari mirongwibiri: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bije musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe, vyo kurokezwamwo za nkago ukw ari zibiri, birtyo birtyo." 
Exodus26:20 Kand’ uz’ ubāze izindi mbaho mirongwibiri z’urundi ruhande rw’iryo hema, ruhera i burārūko," 
Exodus26:21 na zo uzicurire ibitereko vyazo mirongwine mw ifeza: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bije musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe. 
Exodus26:22 Kand’ uz’ ubāze imbaho zitandatu z’ahahera inyuma kur’ iryo hema, hahera i burengerazuba." 
Exodus26:23 Kand’ utek’ ubāze imbaho zibiri zo ku mfuruka z’iryo hema, ahahera inyuma nyene." 
Exodus26:24 Hasi zibe zibiri‐zibiri, arikw ahahera hejuru zimatanywe, ah’ ikigombo ca mbere kigera: abe ari ko zimera zompi; zibe izo ku mfuruka zompi z’ahahera inyuma." 
Exodus26:25 Nukw izo mbaho zose na zose zizoba munani, n’ibitereko vyazo vy’ifeza cumi na bitandatu: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bije musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe." 
Exodus26:26 Kand’ uz’ ubāze ibiti vy’ intumba mu giti citwa umushita: ibiti bitanu vyo kuja ku mbaho zo ku ruhande rumwe rw’iryo hema," 
Exodus26:27 n’ibindi bitanu vyo kuja ku zo ku rundi ruhande rwaryo, n’ibindi bitanu vyo kuja ku z’ ahahera inyuma kur’ iryo hema nyene, ahahera i burengerazuba." 
Exodus26:28 Igiti co hagati y’ibindi, kiri hagati kur’ izo mbaho, kize kibe umwishikira." 
Exodus26:29 Kand’ izo mbaho uz’ uzomekekw izahabu, uheze uzicurire ibigombo vy’izahabu vyo gusobekamwo vya biti; n’ivyo biti na vyo uz’ uvyomekekw izahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Nuk’ uz’ ushinge iryo hema, nk’ukw ikigereranyo caryo werekewe kur’ uyu musozi kimeze." 
Exodus26:31 Kand’ uz’ ujishe igihuzu co gukingīra, ukijishe mu nyuzi z’ amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza; kize kijishwekw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi, bijishwe n’abahinga bavyo." 
Exodus26:32 Uz’ ukimanike ku misumari yacuzwe mw izahabu, iri ku nkingi zine zabājwe mu giti c’ umushita zometswekw izahabu, zineze mu bitereko bine vy’ifeza." 
Exodus26:33 Kand’ ico gihuzu uz’ ukimanike ugitumbereje musi ya twa turinda, uze winjize ya sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe hirya yaco: ico gihuzu kize kibabere ico gutandukanya Ahēra n’Ahēra cane." 
Exodus26:34 Kandi wa mutemere wo guhongerako uz’ uwurumye kur’ iyo sandugu y’ Ibishinga intahe, ir’ Ahēra cane." 
Exodus26:35 Kandi ya meza uz’ uyashire hino y’ico gihuzu, na ca giterekwakw amatara uz’ ugishire ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko mur’ iryo hema, aharābana n’ayo meza; ayo meza na yo uyaherereze mu ruhande rw’i burārūko." 
Exodus26:36 Wongere ujishe n’igihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’ihema, mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, kijererenzwekw amabara n’ abahinga." 
Exodus26:37 Kand’ uz’ ubāze inkingi zitanu mu giti c’umushita z’ico gihuzu co gukinga, uzomekekw izahabu: imisumari yo kuri zo icurwe mw izahabu nyene; kand’ uz’ uvugutire imiringa, uyikūremw’ ibitereko bitanu vyo kunegamw’ izo nkingi." 
Exodus27:1 Kand’ uz’ ubāze igicaniro mu giti c’umushita, uburebure bgaco bube amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bube atanu nyene; ico gicaniro kize kingane impande zose. Kand’ uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo buze bube amatambge atatu." 
Exodus27:2 Ku nkokora zaco ukw ari zine uz’ ugihe amahembe, ayo mahembe yaco az’ abāzirwe kuri co, abe kimwe na co; uheze ucomekekw imiringa." 
Exodus27:3 Kand’ uz’ ugicurire inzavya zo kuyoreramw’ umunyota waco, n’ibintu vyo kuwuyoza, bo n’imibehe yaco, n’ivyo kwōkōza inyama, n’ivyo kurahuza: ivyo bintu vyaco vyose ubicure mu miringa." 
Exodus27:4 Uz’ ugicurire ikintu c’insobane kimeze bga rusenga, ugicuze mu miringa; kand’ ico kintu kimeze nk’urusenga, uz’ ugitērekw ibigombo bine ku nkokora zaco ukw ari zine, ubicuze mu miringa." 
Exodus27:5 Ugishire musi y’ igikugīrwa gikīkūje ico gicaniro, kugira ngo gihēre hasi, kigarukire ahacagatije ico gicaniro nyene." 
Exodus27:6 Kand’ uz’ ubāzire ico gicaniro iminiho, iyo miniho uyibāze mu giti c’umushita, uyomekekw imiringa." 
Exodus27:7 Iyo miniho yaco ize yinjizwe mur’ ivyo bigombo, ibe mu mbavu zaco zompi mu kukirerura." 
Exodus27:8 Uz’ ukibāze mu mbaho, ukigire igisamāre: nk’uk’ uvyerekewe kur’ uyu musozi, az’ abe ari ko bakibāza." 
Exodus27:9 Kand’ uz’ ukore urugo rw’ iryo hema: ku ruhande ruhera i bumanuko, urwo rugo ruze rube urw’ impuzu zibamvye, zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, uburebure bgazo bg’amakika yo kur’ urwo ruhande buze bube amatambge ijana y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Exodus27:10 Ibirimbi zimanitsweko bize bibe mirongwibiri, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo bibe mirongwibiri nyene, bicuzwe mu miringa: imisumari yo kuri vyo iz’ icurwe mw ifeza, bo n’imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus27:11 No ku ruhande ruhera i burārūko n’uko, haze habe impuzu zibamvye, uburebure bgazo bg’amakika buze bube amatambge ijana nyene, n’ibirimbi vyazo bize bibe mirongwibiri, n’ibitereko vyavyo bibe mirongwibiri nyene bicuzwe mu miringa; imisumari yo kuri vyo iz’ icurwe mw ifeza, bo n’imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus27:12 Kand’ ubgaguke bg’ urwo rugo, ahahera i burengerazuba, haze habe impuzu zibamvye z’amatambge mirongwitanu, ibirimbi vyazo bize bibe cumi, n’ibitereko vyavyo bibe cumi nyene." 
Exodus27:13 Kand’ ubgaguke bg’urwo rugo, ahahera i burasirazuba, buze bube amatambge mirongwitanu." 
Exodus27:14 Ku ruhande rumwe ruhera kw irembo haze habe impuzu zibamvye z’amatambge cumi n’atanu; ibirimbi vyazo bize bibe bitatu, n’ibitereko vyavyo bibe bitatu nyene." 
Exodus27:15 Ku rundi ruhande haze habe impuzu zibamvye z’amatambge cumi n’atanu; ibirimbi vyazo bize bibe bitatu, n’ibitereko vyavyo bibe bitatu nyene." 
Exodus27:16 Kand’ irembo ry’ urwo rugo rize rigire igihuzu co kuhakinga c’amatambge mirongwibiri, kijishwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, kijererenzwekw amabara n’abahinga; bo n’ ibirimbi bine bitambagije, n’ibitereko vyavyo bine nyene." 
Exodus27:17 Ibirimbi vyose vy’urwo rugo vy’ impande zose bize bifatanywe n’ imitambikwa icuzwe mw ifeza, n’imisumari yo kuri vyo ibe ifeza nyene, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo bicurwe mu miringa." 
Exodus27:18 Uburebure bg’ amakika y’urwo rugo impande zompi buze bube amatambge ijana, n’ ubgaguke bgarwo bg’amakika buze bube amatambge mirongwitanu impande zompi, uburebure bgarwo bg’igihagararo buze bube amatambge atanu, ruze rube urw’ impuzu zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, kand’ ibitereko vy’ibirimbi vyarwo bize bicurwe mu miringa." 
Exodus27:19 Ibikoreshwa vyose vy’iryo hema vy’ ibikorwa vyaryo vyose, bo n’imambo zaryo zose, n’imambo zose z’urugo, bize bicurwe mu miringa." 
Exodus27:20 Kand’ uz’ ubarire Abisirayeli bakuzanire amavuta y’umwisengesure avuye muri elayo zisekuwe, ya ca giterekwakw amatara, kugira ngo haze hame har’ itara ryaka." 
Exodus27:21 Mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, hino ya ca gihuzu gikingiye vya Bishinga intahe, abe ari ho Aroni n’abana biwe bazokwama baritunganiriza, kugira ngo rize ryame ryaka imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, rihēre ku mugoroba rishitse mu gitondo. Iryo rize ribe ibgirizwa ry’intahava ryo kwitonderwa n’Abisirayeli ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus28:1 Kand’ uze wīgize hafi yawe Aroni mukurwawe n’abana biwe, ubarobanure mu Bisirayeli, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi: Aroni nyene, na Nadabu na Abihu, na Eleyazari na Itamari, abana biwe." 
Exodus28:2 Uz’ ujishishirize Aroni mukurwawe imyambaro, iz’ ibe iyejejwe, yo kumutera icubahiro no kumushariza." 
Exodus28:3 Kand’ uz’ ubgire abahinga bose, abo nujuje impwemu y’ubgenge, ngo bajishe imyambaro ya Aroni yo kumurobanura, kugira ngw ankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus28:4 Iyi abe ari yo myambaro bazojisha: umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza, n’umwambaro witwa efodi, n’umwinjiro, n’ikanzo y’insobane, n’igitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe, n’umukanda: nuko baze bajishire Aroni mukurwawe n’abana biwe imyambaro iz’ ibe iyejejwe, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus28:5 Baze bakoreshe intahe z’izahabu, n’inyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, n’izera derere." 
Exodus28:6 Umwambaro witwa efodi baze bawujishishe intahe z’izahabu, n’ inyuzi z’amasufe, n’iz’ amashigisha, n’izisa n’agahama, n’izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, ujishwe n’ abahinga bavyo." 
Exodus28:7 Uz’ ugire ibizāna bibiri vyo ku bitugu, bifate ku nzāno zayo zompi, kugira ngo biwufatanirize hamwe." 
Exodus28:8 Kand’ umusipi ujishwe n’abahinga, ujishiwe kuri wo, wo kuwukenyeza, uz’ ujishwe nka wo, ube kimwe na wo; baze bawujishe mu ntahe z’izahabu no mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza." 
Exodus28:9 Kand’ uze wābīre utubuyenge tubiri twitwa shohamu, utwandikekw amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe." 
Exodus28:10 Mu mazina yabo uze wandike atandatu ku kabuyenge kamwe, yandi atandatu uyandike ku kandi kabuyenge, nk’uko bakurikiranye." 
Exodus28:11 Nk’uk’ umuntu azi guca amagarwe ku kabuyenge ko kudoma ikimenyetso, abe ari ko nawe wandika amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli kur’ utwo tubuyenge twompi: uheze uturumike mu tugenegene tw’izahabu." 
Exodus28:12 Utēre utwo tubuyenge twompi ahahera ku bitugu ku bizāna vya efodi, tubere Abisirayeli utubuyenge two kwibukwako: Aroni aze yambare amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli ku bitugu vyiwe vyompi, ayazane imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, kuba icibutso." 
Exodus28:13 Kand’ uz’ ucure utugenegene mw izahabu," 
Exodus28:14 n’imigufu ibiri y’izahabu iramuye, uyigire nk’ imigozi itsivye; ivyo bitsibo vy’ imigufu ubirumye kur’ utwo tugenegene." 
Exodus28:15 Kand’ uz’ ujishishe umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza wo kwahukanya imanza: abahinga bavyo abe ari bo bawujisha; uko efodi ijishwe abe ari k’uwujishisha: uwujishishe mu ntahe z’izahabu no mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza. 
Exodus28:16 Uz’ ukorwe ukubiranijwe, uringanire impande zose: uburebure bgawo bube itambge rimwe ry’ intoke, n’ubgaguke bgawo bube itambge rimwe nyene." 
Exodus28:17 Kand’ uheze uwudombagizek’ utubuyenge mu mirongo ine: mu murongo wa mbere haze habe utubuyenge twitwa odemu na pitida na bareketi; 
Exodus28:18 mu wa kabiri habe utwitwa nofekina na safiro na yahalomu; 
Exodus28:19 mu wa gatatu habe utwitwa leshemu na shevo na akilama; 
Exodus28:20 mu wa kane habe utwitwa tarushishi na shohamu na yasipi: tuze tugende turumikwa mu tugenegene tw’izahabu. 
Exodus28:21 Utwo tubuyenge tunganye igitigiri n’amazina y’ abana ba Isirayeli: tube icumi na tubiri nk’ukw amazina yabo ar’ icumi n’abiri: tumere nk’utubuyenge two kudoma ibimenyetso, tugende twandikwakw izina mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe, tube utw’ iyo miryango ukw ar’ icumi n’ibiri." 
Exodus28:22 Kandi kur’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza uz’ uwushireko ya migufu icuzwe mw izahabu iramuye, ikozwe nk’imigozi itsivye." 
Exodus28:23 Uwo mupfuko uz’ uwucurire impeta zibiri z’izahabu, uzitēre ku mitwe yawo yompi yo haruguru." 
Exodus28:24 Uheze urumye iyo migufu yompi y’izahabu itsivye kur’ izo mpeta zompi zo ku mitwe y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza. 
Exodus28:25 Iyindi mitwe yompi y’ivyo bitsibo vyompi vy’imigufu uyirumye kur’ utwo tugenegene twompi, uyitēre kuri vya bizāna vya efodi vyo ku bitugu, ku ruhande rw’imbere." 
Exodus28:26 Kand’ uz’ ucure izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu, uzitēre ku mitwe yompi yo hepfo y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza, ku mubuga wawo, ku ruhande rw’ imbere ruhera kuri efodi." 
Exodus28:27 Kand’ uz’ ucure izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu, uzitēre ahahera imbere aho vya bizāna bibiri vya efodi vyo ku bitugu bitērewe, haruguru ya wa musipi wajishwe n’abahinga, wo gukenyeza efodi." 
Exodus28:28 Kand’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara ku gikiriza baze bawufatanishe impeta zawo n’impeta zo kuri efodi akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe, kugira ng’ ugume kuri wa musipi wa efodi wajishwe n’ abahinga, uwo mupfuko woye gukūrwa kuri efodi." 
Exodus28:29 Aroni, uko yinjiye Ahēra, aze yame yambara ku mutima amazina y’ abana ba Isirayeli ari kur’ uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza wo kwahukanya imanza, kugira ngw ayo mazina abe icibutso co gutuma bibukwa ubudasība imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus28:30 Kand’ uz’ ushire Urimu na Tumimu imbere mur’ uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza wo kwahukanya imanza, bibe ku mutima wa Aroni, uko yinjiye imbere yanje; Aroni aze yame yambara ivyo kwahukanya imanza z’Abisirayeli ubudasība, iy’ aje imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus28:31 Kand’ umwinjiro wo kwambarirwako efodi uz’ uwujishe mu nyuzi z’amasufe gusa; 
Exodus28:32 urwano rw’aho gucisha umutwe ruze rusaturwe muri wo hagati, kand’ urwo rwano ruze rutērwekw akandi kajishano kameze nk’umusōzo karukīkūze, rube nk’urwano rw’ikanzo y’icuma, kugira ngo ntiruze rucike." 
Exodus28:33 Ku mubuga wawo uz’ uwutērek’ udusa n’ amakomamanga dukozwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, dukīkūze uwo mubuga impande zose, kand’ uz’ ugende urarobekamw’ imidende y’izahabu iwukīkūze:" 
Exodus28:34 iyo midende y’izahabu iz’ irobekeranywe n’ayo makomamanga, bikīkūze umubuga w’uwo mwinjiro impande zose." 
Exodus28:35 Aroni aze yame awambara ukw agiye guhereza, kugira ngo ntapfe: kand’ ukujegera kwayo kuze kwame kwumvikana iyo yinjiye Ahēra imbere yanje n’iy’ asohotse." 
Exodus28:36 Uheze ucure akabāte mw izahabu iramuye, ukandikeko mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe, nk’ uko baca amagarwe ku kabuyenge ko kudoma ikimenyetso, uti YEREJWE UHORAHO." 
Exodus28:37 Ugapfundikishe akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’ amasufe, kuri ca gitambara kizingiriye mu mutwe." 
Exodus28:38 Kaze kabe mu ruhanga rwa Aroni, kandi Aroni az’ abe ari we arābgakw ibigabitanijwe mu vyera, ivyo Abisirayeli bazogenda batirimuka mu mashikanwa yabo yera bazotanga yose; kaze kame kaba mu ruhanga rwiwe na ntaryo, kugira ngo jewe Uhoraho mbone kwākīra amashikanwa yabo." 
Exodus28:39 Kandi ya kanzo uz’ uyijishe mu buryo bg’insobane mu nyuzi zera derere nziza; uz’ ujishe n’ igitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza, bo n’umukanda, abahinga bavyo bawujererengekw amabara." 
Exodus28:40 Kandi n’abana ba Aroni na bo uz’ ubajishire amakanzo, ubajishire n’imikanda n’udukofero, bibe ivyo kubatēra icubahiro no kubashariza." 
Exodus28:41 Iyo myambaro yose uz’ uyambike Aroni mukurwawe, bo n’abana biwe, ubasukekw amavuta, ubashikirize iryo bango, ubarobanure, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus28:42 Kand’ uz’ ubajishire amabutura mu nyuzi zera derere, bayambare ngo bapfuke ubgambure bgabo; ave mu rukenyerero ashike mu bibero," 
Exodus28:43 yambare Aroni n’ abana biwe, uko bagiye kwinjira mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, cank’ uko bagiye kwegera igicaniro ngo bakorere Ahēra; kugira ngo ntibagībgeko n’ibigabitanyo, bagapfa: ico kize kimubere icagezwe c’intahava, bo n’uruvyaro rwiwe uko ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Exodus29:1 Uku abe ari k’uzobagenza mu kubarobanura, ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi. Wābīre imasa y’umukangara n’impfizi z’intama zibiri zitagira agasembga," 
Exodus29:2 n’imitsima itambiwe, n’udutsima tutambiwe twacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, n’utundi dutsima tutambiwe nyene tubēhūye, dusutswekw amavuta ya elayo, uyicumvye mw ifu y’ingano igogōretse." 
Exodus29:3 Uyishire mu ndumane imwe, uyizanane na ya masa na za mpfizi z’intama zompi." 
Exodus29:4 Kandi Aroni n’abana biwe uz’ ubazane ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ubūhagirireho." 
Exodus29:5 Wābīre ya myambaro, uheze wambike Aroni ya kanzo, na wa mwinjiro wo kwambarirwako efodi, umwambike na efodi nyene, na wa mupfuko wo kwambarwa mu gikiriza, umukenyeze na wa musipi wa efodi ujishwe n’abahinga;" 
Exodus29:6 umwambike na ca gitambara mu mutwe, ugishireko na ca gitsibo cera." 
Exodus29:7 Maze wābīre amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, uyamusuke mu mutwe, uyamurobanuze." 
Exodus29:8 Uheze uzane n’abana biwe, ubambike ya makanzo." 
Exodus29:9 Aroni n’abana biwe ubakenyeze imikanda, ubambike na twa dukofero: maze bazoba begukiye ubuherezi, kibe icagezwe c’intahava: ushikirize Aroni n’abana biwe iryo bango." 
Exodus29:10 Uz’ uzane ya masa imbere y’ ihema ry’ibonaniro: Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambike ibiganza mu ruhanga. 
Exodus29:11 Uyikererere imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus29:12 Wābīre ku maraso y’iyo masa, uyasīgīshe urutoke ku mahembe y’igicaniro, amaraso yose uheze uyavyagize ahahera hasi ku gicaniro." 
Exodus29:13 Maze wābīre urubambanda rwose rwōrōshe amara, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, n’amafyigo yompi, n’ ibinure bifashe kuri yo, uvyosereze ku gicaniro." 
Exodus29:14 Arikw inyama z’iyo masa, n’urusato rwayo, n’amayezi yayo, ubituririre inyuma y’insago: kizoba ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Exodus29:15 Uteko wābīre impfizi y’ intama imwe muri za zindi; Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambike ibiganza mu ruhanga. 
Exodus29:16 Uyikerere, wābīre amaraso yayo uyamijagire ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Exodus29:17 Uyijanjagure, uyishire mu bikenye vyayo, uronge amara yayo bo n’ ibikenye vyayo vy’amaguru, ubirunde hamwe n’ibindi bikenye vyayo n’umutwe wayo." 
Exodus29:18 Uheze wosereze ivy’ iyo ntama vyose ku gicaniro: kizoba ar’ ikimazi noserejwe, jewe Uhoraho, n’umubabge umota neza, ikimazi nshikaniwe, gitōngōwe n’umuriro." 
Exodus29:19 Maz’ uze wābīre iyo mpfizi y’intama ya kabiri, Aroni n’abana biwe na yo bayirambike ibiganza mu ruhanga." 
Exodus29:20 Uheze uyikerere, wābīre ku maraso yayo, uyakoze ku gutwi kw’i buryo kwa Aroni ahahera hejuru, no ku matwi y’i buryo y’abana biwe ahahera hejuru nyene, no ku bikumu vyabo vy’i buryo, no ku mano yabo manini y’i buryo, ayandi uyamijagire ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Exodus29:21 Wābīre ku maraso yo ku gicaniro, no kuri ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, ubicucagire Aroni n’imyambaro yiwe, n’abana biwe n’imyambaro yabo; nukw azoba yejejwe, bo n’imyambaro yiwe, n’abana biwe n’ imyambaro yabo."
