Exodus29:22 Uheze wābīre ibinure vy’iyo mpfizi y’intama, n’umurizo wayo uko wagahometsekw ibinure, n’ urubambanda rwōrōshe amara, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, n’ amafyigo yompi, n’ibinure bihometse kuri yo, n’igikenye c’ukuguru kwayo kw’i buryo, kukw ar’ impfizi y’intama yo kubinjiza mur’ iryo bango;" 
Exodus29:23 wābīre n’umutsima umwe muri ya yindi, n’ agatsima kamwe kācumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, n’akandi kamwe kabēhūye, uyikūye muri ya ndumane y’imitsima itambiwe izoba iteretse imbere yanje;" 
Exodus29:24 ivyo vyose ubishire ku mashi ya Aroni no ku y’abana biwe, ubizunguze, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje." 
Exodus29:25 Uheze ubikūre ku mashi yabo, uvyosereze ku gicaniro, ubigeretse kuri ca kimazi coshejwe, bibe umubabge umota neza imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho: ico kizoba ar’ ikimazi nshikaniwe gitōngōwe n’umuriro." 
Exodus29:26 Kandi wābīre inkoro y’iyo mpfizi y’ intama yo kwinjiza Aroni mur’ iryo bango, uyizunguze, ibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje; iyo izoba umwanya wawe." 
Exodus29:27 Kand’ uz’ urobanure ya nkoro ishikanishwa kuzunguzwa, na ca gikenye c’ukuguru kigerewe abaherezi, co kuzunguzwa nyene, gishinguwe kuri ya mpfizi y’intama yo kubinjiza mw ibango, ari vyo bigerewe Aroni n’abana biwe." 
Exodus29:28 Ivyo bizoba umuturi Aroni n’abana biwe bazohora bashingura mu Bisirayeli ibihe vyose, kukw ar’ umwanya w’abaherezi mu mashikanwa y’ishimwe Abisirayeli bazohora bashikana; rizoba ishikanwa bangereye, jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus29:29 Kand’ imyambaro yejejwe ya Aroni izoba n’iy’ abana biwe bazomusubirira mu gishingo: baze bayambare mu gihe basukwakw amavuta yo kubarobanura mu gushikirizwa iryo bango. 
Exodus29:30 Umwana wiwe amusubiriye mu gishingo c’ubuherezi az’ ayambare imisi ndwi, ukw agiye kwinjira mw ihema ry’ibonaniro guhērereza Ahēra." 
Exodus29:31 Kandi wābīre ivya ya mpfizi y’intama yo kubinjiza mur’ iryo bango, uteke inyama zayo ahantu hejejwe." 
Exodus29:32 Aroni n’abana biwe bazirishe ya mitsima yo mu ndumane, babirīre ku muryango w’ ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus29:33 Babirye, ar’ ivyatanzwe kubabera impongano, ngo binjizwe mur’ iryo bango, bezwe; arik’ ūtar’ umuherezi ntaz’ abiryeko, kukw ar’ ivyera." 
Exodus29:34 Izo nyama z’ico kimazi cabinjije mw ibango, cank’ imitsima, ni haramuka hagize igisigara, kikarāra, uz’ ugiturire: ntikize kiribge, kukw ar’ icera." 
Exodus29:35 Ivyo abe ari vyo uzogirira Aroni n’abana biwe, nk’uko ndabikugeze vyose: uz’ umare imisi ndwi ukora ivyo kubinjiza mw ibango." 
Exodus29:36 Uko bukeye uz’ ukerere ben’ iyo masa y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ibe impongano; kand’ igicaniro uz’ ugitangire impongano yo kugitunganya, uz’ ugisukekw amavuta, uceze." 
Exodus29:37 Uz’ umare imisi ndwi utangira impongano ico gicaniro, uceze; maze kizoba icera cane; ikizogikorako cose kizoba kibaye icera, kibe inyegu yaco." 
Exodus29:38 Ibi abe ari vyo uzohora utangira kur’ ico gicaniro: uko bukeye, uz’ utange abagazi b’ intama babiri batarengeje umwaka, ubudasība." 
Exodus29:39 Umwagazi umwe uz’ uwutange mu gitondo, uwundi ku mugoroba." 
Exodus29:40 Umwagazi wa mbere uz’ uwutangane n’ifu igogōretse y’ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta avuye muri elayo zisekuwe y’ikigira kane c’ ingero yitwa hini, utange n’ikigira kane ca hini nyene ya vino, ribe ishikanwa ry’ibiturire." 
Exodus29:41 Uwundi mwagazi uz’ uwutange ku mugoroba, uwutangane n’ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, nk’ ivyo mu gitondo, bibe umubabge umota neza, ikimazi nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, gitōngōrwa n’ umuriro." 
Exodus29:42 Bizoba ibimazi vyo kwoswa vy’intasība ukw ibihe vy’ urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, bitangirwa ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro imbere yanje: aho ni ho nzohora mbonanira namwe, ni ho nzoyāgira nawe." 
Exodus29:43 Aho ni ho nzobonanira n’Abisirayeli; kand’ iryo hema rizokwezwa n’ubgiza bganje. 
Exodus29:44 Nzokweza iryo hema ry’ibonaniro bo n’igicaniro; na Aroni n’abana biwe nzobeza, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus29:45 Kandi nzoba hagati mu Bisirayeli, mbe Imana yabo." 
Exodus29:46 Na bo bazomenya yuko nd’Uhoraho Imana yabo, yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, kugira ngo nze mbe hagati muri bo: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Exodus30:1 Kand’ uz’ ubāze igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu: ukibāze mu giti citwa umushita. 
Exodus30:2 Uburebure bgaco bube itambge rimwe ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bube itambge rimwe nyene; kize kingane impande zose; uburebure bgaco bg’ igihagararo buze bube amatambge abiri; amahembe yaco az’ abāzirwe kuri co, abe kimwe na co." 
Exodus30:3 Kand’ uz’ ucomekekw izahabu iramuye, hejuru kuri co, no mu mbavu zaco impande zose, no ku mahembe yaco; kand’ uz’ ugikīkūzek’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus30:4 Musi y’uwo muguno waco, ahahera mu mbavu zaco zompi, uz’ ugicurire ibigombo bibiri‐bibiri vy’ izahabu; mu mpande zaco zompi abe ari ho ubitera, bibe ivyo kwinjizamw’ iminiho yo kukirerura." 
Exodus30:5 Kand’ iyo miniho uz’ uyibāze mu giti c’ umushita, uyomekekw izahabu." 
Exodus30:6 Kand’ uz’ ugishire hino ya ca gihuzu kir’ ahahera kw isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, hino ya wa mutemere wo guhongerako, upfutse ivyo Bishinga intahe, aho nzohora mbonanira nawe." 
Exodus30:7 Aroni az’ ahore acoserezakw imibavu y’ibintu bimoga: az’ ayose uko bukeye mu gitondo, agiye gutunganya ya matara." 
Exodus30:8 No ku mugoroba, Aroni ukw agiye kudomeka ayo matara, az’ ayose: ibe imibavu yo kwoswa y’intahava imbere yanje, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus30:9 Ntimuze mucoserezekw imibavu itemewe, canke ngo mucoserezekw ikimazi, canke ngo mugishirekw ishikanwa ry’ifu, canke ngo mukivyagizekw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire." 
Exodus30:10 Aroni az’ ahongere ico gicaniro rimwe gusa mu mwaka; amaraso y’ikimazi c’impongano gitangirwa ivyaha az’ ayakoze ku mahembe yaco, abe ari yo akibera impongano rimwe gusa mu mwaka, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana: ico gicaniro kizoba icera cane, cerejwe jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus30:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus30:12 ati Ni waharūra igitigiri c’Abisirayeli, abaharūwe uko bangana, umuntu wese muri bo az’ ampe incungu y’ubugingo bgiwe mu gihe ubaharūra, kugira ngw ikīza ntikibatēre igihe ubaharūra." 
Exodus30:13 Iyi abe ari yo ncungu batanga, umuntu wese ukw arēngāna ashirwa mu gitigiri c’abaharūwe, atange ikigabane ca shekeli yagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra: shekeli imwe irimwo gera mirongwibiri; ikigabane ca shekeli kize kibe ari co banshikanira." 
Exodus30:14 Umuntu wese arēngāna agashirwa mu gitigiri c’abaharūwe, amaze imyaka mirongwibiri cank’ isāga, az’ anshikanire iryo shikanwa." 
Exodus30:15 Abatunzi ntibarenze aho, n’aboro ntibagabanye, kur’ ico kigabane ca shekeli, ni banshikanira iryo shikanwa ryo kuba impongano y’ ubugingo bgabo." 
Exodus30:16 Nuk’ uze wake Abisirayeli ayo mahera y’ impongano, uyakoreshe ibikorwa vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro, abere Abisirayeli icibutso kizotuma mpora mbibuka, abe impongano y’ubugingo bgabo." 
Exodus30:17 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus30:18 at’ Uz’ ucure ikigārigāri mu miringa co gukaraba, kigire n’intebe y’ umuringa nyene; uz’ ugishire hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ igicaniro, ugisukemw’ amazi." 
Exodus30:19 Aroni n’abana biwe az’ abe ari ho bahora bakaraba, boge ibirenge." 
Exodus30:20 Iyo bagiye kwinjira mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, baze bakarabe, boge, kugira ngo ntibapfe, n’iyo bagiye kwegera igicaniro guhereza, ngo banyosereze ibimazi bitōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Exodus30:21 Nuko baze bakarabe, boge ibirenge, kugira ngo ntibapfe: bize bibere Aroni n’uruvyaro rwiwe icagezwe c’intahava ukw ibihe vy’ urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus30:22 Kand’ Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus30:23 at’ Uze wābīre imibavu iruta iyindi, ni yo iyi: isenga ishongerana igezwe kuri shekeli amajana atanu, bo n’ikigabane c’urwo rugero, ari zo shekeli amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, ca mudarasini imota neza; wābīre na kanehe imota neza igezwe kuri shekeli amajana abiri na mirongwitanu nyene," 
Exodus30:24 na kesiya ya shekeli amajana atanu, zigezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra, bo n’ingero imwe yitwa hini y’ amavuta ya elayo." 
Exodus30:25 Ivyo ubitunganye, bihinduke amavuta yera yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, abe amavuta atāmirana, nk’ayinjijwe n’abahinga babimogoreye: az’ abe amavuta yera yo kurobanura." 
Exodus30:26 Uyasuke kw ihema ry’ibonaniro no kuri ya sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe," 
Exodus30:27 no kuri ya meza no ku bintu vyayo vyose, no kuri ca giterekwakw amatara no ku bintu vyaco, no kuri ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu," 
Exodus30:28 no kuri ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi no ku bintu vyaco vyose, no kuri ca kigārigāri co gukaraba no ku ntebe yaco." 
Exodus30:29 Ubirobanure, kugira ngo bize bibe ivyera cane: ikizobikorako cose kizoba kibaye icera, kibe inyegu yavyo." 
Exodus30:30 Kand’ uz’ uyasuke no kuri Aroni no ku bana biwe, ubarobanure, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus30:31 Uz’ ubarire Abisirayeli, ut’ Ayo azoba amavuta yiwe yera yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, ukw ibihe vy’ urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus30:32 Ntaz’ asukwe ku mubiri w’ūtar’ umuherezi, kandi ntimuze mukore ayandi ahwanye na yo, uko yavanzwe: azoba ar’ ayera, namwe az’ ababere ayera." 
Exodus30:33 Umuntu wese azovanga āhwanye na yo, canke ngw ayasuke k’ūtar’ umuherezi, az’ arandurwe mu bgoko bgabo." 
Exodus30:34 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uze wābīre ibintu bimoga, ni vy’ibi: natalu, na sheheleti, na helebena: ivyo bintu bimoga ubivange na lebona itagira indobeke; vyose binganye uburemerezi;" 
Exodus30:35 ubitunganye bihinduke imibavu nk’ iyakozwe n’abahinga babimogoreye, irunzwe umunyu, itarobetse ikindi, yejejwe." 
Exodus30:36 Uze wābīre kuri yo, uyisye, uyigogōre, uyishire imbere ya vya Bishinga intahe mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, aho nzohora mbonanira nawe; iz’ ibabere iyera cane." 
Exodus30:37 Kand’ iyo mibavu uzotunganya, ntimuze mwironderere iyindi ihwanye n’iyo uko yavanzwe; iz’ ibabere iyerejwe jewe Uhoraho." 
Exodus30:38 Umuntu wese azokera īhwanye na yo, ngw az’ ayīmotereze, az’ arandurwe mu bgoko bgabo." 
Exodus31:1 Uhoraho yongera kubarira Mose," 
Exodus31:2 at’ Ehe rāba, ntoranije Besaleli mwene Uri, Uri mwene Huri, wo mu muryango wa Yuda;" 
Exodus31:3 kandi ndamwujuje impwemu yanje, kugira ngw agire ubgenge no gutahura no kumenya n’ubuhinga bg’uburyo bgose," 
Exodus31:4 mu vyo kwigenera ibikorwa vy’ubuhanga, no mu vyo gucura izahabu n’ ifeza n’imiringa," 
Exodus31:5 no mu vyo gukeba utubuyenge two kurumikwa mw izahabu, no mu bubāji, no mu vy’ubuhinga bg’uburyo bgose." 
Exodus31:6 Kandi rāba, ndamushizeko Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki, wo mu muryango wa Dani; kandi mu mitima y’abantu bose b’ abahinga ndayishizemw’ ubgenge, ngo bakore ivyo nakubariye vyose, ni vy’ibi:" 
Exodus31:7 rya hema ry’ibonaniro, na ya sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, na wa mutemere wo guhongerako, n’ibindi bintu vyose vyo mur’ iryo hema;" 
Exodus31:8 na ya meza n’ibintu vyayo, na ca giterekwakw amatara c’izahabu iramuye, n’ibintu vyaco vyose, na ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu;" 
Exodus31:9 na ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi n’ibintu vyaco vyose, na ca kigārigāri n’intebe yaco;" 
Exodus31:10 na ya myambaro ijishitse, ni yo myambaro yejejwe yo kwambara Aroni umuherezi, n’iy’abana biwe, yo gukoramw’ igikorwa c’ubuherezi;" 
Exodus31:11 na ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, na ya mibavu y’ibintu bimoga yo kwosereza Ahēra: ivyo vyose baze babikore nk’uko nyene ndabikugeze." 
Exodus31:12 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus31:13 ati Kand’ uz’ ubarire Abisirayeli, uti Ntimuze mubure kuziririza amasabato yiwe; uti Kukw ari yo kimenyetso hagati yiwe namwe ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, kugira ngo mumenye kw ari we Uhoraho yama abeza." 
Exodus31:14 Uti Nuko muze muziririze isabato, kukw ar’ iyera kuri mwebge; umuntu wese azoyizirūra ntaz’ abure kwicwa: mber’ uwogira ic’ akora cose kur’ uwo musi, az’ arandurwe mu bgoko bgabo." 
Exodus31:15 Mu misi itandatu abe ari ho ibikorwa bikorerwa, arik’ ūgira indwi n’isabato yo kuruhūka bihebuje, yerejwe jewe Uhoraho: ūzogira igikorwa na kimwe akora kur’ uwo musi w’isabato, ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Exodus31:16 Nukw Abisirayeli baze baziririze isabato, baze bayitondere ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana, rize ribe isezerano ry’intahava." 
Exodus31:17 N’ikimenyetso hagati yanje n’Abisirayeli kugeza ibihe vyose: kuko mu misi itandatu ari yo jewe Uhoraho naremeyemw’ ijuru n’isi, ku musi ugira indwi nkarangiza, nkaruhūka." 
Exodus31:18 Uhoraho amaze kubonanira na Mose kur’ uwo musozi Sinayi, amuha ibisate bibiri vyanditswekw Ibishinga intahe, ivyo bisate vyar’ ivy’ amabuye, vyanditsweko n’ urutoke rw’ Imana." 
Exodus32:1 Abantu babonye Mose atevye kur’ uwo musozi, atamanutse, bakoranira kuri Aroni, baramubarira, bat’ Enda, n’uturonkere imana zo kutuja imbere; kuk’ umwe Mose yadukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, tutazi ico yabaye." 
Exodus32:2 Aroni arabishura, ati Ni mukātūre impeta z’izahabu, ziri ku matwi y’abagore banyu no ku y’abahungu n’abakobga banyu, muzinzanire." 
Exodus32:3 Nukw abantu bose bakātūra impeta z’izahabu zo ku matwi yabo, bazishīra Aroni." 
Exodus32:4 Arazābīra, azivugutira mu nkero, azikūramw’ igishushanyo c’imasa, agitunganishije isinzo; baravuga, bati Yemwe Bisirayeli, ngiyo imana yanyu, yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus32:5 Aroni abibonye, yubaka igicaniro imbere yaco; arabitāngāza, aravuga, at’ Ejo hazoba umusi mukuru w’Uhoraho." 
Exodus32:6 Bukeye bakoroka kare, batanga ibimazi, baravyosa, bazana n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe; bicarikwa no kurya no kunywa, bava hasi baravyina." 
Exodus32:7 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Manuka ugende, kuko ba bantu bawe wakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa bamaze kwononekara." 
Exodus32:8 Inzira nabageze bayitaye ata n’akanya, bīronkeye igishushanyo c’imasa bakivugutiye mu nkero, bagisenze, bagihaye n’ibimazi, baravuga, bati Yemwe Bisirayeli, ngiyo imana yanyu, yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Exodus32:9 Uhoraho arongera abarira Mose, at’ Abo bantu ndababonye ico barimwo: n’abantu batagonda izosi;" 
Exodus32:10 none rer’ upfe kundeka gusa, uburake bganje bubarurumbeko, mbahonnye; ariko weho nze nguhindure ihanga rikomeye." 
Exodus32:11 Mose atakambira Uhoraho Imana yiwe, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho, n’iki gitumye uburake bgawe bururumba ku bantu bawe wakūje mu gihugu ca Egiputa ububasha bginshi n’ukuboko kw’inkomezi?" 
Exodus32:12 N’iki cotuma uha Abanyegiputa kuvuga, ngo Kubatēza ivyago ni kwo kwatumye ibakūra ino, ngw ibatsinde mu misozi miremire, ibahonnye mw isi? Enda se n’ushire uburake bgawe bg’inkazi, wigarure, ntutēze abantu bawe ivyo vyago." 
Exodus32:13 Ni wibuke Aburahamu na Isaka na Isirayeli, abasavyi bawe, abo wabariye wigize indahiro, uti Nzogwiza uruvyaro rwanyu, rungane n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru, kand’ iki gihugu cose mvuze nzogiha uruvyaro rwanyu, bacegukire ibihe vyose." 
Exodus32:14 Nuk’ Uhoraho arīgarura, areka ivyo vyago yari yavuze gutēza abantu biwe." 
Exodus32:15 Maze Mose arahindukira, amanuka uwo musozi, afise vya bisate vyompi mu minwe birikw Ibishinga intahe, vyanditswekw impande zompi, imbere n’inyuma." 
Exodus32:16 Ivyo bisate vyari bikozwe n’ Imana, kand’ inyandiko zikorogoshowe kuri vyo zar’ inyandiko z’Imana." 
Exodus32:17 Maze Yosuwa yumvise urwamo rw’abantu bayogora, abarira Mose, ati Har’ urwamo rw’intambara mu nsago!" 
Exodus32:18 Aramwishura, at’ Ivyo numva s’urwamo rw’abadēdēsha akarūru ko kunesha, kandi s’urw’ abatakambishwa no kuneshwa, ariko n’urw’ abavyina." 
Exodus32:19 Nukw ashitse hafi y’aho bashagaje, abona ya masa n’abariko baratamba; uburake bga Mose buraziriringa, ata hasi ivyo bisate yar’ afise mu ntoke, abimenera mu mucāmo w’uwo musozi." 
Exodus32:20 Maze yābīra iyo masa bakoze, arayiturira, arayisya, ayigira ifu, ayimēmēra ku mazi, ayanywesha Abisirayeli." 
Exodus32:21 Mose abaza Aroni, ati Mbeg’ aba bantu bakugize bate catumye ubazanakw icaha kingana girtyo?" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni aramwishura, at’ Uburake bgawe bgoye kuziriringa mwami wanje! Urazi aba bantu, ingene bamogoreye mu bibi:" 
Exodus32:23 kuko bambariye, bati N’uturonkere imana yo kutuja imbere, bati Kuk’ umwe Mose yadukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa tutazi ico yabaye." 
Exodus32:24 Nanje ndabishura, nt’ Ūri n’izahabu wese n’ ayikātūre; nuko barazimpa, nziterera mu muriro, havamw’ iyo masa." 
Exodus32:25 Maze Mose abonye kw abantu bīrekuriye mu buyobe, kuko Aroni yabakundiye kwirekurira muri bgo, bagahinduka agatwengo ku bansi babo," 
Exodus32:26 ahagarara mw ishikiro ry’aho bashagaje, aravuga, ati Ni nde ari ku ruhande rw’Uhoraho? N’aze hano aho ndi. Abalewi bose bakoranira ah’ ari." 
Exodus32:27 Arababgira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho, Imana y’ Abisirayeli, agize, ngo Ni muhagatire inkota zanyu mwese, mukwiragire hose aho dushagaje, muhēre ku ruhande rumwe mushitse ku rundi, umuntu wese yice mwene wabo na mugenzi we n’ umubanyi wiwe." 
Exodus32:28 Abalewi babigenza nk’uko Mose yavuze; kur’ uwo musi mu bantu hapfamwo nk’ibihumbi bitatu. 
Exodus32:29 Mose arababarira, at’ Uyu musi mwiyeguriye igikorwa c’Uhoraho, kukw ata warenganye umwana wiwe canke mwene wabo; ivyo bitumye Uhoraho abaha umugisha uyu musi." 
Exodus32:30 Bukeye bgaho, Mose abarira abantu, ati Mwakoze icaha gikomeye; none ngira ndūge nje k’ Uhoraho, kumbure nobona ingene mbatangira impongano kubg’ icaha canyu." 
Exodus32:31 Nuko Mose asubira k’ Uhoraho, aravuga, ati Tegēra Bgirukiro! Abo bantu bakoze icaha gikomeye koko, bicuriye ikigirwamana c’izahabu." 
Exodus32:32 Es’ icompa ukabaharira icaha cabo! Na ho bidashobotse, jewe upfume usibanganya izina ryanje mu gitabo cawe wanditse." 
Exodus32:33 Uhoraho yishura Mose, at’ Ūncumuyeko wese ni we nzosibanganya mu gitabo canje." 
Exodus32:34 None genda, ujane abo bantu ha hantu nakubarira; kand’ ehe rāba, umumarayika wanje azokuja imbere: yamara ku musi wo guhōra, nzobasubiriza mu nkōko ico caha cabo." 
Exodus32:35 Uhoraho atēza abo bantu ivyago, kuko bacurishije ya masa Aroni yacura." 
Exodus33:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati N’ugende, uve ino, mwe n’ abantu wakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mudūge muje mu gihugu narahiye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo ko nzogiha uruvyaro rwabo." 
Exodus33:2 Nanje ndarungika umumarayika abaje imbere, kandi nzocirukanamw’ Abanyakanani, n’ Abamori, n’Abaheti, n’Abaferizi, n’Abahiwi, n’Abayebusi:" 
Exodus33:3 muje mur’ ico gihugu gitemba amata n’ ubūki. Ariko jeho sindūgana namwe, ngo ngendere hagati muri mwebge; kuko mur’ ihanga ritagonda izosi: nohava mbatikiriza mu nzira." 
Exodus33:4 Abantu bumvise iyo nkuru mbi bagira umubabaro, ntihaba hakigira umuntu yambara utugenegene twiwe two gushaza." 
Exodus33:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Mur’ ihanga ritagonda izosi; uti Yogendera hagati muri mwebge n’akanya isase, yobatikiza: uti Nuko rero ni mwiyambure utugenegene twanyu two gushaza, kugira ngw amenye ukw abagirira." 
Exodus33:6 Nukw Abisirayeli biyambura utugenegene twabo, uhereye bakiva ku musozi Horebu, no mu rundi rugendo rwabo rwose." 
Exodus33:7 Mose yajana ihema, akarishinga hirya y’aho bashagaje, ahītāngūye, yaryita ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uwagomba gusigūza Uhoraho wese yava aho bashagaje, akaja kw ihema ry’ibonaniro hirya yaho." 
Exodus33:8 Kand’ uko Mose yava aho bashagaje, agiye kur’ iryo hema, abantu bose bāva hasi, umuntu wese agahagarara ku muryango w’ihema ryiwe, bakamukurikiza amaso, gushitsa aho yinjiriye mur’ iryo hema." 
Exodus33:9 Mose yamara kwinjira mw ihema, ya nkingi y’igicu ikamanuka, igahagarara ku muryango waryo: Uhoraho akagānīra na Mose." 
Exodus33:10 Abantu bose bakabona iyo nkingi y’igicu ihagaze ku muryango w’iryo hema, bakava hasi, umuntu wese agasenga ari ku muryango w’ihema ryiwe." 
Exodus33:11 Uhoraho akīgānīrira na Mose imbonankubone, nk’uk’ umuntu agānīra na mugenzi we. Maze Mose agasubira aho bashagaje; arik’ umufasha wiwe, Yosuwa mwene Nuni, w’umusore, ntiyava kur’ iryo hema." 
Exodus33:12 Maze Mose abgira Uhoraho, ati Rāba, wambariye ngo Dūgana abo bantu, ariko ntiwammenyesha uwo udutumanye. Yamara waravuze, uti Ndakuzi izina, kandi wagiriwe ubuntu imbere yanje." 
Exodus33:13 None rero, ndakwinginze, asangwa nagiriwe ubuntu imbere yawe koko, n’unyereke imigendere yawe, kugira ngo nkumenye, mbone kurushiriza kugirirwa ubuntu imbere yawe: kandi wibuke yukw iryo hanga ar’ iryawe." 
Exodus33:14 Aramwishura, at’ Ubganje nzokwijanira namwe, mbashikane amahoro." 
Exodus33:15 Mose aramwishura, at’ Ubgawe n’utajana natwe, ntudukūre ino." 
Exodus33:16 None n’iki comenyekanisha yuko nagiriwe ubuntu imbere yawe, twe n’iryo hanga? Mbega s’uko wojana natwe, bigatuma twe n’ihanga ryawe dutandukanywa n’amahanga yose ashagaje kw isi?" 
Exodus33:17 Uhoraho yishura Mose, ati N’ico uvuze na co ndagikora, kuko nakugiriye ubuntu, nkakumenya izina." 
Exodus33:18 Mose aramwishura, ati Ndakwinginze, nyereka ubgiza bgawe." 
Exodus33:19 Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Ukugira neza kwanje kwose nzogucisha imbere yawe, nivuge mw izina ko nd’ Uhoraho nd’ imbere yawe; kandi nzogirira ubuntu uwo nzobugirira, ngirire n’ikigongwe uwo nzokigirira." 
Exodus33:20 Kand’ ati Ntiworāba mu nyonga hanje: kuk’ umuntu atondāba mu nyonga ngw abeho. 
Exodus33:21 Uhoraho arongera aravuga, at’ Ehe rāba, harih’ ahantu hafi yanje, nawe uz’ uhagarare ku gitandara;" 
Exodus33:22 maz’ ubgiza bganje bukiriko buraguca i ruhande, nzogushira mur’ ico gitandara, ahameze nk’igihoro, ngukingirize urushi rwanje, gushitsa aho nzoba ndēngāniye," 
Exodus33:23 mpeze nkūreh’ urushi rwanje, urābe mu bitugu vyanje: ariko mu nyonga hanje ntihashobora kuboneka." 
Exodus34:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Wībāzire ibisate vy’amabuye bibiri bisa n’ivya mbere: nanje nzokwandika kur’ ivyo bisate amajambo yari ku vya mbere wamennye." 
Exodus34:2 Ejo mu gatondo buce witeguye, uz’ udūge umusozi Sinayi mu gatondo, urenguke imbere yanje ku gatwe k’uwo musozi." 
Exodus34:3 Ntihaze hagire umuntu mudūgana, canke ngo hagire umuntu n’umwe azoboneka kur’ uwo musozi wose, kandi ntihaze hagire imikuku cank’ amasho birisha hafi yawo." 
Exodus34:4 Nuko Mose abāza ibisate vy’amabuye bibiri bisa n’ivya mbere, azinduka kare mu gatondo, adūga uwo musozi Sinayi, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye, atwaye vya bisate vy’ amabuye vyompi mu minwe." 
Exodus34:5 Uhoraho amanuka ari muri ca gicu, ahagararana na we aho hantu, yivuga izina kw ar’ Uhoraho." 
Exodus34:6 Uhoraho aca imbere yiwe, arīvuga, ati Nd’ Uhoraho, nd’ Uhoraho, Imana yuzuye imbabazi n’ubuntu, nteba kuraka, ngira ikigongwe cinshi, mpora nd’ umwizigirwa," 
Exodus34:7 nama ngirira imbabazi abantu ibihumbi n’ibihumbi, mparira ibigabitanyo n’ibicumuro n’ ivyaha, ariko simperereza urubanza k’ūtarugira; mpōra abana ibigabitanyo vya ba se, nkageza ku buzukuru no ku runganwe rwabo rugira gatatu no ku rugira kane." 
Exodus34:8 Ako kanya Mose aca yunamika umutwe, arasenga." 
Exodus34:9 Aravuga, ati Mwami, namba ngiriwe ubuntu imbere yawe, none ndakwinginze Mwami, n’ugendere hagati muri twebge, nah’ ar’ ihanga ritagonda izosi; uharire ibigabitanyo vyacu n’ibicumuro vyacu, wemere kuduhindura ishamvu yawe." 
Exodus34:10 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Rāba, ndasezerana isezerano: nzokorera ibitangaza imbere y’ihanga ryanyu ryose, bitigeze gukorwa mw isi yose canke mu rindi hanga na rimwe; abantu bose urimwo bazobona igikorwa nzokora, kuko nzogukoresha ibiteye ubgoba." 
Exodus34:11 Uz’ uhore witondera ivyo nkugera uyu musi: rāba, nzokwirukana Abamori, n’Abanyakanani, n’Abaheti, n’Abaferizi, n’Abahiwi, n’Abayebusi, babave imbere." 
Exodus34:12 Muze mwirinde, ntimuze musezerane isezerano n’ abari mur’ ico gihugu mugiyemwo, ntibize bihave bibabera umutego hagati muri mwebge;" 
Exodus34:13 ariko muze musangangure ibicaniro vyabo, mumenagure amabuye bāshinze, mutemagure inkingi bāshingiye Ashera;" 
Exodus34:14 kuko mudakwiye kugira iyindi mana musenga na mba: kuko jewe Uhoraho, izina ryanje nd’ Inyefūhe, nd’ Imana ifūha." 
Exodus34:15 Ntimuze mugire isezerano musezerana n’abari mur’ ico gihugu, kugira ngo, igihe bazohurumbira ibigirwamana vyabo nk’ ibimaka, bakabiha ibimazi, ntihaze hagire ūbatumira, ngo murye ku kimazi ciwe;" 
Exodus34:16 mugahava musaba abageni babo mukabaha abahungu banyu, abo bakobga babo bagahava bahurumbira ibigirwamana vyabo mu bumaka bgabo, bagakwegera abahungu banyu, na bo bagahinduka ibimaka vyavyo." 
Exodus34:17 Ntimuze mwironderere ibigirwamana mubivugutiye mu nkero. 
Exodus34:18 Muze mugire imisi mikuru y’ imitsima itambiwe: nk’uko nababariye, mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe, mu gihe cashinzwe co mu kwezi Abibu, kuk’ ukwezi Abibu ari kwo mwaviriyemwo muri Egiputa." 
Exodus34:19 Icitwa ubuzibūra cose n’icanje: ubuzibūra bg’icitwa ikigabo cose co mu vyo mutunze, ari mu nka canke mu ntama." 
Exodus34:20 Kand’ icana c’indogoba c’uburiza muze mugicunguze umwagazi w’intama; na ho ni mutāgomba kugicungura, muze mukivune izosi; kand’ imfura yose y’umuhungu yo mu bana banyu muze muyicungure. Kandi ntihaze hagire ūza iminwe misa imbere yanje." 
Exodus34:21 Mu misi itandatu muze mukore ibikorwa, ariko ku musi ugira indwi muze muruhūke; no mw irima no mw iyimbura muze mwame muwuruhūkako." 
Exodus34:22 Kand’ umusi ukurikira amasabato ndwi muze muwugire mukuru, ari wo w’intangamarāra wo kugenya ingano, bo n’ umusi w’iyimbura rya vyose wo ku mpera y’umwaka." 
Exodus34:23 Haze harenguke uwitwa umuhungu wese imbere yanje, jewe Umwami Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka." 
Exodus34:24 Kuko nzokwirukana amahanga agahunga imbere yanyu, ngasunika hirya imbibe zanyu; kandi nta wuzokebēra igihugu canyu, igihe muzodūga gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka, murengutse imbere yanje, Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Exodus34:25 Amaraso y’ikimazi mpawe ntimuze muyahēreze hamwe n’imitsima yambiwe; ikimazi gitanzwe ku musi mukuru wa Pasika ntikize kirāre ngo gishitse mu gitondo. 
Exodus34:26 Ivy’ intangamarāra vyo mu vy’ imishuzo yo mu mirima yanyu muze mwame mubizana mu ngoro yanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Ntimuze mutekeshe umwagazi w’ impene amata ya nyina." 
Exodus34:27 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Andika ayo majambo: kukw isezerano nsezeranye nawe n’Abisirayeli rihagaze kur’ ayo majambo." 
Exodus34:28 Amara imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine ari kumwe n’Uhoraho aho hantu, ata co kurya atamira, ata n’amazi anywa. Uhoraho yandika kuri vya bisate amajambo y’isezerano, ni yo vya vyagezwe, ukw ar’ icumi." 
Exodus34:29 Mose amanuka uwo musozi Sinayi, afise mu minwe vya bisate vyompi birikw Ibishinga intahe; kand’ aho yamanuka uwo musozi ntiyar’ azi yuko mu maso hiwe haca ibibatsi kubg’ Uwo bāhora bakebukana." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni n’ Abisirayeli bose babonye Mose, basanga mu maso hiwe haca ibibatsi; batinya kumwēgēra." 
Exodus34:31 Nuko Mose arabahamagara; maze Aroni n’abakuru b’ikoraniro bagaruka kuri we, Mose ababgira amajambo." 
Exodus34:32 Hanyuma Abisirayeli bose na bo baramwegera, abashikiriza ivyagezwe vyose, ivyo Uhoraho yamubaririye ku musozi Sinayi." 
Exodus34:33 Mose amaze kubibabarira, yitwikira mu maso." 
Exodus34:34 Arikw iyo yinjiye imbere y’ Uhoraho ngw abonane na we, yakūra uwo mwitwikiro gushitsa asohotse; amaze gusohoka agashikiriza Abisirayeli ivyo abariwe;" 
Exodus34:35 Abisirayeli bakabona mu maso ha Mose haca ibibatsi; Mose akīsubizako wa mwitwikiro, gushitsa yongeye kwinjira ngw abonane n’Uhoraho." 
Exodus35:1 Mose akoranya ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, arababgira, at’ Ibi ni vyo Uhoraho yageze ko mukora:" 
Exodus35:2 mu misi itandatu abe ari ho ibikorwa bikorerwa, arik’ ūgira indwi uz’ ubabere uwera, ube isabato yo kuruhūka bihebuje yerejwe Uhoraho; ūzogira igikorwa na kimwe awukorako, aze yicwe." 
Exodus35:3 Ntimuze mugeze umuriro mu mazu yanyu yose ku musi w’isabato. 
Exodus35:4 Mose abarira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, at’ Ibi ni vyo Uhoraho yageze," 
Exodus35:5 ngo Mukoranye amashikanwa yo kumushikanira, mukūye ku vyanyu: umuntu wese yumva bivuye ku mutima, abe ari we azana ishikanwa ryo gushikanira Uhoraho; ayo mashikanwa n’aya: amazahabu n’ amafeza n’imiringa," 
Exodus35:6 n’inyuzi z’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere, n’ubushenza bg’impene;" 
Exodus35:7 n’insāto z’ impfizi z’intama zazizwe mu gahama, n’insāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, n’imbaho z’ibiti vyitwa imishita;" 
Exodus35:8 n’amavuta y’amatara, n’ibintu bimoga vyo kuvanga n’ amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, n’ibindi vyo kwosa bitāmirana;" 
Exodus35:9 n’utubuyenge twitwa shohamu, n’utundi tubuyenge two gutēra ku mwambaro witwa efodi no ku mwambaro wo mu gikiriza." 
Exodus35:10 Kand’ umuntu wese w’umuhinga wo muri mwebge n’aze, akore ivyo Uhoraho yageze vyose, ni vyo ibi:" 
Exodus35:11 iryo hema ry’ imbere, n’ihema ryo hejuru yaryo, n’ivyo kurenza hejuru y’iryo hema; n’uturinda twaryo, n’imbaho zaryo, n’ibiti vyaryo vy’intumba, n’inkingi zaryo, n’ibitereko vyo kurokezamw’ imbaho n’inkingi;" 
Exodus35:12 na ya sandugu n’iminiho yayo, na wa mutemere wo guhongerako, n’igihuzu co gukīngīra Ahēra cane;" 
Exodus35:13 n’ ameza n’iminiho yayo n’ibintu vyayo vyose, n’imitsima y’ibiterekerwa;" 
Exodus35:14 n’igitereko c’amatara yo kubonesha, n’ibintu vyaco, n’ amatara yaco, n’amavuta yo gutuma yaka;" 
Exodus35:15 n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu, n’iminiho yaco; n’amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, n’imibavu itāmirana; n’igihuzu co gukinga mu rwinjiriro rw’umuryango w’iryo hema:" 
Exodus35:16 n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, n’ikintu caco c’ insobane gicuzwe mu miringa, n’iminiho yaco, n’ibintu vyaco vyose; n’ikigārigāri n’intebe yaco;" 
Exodus35:17 n’impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo, n’ibirimbi vyo kuzimanikako, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo, n’impuzu yo gukinga mw irembo ry’urwo rugo;" 
Exodus35:18 n’imambo z’iryo hema, n’iz’ urugo, n’imigozi yazo;" 
Exodus35:19 n’ imyambaro ijishitse yo kwambara mu gukora Ahēra, ni yo myambaro yejejwe yo kwambara Aroni umuherezi, n’iy’ abana biwe, yo gukoramw’ igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus35:20 Nukw ikoraniro ryose ry’ Abisirayeli baragenda, bava imbere ya Mose." 
Exodus35:21 Maze baraza, umuntu wese asunitswe n’umutima wiwe, n’umuntu wese atanze bivuye ku mutima, bazana amashikanwa bashikanira Uhoraho, yo gukoresha rya hema ry’ibonaniro, n’ ayo gukoresha ibikorwa vyaryo vyose n’ayo gukoramwo ya myambaro yejejwe." 
Exodus35:22 Haza abemeye gutanga bose bivuye ku mutima, abagabo n’abagore, bazana impeta zo mu mazuru n’izo mu matwi, n’izo bādomesha ibimenyetso, n’inyerere, vyose ar’ utugenegene dukozwe mw izahabu; umuntu wese yar’ afise icitwa izahabu yakizana kugishikanira Uhoraho." 
Exodus35:23 Kandi bose abari bafise inyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, n’ izera derere, n’ubushenza bg’ impene, n’insāto z’impfizi z’intama zazizwe mu gahama, n’insāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, umuntu wese arabizana." 
Exodus35:24 Umuntu wese yar’ afise ico ashikana c’ifeza cank’ ic’ umuringa, arakizana agishikanira Uhoraho; kand’ umuntu wese yar’ afise imbaho z’igiti c’ umushita zogira ico zimara kur’ ico gikorwa, arazizana." 
Exodus35:25 Abagore bose b’abahinga na bo bahingiranya inyuzi, bazana izo bahinze, iz’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere." 
Exodus35:26 Kand’ abagore bose bāsunitswe n’imitima gukoresha ubuhinga bgabo, bāhingiranya ubushenza bg’impene." 
Exodus35:27 Abakuru na bo bazana utubuyenge twitwa shohamu, n’utundi tubuyenge two gutēra ku mwambaro witwa efodi no ku mwambaro wo mu gikiriza;" 
Exodus35:28 bazana n’ibintu bimoga n’amavuta vyo gukoreshwa mu matara no mu vyo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, no mu vyo kwosa bitāmirana." 
Exodus35:29 Nukw abagabo n’abagore bose b’Abisirayeli bemejwe n’imitima yabo kugira ico bazana cose co gukoresha igikorwa Uhoraho yabariye Mose gukora, babizanakw amashikanwa avuye ku mitima ikunze, babishikanira Uhoraho." 
Exodus35:30 Mose abarira Abisirayeli, at’ Ehe rāba, Uhoraho yahamagaye mw izina Besaleli mwene Uri, Uri mwene Huri, wo mu muryango wa Yuda;" 
Exodus35:31 kandi yamwujuje impwemu y’Imana, kugira ngw agire ubgenge no gutahura no kumenya n’ubuhinga bg’uburyo bgose," 
Exodus35:32 mu vyo kwigenera ibikorwa vy’ubuhanga, no mu vyo gucura izahabu n’ifeza n’imiringa," 
Exodus35:33 no mu vyo gukeba utubuyenge two kurumikwa mw izahabu, no mu bubāji, no mu vy’ ubuhinga bg’uburyo bgose bg’ ubgenge." 
Exodus35:34 Kandi yashize mu mutima wiwe kwigisha abandi, bo na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki, wo mu muryango wa Dani." 
Exodus35:35 Abo yabujuje ubgenge mu mitima yabo, bgo gukora ibikorwa vy’ ubuhinga vy’uburyo bgose, bg’ umuntu azi guca amagarwe ku tubuyenge n’ubg’ ubuhinga bgo kujisha, n’ubg’ ubuhinga bgo kujererenga amabara y’inyuzi z’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere, n’ubgo kujisha impuzu, mbere n’ubg’ abakora ibikorwa vyose vy’ubuhinga, n’ubg’ abigenera ibikorwa vy’ubuhanga." 
Exodus36:1 Besaleli na Oholiyabu n’ umuntu wese w’umuhinga, abo Uhoraho yashizemw’ ubuhinga n’ubgenge ngo bamenye gukora vyose vy’iryo hema, baze babikore nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze vyose." 
Exodus36:2 Nuko Mose ahamagara Besaleli na Oholiyabu, n’umuntu wese w’ umuhinga, ab’ Uhoraho yashize ubuhinga mu mutima, mbere n’umuntu wese yasunitswe n’umutima kuza gukora ico gikorwa." 
Exodus36:3 Mose abaha ya mashikanwa yose, ayo Abisirayeli bāshikaniye gukora ivy’ iryo hema, ngo bayakoreshe. Kand’ uko bukeye mu gitondo bākomeza kumuzanira ayandi mashikanwa avuye ku mitima ikunze," 
Exodus36:4 bituma abo bantu bose b’ abahinga bakora ibikorwa vyose vyo kur’ iryo hema, bahērako baraza, umuntu wese ava ku gikorwa ciwe yakora," 
Exodus36:5 babarira Mose, bat’ Ereg’ abantu bazanye ibirenze rwose ku vyo Uhoraho yageze gukora." 
Exodus36:6 Nuko Mose ashinga kubibuza, babitāngāza aho bashagaje hose, bati Ntihaze hagire umugabo cank’ umugore asubira gukora ikindi kintu na kimwe co gushikana kubg’ iryo hema. Uko ni ko bābujije abantu kugira ikindi bazana." 
Exodus36:7 Kukw ivyo bari bafise vyari bihāgije gukora ico gikorwa cose, bigasāguka." 
Exodus36:8 Umuntu wese w’umuhinga mu bakora ico gikorwa, akora iryo hema ry’imbere, barisakaza impuzu cumi; izo mpuzu zajishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, no mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’ agahama; kandi zari zijishwekw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi, bijishwe n’abahinga bavyo." 
Exodus36:9 Uburebure bg’impuzu yose bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge ane: impuzu zose zari cabugerwe." 
Exodus36:10 Besaleli arōngōranya impuzu zitanu ukwazo, zindi zitanu azirōngōranya ukwazo." 
Exodus36:11 Atēra utugombo tw’udutambara tw’amasufe ku ruhande rumwe rw’impuzu iherera izārōngōranijwe za mbere, atēra n’utundi tugombo nk’utwo ku ruhande rw’impuzu iherera izindi mu zārōngōranijwe za kabiri." 
Exodus36:12 Utwo tugombo yatēye ku mpuzu imwe twari mirongwitanu, no mu zindi za kabiri zārōngōranijwe, atēra utundi mirongwitanu nyene ku ruhande rw’iherera izindi; utwo tugombo twari dutumberanye." 
Exodus36:13 Acura uturinda mirongwitanu mw izahabu, adufatanisha izo mpuzu zārōngōranijwe: nukw iryo hema ry’imbere ricika rimwe ryiramvuriye." 
Exodus36:14 Atakw ajisha impuzu mu bushenza bg’impene, zo kuba ihema ryo gupfuka iryo hema ry’ imbere; ajisha impuzu cumi n’ imwe." 
Exodus36:15 Uburebure bg’impuzu yose bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge ane; izo mpuzu ukw ari cumi n’imwe zari cabugerwe. 
Exodus36:16 Arōngōranya impuzu zitanu ukwazo, zitandatu na zo ukwazo." 
Exodus36:17 Atēra utugombo mirongwitanu ku ruhande rw’impuzu iherera izārōngōranijwe za mbere, atēra n’utundi mirongwitanu nyene ku ruhande rw’impuzu iherera izindi mu zārōngōranijwe za kabiri." 
Exodus36:18 Acura uturinda mirongwitanu mu miringa two gufatanya iryo hema, kugira ngo ricike rimwe ryiramvuriye." 
Exodus36:19 Abarīranya ico kurenza hejuru y’iryo hema mu nsāto z’amapfizi y’intama zizizwe mu gahama, hejuru yaco akirenzakw ikindi gikozwe mu nsāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi." 
Exodus36:20 Abāza imbaho mu giti c’ umushita zo guhagarika iryo hema ry’imbere, arazishinga." 
Exodus36:21 Uburebure bg’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe bgar’ amatambge cumi y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgarwo bgar’ itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus36:22 Kandi ku rubaho rumwe‐rumwe har’ inkago zibiri zifatanye; uko ni ko yakoze ku mbaho zose z’iryo hema. 
Exodus36:23 Nuko rer’ abāza izo mbaho z’iryo hema, izo mu ruhande ahahera i bumanuko ziba mirongwibiri." 
Exodus36:24 Kand’ acura ibitereko mirongwine mw ifeza, vyo kuja musi y’izo mbaho ukw ari mirongwibiri: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bija musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe, vyo kurokezwamwo za nkago ukw ari zibiri nyene." 
Exodus36:25 Abāza n’izindi mbaho mirongwibiri z’ urundi ruhande rw’iryo hema, ruhera i burārūko," 
Exodus36:26 na zo azicurira ibitereko vyazo mirongwine mw ifeza: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri vyo kuja musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe. 
Exodus36:27 Kand’ abāza imbaho zitandatu z’ahahera inyuma kur’ iryo hema, aharābana n’i burengerazuba." 
Exodus36:28 Abāza n’imbaho zibiri zo ku mfuruka z’iryo hema ahahera inyuma nyene. 
Exodus36:29 Hasi zari zibiri‐zibiri, arikw ahahera hejuru zari zimatanye, aho ikigombo ca mbere kigera; uko ni ko yazikoze zompi ku mfuruka zompi z’ahahera inyuma." 
Exodus36:30 Nukw izo mbaho zose na zose zari munani, n’ibitereko vyazo vy’ ifeza cumi na bitandatu: ibitereko bibiri‐bibiri bija musi y’urubaho rumwe‐rumwe." 
Exodus36:31 Abāza ibiti vy’intumba mu giti citwa umushita: ibiti bitanu vyo kuja ku mbaho zo ku ruhande rumwe rw’iryo hema," 
Exodus36:32 n’ibindi bitanu vyo kuja ku zo ku rundi ruhande rwaryo, n’ibindi bitanu vyo kuja ku z’ahahera inyuma kuri ryo, ahahera i burengerazuba." 
Exodus36:33 Igiti co hagati y’ibindi, kiri hagati kur’ izo mbaho, akigira umwishikira." 
Exodus36:34 Kand’ izo mbaho azomekakw izahabu, maz’ azicurira ibigombo vy’ izahabu vyo gusobekamwo vya biti; n’ivyo biti na vyo avyomekakw izahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ajisha igihuzu co gukingīra, akijisha mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’ agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza; kandi cari kijishwekw ibishushanyo vy’abekerubi, bijishwe n’abahinga bavyo." 
Exodus36:36 Akibāzira inkingi zine mu giti c’umushita, azomekakw izahabu, azitērakw imisumari yacuzwe mw izahabu; avugutira ifeza, ayikūramw’ ibitereko bine vyo kuzinegamwo." 
Exodus36:37 Kand’ ajisha igihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’ ihema, mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, cari kijererenzwekw amabara n’abahinga." 
Exodus36:38 Abāza inkingi zitanu zaco, azitērakw imisumari; ku mitwe yazo azomekakw izahabu, bo n’ imitambikwa yazo; ibitereko vyazo ukw ari bitanu vyari bicuzwe mu miringa." 
Exodus37:1 Besaleli abāza isandugu mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bgayo bg’umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri n’igice y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ itambge rimwe n’igice, uburebure bg’igihagararo bgar’ itambge rimwe n’igice nyene." 
Exodus37:2 Ayomekakw izahabu iramuye imbere n’inyuma, ayikīkūzak’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus37:3 Avugutira izahabu, ayikūramw’ ibigombo bine vyo kuyitērako, abitēra ku maguru yayo ukw ar’ ane, ibigombo bibiri biba ku ruhande rumwe, bindi bibiri biba ku rundi." 
Exodus37:4 Abāza iminiho mu mushita, ayomekakw izahabu;" 
Exodus37:5 araheza yinjiza iyo miniho yo kurerura iyo sandugu mur’ ivyo bigombo vyo ku mpande zayo. 
Exodus37:6 Acura n’umutemere wo guhongerako mw izahabu iramuye; uburebure bgawo bg’ umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri n’igihimba y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgawo bgar’ itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus37:7 Akora abakerubi babiri mw izahabu, mu mitwe yompi y’uwo mutemere wo guhongerako, abakoze mu buryo bgo gucura." 
Exodus37:8 Umukerubi umwe amukora mu mutwe umwe, uwundi amukora mu wundi; abo bakerubi abashamika kur’ uwo mutemere wo guhongerako mu mitwe yawo yompi, baba kimwe na wo." 
Exodus37:9 Abo bakerubi bari bashanje amababa hejuru, ayo mababa yabo yar’ akingiye uwo mutemere wo guhongerako, bārarābana; bari bashize amaso kur’ uwo mutemere." 
Exodus37:10 Maz’ abāza ameza mu giti citwa umushita: uburebure bgayo bg’umurambararo bgar’ amatambge abiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ itambge rimwe, uburebure bg’ igihagararo bgar’ itambge rimwe n’igihimba." 
Exodus37:11 Ayomekakw izahabu iramuye, ayakīkūza umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus37:12 Ayabāzira ibizingiti vyo kugumya amaguru bikīkūje impande zose, ubgaguke bgavyo bungana n’urushi, abikīkūzak’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus37:13 Avugutira izahabu, ayikūramw’ ibigombo bine vy’ayo meza, abitēra ku nkokora ukw ari zine zo ku maguru yayo ukw ar’ ane." 
Exodus37:14 Ivyo bigombo vyari hafi ya vya bizingiti, vyar’ ivyo kwinjizamw’ iminiho yo kurerura ayo meza." 
Exodus37:15 Abāza iminiho mu mushita yo kurerura ameza, ayomekakw izahabu." 
Exodus37:16 Acura ibintu vyo kur’ ayo meza, amasahani yayo, n’udukombe twayo, n’imibehe n’amakarabo vyayo vyo gusukisha ibiturire ku gicaniro; abicura mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus37:17 Akora ico guterekakw amatara mw izahabu iramuye; ico gitereko cose, hamwe n’intebe yaco n’umutumba waco, cār’ igicurano; ibikombe vyaco, bigizwe bga mapfundo apfundikiyekw amashurwe, vyari bicuriwe kuri co, vyari kimwe na co." 
Exodus37:18 Cari gifise amashami atandatu mu mbavu zaco: mu ruhande rumwe rw’ico gitereko hār’ amashami atatu, mu rundi ruhande rwaco hāri yandi atatu." 
Exodus37:19 Ishami rimwe ryari rifise ibikombe bitatu bisa n’amashurwe y’igiti citwa shakedi, igikombe cose cari kigizwe bga pfundo ripfundikiyekw ishurwe; n’irindi shami n’uko: amashami yose ukw ar’ atandatu ashamitse kur’ ico gitereko ni ko yar’ ameze." 
Exodus37:20 Kand’ umutumba w’ico gitereko warikw ibikombe bine, bisa n’ayo mashurwe ya shakedi nyene; vyari bigizwe bga mapfundo apfundikiyekw amashurwe;" 
Exodus37:21 aho amashami ashamikiye kur’ ico gitereko hose ukw ar’atandatu, hār’ ipfundo ahahera musi aho amashami ahūrira, bicuriwe kuri co, vyari kimwe." 
Exodus37:22 Amapfundo yaco n’amashami yaco vyari bicuriwe kuri co, vyari kimwe na co: cose hamwe cār’ igicurano gicuzwe mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus37:23 Araheza agicurira amatara ndwi, n’imakasi zaco zo gutunganya urutambi, n’ udusahani two gushirwak’ umunyota warwo, abicuze mw izahabu iramuye." 
Exodus37:24 Ico gitereko, bo n’ibintu vyaco vyose, yabikoze mw izahabu iramuye, inganya kuriba n’italanto imwe." 
Exodus37:25 Abāza igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu mu giti citwa umushita; uburebure bgaco bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgar’ itambge rimwe nyene: cangana impande zose; uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge abiri; amahembe yaco yar’ abāziwe kuri co, yari kimwe na co." 
Exodus37:26 Acomekakw izahabu iramuye, hejuru kuri co, no mu mbavu zaco impande zose, no ku mahembe yaco; agikīkūzak’ umuguno w’izahabu impande zose." 
Exodus37:27 Musi y’uwo muguno waco, ahahera mu mbavu zaco zompi, agicurira ibigombo bibiri‐bibiri vy’ izahabu; abitēra mu mpande zaco zompi, biba ivyo kwinjizamw’ iminiho yo kukirerura." 
Exodus37:28 Abāza iminiho mu giti c’umushita, ayomekakw izahabu." 
Exodus37:29 Atunganya amavuta yera yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, n’ imibavu iroranye y’ibintu bimoga, abikora nk’umuhinga yabimogoreye." 
Exodus38:1 Abāza igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi mu giti c’ umushita; uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgaco bgar’ atanu nyene, cangana impande zose; uburebure bgaco bg’ igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atatu." 
Exodus38:2 Agiha amahembe ku nkokora zaco ukw ari zine, ayo mahembe yaco yabāziwe kuri co, aba kimwe na co; araheza acomekakw imiringa." 
Exodus38:3 Acura ibintu vyose vy’ ico gicaniro: inzavya, n’ibintu vyo kuyoza umunyota, n’imibehe, n’ivyo kwōkōza inyama, n’ivyo kurahuza: ivyo bintu vyaco vyose yabicuze mu miringa." 
Exodus38:4 Ico gicaniro agicurira ikintu c’insobane kimeze bga rusenga, agicuze mu miringa, agishira musi y’ igikugīrwa gikīkūje ico gicaniro, gihēra hasi, kigarukira ahacāgatije ico gicaniro nyene." 
Exodus38:5 Avugutira imiringa, ayikūramw’ ibigombo bine vyo gutera ku nkokora zine za ca kintu c’insobane cācuzwe mu miringa, biba ivyo kwinjizamw’ iminiho." 
Exodus38:6 Abāza iminiho mu giti c’umushita, ayomekakw imiringa." 
Exodus38:7 Yinjiza iyo miniho mur’ ivyo bigombo biri mu mbavu z’ico gicaniro, yo kukirerura; yakibāje mu mbaho, akigira igisamāre." 
Exodus38:8 Maz’ acura ikigārigāri mu miringa, co gukaraba, acura n’ intebe yaco mu miringa nyene, abicuze mu vyīrore vy’imiringa vy’abagore bākoranira ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro gukora ibikorwa." 
Exodus38:9 Maz’ akora urugo; ku ruhande ruhera i bumanuko, impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo zari zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, uburebure bgazo bg’amakika bgar’ amatambge ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Exodus38:10 Ibirimbi vyo kuzimanikako vyari mirongwibiri, n’ ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo vyari mirongwibiri nyene, bicuzwe mu miringa: imisumari yo kuri vyo yar’ icuzwe mw ifeza, bo n’ imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus38:11 No ku ruhande ruhera i burārūko na rwo uburebure bg’amakika bg’izo mpuzu bgar’ amatambge ijana nyene, n’ibirimbi vyazo vyari mirongwibiri, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyari mirongwibiri nyene bicuzwe mu miringa; imisumari yo kuri vyo yar’ icuzwe mw ifeza, bo n’imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus38:12 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba, impuzu zo kubamba zar’ iz’ amatambge mirongwitanu; ibirimbi vyazo vyari cumi, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyari cumi nyene; imisumari yo kuri vyo yar’ icuzwe mw ifeza, bo n’ imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus38:13 No ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, amatambge yazo yari mirongwitanu nyene." 
Exodus38:14 Ku ruhande rumwe ruhera kw irembo impuzu zo kubamba zar’ iz’ amatambge cumi n’atanu; ibirimbi vyazo vyari bitatu, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyari bitatu nyene." 
Exodus38:15 No ku rundi ruhande rwaryo vyari kuno; hepfo y’ irembo ry’urwo rugo no haruguru, impuzu zo kubamba zar’ iz’ amatambge cumi‐cumi n’atanu; ibirimbi vyazo vyari bitatu‐bitatu, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyari bitatu‐bitatu nyene." 
Exodus38:16 Impuzu zose zo kubamba impande zose ngo zibe urugo, zari zijishwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza." 
Exodus38:17 Ibitereko vyo kunegamw’ ibirimbi vyari bicuzwe mu miringa; imisumari yo kur’ ivyo birimbi, bo n’imitambikwa yo kuri vyo, vyari bicuzwe mw ifeza; ku mitwe yavyo vyari vyometswekw ifeza; ibirimbi vyose vy’urwo rugo vyarikw imitambikwa icuzwe mw ifeza." 
Exodus38:18 Igihuzu co gukinga mw irembo ry’urwo rugo cari kijererenzwekw amabara n’abahinga, cari kijishwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe no mu z’amashigisha no mu zisa n’agahama, no mu zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza; uburebure bgaco bg’amakika bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri, uburebure bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atanu: bgari cabugerwe n’ubg’ izindi mpuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo." 
Exodus38:19 Ibirimbi vyaco vyari bine, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyari bine nyene, vyacuzwe mu miringa; imisumari yo kuri vyo yar’ icuzwe mw ifeza, kandi vyari vyometswekw ifeza ku mitwe yavyo, bifise n’imitambikwa yacuzwe mw ifeza nyene." 
Exodus38:20 Imambo zose z’iryo hema, n’iz’ urugo rurikīkūje impande zose, zari zicuzwe mu miringa." 
Exodus38:21 Iki ni co gitigiri c’ivyakoze iryo hema, ari ryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe, nk’uko Mose yageze ko biharūrwa, Abalewi baba ari bo babiharūra, baharūzwa na Itamari, mwene Aroni umuherezi." 
Exodus38:22 Kandi Besaleli mwene Uri, Uri mwene Huri, wo mu muryango wa Yuda, ni we yakoze ivyo Uhoraho yabariye Mose vyose." 
Exodus38:23 Yar’ afatanije na Oholiyabu mwene Ahisamaki, wo mu muryango wa Dani, umuntu azi guca amagarwe ku tubuyenge, w’umukozi w’umuhanga, umuhinga wo kujererenga amabara y’inyuzi z’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere." 
Exodus38:24 Amazahabu yose yakoreshejwe mu gucura ivy’ iryo hema vyose, ari yo mazahabu y’amashikanwa, yanganya kuriba n’ italanto mirongwibiri n’icenda na shekeli amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu, yagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra." 
Exodus38:25 Amafeza yatanzwe n’ abaharūwe bo mw ikoraniro yanganya kuriba n’italanto ijana na shekeli igihumbi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na zitanu, yagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra;" 
Exodus38:26 yatanzwe n’abantu ibihumbi amajana atandatu na bitatu n’ amajana atanu na mirongwitanu, umuntu wese yarēngāna agashirwa mu gitigiri c’abāharūwe, amaze imyaka mirongwibiri cank’ isāga, yatanga beka imwe, ari yo kigabane ca shekeli yagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra." 
Exodus38:27 Izo talanto z’ifeza, ukw ar’ ijana, zar’ izo gutekwa zikavugutirwa, ngo zivemw’ ibitereko vyo kurokezamw’ inkingi z’iryo hema, n’iza ca gihuzu co gukingīra Ahēra cane: za talanto ukw ar’ ijana zāvuyemw’ ibitereko ijana nyene, igitereko cose cāvuye mw italanto imwe." 
Exodus38:28 Na za shekeli z’ifeza ukw ar’ igihumbi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na zitanu, yazicuzemw’ imisumari yo ku birimbi, aziyagiriza no ku mitwe yavyo, azicuramwo n’imitambikwa yo kuri vyo." 
Exodus38:29 Kand’ imiringa y’amashikanwa yanganya kuriba n’italanto mirongwirindwi na shekeli ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ane. 
Exodus38:30 Na yo ayicuramw’ ibitereko vyo kurokezamw’ inkingi za ca gihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ayicuramwo na ca gicaniro c’imiringa, na ca kintu c’insobane caco c’imiringa nyene, bo n’ibintu vy’ico gicaniro vyose," 
Exodus38:31 n’ibitereko vyo kunegamw’ ibirimbi vy’urugo impande zose, bo n’ibitereko vyo kunegamw’ ibirimbi bitambagije mw irembo ryarwo, n’imambo zose z’iryo hema, bo n’iz’ urwo rugo rwaryo rurikīkūje impande zose." 
Exodus39:1 Za nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama bazijishamw’ imyambaro ijishitse neza yo kwambara mu gukora Ahēra, ni yo myambaro yejejwe yo kwambara Aroni, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:2 Besaleli ajishisha umwambaro witwa efodi intahe z’izahabu, n’ inyuzi z’amasufe, n’iz’ amashigisha, n’izisa n’agahama, n’izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza." 
Exodus39:3 Bacura amazahabu kugeza abaye uduhuhwa, badukebaguramw’intahe zo kujererenga mur’ izo nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere nziza, abahinga bavyo baba ari bo babikora." 
Exodus39:4 Bakora ibizāna vy’uwo mwambaro, babitēra kuri wo; babitēra ku nzāno zawo zompi." 
Exodus39:5 Umusipi ujishwe n’abahinga, ujishiwe kuri wo, wo kuwukenyeza, uba kimwe na wo, wajishwe nka wo; bawujishishije intahe z’izahabu n’inyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’ izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:6 Batunganya utubuyenge twitwa shohamu, baturumya mu tugenegene tw’izahabu, batwandikakw amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe, nk’ abaca amagarwe ku kabuyenge ko kudoma ikimenyetso." 
Exodus39:7 Besaleli adutēra ahahera ku bitugu ku bizāna vya efodi, kugira ngo tubere Abisirayeli utubuyenge two kwibukwako, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:8 Ajishisha umupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza, abahinga bavyo baba ari bo babikora, nk’uko efodi yajishwe; bawujisha mu ntahe z’izahabu no mu nyuzi z’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, n’izera derere nziza zihinzwe neza." 
Exodus39:9 Bawukora bawukubiranije, uringaniye impande zose; uburebure bgawo bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’intoke, n’ubgaguke bgawo bgar’ itambge rimwe nyene: war’ ukubiranije." 
Exodus39:10 Bawudombagizak’ utubuyenge mu mirongo ine: umurongo wa mbere war’ umurongo w’utwitwa odemu na pitida na bareketi; 
Exodus39:11 mu wa kabiri har’ utwitwa nofekina na safiro na yahalomu; 
Exodus39:12 mu wa gatatu har’ utwitwa leshemu na shevo na akilama; 
Exodus39:13 mu wa kane har’ utwitwa tarushishi na shohamu na yasipi; twagenda turumikwa mu tugenegene tw’izahabu. 
Exodus39:14 Utwo tubuyenge twanganya igitigiri n’amazina y’abana ba Isirayeli; twar’ icumi na tubiri, nk’ukw amazina yabo ar’ icumi n’abiri; twari tumeze nk’ utubuyenge two kudoma ibimenyetso, twagenda twandikwakw izina mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe, twar’ utw’ iyo miryango ukw ar’ icumi n’ibiri." 
Exodus39:15 Kur’ uwo mupfuko wo kwambara mu gikiriza bashirakw imigufu icuzwe mw izahabu iramuye, ikozwe nk’ imigozi itsivye." 
Exodus39:16 Bacura utugenegene tubiri mw izahabu, n’impeta zibiri z’izahabu nyene; izo mpeta zompi bazitera ku mitwe yawo yompi yo haruguru." 
Exodus39:17 Baraheza barumya iyo migufu yompi y’izahabu itsivye kur’ izo mpeta zompi zo ku mitwe y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza. 
Exodus39:18 Iyindi mitwe yompi y’ivyo bitsibo vy’ imigufu vyompi bayirumya kur’ utwo tugenegene twompi, bayitēra kuri vya bizāna vya efodi vyo ku bitugu, ku ruhande rw’imbere." 
Exodus39:19 Bacura izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu, bazitēra ku mitwe yompi yo hepfo y’uwo mupfuko wo ku gikiriza, ku mubuga wawo, ku ruhande rw’imbere ruhera kuri efodi." 
Exodus39:20 Bacura n’izindi mpeta zibiri mw izahabu, bazitēra ahahera imbere aho vya bizāna bibiri vya efodi vyo ku bitugu bitērewe, haruguru ya wa musipi wajishwe n’abahinga, wo gukenyeza efodi." 
Exodus39:21 Uwo mupfuko wo kwambara ku gikiriza bawufatanisha impeta zawo n’impeta zo kuri efodi akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe, kugira ng’ ugume kuri wa musipi wa efodi wajishwe n’abahinga, uwo mupfuko ngo woye gukūrwa kuri efodi, babigenjeje nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:22 Kand’ umwinjiro wo kwambarirwako efodi Besaleli awujisha mu nyuzi z’amasufe gusa; 
Exodus39:23 asatura urwano muri wo hagati, nk’urw’ ikanzo y’icuma, arutērakw akandi kajishano kameze nk’ umusōzo karukīkūje, kugira ngo ntiruze rucike." 
Exodus39:24 Ku mubuga w’uwo mwambaro bawutērak’ udusa n’amakomamanga dukozwe mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, n’izera derere zihinzwe neza." 
Exodus39:25 Bacura imidende mw izahabu iramuye, bayitēra hagati y’ayo makomamanga ku mubuga w’uwo mwambaro impande zose, babirobekeranije," 
Exodus39:26 iyo midende bayirobekeranya n’ayo makomamanga, bikīkūza umubuga w’uwo mwinjiro impande zose, uba uwo kwambarwa mu guhereza, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:27 Kandi bajishira Aroni n’ abana biwe amakanzo mu nyuzi zera derere nziza," 
Exodus39:28 bajisha n’ igitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe mu nyuzi zera derere nziza, n’udukofero dushajije na two nyene mu nyuzi zera derere nziza, bo n’amabutura mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza," 
Exodus39:29 n’ umukanda mu nyuzi zera derere nziza zihinzwe neza, no mu z’ amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama, wajererenzwekw amabara n’abahinga bavyo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:30 Maze bacura akabāte, ni co gitsibo cera, mw izahabu iramuye, bakandikakw amajambo mu buryo bgo guca amagarwe ku kabuyenge ko kudoma ikimenyetso, ngo YEREJWE UHORAHO." 
Exodus39:31 Bagapfundikakw akagozi ko mu nyuzi z’amasufe, ko kugafatisha hejuru kuri ca gitambara co kuzingīra mu mutwe, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Exodus39:32 Uko ni ko barangije gukora ivy’ iryo hema vyose, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro; Abisirayeli bākoze vyose, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose: uko ni ko bābikoze." 
Exodus39:33 Bazanira Mose iryo hema ry’imbere, n’ihema ryo hejuru, n’ibintu vyaryo vyose, n’uturinda twaryo, n’imbaho zaryo, n’ ibiti vy’intumba vyaryo, n’inkingi zaryo, n’ibitereko vyo kuzirokezamwo," 
Exodus39:34 n’ico kurenza hejuru yaryo cakozwe mu nsāto z’amapfizi y’intama zazizwe mu gahama, n’ikindi co kurenza hejuru yaco cakozwe mu nsāto z’ ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, n’igihuzu co gukingīra Ahēra cane;" 
Exodus39:35 n’ isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, n’ iminiho yayo, n’umutemere wo guhongerako;" 
Exodus39:36 n’ameza, n’ ibintu vyayo vyose, n’imitsima y’ibiterekerwa;" 
Exodus39:37 n’igiterekwakw amatara c’izahabu iramuye, n’ amatara yaco nyene, ari yo matara yo gushirwa kuri co, n’ibintu vyaco vyose, n’amavuta y’ayo matara;" 
Exodus39:38 n’igicaniro cacuzwe mw izahabu, n’amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango n’imibavu itāmirana, n’igihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’ihema;" 
Exodus39:39 n’igicaniro cacuzwe mu miringa, n’ikintu caco c’insobane cacuzwe mu miringa nyene, n’iminiho yaco, n’ibintu vyaco vyose; n’ ikigārigāri, n’intebe yaco;" 
Exodus39:40 n’ impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo, n’ibirimbi vyarwo, n’ibitereko vyo kubinegamwo, n’impuzu yo gukinga mw irembo ry’ urwo rugo, n’imigozi yarwo, n’ imambo zarwo, n’ibintu vyose vyo gukoresha mur’ iryo hema, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro;" 
Exodus39:41 n’ imyambaro ijishitse neza yo kwambara mu gukora Ahēra, ni yo myambaro yejejwe yo kwambara Aroni umuherezi, n’imyambaro y’ abana biwe, yo kwambara mu gukora igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus39:42 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabibariye Mose, Abisirayeli ni ko bābikoze vyose." 
Exodus39:43 Mose yitegereza ivyo bākoze vyose, asanga barabiroranije; nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze, ni ko bābikoze: Mose arabahezagira." 
Exodus40:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Exodus40:2 ati Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere uz’ ushinge iryo hema, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus40:3 Uheze ushiremwo ya sandugu y’ Ibishinga intahe, uyikingirize ca gihuzu." 
Exodus40:4 Maze winjizemwo ya meza, uyaterekekw ibintu vyayo, ubiroranye; winjize na ca gitereko c’amatara, ugishirekw amatara yaco;" 
Exodus40:5 na ca gicaniro c’izahabu co kwoserezakw imibavu uz’ ugitereke hino ya ya sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, ukinge ca gihuzu ku muryango w’iryo hema." 
Exodus40:6 Uheze ushire ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi imbere y’ umuryango w’iryo hema, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro." 
Exodus40:7 Maz’ utereke ca kigārigāri co gukaraba hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ico gicaniro, ugisukemw’ amazi." 
Exodus40:8 Uheze ushireh’ urugo rukikuza impande zose, umanike n’impuzu yo gukinga mw irembo ryarwo." 
Exodus40:9 Uheze wābire ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, uyarobanuze iryo hema n’ibirimwo vyose, uryezanye n’ibintu vyaryo vyose: nuko rizoba ribaye iryera." 
Exodus40:10 Uyarobanuze n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, n’ibintu vyaco vyose, uceze: nuko kizoba kibaye icera cane." 
Exodus40:11 Uyarobanuze n’ikigārigāri bo n’intebe yaco, uceze." 
Exodus40:12 Uheze uzane Aroni n’abana biwe ku muryango w’iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, ubuhagire." 
Exodus40:13 Wambike Aroni ya myambaro yejejwe, umurobanuze ayo mavuta, umweze, kugira ngw ankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi." 
Exodus40:14 Uheze uzane n’abana biwe, ubambike ya makanzo." 
Exodus40:15 Ubarobanuze amavuta, nk’uk’ uyarobanuje se, kugira ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi: ukwo kurobanurwa kwabo kuzoba kubahaye ubuherezi bg’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Exodus40:16 Nuko Mose abigenza artyo: uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye kwose, ni ko yabikoze." 
Exodus40:17 Nuko mu kwezi kwa mbere kwo mu mwaka ugira kabiri, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, iryo hema ry’ imbere rirashingwa." 
Exodus40:18 Mose ararishinga, ashirah’ ibitereko vyaryo, ashingamw’ imbaho zaryo, azisobekamw’ ibiti vyazo vy’ intumba, ashinga inkingi zaryo." 
Exodus40:19 Araheza arirenzako rya hema ryo hejuru, iryo hema na ryo arirenzakw ikindi hejuru, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:20 Yābīra vya Bishinga intahe, abishira muri ya sandugu, ayisobekakw iminiho yayo, arumika wa mutemere wo guhongerako kur’ iyo sandugu hejuru:" 
Exodus40:21 yinjiza iyo sandugu mw ihema, amanika ca gihuzu co gukingīra Ahēra cane, gikingīra iyo sandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:22 Ashira ya meza mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, ayaherereza ku ruhande rw’i burārūko rw’iryo hema, hino y’ico gihuzu." 
Exodus40:23 Ayaterekako ya mitsima imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uk Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:24 Ashira na ca giterekwakw amatara mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, aharābana n’ ayo meza, ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko rw’iryo hema." 
Exodus40:25 Agishirakw amatara imbere y’ Uhoraho, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:26 Ashira na ca gicaniro c’izahabu mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, hino ya ca gihuzu," 
Exodus40:27 acoserezakw imibavu y’ibintu bimoga, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:28 Akinga ca gihuzu ku muryango w’iryo hema. 
Exodus40:29 Ashira ca gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi imbere y’umuryango w’iryo hema, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro, agitangirakw ikimazi, aracosa, agitangirako n’ishikanwa ry’ ifu, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Exodus40:30 Atereka ca kigārigāri hagati y’ihema ry’ibonaniro n’ico gicaniro, agisukamw’ amazi yo gukaraba," 
Exodus40:31 Mose ubgiwe na Aroni n’abana biwe barayakaraba, bayoga n’ibirenge;" 
Exodus40:32 iyo bagiye kwinjira mw ihema ry’ ibonaniro, n’iyo bagiye kwēgēra ico gicaniro, bārakaraba, bakoga ibirenge, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose." 
Exodus40:33 Araheza ashirah’ urugo rukīkūza iryo hema n’igicaniro impande zose, ashiraho n’impuzu yo gukinga mw irembo ryarwo. Uko ni ko Mose yarangije ico gikorwa." 
Exodus40:34 Maze ca gicu gipfuka ihema ry’ibonaniro, ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzura mw ihema ry’imbere." 
Exodus40:35 Mose ntiyashobora kwinjira mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, kukw ico gicu cari kuri ryo, n’ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzuye mur’ iryo hema ry’imbere." 
Exodus40:36 Kandi mu rugendo rwabo rwose, iy’ ico gicu kivuye kur’ iryo hema kigasubira hejuru, Abisirayeli bāca bafata inzira;" 
Exodus40:37 arikw iy’ ico gicu kidasubiye hejuru, ntibāgenda, gushitsa ku musi gisubiye hejuru." 
Exodus40:38 Kukw ico gicu c’Uhoraho ku murango caba kur’ iryo hema, mw ijoro kikākamw’ umuriro, imbere y’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bose, mu rugendo rwabo rwose." 
Leviticus1:1 Uhoraho ari mw ihema ry’ibonaniro ahamagara Mose, aramubarira," 
Leviticus1:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni haramuka hagize ūmuha ikimazi, muze mukūre ivyo bimazi mu vyo mutunze, ari mu masho canke mu mikuku." 
Leviticus1:3 Ikimazi c’umuntu co kwoswa, ni cāba ar’ ico mu busho, az’ atange imasa itagira agasembga: ayitangire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngo yemerwe imbere yanje." 
Leviticus1:4 Maz’ arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’ico kimazi co kwoswa, ni ho kizokwemerwa kumubera impongano." 
Leviticus1:5 Aheze akererere iyo masa imbere yanje, bene Aroni abaherezi bazane amaraso yayo, bayahereze, bayamijagire impande zose ku gicaniro co ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus1:6 Aheze abāge ico kimazi co kwoswa, akijanjagure, agishire mu bikenye vyaco." 
Leviticus1:7 Bene Aroni abaherezi bashire umuriro kur’ ico gicaniro, bawurundekw inkwi:" 
Leviticus1:8 bene Aroni abaherezi bagereke ivyo bikenye n’umutwe n’ibinure ku nkwi ziri ku muriro kur’ ico gicaniro; 
Leviticus1:9 arikw amara yayo n’ibikenye vyayo vy’amaguru abanze abironge mu mazi; maz’ umuherezi avyosereze vyose ku gicaniro, bibe ikimazi coshejwe, ikimazi gitōngōwe n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus1:10 Kand’ ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa ni caba ar’ ico mu mukuku, ar’ intama cank’ impene, az’ atange isuguru itagira agasembga." 
Leviticus1:11 Az’ agikererere i ruhande y’igicaniro, ahahera i burārūko, imbere yanje; bene Aroni abaherezi bamijagire amaraso yaco ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus1:12 Ayijanjagure, ayishire mu bikenye vyayo, ashireko n’ umutwe wayo n’ibinure vyayo; umuherezi aheze abigereke ku nkwi ziri ku muriro kur’ ico gicaniro:" 
Leviticus1:13 arikw amara n’ibikenye vy’amaguru abanze abironge mu mazi; maz’ umuherezi abihereze vyose, avyosereze kur’ ico gicaniro. Kizoba ar’ ikimazi coshejwe, ikimazi gitōngōwe n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus1:14 Kand’ ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa azompa ni caba ar’ inyoni, az’ atange intunguru cank’ ivyana vy’ inuma." 
Leviticus1:15 Umuherezi az’ akizane ku gicaniro, akinuse umutwe, awosereze ku gicaniro; amaraso yaco amiminukire ku gicaniro ku ruhande rwaco rumwe;" 
Leviticus1:16 agikūrekw agatorero kaco n’amoya yaco, abiterere hambavu y’igicaniro ahahera i burasirazuba, ku gikuburiro c’umunyota." 
Leviticus1:17 Aheze afate amababa yaco agitānye, ariko ntacahukanye: maz’ uwo muherezi acosereze ku gicaniro, akigeretse ku nkwi ziri ku muriro. Kizoba ar’ ikimazi coshejwe, ikimazi gitōngōwe n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus2:1 Ni hagira umuntu azonshikanira ishikanwa ry’ifu, az’ ashikane īgogōretse; ayisukekw amavuta ya elayo, ayishireko n’ imibavu." 
Leviticus2:2 Aheze ayizanire bene Aroni abaherezi; akamate urushi rumwe kur’ iyo fu n’ayo mavuta, akūraneko n’iyo mibavu yose; umuherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro, bibe icibutso c’iryo shikanwa, bibe ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus2:3 Ibisigaye kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ifu bize bibe ivya Aroni n’abana biwe: kizoba ar’ ikintu cera cane mu mashikanwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikanirwa, jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus2:4 Kandi ni mwashikana ishikanwa ry’ivyokejwe mu ziko vyakozwe mw ifu, bize bibe udutsima tutambiwe twacumbge mw ifu igogōretse, twacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, cank’ udutsima tutambiwe nyene, tubēhūye, twasutswekw amavuta ya elayo." 
Leviticus2:5 Kand’ ishikanwa ryanyu ni ryaba iry’ ivyakaranzwe ku cuma vyakozwe mw ifu, bize bibe ivyakozwe mw īgogōretse, ata mwambiro, vyacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo." 
Leviticus2:6 Mubicemw’ utumanyu, mudusukekw amavuta ya elayo: iryo rizoba ribaye ishikanwa ryo mw ifu." 
Leviticus2:7 Kand’ ishikanwa ryanyu ni ryaba iry’ ivyakaranganywe n’amavuta, vyakozwe mw ifu, bize bibe ivyakozwe mw īgogōretse, vyacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo." 
Leviticus2:8 Muze munzanire ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu, ryakozwe mur’ ubgo buryo; rishīrwe umuherezi, na we arizane ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus2:9 Umuherezi aheze akamate kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ ivyakozwe mw ifu, ikizoba icibutso caryo, acosereze ku gicaniro, kibe ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus2:10 Ibisigaye kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu bize bibe ivya Aroni n’abana biwe: kizoba ar’ umugabane wera cane mu mashikanwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikanirwa jewe Uhoraho. 
Leviticus2:11 Ntihaze hagire ishikanwa ryakozwe mw ifu munshikanira ryacumbanywe n’umwambiro: kuko mudakwiye kugira umwambiro cank’ ubūki mwosa ngo bibe ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro munshikaniye. 
Leviticus2:12 Ivyo mushobora kubinshikanira nk’ishikanwa ry’umushuzo, ariko ntibize bishirwe ku gicaniro kuba nk’umubabge umota neza." 
Leviticus2:13 Kand’ ishikanwa ryose ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu muzoshikana muze mubirunge umunyu; ntimuze mugire ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu mushikana ritarimw’ umunyu, kand’ ari wo kimenyetso c’isezerano ryanje, Imana yanyu: ivyo muzotanga vyose muze mubitangane n’umunyu." 
Leviticus2:14 Kandi ni mwanshikanira ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu ivuye mu vy’umushuzo, rize ribe iry’ igihonde c’impeke mbisi, zivuye mu mishi ikigenywa, zikaranze." 
Leviticus2:15 Mugisukekw amavuta ya elayo, mukigerekeko n’imibavu: iryo rizoba ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu." 
Leviticus2:16 Umuherezi aheze akūre kuri ryo ikizoba icibutso caryo, acōse, ni co gace k’ico gihonde c’impeke, n’ak’ ayo mavuta yazo, bo n’iyo mibavu yazo yose; iryo rizoba ishikanwa nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho ritōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus3:1 Kand’ ishikanwa ry’umuntu ni ryaba ar’ ikimazi c’ishimwe akūye mu busho, ar’ imasa cank’ inyana, az’ agitange kitagira agasembga imbere yanje." 
Leviticus3:2 Aheze arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’iryo shikanwa ryiwe ry’ikimazi, agikererere ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro: bene Aroni abaherezi baheze bamijagire amaraso yaco ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus3:3 Maz’ ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe agikūrekw ishikanwa anshikanira ryo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, ribe urubambanda rwōrōshe amara, n’ibinure vyose bihometse ku mara," 
Leviticus3:4 n’amafyigo yompi, n’ ibinure bihometse kuri yo, ahahereranye n’umurya, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, agakūrane n’ amafyigo." 
Leviticus3:5 Bene Aroni baheze bavyosereze ku gicaniro, babigeretse ku kimazi coswa kiri ku nkwi ziri ku muriro: ivyo bizoba ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus3:6 Kand’ ishikanwa ryiwe ry’ ikimazi c’ishimwe anshikaniye, ni caba ar’ ico akūye mu mukuku, ar’ isuguru cank’ ishashi, az’ agitange kitagira agasembga." 
Leviticus3:7 Ni yatanga umwana w’intama kw ishikanwa ryiwe, az’ awuzane imbere yanje." 
Leviticus3:8 Aheze arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’iryo shikanwa ryiwe ry’ikimazi, agikererere imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro: bene Aroni baheze bamijagire amaraso yaco ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus3:9 Maz’ ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe agikūrekw ishikanwa anshikanira ryo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, ribe ibinure vy’uwo mwana w’intama; umurizo wawo uko wagahometsekw ibinure, az’ awucire mu nguge udasonōye, n’urubambanda rwōrōshe amara, n’ibinure vyose bihometse ku mara," 
Leviticus3:10 n’amafyigo yompi, n’ ibinure bihometse kuri yo, ahahereranye n’umurya, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, agakūrane n’ amafyigo." 
Leviticus3:11 Umuherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro: ivyo bizoba bibaye imfungurwa nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, zitōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus3:12 Kandi ni yatanga impene kw ishikanwa ryiwe, az’ ayizane imbere yanje." 
Leviticus3:13 Aheze arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rwayo, ayikererere imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro: bene Aroni baheze bamijagire amaraso yayo ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus3:14 Maz’ ayikūrekw ishikanwa ryiwe anshikanira ryo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, ribe urubambanda rwōrōshe amara, n’ibinure vyose bihometse ku mara," 
Leviticus3:15 n’amafyigo yompi, n’ibinure bihometse kuri yo, ahahereranye n’ umurya, n’agashami gatoya k’ igitigu, agakūrane n’amafyigo." 
Leviticus3:16 Umuherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro: ivyo bizoba bibaye imfungurwa, ari ryo shikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, ngo ribe umubabge umota neza; ibinure vyose bizoba ivyanje." 
Leviticus3:17 Bize bibabere icagezwe c’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, yuko mu ngo zanyu zose mutazokwigera mugeza mu kanwa ibinure cank’ ubuseri." 
Leviticus4:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus4:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni hagira umuntu akora icaha atabigize ibigirankana mu vyo jewe Uhoraho nabuzanije, hakagira ico akora muri vyo;" 
Leviticus4:3 namb’ ar’ umuherezi yarobanujwe amavuta aramutse akoze icaha, agacumuza ubgo bgoko, az’ atangire ico caha ciwe yakoze imasa y’umukangara itagira agasembga: ayinzanire kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha." 
Leviticus4:4 Azane iyo masa ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro imbere yanje, arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rwayo, ayikererere imbere yanje." 
Leviticus4:5 Uwo muherezi yarobanujwe amavuta, aheze yābīre ku maraso y’iyo masa, ayazane mw ihema ry’ibonaniro:" 
Leviticus4:6 ajōbeke urutoke rwiwe mur’ ayo maraso, ayacucagire ibihetangabo ndwi imbere yanje, hino ya ca gihuzu gikingiriye Ahēra cane." 
Leviticus4:7 Kur’ ayo maraso nyene ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu itamirana, kiri mw ihema ry’ibonaniro imbere yanje; ayandi maraso yose y’iyo masa ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, kiri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:8 Kand’ iyo masa y’ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha, az’ ayikūremw’ ibinure vyayo vyose: urubambanda rwōrōshe amara, n’ibinure vyose bihometse ku mara," 
Leviticus4:9 n’amafyigo yompi, n’ibinure bihometse kuri yo, ahahereranye n’umurya, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, agakūrane n’amafyigo," 
Leviticus4:10 babikūre nk’uko nyene bahora babikūra ku masa y’ikimazi c’ishimwe; uyo muherezi avyosereze ku gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi. 
Leviticus4:11 Kand’ urusato rw’iyo masa, n’inyama zayo zose, hamwe n’umutwe wayo, n’ibikenye vy’amaguru, n’amara yayo, n’amayezi yayo," 
Leviticus4:12 ivy’ iyo masa vyose iyo biva bikagera, abijane inyuma y’aho mushagaje, ahantu hadahumanye, aho basēsa umunyota, abigereke ku nkwi, abiturire; ah’ umunyota usēswa abe ari ho bituririrwa." 
Leviticus4:13 Kand’ ikoraniro ryose ry’ Abisirayeli ni ryaramuka ricumuye, ritabigize ibigirankana, ntibabimenye, bakoze mu vyo jewe Uhoraho nabuzanije, bakikwegera gutsindwa n’urubanza;" 
Leviticus4:14 igicumuro bacumuye ni camenyekana, iryo shengero rize ritange imasa y’umukangara kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, bayizane imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:15 Abakuru b’iryo koraniro baheze barambike ibiganza mu ruhanga rw’iyo masa imbere yanje: baheze bayikererere ngaho nyene imbere yanje. 
Leviticus4:16 Maz’ umuherezi yarobanujwe amavuta az’ azane ku maraso y’iyo masa mw ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Leviticus4:17 ajōbeke urutoke rwiwe mur’ ayo maraso, ayacucagire ibihetangabo ndwi imbere yanje, hino ya ca gihuzu." 
Leviticus4:18 Kur’ ayo maraso nyene ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro kir’ imbere yanje mw ihema ry’ibonaniro; ayandi maraso yose ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, kiri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus4:19 Az’ ayikūremw’ ibinure vyayo vyose, avyosereze ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus4:20 Ukw az’ abe ari kw agira iyo masa: nk’uko yagize ya masa yindi y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, az’ abe ari kw agira n’iyo. Nuk’ umuherezi azoba abahongeye, na bo bazoharirwa." 
Leviticus4:21 Aheze ajane ivy’ iyo masa inyuma y’aho mushagaje, abiturire nk’uko yaturiye ivy’ imasa ya mbere: ico kizoba ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha vy’ ishengero." 
Leviticus4:22 Umukuru ni yakora icaha, akagira ico akora mu vyo jewe Uhoraho Imana yiwe nabuzanije vyose, atabigize ibigirankana, akikwegera gutsindwa n’urubanza;" 
Leviticus4:23 icaha yakoze amaze kukimenyeshwa, az’ azane isuguru y’impene itagira agasembga kw ikimazi ciwe." 
Leviticus4:24 Arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rwayo, ayikererere imbere yanje aho bahora bakererera ikimazi co kwosa: kizoba ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Leviticus4:25 Umuherezi aheze yābirize urutoke ku maraso y’ico kimazi gitangiwe ivyaha, ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, ayandi maraso yaco ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’ico gicaniro." 
Leviticus4:26 Ibinure vyaco vyose avyosereze ku gicaniro, nk’uko bōsa ibinure vy’ikimazi c’ishimwe. Nuk’ umuherezi azoba amuhongeye kur’ ico caha ciwe, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus4:27 Ni hagira umuntu mu banyagihugu akora icaha atabigize ibigirankana, mu vyo jewe Uhoraho nabuzanije, akikwegera gutsindwa n’urubanza;" 
Leviticus4:28 icaha yakoze amaze kukimenyeshwa, az’ azane impene kw ikimazi ciwe, y’ishashi itagira agasembga, yo gutangirwa icaha ciwe yakoze." 
Leviticus4:29 Arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’ico kimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, agikererere aho bakererera ikimazi co kwosa." 
Leviticus4:30 Umuherezi aheze yābirize urutoke ku maraso yaco, ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, ayandi maraso yaco yose ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’igicaniro." 
Leviticus4:31 Ibinure vyaco vyose az’ abikūre, nk’uko bakūra ivy’ ikimazi c’ishimwe: uwo muherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro, bibe umubabge ummotera neza. Nuk’ umuherezi azoba amuhongeye, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus4:32 Kandi ni yaramuka azanye umwana w’intama kw ishikanwa ry’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, az’ azane ishashi itagira agasembga." 
Leviticus4:33 Arambike ikiganza mu ruhanga rw’ico kimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, agikererere aho bakererera ikimazi co kwosa, kibe ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Leviticus4:34 Umuherezi aheze yābirize urutoke ku maraso y’ico kimazi, ayasīge ku mahembe y’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, ayandi maraso yaco yose ayavyagize hasi hambavu y’igicaniro." 
Leviticus4:35 Ibinure vyaco vyose az’ abikūre, nk’uko bakūra ivy’ umwana w’intama w’ikimazi c’ ishimwe; uwo muherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro, abigeretse ku bimazi nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, bigatōngōrwa n’umuriro. Nuk’ umuherezi azoba amuhongeye kur’ ico caha ciwe yakoze, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus5:1 Ni babarahiza mw ikoraniro, umuntu akavyumva, agaheza agakora icaha co guhora ico yabonye n’ico azi, azogībgako n’ibigabitanyo vyiwe." 
Leviticus5:2 Canke ni hagira umuntu akora ku kintu kizira ic’ ari co cose, namb’ ar’ umuvyimba w’igikōko kizira, cank’ umuvyimba w’igitunzwe kizira, cank’ umuvyimba w’icikwega hasi kizira nyene, ariko ntabimenye, agahumana, kizoba kimubereye icaha." 
Leviticus5:3 Canke ni yaramuka akoze ku gihumanya giherereye ku muntu, ic’ ari co cose, ntabimenye, ni yabimenya, kizoba kimubereye icaha." 
Leviticus5:4 Canke ni hagira umuntu atantamukana indahiro y’ico agira akore, ari kibi, ari ciza, atavyiyumviriye, ic’ ari co cose umuntu yotantamukanira indahiro, hanyuma ni yabimenya, ico kintu kizoba kimubereye icaha." 
Leviticus5:5 Nuk’ umuntu ni yaramuka atsinzwe na kimwe mur’ ivyo bidōnzwe, aze yature icaha yakoze," 
Leviticus5:6 anzanire ikimazi ciwe c’impongano y’icaha yakoze, c’inyana y’intama canke y’impene, ayikūye mu mukuku, ngw ibe ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; umuherezi azoba amuhongeye ku caha ciwe." 
Leviticus5:7 Kandi ni yaba atoshobora kuronka umwana w’intama, anzanire ikimazi ciwe c’impongano y’icaha yakoze, c’intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri: kimwe kize kibe ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi kibe ikimazi co kwoswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Abizanire umuherezi, na we atangurire ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, akinuse umutwe, arik’ umutumba waco ntawusature ngw awahukanye." 
Leviticus5:9 Yābīre ku maraso y’ico kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ayacucagire ku gicaniro ku ruhande rwaco rumwe; ayandi maraso ayamiminurire hasi hambavu y’igicaniro: ico kizoba ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Leviticus5:10 Ica kabiri agitange kw ikimazi co kwoswa nk’uko bishinzwe. Nuk’ uwo muherezi azoba amuhongeye ku caha yakoze, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus5:11 Ariko ni yaba atoshobora kuronka n’izo ntunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri, az’ azane ishikanwa ry’icaha yakoze, ry’ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu igogōretse: ariko ntaz’ ayisukekw amavuta, canke ngw ayishirekw imibavu, kukw ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Leviticus5:12 Aheze ayizanire umuherezi, na we ayikamatek’ urushi rumwe rwo kuba icibutso cayo, ayosereze ku gicaniro, ayishize ku bimazi nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, bigatōngōrwa n’ umuriro: kizoba ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha." 
Leviticus5:13 Nuk’ uwo muherezi azoba amuhongeye ku caha yakoze ic’ ari co cose muri vya bindi bidōnzwe, na we azoharirwa: ifu isigaye iz’ ibe iy’ umuherezi, nk’uko bisanzwe biba kw ishikanwa rindi ry’amafu." 
Leviticus5:14 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus5:15 ati Ni hagira umuntu ampomvya ku bintu vyera ngerewe, agakora icaha kitar’ ic’ ibigirankana; az’ anzanire ikimazi ciwe c’impongano c’impfizi y’intama itagira agasembga, ikūwe mu mukuku, iz’ ibe iyimaze igiciro uzocira, ca shekeli z’ifeza zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ ahēra, ibe ikimazi c’impongano." 
Leviticus5:16 Kand’ az’ arihe ico kintu yafuditseko co mu vyera, akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco, abishīre umuherezi: uwo muherezi az’ amuhongere iyo mpfizi y’intama y’ikimazi c’impongano, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus5:17 Kandi ni hagira umuntu akora icaha, agakora na kimwe mu vyo nabuzanije; naho yoba agikoze atabizi, aba atsinzwe, kand’ azogībgako n’ibigabitanyo vyiwe." 
Leviticus5:18 Az’ azanire umuherezi impfizi y’intama itagira agasembga, ikūwe mu mukuku, iz’ ibe iyimaze igiciro uzocira, ibe ikimazi c’ impongano. Uwo muherezi az’ amuhongere kur’ ico kintu yacumuye atabigize ibigirankana, atabizi, na we azoharirwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Ico kizoba ar’ ikimazi c’impongano: n’ukuri koko, azoba yaratsinzwe imbere yanje." 
Leviticus6:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus6:2 ati Ni hagira umuntu akora icaha, akancumurako, jewe Uhoraho, akagunga mugenzi we mu vyo yamubikije, canke ku ngwati yamugwatirije, canke mu vyo yambuye, cank’ akanyaga mugenzi we ku gahahazo," 
Leviticus6:3 cank’ akabona icazimiye, akakigunga, akakirahira ibinyoma; ni hagira ikintu na kimwe mur’ ivyo vyose umuntu azokora, agakora icaha ubgo buryo;" 
Leviticus6:4 iy’ akoze ico caha, akumva kw atsinzwe, az’ arihe ico yambuye, cank’ ico yaronkeshejwe n’agahahazo, cank’ ico yabikijwe, cank’ icari cazimiye yatoye," 
Leviticus6:5 cank’ ikindi kintu cose yarahiye ibinyoma; az’ akirihe uko kingana, kand’ akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco: akirihe ina co ku musi nyene azotangakw ikimazi c’impongano." 
Leviticus6:6 Anzanire ico kimazi ciwe c’impongano c’impfizi y’intama itagira agasembga, ikūwe mu mukuku, iz’ ibe iyimaze igiciro uzocira gikwiranye n’ikimazi c’impongano; agishire umuherezi." 
Leviticus6:7 Umuherezi aheze amuhongerere imbere yanje, na we azoharirwa ico yakoze cose camutsindishije." 
Leviticus6:8 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus6:9 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe, ut’ Iki ni co cagezwe ku vy’ikimazi coswa: kize gihore kiba ku nkwi zaco ku gicaniro, kirāreho buce: umuriro wo ku gicaniro uze wame waka." 
Leviticus6:10 Maz’ umuherezi yambare wa mwambaro wiwe wera derere, na rya butura ryiwe ryera derere aryambike ubgambure bgiwe; aheze ayore umunyota w’ ikimazi coshejwe, ic’ umuriro watōngōreye ku gicaniro, awufashe i ruhande y’igicaniro." 
Leviticus6:11 Maze yambure iyo myambaro yiwe, yambare iyindi, aheze aje gusēsa uyo munyota inyuma y’aho mushagaje, ahantu hadahumanye." 
Leviticus6:12 Nuk’ umuriro wo ku gicaniro uze wame waka, ntuzime; umuherezi aze yame awucana, awurundekw inkwi uko bukeye, aheze azigerekekw ivy’ ikimazi co kwoswa, acoserezekw ibinure vy’ibimazi vy’ishimwe."
