Leviticus6:13 Umuriro uze wame waka ku gicaniro udahengeshanya, ntuz’ uzime." 
Leviticus6:14 Iki ni co cagezwe ku vy’ ishikanwa ry’amafu: bene Aroni baze barihereze bar’ aho nyene imbere yanje, imbere y’igicaniro." 
Leviticus6:15 Umuherezi aheze akamate urushi rumwe kur’ iyo fu igogōretse y’iryo shikanwa, no ku mavuta yo kuri yo, n’imibavu yose igeretse kur’ iryo shikanwa ry’ifu, avyosereze ku gicaniro kuba umubabge umota neza, bimbere icibutso caryo." 
Leviticus6:16 Ibisigaye kuri vyo Aroni n’abana biwe babirye, babirye bitambiwe, babirīre ahantu hēra, mu rugo rw’ihema ry’ibonaniro abe ari ho babirīra." 
Leviticus6:17 Ntibaze babicumbane n’umwambiro. Ndabibahaye, bibe umugabane wabo ku mashikanwa nshikanirwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro; n’ivyera cane, nk’ukw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha kimeze, bo n’ic’ impongano." 
Leviticus6:18 Izinamuhungu wese wo muri bene Aroni yemererwa kubiryako; bibaye umwanya wabo w’intahava, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, wo ku mashikanwa nshikanirwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro; ūzobikorako wese azoba abaye uwera, abe inyegu yavyo." 
Leviticus6:19 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus6:20 at’ Iri ni ryo shikanwa rya Aroni n’abana biwe, bakwiye kuzokwama banshikanira, uhereye ku musi Aroni azorobanuzwa amavuta: ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu igogōretse, ngo kize kibe ishikanwa ry’ifu ry’ubudasība; igice cayo kize gishikanwe mu gitondo, ikindi ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus6:21 Baze bayivangire n’amavuta ya elayo ku cuma gikaranga; ni yamara guhwana, bayizane; baze batange iryo shikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu ar’ utumanyagu dukaranze, ngo ribe umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus6:22 Umuherezi wo mu bana biwe azorobanuzwa amavuta, amusubiriye mu gishingo, aze yame anshikanira iryo shikanwa, bibe icagezwe c’intahava: ryose rize rishe ritōngōke." 
Leviticus6:23 Ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu umuherezi azotanga, rize rishe ryose, ritōngōke: ntirize riribge na mba." 
Leviticus6:24 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus6:25 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe, ut’ Iki ni co cagezwe ku vy’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha: aho bakererera ikimazi co kwoswa, az’ abe ari ho bakererera ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, imbere yanje: n’icera cane." 
Leviticus6:26 Umuherezi ahereje ico kimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha az’ abe ari we akirya: kize kirīwe ahantu hēra, ni ho mu rugo rw’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus6:27 Ūzokora ku nyama zaco wese azoba abaye uwera, abe inyegu yaco, kandi ni hagira umwambaro wose utarukirwako n’amaraso yaco, uwo mwambaro yatarukiyeko baze bawumesurire aho hantu hēra." 
Leviticus6:28 Kandi ni catekwa mu nkono y’ imbumbano, baze bayimene; na ho ni catekwa mu nkono y’umuringa, baze bayikūbe, bayunyuguze n’amazi." 
Leviticus6:29 Izinamuhungu wese wo mu baherezi yemererwa kukiryako: kizoba ar’ icera cane. 
Leviticus6:30 Kand’ ikimazi cose gitangirwa ivyaha, amaraso yaco akajanwa mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, agahongerwa ahēra, ntikize kiribge na mba: ariko kize giturirwe." 
Leviticus7:1 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi c’impongano: kizoba ar’ icera cane. 
Leviticus7:2 Aho bakererera ikimazi co kwoswa, az’ abe ari ho bakererera ikimazi c’impongano; amaraso yaco baze bayamijagire ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus7:3 Kandi batange ibinure vyaco vyose, ari vyo murizo uko wagahometsekw ibinure, n’urubambanda rwōrōshe amara," 
Leviticus7:4 n’amafyigo yompi, n’ ibinure bihometse kuri yo, ahahereranye n’umurya, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, bagakūrane n’ amafyigo." 
Leviticus7:5 Umuherezi aheze avyosereze ku gicaniro, kibe ikimazi nshikaniwe gitōngōrwa n’ umuriro. Ico ni co kimazi c’ impongano." 
Leviticus7:6 Izinamuhungu wese wo mu baherezi yemererwa kukiryako: kize kirīrwe ahantu hēra: n’icera cane. 
Leviticus7:7 Nk’uko bigenzwa ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ni ko bigenzwa no ku kimazi c’impongano: icagezwe cavyo ni kimwe: umuherezi ahereje iyo mpongano, ni we kizoba iciwe." 
Leviticus7:8 Kand’ umuherezi ahereje ikimazi c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese co kwoswa, uwo muherezi nyene az’ abe ari we atwara urusato rw’ico kimazi coshejwe atanze." 
Leviticus7:9 Ishikanwa ryose ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu vyokejwe mu ziko, n’ibindi vyose vyakozwe mw ifu bikaranganywe n’amavuta, bo n’ivyataraguwe ku cuma gikaranga, bizoba ivy’ umuherezi abihereje." 
Leviticus7:10 Ishikanwa ryose ry’ifu, ar’ ivanze amavuta cank’ itavanze, rizoba irya bene Aroni bose, barigabangane." 
Leviticus7:11 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi c’ishimwe umuntu azonshikanira. 
Leviticus7:12 Ni yagitanga kubgo gukenguruka, ico kimazi co gukenguruka az’ agitangane n’udutsima tutambiwe twacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, bo n’utundi dutsima tubēhūye, tutambiwe nyene, twasutswekw amavuta, n’utundi nyene twacumbanywe n’amavuta, twacumbge mw ifu igogōretse ivangishijwe amavuta ngw ihwane." 
Leviticus7:13 Iryo shikanwa ryiwe, n’ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe yatanze kubgo gukenguruka, az’ abitangane n’utundi dutsima twambiwe." 
Leviticus7:14 Kandi kur’ iryo shikanwa ryiwe ry’udutsima tw’ uburyo bgose, az’atangeko kamwe‐kamwe kw ishikanwa angereye jewe Uhoraho; rize ribe umuturi w’umuherezi amija amaraso y’ico kimazi c’ishimwe." 
Leviticus7:15 Kand’ inyama z’ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe yatanze kubgo gukenguruka, zize ziribge ku musi agitanzeko nyene: ntihaze hagire izo asigaza ngo zirāre." 
Leviticus7:16 Arikw ico kimazi ashikanye, ni caba ico gushitsa isezerano, cank’ ico ashikanye kukw avyigombeye, kize kiribge ku musi agitanzeko; izizorāra kuri co zize ziribge bukeye bgaho." 
Leviticus7:17 Arikw inyama z’ico kimazi ni zashika ku musi ugira gatatu, zize ziturirwe." 
Leviticus7:18 Ariko ni haramuka hagize inyama z’ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe ziribga ku musi ugira gatatu, ntikizoba kicemerwa, uwagitanze ntikizoba kikimuharūrwako: kizoba kibaye ikizira, ūkiriyeko azogībgako n’ukugabitanya kwiwe." 
Leviticus7:19 Ni hagira inyama zikora ku kintu gihumanya ntizize ziribge, ariko ziturirwe. Umuntu wese adahumanye ni we yemererwa kurya ku nyama z’ico kimazi." 
Leviticus7:20 Arik’ ūzorya ku nyama z’ico kimazi c’ishimwe, agihumanye, kand’ ar’ icanje jewe Uhoraho, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus7:21 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku kintu gihumanya ic’ ari co cose, ar’ igiherereye ku muntu, cank’ ar’ igitunzwe gihumanya, cank’ ar’ ikindi cose c’ikizira gihumanya, agaheza akarya ku nyama z’ikimazi c’ishimwe, kand’ ar’ icanje jewe Uhoraho, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus7:22 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus7:23 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ntimuze mwigere murya ku binure, ar’ ivy’ inka, canke vy’intama, canke vy’ impene." 
Leviticus7:24 Arikw ibinure vy’ iyipfiriye, cank’ ivy’ ikirangara, vyoshobora gukoreshwa igikorwa kindi cose: ariko ntimuze mubiryeko na gatoya." 
Leviticus7:25 Kuk’ ūzorya wese ku binure vy’ibitunzwe, kand’ ari vyo abantu batangakw ibimazi banshikanira vyo gutongorwa n’umuriro, umuntu azoramuka abiriyeko az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus7:26 Ntimuze mwigere mugeza ubuseri mu kanwa mu ngo zanyu zose, ar’ ubg’ ibiguruka, cank’ ubg’ ibitunzwe, cank’ ubg’ ibikōko." 
Leviticus7:27 Umuntu wese azobugeza mu kanwa, ubg’ ari bgo bgose, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus7:28 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus7:29 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Ūzompa ikimazi c’ishimwe, az’ anshikanire ishikanwa arikūye kur’ ico kimazi ciwe c’ishimwe nyene." 
Leviticus7:30 Ubgiwe yizanire mu minwe yiwe ishikanwa anshikaniye ryo gutōngōrwa n’ umuriro; az’ azane ibinure bo n’inkoro, kugira ngw iyo nkoro ibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje." 
Leviticus7:31 Maz’ ivyo binure umuherezi az’ avyosereze ku gicaniro; arikw inkoro ibe umwanya wa Aroni n’abana biwe. 
Leviticus7:32 Kand’ igikenye c’ukuguru kw’i buryo muze mugihe umuherezi, kibe umwanya wiwe, mugikūye ku kimazi mutanze c’ishimwe." 
Leviticus7:33 Uwo muri bene Aroni azohereza amaraso n’ibinure vy’ikimazi c’ishimwe, az’ abe ari we ahabga igikenye c’ukuguru kw’i buryo kuba umwanya wiwe." 
Leviticus7:34 Kuko ya nkoro ishikanishwa kuzunguzwa, na ca gikenye c’ukuguru kigerewe abaherezi, mbishinguye ku bimazi vy’Abisirayeli vy’ishimwe, mbihaye Aroni umuherezi, n’abana biwe, kuba umuturi bazohora bashingura mu Bisirayeli ibihe vyose." 
Leviticus7:35 Uwo ni wo mwanya wa Aroni n’abana biwe bashinguriwe ku bimazi bishikaniwe Uhoraho bigatōngōrwa n’umuriro, bāgerewe uhereye umusi barobanuriwe kuba abaherezi bo gukorera Uhoraho;" 
Leviticus7:36 Uhoraho yashinze yukw Abisirayeli bazohora babaha uwo mwanya, uhereye ku musi barobanuriweko; uzoba umuturi wabo ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Leviticus7:37 Ico ni co cagezwe co ku kimazi co kwoswa, n’ico kw ishikanwa ry’ amafu, n’ico ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, n’ico ku kimazi c’impongano, n’ico ku vyo kwinjiza abaherezi mw ibango, n’ico ku bimazi vy’ishimwe," 
Leviticus7:38 ivyo Uhoraho yageze Mose ari ku musozi Sinayi, ku musi yageze Abisirayeli kumuzanira amashikanwa, aho nyene mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi." 
Leviticus8:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus8:2 ati Jana Aroni n’abana biwe, na ya myambaro na ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, na ya masa y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, na za mpfizi z’intama zompi, na ya ndumane irimw’ imitsima itambiwe;" 
Leviticus8:3 uheze ukoranirize ikoraniro ryose ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
Leviticus8:4 Nuko Mose agenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; iryo koraniro rikoranira ku muryango w’ihema ry’ ibonaniro. 
Leviticus8:5 Mose abarira iryo koraniro, at’ Ibi ni vyo Uhoraho yageze ko bikorwa." 
Leviticus8:6 Mose araheza azana Aroni n’abana biwe, arabuhagira." 
Leviticus8:7 Yambika Aroni ya kanzo, amukenyeza wa mukanda, amwambika na wa mwinjiro, amushirako na efodi, amukenyeza na wa musipi wa efodi ujishwe n’ abahinga, awuyifatishiriza kuri we;" 
Leviticus8:8 amwambika na wa mupfuko mu gikiriza, mur’ uwo mupfuko ashiramwo Urimu na Tumimu." 
Leviticus8:9 Amwambika na ca gitambara mu mutwe; imbere kur’ ico gitambara agishirako ka kabāte k’izahabu, ari co gitsibo cera; nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Leviticus8:10 Mose araheza yābīra ya mavuta yo kurobanuza, ayarobanuza rya hema bo n’ibirimwo vyose, aravyeza." 
Leviticus8:11 Ayacucagira ku gicaniro ibihetangabo ndwi, arayakirobanuza bo n’ibintu vyaco vyose, bo n’ikigārigāri co gukaraba n’intebe yaco, ngw avyeze." 
Leviticus8:12 Maz’ ayo mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango ayasuka ku mutwe wa Aroni, aramurobanura, aramweza." 
Leviticus8:13 Mose araheza azana bene Aroni, abambika amakanzo, abakenyeza imikanda, abapfundika n’udukofero; nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Leviticus8:14 Araheza azana ya masa y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambika ibiganza mu ruhanga." 
Leviticus8:15 Mose arayikerera, yābīra amaraso yayo, ayasīgisha urutoke ku mahembe y’igicaniro impande zose, aragihumanura, araheza avyagiza ayo maraso hasi hambavu y’igicaniro, acezesha kugitangira impongano." 
Leviticus8:16 Yābīra urubambanda rwose rwōrōshe amara, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, n’amafyigo yompi, n’ibinure vyo kuri yo, avyosereza ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus8:17 Arikw ivy’ iyo masa, urusato rwayo n’inyama zayo n’amayezi yayo abituririra inyuma y’aho bashagaje, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Leviticus8:18 Araheza azana impfizi y’ intama y’ikimazi co kwoswa; Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambika ibiganza mu ruhanga. 
Leviticus8:19 Mose arayikerera, amijagira amaraso yayo ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus8:20 Arayijanjagura, ayishira mu bikenye vyayo; yōsa umutwe wayo, n’ibindi bice vyayo, n’ ibinure vyayo." 
Leviticus8:21 Amara yayo n’ibikenye vyayo vy’amaguru arabironga; nukw ivy’ iyo mpfizi y’intama vyose iyo biva bikagera Mose avyosereza ku gicaniro, kuba ikimazi coshejwe, umubabge umota neza, ikimazi gishikaniwe Uhoraho gitōngōwe n’umuriro; nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Leviticus8:22 Araheza azana ya mpfizi y’intama yindi, ari yo yo kubinjiza mw ibango, Aroni n’abana biwe bayirambika ibiganza mu ruhanga." 
Leviticus8:23 Maze Mose arayikerera, yābīra ku maraso yayo, ayakoza ku gutwi kw’i buryo kwa Aroni ahahera hejuru, no ku rukumu rwiwe rw’i buryo, no kw ino ryiwe rinini ry’i buryo." 
Leviticus8:24 Atakw azana bene Aroni, na bo nyene akoza amaraso ku matwi yabo y’i buryo ahahera hejuru, no ku bikumu vyabo vy’i buryo, no ku mano yabo manini y’i buryo: ayandi maraso ayamijagira ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus8:25 Maze yābīra ibinure vyayo, n’umurizo wayo uko wagahometsekw ibinure, n’urubambanda rwose rwōrōshe amara, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu, n’amafyigo yompi, n’ibinure vyo kuri yo, n’igikenye c’ukuguru kwayo kw’i buryo." 
Leviticus8:26 Kandi muri ya ndumane irimw’ imitsima itambiwe iteretse imbere y’Uhoraho, akūramw’ umutsima umwe, n’agatsima kamwe kācumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, n’akandi kamwe kabēhūye, ayishira kur’ ivyo binure no kur’ ico gikenye c’ ukuguru kw’i buryo." 
Leviticus8:27 Ivyo vyose abishira ku mashi ya Aroni no ku y’abana biwe, ngo babizunguze kuba ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus8:28 Mose araheza abikūra ku mashi yabo, avyosereza ku gicaniro, abigeretse kuri ca kimazi coshejwe; biba ivyo kubinjiza mw ibango, vy’umubabge umota neza, ikimazi gishikaniwe Uhoraho kigatōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus8:29 Maze Mose yābīra inkoro, arayizunguza ngw ibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere y’Uhoraho: uwo war’ umwanya wa Mose wo kur’ iyo mpfizi y’intama yo kubinjiza mw ibango, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Leviticus8:30 Maze Mose yābīra kuri ya mavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, no ku maraso yari ku gicaniro, abicucagira kuri Aroni no ku myambaro yiwe, no ku bana biwe no ku myambaro yabo; yeza Aroni n’imyambaro yiwe, n’abana biwe n’imyambaro yabo." 
Leviticus8:31 Maze Mose abarira Aroni n’abana biwe, ati Muteke za nyama ku muryango w’ihema ry’ ibonaniro; abe ari ho muzirīra, hamwe na ya mitsima iri mu ndumane yo kubinjiza mw ibango; nk’uko navuze, nti Aroni n’abana biwe babe ari bo babirya." 
Leviticus8:32 Ibisigara kur’ izo nyama no kur’ iyo mitsima mubiturire. 
Leviticus8:33 Ntimuze mutirimuke ngo muve ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro kumara imisi ndwi, gushitsa ah’ imisi yanyu yo gushikirizwa iryo bango izoshirira: kuko muzomara imisi ndwi murishikirizwa." 
Leviticus8:34 Uko bikozwe uyu musi, ni k’Uhoraho yageze ko bizokorwa mu kubatangira impongano." 
Leviticus8:35 Ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro abe ari ho mumara imisi ndwi ku murango no mw ijoro, mwitondera ivyo Uhoraho yabajeje, kugira ngo ntimupfe: kuk’ uko ari ko nabariwe." 
Leviticus8:36 Nuko Aroni n’abana biwe babikora vyose, uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose." 
Leviticus9:1 Maze ku musi ugira umunani, Mose ahamagara Aroni n’ abana biwe n’abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli;" 
Leviticus9:2 abarira Aroni, ati Jana ishuri y’umukangara y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, n’ impfizi y’intama y’ikimazi co kwoswa, bitagira agasembga, ubitange ur’ imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Leviticus9:3 Kandi barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mujane isuguru y’impene kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, bo n’imasa n’umwana w’intama, vyompi bimaze umwaka, kandi bitagira agasembga, kw ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Leviticus9:4 n’impfizi y’inka n’impfizi y’intama kw ikimazi c’ishimwe, vyo gukererera imbere y’Uhoraho; bo n’ishikanwa ry’ifu ivanze n’ amavuta ya elayo; kuk’ uyu musi Uhoraho agira abiyereke." 
Leviticus9:5 Nuko bazana ivyo Mose yageze imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro; ikoraniro ryose ryīgira hafi, rihagarara imbere yo Uhoraho." 
Leviticus9:6 Mose aravuga, at’ Ibi ni vyo Uhoraho yageze ko mukora, maz’ ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho burababonekera." 
Leviticus9:7 Maze Mose abarira Aroni, at’ Egera igicaniro, witangire ikimazi c’ ivyaha, n’ico kwoswa, wihongere, uhongere n’abantu; utange n’ibimazi vy’abantu, ubahongere, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yageze." 
Leviticus9:8 Nuko Aroni yegera igicaniro, akerera iyo shuri yitangiriye kw ikimazi c’ivyaha." 
Leviticus9:9 Abana biwe bamuhēreza amaraso, ayajōbekamw’ urutoke, ayasīga ku mahembe y’igicaniro, ayandi ayavyagiza hasi hambavu y’igicaniro:" 
Leviticus9:10 arikw ibinure, n’amafyigo, n’agashami gatoya k’igitigu vy’ico kimazi gitangiwe ivyaha, avyosereza ku gicaniro, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarageze Mose." 
Leviticus9:11 Maz’ inyama zaco n’urusāto abituririra inyuma y’aho bashagaje. 
Leviticus9:12 Araheza akerera ikimazi co kwoswa; abana biwe bamuhēreza amaraso, ayamijagira ku gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus9:13 Maze bamuhēreza ivy’ ico kimazi, bamuha ibice vyaco kimwe‐kimwe bo n’ umutwe waco, avyosereza ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus9:14 Aronga amara yaco, n’ibikenye vy’amaguru, aravyosa, abigeretse ku vy’ico kimazi coshejwe kiri ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus9:15 Maz’ azana ibimazi abantu batanze; yābīra impene y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha vy’abantu, arayikerera, ayitanga kubg’ ivyaha, nk’uko yatanze ca kimazi ca mbere." 
Leviticus9:16 Azana n’ikimazi co kwoswa, agitanga nk’uko vyagezwe." 
Leviticus9:17 Azana n’ishikanwa ry’ ifu, ayikamatak’ urushi rumwe, ayosereza ku gicaniro, ayongeye ku kimazi coshejwe co mu gitondo." 
Leviticus9:18 Kand’ akerera ya mpfizi y’inka na ya mpfizi y’intama kw ikimazi c’ishimwe gitangiwe abantu; abana biwe bamuhēreza amaraso, ayamijagira ku gicaniro impande zose;" 
Leviticus9:19 bamuhēreza ibinure vy’iyo mpfizi, n’ivy’ iyo mpfizi y’intama, n’umurizo uko wagahometsekw ibinure, n’urubambanda, n’amafyigo, n’udushami dutoya tw’ibitigu;" 
Leviticus9:20 bafasha ivyo binure ku nkoro z’ivyo bimazi; araheza yosereza ivyo binure ku gicaniro," 
Leviticus9:21 izo nkoro, bo n’ibikenye vy’amaguru y’i buryo, Aroni arabizunguza, kuba ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere y’ Uhoraho, nk’uko Mose yageze." 
Leviticus9:22 Maze Aroni aterura amaboko, atumbereye abantu, arabahezagira; araheza arururuka, ava aho yatangiye ca kimazi catangiwe ivyaha, na ca kimazi coshejwe, na ca kimazi c’ishimwe." 
Leviticus9:23 Maze Mose na Aroni binjira mw ihema ry’ ibonaniro, baraheza barasohoka, bahezagira abantu; maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bubonekera abantu bose." 
Leviticus9:24 Umuriro uvuye imbere y’Uhoraho uraheza uraza, utōngōrera ku gicaniro ca kimazi coshejwe bo na vya binure: abo bantu bose babibonye, basēsereza impundu, barūnama bashika hasi." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadabu na Abihu, bene Aroni, bābīra ivyotero vyabo, bashiramw’ umuriro, bashirakw imibavu, bayosereza Uhoraho ku muriro urahuwe ahandi, uwo atabageze." 
Leviticus10:2 Haza umuriro uvuye imbere y’Uhoraho, urabīca, bagwa aho imbere yiwe." 
Leviticus10:3 Mose abarira Aroni, at’ Ivyo ni vyo Uhoraho yavuze, ng’ Ukwera kwiwe kuzogaragarira mu bamwegera, kandi ngw Azoherwa icubahiro imbere y’abantu bose. Aroni arūmirwa." 
Leviticus10:4 Mose ahamagara Mishayeli na Elisafani, bene Uziyeli se wabo wa Aroni, arababarira, ati Ni mwīgire hano, muterure ab’i wanyu, mubakūre imbere y’ahēra, mubajane inyuma y’aho dushagaje." 
Leviticus10:5 Nuko bīgira hafi, babaterura mu makanzo yabo, uko bakayambaye, babajana inyuma y’aho bashagaje, nk’uko Mose agize." 
Leviticus10:6 Mose abarira Aroni n’abana biwe Eleyazari na Itamari, ati Ntimuhamburure imishatsi yanyu, canke ngo mutantamure impuzu zanyu, kugira ngo ntimupfe, kand’ Uhoraho ntarakire ikoraniro ryose; ariko bene wanyu, ab’ inzu yose ya Isirayeli, abe ari bo baborogeshwa n’ umuriro Uhoraho arekuye." 
Leviticus10:7 Kandi ntimutirimuke ngo muve ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngo ntimupfe: kukw amavuta y’Uhoraho mwarobanujwe akiri kuri mwebge; nuko babigenza nk’uko Mose avuze." 
Leviticus10:8 Uhoraho abarira Aroni," 
Leviticus10:9 ati Ntuze wigere unywa kuri vino canke ku kiboreza na kimwe, mwe n’abana bawe, igihe mugira mwinjire mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngo ntimupfe: ico kibabere icagezwe c’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana," 
Leviticus10:10 kugira ngo mubone uko mutandukanya ivyera n’ibitar’ ivyera, n’ibihumanya n’ ibidahumanya," 
Leviticus10:11 kandi kugira ngo mwigishe Abisirayeli ivyagezwe vyose narungikanye Mose. 
Leviticus10:12 Mose abarira Aroni n’abana biwe basigaye, Eleyazari na Itamari, ati Ni mujane ivyasigaye kuri rya shikanwa ry’ifu ryo mu mashikanwa yashikaniwe Uhoraho agatōngōrwa n’umuriro, mubirīre i ruhande y’igicaniro bitarimw’ umwambiro: kukw ar’ ivyera cane." 
Leviticus10:13 Nuko mubirīre ahantu hēra, kukw ar’ umuturi wawe n’uw’ abana bawe, wo ku mashikanwa ashikaniwe Uhoraho agatōngōrwa n’umuriro; kuk’ ukw ari ko nabariwe." 
Leviticus10:14 Na ya nkoro yashikanishijwe kuzunguzwa, na ca gikenye c’ukuguru cagerewe abaherezi, mubirīre ahantu hadahumanye, mwe n’abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe; kukw ari vyo wagerewe ngo bibe umuturi wawe, n’uw’ abahungu bawe, wo ku bimazi vy’ishimwe Abisirayeli bashikanye." 
Leviticus10:15 Igikenye c’ukuguru kigerewe abaherezi bo n’inkoro yo kuzunguzwa, baze bahore babizanana n’ishikanwa ry’ibinure ryo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, ngo babizunguze, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere y’Uhoraho: ivyo bizoba ivyawe n’ivy’ abana bawe, bibe umuturi wanyu w’intahava, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yageze." 
Leviticus10:16 Mose abariritsa ca kimazi c’impene catangiwe ivyaha, asanga catongotse. Arakira bene Aroni basigaye, Eleyazari na Itamari, arababaza," 
Leviticus10:17 ati Mwabujijwe n’iki kurya ca kimazi catangiwe ivyaha, ngo muteko mukirīre ahantu hēra, kand’ ar’ icera cane, ar’ ico Uhoraho yabahaye ngo gitume mwishirakw ibigabitanyo vy’ikoraniro, ngo murihongerere imbere yiwe?" 
Leviticus10:18 Ehe rāba amaraso yaco kw atari yazanywe ahēra, nta cari kubabuza kukirya, ngo mukirīre ahantu hēra, nk’uko nageze." 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni yishura Mose, at’ Ereg’ uyu musi batanze ikimazi cabo gitangiwe ivyaha, bo n’ikimazi cabo co kwoswa, bakabitangira imbere y’Uhoraho; kand’ ehe rāba ayo nabonye: mbega non’ uyu musi iyo ndya ico kimazi catangiwe ivyaha, ivyo vyari kuba ari vyiza imbere y’Uhoraho?" 
Leviticus10:20 Mose avyumvise, arashirwa." 
Leviticus11:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Leviticus11:2 ati Mubarire Abisirayeli, muti Mu bikōko vyose, ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu bigenda vyose vyo mw isi:" 
Leviticus11:3 igifise inzāra cose ziri n’umwanya hagati, kikagira inzāra kubiri, kigatako kikūza, ico ni co mwemererwa kurya mu bigenda." 
Leviticus11:4 Ariko mu vyūza no mu bifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, ivyo mutemerewe kurya n’ibi: ingamiya, kuko naho yūza ariko ntigira inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, iyo n’ igihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:5 N’ inkezi, kuko naho yūza ariko ntigira inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, na yo n’igihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:6 N’urukwavu, kuko naho rwūza ariko ntirugira inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, na rwo n’igihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:7 N’ ingurube, kuko nah’ ifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, ikagira inzāra kubiri, ariko ntiyūza, na yo n’igihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:8 Inyama zavyo ntimuze muzirye, n’imivyimba yavyo ntimuze muyikoreko: n’ibihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:9 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu biba mu mazi vyose: ibiba mu mazi, mu biyaga no mu nzūzi, bifise amababa n’ibigaragamba, ivyo ni vyo mwemererwa kurya." 
Leviticus11:10 Ibidafise amababa n’ ibigaragamba vyo mu biyaga no mu nzūzi, ibigendera mu mazi vyose, ibifise ubugingo vyose biba mu mazi, n’umuziro kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:11 Bize bihore biba umuziro kuri mwebge; ntimuze mwigere murya ku nyama zavyo, kand’ imivyimba yavyo muze muyigire umuziro." 
Leviticus11:12 Ico mu mazi cose kitagira amababa n’ibigaragamba kize kibe umuziro kuri mwebge. 
Leviticus11:13 Ibi az’ abe ari vyo mugira umuziro mu bisīga; ntibize vyigere biribga, n’ibizira: inkukuma, n’itarangabo, na oziniya;" 
Leviticus11:14 n’ ikinyamwanira, n’inkōna, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Leviticus11:15 n’icitwa igikōna cose, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Leviticus11:16 n’imbuni, na tamasi, na shakafu, n’agaca, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Leviticus11:17 n’igihuna, na shalaki, n’inyanana;" 
Leviticus11:18 na tinishemeti, n’ inkongori, n’ikinyakabaka;" 
Leviticus11:19 na sarumfune, n’agasōza, ukw amoko yavyo ari, na samunsure, n’ agahungarema." 
Leviticus11:20 Udukōko twose tw’amababa tunyonyera, tugendesha amaguru ane, n’umuziro kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:21 Arikw ivyo mwemererwa kurya muri two n’ibi: udufise amaguru maremare akonye ahahera hejuru y’ibirenge, yo kugenda dutarukisha hasi." 
Leviticus11:22 Utwo mwemererwa kurya muri two n’uruzige, nk’ukw amoko yazo ari, n’utundi tumeze nka rwo twitwa solamu na harugoli na hagabu, nk’ukw amoko yatwo ari." 
Leviticus11:23 Arik’ utundi twose tw’amababa tunyonyera, tugendesha amaguru ane, n’umuziro kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:24 Kand’ ibi ni vyo vyobahumanya: uwokora ku muvyimba wavyo yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba; 
Leviticus11:25 kandi n’uwogira ico aterura co ku muvyimba wavyo, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus11:26 Ikigenda gifise inzāra ziri n’imyanya hagati cose, arikw inzāra zitari kubiri rwose, kigatako nticūze, n’igihumanya kuri mwebge; uwogikorako wese yoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus11:27 Ikigendesha amajanja cose co mu bigenza amaguru ane vyose, n’igihumanya kuri mwebge; uwokora ku muvyimba wavyo yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus11:28 Kandi n’ uwogira ico aterura co ku muvyimba wavyo, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba: ivyo n’ ibihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:29 Ibi ni vyo bihumanya kuri mwebge mu binyonyera bigenda hasi: igikara, n’imbeba, bo n’imburu nk’ukw amoko yazo ari;" 
Leviticus11:30 n’ icūgu, n’ikivumbura, n’umuserebanyi, n’agacamano, n’uruvu." 
Leviticus11:31 Ivyo vyose n’ibihumanya kuri mwebge mu binyonyera vyose; uwokora ku gipfuye muri vyo yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba. 
Leviticus11:32 Kand’ ikintu cose cokorokerwako n’umuvyimba w’ico muri vyo coba gihumanye; kandi naho coba ikintu cose cabājwe mu giti, cank’ umwambaro, cank’ urusato, cank’ igunira, cank’ ikindi kintu iyo kiva kikagera gikoreshwa mu buryo ubg’ ari bgo bgose, gikwiye kwinikwa mu mazi, kibe igihumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba; aho ni ho kizoba gihumanutse." 
Leviticus11:33 Kand’ ikibumbano cose cokorokerwamwo na kimwe muri vyo, ivyoba muri co vyose vyoba bihumanye, na co ubgaco mwoba mukwiye kukimena." 
Leviticus11:34 Ibirībga vyose vyosukwakw amazi yo muri co, vyoba bihumanye: kand’ ico kunywa cose coba mu kintu ben’ ico cose coba gihumanye." 
Leviticus11:35 Ikintu cose cokorokerwako n’icavuye ku muvyimba wavyo coba gihumanye; ar’ iziko cank’ amashiga, coba gikwiye kumenagurwa; ivyo n’ ibihumanya, kandi bizoba ibihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:36 Mugabo icokorokera mw isōko canke mu rwobo rwimbiwe kubīkamw’ amazi, akadengēramwo, yo ntiyoba ahumanye; arik’ uwokora ku muvyimba wavyo wakorokeyemwo yoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus11:37 Kandi ni hagira ico ku muvyimba wavyo cogwa mu mbuto zo kubibga iz’ ari zo zose, zo ntizoba zihumanye." 
Leviticus11:38 Ariko namb’ izo mbuto zīnitswe mu mazi, icavuye ku muvyimba wavyo kikazigwamwo, zizoba igihumanya kuri mwebge." 
Leviticus11:39 Kand’ igikōko cose cank’ igitunzwe mu vyo mwemererwa kurya, hagize igipfuye, uwokora ku muvyimba waco yoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus11:40 Kandi horamuka har’ ūriye ku muvyimba waco, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba; n’uwoterura umuvyimba waco, na we az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus11:41 Kand’ ikinyonyera cose kinyonyera hasi n’ikizira: ntikize cigere kiribga. 
Leviticus11:42 Igikwega inda hasi cose, n’akagendesha amaguru ane kose, n’akagendesha ubuguru bginshi, mber’ utunyonyera twose tunyonyera hasi, ntimuze mwigere muturya, kukw ar’ ibizira." 
Leviticus11:43 Ntimuze mwiyandurishe ak’ ari ko kose ko mu tunyonyera, ntimuze muvyihumanishe ngo bibanduze." 
Leviticus11:44 Kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu: ni mwiyeze rero, mube abera, kuko nanje nd’ uwera; kandi ntimuze mwiyandurishe akanyonyera k’uburyo bgose kagendera hasi." 
Leviticus11:45 Kukw ari jewe Uhoraho nabadūganye mbakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ngo mbe Imana yanyu: nuko rero mube abera, kuko nanje nd’ uwera." 
Leviticus11:46 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vyo ku bikōko no ku bitunzwe, no ku bisīga, no ku bifise ubugingo vyose bigendera mu mazi, no ku turiho twose tunyonyera hasi;" 
Leviticus11:47 vyo gutandukanya igihumanya n’ikidahumanya, n’icoribga mu bigenda n’ikitoribga." 
Leviticus12:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus12:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Umugore ni yasama inda, akavyara umwana w’umuhungu, az’ amare imisi ndwi ahumanye: nk’uko bimubera iy’ari mu muhango w’imiziro yiwe, ni kw azoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus12:3 Ku musi ugira umunani uwo mwana az’ akebge. 
Leviticus12:4 Nyina az’ amare imisi mirongwitatu n’itatu abone guhumanurwa, avuye mu maraso yiwe; ntaz’ akore ku kintu cera na kimwe, canke ngw ashike ahantu hēra, gushitsa ah’ imisi y’uguhumanurwa kwiwe izoshirira." 
Leviticus12:5 Na ho ni yavyara umwana w’umukobga, az’ amare amayinga abiri ahumanye, nk’uko bimubera iy’ ari mu miziro yiwe; az’ aheze amare imisi mirongwitandatu n’ itandatu abone guhumanurwa, avuye mu maraso yiwe." 
Leviticus12:6 Imisi y’uguhumanurwa kwiwe ni yaramuka ishize, yo ku muhungu canke ku mukobga, az’ azane umwagazi w’intama utarengeje umwaka kw ikimazi co kwoswa, n’icana c’inuma cank’ intunguru, kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, abizanire umuherezi ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro:" 
Leviticus12:7 na we aheze abitangire aho nyene imbere yanje jewe Uhoraho, amuhongere; uwo mugore ni ho azoba ahumanuwe isōko y’amaraso yiwe. Ico ni co cagezwe c’umugore avyaye, namba yoba avyaye umuhungu cank’ umukobga." 
Leviticus12:8 Kandi ni yaba atoshobora kuronka umwagazi w’intama, az’ azane intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri; imwe y’ikimazi co kwoswa, iyindi y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha: nuk’ umuherezi amuhongere, na we azoba ahumanutse." 
Leviticus13:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Leviticus13:2 at’ Umuntu ni yagira igishundu, cank’ akagira ibintu bitongangiye, cank’ akagira ikibibi, ku mubiri wiwe inyuma ku rukoba, ico kintu kigahinduka indwara y’imibembe aho nyene ku rukoba rwiwe, baze bamuzanire Aroni umuherezi, cank’ umwe wo muri bene Aroni abaherezi." 
Leviticus13:3 Nuk’ uwo muherezi asuzume iyo ndwara iri ku mubiri wiwe inyuma ku rukoba; maz’ ubgoya bg’aho hantu harwaye, ni yasanga bgahindutse bukēra, iyo ndwara igasa n’aho yinjiye imbere mu rukoba, iyo ndwara izoba ar’ iy’ imibembe: nuk’ uwo muherezi amusuzumye, avuge kw ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:4 Na ho ni yasanga ico kibibi co ku mubiri wiwe cera, kandi kidasa n’aho cinjiye imbere mu rukoba, n’ ubgoya bgaho butāhindutse ngo bgere, nuk’ uwo muherezi yugarane uwo murwayi kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:5 Ku musi ugira indwi uwo muherezi amusuzume; ni yasanga iyo ndwara itayegayeze, ngo yunguruze inyuma ku rukoba, uwo muherezi asubire amwugarane kumara iyindi misi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:6 Ku musi ugira indwi, yongere amusuzume; nuko ni yabona iyo ndwara irikw irazimangana, itunguruje inyuma ku rukoba, avuge kw adahumanye: kizoba car’ igisekera; uwo muntu agende amesure impuzu ziwe, abe uwejejwe." 
Leviticus13:7 Arikw amaze guheza kwiyereka umuherezi, akezwa, ico gisekera kikunguruza inyuma ku rukoba, aze yongere kwiyereka umuherezi." 
Leviticus13:8 Uwo muherezi amusuzume, maze ni yabona ico gisekera cunguruje koko aho nyene inyuma ku rukoba, avuge kw ahumanye: izoba ar’ imibembe." 
Leviticus13:9 Umuntu ni yafatwa n’indwara y’imibembe, az’ azanirwe umuherezi;" 
Leviticus13:10 uwo muherezi amusuzume; maze ni haboneka ahashundashe, inyuma ku rukoba, hagatako hakēra, bigatuma ubgoya bgaho bgera, inyama zaho zikajējēta;" 
Leviticus13:11 izoba ar’ imibembe yamaze igihe kirekire mu rukoba rw’umubiri wiwe: uwo muherezi avuge kw ahumanye, ntarinde kumwugarana, kukw ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:12 Arikw imibembe ni yasēsa ku mubiri, ikarangiza umubiri wose w’uwafashwe n’iyo ndwara, uhereye ku mutwe ugashitsa ku birenge, ah’ umuherezi ageza amaso hose;" 
Leviticus13:13 uwo muherezi amusuzume: maze ni yabona iyo mibembe imukwiye umubiri wose, az’ avuge yuk’ uyo yafashwe n’iyo ndwara adahumanye: umubiri wiwe ko wahindutse ukēra hose, ntahumanye." 
Leviticus13:14 Ariko ni yaramuka agize ahamyotse, hakaba inyama zijega, azoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:15 Umuherezi az’ ahasuzume, avuge kw ahumanye: izo nyama zijega n’uguhumana: n’imibembe." 
Leviticus13:16 Na ho ahar’ izo nyama zijega, ni hasubira guhinduka, hakēra, asubire ku muherezi," 
Leviticus13:17 na we amusuzume; maze ni yasanga aho hārwaye hahindutse, hakēra, uwo muherezi avuge ko yahumanutse: azoba atagihumanye." 
Leviticus13:18 Umuntu ni yagira inkovu y’ahahora igihute inyuma ku rukoba," 
Leviticus13:19 maze muri nya nkovu hagashundaha hakabenjuka, canke hakaza ikibibi, hagatukura; haze herekwe umuherezi," 
Leviticus13:20 na we ahasuzume, maze ni yasanga ico kintu gisa n’icinjiye imbere mu rukoba, ubgoya bgaho bgahindutse, bukēra, uwo muherezi az’ avuge kw ahumanye: izoba ar’ indwara y’imibembe, yaziye mu nkovu y’igihute." 
Leviticus13:21 Arik’ umuherezi ni yahasuzuma, agasanga hatar’ ubgoya bgera, kandi kitinjiye imbere mu rukoba, ariko kiriko kirazimangana, uwo muherezi az’ amwugarane kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:22 Maze ni yasanga cunguruje inyuma ku rukoba, avuge kw ahumanye: izoba ar’ imibembe." 
Leviticus13:23 Arikw ico kibibi ni kitayegayega ngo cunguruze, kizoba ar’ inkovu ya ca gihute; umuherezi az’ avuge ko yeze." 
Leviticus13:24 Cank’ umuntu ni yagira ubushe ku mubiri wiwe, inyuma ku rukoba, inkovu yabgo igahinduka ikibibi, hagatukura canke hakabenjuka;" 
Leviticus13:25 umuherezi az’ ahasuzume; ni yasanga ubgoya bgo mur’ ico kibibi buhindutse, bukēra, kigasa n’icinjiye imbere mu rukoba, izoba ar’ imibembe yaziye muri bga bushe: nuk’ uwo muherezi avuge kw ahumanye; izoba ar’ indwara y’imibembe." 
Leviticus13:26 Arik’ umuherezi ni yahasuzuma, agasanga ubgoya bgo mur’ ico kibibi butera, kandi kitinjiye imbere mu rukoba, ariko kiriko kirazimangana, uwo muherezi amwugarane kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:27 Ku musi ugira indwi, uwo muherezi amusuzume; maze ni yasanga cunguruje inyuma ku rukoba, avuge kw ahumanye: izoba ar’ indwara y’imibembe." 
Leviticus13:28 Arikw ico kibibi ni kitayegayega ngo cunguruze inyuma ku rukoba, kandi kikaba kiriko kirazimangana, hazoba haje igishundu kiziye muri bga bushe: uwo muherezi avuge ko yeze; izoba ar’ inkovu y’ubgo bushe." 
Leviticus13:29 Kand’ umugabo cank’ umugore ni yafatwa n’indwara mu mutwe canke mu bganwa," 
Leviticus13:30 umuherezi az’ asuzume iyo ndwara; ni yabona isa n’iyinjiye musi y’ urukoba, umushatsi waho ugacēkūka, ukaba intaragande; avuge kw ahumanye: kizoba ar’ igiturika c’imibembe ifatiye mu mutwe canke mu bganwa." 
Leviticus13:31 Arik’ umuherezi ni yasuzuma iyo ndwara y’igiturika, agasanga isa n’ah’ itinjiye imbere mu rukoba, kandi hatar’ umushatsi wirabura, uwo muherezi yugarane uwafashwe n’ iyo ndwara y’igiturika kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:32 Ku musi ugira indwi umuherezi az’ asuzume iyo ndwara; maze ni yasanga ico giturika kitunguruje, hatar’ umushatsi ucēkūtse, kandi kidasa n’aho cinjiye imbere mu rukoba," 
Leviticus13:33 baheze bamumwe, arikw ah’ ico giturika kiri ntibahamwe; uwo muherezi asubire yugarane uwafashwe n’ico giturika iyindi misi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:34 Ku musi ugira indwi uwo muherezi asuzume ico giturika: maze ni yasanga kitunguruje inyuma ku rukoba, kandi kidasa n’aho cinjiye imbere mu rukoba, uwo muherezi avuge kw adahumanye: uwo muntu agende amesure impuzu ziwe, abe uwejejwe." 
Leviticus13:35 Arikw amaze guheza kwitwa uweze, ico giturika kikunguruza inyuma ku rukoba," 
Leviticus13:36 umuherezi aheze amusuzume; maze ni yasanga ico giturika cunguruje inyuma ku rukoba, ntiyirirwe aserangura umushatsi k’ucēkūtse: uyo azoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:37 Na ho ku ruhande rwiwe ni yasanga ico giturika kitayegayeze, n’umushatsi wahameze wirabura; ico giturika kizoba gikize, uwo muntu azoba yeze: umuherezi avuge ko yeze." 
Leviticus13:38 Kandi ni hagira umugabo cank’ umugore agira ibibibi ku mubiri wiwe inyuma ku rukoba, ivyo bibibi bikēra;" 
Leviticus13:39 umuherezi az’ abisuzume: maze ni yasanga ivyo bibibi vyo ku mubiri wiwe vyeragurika gusa, bizoba ar’ amabara yadutse inyuma ku rukoba: uyo muntu azoba adahumanye." 
Leviticus13:40 Kand’ umugabo ni yavunguka umushatsi, buzoba ar’ ubuhanza, ariko ntazoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:41 Kandi ni yavunguka umushatsi wo mu gitwariro, azoba ar’ ubuhanza yatobotse mu gitwariro, ariko ntazoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus13:42 Ariko ni haturika ibintu vy’indwara bitukura mu buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro; izoba ar’ imibembe yaje mur’ ubgo buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro. 
Leviticus13:43 Nuk’ umuherezi az’ amusuzume: maze ni yasanga ico gishundu arwaye gitukura aho nyene mu buhanza bgo mu gakomokomo canke mu bgo mu gitwariro, igasa n’imibembe ir’ inyuma ku rukoba;" 
Leviticus13:44 uwo muntu azoba ar’ umunyamibembe, azoba ahumanye; umuherezi ntaz’ abure kuvuga kw ahumanye; iyo ndwara izoba yamufatiye mu mutwe." 
Leviticus13:45 Kand’ umunyamibembe iy’ arwaye iyo ndwara, agende yambaye impuzu zitantamutse, ahamburuye umushatsi wiwe, yipfutse ku munwa, agende arasemerera, ati Ndahumanye, ndahumanye!" 
Leviticus13:46 Imisi yose akirwaye iyo ndwara azoba ahumanye; mber’ azoba ar’ igihumane, abe ukwiwe: az’ abe hirya y’aho mushagaje." 
Leviticus13:47 Kandi ni hagira umwambaro urikw indwara yo mu buryo bg’ imibembe, n’iyo woba wajishwe mu bgoya bg’intama, canke mu nyuzi zera derere;" 
Leviticus13:48 iyo ndwara igafata kur’ ico kijishano uko kijishwe kwose, ari mu nyuzi zera derere canke mu z’ubgoya bg’ intama; cank’ igafata ku rusāto, canke ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto;" 
Leviticus13:49 iyo ndwara ikagomba gusa n’akatsi gatoto canke n’agahama, aho nyene ku mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke ku rusāto, canke ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto; iyo ndwara izoba ar’ iyo mu buryo bg’ imibembe: ivyo vyerekwe umuherezi." 
Leviticus13:50 Na we asuzume iyo ndwara, yugarane ico iriko kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:51 Ku musi ugira indwi asubire asuzume iyo ndwara; maze ni yasanga iyo ndwara yunguruje kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke kur’ urwo rusāto, ico rwoba rukora cose; iyo ndwara izoba ar’ imibembe igenda irarya: ico kintu kizoba gihumanye." 
Leviticus13:52 Aheze aturire uwo mwambaro, iyo ndwara namba yoba ifashe kur’ ico kijishano uko kijishwe kwose, ari mu nyuzi z’ubgoya bg’intama canke mu zera derere, canke namba yoba ifashe ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto, kukw ar’ imibembe igenda irarya; ico kintu kize giturirwe." 
Leviticus13:53 Arik’ uwo muherezi ni yasuzuma, akabona iyo ndwara itunguruje kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto;" 
Leviticus13:54 avuge ko bamesura ico iyo ndwara yafashe, aheze acugarane kumara iyindi misi ndwi." 
Leviticus13:55 Maz’ ico kintu indwara yafashe, uwo muherezi az’ agisuzume, kimaze kumesurwa; nuko ni yasanga ah’ iyo ndwara yafashe hadahinduye ibara, kand’ iyo ndwara itunguruje, na ho nyene kizoba gihumanye; kize giturirwe: izoba ar’ iyo ndwara igenda irarya, naho coba kibaye inkūte imbere cank’ inyuma." 
Leviticus13:56 Maz’ ico kintu indwara yafashe, uwo muherezi ni yagisuzuma, agasanga iyo ndwara irikw irazimangana, kimaze kumesurwa, aho hantu aheze ahatabure, ahakūre kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke kur’ urwo rusāto." 
Leviticus13:57 Maz’ iyo ndwara ni yasubira kwubuka kur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto, izoba igitwarije; ico kintu kirimw’ iyo ndwara kize giturirwe." 
Leviticus13:58 Na ho iyo ndwara ni yaba yavuye mur’ uwo mwambaro uk’ ujishwe kwose, canke mu kintu ic’ ari co cose cakozwe mu rusāto, cari caramesuwe, kize gisubire kumesurwa ubugira kabiri, kibe gihumanutse." 
Leviticus13:59 Ico ni co cagezwe c’indwara yo mu buryo bg’imibembe ifashe umwambaro, ar’ uwajishwe mu bgoya bg’intama canke mu nyuzi zera derere, igafata kur’ ico kijishano uko kijishwe kwose, canke ku kintu cose cakozwe mu rusāto, ngo babone kuvuga ko gihumanye canke ko kidahumanye." 
Leviticus14:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus14:2 at’ Iki abe ari co kiba icagezwe co ku munyamibembe, ku musi wo guhumanurwa kwiwe: az’ ashīrwe umuherezi." 
Leviticus14:3 Na we aheze agende inyuma y’aho mushagaje, asuzume uwo munyamibembe; maze ni yasanga iyo ndwara y’imibembe ikize," 
Leviticus14:4 avuge ko bazanira uyo agira ahumanurwe inyoni zibiri zibona, zitar’ izo mu zizira, n’ingegene y’igiti c’isederi, n’utunyuzi dusa n’agahama, n’ utubabi twa ezobu;" 
Leviticus14:5 umuherezi avuge ko bakererera imwe mur’ izo nyoni hejuru y’ikintu c’ikibumbano, kirimw’ amazi yavomwe mu mbizi." 
Leviticus14:6 Aheze yābīre imwe ikidora, na ya ngegene y’isederi, na twa tunyuzi dusa n’agahama, na ezobu, abijobekane na ya nyoni ikidora mu maraso ya ya nyoni yakererewe hejuru y’amazi yavomwe mu mbizi." 
Leviticus14:7 Aheze ayacucagire ibihetangabo ndwi kur’ uwo nyene guhumanurwa ngw avekw imibembe, avuge kw ahumanutse, arekurire iyo nyoni idora mu gahinga." 
Leviticus14:8 Nyene guhumanurwa aheze amesure impuzu ziwe, yimoshe ahamera umushatsi hose, yiyuhagire, azoba ahumanutse, abone kugaruka aho mushagaje; arikw amare imisi ndwi abe hanze inyuma y’ihema ryiwe." 
Leviticus14:9 Ku musi ugira indwi yimoshe umushatsi wose wo ku mutwe, n’ubganwa n’ibigohe, amwe n’ uwundi wose; aheze amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, abe ahumanutse." 
Leviticus14:10 Ku musi ugira umunani aze yābīre abana b’ intama babiri b’amasuguru, batagira agasembga, n’inyana y’intama itarengeje umwaka itagira agasembga, bo n’ibice bitatu vy’icumi vy’ingero y’ifu igogōretse vyo kuba ishikanwa ry’ifu ivanze n’ amavuta ya elayo, n’ingero imwe yitwa logi y’amavuta ya elayo." 
Leviticus14:11 Umuherezi amuhumanura ashire uwo muntu nyene guhumanurwa hamwe n’ivyo bintu, imbere yanje ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus14:12 Uwo muherezi yābīre imwe mur’ ayo masuguru y’intama, ayitangekw ikimazi c’impongano, ayitangane na ya ngero yitwa logi y’amavuta, abizunguze, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje;" 
Leviticus14:13 akererere iyo suguru y’intama aho bakererera ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha bo n’ikimazi co kwoswa, ahantu hēra: nk’ukw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha ar’ umuturi w’umuherezi, ni ko n’ ikimazi c’impongano kiri: n’icera cane." 
Leviticus14:14 Uwo muherezi yābīre ku maraso y’ico kimazi c’impongano, ayakoze ku gutwi kw’i buryo kw’uyo arikw arahumanurwa, ahahera hejuru, no ku rukumu rwiwe rw’i buryo, no kw ino ryiwe rinini ry’i buryo." 
Leviticus14:15 Uwo muherezi aheze yābīre ku mavuta ari muri logi, ayasuke ku rushi rwiwe rw’i bumoso," 
Leviticus14:16 akoze urutoke rwiwe rwo ku kuryo mur’ ayo mavuta ari ku rushi rwiwe rw’i bumoso, ayacucagirishe urwo rutoke rwiwe imbere yanje ibihetangabo ndwi;" 
Leviticus14:17 amavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe, uwo muherezi ayakoze ku gutwi kw’i buryo kw’uyo arikw arahumanurwa, ahahera hejuru, no ku rukumu rwiwe rw’i buryo, no kw ino ryiwe rinini ry’i buryo, aharoye ya maraso y’ikimazi c’impongano." 
Leviticus14:18 Ayandi mavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe, uwo muherezi ayasīge mu mutwe w’uwo arikw arahumanurwa; uwo muherezi aheze amuhongerere imbere yanje:" 
Leviticus14:19 atange ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ahongere uwo arikw arahumanurwa ubuhumane bgiwe; hanyuma akerere ikimazi co kwoswa." 
Leviticus14:20 Uwo muherezi atangire ku gicaniro ico kimazi co kwoswa bo na rya shikanwa ry’ifu; uko ni kw azoba amuhongeye, na we azoba yejejwe." 
Leviticus14:21 Kandi ni yaba ar’ umworo, ntashobore kuronka ibingana birtyo, aze yābīre umwana w’intama w’isuguru, kuba ikimazi c’impongano co kuzunguzwa, ngw acīhongere, bo n’ikigiracumi c’ingero y’ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, co kuba ishikanwa ry’ifu, na logi imwe y’amavuta ya elayo;" 
Leviticus14:22 bo n’intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri, ivy’ azoshobora kuronka; kimwe kibe ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi kibe ikimazi co kwoswa." 
Leviticus14:23 Ku musi ugira umunani, az’ abishīre umuherezi ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro imbere yanje, bibe ivyo kumuhumanura." 
Leviticus14:24 Umuherezi yābīre uwo mwana w’intama w’ikimazi c’impongano, na ya ngero yitwa logi y’amavuta, abizunguze, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje." 
Leviticus14:25 Akerere uwo mwana w’intama w’ ikimazi c’impongano, aheze yābīre ku maraso y’ico kimazi, ayakoze ku gutwi kw’i buryo kw’uyo arikw arahumanurwa, ahahera hejuru, no ku rukumu rwiwe rw’i buryo, no kw ino ryiwe rinini ry’i buryo." 
Leviticus14:26 Uwo muherezi aheze asuke kur’ ayo mavuta, ayasuke ku rushi rwiwe rw’i bumoso;" 
Leviticus14:27 ayacucagirishe urutoke rwiwe rwo ku kuryo imbere yanje ibihetangabo ndwi; 
Leviticus14:28 aheze yābīre kur’ ayo mavuta ari ku rushi rwiwe, ayakoze ku gutwi kw’i buryo kw’ uyo arikw arahumanurwa, ahahera hejuru, no ku rukumu rwiwe rw’i buryo, no kw ino ryiwe rinini ry’i buryo, aho hantu nyene hari ya maraso y’ikimazi c’impongano." 
Leviticus14:29 Ayandi mavuta asigaye ku rushi rwiwe, uwo muherezi ayasīge mu mutwe w’uwo arikw arahumanurwa, kugira ngo bimubere impongano imbere yanje." 
Leviticus14:30 Kand’ atange imwe muri za ntunguru canke kimwe muri vya vyana vy’inuma, ivy’ uwo ashoboye kuronka;" 
Leviticus14:31 atange ku vy’uwo ashoboye kuronka, kimwe kibe ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi kibe ico kwoswa, hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ifu: uwo arikw arahumanurwa, umuherezi amuhongerere imbere yanje." 
Leviticus14:32 Ico ni co cagezwe c’uwafashwe n’ indwara y’imibembe, ntashobore kuronka ivyo kumuhumanura." 
Leviticus14:33 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Leviticus14:34 ati Ni mwamara gushika mu gihugu c’i Kanani, ico mbahaye kuba ishamvu yanyu, ngatera inzu yo mu gihugu c’ ishamvu yanyu indwara yo mu buryo bg’imibembe;" 
Leviticus14:35 nyen’ iyo nzu az’ agende abarire umuherezi, at’ Inzu yanje umengo isa n’aho yatewe n’indwara." 
Leviticus14:36 Uwo muherezi avuge ko basohora ibintu vyose muri yo, atarinjira gusuzuma iyo ndwara, kugira ngw ivyo mur’ iyo nzu vyose vyoye guhinduka ibihumanye; hanyuma uwo muherezi aze yinjire kurāba iyo nzu;" 
Leviticus14:37 nukw asuzume iyo ndwara: maze ni yabona iyo ndwara yateye amarabaga ku bisika agomba gusa n’akatsi gatoto canke n’agahama, ikaboneka nk’ah’ umengo yinjiye imbere mu gisika;" 
Leviticus14:38 uwo muherezi aheze yisohokere, ave mur’ iyo nzu: ashitse ku muryango, yugare iyo nzu kumara imisi ndwi." 
Leviticus14:39 Ku musi ugira indwi, uwo muherezi agaruke, ayisuzume; maze ni yasanga iyo ndwara yunguruje ku bisika vy’iyo nzu," 
Leviticus14:40 avuge ko basambura amabuye afashweko n’iyo ndwara, bayaterere ahantu hahumanye, inyuma y’igisagara." 
Leviticus14:41 Atekw avuge ko bahomōra iyo nzu imbere hose, kand’ ivyo bihome bahomōye babisēse ha hantu hahumanye, inyuma y’igisagara." 
Leviticus14:42 Baheze bazane ayandi mabuye, bayasanishe aho basambuye ya yandi, bazane n’iyindi ngwa, bahome iyo nzu." 
Leviticus14:43 Na h’iyo ndwara ni yagaruka, igasubira gusēsa ku nzu, bamaze gusambura amabuye no kuyihomōra, bagasubira kuyihoma;" 
Leviticus14:44 uwo muherezi aze yinjire, ayisuzume; maze ni yasanga iyo ndwara yunguruje ku nzu, izoba ar’ imibembe igenda irarya: iyo nzu izoba ihumanye." 
Leviticus14:45 Maze bayisambure, amabuye yayo, n’ibiti vyayo, n’ibihomōtse kuri yo vyose, babikūre mu gisagara, babijane ahantu hahumanye." 
Leviticus14:46 Ikindi, ūzokwinjira mur’ iyo nzu igihe icugawe, azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus14:47 Kand’ uwoyirāramwo az’ amesure impuzu ziwe; n’uwoyirīramwo na we amesure impuzu ziwe. 
Leviticus14:48 Na ho umuherezi ni yinjira, akayisuzuma, agasanga iyo ndwara itunguruje ku nzu, imaze guhomwa; uwo muherezi avuge kw ihumanutse, kukw iyo ndwara ikize." 
Leviticus14:49 Yābīre ivyo guhumanura iyo nzu, inyoni zibiri, n’ ingegene y’igiti c’isederi, n’utunyuzi dusa n’agahama, n’utubabi twa ezobu." 
Leviticus14:50 Aheze akererere imwe mur’ izo nyoni hejuru y’ ikintu c’ikibumbano, kirimw’ amazi yavomwe mu mbizi:" 
Leviticus14:51 yābīre iyo ngegene y’isederi, n’iyo ezobu, n’utwo tunyuzi dusa n’agahama, n’iyo nyoni ikidora, abijōbeke mu maraso y’iyo nyoni yakerewe no mur’ ayo mazi yavomwe mu mbizi, acucagire kur’ iyo nzu ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Leviticus14:52 Ahumanuze iyo nzu amaraso y’iyo nyoni, n’ayo mazi yavomwe mu mbizi, n’iyo nyoni ikidora, n’iyo ngegene y’isederi, n’iyo ezobu, n’utwo tunyuzi dusa n’agahama." 
Leviticus14:53 Aheze agende arekurire iyo nyoni idora mu gahinga, inyuma y’igisagara; uko ni kw azoba ahongeye iyo nzu: nukw izoba yejejwe." 
Leviticus14:54 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vy’ uburyo bgose bg’indwara y’imibembe: ar’ igiturika," 
Leviticus14:55 ar’ indwara yo mu buryo bg’imibembe ifashe umwambaro cank’ inzu," 
Leviticus14:56 ar’ igishundu, ar’ ibintu bitongangiye, ar’ ikibibi," 
Leviticus14:57 kugira ngo vyigishe umuntu kw ikintu gihumanye, canke ko kidahumanye: ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vyo ku mibembe." 
Leviticus15:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Leviticus15:2 ati Mubarire Abisirayeli, mut’ Umugabo wese ni yagira igisokoro mu mubiri wiwe, azoba ahumanye kubg’ ico gisokoro ciwe." 
Leviticus15:3 Uku ni kwo kuzoba guhumana kwiwe gutewe n’ico gisokoro ciwe: ni yaba agenda arajejeta cank’ azibiye, aba ahumanye." 
Leviticus15:4 Uburiri bgose umunyagisokoro aryamyeko buzoba buhumanye, n’ikintu cose yicayeko kizoba gihumanye." 
Leviticus15:5 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku buriri bgiwe az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:6 Ūzokwicara ku kintu na kimwe umunyagisokoro yicayeko, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:7 Ūzokora ku mubiri w’umunyagisokoro, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:8 Kand’ umunyagisokoro ni yacira amate, agakorokera k’ūdahumanye, uyo az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:9 Icicaro cose c’ikigenderwako umunyagisokoro azokwicarako kizoba gihumanye. 
Leviticus15:10 Ūzokora ku kintu na kimwe cari musi yiwe, azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba; kand’ ūzoterura ivyo, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:11 Kand’ umunyagisokoro ni yakora ku muntu adakaravye, uwo az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:12 Ikintu c’ikibumbano umunyagisokoro azokorako, kize kimenwe; na ho ni caba ikibazano, kize cunyugurishwe amazi." 
Leviticus15:13 Kand’ umunyagisokoro ni yagera guhumanurwa igisokoro ciwe, az’ aharūre imisi ndwi yo guhumanurwa, amesure impuzu ziwe; yiyuhagire mu mazi yavomwe mu mbizi, abone guhumanuka." 
Leviticus15:14 Ku musi ugira umunani, yijanire intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri, abizane imbere yanje ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, abihe umuherezi;" 
Leviticus15:15 uwo muherezi abitange kw ibimazi, kimwe co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi co kwoswa; nuk’ uwo muherezi amuhongerere imbere yanje, kubg’ igisokoro ciwe." 
Leviticus15:16 Kand’ intanga z’umugabo ni zamuvamwo, aze yiyuhagire umubiri wose, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:17 Kand’ umwambaro wose cank’ urusato rwose kirikw izo ntanga, kize kimesurwe, kize gikomeze kiba igihumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:18 Kand’ uwo mugabo ni yaramuka aryamanye n’umugore, bompi biyuhagire, bakomeze kuba abahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:19 Kand’ izinamukobga ni yaja mu mihango yiwe, az’ amare imisi ndwi mu miziro yiwe: ūzomukorako wese azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:20 Ikintu cose azoryamako akiri mu miziro yiwe kizoba gihumanye, n’ico azokwicarako cose kizoba gihumanye." 
Leviticus15:21 Kand’ umuntu wese azokora ku buriri bgiwe az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:22 Ūzokora ku kintu na kimwe yicayeko, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:23 Uhereye ku buriri bgiwe, canke ku kintu cose yicayeko, ūzogikorako azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:24 Kandi ni hagira umugabo aryamana na we, imiziro yiwe ikamwanduza, uwo mugabo azoba ahumanye kumara imisi ndwi: uburiri bgose azoryamako buzoba buhumanye." 
Leviticus15:25 Umukobga cank’ umugore ni yamara imisi myinshi ari mu mihango yiwe mu gihe kitari co, canke ni yarenza imisi yiwe, imisi yose azomara mu miziro, az’ abe nk’uko yahora ari mu miziro yiwe; azoba ahumanye." 
Leviticus15:26 Uburiri bgose azoryamako mu misi yose yo guhumana kwiwe, buze bumubere nk’ubgo yaryamyeko mu misi y’imiziro yiwe; n’ikintu cose azokwicarako kizoba gihumanye nk’icari gisanzwe gihumanywa n’ iy’ ari mu miziro." 
Leviticus15:27 Ūkoze kuri vyo wese azoba ahumanye; az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Leviticus15:28 Ariko ni yaramuka ageze guhumanurwa ubgo buhumane bgamuvuyemwo, az’ aharūre imisi ndwi, hanyuma abone guhumanuka." 
Leviticus15:29 Ku musi ugira umunani, yijanire intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri, abishīre umuherezi ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro;" 
Leviticus15:30 uwo muherezi abitange kw ibimazi, kimwe co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi co kwoswa; nuk’ uwo muherezi amuhongerere imbere yanje, kubg’ ubuhumane bgiwe." 
Leviticus15:31 Uko ni ko muzotandukanya Abisirayeli n’ubuhumane bgabo, kugira ngo boye gupfa bahōwe ubuhumane bgabo bgo kwanduza ihema ryanje riri hagati muri bo." 
Leviticus15:32 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe vy’ umunyagisokoro, n’ivy’ ūvubgamwo n’intanga ziwe, bikamuhumanya;" 
Leviticus15:33 n’ivy’ umukobga cank’ umugore arwaye ubutinyanka, n’ ivy’ ūvubgamwo n’ibimuhumanya wese, ar’ umugabo ar’ umugore, n’ivy’ umugabo arāranye n’umugore ahumanye." 
Leviticus16:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose hanyuma yo gupfa kwa ba bana ba Aroni bompi, hamwe bīgira hafi imbere y’Uhoraho, bakagwaho;" 
Leviticus16:2 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Barira Aroni mukurwawe, yoye kwama yinjira, igihe yigombeye cose, ngw aje Ahēra, hirya ya ca gihuzu gikinze, imbere ya wa mutemere wo guhongerako urumitse kuri ya sandugu hejuru, kugira ngo ntapfe; kuko nzoserukira kur’ uwo mutemere wo guhongerako ndi muri ca gicu." 
Leviticus16:3 Aroni uku abe ari kw azogenza, mu kwinjira Ahēra: aze yābīre imasa y’umukangara y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, n’impfizi y’ intama y’ikimazi co kwoswa." 
Leviticus16:4 Yambare ya kanzo yejejwe yera derere, na rya butura ryiwe ryera derere aryambike ubgambure bgiwe; akenyeze wa mukanda wera derere, yambare na ca gitambara cera derere mu mutwe; iyo ni yo myambaro yejejwe: nukw abanze kwiyuhagira, aheze ayambare." 
Leviticus16:5 Maze yake ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli amasuguru abiri y’impene kuba ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, n’impfizi y’intama kuba ikimazi co kwoswa." 
Leviticus16:6 Aroni aheze yīgize hafi ya masa y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, yo kwitangirira, yo kwitangirakw impongano bo n’urugo rwiwe." 
Leviticus16:7 Maz’ azane za mpene zompi, azihagarike imbere yanje ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Leviticus16:8 Aroni aheze apfindire izo mpene zompi: ubupfindo bumwe bgerekane iyanje, ubundi bgerekane iyo gusendwa." 
Leviticus16:9 Maze yīgize hafi iyo mpene yerekanywe n’ubupfindo kw ar’ iyanje, ayigerere kuba ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha." 
Leviticus16:10 Arikw imwe yerekanywe kw ar’ iyo gusendwa, ihagarikwe imbere yanje ikidora, kugira ngo yaturirwekw ivyaha, irungikwe kuba iyo gusenderwa mu bugaragwa." 
Leviticus16:11 Aroni aheze yīgize hafi ya masa y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha yo kwitangirira, yo kwitangirakw impongano bo n’urugo rwiwe, akerere iyo masa y’ikimazi c’ivyaha yitangiriye." 
Leviticus16:12 Yābire icotero, acuzuze amakara y’umuriro akūye ku gicaniro aho nyene imbere yanje, agende yujuje amashi imibavu iseye igogōye, y’ ibintu bimoga, avyinjize hirya ya ca gihuzu;" 
Leviticus16:13 iyo mibavu ayishire kur’ uwo muriro aho nyene imbere yanje, kugira ng’ umwotsi w’iyo mibavu utwīkīre wa mutemere wo guhongerako, uri hejuru ya vya Bishinga intahe, kugira ngo ntapfe." 
Leviticus16:14 Kandi yābīre ku maraso ya ya masa, ayacucagize urutoke kur’ uwo mutemere wo guhongerako ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, atekw ayacucagize urutoke nyene imbere y’iyo ntebe ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Leviticus16:15 Aheze akerere ya mpene y’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha vy’abantu, yinjirane amaraso yayo hirya ya ca gihuzu, ayagenze nk’uko yagenjeje amaraso ya ya masa, ayacucagire kuri wa mutemere wo guhongerako, bo n’imbere yawo." 
Leviticus16:16 Uko ni kw azoba atangiriye Ahēra impongano, kubg’ ubuhumane bg’Abisirayeli, no kubg’ ibicumuro vyabo, n’ivyaha vyabo vyose; kand’ abe ari kw agirira n’ihema ry’ibonaniro, riri hagati yabo, mu buhumane bgabo." 
Leviticus16:17 Ntihaze hagire umuntu n’umwe agera mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, igihe Aroni yinjira Ahēra kuhatangira impongano, gushitsa ah’ azoba asohokeye, amaze kwitangira impongano ubgiwe bo n’ urugo rwiwe, no kuyitangira ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Nukw asohotse, aheze aje ku gicaniro aho nyene imbere yanje, agitangirire impongano, yābīre ku maraso ya ya masa no ku ya ya mpene, ayasīge ku mahembe y’ico gicaniro impande zose." 
Leviticus16:19 Aheze agicucagirekw ayo maraso n’urutoke rwiwe ibihetangabo ndwi, agihumanure, aceze kugira ngo kivek’ ubuhumane bg’Abisirayeli." 
Leviticus16:20 Ni yaheza gutangira Ahēra impongano, bo n’ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’igicaniro, aheze yīgize hafi ya mpene ikidora." 
Leviticus16:21 Uwo Aroni aheze arambike ibiganza vyiwe vyompi mu ruhanga rw’iyo mpene idora, ayaturirekw ibigabitanyo vy’Abisirayeli vyose, n’ ibicumuro vyabo vyose, n’ivyaha vyabo vyose; abiremeke mu ruhanga rw’iyo mpene, ayihe umuntu yari yibangikanije, ayijane mu bugaragwa." 
Leviticus16:22 Iyo mpene igende yikoreye ibigabitanyo vyabo vyose, ibijane ahataba abantu; uwo muntu ayishiburire mu bugaragwa." 
Leviticus16:23 Aroni yinjire mw ihema ry’ ibonaniro, yambure ya myambaro yera derere, iyo yari yambaye igihe yinjira Ahēra, ayisigeyo." 
Leviticus16:24 Aheze yiyuhagirire ahantu hēra, yambare imyambaro yahorana, asohoke, yitangire ikimazi ciwe ubgiwe co kwoswa, atangire n’abantu icabo, yihongere ubgiwe, ahongere n’abantu." 
Leviticus16:25 Kand’ ibinure vya ca kimazi catangiwe ivyaha avyosereze ku gicaniro. 
Leviticus16:26 Uwagiye gushibura ya mpene yasenzwe, amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, abone kugaruka aho mushagaje." 
Leviticus16:27 Kand’ ivya ya masa y’ikimazi catangiwe ivyaha, n’ivya ya mpene y’ikimazi catangiwe ivyaha nyene, bimwe amaraso yavyo yinjijwe Ahēra kuba impongano, babiterure, babijane inyuma y’aho mushagaje, baturire insāto zavyo, n’inyama zavyo, n’amayezi yavyo;" 
Leviticus16:28 kand’ uwabituriye amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, abone kugaruka aho mushagaje." 
Leviticus16:29 Ibi bize bibabere icagezwe c’intahava: mu kwezi kw’indwi, ku musi wakwo w’icumi, muze mwame mwibabaza; ntihaze hagire ūgira igikorwa awukorako, naho yoba imvukira, cank’ umunyamahanga aba muri mwebge." 
Leviticus16:30 Kuko kur’ uwo musi ari ho muzotangirwa impongano, kugira ngo muhumanurwe: nuko muzoba muhumanuwe ivyaha vyanyu vyose imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus16:31 Uwo musi uze wame ubabera isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje, muze mwame muwibabazako: ico n’icagezwe c’intahava." 
Leviticus16:32 Kand’ umuherezi azorobanuzwa amavuta, akarobanurirwa ubuherezi mu gishingo ca se, az’ abe ari we abatangira impongano, yambaye ya myambaro yera derere, ari yo myambaro yejejwe;" 
Leviticus16:33 az’ atange impongano y’Ahēra cane, n’iy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’iy’ igicaniro, atange n’iy’ abaherezi, n’iy’ ikoraniro ry’abantu bose." 
Leviticus16:34 Ico kize kibabere icagezwe c’intahava, yukw azokwama atangira Abisirayeli impongano kubg’ ivyaha vyabo vyose, rimwe gusa uk’umwaka utashe. Nuko Aroni agenza nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Leviticus17:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus17:2 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe n’Abisirayeli bose, ut’ Ibi ni vyo ashinze:" 
Leviticus17:3 Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Isirayeli azobāgira inka cank’ umwana w’intama cank’ impene aho mushagaje, cank’ inyuma yaho," 
Leviticus17:4 atakizanye ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ngw akinshikanire kw ishikanwa, imbere y’ihema ryanje, uwo muntu azogībgako n’ayo maraso: mber’ azoba avishije amaraso: uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus17:5 Ivyo n’ukugira ngw Abisirayeli baze bazane ibimazi vyabo, ivyo bahora batangira mu gahinga, babinzanire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, babihe umuherezi, babinshikanire kw ibimazi vy’ishimwe." 
Leviticus17:6 Uwo muherezi aheze amije amaraso ku gicaniro canje kiri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, yose ibinure ngo bibe umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus17:7 Ntibaze bapfe basubiye gukererera ibisigo vy’amapfizi y’impene ibimazi vyabo, ari vyo bahurumbira nk’ ibimaka. Ico kize kibabere icagezwe c’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Leviticus17:8 Kand’ ubabarire, ut’ Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Isirayeli, canke wo mu banyamahanga baba muri bo, azotanga ikimazi co kwoswa cank’ ikimazi kindi," 
Leviticus17:9 atakizanye ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro kukinshikanira, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus17:10 Kand’ umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Isirayeli, canke wo mu banyamahanga baba muri bo, azokwigera ageza ubuseri mu kanwa, nzohoza igitsūre canje kur’ uwo muntu yariye ubuseri, ndamurandure mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus17:11 Kuk’ ubugingo bg’umubiri buba mu maraso, nanje nshinze kw aba ku gicaniro kubganyu, ngw abe impongano y’ubugingo bganyu: kukw amaraso ar’ impongano, kubg’ ubugingo buri muri yo." 
Leviticus17:12 Ni co catumye nihanikiriza Abisirayeli, nti Ntihaze hagire umuntu azokwigera ageza mu kanwa icitwa amaraso, ar’ uwo muri mwebge, cank’ umunyamahanga aba muri mwebge." 
Leviticus17:13 Kand’ umuntu wese wo mu Bisirayeli, canke wo mu banyamahanga baba muri bo, azogira ico afata ari guhīga, ar’ igikōko, ar’ igisīga, cank’ inyoni, mu vyemerwa kuribga, amaraso yaco az’ ayareke amiminukire hasi, ayarenzekw ivu." 
Leviticus17:14 Kuk’ ubugingo bg’icaremwe cose ar’ amaraso yaco; ni co catumye nihanikiriza Abisirayeli, nti Ntimuze mwigere mugeza mu kanwa icitwa amaraso y’icaremwe ic’ ari co cose, kuk’ ubugingo bg’icaremwe cose ar’ amaraso yaco: ūzoyageza mu kanwa wese az’ acibge." 
Leviticus17:15 Kand’ umuntu wese azorya icipfiriye cank’ ikirangara, ar’ imvukira cank’ umunyamahanga, az’ amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba: ni h’azoba ahumanutse." 
Leviticus17:16 Ariko n’atazimesura, ntiyiyuhagire, azogibgako n’ibigabitanyo vyiwe." 
Leviticus18:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus18:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni we Uhoraho, Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus18:3 Uti Ntimuze mukore nk’ivyo abo mu gihugu ca Egiputa bakora, abo mwahora mubamwo; kandi ntimuze mukore nk’ivyo abo mu gihugu c’i Kanani bakora, iy’ abajanye kuba: ntimuze mukurikire amabgirizwa yabo." 
Leviticus18:4 Ut’ Ivyagezwe vyiwe az’ abe ari vyo mwumvira, n’amabgirizwa yiwe az’ abe ari yo mwitondera, mubigenderemwo: uti Ni we Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus18:5 Uti Nuko muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yiwe, n’ivyagezwe vyiwe; umuntu azokora ivyo, ni vyo bizomubeshaho: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus18:6 Ntihaze hagire uwo muri mwebge yēgēra uwo mu nzu yo hafi, ngw amwambike ubusa: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus18:7 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa nyina, ni kwo kwambika ubusa se: uwo ni nyina, ntaz’ amwambike ubusa." 
Leviticus18:8 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa muka se; kukw ar’ ubgambure bga se. 
Leviticus18:9 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa mushiki we, ar’ uwo basangiye se canke nyina, ar’ uwo bavukana cank’ ar’ umuzanano: ntihaze hagire ūmwambika ubusa." 
Leviticus18:10 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa umwuzukuru wo ku muhungu wiwe canke wo ku mukobga, kuk’ ubgambure bgabo ari bgo bgiwe." 
Leviticus18:11 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa umukobga wa muka se, basangiye se: uwo ni mushikiwe, ntaz’ amwambike ubusa." 
Leviticus18:12 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa inasenge, kukw avukana na se." 
Leviticus18:13 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa nyinabo, kukw avukana na nyina." 
Leviticus18:14 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa se wabo, ngo yegere umugore wiwe, kukw ari nka nyina." 
Leviticus18:15 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa umukazana wiwe: uwo n’umugore w’ umuhungu wiwe, ntihaze hagire ūmwambika ubusa." 
Leviticus18:16 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa muramu we: kuk’ ubgambure bgiwe ar’ ubg’ uwo bavukana. 
Leviticus18:17 Ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa umugore n’umukobga wiwe, canke ngo yābīre umwuzukuru wo ku muhungu w’uwo mugore, cank’ uwo ku mukobga wiwe, ngw amwambike ubusa: kukw ar’ abo mu nda yiwe; ico n’icaha gikomeye." 
Leviticus18:18 Ntihaze hagire ūharika umugore uwo bavukana, ngw abe umukēba wiwe, ngw amwambike ubusa uwo bavukana akiriho." 
Leviticus18:19 Ntihaze hagire uwegera umugore ngw amwambike ubusa, akiri mu muhango wiwe." 
Leviticus18:20 Ntihaze hagire ūsambana na muka mugenzi we, ngo yiyanduze kubgiwe." 
Leviticus18:21 Kandi ntihaze hagire ūtanga uwo mu bana biwe ngo yoserezwe Moleki kw ikimazi, ngw atukishe izina ryanje, Imana yiwe: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus18:22 Ntihaze hagire umugabo yenda uwundi mugabo bga mugore: n’ikizira. 
Leviticus18:23 Ntihaze hagire ūryamana n’igitungano ic’ ari co cose, ngw aciyandurishe; kandi ntihaze hagire umugore cank’ umukobga ahagarara imbere y’igitungano ngw aryamane na co: ivyo vyoba ar’ukuvanga ibidahwanye." 
Leviticus18:24 Ntimuze mugire ico mwiyandurisha na kimwe mur’ ivyo vyose; kukw ivyo vyose ari vyo vyanduje amahanga ngira nze nirukane imbere yanyu," 
Leviticus18:25 bikanduza n’igihugu cabo; ni co gituma ngira ngihōre ibigabitanyo vyaco, ico gihugu kikahava kidahwa abakibamwo." 
Leviticus18:26 Nuko rero mweho muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yanje n’ivyagezwe vyanje, ntimuze mugire ikizira na kimwe co mur’ ivyo mukora, naho yoba imvukira, cank’ umunyamahanga aba muri mwebge." 
Leviticus18:27 Kukw ivyo bizira vyose ben’ ico gihugu babatanguriye kuhaba ari vyo bakoze, bikanduza ico gihugu." 
Leviticus18:28 Ntimuze mubikore, ngw ico gihugu kibadahwe namwe, ni mwacanduza, nk’uko cadashwe rya hanga ryabatanguriye kuhaba." 
Leviticus18:29 Kuk’ umuntu wese azogira ico akora na kimwe mur’ ivyo vyose bizira, abazobikora bose bazorandurwa bakūrwe mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus18:30 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwitondera ivyo mbihanikirije, kugira ngo ntimuze mugire n’umwe mur’ iyo migenzo izira mukora, yakorwa n’ababatanguriye kuhaba, ngo muyiyandurishe: nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus19:2 ati Barira ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli ryose, uti Mube abera, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu na we ar’ uwera." 
Leviticus19:3 Umuntu wese muri mwebge aze yubahe nyina na se, kandi muze mwitondere amasabato yanje: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:4 Ntimuze muhindukirire ibigirwamana, canke ngo mwironderere ibigirwamana mu bivugutiwe mu nkero: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:5 Ni mwanshikanira ikimazi c’ishimwe, muze mugishikane uburyo butuma mwemerwa." 
Leviticus19:6 Umusi mugitanzeko abe ari wo kirīrwako nyene, bo na bukeye bgaho; ariko ni hagira ikizoshitsa ku musi ugira gatatu, kize giturirwe." 
Leviticus19:7 Kandi ni caribgako na gatoya ku musi ugira gatatu, kizoba ar’ ikizira: ntikizokwemerwa;" 
Leviticus19:8 kand’ ūkiriyeko wese azogībgako n’ibigabitanyo vyiwe, kukw aba atukishije icera canje: uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus19:9 Kandi ni mwimbura ivyimburwa vyo mu gihugu canyu, ntimuze muherengeteze rwose kwimbura ivyo ku mibari y’imirima yanyu, kandi ntimuze muhumbe uduhumbga twose iyo muriko murashwābūra." 
Leviticus19:10 Ntimuze muhumbe mu mirima y’imizabibu yanyu, canke ngo mutore izahungurukiyeyo: muze mubisigarize aboro n’abanyamahanga: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:11 Ntimuze mwibe, ntimuze mugunge, canke ngo mubeshane." 
Leviticus19:12 Ntimuze murahire ibinyoma izina ryanje, bigatuma mutukisha izina ryanje, Imana yanyu: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:13 Ntihaze hagire ūhahaza mugenzi we, canke ngw amwambure; ntihaze hagire ūrārana ingero umucangero yakoreye." 
Leviticus19:14 Ntihaze hagire ūvuma igipfamatwi, canke ngo hagire ūshira imbere y’impumyi ikintu comutsitaza: ariko mugende mutinya jewe Imana yanyu: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:15 Ntimuze mucishe urubanza aho rutari; ntimuze muce urwa nkunzi mubitewe no kugirira impuhwe umworo, canke no gutinya ūhambaye; ariko muze mucire bagenzi banyu imanza ziroranye." 
Leviticus19:16 Ntihaze hagire ūgendagendeshwa no guteranya abantu, kandi ntihaze hagire uwitangakw icabona c’ ibinyoma co kwicisha mugenzi we: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:17 Ntihaze hagire uwamanira akazīka uw’i wabo mu mutima wiwe; ariko ntaz’ abure kumuhanūra, kugira ngo ntibimukwegere icaha kubg’ uwo." 
Leviticus19:18 Ntihaze hagire uwihōra, cank’ ūbīkira inzigo abo mu bgoko bgabo; ariko mukunde bagenzi banyu nk’uko mwikunda: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:19 Muze mwitondere ivyagezwe vyanje. Ntihaze hagire ūbangurira ivy’ atunze ivyo bidahwanije ubgoko; canke ngo hagire ūsukiranya imbuto z’imiryango ibiri mu ndimiro yiwe; canke ngo hagire uwambara impuzu ijishwe mu nyuzi z’ubgoko bubiri. 
Leviticus19:20 Umuntu ni yasambana n’ umuguranokazi ataribgacungurwe ngw aronke umwidegemvyo, kandi yar’ asabge n’uwundi; baze bahanwe, ariko ntibaze babice, kuk’ uwo atari n’umwidegemvyo." 
Leviticus19:21 Uwo mugabo azane ikimazi ciwe c’impongano, akinzanire ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro; ico kimazi kibe impfizi y’intama." 
Leviticus19:22 Umuherezi aheze amuhongere iyo mpfizi y’intama y’ikimazi c’impongano c’icaha ciwe yakoze, ayitangire imbere yanje; na we azoharirwa ico caha yakoze." 
Leviticus19:23 Kandi ni mwinjira ca gihugu, mugatera ibiti vy’ubgoko bgose vyama ibiribga, muze mubanze mwite ivyamye kuri vyo nk’ibizira; bize bimare imyaka itatu kuri mwebge ar’ ibizira; ntibize birībgeko." 
Leviticus19:24 Ariko mu mwaka ugira kane, ivyamye kuri vyo vyose bizoba ivyera vyo kunshimisha, jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:25 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu abe ari ho mutangura kurya ku vyamye kuri vyo, kugira ngo birushirize kubāmira: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:26 Ntimuze mugire ikintu murya kikirimw’ amaraso yaco: ntimuze mutere amabara, canke ngo mupfumuze." 
Leviticus19:27 Ntimuze mukebēre umushatsi wo mu misaya, canke ngo mucācūre imitwe y’ubganwa bganyu." 
Leviticus19:28 Ntimuze mwikebagure ku mibiri kubg’ ūpfuye; kandi ntimuze mwicishe imanzi n’imwe: ni jewe Uhoraho. 
Leviticus19:29 Ntihaze hagire uwononesha umukobga wiwe kumutanga kuba maraya, kugira ngw igihugu coye kwisuka mu busambanyi, kikuzura ubushakanyi." 
Leviticus19:30 Muze mwitondere amasabato yanje, mwubahe Ahēra hanje: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:31 Ntimuze muhindukirire abahamagara imizimu cank’ abamenyi: ntimuze muje kubabaza, bagahava babahumanya: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:32 Umuntu wese muri mwebge az’ avire hasi ūmaze kuyenzura imvi, yubahe umutāma, antinye, jewe Imana yiwe: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus19:33 Umunyamahanga ni yaza mu gihugu canyu, akabana namwe, ntimuze mumugirire nabi." 
Leviticus19:34 Umunyamahanga aba muri mwebge muze mumugirire nk’imvukira, mumukunde nk’ uko mwikunda: kuko namwe mwar’ abanyamahanga mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus19:35 Ntimuze mugoreke imanza, mu gusuzuma ivyo kugeresha metero, cank’ ikilo, cank’ ingero." 
Leviticus19:36 Arikw iminzane y’ukuri, n’ibilo vy’ukuri, n’ingero yitwa efa y’ukuri, n’ ingero yitwa hini y’ukuri, bize bibe ari vyo mukoresha: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Leviticus19:37 Nuko muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yanje yose, n’ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, mubishitse: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus20:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus20:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni hagira umuntu uw’ari we wese, ar’ uwo muri mwebge Abisirayeli canke w’umunyamahanga aba muri mwebge, azoshikanira Moleki uwo mu bana biwe, ntaz’ abure kwicwa; abo mur’ ico gihugu baze bamwicishe amabuye." 
Leviticus20:3 Nanje nzohoza igitsūre kur’ uwo muntu, ndamurandure mu bgoko bgabo, ndamuhōye gushikanira Moleki uwo mu bana biwe, akanduza Ahēra hanje, agatukisha izina ryanje ryera." 
Leviticus20:4 Arikw abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu ni birengagiza uwo muntu yashikaniye Moleki uwo mu bana biwe, ntibamwice;" 
Leviticus20:5 jewe ubganje nzohoza igitsūre kur’ uwo muntu, no ku muryango wiwe, ndabarandurane mu bgoko bgabo n’abābīgānye mur’ ubgo bumaka bgo guhurumbira Moleki." 
Leviticus20:6 Umuntu yirukira abahamagara imizimu n’abamenyi, akaja kubaraguza, akabahurumbira nk’ ikimaka; nzohoza igitsūre canje kuri we, ndamurandure mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus20:7 Nuko mwiyeze, mube abera, kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Kandi muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yanje, muyashitse: jewe Uhoraho ni jewe mbeza." 
Leviticus20:9 Umuntu wese azovuma se canke nyina ntaz’ abure kwicwa: kw azoba avumye se canke nyina, amaraso yiwe ni we azokora." 
Leviticus20:10 Umuntu ni yasambana n’ umugore w’uwundi, agasambana na muka mugenzi we, uwo musambanyi n’uwo musambanyikazi ntibaze babure kwicwa." 
Leviticus20:11 Ūryamanye na muka se aba yambitse se ubusa: bompi ntibaze babure kwicwa: amaraso yabo ni bo azokora. 
Leviticus20:12 Umuntu ni yaryamana n’umukazana wiwe, bompi ntibaze babure kwicwa: bazoba bavanze ibidahwanye: amaraso yabo ni bo azokora." 
Leviticus20:13 Umugabo yenze uwundi mugabo bga mugore, bompi bazoba bakoze ikizira: ntibaze babure kwicwa: amaraso yabo ni bo azokora." 
Leviticus20:14 Umuntu ni yābīra umukobga na nyina, kizoba icaha gikomeye: az’ atabge mu muriro, ubgiwe na bo; kugira ngo ntihaze hagire icaha gikomeye kiba muri mwebge." 
Leviticus20:15 Umuntu ni yaryamana n’igitungano, ntaz’ abure kwicwa; na nya gitungano na co mucice." 
Leviticus20:16 Kand’ umugore cank’ umukobga ni yegera igitungano, akaryamana na co, muze mumwicane na co: ntibize bibure kwicwa: amaraso yavyo ni vyo azokora." 
Leviticus20:17 Umuntu ni yenda mushiki we, basangiye se canke nyina, bakarābana ubgambure, kizoba ar’ igihemu giteye isoni: baze barandurirwe mu maso y’ab’ ubgoko bgabo: uyo, kw azoba yambitse ubusa mushiki we, azogībgako n’ukugabitanya kwiwe." 
Leviticus20:18 Umuntu ni yaryamana n’umugore akiri mu muhango wiwe, akamwambika ubusa, azoba yambitse ubusa isōko yiwe, na wa mugore azoba atwikuruye iyo sōko y’amaraso yiwe: bompi baze barandurwe mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus20:19 Kandi ntihaze hagire uwambika ubusa nyinabo canke inasenge: ūzokora artyo azoba yambitse ubusa bene wabo: bazogībgako n’ukugabitanya kwabo. 
Leviticus20:20 Umuntu ni yaryamana na muka se wabo, azoba yambitse ubusa se wabo: bazogībgako n’icaha cabo: bazopfa ar’ imponnyi." 
Leviticus20:21 Umuntu ni yacikiza muka mwene nyina, bizoba ar’ ukwiyanduza: azoba yambitse ubusa mwene nyina; bazoba imponnyi." 
Leviticus20:22 Nuko rero muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yanje yose n’ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, muvyumvire: kugira ngw igihugu mbajanyemwo ngo muhabe, ntikize kihave kibadahwa." 
Leviticus20:23 Ntimuze mugendere mu migenzo y’ihanga ngira nze nirukane imbere yanyu: kukw ivyo vyose ari vyo bākora, bigatuma mbanka urunuka." 
Leviticus20:24 Ariko mwebge narababgiye, nti Ni mwebge muzokwegukira igihugu cabo, kandi nzokibaha, kibe icanyu, ico gihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabatandukanije n’ayandi mahanga." 
Leviticus20:25 Ni co gituma mukwiye gutandukanya ibihumanya n’ibidahumanya mu bitungano no mu bikōko, n’ibihumanya n’ibidahumanya mu bisīga no mu nyoni: ntimuze mwiyandurishe igitungano cank’ igikōko, cank’ igisīga cank’ inyoni, cank’ icikwega hasi ic’ ari co cose, ari vyo nasobanuye mu bindi ngo mumenye ko bihumanya." 
Leviticus20:26 Kandi muze mumbere abera, kuko jewe Uhoraho nd’ uwera, kandi nabatandukanije n’ayandi mahanga ngo mube abanje." 
Leviticus20:27 Umugabo cank’ umugore bahamagara imizimu, canke bakaba abamenyi, ntibaze babure kwicwa: baze babicishe amabuye; amaraso yabo ni bo azokora." 
Leviticus21:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Barira abaherezi bene Aroni, uti Ntihaze hagire umuherezi yiyandurisha ūpfuye wo mu bgoko bgabo;" 
Leviticus21:2 shit’ uwo mu muryango wo hafi, nyina, canke se, cank’ umuhungu wiwe, cank’ umukobga wiwe, canke mukuru we, canke murumuna we," 
Leviticus21:3 canke mushiki we akir’ imvyiruke, akimuzeyeko vyose, kukw atararongorwa: uwo we biremerwa ko yomwanduza." 
Leviticus21:4 Kw ar’ umukuru mw ihanga ryabo, ntaze yiyanduze ngo yiyonone." 
Leviticus21:5 Abaherezi ntibaze bimoshe inkomvorera, canke ngo bacācūre imitwe y’ubganwa bgabo, canke ngo bikebagure ku mibiri." 
Leviticus21:6 Baze bambere abera, jewe Imana yabo, ntibatukishe izina ryanje, Imana yabo; kukw ari bo bampēreza ibimazi, jewe Uhoraho, bitōngōrwa n’umuriro, ari zo mfungurwa zanje, Imana yabo: ni co gituma bakwiye kuba abera." 
Leviticus21:7 Ntihaze hagire uwābira maraya muri bo, cank’ uwamaze kwononekara, kandi ntihagire uwābīra uwirukanywe n’umugabo wiwe: kuk’ umuherezi ar’ uwera kuri jewe, Imana yiwe." 
Leviticus21:8 Ni co gituma mukwiye kumwita uwera, kukw ari we ampēreza imfungurwa, jewe Imana yanyu: az’ ababere uwera, kuko jewe Uhoraho, mbeza, nd’ uwera." 
Leviticus21:9 Kand’ umukobga w’umuherezi wese ni yiyononesha gusambana, azoba yambitse ibara se: az’ atabge mu muriro." 
Leviticus21:10 Umuherezi abaye mukuru muri bagenzi biwe, yasutswe amavuta mu mutwe yo kumurobanura, akaba yashikirijwe ibango ngo yambare ya myambaro, ntaz’ ahamburure umushatsi wiwe, canke ngo yitantamurirekw impuzu ziwe agandaye;" 
Leviticus21:11 ntaze yinjirire ku muvyimba n’umwe, canke ngw awiyandurishe, n’iyo woba uwa se cank’ uwa nyina;" 
Leviticus21:12 canke ngo binamusohokane ngw ave Ahēra, canke ngw ahumanye Ahēra hanje Imana yiwe; kukw ibango yaheshejwe no kurobanuzwa amavuta yanje Imana yiwe riri kuri we: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus21:13 Kand’ uwo azokwābīra az’ abe inkumi yirongoreye. 
Leviticus21:14 Arik’ umupfakazi, cank’ uwirukanywe, cank’ uwamaze kwononekara, canke maraya, ntaz’ agire uwo yābīra muri bo, atar’ inkumi yirongoreye yo mu bgoko bgabo," 
Leviticus21:15 kugira ngo ntaz’ atume uruvyaro rwiwe ruhinduka uruhumanye mu bgoko bgabo: kukw ari jewe Uhoraho ndamweza. 
Leviticus21:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus21:17 ati Barira Aroni, ut’ Umuntu wese azoba afise agasembga wo mu ruvyaro rwawe, ukw ibihe vy’ urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana, ntaze yēgēre ngw ampēreze imfungurwa, jewe Imana yiwe." 
Leviticus21:18 Umuntu wese afise agasembga ntaz’ anyīgire hafi: ar’ impumyi, ar’ ūcumbagira, ar’ ūfise izuru rihomberanye, ar’ ūfise urugingo rurutana n’urundi," 
Leviticus21:19 ar’ ūvunitse ikirenge cank’ igikonjo," 
Leviticus21:20 ar’ ūfise inyonzo, ar’ uwabaye impfunya, ar’ ūfise agasembga ku jisho, ar’ ūfise amahere cank’ urukemba, ar’ ūmenetse amavya;" 
Leviticus21:21 ntihaze hagire umuntu n’umwe wo mu ruvyaro rwa Aroni azokwigera yīgira hafi afise agasembga, ngw ahēreze ibimazi vyanje, jewe Uhoraho, bitōngōrwa n’umuriro: kw azoba arikw agasembga, ntaze yigire hafi ngw ahēreze imfungurwa zanje, jewe Imana yiwe." 
Leviticus21:22 Ashobora kurya ku mfungurwa zanje, Imana yiwe, ari ku zera cane, canke ku zera zindi." 
Leviticus21:23 Mugabo ntaze yēgēre ca gihuzu gikingīra Ahēra cane, canke ngo yēgēre igicaniro, kukw azoba afise agasembga, kugira ngo yoye guhumanya ahēra hanje ah’ ari ho hose: kukw ari jewe Uhoraho ndabeza." 
Leviticus21:24 Nukw ivyo vyose Mose abibarira Aroni n’abana biwe n’Abisirayeli bose. 
Leviticus22:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus22:2 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe baze bitonde mu kwēgēra ivyejejwe Abisirayeli banshikanira, boye gutukisha izina ryanje ryera: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:3 Ubabarire yuk’ umuntu wese wo mu ruvyaro rwabo azokwēgēra ivyejejwe Abisirayeli banshikaniye, ahumanye, uk’ urunganwe rwabo ruzogenda rukurikirana, uwo muntu az’ arandurwe, akūrwe imbere yanje: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:4 Umuntu wese wo mu ruvyaro rwa Aroni yabaye umunyamibembe cank’ afise igisokoro, ntaz’ arye ku vyera gushitsa ahumanutse. Kand’ ūzokora ku kintu ic’ ari co cose cahumanijwe no gukora ku muvyimba, canke ku mugabo intanga zavuyemwo;" 
Leviticus22:5 cank’ ūzokora ku kanyonyera ak’ ari ko kose, ar’ akomuhumanya, canke ku muntu, ar’ uwomuhumanisha ubuhumane ubg’ ari bgo bgose;" 
Leviticus22:6 ūzokora ku bimeze birtyo azoba ahumanye arinde ashitsa ku mugoroba; ntaz’ arye kur’ ivyo vyejejwe, shit’ abanje kwiyuhagira." 
Leviticus22:7 Izuba ni ryamara kurenga azoba ahumanutse; ni h’azobona kurya ku vyejejwe, kukw ivyo ari vyo vyar’ indya ziwe." 
Leviticus22:8 Icipfiriye cank’ ikirangara, ntaz’ agire ico arya muri vyo ngw acihumanishe: nd’ Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:9 Ni co gituma bakwiye kwitondera ibgirizwa ryanje, boye kwikwēgera icaha kubgaryo, rikabicisha, kuko bazoba bahumanije ivyejejwe: kukw ari jewe Uhoraho ndabeza."
