Leviticus22:10 Ntihaze hagire ūtar’ uwo mu baherezi arya ku kintu cejejwe; umushitsi arāriye umuherezi, cank’ umucangero, ntaz’ arye ku kintu cejejwe." 
Leviticus22:11 Umuherezi ni yaramuka yaraguze umuntu, akaba uwo yiguriye amahera yiwe, uyo we azobiryako; n’abavukiye mu rugo rwiwe na bo bazorya ku vyo kurya vyiwe." 
Leviticus22:12 Umukobga w’ umuherezi ni yābīrwa n’ūtar’ uwo mu baherezi ntaz’ arye ku vyejejwe vyashikanywe. 
Leviticus22:13 Arik’ umukobga w’umuherezi apfakaye canke yirukanywe, atagira umwana, akaba igisubiramuhira mu rugo kwa se, akamera nk’uko yahoze mu bgana bgiwe, we azorya ku vyo kurya vya se: arik’ ūtar’ uwo mu baherezi ntaz’ abiryeko." 
Leviticus22:14 Umuntu ni yaramuka ariye ku kintu cejejwe atabizi, az’ akirihe, asubize umuherezi ikingana n’ico kintu cejejwe yariye, akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco." 
Leviticus22:15 Kand’ abaherezi ntibaze bahumanye ivyejejwe Abisirayeli banshikaniye," 
Leviticus22:16 bigatuma babacumuza, bikabazanira gutsindwa, iyo hagize abarya ku vyejejwe vyabo: kukw ari jewe Uhoraho ndabeza." 
Leviticus22:17 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus22:18 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe, n’Abisirayeli bose, yuk’ umuntu wese wo mu b’inzu ya Isirayeli, canke wo mu banyamahanga baba muri bo, azoha jewe Uhoraho ikimazi co kwoswa, ar’ ico gushitsa isezerano ryiwe, ar’ ico atanze avyigombeye," 
Leviticus22:19 az’ atange ishuri cank’ isuguru y’intama cank’ iy’ impene, kugira ngw abone kwemerwa." 
Leviticus22:20 Arikw igifise agasembga cose ntimuze mugitange, kuko kitazokwemerwa ko mushikanye." 
Leviticus22:21 Umuntu wese azotanga ikimazi c’ishimwe, akakimpa jewe Uhoraho ngw ashitse isezerano ryiwe, canke kikaba ico atanze avyigombeye, ar’ ico akūye mu busho canke mu mukuku, kize kibe ciza kugira ngo cemerwe: ntihaze hagire agasembga kibonekako." 
Leviticus22:22 Ntihaze hagire impumyi, cank’ ikivunitse, cank’ icakomerekejwe, cank’ igifise igisebe, cank’ ikirwaye umwirye, cank’ ubushita, muzonshikanira muri ben’ ivyo, canke ngo mugitange kw ishikanwa munshikaniye jewe Uhoraho, ngo gitōngōrwe n’umuriro ku gicaniro." 
Leviticus22:23 Ishuri cank’ umwana w’intama, hagize igifise urugingo rutareha n’izindi, umuntu aremererwa kugitanga kw ishikanwa ashikanye avyigombeye; ariko nticokwemerwa kuba ishikanwa ryo gushitsa isezerano yasezeranye." 
Leviticus22:24 Igifise amavya yahomberanye canke yamenetse canke yajanjaguritse canke yashahuwe, ntimuze mukinshikanire, jewe Uhoraho; ntimuze mugenze murtyo mu gihugu canyu." 
Leviticus22:25 N’iyo coba kizanywe n’umunyamahanga, ntimuze mwemere ikimeze girtyo na kimwe, ngo mukinshikanire kw imfungurwa, jewe Imana yanyu; ntikizokwemerwa ko mushikanye, kuko gitosekaye, kikabakw agasembga." 
Leviticus22:26 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus22:27 at’ Ishuri ni yavuka, cank’ umwagazi w’intama canke w’impene, iz’ imarane na nyina imisi ndwi; uhereye umusi ugira umunani yoshobora kwemerwa kuba ikimazi nshikanirwa jewe Uhoraho, gitōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus22:28 Kand’ inka cank’ intama, ntimuze muzibāgane n’izazo ku musi umwe." 
Leviticus22:29 Kandi ni mwampa ikimazi co gukenguruka, mugitange uburyo butuma mwemerwa." 
Leviticus22:30 Kize kiribge kur’ uwo musi nyene mugitanzeko; ntihaze hagire ico musigaza ngo kirāre: ni jewe Uhoraho. 
Leviticus22:31 Nuko muze mwitondere ivyagezwe vyanje, mubishitse: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus22:32 Ntimuze mutukishe izina ryanje ryera, ariko nze name mboneka nd’Uwera hagati mu Bisirayeli: ni jewe Uhoraho ndabeza," 
Leviticus22:33 nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ngo mbe Imana yanyu: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus23:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Iyi ni yo misi mikuru yiwe ishinzwe mukwiye kuzotāngāza kw ar’ iyo gukorana kwera; imisi mikuru yiwe ishinzwe n’iyi:" 
Leviticus23:3 mu misi itandatu abe ari ho ibikorwa bikorerwa, arik’ ūgira indwi n’ isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje, n’ikoraniro ryera; ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe muwukorako; n’isabato yanje Uhoraho, yo kwitonderwa mu ngo zanyu zose." 
Leviticus23:4 Iyi ni yo misi mikuru yanje Uhoraho ishinzwe yo gukorana kwera, mukwiye kuzotāngāza igihe cayo kigeze:" 
Leviticus23:5 mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo w’icumi na kane ku mugoroba, haze hame haba Pasika yanje Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:6 Ku musi w’icumi na gatanu w’ukwo kwezi nyene, ni ho hazoba umusi mukuru wo kunyubaha w’imitsima itambiwe: muze mumare imisi ndwi ari yo murya." 
Leviticus23:7 Ku musi w’intangamarāra wayo muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako. 
Leviticus23:8 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi, uko bukeye muze munshikanire ibimazi bitōngōrwa n’umuriro: umusi ugira indwi uz’ ube uwo gukorana kwera, ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako." 
Leviticus23:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus23:10 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwashika mu gihugu nzobaha, mukimbura ivyimburo vyaho, muze mwame mushīra umuherezi umukama wo ku vyimburwa vyanyu vy’umushuzo:" 
Leviticus23:11 na we awuzungurize imbere yanje, kugira ng’ ubabere ishikanwa ryemerwa: ku musi ukurikira isabato abe ari wo umuherezi awuzunguzako." 
Leviticus23:12 Ku musi muwujungujeko muze munshikanire n’isuguru y’intama itaramara umwaka kw ikimazi co kwoswa. 
Leviticus23:13 Kand’ ishikanwa ry’ ivyakozwe mw ifu ritanganwa na co rize ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ingero y’ifu igogōretse, ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo; ribe ishikanwa nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge umota neza. Kand’ ishikanwa ry’ibiturire ritanganwa na co nyene rize ribe ikigirakane c’ingero yitwa hini ya vino." 
Leviticus23:14 Kandi ntimuze mugire umutsima w’iyo fu murya, cank’ impeke muhekenya, ar’ izikaranze canke mbisi, uwo musi utarashika, ngo muzane iryo shikanwa ryanje Imana yanyu: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’intahava mu ngo zanyu zose, no ku runganwe rwanyu, uko ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Leviticus23:15 Kandi muze muharūre imisi, muhereye kur’ uwo musi nyene ukurikira isabato, ari wo musi mwazaniyeko umukama w’ishikanwa ryo kuzunguzwa, habe amasabato ndwi yiramvuriye." 
Leviticus23:16 Muharūre, murumye imisi mirongwitanu, irume ku musi ukurikira isabato igira indwi; muheze munshikanire ishikanwa, jewe Uhoraho, ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu y’ ivyakurikiyeko." 
Leviticus23:17 Mu ngo zanyu muze mukūremw’ imitsima ibiri yo kuba ishikanwa ryo kuzunguzwa; ibe ivy’ ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu; iyo fu ibe igogōretse, icumbanywe n’ umwambiro, ngw ibe ishikanwa ryo ku vyimburwa vy’umushuzo mpabga jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus23:18 Kandi hamwe n’iyo mitsima mushikane abana b’intama ndwi batagira agasembga, batarengeje umwaka, bo n’imasa y’umukangara, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri; bibe ikimazi coswa nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, bizananwe n’ishikanwa ry’ivyakozwe mw ifu, n’iry’ ibiturire, bibe ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza." 
Leviticus23:19 Mutange n’isuguru y’impene kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, n’amasuguru abiri y’intama atarengeje umwaka, kw ikimazi c’ishimwe." 
Leviticus23:20 Umuherezi abizunguzanye na ya mitsima yo ku vyimburwa vy’umushuzo, bo na ba bana b’intama bompi, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje: bibe ivyera kuri jewe, bihabge umuherezi." 
Leviticus23:21 Kur’ uwo musi nyene muze mutāngāze kw ar’ umusi mukuru: muze muwugire uwo gukorana kwera; ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’ intahava mu ngo zanyu zose no ku runganwe rwanyu, uko ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Leviticus23:22 Kandi ni mwimbura ivyimburwa vyo mu gihugu canyu, ntimuze muherengeteze rwose gushwābūra ivyo ku mibari y’imirima yanyu, kandi ntimuze muhumbe uduhumbga tw’ivyo mwimbuye: muze mubisigarize aboro n’abanyamahanga: nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:23 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus23:24 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Mu kwezi kw’indwi, umusi wakwo wa mbere uz’ ubabere umusi wo kuruhuka bihebuje, ube uwo kubibutsa, muwutāngāze mu kuvuza inzamba, ube uwo gukorana kwera." 
Leviticus23:25 Ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako, kandi muze muwunshikanirekw ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus23:26 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus23:27 at’ Umusi ugira icumi w’ukwo kwezi nye ne kw’indwi ni wo musi w’impongano: uz’ ubabere uwo gukorana kwera, muze mwame mwibabaza, kandi muze muwunshikanirekw ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus23:28 Ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe mukora kur’ uwo musi, kukw ar’ umusi w’ impongano, aho muzotangirwa impongano imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Kandi ni hagira umuntu atazokwibabaza kur’ uwo musi, az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus23:30 Kandi ni hagira ūzogira igikorwa na kimwe akora kur’ uwo musi, uwo muntu nzomurandura mu bgoko bgabo." 
Leviticus23:31 Ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe mukora: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’intahava mu ngo zanyu zose, no ku runganwe rwanyu, uko ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Leviticus23:32 Uwo musi uz’ ubabere isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje, muze muwibabazeko; muze mwitondere iyo sabato yanyu, muhereye ku mugoroba w’umusi ugira icenda w’ukwo kwezi, mushitse ku mugoroba wundi." 
Leviticus23:33 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus23:34 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ku musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ukwo kwezi kw’indwi nyene, ni ho hazoba umusi mukuru wo kunyubaha w’insago: iz’ ibe imisi mikuru gushitsa indwi." 
Leviticus23:35 Ku musi w’intangamarāra muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako. 
Leviticus23:36 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi, uko bukeye muze munshikanire ibimazi bitōngōrwa n’umuriro; umusi ugira umunani muze muwugire uwo gukorana kwera: muze muwunshikanirekw ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro: rize ribe ikoraniro ry’agahebūza; ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako." 
Leviticus23:37 Iyo ni yo misi mikuru yanje jewe Uhoraho; mukwiye kuyitāngāza kw ar’ iyo gukorana kwera, no kuyinshikanirakw ibimazi vyo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, vy’ivyo kwoswa, n’amashikanwa y’ivyakozwe mw ifu, n’ibimazi bindi, n’amashikanwa y’ibiturire, ibintu vyose ku musi wavyo, uko vyashinzwe;" 
Leviticus23:38 kand’ ivyo ntibikwiye kubabuza kwitondera amasabato yanje, canke gushikana amashikanwa yanyu, canke gushikana ayo gushitsa amasezerano yose mwasezeranye, canke kunshikanira ivyo mutanze vyose muvyigombeye." 
Leviticus23:39 Nuko muhereye kur’ uwo musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ ukwo kwezi kw’indwi, mumaze kwimbura ivyimburwa vyo mu gihugu, muze mugire imisi mikuru ndwi yo kunyubaha: ku musi w’intangamarāra wayo hazoba kuruhuka kwo kwitonderwa, no ku musi ugira umunani haze habe kuruhuka kwo kwitonderwa nyene." 
Leviticus23:40 Kandi kur’ uwo musi w’intangamarāra muze mwābīre ku vyiza‐vyiza vyamye ku biti, n’amashami y’ibigazi, n’amashami y’ibiti bitwaye intunda, n’ibiti vyameze i ruhande y’inzūzi; mumare imisi ndwi munezererewe imbere yanje, Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:41 Uk’ umwaka utashe, muze muhore mugira iyo misi mikuru ndwi yo kunyubaha: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana: muze mugire iyo misi mikuru mu kwezi kw’indwi." 
Leviticus23:42 Muze mumare iyo misi ndwi muri mu nsago; Abisirayeli b’imvukira bose baze bayimare bari mu nsago; 
Leviticus23:43 kugira ngw ab’ urunganwe rwanyu, uko ruzogenda rukurikirana, bamenye yuko nabesheje Abisirayeli mu nsago, hamwe nabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa; nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus23:44 Nuko Mose amenyesha Abisirayeli imisi mikuru y’Uhoraho ishinzwe iy’ ari yo. 
Leviticus24:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus24:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli bakuzanire amavuta y’umwisengesure avuye muri elayo zisekuwe, ya ya matara, kugira ngo haze hame har’ itara ryaka." 
Leviticus24:3 Inyuma ya ca gihuzu gikingiriye vya Bishinga intahe, mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, az’ abe ari ho Aroni azokwama aritunganiriza, kugira ngo rize ryame ryaka imbere yanje, rihēre ku mugoroba rishitse mu gitondo ubudasība: iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’intahava ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana." 
Leviticus24:4 Aze yame atunganiriza ayo matara kur’ ico gitereko c’izahabu iramuye, kugira ngo yame yakira imbere yanje ubudasiba." 
Leviticus24:5 Kandi wābīre ifu igogōretse, uyicumbemw’ imitsima cumi n’ ibiri: mu bigiracumi bibiri vy’ ingero yitwa efa havemw’ umutsima umwe‐umwe." 
Leviticus24:6 Uyigire ibirundo bibiri kuri ya meza y’izahabu iramuye ar’ imbere yanje, mu kirundo kimwe habemw’ itandatu, mu kindi kuno." 
Leviticus24:7 Ku kirundo kimwe ugerekekw imibavu itunganye, ku kindi kuno, ibe icibutso kur’ iyo mitsima, ishikanwa nshikaniwe ryo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Leviticus24:8 Ukw isabato itashe, Aroni az’ ayitereke imbere yanje na ntaryo kubg’ Abisirayeli, bibe isezerano ritazoshira." 
Leviticus24:9 Kand’ iyo mitsima iz’ ibe iya Aroni n’abana biwe; baze bahore bayirīra ahantu hera, kukw ar’ umugabane wiwe wera cane w’intahava agerewe mu mashikanwa atōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikanirwa, jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus24:10 Umuhungu w’Umwisirayelikazi yavyaranye n’Umunyegiputa arasohoka, aja mu Bisirayeli; atonganira mu nsago n’umuntu w’ Umwisirayeli." 
Leviticus24:11 Uwo muhungu w’Umwisirayelikazi arogota kuri rya Zina, ararituka: bamuzanira Mose. Nyina yitwa Shelomiti, mwene Diburi, wo mu muryango wa Dani." 
Leviticus24:12 Baramwugarana kugeza igihe baja kubgirwa ivyo Uhoraho aribushinge. 
Leviticus24:13 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus24:14 ati Jana uwatukanye inyuma y’aho mushagaje, abamwumvise bose aho yatukana bashire ibiganza vyabo ku mutwe wiwe: ikoraniro ryose rimwicishe amabuye." 
Leviticus24:15 Nawe ubarire Abisirayeli, yuk’ umuntu wese azontuka, jewe Imana yiwe, azogībgako n’icaha ciwe." 
Leviticus24:16 Kand’ ūzorogota kw izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho, ntaz’ abure kwicwa: ikoraniro ryose rize rimwicishe amabuye: yaba umunyamahanga ari muri mwebge cank’ imvukira azorogota kw izina ryanje, aze yicwe." 
Leviticus24:17 Ūzokubita umuntu akamutsindaho, na we ntaz’ abure kwicwa;" 
Leviticus24:18 ūzokubita igitunzwe, akacica, az’ akirihe: igifise ubugingo kirihwe ikindi." 
Leviticus24:19 Umuntu ni yatera agasembga uwundi, bamugirire nk’uko yamugiriye." 
Leviticus24:20 Imvune ihōrwe iyindi, n’ijisho rihōrwe irindi, n’iryinyo rihōrwe irindi: ukw azoba yateye uwundi agasembga, abe ari kw asubirizwa mu nkōko." 
Leviticus24:21 Ūzokwica igitunzwe akirihe; ūzokwica umuntu na we yicwe. 
Leviticus24:22 Muze mugire icagezwe kimwe ku munyamahanga ar’i wanyu no ku mvukira: kuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Leviticus24:23 Nuko Mose abarira Abisirayeli, bajana uwatukanye inyuma y’aho bashagaje, bamwicisha amabuye. Abisirayeli bakora nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Leviticus25:1 Uhoraho abaririra Mose ku musozi Sinayi," 
Leviticus25:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, yuko ni bashika mu gihugu nzobaha, ico gihugu kize kigire ikiruhuko nk’isabato co kunyubaha jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus25:3 Muze murime mu ndimiro zanyu imyaka itandatu, kandi mur’ iyo myaka itandatu abe ari yo mutūtūriramw’ imizabibu yanyu, mwamure inzabibu zayo." 
Leviticus25:4 Arik’ umwaka ugira indwi uz’ ubere igihugu nk’isabato yo kuruhuka bihebuje, nk’isabato yo kunyubaha jewe Uhoraho: ntimuze muwurimemwo mu ndimiro zanyu, ntimuze muwutūtūriremw’ imizabibu yanyu." 
Leviticus25:5 Ivyimeza bikurikiye ivyo mwimbuye ntimuze muvyimburire mu bigega, canke ngo mwimbure inzabibu zo ku mizabibu yanyu idatūtūriye: uwo mwaka uz’ ubere igihugu uwo kuruhuka bihebuje." 
Leviticus25:6 Mugabo, ivyo mu gihugu vyapfuye kwimeza mur’ ico gihe c’isabato yaco ni vyo bizoba ivyo kurya vyanyu, mwe n’abagurano banyu, n’abaguranokazi banyu, n’ abakozi banyu b’abacangero, n’ abanyamahanga baba muri mwebge;" 
Leviticus25:7 kandi n’ibiragirano vyanyu n’ibikōko vyo mu gihugu canyu, ivyimeza vyaco vyose bizobibera ivyo kurya." 
Leviticus25:8 Iyo myaka yabaye nk’isabato, muharūre ayo masabato murumye ndwi, muyirumye imyaka ndwi ibihetangabo ndwi; ico gihe muzosanga harimw’ amasabato ndwi y’imyaka, ni yo myaka mirongwine n’icenda." 
Leviticus25:9 Maze ku musi ugira icumi w’ukwezi kw’indwi muze muvugishe inzamba y’ijwi rirenga; ku musi w’impongano az’ abe ari ho muvugisha inzamba mu gihugu canyu cose. 
Leviticus25:10 Muze murobanure uwo mwaka ugira mirongwitanu, mutāngāze mu gihugu cose ko habaye umwidegemvyo w’ abantu bose bo muri co: uwo mwaka uz’ ubabere uwa yubile; umuntu wese muri mwebge aheze agaruke mw itongo ryiwe, kand’ umuntu wese agaruke mu b’i wabo." 
Leviticus25:11 Uwo mwaka ugira mirongwitanu uze wame ubabera uwa yubile; ntimuze muwurimemwo, canke ngo mwimburire mu bigega ivyimejeje muri wo, canke ngo mwimbure inzabibu zo ku mizabibu itātūtūriye." 
Leviticus25:12 Kukw ar’ umwaka wa yubile; uze wame ubabera uwejejwe; muzotungwa n’ivyimeza vyo muri wo, vyimejeje mu ndimiro." 
Leviticus25:13 Mur’ uwo mwaka wa yubile umuntu wese muri mwebge az’ agaruke mw itongo ryiwe. 
Leviticus25:14 Kandi ni hagira ūgurira ikintu mugenzi we, cank’ akagira ico amuguzeko na we, ntimuze mugungane." 
Leviticus25:15 Ukw imyaka ingana, ikurikiye uwa yubile, az’ abe ari k’ūje kugura na mugenzi we atanga ibiguzi; na we az’ amucire nk’ukw imyaka y’ivyimburo ingana." 
Leviticus25:16 Uk’ umuntu azobona imyaka igisigaye ari myinshi, az’ abe ari kw adūza igiciro, kand’ ukw azobona ari mike, az’ abe ari kw akimanura; kukw agura arīmbūye igitigiri c’ivyimburo kigisigaye." 
Leviticus25:17 Nuko ntimuze mugungane, ariko muntinye, jewe Imana yanyu, kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus25:18 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwumvira amabgirizwa yanje, no kwitondera ivyagezwe vyanje, mukavyumvira; ni ho muzoba mu gihugu amahoro." 
Leviticus25:19 Kand’ ico gihugu kizokwimbuka, muzokwama mu gahimbo, mube muri co amahoro." 
Leviticus25:20 Ariko ni mwavuga, muti Tuzotungwa n’iki mur’ uwo mwaka ugira indwi, ko tutazorima, ntitwimbure?" 
Leviticus25:21 Mu mwaka ugira gatandatu nzobarungikira umugisha utuma haba uburumbuke bg’indya zizobatunga imyaka itatu. 
Leviticus25:22 Mu mwaka ugira umunani ni ho muzorima, kandi muzoba murya ibigugu vyahitikiranijwe; mbere muzoba murya ivyahitikiranijwe gushitsa mu mwaka ugira icenda, mu gihe c’iyimbura." 
Leviticus25:23 Amatongo ntaz’ agurwe herandaheze, kukw igihugu ar’ icanje, namwe kuri jewe mukaba akavantara n’ abatsi b’indāro." 
Leviticus25:24 Kandi mu gihugu cose c’ishamvu yanyu, uwahoze ari nyen’ itongo muze mwemere aricungure." 
Leviticus25:25 Uw’i wanyu ni yahinduka umugorwa, akagura kw itongo ryiwe, mwene wabo azoba ar’ uwo hafi az’ aze, acungure iryo tongo mwene wabo yaguze." 
Leviticus25:26 Arik’ umuntu ni yabura uwo kuricungura, akaba yarasubiye gutunga, akabona ibikwiranye na ryo vyo kuricungura," 
Leviticus25:27 az’ aharūre imyaka ryaguriwemwo, asubize uwariguze ibigisigaye ku giciro caryo, abone ukw asubira gushikīra itongo ryiwe." 
Leviticus25:28 Ariko n’atashobora kuricungura ubgiwe, iryo ryaguzwe rigumane uwariguze gushitsa ku mwaka wa yubile; maze rizokomōrwa n’uwo mwaka wa yubile, abone ukw asubira gushikīra itongo ryiwe." 
Leviticus25:29 Umuntu ni yagura inzu yiwe iri mu gisagara gikikijwe n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye, biremerwa kw ayicungura ata mwaka wose urashira; afise uburyo bgo kuyicungura ata mwaka wose urashira." 
Leviticus25:30 Ariko n’atayicungura uwo mwaka wose utarashira, iyo nzu iri mu gisagara gikikijwe n’uruzitiro izoba yegukiwe n’uwayiguze herandaheze, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana: ntizokomōrwa n’umwaka wa yubile." 
Leviticus25:31 Arikw inzu zo mu mihana idakikijwe n’uruzitiro rw’ amabuye, zize zibe kimwe n’ amatongo yo mu misozi, biremerwa ko zicungurwa: zizokomōrwa n’umwaka wa yubile." 
Leviticus25:32 Arikw ibisagara vy’Abalewi vyo si ko bimeze: inzu zo mu bisagara vy’amashamvu yabo, Abalewi biremerwa ko bazicungura aho baboneye uburyo." 
Leviticus25:33 Umwe mu Balewi n’adacungura inzu, iyo nzu yaguzwe yo mu gisagara c’ishamvu yabo iz’ ikomōrwe n’umwaka wa yubile: kukw amazu yo mu bisagara vy’Abalewi ar’ ishamvu yabo mu Bisirayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Arikw ah’Abalewi baragira inyuma y’ ibisagara vyabo ntihaze hagurwe, kukw ar’ ishamvu yabo y’intahava." 
Leviticus25:35 Kand’ uw’i wanyu ni yahinduka umugorwa, mukabona afūtānye, mukwiye kumusanasana; mumufashe nk’uko mwofasha akavantara n’umugerērwa." 
Leviticus25:36 Ntihaze hagire ūmwaka inyungu cank’ ibirenze ku vyo yatwaye, arikw agende antinya jewe Imana yiwe; kugira ng’ uw’i wanyu abone ingen’ abana namwe." 
Leviticus25:37 Ntaz’ amuguranire amahera kuzohabga ay’inyungu, canke ngw amugurane ivyo kurya kugira ngw aguranurwe ibirenze." 
Leviticus25:38 Nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa ngo mbahe igihugu c’i Kanani, mbe Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus25:39 Kand’ uw’i wanyu ni yagorerwa mu maso yanyu, akagira uwo yibunzako ngw amugure, uwo ntaz’ amukoreshe nk’umugurano:" 
Leviticus25:40 az’ abane na we nk’umukozi aca ingero canke nk’ umugerērwa; az’ amukorere gushitsa ku mwaka wa yubile. 
Leviticus25:41 Ni ho azobona kumuvako, bo n’abana biwe, asubire mu b’i wabo bgite, mw ishamvu ya ba sekuruza;" 
Leviticus25:42 kukw ar’ abagurano banje nakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ntibaze bagurwe ngo babe abagurano b’abandi. 
Leviticus25:43 Ntimuze mubatwaze igitugu, ariko mugende muntinya, jewe Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus25:44 Arikw abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi muzogira, muze mubakūre mu mahanga abakikije, abe ari ho mubagura." 
Leviticus25:45 Kandi mu bagerērwa bababamwo, bo muremererwa kubaguramwo, bo no mu ruvyaro rwabo bavyariye mu gihugu canyu, abo bakazoba inyegu mwegukiye," 
Leviticus25:46 mukazobaraga n’abana banyu muzosiga, bakabegukira; mur’ abo ni ho mwemererwa gukūramw’ abagurano b’intahava; ariko muri bene wanyu b’Abisirayeli ntihaze habe gutwazanya igitugu." 
Leviticus25:47 Kand’ umunyamahanga cank’ umugerērwa ari muri mwebge ni yahinduka umutunzi, uw’i wanyu agahinduka umugorwa i ruhande yiwe, akibunza kur’ uwo munyamahanga canke kur’ uwo mugerērwa ari muri mwebge, canke ku wo mu b’i wabo wa ben’ uwo, ngw amugure," 
Leviticus25:48 amaze kugurwa ashobora gucungurwa: umwe muri bene wabo yomucungura," 
Leviticus25:49 canke se wabo, canke mwene se wabo, canke mwene wabo wo hafi uw’ ari we wese yomucungura; canke na we ubgiwe ahindutse umutunzi yokwicungura." 
Leviticus25:50 Aharūre imyaka hamwe n’uwo yamuguze, uhereye ku mwaka yamuguriyemwo gushitsa ku mwaka wa yubile: igiciro co kwicungura kize gihwane n’igitigiri c’iyo myaka; igihe yamaranye na we amukorera kize kirīmbūrwe nk’igihe umucangero agererwa yokoze." 
Leviticus25:51 Ni yaba imyaka izoba igisigaye ari myinshi, ukw izoba ingana abe ari kw ariha igiciro c’ivyo yaguzwe co kwicungura." 
Leviticus25:52 Ni yaba imyaka yo gushitsa kuri yubile izoba isigaye ari mike, ayirīmbūre hamwe na we ico imaze: ukw iyo myaka izoba ingana abe ari kw ariha igiciro co kwicungura." 
Leviticus25:53 Az’ abane na we nk’umucangero akorera ingero uk’ umwaka utashe; ntaz’ amutwaze igitugu mu maso yanyu. 
Leviticus25:54 Kandi ni hatagira ikimucungura mur’ ivyo, azomuvako mu mwaka wa yubile, bo n’abana biwe." 
Leviticus25:55 Kukw Abisirayeli ar’ abagurano banje niharije; n’abagurano banje nakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Leviticus26:1 Ntimuze mwironderere ibigirwamana, canke ngo mushinge igishushanyo, ar’ ikibāzano, ar’ inkingi y’ibuye, kandi ntimuze mugire ikibuye mushira mu gihugu canyu gikorogoshoyekw ibishushanyo co kwunamira: kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Muze mwitondere amasabato yanje, mwubahe Ahēra hanje: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus26:3 Ni mwahora mugendera mu mabgirizwa yanje, mukitondera ivyagezwe vyanje, mukavyumvira;" 
Leviticus26:4 nuko nanje nzogenda mbarekurira imvura mu bihe vyayo, n’ igihugu kizogenda cimbuka ivyimburo vyaco, n’ibiti vyo mu ndimiro bizokwama bitengengere." 
Leviticus26:5 Igihe canyu c’isekura kizorinda gishitsa mw iyimbura ry’inzabibu, iryo yimbura na ryo ririnde rishitsa mw ibiba: muzokwama mu gahimbo, mwībēre mu gihugu canyu ata nkomanzi." 
Leviticus26:6 Kandi nzoha ico gihugu kugira impore, muzokwiryamira ata kibateye akōba: kandi nzohaherengeteza ibikōko vy’inkazi, kandi nta nkota izogera mu gihugu canyu." 
Leviticus26:7 Muzokinagiza abansi banyu, bahindikiranywe n’inkota imbere yanyu." 
Leviticus26:8 Batanu muri mwebge bazokinagiza ijana, n’ijana muri mwebge bazokinagiza ibihumbi cumi, abansi banyu bazohindikiranywa n’ inkota imbere yanyu." 
Leviticus26:9 Nzokwama mbashizek’ umutima, mbarōndōre, mbagwize, nkomeze isezerano ryanje namwe." 
Leviticus26:10 Muzorya ibigugu vyahitikiranye, kandi muzodaha ibihitira kugira ngo mubone aho mwimburira ivyeze." 
Leviticus26:11 Nzoshira ihema ryanje hagati muri mwebge, kandi sinzokwigera ndabazinukwa." 
Leviticus26:12 Nzogendera hagati muri mwebge, mbe Imana yanyu, namwe mube abantu banje." 
Leviticus26:13 Ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, kugira ngo ntimube abagurano babo; navunnye ibiti vy’ingōgo vyababoshe, mbaha kugenda mwemye." 
Leviticus26:14 Ariko ni mutanyumvira, ntimwitondere ivyo vyagezwe vyose," 
Leviticus26:15 kandi ni mwagaya amabgirizwa yanje, mukazinukwa ivyo nashinze, bigatuma mutitondera ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, mukica isezerano ryanje;" 
Leviticus26:16 nanje uko nzobagira n’uku: nzobagomorera ibibaca ivutu; kugenda mukōnyēra bo no kurwara inyonko bizotuma muhwera mu kajisho, imitima yanyu ihondobēre: muzorimira ubusa, kukw abansi banyu ari bo bazobirya." 
Leviticus26:17 Kandi nzohoza igitsūre canje kuri mwebge, muzoneshwa n’abansi banyu: ababanka ni bo bazobaganza; kandi muzohunga ata kibirukanye." 
Leviticus26:18 Ivyo ni bitātuma munyumvira, nanje nzokwongera kubahanira ivyaha vyanyu ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Leviticus26:19 Nzocobogoza ubushobozi bganyu mwihaya, mpindure ijuru ryo hejuru yanyu nk’icuma, n’isi yanyu nk’umuringa." 
Leviticus26:20 Amaboko yanyu azopfa ubusa, n’igihugu canyu ntikizoruha cera, kandi n’ibiti vyo muri co ngo bigire ico vyama." 
Leviticus26:21 Kandi ni mwashishikara kugenda munyuranya nanje, ntimunyumvire, nanje nzokwongera kubateza ivyago ibihetangabo ndwi bihwanye n’ivyaha vyanyu." 
Leviticus26:22 Kandi nzobatērēra ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, bitware abana banyu, biyigize amasho yanyu n’imikuku yanyu, bibatūvye, inzira zanyu zisibe." 
Leviticus26:23 Ivyo ni bitātuma mwihana ngo mumpindukirire, ariko mugashishikara kugenda munyuranya nanje," 
Leviticus26:24 nuko nanje nzogenda nnyuranya namwe, nzobakubita ibihetangabo ndwi jewe ubganje, mbahōra ivyaha vyanyu." 
Leviticus26:25 Kandi nzobatērēra inkota, ibahōre kuva mw isezerano ryanje; na ho ni mwirundaniriza mu bisagara vyanyu, nzobatērēra ikīza; kandi muzotangwa mu maboko y’abansi." 
Leviticus26:26 Ni navuna inkoni mwegamiye, ari yo vyo kurya vyanyu, abagore cumi bazoderenganiriza mu ziko rimwe, botsa udutsima, bazosigara babagaburira udutsima twa mugerwa: murye ututabahāgije." 
Leviticus26:27 Ivyo vyose ni bitātuma munyumvira, ariko mukagenda munyuranya nanje;" 
Leviticus26:28 nuko nanje nzogenda nnyuranya namwe ndi n’uburake, kandi nzobahanira ivyaha vyanyu ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Leviticus26:29 Muzorya abahungu banyu n’ abakobga banyu. 
Leviticus26:30 Kandi nzokomvomvora ibitabo vyanyu vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, nsiture ibishushanyo vyanyu vy’izuba, nshiburire imivyimba yanyu ku mirambararo y’ibigirwamana vyanyu; kandi nzobazinukwa mu mutima wanje." 
Leviticus26:31 Nzohindura ibisagara vyanyu imisaka, ahēra hanyu ntume hatamārirwa, kandi sinzomoterwa n’ugutamirana kw’ibimoga vyanyu munyosereza." 
Leviticus26:32 Nzotuma igihugu canyu gitamārirwa, bijoreze abansi banyu bakibamwo." 
Leviticus26:33 Namwe nzobashwiragiriza mu mahanga, nsokōre inkota, mbirukane; igihugu canyu kizosigara gitamāriwe, n’ibisagara vyanyu bicike imisaka." 
Leviticus26:34 Ico gihe igihugu kizobona uko gishumbushwa ya masabato yaco, ico gihe cose kikir’ amatongo, namwe mukiri mu gihugu c’ abansi banyu; aho ni ho igihugu kizoruhuka, gishumbushwe ya masabato yaco." 
Leviticus26:35 Igihe cose kikir’ amatongo kizoruhuka ukuruhuka kitigeze kuruhuka ku masabato yanyu mukikibamwo. 
Leviticus26:36 Amasigarira yo muri mwebge nzotuma barandukira imitima mu gihugu c’abansi babo: bazokangwa n’ ukwumva akababi gakakaje, bahunge nk’ūhunga inkota; bazotemba ata kibirukanye." 
Leviticus26:37 Bazogwanako nk’abahunga inkota, ata kibirukanye; mbere ntimuzoshobora guhagarara abansi banyu imbere." 
Leviticus26:38 Muzohonera mu mahanga, igihugu c’abansi banyu kizobaherengeteza." 
Leviticus26:39 Amasigarira yo muri mwebge bazogenda bashirira umunywera mu gihugu c’abansi banyu kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyabo; kandi n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza bizotuma bagenda bashira umunywera nka bo. 
Leviticus26:40 Ariko ni bātura ibigabitanyo vyabo n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza, ari vyo bihemu vyabo, bakemera yuko kunyuranya nanje kwabo" 
Leviticus26:41 ari kwo kwatumye nanje nnyuranya na bo, nkabahindira mu gihugu c’abansi babo; kandi ni bicisha bugufi ico gihe mu mitima yabo imeze nk’imibiri itakebge, bakarīmbūka, bakemera yukw ibihano bāhanwe ar’ ivyazanywe n’ibigabitanyo vyabo;" 
Leviticus26:42 ni ho nanje nzokwibuka isezerano ryanje nasezeraniye Yakobo, n’ iryo nasezeraniye Isaka, n’iryo nasezeraniye Aburahamu na ryo nzoryibuka; kandi n’igihugu na co nzocibuka." 
Leviticus26:43 Mber’ ico gihugu bazoba barakivuyemwo, gishumbushwe ya masabato yaco, gisigare ar’ imisaka batakikibamwo; na bo bazoba barīmbūtse, bemeye yukw ibihano bāhanwe ar’ ivyazanywe n’ibigabitanyo vyabo, kuko banse ivyagezwe vyanje, bakazinukwa amabgirizwa yanje." 
Leviticus26:44 Ariko naho bizomera birtyo, sinzobaheba, igihe bazoba bari mu gihugu c’abansi babo, kandi sinzobazinukwa, ngo ndabahenebereze rwose, mve mw isezerano ryanje nabasezeraniye: kuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Ariko kubgabo nzokwibuka isezerano nasezeraniye ba sekuruza, abo nakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa amahanga arorēra, kugira ngo mbe Imana yabo: ni jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus26:46 Ayo ni yo mabgirizwa n’ ivyashinzwe n’ivyagezwe, ivyo Uhoraho yashize hagati yiwe n’ Abisirayeli, abigereye ku musozi Sinayi, abitumye Mose." 
Leviticus27:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Leviticus27:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Umuntu ni yashitsa isezerano yansezeraniye jewe Uhoraho, riherereye ku citwa izinamuntu, uwo yasezeranywe az’ acunguzwe igiciro uzocira." 
Leviticus27:3 Umuhungu cank’ umugabo, uhereye k’ūmaze imyaka mirongwibiri gushitsa k’ūshikanye mirongwitandatu, uzoba ukwiye kumucira shekeli z’ifeza mirongwitanu, zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra." 
Leviticus27:4 Ni yaba umukobga cank’ umugore, uzoba ukwiye kumucira shekeli mirongwitatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Kand’ uhereye k’ūmaze imyaka itanu gushitsa k’ūshikanye mirongwibiri, ni yaba umuhungu uzoba ukwiye kumucira shekeli mirongwibiri, ni yaba umukobga, umucire icumi." 
Leviticus27:6 Kand’ uhereye k’ūmaze ukwezi kumwe gushitsa k’ūshikanye imyaka itanu, ni yaba umuhungu uzoba ukwiye kumucira shekeli z’ifeza zitanu, ni yaba umukobga, umucire zitatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Kand’ uhereye k’ūrengeje imyaka mirongwitandatu, ni yaba umugabo uzoba ukwiye kumucira shekeli z’ifeza cumi na zitanu, ni yaba umugore umucire icumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Arik’ uwasezeranye ni yaba umworo, ntashobore ico waciriye, baze bamujane imbere y’umuherezi, uwo muherezi amucire ico akwiye: amucire igiciro gihwanye n’ico uwasezeranye ashobora gutanga." 
Leviticus27:9 Ni caba ar’ igitunzwe co mu vyo basanzwe bampakw ibimazi, ic’ ari co cose co muri ben’ ivyo umuntu azonshikanira jewe Uhoraho, ico kizoba icera." 
Leviticus27:10 Ntaz’ akiguze ico bidahuje, canke ngw agikābe ikindi, ari ciza ngw agikābe ikibi, cank’ ari kibi ngw agikābe iciza: na ho ni yagikāba ikindi, icākābge bo n’ico yagikāvye, vyompi bizoba ivyera." 
Leviticus27:11 Kandi ni caba ar’ igitunzwe co mu bisanzwe bizira, co mu vyo batāhora bampakw ibimazi, az’ akijane imbere y’umuherezi;" 
Leviticus27:12 uwo muherezi agicire igiciro kimaze, gihwanye n’ukw ari ciza cank’ ari kibi; igiciro uwo muherezi azogicira, kize kibe ico." 
Leviticus27:13 Arik’ uwagitanze, ni yagomba kucicungurira, akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco, nk’ uko caciriwe." 
Leviticus27:14 Umuntu ni yarobanura inzu yiwe, akayimpa ngw ibe iyera, umuherezi az’ ayicire igiciro imaze, gihwanye n’ukw ari nziza cank’ ari mbi; igiciro uwo muherezi azoyicira, kize kigume uko." 
Leviticus27:15 Arik’ uwayirobanuye akayitanga, ni yagomba kuyicungurira, ayigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu cayo, nk’uko yaciriwe, ibone kuba iyiwe." 
Leviticus27:16 Umuntu ni yarobanura igice co kw itongo ryo mw ishamvu yiwe, akakimpa, mu kuhacira uz’ urīmbūre imbuto yohabibga ukw ingana: ni haba hokwirwa n’ ingero yitwa homeru ya sayiri, uhacire shekeli z’ifeza mirongwitanu." 
Leviticus27:17 Nuko ni yahēra mu mwaka wa yubile, akarobanura iyo ndimiro yiwe, haze hagume ico giciro waciriye." 
Leviticus27:18 Na ho ni yarobanura iyo ndimiro yiwe inyuma ya yubile, umuherezi az’ acire uyo amahera, arīmbūye imyaka igisigaye gushitsa ku mwaka wa yubile wundi, amanure igiciro ku vyo waciriye." 
Leviticus27:19 Arik’ uwarobanuye iyo ndimiro, ni yagomba kuyicungurira, agerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu cayo, nk’uko wayiciriye, ibone kuba iyiwe bgite." 
Leviticus27:20 Na ho n’atāgomba kuyicungura, arikw akayigurira uwundi, nta kundi kuzoyicungura hanyuma:" 
Leviticus27:21 arikw iyo ndimiro ni yakomōrwa n’umwaka wa yubile, izoba icitse iyera yanje, nk’iyatanzwe kuba inyegu yanje; izokwegukira umuherezi." 
Leviticus27:22 Kand’ umuntu ni yarobanura indimiro, akayimpa, ar’ iyo yaguze, itar’ iyo mw itongo ryo mw ishamvu yiwe;" 
Leviticus27:23 umuherezi az’ acire uyo igiciro gihwanye n’ico waciriye kuzoshitsa ku mwaka wa yubile: az’ atange kur’ uwo musi igiciro waciriye, kibe ikintu canje cera." 
Leviticus27:24 Maze mu mwaka wa yubile, iyo ndimiro iz’ isubizwe uwayiguzweko, nyen’ ishamvu iryo tongo ririmwo." 
Leviticus27:25 Kand’ igiciro cose uzohora ucira, kize kibe shekeli zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra: shekeli imwe ikwiye kubamw’ ingero yitwa gera mirongwibiri." 
Leviticus27:26 Arikw ic’ uburiza co mu bitunzwe, ntihaze hagire umuntu akirobanura ngw agitange, kuko na kare ivy’ uburiza vyari bisanzwe ar’ ivyanje; ar’ inka cank’ intama, n’iyanje." 
Leviticus27:27 Na ho ni caba ico mu bitunzwe bizira, uwo muntu az’ agicungure nk’uko waciriye, akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco; ariko ni kitacungurwa, kize kigurwe nk’uko waciriye." 
Leviticus27:28 Mugabo, ishikanwa ry’ikintu gitanzwe kuba inyegu yanje, ico umuntu azonshikanira akinyeguriye, mu vyo afise ivy’ ari vyo vyose, yaba umuntu, yaba igitunzwe, cank’ indimiro yo mw ishamvu yiwe, ntihaze hagire ben’ ico kigurwa canke ngo gicungurwe: ben’ iryo shikanwa ry’ikintu catanzwe kw inyegu n’icera cane kuri jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:29 Uwo abantu baciriyekw iteka barunduye, ntaz’ acungurwe; aze yicwe ata kabuza." 
Leviticus27:30 Mu vyeze mu gihugu, vyaba ivyo mu ndimiro, cank’ ivyamye ku biti, ikigiracumi c’ivyo vyose n’icanje, jewe Uhoraho: n’icera canje." 
Leviticus27:31 Maz’ umuntu ni yagomba gucungura ikigiracumi ciwe mur’ ivyo, ico agicunguje akigerekekw ikingana n’ikigiragatanu caco." 
Leviticus27:32 Kandi mu masho no mu mikuku, uko zigenda ziharūzwa inkoni, ikigiracumi co mur’ izo zose kize kibe icera canje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Leviticus27:33 Umuntu ntaze yibaze kw ari nziza canke kw ari mbi, canke ngw ayikābe iyindi: na ho ni yayikāba iyindi, iyakābge bo n’iyo yayikāvye, zompi zizoba izera: īgira icumi ntiz’ icungurwe." 
Leviticus27:34 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe Uhoraho yagereye Mose ku musozi Sinayi, ngw abishikirize Abisirayeli." 
Numbers1:1 Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri kw’umwaka ugira kabiri bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, Uhoraho abaririra Mose mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, bari mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi," 
Numbers1:2 ati Muharūre igitigiri c’ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, muharūre amazina y’abagabo bose umwe‐umwe," 
Numbers1:3 muhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abo mu Bisirayeli bose bashobora kurwana mu ntambara, mwe na Aroni mubaharūre, nk’ukw imice yabo iri." 
Numbers1:4 Kandi muze mufatanye n’umuntu umwe‐umwe wo mu miryango yose, asanzwe ar’ umukuru mu nzu ya ba sekuruza." 
Numbers1:5 Aya ni yo mazina y’abo bantu bazofatanya namwe: mu ba Reyubeni ni Esisuri mwene Shedeyuri; 
Numbers1:6 mu ba Simeyoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi; 
Numbers1:7 mu ba Yuda ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu; 
Numbers1:8 mu ba Isakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari; 
Numbers1:9 mu ba Zebuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni; 
Numbers1:10 muri bene Yosefu, uwo mu ba Efurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi, uwo mu ba Manase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri;" 
Numbers1:11 mu ba Benyamini ni Abidani mwene Gideyoni; 
Numbers1:12 mu ba Dani ni Ahiyeseri mwene Amishadayi; 
Numbers1:13 mu ba Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani; 
Numbers1:14 mu ba Gadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Duweli; 
Numbers1:15 mu ba Nafutali ni Ahira mwene Enani. 
Numbers1:16 Abo ni bo bātowe mw ikoraniro, b’abakuru mu miryango ya ba sekuruza, ni bo bāgaba ibihumbi vy’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers1:17 Nuko Mose na Aroni bajana abo bantu bavuzwe amazina," 
Numbers1:18 bakoranya ikoraniro ryose ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa kabiri; abantu bariyandikisha nk’ukw amavuka yabo ari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, baharūra amazina yabo umwe‐umwe, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru," 
Numbers1:19 nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose; nukw abaharūrira mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi. 
Numbers1:20 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Reyubeni imfura ya Isirayeli, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina y’abagabo bose umwe‐umwe, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:21 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Reyubeni baba ibihumbi mirongwine na bitandatu n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers1:22 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Simeyoni, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:23 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Simeyoni baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’ icenda n’amajana atatu. 
Numbers1:24 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Gadi, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:25 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Gadi baba ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu. 
Numbers1:26 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Yuda, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:27 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Yuda baba ibihumbi mirongwirindwi n’amajana atandatu. 
Numbers1:28 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Isakari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:29 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Isakari baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bine n’amajana ane. 
Numbers1:30 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Zebuloni, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:31 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Zebuloni baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’ indwi n’amajana ane. 
Numbers1:32 Mu ba Yosefu, baharūra amavuka ya ba Efurayimu, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:33 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Efurayimu baba ibihumbi mirongwine n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers1:34 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Manase, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:35 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Manase baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri n’amajana abiri. 
Numbers1:36 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Benyamini, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:37 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Benyamini baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitanu n’amajana ane. 
Numbers1:38 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Dani, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:39 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Dani baba ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bibiri n’amajana ndwi. 
Numbers1:40 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Asheri, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:41 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Asheri baba ibihumbi mirongwine na kimwe n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers1:42 Baharūra amavuka ya ba Nafutali, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, amazina yabo bose, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose:" 
Numbers1:43 abāharūwe bo mu muryango wa Nafutali baba ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana ane. 
Numbers1:44 Abo ni bo bāharūwe na Mose na Aroni bafatanije na ba bakuru b’Abisirayeli ukw ar’ icumi na babiri, umwe‐umwe wo mu nzu ya ba sekuruza." 
Numbers1:45 Nukw abāharūwe bose bo mu Bisirayeli, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, abashobora kurwana mu ntambara bose bo mu Bisirayeli;" 
Numbers1:46 abāharūwe bose na bose baba ibihumbi amajana atandatu na bitatu, n’amajana atanu na mirongwitanu." 
Numbers1:47 Arikw Abalewi, nk’uk’ umuryango wa ba sekuruza usanzwe uri, ntibāharūranywe na bo," 
Numbers1:48 kuk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose," 
Numbers1:49 at’ Umuryango wa Lewi wo ntuz’ uwuharūre, canke ng’ urīmbūre igitigiri cabo mu Bisirayeli bandi." 
Numbers1:50 Arikw Abalewi uz’ ubagire abo kuzezwa iryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe, n’ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu vyo muri ryo, n’ivyaryo vyose: abe ari bo barirerura, n’ibintu vyose vyo muri ryo; abe ari bo bakora ibikorwa vyo muri ryo, bashinge amahema yabo impande zose z’iryo hema." 
Numbers1:51 Kandi mu kurishingūra rigeze kugenda, Abalewi abe ari bo barishingūra, kand’ iyo hageze gushinga, Abalewi abe ari bo barishinga: kandi ni hagira uwundi wese atar’ uwo muri bo yovyēgēra akavyitamwo, aze yicwe." 
Numbers1:52 Abisirayeli baze bashinge amahema yabo, nk’ukw imice yabo iri, umuntu wese aherēre ah’ ab’i wabo bashagaje, ku ruhande rw’ibendera y’i wabo." 
Numbers1:53 Arikw Abalewi bo baze bashinge ayabo impande zose z’iryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe, kugira ng’ uburake bganje bgoye kuziriringira iryo koraniro ry’Abisirayeli; Abalewi baze bitondere ivyo bājejwe vy’iryo hema." 
Numbers1:54 Nukw Abisirayeli babigenza kuno, bakora vyose nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers2:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers2:2 at’ Abisirayeli baze bame bashinga amahema yabo, umuntu wese ku ruhande rw’ibendera y’i wabo, bateko baje ku kabendera karanga inzu ya ba sekuruza: basagaze bakīkūje ihema ry’ibonaniro impande zose." 
Numbers2:3 I burasirazuba haze hasagaze ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Yuda, nk’ukw imice yabo iri; umukuru w’Abayuda ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu." 
Numbers2:4 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bine n’amajana atandatu. 
Numbers2:5 Ab’ umuryango wa Isakari abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abisakari ni Netaneli mwene Suwari: 
Numbers2:6 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bine n’amajana ane. 
Numbers2:7 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Zebuloni; umukuru w’Abazebuloni ni Eliyabu mwene Heloni; 
Numbers2:8 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’indwi n’amajana ane. 
Numbers2:9 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Yuda bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani na bitandatu n’amajana ane, nk’ukw imice yabo yakurikirana. Abo baze babe ari bo babanza guhaguruka." 
Numbers2:10 Ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko haze habe igugu rya Reyubeni, n’ibendera yaryo, nk’ukw imice yabo iri; umukuru w’Abareyubeni ni Elisuri mwene Shedeyuri." 
Numbers2:11 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitandatu n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers2:12 Ab’ umuryango wa Simeyoni abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abasimeyoni ni Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi: 
Numbers2:13 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu n’icenda n’amajana atatu. 
Numbers2:14 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Gadi; umukuru w’Abagadi ni Eliyasafu mwene Ruweli: 
Numbers2:15 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu. 
Numbers2:16 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Reyubeni bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwitanu na kimwe n’amajana ane na mirongwitanu, nk’ukw imice yabo yakurikirana. Abo baze babe aba kabiri mu kugenda." 
Numbers2:17 Hanyuma haze hagende ihema ry’ibonaniro, rijane n’igugu ry’Abalewi, rigendere hagati y’ayandi magugu: uko bakurikirana mu gusagaza, abe ari ko bagenda, umuce wose mu gihimba cawo, ukw’ amabendera yayo akurikirana." 
Numbers2:18 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba haze habe igugu rya Efurayimu, n’ibendera yabo, nk’ukw imice yabo iri; umukuru w’Abefurayimu ni Elishama mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers2:19 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers2:20 Ab’ umuryango wa Manase abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abamanase ni Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri: 
Numbers2:21 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri n’amajana abiri. 
Numbers2:22 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Benyamini; umukuru w’Ababenyamini ni Abidani mwene Gideyoni: 
Numbers2:23 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitanu n’amajana ane. 
Numbers2:24 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Efurayimu bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana n’umunani n’ijana rimwe, nk’ukw imice yabo yakurikirana. Abo baze babe aba gatatu mu kugenda." 
Numbers2:25 Ku ruhande rw’i burārūko haze habe igugu rya Dani, n’ibendera yabo, nk’ukw imice yabo iri; umukuru w’Abadani ni Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi." 
Numbers2:26 Ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bibiri n’amajana ndwi. 
Numbers2:27 Ab’ umuryango wa Asheri abe ari bo bahererana na bo; kand’ umukuru w’Abasheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani: 
Numbers2:28 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na kimwe n’amajana atanu. 
Numbers2:29 Bakurikirwe n’umuryango wa Nafutali; umukuru w’Abanafutali ni Ahira mwene Enani: 
Numbers2:30 ingabo zāharūwe zabo zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana ane. 
Numbers2:31 Bose na bose abāharūwe mw igugu rya Dani bar’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwitanu n’indwi n’amajana atandatu. Abo baze babe ababaherukira mu kugenda, bakurikire amabendera yabo." 
Numbers2:32 Abo ni bo bāharūwe mu Bisirayeli, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari: abāharūwe bose na bose bo mur’ ayo magugu, nk’ukw imice yabo yari, bar’ ibihumbi amajana atandatu na bitatu n’amajana atanu na mirongwitanu." 
Numbers2:33 Arikw Abalewi ntibāharūranwa n’Abisirayeli, biba nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers2:34 Abisirayeli bakora kuno; basagaza baherereye ku mabendera yabo; ngo hagere kugenda bakagenda, umuntu wese agakomeza mu bo mu muryango wabo no mu bo mu nzu ya ba sekuruza, bakurikiye ivyo Uhoraho yabariye Mose vyose." 
Numbers3:1 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro Aroni na Mose bari bafise igihe Uhoraho yavuganira na Mose ku musozi Sinayi. 
Numbers3:2 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Aroni: imfura yiwe ni Nadabu, agakurikirwa na Abihu na Eleyazari na Itamari." 
Numbers3:3 Ayo ni yo mazina ya bene Aroni, abaherezi bāsutswekw amavuta yo kubarobanura, bagashikirizwa ibango ry’ ubuherezi." 
Numbers3:4 Mugabo Nadabu na Abihu bāpfiriye imbere y’Uhoraho, igihe bāmwosereza imibavu ku muriro urahuwe ahandi, bari mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi; bapfa ar’ incike. Ariko Eleyazari na Itamari bāshishikara ibango ry’ ubuherezi imbere ya se Aroni." 
Numbers3:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers3:6 at’ Igiza hafi umuryango wa Lewi, ubashire imbere ya Aroni umuherezi, kugira ngo bamutumikire:" 
Numbers3:7 bamutumikire mu vyo yagezweko, no mu vy’ ishengero ryose ryagezweko, imbere y’ihema ry’ ibonaniro; bakore n’ibikorwa vy’ iryo hema." 
Numbers3:8 Bazezwe ibintu vyose vyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, batumikire n’ishengero ry’Abisirayeli mu vyo ryagezweko, bakore n’ibikorwa vy’iryo hema." 
Numbers3:9 Nukw Abalewi ubashikirize Aroni n’ abana biwe, arabahawe arabeguriwe, barobanuwe mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers3:10 Ushireho Aroni n’abana biwe, abe ari bo bazezwa igikorwa c’ubuherezi bgabo: kand’ uwundi wese atar’ uwo muri bo yovyēgēra akavyitamwo, aze yicwe." 
Numbers3:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers3:12 ati Rāba jewe nisobanuriye Abalewi mu Bisirayeli bandi, ngo babe mu gishingo c’abana bose b’ubuzibūra bg’Abisirayeli: Abalewi bose bazoba abanje niharije." 
Numbers3:13 Kukw abana bose b’imfura ar’ abanje: ku musi nicirakw abana bose b’imfura bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ni ho nirobanuriye imfura zose zo mu Bisirayeli nkazēza, iz’ abantu bo n’uburiza bg’ibitunzwe: bizoba ivyanje; nd’ Uhoraho." 
Numbers3:14 Uhoraho abaririra Mose mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi," 
Numbers3:15 ati Harūra Abalewi, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri: uharūre izinamuhungu wese, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe ukaja hejuru." 
Numbers3:16 Nuko Mose arabaharūra, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze: agira nk’uko yabariwe." 
Numbers3:17 Aba ni bo bana ba Lewi, ukw amazina yabo akurikirana: Gerushoni na Kohati na Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Gerushoni, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri: Libuni na Shimeyi." 
Numbers3:19 Aba ni bo bene Kohati, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri: Amuramu na Isihari na Heburoni na Uziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Aba ni bo bene Merari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri: Mahili na Mushi. Iyo ni yo miryango y’Abalewi, nk’ ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
Numbers3:21 Abākomōtse kuri Gerushoni n’umuryango w’Abalibuni n’uw’ Abashimeyi: iyo ni yo miryango ya ba Gerushoni. 
Numbers3:22 Abāharūwe bo muri bo, nk’ukw igitigiri c’izinamuhungu wese cari kiri, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe no kuja hejuru, bār’ ibihumbi ndwi n’amajana atanu." 
Numbers3:23 Ab’ imiryango ya ba Gerushoni bāsagaza inyuma ya rya hema ahahera i burengerazuba. 
Numbers3:24 Umukuru w’ inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Gerushoni yari Eliyasafu mwene Layeli. 
Numbers3:25 Ivy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro aba Gerushoni bāzēzwa vyar’ ihema ry’imbere, n’ihema ryo hejuru, n’ico kurenza hejuru yaryo, n’ igihuzu cakinga ku muryango w’iryo hema ry’ibonaniro nyene," 
Numbers3:26 n’impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo, n’igihuzu cakinga mw irembo ry’urwo rugo rukīkūza ihema n’igicaniro, n’imigozi, n’ ibikorwa vyavyo vyose." 
Numbers3:27 Abākomōtse kuri Kohati n’ umuryango w’Abamuramu n’uw’ Abisihari n’uw’ Abaheburoni n’uw’ Abuziyeli: iyo ni yo miryango y’aba Kohati. 
Numbers3:28 Nk’ukw igitigiri c’izinamuhungu wese cari kiri, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe no kuja hejuru, bar’ ibihumbi munani n’amajana atandatu: ni bo bāzēzwa ivy’ Ahēra." 
Numbers3:29 Ab’ imiryango y’aba Kohati bāsagaza ku ruhande rw’iryo hema ahahera i bumanuko. 
Numbers3:30 Umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Kohati yari Elisafani mwene Uziyeli. 
Numbers3:31 Ivyo bāzēzwa yar’ isandugu n’ameza n’ico guterekwakw amatara, n’ibicaniro vyompi, n’ibintu vy’Ahēra vyo gukoresha, n’igihuzu co gukingīra Ahēra, n’ibikorwa vyavyo vyose." 
Numbers3:32 Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi ni we yagizwe mukuru kuri ba bakuru b’Abalewi, ngw abgirize abājējwe ivy’ Ahēra." 
Numbers3:33 Abākomōtse kuri Merari n’umuryango w’Abamahili n’uw’ Abamushi: iyo ni yo miryango y’aba Merari. 
Numbers3:34 Abāharūwe bo muri bo, nk’ukw igitigiri c’izinamuhungu wese cari kiri, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe no kuja hejuru, bār’ ibihumbi bitandatu n’amajana abiri." 
Numbers3:35 Umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza b’aba Merari yari Suriyeli mwene Abihayili; abo ni bo bāsagaza ku ruhande rw’iryo hema ahahera i burārūko. 
Numbers3:36 Aba Merari, ivyo bāshingiwe kuzēzwa zar’ imbaho z’iryo hema, n’ibiti vyo gusobeka muri zo, n’inkingi zaryo, n’ibitereko vyo kuzinegamwo, n’ibintu vyaryo vyose, n’ibikoreshwa vyaryo vyose;" 
Numbers3:37 n’ibirimbi vy’ urugo rwo kurikīkūza, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo, n’ imambo zavyo n’imigozi yavyo." 
Numbers3:38 Abāshinga amahema yabo imbere y’iryo hema ahahera i burasirazuba, yari Mose bo na Aroni n’abana biwe; ni bo bāzēzwa igikorwa c’Ahēra, n’ibindi bākora kubg’ Abisirayeli; kand’ uwundi wese atar’ uwo muri bo yovyēgēra akavyitamwo, yar’ akwiye kwicwa." 
Numbers3:39 Abāharūwe bo mu Balewi, abo Mose na Aroni bāharūye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabibabariye, bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, izinamuhungu wese, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe ukaja hejuru." 
Numbers3:40 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Harūra izinamuhungu wese mu bana b’imfura b’Abisirayeli, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe ukaja hejuru, ubaharūre nk’ukw amazina yabo ari." 
Numbers3:41 Unshingūrire Abalewi, ubashire mu gishingo c’imfura zose z’Abisirayeli: nd’Uhoraho; kand’ unshingūrire n’amasho n’imikuku vy’Abalewi, ubishire mu gishingo c’ivy’ uburiza bgose bg’amasho n’imikuku vy’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers3:42 Nuko Mose aharūra imfura zose zo mu Bisirayeli, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye." 
Numbers3:43 Abahungu b’imfura bose bāharūwe, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe no kuja hejuru, nk’ukw igitigiri c’amazina yabo kiri, abāharūwe bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’amajana abiri na mirongwirindwi na batatu." 
Numbers3:44 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers3:45 ati Shingūra Abalewi, ubashire mu gishingo c’imfura zose z’Abisirayeli, n’amasho n’imikuku vy’ Abalewi ubishire mu gishingo c’ivyabo; Abalewi babe abanje niharije: nd’Uhoraho." 
Numbers3:46 Kand’ abana b’imfura b’Abisirayeli basigaye, ukw ar’ amajana abiri na mirongwirindwi na batatu, basāgutse ku gitigiri c’Abalewi," 
Numbers3:47 uz’ ubāke shekeli zitanu kw incungu, umuntu umwe‐umwe ku mutwe wiwe; shekeli uzokwāka zize zibe izigezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra: shekeli imwe irimwo gera mirongwibiri." 
Numbers3:48 Ayo mahera acunguye abasāgutse uyahe Aroni n’abana biwe. 
Numbers3:49 Nuko Mose yāka amahera y’incungu abo bāsāgutse ku bācunguwe n’Abalewi: 
Numbers3:50 amahera yātse abo bana b’ imfura b’Abisirayeli aba shekeli igihumbi n’amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu na zitanu, zigezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra." 
Numbers3:51 Ayo mahera y’incungu Mose ayaha Aroni n’abana biwe, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yageze Mose." 
Numbers4:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers4:2 ati Muharūre igitigiri c’aba Kohati, mubarobanuye mu Balewi bandi; mubaharūre nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari;" 
Numbers4:3 muhēre ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, mugarukire ku bamaze mirongwitanu, bose abashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:4 Kand’ ibi ni vyo bikorwa aba Kohati bazokora mur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro no mu vyera cane. 
Numbers4:5 Iyo hageze guhaguruka ngo mugende, Aroni yinjirane n’abana biwe, bamanure igihuzu gikingīra Ahēra cane, bagitwikirize isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe;" 
Numbers4:6 baheze barenzekw ico kubitwikira co mu nsāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, hejuru baharenze impuzu y’ibara ry’isufe gusa; binjize n’iminiho kur’ iyo sandugu." 
Numbers4:7 Kand’ ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekērwa bayarenzekw impuzu y’isufe, bagereke hejuru amasahani n’udukombe n’amakarabo n’amabakure yo gusukisha ibiturire ku gicaniro; na ya mitsima y’intahava na yo igerekweko;" 
Numbers4:8 baheze babirenzekw impuzu isa n’agahama, na yo bayorosekw ico kuyitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi nyene; binjize n’iminiho kur’ ayo meza." 
Numbers4:9 Baheze bābīre impuzu y’isufe, bayitwikirize igitereko c’ amatara, bo n’amatara yaco, n’ imakasi zaco zo gutunganya urutambi, n’udusahani two gushirwak’ umunyota warwo, n’ibikoreshwa amavuta vyose vyo ku ruhande rwaco," 
Numbers4:10 bagitēkerane n’ibintu vyaco vyose mu co kubitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi, baheze babishire ku miniho." 
Numbers4:11 Kand’ igicaniro c’izahabu bakirenzekw impuzu y’isufe, na yo bayorosekw ico kuyitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi; binjize n’iminiho kur’ ico gicaniro." 
Numbers4:12 Kandi bābīre imbombovu yose y’ibikoreshwa, n’ivyo bakoreshereza Ahēra, babitēkere mu mpuzu y’isufe, na yo bayorosekw ico kuyitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi, baheze babishire ku miniho." 
Numbers4:13 Bayore umunyota ku gicaniro, baheze bakirenzekw impuzu y’ishigisha," 
Numbers4:14 bagereke hejuru ibintu vyaco vyose bakoresha ibikorwa vyaco, ar’ ivyo kurahuza, ar’ ivyo kwōkōza inyama, ar’ ivyo kuyoza umunyota, ar’ imibehe, mber’ imbombovu yose y’ico gicaniro; baheze bongere bakirenzekw ico kugitwikira co mu nsāto za tahashi, binjize n’iminiho kuri co." 
Numbers4:15 Maze Aroni n’abana biwe ni baheza gutwikira ivy’ Ahēra n’ibintu vyaho vyose, igihe hageze guhaguruka ngo mugende, hanyuma aba Kohati babone kuza kubirerura; ariko ntibaze bakore ku vyēra, kuko bopfa. Ivyo ni vyo aba Kohati bagerewe kurerura vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:16 Kand’ ivyo Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi ajējwe bize bibe amavuta y’amatara, n’imibavu itamirana, n’ishikanwa ry’intahava ry’ifu, n’amavuta yo kurobanuza abahabga ibango, atekw azēzwe n’iryo hema iyo riva rikagera, n’ibiri muri ryo vyose, Ahēra, n’ibintu vyaho." 
Numbers4:17 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers4:18 at’ Ubgoko bg’aba Kohati, ukw imiryango yabgo iri, ntimukaburanduze ngo bukūrwe mu Balewi;" 
Numbers4:19 ariko muze mwame mubagirira murtya, kugira ngo babeho ntibapfe, igihe bazokwēgēra ivyēra cane: Aroni n’abana biwe binjire, babagerere umuntu wese igikorwa ciwe n’umutwaro wiwe." 
Numbers4:20 Ariko bo ntibakinjire ngo bītegereze ivyēra, ntibakabikubite n’ijisho, kuko bopfa." 
Numbers4:21 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers4:22 ati Harūra igitigiri c’aba Gerushoni na bo, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri;" 
Numbers4:23 ubaharūre uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, ugarukire ku bamaze mirongwitanu, bose abashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:24 Kand’ ibi ni vyo bikorwa ab’ imiryango y’aba Gerushoni bazokora, bo n’ivyo bazorerura:" 
Numbers4:25 baze barerure impuzu zirōngōranijwe z’ihema ry’imbere, n’ ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’ico kurenza hejuru yaryo, n’ikindi gikozwe mu nsāto za tahashi co kurenza hejuru ya vyose; n’igihuzu co gukinga ku muryango w’iryo hema;" 
Numbers4:26 n’ impuzu zo kubamba ngo zibe urugo, n’igihuzu co gukinga mw irembo ry’urwo rugo rukīkūza ihema n’igicaniro, n’imigozi yavyo, n’ibikoreshwa vyavyo vyose; ibikorwa vyo ku ruhande rw’ivyo vyose babe ari bo babikora." 
Numbers4:27 Aroni n’abana biwe babe ari bo bagera aba Gerushoni mu bikorwa vyabo vyose, ari mu vyo barerura vyose, ari mu bindi bakora vyose: mubagerere ivyo barerura vyose, mubibazēze." 
Numbers4:28 Ivyo abe ari vyo biba ibikorwa vy’imiryango y’aba Gerushoni vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ ibonaniro; kand’ ibikorwa bajējwe baze babirābirwe na Itamari mwene Aroni umuherezi. 
Numbers4:29 Ku vy’aba Merari na bo, ubaharūre nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari;" 
Numbers4:30 ubaharūre uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, ugarukire ku bamaze mirongwitanu, umuntu wese ashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:31 Ibi abe ari vyo bazēzwa kurerura, abe ari vyo biba ibikorwa vyabo vyose vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro: imbaho z’ihema ry’imbere, n’ibiti vyo gusobeka muri zo, n’inkingi zaryo, n’ibitereko vyo kuzinegamwo;" 
Numbers4:32 n’ibirimbi vy’urugo rwo kurikīkūza, n’ibitereko vyavyo vyo kubinegamwo, n’imambo zavyo n’imigozi yavyo, bo n’ibintu vyaryo vyose vy’imbombovu, n’ ibikoreshwa vyaryo vyose: mubagerere ivyo barerura, mubibazēze, mubidonze mu mazina yavyo." 
Numbers4:33 Ivyo abe ari vyo biba ibikorwa vy’imiryango y’aba Merari, ibikorwa vyabo vyose vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro; baze babirābirwe na Itamari mwene Aroni umuherezi." 
Numbers4:34 Nuko Mose na Aroni na ba bakuru b’ikoraniro baharūra aba Kohati, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari," 
Numbers4:35 bahēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, bagarukira ku bamaze mirongwitanu, umuntu wese ashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers4:36 Abāharūwe bo muri bo, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, baba ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitanu." 
Numbers4:37 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Kohati, bose abākora ivyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, abo Mose na Aroni bāharūye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze atumye Mose." 
Numbers4:38 Kand’ abāharūwe bo mu ba Gerushoni, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari," 
Numbers4:39 uhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, ukagarukira ku bamaze mirongwitanu, umuntu wese ashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers4:40 bār’ ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitatu, bāharūwe nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
Numbers4:41 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Gerushoni, bose abākora ivyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, abo Mose na Aroni bāharūye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze." 
Numbers4:42 Kand’ abāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Merari, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari," 
Numbers4:43 uhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, ukagarukira ku bamaze mirongwitanu, umuntu wese ashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers4:44 bār’ ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana abiri, bāharūwe nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
Numbers4:45 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu miryango y’aba Merari, abo Mose na Aroni bāharūye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze, atumye Mose." 
Numbers4:46 Nukw abāharūwe bose na bose bo mu Balewi, abo Mose na Aroni n’abakuru b’Abisirayeli bāharūye, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari," 
Numbers4:47 uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, ukagarukira ku bamaze mirongwitanu, umuntu wese ashobora gukora ibikorwa vyo mu vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro, no kurerura ivyaryo," 
Numbers4:48 abāharūwe bo muri bo baba ibihumbi munani n’amajana atanu na mirongumunani. 
Numbers4:49 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze, ni ko Mose yabaharūje, umuntu wese nk’ukw igikorwa ciwe kiri, nk’ukw ivy’ akwiye kwikorera biri: uko ni ko Mose yabaharūye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamugeze." 
Numbers5:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers5:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, bakūre aho mushagaje umunyamibembe n’ ūfise igisokoro n’ūhumanijwe no gukora ku muvyimba, uw’ ari we wese," 
Numbers5:3 ar’ icitwa izinamuhungu cank’ izinamukobga, mubakūreho, mubashire hirya y’aho mushagaje, kugira ngo ntibahahumanye, kand’ ari ho mba hagati." 
Numbers5:4 Nukw Abisirayeli babigenza bartyo, babashira hirya y’aho bashagaje; nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose, baba ari ko bakora." 
Numbers5:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers5:6 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Umugabo cank’ umugore ni yakora icaha cose mu vy’abantu bagenda bakora, agatsindwa n’urubanza;" 
Numbers5:7 aze yature icaha yakoze, arihe n’ico kintu uko kingana, camukwegeye gutsindwa, kand’ akigerekeko n’ikingana n’ikigira gatanu caco, akirihe uwo yagiriye nabi." 
Numbers5:8 Ariko nyene kugirirwa nabi, namb’ ata mwene wabo wo hafi yasize, yokirihwa, indihano ya wa wundi yatsinzwe iz’ ibe iyanje Uhoraho, ihabge umuherezi, ayigerekekw impongano y’impfizi y’intama, bayimutangirekw impongano." 
Numbers5:9 Umugabane wose uzoshingūrwa ku vyēra vyose Abisirayeli bashikana, bazanira umuherezi, uz’ ube uwiwe." 
Numbers5:10 Ivy’ umuntu wese arobanuye ngw abitange, bize bibe ivy’ umuherezi; mber’ ic’ umuntu aha umuherezi cose kizoba iciwe." 
Numbers5:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers5:12 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Umugore ni yareka kurāba umugabo wiwe, akamucumurako," 
Numbers5:13 uwundi mugabo akaryamana na we, bikazīkwa, umugabo wiwe ntabimenye, uwo mugore akaba ahumanye, ntihaboneke ūmwagiriza, canke ngw afatwe akibikora;" 
Numbers5:14 umugabo wiwe agafatwa n’ifūhe, agafūhira umugore wiwe, yahumanye, canke yofatwa n’ifūhe, agafūhira umugore wiwe, kand’ atāhumanye;" 
Numbers5:15 nuk’ uwo mugabo akwiye kujana umugore wiwe ku muherezi, amujanane n’ishikanwa amutangiriye ry’ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu ya sayiri; ntaz’ ayisukekw amavuta, canke ngw ayishirekw imibavu, kukw ar’ ishikanwa ry’ifu rizanywe kubg’ ifūhe, ar’ ishikanwa ry’icibutso, cibutsa ibigabitanyo." 
Numbers5:16 Umuherezi amwīgize hafi, amushire imbere yanje Uhoraho:" 
Numbers5:17 uwo muherezi aheze yābīre amazi yejejwe mu kintu c’ikibumbano, yābīre no ku mukungugu wo hasi mw ihema, awushire mur’ ayo mazi." 
Numbers5:18 Ashire uwo mugore imbere yanje, amuhamburure umushatsi, amutereke mu maboko rya shikanwa ry’ifu ry’icibutso, ari ryo shikanwa rizanywe kubg’ ifūhe. Uwo muherezi afate mu ntoke ayo mazi y’umururazi atera umuvumo." 
Numbers5:19 Uwo muherezi aheze arahize uwo mugore, amutongēre, at’ Asangw’ ata mugabo wundi mwaryamanye, canke ng’ ube wararetse kurāba umugabo wawe, ukihumanya, kand’ ukiganzwa na we, aya mazi y’umururazi atera umuvumo ntagire ico akugira." 
Numbers5:20 Arikw asangwa wararetse kuba ari we urāba, kand’ ari we akikuganza, ukihumanya, hakaba har’ uwundi mugabo mwaryamanye atar’ uwawe—" 
Numbers5:21 uwo muherezi aheze arahize uwo mugore indahiro yo kwivuma, amutongēre, at’ Uhoraho aguhindure ikivume n’indahiro mu bgoko bganyu, bitewe n’ukw akunyunyuye ikibero, akagaragamvya inda yawe." 
Numbers5:22 Kandi n’aya mazi atera umuvumo araja mu mara yawe, agaragamvye inda yawe, anyunyure ikibero cawe. Nuk’ uwo mugore yitabirize, ati Amen, amen!" 
Numbers5:23 Uwo muherezi aheze yandike iyo mivumo mu gitabo, ayogeshe ayo mazi arura, iyajemwo," 
Numbers5:24 aheze anyweshe uwo mugore ayo mazi arura atera umuvumo, ayo mazi atera umuvumo amujemwo, umururazi wayo umutere uburibge." 
Numbers5:25 Uwo muherezi acishemwo, akūre rya shikanwa ry’ifu rizanywe kubg’ ifūhe mu maboko y’uwo mugore, arizungurize imbere yanje Uhoraho, arijane aje ku gicaniro," 
Numbers5:26 arikamatek’ urushi rumwe rwo kuba icibutso caryo, arwosereze ku gicaniro, abone kunywesha uwo mugore ayo mazi." 
Numbers5:27 Ni yamara kuyamunywesha, bizomera birtya: ni yaba yarahumanye, akaba yacumuye ku mugabo wiwe, ayo mazi atera umuvumo amushitsemwo azomuhindukira umururazi, agaragambe inda, anyunyuke ikibero, ahinduke ikivume mu bgoko bgabo." 
Numbers5:28 Arik’ uwo mugore ni yaba atāhumanye, ntiyandure, azoba yēze, ntibizomubuza gusama inda." 
Numbers5:29 Ico ni co cagezwe c’ifūhe, ku mugore akiganzwa n’umugabo wiwe, akareka kuba ari we arāba, akīhumānya," 
Numbers5:30 no ku mugabo afatwa n’ifūhe, agafūhira umugore wiwe. Uwo mugabo az’ ashire uwo mugore imbere yanje Uhoraho, umuherezi amukorere ibishinzwe n’ico cagezwe vyose." 
Numbers5:31 Uwo mugabo azoba atsinze ntazoba yaragabitanije, uwo mugore ni we azogībgako n’ukugabitanya kwiwe." 
Numbers6:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers6:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, ut’ Umugabo cank’ umugore ni yasezerana isezerano ry’ubunaziri, ngw anyiyegurire jewe Uhoraho;" 
Numbers6:3 aze yitandukanye na vino n’ibiboreza bindi; ntaz’ asome no ku nkarisha ya vino canke ku nkarisha y’ikiboreza kindi, canke ngw asome ku mazi y’inzabibu, canke ngw arye inzabibu mbisi canke zumye." 
Numbers6:4 Mu misi yose y’ubunaziri bgiwe ntaz’ arye ikintu na kimwe kiva ku muzabibu, naho koba akabuto cank’ agashishwa." 
Numbers6:5 Mu misi yose y’isezerano ryiwe ry’ubunaziri ntihaze hagire urupfuhe rugera ku mutwe wiwe: az’ abe uwera gushitsa ah’ imisi yo kunyiyegurira jewe Uhoraho izoshirira; az’ areke umushatsi wiwe utendere. 
Numbers6:6 Imisi yose yo kunyiyegurira kwiwe ntaze yēgēre umuvyimba. 
Numbers6:7 Ivyo ntaz’ avyiyandurishe, naho yoba ari se canke nyina, canke mukuru we canke murumuna we canke mushiki we bapfuye, kukw ikimenyetso co kunyiyegurira jewe Imana kiri ku mutwe wiwe." 
Numbers6:8 Imisi yose y’ubunaziri bgiwe az’ abe uwera kuri jewe Uhoraho. 
Numbers6:9 Kandi ni hagira umuntu agwa bukumbi i ruhande yiwe, akanduza umutwe w’ubunaziri bgiwe, ku musi wo guhumanurwa kwiwe aze yimoshe: ku musi ugira indwi az’ abe ari ho yimosha." 
Numbers6:10 Maze ku w’umunani az’ azane intunguru zibiri cank’ ivyana vy’inuma bibiri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, abihe umuherezi;" 
Numbers6:11 maz’ umuherezi atange kimwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, ikindi agitange kw ikimazi co kwoswa, amutangire impongano y’icaha yazaniwe n’uwo muvyimba, yēze umutwe wiwe kur’ uwo musi." 
Numbers6:12 Aze yongere anyiyegurire jewe Uhoraho imisi y’ubunaziri bgiwe, azane isuguru y’intama itarengeje umwaka kw ikimazi c’impongano; arikw imisi yiwe ya mbere izoba yapfuye ubusa, kuk’ ubunaziri bgiwe bgahumanye." 
Numbers6:13 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku Munaziri, igihe arangije imisi y’ubunaziri bgiwe: az’ azanwe ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro," 
Numbers6:14 anzanire ishikanwa ryiwe, jewe Uhoraho: azane isuguru imwe y’intama itarengeje umwaka, itagira agasembga, kw ikimazi co kwoswa, bo n’ishashi imwe y’ intama itarengeje umwaka nyene, itagira agasembga, kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, n’impfizi y’intama imwe itagira agasembga kw ikimazi c’ishimwe," 
Numbers6:15 n’indumane irimw’ imitsima itambiwe; udutsima twacumbge mw ifu igogōretse, twacumbanywe n’amavuta ya elayo, n’utundi dutsima tutambiwe nyene, tubēhūye, twasutswekw amavuta, bo n’amashikanwa bigendanye, iry’ ifu n’iry’ ibiturire." 
Numbers6:16 Umuherezi abizane imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, aheze amutangire ikimazi ciwe co gutangirwa ivyaha, n’ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa;" 
Numbers6:17 atange na ya mpfizi y’intama kw ikimazi anshikaniye c’ishimwe, ayishikanane na za ndumane z’imitsima itambiwe; kand’ uwo muherezi ashikanane na vyo amashikanwa bigendanye, iry’ ifu n’iry’ ibiturire." 
Numbers6:18 Maz’ uwo Munaziri yimoshereze umushatsi wiwe w’ubunaziri ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, aheze yābīre uwo mushatsi wo ku mutwe wiwe w’ubunaziri, awushire mu muriro uriko ca kimazi c’ishimwe." 
Numbers6:19 Maz’ umuherezi yābīre igikenye c’ukuboko kwa ya mpfizi y’intama gutetse, n’agatsima kamwe katambiwe akūye muri za ndumane, n’akandi gatsima kamwe kabēhūye, katambiwe nyene, abishire ku mashi y’uwo Munaziri, amaze kwimosha ubunaziri bgiwe." 
Numbers6:20 Umuherezi abizunguze, bibe ishikanwa rizungurijwe imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho; ivyo n’ivyera bizotwara umuherezi, hamwe na ya nkoro ishikanishwa kuzunguzwa, na ca gikenye c’ukuguru kigerewe abaherezi nyene. Ivyo birangiye, uwo Munaziri abone kunywa vino." 
Numbers6:21 Ico ni co cagezwe co ku Munaziri yasezeranye isezerano, n’ic’ ishikanwa ryiwe anshikanira ryo kubg’ ubunaziri bgiwe, udashizemw’ ico azotanga nk’ukw ashoboye. Isezerano yasezeranye arishitse, nk’ukw icagezwe c’ubunaziri bgiwe kivuga." 
Numbers6:22 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers6:23 ati Barira Aroni n’abana biwe, ut’ Uku abe ari ko muzohezagira Abisirayeli: muze muvuge," 
Numbers6:24 mut’ Uhoraho aguhe umugisha, akuzigame;" 
Numbers6:25 Uhoraho akumurikishirize mu nyonga hiwe, akugirire neza;" 
Numbers6:26 Uhoraho akurābe neza, aguhe amahoro." 
Numbers6:27 Ukw abe ari ko bashira izina ryanje ku Bisirayeli; nanje nzobaha umugisha. 
Numbers7:1 Mose arangije gushinga rya hema, no kurirobanuza amavuta no kuryeza, bo n’ibintu vyaryo vyose, n’igicaniro n’ibintu vyaco vyose;" 
Numbers7:2 kur’ uwo musi abakuru b’Abisirayeli, ari bo bakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, bazana amashikanwa; ni bo ba bakuru b’imiryango bājējwe ivyo guharūra abantu." 
Numbers7:3 Bazana amashikanwa yabo imbere y’Uhoraho, imikogote itandatu isakaye hejuru, n’inka cumi na zibiri zo kuyikwega: abo bakuru bose, babiri‐babiri bāsangira gushikana umukogote, umwe‐umwe akīsangiza inka; babizana imbere y’iryo hema." 
Numbers7:4 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers7:5 ati Ni wākīre ivyo bazanye, bibe ivyo gukoreshwa ibikorwa vy’ihema ry’ ibonaniro; ubihe Abalewi babikoreshe, umuntu wese nk’ukw igikorwa ciwe kiri." 
Numbers7:6 Nuko Mose yākīra iyo mikogote n’izo nka, abiha Abalewi." 
Numbers7:7 Imikogote ibiri n’inka zine abiha Abagerushoni, ngo babikoreshe nk’ukw ibikorwa vyabo biri;" 
Numbers7:8 iyindi mikogote ine n’inka munani abiha Abamerari, ngo babikoreshe nk’ukw ibikorwa vyabo biri; Itamari mwene Aroni umuherezi akaba ari we abagaba." 
Numbers7:9 Arikw Abakohati ntiyagira ico abaha, kuko bo, igikorwa cabo bājējwe car’ ico mu bintu vyēra, bakaba bari bakwiye kubirerura ku bitugu vyabo." 
Numbers7:10 Abo bakuru bazana amashikanwa yo gushikiriza Imana igicaniro ku musi carobanujwe amavuta, bayashikanirira imbere yaco." 
Numbers7:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Baze bashikane amashikanwa yabo yo kunshikiriza igicaniro, umukuru wese ku musi wiwe." 
Numbers7:12 Ku musi w’intangamarāra uwashikanye ni Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu, wo mu muryango wa Yuda:" 
Numbers7:13 ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakūre imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:14 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:15 n’imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:16 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:17 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu." 
Numbers7:18 Ku musi ugira kabiri, hāshikanye Netaneli mwene Suwari, umukuru w’Abisakari." 
Numbers7:19 Ishikanwa ryiwe yashikanye n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:20 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:21 n’imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:22 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:23 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Netaneli mwene Suwari." 
Numbers7:24 Ku musi ugira gatatu, hāri haramukiwe Eliyabu mwene Heloni, umukuru w’Abazebuloni." 
Numbers7:25 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:26 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:27 n’imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:28 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:29 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Eliyabu mwene Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Ku musi ugira kane, hāri haramukiwe Elisuri mwene Shedeyuri, umukuru w’Abareyubeni." 
Numbers7:31 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:32 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:33 n’ imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’ impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:34 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:35 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Elisuri mwene Shedeyuri." 
Numbers7:36 Ku musi ugira gatanu, hāri haramukiwe Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi, umukuru w’Abasimeyoni." 
Numbers7:37 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’ isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:38 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:39 n’imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:40 n’ isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:41 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi." 
Numbers7:42 Ku musi ugira gatandatu, hāri haramukiwe Eliyasafu mwene Duweli, umukuru w’Abagadi." 
Numbers7:43 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:44 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:45 n’ imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:46 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:47 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Eliyasafu mwene Duweli." 
Numbers7:48 Ku musi ugira indwi, hāri haramukiwe Elishama mwene Amihudi, umukuru w’Abefurayimu." 
Numbers7:49 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:50 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:51 n’imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:52 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:53 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Elishama mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers7:54 Ku musi ugira umunani, hāri haramukiwe Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri, umukuru w’ Abamanase." 
Numbers7:55 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:56 n’ agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:57 n’imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:58 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:59 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri." 
Numbers7:60 Ku musi ugira icenda, hāri haramukiwe Abidani mwene Gideyoni, umukuru w’Ababenyamini." 
Numbers7:61 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:62 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:63 n’ imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:64 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha;
