Numbers7:65 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’ amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’ intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Abidani mwene Gideyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ku musi ugira icumi, hāri haramukiwe Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi, umukuru w’Abadani." 
Numbers7:67 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:68 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:69 n’ imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’ impfizi y’intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:70 n’isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:71 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi." 
Numbers7:72 Ku musi ugira icumi na rimwe, hāri haramukiwe Pagiyeli mwene Okirani, umukuru w’Abasheri." 
Numbers7:73 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:74 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:75 n’imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:76 n’ isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:77 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Pagiyeli mwene Okirani." 
Numbers7:78 Ku musi ugira icumi na kabiri, hāri haramukiwe Ahira mwene Enani, umukuru w’Abanafutali." 
Numbers7:79 Ishikanwa ryiwe n’isahani imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu, n’ibakure imwe y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli mirongwirindwi zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; vyompi vyari vyuzuye ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu;" 
Numbers7:80 n’agakombe kamwe k’izahabu, kuriba kwako ni shekeli cumi; kari kuzuye imibavu;" 
Numbers7:81 n’imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’isuguru y’intama imwe itarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi co kwoswa;" 
Numbers7:82 n’ isuguru y’impene imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; 
Numbers7:83 n’amapfizi abiri y’inka, n’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ay’ impene atanu, n’amasuguru y’intama atanu atarengeje umwaka, vyo kuba ikimazi c’ishimwe; iryo ni ryo shikanwa rya Ahira mwene Enani." 
Numbers7:84 Ivyo ni vyo abakuru b’Abisirayeli bāshikanye mu gushikiriza Imana igicaniro, ku musi carobanujwe amavuta; vyose na vyose vyar’ ibi: amasahani y’ifeza cumi n’abiri, n’amabakure y’ifeza cumi n’abiri, n’udukombe tw’izahabu cumi na tubiri;" 
Numbers7:85 ayo masahani y’ifeza, kuriba kwayo imwe‐imwe ni shekeli ijana na mirongwitatu; kuriba kw’ayo mabakure imwe‐imwe ni shekeli mirongwirindwi; ifeza zose na zose ivyo bintu vyavuyemwo, kuriba kwazo ni shekeli ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ane, zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra;" 
Numbers7:86 kand’ utwo dukombe tw’izahabu twari twuzuye imibavu, ukw ari cumi na tubiri, kuriba kwatwo kamwe‐kamwe ni shekeli cumi, zagezwe kuri shekeli ir’ Ahēra; amazahabu yose na yose utwo dukombe twavuyemwo, kuriba kwayo ni shekeli ijana na mirongwibiri." 
Numbers7:87 Ivyatanzwe kw ibimazi vyo kwoswa vyose na vyose n’ amamasa cumi n’abiri, n’amapfizi y’intama cumi n’abiri, n’amasuguru y’intama atarengeje umwaka cumi n’abiri nyene; bo n’ amashikanwa y’amafu bigendanye; ivy’ ibimazi vyo gutangirwa ivyaha n’amasuguru y’impene cumi n’abiri;" 
Numbers7:88 ivyatanzwe kw ibimazi vy’ishimwe vyose na vyose n’amapfizi y’inka mirongwibiri n’ane, n’amapfizi y’intama mirongwitandatu, n’ay’ impene mirongwitandatu, n’amasuguru y’intama atarengeje umwaka mirongwitandatu nyene. Ivyo ni vyo bāshikanye mu gushikiriza Imana igicaniro, kimaze kurobanuzwa amavuta." 
Numbers7:89 Maze Mose yinjiye mw ihema ry’ibonaniro kubonana n’Uhoraho, yumva ijwi rimubarira, rivugiye ahahera hejuru ya wa mutemere wo guhongerako, uri kw isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe, hagati ya ba bakerubi bompi; aho ni ho babonaniye." 
Numbers8:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers8:2 ati Barira Aroni, uti Ni washira ya matara ku gitereko cayo, uz’ uyatereke kuri co ukw ari ndwi, uburyo butuma abonesha imbere yaco." 
Numbers8:3 Nuko Aroni abigenza artyo; ashira ayo matara ku gitereko, uburyo butuma abonesha imbere yaco, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers8:4 Uku ni kw ico gitereko cākozwe: cari gicuzwe mw izahabu; car’ igicurano uhereye ku ntebe yaco ugashitsa no ku bimeze nk’amashurwe biri kuri co; nk’ukw icitegererezo cari kiri, Uhoraho yeretse Mose, uko ni ko Mose yacurishije ico gitereko." 
Numbers8:5 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers8:6 ati Robanura Abalewi mu Bisirayeli, ubahumanure." 
Numbers8:7 Uku abe ari k’ugenza mu kubahumanura: ubacucagire amazi y’impongano y’ivyaha, bamweshe urupfuhe ku mubiri wabo wose ahamobga, bamesure impuzu zabo, bihumanure." 
Numbers8:8 Maze bābīre imasa y’umukangara, n’ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, ifu igogōretse ivanze n’amavuta ya elayo; wābīre n’ iyindi masa y’umukangara nyene kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha." 
Numbers8:9 Maz’ uzane Abalewi imbere y’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ukoranye n’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers8:10 Kand’ igihe uzanye Abalewi imbere yanje jewe Uhoraho, Abisirayeli babarambikekw ibiganza." 
Numbers8:11 Aroni aheze atange Abalewi kw ishikanwa rijungujwe imbere yanje, rishikanywe n’Abisirayeli, babe abo gukora igikorwa canje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers8:12 Maz’ Abalewi barambike ibiganza mu ruhanga rw’ ayo mamasa, uheze utange imwe kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, iyindi kw ikimazi co kwoswa, bibe ivyo nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, kw impongano y’Abalewi." 
Numbers8:13 Maz’ ushire Abalewi imbere ya Aroni n’ abana biwe, ubatange babe ishikanwa rijungujwe nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers8:14 Ukw abe ari k’urobanura Abalewi mu Bisirayeli bandi: Abalewi babe abanje niharije. 
Numbers8:15 Hanyuma y’ivyo Abalewi babone kuza ngo bakore ibikorwa vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro; nuk’ ubahumanure, ubatange kw ishikanwa rijungujwe." 
Numbers8:16 Kukw abo mbahawe mbeguriwe mu Bisirayeli bandi; kuko mbitoranirije ngo basubire mu gishingo c’ubuzibūra bgose, ari bgo bana b’imfura bose b’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers8:17 Kukw imfura zose z’Abisirayeli ar’ izanje, uhereye ku bantu no ku buriza bg’ibitunzwe: ku musi nicirakw abana bose b’imfura bo mu gihugu ca Egiputa ni ho navyirobanuriye." 
Numbers8:18 None ntwaye Abalewi ngo basubire mu gishingo c’abana bose b’imfura b’Abisirayeli. 
Numbers8:19 Kandi ntanze Abalewi, mbahaye Aroni n’abana biwe, mbakūye mu Bisirayeli bandi, ngo bakore igikorwa c’ihema ry’ibonaniro mu gishingo c’Abisirayeli, ngo babatangire impongano, kugira ngo hoye gutera ikīza na kimwe mu Bisirayeli, iyo begereye Ahēra." 
Numbers8:20 Uko ni ko Mose na Aroni n’ ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli bagenjeje ku Balewi: Abisirayeli babagenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose ku vyabo. 
Numbers8:21 Nukw Abalewi biyuhagira ivyaha, bamesura impuzu zabo; Aroni abatanga kw ishikanwa rijungujwe imbere y’Uhoraho, kand’ abatangira impongano ngo bahumanuke." 
Numbers8:22 Hanyuma y’ivyo Abalewi babona kuza gukora ibikorwa vyabo vy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro, bagabga na Aroni n’abana biwe; ivy’ Abalewi babigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose ku vyabo." 
Numbers8:23 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers8:24 at’ Ibi ni vyo ngeze ku Balewi: abamaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ itanu no kuja hejuru baze binjire mw ibango ry’igikorwa c’ihema ry’ ibonaniro. 
Numbers8:25 Ni bageza imyaka mirongwitanu baze bakūkuruke mur’ iryo bango ry’ico gikorwa, ntibasubire gukora nk’ ababibazwa;" 
Numbers8:26 ariko bashobora kwifashiriza bagenzi babo mu vy’ ihema ry’ibonaniro, ku vyo bājējwe, ariko ntibaze bagire igikorwa na kimwe babazwa. Ukw abe ari k’ugenza Abalewi mu vyo bājējwe." 
Numbers9:1 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, mu mwaka ugira kabiri bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, Uhoraho abaririra Mose mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi," 
Numbers9:2 at’ Abisirayeli bakwiye kurya ivya Pasika mu gihe cayo cashinzwe. 
Numbers9:3 Ku musi w’icumi na kane w’uku kwezi nyene ku mugoroba, az’ abe ari ho mubirya, nk’ukw igihe cayo cashinzwe: mubirye nk’ukw amabgirizwa yayo yose n’imigenzo yayo yose bimeze." 
Numbers9:4 Mose araheza abarira Abisirayeli yuko bakwiye kuzorya ivya Pasika. 
Numbers9:5 Nuko mur’ ukwo kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi na kane, ku mugoroba, barabirya, bari mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi: nukw Abisirayeli bakora vyose nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers9:6 Maze hār’ abagabo bahumanijwe n’umuvyimba w’umuntu, bituma badashobora kurya ivya Pasika kur’ uwo musi. Baza imbere ya Mose na Aroni kur’ uwo musi nyene," 
Numbers9:7 baramubarira, bati Turahumanye kubg’ umuvyimba w’umuntu: none n’iki cotuma dukūrwamwo, ngo ntidutange ikimazi c’Uhoraho mu gihe caco cashinzwe, hamwe n’Abisirayeli bandi?" 
Numbers9:8 Mose arabishura, ati Banza muhagarare, numve ico Uhoraho aribushinge ku vyanyu." 
Numbers9:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers9:10 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni hagira umuntu muri mwebge canke wo mu ruvyaro rwanyu ruzokwaruka hanyuma, ahumanywa n’umuvyimba, cank’ ari mu rugendo rwa kure, na ho nyene ntaz’ abure kurya ivya Pasika yanje, jewe Uhoraho:" 
Numbers9:11 baze babirye mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi na kane nyene, ku mugoroba; inyama baze bazikoze imitsima itambiwe n’imboga zirura;" 
Numbers9:12 ntibaze bagire izo basiga ngo zirāre, kandi ntibaze bavune igufa na rimwe ryazo: nk’ukw amabgirizwa yose ya Pasika ameze, az’ abe ari ko babirya." 
Numbers9:13 Arik’ umuntu adahumanye, kandi ntabe mu rugendo, akareka kurya ku vya Pasika, uwo muntu az’ acibge mu bgoko bgabo. Icaha c’uwo muntu kizomusubirako kukw atātanze ikimazi canje mu gihe caco cashinzwe." 
Numbers9:14 Umunyamahanga ni yaza kuba muri mwebge, akagomba kuja mu vya Pasika yanje, jewe Uhoraho, az’ agenze nk’ukw ibgirizwa ry’ ivya Pasika rimeze, bo n’imigenzo yayo: muze mugire ibgirizwa rimwe ku munyamahanga no ku mvukira." 
Numbers9:15 Ku musi rya hema ryashinzweko, ca gicu kiraza, kiraripfuka, ari ryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe: maz’ uhereye ku mugoroba ugashitsa mu gitondo caba kur’ iryo hema gisa n’umuriro." 
Numbers9:16 Uko ni ko vyagenda biba imisi yose: ico gicu cama kiripfutse, mw ijoro kigasa n’umuriro." 
Numbers9:17 Kand’ ico gicu iyo kidūze kivuye kur’ iryo hema, Abisirayeli ni ho bābona kugenda; kand’ ahantu cahagarara, ni ho bāsagaza." 
Numbers9:18 Icagezwe c’Uhoraho ni co cahagurutsa Abisirayeli, kandi ni co cabaha gusagaza; igihe cose ico gicu cāmara kur’ iryo hema, na bo bāguma aho bashagaje." 
Numbers9:19 Iy’ ico gicu kigumye kw ihema kumara imisi myinshi, Abisirayeli na bo bitondera ico Uhoraho yabihanikirije, ntibagende." 
Numbers9:20 Rimwe na rimwe ico gicu cāmara imisi mike kur’ iryo hema, icagezwe c’Uhoraho kikaba ari co kibagumiza aho bashagaje, hanyuma kikaba ari co kibahagurutsa." 
Numbers9:21 Ahandi carigumak’ uhereye ku mugoroba, ugashitsa mu gitondo; cadūga mu gitondo kivuye kuri ryo, bagafata urugendo. Cank’ iyo kirigumyek’ umurango n’ijoro, cadūga bakabona kugenda." 
Numbers9:22 Naho yaba imisi ibiri, cank’ ukwezi, canke kurengaho, ico gicu uko caguma kur’ iryo hema ni kw Abisirayeli baguma aho bashagaje, ntibagende: maz’ iyo kidūze bakabona kugenda." 
Numbers9:23 Icagezwe c’ Uhoraho ni co cabaha gusagaza, kandi ni co cabahagurutsa; bitondera ico Uhoraho yabihanikirije, nk’uko yatumye Mose." 
Numbers10:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers10:2 at’ Uz’ ukore inzumbete zibiri mw ifeza, uzikoze mu buryo bgo gucura; zize zikubere izo guhamagaza ikoraniro, n’izo guhagurutsa amagugu y’abantu aho bashagaje." 
Numbers10:3 Uko bazivugije, ikoraniro ryose rize rikoranire ah’ uri, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ ibonaniro." 
Numbers10:4 Ni bavuza rumwe gusa, ba bakuru batwara ibihumbi vy’Abisirayeli, abe ari bo bakoranira ah’ uri." 
Numbers10:5 Na ho iyo muvugije ijwi rirengēra, amagugu yo ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba az’ abe ari yo atangura kugenda." 
Numbers10:6 Maze mwongeye kuvuza ijwi rirengēra, amagugu yo ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko az’ abe ari yo akurikira: ijwi rirengēra rize ribe iryo kuvuzwa ngo bahaguruke." 
Numbers10:7 Ariko ni mwagomba gukoranya ikoraniro, muze muzivuze, ariko ntimuzivuze ijwi rirengēra." 
Numbers10:8 Bene Aroni abaherezi az’ abe ari bo bavuza izo nzumbete, bibabere icagezwe c’intahava, uk’ urunganwe rwanyu ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Numbers10:9 Kandi ni mwaba mu gihugu canyu, mugatabara kurwanya ababisha babateye, muze muvuze izo nzumbete ijwi rirengēra, maze muzokwibukwa nanje, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukizwe abansi banyu." 
Numbers10:10 No mu gihe c’umunezero wanyu, no mu misi mikuru yanyu yashinzwe, no ku musi ukwezi kubonetse, izo nzumbete muze muzivugirize hejuru y’ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa, no ku bimazi vyanyu vy’amashikanwa y’ishimwe; zizobabera icibutso imbere yanje: nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Numbers10:11 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri, mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri, ca gicu kiradūga, kiva kuri rya hema ry’ Ibishinga intahe." 
Numbers10:12 Abisirayeli barahaguruka, bagenda bakurikirana nk’uko vyashinzwe, bava mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi, ico gicu gihagarara mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani." 
Numbers10:13 Urwo rugendo ni rwo rwabaye urwa mbere bāgenda barōngōwe n’ivyo Uhoraho yatumye Mose. 
Numbers10:14 Habanje guhaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Yuda, nk’ukw imice yabo iri: umukuru w’izo ngabo yari Nahashoni mwene Aminadabu." 
Numbers10:15 Umukuru w’ ingabo zo mu muryango wa Isakari yari Netaneli mwene Suwari. 
Numbers10:16 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Zebuloni yari Eliyabu mwene Heloni. 
Numbers10:17 Rya hema riraheza rirashingūrwa: aba Gerushoni n’aba Merari, ari bo bājējwe kurirerura, baragenda." 
Numbers10:18 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Reyubeni, nk’ukw imice yabo iri: umukuru w’izo ngabo yari Elisuri mwene Shedeyuri." 
Numbers10:19 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Simeyoni yari Shelumiyeli mwene Surishadayi. 
Numbers10:20 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Gadi yari Eliyasafu mwene Duweli. 
Numbers10:21 Hatako hahaguruka bene Kohati, bareruye ivy’ Ahēra; basanga rya hema bamaze kurishinga." 
Numbers10:22 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Efurayimu, nk’ukw imice yabo iri: umukuru w’izo ngabo yari Elishama mwene Amihudi." 
Numbers10:23 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Manase yari Gamaliyeli mwene Pedasuri. 
Numbers10:24 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Benyamini yari Abidani mwene Gideyoni. 
Numbers10:25 Maze hahaguruka ab’ ibendera y’igugu rya Dani, ari bo bāherukira izo ngabo zose, nk’ukw imice yabo iri: umukuru w’izo ngabo yari Ahiyezeri mwene Amishadayi." 
Numbers10:26 Umukuru w’ ingabo zo mu muryango wa Asheri ni Pagiyeli mwene Okirani. 
Numbers10:27 Umukuru w’ingabo zo mu muryango wa Nafutali yari Ahira mwene Enani. 
Numbers10:28 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bākurikirana, nk’ukw imice yabo yari, iyo bafashe urugendo." 
Numbers10:29 Mose abarira Hobabu, mwene Ruweli sebukwe Umumidiyani, ati Turi mu rugendo tuja mu gihugu Uhoraho yatwemereye kw azoduha; enda n’uze tujane, natwe tuzokugirira neza: kuk’ Uhoraho yasezeranye kugirira Abisirayeli neza." 
Numbers10:30 Na we aramwishura, at’ Eka ntitujana, ariko nisubiriye mu gihugu cacu no mu b’i wacu." 
Numbers10:31 Aramwishura, ati Ndakwinginze, ntudute; kuk’ urazi ko tugiye kugenda turatāhīra mu bugaragwa, nawe uzotubera kamenyanzira." 
Numbers10:32 Kandi ni wajana natwe, ivyiza Uhoraho azotugirira vyose, nawe tuzobikugirira kuno." 
Numbers10:33 Nuko barahaguruka, bava ku musozi w’Uhoraho, bagenda urugendo rw’imisi itatu; kand’ isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ibaja imbere iyo misi itatu y’urugendo, kugira ngw ibaronderere aho baruhukira." 
Numbers10:34 Ca gicu c’Uhoraho cirirwa hejuru yabo, iyo bahagurutse bashingūye amahema." 
Numbers10:35 Maz’ ukw isandugu ihagurutse, Mose yaravuga, at’ Uhoraho, haguruka, ababisha bawe basanzare, abansi bawe baguhunge." 
Numbers10:36 Iy’ ihagaze, akavuga, at’ Uhoraho, garuka mu masinzi y’ibihumbi vy’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers11:1 Abantu baridodomba kubg’ ibibagoye; bigwa mu matwi y’Uhoraho; avyumvise, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa: umuriro w’ Uhoraho wāduka muri bo, uyigiza igihimba co ku mpera y’aho bashagaje." 
Numbers11:2 Abantu batakambira Mose, na we abasabira k’Uhoraho, uwo muriro urazima." 
Numbers11:3 Aho hantu bahita Tabera, kuk’ umuriro w’Uhoraho wādutse muri bo." 
Numbers11:4 Abanyamahanga b’ikivange bari muri bo batangura kwifuza inyama; Abisirayeli na bo bongera kurira, bati Ni nde yoduha inyama zo kurya?" 
Numbers11:5 Twibutse ya mafi twarya tukiri muri Egiputa ata co dutanze, n’amakonkomburi n’amapapayi n’amapwaro n’ibitunguru vya betsalimu n’ivya sumimu." 
Numbers11:6 Ariko non’ uburuma buratwishe: nta kindi na kimwe twezakw ijisho atar’ iyi manu gusa. 
Numbers11:7 Kand’ iyo manu yasa n’utubuto tw’agati kitwa gadi, ishusho yayo yasa n’ivyitwa budola." 
Numbers11:8 Abantu bāragendagenda, bakayegeranya, bakayisya canke bakayisekura, bakayibiriza mu nkono bakayicumbamw’ udutsima: yasōsa nk’udutsima turimw’ amavuta ya elayo." 
Numbers11:9 Mw ijoro ikime catonda aho bashagaje, manu igatonda kuri co." 
Numbers11:10 Nuko Mose yumva abantu barira, umuntu wese arirana n’ab’ inzu yiwe, baririra mu miryango y’amahema yabo: uburake bg’ Uhoraho buraziriringa, na Mose na we arababara." 
Numbers11:11 Mose abaza Uhoraho, ati N’iki gituma ungirira nabi, jewe umusavyi wawe? n’iki gitumye ntagirirwa akagongwe imbere yawe, ukandemēka umutwaro w’aba bantu bose?" 
Numbers11:12 Mbega ni jewe nasamye inda y’aba bantu bose? ni jewe nabavyaye, k’umbarira ngo ni ndabakīkire mu gikiriza, nk’uk’ umugabo akīkira umwana yonka, ngo ndabajane mu gihugu warahiye ba sekuruza k’uzokibaha?" 
Numbers11:13 Nkūre hehe inyama zo kugaburira aba bantu bose, ko bandirira imbere ngo ni ndabahe inyama, barye?" 
Numbers11:14 Erega sinshobora guterura aba bantu bose jenyene, kuko bamvuna." 
Numbers11:15 Hāk’ ungenza urtyo, enda n’upfume unyica, namba ngiriwe akagongwe imbere yawe, kugira ngo noye gupfa nibonye." 
Numbers11:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Nkoraniriza abagabo mirongwirindwi bo mu bakuru b’Abisirayeli, abo uzi kw ar’ abakuru koko, baganza abantu, ubazane kw ihema ry’ibonaniro, bahagararaneho nawe." 
Numbers11:17 Nanje mpava mmanuka, mbonanireyo nawe; nābīre ku mpwemu iri kuri wewe, ndayishire kuri bo; na bo bazofatanya nawe uwo mutwaro w’abantu, ureke kugenda uwuteruye wenyene." 
Numbers11:18 Kand’ ubarire abantu, ut’ Umusi w’ejo uz’ ushike mwiyejeje, uti Kandi muzorya inyama: kuko muririye mu matwi yiwe, mukavuga, muti Ni nde yoduha inyama zo kurya? muti Ko twari tumerewe neza muri Egiputa. Uti Ni co gitumye azobaha inyama z’uko murya." 
Numbers11:19 Uti Ntimuzozirya umusi umwe, cank’ ibiri, cank’ itanu, canke cumi, canke mirongwibiri;" 
Numbers11:20 ut’ Ariko muzozirya ukwezi kwiramvuriye, gushitsa aho zizosigara zibaduhiye, zikabasesema; uti Kuko mumwanse, Uhoraho ari muri mwebge, uti Mukaririra imbere yiwe, muti Twaviriye iki muri Egiputa?" 
Numbers11:21 Mose aramwishura, at’ Aba bantu ndimwo, abagabo b’imbaka n’ibihumbi amajana atandatu: non’ uvuze ng’ Uzobaha inyama, bazirye ukwezi kwiramvuriye!" 
Numbers11:22 Mbega bazobāgirwa imikuku n’amasho bibakwire? canke bazokoranirizwa amafi yose yo mu kiyaga, abakwire?" 
Numbers11:23 Uhoraho yishura Mose, ati Mbeg’ ukuboko kwanje Uhoraho kwabaye kugufi? None hinge urābe yukw ijambo ryanje nkubgiye rishika canke ko ridashika." 
Numbers11:24 Nuko Mose arasohoka, abarira abantu ayo majambo y’Uhoraho. Akoranya abagabo mirongwirindwi bo mu bakuru, abakīkiza rya hema irya n’ino." 
Numbers11:25 Uhoraho amanuka ari muri ca gicu, amubarira amajambo, araheza yābīra ku mpwemu iri kuri Mose, ayishira kur’ abo bakuru mirongwirindwi: maz’ iyo mpwemu ibahagazeko baca bavugishwa n’Imana, ariko bagarukirizaho." 
Numbers11:26 Arikw aho bashagaje hāri hasigaye abagabo babiri, umwe yitwa Elidadi, uwundi yitwa Medadi: iyo mpwemu ibahagararako na bo. Kandi bari mu gitigiri c’abanditswe, ariko ntibari bavuye aho bari ngo baje kuri rya hema; nuko bavugishirizwa n’Imana aho nyene aho bashagaje." 
Numbers11:27 Umuhungu w’umusore agenda yiruka, abarira Mose, ati Elidadi na Medadi bariko baravugishirizwa aho dushagaje." 
Numbers11:28 Yosuwa mwene Nuni, yabaye umufasha wa Mose uhereye mu busore bgiwe, aramubarira, ati N’ubabuze, mugenzi!" 
Numbers11:29 Mose aramubaza, ati Ni jewe ufitiye ishaka? Icompa abantu bose b’Uhoraho bakaba abavugishwa na we, Uhoraho akabashirakw impwemu yiwe!" 
Numbers11:30 Mose asubira aho bashagaje, bo na ba bakuru b’Abisirayeli." 
Numbers11:31 Haza umuyaga uvuye k’Uhoraho, uzana inkware zivuye ku kiyaga, uzirekurira aho bashagaje n’impande zose, gushitsa ahogendwa umusi umwe, zagenda zārāra hejuru y’isi nk’intambge zibiri z’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Numbers11:32 Abantu bava hasi barenza uwo musi bazāndūra, bakesha n’ijoro, barenza n’uwundi musi: uwāndūye nkeya yāndūra ingero yitwa homeru cumi: bazanikira impande zose z’aho bashagaje." 
Numbers11:33 Izo nyama bakizishinzekw amenyo, batarazihekenya, uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira abantu, abarekuriramw’ ikīza gikomeye cane." 
Numbers11:34 Aho hantu bahita Kiburoti‐hatava, kukw ari ho bahamvye abifuje inyama." 
Numbers11:35 Abantu bava i Kiburoti‐hatava, baja i Haseroti, bagumaho." 
Numbers12:1 Miriyamu na Aroni banegura Mose, kubg’ Umunyetiyopiyakazi yābiriye; kuk’ uwo Munyetiyopiyakazi yari yaramwābiriye koko." 
Numbers12:2 Baravuga, bati Mbeg’ Uhoraho avugisha Mose gusa? Tweho ntatuvugisha? Uhoraho aravyumva." 
Numbers12:3 Kand’ uwo mugabo Mose yar’ umugwaneza kurusha abantu bose bo mw isi. 
Numbers12:4 Ako kanya Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni na Miriyamu, ati Ni murenguke uko muri batatu, muze kw ihema ry’ibonaniro; nuko bararenguka, ukw ari batatu." 
Numbers12:5 Uhoraho amanuka ari muri ya nkingi y’igicu, ahagarara mu muryango w’iryo hema, ahamagara Aroni na Miriyamu, bompi baraza." 
Numbers12:6 Arababarira, ati Ni mwumve amajambo yanje; asangwa muri mwebge har’ uwo mvugisha, jewe Uhoraho nzomwimenyeshereza mw iyerekwa, mvuganire na we mu nzozi." 
Numbers12:7 Arik’ umusavyi wanje Mose si ko bimeze: ayoboka mu rugo rwanje hose. 
Numbers12:8 Uyo we twama twivuganira mu kanwa n’akandi, mfoboye, ntapfinze, kand’ ishusho yanje, jewe Uhoraho, arayibona. None rero n’iki catumye mwubahuka kunegura umusavyi wanje Mose?" 
Numbers12:9 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho burabaziriringira, arivumbura." 
Numbers12:10 Ca gicu kiva hejuru y’ihema, kiragenda; Miriyamu aca asēsakw imibembe, yera nka shelegi; Aroni amukubisekw amaso, asanga yashēshekw imibembe." 
Numbers12:11 Aroni abarira Mose, ati Ndakwinginze, mwami wanje, ntuduhōre ico caha, kuko twagize ubupfu, tugakora icaha." 
Numbers12:12 Ndakwinginze, yoye kumera nk’ikivutse gihwereye, kivuye mu nda ya nyina kiriko kirabora." 
Numbers12:13 Nuko Mose atakambira Uhoraho, ati Mana, ndakwinginze, mukize!" 
Numbers12:14 Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Iyaba se yamuciriye amate mu maso gusa, ntiyomaze imisi ndwi amāramāra? Ni bamwugaranire inyuma y’aho mushagaje, amare imisi ndwi, aheze abone kugaruka." 
Numbers12:15 Nuko bugaranira Miriyamu inyuma y’ aho bashagaje, amara imisi ndwi; maz’ abantu ntibāhaguruka, Miriyamu ataragaruka." 
Numbers12:16 Hanyuma barahaguruka, bava i Haseroti, basagaza mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani." 
Numbers13:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers13:2 ati Tuma abantu, baje gutata igihugu c’i Kanani mpaye Abisirayeli; ukūre umuntu umwe‐umwe mu miryango ya ba sekuruza, asanzwe ari mukuru muri bo." 
Numbers13:3 Nuko Mose abatuma ari mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yageze: abo yatumye bose bār’ abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers13:4 Aya ni yo mazina yabo: mu muryango wa Reyubeni hatumwa Shamuwa mwene Zakuri. 
Numbers13:5 Mu muryango wa Simeyoni hatumwa Shafati mwene Hori. 
Numbers13:6 Mu muryango wa Yuda hatumwa Kalebu mwene Yefune. 
Numbers13:7 Mu muryango wa Isakari hatumwa Igalu mwene Yosefu. 
Numbers13:8 Mu muryango wa Efurayimu hatumwa Hoseya mwene Nuni. 
Numbers13:9 Mu muryango wa Benyamini hatumwa Paluti mwene Rafu. 
Numbers13:10 Mu muryango wa Zebuloni hatumwa Gadiyeli mwene Sodi. 
Numbers13:11 Mu muryango wa Yosefu, ari wo muryango wa Manase, hatumwa Gadi mwene Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Mu muryango wa Dani hatumwa Amiyeli mwene Gemali. 
Numbers13:13 Mu muryango wa Asheri hatumwa Seturi mwene Mikayeli. 
Numbers13:14 Mu muryango wa Nafutali hatumwa Nakibi mwene Vofusi. 
Numbers13:15 Mu muryango wa Gadi hatumwa Geweli mwene Maki. 
Numbers13:16 Ayo ni yo mazina y’abantu Mose yatumye gutata ico gihugu; kandi yita Hoseya mwene Nuni, Yosuwa." 
Numbers13:17 Nuko Mose abatuma gutata ico gihugu c’i Kanani, arababgira, ati Mudūgane iyi nzira, ica i Negebu, mudūge muje mu mugamba," 
Numbers13:18 murābe ico gihugu uko kimeze, n’abantu bakibamwo kw ar’abahizi canke kw ar’ abanyantege nke, murābe n’ukw ari bake canke kw ari benshi;" 
Numbers13:19 murābe n’ico gihugu babamwo kw ari ciza canke kw ari kibi, n’ibisagara babamwo uko bimeze, ko baba mu mahema canke mu bisagara bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye;" 
Numbers13:20 murābe n’ukw ico gihugu kimera canke ko kitamera, kandi ko kirimw’ ibiti canke ko bitarimwo. Kandi mushire ubgoba, muzane ku vyo ico gihugu ceze. Kand’ ico gihe car’ igihe insukoni z’isega zirungurije." 
Numbers13:21 Nuko baradūga, batata ico gihugu, bahereye mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, bashitsa i Rehobu, hahereranye n’ahafata i Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Mu kudūga bari baciye i Negebu, bashika i Heburoni; Ahimani na Sheshayi na Talumayi, abākomōtse kuri Anaki, ni ho bāba. Kand’ igisagara c’i Heburoni cari kimaze imyaka ndwi cubatswe, igihe Sowani ho muri Egiputa hubakwa." 
Numbers13:23 Bashika mu gihogoro citwa Eshikoli, bahaca ishami ririk’ umusoko umwe w’ inzabibu, bawutwara ku munzeganzega ari babiri; bazana no ku makomamanga yaho no ku nsukoni." 
Numbers13:24 Aho hantu hitwa Igihogoro Eshikoli kubg’ uwo musoko Abisirayeli baciyeho. 
Numbers13:25 Nuko bagaruka hashize imisi mirongwine, bavuye gutata ico gihugu." 
Numbers13:26 Bashitse, basanga Mose na Aroni n’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli i Kadeshi, mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani. Babīgānira inkuru, hamwe n’iryo koraniro ryose, babereka n’ivyo bamuye mur’ ico gihugu." 
Numbers13:27 Babarira Mose, bati Twarashitse mu gihugu wadutumyemwo, kandi n’ivy’ ukuri koko gitemba amata n’ubūki; kandi ngivyo ivyo twamuyeyo." 
Numbers13:28 Mugabo, abantu baba mur’ ico gihugu n’abahizi, kand’ ibisagara vyaho bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, kandi ni binini‐binini cane; eka mbere twabonyey’ Abānaki." 
Numbers13:29 Kand’ igihugu c’i Negebu kibamw’ Abamaleki, n’umugamba waho ubamw’ Abaheti n’Abayebusi n’Abamori; kand’ ahaherereye ku kiyaga haba Abanyakanani, bo n’ahaherereye kuri Yorodani." 
Numbers13:30 Maze Kalebu yamira abantu bariko baridodombera Mose, aravuga, ati Ni muze tudūge ubu nyene, tuhashikīre, kuko dushobora rwose kuhatsinda." 
Numbers13:31 Arikw abari baradūganye na we, bati Ntitwoshobora kudūga ngo turwanye abo bantu, kuko baturusha ubuhizi." 
Numbers13:32 Babarira Abisirayeli inkuru z’agacavutu z’ico gihugu batase, bat’ Igihugu twanyuragiyemwo tugitata n’igihugu kimiragura abantu baho, kand’ abantu bose twahabonye n’abagabo barebare cane." 
Numbers13:33 Kandi twabonyey’ ibigatanya, ari bo Bānaki, bakomōtse ku bigatanya nyene: ku ruhande rwacu twabonye ko tubamezeko nk’inzige, na bo kandi bakabona kw ari ko tumeze." 
Numbers14:1 Ishengero ryose riraturikisha, riraboroga; iryo joro abantu barāra bararira." 
Numbers14:2 Abisirayeli bose bidodombera Mose na Aroni, ikoraniro ryose rirababarira, rit’ Es’ iyo tuba twaraguye mu gihugu ca Egiputa! Canke tukagwa mur’ ubu bugaragwa!" 
Numbers14:3 Mbeg’ Uhoraho atujanira iki mur’ ico gihugu, kwicirwayo n’ inkota? Abagore bacu n’ibibondo vyacu bakazoba abanyagano: non’ iciza s’uko twosubira muri Egiputa?" 
Numbers14:4 Baravugana, bat’ Enda twitoranirize uwo kutugaba, twisubirire muri Egiputa." 
Numbers14:5 Maze Mose na Aroni bikubitira hasi imbere y’ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli ryari rihakoraniye. 
Numbers14:6 Yosuwa mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune bāri mu gitigiri c’abagiye gutata ico gihugu, bitantamurirakw impuzu zabo;" 
Numbers14:7 babarira ishengero ryose ry’ Abisirayeli, bat’ Igihugu twanyuragiyemwo tugitata, n’igihugu ciza c’agahebuza." 
Numbers14:8 Uhoraho namba tumuhimbaye, azotujana mur’ ico gihugu, akiduhe; kandi n’igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Numbers14:9 Mugabo ntimugararize Uhoraho, kandi ntimutinye ben’ ico gihugu: tuzobarya bga mutsima; icābakingira cabavuyeko, ariko tweho Uhoraho ari mu ruhande rwacu: nta co mubatinya!" 
Numbers14:10 Ishengero ryose riraheza rivuga ko babicisha amabuye; maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bubonekera Abisirayeli bose buri mw ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
Numbers14:11 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Aba bantu bazogeza hehe kunkēngēra? Bazogeza hehe kutanyizera, naho nakoreye ibitangaza bingaho hagati muri bo?" 
Numbers14:12 Hinge mbarekuriremw’ ikīza, ndabarandure, nawe ndaguhindure ihanga rizobarusha ubginshi n’inkomezi." 
Numbers14:13 Mose yishura Uhoraho, at’ Ereg’ Abanyegiputa bazovyumva, kuko wakūye aba bantu muri bo, ubakūjey’ ububasha bgawe," 
Numbers14:14 na bo bazobibgira ben’ ico gihugu: barumvise yuko wewe, Uhoraho, uri hagati mur’ aba bantu; kuko wewe, Uhoraho, uboneka imbonankubone, n’igicu cawe kigahagarara hejuru yabo, kand’ ukaja imbere yabo uri mu nkingi y’igicu ku murango, no mu nkingi y’umuriro mw ijoro." 
Numbers14:15 None ni wica aba bantu nk’umuntu umwe, amahanga yumvise inkuru zawe azovuga," 
Numbers14:16 at’ Uhoraho ko yananiwe kujana abo bantu mu gihugu yarahiye kw azobaha, ni co catumye abatsinda mu bugaragwa." 
Numbers14:17 Enda se, ububasha bg’Umwami wanje ni bgiyerekane kw ari bginshi, nk’uko wivuzeko," 
Numbers14:18 ut’ Uhoraho nteba kuraka, ngira ikigongwe cinshi, mparira ibigabitanyo n’ibicumuro, ariko simperereza urubanza k’ūtarugira; mpōra abana ibigabitanyo vya ba se, nkageza ku runganwe rwabo rugira gatatu no ku rugira kane." 
Numbers14:19 Ndakwinginze, n’uharire ibigabitanyo vy’aba bantu, nk’ukw imbabazi zawe nyinshi ziri, nk’uko wagenda ubaharira uhereye bakiva muri Egiputa ugashitsa n’ubu." 
Numbers14:20 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Ndabahariye nk’uk’ unsavye;" 
Numbers14:21 ariko n’ukuri, ndahiye uguhoraho kwanje, ndahiye n’isi yose izokwuzura icubahiro canje, jewe Uhoraho," 
Numbers14:22 kw abo bantu bose babonye icubahiro canje n’ibitangaza vyanje nakoreye muri Egiputa no mu bugaragwa, bakangerageza ibihetangabo cumi vyose, ntibanyumvire;" 
Numbers14:23 n’ukuri nta n’umwe azobona igihugu nari nararahiye ba sekuruza ko nzokibaha, nta n’umwe mur’ abo bankengereye azokibona;" 
Numbers14:24 shit’ umusavyi wanje Kalebu, kuko yari n’uwundi mutima utari nk’uwabo, akankurikira muri vyose, uyo we nzomujana mu gihugu yagiyemwo, kand’ uruvyaro rwiwe ruzocegukira." 
Numbers14:25 Eh’ Abamaleki n’Abanyakanani baba muri kiriya kiyaya: nukw ejo muze muhindukire musubire mu bugaragwa mwerekeye ku Kiyaga Gitukura. 
Numbers14:26 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers14:27 ati Nzogeza hehe kwihanganira iri shengero rimeze nabi, rihora riranyidodombera? Numvise imyidodombo y’Abisirayeli banyidodombera." 
Numbers14:28 Babarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize: ut’ Arahiye uguhoraho kwiwe, ut’ Ivyo yumvise mwivugiye ni vyo nyene azobagirira:" 
Numbers14:29 ut’ Imivyimba yanyu izogenda ihindikirana mur’ ubu bugaragwa: ut’ Abāharūwe mwese uko mungana, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, uko mwakamwidodombeye," 
Numbers14:30 uti N’ukuri mukazogera mu gihugu yarahiye amanitse ukuboko kw azokibaha ngo mukibemwo, shiti Kalebu mwene Yefune na Yosuwa mwene Nuni." 
Numbers14:31 Ut’ Arikw abana banyu b’ibibondo, abo muvuze ko bazoba abanyagano, ni bo azocinjiza, bībonere igihugu mwanse." 
Numbers14:32 Ut’ Ariko mweho, imivyimba yanyu izogenda ihindikirana mur’ ubu bugaragwa." 
Numbers14:33 Uti Kand’ abana banyu bazomara imyaka mirongwine baragira mu bugaragwa, bagībgeko n’ubuhemu bganyu bgo kumureka; uti Gushitsa ah’ imivyimba yanyu izoba ikunkumukiye mu bugaragwa." 
Numbers14:34 Uti Nk’ ukw imisi ingana mwamaze mutata ico gihugu, ukw ari mirongwine, umusi uzohwana n’umwaka; uti Muzoyimara mugiweko n’ibigabitanyo vyanyu, ukw iyo myaka ari mirongwine; uti Kandi muzomenya kugirirwa umwikomo na we ic’ ari co." 
Numbers14:35 Jewe Uhoraho ndabivuze: sinzobura kugenza ntyo iri shengero ryose rimeze nabi, rikoraniye kungarariza. Bazokunkumukira mur’ ubu bugaragwa, ni ho bazogwa." 
Numbers14:36 Maze ba bagabo Mose yatuma gutata ico gihugu, bagarutse bakadonda inkuru z’agacavutu z’ico gihugu, bigatuma ishengero ryose rimwidodombera," 
Numbers14:37 abo bagabo nyene bādonze izo nkuru z’agacavutu z’ico gihugu, bicirwa n’ikīza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers14:38 Ariko Yosuwa mwene Nuni na Kalebu mwene Yefune baba ari bo bakira muri ba bagabo bagiye gutata ico gihugu. 
Numbers14:39 Mose araheza ashikiriza Abisirayeli bose ayo majambo; abantu bagira umubabaro mwinshi. 
Numbers14:40 Bakoroka kare mu gatondo, badūga imisozi yo mur’ uwo mugamba, bavuze, bat’ Ehe turaje, turadūze tugiye ah’Uhoraho yadusezeraniye: koko twakoze icaha." 
Numbers14:41 Mose arababaza, ati None n’iki kibatera gucumura ku cagezwe c’Uhoraho? Ereg’ ico mukora ntikija kugenda neza." 
Numbers14:42 Sigaho kudūga, kuk’ Uhoraho atari muri mwebge, ntimuhave mutsindwa n’abansi banyu." 
Numbers14:43 Kukw iyo imbere yanyu har’ Abamaleki n’Abanyakanani, kandi mwohava mwicwa n’inkota. Ko mwasubiye inyuma, mukareka gukurikira Uhoraho, ni co gituma Uhoraho ataribube kumwe namwe." 
Numbers14:44 Ariko bo bapfa guhangāra, badūga iyo misozi yo mur’ uwo mugamba; mugabo ya sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bo na Mose, ntivyava aho bāri bashagaje." 
Numbers14:45 Maz’ Abamaleki bamanukana n’Abanyakanani baba mur’ iyo misozi, barabanesha, barabirukana, babashitsa i Horuma." 
Numbers15:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers15:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli yuko, ni bamara gushika mu gihugu bagiye kubamwo, mbahaye," 
Numbers15:3 bakagomba kumpa ibimazi, jewe Uhoraho, vyo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro bakūye mu masho canke mu mikuku, ar’ ivyo kwoswa, ar’ ivyo gushitsa isezerano, ar’ ivyo batanze bavyigombeye, cank’ ar’ ivyo ku misi mikuru yanyu yashinzwe, ngo bibe umubabge ummotera neza jewe Uhoraho," 
Numbers15:4 umuntu azanye ikimazi ciwe az’ anshikanire n’ ishikanwa ry’ifu igogōretse y’ikigiracumi c’ingero yitwa efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo y’ikigirakane c’ingero yitwa hini." 
Numbers15:5 Kand’ az’ atange na vino y’ikigirakane ca hini nyene, kw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire; ivyo bize bihore bitanganwa n’umwagazi w’intama wose, iy’ uje kw ikimazi co kwoswa canke co gutangwa mu bundi buryo." 
Numbers15:6 Kandi ni yaba impfizi y’intama, muze muyitangane n’ ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ifu igogōretse vy’iyo ngero ya efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo y’ikigiragatatu c’iyo ngero ya hini;" 
Numbers15:7 kandi muze mutange na vino y’ikigiragatatu ca hini nyene, kw ishikanwa ry’ ibiturire, bibe umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers15:8 Kandi ni mwatanga ishuri kw ikimazi co kwoswa canke co gutangwa mu bundi buryo, ar’ ico gushitsa isezerano, cank’ ar’ ic’ ishimwe mpawe jewe Uhoraho," 
Numbers15:9 nyene kuyitanga az’ ayitangane n’ibigiracumi bitatu vy’ifu igogōretse vy’iyo ngero ya efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo atīmbānye iyo ngero ya hini," 
Numbers15:10 kand’ az’ atange na vino itīmbānye hini nyene, kw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire, kugira ngo bibe ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers15:11 Ukw abe ari ko bizokwama bigenda kw ishuri yose no ku mpfizi y’intama yose no kw isuguru yose y’umwagazi w’intama canke w’impene. 
Numbers15:12 Ukw ibimazi muzotanga bingana, az’ abe ari ko muzogenza kuri kimwe‐kimwe, uko bizoba bingana kwose." 
Numbers15:13 Ab’ imvukira bose az’ abe ari ko bagenza, iyo batanze ikimazi co gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, c’umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers15:14 Kand’ umunyamahanga ni yaza kuba muri mwebge, canke hakagira ūzoza kubana namwe mu bihe bir’ imbere, akagomba gutanga ikimazi co gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, c’umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho, uko muzogenza az’ abe ari kw agenza na we." 
Numbers15:15 Mw ishengero ryose haze habe ibgirizwa rimwe kuri mwebge no ku munyamahanga wese ababamwo, rize ribe ibgirizwa ry’intahava uk’ urunganwe rwanyu ruzogenda rukurikirana; uko muzoba mumeze imbere yanje, az’ abe ari k’umunyamahanga amera." 
Numbers15:16 Muze mugire icagezwe kimwe n’ibgirizwa rimwe kuri mwebge no ku munyamahanga ababamwo. 
Numbers15:17 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers15:18 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwashika mu gihugu abajanamwo," 
Numbers15:19 mukarya ku vyo kurya vyaho, uti Muze mumushikanire ishikanwa mumugereye." 
Numbers15:20 Ifu yanyu y’ umushuzo isewe iheretuwe muze muyicumbemw’ umutsima wo kuba ishikanwa mumugereye: nk’ uko muhēreza ishikanwa ry’ivyo ku mbuga, az’ abe ari ko murihēreza." 
Numbers15:21 Kw ifu yanyu y’umushuzo isewe iheretuwe, uti Muze mwame muyimushikanirako ibe iy’ agerewe, uk’ urunganwe rwanyu ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Numbers15:22 Uti Kandi ni mwacumura, ntimwitondere ivyo vyagezwe vyose yantumye," 
Numbers15:23 ari vyo yabageze vyose nabashikirije, uhereye umusi yabishingiye no hanyuma yaho uk’ urunganwe rwanyu rugenda rukurikirana;" 
Numbers15:24 uti Namb’ ico caha kizoba gikozwe mu buryo butar’ ubg’ ibigirankana, ishengero ritabizi, ishengero ryose rize ritange ishuri y’umukangara kw ikimazi co kwoswa, kibe umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho, bagitangane n’ishikanwa bigendanye ry’ifu, n’iry’ ibiturire, nk’uko vyashinzwe, batange n’isuguru y’impene kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha." 
Numbers15:25 Umuherezi az’ atangire impongano ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, na bo bazoharirwa; kuko batābikoze ibigirankana, kandi bakazoba bazanye ikimazi cabo co gutōngōrwa n’ umuriro nshikaniwe, jewe Uhoraho, bo n’ikimazi cabo co gutangirwa ivyaha aho nyene imbere yanje, batangiye ico caha cabaguyeko." 
Numbers15:26 Nukw ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli rizoharirwa, bo n’ umunyamahanga wese aba muri bo, kukw ico caha kizoba caguye ku bantu bose iyo bava bakagera." 
Numbers15:27 Kand’ umuntu ni yakora icaha ku mutumba wiwe, mu buryo butar’ ubg’ ibigirankana, az’ atange impene ivyara itarengeje umwaka kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha." 
Numbers15:28 Uwo muntu caguyeko, umuherezi az’ amutangire impongano imbere yanje, amuhongere, na we azoharirwa." 
Numbers15:29 Muze mugire icagezwe kimwe ku muntu icaha caguyeko, ar’ Umwisirayeli w’imvukira cank’ umunyamahanga ababamwo." 
Numbers15:30 Arik’ umuntu ni yagira ico akora ku kagāgazo, ar’ imvukira cank’ umunyamahanga, azoba angaye jewe Uhoraho; uwo muntu az’ acibge mw ihanga ryabo." 
Numbers15:31 Kukw azoba yakengereye ijambo ryanje, akarenga icagezwe canje, uwo muntu az’ acibge ruhebga, agībgeko n’ukugabitanya kwiwe." 
Numbers15:32 Igihe Abisirayeli bari bakiri mu bugaragwa, umuntu umwe bāmuserutseko arikw aratoragura udukwi kw isabato." 
Numbers15:33 Abasanze azitoragura bamuzanira Mose na Aroni n’ishengero ryose. 
Numbers15:34 Baramwugarana, kukw ivyo akwiye kugirirwa bitaribgashingwe." 
Numbers15:35 Uhoraho abarira Mose, at’ Uyo muntu akwiye kwicwa: ishengero ryose ni rimwicishirize amabuye inyuma y’aho mushagaje." 
Numbers15:36 Nukw ishengero ryose rimujana inyuma y’aho bashagaje, bamutēra amabuye arapfa, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers15:37 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers15:38 ati Barira Abisirayeli batēre ubuyonga ku mitwe y’impuzu zabo, baze bame bagenza bartyo uk’ urunganwe rwabo ruzogenda rukurikirana; kandi ku buyonga bgo mu mitwe yose baze batērekw akanyuzi k’isufe." 
Numbers15:39 Ubgo buyonga, uko mubukubisekw ijisho, muzokwama mwibuka ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, jewe Uhoraho, muvyitondere; kugira ngo mwoye gukurikira ivyo imitima yanyu n’amaso yanyu vyifuza, ivyo mwakunda guhurumbira bikabahindura ibimaka;" 
Numbers15:40 ariko ngo mwibuke ivyagezwe vyanje vyose muvyitondere, mumbere abēra, jewe Imana yanyu." 
Numbers15:41 Nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa ngo mbe Imana yanyu: ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Numbers16:1 Kora mwene Isihari, Isihari wa Kohati, Kohati wa Lewi, agararizanya na Datani na Abiramu bene Eliyabu, na Oni mwene Peleti, bo mu ba Reyubeni." 
Numbers16:2 Bakūrira hasi Mose, bafatanije na bamwe mu Bisirayeli b’abakuru b’ishengero amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, abār’ imbere mw ikoraniro, ba rurangiranwa." 
Numbers16:3 Bikoraniriza hamwe kurwanya Mose na Aroni, barababarira, bat’ Ivyanyu biratunaniye! Ereg’ ishengero ryose n’iryera, iyo bava bakagera, kand’ Uhoraho ari muri bo: none n’iki gituma mwishira hejuru y’ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho?" 
Numbers16:4 Mose avyumvise, arapfukama arūnama." 
Numbers16:5 Abgira Kora n’abo bīfatanije bose, at’ Ejo mu gitondo Uhoraho azokwerekana abiwe ab’ ari bo, n’uwera uw’ ari we, amwiyegereze: uwo azotoranya, ni we azokwiyegereza." 
Numbers16:6 Enda ni mugenze murtya: ni mwābīre ivyotero, wewe Kora n’abo mufatanije mwese," 
Numbers16:7 ejo muze mubishiremw’ umuriro, mugerekeko n’imibavu, aho nyene imbere y’Uhoraho: maz’ umuntu Uhoraho azotoranya ni we azoba ar’ uwera. Ivyanyu biratunaniye, namwe mwa Balewi!" 
Numbers16:8 Maze Mose abarira Kora, at’ Enda ni mwumve, yemwe Balewi:" 
Numbers16:9 mbega mwabigize ivyoroshe kw Imana y’Abisirayeli yabarobanuye mw ishengero ry’Abisirayeli bandi, kugira ngw ibiyegereze, ngo mukore igikorwa co mw ihema ryayo, ari we Uhoraho, ngo muhagarare imbere y’ishengero guhēreza ivyaryo?" 
Numbers16:10 Ko yabiyegereje, mwe n’ab’i wanyu bose b’Abalewi, none mutayeko murondera n’ubuherezi na bgo?" 
Numbers16:11 Ereg’ Uhoraho ni we mugararije, mwe n’abo mufatanije bose: na we Aroni n’iki, aho mumwidodombera?" 
Numbers16:12 Maze Mose ahamagaza Datani na Abiramu, bene Eliyabu; na bo baravuga, bat’ Eka ntitumwitaba na mba;" 
Numbers16:13 mbega yabigize ivyoroshe kudukūra mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, ngw adutsinde mu bugaragwa, kand’ akagerekakw akīgira umutware wacu?" 
Numbers16:14 Kandi ntiyatujanye mur’ ico gihugu kindi gitemba amata n’ubūki nyene, canke ngw aduhe amashamvu y’amatongo n’ inzabibu. Mbeg’ agomba kunogora aba bantu amaso? Eka ntitumwitaba na mba!" 
Numbers16:15 Mose araraka cane, asaba Uhoraho, ati Ntiwemere amashikanwa yabo; urazi kw ata we nanyaze indogoba n’imwe, canke ngo hagire n’umwe nagiriye nabi." 
Numbers16:16 Maze Mose abarira Kora, ati Mwe n’abo ku ruhande rwawe bose, ejo muze muze imbere y’Uhoraho: wewe ubgawe, n’abo nyene, muzanane na Aroni;" 
Numbers16:17 kand’ umuntu wese muri mwebge aze yābīre icotero ciwe, mubishirekw imibavu, mubizane imbere y’Uhoraho, umuntu wese icotero ciwe, ukw ar’ amajana abiri na mirongwitanu; nawe nyene mwe na Aroni muzane ivyotero vyanyu." 
Numbers16:18 Nuk’ umuntu wese muri bo yābīra icotero ciwe, agishiramw’ umuriro, agerekakw imibavu, bahagararana na Mose na Aroni ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers16:19 Kora akoraniriza ishengero ryose ku muryango w’iryo hema kubarwanya. Maz’ ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho bubonekera iryo shengero ryose. 
Numbers16:20 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers16:21 ati Ni mwitandukanye n’iri shengero, ndarirandure mu kanya isase." 
Numbers16:22 Baca barapfukama barūnama, bati Mana, yewe Mana y’impwemu z’abari n’umubiri bose, umuntu umwe akoze icaha, mbega woca urakira ishengero ryose?" 
Numbers16:23 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers16:24 ati Barira ishengero, uti Ni mwīgireyo, muve ku mpande zose z’amahema ya Kora na Datani na Abiramu." 
Numbers16:25 Nuko Mose ava hasi, aja aho Datani na Abiramu bari; abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli baramukurikira." 
Numbers16:26 Abarira ishengero, ati Ni mwīgireyo, muve ku mpande zose z’amahema y’izi nkozi z’ibibi, ntimugire ikintu cabo na kimwe mukorako, kugira ngo ntimuranduranwe na bo mu guhanirwa ivyaha vyabo vyose." 
Numbers16:27 Nuko bīgirayo, bava ku mpande zose z’amahema ya Kora na Datani na Abiramu; Datani na Abiramu barasohoka, bahagararana mu miryango y’amahema yabo n’abagore babo n’abahungu babo n’abana babo bato‐bato." 
Numbers16:28 Mose aravuga, at’ Iki ni co kigira ngo kibamenyeshe yuk’ Uhoraho ari we yantumye gukora ibi bikorwa nkora vyose, kandi kw atari jewe nitumye." 
Numbers16:29 Aba bantu ni bapfa urupfu rupfa abandi bantu bose, bakāzwako n’ibiza ku bandi bose, Uhoraho azoba atāntumye." 
Numbers16:30 Arik’ Uhoraho ni yakora ikintu c’inzeduka, isi ikāsama, ikabamirana n’ivyabo vyose, bakamanuka i kuzimu bakibona, muca mumenya yukw aba bantu bakengereye Uhoraho." 
Numbers16:31 Agiheza kuvuga ayo majambo yose, aho nyene bahagaze isi irasaduka," 
Numbers16:32 irāsama, ibamirana n’ingo zabo, n’abantu bose ba Kora, n’ibintu vyabo vyose." 
Numbers16:33 Nuko bo n’ivyabo vyose bamanuka i kuzimu, isi ibarengako, bararanduka, bazimangana mur’ iryo shengero." 
Numbers16:34 Abisirayeli bose bāri babakīkije barahunga bumvise ugutaka kwabo, bat’ Isi yoye kutumira natwe." 
Numbers16:35 Umuriro uva k’Uhoraho, uyigiza ba bagabo amajana abiri na mirongwitanu bosheje imibavu." 
Numbers16:36 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers16:37 ati Barira Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi, yōkōre ivyotero vyabo mur’ uwo muriro, nawe usēse umuriro wo muri vyo hirya; kukw ivyo vyotero ar’ ivyera, vyacitse inyegu." 
Numbers16:38 Maz’ ivyo vyotero vy’ abo banyavyaha nyene bīhamagariye kugesera, babicuremw’ ibintu bibāse vyo kwomeka ku gicaniro, kuko bāvyīgije hafi imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, bigatuma biba ivyera, bigacika inyegu: kandi bizobera Abisirayeli ikimenyetso." 
Numbers16:39 Nuko Eleyazari umuherezi yābīra ivyo vyotero vy’imiringa, ivyo abāyigiye bari bīgije hafi; babibādikamw’ ivyo kwomeka ku gicaniro," 
Numbers16:40 ngo bibere Abisirayeli icibutso, kugira ngo ntihagire umuntu atar’ uwo mu ruvyaro rwa Aroni yīgira hafi kwosereza imibavu imbere y’Uhoraho; kugira ngo ntabe nka Kora n’abafatanije na we. Nuko Eleyazari abikora nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose." 
Numbers16:41 Bukeye bgaho, ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli ryidodombera Mose na Aroni, riti Ni mwebge mwishe abantu b’Uhoraho." 
Numbers16:42 Maz’ iryo shengero rikoraniye kurwanya Mose na Aroni, bagize ngo bararāba ihema ry’ibonaniro, babona ca gicu kiritwikiriye, ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buraboneka." 
Numbers16:43 Mose na Aroni baja imbere y’iryo hema. 
Numbers16:44 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers16:45 ati Ni mwīgireyo, muve mur’ iri shengero, ndarirandure mu kanya isase. Baca barapfukama, barūnama." 
Numbers16:46 Mose abarira Aroni, at’ Abīra icotero cawe, ugishiremw’ umuriro uwukūye ku gicaniro, ugerekekw imibavu, ukijane n’ingoga mw ishengero, ubahongere: kuko haje uburake buvuye k’Uhoraho, ikīza kikaba gitanguye gutēra." 
Numbers16:47 Nuko Aroni aracābīra, nk’uko Mose amubariye, arirukanga, aja mw ikoraniro hagati, asanga ikīza kimaze gutangura gutēra mu bantu: ashirakw iyo mibavu, ahongera abantu." 
Numbers16:48 Ahagarara hagati y’imivyimba n’abagikomeye, ikīza kirashira." 
Numbers16:49 Abishwe n’ ikīza bār’ abantu ibihumbi cumi na bine n’amajana ndwi, udashizemw’ abicishijwe n’ivya Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Aroni araheza asubira aho Mose ari ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro; nukw ikīza kirashira. 
Numbers17:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers17:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli baguhe inkoni, umuryango wa ba sekuruza wose utange imwe‐imwe, zitangwe n’abakuru bose b’imiryango ya ba sekuruza, izo nkoni zose na zose zibe cumi na zibiri: uheze wandike izina ry’umuntu wese ku nkoni yiwe." 
Numbers17:3 Kandi ku nkoni y’Abalewi wandikekw izina rya Aroni: kuko hazoba inkoni imwe‐imwe y’umukuru wese w’ umuryango wa ba sekuruza. 
Numbers17:4 Uheze uzirambike mw ihema ry’ibonaniro imbere y’Ibishinga intahe, aho nama mbonanira namwe." 
Numbers17:5 Maz’ umuntu nzotoranya, inkoni yiwe izonaga: uko ni ko nzoherengeteza imyidodombo Abisirayeli babidodombera, ndayīkūre mu matwi." 
Numbers17:6 Nuko Mose abibarira Abisirayeli, maz’ abakuru babo bamuha izo nkoni, umukuru wese atanga imwe‐imwe, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza angana, inkoni zose na zose ziba cumi na zibiri, zirimw’ inkoni ya Aroni." 
Numbers17:7 Mose arambika izo nkoni imbere y’Uhoraho mw ihema ry’Ibishinga intahe. 
Numbers17:8 Bukeye bgaho Mose yinjira mur’ iryo hema ry’Ibishinga intahe; agize ngw ararāba, asanga inkoni ya Aroni yatangiwe inzu ya Lewi yanaze, ipfunditse amapfundo, isambuye amashurwe, yamyeko shakedi zihishiye." 
Numbers17:9 Maze Mose asohora izo nkoni zose zar’ imbere y’Uhoraho, azijana ah’ Abisirayeli bose bari: barazītegereza, umuntu wese yābīra inkoni yiwe." 
Numbers17:10 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Subiza inkoni ya Aroni imbere ya vya Bishinga intahe, kugira ngw ibīkirwe kubera ba bagarariji ikimenyetso: ubone guherengeteza imyidodombo yabo banyidodombera, boye gupfa." 
Numbers17:11 Mose agenza kuno: uk’ Uhoraho yamugeze, aba ari kw akora." 
Numbers17:12 Abisirayeli babarira Mose, bat’ Ehe turashize, turapfuye, eka mbere turapfuye twese." 
Numbers17:13 Ūgize ngw arīgira hafi, ngo yēgēre ihema ry’Uhoraho, aca apfa: mbega twese tugiye gupfa, dushire?" 
Numbers18:1 Uhoraho abarira Aroni, ati Mwe n’abana bawe, bo n’inzu ya ba sogokuruza, ni mwebge muzobazwa ibigabitanijwe mu vy’Ahēra; mwe n’abana bawe muzobazwa n’ibigabitanijwe mu vy’ubuherezi bganyu." 
Numbers18:2 Kandi bene wanyu, ab’ umuryango wa Lewi, umuryango wa sogokuruza, ubazane, mwīgirane hafi, bafatanye nawe, bagutumikire, iyo mur’ imbere y’ihema ry’Ibishinga intahe, wewe hamwe n’abana bawe." 
Numbers18:3 Baze bitondere ivy’ ubajēje wewe, n’ivyo bajējwe vyose vyo mw ihema. Mugabo ntibaze bēgēre ibintu vy’Ahēra cank’ igicaniro, boye gupfa, canke namwe mugapfa." 
Numbers18:4 Bazofatanya nawe, bitondere ivyo bajējwe vyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, ku vyo bazokora vyose vyo mw ihema: ntihaze hagire uwundi wese atar’ uwo muri bo abēgēra ngw avyitemwo." 
Numbers18:5 Namwe muze mwitondere ivyo mujējwe vy’Ahēra n’ivy’ igicaniro, kugira ngo ntihaze hasubire kuza uburake ku Bisirayeli." 
Numbers18:6 Rāba jewe nasobanuye Abalewi bene wanyu mu Bisirayeli bandi: nabahawekw ingabire, jewe Uhoraho, namwe murabagabirwa, ngo bakore igikorwa co mw ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers18:7 Kandi nawe hamwe n’abana bawe muze mwitondere ivy’ubuherezi bganyu ku vy’igicaniro vyose no ku bir’ imbere ya ca gihuzu gikingīra Ahēra cane; ivyo abe ari vyo muzokora; mbahaye igikorwa c’ubuherezi bga ngabire: arik’ uwundi wese atar’ uwo muri mwebge yovyēgēra akavyitamwo, aze yicwe." 
Numbers18:8 Uhoraho abarira Aroni, ati Rāba ndakujēje amashikanwa ngerewe; ivyo Abisirayeli bazorobanura vyose ni wewe mbihaye, mwe n’abana bawe, kuko mwarobanujwe amavuta, ngo bibe umuturi wanyu w’ibihe vyose." 
Numbers18:9 Ibi ni vyo bizoba ivyawe vyo mu vyera cane bitar’ ivyo kwosa ku muriro: ishikanwa ryabo ryose bazonshikanira, ar’iry’ amafu, ar’ ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha, ar’ impongano, bizoba ar’ ivyera cane, bibe ivyawe n’abana bawe." 
Numbers18:10 Uz’ ubirīre ahantu hēra cane; izinamuhungu wese wo mu bawe yemererwa kubiryako: bize bikubere ivyera. 
Numbers18:11 Ibi na vyo nyene n’ivyawe mu mashikanwa yose ngerewe bazonshikanira: ivyo Abisirayeli bazoshikana vyose bizunguzwa, ndabiguhaye, mwe n’abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe, bibe umuturi wanyu w’intahava: ūdahumanye wese wo mu b’inzu yawe yemererwa kubiryako." 
Numbers18:12 Ku vy’ umushuzo vyose bazonzanira, jewe Uhoraho, ibirusha ibindi kuba vyiza, ari ku mavuta ya elayo, ari ku nzabibu, ari ku mpeke, ni wewe mbihaye." 
Numbers18:13 Ivy’ amasega vyose bizokwera mu gihugu cabo bazonzanira, jewe Uhoraho, bizoba ivyawe: ūdahumanye wese wo mu b’inzu yawe yemererwa kubiryako." 
Numbers18:14 Ikintu cose mpawekw inyegu mu Bisirayeli kizoba icawe. 
Numbers18:15 Ic’ ubuzibūra cose mu bifise umubiri mpabga jewe Uhoraho, ari mu bantu, ari mu bitunzwe, bizoba ivyawe: mugabo, imfura zo mu bantu ntuz’ ubure kwāka incungu zo kuzicungura, bo n’uburiza bg’ibitunzwe na bgo n’ uko, ubgākire incungu." 
Numbers18:16 Kandi ku vy’incungu zo kubacungura, uze wāke incungu uzocira uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe bavutse, iz’ ibe shekeli zitanu zagezwe ku y’Ahēra; kandi shekeli ni co kimwe na gera mirongwibiri." 
Numbers18:17 Arik’ uburiza bg’ inka canke bg’intama canke bg’ impene, ntuze wāke incungu zabgo: izo zizoba izera; uz’ umije amaraso yazo ku gicaniro, wose ibinure vyazo kuba ishikanwa ritōngōrwa n’umuriro, bimbere umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers18:18 Inyama zazo zize zibe umwanya wawe, nk’ukw inkoro yo kuzunguzwa bo n’igikenye c’ukuguru kw’i buryo ar’ umwanya wawe." 
Numbers18:19 Amashikanwa yose ngerewe yo mu vyera, ayo Abisirayeli bazonshikanira jewe Uhoraho, ndayaguhaye, mwe n’abahungu bawe n’ abakobga bawe, abe umuturi wanyu w’intahava. Iryo n’isezerano ritazohinduka imbere yanje kugeza ibihe bidashira, usezeraniwe, mwe n’uruvyaro rwawe." 
Numbers18:20 Kand’ Uhoraho abarira Aroni, ati Ntuz’ ugire ishamvu mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli, canke ng’ugire umugabane muri bo: ni jewe mugabane wawe n’ishamvu yawe mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers18:21 Abalewi ehe mbahaye ibigiracumi vyose Abisirayeli batanga, kuba ari vyo biba ishamvu yabo, ndabibahaye kw impembo y’ibikorwa bakora vyo mw ihema ry’ ibonaniro." 
Numbers18:22 Kandi guhēra ubu, Abisirayeli ntibaze basubire kwēgēra iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngo ntibīshirekw icaha kikabazanira gupfa." 
Numbers18:23 Arikw Abalewi az’ abe ari bo bakora ibikorwa vyo mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, kandi ni bo bazobazwa ivyo bagabitanije muri vyo. Ivyo bize bibabere icagezwe c’intahava, uk’ urunganwe rwanyu ruzogenda rukurikirana, yukw Abalewi batazohabga ishamvu mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers18:24 Kukw ibigiracumi Abisirayeli bazotanga kw amashikanwa bangereye, jewe Uhoraho, mbihaye Abalewi kuba ari vyo biba ishamvu yabo: ni co gitumye mbabarira yukw ata shamvu bazogira mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers18:25 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers18:26 ati Kandi barira Abalewi, uti Ni mwāka Abisirayeli vya bigiracumi mbahaye kuba ari vyo biba ishamvu yanyu bivuye kuri bo, uti Nuko namwe muze mutange kuri vyo ishikanwa mumugereye, ribe ikigiracumi c’ivyo bigiracumi nyene." 
Numbers18:27 Ut’ Iryo shikanwa mumugereye rizobaharūrwako nk’ aho muritanze ku mihūre yo ku mbuga, canke ku mitobe ya vino yuzuye amato." 
Numbers18:28 Ut’ Ukw az’ abe ari ko namwe mumushikanira ishikanwa mumugereye ryo kuri vya bigiracumi vyose mwāka Abisirayeli, uti Kand’ iryo shikanwa mumugereye muze murihe Aroni umuherezi." 
Numbers18:29 Uti Ku vyo muhabga vyose, muze mukūrekw ivyo mumushikanira mwamugereye; uti Ku birusha ibindi kuba vyiza, az’ abe ari ho mumukūrira umugabane wiwe wera." 
Numbers18:30 Kand’ ubabarire, uti Ni mwaheza gukūramw’ ibirusha ibindi kuba vyiza mwamugereye, ibisigaye mwebge Abalewi muzobiharūrwako nk’ah’ ar’ ivyo mwirimiye, nk’imihūre yo ku mbuga, canke nk’imitobe iri mu mato." 
Numbers18:31 Muzobirīra aho mugomba hose, mwe n’abo mu ngo zanyu; kukw ar’ impembo zanyu muhemberwa ibikorwa mukorera mw ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers18:32 Uti Ni mwaheza gukūramw’ ibirusha ibindi kuba vyiza mwamugereye, nta caha kizobabako ku bisigaye: ut’ Ariko ntimuze mukengereze ivyera Abisirayeli batanga, kugira ngo ntimupfe." 
Numbers19:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni," 
Numbers19:2 at’ Ibi ni vyo bibgirijwe n’icagezwe jewe Uhoraho nshinze: Barira Abisirayeli bakuzanire inka y’iriza y’akagajo itagira ibara cank’ agasembga, itigeze gukoreshwa igikorwa na kimwe." 
Numbers19:3 Muyihe Eleyazari umuherezi, ijanwe inyuma y’aho mushagaje, ikerererwe imbere yiwe." 
Numbers19:4 Maze Eleyazari umuherezi akoze urutoke mu maraso yayo, ahagarare ahatumberanye n’umuryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, ayacucagire ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Numbers19:5 Iyo nka iheze ituririrwe aho nyene imbere yiwe; iturirwe yose, uhereye ku rusato rwayo n’inyama zayo n’ubuseri bgayo n’amayezi yayo." 
Numbers19:6 Maz’ umuherezi yābīre ingegene y’igiti c’isederi, n’utubabi twa ezobu, n’utunyuzi dusa n’agahama, abiterere hagati mu muriro ah’ iyo nka ituririwe." 
Numbers19:7 Uwo muherezi aheze amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, abone gusubira aho mushagaje, akomeze abe ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Numbers19:8 Uwayituriye na we nyene amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Numbers19:9 Umuntu adahumanye ayore umunyota w’iyo nka, awubīke inyuma y’aho mushagaje, ahantu hadahumanye, ubīkirwe ishengero ry’Abisirayeli, ngo baze bawutobe mu mazi, abe ayo guhumanura: ivyo bizoba ivyo gukūra ivyaha." 
Numbers19:10 Ūyoye umunyota wayo amesure impuzu ziwe, akomeze kuba ūhumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba. Ivyo bize bibere Abisirayeli n’ umunyamahanga aba muri bo, ibgirizwa ry’intahava." 
Numbers19:11 Ūzokora ku kiziga c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese azoba ahumanye kumara imisi ndwi: 
Numbers19:12 aze yihumanuze ayo mazi ku musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi, abone guhumanuka; ariko n’atihumanura kur’ uwo musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi, ntazoba ahumanutse." 
Numbers19:13 Ūzokora ku kiziga c’umuntu uw’ ari we wese, ntiyihumanuze, azoba ahumanije ihema ryanje, jewe Uhoraho; uwo muntu az’ acibge mu Bisirayeli. Kw azoba atāmījwekw ayo mazi ahumanura, azoba agihumanye: azoba akirik’ ubuhumane bgiwe." 
Numbers19:14 Iki ni co cagezwe co ku muntu aguye i we mw ihema: umuntu wese azokwinjira mur’ iryo hema, n’ūzoba yari muri ryo wese, bazoba bahumanye kumara imisi ndwi." 
Numbers19:15 Kand’ ikintu cose gisanzwe kirāngāye, kitarumijek’ umutemere, kizoba gihumanye." 
Numbers19:16 Kand’ umuntu azoba ari ku gahinga, agakora ku kiziga c’ umuntu yishwe n’inkota, canke ku kindi kiziga cose, canke kw igufa ry’umuntu, canke ku mva, azoba ahumanye kumara imisi ndwi." 
Numbers19:17 Ūhumanye bamukamatire kuri wa munyota wa ca kimazi co gukūra ivyaha caturiwe, bawutobe mu mazi yavomwe mu mbizi, babikoreye mu rwavya." 
Numbers19:18 Umuntu adahumanye aheze yābīre utubabi twa ezobu, atujobeke mur’ ayo mazi, ayacucagire kuri rya hema, no ku mbombovu zose, no ku bantu bāri muri ryo, no ku wakoze kw igufa canke ku wishwe canke ku kiziga kindi canke ku mva." 
Numbers19:19 Kand’ uwo muntu adahumanye az’ acucagire k’ūhumanye ku musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi: nuko ku musi ugira indwi amuhumanure; na we aheze amesure impuzu ziwe, yiyuhagire, maze ku mugoroba azoba ahumanutse." 
Numbers19:20 Arik’ umuntu azoba ahumanye, ntiyihumanuze, uwo muntu az’ acibge mw ishengero, kukw azoba ahumanije Ahēra hanje, jewe Uhoraho; ayo mazi ahumanura kw azoba atayamijweko, azoba agihumanye." 
Numbers19:21 Iryo rize ribabere ibgirizwa ry’ intahava. Kand’ ūzoba acucagiye ayo mazi ahumanura az’ amesure impuzu ziwe; ūzoyakorako azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba. 
Numbers19:22 Kand’ ikintu cose ūhumanye azokorako na co kizoba gihumanye: ūzogikorako azoba ahumanye gushitsa ku mugoroba. 
Numbers20:1 Ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli rishika mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini mu kwezi kwa mbere: abo bantu bamara igihe i Kadeshi. Miriyamu agwaho, bamuhamba aho nyene." 
Numbers20:2 Iryo shengero ribura amazi: bakoranira kurwanya Mose na Aroni. 
Numbers20:3 Abo bantu batonganya Mose, baramubarira, bat’ Es’ iyo dupfa ca gihe bene wacu bapfira imbere y’Uhoraho!" 
Numbers20:4 Kandi mwazaniye iki ishengero ry’ Uhoraho mur’ ubu bugaragwa, ngo tubugwemwo, twe n’ivyo dushoreye?" 
Numbers20:5 Mwadukūriye iki muri Egiputa, mukatuzana aha hantu habi? S’ahantu harimwa, s’ahantu hamera imisukoni cank’ imizabibu cank’ amakomamanga; kandi ntihagira n’amazi yo kunywa." 
Numbers20:6 Mose na Aroni bava imbere y’iryo koraniro, baja ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro, barapfukama barūnama; maz’ ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho burababonekera." 
Numbers20:7 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers20:8 at’ Abīra ya nkoni, muheze mukoranye iryo shengero, mwe na Aroni mukurwawe, mubaririre igitandara imbere yabo gisendanishe amazi yaco; ubakūrire amazi mur’ ico gitandara, uhe iryo shengero n’ ivyo bashoreye amazi yo kunywa." 
Numbers20:9 Nuko Mose yābīra iyo nkoni, ayikūye imbere y’Uhoraho, uko yamubariye." 
Numbers20:10 Mose na Aroni bakoraniriza iryo koraniro imbere y’ico gitandara, maze Mose arababarira, ati Ni mwumve, mwa bagarariji mwe! Mbega twebge twobakūrira amazi mur’ iki gitandara?" 
Numbers20:11 Mose araheza amanika ukuboko, akubita ico gitandara inkoni yiwe kabiri: amazi menshi aca arasendanisha, iryo shengero riranywa, bo n’ivyo bashoreye." 
Numbers20:12 Uhoraho abarira Mose na Aroni, ati Ko mutanyizeye, ngo mwerekane ukwera kwanje imbere y’Abisirayeli, ntimugishikanye iri koraniro mu gihugu nemeye ko nzobaha." 
Numbers20:13 Ayo ni yo mazi y’i Meriba, kukw Abisirayeli batonganije Uhoraho, akerekanira ukwera kwiwe muri bo." 
Numbers20:14 Bar’ i Kadeshi, Mose atuma intumwa ku mwami wa Edomu, ngo zimubgire, zit’ Isirayeli murumunawe ng’ Urazi amagorwa babonye yose," 
Numbers20:15 ingene ba sekuruza bamanutse muri Egiputa, bakahamara igihe kirekire, Abanyegiputa bakabagirira nabi, bose uhereye no kuri ba sekuruza." 
Numbers20:16 Maze batakambiye Uhoraho, yumva ijwi ryabo, atuma umumarayika, abakūra muri Egiputa. Ngo Non’ ehe rāba, bar’ i Kadeshi, igisagara co ku rubibe rwawe." 
Numbers20:17 Ngo N’ubemerere bace mu gihugu cawe; ngo Ntibazogira umurima cank’ uruzabibu bacamwo, canke ngo banywe ku mazi yo mu mariba; ngo Bazogumya inzira y’iroro, ngo Ntibazokevya ngo baje i buryo cank’ i bumoso, gushitsa aho bazorangiriza igihugu cawe." 
Numbers20:18 Umwami wa Edomu arishura, at’ Eka ntimuzoca mu gihugu canje, nobategesha inkota." 
Numbers20:19 Abisirayeli barishura, bati Tuzoca mu nzira y’iroro gusa, kandi twebge n’ivyo dushoreye ni twanywa amazi yo mu gihugu cawe, tuzotanga ic’ uzocira: reka twihitire gusa, nta kindi tuzokora." 
Numbers20:20 Arabahakanira, at’ Eka ntimuzohaca. Umwami wa Edomu abategesha ingabo nyinshi, ziri n’ubuhizi bginshi." 
Numbers20:21 Uko ni k’umwami wa Edomu yanse kw Abisirayeli baca mu gihugu ciwe; ni co catumye Abisirayeli bahindukira bakahareka. 
Numbers20:22 Bava i Kadeshi, baragenda; ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli rishika ku musozi Hori." 
Numbers20:23 Uhoraho abaririra Mose na Aroni ku musozi Hori, ku rubibe rw’igihugu ca Edomu," 
Numbers20:24 ati Aroni agiye gutāmbūra, ahamvye ababo; ntakigiye mu gihugu nemeye guha Abisirayeli, kuko mwanse kwumvira ijambo ryanje, muri ku mazi y’i Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Jana Aroni na Eleyazari umwana wiwe, ubadūgane umusozi Hori:" 
Numbers20:26 uheze wambure Aroni imyambaro yiwe, uyambike Eleyazari umwana wiwe; aho ni ho Aroni aja gupfira, ahamvye ababo." 
Numbers20:27 Nuko Mose abigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye: badūga uwo musozi Hori, ishengero ryose rirorēra." 
Numbers20:28 Mose yambura Aroni imyambaro yiwe, ayambika Eleyazari umwana wiwe; maze Aroni apfira ngaho, ku mpinga y’uwo musozi. Mose na Eleyazari baramanuka." 
Numbers20:29 Ishengero ryose ribonye ko Aroni apfuye, iyo nzu yose ya Isirayeli bamara imisi mirongwitatu bamuririra." 
Numbers21:1 Umwami w’i Aradi w’Umunyakanani, wo mu gihugu c’i Negebu, yumva kw Abisirayeli baje bazananye inzira itumbereye Atarimu, arabarwanya, afata mpiri bamwe muri bo." 
Numbers21:2 Abisirayeli basezeranira Uhoraho isezerano, bati Ni wagabura aba bantu mu maboko yacu, tuzokomvomvora ibisagara vyabo." 
Numbers21:3 Uhoraho yumvira Abisirayeli, agabura abo Banyakanani mu maboko yabo; babakomvomvorana n’ibisagara vyabo: aho hantu haca hitwa Horuma." 
Numbers21:4 Bavuduka ku musozi Hori, bajana inzira ija ku Kiyaga Gitukura kugira ngo bagendane urubibe rw’igihugu ca Edomu; abantu bīhebūzwa cane n’urwo rugendo," 
Numbers21:5 batonganya Imana na Mose, bati Mwadukūriye iki muri Egiputa, mukatuzana gupfira mur’ ubu bugaragwa? kw ata vyo kurya tuharonka, ata n’amazi ariho, kandi tubihiwe n’ibi vyo kurya bitagira ikimazi." 
Numbers21:6 Maz’ Uhoraho atērēra abantu inzoka z’ubumara buturira, zirabakomora; abantu benshi bo mu Bisirayeli barapfa." 
Numbers21:7 Abantu baza kuri Mose, bati Twakoze icaha, kuko twatonganije Uhoraho nawe; udusabire k’Uhoraho, adukūremw’ izi nzoka. Nuko Mose arabasabira." 
Numbers21:8 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Cura inzoka isa n’izo, uyimanike ku giti c’intumba, maz’ uwakomowe wese ni yayirāba, arakira." 
Numbers21:9 Nuko Mose acura inzoka mu miringa, ayimanika ku giti c’ intumba, maz’ uwo inzoka yariye wese, yarāba iyo nzoka y’umuringa, agakira." 
Numbers21:10 Abisirayeli barahaguruka, basagaza ahitwa Oboti." 
Numbers21:11 Bavuduka Oboti, basagaza ahitwa Iye‐abarimu, mu bugaragwa burābana n’i Mowabu ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba." 
Numbers21:12 Bavudukayo, basagaza ku mwonga witwa Zeredi." 
Numbers21:13 Bavudukayo, basagaza hakurya ya Arunoni rwo mu bugaragwa, ruturuka mu gihugu c’ Abamori: kuko Arunoni ari rwo rugabano rw’i Mowabu, rugabanya Mowabu n’Abamori." 
Numbers21:14 Ni co gituma vyaravuzwe mu gitabo c’Intambara z’Uhoraho, ngo Vahebu h’i Sufa, Bo n’imyonga yo kuri Arunoni," 
Numbers21:15 N’agahanamo ko ku myonga Kamanuka kerekeye ah’i Ari hatabamye, Kakegamira urugabano rw’i Mowabu." 
Numbers21:16 Bavudukayo bashika i Beri; aho ni ha handi Beri Uhoraho yabaririra Mose, ati Koranya abantu, ndabahe amazi;" 
Numbers21:17 Abisirayeli bagaca baririmba iyi ndirimbo, bati Dudubiza, wa Riba! Ni murivugirize impundu!" 
Numbers21:18 Iri ni ryo riba ryimbge n’abaganza, Abakomeye baganza abantu bimbishije icumu ry’ubugabe, N’inkoni zabo. Bahaguruka mur’ ubgo bugaragwa, bashika i Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 bavuduka i Matana, bashika i Nahaliyeli; bavuduka i Nahaliyeli bashika i Bamoti;" 
Numbers21:20 bavuduka i Bamoti bashika ku mwonga uri mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, hafi y’agatwe ka Pisiga gahanamiye ubugaragwa." 
Numbers21:21 Abisirayeli batuma intumwa kuri Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, ngo zimubgire," 
Numbers21:22 ziti Bareke bace mu gihugu cawe; ngo Ntibazokevya ngo bagire umurima cank’ uruzabibu bakandagiramwo, canke ngo banywe ku mazi yo mu mariba; ngo Bazogumya inzira y’iroro gushitsa aho bazorangiriza igihugu cawe." 
Numbers21:23 Ariko Sihoni ntiyakundira Abisirayeli ko baca mu gihugu ciwe; akoranya ingabo ziwe zose, aja kubategera mu bugaragwa. Ashitse i Yahasi, arumana na bo." 
Numbers21:24 Abisirayeli bamutsindisha inkota, baca begukira igihugu ciwe, uhereye ku ruzi Arunoni ugashitsa ku ruzi Yaboki, bakagarukira ku gihugu c’Abamoni: kuko Yazeri hāri ku rugabano rw’Abamoni." 
Numbers21:25 Abisirayeli banesha ivyo bisagara vyose, baba mu bisagara vyose vy’Abamori, i Heshiboni no mu bisagara vyose bihereranye na ho." 
Numbers21:26 Kukw i Heshiboni war’ umurwa wa Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, yari yararwanije umwami w’i Mowabu wo ku ngoma yahise, akamunyaga igihugu ciwe cose gushitsa kuri Arunoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ni co gituma abatika ibitiko bavuga, bati Ni muze i Heshiboni, muhubake, Umurwa wa Sihoni n’ukomezwe:" 
Numbers21:28 Kuk’ umuriro waturutse i Heshiboni, Urubeya rukaba rwavuye ku murwa wa Sihoni, Rugatōngōra Ari h’i Mowabu, Gushitsa no ku baba ku mpinga z’imisozi yo kuri Arunoni." 
Numbers21:29 Ewe Mowabu, ubonye ibara! Murageseye, mwa bantu ba Kemoshi! Yagabuye abahungu biwe baba impunzi, N’abakobga biwe baba inyagano Ya Sihoni umwami w’Abamori." 
Numbers21:30 Twarabarashe: i Heshiboni baratikira gushitsa n’i Diboni, Twaragesheje dushitsa n’i Nofaki, Hafi y’i Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli babaye mu gihugu c’Abamori. 
Numbers21:32 Maze Mose atuma gutata i Yazeri, banesha ibisagara vyaho, birukana Abamori bābayo." 
Numbers21:33 Barahindukira, baradūga, bajana inzira ija i Bashani: Ogi umwami w’i Bashani abategesha ingabo ziwe zose; intambara irumanira ahitwa Edireyi." 
Numbers21:34 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Ntumutinye, kuko ndamugabuye mu maboko yawe, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose n’igihugu ciwe; nawe uz’ umugirire nk’uko wagiriye Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, yaba i Heshiboni." 
Numbers21:35 Nuko bamukekana n’ abahungu biwe n’abantu biwe bose, ntihasigara n’uwa kirazira: baraheza begukira igihugu ciwe." 
Numbers22:1 Abisirayeli barahaguruka, basagaza mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu, hakuno ya Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balaki mwene Sipori abona ivyo Abisirayeli bāgiriye Abamori vyose. 
Numbers22:3 Abanyamowabu bacibga ivutu n’iryo hanga, kubg’ ubginshi bgabo; barandurwa imitima n’ Abisirayeli." 
Numbers22:4 Abanyamowabu babarira abakuru b’i Midiyani, bat’ Erega ririya sinzi ry’abantu rigiye gukombotoza ibiri hirya no hino yacu vyose, nk’ukw inka zikombotoza ubgatsi bgo ku musozi. Kand’ uyo Balaki mwene Sipori ni we yari ku ngoma i Mowabu mur’ ico gihe." 
Numbers22:5 Atuma intumwa kuri Balamu mwene Beyori, i Petori hafi y’uruzi Efurate, mu gihugu c’i wabo, ngo zimuhamagare, zimubgire, ziti Ngo Haje abantu bavuye muri Egiputa, bajimagije igihugu cose, ngo None bahanganye na we." 
Numbers22:6 None ngw Arakwinginze, n’uze umuvumire abo bantu; ngo Kuko bahambaye, atobīhanga. Ngo Kumbure yobanesha, akabatsinda, akabirukana mu gihugu: ngo Kukw azi yuk’ uwo uhezagiye aba ahezagiwe, kand’ uwo uvumye aba avumwe." 
Numbers22:7 Abakuru b’i Mowabu n’ab’i Midiyani bakora ingemu baragenda, baja kwa Balamu, bamubarira amajambo ya Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Arababarira, ati Ni murāre hano iri joro, nanje nzobishura ijambo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho aribumbarire. Nukw abo bamenyekana b’i Mowabu barāra kwa Balamu." 
Numbers22:9 Imana iza kuri Balamu, iramubaza, it’ Abo bantu muri kumwe n’aba hehe?" 
Numbers22:10 Balamu yishura Imana, ati Balaki mwene Sipori, umwami w’i Mowabu, yantumyeko," 
Numbers22:11 ngo Har’ abantu bavuye muri Egiputa, bajimagije igihugu; ngo None ni ngende ndabamuvumire; ngo Kumbure yoshobora kubarwanya, akabirukana." 
Numbers22:12 Imana yishura Balamu, iti Ntuz’ ujane na bo, kandi ntuz’ uvume abo bantu, kukw ar’ abāhezagiwe." 
Numbers22:13 Bukeye Balamu aravyuka, abarira abo bamenyekana ba Balaki, ati Ni mwīgīre, mwisubirire i wanyu, kuk’ Uhoraho yanse kunyemerera ko tujana." 
Numbers22:14 Abo bamenyekana b’i Mowabu barahaguruka, basubira kwa Balaki, bati Balamu yanse ko tuzanana." 
Numbers22:15 Balaki yongera gutuma abandi bamenyekana, barusha abo ubginshi, babarusha n’icubahiro." 
Numbers22:16 Baja kwa Balamu, baramubgira, bati Balaki mwene Sipori ngo Ntihagire ikintu kikubuza kuza kumwitaba;" 
Numbers22:17 ngo Kukw azoguha icubahiro cinshi, kandi ngw Ico uzogomba cose ni co azogukorera: none ngo N’uze, arakwinginze, umuvumire abo bantu." 
Numbers22:18 Balamu yishura abo bantu ba Balaki, ati Balaki naho yompa ifeza n’izahabu vyuzuye inzu yiwe, sinoshobora gukora ikinyurana n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho Imana yanje, ari gito cank’ ari kinini." 
Numbers22:19 Nuko namwe, enda ni murāre hano iri joro, ndābe ico Uhoraho yongera kumbarira." 
Numbers22:20 Imana iza kuri Balamu iryo joro, iramubarira, it’ Abo bantu asangwa baje kuguhamagara, pfa kuva hasi, ujane na bo; mugabo, ico nzokubarira cose, az’ abe ari co ukora gusa." 
Numbers22:21 Bukeye Balamu aravyuka, ashira amatandiko ku ndogoba yiwe, ajana na ba bamenyekana b’i Mowabu." 
Numbers22:22 Uburake bg’Imana buraziriringa kukw agiye: umumarayika w’Uhoraho ahagarara mu nzira ngw amutāngīre. Kandi yari ku ndogoba yiwe, abashumba biwe babiri bari kumwe na we." 
Numbers22:23 Maz’ iyo ndogoba ibona uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho ahagaze mu nzira, yāsokōye inkota, ica irakevya, iva mu nzira, ica mu vyatsi. Balamu arayikubita ngw ayisubize mu nzira." 
Numbers22:24 Maz’ uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho aragenda ahagarara mu murombero uca hagati y’imirima y’imizabibu, urombeye impande zompi." 
Numbers22:25 Iyo ndogoba ibonye uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho, yiyagiriza ku murombero, iwuhomberanirizakw ikirenge ca Balamu: arongera arayikubita." 
Numbers22:26 Maz’ uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho yīgirayo, ahagarara mu mbombane, hatagira akanya ko gukebereza i buryo cank’ i bumoso." 
Numbers22:27 Iyo ndogoba ibonye uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho, ica iryama Balamu akiri kuri yo: uburake bga Balamu buraziriringa, ayikubita inkoni." 
Numbers22:28 Maz’ Uhoraho abumbura akanwa k’iyo ndogoba, ibaza Balamu, it’ Umpoye iki, kunkubita ibihetangabo gatatu kose?" 
Numbers22:29 Balamu arayishura, ati N’uk’ urik’ uramfyinako. Iyo mba mfise inkota mu ntoke, mba nkwishe aka kanya!" 
Numbers22:30 Iyo ndogoba ibaza Balamu, iti Sind’ indogoba yawe, wama ugenderako gushitsa uyu musi? Har’ aho nigeze kukugirira nk’ibi? Arahakana, at’ Oya." 
Numbers22:31 Maz’ Uhoraho ahumūra amaso ya Balamu, abona uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho ahagaze mu nzira, yāsokōye inkota: aca ajondamika umutwe, arapfukama arūnama." 
Numbers22:32 Umumarayika w’ Uhoraho aramubaza, at’ Ukubitiye iki iyo ndogoba yawe gatatu kose? Rāba nzanywe no kugutāngīra, kuk’ uhurūdukiye mu binyuranye n’ivyo ngomba." 
Numbers22:33 Indogoba yambonye, ikebereza imbere yanje ibihetangabo gatatu: iy’ idakebereza imbere yanje, simba nabuze kukwica, na yo nkayireka." 
Numbers22:34 Balamu yishura uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho, ati Nkoze icaha, kuko ntamenye kw ari wewe uhagaze mu nzira ng’ untāngīre; none rero, asangwa bikubabaje, reka nsubire inyuma." 
Numbers22:35 Uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho yishura Balamu, ati Pfa kujana n’abo bantu; mugabo, ijambo ryose nzokubarira az’ abe ari ryo uvuga. Nuko Balamu akomeza kujana na ba bamenyekana ba Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Maze Balaki yumvise ko Balamu aje, aja kumusanganirira mu gisagara c’i Mowabu, giherereye ku ruzi Arunoni, ni rwo rugabano rw’igihugu ciwe, aho kigarukira." 
Numbers22:37 Balaki abaza Balamu, ati Mbega sinaguhamagaranye agakuba? none n’iki cakubujije kunyitaba? ugira ngo sinshobora kuguha icubahiro?" 
Numbers22:38 Balamu yishura Balaki, ati Rāba, noneho ndaje: yamara jewe ugira ngo har’ ico nshobora kuvuga ku ruhande rwanje? Ijambo Imana izonshira mu kanwa ni ryo nzovuga." 
Numbers22:39 Nuko Balamu ajana na Balaki, baja i Kiriyati‐husoti." 
Numbers22:40 Balaki atanga inka n’intama kw ibimazi, abicīrako Balamu na ba bamenyekana bari kumwe na we." 
Numbers22:41 Bukeye Balaki ajana Balamu, amudūgana i Bamoti‐Bayali, ah’ ashobora kubona uruhande rumwe rw’Abisirayeli aho bagarukira." 
Numbers23:1 Balamu abarira Balaki, ati Nyubakishiriza hano ibicaniro ndwi, unzanire aha nyene amamasa ndwi n’amasuguru y’ intama ndwi." 
Numbers23:2 Nuko Balaki abigenza nk’uko Balamu amubariye, maze Balaki na Balamu batangira ku gicaniro cose imasa n’isuguru." 
Numbers23:3 Balamu abarira Balaki, ati N’uhagarare hambavu y’ ibimazi vyawe vyoshejwe, nanje ndagiye: kumbure Uhoraho araza guhūra nanje; maz’ ico aribunyereke cose ndakikubarira. Nukw aragenda, aja ku mpinga y’umusozi mu ruharabuga." 
Numbers23:4 Maz’ Imana iraza, ihūra na Balamu, arayibarira, ati Natunganije ibicaniro ndwi, ntangira kuri kimwe‐kimwe imasa n’isuguru y’intama." 
Numbers23:5 Maz’ Uhoraho ashira amajambo mu kanwa ka Balamu, aramubarira, ati Subira kuri Balaki, uvuge urtya n’urtya." 
Numbers23:6 Nukw asubira kuri we, asanga agihagaze hambavu ya vya bimazi vyiwe vyoshejwe, bo na ba bamenyekana bose b’i Mowabu." 
Numbers23:7 Atangura kuvugishwa, ati Balaki yankūye muri Aramu, Umwami w’i Mowabu yankūye mu misozi y’i burasirazuba, Ati Ngwino umvumire aba Yakobo, Ngwino wīrabire akaranga Abisirayeli." 
Numbers23:8 Novuma nte abo Imana itāvumye? Nokwīrabira akaranga nte abo Imana itīrabiye akaranga? 
Numbers23:9 Kuko nababonye mpagaze hejuru ku bitandara, Nkabitegereza mpagaze ku misozi. Rāba, n’ihanga ryībēra ukwaryo, Ritīharūra mu yandi mahanga." 
Numbers23:10 Ni nde yoshobora guharūra umukungugu, ari bo ba Yakobo? Canke ngw aharūre n’ikigira kane c’Abisirayeli? Icompa nkazokwipfira nk’ukw abagororotsi bapfa, Iherezo ryanje rikazoba nk’ iryabo!" 
Numbers23:11 Maze Balaki abaza Balamu, at’ Unkoreye iki? Nakuzaniye kumvumira abansi, non’ urabahezagiye gusa!" 
Numbers23:12 Aramwishura, ati Mbega sinkwiye kwirinda, ngw ico Uhoraho anshira mu kanwa abe ari co mvuga?" 
Numbers23:13 Balaki aramubarira, at’ Enda ngwino tuje ahandi, ah’ ushobora kubabona; ubona uruhande rumwe rwabo rwonyene, si bose: uheze ubamvumire uhagazeho." 
Numbers23:14 Nukw amujana mu gahinga k’i Sofimu, amushikana ku gatwe ka Pisiga, ahubaka ibicaniro ndwi, atangira kuri kimwe‐kimwe imasa n’isuguru y’intama." 
Numbers23:15 Maze Balamu abarira Balaki, ati N’uhagarare hano hambavu y’ibimazi vyawe vyoshejwe, nanje nje guhūrira n’Uhoraho hariya." 
Numbers23:16 Nuk’ Uhoraho araza, ahūra na Balamu, ashira amajambo mu kanwa kiwe, aramubarira, ati Subira kuri Balaki, uvuge urtya n’urtya." 
Numbers23:17 Nukw asubira kuri we, asanga agihagaze hambavu ya vya bimazi vyiwe vyoshejwe, ari kumwe na ba bamenyekana b’i Mowabu. Balaki aramubaza, at’ Uhoraho yavuze iki?" 
Numbers23:18 Atangura kuvugishwa, ati Haguruka, Balaki, wumve, Ntegera ugutwi, ewe mwene Sipori." 
Numbers23:19 Ereg’ Imana s’umuntu ngw ibeshe, Kandi s’umwana w’umuntu ngo yisubiremwo! Ivyo yavuze, mbega ntizobikora? Ivyo yashinze ntizobishitsa?" 
Numbers23:20 Rāba, nabariwe kubahezagira: Na yo yarabahezagiye, nanje sinshobora kubihindura." 
Numbers23:21 Nta bigabitanyo ibonye mu ba Yakobo, Nta bugoryi ibonye mu Bisirayeli: Uhoraho Imana yabo ari kumwe na bo, Muri bo hasēserezwa impundu z’Umwami." 
Numbers23:22 Imana yabakūye muri Egiputa; Bītwaje amahembe nk’ay’ imbogo. 
Numbers23:23 Ereg’ indagu nta co yotwara aba Yakobo, Cank’ ubupfumu ngo bugire ico butwara Abisirayeli. None biravugwa ku ba Yakobo no ku Bisirayeli, Ngw Ewe kuntu Imana yakoze!" 
Numbers23:24 Rāba, iryo hanga ribaduka nk’ intambge y’ingore, Rivumbuka nk’intambge y’ ingabo: Ntiriryama ritariye ico ryishe, Ritanyoye amaraso y’abishwe." 
Numbers23:25 Balaki abarira Balamu, at’ Ar’ ukubavuma, ar’ ukubahezagira, pfuma ubireka vyose!" 
Numbers23:26 Maze Balamu yishura Balaki, ati Sinakubariye yukw ico Uhoraho azovuga cose ari co nkwiye gukora?" 
Numbers23:27 Balaki abarira Balamu, ati Ngwino nkujane ahandi: kumbure Imana yokunda k’ubamvumira uhagazeyo." 
Numbers23:28 Nuko Balaki ajana Balamu ku gatwe ka Peyori gahanamiye ubugaragwa. 
Numbers23:29 Balamu abarira Balaki, ati Nyubakishiriza hano ibicaniro ndwi, unzanire aha nyene amamasa ndwi n’amasuguru y’intama ndwi." 
Numbers23:30 Nuko Balaki abigenza nk’uko Balamu amubariye, atangira ku gicaniro cose imasa n’isuguru." 
Numbers24:1 Balamu abonye yuk’ Uhoraho akunda guhezagira Abisirayeli, ntiyagenda nk’ubga mbere kurondera ubumenyi, ariko yerekeza amaso yiwe mu bugaragwa." 
Numbers24:2 Balamu yunamura amaso, abona Abisirayeli bashagaje nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri; Mpwemu w’ Imana amuzako." 
Numbers24:3 Atangura kuvugishwa, at’ Uku ni ko Balamu mwene Beyori avuga, Ni k’umuntu yar’ ahumirije amaso avuga," 
Numbers24:4 Ni k’uwumva amajambo y’ Imana avuga, Akerekwa Īshobora vyose nko mu nzozi, Akīkubita hasi, arikw ahumūye amaso:" 
Numbers24:5 At’ Ewe kuntu amahema yanyu ari meza, yemwe aba Yakobo, Ukuntu imihana yanyu ari myiza, yemwe Abisirayeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Imeze nk’imishoka y’imyonga ishika kure, Nk’imirima igendanye uruzi, Nk’imibazibazi itewe n’Uhoraho, Nk’ibiti vy’amasederi bimeze i ruhande y’amazi." 
Numbers24:7 Imibindi yabo izosesekara amazi, Imbuto zabo zizoba ahar’ ibigera vy’amazi menshi; Umwami wabo azosumba Agagi, Ubgami bgabo buzoshirwa hejuru." 
Numbers24:8 Imana yabakūye muri Egiputa; Bītwaje amahembe nk’ay’ imbogo. Bazotsontsomera amahanga ari bo barwanizi babo, Bamenagure amagufa yabo, Babatobekeranishe imyampi yabo." 
Numbers24:9 Barabunze, baryama nk’intambge, Mbere nk’intambge y’ingore: ni nde yohāngāra kubavyutsa? Ūzobahezagira na we ahezagirwe, Ūzobavuma na we avumwe." 
Numbers24:10 Maz’ uburake bga Balaki buziriringira Balamu, akubita amashi ku yandi; abarira Balamu, ati Naguhamagariye kumvumira abansi, non’ ehe rāba, urabahezagiye gusa ibihetangabo gatatu kose!" 
Numbers24:11 None genda mva imbere, taha i wawe. Nari niyumviriye kuguha icubahiro, ariko non’ Uhoraho arakikwimishije!" 
Numbers24:12 Balamu yishura Balaki, ati Sinabariye intumwa zawe wantumyeko," 
Numbers24:13 nti Balaki naho yompa ifeza n’izahabu vyuzuye inzu yiwe, sinoshobora gukora ikinyurana n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ngo nkore iciza cank’ ikibi nigeneye? Nt’ Ico Uhoraho azombarira cose ni co nzovuga?" 
Numbers24:14 Nuko rero ndatashe, ariko hinge nkumenyeshe ivyo bariya bantu bazogirira abawe mu bihe bizoza." 
Numbers24:15 Nukw atangura kuvugishwa, at’ Uku ni ko Balamu mwene Beyori avuga, Ni k’umuntu yar’ ahumirije amaso avuga," 
Numbers24:16 Ni k’uwumva amajambo y’ Imana avuga, Agatakw akamenya ubgenge bg’ Īsumba vyose, Akerekwa Īshobora vyose nko mu nzozi, Akīkubita hasi, arikw ahumūye amaso:"
