Numbers24:17 Ati Ndamubona, ariko s’ubu nyene; Ndamwitegereza, ariko ntari hafi. Inyenyeri izokomōka muri Yakobo, Icumu ry’ubugabe rizosokoroka muri Isirayeli, Ritobekeranye aba Mowabu mu mvuridahita, Rimene umutwe aba Sheti bose." 
Numbers24:18 Edomu bazohagira inyurwa, Bagire inyurwa i Seyiri, ahāhora ar’ umwansi wabo; Abisirayeli bazokora ivy’ ubuhizi." 
Numbers24:19 Muri Yakobo hazova ūganza, Azogeseza amasigarira yo mu bisagara." 
Numbers24:20 Maz’ atuma amaso Abamaleki, yongera kuvugishwa, at’ Abamaleki bār’ aba mbere mu mahanga; Arikw iherezo ryabo n’ukuzorandurwa." 
Numbers24:21 Maz’ atuma amaso Abanyakeni, yongera kuvugishwa, at’ Aho mwībēra harakomeye: Icāri canyu kiri hejuru ku gitandara!" 
Numbers24:22 Yamara mwa Banyakeni, muzogesezwa! Bizoba ryari? Bizoba ah’ Abashuri bazobajana mur’ inyagano." 
Numbers24:23 Yongera kuvugishwa, at’ Emwe n’ibara! Ni nde azoshobora kubaho, igihe Imana izokora ivyo?" 
Numbers24:24 Arikw amato azoza, aturutse ku nkombe y’i Kitimu, Aneshe Ashuri, aneshe na Eberi, Maze na bo nyene bazorandurwa." 
Numbers24:25 Nuko Balamu ava hasi, aragenda, ataha i we; Balaki na we arīgīra." 
Numbers25:1 Abisirayeli batebeye i Shitimu, abantu batangura gusambana n’Abanyamowabukazi:" 
Numbers25:2 kuko bābatumira ngo baze gusangira na bo ibimazi vy’ibigirwamana vyabo: nukw abo bantu bakabiryako, bakūnamira ivyo bigirwamana vyabo." 
Numbers25:3 Abisirayeli bīfatanya na Bayali y’i Peyori, uburake bg’Uhoraho burabaziriringira." 
Numbers25:4 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Jana n’abakuru bose baganza abantu, umanike abakoze ivyo imbere yanje, ubānikire ku zuba, kugira ng’ uburake bganje bg’inkazi buve ku Bisirayeli." 
Numbers25:5 Nuko Mose abarira abacamanza b’Abisirayeli, at’ Umuntu wese muri mwebge ni yice mu bo atwara abīfatanije na Bayali y’i Peyori." 
Numbers25:6 Bagize bartya, umwe mu Bisirayeli azana Umumidiyanikazi amushikana mu b’i wabo, amwātātana imbere ya Mose n’imbere y’ ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, aho bāriko bararirira ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Numbers25:7 Maze Finehasi mwene Eleyazari, Eleyazari wa Aroni umuherezi, abibonye, ava hasi hagati mw ishengero, ahitana icumu," 
Numbers25:8 akurikira wa mugabo w’Umwisirayeli haruguru mw ihema ryiwe, abatobekeranisha icumu bompi, wa mugabo w’Umwisirayeli na wa mugore, umugore rimutobekeranya mu nda. Uko ni kw ikīza cābogojwe mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers25:9 Abishwe n’ico kīza bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
Numbers25:10 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers25:11 ati Finehasi mwene Eleyazari, Eleyazari wa Aroni umuherezi, ahwamitse uburake bganje, atumye buva ku Bisirayeli, kuko yarwaniye ifūhe ryanje muri bo, bigatuma ntarandura Abisirayeli kubg’ iryo fūhe ryanje." 
Numbers25:12 Ni co gituma ukwiye kuvuga yuko mmuhaye isezerano ryanje ry’amahoro," 
Numbers25:13 rizomubera isezerano ry’ubuherezi bg’intahava, bo n’uruvyaro rwiwe, kuko yagize ifūhe kubganje, jewe Imana yiwe, agatangira Abisirayeli impongano." 
Numbers25:14 Wa mugabo w’Umwisirayeli yicanwa na wa Mumidiyanikazi, yitwa Zimuri, yari mwene Salu, yar’ umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza wo mu ba Simeyoni." 
Numbers25:15 Uwo Mumidiyanikazi bicanywe yitwa Kozibi, yari mwene Suri, umukuru w’inzu ya ba sekuruza wo mu Bamidiyani." 
Numbers25:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers25:17 ati Genda ukubagure Abamidiyani, ubice," 
Numbers25:18 kuko bābakubaguye mu buryo bgiyorobetse, hamwe bābōhagiza mu vy’i Peyori no mu vya Kozibi, umwe w’i wabo, wa mukobga w’umukuru wo mu Bamidiyani, umwe yicwa ku musi w’ikīza catēye kubg’ ivyabaye i Peyori." 
Numbers26:1 Hanyuma y’ico kīza, Uhoraho abarira Mose na Eleyazari mwene Aroni umuherezi," 
Numbers26:2 ati Harūra igitigiri c’ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri ukaja hejuru, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, abo mu Bisirayeli bose bashobora kurwana mu ntambara." 
Numbers26:3 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi barabibabarira bari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko," 
Numbers26:4 bati Muharūre abamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru. Babigira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose. Abisirayeli bāvuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa bār’ aba: 
Numbers26:5 Bene Reyubeni, imfura ya Isirayeli, n’aba: Henoki, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahenoki; na Palu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abapalu;" 
Numbers26:6 na Hesironi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahesironi; na Karumi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’ Abakarumi." 
Numbers26:7 Ayo ni yo mazu y’ Abareyubeni. Abāharūwe bo muri bo bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitatu, n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu." 
Numbers26:8 Aba Palu ni Eliyabu: 
Numbers26:9 aba Eliyabu ni Nemuweli na Datani na Abiramu. Uwo Datani na Abiramu ni bo ba bandi bāri bāratoranijwe mw ishengero, bagahava barwanya Mose na Aroni, bafatanije n’umuce wa Kora, igihe bāgarariza Uhoraho," 
Numbers26:10 isi ikāsama, ikabamirana na Kora, hamwe wa muce wifatanya na bo wapfa, umuriro ukayigiza abagabo amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, bakaba akābarore." 
Numbers26:11 Arikw abana ba Kora ntibāpfuye. 
Numbers26:12 Bene Simeyoni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Nemuweli ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abanemuweli; na Yamini, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayamini; na Yakini, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayakini;" 
Numbers26:13 na Zera, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abazera; na Sauli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abasauli." 
Numbers26:14 Ayo ni yo mazu y’Abasimeyoni: bose bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’amajana abiri. 
Numbers26:15 Bene Gadi, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Sefoni, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abasefoni; na Hagi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahagi; na Shuni, ni we gishitsi c’ inzu y’Abashuni;" 
Numbers26:16 na Ozini, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abozini; na Eri, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Aberi;" 
Numbers26:17 na Arodi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abarodi; na Areli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abareli." 
Numbers26:18 Ayo ni yo mazu y’Abagadi, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari, ukw ar’ ibihumbi mirongwine n’amajana atanu." 
Numbers26:19 Bene Yuda ni Eri na Onani; ariko Eri na Onani bāpfiriye mu gihugu c’i Kanani. 
Numbers26:20 Bene Yuda bābaye ibishitsi vy’amazu n’aba: Shela, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashela; na Peresi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaperesi; na Zera, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abazera." 
Numbers26:21 Aba Peresi n’aba: Hesironi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahesironi; na Hamuli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’ Abahamuli." 
Numbers26:22 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Yuda, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari, ukw ar’ ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bitandatu n’amajana atanu." 
Numbers26:23 Bene Isakari, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Tola, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abatola; na Puva, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abapuva;" 
Numbers26:24 na Yashubu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayashubu; na Shimuroni, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashimuroni." 
Numbers26:25 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Isakari, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari, ukw ar’ ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bine n’amajana atatu." 
Numbers26:26 Bene Zebuloni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Seredi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaseredi; na Eloni, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abeloni; na Yakileli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayakileli." 
Numbers26:27 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Zebuloni, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari, ukw ar’ ibihumbi mirongwitandatu n’amajana atanu." 
Numbers26:28 Bene Yosefu, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ni Manase na Efurayimu." 
Numbers26:29 Aba Manase n’aba: Makiri, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abamakiri; Makiri yavyaye Gileyadi; Gileyadi ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abagileyadi." 
Numbers26:30 Aba Gileyadi n’aba: Yezeri, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayezeri; na Heleki, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaheleki;" 
Numbers26:31 na Asiriyeli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’ Abasiriyeli; na Shekemu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashekemu;" 
Numbers26:32 na Shemida, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashemida; na Heferi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaheferi." 
Numbers26:33 Selofehadi mwene Heferi ntiyavyaye abahungu, ariko yavyaye abakobga; amazina y’abo bakobga ba Selofehadi ni Makila na Nowa na Hogila na Miluka na Tirusa." 
Numbers26:34 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Manase: abāharūwe bo muri bo bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bibiri n’ amajana ndwi. 
Numbers26:35 Aba ni bo ba Efurayimu, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari: Shutela, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashutela; na Bekeri, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Ababekeri; na Tahani, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abatahani." 
Numbers26:36 Aba Shutela n’aba: Erani, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Aberani." 
Numbers26:37 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Efurayimu, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari; bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri n’amajana atanu. Abo ni bo ba Yosefu, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Numbers26:38 Bene Benyamini, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Bela, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Ababela; na Ashibeli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashibeli; na Ahiramu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahiramu;" 
Numbers26:39 na Shufamu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashufamu; na Hufamu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abahufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Aba Bela ni Arudi na Namani: Arudi ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abarudi, Namani ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abanamani." 
Numbers26:41 Abo ni bo ba Benyamini, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari: abāharūwe bo muri bo bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana atandatu." 
Numbers26:42 Aba ni bo bene Dani, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari: Shuhamu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashuhamu. Abo ni bo bābayemw’ amazu y’aba Dani, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Numbers26:43 Ab’ amazu yose y’Abashuhamu, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari, bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na bine n’ amajana ane." 
Numbers26:44 Bene Asheri, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Imuna, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abimuna; na Ishivi, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abishivi; na Beriya, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Ababeriya." 
Numbers26:45 Mu ba Beriya, Heberi ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaheberi, na Malukiyeli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abamalukiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Umukobga wa Asheri yitwa Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ayo ni yo mazu y’aba Asheri, nk’ukw abāharūwe bari; bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana ane." 
Numbers26:48 Bene Nafutali, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Yakiseli, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayakiseli; na Guni, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abaguni;" 
Numbers26:49 na Yeseri, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abayeseri; na Shilemu, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abashilemu." 
Numbers26:50 Abo ni bo bābayemw’ amazu y’aba Nafutali, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari: abāharūwe bo muri bo bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bitanu n’amajana ane." 
Numbers26:51 Abo ni bo bāharūwe bo mu Bisirayeli: bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi amajana atandatu na kimwe n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu. 
Numbers26:52 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers26:53 at’ Abo az’ abe ari bo bagabanganywa igihugu kibe ishamvu yabo, nk’ukw igitigiri c’amazina yabo kingana." 
Numbers26:54 Umuryango munini uz’ uwuhe ishamvu nini, umutoya uwuhe ishamvu ntoya; umuryango wose uz’ uhabge ishamvu ihwanye n’ igitigiri c’abāharūwe bo muri wo." 
Numbers26:55 Arikw ico gihugu kize kigabuzwe ubupfindo; nk’ukw amazina y’imiryango ya ba sekuruza ari, az’ abe ari ko bahegukira." 
Numbers26:56 Nk’uk’ ubupfindo buzokwerekana, az’ abe ari k’umuryango wose ugabanganirizwa ishamvu yawo, ari munini ari mutoya." 
Numbers26:57 Abāharūwe bo mu Balewi, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari, n’aba: Gerushoni, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abagerushoni; na Kohati, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abakohati; na Merari, ni we gishitsi c’inzu y’Abamerari." 
Numbers26:58 Aya ni yo mazu y’aba Lewi: inzu y’Abalibuni, n’iy’ Abaheburoni, n’iy’ Abamahili, n’iy’ Abamushi, n’iy’ Abakora. Kandi Kohati ni we se wa Amuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Muka Amuramu yitwa Yokebedi, yari mwene Lewi, yavukiye muri Egiputa. Bavyarana na Amuramu Aroni na Mose na Miriyamu mushiki wabo." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni na we abo yavyaye ni Nadabu na Abihu na Eleyazari na Itamari. 
Numbers26:61 Ariko Nadabu na Abihu bāpfuye ca gihe bosereza Uhoraho imibavu ku muriro urahuwe ahandi. 
Numbers26:62 Abāharūwe bo muri bo b’izinamuhungu wese, uhereye ku bamaze ukwezi kumwe bavutse, ukaja hejuru, bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitatu. Kandi ntibāharūranwa n’Abisirayeli bandi, kukw ata shamvu bahawe mu bandi Bisirayeli." 
Numbers26:63 Abo ni bo bāharūwe na Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi; bāharūye Abisirayeli bari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Ariko muri bo ntihari hakigira n’umwe mu bāharūwe na Mose na Aroni umuherezi, igihe bāharūrira Abisirayeli mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi." 
Numbers26:65 Kuk’ Uhoraho yari yaravuze ivyabo, ati Bazogwa mu bugaragwa nta kabuza. Ntihasigara n’umwe muri bo, atari Kalebu mwene Yefune, na Yosuwa mwene Nuni." 
Numbers27:1 Maz’ abakobga ba Selofehadi bīgira hafi. Selofehadi yari mwene Heferi, Heferi wa Gileyadi, Gileyadi wa Makiri, Makiri wa Manase, bo mu ruvyaro rwa Manase mwene Yosefu. Aya ni yo mazina y’abo bakobga ba Selofehadi: Makila na Nowa na Hogila na Miluka na Tirusa." 
Numbers27:2 Bahagarara imbere ya Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi, n’imbere y’ abakuru, n’imbere y’ikoraniro ryose, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ ibonaniro, baravuga," 
Numbers27:3 bati Data yapfiriye mu bugaragwa, kandi ntiyari muri rya koraniro ry’abīfatanije na Kora kugarariza Uhoraho, ariko yapfiriye mu vyaha vyiwe ubgiwe gusa; kandi nta bahungu yasize." 
Numbers27:4 N’iki cotuma izina rya data rizimangana mu muryango, n’ukw atāsize umuhungu? N’uduhe kuzogira ishamvu mu b’i wacu." 
Numbers27:5 Maze Mose ashīra Uhoraho amajambo yabo. 
Numbers27:6 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers27:7 at’ Abakobga ba Selofehadi bavuze ivy’ ukuri; nuk’ uz’ ubahe kwegukira ishamvu mu b’i wabo; ubashikirize ishamvu ya se. 
Numbers27:8 Kand’ ubarire Abisirayeli, ut’ Umuntu ni yapfa adasize umuhungu, umukobga wiwe az’ abe ari we mushikiriza ishamvu yiwe." 
Numbers27:9 Na ho ni yaba adasize umukobga, muze mushikirize ishamvu yiwe abo bavukana." 
Numbers27:10 Kandi ni yaba atagira abo bavukana, muze muyishikirize ba se wabo." 
Numbers27:11 Kandi se ni yaba atagira abo bavukana, ishamvu yiwe muze muyishikirize mwene wabo arusha abandi kuba uwo hafi, ayegukire. Iryo rizobera Abisirayeli ibgirizwa bazohora bakurikira mu guca imanza, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose." 
Numbers27:12 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati N’udūge uyu musozi wo muri Abarimu, witegereze igihugu nahaye Abisirayeli." 
Numbers27:13 Maze ni waheza kukibona, nawe uzotāmbūra, uhamvye abanyu, nk’uko Aroni mukurwawe yabahambije;" 
Numbers27:14 kuko mwanse kwumvira ijambo ryanje muri mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, hamwe ishengero ryitonganya, namwe ntimwerekanire ukwera kwanje imbere yabo kuri ya mazi. (Ayo ni ya mazi y’i Meriba h’i Kadeshi, mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini.)" 
Numbers27:15 Mose abarira Uhoraho," 
Numbers27:16 at’ Uhoraho, Mana y’impwemu z’ abari n’umubiri bose, n’utoranye umuntu wo kuganza iri shengero," 
Numbers27:17 wo kubaja imbere amaja n’ amaza, abaturutsa akabacūra: kugira ngw ishengero ryawe, Uhoraho, ryoye kumera nk’intama zitagira umwungere." 
Numbers27:18 Uhoraho yishura Mose, ati Jana Yosuwa mwene Nuni, umuntu arimwo Mpwemu, umurambikekw ibiganza;" 
Numbers27:19 umuhagarike imbere ya Eleyazari umuherezi, n’imbere y’ ishengero ryose, umushikiririze igikorwa imbere yabo." 
Numbers27:20 Kand’ umukebere ku cubahiro cawe, kugira ngw ishengero ryose ry’ Abisirayeli rihore rimwumvira." 
Numbers27:21 Kand’ az’ ahore ahagarara imbere ya Eleyazari umuherezi, amutume kuza imbere yanje kumbaza, apfindishije Urimu; ijambo rya Eleyazari rize ribe ari ryo ribaturutsa, ribacūre, Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose, mbere n’ishengero ryose." 
Numbers27:22 Nuko Mose abigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; ajana Yosuwa, amuhagarika imbere ya Eleyazari umuherezi, n’imbere y’ ishengero ryose." 
Numbers27:23 Amurambikakw ibiganza, amushikiriza ico gikorwa, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yabimubariye." 
Numbers28:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers28:2 at’ Ugere Abisirayeli, ubabarire, ut’ Ibimazi vyiwe, ari zo mfungurwa ashikanirwa zitōngōrwa n’umuriro, z’umubabge umumotera neza, uti Muze muhore muvyitondera, mubimushikanire mu bihe vyavyo vyashinzwe." 
Numbers28:3 Ubabarire, ut’ Iki ni co kimazi co gutōngōrwa n’umuriro muzohora mumushikanira: muze mutange abana b’intama babiri‐babiri uko bukeye, b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga, kw ibimazi vyo kwoswa vy’intasība." 
Numbers28:4 Umwana w’intama umwe muze muwutange mu gitondo, uwundi ku mugoroba;" 
Numbers28:5 bo n’ifu igogōretse y’ikigiracumi c’ ingero yitwa efa kw ishikanwa ry’ ifu, ivanzwe n’amavuta avuye muri elayo zisekuwe y’ikigirakane c’ ingero yitwa hini." 
Numbers28:6 Ivyo n’ikimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, nk’uko vyashingiwe ku musozi Sinayi, ngo kibe umubabge umota neza w’ikimazi nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, kigatōngōrwa n’umuriro." 
Numbers28:7 Ishikanwa ry’ibiturire muzohora mushikanana n’umwana w’intama umwe‐umwe, rize ribe ikigirakane ca hini nyene; iryo shikanwa ry’ ibiturire bihiye munshikanira, muze murivyagize Ahēra." 
Numbers28:8 Uwundi mwana w’intama muze muwutange ku mugoroba: muwutangane n’ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, nk’ivyo mu gitondo, bibe ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers28:9 Kw isabato muze mutange abana b’intama babiri b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga, bo n’ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ifu igogōretse vy’ingero ya efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu, hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ibiturire rigendanye na vyo." 
Numbers28:10 Ivyo ni co kimazi co kwoswa kw isabato yose ukw itashe, congerwe ku kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire rigendanye na co." 
Numbers28:11 Ku musi ukwezi kwose kubonetse, muze munshikanire ikimazi co kwoswa, jewe Uhoraho; kibe amamasa abiri y’imikangara, bo n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’ abana b’intama ndwi b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers28:12 imasa yose muze muyitangane n’ibigiracumi bitatu vy’ifu igogōretse vy’iyo ngero ya efa, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo, kw ishikanwa ry’ifu; ya mpfizi y’intama na yo muyitangane n’ ibigiracumi bibiri vy’ifu igogōretse vy’iyo ngero nyene, ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo;" 
Numbers28:13 umwana w’intama umwe‐umwe muwutangane n’ikigiracumi kimwe c’ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo: bize bibe ikimazi co kwoswa, umubabge umota neza, ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers28:14 Amashikanwa y’ibiturire agendana na vyo az’ abe aya: irigendana n’ imasa yose rize ribe vino itīmbānye iyo ngero ya hini, iryo kur’ iyo mpfizi y’intama rize ribe ikigira gatatu ca hini nyene, iryo ku mwana w’intama wose rize ribe ikigira kane c’iyo hini; ivyo bize bibe ikimazi co kwoswa uk’ ukwezi kubonetse, ukw amezi yo mu mwaka angana." 
Numbers28:15 Kandi muze mutange n’impfizi y’impene, muyimpaye jewe Uhoraho, kw ikimazi gitangiwe ivyaha, mucongere ku kimazi co kwoswa c’ intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire rigendanye na co." 
Numbers28:16 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi ugira icumi na kane wakwo, haze hame haba Pasika yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers28:17 Ku musi w’ icumi na gatanu w’ukwo kwezi nyene, haze habe umusi mukuru: muze mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe." 
Numbers28:18 Ku musi w’intangamarāra wayo muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako: 
Numbers28:19 ariko muze munshikanire ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro, jewe Uhoraho, ari co kimazi co kwoswa: kize kibe amamasa abiri y’imikangara, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama ndwi b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka; muze mubitange bitagira agasembga," 
Numbers28:20 hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo: iryo kw imasa ribe ibigiracumi bitatu vy’iyo ngero ya efa, iryo ku mpfizi y’intama ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vya efa nyene," 
Numbers28:21 iryo ku mwana w’intama umwe‐umwe mur’ abo, ukw ari ndwi, ribe ikigiracumi kimwe." 
Numbers28:22 Muze mutange n’impfizi y’impene kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, co kubabera impongano." 
Numbers28:23 Ivyo muze muvyongere ku kimazi co kwoswa co mu gitondo, ari co kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība." 
Numbers28:24 Ivyo abe ari vyo muzohora mutanga uko bukeye kumara iyo misi ndwi; bizoba bibaye imfungurwa nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho, zitōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza. Bize vyongerwe ku kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ibiturire rigendanye na co." 
Numbers28:25 Kandi ku musi ugira indwi muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako. 
Numbers28:26 No ku musi wo kuzana ivyimburwa vy’umushuzo, igihe munshikanira ishikanwa ry’umushuzo, jewe Uhoraho, ku musi mukuru ukurikira amasabato ndwi, muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera: ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako." 
Numbers28:27 Ariko muze mutange ikimazi co kwoswa c’umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho, kize kibe amamasa abiri y’imikangara, n’ impfizi y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama ndwi b’amasuguru batarengeje umwaka;" 
Numbers28:28 hamwe n’ ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo: iryo ku masa yose ribe ibigiracumi bitatu vya efa, iryo ku mpfizi y’intama ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vya efa nyene," 
Numbers28:29 iryo ku mwana w’intama umwe‐umwe mur’ abo, ukw ar’indwi, ribe ikigiracumi kimwe." 
Numbers28:30 Muze mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe yo kubabera impongano. 
Numbers28:31 Muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu rigendanye na co, mubitange bidafise agasembga, hamwe n’ ishikanwa ry’ibiturire bigendanye." 
Numbers29:1 Mu kwezi kw’indwi, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera; ntihaze hagire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako: muze muwugire umusi wo kuvuzakw inzamba." 
Numbers29:2 Muze muwutangekw ikimazi co kwoswa c’ umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho; kize kibe imasa y’ umukangara imwe, n’impfizi y’ intama imwe, n’abana b’intama ndwi b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga," 
Numbers29:3 hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’ amavuta ya elayo; iryo ku masa ribe ibigiracumi bitatu vy’ingero yitwa efa, iryo ku mpfizi y’intama ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vya efa nyene," 
Numbers29:4 iryo ku mwana w’intama umwe‐umwe mur’ abo, ukw ar’ indwi, ribe ikigiracumi kimwe." 
Numbers29:5 Muze mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, co kubabera impongano." 
Numbers29:6 Muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa gihora gitangwa iy’ ukwezi kubonetse, hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, vyongerwe no kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, hamwe n’ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, bo n’ amashikanwa y’ibiturire agendanye n’ivyo vyose, nk’uko bishinzwe; bibe umubabge umota neza, ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro nshikaniwe jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers29:7 Ku musi w’icumi w’ukwo kwezi kw’indwi muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera; muze mwame muwibabazako, kandi ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe muwukorako;" 
Numbers29:8 ariko muze mutange ikimazi co kwoswa munshikaniye jewe Uhoraho, c’umubabge umota neza; kize kibe imasa y’umukangara imwe, n’ impfizi y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama ndwi b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka; muze mubitange bitagira agasembga." 
Numbers29:9 Muze mubitangane n’ishikanwa ry’ ifu bigendanye, ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo; iryo ku masa ribe ibigiracumi bitatu vya efa, iryo ku mpfizi y’intama ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vya efa nyene," 
Numbers29:10 iryo ku mwana w’intama umwe‐umwe mur’ abo, ukw ar’ indwi, ribe ikigiracumi kimwe." 
Numbers29:11 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha c’impongano, no kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu bigendanye, no ku mashikanwa y’ibiturire agendanye na vyo." 
Numbers29:12 Kandi ku musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ukwo kwezi kw’indwi muze mukoranywe no kuba ikoraniro ryera; ntimuze mugire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako, kandi muze mumare imisi ndwi muri mu misi mikuru yo kunyubaha, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers29:13 Ku musi wayo w’intangamarāra muze mutange ikimazi co kwoswa, ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza; kize kibe amamasa y’imikangara cumi n’ atatu, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’ amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka; bize bibe ibitagira agasembga." 
Numbers29:14 Mubitangane n’ishikanwa ry’ ifu rigendana na vyo, ifu igogōretse ivanzwe n’amavuta ya elayo; iryo ku masa imwe‐imwe mur’ ayo, ukw ar’icumi n’atatu, ribe ibigiracumi bitatu vya efa, iryo ku mpfizi y’intama imwe‐imwe mur’ izo, ukw ari zibiri, ribe ibigiracumi bibiri vya efa nyene," 
Numbers29:15 iryo ku mwana w’intama umwe‐umwe mur’ abo, ukw ar’ icumi na bane, ribe ikigiracumi kimwe." 
Numbers29:16 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:17 Bukeye ku musi ugira kabiri muze mutange amamasa y’imikangara cumi n’abiri, n’impfizi z’ intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:18 mutangane n’ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’ abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:19 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:20 Bukeye ku musi ugira gatatu muze mutange amamasa cumi n’ imwe, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’ amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:21 mutangane n’ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:22 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:23 Bukeye ku musi ugira kane muze mutange amamasa cumi, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:24 mutangane n’ ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:25 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:26 Bukeye ku musi ugira gatanu muze mutange amamasa cenda, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:27 mutangane n’ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:28 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:29 Bukeye ku musi ugira gatandatu muze mutange amamasa munani, n’impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’ amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:30 mutangane n’ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:31 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:32 Bukeye ku musi ugira indwi muze mutange amamasa ndwi, n’ impfizi z’intama zibiri, n’abana b’intama cumi na bane b’amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:33 mutangane n’ayo mamasa n’izo mpfizi z’intama n’abo bana b’intama amashikanwa y’ifu n’ay’ ibiturire bigendana, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kingana, nk’uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:34 Mutange n’impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:35 Bukeye ku musi ugira umunani muze mugire ikoraniro ry’ agahebuza; ntimuze mugire igikorwa kiruhisha muwukorako; 
Numbers29:36 ariko muze mutange ikimazi co kwoswa, ikimazi gitōngōrwa n’ umuriro, umubabge ummotera neza, jewe Uhoraho; kize kibe imasa imwe, n’impfizi y’intama imwe, n’abana b’intama ndwi b’ amasuguru, batarengeje umwaka, batagira agasembga;" 
Numbers29:37 ishikanwa ry’ifu n’ishikanwa ry’ibiturire vyo kugendana n’iyo masa n’iyo mpfizi y’intama n’abo bana b’intama, bize bibe nk’ukw igitigiri c’ivyo bimazi kingana, nk’ uko bishinzwe." 
Numbers29:38 Mutange n’ impfizi y’impene imwe kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; muze muvyongere kuri ca kimazi co kwoswa c’intasība, no kw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’iry’ ibiturire, uko bigendana na co." 
Numbers29:39 Ivyo abe ari vyo muzohora munshikanira, jewe Uhoraho, mu misi mikuru yanyu ishinzwe, muvyongeye ku bimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa, no ku mashikanwa yanyu y’ifu no ku y’ibiturire, no ku bimazi vyanyu vy’ishimwe, ivyo mutangishwa no gushitsa isezerano canke n’uko muvyigombeye." 
Numbers29:40 Nuko Mose ashikiriza Abisirayeli ivyo Uhoraho yamubariye vyose. 
Numbers30:1 Mose abarira abakuru b’ imiryango y’Abisirayeli, at’ Iki ni co Uhoraho yashinze:" 
Numbers30:2 umugabo ni yasezeranira Uhoraho isezerano, cank’ akarahira indahiro, akībohesha ivyo araganye, ntaz’ ace mw ijambo ryiwe, arikw az’ ashitse ivyamuvuye mu kanwa vyose." 
Numbers30:3 Kand’ umukobga ni yasezeranira Uhoraho isezerano, akībohesha ivyo araganye, akiri mu rugo kwa se mu bgigeme bgiwe;" 
Numbers30:4 se akumva ivyo asezeranye, n’ingene yibohesheje ivyo araganye, agapfa kwihorera akamureka, ayo masezerano yiwe yose azohama, bo n’ivyo yaraganye vyose yibohesheje." 
Numbers30:5 Ariko se ni yamubuza kur’ uwo musi avyumviyeko, ntihazogira isezerano ryiwe rihama, canke na kimwe mu vyo yaraganye yari yibohesheje; Uhoraho azomuharira kuko se yamubujije." 
Numbers30:6 Na ho ni yarongorwa akiri mur’ ayo masezerano, no mu vyo akanwa kiwe kātuntumukanye, akavyībohesha;" 
Numbers30:7 umugabo wiwe akavyumva, agapfa kwihorera akamureka kur’ uwo musi avyumviyeko; ayo masezerano yiwe azohama, bo n’ivyo yaraganye yibohesheje." 
Numbers30:8 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yamubuza ku musi avyumviyeko, azoba akūyeh’ iryo sezerano yarimwo, n’ivyo akanwa kiwe kātuntumukanye, akavyibohesha; kand’ Uhoraho azomuharira." 
Numbers30:9 Arikw isezerano ry’umupfakazi, canke ry’uwahukanye, ico azoba yībohesheje cose kizomuhambira." 
Numbers30:10 Kand’ umugore ni yasezerana isezerano ari mu rugo, akībohesha ivyo araganye, akarahira," 
Numbers30:11 umugabo wiwe akavyumva, agapfa kwihorera akamureka, ntamubuze; ayo masezerano yiwe yose azohama, bo n’ivyo yaraganye vyose yibohesheje." 
Numbers30:12 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yavyanzuza ku musi avyumviyeko, ivyamuvuye mu kanwa vyose vy’ amasezerano n’ivyo yaraganye akavyibohesha, ntibizohama, kuk’ umugabo wiwe yavyanjuje; kand’ Uhoraho azomuharira." 
Numbers30:13 Isezerano ryose n’indahiro yose yokwibohesha ngo yibabaze, umugabo wiwe ni we yobishinga canke ni we yobikūra." 
Numbers30:14 Arik’ umugabo wiwe ni yapfa kwihorera uko bukeye uko bgije, akamureka, azoba akomeje amasezerano yiwe yose n’ivyo yaraganye vyose bimuhambiriye. Kw azoba yarihoreye akamureka ku musi avyumviyeko, azoba yarabishinze." 
Numbers30:15 Ariko ni yavyanzuza amaze igihe yaravyumvise, azogībgako n’ibigabitanyo vy’umugore wiwe." 
Numbers30:16 Ayo ni yo mabgirizwa Uhoraho yabariye Mose, yo ku vy’ umugabo n’umugore wiwe, no ku vy’ umukobga na se, umukobga akiri mu bgigeme bgiwe mu rugo kwa se." 
Numbers31:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers31:2 ati Subiriza Abamidiyani mu nkōko ku vyo bāgiriye Abisirayeli; hanyuma uzotāmbūra, uhamvye abanyu." 
Numbers31:3 Nuko Mose abarira abantu, ati Ni musobanure abantu muri mwebge bo kuja mu ntambara, mubahe ibirwanishwa, baje gutera Abamidiyani, kubgo kwīhōra kw’ Uhoraho, babasubirize mu nkōko." 
Numbers31:4 Mu muryango wose wo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli mukūremw’ ingabo igihumbi‐igihumbi, mubarungike gutera." 
Numbers31:5 Nuko mu bihumbi vy’Abisirayeli basobanura mu muryango wose igihumbi‐igihumbi, ziba ingabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri zitwaje ibirwanishwa." 
Numbers31:6 Nuko Mose arungika izo ngabo gutera, ukw ar’ igihumbi‐igihumbi mu miryango yose; abarungikana na Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi, ajanye ibintu vyera n’inzumbete zo kuvuzwa ijwi rirengēra." 
Numbers31:7 Nuko barwana n’Abamidiyani, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose; bica uw’ izinamuhungu wese." 
Numbers31:8 Kand’ ukūye abandi bishe, bica abami b’Abamidiyani, ni bo aba: Ewi, na Rekemu, na Tsuri, na Huri, na Reba, abo bami b’Abamidiyani ukw ari batanu; kandi na Balamu mwene Beyori bamwicisha inkota." 
Numbers31:9 Abisirayeli bafata mpiri Abamidiyanikazi n’abana babo; banyaga inka zabo zose n’imikuku yabo yose, basahura n’ibintu vyabo vyose." 
Numbers31:10 Baturira ibisagara bābamwo vyose, n’insāgo zose bari bashagajemwo." 
Numbers31:11 Batabarukana isahu yose n’iminyago yose y’ abantu n’ibigenda. 
Numbers31:12 Abafashwe mpiri n’iminyago n’amasahu babizanira Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi n’ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli, aho bashagaje mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu, kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi, n’abakuru bose b’iryo shengero, babasanganirira inyuma y’aho bashagaje." 
Numbers31:14 Maze Mose arakira abagabisha b’ingabo, abagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, batabarutse mu ntambara." 
Numbers31:15 Arababaza, ati Mbeg’ abagore n’abakobga mwabaretse bose?" 
Numbers31:16 Ereg’ abo ni bo bacumuje mwebge Abisirayeli k’Uhoraho ngo mumuhemukire mu vyabaye i Peyori, babitewe n’inama za Balamu, bituma ikīza gitera ishengero ry’Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:17 Nuko rero ni mwice umuhungu wese mu bana, n’umugore n’umukobga wese yigeze kuryamana n’umugabo." 
Numbers31:18 Arikw abigeme bose batigeze kumenya icitwa umugabo abe ari bo mureka, mubītungire." 
Numbers31:19 Kandi namwe ubganyu, mugume inyuma y’aho dushagaje, muhasagaze kumara imisi ndwi; uwishe wese, n’uwakoze ku muvyimba wese, aze yihumanure ku musi ugira gatatu no ku wugira indwi, mwihumanurane n’abo mwafashe mpiri." 
Numbers31:20 Muhumanure n’imyambaro yose, n’ivyakozwe mu nsāto vyose, n’ivyajishwe mu bgoya bg’impene vyose, n’ibintu vyose vy’ibibāzano." 
Numbers31:21 Maze Eleyazari umuherezi abarira izo ngabo zitabarutse, at’ Ibi ni vyo icagezwe Uhoraho yageze Mose kibgiriza:" 
Numbers31:22 kw ibintu vyo mw izahabu n’ivyo mw ifeza n’ivyo mu miringa n’ivyo mu vyuma n’ivyo mw ibāti n’ivyo mw isāsu," 
Numbers31:23 ibintu vyose birinda umuriro, muze mubicishe mu muriro, bibone guhumanuka; ariko kandi mubihumanuze na ya mazi yo guhumanura; na vy’ ibintu bitarinda umuriro muze mubinyuze mur’ ayo mazi." 
Numbers31:24 Maze ku musi ugira indwi muze mumesūre impuzu zanyu, muzoba muhumanutse, hanyuma mubone kugaruka aho dushagaje." 
Numbers31:25 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers31:26 ati Harūra igitigiri c’iminyago yanyazwe y’abantu n’ibigenda, mwe na Eleyazari umuherezi n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, ukw amazu angana mw ishengero." 
Numbers31:27 Uheze ugabanye iminyago mu bitigiri bibiri bingana; kimwe gihabge abahizi batabarutse, ikindi gihabge ishengero ryose." 
Numbers31:28 Maze mu gitigiri gihawe abahizi batabarutse, munsobanuriremw’ indogōzo yanje, jewe Uhoraho: ibe kimwe‐kimwe mu majana atanu, uhereye ku bantu, no ku nka, no ku ndogoba, no ku mikuku;" 
Numbers31:29 ubikūre mu gitigiri cabo, ubihe Eleyazari umuherezi, bibe ishikanwa munshikaniye." 
Numbers31:30 Kandi mu gitigiri gihawe ishengero ry’ Abisirayeli musobanure kimwe‐kimwe muri mirongwitanu, uhereye ku bantu, no ku nka, no ku ndogoba, no ku mikuku, mbere ku bigenda vyose; ubihe Abalewi, ari bo bājejwe ivy’ ihema ryanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:31 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi babigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose. 
Numbers31:32 Kand’ iminyago abo bahizi bari banyaze, iyar’ isigaye ikiriho zar’ intama ibihumbi amajana atandatu na mirongwirindwi na bitanu," 
Numbers31:33 n’ inka ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bibiri," 
Numbers31:34 n’indogoba ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na kimwe," 
Numbers31:35 n’ abantu ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri vy’abakobga batigeze kumenya icitwa umugabo. 
Numbers31:36 Igitigiri c’umugabane abatabarutse bahawe car’ intama ibihumbi amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’indwi n’ amajana atanu: 
Numbers31:37 izo Uhoraho yirogōjemwo zar’ amajana atandatu na mirongwirindwi na zitanu; 
Numbers31:38 inka na zo bahawe zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitandatu; izo Uhoraho yirogōje muri zo zari mirongwirindwi na zibiri; 
Numbers31:39 indogoba na zo bahawe zar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’amajana atanu; izo Uhoraho yirogōje muri zo zari mirongwitandatu n’imwe. 
Numbers31:40 Mu bantu banyaze, abo bahawemwo bār’ ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu; abo Uhoraho yirogōje muri bo bari mirongwitatu na babiri." 
Numbers31:41 Nuko Mose ashikiriza Eleyazari umuherezi izo ndogōzo, ni ryo shikanwa ryari rigerewe Uhoraho, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Numbers31:42 Umugabane w’abandi Bisirayeli, uwo Mose yashigaje ku wo abatabarutse bahawe," 
Numbers31:43 uwo mugabane w’ishengero war’ intama ibihumbi amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’indwi n’amajana atanu," 
Numbers31:44 n’inka ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitandatu," 
Numbers31:45 n’indogoba ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’amajana atanu," 
Numbers31:46 n’abantu ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu. 
Numbers31:47 Nuko kur’ uwo mugabane w’Abisirayeli Mose akūra kimwe‐kimwe muri mirongwitanu, uhēreye ku bantu no ku bigenda vyose, abiha Abalewi, ari bo bājejwe ivy’ ingoro y’Uhoraho, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaramubariye." 
Numbers31:48 Maz’ abagabisha b’imitwe y’ingabo, abagaba ibihumbi n’ abagaba amajana, bēgēra Mose," 
Numbers31:49 baramubarira, bati Twebge abasavyi bawe twaharūye ingabo tugaba, dusanga ntihabuzemwo n’umwe, uko tungana." 
Numbers31:50 None tuzaniye Uhoraho ishikanwa ry’ utugenegene tw’izahabu ku vyo twaronse: utwambarwa mu bizigira no ku maboko, n’impeta, n’ utwo kwambara ku matwi, n’utwo mw izosi, vyo gutangakw impongano y’amagara yacu imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers31:51 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi babākīrira ayo mazahabu: yose yar’ utugenegene tw’uducurano. 
Numbers31:52 Ayo mazahabu yose, ayo bagereye gushikanira Uhoraho, abo bagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana bashikanye, uburemerezi bgayo bgari shekeli ibihumbi cumi na bitandatu n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitanu." 
Numbers31:53 Kuk’ umuntu wese mur’ izo ngabo yari yisahuriye isahu. 
Numbers31:54 Nuko Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi bākīra ayo mazahabu y’abo bagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, bayajana mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngw abere Abisirayeli icibutso co kwibukwako imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers32:1 Abareyubeni n’Abagadi bari bafise ibitayega vy’isinzi. Babonye igihugu c’i Yazeri n’ic’i Gileyadi kw ar’ ahantu h’amaragiro meza," 
Numbers32:2 abo Bagadi n’ Abareyubeni baragenda babarira Mose na Eleyazari umuherezi n’ abakuru b’ishengero," 
Numbers32:3 bati Ataroti n’i Diboni n’i Yazeri n’i Nimura n’i Heshiboni n’i Eleyale n’i Sebamu n’i Nebo n’i Beyoni," 
Numbers32:4 igihugu Uhoraho yaneshereje ishengero ry’Abisirayeli, n’igihugu c’amaragiro, kandi twebge abasavyi bawe tur’ abanyenka." 
Numbers32:5 Bati Namb’ utugiriye neza, emera ko duhabga iki gihugu kw ishamvu, twebge abasavyi bawe: nturinde kutujabutsa Yorodani." 
Numbers32:6 Mose yishura Abagadi n’Abareyubeni, ati None se bene wanyu baze baje mu ntambara, namwe mwiyicariye hano?" 
Numbers32:7 N’iki gitumye murandura imitima y’Abisirayeli, kugira ngo ntibajabuke ngo baje mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahaye?" 
Numbers32:8 Uko ni ko na ba so bakoze, hamwe nabatuma gutata ico gihugu, nd’i Kadeshi‐baruneya." 
Numbers32:9 Kukw igihe bādūga, bakaja mu gihogoro citwa Eshikoli, bakitegereza ico gihugu, bāhavuye barandura imitima y’Abisirayeli, ngo boye kuja mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahaye." 
Numbers32:10 Maz’ uburake bg’ Uhoraho bgaciye buziriringa kur’ uwo musi, ararahira," 
Numbers32:11 ati N’ ukuri hakazogira n’umwe mu bagabo bādūze bava muri Egiputa, uhēreye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, azobona ico gihugu nari nararahiye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo ko nzokibaha, kuko batankurikiye muri vyose;" 
Numbers32:12 ati Shiti Kalebu mwene Yefune Umukenizi, na Yosuwa mwene Nuni, kuko bo bankurikiye muri vyose." 
Numbers32:13 Nuk’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli, abaha kuyerēra mu bugaragwa hirya no hino kumara imyaka mirongwine, gushitsa ah’ urwo runganwe rwose rw’abakoze ibibi imbere y’Uhoraho rwakunkumukiye." 
Numbers32:14 None namwe musubiye mu gishingo ca ba so, mur’ uruvyaro rw’inkozi z’ibibi, kugira ngo mwongereze uburake bg’Uhoraho arakiye Abisirayeli." 
Numbers32:15 Kuko ni mwakīkama, mukareka kumukurikira, na we azokwongera kurekera Abisirayeli mu bugaragwa ukundi gusha, namwe muzoba mwicishije iri hanga ryose." 
Numbers32:16 Maze baramwēgēra, baramubgira, bat’ Erega hano twohaca amarāro gusa y’amasho yacu n’imikuku, tukubaka n’ibisagara vy’aho dusiga abana;" 
Numbers32:17 ariko twebge ubgacu tuzoba twiteguye ibirwanishwa, kugira ngo tugende imbere y’abandi Bisirayeli, gushitsa aho tuzoba tumaze kubashikana ahabo; kand’ abana bacu basigare baba mu bisagara bizitiwe kubgo gutinya ben’ igihugu." 
Numbers32:18 Ntituzoruha tugaruka mu ngo zacu, umuntu wese mu Bisirayeli atarashikīra ishamvu yiwe." 
Numbers32:19 Erega tweho nta shamvu tuziga hamwe na bo hakurya ya Yorodani, canke hirya yaho, kukw ishamvu yacu tuyihawe ngaha hakuno ya Yorodani, ahahera i burasirazuba." 
Numbers32:20 Mose arabishura, ati Ni mwakora murtyo, mugahitana ibirwanishwa mukaja mu ntambara imbere y’Uhoraho," 
Numbers32:21 umuntu wese muri mwebge mukajabuka Yorodani imbere y’Uhoraho mwitwaje ibirwanishwa, mukageza ah’ azoba amaze kwirukana abansi biwe," 
Numbers32:22 agatsinda ico gihugu; hanyuma muzobona kugaruka, ata gicumuro muriko imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’Abisirayeli; kand’ iki gihugu kizoba ishamvu yanyu imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Numbers32:23 Ariko ni mutākora murtyo, muzoba mucumuye k’Uhoraho; kandi mumenye neza yukw icaha canyu kizobahama." 
Numbers32:24 Nuko ni mwubake ibisagara vy’aho musiga abana, muce n’amarāro y’intama zanyu; muheze mukore ivyo muvuze." 
Numbers32:25 Abagadi n’Abareyubeni bishura Mose, bati Mugenzi, twebge abasavyi bawe tuzokora nk’uk’ utubariye." 
Numbers32:26 Abana bacu n’abagore bacu n’imikuku yacu n’ amatungo yacu yose bizoguma ngaha mu bisagara vy’i Gileyadi; 
Numbers32:27 ariko twebge abasavyi bawe tuzojabuka, twitwaje ibirwanishwa vy’intambara uko tungana, tuje mu rugamba imbere y’Uhoraho, nk’uk’ uvuze, mugenzi." 
Numbers32:28 Nuko Mose ashikiriza ivyabo Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, ukw amazu angana mu miryango y’Abisirayeli;" 
Numbers32:29 arababarira, at’ Abagadi n’ Abareyubeni ni bajabukana namwe Yorodani, bitwaje ibirwanishwa vy’intambara imbere y’Uhoraho, igihugu mukagitsinda; nuko muze mubahe igihugu c’i Gileyadi kw ishamvu." 
Numbers32:30 Ariko ni batajabukana namwe bitwaje ibirwanishwa, baze bahabge ishamvu muri mwebge mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Numbers32:31 Abagadi n’Abareyubeni baramwishura, bati Nk’uk’ Uhoraho atubariye, twebge abasavyi bawe, ni ko tuzobigenza." 
Numbers32:32 Tuzojabuka twitwaje ibirwanishwa imbere y’Uhoraho, tuje mu gihugu c’i Kanani, arikw ishamvu twegukiye tuzoyigira hakuno ya Yorodani." 
Numbers32:33 Nukw Abagadi n’Abareyubeni n’igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase mwene Yosefu, Mose abaha igihugu ca Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, n’igihugu ca Ogi umwami w’i Bashani; igihugu cose akibahāna n’ibisagara vyaco n’intara zavyo, ukw ivyo bisagara bigikwiragiyemwo." 
Numbers32:34 Abagadi bubaka i Diboni, n’i Ataroti, n’i Aroweri," 
Numbers32:35 n’i Ataroti‐shofani, n’i Yazeri, n’i Yogibeha," 
Numbers32:36 n’i Beti‐nimura, n’i Beti‐harani: ivyo bisagara bavyubakira inzitiro z’ amabuye, bacira amasho yabo amarāro." 
Numbers32:37 Abareyubeni bubaka i Heshiboni, n’i Eleyale, n’i Kiriyatayimu," 
Numbers32:38 n’i Nebo, n’i Bayali‐meyoni, bahindura amazina yavyo; bubaka n’i Sibuma: ivyo bisagara bubatse bavyita ayandi mazina." 
Numbers32:39 Aba Makiri mwene Manase baja i Gileyadi, barahatsinda, birukana Abamori bāhaba." 
Numbers32:40 Nuko Mose aha aba Makiri mwene Manase i Gileyadi, barahagerēra." 
Numbers32:41 Kandi Yayiri wo mu ba Manase na we aragenda, atsinda ibisagara vyaho, avyita ibisagara vya Yayiri." 
Numbers32:42 Na Noba aragenda, atsinda i Kenati n’imihana ihereranye na ho, ahita i Noba kimwe n’izina ryiwe." 
Numbers33:1 Izi ni zo ndāro z’Abisirayeli, uhereye aho baviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ukw ingabo zabo zari ziri, barōngōwe na Mose na Aroni." 
Numbers33:2 Mose yandika ingendo zabo, uko bāgenda batāhīra, abibariwe n’Uhoraho: izi ni zo ndāro zabo, nk’ukw ingendo zabo zari ziri." 
Numbers33:3 Bāvudutse i Ramesesi mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi na gatanu: Pasika iraye iheze, Abisirayeli bavayo bakobagurije Abanyegiputa bose, bagenda babarorēra." 
Numbers33:4 Basiga Abanyegiputa bagihamba imfura zabo zose, Uhoraho yatsinze hagati muri bo; kand’ Uhoraho yari yaciriyekw iteka imana zabo." 
Numbers33:5 Nukw Abisirayeli ni kwo kuvuduka i Ramesesi, basagaza i Sukoti." 
Numbers33:6 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Etamu, ah’ ubugaragwa butangurira." 
Numbers33:7 Bavuduka muri Etamu, barakebanuka, baja i Pi‐hahiroti, aharābana n’i Bayali‐sefoni, basagaza imbere y’i Migidoli." 
Numbers33:8 Bavuduka imbere y’i Pi‐hahiroti, baca hagati mu kiyaga, bafata ubugaragwa; bagenda urugendo rw’imisi itatu mur’ ubgo bugaragwa bgo muri Etamu, basagaza i Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Bavudukayo, bashika muri Elimu; kandi muri Elimu hār’ amariba cumi n’abiri, n’ibigazi mirongwirindwi, barahasagaza." 
Numbers33:10 Bavudukayo, basagaza ku Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Numbers33:11 Bavudukayo, basagaza mu bugaragwa bg’i Sini." 
Numbers33:12 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Dofuka." 
Numbers33:13 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Alushi." 
Numbers33:14 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Refidimu, abantu basanga hatagira amazi yo kunywa." 
Numbers33:15 Bavudukayo, basagaza mu bugaragwa bg’i Sinayi." 
Numbers33:16 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Kiburoti‐hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Haseroti." 
Numbers33:18 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Ritima." 
Numbers33:19 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Rimoni‐Peresi." 
Numbers33:20 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Libuna." 
Numbers33:21 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Bavudukayo, basagaza ku musozi Sheferi." 
Numbers33:24 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Makeloti." 
Numbers33:26 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Tahati." 
Numbers33:27 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Mitika." 
Numbers33:29 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Hashimona." 
Numbers33:30 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Moseroti." 
Numbers33:31 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Bene‐yakani." 
Numbers33:32 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Hori‐hagidigadi." 
Numbers33:33 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Yotibata." 
Numbers33:34 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Aburona." 
Numbers33:35 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Esiyoni‐geberi." 
Numbers33:36 Bavudukayo, basagaza mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, ari ho i Kadeshi." 
Numbers33:37 Bavuduka i Kadeshi, basagaza ku musozi Hori, ku rubibe rw’igihugu ca Edomu." 
Numbers33:38 Aroni umuherezi adūga uwo musozi Hori, abibariwe n’Uhoraho, agwayo, hāri mu mwaka ugira mirongwine uhēreye ah’ Abisirayeli bāviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu kwezi kwa gatanu, ku musi wakwo wa mbere." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni yar’ amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri n’itatu igihe yapfira kur’ uwo musozi Hori. 
Numbers33:40 Umwami w’i Aradi w’Umunyakanani, w’i Negebu ho mu gihugu c’i Kanani, yumva kw Abisirayeli baje." 
Numbers33:41 Bavuduka kur’ uwo musozi Hori, basagaza i Salumona." 
Numbers33:42 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Punoni." 
Numbers33:43 Bavudukayo, basagaza ahitwa Oboti." 
Numbers33:44 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Iye‐abarimu ku rubibe rw’i Mowabu." 
Numbers33:45 Bavudukayo, basagaza i Diboni‐gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Bavudukayo, basagaza muri Alumoni‐dibulatayimu." 
Numbers33:47 Bavudukayo, basagaza mu misozi yo muri Abarimu, aharābana n’i Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Bavudukayo, basagaza mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Mu gusagaza bagendana Yorodani, bāhēreye i Beti‐yeshimoti bakageza ahitwa Abeli‐shitimu, mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu." 
Numbers33:50 Uhoraho abaririra Mose mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko," 
Numbers33:51 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwajabuka Yorodani, mugashika mu gihugu c’i Kanani," 
Numbers33:52 muze mwirukane ben’ ico gihugu bose, mumenagure ibibuye vyabo vyose bikorogoshoyekw ibishushanyo, mumenagure n’ibishushanyo vyabo vyose vyavugutiwe mu nkero, mukomvomvore ibitabo vyabo vyose vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi;" 
Numbers33:53 muheze mwegukire ico gihugu, kukw ari mwebge ngihaye kw ishamvu." 
Numbers33:54 Kandi muzokwegurirwa ico gihugu n’ubupfindo, nk’ukw imiryango yanyu iri; umuryango munini muze muwuhe ishamvu nini, umutoya muze muwuhe ishamvu ntoya; ah’ ubupfindo buzokubitira umuntu amabango az’ abe ari ho haba ahiwe; muze mwegukire ahanyu nk’ukw imiryango ya ba sogokuruza iri." 
Numbers33:55 Na ho ni mutirukana ben’ ico gihugu, abo muzosiga muri bo bazobamerera nk’amahwa abahanda mu maso, nk’ibisaganga mu mbavu zanyu, bababere ivyago mur’ ico gihugu mugiye kubamwo." 
Numbers33:56 Kand’ ivyo nari ngeneye abo, nzobisubiza kuri mwebge." 
Numbers34:1 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers34:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwashika mu gihugu c’i Kanani, ari co gihugu muzohabga kw ishamvu iyo kiva kikagera," 
Numbers34:3 urubibe rw’aho muzogeza ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko ruze ruhēre mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, rugende rubangikanye n’igihugu ca Edomu. Urwo rubibe rwanyu rw’i bumanuko ruze ruhēre kw iherezo ry’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu ahahera i burasirazuba;" 
Numbers34:4 ruheze rukebanuke, ruce hirya y’umudūgo w’i Akurabimu ahahera i bumanuko, rugende rushike i Zini, rugarukire hirya y’i Kadeshi‐baruneya ahahera i bumanuko nyene; ruheze rugende rushike i Hasaradari, rukomeze rushike muri Asimoni:" 
Numbers34:5 ruvuye muri Asimoni, rukebanuke, rushike ku mugezi wa Egiputa, rugarukire ku Kiyaga Kinini." 
Numbers34:6 Urubibe rw’i burengerazuba ruze rube ico Kiyaga Kinini nyene: kuri co az’ abe ari ho mugarukira; ico kize kibe urubibe rwanyu ahahera i burengerazuba. 
Numbers34:7 Urubibe rwanyu rw’i burārūko ruze rube uru: muhēreye ku Kiyaga Kinini murucishe ku musozi Hori; 
Numbers34:8 muhēreye ku musozi Hori murucishe ahafata i Hamati, rugarukire i Sedadi;" 
Numbers34:9 ruheze rugende rushike i Zifuroni, rugarukire i Hasar‐enani: urwo ruze rube urubibe rwanyu rw’i burārūko." 
Numbers34:10 Urubibe rwanyu rw’i burasirazuba, muhēreye i Hasar‐enani nyene muze murucishe i Shefamu;" 
Numbers34:11 ruvudutse i Shefamu, rumanuke, rushike i Ribula, hirya ya Ayini ahahera i burasirazuba; ruheze rumanuke rujane inkōkoro y’ikiyaga Kinereti ihera i burasirazuba;" 
Numbers34:12 rumanuke rujane Yorodani, rugarukire ku Kiyaga c’ Umunyu. Ico ni co kizoba igihugu canyu, ukw imbibe zaco zigikīkūje impande zose." 
Numbers34:13 Mose abishikiriza Abisirayeli, at’ Ico ni co gihugu muzohabga kw ishamvu, mukigabanganijwe n’ ubupfindo, ico Uhoraho yageze ko gihabga imiryango cenda n’igihimba;" 
Numbers34:14 kuk’ umuryango w’ Abareyubeni, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, n’uw’ Abagadi, nk’ ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, n’igihimba gisigaye c’umuryango w’Abamanase, bamaze guhabga amashamvu yabo." 
Numbers34:15 Iyo miryango, ukw ar’ ibiri n’igihimba, bamaze guhabga amashamvu yabo hakuno ya Yorodani aharābana n’i Yeriko, ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba." 
Numbers34:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers34:17 at’ Aya ni yo mazina y’abantu bazobagabanganya igihugu kw amashamvu: Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni. 
Numbers34:18 Muze mukūre umukuru umwe‐umwe mu muryango wose, kugira ngo bagabanganye igihugu kw amashamvu." 
Numbers34:19 Aya ni yo mazina y’abo bantu: mu muryango w’Abayuda ni Kalebu mwene Yefune; 
Numbers34:20 mu muryango w’Abasimeyoni ni Shemuweli mwene Amihudi; 
Numbers34:21 mu muryango w’Ababenyamini ni Elidadi mwene Kisiloni; 
Numbers34:22 mu muryango w’Abadani umukuru az’ abe Buki mwene Yogili; 
Numbers34:23 mu Bayosefu baze babe aba: mu muryango w’ Abamanase umukuru az’ abe Haniyeli mwene Efodi; 
Numbers34:24 mu muryango w’Abefurayimu umukuru az’ abe Kemuweli mwene Shifutani; 
Numbers34:25 mu muryango w’Abazebuloni umukuru az’ abe Elisafani mwene Parunaki; 
Numbers34:26 mu muryango w’ Abisakari umukuru az’ abe Palutiyeli mwene Azani; 
Numbers34:27 mu muryango w’Abasheri umukuru az’ abe Ahihudi mwene Shelomi; 
Numbers34:28 mu muryango w’Abanafutali umukuru az’ abe Pedaheli mwene Amihudi. 
Numbers34:29 Abo ni bo Uhoraho yageze kugabanganya Abisirayeli amashamvu yabo mu gihugu c’i Kanani. 
Numbers35:1 Uhoraho abaririra Mose mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko," 
Numbers35:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli baze bahe Abalewi ibisagara vyo kubamwo, babisobanuye mu mashamvu yabo beguriwe; uti Mubahe n’amaragiro inyuma y’ivyo bisagara impande zose." 
Numbers35:3 Ivyo bisagara bize bibe ivyabo vyo kubamwo, amaragiro na yo az’ abe ay’amasho yabo n’ibitungwa vyabo n’ibindi baragiye vyose." 
Numbers35:4 Uti Kand’ amaragiro y’ivyo bisagara muzoha Abalewi az’ ahēre ku ruzitiro rw’ igisagara agende aja hirya, amatambge igihumbi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, birtyo birtyo impande zose." 
Numbers35:5 Uti Kand’ inyuma y’igisagara i burasirazuba, amakīka muze mugere amatambge ibihumbi bibiri, amakīka y’i bumanuko abe ibihumbi bibiri nyene, ay’ i burengerazuba abe ibihumbi bibiri, n’ay’ i burārūko ibihumbi bibiri nyene; igisagara kibe hagati. Ayo ni yo azoba amaragiro yo ku bisagara vyabo." 
Numbers35:6 Uti Kandi mu bisagara muzoha Abalewi, bitandatu muri vyo bize bibe ivy’ ubuhungiro, ivyo mushizeho kugira ng’uwishe umuntu ahungireyo; uti Kandi mubahe ibindi mirongwine na bibiri bigeretse kur’ ivyo." 
Numbers35:7 Nukw ibisagara muzoha Abalewi vyose na vyose bize bibe mirongwine n’umunani; uti Muze mubitangane n’amaragiro agendanye na vyo. 
Numbers35:8 Ibisagara muzobasobanurira bivuye ku mashamvu y’Abisirayeli, abenshi mubāke vyinshi, abake mubāke bike; umuryango wose, ukw ishamvu yabo ingana, abe ari ko baha Abalewi ku bisagara vyabo." 
Numbers35:9 Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Numbers35:10 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Ni mwajabuka Yorodani, mugashika mu gihugu c’i Kanani," 
Numbers35:11 muze mwirobanurire ibisagara, ngo bize bibe ibisagara vy’ubuhungiro, kugira ng’ umukoracumu yishe umuntu atabigize ibigirankana, ahungireyo." 
Numbers35:12 Ivyo bisagara bizobabera ubuhungiro bgo guhunga umuhōzi, kugira ng’ uwo mukoracumu ntapfe atarahagarara imbere y’ikombe ngw acirwe urubanza." 
Numbers35:13 Uti Mu bisagara muzobaha, bitandatu bize bibabere ibisagara vy’ubuhungiro." 
Numbers35:14 Muze mushireh’ ibisagara bitatu hakuno ya Yorodani, bindi bitatu mu gihugu c’i Kanani; bize bibe ibisagara vy’ubuhungiro." 
Numbers35:15 Ivyo bisagara bize bibere Abisirayeli ubuhungiro, bo n’umunyamahanga n’inyambukira bari muri bo; kugira ng’ umukoracumu yishe umuntu atabigize ibigirankana, ahungireyo." 
Numbers35:16 Ariko ni yaba yamukubise ikintu c’icuma, akagwaho, azoba ar’ umwicanyi: kand’ umwicanyi ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Numbers35:17 Canke ni yaba yamuhondesheje ibuye afise mu ntoke, ryoshobora kwica umuntu, akagwaho, azoba ar’ umwicanyi: kand’ umwicanyi ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Numbers35:18 Canke ni yaba yamukubise ikintu c’igiti afise mu ntoke, coshobora kwica umuntu, akagwaho, azoba ar’umwicanyi: kand’ umwicanyi ntaz’ abure kwicwa." 
Numbers35:19 Ūhōra uwishwe az’ abe ari we amwica ubgiwe: aho bazohūrira, amwice." 
Numbers35:20 Canke ni yaba yamucuranguje kubg’ urwanko, cank’ akamutera ikintu yamuryamiye, akagwaho;" 
Numbers35:21 cank’ akamukubita igipfunsi kubg’ ubgansi, akagwaho; uyo amwishe ntaz’ abure kwicwa: azoba ar’ umwicanyi. Ūhōra uwishwe az’ amwice aho bazohūrira hose." 
Numbers35:22 Mugabo, ni yaba yamucuranguje atavyitumye, atabitewe n’urwanko, canke ni yaba yamuteye ikintu atamuryamiye," 
Numbers35:23 canke ni yaba yamuteye ibuye ryoshobora kwica umuntu, atamubona, akagwaho, kand’ atar’ asanzwe ar’ umwansi wiwe, atārondera kumugirira nabi;" 
Numbers35:24 abanyekombe baze bacire urubanza uwishe n’ ūhōra uwishwe, ruhwanye n’ayo mabgirizwa;" 
Numbers35:25 bakize uwo mukoracumu, bamukūre mu maboko y’ūmuhōra uwo yishe, bamusubize mu gisagara c’ubuhungiro aho yari yahungiye; az’ abe ari ho aba gushitsa ah’ umuherezi mukuru, yasutswekw amavuta yejejwe yo kumurobanura, azopfira." 
Numbers35:26 Arik’ uwo mukoracumu ni yahīrahīra akarengana urugabano rw’igisagara abamwo c’ubuhungiro, aho yahungiye," 
Numbers35:27 ūhōra uwishwe akamusanga inyuma y’urugabano rw’ico gisagara abamwo c’ubuhungiro, akamwica, amaraso y’uwo mukoracumu ntazomusubirako;" 
Numbers35:28 kuko yar’ akwiye kuguma mur’ ico gisagara yabamwo c’ubuhungiro gushitsa ah’umuherezi mukuru azopfira. Arik’ umuherezi mukuru amaze gupfa, uwo mukoracumu azobona gusubira i we mw ishamvu yiwe." 
Numbers35:29 Ivyo bize bibabere ibgirizwa muzohora mukurikira mu guca imanza, ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwanyu bizogenda bikurikirana aho muba hose." 
Numbers35:30 Ni hagira uwica uwundi, uwo mwicanyi aze yicishwe n’ivyabona bimwagirije; arikw icabona kimwe ntikize cagirize umuntu ngo yicwe." 
Numbers35:31 Kandi ntimuze mwemere ivyo gucungura umwicanyi yar’ akwiye gupfa: aze yicwe nta kabuza. 
Numbers35:32 Kandi ntimuze mwemere ivyo gucungura uwahungiye mu gisagara c’ubuhungiro, ngw asubire kwībēra i wabo mu gihugu, umuherezi atarapfa." 
Numbers35:33 Nuko ntimuze muhumanye igihugu murimwo; kukw amaraso ari yo ahumanya igihugu; kandi nta mpongano yaco yo kugihongera kubg’ ayo maraso yakiviriyemwo, atar’ amaraso y’uwayavishije." 
Numbers35:34 Ntimuze muhumanye igihugu muzobamwo, ico nzoba ndimwo hagati: kuko jewe Uhoraho mba hagati mu Bisirayeli." 
Numbers36:1 Abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bo mu muryango wa Gileyadi mwene Makiri, Makiri mwene Manase, umwe mu miryango ya Yosefu, bīgira hafi, bavugira imbere ya Mose n’abatware, ari bo bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza y’Abisirayeli," 
Numbers36:2 bati Mugenzi, Uhoraho yakubariye kugabuza igihugu ubupfindo, ng’ ugihe Abisirayeli kw amashamvu; kandi mugenzi, Uhoraho yakubariye guha abakobga ba Selofehadi mwene wacu ishamvu yiwe." 
Numbers36:3 None ni barongorwa n’umuntu wese wo mu yindi miryango y’ Abisirayeli, ishamvu yabo izokūrwa kw ishamvu ya ba sogokuruza, ishirwe kw ishamvu y’ umuryango bazojamwo: nukw izoba ikūwe ku mugabane twahawe kw ishamvu." 
Numbers36:4 Maz’ umwaka wa yubile y’Abisirayeli ni washika, ishamvu yabo izoshirwa kw ishamvu y’umuryango bazoba baragiyemwo; nukw ishamvu yabo izoba ikūwe kw ishamvu y’umuryango wa ba sogokuruza." 
Numbers36:5 Nuko Mose ashikiriza Abisirayeli ivyo Uhoraho amubariye, at’ Ab’ umuryango w’Abayosefu, ivyo bavuze n’ivy’ ukuri." 
Numbers36:6 Iki ni co cagezwe Uhoraho ashinze ku vy’abakobga ba Selofehadi, ati Bararongorwa n’abo bagomba: ariko bo mu nzu yo mu muryango wa se." 
Numbers36:7 Ntihaze hagire ishamvu iva mu muryango ngw ije mu wundi; arik’ umuntu wese wo mu Bisirayeli aze yame yīzīziye ishamvu yo mu muryango wa ba sekuruza. 
Numbers36:8 Umukobga wese azogira ishamvu mu muryango wose w’Abisirayeli, az’ arongorwe n’uwo mu nzu yo mu muryango wa se, kugira ng’umuntu wese mu Bisirayeli agire ishamvu ya ba sekuruza." 
Numbers36:9 Ntihaze hagire ishamvu iva mu muryango ngw ije mu wundi; kukw imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli izoba ikwiye kwīzīzira amashamvu yayo ubgayo. 
Numbers36:10 Nukw abo bakobga ba Selofehadi babigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose. 
Numbers36:11 Makila na Tirusa na Hogila na Miluka na Nowa, abo bene Selofehadi, barongorwa na basazabo." 
Numbers36:12 Barongorwa n’abo mu mazu y’aba Manase mwene Yosefu, bituma ishamvu yabo iguma mu nzu ya se, mu muryango wabo." 
Numbers36:13 Ivyo ni vyo vyagezwe n’amabgirizwa Mose yashikirije Abisirayeli atumwe n’Uhoraho, bari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu kuri Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aya ni yo majambo Mose yabaririye Abisirayeli bose hakuno ya Yorodani mu bugaragwa, mu kiyaya citwa Araba, aharābana n’i Sufu, hagati y’i Parani n’i Tofeli n’i Labani n’i Haseroti n’i Di‐zahabu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Uvuye i Horebu, ukaja ī Kadeshi‐baruneya, uciye ku musozi Seyiri, n’urugendo rw’ imisi cumi n’umwe." 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mu mwaka wa mirongwine, mu kwezi kw’icumi na rimwe, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, ni ho Mose yabaririye Abisirayeli ivyo Uhoraho yamugeze kubabgira vyose;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 amaze gutsinda Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yaba i Heshiboni, na Ogi umwami w’i Bashani yaba ahitwa Ashitaroti n’ahitwa Edireyi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Hakuno ya Yorodani, mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, ni ho Mose yatanguriye gusobanura ibi vyagezwe," 
Deuteronomy1:6 at’ Uhoraho Imana yacu yatubaririye i Horebu, at’ Igihe mumaze kur’ uyu musozi kirahāgīje:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 ni mukebanuke, mufate inzira, muje mu mugamba w’Abamori n’ahandi hose hahereranye na ho mu kiyaya citwa Araba, hose mu mugamba n’ahaciye bugufi, n’i Negebu, no mu kiyaya c’ikiyaga mu gihugu c’Abanyakanani, n’i Lebanoni, muze murinde mushitsa ku ruzi runini Efurate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ati Nuko rāba, igihugu ndakibashize imbere, ni mucinjire, mucegukire, igihugu jewe Uhoraho narahiye ba sogokuruza banyu, Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo, ko nzobaha, bo n’uruvyaro rwabo ruzobakurikira." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Maze nanje ico gihe narababgiye, nti Sinshobora kubaterura jenyene." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Nt’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yarabagwije, non’ ehe rāba munganya ubginshi n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Nt’ Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sogokuruza, arakabagwiza gushitsa ibihetangabo igihumbi, abahezagire, nk’uko yabasezeraniye!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Nti None noshobora nte guterura jenyene ukugorana kwanyu n’uburemerezi bganyu n’ ugutongana kwanyu? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nti Ni mutoranye mu miryango yanyu abantu b’ubgenge, bazi gusobanukirwa, bamenyekana, ndabagire abakuru bo kubaganza." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Namwe muranyishura, mut’ Inama yawe ni nziza." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Nuko rero ntoranya abakuru mu miryango yanyu, abantu b’ubgenge bamenyekana, mbagira abakuru bo kubaganza, bamwe igihumbi‐igihumbi, abandi ijana‐ijana, abandi mirongwitanu‐itanu, abandi cumi‐cumi, ngo babarōngōre nk’ukw imiryango yanyu ingana." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Kandi mur’ ico gihe nihanikirije abacamanza banyu, nti Ni mwumvirize imanza za bene wanyu, mucire urw’ ukuri umuntu na mugenzi we, cank’ umuntu avuganye n’umunyamahanga aba i we." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Nti Ntimuze muce urwa nkunzi, nt’ Ariko muze mwumvirize aboroshe n’abahambaye, mubanganye: nti Ntimuze mutinye umuntu ku kigohe, kukw imanza ar’ iz’ Imana. Nti Kand’ urubanza ruzobananira, muze murunzanire, ndarwumvirize, ndaruce." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Nukw ico gihe nabageze ivyo mukwiye gukora vyose. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Nuko tuvuduka i Horebu, duca muri bga bugaragwa bunini buteye ubgoba, turaburangiza, nk’ uko mwabibonye; tujana inzira irora mu mugamba w’Abamori, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu yatugeze; dushika i Kadeshi‐baruneya." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Maze ndababarira, nt’ Aha mushitse ni mu mugamba w’Abamori, igihugu Uhoraho Imana yacu aduhaye." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Nti Rāba, Uhoraho Imana yanyu ico gihugu akibashize imbere; nti Dūga mucinjire, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza yababariye; nti Ntimutinye, ntimuranduke imitima." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Maze muraheza mwese muza kuri jewe, mut’ Enda dutume abatasi, babanze kudutatira ico gihugu, bagaruke batubarire inzira twodūgana, n’ibisagara tuzoshikirak’ uko bimeze." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Iyo nama nca ndayishima, mbatoranyamw’ abantu cumi na babiri, umwe‐umwe ukw imiryango yanyu ingana." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Bafata inzira, badūga uwo mugamba, bashika mu gihogoro citwa Eshikoli, barahatata." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Bamura ku vyo ico gihugu cama, barabituzanira, batubarira inkuru, bat’ Igihugu Uhoraho Imana yacu aduhaye ni ciza." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Yamara mweho ntimwemera kudūga, muragarariza, mwanka icagezwe c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Mwidodombera mu mahema yanyu, mut’ Uhoraho kukw atwanka, ni co catumye adukūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ngw adutange mu maboko y’Abamori, baturandure." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Muti None tudūga tuja hehe? Muti Bagenzi bacu ko baturanduye imitima, ngw Abantu baho ni banini, kandi baradusumba; ngw Ibisagara vyabo ni binini, bizitijwe inzitiro z’ amabuye zigera mw ijuru; ngo Mbere babonyeyo n’Abanaki." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Maze nca ndababarira, nti Ntimuranduke imitima, kandi ntimubagirire ubgoba." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Nt’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, umwe ahora abaja imbere, ni we azobarwanira, nk’uko mwabonye ivyo yabakoreye vyose muri Egiputa," 
Deuteronomy1:31 no mu bugaragwa, aho Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagenda abaterura nk’ uko mubizi, nk’uk’ umugabo aterura umwana wiwe, mu rugendo mwagenze rwose, nti Gushitsa aho mwashikiye aha hantu." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ariko naho vyabaye birtyo, ntimwizeye Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 yahora abaja imbere mu nzira, kugira ngw abaronderere aho mushinga amahema, mw ijoro akagendera mu muriro, kugira ngw abereke inzira mukwiye gucamwo, ku murango akagendera mu gicu." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Maz’ Uhoraho yumvise amagambo yanyu, araraka, ararahira," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ati N’ukuri hakazogira n’umwe wo mur’ aba bantu b’uru runganwe rw’ abanyakibi, azobona igihugu ciza narahiye ko nzoha ba sekuruza;" 
Deuteronomy1:36 Ati Shiti Kalebu mwene Yefune, uyo we azokibona, ati Kandi nzomuha igihugu yaciyemwo, ndagihe n’uruvyaro rwiwe, ati Kuko yankurikiye muri vyose jewe Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Nanje, Uhoraho yandakiye kubganyu, ati Nawe ntuzokijamwo;" 
Deuteronomy1:38 ati Yosuwa mwene Nuni, wa mutumwa wawe, ni we azokijamwo, ati Nuk’ umuremeshe, kukw ari we azocinjiza Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ati Kand’ ibibondo vyanyu, ivyo muvuze ko bizoba abanyagano, n’abana banyu bataraca ubgenge ngo batandukanye ikibi n’iciza, ni bo bazokijamwo, ni bo nzogiha, bacegukire." 
Deuteronomy1:40 At’ Ariko mwebge ni muhindukire, muje mu bugaragwa, mujane inzira ija ku Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Maze murambarira, muti Koko twacumuye k’Uhoraho: turadūze, turwane, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu yatubariye nyene. Nuko mwese muhagatira ibirwanishwa vyanyu, mupfa kugāgaza ngo mudūge uwo mugamba." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Babgire uti Ntimudūge, kandi ntimurwane, kuko ntari muri mwebge, mwoye gutsindwa n’abansi banyu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Nuko ndabibabarira, ntimwavyumvira, ariko mugarariza ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mupfa guhāngāra, mudūga uwo mugamba." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Abamori babayo barabatega, barabarwanya, barabakinagiza, nk’ukw inzuki zikinagiza umuntu, babīca urugenda, kuva i Seyiri gushitsa i Horuma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Maze mugarutse, muririra imbere y’Uhoraho, ariko we ntiyashira umutima ku vyanyu, canke ngw abatege amatwi." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Nuko mumara igihe kirekire i Kadeshi, nk’uko mubizi." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Maze turakevya, tujana inzira ica mu bugaragwa irāba ku Kiyaga Gitukura, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yambariye: tuzenguka umusozi Seyiri igihe kirekire." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Uhoraho arambarira," 
Deuteronomy2:3 at’ Igihe mumaze muzenguka iyi misozi kirahāgije; ni mukevye, mugende mwerekeje i burārūko." 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ati Kand’ ubarire abantu, uti Mugiye guca mu gihugu c’ab’i wanyu ari bo bandurutse kuri Esau, baba i Seyiri; abo bo bazobatinya. Uti Nuko muze mwirinde cane," 
Deuteronomy2:5 ntimubandurutse, uti Kukw atazobaha ku gihugu cabo, naho hoba aho gukandagiza ikirenge; uti Kukw imisozi y’i Seyiri yayihaye Esau kuba ishamvu yiwe." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Uti Muze mubagurekw ivyo kurya mutanze amahera, n’amazi na yo nyene muyagure, kugira ngo muronke ico kurya n’ico kunywa." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Uti Kuko we, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, yama abaha umugisha mu bikorwa vyanyu vyose; uti Kukw azi ivy’ urugendo rwanyu rwo mur’ ubu bugaragwa buhambaye; uti Kand’ ubgiwe, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, yabanye namwe iyi myaka ukw ari mirongwine, nta kintu mwakennye." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Nuko duca mu b’i wacu, ari bo bandurutse kuri Esau, baba i Seyiri, tujanye inzira ica muri Araba, tuvuye muri Elati no muri Esiyoni‐geberi. Turakevya, tujana inzira ica mu bugaragwa bg’i Mowabu." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Uhoraho arambarira, ati Ntimutere Abanyamowabu, ntimubandurutse, kuko ntazobaha ishamvu ku gihugu cabo; ati Kukw ahitwa Ari nahahaye Abaloti kw ishamvu yabo." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Kera Abemi ni bo bāba aho hantu; bār’ ihanga rikomeye, ry’abantu benshi kandi barebare, nk’ukw Abanaki bameze;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 bāvuga kw ar’ Abarefa nk’uko bāvuga Abanaki; arikw Abanyamowabu babita Abemi. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Kandi kera Abahori ni bo bāba i Seyiri, maz’ abandurutse kuri Esau binjira igihugu cabo, barabatikiza, begukira ahantu habo; nk’ukw Abisirayeli bākoze mu gihugu cabo, ico Uhoraho yabahaye kw ishamvu.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Uhoraho arambarira, ati Ni muhaguruke, mujabuke umugezi Zeredi. Nuko duca tujabuka uwo mugezi nyene." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Uhereye igihe twaviriye i Kadeshi‐baruneya, ugashitsa igihe twajabukiye uwo mugezi Zeredi, n’imyaka mirongwitatu n’umunani: urunganwe rwose rw’abari bageze kurwana, gushitsa aho rwakunkumukiye, rugaherengetera aho dushagaje, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabarahiye." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Mber’ Uhoraho yagenda ababanguriye ukuboko, ngw abarandure abakūre muri twebge aho dushagaje, gushitsa aho bakunkumukiye." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Maz’ abāri bageze kurwana bose bamaze guherengetera, bashize mu bantu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Uhoraho arambarira," 
Deuteronomy2:18 at’ Uyu musi mugiye kurengana urubibe rw’i Mowabu, ahitwa Ari;" 
Deuteronomy2:19 kandi ni mwashika ahēgereye urubibe rw’Abamoni, ntimubatere canke ngo mubandurutse; kuko ntazobaha ishamvu ku gihugu c’Abamoni, kuko nagihaye Abaloti kw ishamvu yabo." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Ico gihugu na co cāvugwa kw ar’ ic’ Abarefa, kukw Abarefa bākibamw’ ubga mbere; arikw Abamoni bābita Abazamuzumi;" 
Deuteronomy2:21 bar’ ihanga rikomeye, ry’abantu benshi kandi barebare, nk’ukw Abanaki bameze; arik’ Uhoraho arabatikiza, Abamoni binjira igihugu cabo, begukira ahantu habo;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 nk’uko yatabaye abandurutse kuri Esau baba i Seyiri, hamwe yatikiriza Abahori imbere yabo, bagaheza bakinjira igihugu cabo, bakegukira ahantu habo kugeza n’ ubu." 
Deuteronomy2:23 N’Abawi, imihana yabo yasagaza ikarinda ishika i Gaza, na bo nyene Abakafutori bavuye i Kafutori, bārabatikije, begukira ahantu habo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Uhoraho arambarira, ati Ni muhaguruke, mufate urugendo, mujabuke umwonga wo kuri Arunoni: ehe Sihoni Umwamori, umwami w’i Heshiboni, ndamugabuye mu maboko yanyu, bo n’igihugu ciwe: mutangure kucinjira, mumutēre." 
Deuteronomy2:25 At’ Uyu musi ngira ntangure gutēra ubgoba amahanga yose yo musi y’ ijuru kubganyu, babatinye; bazokwumva inkuru zanyu, bahinde agashitsi, bacike ivutu kubganyu." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Nuko ndi mu bugaragwa bg’i Kedemoti, ntuma intumwa kuri Sihoni, umwami w’i Heshiboni, ngo zimugishe inama y’amahoro," 
Deuteronomy2:27 uti Ni mubareke bace mu gihugu cawe, uti Bazogumya inzira y’ iroro, uti Ntibazokevya ngo baje i buryo cank’ i bumoso." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Ut’ Uz’ ubagurire ivyo kurya amahera, n’amazi na yo nyene uyabagurire, kugira ngo baronke ico kurya n’ico kunywa; ut’ Urabareka bīhitire gusa;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 ut’ Ubagirire nk’ukw aba Esau baba i Seyiri bābagiriye, bo n’Abanyamowabu baba ahitwa Ari; uti Gushitsa aho bazojabukira Yorodani, bakaja mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yabo yabahaye." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Ariko Sihoni, umwami w’i Heshiboni, aratwankira ngo ntiduce mu gihugu ciwe, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yamukomantaje umutima, akawugira nk’ ibuye, kugira ngw amugabure mu maboko yanyu, nk’uko n’ubu vyābaye." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, at’ Ehe kuva ubu ngabuye Sihoni n’igihugu ciwe mu maboko yanyu; ni mutangure kugitēra kugira ngo mubone kucegukira." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Maze Sihoni aza kudutega bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, turumanira i Yahasi." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Uhoraho Imana yacu amugabura mu maboko yacu, tumwicana n’abahungu biwe n’ingabo ziwe zose;" 
Deuteronomy2:34 duca tunesha ibisagara vyiwe vyose, tugeseza igisagara cose, uhereye ku bagabo n’abagore n’abana, ntitwasiga n’uwa kirazira;" 
Deuteronomy2:35 shit’ amasho yonyene ni yo twanyaze, hamwe n’ivyo twasahuye mur’ ivyo bisagara twanesheje." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni, no ku gisagara kiri kur’ uwo mwonga nyene, ugashitsa i Gileyadi, nta gisagara na kimwe catunaniye kubg’ uburebure bg’inzitiro zaco z’amabuye: vyose Uhoraho Imana yacu yabitanze mu maboko yacu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Mugabo, igihugu c’Abamoni co ntimwācēgereye, uhereye no ku mwonga wo kuri Yaboki no ku bisagara vyo mu mugamba waho, n’ahandi hose ah’ Uhoraho Imana yacu yatubujije gutēra." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Turaheza turakebanuka, tujana inzira idūga i Bashani; maze Ogi umwami waho aza kudutega bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, turumanira ahitwa Edireyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Uhoraho arambarira, ati Ntimumutinye, kuko mmugabuye mu maboko yanyu, bo n’abantu biwe bose n’igihugu ciwe; namwe muze mumugirire nk’ivyo mwagiriye Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yaba i Heshiboni." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Nuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu arongera agabura na Ogi umwami w’i Bashani na we mu maboko yacu, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose; turamwica, ntitwasiga n’ uwa kirazira mu bantu biwe." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Duca tunesha ibisagara vyiwe vyose, nta gisagara cabo na kimwe tutanesheje mu bisagara vyose ukw ari mirongwitandatu mu ntāra yose yo muri Arugobu i Bashani, mu gihugu ca Ogi." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Ivyo bisagara vyose vyari bikīkūjwe n’inzitiro ndende z’amabuye zirikw inzugi zugarijwe ibihindizo; hāri n’ibindi bisagara vyinshi cane bitāgira inzitiro. 
Deuteronomy3:6 Turabigeseza rwose, nk’uko twāgize kwa Sihoni umwami w’i Heshiboni, tugeseza igisagara cose, uhereye ku bagabo n’abagore n’ abana." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Arikw amasho yose ni yo twānyaze, bo n’ivyo twasahuye mur’ ivyo bisagara." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Mur’ ico gihe uko ni ko twegukiye ivyo bihugu vy’abo bami b’ Abamori bompi bāri hakuno ya Yorodani, uhereye ku mwonga wo kuri Arunoni ugashitsa ku musozi Herumoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Uwo musozi Herumoni, Abasidoni bawita Siriyoni, Abamori bawita Seniri);" 
Deuteronomy3:10 twegukira n’ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya cose, n’i Gileyadi hose, n’i Bashani hose, gushitsa i Saleka n’ahitwa Edireyi, ibisagara vy’i Bashani mu gihugu ca Ogi." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Kand’ uyo Ogi, umwami w’i Bashani, ni we wenyene yar’ agasigarira k’Abarefa. Uburiri bgiwe bgar’ ubg’ icuma: mbega ntibukir’ i Raba mu Bamoni no kugeza n’ubu? Uburebure bgabgo bgar’ amatambge cenda y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgar’ amatambge ane, nk’ukw itambge ry’ ukuboko risanzwe rireha.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ico gihe tumaze gushikīra ico gihugu, ngiha Abareyubeni n’ Abagadi, uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mwonga wo kuri Arunoni, n’ igice c’umugamba w’i Gileyadi, bo n’ibisagara vyaho;" 
Deuteronomy3:13 igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase ndagiha ikindi gice gisigaye c’i Gileyadi, n’i Bashani hose mu gihugu ca Ogi, ari yo ntāra yose yo muri Arugobu. Aho i Bashani hose bahita igihugu c’ Abarefa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 (Yayiri umwuzukuruza wa Manase ni we yanesheje iyo ntāra yose yo muri Arugobu, ari ho i Bashani, gushitsa ku rubibe rw’Abageshuri n’ Abanyamayaka: ibisagara vyaho avyitiranya n’izina ryiwe, avyita Havoti‐yayiri, nk’uko bicitwa na bugingo n’ubu.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Nuko mpa Abamakiri i Gileyadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Abareyubeni n’Abagadi mbaha igihugu uhereye i Gileyadi ugashitsa ku mwonga wo kuri Arunoni, urubibe rukajana uwo mwonga gushitsa ku ruzi Yaboki, ari rwo rubibe rugarukirakw Abamoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 kandi mbaha n’ikiyaya Araba, urubibe rugarukira kuri Yorodani, uhereye i Kinereti, ugashitsa ku kiyaga co mur’ ico kiyaya Araba, ari co Kiyaga c’Umunyu, kiri musi y’ agahanamo ka Pisiga ahahera i burasirazuba." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Mur’ ico gihe ndababarira, nt’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye iki gihugu ngo mukiganze; nt’ Abahizi mwese ni mujabuke, mwitwaje ibirwanishwa, muje imbere y’Abisirayeli bagenzi banyu." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Nt’ Arikw abagore banyu n’ abana banyu n’inka zanyu bisigare mu bisagara vyanyu mbahaye: nti Ndazi ko mufise inka nyinshi. 
Deuteronomy3:20 Nti Muze mushitse aho Uhoraho azohēra bagenzi banyu gushika hasi nk’uko namwe yabibahaye, bakinjira igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye hakurya ya Yorodani; nti Maze muze mubone kugaruka, umuntu wese mw ishamvu yiwe nabahaye." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Mur’ ico gihe mbarira Yosuwa, nt’ Amaso yawe yiboneye ivyo vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiriye ba bami bompi: nt’ Uko ni kw azogirira abami bose b’ibihugu mugiye kujamwo hakurya." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Nti Ntimuze mubatinye; nti Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we azobarwanira. 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ico gihe ninginga Uhoraho," 
Deuteronomy3:24 nt’ Uhoraho Bgirukiro, jewe umusavyi wawe utanguye kunyereka ububasha bgawe n’ubushobozi bgawe buhambaye. Nti Mbega har’ iyindi mana, yaba iyo mw ijuru canke mw isi, yoshobora gukora ibikorwa n’ibihambaye bihwanye n’ivyo ukora?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Nti Ndakwinginze, nyemerera njabuke ndābe ico gihugu ciza co hakurya ya Yorodani, n’uriya mugamba waho mwiza, n’i Lebanoni." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Arik’ Uhoraho arandakira kubganyu, ntiyanyemerera; arambarira, at’ Ugeze ngaho: ntiwongere kumbarira iryo jambo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 At’ Uradūga ku mpinga ya Pisiga, utereze amaso, urābe i burengerazuba n’i burārūko n’i bumanuko n’i burasirazuba, uharābishe amaso, kuk’ uru Yorodani utazorujabuka." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Arik’ uhanūre Yosuwa, umuremēshe, umutēre gushikama, kukw ari we azorujabuka arōngōye abo bantu, akabinjiza igihugu uzoja kurāba." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Nuko tuguma ku mwonga aharābana n’i Beti‐peyori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 None rero, yemwe Bisirayeli, ni mwumvirize amabgirizwa n’ amatēka ashinzwe mbigisha, muvyitondere; kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mwinjire igihugu Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza yabahaye, mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Ntimuze mwungurire ku vyagezwe mbagera, canke ngo mubigabanye, kugira ngo mubone kwitondera ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu mbagera." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Amaso yanyu yiboneye ivyo Uhoraho yakoze kubga Bayali y’i Peyori; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yaranduye abantu bose bākurikiye Bayali y’i Peyori, akabakūra hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Ariko mweho abīfatanije n’Uhoraho Imana yanyu muracariho mwese no kugeza uyu musi. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Rāba ndabigishije amabgirizwa n’amatēka ashinzwe, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yanje yangeze, kugira ngw abe ari ko muzogenza mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Nuko muze muvyitondere, mubishitse, kukw ivyo ari vyo bizogaragariza ayandi mahanga ubgenge bganyu n’ubunyarutsi bganyu, igihe azokwumva ayo mabgirizwa yose, akavuga, ati N’ukuri iri hanga rihambaye n’ abantu b’abanyabgenge bafise ubunyarutsi." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Mbega har’ ihanga rihambaye rifise imana iri hafi yaryo nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu aba hafi yacu, iyo tumwambaje?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Canke har’ ihanga rihambaye rifise amabgirizwa n’amatēka ashinzwe aroranye, nk’ukw ibi vyagezwe vyose biri, nshize imbere yanyu uyu musi?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Ariko kimwe gusa, mwiyubare, mugire umwete wo kwirinda mu mitima, mwoye kwibagira ivyo amaso yanyu yiboneye, vyoye kuva mu mitima yanyu imisi yose muzoba mukiriho; ariko muze mubimenyeshe abana banyu n’abuzukuru banyu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Kandi ntimwibagire wa musi mwari muhagaze imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu kuri Horebu, igihe Uhoraho yambarira, ati Nkoraniriza abantu, mbacūrire amajambo, kugira ngo bige kunyubaha imisi yose bazomara bakiriho mw isi, bavyigishe n’abana babo;" 
Deuteronomy4:11 namwe mukaza, mugahagarara musi ya wa musozi warik’ urāka umuriro w’imbeya zishika mw ijuru, wubikijek’ umwiza n’igicu c’igipfungu n’umuzimagiza." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Uhoraho yavugiye mur’ uwo muriro ababarira, namwe mwumva ijwi rivuga, ariko ntimwagira ishusho yiwe mubona, mwumvise ijwi gusa." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Abamenyesha isezerano ryiwe, ababarira ngo murishitse, ni vyo vya vyagezwe cumi; avyandika ku bisate vy’amabuye bibiri." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Nanje ico gihe Uhoraho ambarira kubigisha amabgirizwa n’amatēka ashinzwe, kugira ngo muze muvyitondere mushitse mu gihugu mugiye kujabukiramwo ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Nuko mwiyubare cane, kuko mutāgize ishusho mubona na mba, kuri wa musi Uhoraho yababarira ar’ i Horebu, ari hagati mu muriro," 
Deuteronomy4:16 kugira ngo mwoye kwihumanya, mukībāzira igishushanyo, mugishushanije n’ ishusho iy’ ari yo yose, ar’ igishushanijwe mu kigabo canke mu kigore," 
Deuteronomy4:17 canke mu gikōko canke mu gitunzwe kiri kw isi ic’ ari co cose, canke mu kiguruka mu kirere ic’ ari co cose," 
Deuteronomy4:18 ar’ igishushanyo c’ikinyonyera kigendera hasi ic’ ari co cose, canke c’ifi iy’ ari yo yose yo mu mazi yo mu biyaga;"
