Deuteronomy4:19 kandi mwiyubare kugira ngo ni mwararama mukarāba mw ijuru, mukabona izuba n’ukwezi n’inyenyeri, ari zo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru, bize vyoye kubakwega ngo mubisenge, mubisabe, kand’ ari vyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yashiriyeh’ amahanga yose yo musi y’ijuru." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ariko mweho, Uhoraho yarabashīngūye, abakūra muri rya tanure rivugutira ivyuma, ari ryo Egiputa, kugira ngo mumubere abantu yiharije, nk’uko biri n’ ubu." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kand’ Uhoraho yandakiye kubganyu, andahira yuko ntazojabuka Yorodani, ngo nshike mu gihugu ciza Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye kw ishamvu;" 
Deuteronomy4:22 ariko ko nkwiye kuzopfira mur’ iki gihugu, sinjabuke Yorodani: ariko mweho muzorujabuka, mwinjire ico gihugu ciza." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Nuko mwiyubare, mwoye kwibagira isezerano ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu yasezeranye namwe, mukībāzira igishushanyo, mugishushanije n’ ishusho y’ikintu ic’ ari co cose, Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababujije." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ar’ umuriro utōngōra, ar’ Imana ifūha." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Ni mwamara kuvyara abana, mukagira n’abuzukuru, mumaze igihe kirekire mur’ ico gihugu, hanyuma mukihumanya, mukībāzira igishushanyo, mugishushanije n’ikintu ic’ ari co cose, mugakora ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibona kw ari kibi, mukayiratsa;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 uyu musi ntanze ijuru n’isi kw ivyabona yuko mutazobura guhona bidatevye, mugaherengetera mu gihugu mujabuka Yorodani muja kwinjira; ntimuzokirambiramwo, ariko muzorandurwa rwose." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Kand’ Uhoraho azobasābagiriza mu mahanga, kandi muzosigara mur’ inkehwa mur’ ayo mahanga, iyo Uhoraho azoba yarabajanye." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Muzohasabira imana zābājwe n’intoke z’abantu mu biti no mu mabuye, zitaruha zibona canke ngo zumve canke ngo zirye canke ngo zimoterwe." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Arikw iyo ni mwaharonderera Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukamurondeza imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose, muzomubona." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ni mwaramuka mugiye mu vyago, ivyo vyose bikabashikako, amaherezo muzohindukirira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mumwumvire;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ar’ Imana y’inyembabazi, ntizobaheba, ntizobarandura, canke ngo yibagire isezerano yasezeranye na ba sogokuruza, ikabarahira." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Enda bariritsa ivyo mu misi yahise, mutarabaho, muhēreye ku musi Imana yaremeyek’ umuntu mw isi, muhēreye no ku mpera y’ ijuru mukageza ku yindi, yuko higeze kubah’ igihwanye n’iki kintu gikomeye, canke ko humvikanye igihwanye na co." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Mbega har’ aho abantu bīgeze kwumva ijwi ry’Imana iri hagati mu muriro, nk’uko mwebge mwaryumvise, bagaheza bakabaho?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Canke hīgeze kuba imana yagerageje gushingūra ihanga, ikarikūra hagati mu rindi, irikūjeyo kurekura ibigerageza, n’ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, n’intambara, irikūjeyo n’ ukuboko kw’inkomezi kandi kubanguye, n’ibiteye ubgoba bihambaye, nk’ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakoreye muri Egiputa muvyibonera?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Ni mwebge mweretswe ivyo kugira ngo mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana, ata yindi iriho atari we." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Yabumvishije ijwi ryiwe ari mw ijuru, kugira ngw abigishe, kandi yaberekeye kw isi umuriro wiwe uhambaye: mwumva amajambo yiwe ava hagati mur’ uwo muriro." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Kandi kuko yakunda ba sogokuruza banyu, ni co catumye atoranya uruvyaro rwabo, we ubgiwe akabakūra muri Egiputa, abakūjey’ ubushobozi bgiwe buhambaye," 
Deuteronomy4:38 akirukana amahanga imbere yanyu abarusha ubginshi n’inkomezi, ngo mwebge abinjize mu gihugu cabo, akibahe kibe ishamvu yanyu, nk’uko biri n’uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Nuk’ uyu musi mubimenye, mubishirekw imitima, yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana mw ijuru no mw isi, ata yindi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Kandi muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yiwe n’ ivyagezwe vyiwe, ivyo mbagera uyu musi, kugira ngo mube mu vyiza, mwe n’abana banyu bazovuka hanyuma, kugira ngo mwame mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye kugeza ibihe bidashira." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Maze Mose arobanura ibisagara bitatu hakuno ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba," 
Deuteronomy4:42 kugira ng’ uwishe umuntu ahungireyo, amwishe atabigize ibigirankana, adasanzwe amwanka; az’ ahungire muri kimwe mur’ ivyo bisagara, abone gukira." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Kimwe n’i Beseri mu bugaragwa bgo mu kiyaya, c’ubuhungiro bg’Abareyubeni; n’i Ramoti i Gileyadi, c’ubuhungiro bg’Abagadi; n’i Golani i Bashani, c’ ubuhungiro bg’Abamanase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ibi ni vyo vyagezwe Mose yashize imbere y’Abisirayeli," 
Deuteronomy4:45 ari vyo vyashinzwe bo n’amabgirizwa n’amatēka Mose yabashikirije igihe bari bavuye muri Egiputa," 
Deuteronomy4:46 bakiri hakuno ya Yorodani, ku mwonga aharābana n’i Beti‐Peyori, mu gihugu car’ ica Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, yaba i Heshiboni, uwo Mose n’Abisirayeli banesheje, igihe bari baravuye muri Egiputa;" 
Deuteronomy4:47 bakegukira igihugu ciwe n’ica Ogi, umwami w’i Bashani; abo bompi bar’ abami b’Abamori, baganza hakuno ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba," 
Deuteronomy4:48 uhēreye kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni, ugashitsa ku musozi Siriyoni, ari wo Herumoni," 
Deuteronomy4:49 n’ikiyaya Araba cose co hakuno ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba, ugashitsa no ku kiyaga co mur’ ico kiyaya Araba, kiri musi y’agahanamo ka Pisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mose ahamagara Abisirayeli bose, arababarira, ati Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni mwumve amabgirizwa n’ivyagezwe mvugira mu matwi yanyu uyu musi, kugira ngo muvyige, muvyitondere, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Uhoraho Imana yacu yasezeranye natwe isezerano kuri Horebu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ba sogokuruza si bo Uhoraho yasezeranye na bo iryo sezerano, ariko ni twebge abakiriho, turi hano uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Uhoraho yavugiye mu muriro, yivuganira namwe imbonankubone kuri wa musozi." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Nanje nahagaze hagati y’Uhoraho namwe ico gihe, kugira ngo mbashikirize ijambo ryiwe, kuko mwari mutinye uwo muriro, ntimudūge kur’ uwo musozi. Aravuga," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ati Nd’Uhoraho Imana yawe, yagukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Ntukagire izindi mana umbangikanya. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ntukībāzire igishushanyo, cank’ igisa n’ishusho y’ikintu na kimwe kiri hejuru mw ijuru, canke hasi kw isi, canke mu mazi yo mu biyaga;" 
Deuteronomy5:9 ntuz’ uvyikubite imbere, ntuz’ ubisabe, kuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nd’Imana ifūha, mpōra abana ibigabitanyo vya ba se, nkageza ku runganwe rugira gatatu no ku rugira kane rw’abanyanka," 
Deuteronomy5:10 nkagirira īkigongwe abankunda, bakitondera ivyagezwe vyanje, nkageza ku runganwe rwabo uko ruzogenda rukurikirana gushitsa igihumbi." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Ntugapfe kuvuga izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, ku vy’ubusābusa, kuk’ uworivuga ku vy’ubusābusa, jewe Uhoraho ntobura kubimuhōra." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Uze witondere umusi w’isabato, kugira ng’ uwuziririze, nk’ uko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nabikugeze." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Mu misi itandatu az’ abe ari yo ukoreramw’ ibikorwa vyawe vyose: 
Deuteronomy5:14 arik’ umusi ugira indwi ni wo sabato yanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe. Ntukagire igikorwa na kimwe ukora kuri wo, wewe ubgawe, cank’ umuhungu wawe, cank’ umukobga wawe, cank’ umugurano wawe, cank’ umuguranokazi wawe, cank’ inka yawe, cank’ indogoba yawe, cank’ ibitungano vyawe ivy’ ari vyo vyose, cank’ uw’ inyambukīra aba i wawe; kugira ng’ umugurano wawe n’umuguranokazi wawe babone kuruhūka nkawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Kand’ uze wibuke yuko nawe wari mu buja mu gihugu ca Egiputa, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nagukūjey’ ukuboko kw’inkomezi kandi kubanguye; ni co catumye jewe Uhoraho mbikugera kuziririza umusi w’isabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Wubahe so na nyoko, nk’ uko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nabikugeze, kugira ng’ urambire mu gihugu jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nzoguha, uhamererwe neza." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Ntukice. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Kandi ntugasambane. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Kandi ntukibe. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Kandi ntukāgirize ibinyoma mugenzawe. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Kandi ntukifuze umugore wa mugenzawe, ntukifuze inzu ya mugenzawe, cank’ itongo ryiwe, cank’ umugurano wiwe, cank’ umuguranokazi wiwe, cank’ inka yiwe, cank’ indogoba yiwe, cank’ ikintu na kimwe ca mugenzawe." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Ayo majambo Uhoraho yayababgiye mukoraniye hamwe mwese kuri wa musozi, ntiyagira ikindi yongera kuri yo; ayavugisha ijwi rirenga, ayavugiye mu muriro, no muri ca gicu c’igipfungu, no mu mwiza w’ umuzimagiza. Araheza ayandika ku bisate bibiri vy’ amabuye, arabimpa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Maze mwumvise ijwi rivuye mur’ uwo mwiza, n’umusozi urik’ urāka umuriro, muza kuri jewe, abakuru mwese bo mu miryango yanyu n’ abashingantahe bo muri mwebge," 
Deuteronomy5:24 muravuga, mut’ Uhoraho Imana yacu kw atweretse ubgiza bgiwe n’ububasha bgiwe, tukumva ijwi ryiwe rivuye hagati mu muriro, uyu musi tubonye yukw Imana ivugana n’umuntu, akabaho ntapfe." 
Deuteronomy5:25 None turinda gupfira iki kandi? kuk’ urya muriro uhambaye uhava utuyogeza, kandi ni twakomeza kwumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu, turapfa." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Muti Ni nde mu baremwe bose yigeze kwumva ijwi ry’Imana nzima rivugira hagati mu muriro, nk’uko twebge turyumvise, agaheza akabaho ntapfe?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Muti Ba ari wewe wēgēra, wumve ivyo Uhoraho Imana yacu avuga vyose; uheze utubarire ivyo Uhoraho Imana yacu akubarira vyose, natwe tuzovyumvira, tuvyitondere." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Maz’ Uhoraho yumva amajambo yanyu mumbariye; nukw arambarira, ati Numvise amajambo y’abo bantu bakubariye; ivyo bavuze vyose babivuze ko." 
Deuteronomy5:29 At’ Icompa bagahorana ben’ uwo mutima, ubatera kunyubaha no kwama bitondera ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, kugira ngo bamererwe neza, bo n’uruvyaro rwabo, ibihe vyose!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ati Genda ubabgire, uti Ni mwisubirire mu mahema yanyu." 
Deuteronomy5:31 At’ Ariko weho, ugume hano aho ndi, nkubarire ivyagezwe vyose n’amabgirizwa n’ibishinzwe ukwiye kubigisha, kugira ngo baze bavyitondere bashitse mu gihugu nabahaye kuzokwegukira." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Nuko rero muze mwitondere ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababariye; ntimuze mutambamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Muze mujane inzira yose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabarangiye, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mumererwe neza, muze muhore muba mur’ ico gihugu mugiye kwegukira." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ibi ni vyo vyagezwe n’amatēka ashinzwe, Uhoraho Imana yanyu yangeze kubigisha, kugira ngo muze muvyitondere mushitse mu gihugu mugiye kujabukiramwo ngo mucegukire;" 
Deuteronomy6:2 ngo mwubahe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mwitondere amabgirizwa yiwe yose n’ ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose, ivyo mbagera, mwe n’abana banyu n’ abuzukuru banyu, imisi yose y’ ukubaho kwanyu, kugira ngo mubone kuramba." 
Deuteronomy6:3 None rero, yemwe Bisirayeli, ni muvyumve, muvyitondere; kugira ngo mumererwe neza, mugwire cane, muri mu gihugu gitemba amata n’ ubūki, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza yabasezeraniye." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Ni mwumve, yemwe Bisirayeli: Uhoraho Imana yacu ni we Uhoraho wenyene;" 
Deuteronomy6:5 kandi mukundishe Uhoraho Imana yanyu imitima yanyu yose, n’ ubugingo bganyu bgose, n’inkomezi zanyu zose." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ayo mabgirizwa mbageze uyu musi, az’ ahore ku mitima yanyu:" 
Deuteronomy6:7 muze mugire umwete wo kuyigisha abana banyu; muze muyahoze mu kanwa iyo mwicaye mu nzu, n’iyo muriko muragenda mu nzira, n’iyo muryamye, n’iyo muvyutse." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Muze muyahambire ku maboko yanyu, ababere ikimenyetso, muyashire mu ruhanga nk’amambe, abe hagati y’amaso yanyu." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Muze muyandike ku bishimaryango vy’ amazu yanyu no ku bikingi vy’ amarembo. 
Deuteronomy6:10 Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ni yamara kubashikana mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha, Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo, kirimw’ ibisagara binini‐binini vyiza mutubatse," 
Deuteronomy6:11 n’amazu yuzuye ivyiza vy’uburyo bgose mutāshizemwo, n’ivyobo vyimbiwe kubīka amazi mutimvye, n’imirima y’imizabibu n’imyelayo mutāteye, mukarya, mukāma mu gahimbo;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 muze muheze mwirinde, ntimwibagire Uhoraho, yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Muze mwubahe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, abe ari we musaba, izina ryiwe abe ari ryo murahira." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Ntimuze mugendanire izindi mana, zo mu mana z’amahanga abakikije:" 
Deuteronomy6:15 kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari hagati muri mwebge ar’ Imana ifūha; kugira ng’ uburake bg’Uhoraho Imana yanyu bgoye kubaziriringira, akabarandura, akabakūra kw isi." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Ntimukagerageze Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko mwamugeragereje i Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Muze mugire umwete wo kwitondera ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, n’ivyo yababariye, n’amabgirizwa yiwe yabagezeko." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Kandi muze mukore ivyo Uhoraho abona ko bitunganye kandi kw ari vyiza, kugira ngo mumererwe neza, mubone kwinjira ca gihugu ciza Uhoraho yarahiye ba sogokuruza kw azokibaha, mucegukire," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ni yaheza kwirukana abansi banyu imbere yanyu, nk’uko yavuze." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Mu gihe kizoza, ni hagira uwo mu bana banyu abaza se, at’ Ibi vyagezwe n’aya mabgirizwa n’aya matēka ashinzwe, Uhoraho Imana yacu yabageze, vyavuye ku ki?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 aze yishure uwo mwana, ati Twari muri Egiputa tur’ abaja ba Farawo, maz’ Uhoraho adukūzay’ ukuboko kw’ inkomezi kandi kubanguye," 
Deuteronomy6:22 yerekanira imbere yacu ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza bikomeye vy’ivyago, abiteje Egiputa na Farawo n’urugo rwiwe rwose;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 adukūrayo kugira ngw atujane mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza kw azoduha. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Kand’ Uhoraho atubarira kwitondera ayo mabgirizwa yose, no kumwubaha we ubgiwe, Uhoraho Imana yacu, kugira ngo twame mu mahirwe imisi yose, atuzigame atubesheho, nk’uko biri n’uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kandi ni twitondera ivyo vyagezwe vyose imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’uko yabitugeze, bizoduharūrwako nk’ukugororoka." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kubashikana mu gihugu mugiye kwegukira, agasohora amahanga menshi ngw ababise, Abaheti n’Abagirugashi n’Abamori n’Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi, amahanga ndwi abarusha ubginshi n’inkomezi;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kubagabura mu maboko yanyu, mukabatsinda, muze mubarandure. Ntimuze mugire isezerano musezerana na bo, canke ngo mubagirire akagongwe." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Ntimuze musabiranire na bo, ngw abakobga banyu mubahe abahungu babo, cank’ abahungu banyu mubasabire abakobga babo." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Kuko bohindura abahungu banyu, ntibagendanire Uhoraho, ariko bagasaba izindi mana; ivyo bigatuma uburake bg’Uhoraho bubaziriringira, agaca abarandura ako kanya." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Arik’ uku az’ abe ari ko mubagirira: muze musangangure ibicaniro vyabo, mumenagure amabuye bashinze, mutemagure inkingi bashingiye Ashera, muturire ibishushanyo vyabo bibājwe." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Kuko mur’ ihanga ryera ryarobanuriwe Uhoraho Imana yanyu; kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabatoranije mu mahanga yose yo mw isi ngo mube ihanga yiharije. 
Deuteronomy7:7 Icatumye Uhoraho abakunda, akabatoranya, s’uko mwarusha ayandi mahanga yose ubginshi; mbere mwar’ ubusa hanyuma y’ayandi yose." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Ariko n’uk’ Uhoraho abakunda, akagomba gushitsa indahiro yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu; ni co catumye Uhoraho abakūzay’ ububasha bgiwe bginshi, akabagobōtora, akabakūra mu nzu y’ubuja, no mu maboko ya Farawo umwami wa Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Nuko rero mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari yo Mana; n’Imana yo kwizigirwa, yama ishitsa isezerano, ikagirira imbabazi abayikunda, bakitondera ivyagezwe vyayo, ikageza ku runganwe rwabo uko ruzogenda rukurikirana gushitsa igihumbi;" 
Deuteronomy7:10 arikw abayanka ikabasubiriza mu nkōko bidatevye, ikabahonnya; ku vyo igirira ūyanka ntibitak’ urwangara, arikw imusubiriza mu nkōko bidatevye." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Nuko rero muze mwitondere ivyo vyagezwe n’amabgirizwa n’ amatēka ashinzwe mbageze uyu musi, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Maze ni mwumvira ayo matēka ashinzwe, mukayitondera, mukayashitsa, Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobashikiriza isezerano, abagirire imbabazi, nk’uko yarahiye ba sogokuruza;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 azobakunda, abahe umugisha, abagwize; azohezagira uruvyaro rwo mu nda zanyu, n’imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu, n’amasaka na vino n’amavuta ya elayo, n’ukugwira kw’ inka zanyu n’ukw’ imikuku yanyu, abihezagirire mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Muzogira umuhezagiro gusumba ayandi mahanga yose; ntihazoba ingumba y’umugabo canke y’umugore muri mwebge, canke mu masho yanyu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Uhoraho azobakūrakw indwara zose; ntazobatēza n’imwe muri za ndwara mbi zo muri Egiputa, nk’uko muzizi, arikw azozitēza ababanka bose." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nuko muze murandure amahanga yose Uhoraho Imana yanyu azogabura mu maboko yanyu ata kagongwe; ntimuze musabe imana zabo, kukw ivyo vyobabera umutego." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Kumbure mwokwibaza mu mitima yanyu, mut’ Aya mahanga kw aturuta ubginshi, twoshobora dute kuyanesha?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ntimuze mubatinye: muze mwibuke ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiriye Farawo n’igihugu cose ca Egiputa; 
Deuteronomy7:19 ibigerageza bikomeye amaso yanyu yiboneye, n’ ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, n’ingen’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakūjey’ ukuboko kw’inkomezi kandi kubanguye; uko ni kw azogirira amahanga yose muzoba mufitiye ubgoba." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobatērēra amavubi, gushitsa ah’ amasigarira yabo yabīnyegeje azohonera." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Ntimuze mubatinye, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari hagati muri mwebge, ar’ Imana ihambaye iteye ubgoba." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azokwirukana ayo mahanga imbere yanyu si ruto si ruto; ntimwobamarira icarimwe, ibikōko vyo mw ishamba vyoye kuzohava bigwira bikabatera." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Arik’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu izobagabura mu maboko yanyu, ibace igikuba gihambaye, gushitsa batikiye." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Kand’ azogabura abami babo mu maboko yanyu, namwe muzozimiriza amazina yabo musi y’ ijuru; nta muntu n’umwe azoshobora kubahagarara imbere, gushitsa mubaherengeteje." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Ibishushanyo bibājwe vy’ibigirwamana vyabo muze mubiturire; ntimuze mwifuze ifeza cank’ izahabu vyometse kuri vyo, ntimuze mubitware, vyoye kuzohava bibahindukira umutego, kukw ivyo ar’ ubuyobe k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu;" 
Deuteronomy7:26 ntimuze mujane ico kintu c’ubuyobe mu ngo zanyu, mwoye kuzohava muhinduka umuvumo nka co; muze mucanke urunuka, mukizinukwe rwose, kukw ar’ ikintu cāvumwe." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Ivyagezwe vyose mbagera uyu musi muze muvyitondere, mubishitse, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mugwire, kugira ngo mwinjire igihugu Uhoraho yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Kandi muze mwibuke urugendo rwose rwo mu bugaragwa Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabarōngōyemw’ iyi myaka ukw ari mirongwine; kugira ngw abacishe bugufi, abagerageze, amenye ibiri mu mitima yanyu, yuko muzokwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe canke ko mutazovyitondera." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Nuko yabacishije bugufi, yemera ko musonza, araheza abagaburira manu mutāri muzi, na ba sogokuruza banyu batigeze kumenya; kugira ngw abamenyeshe yuk’ umuntu adatungwa n’ivyo kurya gusa, arikw atungwa n’amajambo yose ava mu kanwa k’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Impuzu zanyu ntizabashiriyeko, cank’ ibirenge vyanyu ngo bivyimbe, iyi myaka ukw ari mirongwine." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Mukwiye kumenya mu mitima yanyu yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahana nk’uk’ umuntu ahana umwana wiwe. 
Deuteronomy8:6 Muze mwitondere ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugendere mu nzira ziwe, mumwubahe." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abajanye mu gihugu ciza, n’igihugu kirimw’ imigezi n’amariba n’amasōko, vyatobotse mu myonga no ku misozi." 
Deuteronomy8:8 N’igihugu kibamw’ ingano na sayiri n’imizabibu n’imisukoni n’amakomamanga; n’igihugu kibamw’ imyelayo n’ubūki; 
Deuteronomy8:9 n’igihugu muzokenukiramw’ ivyo kurya, ntimugire ico mugikeneramwo; n’ igihugu kirimw’ amabuye y’ubutare, n’imisozi mwoshobora kwimbamw’ imiringa." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Muzokwama mu gahimbo, mushimire Uhoraho Imana yanyu igihugu ciza yabahaye." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Muze mwirinde, mwoye kwibagira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukareka kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe, n’amatēka yiwe ashinzwe, n’amabgirizwa yiwe, ivyo mbageze uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ni mwamara kurya mugahimba, mukūbaka amazu meza mukayabamwo;" 
Deuteronomy8:13 amasho yanyu n’imikuku yanyu bikagwira, mukagwiza amafeza n’amazahabu, mber’ ivyo mufise vyose bikagwira;" 
Deuteronomy8:14 maze muze mwirinde, imitima yanyu yoye kwishira hejuru, ngo mwibagire Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja," 
Deuteronomy8:15 akabacisha muri bga bugaragwa bunini buteye ubgoba, burimw’ inzoka z’ubumara buturira na sikorupiyo, igihugu kigataye kitagira amazi; ikabakūrira amazi mu gitandara c’isare," 
Deuteronomy8:16 ikabagaburira manu mur’ ubgo bugaragwa, iyo ba sogokuruza banyu batigeze kumenya; kugira ngw abacishe bugufi, abagerageze, maz’ amaherezo az’ abagirire neza." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Kandi muze mwirinde, mwoye kwiyumvira mu mitima yanyu, mut’ Ubutōre bgacu n’inkomezi zacu ni vyo vyaturonkesheje ubu butunzi." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Ariko muze mwibuke Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kukw ari we azobaha ubutōre bgo kuronka ubutunzi, kugira ngw ashitse isezerano yasezeranye arahira ba sogokuruza banyu, nk’uko biri n’uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ariko ni mwibagira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugakurikira izindi mana, mukazisaba, mukazisenga, uyu musi ndababūriye yuko mutazobura guhona." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho agenda arandura amahanga imbere yanyu, ni ko namwe muzoranduka, kuko muzoba mwanse kwumvira ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Ni mwumve, yemwe Bisirayeli, mur’ iki gihe mugiye kuzojabuka Yorodani, mwinjire igihugu c’amahanga abarusha ubginshi n’inkomezi, kirimw’ ibisagara binini, bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye zigera mw ijuru," 
Deuteronomy9:2 n’ abantu banini barebare, ni bo Banaki, nk’uko mubazi, kandi mwarumvise babavuga, ngo Ni nde yohagarara Abanaki imbere?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Nuko rero, uhēreye ubu mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we azojabuka abagiye imbere, ari nk’umuriro utōngōra; ni we azobahonnya, abamare igabo imbere yanyu; uko ni ko muzobona kubirukana no kubatikiza vuba, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yababariye." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kubirukana imbere yanyu, ntimuze mwiyumvire mu mitima yanyu, mut’ Ukugororoka kwacu ni kwo kwatumye Uhoraho atwinjiza iki gihugu ngo tucegukire; ereg’ ukugabitanya kw’ayo mahanga ni kwo kuzoba gutumye Uhoraho ayirukana imbere yanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ukugororoka kwanyu canke gutungana kw imitima yanyu si vyo bizoba bitumye mwinjira igihugu cabo ngo mucegukire; arik’ ukugabitanya kw’ayo mahanga ni kwo kuzoba gutumye Uhoraho Imana yanyu abirukana imbere yanyu, kugira ngw ashitse ijambo yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu, Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Nuko rero mumenye yuk’ ukugororoka kwanyu atari kwo kuzotuma Uhoraho Imana yanyu abaha ico gihugu ciza ngo mucegukire; kuko mur’ abantu batagonda izosi. 
Deuteronomy9:7 Muze mwibuke ingene mwarakije Uhoraho Imana yanyu muri mu bugaragwa, ntimuze muvyibagire; uhereye umusi mwaviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, kugeza aho mwashikiye aha hantu, mwagiye mugarariza Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy9:8 No kuri Horebu mwarakije Uhoraho, arabashavurira, bimutera kugomba kubarandura." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Nari nadūganywe uwo musozi no guhabga vya bisate vy’amabuye, ari vyo vyarikw isezerano Uhoraho yasezeranye namwe, nca mmara kur’ uwo musozi imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine, ata co ntamira, ata n’amazi nnywa." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Uhoraho araheza ampa ivyo bisate vy’amabuye, vyanditsweko n’urutoke rw’ Imana amajambo yose Uhoraho yababaririye kuri wa musozi, ayavugiye mu muriro, kuri wa musi mwari mukoranye." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Iyo misi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine bishize, ni ho Uhoraho yampaye ivyo bisate vy’amabuye, ari vyo vyarikw iryo sezerano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Va hasi, uve hano, umanuke vuba, kuko ba bantu bawe wakūye muri Egiputa bamaze kwononekara; inzira nabageze bayitaye ata n’akanya, bironkeye igishushanyo bakivugutiye mu nkero." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Uhoraho arongera arambarira, at’ Abo bantu ndababonye ico barimwo: n’ abantu batagonda izosi;" 
Deuteronomy9:14 pfa kundeka gusa, nzimirize izina ryabo musi y’ijuru, nawe ndaguhindure ihanga rizobarusha inkomezi n’ubginshi." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Nuko ndahindukira, mmanuka uwo musozi; kand’ uwo musozi warik’ urāka umuriro, mfise vya bisate vyompi mu minwe birikw isezerano." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ngize ngo ndarāba, mbona mwamaze gucumura k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mwironkeye igishushanyo c’imasa mukivugutiye mu nkero. Inzira Uhoraho yabageze mwari mwayitaye ata n’akanya." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Nca mfata vya bisate vyompi nari mfise mu ntoke, mbikubita hasi, mbimenera imbere yanyu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Nikubita hasi imbere y’Uhoraho nk’ubga mbere, mmara imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine, ata co ntamira, ata n’amazi nnywa, mbitewe n’ico caha gikomeye mwakoze, co gukora ico Uhoraho abona kw ari kibi, mukamuratsa." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Kuko natinya uburake n’ubushangashirwe Uhoraho yar’ abafitiye, vyatuma agomba kubarandura. Arik’ Uhoraho aranyumvira no mur’ ico gihe na co." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kand’ Uhoraho arakira Aroni cane, bituma agomba kumwica; ariko na we n’uko nca ndamusabira mur’ ico gihe nyene." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndaheza nābīra bga buyobe bganyu, ya masa mwacuze, ndayiturira, ndayisekura ndayinoza, kugeza icitse ifu; mmēmēra ifu yayo mu kagezi kamanuka kava kuri wa musozi." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Kandi n’i Tabera, n’i Masa, n’i Kiburoti‐hatava, mwaharakirije Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kandi na ca gihe Uhoraho yabarungika ngo muve i Kadeshi‐baruneya, ati Ni mudūge, mwinjire igihugu mbahaye; na ho nyene mwagararije ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabagezeko, ntimwamwizera canke ngo mwumvire ijwi ryiwe." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Mbere mwagiye mugarariza Uhoraho, uhereye ku musi natanguriyeko kubamenya." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Nuko mmara iyo misi ukw ari mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine nubamye imbere y’Uhoraho, kuk’ Uhoraho yar’ avuze kw azobarandura." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Nsaba Uhoraho, nti Mwami Uhoraho, nturandure abantu bawe, ari bo cibare cawe, abo warokoje ububasha bgawe, ukabakūza muri Egiputa ukuboko kw’inkomezi kandi kuramvuye." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ni wibuke abasavyi bawe, Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo; nturābe ukutagondwa kw’aba bantu, cank’ ukugabitanya kwabo, cank’ icaha cabo;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 kugira ngw abo mu gihugu wadukūyemwo boye kuvuga, bat’ Uhoraho vyaramunaniye kubashikana mu gihugu yabasezeraniye, kand’ arabanka; bati Ni co catumye abakūra ino, ngw abatsinde mu bugaragwa." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Yamara, abo n’abantu bawe, ni bo cibare cawe, abo wakūjey’ ububasha bgawe buhambaye n’ukuboko kubanguye." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Mur’ ico gihe Uhoraho arambarira, ati Wibāzire ibisate vy’amabuye bibiri bisa n’ivya mbere, uheze udūge uyu musozi uze iyo ndi, kand’ ubāze n’isandugu mu giti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ati Nanje ndaheza nandike kur’ ivyo bisate amajambo yari ku vya mbere, bimwe wamena, uheze uz’ ubishire mur’ iyo sandugu." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Nuko mbāza isandugu mu giti citwa umushita, mbāza n’ ibisate bibiri vy’amabuye bisa n’ivya mbere, ndūga uwo musozi mfise ivyo bisate vyompi mu minwe." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Yandika kur’ ivyo bisate amajambo ahwanye n’ayo yanditse mbere, ari vyo vyagezwe cumi, ivyo Uhoraho yababaririye kur’ uwo musozi, abivugiye mu muriro, kuri wa musi mwari mukoranye: Uhoraho arabimpa." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Nuko ndahindukira, mmanuka uwo musozi, nshira ivyo bisate mw isandugu nabāje; kandi biracarimwo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yambariye." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Abisirayeli bavuduka i Beroti‐Bene‐Yakani, bashika i Mosera; ni ho Aroni yapfiriye, bamuhambayo. Eleyazari umwana wiwe asubira ku buherezi bgiwe." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bavudukayo, bashika i Gudigoda; bavuduka i Gudigoda bashika i Yotibata, igihugu kirimw’ imigezi." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Mur’ ico gihe Uhoraho arobanura umuryango w’Abalewi kugira ngo barerure ya sandugu y’ isezerano ryiwe, kandi ngo bahagarare imbere yiwe bamuhereze, bahezagire n’abantu mw izina ryiwe, nk’uko biri na bugingo n’ ubu." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ni co catumye Abalewi batagira umugabane cank’ ishamvu muri bene wabo; Uhoraho ni we shamvu yabo, nk’uko yababgiye, ari we Uhoraho Imana yanyu.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Nuko namaze kur’ uwo musozi imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine, nk’ubga mbere: Uhoraho no mur’ ico gihe na co aranyumvira, ntiyabarandura." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Va hasi, ufate urugendo, uje aba bantu imbere, kugira ngo binjire igihugu narahiye ba sekuruza ko nzokibaha, bacegukire." 
Deuteronomy10:12 None rero, yemwe Bisirayeli, mbega har’ ikindi Uhoraho Imana yanyu abagombako, atar’ ukumwubaha, no kugendera mu nzira ziwe zose, no kumukunda, no kumukorera n’imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose," 
Deuteronomy10:13 no kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’ amabgirizwa yiwe, ivyo mbageze uyu musi kugira ngo mumererwe neza?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Ereg’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni we Nyen’ ijuru, mbere ni Nyen’ ijuru risumba ayandi, bo n’isi n’ibirimwo vyose." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ariko rero, Uhoraho yarangirije umutima kuri ba sogokuruza, arabakunda, atoranya n’uruvyaro rwabo ruzoza hanyuma, ni rwo mwebge, abasumbisha ayandi mahanga yose, nk’uko biri na bugingo n’ubu." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Nuko mukūreh’ ukudakebga kwo mu mitima yanyu, kandi ntimukomeze kugamika amazosi." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ar’ Imana isumba izindi, n’Umwami asumba abandi, n’ Imana ihambaye, n’Inyabushobozi iteye ubgoba, idatinya abantu ku kigohe, itarya ingurire." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Icira imanza impfuvyi n’abapfakazi, ikunda inyambukīra, ikayigaburira, ikayambika." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Nuko rero mukunde inyambukīra, kuko namwe mwar’ inyambukīra mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Mwubahe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, abe ari we musaba, mwifatanye na we akaramata, izina ryiwe ribe ari ryo murahira." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ni we shimwe ryanyu, ni we Mana yanyu, yabakoreye vya bihambaye biteye ubgoba, ivyo amaso yanyu yiboneye." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ba sogokuruza banyu bamanutse muri Egiputa ar’ abantu mirongwirindwi: non’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahinduye nk’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru mu kuba benshi. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Nuko mukunde Uhoraho Imana yanyu, muze mwame mwitondera ivyo yabajeje, n’amabgirizwa yiwe, n’amatēka yashinze, n’ivyagezwe vyiwe." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Abana banyu batigeze kubimenya canke kubibona si bo mbarira; ariko mwebge uyu musi mumenye indero Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabatōje iy’ ari yo, n’ingen’ ar’ ūhambaye, mumenye n’ukuboko kwiwe kw’inkomezi kandi kwama kubanguye," 
Deuteronomy11:3 n’ibimenyetso vyiwe, n’ ibihambaye yakoreye muri Egiputa abigiriye Farawo umwami waho n’igihugu ciwe cose;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 mumenye n’ivyo yagiriye ingabo z’Abanyegiputa n’amafarasi yabo n’imikogote yabo, ingene yatumye amazi y’Ikiyaga Gitukura abarenga hejuru igihe bābakurikira, n’ingen’ Uhoraho yabahoneje akagirire;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 n’ivyo yabakoreye muri bga bugaragwa, gushitsa aho mwaziye aha hantu;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 bo n’ivyo yagiriye Datani na Abiramu, bene Eliyabu Umureyubeni; uburyo isi yāsamye, ikabamirana n’ababo n’ amahema yabo n’abābakondōreye inyuma bose, bibera hagati muri mwebge Abisirayeli mwese." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Amaso yanyu yiboneye ivyo vyose bihambaye Uhoraho yakoze. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwitondera ivyagezwe vyose mbagera uyu musi, kugira ngo mubone kugira inkomezi, mwinjire igihugu mugiye kujabukiramwo ngo mucegukire;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 mubone kurambira mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiye ba sogokuruza kw azokibaha, bo n’ uruvyaro rwabo, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Kukw igihugu mugiye kwinjira ngo mucegukire kitameze nk’igihugu ca Egiputa mwavuyemwo, mwabibamw’ imbuto zanyu, mukazivomera munyongesheje ibirenge vyanyu, nk’uk’ umuntu avomera umurima w’imboga." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Arikw igihugu mugiye kujabukiramwo ngo mucinjire, n’igihugu kirimw’ imirambi n’imyonga, kinyoshwa n’ amazi y’imvura iva mw ijuru;" 
Deuteronomy11:12 n’igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yāmizak’ umutima, kand’ agihozakw ijisho, uhereye ku ntango y’umwaka ugashitsa kw iherezo ryawo." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Maze ni mwagira umwete wo kwumvira ivyagezwe mbagera uyu musi, mugakunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukamukorera mubiherejekw imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose," 
Deuteronomy11:14 igihugu canyu azokirekurira imvura mu bihe vyayo, imvura y’agatāsi n’iy’ urushana, kugira ngo mubone kwimbura amasaka yanyu n’inzabibu zanyu za vino n’imyelayo yanyu y’amavuta." 
Deuteronomy11:15 N’amasho yanyu azoyamereza ubgatsi mu matongo yanyu, kandi muzokwama mu gahimbo." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ariko mwirinde, imitima yanyu yoye gusukwa, mugakikama, mugasaba izindi mana, mukazisenga," 
Deuteronomy11:17 uburake bg’Uhoraho bukabaziriringira, agakinga ijuru kugira ngw imvura ntigwe, isi ntibe ikimerakw ibintu, mukazohava muhona bidatevye, mugashira mu gihugu ciza Uhoraho abahaye." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Nuko mubīke ayo majambo mvuze mu mitima yanyu no mu bugingo bganyu; muze muyahambīre ku maboko yanyu, ababere ikimenyetso, muyashire mu ruhanga nk’amambe, abe hagati y’amaso yanyu." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Muze muyigishe abana banyu, muyahoze mu kanwa iyo mwicaye mu nzu, n’iyo muriko muragenda mu nzira, n’iyo muryamye, n’iyo muvyutse." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Muze muyandike ku bishimaryango vy’amazu yanyu no ku bikingi vy’amarembo," 
Deuteronomy11:21 kugira ngo mwe n’abana banyu muze mwame mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha, nk’ukw ijuru ryama rihagaze hejuru y’isi." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Ni mwagira umwete wo kwitondera ivyo vyagezwe vyose mbagera, mukabishitsa, mugakunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukagendera mu nzira ziwe zose, mukifatanya na we akaramata;" 
Deuteronomy11:23 Uhoraho na we azokwirukana ayo mahanga yose imbere yanyu, namwe muzokwinjira igihugu c’ amahanga abarusha ubginshi n’ inkomezi." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Ahantu hose muzokandagiza ibirenge hazoba ahanyu; urugabano rwanyu ruzohēra ku bugaragwa rushike i Lebanoni, ruhēre no kuri rwa ruzi, ari rwo Efurate, rushike ku kiyaga c’i burengerazuba." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Nta muntu n’ umwe azoshobora kubahagarara imbere; igihugu cose muzokandagiramwo, Uhoraho Imana yanyu azogitera ubgoba kubganyu, babatinye, nk’uko yababariye." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Rāba, uyu musi mbashize imbere umugisha n’umuvumo:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 uwo mugisha muzowuhabga ni mwitondera ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ivyo mbagera uyu musi;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 uwo muvumo muzowuvumwa ni mutumvira ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugakikama mugata inzira mbagera uyu musi, mukagendanira izindi mana mutigeze kumenya." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Maz’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kubashikana mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira, muze muvugire uwo mugisha ku musozi Gerizimu, kand’ uwo muvumo muze muwuvugire ku musozi Ebalu." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Mbega ntimuzi iyo misozi kw iri hakurya ya Yorodani, hirya y’inzira itumbereye i burengerazuba, mu gihugu c’ Abanyakanani baba mu kiyaya citwa Araba, aharābana n’i Gilugali, i ruhande y’ibiti vy’imyeloni vya More?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Kuko mugiye kujabuka Yorodani, mukinjira igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye; nuko ni mwamara kucegukira, mukakibamwo," 
Deuteronomy11:32 muze mwitondere amabgirizwa yose n’ ivyashinzwe nshize imbere yanyu uyu musi, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Aya ni yo mabgirizwa n’ ivyashinzwe mukwiye kuzokwitondera, mukabishitsa, imisi yose muzoba muriho mw isi, muri mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza banyu yabahaye ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ntimuze mubure gusangangura ahantu hose aho ayo mahanga mugiye kwirukana yahora asengera ibigirwamana vyabo, ari ku misozi miremire, ari ku mirambi, ari musi y’igiti cose gitōtahaye." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Muze musangangure ibicaniro vyabo, mumenagure amabuye bāshinze, muturire inkingi bāshingiye Ashera, mutemagure n’ ibishushanyo bibājwe vy’ibigirwamana vyabo, muzimirize amazina yavyo aho hantu vyahora." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Ntimuze musenge Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubgo buryo bgabo," 
Deuteronomy12:5 arikw ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotoranya mu miryango yanyu yose ngw ahashire izina ryiwe, aho hantu nyene azogerēra az’ abe ari ho muzohora mumubariza, abe ari ho muja gushengerera." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Kand’ az’ abe ari ho mujana ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa n’ibimazi vyanyu bindi, n’ibigiracumi vyanyu mutanga, n’amashikanwa yanyu mumugereye, n’ayo gushitsa amasezerano, n’ayo mutanga muvyigombeye, n’iz’ uburiza zo mu masho yanyu no mu mikuku yanyu;" 
Deuteronomy12:7 az’ abe ari ho murīra imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, abe ari ho munezeranwa n’ abo mu ngo zanyu, munezererwa ibikorwa vyose mwakoze, ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahēreyemw’ umugisha." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Ntimuze mugenze nk’uko twagenza tukir’ ino mur’ iki gihe, aho umuntu wese akora ico yigombeye," 
Deuteronomy12:9 kuko mutarashika mu buruhukiro no mw ishamvu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ni mwajabuka Yorodani, mukamara gushika hasi mur’ ico gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye kw ishamvu, akabaha kuruhuka, mumaze gukira abansi banyu bose babakikije, bigatuma mwibēra amahoro ata nkomanzi;" 
Deuteronomy12:11 maz’ ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotoranya ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe, az’ abe ari ho mujana ivyo mbagera vyose; ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa, n’ ibimazi vyanyu bindi, n’ibigiracumi vyanyu mutanga, n’amashikanwa yanyu mumugereye, n’ ivy’ indobanurwa vyo gushitsa amasezerano mwasezeraniye Uhoraho;" 
Deuteronomy12:12 muheze munezererwe imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mwe n’abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu, n’abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi banyu, n’Abalewi baba muri mwebge, kukw Abalewi ata mugabane cank’ ishamvu bafise muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Muze mwirinde, mwoye kuzopfa gutangira ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa ahantu hose mubonye;" 
Deuteronomy12:14 arikw ahantu Uhoraho azotoranya mw ishamvu y’umwe mu miryango yanyu, az’ abe ari ho mutangira ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa, az’ abe ari ho mukorera ivyo mbagera vyose." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Mugabo, mushobora kuzobāga izo mwīrīra mu ngo zanyu zose uko mugomba kwose, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba abahaye umugisha: abazoba basanzwe bahumanye n’ abadahumanye bashobora kuziryako, nk’iz’ ingeregere n’impongo." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Mugabo ntimuze murye ubuseri: muze muyareke asēseke hasi nk’amazi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Arikw ibigiracumi vyo mu masaka yanyu n’ivya vino zanyu n’ivy’ amavuta yanyu ya elayo, n’iz’ uburiza bgo mu masho yanyu no mu mikuku yanyu, n’ico muzanye gushitsa isezerano ic’ ari co cose, n’ivyo muzotanga muvyigombeye, n’amashikanwa muzoba mumugereye, ivyo vyose ntimuze mubirīre i muhira." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Ariko muze mubirīre imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu aho hantu azoba yātoranije, mubisangire n’abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu n’abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi banyu, n’Abalewi baba muri mwebge; muze munezererwe ibikorwa vyose mwakoze, ngaho nyene imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Igihe cose muzomara mukiriho mu gihugu canyu muze mwirinde ntimupfe uko mufashe Umulewi. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara gusunika hirya imbibe zanyu, nk’uko yabasezeraniye, umuntu akumva agomba kurya inyama, ati Ngomba inyama; mushobora kuzirya uko mugomba kwose." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yaratoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe, ni hagira uwo habera kure muri mwebge, ashobora kubāga mu busho bgiwe canke mu mukuku wiwe, mu vyo Uhoraho yamuhaye, nk’uko nabageze, azirīre i we nk’ukw agomba kwose." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Azirye nk’uko barya iz’ ingeregere n’impongo: abazoba bahumanye n’abadahumanye bashobora kuzirya ata tandukaniro. 
Deuteronomy12:23 Mugabo, muze mwirinde ntimurye ubuseri, kukw amaraso ari yo bugingo: ntimukarye inyama zikirimw’ ubugingo bgazo." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Nuk’ ubuseri ntimukaburye: muze muyareke asēseke hasi nk’amazi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Ntimukaburye, kugira ngo mube mu vyiza, mwe n’abana banyu bazovuka hanyuma, kuko muzoba mukoze ivyo Uhoraho abona ko bitunganye." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Mugabo, ivyera mushikana, bo n’ivyo mushikisha amasezerano, muze mubijane ha hantu Uhoraho azoba yātoranije;" 
Deuteronomy12:27 mu bimazi vyo kwoswa, inyama zavyo bo n’ amaraso muze mubitangire ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu; mu bindi bimazi vyanyu, amaraso az’ abe ari yo avyagizwa ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, namwe murye inyama zavyo." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Aya majambo yose mbageze muze muyitondere, muyumvire, kugira ngo mube mu vyiza, mwe n’abana banyu bazovuka hanyuma gushitsa ibihe bidashira, kuko muzoba mukoze ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu abona kw ari vyiza kandi bitunganye." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kurandura ya mahanga imbere yanyu, ayo mugiye kwinjira igihugu cayo, mukacegukira, mukakibamwo;" 
Deuteronomy12:30 ni baherengetera imbere yanyu, muze mwirinde kugwa mu mutego ngo mubīgāne, mukabariritsa ivy’ imana zabo, muti Ya mahanga yagenza ate mu gusaba imana zabo? kugira ngo natwe tugire durtyo." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ntimuze musenge Uhoraho Imana yanyu ubgo buryo bgabo: kukw ikintu cose c’ubuyobe imbere y’Uhoraho, ico yanka urunuka, ari co basabisha imana zabo; mbere n’abahungu babo n’abakobga babo babosereza izo mana zabo kw ibimazi." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Ico mbageze cose muze mucitondere, mugishitse; ntimuze mucungurireko, canke ngo mukigabanye." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Muri mwebge ni hāduka umuvugishwa cank’ umurōsi, akabaha ikimenyamenya cank’ akababarira igitangaza," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ico kimenyamenya cank’ ico gitangaza kigashika, ico yababariye, ati Ni cashika tuze tugendanire izindi mana, tuzisabe; kand’ ar’ imana mutigeze kumenya;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 ntimuze mwemere amagambo y’uwo muvugishwa canke y’uwo murōsi, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba abagerageza, ngw amenye yuko mumukundisha imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Ariko muze mugendanire Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mumwubahe, mwitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe, mumwumvire, abe ari we musaba, mwifatanye na we akaramata." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kand’ uwo muvugishwa cank’ uwo murōsi baze bamwice, kukw azoba avuze ibibatera kugarariza Uhoraho Imana yanyu, n’ivyo kubakūra mu nzira Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabarangiye ngo muyicemwo, kand’ ari we yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, akabagobōtora, akabakūra mu nzu y’ ubuja. Uko az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Mu bo muvukana canke muri bene nyoko, canke mu bahungu banyu canke mu bakobga banyu, canke mu bagore banyu mupfumbatirana, canke mu bakunzi banyu b’amagara, muri ben’ abo ni hagira uwo yosha muri mwebge mu mpisho, ati Tugende dusabe izindi mana; (kand’ ar’ izo mutigeze kumenya, mwe na ba sogokuruza;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 ar’ imana zo mu mahanga abakīkije, namb’ ar’ ayoba hafi yanyu canke ya kure, uhēreye ku mpera y’isi, ugashitsa ku yindi);" 
Deuteronomy13:8 wewe wohejwe ntuz’ umwemerere, ntuz’ umwumvire; ntuz’ umugirire akagongwe, canke ng’umugirire ikibabarwe, canke ng’ umuhishīre;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 ariko ntuz’ ubure kumwica: ukuboko kwawe az’ abe ari kwo gutangura kumwica, maze habone gukurikirako n’ abandi bantu bose." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Mu kumwica, uz’ umwicishe amabuye, kuko yagerageje kugukwegakwega ng’ uve k’Uhoraho Imana yawe, yagukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Abisirayeli bose bazovyumva, batinye, boye kwongera gukorera ikibi kingana girtyo hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Ni mwaramuka mwumvise inkuru mu gisagara kimwe mu vyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu agiye kuzobaha ngo mubibemwo, bavuga," 
Deuteronomy13:13 bati Hādutse abagesera muri mwebge bariko barakwegakwega abo mu gisagara cabo, bat’ Ingo tugende, dusabe izindi mana, kand’ ar’ izo mutigeze kumenya;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 muze mubibariritse, mubicishe agace, mubihwēbūtse mushirutse umwete. Maze ni mwasanga ar’ ivy’ ukuri, ata mazinda, yuk’ ubuyobe bungana burtyo bukorerwa hagati muri mwebge;" 
Deuteronomy13:15 ntimuze mubure kuririkisha inkota ababa mur’ ico gisagara, mugitikizanye n’ ibirimwo vyose, muririkishe inkota amasho yaho." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Kandi mukoranye amasahu yose yo muri co, muyarunde mu kibuga caho, muturire ico gisagara n’amasahu yaco yose, bibe nk’ikimazi co kwoswa ciramvuriye, gishikaniwe Uhoraho Imana yanyu; ico gisagara kize gihinduke ikigūngūzi c’amasakamburira ibihe vyose: ntikize gisubire kwubakwa ukundi." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Muhīrahīre ntihaze hagire ikintu na kimwe mur’ ivyo bijiririjwe muzokozak’ ukuboko, kugira ng’ Uhoraho abone kwigarura, areke uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi, abagirire imbabazi n’ikigongwe, abagwize nk’uko yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azobikora," 
Deuteronomy13:18 ni mwamara kwumvira ijwi ryiwe, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose mbagera uyu musi, mugakora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu abona kw ari vyiza." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Mwebge mur’ abana b’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu: ntimukikebagure ku mibiri yanyu, canke ngo mwiharanguze ibimwerere mu bitwariro kubg’ ūpfuye." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Kuko mur’ ihanga ryera ryarobanuriwe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kand’ Uhoraho akaba yarabītoranirije mu mahanga yose yo mw isi kuba ihanga yiharije." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Ntimuze murye ikintu na kimwe kizira. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu bigenda: inka n’intama n’impene," 
Deuteronomy14:5 n’impongo n’ingeregere n’ifumberi n’impene y’inyeshamba n’inzobe n’imbogo n’intama y’inyeshamba. 
Deuteronomy14:6 Mu bigenda, igifise inzāra cose ziri n’ umwanya hagati, kikagira inzāra kubiri, kigatako kikūza, ico ni co mwemererwa kurya mu bigenda." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ariko mu vyūza no mu bifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, ivyo mutemerewe kurya n’ibi: ingamiya n’urukwavu n’inkezi; ivyo n’ibihumanya kuri mwebge, kuko naho vyūza ariko ntibigira inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati." 
Deuteronomy14:8 N’ingurube, kuko nah’ ifise inzāra ziri n’umwanya hagati, ariko ntiyūza: na yo n’igihumanya kuri mwebge. Inyama zavyo ntimuze muzirye, n’imivyimba yavyo ntimuze muyikoreko." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ibi ni vyo mwemererwa kurya mu biba mu mazi vyose: ibifise amababa n’ibigaragamba, ivyo ni vyo mwemererwa kurya." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Ibidafise amababa n’ibigaragamba ntimuze mubirye: n’umuziro kuri mwebge. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Ibisīga n’inyoni vyose bidahumanya mwemererwa kubirya. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Arikw ibi ntimuze mubirye: inkukuma n’itarangabo na oziniya; 
Deuteronomy14:13 n’ikinyamwotsi n’inkōna n’ikinyamwanira, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 n’icitwa igikōna cose, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Deuteronomy14:15 n’imbuni na tamasi na shakafu n’agaca, ukw amoko yavyo ari;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 n’igihuna n’inyanana na tinishemeti; 
Deuteronomy14:17 n’inkongori n’ikinyakabaka na shalaki; 
Deuteronomy14:18 na sarumfune n’agasōza, ukw amoko yavyo ari, na samunsure n’agahungarema." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Kand’ udukōko twose tw’amababa tunyonyera, na two n’umuziro kuri mwebge: ntimuze muturye." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Ibisīga n’inyoni vyose bidahumanya ni vyo mwemererwa kurya. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Ntihaze hagire ikintu na kimwe cīpfiriye murya; ariko mushobora kugiha uwo mu nyambukīra aba i wanyu, akaba ari we akirya; canke mushobora kukigura n’umunyamahanga; ariko mweho mur’ ihanga ryera ryarobanuriwe Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Ntimuze mutekeshe umwagazi w’ impene amata ya nyina." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Ntimuze mubure gutanga ikigiracumi co mu vyo mwejeje ku mbuto mwateye, ukw imirima yanyu izokwera uk’ umwaka utashe." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Ikigiracumi c’amasaka yanyu, n’ica vino yanyu, n’ic’ amavuta ya elayo yanyu, n’ivy’ uburiza bgo mu masho yanyu, n’ ivyo mu mikuku yanyu, muze mubirīre imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ahantu azoba yaratoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe; kugira ngo mwige kwubaha Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibihe vyose." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Arikw ah’ urugendo ruzoba rurerure, rukabananira, ntimushobore kubishikanayo, igihe Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba abahaye umugisha, kukw aho hantu azoba yaratoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe hazoba hababereye kure;" 
Deuteronomy14:25 muze mubigure amahera, muyatekere, mugende aho hantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yaratoranije:" 
Deuteronomy14:26 mushike muyagure ico mwumva mugomba cose, ar’ inka, ar’ intama, ari vino, ar’ inzoga, ar’ ikindi kintu cose mwumva mugomba; muheze mubirīre ngaho nyene imbere y’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mubisangire n’abo mu ngo zanyu, munezeranwe." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Kand’ Abalewi baba muri mwebge ntimuze mupfe uko mubafashe, kukw ata mugabane cank’ ishamvu bafise muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ku mpera y’umwaka wose ugira gatatu muze mwame mukūra ikigiracumi ku vyo mwejeje vyose mur’ uwo mwaka, mubikoranirize i wanyu," 
Deuteronomy14:29 kugira ngw Abalewi, kuko badafise umugabane cank’ ishamvu muri mwebge, bo n’ inyambukīra, n’impfuvyi, n’abapfakazi, baba i wanyu, babone kuza, barye, bahāge; kugira ng’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahezagire mu bikorwa mukora vyose." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Uk’ umwaka ugira indwi wose utashe, muze mwame muheberanira." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Uburyo bgo guheberanira buze bugende burtya: ūzoba yarīriwe umwenda wese az’ awuhebere mugenzi we yawumurīriye; ntaz’ awishuze mugenzi we cank’ uw’i wabo, kuk’ ukwo guheberanira Uhoraho yashinze kuzoba kwatangajwe." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Mushobora kwishuza umunyamahanga, arikw ico umuntu yoba afitiwe n’uw’ i wabo az’ akimuhebere." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ariko nta bakene bazoba muri mwebge, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu atazobura kubahēra umugisha mu gihugu yabahaye kuba ishamvu yanyu ngo mucegukire," 
Deuteronomy15:5 ni mwagira umwete wo kwumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ngo mwitondere ibi vyagezwe vyose mbagera uyu musi, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobaha umugisha nk’uko yabasezeraniye; amahanga menshi azoza kubagurāna, ariko mweho ntimuzoja kuyagurāna; kandi muzotwara amahanga menshi, ariko yo ntazobatwara." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Muri mwebge ni hagira ahazoba umukene mu b’i wanyu, mu gisagara canyu cose co mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu agiye kubaha, ntimuze mugire imitima yiyumanganya uwo mukene w’i wanyu, canke ngo mupfunye amaboko ku co mumuha;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 ariko ntimuze mubure kumuramvurira ukuboko ngo mumugurāne ibimumara ubukene bg’ico akeneye. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Muze mwirinde, mu mitima yanyu ntihaze haze iciyumviro kibi, ngo muvuge muti Wa mwaka ugira indwi wo guheberanira uri hafi; bigatuma mwirengagiza kubg’ uwo mukene w’i wanyu, mukanka kugira ico mumuha; na we akazohava atakambira Uhoraho abarega, mukagībgako n’icaha." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Ntimuze mubure kumuha, kandi ni mwamuha ntibize bibababaze; kukw ivyo bizotuma Uhoraho Imana yanyu abaha umugisha mu bikorwa vyanyu vyose no ku co muzoba mukoze cose." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Kukw abakene ata ho bazobura kubaho mu gihugu; ni co gitumye mbabarira, nti Ntimuze mubure kuramvurira ukuboko umukene w’ umworo wo mu b’i wanyu muri mu gihugu canyu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Uw’i wanyu w’Umuheburayo canke w’Umuheburayokazi, ni hagira uwo yibunzako ngw amugure, wewe umuguze az’ akujakarire imyaka itandatu; maze mu w’ugira indwi uz’ umurekure, yībēre mu mwidegemvyo." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kandi ni wamurekura ngw agire umwidegemvyo, ntuz’ umurekure imbokoboko;" 
Deuteronomy15:14 arik’ uz’ umuvōtorere ku mukuku wawe no ku vyo mu kigega cawe no ku vyengūwe mu bgato bgawe: uk’ Uhoraho Imana yawe azoba yaraguhaye umugisha, az’ abe ari k’umuha." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Kand’ uze wibuke yuko nawe wari mu buja mu gihugu ca Egiputa, Uhoraho Imana yawe akakugobōtora: ni co gitumye uyu musi ndakugera ivyo." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ariko ni yakubarira, ati Singomba kukuvako; kukw agukunda, agakunda n’urugo rwawe, kuko mumeraniye neza;" 
Deuteronomy15:17 uze wābīre umugera, uwumutoboze ugutwi urume mu rugi, aze yame ar’ umugurano wawe ibihe vyose. No ku muguranokazi wawe na we az’ abe ari k’ubigenza." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Na ho ni wamurekura ngw agire umwidegemvyo, ntibize bikubabaze, kukw azoba yagukoreye imyaka itandatu; kand’ iy’ aba umucangero, yari gutwara ibingana kabiri n’ivyo wakoresheje kubgiwe: maz’ Uhoraho Imana yawe azoguha umugisha mu vy’ ukora vyose." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Muze murobanurire Uhoraho Imana yanyu uburiza bgose bg’icitwa ishuri buvuka mu masho yanyu no mu mikuku yanyu: ntimuze mugire igikorwa na kimwe mukoresha ic’ uburiza bgo mu masho yanyu, canke ngo mukēmūre ic’ uburiza bgo mu mikuku yanyu." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Uk’ umwaka utashe, muze mubirīre ahantu Uhoraho azotoranya, mur’ imbere yiwe nyene, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mwe n’ abo mu ngo zanyu." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ariko ni hagira ikigira agasembga, ari nko gucumbagira canke guhuma, cank’ akandi gasembga kabi ak’ ari ko kose, ntimuze mugishikanire Uhoraho Imana yanyu kw ikimazi." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Muze mubirīre i wanyu; abazoba bahumanye n’abadahumanye bashobora kubirya ata tandukaniro, nk’uko barya ingeregere n’impongo." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Mugabo ntimuze murye ubuseri bgavyo: muze muyareke asēseke hasi nk’amazi. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Ukwezi kwa Abibu muze mwame mukugira gukuru, mwitondere ivya Pasika y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu; kuko mu kwezi kwa Abibu ari ho Uhoraho Imana yanyu yahenze mw ijoro akabakūra muri Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Muze mutange ivya Pasika, mubihe Uhoraho Imana yanyu kw ikimazi, mubikūye mu mikuku yanyu no mu masho yanyu, mubitangire ahantu Uhoraho azoba yātoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ntimuze mugire imitsima yambiwe mubikoza; muze mumare imisi ndwi murya imitsima itambiwe yavyo, ari yo mitsima y’ amagorwa, kuko mwavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa ikibiriraho; kugira ngw imisi yose muzoba mukiriho, muze mwame mwibuka wa musi mwaviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Mur’ iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi ntihaze hagire icitwa umwambiro kibabonekamwo, mu gihugu canyu cose; kandi ku kimazi muzotanga ku musi wa mbere ku mugoroba, ntihaze hagire inyama zaco zirāra ngo zishitse mu gitondo." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Ntimuze mutangire ikimazi ca Pasika mu gisagara na kimwe mu vyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobaha: 
Deuteronomy16:6 arikw ahantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yātoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe, az’ abe ari ho mutangira ico kimazi ca Pasika ku mugoroba, ku kirengazuba, ari co gihe nyene mwaviriye muri Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Aho hantu nyene Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yātoranije az’ abe ari ho mutara inyama zaco, muhazirīre; mu gitondo muheze muhindukire, musubire mu mahema yanyu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Imitsima itambiwe iz’ ibe ari yo murya kumara imisi itandatu; maze ku wugira indwi muze mugire ikoraniro ry’agahebuza, mushengereye Uhoraho Imana yanyu; ntihaze hagire igikorwa muwukorako." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Muze muharūre amasabato ndwi; muyaharūre muhereye igihe mutanguriye guha amahonda umuhoro. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Umusi ukurikira ayo masabato ndwi muze muwugire mukuru wo kuninahaza Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mu gutanga amashikanwa, muyatanze nk’uko muvyigombeye, nk’ukw azoba yarabahaye umugisha;" 
Deuteronomy16:11 muheze munezererwe imbere yiwe, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ha hantu nyene azoba yātoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe, munezeranwe n’ abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu, n’abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi banyu, n’Abalewi baba i wanyu, n’inyambukīra n’ impfuvyi n’abapfakazi baba muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Kandi muze mwibuke yuko mwari mu buja muri Egiputa, mwitondere ayo mabgirizwa, muyashitse." 
Deuteronomy16:13 Muze mugire imisi mikuru y’insāgo kumara imisi ndwi, ni mwaheza kubīka imihūre mwāhūriye ku mbuga, no kwengūra vino zo mu mato yanyu." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Kandi muze munezererwe iyo misi mikuru, mwe n’abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu, n’abagurano banyu n’abaguranokazi banyu, n’ Abalewi, n’inyambukīra, n’impfuvyi n’abapfakazi bar’ i wanyu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Iyo misi ukw ar’ indwi muze muyigire mikuru yo kuninahaza Uhoraho Imana yanyu muri ha hantu azoba yātoranije; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yabahaye umugisha mu myimbu yanyu yose, no mu bikorwa vyose mwakoze, kandi muzoba munezerewe rwose." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Haze harenguke izinamuhungu wese imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka, barenguke ha hantu azoba yātoranije. Baze mu misi mikuru y’imitsima itambiwe, no ku musi ukurikira ya masabato ndwi, no mu misi mikuru y’insāgo; ariko ntibaze barenguke imbere y’ Uhoraho iminwe misa." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Umuntu wese az’ atange ukw ashoboye, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yabahaye umugisha." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Muze mushireh’ abacamanza n’abashingantahe mu bisagara vyanyu vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobaha, nk’ukw imiryango yanyu iri; baze bacire abantu imanza ziroranye." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Ntimuze mugoreke imanza, ntimuze muce urwa nkunzi, canke ngo murye ingurire: kukw ingurire ihuma amaso y’ abanyabgenge, ikagoreka imanza z’ukuri." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ivy’ ukuri, mber’ ivy’ ukuri vyonyene abe ari vyo mutumbera mu guca imanza, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mugume muri ca gihugu mwashikiriye, ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Ntimuze mugire igiti c’ubgoko ubg’ ari bgo bgose mushingira Ashera, i ruhande y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ico muzokwubaka." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kandi ntimuze mugire ibuye mushinga nk’inkingi, kand’ ar’ ikintu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yanka." 
Deuteronomy17:1 Ntimuze mugire imasa cank’ intama muzanira Uhoraho Imana yanyu kw ikimazi birikw agasembga cank’ igitosekaye cose, kukw ico ar’ umuziro k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Muri mwebge, mu bisagara vyanyu vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yābahaye, ni haboneka umugabo cank’ umugore akora ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu abona kw ari kibi, co kuva mw isezerano ryiwe," 
Deuteronomy17:3 akagenda agasaba izindi mana, akazisenga, ari nk’izuba, cank’ ukwezi, cank’ inyenyeri, ari zo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru, kand’ ar’ ivyo ntabageze;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 mukabibarirwa; mumaze kuvyumva muheze mugire umwete wo kubibariritsa; maze ni mwasanga ar’ ivy’ ukuri bidakekeranywa, yuk’ ubuyobe bungana burtyo bukorerwa mu Bisirayeli," 
Deuteronomy17:5 muce muzana uwo mugabo cank’ uwo mugore, yakoze ico kintu kibi, mumushikane kw irembo ry’igisagara canyu, mumwicishe amabuye." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Umuntu mu kw apfa, aze yicishwe n’ ivyabona bibiri canke bitatu bimwagirije; arikw icabona kimwe ntikize cagirize umuntu ngo yicwe." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Amaboko y’abamwagīrīje az’ abe ari yo atangura kumwica, maze habone gukurikirako n’ abandi bantu bose. Ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ni haramuka habaye urubanza runaniranye, ari mu vy’ abīcanye, canke mu vyo abantu bapfa, canke mu vy’abakomerekanije, cank’ imibūrano yindi ivyutse mu bisagara vyanyu; mwebge abazica muze muhaguruke, muje ha hantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yātoranije," 
Deuteronomy17:9 mushikīre abaherezi, ari bo Balewi, n’ umucamanza azoba ariho mur’ iyo misi, mubibashikirize, na bo bazobamenyesha uko baciye urwo rubanza." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Namwe, ni bamara kurubashikiririza aho hantu Uhoraho azoba yātoranije, muze mukore nk’uko baruciye nyene; muze mwitondere kubigenza nk’uko bababariye kwose," 
Deuteronomy17:11 mukurikire uko barushinze n’uko baruciye; ntimuze mutirimuke ngo muve kur’ urwo rubanza babashikirije, ngo murucishe ahandi." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Arik’ umuntu ni yibona ku muherezi, ntamwumvire, kand’ ari we ahagarara ngaho nyene imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu ngw amuhereze, canke ntiyumvire uwo mucamanza, uwo muntu baze bamwice; ukw abe ari ko mukūra ikibi muri mwebge Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Maz’ abantu bose bazovyumva, bace batinya, ntibongere kwibona ben’ ukwo." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Ni mwamara gushika mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abaha, mukacegukira mukakibamwo; mukiyumvira, muti Reka twishirireh’ umwami wo kutuganza, nk’uko bimeze mu yandi mahanga yose adukikije;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 umwami muzoshiraho ntaz’ abure kuba uwo Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotoranya; uwo mwami muzoshiraho wo kubaganza az’ abe uwo mu b’i wanyu; ntimuze mushireh’ umunyamahanga ngw abe ari we abaganza, atar’ uwo mu b’i wanyu." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ikibujijwe, ntaze yironderere amafarasi menshi, canke ngw agire abantu atuma muri Egiputa kugira ngo yironkere umukimba w’amafarasi; kuk’ Uhoraho yababariye, ati Ntimuze musubire kujana iyo nzira ukundi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kandi ntaz’ agire umukimba w’abagore, kugira ngo ntibize bihindure umutima wiwe; kandi ntaze yirundanirize amafeza n’ amazahabu ngo bibe isinzi." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Maze ni yamara kuja ku ngoma, aze yiyandikishirize ibi vyagezwe mu gitabo, abikūye mu gitabo gifiswe n’abaherezi ari bo Balewi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Ico gitabo az’ acamane, agisome imisi yose y’ukubaho kwiwe: kugira ngo yige kwubaha Uhoraho Imana yiwe, yitondere amajambo yose y’ibi vyagezwe n’aya mabgirizwa, abishitse;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 kugira ngw abone guhangama ku ngoma yiwe mu Bisirayeli, bo n’uruvyaro rwiwe; kand’ umutima wiwe woye kuzokwishira hejuru ngw akēngēre ab’i wabo, ntaz’ atirimuke ngw ave mur’ aya mabgirizwa, ngw akikamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Abaherezi, ari bo Balewi, mber’ umuryango wa Lewi wose, ntibaze bagire umugabane cank’ ishamvu mu Bisirayeli: ariko baze batungwe n’ibimazi bizanirwa Uhoraho vyo gutōngōrwa n’umuriro, n’ibindi yagerewe." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ntibaze bagire ishamvu mu b’i wabo: Uhoraho ni we shamvu yabo, nk’uko yababariye." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Uyu az’ abe ari wo uba umwanya w’abaherezi abantu bakwiye kuzohora babakūrira: ūtanze ikimazi, ar’ inka cank’ intama, az’ ahore akūrira umuherezi igikenye c’ukuboko, n’imisaya yompi, n’ umushīshīto." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Kandi muze muhore mubaha ku vy’umushuzo, ku mpeke zanyu no kuri vino yanyu no ku mavuta yanyu ya elayo, n’ubgoya bg’ītanguye gukemurwa mu ntama zanyu." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Kukw ari bo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yatoranije mu miryango yanyu yose, kugira ngo baze bahore bakora igikorwa c’ubuherezi mw izina ryiwe, bo n’uruvyaro rwabo, ibihe vyose." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Kand’ Umulewi ni yava i wanyu ah’ aba, ah’ ari ho hose muri mwebge Abisirayeli, akaja ahantu Uhoraho azoba yātoranije, ashobora kuza ah’ agombeye hose," 
Deuteronomy18:7 akore igikorwa c’ubuherezi mw izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, nk’ ukw ab’i wabo bose b’Abalewi basanzwe bakora, bahagarara ngaho nyene imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Az’ agire umugabane ungana n’uw’ abandi ku vyo kurya, ukūye ivyo yaguze itongo yarazwe na se." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Ni mwamara gushika mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abaha, ntimuze mwige gukora ivy’ ibizira ayo mahanga akora." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Muri mwebge ntihaze haboneke umuntu atanga umwana wiwe kw ikimazi, ar’ uw’ umuhungu canke w’umukobga, ngo yoswe mu muriro, canke ngo haboneke ūragura, cank’ ūtera amabara, cank’ umupfumu, cank’ umurozi," 
Deuteronomy18:11 cank’ umwābūzi, cank’ ūja guhamagara imizimu, cank’ umumenyi, cank’ ūraguza imizimu." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Kuk’ ūkora ben’ ivyo wese aba abaye umuyobe k’Uhoraho; kand’ ubgo buyobe ari bgo butumye Uhoraho Imana yanyu agira yirukane ayo mahanga imbere yanyu. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Ariko mweho muze mube abaroranye k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Kukw ayo mahanga mugiye gusohora ar’ abantu bemera abatera amabara n’ abapfumu; ariko mweho, Uhoraho Imana yanyu ntiyemera ko mugenza murtyo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobahagurukiriza ūvugishwa na we ameze nkanje, ava muri mwebge, mu b’i wanyu: az’ abe ari we mwumvira." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Bizoba nk’uko mwabisavye Uhoraho Imana yanyu mur’ i Horebu, kuri wa musi mwari mukoranye, aho mwavuga, muti Ntidusubire kwumva ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu, no kubona urya muriro uhambaye, ntiduhave dupfa." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Uhoraho akambarira, at’ Ivyo bavuze babivuze ko." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ati Nzobahagurukiriza ūvugishwa nanje ava mu b’i wabo, ameze nkawe; ati Nzoshira amajambo yanje mu kanwa kiwe, na we azobabarira ivyo ndamugeze vyose." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ati Kand’ ūtazokwumvira amajambo yanje uyo azovuga mw izina ryanje, nzobimuhōra." 
Deuteronomy18:20 At’ Arik’ umuvugishwa azohāngāra kwigenera ijambo ntamugeze kuvuga, akarivuga mw izina ryanje, cank’ akagira ico avuga mw izina ry’izindi mana, uwo muvugishwa azobizira apfe." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Ariko ni mwivuganya mu mitima yanyu, mut’ Ijambo Uhoraho atāvuze tuzorimenya dute?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Umuvugishwa azogira ico avuga mw izina ry’Uhoraho, hanyuma ntikibe, ntigishike; ico kizoba kitāvuzwe n’Uhoraho: uwo muvugishwa azoba yahāngāye kucigenera: ntimuze mumutinye." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kurandura ben’ igihugu agira ngw abahe, ari bo ya mahanga, namwe mukegukira ico gihugu cabo, mukinjira ibisagara vyabo n’amazu yabo;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 muze mwirobanurire ibisagara bitatu hagati mu gihugu canyu, ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Muze muharure amabarabara ajayo, kand’ ico gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye kw ishamvu, muze mukigabanye mu bihimba bitatu, kugira ng’ umukoracumu abone guhungira mu gisagara kimwe mur’ ivyo." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Uku ni ko bikwiye kugenda ku vy’umukoracumu azohungirayo, ngw abone gukira: ūzokwica umuntu atabigize ibigirankana, atar’ asanzwe amwanka;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 nk’iy’ umuntu ajanye na mugenzi we mu kibira kwicira ibiti, akihanukīra n’incabiti guca igiti, incabiti ikaroka, ikamījūkira kuri mugenzi we, ikamwica; ben’ uyo az’ ahungire mu gisagara kimwe mur’ ivyo, abone gukira;" 
Deuteronomy19:6 bibe birtyo kugira ng’ umuhōzi amukurikiye ntaz’ amuhamvye mu nzira akiratse, bitewe n’uko habaye kure, akamwica; kand’ atar’ akwiye gupfa, kukw atar’ asanzwe amwanka." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ni co gitumye mbagera, ngo mwirobanurire ibisagara bitatu." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yasunika hirya imbibe zanyu, nk’uko yasezeraniye ba sogokuruza banyu arahira, akabaha igihugu cose yabasezeraniye;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 ni mwitondera ibi vyagezwe vyose mbagera uyu musi, mukabishitsa, mugakunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukāma mugendera mu nzira ziwe, azokibaha; maze muze muheze mwironderere ibindi bisagara bitatu, mubigereke kuri vya bindi bitatu vyari bisanzwe;" 
Deuteronomy19:10 kugira ngw amaraso y’abatācumuye ntaz’ avishirizwe mu gihugu canyu, ico Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye kw ishamvu, ayo maraso akazohava abakora." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Arik’ umuntu ni yanka uwundi, akamuryamira, agaheza akamuvumbukira, akamwica, maz’ agahungira muri kimwe mur’ ivyo bisagara;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 abakuru bo mu gisagara c’i wabo baze batume kumukūrayo, bamushikirize umuhōzi, amwice." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ntimuze mumugirire akagongwe, arikw amaraso y’ūtācumuye muze muyīkūreko mwebge Abisirayeli, kugira ngo mubone kuba mu vyiza." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Ni mwamara kwegukira amashamvu mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye ngo mucinjire, ntihaze hagire ūshingūra akarimbi k’urubibe rw’umubanyi wiwe, kāshinzwe n’aba mbere." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Icabona kimwe gusa ntikirangije kwagiriza umuntu ico yagabitanije cank’ ikindi caha ic’ ari co cose; amajambo az’ aringanizwe, bivuye mu kanwa k’ ivyabona bibiri canke bitatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Umuntu ni yaja kurega uwundi ibinyoma, akamurega ngo yakoze ikibi;" 
Deuteronomy19:17 abo bompi bāgiranya, baze bahagarare imbere y’ Uhoraho, imbere y’abaherezi n’ abacamanza bazoba bariho mur’ ico gihe;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 abo bacamanza baze babibariritse neza; maze ni basanga uwo muntu avuga ibinyoma, kw abeshera mugenzi we," 
Deuteronomy19:19 muze mumushire aho yagira ashire mugenzi we. Ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Abasigaye bazovyumva batinye, boye kwongera gukorera muri mwebge ikibi kingana girtyo." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ntimuze mugirire akagongwe ūmeze artyo; ubugingo buze buhōrwe ubundi, ijisho rihōrwe irindi, iryinyo rihōrwe irindi, igikonjo gihōrwe ikindi, ikirenge gihōrwe ikindi." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Ni mwaja mu ntambara kurwanya abansi banyu, mukabona amafarasi n’imikogote n’ abantu babaruta ubginshi, ntimuze mubatinye; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa azoba ari kumwe namwe." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Maze ni mwashika hafi y’urugamba, umuherezi aze yēgēre abantu, ababarire," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ati Ni mwumve, yemwe Bisirayeli: uyu musi mwēgereye urugamba ngo murwane n’abansi banyu; ntimuranduke imitima, ntimutinye, ntimugire ubgoba, canke ngo mubacikire ivutu;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we ajanye namwe, ngw abarwanire n’abansi banyu, abahe kunesha." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Maz’ abakuru baze babaze abantu, bati Ni nde ari hano yubatse inzu nsha, akaba atarayinjira? N’agende asubire i muhira, ntahave agwa mu ntambara, uwundi akaba ari we ayinjira." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Kandi ni nde ari hano yateye uruzabibu, akaba ataratamira ku nzabibu zarwo? N’agende asubire i muhira, ntahave agwa mu ntambara, uwundi akaba ari we azorya inzabibu zarwo." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Kandi ni nde ari hano yasavye umugeni, akaba ataramurongora? N’agende asubire i muhira, ntahave agwa mu ntambara, uwundi akaba ari we azomurongora." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Abo bakuru bongere babaze abantu, bati Ni nde ari hano atinye, arandutse umutima? N’agende asubire i muhira, imitima ya bagenzi be ntihave isha cōba nk’uwiwe." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Abo bakuru ni bamara kubarira abantu ivyo, baze bashireh’ abagabisha b’ingabo bo kurōngōra abantu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Ni mwashika hafi y’igisagara, mugiye kugitera, muze mubarire abo muri co ngo babakomere amashi." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Maze ni bemera kubakomera amashi, bakabūgururira, abari muri co bose muze mubashinge ibikebere, babakorere." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ariko ni banka kubakomera amashi, bakagomba kurwana namwe, muze muziguze ico gisagara;" 
Deuteronomy20:13 maz’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yakigabura mu maboko yanyu, muze mwicishe inkota uw’ izinamuhungu wese wo muri co;" 
Deuteronomy20:14 arikw abagore n’abana, n’amasho, n’ibiri mur’ ico gisagara vyose, iminyago yaho yose n’isahu, muvyitwarire, murye ivyo mwanyaze abansi banyu, ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ukw az’ abe ari ko muzogenza ibisagara biri kure yanyu bibītāngūye, bitar’ ivy’ aya mahanga y’ino." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ariko mu bisagara vy’aya mahanga y’ino, aho Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibahaye kw ishamvu, ntimuze mukize ikintu na kimwe gihūmēka." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Ariko muze murandure rwose ayo mahanga, ni bo Baheti, n’ Abamori, n’Abanyakanani, n’Abaferizi, n’Abahiwi, n’Abayebusi, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababariye;" 
Deuteronomy20:18 kugira ngo ntibaze babigishe gukora ivy’ ibizira bakora vyose, ivyo bakorera imana zabo, mukaba mucumuye k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Ni mwamara igihe kirekire mujiguje igisagara, muriko murarwana na co ngo mukineshe, ntimuze muhitane incabiti ngo muririke ibiti vyaho, kuko muzorya ivyamye kuri vyo. Ntimuze muvyicire: non’ igiti co ku musozi mbega na co kibaye umuntu, vyotuma mugitera nk’ico gisagara?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Mugabo, ibiti muzi ko bitama ibiribga, muze mubiririke, mubice, muvyubakishe ivyo kwuririrako kur’ ico gisagara kiriko kirabarwanya, gushitsa aho muzogitsindira." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Ni mwasanga umuntu yishwe, arambaraye mu gahinga, muri mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye ngo mucegukire, uwamwishe ntamenyekane;" 
Deuteronomy21:2 abakuru n’abacamanza bo muri mwebge baze bagende, bahēre ah’ uwo muvyimba uri, batambuke intambge bashike ku bisagara biri hafi y’ah’ uwo muntu yiciwe;" 
Deuteronomy21:3 maz’ igisagara kizorusha ibindi kuba hafi yaho, abakuru bo mur’ ico gisagara baze bazane inka y’ishashi bakūye mu busho, itigeze gukoreshwa igikorwa, canke ngw isangire ingōgo n’iyindi, zikwega ikintu;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 bayimanukane mu mwonga ahar’ amazi atemba, hatagira indimiro cank’ imbibe, bayivunire izosi aho nyene mur’ uyo mwonga." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Maz’ abaherezi bo mu ruvyaro rwa Lewi bīgire hafi, kukw abo ari bo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yatoranije ngo bamuhereze, ngo bahezagire n’abantu mw izina ryiwe, kandi ni bo basanzwe baca imanza zose z’imiburano n’iz’ inguma." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Abakuru bose bo mu gisagara kirusha ibindi kuba hafi y’ah’ uwo muntu yiciwe, baze bakarabire kur’ iyo nka yavuniwe izosi mur’ uwo mwonga," 
Deuteronomy21:7 bavuge, bat’ Amaboko yacu si yo yavishije ayo maraso, kandi n’ amaso yacu ntiyabibonye." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Bat’ Uhoraho, harira abantu bawe Abisirayeli, abo wacunguye, kandi ntubahōre amaraso y’uwazize ubusa. Uko ni ko bazoharirwa ayo maraso," 
Deuteronomy21:9 kandi ni ko muzokūra amaraso y’uwazize ubusa hagati muri mwebge, ni mwakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Ni mwagenda gutera abansi banyu, Uhoraho Imana yanyu akabagabura mu maboko yanyu, mukabajana ar’ inyagano;" 
Deuteronomy21:11 ni hagira ūbona mu banyagano umwigeme mwiza cank’ umugore, akamugomwa, akagomba kumwābīra;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 az’ amujane i we, yimoshe, ace inzāra," 
Deuteronomy21:13 akūre impuzu yanyaganywe, agume mu rugo rwiwe, amare ukwezi kwose agandariye se na nyina; hanyuma abone kumwābīra, babane." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Hanyuma ni yabona atakimuhimbaye, az’ amureke agende iy’ agomba; ariko ntaz’ amugure amahera, canke ngw amucuranguze ukw agomba, kukw azoba yamaze kumwonona." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Umugabo ni yagira abagore babiri, umwe akaba inkundwakazi, uwundi akaba intabga, kandi bompi yabavyayeko, umuhungu w’imfura akaba uw’ intabga;" 
Deuteronomy21:16 ni yagera kuraga, ntaz’ ahindure umwana w’inkundwakazi kuba uw’ imfura, mu gishingo c’uw’ intabga, kand’ ari we mfura koko." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Arikw akwiye kwerekana umwana w’ intabga kw ari we mfura, avyerekanishe kumuha imigabane ibiri y’ivy’ atunze vyose: kukw ari we buzibūra bgiwe; ibigerewe imfura n’ivyiwe." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Umuntu ni yagira umwana w’ intabarirwa w’ikigāba, atumvira se na nyina, naho bomukubita agakomeza kutumva;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 se na nyina baze bamufate, bamushīre abakuru bo mu gisagara cabo kw irembo;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 baheze babarire abo bakuru bo mu gisagara, bat’ Uyu mwana wacu n’intabarirwa kandi n’ikigāba, ntakunda kutwumvira; n’umunyangeso mbi kandi yama aborerwa." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Abagabo bose bo mu gisagara cabo baze bamwicishe amabuye: ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge; Abisirayeli bose bazovyumva batinye. 
Deuteronomy21:22 Umuntu ni yakora icaha gikwiye kumwicisha, bakamwica, mukamumanika ku giti;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 umuvyimba wiwe ntuz’ urāre kur’ ico giti, ariko ntimuze mubure kumuhamba kur’ uwo musi nyene: kuk’ ūmanitswe ku giti arik’ umuvumo w’Imana; nuko mumuhambe, kugira ngo ntimwanduze igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye kw ishamvu." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Ni hagira uwo muri mwebge abona inka izimiye, cank’ intama, y’uw’ i wanyu w’Umwisirayeli, wewe uyibonye ntuz’ upfe kwirengagiza, arik’ uz’ uyigarurire inayo." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kandi inayo ni yakuba kure, cank’ ukaba utamuzi, uz’ uyijane i wawe, uyigumye, gushitsa aho inayo azoyironderera, uyimuhe." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Kandi n’indogoba uz’ uyigenze urtyo, bo n’impuzu itakaye, n’ikindi kintu cose c’uw’ i wanyu w’Umwisirayeli cari kizimiye, ukakirengukako: ntuz’ upfe kwirengagiza." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Kandi ni wabona indogoba y’ uw’ i wanyu cank’ inka yiwe itemvye ku nzira, ntuz’ upfe kwirengagiza: ntuz’ ubure kumufasha kuyivyura." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Ntihaze hagire izinamukobga yambarana impuzu n’izinamuhungu, canke ngo hagire izinamuhungu yambarana n’izinamukobga: kuk’ ūkoze ivyo wese aba abaye ikizira k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ni hagira uwo muri mwebge abona icāri c’inyoni ku nzira imbere yiwe, kiri ku giti canke hasi, kirimw’ ivyana cank’ amagi, nyina ikaba ibundikiriye ivyo vyana cank’ amagi; wewe ubibonye, ntuz’ ufate nyina ng’ uyijanane n’ivyana vyayo:" 
Deuteronomy22:7 ntuz’ ubure kureka nyina ngw igende, arikw ivyana ushobora kubitwara; uz’ ureke nyina kugira ng’ ube mu vyiza, urambe." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ni hagira uwubaka inzu nsha muri mwebge, wewe uyubaka uz’ uyikīkūzekw igikugiro hejuru co gutangīra umuntu, ntakoroke, bigahava bizanira inzu yawe guharūrwakw amaraso y’uno akorotse." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ntihaze hagire ūsukiranya imbuto z’imiryango ibiri mu ruzabibu rwiwe, imyimbu yose ikazohava ihinduka inyegu y’Ahēra, ar’ iy’ izo mbuto yarimye, ar’ iy’ imizabibu." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ntihaze hagire ūrimisha inka n’indogoba azisangije ingōgo imwe. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Ntihaze hagire uwambara impuzu ijishwe mu nyuzi z’ubgoko bubiri, nk’iz’ ubgoya bg’intama n’iziva ku giti citwa pishita." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Impuzu zanyu mwambara, muze muzitere ubuyonga mu mitwe yazo ukw ar’ ine." 
Deuteronomy22:13 Umuntu ni yarongora umugeni, akaryamana na we, agaheza akamwanka," 
Deuteronomy22:14 akamurega ibiteye isoni, akamwambika ibara, akavuga, ati Narongoye uyu mugeni, maze ndoye iy’ ari, nsanga atagira ibimenyetso vy’ubgigeme." 
Deuteronomy22:15 Maze se na nyina b’uwo mukobga baze bābīre ibimenyetso vy’ ubgigeme bgiwe, babishīre abakuru b’igisagara cabo mw irembo ryaco." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Se w’uwo mukobga aheze abarire abo bakuru, at’ Uyu mugabo namushingiye umukobga wanje, non’ aramwanse;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 kand’ amureze ibiteye isoni, ngo ntiyasanganye umukobga wanje ibimenyetso vy’ubgigeme; ariko rero, ibimenyetso vy’ubgigeme bgiwe ngibi. Baheze bagaranzure uwo mwambaro imbere y’abakuru b’igisagara." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Abo bakuru bafate uwo muntu bamukubitishe; 
Deuteronomy22:19 bateko bamucire iciru ca shekeli z’ifeza ijana, bazihe se w’uwo mukobga, kuko yambitse ibara umwigeme wanyu Abisirayeli; na we uwo mugore akomeze kuba uwiwe; az’ arinde apfa atamwirukanye." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Na ho ivyo ni vyaba ivy’ ukuri, ata bimenyetso vy’ubgigeme vyabonetse kur’ uwo mukobga," 
Deuteronomy22:21 baze bamusohokane, bamujane ku muryango w’inzu ya se, abagabo bo mur’ ico gisagara cabo bamwicishe amabuye, kuko yakoze ikizira mu Bisirayeli, agasambanira kwa se: ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Umuntu ni yafatwa aryamanye n’umugore w’uwundi, baze babice bompi: abo ukw ari babiri, uwo mugabo yaryamanye n’ uwo mugore, na nya mugore nyene, bapfe; ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi muri mwebge Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Umuntu ni yasanga umukobga mu gisagara, kand’ ar’ umwigeme yasabge n’uwundi, akaryamana na we;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 bompi muze mubajane kw irembo ry’ico gisagara, mubicishe amabuye; umukobga azire kw atavugije induru kandi yari mu gisagara, uwo mugabo azire ko yononye umugeni wa mugenzi we; ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Arik’ umuntu ni yasanga umukobga mu gahinga, kand’ ar’ uwasabge, akamugōbēra, agasambana na we; uwo mugabo yasambanye na we az’ abe ari we apfa wenyene:" 
Deuteronomy22:26 arik’ uyo mukobga ntimuze mugire ico mumugira, kukw ata caha azoba yakoze co kumwicisha: kukw ivyiwe bizoba bibaye nk’uk’ umuntu avira hasi uwundi, akamwica." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Kuk’ uyo mugabo azoba yamusanze mu gahinga, uyo mwigeme akazoba yaravugije induru, hakabura ikimutabara." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Umuntu ni yasanga umukobga akizigamye ubgigeme bgiwe, kand’ ataribgasabge, akamufata, agasambana na we, bakabaserukako;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 uyo mugabo azoba yasambanye na we az’ ahe se w’uyo mukobga inkwano ya shekeli z’ ifeza mirongwitanu, uyo aheze abe umugore wiwe, kuko yamwononye; az’ arinde apfa atamwirukanye." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Ntihaze hagire ūcūra muka se, canke ngo yorosore impuzu ya se, ngw amwambike ubusa." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Umenetse amavya, cank’ ūshāhūwe, ntaz’ agere mw ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Umuntu w’ikivyarwa ntaz’ agere mw ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho; haba n’uwo mu ruvyaro rwiwe azorigeramwo, eka mber’ uko bazogenda bavyarana gushitsa no ku bihe cumi." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Ntihaze hagire Umwamoni cank’ Umunyamowabu agera mw ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho; haba n’ uwo mu runganwe rwabo azorigeramwo, eka mber’ uko ruzogenda rukurikirana gushitsa icumi;" 
Deuteronomy23:4 kuko batābashanganije ivyo kurya n’amazi, igihe mwava muri Egiputa; kandi kuko bāhēreye Balamu mwene Beyori w’i Petori ho muri Aramu‐Naharayimu ngw abavume." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Yamar’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yanka kwumvira Balamu, arik’ uwo muvumo Uhoraho Imana yanyu awubahindurira umugisha, kuko yabakunda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Muze murinde mupfa mutabendeje ivy’ amahoro cank’ ivyiza ukw ibihe bizoha ibindi. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Ntimuze mugirire akazīka Abanyedomu, kuko mur’ akara kamwe, kandi ntimugirire akazīka Abanyegiputa, kuko mwar’ inyambukīra mu gihugu cabo." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Abuzukuru babo bazovuka hanyuma bazoshobora kuja mw ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ni mwagenda gutera abansi banyu, mukagira aho mushagaje, muze mwirinde ikintu kitabereye cose." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Muri mwebge ni hagira umugabo yagize ivyamubayeko mw ijoro, bikamuhumanya, az’ agende ave aho mushagaje, ntaz’ ahagaruke uwo musi;" 
Deuteronomy23:11 maze bugira bugorobe, yiyuhagire; izuba rirenze, abone kugaruka aho mushagaje." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Kandi muze mugire ahantu hirya y’aho mushagaje, h’ukwihagarika;" 
Deuteronomy23:13 kand’ umuntu wese muri mwebge az’ agire ikimīto agendana; maz’ iy’ agiye ku gahinga, akicara, az’ acimbishe ikinogo, aheze arenzekw ivu ibimuvuyemwo:"
