Deuteronomy23:14 kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu agendagenda hagati y’aho mushagaje, kugira ngw abakize, agabure abansi banyu mu maboko yanyu; ni co gituma aho mushagaje hakwiye kuba ahantu hera, kugira ngo ntaz’ ababonemw’ ikintu na kimwe giteye ishishi, akarora irya, akabata." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Ni hagira umugurano acika, ahunze shebuja, agahungira muri mwebge, ntimuze mumumuhe;" 
Deuteronomy23:16 az’ abane namwe, abe hagati muri mwebge, ah’ azokwihitiramwo kuba mu bisagara vyanyu, ah’ ashima: ntimuze mumugirire nabi." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Ntihaze habemwo ba maraya mu Bisirayelikazi, canke ngo hagire abagabo bendana mu Bisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Ntihaze hagire ūjana mu ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibihērewe maraya, cank’ ibihērewe umugabo yendwa, ngw abishikishe isezerano iry’ ari ryo ryose: kukw ivyo vyompi ar’ ubuyobe k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Muri mwebge ntihaze hagire ūgurāna mugenzi we ngw amucire ivy’ inyungu, ar’ amahera, ar’ ivyo kurya, ar’ ikindi kintu cose cotanzwekw inyungu." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Umunyamahanga we murashobora kumucira ivy’ inyungu iyo mumugurānye, arik’ uw’ i wanyu ntimuze mumucire inyungu: kugira ng’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibahe umugisha ku co muzoba mukoze cose muri mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Muri mwebge ni hagira ūsezeranira isezerano Uhoraho Imana yiwe, ntaz’ atebe kurishitsa; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe itazobura kubimubaza, agasanga vyamuhindukiye icaha." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ariko ni yareka kugira ico asezerana, ntibizomubera icaha." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Ibimwiviriye mu kanwa az’ avyitondere, abishitse, kukw ari vyo yasezeraniye Uhoraho Imana yiwe bivuye mu mutima, akabivugisha akanwa." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Muri mwebge ni hagira ūshika mu ruzabibu rw’uwundi, inzabibu ashobora kuzirīra aho nyene ukw agomba, agahāga; ariko ntagire izo atēkera mu co afise." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kandi ni hagira ūca mu mahonda y’uwundi, ashobora kumyoza utwo ahekenya, ariko ntashobora gushira umuhoro muri yo." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Umuntu ni yarongora umugeni, hanyuma ntamushime, kuko har’ igiteye isoni yamubonyeko, amwandikire icete co kuvāvānura, akimuhe, amwirukane mu rugo rwiwe." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ni yamara kuva mur’ urwo rugo, ashobora kwābīrwa n’uwundi." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Kand’ uwo mugabo wa kabiri ni yamwanka, akamwandikira icete co kuvāvānura, akamwirukana mu rugo rwiwe, cank’ uwo mugabo wa kabiri yamwābiriye agapfa;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 umugabo wiwe wa mbere yamwirukanye ntaz’ amugarukane, kuko yamaze kwononekara; kukw ivyo ar’ ikizira k’Uhoraho; ntimuze mukwegere icaha igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibaha kw ishamvu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Umuntu arongoye vuba ntakwiye kuja mu ntambara, canke ngw akoreshwe igikorwa ic’ ari co cose; ariko bamureke umwaka wose, anezereze umugore wiwe yarongoye." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Ntihaze hagire umuntu atwara urusyo rw’uwundi cank’ ingasire kw ingwati y’umwenda, kuko yoba atwaye amagara y’umuntu." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Ni hagira uwiba umuntu w’i wabo w’Umwisirayeli, akamujana, akamugira umuja cank’ akamushōra, bakamumufatana; uwo musuma aze yicwe: ukw az’ abe ari ko mukūra ikibi hagati muri mwebge." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Muze mwitwaririke ivy’ indwara y’imibembe, kugira ngo mugire umwete wo kwitondera no gushitsa ivyo abaherezi ari bo Balewi bazobigisha vyose; nk’ukw abo nabibageze, az’ abe ari ko namwe muvyitondera, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Muze mwibuke ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yagiriye Miriyamu, aho mwari mu rugendo muva muri Egiputa." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Muri mwebge ni hagira ūgurāna mugenzi we ikintu ic’ ari co cose, ntashobora kwinjira mu nzu yiwe kwiha ingwati." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Az’ ahagarare hanze, uwo yagurānye abe ari we amusohokanira ingwati." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kandi ni yaba ar’ umworo, ntaz’ arāre mu mpuzu yamugwatirije;" 
Deuteronomy24:13 ntaz’ abure kuyimusubiza izuba rikirenga, kugira ngw arāre mu mpuzu yiwe, amuhezagire; ivyo bizomubera ukugororoka imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Muri mwebge ntihaze hagire ūgirira nabi umukozi w’umucangero, kand’ ar’ umworo w’umukene, ar’ uwo mu b’i wanyu, cank’ uwo mu banyamahanga baba mu bisagara vyanyu, mu gihugu canyu:" 
Deuteronomy24:15 az’ ahore amuha ingero yiwe ku musi ayikoreye; izuba ntirize rirenge atarayimuha; kukw ar’ umworo, ari ho ashize umutima; yoye kuzohava atakambira Uhoraho amurega, akagībgako n’icaha." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Abavyeyi ntibaze bicwe bazize abana babo, kand’ abana ntibaze bicwe bazize abavyeyi: umuntu wese az’ azire iciwe caha." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Ntihaze hagire ūgoreka urubanza rw’umunyamahanga, cank’ urw’ impfuvyi; canke ngo hagire uwaka umupfakazi impuzu yiwe kw ingwati:" 
Deuteronomy24:18 ariko muze mwibuke yuko mwari mu buja muri Egiputa, Uhoraho Imana yanyu akahabagobōtora: ni co gitumye mbabuza kuzogenza murtyo." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Ni mwimbura imirima yanyu, hakagira uwibagiriray’ umuganda, ntaz’ asubireyo kuwuzana: uzoba uw’ umunyamahanga cank’ uw’ impfuvyi cank’ uw’ umupfakazi; kugira ng’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahezagire mu bikorwa vyanyu vyose." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Muri mwebge iyo hagize ūja guhungurura ivyamye ku giti ciwe c’umwelayo, ntaz’ asubire gusesa mu mashami yawo ubugira kabiri: ibisigaye bizoba ivy’ umunyamahanga cank’ impfuvyi cank’ umupfakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Kand’ iyo hagize ūja kwāmūra inzabibu mu ruzabibu rwiwe, ntaz’ asubiremwo guhūmba: izisigaye zizoba iz’ umunyamahanga cank’ impfuvyi cank’ umupfakazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Kandi muze mwibuke yuko mwari mu buja mu gihugu ca Egiputa: ni co gitumye mbagera kuzogenza murtyo. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Ni hagira abantu bari n’ico bapfa, bakaja kubūrana, bakabacira urubanza, haze hatsinde ūrufise, hatsindwe uwakoze nabi;" 
Deuteronomy25:2 kandi namb’ uyo yakoze nabi yakoze ibikwiye kumukubitisha, umucamanza avuge kw aryama, bamukubitire imbere yiwe igitigiri c’inkoni zihwanye n’ikibi yakoze." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ashobora gushitsa ku nkoni mirongwine, ariko ntaz’ azirenze; kugira ng’ uyo w’i wanyu yoye gukēngēreka kuri mwebge, ni yazirenza, akamukubita izindi nyinshi." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Ntimuze murumye umunwa w’inka irikw irasekura ingano. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Abavukana babana, umwe ni yapfa adasize umuhungu, umugore w’uyo apfuye ntaz’ acūrwe n’ uw’ ahandi, ariko muramu we az’ abe ari we amwābīra, amucūre, amugirire ibikwiye muramu w’ umuntu." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Maz’ uw’ imfura azotangura kuvyara az’ abe ari we asubira mu gishingo c’uwapfuye, kugira ngw izina ryiwe ryoye kuzimangana mu Bisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Arik’ uwo mugabo n’atākunda gucūra umugorabo, uwo mugorabo az’ aje kw irembo ry’igisagara, abarire abashingantahe, ati Muramwanje yanse guhonōra uwabo ngw izina ryiwe ntirizimangane mu Bisirayeli, ntakunze kungirira ibikwiye muramu w’umuntu." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Abo bashingantahe bo mur’ ico gisagara cabo baheze bamuhamagaze, bamuhanūre; n’atemera gukūrwa kw ijambo, akavuga ati Singomba kumucūra;" 
Deuteronomy25:9 uwo mugorabo agende amushikīre imbere y’abo bashingantahe, amukūre inkweto mu kirenge, amucire amate mu maso, avuge, at’ Uku ni kw agirirwa, uwanse guhonōra uwo bavukana!" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ab’ inzu yiwe baze bahore bavugwa bartya mu Bisirayeli, ngw Inzu y’uwakūwe inkweto." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Abagabo ni birwanira, umugore w’umwe muri bo akaza gutabara umugabo wiwe ūrikw aramukubita, agatuma ukuboko, agafata uwo mugabo epfo;" 
Deuteronomy25:12 nya mugore muze mumuce igikonjo, ata kagongwe." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Muri mwebge ntihaze hagire ūgira mw isaho yiwe amabuye ageresha ikilo kimwe, kand’ aciye ukubiri, rimwe ari rinini, irindi ari ritoya." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Kandi ntihaze hagire ūgira mu nzu yiwe ingero ziciye ukubiri avuga ngo ni efa, imwe ari nini, iyindi ari ntoya." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Arikw amabuye ashitse, y’ukuri, az’ abe ari yo mugeresha; n’ingero zitwa efa zishitse, z’ ukuri, az’ abe ari zo mugeresha; kugira ngo muze murambire mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Kukw abakora ben’ ivyo bose, abakora ibidatunganye bose, baba babaye ikizira k’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Muze mwibuke ivyo Abamaleki babagiriye muri mu nzira, igihe mwava muri Egiputa;" 
Deuteronomy25:18 uko babategeye mu nzira, bakica abasigaye inyuma bo muri mwebge, abanyantegenke bose, hamwe mwari munaniwe murushe; ntibatinye Imana." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ni co gituma Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni yamara kubakiza abansi banyu bose impande zose, akabaha kuruhukira mu gihugu abahaye kw ishamvu ngo mucegukire, muzoba mukwiye kuzimanganya ukumenyekana kw’Abamaleki, bibagirane mu bo musi y’ijuru bose: ntimuze muvyibagire." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Ni mwamara kwinjira igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye kw ishamvu, mukacegukira, mukakibamwo;" 
Deuteronomy26:2 muze mwābīre ku vy’umushuzo vyo mu mirima yanyu, ivyo muzokwimburira mu gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahaye, umuntu wese abishire mu gisimbo, abijane ha hantu Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yātoranije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe ngo rihabe." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Az’ ashikīre umuherezi azoba ariho mur’ ico gihe, amubarire, at’ Uyu musi Uhoraho Imana yawe ndamwaturiye yuko nashitse mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza bacu kw azokiduha." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Uwo muherezi amwākīrire ico gisimbo, akijane agitereke imbere y’igicaniro c’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Wa wundi akomeze kwaturira imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, ati Sogokuruza yar’ Umwaramu w’inyererezi; aramanuka, aja muri Egiputa, babayo ar’ imparūrwa; bahindukirayo ihanga rinini rihambaye, ry’isinzi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 At’ Abanyegiputa batugirira nabi, badutwaza ituntu, badushira mu buja bukomeye." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Maze dutakambira Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza, Uhoraho yumva ugutakamba kwacu, abona amarushwa yacu, n’ ubucumukure bgacu, n’agahahazo turimwo." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Ati Maz’ Uhoraho adukūra muri Egiputa, adukūzayo ukuboko kw’inkomezi kandi kubanguye, n’ibiteye ubgoba bihambaye, n’ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Araheza atuzana ino, aduha iki gihugu, ar’ igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ati None nzanye ku vy’umushuzo vyo mu mirima wampaye, ewe Uhoraho. Ukw az’ abe ari kw abitereka imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, amusenge." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Aheze anezererwe ivyiza vyose Uhoraho Imana yiwe yamuhaye, anezeranwe n’abo mu rugo rwiwe, n’Umulewi n’inyambukīra baba i wabo." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Ni mwamara gukūra ikigiracumi ku vyo mwejeje vyose mu mwaka ugira gatatu, ari wo mwaka wo gutangamw’ ibigiracumi nyene, muze mubihe Abalewi n’inyambukīra n’impfuvyi n’abapfakazi, babirīre i wanyu, bahāge;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 umuntu wese aheze avugire imbere y’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ati Nkūye ivyarobanuwe mu nzu yanje, mbihaye Umulewi n’inyambukīra n’ impfuvyi n’umupfakazi, nk’ukw ivyagezwe vyawe vyose biri, ivyo wangeze; sinaciye mu cagezwe cawe na kimwe, canke ngo ngire ico nibagira muri vyo;" 
Deuteronomy26:14 sinatamiye kur’ ivyo vyarobanuwe ngandaye; sinabiteruye mpumanye, canke ngo ndabitange kw ibiterekerezwa imizimu; ariko numviye wewe Uhoraho Imana yanje, nitondeye ivyo wangeze vyose." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Tuma inyonga zawe hasi, ur’ iyo mw ijuru ah’ uba hēra, uduhe umugisha twebge abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, twe n’igihugu waduhaye, nk’uko warahiye ba sogokuruza kuzoduha igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Uyu musi Uhoraho Imana yanyu ababariye kwumvira ayo mabgirizwa n’ayo matēka yashinze; nuko muze muvyitondere, mubishizekw imitima yanyu yose n’ ubugingo bganyu bgose, mubishitse." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Uyu musi mwātuye yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana yanyu, kandi ko muzogendera mu nzira ziwe, mukitondera amabgirizwa yiwe n’ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amatēka yashinze, mukamwumvira." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Kand’ Uhoraho na we uyu musi yātuye ko muzomubera ihanga yiharije, nk’uko yabasezeraniye; nuko mukwiye kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose," 
Deuteronomy26:19 kugira ngw abasumbishe ayandi mahanga yose yaremye, muyarushe gushemagizwa no kwāmāmara no kwubahwa, mubere Uhoraho Imana yanyu ihanga ryera, nk’uko yavuze." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mose n’abakuru b’Abisirayeli babarira abantu, bati Muze mwitondere ivyagezwe vyose mbagera uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Umusi muzojabuka Yorodani, mugashika muri ca gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye, muze mushinge amabuye manini‐manini, muyahome ingwa;" 
Deuteronomy27:3 muheze muyandikekw amajambo yose y’ivyo vyagezwe, mugiheza kujabuka, kugira ngo mubone kwinjira ico gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza yabasezeraniye." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Nuko ni mwamara kujabuka Yorodani muze mushinge ayo mabuye mbageze uyu musi ku musozi Ebalu, muyahome ingwa." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Kandi muze muhubakire Uhoraho Imana yanyu igicaniro c’amabuye, mutayakojejekw icitwa icuma." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Igicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu muze mucubakishe amabuye atabājwe; muheze mucoserezekw ibimazi muhaye Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Deuteronomy27:7 mutange n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe, mubirīre aho nyene, munezererwe imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Kandi muze mwandike kuri ya mabuye amajambo yose y’ivyo vyagezwe uburyo busomeka neza. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Maze Mose n’abaherezi ari bo Balewi babarira Abisirayeli bose, bati Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni muhore, mwumve: uyu musi muhindutse ihanga ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe, ivyo mbagera uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Maze Mose agera abantu kur’ uwo musi," 
Deuteronomy27:12 at’ Aba az’ abe ari bo bahagarara ku musozi Gerizimu mu guhezagira abantu, mumaze kujabuka Yorodani: Abasimeyoni, n’Abalewi, n’Abayuda, n’Abisakari, n’Abayosefu, n’Ababenyamini;" 
Deuteronomy27:13 aba na bo az’ abe ari bo bahagarara ku musozi Ebalu mu kuvuma: Abareyubeni, n’Abagadi, n’Abasheri, n’Abazebuloni, n’Abadani, n’Abanafutali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Maz’ Abalewi baze babarire abantu b’Abisirayeli bose, bababarire mw ijwi rirenga," 
Deuteronomy27:15 bat’ Azoba avumwe, umuntu abāza igishushanyo cank’ akakivugutira mu nkero, ar’ igikorwa c’umuhinga, akagishinga mu mpisho, kand’ ar’ ubuyobe k’ Uhoraho. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūkēngēra se canke nyina. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūshingūra akarimbi k’urubibe rw’ umubanyi wiwe. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūhuvya impumyi ngw ite inzira yayo. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūgoreka urubanza rw’inyambukīra, canke rw’impfuvyi canke rw’umupfakazi. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūryamana na muka se, kukw aba yorosoye impuzu ya se. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūryamana n’igitungano ic’ ari co cose. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūryamana na mushiki we, ar’ uwo basangiye se canke nyina. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūryamana na inabukwe. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, uwica mugenzi we mu mpisho. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūhērewe ngw aje kwica umuntu ata co yakoze. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:26 Abalewi bat’ Azoba avumwe, ūdashitsa amajambo y’ibi vyagezwe ngw ayitondere. Abantu bose bitabirize, bati Amen." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Ni mwagira umwete wo kwumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose mbagera uyu musi, mukabishitsa, Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobashira hejuru gusumba amahanga yose yo mw isi." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Kand’ iyi mihezagiro izobazako, ibashikīre, ni mwumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Muzogira umuhezagiro mu bisagara, muzowugira no mu matongo." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Uruvyaro rwo mu nda zanyu ruzohezagirwa, bo n’ imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu, n’uruvyaro rw’amasho yanyu, inka zanyu zirondoke, bo n’imikuku yanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Mu bisimbo vyanyu hazoba umuhezagiro, bo no mu twato twanyu mucumbamwo." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Muzogira umuhezagiro mu maja no mu maza. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Uhoraho azotuma abansi banyu babakūriye hasi batsindirwa imbere yanyu: bazozanana inzira imwe babateye, babahunge baciye mu nzira ndwi." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Uhoraho azorungika umugisha ubane namwe, ube mu bigega vyanyu no mu vyo mukora vyose; kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobahēra umugisha mu gihugu abahaye." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Uhoraho azobahagarikira ngo mumubere ihanga ryera, nk’uko yabarahiye, ni mwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe, Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukagendera mu nzira ziwe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Kand’ amahanga yose yo kw isi azobona yuko mwitiriwe izina ry’Uhoraho, abatinye." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Uhoraho azobasesekariza ivyiza, agwize uruvyaro rwo mu nda zanyu, n’urwo mu masho yanyu, n’ imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu, mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu kw azokibaha." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Uhoraho azobugururira ijuru, ari ryo bubīko bgiwe buninahaye, ngw ahe igihugu canyu imvura mu gihe cayo, ahezagire n’ibikorwa vyanyu vyose; amahanga menshi azoza kubagurāna, ariko mweho ntimuzoja kuyagurāna." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Uhoraho azobagira umutwe, ntazobagira umurizo; muzokwama mur’ abo hejuru, ntimuzoba abo hasi, ni mwumvira ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana yanyu mbagera uyu musi, mukavyitondera mukabishitsa," 
Deuteronomy28:14 ntimukikamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso, ngo muve ku kintu na kimwe mu vyo mbageze uyu musi, mukaja kugendanira izindi mana ngo muzisabe." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Ariko ni mutumvira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ngo mwitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose n’amabgirizwa yiwe yose mbagera uyu musi, iyi mivumo yose izobazako, ibashikīre." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Muzogira umuvumo mu gisagara, muzogira umuvumo mu ndimiro." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Mu bisimbo vyanyu hazoba umuvumo, bo no mu twato twanyu mucumbamwo." 
Deuteronomy28:18 Uruvyaro rwo mu nda zanyu ruzovumwa, bo n’imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu, n’uruvyaro rw’inka zanyu n’urw’ imikuku yanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Muzogira umuvumo mu maja no mu maza. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Uhoraho azobarungikira umuvumo, n’amananiza, n’ubgihebūre, mu vyo muzogerageza gukora vyose, gushitsa aho muzorandurirwa, mugaherengetera vuba, muhōwe ibibi muzoba mwakoze, vyatumye mumuheba." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Uhoraho azobatērēra ikīza, kibūmireko, kugeza ah’ azobaherengetereza mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Uhoraho azobatērēra ibizotuma mugenda mukōnyēra bo no kurwara inyonko n’ibivyimba birurumba, n’indugumba n’ikigatwa n’ukurumvya n’ururyi rw’agahezambuto: bizobakurikirana gushitsa muhonnye." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ijuru ryo hejuru yanyu rizomera nk’umuringa, n’isi muhagazeko ibe nk’icuma." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Mu gishingo c’imvura Uhoraho azorekurira umusenyi n’umukungugu mu gihugu canyu, gushitsa murandutse." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Uhoraho azotuma muneshwa n’abansi banyu: muzojana inzira imwe mubateye, mu kubahunga muce mu nzira ndwi; muzoba akūmiza mu bihugu vyose vyo mw isi." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Imivyimba yanyu izoba inyama z’ibisīga vyose vyo mu kirere, n’iz’ ibikōko vyo kw isi, ntihazogira ūvyāmurura." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Uhoraho azobatērēra ibihute nk’ivyo yatērereye Abanyegiputa, no gusiduka amagara, n’urukemba n’ amahere, ivyo mutazoshobora kuvūrwa." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Uhoraho azobatērēra ibisazi n’ubuhumyi n’ubuyingiyingi; 
Deuteronomy28:29 muzogenda mukabakaba ku murango w’amashōka, nk’ukw impumyi ikabakaba mu mwiza, kandi ntimuzogira ukuboko kwiza mu vyo mukora; muzokwama muhahazwa munyagwa na ntaryo, ata kibatabara." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Muzosaba abageni, barongorwe n’abandi; muzokwubaka amazu, ntimuyabemwo; muzotera imizabibu, ntimuzoyāmūra." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Inka zanyu zizobāgwa mubona, ntimuzoziryako; indogoba zanyu zizonyagwa murorēra, ntimuzikomōrerwe; intama zanyu zizohabga abansi banyu, ntihagire ikibatabara." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu bazonyagwa bahabge irindi hanga, amaso yanyu azokwama areretse, ahere mu nzira burinde bgira, kubgo kubakumbura, ata co mushobora gukora." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu, n’ivyo mwakoze vyose, bizoribga n’ihanga mutazi; muzokwama muhahazwa mucuranguzwa na ntaryo," 
Deuteronomy28:34 bitume musazwa n’ivyo amaso yanyu azobona biba. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Uhoraho azobatērēra ibihute bibi mu mavi no ku maguru, mudashobora kuvūrwa; mber’ azobibatēza bihēre mu bgoro bg’ikirenge bigeze mu gitwariro." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Uhoraho azobatangana n’umwami muzoba mwiyimikiye, abatange mu maboko y’ihanga mutigeze kumenya, mwe na ba sogokuruza; mushitseyo muzohasabira izindi mana z’ibiti n’iz’ amabuye." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Kandi mur’ ayo mahanga yose ah’ Uhoraho azoba yarabajanye, muzohahindukira akajoreza n’iciro ry’imigani n’agashinyaguro." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Muzosohora imbuto nyinshi, mwimbure bike, kukw inzige zizobirya." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Muzotera imizabibu, muyikorere, ariko ntimuzonywa vino yayo, canke ngo muyāmūre, kukw ingungu zizoyirya." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mu gihugu canyu cose muzoba mufise imyclayo, ariko ntimuzokwisiga amavuta yayo, kukw iyo myelayo yanyu izorumba." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Muzovyara abahungu n’abakobga, ariko ntibazoba abanyu, kuko bazoshorerwa ar’ inyagano." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Ibiti vyanyu vyose n’ imirima yanyu inzige ni zo zizovyihariza. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Abanyamahanga bari muri mwebge ni bo bazogenda barushiriza kuja hejuru, namwe muzogenda murushiriza gusubira hasi." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Muzoja kubagurāna, ariko bo ntibazoza kubagurāna; bo bazoba umutwe namwe mube umurizo." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Kand’ iyo mivumo yose izobashikako; izobakurikirana, ibahamvye, gushitsa aho muzorandukira, kuko muzoba mutumviye Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ngo mwitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe, ivyo yabageze." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Iyo mivumo izoba kuri mwebge ngw ibe ikimenyetso n’akūmiza, bo no ku ruvyaro rwanyu ibihe vyose." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Ko muzoba mwaranse gukoreranira Uhoraho Imana yanyu umunezero n’umutima ukunze, mugifise umurengera wa vyose," 
Deuteronomy28:48 ni co kizotuma mukorera abansi banyu, abo Uhoraho azobagomorera kubatēra, mufise inzara n’inyota, mwambaye ubusa, muburaniwe muri vyose; azobambika ingōgo y’icuma mw izosi, gushitsa ah’ azobaherengetereza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Uhoraho azobagomorera ihanga rya kure, ribatere, arikūye ku mpera y’isi, rize nk’ukw inkukuma yirasa, ihanga mutazomenya ururimi rwaryo," 
Deuteronomy28:50 ihanga rigendana ijisho rikaze, ritazosonera abashaje, canke ngo rigirire abana akagongwe." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Bazorya inyana z’ inka zanyu, n’ivyo imirima yanyu izoba yarēze, gushitsa aho muzorandukira; nta co bazobasigariza, ar’ icitwa uruheke, canke vino, cank’ amavuta ya elayo, cank’ uruvyaro rw’inka zanyu cank’ urw’ imikuku yanyu, gushitsa aho bazobahonereza." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Bazota hagati ibisagara vyanyu vyose, bavyugarize, gushitsa ah’ inzitiro zanyu ndende zikomeye muzoba mwizigiye, zizohomvagurirwa mu gihugu canyu cose; mbere bazokwugariza ibisagara vyanyu vyose vyo mu gihugu canyu cose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Kandi kubgo kwugarizwa no gusūgerezwa, abansi banyu bazoba babasugereje, muzoruhira kurya uruvyaro mwivyariye, murye abana banyu b’ abahungu n’abakobga, abo Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yarabahaye." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Umugabo wo muri mwebge yamenyereye kudibama, yamye ar’ igifyine, azorāba irarīrari mugenzi we, n’umugore wiwe bāpfumbatirana, n’abana biwe azoba yar’ agisigaranye," 
Deuteronomy28:55 bitume ata n’umwe muri bo aha ku nyama z’abana biwe azohora arya, kukw azoba asigaye aburaniwe, kubgo kwugarizwa no gusūgerezwa, abansi banyu bazoba babasūgereje mu bisagara vyanyu vyose." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Umugore wo muri mwebge yamenyereye kudibama, yahora yamikaye, atohīrahīra ngw akandagize ikirenge hasi kubgo kwamikara no kudibama, azorāba irarīrari umugabo wiwe bāpfumbatirana, n’umwana wiwe w’umuhungu n’ umukobga," 
Deuteronomy28:57 bitume abacura ingovyi yamwiviriye mu nda, abacure n’utubondo twiwe ukw atuvyaye; kukw azobarīra mu mpisho, bitewe no kuburanirwa muri vyose, kubgo kwugarizwa no gusūgerezwa, abansi banyu bazoba babasūgereje mu bisagara vyanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Ni mutitondera amajambo yose yo mur’ ibi vyagezwe vyanditswe mur’ iki gitabo, ngo mubishitse; muteko mutinye iri zina ry’icubahiro riteye ubgoba, ni ry’iri: UHORAHO IMANA YANYU;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 Uhoraho azobatērēra ivyago vy’igitangaza, mwe n’ uruvyaro rwanyu; bizoba ivyago bikomeye, vy’igihe kirekire, n’ indwara zikomeye z’igihe kirekire." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Kandi za ndwara zose mwahora mutinya muri Egiputa azozihindukiza, azibatēze namwe, zibamateko." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Mbere n’indwara zose n’ivyago vyose bitarinze kwandikwa mu gitabo c’ibi vyagezwe, na vyo Uhoraho azobibatēza, kugeza aho muzohonera." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Kandi muzosigara mur’ inkehwa, naho muzoba mwanganya ubginshi n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru; kuko muzoba mutumviye Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kandi nk’uk’ Uhoraho vyamuhimbara kubagirira neza no kubagwiza, ni ko bizomuhimbara kubahonnya no kubatikiza; muzorandurwa mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Kand’ Uhoraho azobashwiragiriza mu mahanga yose, uhereye ku mpera y’isi ugashitsa ku yindi; kandi muzosabiray’ izindi mana z’ibiti n’iz’amabuye, mutigeze kumenya, ari mwebge canke ba sogokuruza banyu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Kandi mur’ ayo mahanga nta mahoro muzohabonera; ntimuzogira uburagamo bg’aho mushinga ikirenge; Uhoraho azobaha kwamana imitima ihagaze, no guhwera mu kajisho, no kugenda muhondobēra mu mitima." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Muzokwama mutegekanya ibigiye kubabako, mwamane ubgoba ku murango no mw ijoro, ata kizigizigi c’uko mugikira." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Buzoca, mugire mut’ Iyo bgira! Buzokwira, mugire mut’ Iyo buca! mubitewe n’ubgoba buri mu mitima yanyu bgayiranduye, n’ivyo amaso yanyu azohora abona." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Kand’ Uhoraho azobasubiza muri Egiputa muri mu māto, mujanye ya nzira nababarira, nti Ntimuzosubira kuyibona ukundi; mushitseyo muzokwishōra mu bansi banyu, ngo mube abagurano n’ abaguranokazi, ariko ntimuzobona uwo kubagura." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Aya ni yo majambo y’isezerano, Uhoraho yabariye Mose gusezeranira n’Abisirayeli mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, yongewe kw isezerano yasezeraniye na bo kuri Horebu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mose ahamagara Abisirayeli bose, arababgira, ati Mwiboneye ivy’ Uhoraho yakoze vyose mu maso yanyu mu gihugu ca Egiputa, abigiriye Farawo n’abamenyekana biwe bose, n’igihugu ciwe cose;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 n’ibigerageza bikomeye, n’ibimenyetso, na vya bitangaza bihambaye, amaso yanyu yiboneye." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Arik’ Uhoraho ntiyabaha umutima wo kubitahura, n’amaso yo kuvyitegereza, n’amatwi yo kuvyumva, gushitsa kur’ uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kand’ Uhoraho ati Namaze imyaka mirongwine mbarōngōra mu bugaragwa; imyambaro yanyu ntiyabashiriyeko, n’ inkweto zo mu birenge vyanyu ntizabashiriyeko." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ntimwagenda murya umutsima, canke ngo munywe vino cank’ inzoga, kugira ngo mumenye yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Dushitse aha hantu, Sihoni umwami w’i Heshiboni na Ogi umwami w’i Bashani baza kudutega ngo baturwanye, turabanesha;" 
Deuteronomy29:8 dushikīra ibihugu vyabo, tubiha Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase, kuba ishamvu yabo." 
Deuteronomy29:9 None rero ni mwitondere amajambo y’iri sezerano, muyashitse, kugira ngo mugire ukuboko kwiza mu vyo mukora vyose." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Rāba uyu musi muhagaze imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu mwese: abakuru b’imiryango, n’ abashingantahe banyu, n’abagabisha banyu, n’abagabo mwese bo mu Bisirayeli," 
Deuteronomy29:11 n’abana banyu, n’abagore banyu, n’abanyamahanga baba mu nsago zanyu, uhereye ku mushenyi wanyu ukageza ku muvomyi;" 
Deuteronomy29:12 muzanywe no kuja mw isezerano ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, isezerano rishingishijwe indahiro, iryo Uhoraho Imana yanyu asezerana namwe uyu musi," 
Deuteronomy29:13 kugira ngw abahagarikire, mumubere ihanga, na we ababere Imana, nk’uko yababgiye, kandi nk’uko yarahiye ba sogokuruza banyu, Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Kandi si mwebge mwenyene nsezeranishiriza iri sezerano n’iyi ndahiro; 
Deuteronomy29:15 ariko ndarisezeranishiriza abahagararanye natwe uyu musi imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yacu, bo n’abatari hano uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Murazi ko twaba mu gihugu ca Egiputa, n’ingene twaciye hagati mu mahanga;" 
Deuteronomy29:17 kandi mwabonye ibizira bākunda, n’ibigirwamana vyabo vy’ ibiti n’amabuye n’ifeza n’izahabu vyari muri bo." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Muri mwebge ntihaze hagire ūkūra umutima k’Uhoraho Imana yacu, ngw aje gusaba imana z’ayo mahanga, ar’ umugabo cank’ umugore cank’ inzu cank’ umuryango; kugira ngo muri mwebge hoye kuba umuzi uzana ibamba n’umururazi." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ntihaze hagire uwumva amajambo y’uyu muvumo, ngo yihende mu mutima wiwe, ati Nzoba amahoro, naho mpfa uko ngenze; ivyo vyoba ar’ ukurandurana ibitotahaye n’ivyumye." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Uhoraho ntazokwemera kumuharira, arik’ uburake bgiwe n’ifūhe ryiwe bizopfūndūka nk’umwotsi kur’ uyo muntu, imivumo yose yanditswe mur’ iki gitabo imurundaneko, kand’ Uhoraho azozimiriza izina ryiwe musi y’ijuru." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Uhoraho azomutandukanya n’ imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ngw amutērēre ivyago bihwanye n’ imivumo yose yo mw isezerano ryanditswe mur’ iki gitabo c’ ivyagezwe." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Kand’ urunganwe ruzoza hanyuma, ari bo bana banyu bazokura babakurikiye, bo n’ umunyamahanga azova mu gihugu ca kure, ni babona ivyago vyabaye mur’ ico gihugu n’indwara Uhoraho yagiteje," 
Deuteronomy29:23 bakabona yukw ico gihugu cose cabaye amazuku n’umunyu, cahiye uburimbi, ko kitakirimwa, canke ngo kimere, canke ngo kibemwo n’akātsi, ko gisigaye kimeze nk’ukw i Sodomu hākomvomvowe, bo n’i Gomora n’i Adima n’i Seboyimu, ibisagara Uhoraho yakomvomvoje uburake bgiwe n’ubushangashirwe bgiwe;" 
Deuteronomy29:24 bazobaza, mbere n’amahanga yose azobaza, bati Mbega n’iki cateye Uhoraho kugirira ico gihugu artyo? ubgo burake bg’inkazi bururumba bgavuye ku ki?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Abantu bazobishura, bati N’uko bāretse isezerano ry’Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sekuruza, iryo yari yasezeranye na bo, igihe yabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 bakagenda bagasaba izindi mana, bakazisenga, ar’ imana batari bigeze kumenya, izo Uhoraho atābashingiye." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Bati Ni co catumye uburake bgiwe buziriringira ico gihugu, bukakizanira imivumo yose yanditswe mur’ iki gitabo," 
Deuteronomy29:28 Uhoraho akabarandura, akabakūra mu gihugu cabo, bivuye kw ishavu abafitiye, n’uburake n’ubushangashirwe bginshi, akabashiburira mu kindi gihugu, nk’uko biri uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Ibikir’ amabanga n’ivy’ Uhoraho Imana yacu, arikw ibimaze guhishurwa n’ivyacu n’uruvyaro rwacu ibihe vyose, kugira ngo twitondere amajambo yose y’ibi vyagezwe." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Igihe ivyo vyose bizoba vyabashitseko, ivy’ umugisha n’umuvumo nabashize imbere, mukavyibukira iyo muri mu mahanga yose ah’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba yarabirukaniye," 
Deuteronomy30:2 mugahindukirira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukamwumvira muri vyose, nk’ uko mbibagera uyu musi, mwe n’abana banyu, mumwumvirishije imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 Uhoraho Imana yanyu azotuma muhindukira, muve mu kinyago, abagirire ikigongwe, asubire kubakoraniriza hamwe, abakūye mu mahanga yose ah’ azoba yarabasābagirije." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kandi namba har’ abirukanywe bo muri mwebge bazoba bar’ iy’ ijuru riherera, Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobakūrayo, abakoranye, mber’ iyo ni ho azoja kubazana." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobasubiza mu gihugu car’ ishamvu ya ba sogokuruza, namwe mucegukire; kand’ azobagirira neza, abagwize gusumvya ba sogokuruza." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azokūrah’ ukudakebga kwo mu mitima yanyu, n’ukwo mu mitima y’uruvyaro rwanyu, kugira ngo mumukundishe imitima yanyu yose, n’ubugingo bganyu bgose, mubone kubaho." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoshira iyo mivumo yose ku bansi banyu no ku bazoba babagendanira inzigo no ku babadendereza. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Namwe muzohindukirira Uhoraho, mumwumvire, mwitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe vyose mbagera uyu musi." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobasesekariza ivyiza mu bikorwa vyanyu vyose, agwize uruvyaro rwo mu nda zanyu, n’urwo mu masho yanyu, n’imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu; kuk’ Uhoraho azokwongera kunezererwa kubagirira neza, nk’uko yanezererwa ba sogokuruza," 
Deuteronomy30:10 namba muzoba mwumviye Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mukitondera ivyagezwe n’ amabgirizwa vyanditswe mur’ iki gitabo c’ivyagezwe, mukamuhindukirira, mukamurondeza imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Kukw ivyo vyagezwe mbageze uyu musi atar’ ivyo kubananira, kand’ atar’ ibiri kure." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Ntibiri mw ijuru, ngo muvuge, muti Ni nde yotudūgira mw ijuru, kugira ngw abituzanire, ngo tuvyumvire, tuvyitondere?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Kandi ntibiri hakurya y’ikiyaga, ngo muvuge, muti Ni nde yotujabukira ikiyaga, ngw abituzanire, ngo tuvyumvire, tuvyitondere?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Arikw iryo jambo riri hafi yanyu cane, mbere riri mu kanwa kanyu no mu mitima yanyu, ngo mubone kuryitondera." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Ehe rāba, uyu musi mbashize imbere ubugingo n’amahirwe, bo n’urupfu n’amagorwa;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 kuk’ uyu musi mbabariye gukunda Uhoraho Imana yanyu, no kugendera mu nzira ziwe, no kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe n’amatēka yashinze, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mugasāre, Uhoraho Imana yanyu abahēre umugisha mu gihugu mugiye kwinjira ngo mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ariko ni mwakikama mu mitima yanyu, mukanka kwumvira, mukemera inyosha, mugasenga izindi mana, mukazisaba," 
Deuteronomy30:18 uyu musi ndabamenyesha yuko mutazobura guhona; ntimuzomara igihe kinini mu gihugu mugiye kujabuka Yorodani ngo mucinjire, mucegukire." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Uyu musi ntanze ijuru n’isi kw ivyabona bizobāgiriza, yuko mbashize imbere ubugingo n’urupfu, umugisha n’umuvumo; nuko ni muhitemw’ ubugingo, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, mwe n’uruvyaro rwanyu," 
Deuteronomy30:20 mukunde Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mumwumvire, mwifatanye na we akaramata, kukw ari we bugingo bganyu n’ukuramba kwanyu; kugira ngo mubone kuba mu gihugu yarahiye ba sogokuruza Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo, kw azokibaha." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Maze Mose arakomeza, abgira Abisirayeli bose aya majambo." 
Deuteronomy31:2 Arababarira, at’ Ubu mmaze imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri, singishobora gutēra ururengo, kand’ Uhoraho yarambariye, ati Ntuzojabuka uru ruzi Yorodani." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Uhoraho Imana yanyu ni we azojabuka abagiye imbere, kand’ azorandura ayo mahanga ar’ imbere yanyu, namwe mwegukire igihugu cabo: kandi Yosuwa ni we azojabuka abagiye imbere, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Kand’ ayo mahanga Uhoraho azoyagirira nk’ uko yagiriye Sihoni na Ogi, abami b’Abamori, n’igihugu cabo, abo yaranduye." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Uhoraho azobagabura mu maboko yanyu, namwe muze mubagirire nk’uko nabageze kwose." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Mushikame, mushire amanga, ntimutinye, ntimubacikire ivutu: kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we azojana namwe; ntazobaheba, ntazobata." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Maze Mose ahamagara Yosuwa, amubaririra imbere y’Abisirayeli bose, at’ Ushikame, ushire amanga, kukw ari wewe uzojana aba bantu mu gihugu Uhoraho yarahiye ba sogokuruza kw azokibaha: ni wewe uzokibashikiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Uhoraho ni we azokuja imbere; azobana nawe, ntazoguheba, ntazoguta; ntutinye, nturanduke umutima." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mose yandika ivyo vyagezwe, abishikiriza abaherezi, ari bo Balewi, abareruzi b’isandugu y’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho, abishikiriza n’abakuru bose b’Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Arabagera, at’ Uk’ umwaka wose ugira indwi utashe, mu gihe cashinzwe c’umwaka wo guheberanira, mu misi mikuru y’insago," 
Deuteronomy31:11 igihe Abisirayeli bose baje gushengerera Uhoraho Imana yanyu ha hantu azoba yaratoranije, muze muhore musomera ibi vyagezwe Abisirayeli bose." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Muze mukoranye abantu, abagabo n’abagore n’abana, n’abanyamahanga baba muri mwebge, kugira ngo bavyumve, bavyige, bubahe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, bitondere amajambo yose y’ibi vyagezwe, babishitse;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 no kugira ngw abana babo bataribgabimenye, bavyumve, bige kwubaha Uhoraho Imana yanyu, igihe cose muzoba mur’ ico gihugu, ico mugiye kujabuka Yorodani ngo mucinjire." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Rāba, igihe cawe co gupfa kiri hafi: enda hamagara Yosuwa, murenguke mw ihema ry’ibonaniro, kugira ngo ndamushikirize igikorwa. Nuko Mose na Yosuwa baragenda, bararenguka mw ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Maz’ Uhoraho aserukira mur’ iryo hema, ari mu nkingi y’igicu: iyo nkingi ihagarara mu muryango w’iryo hema." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Uhoraho abarira Mose, ati Rāba, ugiye guhamvya ba sogokuruza bawe; kand’ iri hanga rizohaguruka, bahurumbire izindi mana nk’ibimaka, ari vyo bigirwamana vy’ico gihugu, aho bagiye kuja kuba muri bene co, bamveko, bice isezerano ryanje nasezeranye na bo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Maz’ ico gihe uburake bganje buzobaziriringira, nanje ndabahebe, ndabahishe mu nyonga hanje, bamarwe n’ivyago vyinshi n’imibabaro bizobazako; bitume bavuga, bat’ Icateye ibi vyago kutuzako s’ukw Imana yacu itari muri twebge?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ico gihe ni koko nzobahisha mu nyonga hanje, mbahōye ibibi vyose bazoba bakoze vyo guhindukirira izindi mana." 
Deuteronomy31:19 None rero ni mwandike iyi ndirimbo, uyigishe Abisirayeli, uyibatoze, kugira ngw iyi ndirimbo imbēre icabona ku Bisirayeli kizobāgiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Kuko ni namara kubashikana mu gihugu narahiye ba sekuruza babo, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, bakarya, bagahāga, bakadibama; bazohērako bahindukirire izindi mana, bazisabe, bankēngēre, bice isezerano ryanje." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Kand’ ivyo vyago vyinshi n’imibabaro ni vyamara kubazako, iyi ndirimbo izobāgiriza nk’icabona, kukw itazokwibagirana ngw ive mu kanwa k’uruvyaro rwabo. N’ubu nzi ivyo bīgereye mu vyiyumviro vyabo, ntarabashikana mu gihugu narahiye ko nzobaha." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Nuko kur’ uwo musi nyene Mose yandika iyo ndirimbo, ayigisha Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Kand’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa mwene Nuni, at’ Ushikame, ushire amanga; kukw ari wewe uzoshikana Abisirayeli mu gihugu narahiye ko nzobaha: kandi nzobana nawe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Maze Mose, ahejeje kwandika amajambo y’ivyo vyagezwe mu gitabo, ayarangije," 
Deuteronomy31:25 abarira Abalewi, ari bo bareruzi b’isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho," 
Deuteronomy31:26 ati Ni mujane iki gitabo c’ivyagezwe, mugishire i ruhande y’isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kigumeho kugira ngo kibe icabona co kubāgiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Kuko nzi ubugarariji bganyu, n’ukuntu mutagonda izosi; ko mukunda kugarariza Uhoraho nkiriho, nkiri kumwe namwe mur’ iki gihe, ntimuzorushiriza ni namara gupfa?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ni munkoranirize abakuru bose b’imiryango yanyu, n’abashingantahe banyu, kugira ngo mvugire aya majambo mu matwi yabo, ntange ijuru n’isi kw ivyabona bizobāgiriza." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Kuko nzi yuko, ni namara gupfa, muzokwononekara rwose, mugakikama mugata inzira mbagera uyu musi; kand’ amaherezo, ivyago bizobatera, kuko muzoba mukoze ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, mukamurakisha ibikorwa vy’intoke zanyu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Nuko Mose avugira mu matwi y’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli amajambo y’iyi ndirimbo, gushitsa ah’ ayarangirije." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Tega ugutwi, wa juru we, nanje mvuge; Isi na yo ni yumve amajambo ava mu kanwa kanje." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Ukwigisha kwanje kugwe nk’ imvura, Amajambo yanje atonde nk’ ikime, Abe nk’ukw imvura y’akajogotera igwa ku rumerēra, Kandi nk’iy’ akavuvu iy’ igwa ku bgatsi." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Kuko ngira namamaze izina ry’Uhoraho. Enda ni mwaturire Imana yacu kw ifise icubahiro gikomeye. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ico Gitandara, igikorwa ciwe n’agahore; Kand’ inzira ziwe zose ziragororotse. N’Imana yo kwizigirwa, itarimwo kugabitanya, Iroranya, kandi y’Inyakuri." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Barayihemukiye, ntibakir’ abana bayo, ariko vyabateye agasembga: N’ab’ urunganwe rw’ibidambidambi bagoramye." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Mbeg’ iyo ni yo ngero mushubije Uhoraho, Mwa bantu b’ibipfu b’imburabgenge? Si we Muvyeyi wanyu yabaremye, Akababumba, akabakomeza?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ni mwibuke ibihe vya kera, Mwiyumvire uk’ urunganwe rwagiye rukūranwa mu myaka yashize. Bibaze ba so, barabibamenyesha, N’abo hambere, barabibabarira." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Igihe Īsumba Vyose yagabanganya amahanga amashamvu yayo, Igatandukanya amoko n’ayandi, Yashizeh’ imbibe z’amahanga, Nk’ukw igitigiri c’Abisirayeli kingana." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Kukw abantu b’Uhoraho ari bo mugabane wiwe, Aba Yakobo ni bo shamvu y’ aho yigereje ibango." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Yabasanze mu gihugu c’ ubugaragwa, Mu bugaragwa bg’ubgeranyange, humvikanamw’ ibihūrira; Abakikiza irya n’ino, arababungabunga, Abazigama nk’imbone y’ijisho." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Nk’ukw inkukuma ikangura ivyana vyayo mu cāri, Igahungiriza amababa hejuru yavyo, Igasanza amababa, ikabijana, Ikabihēka ku mababa yayo:" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yagenda abarōngōra wenyene, Ata mana y’inyamahanga yari kumwe na we." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Yabahaye kugenda bajandagira ku mpinga z’imisozi yo mu gihugu, Barya ivyeze vyo mu mirima; Abaha kuvotagira ubūki bgo mu bitandara, N’amavuta ya elayo ava mu rutare rukomeye;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Abaha n’amata y’urubu n’ amatāmatāma, N’ibinure vy’abana b’intama n’ivy’ amapfizi y’intama, N’amasho y’i Bashani, n’ impene, N’ingano zitengengeye nziza; Mwanyoye vino, ari yo maraso y’inzabibu." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Ariko Yeshuruni amaze kuvyibuha, atēra akagere: Yaravyibushe, arasenyuka, acika igisēme; Maz’ aca areka Imana yamuremye, Akēngēra ca Gitandara c’ agakiza kiwe." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Bayiteye kugira ifūhe kubgo gusaba imana z’inyamahanga, Bayirakishije ibizira bakoze;" 
Deuteronomy32:17 Bahaye ibimazi abadayimoni batar’ Imana, Bahaye ibimazi imana batigeze kumenya, Imana nsha z’inzaduka, Izo ba sogokuruza batātinya." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Ca Gitandara mwavutseko ntimukicibuka: Mwibagiye Imana yabavyaye. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Uhoraho yarabibonye, karaziriringa, Ashavurira abahungu biwe n’ abakobga biwe." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Aravuga, ati Reka mbahishe mu nyonga hanje, Ndābe iherezo ryabo uko rizomera; Kukw ar’ urunganwe rw’ ibidambidambi, N’abana batar’ abizigirwa." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Ati Bantēje ifūhe ibitar’ Imana; Bandakishije ibigirwamana vyabo vy’ubusa: Nuko nanje nzobatēza ishari abatar’ ihanga ry’ukuri, Nzobarakisha ihanga ry’imburabgenge." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Kuk’ umuriro w’uburake bganje udometswe, Wātse, ugashika hasi i kuzimu, Ugatōngōra isi n’ivyeze kuri yo, Ukadomeka amatanguriro y’ imisozi." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Nzobarundakw ivyago, Nzobamarirakw imyampi yanje;" 
Deuteronomy32:24 Bazogenda bamarwa umunywera n’inzara, bahondoberezwe n’umururumbo, N’ikiza gikaze; Nzobatērēra ibikōko, bibate mu menyo yavyo, Ndabatērēre n’ivyikwega mu mukungugu vy’ubumara." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Hanze inkota izohēkūra, No mu nzu habe gucika ivutu, Yice imisore n’inkumi, N’abana bonka n’abatāma bameze imvi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Nari mmaramaje kubashwiragiriza kure, Nkazimanganya ukwibukwa kwabo mu bantu," 
Deuteronomy32:27 Iyo ntatinya ibitutsi vy’abansi, N’ukw abarwanizi babo bovyita ukundi, Bakavuga, bat’ Ubuhizi bgacu buhambaye Ni bgo bgakoze ivyo vyose, s’ Uhoraho." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Kukw ar’ ihanga ry’abantu ata co bībaza, Ata bgenge buri muri bo." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Iyo baba abanyabgenge bokwibajije ibi, Bakiyumvira ivy’ iherezo ryabo." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Umwe yoshoboye ate gukinagiza igihumbi, Na babiri kwirukana ibihumbi cumi, Iyo ca Gitandara cabo atabagura, Iy’ Uhoraho atabagabura?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Kukw igitandara ca ba bandi kidahwanye n’icacu, Mbere n’abansi bacu ubgabo barabizi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Umuzabibu wabo wavuye ku w’i Sodomu, No mu mirima y’i Gomora; Inzabibu zabo n’amabamba, Imisoko yazo n’imirurazi." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Vino yabo ni nk’ubumara bg’ inzoka, Mbere ni nk’ubumara bgica bg’imvuvyi." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibibītswe aho ndi? Ntivyugaraniwe mu bubīko bganje? 
Deuteronomy32:35 Uguhōra n’ukwanje, nzobasubiriza mu nkōko Igihe ibirenge vyabo bizonyerera. Kuk’ umusi w’ivyago vyabo uri hafi, Kand’ ibigira bibazeko bizotebuka." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Kuk’ Uhoraho azocira urubanza abantu biwe, Azokwirīmbūra ku vyo agirira abashumba biwe, Ni yabona yuk’ ubushobozi bgabo buheze, Ata wugisigaye, n’iyo yoba imbohe cank’ uwidegemvya." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Azobaza, ati Mbeg’ imana zabo ziri hehe, Ca gitandara bāri bizigiye?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Zimwe zārya ibinure vy’ibimazi vyabo, Zikanywa vino z’ibiturire bāshikana? Ni zihaguruke zibatabare, Zibe ari zo zibakingira!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Nuko rero mumenye yuko jewe, jewe ubganje, ari jewe Mana, Kandi kw ata yindi mana ibangikanye nanje: Ni jewe ntuma umuntu apfa, ni jewe ntuma umuntu abaho; Ni jewe nkomeretsa, ngakiza; Kandi nta woshobora kugira ico arokora mu kuboko kwanje." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Mbere mmanitse ukuboko kwanje, ndagutunze mw ijuru, Nti Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, nk’uko namah’ ibihe vyose," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Yukw igihe nzokarisha inkota yanje irabagirana nk’ umuravyo, Ukuboko kwanje kugafata amatēka, Nzokwihōra abarwanizi banje, Nsubirize mu nkōko abanyanka." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Imyampi yanje nzoyiboreza amaraso, Amaraso y’abishwe n’ay’ abafashwe mpiri; Inkota yanje izorya inyama, Ikegete imitwe y’abatware b’abansi." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Yemwe banyamahanga, ni munezeranwe n’abantu bayo, Kukw abāvishije amaraso y’ abasavyi bayo izoyabahōra, Kand’ izokwihōra abarwanizi bayo, Itangire impongano igihugu c’abantu bayo." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Nuko Mose araza, avugira amajambo yose y’iyo ndirimbo mu matwi y’abantu, afatanije na Yosuwa mwene Nuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Maze Mose arangije kubgira Abisirayeli bose ayo majambo yose," 
Deuteronomy32:46 arababarira, ati Mushire imitima yanyu ku majambo yose mbabariye uyu musi, muze muyatoze abana banyu kugira ngo baze bitondere amajambo yose y’ivyo vyagezwe, babishitse." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ivyo ntimubigire ivyoroshe; kukw ari vyo bugingo bganyu, kandi ni mwavyitondera bizobahesha kurambira mu gihugu, ico mugiye kujabuka Yorodani ngo mucinjire." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Kur’ uwo musi nyene Uhoraho abarira Mose," 
Deuteronomy32:49 ati N’udūge mur’ iyi misozi yo muri Abarimu, urinde ushika ku musozi Nebo, uri mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, aharābana n’i Yeriko; witegereze igihugu c’i Kanani nahaye Abisirayeli kw ishamvu." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Kand’ uzoca utambūrira kur’ uyo musozi udūze, uhamvye abanyu, nk’uko Aroni mukurwawe yapfiriye ku musozi Hori, akabahamvya;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 kuko mwampemukiye hagati mu Bisirayeli, igihe mwari ku mazi y’i Meriba h’i Kadeshi, mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, ntimwerekane ukwera kwanje hagati mu Bisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Ico gihugu uzogitereza amaso kiri kure yawe, ariko ntuzokigeramwo, ico gihugu mpaye Abisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Iyi ni yo mihezagiro Mose umuntu w’Imana yahezagiye Abisirayeli, atarapfa:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 at’ Uhoraho yaturutse kuri Sinayi, Yabarasiye aserutse kuri Seyiri, Yakayanganye aserutse ku musozi Parani, Avuye hagati mu masinzi y’ abera; I buryo bgiwe har’ umuriro waka." 
Deuteronomy33:3 N’ivy’ ukuri arakunda amahanga, Abera biwe bose bari mu kuboko kwiwe, Bicaye hambavu y’ibirenge vyiwe, Umuntu wese yumva amajambo yiwe." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mose yadushingiye ivyagezwe, Ni vyo shamvu y’ikoraniro ry’ aba Yakobo." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Kand’ Uhoraho yar’ Umwami mu ba Yeshuruni, Igihe abakuru bāgaba abantu bākorana, Imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli igakoranira hamwe." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Aba Reyubeni baragahoraho, ntibagapfe, Abantu bo muri bo ntibabe bake." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ibi ni vyo yavuze ku ba Yuda: At’ Uhoraho, ni wumve ijwi rya Yuda, Umusubize mu bgoko bgabo. Amaboko yiwe yaramurwaniye, Nawe uz’ umubere umutabazi wo kumutabara abansi biwe." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Aba Lewi abavugako, Ati Tumimu zawe na Urimu zawe zifiswe n’umukunzi wawe, Uwo wageragereje i Masa, Ugahārīrira na we ku mazi y’i Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Lewi yavuze ku vya se na nyina, ati Sinkibamenya; N’abo bavukana ntabemera, Canke ngw anamenye n’ivy’ abana biwe ubgiwe; Kukw Abalewi bakomeje ijambo ryawe, Bakitondera isezerano ryawe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bazokwigisha aba Yakobo amatēka washinze, Bigishe Abisirayeli ivyagezwe vyawe. Bazokumotereza imibavu, Bakwosereze ibimazi bidasonōye ku gicaniro cawe." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ewe Uhoraho, hezagira inkomezi za Lewi, Wemere igikorwa c’amaboko yiwe. Uze wame uvunagura urukenyerero rw’abamukūriye hasi, Bo n’abamwanka, kugira ngo ntibongere kuvyuka." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Aba Benyamini abavugako, Ati N’umutoni w’Uhoraho, kand’ azobana na we amahoro; Yama amukingiriye bukarinda bgīra, Aba mu bitugu vyiwe." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Aba Yosefu abavugako, At’ Igihugu ciwe kiragahezagirwa n’Uhoraho, Kironke umuhezagiro w’ibirenze ibindi biva mw ijuru, n’uw’ ikime, N’uw’ amazi aryamye hasi i kuzimu." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Umuhezagiro w’ibirenze ibindi vyezwa n’izuba, N’uw’ ibirenze ibindi vyera uk’ ukwezi gutashe;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 N’uw’ ivy’ agahebuza vyera ku misozi yahozeho kera, N’uw’ ibirenze ibindi vyera ku mirambi yamaho;" 
Deuteronomy33:16 N’uw’ ibirenze ibindi vyo mw isi n’ibiyuzuye, N’uw’ ubuntu bg’Imwe yari muri ca gisaka c’amahwa: Umugisha ube ku mutwe wa Yosefu, Mu gitwariro c’uwagizwe mukuru muri bene se." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Impfizi yiwe y’uburiza, icubahiro n’icayo, Amahembe yayo ni nk’ay’ imbogo: Izoyicisha amahanga yose, gushitsa ku mpera y’isi. Ni kw amasinzi y’aba Efurayimu ameze, Bo n’ibihumbi vy’aba Manase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Aba Zebuloni abavugako, At’ Ewe Zebuloni, nezererwa gutēra ururengo kwawe, Nawe Isakari, nezererwa kwigumira mu mahema yawe!" 
Deuteronomy33:19 Amahanga bazoyatumako ngw aze ku musozi wabo, Aho ni ho bazotangira ibimazi vy’ukugororcka. Kuko bazovotagira ibibōgabōga mu biyaga, N’ubutunzi buhishijwe mu musenyi." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Aba Gadi abavugako, At’ Aragahezagirwa uwāgurira Gadi: Abunda nk’intambge y’ingore, Atabagura amaboko no mu gitwariro." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Yikubitiye umugabane usumba iyindi mu gihugu, Kukw ari ho icibare c’umugabisha w’ingabo cari kibītswe; Yaje arōngōye abantu; Yashikije amatēka y’Uhoraho, N’ivyo yashinze ku Bisirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Aba Dani abavugako, Ati Dani n’ikibuguru c’intambge, Asimba ava i Bashani." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Aba Nafutali abavugako, At’ Ewe Nafutali, uhāze ivyo wahawe ku buntu, Wuzuye imigisha y’Uhoraho: Ni wegukire igihugu c’i burengerazuba n’ic’i bumanuko." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Aba Asheri abavugako, Ati Asheri aragahezagirwa kuruta abandi bana, Ashirwe imbere na bene se; Ajobeke ikirenge mu mavuta ya elayo." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Ibihindizo vyawe bizoba ivyuma n’imiringa, Kand’ ukw imisi yawe ingana, ni kw inkomezi zawe zizongana." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Nta gihwanye n’Imana yawe, ewe Yeshuruni, Iza ireruwe n’ijuru, izanywe no kugutabara, Iza ireruwe n’ibicu, iri n’ igitinyiro." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Imana ihoraho ni yo buhungiro bgawe, Kand’ amaboko y’ibihe vyose yama akuramira. Yirukanye abansi imbere yawe, Iravuga, iti Genda urandure!" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bahavuye baba amahoro, Iriba rya Yakobo rikībēra ukwaryo Mu gihugu kibamw’ ingano na vino, Ijuru ryaco rigatonyanga ikime." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Yemwe Bisirayeli, murahiriwe! N’ihanga ki rihwanye namwe kuba ihanga ryarokowe n’Uhoraho, Ari we nkinzo ibakingira, ikabakiza, Ari we nkota ibubahiriza? Abansi banyu bazoza babakomere ibōbo, Namwe muzosiribanga ibitabo vyabo batavye ku mpinga z’imisozi." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Maze Mose ava mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu, adūga umusozi Nebo, ashika ku gatwe Pisiga, aharābana n’i Yeriko. Uhoraho amwereka igihugu cose c’i Gileyadi gushitsa i Dani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 n’ic’ Abanafutali cose, n’ic’ Abefurayimu, n’ic’ Abamanase, n’ic’ Abayuda cose, gushitsa ku kiyaga c’i burengerazuba." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Amwereka n’i Negebu, n’ikiyaya co kuri Yorodani, ari ho haca igihogoro c’i Yeriko, igisagara co mu bigazi, gushitsa i Sowari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Ngīkirīya igihugu narahiye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo, nti Nzogiha uruvyaro rwanyu. None nguhaye kukirābisha amaso, ariko ntuzojabuka ng’ ujeyo." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Nuko Mose umusavyi w’ Uhoraho apfira ngaho mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, nk’ukw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryavuze." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Uhoraho amuhamba mu mwonga wo mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, aharābana n’i Beti‐Peyori; ariko nta wuzi imva yiwe na bugingo n’ubu." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mose yapfuye amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwibiri; kand’ amaso yiwe ntiyaribgarābe ivyijiji, cank’ inkomezi ziwe ngo zigabanuke." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Abisirayeli bamara imisi mirongwitatu baririra Mose, bari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu; nukw imisi yo kuririra Mose no kumugandarira irarangira." 
Deuteronomy34:9 Kandi Yosuwa mwene Nuni yari yuzuye impwemu y’ubgenge, kuko Mose yari yaramurambitsekw ibiganza. Nukw Abisirayeli baramwumvira, bagenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Kandi mu Bisirayeli ntihigeze kuboncka ūvugishwa n’Imana ahwanye na Mose, uwo Uhoraho yibonanira na we imbonankubone." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Nta wogereranywa na we kubg’ ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza vyose Uhoraho yamutumye gukorera mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ngw abigirire Farawo n’abamenyekana biwe bose n’igihugu ciwe cose;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 no kubg’ ivy’ ububasha n’ibiteye ubgoba vyose Mose yakoreye imbere y’ Abisirayeli bose. 
Joshua1:1 Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho amaze gupfa, Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa mwene Nuni umufasha wa Mose," 
Joshua1:2 ati Mose umusavyi wanje yāpfuye; none rero va hasi, ujabukane aba bantu bose urwo ruzi Yorodani, muje mu gihugu mbahaye, mwebge Abisirayeli." 
Joshua1:3 Ahantu hose muzokandagiza ibirenge ndahabahaye, nk’uko nabariye Mose." 
Joshua1:4 Uhereye mu bugaragwa no kur’ uriya musozi Lebanoni, ugashitsa ku ruzi runini, ari rwo Efurate, ugahitana igihugu cose c’Abaheti, ukageza ku kiyaga kinini gihera i burengerazuba, ni rwo ruzoba urugabano rwanyu." 
Joshua1:5 Nta muntu n’umwe azoshobora kuguhagarara imbere imisi yose uzomara ukiriho: nk’uko nabanye na Mose ni ko nzobana nawe; sinzoguhemukira, sinzoguta." 
Joshua1:6 Shikama, ushire amanga, kukw ari wewe uzoshikiriza abo bantu igihugu narahiye ba sekuruza ko nzokibaha." 
Joshua1:7 Mugabo shikama, ushire amanga cane, kugira ngo witondere ivy’ ivyagezwe vyose bivuga, ubishitse, ivyo Mose umusavyi wanje yakugeze; ntuz’ utambamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso, kugira ng’ ugire ukuboko kwiza ah’ uja hose." 
Joshua1:8 Ibiri mur’ ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe ntuz’ ubikūre mu kanwa kawe; arik’ uze wame ubirīmbūra ku murango no mw ijoro, kugira ng’ubone kwitondera ivyanditswemwo vyose; ni ho ivyawe bizogenda neza, ukagira amahirwe." 
Joshua1:9 None si jewe nkwibaririye, nti Shikama, ushire amanga? Nuko ntutinye, nturanduke umutima, kuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe ndi kumwe nawe ah’ uzoja hose." 
Joshua1:10 Maze Yosuwa abarira abagaba abantu," 
Joshua1:11 ati Ni mugende munyuranganye aho mushagaje, mubarire abantu, muti Ni murondere impamba, kuko mu misi itatu muzojabuka rurya ruzi Yorodani, kugira ngo mwinjire ico gihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye ngo mucegukire." 
Joshua1:12 Kandi Yosuwa abarira Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igice c’umuryango wa Manase," 
Joshua1:13 ati Ni mwibuke rya jambo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yababariye, at’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu arabaruhuye, abahaye iki gihugu." 
Joshua1:14 Nukw abagore banyu n’abana banyu n’amasho yanyu bize bisigare mur’ iki gihugu Mose yabahaye co hakuno ya’Yorodani; ariko mwebge mwese abahizi, muze mujabuke imbere ya bagenzi banyu, mwitwaje ibirwanishwa, kugira ngo mubatabare," 
Joshua1:15 gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho azoruhurira bagenzi banyu nk’uko namwe yabaruhuye, na bo bakegukira igihugu Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye; hanyuma mubone kugaruka mur’ iki gihugu mwegukiye, mukigerēre, ico Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabahaye gihera i burasirazuba, hakuno ya Yorodani." 
Joshua1:16 Na bo bishura Yosuwa, bat’ Ivy’ utubariye vyose tuzobikora, kand’ ah’ uzodutuma hose tuzojayo." 
Joshua1:17 Nk’uko twahora twumvira Mose muri vyose, ni ko nawe tuzokwumvira; mugabo rero, Uhoraho Imana yawe az’ abane nawe nk’uko yabana na Mose." 
Joshua1:18 Umuntu wese azogarariza, akanka icagezwe cawe, ntiyumvire ic’ umubariye cose, azokwicwa. Mugabo, shikama, ushire amanga." 
Joshua2:1 Bakir’ i Shitimu, Yosuwa mwene Nuni atuma abantu babiri mu mpisho, ngo baje gutata; arababarira, ati Ni mugende mwitegereze ico gihugu, cane‐cane i Yeriko. Nuko baragenda, bashika mu nzu ya maraya yitwa Rahabu, bahāka indaro." 
Joshua2:2 Baja kubarira umwami w’i Yeriko, bat’ Erega kur’ uyu mugoroba haje abantu bo mu Bisirayeli, baje gutata igihugu." 
Joshua2:3 Uwo mwami atuma kuri Rahabu, ati Zana abo bantu baje i wawe, kuko bazanywe no gutata igihugu cose." 
Joshua2:4 Arik’ uwo mugore ajana abo bantu bompi, arabahisha; araheza abarira izo ntumwa, ati Ni koko haje abantu i wanje, ariko sinamenye iyo bavuye;" 
Joshua2:5 nuko hageze mu mūgarira, buhwibiriye, abo bantu baciye bagenda, ariko sinzi aho baroye; enda ni mubakurikire, murabafata." 
Joshua2:6 Ariko yari yabūrije hejuru ku nzu, arabahisha, abarenzakw ibiti vya pishita bitaribgakūbgekw inyuzi, ivyo yari yanikiye aho nyene ku nzu." 
Joshua2:7 Nuko ba bandi baragenda, baja kubakurikira mu nzira ija kuri Yorodani, ku majabukiro yarwo; bamaze kurenga irembo ry’igisagara, baca barugarira." 
Joshua2:8 Nuko batararyama, uwo mugore arūrira, aja ah’ abo bantu bari ku nzu," 
Joshua2:9 arababarira, ati Nzi yuk’ Uhoraho abahaye iki gihugu; kandi mwaduciye ivutu, mber’ abari mu gihugu bose bahiye cōba kubganyu." 
Joshua2:10 Kuko twumvise ingen’ Uhoraho yakamije Ikiyaga Gitukura imbere yanyu, igihe mwava muri Egiputa; kandi twumvise n’ivyo mwagiriye abami bompi b’Abamori hakurya ya Yorodani, Sihoni na Ogi, abo mwagesheje rwose." 
Joshua2:11 Tuvyumvise, imitima yacu yaciye ituvamwo, nta muntu n’umwe yar’ agisigaranye umutima mu nda kubganyu: kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we Mana iri hejuru mw ijuru no hasi kw isi." 
Joshua2:12 Nuko rero ndabinginze, ni mundahire Uhoraho yuko muzogirira neza ab’ inzu ya data, nk’uko nanje ndabagiriye neza; mumpe ikimenyamenya c’ ukuri," 
Joshua2:13 yuko muzorokora data na mama, na basaza banje na barumuna banje n’ababo bose, mukadukiza ntidupfe." 
Joshua2:14 Abo bantu baramwishura, bati Ni mutatuvuga, amagara yacu mukijije natwe ntituzobura gukiza ayanyu. Maz’ Uhoraho ni yaduha iki gihugu, tuzokugirira neza, ntituzoguhemukira." 
Joshua2:15 Araheza abūrurukisha umugozi abacishije mw idirisha, kukw inzu yiwe yar’ ifatanye n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye ruzitiriye igisagara: ni ho yaba." 
Joshua2:16 Arababarira, ati Ni mugende ruguru ku misozi, kugira ngo ntimuhūre n’ababagenza; mwinyegezeyo kumara imisi itatu, gushitsa ah’ ababagenza bazogarukira: muheze muze mubone kugenda." 
Joshua2:17 Abo bantu baramwishura, bati Ni watirigana mu vyo tukubgira, iyo ndahiro ntizodufata." 
Joshua2:18 Enda ni twashika mur’ iki gihugu, uz’ upfundike aka kagozi gasa n’agahama kur’ iri dirisha uducishijemwo; maze so na nyoko n’abo muvukana n’abo mu rugo kwa so bose uz’ ubakoranirize aha i wawe." 
Joshua2:19 Mugabo, ūzotirimuka akava mu nzu yawe agasohoka, amaraso yiwe ni we azosubirako, natwe tweho tuzocuna; arik’ umuntu wese azoba kumwe nawe mu nzu, akagira ic’ aba, amaraso yiwe ni twebge azosubirako." 
Joshua2:20 Ariko ni watuvuga, iyo ndahiro uturahije ntizodufata." 
Joshua2:21 Arabishura, ati Biraba nk’uko muvuze. Araheza arabasezera, baragenda. Maz’ apfundika ako kagozi gasa n’agahama kw idirisha." 
Joshua2:22 Nuko baragenda barengera imisozi, bamaray’ imisi itatu, gushitsa ah’ abagiye kubagenza bagarukiye; ariko bari babarondeye mur’ iyo nzira yose, barabahebūra." 
Joshua2:23 Maz’ abo bantu bompi baragaruka, bamanuka iyo misozi, barajabuka bashikīra Yosuwa mwene Nuni, bamudōndera ivyababayeko vyose." 
Joshua2:24 Baramubarira, bati N’ ukuri koko, Uhoraho agabuye ico gihugu cose mu maboko yacu, mbere bene co bose twabaranduye imitima." 
Joshua3:1 Bukeye Yosuwa arazinduka, avana i Shitimu n’Abisirayeli bose, bashika kuri Yorodani, barāra batajabutse." 
Joshua3:2 Hashize imisi itatu, abagaba abantu banyuranganya aho bashagaje," 
Joshua3:3 babarira abantu, bati Ni mwabona isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu ireruwe n’abaherezi ari bo Balewi, muze muce muhaguruka muve aho muri, muyikurikire," 
Joshua3:4 kugira ngo mumenye inzira mukwiye kujana, kuko mutigeze guca mur’ iyi nzira. Mugabo, hagati yanyu na yo haze hasigare ikirere c’intambuko igihumbi; ntimuze muyēgēre." 
Joshua3:5 Maze Yosuwa abarira abantu, ati Ni mwiyeze, kukw ejo Uhoraho azokora ibitangaza muri mwebge." 
Joshua3:6 Yosuwa araheza abarira abaherezi, ati Ni murerure isandugu y’ isezerano, mwītangire imbere y’ abantu mu kujabuka. Nuko barerura iyo sandugu, bītangira imbere y’abantu." 
Joshua3:7 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, at’ Uyu musi ngira ntangure kugukuza imbere y’Abisirayeli bose, kugira ngo bamenye yuko ndi kumwe nawe nk’uko nāmana na Mose." 
Joshua3:8 Kand’ ubarire abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’isezerano, uti Ni mwashika ah’ amazi ya Yorodani agarukira, muyashōreremw’ ibirenge, muhagararemwo." 
Joshua3:9 Yosuwa abarira Abisirayeli, ati Ni mwigire hano, mwumve amajambo y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Joshua3:10 Araheza aravuga, at’ Iki ni co kigira kibamenyeshe yukw Imana nzima iri muri mwebge, kandi yukw itazobura kwirukana Abanyakanani imbere yanyu, bo n’ Abaheti n’Abahiwi n’Abaferizi n’Abagirugashi n’Abamori n’Abayebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Ehe rāba, isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ isi yose igira ibītangire imbere mu kuja muri Yorodani." 
Joshua3:12 Nuko ni murobanure abantu cumi na babiri mu miryango y’Abisirayeli, mu muryango wose havemw’ umuntu umwe‐umwe." 
Joshua3:13 Maz’ abaherezi barerura isandugu y’ Uhoraho Nyen’ isi yose ni bashinga ibirenge mu mazi ya Yorodani, amazi yarwo ava ruguru aca yīmīrwa, yirundanye." 
Joshua3:14 Nukw abantu bashīngūra amahema yabo, kugira ngo bajabuke Yorodani, kand’ abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’isezerano babītangira imbere." 
Joshua3:15 Nukw abo baherezi bareruye iyo sandugu bashika kuri Yorodani, maze bagishōrera ibirenge vyabo ah’amazi agarukira (kuko mu gihe c’iyimbura, Yorodani rwama rurenga inkombe zarwo)," 
Joshua3:16 amazi ava ruguru aca arīmīrwa, yirundaniriza aharinganiye n’igisagara citwa Adamu kibangikanye n’i Saretani, kure y’aho bagomba kujabukira, kand’ ayo hepfo atembera mu kiyaga co mu kiyaya citwa Araba, ari co Kiyaga c’Umunyu, arakamuka. Nukw abantu barajabuka batumbereye i Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho bahagarara muri Yorodani hūmūtse, maz’ Abisirayeli bose bajabukira ahūmūtse, kugeza ah’ abantu bose barangirije kujabuka Yorodani." 
Joshua4:1 Iryo hanga ryose rimaze kujabuka Yorodani, Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa," 
Joshua4:2 ati Musobanure ba bagabo cumi na babiri mu bantu, umwe‐umwe mu miryango yose," 
Joshua4:3 mubabarire, muti Ni mutore amabuye cumi n’abiri ngaha nyene muri Yorodani, ah’ abaherezi bahagaze, muyajabukane muyarambike aho muja kurāra iri joro." 
Joshua4:4 Nuko Yosuwa ahamagaza ba bagabo ukw ar’ icumi na babiri yarobanuye mu Bisirayeli, umwe‐umwe mu miryango yose;" 
Joshua4:5 arababarira, ati Ni muje imbere y’ isandugu y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu muri Yorodani, umuntu wese yāndūre ibuye, muyashire ku rutugu, nk’ukw igitigiri c’imiryango y’ Abisirayeli kingana;" 
Joshua4:6 kugira ngw az’ abe ikimenyamenya muri mwebge. Hanyuma mu bihe bizoza, abana banyu ni babaza, bat’ Aya mabuye yerekana iki?" 
Joshua4:7 muze mubishure, muti N’ukw amazi ya Yorodani yīmiriwe, akitandukaniriza imbere y’isandugu y’isezerano ry’ Uhoraho; mut’ Igihe yarikw irajabuka Yorodani, amazi yarwo yarīmiriwe; muti Kand’ aya mabuye yabereyeho kuba icibutso c’Abisirayeli gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Joshua4:8 Nukw abo bagabo b’Abisirayeli bakora nk’uko Yosuwa yababariye, bāndūra amabuye cumi n’abiri muri Yorodani, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye Yosuwa, angana n’igitigiri c’imiryango y’Abisirayeli; barayajabukana, bayashikana aho bagiye kurāra, bayaturaho." 
Joshua4:9 Yosuwa na we ashinga amabuye cumi n’abiri nyene muri Yorodani, ah’ abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’ isezerano bahagaze: kandi ni ho akiri na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua4:10 Kukw abo baherezi bareruye iyo sandugu bari bahagaze muri Yorodani, gushitsa ah’ ivyo Uhoraho yabariye Yosuwa kubgira abantu vyarangiriye vyose, bihwanye n’ivyo Mose yari yarabariye Yosuwa vyose: nuko ni kw abantu bihuse, barajabuka." 
Joshua4:11 Maz’ abantu bose bamaze kujabuka, isandugu y’ Uhoraho irajabuka, ireruwe n’ abaherezi, abantu barorēra." 
Joshua4:12 Kand’ Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase ni bo bagiye imbere y’ abandi Bisirayeli mu kujabuka, bītwaje ibirwanishwa, nk’uko Mose yari yarababariye." 
Joshua4:13 Ingabo zabo zari nk’ibihumbi mirongwine, zītwaje ibirwanishwa, ziteguye kurwana, zica imbere y’Uhoraho mu kiyaya c’i Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho akuza Yosuwa imbere y’Abisirayeli bose, baramwubaha imisi yose yamaze akiriho, nk’uko bubaha Mose." 
Joshua4:15 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa," 
Joshua4:16 ati Barira abaherezi bareruye isandugu y’Ibishinga intahe bave muri Yorodani. 
Joshua4:17 Nuko Yosuwa abarira abaherezi, ati Ni mudūge, muve muri Yorodani." 
Joshua4:18 Maz’ abaherezi bareruye iyo sandugu y’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho bavuye muri Yorodani, bashitse i musozi, amazi ya Yorodani asubira gutemba aho yahora, arenga inkombe, nk’uko yar’ asanzwe." 
Joshua4:19 Abantu bādūze bava muri Yorodani ku musi w’icumi w’ ukwezi kwa mbere, basagaza i Gilugali ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba rw’i Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Ya mabuye cumi n’abiri bakūye muri Yorodani Yosuwa ayashinga i Gilugali. 
Joshua4:21 Maz’ abarira Abisirayeli, ati Mu bana banyu, ni hagira abazobaza ba se mu bihe bizoza, bat’ Aya mabuye n’ay’ iki?" 
Joshua4:22 muze mubabarire, muti N’ukw Abisirayeli bājabutse uru Yorodani nk’abaca ku musozi." 
Joshua4:23 Ati Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yakamije amazi yarwo imbere yanyu, kugeza muhejeje kujabuka, nk’uko yagize Ikiyaga Gitukura, igihe yagikamiriza imbere yacu kugeza duhejeje kujabuka;" 
Joshua4:24 kugira ngw amahanga yose yo mw isi amenye yuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho gukomeye, batinye Uhoraho Imana yanyu ibihe vyose." 
Joshua5:1 Maz’ abami bose b’Abamori bāba hakuno ya Yorodani mu ruhande rw’i burengerazuba, n’ abami bose b’Abanyakanani bāba ku kiyaga, bumvise ingen’ Uhoraho yakamirije amazi ya Yorodani imbere y’Abisirayeli kugeza bahejeje kujabuka, imitima yabo ibavamwo, ntihāba hakigira ūfise umutima mu nda kubg’ Abisirayeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ico gihe Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Wisaturire amabuye akarishe bga mbugita, usubizeh’ ugukebga mu Bisirayeli ubga kabiri." 
Joshua5:3 Yosuwa asatuza amabuye akarishe bga mbugita, akebeshereza Abisirayeli ku musozi Araloti." 
Joshua5:4 Inyanduruko Yosuwa abakebesha n’iyi: n’ukw abagabo bose b’abahizi bari bavuye muri Egiputa bari baraguye mu nzira, mu bugaragwa, bamaze kuva muri Egiputa;" 
Joshua5:5 kukw abantu bose bavuyeyo bari barakebge, arikw abāvukiye mu nzira bose mu bugaragwa, bamaze kuva muri Egiputa, bo ntibaribgakebge;" 
Joshua5:6 kukw Abisirayeli bari bamaze imyaka mirongwine bagendagenda mu bugaragwa, kugeza ah’ abahizi bose b’iryo hanga bavuye muri Egiputa bāherengetereye, kuko batumviye Uhoraho. Kand’ Uhoraho yari yarabarahiye kw atazokunda ko babona igihugu yarahiye ba sekuruza babo kw azokibaha, ni co gihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki." 
Joshua5:7 Abana babo, abo yashubije mu kirenge cabo, ni bo Yosuwa yakebesheje, kuko bataribgakebge; inyanduruko n’uko batākebewe mu nzira." 
Joshua5:8 Nukw abantu bose bamaze kubakeba baguma ngaho nyene aho bari bashagaje, kugeza bakize." 
Joshua5:9 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, at’ Uyu musi mbakūyekw agakēngērwe Abanyegiputa bābakēngereye, ndagatembagaje. Ni co catumye aho hantu hitwa Gilugali na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua5:10 Nukw Abisirayeli bagishagaje i Gilugali barya ivya Pasika ku musi ugira icumi na kane w’ukwo kwezi, ku mugoroba, bari mu kiyaya c’i Yeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Bukeye, umusi wa Pasika ushize, barya ivyeze mur’ ico gihugu, bacumba udutsima tutambiwe, barya n’ impeke zikaranze." 
Joshua5:12 Maz’ uwo musi nyene bariye ku vyeze mur’ ico gihugu, manu ntiyongera kuboneka; Abisirayeli ntibongera kubona manu ukundi, arik’ uwo mwaka bakomeje kurya ivyeze mur’ ico gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Joshua5:13 Maze Yosuwa ari hafi y’i Yeriko, agize ngw arunamura amaso, abona umuntu imbere yiwe, yāsokōye inkota, ayifashe mu ntoke. Yosuwa aramwēgēra, aramubaza, ati Mbeg’ ur’ ūje ku ruhande rwacu, canke ku rw’abansi bacu?" 
Joshua5:14 Aramwishura, at’ Ekāye: arikw ikinzanye ubu n’uko nd’ umugabisha w’ingabo z’Uhoraho. Maze Yosuwa arapfukama, arūnama, amuha icubahiro, aramubaza, ati Mugenzi, jewe umusavyi wawe non’ ico ugomba kumbarira n’iki?" 
Joshua5:15 Nuk’ uwo mugabisha w’ingabo z’Uhoraho yishura Yosuwa, ati Kūra inkweto mu birenge vyawe, kukw aho hantu uhagaze ar’ ahēra. Nuko Yosuwa abigenza artyo." 
Joshua6:1 Kand’ i Yeriko bari biyugaranye bahadadiye kubgo gutinya Abisirayeli; nta warenga irembo, kandi nta washika imbere." 
Joshua6:2 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Rāba, ngabuye i Yeriko mu maboko yawe, bo n’umwami waho n’abahizi baho b’ibishirīra." 
Joshua6:3 Muze muzenguke ico gisagara, mwese ab’ ingabo, mukizenguke rimwe‐rimwe ku musi kumara imisi itandatu." 
Joshua6:4 Kand’ abaherezi ndwi baze bajane inzamba ndwi z’amahembe y’impfizi z’intama, bagende imbere y’isandugu; maze ku musi ugira indwi muze muzenguke ico gisagara ibihetangabo ndwi; kand’ abo baherezi baze bagende baravuza izo nzamba." 
Joshua6:5 Maz’ ayo mahembe y’impfizi z’intama ni bayavuza ijwi rirandiriye, mukumva ijwi ryayo, abantu bose bace bīha akāmo icarimwe: maz’ uruzitiro rw’amabuye rw’ico gisagara ruzoca ruhomvokera hasi, abantu bose bace barengagira, umuntu wese aho yar’ atumbereye." 
Joshua6:6 Nuko Yosuwa mwene Nuni ahamagaza abaherezi, arababarira, ati Ni murerure isandugu y’isezerano, maz’ abandi baherezi ndwi bajane inzamba ndwi z’amahembe y’impfizi z’intama, bagende imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua6:7 Maz’ abarira abantu, ati Ni mushireko, mugende, muzenguke ico gisagara; abafise ibirwanishwa abe ari bo baja imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua6:8 Nuko Yosuwa amaze kubarira abantu, ba baherezi ndwi bashirako baragenda, batwaye za nzamba ndwi, bar’ imbere y’Uhoraho, bagenda barazivuza; isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ibaja inyuma." 
Joshua6:9 Abītwaje ibirwanishwa baja imbere ya ba baherezi bagenda baravuza inzamba, inyuma haza abīmirije ya sandugu, za nzamba bakiriko barazivuza." 
Joshua6:10 Ariko Yosuwa abarira abantu, ati Ntimuze muvuze akāmo, canke ngw ijwi ryanyu ryumvikane, canke ngo hagire ijambo na rimwe riva mu kanwa kanyu, gushitsa ku musi nzobabaririra kwitera hejuru: ni ho muzoca mwiha akāmo." 
Joshua6:11 Nukw atuma iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho izenguka ico gisagara, ikakizenguka rimwe; bagaheza bagasubira aho bashagaje, bakarāra ngaho." 
Joshua6:12 Bukeye Yosuwa azinduka mu gatondo kare, abaherezi barerura isandugu y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua6:13 Maze ba baherezi ndwi batwaye za nzamba ndwi, baja imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho, bakomeza kugenda barazivuza; abītwaje ibirwanishwa baja imbere yabo, inyuma haza abīmirije ya sandugu y’Uhoraho, za nzamba bakiriko barazivuza." 
Joshua6:14 Kur’ uwo musi ugira kabiri bazenguka ico gisagara rimwe nyene, basubira aho bashagaje. Uko ni ko bāgenjeje kumara imisi itandatu." 
Joshua6:15 Maze ku musi ugira indwi, bazinduka mu gaturuturu, bazenguka ico gisagara nk’uko bahora, bashitsa ibihetangabo ndwi: kur’ uwo musi gusa ni ho bākizengutse gushikana indwi." 
Joshua6:16 Maze ku muzenguko ugira indwi, ba baherezi bakiriko baravuza za nzamba, Yosuwa abarira abantu, ati Ni mwihe akāmo, kuk’ Uhoraho abahaye iki gisagara." 
Joshua6:17 Ati Kand’ igisagara n’ibiri muri co vyose bicitse inyegu y’Uhoraho; mugabo Rahabu, umwe maraya, abe ari we arokoka, bo n’abari mu nzu yiwe bose, kuko yanyegeje za ntumwa twatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Ariko mwebge muzire akaziri ntimugire ico mukorako mu vyabaye inyegu y’ Uhoraho; kuko ni mwavyifuza, mukabikorako, muzoba muzaniye umuvumo n’ivyago Abisirayeli aho mushagaje." 
Joshua6:19 Arikw amafeza yose n’amazahabu n’ibintu vyose vyo mu miringa n’ivyo mu vyuma bibaye ivyera vy’Uhoraho: bizoja mu bushinguro bgiwe. 
Joshua6:20 Nuko za nzamba zivuze, abantu biha akāmo: mbere bacumva ijwi ryazo, baciye biha akāmo icarimwe, inzitiro zica zihomvokera hasi, abantu baca bararengagira, bītera mu gisagara, umuntu wese aho yar’ atumbereye, barakinesha." 
Joshua6:21 Bageseza ivyari mur’ ico gisagara vyose, bicisha inkota abagabo n’abagore, abato n’abashaje, n’inka n’intama n’indogoba." 
Joshua6:22 Maze Yosuwa abarira ba bantu babiri bāja gutata igihugu, ati Ni mwinjire mu nzu ya wa mugore maraya, mumusohorane n’ab’ afise bose, nk’uko mwamurahiye." 
Joshua6:23 Nukw iyo misore yagiye gutata igihugu irinjira, isohokana Rahabu na se na nyina na basaza be n’abo bafise bose; bajana umuryango wiwe wose, babashikana inyuma y’ah’ Abisirayeli bashagaje." 
Joshua6:24 Igisagara bagitōngōza umuriro, n’ivyari muri co vyose; arikw amafeza n’amazahabu n’ibintu vyo mu miringa n’ivyo mu vyuma, ni vyo bashize mu bushinguro bgo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua6:25 Nuko Yosuwa arokora Rahabu umwe maraya, n’inzu ya se, n’abo yar’ afise bose; aba mu Bisirayeli gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu, kuko yanyegeje za ntumwa Yosuwa yatumye i Yeriko kuhatata." 
Joshua6:26 Ico gihe Yosuwa aca amahani abantu, aravuga, ati Ni hagira umuntu ahaguruka, akazokwubaka iki gisagara c’i Yeriko, aravumwe imbere y’Uhoraho. Igihe azokwubaka itanguriro ryaho azobura umwana wiwe w’imfura, kand’ igihe azotera ibikingi vy’amarembo yaho azobura umwana wiwe w’ umuhererezi." 
Joshua6:27 Nuk’ Uhoraho yabana na Yosuwa; aba rurangiranwa mur’ ico gihugu cose. 
Joshua7:1 Arikw Abisirayeli bacumura mu vyagizwe inyegu y’Uhoraho; Akani mwene Karami, Karami wa Zabudi, Zabudi wa Zerahi, wo mu muryango wa Yuda, ni we yasotōye ku vyagizwe inyegu; maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli." 
Joshua7:2 Yosuwa atuma abantu bava i Yeriko ngo baje i Hayi; hari hafi y’i Betaveni, ku ruhande rw’i Beteli rw’i burasirazuba; arababarira, ati Ni mudūge, muje gutata ico gihugu. Nukw abo bantu baradūga, baja gutata Hayi." 
Joshua7:3 Bagaruka aho Yosuwa ari, baramubgira, bat’ Abantu bose ntibarinde kudūgayo; ni hagende nk’ibihumbi bibiri canke bitatu, babe ari bo bahatera. Ntiwirirwe ugorera abantu bose ubusa ngo badūgeyo, kukw abaho ari bake." 
Joshua7:4 Nuko mu bantu havamwo nk’ibihumbi bitatu, badūgayo: arikw abantu b’i Hayi barabirukana." 
Joshua7:5 Ab’i Hayi babīcamw’ abantu nka mirongwitatu na batandatu, barabakinagiza, babahanuye kw irembo ry’igisagara babashitsa i Shebarimu, bagenda barabīcira ku mumanuko. Maz’ imitima y’abantu ishongera mu nda zabo, icika nk’amazi;" 
Joshua7:6 Yosuwa na we yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, yitembagaza imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho ashitsa ku mugoroba, bo n’abakuru b’Abisirayeli, bīsūrirakw imikungugu ku mitwe." 
Joshua7:7 Yosuwa aravuga, ati Yoo! Ewe Mwami Uhoraho! N’ iki catumye ujabutsa aba bantu Yorodani, kugira ng’ utugabure mu maboko y’Abamori ngo batugeseze? Ereg’ iyo tuba twapfumye tuguma hakurya ya Yorodani!" 
Joshua7:8 None ga Mwami, ndacavuga iki, kw Abisirayeli babinjitse ibitugu imbere y’abansi babo?" 
Joshua7:9 Kukw Abanyakanani n’abari mu gihugu bose bazovyumva, bāze batuzingazinge, bazimirize izina ryacu mw isi: non’ izina ryawe rikomeye uzorirwanira ngw iki?" 
Joshua7:10 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Va hasi: n’iki gitumye witembagaza hasi?" 
Joshua7:11 Ereg’ Abisirayeli bacumuye, kuko baciye mw isezerano ryanje nari nabageze kwitondera, bagasotōra ku vyagizwe inyegu yanje, bakavyiba, bagatako bakabirenzako, mbere bakabisukiranya n’ibintu vyabo." 
Joshua7:12 Ico ni co gitumye Abisirayeli badashobora guhagarara imbere y’abansi babo, bakabinjika ibitugu imbere yabo, kuko bahindutse ibivume. Mbere sinzokwongera kubana namwe shiti mukūye ivyagizwe inyegu yanje muri mwebge." 
Joshua7:13 Va hasi, ubgire abantu biyeze, ut’ Umusi w’ejo uz’ ushike mwiyejeje, uti Ni we nyene abivuze, Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ngo Yemwe Bisirayeli, muri mwebge harih’ ivyagizwe inyegu yiwe; uti Ntimugishobora guhagarara imbere y’abansi banyu gushitsa mubikūye muri mwebge." 
Joshua7:14 Nuko mu gitondo muze mukorane, umuryango umwe‐umwe ukwawo, maz’ umuryango nzokwerekana, jewe Uhoraho, uz’ ukorane, inzu imwe‐imwe ukwayo; maz’ inzu nzokwerekana, jewe Uhoraho, iz’ ikorane, nyen’ irembo umwe‐umwe ukwiwe; maz’ urugo nzokwerekana, jewe Uhoraho, baze bakorane, umugabo umwe‐umwe ukwiwe." 
Joshua7:15 Maz’ ūzofatanwa ivyagizwe inyegu yanje azoturiranwa n’ivyiwe vyose, kuko yishe isezerano ryanje, jewe Uhoraho, agakora ikizira mu Bisirayeli." 
Joshua7:16 Nuko Yosuwa azinduka kare mu gatondo, ahamagaza Abisirayeli, umuryango umwe‐umwe ukwawo; umuryango wa Yuda urafatwa." 
Joshua7:17 Ahamagaza amazu ya ba Yuda, inzu ya ba Zerahi irafatwa; ahamagaza ab’ inzu ya Zerahi, ben’ amarembo umwe‐umwe, Zabudi arafatwa." 
Joshua7:18 Ahamagaza abo mu rugo rwiwe, umugabo umwe‐umwe; hafatwa Akani mwene Karami, umwuzukuru wa Zabudi, Zabudi mwene Zerahi, wo mu muryango wa Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Maze Yosuwa abarira Akani, ati Mwana wanje, enda ni wubahe Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, uyishire hejuru; mbarira ico wakoze, ntumpishe." 
Joshua7:20 Akani yishura Yosuwa, ati N’ivy’ ukuri nacumuye k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli; kand’ uko vyagenze n’uku:" 
Joshua7:21 nabonye mw isahu umwambaro mwiza uvuye i Shinari, na shekeli z’ifeza amajana abiri, n’ikigabane c’izahabu kirivye shekeli mirongwitanu; ndaheza ndavyifuza, ndabitwara; kandi bizītse mu kuzimu mw ihema ryanje, n’ifeza ziri musi yavyo." 
Joshua7:22 Maze Yosuwa atuma abantu, bagenda biruka, bitera mw ihema; basanga binyegejwe mw ihema ryiwe, n’ifeza ziri musi yavyo." 
Joshua7:23 Babikūrayo, babizanira Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose, babirambika ngaho imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua7:24 Nuko Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose bafata Akani wo mu ba Zerahi, bamujanana na za feza na wa mwambaro na ca kigabane c’izahabu, bo n’abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe n’inka ziwe n’indogoba ziwe n’intama ziwe n’ihema ryiwe n’ ivyo yar’ afise vyose, babidūgana mu kiyaya c’i Akori." 
Joshua7:25 Maze Yosuwa aravuga, ati N’iki catumye udutēza amagorwa? Nawe uyu musi Uhoraho aragutera amagorwa. Maz’ Abisirayeli bose bamutera amabuye; babicisha amabuye, barabaturira." 
Joshua7:26 Baraheza bamurundakw ikirundo kinini c’ amabuye: kiracariho na bugingo n’ubu. Maz’ Uhoraho arigarura, uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi burahwama. Ni co catumye izina ry’ aho hantu hitwa Ikiyaya Akori na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua8:1 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Ntutinye, kandi nturanduke umutima; jana ingabo zose, uhaguruke, utere i Hayi: rāba, ngabuye umwami waho mu maboko yawe, bo n’abantu biwe n’igisagara ciwe n’igihugu ciwe." 
Joshua8:2 Kand’ uz’ ugire Hayi n’umwami waho nk’uko wagiriye Yeriko n’umwami waho; mugabo ivyo muzosahura vyose n’inka zaho, muze muvyitwarire bibe iminyago yanyu. Kandi muze muce igico hirya y’ ico gisagara." 
Joshua8:3 Nuko Yosuwa arahaguruka, bo n’ingabo zose, ngo baje gutera i Hayi: maz’ atoranya abantu ibihumbi mirongwitatu b’abahizi, abarungika mw ijoro." 
Joshua8:4 Arababarira, ati Murumva: muje kubunda hirya y’ico gisagara; ntimukije kure cane, kandi mwese mube mwiteguye." 
Joshua8:5 Nanje n’ abantu turi kumwe bose tuzokwēgereza igisagara: maze ni badushwabadukira nk’ubga mbere, tuzoca twīgira nk’ababahunze;" 
Joshua8:6 na bo bazoca badukurikira, tubahende, tubavane hafi y’igisagara, bagire ngo turabahunze nk’ubga mbere. Uko ni ko tuzogenda dusa n’ababahunga." 
Joshua8:7 Maze namwe muze muheze muvyuke aho mubunze mu gico, mutere ico gisagara, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azoba akigabuye mu maboko yanyu." 
Joshua8:8 Maze ni mwamara kukivyagira, muze mugiturire, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze. N’ivyo, ivyo mbageze." 
Joshua8:9 Nuko Yosuwa arabarungika; baja aho baja kubunda, baguma hagati ya Beteli na Hayi, ahahera i burengerazuba bga Hayi; ariko Yosuwa we, iryo joro arāra mu ngabo." 
Joshua8:10 Yosuwa ahenga kare mu gatondo akoranya ingabo, adūgana n’abakuru b’Abisirayeli, azigiye imbere, baja i Hayi." 
Joshua8:11 Izo ngabo zose zari kumwe na we ziradūga, zishika hafi y’ico gisagara aharābana na co, zisagaza ku ruhande rwaco rw’i burārūko; kandi hār’ umwonga hagati yabo n’i Hayi." 
Joshua8:12 Maz’ atoranya abantu nk’ibihumbi bitanu, abarungika kuja kubunda hagati y’i Beteli n’i Hayi, i burengerazuba bg’ico gisagara."
