Joshua8:13 Uko ni ko bāciye abantu intēko: itsitsi ry’ingabo risigara i burārūko bg’ico gisagara, abagiye kubunda bakaja i burengerazuba bgaco; ariko Yosuwa we, iryo joro arāra mur’ uwo mwonga." 
Joshua8:14 Maz’ umwami w’i Hayi abibonye, akorokana kare n’abo mur’ ico gisagara, bihutira gushwabadukira Abisirayeli, umwami n’ abantu biwe bose, ngo babasange ku kamanuko kaja mu kiyaya, babasōbōre; ariko ntiyar’ azi ko har’ abābunze hirya y’ico gisagara." 
Joshua8:15 Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose bīgira nk’abaneshejwe imbere yabo, bahunga bajanye inzira ija mu bugaragwa." 
Joshua8:16 Uko ni kw abo mur’ ico gisagara bose bāciye bīvuta ngo babakōndōrere inyuma; kandi bakiriko barakōndōrera inyuma ya Yosuwa, arabahenda, abavana hafi y’ico gisagara." 
Joshua8:17 Ntihasigara umugabo n’umwe i Hayi cank’ i Beteli, ataje kwirukana Abisirayeli; basiga igisagara cuguruwe, babakōndōrera inyuma." 
Joshua8:18 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Tunga i Hayi iryo cumu witwaje, kuko ngira ndahagabure mu maboko yawe. Nuko Yosuwa atunga icumu yitwaje kur’ ico gisagara." 
Joshua8:19 Agitunga ukuboko, abāri babunze baca bavyuka ako kanya aho bāri baryamye, bītera mu gisagara, barakivyagira, bihūtira kugiha impumbi." 
Joshua8:20 Ab’ i Hayi bagize ngo barasubiza amaso inyuma, babona imyotsi y’ico gisagara idūze intumbgejuru, bituma bananirwa guhunga, babura epfo na ruguru; maze ba bandi bāri bīgize nk’abahungira mu bugaragwa barabahindukirana." 
Joshua8:21 Nuko Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bose babonye kw abāri bīcīye igico bavyagiye ico gisagara, kandi kw imyotsi yaco ipfūndūka, bahindukirana ab’ i Hayi, bagenda barabica." 
Joshua8:22 Ba bandi na bo bava mu gisagara, babata hagati, babaturuka hirya no hino; ntihagira n’umwe abajana, canke ngw acike kw icumu." 
Joshua8:23 Umwami w’i Hayi bamufata mpiri, bamuzanira Yosuwa." 
Joshua8:24 Maz’ Abisirayeli bahejeje kwicira ab’ i Hayi mu gahinga no mu bugaragwa aho bāri babirukaniye, basize ar’ imihindigiti bishwe n’ inkota iyo bava bakagera, bose basubira i Hayi, bahatōngōza inkota." 
Joshua8:25 Nukw abantu b’i Hayi iyo bava bakagera, abishwe uwo musi nyene, abagabo n’abagore, bar’ ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
Joshua8:26 Kandi Yosuwa ntiyagarura ukuboko yari yatungishije icumu, gushitsa aherengeteje kugeseza ab’i Hayi bose." 
Joshua8:27 Mugabo, inka n’ivyo basahuye vyo mur’ ico gisagara, ni vyo Abisirayeli bitwariye ngo bibe iminyago yabo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarageze Yosuwa." 
Joshua8:28 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yaturiye Hayi, ahahindura ikigūngūzi c’amasakamburira gushitsa ibihe vyose; hasigara ar’ amatongo kugeza na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua8:29 Na we umwami w’i Hayi amumanika ku giti gushitsa ku mugoroba; maze ku kirengazuba Yosuwa abarira abamanura umuvyimba wiwe ku giti, bawuterera imbere y’irembo ry’igisagara, bawurundakw ikirundo kinini c’amabuye; kiracariho na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua8:30 Maze Yosuwa yubakira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli igicaniro ku musozi Ebalu," 
Joshua8:31 nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabariye Abisirayeli, nk’uko vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vya Mose, igicaniro c’amabuye atabājwe, atigeze gukozwakw icuma; bagitangirakw ibimazi boshereje Uhoraho, batanga n’ibimazi vy’ ishimwe." 
Joshua8:32 Maze yandikira imbere y’Abisirayeli ivyagezwe vya Mose ku mabuye, nk’uko Mose yari yaravyanditse." 
Joshua8:33 Abisirayeli bose n’abakuru babo n’abashingantahe n’abacamanza bahagarara imbere y’Abalewi barerura isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bamwe ku ruhande rumwe rw’iyo sandugu, abandi ku rundi: s’ab’ imvukira gusa, ariko n’abanyamahanga na bo; igihimba kimwe cari gihagaze ku ruhande rw’umusozi Gerizimu, ikindi ku ruhande rw’ umusozi Ebalu, nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yababariye ubga mbere, uko bizogenzwa mu guhezagira Abisirayeli." 
Joshua8:34 Hanyuma asoma amajambo yose y’ivyagezwe, imihezagiro n’imivumo, nk’ uko vyari vyaranditswe vyose mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe." 
Joshua8:35 Nta jambo na rimwe mu yo Mose yageze yose, Yosuwa atāsomeye imbere y’ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli ryose, hamwe n’abagore n’abana n’abanyamahanga bāgendana na bo." 
Joshua9:1 Maz’ abami bose bo hakuno ya Yorodani, bo mu mugamba waho, n’abo mu misozi iciye bugufi, n’abo ku kiyaga kinini, aharābana n’i Lebanoni, Abaheti n’ Abamori n’Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi bavyumvise," 
Joshua9:2 barifatanya bahūza umutima, ngo baje kurwanya Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli." 
Joshua9:3 Maz’ ababa i Gibeyoni bumvise ivyo Yosuwa yagiriye Yeriko na Hayi," 
Joshua9:4 bagira inama y’ubgenge, baragenda batēkera impamba mu magunira y’imishire, baziremēka indogoba zabo, bo n’imikuza y’insāto ya vino y’imishire, yatabutse, isanikiriye;" 
Joshua9:5 bambara inkweto z’imishire mu birenge ziteye ibiremo, bambara n’impuzu z’imishire nyene; bakora imitsima y’impamba yabaye impehe iguye ifira." 
Joshua9:6 Nuko baragenda, bashikīra Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli aho bashagaje i Gilugali, barababarira, bati Tuvuye mu ntāra ya kure: non’ enda ni muduhe isezerano ryo gufatanya natwe." 
Joshua9:7 Maz’ Abisirayeli bishura abo Bahiwi, bati Kumbure mur’ abo tubana: none twohava tugasezerana namwe dute?" 
Joshua9:8 Babarira Yosuwa, bati Tur’ abasavyi bawe. Yosuwa arababaza, ati Mur’ abaki? kandi muturuka hehe?" 
Joshua9:9 Baramwishura, bati Twebge abasavyi bawe tuvuye mu gihugu ca kure iyo bigwa, kand’ ikituzanye ino ni kubg’ izina ry’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, kuko twumvise inkuru zayo, n’ivyo yakoze vyose muri Egiputa," 
Joshua9:10 n’ivyo yagiriye abami babiri b’Abamori bo hakurya ya Yorodani, Sihoni umwami w’i Heshiboni na Ogi umwami w’i Bashani yaba ahitwa Ashitaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Nukw abakuru bacu n’abo mu gihugu cacu bose baratubarira, bati Ni mukore impamba, mugende kubasanganira, mubabarire, muti N’abasavyi banyu; ngo None ni mubahe isezerano ryo gufatanya na bo." 
Joshua9:12 Kand’ ehe rāba iyi mitsima yacu twayitēkeye kw impamba igishushe, umusi nyene tukiva i muhira i wacu, dufashe inzira yo kuza iyo muri: none yarabaye impehe, yaguye ifira;" 
Joshua9:13 kandi n’iyi mikuza twayitēkeyemwo vino ikiri misha, non’ ehe rāba iratabaguritse; ehe n’iyi myambaro n’inkweto vyadushiriyeko kubg’ urugendo rurerure." 
Joshua9:14 Maz’ Abisirayeli bemezwa n’ izo mpamba, batarinze kugīsha inama Uhoraho." 
Joshua9:15 Yosuwa abasezeranira kuzobana amahoro na bo, no kubareka ngo bībēreho; n’abakuru b’ishengero na bo barabarahira." 
Joshua9:16 Ariko haciye imisi itatu bamaze gusezerana na bo, bumva kw ar’ ababangikanye na bo, kandi kw ar’ ababa ngaho nyene muri bo." 
Joshua9:17 Nukw Abisirayeli barahaguruka, bashika ku bisagara vyabo ku musi ugira gatatu. Ivyo bisagara vyari Gibeyoni na Kefira na Beroti na Kireyati‐yeyarimu." 
Joshua9:18 Arikw Abisirayeli bareka kubica, kukw abakuru b’ishengero bāri babarahiye Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli; maz’ ishengero ryose ryidodombera abo bakuru." 
Joshua9:19 Arikw abo bakuru babarira ishengero ryose, bati Twabarahiye Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, none ntitwoshobora kubakakaza." 
Joshua9:20 Enda tubagire durtya: tubareke bībēreho, twoye kwihamagarira uburake kubga ya ndahiro twabarahiye:" 
Joshua9:21 dupfe kubareka, ariko tubagire abashenyi n’abavomyi b’ ikoraniro ryose, nk’uko twababgiye. Uko ni kw abo bakuru bāvuze." 
Joshua9:22 Maze Yosuwa arabahamagaza, arababaza, ati N’iki catumye muduhenda, mukavuga yuko mur’ aba kure, kandi mur’ abo ngaha nyene muri twebge?" 
Joshua9:23 Nuko rero muravumwe, ntimuzobura kwama mur’ abaja, mube abashenyi n’abavomyi b’inzu y’Imana yanje." 
Joshua9:24 Bishura Yosuwa, bat’ Erega twebge abasavyi bawe bātubariye inkuru y’imvaho yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yawe yabariye Mose umusavyi wayo kw azobaha iki gihugu cose, no kuzorandura bene co; ni co catumye dutinyirira amagara yacu kubganyu, tugakora durtyo." 
Joshua9:25 None rāba, turi mu maboko yawe: utugire uk’ ugomba, nk’uko wumva bikubangukiye." 
Joshua9:26 Nuko Yosuwa abagirira nk’uko yavuze, arabakiza, abakūra mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, ntibābica." 
Joshua9:27 Kur’ uyo musi abagira abashenyi n’abavomyi b’iryo shengero n’ ab’ igicaniro c’Uhoraho, ahantu Uhoraho azotoranya ko kihaba. Kandi ni ko bagikora na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua10:1 Maze Adonisedeki umwami w’i Yerusalemu yumvise ingene Yosuwa yatsinze Hayi akaharandura rwose, akahagirira bo n’umwami waho nk’uko yagiriye Yeriko n’umwami waho, kandi yumvise kw ab’i Gibeyoni bifatanije n’Abisirayeli, bakabana," 
Joshua10:2 aratinya cane, kuko Gibeyoni car’ igisagara gihambaye, nk’ah’ ar’ umurwa w’umwami; mbere casumba Hayi, kand’ abantu baho bose bār’ abahizi." 
Joshua10:3 Nuko Adonisedeki umwami w’i Yerusalemu aca atuma kuri Hohamu umwami w’i Heburoni, no kuri Piramu umwami w’i Yaramuti, no kuri Yafiya umwami w’i Lakishi, no kuri Debira umwami w’i Eguloni;" 
Joshua10:4 uti Ni mudūge ino mumufashe, muje gutera ab’i Gibeyoni, kuko bifatanije na Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli." 
Joshua10:5 Nukw abo bami batanu b’Abamori, umwami w’i Yerusalemu n’uw’ i Heburoni n’uw’i Yaramuti n’uw’i Lakishi n’ uw’i Eguloni bakoranira hamwe, baradūga, bo n’ingabo zabo zose, basagaza inyuma y’i Gibeyoni, barahatera." 
Joshua10:6 Maz’ ab’i Gibeyoni batuma kuri Yosuwa ah’ ari mu nsago i Gilugali, uti Ntuhebe abasavyi bawe, uti Dūga n’ingoga ubatabare, ubavune, uti Kukw abami bose b’Abamori bo mu mugamba bakoraniye hamwe ngo babatere." 
Joshua10:7 Nuko Yosuwa ava i Gilugali, adūgana n’ingabo zose n’abahizi bose b’ibishirīra." 
Joshua10:8 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Ntubatinye, kuko mbagabuye mu maboko yawe: nta muntu n’umwe muri bo azoguhagarara imbere." 
Joshua10:9 Nuko Yosuwa abahungira ata co bīnona, kuko yarāye araza ijoro ryose, avuye i Gilugali." 
Joshua10:10 Maz’ Uhoraho abaca umuhongo imbere y’Abisirayeli, babicira i Gibeyoni, barabahindikiranya, babakinagiza inzira yose idūga ija i Beti‐horoni, babica ingenda gushitsa i Azeka n’i Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Maze bakiriko barahunga Abisirayeli, bakimanuka bava i Beti‐horoni, Uhoraho arekura imināna ivuye mw ijuru, igenda irabahonda barinda bashika i Azeka. Nuko barapfa: abishwe n’ urwo rubura bāruta abo Abisirayeli bicishije inkota." 
Joshua10:12 Ku musi Uhoraho yagabuye Abamori mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, Yosuwa abarira Uhoraho, maz’ avugira imbere y’Abisirayeli, ati Zuba, hagarara kuri Gibeyoni; nawe kwezi, hagarara mu kiyaya Ayaloni." 
Joshua10:13 Nukw izuba rica rirahagarara, n’ukwezi kuguma aho kwari kuri, gushitsa ah’ iryo hanga rimariye kwihōra abansi babo. Mbeg’ ivyo si ko vyanditswe mu Gitabo ca Yashari? Mber’ izuba ryagumye mw ijuru hagati, riteba kurenga kumara nk’umusi wose." 
Joshua10:14 Kand’ uwo musi nta wigeze guhwana na wo, ari mu yawutanguriye canke mu yawuherukiye, ah’ Uhoraho yumvise gusaba kw’umuntu, kuk’ Uhoraho ari we yarwaniye Abisirayeli." 
Joshua10:15 Hanyuma Yosuwa atabarukana n’Abisirayeli bose, bagaruka aho bashagaje i Gilugali." 
Joshua10:16 Abo bami ukw ari batanu barahunga, banyegera mw isenga ry’i Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Maze Yosuwa abarirwa inkuru yuko ba bami ukw ari batanu bababonye aho banyegeye, mw isenga ry’i Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Nuko Yosuwa arababarira, ati Genda mutembagaze amabuye manini‐manini, muyugaze umuryango w’iryo senga, muheze muhashire ababarinda." 
Joshua10:19 At’ Ariko mwebge ntimuhatebe: mukurikire abansi banyu, mugende murica ab’ indongorongo bo muri bo; ntimubakundire gusubira mu bisagara vyabo, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu abagabuye mu maboko yanyu." 
Joshua10:20 Maze Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bamaze kubahindikiranya, babatsinze rwose, amasigarira yo muri bo amaze kwitera mu bisagara bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye," 
Joshua10:21 ingabo zose zigaruka kuri Yosuwa amahoro, aho bashagaje i Makeda. Ntihāba hakigira ūtinyuka kugira ico avuga ku muntu n’umwe mu Bisirayeli." 
Joshua10:22 Maze Yosuwa aravuga, ati Ni mwugurure ku muryango w’iryo senga, mukūrey’ abo bami ukw ari batanu, mubanzanire." 
Joshua10:23 Bagira nk’uko babariwe, bakūra abo bami mur’ iryo senga ukw ari batanu, barabamuzanira; ni bo aba: umwami w’i Yerusalemu, n’uw’i Heburoni, n’uw’i Yaramuti, n’uw’i Lakishi, n’uw’i Eguloni." 
Joshua10:24 Nuko bamaze kubakūrayo, babashīra Yosuwa; Yosuwa ahamagaza abantu bose b’Abisirayeli, abarira abagabisha b’ingabo bajanye na we, ati Ni muze, mukandagire ku mazosi y’aba bami. Nuko baraza, babakandagira ku mazosi." 
Joshua10:25 Yosuwa arababarira, ati Ntimutinye, ntimuranduke imitima; mushikame, mushire amanga: kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho azokwama agirira abansi banyu bose muzorwanya." 
Joshua10:26 Hanyuma Yosuwa afata abo bami, arabica; araheza abamanika ku biti bitanu: basigara ngaho bēnēna kur’ ivyo biti gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Joshua10:27 Maze ku kirengazuba, Yosuwa avuga ko babamanura kur’ ivyo biti, babaterera muri rya senga bari binyegejemwo, ku muryango waho bahugaza amabuye manini‐manini, kugeza na bugingo n’ubu." 
Joshua10:28 Kur’ iryo zuba nyene Yosuwa atsinda i Makeda, ahatōngōza inkota, yica n’umwami waho; abageseza bose iyo bava bakagera, ntiyasiga n’uwa kirazira: mber’ agirira umwami w’i Makeda nk’ uko yagiriye uw’i Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Hanyuma Yosuwa ava i Makeda, bo n’Abisirayeli bose, batera i Libuna, baraharwanya;" 
Joshua10:30 Uhoraho agabura ico gisagara na co mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, bo n’umwami waco; Yosuwa atōngōza inkota abahaba bose, ntiyasiga n’uwa kirazira; agirira umwami waco nk’ uko yagiriye uw’i Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Hanyuma Yosuwa ava i Libuna, bo n’Abisirayeli bose, basagaza inyuma y’i Lakishi, barahatera:" 
Joshua10:32 maz’ Uhoraho ahagabura mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, Yosuwa ahanesha ku musi ugira kabiri, atōngōza inkota abahaba bose, ahagirira nk’ivyo yagiriye i Libuna vyose." 
Joshua10:33 Maze Horamu umwami w’i Gezeri adūga gutabara i Lakishi: Yosuwa amwicana n’ingabo ziwe, ntiyasiga n’uwa kirazira." 
Joshua10:34 Hanyuma Yosuwa ava i Lakishi, bo n’Abisirayeli bose, basagaza inyuma y’i Eguloni, barahatera;" 
Joshua10:35 bahanesha kur’ uwo musi nyene, bahatōngōza inkota, Yosuwa ageseza abahaba bose, ahagirira nk’ivyo yagiriye i Lakishi vyose." 
Joshua10:36 Hanyuma Yosuwa aradūga, ava i Eguloni, bo n’Abisirayeli bose, batera i Heburoni, baraharwanya." 
Joshua10:37 Barahanesha, bahatōngōza inkota, bica n’umwami waho, batōngōra n’ibindi bisagara vyaho vyose, n’abāri muri vyo bose: ntibasiga n’uwa kirazira; Yosuwa ahagirira nk’ivyo yagiriye i Eguloni vyose, ahagesezanya n’ abahaba bose." 
Joshua10:38 Maze Yosuwa arakebanuka, bo n’Abisirayeli bose, atera i Debira, araharwanya;" 
Joshua10:39 ahaneshanya n’umwami waho, n’ibindi bisagara vyaho vyose; abitōngōza inkota, ageseza abāri muri vyo bose: ntiyasiga n’uwa kirazira. Nk’uko yagiriye i Heburoni, bo n’i Libuna n’umwami waho, ni ko yagiriye i Debira n’umwami waho." 
Joshua10:40 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yatsinze ico gihugu cose, igihugu c’umugamba n’ic’i Negebu n’igiciye bugufi n’ icegamiye umugamba, bo n’abami baho bose, ntiyasiga n’uwa kirazira, arikw ageseza abahumeka bose, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli yavuze." 
Joshua10:41 Yosuwa arabatsinda, uhereye i Kadeshi‐baruneya ukageza n’i Gaza n’igihugu cose c’i Gosheni, ukarinda ushitsa n’i Gibeyoni." 
Joshua10:42 Nukw abo bami bose n’ibihugu vyabo Yosuwa yabaneshereje igihe kimwe, kuk’ Uhoraho, Imana y’ Abisirayeli, ari we yabarwaniye." 
Joshua10:43 Maze Yosuwa atabarukana n’ Abisirayeli bose, basubira aho bashagaje i Gilugali." 
Joshua11:1 Yabina umwami w’i Hasori avyumvise, atuma kuri Yobabu umwami w’i Madoni, no ku mwami w’i Shimuroni, no ku mwami w’i Akishafi," 
Joshua11:2 atuma no ku bami bo mu mugamba w’i burārūko, n’abo mu kiyaya Araba giherereye i Kinereti i bumanuko bgaho, n’abo mu gihugu c’imisozi iciye bugufi, n’abo mu misozi ihagaze y’i Dori ahahera i burengerazuba;" 
Joshua11:3 atuma no ku Banyakanani b’i burasirazuba n’ab’i burengerazuba, no ku Bamori no ku Baheti no ku Baferizi no ku Bayebusi bo mu mugamba, no ku Bahiwi bo musi ya Herumoni mu gihugu c’i Misipa." 
Joshua11:4 Nuko bazanana n’ingabo zabo zose; bāri benshi nk’umusenyi wo kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga, bo n’amafarasi n’imikogote vy’isinzi." 
Joshua11:5 Abo bami bose bakoranira hamwe, baraza basagaza ku mazi y’i Meromu, ngo batere Abisirayeli." 
Joshua11:6 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa, ati Ntubatinye; kukw ejo nk’aya mango bose nzobagabura bagwe imbere y’Abisirayeli; amafarasi yabo uz’ uyacagagure ibitsi, n’imikogote yabo uz’ uyiturire." 
Joshua11:7 Nuko Yosuwa azanana n’ingabo ziwe zose, abaterera ku mazi y’i Meromu, abahungiye ata co bīnona." 
Joshua11:8 Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, barabanesha, barabakinagiza, babashitsa ku gisagara kinini Sidoni n’i Misirefoti‐mayimu no mu kiyaya c’i Misipe ahahera i burasirazuba; barabica ntibasiga n’uwa kirazira." 
Joshua11:9 Yosuwa abagirira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; amafarasi yabo ayacagagura ibitsi, n’imikogote yabo arayiturira." 
Joshua11:10 Maz’ ico gihe Yosuwa arakebanuka, atsinda i Hasori, yicisha umwami waho inkota; kand’ i Hasori ubga mbere ni co cār’ igisagara gikuru mu bihugu vy’abo bami bose." 
Joshua11:11 Batōngōza inkota abari muri co bose, barabageseza; ntihasigara n’umwe agihumeka, kandi n’i Hasori bahatōngōza umuriro." 
Joshua11:12 Yosuwa atsinda ibisagara vyose vy’abo bami, abo bami bose abicisha inkota, arabageseza, nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yageze." 
Joshua11:13 Arikw ibisagara vyubatswe ku dusozi tunungaraye, Abisirayeli nta na kimwe bāturiye, atar’ i Hasori honyene: aho ho Yosuwa yarahaturiye." 
Joshua11:14 Iminyago yose y’ivyo bisagara, n’inka zose, Abisirayeli bavyijanira kw iminyago; arikw icitwa umuntu wese bamwicisha inkota, gushitsa babaranduye rwose: ntibasigaza n’umwe agihumeka." 
Joshua11:15 Nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yageze Mose umusavyi wiwe, ni ko Mose yageze Yosuwa, Yosuwa na we abigenza kuno: nta kintu na kimwe atākoze, mu vy’Uhoraho yageze Mose vyose." 
Joshua11:16 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yanesheje ico gihugu cose: umugamba waho, n’i Negebu hose, n’igihugu cose c’i Gosheni, n’ic’ imisozi iciye bugufi, n’ikiyaya Araba, n’umugamba witwa uwa Isirayeli, n’igihugu c’imisozi iciye bugufi kiwegamiye," 
Joshua11:17 uhereye ku musozi Halaki, uk’ udūga utumbereye i Seyiri, gushitsa i Bayali‐gadi ku mwonga w’i Lebanoni uri musi y’umusozi Herumoni; anesha n’abami baho bose, arabafata, arabica." 
Joshua11:18 Mbere Yosuwa yamaze igihe kirekire arwana n’abo bami bose. 
Joshua11:19 Nta gisagara na kimwe cigeze kwisaba Abisirayeli, atar’ Abahiwi bāba i Gibeyoni: ibindi bisagara vyose babinesheje birwanye." 
Joshua11:20 Kukw ivyo vyari bivuye k’Uhoraho, yakomantaje imitima yabo, bakaza kurwana n’Abisirayeli, kugira ngw Abisirayeli babarandure rwose ata kagongwe, babageseze, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose." 
Joshua11:21 Ico gihe Yosuwa aragenda, ageseza Abanaki bo mu gihugu c’ umugamba, uhereye i Heburoni n’i Debira n’i Anabu, umugamba wose watwaye Abayuda, n’umugamba wose watwaye Abisirayeli; Yosuwa arabarandura rwose, bo n’ibisagara vyabo." 
Joshua11:22 Ntihagira n’umwe wo mu Banaki asigara mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli, atari bamwe‐bamwe basigaye i Gaza n’i Gati n’i Ashidodi." 
Joshua11:23 Uko ni ko Yosuwa yanesheje ico gihugu cose, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose. Maze Yosuwa akigabanganya Abisirayeli ngo kibe ishamvu yabo, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri. Nukw igihugu gihabga impore." 
Joshua12:1 Aba ni bo bami b’ibihugu Abisirayeli bānesheje, bakegukira ibihugu vyabo, hakurya ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba, uhereye ku mwonga wo kuri Arunoni ugashitsa ku musozi Herumoni n’ikiyaya cose citwa Araba ahahera i burasirazuba:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihoni umwami w’Abamori, yaba i Heshiboni, yatwara uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’ umwonga wo kuri Arunoni, ukajana uwo mwonga nyene, n’igihimba c’i Gileyadi, ugashitsa ku ruzi Yaboki, ari rwo rugabano rw’Abamoni," 
Joshua12:3 bo n’ikiyaya Araba, ugashitsa ku kiyaga Kinereti ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, no ku kiyaga co mur’ ico kiyaya Araba nyene, ari co Kiyaga c’Umunyu, ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba uko rugiye rurābana n’i Beti‐yeshimoti, ugaca i bumanuko, musi y’agahanamo ka Pisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Kandi banesha n’igihugu ca Ogi, umwami w’i Bashani w’agasigarira k’Abarefa, yaba ahitwa Ashitaroti n’ahitwa Edireyi;" 
Joshua12:5 yatwara uhereye ku musozi Herumoni n’i Saleka n’i Bashani hose, gushitsa ku rugabano rw’Abageshuri n’Abanyamayaka, n’igihimba c’i Gileyadi gushitsa ku rugabano rwa Sihoni umwami w’i Heshiboni." 
Joshua12:6 Abo ni bo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho, bo n’Abisirayeli, bānesheje; kand’ igihugu cabo Mose yagihaye Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’ umuryango wa Manase kw ishamvu." 
Joshua12:7 Kand’ aba ni bo bār’ abami b’ ibihugu vyo hakuno ya Yorodani i burengerazuba, abo Yosuwa n’Abisirayeli bānesheje, uhereye i Bayali‐gadi mu kiyaya c’i Lebanoni, ugashitsa ku musozi Halaki, uk’ udūga utumbereye i Seyiri. Yosuwa agiha imiryango y’Abisirayeli ngo bacegukire nk’uko bākigabanganirijwe;" 
Joshua12:8 igihugu c’ umugamba n’igiciye bugufi, n’ikiyaya citwa Araba, n’igihugu cegamiye umugamba, n’ubugaragwa, n’i Negebu; ni vyo bihugu vy’ Abaheti n’Abamori n’Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi." 
Joshua12:9 Abo bami n’aba: umwe n’umwami w’i Yeriko, n’uw’i Hayi aharābana n’i Beteli;" 
Joshua12:10 n’uw’i Yerusalemu, n’uw’i Heburoni;" 
Joshua12:11 n’uw’i Yaramuti, n’uw’i Lakishi;" 
Joshua12:12 n’uw’i Eguloni, n’uw’i Gezeri;" 
Joshua12:13 n’uw’i Debira, n’uw’i Gederi;" 
Joshua12:14 n’uw’i Horuma, n’ uw’i Aradi;" 
Joshua12:15 n’uw’i Libuna, n’uw’i Adulamu;" 
Joshua12:16 n’uw’i Makeda, n’uw’i Beteli;" 
Joshua12:17 n’uw’i Tapuwa, n’uw’i Heferi;" 
Joshua12:18 n’uw’ i Afeka, n’uw’i Lasharoni;" 
Joshua12:19 n’ uw’i Madoni, n’uw’i Hasori;" 
Joshua12:20 n’uw’i Shimuroni‐meroni, n’ uw’i Akishafu;" 
Joshua12:21 n’uw’i Tanaki, n’uw’i Megido;" 
Joshua12:22 n’uw’i Kedeshi, n’uw’i Yokineyamu h’i Karumeli;" 
Joshua12:23 n’uw’i Dori yātwara mu mugamba w’i Dori nyene, n’uw’i Goyimu h’i Gilugali;" 
Joshua12:24 n’uw’i Tirusa. Bose na bose abo bami bari mirongwitatu n’umwe. 
Joshua13:1 Kandi Yosuwa yar’ ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru; nuk’ Uhoraho aramubarira, at’ Eh’ urashaje, ugeze mu zabukuru; ariko haracasigaye ibihugu vyinshi mutaregukira." 
Joshua13:2 Ibi ni vyo bihugu bisigaye: igihugu cose c’Abafilisitiya, n’ic’ Abageshuri cose," 
Joshua13:3 uhēreye ku ruzi Shihori rurābana na Egiputa, gushitsa ku rubibe rw’i Ekuroni ahahera i burārūko, ahavugwa kw ar’ ah’ Abanyakanani: kand’ abaganwa batanu b’Abafilisitiya n’aba: uw’i Gaza, n’uw’i Ashidodi, n’uw’i Ashikeloni, n’uw’i Gati, n’uw’i Ekuroni; bo n’igihugu c’Abavimu," 
Joshua13:4 ahahera i bumanuko; bo n’igihugu cose c’ Abanyakanani, n’i Meyara h’Abasidoni, ugashitsa kuri Afeka ku rubibe rw’Abamori;" 
Joshua13:5 bo n’igihugu c’Abagebali, n’i Lebanoni hose aherekeye i burasirazuba, uhereye i Bayali‐gadi musi y’umusozi Herumoni, ugashitsa ahafata i Hamati;" 
Joshua13:6 ababa mu mugamba bose, uhereye i Lebanoni ugashitsa i Misirefoti‐mayimu, ni bo Basidoni bose; at’ Abo nzotuma biruka imbere y’Abisirayeli; ariko wewe, pfa kuhagabanganya Abisirayeli, nk’uko nakugeze." 
Joshua13:7 None rer’ ivyo bihugu ubigabanganye imiryango cenda, bo na ca gihimba c’Abamanase." 
Joshua13:8 Ikindi gihimba c’Abamanase, bo n’Abareyubeni n’Abagadi, bāri bamaze guhabga ishamvu yabo hakurya ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba, nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabahaye;" 
Joshua13:9 uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni, no ku gisagara kiri hagati mur’ uwo mwonga nyene, n’ikiyaya cose c’i Medeba, ugashitsa i Diboni;" 
Joshua13:10 n’ibisagara vyose vya Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yatwara i Heshiboni, no kugeza ku rubibe rw’Abamoni," 
Joshua13:11 n’i Gileyadi, n’ igihugu c’Abageshuri n’ic’ Abanyamayaka, n’umusozi wose w’i Herumoni, n’i Bashani hose gushitsa i Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 n’igihugu cose ca Ogi umwami w’i Bashani, yaganziriza ahitwa Ashitaroti n’ahitwa Edireyi; uwo ni we yar’ agasigarira k’Abarefa; abo ni bo Mose yanesheje, arabasohora." 
Joshua13:13 Yamar’ Abisirayeli bo ntibirukanye Abageshuri cank’ Abanyamayaka; arikw Abageshuri n’Abanyamayaka baciye babana n’Abisirayeli kugeza na bugingo n’ubu. 
Joshua13:14 Arik’ umuryango w’Abalewi wo nta shamvu Mose yabahaye; ibimazi vyashikaniwe Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli bigatōngōrwa n’umuriro, ni vyo vyar’ ishamvu yabo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye." 
Joshua13:15 Mose ni we yahaye umuryango w’Abareyubeni ishamvu, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua13:16 Igihugu cabo cāhēra kuri Aroweri ho ku mucāmo hejuru y’umwonga wo kuri Arunoni, no ku gisagara kiri hagati mur’ uwo mwonga nyene, n’ikiyaya cose c’i Medeba," 
Joshua13:17 n’i Heshiboni n’ibisagara vyose vyo mu kiyaya bihakūkira, n’i Diboni n’i Bamoti‐bayali, n’i Beti‐bayali‐meyoni," 
Joshua13:18 n’i Yahasi n’i Kedemoti n’i Mefayati," 
Joshua13:19 n’i Kiriyatayimu n’i Sibuma, n’i Sereti-shahari hubatswe ku musozi wo mu kiyaya," 
Joshua13:20 n’i Beti‐peyori, n’ agahanamo ka Pisiga, n’i Beti‐yeshimoti," 
Joshua13:21 n’ibisagara vyose vyo mu kiyaya, n’igihugu cose car’ ica Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yaganziriza i Heshiboni, uwo Mose yanesheje hamwe n’abaganwa b’i Midiyani, ni bo aba: Ewi na Rekemu na Tsuri na Huri na Reba, ni bo baganwa bākūkira Sihoni bāba mur’ ico gihugu." 
Joshua13:22 Kandi na Balamu mwene Beyori w’umumenyi, Abisirayeli bāmwicishije inkota hamwe n’abandi bishe." 
Joshua13:23 Igihugu c’Abareyubeni cāgarukira kuri Yorodani: ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rwabo. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abareyubeni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ukw ibisagara vyaho biri, bo n’imihana yaho." 
Joshua13:24 Kandi Mose yahaye umuryango w’Abagadi ishamvu, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua13:25 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Yazeri, n’ibisagara vyose vy’i Gileyadi, n’igihimba c’igihugu c’Abamoni gushitsa kuri Aroweri aharābana n’i Raba," 
Joshua13:26 no guhēra i Heshiboni ugashitsa i Ramati‐Misipa n’i Betonimu, no guhēra i Mahanayimu ugashitsa ku rubibe rw’i Debira;" 
Joshua13:27 bo n’ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya, i Beti‐haramu n’i Beti‐nimura n’i Sukoti n’i Safoni, n’igihimba casigaye c’igihugu ca Sihoni, umwami w’i Heshiboni; Yorodani ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rwabo gushitsa ah’ ikiyaga c’i Kinereti kigarukira, hakurya ya Yorodani ahahera i burasirazuba." 
Joshua13:28 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abagadi, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ukw ibisagara vyaho biri, bo n’imihana yaho." 
Joshua13:29 Kandi Mose yahaye ishamvu igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase: haba umugabane wabo, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua13:30 Igihugu cabo cāhēra i Mahanayimu, n’i Bashani hose, igihugu cose ca Ogi umwami w’i Bashani, n’ibisagara vyose vya Yayiri vy’i Bashani nyene, vyose na vyose vyari mirongwitandatu;" 
Joshua13:31 n’igihimba c’i Gileyadi, n’ahitwa Ashitaroti n’ahitwa Edireyi, yar’ imirwa ya Ogi umwami w’i Bashani; ivyo ni vyo vyatwaye aba Makiri mwene Manase; ni co ca gihimba c’Abamakiri, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua13:32 Ayo ni yo mashamvu Mose yagabuye ari mu kiyaya c’i Mowabu, hakurya ya Yorodani, aharābana n’i Yeriko ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba." 
Joshua13:33 Arik’ umuryango wa Lewi wo, Mose nta shamvu yabahaye: Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ni we shamvu yabo, nk’uko yababariye." 
Joshua14:1 Aya ni yo mashamvu Abisirayeli bāhawe mu gihugu c’i Kanani, uko bayagabanganijwe na Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli." 
Joshua14:2 Imiryango cenda n’igihimba, amashamvu yabo bayaheshejwe n’ubupfindo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose;" 
Joshua14:3 kuko Mose ubgiwe ari we yari yagaburiye iyindi miryango ibiri n’igihimba amashamvu hakurya ya Yorodani; arikw Abalewi bo ntiyabahaye ishamvu mu bandi. 
Joshua14:4 Kuko bene Yosefu babayemw’ imiryango ibiri: uw’Abamanase n’uw’Abefurayimu; nta mugabane Abalewi bāhawe, atar’ ibisagara vyo kubamwo, n’amaragiro ar’ inyuma yavyo, yo kuragiramw’ inka zabo n’ibitungwa vyabo." 
Joshua14:5 Nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabariye Mose, ni kw Abisirayeli bābigenjeje, mu kugabura igihugu." 
Joshua14:6 Maz’ Abayuda baza kuri Yosuwa i Gilugali; Kalebu mwene Yefune Umukenizi aramubarira, at’ Urazi ivyo Uhoraho yatuvuzeko twe nawe, akabibgira Mose umuntu w’Imana, tur’ i Kadeshi‐baruneya." 
Joshua14:7 Nari mmaze imyaka mirongwine, igihe Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yantuma, ngo mve i Kadeshi‐baruneya nje gutata igihugu; ngarutse nkamubarira inkuru ntacishije i ruhande;" 
Joshua14:8 ariko bagenzi banje twari twadūganye bakarandura abantu imitima: mugabo jeho nakurikiye Uhoraho Imana yanje muri vyose. 
Joshua14:9 Maz’ uwo musi nyene Mose arandahira, ati N’ukuri igihugu wakandagiyemwo kizoba ishamvu yawe n’iy’ abana bawe gushitsa ibihe vyose, kuko wakurikiye Uhoraho Imana yanje muri vyose." 
Joshua14:10 Kalebu arongera aravuga, ati Kand’ ehe rāba, Uhoraho yampaye kumara iyi myaka mirongwine n’itanu nk’ uko yavuze, uhereye igihe yabaririye Mose iryo jambo, Abisirayeli bagatangura kuyerēra mu bugaragwa; non’ ehe rāba, uyu musi mmaze imyaka mirongumunani n’ itanu." 
Joshua14:11 Kandi n’uyu musi ndacafise inkomezi, nk’uko nari ndazifise kuri wa musi Mose yantuma; ukw inkomezi zanje zari ziri ico gihe ngitabara mu rugamba ngatabaruka, n’ubu ni ko zikiri." 
Joshua14:12 None rero n’umpe uriya musozi Uhoraho yavuze wa musi. Ico gihe wumvise kw ar’ah’ Abanaki, kandi ko bahafise ibisagara binini‐binini bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye; kumbure Uhoraho azoba kumwe nanje, ndabaneshe nk’uko yambariye." 
Joshua14:13 Maze Yosuwa ahezagira Kalebu mwene Yefune, amuha Heburoni kw ishamvu." 
Joshua14:14 Nuko Heburoni hacika ishamvu ya Kalebu mwene Yefune Umukenizi na bugingo n’ubu, kuko yakurikiye Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli muri vyose." 
Joshua14:15 Kand’ i Heburoni kera hitwa Igisagara ca Araba: Araba uwo yasumba abandi Banaki bose. Nukw igihugu gihabga impore. 
Joshua15:1 Ishamvu umuryango w’Abayuda waheshejwe n’ubupfindo, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, yagarukira ku rubibe rw’Abanyedomu, ikerekera i bumanuko ahahera mu bugaragwa bg’i Zini, ikarinda ishika no kw iherezo ryabgo ry’i bumanuko." 
Joshua15:2 Urubibe rwabo rw’i bumanuko rwāhēra ah’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu gitaye ikirimi aharāba i bumanuko; 
Joshua15:3 rugaca hirya y’umudūgo w’i Akurabimu ahahera i bumanuko nyene, rukagenda rugaca i Zini, rukadūga rugaca ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko rw’i Kadeshi‐baruneya, rugaca hafi y’i Hesironi, rukadūga Adari, rugakebereza i Karika;" 
Joshua15:4 rugaca ahitwa Asimoni, rukagarukira ku ruzi rwa Egiputa, maz’ urwo rubibe rukaruma ku kiyaga. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rwabo rw’i bumanuko." 
Joshua15:5 Urubibe rw’i burasirazuba rwar’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu gushitsa aho Yorodani rushikira muri co. Urubibe rw’i burārūko rwāhēra ah’ ico kiyaga gitaye ikirimi, hamwe nyene Yorodani rushikira muri co;" 
Joshua15:6 urwo rubibe rwādūga i Beti‐hogula, rugaca ku ruhande rw’i burārūko rw’i Beti‐araba; rukadūga rugashika kw ibuye rya Bohani mwene Reyubeni;" 
Joshua15:7 rugakomeza rukadūga i Debira ruvuye mu Kiyaya Akori, rugakomeza rurtyo ruja i burārūko rwerekeye i Gilugali, aharābana n’ inzira idūga Adumimu, umusozi wo hakurya, ahahera i bumanuko; rugakomeza rugaca ku mazi y’i Eni‐shemeshi, rukagarukira ahitwa Eni‐rogeli;" 
Joshua15:8 rugaheza rukadūga rukajana umwonga wa mwene Hinomu gushitsa ku mucāmo w’ umusozi w’Abayebusi ahahera i bumanuko, ni wo Yerusalemu; rukadūga gushitsa ku mpinga y’ umusozi uhanamiye uwo mwonga nyene wa Hinomu ahahera i burengerazuba, ni ho umwonga Refayimu wahēra, ku ruhande rw’i burārūko." 
Joshua15:9 Nuk’ urwo rubibe rukamanuka ku mpinga y’uwo musozi gushitsa kw iriba ry’i Nefutowa, rugahēraho rugashitsa mu bisagara vyo ku musozi Efuroni; rugakebānuka rugaca i Bayala, ari ho Kiriyati‐yeyarimu;" 
Joshua15:10 rugaheza rugakevya, rukava i Bayala, rukagenda rwerekeye i burengerazuba gushitsa ku musozi Seyiri; rugahita rugashika ku mucāmo uhera i burārūko w’umusozi Yeyarimu, ari wo Kesaloni, rukamanuka rugashika i Beti‐shemeshi, rugaca hafi y’i Timuna;" 
Joshua15:11 rugakomeza rugashika ku mucāmo wa Ekuroni ahahera i burārūko; rugakevya, rugaca i Shikeroni, rugashika ku musozi Bayala, rugakomeza gushitsa i Yabuneli, rukaruma ku kiyaga." 
Joshua15:12 Urubibe rw’i burasirazuba rwar’ ikiyaga kinini, ujanye inkōkoro yaco. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’Abayuda impande zose, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua15:13 Nuko Kalebu mwene Yefune Yosuwa amuha ishamvu mu muryango wa Yuda, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; amuha Igisagara ca Araba, ari ho Heburoni; (Araba uwo ni we se wa Anaki)." 
Joshua15:14 Maze Kalebu ahīrukana bene Anaki batatu, Sheshayi na Ahimanu na Talumayi; abo ni bo bene Anaki." 
Joshua15:15 Nukw avayo, aradūga, ngw aje gutera ab’i Debira; Debira kera hitwa i Kiriyati‐seferi." 
Joshua15:16 Kalebu aravuga, at’ Umuntu azotera i Kiriyati‐seferi akahanesha, nzomushingira umwana wanje Akisa." 
Joshua15:17 Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi, murumuna wa Kalebu, arahanesha; araheza amushingira umukobga wiwe Akisa." 
Joshua15:18 Maz’ agishika i w’umugabo wiwe, aramwinginga ngw asabe se itongo; Akisa ava ku ndogoba yiwe, Kalebu aramubaza, at’ Ugomba iki?" 
Joshua15:19 Aramwishura, ati Ntabara ungabire: ko wandungitse mu gihugu cumye, mpa n’amariba y’amazi. Nukw amuha amariba yo haruguru n’ayo hepfo." 
Joshua15:20 Iyi ni yo shamvu y’umuryango w’Abayuda, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari:" 
Joshua15:21 ibisagara vy’umuryango w’Abayuda birābana n’urubibe rw’ Abanyedomu i bumanuko vyari Kabuseri na Ederi na Yagura," 
Joshua15:22 na Kina na Dimona na Adada," 
Joshua15:23 na Kedeshi na Hasori na Itunani," 
Joshua15:24 na Zifu na Teremu na Beyaloti," 
Joshua15:25 na Hasori‐hadata na Keriyoti‐hezeroni (ari ho Hasori)," 
Joshua15:26 na Amamu na Shema na Molada," 
Joshua15:27 na Hasari‐gada na Heshimoni na Beti‐peleti," 
Joshua15:28 na Hasari‐shuwali na Beri‐sheba na Biziyotiya," 
Joshua15:29 na Bala na Yimu na Esemu," 
Joshua15:30 na Elitoladi na Kesili na Horuma," 
Joshua15:31 na Sikulagi na Medumani na Sanusana," 
Joshua15:32 na Lebayoti na Shiluhimu na Ayini na Rimona; ibisagara vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri n’icenda, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua15:33 Ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya vyar’ ibi: Eshitayoli na Sora na Ashina," 
Joshua15:34 na Sanowa na Eni‐ganimu, na Tapuwa na Enamu," 
Joshua15:35 na Yaramuti na Aduwamu na Sokoho na Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 na Sharayimu na Aditayimu na Gedera na Gederotayimu; vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bine, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua15:37 Hāri na Senani na Hadasha na Migudali‐gadi," 
Joshua15:38 na Dilani na Misipe na Yokiteli," 
Joshua15:39 na Lakishi na Bosikati na Eguloni," 
Joshua15:40 na Kaboni na Lahimamu na Kitilishi," 
Joshua15:41 na Gederoti na Beti‐dagoni na Nayama na Makeda; vyose na vyose n’ icumi na bitandatu, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua15:42 Hāri na Libuna na Eteri na Ashanu," 
Joshua15:43 na Ifuta na Ashuna na Nesibu," 
Joshua15:44 na Keyila na Akizibu na Maresha; vyose na vyose vyar’ ibisagara cenda, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua15:45 Hāri na Ekuroni bo n’udusagara n’imihana bihakūkira," 
Joshua15:46 uhereye Ekuroni nyene ugashitsa ku kiyaga, iyo ntāra yose n’ imihana yaho, uko vyagenda biherereye kuri Ashidodi." 
Joshua15:47 Hāri na Ashidodi nyene, bo n’udusagara n’imihana bihakūkira, na Gaza n’udusagara n’imihana bihakūkira nyene, ugashitsa ku ruzi rwa Egiputa no ku kiyaga kinini ujanye inkōkoro yaco." 
Joshua15:48 Ibisagara vyo mu mugamba vyār’ ibi: Shamira na Yatira na Sokoho," 
Joshua15:49 na Dana na Kiriyati‐sana, ari ho Debira," 
Joshua15:50 na Anaba na Eshitemo na Animu," 
Joshua15:51 na Gosheni na Holoni na Gilo; vyar’ ibisagara cumi na kimwe bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:52 Hāri na Araba na Duma na Eshana," 
Joshua15:53 na Yanimu na Beti‐tapuwa na Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 na Humata na Kiriyati‐Araba (ari ho Heburoni) na Siyori; vyar’ ibisagara cenda bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:55 Hāri na Mayoni na Karumeli na Zifu na Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 na Yezireli na Yokodeyamu na Sanowa," 
Joshua15:57 na Kayini na Gibeya na Timuna; vyar’ ibisagara cumi bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:58 Hāri na Halihuli na Beti‐suri na Gedora," 
Joshua15:59 na Mara na Beti‐anoti na Elitekoni; vyar’ ibisagara bitandatu bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:60 Hāri na Kiriyati‐bayali (ari ho Kiriyati‐yeyarimu) na Raba: ibisagara bibiri bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:61 Ibisagara vyo mu bugaragwa vyar’ ibi: Beti‐araba na Midina na Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 na Nibushani n’Igisagara c’Umunyu na Eni‐gedi; vyar’ ibisagara bitandatu bifise imihana ibikūkira. 
Joshua15:63 Arikw Abayebusi bo, ari bo bāba i Yerusalemu, Abayuda ntibāshoboye kubirukana; ariko bībēra i Yerusalemu mu Bayuda gushitsa n’ubu." 
Joshua16:1 Ishamvu aba Yosefu baheshejwe n’ubupfindo yahēra kuri Yorodani aharābana n’i Yeriko, ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba ku mazi ya Yeriko nyene; urubibe rwabo rwajana mu bugaragwa ruvuye i Yeriko, rugaca mu mugamba rugashika i Beteli;" 
Joshua16:2 rukava i Beteli rugashika i Luzi, rugakomeza inzira rugashika ku rubibe rw’Abaruki ahitwa Ataroti;" 
Joshua16:3 rukamanuka rwerekeye i burengerazuba, rurābana n’urubibe rw’Abayafuleti, rukarinda rushika ku rubibe rw’i Beti‐horoni ho hepfo, bo n’i Gezeri, rukagarukira ku kiyaga." 
Joshua16:4 Aho ni ho aba Yosefu bāronse ishamvu, ari bo Bamanase n’Abefurayimu." 
Joshua16:5 Urubibe rw’Abefurayimu, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari, rwagenda rurtya: urugabano rw’ishamvu yabo rw’ahahera i burasirazuba rwahēra kuri Ataroti‐adara rugashika i Beti‐horoni ho haruguru:" 
Joshua16:6 ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba rwagarukira i Mikimetati ahahera i burārūko; rugaheza rugakebereza ahahera i burasirazuba, rugaca i Tanati‐shilo, rugaca i burasirazuba bg’i Yanowa;" 
Joshua16:7 ruvuye i Yanowa rukamanuka rugaca i Ataroti n’i Nara, rugashika i Yeriko, rukagarukira kuri Yorodani." 
Joshua16:8 Kuva i Tapuwa, urwo rubibe rwagenda rwerekeye i burengerazuba, rukarinda rushika ku kagezi kitwa Kana; maze rukagarukira ku kiyaga. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ Abefurayimu, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari," 
Joshua16:9 hamwe n’ibisagara bāsobanuriwe mw ishamvu y’Abamanase, ibisagara vyose n’imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua16:10 Mugabo ntibirukanye Abanyakanani bāba i Gezeri, arikw abo Banyakanani bībēra mu Befurayimu gushitsa n’ ubu, bahinduka abaja bo gushingwa ibikebere." 
Joshua17:1 Maz’ ubupfindo bgerekana ishamvu y’umuryango wa Manase, ari we mfura ya Yosefu; imfura ya Manase yari Makiri, se wa Gileyadi; Makiri uwo, ni we yahawe i Gileyadi n’i Bashani, kuko yar’ umuhizi." 
Joshua17:2 Ubupfindo bgerekana n’amashamvu ya bene Manase bandi, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ni bo ba Abiyezeri n’aba Heleki n’aba Asiriyeli n’aba Shekemu n’aba Heferi n’aba Shemida; abo ni bo bahungu ba Manase mwene Yosefu, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua17:3 Ariko Selofehadi mwene Heferi, Heferi wa Gileyadi, Gileyadi wa Makiri, Makiri wa Manase, ntiyari yaravyaye abahungu, atar’ abakobga gusa; aya ni yo mazina yabo: Makila na Nowa na Hogila na Miluka na Tirusa." 
Joshua17:4 Baza kuri Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni n’abakuru, bat’ Uhoraho yabariye Mose kw azoduha ishamvu muri basāzācu. Nuko Yosuwa abaha ishamvu muri ba se wabo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yari yarabigeze." 
Joshua17:5 Nuk’ umuryango wa Manase wahawe imigabane cumi, ukūye igihugu c’i Gileyadi n’i Bashani vyo hakurya ya Yorodani;" 
Joshua17:6 kukw abuzukuruza ba Manase b’abakobga bāhānye amashamvu n’abandi bo mu biwe; kand’ igihugu c’i Gileyadi kiba ic’ abandi bo mu ba Manase nyene. 
Joshua17:7 Nuk’ urubibe rw’Abamanase rwāhēra ahitwa Asheri, rugaca i Mikimetati herekeye i Shekemu ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba; rugaheza rugakevya rugaca i buryo, rugashika mu b’i Eni‐Tapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Intāra y’i Tapuwa yar’ iy’ Abamanase, arikw igisagara Tapuwa ubgaco, cāri ku rubibe rw’Abamanase, cār’ ic’ Abefurayimu." 
Joshua17:9 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rukamanuka, rugashika ku mugezi witwa Kana, i bumanuko bgawo; ibisagara vyaho vyar’ ivy’ Abefurayimu, naho vyari hagati mu vy’Abamanase; urwo rubibe rw’Abamanase rukajana i burārūko bg’ uwo mugezi, rukaruma ku kiyaga;" 
Joshua17:10 i bumanuko bgawo hār’ ah’ Abefurayimu, i burārūko bgawo hār’ ah’ Abamanase, bakagarukira ku kiyaga; bāhāna urubibe n’ Abasheri ku ruhande rw’i burārūko, n’Abisakari ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba." 
Joshua17:11 Kand’ Abamanase ibisagara bāhāwe mu bg’Abisakari no mu bg’Abasheri ni vy’ ibi: Beti‐sheyani na Ibuleyamu n’ababa i Dori n’ababa i Endori, n’ababa i Tanaki n’ababa i Megido, bo n’udusagara tugenda tuhakūkira; iyo ni yo misozi itatu ihagaze." 
Joshua17:12 Mugabo, Abamanase ntibashoboye kwirukana ben’ ivyo bisagara, kukw Abanyakanani bāgataye kuva mur’ ico gihugu." 
Joshua17:13 Maz’ Abisirayeli bamaze guhama, bashinga Abanyakanani ibikebere, ntibabirukana ngo babaherengeteze." 
Joshua17:14 Ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu babaza Yosuwa, bati N’iki catumye uduhesha ubupfindo igisate kimwe gusa kuba ishamvu yacu, kandi tur’ umuryango munini, kuk’ Uhoraho yaduhaye umugisha kugeza ubu?" 
Joshua17:15 Nuko Yosuwa arabishura, ati Ko mur’ umuryango munini, ni mudūge muje mu kibira, mugiteme mwiyagurire mu gihugu c’Abaferizi n’Abarefa, asangw’ umugamba w’Abefurayimu wābāgiye." 
Joshua17:16 Aba Yosefu baravuga, bat’ Ek’ uwo mugamba ntiwodukwira; kand’ Abanyakanani bo mu biyaya, ar’ab’i Beti‐sheyani n’ibisagara bihakūkira, ar’ abo mu kiyaya c’i Yezireli, bose bafise imikogote y’ ivyuma." 
Joshua17:17 Yosuwa yishura ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu, ari bo Befurayimu n’Abamanase, ati Mur’ umuryango munini koko, kandi mur’ abahizi: ntimwohabga umugabane umwe gusa." 
Joshua17:18 Arikw igihugu c’umugamba kizoba icanyu, kandi nah’ ar’ ikibira muzogitema, kand’ imicāmo yaho izoba iyanyu; kand’ Abanyakanani, naho bafise imikogote y’ivyuma, kand’ ar’ abahizi, muzobirukana." 
Joshua18:1 Maz’ ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli bakoranira i Shilo, bahashinga ihema ry’ibonaniro; kand’ igihugu cari kimaze gukōndōka." 
Joshua18:2 Kandi mu Bisirayeli hari hagisigaye imiryango ndwi itarahabga amashamvu yayo. 
Joshua18:3 Maze Yosuwa abaza Abisirayeli, ati Muzogeza hehe kugira urwangara rwo kutinjira igihugu ngo mucegukire, ar’ ico Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza yabahaye?" 
Joshua18:4 Enda ni mwitoranirize abantu batatu‐batatu mu muryango wose; nanje ndabatume banyuranganye igihugu, bandike uko gisa, n’ingene cogabanganywamw’ amashamvu yabo; ni baheza bagaruke iyo ndi." 
Joshua18:5 Baze bakigaburemw’ imigabane ndwi; Abayuda bazoguma mu mugabane wabo i bumanuko, n’aba Yosefu bagume mu wabo i burārūko." 
Joshua18:6 Kand’ ati Muze mwandike ico gihugu mu migabane ndwi; maz’ ivyo mwanditse mubinzanire hano, nanje nzokibagabanganisha ubupfindo ngaha nyene imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Joshua18:7 Mugabo, Abalewi bo, nta mugabane bafise muri mwebge: kuba abaherezi b’Uhoraho ni yo shamvu yabo; na bo Abagadi n’Abareyubeni n’ab’ igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase bamaze guhabga amashamvu yabo hakurya ya Yorodani i burasirazuba, ni ho Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabahaye." 
Joshua18:8 Nukw abo bantu bīkoze ngo bagende kwandika ico gihugu uko gisa, Yosuwa arababarira, ati Ni mugende, munyuranganye ico gihugu cose, mwandike uko gisa, muheze mugaruke iyo ndi, nanje nzokibagabanganisha ubupfindo imbere y’Uhoraho ngaha nyene i Shilo." 
Joshua18:9 Nukw abo bantu baragenda, banyuranganya ico gihugu, bandika mu gitabo uko gisa, n’ibisagara vyaco vyose, bakigabanyamw’ imigabane ndwi; baraheza bagaruka iyo Yosuwa ari, aho bashagaje i Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Nuko Yosuwa abapfindira ubupfindo imbere y’Uhoraho i Shilo; agabanganya Abisirayeli ico gihugu, nk’ukw imigabane yabo iri." 
Joshua18:11 Bapfindiye ubupfindo Ababenyamini, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ishamvu yabo bgerekanye yari hagati y’iy’ Abayuda n’iy’ Abayosefu." 
Joshua18:12 Urubibe rwabo rw’i burārūko rwāhēra kuri Yorodani, rukadūga ku mpinga y’umusozi ur’ i burārūko bg’i Yeriko, rukadūga mu mugamba rwerekeye i burengerazuba, rukagarukira mu bugaragwa bg’i Beti‐aveni." 
Joshua18:13 Ruvuye aho rukagenda rugashika i Luzi, ari ho i Beteli, ku mpinga yaho ahahera i bumanuko; rugaheza rukamanuka, rukagenda rubangikanye n’umusozi uhera i bumanuko bg’i Beti‐horoni ho hepfo, rugashika i Ataroti‐adari." 
Joshua18:14 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rugakevya, rukagenda rubangikanye n’i burengerazuba rwerekeye i bumanuko, ruvuye kuri wa musozi uhera i bumanuko bg’i Beti‐horoni, rukagarukira i Kiriyati‐bayali, ari ho Kiriyati‐yeyarimu, igisagara c’ Abayuda; urwo ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rw’i burengerazuba." 
Joshua18:15 Urubibe rw’i bumanuko rwāhēra kw iherezo ry’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu, rukagenda rwerekeye i burengerazuba, rukarinda rushika kw iriba ry’i Nefutowa." 
Joshua18:16 Urwo rubibe rugaheza rukamanuka ku mucāmo w’umusozi uhanamiye umwonga wa mwene Hinomu, ni ho umwonga wa Refayimu wahēra, ku ruhande rw’i burārūko; rugaheza rukamanukana uwo mwonga nyene wa Hinomu, ahahera i bumanuko bg’ umucāmo w’umusozi w’Abayebusi, rukamanuka rukarinda rushika ahitwa Eni‐rogeli;" 
Joshua18:17 rugaheza rugakevya, rukagenda rwerekeye i burārūko, rugashika i Eni‐shemeshi; rukavudukayo rugashika i Geliloti, aharābana n’inzira idūga Adumimu, rukamanuka rugashika kw ibuye rya Bohani mwene Reyubeni;" 
Joshua18:18 rugakomeza rukagenda rubangikanye n’ ikiyaya Araba ahahera i burārūko, rugaheza rukamanuka muri Araba nyene," 
Joshua18:19 rugakomeza rugashika ku mucāmo w’i Beti‐hogula ahahera i burārūko, rukagarukira ah’ Ikiyaga c’Umunyu gitaye ikirimi ahahera i burārūko nyene, aho Yorodani rushikira muri co. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’i bumanuko." 
Joshua18:20 Kandi Yorodani ni rwo rwar’ urubibe rwaho rw’i burasirazuba. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Ababenyamini, nk’ukw imbibe zaho ziri impande zose, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua18:21 Kand’ ibisagara vy’umuryango w’Ababenyamini, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, vyar’ ibi: Yeriko na Beti‐hogula na Emeki‐kesisi," 
Joshua18:22 na Beti‐araba na Semarayimu na Beteli," 
Joshua18:23 na Avimu na Para na Ofura," 
Joshua18:24 na Kefaramoni na Ofuni na Geba: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bibiri, bifise imihana ibikūkira;" 
Joshua18:25 hāri na Gibeyoni na Rama na Beroti," 
Joshua18:26 na Misipe na Kefira na Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 na Rekemu na Irupeli na Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 na Sela na Elefu na Yebusi (ari ho Yerusalemu) na Gibeyati na Kiriyati: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bine, bifise imihana ibikūkira. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Ababenyamini, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua19:1 Ubupfindo bga kabiri bushika ku ba Simeyoni, nk’ukw amazu y’umuryango w’Abasimeyoni ari; kand’ ishamvu yabo yar’ itaye ikirimi mu y’umuryango w’ Abayuda." 
Joshua19:2 Ishamvu yabo bahawe yari Beri‐sheba na Sheba na Molada," 
Joshua19:3 na Hasari‐shuwali na Bala na Esemu," 
Joshua19:4 na Elitoladi na Betula na Horuma," 
Joshua19:5 na Sikulagi na Beti‐marakaboti na Hasari‐susa," 
Joshua19:6 na Beti‐lebayoti na Sharuheni: ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bitatu, bifise imihana ibikūkira;" 
Joshua19:7 hāri na Ayini na Rimona na Eteri na Ashani: ivyo na vyo vyari bine, bifise imihana ibikūkira;" 
Joshua19:8 bāhawe n’imihana yose ikikije ivyo bisagara, ukarinda ushika i Balati‐beri, ari ho Rama h’i bumanuko. Iyo ni yo shamvu y’umuryango w’Abasimeyoni, nk’ ukw amazu yabo ari;" 
Joshua19:9 iyo shamvu y’Abasimeyoni yakūwe ku mugabane w’Abayuda, kuk’ umugabane w’Abayuda war’ ubarengeye; ni kubg’ ivyo Abasimeyoni bāhawe ishamvu ku yabo." 
Joshua19:10 Ubupfindo bga gatatu bushika ku Bazebuloni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari; igihugu cabo cagarukira i Sarida;" 
Joshua19:11 urubibe rwabo rwādūga rwerekeye i burengerazuba, rukarinda rushika i Marala, rugaca i Dabesheti, rugashika ku mugezi uca imbere y’i Yokineyamu;" 
Joshua19:12 kandi kuva i Sarida nyene, urwerekeye i burasirazuba rwarakevya, rukarinda rushika ku rubibe rw’i Kisiloti‐tabora; rugaca i Daberati, rukadūga rugashika i Yafiya;" 
Joshua19:13 ruvudutse aho, rukagenda rwerekeye i burasirazuba, rugaca i Gati‐heferi n’i Eti‐kasini, rugashika i Rimoni, rugakebereza i Neya;" 
Joshua19:14 ruvuye aho, urwo rubibe rugakebereza i burārūko, rukaja i Hanatoni, rukagarukira ku mwonga Ifutaheli." 
Joshua19:15 Batwara na Katati na Nahalali na Shimuroni na Idala na Betelehemu: ibisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bibiri, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:16 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’Abazebuloni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ivyo bisagara bo n’imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:17 Ubupfindo bga kane bushika ku Bisakari, nk’ukw amazu y’Abisakari ari." 
Joshua19:18 Urubibe rwabo rwaca i Yezireli n’i Kesuloti n’i Shunemu," 
Joshua19:19 n’i Hafarayimu n’i Shiyoni n’i Anaharati," 
Joshua19:20 n’i Rabiti n’i Kishiyoni n’i Ebeza," 
Joshua19:21 n’i Remeti n’i Eni‐ganimu n’i Eni‐hada n’i Beti‐pazezi; 
Joshua19:22 kand’ urwo rubibe rwaca n’i Tabora n’i Shahazuma n’i Beti‐shemeshi, rukaruma kuri Yorodani; ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi na bitandatu, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:23 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abisakari, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ivyo bisagara bo n’imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:24 Ubupfindo bga gatanu bushika ku muryango w’Abasheri, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari." 
Joshua19:25 Urubibe rwabo rwaca i Helikati n’i Hali n’i Beteni n’i Akishafu," 
Joshua19:26 n’i Alameleki n’i Amadi n’i Mishali, nuko rugashika i Karumeli ahahera i burengerazuba, rugashika n’i Shihori‐libunati;" 
Joshua19:27 rugaheza rugakebereza i burasirazuba, rugashika i Beti‐dagoni, rugasomana n’ic’ Abazebuloni ku mwonga Ifutaheli ahahera i burārūko, rugaca n’i Beti‐emeki n’i Neyeli, rugakomeza kugenda rwerekeye i burārūko rukarinda rushika i Kabuli," 
Joshua19:28 n’i Eburoni n’i Rehoba n’i Hamoni n’i Kana, gushika no kuri ca gisagara kinini Sidoni;" 
Joshua19:29 maz’ urwo rubibe rugakevya rugaca i Rama, rugashika no ku gisagara c’i Tiro kizitijwe uruzitiro rw’amabuye; rugaheza rugakebereza i Hosa, rukagarukira ku kiyaga. Batwara na Mahalabu na Akizibu," 
Joshua19:30 na Uma na Afeka na Rehobu: ibisagara vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri na bibiri, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:31 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’umuryango w’Abasheri, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ivyo bisagara bo n’imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:32 Ubupfindo bga gatandatu bushika ku Banafutali, nk’ukw amazu y’Abanafutali ari." 
Joshua19:33 Urubibe rwabo rwāhēra i Helefu, rugaca ku giti c’umweloni kir’ i Sananimu, n’i Adami‐nekebu n’i Yabuneli, rugashika i Lakumu, rukagarukira kuri Yorodani;" 
Joshua19:34 urwo rubibe rugakebereza i burengerazuba rugashika i Azinoti‐tabora, rukavudukaho rugaca i Hukoki, rukagarukira ku gihugu c’Abazebuloni i bumanuko, no ku c’Abasheri i burengerazuba no ku c’Abayuda kuri Yorodani i burasirazuba." 
Joshua19:35 Ibisagara bātwaye vyubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye vyar’ ibi: Sidimu na Sera na Hamati na Rakati na Kinereti," 
Joshua19:36 na Adama na Rama na Hasori," 
Joshua19:37 na Kedeshi na Edireyi na Eni‐hasori," 
Joshua19:38 na Ironi na Migudali‐eli na Horemu na Beti‐anati na Beti‐shemeshi; ivyo bisagara vyose na vyose vyar’ icumi n’icenda, bifise imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:39 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abanafutali, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ivyo bisagara bo n’imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:40 Ubupfindo bugira indwi bushika ku muryango w’Abadani nk’ukw amazu yabo ari. 
Joshua19:41 Urubibe rw’ishamvu yabo rwaca i Sora n’i Eshitayoli n’i Irishemeshi," 
Joshua19:42 n’i Shalabina n’i Ayaloni n’i Itula," 
Joshua19:43 n’i Eloni n’i Timuna n’i Ekuroni," 
Joshua19:44 n’i Eliteke n’i Gibetoni n’i Balati," 
Joshua19:45 n’i Yehudi n’i Beneberake n’i Gati‐rimoni," 
Joshua19:46 n’i Meyarakoni n’i Rakoni no mu ntāra irābana n’i Yopa. 
Joshua19:47 Maz’ igihugu c’Abadani kibāgiye, baradūga, batera i Leshemu, barahatsinda, baharanduza inkota, baca barahegukira, barahaba; maze Leshemu bahīta Dani, bahītiranije na sekuruza wabo Dani nyene." 
Joshua19:48 Iyo ni yo shamvu y’ umuryango w’Abadani, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ivyo bisagara n’ imihana ibikūkira." 
Joshua19:49 Bahejeje kugabanganya igihugu mw amashamvu nk’ukw imbibe zayo ziri, Abisirayeli baha Yosuwa mwene Nuni ishamvu hagati yabo;" 
Joshua19:50 bamuha igisagara yasavye citwa i Timunati‐sera, co mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, nk’ uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze; asanura ico gisagara, akibamwo." 
Joshua19:51 Ayo ni yo mashamvu Eleyazari umuherezi, na Yosuwa mwene Nuni, n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli, bagaburishije ubupfindo bar’ i Shilo imbere y’Uhoraho, ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro. Uko ni ko barangije kugabanganya igihugu." 
Joshua20:1 Uhoraho abarira Yosuwa," 
Joshua20:2 ati Barira Abisirayeli, uti Mwirobanurire vya bisagara vy’ ubuhungiro, ut’ Ivyo yababariye atumye Mose;" 
Joshua20:3 uti Kugira ng’ umukoracumu yishe umuntu atabigize ibigirankana, atavyitumye, ahungireyo; uti Ni vyo bizobabera ubuhungiro bgo guhunga ūhōra uwishwe." 
Joshua20:4 Kand’ umukoracumu ni yahungira mu gisagara kimwe mur’ ivyo, az’ ahagarare kw irembo ry’ico gisagara, adōndere abakuru baho ivyiwe; na bo baze bace bamushikana imbere muri co, bamuhe ah’ aba, abe muri bo." 
Joshua20:5 Maz’ ūhōra uwishwe ni yamukurikira, ntibaze bamuhe uwo mukoracumu, kuk’ uwo yishe yamwishe atavyitumye, adasanzwe amwanka." 
Joshua20:6 Nukw az’ agume mur’ ico gisagara gushitsa ah’ azogīra mw ikombe agacirwa urubanza, aheze arorēre igihe umuherezi mukuru azoba ariho mur’ ico gihe azopfira; ni ho uwo mukoracumu azobona gusubira i wabo mu rugo rwiwe, mu gisagara yavuyemw’ ahunga." 
Joshua20:7 Nuko batoranya i Kedeshi i Galilaya mu mugamba w’Abanafutali, n’i Shekemu mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, n’i Kiriyati‐Araba, ari ho Heburoni, mu mugamba w’Abayuda." 
Joshua20:8 Kandi hakurya ya Yorodani i burasirazuba bg’i Yeriko batoranyay’ i Beseri mu bugaragwa bgo mu kiyaya, mu bg’ umuryango w’Abareyubeni, n’i Ramoti i Gileyadi, mu bg’umuryango w’Abagadi, n’i Golani i Bashani, mu bg’umuryango w’ Abamanase." 
Joshua20:9 Ivyo ni vyo bisagara vyashingiwe Abisirayeli bose, n’umunyamahanga wese aba muri bo, kugira ng’ uwishe umuntu wese atabigize ibigirankana az’ ahungireyo, kugira ng’ ūmuhōra ku wo yishe ntaz’ amwice, gushitsa abanje kuja mw ikombe." 
Joshua21:1 Maz’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abalewi baza kuri Eleyazari umuherezi na Yosuwa mwene Nuni n’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sekuruza b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli," 
Joshua21:2 aho bāri bari nyene i Shilo mur’ ico gihugu c’i Kanani, barababarira, bat’ Uhoraho yatumye Mose, avuga ko tuzohabga ibisagara vyo kubamwo, hamwe n’amaragiro inyuma yavyo y’amasho yacu." 
Joshua21:3 Nukw Abisirayeli baha Abalewi mu mashamvu yabo ibi bisagara hamwe n’amaragiro ar’ inyuma yavyo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze." 
Joshua21:4 Ubupfindo bushika ku mazu y’ Abakohati; maz’ abuzukuruza ba Aroni umuherezi, bo mu muryango w’Abalewi nyene, ubupfindo bubaha ibisagara cumi na bitatu, bikūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abayuda no ku vy’uw’ Abasimeyoni no ku vy’uw’ Ababenyamini." 
Joshua21:5 Abasigaye mu Bakohati ubupfindo bubaha ibisagara cumi, bikūwe ku vy’amazu y’umuryango w’Abefurayimu no ku vy’uw’ Abadani no ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase." 
Joshua21:6 Abagerushoni ubupfindo bubaha ibisagara cumi na bitatu, bikūwe ku vy’amazu y’umuryango w’Abisakari no ku vy’uw’ Abasheri no ku vy’uw’ Abanafutali no ku vy’ikindi gihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase i Bashani." 
Joshua21:7 Abamerari bahabga ibisagara cumi na bibiri, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, bikūwe ku vy’umuryango w’ Abareyubeni no ku vy’uw’ Abagadi no ku vy’uw’ Abazebuloni." 
Joshua21:8 Ibisagara Abisirayeli bāhesheje Abalewi ubupfindo, hamwe n’ amaragiro yavyo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabivuze atumye Mose, vyar’ ibi:" 
Joshua21:9 ku vy’umuryango w’Abayuda no ku vy’uw’ Abasimeyoni batanga ibi bisagara bigiye kudōndwa amazina," 
Joshua21:10 ngo bibe ivy’ ab’ inzu ya Aroni, imwe mu mazu y’Abakohati, bo mu muryango w’Abalewi, kukw ari bo ubupfindo bgabanje kwerekana." 
Joshua21:11 Nuko babaha Igisagara ca Araba, ari ho Heburoni, mu mugamba w’Abayuda, hamwe n’amaragiro ahakikije; (Araba uwo ni we se wa Anaki)." 
Joshua21:12 Arikw indimiro zo kur’ ico gisagara, n’imihana ihakūkira, babiha Kalebu mwene Yefune kuba ishamvu yiwe." 
Joshua21:13 Nukw ab’inzu ya Aroni umuherezi ni kwo kubaha i Heburoni nyene, bo n’amaragiro yaho; kandi car’ igisagara c’ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Libuna," 
Joshua21:14 n’i Yatiri n’i Eshitemowa," 
Joshua21:15 n’i Holoni n’i Debira," 
Joshua21:16 n’i Ayini n’i Yuta n’i Beti‐shemeshi, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara cenda bivuye mur’ iyo miryango ibiri." 
Joshua21:17 Kandi ku vy’ umuryango w’Ababenyamini batanga Gibeyoni n’i Geba," 
Joshua21:18 n’i Anatoti n’i Alunoni, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:19 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’ab’ inzu ya Aroni, ari bo baherezi, vyar’ icumi na bitatu, hamwe n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
Joshua21:20 Abalewi bo mu yandi mazu y’Abakohati asigaye, ibisagara bāhawe n’ubupfindo vyākūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abefurayimu." 
Joshua21:21 Babaha Shekemu n’amaragiro yaho mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu nyene, kandi car’ igisagara c’ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Gezeri," 
Joshua21:22 n’i Kibuzayimu n’i Beti‐horoni, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:23 Ku vy’umuryango w’ Abadani babaha Eliteke n’i Gibetoni," 
Joshua21:24 n’i Ayaloni n’i Gati‐rimoni, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:25 Ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase babaha Tanaki n’amaragiro yaho, n’i Gati‐rimoni n’amaragiro yaho, ivyo bisagara ukw ari bibiri." 
Joshua21:26 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’amazu asigaye y’Abakohati vyar’ icumi, hamwe n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
Joshua21:27 Abagerushoni bo mu mazu y’ Abalewi, ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase babaha Golani i Bashani n’amaragiro yaho; car’ igisagara c’ubuhungiro bg’ uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Beshitera n’amaragiro yaho; ivyo bisagara ukw ari bibiri." 
Joshua21:28 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abisakari babaha Kishiyoni n’i Daberati," 
Joshua21:29 n’i Yaramuti n’i Eni‐ganimu, bo n’ amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:30 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abasheri babaha Mishali n’i Abudoni," 
Joshua21:31 n’i Helikati n’i Rehobu, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:32 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abanafutali babaha Kedeshi i Galilaya n’ amaragiro yaho; car’ igisagara c’ ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Hamoti‐dora n’amaragiro yaho, n’i Karitani n’amaragiro yaho; vyar’ ibisagara bitatu." 
Joshua21:33 Ibisagara vyose na vyose vy’Abagerushoni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, vyar’ icumi na bitatu, hamwe n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
Joshua21:34 Amazu y’Abamerari, ari bo Balewi bāsigaye guhabga, babaha ku vy’umuryango w’Abazebuloni ahitwa Yokineyamu n’i Karita," 
Joshua21:35 n’i Dimuna n’i Nahalali, bo n’ amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:36 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abareyubeni babaha Beseri n’i Yahasi," 
Joshua21:37 n’i Kedemoti n’i Mefati, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:38 Ku vy’umuryango w’Abagadi babaha Ramoti i Gileyadi n’amaragiro yaho; car’ igisagara c’ubuhungiro bg’uwishe uwundi; babaha n’i Mahanayimu," 
Joshua21:39 n’i Heshiboni n’i Yazeri, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye; vyar’ ibisagara bine." 
Joshua21:40 Ivyo vyose vyar’ ibisagara vy’ Abamerari, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ari yo mazu yar’ agisigaye guhabga mu y’Abalewi; ubupfindo bgabahaye ivyo bisagara ukw ar’ icumi na bibiri." 
Joshua21:41 Ibisagara Abalewi bāhawe mu mashamvu y’Abisirayeli bandi, vyose na vyose vyari mirongwine n’umunani, hamwe n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
Joshua21:42 Ivyo bisagara vyose vyari bikikijwe n’amaragiro yavyo; vyose iyo biva bikagera ni ko vyari bimeze. 
Joshua21:43 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yahaye Abisirayeli bose igihugu yasezeraniye ba sekuruza, ni ko bācegukiye, bakibamwo." 
Joshua21:44 Uhoraho abaha impore impande zose, nk’uko yarahiye ba sekuruza muri vyose; nta muntu n’umwe mu bansi babo yigeze kubahagarara imbere, arik’ Uhoraho yagenda agabura abansi babo bose mu maboko yabo." 
Joshua21:45 Nta kintu na kimwe mu vyiza vyose Uhoraho yasezeraniye ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli kitāshitse: ariko vyose vyarasohoye. 
Joshua22:1 Maze Yosuwa ahamagaza Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’ ab’igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase; 
Joshua22:2 arababarira, at’ Ivyo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabageze vyose, mwarabishikije; kandi nanje mwaranyumviye mu vyo nabageze vyose." 
Joshua22:3 Ikindi, kumara ico gihe cose nta ho mwahemukiye bagenzi banyu, no kugeza n’ubu, ariko mwitondeye icagezwe c’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Joshua22:4 Non’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu amaze guha impore bagenzi banyu, nk’uko yabasezeraniye; nuko rero ni mwisubirire i wanyu mu gihugu mwahawe kw ishamvu, ico Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabahaye hakurya ya Yorodani." 
Joshua22:5 Mugabo, muze mugire umwete cane wo kwitondera ivyagezwe n’amabgirizwa, ivyo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yabageze, ati Mukunde Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mugendere mu nzira zayo zose, mwitondere ivyagezwe vyayo, mwifatanye na yo akaramata, muyisabe muyiherejekw imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose." 
Joshua22:6 Nuko Yosuwa arabahezagira, arabasezera, barītāhira." 
Joshua22:7 Arikw igihimba kimwe c’umuryango wa Manase Mose yari yarabahaye ishamvu yabo i Bashani; ikindi gihimba Yosuwa ni we yabahaye mu b’i wabo hakuno ya Yorodani i burengerazuba. Kandi Yosuwa akirikw arabasezera ngo basubire i wabo, arabahezagira," 
Joshua22:8 arababgira, ati Ni mwisubirire i wanyu, mugigimvye itunga ryinshi n’inka nyinshi, mujane n’amafeza n’amazahabu n’imiringa n’ivyuma n’impuzu nyinshi cane: mugabangane na bagenzi banyu iminyago y’abansi banyu." 
Joshua22:9 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase barahindukira, bava mu bandi Bisirayeli i Shilo mu gihugu c’i Kanani, ngo baje mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi, igihugu bāhawe kw ishamvu, bakacegukira, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabigeze atumye Mose." 
Joshua22:10 Bashitse mu ntāra yo mu gihugu c’i Kanani iherereye kuri Yorodani, bubaka igicaniro aho nyene kuri Yorodani, kinini cībonekeza." 
Joshua22:11 Bukeye Abisirayeli bandi bumva kw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’ Abamanase bubatse igicaniro ku rubibe rw’igihugu c’i Kanani, mu ntāra iherereye kuri Yorodani, hakuno mu bg’Abisirayeli." 
Joshua22:12 Abisirayeli babimenye, ishengero ryabo ryose rikoranira i Shilo, kugira ngo baje kubatera." 
Joshua22:13 Abisirayeli baraheza batuma Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi, kur’ abo Bareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’ Abamanase mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi;" 
Joshua22:14 bamutumana n’abakuru cumi, umuryango wose umukuru umwe‐umwe wo mu nzu ya sekuruza; bose uko bavuye mur’ iyo miryango y’Abisirayeli bari basanzwe ar’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza." 
Joshua22:15 Nuko bashikiriye Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase, mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi, barababgira," 
Joshua22:16 bat’ Ikoraniro ryose ry’Uhoraho ryadutumye, ng’ Uku kuntu mwahemukiye Imana y’Abisirayeli mwagutewe n’iki, ko mwaciye mureka gukurikira Uhoraho, mukiyubakira igicaniro, mukamugarariza aka kanya?" 
Joshua22:17 Mbeg’ igicumuro c’i Peyori catubereye icoroshe, kandi gushitsa uyu musi tutararonka ingene tucera, nah’ ikīza cāciye gitera ikoraniro ry’ Uhoraho?" 
Joshua22:18 Icātumye uyu musi mureka gukurikira Uhoraho n’iki? Kandi ko mugararije Uhoraho uyu musi, ejo azohava arakira ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Mugabo, namb’ igihugu canyu mubona gihumanye, enda ni mujabuke muze mu gihugu c’Uhoraho, ah’ ihema ry’Uhoraho riri, mugabure natwe; ariko mwoye kugarariza Uhoraho, natwe ngo mudushirek’ ubugarariji, mukiyubakira ikindi gicaniro kitar’ ic’ Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Joshua22:20 Mbega Akani, umwe mwene Zerahi, ntiyacumuye, agasotōra ku vyagizwe inyegu, ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli rikagībgako n’uburake? Kand’ uwo muntu ntiyipfanye mu gucumura kwiwe!" 
Joshua22:21 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’ Abamanase, bishura abo bakuru b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli," 
Joshua22:22 bat’ Uhoraho Imana nyamana, Uhoraho Imana nyamana irabizi, kand’ Abisirayeli na bo bazobimenya! Namba twabikoreshejwe n’ubugarariji canke n’uguhemukira Uhoraho, uyu musi ntimusige mutatwishe!" 
Joshua22:23 Asangwa twiyubakiye igicaniro ngo tureke gukurikira Uhoraho, canke kugira ngo tucoserezekw ibimazi, canke tugitangirekw amashikanwa y’amafu, cank’ ibimazi vy’ishimwe, Uhoraho n’ abiduhōre ubgiwe!" 
Joshua22:24 Arikw icabiduteye kwar’ ugutinya yuko mu gihe kizoza abana banyu bohava babarira abacu, bati Muhūriye hehe n’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli?" 
Joshua22:25 Bakavuga, bat’ Uhoraho ko yagize Yorodani urubibe hagati yacu namwe, mwebge Abareyubeni n’Abagadi, nta mugabane mufise k’Uhoraho! Uko ni kw abana banyu bohava bazotesha abacu kwubaha Uhoraho." 
Joshua22:26 Ico ni co catumye twīgīra inama, tuti Hinge twiyubakire igicaniro, kitar’ ico kwoserezako canke gutangirakw ibimazi," 
Joshua22:27 ariko ngo kize kibe icabona hagati yacu namwe, no hagati y’urunganwe rwacu uko ruzogenda rukurikirana, yuko natwe duhora dukūkira Uhoraho, kugira ngo tumwosereze ibimazi, tubimushikanire, tumushikanire n’ ivy’ ishimwe; abana banyu boye kuzohava babarira abacu mu gihe kizoza, bati Nta mugabane mufise k’Uhoraho." 
Joshua22:28 Ni co catumye twiyumvira, tuti Ni batubarira bartyo, canke bakabibarira uruvyaro rwacu ruzokwaruka hanyuma, baze babishure, bat’ Ehe rāba icitegererezo c’igicaniro c’Uhoraho ba sogokuruza bubatse, kitar’ ico kwoserezako canke gutangirakw ibimazi, ariko ngo kibe icabona hagati yacu namwe." 
Joshua22:29 Barongera baravuga, bati Biragahera ko twogarariza Uhoraho, ngo tureke uyu musi kumukurikira, ngo twiyubakire igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, canke co gutangirakw amashikanwa y’amafu n’ibindi bimazi, kitari ca gicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yacu kir’ imbere y’ihema ryiwe." 
Joshua22:30 Maze Finehasi umuherezi, bo n’abakuru b’ikoraniro, ari bo bakuru bo mu mazu y’Abisirayeli bari kumwe na we, bumvise ukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’Abamanase babishuye, barashirwa." 
Joshua22:31 Nuko Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi abarira Abareyubeni n’Abagadi n’Abamanase, ati Noneh’ uyu musi dutāhūye yuk’ Uhoraho ari hagati muri twebge, kuko mutāhemukiye Uhoraho nk’ uko twari twumvise; none mukijije Abisirayeli gukorokera mu maboko y’Uhoraho." 
Joshua22:32 Maze Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umuherezi na ba bakuru barahindukira, bava mu Bareyubeni n’Abagadi mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi, basubira i wabo i Kanani mu Bisirayeli bandi, babadōndera uko vyagenze." 
Joshua22:33 Abo bavyumvise, baca barashirwa; bashima Imana, ntibāba baciyumvira kuja kubatera, ngo barandure igihugu c’Abareyubeni n’Abagadi." 
Joshua22:34 Nukw Abareyubeni n’Abagadi bita ico gicaniro Icabona, bat’ Ico n’icabona hagati yacu yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana." 
Joshua23:1 Hashize igihe kirekire, Uhoraho ahaye Abisirayeli impore, abakijije abansi babo bose bari babakikije; kandi Yosuwa yar’ ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru;" 
Joshua23:2 Yosuwa ahamagaza Abisirayeli bose, abashingantahe babo n’abakuru, n’abacamanza babo n’abagabisha b’ingabo, arababarira, ati Rāba ndashaje, ngeze mu zabukuru." 
Joshua23:3 Kandi mwabonye ivyo Uhoraho yagiriye ayo mahanga yose kubganyu; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we yagenda abarwanira. 
Joshua23:4 None rāba amahanga agisigaye, hamwe n’amahanga yose naranduye, nabahesheje ubupfindo ibihugu vyabo ngo bibe amashamvu y’imiryango yanyu, uhereye kuri Yorodani ugashitsa ku kiyaga kinini gihera i burengerazuba." 
Joshua23:5 Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu azobakinagiza imbere yanyu, abirukane babave imbere, muheze mubone kwegukira igihugu cabo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu yababgiye." 
Joshua23:6 Nuko rero ni mugumye imitima, mushikame, mubone kwitondera no gushitsa ivyanditswe vyose mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vya Mose, kugira ngo ntimukikamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso, ngo mubiveko," 
Joshua23:7 mukifatanya n’ayo mahanga agisigaye muri mwebge, canke ngo mushire mu kanwa amazina y’imana zabo, canke ngo muzirahire, canke ngo muzisabe, canke ngo muzunamire;" 
Joshua23:8 ariko muze mwifatanye akaramata n’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko mwakoze kugeza ubu." 
Joshua23:9 Kuk’ Uhoraho yirukanye imbere yanyu amahanga ahambaye afise amagara; ariko mwebge nta muntu n’umwe yigeze kubahagarara imbere gushitsa ubu; 
Joshua23:10 arik’ umwe muri mwebge akinagiza abantu igihumbi, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we abarwanira, nk’uko yababgiye." 
Joshua23:11 Mugire umwete cane wo kubera maso ubugingo bganyu, kugira ngo mukunde Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Joshua23:12 Ariko ni mwahīrahīra mukarāba irya, mukīfatanya n’aya mahanga asigaye muri mwebge, mugashingirana na bo, mukābīra abageni babo, na bo bakābīra abanyu," 
Joshua23:13 mumenye rwose yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu atazosubira kwirukana ayo mahanga ngw ayabakūre imbere, ariko bazobabera ururiba n’umutego, bababere nk’ikimōko kibakubita mu mbavu, nk’amahwa abahanda mu maso, kugeza aho muzorandukira, mugashira mur’ iki gihugu ciza Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabahaye." 
Joshua23:14 Rāba ubu ngiye kugenda nk’ ukw abandi bose bagenda; namwe mu mitima yanyu no mu vyiyumviro vyanyu murazi neza mwese yukw ata kintu na kimwe mu vyiza vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabasezeraniye kitāshitse; vyose vyarasohoye, nta kintu na kimwe muri vyo kitāshitse." 
Joshua23:15 Nk’ ukw ivyiza vyose Uhoraho Imana yanyu yabasezeraniye vyāshitse, uko ni k’Uhoraho azobashitsakw ivyago vyose yababūriye, kugeza ah’ azobaherengetereza, mugashira mur’ iki gihugu ciza mwahawe n’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Joshua23:16 ni mwaca mw isezerano ryiwe yabasezeraniye, mukaja gusaba izindi mana, mukazūnamira. Uburake bg’Uhoraho buzoca bubaziriringira, muranduke bidatevye, mushire mu gihugu ciza yabahaye." 
Joshua24:1 Maze Yosuwa akoraniriza imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli i Shekemu, ahamagaza abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli n’abakuru babo n’abacamanza babo n’abagabisha b’ingabo, bararenguka bahagarara imbere y’Imana." 
Joshua24:2 Yosuwa abarira abantu bose, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ati Kera ba sogokuruza banyu bāba hakurya ya Efurate, nka Tera se wa Aburahamu na Nahori, bāsaba izindi mana." 
Joshua24:3 Bukeye njana sogokuruza wanyu Aburahamu, ndamukūra hakurya y’urwo ruzi, mmugēndūza igihugu cose c’i Kanani, mmuha kurondoka; mmuha Isaka," 
Joshua24:4 Isaka na we mmuha Yakobo na Esau; Esau mmuha umusozi Seyiri ngw awegukire, Yakobo na we amanukana n’uruvyaro rwiwe muri Egiputa." 
Joshua24:5 Bukeye ntuma Mose na Aroni, nkubitisha Abanyegiputa ivyago narekuriye hagati muri bo. Hanyuma mbakūrayo," 
Joshua24:6 nkūra ba sogokuruza banyu muri Egiputa, mbashikana ku kiyaga; maz’ Abanyegiputa baza babakurikiye, bari mu mikogote no ku mafarasi, babasanga ku Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Joshua24:7 Maze bantakambiye jewe Uhoraho, nshira umwiza hagati yabo n’Abanyegiputa, ndaheza mbateranirizakw ikiyaga, kirabarengera. Kand’ amaso yanyu yiboneye ivyo nakoze muri Egiputa; maze mumara igihe kirekire mu bugaragwa." 
Joshua24:8 Hanyuma mbashikana mu gihugu c’Abamori bo hakurya ya Yorodani, barwana namwe; maze mbagabura mu maboko yanyu, mwegukira igihugu cabo; ndaheza ndabarandura, baherengetera imbere yanyu." 
Joshua24:9 Bukeye Balaki mwene Sipori umwami w’i Mowabu arahaguruka, arabatera mwebge Abisirayeli, atuma guhamagaza Balamu mwene Beyori ngw aze kubavuma." 
Joshua24:10 Ariko nanka kwumvira Balamu, ni co catumye akomeza kubasabira umugisha; uko ni ko nabakūye mu maboko ya Balaki." 
Joshua24:11 Hanyuma mujabuka Yorodani, mushika i Yeriko, abāho barabarwanya, mbere n’Abamori n’Abaferizi n’Abanyakanani n’Abaheti n’Abagirugashi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi; maze bose mbagabura mu maboko yanyu." 
Joshua24:12 Kandi nagomoye amavubi abītangira imbere, yirukana abami bompi b’Abamori imbere yanyu; ntibirukanywe n’inkota zanyu cank’ imiheto yanyu." 
Joshua24:13 Maze mbaha igihugu mutigeze kurimamwo, n’ibisagara mutubatse, mubibamwo, n’imirima y’imizabibu n’imyelayo mutāteye, ari vyo muriko murarya ubu." 
Joshua24:14 None rero ni mwubahe Uhoraho, mumusabe mu vy’ukuri ata buryarya; mukūreho za mana ba sogokuruza bāsaba hakurya ya rwa ruzi no muri Egiputa, Uhoraho abe ari we musaba." 
Joshua24:15 Kandi namba mubona bibabangamiye gusaba Uhoraho, uyu musi ni mwitoranirize uwo muzosaba, namb’ ari za mana ba sogokuruza bāsaba hakurya ya rwa ruzi, cank’ imana z’Abamori ben’ iki gihugu murimwo; ariko jeho n’abo mu rugo rwanje tuzokwama tugendanira Uhoraho." 
Joshua24:16 Abantu baramwishura, bati Guheba Uhoraho ngo dusabe izindi mana biragahera!" 
Joshua24:17 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ari we yadukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, twe na ba sogokuruza, akadukūra mu nzu y’ubuja, kand’ agakorera vya bimenyetso bihambaye mu maso yacu, akatuzigama mu nzira yose twazananye, no mu mahanga yose twaciyemwo." 
Joshua24:18 Ikindi, Uhoraho yirukanye ya mahanga yose imbere yacu, bo n’Abamori bāba mur’ iki gihugu; ni co gituma natwe tuzogendanira Uhoraho, kukw ari yo Mana yacu." 
Joshua24:19 Ariko Yosuwa abarira abantu, ati Ntimuzobishobora kugendanira Uhoraho, kukw ar’ Imana yera kand’ ar’ Imana ifūha; ntizoharira ibicumuro vyanyu cank’ ivyaha vyanyu." 
Joshua24:20 Kuko ni mwaheba Uhoraho, mugasaba imana z’inyamahanga, azohindukira abagirire nabi, abarandure, naho yari yarabagiriye neza." 
Joshua24:21 Abantu babarira Yosuwa, bat’ Ekaye, Uhoraho ni we tuzogendanira." 
Joshua24:22 Yosuwa abarira abantu, ati Ni mwebge mwibereye ivyagirizi yuko muhisemwo Uhoraho, kuba ari we musaba. Na bo bati Tubaye ivyagirizi koko." 
Joshua24:23 Yosuwa ati None rero ni mukūreh’ imana z’inyamahanga ziri muri mwebge, muhindurire imitima yanyu k’Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli." 
Joshua24:24 Abantu bishura Yosuwa, bat’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ni we dusavye, kandi tuzomwumvira." 
Joshua24:25 Nuk’ uwo musi Yosuwa asezeranira abantu isezerano, abashingira ivyagezwe n’amabgirizwa aho nyene i Shekemu." 
Joshua24:26 Nuko Yosuwa yandika ayo majambo mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’Imana; yābīra ikibuye kinini, agishinga musi y’igiti c’umweloni kibangikanye n’Ahēra h’Uhoraho." 
Joshua24:27 Yosuwa abarira abantu bose, at’ Ehe rāba, iri buye ritubereye icagirizi, kuko ryumvise amajambo yose Uhoraho atubariye; ni co gituma ribabereye icagirizi, kugira ngo ntimuze mwihakane Imana yanyu." 
Joshua24:28 Nuko Yosuwa asezera abantu, umuntu wese asubira mw ishamvu yiwe." 
Joshua24:29 Ivyo vyose bibaye, Yosuwa mwene Nuni umusavyi w’Uhoraho arahwera; yar’ amaze imyaka ijana n’icumi." 
Joshua24:30 Bamuhamba mw ishamvu yiwe bgite i Timunati‐sera mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, ku ruhande rw’i burārūko rw’umusozi Gashi." 
Joshua24:31 Yosuwa akiriho, Abisirayeli bāgumye k’ Uhoraho, no mu gihe cose c’abakuru bāsigaye Yosuwa amaze gupfa, abāri bazi ibikorwa vyose Uhoraho yakoreye Abisirayeli." 
Joshua24:32 Kand’ amagufa ya Yosefu, Abisirayeli bāri bāradūganye bayakūye muri Egiputa, bāyahamvye i Shekemu, ku gasozi Yakobo yari yaraguze na bene Hamori se wa Shekemu amahera ijana y’ifeza yitwa kesita; gaca kaba ishamvu y’aba Yosefu." 
Joshua24:33 Na Eleyazari mwene Aroni arahwera; bamuhamba mu gisagara ca Finehasi umwana wiwe i Gibeya, aho yari yarahawe mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu." 
Judges1:1 Yosuwa amaze gupfa, Abisirayeli babaza Uhoraho, bati Muri twebge ni nde azobanza kuja gutera Abanyakanani ngw abarwanye?" 
Judges1:2 Uhoraho arishura, at’ Abayuda ni bo bazobanza gutera: kand’ ico gihugu ndakigabuye mu maboko yabo." 
Judges1:3 Nukw Abayuda babarira ab’i wabo b’Abasimeyoni, bati Ni muze mufatanye natwe dutere Abanyakanani, dushikīre umugabane wacu twaheshejwe n’ubupfindo; natwe tuzofatanya namwe ngo mushikīre uwanyu. Nukw Abasimeyoni bajana na bo." 
Judges1:4 Nukw Abayuda badūga gutera, maz’ Uhoraho agabura Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi mu maboko yabo, i Bezeki bahatsinda ibihumbi cumi mu ngabo zabo." 
Judges1:5 Basanga Adoni‐bezeki i Bezeki nyene, baramurwanya, banesha Abanyakanani n’Abaferizi." 
Judges1:6 Ariko Adoni‐bezeki arahunga, baramukinagiza, baramufata, bamuca intoke z’ibikumu n’amano manini." 
Judges1:7 Adoni‐bezeki aravuga, at’Abami mirongwirindwi naciye ibikumu n’amano manini bāhora batoragura utwo barya musi y’ameza yanje: uko nabagiriye ni kw Imana inshubirije mu nkōko. Nuko bamujana i Yerusalemu, agwayo." 
Judges1:8 Maz’ Abayuda batera Yerusalemu, barahatsinda, baharanduza inkota; ico gisagara bagiha impumbi." 
Judges1:9 Maze baramanuka, batera Abanyakanani, uhereye ku baba mu mugamba n’ababa i bumanuko n’ababa mu gihugu c’ imisozi iciye bugufi." 
Judges1:10 Baraheza baja gutera Abanyakanani baba i Heburoni; Heburoni kera hitwa Kiriyati‐Araba: maze bica Sheshayi na Ahimanu na Talumayi. 
Judges1:11 Nuko bavayo, baja gutera ab’i Debira; Debira kera hitwa Kiriyati‐seferi." 
Judges1:12 Kalebu aravuga, at’ Umuntu azotera i Kiriyati‐seferi akahanesha, nzomushingira umwana wanje Akisa." 
Judges1:13 Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi, murumuna wa Kalebu, arahanesha; araheza amushingira umukobga wiwe Akisa." 
Judges1:14 Maz’ agishika i w’umugabo wiwe, aramwinginga ngw asabe se itongo; Akisa ava ku ndogoba yiwe, Kalebu aramubaza, at’ Ugomba iki?" 
Judges1:15 Aramwishura, ati Ntabara ungabire: ko wandungitse mu gihugu cumye, mpa n’amariba y’amazi. Nuko Kalebu amuha amariba yo haruguru n’ayo hepfo." 
Judges1:16 Maz’ abo mu ruvyaro rwa wa Munyakeni, muramu wa Mose, badūgana n’Abayuda bavuye mu gisagara co mu bigazi, baja mu bugaragwa bg’i Buyuda, ahahera i bumanuko bg’i Arada, babanayo na bene ho." 
Judges1:17 Bukeye Abayuda bafatanya n’ab’i wabo b’Abasimeyoni, banesha Abanyakanani bāba i Sefati, barahageseza; ni kwo kwita ico gisagara Horuma." 
Judges1:18 Abayuda banesha i Gaza n’impande zaho zose, na Ashikeloni n’impande zaho zose, na Ekuroni n’impande zaho zose." 
Judges1:19 Uhoraho yari kumwe n’Abayuda; birukana ababa mu gihugu c’umugamba, ariko ntibashobora kwirukana ababa mu biyaya, kuko bari bafise imikogote y’ivyuma." 
Judges1:20 Kalebu bamuha Heburoni nk’uko Mose yari yaravuze; ahirukana bene Anaki ukw ari batatu. 
Judges1:21 Arikw Ababenyamini ntibirukanye Abayebusi bāba i Yerusalemu; nukw Abayebusi babana n’Ababenyamini i Yerusalemu gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu. 
Judges1:22 Ab’ umuryango wa Yosefu na bo baradūga ngo batere i Beteli; kand’ Uhoraho yari kumwe na bo. 
Judges1:23 Batuma abaja gutata i Beteli; ico gisagara kera citwa Luzi. 
Judges1:24 Abo batasi babona umuntu avuye mur’ ico gisagara, baramubarira, bat’ Enda se twereke akanyuro twocamwo ngo dushike mur’ iki gisagara, natwe tuzokwibuka." 
Judges1:25 Aca abereka aho baca ngo bagishikemwo; ni kwo kuranduza inkota ico gisagara, ariko wa mugabo n’abo mu rugo rwiwe bose barabareka." 
Judges1:26 Uwo muntu araheza aragenda, aja mu gihugu c’Abaheti, yubakay’ igisagara, acita Luzi: ni ryo zina ryaco na bugingo n’ubu." 
Judges1:27 Arikw Abamanase ntibirukanye ab’i Beti‐sheyani cank’ ab’i Tanaki cank’ ababa i Dori, cank’ ababa Ibuleyamu, cank’ ababa i Megido, cank’ abo mu dusagara twagenda tuhakūkira, kukw Abanyakanani bāgataye kuva mur’ ico gihugu." 
Judges1:28 Maz’ Abisirayeli bamaze guhama, bashinga Abanyakanani ibikebere, ntibabirukana ngo babaherengeteze." 
Judges1:29 Abefurayimu na bo ntibirukanye Abanyakanani baba i Gezeri, arikw Abanyakanani babana na bo ngaho nyene i Gezeri." 
Judges1:30 N’Abazebuloni na bo ntibirukanye ababa i Kitironi cank’ ababa i Nahalolo; arikw abo Banyakanani babana na bo, bashingwa ibikebere." 
Judges1:31 N’Abasheri na bo ntibirukanye ababa ahitwa Ako, cank’ ababa i Sidoni, cank’ ab’i Ahulaba, cank’ ab’i Akuziba, cank’ ab’i Heliba, cank’ ab’i Afeka, cank’ ab’i Rehobu;" 
Judges1:32 arikw Abasheri babana n’Abanyakanani, ben’ ico gihugu, ntibabirukana." 
Judges1:33 N’Abanafutali na bo ntibirukanye ababa i Beti‐shemeshi, cank’ ababa i Beti‐anati, arikw Abanafutali babana n’Abanyakanani, ben’ ico gihugu; mugabo, ababa i Beti‐shemeshi n’i Beti‐anati bashingwa ibikebere." 
Judges1:34 Abamori bagenda barasegenya, basunika Abadani gushitsa mu gihugu c’umugamba, ntibābakundira kumanuka mu kiyaya," 
Judges1:35 arikw abo Bamori bāgataye kuva ku musozi Heresi n’i Ayaloni n’i Shalubimu; arikw ab’ inzu ya Yosefu bamaze gukomera bashinga abo Bamori ibikebere. 
Judges1:36 Kand’ urubibe rw’Abamori rwāhēra ku mudūgo w’i Akurabimu rugashitsa i Sela rugasubiza amajaruguru. 
Judges2:1 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho ava i Gilugali aradūga, aja i Bokimu. Arababarira, ati Nabadūganye mbakūye muri Egiputa, mbashikana mu gihugu nasezeraniye ba sogokuruza, nkavuga, nti Nta ho nzova mw isezerano nabasezeraniye;" 
Judges2:2 nti Namwe ntimuze musezerane na ben’ iki gihugu, ariko muze musangangure ibicaniro vyabo. Yamara ntimwanyumviye. N’iki catumye mukora murtyo?" 
Judges2:3 None nanje hinge ndababarire: Abo sinzobirukana ngo bababise, ariko bazobabera ibibahanda mu mbavu, n’imana zabo zizobabera umutego." 
Judges2:4 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho amaze kubgira Abisirayeli bose ayo majambo, abantu baraturikisha bararira." 
Judges2:5 Aho hantu baca bahita i Bokimu; bahatangira ibimazi, babishikanira Uhoraho." 
Judges2:6 Kandi Yosuwa igihe yar’ amaze gusēzera abantu, umuntu wese aja mw ishamvu yiwe, ngo begukire ico gihugu." 
Judges2:7 Yosuwa akiriho, abantu bāgumye k’Uhoraho, no mu gihe cose c’abakuru bāsigaye Yosuwa amaze gupfa, abāri bārabonye ibikorwa vyose bihambaye Uhoraho yakoreye Abisirayeli." 
Judges2:8 Yosuwa mwene Nuni umusavyi w’Uhoraho ahwera amaze imyaka ijana n’icumi.
