Judges2:9 Bāmuhamvye mw ishamvu yiwe bgite i Timunati‐sera mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, ku ruhande rw’i burārūko rw’ umusozi Gashi." 
Judges2:10 Hanyuma ab’ urwo runganwe bose na bo barapfa, bahamvya ababo; bakurikirwa n’urundi runganwe, abo bo bakura batazi Uhoraho, canke ngo bamenye igikorwa yakoreye Abisirayeli." 
Judges2:11 Maz’ Abisirayeli bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, basaba za Bayali;" 
Judges2:12 bava k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bakurikira izindi mana zo mu mana z’abanyamahanga babakikije, bakazūnamira, bakaratsa Uhoraho." 
Judges2:13 Uko ni ko bātaye Uhoraho, bagasaba Bayali na Ashitaroti." 
Judges2:14 Uburake bg’ Uhoraho buca buziriringira Abisirayeli, abagabura mu maboko y’ abanyazi, barabanyaga, abatanga mu maboko y’abansi babo babakikije, bituma batagishobora guhagarara imbere y’abansi babo." 
Judges2:15 Aho bāja gutera hose, Uhoraho yarabarwanya, nk’uko yari yaravuze akabarahira; bituma baja mu vyago bikomeye." 
Judges2:16 Maz’ Uhoraho akabahagurukiriza abacamanza, bakabakiza bakabakūra mu maboko y’abābanyaga." 
Judges2:17 Ariko bakanka kwumvira abo bacamanza babo, bakagenda bahurumbira izindi mana nk’ibimaka, bakazūnamira, bagata vuba inzira ba sekuruza bāhora bagenderamwo, ntibumvira ivyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho nk’ukw abo bāvyumvira." 
Judges2:18 Kand’ uk’ Uhoraho yabaha umucamanza, yaba kumwe n’uwo mucamanza, akabakiza, akabakūra mu maboko y’abansi babo igihe cose uwo mucamanza akiriho, kuko vyamutera akagongwe kwumva iminiho yabo banihishwa n’ababahahaza bakabacuranguza." 
Judges2:19 Ariko hanyuma, uwo mucamanza amaze gupfa, bagasubira inyuma, bagakora ibibi birengeye ivya ba sekuruza, bagakurikira izindi mana bakazisaba, bakazūnamira; mu ngeso zabo mbi bakanka kugira n’imwe bata, canke ngo bareke no gukomantaza imitima." 
Judges2:20 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli, akavuga, at’ Iri hanga ko ryishe isezerano ryanje nasezeranye na ba sekuruza, ntibanyumvire," 
Judges2:21 nanje guhēra ubu sinzokwongera kwirukana ihanga na rimwe ngo ribabise, mu yo Yosuwa yasizeho igihe yapfa," 
Judges2:22 kugira ngw Abisirayeli ndabageragereshe ayo mahanga, ndābe ko boruha bakagumya inzira yanje, bakayigenderamwo, nk’uko ba sekuruza bāyigenderamwo, canke ko bazokwanka." 
Judges2:23 Ni co catumye Uhoraho areka ayo mahanga, ntayirukane n’ingoga na n’ingoga; kandi ntiyayagomoreye Yosuwa." 
Judges3:1 Aya ni yo mahanga Uhoraho yaretse, kugira ngw ayageragereshe Abisirayeli, cane‐cane abatigeze kubona intambara zabaye i Kanani;" 
Judges3:2 ico yagomba gusa kwar’ ukugira ngw abārutse hanyuma bo mu Bisirayeli bamenyerezwe ivy’ intambara, avyigishe abatigeze kubimenya ubga mbere." 
Judges3:3 Hār’ abaganwa batanu b’Abafilisitiya, n’Abanyakanani bose, n’Abasidoni, n’Abahiwi bo ku musozi Lebanoni, uhereye ku musozi Bayali‐Herumoni ugashitsa ahafata i Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Abo ni bo Uhoraho yaretse, kugira ngw abageragereshe Abisirayeli, arābe ko bokwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe, ivyo yageze ba sekuruza abitumye Mose." 
Judges3:5 Nukw Abisirayeli baba hagati y’Abanyakanani n’Abaheti n’Abamori n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi. 
Judges3:6 Barashingirana, batako basaba imana zabo." 
Judges3:7 Maz’ Abisirayeli bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, bibagira Uhoraho Imana yabo, basaba za Bayali na za Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Bituma uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli, abagabura mu maboko ya Kushani‐rishatayimu umwami w’i Aramu‐naharayimu; Abisirayeli baganzwa na Kushani‐rishatayimu imyaka munani." 
Judges3:9 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho, abahagurukiriza uwo kubakiza yitwa Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi, murumuna wa Kalebu; arabakiza." 
Judges3:10 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amuzako, ahinduka umucamanza w’Abisirayeli. Bukeye aja gutera, maz’ Uhoraho amugomorera Kushani‐rishatayimu uwo mwami w’i Aramu‐naharayimu, aramunesha." 
Judges3:11 Nukw ico gihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongwine. Maze Otiniyeli mwene Kenazi arapfa. 
Judges3:12 Abisirayeli bongera gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, maz’ Uhoraho aha ubushobozi Eguloni umwami w’i Mowabu bgo kurwanya Abisirayeli, kuko bari bakoze ibibi mu nyonga ziwe." 
Judges3:13 Eguloni atabaza Abamoni n’ Abamaleki, aja gutera Abisirayeli arabanesha, begukira ca gisagara co mu bigazi." 
Judges3:14 Nukw Abisirayeli baganzwa na Eguloni umwami w’i Mowabu imyaka cumi n’ umunani. 
Judges3:15 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho, abahagurukiriza uwo kubakiza yitwa Ehudi mwene Gera w’Umubenyamini; yar’ ibamfu. Bukeye Abisirayeli bamurungikana ishikanwa ryo gushikanira Eguloni umwami w’i Mowabu." 
Judges3:16 Maze Ehudi yicurishiriza intambi; uburebure bgayo bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ayambara kw itako ry’i buryo, ayirenzakw impuzu ziwe." 
Judges3:17 Nukw aragenda, ashikanira Eguloni umwami w’i Mowabu iryo shikanwa; kandi Eguloni yar’ umuntu yavyibushe yasenyutse." 
Judges3:18 Nuko Ehudi ahejeje kwākīrirwa iryo shikanwa, arungika abantu baje baryikoreye." 
Judges3:19 Ariko we, ashitse i Pesilimu hafi y’i Gilugali, arakimirana; arashika abgira umwami, ati Bgirukiro, mfise ijambo ry’ibanga nsaba kukubgira. Na we ati Banza uhagarare. Maz’ abāri kumwe na we bose barataramuka." 
Judges3:20 Nuko Ehudi aramwēgēra aho yar’ avyagiye ari wenyene, mu cumba co gusama akayaga co hejuru ku nzu; Ehudi aramubgira, ati Ngufitiye ijambo ntumwe n’Imana. Nuko Eguloni ahaguruka ku ntebe yiwe." 
Judges3:21 Maze Ehudi atuma ukuboko kwiwe kw’i bumoso, anyakura intambi kw itako ry’i buryo, ayimuzibura ku nda;" 
Judges3:22 iyo ntambi ijana n’ikirindi na co, ibinure biyirenga hejuru, kukw atāyisokōye, iseruka mu mugongo." 
Judges3:23 Maze Ehudi arasohoka, ashitse ku rubaraza aramwugarana, yugaza inzugi z’ico cumba urupfunguzo." 
Judges3:24 Amaze gusohoka, abantu ba Eguloni baraza, basanga inzugi z’ico cumba zidadiye, bati Ngira ngw ari kwihagarika mu kazu ko mur’ ico cumba co gusama akayaga." 
Judges3:25 Bararorēra gushitsa bibazazaniye kukw atuguruye inzugi z’ico cumba; bararuha bazana urupfunguzo, barugurura: basanga umwami wabo arambaraye hasi yāpfuye." 
Judges3:26 Ico gihe bāmaze bagitebaganye, Ehudi arabajana, aca i Pesilimu, ashika i Seyira." 
Judges3:27 Ashitseyo, avugisha inzamba mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu: Abisirayeli bamanukana na we bavuye mur’ uwo mugamba, abagiye imbere." 
Judges3:28 Arababarira, ati Ni munkurikire, kuk’ Uhoraho agabuye abansi banyu b’Abanyamowabu mu maboko yanyu. Nuko bamanukana na we bamwōmyeko, bazibira ivyambu vya Yorodani bija i Mowabu, ntibākundira umuntu n’umwe kujabuka." 
Judges3:29 Ico gihe bica abagabo nk’ ibihumbi cumi b’Abanyamowabu, bose b’abahizi b’intōre; ntihārokoka n’uwa kirazira." 
Judges3:30 Nuk’ uwo musi Abanyamowabu baneshwa n’Abisirayeli. Igihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongumunani. 
Judges3:31 Ehudi akurikirwa na Shamugari mwene Anati, yica Abafilisitiya amajana atandatu, abicisha umuhunda w’inyobozo y’inka; na we akiza Abisirayeli." 
Judges4:1 Ehudi amaze gupfa, Abisirayeli bongera gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi." 
Judges4:2 Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko ya Yabina umwami w’i Kanani, yaba i Hasori; kand’ umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe yari Sisera, yaba i Harosheti‐ha‐goyimu." 
Judges4:3 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambira Uhoraho, kubg’ imikogote y’ivyuma amajana cenda Yabina yar’ afise, kandi yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri ahahaza Abisirayeli bibi." 
Judges4:4 Ico gihe Debora, uwavugishwa n’Imana, muka Lapidoti, ni we yar’ umucamanza w’Abisirayeli." 
Judges4:5 Yakunda kwicara musi y’ikigazi citwa ica Debora nyene, cari hagati y’i Rama na Beteli mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu; kand’ Abisirayeli bāma badūga baja kuri we ngw abacire imanza." 
Judges4:6 Bukeye atuma i Kedeshi‐nafutali guhamagara Baraki mwene Abinowamu; aramubgira, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli arakugeze, ngo Genda ukoranirize i Tabora ingabo ibihumbi cumi bo mu ba Nafutali no mu ba Zebuloni;" 
Judges4:7 ngo Na we azokwegakwega Sisera, umugabisha w’ingabo za Yabina, agusange ku mugezi Kishoni n’imikogote yiwe n’ingabo ziwe, kandi ngw Azomugabura mu maboko yawe." 
Judges4:8 Baraki aramwishura, ati Ni twajana nawe nzogenda, ariko ni tutajana sinzogenda." 
Judges4:9 Aramwishura, ati Nuko tuzojana: yamara rer’ urwo rugendo uzogenda ntiruzotuma ushirwa hejuru, kuk’ Uhoraho agiye kuzogabura Sisera mu maboko y’umugore. Nuko Debora ava hasi, ajana na Baraki i Kedeshi." 
Judges4:10 Bukeye Baraki ahamagaza Abazebuloni n’Abanafutali ngo bakoranire i Kedeshi; nukw ingabo ibihumbi cumi ziradūga zimukōndōreye inyuma, na Debora na we barajana." 
Judges4:11 Heberi w’Umunyakeni yari yaritandukanije n’Abanyakeni bandi, ari bo buzukuruza ba Hobabu muramu wa Mose, yar’ ashinze ihema ryiwe musi y’igiti c’umweloni i Sananimu, hafi y’i Kedeshi." 
Judges4:12 Maze babarira Sisera yuko Baraki mwene Abinowamu adūze ashitse ku musozi Tabora. 
Judges4:13 Nuko Sisera akoranya imikogote yiwe yose y’ivyuma ukw ar’ amajana cenda, n’ingabo zose yar’ afise, uhereye i Harosheti‐ha‐goyimu ugashitsa ku mugezi Kishoni." 
Judges4:14 Maze Debora abgira Baraki, ati Haguruka, kuk’ uyu musi ari wo Uhoraho agabuye Sisera mu maboko yawe. Rāba Uhoraho ni we akugiye imbere. Nuko Baraki amanukana n’ingabo ziwe ukw ar’ ibihumbi cumi, bava ku musozi Tabora bamukōndōreye inyuma." 
Judges4:15 Maz’ Uhoraho ashwiragiriza imbere ya Baraki imikogote yose ya Sisera n’ingabo ziwe zose, abatsindisha inkota; Sisera arataruka ava mu mukogote wiwe, ahunga yiruka ku maguru." 
Judges4:16 Ariko Baraki yōma inyuma y’iyo mikogote n’izo ngabo, barinda bashika i Harosheti‐ha‐goyimu; ingabo za Sisera zose zishirira ku nkota, ntihasigara n’uwa kirazira." 
Judges4:17 Ariko Sisera, uko yagahunze yiruka ku maguru, ashika kw ihema rya Yayeli muka Heberi w’Umunyakeni, kuko Yabina umwami w’i Hasori n’ab’ inzu ya Heberi Umunyakeni bari bafitaniye ubumwe." 
Judges4:18 Maze Yayeli arasohoka, asanganira Sisera, aramubarira, ati Kebereza hano mugenzi, winjire i wanje, ntutinye. Nukw arakevya, yinjirana na we mw ihema, amurenzak’ uburengeti." 
Judges4:19 Sisera aramubarira, at’ Enda se n’umpe utuzi two kunywa, kukw inyota inyishe. Yayeli apfundura icansi c’amata, aramuha aranywa; maz’ aramupfuka." 
Judges4:20 Sisera aramubarira, ati Genda wihagararire mu muryango w’ihema, maze ni hagira umuntu aza, akakubaza, ati Har’ umuntu aje ngaho? umwishure, uti Na mba." 
Judges4:21 Maze Yayeli muka Heberi yābīra urumambo rw’ihema n’inyundo, aza yōmbōka, amunega urumambo mu mvuridahita, rushinga hasi, kuko yari mw itiro ryinshi, arushe cane; nukw arapfa." 
Judges4:22 Maze haza Baraki akurikiranye Sisera; Yayeli arasohoka, aramusanganira, aramubarira, ati Ngwino nkwereke uwo urondera. Barinjirana, asanga Sisera arambaraye, yapfuye, urumambo rukineze mu mvuridahita." 
Judges4:23 Uko ni kw Imana yamaze igabo Yabina umwami w’i Kanani kur’ uwo musi, imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges4:24 Nukw Abisirayeli bagenda barushiriza kugira ubushobozi bgo kumunesha, gushitsa bamuherengeteje." 
Judges5:1 Kur’ uwo musi Debora na Baraki mwene Abinowamu bararirimba," 
Judges5:2 bati Ni muhimbaze Uhoraho, Kuko habonetse imena zo kurōngōra Abisirayeli, Abantu bagaheba amagara yabo babikunze." 
Judges5:3 Ni mwumve, yemwe bami; mutege amatwi, namwe baganwa: Nanje ndirimbe, ndirimbire Uhoraho, Ndirimbe ishimwe ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges5:4 Ewe Uhoraho, igihe wava i Seyiri, Ukīsidukira uvuye mu ntāra ya Edomu, Isi yahinze agashitsi, ijuru rirajojota, Mber’ ibicu bijojota amazi;" 
Judges5:5 Imisozi yadegerejwe imbere y’Uhoraho, Na Sinayi n’uko, imbere y’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges5:6 Mu gihe ca Shamugari mwene Anati, No mu gihe ca Yayeli, inzira z’ibihamo zari zasivye, Abahita bāri basigaye bajana utuyira tw’inkereramucāmo." 
Judges5:7 Ntihāri hagisigaye abo kurōngōra Abisirayeli, Kugeza ubgo jewe Debora nahagurutse, Mpaguruka nd’ umuvyeyi w’ Abisirayeli." 
Judges5:8 Igihe bitoraniriza izindi mana, Intambara zaciye zishika ku marembo yabo. Nta nkinzo cank’ icumu vyari bikiboneka Mu Bisirayeli naho boba ibihumbi mirongwine." 
Judges5:9 Umutima wanje wose uri ku barōngōra Abisirayeli, Ku bāhevye amagara yabo mu bantu: Ni muhimbaze Uhoraho!" 
Judges5:10 Yemwe abagendera ku ndogoba z’ibihororo, Yemwe abīshānyāngira ku mikeka myiza, Yemwe abari ku nzira, ni muririmbe." 
Judges5:11 Aho bavuga ibicuba ku ngomero z’inka, Abe ari ho batāzīrira Uhoraho kubg’ intsinzi yiwe, Kubg’ intsinzi yiwe arōngōye Abisirayeli. Aho ni ho abantu b’Uhoraho bāmanutse, bagatamaza mu marembo yabo." 
Judges5:12 Ikangure, ikangure, Debora! Ikangure, ikangure, ushirek’ uririmbe! Haguruka, Baraki, wijanire inyagano, ewe mwene Abinowamu!" 
Judges5:13 Amasigarira y’abahambaye n’ ay’ abanyagihugu baramanuka, Uhoraho amanukanwa no kuntabara abahizi." 
Judges5:14 Abefurayimu bamanuka mu mwonga, Ari mwebge bakurikiye, yemwe Babenyamini, bīvanze mu banyu; Mu Bamakiri hamanuka abagabisha, Mu Bazebuloni hamanuka abatwaye inkoni y’ubugabe;" 
Judges5:15 Abaganwa bo mu Bisakari bari kumwe na Debora, Mber’ Abisakari bakurikira Baraki; Bītera mu mwonga bamwōmye inyuma. Ku migezi y’Abareyubeni Hābaye kwibūranya gukomeye," 
Judges5:16 Ngo N’iki catumye wicara hagati y’impongore z’intama, Ngo wumvirize imyironge y’ abungere? Ku migezi y’Abareyubeni Ni ho hābaye kwibūranya gukomeye." 
Judges5:17 N’Abagileyadi bīgumiye hakurya ya Yorodani; Mbeg’ Abadani n’iki catumye biyicarira mu māto? Abasheri na bo biyicariye ku musenyi w’ikiyaga, Bīgumira mu bigobe vyaco." 
Judges5:18 Abazebuloni n’abantu bahevye amagara yabo kugeza ku gupfa, N’Abanafutali ni ko bitanze ku mpinga z’imisozi." 
Judges5:19 Abami baraza, bararwana; Abami b’i Kanani barwanira i Tanaki ku mazi y’i Megido, Ariko nta masahu y’ifeza bāronse." 
Judges5:20 Inyenyeri zo kw ijuru ziratabara, Zirwanya Sisera zijanye inzira zazo." 
Judges5:21 Umugezi Kishoni urabatembana, Ni wo wa mugezi wa kera witwa Kishoni. Ewe mutima wanje, iserure mu buhizi!" 
Judges5:22 Amafarasi avuza imirindi Agendeshwa akābushūngwe n’ abahizi. 
Judges5:23 Ni muvume Merozi, ni k’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho agize; Muvume abahaba mubakoze! Kuko batātabaye Uhoraho, Ngo bamutabare kurwanya abahizi." 
Judges5:24 Yayeli aragahezagirwa kurusha abandi bagore, Muka Heberi Umunyakeni Aragahezagirwa kurusha abandi bagore baba mu mahema!" 
Judges5:25 Yamusavye amazi, amuha amata, Amuzanira urubu mu gikombe c’icubahiro." 
Judges5:26 Atuma ukuboko, yābīra urumambo, Atuma ukw’i buryo, yābīra inyundo y’abakozi; Akubita Sisera, amumena umutwe, Aramusāvya, aramutobekeranya mu mvuridahita." 
Judges5:27 Ayāmīrira imbere y’ibirenge vyiwe, arakumbagara, ararambarara; Imbere y’ibirenge vyiwe ni ho yayāmīriye, arakumbagara: Aho yayāmīriye ni ho yacīkāniye." 
Judges5:28 Nyina wa Sisera arerekera mw idirisha, Acishiriza mu nshingo zaryo yibaza, Ati Mbeg’ umukogote wiwe k’ utevye kuza? Imirindi y’amafarasi akwega imikogote kw itarakakaza?" 
Judges5:29 Ab’ incabgenge bo mu ncoreke ziwe baramubarira, Bahūza n’ivyo na we ubgiwe yibgira:" 
Judges5:30 Ngo Ngira ngo n’uko bakigabangana isahu baronse: Umugabo wese aratwara umwigeme umwe canke babiri, Sisera na we aratwara isahu y’impuzu z’amabara, Impuzu zijererenze amabara, Zijererenze amabara impande zompi zo kwambara mw izosi zivuye mw isahu!" 
Judges5:31 Uhoraho we, abansi bawe bose baragapfa bartyo, Arikw abagukunda babe nk’ izuba rirashe risasitse! Maz’ igihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongwine." 
Judges6:1 Abisirayeli bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi; maz’ Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko y’Abamidiyani kumara imyaka ndwi. 
Judges6:2 Nukw Abamidiyani bamara igabo Abisirayeli, bituma Abisirayeli bironderera aho kuja kunyegera mu bihuma vyo ku misozi no mu masenga no mu maboma kubg’ abo Bamidiyani." 
Judges6:3 Kand’ Abisirayeli iyo bahejeje kurangiriza imbuto hanze, Abamidiyani bādūgana n’Abamaleki n’ abantu b’i burasirazuba, bakabatera," 
Judges6:4 bagasagazayo, bagasiribanga imirima yo mur’ ico gihugu kurinda ushitsa i Gaza, ntibāsigarana Abisirayeli ico kubatunga, ar’ agatungwa cank’ agaka cank’ akadogoba." 
Judges6:5 Bādūgana amasho yabo n’amahema yabo, bameze nk’ isinzi ry’inzige; bo ubgabo bo n’ ingamiya zabo ntivyaharūrika; batera ico gihugu kugira ngo bagihindure iyondoyondo." 
Judges6:6 Nukw Abisirayeli baja mu karindiro kubg’ Abamidiyani, maze batakambira Uhoraho." 
Judges6:7 Ico gihe Abisirayeli batakambiye Uhoraho kubg’ Abamidiyani," 
Judges6:8 Uhoraho abatumak’ ūvugishwa na we, arababarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngo Yabadūganye abakūye muri Egiputa, mu nzu y’ubuja;" 
Judges6:9 abakūra mu maboko y’Abanyegiputa no mu maboko y’abābahahaza bose; ngw Abirukana imbere yanyu, abaha igihugu cabo;" 
Judges6:10 ngw Arababgira, ati Nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ntimuze mwubahe imana z’Abamori, ben’ iki gihugu murimwo; ngw Ariko mwanka kumwumvira." 
Judges6:11 Bukeye umumarayika w’ Uhoraho araza, yicara musi y’ igiti c’umweloni cari muri Ofura; car’ ica Yowasi Umwabiyezeri, kand’ umuhungu wiwe Gideyoni yarikw arakubitira ingano mu bgato baganiramwo vino, bgimbge mu kuzimu, kugira ngw azinyegeze Abamidiyani." 
Judges6:12 Nuk’ uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho aramwiyereka, aramubarira, at’ Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe, ewe wa muhizi w’ inkomezi!" 
Judges6:13 Gideyoni aramwishura, ati Mugenzi, namb’ Uhoraho ari kumwe natwe, n’iki gituma ivyo vyose bitubako? Kandi vya bitangaza vyiwe vyose ba sogokuruza bātubarira biri hehe, bat’ Uhoraho ni we yadukūye muri Egiputa? Ariko noneho, Uhoraho yaradutaye, yatugabuye mu maboko y’Abamidiyani." 
Judges6:14 Uhoraho aramwitegereza, aramubarira, ati Genda ukw izo nkomezi zawe zingana, ukize Abisirayeli ubakūre mu maboko y’Abamidiyani: ni jewe ubganje ngutumye." 
Judges6:15 Aramwishura, ati Mbeg’ Abisirayeli nobakiza nte ga Mwami wanje? Inzu yacu kw ar’ iyo hasi mu muryango wa Manase, nanje nkaba nd’ umuhererezi kwa data!" 
Judges6:16 Uhoraho aramubarira, at’ Erega jewe nzoba ndi kumwe nawe, kand’ uzoririka Abamidiyani nk’ uwishe umuntu umwe." 
Judges6:17 Aramubgira, ati Ni naba ngiriwe akagongwe imbere yawe, n’unyereke ikimenyetso kinyemeza kw ari wewe ubgawe uvuganye nanje." 
Judges6:18 Nuko ndakwinginze ntuve hano, kugeza ngarutse ah’ uri, nkuzaniye ishikanwa nkaritereka imbere yawe. Na we aramwishura, ati Nuko ndakurorēra gushitsa ugarutse." 
Judges6:19 Nuko Gideyoni yinjira i we, abāga isuguru y’impene, acumba udutsima tutambiwe mw ifu iri ku ngero yitwa efa; inyama azishira mu nkōko, umufa wazo awusuka mu rwavya, abimusanza musi ya ca giti c’umweloni, arabimushikanira." 
Judges6:20 Maz’ uwo mumarayika w’ Imana aramubarira, at’ Abīra izo nyama n’iyo mitsima, ubishire kur’ ico kibuye, ubisukeko n’uyo mufa. Nukw abigira kuno." 
Judges6:21 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho atuma inkoni yari yitwaje, ayikoza kur’ izo nyama na ya mitsima itambiwe, umuriro uca waduka mur’ iryo buye, urabitōngōra; nuk’ uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho aca akamangana: ni yo maso." 
Judges6:22 Maze Gideyoni aca amenya ko yar’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho; aravuga, at’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho, ndahūmiwe, kuko mbonye umumarayika wawe imbonankubone, Uhoraho!" 
Judges6:23 Maz’ Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Mpore, nta co utinya, ntupfa." 
Judges6:24 Nuko Gideyoni araheza ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro, acita Yehova‐shalomu; kiracari ku musozi Ofura w’Ababiyezeri na bugingo n’ubu." 
Judges6:25 Mw ijoro ry’uwo musi, Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Hitana impfizi ya so, imwe ya kabiri imaze imyaka ndwi, usangangure igicaniro ca Bayali kiri kwa so, utemagure inkingi y’ikigirwamana Ashera ishinzwe i ruhande yaco," 
Judges6:26 uheze unyubakire igicaniro kur’ iki gitandara, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, mu buryo bushinzwe, ujane ya mpfizi ya kabiri uyitange kw ikimazi co kwoswa, ucanirize inkwi za ya nkingi ya Ashera uzoba watemaguye." 
Judges6:27 Nuko Gideyoni ajana abantu cumi bo mu bantu biwe, abigenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; ariko yabikoze mw ijoro, ntiyatinyutse kubikora ku murango kubgo gutinya abo mu muryango wabo, n’ababa mur’ ico gisagara." 
Judges6:28 Bukeye abantu bo mu gisagara bavyutse, basanga ca gicaniro ca Bayali gisanganguwe, na ya nkingi ya Ashera yar’ ishinzwe i ruhande yaco yatemaguwe, na ya mpfizi ya kabiri yatangiwe ku gicaniro cubatswe." 
Judges6:29 Barabazanya, bati Ni nde yakoze ibi? Bamaze kubibariritsa no kubihwēbūtsa, basanga ari Gideyoni mwene Yowasi yabikoze." 
Judges6:30 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara babarira Yowasi, bati Sohokana umuhungu wawe, apfe, kuko yasanganguye igicaniro ca Bayali, agatemagura inkingi ya Ashera yar’ i ruhande yaco." 
Judges6:31 Yowasi yishura abamuhagurukiye bose, ati Mbega mugomba kurwanira Bayali? canke mugomba kuyitabara? At’ Ūgomba kuyirwanira ni bamwice hakiri kare! Asangw’ ar’ imana, ni yīrwanire, kuko basanganguye igicaniro cayo!" 
Judges6:32 Nuko kur’ uwo musi aca yita Gideyoni Yerubayali; ati Bayali ni yirwanirire, kuko yasanganguye igicaniro cayo." 
Judges6:33 Maz’ Abamidiyani bose n’ Abamaleki n’ab’i burasirazuba bakoranira hamwe, bajabuka Yorodani, basagaza mu kiyaya c’i Yezireli." 
Judges6:34 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aza kuri Gideyoni; aca avuza inzamba, maz’ Ababiyezeri bakoranira kuri we." 
Judges6:35 Atuma intabaza mu gihugu cose c’Abamanase, na bo baraza bakoranira kuri we; atuma n’izindi mu Basheri no mu Bazebuloni no mu Banafutali, baradūga ngo baje guhūra na bo." 
Judges6:36 Maze Gideyoni abarira Imana, ati Namb’ uzokiza Abisirayeli, ubakirishije jewe nk’uko wavuze," 
Judges6:37 ehe ngiye gushira ubgoya bg’ intama ku mbuga; ni nasanga ikime gitonze ku bgoya bgonyene, hasi hose hūmye, nuko nzoca mmenya kw ari jewe uzokirisha Abisirayeli nk’uko wavuze." 
Judges6:38 Nuko biba birtyo: bukeye azinduka kare, bga bgoya arabukāmūra, abukānyamw’ ikime, amazi yaco yuzura urwavya." 
Judges6:39 Gideyoni yongera kubarira Imana, at’ Uburake bgawe ntibunziriringire: ntunga mvuge iri rimwe gusa: ndasavye nsubire ngeragereshe rimwe ubu bgoya; ubu ho ikime kize gitonde hasi hose, arik’ ubgoya abe ari bgo busigara bgūmye gusa." 
Judges6:40 Nukw Imana ibigenza irtyo no mur’ iryo joro: ubgoya bgonyene busigara bgūmye, ikime gitonda hasi hose." 
Judges7:1 Yerubayali, ari we Gideyoni, n’abantu bose bari kumwe na we, bazinduka kare, baragenda basagaza kw iriba ry’i Harodi, kand’ Abamidiyani bari bashagaje ahahera i burārūko bgabo, ahēgeranye n’umusozi More, mu kiyaya." 
Judges7:2 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Gideyoni, at’ Abantu muri kumwe ni benshi kurenza urugero: kubg’ ivyo sinshobora kugabura Abamidiyani mu maboko yabo, kugira ngw Abisirayeli boye kunyishirako hejuru, bat’ Ubutōre bgacu ni bgo bgadukijije." 
Judges7:3 None genda ubitāngāze, abantu bavyumve, ut’ Umuntu wese afise akōba atinya, n’atahe, ave kur’ uyu musozi Gileyadi. Nuko hataha abantu ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri, hasigara ibihumbi cumi." 
Judges7:4 Uhoraho yongera kubarira Gideyoni, ati N’ubu abantu baracari benshi kurenza urugero; bamanukane ku mazi, nanje ndabagusuzumire; maz’ uwo nja kukubarira kw ari we mujana, abe ari we mujana nyene; arik’ uwo nja kukubarira, nti Ntimujane, uwo we ntagende." 
Judges7:5 Nukw amanukana abo bantu ku mazi, maz’ Uhoraho abarira Gideyoni, at’ Umuntu wese aja gusabagira amazi n’ ururimi nk’imbga, umushire ukwiwe; kandi n’ūja gupfukama mu kunywa na we umushire ukwiwe." 
Judges7:6 Igitigiri c’abānyoye basabagiye ku mashi yabo car’ amajana atatu; arikw abandi bose bārapfukamye mu kunywa amazi. 
Judges7:7 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Gideyoni, at’ Abo bantu amajana atatu banyoye basabagira ni bo nzobakirisha, ngabure Abamidiyani mu maboko yawe; abandi bose ni bītahire." 
Judges7:8 Nukw abo amajana atatu bāka abo bandi impamba zabo n’inzamba zabo. Maze Gideyoni arungika abo Bisirayeli bose bacaguwe, umuntu wese asubira i we, asigarana n’abo amajana atatu. Kand’ Abamidiyani bari bashagaje mu kiyaya hepfo yabo." 
Judges7:9 Ijoro ry’uwo musi Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Va hasi, umanuke aho bashagaje, kuko mbagabuye mu maboko yawe." 
Judges7:10 Ariko ni waba utinya kumanukayo, jana n’uwo muntu wawe Pura umanuke aho bashagaje;" 
Judges7:11 wumvirize ivyo bavuga; ni ho uja kurema, ubone kumanuka kubatera. Nukw amanukana n’umuntu wiwe Pura, bashikira ku ngabo za mbere ziteramye aho bashagaje." 
Judges7:12 Kand’ Abamidiyani n’Abamaleki n’ab’i burasirazuba bose bari bajimagije ico kiyaya, ar’ amasinzi nk’inzige, n’ingamiya zabo zitoharūrika, ar’ amasinzi nk’umusenyi wo kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga." 
Judges7:13 Nuko Gideyoni ashitseyo, yumva umuntu arotorera inzozi mugenzi we, ati Ndose inzozi, mbona irobe ry’umutsima wa sayiri ritembagara, rishika mu nsago z’Abamidiyani, ryikubita kw ihema, iryo hema rirubama, rirambarara hasi." 
Judges7:14 Mugenzi we aramwishura, ati Nta kindi, iyo n’inkota ya Gideyoni mwene Yowasi, w’Umwisirayeli. Imana yagabuye Abamidiyani n’ingabo zabo zose mu maboko yiwe." 
Judges7:15 Nuko Gideyoni yumvise izo nzozi n’uko zisobanuwe, ashima Imana, asubira mu nsago z’Abisirayeli, arababarira, ati Ni mukūre hasi, kuk’ Uhoraho agabuye ingabo z’Abamidiyani mu maboko yanyu." 
Judges7:16 Nukw abo bantu ukw ar’ amajana atatu abagabanyamw’ imitwe itatu, umuntu wese amuha inzamba n’umubindi uri gusa, urimw’ urumuri." 
Judges7:17 Arababarira, ati Muje kundābirako: uko nja gukora abe ari ko mukora; ni twashika ku nsago za mbere, uko nja kugira namwe mugire kuno." 
Judges7:18 Ni navuza inzamba, jewe n’abo turi kumwe bose, namwe muce muvuza inzamba ku mpande zose z’aho bashagaje, mwihe akaruru, muti Kubg’ Uhoraho na Gideyoni!" 
Judges7:19 Nuko Gideyoni n’abantu ijana bajanye na we bashika ku nsago za mbere, igihe umuteramyi wa kabiri agitanguye, ari ho bakimuvyutsa; nuko baca bavuza inzamba, bamenagura ya mibindi bari bafise mu ntoke." 
Judges7:20 Nuko ya mitwe ukw ar’ itatu baca bavuza inzamba, bamenagura ya mibindi, bafatisha za muri ukuboko kw’i bumoso, inzamba bazifatisha ukw’ i buryo mu kuvuza; biha akaruru, bat’ Inkota n’iy’ Uhoraho na Gideyoni!" 
Judges7:21 Umuntu wese ahagarara aho yar’ ari, bakīkūje izo nsago; maz’ ingabo zose zirashikuka, bavuza induru barahunga." 
Judges7:22 Nuko bakomeza kuvuza za nzamba ukw ar’ amajana atatu, maz’ Uhoraho atuma Abamidiyani basubiranamwo, bazibagurana inkota mu ngabo zose; maz’ ingabo zisigaye zirahunga, zirinda zishika i Betishita ku nzira ija i Zerera, zishika no ku rubibe rw’i Abeli‐mehola ahahereranye n’i Tabati." 
Judges7:23 Batabaza Abisirayeli bo mu Banafutali n’abo mu Basheri n’abo mu Bamanase bose, bōma inyuma y’Abamidiyani." 
Judges7:24 Gideyoni atuma intabaza mu mugamba wose w’Abefurayimu, kubabarira ngo bamanuke batege Abamidiyani, babatange ku majabukiro kurinda bashitsa i Beti‐bara no kuri Yorodani. Nukw Abefurayimu bose baratabara, babatanga ku majabukiro kurinda bashitsa i Beti‐bara no kuri Yorodani nyene." 
Judges7:25 Bafata abaganwa bompi b’Abamidiyani, Orebu na Zebu; Orebu bamwicira ku gitandara citwa Orebu nyene, Zebu bamwicira ahar’ ubgato baganiramwo vino, hitwa i Zebu; bakomeza kwōma inyuma y’Abamidiyani, bazanira Gideyoni imitwe ya Orebu na Zebu bayimusanza hakurya ya Yorodani." 
Judges8:1 Maz’ Abefurayimu babaza Gideyoni, bati Watubonyekw iki, cātumye utadutabaza ukija kurwana n’Abamidiyani? Baramutonganya cane." 
Judges8:2 Arabishura, ati Har’ ico nakoze gihwanye n’ ico mwakoze? Mbeg’ imizabibu Abefurayimu mwahumvye ntirengeye iy’ Ababiyezeri bimbuye?" 
Judges8:3 Erega ni mwebge Imana yahaye abo baganwa b’Abamidiyani, Orebu na Zebu, ibagabura mu maboko yanyu: none har’ ico nashoboye gukora gihwanye n’ico mwakoze? Avuze ivyo, uburake bari bamufitiye burahwama." 
Judges8:4 Nuko Gideyoni ashika kuri Yorodani, ajabukana na za ngabo ziri kumwe na we amajana atatu, zicōmye inyuma y’abansi, zinaniwe." 
Judges8:5 Ashitse i Sukoti abarira abaho, ati Ntabara mumpēmbūrire aba bantu tugendanye, kuko bananiwe, kandi turacakurikiranye abami b’Abamidiyani, Zeba na Salumuna." 
Judges8:6 Abatware b’i Sukoti baramwishura, bat’ Aho Zeba na Salumuna murabafise, bari mu maboko yanyu, ngo duhēmbūre ingabo zawe?" 
Judges8:7 Gideyoni arabishura, ati Nuko rero, Uhoraho ni yamara kugabura Zeba na Salumuna mu maboko yanje, nzoza mbashishaguze amahwa yo mw ishamba n’imibambangwe!" 
Judges8:8 Avayo, aja i Peniyeli, n’abaho ababgira nk’uko, na bo bamwishura nk’ukw ab’i Sukoti bamwishuye." 
Judges8:9 Nukw abgira ab’i Peniyeli, ati Ni nagaruka amahoro nzohomvagura uyu munara." 
Judges8:10 Kandi Zeba na Salumuna bar’ i Karikori, hamwe n’ingabo zabo zishika nko ku bihumbi cumi na bitanu, ari zo zari zisigaye gusa mu ngabo zose z’ab’i burasirazuba, kuko mu rugamba hāri hāgūye ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri zizi kurwanisha inkota." 
Judges8:11 Maze Gideyoni adūgana inzira ica mu bībēra mu mahema hirya y’i Noba n’i Yogi‐beha ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, asanga izo ngabo zījajaye, arazitera." 
Judges8:12 Zeba na Salumuna barahunga, abōma inyuma, afata mpiri abo bami b’i Midiyani ukw ari babiri, aca igikuba ingabo zabo zose." 
Judges8:13 Nuko Gideyoni mwene Yowasi agarukira ku mudūgo w’i Heresi, aratabāruka." 
Judges8:14 Ahūra n’umusore wo mu b’i Sukoti, aramufata, aramudedaguza, na we aca amwandikira amazina y’abaganwa n’abakuru b’i Sukoti, bashika ku bantu mirongwirindwi n’indwi." 
Judges8:15 Ashitse i Sukoti abarira abaho, ati Ni murābe Zeba na Salumuna ngaba, aho mwari mukingaya, ngo Mbega Zeba na Salumuna aho murabafise, bari mu maboko yanyu, ngo duhēmbūre ingabo zawe zishonje?" 
Judges8:16 Nukw afata abakuru bo mur’ ico gisagara, aca amahwa yo mw ishamba n’imibambangwe, abishishaguza abo bantu b’i Sukoti." 
Judges8:17 Maz’ ahomvagura na wa munara w’i Peniyeli, yica abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara." 
Judges8:18 Maz’ abaza Zeba na Salumuna, ati Mbeg’ abantu mwiciye i Tabora bāsa bate? Baramwishura, bati Bāsa n’uko kwawe: umuntu wese yasa n’umwana w’ umwami." 
Judges8:19 Arababgira, ati Barya bār’ abo tuvukana, mbere bāri bene mama. Iyaba mwarabaretse, mbarahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, sinabica!" 
Judges8:20 Maz’ abarira imfura yiwe Yeteri, ati Va hasi ubice. Arik’ uyo muhungu ntiyubahuka gusokōra inkota, kuko yar’ akiri muto." 
Judges8:21 Nuko Zeba na Salumuna baravuga, bati Haguruka, abe ari wewe utwiyicira: urukāmvye rumara umugabo. Gideyoni aca ava hasi, yica Zeba na Salumuna, yambura ingamiya zabo ibihete vyari mu mazosi yazo." 
Judges8:22 Maz’ Abisirayeli babarira Gideyoni, bati N’utuganze, wewe ubgawe, n’umwana wawe az’ atuganze, n’umwuzukuru wawe, kuko wadukijije, ukadukūra mu maboko y’Abamidiyani." 
Judges8:23 Gideyoni arabishura, at’ Eka sinemeye kubaganza, n’umwana wanje ntazobaganza; arik’ Uhoraho ni we azobaganza." 
Judges8:24 Maz’ arababarira, ati Mugabo, har’ ico mbasaba: umuntu wese n’ampe impeta zo ku matwi yanyaze. (Abo bansi bari bambaye impeta z’izahabu ku matwi, kuko bār’ Abishimayeli.)" 
Judges8:25 Baramwishura, bati Turaziguha cane. Nuko basasa impuzu hasi, umuntu wese atererakw impeta zo ku matwi yanyaze." 
Judges8:26 Kandi kuriba kw’izo mpeta z’izahabu kwari shekeli igihumbi n’amajana ndwi, udashizemw’ ibihete n’utugenegene n’impuzu z’inyambarabami, ivy’ abo bami b’i Midiyani bambara, udashizemwo n’imigufu yari ku mazosi y’ingamiya zabo." 
Judges8:27 Maz’ izo zahabu Gideyoni azikoramw’ icitwa efodi, ayishira mu gisagara c’i wabo Ofura; maz’ Abisirayeli bose bahondoganirayo, bayihurumbira nk’ibimaka; ihindukira Gideyoni n’abiwe umutego." 
Judges8:28 Nukw Abamidiyani bamarwa igabo n’Abisirayeli: ntibāsubira kuvyutsa umutwe ukundi; mu gihe ca Gideyoni igihugu gihabga impore kumara imyaka mirongwine. 
Judges8:29 Nuko Yerubayali mwene Yowasi, ari we Gideyoni, ni kwo gutaha, yībēra i muhira;" 
Judges8:30 kand’ abahungu yivyariye bāri mirongwirindwi, kuko yar’ afise abagore benshi." 
Judges8:31 Kandi yar’ afise incoreke i Shekemu, na yo ayivyarak’ umwana w’umuhungu amwita Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Nuko Gideyoni mwene Yowasi apfa yīsāziye neza, bamuhamba mu mva yahambgemwo se Yowasi, ku musozi Ofura w’Ababiyezeri." 
Judges8:33 Maze Gideyoni apfuye, Abisirayeli baca bahindukirira za Bayali, bazihurumbira nk’ibimaka, kandi Bayali‐beriti bayigira imana yabo." 
Judges8:34 Maze ntibaba bacibuka Uhoraho Imana yabo, yabakijije akabakūra mu maboko y’abansi babo bose bāri babakikije." 
Judges8:35 Kandi ntibagirira neza ab’ inzu ya Yerubayali, ari we Gideyoni, ngo bamwishure ineza yose yari yarabagiriye." 
Judges9:1 Maze Abimeleki mwene Yerubayali aja i Shekemu kwa ba inarume, avugana na bo n’abo mu nzu ya sekuru avyara nyina, arababarira," 
Judges9:2 at’ Enda ni mumbarize ab’i Shekemu bose, mut’ Icobamerera neza n’iki? N’uko mwotwarwa na bene Yerubayali bose ukw ari mirongwirindwi, canke n’uko mwotwarwa n’umwe? Kandi muribuka yuko nd’ akavata kanyu n’akara kanyu." 
Judges9:3 Ba inarume baragenda bīgānira ayo majambo yose ab’i Shekemu bose; na bo imitima yabo baca bayishira kuri Abimeleki, bati Na kare yari mwishwa wacu." 
Judges9:4 Bamuha intete z’ifeza mirongwirindwi bakūye mu ngoro ya Bayali‐beriti; Abimeleki azihēra abantu b’imburakimazi kandi b’inshirukanya, bāgendana na we." 
Judges9:5 Aja i wabo i Ofura, yica bene se, ari bo bene Yerubayali, abakererera kw ibuye rimwe; ariko Yotamu umuhererezi wa Yerubayali, ararokoka, kuko yaciye yinyegeza." 
Judges9:6 Maz’ abantu bose b’i Shekemu bakoranira hamwe n’ab’ inzu ya Milo bose, baja kwimikira Abimeleki musi y’igiti c’umweloni cari mu gitabo i Shekemu." 
Judges9:7 Maze Yotamu avyumvise, aragenda ahagarara ku mpinga y’ umusozi Gerizimu, asemerera n’ ijwi rirenga, aravuga, ati Yemwe bantu b’i Shekemu, ni munyumvirize, kugira ngw Imana namwe ibumvirize." 
Judges9:8 Kera ibiti vyari bigiye kwiyimikamw’ umwami wo kubiganza. Bibarira igiti c’umwelayo, biti Ba ari wewe utuganza." 
Judges9:9 Umwelayo uravyishura, uti Mbeg’ aho noheba amavuta yanje, kand’ ari yo atuma nubahwa n’Imana n’abantu, ngo nje kwirirwa ndahungabana hejuru y’ibiti?" 
Judges9:10 Maz’ ibiti bibarira umusukoni, biti N’uze weho utuganze." 
Judges9:11 Umusukoni uravyishura, uti Mbeg’ aho noheba uburyohe bganje n’insukoni zanje nziza, ngo nje kwirirwa ndahungabana hejuru y’ibiti?" 
Judges9:12 Maz’ ibiti bibarira umuzabibu, biti N’uze weho utuganze." 
Judges9:13 Umuzabibu uravyishura, uti Mbeg’ aho noheba vino yanje inezereza Imana n’abantu, ngo nje kwirirwa ndahungabana hejuru y’ibiti?" 
Judges9:14 Maz’ ibiti vyose bibarira umubambangwe, biti N’uze weho utuganze." 
Judges9:15 Umubambangwe wishura ivyo biti, ut’ Asangwa mugomba kunyimika vy’ukuri ngo mbe umwami wanyu, ni muze mwikinge mu gitutu canje; na ho bitabaye ivy’ ukuri, umuriro uzokwaduka mu mubambangwe, uyigize amasederi y’i Lebanoni." 
Judges9:16 Yotamu yungamwo, ati Mbeg’ aho mwakoze ivy’ ukuri n’ibibereye, kwimika Abimeleki? Aho mwagiriye neza Yerubayali n’ab’ inzu yiwe, mwamwishuye ivyo yar’ akwiye?" 
Judges9:17 Data ko yabarwanira ahevye amagara yiwe, akabakiza akabakūra mu maboko y’Abamidiyani;" 
Judges9:18 none mwebge ko mwakūriye hasi inzu yiwe, mukica abana biwe mirongwirindwi, mukabakererera kuri rya buye, mukaba mwimitse Abimeleki umwana w’umuja wiwe, kukw ari mwene wanyu, kugira ngw abe umwami w’ab’i Shekemu!" 
Judges9:19 None rero, asangwa mwakoreye Yerubayali n’inzu yiwe ivy’ ukuri n’ibibereye, enda ni munezererwe Abimeleki, na we abanezererwe!" 
Judges9:20 Na ho bitabaye birtyo, umuriro n’uve kuri Abimeleki, uyigize abantu b’i Shekemu n’ab’ inzu ya Milo; kand’ umuriro n’uve mu b’i Shekemu no mu b’inzu ya Milo, uyigize Abimeleki." 
Judges9:21 Maze Yotamu aca yiruka arahunga, aja i Beri, abayo, kuko yatinya Abimeleki mwene se." 
Judges9:22 Nuko Abimeleki amara imyaka itatu, ari we aganza Abisirayeli." 
Judges9:23 Maz’ Imana irungika impwemu mbi yo guteranya Abimeleki n’ abantu b’i Shekemu; nukw ab’i Shekemu baryaruka Abimeleki; 
Judges9:24 kugira ngw asubirizwe mu nkōko agatikizo yatikije bene Yerubayali mirongwirindwi, kandi ngw amaraso yabo akore Abimeleki nyene kubica, akore n’abantu b’i Shekemu bāfatanije na we aho yica bene se." 
Judges9:25 Maz’ ab’i Shekemu bashirah’ abantu bo kumuryamira ku mpinga z’imisozi, kandi bahāmburira abahita benshi bāca mur’ iyo nzira. Abimeleki arabibūrirwa." 
Judges9:26 Maze Gayali mwene Ebedi yimukana n’abo bavukana, baja i Shekemu; abantu b’i Shekemu baca baramwizigira." 
Judges9:27 Bukeye baja mu ndimiro, bimbura inzabibu zabo, barazigana, bagira umusi mukuru, binjira mu ngoro y’ikigirwamana cabo, bararya baranywa, bavuma Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Gayali mwene Ebedi aravuga, ati Abimeleki n’iki, kand’ ab’i Shekemu duhūriye hehe na we, vyotuma tumusaba? Mbeg’ uyo mwene Yerubayali, bo na Zebuli amutwarira, kera ntibāri bashumbiye Abanyahamori, ari we Sēshekemu nyene? None n’iki cotuma tumusaba?" 
Judges9:29 Icompa nkaba ari jewe mbaganza! Nokūraho Abimeleki! Nobarira Abimeleki, nti Gwiza ingabo zawe, uheze uze, uransanga!" 
Judges9:30 Zebuli umutware w’ico gisagara, yumvise amagambo ya Gayali mwene Ebedi, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa." 
Judges9:31 Atuma intumwa kwa Abimeleki mu mpisho, muti Gayali mwene Ebedi bo n’ ab’i wabo baje i Shekemu, kandi bariko barakugomeshereza igisagara." 
Judges9:32 Muti None rero, enda n’uhenge mw ijoro, mwe n’abantu muri kumwe, muze muryame mu mirima;" 
Judges9:33 muheze muhenge kare mu gatondo izuba rirashe, muvyuke mutere igisagara. Muti Maze Gayali n’abo bari kumwe ni baza kukurwanya, uzoshobora kubagirira uk’ ugomba." 
Judges9:34 Nuko Abimeleki ahenga mw ijoro, ahagurukana n’abantu bose bari kumwe na we, baja kuryamira i Shekemu, bīcīyemw’ imice ine." 
Judges9:35 Maze Gayali mwene Ebedi arasohoka, aragenda ahagarara kw irembo ry’igisagara; maze Abimeleki n’abo bari kumwe, bavyuka aho babunze mu gico." 
Judges9:36 Nuko Gayali ababonye, abarira Zebuli, at’ Ehe bariya bantu bamanuka ku mpinga y’umusozi! Zebuli aramwishura, at’ Ereg’ ubonye ibitutu vy’imisozi, uvyita abantu!" 
Judges9:37 Maze Gayali yongera kuvuga, at’ Ehe rāba, ngabariya n’abandi, bamanutse ku gahanamo, kandi n’ uwundi muce uzananye inzira yo ku giti c’umweloni w’abapfumu!" 
Judges9:38 Maze Zebuli aca aramubgira, ati Kwa kwihaya kwawe kuri hehe, aho wavuga, uti Abimeleki n’iki tukamusaba? Bariya si ba bantu wakēngēra? None seruka urwane na bo!" 
Judges9:39 Nuko Gayali arōngōra ingabo z’i Shekemu, aja kurwana na Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleki aramukinagiza, na we aratemēsha; benshi bagenda bahindikirana bakomeretse, kugeza no kw ishikiro ry’irembo ry’igisagara." 
Judges9:41 Nuko Abimeleki arāra i Aruma, maze Zebuli yirukana Gayali n’ ab’i wabo kugira ngo ntibasubire kuba i Shekemu." 
Judges9:42 Bukeye bgaho abantu baragenda baja mu mirima; Abimeleki barabimubarira. 
Judges9:43 Aca ajana ingabo ziwe, azicamw’ imice itatu, baryama mu mirima; maz’ abonye abantu ko bavuye mu gisagara, baca babakūrira hasi, barabarwanya." 
Judges9:44 Maze Abimeleki n’umuce wari kumwe na we birukira kw ishikiro ry’irembo, bahagararaho; iyindi mice ibiri yirukira abagiye mu mirima bose, barabarwanya." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleki yiriza uwo musi wose arwanya ico gisagara, aragitsinda, ageseza abari muri co, aragisangangura, akimēmēramw’ umunyu." 
Judges9:46 Maz’ abantu bose bo ku munara w’i Shekemu bumvise ivyo, baja kwinyegeza mu cumba co mu kuzimu musi y’ingoro y’ikigirwamana Beriti." 
Judges9:47 Abimeleki abarirwa yukw abantu bose bo ku munara w’i Shekemu bakoraniye hamwe. 
Judges9:48 Nuko Abimeleki adūga umusozi Salumoni bo n’abantu bose bari kumwe; ahitana incabiti, yicira inkwi, araziterura, azita ku rutugu; abgira abari kumwe na we, ati Nyaruka mugire uko ngize." 
Judges9:49 Nukw abantu bose bicira inkwi, bakurikira Abimeleki, bazirunda kuri ca cumba, bakibaturirako. Nukw abantu bose bo mu munara w’i Shekemu na bo barapfa, bose na bose abagabo n’abagore bari nk’igihumbi." 
Judges9:50 Maze Abimeleki aja i Tebesi, asagaza inyuma yaho, arahatera, arahatsinda." 
Judges9:51 Ariko mur’ ico gisagara hār’ umunara ukomeye; ni ho abantu bose bo mur’ ico gisagara birukiye, abagabo n’abagore, bariyugarana, būrira mur’ uwo munara, baja hejuru kuri wo." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleki araza azibiriza uwo munara, yēgēra urugi rwawo ngw aruturire." 
Judges9:53 Maz’ umugore umwe mur’ abo atera Abimeleki ingasire mu ruhanga, ararusāvya." 
Judges9:54 Aca ahamagara umuhungu w’umusore amutwaje ibirwanishwa, ati Sokōra inkota yawe, umpohoshe, boye kuzovuga, ngo Yishwe n’umugore. Nuk’ uwo muhungu aramusogota, arapfa." 
Judges9:55 Maz’ Abisirayeli babonye Abimeleki apfuye, barataha, umuntu wese aja i we." 
Judges9:56 Uko ni kw Imana yashubirije Abimeleki mu nkōko, ku vyo yagiriye se, aho yamwicira abana mirongwirindwi;" 
Judges9:57 kand’ Imana yatumye ibibi vyose ab’i Shekemu bākoze bibasubira ku mutwe, wa muvumo wa Yotamu mwene Yerubayali ubashikako." 
Judges10:1 Hanyuma ya Abimeleki haza Tola mwene Puwa, Puwa wa Dodo, wo mu muryango wa Isakari, arahaguruka akiza Abisirayeli. Yaba i Shamiri mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu." 
Judges10:2 Amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’itatu ar’ umucamanza mu Bisirayeli; apfuye, bamuhamba i Shamiri nyene." 
Judges10:3 Hanyuma yiwe hahaguruka Yayiri w’Umugileyadi; amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri ar’ umucamanza mu Bisirayeli. 
Judges10:4 Kandi yar’ afise abahungu mirongwitatu, bagendera ku ndogoba mirongwitatu nyene, kandi bari bafise ibisagara mirongwitatu vyitwa Havoti‐yayiri, kandi ni ko bicitwa na bugingo n’ubu; biri mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi." 
Judges10:5 Yayiri apfuye, bamuhamba i Kamoni." 
Judges10:6 Maz’ Abisirayeli bongera gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, basaba za Bayali na za Ashitaroti, n’imana z’i Siriya n’iz’ i Sidoni n’iz’ i Mowabu n’iz’ Abamoni n’iz’ Abafilisitiya; bata Uhoraho, ntibaba bakimusaba." 
Judges10:7 Uburake bg’ Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli, abagabura mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya no mu y’ Abamoni." 
Judges10:8 Mur’ uwo mwaka bacuranguza Abisirayeli, barabahahaza; bamara imyaka cumi n’umunani bagirira nabi Abisirayeli bose bo hakurya ya Yorodani mu gihugu c’Abamori i Gileyadi." 
Judges10:9 Hanyuma Abamoni bajabuka Yorodani baja gutera n’Abayuda na bo n’Ababenyamini n’ab’ umuryango w’Abefurayimu, bituma Abisirayeli babura epfo na ruguru." 
Judges10:10 Maz’ Abisirayeli batakambira Uhoraho, bati Twagucumuyeko, kuko twakuvuyeko ari wewe Imana yacu, tugasaba za Bayali." 
Judges10:11 Uhoraho yishura Abisirayeli, ati Mbega si jewe nagenda mbakiza Abanyegiputa n’Abamori n’Abamoni n’Abafilisitiya?" 
Judges10:12 Kandi hamwe Abasidoni n’Abamaleki n’Abamayoni bābahahaza, mukantakambira, nagenda mbarokora nkabakūra mu maboko yabo." 
Judges10:13 Yamara, ko mwamvuyeko, mukaja gusaba izindi mana, ni co gituma ntongera kubakiza." 
Judges10:14 Ni mugende mutakambire za mana mwitoranirije, abe ari zo zibakiza mu gihe c’amagorwa yanyu." 
Judges10:15 Abisirayeli bishura Uhoraho, bati Twaracumuye koko, none n’utugire uk’ ugomba: mugabo, wemere kudukiza iri rimwe gusa." 
Judges10:16 Baraheza bakūraho izo mana z’inyamahanga, basubira gusaba Uhoraho, na we aca agira ikigumbagumba mu mutima kubgo kubona imibabaro y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges10:17 Maz’ Abamoni bakoranira hamwe, basagaza i Gileyadi, Abisirayeli na bo barakorana, basagaza i Misipa." 
Judges10:18 Abantu baravugana, ari bo bakuru b’i Gileyadi, bati Ni nde yotangura gusomboroza Abamoni? Uwoboneka azohabga ubukuru mu b’i Gileyadi bose." 
Judges11:1 Maze hāri Yefuta w’Umugileyadi, kandi yar’ umuhizi w’inkomezi; yari yavutse kuri maraya, yamuvyaweko na Gileyadi." 
Judges11:2 Ariko muka Gileyadi bari baravyaranye abandi bahungu; abo bamaze gukura, bāri bārirukanye Yefuta, bati Nta co uteze mu vya data, kuko wavutse ku mugore w’ icangazi." 
Judges11:3 Maze Yefuta aca ahunga bene se, aragenda aba mu gihugu c’i Tobu; abantu b’ imburakimazi bakoranira kuri we, bakagenda bambura abantu." 
Judges11:4 Igihe kiragera, Abamoni ni kwo gutera Abisirayeli." 
Judges11:5 Maze babateye, abakuru b’i Gileyadi baragenda ngo bakūre Yefuta mu gihugu c’i Tobu;" 
Judges11:6 baramubarira, bati N’uze ube umugabisha wacu, tubone kurwanya Abamoni." 
Judges11:7 Yefuta yishura abakuru b’i Gileyadi, ati Mbega si mwebge mwanyanse, mukanyirukana mu rugo rwa data? None muhenga mugowe mukaza iyo ndi?" 
Judges11:8 Maz’ abakuru b’i Gileyadi baramwishura, bati Noneh’ igitumye tuza iy’ uri n’ukugira ng’ ujane natwe, urwanye Abamoni; uzoheza ube umukuru wacu, uganze ababa i Gileyadi bose." 
Judges11:9 Yefuta arababaza, ati None ni mwansubiza i wacu kurwana n’Abamoni, Uhoraho akampa kubatsinda, nzoheza mbe umukuru wanyu koko?" 
Judges11:10 Abo bakuru b’i Gileyadi baramwishura, bat’ Uhoraho abaye icabona hagati yacu, yuko tuzoshitsa ivyo uvuze." 
Judges11:11 Nuko Yefuta ajana n’abo bakuru b’i Gileyadi, abantu bamugira umugabisha wabo n’umukuru wo kubaganza; Yefuta asubira muri ya majambo yiwe yose imbere y’Uhoraho i Misipa." 
Judges11:12 Maze Yefuta atuma intumwa ku mwami w’Abamoni, muti Ngo Mupfa iki, gitumye umukūriye hasi, ukaza gutera igihugu ciwe?" 
Judges11:13 Umwami w’Abamoni yishura intumwa za Yefuta, uti N’ukw Abisirayeli, bamaze kuva muri Egiputa, banyaze igihugu ciwe uhereye ku ruzi Arunoni ugashitsa kuri Yaboki no kuri Yorodani. Uti None rero, n’umusubize ivyo bihugu ku neza." 
Judges11:14 Yefuta yongera gutuma intumwa ku mwami w’Abamoni," 
Judges11:15 ziramubgira, ziti Yefuta ngw Abisirayeli si bo bānyaze igihugu c’i Mowabu cank’ igihugu c’Abamoni," 
Judges11:16 ut’ Arikw Abisirayeli, igihe bādūga bava muri Egiputa, bāciye mu bugaragwa bashika ku Kiyaga Gitukura; hanyuma bashika i Kadeshi." 
Judges11:17 Ut’ Abisirayeli baraheza batuma intumwa ku mwami wa Edomu kumwinginga ngw abareke bahite mu gihugu ciwe, arik’ umwami wa Edomu ntiyabakundira. Uti Batuma no ku mwami w’i Mowabu nk’uko nyene, na we nyene aranka. Uti Nukw Abisirayeli baguma i Kadeshi." 
Judges11:18 Uti Hanyuma baca mu bugaragwa, bagendana urubibe rw’igihugu ca Edomu n’ic’ i Mowabu, bashika ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba rw’igihugu c’i Mowabu, basagaza hakurya ya Arunoni; ut’ Ariko ntibārenze urubibe rw’i Mowabu, uti Kuko Arunoni ari rwo rwar’ urubibe rwaho." 
Judges11:19 Uti Maz’ Abisirayeli batuma intumwa kuri Sihoni umwami w’Abamori yaba i Heshiboni, uti Kumwinginga ngw abareke bahite mu gihugu ciwe, baje mu cabo." 
Judges11:20 Ut’ Ariko Sihoni ntiyabashirwako ngw abareke bahite mu gihugu ciwe; ut’ Arikw akoranya ingabo ziwe zose, abategera i Yahasi, arabarwanya." 
Judges11:21 Uti Maz’ Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli agabura Sihoni n’ ingabo ziwe zose mu maboko y’Abisirayeli, barabatsinda. Uti Nukw Abisirayeli bashikīra igihugu cose c’Abamori bāba mur’ ico gihugu." 
Judges11:22 Bashikīra igihugu cose c’Abamori, uhereye kuri Arunoni ugashitsa kuri Yaboki, uhereye no mu bugaragwa ugashitsa kuri Yorodani." 
Judges11:23 Uti Non’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, ko yasohoye Abamori ngo babise abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli, uti None ni wewe wohabāka?" 
Judges11:24 Uti Non’ igihugu imana yawe Kemoshi yoguha, ntiwocegukira? Uti Na bo n’uko, igihugu Uhoraho Imana yabo yasohoyemwo bene co bose ngo bababise, bāracegukiye." 
Judges11:25 Uti Mbeg’ uraruta Balaki mwene Sipori umwami w’i Mowabu? Uti Har’ aho yigeze aja impaka n’Abisirayeli? Uti Har’ aho yarwanye na bo? 
Judges11:26 Ut’ Abisirayeli ko bamaze imyaka amajana atatu baba i Heshiboni no mu dusagara tuhakūkira, n’i Aroweri no mu dusagara tuhakūkira, no mu bisagara vyose vyo kuri Arunoni; uti None n’iki cababujije kubisubirana mur’ ico gihe cose?" 
Judges11:27 Uti We nta co agukoreye, ni wewe umugiriye nabi k’uje kumutera. Ut’ Uhoraho Umucamanza uyu musi ni yerekane Abisirayeli n’Abamoni abatsinze ab’ ari bo." 
Judges11:28 Arik’ umwami w’Abamoni ntiyaruha yumva amajambo Yefuta yamutumyeko. 
Judges11:29 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aza kuri Yefuta, na we anyuranganya i Gileyadi no mu bg’aba Manase, aca i Misipe h’i Gileyadi, avay’ aragenda ngw aje mu Bamoni." 
Judges11:30 Maze Yefuta asezeranira Uhoraho isezerano, ati Ni wagabura Abamoni mu maboko yanje," 
Judges11:31 ngatabaruka amahoro mvuye kurwana na bo, ūzobanza gusohoka mu nzu yanje kunsanganira, azoba uwawe, Uhoraho, nanje nzomutanga kw ikimazi c’ukwoswa." 
Judges11:32 Nuko Yefuta ajabuka mu Bamoni, arabatera; Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko yiwe." 
Judges11:33 Arabatikiza uhereye i Aroweri ugashitsa i Miniti, atsinda ibisagara mirongwibiri, arinda ashitsa i Abeli‐keramimu; kaba agatikizo gakomeye. Uko ni kw Abamoni bāmazwe igabo n’Abisirayeli." 
Judges11:34 Maze Yefuta aratabaruka, aja i Misipa; ashitse i we, umwana wiwe w’umwigeme asohoka kumusanganira afise udushāko tw’ ingoma, arikw aratamba, atārīka. Kand’ uwo mwana wiwe yar’ ikinege: nta muhungu nta mwigeme wundi yar’ afise, atar’ uyo gusa." 
Judges11:35 Amubonye, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, ati Mbonye ibara, mwana wanje! Urambabaje, ungiriye nabi! Kuko navyīkūriye mu kanwa, nkabibarira Uhoraho, none sinshobora kwivuguruza." 
Judges11:36 Aramwishura, ati Data, ko vyakwīvīriye mu kanwa ukabibarira Uhoraho, n’ungenze nk’uko wavuze; kazima Uhoraho yaguhaye kwīhōra abansi bawe b’Abamoni." 
Judges11:37 Kand’ abarira se, ati Mugabo har’ ico ngusaba: ube urandetse amezi abiri, ngende ku misozi, twe na bagenzi banje, ndirire ubukumi bganje." 
Judges11:38 Se aramwishura, ati Genda. Aramusezera ngw aje kumara amezi abiri. Ajana na bagenzi be, aririra ubukumi bgiwe mu misozi." 
Judges11:39 Maz’ amezi abiri ashize, agaruka kwa se, na we amugenza nk’ukw isezerano yasezeranye riri; kandi ntiyari yarīgeze kumenya icitwa umugabo. Bica biba umugenzo mu Bisirayeli, uk’ umwaka utashe:" 
Judges11:40 abigeme b’Abisirayeli bama bagenda kwibuka uwo mukobga wa Yefuta w’Umugileyadi, bamuririra imisi ine mu mwaka mu mwaka." 
Judges12:1 Maz’ Abefurayimu barakorakorana, baja i burārūko, babaza Yefuta, bati N’iki catumye uja kurwana n’Abamoni, ntudutabaze? Tuzoguturirira mu nzu!" 
Judges12:2 Yefuta arabishura, ati Twe n’abantu banje twari tugishāmiranye n’Abamoni, maze ngo ndabatabaze ntimwāza kudutabara ngo muturwanire." 
Judges12:3 Maze mbonye ko mwanse kudutabara nca nīrya uko ndi, ndajabuka ndwana n’ Abamoni, Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko yanje. None n’iki gitumye uyu musi muza kurwana nanje?" 
Judges12:4 Maze Yefuta akoranya ingabo zose z’i Gileyadi, barwana n’Abefurayimu; Abagileyadi banesha Abefurayimu, barabica, kuko bavuze, bati Mur’ incīke z’ Abefurayimu, mwa Bagileyadi mwe, mwacitse ku Befurayimu no ku Bamanase!" 
Judges12:5 Abagileyadi bazibira ivyambu vya Yorodani ngo batege Abefurayimu; maz’ ūcitse wo mu Befurayimu yahashika, ati Ndeka njabuke, Abagileyadi bakamubaza, bat’ Ur’ Umwefurayimu? Yavuga, at’ Oya!" 
Judges12:6 bagaca bamubarira, bati None rero vuga Shiboleti. Na we akavuga, ati Siboleti; kukw adashobora kurishitsa neza; bagaca bamufata, bakamwicira aho nyene ku cambu ca Yorodani. Ico gihe hapfa Abefurayimu ibihumbi mirongwine na bibiri." 
Judges12:7 Nuko Yefuta amara imyaka itandatu ar’ umucamanza w’Abisirayeli. Maze Yefuta uwo Mugileyadi araheza arapfa, bamuhamba mu gisagara c’i wabo c’i Gileyadi." 
Judges12:8 Yefuta akurikirwa na Ibusani w’i Betelehemu, aba umucamanza w’Abisirayeli." 
Judges12:9 Yar’ afise abahungu mirongwitatu n’abakobga mirongwitatu; abo bakobga abashingira mu yindi miryango, asabira abahungu biwe abageni mirongwitatu nyene bavuye mu yindi miryango. Amara imyaka ndwi acira imanza Abisirayeli." 
Judges12:10 Ibusani araheza arapfa, bamuhamba i Betelehemu." 
Judges12:11 Akurikirwa na Eloni wo mu Bazebuloni, aba umucamanza w’ Abisirayeli; amara imyaka cumi abacira imanza." 
Judges12:12 Eloni uwo, wo mu Bazebuloni, araheza arapfa, bamuhamba i Ayaloni mu gihugu c’Abazebuloni." 
Judges12:13 Akurikirwa na Abudoni mwene Hileli w’Umunyapiratoni, na we acira imanza Abisirayeli." 
Judges12:14 Kandi yar’ afise abahungu mirongwine n’abuzukuru mirongwitatu, bāgendera ku ndogoba mirongwirindwi; amara imyaka munani acira imanza Abisirayeli." 
Judges12:15 Abudoni mwene Hileli w’ Umunyapiratoni araheza arapfa, bamuhamba i Piratoni nyene mu gihugu c’Abefurayimu, ku musozi Amaleki." 
Judges13:1 Maz’ Abisirayeli bongera gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi; Uhoraho abatanga mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya kumara imyaka mirongwine. 
Judges13:2 Kandi hār’ umuntu w’i Sora wo mu muryango w’Abadani, yitwa Manowa. Umugore wiwe yar’ ingumba itigeze kuvyara." 
Judges13:3 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho yiyereka uwo mugore, aramubarira, ati Rāba ur’ ingumba, ntiwigeze kuvyara; arik’ uzosama inda, uvyare umwana w’umuhungu." 
Judges13:4 None rero, uz’ uzire akaziri ntunywe vino cank’ ikiboreza na kimwe, kandi ntuz’ urye ikintu na kimwe gihumanya;" 
Judges13:5 kukw ehe rāba, ugiye gusama inda, uvyare umwana w’umuhungu; kandi ntihaze hagire urupfuhe rumugera ku mutwe; kuk’ uwo mwana azoba Umunaziri ku Mana uhereye akiva mu nda; kandi ni we azotangura kurokora Abisirayeli, abakūre mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya." 
Judges13:6 Uwo mugore aragenda, abibarira umugabo wiwe, at’ Umuntu w’Imana yaje aho ndi; kandi mu maso hiwe hāsa n’ah’ umumarayika w’Imana, kandi hateye ubgoba cane. Ariko sinamubajije iy’ avuye, na we ntiyambgiye izina ryiwe." 
Judges13:7 Ariko yambariye ngo nzosama inda, mvyare umuhungu; kandi ngo none nze nzire akaziri sinze nnywe vino cank’ ikiboreza na kimwe canke ngo ndye ikintu na kimwe gihumanya, ngo kuk’ uwo mwana azoba Umunaziri ku Mana uhereye akiva mu nda ngo gushitsa ku musi azopfirako." 
Judges13:8 Maze Manowa yinginga Uhoraho, ati Bgirukiro, ndakwinginze, wa muntu wawe wadutumako ni yongere agaruke kuri twebge, atubarire uko tuzogenza uwo mwana azovuka." 
Judges13:9 Nukw Imana yemerera Manowa; maz’ uwo mumarayika w’Imana asubira kugaruka aho wa mugore ari, amusanga aho yari yicaye mu murima; ariko Manowa umugabo wiwe ntiyari kumwe na we." 
Judges13:10 Nuk’ uwo mugore aca aranyaruka, arirukanga, abibgira umugabo wiwe, ati Wa muntu yaza bga bundi yongeye kunyiyereka." 
Judges13:11 Maze Manowa ava hasi, akurikira umugore wiwe; ashikiriye uwo muntu aramubaza, ati Mbega ni wewe wavuganye n’uyu mugore? Na we ati Ni jewe." 
Judges13:12 Manowa aramubaza, at’ Ivyo wavuze ni vyashika, uwo mwana tuzomurera dute? Azokora iki?" 
Judges13:13 Uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho yishura Manowa, at’ Ivyo nabariye uyu mugore vyose, az’ avyirinde:" 
Judges13:14 ntaz’ arye ku kintu na kimwe kivuye ku muzabibu, ntaz’ anywe vino cank’ ikiboreza na kimwe, canke ngw arye ikintu na kimwe gihumanya; ivyo namubariye vyose az’ avyitondere." 
Judges13:15 Maze Manowa abarira uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho, ati Ndakwinginze, banza uhagarare, tukubāgire agasuguru." 
Judges13:16 Uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Nah’ umpagaritse nta co ndiburye ku vyo kurya vyawe; ariko namb’ ugomba kubāga ikimazi co kwosa, ugishikanire Uhoraho. Ariko Manowa ntiyaribgamenye kw ar’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho." 
Judges13:17 Maze Manowa abaza uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho, ati Witwa nde, kugira ngw ivyo wavuze ni vyashika tuze tugushemagize?" 
Judges13:18 Uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Umbariza iki izina ryanje, kw ar’ izina ritangaje?" 
Judges13:19 Nuko Manowa yābīra iyo suguru y’impene n’ishikanwa ry’ifu, abishikanirira Uhoraho hejuru ku gitandara; haca haba igitangaza, Manowa n’umugore wiwe babirorēra:" 
Judges13:20 umuriro wo ku gicaniro ukiriko urarabagiza uja hejuru, wa mumarayika w’Uhoraho adūga mur’ uwo muriro wo ku gicaniro, Manowa n’umugore wiwe babirorēra; baca barapfukama, barūnama." 
Judges13:21 Kuva ubgo, uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho ntiyongeye kwiyereka Manowa cank’ umugore wiwe ukundi. Nuko Manowa amenya kw ar’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho." 
Judges13:22 Maze Manowa abarira umugore wiwe, ati Nta kabuza turapfuye, kuko tubonye Imana!" 
Judges13:23 Arik’ umugore wiwe aramwishura, at’ Iyaba Uhoraho yagomba kutwica, ntaba yātwākīriye ikimazi cacu coshejwe bo n’ishikanwa ryacu ry’ifu, kandi ntaba yātweretse ivyo vyose, canke ngw atubarire amajambo ameze nk’ayo." 
Judges13:24 Hanyuma uwo mugore avyara umwana w’umuhungu, amwita Samusoni; uwo mwana arakura, Uhoraho amuha umugisha." 
Judges13:25 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho atangura kumucānīra ar’ i Mahane‐dani, hagati y’i Sora n’i Eshitayoli." 
Judges14:1 Samusoni aramanuka aja i Timuna; abonay’ umwigeme wo mu Bafilisitiyakazi. 
Judges14:2 Maz’ aradūga, abarira se na nyina, ati Nabonye umwigeme i Timuna w’Umufilisitiyakazi: none ni mumunsabire." 
Judges14:3 Se na nyina baramwishura, bati Mbega nta mwigeme n’umwe ari mu b’i wanyu canke mu b’iki gihugu, igitumye uja gusaba umugeni mu Bafilisitiya batākebge? Ariko Samusoni yishura se, ati Nsabira uyo, kukw ari we nagomwe." 
Judges14:4 Ariko se na nyina ntibāri bāzi ko bivuye k’Uhoraho; kuko yarondera inyanduruko ku Bafilisitiya. Kand’ ico gihe Abafilisitiya ni bo bāganza Abisirayeli. 
Judges14:5 Hanyuma Samusoni amanukana na se na nyina, baja i Timuna; ashitse mu mizabibu yaho, ahūra n’umugunza w’intambge, iramutontomera." 
Judges14:6 Maze Mpwemu w’ Uhoraho amuzako akābushungwe, arayitabagura nk’uwotabagura umwagazi w’impene, kandi yar’ imbokoboko. Ariko ntiyabgira se canke nyina ico akoze." 
Judges14:7 Araheza aramanuka, ayāga n’uwo mwigeme, yumva amuhimbaye." 
Judges14:8 Bukeye asubiyeyo kurongora, akebereza ha handi kurāba wa muvyimba w’intambge; asanga ikirangara, inzuki zakiremeyemwo ziri n’ubūki." 
Judges14:9 Arabuhakura, abushira mu minwe, agenda araburya; ashikiriye se na nyina, abubahako, na bo baraburya; ariko ntiyababgira kw abukūye mu kirangara c’intambge." 
Judges14:10 Se amanutse i wabo w’uwo mwigeme, Samusoni arondeza amazimano y’ubukwe, kukw abasore ari wo war’ umugenzo wabo." 
Judges14:11 Bamubonye, bamuzanira abagenzi mirongwitatu ngo babe baragumanye na we." 
Judges14:12 Maze Samusoni arababgira, ati Hinge mbasōkōze igisōkōranyo; ni mwashobora kugipfīndūra, mukakinsobanurira, iyi misi ndwi yo kuba mu nkinga itarashira, nzoheza mbahe imikenyero yera mirongwitatu n’ impuzu zo gukūranya mirongwitatu nyene;" 
Judges14:13 ariko ni cabananira, ni mwebge muzompa imikenyero yera mirongwitatu n’impuzu zo gukūranya mirongwitatu nyene. Baramwishura, bati Dusōkōze, twumve igisōkōranyo cawe." 
Judges14:14 Arababgira, ati Mu muryi hāvuyemw’ ivyo kurya, Mu munyenkomezi hāvuyemw’ ibisōsa. Bamara imisi itatu bananiwe kugisobanura." 
Judges14:15 Maze ku musi ugira kane babarira muka Samusoni, bati Genda uhendahende umugabo wawe, udusobanurize ico gisōkōranyo, ntiduhave tuza tukaguturirana n’urugo rwa so. Mbega mwaduhamagariye kunyaga utwacu?" 
Judges14:16 Nuko muka Samusoni amuririra imbere, aramubarira, at’ Ereg’ uranyanka gusa, ntunkunda; ko wasōkōje ab’i wacu igisōkōranyo, ntukimbarire. Aramwishura, at’ Erega na data na mama sinakibabariye, none nokibarira wewe?" 
Judges14:17 Arangiza iyo misi ndwi bari mu nkinga amuririra imbere; maze ku musi ugira indwi arakimubarira, kuko yamujigirije: na we aca abarira ab’i wabo ico gisōkōranyo." 
Judges14:18 Maze kur’ uwo musi ugira indwi nyene, izuba ritararenga, abo mu gisagara baramubarira, bati N’iki corusha ubūki gusōsa? canke n’iki corusha intambge inkomezi? Na we arabishura, at’ Iyaba mutarimishije inka yanje, Ntimuba mupfīndūye igisōkōranyo canje!" 
Judges14:19 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amuzako akābushungwe, aramanuka aja i Ashikeloni, yicayo abantu mirongwitatu, abakoba imyambaro yabo, aha bamwe bāpfīndūye ca gisōkōranyo imyambaro yo gukūranya. Araheza arīvumbura, adūga kwa se asuguriwe." 
Judges14:20 Ariko muka Samusoni bamuha umwe wo muri ba bandi bagenzi ba Samusoni, uwo yari yātoye kuba mukuru." 
Judges15:1 Maz’ igihe gihise, hageze mw igenya ry’ingano, Samusoni asubira iy’ umugore ari, ajanye agasuguru k’impene. Aravuga, ati Hinge nje iy’ umugore wanje ari, haruguru; ariko sebukwe ntiyamukundira kujayo." 
Judges15:2 Aramubgira, at’ Erega nagira ngo waramwanse rwose; ni co catumye ndamuha umwe muri bagenzi bawe. Mbega murumuna we si we anamurusha ubgiza? Enda mujane mu gishingo ciwe." 
Judges15:3 Samusoni arababgira, at’ Ubu ho nta kizombako ku vy’Abafilisitiya, ni naramuka ndabagiriye nabi." 
Judges15:4 Nuko Samusoni aragenda afata imbgebge amajana atatu, ahambira ivyatsi vyo gukongerezak’ umuriro; araheza izo mbgebge azitumberanya imirizo, agenda abohera ivyo vyatsi ku mirizo ibiri‐ibiri." 
Judges15:5 Amaze kudomeka ivyo vyatsi, azirekurira mu mirima y’ingano z’Abafilisitiya; uwo muriro ugenda uratōngōra kuva ku mikama itēkeye no ku ngano zigihagaze gushitsa no ku mirima y’imyelayo." 
Judges15:6 Maz’ Abafilisitiya barabaza, bati Ni nde yakoze ivyo? Bati Ni Samusoni, umukwe wa wa Munyatimuna, kuko yamwātse umugore wiwe akamushingira uwundi. Nukw Abafilisitiya baca baradūga, uwo mugore bamuturirana na se." 
Judges15:7 Maze Samusoni arababarira, ati Ko mukoze murtyo, sinzogenda ntabīhōye! Ariko ni naheza kubīhōra nzorekeraho." 
Judges15:8 Aca arabahindikiranya, arabatikiza bikomeye; araheza aramanuka, aja kuba mu gihoro co mu gitandara c’ahitwa Etamu." 
Judges15:9 Maz’ Abafilisitiya baradūga, basagaza mu Buyuda, baragandagaza, barinda bashika i Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Ab’i Buyuda barababaza, bati N’iki kibazanye kudutera? Barabishura, bati Tuzanywe no gufata Samusoni ngo tumubohe, tumugirire nk’ivyo yatugiriye." 
Judges15:11 Maz’ abantu b’i Buyuda ibihumbi bitatu baca baramanuka, basanga Samusoni muri ca gihoro co mu gitandara c’ahitwa Etamu; baramubaza, bati Mbega ntuzi yukw Abafilisitiya ari bo batuganza? Non’ ivyo udukoreye n’ibiki? Arabishura, at’ Erega kwar’ ukubasubiriza mu nkōko ivyo bāngiriye." 
Judges15:12 Baramwishura, bat’ Ikituzanye n’ukugufata ngo tukubohe, tugutange mu maboko y’ Abafilisitiya. Samusoni arabishura, ati Ni mundahire ko mutanyica mwebge ubganyu." 
Judges15:13 Baramwishura, bat’ Oya, turakuboha gusa, tubagushikirize, ariko twebge ubgacu ntitukwica. Nuko bamubohesha imigozi misha ibiri, bamukūra mur’ ico gitandara baramudūgana." 
Judges15:14 Ashitse i Lehi, Abafilisitiya bamusanganiza urwamo. Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amuzako akābushūngwe, imigozi yar’ imuboshe amaboko ihinduka nk’ubugwēgwe bufashwe n’umuriro; ivyari bimuboshe ku bikonjo biravutagurika." 
Judges15:15 Abona urwāsaya rw’indogoba rutarūma, atuma ukuboko araruraha, arwicisha abantu igihumbi." 
Judges15:16 Maze Samusoni aravuga, at’ Urwāsaya rw’indogoba ndarurundishije ibirundo n’ ibirundo, Urwāsaya rw’indogoba ndarwicishije abantu igihumbi!" 
Judges15:17 Ahejeje kuvuga artyo, ashibura rwa rwāsaya yar’ afise mu minwe; aho hantu haca hitwa Ramati‐lehi." 
Judges15:18 Agwa umwūmwa, atakambira Uhoraho, ati Jewe umusavyi wawe ko wampaye uku kunesha gukomeye, none nicwe n’inyota, ngwe mu maboko y’ abatākebge?" 
Judges15:19 Maz’ ikinogo car’ i Lehi Imana iragisatura, amazi aradudubiza; nukw amaze kunywa, udutege turagaruka, arahēmbūka. Ni co catumye bacita Eni‐hakore: kiracar’ i Lehi na bugingo n’ubu." 
Judges15:20 Nukw amara imyaka mirongwibiri acira imanza Abisirayeli, mu gihe c’Abafilisitiya." 
Judges16:1 Maze Samusoni aja i Gaza, abonayo maraya, yinjira i we." 
Judges16:2 Babarira ab’i Gaza, bati Samusoni ashitse hano. Baramuryamira, barāra bamutegeye kw irembo ry’igisagara, bakēsha ijoro ryose banumye, bati Tubanze turorēre buce, duheze tumwice." 
Judges16:3 Ariko Samusoni ariryamira gushitsa mu gicugu; hageze mu gicugu aravyuka, afata inzugi z’ irembo ry’igisagara, n’ibikingi vyompi vy’irembo, abishingūra vyose hamwe n’igihindizo cavyo, abita ku bitugu, abidūgana ku mpinga y’umusozi urābana n’i Heburoni." 
Judges16:4 Hanyuma y’ivyo agomwa umugore yitwa Delila, yaba ku mwonga Soreki." 
Judges16:5 Maz’ abaganwa b’ Abafilisitiya baja iy’ uwo mugore ari, baramubarira, bati Genda umuhendahende, umenye ah’ inkomezi ziwe nyinshi ziva, n’uburyo twomushobora, kugira ngo tubone kumuboha, tumumare amanyama; nawe tuzoguha amafeza, umuntu wese igihumbi n’ ijana." 
Judges16:6 Nuko Delila abarira Samusoni, ati Ndakwinginze, mbarira ah’ inkomezi zawe nyinshi ziva, n’icoshobora kukuboha, ugashira amanyama." 
Judges16:7 Samusoni aramwishura, at’ Abombohesha imvuto ndwi zikiri mbisi zitarūma, noca mpinduka goyigoyi, nkamera nk’abandi." 
Judges16:8 Maz’ abo baganwa b’Abafilisitiya bazanira uwo mugore imvuto ndwi zikiri mbisi zitarūma, arazimubohesha." 
Judges16:9 Kand’ uwo mugore yar’ afise abantu babunze mu cumba c’imbere mu nzu; nukw aramubarira, ati Ngaho Samusoni, Abafilisitiya baragushikiriye! Arikw acagagura izo mvuto, nk’uk’ ubugwēgwe bucika bgumvise umuriro. Nukw inkomezi ziwe ntizamenyekana aho ziva." 
Judges16:10 Maze Delila abarira Samusoni, at’ Ereg’ urampenze, umbariye ibinyoma! Enda se, ndakwinginze, mbarira icoshobora kukuboha." 
Judges16:11 Aramwishura, ati Bombohesha imigozi misha itigeze gukoreshwa, noca mpinduka goyigoyi, nkamera nk’abandi." 
Judges16:12 Nuko Delila yābīra imigozi misha, arayimubohesha, aramubarira, ati Ngaho Samusoni, Abafilisitiya baragushikiriye! Kand’ abāmubundiye bāri mu cumba c’imbere mu nzu. Maze Samusoni aca acagagura iyo migozi imuboshe amaboko, nk’ūcagagura inyuzi." 
Judges16:13 Delila abarira Samusoni, ati Na non’ uracampenda, umbarira ibinyoma gusa! Ntabara umbarire icoshobora kukuboha. Aramwishura, at’ Ibitsibo ndwi vy’ umushatsi wanje wobijishira ku kijisha impuzu, vyoshoboka." 
Judges16:14 Nukw arabijisha, abigumisha urumambo, maz’ aramubarira, ati Ngaho Samusoni, Abafilisitiya baragushikiriye! Aca arakanguka, ashikura urwo rumambo rw’inshingiro hamwe n’ikijishirwakw impuzu." 
Judges16:15 Delila aramubarira, ati Wokagize ng’ Urankunda, kand’ ufise ivyo unkinga! Eh’ umpenze aka gatatu kose, wanka kumbarira ah’ inkomezi zawe nyinshi ziva." 
Judges16:16 Maz’ akomeje kumuzigiriza imisi yose, amukubakuba, abona kw atakimucanan’ uwāka." 
Judges16:17 Nukw amumenera impuri rwose, aramubarira, ati Nta rupfuhe rwigeze kugera ku mutwe wanje, kuko nabaye Umunaziri w’Imana uhereye nkiva mu nda ya mama; nomobga, inkomezi zanje zoca zimvako, ngahinduka goyigoyi, nkamera nk’abandi bose." 
Judges16:18 Nuko Delila abonye kw amumeneye impuri rwose, atuma guhamagaza ba baganwa b’Abafilisitiya, uti Ni mudūge iri rimwe gusa, uti Kuko yamumeneye impuri. Nukw abo baganwa b’Abafilisitiya baza iy’ ari, bāzanye ya mafeza." 
Judges16:19 Maze Delila amusinziriza ku bibero vyiwe; araheza ahamagara umuntu, amumwa vya bitsibo ndwi vy’umushatsi. Atangura guhinduka goyigoyi, inkomezi ziwe zimuvako." 
Judges16:20 Maz’ aramubarira, ati Ngaho Samusoni, Abafilisitiya baragushikiriye! Aca arakanguka, agira ngw arabakira nk’uko yahora, abīkunkumure. Ariko ntiyar’ azi yuk’ Uhoraho yamuretse." 
Judges16:21 Maz’ Abafilisitiya baramufata, bamunogora amaso, bamumanukana i Gaza, bamufatisha iminyororo y’imiringa, bamugira umusyi mu nzu y’imbohe." 
Judges16:22 Ariko naho bamumoye, umushatsi wiwe utangura gusubira kumera." 
Judges16:23 Hanyuma abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya bakoranira gutanga ibimazi vyinshi babiha Dagoni imana yabo no kunezerwa, kuko bāvuga, bat’ Imana yacu yagabuye umwansi wacu Samusoni mu maboko yacu." 
Judges16:24 Nukw abantu bamubonye batāzīra iyo mana yabo, bat’ Imana yacu yagabuye umwansi wacu mu maboko yacu, ari we yar’ umuranduzi w’igihugu cacu, yishe benshi muri twebge." 
Judges16:25 Maze bacuzuye umunezero, baravuga, bati Ni muhamagare Samusoni, tube turamwitwengera. Nuko baja guhamagara Samusoni, bamukūra mu nzu y’imbohe; ashitse imbere yabo baramwitwengera. Bamuhagarika hagati y’inkingi;" 
Judges16:26 maze Samusoni abarira umuhungu yar’ amufashe ukuboko, ati Njana numve ah’ inkingi ziri ziteze iyi nzu, mbe ndazegamiye." 
Judges16:27 Kand’ iyo nzu yari yuzuye abagabo n’abagore, n’abaganwa bose b’Abafilisitiya ni ho bāri bari; kandi no hejuru ku nzu hār’ abagabo n’abagore nk’ibihumbi bitatu, bāriko bararorēra bamwitwengera." 
Judges16:28 Maze Samusoni atakambira Uhoraho, at’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho, ndakwinginze nyibuka, umpe se inkomezi iri rimwe gusa, Mana, nsubirize Abafilisitiya mu nkōko aka kanya gusa, mpōre amaso yanje yompi." 
Judges16:29 Nuko Samusoni afata izo nkingi zompi zo hagati ziteze inzu, arazegamira, ukuboko kw’i buryo gufata imwe, ukw’ i bumoso iyindi." 
Judges16:30 Maz’ aravuga, ati Reka mpfane n’Abafilisitiya. Araheza arīkōngānya n’inkomezi ziwe zose, arazishika, inzu ihomvokera kuri ba baganwa no ku bantu bose bari muri yo. Nukw abo yishe mu gupfa kwiwe bāruta abo yishe akiriho." 
Judges16:31 Maz’ ab’i wabo n’abo kwa se bose baramanuka, bajana ikiziga ciwe, barakidūgana, bamuhamba hagati y’i Sora n’i Eshitayoli, ahantu aho se Manowa yahambge. Kandi Samusoni yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri acira imanza Abisirayeli." 
Judges17:1 Kandi hār’ umuntu wo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu yitwa Mika. 
Judges17:2 Abarira nyina, ati Za shekeli z’ifeza igihumbi n’ijana wari wibge, nkumva uvumana, ni jewe nazitwaye, ndazifise. Nyina aravuga, at’ Uragahezagirwa n’ Uhoraho, mwana wanje!" 
Judges17:3 Nukw asubiza nyina izo shekeli z’ ifeza igihumbi n’ijana; nyina aravuga, at’ Izi feza ndazēguriye Uhoraho ngo zibe izera, kugira ng’ uzironderemw’ igishushanyo kibājwe n’igishushanyo kivugutiye mu nkero, mwana wanje: none rero ndaziguhaye." 
Judges17:4 Nukw amaze gusubiza nyina izo feza, nyina ahitanamw’ amajana abiri, aziha umucuzi, azikūramw’ igishushanyo kibājwe n’igishushanyo kivugutiye mu nkero; babishira mu nzu ya Mika." 
Judges17:5 Uwo mugabo Mika yar’ afise akanyabugoro k’ibigirwamana; arondeza umwambaro witwa efodi na terafimu, yirobanurira umwe mu bahungu biwe ngw amubere umuherezi." 
Judges17:6 Mur’ iyo misi Abisirayeli nta mwami bāribgagire: umuntu wese yakora ico yigombeye. 
Judges17:7 Kandi hārih’ umusore w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda wo mu muryango wa Yuda w’Umulewi, yari yaje ngaho." 
Judges17:8 Yari yaravuye mur’ ico gisagara c’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda, aja kurondera ah’ aba; akirikw arāngāra mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu aserukira ku rugo rwa Mika." 
Judges17:9 Mika aramubaza, at’ Uva hehe? Aramwishura, ati Nd’ Umulewi w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda: ngenda ndondera aho mba." 
Judges17:10 Mika aramwishura, at’ Igumire ngaha i wanje, umbere umuvyeyi umbere n’umuherezi, nanje nzoguhemba shekeli cumi mu mwaka, n’impuzu n’ivyo kurya. Nuk’ uwo Mulewi aca arinjira," 
Judges17:11 yemera kubana na we; uwo musore amuhindukira nk’ umwe mu bana biwe. 
Judges17:12 Nuko Mika arobanura uwo Mulewi, ahinduka umuherezi wiwe, yībēra mu rugo rwiwe." 
Judges17:13 Maze Mika aravuga, ati Noneho mmenye yuk’ Uhoraho azongirira neza, kuko mfise Umulewi k’umuherezi." 
Judges18:1 Mur’ ico gihe Abisirayeli nta mwami bāribgagire. Kand’ ico gihe umuryango w’Abadani warik’ urironderera ishamvu yo kubamwo, kuko kugeza ico gihe ata shamvu bāribgaronke mu miryango yindi y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges18:2 Nukw Abadani batora mu muryango wabo wose abantu batanu barīndūka, bava i Sora n’i Eshitayoli, babatuma kuja gutata igihugu no kugisuzuma; barababarira, bati Ni mugende musuzume ico gihugu uko kimeze. Nuko baragenda, bīhēreza umugamba w’Abefurayimu, bashika ku rugo rwa Mika, ngw abe ari ho barāra." 
Judges18:3 Bacegereje kwa Mika, bamenya ijwi rya wa musore w’Umulewi, bakeberezayo, baramubaza, bati Ni nde yakuzanye ino? Ukora iki hano, kand’ uhatungiwe n’iki?" 
Judges18:4 Abadōndera uko Mika amutunze kwose, at’ Arampemba, nanje nd’ umuherezi wiwe." 
Judges18:5 Baramubarira, bat’ Enda se tubarize Imana, tumenye ko tuzogira amahirwe mu rugendo rwacu." 
Judges18:6 Uwo muherezi arabishura, ati Ni mugende uburarame: Uhoraho arabaragira mu rugendo rwanyu." 
Judges18:7 Nukw abo bantu ukw ari batanu baragenda, bashika i Layishi, bitegereza abantu baho, babona ingene bīrāye nk’ukw ab’ i Sidoni basanzwe bamera, bitekerereje ata co bīnona, ata co babuze mur’ ico gihugu, bifitiye ubutunzi; babona n’ingene baba kure y’ab’i Sidoni, n’ingene batifatanya n’umuntu wundi n’umwe." 
Judges18:8 Nukw abo batasi bahindukiye mu b’i wabo i Sora n’i Eshitayoli, barababaza, bati Muzanye inkuru ki?" 
Judges18:9 Barabishura, bati Ni mukūre hasi tuje kubatera, kuko twitegereje igihugu, kandi ni ciza cane. None mwopfa kwiyicarira ngaho? Ntimutebagane kuja kwinjira ico gihugu ngo mucegukire." 
Judges18:10 Nuko ni mwagenda, muzosanga abantu bīrāye; ico gihugu kirāgutse, kand’ Imana yakigabuye mu maboko yanyu. N’ahantu hadakennye ikintu na kimwe kiba mw isi." 
Judges18:11 Nukw abantu bo mu muryango wa Dani bashika ku majana atandatu barahaguruka, bava i Sora n’i Eshitayoli, bitwaje ibirwanishwa;" 
Judges18:12 baradūga, basagaza kuri Kiriyati‐yeyarimu i Buyuda. Ni co catumye aho hantu bahīta Mahane‐dani na bugingo n’ubu; hār’ ahahera i burengerazuba bg’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu." 
Judges18:13 Bavudukayo baca mu mugamba w’ Abefurayimu, baca kwa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Maze ba bandi ukw ari batanu bāri baragiye gutata igihugu c’i Layishi, babgira bagenzi babo, bati Harya murazi ko mur’ uru rugo harimwo efodi na terafimu n’igishushanyo kibājwe n’igishushanyo kivugutiye mu nkero? None rero ni mwiyumvire ico mwokora." 
Judges18:15 Bakeberezaho, bashika mu nzu ya wa musore w’ Umulewi mu rugo rwa Mika, baramuramutsa;" 
Judges18:16 ba bandi ukw ar’ amajana atandatu bo mu Badani bari bahagaze kw irembo, bitwaje ibirwanishwa vyabo." 
Judges18:17 Nuko bano ukw ari batanu bāri baratase ico gihugu, ni kwo kudūga bakinjira mu nzu, bagasahura ico gishushanyo kibājwe na efodi na terafimu na ca gishushanyo kivugutiye mu nkero; arik’ uwo muherezi yar’ ahagaze kw irembo hamwe n’abo bantu ukw ar’ amajana atandatu bitwaje ibirwanishwa." 
Judges18:18 Nukw abo bamaze kwinjira mu nzu ya Mika, no gusahura ico gishushanyo kibājwe na efodi na terafimu na ca gishushanyo kivugutiye mu nkero, uwo muherezi arababaza, ati Mbeg’ ivyo mugira n’ibiki?" 
Judges18:19 Baramwishura, bat’ Ihorere ni winumire: uz’ ujane natwe, utubere umuvyeyi n’umuherezi. Mbeg’ ugira ngw iciza n’uko woba umuherezi w’urugo rumwe kuruta uko woba umuherezi w’inzu yose, ari wo muryango umwe wo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli?" 
Judges18:20 Nuk’ uwo muherezi agira akanyamuneza mu mutima, ajana efodi na terafimu na ca gishushanyo kibājwe, agenda acagatiwe n’abo bantu." 
Judges18:21 Nuko barakebānuka, baragenda, bimiriza abana n’ivyo bashoreye n’intēkera zabo." 
Judges18:22 Bagenze nk’ikirēre bavuye kwa Mika, abo mu mihana ihereranye na Mika baratabara, baseseka ku Badani;" 
Judges18:23 babatera akāmo; Abadani barakebuka, babaza Mika, bati Mbega n’ibiki, k’uzananye n’ ingabo?" 
Judges18:24 Arabishura, ati Ko munsahuye imana zanje nironkeye, n’umuherezi wanje, mukīgīra mugasiga munyogeje, none murambaza, muti N’ibiki?" 
Judges18:25 Abadani baramwishura, bati Ntusubire kudusemerera inyuma, bamwe muri twebge bohava bashangashirwa, bakabagwako, bakakwicana n’abo mu rugo rwawe!" 
Judges18:26 Nukw Abadani baca bīgīra; maze Mika abonye kw atobashobora, arahindukira asubira i we." 
Judges18:27 Nukw Abadani ni kwo gutwara ivyo Mika yari yarironkeye, bo n’umuherezi yar’ afise, bashika i Layishi, mu bantu bitekerereje ata co bīnona, babīcisha inkota, baturira n’igisagara cabo." 
Judges18:28 Kandi ntihāgira gitabara, kuko hāri kure y’i Sidoni, kand’ abaho ntibāri bīfatanije n’umuntu wundi n’ umwe. Aho hantu hāri mu kiyaya gihereranye n’i Beti‐rehobu. Maz’ Abadani basanura ico gisagara, bakibamwo." 
Judges18:29 Bacita Dani, bacitiranije na sekuruza wabo Dani mwene Isirayeli; arik’ ubga mbere ico gisagara citwa Layishi." 
Judges18:30 Maz’ Abadani bīshingira ca gishushanyo kibājwe; kandi Yonatani mwene Gerushomu, Gerushomu wa Mose, ni we yabaye umuherezi w’umuryango w’Abadani, bo n’uruvyaro rwiwe, gushitsa igihe abo mu gihugu bajanywe kw inyagano." 
Judges18:31 Nukw ico gishushanyo kibājwe bāshinze, ico Mika yari yarironkeye, kiguma ngaho kumara igihe cose inzu y’ Imana yamaze i Shilo." 
Judges19:1 Maz’ ico gihe, Abisirayeli bataragira umwami, hār’ Umulewi yari yaracīkiye mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu wo hirya, yari yābiriye umugore ava i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda." 
Judges19:2 Bukeye umugore wiwe amucumurako, arasambana, arāhukana, aja kwa se i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda; amaray’ igihe nk’amezi ane." 
Judges19:3 Bukeye umugabo wiwe arīkora, aramukurikira, kugira ngw amuhōyahōye, amugarukane; ajana n’ umuntu wiwe n’indogoba zibiri; ashitse i wabo w’uwo mugore, se wa nya mugore amubonye, aza kumusanganira anezerewe." 
Judges19:4 Maze sebukwe, se wa nya mugore, aramusīvya, amarana na we imisi itatu, barya, banywa, ari ho barāra." 
Judges19:5 Ku musi ugira kane bavyutse kare, arīkora ngw agende. Se wa nya mugore abarira uwo mukwe wiwe, ati Banza wābīre utw’ utamira, uhēmbūre umutima, mubone kugenda." 
Judges19:6 Nuko bompi baca baricara, bararya, baranywa, kugeza se wa nya mugore amubariye, at’ Enda se subira urāre hano, ube urījandajandira." 
Judges19:7 Arik’ uwo mugabo arahaguruka ngw agende; sebukwe aramwinginga, arongera ararāra." 
Judges19:8 Ku musi ugira gatanu azinduka kare ngw agende. Se wa nya mugore aravuga, at’ Enda banza wihēmbūre! Ba muraguma hano gushitsa umusi ukuze. Nuko bompi bararya." 
Judges19:9 Uwo mugabo araheza ava hasi ngw agende, bo n’umugore wiwe n’umuntu wiwe; maze sebukwe, se w’uwo mugore, aramubarira, at’ Ehe burije, ndabinginze murāre hano iri joro; rāba bgāhinnye: kīnja hano wījandajandire! Ejo uz’ uhenge mu gatwenzi, wifatire inzira, utahe." 
Judges19:10 Arik’ uwo mugabo ntiyemera kurāra; arīkora, aragenda, ashika aharābana n’i Yebusi, ari ho Yerusalemu; kandi yar’ afise indogoba zibiri zirikw amatandiko, n’umugore wiwe bari kumwe." 
Judges19:11 Kandi bāshitse hafi y’i Yebusi buriko buragoroba. Wa muntu abgira shebuja, at’ Enda ngo dukevye, twāke indāro muri kirya gisagara c’Abayebusi." 
Judges19:12 Ariko shebuja aramubarira, ati Ntitwokevya ngo tuje mu gisagara c’abanyamahanga kitar’ ic’ Abisirayeli; ariko ngo tujabuke dufate i Gibeya." 
Judges19:13 Yongera abarira uwo muntu wiwe, at’ Enda tuje mu gisagara kimwe muri biriya, twāke indāro i Gibeya cank’ i Rama." 
Judges19:14 Nuko bararamiriza, izuba ricokera bashitse hafi y’i Gibeya h’Ababenyamini." 
Judges19:15 Bakeberezayo, baja kwāka indāro i Gibeya. Ashitseyo, apfa kwicara mu kibuga co mur’ ico gisagara, kukw ata wemeye kubaha indāro." 
Judges19:16 Maze haza umutāma avuye mu murima gukora buhwibiriye; kand’ uwo muntu yahora mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, acīkira i Gibeya, arikw abo mur’ ico gisagara bār’ Ababenyamini." 
Judges19:17 Yunamuye amaso, abona umuntu w’ingenzi ari ngaho mu kibuga co mur’ ico gisagara. Uwo mutāma aramubaza, at’ Uva hehe, ukaja he?" 
Judges19:18 Aramwishura, ati Tuvuye i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda, tuja mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu wo hirya, iyo naturutse; nari nagiye i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda, none ndatashe; kandi mbuze umuntu yompa indāro," 
Judges19:19 naho nari nīfitiye ivyarire vy’indogoba zacu n’ivyo kurya vyazo, bo n’ivyo kurya vya twe n’uyu mugore n’uyu muhungu turi kumwe: nta co tubuze na mba." 
Judges19:20 Uwo mutāma aramwishura, ati Ruhuka, gira amahoro: ivy’ ugomba vyose ndabikugirira; mugabo ntimushobora kurāra ku musozi." 
Judges19:21 Nukw abajana i we, agaburira izo ndogoba; nuko bamaze kwoga ibirenge, bararya baranywa." 
Judges19:22 Bakiriko barījandajandira, haza abanyagisagara b’abanyangeso mbi, bakikiza iyo nzu impande zose, bakubitagura ku rugi, babarira uwo mutāma nyen’ urugo, bati Sohora uwo mugabo yinjiye i wawe, tumwonone." 
Judges19:23 Uwo mugabo nyen’ urugo arasohoka, arababarira, ati Sigaho bagenzi banje, ndabinginze, ntimukore icaha kingana girtyo; kuk’ uyu mugabo aje mu nzu yanje: ntimukore ikizira kingana girtyo!" 
Judges19:24 Rāba harih’ umwigeme wanje w’inkumi n’umugore w’uyo mugabo: hinge ndababasohorere, abe ari bo mwonona, mubagenze uko mugomba kwose; arik’ uwo mugabo mwoye kumukorakw ikizira kingana girtyo." 
Judges19:25 Arikw abo bagabo banka kumwumvira; nuk’ uwo mushitsi afata umugore wiwe, aramubahereza; barārana na we baramwonona bakēsha ijoro; umutwenzi utambitse, baramurekura." 
Judges19:26 Nuko mu mutwenzi nya mugore araza, ahenukira imbere y’umuryango w’inzu y’uwo mutāma, ah’ umugabo wiwe ari, burinda buca ari ngaho." 
Judges19:27 Maz’ umugabo wiwe mu gatondo aravyuka, yugurura urugi rw’inzu, arasohoka agira ngw agende. Asanga uwo mugore wiwe arambaraye imbere y’umuryango w’inzu, ibiganza vyiwe biri mu rwinjiriro." 
Judges19:28 Aramubarira, ati Vyuka, tugende; ariko ntiyakakaza. Nukw aramuterura, amurambika ku ndogoba; uwo mugabo ni kwo guca yitahira." 
Judges19:29 Ashitse i we, ahitana imbugita, afata umuvyimba w’uyo mugore wiwe, awuhimbaguramw’ ibihimba cumi na bibiri, acīra mu ngingo mu ngingo, abirungika mu bihugu vyose vy’Abisirayeli." 
Judges19:30 Maz’ ababibonye bose baravuga, bat’ Ikintu kimeze girtyo nticīgeze gukorwa canke kuboneka, uhereye ku musi Abisirayeli bādūgiye bava mu gihugu ca Egiputa kugeza uyu musi! Nuko ni muvyiyumvire, mubije inama, mugire ico muvuga!" 
Judges20:1 Maz’ Abisirayeli bose baragenda, bava mu gihugu cose uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba, hamwe n’abo mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi, bakoranira i Misipa imbere y’Uhoraho, bahūje inama nk’umuntu umwe." 
Judges20:2 Maz’ abakuru bo mu bantu bose b’imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli bava hasi mw ikoraniro ry’abantu b’Imana, ryakoranye ar’ ingabo ibihumbi amajana ane zizi kurwanisha inkota."
