Judges20:3 (Kand’ Ababenyamini bari bumvise kw Abisirayeli badūze i Misipa.) Maz’ Abisirayeli barabaza, bati Tubarire ukw ico caha cakozwe." 
Judges20:4 Wa Mulewi, umugabo wa wa mugore yishwe, arabishura, ati Nashitse i Gibeya h’i Bubenyamini, mpāka indāro ndi kumwe n’umugore wanje." 
Judges20:5 Maz’ abagabo b’i Gibeya bahenga mw ijoro barantera, bakikiza inzu narimwo; jewe bāgomba kunyica, kand’ umugore wanje baramwonona, arapfa." 
Judges20:6 Ndaheza ndamufata, mmuhimbaguramw’ ibihimba, mbirungika mu gihugu cose c’ishamvu y’Abisirayeli, kuko bākoze igiteye isoni c’ubuyobe mu Bisirayeli." 
Judges20:7 None rero yemwe Bisirayeli mwese, ni murondere inama y’ivyo, mubijekw ingingo!" 
Judges20:8 Maz’ abantu bose bavira hasi icarimwe, bati Nta muntu n’umwe muri twebge azosubira i muhira canke ngw atahe i we;" 
Judges20:9 arikw ico dukwiye kugirira i Gibeya n’ ukuhatera, nk’uk’ ubupfindo buzotwereka." 
Judges20:10 Kandi tuzogenda dutora abantu, mw ijana tuhakūra cumi, mu gihumbi tuhakūra ijana, mu bihumbi cumi tuhakūra igihumbi, duhetūre mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, kugira ngo baje gukoranya ivyo kurya vy’ingabo zigiye kuja i Gibeya h’i Bubenyamini kubahōra ubuyobe bgose bākoreye mu Bisirayeli." 
Judges20:11 Nukw ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli zikoranira kurwanya ico gisagara, bahūje umutima nk’umuntu umwe." 
Judges20:12 Maz’ ab’ imiryango y’Abisirayeli batuma intumwa mu muryango w’Ababenyamini iy’ uva ukagera, zo kubabaza, ut’ Ubgo buyobe bgabaye muri mwebge bgavuye ku ki?" 
Judges20:13 Uti None ni mubahe abo bantu b’abagesera b’i Gibeya, babice, bakūre ikibi mu Bisirayeli. Arikw Ababenyamini banka kwumvira ab’i wabo b’Abisirayeli." 
Judges20:14 Maz’ Ababenyamini bava mu bisagara vyabo bakoranira i Gibeya, kugira ngo barwane n’Abisirayeli." 
Judges20:15 Uwo musi hakorana Ababenyamini bavuye mur’ ivyo bisagara ingabo zizi kurwanisha inkota ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitandatu, udashizemw’ abasanzwe baba i Gibeya, ingabo z’intorwa amajana ndwi." 
Judges20:16 Kandi mur’ izo ngabo zose hārimw’ abantu b’intorwa amajana ndwi b’amabamfu, kand’ umwe‐umwe muri bo yashobora guteresha ibuye umugozi ntāhushe, n’iyo koba agashatsi kamwe." 
Judges20:17 Abandi Bisirayeli, udashizemw’ Ababenyamini, bākoranye ar’ ibihumbi mirongwine bazi kurwanisha inkota: abo bose bar’ ingabo." 
Judges20:18 Maz’ Abisirayeli barahaguruka baja i Beteli, ngo basiguze Imana; barayibaza, bati Muri twebge ni ba nde bazotangura kuja gutera Ababenyamini? Uhoraho arabishura, at’ Abayuda ni bo bazotangura kugenda." 
Judges20:19 Nuko bukeye Abisirayeli barahaguruka, basagaza inyuma y’i Gibeya." 
Judges20:20 Ingabo zabo zitera Ababenyamini, zitonda urugamba i Gibeya ngo zibarwanye." 
Judges20:21 Maz’ Ababenyamini barasokoroka bava i Gibeya, batikiza Abisirayeli kur’ uwo musi, bahasiga imihindigiti ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri." 
Judges20:22 Arikw izo ngabo z’Abisirayeli zirīyūngūnganya, basubira gutonda urugamba hamwe bari barutonze ubga mbere." 
Judges20:23 Maz’ Abisirayeli baradūga, baja kuririra imbere y’Uhoraho gushitsa ku mugorōba; babaza Uhoraho, bati Mbega dusubire kuja kurwana n’ab’ i wacu b’Ababenyamini? Uhoraho arabishura, at’ Ego me dūga mubatere." 
Judges20:24 Nuko ku musi ugira kabiri Abisirayeli bongera kwēgereza Ababenyamini. 
Judges20:25 Maz’ Ababenyamini bongera gusokoroka bava i Gibeya kur’ uwo musi wa kabiri nyene, basubira gutikiza Abisirayeli, bahasiga imihindigiti ibihumbi cumi n’umunani, bose ar’ abāri bazi kurwanisha inkota." 
Judges20:26 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli n’abantu bose baradūga, baja i Beteli, bicara ngaho imbere y’ Uhoraho barira, bīrirwa bīsonzesheje kugeza ku mugorōba, batangira ngah’ imbere y’Uhoraho ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ibimazi vy’ ishimwe." 
Judges20:27 Maz’ Abisirayeli basiguza Uhoraho, (kukw ico gihe isandugu y’isezerano ry’Imana ari ho yar’ iri;" 
Judges20:28 na Finehasi mwene Eleyazari umwuzukuru wa Aroni ni we yahagarara imbere yayo); babaza Uhoraho, bati Mbega dusubire kuja kurwana n’ab’i wacu b’Ababenyamini, canke dusigeho? Uhoraho arabishura, ati Dūga, kukw ejo nzobagabura mu maboko yanyu." 
Judges20:29 Nukw Abisirayeli barekura abaca ibico ngo batangatange i Gibeya impande zose. 
Judges20:30 Maze ku musi ugira gatatu Abisirayeli baja gutera Ababenyamini, batonda urugamba i Gibeya nk’ubga mbere." 
Judges20:31 Ababenyamini baraza barabarwanya, na bo barabahenda, babavana hafi y’ico gisagara; maz’ Ababenyamini batangura kubica ingenda nk’ubga mbere, babatsinda mu mabarabara, mu rija i Beteli no mu rija i Gibeya, no mu misozi; mu Bisirayeli hapfa abantu nka mirongwitatu." 
Judges20:32 Maz’ Ababenyamini barihaya, bati Turabanesheje nk’ubga mbere; arikw Abisirayeli bati Ngo twiruke, tubahende, bave hafi y’igisagara bashike mu mabarabara." 
Judges20:33 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bose bāvuye aho bāri bari, baja gutonda urugamba i Bayali‐tamari; maz’ abāri baciye ibico baravyuka, bava aho bāri babunze i Mare‐geba:" 
Judges20:34 nukw abo bantu, ukw ar’ ibihumbi cumi b’intorwa bo mu Bisirayeli bose, baraza batera i Gibeya; haba intambara ikomeye; arikw Ababenyamini ntibāri bazi kw ivyago bibashikiriye." 
Judges20:35 Maz’ Uhoraho atuma Ababenyamini baneshwa imbere y’Abisirayeli; kur’ uwo musi Abisirayeli batikiza mu Babenyamini abantu ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu n’ijana, bose ar’abāri bazi kurwanisha inkota." 
Judges20:36 Nukw Ababenyamini babona ko baneshejwe. Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāhenze Ababenyamini, kuko bāri bizigiye abo bari bashize mu bico inyuma y’i Gibeya;" 
Judges20:37 abo bāri mu bico ni kwo kwiruka akābushūngwe, bagatera i Gibeya, bagasāgiriza ico gisagara, bakaranduza abari muri co bose inkota." 
Judges20:38 Ikimenyetso Abisirayeli bāri bāhānye n’abāri mu bico n’uko ni bāturira igisagara, umwotsi mwinshi ugapfūndūka," 
Judges20:39 Abisirayeli ni ho bazoca babahindukirana. Kand’ Ababenyamini bāri bamaze gutangura kwica mu Bisirayeli abantu nka mirongwitatu, bihaya, bati N’ukuri turabanesheje nko muri ya ntambara ya mbere." 
Judges20:40 Arik’ umwotsi utanguye kudūga utwaje uva mu gisagara, Ababenyamini ni kwo gukebuka, bakabona igisagara cose gipfūndūka umwotsi udūga intumbgejuru." 
Judges20:41 Abisirayeli ni kwo kubahindukirana, Ababenyamini bakagwa igihūmura, kuko babonye yukw ivyago bibashikiriye." 
Judges20:42 Nuko baha ibitugu Abisirayeli, bajana inzira ija mu bugaragwa; arikw ingabo zibōma inyuma, kand’ izivuye mu gisagara zibīteramwo hagati, zigenda zirabica." 
Judges20:43 Baca Ababenyamini hirya no hino, barabakinagiza, bagize ngo baratēnyēnya barabasiribanga, kurinda bashika aharābana n’i Gibeya, ku ruhande ruhera i burasirazuba." 
Judges20:44 Mu Babenyamini hapfa abantu ibihumbi cumi n’ umunani, bose n’abahizi." 
Judges20:45 Uko ni ko bākebeje, bagahunga bajanye inzira ija mu bugaragwa, kugira ngo bashike ku gitandara c’i Rimona; abo bishe ingenda mu mabarabara bār’ ibihumbi bitanu, bakomeza kubōma inyuma gushitsa i Gidomu, batsinday’ abandi ibihumbi bibiri." 
Judges20:46 Nukw abāpfuye kur’ uwo musi mu Babenyamini bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu bazi kurwanisha inkota; abo bose bār’ abahizi. 
Judges20:47 Mugabo, abantu amajana atandatu bākebeje, bagahunga bajanye inzira ija mu bugaragwa, bāruhiye gushika kuri ca gitandara c’i Rimona; bagumayo kumara amezi ane." 
Judges20:48 Maz’ Abisirayeli barahindukira, bongera kurwanya abandi bo mu Babenyamini, babicisha inkota uhereye ku bantu no ku bigenda bindi no ku vyo barengutseko vyose; kand’ ibisagara vyose bārengukako barabiturira." 
Judges21:1 Kand’ Abisirayeli bāri bararahiriye i Misipa, bati Nta muntu n’umwe muri twebge azoshingira umwana wiwe Umubenyamini." 
Judges21:2 Nukw abantu baja i Beteli, bicara imbere y’Imana gushitsa ku mugoroba, baboroga, barira," 
Judges21:3 bat’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, n’iki cateye ibi mu Bisirayeli, bigatuma habura umuryango umwe muri twebge?" 
Judges21:4 Bukeye abantu bakoroka kare, bahubaka igicaniro, bahatangira ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe." 
Judges21:5 Maz’ Abisirayeli barabazanya, bati Ni ba nde bo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli boba batādūze ngo baje mw ikoraniro ry’ Uhoraho? Kuko bāri bararahiye indahiro ikomeye k’umuntu atazodūga gushengerera Uhoraho i Misipa atazobura gupfa." 
Judges21:6 Nukw Abisirayeli baricuza kubg’ Ababenyamini bene wabo, baravuga, bat’ Uyu musi umuryango umwe uraranduwe mu Bisirayeli." 
Judges21:7 None twobigenza dute ngo turonderere amasigarira yabo abagore, kandi twaramaze kugira Uhoraho indahiro ko tutazobashingira abakobga bacu?" 
Judges21:8 Ni kwo kubazanya, bati Harya har’ abo mu miryango y’Abisirayeli boba batādūze gushengerera Uhoraho i Misipa? Basanga kw ata muntu n’umwe yavuye i Yabeshi‐gileyadi ngw aze aho bashagaje mw ikoraniro ryabo," 
Judges21:9 kukw igihe abantu bāharūrwa ntihābonetse n’umwe wo mu baba i Yabeshi‐gileyadi. 
Judges21:10 Nukw iryo koraniro ritumay’ abantu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri b’abahizi barusha abandi; barababarira, bati Ni mugende muririkishe inkota ababa i Yabeshi‐gileyadi, mubīcane n’abagore n’ abana." 
Judges21:11 Uku abe ari ko muzobigenza: muze mugeseze umugabo wese iyo bava bakagera, n’ umugore wese, eka n’uwigeze kuryamana n’umugabo." 
Judges21:12 Nuko mu baba i Yabeshi‐gileyadi babonay’ abakobga b’inkumi amajana ane batīgeze kumenya icitwa umugabo; babazana aho bashagaje i Shilo, mu gihugu c’i Kanani." 
Judges21:13 Maz’ iryo koraniro ryose rituma impore ku Babenyamini bāri kuri ca gitandara c’i Rimona. 
Judges21:14 Buno Ababenyamini baca barahūngūka, babashingira ba bigeme bārokoye mu bagore b’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi, ariko ntibābakwira." 
Judges21:15 Nukw abantu barīcuza kubg’ Ababenyamini, kuk’ Uhoraho yari yaciye igihengeri mu miryango y’Abisirayeli." 
Judges21:16 Maz’ abakuru b’iryo koraniro barabazanya, bati Twobigenza dute ngo turonderere abasigaye abagore? None kw abagore batikiye mu Babenyamini!" 
Judges21:17 Bat’ Amasigarira y’Ababenyamini ntakwiye kubura ishingiro, ngo hagire umuryango uzimangana mu Bisirayeli." 
Judges21:18 Yamara twebge ntidushobora kubashingira abakobga bacu! Icabiteye n’ukw Abisirayeli bari bararahiye, ng’ Ūzoshingira Umubenyamini arakavumwa!" 
Judges21:19 Maze baravuga, bat’ Erega hariho wa musi mukuru w’Uhoraho bagira uk’ umwaka utashe i Shilo, hamwe i burārūko bg’ i Beteli, ku ruhande ruhera i burasirazuba rw’inzira iva i Beteli ija i Shekemu, i bumanuko bg’i Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Nuko babarira Ababenyamini, bati Ni mugende muryame mu mizabibu," 
Judges21:21 murereke: maz’ abakobga b’i Shilo ni basokoroka baja kuvyina, muce musokoroka aho mubunze mu mizabibu, umuntu wese acakire umwigeme mur’ abo bigeme b’i Shilo, amugire umugore wiwe; muheze mwitahire mu gihugu c’i Bubenyamini." 
Judges21:22 Maze ba se canke basāza babo ni baza kutwitwarako, tuzobabgira, tuti Ni mubaduhe ku neza, kukw abagore twābasahuriye muri ya ntambara batābakwiye. Tuti Kandi kw atari mwebge mwababīhēreye, nta co muriko." 
Judges21:23 Nukw Ababenyamini babigenza kuno, binyagira abageni mu baje kuvyina bahwanye n’igitigiri cabo, barabashorera; baraheza barīgīra, basubira mw ishamvu yabo, bongera kwubaka ibisagara, babibamwo." 
Judges21:24 Ico gihe nyene Abisirayeli na bo bavayo, umuntu wese asubira mu muryango w’i wabo no mu nzu y’i wabo; bitahira mu mashamvu yabo." 
Judges21:25 Kandi mur’ iyo misi Abisirayeli nta mwami bāribgagire: umuntu wese yakora ico yigombeye. 
Ruth1:1 Mu misi y’abacamanza ikigoyi cateye mu gihugu. Nuk’ umugabo w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda asuhukira mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, bo n’umugore wiwe n’abahungu biwe bompi." 
Ruth1:2 Uwo mugabo yitwa Elimeleki, umugore wiwe yitwa Nawomi, abahungu biwe bompi umwe yitwa Mahaloni, uwundi yitwa Kiliyoni, bār’ Abanyefurata b’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda. Bashika mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, babayo." 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleki, umugabo wa Nawomi, arapfa; asigarana n’abahungu biwe bompi." 
Ruth1:4 Bābīra Abanyamowabukazi; umwe yitwa Orupa, uwundi yitwa Rusi: bamaray’ imyaka nk’ icumi." 
Ruth1:5 Maze Mahaloni na Kiliyoni bompi barapfa; uwo mugore abura abana biwe bompi n’umugabo wiwe. 
Ruth1:6 Bukeye avana hasi n’abakazana biwe, kugira ngw ave mu gihugu c’i Mowabu asubire i wabo: kuko yari yumvise ari mu gihugu c’i Mowabu yuk’ Uhoraho yagendeye abantu biwe, akabaha ivyo kurya." 
Ruth1:7 Ava aho hantu yar’ ari, bo n’abakazana biwe bompi, bajana inzira isubira mu gihugu c’i Buyuda." 
Ruth1:8 Nawomi abgira abakazana biwe bompi, ati Ni mugende, musubire mu mazu ya ba nyoko: Uhoraho abagirire neza, nk’uko mwagiriye neza abahisi, bo nanje." 
Ruth1:9 Uhoraho abahe mwempi gusubira kwubaka ingo mugire abagabo. Arabagūmbīra, baraturikisha, bararira." 
Ruth1:10 Baramwishura, bat’ Oya, ariko turasubiranayo nawe mw ihanga ryanyu." 
Ruth1:11 Nawomi arabishura, ati Bakobga banje, ni mwisubirire inyuma: n’iki gitumye mugomba kujana nanje? Har’ abandi bana ngifise mu nda, ngo baze babe abagabo banyu?" 
Ruth1:12 Ni mwisubirire inyuma, bakobga banje, mwīgīre; kuko ndenze gucūrwa. Iyo mba mvuzeho, nti Ndi n’ivyizigiro; ndeke naho noronka umugabo iri joro nyene nkazovyara abahungu;" 
Ruth1:13 mbeg’ ivyo vyotuma mubarīndīra gushitsa aho bazokurira? Ivyo vyotuma mureka kurondera abagabo? Vyoye kuba birtyo, bakobga banje, kuko muntera akagongwe, kuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwaramvuriye kundwanya." 
Ruth1:14 Barongera baraturikīsha, bararira: Orupa agūmbīra inabukwe, ariko Rusi we amugumakw akaramata." 
Ruth1:15 Nawomi aravuga, ati Rāba, mugenzawe asubiye mu b’i wabo no ku mana yabo: nawe subirayo, ukurikire mugenzawe." 
Ruth1:16 Rusi aramwishura, ati Reka kunyinginga kuguheba, no gusubira inyuma ngo noye kugukurikira; kukw ah’ uzoja ari ho nzoja, kand’ ah’ uzorāra ari ho nzorāra; ihanga ryanyu ni ryo rizoba ihanga ryacu, Imana yawe ni yo izoba Imana yanje;" 
Ruth1:17 ah’ uzogwa ni ho nzogwa, bahampambe: Uhoraho arakabimpanira, kandi birushirije, ni nagira ikizontandukanya nawe, atar’ urupfu." 
Ruth1:18 Nawomi abonye yukw amaramaje kujana na we aca arahora. 
Ruth1:19 Nuko bompi barajana kurinda bashika i Betelehemu. Nuko rero bashitse i Betelehemu abo mu gisagara bose barashwabāduka, abagore barabazanya, bati Mbeg’ uyo yoba Nawomi?" 
Ruth1:20 Arabishura, ati Ntimube mukinyita Nawomi, ariko munyite Mara; kuko Rugira Vyose ivyo yangiriye vyambereye umururāzi." 
Ruth1:21 Navuye ino nninahaye, Uhoraho angarukanye i wacu nd’ imbokoboko: munyitira iki Nawomi, Uhoraho ko yantuntuje, kandi Rugira Vyose akaba yanteye ivyago?" 
Ruth1:22 Uko ni ko Nawomi yagarukanye na Rusi Umunyamowabukazi umukazana wiwe, bavuye mu gihugu c’i Mowabu: bashika i Betelehemu mw itangura ry’igenya rya sayiri." 
Ruth2:1 Kandi Nawomi yar’ afise mwene wabo w’umugabo wiwe, umuntu akomeye w’umutunzi, wo mu muryango wa Elimeleki, yitwa Bowazi." 
Ruth2:2 Rusi wa Munyamowabukazi abarira Nawomi, ati Ndekura ngende mu bibuba mpūmbe uduhūmbga, nkurikire uwongirira ubuntu. Aramwishura, ati Genda, mukobga wanje." 
Ruth2:3 Aragenda, ahūmba mu kibuba akurikiye abagenyi: kand’ umurima yarengutseko war’ uwo mw itongo rya Bowazi, wo mu muryango wa Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Bowazi araza, avuye i Betelehemu, abgira abagenyi, at’ Uhoraho abane namwe. Na bo baramwishura, bat’ Uhoraho aguhe umugisha." 
Ruth2:5 Maze Bowazi abaza umuntu wiwe agenyesha, at’ Uyu mukobga n’uwa nde?" 
Ruth2:6 Ūgenyesha aramwishura, ati Ni wa Munyamowabukazi yagarukanye na Nawomi avuye mu gihugu c’i Mowabu:" 
Ruth2:7 kandi yansavye, ati Ndakwinginze nyemerera guhūmba nkurikire abagenyi hagati y’ imikama: nukw araza, kandi yahereye mu gatondo gushitsa n’ubu, atar’ akanya gatoya yaruhutse." 
Ruth2:8 Maze Bowazi abgira Rusi, at’ Urumva, mukobga wanje? Ntuz’ ugire uwundi murima uzohūmbamwo, kandi ntuve hano, arik’ ugume hano hafi y’abigeme b’i wanje." 
Ruth2:9 Shira amaso ku murima bagenya, ubakurikire: mbeg’ abahungu simbihanikirije ko batazogukoma? Kand’ iy’ ugize inyota wame ugenda ku mibindi unywe ku yo abahungu bavomye." 
Ruth2:10 Yicisha bugufi, arūnama ashika hasi, aramubaza, ati N’iki gitumye ungirira ubuntu, ukambabara, kandi nd’ umunyamahanga?" 
Ruth2:11 Bowazi aramwishura, ati Bānyigāniye neza ivyo wakoreye nyokobukwe vyose, uhereye ah’ umugabo wawe yapfiriye: kandi ko wasize so na nyoko n’igihugu wavukiyemwo, ukaza mw ihanga utār’ uzi." 
Ruth2:12 Uhoraho akwishure ivyo wakoze, uhabge impēra ishitse n’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, wahungiye musi y’amababa yayo." 
Ruth2:13 Aramwishura, ati Ni ngirirwe akagongwe imbere yawe, mugenzi, kuk’ ummaze umubabaro, ukabarira incoreke yawe neza, naho ntahwanye n’umwe wo mu ncoreke zawe." 
Ruth2:14 Igihe co kurya kigeze, Bowazi aramubgira, ati Ngwino urye agatsima, ukoze intore yawe mu nkarisha ya vino. Yicarana n’abagenyi bamuhēreza impeke zikaranze, arazirya, arahāga, arasigaza." 
Ruth2:15 Avuye hasi guhūmba, Bowazi abarira imikangara yiwe, ati N’ ahūmbe no hagati y’imikama, ntimumukabukire." 
Ruth2:16 Kandi mumusokōrere zimwe mu mikama, muzisige, azihūmbe, ntimumuhambarire." 
Ruth2:17 Nukw ahūmba mur’ ico kibuba ashitsa ni kera; akubita izo yahūmvye, izo sayiri zishika ingero yitwa efa." 
Ruth2:18 Arazīkorera, aja mu gisagara: inabukwe abona izo yahūmvye, Rusi amugobororera utwo yashigaje amaze guhāga, aratumuha." 
Ruth2:19 Inabukwe aramubaza, ati Wahūmvye kwa nde uyu musi? Wakoze hehe? Uwakubabaye aragahezagirwa! Asobanurira inabukwe nyen’ umurima yakozemwo uw’ ari we, aramubgira, ati Nyen’ umurima nakozemw’ uyu musi yitwa Bowazi." 
Ruth2:20 Nawomi abgira umukazana wiwe, at’ Uhoraho atāsizeho kugirira neza abakiriho n’abāpfuye, arakamuhezagira! Nawomi arongera aramubgira, at’ Uwo mugabo n’uwo mu muryango wacu wo hafi, n’umwe wo mu bacunguzi bacu." 
Ruth2:21 Rusi wa Munyamowabukazi aramubarira, ati Mbere yambgiye, ati Wame ugumana n’abahungu b’i wanje, gushitsa aho bazohereza kugenya i wanje hose." 
Ruth2:22 Nawomi abarira Rusi umukazana wiwe, ati Mukobga wanje, ni vyiza k’ujana n’abigeme bamukorera, boye kugusanga mu murima w’uwundi." 
Ruth2:23 Nukw aguma hafi y’abigeme bakorera Bowazi, agahūmba akageza aho bahereje kugenya sayiri bo n’ingano; abana na inabukwe." 
Ruth3:1 Nawomi inabukwe aramubaza, ati Mukobga wanje, sinokurangira urugo, kugira ng’ umererwe neza?" 
Ruth3:2 None ntihariho Bowazi wo mu muryango wacu, umwe wabana n’abigeme biwe? Umve iri joro aragosōreza sayiri kuri ya mbuga." 
Ruth3:3 Nuko wiyuhagire, wīsīge, wambare imyambaro yawe, umanuke uje ku mbuga: ariko ntumwiyereke atararangiza kurya no kunywa." 
Ruth3:4 Nuko rero, ni yaryama, witegereze aho aja kuryama, nawe ujeyo, worosore ibirenge vyiwe, uryame; na we arakubgira ico uja gukora." 
Ruth3:5 Aramwishura, at’ Ic’ umbgiye cose ndagikora." 
Ruth3:6 Aramanuka aja ku mbuga, abikora vyose nk’uko inabukwe yamubariye." 
Ruth3:7 Bowazi amaze kurya no kunywa, ahimvye mu mutima wiwe, aja kuryama i ruhande y’ ikirundo c’umuhure: na we aza asōbōka, yorosora ibirenge vyiwe, araryama." 
Ruth3:8 Maze mu gicugu uwo mugabo arīkanga, arihindukiza: asanga har’ umugore aryamye hepfo y’ibirenge vyiwe." 
Ruth3:9 Aramubaza, at’ Uri nde? Aramwishura, ati Nd’ incoreke yawe Rusi; worose umuja wawe umwambaro wawe, kuk’ ur’ umucunguzi wacu." 
Ruth3:10 Aramwishura, at’ Uragahezagirwa n’Uhoraho, mukobga wanje; ineza werekanye none iruta iyo werekanye ubga mbere, kuk’ utārondeye imisore, ar’ aboro cank’ abatunzi." 
Ruth3:11 None rero, mukobga wanje, nta co utinya; ndakugirira ivyo uvuze vyose: kukw abashingantahe bose b’i wacu bazi yuk’ ur’ umugore aroranye." 
Ruth3:12 N’ukuri koko nd’ umucunguzi wanyu, ariko harih’ uwundi andusha kuba umucunguzi wo hafi." 
Ruth3:13 Rāra hano iri joro, kandi mu gitondo ni yakugirira ivy’ umucunguzi bizoba vyiza, az’ abikugirire; ariko ni yanka kubikugirira, ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho yuk’ ubganje nzokugirira ivy’ umucunguzi: ryama buce." 
Ruth3:14 Aryama hepfo y’ibirenge vyiwe, ageza mu rubungubungu: avyuka hataragera igihe umuntu yohwihwisha uwundi. Kuko yagira ngo Vyoye kumenyekana yuk’ uyo mugore yaje ku mbuga." 
Ruth3:15 Aramubgira, ati Zana umutamana wawe uwutege; amugerera ingero zitandatu za sayiri, arazimukorera, aja mu gisagara." 
Ruth3:16 Ashitse kwa inabukwe, aramubaza, ati Ni wewe ga mukobga wanje? Na we amwīgānira vyose ivyo uwo mugabo yamugiriye." 
Ruth3:17 At’ Izi ngero za sayiri ukw ari zitandatu ni we yazimpaye: kuko yambgiye, ati Ntiwosubira kwa nyokobukwe ata co ufise." 
Ruth3:18 Nawomi aramubarira, at’ Iyicarire mukobga wanje, ushitse ah’ uribumenyere amaherezo yavyo; kuk’ uyo mugabo ataja kuruhuka, gushitsa ah’ abirangiriza uyu musi." 
Ruth4:1 Nuko Bowazi aradūga, aja kw irembo ry’igisagara, yicarayo: maze wa mucunguzi Bowazi yavuze arahaca; aramuhamagara, ati Yewe naka! Ngo wicare hano. Aragenda, aricara." 
Ruth4:2 Azana abantu cumi bo mu bashingantahe b’ico gisagara, arababgira, ati Ni mwicare hano. Baricara." 
Ruth4:3 Abgira wa mucunguzi, ati Nawomi, umwe yagaruka avuye mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, agomba kugura itongo ryar’ irya mwene wacu Elimeleki:" 
Ruth4:4 nagomvye kubikumenyesha, no kukubgira kurigurira imbere y’aba bicaye hano, n’imbere y’ abashingantahe b’i wacu. Ni wagomba kuritora, uritore, n’utabigomba mbarira, mbimenye: kukw ata wundi yoritora atari wewe, canke jewe ngukurikiye. Aramwishura, ati Ndaritora." 
Ruth4:5 Maze Bowazi aramubarira, ati Ni wagura iryo tongo na Nawomi, ukwiye kurigurana na Rusi Umunyamowabukazi, umugore w’umuhisi, ng’ uhonore umuhisi, ribe ishamvu y’izina ryiwe." 
Ruth4:6 Wa mucunguzi aramwishura, at’ Ubganje sinshobora kuritora, ngw iyanje shamvu ndayidabanganye: subira mu gishingo canje co kuritora, kuko jeho ntashobora kuritora." 
Ruth4:7 Kera uyu ni wo war’ umugenzo w’Abisirayeli wo gucungura no kunyuranya, kugira ngo vyose bishingwe: umuntu yakūra inkweto yiwe, akayiha uwundi. Uko ni kw’Abisirayeli bātanga icabona ca ben’ ivyo." 
Ruth4:8 Nuko wa mucunguzi abarira Bowazi, ati N’uryīgurire. Maz’ akūra inkweto yiwe." 
Ruth4:9 Bowazi abarira abashingantahe n’ abantu bose, ati Mbatanzekw ivyabona uyu musi, yuko nguze ivyar’ ivya Elimeleki vyose, n’ivyar’ ivya Kiliyoni na Mahaloni, mbiguze na Nawomi." 
Ruth4:10 Kandi na Rusi Umunyamowabukazi, yari muka Mahaloni, ndamuguze ngw abe umugore wanje, ngo mponore umuhisi, ishamvu ntive kw izina ryiwe, izina ry’umuhisi ryoye kuzimangana muri bene wabo, no ku marembo y’igisagara cabo: mbatanzekw ivyabona uyu musi." 
Ruth4:11 Nukw abantu bose bāri kw irembo n’abashingantahe baramwishura, bati Tur’ ivyabona vy’ ivyo. Uwo mugore aje mu nzu yawe, Uhoraho amuhwanye na Rakeli na Leya, ari bo bompi bāshinze inzu ya Isirayeli: nawe uragasagamba muri Efurata, ube rurangiranwa i Betelehemu:" 
Ruth4:12 kand’ inzu yawe n’ihwane n’ iya Peresi, uwo Tamari yavyariye Yuda, bizanywe n’uruvyaro Uhoraho azoguha kur’ ico gitamba." 
Ruth4:13 Nuko Bowazi yābīra Rusi, aba umugore wiwe; abana na we, Uhoraho amuha gusama inda, avyara umuhungu." 
Ruth4:14 Abagore babgira Nawomi, bat’ Uhoraho ashemezwe, atākuretse uyu musi ng’ube ūtagira umucunguzi; izina ryiwe ni ribe rurangiranwa mu Bisirayeli." 
Ruth4:15 Kand’ azosubiza intege mu bugingo bgawe, kand’ azogutunga ugeze mu zabukuru: kuk’ umukazana wawe agukunda, akakurutira abahungu ndwi wovyaye, ari we amuvyaye." 
Ruth4:16 Nawomi ajana uwo mwana, amushira mu gikiriza, aba umurezi wiwe." 
Ruth4:17 Abagore b’ababanyi biwe bamwita izina, bati Nawomi avyariwe umuhungu. Bamwita Obedi, ni we se wa Isayi, se wa Dawidi." 
Ruth4:18 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwa Peresi: Peresi yavyaye Hesironi; 
Ruth4:19 Hesironi yavyaye Ramu; Ramu yavyaye Aminadabu; 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabu yavyaye Nahashoni; Nahashoni yavyaye Salumoni; 
Ruth4:21 Salumoni yavyaye Bowazi; Bowazi yavyaye Obedi; 
Ruth4:22 Obedi yavyaye Isayi; Isayi yavyaye Dawidi. 
1Samuel1:1 Hār’ umuntu w’i Ramatayimu‐sofimu, mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, yitwa Elukana; yari mwene Yerohamu, Yerohamu wa Elihu, Elihu wa Tohu, Tohu wa Sufu, w’Umwefurayimu." 
1Samuel1:2 Yar’ afise abagore babiri, umwe yitwa Hana, uwundi Penina; Penina ni we yavyara, ariko Hana yar’ ingumba." 
1Samuel1:3 Uwo muntu yama ava mu gisagara c’i wabo uk’ umwaka utashe, akadūga i Shilo gusenga no gushikanira Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ibimazi. Kandi bene Eli bompi, Hofuni na Finehasi, bār’ abaherezi b’Uhoraho aho hantu." 
1Samuel1:4 Umusi Elukana yatangakw ikimazi, yahakw imitigiri Penina umugore wiwe, n’abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe;" 
1Samuel1:5 ariko Hana yamuha umutigiri ungana n’iyabo kabiri, kuko yamukunda; arik’ Uhoraho yari yaramuzivye inda." 
1Samuel1:6 Kandi mukēba we yama amushinyagurira, akamutera intuntu, kuk’ Uhoraho yamuzivye inda." 
1Samuel1:7 Uko ni ko vyāgenda, uk’ umwaka utashe: uko Hana yadūga aja mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ni ko mukēba we yamushinyagurira. Ni co cātuma arira, akanka kurya." 
1Samuel1:8 Maz’ umugabo wiwe Elukana aramubaza, at’ Urizwa n’iki ga Hana? N’iki kikubuza kurya? Ubabajwe n’iki? Mbega sinkurutira abahungu cumi wovyaye?" 
1Samuel1:9 Maze barangije kurya no kunywa aho bāri bari i Shilo, Hana ava hasi. Kandi Eli umuherezi yari yicaye ku ntebe yiwe ku gishimaryango mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:10 Maze Hana asenga Uhoraho afise intuntu, arira cane," 
1Samuel1:11 asezerana isezerano, at’ Ewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ni warāba umubabaro wanje incoreke yawe, ukanyibuka, ntunyibagire jewe incoreke yawe, ukantabaza umwana w’umuhungu, nanje nzomuguha, Uhoraho, abe uwawe kuzorinda apfa, kandi nta rupfuhe ruzomugera ku mutwe." 
1Samuel1:12 Nukw akomeje artyo gusengera imbere y’Uhoraho, Eli yitegereza umunwa wiwe;" 
1Samuel1:13 kuko Hana yavugira mu mutima, akubita umunwa gusa, arikw ijwi ryiwe ritumvikana; ni co catumye Eli yiyumvira kw aborewe." 
1Samuel1:14 Nuko Eli aramubaza, at’ Uzogeza hehe kwama uborewe? Genda uhebe iyo vino yawe!" 
1Samuel1:15 Ariko Hana aramwishura, at’ Oyaye mwami wanje, nd’ umuntu yabonye amahano! Nta vino nanyoye cank’ ikindi kiboreza, ariko nariko ndasuka amajojwa yanje imbere y’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:16 Ntugire ngo nd’ umuntu w’ umunyangeso mbi, kukw aka kanya kose namye mvugana umubabaro n’amaganya bindengeye." 
1Samuel1:17 Maze Eli aramwishura, ati Nuko ni wīgīre amahoro; Imana ya Isirayeli iguhe ico wayisavye." 
1Samuel1:18 Na we aramwishura, ati N’ umpangaze, jewe incoreke yawe. Maz’ uwo mugore arīgīra; araheza ararya, ntiyasubira kwiraburanirwa ukundi." 
1Samuel1:19 Bukeye barazinduka, baja imbere y’Uhoraho barasenga; bahejeje barataha, basubira i wabo i Rama. Maze Elukana arārira Hana umugore wiwe, Uhoraho aramwibuka." 
1Samuel1:20 Igihe kiragera, Hana asama inda, avyara umwana w’umuhungu, amwita Samweli, ati Kuko namusavye Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:21 Maz’ uwo mugabo Elukana akora abo mu rugo rwiwe bose aradūga, aja gushikanira Uhoraho ikimazi c’uwo mwaka no gushitsa amasezerano yiwe." 
1Samuel1:22 Ariko Hana ntiyadūgayo, abarira umugabo wiwe, at’ Umwana ni yamara gucūka ni ho nzodūga, ndamujane, ashikirizwe Uhoraho, agumey’ igihe cose." 
1Samuel1:23 Maze Elukana umugabo wiwe aramwishura, ati N’ukore ico ushimye: wigumire aho gushitsa ah’uzomucūkiriza; arik’ Uhoraho n’ashitse ijambo ryiwe. Nuk’ uwo mugore yigumira ngaho, yonsa umwana wiwe, gushitsa aho yamucūkirije." 
1Samuel1:24 Amaze kumucūtsa aramudūgana, ajana n’imasa imaze imyaka itatu, n’ingero yitwa efa y’ifu, n’umukuza w’urusato wa vino; nukw amujana i Shilo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; kand’ uwo mwana yar’ akiri mutoya." 
1Samuel1:25 Babāga nya masa, bazanira Eli uwo mwana." 
1Samuel1:26 Maze Hana aravuga, ati Mwami wanje, indahiro ni wewe nyene, erega ni jewe wa mugore nari mpagaze i ruhande yawe, mwami wanje, nsaba Uhoraho." 
1Samuel1:27 Uyu mwana ni we nasaba, kand’ Uhoraho yampaye ico namusavye." 
1Samuel1:28 Ni co gitumye ndamugize inkūka y’Uhoraho; azorinda apfa ar’ inkūka y’Uhoraho. Nuko basengera Uhoraho aho hantu. 
1Samuel2:1 Maze Hana arasenga, at’ Umutima wanje uvugiriza Uhoraho impundu, Ihembe ryanje rivyuwe n’ Uhoraho; Akanwa kanje kāsamiye abansi banje, Kuko nnejerejwe n’agakiza kiwe." 
1Samuel2:2 Nta wera nk’Uhoraho, Kukw ata yindi mana, atari we: Kandi nta gitandara kimeze nk’Imana yacu." 
1Samuel2:3 Ntimukongere kuvuga ivy’ ubgibone murtyo, Ivy’ amanyama ntibigaturuke mu kanwa kanyu; Kuk’ Uhoraho ar’ Imana izi vyose, Ni yo igera ibikorwa vy’abantu nko ku munzane." 
1Samuel2:4 Imiheto y’abahizi iravunitse, Abāri badendebukiwe bakenyeye inkomezi." 
1Samuel2:5 Abāhoran’ agahimbo basigaye baca ingero, Arikw abāhora bashonje ntibagicumukura. Mber’ uwahora ar’ ingumba avyaye indwi, Uwavyaye benshi arahondobereye." 
1Samuel2:6 Uhoraho ni we atuma umuntu apfa, kandi ni we atuma abaho, Ni we amumanura i kuzimu, kandi ni we amukūrayo." 
1Samuel2:7 Uhoraho ni we amukenesha kandi ni we amukenura, Ni we amucisha bugufi kandi ni we amushira hejuru." 
1Samuel2:8 Ni we akūra umugorwa mu mukungugu, Agashira hejuru umukene, amukūye mu mwavu, Kugira ngw abicarikane n’ abahambaye, Baragwe intebe z’icubahiro: Kukw inkingi z’isi ar’ iz’ Uhoraho, Kandi ni zo yayiteretseko." 
1Samuel2:9 Azozigama ibirenge vy’abagororotsi biwe, Arikw abanyavyaha bazohonera mu muzimagiza, Kukw inkomezi z’umuntu atari zo zimuha kunesha." 
1Samuel2:10 Abarwanya Uhoraho bazovunagurika, Azoturagara ari mw ijuru, abakankamire. Uhoraho azocira imanza abo ku mpera z’isi; Kand’ azoha inkomezi umwami wiwe, Ashire hejuru ihembe ry’uwo yimikishije amavuta." 
1Samuel2:11 Maze Elukana asubira i we i Rama. Arik’ uwo mwana akorera Uhoraho imbere ya Eli umuherezi. 
1Samuel2:12 Kandi bene Eli bār’ abanyangeso mbi; bāpfa uko bagize ivy’ Uhoraho," 
1Samuel2:13 n’ivy’imituri abaherezi bāgenewe ku bimazi vy’abantu. Iy’ umuntu atanze ikimazi, inyama zigitētswe, umusuku w’ umuherezi yaraza, afise icuma mu ntoke cārura inyama c’ingobe zitatu;" 
1Samuel2:14 akagita mw isafuriya, canke mw ibinika, canke mu nkono, canke mu kazīhebe; maz’ iz’ ico cuma cājabura zose, umuherezi yarazītwarira. Uko ni ko bāgirira Abisirayeli bose uko bagiye i Shilo." 
1Samuel2:15 Mbere batarosa ibinure, umusuku w’umuherezi yaraza, akabarira ūtanze ikimazi, ati N’umpe inyama zo gutarira umuherezi, kukw atagomba k’umuha izitētse, atar’ imbisi." 
1Samuel2:16 Uwo muntu yamwishura, ati Hinge babanze bose ibinure, uheze ubone gutwara iz’ ugomba; na we akamubarira, at’ Oya, urazimpa ubu nyene: utazimpaye ndazitwara wanse ukunze!" 
1Samuel2:17 Uko ni kw icaha c’abo basore cabaye igikomeye imbere y’Uhoraho, kuko bākēngēra ikimazi ciwe." 
1Samuel2:18 Ariko Samweli akorera Uhoraho, kandi yar’ akir’ umwana, yari yambaye efodi yera derere." 
1Samuel2:19 Kandi nyina yama amubarīrira agahuzu, akakamushīra uk’ umwaka utashe, uko yajana n’umugabo wiwe gutanga ikimazi c’umwaka;" 
1Samuel2:20 Eli na we agahezagira Elukana n’umugore wiwe, at’ Uragahabga uruvyaro n’Uhoraho kur’ uyu mugore, abasubirize mu bukandu bg’ uwo yahaye Uhoraho kw’ inkūka; bagaheza bagasubira i wabo." 
1Samuel2:21 Maz’ Uhoraho agendera Hana, asama inda, aja imbere avyara abana b’abahungu batatu n’abakobga babiri. Arik’ uwo mwana Samweli akurira imbere y’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel2:22 Nuko Eli yar’ ageze mu zabukuru; kandi yama yumva ivyo abo bahungu biwe bagirira Abisirayeli bose, kandi ko basambana n’abagore bākora ibikorwa vyo ku muryango w’ihema ry’ibonaniro." 
1Samuel2:23 Arababaza, ati N’iki gituma mukora ben’ ivyo? Ko nama numva abantu bose bambarira ingeso zanyu mbi." 
1Samuel2:24 Eka bana banje, ivyo numva bavuga kuri mwebge si vyiza, kandi muracumuza abantu b’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel2:25 Umuntu ni yacumura ku wundi, Imana ishobora kubuzuza; arik’ uwocumura k’ Uhoraho, ni nde yomuvugira? Yamara bīrengagiza ivyo se ababariye, kuk’ Uhoraho yari yagabiye kubica." 
1Samuel2:26 Arik’ uwo mwana Samweli akomeza gukura, no gushimwa n’Uhoraho n’abantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Bukeye haza umuntu w’Imana kuri Eli, aramubarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Mbega ntiyiyeretse inzu ya sogokuruza, bakiri muri Egiputa mu buja kwa Farawo?" 
1Samuel2:28 Ngo Ntiyamutoranije mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ngw abe umuherezi wiwe, aje ku gicaniro ciwe, yose imibavu, yambare efodi imbere yiwe? Ngo Kandi ntiyahaye inzu ya sogokuruza ibimazi vyose Abisirayeli batanga vyo gutongorwa n’umuriro?" 
1Samuel2:29 Ngo N’iki gituma mutimamukira ibimazi vyiwe n’amashikanwa yiwe, ivyo yashinze ko bamuzanira mu ngoro yiwe, ng’ Ukūbaha abahungu bawe kubamurutisha, mukīgaburira ibinoboye vyo mu bimazi vyose abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli bamushikanira, mukīvyibuhira?" 
1Samuel2:30 Ni co gitumye Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, avuga, ngo N’ukuri yari yaravuze yukw ab’ inzu yawe n’ab’ inzu ya sogokuruza bazokwama bamugendako bar’ imbere yiwe ibihe vyose; ariko noneh’ Uhoraho agize ngo Biragahera; ngo Kukw abamwubaha ari bo azokwubaha, arikw abamukēngēra bazokēngērwa." 
1Samuel2:31 Ngw Ehe rāba, imisi igiye kuza, akūreh’ inkomezi zawe, n’iz’ ab’ inzu ya sogokuruza, hoye kugira uwo mu nzu yawe azoba agishika mu zabukuru." 
1Samuel2:32 Ngo Maze mu magorwa yawe uzotimamukira ivyiza azoba ahaye abandi Bisirayeli; ngo Kandi nta n’umwe wo mu nzu yawe azoba agishika mu zabukuru kugeza ibihe vyose. 
1Samuel2:33 Ngo Kandi ni hagira umuntu wo kuri wewe azosigara atamukūye ku gicaniro ciwe, na ho nyene bizoba ar’ ugusigara akobotse amaso, atuntuye mu mutima; ngo Kand’ ab’ uruvyaro rw’inzu yawe bose bazogenda bapfa bakenyutse." 
1Samuel2:34 Ngo Kand’ ikizoba ku bahungu bawe bompi, Hofuni na Finehasi, kizokubera ikimenyamenya c’ivyo: bompi bazopfira umusi umwe." 
1Samuel2:35 Maze ngw Azokwihagurukiriza umuherezi w’umwizigirwa, umuntu azokora nk’ivyari mu mutima wiwe no mu vyiyumviro vyiwe; ngo Kand’ azomwubakira inzu izokwamaho; na we azogendanira uwo yimikishije amavuta ibihe vyose." 
1Samuel2:36 Ngo Kand’ uko bizogenda n’uku: ng’ Umuntu wese w’agasigarira ko mu nzu yawe azoza amwikubite imbere, amusabe agafeza n’agatsima, amubgire, ati Ndakwinginze, umpe agakorwa kamwe ko mu vy’ubuherezi, kugira ngo mbone utwo kuntunga." 
1Samuel3:1 Uwo mwana Samweli yakorera Uhoraho imbere ya Eli. Kandi mur’ iyo misi ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryari risigaye ar’ imbonekarimwe, nta kwerekwa na we kwari kukiriho cane." 
1Samuel3:2 Ico gihe Eli yar’ atanguye guhuma, asigaye ahwihwisha gusa. Umusi ur’ izina yiryamiye ku buriri bgiwe," 
1Samuel3:3 itara ry’Imana ritarazima, Samweli na we aryamye mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho, ah’ isandugu y’ Imana iba," 
1Samuel3:4 Uhoraho ahamagara Samweli; na we ati Sabge! 
1Samuel3:5 Araheza arirukanga, aja iyo Eli ari, aramubarira, ati Ndaje nditavye. Eli at’ Eka singuhamagaye: subira kuryama. Nukw aragenda araryama." 
1Samuel3:6 Uhoraho yongera guhamagara, ati Samweli! Nuko Samweli aravyuka, aja iyo Eli ari, ati Ndaje nditavye. Na we at’ Eka singuhamagaye, mwananje: subira kuryama." 
1Samuel3:7 Maze Samweli ntiyaribgamenye Uhoraho, canke ngw ahishurirwe ijambo ryiwe." 
1Samuel3:8 Nuk’ Uhoraho yongera guhamagara Samweli ubugira gatatu. Aravyuka, aja iyo Eli ari, ati Ndaje nditavye. Maze Eli aca amenya kw ar’ Uhoraho ahamagaye uwo mwana;" 
1Samuel3:9 ni kwo kubarira Samweli, ati Genda, subira kuryama; maze ni yongera kuguhamagara, uheze umwitabe, ut’ Uhoraho, n’ uvuge, kuk’ umusavyi wawe nteze amatwi. Nuko Samweli asubira kuryama aho yar’ ari." 
1Samuel3:10 Maz’ Uhoraho araza ahagarara ngaho, aramuhamagara nk’ubga mbere, ati Samweli we! Ewe Samweli! Na we ati N’uvuge, kuk’ umusavyi wawe nteze amatwi." 
1Samuel3:11 Uhoraho abarira Samweli, ati Rāba nzokora ikintu mu Bisirayeli, ūzocumva wese imīnzerere izomuvuga mu matwi." 
1Samuel3:12 Uwo musi nzoshitsa kuri Eli ivyo navuze ku nzu yiwe vyose, iyo biva bikagera." 
1Samuel3:13 Kuko mmaze kumubgira yuko ngiye guha inzu yiwe igihano kitazobavako, mbahōye ukugabitanya yirengagije, kukw abahungu biwe bihamagariye umuvumo, na we ntabateshe." 
1Samuel3:14 Ni co catumye ndahira ab’ inzu ya Eli, yukw ibigabitanyo vyabo bitazotangirwa impongano, n’iyo coba ikimazi cank’ ishikanwa, gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
1Samuel3:15 Nuko Samweli araryama, ageza mu gitondo; aravyuka, yugurura inzugi z’inzu y’Uhoraho; arikw atinya kubarira Eli ivyo yeretswe." 
1Samuel3:16 Maze Eli aramuhamagara, ati Mwana wanje Samweli! Na we ati Sabge!" 
1Samuel3:17 Aramubaza, ati Bga bundi yakubariye iki? Ntugire ico umpisha. Ni wagira ico umpisha mu vyo yakubariye vyose, Imana ibiguhanire, mbere birushirije." 
1Samuel3:18 Nuko Samweli amudōndera vyose, ntiyagira ico amuhisha. Maze Eli aravuga, ati N’Uhoraho: n’akore ico ashima." 
1Samuel3:19 Nuko Samweli arakura, Uhoraho abana na we; ntiyakunda ko hagira ijambo na rimwe rya Samweli rikorokera hasi." 
1Samuel3:20 Nukw Abisirayeli bose, uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba, bamenya ko Samweli yegukiye kuba ūvugishwa n’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel3:21 Nuk’ Uhoraho asubira kwiyerekanira i Shilo, kukw i Shilo nyene ari ho Uhoraho yihishuririra Samweli mw ijambo ryiwe. Kand’ ijambo rya Samweli rishika ku Bisirayeli bose." 
1Samuel4:1 Bukeye Abisirayeli batera Abafilisitiya, basagaza ahabangikanye n’i Ebenezeri; Abafilisitiya na bo basagaza kuri Afeka." 
1Samuel4:2 Abafilisitiya batonda urugamba ngo barwanye Abisirayeli: bamaze kurumana, Abisirayeli baneshwa n’ Abafilisitiya, Abafilisitiya babicamw’ abantu nk’ibihumbi bine mur’ urwo rugamba." 
1Samuel4:3 Maz’ ingabo zishitse mu nsago, abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli barabazanya, bati N’iki gitumye Uhoraho yemera ko tuneshwa uyu musi n’Abafilisitiya? Enda ni muze tuje kuzana isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho tuyikūre i Shilo, tuyizane hano, kugira ngo ni yashika muri twebge idutabare ububasha bg’abansi bacu." 
1Samuel4:4 Nukw abantu batuma i Shilo, bakūray’ isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yama avyagiye ku bakerubi, barayizana. Kandi bene Eli bompi, Hofuni na Finehasi, bazanana n’iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Imana." 
1Samuel4:5 Nukw iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ishitse aho bashagaje, Abisirayeli bose baca biha akamo icarimwe, isi irāsīra." 
1Samuel4:6 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bumvise urwo rwamo, barabazanya, bat’ Urwo rwamo rwinshi ruri mu nsago z’Abaheburayo n’urw’ iki? Hanyuma bamenya kw ar’ isandugu y’Uhoraho ishitse mur’ izo nsago." 
1Samuel4:7 Maz’ Abafilisitiya baratinya, bat’ Imana irashitse mu nsago zabo! Bat’ Erega turapfuye! Nta ho twaribgabone nk’ivyo!" 
1Samuel4:8 Eka turapfuye! Ni nde yodukiza akadukūra mu maboko y’izo mana zihambaye? Izo ni za mana zāzaniye Abanyegiputa ivyago bitari bimwe mu bugaragwa. 
1Samuel4:9 Ni mushikame, murwane magabo, yemwe Bafilisitiya, mwoye kuba abaja b’Abaheburayo, nk’uko bo ar’ abacu: nuko murwane magabo!" 
1Samuel4:10 Nukw Abafilisitiya bashirako bararwana, maz’ Abisirayeli baraneshwa, umuntu wese ahungira i we; haba agatikizo gakomeye: mu Bisirayeli hapfa ingabo ibihumbi mirongwitatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Kand’ isandugu y’ Imana ifatwa mpiri; na bene Eli bompi, Hofuni na Finehasi baricwa." 
1Samuel4:12 Maz’ umuntu wo mu ba Benyamini ava mu rugamba, agenda yiruka, ashika i Shilo uwo musi, yitantamuriyekw impuzu ziwe, yiyoreye ivu mu mutwe." 
1Samuel4:13 Kand’ aho yaza, Eli yari yicaye ku ntebe yiwe i ruhande y’inzira, ategereye agakuru, kuko yar’ ahagaritswe umutima n’isandugu y’Imana. Nuk’ uwo muntu ashitse mu gisagara, avuga inkuru z’ivyabaye; abo mu gisagara bose bacura umuborogo." 
1Samuel4:14 Maze Eli yumvise ijwi ry’amaborogo, arabaza, at’ Urwo rwamo n’urw’ iki? Nuk’ uwo muntu aza yirukanga, abibikira Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Kandi Eli yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwicenda n’umunani; amaso yiwe yar’ ahumye, ntiyar’ akibona." 
1Samuel4:16 Nuk’ uwo muntu abarira Eli, ati Ni jewe mvuye mu rugamba, nje mpunga mvuye mu ntambara uyu musi. Aramubaza, ati Vyagenze bite ga mwana wanje?" 
1Samuel4:17 Iyo mbitsi iramwishura, it’ Abisirayeli batsinzwe n’ Abafilisitiya, habaye agatikizo gakomeye mu bantu; ba bahungu bawe bompi Hofuni na Finehasi bapfuye; kand’ isandugu y’Imana yafashwe mpiri." 
1Samuel4:18 Nukw amaze kuvuga ivy’ isandugu y’Imana, Eli ahanuka ku ntebe yiwe, agwa agaramye ku gikingi c’irembo, akenyura izosi, arahwera; kuko yar’ umutāma, kandi yari yiremereye. Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwine ar’ umucamanza w’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel4:19 Umukazana wiwe, muka Finehasi, yar’ afise inda, ari hafi yo kuvyara. Nuko yumvise izo nkuru yukw isandugu y’Imana yafashwe mpiri, kandi ko sebukwe n’ umugabo wiwe bapfuye, aca apfukama, aravyara, kukw ibise vyaciye bimufata." 
1Samuel4:20 Maz’ ari hafi yo gucīkāna, abagore bāri bamuhagaze i ruhande baramubarira, bati Rema, kuk’ uvyaye umuhungu! Ariko nta co yabishura, canke ngw anabibabare." 
1Samuel4:21 Yita uwo mwana Ikabodi; at’ Icubahiro kirashize mu Bisirayeli. Icatumye avuga artyo n’ukw isandugu y’ Imana yafashwe mpiri, kandi n’ uko sebukwe n’umugabo wiwe bāpfuye." 
1Samuel4:22 Aravuga, at’ Icubahiro kirashize mu Bisirayeli, kukw isandugu y’Imana ifashwe mpiri." 
1Samuel5:1 Abafilisitiya bafashe mpiri isandugu y’Imana, bayikūra i Ebenezeri bayijana i Ashidodi." 
1Samuel5:2 Baraheza bayinjiza mu ngoro ya Dagoni, bayitereka i ruhande ya Dagoni nyene." 
1Samuel5:3 Bukeye mu mavyuka ya kare Abanyashidodi basanga Dagoni yatemvye yubamye imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho; barayegura, bayisubiza ahantu hayo." 
1Samuel5:4 Bukeye bgaho, mu mavyuka ya kare nyene, basanga Dagoni yongeye gutemba yubamye imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho, kand’ umutwe n’ibikonjo vyayo vyahimbaguritse vyayivuyeko, bitembagara mu rwinjiriro; hari hasigaye umutumba wayo gusa." 
1Samuel5:5 Ni co gituma abaherezi ba Dagoni n’uwinjira mu ngoro yayo wese, bitonda kudakandagira mu rwinjiriro rw’ ingoro ya Dagoni yo muri Ashidodi gushitsa n’ubu." 
1Samuel5:6 Maz’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho gushikamira Abanyashidodi n’abāhakūkira, arabageseza, abatērēra ibihute." 
1Samuel5:7 Abanyashidodi babonye bibaye birtyo baravugana, bat’ Isandugu y’Imana y’Abisirayeli ntikagume muri twebge, kuk’ ukuboko kwayo kudushikamiye, twe na Dagoni imana yacu." 
1Samuel5:8 Ni kwo gutuma ku baganwa b’Abafilisitiya bose, bakoraniraho barababaza, bati Mbeg’ isandugu y’Imana y’ Abisirayeli tuyigenze dute? Barabishura, bati Ni bayijane i Gati. Nuko bajanay’ iyo sandugu y’ Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel5:9 Bamaze kuyishikanayo, ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kurwanya ico gisagara, kubaca ivutu; atērēra ibihute abo mur’ ico gisagara, abato n’abakuru, bisēsa ku mibiri yabo." 
1Samuel5:10 Nukw iyo sandugu y’Imana bayirungika i Ekuroni. Igiserukayo, Abanyekuroni bavuza induru, bati Batuzaniye ya sandugu y’Imana y’Abisirayeli ngw itumarane n’ abacu!" 
1Samuel5:11 Ni kwo gutuma ku baganwa bose b’Abafilisitiya, bakoraniraho, barababgira, bati Ni murungike iyi sandugu y’Imana y’Abisirayeli, isubire aho yahora, ireke kutumarana n’abacu; kuko mur’ ico gisagara cose urupfu rwari rwabaciye ivutu, kand’ ukuboko kw’Imana kwari kubashikamiye cane." 
1Samuel5:12 Abatāpfuye batērērwa ibihute; induru z’ico gisagara zishika mw ijuru. 
1Samuel6:1 Kand’ iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho yar’ imaze amezi ndwi mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya. 
1Samuel6:2 Bukeye Abafilisitiya bahamagara abaherezi n’abapfumu, barababaza, bat’ Iyi sandugu y’Uhoraho tuyigenze dute? Tuyirungikane n’iki, mu ko tuyisubiza ahantu hayo?" 
1Samuel6:3 Barabishura, bati Ni mwarungika iyo sandugu y’Imana y’Abisirayeli, ntimuze muyirungike yonyene, ariko muyisubizanyeyo n’impongano muhongeye Imana: ni ho muzobona gukira, mumenye n’icatumye ukuboko kwayo kutabatenzukira." 
1Samuel6:4 Barababaza, bati Mbega tuyihongere impongano ki? Bati Muyihongere ibisa n’ibihute bitanu mucuze mw izahabu, n’ ibisa n’imbeba bitanu mucuze mw izahabu nyene, nk’ukw igitigiri c’abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya kingana; kukw icago cabashitseko mwese ari kimwe n’icashitse ku baganwa banyu." 
1Samuel6:5 Ni co gituma mukwiye kwicurishiriza ibishushanyo vy’ivyo bihute vyanyu, n’ibishushanyo vy’izo mbeba zabateye, zikonona igihugu; muteko mwubahe Imana y’Abisirayeli: kumbure yotenzura ukuboko kwayo, ikagukūra kuri mwebge no ku mana zanyu no ku gihugu canyu." 
1Samuel6:6 Har’ icotuma mukomantaza imitima nk’ukw Abanyegiputa na Farawo bagize? Mbeg’ imaze kwerekana ububasha muri bo, ntibāhavuye bakarekura abo bantu, bakīgīra?" 
1Samuel6:7 None rero ni murondere umukogote musha, bo n’ inka zibiri z’imvyeyi, zitigeze gukoreshwa igikorwa na kimwe; muheze muziboherek’ uwo mukogote, muzāke izazo muzisubize i muhira." 
1Samuel6:8 Maze mwābīre ya sandugu y’Uhoraho, muyigereke kur’ uwo mukogote; kand’ ivyo bishushanyo vy’izahabu murungitse vyo kumuhongera, mubishire mu gasandugu i ruhande yayo; muheze muyirungike, igende." 
1Samuel6:9 Maze muyishinge ijisho: ni yajana inzira ija i Beti‐shemeshi mu gihugu cayo, izoba ar’ Imana yaduterereye ivyo vyago bikomeye; ariko bitabaye birtyo tuzomenya kw atar’ ukuboko kwayo kwatwishe, bizoba ar’ ivyago vy’ivyaduka vyapfuye kutuzako gusa." 
1Samuel6:10 Nukw abo bantu babigenza bartyo; bābīra inka zibiri z’imvyeyi, baziboherak’ umukogote, izazo bazugaririra i muhira;" 
1Samuel6:11 baraheza bashira iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho kur’ uwo mukogote, bashirako na ka gasandugu karimw’ izo mbeba zacuzwe mw izahabu na vya bishushanyo vy’ibihute vyabo." 
1Samuel6:12 Izo nka zigenda zitumbereye i Beti‐shemeshi, zijana inzira y’iroro, zigenda zirābira inzira yose, ntizakebereza i buryo cank’ i bumoso; abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya baraziherekeza, bazishikana ku rubibe rw’i Beti‐shemeshi." 
1Samuel6:13 Kand’ ab’i Beti‐shemeshi bāriko baragenya ingano mu kiyaya; bunamuye amaso babona isandugu iserutse: bayibonye baranezerwa. 
1Samuel6:14 Nuk’ uwo mukogote uraza, ushikira mu murima wa Yosuwa w’i Beti‐shemeshi, uhagararaho. Kand’ aho hantu hār’ ikibuye kinini. Baraheza basatagura uwo mukogote mw inkwi, bazitangirakw izo nka kw ikimazi co kwosereza Uhoraho." 
1Samuel6:15 Abalewi bāri bawukūyekw isandugu y’Uhoraho na ka gasandugu kari kumwe na yo, karimwo vya bintu vy’izahabu, babiteretse kuri ca kibuye kinini. Nuk’ uwo musi ab’i Beti‐shemeshi bashikanira Uhoraho ibimazi vyoshejwe n’ibindi bimazi." 
1Samuel6:16 Maze ba baganwa batanu b’Abafilisitiya babibonye, basubira i Ekuroni kur’ uwo musi nyene." 
1Samuel6:17 Ibihute vyacuzwe mw izahabu Abafilisitiya bashikaniye Uhoraho kw impongano vyar’ ibi: kimwe car’ ic’i Ashidodi, ikindi car’ ic’i Gaza, ikindi car’ ic’i Ashikeloni, ikindi car’ ic’i Gati, ikindi car’ ic’i Ekuroni;" 
1Samuel6:18 bo n’imbeba zacuzwe mw izahabu nyene, zingana n’ibisagara vyose vy’Abafilisitiya biganzwa n’abo baganwa batanu, uhereye ku bisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro no ku dusagara tutubakiwe. Ca kibuye kinini bāterekakw isandugu y’Uhoraho, kiri mu murima wa Yosuwa w’i Beti‐shemeshi, ni co kibishingira intahe." 
1Samuel6:19 Hanyuma Uhoraho yica abantu b’i Beti‐shemeshi mirongwirindwi, kuko barungurutse mw isandugu yiwe; maz’ abantu barizwa n’uk’ Uhoraho yabiciye abantu benshi." 
1Samuel6:20 Abo bantu b’i Beti‐shemeshi baravuga, bati Ni nde yoshobora guhagarara imbere y’Uhoraho, iyi Mana yera? Mbega none yodūga hehe, kugira ngw ituvemwo?" 
1Samuel6:21 Batuma intumwa ku baba i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu, mut’ Abafilisitiya bagarukanye isandugu y’Uhoraho; muti None ni mumanuke, muyidūgane ije i wanyu." 
1Samuel7:1 Nukw ab’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu baraza, bajana isandugu y’ Uhoraho, bayidūgana umusozi, bayishira kwa Abinadabu; maze barobanura umuhungu wiwe Eleyazari, kugira ngw abe ari we ayizezwa." 
1Samuel7:2 Kuva ku musi iyo sandugu yashikiye i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu hashira igihe kirekire, nk’imyaka mirongwibiri; ab’ inzu y’Abisirayeli bose barondera Uhoraho batuntuye." 
1Samuel7:3 Maze Samweli abarira ab’ inzu y’Abisirayeli bose, ati Ni mwaba mugarutse k’Uhoraho n’ imitima yanyu yose, ni mukūreh’ ibigirwamana vy’abanyamahanga na Ashitaroti biri muri mwebge, muherereze imitima yanyu k’Uhoraho, abe ari we musaba wenyene, na we azobarokora, abakūre mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel7:4 Nukw Abisirayeli baca bakūraho za Bayali na Ashitaroti, basaba Uhoraho wenyene." 
1Samuel7:5 Bukeye Samweli aravuga, at’ Abisirayeli bose ni mubakoranirize i Misipa, nanje nzobasengera k’ Uhoraho." 
1Samuel7:6 Nuko bakoranira i Misipa, bavoma amazi, bayavyagiza imbere y’Uhoraho; uwo musi barisonzesha, baravuga, bati Twaracumuye k’Uhoraho. Maze Samweli acīrira Abisirayeli imanza aho nyene i Misipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Abafilisitiya bumvise kw Abisirayeli bakoraniye i Misipa, abaganwa babo baca badūga kubatera. Abisirayeli bavyumvise, bagira ubgoba kubg’ Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel7:8 Abisirayeli babarira Samweli, bati Ntuhengeshanye kudutakambira k’Uhoraho Imana yacu, kugira ngw adukize, ntidukorokere mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel7:9 Nuko Samweli yābīra umwagazi w’intama uconka, awushikanira Uhoraho kw ikimazi co kwoswa kidasonōye; maze Samweli atakambira Uhoraho kubg’ Abisirayeli; Uhoraho aramwumvira." 
1Samuel7:10 Samweli akirikw arosa ico kimazi, Abafilisitiya bēgereza Abisirayeli ngo bashireko, barwane. Arik’ Uhoraho kuri nya musi nyene aturikira hejuru y’ Abafilisitiya guturagara guhāmbāye, abaca umuhongo; Abisirayeli ni kwo kubanesha." 
1Samuel7:11 Ingabo z’ Abisirayeli ziva i Misipa, bakinagiza Abafilisitiya babica ingenda kurinda bashika musi y’i Beti‐kari." 
1Samuel7:12 Maze Samweli yābīra ibuye, arishinga hagati y’i Misipa n’i Sheni, aryita Ebenezeri, ati Kugeza n’ubu Uhoraho aradutabaye." 
1Samuel7:13 Uko ni kw Abafilisitiya bātsinzwe, ntibasubira kurenga urubibe rw’Abisirayeli; mbere mu gihe ca Samweli cose ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwama gushikamiye Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel7:14 Kand’ ibisagara vy’ Abisirayeli vyari vyaranyazwe n’ Abafilisitiya barabisubizwa, uhereye i Ekuroni ugashitsa i Gati, mber’ Abisirayeli bakūra igihugu cabo mu bubasha bg’Abafilisitiya. Ariko hagati y’Abisirayeli n’Abamori ho hār’ impore." 
1Samuel7:15 Imisi yose Samweli yamaze, yar’ umucamanza w’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel7:16 Kand’ uk’ umwaka utashe yama agīshanya imbu kuja i Beteli n’i Gilugali n’i Misipa, acīra Abisirayeli imanza mur’ iyo myanya yose;" 
1Samuel7:17 agaheza agasubira i Rama, kukw ari ho urugo rwiwe rwari ruri, na ho nyene akahacīrira Abisirayeli imanza. Kandi yari yarahubakiye Uhoraho igicaniro." 
1Samuel8:1 Maze Samweli ageze mu zabukuru, abahungu biwe abagira abacamanza b’Abisirayeli;" 
1Samuel8:2 imfura yiwe yitwa Yoweli, uw’ ubuheta yitwa Abiya. Baba abacamanza b’i Beri‐sheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Yamar’ abo bahungu biwe ntibāri n’ingeso nk’ iziwe, ariko bākebereje gukurikira inyungu mbi, bakarya ingurire, bakagoreka imanza." 
1Samuel8:4 Nukw abakuru b’Abisirayeli bose barakorana, baja i Rama kwa Samweli," 
1Samuel8:5 baramubarira, bat’ Ehe rāba urashaje, kand’ abahungu bawe ntibafise ingeso nk’izawe; none rer’ utwimikire umwami wo kuducīra imanza nk’ayandi mahanga yose." 
1Samuel8:6 Arikw iryo jambo ribabaza Samweli, ko bavuze ngo n’abahe umwami wo kubacīra imanza; araheza asenga Uhoraho." 
1Samuel8:7 Uhoraho abarira Samweli, ati Ni wemerere abo bantu ico bakwātse cose, kukw atari wewe banse, ariko ni jewe banse ngo simbe Umwami wabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Bakugiriye nk’uko bāngiriye muri vyose, uhereye umusi nabadūganye mbakūye muri Egiputa ukageza n’ubu; kuko bāntaye, bagasaba izindi mana." 
1Samuel8:9 None rero n’upfe kubemerera, arik’ ubihanikirize cane, ubamenyeshe ingeso z’umwami azobaganza uko zizobamerera." 
1Samuel8:10 Nuko Samweli asigurira abantu bamusavye umwami ivyo Uhoraho yamubariye vyose. 
1Samuel8:11 Aravuga, at’ Umve ubugene umwami agiye kubaganza azobagirira: azofata abahungu banyu abashinge gukora ivy’ imikogote yiwe n’ivy’ amafarasi yiwe, no kwiruka imbere y’imikogote yiwe;" 
1Samuel8:12 abandi azobashinga kuba abagabisha b’ingabo, bamwe igihumbi abandi mirongwitanu; abandi azobagira abarimyi n’abimbuzi biwe, n’abo gucura ibirwanishwa vyiwe vy’intambara n’ivyuma vy’imikogote yiwe." 
1Samuel8:13 Kand’ azofata abakobga banyu, abashinge kuba abasyi b’imbazi n’abatētsi n’abacumvyi." 
1Samuel8:14 Kand’ azofata imirima yanyu n’imizabibu yanyu n’imyelayo yanyu, ibiruta ibindi kuba vyiza, abihe abantu biwe." 
1Samuel8:15 Kand’ azobatoza ibigiracumi vy’impeke zanyu n’inzabibu kw amarari, abihe abīshikira biwe n’abantu biwe." 
1Samuel8:16 Kand’ azobanyaga abagurano banyu b’abahungu n’abakobga, yikubitire intorwa mu nka zanyu no mu ndogoba, abikoreshe ibikorwa vyiwe." 
1Samuel8:17 Kand’ azobatwara ikigiracumi c’imikuku yanyu, namwe azobagaba ukw agomba." 
1Samuel8:18 Maz’ umusi muzobibona muzoborōzwa n’uwo mwami mwitoreye; arik’ uwo musi nta co Uhoraho azobishura. 
1Samuel8:19 Arikw abantu banka kwumva ivyo Samweli ababariye, baravuga, bati Nta co biriko, turagomba umwami wo kutuganza," 
1Samuel8:20 kugira ngo natwe tumere nk’ayandi mahanga yose, tugire umwami wo kuducīra imanza no kutuja imbere no kuturwanira mu ntambara." 
1Samuel8:21 Samweli yumvise ivyo abantu bavuze vyose, abishikiriza Uhoraho." 
1Samuel8:22 Uhoraho aramwishura, ati N’ubemerere, ubimikire umwami. Maze Samweli abarira Abisirayeli, ati Mwese ni mwītāhire mu bisagara vy’i wanyu." 
1Samuel9:1 Hār’ umuntu w’Umubenyamini yitwa Kishi; yari mwene Abiyeli, Abiyeli wa Serori, Serori wa Bekorati, Bekorati wa Afiya w’ Umubenyamini; yar’ umuntu w’umutunzi." 
1Samuel9:2 Kandi yar’ afise umuhungu mwiza w’umusore yitwa Sauli. Nta n’umwe mu Bisirayeli yamurusha ubgiza, kandi yasumba abantu bose, bamugera ku bitugu gusa." 
1Samuel9:3 Bukeye indogoba za Kishi se wiwe ziratakara. Kishi abarira Sauli umuhungu wiwe, ati Hitana umwe mu banyarugo, muje kurondera izo ndogoba." 
1Samuel9:4 Nuko baca mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu no mu ntāra y’i Shalisha, ntibāzibona. Maze baca mu ntāra y’i Shalimu barazibura, baca no mu ntāra y’ Ababenyamini, na ho nyene ntibāzibona." 
1Samuel9:5 Hanyuma bashitse mu ntāra y’i Sufi, Sauli abarira uno muntu bari kumwe, at’ Ingo dutahe, data ntahave ahagarikira umutima twebge kuruta indogoba." 
1Samuel9:6 Na we aramwishura, at’ Erega mur’ iki gisagara harih’ umuntu w’Imana, kandi n’umunyacubahiro; ivyo avuga vyose bihora bishika; enda se tujeyo, kumbure yoturangira inzira tujana." 
1Samuel9:7 Maze Sauli abaza uwo muntu wiwe, ati Mbega none, ni twajayo tumugemura iki? Kw impamba yashize mu masaho yacu, tukaba ata ngemu tugira yo guha uwo muntu w’Imana. Mbega har’ ico dufise?" 
1Samuel9:8 Uwo muntu yishura Sauli, at’ Ehe ndafise ikigirakane ca shekeli y’ifeza; ndagiha uwo muntu w’ Imana kugira ngw aturangire inzira." 
1Samuel9:9 (Kera mu Bisirayeli, umuntu iyo yagira ic’ aja gusiguza Imana, yavuga, ati Hogi tuje kwa kamenyi; kuk’ uwitwa ūvugishwa n’Imana ubu, kera yitwa kamenyi.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Nuko Sauli abgira uwo muntu wiwe, ati Ni vyiza; ngwino tugende. Nuko baja ku gisagara ah’ uwo muntu w’Imana yaba." 
1Samuel9:11 Bakidūga umusozi ngo bashike ku gisagara, bahūra n’abigeme bavuyeyo baja kuvoma; barababaza, bati Mbega kamenyi ni ho ari?" 
1Samuel9:12 Barabishura, bat’ Ego me; nguyo ah’ imbere yanyu; ariko munyaruke: ni ho agishika mu gisagara, azanywe n’ukw abantu bagira batange ibimazi ku mpinga y’umusozi." 
1Samuel9:13 Ni mwashika mu gisagara muca mumubona ataradūga ku mpinga y’umusozi kurīrayo; kukw abantu badashobora kurya ataraza, kukw ari we ahezagira ibimazi, maz’ abātowe bakabona kurya. Nuko rero ni mudūge: muca mumubona aka kanya." 
1Samuel9:14 Nuko baradūga ngo baje mu gisagara; bagishikayo baca bahūra na Samweli avayo ngw adūge ku mpinga y’umusozi. 
1Samuel9:15 Kand’ umusi Sauli ashikayo, Uhoraho yari yarāye abihishuriye Samweli," 
1Samuel9:16 at’ Ejo nka magingo aya nzokurungikira umuntu avuye mu gihugu c’Ababenyamini; uz’ umwimikishe amavuta, abe umwami w’abantu banje Abisirayeli. Ni we azokiza abantu banje, abakūre mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya; kuko nitegereje abantu banje, kand’ ugutaka kwabo kwanshitseko." 
1Samuel9:17 Nuko Samweli agikubita ijisho Sauli, Uhoraho aramubarira, at’ Ehe nguyo wa muntu nakubarira! Uyo ni we azoganza abantu banje." 
1Samuel9:18 Nuko Sauli yēgēra Samweli aho nyene mw irembo ry’igisagara, aramubarira, ati Ntabara undangire inzu ya kamenyi ah’ itumbereye." 
1Samuel9:19 Samweli aramwishura, at’ Erega ni jewe nyene kamenyi; none hogi tuje ku mpinga y’umusozi, kuk’ uyu musi muribusangire nanje; maz’ ejo mu gitondo nzokurekura, ngusobanurire ibiri mu mutima wawe vyose." 
1Samuel9:20 Kandi ku vya za ndogoba zawe, zimaze gatatu zizimiye, ntiziguhagarike umutima: zārabonetse. Mbeg’ ivy’ igikundiro vyose vyo mu Bisirayeli bibīkiwe nde? Si wewe nyene, n’inzu yose ya so?" 
1Samuel9:21 Maze Sauli aramwishura, ati Mbega sind’ Umubenyamini, ari wo muryango mutoya hanyuma y’iyindi yo mu Bisirayeli? Kand’ inzu yacu si yo ntoya hanyuma y’ayandi mazu yose yo mu Babenyamini? None n’iki gitumye umbarira ben’ ivyo?" 
1Samuel9:22 Maze Samweli ajana Sauli n’ umuntu wiwe, abinjiza mu nzu yo kuzimaniramwo, abaha ivyicaro vy’icubahiro mu bātowe, bāri nka mirongwitatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Maze Samweli abarira umusuku, ati Zana wa mutigiri nakubarira." 
1Samuel9:24 Nuk’ uwo musuku azana igikenye c’ukuguru n’inkenyūre zaco, agitereka imbere ya Sauli. Maze Samweli aravuga, at’ Ehe ngibi ivyo wateguriwe; shirak’ ufungure, kukw ari wewe wabiteguriwe gushitsa iki gihe cāshinzwe, kugira ng’ usangire n’ abandi bāhamagawe. Nuk’ uwo musi Sauli asangira na Samweli." 
1Samuel9:25 Bavuye aho ku mpinga y’umusozi, baramanuka bashika mu gisagara, Samweli aja kugānirira na Sauli hejuru ku nzu." 
1Samuel9:26 Bukeye barazinduka; hakiri mu gaturuturu Samweli ahamagara Sauli iy’ ari hejuru ku nzu, ati Vyuka, ndaguherekeze. Nuko Sauli aravyuka, arengana irembo na Samweli." 
1Samuel9:27 Bakimanuka, bashitse ah’ igisagara kigarukira, Samweli abarira Sauli, ati Barira uwo muntu wawe atambuke imbere; nawe uhagarare gatoya, nkumenyeshe ijambo ry’ Imana." 
1Samuel10:1 Maze Samweli yābīra agakuza k’amavuta ya elayo, ayamusuka ku mutwe, aramugūmbīra, aravuga, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho si we akwimitse ng’ ube ari wewe ugaba ishamvu yiwe?" 
1Samuel10:2 Uyu musi ni twamara gutandukana, uja gusanga abantu babiri hafi y’ imva ya Rakeli ku rubibe rw’Ababenyamini i Selusa; kandi barakubarira, bat’ Indogoba wari wagiye kurondera zarabonetse, bati Kandi so asigaye ahagarikiye umutima wewe kuruta izo ndogoba, avuga ngw ivy’ umwana wiwe yobigenza ate?" 
1Samuel10:3 Maz’ uvuye aho, ugiye nk’akarēre, ugashika ku giti c’umweloni c’i Tabora, uja guhūra n’abantu batatu badūga gushengerera Imana i Beteli, umwe ateruye abagazi b’impene batatu, uwundi atwaye amarobe atatu y’imitsima, uwundi atwaye umukuza wa vino." 
1Samuel10:4 Barakuramutsa, baguhe n’amarobe abiri, nawe uyākīre." 
1Samuel10:5 Hanyuma urashika ku musozi w’ Imana, ahar’ iboma y’Abafilisitiya; ni washika mur’ ico gisagara, uja guhūra n’agakama k’abavugishwa n’Imana bamanuka bavuye ahēra ho ku mpinga y’umusozi, bafise amakembe n’udushāko tw’ingoma n’imyironge n’inanga bigenda biravugira imbere yabo; uja gusanga bariko baravugishwa n’Imana." 
1Samuel10:6 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aca akuzako akābushūngwe, nawe akuvugishe hamwe na bo, uce uhinduka ukundi, ube umuntu musha." 
1Samuel10:7 Kand’ ivyo bimenyamenya ni vyagushikako, ugenze uk’ ubona bikwiye, kukw Imana iri kumwe nawe." 
1Samuel10:8 Kand’ uz’ unyitangire imbere, umanuke i Gilugali; nanje nyene nzomanuka ngusangeyo, nje kwosa ibimazi no gutanga ivy’ ishimwe. Uz’ undorēre imisi ndwi kugeza igihe nzogusangayo nkakwereka uk’ ukwiye kugenza." 
1Samuel10:9 Akirora irya avuye aho Samweli ari, Imana imuha umutima musha: maze kur’ uwo musi nyene vya bimenyamenya vyose birashika." 
1Samuel10:10 Nuko bashitse kuri wa musozi, abavugishwa n’Imana b’agakama bahūra na we; maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amuzako akābushūngwe, avugishwa hamwe na bo." 
1Samuel10:11 Maz’ abāri basanzwe bamuzi bose, babonye arikw aravugishwa hamwe n’abandi, barabazanya, bati Mbega mwene Kishi yabaye iki? None Sauli na we yari mu bavugishwa n’Imana?" 
1Samuel10:12 Umwe wo mu baba aho hantu arabaza, ati Mbeg’ abo ni bene nde? Ni co catumye bihinduka akagani, ngo Mbega Sauli na we yari mu bavugishwa n’Imana?" 
1Samuel10:13 Maz’ arangije kuvugishwa aja ha hantu hēra ku mpinga y’umusozi. 
1Samuel10:14 Se wabo wa Sauli abaza Sauli na wa muntu wiwe, ati Mbega mwagiye hehe? Aramwishura, ati Twagiye kurondera za ndogoba; maze tubonye tuzibuze tuja kwa Samweli." 
1Samuel10:15 Se wabo wa Sauli aramwishura, at’ Enda se mbarira ivyo Samweli yababgiye." 
1Samuel10:16 Sauli yishura se wabo, ati Yatubariye neza kw indogoba zabonetse. Ariko ku vy’ubgami Samweli yamubariye, ntiyagira ico amukerukiriza." 
1Samuel10:17 Bukeye Samweli akoraniriza abantu i Misipa imbere y’Uhoraho," 
1Samuel10:18 abarira Abisirayeli, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngo Yadūganye Abisirayeli abakūye muri Egiputa, ngw Arabarokora abakūra mu maboko y’ Abanyegiputa no mu maboko y’ abami bose bābahahaza;" 
1Samuel10:19 arik’ uyu musi muranse Imana yanyu, kand’ ari yo nyene ubgayo ihora ibakiza mu vyago vyanyu vyose no mu magorwa; mwarayibgiye ngo n’ibahe umwami. Nuko rero, ni muze muhagarare imbere y’Uhoraho, umuryango wose uk’ uri, n’ inzu yose ukw iri." 
1Samuel10:20 Nuko Samweli ahamagaza imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ubupfindo bufata umuryango w’Ababenyamini." 
1Samuel10:21 Ahamagaza umuryango w’Ababenyamini, inzu imwe‐imwe ukwayo, inzu ya ba Matiri irafatwa; araheza ahamagaza ab’ inzu ya ba Matiri, umuntu umwe‐umwe; hafatwa Sauli mwene Kishi; ariko bamurondeye baramubura." 
1Samuel10:22 Nuko bongera gusiguza Uhoraho, bati Mbeg’ uwo muntu yoba ataraza? Uhoraho arabishura, at’ Ereg’ arinyegeje mu bintu vy’intēkera." 
1Samuel10:23 Bagenda biruka, baramuzana; ahagaze mu bantu, abasumba bose uko bangana: bamugera ku bitugu gusa." 
1Samuel10:24 Maze Samweli abarira abantu bose, ati Mbega murabona uw’ Uhoraho yatoranije, kw ata wuhwanye na we mu bantu bose? Abantu bose bashira akamo hejuru, bat’ Umwami n’ahangame." 
1Samuel10:25 Maze Samweli amenyesha abantu imiganzirize y’ubgami ukw izobamerera, avyandika mu gitabo, akibīka imbere y’Uhoraho. Samweli araheza asēzera abantu bose, barataha." 
1Samuel10:26 Sauli na we arītāhira, aja i muhira i Gibeya, acagatiwe n’abantu b’abahizi, abo Imana yakoze mu mitima." 
1Samuel10:27 Arikw abantu b’abagesera bamwe baravuga, bati Mbeg’ uwo muntu yodutabara ate? Baramukēngēra, ntibāruha bamuzanira n’ imishikīro. Arikw apfa kwinumira." 
1Samuel11:1 Maze Nahashi umwami w’ Abamoni aradūga, asagaza inyuma y’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi. Ab’i Yabeshi bose baramubarira, bati Duhe isezerano ryo kuduhāngaza, natwe tuzogusaba." 
1Samuel11:2 Nahashi umwami w’Abamoni arabishura, ati Mu ko nemera kuribaha, mwese mbanza kubanogora amaso y’i buryo, mbe nsīze Abisirayeli bose iceyi." 
1Samuel11:3 Abakuru b’i Yabeshi baramwishura, bati N’utwihanganire imisi ndwi, kugira ngo dutume intabaza zinyuranganye igihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; maze ni hābura uwodutabara, tuzokwisaba." 
1Samuel11:4 Nukw intabaza zishitse i Gibeya ho kwa Sauli, zibarira abantu uko bibaye; abantu bose baraturikisha, bararira." 
1Samuel11:5 Ako kanya Sauli araza yimirije inka zivuye kurima, arabaza, ati Habaye iki kw abantu barira? Bamubarira inkuru ab’i Yabeshi bazanye." 
1Samuel11:6 Sauli yumvise ivyo, Mpwemu w’Imana amuzako akābushūngwe, uburake bgiwe buca buraziriringa;" 
1Samuel11:7 afata inka zibiri, azihimbaguramw’ ibihimba, abiha intabaza ngo zibinyuranganye mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli, mut’ Ūtazotabarana na Sauli na Samweli, uko ni kw inka ziwe zizogirirwa. Ubgoba buvuye k’Uhoraho burabafata, baca baza icarimwe gutabara nk’ umuntu umwe." 
1Samuel11:8 Sauli abaharūrira i Bezeki, Abisirayeli bār’ ibihumbi amajana atatu, Abayuda bar’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Maze babarira za ntabaza, bati Mubarire ab’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi, mut’ Ejo ku gasase bazobatabara. Nukw izo ntabaza zije, zibibgira ab’i Yabeshi, baranezerwa." 
1Samuel11:10 Ab’i Yabeshi ni kwo kubarira Abamoni, bat’ Ejo tuzoza kubīsaba, namwe mutugire uko mugomba." 
1Samuel11:11 Bukeye Sauli agabanya abantu mw imice itatu, basēseka hagati mu nsago z’Abamoni mu gahuru, baririka Abamoni gushitsa ku musase munini; maz’ abācitse kw icumu aho bashwiragiriye nta na babiri wobonye bari hamwe." 
1Samuel11:12 Maz’ abantu babarira Samweli, bati Mbega ni ba nde bavuze, ngw Aho Sauli ni we yotuganza? Ni muzane abo bantu, tubice." 
1Samuel11:13 Ariko Sauli aravuga, ati Nta muntu yokwicwa uyu musi, kuk’ uyu musi Uhoraho ahaye Abisirayeli intsinzi." 
1Samuel11:14 Maze Samweli abarira abantu, ati Ni muze tuje i Gilugali, dusubire dukomeze ivy’ ubgami." 
1Samuel11:15 Nukw abantu bose baja i Gilugali, bimikira Sauli imbere y’Uhoraho aho nyene i Gilugali, bahatangira ibimazi vy’ishimwe imbere y’Uhoraho: nuko Sauli n’Abisirayeli bose bahagirira akanyamuneza kenshi." 
1Samuel12:1 Maze Samweli abarira Abisirayeli bose, at’ Ehe rāba, nabakoreye ivyo mwansavye vyose, mbimikiye umwami wo kubaganza." 
1Samuel12:2 Eh’ umwami azobarōngōra nguyo; jeho ndashaje, mmeze imvi; kandi rāba abahungu banje muri kumwe: nanje murazi ko nabarōngōye uhereye mu buto bganje ugashitsa n’ubu." 
1Samuel12:3 Ehe ndi hano: ni munyagirize imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’uwo yimikishije amavuta. Mbega har’ uwo nanyaze inka? Canke har’ uwo nanyaze indogoba? Har’ uwo nagunze? Har’ uwo natwaje igitugu? Canke har’ uwo nātse impongano ikampuma amaso? Vuga ndabarihe. 
1Samuel12:4 Baramwishura, bat’ Eka ntiwatugunze, kandi ntiwadutwaje igitugu, canke ng’ ugire ico unyaga umuntu n’umwe." 
1Samuel12:5 Arababgira, at’ Uhoraho ni we cabona, bo n’uwo yimikishije amavuta, kw ata co mwambonanye. Baravuga, bati Ni we cabona." 
1Samuel12:6 Maze Samweli abarira abantu, at’ Uhoraho yatoranije Mose na Aroni, akadūgana ba sogokuruza abakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ni we cabona." 
1Samuel12:7 Nuko none ni muhagarare, mbāgiririze imbere y’ Uhoraho, mbereke n’ivyo yabagiriye vyose mu bugororotsi, mwe na ba sogokuruza." 
1Samuel12:8 Yakobo yagiye muri Egiputa, Abanyegiputa babagirira nabi; maze ba sogokuruza batakambira Uhoraho, na we atuma Mose na Aroni, babakūra muri Egiputa, babagerēra mur’ iki gihugu." 
1Samuel12:9 Ariko bibagira Uhoraho Imana yabo, abagabura mu maboko ya Sisera umugabisha w’ingabo za Hasori, no mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya no mu maboko y’umwami w’i Mowabu; barabarwanya." 
1Samuel12:10 Maze batakambira Uhoraho, bati Twaracumuye, kuko twaguhevye, ewe Uhoraho, tugasaba za Bayali na Ashitaroti; bati Non’ uturokore, udukūre mu maboko y’abansi bacu, abe ari wewe dusaba." 
1Samuel12:11 Maz’ Uhoraho arungika Yerubayali na Bedani na Yefuta nanje Samweli, arabarokora, abakūra mu maboko y’abansi banyu impande zose, mwībēra amahoro." 
1Samuel12:12 Maze mubona Nahashi umwami w’Abamoni abateye; kandi nah’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ari we yar’ umwami wanyu, murambarira, muti Nta co biriko: mut’ Umwami ni we azotuganza." 
1Samuel12:13 None rero, nguyo umwami mwitoranirije kandi mwasavye; Uhoraho abahaye umwami wo kubaganza." 
1Samuel12:14 Mugabo, ni mwubaha Uhoraho, mukamusaba, mukamwumvira, ntimugararize ngo muce mu vyagezwe vyiwe, kandi mwe n’umwami wanyu abaganza, ni mwagendanira Uhoraho Imana yanyu, bizoba vyiza." 
1Samuel12:15 Ariko ni mutumvira Uhoraho, mugaca mu vyagezwe vyiwe, ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho kuzobarwanya, nk’uko kwarwanije ba sogokuruza." 
1Samuel12:16 Nuko none hagarara murābe ikintu gihambaye Uhoraho agira akorere imbere yanyu. 
1Samuel12:17 Mbeg’ ubu si mw igenya ry’ingano? None ngira nsabe Uhoraho arungike imvura irimw’ imituragaro; muca mumenya kandi mubone kw ibigabitanyo vyanyu ari vyinshi, ivyo mwagabitanije imbere y’Uhoraho, ko mwisabiye umwami." 
1Samuel12:18 Nuko Samweli asaba Uhoraho; maz’ uwo musi nyene Uhoraho arekura imvura irimw’ imituragaro; abantu bose baca bagirira Uhoraho na Samweli ubgoba bginshi. 
1Samuel12:19 Nukw abantu bose babarira Samweli, bati Dusengere k’Uhoraho Imana yawe, twebge abasavyi bawe, twoye gupfa, kuko twageretse ku vyaha vyacu vyose iki caha co kwisabira umwami." 
1Samuel12:20 Maze Samweli yishura abantu, ati Nta co mutinya: ivyo bibi vyose mwarabikoze koko; ariko noneho ntimukikame ngo mureke gukurikira Uhoraho; ariko musabishe Uhoraho imitima yanyu yose." 
1Samuel12:21 Ntimukikame ngo mukurikire ivy’ impfagusa bidashobora kugira ikimazi canke gukiza, kukw ar’ ubusa gusa." 
1Samuel12:22 Uhoraho ntazoheba abantu biwe, kubg’ izina ryiwe rikuru, kuko vyahimbaye Uhoraho kubagira abantu biwe yiharije." 
1Samuel12:23 Kandi nanje, ntibikanzeko ko noreka kubasengera, ngacumura k’Uhoraho, ariko nzokwama mbarangira inzira nziza itunganye." 
1Samuel12:24 Ariko gusa, ni mwubahe Uhoraho, mumukorere mushize igikonyo, bivuye mu mutima; murābe ivyo yabakoreye ingen’ ar’ ibihambaye." 
1Samuel12:25 Ariko ni mwashishikara kugabitanya, muzorandurwa, mwe n’umwami wanyu." 
1Samuel13:1 Sauli yīmye amaze imyaka mirongwitatu; amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli. 
1Samuel13:2 Sauli yitoraniriza abantu mu Bisirayeli ibihumbi bitatu; muri bo, ibihumbi bibiri bāba kuri we i Mikimashi no ku musozi w’i Beteli; abandi igihumbi bāba kuri Yonatani i Gibeya h’i Bubenyamini; abasigaye arabacūra, umuntu wese yītāhira i we." 
1Samuel13:3 Bukeye Yonatani atera abo mu nsago z’ Abafilisitiya i Geba, arabatsinda; abandi Bafilisitiya baravyumva. Maze Sauli avugisha inzamba mu gihugu cose, kugira ngw Abaheburayo bavyumve." 
1Samuel13:4 Abisirayeli bose bumva bavuga ko Sauli yatsinze Abafilisitiya bo mur’ izo nsago, kandi kw ari bo nyene bāsomboroje Abafilisitiya. Nukw abantu bakōndōrera kuri Sauli i Gilugali." 
1Samuel13:5 Nukw Abafilisitiya barakorakorana ngo barwanye Abisirayeli; bāri bafise imikogote y’intambara ibihumbi mirongwitatu, n’abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi bitandatu, n’ingabo nyinshi nk’umusenyi wo kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga; baradūga, basagaza i Mikimashi ku ruhande rw’i Beti‐aveni ruhera i burasirazuba." 
1Samuel13:6 Maz’ Abisirayeli babonye ko babuze epfo na ruguru, kuko bāri mu karindiro, baja kwinyegeza mu masenga no mu bisaka no mu bitandara no mu bihuma no mu vyobo vyimbiwe kubīka amazi." 
1Samuel13:7 Mbere bamwe bo mu Baheburayo bāri bajabutse Yorodani, baja mu gihugu c’i Gadi n’i Gileyadi; ariko Sauli we yar’ akir’ i Gilugali; kand’ abāri bakiri kuri we bāri bakūtse imitima." 
1Samuel13:8 Nuko Sauli amaray’ imisi ndwi, arorereye Samweli, nk’uko yari yamuhaye indagano; arikw abantu bāri bāgiye biyonjorora bamuta, Samweli ataraza i Gilugali." 
1Samuel13:9 Sauli ni kwo kuvuga, ati Ni munzanire hano ikimazi co kwosa n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe. Nuko yosa ico kimazi." 
1Samuel13:10 Agiheza kucosa, Samweli arashika; maze Sauli arasohoka aja kumusanganira ngw amuramutse." 
1Samuel13:11 Maze Samweli aramubaza, at’ Ivyo wakoze n’ ibiki? Sauli aramwishura, at’ Erega nabonye abantu biyonjoroye bāntaye, kandi nawe nyene utaje muri ya ndagano, Abafilisitiya na bo bariko barakorakorana i Mikimashi;" 
1Samuel13:12 nuko nca niyumvira, nt’ Abafilisitiya bahava bamanuka ubu nyene i Gilugali bantere, kandi nanje ntaringinga Uhoraho ngw ampangaze; ni kwo gupfa guhāngāra, nosa ikimazi." 
1Samuel13:13 Maze Samweli abgira Sauli, ati Wakoze ic’ ubupfu; iyo wumvira icagezwe Uhoraho Imana yawe yakugeze, Uhoraho na we yokomeje ubgami bgawe ibihe vyose mu Bisirayeli." 
1Samuel13:14 Ariko noneh’ ubgami bgawe ntibuzohangama; Uhoraho aramaze kwironderera umuntu ameze nk’uk’ umutima wiwe ugomba; kandi ni we Uhoraho yashinze ngw az’ abe segaba w’abantu biwe, kuk’ utumviye ic’ Uhoraho yakugeze." 
1Samuel13:15 Nuko Samweli ava hasi, ava i Gilugali, aja i Gibeya h’i Bubenyamini. Maze Sauli aharūra abantu bari kumwe na we, baba nk’amajana atandatu." 
1Samuel13:16 Nuko Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe n’abari kumwe na bo baguma i Geba h’i Bubenyamini; arikw Abafilisitiya bāri bashagaje i Mikimashi. 
1Samuel13:17 Bukeye abanyazi b’Abafilisitiya bava aho bashagaje, bīcīyemw’ imice itatu: umuce umwe ujana inzira ija i Ofura, mu gihugu c’i Shuwali;" 
1Samuel13:18 uwundi ujana inzira ija i Beti‐horoni; uwundi ujana inzira igendana urubibe rurāba ku mwonga w’i Seboyimu ahahera mu bugaragwa. 
1Samuel13:19 Ico gihe nta mucuzi yar’ akiboneka mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; kukw Abafilisitiya bari bavuze, bati Hinge tubuze Abaheburayo kwicurishiriza inkota n’ amacumu." 
1Samuel13:20 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bāhora bamanuka mu Bafilisitiya, umuntu wese ngw anagūzeyo isuka yiwe cank’ imbāzo cank’ incabiti cank’ umuhoro;" 
1Samuel13:21 kand’ impembo bācira isuka cank’ imbāzo ryar’ ihera ryitwa pimu, iyo bācira kunagūra incabiti canke gukwikira ikimīto, car’ ikigira gatatu ca shekeli." 
1Samuel13:22 Ni co gituma umusi intambara yarumanako, mu bantu bāri kumwe na Sauli na Yonatani ata n’umwe yar’ afise inkota cank’ icumu, ukūye Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe: ni bo bāri babifise." 
1Samuel13:23 Maz’ abo mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya barunguruza, bategera hejuru ku kavōvo k’i Mikimashi." 
1Samuel14:1 Umusi ur’ izina, Yonatani mwene Sauli abarira umuhungu yamutwaza ibirwanishwa, ati Ngwino tujabuke tuje ku nsago z’Abafilisitiya hakurya. Ariko ntiyabibarira se." 
1Samuel14:2 Kandi Sauli yar’ ashagaje ah’ i Gibeya hagarukira, musi y’igiti c’umukomamanga c’i Miguroni, ari kumwe n’abantu nk’amajana atandatu," 
1Samuel14:3 harimwo na Ahiya mwene Ahitubu, Ahitubu mukuru wa Ikabodi mwene Finehasi, Finehasi yari mwene Eli, umuherezi w’Uhoraho i Shilo; kandi Ahiya yambara efodi. Arikw abantu ntibamenya ko Yonatani yagiye." 
1Samuel14:4 Kandi mur’ ako kavōvo, aho Yonatani yagomba guca ngw ashikīre za nsago z’Abafilisitiya, mu ruhande rumwe hār’ igitandara gisongoye, mu rundi ikindi; kimwe citwa Bosesi, ikindi citwa Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Igitandara kimwe cari gihagaze ahahera i burārūko, aharābana n’i Mikimashi, ikindi ahahera i bumanuko, aharābana n’i Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatani ni kwo kubarira uwo muhungu yamutwaza ibirwanishwa, ati Ngwino tujabuke tuje ku nsago za ziriya ntakebga; kumbure Uhoraho har’ ico yodukorera, kukw ata cobuza Uhoraho gukiza, atumye benshi canke bake." 
1Samuel14:7 Ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa aramwishura, ati Kora ico wiyumvira cose: hogiyo, turajana ah’ ugomba kuja hose." 
1Samuel14:8 Yonatani aramwishura, ati Nuko rero tujabuke, duseruke ah’ abo bagabo batubona;" 
1Samuel14:9 maze ni batubarira, bati Ni mugume aho, turaje; duhagarare, twoye kudūga ngo tuje iyo bari." 
1Samuel14:10 Ariko ni batubarira, bati Ni muze ino; duce tudūga, kuk’ Uhoraho azoba abagabuye mu maboko yacu: kand’ ico ni co kija kutubera ikimenyamenya." 
1Samuel14:11 Nuko bompi baseruka ah’ abo mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya bababona; maz’ Abafilisitiya baravuga, bat’ Ehe rāba Abaheburayo barasokorotse mu myobo bāri binyegejemwo!" 
1Samuel14:12 Abo mur’ izo nsago bahamagara Yonatani n’ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa, bati Ni mudūge ino, ico tubereka! Nuko Yonatani abarira ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa, ati Nkurikira, kuk’ Uhoraho abagabuye mu maboko y’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel14:13 Nuko Yonatani aharāmba yāvūra, n’ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa ar’ inyuma yiwe. Ba Bafilisitiya Yonatani arabahindikiranya, bagwa imbere yiwe, n’ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa agenda arabahohosha inyuma yiwe." 
1Samuel14:14 Mur’ ukwo kugeseza kwa mbere kwa Yonatani n’ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa, bishe abantu nka mirongwibiri, babatsinda ahantu hangana n’ikivutu umuntu yorima mu gihimba c’umusi." 
1Samuel14:15 Maze haba gucika ivutu aho bashagaje n’inyuma yaho, mbere no mu ngabo zose; abo mu nsago na ba banyazi na bo bagwa mu gatengo; isi na yo iratigita, haba gucika ivutu gutewe n’Imana." 
1Samuel14:16 Inderetsi za Sauli zar’ i Gibeya h’i Bubenyamini bagize bartya, babona izo ngabo zishwiragiye, ziruka hirya no hino." 
1Samuel14:17 Maze Sauli abarira abantu bari kumwe na we, ati Ni muharūrane, murābe ko har’ uwacu yoba yatuvuyemwo. Baharūye, basanga Yonatani n’uwamutwaza ibirwanishwa batariho." 
1Samuel14:18 Maze Sauli abarira Ahiya, ati Zana hano isandugu y’Imana; kuko mur’ iyo misi isandugu y’Imana yajana n’ Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel14:19 Maze Sauli akirikw aravugana n’umuherezi, urwamo rwari mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya rurarushiriza; nuko Sauli abarira uwo muherezi, at’ Isigireho." 
1Samuel14:20 Nuko Sauli n’abantu bari kumwe na we bose barakorana baja mu ntambara, basanga basubiranyemwo, bariko barazibagurana inkota, bacitse umuhongo rwose." 
1Samuel14:21 Maz’ Abaheburayo bari basanzwe bafatanije n’Abafilisitiya ubga mbere, bakaba bāradūganye na bo aho bāja gusagaza, na bo barahinduka, bifatanya n’Abisirayeli bari kumwe na Sauli na Yonatani." 
1Samuel14:22 Kand’ Abisirayeli bose bari binyegeje mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, bumvise kw Abafilisitiya bahunze, na bo nyene babōma inyuma babarwanya." 
1Samuel14:23 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yarokoye Abisirayeli uwo musi; kand’ urugamba rurinda rurenga i Beti‐aveni. 
1Samuel14:24 Maz’ uwo musi Abisirayeli bacika intege; kuko Sauli yari yarahije abantu, akavuga, ati Haravumwe umuntu aza kugira ico atamira butaragoroba, ntaraheza kwihōra abansi banje. Nuko nta muntu n’umwe muri bo yagize ico atamira." 
1Samuel14:25 Maz’ abantu bose baja mu kibira; kandi hasi har’ ubūki. 
1Samuel14:26 Nuko bashitse mur’ ico kibira, basanga ubgo būki buriko burashonga; ariko ntihagira umuntu n’umwe akoza intoke ku munwa, kuko bātinya kurenga indahiro." 
1Samuel14:27 Ariko Yonatani we, igihe se yarahiza abantu, ntiyumva, ni kwo gutuma inkoni yitwaje, akayikoza ku mutsāma w’ ubūki, agashira mu kanwa, akajisho kakagaruka." 
1Samuel14:28 Maz’ umwe mur’ abo bantu aramubarira, at’ Erega so yari yihanikirije abantu, arabarahiza, ngo Haravumwe umuntu aza kugira ico atamira uyu musi. Kand’ abantu bari badendebukiwe." 
1Samuel14:29 Maze Yonatani aramwishura, ati Data yagiriye abantu nabi! Ehe rāba ingen’ akajisho kagarutse, aho ntamiriye kur’ ubu būki." 
1Samuel14:30 Uyu musi iyaba abantu baretswe bakarya ku vyo basahuye abansi babo, vyari kugenda neza; ariko noneho mu Bafilisitiya ntihapfuye benshi cane." 
1Samuel14:31 Nuk’ uwo musi bica Abafilisitiya, uhereye i Mikimashi ugashitsa i Ayaloni; arikw abantu bari badendebukiwe cane." 
1Samuel14:32 Hanyuma bagurukira ku myiri banyaze, bafata intama n’inka n’inyana, bazitsinda hasi barazizibagura, bazirya zikirimw’ amaraso." 
1Samuel14:33 Baca babibarira Sauli, bat’ Ereg’ abantu baracumuye k’Uhoraho, kuko bariko bararya inyama amaraso akirimwo. Arababgira, ati Murahemutse; ni muntembagarize hano ibuye rinini." 
1Samuel14:34 Maze Sauli aravuga, ati Ni mugende mukwiragire mu bantu, mubabgire, umuntu wese anzanire inka yanyaze cank’ intama, ayikererere hano. Muheze muzirye, mureke gucumura k’Uhoraho, mukazirya amaraso akirimwo. Nuko mur’ iryo joro umuntu wese muri bo azana inka yanyaze, bazikerereraho." 
1Samuel14:35 Maze Sauli yubakira Uhoraho igicaniro; kand’ ico gicaniro ni co ca mbere yubakiye Uhoraho. 
1Samuel14:36 Maze Sauli aravuga, at’ Enda ni muze tumanuke, dukurikire Abafilisitiya iri joro, turāre turabanyaga gushitsa mu macaca, ntihagire umuntu n’umwe dusiga. Baramwishura, bati Kora uk’ ugomba kwose. Arik’ umuherezi ati Ni mwīgire hano twēgēre Imana." 
1Samuel14:37 Nuko Sauli asiguza Imana, ati Mbega mmanuke nkurikire Abafilisitiya? Urabagabura mu maboko y’Abisirayeli? Arik’ uwo musi ntiyamwishura." 
1Samuel14:38 Maze Sauli aravuga, ati Ni mwīgire hano, mwese abakuru b’abantu, musuzume murābe icaha cakozwe uyu musi ic’ ari co." 
1Samuel14:39 Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, yama arokora Abisirayeli, naho yoba umwana wanje Yonatani, arapfa nta kabuza! Ariko mu bantu bose ntihagira n’umwe agira ico amwishura." 
1Samuel14:40 Maz’ abarira Abisirayeli bose, ati Ni muherēre ku ruhande rumwe, nanje na Yonatani umwana wanje turaherēra ku rundi. Nukw abantu bishura Sauli, bati Kora uk’ ugomba." 
1Samuel14:41 Maze Sauli aravuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, (n’ iki gitumye utishura umusavyi wawe uyu musi? Namb’ ico caha kiri muri jewe canke muri Yonatani umwana wanje, Uhoraho Mana y’Abisirayeli, rekura Urimu, arikw asangwa kiri mu bantu bawe Abisirayeli), rekura Tumimu. Nuk’ ubupfindo bufata Yonatani na Sauli, arikw abantu barēra." 
1Samuel14:42 Maze Sauli aravuga, ati Ni mudupfindire twe na Yonatani umwana wanje. Nuko Yonatani arafatwa." 
1Samuel14:43 Sauli araheza abgira Yonatani, ati Mbarira ico wakoze. Yonatani aramwishura, ati Nakojeje inkoni nari nitwaje mu mutsāma w’ubūki, ndumviriza; none rero ndemeye gupfa." 
1Samuel14:44 Sauli aramwishura, ati Ni wagenda udapfuye ga Yonatani, Imana ibimpanire, mbere birushirije." 
1Samuel14:45 Arikw abantu babarira Sauli, bati None Yonatani yopfa, kand’ ari we yahaye Abisirayeli ugutsinda kungana gurtyo? Biragahera! Turahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho yukw ata n’agashatsi na kamwe ko ku mutwe wiwe kazohara ngo gakorokere hasi; kuko ku vyabaye uyu musi yafatanije n’Imana. Uko ni kw abantu bākijije Yonatani ngo ntāpfe." 
1Samuel14:46 Maze Sauli arīgīra, areka gukurikira Abafilisitiya; Abafilisitiya na bo basubira i wabo." 
1Samuel14:47 Sauli amaze kuja ku ngoma ngw aganze Abisirayeli, arwanya abansi biwe bose impande zose, Abanyamowabu n’Abamoni n’ Abanyedomu, n’abami b’i Zoba, n’Abafilisitiya; yagenda anesha aho yatumbera hose." 
1Samuel14:48 Akora ivy’ ubuhizi, anesha Abamaleki, arokora Abisirayeli, abakūra mu maboko y’ababanyaga." 
1Samuel14:49 Abahungu ba Sauli bāri Yonatani na Ishivi na Malikishuwa, kand’ abakobga biwe bompi, umukuru yari Merabu, umutoyi yari Mikali."
