1Samuel14:50 Muka Sauli yitwa Ahinowamu mwene Ahimasi; kand’ umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe yari Abuneri mwene Neri, se wabo wa Sauli;" 
1Samuel14:51 Kishi ni we yari se wa Sauli, kandi Neri se wa Abuneri yari mwene Abiyeli." 
1Samuel14:52 Imisi yose Sauli yabayeho hābaye indwano zigoye hagati yabo n’Abafilisitiya; kandi Sauli, iy’ abonye umuntu wese w’amagara kandi w’umuhizi yaca amujana i we." 
1Samuel15:1 Maze Samweli abarira Sauli, ati Ni jewe Uhoraho yatumye kukwimikisha amavuta, ng’ ube umwami w’abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli. None rero ni wumve amajambo y’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel15:2 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize: ngw Amaramaje guhana Abamaleki, abahoye ivyo bagiriye Abisirayeli, ingene bābabujije inzira igihe bādūga bava muri Egiputa." 
1Samuel15:3 None rero genda, utere Abamaleki, ubarandure rwose n’ivyo bafise vyose; ntuz’ ugire uwo uziguriza, arik’ uz’ ugeseze abagabo n’abagore n’abana, mbere n’abonka, bo n’inka n’intama n’ingamiya n’indogoba." 
1Samuel15:4 Nuko Sauli ahamagaza ingabo, aziharūrira i Telayimu, zār’ ingabo ibihumbi amajana abiri, bo n’iz’ i Buyuda ibihumbi cumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Bukeye Sauli aja ku gisagara c’Abamaleki, aryama mu mwonga waho." 
1Samuel15:6 Ariko Sauli abarira Abanyakeni, ati Hogi ni mugende, muve mu Bamaleki, noye kubarandurana na bo, kuko mwagiriye Abisirayeli bose neza, igihe bādūga bava muri Egiputa. Nukw Abanyakeni bava mu Bamaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Maze Sauli ageseza Abamaleki uhereye i Havila ugashitsa i Shura, aharābana na Egiputa." 
1Samuel15:8 Afata mpiri umwami wabo Agagi, aranduza abantu bose inkota." 
1Samuel15:9 Ariko Sauli n’ingabo ziwe baziguriza Agagi, bo n’ibirusha ibindi ubgiza mu ntama no mu nka no mu mashūri anuze no mu myagazi y’intama, mber’ ivyiza‐vyiza vyose, banka kubigeseza rwose; arikw ibigayitse vyose n’ ibitagira ico bimaze aba ari vyo bageseza rwose." 
1Samuel15:10 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Samweli," 
1Samuel15:11 riti Ndicujije icatumye nimika Sauli; kuko yamvuyeko, akanka gukora ivyo namubariye. Maze Samweli araraka, akēsha ijoro atakambira Uhoraho." 
1Samuel15:12 Bukeye akoroka kare ngw aje gusanganira Sauli; baramubarira, bati Sauli yari yagiye i Karumeli, ahīshingira icibutso; hanyuma arahindukira, akomeza inzira amanuka i Gilugali." 
1Samuel15:13 Maze Samweli ashikīra Sauli; Sauli aramubarira, at’ Uragahezagirwa n’Uhoraho! Ico Uhoraho yambariye nāgishikije." 
1Samuel15:14 Samweli aramubaza, ati Non’ urwo rwānāga rw’intama runza mu matwi, bo n’ukwabagirana kw’inka numva, n’ivy’ iki?" 
1Samuel15:15 Sauli aramwishura, ati N’izo bākūye mu Bamaleki, kukw abantu bazigurije izirusha izindi ubgiza mu ntama no mu nka, ngo n’izo gushikanira Uhoraho Imana yawe kw ibimazi; na vyo ibindi vyose twarabigesheje rwose." 
1Samuel15:16 Maze Samweli yishura Sauli, ati Hagarara! Hinge nkubarire nanje ivyo Uhoraho yarāye ambariye iri joro. Aramwishura, at’ Ego, vuga." 
1Samuel15:17 Samweli aramubgira, ati Naho wari warīkēngereye, mbega ntiwagizwe uwo kuganza imiryango y’ Abisirayeli? Uhoraho ntiyakwimikishije amavuta ng’ube umwami w’Abisirayeli?" 
1Samuel15:18 Kand’ akagutuma ku rubanza, akakubgira, ati Genda ugeseze rwose ba banyavyaha b’Abamaleki, ubarwanye gushitsa baherengeteye?" 
1Samuel15:19 None se n’iki cakubujije kwumvira Uhoraho, ukagurukira ku minyago, ugakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi?" 
1Samuel15:20 Maze Sauli yishura Samweli, at’ Ereg’ Uhoraho nāmwumviye: kand’ urwo rubanza Uhoraho yantumyeko nārumaze; nazanye Agagi umwami w’Abamaleki, kand’ Abamaleki ubgabo narabagesheje rwose." 
1Samuel15:21 Arikw abantu ni bo bākūye intama n’inka mu zo bānyaze, izarusha izindi kuba nziza mu zāgira zigesezwe, ngo zize zibe izo gushikanira Uhoraho Imana yawe kw ibimazi ngaha i Gilugali." 
1Samuel15:22 Samweli aramwishura, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho ahimbarwa n’ibimazi vyoswa n’ ibindi bimazi gusumba ūmwumviye? Erega kwumvira gusumba ibimazi, no kuyoboka gusumba ibinure vy’impfizi z’intama." 
1Samuel15:23 Kuk’ ubugarariji ari co kimwe n’icaha c’ubupfumu, kandi kuba ntagondwa ni kimwe no gusenga ibishushanyo n’ibigirwamana. Ko wanse ijambo ry’Uhoraho, na we yanse k’uba ku ngoma." 
1Samuel15:24 Maze Sauli yishura Samweli, ati Naracumuye, kuko ntumviye icagezwe c’Uhoraho n’amajambo yawe, ngatinya abantu nkabumvira." 
1Samuel15:25 None rero ndakwinginze, mparira icaha canje; uze dusubiraneyo, kugira ngo nsenge Uhoraho." 
1Samuel15:26 Samweli yishura Sauli, at’ Eka sinsubiranayo nawe; ko wanse ijambo ry’Uhoraho, na we yanse k’uba umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel15:27 Nuko Samweli agihindukira ngw agende, Sauli ashingīra umutwe w’impuzu yiwe, iratabuka." 
1Samuel15:28 Maze Samweli aramubarira, at’ Uhoraho na we uyu musi agutabuyekw ingoma y’Abisirayeli, ayihaye mugenzawe akuruta." 
1Samuel15:29 Ereg’ Inyenkomezi y’Abisirayeli ntibesha, kandi ntiyīrīmbūra, kukw atar’ umuntu ngw ize yīrīmbūre." 
1Samuel15:30 Na we aramwishura, ati Naracumuye; yamara none ndakwinginze, untere itēka imbere y’abakuru bo mu bantu banje n’imbere y’Abisirayeli, dusubiraneyo kugira ngo nsenge Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
1Samuel15:31 Nuko Samweli arahindukira, akurikira Sauli; Sauli asenga Uhoraho." 
1Samuel15:32 Maze Samweli aravuga, ati Ni munzanire hano Agagi umwami w’Abamaleki. Nuko Agagi aza ah’ ari araramanga; aravuga, ati N’ukuri ibamba ry’urupfu rirashize." 
1Samuel15:33 Maze Samweli aramubgira, ati Nk’ukw inkota yawe yagira abagore imbura, ni ko na nyoko abaye imbura mu bandi bagore. Nuko Samweli amuhimbagurira imbere y’Uhoraho i Gilugali." 
1Samuel15:34 Maze Samweli aja i Rama, Sauli na we aradūga, ataha i muhira i we i Gibeya." 
1Samuel15:35 Guhēra ico gihe Samweli ntiyongera kubonana na Sauli kurinda apfa, atar’ ukwama amuririra; kand’ Uhoraho aricuza ico yimikiye Sauli ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
1Samuel16:1 Maz’ Uhoraho abaza Samweli, at’ Uzogeza hehe kuririra Sauli, kandi namaze kwanka kw aba umwami w’Abisirayeli? Uzuza ihembe ryawe amavuta, uheze uze ngutume kuri Isayi w’i Betelehemu, kuko nironkeye umwami mu bahungu biwe." 
1Samuel16:2 Samweli arasiguza, ati Nogenda nte? Erega Sauli ni yavyumva azonyica. Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Hitana inka y’ishashi, ugende, uvuge, uti Nje gushikanira Uhoraho ikimazi." 
1Samuel16:3 Uheze uhamagare Isayi aze kur’ ico kimazi; nanje nzokwereka uk’ uzogenza; uz’ undobanurize amavuta uwo nzokurangira. 
1Samuel16:4 Nuko Samweli agenza nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubgiye, aja i Betelehemu. Ashitseyo, abakuru b’igisagara baza kumusanganira, bahinda agashitsi. Baramubaza, bati Mbeg’ ugenzwa n’amahoro?" 
1Samuel16:5 At’ Ego me n’amahoro; nzanywe no gushikanira Uhoraho ikimazi. Nuko ni mwiyeze, muze tujane kur’ ico kimazi. Kandi yeza Isayi n’abahungu biwe, abahamagara kuza kur’ ico kimazi." 
1Samuel16:6 Nuko bashitseyo, abonye Eliyabu, aribgira, ati Nta gukekeranya, uwo Uhoraho agira yimikishe amavuta nguyu imbere yiwe." 
1Samuel16:7 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira Samweli, ati Nta co urāba ishusho yiwe, cank’ ikirēho ciwe, kuko ntāmushimye; erega jewe sindāba nk’ukw abantu barāba: kukw abantu barāba ku rukoba gusa, ariko jewe Uhoraho ndāba mu mutima." 
1Samuel16:8 Maze Isayi ahamagara Abinadabu, amwereka Samweli. Samweli aravuga, ati N’uyu nyene Uhoraho si we yatoranije." 
1Samuel16:9 Isayi arongera amwereka Shama; na ho nyene Samweli aravuga, at’ Eka n’uyu na we Uhoraho si we yatoranije." 
1Samuel16:10 Nuko Isayi yerekana indwi mu bahungu biwe ngo Samweli abarābe. Samweli abarira Isayi, at’ Aba si bo Uhoraho yatoranije." 
1Samuel16:11 Maze Samweli abaza Isayi, ati Mbeg’ abana bawe bose n’abo? Aramwishura, ati Hasigaye umuhererezi, ariko rer’ ari ku ntama. Nuko Samweli aramubarira, ati Tuma ūja kumuhamagara, kuko tutaribgicare ngo turye ataraza." 
1Samuel16:12 Nukw atuma ūja kumuzana. Kandi yar’ umuhungu w’inzobe, w’amaso meza, w’umunyakaranga. Maz’ Uhoraho aravuga, ati Va hasi, umusukekw amavuta, kuko wa wundi ar’ uyo." 
1Samuel16:13 Nuko Samweli aca yābīra rya hembe ry’amavuta, ayamusukako bakuru be bamukikije. Kuva uwo musi Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yama aza kuri Dawidi akābushūngwe. Nuko Samweli arahaguruka, asubira i Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho amaze kuva kuri Sauli, impwemu mbi irungitswe n’Uhoraho yama igenda imufata bga gikange." 
1Samuel16:15 Maz’ abantu ba Sauli baramubarira, bat’ Ereg’ impwemu mbi irungitswe n’ Uhoraho ni yo igukanga!" 
1Samuel16:16 Enda se databuja, n’udutume twebge abasavyi bawe duhagaze hano, tuje kukuronderera umuntu w’ umuhinga azi gucuraranga inanga; maz’ iyo mpwemu mbi irungitswe n’Imana iy’ igufashe, az’ agucurarangire, ukire." 
1Samuel16:17 Nuko Sauli yishura abo bantu biwe, ati Nuko ni mundonderere umuntu azi gucuraranga neza, mumunzanire." 
1Samuel16:18 Umuhungu umwe w’umusore aramwishura, ati Nabonye umuhungu wa Isayi w’i Betelehemu, n’umucuraranzi w’umuhinga, n’ umuhizi w’inkomezi kand’ arazi kurwana, aritonda mu vyo avuga, n’umuntu w’igikundiro, kand’ Uhoraho ari kumwe na we." 
1Samuel16:19 Nuko Sauli atuma intumwa kuri Isayi, uti Murungikire umuhungu wawe Dawidi, umwe aragira intama." 
1Samuel16:20 Nuko Isayi yābīra indogoba, ayishirakw imitsima n’umukuza w’urusāto wuzuye vino, n’umwagazi w’impene, abirungikana umuhungu wiwe Dawidi ngw abishikanire Sauli." 
1Samuel16:21 Nuko Dawidi ashitse kwa Sauli arenguka imbere yiwe; Sauli aramukunda cane, amugira ūmutwaza ibirwanishwa." 
1Samuel16:22 Maze Sauli atuma kuri Isayi, ut’ Aragusavye Dawidi ngw amugendanire, kukw amushimye." 
1Samuel16:23 Hanyuma uko ya mpwemu mbi yarungitswe n’Imana yafata Sauli, Dawidi yahitana inanga, agacuraranga; maze Sauli akoroherwa agakira, iyo mpwemu mbi ikamuvako." 
1Samuel17:1 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bakoranya ingabo zabo ngo batere; bazikoraniriza i Sokoho h’i Buyuda, basagaza ahitwa Efesi‐damimu, hagati y’i Sokoho n’i Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Sauli n’Abisirayeli na bo barakorakorana, basagaza ku mwonga Ela, batonda urugamba ngo barwanye Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel17:3 Abafilisitiya batonda ku musozi wo hakurya, Abisirayeli ku wo hakuno, umwonga ugaca hagati yabo." 
1Samuel17:4 Bukeye mu nsago z’Abafilisitiya havamw’ umuhizi yitwa Goliyati w’i Gati; uburebure bgiwe bgar’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora n’itambge rimwe ry’intoke. 
1Samuel17:5 Kandi yari yambaye inkofero y’umuringa mu mutwe, n’umwinjiro ukozwe mu miringa, urivye shekeli ibihumbi bitanu;" 
1Samuel17:6 ku maguru yari yambaye ibikingira imirundi bikozwe mu miringa; kandi yar’ afise agakobero k’umuringa nyene gatendera inyuma mu butīkorwa. 
1Samuel17:7 Uruti rw’icumu ryiwe rwāngana n’umwaro ujishirwakw impuzu, icumu ubgaryo ryar’ iryo mu vyuma, ryari ririvye shekeli amajana atandatu; kand’ uwamutwaza inkinzo yaja imbere yiwe." 
1Samuel17:8 Arahagarara, atera akamo ingabo z’Abisirayeli, ati N’iki cabazanye gutonda urugamba? Mbega sind’ Umufilisitiya, namwe mukaba abaja ba Sauli? Enda ni mwitorere umuntu, amanuke aze duhwane!" 
1Samuel17:9 Ni yashobora kundwanya akanyica, tuzoba abaja banyu; nanje ni nashobora kumutsinda nkamwica, ni mwebge muzoba abaja bacu, mudukorere." 
1Samuel17:10 Uwo Mufilisitiya arongera aravuga, at’ Uyu musi ndagaye ingabo z’Abisirayeli! Enda ni muzane umuntu, twimarize twempi!" 
1Samuel17:11 Maze Sauli n’Abisirayeli bose bumvise ayo magambo y’Umufilisitiya, barīhebūra, bagira ubgoba bginshi." 
1Samuel17:12 Kandi Dawidi yar’ umwana wa wa Munyefurata w’i Betelehemu h’i Buyuda yitwa Isayi; Isayi yar’ afise abahungu munani; kand’ igihe Sauli yīma Isayi yar’ ashitse mu zabukuru. 
1Samuel17:13 Kand’ abahungu batatu bakuru ba Isayi bāri bāratabaranye na Sauli; amazina y’abo bahungu biwe batatu bātabaye, uw’ imfura ni Eliyabu, uwa kabiri ni Abinadabu, uwa gatatu ni Shama." 
1Samuel17:14 Dawidi ni we yar’ umuhererezi; kand’ abo bakuru be batatu bāri bāratabaranye na Sauli. 
1Samuel17:15 Kandi Dawidi yaja agīshanya imbu, hamwe akaba kwa Sauli, ahandi akaja kuragira intama za se i Betelehemu." 
1Samuel17:16 Nuk’ uwo Mufilisitiya, uko bukeye uko bgije, akāma aseruka ahibonekeza, abasomboroza, kumara imisi mirongwine." 
1Samuel17:17 Bukeye Isayi abarira umuhungu wiwe Dawidi, ati Genda ugemurire bakuru bawe ingero imwe kur’ izi ngano zikaranze, n’iyi mitsima cumi, ubandanye aho bashagaje, ubibashīre." 
1Samuel17:18 Kand’ ugemurire umugabisha w’umuce barimwo, aya masoro ukw ar’ icumi y’umukānyūre w’amavuta; uheze urābe bakuru bawe uko bameze, unzanire agakuru k’imvāho." 
1Samuel17:19 Kandi Sauli n’abo bakuru ba Dawidi n’ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli bāri kuri wa mwonga Ela bashāmiranye n’Abafilisitiya. 
1Samuel17:20 Nuko Dawidi akoroka kare, asigarana intama ūzimurābira, ahitana ivyo bintu aragenda, nk’uko Isayi yamubariye, ashikira aho barāza imikogote y’intambara, ahūra ingabo zigiye gutonda urugamba zīrahira ubutōre." 
1Samuel17:21 Nukw Abisirayeli batonda urugamba, n’Abafilisitiya n’uko, urugamba ruhanganye n’ urundi." 
1Samuel17:22 Maze Dawidi abītsa ivyo yar’ agemuye ūsigarana ibintu vy’intēkera, ariruka aja mu ngabo, aramutsa bakuru be." 
1Samuel17:23 Akirikw arayāga na bo, wa muhizi w’Umufilisitiya w’i Gati yitwa Goliyati asokoroka mu ngabo z’Abafilisitiya, atangura kwiyamāmura nk’ uko yahora. Dawidi aravyumva." 
1Samuel17:24 Abisirayeli bose bamubonye, bacika ivutu baramuhunga." 
1Samuel17:25 Abisirayeli baravuga, bati Ntimubona uriya mugabo adūze? Adūganywe no gucōkōra Abisirayeli, nta kindi. Umuntu yomwica, umwami azomugororera vyinshi, kand’ azomushingira umwana wiwe, akūre n’inzu ya se kw ikori mu Bisirayeli." 
1Samuel17:26 Maze Dawidi abaza abantu bahagaze i ruhande yiwe, at’ Uwokwica uwo Mufilisitiya, agakūra igitutsi ku Bisirayeli, bomugororera iki? Mbeg’ uwo Mufilisitiya w’intakebga n’iki, ah’ acōkōra ingabo z’Imana nzima?" 
1Samuel17:27 Abantu bamwishura nk’ivyo bari bahejeje kuvuga, bat’ Uwomwica, uko ni ko yogororerwa." 
1Samuel17:28 Maze Eliyabu mukuru we, imfura ya se, yumvise Dawidi avugana n’abo bantu, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa, aramubaza, ati Wazanywe n’iki? Mbega bga butama wabusigaranye nde mu bugaragwa? Ndazi amanyama yawe, n’ ubugāba bgo mu mutima wawe: ereg’ icakuzanye n’ukugira ng’ urābe intambara." 
1Samuel17:29 Dawidi aramwishura, ati None nkoze iki? Ntikwar’ ukubaza gusa?" 
1Samuel17:30 Arahindukira, arāba uwundi, na we amubaza nk’ivyo, abantu basubira kumwishura nk’ivya mbere." 
1Samuel17:31 Bumvise amajambo Dawidi avuga, bayashengerana kwa Sauli; araheza aramuhamagaza." 
1Samuel17:32 Dawidi ashitse, abarira Sauli, ati Ntihagire uwo arandura umutima; jewe umusavyi wawe ndagiye kurwana n’uwo Mufilisitiya." 
1Samuel17:33 Sauli yishura Dawidi, ati Ntiwoshobora kuja kurwanya uwo Mufilisitiya, kuk’ ukir’ umwana, ariko we yamenyereye kurwana uhereye mu buto bgiwe." 
1Samuel17:34 Dawidi yishura Sauli, ati Jewe umusavyi wawe iyo ndagiye intama za data, hakaza intambge cank’ idubu kigasahura umwana w’intama mu mukuku," 
1Samuel17:35 twāca tugerekerana nkagikubita, nkakiyāka mu kanwa; cāmvumbukana nkagisūmira urusakanwa, nkagikubita nkacica." 
1Samuel17:36 Non’ umusavyi wawe ko namaze kwica intambge n’idubu, n’uwo Mufilisitiya w’intakebga azopfa nka kimwe muri vyo, kuko yacōkōye ingabo z’Imana nzima." 
1Samuel17:37 Dawidi atakw aravuga, at’ Uhoraho yagiye andokora mu nzāra z’intambge no mu z’idubu, arandokora no mu maboko y’uwo Mufilisitiya. Nuko Sauli abarira Dawidi, ati Nuko genda; Uhoraho abane nawe." 
1Samuel17:38 Maze Sauli yambika Dawidi imyambaro yiwe, amwambika n’inkofero y’umuringa mu mutwe, n’umwinjiro w’ ivyuma." 
1Samuel17:39 Dawidi araheza ahagatira inkota yiwe hejuru y’iyo myambaro, agerageza gutambuka ngw arābe, kukw atabimenyereye. Maz’ abarira Sauli, at’ Ibi sinshobora kubijana, kuko ntābimenyereye. Nuko Dawidi aravyiyambura." 
1Samuel17:40 Araheza ahitana inkoni yiwe, ashitse ku kagezi, atoramw’ amabuye y’imburungu atanu, ayarokeza mw isaho yiwe y’ubgungere; kandi yar’ afise umugozi mu ntoke wo guteresha ibuye; nukw aja guhūra na wa Mufilisitiya." 
1Samuel17:41 Wa Mufilisitiya na we aza guhūra na Dawidi, ūmutwaje inkinzo amutamaje imbere." 
1Samuel17:42 Nuko wa Mufilisitiya abonye Dawidi, aramwitegereza, aramukēngēra, kuko yar’ akir’ umwana w’umusore, kandi yar’ inzobe w’umunyakarānga." 
1Samuel17:43 Wa Mufilisitiya abaza Dawidi, ati Mbeg’ ugira ngo nd’ imbga, k’uje kundwanya ufise inkoni? Araheza avuma Dawidi mu mazina y’imana ziwe." 
1Samuel17:44 Uwo Mufilisitiya abarira Dawidi, ati Ngwino nkubāgire ibisīga vyo mu kirēre n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba!" 
1Samuel17:45 Dawidi yishura uwo Mufilisitiya, at’ Uje kundwanya ufise inkota n’icumu n’agakobero, ariko jewe nje kukurwanya mw izina ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’ingabo z’Abisirayeli wacōkōye." 
1Samuel17:46 Uyu musi Uhoraho arakugabuye mu maboko yanje; ngira nkwice, nguce izosi; kand’ imivyimba y’ingabo z’Abafilisitiya ngira ndayigaburire ibisīga vyo mu kirēre n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, kugira ngw isi yose imenye ko mu Bisirayeli har’ Imana;" 
1Samuel17:47 kand’ iri koraniro ryose rimenye yuk’ Uhoraho adakirisha inkota cank’ icumu, kukw intambara ar’ iy’ Uhoraho, kandi ni we agira abagabure mu maboko yacu." 
1Samuel17:48 Nuko wa Mufilisitiya atanguye kuza ngw ahūre na Dawidi, Dawidi arabandanya ariruka atumbereye ingabo z’Abafilisitiya, ngw ahūre n’uwo Mufilisitiya nyene." 
1Samuel17:49 Maze Dawidi atuma ukuboko mw isaho yiwe, akūray’ ibuye, ariteresha wa mugozi, arinega uwo Mufilisitiya mu ruhanga, rimwiteramwo, aca yikubita hasi yubamye." 
1Samuel17:50 Uko ni ko Dawidi yagangahuje uwo Mufilisitiya ibuye yateresheje umugozi, akamwica; kandi nta nkota Dawidi yari yitwaje." 
1Samuel17:51 Maze Dawidi arirukanga, amuhagarara hejuru, asūmira inkota yiwe, ayimusokōra mu rwubati, aramuhohosha, amuca izosi. Maz’ Abafilisitiya babonye umuhizi wabo apfuye, baca baratemesha." 
1Samuel17:52 Maz’ ingabo z’Abisirayeli n’iz’ Abayuda zikūra hasi, zishira urwamo hejuru, zikinagiza Abafilisitiya zibashitsa i Gati no ku marembo y’i Ekuroni: Abafilisitiya bagenda barahindikirana bakomeretse ku nzira ija i Sharayimu, kurinda bashika i Gati n’i Ekuroni." 
1Samuel17:53 Abisirayeli baraheza bava inyuma y’ Abafilisitiya, baragaruka basahura insago zabo." 
1Samuel17:54 Maze Dawidi afata umutwe wa wa Mufilisitiya, awujana i Yerusalemu; arikw ibirwanishwa vyo asiga abibītse mw ihema ryiwe." 
1Samuel17:55 Igihe Sauli yabona Dawidi agiye kurwana na wa Mufilisitiya, yabajije Abuneri umugabisha w’ ingabo ziwe, ati Harya ga Abuneri, urya muhungu ni mwene nde? Na we aramwishura, ati Mugenzi, indahiro ni wewe nyene nkamumenya!" 
1Samuel17:56 Umwami aramwishura, ati Baza se w’uwo muhungu uw’ ari we." 
1Samuel17:57 Hanyuma Dawidi atabarutse, avuye kwica wa Mufilisitiya, Abuneri aramujana, amushikiriza Sauli, afise umutwe wa wa Mufilisitiya mu ntoke." 
1Samuel17:58 Sauli aramubaza, ati Harya uri mwene nde, ga wa muhungu? Dawidi aramwishura, ati Nd’ umwana w’umusavyi wawe Isayi w’i Betelehemu." 
1Samuel18:1 Nuko Dawidi amaze kugānīra na Sauli, umutima wa Yonatani uca ufatana n’uwa Dawidi akaramata, Yonatani amukunda nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel18:2 Maz’ uwo musi Sauli aca agumya Dawidi, ntiyamukundira gusubira kwa se ukundi." 
1Samuel18:3 Bukeye Yonatani asezerana isezerano na Dawidi, kuko yar’ amukunze nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonatani yikiza umutamana wiwe yari yambaye, awuha Dawidi, amuha n’ivyo yambara mu ntambara, mbere n’inkota yiwe n’ umuheto n’umukanda." 
1Samuel18:5 Nuko Dawidi yama agenda aho Sauli yamutuma hose, akabigiramw’ ikiganza ciza, bituma Sauli amuha kugaba ingabo ziwe; abantu bose barabishima, mbere n’abagendanyi ba Sauli na bo." 
1Samuel18:6 Maze mw itabaruka ryabo, Dawidi agarutse avuye kwica wa Mufilisitiya, abagore bava mu bisagara vyose vy’Abisirayeli, bavyina batamba, baza gusanganira umwami Sauli, bafise udushāko tw’ingoma n’utundi tuvuga nk’ inanga, bavuza impundu." 
1Samuel18:7 Mur’ ukwo kuvyina, abagore bāgenda baritabiriza, bati Sauli yishe ibihumbi, Dawidi we yica ibihumbi indiri." 
1Samuel18:8 Sauli aca arashangashirwa, iryo jambo riramubabaza; aravuga, ati Dawidi bamuharūyekw ibihumbi indiri, nanje jeho bamparūyek’ uduhumbi gusa. None har’ ikindi agishigaje, atar’ ingoma?" 
1Samuel18:9 Kuva uyo musi Sauli yama arāba Dawidi ijisho ribi. 
1Samuel18:10 Bukeye impwemu mbi irungitswe n’Imana iza kuri Sauli akābushūngwe, ashirakw ariyamiriza ari mu ngoro, Dawidi akavuza inanga nk’uko yar’ asanzwe akora imisi yose; kandi Sauli yar’ afise icumu mu ntoke." 
1Samuel18:11 Araheza ararirekura, ati Hinge ndarisākize Dawidi, rirume ku nzu. Ariko Dawidi amuzibukira kabiri." 
1Samuel18:12 Maze Sauli atinya Dawidi, kuk’ Uhoraho yari kumwe na we, ariko we akaba yamuvuyeko." 
1Samuel18:13 Ni co catumye amwigizayo, akamugira umugabisha w’ingabo igihumbi, akāma atabarana na zo amaja n’amaza." 
1Samuel18:14 Kandi Dawidi yagira ikiganza ciza mu vyo yakora vyose, kand’ Uhoraho yari kumwe na we." 
1Samuel18:15 Maze Sauli abonye ukuntu agira ikiganza ciza, aramutinya." 
1Samuel18:16 Arikw Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bose bākunda Dawidi, kuko yatabarana na bo amaja n’amaza." 
1Samuel18:17 Bukeye Sauli abarira Dawidi, ati Nguyo umukobga wanje mukuru Merabu, nzomuguha; ariko rero, uz’ ube umuhizi wo kundwanira, urwane intambara z’Uhoraho. Kuko Sauli yavuga, ati Yoye kuzongwako, arikw az’ agwe ku Bafilisitiya." 
1Samuel18:18 Ariko Dawidi abarira Sauli, ati Mbega jewe, n’inda n’ indēsho, n’umuryango wacu, n’ inzu ya data ukw iri mu Bisirayeli, noba umukwe w’umwami?" 
1Samuel18:19 Arikw igihe Merabu uwo mukobga wa Sauli yar’ akwiye gushingirwa Dawidi, bamuha Aduriyeli Umumeholati, aramurongora." 
1Samuel18:20 Hanyuma Mikali umukobga wa Sauli agomwa Dawidi; babibgira Sauli, arabishima." 
1Samuel18:21 Aravuga, ati Nzomumuha, amubere umutego, agwe ku Bafilisitiya. Ni co catumye Sauli abarira Dawidi ubugira kabiri, at’ Uyu musi ubaye umukwe wanje." 
1Samuel18:22 Nuko Sauli abarira abantu biwe, ati Ni muje kuyāga na Dawidi mu mpisho, mumubarire, mut’ Umve, umwami aragushima, kandi n’ abantu biwe bose baragukunda; muti None rer’ ukwiye kuba umukwe w’umwami." 
1Samuel18:23 Nukw abo bantu ba Sauli babarira Dawidi ayo majambo; Dawidi arabishura, ati Mugira ngo biroroshe kuba umukwe w’umwami, nanje nd’ umworo w’inkēngērwa?" 
1Samuel18:24 Hanyuma abo bantu ba Sauli baramubarira, bati Dawidi yavuze artya n’artya." 
1Samuel18:25 Maze Sauli arababarira, ati Muze mubarire Dawidi, muti Ntagomba inkwano; mut’ Ico agomba n’ubugabo ijana uzoshāhura Abafilisitiya, kugira ngo yīhōre abansi biwe. Ariko Sauli yagira ngw akororere Dawidi mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel18:26 Nukw abo bantu biwe bamaze kubarira Dawidi ayo majambo, Dawidi aca ashima kuba umukwe w’umwami." 
1Samuel18:27 Igihe gishinzwe kitaragera, Dawidi ahagurukana n’ingabo ziwe, yica mu Bafilisitiya abagabo amajana abiri; nuko Dawidi atabarukana ubugabo bgabo, babushikiriza umwami ukw igitigiri cabgo kingana, kugira ngo Dawidi abone kuba umukwe w’umwami. Nuko Sauli amushingira umukobga wiwe Mikali." 
1Samuel18:28 Kandi Sauli amenya yuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe na Dawidi, arabitahura. Kandi Mikali umukobga wa Sauli yakunda Dawidi." 
1Samuel18:29 Nuko Sauli arushiriza gutinya Dawidi, amugendanira akazīka imisi yose." 
1Samuel18:30 Bukeye abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya baza gutera; kand’ uko bātera kwose, Dawidi yagira ibakwe kurusha abandi bantu bose ba Sauli, bituma izina ryiwe riba rurangiranwa." 
1Samuel19:1 Bukeye Sauli abarira Yonatani umuhungu wiwe bo n’ abantu biwe bose ngo bice Dawidi. Ariko Yonatani mwene Sauli yakunda Dawidi cane. 
1Samuel19:2 Nukw abūrira Dawidi, ati Data Sauli agomba kukwica; none rero wirinde: ejo uz’ ube ur’ ahantu hiherereye, wihishe." 
1Samuel19:3 Nanje nzogenda mpagararane na data ku musozi ah’ uzoba uri nyene, mvugane na we ivyawe; ni nagira ico numva cose nzokikubarira." 
1Samuel19:4 Bukeye Yonatani avugana na se Sauli, amushimira Dawidi; aramubarira, ati Mugenzi, ntuz’ ugirire nabi Dawidi umusavyi wawe, kukw ata kibi yakugiriye; mber’ ivyo yagukoreye vyabaye vyiza cane," 
1Samuel19:5 kuko yahevye amagara yiwe, akica wa Mufilisitiya, Uhoraho akarokora Abisirayeli uburyo bukomeye. Nawe ubibonye uranezerwa. None n’iki kigutera kugira nabi, ukavisha amaraso y’ūtācumuye, ngo wice Dawidi umuhōye ubusa?" 
1Samuel19:6 Nuko Sauli yumvira Yonatani, aramurahira, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’ Uhoraho akaba agipfuye!" 
1Samuel19:7 Yonatani arahava ahamagara Dawidi, amwīgānira ivyo vyose. Nuko Yonatani arengukana Dawidi imbere ya Sauli, aguma ngaho nk’uko yahora." 
1Samuel19:8 Bukeye hasubira kuba intambara; Dawidi aratabara, arwana n’Abafilisitiya, abatikiza agatikizo gakomeye; abasigaye barahunga." 
1Samuel19:9 Bukeye ya mpwemu mbi irungitswe n’Uhoraho iza kuri Sauli, avyagiye mu ngoro yiwe, afise icumu mu minwe; Dawidi amuvugiriza inanga." 
1Samuel19:10 Sauli agerageza gusākiza Dawidi icumu, ngo rirume ku nzu; Dawidi ararizibukira, amuva imbere, rinega ku nzu. Nuko mur’ iryo joro nyene Dawidi arahunga, aramukira." 
1Samuel19:11 Maze Sauli atuma abantu ngo baje kwa Dawidi, bamuryamire, kugira ngo ni bgāca bamwice. Maze Mikali, muka Dawidi, aramubarira, at’ Iri joro n’utanyaga amagara, ejo bazokwica." 
1Samuel19:12 Nuko Mikali acisha Dawidi mw idirisha, aramwururutsa, na we aca aratemesha, arahunga." 
1Samuel19:13 Mikali araheza ahitana terafimu, ayirambika ku buriri, ayishirakw ikijishano c’ ubushenza bg’impene mu mutwe, ayorosakw impuzu." 
1Samuel19:14 Nukw izo ntumwa Sauli yarungitse gufata Dawidi, Mikali arazibgira, at’ Ararwaye." 
1Samuel19:15 Hanyuma Sauli yongera gutuma izo ntumwa ngo barābe Dawidi, ati Mumuterurane n’uburiri mumudūgane, mumunzanire, ndamwice." 
1Samuel19:16 Nukw izo ntumwa zinjiye zisanga terafimu ari yo iri ku buriri, na ca kijishano c’ubushenza bg’impene kiri mu mutwe wayo." 
1Samuel19:17 Sauli abimenye, abaza Mikali, ati N’iki caguteye kumpenda urtyo, ukareka umwansi wanje, agacika? Mikali yishura Sauli, ati Yambgiye, ati Ndeka ngende, sinkwice." 
1Samuel19:18 Nuko Dawidi ni kwo guhunga agacika, akaja i Rama kwa Samweli, amwīgānira ivyo Sauli yamugiriye vyose. Hanyuma ahagurukana na Samweli, baja i Nayoti, bagumayo." 
1Samuel19:19 Maze babgira Sauli, bat’ Erega Dawidi ar’ i Nayoti i Rama." 
1Samuel19:20 Nuko Sauli atuma abantu gufata Dawidi: bashitseyo, basanga abavugishwa n’Imana b’agakama bariko baravugishwa, na Samweli ahagaze ngaho nk’umukuru wabo; maze Mpwemu w’Imana aza kur’ izo ntumwa za Sauli, na zo zica ziravugishwa." 
1Samuel19:21 Babibgiye Sauli, atuma izindi ntumwa, na zo zishitse ziravugishwa. Arongera atuma izindi ubugira gatatu, na zo n’uko ziravugishwa." 
1Samuel19:22 Araheza arisidukira, aja i Rama, ashikira kw iriba rinini ry’i Seku, arabaza, ati Samweli na Dawidi bari hehe? Umuntu aramwishura, ati Bar’ i Nayoti i Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Aca agenda i Nayoti i Rama; maze Mpwemu w’Imana amuzako na we, agenda aravugishwa kurinda ashika i Nayoti i Rama nyene." 
1Samuel19:24 Ashitseyo yīkiza impuzu ziwe, avugishirizwa imbere ya Samweli arambaraye hasi yambaye ubusa, yiriza umusi akēsha ijoro. Ni co catumye bavuga, bati Mbega Sauli na we yari mu bavugishwa n’Imana?" 
1Samuel20:1 Nuko Dawidi arahunga, ava i Nayoti i Rama, araza abaza Yonatani, ati Mbega nzira iki? Nacumuye mu ki? Ikibi nagiriye so n’igiki, gituma arondera kunyica?" 
1Samuel20:2 Na we aramwishura, ati Biragahera, ntuzopfa! Erega data nta co akora atambariye, ari gito ari kinini; none har’ icotuma abimpisha? Ek’ ivyo si ko biri." 
1Samuel20:3 Dawidi aramwishura, at’ Erega so azi neza ko ngutonnyeko; ni co catumye yiyumvira, ati Yonatani ntābimenye ngo bimubabaze. Ariko vy’ukuri, ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene ndakurahiye, har’ agatambuko kamwe gusa hagati yanje n’urupfu." 
1Samuel20:4 Maze Yonatani yishura Dawidi, at’ Ico ugomba cose nzokigukorera." 
1Samuel20:5 Dawidi aramwishura, at’ Ejo ukwezi kuzoboneka, kandi nta cari gikwiye kumbuza gusangira n’umwami; ariko ndekura ngende ninyegeze ku musozi, gushitsa ku musi ugira gatatu ku mugoroba;" 
1Samuel20:6 maze so ni yaramuka andāvye akambura, uz’ uheze uvuge, uti Dawidi yaranyinginze ngo ndamurekure anyanyase, akubite i wabo i Betelehemu, ngo Kukw igihe co gutangira umuryango wose ikimazi c’umwaka kigeze." 
1Samuel20:7 Maze ni yavuga, ati Nuko ni vyiza; umusavyi wawe nzoba nd’ amahoro; ariko ni yaraka, uzoca umenya ko yamaramaje ivyo kuzongirira nabi." 
1Samuel20:8 Nuko rer’ ungirire neza, jewe umusavyi wawe, kuko wansezeraniye isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho. Ariko namba har’ igicumuro mfise, n’unyiyicire ubgawe: n’iki cotuma urinda kunshīra so?" 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatani aramwishura, ati Biragahera! None nomenya ko data afise inama yo kukugirira nabi, sinoca ndabikubgira?" 
1Samuel20:10 Maze Dawidi abaza Yonatani, ati None so ni yakwishura nabi, nzobibgirwa n’iki?" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatani aramubarira, ati Hogi dusohoke tuje ku gahinga." 
1Samuel20:12 Nuko Yonatani abarira Dawidi, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ni we cabona; ejo nk’aya mango, canke hirya y’ejo, nzoba nāmaze gucaca data; maze ni nasanga akuvuga neza, nzoca ngutumako, ndabikumenyeshe." 
1Samuel20:13 Ariko data ni yaramuka agomba kukugirira nabi, simbikumenyeshe, ngo nkurungike wīgīre uburarame, Uhoraho abimpanire, kandi birushirije. Kand’ Uhoraho az’ abane nawe nk’uko yabana na data." 
1Samuel20:14 Namba nzoba nkibayeho, uz’ ungirire imbabazi nk’iz’ Uhoraho;" 
1Samuel20:15 na ho ni napfa, na ho nyene ntuz’ ukūre imbabazi zawe ku nzu yanje gushitsa ibihe vyose, eka mbere gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho azoba ahejeje kurandura abansi bawe bose kw isi." 
1Samuel20:16 Nuko Yonatani asezerana isezerano n’inzu ya Dawidi, ati Ni waricamwo, Uhoraho azoriguhōra atumye abansi bawe." 
1Samuel20:17 Nuko Yonatani yongera kurahiza Dawidi kubg’ urukundo yamukunda, kuko yamukunda nk’uko yikunda." 
1Samuel20:18 Maze Yonatani aramubarira, at’ Ejo k’ukwezi kuzoboneka, bazokurāba bakubure, kukw icicaro cawe kizoba kirimw’ ubusa." 
1Samuel20:19 Maze ku musi ugira gatatu, uz’ uce umanuka vuba, usubire ha handi wari winyegeje ku musi wa vya bindi, ugume hambavu ya ca gihongo c’amabuye." 
1Samuel20:20 Nanje nzorasa imyampi itatu i ruhande yaco, nk’aho ndi n’ico ngenekereje;" 
1Samuel20:21 nce ntuma umwana, ndamubarire, nti Genda utore irya myampi. Maze ni nabarira nya mwana, nt’ Eh’ imyampi iri hino yawe, n’uyābīre; uz’ uheze uze, kukw azoba ar’ amahoro, ata co kwinona, nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel20:22 Ariko ni nabarira nya muhungu, nt’ Eh’ imyampi iri hirya yawe; uz’ uheze uhunge, kuk’ Uhoraho azoba aguhungishije." 
1Samuel20:23 Kand’ iri jambo tuvuganye twe nawe, Uhoraho abe hagati yacu ibihe vyose." 
1Samuel20:24 Nuko Dawidi yinyegeza ku musozi; bukeye ukwezi kubonetse, umwami aravyagira ngw afungure." 
1Samuel20:25 Kandi yar’ avyagiye ku ntebe yiwe, nk’uko yahora, ari yo ntebe yegamiye inzu; Yonatani yar’ amutumbereye, Abuneri yicaye i ruhande ya Sauli; arikw icicaro ca Dawidi carimw’ ubusa." 
1Samuel20:26 Yamara Sauli kur’ uwo musi ntiyagira ico avuga, kuko yiyumviriye, ati Sinzi ico yabaye; ngira ngw arahumanye, eka nta kundi arahumanye." 
1Samuel20:27 Ku musi ugira kabiri, ukwezi gusībiye kubonetse, na ho nyene icicaro ca Dawidi carimw’ ubusa. Maze Sauli abaza umuhungu wiwe Yonatani, at’ Ejo n’iki cabujije mwene Isayi kuza gusangira natwe, kugeza n’uyu musi akaba ataje?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatani aramwishura, ati Dawidi yaranyinginze ngo ndamurekure akubite i wabo i Betelehemu;" 
1Samuel20:29 yarambgiye ngo ndamutabare ndamurekure, ngo Kukw i wabo mur’ ico gisagara bazotanga ikimazi, ngo Kandi mukuru we yamutumyeko; ngo Kandi ni naba ndamugiriye neza, ngo Ndamurekure, aje kubonana na bakuru be. Ico ni co camubujije kuza ku meza yawe, mwami." 
1Samuel20:30 Maz’ uburake bga Sauli buziriringira Yonatani, aramubarira, ati Wa mwana w’umugore w’intumva kandi w’inshirukanya! Mbeg’ ugira ngo sindabizi ko watoranije mwene Isayi ngo wīmāramāze, wambike na nyoko ibara?" 
1Samuel20:31 Erega mwene Isayi agihumeka, nta guhangama kwawe, nta n’ugutsindaza kw’ingoma yawe. Nuko tuma bamunzanire; n’ukuri azopfa nta kabuza!" 
1Samuel20:32 Maze Yonatani yishura se Sauli, ati Non’ apfa azize iki? Yakoze iki?" 
1Samuel20:33 Sauli amutera icumu ngw amwice; bituma Yonatani amenya ko se yamaramaje kwica Dawidi. 
1Samuel20:34 Maze Yonatani aca ava ku meza afise ishavu ryinshi; kur’ uwo musi ugira kabiri w’ukwezi ntiyagira ico atamira na mba, kuko yababajwe n’ivya Dawidi, kandi n’uko se amutētereje." 
1Samuel20:35 Bukeye mu gitondo Yonatani aja kuri wa musozi mu gihe yaraganye na Dawidi, ari kumwe n’ umwana mutoya." 
1Samuel20:36 Maz’ abarira uwo mwana, at’ Irukanga utore imyampi ngira ndase. Umwana aciruka, Yonatani arekura umwampi, uramurēngāna." 
1Samuel20:37 Nya mwana ashitse aho Yonatani arashe umwampi, Yonatani amutera akamo, ati Mbega nta wo ubona hiyo yawe?" 
1Samuel20:38 Yongera kumutera akamo, ati Bandanya unyaruke, ntuhagarare. Nuko nya mwana wa Yonatani atora imyampi, agaruka aho shebuja ari." 
1Samuel20:39 Arik’ uwo mwana ntiyagira ico amenya; Yonatani na Dawidi bonyene ni bo bāri babizi. 
1Samuel20:40 Maze Yonatani aha uwo mwana umuheto wiwe n’imyampi, aramubarira, ati Hogi bijane mu gisagara." 
1Samuel20:41 Nuk’ uwo mwana amaze kugenda, Dawidi asokoroka aho yar’ ari i ruhande ya ca gihongo, akubita inkoro hasi, amwunamira gatatu; maze baragūmbīrana, bararira, ariko Dawidi we ararushiriza." 
1Samuel20:42 Maze Yonatani abarira Dawidi, ati Genda amahoro, ko twarahiye mw izina ry’Uhoraho, tukavuga, tut’ Uhoraho azoba hagati yacu no hagati y’ uruvyaro rwacu gushitsa ibihe vyose. Nuko Dawidi arahaguruka aragenda; Yonatani na we asubira mu gisagara." 
1Samuel21:1 Maze Dawidi aja i Nobu kwa Ahimeleki umuherezi; Ahimeleki aza kumusanganira ahinda agashitsi; aramubaza, ati Vyagenze bite, k’uri wenyene ata waguherekeje?" 
1Samuel21:2 Dawidi yishura Ahimeleki umuherezi, at’ Umwami yantumye ku rubanza, arambarira ngo ntihagire umuntu n’umwe amenya ivy’ urwo rubanza yantumyeko, cank’ ico yangeze. Kand’ imikangara yanje nayirangiye ko tuzohūrira ahanaka." 
1Samuel21:3 Mbega nta kazimano? Ntabaza udutsima dutanu, cank’ ico wobona cose." 
1Samuel21:4 Uwo muherezi yishura Dawidi, ati Nta mitsima isanzwe mfise, atar’ iyejejwe; n’imiburiburi iyaba iyo mikangara idaherūkanye n’ abagore." 
1Samuel21:5 Dawidi yishura uwo muherezi, ati Vy’ukuri haciye imisi itatu dutandukanye n’abagore; kandi twavuye i muhira ibintu vy’iyo mikangara vyejejwe, nah’ ar’ urugendo nk’izindi. Non’ uyu musi ibintu vyabo ntibiheza bikarushiriza kuba ivyera?" 
1Samuel21:6 Nuk’ uwo muherezi amuha imitsima yejejwe, kukw ata yindi yariho atar’ iy’ ibiterekērwa, iyo bāhora bakūra imbere y’Uhoraho, bagasubizah’ iyigishūshe ku musi bayikūyeho." 
1Samuel21:7 Kur’ uwo musi nyene hār’ umuntu umwe wo mu basavyi ba Sauli yari yashībijwe ngw agume imbere y’Uhoraho, yitwa Dowegi w’Umunyedomu, yar’ umubgiriza w’abungere ba Sauli." 
1Samuel21:8 Dawidi abaza Ahimeleki, ati Mbega nta cumu wogira hano cank’ inkota? Nta nkota nazanye cank’ ikindi kirwanishwa, kuk’ urubanza rw’umwami rwar’ urwo kwihuta." 
1Samuel21:9 Uwo muherezi aramwishura, ati Ya nkota ya Goliyati wa Mufilisitiya watsinda mu mwonga Ela, ehe ngiyi iri hano, izingiriwekw impuzu inyuma ya efodi; ni wagomba kuyijana, uyijane, kukw ata yindi iri hano atar’ iyo. Dawidi aramwishura, ati Nta yiruta iyo; yimpe." 
1Samuel21:10 Uwo musi Dawidi arahaguruka ahunga Sauli, aja kwa Akishi umwami w’i Gati." 
1Samuel21:11 Abantu ba Akishi baramubarira, bat’ Uyu si Dawidi umwami wa ca gihugu? Si we bāvyinira bitabiriza, bati Sauli yishe ibihumbi, Dawidi we yica ibihumbi indiri?" 
1Samuel21:12 Ayo magambo atuma Dawidi ahagarika umutima, agirira Akishi umwami w’i Gati ubgoba bginshi." 
1Samuel21:13 Araheza yigira ukundi imbere yabo, yisarishiriza muri bo, aharamba inzugi z’irembo, akarekura urukonda rugashororokera mu bganwa." 
1Samuel21:14 Akishi abarira abo bantu biwe, at’ Aho ntimubona k’uyo muntu yasaze? Icatumye mumunzanira n’iki?" 
1Samuel21:15 Mbega har’ abasazi nari nkennye mu ko munzanira uru rugabo kunsarira imbere? Urugabo nk’uru rwongīra mu nzu? 
1Samuel22:1 Nuko Dawidi avayo, arahunga, aja mw isenga ry’i Adulamu. Bukeye bakuru be na bene wabo bose bavyumvise, baramanuka bamusangayo." 
1Samuel22:2 Kand’ umuntu wese yari mu magorwa, n’ūrin’umwenda, n’ūgendana imyidogo bakoranira kuri we, aba umukuru wabo; nukw abo bantu bāri kumwe na we bāri nk’amajana ane." 
1Samuel22:3 Bukeye Dawidi aja i Misipa h’i Mowabu, asaba umwami w’i Mowabu, ati Ndakwinginze, wemerere data na mama bimukire ino, babe i wawe gushitsa aho nzomenyera ico Imana izongirira." 
1Samuel22:4 Nukw abashikiriza umwami w’i Mowabu; baba i we igihe cose Dawidi yamaze mw isenga. 
1Samuel22:5 Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Gadi abarira Dawidi, ati Reka gukomeza kuba mur’ iryo senga; rivemwo, uje mu ntāra y’i Buyuda. Nuko Dawidi avayo, aja mu kibira c’i Hereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Bukeye Sauli yumva ko Dawidi n’abo bari kumwe har’ abababonye; kandi yar’ avyāgiye musi y’igiti c’umwesheli ku gatwe k’ umusozi i Gibeya; yar’ afise icumu mu minwe, kand’ abagendanyi biwe bose bari bahagaze bamukikije." 
1Samuel22:7 Sauli abaza abo bagendanyi biwe bamuhagaze irya n’ino, ati Yemwe mwa Babenyamini! Aho mwene Isayi uwo azoha umuntu wese muri mwebge amatongo n’imizabibu? Kandi mwese azobagira abagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana," 
1Samuel22:8 ngo bitume mwese mungarariza? Kw ata n’umwe yarushe ammenyesha k’umwana wanje yasezeranye na mwene Isayi, ntihagire n’ūmbabara n’umwe, cank’ ūmmenyesha k’umwana wanje yangararishirije umuntu akamugira umwansi wanje, nk’uko bimeze n’ubu!" 
1Samuel22:9 Maze Dowegi w’Umunyedomu, yar’ ahagararanye n’abo bagendanyi ba Sauli, yishura umwami, ati Narabonye mwene Isayi uwo aza i Nobu kwa Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu;" 
1Samuel22:10 na we amusiguriza Uhoraho, kand’ amuha impamba, amuha na ya nkota yar’ iya Goliyati Umufilisitiya." 
1Samuel22:11 Umwami avyumvise, atuma guhamagaza Ahimeleki umuherezi, mwene Ahitubu, n’ab’ inzu ya se bose, ari bo baherezi b’i Nobu; bose bītaba umwami." 
1Samuel22:12 Bashitse, Sauli aravuga, ati Wewe mwana wa Ahitubu! Na we ati Sabge mugenzi." 
1Samuel22:13 Sauli aramubaza, ati N’iki catumye mungīra inama, mwe na mwene Isayi, ukamuha ivyo kurya n’inkota, ukamusiguriza Imana, ngw ankūrire hasi, abe umwansi wanje, nk’uko bimeze ubu?" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimeleki yishura umwami, ati Mbega none mu basavyi bawe bose har’ uwoba umwizigirwa nka Dawidi umukwe w’ umwami, ari we aganza abagushibamira, akaba umunyacubahiro mu rugo rwawe?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ugira ngo ni bgo bga mbere kumusiguriza Imana? Ntibikabeho ko nokora nk’ivyo! Mugenzi, ntunshirekw ikintu nk’ico, jewe umusavyi wawe, canke ku b’inzu ya data iyo bava bakagera; kukw ata kintu na kimwe nari nzi mur’ ivyo vyose." 
1Samuel22:16 Umwami aramwishura, ati Nta kabuza, ntugenda udapfuye, mwe n’ab’ inzu ya so bose." 
1Samuel22:17 Umwami araheza abarira abashibamyi bamukikije, ati Ni mukūre hasi, mwice abo baherezi b’Uhoraho, kuko bāfatanye agatoke na Dawidi, kandi bāri bazi ko yahunze, ntibabimbarire. Arikw abo bantu b’umwami ntibemera gukoza amaboko kur’ abo baherezi b’ Uhoraho." 
1Samuel22:18 Maz’ umwami abarira Dowegi, ati Kūra hasi weho, wice abo baherezi. Nuko Dowegi Umunyedomu akūra hasi, arabica; uwo musi yica abantu mirongumunani na batanu bambara efodi yera derere." 
1Samuel22:19 Maz’ i Nobu, igisagara c’abaherezi, akigeseza n’ inkota, abagabo n’abagore, abana n’abonka, bo n’inka n’indogoba n’intama, vyose abimarira ku nkota." 
1Samuel22:20 Arik’ umwe mu bahungu ba Ahimeleki mwene Ahitubu, yitwa Abiyatari, aracīka, ahungira iyo Dawidi ari." 
1Samuel22:21 Abikira Dawidi ko Sauli yagesheje abaherezi b’ Uhoraho. 
1Samuel22:22 Dawidi abarira Abiyatari, ati Wa musi, aho nabona Dowegi Umunyedomu, namenye kw atazobura kubibarira Sauli: abo mu nzu ya so bose ni jewe bazize." 
1Samuel22:23 N’ugume aho ndi, ntutinye; kuk’ ūmpīga ari we aguhīga: ariko ni wagumana nanje nta co uzoba." 
1Samuel23:1 Bukeye babarira Dawidi, bat’ Ereg’ Abafilisitiya barateye i Keyila, bariko barasahura ivyandagaye ku mbuga." 
1Samuel23:2 Nuko Dawidi asiguza Uhoraho, ati Mbega nje kurwanya abo Bafilisitiya? Uhoraho yishura Dawidi, ati Genda ubarwanye, utabare ab’i Keyila." 
1Samuel23:3 Arikw ingabo za Dawidi ziramubaza, ziti Ko twari dusanzwe dufise ubgoba tukir’ ino i Buyuda, ni twaja i Keyila kurwana n’ingabo z’Abafilisitiya bizocura iki?" 
1Samuel23:4 Nuko Dawidi yongera gusiguza Uhoraho. Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Haguruka umanuke uje i Keyila, kuko nzogabura Abafilisitiya mu maboko yawe." 
1Samuel23:5 Nuko Dawidi ahagurukana n’ingabo ziwe, baja i Keyila, barwana n’Abafilisitiya, banyaga inka zabo, babatikiza agatikizo gakomeye. Uko ni ko Dawidi yatabaye ababa i Keyila." 
1Samuel23:6 Kand’ igihe Abiyatari mwene Ahimeleki yahungira iyo Dawidi ari, yamanukanye efodi i Keyila." 
1Samuel23:7 Bukeye babarira Sauli yuko Dawidi yagiye i Keyila; Sauli aravuga, at’ Imana imugabuye mu maboko yanje, yitaye mu mutego, ko yagiye mu gisagara cugazwa inzugi n’ibihindizo." 
1Samuel23:8 Nuko Sauli ahamagaza ingabo zose ngo zitabare, zije gutera i Keyila, zūgarize Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe." 
1Samuel23:9 Dawidi amenye ko Sauli yamugīriye inama mbi, abarira Abiyatari umuherezi, ati Zana hano efodi." 
1Samuel23:10 Nuko Dawidi arasenga, at’ Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, jewe umusavyi wawe numvise inkuru y’imvāho yuko Sauli agomba gutera i Keyila, ngw arandure iki gisagara agihōra jewe." 
1Samuel23:11 Mbeg’ abantu b’i Keyila bazontanga mu maboko yiwe? Kandi Sauli azomanuka koko, nk’uko jewe umusavyi wawe navyumvise? Ewe Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, ndakwinginze barira umusavyi wawe. Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Azomanuka." 
1Samuel23:12 Maze Dawidi arongera arabaza, ati Non’ abantu b’i Keyila bazontanga twe n’ingabo zanje mu maboko ya Sauli? Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Bazogutanga." 
1Samuel23:13 Nuko Dawidi ahagurukana n’ingabo ziwe, zari nk’ amajana atandatu, bava i Keyila, bagenda bayerēra hirya no hino. Hanyuma babarira Sauli ko Dawidi yahunze akava i Keyila; aca asigaho ntiyaja gutera." 
1Samuel23:14 Nuko Dawidi aba mu masenga yo mu bugaragwa, aguma mu mugamba wo mu bugaragwa bg’i Zifu. Sauli akāma amurondera uko bukeye, arikw Imana ntiyamugabura mu maboko yiwe." 
1Samuel23:15 Maze Dawidi abonye ko Sauli amurondera ngw amwice, yigumira i Horeshi mu bugaragwa bg’i Zifu." 
1Samuel23:16 Bukeye Yonatani mwene Sauli arahaguruka, aja iyo Dawidi ari i Horeshi, amuremēsha mu vy’ Imana." 
1Samuel23:17 Aramubarira, ati Reka gutinya, kuk’ ukuboko kwa data Sauli kutazogushikīra; kand’ uzoba umwami w’Abisirayeli, nanje nzoba uwa kabiri kuri wewe; kandi data Sauli na we arabizi." 
1Samuel23:18 Bompi baraheza basezeranira isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho; maze Dawidi yigumira i Horeshi, Yonatani asubira i we." 
1Samuel23:19 Bukeye Abanyezifu baja i Gibeya kwa Sauli, baramubarira, bati Mbeg’ aho ntuzi ko Dawidi yinyegeje i wacu, mu masenga y’i Horeshi, ku musozi Hakila, ahahera i bumanuko bg’ubugaragwa?" 
1Samuel23:20 None rero mugenzi, n’umanuke nk’uk’ ugomba; kandi ni twebge tuzomugabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi." 
1Samuel23:21 Sauli arabishura, ati Muragahezagirwa n’Uhoraho kuko mwambabaye!" 
1Samuel23:22 None rero ni mugende, murushirize guhwēbūtsa, mumenye mwitegereze ah’ ikiryamo ciwe kiri, kandi n’uwoba yaramubonye uw’ ari we, kuko bambariye kw ar’ ubgenge cane." 
1Samuel23:23 Nuko murābe mwitegereze utunyegero twiwe twose aho yihisha; muheze mungarukanire inkuru y’imvāho, nanje nzoheza njane namwe: kandi namb’ ari mur’ ico gihugu, nzomusesangura mu masinzi yose y’ Abayuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Nuko bava hasi, baja i Zifu, bitangiye imbere ya Sauli. Ariko Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe bāri mu bugaragwa bg’i Mayoni, mu kiyaya Araba, ahahera i bumanuko bg’ubugaragwa." 
1Samuel23:25 Nuko Sauli n’ingabo ziwe baja kumurondera, ariko Dawidi arabūrirwa; araheza aramanuka, aja ku gitandara co mu bugaragwa bg’i Mayoni, yigumirayo. Sauli avyumvise, akurikira Dawidi mur’ ubgo bugaragwa bg’i Mayoni nyene." 
1Samuel23:26 Ashitseyo, ajana uruhande rumwe rw’umusozi, Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe bajana urundi. Dawidi akirikw aranyaragasa ngw ahunge Sauli, Sauli na we n’ingabo ziwe bakirīko baratangatanga irya n’ino Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe ngo babafate," 
1Samuel23:27 haza intabaza kuri Sauli, iramubarira, iti Ngwino tebuka, kukw Abafilisitiya bateye igihugu." 
1Samuel23:28 Nuko Sauli arahindukira, areka gukurikira Dawidi, aja kurwanya Abafilisitiya: ni co catumye aho hantu bahita Sela‐hamalekoti." 
1Samuel23:29 Nuko Dawidi avayo, aradūga, aja kuba mu masenga y’i Eni‐gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Bukeye Sauli atabarutse, avuye kwirukana Abafilisitiya, baramubarira, bat’ Erega Dawidi ari mu bugaragwa bg’i Eni‐gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Nuko Sauli ahitana ingabo ibihumbi bitatu zitoranijwe mu Bisirayeli bose, baja kurondera Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe mu bitandara ah’ impene z’inyeshamba ziba." 
1Samuel24:3 Nukw araza, ashika ku birāro vy’intama vyar’ i ruhande y’inzira, kandi hār’ isenga. Maze Sauli aryinjiramwo kwihagarika. Kandi Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe bari bicaye hirya mur’ iryo senga." 
1Samuel24:4 Maz’ izo ngabo za Dawidi ziramubarira, zit’ Uyu ni wa musi Uhoraho yakubgira kw azogabura umwansi wawe mu maboko yawe, ng’ uz’ umugire uk’ ugomba. Dawidi ava hasi, acacura umutwe w’impuzu ya Sauli buhoro‐buhoro." 
1Samuel24:5 Hanyuma Dawidi yumva umutima umuseka, kukw acacuye umutwe w’impuzu ya Sauli." 
1Samuel24:6 Maz’ abarira ingabo ziwe, at’ Uhoraho arakabishira kure yanje, sinkagire ikintu nk’ico ngirira umwami wanje, kand’ ari we Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta! Sinkamukozek’ ukuboko, kuko yimikishijwe amavuta n’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel24:7 Uko ni ko Dawidi yatesheje ingabo ziwe, ntiyabakundira kugurukira kuri Sauli. Nuko Sauli arahaguruka, ava mur’ iryo senga, arīgīra." 
1Samuel24:8 Hanyuma Dawidi na we ava hasi, ava mur’ iryo senga nyene, ahamagara Sauli, at’ Urazirikanye, mugenzi! Sauli akebutse, Dawidi akubita inkoro hasi, aramwūnamira." 
1Samuel24:9 Nuko Dawidi aramubaza, ati N’iki gituma uja ku vyo abantu bakubarira, ngo Dawidi agomba kukugirira nabi?" 
1Samuel24:10 Aho ntubonye k’Uhoraho yar’ akugabuye mu maboko yanje uyu musi, mur’ iri senga? Mbere harih’ abāmbgiye kukwica, ariko ndakwirekera, nti Sinokoza ukuboko kuri databuja, nti Kukw ari we Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta." 
1Samuel24:11 Kandi ga muvyeyi, ehe rāba nguyu umutwe w’impuzu yawe mu ntoke zanje! Ko nacacuye umutwe w’impuzu yawe sinkwice, none rero n’umenye kand’ ushirwe kw ata kibi cank’ ubugarariji ngufiseko; kandi sinagucumuyeko, nah’ umpīga ng’ unyice." 
1Samuel24:12 Uhoraho n’aducire urubanza twe nawe, Uhoraho n’abe ari we azokumpōra; arik’ ukuboko kwanje ntikuzogukorako." 
1Samuel24:13 Aba kera baciye umugani, ngw Ibibi biva mu babi; ariko rer’ ukuboko kwanje ntikuzogukorako." 
1Samuel24:14 None ga mwami w’Abisirayeli, uteye iki? Uhīga iki? Ereg’ uteye imbga ipfuye, uhīga imbaragasa!" 
1Samuel24:15 None rer’ Uhoraho n’abe umucamanza, aducīre urubanza twe nawe, n’avyitegereze, ambūrane, ankūre mu maboko yawe." 
1Samuel24:16 Nuko Dawidi amaze kubarira Sauli ayo majambo, Sauli aravuga, at’ Ah’ iryo jwi n’iryawe, ga mwana wanje Dawidi? Maze Sauli araturikisha ararira." 
1Samuel24:17 Abarira Dawidi, at’ Undushije kugororoka, kuk’ ungiriye neza, nanje jeho nakugiriye nabi." 
1Samuel24:18 Kand’ uyu musi werekanye k’ungiriye neza, kuk’ Uhoraho yari yangabuye mu maboko yawe, ntunyice." 
1Samuel24:19 Mbeg’ umuntu yobona umwansi wiwe, agaheza agapfa kumureka akīgīra? Uragahabga ingororano nziza n’Uhoraho, ku vy’ unkoreye uyu musi." 
1Samuel24:20 Kandi rero ndazi k’utazobura kuba umwami, kandi kw ari wewe uzotuma ingoma y’Abisirayeli ihangama." 
1Samuel24:21 None rero ndahira Uhoraho k’utazorandura uruvyaro rwanje, kandi k’utazozimiriza izina ryanje mu nzu ya data." 
1Samuel24:22 Nuko Dawidi aramurahira. Sauli araheza yisubirira i we, Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe baradūga baja mw isenga." 
1Samuel25:1 Maze Samweli apfuye, Abisirayeli bose bakoranira hamwe, baramuririra; bamuhamba i we i Rama. Hanyuma Dawidi ava hasi, aramanuka aja mu bugaragwa bg’i Parani." 
1Samuel25:2 Hār’ umuntu w’i Mayoni, itunga ryiwe ryar’ i Karumeli; yar’ umutunzi cane, yar’ afise intama ibihumbi bitatu n’impene igihumbi; ico gihe yarikw arakemuriza ubgoya bg’intama ziwe i Karumeli." 
1Samuel25:3 Uwo muntu yitwa Nabali, umugore wiwe yitwa Abigayili; uwo mugore yar’ umunyabgenge, kandi yar’ umunyakaranga, arik’ umugabo wiwe yar’ umuntu w’ikigoryi kandi w’imico mibi; yar’ uwo mu muryango wa Kalebu." 
1Samuel25:4 Maze Dawidi ari mu bugaragwa yumva ko Nabali arikw arakemuza intama ziwe. 
1Samuel25:5 Nuko Dawidi atuma abahungu b’imisore cumi, ati Ni mudūge muje i Karumeli, muje kwa Nabali, mumundamukirize;" 
1Samuel25:6 mubgire uwo mutungwa, mut’ Amahoro abe kuri wewe no mu rugo rwawe no mu vy’ufise vyose." 
1Samuel25:7 Muti Yumvise k’ufise abantu bariko barakemura; muti Kand’ abungere bawe bābāna na bo, nta co bābagiriye nabi, nta co bājimije igihe cose bābaye i Karumeli." 
1Samuel25:8 Muti Baza imikangara yawe barabikubarira; muti Ngo Kandi natwe abantu biwe utugirire ubuntu, kuko tuje ku musi mwiza; muti Non’ aragusavye, ngw ico uzoba ufise cose, abe ari co uduha, twebge abasavyi bawe, n’umwana wawe Dawidi." 
1Samuel25:9 Abo bahungu bo kwa Dawidi bashitse, babarira Nabali ivyo Dawidi yabatumye vyose, baraheza bītega ico abishura." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabali yishura abo bantu ba Dawidi, ati Dawidi n’iki? Kandi mwene Isayi n’iki? Erega mur’ iyi misi harih’ abashumba benshi bātaye ba shebuja." 
1Samuel25:11 None ntore imitsima yanje n’amazi yanje n’inyama nabāgiye abakemuzi banje, mbihe abantu ntazi iyo bava?" 
1Samuel25:12 Nukw iyo mikangara ya Dawidi barahindukira, basubirayo; bashitse bamwīgānira ivyo vyose." 
1Samuel25:13 Nuko Dawidi abarira abantu biwe, at’ Umuntu wese n’ahagatire inkota yiwe. Nuk’ umuntu wese ahagatira inkota, na Dawidi na we ahagatira iyiwe; nukw abantu nk’ amajana ane badūgana na Dawidi, abagiye imbere; arikw abandi amajana abiri basigara ku bintu." 
1Samuel25:14 Maz’ umwe mu mikangara ya Nabali abarira Abigayili muka Nabali, at’ Erega Dawidi yatumye intumwa ziva mu bugaragwa ngo zize kuramutsa databuja; na we araheza arabarandamukira." 
1Samuel25:15 Arikw abo bantu bāhora batugirira neza cane, nta kintu na kimwe bātugiriye nabi, ntitwāgize ico tuzimiza igihe cose twābanye na bo, turi mw irāro;" 
1Samuel25:16 bātubereye uruzitiro rudukingira mw ijoro no ku murango igihe cose twāmaranye na bo turagiye intama. 
1Samuel25:17 None rer’ ubimenye, wiyumvire ico wokora, kuko hagiye kuba ivyago kuri databuja no ku rugo rwiwe rwose, kand’ ar’ umuntu w’umugesera, ata woshobora kugira ico amubgira." 
1Samuel25:18 Maze Abigayili arakwakwanya, akora imitsima amajana abiri, n’imikuza ibiri ya vino, n’inyama zihiye z’amapfizi atanu y’intama, n’ingero zitanu z’ingano zikaranze, n’imisoko ijana y’inzabibu zumye, n’uturobe amajana abiri tubumbabumbge mu nsukoni, abiremēka indogoba." 
1Samuel25:19 Abarira abantu biwe, ati Ni munyītangire imbere, mugende, nanje ndaje ndabakurikiye. Ariko ntiyabibgira Nabali umugabo wiwe." 
1Samuel25:20 Nukw akimanuka ari ku ndogoba yiwe, ajanye inzira ikingiriwe n’ umusozi, Dawidi n’abantu biwe bāriko baramanuka batumberanye na we; agize artya ahūra na bo." 
1Samuel25:21 Kandi Dawidi yari yāvuze, ati N’ivy’ ukuri vyabaye ivy’ ubusa kuzigama ivy’ urwo rugabo rwari rufise vyose mu bugaragwa, ntihazimire na kimwe mu vyo yar’ afise vyose! Namugiriye ivyiza, anyishuye ibibi." 
1Samuel25:22 Ni bgāca hakir’ izinamuhungu n’umwe nja gusiga mu bantu biwe, Imana ibimpanire, jewe Dawidi, mbere birushirije!" 
1Samuel25:23 Nuko Abigayili abonye Dawidi, ava ku ndogoba yiwe vuba, akubita inkoro hasi, aramwūnamira;" 
1Samuel25:24 yitembagaza imbere y’ ibirenge vyiwe, aramubarira, ati Mwami wanje, ico caha abe ari jewe kijako; ndakwinginze, jewe umuja wawe zirikana ico nkubarira, utegēre amajambo yanje." 
1Samuel25:25 Ndakwinginze, mwami wanje, woye kwiyumvira kur’ uwo muntu w’umugesera Nabali. Izina ni ryo muntu: Nabali ni ko yitwa, kand’ ubujuju ni ko kameremere kiwe. Ariko jewe umuja wawe sinigeze mbona imikangara yawe watumye, mwami wanje." 
1Samuel25:26 None rero mugenzi, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamaho, nawe ukaba uriho, Uhoraho ni we agutesheje ngo ntuvishe amaraso, ntiwīhōre ubgawe; abansi bawe, n’abarondera kukugirira nabi, barakamera nka Nabali, mugenzi!" 
1Samuel25:27 None rero mwami wanje, nyakīrira iri shikanwa ngushikaniye, jewe umuja wawe, urigaburire imikangara yawe ikugendanira, mugenzi." 
1Samuel25:28 Ndakwinginze, mpangaza jewe umuja wawe, umparire igicumuro canje: Uhoraho ntazobura guha inzu yawe kurama, kuk’ urwana intambara z’Uhoraho, mugenzi, kandi nta kibi kizokubonekako imisi yose uzoba uriho." 
1Samuel25:29 Kandi nah’ abantu bagukūriye hasi ngo baguhīge, bakwice, ubugingo bgawe buzokwama butēkeye mu mutēkero w’abariho ufiswe n’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, mugenzi: kand’ ubugingo bg’abansi bawe azobushibura nk’ibuye ritewe n’ umugozi." 
1Samuel25:30 Nuko mugenzi, Uhoraho ni yamara kugushitsakw ivyiza vyose yakuvuzeko, akaguhindura segaba w’Abisirayeli," 
1Samuel25:31 ntuzohava wicuza canke ngo wītek’ umwikomo ko wavishije amaraso ata nyanduruko, canke ko wīhōye ubgawe, mugenzi; maze mugenzi, Uhoraho ni yamara kukugirira neza, uz’ uheze unyibuke, jewe umuja wawe." 
1Samuel25:32 Maze Dawidi yishura Abigayili, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ashemagizwe, yakurungitse uyu musi kunsanganira;" 
1Samuel25:33 hahezagirwe n’ubgenge bgawe, nawe ubgawe uragahezagirwa, untesheje uyu musi ngo simvishe amaraso, sinīhōre ubganje." 
1Samuel25:34 Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli, yambujije kukugirira nabi, nta kabuza bgari guca hadasigaye izinamuhungu n’umwe mu bo kwa Nabali, iy’ utanyaruka kunsanganira." 
1Samuel25:35 Nuko Dawidi amwākīrira ivyo amuzaniye; aramubarira, ati Ni wīdūgire, usubire i muhira amahoro; nukw ivyo uvuze ndavyumvise, ndakwemereye." 
1Samuel25:36 Nuko Abigayili asubirayo, asanga Nabali yarondeje amazimano mu nzu yiwe, nk’amazimano y’umwami, asigaye adayangwa kuko yaborewe cane; ni co catumye atagira ico amubarira, ari gito ari kinini, gushitsa bukeye." 
1Samuel25:37 Nuko bukeye, vino imuvuyeko, umugore wiwe amwīgānira ivyo; umutima wa Nabali uca udegera, acika nk’igiti." 
1Samuel25:38 Hahise imisi nk’ icumi, Uhoraho akubita Nabali, arapfa." 
1Samuel25:39 Bukeye Dawidi yumvise ko Nabali yapfuye, aravuga, at’ Uhoraho ashemagizwe, yambūranye, akankūrakw ibitētērwa Nabali yari yanteye, agatako jewe umusavyi wiwe akambuza gukora icaha; kand’ inabi ya Nabali Uhoraho akayimusubiza ku mutwe. Hanyuma Dawidi atuma kuri Abigayili kumuresha ngw amucūre." 
1Samuel25:40 Abantu ba Dawidi bashitse i Karumeli kwa Abigayili, baramubarira, bati Dawidi akudutumyeko ngw agucūre ube umugore wiwe." 
1Samuel25:41 Ava hasi arūnama, yicisha bugufi, aravuga, at’ Ehe nd’ incoreke yawe, umuja wo kwoza ibirenge vy’abantu ba databuja." 
1Samuel25:42 Nuko Abigayili agira n’ingoga arahaguruka, aja ku ndogoba, ari kumwe n’abigeme batanu bamucorekeye; akurikira izo ntumwa za Dawidi, aba umugore wiwe." 
1Samuel25:43 Kandi Dawidi arongora na Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli, bompi baba abagore biwe." 
1Samuel25:44 Kandi Mikali, wa mukobga wa Sauli yari muka Dawidi, Sauli yari yaramuhaye Paliti mwene Layishi w’i Galimu." 
1Samuel26:1 Bukeye Abanyezifu baja i Gibeya kwa Sauli, baramubarira, bati Mbeg’ aho ntuzi ko Dawidi yinyegeje ku musozi Hakila, aharābana n’ubugaragwa?" 
1Samuel26:2 Nuko Sauli arahaguruka, amanuka mu bugaragwa bg’i Zifu, ari kumwe n’ingabo ibihumbi bitatu zitoranijwe mu Bisirayeli, agiye kurondera Dawidi mur’ ubgo bugaragwa bg’i Zifu." 
1Samuel26:3 Sauli asagaza i ruhande y’inzira ku musozi Hakila, aharābana n’ubugaragwa. Kandi Dawidi yaba mu bugaragwa; maz’ abonye ko Sauli aje kumurondera mur’ ubgo bugaragwa," 
1Samuel26:4 aca atuma inderetsi; maz’ amenye ko Sauli aje koko," 
1Samuel26:5 aca ava hasi, aja ha handi Sauli yar’ ashagaje. Nuko Dawidi abona ikiryamo ca Sauli aho kiri, n’ica Abuneri mwene Neri, umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe; kand’ ikiryamo ca Sauli cari hagati y’aho bārāza imikogote y’intambara, ingabo na zo zari zimushagaje irya n’ino." 
1Samuel26:6 Maze Dawidi abaza Ahimeleki Umuheti na Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya, murumuna wa Yowabu, ati Ni nde yomanukana nanje aho Sauli ashagaje? Abishayi aramwishura, ati Jewe turajana." 
1Samuel26:7 Nuko Dawidi na Abishayi bahenga mw ijoro baragenda, bashika mur’ izo ngabo, basanga Sauli yībīkiriye hagati y’aho bārāza imikogote y’intambara, icumu ryiwe rishinze haruguru y’umutwe wiwe, Abuneri n’ingabo baryamye bamukikije." 
1Samuel26:8 Maze Abishayi abarira Dawidi, at’ Uyu musi Imana igabuye umwansi wawe mu maboko yawe; none rero reka ndamuzibure icumu rimwe gusa, rishinge hasi, sinsubīra ubga kabiri." 
1Samuel26:9 Ariko Dawidi yishura Abishayi, ati Ntumwice: har’ uwoshobora kubangurira ukuboko uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta, ntābizire?" 
1Samuel26:10 Arongera aravuga, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, Uhoraho ubgiwe ni we azomwiyicira; cank’ umusi wiwe wo gupfa uzoshika; cank’ azomanuka aje mu ntambara, ayigwemwo." 
1Samuel26:11 Uhoraho arakabishira kure yanje, ko nobangurira ukuboko uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta; ariko ni wābīre iryo cumu riri ku mutwe wiwe, n’uwo mukuza w’amazi, uze tugende." 
1Samuel26:12 Nuko Dawidi ajana iryo cumu n’umukuza w’amazi vyari ku mutwe wa Sauli, barīgīra, ata wubakubise ijisho canke ngw abimenye, haba n’uwokwikangura; bose bari basinziriye, kuk’ Uhoraho yari yabasinzirije ubutikoma." 
1Samuel26:13 Maze Dawidi afata hakurya, ahagarara ku gatwe k’umusozi witereye, har’ akarēre katari gato hagati yabo;" 
1Samuel26:14 atera akamo ingabo bo na Abuneri mwene Neri, ati Abuneri we, mbega k’udakakaza! Abuneri aramwishura, at’ Uri nde, wewe uhamagara umwami?" 
1Samuel26:15 Dawidi abarira Abuneri, ati Mbega ntur’ umuntu w’umugabo? Har’ ūhwanye nawe mu Bisirayeli? None se k’utāteramiye umwami shobuja? Hari haje umuntu aho muri, aje kwica umwami, kand’ ari we shobuja." 
1Samuel26:16 Eka ivyo wakoze si vyiza! Mbarahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, mwari mukwiye gupfa, kuko mutāteramiye shobuja, uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta! Noneho ni musuzume icumu ry’ umwami n’umukuza w’amazi vyari haruguru y’umutwe w’umwami kw ari ho bikiri." 
1Samuel26:17 Maze Sauli amenya ijwi rya Dawidi; aramubaza, at’ Ah’ iryo jwi n’iryawe, ga mwana wanje Dawidi? Dawidi aramwishura, ati N’iryanje, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
1Samuel26:18 Ati Mbega mugenzi, umpīgira iki, jewe umusavyi wawe? Nakoze iki? Ndikw igicumuro ki?" 
1Samuel26:19 None rero ndakwinginze, mugenzi, zirikana amajambo yanje jewe umusavyi wawe, mwami; asangw’ ar’ Uhoraho yakungomoreye, ni yemere ndamuhe ikimazi; na ho ni baba ar’ abantu, barakavumwa imbere y’Uhoraho, kuk’ ubu banciye, ngo singire umugabane mw ishamvu y’Uhoraho, bakavuga ngo ni ngende gusaba izindi mana." 
1Samuel26:20 None rero ntiwemere kw amaraso yanje azosēswa kure y’ah’ Uhoraho aba; erega mwami w’ Abisirayeli, wazanywe no guhīga imbaragasa, nk’ūhīga inkware mu misozi." 
1Samuel26:21 Sauli aramwishura, ati Nakoze icaha; garuka mwananje Dawidi; sinzosubira kukugirira nabi, kukw amagara yanje yabaye agakomeye kuri wewe uyu musi; erega narabaye ikijuju, nakoze nabi cane." 
1Samuel26:22 Dawidi aramwishura, ati Ngiri icumu ryawe, mwami! Umwe wo mu basore n’aze aryābīre." 
1Samuel26:23 Uhoraho azokwishura umuntu wese ukugororoka kwiwe n’ukuyoboka kwiwe; ereg’ uyu musi Uhoraho yari yakumpaye, ndaheza nanka kubangura ukuboko ku wimikishijwe amavuta n’Uhoraho." 
1Samuel26:24 Kandi nk’ukw amagara yawe yabaye agakomeye kuri jewe uyu musi, az’ abe ari kw ayanje aba agakomeye k’Uhoraho, ankize amagorwa yose." 
1Samuel26:25 Maze Sauli abarira Dawidi, at’ Uragahezagirwa, mwananje Dawidi! Uzokora ivy’ ubuhizi, kand’ uzotsinda nta kabuza. Nuko Dawidi arīgīra, Sauli na we asubira i we." 
1Samuel27:1 Maze Dawidi yiyumvira mu mutima, at’ Umusi munaka, Sauli azoteba anyice; nta cosumba ko nohungira mu gihugu c’ Abafilisitiya, Sauli akampebūra, ntasubire kundondera mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; uko ni ko noba ndamukize." 
1Samuel27:2 Nuko Dawidi arahaguruka, bo na za ngabo amajana atandatu zari kuri we, barajabuka baja kwa Akishi mwene Mayoki, umwami w’i Gati." 
1Samuel27:3 Nuko Dawidi n’izo ngabo ziwe baba i Gati kwa Akishi, umuntu wese n’abo mu rugo rwiwe; Dawidi na we yari kumwe n’abagore biwe bompi, Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli, na Abigayili w’i Karumeli, yahora ari muka Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Maze babariye Sauli ko Dawidi yahungiye i Gati, ntiyasubira kumurondera ukundi." 
1Samuel27:5 Maze Dawidi abarira Akishi, ati Ni naba ngutonnyeko, ntabaza ikibanza mu gisagara kimwe co mu vyo mu gihugu, abe ari ho nja kuba; har’ icotuma jewe umusavyi wawe ndinda kubana nawe ku murwa wawe?" 
1Samuel27:6 Nuk’ uwo musi Akishi amugabira i Sikulagi; ni co catumye i Sikulagi haba ah’ abami b’Abayuda bīzīziye na bugingo n’ubu. 
1Samuel27:7 Igihe Dawidi yamaze mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya n’ umwaka n’amezi ane. 
1Samuel27:8 Bukeye Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe baradūga, batera Abageshuri n’ Abagiruzi n’Abamaleki; abo ni bo bār’ inyamo z’ico gihugu uhereye kera, kurinda ushika i Shura n’ igihugu ca Egiputa." 
1Samuel27:9 Nuko Dawidi ageseza ico gihugu, ntiyagira umugabo cank’ umugore asiga atishe; anyaga intama n’inka n’ indogoba n’ingamiya, asahura n’ impuzu; maze yatabāruka akaja kwa Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi ngw amubaze, at’ Uyu musi wateye hehe? Dawidi akamwishura, ati Nateye i bumanuko mu Buyuda; cank’ ati Nateye i bumanuko mu ba Yerameyeli; cank’ ati Nateye i bumanuko mu Banyakeni." 
1Samuel27:11 Ariko Dawidi ntiyagira umugabo cank’ umugore asiga atishe, kugira ngo ntabajane i Gati, ati Boye kuturega, ngo Dawidi yakoze artya n’ artya. Uko ni ko yahora agenza igihe cose yamaze aba mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel27:12 Nuko Akishi aca yizigira Dawidi, akavuga, ati Yatumye Abisirayeli bagenzi biwe bamuzinukwa rwose; noneh’ abaye umuntu wanje gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
1Samuel28:1 Mur’ iyo misi Abafilisitiya bakoranya ingabo zabo ngo baje gutera Abisirayeli. Akishi abarira Dawidi, at’ Umenye neza ko mwe n’abantu bawe muzotabarana nanje mu rugamba." 
1Samuel28:2 Dawidi aramwishura, ati Ni ko; kandi ni ho uzomenyera ico ndimwo, jewe umusavyi wawe. Akishi aramwishura, ati Nuko nanje nzokugira uwo kuzigama agatwe kanje na ntaryo." 
1Samuel28:3 Samweli yar’ amaze gupfa; Abisirayeli bose bari baramuririye, bamuhamba i Rama mu gisagara yabamwo. Kandi Sauli yari yarahoneje abahamagara imizimu n’ abamenyi mu gihugu." 
1Samuel28:4 Nukw Abafilisitiya barakorakorana, baraza basagaza i Shunemu; Sauli na we akoranya Abisirayeli bose, basagaza i Gilibowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Sauli abonye ingabo z’Abafilisitiya, aratinya, aranduka umutima." 
1Samuel28:6 Arikw asiguje Uhoraho, ntiyagira ico amwishura, ari mu nzozi, ari mu buryo bga Urimu, haba no mu bavugishwa na we." 
1Samuel28:7 Maze Sauli abarira abantu biwe, ati Ni mumbarize umupfumukazi azi guhamagara imizimu, nje kumubaza. Abantu biwe baramwishura, bati Harih’ umupfumukazi abizi i Endori." 
1Samuel28:8 Nuko Sauli ariyoberanya, yambara izindi mpuzu, ajana n’abantu babiri, baja kur’ uwo mupfumukazi mw ijoro. Maze Sauli aramubarira, ati Ntabara umpamagarize umuzimu ubumenyi bgawe, unzūrire uwo ngira nkubarire." 
1Samuel28:9 Uwo mupfumukazi aramwishura, ati Mbega ntuzi ivyo Sauli yakoze, ingene yahoneje abahamagara imizimu n’abamenyi mu gihugu? N’iki gitumye ugomba kunta mu mutego, kugira ng’ unyicishe?" 
1Samuel28:10 Sauli amurahira Uhoraho, ati Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho hakagira ico uzoba kubg’ ibi." 
1Samuel28:11 Uwo mupfumukazi aramubaza, at’ Ugomba ko nkuzūrira nde? Na we ati Nzūrira Samweli." 
1Samuel28:12 Uwo mupfumukazi abonye Samweli, atura ubuku n’ijwi rirenga, abaza Sauli, at’ Umbesheye iki? Erega ni wewe Sauli!" 
1Samuel28:13 Umwami aramwishura, ati Hūmura! Mbarira ico ubonye. Nya mupfumukazi aramwishura, ati Mbonye igisa n’imana kidūga kiva i kuzimu." 
1Samuel28:14 Sauli aramubaza, ati Gisa gite? Na we ati Hariko haradūga umutāma, kandi yambaye igikwemu. Maze Sauli aca amenya kw ari Samweli, akubita inkoro hasi, aramwūnamira." 
1Samuel28:15 Nuko Samweli abaza Sauli, ati N’iki gitumye uza kunkoma, ukanzūra? Sauli aramwishura, ati N’uko ndi mu magorwa, kukw Abafilisitiya baje kuntera, kand’ Imana ikaba yarantaye, ata co ikinyishura, ari mu bo ivugisha canke mu nzozi. Ni co kinteye kuguhamagara, ng’ummenyeshe ico nkwiye gukora." 
1Samuel28:16 Samweli aramwishura, at’ Ubimbarije iki, k’ Uhoraho yakuretse, agahinduka umwansi wawe?" 
1Samuel28:17 Uhoraho yakugiriye nk’uko yari yarabivugiye muri jewe. Akunyaze ingoma, ayiha mugenzawe Dawidi;" 
1Samuel28:18 kuk’ utumviye Uhoraho, ntushitse uburake bgiwe bukaze ku Bamaleki; ni co kimuteye kukugenza artyo uyu musi." 
1Samuel28:19 Mbere mwe n’Abisirayeli Uhoraho azobagabura mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya; kand’ ejo mwe n’abahungu bawe muzoba mur’ aho ndi; Uhoraho agira agabure ingabo z’ Abisirayeli mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya. 
1Samuel28:20 Buno Sauli yikubita hasi, ararambarara, kukw aranduwe umutima n’ivyo Samweli amubariye; kandi na kare yar’ asanzwe adafise intege, kuko yari yiriwe ubusa kand’ akaburāra." 
1Samuel28:21 Maze nya mupfumukazi aza aho Sauli ari, abona ko yihebūye, aramubarira, ati Rāba jewe umuja wawe nakwumviye, mpeba amagara, nemera ivyo umbariye." 
1Samuel28:22 None rero ndakwinginze, nawe unyumvire, jewe umuja wawe, unyemerere ngire utwo nkuronderera, ufūngure, kugira ng’ usubiremw’ intege ubashe kugenda." 
1Samuel28:23 Aranka, at’ Eka singomba kurya. Arikw abantu biwe bo na nya mupfumukazi baramugōbēra, arabemerera, ava hasi, yicara ku buriri." 
1Samuel28:24 Kandi nya mupfumukazi yar’ afise imasa inuze mu ruhongore; aranyanyasa arayikerera, ahitana ifu, arayicumba ayironderamw’ umutsima utambiwe;" 
1Samuel28:25 abihereza Sauli n’ abantu biwe, barafūngura. Maz’ iryo joro nyene barahaguruka, baragenda." 
1Samuel29:1 Nukw Abafilisitiya bakoraniriza ingabo zabo zose i Afeka, Abisirayeli na bo basagaza hafi y’iriba ry’i Yezireli." 
1Samuel29:2 Maz’ abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya bagenda bajanye ingabo zabo, hamwe ijana‐ijana, ahandi igihumbi‐igihumbi; kandi Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe bazanana na Akishi babakurikiye." 
1Samuel29:3 Maz’ abagabisha b’Abafilisitiya barabaza, bati Mbeg’ abo Baheburayo bakora iki hano? Akishi yishura abo bagabisha b’Abafilisitiya, at’ Uyu si Dawidi, yar’ umuntu wa Sauli umwami w’Abisirayeli, akaba yamaranye nanje imisi, na ko n’imyaka? Kand’ uhereye igihe yacīkiye, akaza i wanje, nta kibi namubonyeko gushitsa n’ubu." 
1Samuel29:4 Arikw abo bagabisha b’Abafilisitiya baramurakira, baramubarira, bati Subizay’ uwo mugabo, asubire ha hantu hiwe wamuhaye; nta co ajana natwe mu ntambara, ntahave aduhindukira umurwanizi mu rugamba. Mbeg’ uru rugabo, icosubira kurwuzuza na shebuja n’iki? S’imitwe y’aba bantu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Mbeg’ uyu si Dawidi wa wundi bāvyinira bitabiriza, bati Sauli yishe ibihumbi, Dawidi we yica ibihumbi indiri?" 
1Samuel29:6 Nuko Akishi ahamagaza Dawidi, aramubarira, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, warabaye umwizigirwa, kandi kubganje nta cokubujije ko wotabaranye nanje mu rugamba, tugatabarukana; kuk’ uhereye igihe waziye i wanje, nta kibi nakubonyeko gushitsa n’ubu; ariko rer’ abaganwa ntibagushima." 
1Samuel29:7 None rero ni wītāhire, ugende amahoro, woye gutera ishavu abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya." 
1Samuel29:8 Dawidi abaza Akishi, ati None se nakoze iki? Uhereye igihe natanguriye kuba umusavyi wawe ukageza n’ubu, wambonyekw iki combuza kugenda gutera abansi bawe ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma?" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi aramwishura, ati Kubganje ndazi ko war’ untunganiye nk’umumarayika w’ Imana; arikw abagabisha b’Abafilisitiya baravuze, ngo Ntuzojana na bo mu ntambara." 
1Samuel29:10 Nuko non’ uzindukane n’abantu ba shobuja mwāzananye, muhenge kare mu macāca, mugende." 
1Samuel29:11 Nuko Dawidi azindukana kare mu gatondo n’ingabo ziwe, baragenda, basubira mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya. Arikw Abafilisitiya baradūga, batera i Yezireli." 
1Samuel30:1 Nuko Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe bashika i Sikulagi ku musi ugira gatatu, basanga Abamaleki bateye igihugu c’i bumanuko n’i Sikulagi, basanga i Sikulagi bāhanesheje, bāhaturiye," 
1Samuel30:2 bānyaze abagore n’abāri mur’ ico gisagara bose, abato n’abakuru; ntibāri bagize uwo bica, atar’ ukubajana ar’ inyagano, bakīgīra." 
1Samuel30:3 Nuko Dawidi n’abantu biwe bashitse kur’ ico gisagara, ni kwo gusanga bāgituriye, kand’ abagore n’abana babo b’abahungu n’abakobga bājanywe ar’ inyagano." 
1Samuel30:4 Maze Dawidi n’abantu bari kumwe na we baraturikisha, bararira, gushitsa aho batakibasha kurira." 
1Samuel30:5 Kand’ abagore ba Dawidi bompi, Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli, na Abigayili yahora ari muka Nabali w’i Karumeli, na bo bāri bājanywe ar’ inyagano." 
1Samuel30:6 Maze Dawidi agira intuntu nyinshi, kukw abantu bāvuga nk’abagomba kumutera amabuye; bose bāri n’akabonge kubg’ abana babo b’abahungu n’abakobga; ariko Dawidi arīremēsha, yisunze Uhoraho Imana yiwe." 
1Samuel30:7 Maze Dawidi abarira Abiyatari umuherezi mwene Ahimeleki, ati N’unzanire efodi hano. Nuko Abiyatari azanira Dawidi efodi." 
1Samuel30:8 Dawidi araheza asiguza Uhoraho, ati Mbega ni nakurikira ico gitero nzogihamvya? Aramwishura, ati N’ubakurikire, kuk’ utazobura kubahamvya, ukabāka vyose." 
1Samuel30:9 Nuko Dawidi aragenda, bo na za ngabo zari kumwe na we ukw ar’ amajana atandatu; bashitse ku mugezi Besori, abāri basigaye inyuma bagumaho." 
1Samuel30:10 Ariko Dawidi araramiriza, bo n’abantu amajana ane; abandi amajana abiri barasigara, kuko bari barushe, bananirwa kujabuka umugezi Besori." 
1Samuel30:11 Hanyuma baseruka ku Munyegiputa mu gahinga, bamuzanira Dawidi; bamutamika agatsima, bamuramiza n’utuzi," 
1Samuel30:12 bamuha n’ikimanyu c’irobe ribumbabumbge mu nsukoni, n’udusoko tubiri tw’inzabibu zumye; ariye, aca arahēmbūka, kuko yar’ amaze imisi itatu n’amajoro atatu ata co arya, ata co anywa." 
1Samuel30:13 Dawidi aramubaza, at’ Ur’ umuntu wa nde? Kand’ ur’ uwa hehe? Na we aramwishura, ati Nd’ umuhungu wo muri Egiputa, umugurano w’ Umwamaleki; kandi hashize imisi itatu databuja antaye, kuko nari ndwaye." 
1Samuel30:14 Twari twateye i bumanuko mu Bakeriti, dutera n’i Buyuda, n’i bumanuko mu bga Kalebu, duturira n’i Sikulagi." 
1Samuel30:15 Dawidi aramubaza, ati None wonjana ukanshikana mur’ ico gitero? Aramwishura, ati Ndahira Imana k’utazonyica, canke k’utazontanga mu maboko ya databuja, mpeze ndakujane ah’ ico gitero kiri." 
1Samuel30:16 Nukw amumanukanye, basanga bagandagaje, bariko bararya, binywera, batārīka, bahimbawe n’inyagano nyinshi banyaze mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya no mu c’Abayuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Dawidi aca ashirakw arabica, uhereye bugihwībīra ugashitsa ku mugoroba wa bukeye; ntiharokoka n’umwe, atar’ abahungu b’imisore amajana ane, bāsimbiye ku ngamiya bagahunga." 
1Samuel30:18 Dawidi yigarukanira ivyo Abamaleki bari banyaze vyose, arokora n’abagore biwe bompi." 
1Samuel30:19 Ntihāgira ico babura, ari gito ari kinini, ar’ abana b’abahungu cank’ ab’ abakobga, ar’ ico mu nyagano canke mu vyari vyasahuwe; Dawidi abigarukana vyose." 
1Samuel30:20 Dawidi anyaga intama n’inka zose, bazishorera imbere y’izabo, baravuga, bat’ Uyu ni wo munyago wa Dawidi." 
1Samuel30:21 Maze Dawidi ashika kuri ba bantu amajana abiri bāri barushe, bananirwa kumukurikira, bakabasiga ku mugezi Besori; baza gusanganira Dawidi n’abari kumwe na we. Dawidi abashikiriye arabaramutsa." 
1Samuel30:22 Maz’ abantu bose b’abanyakibi b’abagesera mu bāri bājanye na Dawidi baravuga, bati Ntitubaha ku vyari vyaranyazwe twigarukaniye, kuko batājanye natwe; shit’ umuntu wese turamuha umugore wiwe n’abana, babajane bagende." 
1Samuel30:23 Ariko Dawidi arababarira, ati Bagenzi banje, ntimwogenza murtyo ivyo Uhoraho yaduhaye, n’ukuntu yatuzigamye, akagabura mu maboko yacu ico gitero cari caduteye." 
1Samuel30:24 Har’ uwokwemera iyo nama yanyu? Uwagiye mu ntambara n’uwasigaye ku bintu bararinganiza umutigiri: baragabangana banganye. 
1Samuel30:25 Nuk’ uhereye uwo musi abigira icagezwe n’ibgirizwa mu Bisirayeli na bugingo n’ ubu. 
1Samuel30:26 Maze Dawidi ashitse i Sikulagi, arungikira abakunzi biwe b’ abashingantahe b’i Buyuda ku minyago, ati Ngivyo ivyo mbagabiye bivuye ku minyago y’abansi b’ Uhoraho." 
1Samuel30:27 Abirungikira ab’i Beteli, n’ab’i Ramoti h’i bumanuko, n’ab’i Yatira;" 
1Samuel30:28 n’ab’i Aroweri, n’ab’i Sifumoti, n’ab’i Eshitemowa;" 
1Samuel30:29 n’ab’i Rakala, n’abo mu bisagara vya ba Yerameyeli, n’abo mu bisagara vy’Abanyakeni;" 
1Samuel30:30 n’ab’i Horuma, n’ab’i Korashani, n’ab’i Ataki;" 
1Samuel30:31 n’ ab’i Heburoni, n’ab’ ahandi hose aho Dawidi n’abantu biwe bāhora bayerērera." 
1Samuel31:1 Nukw Abafilisitiya batera Abisirayeli, Abisirayeli barabahunga, bahindikirana ku musozi Gilibowa." 
1Samuel31:2 Abafilisitiya bakinagiza Sauli n’abahungu biwe, bica Yonatani na Abinadabu na Milikishuwa abahungu biwe." 
1Samuel31:3 Urubgamba rusugereza Sauli, abanyamiheto bamushingiriza imyampi, bamurandura umutima." 
1Samuel31:4 Maze Sauli abarira ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa, ati Sokōra inkota, uyinsogote, zirya ntakebga zoye kunshikīra ngo zinsogote, zinshinyagurire. Arik’ ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa aranka, kuko yari yagize ubgoba bginshi. Sauli ni kwo gufata iyiwe nkota, ayīsukako." 
1Samuel31:5 Uno yamutwaza ibirwanishwa abonye ko Sauli apfuye, na we yīsuka kuri rwiwe, bagwa hamwe." 
1Samuel31:6 Uko ni ko Sauli yapfuye, n’abahungu biwe batatu, n’uwamutwaza ibirwanishwa, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, bapfa kur’ uwo musi nyene." 
1Samuel31:7 Maz’ ingabo z’Abisirayeli zo hakurya y’umwonga n’izo hakurya ya Yorodani, babonye kw Abisirayeli bahunze, kandi ko Sauli n’ abahungu biwe bapfuye, bata ibisagara vyabo, barahunga; Abafilisitiya baraza, baravyinjira." 
1Samuel31:8 Bukeye bgaho, Abafilisitiya baje gukoba imivyimba, basanga Sauli n’abahungu biwe batatu barambaraye ku musozi Gilibowa bapfuye." 
1Samuel31:9 Bamuca izosi, bamukoba ibirwanishwa, batuma intumwa mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya iyo kiva kikagera, ngo bakwize inkuru mu nsengero z’ibigirwamana vyabo no mu bantu." 
1Samuel31:10 Ibirwanishwa vyiwe babishira mu rusengero rwa Ashitaroti, umuvyimba wiwe bawēnētsa ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye rw’igisagara c’i Beti‐shani." 
1Samuel31:11 Maz’ ab’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi bumvise ivy’ Abafilisitiya bagiriye Sauli," 
1Samuel31:12 abahizi bose barahaguruka, bagenda ijoro ryose, bamanura umuvyimba wa Sauli ku ruzitiro rw’i Beti‐shani, bo n’iy’ abahungu biwe; bashitse i Yabeshi bayituririraho." 
1Samuel31:13 Maze bābīra amagufa yabo, bayahamba musi y’igiti c’umwesheli i Yabeshi nyene, baca barisonzesha kumara imisi ndwi." 
2Samuel1:1 Sauli amaze gutanga, Dawidi na we atabarutse avuye kugeseza Abamaleki, amaze kabiri i Sikulagi," 
2Samuel1:2 ku musi ugira gatatu haza umuntu avuye aho Sauli yar’ ashagaje, yitantamuriyekw impuzu ziwe, yiyoreye ivu mu mutwe; ashitse imbere ya Dawidi akubita inkoro hasi, aramwunamira." 
2Samuel1:3 Dawidi aramubaza, at’ Uva hehe? Aramwishura, ati Ni jewe ndokotse mva ah’ Abisirayeli bāri bashagaje." 
2Samuel1:4 Dawidi aramubaza, ati Vyagenze bite? Ntabara umbarire. Aramwishura, at’ Abantu barahunze bava mu rugamba, kandi benshi baruguyemwo, barapfa; na Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe na bo bārapfuye." 
2Samuel1:5 Maze Dawidi abaza uwo muhungu amubikiye, ati Mbega wabimenye ute ko Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe bāpfuye?" 
2Samuel1:6 Nya muhungu amubikiye aramwishura, ati Nariko ndihitira, nshitse ku musozi Gilibowa, ngize ntya mbona Sauli yishimikije icumu, kandi mbona asugerejwe n’imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi." 
2Samuel1:7 Maze Sauli akebutse inyuma arambona, arampamagara, ndamwitaba, nti Sabge!" 
2Samuel1:8 Arambaza, at’ Uri nde? Ndamwishura, nti Nd’ Umwamaleki." 
2Samuel1:9 Arambarira, at’ Igira hino, untabare umpohoshe, ati Kuko nsigaye nd’ intēre, naho nkibona." 
2Samuel1:10 Nuko ndamwēgēra, ndamuhohosha, kuko nabona neza kw atagikira, ni yaramuka atemvye. Ndaheza ndamukoba igitsibo cari mu mutwe, n’umuringa wari ku kuboko; none ndabikuzaniye hano, mugenzi." 
2Samuel1:11 Maze Dawidi afata impuzu ziwe, azītantamurirako, n’abantu bose bari kumwe na we bagira kuno;" 
2Samuel1:12 baraboroga, bararira, birirwa ata co batamiye gushitsa ku mugoroba, kubga Sauli n’ umuhungu wiwe Yonatani, no kubg’ abantu b’Uhoraho, n’inzu ya Isirayeli, kuko bicishijwe inkota." 
2Samuel1:13 Dawidi abaza uno muhungu amubikiye, at’ Ur’ uwa hehe? Ati Nd’ umwana w’Umwamaleki yaje ino ar’ inyambukīra." 
2Samuel1:14 Dawidi aramubaza, ati N’iki caguteye kwubahuka, ntutinye kubangura ukuboko, ukica uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta?" 
2Samuel1:15 Dawidi araheza ahamagara umwe mu basore, aramubarira, ati Ngwino umwice. Aca aramucumita, arapfa." 
2Samuel1:16 Dawidi aramubarira, at’ Amaraso yawe abe ari wewe aja ku mutwe, kukw akanwa kawe ari ko kakubereye icagirizi, nk’uko wivugiye ko wishe uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta." 
2Samuel1:17 Maze Dawidi acura intimba ya Sauli n’umuhungu wiwe Yonatani; 
2Samuel1:18 avyita Agacurantimba k’Umuheto, avuga ko bavyigisha Abayuda; vyanditswe mu gitabo ca Yashari." 
2Samuel1:19 At’ Ewe Isirayeli, icubahiro cawe gitsinzwe ku mpinga z’imisozi yawe! Ewe kuntu abahizi bāguye!" 
2Samuel1:20 Ntimukabikerutse i Gati, Ntimukabitāngāze mu nzira z’i Ashikeloni, Abakobga b’Abafilisitiya boye kunezerwa, Abakobga b’abantu b’intakebga boye gutera impundu." 
2Samuel1:21 Yemwe misozi y’i Gilibowa, Ntihagatonde ikime kuri mwebge, canke ngo hagwe imvura, Ntihakamere imirima ngo baronkek’ umushuzo w’amashikanwa! Kuko kuri mwebge ari ho inkinzo y’umuhizi yashiburiwe, Ni yo nkinzo ya Sauli, itazosīgwa amavuta ukundi." 
2Samuel1:22 Umuheto wa Yonatani ntiwatabaruka Utanyoye amaraso y’abishwe, Udasākije mu binure vy’ abahizi; Kand’ inkota ya Sauli ntiyatabaruka ubusa." 
2Samuel1:23 Ewe kuntu Sauli na Yonatani bākundwa, kand’ ar’ abanyagikundiro! Nta cabatandukanije mu kubaho kwabo canke mu gupfa kwabo. Bārusha inkukuma kunyaruka, Bārusha n’intambge gukomera." 
2Samuel1:24 Yemwe bakobga b’Abisirayeli, ni muririre Sauli, Yahora abambika impuzu zisa n’agahama, mugashaza, Yashariza impuzu zanyu n’ utugenegene tw’izahabu." 
2Samuel1:25 Ewe kuntu abahizi bāguye mu ntambara hagati! Yonatani arambaraye ku mpinga y’umusozi wawe, aho yatsinzwe." 
2Samuel1:26 Unteye akabonge, ncuti yanje Yonatani! Ewe kuntu nagukunda! Urukundo wankunda rwar’ igitangaza, Rwaruta urukundo rw’abagore." 
2Samuel1:27 Ewe kuntu abahizi bāguye, Ibirwanishwa vyabo bikononekara!" 
2Samuel2:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, Dawidi asiguza Uhoraho, ati Mbega ndūge, nimukire mu gisagara kimwe mu vy’i Buyuda? Uhoraho aramwishura, at’ Ego me dūga. Dawidi ati Nje hehe? Aramwishura, ati Ja i Heburoni." 
2Samuel2:2 Nuko Dawidi adūganayo n’abagore biwe bompi, Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli, na Abigayili yahora ari muka Nabali w’i Karumeli." 
2Samuel2:3 Adūgana n’abantu biwe, umuntu wese n’abo mu rugo rwiwe; bimukira mu bisagara vy’i Heburoni." 
2Samuel2:4 Bukeye abantu b’i Buyuda baraza, bahimikira Dawidi bamusutsekw amavuta, ngw abe umwami w’ umuryango w’Abayuda. Bukeye babarira Dawidi, bat’ Ab’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi ni bo bāhamvye Sauli." 
2Samuel2:5 Nuko Dawidi atuma intumwa ku b’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi, muti Muragahezagirwa n’Uhoraho, kubg’ ico kigongwe mwagiriye Sauli shobuja, mukamufuba!" 
2Samuel2:6 Nuko rer’ Uhoraho abagirire ikigongwe ababere umwizigirwa; nanje nyene nzobishura ico kigongwe mwāgize, kuko mwāgenjeje murtyo." 
2Samuel2:7 None rero, mwigumye, mube abagabo: kuko Sauli shobuja yāpfuye, kand’ ab’ umuryango w’Abayuda banyimikishije amavuta ngo mbe umwami wabo." 
2Samuel2:8 Kandi Abuneri mwene Neri, umugabisha w’ingabo za Sauli, yari yarajanye Ishibosheti mwene Sauli, aramujabutsa amujana i Mahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:9 Aramwimika ngw abe umwami w’i Gileyadi n’ uw’ Abashuri n’uw’ i Yezireli n’ uw’ Abefurayimu n’uw’ Ababenyamini n’uw’ Abisirayeli bose. 
2Samuel2:10 Kandi Ishibosheti mwene Sauli, igihe yima ngw abe umwami w’ Abisirayeli, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwine; amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma. Arikw ab’ umuryango w’Abayuda bo, bākondoreye inyuma ya Dawidi." 
2Samuel2:11 Kandi Dawidi igihe yamaze i Heburoni ar’ umwami w’umuryango w’ Abayuda, n’imyaka ndwi n’amezi atandatu." 
2Samuel2:12 Bukeye Abuneri mwene Neri, n’abantu ba Ishibosheti mwene Sauli, bava i Mahanayimu baja i Gibeyoni." 
2Samuel2:13 Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya na we, n’abantu ba Dawidi, baragenda bahūrira na bo ku kidengeri c’i Gibeyoni; nuko baricara, bamwe hakurya y’ ico kidengeri, abandi hakuno." 
2Samuel2:14 Abuneri abarira Yowabu, at’ Abasore ni bave hasi, bakinishe inkota twirorērere. Yowabu at’ Ego me ni bave hasi."
