2Samuel2:15 Nuko bava hasi, baraza barahūra, baringanije igitigiri: abo ku ruhande rw’Ababenyamini na Ishibosheti mwene Sauli bar’ icumi na babiri, kand’ abo ku ruhande rwa Dawidi na bo bar’ icumi na babiri nyene." 
2Samuel2:16 Bose barasūmirana, umuntu wese asūmira agakanu ka mugenzi we, bazibagurana inkota mu mbavu; bacurikirana hamwe. Ni co catumye aho hantu bahīta Helukati‐hasurimu: ni hafi y’i Gibeyoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Uwo musi haca haba intambara ihambaye cane; Abuneri n’Abisirayeli baraneshwa, bahunga abantu ba Dawidi." 
2Samuel2:18 Kand’ abana ba Seruwiya ukw ari batatu, Yowabu na Abishayi na Asaheli, ni ho bāri; kandi Asaheli yar’ impayamaguru nk’ingeregere yo mw ishamba." 
2Samuel2:19 Maze Asaheli yōma kuri Abuneri, adakebereje i buryo cank’ i bumoso ngw amuve inyuma." 
2Samuel2:20 Maze Abuneri akebutse inyuma, aramubaza, ati Mbega ni wewe ga Asaheli? Na we aramwishura, ati Ni jewe." 
2Samuel2:21 Abuneri aramubarira, ati Kebereza i buryo cank’ i bumoso, ugire uwo mu misore ufata, abe ari we wambura ibirwanishwa vyiwe. Ariko Asaheli yanka gukevya ngw amuve inyuma." 
2Samuel2:22 Abuneri asubira kubarira Asaheli, ati Ca hiyo, ureke kunkurikira; mbeg’ urinde kuntera kukwica? Nkwishe noshobora nte guhūza amaso na Yowabu mukurwawe?" 
2Samuel2:23 Ariko na ho nyene yanka gukebereza i ruhande, bituma Abuneri amuzibura umuhunda w’icumu ku nda, riseruka inyuma, Asaheli yikubita hasi, agwa aho nyene. Maz’ abantu bashitse aho Asaheli aguye, baca bahagararaho." 
2Samuel2:24 Ariko Yowabu na Abishayi bakurikira Abuneri; izuba rirenga bafashe ku musozi Ama, urābana n’i Giya ku nzira ija mu bugaragwa bg’i Gibeyoni." 
2Samuel2:25 Maz’ Ababenyamini biyegeraniriza kuri Abuneri, bīrema akarwi kamwe, batonda ku mpinga y’umusozi." 
2Samuel2:26 Maze Abuneri atera akamo Yowabu, aramubaza, ati Mbeg’ inkota izokwama iririka na ntaryo? Ntuzi yukw amaherezo hazovamw’ intuntu? None mbeg’ uzogeza ryari kutabogoza abantu ngo bave inyuma ya bene wabo?" 
2Samuel2:27 Yowabu aramwishura, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Imana, iy’ utagira ico uvuga, bgari kurinda buca abantu batarareka gukurikirana bene wabo." 
2Samuel2:28 Nuko Yowabu aca avuza inzamba, abantu bose barahagarara, ntibakomeza gukurikirana Abisirayeli canke kubarwanya ukundi." 
2Samuel2:29 Nuko Abuneri n’ingabo ziwe bakesha iryo joro bajanye ikiyaya Araba; bajabuka Yorodani, bajana i Bitironi hose, bararuha bashika i Mahanayimu." 
2Samuel2:30 Yowabu na we arahindukira, areka gukurikirana Abuneri; amaze gukoranya ingabo zose za Dawidi, asanga habuzemw’ abantu cumi n’icenda bo na Asaheli." 
2Samuel2:31 Arikw ingabo za Dawidi zari zishe abantu amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu mu Babenyamini no mu ngabo za Abuneri. 
2Samuel2:32 Nuko baterura Asaheli, baramujana bamuhamba i Betelehemu mu mva ya se. Yowabu n’ingabo ziwe baraheza bagenda ijoro ryose; buca bashitse i Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:1 Nuko haba intambara kumara igihe kirekire hagati y’ab’ inzu ya Sauli n’ab’ iya Dawidi; Dawidi agenda arushiriza kuba agahambaye, arikw ab’ inzu ya Sauli bo bagenda bashira inkomezi." 
2Samuel3:2 Abana b’abahungu Dawidi yavyariye i Heburoni, uw’ imfura ni Amunoni, uwo yavyaye kuri Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli;" 
2Samuel3:3 uwa kabiri ni Kileyabu, uwo yavyaye kuri Abigayili, yahora ari muka Nabali w’i Karumeli; uwa gatatu ni Abusalomu, uwo yavyaye kuri Mayaka, umukobga wa Talumayi umwami w’i Geshuri;" 
2Samuel3:4 uwa kane ni Adoniya, uwo yavyaye kuri Hagita; uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya, uwo yavyaye kuri Abitali;" 
2Samuel3:5 uwa gatandatu ni Itureyamu, uwo yavyaye ku wundi mugore wiwe yitwa Egila. Abo ni bo Dawidi yavyariye i Heburoni." 
2Samuel3:6 Ico gihe c’intambara y’ab’ inzu ya Sauli n’ab’ iya Dawidi, Abuneri yari yīgize agakomeye mu rugo rwa Sauli." 
2Samuel3:7 Kandi Sauli yar’ afise incoreke yari yaragize umugore, yitwa Risipa, umukobga wa Aya; bukeye Ishibosheti abaza Abuneri, ati N’iki catumye winjirana muka data?" 
2Samuel3:8 Ayo majambo ya Ishibosheti ashavuza Abuneri cane; aramwishura, ati Mbeg’ ugira ngo nd’imbga y’i Buyuda? Ko nagiriye neza ab’ inzu ya so Sauli na bene wabo n’abakunzi biwe, nawe sinkugabure mu maboko ya Dawidi; non’ ugapfa kunyagiriza icaha ku mugore gusa?" 
2Samuel3:9 Imana iz’ ibimpanire, jewe Abuneri, mbere birushirije, ni ntagirira Dawidi nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamurahiye," 
2Samuel3:10 ngakūra ingoma mu nzu ya Sauli, nkayegurira Dawidi, ngatuma ingoma yiwe ihangama mu Bisirayeli no mu Bayuda, uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba." 
2Samuel3:11 Maze Ishibosheti ntiyaronka irindi na rimwe yishura Abuneri, kuko yamutinya." 
2Samuel3:12 Bukeye Abuneri atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi, muti Nyene kirya gihugu ni nde? Muti N’ usezerane isezerano na we, muti Kand’ azofatanya nawe kukurehereza Abisirayeli bose." 
2Samuel3:13 Dawidi arishura, ati Ni vyiza; mut’ Azosezerana nawe; muti Mugabo hariho kimwe akugombako, mut’ Utazanye Mikali mwene Sauli, ah’ uzozira ngo mubonane, muti Ntuzomukubita ijisho." 
2Samuel3:14 Maze Dawidi atuma intumwa kuri Ishibosheti mwene Sauli, muti Muhe umugore wiwe Mikali, uwo yakoye ubugabo ijana yashahuye Abafilisitiya." 
2Samuel3:15 Nuko Ishibosheti aratuma, bamukūra kwa Palutiyeli mwene Layishi umugabo wiwe." 
2Samuel3:16 Maz’ uwo mugabo wiwe aramuherekeza, agenda ararira inzira yose, arinda amushikana i Bahurimu. Ashitseyo, Abuneri aramubarira, ati Hogi subira inyuma; nukw aca asubira inyuma." 
2Samuel3:17 Bukeye Abuneri aja inama n’ abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli, aravuga, ati Mumaze igihe kitari gito mugomba ko Dawidi yoba umwami wanyu;" 
2Samuel3:18 none rero ni mubirāngūre; kuk’ Uhoraho yavuze ivya Dawidi, ng’ Umusavyi wiwe Dawidi ni we azokiza abantu biwe Abisirayeli, abakūre mu maboko y’Abafilisitiya no mu y’abansi babo bose." 
2Samuel3:19 Abuneri abibarira n’ Ababenyamini na bo. Bukeye aja i Heburoni, kugira ngo yīgānire Dawidi ivyo Abisirayeli n’ab’ umuryango w’Ababenyamini bose bamaramaje gukora vyose." 
2Samuel3:20 Nukw ashitse i Heburoni kwa Dawidi, ari kumwe n’abantu mirongwibiri, Dawidi amurondereza amazimano bo n’abari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel3:21 Maze Abuneri abarira Dawidi, ati Hinge ngende, ngagamure Abisirayeli bose baze ah’ uri, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, kugira ngo basezerane nawe, ubone kubaganza bose nk’uk’ ugomba. Nuko Dawidi arekura Abuneri, agenda amahoro." 
2Samuel3:22 Maze Yowabu n’abantu ba Dawidi baragaruka bavuye gutera, bazanye iminyago myinshi; ariko Abuneri ntiyar’ akiri kumwe na Dawidi i Heburoni, kuko yar’ amaze kumurekura, yīgīriye amahoro." 
2Samuel3:23 Nuko Yowabu n’ingabo ziwe zose bagishika bartya, babarira Yowabu, bati Abuneri mwene Neri yamanye n’umwami, non’ umwami yamurekuye, yīgīriye amahoro." 
2Samuel3:24 Maze Yowabu aragenda abaza umwami, ati Wakoze ibiki? Abuneri ngo yamanye nawe, uraheza uramureka arīgīra?" 
2Samuel3:25 Aho ntuzi yuko Abuneri mwene Neri yazanywe no kuguhenda, ngw amenye ingen’ utabara n’ ingen’ utabaruka, amenye n’ivy’ ukora vyose?" 
2Samuel3:26 Nuko Yowabu, amaze kwikebanura Dawidi, akurikiza intumwa Abuneri; zimugarurira kw iriba ry’i Sira; ariko Dawidi ntiyabimenya." 
2Samuel3:27 Nuko Abuneri ashitse i Heburoni, Yowabu amwihererana hagati y’ amarembo, nk’ūgira abonane na we ata wumva; araheza amucumita ku nda, agwaho, amuhōye amaraso ya murumuna we Asaheli." 
2Samuel3:28 Hanyuma Dawidi avyumvise, aravuga, ati Twe n’igihugu canje turacuna imbere y’Uhoraho kur’ ayo maraso ya Abuneri mwene Neri gushitsa ibihe vyose;" 
2Samuel3:29 arikw arasubira ku mutwe wa Yowabu no ku b’inzu ya se bose; mu nzu ya Yowabu ntihakabure umunyagisokoro, cank’ umunyamibembe, cank’ ūgendera ku kibando, cank’ uwicwa n’inkota, cank’ ūtagira ico ashira ku munwa." 
2Samuel3:30 Uko ni ko Yowabu na Abishayi murumuna we bishe Abuneri, kuko yari yatsinze murumuna wabo mu ntambara y’i Gibeyoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Dawidi araheza abarira Yowabu n’abari kumwe na we bose, ati Ni mwitantamurirekw impuzu zanyu, mukenyere amagunira, muririre i ruhande ya Abuneri. Maz’ umwami Dawidi akurikira ikigagara ciwe." 
2Samuel3:32 Nuko Abuneri bamuhamba i Heburoni, umwami araturikisha aririra ku mva ya Abuneri; abantu bose bararira." 
2Samuel3:33 Umwami acurira intimba Abuneri, ati Mbega Abuneri yar’ akwiye gupfa nk’ukw imburabgenge ipfa?" 
2Samuel3:34 Amaboko yawe kw atar’ aboshwe, Cank’ ibirenge vyawe ngo bibe mu minyororo! Upfuye nk’umuntu aguye mu maboko y’inkozi z’ibibi! Nukw abantu bose bongera kumuririra." 
2Samuel3:35 Hanyuma abantu bose baza kwinginga Dawidi ngw afūngure hakiri ku murango; ariko Dawidi ararahira, aravuga, ati Ni nagira ico ntamira izuba ritararenga, Imana iz’ ibimpanire, mbere birushirije!" 
2Samuel3:36 Abantu bose babibonye birabanezera; mber’ ivy’ umwami yakora vyose vyagenda binezera abantu bose. 
2Samuel3:37 Nuk’ uwo musi abantu bose n’Abisirayeli bose bamenya ko bitāvuye ku mwami kwica Abuneri mwene Neri. 
2Samuel3:38 Maz’ umwami abarira abantu biwe, at’ Aho ntimuzi yuk’ uyu musi hapfuye uwo mu nda y’ingoma kandi w’agahambaye?" 
2Samuel3:39 Kandi nanje naho nd’umwami yimikishijwe amavuta, arik’ ubu nsigaye ncitse urudendevu. Kand’ abo bagabo, abahungu ba Seruwiya, n’abantu badashoboka, barannaniye. Uhoraho n’asubirize umunyakibi mu nkōko nk’ukw ibibi vyiwe bingana." 
2Samuel4:1 Bukeye Ishibosheti mwene Sauli yumvise ko Abuneri yaguye i Heburoni, arajonjogora, Abisirayeli bose bahagarika imitima." 
2Samuel4:2 Kandi mwene Sauli uwo yar’ afise abagabisha babiri b’ imice y’ingabo, umwe yitwa Bayana, uwundi Rekabu, bari bene Rimoni w’i Beroti, wo mu muryango wa Benyamini. (Kukw i Beroti hāharūrwa ku Babenyamini;" 
2Samuel4:3 kand’ ab’ i Beroti bari barahungiye i Gitayimu, bagumayo kugeza na bugingo n’ubu.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Kandi Yonatani mwene Sauli yar’ afise umwana yamugaye ibirenge. Igihe imbitsi yaza ivuye i Yezireli kubika Sauli na Yonatani, uwo mwana yar’ amaze imyaka itanu avutse; maz’ umurezi wiwe aramuhitana, arahunga; akinyaragasa ahunga, aramukorokana, yikubita hasi, aca amugara. Nya mwana yitwa Mefibosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Bukeye bene Rimona w’i Beroti, Rekabu na Bayana, baraza, bashika kwa Ishibosheti, igihe yar’ avyukiriye mu mashōka." 
2Samuel4:6 Kand’ incoreke ikumīra yari yamye aragosora ingano, iterwa n’itiro, irasinzira; nuko Rekabu na Bayana mwene nyina babona akaryo ko kwinjira." 
2Samuel4:7 Bīteye mu ngoro, barenga mw iteka basanga aryamye ku kirwa, baramucumita, baramwica, bamuca izosi; baraheza bajana umutwe wiwe, bagenda ijoro ryose bajanye ikiyaya Araba." 
2Samuel4:8 Maz’ uwo mutwe wa Ishibosheti bawushīra umwami Dawidi i Heburoni, baramubarira, bati Nguyu umutwe wa Ishibosheti umwana w’ umwansi wawe Sauli, yahora aguhīga; Uhoraho ashubirije Sauli mu nkōko, n’abana biwe, abaguhōye, mwami wacu nyen’ ingoma." 
2Samuel4:9 Maze Dawidi yishura Rekabu na mwene nyina Bayana, bene Rimona w’i Beroti, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, yagiye andokora mu vyago vyose;" 
2Samuel4:10 igihe umuntu yaje kumbarira, at’ Erega Sauli yapfuye, agira ngw anzaniye inkuru nziza, naciye ndamufata, ndamwicira aho nyene i Sikulagi; iyo ni yo ngero namugereye ku nkuru yiwe." 
2Samuel4:11 None mbega, abantu b’inkozi z’ibibi basanze umuntu w’umugororotsi mu nzu yiwe yiryamiye ku buriri bakamwica, sindushiriza kubahōra amaraso yiwe, nkabarandura nkabakūra mw isi?" 
2Samuel4:12 Maze Dawidi abarira imisore yamugendanira, barabīca, babaca ibikonjo n’ibirenge, babamanika i ruhande y’ikidengeri c’i Heburoni. Arik’ umutwe wa Ishibosheti barawābīra, bawuhamba mu mva ya Abuneri i Heburoni nyene." 
2Samuel5:1 Bukeye imiryango yose y’ Abisirayeli ija i Heburoni kwa Dawidi, baramubarira, bat’ Ehe rāba, tur’ akara kamwe n’amaraso amwe." 
2Samuel5:2 Kandi mu bihe vya kera, hamwe Sauli yar’ umwami wacu, ni wewe wajana Abisirayeli gutabara, mugatabarukana. Kand’ Uhoraho yarakubgiye kw ari wewe uzoragira abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli, kandi k’uzoba segaba wabo." 
2Samuel5:3 Uko ni kw abashingantahe bose b’Abisirayeli bāshengereye umwami i Heburoni; nuk’ umwami Dawidi asezeranira na bo isezerano imbere y’Uhoraho i Heburoni nyene; bamwimikisha amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli. 
2Samuel5:4 Kandi Dawidi yimye amaze imyaka mirongwitatu avutse; amara imyaka mirongwine ku ngoma. 
2Samuel5:5 Yamaze imyaka ndwi n’amezi atandatu i Heburoni, aganza Abayuda; i Yerusalemu na ho ahamara imyaka mirongwitatu n’itatu, aganza bose Abisirayeli n’Abayuda." 
2Samuel5:6 Igihe umwami Dawidi yaja i Yerusalemu n’ingabo ziwe gutera Abayebusi, ari bo bamye ar’ inyamo z’ico gihugu, Abayebusi baramubarira, bati Ntuzopfa ushitse ngaha, kuko naho boba impumyi n’ibimuga bokwiyamiriza! Kuko bari bibgiye, bati Dawidi ntiyoshobora gushika ino." 
2Samuel5:7 Ariko Dawidi atsinda iboma ry’i Siyoni, ari ho hāciye hahinduka umurwa wiwe." 
2Samuel5:8 Uwo musi Dawidi aravuga, at’ Ūgomba gutera Abayebusi, n’ adūgane umugende w’amazi, abone gutera ivyo bimuga n’impumyi umutima wanje wanka. Ni co catumye bavuga, ngo Nta mpumyi cank’ ibimuga bizoshobora kwinjira mu ngoro." 
2Samuel5:9 Nuko Dawidi aba mur’ iryo boma, aryita umurwa wa Dawidi. Yubaka impande zose, uhereye inyuma y’uruzitiro rw’i Milo ugashitsa imbere yaho." 
2Samuel5:10 Nuko Dawidi arushiriza kuba agahambaye, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo yari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel5:11 Bukeye Hiramu umwami w’i Tiro atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi, arungika n’ibiti vy’amasederi n’ ababāji n’abubatsi, bubakira Dawidi ingoro." 
2Samuel5:12 Nuko Dawidi aca atahura yuk’ Uhoraho ari we yamuteretse ngw abe umwami w’ Abisirayeli, kandi kw ashize hejuru ubgami bgiwe kubg’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Maze Dawidi yābīrira i Yerusalemu abandi bamikazi, ahagirira n’izindi ncoreke zimeze bga bagore, amaze kwimukirayo avuye i Heburoni, yongera kuvyara abandi bana b’abahungu n’abakobga." 
2Samuel5:14 Aya ni yo mazina y’abo yavyariye i Yerusalemu: Shamuwa na Shobabu na Natani na Salomo," 
2Samuel5:15 na Ibuhari na Elishuwa na Nefegi na Yafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 na Elishama na Eliyada na Elifeleti. 
2Samuel5:17 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bumvise ko Dawidi yimikishijwe amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli, Abafilisitiya bose baradūga baja kumuhīga. Dawidi avyumvise aramanuka aja mw isenga." 
2Samuel5:18 Kand’ abo Bafilisitiya bari baje, basagaza ku mwonga Refayimu." 
2Samuel5:19 Maze Dawidi asiguza Uhoraho, ati Ndūge nje gutera Abafilisitiya? Urabagabura mu maboko yanje? Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Dūga ubatere, kuko ntazobura kugabura abo Bafilisitiya mu maboko yawe." 
2Samuel5:20 Nuko Dawidi aja i Bayali‐perasimu, abanesherezayo; aravuga, at’ Uhoraho yahomvoye abansi banje imbere yanje nk’ukw amazi ahomvora urugomero; ni co catumye yita aho hantu Bayali‐perasimu." 
2Samuel5:21 Abafilisitiya batayo ibigirwamana vyabo; Dawidi n’ ingabo ziwe barabijana. 
2Samuel5:22 Bukeye Abafilisitiya basubira kudūga ubugira kabiri, basagaza ku mwonga Refayimu nyene." 
2Samuel5:23 Maze Dawidi asiguje Uhoraho, aramwishura, ati Ntudūge ngo mubīsanganize, arik’ ugende inkerera‐mucamo, mubaturuke inyuma, aharābana n’ibiti vyitwa imibaka." 
2Samuel5:24 Maze ni wumva imirindi y’ingabo ihindira hejuru kur’ iyo mibaka, uce uhaguruka vuba, kuko jewe Uhoraho nzoba nkwitangiye imbere gutera izo ngabo z’Abafilisitiya." 
2Samuel5:25 Nuko Dawidi abigenza artyo, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye; akinagiza Abafilisitiya uhereye i Geba ugashitsa i Gezeri." 
2Samuel6:1 Bukeye Dawidi yongera gukoranya ingabo zose zatoranijwe mu Bisirayeli; bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu. 
2Samuel6:2 Dawidi ahagurukana n’abo bantu bose bari kumwe na we, baja i Bayali‐yuda gukūray’ isandugu y’Imana yitirirwa rya Zina, ari ryo zina ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yama avyagiye ku bakerubi." 
2Samuel6:3 Nuko bashira iyo sandugu y’Imana ku mukogote musha, bayikūra kwa Abinadabu yaba kur’ uwo musozi; Uza na Ahiyo bene Abinadabu bayobora inka zikwega uyo mukogote musha." 
2Samuel6:4 Uko ni ko bākūye iyo sandugu y’ Imana kwa Abinadabu kur’ uwo musozi, Ahiyo ari we ayigiye imbere." 
2Samuel6:5 Dawidi n’umuryango wose w’Abisirayeli bagenda biyereka biginagura, bar’ imbere y’Uhoraho, bavuza inanga n’amakembe n’ udushako tw’ingoma n’imiduri n’ivyitwa matowazi." 
2Samuel6:6 Maze bashitse ku mbuga ya Nakoni, Uza atuma ukuboko ngw asame isandugu y’Imana, kukw inka zari zitirimutse." 
2Samuel6:7 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Uza, aca amutsinda aho nyene, amuhōye ico gicumuro, agwa ngah’ i ruhande y’isandugu y’ Imana." 
2Samuel6:8 Bibabaza Dawidi k’ Uhoraho yahwikiye Uza; aho hantu haca hitwa Peresi‐uza, kugeza na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Samuel6:9 Uwo musi Dawidi aca aterwa ubgoba n’Uhoraho; aravuga, ati Mbeg’ isandugu y’Uhoraho vyoshoboka bite kw iza i wanje?" 
2Samuel6:10 Nukw iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho Dawidi ntiyakunda kuyijana i we ku murwa wiwe, arikw ayikebereza kwa Obed‐edomu w’Umunyegati;" 
2Samuel6:11 imara amezi atatu mu nzu yiwe, kand’ Uhoraho aha umugisha Obed‐edomu n’abo mu rugo rwiwe bose." 
2Samuel6:12 Bukeye babarira umwami Dawidi, bat’ Uhoraho yahaye umugisha urugo rwa Obed‐edomu n’ivy’ afise vyose, kubga ya sandugu yiwe. Nuko Dawidi arahaguruka aja gukūra iyo sandugu y’ Imana kwa Obed‐edomu, ayitahana ku murwa wiwe anezerewe." 
2Samuel6:13 Kand’ uko vyagenze n’uku: abareruye isandugu y’Uhoraho batambutse intambuko zitandatu, atanga impfizi kw ikimazi, bo n’ ishuri y’igishishe." 
2Samuel6:14 Maze Dawidi yiyerekera imbere y’Uhoraho yiginagura; kandi yar’ akenyeye efodi yera derere. 
2Samuel6:15 Nuko Dawidi n’umuryango wose w’Abisirayeli badūgana isandugu y’Uhoraho basēsereza impundu, bavuza inzamba." 
2Samuel6:16 Maz’ isandugu y’Uhoraho igitamaje ku murwa wa Dawidi, Mikali umukobga wa Sauli arungurukira mw idirisha, abona umwami Dawidi yitera hejuru, yiyerekera imbere y’Uhoraho; amugayira mu mutima." 
2Samuel6:17 Nuko binjiza iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho, bayishira aho yagerewe hagati mw ihema Dawidi yari yarayishingiye. Dawidi araheza atangira imbere y’Uhoraho ibimazi vyoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe." 
2Samuel6:18 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwosa ikimazi no gutanga ibimazi vy’ishimwe, ahezagira abantu mw izina ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
2Samuel6:19 Maz’ agaburira abantu bose bo mur’ iryo shengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, abagabo n’abagore, umwe‐umwe amuha umutsima n’inkekera y’inyama n’akarobe kabumbabumbge mu nzabibu zumye. Maz’ abantu bose barataha, umuntu wese asubira i we." 
2Samuel6:20 Dawidi na we asubira i we ngw ahezagire abo mu rugo rwiwe. Maze Mikali umukobga wa Sauli asohoka gusanganira Dawidi, aramubarira, at’ Ereg’ uyu musi umwami w’Abisirayeli yar’ agahore! Urabona ukuntu wikijije impuzu imbere y’ubukobga bushumbiye abantu bawe, nk’umuntu yabaye vyenywe azīkiza ata dusoni!" 
2Samuel6:21 Dawidi yishura Mikali, at’ Uhoraho ni we nariko ndiyereka, kandi ni we yantoranije kuruta so n’ab’ inzu yiwe bose, akangira segaba w’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli. Ni co kizotuma niyereka Uhoraho." 
2Samuel6:22 Mbere nzorushiriza kwigira inkēngērwa, mbe ūgayitse mu maso yawe; arikw abo bakobga abo uvuze, bo bazonyubaha." 
2Samuel6:23 Maze Mikali umukobga wa Sauli ntiyabona akana arinda apfa. 
2Samuel7:1 Nuk’ umwami amaze kwinjira ingoro yiwe, Uhoraho amuhaye impore hagati y’abansi biwe bose bamukikije," 
2Samuel7:2 abarira ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani, at’ Ehe jewe mba mu nzu yubakishijwe amasederi, na yo isandugu y’Imana iba mw ihema gusa." 
2Samuel7:3 Natani yishura umwami, ati Genda ukore nk’uko wumva ugomba kwose, kuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe nawe." 
2Samuel7:4 Arikw iryo joro nyene ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Natani," 
2Samuel7:5 riti Genda ubgire umusavyi wanje Dawidi, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uti Mbeg’ uzomwubakira inzu yo kubamwo?" 
2Samuel7:6 Ut’ Erega ntiyigeze kuba mu nzu uhereye igihe yadūganiye Abisirayeli abakūye muri Egiputa gushitsa n’ubu. Uti Yahora aba mw ihema nk’ urusago. 
2Samuel7:7 Uti Mbeg’ ahantu hose yagiye agendana n’Abisirayeli bose, uti Har’ aho yigeze kubarira umucamanza w’Abisirayeli uw’ ari we wese, uwo yashizeho kuragira abantu biwe, akamubaza, ati N’iki cababujije kumwubakira inzu y’amasederi?" 
2Samuel7:8 Nuko rero, ukw abe ari k’ubarira umusavyi wanje Dawidi, ut’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, uku ni kw agize, uti Yagukūye mu bgungere, inyuma y’intama, ng’ ube segaba w’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli;" 
2Samuel7:9 uti Kandi yagendana nawe aho waja hose, ut’ Arandura abansi bawe bose imbere yawe; uti Kand’ azoguha izina rya rurangiranwa, nk’ukw abandi bahambaye bo mw isi bayafise." 
2Samuel7:10 Uti Kand’ abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli azobagenera ahantu, ahababadike, bahībēre ar’ ahabo bgite, batazohimuka ukundi; uti Kand’ abantu b’ibirara ntibazosubira kubagirira nabi nk’ubga mbere," 
2Samuel7:11 nko mu bihe yaha abacamanza kuganza abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli; uti Kand’ azoguha impore hagati y’abansi bawe bose. Uti Mber’ Uhoraho arakubariye yukw azokugira igisata. 
2Samuel7:12 Uti Kand’ imisi yawe ni yashika, ugahamvya ba sogokuruza, ut’ Azokwimika umwana wawe wivyariye, agusubirire mu gishingo, uti Kand’ azokomeza ingoma yiwe." 
2Samuel7:13 Ut’ Uwo ni we azomwubakira ingoro, ibe iy’ izina ryiwe, uti Kand’ azokomeza intebe yiwe y’ubgami gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
2Samuel7:14 Ut’ Azomubera se, na we amubere umwana; uti Na ho ni yacumura, azomuhanisha inkoni nk’iyo abantu bahanisha, amuhe imiramu nk’iy’ abana b’abantu;" 
2Samuel7:15 ut’ Arikw imbabazi ziwe ntazozimukūrako nk’uko yazikūye kuri Sauli, uwo yasohoye agashiraho wewe." 
2Samuel7:16 Uti Kand’ inzu yawe n’ubgami bgawe bizohora bihamye imbere yiwe, uti N’ingoma yawe izokwama ihangamye na ntaryo." 
2Samuel7:17 Maz’ ayo majambo yose n’ ukwo kwerekwa kwose, Natani abidondera Dawidi." 
2Samuel7:18 Maz’ umwami Dawidi arinjira, yicara imbere y’Uhoraho, aravuga, ati Mwami Uhoraho, mbega jewe n’inda n’indesho, n’inzu yanje, nar’ iki, kubona wagiye unzigama gushitsa n’ubu?" 
2Samuel7:19 Kand’ ivyo kuri wewe vyari vyoroshe, Mwami Uhoraho; ariko non’ ugeretsek’ uvuga n’ivy’ inzu yanje jewe umusavyi wawe, vy’igihe kirekire kir’ imbere, unyereka n’uruvyaro ruzokwaruka hanyuma, Mwami Uhoraho." 
2Samuel7:20 Non’ ikindi jewe Dawidi nokubgira n’iki? kuk’ uzi umusavyi wawe, Mwami Uhoraho." 
2Samuel7:21 Ivyo vyose bikomeye wabikoze kubg’ ijambo ryawe, nk’uko wavyigombeye mu mutima wawe, kugira ng’ ubimmenyeshe, jewe umusavyi wawe." 
2Samuel7:22 Ni co gituma ur’ ūhambaye, Uhoraho Mana, kukw ata wuhwanye nawe, kand’ ata yindi Mana iriho twigeze kwumva atari wewe." 
2Samuel7:23 Har’ irindi hanga na rimwe mw isi rihwanye n’abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, abo wewe Mana wisidukiye ugacungura, ukabagira abawe, kugira ngo wironkere izina rya rurangiranwa, ugakora ibikomeye kubgabo, n’ ibiteye ubgoba kubg’ igihugu cawe, ukirukana amahanga n’ imana zayo imbere y’abantu bawe, abo wacunguye ukabakūra muri Egiputa?" 
2Samuel7:24 Ni wewe wahaye abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli gutsindaza, ngo baze bahore ar’ abawe ibihe vyose; kandi nawe, Uhoraho, wababereye Imana." 
2Samuel7:25 Nuko none, Uhoraho Mana, ijambo uvuze kuri jewe umusavyi wawe no ku nzu yanje urikomeze ibihe vyose, kand’ ushitse ivy’ uvuze." 
2Samuel7:26 Maz’ izina ryawe baze barishemagize ibihe bidashira, bat’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni yo Mana y’Abisirayeli; kandi n’inzu yanje, jewe umusavyi wawe Dawidi, izokwama itsindaje imbere yawe;" 
2Samuel7:27 kuk’ umpishuriye, jewe umusavyi wawe, k’uzonyubakira inzu, ewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Mana y’ Abisirayeli; ni co gitumye umusavyi wawe ntinyuka kugusenga ntya." 
2Samuel7:28 Kandi none, Mwami Uhoraho, ni wewe Mana, n’amajambo yawe n’ay’ ukuri, kand’ unsezeraniye iryo jambo ryiza, jewe umusavyi wawe." 
2Samuel7:29 None rero, emera guha umugisha inzu y’umusavyi wawe, kugira ngw ihore ihamye imbere yawe ibihe vyose, kukw ari wewe ubivuze, Mwami Uhoraho; kand’ umugisha utangwa nawe uz’ uhore ku nzu y’umusavyi wawe ibihe vyose." 
2Samuel8:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Dawidi anesha Abafilisitiya, abamara igabo, atsinda igisagara cabo gikuru, arakibanyaga." 
2Samuel8:2 Maz’ anesha Abanyamowabu, abarambika hasi mu mirongo, abageresha umugozi: agera imirongo ibiri, iba iyo kwicwa, uwa gatatu wose uba uwo guhangazwa. Nukw Abanyamowabu baca baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi, bakāma bamuzanira amarari." 
2Samuel8:3 Bukeye Dawidi anesha n’ umwami w’i Zoba, Hadadezeri mwene Rehobu, igihe Hadadezeri yaja gusubira kugandura igihugu yaganza co ku ruzi Efurate." 
2Samuel8:4 Dawidi amunyaga ingabo zigendera ku mafarasi igihumbi n’amajana ndwi, n’izigendesha amaguru ibihumbi mirongwibiri; maz’ amafarasi akwega imikogote ayacagagura ibitsi, arikw asigaza ayakwiranye n’imikogote ijana." 
2Samuel8:5 Maz’ Abasiriya b’i Damasiko baje gutabara Hadadezeri umwami w’i Zoba, Dawidi abicamw’ ingabo ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri." 
2Samuel8:6 Araheza akwiragiza amaboma mu gihugu c’i Siriya gikūkira i Damasiko; nukw Abasiriya baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi, bakāma bamuzanira amarari. Nuk’ Uhoraho yahora aha Dawidi intsinzi aho yaja hose." 
2Samuel8:7 Kandi Dawidi yari yaranyaze abantu ba Hadadezeri inkinzo z’izahabu bari bafise, azijana i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel8:8 Kand’ umwami Dawidi yari yarasahuye imiringa myinshi cane mu bisagara vya Hadadezeri, ic’ i Beta n’ic’ i Berotayi." 
2Samuel8:9 Bukeye Toyu umwami w’i Hamati yumvise ko Dawidi yanesheje ingabo zose za Hadadezeri," 
2Samuel8:10 atuma umuhungu wiwe Yoramu ku mwami Dawidi kumuramutsa no kumushima, ko yarwanye na Hadadezeri akamunesha; kuko Hadadezeri yahora arwanya Toyu. Kandi Yoramu yar’ azanye ibintu vy’amafeza n’ivy’ amazahabu n’ ivy’ imiringa." 
2Samuel8:11 Na vyo nyene umwami Dawidi abirobanurira Uhoraho, hamwe n’amafeza n’ amazahabu yari yaramurobanuriye, ayasahuye mu mahanga yari yaranesheje," 
2Samuel8:12 i Siriya n’i Mowabu no mu Bamoni no mu Bafilisitiya no mu Bamaleki, bo na ya masahu yari yarasahuye umwami w’i Zoba, Hadadezeri mwene Rehobu." 
2Samuel8:13 Nuko Dawidi yironkera izina rya rurangiranwa. Maz’ atabarutse avuye kunesha Abasiriya, atsinda Abanyedomu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu Kiyaya c’ Umunyu." 
2Samuel8:14 Nukw ashira amaboma mu gihugu c’Abanyedomu, ayakwiragiza muri Edomu hose. Abanyedomu bose baca baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi. Nuk’ Uhoraho yahora aha Dawidi intsinzi aho yaja hose." 
2Samuel8:15 Nuko Dawidi yaganza Abisirayeli bose, agacira abantu biwe bose imanza ziroranye." 
2Samuel8:16 Kandi Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo, Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba;" 
2Samuel8:17 Sadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari ni bo bār’ abaherezi; Seraya ni we yar’ umukarani; 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya mwene Yehoyada ni we yagabisha Abakereti n’Abapeleti; kandi bene Dawidi bār’ abakuru b’igihugu. 
2Samuel9:1 Bukeye Dawidi arabaza, ati Mbega har’ agasigarira mu nzu ya Sauli koba kakiriho, kugira ngo ndamugirire neza kubga Yonatani?" 
2Samuel9:2 Maze hār’ umunyarugo wa Sauli yitwa Ziba; nuko baramuhamagara ngo yitabe Dawidi. Umwami aramubaza, ati Ni wewe Ziba? Na we at’ Ego me, ni jewe Ziba umusavyi wawe." 
2Samuel9:3 Umwami aramubaza, ati Mbega mu nzu ya Sauli nta woba akiriho ngo ndamugirire neza kubg’ Imana? Ziba yishura umwami, ati Haracarih’ umwana wa Yonatani amugaye ibirenge." 
2Samuel9:4 Umwami aramubaza, at’ Aba hehe? Ziba yishura umwami, at’ Aba kwa Makiri mwene Amiyeli i Lo‐debari." 
2Samuel9:5 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aratuma, baramuzana bamukūye kwa Makiri mwene Amiyeli i Lo‐debari." 
2Samuel9:6 Nuko Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani umwuzukuru wa Sauli arenguka imbere ya Dawidi; akubita inkoro hasi, aramwunamira. Maze Dawidi aravuga, ati Mefibosheti! Aritaba, ati Sabge!" 
2Samuel9:7 Dawidi aramubarira, ati Mpore nta co utinya, kuko ntazobura kukugirira neza kubga so Yonatani, kandi nzogusubiza amatongo yose ya sogokuru Sauli, kand’ uzohora urīra ku meza yanje na ntaryo." 
2Samuel9:8 Arasubira aramwunamira, ati Mbega jewe umusavyi wawe, n’ inda n’indesho, nar’ iki k’undoreshako n’ijisho, kandi nd’ imbga ipfuye?" 
2Samuel9:9 Umwami araheza ahamagaza Ziba, yar’ umunyarugo wa Sauli, at’ Ivyar’ ivya Sauli vyose n’ivyar’ ivy’ abo mu nzu yiwe bose, mbigabiye mwene shobuja." 
2Samuel9:10 Nawe uz’ uhore umurimira, mwe n’ abahungu bawe n’abantu bawe, mumushikirize imyimbu, kugira ngo mwene shobuja az’ ahore abona ibimutunga. Ariko Mefibosheti mwene shobuja ubgiwe azohora arīra ku meza yanje na ntaryo. Kandi Ziba yar’ afise abahungu cumi na batanu n’abantu atunze mirongwibiri." 
2Samuel9:11 Maze Ziba yishura umwami, at’ Ivy’ umbariye vyose, jewe umusavyi wawe, ni ko nzobigenza, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma. Nuko Mefibosheti yama arīra ku meza y’ umwami nk’uwo mu bana b’ umwami." 
2Samuel9:12 Kandi Mefibosheti yar’ afise akana k’agahungu kitwa Mika. Nukw abo mu rugo rwa Ziba bose baba abantu ba Mefibosheti. 
2Samuel9:13 Nuko Mefibosheti aba i Yerusalemu, kuko yama arīra ku meza y’umwami; kandi yari yaramugaye ibirenge vyompi." 
2Samuel10:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo umwami w’Abamoni aratanga; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Hanuni asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
2Samuel10:2 Dawidi avyumvise aravuga, ati Nzogirira neza Hanuni mwene Nahashi, nk’uko se yangiriye neza. Nuko Dawidi arungika abantu bo kumugarukirako kuko yabuze se. Abo bantu ba Dawidi baragenda, bashika mu gihugu c’Abamoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Arikw abaganwa b’Abamoni babarira umwami wabo Hanuni, bati Mbeg’ ugira ngo Dawidi icamuteye kurungika abo kukugarukirako n’uko yari yubashe so? Ntuzi kw abo bantu yabarungitse gukenguza iki gisagara no kugitata, ngw abone kukigeseza?" 
2Samuel10:4 Nuko Hanuni afata abo bantu ba Dawidi, abamwa ubganwa bg’umusaya umwe, akeba impuzu zabo ahereye hagati ku kibuno, araheza arabarungika." 
2Samuel10:5 Dawidi abibariwe, atuma abo guhūra na bo, kukw abo bagabo bāri batēterewe cane. Umwami abatumako, uti Ni mugume i Yeriko kugeza musubiye kumera ubganwa, muheze muze mubone kugaruka." 
2Samuel10:6 Maz’ Abamoni babonye ko bateye Dawidi akayigo, batuma ku Basiriya b’i Beti‐rehobu n’ab’i Zoba, babaha impēra ngo babahe ingabo ibihumbi mirongwibiri, bahēra n’umwami w’i Mayaka, azana ingabo igihumbi, n’iz’ i Tobu ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
2Samuel10:7 Maze Dawidi avyumvise, arekura Yowabu n’ingabo zose z’abahizi." 
2Samuel10:8 Nukw Abamoni basokoroka mu gisagara, batonda urugamba mw ishikiro kw irembo; Abasiriya b’i Zoba n’ab’i Rehobu, n’ingabo z’i Tobu n’iz’ i Mayaka, na bo baja ukwabo mu gahinga." 
2Samuel10:9 Maze Yowabu abonye ko batonze urugamba, rumwe imbere urundi inyuma yiwe, atora bamwe bo mu ntōre zose z’Abisirayeli, abatondesha urugamba ruhangana n’Abasiriya." 
2Samuel10:10 Izindi ngabo zose aziha murumuna we Abishayi ngw azigabishe, na we azitondesha urugamba ruhangana n’Abamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Maze Yowabu aramubarira, at’ Abasiriya ni baramuka bagomba kunnanira, uraza untabare; kandi nawe Abamoni ni baramuka bagomba kukunanira, nanje ndaza kugutabara." 
2Samuel10:12 Nuko shira ubgoba, turwane kigabo, turwanire ubgoko bgacu n’ibisagara vy’Imana yacu; na we Uhoraho arakora ico ashima." 
2Samuel10:13 Nuko Yowabu n’ingabo ziri kumwe na we begereza Abasiriya ngo barumaneko; baca bariruka baramuhunga. 
2Samuel10:14 Maz’ Abamoni babonye Abasiriya bahunze, na bo bahunga Abishayi, bīsuka mu gisagara. Nuko Yowabu araheza areka Abamoni, asubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel10:15 Bukeye Abasiriya babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abisirayeli, barakorakorana." 
2Samuel10:16 Maze Hadadezeri atuma no ku Basiriya bo hakurya y’uruzi Efurate, baza i Helamu, Shobaki umugabisha w’ingabo za Hadadezeri abagiye imbere." 
2Samuel10:17 Maze Dawidi abibariwe, na we akorakoranya Abisirayeli bose, bajabuka Yorodani baja i Helamu. Maz’ Abasiriya batonda urugamba bahangana na Dawidi, barwana na we." 
2Samuel10:18 Maz’ Abasiriya bahunga Abisirayeli; Dawidi yica mu Basiriya abagendera mu mikogote amajana ndwi y’intambara, n’abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi mirongwine, kandi yica Shobaki umugabisha w’ingabo zabo, agwaho." 
2Samuel10:19 Maz’ abami bose baganzwa na Hadadezeri, babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abisirayeli, barabīsaba, bemera kuganzwa na bo. Nukw Abasiriya batinya gusubira gutabara Abamoni ukundi." 
2Samuel11:1 Nuk’ umwaka utashe, ku gacikamvura, mu gihe abami bākunda kuja mu ntambara, Dawidi agomora Yowabu n’abantu biwe n’Abisirayeli bose, bageseza Abamoni, baziguza n’i Raba. Ariko Dawidi ubgiwe yisigarira i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel11:2 Maz’ umusi ur’ izina ku mugoroba, Dawidi amaze kwibambura ku kirwa, agendagenda hejuru ku ngoro yiwe; maz’ akiri hano hejuru, aja abona umugore arikw ariyuhagira, kandi yari mwiza ateye igomwe." 
2Samuel11:3 Nuko Dawidi atuma kubaza uwo mugore uw’ ari we. Baramubarira, bati Si Batisheba mwene Eliyamu, muka Uriya Umuheti?" 
2Samuel11:4 Nuko Dawidi atuma intumwa zo kumuzana, aca arenguka i we, bararyamana, kuko yari yihumanuye avuye mu miziro; hanyuma asubira i muhira." 
2Samuel11:5 Nya mugore asamye inda, atuma kuri Dawidi, ut’ Afise inda." 
2Samuel11:6 Maze Dawidi atuma kuri Yowabu, uti Murungikire wa Muheti Uriya. Nuko Yowabu aca arungika Uriya kwa Dawidi." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya amushikiriye, Dawidi amubaza inkuru za Yowabu n’iz’ ingabo, n’uko bigenda mu ntambara." 
2Samuel11:8 Maze Dawidi aramubarira, ati Manuka uje i wawe, woge ibirenge. Nuko Uriya asohoka mu ngoro y’umwami, bamukurikiza ingaburo agaburiwe n’umwami." 
2Samuel11:9 Ariko Uriya yīrārira hamwe n’abanyarugo ba shebuja bose, mw irebe ry’ingoro y’umwami, ntiyamanuka ngw aje i we." 
2Samuel11:10 Maze babariye Dawidi, bat’ Erega Uriya ntiyatashe i muhira; Dawidi aca abaza Uriya, ati Mbega ntiwar’ uvuye ku rugendo? None k’utāgiye kurāra i wawe?" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya yishura Dawidi, at’ Isandugu y’Imana n’Abisirayeli n’Abayuda ko barāra mu nsago, kandi databuja Yowabu n’ abantu bawe, mugenzi, bakaba bashagaje mu gahinga; none jewe ngende i wanje, nīrīre, nīnywere, ndārane n’umugore wanje? Ndakurahiye, eka ni wewe ndahiro nyene, sinorikora!" 
2Samuel11:12 Maze Dawidi aramubarira, ati Sībira hano n’uyu musi, ejo nzokurekura ugende. Nuko Uriya asībira i Yerusalemu uwo musi na bukeye." 
2Samuel11:13 Maze Dawidi aramurengukisha ngw aze kurya no kunywa ar’ imbere yiwe, aramuboreza; hageze mw ijoro, Uriya aja kuryama ku gisegure ciwe hamwe na ba banyarugo ba shebuja, ariko ntiyamanuka ngw aje i we." 
2Samuel11:14 Bukeye mu gitondo Dawidi yandikira Yowabu icete, akirungikana Uriya nyene." 
2Samuel11:15 Yandika mur’ ico cete, ati Muherereze Uriya imbere ah’ urugamba rukaze, muheze mwīgire inyuma mumute, kugira ngo bamutere apfe." 
2Samuel11:16 Nuko rero Yowabu, igihe asubiye gutera ico gisagara, aherereza Uriya ahantu azi ko har’ abahizi." 
2Samuel11:17 Maz’ abantu bo muri nya gisagara barasokoroka, barwanya Yowabu; abantu bamwe bo mu ngabo za Dawidi barapfa, hapfamwo na Uriya wa Muheti." 
2Samuel11:18 Maze Yowabu atuma kumenyesha Dawidi ivy’ intambara uko bimeze; 
2Samuel11:19 abarira intumwa, ati Ni wamara kudondera umwami inkuru zose z’uko bimeze mu ntambara," 
2Samuel11:20 umwami ni yaramuka aratse, akakubaza, ati N’iki cabateye kurwana mwegereje igisagara murtyo? ati Mbega ntimwari muzi ko batoretse kubarasa bahagaze ku ruzitiro?" 
2Samuel11:21 Akanakubaza, ati None ni nde yishe Abimeleki mwene Yerubayali? ati S’umugore yamuteye ingasire, yihagarariye ku ruzitiro, akagwa aho nyene i Tebesi? ati N’iki cabateye kwegereza uruzitiro murtyo? Uz’ uheze umubarire, ut’ Erega na wa muntu wawe w’Umuheti Uriya, na we yarapfuye." 
2Samuel11:22 Nukw iyo ntumwa iragenda; ishitse, idondera Dawidi ivyo Yowabu yamutumye vyose." 
2Samuel11:23 Iramubarira, it’ Abantu baho bāradutwariranije, badushikana no mu gahinga, ariko turaruha tubīgiza inyuma kurinda tubashikanye kw irembo ryabo." 
2Samuel11:24 Kand’ abanyamiheto bari bahagaze ku ruzitiro baturasa, twebge abantu bawe; hapfa bamwe bo mu bantu bawe, mwami, kandi hapfuye na wa muntu wawe w’Umuheti, Uriya." 
2Samuel11:25 Maze Dawidi yishura iyo ntumwa, at’ Uz’ ubarire Yowabu, ut’ Ivyo ntibikubabaze, uti Kukw inkota mu kwica ipfa uwo ihubiyeko; uti None rero shimika, uvyure akanyarigabo mu kurwanya ico gisagara, ukineshe. Ukw abe ari k’umurindisha." 
2Samuel11:26 Maze muka Uriya yumvise k’ umugabo wiwe yapfuye, aramuririra." 
2Samuel11:27 Hanyuma agandutse, Dawidi atuma kumuzana i we, aramucūra; bavyarana umwana w’umuhungu; arikw ivyo Dawidi yakoze vyababaje Uhoraho." 
2Samuel12:1 Bukeye Uhoraho atuma Natani kuri Dawidi; araza, aramubarira, ati Hār’ abantu babiri bāba mu gisagara kimwe, umwe w’umutunzi, uwundi w’umworo." 
2Samuel12:2 Kand’ uwo mutunzi yar’ afise amasinzi y’intama n’inka. 
2Samuel12:3 Ariko nya mworo nta co yar’ afise, atar’ akāgazi k’intama kamwe yari yaraguze, akakarera, kagakura kari kumwe na we n’abana biwe, kakarya ku two kurya twiwe, kakanywera mu gikombe ciwe, kakāma karyama mu gikiriza ciwe, kakamumerera nk’umukobga yivyariye." 
2Samuel12:4 Bukeye haza umushitsi kwa nya mutunzi, na we yanka gukora mu ntama ziwe canke mu nka, ngw azimane uwo mushitsi amugendeye, arikw ahitana wa mwana w’intama wa nya mworo, ayibāgira umushitsi wiwe." 
2Samuel12:5 Maz’ uburake bga Dawidi buca buziriringira uwo muntu; abarira Natani, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, uwakoze ivyo yar’ akwiye gupfa;" 
2Samuel12:6 non’ az’ amurihe uwo mwana w’intama kane, kuko yakoze ikintu nk’ico, akaba imburakigongwe." 
2Samuel12:7 Maze Natani abarira Dawidi, at’ Ereg’ uwo muntu ni wewe nyene. Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli avuze, ati Ni jewe nakwimikishije amavuta ng’ube umwami w’Abisirayeli, ndagukiza, ngukūra mu maboko ya Sauli;" 
2Samuel12:8 nkwinjiza ingoro ya shobuja, nguha n’abagore biwe ngo bagusegure; kandi nkugabira umuryango wa Isirayeli n’ uwa Yuda; kand’ iyo biba vyarabaye bike, mba narakwongeye n’ibindi." 
2Samuel12:9 N’iki catumye ukēngēra ijambo ryanje jewe Uhoraho, ugakora ivyo mbona kw ari bibi, ukicisha inkota Uriya Umuheti, ugacūra umugore wiwe ukamugira rwawe, na we Uriya ukamwicisha inkota y’Abamoni?" 
2Samuel12:10 None rero, inkota nta ho izova mu rugo rwawe, kuko wankēngereye, ugacūra muka Uriya Umuheti, ukamugira umugore wawe." 
2Samuel12:11 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nzokuvyurira ivyago vyanduruka mu rugo rwawe; nzokunyaga abagore bawe ubona, mbahe umubanyi wawe, aryamane na bo ku murango." 
2Samuel12:12 Wewe wabikoreye mu mpisho, ariko jeho nzobikora icese imbere y’Abisirayeli, ku murango nyene." 
2Samuel12:13 Maze Dawidi yishura Natani, ati Nacumuye k’Uhoraho. Natani aramwishura, ati Noneho Uhoraho yagukūyekw icaha cawe, ntugipfuye." 
2Samuel12:14 Ariko kuko wahaye abansi b’Uhoraho urwitwazo rukomeye rwo kumurogotako kubg’ ico wakoze, wa mwana wavyara ntakabuza azopfa." 
2Samuel12:15 Natani araheza yitahira i we. Hanyuma Uhoraho atēza indwara wa mwana muka Uriya yavyarana na Dawidi, agera kure." 
2Samuel12:16 Ni co catumye Dawidi yinginga Imana kubg’ uwo mwana, akisonzesha, akinjira mu nzu agakesha ijoro arambaraye hasi." 
2Samuel12:17 Abantu bakuru bo mu rugo rwiwe babibonye bamuhagarara i ruhande, ngo bamuvyure ave hasi, aranka, yanka no kuja aho bari ngw afūngure." 
2Samuel12:18 Maze ku musi ugira indwi uwo mwana arapfa; abantu ba Dawidi batinya kumubgira k’umwana acīkānye; bati Mbega ko twamuhanūye umwana akiriho, akanka kutwumvira, none biracura iki, ni twamubgira k’umwana acīkānye? Ubgo ntaca yiyahura?" 
2Samuel12:19 Maze Dawidi abonye kw abantu biwe bongorerana, amenyera aho k’ umwana apfuye; abaza abo bantu biwe, ati Mbeg’ umwana aracīkānye? Bat’ Aracīkānye." 
2Samuel12:20 Maze Dawidi aca arahaguruka, ava aho yar’ arambaraye hasi, ariyuhagira arirtyorora, yambara iyindi myambaro, araheza aja mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho, arasenga; hanyuma ataha i we; maze yatse ivyo kurya barabimuzanira, arafūngura." 
2Samuel12:21 Maz’ abantu biwe baramubaza, bati Mbeg’ ukoze ibiki? Umwana akiriho ko wisonzesheje ukamuririra, ariko non’ amaze guhwera, uca urahaguruka, urafūngura!" 
2Samuel12:22 Arabishura, ati Nka ko, umwana akiriho narisonzesheje ndarira, nti Sinzi, kumbure Uhoraho yongirira imbabazi, umwana agakira." 
2Samuel12:23 None se kw amaze gupfa, noba ncisonzeshereza iki? Mbega noshobora kumugarura? Nzoja iy’ ari, ariko we ntakigaruka aho ndi." 
2Samuel12:24 Maze Dawidi yirura umugore wiwe Batisheba, yinjira iy’ ari, aramurārira; hanyuma avyara umwana w’umuhungu, amwita Salomo. Uhoraho aramukunda," 
2Samuel12:25 atuma ūvugishwa na we Natani kumwita Yedidiya; agenza artyo nk’uk’ Uhoraho yamubariye. 
2Samuel12:26 Kandi Yowabu yar’ akirwanya i Raba h’Abamoni; atsinda iboma ryazigama ivomo ryaho. 
2Samuel12:27 Araheza atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi, uti Yarwanije i Raba, kandi yafashe igisagara kirimw’ ivomo ryaho;" 
2Samuel12:28 uti None rero koranya izindi ngabo zisigaye, uze gusagaza imbere y’igisagara, abe ari wewe ugitsinda, uti Yoye kuba ari we agitsinda, bakazohava bakimwitirira." 
2Samuel12:29 Nuko Dawidi akoranya ingabo zose, arahaguruka aja i Raba, araharwanya, arahatsinda." 
2Samuel12:30 Akūra Milikomu igitsibo mu mutwe, kuriba kwaco kwar’ italanto y’izahabu, kandi cari gihunzwek’ utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini; nuko bacambika Dawidi mu mutwe. Maze mur’ ico gisagara akūramw’ amasahu menshi cane." 
2Samuel12:31 Asokorora abantu bāri muri co, abashikiriza imisumeno n’ivyuma vy’ibisaganga n’amacabiti; abakoresha no ku matanure y’amatafari, arabacumukuza. Uko ni ko yagirira ibisagara vyose vy’Abamoni. Nuko Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe zose basubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel13:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo ivyābaye n’ibi: Abusalomu mwene Dawidi yar’ afise mushiki we mwiza w’umunyakaranga, yitwa Tamari. Bukeye Amunoni mwene Dawidi nyene aramugomwa." 
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni atuntuzwa no kwifuza mushiki we Tamari, biranamurwaza; kuko yar’ inkumi igumije ibanga, Amunoni akamubura uburyo." 
2Samuel13:3 Ariko Amunoni yar’ afise umugenzi bakundana yitwa Yonadabu mwene Shimeya, Shimeya mukuru wa Dawidi; kandi Yonadabu uwo yar’ umuntu w’incabgenge." 
2Samuel13:4 Aramubaza, ati Mbega mwana w’umwami, k’ugenda ushira umunywera imisi yose, ntiwombgira icabiguteye? Amunoni aramwishura, ati Nagomwe Tamari mushiki wa Abusalomu mwene data." 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabu aramubgira, ati Genda wiryamire ku buriri bgawe, wirwaze; maze so ni yaza kurāba uko umeze, umubarire, uti Ndasavye mundungikire mushikanje Tamari, aze ampēreze utwo ntamira; uti Kand’ abironderere imbere yanje aho mbona, uti Maz’ ubgiwe abimpēreje, ni ho nobirya." 
2Samuel13:6 Nuko Amunoni araryama, arirwaza; maz’ umwami aje kurāba ukw ameze, Amunoni aramubgira, ati Ndasavye mundungikire mushikanje Tamari, andonderere udukāte tubiri aho mbona, maz’ abe ari we atumpēreza; ni ho norya." 
2Samuel13:7 Maze Dawidi atuma i muhira kuri Tamari, uti Genda kwa musazāwe Amunoni, umuronderere utwo kurya." 
2Samuel13:8 Nuko Tamari aja kwa Amunoni musaza we, asanga aryamye; yābīra igikandu, akibumbabumbamw’ udukāte Amunoni abona, aradukaranga." 
2Samuel13:9 Yābīra ico yakaranzeko, aratumusukira, ariko yanka kurya. Maze Amunoni aravuga, ati Bose ni bataramuke. Nuko barataramuka bose." 
2Samuel13:10 Maze Amunoni abarira Tamari, ati Nzanira mu mpete utwo warondeye, unyīhēre mbone kurya. Nuko Tamari yābīra utwo dukāte yarondeye, adushīra musaza we Amunoni haruguru mu mpete." 
2Samuel13:11 Atumuhēreje ngw arye, Amunoni aramucakira, aramubgira, at’ Enda mushikanje, n’uze turyamane." 
2Samuel13:12 Na we aramwishura, at’ Oyaye, mwana wa data, reka kunyambika ibara, kuko ben’ ivyo bidakwiye gukorwa mu Bisirayeli; reka gukora ikizira nk’ico." 
2Samuel13:13 Mbega nanje noheza ngakwirwa hehe n’ibitētērwa? Kandi nawe woba ugotse mu Bisirayeli. Enda se n’ubivugane n’umwami, kukw atokunyima." 
2Samuel13:14 Ariko yanka kwumva ivyo amubgiye; maze kuko yamurusha inkomezi amufata ku kagōbēro, aryamana na we." 
2Samuel13:15 Maze Amunoni aca amwanka urunuka; urwanko yamwanse rwaruse urukundo yamukunda. Aramubgira, ati Hoji va hasi ugende." 
2Samuel13:16 Na we aramwishura, at’ Oyaye si ko, kuko kunyirukana ari bibi kuruta ivyo umaze kungirira. Ariko yanka kwemera." 
2Samuel13:17 Maz’ ahamagara umuntu wiwe amusukurira, ati Sohora uyu mukobga amve i ruhande, umwugaranire hanze." 
2Samuel13:18 Kandi yari yambaye umwambaro muremure w’amaboko, kukw abakobga b’umwami bakir’ abigeme ari ko bambara. Nuk’ uwo musuku wiwe aramusohora, aramwugarana." 
2Samuel13:19 Maze Tamari yiyorera umunyota mu mutwe, yitantamurirako wa mwambaro wiwe w’amaboko, yiremēka ukuboko, agenda ararira ingenda, aboroga." 
2Samuel13:20 Maze Abusalomu musaza we amubonye, aramubaza, at’ Aho ntiwamanye na musazāwe Amunoni? Enda ni wiyihorerere, mwana wa mama; erega kw ari musazāwe, reka kubishirak’ umutima. Nuko Tamari aguma kwa musaza we Abusalomu yifumbereje." 
2Samuel13:21 Maz’ umwami Dawidi yumvise ivyo vyose, araraka cane." 
2Samuel13:22 Kandi Abusalomu ntiyaba akigira ico avugana na Amunoni, ari kibi ari ciza, kuko Abusalomu yar’ agiriye Amunoni urwanko, kuko yononye mushiki we Tamari." 
2Samuel13:23 Hashize imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye, Abusalomu arārika abamukemurira intama i Bayali‐hasori, hāri hahereranye n’i Bgefurayimu; maz’ atumira abana b’umwami bose." 
2Samuel13:24 Aragenda abarira umwami, ati Jewe umusavyi wawe ndafise abankemurira intama; none ndakwinginze mugenzi, mwe n’abantu bawe muze tujane." 
2Samuel13:25 Umwami yishura Abusalomu, at’ Oyaye mwananje, ntitwojana twese, ngo tuje kukurusha. Abusalomu aramugōbēra, ariko yanka kugenda, mugabo aramuhezagira." 
2Samuel13:26 Maze Abusalomu aramubarira, ati None rero k’utaje, urungike mukurwanje Amunoni, aze tujane. Umwami aramubaza, at’ Ugombera iki ko mujana?" 
2Samuel13:27 Ariko Abusalomu aramuzigitīra, umwami araruha aremera ko Amunoni n’ abandi bana biwe bose bajana na we." 
2Samuel13:28 Nuko Abusalomu arahava abarira abasuku biwe, ati Muje muritegereza Amunoni: ni mwabona amaze guhimba vino, nkababarira, nti Ni muzibagure Amunoni; nuko muce mumwica, ntimutinye: none si jewe nzoba ndabibabariye? Nuko mugumye imitima, mube abahizi." 
2Samuel13:29 Nukw abo basuku ba Abusalomu bagira Amunoni nk’uko Abusalomu yababariye. Maz’ abana b’umwami bose baca barabatagurika, umuntu wese asimbira ku nyumbu yiwe, barahunga." 
2Samuel13:30 Bakiri mu nzira, imbitsi ibikira Dawidi ko Abusalomu yishe abana b’umwami bose, ngo Ntihasigaye n’umwe." 
2Samuel13:31 Maz’ umwami arabaduka, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, arambarara mw ivu; n’ abantu biwe bose bamuhagaze i ruhande na bo bitantamurirakw impuzu zabo." 
2Samuel13:32 Maze Yonadabu mwene Shimeya, Shimeya mukuru wa Dawidi, aramubarira, ati Mugenzi, erega ntugire ngo bishe abana bawe bose; Amunoni wenyene ni we yapfuye; kukw ivyo Abusalomu yabigabiye guhēra umusi Amunoni yonona mushiki we Tamari." 
2Samuel13:33 Nuko none mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, izo nkuru ureke kuzemera ngo wiyumvire kw abana bawe bose bapfuye, kuko hapfuye Amunoni wenyene." 
2Samuel13:34 Kandi Abusalomu yari yahunze. Maz’ umuhungu yar’ ashibamye, yunamuye amaso, abona haje abantu benshi, baturutse mu nzira iva i Horonayimu ikikamanye umusozi." 
2Samuel13:35 Maze Yonadabu abarira umwami, at’ Eh’ abana bawe baraje; nk’uko jewe umusavyi wawe nabivuze, ni ko bibaye." 
2Samuel13:36 Akirangiza kuvuga, abana b’ umwami barashika, maze baraturikisha bararira; n’umwami na we nyene n’abantu biwe bose bararira baraboroga." 
2Samuel13:37 Ariko Abusalomu we yari yahunze, aja ku mwami w’i Geshuri, Talumayi mwene Amihuri. Kandi Dawidi yamana akabonge k’umwana wiwe imisi yose." 
2Samuel13:38 Abusalomu amara imyaka itatu i Geshuri iyo yahungiye. 
2Samuel13:39 Hanyuma umwami Dawidi amugirira inkumbu nyinshi, kuko yar’ amaze gushira umubabaro w’urupfu rwa Amunoni." 
2Samuel14:1 Bukeye Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya amenya k’ umwami afitiye inkumbu Abusalomu. 
2Samuel14:2 Nuko Yowabu atuma i Tekowa guhamagaza umugore w’ umunyabgenge; aramubarira, ati Ntabara wīgire nk’ūgandaye, wambare nk’ūri ku kigandaro, ntiwīsīge amavuta, arik’ use n’umugore amaze imisi myinshi agandariye uwapfuye." 
2Samuel14:3 Uheze uje i bgami, ubarire umwami urtya n’urtya. Nuko Yowabu amutegekera ivyo aja kuvuga." 
2Samuel14:4 Uwo mugore w’i Tekowa ashikiriye umwami, akubita inkoro hasi, aramwunamira, aramubarira, ati Ntabara, mugenzi." 
2Samuel14:5 Umwami aramubaza, at’ Ubaye iki? Aramwishura, ati Yō! Erega nd’ umupfakazi, umugabo wanje yarapfuye." 
2Samuel14:6 Kandi jewe incoreke yawe nari mfise abana b’ abahungu babiri; bukeye basindira ku gahinga, batagira ūbabanguranya; nuk’ umwe akubita uwundi, agwa bukumbi." 
2Samuel14:7 Non’ abaryango bose bankūriye hasi, jewe incoreke yawe, ngo ni ntange uwishe mugenzi we, kugira ngo bamuhōre uwo yishe; bakagomba kwica n’uwotoye umwandu; uko ni ko bagira bazimye agakara nari nsigaranye, ngo ntibasigarize umugabo wanje izina cank’ imbuto kw isi." 
2Samuel14:8 Umwami abgira uwo mugore, ati Genda, ni witahire; ivyawe ndabitunganya." 
2Samuel14:9 Uwo mugore w’i Tekowa yishura umwami, at’ Abe ari jewe bizosubira ku mutwe, n’inzu ya data, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ntibize bikujeko cank’ ingoma yawe, mugenzi." 
2Samuel14:10 Umwami aramwishura, ati Ni hagira ūkuvuga, umunzanire, ntazoba agisubira kugukakaza." 
2Samuel14:11 Aramwishura, ati Ndakwinginze mugenzi, undahire Uhoraho Imana yawe, kugira ng’ ūhōra uwishwe ntaz’ aze kwica, bakamarīra n’agahungu nari nsigaranye. Umwami aramwishura, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, yukw ata n’agashatsi na kamwe ko ku mutwe w’umwana wawe kazohara ngo gakorokere hasi." 
2Samuel14:12 Maz’ uno mugore aramubarira, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, zirikana ico nkubarira, jewe incoreke yawe. Na we ati Nuko mbarira." 
2Samuel14:13 Uwo mugore aramubgira, ati None n’iki caguteye kugira imigabo yo kugirira abantu b’Imana nka ben’ ivyo nyene? Ko vyakwiviriye mu kanwa ga mugenzi, usa n’ūtsinzwe, kuk’ utāgarukanye ca gicibga cawe." 
2Samuel14:14 Erega twese tuzopfa, tumeze nk’amazi asēseka ntayorwe. Mbere n’Imana ntiyiciraho, arikw irondera uburyo kugira ng’ uwaciwe ntaz’ arinde apfa akir’ igicibga." 
2Samuel14:15 None rero mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, igitumye nza kukubgira iryo jambo n’ukw abantu banteye ubgoba; incoreke yawe nkavuga nti Hinge nje kwivuganira n’umwami; nti Kumbure umwami yokwemera gukora ico incoreke yiwe imusavye;" 
2Samuel14:16 nt’ Umwami aranyumvira, ankize jewe incoreke yiwe, ankūre mu maboko ya wa muntu agomba kundandurana n’umwana wanje, adukūre mw ishamvu y’Imana." 
2Samuel14:17 Kandi jewe incoreke yawe ngatako nkiyumvira, nt’ Ijambo ry’umwami wanje nyen’ ingoma rizondemesha; nti Kuk’ umwami ameze nk’umumarayika w’Imana ku vyo gutandukanya ibibi n’ ivyiza. Nuk’ Uhoraho Imana yawe az’ ahorane nawe." 
2Samuel14:18 Maz’ umwami yishura uwo mugore, ati Ntabara umbarire ico ngira nkubaze cose, ntumpishe. Uwo mugore aramwishura, ati Mbaza mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
2Samuel14:19 Umwami aramubaza, at’ Ubg’ ivyo vyose ntiwabibgirijwe na Yowabu? Uwo mugore aramwishura, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, indahiro ni wewe nyene hakagira uwoshobora gucisha i ruhande ico umubajije cose; ni koko umusavyi wawe Yowabu ni we yangeze, jewe incoreke yawe, antegekera ayo majambo yose;" 
2Samuel14:20 icamuteye kugenza artyo kwar’ ukugira ngw ivyabaye abihindure ukundi. Kandi ga mugenzi, ufise ubgenge nk’ubg’ umumarayika w’ Imana, umenya ibiri mw isi vyose." 
2Samuel14:21 Maz’ umwami abarira Yowabu, ati Nuko ndavyemeye; uragenda ugarukane uyo muhungu Abusalomu." 
2Samuel14:22 Maze Yowabu akubita inkoro hasi, yunamira umwami, aramuhezagira; aravuga, ati Jewe umusavyi wawe uyu musi mmenye ko ngutonnyeko, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, kuk’ ukoze ico nagusavye." 
2Samuel14:23 Nuko Yowabu arahaguruka, aja i Geshuri, agarukana Abusalomu i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel14:24 Maz’ umwami aravuga, ati N’asubire mu rugo rwiwe; ariko ntazonkubita ijisho. Nuko Abusalomu asubira mu rugo rwiwe, ariko nta ho yabonana n’umwami." 
2Samuel14:25 Kandi mu banyakaranga bo mu Bisirayeli bose nta wavugangwa nka Abusalomu; uhereye mu bgōro bg’ikirenge ugashitsa mu gitwariro nta gasembga yagira. 
2Samuel14:26 Uk’ umwaka utashe yimosha umushatsi kuko wamuremēra, ni co catuma awimosha. Kand’ iy’ awimosheje yarawugera, ukariba shekeli amajana abiri, yagezwe kuri shekeli y’umwami." 
2Samuel14:27 Kandi Abusalomu yari yaravyaye abahungu batatu n’umukobga yitwa Tamari; yar’ umukobga mwiza w’umunyakaranga. 
2Samuel14:28 Nuko Abusalomu amara imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye i Yerusalemu, atararengukishwa i bgami." 
2Samuel14:29 Bukeye Abusalomu atuma guhamagaza Yowabu, kugira ngw az’ amutume ku mwami; yanka kumwitaba. Yongera kumutumak’ ubugira kabiri, na ho nyene yanka kumwitaba." 
2Samuel14:30 Ni kwo kubarira abantu biwe, ati Wa murima wa Yowabu wa sayiri, ubangikanye n’uwanje, mugende muwuturire. Nukw abantu ba Abusalomu baragenda barawuturira." 
2Samuel14:31 Maze Yowabu aca arahaguruka aja kwa Abusalomu, aramubaza, ati N’iki catumye abantu bawe banturirira umurima?" 
2Samuel14:32 Abusalomu yishura Yowabu, ati N’uko nagutumyeko ng’uze hano ngutume ku mwami, ukanka; kwar’ ukugira ng’umumbarize icanzanye nkava i Geshuri; ut’ Iciza kwar’ uko yopfumye agumayo: none rero ndagomba kurenguka imbere y’umwami; kandi namba har’ ibigabitanyo mfise, apfume anyica." 
2Samuel14:33 Nuko Yowabu aja i bgami, arabimubarira; maz’ umwami ahamagaza Abusalomu, ararenguka, akubita inkoro hasi imbere y’ umwami; umwami aramugumbira." 
2Samuel15:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, Abusalomu yironderera umukogote n’amafarasi, n’abantu mirongwitanu bo kumwiruka imbere." 
2Samuel15:2 Kandi yama akoroka hakiri kare, akagenda agahagarara kw ishikiro ry’ikirimba; maz’ umuntu wese afise urubanza agomba gucirwa n’umwami, Abusalomu akamuhamagara, akamubaza, at’ Uva mu kihe gisagara? Na we at’ Umusavyi wawe nd’ uwo mu muryango munaka wo mu Bisirayeli." 
2Samuel15:3 Abusalomu akamubarira, at’ Ereg’ urubanza rwawe rwari rwiza kandi rwari ruboneye; ariko nta muntu umwami yashizeho wo kwumviriza ivyawe." 
2Samuel15:4 Kandi Abusalomu agatakw akavuga, ati Yemwe, iyaba naragizwe umucamanza w’iki gihugu, umuntu wese yogize imbūrano cank’ aje kwitwara, akanshikīra, nomuciriye urubanza rwiza!" 
2Samuel15:5 Kand’ iyo hagize ūmwunamira ngw amuramutse, yarāmvura ukuboko akamufata akamugumbira." 
2Samuel15:6 Uko ni ko Abusalomu yagenza Abisirayeli bose baza kwitwara ku mwami; nukw atwara imitima y’ Abisirayeli. 
2Samuel15:7 Hashize imyaka ine, Abusalomu abarira umwami, ati Ndasavye unyemerere nje i Heburoni, gushitsa isezerano nasezeraniye Uhoraho." 
2Samuel15:8 Kuko nasezeranye isezerano, jewe umusavyi wawe, igihe naba i Geshuri muri Siriya, nt’ Uhoraho ni yaramuka anshubije i Yerusalemu, nzomusaba." 
2Samuel15:9 Umwami aramwishura, ati Nuko genda amahoro. Nukw arahaguruka aja i Heburoni." 
2Samuel15:10 Bukeye Abusalomu atuma abantu ngo bagende mu mpisho, bakwiragire mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ngo bavuge, bati Ni mwumva ijwi ry’inzamba, muce muvuga, muti Abusalomu agiye ku ngoma i Heburoni." 
2Samuel15:11 Kand’ igihe Abusalomu yava i Yerusalemu, yajanye n’abantu amajana abiri yahamagaye, bagenda ata kindi biyumvira, ata co bazi." 
2Samuel15:12 Maz’ igihe Abusalomu yarikw aratanga ibimazi, atuma guhamagaza Ahitofeli w’i Gilo, umujanama wa Dawidi; ava mu gisagara c’i wabo i Gilo. Nukw inama y’ubugarariji irakomera, kukw abantu bāgenda bagwirirana kuri Abusalomu." 
2Samuel15:13 Bukeye haza intumwa kuri Dawidi, iravuga, it’ Imitima y’Abisirayeli yaroye kuri Abusalomu." 
2Samuel15:14 Maze Dawidi abarira abantu biwe bose bari kumwe na we i Yerusalemu, ati Ni muve hasi duhunge; kuko tudahunze ata n’umwe muri twebge yomukira; ni mwihute tugende, ntace aduhamvya akadukorera ibara, umurwa akawuririkisha inkota." 
2Samuel15:15 Maz’ abantu b’umwami baramwishura, bati Mwami wacu nyen’ ingoma, abasavyi bawe twiteguye gukora ic’ ugomba cose." 
2Samuel15:16 Nuk’ umwami avanayo n’abo mu rugo rwiwe bose bamukondoreye inyuma; arikw asigay’ icumi bo mu ncoreke ziwe yagize abagore, ngo bazigame urugo." 
2Samuel15:17 Uko ni k’umwami yavuyeyo, abantu bose bamukondoreye inyuma; bashitse ku nzu y’imperēra batebaganiraho." 
2Samuel15:18 Nukw abantu biwe bose bamuca imbere; kand’ Abakereti n’Abapeleti bose, n’Abanyegati bose ukw ar’ amajana atandatu bāri bavuye i Gati bamukurikiye, na bo baca imbere yiwe." 
2Samuel15:19 Maz’ umwami abaza Itayi Umunyegati, ati Mbega wewe n’ iki gitumye ugomba kujana natwe? Subirayo, wisabire uwo mwami, kuk’ ur’ umunyamahanga, wavuye i wanyu wāngājwe." 
2Samuel15:20 Mbega ko waje ejo bundi, non’ uyu musi noshobora nte kukwemerera kuyererana natwe hirya no hino, ko ngiye kuja ahampaye uburyo hose? Subira inyuma, ujane na bagenzi bawe, Uhoraho akugirire imbabazi, akubere umwizigirwa." 
2Samuel15:21 Itayi yishura umwami, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ni wewe ndahiro yanje, ah’ uzoba, mugenzi, ni ho nzoba, jewe umusavyi wawe, ar’ ugupfa ar’ ugukira." 
2Samuel15:22 Dawidi yishura Itayi, ati Nuko genda, ujabuke. Nuko Itayi Umunyegati arajabuka, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose n’abana bose bari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel15:23 Igihugu cose kirarira kiraboroga abantu bose bakiriko barajabuka; umwami na we aca arajabuka uwo mugezi Kidironi. Nukw abantu bose ni kwo kujabuka; bagenda batumbereye inzira ija mu bugaragwa. 
2Samuel15:24 Kandi hari haje Abiyatari, na Sadoki na we ni ho yar’ ari, n’Abalewi bose bareruye isandugu y’isezerano ry’Imana; batereka hasi iyo sandugu y’Imana, kugeza ah’ abantu bose barangirije kuva ku murwa." 
2Samuel15:25 Maz’ umwami abarira Sadoki, ati Subiza isandugu y’Imana ku murwa; Uhoraho ni yangirira ubuntu azongarukanayo, anyereke iyo sandugu yiwe n’ah’ aba." 
2Samuel15:26 Na ho ni yambarira ngo sindamuhimbaye; ehe ndi hano: n’angire ukw agomba. 
2Samuel15:27 Umwami arongera abarira Sadoki umuherezi, at’ Urumva, ni musubire ku murwa amahoro, mwe n’abahungu banyu bompi, Ahimasi umuhungu wawe na Yonatani mwene Abiyatari." 
2Samuel15:28 Ehe nzororērera ku majabukiro afata mu bugaragwa, gushitsa aho muzommenyeshereza inkuru z’uko bimeze." 
2Samuel15:29 Nuko Sadoki na Abiyatari barerura iyo sandugu y’Imana, bayisubiza i Yerusalemu, bagumayo." 
2Samuel15:30 Maze Dawidi atangura kudūga umusozi Elayono, adūga ararira ingenda, yitwikiriye mu mutwe, atambaye inkweto; kand’ abantu bose bari kumwe na we bitwikira mu mitwe, badūga bararira ingenda." 
2Samuel15:31 Maz’ umuntu abarira Dawidi, ati Ahitofeli ari mu bagarariji bafatanije na Abusalomu. Maze Dawidi arasenga, at’ Uhoraho, ndakwinginze, hindura ubusa inama za Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:32 Maze Dawidi ashitse ku mpinga y’uwo musozi, aho bama basengera Imana, Hushayi Umwaruki aza guhūra na we, yitantamuriyekw impuzu yiwe, yisutse ivu ku mutwe." 
2Samuel15:33 Dawidi aramubarira, ati Ni twajana uzongora;" 
2Samuel15:34 ariko ni wasubira ku murwa, ukabgira Abusalomu, uti Mugenzi, mbaye umusavyi wawe; uti Nk’ uko nahora nsaba so mu gihe gishize, ni ko nawe nzogusaba. Uko ni k’uzoshobora kugenda unyicira inama za Ahitofeli." 
2Samuel15:35 Kandi ntuzi yuk’ uzoba uri kumwe na Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezi? Nuko ni wagira ikintu cose wumva i bgami, uz’ uze ukibarire abo baherezi Sadoki na Abiyatari." 
2Samuel15:36 Kandi bafiseyo n’ abahungu babo bompi, Ahimasi wa Sadoki na Yonatani wa Abiyatari; abo ni bo muzoja murantumako, ngo mummenyeshe ivyo muzokwumva vyose." 
2Samuel15:37 Nuko Hushayi, uwo mukunzi wa Dawidi, aja ku murwa i Yerusalemu, ahashika igihe Abusalomu na we ashitseyo." 
2Samuel16:1 Maze Dawidi, aminutse impinga gatoya, ahūra na Ziba, umuntu wa Mefibosheti, azanye indogoba zibiri zirikw amatandiko, zīremētse amarobe y’ imitsima amajana abiri, n’imisoko ijana y’inzabibu zumye, n’amatunda ahishirije ijana, n’umukuza wa vino." 
2Samuel16:2 Umwami abaza Ziba, at’ Ibi n’ivy’ iki? Ziba aramwishura, at’ Indogoba n’izo kugira ngw abo mu rugo rwawe bazigendereko, mugenzi; imitsima n’ amatunda na vyo n’induhuro y’ imikangara, vino na yo n’iyo guhēmbūra abazogwira isari mu bugaragwa." 
2Samuel16:3 Umwami aramubaza, ati Mbega mwene shobuja we ari hehe? Ziba aramwishura, at’ Erega yigumiye i Yerusalemu, kuko yavuze ng’ uyu musi ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli baramusubiza ku ngoma ya se." 
2Samuel16:4 Maz’ umwami abarira Ziba, at’ Ehe rāba, ivyar’ ivya Mefibosheti vyose ndabikugabiye. Ziba aramwishura, ati Ndagukūriye ubgatsi, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma; urakāma untonesha." 
2Samuel16:5 Maz’ umwami Dawidi ashitse i Bahurimu, hasokoroka umuntu wo mu muryango wa Sauli yitwa Shimeyi mwene Gera, agenda aramutuka inzira yose." 
2Samuel16:6 Agenda aratera umwami Dawidi amabuye, n’abantu biwe bose; kand’ abantu bose n’abahizi bose bari bamuhagatiye i buryo n’i bumoso." 
2Samuel16:7 Uku ni ko Shimeyi yagenda aramutuka, ati Genda, urakagenda, wa mwicanyi we, wa mugesera we!" 
2Samuel16:8 Uhoraho agushubije ku mutwe amaraso yose y’ab’ inzu ya Sauli, uwo wishize mu gishingo ciwe, ukīyimika; non’ Uhoraho agabiye Abusalomu umuhungu wawe ubgo bgami; awa! Ubuyobe bgawe buragukoze, kuk’ ur’ umwicanyi!" 
2Samuel16:9 Maze Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya abaza umwami, at’ Ariko n’iki gituma tureka uwo muvyimba w’imbga akagenda aragutuka ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma? Hinge njabuke ndamuce izosi." 
2Samuel16:10 Umwami aramwishura, ati Dusangiye iki ga yemwe bana ba Seruwiya? Ni yaba antutse Uhoraho ari we yamubariye, ati Tuka Dawidi; har’ uwoshobora kumubuza, at’ Ivyo ubitewe n’iki?" 
2Samuel16:11 Mbere Dawidi abarira Abishayi n’abantu biwe bose, ati K’umwana wanje nīkūriye mu nda arondera agatwe kanje, mbeg’ urya Mubenyamini we ntarushiriza? Nuko mureke antuke, kuk’ Uhoraho ari we yabimubariye." 
2Samuel16:12 Kumbure Uhoraho azorāba ayo mbonye, ampe ivyiza mu gishingo c’iyo mivumo mvumwe uyu musi." 
2Samuel16:13 Nuko Dawidi n’abantu biwe bakomeza inzira, Shimeyi na we agenda akikamanye umusozi abangikanye na we, amutuka ingenda, amutera amabuye asūra umukungugu." 
2Samuel16:14 Nuk’ umwami n’ abantu bose bari kumwe na we bashika i Ayefimu; aruhukirayo. 
2Samuel16:15 Nuko Abusalomu n’Abisirayeli bose bashika i Yerusalemu, na Ahitofeli ari kumwe na we." 
2Samuel16:16 Maze Hushayi Umwaruki, umukunzi wa Dawidi, ashikiriye Abusalomu, aramubarira, at’ Uragahora ku ngoma, uragahora ku ngoma!" 
2Samuel16:17 Maze Abusalomu abaza Hushayi, at’ Urwo ni rwo rukundo ukunze wa mukunzi wawe? Mbega k’utajanye na we?" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushayi yishura Abusalomu, at’ Ekaye; arik’ ūtoranijwe n’ Uhoraho n’iri hanga bo n’ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli, nzoba uwiwe, ni we nzogendanira." 
2Samuel16:19 Kare ho nosavye nde? Sinosavye umwana wiwe? Nk’uko nahora nsaba so ni ko nawe nzogusaba. 
2Samuel16:20 Maze Abusalomu abarira Ahitofeli, ati Tugīre inama: tubigenze dute?" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitofeli yishura Abusalomu, ati Genda winjirane baka so b’incoreke, abo yasigaranye urugo; ni ho Abisirayeli bose bazomenya ko wacancabuye na so, abari kumwe nawe bose bagaca barema." 
2Samuel16:22 Nuko bashingira Abusalomu ihema hejuru ku ngoro; Abusalomu araheza yinjirana izo ncoreke za se, Abisirayeli bose babona." 
2Samuel16:23 Kandi mur’ ico gihe, inama Ahitofeli yazana bāzemera nk’izo bagīriwe n’Imana. Uko ni ko vyamera ku nama za Ahitofeli, uhereye kuri Dawidi ugashitsa kuri Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:1 Hanyuma Ahitofeli abarira Abusalomu, ati Hinge ntoranye ingabo ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, mpaguruke nkurikire Dawidi mur’ iri joro nyene;" 
2Samuel17:2 ndamusēsekeko akirushe, acihebuye, ndamuce ivutu; maz’ abantu bari kumwe na we bose baza guca bahunga, mpeze nice umwami wenyene." 
2Samuel17:3 Maze nzokugarukanira abantu bose; ushikiriye uwo urondera, bose uzoba ubagarukanye; ni ho abantu bose bazoca bagira umutekano." 
2Samuel17:4 Iyo nama Abusalomu arayishima cane, n’abakuru b’Abisirayeli na bo n’uko." 
2Samuel17:5 Maze Abusalomu aravuga, ati Mpamagarira Hushayi Umwaruki na we, twumve ico avuga." 
2Samuel17:6 Maze Hushayi arengutse kwa Abusalomu, Abusalomu aramubarira, ati Ahitofeli yatubgiye uku n’uku; none dukore uko yavuze? Ni waba utabishimye, zana inama yawe." 
2Samuel17:7 Hushayi yishura Abusalomu, at’ Ubu ho inama Ahitofeli yazanye si yo." 
2Samuel17:8 Kand’ at’ Urazi so n’ingabo ziwe kw ar’ abahizi, kandi baramaze kuraka nk’idubu isahuriwe abana mu gahinga. Bitayeko, so n’umuntu amenyereye ivy’ intambara, ntiyopfa kurāra mu ngabo." 
2Samuel17:9 Erega nk’ubu aramaze kwinyegeza mu rwobo cank’ ahandi; maze ni hagira abapfa bagitanguye kurwana, ūzovyumva wese azovuga, ati Habaye agatikizo mu bari kuri Abusalomu." 
2Samuel17:10 Bizotuma umuntu wese acika ivutu, naho yoba yar’ intōre afise umutima nk’uw’ intambge; kukw Abisirayeli bose basanzwe bazi so kw ar’ umuhizi, kandi n’abari kumwe na we kw ar’ abantu b’ intōre." 
2Samuel17:11 Ariko jewe inama yanje, koranya Abisirayeli bose, uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba, bangane n’umusenyi wo mw isēsero ry’ikiyaga, kandi nawe ubgawe uz’ ujane na bo mu ntambara." 
2Samuel17:12 Tuzomusēsekako ah’ azoba ari hose, tumutondeko nk’ ikime, nk’uko gitonda kw isi; nuk’ uhereye kuri we n’ingabo zose zizoba ziri kumwe na we, ntituzosiga n’uwa kirazira." 
2Samuel17:13 Na ho ni yaramuka ahungiye mu gisagara, Abisirayeli bose bazozana imigozi, dukwege ico gisagara tugicurangurize mu ruzi, gushitsa hatakiboneka n’akabuye na kamwe." 
2Samuel17:14 Nuko Abusalomu n’ abantu bose b’Abisirayeli baravuga, bat’ Inama ya Hushayi Umwaruki iruse inama ya Ahitofeli. Icabiteye n’uk’ Uhoraho yari yaragabiye gusambura izo nama nziza za Ahitofeli, kugira ngw ateze Abusalomu ivyago." 
2Samuel17:15 Maze Hushayi abarira Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezi, at’ Inama Ahitofeli yagīriye Abusalomu n’ abakuru b’Abisirayeli n’iyi n’iyi; ariko jeho iyo nabagīriye, nababariye ntya na ntya." 
2Samuel17:16 None rero ni mutume kuri Dawidi vuba, mut’ Iri joro nturāre ku majabukiro afata mu bugaragwa, ariko ntihagire ikikubuza kujabuka; muti Kugira ngo ntibakumirane n’abantu bose muri kumwe, mugenzi." 
2Samuel17:17 Kandi Yonatani na Ahimasi bāri babaye barīkinga i Eni‐rogeli, umuguranokazi akāma aja kubacira agace, na bo bakaja kubibgira umwami Dawidi; kuko batātinyuka gushika ku murwa icese." 
2Samuel17:18 Arik’ umwana w’umuhungu arababona, aragenda abibarira Abusalomu; na bo baragenda bihuta bompi, bashika i Bahurimu ku muntu yar’ afise icobo cimbge mu rugo rwiwe co kubīka amazi, bururukirayo." 
2Samuel17:19 Maz’ umugore ahitana ikinyambuga, agisasa hejuru ku munwa w’ico cobo, agisanzakw impeke, ntihagira ūbica n’ikanda." 
2Samuel17:20 Maz’ abantu ba Abusalomu bashikīra nya mugore mu rugo, baramubaza, bati Ahimasi na Yonatani bari hehe? Nya mugore arabishura, ati Bafashe hakurya. Nuko babarondeye, barababura, basubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel17:21 Bamaze kugenda, ba bandi barūrira basokoroka mur’ ico cobo, baragenda babibarira umwami Dawidi; baramubarira, bati Ni muhaguruke mujabuke n’ingoga, kuko Ahitofeli yabagīriye inama izi n’izi." 
2Samuel17:22 Nuko Dawidi ahagurukana n’abantu bose bari kumwe na we, bajabuka Yorodani; bgakeye hadasigaye n’ umwe muri bo atājabutse Yorodani." 
2Samuel17:23 Ariko Ahitofeli abonye ko batemeye inama yiwe, ashira amatandiko ku ndogoba yiwe, afata inzira ataha i muhira mu gisagara c’i wabo; araheza aroranya ivyo mu rugo rwiwe, aca yiha umugozi. Nukw arapfa, bamuhamba mu mva ya se." 
2Samuel17:24 Maze Dawidi ashika i Mahanayimu; Abusalomu na we ajabuka Yorodani, ari kumwe n’ Abisirayeli bose." 
2Samuel17:25 Kandi Abusalomu yari yagize Amasa umugabisha w’ingabo mu gishingo ca Yowabu. Kandi Amasa uwo yari mwene Yitura, umuntu w’Umwishimayeli; uyo Yitura yari yaratahiye Abigayili mwene Nahashi, Abigayili mwene nyina wa Seruwiya, Seruwiya nyina wa Yowabu." 
2Samuel17:26 Maze Abusalomu n’Abisirayeli basagaza mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Nuko Dawidi ashitse i Mahanayimu, Shobi mwene Nahashi w’i Raba mu Bamoni, na Makiri mwene Amiyeli w’i Lo‐debari, na Baruzilayi Umunyagileyadi w’i Rogelimu," 
2Samuel17:28 bamuzanira amariri, n’amabakule, n’inzavya z’ibibumbano; n’ingano, na sayiri, n’ifu, n’impeke zikaranze, n’ibiharage, n’inkore," 
2Samuel17:29 n’ubūki, n’urubu, n’ intama, n’umukānyūre w’amavuta y’inka, babigemurira Dawidi n’ abo bari kumwe; kuko bari biyumviriye, bat’ Abantu barashonje kandi bararushe, bafise inyota aho bari mu bugaragwa." 
2Samuel18:1 Maze Dawidi aharūra ingabo zari kumwe na we, ashirah’ abagaba igihumbi‐igihumbi n’abagaba ijana‐ijana." 
2Samuel18:2 Dawidi araheza agabanya ingabo mu mice itatu, umuce umwe awuha Yowabu, uwundi awuha Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya, murumuna wa Yowabu, uwundi awuha Itayi Umunyegati. Maz’ umwami abarira ingabo, ati Nanje ubganje turatabarana." 
2Samuel18:3 Ingabo ziramuhakanira, bat’ Eka ntiwojana natwe; kuko naho tworamuka duhunze, ntibobibabara, canke hapfuye kimwe ca kabiri cacu, na ho nyene ntibibishirak’ umutima; ariko wewe urengeye abantu ibihumbi cumi bo muri twebge. Icoba ciza n’uko wokwitegura kudutabara uvuye mu gisagara." 
2Samuel18:4 Umwami arabishura, at’ Ico mushima ni co nemera. Nuk’ umwami ahagarara kw irembo ry’ igisagara, ingabo zose zirarēngāna, uko zār’ ijana‐ijana n’igihumbi‐igihumbi." 
2Samuel18:5 Maz’ umwami agera Yowabu na Abishayi na Itayi, arababarira, ati Muze mundindire uwo muhungu Abusalomu, mumubungabunge. Kand’ ingabo zose zarumva, ah’ umwami yagera abo bagabisha bose ivya Abusalomu." 
2Samuel18:6 Nukw izo ngabo zija gutegera Abisirayeli mu gahinga; urugamba rurumanira mu kibira c’i Bgefurayimu. 
2Samuel18:7 Abisirayeli baneshwa n’abantu ba Dawidi; uwo musi haba agatikizo gakomeye, hapfa ibihumbi mirongwibiri," 
2Samuel18:8 kukw intambara yar’ ikwiye hose mur’ ico gihugu. Uwo musi ikibira kimira abantu benshi kuruta abishwe n’inkota. 
2Samuel18:9 Maze Abusalomu ahubirana n’ abantu ba Dawidi, kandi yari ku nyumbu yiwe; maz’ iyo nyumbu imucāna musi y’igiti c’umweloni c’inganzamarumpu c’amashami y’ inzitane, umutwe wiwe ufatwa n’ ayo mashami, asigara yenena mu kirēre; inyumbu yagenderako na yo irakomeza iragenda." 
2Samuel18:10 Maz’ umuntu arabibona, abibgira Yowabu, at’ Erega nabonye Abusalomu yenena ku giti c’umweloni." 
2Samuel18:11 Yowabu abaza uwo muntu amubariye, ati Non’ uramubona uraheza ntiwamutsinda aho nyene ng’ umutūre hasi? Ko mba nkugororeye intete cumi z’ifeza bo n’ umukanda." 
2Samuel18:12 Uwo muntu yishura Yowabu, ati Naho nari guhabga amafeza igihumbi mu ntoke, sinari gukoza ukuboko ku mwana w’umwami; kukw ah’ umwami yabīhanikiriza mwe na Abishayi na Itayi, ati Mwirinde ntihaze hagire ūkora kur’ uwo muhungu Abusalomu, natwe twavyumva." 
2Samuel18:13 Non’ iyaba nārikoze nkayoba, umwami ntiyari kubura kuvyumva, nawe ukabintāna." 
2Samuel18:14 Yowabu aramwishura, ati Nta co nirirwa ndasyogoranya nawe. Araheza ajana amakobero atatu, ayamutobekeranya mu mutima, ar’ aho nyene mu mweloni akibona." 
2Samuel18:15 Maz’ imisore cumi yatwaza Yowabu ibirwanishwa, ica Abusalomu irya n’ino, iramuhohosha, arapfa." 
2Samuel18:16 Yowabu araheza avuza inzamba, ingabo zirahindukira, zireka gukurikira Abisirayeli, kuko Yowabu azibujije." 
2Samuel18:17 Nuko bajana ikiziga ciwe, bagishiburira mu rwobo runini rwar’ aho mu kibira, bakirundakw ikirundo c’amabuye kinini cane; nukw Abisirayeli bose baratemesha, umuntu wese ahungira i we." 
2Samuel18:18 Kandi Abusalomu akiriho yari yarābiriye inkingi y’ibuye, ayishinga mu mwonga w’umwami, kuko yari yaravuze, ati Nta mwana w’umuhungu ngira, ngo baze bamunyibukireko, izina ryanje ntirizimangane; ni kwo kwitiranya iyo nkingi izina ryiwe. Nuko yitwa inkingi y’ icibutso ca Abusalomu na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Samuel18:19 Maze Ahimasi mwene Sadoki aravuga, ati Ndeka niruke mbarire umwami inkuru z’ingen’ Uhoraho yashubirije abansi biwe mu nkōko." 
2Samuel18:20 Yowabu aramwishura, at’ Eka nta nkuru ujana uyu musi: uzoba urazijana ikindi gihe; arik’ uyu musi nta zo uja kuvuga, kuk’ umwana w’umwami yapfuye." 
2Samuel18:21 Yowabu araheza abarira Umunyekushi, ati Genda ubarire umwami ivyo wabonye. Nuk’ uwo Munyekushi yunamira Yowabu, aca arijura aragenda." 
2Samuel18:22 Maze Ahimasi mwene Sadoki arongera abarira Yowabu, at’ Eka naho vyabaye birtyo, ndakwinginze undekure nanje mpfe kugenda, nkurikire uwo Munyekushi. Yowabu aramwishura, ati Wirukanwa n’iki ga mwana wanje, kw ata mpēra y’izo nkuru uja guhabga?" 
2Samuel18:23 Uwundi ati Naho bimeze birtyo, mpfuye kwiruka. Yowabu ati Nuko ni wiruke. Nuko Ahimasi ariruka, ajana inzira ica mu kiyaya, aja gutanga wa Munyekushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Kandi Dawidi yar’ avyagiye hagati y’amarembo abiri; maz’ inderetsi yūrira hejuru kw irembo ahahereranye n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye; atereje amaso, abona umuntu yiruka ari wenyene." 
2Samuel18:25 Iyo nderetsi ishira ijwi hejuru, ibibgira umwami. Umwami aravuga, ati Ni yaba ari wenyene, har’ inkuru aje kuvuga. Nukw akomeza kubandanya aza." 
2Samuel18:26 Maz’ iyo nderetsi ibona uwundi muntu yiruka. Ihamagara umushibamyi, it’ Eh’ uwundi muntu yiruka ari wenyene. Umwami aravuga, ati Na we nyene azanye inkuru." 
2Samuel18:27 Iyo nderetsi iravuga, it’ Umenga uw’ imbere yiruka nka Ahimasi mwene Sadoki. Umwami aravuga, ati N’umuntu ameze neza; azoba azanye inkuru nziza." 
2Samuel18:28 Maze Ahimasi ashira ijwi hejuru, abarira umwami, ati Vyose vyagenze neza. Araheza akubita inkoro hasi imbere y’umwami, aramubarira, at’ Uhoraho Imana yawe ahimbazwe, yaguhaye abantu bari bakubanguriye amaboko, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
2Samuel18:29 Umwami aramubaza, ati Wa muhungu Abusalomu ar’ amahoro? Ahimasi aramwishura, at’ Aho Yowabu yantuma, jewe umusavyi wawe, nabonye agahōgo kenshi, ariko sinamenye ivy’ ari vyo." 
2Samuel18:30 Umwami aramubarira, ati Rēngāna uhagarare hano. Nukw ararēngāna, arahagarara." 
2Samuel18:31 Wa Munyekushi aca ashika ubgo nyene, aravuga, ati Nkuzaniye inkuru, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma. Uyu musi Uhoraho yashubirije mu nkōko abāri baguhagurukiye bose." 
2Samuel18:32 Umwami abaza uwo Munyekushi, ati Wa muhungu Abusalomu ar’ amahoro? Uwo Munyekushi aramwishura, at’ Abansi bawe n’ aboguhagurukira kukugirira nabi bose, barakaba nk’uk’ uwo muhungu yabaye, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma!" 
2Samuel18:33 Umwami avyumvise, inkonko irakoroka, yūrira mu cumba cubatswe hejuru kw irembo, arira; akirikw aragenda aravuga, ati Yō! Mwananje Abusalomu! Es’ umwananje! Ewe mwananje Abusalomu! Iyo mpfuma ari jewe mpfa mu gishingo cawe, ewe Abusalomu mwana wanje, mwana wanje we!" 
2Samuel19:1 Hanyuma babarira Yowabu, bat’ Ereg’ umwami arikw araririra Abusalomu, amuborogera." 
2Samuel19:2 Uwo musi umunezero w’ uko banesheje uhinduka umubabaro mu bantu bose; kuko bari bumvise ng’ Umwami atuntujwe n’umwana wiwe. 
2Samuel19:3 Maz’ uwo musi ingabo zigenda zomba mu kugaruka mu gisagara, nk’ukw abahunze mu ntambara bagenda bomba bafise isoni." 
2Samuel19:4 Kand’ umwami yari yitwikiriye mu maso, avuza induru, ati Yō! Mwananje Abusalomu! Ewe Abusalomu, mwana wanje, mwana wanje we!" 
2Samuel19:5 Maze Yowabu yinjira mu nzu ah’ umwami ari, aramubarira, at’ Uyu musi utētereje abantu bawe bose, kand’ ari bo bakijije amagara yawe uyu musi nyene, n’ay’ abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe, n’ay’ abamikazi bawe n’abagore bawe b’incoreke," 
2Samuel19:6 kuk’ ukunze abakwanse, ukanka abagukunda; ereg’ uyu musi werekanye yukw abagabisha n’abasavyi ari nk’ ubusa kuri wewe; ubu ndamenye yuko Abusalomu iyaba akiriho, tukaba ari twebge twapfuye twese uyu musi, ni vyo uba washimye." 
2Samuel19:7 Nuko none n’uhaguruke, usohoke, ucūrire amajambo abasavyi bawe yo kubahūmuriza; ntanze Uhoraho kw indahiro, n’utāsohoka, nta muntu n’umwe aza gusigara kuri wewe mur’ iri joro. Kand’ ivyo bizokubera nabi kuruta ivyago wakabonye vyose, uhereye mu buto bgawe gushitsa n’ ubu." 
2Samuel19:8 Nuk’ umwami aca arahaguruka, aja kuvyagira ku kirimba. Maze babarira abantu bose, bat’ Ereg’ umwami avyagiye ku kirimba. Nukw abantu bose baza kumushengerera. Kand’ Abisirayeli bose bari barashwiragiye, umuntu wese aja i we." 
2Samuel19:9 Abantu bose bo mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli baritonganya, bat’ Umwami ni we yahora aturokora, adukūra mu maboko y’abansi bacu, no mu y’Abafilisitiya; none rero yarahunze Abusalomu, ava mu gihugu." 
2Samuel19:10 Kandi Abusalomu na we, uwo twari twimikishije amavuta ngw atuganze, yaguye mu ntambara. None rero ko mutavuga ivyo kugarukana umwami?" 
2Samuel19:11 Bukeye umwami Dawidi atuma kuri Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezi, uti Ni mubaze abakuru b’ Abayuda, muti N’iki gituma ari mwebge mugiye guherukira abandi kugarukana umwami i we? Muti Kukw inama y’Abisirayeli bose yo kumugarukana i we yamaze kumushikīra." 
2Samuel19:12 Muti Kw ari mwebge musangiye umuryango, mukaba akara kamwe n’amaraso amwe, none n’iki gituma ari mwebge mugiye guherukira abandi kumugarukana?" 
2Samuel19:13 Uti Kandi mumubarize na Amasa, muti Mbega nawe ntimur’ akara kamwe n’amaraso amwe? Mut’ Imana ize ibimuhanire, kandi birushirije, n’atākugira umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe na ntaryo mu gishingo ca Yowabu." 
2Samuel19:14 Nuk’ umwami agonda imitima y’Abayuda bose nk’ uw’ umuntu umwe; baca bamutumako ngw agaruke bo n’abantu biwe bose. 
2Samuel19:15 Nuk’ umwami asubirayo, ashika kuri Yorodani; maz’ Abayuda baja i Gilugali ngo basanganire umwami, bamujabutse Yorodani." 
2Samuel19:16 Maze Shimeyi mwene Gera Umubenyamini w’i Bahurimu, na we arabandanya, amanukana n’abo Bayuda gusanganira umwami Dawidi," 
2Samuel19:17 kandi yari kumwe n’ abantu igihumbi b’Ababenyamini nyene. Kandi Ziba, umwe nyene yamye ar’ umusavyi wa Sauli n’ inzu yiwe, arindimuka kuri Yorodani ari kumwe n’abahungu biwe ukw ar’ icumi na batanu n’abantu biwe ukw ari mirongwibiri, umwami abarorēra," 
2Samuel19:18 bajabuka icambu kugira ngo bajabutse abo mu rugo rw’umwami, bamukorere n’ivyo agomba. Maz’ umwami agira ngw ajabuke Yorodani, Shimeyi mwene Gera yikubita hasi imbere yiwe." 
2Samuel19:19 Abarira umwami, ati Mugenzi, ntumparūrekw ibigabitanyo, canke ngo wibuke ivy’ ubuyobe nakoze, jewe umusavyi wawe, wa musi wava i Yerusalemu, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ng’ unabishirek’ umutima;" 
2Samuel19:20 kuko jewe umusavyi wawe ndazi ko nacumuye; ni co gitumye uyu musi mbaye uw’intangamarāra mu muryango wa Yosefu wose kumanuka kugusanganira, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
2Samuel19:21 Ariko Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya aravuga, ati None Shimeyi ntakwiye gupfa, ko yatutse uwo Uhoraho yimikishije amavuta?" 
2Samuel19:22 Dawidi aravuga, ati Dusangiye iki ga yemwe bana ba Seruwiya, uyu musi ko mumbereye abarwanizi? Har’ uwokwicwa uyu musi mu Bisirayeli? Non’ ubu na ho simmaze kumenya ko nd’ umwami w’Abisirayeli?" 
2Samuel19:23 Umwami abarira Shimeyi, at’ Eka ntupfa. Araheza arabimurahira." 
2Samuel19:24 Na Mefibosheti umwuzukuru wa Sauli aramanuka, aza gusanganira umwami; uhereye umusi umwami yagīriye, ugashitsa umusi yagarukiye i we amahoro, ntiyongeye kwiyoga ibirenge, canke ngw aringanize ubganwa, canke ngw amesure impuzu." 
2Samuel19:25 Nukw avuye i Yerusalemu gusanganira umwami, umwami aramubaza, ati Mbega n’iki cākubujije kujana nanje ga Mefibosheti?" 
2Samuel19:26 Aramwishura, at’ Ereg’ umuntu wanje yarampenze, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma; kuko jewe umusavyi wawe namubgiye ngw anshirire amatandiko ku ndogoba kugira ngo ndayigendereko njane nawe, mugenzi, kuko jewe umusavyi wawe nd’ikimuga." 
2Samuel19:27 Hanyuma aza kukumbesherako, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma; ariko rero mugenzi, umeze nk’umumarayika w’ Imana; nuko n’ukore ico ugomba;" 
2Samuel19:28 kukw abo mu rugo rwa data twese imbere yawe twār’ abo gupfa gusa; uraheza jewe umusavyi wawe unshira mu barīra ku meza yawe. None har’ ikindi novuga ngo ngutakambire ga mugenzi? 
2Samuel19:29 Umwami aramwishura, ati N’iki gituma ushishikara kuzana amajambo y’ivyawe? Namaze kubiheza: mwe na Ziba ni mugende mugabure iryo tongo." 
2Samuel19:30 Mefibosheti yishura umwami, ati Ni yagomba n’atware ryose; kizima ugarutse amahoro mu rugo rwawe, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
2Samuel19:31 Na Baruzilayi Umunyagileyadi ava i Rogelimu aramanuka, ngw aje kujabukana n’umwami Yorodani, ngw amugeze hakurya." 
2Samuel19:32 Baruzilayi uwo yar’ umutāma ashaje cane, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongumunani, kandi ni we yagemuriye umwami aho yar’ i Mahanayimu, kuko yar’ umuntu w’umutunzi cane." 
2Samuel19:33 Maz’ umwami abarira Baruzilayi, ati Ngwino tujabukane, nanje nzokumarira vyose dushitse i wanje i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel19:34 Ariko Baruzilayi yishura umwami, ati Mbeg’ ugira ngo nshigaje imyaka ingana iki, yotuma ndūgana nawe i Yerusalemu ga mugenzi?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ubu ko mmaze imyaka mirongumunani y’amavuka, ndacamenya ibiryoshe n’ibibishe? Jewe umusavyi wawe ubona nkiryoherwa n’ivyo ndya n’ivyo nnywa? Ndacashobora kwumva amajwi y’abaririmvyi, ar’abagabo ar’abagore? Non’ icotuma jewe umusavyi wawe nja kukugora n’iki, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma?" 
2Samuel19:36 Ereg’ icari kinzanye kwar’ ukukujabutsa Yorodani gusa, nkakwigiza imbere, mugenzi; non’ ico ni co cotuma urinda kumpa ingororano ingana irtyo ga mwami?" 
2Samuel19:37 Ntunga nisubirire mu gisagara c’i wacu, jewe umusavyi wawe, abe ari ho nzogwa, ah’ imva ya data na mama iri. Ariko nguyo Kimuhamu umusavyi wawe; abe ari we ajabukana nawe, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma; uz’ umukoreshe ico ugomba." 
2Samuel19:38 Umwami aramwishura, ati Nuko Kimuhamu n’ahogi tujabukane, kandi nzomugirira uk’ ugomba; kand’ ic’ uzongombako cose nzokigukorera."
