2Samuel19:39 Nukw abantu bose bajabuka Yorodani; n’umwami na we arajabuka. Maz’ umwami agumbira Baruzilayi, aramuhezagira; aca yisubirira i we." 
2Samuel19:40 Uko ni k’umwami yajabutse ashikira i Gilugali, na Kimuhamu ajabukana na we, n’Abayuda bose n’igice ca kabiri c’Abisirayeli bamuherekeje." 
2Samuel19:41 Bukeye Abisirayeli bose bashengerera umwami Dawidi, baramubaza, bati Mugenzi, n’iki gitumye bene wacu b’Abayuda bakuzana nk’abakutwiba, bakakujabutsa Yorodani bo n’abo mu rugo rwawe n’ingabo zawe zose?" 
2Samuel19:42 Abayuda bose baca bishura Abisirayeli, bati N’uk’ umwami ari twebge dufitaniye akamwe ko hafi. Non’ ivyo ni vyo bibaratsa? Har’ ico yatugaburiye tukabacura? Canke yoba yatugabiye?" 
2Samuel19:43 Abisirayeli bishura Abayuda, bat’ Umwami tumufiseko hanini ibihetangabo cumi; kubg’ ivyo Dawidi n’uwacu kuruta mwebge. None n’iki catumye mudukēngēra, kand’ ari twebge twabatanze kugira inama yo kugarukana umwami wacu? Arikw Abayuda mu magambo yabo bāri bakarātiye kuruta Abisirayeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Hār’ umuntu w’umugesera yitwa Sheba, mwene Bikuri Umubenyamini; aca avuza inzamba, aravuga, ati Dawidi nta co tumwegako, nta mugabane dufise kuri mwene Isayi: yemwe Bisirayeli, hogi twitahire, umuntu wese aje i muhira!" 
2Samuel20:2 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bata Dawidi, bakondorera inyuma ya Sheba mwene Bikuri; arikw Abayuda bo bigumira ku mwami wabo, baramuherekeza kuva kuri Yorodani gushitsa i Yerusalemu." 
2Samuel20:3 Nuk’ umwami Dawidi ashitse i we i Yerusalemu, ajana za ncoreke ziwe yagize abagore ukw ar’ icumi, abo yari yasigaranye urugo; abashira mu nzu, abaha ababarinda; abatungiraho, ariko ntiyasubira kubarārira. Nuko baguma ngaho barindwa, barinda bapfa bameze nk’abapfakazi." 
2Samuel20:4 Maz’ umwami abarira Amasa, ati Nkoraniriza Abayuda hano mu misi itatu itarenze, kandi nawe uz’ ubeho." 
2Samuel20:5 Nuko Amasa aja guhamagara Abayuda; arikw arenza imisi umwami yamubariye. 
2Samuel20:6 Dawidi araheza abarira Abishayi, ati Sheba mwene Bikuri agiye kutugirira nabi kuruta Abusalomu; abe ari wewe ujana ingabo zanje, umukurikirane, kugira ngo ntiyegukire ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye, akaba atujanye." 
2Samuel20:7 Nukw ingabo za Yowabu n’ Abakereti n’Abapeleti n’abahizi bose bakurikira Abishayi; bava i Yerusalemu baja guhīga Sheba mwene Bikuri. 
2Samuel20:8 Bashitse ku gitandara kinini c’i Gibeyoni, Amasa aza kubasanganira; kandi Yowabu yari yambaye imyambaro y’intambara, ayikenyeje umukanda urikw inkota iri mu rwubati, yenena kw itako ryiwe; yīgīye imbere, iruvamw’ irakoroka." 
2Samuel20:9 Yowabu abarira Amasa, ati N’amahoro ga ncuti? Yowabu araheza afatisha Amasa ukuboko kw’i buryo ku rusakanwa nk’ ūgira amusome." 
2Samuel20:10 Ariko Amasa ntiyagira ico yibaza ku nkota Yowabu yar’ afise mu ntoke; nuko Yowabu ayimuzibura ku nda, amara yiwe asēseka hasi, ntiyarinda kugereka ubga kabiri; nukw arapfa. Maze Yowabu na Abishayi murumuna we bakomeza guhīga Sheba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:11 Umwe mu ngabo za Yowabu ahagarara hejuru ya Amasa, aravuga, at’ Ūkunda Yowabu, kand’ ūherereye ku ruhande rwa Dawidi, n’ akurikire Yowabu." 
2Samuel20:12 Kandi Amasa yari hagati mu nzira arambaraye mu maraso yiwe, arikw arasāmba; maz’ uwo muntu abonye kw abantu bose bahashika bakarundana, aterura Amasa, amukūra mu nzira, amurambika hirya mu murima, amworosa impuzu; kuko yabonye k’uwamushikako wese yaca ahagarara." 
2Samuel20:13 Nukw amaze gukūrwa mu nzira, abantu bose baca bakomeza inzira bakurikira Yowabu, baja guhīga Sheba mwene Bikuri." 
2Samuel20:14 Sheba anyuragira mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ashika i Abeli h’i Beti‐mayaka; maz’ Ababeriti bose barakorakorana, bamukurikirayo." 
2Samuel20:15 Maz’ ingabo zose zari kuri Yowabu ziraza, zimusāgiririza i Abeli nyene h’i Beti‐mayaka, barunda ikirundo kur’ ico gisagara co kwūririrako, cegamiye uruzitiro rwaco; basita urwo ruzitiro kugira ngo baruhomvore." 
2Samuel20:16 Maz’ umugore w’umunyabgenge wo mur’ ico gisagara ashira ijwi hejuru, aravuga, ati Ni mwumvirize, yemwe ni mwumvirize! Ndabinginze, mumbaririre Yowabu, mut’ Igira hino, ico akubarira." 
2Samuel20:17 Nuko yigira hafi y’ah’ ari; nya mugore aramubaza, ati Ni wewe Yowabu? Na we at’ Ego me ni jewe. Aramubarira, ati Ni wumve amajambo yanje, jewe incoreke yawe; na we at’ Ego me ndumva." 
2Samuel20:18 Aravuga, ati Kera bākunda kuvuga, bati Ni bagīshe inama i Abeli; kandi rero vyaca bihera." 
2Samuel20:19 Jewe nd’umwe mu bakunda ivy’ amahoro kandi b’abizigirwa mu Bisirayeli; ariko wewe urondera kugeseza igisagara, ari co muvyeyi mu Bisirayeli. N’iki gituma ugomba kuyongobeza ishamvu y’Uhoraho?" 
2Samuel20:20 Yowabu aramwishura, ati Biragahera! Biragahera ko hogira ico noyongobeza canke nogeseza!" 
2Samuel20:21 Si ko biri; ariko harih’ umuntu wo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu yitwa Sheba mwene Bikuri, yagararije umwami Dawidi; mube ari we mutanga wenyene, mbone kubavira ku gisagara. Nya mugore yishura Yowabu, ati Nuko rero, umutwe wiwe turawurenza uruzitiro tuwugushiburire." 
2Samuel20:22 Maz’ uwo mugore aja mu bantu bose ajanye inama y’ubgenge; na bo baragenda baca izosi Sheba mwene Bikuri, bashiburira Yowabu umutwe wiwe. Na we araheza avuza inzamba, abantu bose bava ku gisagara, baratandukana, umuntu wese ataha i we. Yowabu na we atabarukira i Yerusalemu i bgami." 
2Samuel20:23 Kandi Yowabu yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli; Benaya mwene Yehoyada ni we yagabisha Abakereti n’Abapeleti; 
2Samuel20:24 Adoramu na we yagaba ivy’ ikori; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba; 
2Samuel20:25 Shewa yar’ umukarani; Sadoki na Abiyatari ni bo bār’ abaherezi; 
2Samuel20:26 Ira w’Umuyayiri na we yar’ umujenama mukuru wa Dawidi. 
2Samuel21:1 Ku ngoma ya Dawidi hatera inzara, imara imyaka itatu ikurikiranye; maze Dawidi aja kubisiguza Uhoraho. Uhoraho arishura, ati Vyātewe n’ubgicanyi bga Sauli n’inzu yiwe, kuko yishe ab’i Gibeyoni." 
2Samuel21:2 Maz’ umwami ahamagaza ab’i Gibeyoni, arabibabgira. (Kand’ ab’i Gibeyoni ntibār’ abo mu Bisirayeli, ariko bār’ abandurutse ku masigarira y’ Abamori; kandi nah’ Abisirayeli bari barasezeranye na bo kubareka, ariko Sauli yari yagomvye kubahonnya, abitewe n’ishaka yagirira Abisirayeli n’Abayuda.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Nuko Dawidi abaza ab’i Gibeyoni, ati Nobakorera iki? Notanga impongano ki, kugira ngo mubone gusabira ishamvu y’Uhoraho umugisha?" 
2Samuel21:4 Ab’i Gibeyoni baramwishura, bat’ Ico tugomba kuri Sauli n’ab’ inzu yiwe s’ifeza cank’ izahabu, kandi mu Bisirayeli nta muntu n’umwe tugomba kwica. Na we aravuga, at’ Ico muvuga ni co mbakorera." 
2Samuel21:5 Babgira umwami, bat’ Umuntu yaturanduye, akaturonderera inama yo kutugeseza, kugira ngo ntitugire uburagamo mu gihugu cose c’ Abisirayeli," 
2Samuel21:6 ni muduhe abantu ndwi mu bahungu biwe, tubamanike imbere y’Uhoraho i Gibeya, ahāri kwa Sauli uwo Uhoraho yatoranije. Umwami arabishura, ati Nzobabaha." 
2Samuel21:7 Arik’ umwami Dawidi arēngāna Mefibosheti mwene Yonatani umwuzukuru wa Sauli, kubg’ indahiro bārahiriye imbere y’ Uhoraho, bo na Yonatani nyene, mwene Sauli." 
2Samuel21:8 Nuk’ umwami afata abahungu babiri ba Risipa umukobga wa Aya, yavyaranye na Sauli, Arumoni na Mefibosheti, bo n’abahungu batanu ba Merabu umukobga wa Sauli, yavyaranye na Aduriyeli mwene Baruzilayi Umumeholati;" 
2Samuel21:9 abagabura mu maboko y’ab’i Gibeyoni; babamanika ku musozi imbere y’ Uhoraho; bose ukw ar indwi bagwa hamwe, bicwa mw ishuza ry’ igenya, batanguye kugenya sayiri." 
2Samuel21:10 Maze Risipa umukobga wa Aya ahitana amagunira, ayīsasira ku gitandara, ahēra mw ishuza ry’ igenya, ashitsa ku mutasuro, imvura iguye kur’ iyo mivyimba; ku murango ntiyakundira ibisīga vyo mu kirēre ko biyigwako, canke mw ijoro kw ibikōko vyo mw ishamba biyēgēra." 
2Samuel21:11 Maze babarira Dawidi ivyo Risipa yakoze, umukobga wa Aya, incoreke Sauli yari yaragize umugore." 
2Samuel21:12 Dawidi araheza aragenda yaka abantu b’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi amagufa ya Sauli n’aya Yonatani umuhungu wiwe, ayo bāri bārīvye mu kibuga c’i Beti‐shani, ah’ Abafilisitiya bari barayamanitse, kuri wa musi bātsinda Sauli i Gilibowa." 
2Samuel21:13 Akūray’ ayo magufa yabo, maze bakoranya n’amagufa ya ba bandi bamanitswe." 
2Samuel21:14 Nuko bahamba ayo magufa ya Sauli na Yonatani umuhungu wiwe i Sela mu gihugu c’Ababenyamini, mu mva ya Kishi se wa Sauli; nuko bashitsa ivy’ umwami yababariye vyose. Hanyuma y’ivyo Imana ibona guhangaza ico gihugu." 
2Samuel21:15 Bukeye Abafilisitiya bongera gutera Abisirayeli. Dawidi amanukana n’ingabo ziwe, arwanya Abafilisitiya; arateba araruha." 
2Samuel21:16 Maze Ishubi‐benobu, umwe wo mu bana b’Abarefa, yagomba kwica Dawidi; kand’ icumu ryiwe ryar’ iry’ umuringa ririvye shekeli amajana atatu, yari yambaye n’inkota nsha." 
2Samuel21:17 Ariko Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya aramutabara, asogota uwo Mufilisitiya, aramwica. Maz’ abantu ba Dawidi baramurahira, bati Ntuzosubira na mba kujana natwe mu ntambara, ntuz’ uhave uzimya itara ry’Abisirayeli." 
2Samuel21:18 Hanyuma y’ivyo hongera kuba intambara yo kurwana n’Abafilisitiya i Goba. Sibekayi Umuhushati yica Safu, umwe wo mu Barefa." 
2Samuel21:19 Maze hasubira kuba iyindi ntambara yo kurwana n’ Abafilisitiya aho nyene i Goba. Eluhanani mwene Yare‐oregimu w’i Betelehemu yica Goliyati Umunyegati, uruti rw’icumu ryiwe rwangana n’umwaro ujishirwakw impuzu." 
2Samuel21:20 Bukeye hongera kuba intambara i Gati, kandi hariy’ umuntu muremure w’ikigambati, yar’ afise indegeya ku ntoke no ku mano: intoke n’amano vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri na bine; kandi na we yar’ umwe wo mu Barefa." 
2Samuel21:21 Maz’ acokoye Abisirayeli, Yonatani mwene Shimeyi, umuhungwabo wa Dawidi, aramwica." 
2Samuel21:22 Abo bose ukw ari bane bar’ abo mu Barefa b’i Gati; bicwa na Dawidi n’abantu biwe. 
2Samuel22:1 Dawidi yabariye Uhoraho amajambo yo mur’ iyi ndirimbo, umusi Uhoraho yamurokoye, akamukūra mu maboko y’ abansi biwe bose, no mu ya Sauli." 
2Samuel22:2 Aravuga, at’ Uhoraho n’igitandara canje, n’ubuhungiro bganje, n’umurokozi wanje," 
2Samuel22:3 N’Imana igitandara canje; ni we nzohungirako. Ni we nkinzo yanje, n’ihembe ry’agakiza kanje, n’ umunara wanje wo guhungiramwo, n’ubgugamo bganje; Ni wewe Mukiza wanje, unkiza umuryano w’abantu." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndambaza Uhoraho abereye gushimwa: Ni ho nzokizwa abansi banje. 
2Samuel22:5 Imipfunda y’urupfu yaranyizingiriyeko, Isūri zo kurandura zanteye ubgoba." 
2Samuel22:6 Ingoyi z’i kuzimu zantaye hagati, Imitego y’urupfu yantanze imbere." 
2Samuel22:7 Mu mubabaro wanje nambaje Uhoraho, Mbere natakambiye Imana yanje; Yumva ijwi ryanje iri mu ngoro yayo, Ivyo natakamvye biyishika mu matwi." 
2Samuel22:8 Maz’ isi iratigita, ihinda agashitsi, Amatanguriro y’ijuru aranyiganyiga, Atigitishwa n’uburake bgayo." 
2Samuel22:9 Umwotsi upfunduka mu mazuru yayo, Umuriro uva mu kanwa kayo, urayigiza, Amakara afatishwa na wo." 
2Samuel22:10 Yandaza ijuru, na yo nyene iramanuka, Umwiza w’umuzitanya wari musi y’ibirenge vyayo." 
2Samuel22:11 Iguruka ivyagiye ku mukerubi, Mbere yabonetse igendera ku mababa y’umuyaga." 
2Samuel22:12 Umwiza iwugira ihema riyisāgiriye; Isāgīrwa n’ibicu bibungenze amazi, ibicu bitwaye intunda vyo mw ijuru." 
2Samuel22:13 Ubgiza bukayangana bur’ imbere yayo Butuma amakara yaka. 
2Samuel22:14 Uhoraho aturagara ari mw ijuru, Ūsumba vyose avugisha ijwi ryiwe." 
2Samuel22:15 Arasa imyampi yiwe, ashwiragiza abansi banje, Arekura imiravyo, abaca umuhongo." 
2Samuel22:16 Maz’ agataka ko musi y’ikiyaga karaboneka, Amatanguriro y’isi aratwikururwa, Bitewe n’uguhana kw’Uhoraho, N’ugufūha kw’impwemu ziva mu mazuru yiwe." 
2Samuel22:17 Atuma ukuboko ari hejuru, aramfata, Andoba mu mazi menshi." 
2Samuel22:18 Ankiza umwansi wanje akomeye, N’abanyanka, kuko bandusha inkomezi." 
2Samuel22:19 Bari bantanze imbere ku musi w’amagorwa yanje, Arik’ Uhoraho ni we yambereye ubgishimikizo." 
2Samuel22:20 Abinkūramwo, anshira ahantu hāgutse: Yandokoye kuko namuhimbaye." 
2Samuel22:21 Uhoraho yangereye ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje, Nk’ukw amaboko yanje atanduye, ni ko yangiriye." 
2Samuel22:22 Kuko nitondeye inzira z’ Uhoraho, Kandi sinakoze icaha co kureka Imana yanje:" 
2Samuel22:23 Kukw amateka yayo yose yar’ imbere yanje, Kandi sinatirimutse ngo mve mu vyagezwe vyayo." 
2Samuel22:24 Narayitunganira, Nirinze ukugabitanya kwanje." 
2Samuel22:25 Ni co catumye Uhoraho anyishura ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje, Ibikwiranye n’ukutandura kwanje mu nyonga ziwe." 
2Samuel22:26 Ku munyembabazi uzokwiyerekana ur’ umunyembabazi; K’ūtunganye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtunganye; 
2Samuel22:27 K’ūtanduye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtanduye; Ku ntabarirwa uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūdadika. 
2Samuel22:28 Abacishijwe bugufi uzobakiza, Arikw igitsure cawe kiri ku bībone, kugira ng’ ubasubize hasi." 
2Samuel22:29 Kukw ari wewe tara ryanje, Uhoraho; Uhoraho ni we yākira umwiza wanje." 
2Samuel22:30 Kukw ari wewe unshoboza gutera umuce w’ingabo, Kand’ ar’ Imana yanje inshoboza gusimba uruzitiro rw’ amabuye." 
2Samuel22:31 Imana yo, inzira yayo iratunganye rwose, Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaravugutiwe: Ni we nkinzo ikīngīra abamuhungirako bose." 
2Samuel22:32 Ni nde Mana, atar’ Uhoraho? Ni nde Gitandara, atar’ Imana yacu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Imana ni yo buhungiro bganje bukomeye; Irōngōra umugororotsi mu nzira yayo. 
2Samuel22:34 Ni yo ihindura ibirenge vyanje nk’ivy’ impongokazi, Impagarika ku dutwe tw’ imisozi yanje." 
2Samuel22:35 Yigisha intoke zanje kurasana, Bituma amaboko yanje afora umuheto w’umuringa." 
2Samuel22:36 Kandi wampaye inkinzo, ni yo gakiza kawe, Ukwicisha bugufi kwawe kwanshize hejuru." 
2Samuel22:37 Intambuko zanje wazāguriye inzira, Ibirenge vyanje ntivyanyereye." 
2Samuel22:38 Nakinagije abansi banje, ndabarandura, Sinatabaruka badaheze." 
2Samuel22:39 Narabatobekeranije, ntibābasha kuvyuka; Mbere bāguye musi y’ibirenge vyanje." 
2Samuel22:40 Wankenyeje inkomezi ngo ndwane, Abarwanizi banje wabamaze igabo." 
2Samuel22:41 Watumye ababisha banje bampa ibitugu, Kugira ngo ndandure abanyanka." 
2Samuel22:42 Bārēraguje, babura ūbakiza; Batakambiye Uhoraho, ntiyabishura." 
2Samuel22:43 Maze ndabasya, bacika nk’ umukungugu wo kw isi, Ndabasiribanga nk’umwavu wo ku nzira, ndabashwiragiza." 
2Samuel22:44 Wankijije indwano z’abantu banje, Waranzigamye ngo nganze amahanga; Ihanga ntigeze kumenya ryaransavye." 
2Samuel22:45 Abanyamahanga baje banyunamira bampema; Bumvise inkuru yanje baca baranyoboka. 
2Samuel22:46 Abanyamahanga barakabiranye, Bava mu binyegero vyabo bahinda agashitsi." 
2Samuel22:47 Uhoraho yamaho; Igitandara canje gihimbazwe; Imana, Igitandara c’agakiza kanje, ishirwe hejuru:" 
2Samuel22:48 Ni yo Mana impōra, Ikangandūrira amahanga nkayaganza." 
2Samuel22:49 Inkūra mu babisha banje: Mber’ unshira hejuru y’abampagurukira, Unkiza n’umuntu w’ikirara." 
2Samuel22:50 Ni co gituma, Uhoraho, nzogushimira mu mahanga, Ndirimbe ishimwe ry’izina ryawe." 
2Samuel22:51 Umwami yimitse amugabira agakiza gakomeye, Agirira imbabazi umwami yimikishije amavuta, Ni Dawidi n’uruvyaro rwiwe ibihe bidashira." 
2Samuel23:1 Aya ni yo majambo ya Dawidi aheruka: At’ Uku ni ko Dawidi mwene Isayi avuga, Ni k’uwashizwe hejuru avuga, Uwo Imana ya Yakobo yimikishije amavuta, Umuririmvyi w’umuhinga w’ Abisirayeli;" 
2Samuel23:2 Ati Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yavugiye muri jewe, Ijambo ryiwe ryari ku rurimi rwanje." 
2Samuel23:3 Imana y’Abisirayeli yaravuze, Igitandara c’Abisirayeli yarambgiye, It’ Ūganza abantu mu bugororotsi, Agatwara yubaha Imana," 
2Samuel23:4 Abarasira nk’umutwenzi iy’ utambitse, Nk’izuba iyo rirashe mu gatondo hatagira agacu, Ubgatsi bukamera hasi, imvura yāguye." 
2Samuel23:5 Non’ inzu yanje si kw imeze ku Mana? Kuko yasezeranye nanje isezerano ritazovaho, Ritunganye muri vyose, kandi rikomeye; Non’ agakiza kanje kose n’ ivyo nifuza vyose Ntizotuma bimera bikaba ibironge?" 
2Samuel23:6 Arikw abantu bose b’abagesera bazoba nk’amahwa abantu bakinjura, Kukw ata wuyafatisha intoke;" 
2Samuel23:7 Arik’ uwoyakorako Akwiye kugira icuma n’uruti rw’icumu; Umuriro uzoyatongorera aho nyene. 
2Samuel23:8 Aya ni yo mazina y’abahizi Dawidi yar’ afise: Yoshebu‐bashebeti w’i Takemoni, ni we yar’ umukuru wa bamwe batatu; ni we yarāgūriye icumu abantu amajana munani, bahindikiranirah’ umusi umwe." 
2Samuel23:9 Uwa kabiri kuri we muri ba bahizi batatu ni Eleyazari mwene Dodayi Umwahohi. Yari kumwe na Dawidi igihe bahangāra Abafilisitiya bari bakoraniye kubarwanya. Maz’ Abisirayeli bahunze," 
2Samuel23:10 arahaguruka yica Abafilisitiya, ukuboko kwiwe kurateba kugwa ikinyānya, kwumira ku nkota. Uwo musi Uhoraho atanga intsinzi ikomeye; abantu baraheza bagaruka kuri Eleyazari, bazanywe no gukoba imivyimba gusa." 
2Samuel23:11 Akurikirwa na Shama mwene Ageye Umuharari. Abafilisitiya bari bakoraniye i Lehi, ahār’ umurima w’inkore; nukw ingabo zihunga Abafilisitiya." 
2Samuel23:12 Ariko we yihagararira muri wa murima, arawurwanira, yica Abafilisitiya; nuk’ Uhoraho atanga intsinzi ikomeye." 
2Samuel23:13 Umusi ur’ izina batatu bo muri bamwe mirongwitatu b’abahizi baramanuka, baja iyo Dawidi ari muri rya senga ry’i Adulamu; hāri mu gihe c’iyimbura, kand’ igitero c’Abafilisitiya cari gishagaje ku mwonga Refayimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Ico gihe Dawidi yari mw isenga, kandi har’ insago z’Abafilisitiya i Betelehemu." 
2Samuel23:15 Dawidi yumva akumbuye amazi yaho; aravuga, at’ Icompa nkabona uwompa ku mazi y’iriba ryo kw irembo ry’i Betelehemu, nkayanywa!" 
2Samuel23:16 Maze ba bahizi batatu baca mu ngabo z’ Abafilisitiya, bavoma amazi mur’ iryo riba ryo kw irembo ry’i Betelehemu, barayazana, bayaha Dawidi; ariko yanka kuyanywa, ayavyagiza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
2Samuel23:17 Aravuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, biragahera ko nokora ntyo! Ndābe nnywe amaraso y’abantu bahevye amagara yabo? Ni co catumye yanka kuyanywa. Ivyo ni vyo vyakozwe na ba bandi batatu b’ abahizi." 
2Samuel23:18 Kandi Abishayi murumuna wa Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ni we yar’ umukuru wa bamwe mirongwitatu. Yarāgūriye icumu abantu amajana atatu, arabahindikiranya, aronka izina rya rurangiranwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu." 
2Samuel23:19 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene, bituma agirwa umukuru wabo. Ariko rero ntiyashikīra ba bandi batatu ba mbere." 
2Samuel23:20 Kandi na Benaya mwene Yehoyada, umuntu w’umuhizi w’i Kabuseli, na we yari yarakoze ivy’ ubutōre; ni we yishe bene Ariyeli w’i Mowabu bompi; kandi yaramanutse yicira intambge mw isenga, ku musi shelegi yar’ iguye." 
2Samuel23:21 Yishe n’Umunyegiputa mwiza w’akaranga; uwo Munyegiputa yar’ afise icumu mu minwe, ariko we amanuka iy’ ari atwaye ubuhiri; amushikura iryo cumu, ararimwicisha." 
2Samuel23:22 Ivyo ni vyo Benaya mwene Yehoyada yakoze, aronka izina rya rurangiranwa muri ba bahizi mirongwitatu." 
2Samuel23:23 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene, ariko ntiyashikīra ba bandi batatu ba mbere. Maze Dawidi amugira umukuru w’abashibamyi biwe." 
2Samuel23:24 Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu yar’ umwe muri bamwe mirongwitatu, hamwe na Eluhanani mwene Dodo w’i Betelehemu," 
2Samuel23:25 na Shama w’i Harodi, na Elika w’i Harodi nyene;" 
2Samuel23:26 na Helezi w’i Paluti, na Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa;" 
2Samuel23:27 na Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti, na Mebunayi w’i Hushati;" 
2Samuel23:28 na Salumoni w’i Ahohi, na Maharayi w’i Netofati;" 
2Samuel23:29 na Helebu mwene Bayana w’i Netofati nyene, na Itayi mwene Ribayi w’i Gibeya h’Ababenyamini;" 
2Samuel23:30 na Benaya w’i Piratoni, na Hidayi wo ku migezi y’i Gashi;" 
2Samuel23:31 na Abi‐aluboni w’i Arubati, na Azimaveti w’i Bahurimu;" 
2Samuel23:32 na Eliyaba w’i Shaliboni, na bene Yasheni, na Yonatani;" 
2Samuel23:33 na Shama w’i Harari, na Ahiyamu mwene Sharari w’i Harari nyene;" 
2Samuel23:34 na Elifeleti mwene Ahasubayi w’i Mayaka, na Eliyamu mwene Ahitofeli w’i Giloni;" 
2Samuel23:35 na Hesiro w’i Karumeli, na Parayi w’i Arubi;" 
2Samuel23:36 na Igali mwene Natani w’i Zoba, na Bani w’Umugadi;" 
2Samuel23:37 na Seleki w’Umwamoni, na Naharayi w’i Beroti, ari we yatwaza Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ibirwanishwa;" 
2Samuel23:38 na Ira w’i Ituri, na Garebu w’i Ituri nyene;" 
2Samuel23:39 na Uriya Umuheti; bose na bose bari mirongwitatu n’indwi. 
2Samuel24:1 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho bgongera kuziriringira Abisirayeli; asunika Dawidi ngw abakwegere, ati Genda uharūre Abisirayeli n’Abayuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Umwami abarira Yowabu umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe yari kuri we, ati Nyuragira mu miryango yose y’ Abisirayeli, uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba, muharūre abantu, kugira ngo mmenye igitigiri cabo." 
2Samuel24:3 Yowabu yishura umwami, at’ Uhoraho Imana yawe n’igwiririkanye abantu, barute uko bari basanzwe bangana ibihetangabo ijana, nawe uz’ uvyibonere mugenzi; ariko mbega n’iki kiguteye gushira umutima ku kintu nk’ico ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma?" 
2Samuel24:4 Arikw ijambo ry’umwami rinesha irya Yowabu n’iry’ abagabisha b’ingabo. Nuko Yowabu n’abo bagabisha bava imbere y’umwami, baja guharūra Abisirayeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Bajabuka Yorodani, bahēra i Aroweri, no ku gisagara kiri hagati mu kiyaya, bagenda berekeye i Gadi kurinda bashika i Yazeri." 
2Samuel24:6 Maze baja i Gileyadi no mu gihugu c’i Tahatimu‐hodishi, baja n’i Dani‐yani, barazenguka baja i Sidoni," 
2Samuel24:7 baca kw iboma ry’i Tiro no mu bisagara vyose vy’Abahiwi n’ivy’ Abanyakanani, bagarukira i Beri‐sheba i bumanuko bg’i Buyuda." 
2Samuel24:8 Nuko barangije kugendura igihugu cose basubira i Yerusalemu, bamaze amezi cenda n’imisi mirongwibiri." 
2Samuel24:9 Maze Yowabu ashikiriza umwami igitigiri c’abantu bāharūye: mu Bisirayeli hārimw’ abantu b’abahizi bazi kurwanisha inkota, ibihumbi amajana munani; mu Bayuda na ho hārimw’ ibihumbi amajana atanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Ariko Dawidi amaze guharūra abantu, yumva umutima umukubita. Abarira Uhoraho, ati Nācumuye cane ku vyo nakoze; ariko none, Uhoraho, ndakwinginze, kūrah’ ibigabitanyo vyanje, jewe umusavyi wawe, kuko nakoze ivy’ ubujuju rwose." 
2Samuel24:11 Bukeye mu gatondo, Dawidi avyukurutse, ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Gadi, uwavugishwa na we, ari we kamenyi wa Dawidi," 
2Samuel24:12 riti Genda ubarire Dawidi, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ut’ Agushize imbere ibihano bitatu; uti Hitamwo kimwe muri vyo; ut’ Abe ari co aguhanisha." 
2Samuel24:13 Nuko Gadi aja kwa Dawidi arabimubgira; aravuga, ati Ngo Mbega hatere inzara mu gihugu cawe, imare imyaka itatu, canke ng’ Uhīgwe n’abansi kumara amezi atatu, canke ngo Hatere ikīza mu gihugu cawe, kimare imisi itatu? Ni wiyumvire rero, uvuge ico nja kwishura Iyantumye." 
2Samuel24:14 Dawidi yishura Gadi, ati Ndagowe rwose: ni dupfume dukorokera mu maboko y’Uhoraho, kukw imbabazi ziwe ari nyinshi; ariko noye gukorokera mu maboko y’abantu." 
2Samuel24:15 Nuk’ Uhoraho atērēra Abisirayeli ikīza, gihēra mu gitondo gishitsa igihe cāshinzwe; uhereye i Dani ugashika i Beri‐sheba, hapfa abagabo ibihumbi mirongwirindwi." 
2Samuel24:16 Maz’ umumarayika akibangurira ukuboko i Yerusalemu ngw ahageseze, Uhoraho arīgarura abuza ivyo vyago, abarira uwo mumarayika yageseza abantu, ati Birahaye: garukana ukuboko kwawe. Kand’ uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho yar’ ahagaze i ruhande y’imbuga ya Arawuna Umuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Dawidi abonye uwo mumarayika yageseza abantu, abarira Uhoraho, at’ Erega ni jewe nacumuye, ni jewe nakoze nabi; arikw izi ntama zo zakoze iki? Ndakwinginze, ukuboko kwawe abe ari jewe kurwanya, bo n’inzu ya data." 
2Samuel24:18 Uwo musi nyene Gadi aja kuri Dawidi, aramubarira, ati Dūga wubakire Uhoraho igicaniro ku mbuga ya Arawuna Umuyebusi." 
2Samuel24:19 Nuko Dawidi yumvise irya Gadi aradūga, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze." 
2Samuel24:20 Maze Arawuna agize ngw ararāba, abona umwami n’ abantu baza iy’ ari; Arawuna arenga irembo, akubita inkoro hasi imbere y’umwami, aramwunamira." 
2Samuel24:21 Arawuna aramubaza, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, uzanywe n’iki i wanje jewe umusavyi wawe? Dawidi aramwishura, ati Nzanywe no kugura iyo mbuga yawe, ngo nubakire Uhoraho igicaniro, kugira ngw ikīza kive mu bantu." 
2Samuel24:22 Arawuna yishura Dawidi, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, twara ivy’ ugomba vyose, ubitange: eh’ inka ngizo z’ikimazi co kwosa, n’ibisekuzo zikoresha n’ ingōgo zazo mubigire inkwi:" 
2Samuel24:23 ivyo vyose jewe Arawuna ndabiguhaye, mugenzi. Arawuna arongera abarira umwami, at’ Uhoraho Imana yawe ikwākīrire." 
2Samuel24:24 Arik’ umwami yishura Arawuna, ati Na mba: turabigura, nguhe ikiguzi cavyo; sinokwosereza Uhoraho Imana yanje ibimazi ata co binkeheje. Nuko Dawidi agura iyo mbuga n’inka, atanga amashekeli y’ifeza mirongwitanu." 
2Samuel24:25 Maze Dawidi ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro, ahosereza ibimazi, atanga n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe. Nuk’ Uhoraho abona guhangaza ico gihugu, ikīza kirabogozwa mu Bisirayeli." 
1Kings1:1 Umwami Dawidi yar’ ashaje, ageze mu zabukuru; bāri basigaye bamupfuka impuzu ntabe agisusurukirwa." 
1Kings1:2 Bituma abīshikira biwe bamubarira, bati Mwami wacu nyen’ ingoma, ni bakuronderere umwigeme w’inkumi, yamane nawe, akubungabunge, agupfumbatire, kugira ng’ ususurukirwe, mugenzi." 
1Kings1:3 Nuko barondera umwigeme mwiza mu gihugu cose c’Abisirayeli; baronka Abishagi w’i Shunemu, bamuzanira umwami." 
1Kings1:4 Uwo mwigeme yari mwiza w’umunyakaranga; nukw aba uwo kubungabunga umwami, akāma amukorera; ariko ntibāmenyana mu buryo bg’umugabo n’umugore." 
1Kings1:5 Hanyuma Adoniya umwana wa Hagita arishira hejuru, aravuga, ati Ni jewe nzoba umwami. Yironderera imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi, n’abantu mirongwitanu bo kumwiruka imbere." 
1Kings1:6 Kandi se nta ho yigeze amukankamira, ngw amubaze at’ Ivyo ukora ubiterwa n’iki? Kandi Adoniya yar’ umuntu mwiza w’ umunyakaranga, mu nda kwa se ni we yavutse inyuma ya Abusalomu." 
1Kings1:7 Nukw aja inama na Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya, na Abiyatari umuherezi, baramukurikira ngo bamushigikire." 
1Kings1:8 Ariko Sadoki umuherezi na Benaya mwene Yehoyada na Natani uwavugishwa n’Imana na Shimeyi na Reyi na ba bahizi ba Dawidi, ntibāfatanya na Adoniya." 
1Kings1:9 Bukeye Adoniya abāgira intama n’inka n’amashūri y’ibitegetera ku gitandara c’i Zoheleti hahereranye n’i Eni‐rogeli; atumira abana b’umwami bose, ari bo barumuna biwe, n’Abayuda bose bagendanira umwami." 
1Kings1:10 Ariko Natani uwavugishwa n’Imana, na Benaya, na ba bahizi, na Salomo mwene se, bo ntiyabatumira." 
1Kings1:11 Maze Natani abaza Batisheba nyina wa Salomo, at’ Ubgo ntiwumvise ko Adoniya umwana wa Hagita yiyimitse, kandi databuja Dawidi ata co azi?" 
1Kings1:12 None rero, enda ndakugīre inama, kugira ng’ ubone gukiza agatwe kawe n’ak’ umwana wawe Salomo." 
1Kings1:13 Genda ushikīre umwami Dawidi, umubaze, uti Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, uti Mbega ntiwandahiye jewe incoreke yawe, yuko Salomo umwana wanje ari we azokwima ni watanga, akagusubirira ku ngoma? Uti None n’iki gitumye Adoniya ari we yimye?" 
1Kings1:14 Maz’ ukirik’ urabonana n’ umwami, nanje nza kuza ngukurikiye, nemeze ivyo uvuze." 
1Kings1:15 Nuko Batisheba arinjira, aja i kare iy’ umwami ari; kand’ umwami yar’ ashaje cane, Abishagi w’i Shunemu ni we yamukorera." 
1Kings1:16 Maze Batisheba akubita inkoro hasi, yunamira umwami. Umwami aramubaza, at’ Ugomba iki?" 
1Kings1:17 Aramwishura, at’ Urazirikanye, jewe incoreke yawe wandahiye Uhoraho Imana yawe, yuko Salomo umwana wanje ari we azokwima ni watanga, akagusubirira ku ngoma." 
1Kings1:18 Ariko none, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, Adoniya ni we yimye, kandi ntiwabimenye." 
1Kings1:19 Yabāze inka n’ amashūri y’ibitegetera n’intama vy’isinzi, atumira abana bawe bose mugenzi, na Abiyatari umuherezi na Yowabu umugabisha w’ ingabo; arik’ umusavyi wawe Salomo ntiyamutumiye." 
1Kings1:20 None rer’ amaso y’Abisirayeli bose bayahanze wewe, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, kugira ng’ ubamenyeshe ūzosubira ku ngoma yawe ni watanga." 
1Kings1:21 Arik’ utagize ico ukora ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ni wahamvya ba sogokuruza, twe n’umwana wanje Salomo bazotwita abagarariji." 
1Kings1:22 Akirikw arabonana n’umwami, Natani ūvugishwa n’Imana arinjira." 
1Kings1:23 Babarira umwami, bat’ Ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani nguyu hano. Arengutse imbere y’umwami, akubita inkoro hasi, aramwunamira." 
1Kings1:24 Natani abaza umwami, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, mbega ni wewe wavuze yuko Adoniya ari we azokwima ni watanga, akagusubirira ku ngoma?" 
1Kings1:25 Uyu musi ko yamanutse, akabāga inka n’amashūri y’ibitegetera n’intama vy’isinzi, agatumira abana bawe bose mugenzi, n’abagabisha b’ ingabo, na Abiyatari umuherezi; none bakaba bariko bararya, banywa, bar’ imbere yiwe, bavuga ng’ Umwami Adoniya n’ahangame!" 
1Kings1:26 Ariko jewe umusavyi wawe, na Sadoki umuherezi, na Benaya mwene Yehoyada, n’umusavyi wawe Salomo, tweho ntiyadutumiye." 
1Kings1:27 None ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ivyo ni wewe wabigeze, kandi twebge abasavyi bawe ata ho wigeze kutubarira ūzogusubirira ku ngoma ni watanga ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma?" 
1Kings1:28 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aramubarira, ati Mpamagarira Batisheba. Nukw arengutse, ahagarara imbere y’umwami." 
1Kings1:29 Umwami ararahira, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, yagiye andokora mu vyago vyose," 
1Kings1:30 uko nakurahiye Uhoraho Imana ya Isirayeli, yuko Salomo umwana wawe ari we azokwima ni natanga, akansubirira ku ngoma, ni ko ngira ndabishitse uyu musi." 
1Kings1:31 Maze Batisheba akubita inkoro hasi, yunamira umwami Dawidi, aravuga, at’ Uragahora ku ngoma, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
1Kings1:32 Maz’ umwami Dawidi aravuga, ati Ni mumpamagarire Sadoki umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’ Imana Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada. Nuko bararenguka." 
1Kings1:33 Umwami arababarira, ati Ni mujane ingabo zanje, kandi mushire umwana wanje Salomo ku nyumbu yanje bgite, ayigendereko, mumumanukane i Gihoni;" 
1Kings1:34 maze Sadoki umuherezi n’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani baheze bamwimikishirizey’ amavuta, abe umwami w’Abisirayeli; maze muce muvuza inzamba, mut’ Umwami Salomo n’ahangame!" 
1Kings1:35 Muheze mudūge mumugendaniye, aze avyagire ku ntebe yanje y’ubgami; kukw ari we azoba umwami mu gishingo canje, kand’ ari we nyene nageze kw azoba segaba w’Abisirayeli n’Abayuda." 
1Kings1:36 Maze Benaya mwene Yehoyada yishura umwami, ati Ni bibe birtyo: Uhoraho Imana yawe n’ ibishitse, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
1Kings1:37 Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabanye nawe, mwami wanje, abe ari kw azobana na Salomo, atume ingoma yiwe isumburuka iyawe, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma." 
1Kings1:38 Nuko Sadoki umuherezi n’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada n’Abakereti n’Abapeleti bamanukana Salomo, bamushize ku nyumbu y’ umwami Dawidi, bamujana i Gihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Umuherezi Sadoki araheza akūra ihembe ry’amavuta mw Ihema, ayimikisha Salomo; maze bavuza inzamba; abantu bose baravuga, bat’ Umwami Salomo n’ahangame!" 
1Kings1:40 Maz’ abantu bose bamukondorera inyuma, baradūga, bavuza imyironge, basēsereza impundu nyinshi, urwamo rwabo rutuma imisozi yāsīra." 
1Kings1:41 Maze Adoniya n’abatumire biwe bose bari kumwe na we baravyumva, bakiriko baraheza kurya. Yowabu yumvise ijwi ry’inzamba aravuga, at’ Urwo rwamo rwinshi ruri mu gisagara n’urw’ iki?" 
1Kings1:42 Akibivuga, haza Yonatani mwene Abiyatari umuherezi; Adoniya aramubarira, ati Shika, kuk’ ur’ umuntu ameze neza, ntiwobura kuzana inkuru nziza." 
1Kings1:43 Yonatani yishura Adoniya, at’ Eka si ko, ariko segaba umwami Dawidi yimitse Salomo ngw abe umwami." 
1Kings1:44 Kand’ umwami yarungitse Sadoki umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’ Imana Natani na Benaya mwene Yehoyada, bo n’Abakereti n’Abapeleti, bajana na we bamushize ku nyumbu y’umwami;" 
1Kings1:45 kandi Sadoki umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani bamwimikishirije amavuta i Gihoni; ubu baravuyeyo, baradūze basēsereza impundu, igisagara cose n’urwamo rusa. Iyo ni yo ntūrēka mwumvise." 
1Kings1:46 Mbere Salomo yavyagiye ku ntebe y’ubgami. 
1Kings1:47 Bitayekw abantu b’umwami baje guhezagira segaba umwami Dawidi, bat’ Imana yawe itume izina rya Salomo risumburuka iryawe, n’ingoma yiwe isumburuka iyawe. Umwami na we yaciye yunama ku kirwa ciwe;" 
1Kings1:48 mbere yavuze, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ahimbazwe, ampaye uwo kuvyagira ku ntebe yanje nkibona." 
1Kings1:49 Maz’ abatumire ba Adoniya bose baranduka imitima, bava hasi, umuntu wese afata inzira yiwe." 
1Kings1:50 Maze Adoniya atinya Salomo, aca ava hasi, aragenda yumira ku mahembe y’igicaniro." 
1Kings1:51 Nuko babarira Salomo, bati Adoniya yakugiriye ubgoba mugenzi; kuko yagiye kwumira ku mahembe y’igicaniro, at’ Umwami Salomo andahire uyu musi kw atanyicisha inkota, jewe umusavyi wiwe." 
1Kings1:52 Maze Salomo aravuga, ati Ni yaboneka kw ameze neza, nta n’agashatsi na kamwe kiwe kazohara ngo gakorokere hasi; ariko ni hagira ikibi kimubonekako, azopfa." 
1Kings1:53 Nuk’ umwami Salomo atuma abamukūra ku gicaniro. Nukw araza yikubita imbere y’ umwami Salomo. Salomo aramubarira, ati Ni witahire." 
1Kings2:1 Igihe ca Dawidi co gutanga kigira gishike, abarira umwana wiwe Salomo ivyo azokora," 
1Kings2:2 ati Ngiye kujana inzira ab’ isi bose bajana; nuko shikama, ube umugabo nya mugabo." 
1Kings2:3 Uze wumvire ivyo Uhoraho Imana yawe yageze, ugendere mu nzira ziwe, witondere ivyo yashinze, n’amabgirizwa yiwe, n’amateka yiwe, n’ivyo yihanikirije, nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose, kugira ng’ ugire ikiganza ciza mu vy’uzokora vyose n’ah’ uzoja hose;" 
1Kings2:4 ng’ Uhoraho az’ ashitse ijambo yamvuzeko, kw abana banje ni bitonda mu ngeso zabo, bakagendera imbere yiwe mu vy’ukuri, uhereye mu vyiyumviro vyabo no mu mitima yabo, yavuze ngo ntihazobura mu banje uwo kuja ku ngoma y’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings2:5 Ikindi, urazi ivyo Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya yangiriye, n’ivyo yagiriye ba bagabisha bompi b’ingabo z’Abisirayeli, Abuneri mwene Neri na Amasa mwene Yeteri, abo yishe, amaraso yaviriye mu ntambara akayahōra mu gihe c’impore, akīyandurisha amaraso y’abatācumuye, akamutarukira ku mukanda no ku nkweto." 
1Kings2:6 Ubgenge bgawe buze bukurōngōre mu vyo uzomugirira, ariko ntuze wemere kw azomanukana imvi ziwe ngw aje mu mva amahoro." 
1Kings2:7 Ariko bene Baruzilayi Umugileyadi uz’ ubagirire neza, ubashire mu barīra ku meza yawe; kuko na bo bangiriye neza igihe nari narahunze mukurwawe Abusalomu." 
1Kings2:8 Mugabo harih’ uwundi ngaho, ni Shimeyi mwene Gera, Umubenyamini w’i Bahurimu, yantutse ibitutsi bibi, umusi naja i Mahanayimu; ariko hanyuma amanuka kuri Yorodani kunsanganira, ndamurahira Uhoraho yuko ntazomwicisha inkota." 
1Kings2:9 Ariko rero wewe ntuz’ ugende utamuhannye; kuk’ ur’ umunyabgenge, uzomenya uk’ ukwiye kumugenza; uz’ utume amanuka mu mva imvi ziwe zirikw ibitenga vy’amaraso." 
1Kings2:10 Nuko Dawidi ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa i we." 
1Kings2:11 Kand’ imyaka Dawidi yamaze ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli yari mirongwine, kuko yamaze imyaka ndwi aganziriza i Heburoni, akamara n’ iyindi mirongwitatu n’itatu i Yerusalemu." 
1Kings2:12 Nuko Salomo asubira ku ngoma ya se Dawidi, ubgami bgiwe burahangama." 
1Kings2:13 Maze Adoniya umwana wa Hagita ashikīra Batisheba nyina wa Salomo. Batisheba aramubaza, at’ Ugenzwa n’ amahoro? Na we at’ Ego me n’ amahoro." 
1Kings2:14 Kand’ ati Ndagusavye ijambo. Na we at’ Ego me vuga. 
1Kings2:15 Aramubarira, at’ Urazi yukw ingoma yar’ iyanje, kukw Abisirayeli bose bari bampanze amaso, ngo ni jewe nzoba umwami. Ariko hanyuma ingoma irahinduka, iba iya murumunanje, kuk’ Uhoraho ari we yayimuhaye." 
1Kings2:16 None rero, har’ ico ngusaba: kandi ntukinyime. Aramwishura, ati Kivuge." 
1Kings2:17 Aramubarira, ati Ndakwinginze, nsabira umwami Salomo, kukw adashobora kukwima, ampe Abishagi w’i Shunemu, ndamucūre." 
1Kings2:18 Batisheba aramwishura, ati Nuko, ndakuvugira ku mwami." 
1Kings2:19 Nuko Batisheba aragenda ashikīra umwami Salomo, kugira ngw avugire Adoniya. Umwami aca ahaguruka ngw amusanganire, aramwunamira; araheza asubira kuvyagira ku ntebe y’ubgami, avuga ko bazanira umugabekazi intebe; nuk’ umugabekazi yicara i buryo bgiwe." 
1Kings2:20 Aravuga, ati Har’ ico ngusaba gitoya, ntukinyime. Umwami aramwishura, ati Kimbarire nyina wanje, sindakikwima." 
1Kings2:21 Aramubgira, ati Adoniya mukurwawe n’ahabge Abishagi w’i Shunemu, amucūre." 
1Kings2:22 Arik’ umwami Salomo yishura nyina, ati N’iki gitumye usabira Adoniya Abishagi w’i Shunemu? Erega n’umusabire n’ingoma, kukw ari mukurwanje! Mber’ uyisabire na Abiyatari umuherezi na Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya!" 
1Kings2:23 Maz’ umwami Salomo arahira Uhoraho, at’ Ijambo Adoniya avuze, ni ritamucisha umutwe, Imana iz’ ibimpanire, kandi birushirije!" 
1Kings2:24 Nuko rero ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho yanshize ku ngoma ya data Dawidi, akantereka, akampindura inzu nk’uko yasezeranye, n’ukuri uyu musi Adoniya akagenda batamwishe!" 
1Kings2:25 Nuk’ umwami Salomo arungika Benaya mwene Yehoyada, amutsindaho, arapfa." 
1Kings2:26 Maz’ umwami abarira Abiyatari umuherezi, ati Hoji genda, subira i Anatoti mw ishamvu yawe; war’ ukwiye gupfa, arik’ ubu sinkwica, kuko wagenda ureruye isandugu y’Uhoraho Imana imbere ya data Dawidi, kandi kuko wababarana na we mu vyamubabaje vyose." 
1Kings2:27 Uko ni ko Salomo yirukanye Abiyatari mu buherezi bg’Uhoraho, ngw ashitse ijambo Uhoraho yari yaravuze ku nzu ya Eli i Shilo." 
1Kings2:28 Nukw inkuru zishika kuri Yowabu; kandi Yowabu yari yarafatanije na Adoniya, nah’ atāfatanije na Abusalomu. Nukw aca ahungira mw Ihema ry’ Uhoraho, yumira ku mahembe y’igicaniro." 
1Kings2:29 Maze babgira umwami Salomo, bati Yowabu yahungiye mw Ihema ry’Uhoraho, ubu ari ku gicaniro. Nuko Salomo arungika Benaya mwene Yehoyada, aramubarira, ati Genda umwice." 
1Kings2:30 Nuko Benaya aragenda, aja mw Ihema ry’Uhoraho, aramubarira, at’ Umwami agize ngo Sohoka. Na we at’ Ekaye, ndagwa ngaha. Nuko Benaya aragenda, abarira umwami ivyo Yowabu yavuze n’ingene yamwishuye." 
1Kings2:31 Umwami aramubarira, ati Genda ubigenze uko yavuze, umutsindeho, umuhambe, kugira ng’ ukūre kuri jewe no ku nzu ya data amaraso yavishije adafise inyanduruko." 
1Kings2:32 Uhoraho aza kuba amushubije ku mutwe amaraso ya ba bantu babiri yatsindaho, akabicisha inkota, data Dawidi atabizi, kand’ ar’ abantu bamurusha kugororoka no gutungana, ni bo Abuneri mwene Neri, umugabisha w’ingabo z’Abisirayeli, na Amasa mwene Yeteri, umugabisha w’ingabo z’Abayuda." 
1Kings2:33 Uko ni kw amaraso yabo azosubira ku mutwe wa Yowabu no ku mitwe y’uruvyaro rwiwe ibihe vyose; ariko kuri Dawidi n’uruvyaro rwiwe n’inzu yiwe n’ingoma yiwe hazoba amahoro ava k’Uhoraho ibihe vyose. 
1Kings2:34 Nuko Benaya mwene Yehoyada aradūga, amutsindaho, aramwica; bamuhamba mu rugo rwiwe bgite rwari mu bugaragwa." 
1Kings2:35 Maz’ umwami ashira Benaya mwene Yehoyada mu gishingo ca Yowabu ngw abe umugabisha w’ingabo, ashira na Sadoki umuherezi mu gishingo ca Abiyatari." 
1Kings2:36 Maz’ umwami atumiza Shimeyi, aramubarira, ati Ni wiyubakire inzu i Yerusalemu, uyibemwo, ntuz’ uyivemwo ng’ ugire ahandi uja na hamwe." 
1Kings2:37 Umusi wayivuyemwo, ukajabuka umugezi Kidironi, umenye neza k’ utazobura gupfa; amaraso yawe azoba ari wewe aja ku mutwe." 
1Kings2:38 Shimeyi yishura umwami, at’ Ivyo umbgiye ni vyiza; uk’ uvuze, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, ni ko nzobigenza, jewe umusavyi wawe. Nuko Shimeyi aba i Yerusalemu igihe kirekire." 
1Kings2:39 Hahise imyaka itatu, abagurano babiri ba Shimeyi baracika, baja kwa Akishi mwene Mayaka umwami w’i Gati. Bukeye babarira Shimeyi, bati Ba bagurano bawe bar’ i Gati." 
1Kings2:40 Shimeyi arahaguruka, ashira amatandiko ku ndogoba yiwe, aja i Gati kwa Akishi kurondera abagurano biwe; nukw aragenda abakūra i Gati." 
1Kings2:41 Maze Salomo abarirwa ko Shimeyi yavuye i Yerusalemu akaja i Gati, akagaruka." 
1Kings2:42 Nuk’ umwami atumiza Shimeyi, aramubaza, ati Mbega sinakwatse indahiro y’Uhoraho, nkakwihanikiriza rwose, nt’ Umenye neza yuk’ umusi uzovayo, ukagira ah’ ucarukira na hamwe, k’utazobura gupfa? Ukanyishura yukw ivyo mvuze ari vyiza, k’ uvyumvise?" 
1Kings2:43 None n’iki cakubujije kwitondera indahiro y’ Uhoraho n’icagezwe naguhaye? 
1Kings2:44 Umwami atakw abarira Shimeyi, at’ Urazi mu mutima wawe ibibi vyose wakoreye data Dawidi, ni co gituma ivyo bibi vyawe Uhoraho agira abigusubize ku mutwe." 
1Kings2:45 Ariko jewe umwami Salomo nzohabga umugisha, kand’ ingoma ya Dawidi izohangama imbere y’ Uhoraho ibihe vyose." 
1Kings2:46 Nuk’ umwami agera Benaya mwene Yehoyada kumwica; na we arasohoka, amutsindaho, arapfa. Uko ni ko Salomo yahangamye ku ngoma." 
1Kings3:1 Maze Salomo asabira Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, arongora umukobga wiwe, amujana mu gisagara ca Dawidi, gushitsa amaze kwubaka ingoro yiwe bgite n’ ingoro y’Uhoraho, n’uruzitiro rwo kuzitirira i Yerusalemu impande zose." 
1Kings3:2 Kand’ ico gihe abantu bātangira ibimazi ku mpinga z’ imisozi; kuko gushitsa ico gihe ata ngoro bāribgubakire izina ry’ Uhoraho. 
1Kings3:3 Kandi Salomo yakunda Uhoraho, akagendera mu mabgirizwa ya se Dawidi, mugabo yatangira ibimazi ku mpinga z’ imisozi, akahosereza imibavu." 
1Kings3:4 Bukeye umwami Salomo aja i Gibeyoni gutangiray’ ibimazi, kukw ari ho hari hakuru ku zindi mpinga z’imisozi; nuko yosereza ku gicaniro caho ibimazi igihumbi." 
1Kings3:5 Kandi Salomo akir’ i Gibeyoni, Uhoraho amwiyerekera mu nzozi mw ijoro. Nukw Imana iramubarira, iti Nsaba ico ugomba, ndakiguhe." 
1Kings3:6 Salomo arishura, ati Wagiriye neza cane data, umusavyi wawe Dawidi, kuko yagendera imbere yawe mu vy’ukuri no mu vy’ukugororoka, agutunganiye mu mutima wiwe, kand’ ukaba waramugereye kuzomugirira neza cane nk’uku, ukamuha umwana wo kumusubirira ku ngoma, nk’uko bir’ uyu musi." 
1Kings3:7 Nuko none, Uhoraho Mana yanje, jewe umusavyi wawe wanyimitse mu gishingo ca data Dawidi, naho nkir’ umwana muto gusa; sinzi iyo bija n’iyo biva." 
1Kings3:8 Kandi jewe umusavyi wawe ndi hagati mu bantu bawe watoranije, ihanga rihambaye, ritoharūrika canke ngo rimenywe ubginshi bgaryo." 
1Kings3:9 None rero, jewe umusavyi wawe, n’umpe umutima w’ubgenge, nshobore gucira abantu bawe imanza, mmenye gutandukanya ikibi n’iciza. None ni nde yoshobora gucira imanza iri hanga ryawe rihambaye?" 
1Kings3:10 Maze binezereza Uhoraho yuko Salomo asavye ivyo. 
1Kings3:11 Nukw Imana iramubarira, it’ Ivyo kw ari vyo usavye, ukaba udasavye kuramba, canke ng’ usabe ubutunzi, canke ng’ usabe kw abansi bawe bapfa; arik’ ukaba wisabiye ubgenge bgo guca imanza neza;" 
1Kings3:12 nuko nkugiriye nk’uk’ usavye: ehe nguhaye umutima w’ubgenge wo gutahura, ata we muhwanye mu bākwitangiye imbere canke mu bazoguherukira." 
1Kings3:13 Kandi nguhaye n’ico utansavye: nguhaye ubutunzi n’icubahiro, bitume ata mwami n’umwe azohwana nawe igihe cose ukiriho." 
1Kings3:14 Kandi ni wagendera mu nzira zanje, ukitondera amabgirizwa yanje n’ivyagezwe vyanje, nk’uko so Dawidi yagenjeje, nzoguha kuramba." 
1Kings3:15 Maze Salomo aribambura, amenya kw ar’ inzozi. Maz’ aja i Yerusalemu, ahagarara imbere y’isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, ahosereza ibimazi, ahatangira n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe, atumirira abantu biwe bose amazimano." 
1Kings3:16 Bukeye ba maraya babiri baza ku mwami, bahagarara imbere yiwe." 
1Kings3:17 Umwe muri bo aravuga, at’ Urazirikanye mugenzi; jewe n’uyu mugore tubana mu nzu imwe; bukeye mvyara umwana turi kumwe mu nzu." 
1Kings3:18 Mmaze imisi itatu mvyaye, uyu mugore na we aravyara; kandi twari twenyene, ata muntu wundi yari kumwe natwe mu nzu, atari twebge twempi gusa." 
1Kings3:19 Hanyuma umwana w’uyu mugore ahenga mw ijoro arapfa, nyina yamuryamyeko." 
1Kings3:20 Na we aca avyuka mu gicugu, ankūra umwana i ruhande nsinziriye, jewe umusavyi wawe, amuryamika mu gikiriza ciwe, wa wundi yapfuye amuryamika mu gikiriza canje." 
1Kings3:21 Ngo mvyuke kwonsa umwana bugira buce, nsanga yapfuye; ariko bukeye ndamwitegereje, nsanga si we w’iwanje navyaye." 
1Kings3:22 Uwundi mugore aramwishura, ati Na mba! Ūkomeye ni we w’ iwanje, na we uwapfuye ni rwawe. Uno na we at’ Eka na mba! Uwapfuye ni we mwana wawe, ūgikomeye ni we w’iwanje. Uko ni ko bābūraniye imbere y’umwami." 
1Kings3:23 Nuk’ umwami aravuga, ati Mbega k’umwe avuga, ng’ Ūkomeye ni we w’iwanje, ngo Na we uwapfuye ni we w’iwawe; uwundi akavuga, ati Na mba! Uwapfuye ni we w’iwawe, ūgikomeye ni we w’iwanje!" 
1Kings3:24 Umwami arongera aravuga, ati Ni munzanire inkota. Bayizana imbere y’ umwami." 
1Kings3:25 Maz’ umwami aravuga, at’ Uwo mwana akomeye ni mumucemwo kubiri, igihimba kimwe mugihe umwe, ikindi mugihe uwundi." 
1Kings3:26 Nuko wa mugore nyina w’umwana akomeye, kuko mu mutima yar’ afise ikibabarwe c’umwana wiwe, abarira umwami, at’ Ewe mugenzi! Uyo mwana akomeye pfuma umumuha, ntumwice na gatoya. Ariko wa wundi ati Ni mumucemwo kubiri, tumubure twempi." 
1Kings3:27 Maz’ umwami araheza aravuga, at’ Uwo mwana akomeye ntimumwice na gatoya, mumuhe urya, kukw ari we nyina." 
1Kings3:28 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bumvise uk’ umwami yaciye urwo rubanza, baca baramutinya, kuko bābonye k’ubgenge buva ku Mana buri muri we bgo guca imanza." 
1Kings4:1 Umwami Salomo yar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli bose. 
1Kings4:2 Kand’ aba ni bo baganwa biwe: Azariya mwene Sadoki umuherezi; 
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahiya bene Shisha bar’ abakarani; Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ ivyaja biraba; 
1Kings4:4 Benaya mwene Yehoyada yar’ umugabisha w’ ingabo; Sadoki na Abiyatari ni bo bar’ abaherezi; 
1Kings4:5 Azariya mwene Natani yar’ umukuru w’ abamenyekana; Zabudi mwene Natani nyene yar’ umuherezi kandi yar’ umukunzi w’umwami; 
1Kings4:6 Ahishari yar’ umubgiriza wo mu rugo; Adoniramu mwene Abuda ni we yagaba ivy’ abanyabikebere. 
1Kings4:7 Kand’ umwami Salomo yar’ afise abamenyekana cumi na babiri bakwiragiye mu Bgisirayeli hose, kugira ngo bame bamutoreza ivyo kumutunga bo n’abo mu rugo rwiwe; umuntu wese yar’ afise ukwezi kumwe mu mwaka kwo kubitoza." 
1Kings4:8 Aya ni yo mazina yabo: mwene Huri yatoza ivyo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu; 
1Kings4:9 na mwene Dekeri yatoza ivy’ i Makasi n’i Shalibimo n’i Beti‐shemeshi n’i Eloni‐beti‐hanani; 
1Kings4:10 na mwene Hesedi yatoza ivy’ i Aruboti, akaganza n’i Sokoho n’intāra yose y’i Heferi;" 
1Kings4:11 na mwene Abinadabu yatoza ivyo mu misozi yose ihagaze y’i Dori, kandi yar’ afise umukobga wa Salomo yitwa Tafati;" 
1Kings4:12 na Bayana mwene Ahiludi yatoza ivy’ i Tanaki n’i Megido, n’i Beti‐sheyani hose hahereranye n’i Zaretani hepfo y’i Yezireli, uhereye i Beti‐sheyani nyene ugaca i Abeli‐mehola ukarinda ushika hirya y’i Yokumeyamu;" 
1Kings4:13 na mwene Geberi yatoza ivy’ i Ramoti‐gileyadi, akaganza n’ibisagara vya Yayiri mwene Manase vyar’ i Gileyadi nyene, bo n’intāra y’i Arugobu i Bashani yarimw’ ibisagara mirongwitandatu bikomeye, bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, vyugazwa ibihindizo vy’imiringa;" 
1Kings4:14 na Ahinadabu mwene Ido yatoza ivy’ i Mahanayimu; 
1Kings4:15 na Ahimasi yatoza ivy’ Abanafutali, yari yarongoye Basemati umukobga wa Salomo;" 
1Kings4:16 na Bayana mwene Hushayi yatoza ivy’ Abasheri n’ivy’ i Beyaloti; 
1Kings4:17 na Yehoshafati mwene Paruwa yatoza ivy’ Abisakari; 
1Kings4:18 na Shimeyi mwene Ela yatoza ivy’ Ababenyamini; 
1Kings4:19 na Gebera mwene Uri yatoza ivyo mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi, mu ntāra yar’ iya Sihoni umwami w’Abamori na Ogi umwami w’i Bashani; hār’ umumenyekana umwe gusa yatoza ivyo mur’ ico gihugu." 
1Kings4:20 Kand’ Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bār’ isinzi, bangana n’umusenyi wo mw isēsero ry’ikiyaga; kandi bārarya, bāranywa, bakanezerwa." 
1Kings4:21 Kandi Salomo yaganza ibihugu vyose vy’abami, uhereye kuri rwa ruzi Efurate, ugashitsa ku gihugu c’Abafilisitiya ukagarukira ku rubibe rwa Egiputa, bakāma bamuzanira amashikanwa, bakamusaba, igihe cose yabaye ku ngoma." 
1Kings4:22 Ivyāgaburwa kwa Salomo ku musi ku musi vyar’ ibi: ingero zitwa koro mirongwitatu z’ifu igogōretse, n’ingero mirongwitandatu z’ayandi mafu;" 
1Kings4:23 n’ibimasa cumi vyagaburiwe neza, n’ ibindi mirongwibiri vyirishiriza, n’intama ijana, ukūyemw’ impongo n’ingeregere n’amafumberi, bo n’inkoko zagaburiwe neza." 
1Kings4:24 Kuko yaganza igihugu cose co hakuno ya rwa ruzi Efurate, uhereye i Tifusa ugashitsa i Gaza, akaganza n’abami bose bo hakuno yarwo, kandi yabana amahoro n’ ibihugu vyose bimukikije;" 
1Kings4:25 nukw Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bībēra amahoro, umuntu wese mu mizabibu yiwe no mu misukoni yiwe, uhereye i Dani ugashitsa i Beri‐sheba, igihe cose Salomo yari ku ngoma." 
1Kings4:26 Kandi Salomo yar’ afise impongore ibihumbi bine z’amafarasi yakwega imikogote yiwe, n’abantu bagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri." 
1Kings4:27 Nukw abo bamenyekana bama batoza ivyo gutunga umwami Salomo n’abaza kurīra ku meza yiwe bose, umuntu wese uk’ ukwezi kwiwe gutashe; nta kintu na kimwe bāhaza ngo kibure." 
1Kings4:28 Kandi bama bazana na sayiri n’ivyarire vy’amafarasi akwega imikogote n’ayandi yo kwirukako, nk’uko vyashinzwe, bakabizana aho bikwiye kuja." 
1Kings4:29 Nukw Imana iha Salomo ubgenge n’ubuhanga bginshi cane, n’ umutima wagutse, nk’ukw isēsero ry’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga ryagutse." 
1Kings4:30 Ubgenge bga Salomo bgāruta ubg’ abanyabgenge bose b’i burasirazuba n’ubg’ Abanyegiputa bgose. 
1Kings4:31 Yarusha abandi bantu bose ubgenge, yarusha na Etani Umwezerahi, na Hemani na Kalukoli na Darada, bene Maholi; mbere yaravugangwa mu mahanga yose amukikije." 
1Kings4:32 Yigeneye imigani ibihumbi bitatu, n’indirimbo igihumbi na zitanu." 
1Kings4:33 Yar’ azi kudondora ivy’ ibiti, uhereye kw isederi y’i Lebanoni ugashitsa kuri ezobu imera ku mazu; yar’ azi no kudondora ivy’ ibikōko n’ ibisīga n’ivyikwega hasi n’amafi." 
1Kings4:34 Nukw abantu bakava mu mahanga yose bazanywe no kwumva ubgenge bga Salomo, barungitswe n’abami bose bo mw isi bumvise ivy’ ubgenge bgiwe." 
1Kings5:1 Hiramu umwami w’i Tiro yumvise ko bimikishije Salomo amavuta ngw asubire ku ngoma ya se, amutumakw intumwa, kuk’ uhereye kera Hiramu yakundana na Dawidi." 
1Kings5:2 Nuko Salomo atuma kwishura Hiramu," 
1Kings5:3 ut’ Urazi ko se Dawidi atābonye uburyo bgo kwubaka ingoro y’izina ry’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe, kubg’ intambara z’abansi biwe zari zimuturutse irya n’ino, uti Gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho yabashiriye musi y’ibirenge vyiwe." 
1Kings5:4 Ut’ Ariko we, Uhoraho Imana yiwe amuhaye impore impande zose; uti Nta murwanizi nta n’agakakaza." 
1Kings5:5 Uti Non’ afise imigabo yo kwubaka ingoro y’izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, uti Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabariye se wiwe Dawidi, at’ Umwana wawe nzosubiza ku ngoma yawe ni we azonyubakira ingoro y’izina ryanje." 
1Kings5:6 Uti None rer’ umubaririre abamwicirira ibiti vy’ amasederi i Lebanoni, uti Kand’ abantu biwe bazofatanya n’abawe; uti Kand’ azoguha ingero z’abakozi bawe uk’ uzozicīra kwose; uti Kuk’ uzi yukw ata n’umwe mu b’i wabo azi kwicira ibiti nk’Abasidoni." 
1Kings5:7 Nuko Hiramu yumvise amajambo ya Salomo aranezerwa cane, aravuga, at’ Uyu musi Uhoraho ashemagizwe, kuko yahaye Dawidi umwana w’incabgenge wo kuganza iryo hanga rihambaye." 
1Kings5:8 Nuko Hiramu atuma kuri Salomo, uti Yumvise ivyo umutumyeko; uti Nukw azogukorera ivyo wamusavye vyose ku vy’ibiti vy’amasederi no ku vy’ akajwari." 
1Kings5:9 Ut’ Abantu biwe bazobikūra i Lebanoni, babimanukane babishikane ku kiyaga; uti Bishitseyo azobitekera imbambo, abicīshe mu kiyaga, ut’ Abishikane ah’ uzomurangira, babitekururireho, uti Nawe abe ari ho uzovyākīrira. Uti Nawe ni watanga ivyo kugaburira abo mu rugo rwiwe, uzoba uhaye." 
1Kings5:10 Nuko Hiramu aha Salomo ibiti vy’amasederi n’ivy’ akajwari, nk’uko yagomba kwose." 
1Kings5:11 Salomo na we agaha Hiramu ingano ingero zitwa koro ibihumbi mirongwibiri zo kugaburira abo mu rugo rwiwe, n’amavuta akūwe muri elayo zisekuwe ingero mirongwibiri. Uko ni ko Salomo yaha Hiramu uk’ umwaka utashe." 
1Kings5:12 Nuk’ Uhoraho aha Salomo ubgenge nk’uko yamusezeraniye, na we abana amahoro na Hiramu, basezerana isezerano ryo gufatanya." 
1Kings5:13 Maz’ umwami Salomo atoza abantu bo kuba abanyabikebere mu Bisirayeli hose; abo yatoje baba ibihumbi mirongwitatu. 
1Kings5:14 Akāma abarungika i Lebanoni, bagahāna imbu, ibihumbi icumi‐icumi mu kwezi, bakamara ukwezi kumwe i Lebanoni, abiri bakayamara i muhira. Adoniramu ni we yagaba ivy’ abo banyabikebere." 
1Kings5:15 Kandi Salomo yari yarashizeh’ abantu ibihumbi mirongwirindwi bāshinzwe ivyo kwikorera, n’abandi ibihumbi mirongumunani bāshinzwe kubāza amabuye ku misozi;" 
1Kings5:16 udashizemw’ abakoresha biwe bakuru bākoresha ivyo bikorwa, ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana atatu, bāgaba abo bakozi." 
1Kings5:17 Nuk’ umwami agera ko bimba amabuye manini‐manini y’igiciro kinini, kugira ngw itanguriro ry’iyo ngoro ryubakishwe amabuye abājwe." 
1Kings5:18 Maz’ abubatsi ba Salomo n’aba Hiramu n’Abagebali barayabāza, batunganya ibiti n’amabuye, kugira ngo bavyubakishe iyo ngoro." 
1Kings6:1 Maz’ imyaka amajana ane na mirongumunani ishize, uhereye igihe Abisirayeli baviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, Salomo atangura kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho, hāri mu mwaka ugira kane ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa Zivu, ari kwo kwezi kwa kabiri." 
1Kings6:2 Iyo ngoro umwami Salomo yubakiye Uhoraho, uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri, uburebure bgayo bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu." 
1Kings6:3 Urubaraza ruherereye imbere y’Ahēra h’iyo ngoro, uburebure bgarwo bg’ amakika bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri, nk’uk’ ubgaguke bg’iyo ngoro bgangana; ubgaguke bgarwo bgar’ amatambge cumi." 
1Kings6:4 Iyo ngoro ayishiramw’ amadirisha y’ inshingo zikomeye. 
1Kings6:5 Mu mbavu z’iyo ngoro ahōmeka utwumba tugerekeranye, dukikuje iyo ngoro yose uhereye Ahēra n’Ahēra Cane; uko ni ko yubatse utwumba tuyikikuje." 
1Kings6:6 Utwumba two hasi, ubgaguke bgatwo bgar’ amatambge atanu; utwo hagati ubgaguke bgatwo bgar’ atandatu; utwa gatatu, ubgaguke bgatwo bgar’ indwi; ku gisika c’iyo ngoro ahahera inyuma, yagenda asiga ahaniguye impande zose, kugira ngw imbaho z’utwo twumba ntizinjire mu gisika c’iyo ngoro." 
1Kings6:7 Mw iyubaka ry’iyo ngoro bayubakishije amabuye yatunganirijwe aho bayimvye; nta nyundo cank’ incabiti cank’ ikindi kintu cose c’icuma cumvikana mur’ iryo yubakwa ryayo. 
1Kings6:8 Umuryango w’utwumba two hasi wari ku ruhande rw’i buryo rw’iyo ngoro; abāja mu twumba two hagati bāca ku curirizo cihotaguye mu gushikayo, bahavuye bagashika mu twa gatatu." 
1Kings6:9 Uko ni ko yubatse iyo ngoro, arayuzuza; ayimanikisha ibishōro n’imbaho vy’amasederi." 
1Kings6:10 Twa twumba yometse kur’ iyo ngoro impande zose, kamwe‐kamwe uburebure bgako bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; twari twubatswe ku myaro y’amasederi ifashe kur’ iyo ngoro." 
1Kings6:11 Bukeye ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Salomo," 
1Kings6:12 riti Ku vy’ iyi ngoro urik’ urubaka, ni wagendera mu vyo nashinze, ugashitsa amabgirizwa yanje, ukitondera ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, ukaba ari vyo ugenderamwo, nanje nzokomeza ijambo ryanje kuri wewe, iryo navuganye na so Dawidi." 
1Kings6:13 Kandi nzoba mu Bisirayeli, sinzoheba abantu banje." 
1Kings6:14 Uko ni ko Salomo yubatse iyo ngoro, arayuzuza." 
1Kings6:15 Imbere ku bisika vy’iyo ngoro ahōmeka imbaho z’amasederi; uhereye hasi ugashitsa ku myaro y’urusenge, imbere hose ahōmeka imbaho; kandi hasi ahasasa imbaho z’akajwari." 
1Kings6:16 Haruguru imbere mur’ iyo ngoro ahōmeka imbaho z’ amasederi kumara amatambge mirongwibiri, uhereye hasi ugashitsa ku myaro; aho hantu imbere haruguru arahakīngīra kugira ngo habe ahantu hiherereye, habe Ahēra Cane." 
1Kings6:17 Ingoro isigaye hino y’Ahēra Cane yar’ amatambge mirongwine; ni yo yitwa Ahēra. 
1Kings6:18 Hose imbere mur’ iyo ngoro hāri hōmetse imbaho z’ amasederi zisharijwekw ibishushanyo vy’uturende n’amashurwe asambuye; hose zar’ imbaho z’ amasederi, nta buye ryaboneka." 
1Kings6:19 Nukw atunganya Ahēra Cane aho nyene imbere haruguru mur’ iyo ngoro, kugira ngw ahatereke isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho." 
1Kings6:20 Kand’ Ahēra Cane, amakika yaho yar’ amatambge mirongwibiri, n’ubgaguke bgaho bgari mirongwibiri, n’uburebure bg’igihagararo na bgo bgari mirongwibiri nyene. Hose ahōmekakw izahabu iramuye, abāza n’igicaniro mw isederi, na co acomekakw izahabu, agitereka imbere y’Ahēra Cane." 
1Kings6:21 Nuko ku ngoro imbere hose ahōmekakw izahabu iramuye, araheza atambika iminyororo y’izahabu imbere y’Ahēra Cane." 
1Kings6:22 Nuko ku ngoro hose yahōmetse izahabu kugeza ingoro yose ihwanye; na ca gicaniro c’imbere y’ Ahēra Cane na co yacometsekw izahabu hose. 
1Kings6:23 Abāza mu biti vy’imyelayo ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi bibiri vyo gushira Ahēra Cane, uburebure bgavyo bgar’ amatambge cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
1Kings6:24 Uburebure bg’ibaba rimwe ry’umukerubi bgar’ amatambge atanu, n’irindi baba n’uko: uhereye kw isonga ry’ibaba rimwe ukageza ku ry’irindi yar’ amatambge cumi." 
1Kings6:25 Igishushanyo c’ umukerubi ca kabiri uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge cumi nyene; abo bakerubi bompi bārangana cabugerwe, kandi n’ishusho yabo yar’ imwe." 
1Kings6:26 Uburebure bg’umukerubi umwe bgar’ amatambge cumi, n’ubg’ uwundi kuno nyene." 
1Kings6:27 Nukw atereka abo bakerubi aho nyene haruguru mur’ iyo ngoro; amababa yabo yar’ ashānje, ibaba ry’umwe ryaruma ku nzu ku ruhande rumwe, iry’ uwundi ku rundi ruhande, yandi abiri agasomanira hagati mu nzu." 
1Kings6:28 Kand’ abo bakerubi abomekakw izahabu. 
1Kings6:29 Ku nzu hose imbere mur’ iyo ngoro ahabāzira ibishushanyo vy’ abakerubi n’ivy’ ibigazi n’ivy’ amashurwe asambuye, imbere haruguru no hino." 
1Kings6:30 No hasi mur’ iyo ngoro ahōmeka izahabu, imbere haruguru no hino." 
1Kings6:31 Umuryango uja Ahēra Cane awushirakw inzugi z’imbaho z’ imyelayo; uwo muryango, hakora ikibambāsi co hejuru n’ibishimaryango, watwaye umwanya w’ikigiragatanu c’umukingo waho." 
1Kings6:32 Kand’ abāza inzugi zibiri mu mbaho z’imyelayo, mu kuzibāza azishushanyakw ibishushanyo vy’ abakerubi n’ivy’ ibigazi n’ivy’ amashurwe asambuye, azomekakw izahabu, ayiyagiriza no kur’ ivyo bishushanyo vy’abakerubi no ku vy’ibigazi." 
1Kings6:33 Akora ibishimaryango vy’ urwinjiriro rw’urusengero mu biti vy’imyelayo, uwo muryango utwara umwanya w’ikigirakane c’urwo ruhande;" 
1Kings6:34 akora n’inzugi zaho zibiri mu mbaho z’akajwari; urugi rumwe iyo buguruye, imbaho zarwo zompi zarīzinga, n’iz’ urwa kabiri zīzinga kuno nyene." 
1Kings6:35 Kandi mu kuzibāza azishushanyakw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi n’ivy’ ibigazi n’ivy’ amashurwe asambuye, azomekakw izahabu ayikuyengeza no kur’ ivyo bishushanyo." 
1Kings6:36 Urugo rw’inyubakwa arwubakisha amabuye abājwe imirongo itatu igerekeranye, n’uwundi murongo w’ibiti bibājwe vy’amasederi." 
1Kings6:37 Igihe bātanguriye kwubaka itanguriro ry’iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho hāri mu mwaka ugira kane Salomo ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa Zivu." 
1Kings6:38 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe, mu kwezi kwa Bulu, ari kwo kwezi kw’umunani, barangiza iyo ngoro n’ivyayo vyose, nk’ukw icitegererezo cayo cose cari kimeze. Nuko yamaze imyaka ndwi ayubaka." 
1Kings7:1 Maze Salomo yubaka iyiwe ngoro; amara imyaka cumi n’itatu mu kw arangiza vyose. 
1Kings7:2 Yubatse inzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni, uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitanu, uburebure bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu; yar’ itezwe n’inkingi z’ amasederi zinegagiwe mu mirongo itatu, zitambitswekw imyaro y’ amasederi nyene." 
1Kings7:3 Adondekanya imbaho z’amasederi kur’ iyo myaro itambitswe kur’ izo nkingi mirongwine na zitanu uko zinegagiye ar’ icumi‐icumi na zitanu mu murongo. 
1Kings7:4 Atambika imbaho z’intumba mu mirongo itatu, zihānye imyanya irimw’ amadirisha mu mirongo itatu nyene, idirisha rirābana n’irindi." 
1Kings7:5 Inzugi zose, uburebure bgazo n’ubgaguke vyari kimwe, n’amadirisha n’uko; kand’ idirisha ryārābana n’irindi mur’ iyo mirongo ukw ar’ itatu." 
1Kings7:6 Yubaka n’urubaraza rufise inkingi, uburebure bgarwo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgarwo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu; imbere yarwo ahashira akandi kabaraza gafise inkingi nyene n’ingazi y’amabuye imanuka ija hanze." 
1Kings7:7 Yubaka n’inzu yo guciramw’ imanza, ayishiramw’ intebe y’ ubgami; ahōmeka imbaho z’ amasederi uhereye hasi ugashitsa ku myaro." 
1Kings7:8 Kand’ ingoro yiwe nyamugari yubatswe kuno nyene; inyubakwa yayo yaca inyuma y’iyo nzu. Yubaka n’iyindi ngoro isa n’iyo nzu y’imanza, ayubakiye umukobga wa Farawo yar’ afise." 
1Kings7:9 Ayo mazu yose yari yubakishijwe amabuye y’igiciro kinini abājwe ku rugero, akerejwe imisumeno imbere n’inyuma, uhereye ku y’amatanguriro ugashitsa ku yo hejuru, uhereye no ku y’inyubakwa y’urusengero ugashitsa no ku y’urugo rw’intangaro." 
1Kings7:10 Ay’ amatanguriro na yo nyene yar’ ay’ igiciro kinini, kandi yar’ amabuye manini‐manini, amwe yar’ ay’ amatambge cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ayandi yar’ ay’ amatambge munani." 
1Kings7:11 Hejuru yayo hakurikirakw amabuye y’ igiciro kinini abājwe ku rugero, agasozerwa n’ibiti bibājwe vy’ amasederi." 
1Kings7:12 Urugo rw’intangaro rwari rwubakishijwe amabuye abājwe imirongo itatu igerekeranye, rusozeshejwe umurongo w’ibiti bibājwe vy’amasederi, nk’ uko bāgenjeje urugo rw’inyubakwa yo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ urubaraza rw’iyo ngoro." 
1Kings7:13 Bukeye Salomo atuma i Tiro guhamagaza Hiramu. 
1Kings7:14 Hiramu uwo, nyina yar’ umupfakazi wo mu muryango wa Nafutali, ariko se yar’ uw’ i Tiro; yar’ umucuzi w’imiringa, yuzuye ubgenge no gutahura n’ubuhinga bgo gucura ikintu cose co mu miringa. Nuko yitaba umwami Salomo, amukorera ikintu cose yagomba." 
1Kings7:15 Acura inkingi zibiri z’imiringa, uburebure bgazo bgar’ amatambge cumi n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubunini bgo mu nda yayo bgagerwa n’ umugozi w’amatambge cumi n’ abiri." 
1Kings7:16 Maz’ avugutira imiringa mu nkero, ayikūramw’ imyashi ibiri yo gushira mu mitwe y’izo nkingi; uburebure bg’umwashi umwe bgar’ amatambge atanu, n’ubg’ uwundi bgar’ atanu nyene." 
1Kings7:17 Acura ibimeze nk’insenga vy’ insobane n’imigufu ihotoranije, vyo gushira kur’ iyo myashi yo mu mitwe y’inkingi; ashira kimwe ku mwashi umwe, n’ikindi ku wundi." 
1Kings7:18 Acura n’ibisa n’amakomamanga, abishira ku rusenga rumwe mu mirongo ibiri ikikuje, abirenza ku mwashi uri mu mutwe w’inkingi; no ku wundi mwashi agira kuno nyene." 
1Kings7:19 Mugabo, imyashi yo mu mitwe y’inkingi zo ku rubaraza yar’ ishushanijwekw amashurwe y’amarebe, uburebure bg’ iyo myashi bgar’ amatambge ane." 
1Kings7:20 Nukw iyo myashi ayishira mu mitwe y’izo nkingi ukw ari zibiri, hejuru y’imikugiro yari kuri zo, ah’ izo nsenga zagarukira; ibisa n’amakomamanga vyar’ amajana abiri, biri mu mirongo ibiri; no ku wundi mwashi n’uko." 
1Kings7:21 Izo nkingi azishinga ku rubaraza rw’ urusengero; iy’ i buryo ayishinze, ayita Yakini, ashinze iy’ i bubamfu, ayita Bowazi." 
1Kings7:22 Ku mitwe y’izo nkingi hari hashushanijwekw amashurwe y’amarebe. Nukw igikorwa c’izo nkingi kirarangira. 
1Kings7:23 Maz’ akora igikarabiro citwa ikiyaga, akivugutiye mu nkero, ubgaguke bgaco, uhereye ku rubiga rw’uruhande rumwe ugashitsa ku rundi, bgar’ amatambge cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, bgarangana impande zose; uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atanu; urubiga rwaco rwazengukwa n’umugozi w’amatambge mirongwitatu." 
1Kings7:24 Musi y’urubiga rwaco hari hakikujwe n’ibishushanyo vy’uturende, mw itambge rimwe hār’ icumi‐icumi, dukikuje hirya no hino kur’ ico kiyaga; utwo turende twari dutondeshejwe mu mirongo ibiri, twāvugutiranywe na co kikiri mu nkero." 
1Kings7:25 Cari giteretswe ku bishushanyo vy’amapfizi cumi n’abiri; atatu yarāba i burārūko, yandi atatu yarāba i burengerazuba, yandi atatu yarāba i bumanuko, yandi atatu yarāba i burasirazuba; ico kiyaga cari giteretse kur’ ayo mapfizi, kandi yose yar’ ahānye imigongo." 
1Kings7:26 Intimba yaco yangana n’ikiganza c’umuntu, kand’ umunwa waco war’ umeze nk’uw’ igikombe, canke nk’ishurwe ry’irebe; cuzuzwa n’imibindi ibihumbi bibiri." 
1Kings7:27 Acura ibitereko cumi mu miringa. Igitereko kimwe, uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge ane y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgaco bgar’ amatambge ane nyene, uburebure bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atatu." 
1Kings7:28 Ivyo bitereko vyari bicuzwe birtya: vyari bifise imiringa y’utubāte ikikujwe n’imikugiro; 
1Kings7:29 kur’ utwo tubāte hagati y’iyo mikugiro hār’ ibishushanyo vy’ intambge n’amapfizi n’abakerubi; kur’ iyo mikugiro haruguru y’ivyo bishushanyo vy’intambge n’amapfizi no ku mikugiro yo hepfo yavyo, hārih’ utugenegene duhotoranije dutendeye." 
1Kings7:30 Igitereko cose cari gifise amakurudumu ane acuzwe mu miringa, kand’ ivyuma bitambitse bifashekw ayo makurudumu na vyo vyar’ ivyo mu miringa. Mu mfuruka zaco ukw ari zine hārih’ ibishigikizo vyo gushigikira ikigarigari; ivyo bishigikizo vyar’ ivyāvugutiwe mu nkero, bifise utugenegene duhotoranije mu mbavu zavyo zose." 
1Kings7:31 Ivyo bishigikizo vyatega ikimeze bga rugata co guterekwakw ikigarigari; uburebure bgaco bgar’ itambge rimwe, n’ubg’ amajepfo bgar’ itambge n’igihimba, kandi cari giciye amagarwe; twa tubāte two kur’ ico gitereko ntitwari twihese, ariko twari dufise impande zine zingana." 
1Kings7:32 Ayo makurudumu ukw ar’ ane yar’ ahahera musi ya twa tubāte, kand’ ivyuma bitambitse bifashekw ayo makurudumu vyari vyacuranywe n’ico gitereko; uburebure bg’ayo makurudumu bgar’ itambge n’igihimba." 
1Kings7:33 Kandi yakozwe nk’ay’ umukogote; ivyuma afasheko, n’imikugiro yayo, n’inkingi zayo, n’ivyuma vyayo vyo mw iteranirizo ry’inkingi, vyose na vyose vyar’ ivyāvugutiwe mu nkero." 
1Kings7:34 Vya bishigikizo ukw ari bine vyo mu mfuruka zine z’igitereko cose vyari vyacuranywe n’ivyo bitereko vyavyo. 
1Kings7:35 Hejuru ku gitereko hār’ ikintu cijingurije kimeze nk’urugata; uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo bgar’ igihimba c’itambge ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ivyari bigishigikiye bo n’utubāte two kuri co, vyari vyacuranywe na co." 
1Kings7:36 Kur’ ivyo bishigikizo, ahabāse havyo, no kuri twa tubāte nyene, ahashushanyakw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi n’ivy’ intambge n’ivy’ ibigazi, nk’ uko hāgenda harēha, ashirako n’utugenegene duhotoranije mu mpande zose." 
1Kings7:37 Uko ni ko yakoze ivyo bitereko ukw ar’ icumi; vyose vyavugutiwe mu nkero z’uburyo bumwe; vyarangana cabugerwe, kandi vyari bifise ishusho imwe." 
1Kings7:38 Acura n’ibigarigari cumi mu miringa; kimwe‐kimwe cuzuzwa n’imibindi mirongwine; kimwe‐kimwe uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge ane y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora. Kand’ ivyo bitereko ukw ar’ icumi, kimwe‐kimwe caterekwakw ikigarigari caco." 
1Kings7:39 Ibitereko bitanu abishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo bg’iyo ngoro, bindi bitanu abishira ku ruhande rw’i bumoso. Ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga na co agishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo bg’iyo ngoro, ku mfuruka ihera i burasirazuba n’i bumanuko." 
1Kings7:40 Maz’ imibindi n’ivyuma vyo kuyora umunyota n’imibehe Hiramu arabikora na vyo. Uko ni ko yanonosoye igikorwa cose yakorera umwami Salomo c’ingoro y’Uhoraho. 
1Kings7:41 Ivyo yakoze vyar’ ibi: za nkingi zompi, na ya myashi yompi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’izo nkingi, na vya bindi bimeze nk’ insenga vyompi vyari kuri ya myashi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’izo nkingi;" 
1Kings7:42 na vya bishushanyo vy’amakomamanga amajana ane bitondeshejwe kur’ izo nsenga, imirongo ibiri‐ibiri ku nsenga zompi, uko zari kur’ iyo myashi yompi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’izo nkingi;" 
1Kings7:43 na vya bitereko ukw ar’ icumi, na vya bigarigari ukw ar’ icumi nyene vyari biteretse kuri vyo;" 
1Kings7:44 na ca kiyaga, na vya bishushanyo vy’amapfizi ukw ar’ icumi na bibiri biteretswekw ico kiyaga nyene;" 
1Kings7:45 na ya mibindi na vya vyuma vyo kuyora umunyota na ya mibehe; ivyo bintu vyose Hiramu yakoreye umwami Salomo vy’ingoro y’Uhoraho, yabikoze mu miringa y’imyakaka." 
1Kings7:46 Umwami yabikoreshereje mu kiyaya ca Yorodani bivugutiwe mu nkero, ahantu hār’ ibumba, hagati y’i Sukoti n’i Saretani." 
1Kings7:47 Kandi Salomo apfa kureka ivyo bintu vyose atabigeze ku munzane, kuko vyari vyinshi cane; uburemerezi bg’imiringa vyakuwemwo ntibgāmenyekanye." 
1Kings7:48 Kandi Salomo acurisha ibintu vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ni vyo ibi: igicaniro c’izahabu, n’ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekērwa na yo yar’ izahabu;" 
1Kings7:49 n’ibiterekwakw amatara, bitanu mu ruhande rw’i buryo, bindi bitanu mu ruhande rw’i bumoso, aharābana n’Ahēra Cane, vyose vyar’ izahabu iramuye; n’ibisa n’amashurwe, n’ayo matara nyene, n’imakasi zayo zo gutunganya urutambi, na vyo vyar’ ivy’ izahabu;" 
1Kings7:50 n’ inzavya, n’imbugita, n’imibehe, n’udukombe, n’udusahani two gushirwak’ umunyota, na vyo nyene vyar’ ivy’ izahabu iramuye; n’ amapata y’inzugi zija haruguru, ari ho Hēra Cane, n’ay’ inzugi z’ingoro ubgayo, ari rwo rusengero, na yo yar’ ay’ izahabu." 
1Kings7:51 Uko ni kw igikorwa cose umwami Salomo yakoreye ingoro y’Uhoraho carangiye. Maze yinjiza ivyo se Dawidi yari yaragize inyegu y’Uhoraho vyose, amafeza n’amazahabu, n’ibintu vy’ibikoreshwa, abishira mu bubīko bg’ ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Kings8:1 Maze Salomo akoranya abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli n’ abakuru b’imiryango bose, ari bo bakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abisirayeli, bakoranira i Yerusalemu bītavye umwami, kugira ngo badūgane isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bayikūye mu gisagara ca Dawidi, ari ho i Siyoni." 
1Kings8:2 Nukw abagabo bose b’Abisirayeli bakoranira i bgami kwa Salomo, mu kwezi kwa Etanimu, ari kwo kwezi kw’indwi, ngo bagire imisi mikuru." 
1Kings8:3 Nukw abakuru bose bo mu Bisirayeli baraza, abaherezi baraheza barerura isandugu." 
1Kings8:4 Nuko badūgana iyo sandugu y’ Uhoraho, n’ihema ry’ibonaniro, bo n’ibintu vyera vyari mw ihema vyose; ivyo vyose abaherezi n’ Abalewi ni bo bābidūganye." 
1Kings8:5 Maz’ umwami Salomo hamwe n’ ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli bari bakoraniye imbere yiwe, bahagararana na we imbere y’iyo sandugu, batanga intama n’inka kw ibimazi zitoharūrwa canke ngo zimenyekane igitigiri kuko zar’ isinzi." 
1Kings8:6 Maz’ abaherezi binjiza iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bayishikana ahayo, haruguru mu ngoro, ari ho Hēra Cane, musi y’amababa y’abakerubi;" 
1Kings8:7 kukw ivyo bishushanyo vy’abakerubi vyari bishānje amababa hejuru y’ikibanza c’iyo sandugu, bigakīngīra iyo sandugu n’iminiho yayo." 
1Kings8:8 Kand’ iyo miniho yayo yari miremire, bigatuma ūhagaze Ahēra, hafi y’Ahēra Cane, yashobora kubona imitwe yayo, arik’ ūhagaze hanze ntiyayibona; kandi ni ho ikiri no kugeza n’ubu." 
1Kings8:9 Mur’ iyo sandugu nta kindi carimwo atari vya bisate bibiri vy’amabuye Mose yashiriyemw’ i Horebu, igihe Uhoraho yasezerana isezerano n’Abisirayeli, hamwe bava mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
1Kings8:10 Maz’ abaherezi bavuye Ahēra, igicu c’ igipfungu cuzura mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho," 
1Kings8:11 bituma abaherezi badashobora guhagararayo ngo bahēreze kubg’ ico gicu, kuk’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bgari bguzuye mur’ iyo ngoro yiwe." 
1Kings8:12 Salomo araheza aravuga, at’ Uhoraho yavuze kw azokwibera mu mwiza w’umuzitanya!" 
1Kings8:13 None ndakwubakiye ingoro yo kubamwo, ahantu uzokwibera ibihe vyose." 
1Kings8:14 Maz’ umwami arahindukira, ahezagira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli; kand’ iryo koraniro ryose ryari rihagaze." 
1Kings8:15 Maz’ aravuga, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ahimbazwe, yashikije n’ukuboko kwiwe ivyo yavuze n’akanwa kiwe, abarira data Dawidi," 
1Kings8:16 yuk’ uhereye igihe yakūriye abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli muri Egiputa, ata gisagara co mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli yigeze gutoranya co kwubakamw’ ingoro ngw izina ryiwe rihabe; ariko yatoranije Dawidi kugira ngw aganze abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings8:17 Kandi data Dawidi yari yaragabiye mu mutima wiwe kuzokwubakira ingoro izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli. 
1Kings8:18 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira data Dawidi, ati Ko war’ ufise imigabo mu mutima wawe yo kwubakira izina ryanje ingoro, wagize neza kuvyiyumvira;" 
1Kings8:19 at’ Ariko wewe ntuzokwubaka iyo ngoro, izokwubaka umwana wawe uzokwikūrira mu nda; uwo ni we azokwubakira izina ryanje ingoro." 
1Kings8:20 Non’ Uhoraho ashikije iryo jambo ryiwe yavuze, kuko nsubiye mu gishingo ca data Dawidi, kandi nkaba ndi ku ngoma y’i Bgisirayeli nk’uko yasezeranye, kandi nkaba nujuje iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings8:21 Ni ho nashingiye umwanya isandugu irimw’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho yasezeranye na ba sogokuruza, aho yabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
1Kings8:22 Salomo araheza ahagarara imbere y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho, ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli rirorēra, agaranzura amaboko ayatumbereje mw ijuru," 
1Kings8:23 aravuga, at’ Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, nta mana ihwanye nawe, uhereye hejuru mw ijuru no hasi kw isi; ni wewe wama ushitsa amasezerano, ukagirira imbabazi abasavyi bawe bagendera imbere yawe bitonze n’imitima yabo yose;" 
1Kings8:24 kandi washikije ivyo wasezeraniye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi; mber’ ivyo wavugishije akanwa kawe ubishikishije ukuboko kwawe, nk’ uko bir’ uyu musi." 
1Kings8:25 None rero, Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, komeza ivyo wasezeraniye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi, nk’ uko wamubariye kw atazobura uwo guhora ku ngoma y’i Bgisirayeli imbere yawe, abana biwe ni bagendera imbere yawe bitonda mu ngeso zabo, nk’uko na we yagendera imbere yawe." 
1Kings8:26 None rero, Mana y’Abisirayeli, ndakwinginze, ijambo ryawe wabariye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi urishitse." 
1Kings8:27 Ariko se, n’ivy’ ukuri Imana yoza kuba mur’ iyi si? Rāba ijuru, mbere n’ijuru risumba ayandi, ntushobora kurikwirwamwo, nkanswe iyi nzu nubatse!" 
1Kings8:28 Arik’ Uhoraho Mana yanje, shira umutima ku gusenga kw’umusavyi wawe no ku kwinginga kwanje, zirikana ugutakamba kwanje n’ ugusenga jewe umusavyi wawe nsengeye imbere yawe uyu musi," 
1Kings8:29 kugira ng’ uhoze inyonga zawe kur’ iyi ngoro ku murango no mw ijoro, ni ho wavuze k’uzoshira izina ryawe, kugira ng’ uze wame wumva amasengesho yanje, jewe umusavyi wawe nzogusenga ntumbereye aha hantu." 
1Kings8:30 Kand’ uze wame wumva ukwinginga kwanje, jewe umusavyi wawe, n’ ukw’ abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, uko tuzosenga dutumbereye aha hantu; ego me koko, uze wame uvyumva uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, kand’ uk’ uzovyumva, uze wame uharira." 
1Kings8:31 Umuntu ni yagirira nabi mugenzi we, bakamwaka indahiro, akaza akarahirira imbere y’igicaniro cawe mur’ iyi ngoro;" 
1Kings8:32 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, ugire ico ukora, ucire abantu bawe imanza, utsindishe uwakoze nabi, bimusubire ku mutwe, ucire umugororotsi urubanza, atsinde nk’ uk’ ukuri kwiwe kumeze." 
1Kings8:33 Kand’ abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli ni baneshwa n’abansi, bazize ko bagucumuyeko, hanyuma bakaguhindukirira, bakātura izina ryawe, bagasenga bakwingingira mur’ iyi ngoro;" 
1Kings8:34 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, uharire icaha c’abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ubagarukane mu gihugu wahaye ba sekuruza." 
1Kings8:35 Kand’ ijuru ni ryakingwa, imvura ntikoroke, kuko bāgucumuyeko; ni basenga batumbereye aha hantu, bakātura izina ryawe, bagahindukira bakareka icaha cabo, kuko wabahannye;" 
1Kings8:36 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, uharire abasavyi bawe icaha cabo, ari bo bantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ubarangire inzira nziza bakwiye kujana, urekurire imvura mu gihugu cawe, ico wahaye abantu bawe kw ishamvu." 
1Kings8:37 Inzara ni yatera mu gihugu, cank’ ikīza, canke kurumbisha, cank’ ururyi rw’agahezambuto, cank’ inzige, cank’ inzikira, cank’ abansi babo ni babatera bakabaziguza mu gisagara cabo ic’ ari co cose; ni haramuka hateye icago ic’ ari co cose, cank’ indwara," 
1Kings8:38 hakagira ūsenga akinginga, naho yoba umuntu umwe cank’ abantu bawe bose b’Abisirayeli, umuntu wese ukw azoba yimenyekw indwara yo mu mutima wiwe, akagaranzura amaboko ayatumbereje iyi ngoro;" 
1Kings8:39 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, uharire, ugire ico ukora, ugenze umuntu wese nk’ukw ameze, wewe uzi umutima wiwe, kukw ari wewe wenyene uzi imitima y’abantu bose;" 
1Kings8:40 kugira ngo baze bahore bagutinya imisi yose bazomara bakiriho, mu gihugu wahaye ba sogokuruza bacu." 
1Kings8:41 Kandi n’umunyamahanga, atar’ uwo mu bantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ni yaza avuye mu gihugu ca kure azanywe n’izina ryawe;" 
1Kings8:42 (kuko batazobura kwumva ivy’ izina ryawe rihambaye, n’ivy’ ububasha bgawe bukomeye, n’ ivy’ ubushobozi bgawe); nuko ni yaza agasenga atumbereye iyi ngoro," 
1Kings8:43 uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, uwo munyamahanga umumarire ivyo azoba agutakambiye vyose, bitume amahanga yose yo mw isi amenya izina ryawe, bakwubahe, nk’ukw abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli bakwubaha, kandi bamenye n’iyi ngoro nubatse ko yitwa iy’ izina ryawe." 
1Kings8:44 Kand’ abantu bawe ni baramuka bagiye gutera abansi babo ah’ uzoba ubagomoye hose, bakagusenga wewe Uhoraho, batumbereye uyu murwa watoranije n’iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ryawe;" 
1Kings8:45 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru, ubaroranirize ivyabo." 
1Kings8:46 Kandi ni baramuka bagucumuyeko, kukw ata muntu adacumura, ukabarakira, ukabagabura mu maboko y’abansi babo, bakabafata mpiri bakabajana mu gihugu cabo, naho hoba hafi canke kure;" 
1Kings8:47 maze bakīsubiramwo bari mu gihugu bajanywemw’ ar’ inyagano, bagahindukira, bakagutakambira bari mu gihugu c’ababafashe mpiri, bati Twaracumuye, twaragabitanije, twakoze nabi;" 
1Kings8:48 bakakugarukako n’imitima yabo yose n’ivyiyumviro vyabo vyose, bari mu gihugu c’abansi babo babafashe mpiri, bakagusenga batumbereye igihugu cabo, ico wahaye ba sekuruza, n’uyu murwa watoranije, n’iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ryawe;" 
1Kings8:49 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, ubaroranirize ivyabo," 
1Kings8:50 uharire abantu bawe ivyaha n’ibicumuro vyabo vyose bagucumuyeko, ubahe gutera akagongwe ababafashe mpiri, kugira ngo babagirire imbabazi;" 
1Kings8:51 kukw ar’ abantu bawe n’ ishamvu yawe wīkūriye muri Egiputa, hagati muri rya tanure rivugutira ivyuma." 
1Kings8:52 Tereza inyonga, urābe ingene ninginga, jewe umusavyi wawe, n’abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ubabangire ugutwi iyo bagutakambiye." 
1Kings8:53 Kuko wabarobanuye mu mahanga yose yo mw isi ngo babe ishamvu yawe, nk’uko wavugiye mu kanwa ka Mose umusavyi wawe, ewe Mwami Uhoraho, igihe wakūra ba sogokuruza muri Egiputa." 
1Kings8:54 Nuko Salomo arangije gusengesha ayo majambo yose no kwinginga Uhoraho, arahaguruka ava imbere y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho, aho yamye apfukamye agaranzuye amaboko ayatumbereje mw ijuru." 
1Kings8:55 Arahagarara, asabira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli umugisha, avuga n’ijwi rirenga," 
1Kings8:56 at’ Uhoraho ahimbazwe, ahaye impore abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli nk’uko yabasezeraniye; nta jambo na rimwe ritāshitse mu vyiza vyose yasezeraniye mu kanwa ka Mose umusavyi wiwe." 
1Kings8:57 Uhoraho Imana yacu abane natwe, nk’uko yabana na ba sogokuruza bacu; ntaz’ aduhebe, ntaz’ adute," 
1Kings8:58 arikw imitima yacu yame ayīgarukanako, kugira ngo tugendere mu nzira ziwe zose, twitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe n’amateka ashinzwe, ivyo yageze ba sogokuruza bacu." 
1Kings8:59 Kand’ ayo majambo yanje ningingiye Uhoraho nd’ imbere yiwe, Uhoraho Imana yacu aze yame ayibuka ku murango no mw ijoro, kugira ngw andoranirize ivyanje, jewe umusavyi wiwe, n’ivy’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli, ku bihora biba ku musi n’umusi;" 
1Kings8:60 kugira ngw amahanga yose yo mw isi amenye k’Uhoraho ari we Mana, ata yindi." 
1Kings8:61 Nukw imitima yanyu ibe itunganiye Uhoraho Imana yacu, mugendere mu mabgirizwa yiwe, mwitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe, nk’uko mubigenjeje uyu musi." 
1Kings8:62 Maz’ umwami n’Abisirayeli bose bafataniriza hamwe gutangira ibimazi imbere y’Uhoraho. 
1Kings8:63 Salomo azanira Uhoraho inka ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’intama ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri kw ibimazi vy’ishimwe. Uko ni k’umwami n’Abisirayeli bose bashikirije Uhoraho ingoro yiwe. 
1Kings8:64 Kur’ uwo musi umwami ashinga umwanya wo hagati mu nyubakwa imbere y’ingoro y’ Uhoraho, arahēza; aho ni ho yoshereje ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ amashikanwa y’amafu n’ibinure vy’ibimazi vy’ishimwe, kukw igicaniro c’umuringa car’ imbere y’ Uhoraho cari gito, kitokwirwakw ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’amashikanwa y’amafu n’ibinure vy’ibimazi vy’ishimwe." 
1Kings8:65 Uko ni ko Salomo yagize imisi mikuru ico gihe, hamwe n’Abisirayeli bose, bār’ ikoraniro rinini bavuye mu gihugu cose, uhereye ahafata i Hamati ugashitsa ku mugezi wa Egiputa; bamara imisi ndwi, baraheza basubira iyindi ndwi, yose na yose iba icumi n’ine, bar’ imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
1Kings8:66 Ku musi ugira umunani w’ iyinga rya kabiri umwami asezera abantu, baramuhezagira, basubira i wabo banezerewe, bahimbawe mu mitima yabo kubg’ ivyiza vyose Uhoraho yagiriye umusavyi wiwe Dawidi n’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings9:1 Maze Salomo arangije kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’ubgami n’ivyo yagomvye gukora vyose," 
1Kings9:2 Uhoraho amwiyereka ubugira kabiri, nk’uko yamwiyerekeye i Gibeyoni." 
1Kings9:3 Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Numvise ugusenga kwawe n’ukwinginga kwawe wingingiye imbere yanje; kandi nejeje iyi ngoro wubakiye izina ryanje ngo rihabe ibihe vyose; nzoyihozakw amaso n’umutima na ntaryo."
