1Kings9:4 Nuko nawe ni wagendera imbere yanje nk’uko so Dawidi yagenda, ufise umutima w’ukuri kand’ utunganye, ugakora ivyo nakugeze vyose, ukitondera amabgirizwa yanje n’amateka nashinze;" 
1Kings9:5 nanje nzotuma ingoma yawe ihangama mu Bisirayeli ibihe vyose, nk’uko nasezeraniye so Dawidi, nkamubarira, nti Ntuzobura uwo gusubira ku ngoma y’ i Bgisirayeli." 
1Kings9:6 Ariko ni mwanta, mukareka kunkurikira, cank’ abana banyu, ntimwitondere ivyagezwe vyanje n’amabgirizwa yanje nabashize imbere, mukaja gusaba izindi mana, mukaba ari zo musenga;" 
1Kings9:7 nuko nanje nzoherengeteza Abisirayeli mu gihugu nabahaye, kand’ iyi ngoro nejeje kubg’ izina ryanje nzoyishibura imve mu maso; kand’ Abisirayeli bazoba iciro ry’imigani n’agashinyaguro mu mahanga yose;" 
1Kings9:8 kand’ iyi ngoro nah’ ar’ agahambaye irtya, ūzoyica i ruhande wese azokwumirwa, avuze agahwa, at’ Ariko n’iki catumye Uhoraho agirira artya iki gihugu n’iyi ngoro?" 
1Kings9:9 Bazomwishura, bati N’uko bahevye Uhoraho Imana yabo, yakūye ba sekuruza mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bakaramatana n’izindi mana, bakazisenga, bakaba ari zo basaba; ni co catumye Uhoraho abateza ivyo vyago vyose." 
1Kings9:10 Nuko hashize imyaka mirongwibiri, ari yo Salomo yubakiyemw’ ingoro zompi, iy’ Uhoraho n’iyiwe ubgiwe," 
1Kings9:11 umwami Salomo aha Hiramu ibisagara mirongwibiri mu gihugu c’i Galilaya; kandi Hiramu uwo, umwami w’i Tiro, ni we yari yarahaye Salomo ibiti vy’amasederi n’ivy’ akajwari n’amazahabu, nk’uko yagomba kwose." 
1Kings9:12 Bukeye Hiramu ava i Tiro aja kugendura ivyo bisagara Salomo yamuhaye; maze ntiyabishima. 
1Kings9:13 Aramubarira, ati Mbega mugenzi wanje, ibisagara wampaye ubona ar’ ibisagara ki? Ni kwo kuhīta igihugu c’i Kabula; kandi ni ko hacitwa na bugingo n’ubu." 
1Kings9:14 Kandi Hiramu yari yararungikiye umwami Salomo amazahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri. 
1Kings9:15 Ubu ni bgo buryo umwami Salomo yashizeh’ abanyabikebere bo kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro yiwe ubgiwe n’i Milo n’uruzitiro rw’amabuye rw’i Yerusalemu, n’i Hasori n’i Megido n’i Gezeri." 
1Kings9:16 Kandi Farawo umwami wa Egiputa yari yarateye i Gezeri, arahatsinda, arahaturira, ageseza Abanyakanani bāba mur’ ico gisagara, ahaha muka Salomo umukobga wiwe kw indongoranywa." 
1Kings9:17 Nuko Salomo yubaka i Gezeri nyene, n’i Beti‐horoni ho hepfo," 
1Kings9:18 n’i Bayalati n’i Tamari mu bugaragwa bgo mu gihugu c’Abayuda; 
1Kings9:19 n’ibisagara vyose vy’ibigega vyiwe, n’ibisagara vyo kubīkamw’ imikogote yiwe, n’ivy’ abagendera ku mafarasi biwe, n’ amazu yose yagomvye kwubaka i Yerusalemu n’i Lebanoni no mu gihugu cose yaganza." 
1Kings9:20 Abantu bose b’amasigarira y’Abamori n’ Abaheti n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’ Abayebusi, abatār’ Abisirayeli," 
1Kings9:21 abuzukuruza babo bari barasigaye mu gihugu, abo Abisirayeli batāshoboye guherengeteza rwose, abo ni bo Salomo yatojemw’ abo gushinga ibikebere, abahindura abaja na bugingo n’ubu." 
1Kings9:22 Ariko mu Bisirayeli bo, nta bo yahinduye abaja; ariko bār’ ingabo zo kuja mu ntambara, n’abagendanyi, n’abagabisha b’ingabo, n’ abatware, n’abagaba abagendera ku mafarasi n’imikogote." 
1Kings9:23 Abo ni bo bakoresha bakuru bāgaba ibikorwa vya Salomo; bose na bose bār’ amajana atanu na mirongwitanu, bārāba abantu mu bikorwa." 
1Kings9:24 Maze wa mukobga wa Farawo yimuka mu gisagara ca Dawidi, aja kuba mu ngoro Salomo yamwubakiye; maze Salomo yubaka i Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Kandi Salomo yahora atanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka, abitangira ku gicaniro yubakiye Uhoraho, akosereza n’imibavu imbere y’Uhoraho." 
1Kings9:26 Kand’ umwami Salomo abāzīsha amāto i Eziyoni‐geberi, hafi y’i Eloti, kw isēsero ry’Ikiyaga Gitukura mu gihugu c’Abanyedomu." 
1Kings9:27 Maze Hiramu arungika mur’ ayo māto abantu biwe b’ abasoza bamenyereye ivy’ ikiyaga, bafatanya n’abantu ba Salomo;" 
1Kings9:28 baragenda baja i Ofiru, bakūray’ amazahabu italanto amajana ane na mirongwibiri, bayazanira umwami Salomo." 
1Kings10:1 Umwami w’umugore yaganza i Sheba yumvise ingen’ izina ry’Uhoraho ryahaye Salomo kuba rurangiranwa, aza azanywe no kumugerageresha ibibazo bigoye." 
1Kings10:2 Nukw ashika i Yerusalemu agendaniwe n’abantu benshi b’ isinzi, afise n’ingamiya zīremētse imibavu n’amazahabu menshi cane n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini. Ashitse kwa Salomo amudondorera ivyari mu mutima wiwe vyose." 
1Kings10:3 Nuk’ umwami Salomo amusobanurira ivyo amubajije vyose; nta kintu na kimwe cāmunaniye kw amusobanurira. 
1Kings10:4 Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Sheba abonye ingene Salomo ar’ umunyabgenge, n’ingoro yubatse ukw imeze," 
1Kings10:5 n’ivyo kurya vyo ku meza yiwe ukuntu vyari, n’abo mu rugo rwiwe uko bīfata, n’abasuku biwe uko bahēreza, n’ukuntu bambaye, n’abakevyi biwe bamuhēreza igiturire, n’ibimazi vyo kwosa yatanga mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, arajorerwa." 
1Kings10:6 Abarira umwami, at’ Inkuru numvise ndi mu gihugu canje z’ ibikorwa vyawe n’ubgenge bgawe zar’ iz’ ukuri." 
1Kings10:7 Ariko sinari navyemeye gushitsa niyiziye, nkavyibonera n’amaso yanje. Ereg’ ivyo bāmbariye ntibishika n’agace k’ivyo mbonye; ubgenge bgawe n’ubutunzi bgawe bisumba uko navyumvise." 
1Kings10:8 Hahirwa abantu bawe, hahirwa n’aba bagendanyi bawe bama imbere yawe bakumva ubgenge bgawe!" 
1Kings10:9 Uhoraho Imana yawe ahimbazwe, yagushimye akagushira ku ngoma mu Bisirayeli. Kuk’ Uhoraho yakunze Abisirayeli uhereye kera hose, ni co catumye akwimika, kugira ng’uce izibereye n’iziroranye." 
1Kings10:10 Maz’ aha umwami izahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri, amuha n’imibavu myinshi y’isinzi, n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini; ntihongeye kuboneka imibavu ingana n’iyo uwo mwami w’i Sheba yahaye umwami Salomo." 
1Kings10:11 Kand’ amāto ya Hiramu yahora azana amazahabu ayakūye i Ofiru, yazanana n’ibiti vyinshi cane vyitwa alumugi, n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini, abikūye i Ofiru nyene." 
1Kings10:12 Ivyo biti vya alumugi umwami ni vyo yabājemw’ inkingi zo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho n’izo mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe; yabibājemwo n’inanga n’amakembe vy’abaririmvyi; ntihigeze kuza canke kuboneka ibiti vya alumugi nk’ivyo gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu. 
1Kings10:13 Nuk’ umwami Salomo aha uwo mwami w’i Sheba ivyo yagomba vyose n’ico amwatse cose, udashizemw’ ivyo yagomvye kumwihēra ubgiwe, nk’uk’ umwami ameze nka we asanganywe ikiganza ciza. Bukeye uwo mwami arahaguruka, aragenda asubira mu gihugu ciwe, bo n’abantu biwe." 
1Kings10:14 Amazahabu yaza kwa Salomo mu mwaka mu mwaka, ukuriba kwayo kwashika italanto amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu na zitandatu," 
1Kings10:15 udashizemw’ ayakwa abahanjuzi kw ibibuguro n’ayakwa mu nyungu z’abadandaza, n’ayakwa abami bose bo muri Arabiya n’abaganza igihugu." 
1Kings10:16 Maz’ umwami Salomo acurisha inkinzo nini‐nini amajana abiri mw izahabu, imwe‐imwe yacurwa mw izahabu irivye shekeli amajana atandatu." 
1Kings10:17 Acurisha n’inkinzo nto‐nto amajana atatu mw izahabu nyene, imwe‐imwe yacurwa mw izahabu irivye mina zitatu; umwami azishira muri ya nzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni." 
1Kings10:18 Kand’ umwami yibāzishiriza intebe nini y’ubgami mu mahembe y’inzovu, ayomekakw izahabu iramuye;" 
1Kings10:19 iyo ntebe yar’ ifise aho kudondagira hatandatu; aho kwegamira hayo hāri hihese, kand’ impande zompi z’icicaro cayo yar’ ifise aho gushirakw amaboko, n’ibishushanyo bibiri vy’ intambge, kimwe gihagaze ku ruhande rumwe, ikindi ku rundi rw’ahashirwa amaboko nyene." 
1Kings10:20 Kandi hār’ ibishushanyo vy’ intambge cumi na bibiri, bidondagije kimwe‐kimwe impande zompi z’aho kudondagira ukw ari hatandatu; mu bihugu vyose nta ntebe y’ubgami yigeze kubāzwa ihwanye n’iyo." 
1Kings10:21 Kand’ ibintu vyose vy’umwami Salomo vyo kunywesha vyar’ ivy’ izahabu, n’ ibikoreshwa vyose vyo mur’ iyo nzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni vyar’ ivy’ izahabu iramuye; nta citwa ic’ ifeza cariho, kuko ku ngoma ya Salomo ifeza ata co bāyiyumvirako." 
1Kings10:22 Kuk’ umwami yar’ afise amāto y’i Tarushishi yagendera ku kiyaga yajana n’aya Hiramu; ukw imyaka itatu ishize, ayo māto y’i Tarushishi yagaruka azanye amazahabu n’amafeza n’ amahembe y’inzovu n’inkima n’ ibisīga vyitwa tawusi." 
1Kings10:23 Uko ni k’umwami Salomo yarusha abami bose bo mw isi ubutunzi n’ubgenge. 
1Kings10:24 Mu bihugu vyose vyo mw isi hāhora haza abagomba kubona Salomo, no kwumva ivyo avugishwa n’ubgenge Imana yashize mu mutima wiwe." 
1Kings10:25 Umuntu wese yaza azanye indamukanyo, ar’ ivyakozwe mu mafeza canke mu mazahabu, ar’ ivyambarwa, ar’ ibirwanishwa, ar’ imibavu, ar’ amafarasi, ar’ inyumbu; ni ko vyagenda uk’ umwaka utashe." 
1Kings10:26 Kandi Salomo yironderera imikogote y’intambara n’abo kugendera ku mafarasi; yar’ afise imikogote igihumbi n’amajana ane, n’abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, bamwe abashira mu bisagara bibīkwamw’ imikogote, abandi i we i Yerusalemu." 
1Kings10:27 Amafeza umwami yararushe ayahindura nk’amabuye i Yerusalemu, n’ibiti vy’amasederi bihinduka nk’ivy’ imisukomora vyo mu biyaya mu kuba vyinshi." 
1Kings10:28 Kand’ amafarasi Salomo yar’ atunze bāyakūra muri Egiputa; abadandaza b’umwami bayagura ar’ amasho, ubusho bgose igiciro cabgo." 
1Kings10:29 Umukogote umwe‐umwe bāwukūra muri Egiputa kuri shekeli z’ifeza amajana atandatu, ifarasi kw ijana na mirongwitanu. Kand’ abo bādandariza umwami bāshōrera n’abami bose bo mu Baheti n’abo mu Basiriya." 
1Kings11:1 Kand’ umwami Salomo yagomwa abanyamahangakazi benshi, udashizemw’ umukobga wa Farawo yar’ asanganywe, ni bo Banyamowabukazi n’Abamonikazi n’Abanyedomukazi n’Abasidonikazi n’Abahetikazi," 
1Kings11:2 bo mu mahanga Uhoraho yari yarabujije Abisirayeli, ati Ntimuze musabirane na bo, na bo ntibaze basabirane namwe, kuko bohava bahindura imitima yanyu, mugakurikira ibigirwamana vyabo. Ariko Salomo yifatanya na bo akaramata kubgo kubagomwa." 
1Kings11:3 Yar’ afise abagore amajana ndwi b’abamikazi bgite, n’abandi amajana atatu bo mu buryo bg’incoreke; nukw abo bagore biwe bamuhuvya umutima." 
1Kings11:4 Kukw amaze gusāza, abagore biwe bāciye bakwegera umutima wiwe ku zindi mana; nuk’ umutima wiwe ntiwaba ugitunganira Uhoraho Imana yiwe, nk’uwa se Dawidi," 
1Kings11:5 kuko Salomo yakurikiye Ashitoreti imanakazi y’Abasidoni, na Milikomu, ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’Abamoni." 
1Kings11:6 Uko ni ko Salomo yakoze ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, ntiyayoboka Uhoraho rwose, nka se Dawidi." 
1Kings11:7 Bukeye Salomo ataba ku mpinga y’umusozi werekeye i Yerusalemu igitabo ca Kemoshi, ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’Abanyamowabu, bo n’ica Moleki, ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’Abamoni." 
1Kings11:8 Uko ni ko yagiriye abagore biwe bose b’abanyamahangakazi, bagahora bosereza imibavu ivyo bigirwamana vy’i wabo, bakabiha ibimazi." 
1Kings11:9 Maz’ Uhoraho arakira Salomo, kuk’ umutima wiwe wavuye kuri we, kand’ Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli ari we yari yaramwiyeretse ibihetangabo kabiri," 
1Kings11:10 kandi yari yaramutesheje ivyo, ngo ntaz’ akurikire izindi mana; ariko ntiyumvira ico Uhoraho yamubariye." 
1Kings11:11 Ni co catumye Uhoraho abarira Salomo, ati Ko wakoze ivyo, ntiwitondere isezerano ryanje n’amabgirizwa yanje nakugeze, sinzogenda ntagushikuye ubgami, nkabuha umusavyi wawe." 
1Kings11:12 Mugabo sinzobikora ku ngoma yawe kubga so Dawidi, ariko nzobushikura umwana wawe." 
1Kings11:13 Na we nyene sinzomushikura ubgami bgose, ariko nzomusigariza umuryango umwe kubga Dawidi umusavyi wanje, no kubga Yerusalemu natoranije." 
1Kings11:14 Maz’ Uhoraho ahagurukiriza Salomo umurwanizi, ni we Hadadi Umunyedomu; yar’ uwo mu nzu y’umwami wa Edomu." 
1Kings11:15 Igihe Dawidi yatera Edomu, Yowabu umugabisha w’ingabo ziwe yadūze guhambisha abāguye mu ntambara, araheza ageseza izinamuhungu wese wo muri Edomu;" 
1Kings11:16 mbere Yowabu n’Abisirayeli bose bamaray’ amezi atandatu, gushitsa baherengeteje izinamuhungu muri Edomu." 
1Kings11:17 Ico gihe Hadadi ahungana n’Abanyedomu bamwe bo mu bantu ba se, kugira ngw ahungire muri Egiputa; kandi Hadadi uwo yar’ akir’ umwana w’umuyabaga." 
1Kings11:18 Nuko bafata inzira, bava i Midiyani bashika i Parani; bahitana abantu bamwe b’i Parani, baja muri Egiputa kwa Farawo umwami waho. Farawo amuha inzu, amugerera ivyo kumutunga, amuha n’itongo." 
1Kings11:19 Maze Hadadi atona cane kuri Farawo, bituma amushingira muramu we, murumuna wa Tahupenesi umwamikazi wiwe." 
1Kings11:20 Hanyuma uwo mugore, murumuna wa Tahupenesi, bavyarana umwana w’umuhungu, bamwita Genubati; igihe kigeze, Tahupenesi aramucūtsa, amujana kwa Farawo; nuko Genubati aguma i bgami mu bana ba Farawo." 
1Kings11:21 Maze Hadadi yumvise ko Dawidi yatanze, agahamvya ba sekuruza, kandi ko Yowabu umugabisha w’ingabo yapfuye, avyumviye muri Egiputa, araheza abarira Farawo, ati Ndekura ngende, nsubire mu gihugu c’i wacu." 
1Kings11:22 Farawo aramubaza, ati Mbega har’ ico wabuze i wanje cotuma ugomba gusubira i wanyu? Na we aramwishura, ati Nta co; ariko pfa kundekura ngende." 
1Kings11:23 Hanyuma Imana yongera guhagurukiriza Salomo uwundi murwanizi, ni we Rezoni mwene Eliyada; uwo yari yarahunze shebuja Hadadezeri umwami w’i Zoba." 
1Kings11:24 Maz’ igihe Dawidi yageseza ab’i Zoba, Rezoni yakoranije abantu, yīgira umugabisha w’igitero; baraheza baja i Damasiko, babayo; na we yīgira umwami waho." 
1Kings11:25 Uwo na we aba umurwanizi w’Abisirayeli imisi yose Salomo yamaze ku ngoma, akora nabi nka Hadadi; yanka Abisirayeli urunuka, kand’ aganza i Siriya." 
1Kings11:26 Maze Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, Umwefurayimu w’i Sereda, umusavyi w’umwami Salomo, na we aramugarariza; nyina yar’ umupfakazi yitwa Zeruwa." 
1Kings11:27 Ivyamuteye kugarariza umwami vyatanguye birtya: Salomo yarikw arubaka i Milo, asana n’ikirengero c’uruzitiro rw’igisagara ca se Dawidi." 
1Kings11:28 Kandi Yerobowamu uwo yar’ umuntu w’umuhinga; nuko Salomo abonye uwo musore kw ar’ umukozi w’umunyamwete, amugira umukoresha w’ibikebere vyose vy’abo mu muryango wa Yosefu." 
1Kings11:29 Maz’ umusi ur’ izina, Yerobowamu avuye i Yerusalemu, Ahiya w’i Shilo, ūvugishwa n’Imana, ahwanira na we mu nzira; kandi Ahiya yari yambaye umwambaro musha; nuko bāri ngaho bonyene mu gahinga ukw ari babiri." 
1Kings11:30 Maze Ahiya afata uwo mwambaro musha yari yambaye, awutaburamw’ ibitabu cumi na bibiri." 
1Kings11:31 Abarira Yerobowamu, ati Ni wābīre ibitabu cumi; kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngw Agiye gutabura ubgami, abukūre mu maboko ya Salomo, aguhemw’ imiryango cumi;" 
1Kings11:32 ngw Ariko we azomusigarana umuryango umwe, ngo Kubga Dawidi umusavyi wiwe, no kubga Yerusalemu, umurwa yitoranirije mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli;" 
1Kings11:33 ngw Abitewe n’uko bāmutaye, bakaja gusenga Ashitoreti imanakazi y’Abasidoni, na Kemoshi imana y’Abanyamowabu, na Milikomu imana y’Abamoni; ntibagendere mu nzira ziwe, ngo bakore ivyo abona ko bibereye, bitondere amabgirizwa yiwe n’ivyagezwe vyiwe, nk’uko Dawidi se wa Salomo yagenza." 
1Kings11:34 Ngw Ariko ntazomunyaga ubgami bgose, ngw Azomureka akomeze kuba umwami imisi yose azomara, ngo Kubga Dawidi umusavyi wiwe yitoranirije, ngo Kuko we yitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe." 
1Kings11:35 Ngw Arik’ ubgo bgami azobunyaga umwana wiwe, abuhe wewe, ni bgo ya miryango cumi." 
1Kings11:36 Ngo Yamar’ uwo mwana wiwe azomuha umuryango umwe, ngo Kugira ng’ umusavvi wiwe Dawidi az’ ahorane itara imbere yiwe i Yerusalemu, ngo Wa murwa yitoranirije ngw ahashire izina ryiwe." 
1Kings11:37 Ngo Maze wewe azokwābīra, aguhe kuganza nk’uk’ umutima wawe ugomba kwose, ngo Kand’ uzoba umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings11:38 Ngo None rero, ni wumvira ivyo azokubarira vyose, ng’ Ukagendera mu nzira ziwe, ng’ Ugakora ivyo abona ko bibereye, ng’ Ukitondera amabgirizwa yiwe n’ivyagezwe vyiwe, ngo Nk’uko Dawidi umusavyi wiwe yagenza, ngo Nukw azobana nawe, ngw Agushingire inzu itazovaho, nk’iyo yashingiye Dawidi, ngo Kand’ azoguha Abisirayeli." 
1Kings11:39 Ngo Nukw azotītūza uruvyaro rwa Dawidi, ngw Aruhōye ivyo, ngw Ariko s’ugushitsa ibihe vyose." 
1Kings11:40 Nuko Salomo arondera ingene yokwica Yerobowamu, ariko Yerobowamu ava hasi, ahungira muri Egiputa kwa Shishaki umwami wa Egiputa; agumayo gushitsa Salomo atanze." 
1Kings11:41 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Salomo, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ ivy’ ubgenge bgiwe, mbega ntivyanditswe mu Gitabo c’Ivyakozwe na Salomo nyene?" 
1Kings11:42 Nukw igihe cose Salomo yamaze ari ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli bose ar’ i Yerusalemu, cabaye imyaka mirongwine." 
1Kings11:43 Nuko Salomo ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa wa se Dawidi; maz’ umwana wiwe Rehobowamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings12:1 Bukeye Rehobowamu aja i Shekemu, kukw ari ho Abisirayeli bose bari bagiye kumwimikira." 
1Kings12:2 Maze Yerobowamu mwene Nebati aravyumva; kandi yar’ akiri muri Egiputa, iyo yari yarahungiye umwami Salomo, akagumayo;" 
1Kings12:3 nuko batuma kumuhamagara. Ashitse araza, bo n’ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli, babarira Rehobowamu," 
1Kings12:4 bati So yadutwaje igitugu; none rero, n’ utugerurire ibikorwa bibabaza so yadukoresha, utugabanyeko n’iyo ntwaro yadutwaza, natwe tuzogusaba." 
1Kings12:5 Arabishura, ati Ni mugende mumare imisi itatu, muze muheze mugaruke. Nukw abantu baragenda." 
1Kings12:6 Maz’ umwami Rehobowamu aragenda agīsha inama abashingantahe bāri kuri se Salomo akiriho, arababaza, ati Mwongīra inama ki nokwishura abo bantu?" 
1Kings12:7 Baramwishura, bat’ Uyu musi ni wemera kwumvira aba bantu, ukabamerera neza, ukabishura amajambo meza, nuko na bo bazokwumvira ibihe vyose." 
1Kings12:8 Ariko yanka iyo nama abo bashingantahe bamugīriye, aja kugīsha inama imisore yārukanye na we, yari kuri we." 
1Kings12:9 Arababaza, at’ Inama yanyu n’inki, twokwishura abo bantu bambariye, ngo ni ndabagabanyekw intwaro data yabatwaza?" 
1Kings12:10 Nukw iyo misore iramubarira, it’ Uze wishure abo bantu bakubariye ngo so yabatwaje igitugu, ariko ngo weho ubagabanyekw iyo ntwaro; uz’ ubabarire, ut’ Uruhererezi rwanje ruruta ubunini ikiyunguyungu ca data!" 
1Kings12:11 Ut’ Ariko naho data yabatwaje igitugu, uti Jeho nzorushiriza; uti Data yabakubitisha ibimoko, ut’ Ariko jeho nzobakubitisha sikorupiyo." 
1Kings12:12 Nuko ku musi ugira gatatu Yerobowamu n’abantu bose baza ku mwami Rehobowamu, nk’uko yababariye kuzogaruka i we ku musi ugira gatatu." 
1Kings12:13 Maz’ umwami yanse inama yagīriwe na ba bashingantahe, yishura abantu abakankamira," 
1Kings12:14 ababarira nk’ ukw inama ya ya misore iri, ati Data yabatwaje igitugu, ariko jeho nzorushiriza; data yabakubitisha ibimoko, ariko jeho nzobakubitisha sikorupiyo." 
1Kings12:15 Nuk’ umwami ntiyemerera abantu; kukw ivyo vyari bivuye k’Uhoraho, kugira ngw ashitse ijambo yari yarabariye Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, aritumye Ahiya w’i Shilo." 
1Kings12:16 Maz’ Abisirayeli bose babonye yuk’ umwami yanse kubemerera, baramubarira, bati Dawidi har’ ico tumwegako? Eka nta mugabane dufise kuri mwene Isayi: yemwe Bisirayeli, hogi twitahire i muhira! Nawe Dawidi, urimenya, mwe n’umuryango wawe! Nukw Abisirayeli baritahira, basubira i wabo." 
1Kings12:17 Arikw Abisirayeli baba mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, abo bo Rehobowamu arabaganza." 
1Kings12:18 Bukeye umwami Rehobowamu arungika Adoramu, ari we yagaba ivy’ abanyabikebere; Abisirayeli bose bamutera amabuye, arapfa. Umwami Rehobowamu avyumvise, aca arakwakwanya yūrira mu mukogote wiwe, ahungira i Yerusalemu." 
1Kings12:19 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāgararije inzu ya Dawidi gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu. 
1Kings12:20 Maz’ Abisirayeli bose bumvise yuko Yerobowamu yagarutse, batuma kumuhamagara ngw aze mw ikoraniro ryabo; baca baramwimika, aba umwami w’Abisirayeli bose; ntihāba hakigira ūsaba ab’ inzu ya Dawidi, atar’ umuryango wa Yuda gusa." 
1Kings12:21 Ariko Rehobowamu ashitse i Yerusalemu, akoranya umuryango wose w’Abayuda, n’umuryango w’Ababenyamini, bakorana ar’ ingabo z’abahizi ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani bo gutera ab’ inzu y’Abisirayeli, ngo bagarukanire Rehobowamu mwene Salomo igihugu." 
1Kings12:22 Maz’ ijambo ry’ Imana riza kuri Shemaya umuntu w’Imana," 
1Kings12:23 riti Barira Rehobowamu mwene Salomo, umwami w’Abayuda, n’abo mu muryango w’Abayuda bose n’uw’ Ababenyamini, n’abandi bantu bose," 
1Kings12:24 ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ntimuze mudūge kurwanya ab’ i wanyu b’Abisirayeli; ngo Ni mwitahire, umuntu wese asubire i we; ngo Kukw ivyabaye vyavuye kuri we. Nuko bumvira ijambo ry’Uhoraho, baritahira, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze." 
1Kings12:25 Maze Yerobowamu yubaka i Shekemu mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, abayo; hanyuma avayo, yubaka i Penuweli." 
1Kings12:26 Maze Yerobowamu yivuganya mu mutima, at’ Ereg’ igihugu kizohava cisubirira ku b’inzu ya Dawidi." 
1Kings12:27 Aba bantu ni bakomeza kudūga i Yerusalemu gutangira ibimazi mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, imitima yabo izosubira kuri shebuja, Rehobowamu umwami w’Abayuda; baheze banyice, bīsubirire kuri we." 
1Kings12:28 Umwami araheza yīgīra inama, acurisha ibishushanyo vy’ amamasa bibiri mw izahabu, abarira abantu, at’ Erega birabagoye kwama mudūga i Yerusalemu: ehe rāba, ngizi imana zanyu zabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, yemwe Bisirayeli!" 
1Kings12:29 Maze kimwe agishinga i Beteli, ikindi i Dani." 
1Kings12:30 Ico kintu gihindukira abantu icaha, kuko bagenda kucikubita imbere, bakarinda bashika no ku c’i Dani." 
1Kings12:31 Kandi yubaka n’ utunyabugoro ahantu hār’ ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi, atoranya mu bandi bantu bose batar’ Abalewi, abagira abaherezi." 
1Kings12:32 Yerobowamu ashinga ko haba umusi mukuru mu kwezi kw’umunani, ku musi wakwo w’icumi na gatanu, uhwanye n’umusi mukuru bāgira i Buyuda, yosereza ibimazi ku gicaniro; n’i Beteli ni ko yabigenza, aha ibimazi vya bishushanyo vy’amamasa yacurishije. I Beteli ahashira abaherezi b’ivyo bitabo yatabishije ku mpinga z’ imisozi." 
1Kings12:33 Aradūga aja ku gicaniro yari yarubakishije i Beteli, hāri ku musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ukwezi kw’umunani, ari kwo kwezi yitoranirije ubgiwe, agashinga uwo musi mukuru w’ Abisirayeli; nukw aradūga aja ku gicaniro, kugira ngw ahosereze imibavu." 
1Kings13:1 Yerobowamu agihagaze ku gicaniro, agira yōse imibavu, haza umuntu w’Imana avuye i Buyuda, aje i Beteli, azanywe n’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
1Kings13:2 Avuga n’ ijwi rirenga, avugishijwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, abarira ico gicaniro, at’ Ewe wa gicaniro, ewe wa gicaniro! Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Mu nzu ya Dawidi hazovuka umwana yitwa Yosiya; ngo Kand’ abaherezi bo mu bitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi bahora bosereza imibavu kuri wewe, ng’ Uyo azobatanga bga bimazi kuri wewe nyene, ngo Kandi kuri wewe ni ho bazoturirira amagufa y’ abantu." 
1Kings13:3 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nyene abaha ikimenyamenya, at’ Iki ni co kimenyamenya Uhoraho atanze: iki gicaniro kigira gisaduke, umunyota wo kuri co usēseke." 
1Kings13:4 Maz’ umwami Yerobowamu yumvise ijambo uwo muntu w’Imana yasemereye, avugiye kur’ ico gicaniro c’i Beteli, amutunga ukuboko ahagaze ku gicaniro, aravuga, ati Ni mumufate! Uwo mwanya ukuboko yar’ amutunze guca kuranyūnyūka, bituma adashobora kukwigarukanako." 
1Kings13:5 Igicaniro na co gica kirasaduka, umunyota wo kuri co urasēseka, nk’ukw ikimenyamenya uwo muntu w’Imana yabahaye kiri, abivugishijwe n’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
1Kings13:6 Maz’ umwami abarira uwo muntu w’ Imana, at’ Inginga Uhoraho Imana yawe ampangaze, unsabire, ukuboko kwanje gukire. Nuk’ uwo muntu w’Imana yinginga Uhoraho, ukuboko kw’umwami kurakira, gusubira kumera uko kwahora." 
1Kings13:7 Maz’ umwami abarira uwo muntu w’Imana, ati Ngwino tujane i wanje, ndakuzimane, nteko ndagutāsure." 
1Kings13:8 Uwo muntu w’Imana yishura umwami, ati Naho wompa igihimba c’ivyo mu ngoro yawe, nta ho twojana i wawe; kandi sinshobora kugira ico ndīra ino, canke ngo ndahanywere n’amazi;" 
1Kings13:9 kukw ari kw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanyihanikirije, ngo Sinze ngire ico ndya, canke ngo nnywe n’amazi, kandi ngo sinze nsubire mu nzira nazananye." 
1Kings13:10 Nukw aragenda, ajana iyindi nzira, ntiyasubira mu nzira yazananye aza i Beteli." 
1Kings13:11 Kand’ i Beteli hār’ umutāma yavugishwa n’Imana; abahungu biwe baraza, bamwīgānira ivyo uwo muntu w’Imana yakoreye i Beteli vyose uwo musi; n’amajambo yabariye umwami, na yo bayīgānira se." 
1Kings13:12 Se arababaza, at’ Aciye mu yihe nzira? Kand’ uwo muntu w’Imana yavuye i Buyuda, abo bahungu bari babonye inzira aciyemw’ iy’ ari yo." 
1Kings13:13 Nukw abarira abahungu biwe, ati Ni munshirire amatandiko ku ndogoba. Bayamushiriyeko, arayūrira," 
1Kings13:14 akurikira uwo muntu w’Imana, asanga yicaye musi y’igiti c’umweloni, aramubaza, ati Mbega ni wewe muntu w’Imana waje uva i Buyuda? Na we at’ Ego me ni jewe." 
1Kings13:15 Aramubarira, ati Ngwino dusubirane i muhira, ufūngure." 
1Kings13:16 Aramwishura, ati Sinemererwa gusubirana inyuma nawe, canke ngo tujane i wawe, canke ngo ngire ico nsangirira nawe aha hantu, ar’ ico kurya cank’ ico kunywa;" 
1Kings13:17 kuko nabariwe n’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ngo Sinze ngire ico ndya, canke ngo nnywe n’amazi, kandi ngo sinze nsubire mu nzira nazananye." 
1Kings13:18 Na we aramwishura, ati Nanje nd’ ūvugishwa n’Imana nkawe, kand’ umumarayika yambariye avugishijwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ati Genda umugarure, umujane i wawe, umuhe ico arya n’ico anywa. Ariko yaramubesha." 
1Kings13:19 Nuko basubirana inyuma; bashitse i we amuha ico arya n’ico anywa. 
1Kings13:20 Bakiri ku meza, ijambo ry’ Uhoraho riza kuri wa muvugishwa yamugaruye;" 
1Kings13:21 avuga n’ijwi rirenga, abarira uwo muntu w’ Imana yavuye i Buyuda, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ko wanse kwumvira ijambo ryiwe, ntiwitondere icagezwe ciwe, Uhoraho Imana yawe," 
1Kings13:22 ariko ng’ Ukagaruka, ukarya ivyo kurya ukanywera n’amazi ahantu yakubujije, ngo Ntuz’ ugire ico urya cank’ ico unywa; ngo Nuko rero, umuvyimba wawe ntuzoruha ushika mu mva ya ba sogokuruza." 
1Kings13:23 Hanyuma amaze kurya no kunywa, wa muvugishwa yamugaruye amushirira amatandiko ku ndogoba;" 
1Kings13:24 nukw aragenda; araheza ahūra n’intambge, iramwica, umuvyimba wiwe urambarara mu nzira, indogoba iwuhagarara i ruhande; intambge na yo ihagarara i ruhande y’uwo muvyimba nyene." 
1Kings13:25 Maz’ abantu bahaciye, babona uwo muvyimba urambaraye mu nzira, n’intambge iwuhagaze i ruhande; baragenda babivuga mu gisagara ah’ uwo muvugishwa w’umutāma yaba." 
1Kings13:26 Maz’ uwo muvugishwa yamugaruriye mu nzira avyumvise, aravuga, ati Ni wa muntu w’ Imana atumviye ijambo ry’Uhoraho; ni co gitumye Uhoraho amutērēra intambge, ikamutabagura, ikamwica, nk’ukw ijambo ryiwe ryamubariye." 
1Kings13:27 Araheza abarira abahungu biwe, ati Ni munshirire amatandiko ku ndogoba; nuko bayashira kuri yo." 
1Kings13:28 Nukw aragenda, asanga uwo muvyimba urambaraye mu nzira, na ya ndogoba n’intambge bihagaze i ruhande yawo; arikw iyo ntambge ntiyari yariye uwo muvyimba, canke ngw itabagure iyo ndogoba." 
1Kings13:29 Nuk’ uwo muvugishwa w’umutāma aterura umuvyimba w’uwo muntu w’Imana, awuremēka iyo ndogoba, arawuhindukirana, awujana mu gisagara, ngw amuririre, amuhambe;" 
1Kings13:30 ahamba uwo muvyimba mu mva yiwe yari yiyimbiye; baramuborogera, bati Yō! Ewe mwene data!" 
1Kings13:31 Nukw amaze kumuhamba, abarira abahungu biwe, ati Ni napfa, muze mumpambe mur’ iyi mva uwo muntu w’Imana ahambgemwo; umuvyimba wanje muze muwurambike i ruhande y’amagufa yiwe." 
1Kings13:32 Kukw ivyo yavuze n’ijwi rirenga ata kizobibuza gushika, abivugishijwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, abarira ico gicaniro c’i Beteli n’utunyabugoro twose two mu bitabo vyo mu bisagara vy’i Samariya." 
1Kings13:33 No hanyuma y’ivyo, Yerobowamu ntiyahindukiye ngw areke inzira yiwe mbi, arikw akomeza gupfa gutoranya mu bantu bose abo agira abaherezi bo mu bitabo; uwabigomba wese yaramurobanura, kugira ngw abe umuherezi wo mu bitabo." 
1Kings13:34 Nukw ico kibera inzu ya Yerobowamu akaziri, kiraruha kiyikwegera gucibga no guheneberezwa kw isi." 
1Kings14:1 Ico gihe Abiya mwene Yerobowamu ararwara. 
1Kings14:2 Yerobowamu abarira umwamikazi wiwe, at’ Enda genda wiyoberanye, kugira ngo woye kumenyekana k’ur’ uwanje, uheze uje i Shilo; ni ho ūvugishwa n’Imana Ahiya aba, umwe yavuga ko nzoba umwami w’aba bantu." 
1Kings14:3 Ujane amarobe cumi y’imitsima, n’ utundi dutsima dukaranze, n’ ikarabo ry’umutsama w’ubūki, uje i we; na we azokubarira ivy’ uyu mwana ivy’ ari vyo." 
1Kings14:4 Nuk’ umwamikazi wa Yerobowamu abigenza artyo, arahaguruka, aja i Shilo kwa Ahiya. Kandi Ahiya ntiyar’ agishobora kubona, kukw amaso yiwe yar’ asigaye ar’ ivyijiji kubg’ ubusāza." 
1Kings14:5 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Ahiya, at’ Ehe muka Yerobowamu araje kukubaza ivy’ umwana wiwe arwaye; nuk’ umubgire ibi n’ibi; kandi ni yashika, aza kuba yihinduye uwundi." 
1Kings14:6 Nuko Ahiya, yumvise ibirenge vyiwe acinjira mu muryango, aramubarira, ati Shika, yewe muka Yerobowamu! N’iki gitumye wihindura uwundi, kandi ngutumwekw inkuru mbi?" 
1Kings14:7 Genda ubarire Yerobowamu, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho, Imana y’ Abisirayeli, agize: ngo Yagukūye mu bandi bantu, agushira hejuru, ngw Akugira segaba w’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli;" 
1Kings14:8 ngw Akugabaniriza igihugu, agikūye ku nzu ya Dawidi; ngw Ariko wewe ntiwamumereye nk’umusavyi wiwe Dawidi yitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe, ngw Akamukurikira n’ umutima wiwe wose, agakora ibishimwa imbere yiwe;" 
1Kings14:9 ngw Arik’ ukora ibibi kurenza abakubanjirije bose, ng’ Uragenda wironderera izindi mana z’ibishushanyo bivugutiwe mu nkero, ng’ Uramuratsa, umushiburira inyuma yawe;" 
1Kings14:10 ngo Nuko rero, ngo Ni co kizotuma atēza ivyago inzu ya Yerobowamu, agaherengeteza izinamuhungu wese kuri Yerobowamu aho bava bakagera mu Bisirayeli, ngw Agafyēfyētura inzu ya Yerobowamu, nk’uk’ umuntu afyēfyētura amavyi akayamaririkanya." 
1Kings14:11 Ng’ Ūzogwa mu gisagara mu ba Yerobowamu azoribga n’imbga; ng’ Ūzogwa mu gahinga azoribga n’ibisīga, kuk’ Uhoraho ari we abivuze." 
1Kings14:12 Nuko rero haguruka utahe i muhira; mugabo, ukigira ng’ urashinga ibirenge ku murwa, uwo mwana azoca acikana." 
1Kings14:13 Kand’ Abisirayeli bose bazomuririra, bamuhambe; uwo ni we wenyene mu ba Yerobowamu azohambga mu mva, kuko mu nzu ya Yerobowamu ari we gusa yagize ivyiza abonekwakw imbere y’Uhoraho, Imana y’ Abisirayeli." 
1Kings14:14 Kand’ Uhoraho azokwihagurukiriza mu Bisirayeli umwami azohonnya ab’ inzu ya Yerobowamu uwo musi. 
1Kings14:15 Kuk’ uhereye ubu, Uhoraho agiye gukubita Abisirayeli, babe nk’ irenga rinyiganyigira mu mazi, arandure Abisirayeli mur’ iki gihugu ciza yari yarahaye ba sekuruza, abashwiragirize hakurya ya rwa ruzi Efurate, kuko bashingiye Ashera inkingi, bagatera umwikomo Uhoraho, bakamuratsa." 
1Kings14:16 Kand’ azoheba Abisirayeli, abahōye ivyaha Yerobowamu yakoze, akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings14:17 Nuko muka Yerobowamu arahaguruka, aragenda, asubira i Tirusa; agishika ku muryango w’ingoro, uwo mwana aracikana." 
1Kings14:18 Abisirayeli bose baramuhamba, baramuririra, nk’ukw ijambo Uhoraho yavugishije umusavyi wiwe Ahiya riri." 
1Kings14:19 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yerobowamu, n’intambara yarwanye, n’uburyo yaganje, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings14:20 Igihe Yerobowamu yamaze ari ku ngoma yabaye imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri; nukw ahamvya ba sekuruza, maz’ umuhungu wiwe Nadabu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings14:21 Kandi Rehobowamu ni we yabaye ku ngoma i Buyuda; yimye amaze imyaka mirongwine n’umwe, yamaze ku ngoma imyaka cumi n’indwi i Yerusalemu, umurwa Uhoraho yari yaritoranirije mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, ngw ahashire izina ryiwe; nyina yitwa Nayama w’Umwamonikazi." 
1Kings14:22 Maz’ Abayuda bakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, bamuteza ifuhe ivyaha bakoze, birengeye ivyo ba sekuruza bakoze vyose." 
1Kings14:23 Kuko bītabiye ibitabo, bagashinga n’amabuye kw inkingi, bo n’inkingi bashingiye Ashera, ku musozi muremure wose no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye." 
1Kings14:24 Mbere mur’ ico gihugu hāri n’abagabo bendana. Kandi bākora ibizira vyose abanyamahanga bākora, abo Uhoraho yirukanye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings14:25 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu umwami Rehobowamu ari ku ngoma, Shishaki umwami wa Egiputa aradūga atera i Yerusalemu;" 
1Kings14:26 asahura ivy’ ubutunzi vyari bibītswe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho n’ivyo mu ngoro y’umwami, arabijana vyose, ajana n’inkinzo zose z’amazahabu Salomo yari yaracurishije." 
1Kings14:27 Maz’ umwami Rehobowamu acurisha izindi nkinzo mu miringa zo gusubira mu gishingo cazo, azizēza abakuru b’ abashibamyi bāshibama ku gisapfu c’ingoro y’umwami." 
1Kings14:28 Kand’ uk’ umwami yaja mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, abo bashibamyi bāgenda bazijanye, hanyuma bakazigarukana bakazisubiza mu nzu yabo." 
1Kings14:29 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Rehobowamu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abayuda?" 
1Kings14:30 Kandi hāmah’ intambara hagati ya Rehobowamu na Yerobowamu na ntaryo. 
1Kings14:31 Nuko Rehobowamu ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa Dawidi; kandi nyina yitwa Nayama w’Umwamonikazi. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Abiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings15:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani umwami Yerobowamu mwene Nebati ari ku ngoma, ni ho Abiya yima i Buyuda." 
1Kings15:2 Amara imyaka itatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma, kandi nyina yitwa Mayaka umukobga wa Abishalomu." 
1Kings15:3 Nuko Abiya akomeza kugendera mu vyaha vyose vya se, ivyo yakoze Abiya atarīma; kand’ umutima wiwe ntiwar’ utunganiye Uhoraho Imana yiwe, nk’uwa sekuruza Dawidi." 
1Kings15:4 Yamar’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe amuha itara i Yerusalemu, kuko yamuhaye umwana wo kumusubirira ku ngoma, atuma n’i Yerusalemu hahangama kubga Dawidi;" 
1Kings15:5 kuko Dawidi yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, ntakikame ngw ace mu kintu na kimwe yamugeze igihe cose yamaze akiriho, ukūye ivyo yakoze ku vya Uriya Umuheti." 
1Kings15:6 Kandi Rehobowamu akiriho, hāmah’ intambara hagati yiwe na Yerobowamu;" 
1Kings15:7 no hagati ya Abiya na Yerobowamu hakomeza kubah’ intambara. Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Abiya, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abayuda?" 
1Kings15:8 Nuko Abiya ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Asa asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings15:9 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri Yerobowamu umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, ni ho Asa yima i Buyuda." 
1Kings15:10 Amara imyaka mirongwine n’umwe i Yerusalemu, ari ku ngoma; kandi inakuru yitwa Mayaka umukobga wa Abishalomu." 
1Kings15:11 Asa uwo yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’uko sekuruza Dawidi yakora." 
1Kings15:12 Akūra mu gihugu abagabo bendana, akūraho n’ibishushanyo vyose ba se birondereye." 
1Kings15:13 Mbere yirukana na inakuru Mayaka mu bugabekazi, kuko yabājishije igishushanyo c’ubuyobe ngo kibe Ashera; asitura ubgo buyobe bgiwe, agituririra ku mugezi Kidironi." 
1Kings15:14 Arikw ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi vyo ntivyākūrwaho; mugabo, umutima wiwe war’ utunganiye Uhoraho igihe cose yamaze akiriho." 
1Kings15:15 Kandi yinjiza mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho ibintu se yari yaratanzekw inyegu, n’ivyo yatanzekw inyegu na we ubgiwe, amafeza n’ amazahabu, n’ibintu vy’ibikoreshwa." 
1Kings15:16 Kandi hāmah’ intambara hagati ya Asa na Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli igihe cabo cose. 
1Kings15:17 Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli atera i Buyuda, yubaka i Rama, ngo yīmīre abaja kwa Asa umwami w’Abayuda, cank’ abavayo." 
1Kings15:18 Maz’ umwami Asa abibonye, ahitana amafeza n’amazahabu yose yar’ asigaye mu bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho n’ubgo mu ngoro yiwe, ayarungikana abantu biwe, abatuma kwa Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya yaba i Damasiko; yari mwene Taburimoni, Taburimoni mwene Heziyoni." 
1Kings15:19 Abatuma ut’ Urazi ko mwe na we mufitaniye isezerano, uti Kandi ryamye hagati ya so na se; uti Non’ akurungikiye ingabire y’ifeza n’izahabu: uti Genda ureke isezerano war’ ufitaniye na Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli, uti Kugira ngw amuvire mu gihugu." 
1Kings15:20 Nuko Beni‐hadadi yemerera umwami Asa, agomora abagabisha b’ingabo ziwe ngo baje gutera ibisagara vy’Abisirayeli; nuko batsinda Iyoni n’i Dani n’i Abeli‐beti‐mayaka n’i Kinereti hose n’igihugu cose c’i Bunafutali." 
1Kings15:21 Bayasha avyumvise, areka kwubaka i Rama, aragenda asubira i Tirusa." 
1Kings15:22 Maz’ umwami Asa araheza ahamagaza Abayuda bose, ata n’umwe asize, baja i Rama bakūray’ amabuye n’ibiti, ivyo Bayasha yarikw arubakisha; maz’ umwami Asa avyubakisha i Geba h’i Bubenyamini n’i Misipa." 
1Kings15:23 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Asa, n’ivy’ ububasha bgiwe bgose, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ibisagara yubatse, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’ abami b’i Buyuda? Arikw ageze mu zabukuru, arwara ibirenge." 
1Kings15:24 Nuko Asa ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa sekuruza Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoshafati asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings15:25 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Nadabu mwene Yerobowamu yima mu Bgisirayeli; amara imyaka ibiri aganza Abisirayeli." 
1Kings15:26 Yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, akagendera mu ngeso za se, no mu vyaha yakoze, akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings15:27 Maze hanyuma Bayasha mwene Ahiya, wo mu muryango wa Isakari, aramugarariza; amwicira i Gibetoni haganzwa n’Abafilisitiya; kukw ico gihe Nadabu n’ Abisirayeli bose bari bateye i Gibetoni bahūgarije." 
1Kings15:28 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Asa umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma ni ho ico gihe Bayasha yamwica; araheza yiyimika mu gishingo ciwe. 
1Kings15:29 Agiheza kwima, ageseza ab’ inzu ya Yerobowamu bose; mu ba Yerobowamu ntiyasiga n’umwe agihumeka, gushitsa abaherengeteje, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, iryo yavugiye mu kanwa k’umusavyi wiwe Ahiya w’i Shilo," 
1Kings15:30 kubg’ ivyaha Yerobowamu yakoze, akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli, no kubg’ umwikomo yateye Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, akamuratsa." 
1Kings15:31 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Nadabu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings15:32 Kandi hāmah’ intambara hagati ya Asa na Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli igihe cabo cose. 
1Kings15:33 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Bayasha mwene Ahiya yimira i Tirusa, agaca aganza Abisirayeli bose; amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’ine ari ku ngoma." 
1Kings15:34 Yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, akagendera mu ngeso za Yerobowamu, no mu vyaha yakoze, akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings16:1 Bukeye ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yehu mwene Hanani, ryagiriza Bayasha;" 
1Kings16:2 riti Nagukūye mu mukungugu ndagushira hejuru, nkugira segaba w’abantu banje b’Abisirayeli; rit’ Ariko non’ ugendera mu ngeso za Yerobowamu, ukwegera abantu banje b’Abisirayeli mu vyaha, kugira ngo bantēze umwikomo ivyaha vyabo ngo ndake;" 
1Kings16:3 rit’ Ehe ngira ngufyēfyēturane n’ inzu yawe, yewe Bayasha, kand’ inzu yawe nzoyigira nk’iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati;" 
1Kings16:4 rit’ Ūzogwa mu gisagara mu bawe azoribga n’imbga, kand’ ūzogwa mu gahinga azoribga n’ibisīga." 
1Kings16:5 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Bayasha, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivy’ ububasha bgiwe, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings16:6 Nuko Bayasha ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga i Tirusa; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ela asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings16:7 Kandi hāri haje ijambo ry’Uhoraho kuri Yehu mwene Hanani, ryagiriza Bayasha bo n’inzu yiwe, kubg’ ibibi vyose yakoze imbere y’Uhoraho, amutēza umwikomo ibikorwa vyiwe yakoze kubgo kwīgāna ab’ inzu ya Yerobowamu, no kubgo kubageseza." 
1Kings16:8 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatandatu Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Ela mwene Bayasha yima i Tirusa mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:9 Maz’ umuntu wiwe yitwa Zimuri, umugabisha yagaba igice c’imikogote yiwe y’intambara, aramugarariza. Ico gihe Ela yar’ i Tirusa, yarikw aranywera ku mubgiriza wiwe Arusa, amaze kuborerwa." 
1Kings16:10 Zimuri arinjira, amutsindaho, aramwica, araheza yiyimika mu gishingo ciwe; hāri mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri n’indwi Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:11 Amaze kwima, agishika ku ngoma, ageseza ab’ inzu ya Bayasha bose, ntiyamusigariza icitwa umuhungu n’umwe, uhereye ku b’i wabo no ku bagenzi biwe." 
1Kings16:12 Uko ni ko Zimuri yahenebereje ab’ inzu ya Bayasha bose, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, iryo yavugishije Yehu, yagiriza Bayasha," 
1Kings16:13 kubg’ ivyaha vyose vya Bayasha n’ivy’ umuhungu wiwe Ela, ivyo bākoze, bakabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli, bagatera umwikomo Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, bakamurakisha ibishushanyo vyabo." 
1Kings16:14 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Ela, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’ abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings16:15 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri n’indwi Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Zimuri yima i Tirusa, amara imisi ndwi ari ku ngoma. Ico gihe abantu bari bateye i Gibetoni haganzwa n’ Abafilisitiya, bahūgarije." 
1Kings16:16 Maz’ abantu bari bashagaje aho, bumva bavuga, bati Zimuri yayovye, yishe umwami. Uwo musi nyene Abisirayeli bose ni kwo kwimika Omuri, umugabisha w’ingabo, ngw abe umwami wabo; bamwimikira aho nyene aho bashagaje." 
1Kings16:17 Maze Omuri n’Abisirayeli bose bari kumwe na we, baca bareka i Gibetoni, baja gutera i Tirusa, barahūgariza." 
1Kings16:18 Maze Zimuri abonye ko batsinze igisagara, yitera mu munara wo mu rugo i bgami, yītuririramwo, arapfa," 
1Kings16:19 azize ivyaha vyiwe yakoze, kuko yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, akagendera mu ngeso za Yerobowamu no mu vyaha vyiwe yakora abikwegeramwo n’ Abisirayeli." 
1Kings16:20 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Zimuri, n’ingene yayovye, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings16:21 Maz’ Abisirayeli bigabanyamw’ ibice bibiri, igice kimwe gikurikira Tibuni mwene Ginati, kugira ngo bamwimike, ikindi gikurikira Omuri." 
1Kings16:22 Arikw abākurikiye Omuri banesha abākurikiye Tibuni mwene Ginati; nukw ivyo bizanira Tibuni urupfu, Omuri ahangama ku ngoma." 
1Kings16:23 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu na rimwe Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Omuri yima mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka cumi n’ibiri ku ngoma; i Tirusa yahamaze imyaka itandatu;" 
1Kings16:24 bukeye agura na Shemeri umusozi w’i Samariya, atanga italanto zibiri z’ifeza, yubaka kur’ uwo musozi; umurwa yubatse awita Samariya, awitiriye Shemeri nyen’ uwo musozi." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, arusha abāmwitangiye imbere bose gukora ivyaha;" 
1Kings16:26 kuko yagendera mu ngeso zose za Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, no mu vyaha vyiwe yakora abikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli, bigatuma batera umwikomo Uhoraho Imana yabo, bakamurakisha ibishushanyo vyabo." 
1Kings16:27 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Omuri, n’ivy’ ubuhizi bgiwe, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings16:28 Nuko Omuri ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba i Samariya; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahabu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings16:29 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’umunani Asa umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Ahabu mwene Omuri yima mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri i Samariya aganza Abisirayeli." 
1Kings16:30 Kandi Ahabu uwo, mwene Omuri, akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi kurusha abāmwitangiye imbere bose." 
1Kings16:31 Kandi nk’ ah’ umengo vyamubereye ivyoroshe kugendera mu ngeso za Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, agerekako yābīra Yezebeli umukobga wa Etibayali umwami w’Abasidoni, aragenda asaba Bayali, aba ari yo asenga;" 
1Kings16:32 mbere yubakira Bayali igicaniro mu ngoro yayubakiye i Samariya," 
1Kings16:33 ashinga n’ inkingi za Ashera. Kandi Ahabu uwo yakoze ivyo gutera umwikomo Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, kurusha abandi bami bose b’Abisirayeli bāmwitangiye imbere." 
1Kings16:34 Kandi ku ngoma yiwe ni ho Hiyeli w’i Beteli yubaka i Yeriko. Acubaka itanguriro ryaho abura umwana wiwe w’imfura yitwa Abiramu, maz’ agitera ibikingi vy’amarembo yaho abura umwana wiwe w’umuhererezi yitwa Segubu, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, arivugiye mu kanwa ka Yosuwa mwene Nuni." 
1Kings17:1 Bukeye Eliya w’i Tishubi, umwe mu bāgerereye i Gileyadi, aragenda abarira Ahabu, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ari we nyene nsavye, yukw ata kime kizotonda cank’ imvura ngw ikoroke mur’ iyi myaka, atari jewe mbivuze." 
1Kings17:2 Hanyuma ijambo ry’Uhoraho rimuzako," 
1Kings17:3 riti Va hano ugende werekeye i burasirazuba, winyegeze ku mugezi Keriti, ahahera i burasirazuba bga Yorodani." 
1Kings17:4 Uzohora unywa ku mazi yawo, kandi nageze ibikona ko bizohora bikugaburirirayo." 
1Kings17:5 Nukw aragenda, agira nk’ukw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryamubariye, aja kur’ uwo mugezi Keriti, ahahera i burasirazuba bga Yorodani, agumayo." 
1Kings17:6 Ibikona bikāma bimuzanira umutsima n’inyama uko bukeye, mu gitondo no ku mugoroba; kand’ akāma anywa amazi kur’ uwo mugezi." 
1Kings17:7 Igihe kiragera uwo mugezi urakama, kukw ata mvura yagwa mur’ ico gihugu." 
1Kings17:8 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rimuzako," 
1Kings17:9 riti Va hasi, uje i Zarefati mu ntāra y’Abasidoni, abe ari ho uba; rāba ngeze umugore w’ umupfakazi waho kuzokwama akugaburira." 
1Kings17:10 Nukw akora inzira, aja i Zarefati; agishika kw irembo ry’igisagara, agize artya abona umugore w’umupfakazi arikw aratoragura udukwi. Eliya aramuhamagara, aramubarira, ati Ntabara urābe ico wonzaniramw’ utuzi two kunywa." 
1Kings17:11 Akirikw aragenda kuyazana, aramuhamagara, at’ Urantabara unzanire n’ utwo notamira." 
1Kings17:12 Aramwishura, ati Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, nta co mfise co kurya, atar’ agafu ku rushi gasigaye mu gaseke, n’uturāngūzwa tw’amavuta ya elayo mu gakarabo; mber’ ubu ngira ntoragure udukwi tubiri, kugira ngo ngende i muhira ndakīcumbire, twe n’umwana wanje, tukarye, duheze duhwere." 
1Kings17:13 Eliya aramwishura, ati Ntutinye: genda ugire nk’uk’ uvuze; mugabo, ubanze uncumbireko gatoya, ukanzanire hano, uheze ubone kwicumbira, mwe n’umwana wawe;" 
1Kings17:14 kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngw Ako gaseke ntikazoshiramw’ ifu, n’ako gakarabo ntikazoshiramw’ amavuta, gushitsa ku musi Uhoraho azorekurira imvura kw isi." 
1Kings17:15 Nukw aragenda, agira nk’uko Eliya yavuze; kand’ uwo mugore n’abo mu rugo rwiwe na Eliya babirya igihe kirekire." 
1Kings17:16 Ako gaseke ntikāshiramw’ ifu, n’ako gakarabo ntikāshiramw’ amavuta, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, iryo yavugiye muri Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Hanyuma y’ivyo, umwana w’ uwo mugore nyen’ urugo ararwara; indwara yiwe ikomeza kuja imbere gushitsa ah’ atagihumeka." 
1Kings17:18 Nyina abarira Eliya, ati Twapfuye iki ga muntu w’Imana? Waje i wanje kwibukiriza ivyaha vyanje, no kunyicishiriza umwana?" 
1Kings17:19 Eliya aramubarira, ati Mpa uwo mwana wawe. Nukw amumukūra mu gikiriza, aramuterura, amwūrirana mu cumba co hejuru, ah’ arāra, amurambika ku buriri bgiwe." 
1Kings17:20 Araheza atakambira Uhoraho, at’ Ewe Uhoraho Mana yanje, mbeg’ uyu mupfakazi yampaye indāro, umuteje ivyago ng’ umwicire umwana?" 
1Kings17:21 Maze yubarara kur’ uyo mwana ibihetangabo gatatu, atakambira Uhoraho, at’ Ewe Uhoraho Mana yanje, ndakwinginze, ubugingo bg’uyu mwana bumugarukemwo." 
1Kings17:22 Nuk’ Uhoraho yumvira Eliya, ubugingo bg’uyo mwana bumugarukamwo, arahēmbūka." 
1Kings17:23 Maze Eliya yābīra uwo mwana, aramwururukana amukūye mur’ ico cumba co hejuru, aramwinjirana amuha nyina; Eliya aramubarira, at’ Eh’ umwana wawe ni muzima." 
1Kings17:24 Uwo mugore abarira Eliya, ati Noneho mmenye k’ur’ umuntu w’Imana koko, kandi kw ijambo ry’Uhoraho uvuga ar’ iry’ ukuri." 
1Kings18:1 Hashize igihe kirekire ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Eliya; hāri mu mwaka ugira gatatu inzara iteye. Riti Genda wiyereke Ahabu, nanje nzorekurira imvura kw isi." 
1Kings18:2 Nuko Eliya aragenda, ngw aje kwiyereka Ahabu. Ico gihe kigoyi cari cinshi cane i Samariya," 
1Kings18:3 kandi Ahabu yari yahamagaye Obadiya umubgiriza wiwe. Kandi Obadiya uwo yama yubaha Uhoraho cane; 
1Kings18:4 ushime, aho Yezebeli yahonnya abavugishwa b’Uhoraho, Obadiya yahitanye abavugishwa ijana, arabanyegeza, mirongwitanu mw isenga rimwe, yindi mirongwitanu mu rindi, akabagaburira ivyo kurya n’amazi." 
1Kings18:5 Maze Ahabu abarira Obadiya, ati Genda ugendure igihugu cose, ahantu hose har’ amariba y’amazi, no ku myonga yose; kumbure twobonay’ uturemba two gukiza amafarasi n’ inyumbu, kugira ngo binanage, ntitubure vyose." 
1Kings18:6 Nuko bagabura igihugu kugira ngo bakigendure; Ahabu ajana iyiwe nzira, Obadiya ajana iyindi." 
1Kings18:7 Maze Obadiya ari mu nzira, agira artya abona Eliya aza iy’ ari; aramumenya, akubita inkoro hasi, aramubaza, ati Mbega ni wewe ga mugenzi?" 
1Kings18:8 Aramwishura, ati Ni jewe; genda ubarire shobuja, uti Eliya ari hano." 
1Kings18:9 Obadiya aramwishura, ati Nagucumuyekw iki, gitumye ungabura mu maboko ya Ahabu ngw anyice?" 
1Kings18:10 Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho Imana yawe, nta hanga na rimwe cank’ igihugu, databuja atātumye kukurondereramwo; bahakanye k’utariyo, yaciye yaka indahiro abami b’ivyo bihugu cank’ ayo mahanga ko bakubuze koko." 
1Kings18:11 Non’ ugize ngo ni ngende mbarire databuja yuk’ uri hano! 
1Kings18:12 Ariko ni namara gutandukana nawe, Mpwemu w’Uhoraho ahava akujana ahandi ntazi; nuko ni naja kubibgira Ahabu, akaza ntakubone, aranyica. Yamara jewe umusavyi wawe nahereye mu buto bganje nubaha Uhoraho." 
1Kings18:13 Mbega none mugenzi, nta ho bakubariye ivyo nakoze, igihe Yezebeli yica abavugishwa b’Uhoraho, ko nanyegeje abantu b’abavugishwa ijana, mirongwitanu mw isenga rimwe, yindi mirongwitanu mu rindi, nkabagaburira ivyo kurya n’amazi?" 
1Kings18:14 Non’ urambarira ngo ni ngende mbarire databuja k’uri hano; ntuzi kw aheza akanyica? 
1Kings18:15 Eliya aramwishura, ati Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ari we nyene nsavye, nkagenda ntamwiyeretse uyu musi." 
1Kings18:16 Nuko Obadiya aragenda aja kurondera Ahabu, arabimubarira; Ahabu araheza aza guhūra na Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Maze Ahabu abonye Eliya, aramubarira, ati Mbega ni wewe nyene, n’ukuntu wateje amagorwa Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings18:18 Na we aramwishura, at’ Eka si jewe nateje amagorwa Abisirayeli, ariko ni wewe, mwe n’inzu ya so, mwayabateye, kuko mwaretse ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho, mugakurikira za Bayali." 
1Kings18:19 Nuko rero n’umpamagarize Abisirayeli bose, bakoranire ku musozi Karumeli, bo na ba kamenyi ba Bayali ukw ar’ amajana ane na mirongwitanu, na ba kamenyi ba Ashera barīra ku meza ya Yezebeli, ukw ar’ amajana ane." 
1Kings18:20 Maze Ahabu atuma guhamagaza Abisirayeli bose, bo n’abo ba kamenyi, abakoraniriza ku musozi Karumeli." 
1Kings18:21 Nuko Eliya yēgēra abantu bose, arababarira, ati Muzogeza ryari kuba ba nyamujiryanino? Asangw’ Uhoraho ari we Mana, ni mumukurikire; na ho nyene ni yaba Bayali, abe ari yo mukurikira. Abantu ntibamwishura ijambo na rimwe." 
1Kings18:22 Maze Eliya arongera abarira abantu, ati Ni jewe jenyene nsigaye mu bavugishwa n’Uhoraho; ariko ba kamenyi ba Bayali n’ amajana ane na mirongwitanu." 
1Kings18:23 Nuko ni baduhe amamasa abiri; baheze bihitiremw’ iyo bagomba, bayibāge bayijanjagure mu bikenye vyayo, babigereke ku nkwi, ariko boye gushirak’ umuriro; nanje ndabāga iya kabiri, ndayigereke ku nkwi nyene, sinshirek’ umuriro." 
1Kings18:24 Muheze mutakambire izina ry’imana yanyu, nanje ndatakambira izina ry’Uhoraho. Maz’ Imana iza kwishurisha kurekura umuriro, iza kuba ari yo Mana. Abantu bose baravuga, bat’ Iyo nama ni yo!" 
1Kings18:25 Maze Eliya abarira abo ba kamenyi ba Bayali, ati Ni muhitemw’ imasa mugomba; mube ari mwebge mubanza kubāga, kuko muri benshi, muheze mutakambire izina ry’imana yanyu, ariko ntimushirek’ umuriro." 
1Kings18:26 Nuko bābīra imasa bahawe, barayibāga, maze batakambira izina rya Bayali, uhereye mu gitondo ugashitsa mu mashōka, bavuga, bat’ Ewe Bayali, n’utwumvire! Ariko ntihagira ijwi ryumvikana cank’ ikibishura na mba. Basimbagurika bicumbagiza hirya no hino y’igicaniro bubatse." 
1Kings18:27 Bagejeje mu mashōka, Eliya arabashinyagurira, ati Ni mushire ijwi hejuru: erega n’imana! Kumbure yahubiye ku bindi, canke har’ ibiyifatiriye, canke yamaze urubanza, canke kumbure irasinziriye mukwiye kuyikangura!" 
1Kings18:28 Nuko barashimika bashira amajwi hejuru, bikebagurisha intambi n’amacumu, nk’ uk’ umugenzo wabo war’ uri: amaraso aravirirana." 
1Kings18:29 Maz’ igihe c’amashōka kirenze, batangura kuvovota, gushitsa igihe kigeze co gutanga ikimazi ca ni kera; ariko ntihagira ijwi ribītaba, cank’ ikibishura, cank’ ikibababara." 
1Kings18:30 Maze Eliya abarira abantu bose, ati Ni mwīgire hino; nukw abantu bose baramwēgēra. Asanasana igicaniro c’Uhoraho cari carahomvotse." 
1Kings18:31 Araheza yābīra amabuye cumi n’abiri, nk’ukw igitigiri c’imiryango ya bene Yakobo kingana, ari we nyene ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryajeko, riti Isirayeli ni ryo ribaye izina ryawe." 
1Kings18:32 Nukw ayo mabuye Eliya ayubakisha ico gicaniro mw izina ry’Uhoraho: araheza yimba umuvo ukikuje ico gicaniro, uburebure bgawo bg’ amajepfo bgokwuzuzwa n’ingero zibiri z’imbuto." 
1Kings18:33 Araheza akomānya inkwi, abāga ya masa, ayijanjagura mu bikenye vyayo, abigereka kur’ izo nkwi. Maz’ arababarira, ati Ni mwuzuze imibindi ine amazi, muyasuke ku kimazi co kwoswa no ku nkwi. Barabigira." 
1Kings18:34 Arababarira, ati Ni musubīre ubugira kabiri. Barasubīra. Arongera, ati Ni musubīre n’ ubugira gatatu. Bagira kuno nyene." 
1Kings18:35 Amazi arasēndēra, atembera hirya no hino y’igicaniro; yuzuza n’uyo muvo amazi." 
1Kings18:36 Maz’ igihe co gutanga ikimazi ca ni kera kigeze, uwo muvugishwa n’Imana Eliya yīgira hafi, aravuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya Aburahamu na Isaka na Isirayeli, uyu musi bimenyekane kw ari wewe Mana mu Bisirayeli, nanje ko nd’ umusavyi wawe, kandi ko nkoze ibi vyose kubg’ ijambo ryawe." 
1Kings18:37 Unyumvire se, ewe Uhoraho, unyumvire kugira ngw aba bantu bamenye kw ari wewe Mana, ewe Uhoraho, kandi kw ari wewe ugarukana imitima yabo." 
1Kings18:38 Maz’ umuriro w’Uhoraho uca uratibuka, uturira ikimazi co kwoswa na za nkwi na ya mabuye n’umukungugu, urigata na ya mazi yari mu muvo." 
1Kings18:39 Maz’ abantu bose babibonye, barunama bashika hasi, baravuga, bat’ Uhoraho ni we Mana, Uhoraho ni we Mana!" 
1Kings18:40 Maze Eliya arababarira, ati Ni mufate abo ba kamenyi ba Bayali, ntihagire ūcika n’umwe. Barabafata; maze Eliya abamanukana ku mugezi Kishoni, abīcirayo." 
1Kings18:41 Maze Eliya abarira Ahabu, ati Genda udūge, ufūngure, wuhire, kuko numva akariri k’imvura nyinshi." 
1Kings18:42 Nuko Ahabu aradūga, aja gufūngura. Eliya na we aradūga, aja ku mpinga y’uwo musozi Karumeli, arunama ashika hasi, acurika umutwe mu maguru." 
1Kings18:43 Abarira umuntu wiwe, ati Dūga, witegereze ku kiyaga. Aradūga, aritegereza; aragaruka, aramubarira, ati Nta kintu mbonye. Aramubarira, ati Subira ugende, ushitse ibihetangabo ndwi." 
1Kings18:44 Hanyuma ku bugira indwi, aravuga, at’ Ehe mbonye agacu gatoya kangana ikiganza c’umuntu, kadūga kava mu kiyaga. Eliya aramubarira, ati Genda ubarire Ahabu, uti Zirikisha umukogote wawe ku mafarasi, umanuke, ut’ Imvura ntikubuze." 
1Kings18:45 Nuko hashize akanya gatoya, ijuru ryubikiza ibicu, umuyaga urakubeba, hagwa imvura y’isegenya. Ariko Ahabu yūrira mu mukogote wiwe, aja i Yezireli." 
1Kings18:46 Ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kuja kuri Eliya; arakenyera, yiruka imbere ya Ahabu barinda bashika kw irembo ry’i Yezireli nyene." 
1Kings19:1 Maze Ahabu adondera Yezebeli ivyo Eliya yakoze vyose, n’ingene yicishije inkota ba kamenyi bose." 
1Kings19:2 Yezebeli araheza atuma intumwa kuri Eliya, ut’ Ejo nk’aya mango wewe ubgawe, uti N’atakugira nk’uko wagize abo, ut’ Imana zirakabimuhanira kandi birushirije!" 
1Kings19:3 Eliya aca aterwa n’ubgoba, akūra hasi, arahunga ngw akize amagara, aja i Beri‐sheba h’i Buyuda, ahasiga umuntu wiwe." 
1Kings19:4 Mugabo we, agenda urugendo rw’umusi umwe mu bugaragwa, araza yicara musi y’igiti c’umurotemu, yisabira gupfa, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, ivyanje ni bigarukire hano: ntabara unkūreho, kuko ntaruta ba sogokuruza." 
1Kings19:5 Araheza yiryamira musi y’ico giti c’umurotemu, arasinzira; maz’ umumarayika araza aramukoma, aramubarira, ati Vyuka, urye." 
1Kings19:6 Akanuye, abona umutsima ugeretse ku makara, n’umukuza w’ amazi, biri haruguru y’umutwe wiwe. Nukw aravyābīra, ararya, aranywa, arongera ariryamira." 
1Kings19:7 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho agaruka ubugira kabiri, aramukoma, aramubarira, ati Vyuka urye, urugendo ntirukunanire kukw ari rurerure." 
1Kings19:8 Nukw aravyuka, ararya, aranywa; izo ndya azigendera imisi mirongwine n’amajoro mirongwine, ashika i Horebu ku musozi w’Imana." 
1Kings19:9 Ashitseyo, yinjira mw isenga, abaho; maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rimuzako, riramubaza, rit’ Ukora iki hano ga Eliya?" 
1Kings19:10 Na we arishura, ati Nagize ishaka ryinshi ryawe, Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo; kukw Abisirayeli bavuye mw isezerano ryawe, bagahomvagura ibicaniro vyawe, kandi bicishije inkota abavugishwa nawe; ni jewe jenyene nsigaye, nanje nyene barangenza ngo banyice." 
1Kings19:11 Aramwishura, ati Sohoka uhagarare hanze ku musozi imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho. Ako kanya Uhoraho arahaca, maze haza umuyaga mwinshi w’igihuhuta usatagura imisozi, umenagura ibitandara imbere y’Uhoraho; arik’ Uhoraho ntiyari mur’ uyo muyaga. Umuyaga uciye, habaho gutigita kw’isi; arik’ Uhoraho ntiyari mur’ ukwo gutigita." 
1Kings19:12 Isi irangije gutigita habah’ umuriro; arik’ Uhoraho ntiyari mur’ uwo muriro. Hanyuma y’uwo muriro haza agacerere. 
1Kings19:13 Maze Eliya akumvise, yipfuka umutamana wiwe mu maso, arasohoka ahagarara ku muryango w’iryo senga. Haza ijwi rimubaza, rit’ Ukora iki hano ga Eliya?" 
1Kings19:14 Arishura, ati Nagize ishaka ryinshi ryawe, Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo; kukw Abisirayeli bavuye mw isezerano ryawe, bagahomvagura ibicaniro vyawe, kandi bicishije inkota abavugishwa nawe; ni jewe jenyene nsigaye, nanje nyene barangenza ngo banyice." 
1Kings19:15 Uhoraho aramubarira, ati Subiray’ ujane inzira wazananye, uje mu bugaragwa bg’i Damasiko; ni washikayo, uz’ urobanuze Hazayeli amavuta, az’ abe umwami w’i Siriya;" 
1Kings19:16 na Yehu mwene Nimushi na we uz’ umurobanuze amavuta, az’ abe umwami w’Abisirayeli; kandi na Elisa mwene Shafati w’i Abeli‐mehola uz’ umurobanuze amavuta, az’ abe ūvugishwa mu gishingo cawe." 
1Kings19:17 Maz’ ūzokira inkota ya Hazayeli, Yehu azomwica; ūzokira iya Yehu, Elisa azomwica." 
1Kings19:18 Yamara rero, ngiye kwisigariza abantu ibihumbi ndwi mu Bisirayeli, batigeze bapfukamira Bayali canke ngo bamusome." 
1Kings19:19 Nukw avayo, aragenda abona Elisa mwene Shafati, arikw ararimisha inka mirongwibiri na zine zirongōye imbere yiwe, zisangiye ingōgo ari zibiri‐zibiri, na we ari ku z’imperēra; Eliya akebereza iy’ ari, amutererak’ umutamana wiwe." 
1Kings19:20 Maze Elisa asiga inka ngaho, agenda ariruka akurikira Eliya, aramubarira, ati Ndakwinginze reka mbanze nje gusezera data na mama, mpeze nze ngukurikire. Na we ati Genda: ubonye nkugize nte?" 
1Kings19:21 Nukw areka kumukurikira, asubira inyuma, ahitana inka zibiri zisangiye ingōgo, arazibāga, atekesha inyama zazo ibiti vy’ingōgo zazo, agaburira abantu, bararya. Araheza ava hasi, akurikira Eliya, agenda aramukorera." 
1Kings20:1 Bukeye Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya akoranya ingabo ziwe zose, aradūga aja gutera i Samariya, ahugariza impande zose; abami mirongwitatu na babiri bafatanya na we, bari n’amafarasi n’imikogote y’intambara." 
1Kings20:2 Atuma intumwa mur’ ico gisagara kuri Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli," 
1Kings20:3 muti Beni‐hadadi agize ngw Amafeza yawe n’amazahabu yawe n’ayiwe; ngo Mbere n’abarusha abandi ubgiza mu bagore bawe no mu bana bawe, ngo Na bo n’abiwe." 
1Kings20:4 Umwami w’Abisirayeli arabishura, muti Bizoba uk’ uvuze, segaba mwami wiwe; muti N’uwawe, bo n’ivy’ afise vyose." 
1Kings20:5 Bukeye izo ntumwa ziragaruka, ziti Beni‐hadadi agize ngo Yari yagutumyeko ng’ umuhe amafeza yawe n’ amazahabu, n’abagore bawe n’ abana;" 
1Kings20:6 ngw Ariko rer’ ejo nk’ aya mango azorungika abantu biwe i wawe, basakangure mu ngoro yawe no mu mazu y’abantu bawe; maz’ ico bazobona cose giteye igomwe bakinyage, bakizane." 
1Kings20:7 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli atuma guhamagaza abashingantahe bose bo mu gihugu, arababarira, at’ Ehe rāba ingen’ uyo mugabo atwigenzako, muvyiyumvire! Erega yari yantumyekw abagore banje n’abana banje n’amafeza yanje n’amazahabu yanje, sinabimwima!" 
1Kings20:8 Nukw abo bashingantahe bose n’abantu bose baramwishura, bati Ntuhīrahīre ng’ umwumvire, ntuvyemere." 
1Kings20:9 Nukw abarira za ntumwa za Beni‐hadadi, ati Mumbaririre segaba umwami wanje, mut’ Ivyo wamutumyeko vyose ubga mbere, mut’ Ivyo yari kubikora; mut’ Arikw ivy’ ubu vyo ntabishoboye. Nukw izo ntumwa ziragenda, zimubarira ukw amwishuye." 
1Kings20:10 Beni‐hadadi yongera kumutumako, muti N’umukungugu ur’ i Samariya, muti Ni waramuka ukwiye ingabo ziwe zimukakako, mut’ Umuntu wese ngw ayore n’urushi na rumwe, mut’ Imana zirakabimuhanira kandi birushirije!" 
1Kings20:11 Umwami w’Abisirayeli arabishura, ati Mumubgire, mut’ Ūcambara ibirwanishwa aja kurwana, muti Ntaze yihaye nk’ūvyambura avuye kunesha!" 
1Kings20:12 Ayo majambo bayabarira Beni‐hadadi akirikw aranywa hamwe na ba bami, bari mu nsago; avyumvise, abarira ingabo ziwe, ati Ni mwikazanure! Nuko barikazanura ngo batere igisagara." 
1Kings20:13 Ako kanya umuntu avugishwa n’Imana arenguka imbere ya Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli, aramubarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Mbega ntubona izo ngabo ukuntu ar’ isinzi? ng’ Uyu musi arazigabura mu maboko yawe, ngo Nawe uca umenya kw ar’ Uhoraho." 
1Kings20:14 Ahabu aramubaza, ati Ni ba nde bagiye kubanesha? Na we aramwishura, at’ Uhoraho agize ngo N’imikangara y’abaganwa. Arongera aramubaza, at’ Ūja gusomboroza ni nde? Na we ati Ni wewe." 
1Kings20:15 Nukw akoranya iyo mikangara y’abaganwa, baba amajana abiri na mirongwitatu na babiri; hanyuma akoranya ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli, baba ibihumbi ndwi." 
1Kings20:16 Mu gihe c’amashōka barasokoroka bava mu gisagara ngo barwane. Kand’ ico gihe Beni‐hadadi yarikw aranywa, amaze kuborerwa, bo na ba bami bari batabaye, ukw ari mirongwitatu na babiri, bari mu nsago." 
1Kings20:17 Ya mikangara y’abaganwa ni bo babanje gusokoroka; kandi Beni‐hadadi yar’ atumye abo kumurerekera, baraza baramubarira, bati Hasokorotse abantu bavuye i Samariya." 
1Kings20:18 Aravuga, ati Namba bazanywe no kwisaba, mubafate mpiri; na ho ni baba baje kurwana, na ho nyene mubafate mpiri." 
1Kings20:19 Maz’ iyo mikangara y’abaganwa, bo na za ngabo zibakurikiye, basokorotse mu gisagara," 
1Kings20:20 batangura gushirako, umuntu wese agira uwo yica; maz’ Abasiriya barahunga, Abisirayeli barabakinagiza; maze Beni‐hadadi asimbira kw ifarasi, hamwe n’abandi bayagenderako, arabakira." 
1Kings20:21 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na we asokoroka mu gisagara, atera abagendera ku mafarasi n’imikogote, atikiza Abasiriya agatikizo gakomeye." 
1Kings20:22 Hanyuma wa muvugishwa aza ku mwami w’Abisirayeli, ati Genda witegure, wiyumvire umenye uk’ uzogenza, kuko mu mwaka utaha ku gacikamvura, umwami w’i Siriya azokwongera kugutera." 
1Kings20:23 Maz’ abantu b’umwami w’i Siriya baramubarira, bat’ Imana yabo n’imana ikara mu misozi miremire, ni co catumye batunesha; ariko none tuze turwanire na bo mu biyaya: ntituzobura kuba ari twebge tubanesha." 
1Kings20:24 Kand’ uz’ ugenze urtya: ukwiye gukūrah’ abo bami, bave mu myanya yabo, maze mu gishingo cabo ushireh’ abagabisha;" 
1Kings20:25 uheze ukoranye izindi ngabo zingana n’izo wabuze; usubize ifarasi mu gishingo c’iyabuze, n’umukogote mu gishingo c’uwabuze nyene. Duheze tuze turwanire na bo mu kiyaya, maze ntituzobura kuba ari twebge tubanesha. Nukw arabemerera, abigenza artyo." 
1Kings20:26 Nuko wa mwaka utashe, ku gacikamvura Beni‐hadadi akoranya Abasiriya, aradūga aja i Afeka ngw atere Abisirayeli." 
1Kings20:27 Maz’ Abisirayeli barakorakorana, bahitana impamba zabo, baragenda baratabara, baca insago ahahanganye na bo, bameze nk’udukuku tubiri tw’ impene, arikw Abasiriya bo bari bājimagije igihugu." 
1Kings20:28 Maze haza umuntu w’Imana, abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Abasiriya ko bavuze ng’ Uhoraho n’imana ikara mu misozi miremire, ngw Ariko s’imana ikara mu biyaya; ngo none rero, aya masinzi y’ingabo agiye kuyagabura mu maboko yawe, ngo Namwe muzomenya kw ari we Uhoraho." 
1Kings20:29 Nuko bamara imisi ndwi bashagaje ngaho bahanganye. Maze ku musi ugira indwi bararumana. Abisirayeli bica mu Basiriya ingabo ibihumbi ijana ku musi umwe. 
1Kings20:30 Abasigaye bahungira mu gisagara c’i Afeka; maz’ uruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye rusidukira ku bantu ibihumbi mirongwibiri n’indwi mur’ abo bari basigaye. Beni‐hadadi na we arahunga, yitera mu nzu yo mur’ ico gisagara, arenga hirya mu mpete." 
1Kings20:31 Maz’ abamenyekana biwe baramubarira, bati Twumvise kw abami b’Abisirayeli ar’ abami b’ abanyakigongwe; enda rero ni dukenyere amagunira, twīte ibiyonzoyonzo mw izosi, dusokoroke tuje ku mwami w’Abisirayeli; kumbure yoguhangaza." 
1Kings20:32 Nuko bakenyera amagunira, bīta ibiyonzoyonzo mw izosi, baja ku mwami w’Abisirayeli, baramubarira, bat’ Umusavyi wawe Beni‐hadadi ngo Mutabare umuhangaze. Arababaza, ati Mbeg’ aracariho? Na kare yari mugenzanje." 
1Kings20:33 Kand’ abo bagabo bari bareretse iryomuvamwo, baca bamuzigira kur’ iryo jambo, bat’ Eka Beni‐hadadi yari mugenzawe koko. Na we ati Ni mugende mumuzane. Nuko Beni‐hadadi arasokoroka, aza iy’ ari; Ahabu amwūriza mu mukogote wiwe." 
1Kings20:34 Maze Beni‐hadadi aramubarira, at’ Ibisagara data yanyaze so nzobigusubiza; kand’ uzogira aho kudandariza i Damasiko, nk’uko data yar’ ahafise i Samariya. Ahabu aramwishura, ati Ndemeye iryo sezerano: ndakurekuye. Nuko barasezerana, aramurekura." 
1Kings20:35 Hār’ umuntu wo mu bīga ivy’ ukuvugishwa abarira mugenzi we avugishijwe n’ijambo ry’Uhoraho, at’ Enda nkubita. Uwundi yanka kumukubita." 
1Kings20:36 Uwo muvugishwa aramubarira, ati K’ utumviye Uhoraho, ni twamara gutandukana intambge irakwica. Nuko bamaze gutandukana, ahūra n’intambge, iramwica." 
1Kings20:37 Uwo muvugishwa abona uwundi muntu, aramubarira, at’ Enda nkubita. Uwo we aramukubita, aramukomeretsa." 
1Kings20:38 Uwo muvugishwa aragenda, ategera umwami ku nzira, ariyoberanya, yipfuka igitambara mu maso." 
1Kings20:39 Maz’ umwami ahaciye, aramutakambira, ati Jewe umusavyi wawe nari nagiye mu ntambara; ngize ntya mpūra n’umugabo afashe umuntu, aramunshikiriza ngo ndamurinde; ngo Na ho ni yacika, ngo Ni jewe nzosubira mu gishingo ciwe, ngo Canke nze ntange italanto imwe y’ifeza." 
1Kings20:40 Ariko ndiko ndacurumba nja hirya no hino, uwo muntu arancika. Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli aramubarira, at’ Urubanza ruragutsinze: kandi ni wewe urwiciriye." 
1Kings20:41 Ubgo nyene aca anyarutsa gukūra ico gitambara mu maso; umwami w’Abisirayeli aca abona kw ar’ uwo mu bavugishwa. 
1Kings20:42 Uwo muvugishwa aramubarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ko warekuye umuntu yar’ atanze ngw apfe, usubiye mu gishingo ciwe, n’abantu bawe basubiye mu gishingo c’abiwe." 
1Kings20:43 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli aca ataha i we i Samariya, ashavuye, yijiriwe." 
1Kings21:1 Kandi hār’ umuntu yitwa Naboti w’i Yezireli, yar’ afise uruzabibu aho nyene i Yezireli, rubangikanye n’urugo rwa Ahabu umwami w’i Samariya." 
1Kings21:2 Bukeye Ahabu abarira Naboti, ati Mpa urwo ruzabibu rwawe, kugira ngo ndahagire umurima w’imboga, kuko ruri hafi y’urugo rwanje, nanje ndaguha urundi ruruta urwo mu gishingo carwo; canke ni wagomba, ndaguha amahera aruciye." 
1Kings21:3 Naboti yishura Ahabu, ati N’Uhoraho ntakavyumve ko noguha ishamvu ya ba sogokuruza!" 
1Kings21:4 Nuko Ahabu arataha ashavuye yijiriwe, kubg’ iryo jambo Naboti w’i Yezireli yamubariye: kuko yamubariye, ati Sinoguha ishamvu ya ba sogokuruza. Nukw aragenda yiryamira ku kirwa, aroresha amaso hirya mu rusika, yanka gufūngura." 
1Kings21:5 Maz’ umwamikazi wiwe Yezebeli araza, aramubaza, ati N’ iki kikubabaje, ukanka kurya?" 
1Kings21:6 Aramwishura, at’ Ikimbabaje n’uko nabariye Naboti w’i Yezireli, nti Mpa urwo ruzabibu rwawe ndarugure, nti Canke ndaguhe urundi mu gishingo carwo; akambarira kw atampa uruzabibu rwiwe." 
1Kings21:7 Umwamikazi wiwe Yezebeli aramubaza, ati None si wewe uganza igihugu c’Abisirayeli? Vyuka mufūngure, mushire umubabaro, jewe nzoguha urwo ruzabibu rwa Naboti w’i Yezireli." 
1Kings21:8 Nuko yandika ivyete mw izina rya Ahabu, abidomakw ikimenyetso ciwe, abirungikira abashingantahe n’abaganwa bābana na Naboti mur’ ico gisagara." 
1Kings21:9 Yandika mur’ ivyo vyete, aravuga, ati Ni mushinge umusi wo kwisonzesha, mushire Naboti imbere y’abantu;" 
1Kings21:10 maze muzane abantu babiri b’inshirukanya, baje imbere yiwe bamwagirize, bati Warogose ku Mana no ku mwami. Muheze mumujane inyuma y’ igisagara, mumwicishe amabuye." 
1Kings21:11 Nukw abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara, ari bo bashingantahe n’ abaganwa bene ho, babigenza nk’ uko Yezebeli yabatumyeko muri vya vyete yabandikira." 
1Kings21:12 Bashinga umusi wo kwisonzesha, bashira Naboti imbere y’abantu;" 
1Kings21:13 maz’ abo bantu babiri b’inshirukanya baraza bamwicara imbere, bāgiriza Naboti ngaho imbere y’ abantu, bati Naboti yarogose ku Mana no ku mwami. Maze baca bamukūra mu gisagara, bamwicisha amabuye." 
1Kings21:14 Baraheza batuma kuri Yezebeli, uti Naboti bamuteye amabuye; yapfuye." 
1Kings21:15 Maze Yezebeli yumvise ko Naboti bamuteye amabuye kandi ko yapfuye, abarira Ahabu, ati Haguruka uje gushikīra rwa ruzabibu Naboti w’i Yezireli yanka ko mugura: ntakiriho, yapfuye." 
1Kings21:16 Ahabu yumvise ko Naboti yapfuye, arahaguruka, aramanuka, aja gushikīra rwa ruzabibu rwa Naboti w’i Yezireli." 
1Kings21:17 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Eliya w’i Tishubi," 
1Kings21:18 riti Va hasi umanuke uje guhūra na Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli, aba i Samariya; uramusanga mu ruzabibu rwa Naboti, aramanutse kurushikīra." 
1Kings21:19 Umubarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Non’ urishe, utak’ ushikīra imyandu? Uheze umubarire, ut’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ngw Ah’ imbga zarigatiye amaraso ya Naboti, ni ho zizorigatira n’ayawe." 
1Kings21:20 Maze Ahabu abarira Eliya, at’ Urandonse akabero, wa mwansi wanje! Na we ati Ndakuronse akabero koko, kuko witanze gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi." 
1Kings21:21 Mbere ngw Azokuzanakw ivyago, agufyēfyēture agukūreho, aherengeteze izinamuhungu wese wo kuri wewe, Ahabu, aho bava bakagera mu Bisirayeli;" 
1Kings21:22 kandi ngw Inzu yawe azoyihindura nk’iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, kandi ngw Ayihindure nk’iya Bayasha mwene Ahiya, ngo Kubg’ umwikomo wamuteye ukamuratsa, ugakwegera Abisirayeli mu vyaha;" 
1Kings21:23 kandi kuri Yezebeli Uhoraho agize ngw Imbga zizomurīra ku ruzitiro rw’i Yezireli. 
1Kings21:24 Kandi ng’ Ūzogwa mu gisagara mu ba Ahabu azoribga n’imbga; ng’ Ūzogwa mu gahinga azoribga n’ibisīga. 
1Kings21:25 Nta wundi yigeze kwīgira umugurano wo gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi nka Ahabu, yavyohejwe n’umwamikazi wiwe Yezebeli." 
1Kings21:26 Yama akora ibintu vy’ubugesera, akurikira ibishushanyo, nk’ukw Abamori babigenza kwose, abo Uhoraho yirukanye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
1Kings21:27 Maze Ahabu yumvise ayo majambo, aca yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, yambara amagunira, arisonzesha, aryama mu magunira nyene, agenda yifumbereje." 
1Kings21:28 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Eliya w’i Tishubi," 
1Kings21:29 riti Mbeg’ urabonye ingene Ahabu yicishije bugufi imbere yanje? Ko yicishije bugufi artyo imbere yanje, sinzozana ivyo vyago ku ngoma yiwe, ariko ku ngoma y’ umuhungu wiwe ni ho nzozana ivyo vyago ku nzu yiwe." 
1Kings22:1 Kand’ Abasiriya n’Abisirayeli bari bamaze imyaka itatu batekereje batarwana. 
1Kings22:2 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatatu, Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda aramanuka, aja kuramutsa umwami w’ Abisirayeli." 
1Kings22:3 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli abarira abantu biwe, ati Harya ntimuzi yukw i Ramoti‐gileyadi hār’ ahacu, natwe tugapfa kwihorera, ntituhagobotore umwami w’Abasiriya?" 
1Kings22:4 Araheza abaza Yehoshafati, ati Mbega wokwemera kuntabara, ukajana natwe kuja gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi? Yehoshafati yishura umwami w’ Abisirayeli, at’ Ego cane, jewe nd’ umwe nawe, n’abantu banje ni bo b’iwawe, n’amafarasi yanje ni yo y’iwawe." 
1Kings22:5 Maze Yehoshafati abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli, at’ Enda se banza usiguze ijambo ry’ Uhoraho." 
1Kings22:6 Nuk’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli akoranya ba kamenyi, bār’ abantu nk’amajana ane; arababaza, ati Mbega tuje gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi canke dusigeho? Baramwishura, bati Dūga uhatere, kuk’ Uhoraho azohagabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi." 
1Kings22:7 Ariko Yehoshafati arabaza, ati Mbeg’ uretse aba, nta muntu avugishwa n’Uhoraho yobaho ngo tumusiguze?" 
1Kings22:8 Umwami w’Abisirayeli yishura Yehoshafati, ati Haracasigaye umuntu umwe twoshobora kubaza, akadusiguriza Uhoraho; yitwa Mikaya mwene Imula; ariko ndamwanka, kukw ata ho avugishwa ivyiza kuri jewe, atar’ ivyago. Yehoshafati aramubarira, ati Sigaho mugenzi, nta co uvuga urtyo!" 
1Kings22:9 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli ahamagara umuntu w’inkone, aramubarira, ati Genda unyaruka uzane Mikaya mwene Imula." 
1Kings22:10 Kand’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda bāri bavyagiye ku ntebe zabo z’ubgami, bambaye imyambaro yabo y’ubgami, bari ku nama kw ishikiro ry’ikirimba c’i Samariya; ba kamenyi bose bavugishirizwa imbere yabo." 
1Kings22:11 Maze Zedekiya mwene Kenayana yicurishiriza amahembe y’ivyuma, aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Aya mahembe ni yo uzokwirukanisha Abasiriya gushitsa baherengeteye." 
1Kings22:12 N’abandi ba kamenyi bose bavugishwa bartyo, bati Dūga utere i Ramoti‐gileyadi, bizokubera ko, kuk’ Uhoraho azohagabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi." 
1Kings22:13 Maz’ intumwa yari yagiye guhamagara Mikaya iramubarira, it’ Abavugishwa bose bahūrije hamwe gusigurira umwami ivyiza; none rero nawe amajambo yawe n’abe nk’ayabo, uvuge ivyiza." 
1Kings22:14 Mikaya aramwishura, ati Ndakurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, ic’ Uhoraho ambarira cose ni co nja kuvuga." 
1Kings22:15 Nukw ashitse imbere y’umwami, umwami aramubaza, ati Mikaya, tuje gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi, canke dusigeho? Aramwishura, ati Dūga utere, bizokubera ko, kand’ Uhoraho azohagabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi!" 
1Kings22:16 Umwami aramubarira, at’ Aho nakurahirije nzogeza ryari, kugira ngo ntugire ico umbarira kitar’ ic’ ukuri mw izina ry’ Uhoraho?" 
1Kings22:17 Aramwishura, ati Mbonye Abisirayeli bose basābagiye ku misozi nk’intama zitagira umwungere; kand’ Uhoraho agize ngo Bariya n’abatagira shebuja; ni basubire i wabo, umuntu wese yīgīre amahoro." 
1Kings22:18 Umwami w’Abisirayeli abarira Yehoshafati, ati Sinakubariye kw atogira ivyiza avugishwa kuri jewe, atar’ ivyago?" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya arongera, ati None rero ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: mbonye Uhoraho avyagiye ku ntebe yiwe, ingabo zose zo mw ijuru zimuhagaze i buryo n’i bumoso." 
1Kings22:20 Maz’ Uhoraho arabaza, ati Ni nde yogenda kwosha Ahabu ngw adūge i Ramoti‐gileyadi, agweyo? Nuk’ umwe aravuga, ashira ukwiwe, uwundi ukwiwe." 
1Kings22:21 Hanyuma haza impwemu, ihagarara imbere y’Uhoraho, iravuga, iti Jewe ndamwosha." 
1Kings22:22 Uhoraho arayibaza, at’ Uja kumwosha ute? Na yo iti Ndagenda nihindure impwemu y’ibinyoma mu kanwa ka ba kamenyi biwe bose. Na we arayishura, ati Nuko, uramwosha, kand’ uzobishobora; genda ugire urtyo." 
1Kings22:23 Nuko non’ ehe rāba, Uhoraho ashize impwemu y’ibinyoma mu kanwa k’aba ba kamenyi bawe bose; kand’ akugeneye ivyago." 
1Kings22:24 Maze Zedekiya mwene Kenayana yēgēra Mikaya amukubita urushi, aramubaza, at’ Iyo mpwemu y’Uhoraho yaciye hehe mu kuva muri jewe iza kuvugana nawe?" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya aramwishura, at’ Uzoba urabimenya ku musi uzokwitera haruguru mu mpete winyegeza." 
1Kings22:26 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli aravuga, ati Ni mufate Mikaya, mumushīre Amoni umukuru w’umurwa, na Yowasi umwana wanje," 
1Kings22:27 mut’ Umwami agize ng’ Uru rugabo murushire mw ibohero, murugaburire ivyo kurya n’amazi vy’intīca ntīkize, uti Kugeza ah’ azotabarukira amahoro." 
1Kings22:28 Mikaya aravuga, ati Ni waramuka utabarutse amahoro, Uhoraho azoba atamvugishije. Arongera ati Mwa bantu mwese, muraba muvyumvise!" 
1Kings22:29 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda baradūga, baja gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi." 
1Kings22:30 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli abarira Yehoshafati, ati Ngiye kwiyoberanya, nje mu rugamba; ariko weho ni wambare imyambaro yawe y’ubgami. Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli ariyoberanya, aja mu rugamba." 
1Kings22:31 Kand’ umwami w’i Siriya yari yabariye abagabisha b’imikogote yiwe y’intambara, ukw ari mirongwitatu na babiri, ati Ntimutumbere kurasa abandi, ar’ aboroshe cank’ abahambaye, atar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli wenyene." 
1Kings22:32 Nukw abo bagabisha b’imikogote y’ intambara babonye Yehoshafati, baravuga, bati Nguriya umwami w’Abisirayeli nta gukēka! Nuko barakebanuka, batumbera we; Yehoshafati atura ubuku." 
1Kings22:33 Maz’ abo bagabisha b’imikogote babonye kw atar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli, barahindukira bareka kumwirukana." 
1Kings22:34 Maz’ umuntu umwe wo mu rugamba apfa kurasa, agema umwami w’Abisirayeli ah’ ivyuma bimukīngīra bihūrira; aca abarira ūtumbereza umukogote wiwe, ati Hindukiza, unkūre mu rugamba, kuko nkomeretse bibi." 
1Kings22:35 Uwo musi intambara irushiriza kuba ihambaye; umwami bamushigikirira aho nyene mu mukogote wiwe, ahangana n’Abasiriya; hageze ku mugoroba aratanga; kand’ amaraso yari yacunduguse ava mu ruguma, atega imbere mu mukogote." 
1Kings22:36 Maze nko ku kirengazuba humvikana akāmo mu ngabo, ngo Ni mutahe, musubire mu bisagara vyanyu no mu ntāra z’i wanyu." 
1Kings22:37 Uko ni k’umwami yatanze; bamujana i Samariya, bamuhambayo." 
1Kings22:38 Umukogote wiwe bawogereza ku kidengeri c’i Samariya aho ba maraya biyuhagirira; imbga ziraza zirigata amaraso yiwe nk’ukw ijambo Uhoraho yavuze riri. 
1Kings22:39 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Ahabu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivy’ inzu yubatse isharijwe n’amahembe y’inzovu, n’ibisagara vyose yubatse, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’ abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
1Kings22:40 Uko ni ko Ahabu yahambije ba sekuruza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahaziya asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
1Kings22:41 Yehoshafati mwene Asa aho yima i Buyuda hāri mu mwaka ugira kane Ahabu umwami w’ Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma. 
1Kings22:42 Kandi Yehoshafati, aho yatangura kwima, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’itanu; araheza amara ku ngoma imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Azuba umukobga wa Shiluhi." 
1Kings22:43 Kandi yagendera mu ngeso zose za se Asa; ntiyatirimuka ngw azivemwo, ariko yagenda akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza. Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi vyo ntivyākūrwaho, arikw abantu bākomeje gutangiray’ ibimazi no kuhosereza imibavu." 
1Kings22:44 Kandi Yehoshafati ashira hamwe n’umwami w’Abisirayeli. 
1Kings22:45 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoshafati, n’ivy’ ubuhizi bgiwe, n’ingene yarwana intambara, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abayuda?" 
1Kings22:46 Kand’ abāri basigaye ku bagabo bendana, ari bo nyene bāri basigaye ku ngoma ya se Asa, abakūra mu gihugu ciwe." 
1Kings22:47 Kandi mur’ ico gihe nta mwami yariho mu gihugu ca Edomu: hāganza uwar’ agihagarikiye. 
1Kings22:48 Yehoshafati abāzisha amato y’i Tarushishi yo kwama aja i Ofiru kuzana amazahabu; ariko ntiyashikayo, kuko yamenagurikiye i Eziyoni‐geberi." 
1Kings22:49 Maze Ahaziya mwene Ahabu asaba Yehoshafati kw abantu biwe bojana n’abiwe mu mato, ariko Yehoshafati ntiyabikunda." 
1Kings22:50 Maze Yehoshafati ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa sekuruza Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoramu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Kings22:51 Ahaziya mwene Ahabu aho yima i Samariya mu Bgisirayeli hāri mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ indwi Yehoshafati umwami w’ Abayuda ari ku ngoma; amara imyaka ibiri aganza Abisirayeli. 
1Kings22:52 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, agendera mu ngeso za se n’iza nyina, n’iza Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yakwegeye Abisirayeli mu vyaha." 
1Kings22:53 Asaba Bayali arayisenga, atera umwikomo Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, amuratsa nk’uko se yagize mu vyo yakoze vyose." 
2Kings1:1 Ahabu amaze gutanga, Abanyamowabu bagarariza Abisirayeli." 
2Kings1:2 Umusi ur’ izina, Ahaziya akoroka aciye mu nshingo z’idirisha ryo mu cumba ciwe co hejuru, ah’ aba i Samariya, yenderamwo kurwara. Bukeye arungika intumwa, ati Ni mugende mundagurize Bayali‐zebubi, imana y’i Ekuroni, mumbarize ko nzokira iyi ndwara." 
2Kings1:3 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho abarira Eliya w’i Tishubi, ati Va hasi, uje guhūra n’intumwa z’umwami w’i Samariya, uzibaze, uti Mbeg’ icatumye muja kuri Bayali‐zebubi iyo mana y’i Ekuroni kuraguza, n’ ukw ata Mana yariho mu Bgisirayeli?" 
2Kings1:4 Uti None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uti Ntuzovyuka ku kirwa uryamyeko, ut’ Uzopfa nta kabuza. Nuko Eliya aragenda." 
2Kings1:5 Maz’ izo ntumwa zigarutse ku mwami, arazibaza, ati Mugarukanywe n’iki?"
