2Kings1:6 Ziramwishura, ziti Twahūye n’umugabo, aratubarira, ngo Ni tugaruke ku mwami yadutumye, ngo Tukubarire, tut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Mbeg’ icatumye utuma kuri Bayali‐zebubi iyo mana y’i Ekuroni kuraguza, ngo N’ukw ata Mana yariho mu Bgisirayeli? ngo Nuko rero, ngo Ntuzovyuka ku kirwa uryamyeko, ng’ Uzopfa nta kabuza." 
2Kings1:7 Arababaza, at’ Uwo muntu yaje guhūra namwe, akababarira ayo magambo, asa ate?" 
2Kings1:8 Baramwishura, bati Yar’ umuntu yakatse ivyoya, kandi yar’ akenyeje umukanda w’urusato. Aravuga, at’ Uwo ni Eliya w’i Tishubi." 
2Kings1:9 Umwami araheza atuma umugabisha agaba ingabo mirongwitanu, ari kumwe n’izo ngabo ziwe, ngo bamufate. Nukw adūga iyo Eliya ari, asanga yicaye ku mpinga y’umusozi. Aramubarira, ati Yewe muntu w’Imana, umwami aradutumye, ngo Manuka umwitabe." 
2Kings1:10 Eliya yishura uwo mugabisha w’izo ngabo mirongwitanu, at’ Asangwa nd’ umuntu w’Imana, umuriro n’utibuke uve mw ijuru, ukuyigizanye n’izo ngabo zawe ukw ari mirongwitanu. Ako kanya umuriro uca utibuka uvuye mw ijuru, umuyigizanya n’ingabo ziwe ukw ari mirongwitanu." 
2Kings1:11 Umwami arongera atuma uwundi mugabisha w’ingabo mirongwitanu nyene, ari kumwe n’ izo ngabo ziwe, ngo bamufate. Araza aramubarira, ati Yewe muntu w’Imana, umwami aradutumye, ngo Manuka n’ingoga umwitabe." 
2Kings1:12 Eliya arabishura, at’ Asangwa nd’ umuntu w’Imana, umuriro n’utibuke uve mw ijuru, ukuyigizanye n’izo ngabo zawe ukw ari mirongwitanu. Ako kanya umuriro w’Imana uca utibuka uvuye mw ijuru, umuyigizanya n’ingabo ziwe ukw ari mirongwitanu." 
2Kings1:13 Umwami arongera atuma uwundi mugabisha w’ingabo mirongwitanu nyene, ari kumwe n’izo ngabo ziwe. Uwo mugabisha wa gatatu aradūga; ashitse apfukama imbere ya Eliya, aramwinginga, ati Yewe muntu w’Imana, ndakwinginze, amagara yanje bo n’ay’ aba basavyi bawe ukw ari mirongwitanu n’agutere imbabazi." 
2Kings1:14 Rāba umuriro uvuye mw ijuru uhejeje kuyigiza ba bagabisha ba mbere bompi bo n’ingabo zabo ukw ari mirongwitanu‐itanu; ariko noneh’ amagara yanje n’agutere imbabazi. 
2Kings1:15 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho abarira Eliya, ati Manukana na we, ntumutinye. Nukw ava hasi, amanukana na we, aja ku mwami." 
2Kings1:16 Aramubarira, at’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho abajije, ngo Mbeg’ icatumye utuma abantu kuri Bayali‐zebubi ya mana y’i Ekuroni kuraguza, ngo N’ukw ata Mana yariho mu Bgisirayeli wosiguje? Ngo Nuko rero, ngo Ntuzovyuka ku kirwa uryamyeko, ng’ Uzopfa nta kabuza." 
2Kings1:17 Nuko Ahaziya aratanga, nk’ ukw ijambo Uhoraho yavugishije Eliya ryavuze. Maze kukw ata mwana w’umuhungu yagira, murumuna we Yehoramu asubira ku ngoma yiwe; hari mu mwaka ugira kabiri Yehoramu mwene Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings1:18 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Ahaziya, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings2:1 Igihe Uhoraho yagomba kujana Eliya mu gashururu ngw amudūgane mw ijuru, Eliya na Elisa bāri mu nzira bava i Gilugali." 
2Kings2:2 Maze Eliya abarira Elisa, at’ Enda sigara hano, kuk’ Uhoraho antumye i Beteli. Elisa aramwishura, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene ndakurahiye, sintandukana nawe. Nuko baramanuka baja i Beteli." 
2Kings2:3 Bashitseyo, abīgishirizwa i Beteli ivy’ ukuvugishwa baza gusanganira Elisa, baramubaza, bati Harya urazi yuk’ uyu musi Uhoraho agiye kukwaka shobuja? Arabishura, at’ Ego me ndabizi, ariko ni mupfe gucereza." 
2Kings2:4 Maze Eliya yongera kumubarira, at’ Enda rero Elisa, sigara hano, kuk’ Uhoraho antumye i Yeriko. Aramwishura, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene ndakurahiye, sintandukana nawe. Nuko baja i Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Bashitseyo, abīgishirizwa i Yeriko ivy’ ukuvugishwa baza kuri Elisa baramubaza, bati Harya urazi yuk’ uyu musi Uhoraho agiye kukwaka shobuja? Arabishura, at’ Ego me ndabizi, ariko ni mupfe gucereza." 
2Kings2:6 Eliya yongera kumubarira, at’ Enda sigara hano, kuk’ Uhoraho antumye kuri Yorodani. Na we aramwishura, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene ndakurahiye, sintandukana nawe. Nuko bompi barajana." 
2Kings2:7 Maz’ abantu mirongwitanu mu biga ivy’ ukuvugishwa baragenda bahagarara kure aharābana na bo, abo bompi bagihagaze kuri Yorodani." 
2Kings2:8 Maze Eliya yābīra umutamana wiwe, arawuzinga, awukubitisha amazi, aca yigabanyamwo kubiri, amwe aja ukwayo ayandi ukwayo, nuko bompi bajabukira ahūmūtse." 
2Kings2:9 Bamaze kujabuka, Eliya abarira Elisa, ati Nsaba ico ugomba ko ndagukorera, ntaratandukanywa nawe. Elisa aramwishura, ati Ntabara umpe imigabane ibiri y’impwemu yawe, ngw imbeko." 
2Kings2:10 Aramwishura, at’ Unsavye ikigoye; mugabo ni wambona ngitandukanywa nawe, biza kukubera birtyo; na ho n’utambona, ntibiza kuba birtyo." 
2Kings2:11 Hanyuma bakiriko baragenda bayāga, bagize bartya, umukogote w’umuriro n’amafarasi y’umuriro birabatandukanya; Eliya adūganwa mw ijuru n’agashururu." 
2Kings2:12 Elisa abibonye, araboroga, ati Yewe ga data we, yewe ga data we, wabereye Abisirayeli imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi! Nuko ntiyongera kumubona ukundi. Maze yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, azigiramw’ ibitabu bibiri." 
2Kings2:13 Araheza atora umutamana wa Eliya wamukorokanye, arahindukira; ashitse ku nkombe ya Yorodani, ahagararaho." 
2Kings2:14 Yābīra wa mutamana wakorokanye Eliya, awukubitisha amazi, aravuga, at’ Uhoraho, Imana ya Eliya, ari hehe? Amaze gukubita amazi, aca yigabanyamwo kubiri, amwe aja ukwayo ayandi ukwayo; nuko Elisa arajabuka." 
2Kings2:15 Maze bamwe b’i Yeriko biga ivy’ ukuvugishwa, bār’ aharābana na we, baravuga, bat’ Impwemu ya Eliya iri kuri Elisa. Nuko baraza, baramusanganira, bakubita inkoro hasi imbere yiwe." 
2Kings2:16 Baramubarira, bati Twebge abasavyi bawe turi kumwe n’ abantu b’inkomezi mirongwitanu; nuko turakwinginze, reka bagende baje kurondera shobuja; kumbure Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yoba yamuteruye, akamuterera ku musozi muremure, canke mu mwonga. Aravuga, at’ Oya, ntimubarungike." 
2Kings2:17 Baramuzigiriza gushitsa aho vyamuteye isoni, araruha aremera, ati Ni mubatume. Nuko batuma abantu mirongwitanu, bamara gatatu bamurondera, baramubura." 
2Kings2:18 Bagarutse iy’ ari, basanga akir’ i Yeriko; arababarira, ati Sinababujije kugenda?" 
2Kings2:19 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara babarira Elisa, bati Rāba iki gisagara ingene cubatswe ahantu heza, nk’uko nawe ubibona mugenzi; arikw amazi yaho ni mabi, kand’ atera uburambu mu gihugu." 
2Kings2:20 Aravuga, ati Ni munzanire akavya gasha, mugashiremw’ umunyu. Nuko barakamuzanira." 
2Kings2:21 Ava mu gisagara, aja kw iriba, aritereramw’ umunyu, aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Akijije aya mazi, nta ho azosubira kuzana urupfu canke kurūmvya." 
2Kings2:22 Nukw amazi arakira gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu, nk’ukw ijambo Elisa yavuze riri." 
2Kings2:23 Bukeye avayo, adūga i Beteli; akiri mu nzira arikw aradūga, haza abana b’abahungu bavuye mu gisagara baramutwenga, baramubarira, bati Dūga, busa bg’ubuhanza!" 
2Kings2:24 Arakebuka; ababonye abavuma mw izina ry’Uhoraho. Nuko haca haza ibikōko bibiri vy’idubu z’ingore zivuye mw ishamba, zitabagura abahungu mirongwine na babiri bo muri bo." 
2Kings2:25 Avuyeyo, aja ku musozi Karumeli; hanyuma avayo, asubira i Samariya." 
2Kings3:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yehoramu mwene Ahabu yima mu Bisirayeli, amara imyaka cumi n’ibiri ari ku ngoma i Samariya." 
2Kings3:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, mugabo ntiyashikīra se na nyina, kuko yakūyeh’ inkingi ya Bayali, iyo se yari yarashinze." 
2Kings3:3 Ariko rero yifatanya n’ivyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yari yarakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli, ntiyabivamwo." 
2Kings3:4 Kandi Mesha umwami w’i Mowabu yar’ umutunzi w’intama; yama ashikanira umwami w’Abisirayeli ubgoya bukemuwe ku bana b’intama ibihumbi ijana, n’ubg’ amapfizi y’intama ibihumbi ijana nyene." 
2Kings3:5 Ariko Ahabu amaze gutanga, uwo mwami w’i Mowabu agarariza umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings3:6 Nuk’ umwami Yehoramu ava i Samariya ico gihe, akoranya Abisirayeli bose." 
2Kings3:7 Maz’ araheza atuma kuri Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda, ut’ Umwami w’i Mowabu yamugararije, uti Mbega wokwemera kumutabara, ukajana na we kuja gutera i Mowabu? Aramwishura, ut’ Ego me muzojana, uti We n’umwe nawe, uti N’abantu biwe ni bo b’iwawe, uti N’amafarasi yiwe ni yo y’iwawe." 
2Kings3:8 Yehoramu arongera aramubaza, uti Muzodūgana iyihe nzira? Aramwishura, uti Muzojana inzira ica mu bugaragwa bg’Abanyedomu." 
2Kings3:9 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli aragenda, bo n’umwami w’Abayuda n’umwami w’Abanyedomu; baca ahaziguye, maze bagenze imisi ndwi mu nzira, ingabo zibura amazi, bo n’inyumbu zibakurikiye zīremētse intēkera zabo." 
2Kings3:10 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli aravuga, ati Tubonye ibara, kuk’ Uhoraho yadukoranije tur’ abami batatu ngw atugabure mu maboko y’Abanyamowabu!" 
2Kings3:11 Yehoshafati arabaza, ati Mbega nta wuvugishwa n’Uhoraho yoba ngaha, ngw adusigurize Uhoraho? Umwe mu bantu b’umwami w’ Abisirayeli aramwishura, ati Elisa mwene Shafati ari hano, yahora ar’ umusuku wa Eliya." 
2Kings3:12 Yehoshafati aravuga, at’ Ijambo ry’ Uhoraho riri muri we. Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli, na Yehoshafati, n’umwami w’Abanyedomu, baramanuka baja iy’ ari." 
2Kings3:13 Elisa abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli, ati Dusangiye iki nawe? Genda usiguze ba kamenyi ba so na ba kamenyi ba nyoko! Umwami w’Abisirayeli aramwishura, at’ Oyaye, kuk’ Uhoraho yadukoranije tur’ abami batatu ngw atugabure mu maboko y’ Abanyamowabu." 
2Kings3:14 Elisa aramwishura, ati Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, uwo nsavye, iyo ntubaha Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda, sinaruha nkurāba ngo ngushirekw ijisho." 
2Kings3:15 Ariko noneho nzanira umuvuzi w’inanga. Uwo muvuzi w’inanga ashitse, atanguye kuvuza, ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kuza kuri Elisa;" 
2Kings3:16 aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Ngw iki kiyaya ni mugisataguremw’ imigazo myinshi." 
2Kings3:17 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Nta muyaga muja kubona, canke ngo mubone imvura, ngw Arikw iki kiyaya kizokwuzura amazi, munywe mwebge ubganyu, mushōre n’ivyo mushoreye n’inyumbu zanyu." 
2Kings3:18 Kand’ ivyo s’ikigoye k’Uhoraho; mber’ azogabura n’Abanyamowabu mu maboko yanyu. 
2Kings3:19 Namwe muze musangangure igisagara cose kizitijwe uruzitiro rw’amabuye, n’igisagara cose giteye igomwe; n’igiti ciza cose muze mugice, musivye n’amariba yaho yose, n’indimiro nziza zose muzisibanganishe amabuye." 
2Kings3:20 Bukeye nko mu gihe co gutanga ikimazi co mu gitondo, bagize bartya babona amazi aturutse mu gihugu ca Edomu; nukw ico gihugu cuzura amazi." 
2Kings3:21 Abanyamowabu bose bumvise kw abo bami badūze kubatera, barakorana bose, uhereye ku bageze kwambara ibirwanishwa, no kuja hejuru; baragenda bategera ku rubibe." 
2Kings3:22 Maz’ abo Banyamowabu bazindutse kare mu gatondo, izuba riserutse, rirasiye ku mazi, babona ayo mazi ahahanganye na bo atukura nk’amaraso." 
2Kings3:23 Maze baravuga, bat’ Ariya n’amaraso: ba bami nta kabuza baratikiye, ingabo zabo zīsubiraniyemwo; yemwe Banyamowabu, ni muze tuje kwiyegayegereza iminyago!" 
2Kings3:24 Maze bashitse mu nsago z’Abisirayeli, Abisirayeli babakūrira hasi, barabarwanya; Abanyamowabu na bo barabahunga; bagenda barabica ingenda kugeza bashitse mu gihugu cabo;" 
2Kings3:25 baraheza basangangura ibisagara vyabo, indimiro nziza yose babonye, umuntu wese akayitereramw’ ibuye, kugeza bayujuje; basivya amariba yaho yose, baca n’ibiti vyiza‐vyiza vyose; gushitsa hasigaye i Kiru‐hareseti honyene ari ho hakir’ uruzitiro rw’amabuye; na ho nyene abateresha amabuye imigozi barahaziguza, barahanesha." 
2Kings3:26 Maz’ umwami w’i Mowabu abonye k’urugamba rumusugereje, ajana ingabo amajana ndwi bitwaje inkota, kugira ngo babatwariranye, babone gushikīra umwami w’Abanyedomu; ariko ntibabishobora." 
2Kings3:27 Bibananiye, ahitana umwana wiwe w’imfura yomusubiriye ku ngoma, amutanga kw ikimazi co kwoswa, amwosereza hejuru ku ruzitiro. Abisirayeli baca barazinukwa rwose; bituma bamureka, barahindukira basubira mu gihugu cabo." 
2Kings4:1 Bukeye haza umugore kuri Elisa; umugabo wiwe yar’ uwo mu biga ivy’ ukuvugishwa; aramutakambira, at’ Umusavyi wawe, ari we mugabo wanje, yarapfuye; kand’ urazi ko yubaha Uhoraho. Non’ ūtwishuza araje, kand’ agomba gutwara abahungu banje bompi ngw abagire abagurano biwe." 
2Kings4:2 Elisa aramubaza, ati None nogukorera iki? Ndakubaza: har’ ico woba ufise i muhira? Na we at’ Umusavyi wawe nta co mfise i muhira atar’ urwavya rw’utuvuta twa elayo." 
2Kings4:3 Aramwishura, ati Genda urābe ivyo utīra mu babanyi bawe biri gusa, kandi ntutīre bike." 
2Kings4:4 Uheze winjire mu nzu, wiyugarane mwe n’abana bawe, ayo mavuta uyasuke mur’ ivyo bintu vyose; ikintu cose uko cuzuye urābe ah’ ugitereka." 
2Kings4:5 Nukw avuye iy’ ari, abigenza kuno; ariyugarana bo n’abana biwe, bamuhereza ivyo bintu, na we abisukamwo." 
2Kings4:6 Nuko bimaze kwuzura, abarira umwana, ati Mpa ikindi. Aramwishura, ati Nta kindi gisigaye. Ako kanya amavuta aca areka kuza." 
2Kings4:7 Maz’ aragenda, abibarira wa muntu w’Imana, na we aramwishura, ati Genda ushōre ayo mavuta, wishure umwenda wawe; ayasigaye agutungane n’ abana bawe." 
2Kings4:8 Umusi ur’ izina, Elisa aja i Shunemu. Kandi hāriy’ umugore w’umutunzikazi; aramugōbēra ngw amuzimane. Maz’ uhereye ico gihe, iy’ aciye aho, yama ajayo bakamuzimana." 
2Kings4:9 Bukeye nya mugore abarira umugabo wiwe, ati Mbona uyo muntu kw ar’ uwera, kandi n’umuntu w’Imana;" 
2Kings4:10 enda tumwubakire akumba hejuru ku nzu, tumushiriremw’ uburiri n’ameza n’intebe n’itara; maz’ iy’ aje kuturamutsa, az’ ahore arāraho." 
2Kings4:11 Umusi ur’ izina, araza aja mur’ ako kumba, arāraho." 
2Kings4:12 Abarira umuntu wiwe Gehazi, ati Mpamagarira uwo mugore w’ Umunyashunemu. Amaze kumuhamagara, aramwitaba." 
2Kings4:13 Abarira Gehazi, at’ Umubarire, uti Ko wabītwariritse ben’ uko, uti None yogukorera iki? uti Mbeg’ uragomba kuvugirwa ku mwami, uti Canke ku mugabisha w’ingabo? Aramwishura, at’ Oyaye, nzokwigumira ngaha i wacu." 
2Kings4:14 Maze Elisa arabaza, ati None twomukorera iki? Gehazi aramwishura, at’ Erega nta mwana agira, kand’ umugabo wiwe arashāje." 
2Kings4:15 Aramubgira, ati Muhamagare. Amaze kumuhamagara, araza ahagarara mw itangaza ry’umuryango." 
2Kings4:16 Elisa aramubarira, at’ Umwaka ugeze ah’ uyu ugeze, uzoba ukikiye umwana w’umuhungu. Na we aramwishura, ati Sigaho nyabuna, muntu w’Imana, reka kumpenda jewe umusavyi wawe." 
2Kings4:17 Hanyuma uwo mugore asama inda, avyara umwana w’umuhungu, ca gihe nyene Elisa yamubariye gishitse." 
2Kings4:18 Uwo mwana amaze gukura, umusi ur’ izina aragenda asanga se iyo bagenya." 
2Kings4:19 Abarira se, at’ Umutwe uranyishe, umutwe uranyishe! Se abarira umuntu wiwe, ati Muterure umushīre nyina." 
2Kings4:20 Nukw aramujana amushikiriza nyina; nyina amushira ku bibero; hageze mu mashōka aracīkāna. 
2Kings4:21 Araheza aramwūrirana, amurambika ku buriri bga wa muntu w’Imana, aramwugarana, arasohoka." 
2Kings4:22 Ahamagara umugabo wiwe, aramubarira, ati Ntabaza umuhungu umwe n’indogoba imwe, nkwakwanye nikubitire kwa wa muntu w’Imana, ndagarutse." 
2Kings4:23 Aramwishura, ati N’iki kikujanyey’ uyu musi? Kw atari mu mboneko z’ukwezi canke ngo habe kw isabato! Na we ati Pfa kundeka ngende." 
2Kings4:24 Nuk’ uwo mugore ashirisha amatandiko ku ndogoba, abarira uwo muntu, ati Yobora tugende: ntuyigenze bu horo shiti nkubgiye." 
2Kings4:25 Nukw aragenda, aja iyo wa muntu w’ Imana ari ku musozi Karumeli. Uwo muntu w’Imana amubonye akiri kure, abarira umuntu wiwe Gehazi, ati Nguriya wa mugore w’Umunyashunemu." 
2Kings4:26 Enda irukanga, muhūre, umubaze, uti N’amahoro? ut’ Uragumye, n’umugabo wawe, n’umwana? Amubajije, aramwishura, ati N’amahoro!" 
2Kings4:27 Ashitse aho nyene kur’ uwo musozi, ah’ uwo muntu w’ Imana ari, amufata ku birenge. Gehazi aramwēgēra ngw amusunure, arik’ uwo muntu w’Imana aramubgira, ati Mureke, kukw afise umubabaro mu mutima, kand’ Uhoraho yabimpishije ntiyabimbariye." 
2Kings4:28 Nya mugore aravuga, ati Mbega mugenzi, ni jewe nari nagusavye umwana? Sinakubariye, nti Reka kumpenda?" 
2Kings4:29 Elisa abarira Gehazi, ati Kenyera, wābīre inkoni yanje, ugende; ni hagira uwo muhūra, ntimuramukanye; n’ūgomba ko muramukanya, ntumwishure: uheze urambike iyo nkoni ku maso y’umuvyimba w’uwo mwana." 
2Kings4:30 Nyina w’uwo mwana aramubarira, ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, nawe nyene ndakurahiye, singusiga. Nuko Elisa ava hasi, aramukurikira." 
2Kings4:31 Ariko Gehazi yari yarabītangiye imbere; ashitse, arambika iyo nkoni ku maso y’umuvyimba, ariko ntiyakakaza canke ngo yumve. Araheza aragaruka, ahūra na we, aramubarira, at’ Umwana ntakangutse." 
2Kings4:32 Maze Elisa ashitse, yinjira mu nzu, asanga uwo mwana yapfuye, arambaraye kuri bga buriri bgiwe." 
2Kings4:33 Nuko yinjiye, yiyugarana wenyene n’uwo muvyimba, araheza asenga Uhoraho." 
2Kings4:34 Maz’ arūrira, yubama kur’ uwo mwana, ashira umunwa ku wiwe, n’amaso ku yiwe, n’amaboko ku yiwe nyene; nukw amwubarayeko, umubiri w’uwo mwana utangura gushuha." 
2Kings4:35 Maz’ aravyuka, akubita hirya mur’ iyo nzu, aragaruka, arongera arūrira, amwubararako; umwana araheza yāsamura ibihetangabo ndwi, arakanura." 
2Kings4:36 Elisa ahamagara Gehazi, aramubarira, ati Hamagara uwo mugore w’Umunyashunemu. Nukw aramuhamagara. Ashitse, aramubarira, at’ Abīra umwana wawe." 
2Kings4:37 Nukw arinjira, arunama ashika hasi imbere y’ibirenge vyiwe; araheza aterura umwana wiwe, arasohoka." 
2Kings4:38 Hanyuma Elisa asubira i Gilugali; ico gihe hari harateye inzara mu gihugu. Maz’ abiga ivy’ ukuvugishwa bicaye imbere yiwe, abarira umuntu wiwe, ati Tereka ya nkono nini ku ziko, utekere imboga aba biga ivy’ ukuvugishwa." 
2Kings4:39 Umwe muri bo arasohoka aja ku gahinga gusoroma imboga; ahasanga umutanga, yamurakw ibitangatanga atega impuzu yiwe; araza abikekagurira muri ya nkono batetsemw’ imboga, kuko batari bazi ivy’ ari vyo." 
2Kings4:40 Bahīshije, bārurira abo bantu ngo barye. Bagitamira izo mboga baraboroga, bati Yewe muntu w’Imana, mu nkono harimw’ ubumara bg’urupfu! Ntibāshobora kuzirya." 
2Kings4:41 Aravuga, ati Ni munzanire ifu. Ayiterera mur’ iyo nkono, araheza aravuga, ati Ni mwārurire abantu, barye. Nuko basanga ata cago kikiri mu nkono." 
2Kings4:42 Maze haza umuntu avuye i Bayali‐shalisha, agemuriye uwo muntu w’Imana udutsima mirongwibiri twa sayiri y’umushuzo, n’isaho yuzuye imishi igiheza kugenywa. Maze Elisa aravuga, ati Ni mubihe abantu, babirye." 
2Kings4:43 Maz’ umusuku wiwe aramwishura, ati Non’ utu noduhēreza abantu ijana? Na we ati Pfa kubaha babirye; kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho agize, ati Barabirya banabisigaze." 
2Kings4:44 Nukw abitereka imbere yabo, barabirya barabisigaza, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze." 
2Kings5:1 Namani, umugabisha w’ingabo z’umwami w’i Siriya, yar’ atonnye kuri shebuja, kandi yar’ umunyacubahiro, kukw ari we Uhoraho yaha inganji yatuma Abasiriya banesha; yar’ umuhizi w’inkomezi, ariko yar’ umunyamibembe." 
2Kings5:2 Kand’ Abasiriya bāri baragiye kunyaga ar’ ibitero; mur’ ukwo kunyaga banyaga umwigeme mutoya mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli; araheza acorekera muka Namani. 
2Kings5:3 Bukeye abarira inabuja, at’ Icompa databuja akaja k’ūvugishwa n’Imana aba i Samariya! Yomukiza iyo mibembe yiwe." 
2Kings5:4 Nuko Namani aja kubarira shebuja; at’ Umwigeme yavuye mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli yavuze artya n’artya. 
2Kings5:5 Nuk’ umwami w’i Siriya aramubarira, ati Shirak’ ugende, nanje ndandikira umwami w’Abisirayeli icete. Nukw aragenda, ajana amafeza italanto cumi n’amazahabu shekeli ibihumbi bitandatu n’imyambaro cumi yo gukūranya." 
2Kings5:6 Nukw ashīra umwami w’Abisirayeli ico cete, cāvuga, ngw Ico cete ni cagushikīra, urabona ko nkurungikiye umusavyi wanje Namani ng’ umukize imibembe." 
2Kings5:7 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli asomye ico cete, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, aravuga, ati Mbega jewe nd’ Imana, ngo ntume umuntu apfa canke ngw abeho, k’uyo mugabo andungikiye umuntu ngo ndamukize imibembe? Ehe rāba ingen’ anyigenzako, muheze muvyiyumvire!" 
2Kings5:8 Maze Elisa wa muntu w’Imana yumvise k’umwami w’Abisirayeli yitantamuriyekw impuzu ziwe, amutumako, uti N’iki gitumye witantamurirakw impuzu zawe? N’aze i wanje, aramenya yuko mu Bisirayeli harih’ ūvugishwa n’ Imana." 
2Kings5:9 Nuko Namani araza, azana n’amafarasi yiwe n’imikogote yiwe, ahagarara ku muryango w’inzu ya Elisa." 
2Kings5:10 Elisa araheza amutumako, uti Genda wiyuhagire muri Yorodani ibihetangabo ndwi, umubiri uraca usubira uko wahora, nawe uzoba uhumanutse." 
2Kings5:11 Ariko Namani aca araraka, arivumbura, ati Nahoze ngira ngw arasohoka ahagarare, atakambire izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, azungagize ukuboko hejuru y’ aho ndwaye, ankize imibembe." 
2Kings5:12 Mbeg’ inzūzi z’i Damasiko, Abana na Farupari, ntiziruta amazi yose y’i Bgisirayeli? Sinoshobora kuziyuhagiramwo ngahumanuka? Nukw arahindukira, agenda aratse." 
2Kings5:13 Abantu biwe baramwēgēra, baramubarira, bati Mbega mutungwa, iyaba uyo muvugishwa n’Imana akurangiye ikintu kigoye, ntiwari kugikora? Nkanswe kukubarira, ngw Iyuhagire uhumanuke?" 
2Kings5:14 Nukw aramanuka, yībira muri Yorodani ibihetangabo ndwi, nk’uk’ uwo muntu w’Imana yari yamubariye. Ako kanya umubiri wiwe uhinduka nk’uw’ umwana mutoya, arahumanuka." 
2Kings5:15 Hanyuma agarukana n’abantu biwe bose kur’ uwo muntu w’ Imana, araza ahagarara imbere yiwe, aramubarira, ati Noneho ndamenye kw ata yindi Mana iriho mw isi yose, atari mu Bisirayeli; enda rero ni wābīre ingemu nguhaye jewe umusavyi wawe." 
2Kings5:16 Elisa aramwishura, ati Nkurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, uwo nsavye, nta kintu na kimwe nshobora kwābīra. Aramugōbēra ngw avyābīre, arikw aranka." 
2Kings5:17 Maze Namani aramubarira, ati K’utavyemeye, ndasavye ni bampe ivu ryotwarwa n’inyumbu zibiri, kuk’ uhereye none ata kimazi nzokwosereza izindi mana canke ngo ndazihe ikindi kimazi ic’ ari co cose, atar’ Uhoraho wenyene." 
2Kings5:18 Arik’ Uhoraho az’ ampangaze jewe umusavyi wawe kur’ iki kimwe: databuja iyo yinjiye mu ngoro ya Rimoni kuyisenga, ari jewe ndamushigikiye, maze nkunama mur’ iyo ngoro ya Rimoni; iyo nunamye mur’ iyo ngoro, Uhoraho az’ ampangaze kur’ ico kintu, jewe umusavyi wawe." 
2Kings5:19 Elisa aramubarira, ati Genda amahoro. Ariko Namani avuyeyo, agenze akarēre gatoya," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi, umusuku w’uwo muntu w’Imana Elisa, arivuganya, ati Databuja ko yahebeye Namani uwo Musiriya, ntiyābīre ivyo amugemuye, ndahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, singenda ntirutse ngo ndamuhamvye, ngire ico ndamwiyakira." 
2Kings5:21 Nuko Gehazi akurikira Namani. Maze Namani abonye ūmukurikiye yiruka, arururuka ava mu mukogote wiwe ngo bahūre. Aramubaza, ati N’amahoro?" 
2Kings5:22 Na we ati N’amahoro; ati Databuja arantumye, ng’ Ubu nyene agendewe n’abahungu babiri bo mu biga ivyo kuvugishwa, baturutse mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu; ngo None mutabare, ubamuhēre italanto y’ifeza n’imyambaro ibiri yo gukūranya." 
2Kings5:23 Nuko Namani aramwishura, at’ Enda n’utware italanto zibiri. Nukw aramugōbēra, amutekerera italanto zibiri z’amafeza mu masaho abiri hamwe n’imyambaro ibiri yo gukūranya, abikorera abantu biwe babiri, baja imbere ya Gehazi bavyikoreye." 
2Kings5:24 Babishikanye ku musozi w’i wabo, arabibāka, araheza abijana mu nzu arabibīka, arungika abo bantu, baragenda." 
2Kings5:25 Maz’ araza, yinjira aho shebuja ari. Elisa aramubaza, at’ Uvuye hehe ga Gehazi? Uwundi at’ Eka nta ho nagiye." 
2Kings5:26 Aramubarira, ati Mbeg’ ugira ng’ umutima wanje ntiwajanye nawe, igihe wa mugabo yava mu mukogote wiwe agahindukira ngo muhūre? Mbeg’ iki n’igihe co kwākīra amahera n’imyambaro, n’imirima y’imyelayo n’iy’ imizabibu, n’intama n’ inka, n’abagurano n’abaguranokazi?" 
2Kings5:27 None rer’ imibembe ya Namani izokwōmako no ku ruvyaro rwawe kugeza ibihe vyose. Maze Gehazi ava imbere yiwe ajejeta imibembe, yera nka shelegi." 
2Kings6:1 Bukeye abiga ivy’ ukuvugishwa babarira Elisa, bat’ Ehe rāba, aho tuba haratwāgiye, nk’ uko nawe ubibona." 
2Kings6:2 None rero turakwinginze, uturekure tuje kuri Yorodani, umuntu wese yicire igiti, twiyubakireyo aho kuba. Arabishura, ati Nuko ni mugende." 
2Kings6:3 Umwe muri bo aramubarira, ati Ndagusavye wemere kujana natwe abasavyi bawe. Aramwishura, ati Nuko ndaje tujane." 
2Kings6:4 Nuko barajana; bashitse kuri Yorodani batangura guhumbira ibiti. 
2Kings6:5 Maz’ umwe muri bo, akirikw aricira igiti, incabiti imijukira mu mazi; araboroga, at’ Ewe jewe ndagowe! Erega mugenzi yar’ intīrano!" 
2Kings6:6 Uwo muntu w’Imana aramubaza, at’ Ikorokeye hehe? Arahamwereka. Araheza aca igiti, agiterera mu mazi, ya ncabiti irareremba." 
2Kings6:7 Aramubarira, ati Yābīre. Atuma ukuboko arayābīra." 
2Kings6:8 Hār’ igihe umwami w’i Siriya yatera Abisirayeli; maz’ akaja inama n’abantu biwe, akababarira, at’ Ahanaka ni ho tuzobacira igico." 
2Kings6:9 Ariko Elisa wa muntu w’Imana agatuma ku mwami w’Abisirayeli, uti Wirinde, uti Ntuz’ uce ahanaka, uti Kukw ari ho Abasiriya bamanutse kugutegera." 
2Kings6:10 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli agaca atuma abo kumurābira aho hantu uwo muntu w’Imana yamubūriye; akagenda akira artyo si rimwe si kabiri. 
2Kings6:11 Ivyo bituma umwami w’i Siriya yījījanya imitima, ahamagaza abantu biwe, arababaza, ati Mbega ntimwombarira umuntu wacu ari ku ruhande rw’ umwami w’Abisirayeli uw’ ari we?" 
2Kings6:12 Umwe mu bantu biwe aramwishura, at’ Oyaye, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma; ariko Elisa umuvugishwa wo mu Bisirayeli ni we abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli amajambo uvugira ku kirwa." 
2Kings6:13 Arababarira, ati Ni mugende muhwebutse aho yoba ari, ntume abo kumufata. Baramubarira, bat’ Ar’ i Dotani." 
2Kings6:14 Nukw aca arungikay’ amafarasi n’ imikogote n’ingabo nyinshi; bagenda mw ijoro, bashitse baziguza ico gisagara hirya no hino." 
2Kings6:15 Maz’ umusuku w’uwo muntu w’Imana, avyutse kare mu gatondo abona ingabo ziri kumwe n’amafarasi n’imikogote bajiguje ico gisagara. Uwo musuku abarira shebuja, ati Biracitse databuja! None tugira dute?" 
2Kings6:16 Aramwishura, ati Nta co utinya, kukw abo turi kumwe ari benshi kuruta abari kumwe na bo." 
2Kings6:17 Maze Elisa arasenga, at’ Uhoraho ndakwinginze, muhumūre amaso, arābe. Nuk’ Uhoraho ahumūra amaso y’uwo musore, ararāba, abona umusozi wuzuyekw amafarasi n’imikogote vy’umuriro bikikije Elisa." 
2Kings6:18 Za ngabo zimanutse iyo Elisa ari, asaba Uhoraho, ati Ndakwinginze, suka uruhuni mu maso y’aba bantu. Nukw abatamw’ uruhuni, nk’uko Elisa yasavye." 
2Kings6:19 Elisa araheza arababarira, at’ Iyi si yo nzira, kand’ iki si co gisagara; ni munkurikire ndabashikane ku muntu murondera. Nukw abajana i Samariya." 
2Kings6:20 Bashitse i Samariya, Elisa aravuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, humūra amaso y’aba bantu, barābe. Nuk’ Uhoraho abahumūra amaso; bagize ngo bararāba, babona bar’ i Samariya hagati." 
2Kings6:21 Umwami w’Abisirayeli ababonye, abaza Elisa, ati Mbega mutungwa, ndabice? aho sinobica?" 
2Kings6:22 Aramwishura, at’ Eka ntubice: mbeg’ abo wofata mpiri kubg’ inkota yawe n’umuheto wawe, woheza ukabica? Ni babazanire ivyo kurya n’amazi, barye banywe, babone kwisubirira kwa shebuja." 
2Kings6:23 Nukw abarondereza ivyo kurya vyinshi; bamaze kurya no kunywa arabarungika, basubira kwa shebuja. Maz’ uhereye ubgo, ibitero vy’Abasiriya ntivyongera kuza mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings6:24 Hanyuma y’ivyo, Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya akoranya ingabo ziwe zose; aradūga atera i Samariya, arahugariza." 
2Kings6:25 Maz’ i Samariya hatera inzara y’icago; bakomeza kuhugariza gushitsa ah’ abantu basigaye bagura umutwe w’indogoba shekeli z’ifeza mirongumunani, n’ikigirakane c’agakondwe k’amavyi y’inuma shekeli z’ifeza zitanu." 
2Kings6:26 Bukeye umwami w’Abisirayeli arikw arahita hejuru ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye, umugore aramutakambira, ati Ntabara se mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma!" 
2Kings6:27 Aramwishura, at’ Uhoraho n’atāgutabara, ico nogutabaza nogikūra hehe? None nobikūra ku mbuga, canke novyengura mu bgato?" 
2Kings6:28 Umwami yongera aramubaza, ati Mbega n’ iki? Aramwishura, at’ Uyu mugore yambariye, ngo Ni nzane umwana wanje tumurye; ngw Ejo tuzorya uwiwe." 
2Kings6:29 Nuko duteka umwana wanje, turamurya; bukeye bg’aho ndamubarira, nti Zana umwana wawe tumurye; none yagiye kumunyegeza." 
2Kings6:30 Maz’ umwami yumvise uyo mugore, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe; nukw arikw arahita ku ruzitiro, abantu barāvye, babona yambaye amagunira imbere ku mubiri." 
2Kings6:31 Maz’ aravuga, ati Elisa mwene Shafati uyu musi ni yirirwa ntamuciye umutwe, Imana irakabimpanira kandi birushirije!" 
2Kings6:32 Kandi Elisa yari yicaye mu nzu yiwe, yicaranye n’abashingantahe; kand’ umwami yar’ atumye intumwa kuri we. Arikw iyo ntumwa itaramushikīra, Elisa abarira abo bashingantahe, ati Ntimubona k’uwo mwana w’umwicanyi atumye uwo kunca umutwe? Nukw iyo ntumwa ni yashika, muyugarane, mugumye urugi. Non’ ibirenge vya shebuja ntimwumva ingene vyumvikana inyuma yiwe?" 
2Kings6:33 Akivugana na bo, umwami aramanuka aja iy’ ari; aravuga, at’ Ibi vyago ko bivuye k’Uhoraho, har’ ikindi kizigizigi nkimufiseko?" 
2Kings7:1 Elisa aramwishura, ati Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Ejo nk’aya mango, kw irembo ry’i Samariya, ingero y’ifu igogōretse izogurwa shekeli imwe, kandi n’ ingero zibiri za sayiri zizogurwa shekeli imwe nyene." 
2Kings7:2 Arik’ umugabisha uwo mwami yagenda yegamiye yishura uwo muntu w’ Imana, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho naho yotobora amadirisha mw ijuru, ivyo vyoshoboka? Aramwishura, at’ Uzobirābisha amaso, ariko ntuzobiryako." 
2Kings7:3 Kandi hār’ abantu bane b’abanyamibembe kw irembo ry’igisagara; baravugana, bati N’iki kitwicaritse ngaha kugira ngo tuhapfire?" 
2Kings7:4 Tworamuka tugiye mu gisagara, kandi hariy’ inzara ingana irtyo, twogwayo; na ho nyene ni twapfa kwicara ngaha, n’ugupfa nta kindi. None rero ni muze twisabe ingabo z’Abasiriya; ni baduhangaza tuzobaho, na ho ni batwica, na kare kwar’ ugupfa n’ugupfa!" 
2Kings7:5 Nuko bahenga buhwibiriye barīkora ngo baje ah’ Abasiriya bashagaje; ariko bashitse ah’ insago zabo zitangurira, basanga ata muntu akiharangwa;" 
2Kings7:6 kuk’ Uhoraho yari yatumye haza mu matwi y’ingabo z’Abasiriya uguhinda kw’imikogote n’ukw’ amafarasi n’ukw’ ingabo nyinshi, bituma bavugana, bat’ Ereg’ umwami w’Abisirayeli yahēreye abami b’Abaheti n’abami bo muri Egiputa ngo badutere." 
2Kings7:7 Nuko bafashako baratemesha aho nyene bugihwibira, bata amahema yabo n’amafarasi yabo n’indogoba zabo, basiga vyose uko vyakabaye aho bashagaje, kugira ngo banyage amagara." 
2Kings7:8 Nukw abo banyamibembe bashitse ah’ izo nsago zitangurira, binjira mw ihema rimwe, bashirako bararya baranywa, basahuramw’ amafeza n’amazahabu n’imyambaro, baragenda barabinyegeza; baragaruka binjira mu rindi hema, basahuramw’ ibindi, na vyo nyene baragenda barabinyegeza." 
2Kings7:9 Hanyuma baravugana, bat’ Ivyo tugize si vyo, kuk’ uyu musi ar’ umusi wo kuvuga inkuru nziza, natwe takaba dupfuye kwihorera; ni twarorēra ko buca, bizodusubirako. Ni muze tugende tubibarire ab’i bgami." 
2Kings7:10 Nuko baragenda bahamagara abashibamyi b’irembo ry’igisagara, barababarira, bati Twagiye mu nsago z’ Abasiriya, dusanga hatarangwa umuntu n’umwe, ata n’agakakaza, atar’ amafarasi n’indogoba biziritse, kand’ amahema ar’ uko yakabaye." 
2Kings7:11 Maz’ abo bashibamyi bahamagara abo mu rugo i bgami, barabibamenyesha." 
2Kings7:12 Nuk’ umwami avyukuruka mur’ iryo joro, abarira abantu biwe, ati Reka mbabarire inama Abasiriya batugīriye: bamenye kw inzara irikw iratwica; ni co gitumye bava aho bashagaje bakaja kunyegagira mw ishamba, ngo ni twasokoroka mu gisagara baducakire, babone ingene bashika imbere mu gisagara." 
2Kings7:13 Umwe mu bantu biwe aramubarira, at’ Enda rungika abajana amafarasi atanu mu yasigaye; ni bakira, bazoba bameze nk’ Abisirayeli bose basigaye ngaha batāpfuye; na ho ni bapfa, bazoba babaye nk’ Abisirayeli bandi bose bāpfuye: tubarungike turābe." 
2Kings7:14 Nuko bajana imikogote ibiri ikwegwa n’amafarasi, umwami arabarungika ngo bakurikire ingabo z’Abasiriya, ati Ni mugende murābe." 
2Kings7:15 Nuko baca aho baciye, barinda bashika kuri Yorodani; basanga inzira yose ar’ impuzu n’ibintu Abasiriya bagiye barata mu kwiruka. Nukw izo ntumwa ziragaruka zibibarira umwami." 
2Kings7:16 Maz’ abantu barasokoroka, basahura izo nsago z’Abasiriya; nukw ingero y’ifu igogōretse isigara igurwa shekeli imwe, n’ingero zibiri za sayiri zikagurwa shekeli imwe nyene, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze." 
2Kings7:17 Maze wa mugabisha umwami yagenda yegamiye, umwami amushira mw irembo kubuza ababandana; arikw abantu bamucako bamuhonyangira aho nyene mw irembo, arapfa, nk’uko wa muntu w’Imana yavuze, igihe umwami yaza ah’ ari." 
2Kings7:18 Birashika nk’uk’ uwo muntu w’Imana yabariye umwami, at’ Ejo nk’aya mango, kw irembo ry’i Samariya, ingero y’ifu igogōretse izogurwa shekeli imwe, kandi n’ingero zibiri za sayiri zizogurwa shekeli imwe nyene;" 
2Kings7:19 uwo mugabisha akishura uwo muntu w’Imana, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho naho yotobora amadirisha mw ijuru, ben’ ivyo vyoshoboka? na we akamwishura, at’ Uzobirābisha amaso, ariko ntuzobiryako." 
2Kings7:20 Nuko bimushikako birtyo; abantu bamucako bamuhonyangira mw irembo, arapfa." 
2Kings8:1 Kandi Elisa yari yarabariye wa mugore yazurira umwana, at’ Enda genda, mwe n’abo mu rugo rwawe, urondere ah’ usuhukira, kuk’ Uhoraho arekuye inzara, kand’ izomara imyaka ndwi mu gihugu." 
2Kings8:2 Nuk’ uwo mugore aragenda, agira nk’uk’ uwo muntu w’Imana yavuze, ajana n’abo mu rugo rwiwe, asuhukira mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya, amaray’ imyaka ndwi." 
2Kings8:3 Iyo myaka ndwi ishize, uwo mugore arasuhukuruka, ava mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya; araheza araza atakambira umwami, yitwarira urugo rwiwe n’itongo ryiwe." 
2Kings8:4 Kand’ uwo mwanya umwami yarikw arabonana na Gehazi, wa musuku wa wa muntu w’Imana, amubaza, at’ Enda mbarira ibintu bikomeye Elisa yakoze vyose." 
2Kings8:5 Nukw akirikw arīgānira umwami ingene yazuye uwapfuye, ako kanya nya mugore yazuriye umwana arashika; atakambira umwami yitwarira urugo rwiwe n’itongo ryiwe. Gehazi aca aravuga, ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, nguyu wa mugore navuga, nguyu na wa mwana wiwe Elisa yazura." 
2Kings8:6 Nuk’ umwami abibaza uwo mugore, na we arabimudondera. Umwami aca amuha umushikiriza, ati Genda umushikirize ibintu vyiwe vyose, n’ivyahimbuwe vyose uhereye ku musi yahaviriye ugashitsa n’ubu." 
2Kings8:7 Bukeye Elisa aja i Damasiko; ico gihe Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya yar’ arwaye; baramubarira, bati Wa muntu w’Imana yaje ar’ ino." 
2Kings8:8 Maz’ umwami abarira Hazayeli, at’ Enda abīra ingemu, uje guhūra n’uyo muntu w’Imana, umubarire ansigurize Uhoraho yuko nzokira iyi ndwara." 
2Kings8:9 Nuko Hazayeli aja guhūra na we atwaye ingemu zo ku vyiza‐vyiza vyose vy’i Damasiko, abiremētse ingamiya mirongwine; nukw arashika ahagarara imbere yiwe, aramubarira, at’ Umwana wawe Beni‐hadadi, umwami w’i Siriya, arantumye, ngo Mbeg’ ubona azokira iyo ndwara yiwe?" 
2Kings8:10 Elisa aramwishura, ati Genda umubarire, uti Gukira uzokira; ariko rer’ Uhoraho anyeretse kw azopfa." 
2Kings8:11 Araheza amushinga ijisho, kugeza aho Hazayeli yagiriye isoni. Uwo muntu w’Imana arahava ararira." 
2Kings8:12 Maze Hazayeli aramubaza, at’ Urizwa n’iki ga mugenzi? Aramwishura, ati N’uko mbona ibibi uzogirira Abisirayeli; amaboma yabo uzoyatongoza umuriro, n’abasore babo uzobicisha inkota; utuyoya twabo uzotumenagura, abagore babo bafise inda uzobafomoza." 
2Kings8:13 Hazayeli aramwishura, ati Mbega nkanje umuntu w’imbga, n’inda n’indesho, nd’ uwo gukora ibikomeye ben’ ivyo? Elisa aramwishura, at’ Uhoraho yanyeretse k’uzoba umwami w’i Siriya." 
2Kings8:14 Maz’ avuye aho Elisa ari, asubira kwa shebuja; shebuja aramubaza, ati Elisa yakubgiye iki? Na we aramwishura, ati Yambgiye ng’ Uzokira nta kabuza." 
2Kings8:15 Bukeye bgaho, Hazayeli yābīra uburengeti, abginika mu mazi, abumuta mu maso, aramupfunda arapfa. Hazayeli aca asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings8:16 Mu mwaka ugira gatanu Yoramu mwene Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli, ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yehoramu mwene Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda, yaja ku ngoma i Buyuda." 
2Kings8:17 Aho yatangura kwima, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ibiri; araheza amara imyaka munani i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings8:18 Ariko yagendera mu ngeso z’abami b’ Abisirayeli, nk’ukw ab’ inzu ya Ahabu bākora, kuko yari yābiriye umukobga wa Ahabu; nukw akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi." 
2Kings8:19 Mugabo Uhoraho yanka guhonnya Abayuda kubga Dawidi umusavyi wiwe, nk’uko yari yaramusezeraniye kuzomuha itara rizokwama ryaka mu ruvyaro rwiwe ibihe vyose." 
2Kings8:20 Ku ngoma yiwe ni ho Abanyedomu bāgararije Abayuda, biyimikira uwabo mwami." 
2Kings8:21 Maze Yehoramu aca ajabukana n’imikogote yiwe yose y’intambara, afata i Zayiri; maz’ Abanyedomu bamutaye hagati, ahenga mw ijoro, bo n’abagabisha b’imikogote yiwe, bīcīra inzira mur’ abo Banyedomu; ingabo ziwe zica zirahunga zīsubirira i wabo." 
2Kings8:22 Uko ni kw Abanyedomu bīkūye ku Bayuda gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu. Ico gihe ab’ i Libuna na bo baramugarariza. 
2Kings8:23 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoramu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’ abami b’Abayuda?" 
2Kings8:24 Nuko Yehoramu ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahaziya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings8:25 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri Yoramu mwene Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, ni ho Ahaziya mwene Yehoramu umwami w’Abayuda yaja ku ngoma." 
2Kings8:26 Ahaziya aho yatangura kwima yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri; araheza amara umwaka umwe i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Ataliya, umwuzukuru wa Omuri umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings8:27 Yagendera mu ngeso z’ab’ inzu ya Ahabu, agakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ukw ab’ inzu ya Ahabu nyene bāgenda bakora; kuko yar’ afitaniye akamwe na bo." 
2Kings8:28 Bukeye atabara Yoramu mwene Ahabu, baja gutera Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya i Ramoti‐gileyadi; maz’ Abasiriya bakomeretsa Yoramu." 
2Kings8:29 Nuk’ umwami Yoramu aratabaruka, aja i Yezireli kugira ngw arwarirey’ izo nguma yakomerekerejwe n’Abasiriya i Rama, igihe yarwanya Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya. Bukeye Ahaziya mwene Yehoramu umwami w’i Buyuda, amanuka i Yezireli kurāba Yoramu mwene Ahabu ukw ameze, kuko yar’ arwaye." 
2Kings9:1 Bukeye Elisa ūvugishwa n’ Imana ahamagara umwe mu biga ivy’ ukuvugishwa, aramubarira, at’ Ikazanure, wābīre iri cupa ry’amavuta ya elayo, uje i Ramoti‐gileyadi." 
2Kings9:2 Ni washikayo, ubaze Yehu mwene Yehoshafati, Yehoshafati mwene Nimushi; uheze winjire iy’ ari, umuhagurutse umukūre mu bandi, umujane haruguru ahīherereye;" 
2Kings9:3 uheze usokorore iryo cupa ry’amavuta, uyamusuke ku mutwe, uvuge ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Akwimikishije amavuta ng’ ube umwami w’Abisirayeli. Uheze wugurure urugi; ntutebagane, uce uhunga." 
2Kings9:4 Nuk’ uwo muvugishwa w’ umusore aragenda aja i Ramoti‐gileyadi. 
2Kings9:5 Ashitseyo, asanga abagabisha b’ingabo bicaranye; aravuga, ati Yewe mugabisha, mfise ico ngutumweko. Yehu aramubaza, ati Ni nde muri twebge twese? Aramwishura, ati Ni wewe, mugenzi." 
2Kings9:6 Nuko Yehu ava hasi, binjirana mu nzu; uwo musore araheza amusuka amavuta mu mutwe, aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngw Akwimikishije amavuta ng’ ube umwami w’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings9:7 Kandi ng’ Uze wice ab’ inzu ya Ahabu shobuja, ngo Kugira ngw ahōre Yezebeli amaraso y’abasavyi biwe b’abavugishwa, n’ay’ abandi basavyi biwe bose yavishije." 
2Kings9:8 Ngo Kand’ ab’ inzu ya Ahabu bose bazogesera; kandi ngw Azoherengeteza izinamuhungu wese wo kuri we, aho bava bakagera mu Bisirayeli." 
2Kings9:9 Ngw Inzu ya Ahabu azoyihindura nk’iya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, kandi nk’iya Bayasha mwene Ahiya." 
2Kings9:10 Ngo Kand’ imbga zizorīra Yezebeli ku musozi w’i Yezireli, ngo Kandi nta wuzomuhamba. Nukw araheza yugurura urugi, arahunga." 
2Kings9:11 Maze Yehu arasohoka, aza aho ba bantu ba shebuja bari; umwe aramubaza, ati Mbega n’ amahoro? Uwo mugabo w’umusazi yakuronderakw iki? Arabishura, at’ Ereg’ uwo muntu ni mwebge mumuzi, n’amajambo yiwe murayazi." 
2Kings9:12 Baramwishura, bat’ Eka s’ivy’ ukuri nta co tuzi: tubarire nyabuna ivy’ ari vyo. Arabishura, at’ Ivyo ambariye n’ ibi: ng’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Anyimikishije amavuta ngo mbe umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings9:13 Baca babaduka n’ingoga, umuntu wese yikiza umutamana wiwe, bayishira musi y’ibirenge vyiwe, ah’ ahagaze hejuru ku ngazi y’amabuye; bavuza inzamba, bati Yehu ni we mwami!" 
2Kings9:14 Uku ni ko Yehu mwene Yehoshafati, Yehoshafati wa Nimushi, yagararije Yoramu. Kandi Yoramu n’Abisirayeli bose bari bashagaje i Ramoti‐gileyadi, bimiriye Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya;" 
2Kings9:15 arik’ umwami Yoramu ubgiwe yari yahindukiye asubira i Yezireli, kugira ngw arwarirey’ inguma yakomerekejwe n’Abasiriya, igihe yarwanya Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya. Nuko Yehu aravuga, ati Namb’ ari vyo mugomba, ntihagire umuntu n’umwe yomba ngw ave mu gisagara, aje kubivuga i Yezireli." 
2Kings9:16 Maze Yehu agendera mu mukogote aja i Yezireli, kukw ari ho Yoramu yar’ arwariye; kandi Ahaziya umwami w’i Buyuda yari yamanutseyo kurāba ukw ameze." 
2Kings9:17 Maz’ inderetsi yar’ ihagaze ku munara w’i Yezireli agize artya abona umuce w’ingabo za Yehu zije; aravuga, ati Mbonye umuce w’ingabo. Yoramu aravuga, ati Rāba umuntu agende kw ifarasi, ahūre na bo, ababaze kw ar’ amahoro." 
2Kings9:18 Nuko hagenda umuntu ari kw ifarasi, ahwana na we, aramubaza, at’ Umwami ngo N’amahoro? Yehu aramwishura, at’ Ivy’ amahoro ubigombakw iki? Hindukira unkurikire. Maz’ iyo nderetsi iravuga, iti Ya ntumwa ihūye na bo, ariko ntibīkūye ngw igaruke." 
2Kings9:19 Nukw atuma uwa kabiri na we nyene ari kw ifarasi; abashikiriye arababaza, at’ Umwami ngo N’amahoro? Yehu aramwishura, at’ Ivy’ amahoro ubigombakw iki? Hindukira unkurikire." 
2Kings9:20 Ya nderetsi iravuga, iti Ya ntumwa ihūye na bo, ariko na yo ntibīkūye ngw igaruke; arik’ uwo muntu, uburyo yirukana umukogote busa n’ingendo ya Yehu mwene Nimushi, kukw agenda awugurukana." 
2Kings9:21 Nuko Yoramu aravuga, ati Ni muzirikishe umukogote wanje ku mafarasi; nuko barawuzirika. Maze Yoramu umwami w’Abisirayeli na Ahaziya umwami w’Abayuda bava mu gisagara, umwe agenda mu mukogote wiwe, uwundi mu wiwe, baja guhūra na Yehu; bahwanira na we mw itongo ryar’ irya Naboti w’i Yezireli." 
2Kings9:22 Maze Yoramu abonye Yehu, aramubaza, ati N’amahoro ga Yehu? Aramwishura, at’ Amahoro ki, ubusambanyi bga nyoko Yezebeli n’uburozi bgiwe bikiri ngaho ar’ isinzi?" 
2Kings9:23 Yoramu aca ahindukiza amafarasi yiwe, arahunga, abarira Ahaziya, ati Ngaho Ahaziya, hateye umugararizo!" 
2Kings9:24 Maze Yehu afora umuheto wiwe arawuheza, arasa Yoramu mu mwanya w’ibitugu, umwampi uca mu mutima; aca acurama aho nyene mu mukogote wiwe." 
2Kings9:25 Maze Yehu abarira Bidukari umugabisha wiwe, ati Muterure umushiburire ngaha mw itongo ryar’ irya Naboti w’i Yezireli; ntiwibuka igihe twe nawe twagendera ku mafarasi tugendaniye se Ahabu, k’Uhoraho yamuremētse iki gihano," 
2Kings9:26 kandi k’Uhoraho yavuze, ati N’ukuri ejo nabonye amaraso ya Naboti n’ay’ abana biwe, kandi ko yavuze, ati Nzobigusubiza ku mutwe ngaha nyene mur’ iri tongo? Nuko rero muterure, umushiburire mur’ iri tongo, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze." 
2Kings9:27 Maze Ahaziya umwami w’i Buyuda abibonye, arahunga ajana inzira ija i Beti‐hagani. Yehu amwōma inyuma, aravuga, ati Na we nyene mutsinde mu mukogote wiwe. Nukw ashitse ku mudūgo w’i Guri, aharābana n’i Ibuleyamu, baramugema; akomeza guhunga, ashitse i Megido agwayo." 
2Kings9:28 Maz’ abantu biwe bamujana i Yerusalemu ari mu mukogote, bamuhamba mu mva yiwe i ruhande ya ba sekuruza, ku murwa wa Dawidi." 
2Kings9:29 Kand’ igihe Ahaziya yaja ku ngoma y’i Buyuda, hari mu mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe Yoramu mwene Ahabu ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings9:30 Maze Yehu ashitse i Yezireli, Yezebeli arabibarirwa; aca yīraba amarangi mu maso, asokoza umushatsi, araheza arungurukira mw idirisha." 
2Kings9:31 Maze Yehu agitamaje mw irembo, Yezebeli aramubaza, ati N’amahoro ga yewe Zimuri wa mugesera wishe shobuja?" 
2Kings9:32 Yehu yunamura amaso arangamiza mw idirisha, aravuga, ati Ni nde aherereye ku ruhande rwanje? Yoba nde? Nukw abantu b’inkone nka babiri canke batatu baramurunguruka." 
2Kings9:33 Arababarira, ati Ni mumukororere hasi. Nuko bamukororera hasi; amaraso yiwe atarukira ku nzu no ku mafarasi; aca arayamusiribangisha." 
2Kings9:34 Araheza yinjira mu nzu, arafūngura; hanyuma aravuga, ati Ni mugende murābe uko mugenza uwo mugore w’ikivume, mumuhambe, kuko yar’ umwana w’umwami." 
2Kings9:35 Ariko bagiye kumuhamba, ntibagira ico basangaho, atar’ umutwe n’ibirenge n’ibiganza." 
2Kings9:36 Nuko bagaruka kubimubgira; na we aravuga, at’ Iryo ni rya jambo Uhoraho yavugishije umusavyi wiwe Eliya w’i Tishubi, ati Mw itongo ry’i Yezireli ni ho imbga zizorīra umuvyimba wa Yezebeli;" 
2Kings9:37 ati Kand’ umuvyimba wiwe uzohinduka nk’intabire yo ku gahinga mw itongo ry’i Yezireli, kugira ngo ntihaze hagire ūvuga, ngo Harya hari Yezebeli." 
2Kings10:1 I Samariya hār’ abahungu mirongwirindwi bandurutse kuri Ahabu. Bukeye Yehu yandika ivyete, abirungika i Samariya ku bakuru b’igisagara no ku bashingantahe no ku bājejwe abo buzukuru ba Ahabu;" 
2Kings10:2 ati Bene shobuja ko mubafise ngaho, mukaba muri n’imikogote y’intambara n’amafarasi, n’igisagara kizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, n’ibirwanishwa; ico cete ni cabashikīra," 
2Kings10:3 mutoranye uwo muri bene shobuja ashimwa kand’ abereye kurusha abandi, mube ari we musubiza ku ngoma ya se, murwanire inzu ya shobuja." 
2Kings10:4 Ariko baranduka umutima, baravugana, bat’ Abo bami bompi ko batāshoboye guhagarara imbere yiwe, none ni twebge twobishobora?" 
2Kings10:5 Nuk’ umubgiriza wo mu rugo, n’umukuru w’umurwa, n’ abashingantahe bo n’abājejwe ba bana, batuma kuri Yehu, uti N’ abasavyi bawe; ut’ Ivy’ ubagera vyose ni vyo bazokora; uti Kandi nta n’umwe bazokwimika; ut’ Ugire uk’ ugomba." 
2Kings10:6 Yongera kubandikira icete ubga kabiri, at’ Asangwa muherereye ku ruhande rwanje, mukemera kunyumvira, ni muce amazosi bene shobuja, imitwe yabo muze muyinsanze i Yezireli ejo nk’iki gihe. Kand’ abo bana b’umwami ukw ari mirongwirindwi, bari kumwe n’abashingantahe bo ku murwa, ari bo nyene bāri bārabajejwe." 
2Kings10:7 Nukw ico cete kibashikiriye, bafata abo bana b’umwami, babica ukw ari mirongwirindwi; imitwe yabo bayishira mu bisimbo, bayimurungikira i Yezireli." 
2Kings10:8 Intumwa iraza iramubarira, iti Barazanye imitwe ya ba bana b’umwami. Aravuga, ati Ni muyirunde ibirundo bibiri kw irembo, iharāre gushitsa ejo." 
2Kings10:9 Bukeye mu gitondo arasohoka, arahagarara, abarira abantu bose, ati Mweho nta co muriko: jeho ni ko nagararije databuja, ndamwica, arikw aba bose bāhumbikiranijwe na ba nde?" 
2Kings10:10 Nuko mumenye kw ata jambo na rimwe Uhoraho yavuze ku nzu ya Ahabu rizokorokera hasi; ereg’ Uhoraho ashikije ivyo yavugishije umusavyi wiwe Eliya. 
2Kings10:11 Maze Yehu ageseza abari basigaye bose mu b’ inzu ya Ahabu i Yezireli, bo n’ abamenyekana biwe bose n’abakunzi biwe n’abaherezi biwe, ntiyasigaza n’uwa kirazira." 
2Kings10:12 Araheza arahaguruka avayo, aja i Samariya; ari ku nzira, ashitse i Betekedi‐harowimu," 
2Kings10:13 ahūra n’ab’ i wabo wa Ahaziya umwami w’i Buyuda; arababaza, ati Mur’ aba hehe? Baramwishura, bati Tur’ ab’ i wabo wa Ahaziya, kandi tumanutse kuramutsa abana b’umwami n’abana b’umugabekazi." 
2Kings10:14 Abarira abari kumwe na we, ati Ni mubafate. Barabafata, babatsinda ku rwobo rw’i Betekedi; bose na bose bar’ abantu mirongwine na babiri, ntiyasiga n’ uwa kirazira." 
2Kings10:15 Avuye aho, ahūra na Yehonadabu mwene Rekabu aje kumusanganira; aramuramutsa, aramubaza, ati Mbeg’ urafatanije nanje bivuye ku mutima, nk’uko nanje numva mfatanije nawe? Yehonadabu aramwishura, at’ Ego me turafatanije. Na we at’ Asangw’ ari ko biri, mpa ukuboko kwawe. Arakumuha, araheza aramwuriza, amushira mu mukogote wiwe." 
2Kings10:16 Aramubarira, ati Ngo tujane, urābe ishaka mfitiye Uhoraho. Nukw amujana mu mukogote wiwe." 
2Kings10:17 Ashitse i Samariya, ageseza abāri basigaye bose kuri Ahabu bar’ i Samariya, gushitsa abaherengeteje, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, iryo yabariye Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Bukeye Yehu akoranya abantu bose, arababarira, ati Ahabu yasavye Bayali buhoro, ariko jewe Yehu nzomusaba bishimitse." 
2Kings10:19 None rero ni mumpamagarire ba kamenyi ba Bayali n’abamusenga bose n’abaherezi biwe bose; ntihaze hasigare n’umwe; kuko ngomba guha Bayali ikimazi gihambaye; ūzobura kuza wese azokabona. Ariko Yehu cār’ icenge, kugira ngw abone kugeseza abasenga Bayali." 
2Kings10:20 Maze Yehu aravuga, ati Mushinge ikoraniro ry’agahebuza rya Bayali. Nuko bararitāngāza." 
2Kings10:21 Nuko Yehu atuma mu Bgisirayeli hose; abasenga Bayali bose baraza, ntihagira umuntu n’umwe asigara ataje. Baraza binjira mu ngoro ya Bayali; iyo ngoro ya Bayali iruzura, ukūye ku mukondo ukageza ku muryango." 
2Kings10:22 Maz’ abarira uwajejwe ububīko bg’imyambaro, ati Zanira abasenga Bayali bose imyambaro. Nukw arayibazanira." 
2Kings10:23 Maze Yehu yinjirana na Yehonadabu mwene Rekabu mu ngoro ya Bayali, abarira abasenga Bayali, ati Ni musuzume murābe, ntihagire n’umwe mu bantu b’ Uhoraho yoba ari ngaha, atar’ abasanzwe basenga Bayali bonyene." 
2Kings10:24 Nukw arinjira ngw atange ibimazi, yōse n’ivy’ ukwoswa. Ariko Yehu yari yaregetse hanze abantu mirongumunani, arababarira, at’ Aba bantu mbagomoreye, ni haramuka hagize ūcika, uwo acikanye arasubira mu gishingo ciwe apfe." 
2Kings10:25 Maz’ ahejeje kwosa ibimazi, abarira abashibamyi n’abagabisha, ati Ni mwinjire mubice, ntihagire ūbasohokana n’ umwe. Nuko babaririkisha inkota. Maz’ abo bashibamyi n’abo bagabisha babakwegera hanze, baja hirya i budashikwa mur’ iyo ngoro ya Bayali." 
2Kings10:26 Inkingi zari mur’ iyo ngoro ya Bayali bazijana hanze, baraziturira." 
2Kings10:27 Maze bamenagura inkingi ya Bayali, basangangura iyo ngoro yayo, bayihindura umusarane gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Kings10:28 Uko ni ko Yehu yahenebereje ya mana Bayali, akayikūra mu Bisirayeli." 
2Kings10:29 Ariko rero Yehu ntiyaretse gukurikira ivyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakoze akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli, n’ivy’ ibishushanyo vy’amamasa vyacuzwe mw izahabu, vyar’ i Beteli n’i Dani." 
2Kings10:30 Hanyuma Uhoraho abarira Yehu, ati Ko wakoze neza, ugakora ivyo mbona kw ari vyiza, ugashitsa imigabo yanje yose nari mfise ku nzu ya Ahabu, abana bawe bazokomeza ku ngoma mu Bisirayeli gushitsa ku mwuzukururuza wawe." 
2Kings10:31 Ariko Yehu ntiyababara kugendera mu vyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli n’umutima wiwe wose; ntiyava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu, ivyo yakoze akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings10:32 Mur’ ico gihe Uhoraho atangura kugabanya igihugu c’Ubgisirayeli; Hazayeli abanesha ku mbibe zose z’Ubgisirayeli," 
2Kings10:33 uhereye kuri Yorodani ugasubiza i burasirazuba, igihugu cose c’i Gileyadi, n’ic’ Abagadi n’ic’ Abareyubeni n’ic’ Abamanase, uhereye kuri Aroweri ho ku mwonga wo kuri Arunoni ukajana i Gileyadi n’i Bashani." 
2Kings10:34 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivy’ ububasha bgiwe bgose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings10:35 Nuko Yehu ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba i Samariya; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehowahazi asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings10:36 Igihe Yehu yamaze ku ngoma y’Abisirayeli yar’ imyaka mirongwibiri n’umunani. 
2Kings11:1 Maze Ataliya nyina wa Ahaziya abonye k’umwana wiwe Ahaziya apfuye, arahaguruka ageseza abo mu nda y’ingoma bose." 
2Kings11:2 Ariko Yehosheba umukobga w’umwami Yoramu, mushiki wa Ahaziya, afata Yowasi mwene Ahaziya, amukūra mu bana b’ umwami bariko baricwa, amujanana n’umurezi wiwe, amushira mu cumba kibīkwamw’ amariri; nuko bamunyegeza Ataliya, ntiyicwa." 
2Kings11:3 Maz’ amarana na we imyaka itandatu, anyegejwe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; Ataliya na we aba ari we aganza igihugu." 
2Kings11:4 Mu mwaka ugira indwi, Yehoyada atuma ku bagabisha bagaba ijana‐ijana bo mu Bakariti no mu bashibamyi, avuga ko baza iy’ ari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; araheza asezerana na bo isezerano, abākira indahiro aho nyene mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho; maz’ abereka uwo mwana w’umwami." 
2Kings11:5 Arababarira, at’ Uko mukwiye kubigenza n’uku: aho muzozira kw isabato ku rubu rwanyu, ikigiragatatu canyu kize gishibame ku ngoro y’umwami," 
2Kings11:6 ikindi kigiragatatu kize gishibame ku kirimba citwa Suri, ikindi kigiragatatu kize gishibame ku kirimba inyuma y’ abateramyi bahasanzwe. Uko ni ko muzoshibamira iyo ngoro mukumiriye." 
2Kings11:7 Kand’ imice yanyu ibiri y’abazoba bageze gukūrwa kw isabato, iz’ ishibamire ingoro y’Uhoraho ah’ umwami ari;" 
2Kings11:8 muze mukikize umwami impande zose, umuntu wese afise ibirwanishwa mu ntoke; ūzopfa kubēgēra aho mutonze imirongo, muze mumwice; muze mugume ku mwami ukw asohotse n’uko yinjiye." 
2Kings11:9 Nukw abo bagabisha bagaba amajana babigenza nk’uk’ uwo muherezi Yehoyada yageze kwose; umuntu wese azana abo kuja ku mbu zabo kw isabato, bahitana n’abāri bazirangije kur’ iyo sabato nyene, baja iy’ umuherezi Yehoyada ari." 
2Kings11:10 Uwo muherezi aha abo bagabisha amacumu n’inkinzo vyar’ ivy’ umwami Dawidi, bikabīkwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings11:11 Nukw abo bashibamyi bahagarara kur’ iyo ngoro, uhereye ku ruhande rw’i buryo ugashitsa ku rw’i bumoso, bakikuza igicaniro n’iyo ngoro ah’ umwami ari, impande zose, umuntu wese afise ibirwanishwa mu ntoke." 
2Kings11:12 Maze Yehoyada asohokana uwo mwana w’umwami, amwambika igitsibo c’ubgami amuha n’Ibishinga intahe. Nuko bamwimikisha amavuta, bamugira umwami; maze bakoma amashi, baravuga, bat’ Umwami n’ahangame!" 
2Kings11:13 Maze Ataliya yumvise urwamo rw’abashibamyi n’abantu, aza ah’ abantu bari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings11:14 Yitegereje abona umwami ahagararanye n’inkingi, nk’uk’ umugenzo wabo war’ uri, n’abagabisha n’abavuza inzumbete bamuhagaze i ruhande, n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu banezerewe bavuza inzumbete. Ataliya araheza yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, avuza induru, ati N’umugararizo! N’umugararizo!" 
2Kings11:15 Maz’ umuherezi Yehoyada abarira abagabisha bagaba amajana, bashiriweho kugaba ingabo zose, ati Ni mumusohore, mumucishe hagati y’imirongo y’ingabo, kandi ni hagira ūmukurikira mumwicishe inkota; kuk’ uwo muherezi yar’ avuze, ngo Ntatsindwe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings11:16 Nuko baramukinjurira, ajana inzira amafarasi yatahana aja mu rugo rw’umwami; bamwiciraho." 
2Kings11:17 Maze Yehoyada ashinga isezerano hagati y’Uhoraho n’umwami n’abantu, ngo babe abantu b’ Uhoraho; ashinga isezerano no hagati y’umwami n’abantu." 
2Kings11:18 Abantu bose bo mu gihugu baca bagenda ku ngoro ya Bayali, barayisangangura; ibicaniro vyayo n’ibishushanyo vyayo barabimenagura rwose, kandi Matani umuherezi wa Bayali bamwicira imbere y’ibicaniro. Hanyuma umuherezi Yehoyada ashirah’ abateramyi bo guteramira ingoro y’ Uhoraho." 
2Kings11:19 Ajana ba bagabisha bagaba amajana na ba Bakariti na ba bashibamyi n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu; basohokana umwami mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, baramumanukana, bajana inzira ica mu kirimba c’abashibamyi, bamushikana mu ngoro i bgami. Bashitse, umwami avyagira ku ntebe y’ubgami." 
2Kings11:20 Maz’ abantu bose bo mu gihugu baranezerwa, haba umutekano ku murwa. Uko ni ko bicishije Ataliya inkota, bamutsinze ku ngoro y’ umwami." 
2Kings11:21 Yowasi yar’ amaze imyaka ndwi igihe yaja ku ngoma. 
2Kings12:1 Mu mwaka ugira indwi Yehu ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yowasi yima; amara imyaka mirongwine i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Sibiya w’i Beri‐sheba." 
2Kings12:2 Yowasi akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza igihe cose Yehoyada umuherezi yar’ akimwigisha. 
2Kings12:3 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bāri bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo, bakahosereza imibavu." 
2Kings12:4 Bukeye Yowasi abarira abaherezi, at’ Amahera yose azanwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, atanzwe mu buryo bg’inyegu, ari yo mahera y’ incungu z’abaharūwe, n’ayo umuntu wese aciriwe, n’ayo umuntu wese azokwiyumvira mu mutima wiwe kuzana mu ngoro y’Uhoraho;" 
2Kings12:5 ayo yose abaherezi bayatware, umuntu wese az’ ayake uwo bazinanyi; mugabo abe ari bo bazosanura iyo ngoro, ah’ igomba gusanwa hose." 
2Kings12:6 Ariko kurinda ushitsa mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu umwami Yowasi ari ku ngoma, abo baherezi ntibāribgasanure ah’ iyo ngoro yasambutse." 
2Kings12:7 Maz’ umwami Yowasi ahamagaza umuherezi Yehoyada n’abandi baherezi, arababaza, ati N’iki cababujije gusanura ah’ iyo ngoro yasambutse? None rer’ ayo mahera y’abo muzinanyi mwahora mwaka, ntimwongere kuyatwara, ariko muyatange, kugira ngw asanure ah’ iyo ngoro yasambutse." 
2Kings12:8 Nukw abaherezi bemera kubivamwo, no kudasubira kwaka abantu amahera, canke kuba ari bo bazoyisanura ah’ isambutse." 
2Kings12:9 Maz’ umuherezi Yehoyada yābīra isandugu, ayitobora umwenge mu mutemere, ayitereka i ruhande y’igicaniro, ku ruhande rw’i buryo umuntu aja kwinjira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; nukw abaherezi barinda umuryango bakagenda barokezamw’ amahera yose azanwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings12:10 Maz’ iyo babonye amahera agwiriye mur’ iyo sandugu, umukarani w’umwami n’umuherezi mukuru bāradūga, bagaharūra amahera yabonetse mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, bakayashira mu mipfuko." 
2Kings12:11 Bamaze kugera ayo mahera ku munzane bakayaha abashinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo kur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho; na bo bakayahemba ababāji n’abubatsi bākora kur’ iyo ngoro nyene," 
2Kings12:12 bo n’abubakisha amabuye n’abayabāza; bakayagura n’imbaho n’amabuye abāje vyo gusanura aho hāsambutse h’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho, bakayagura n’ibindi vyose bigombga vyo kuyisanura." 
2Kings12:13 Arikw amahera yazanwa mur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho ntiyakūrwamw’ inzavya z’ifeza cank’ imbugita cank’ imibehe cank’ inzumbete, cank’ ibintu vy’izahabu cank’ ivy’ ifeza vyo gukoresha mur’ iyo ngoro;" 
2Kings12:14 kuko bāyaha abākora ivyo bikorwa ngo bayakoreshe gusanura iyo ngoro. 
2Kings12:15 Kand’ abo bantu bāhabga ayo mahera yo guhemba abakozi, ntibārinda kuyasuzumirwa, kuko bākora ar’ abizigirwa." 
2Kings12:16 Arikw amahera y’ibimazi vy’impongano n’ay’ ibimazi bitangirwa ivyaha, yo ntiyashirwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, yaba ay’ abaherezi." 
2Kings12:17 Bukeye Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya aradūga, atera i Gati, ahagira ahiwe; maze yiteguye kudūga ngw atere i Yerusalemu na ho," 
2Kings12:18 Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda aca yābīra ivyatanzwekw inyegu vyose, ivyo ba sekuruza Yehoshafati na Yehoramu na Ahaziya abami b’Abayuda bāri bāratanze, n’ ivyo yatanzekw inyegu na we ubgiwe, n’ivy’ amazahabu vyose vyari mu bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho, n’ivyari mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe, abihongera Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya; nuko Hazayeli arahindukira, areka Yerusalemu." 
2Kings12:19 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yowasi, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings12:20 Bukeye abantu bo mu banyarugo biwe baramugarariza, bamutsinda mu nzu i Milo ku nzira imanuka ija i Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Abo banyarugo biwe bāmwishe ni Yozakari umwana wa Shimeyati na Yehozabadi umwana wa Shomeri; nukw arapfa, bamuhamba hamwe na ba sekuruza ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Amaziya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings13:1 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu Yowasi mwene Ahaziya, umwami w’i Buyuda, ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yehowahazi mwene Yehu yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli, amara imyaka cumi n’ indwi ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings13:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, akurikira ivyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakoze akabikwegeramwo n’Abisirayeli, ntiyabivamwo." 
2Kings13:3 Maz’ uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Abisirayeli, akāma abagabura mu maboko ya Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya, no mu ya Beni‐hadadi mwene Hazayeli nyene." 
2Kings13:4 Maze Yehowahazi atakambira Uhoraho, Uhoraho aramwumvira, kuko yabonye agahahazo umwami w’i Siriya yahahaza Abisirayeli." 
2Kings13:5 Maz’ Uhoraho aha Abisirayeli uwo kubakiza, bituma bīgobotora mu maboko y’Abasiriya, babona gusubira kwigumira i muhira nk’uko bāhora ubga mbere." 
2Kings13:6 Mugabo ntibāva mu vyaha vy’ab’ inzu ya Yerobowamu, ari we nyene yari yarabikwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure, ariko bakomeza kubigenderamwo. Kand’ inkingi za Ashera ziguma i Samariya." 
2Kings13:7 Kuk’ umwami w’i Siriya ata co yasigarije Yehowahazi mu ngabo, atar’ abagendera ku mafarasi mirongwitanu, n’imikogote cumi, n’ abagendesha amaguru ibihumbi cumi; abandi yari yarabaranduye, abahindura nk’umukungugu wo ku mbuga." 
2Kings13:8 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehowahazi, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivy’ ububasha bgiwe, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings13:9 Nuko Yehowahazi ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba i Samariya; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehowasi asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings13:10 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’indwi Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka cumi n’itandatu ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings13:11 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi; ntiyava mu vyaha vyose vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure; arikw abigenderamwo na we." 
2Kings13:12 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehowasi, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ ivy’ ubuhizi yar’ afise arwana na Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings13:13 Nuko Yehowasi ahamvya ba sekuruza, Yerobowamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe. Yehowasi ahambga i Samariya hamwe n’abami b’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings13:14 Yehowasi akiriho, Elisa afatwa n’indwara, ari yo nyene yamwishe. Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli aramanuka aja kurāba ukw ameze, amuririra hejura, ati Yewe ga data we, yewe ga data we, wabereye Abisirayeli imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi!" 
2Kings13:15 Elisa aramubarira, at’ Abīra umuheto n’imyampi. Nukw aravyābīra." 
2Kings13:16 Elisa abarira uwo mwami w’Abisirayeli, ati Fora. Nukw arafora; Elisa ashira intoke ziwe ku z’ umwami." 
2Kings13:17 Araheza aravuga, at’ Ugurura idirisha ryerekeye i burasirazuba; bararyugurura. Maze Elisa aramubarira, ati Rasa; nukw ararasa. Elisa aravuga, ati N’umwampi w’Uhoraho w’intsinzi, ni wo mwampi wo kunesha i Siriya; kukw ari wewe uzorwanira n’Abasiriya muri Afeka gushitsa ah’ uzobaherengetereza." 
2Kings13:18 Maz’ at’ Abīra imyampi; nuk’ uwo mwami w’Abisirayeli arayābīra. Elisa aramubarira, ati Yikubite hasi. Ayikubita hasi gatatu, araheza ageza aho." 
2Kings13:19 Uwo muntu w’Imana aramurakira, aramubarira, at’ Iy’ uba war’ ukubise gatanu canke gatandatu, wonesheje Abasiriya gushitsa ah’ ubaherengeteje; ariko non’ uzobanesha gatatu gusa." 
2Kings13:20 Bukeye Elisa arahwera, baramuhamba. Kand’ uk’ umwaka utashe, ibitero vy’Abanyamowabu vyahora bitera ico gihugu ku gacikamvura." 
2Kings13:21 Umusi ur’ izina, harih’ abāri bagiye guhamba umuntu; bagize bartya, babona haje igitero; bashiburira uwo muvyimba mw isenga yahambgemwo Elisa, maz’ uwo muvyimba ugikora ku magufa ya Elisa, uwo muntu aca ararabūka, ava hasi, arahagarara." 
2Kings13:22 Kand’ igihe cose Yehowahazi yabaye ku ngoma, Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya yahahaza Abisirayeli." 
2Kings13:23 Arik’ Uhoraho bamutera akagongwe, abagirira imbabazi, abasubizak’ umutima kubg’ isezerano yasezeraniye Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo, ntiyabarandura; no kugeza n’ubu ntiyabaciye." 
2Kings13:24 Maze Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya aratanga; umuhungu wiwe Beni‐hadadi asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
2Kings13:25 Hanyuma Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi agarura ibisagara Beni‐hadadi mwene Hazayeli yari yaranyaze se Yehowahazi mu ntambara. Yehowasi amunesha gatatu, agarura ibisagara vy’i Bgisirayeli." 
2Kings14:1 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, ni ho Amaziya mwene Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda yima." 
2Kings14:2 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yaja ku ngoma, amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’ icenda i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma; nyina yitwa Yehowadina w’i Yerusalemu nyene." 
2Kings14:3 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, ariko ntiyashikīra sekuruza Dawidi; yakoze nk’ivyo se Yowasi yakoze vyose." 
2Kings14:4 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bāri bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo, bakahosereza imibavu." 
2Kings14:5 Hanyuma amaze kubona kw ahangamye ku ngoma, yica ba banyarugo bāri barishe umwami se wiwe." 
2Kings14:6 Arikw abana b’abo bicanyi ntiyabica, nk’uko vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vya Mose, ivyashinzwe n’Uhoraho, ngw Abavyeyi ntibaze bicwe bazize abana babo, kand’ abana ntibaze bicwe bazize abavyeyi: ngw Arik’ umuntu wese az’ azire iciwe caha." 
2Kings14:7 Kandi yishe mu Banyedomu abantu ibihumbi cumi, abatsinze mu Kiyaya c’Umunyu; atera n’i Sela, arahatsinda, ahahindura izina ahita i Yokiteli na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Kings14:8 Hanyuma Amaziya atuma intumwa kuri Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi, Yehowahazi mwene Yehu, umwami w’Abisirayeli, muti N’uze muhangane." 
2Kings14:9 Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli atuma kwishura Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, mut’ Igitovu c’i Lebanoni catumye kw isederi y’i Lebanoni nyene, ut’ Umukobga wawe n’umushingire umuhungu waco. Bukeye igikōko caba i Lebanoni kihahise gikandagira ca gitovu." 
2Kings14:10 Nka ko waratsinze Abanyedomu, uraheza wishira hejuru mu mutima wawe: ego ni wihaye, arik’ ugume i muhira; n’iki gituma ugomba kwikwegera akaziri, mugapfa mwe n’ Abayuda?" 
2Kings14:11 Ariko Amaziya ntiyaruha amwumvira. Nuko Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli ni kwo kudūga, bahanganira na Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda i Beti‐shemeshi h’i Buyuda nyene, bararumana." 
2Kings14:12 Maz’ Abayuda baneshwa n’Abisirayeli, umuntu wese ahungira i we." 
2Kings14:13 Maze Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli afata mpiri Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, mwene Yowasi, Yowasi mwene Ahaziya, amufatira i Beti‐shemeshi nyene; aca aja i Yerusalemu, asangangura uruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye, uhereye kw irembo ry’Abefurayimu ugashitsa kw irembo ryo ku mfuruka, hose har’ amatambge amajana ane y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
2Kings14:14 Asahura amazahabu n’amafeza yose, n’ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu bāsanze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho n’ivyo bāsanze mu bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’umwami, afata n’abantu abajana bari mu bugōmbe, araheza asubira i Samariya." 
2Kings14:15 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehowasi, n’ivy’ ubuhizi bgiwe, n’ingene yarwanye na Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings14:16 Nuko Yehowasi ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga i Samariya hamwe n’abami b’Abisirayeli; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yerobowamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings14:17 Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi umwami w’Abisirayeli amaze gutanga, Amaziya mwene Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda amara iyindi myaka cumi n’itanu." 
2Kings14:18 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Amaziya, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings14:19 Bukeye ab’i Yerusalemu baramugarariza, ahungira i Lakishi; barungika abamukurikirana i Lakishi, bamutsindayo." 
2Kings14:20 Umuvyimba wiwe bawuremēka amafarasi, bawuzana i Yerusalemu, bamuhamba hamwe na ba sekuruza ku murwa wa Dawidi." 
2Kings14:21 Maz’ abantu bose bahitana Uziya baramwimika, bamusubiza ku ngoma ya se Amaziya; Uziya yar’ amaze imyaka cumi n’itandatu." 
2Kings14:22 Ni we yasanasannye i Elati, ahagarura i Buyuda, umwami Amaziya amaze guhamvya ba sekuruza." 
2Kings14:23 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatanu Amaziya mwene Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yerobowamu mwene Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli yima i Samariya; amara imyaka mirongwine n’umwe ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings14:24 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi; ntiyava mu vyaha vyose vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure." 
2Kings14:25 Mugabo asubiza urubibe rw’i Bgisirayeli aharwo, uhereye ahafata i Hamati ugashitsa ku kiyaga co mu kiyaya Araba, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ryavuze, iryo yavugiye mu musavyi wiwe Yona mwene Amitayi w’i Gati‐heferi, uwo yavugisha." 
2Kings14:26 Kuk’ Uhoraho yabonye amagorwa y’Abisirayeli iyo bava bakagera ingen’ ari menshi, kand’ ata mutabazi ariho wo kubatabara." 
2Kings14:27 Arik’ Uhoraho ntiyari yaravuze kw azozimanganya izina ry’Abisirayeli musi y’ijuru, nuko rero, abakirisha Yerobowamu mwene Yehowasi." 
2Kings14:28 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yerobowamu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivy’ ubuhizi bgiwe, n’ingene yarwanye intambara, n’uburyo yagaruriye Ubgisirayeli i Damasiko n’i Hamati, ahanyaze Abayuda, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings14:29 Maze Yerobowamu ahamvya ba sekuruza, ari bo bami b’Abisirayeli; umuhungu wiwe Zekariya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:1 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri n’indwi Yerobowamu umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, Uziya mwene Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda ni ho yima." 
2Kings15:2 Yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’itandatu, ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’ibiri i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Yekoliya w’i Yerusalemu nyene." 
2Kings15:3 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ivyo se Amaziya yakoze vyose." 
2Kings15:4 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bari bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo, bakahosereza imibavu." 
2Kings15:5 Hanyuma Uhoraho atēza umwami imibembe, arinda atanga akir’ umunyamibembe, aba mu nzu ya wenyene; maze Yotamu umwana wiwe ni we yagaba ivyo mu rugo, agacira abantu bo mu gihugu imanza." 
2Kings15:6 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Uziya, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abayuda?" 
2Kings15:7 Nuko Uziya ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba hamwe na bo ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ uwo muhungu wiwe Yotamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:8 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’umunani Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Zekariya mwene Yerobowamu yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli; amara amezi atandatu ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:9 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’uko ba sekuruza bākora, ntiyava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure." 
2Kings15:10 Maze Shalumu mwene Yabeshi aramugarariza, amugurukirakw imbere y’abantu, aramwica, asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:11 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Zekariya vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli. 
2Kings15:12 Vyabaye nk’ukw ijambo Uhoraho yari yarabariye Yehu ryāvuze, rit’ Abana bawe bazokomeza ku ngoma mu Bisirayeli gushitsa ku mwuzukururuza wawe. Nuko birashika." 
2Kings15:13 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’icenda Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Shalumu mwene Yabeshi yima; amara ukwezi kumwe i Samariya ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:14 Maze Menahemu mwene Gadi ava i Tirusa, aradūga aja i Samariya, amutsindaho aramwica, asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:15 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Shalumu, n’ingene yagararije, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings15:16 Menahemu araheza atera i Tifusa, arahatsinda, ageseza n’ abari mur’ ico gisagara bose, anesha n’intara yaco uhereye i Tirusa nyene; icatumye ahageseza n’uko banse kumwugururira amarembo; nukw afomoza abagore bose bafise inda bari muri co." 
2Kings15:17 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’icenda Uziya umwami w’ Abayuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Menahemu mwene Gadi yima mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka cumi i Samariya ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:18 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, ntiyigeze ava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure." 
2Kings15:19 Bukeye Puli umwami w’i Ashuri atera igihugu; maze Menahemu amuhongera italanto z’ifeza igihumbi, kugira ngo buzure, amuhagarikire, ahangame ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:20 Kand’ ayo mahera Menahemu yari yayatoje mu Bisirayeli, mu bantu b’abatunzi, umuntu wese yari yamutoje shekeli mirongwitanu, ngw ayahe umwami w’i Ashuri. Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Ashuri arahindukira, ntiyaguma mur’ ico gihugu." 
2Kings15:21 Non’ ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Menahemu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli?" 
2Kings15:22 Nuko Menahemu ahamvya ba sekuruza, maz’ umuhungu wiwe Pekahiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:23 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitanu Uziya umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Pekahiya mwene Menahemu yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka ibiri ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:24 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, ntiyava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure." 
2Kings15:25 Bukeye Peka mwene Remaliya, umugabisha wiwe, afatanya n’ Abanyegileyadi mirongwitanu, aramugarariza, amwicana na Arugobi na Ariyeha, abatsinda i Samariya mu munara wo mu rugo i bgami; nukw amaze kumwica asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings15:26 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Pekahiya, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings15:27 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitanu na kabiri Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Peka mwene Remaliya yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka mirongwibiri ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:28 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, ntiyava mu vyaha vya Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, ivyo yakwegeyemw’ Abisirayeli ngo bacumure." 
2Kings15:29 Kandi ku ngoma ya Peka umwami w’Abisirayeli, Tigulati‐pileseri umwami w’i Ashuri araza, atera ahitwa Iyoni n’i Abeli‐beti‐mayaka, n’i Yanowa n’i Kedeshi, n’i Hasori n’i Gileyadi, n’i Galilaya n’igihugu cose c’i Nafutali; abantu baho abajana i Ashuri ar’ inyagano." 
2Kings15:30 Hanyuma Hosheya mwene Ela agarariza Peka mwene Remaliya, amutsindaho aramwica, asubira ku ngoma yiwe; hāri mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri Yotamu mwene Uziya ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings15:31 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Peka, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings15:32 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri Peka mwene Remaliya umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, ni ho Yotamu mwene Uziya, umwami w’i Buyuda, yima." 
2Kings15:33 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yima; amara imyaka cumi n’itandatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Yerusha, umukobga wa Sadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ ivyo se Uziya yakoze vyose." 
2Kings15:35 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi ntivyakūrwaho; abantu bāri bagitangira ibimazi mur’ ivyo bitabo, bakahosereza imibavu. Yotamu ni we yubatse ikirimba co haruguru ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho." 
2Kings15:36 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yotamu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings15:37 Mur’ ico gihe ni ho Uhoraho yatangura kugomora Rezini umwami w’i Siriya na Peka mwene Remaliya kurwanya Abayuda. 
2Kings15:38 Maze Yotamu ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa sekuruza Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahazi asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings16:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ indwi Peka mwene Remaliya ari ku ngoma, ni ho Ahazi mwene Yotamu, umwami w’i Buyuda, yima." 
2Kings16:2 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri igihe yima, amara imyaka cumi n’itandatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Mugabo ntiyakora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari vyiza, nk’uko sekuruza Dawidi yakora;" 
2Kings16:3 ariko yagendera mu ngeso z’abami b’ Abisirayeli, mbere yatanze umuhungu wiwe kw ikimazi ngo yoserezwe mu muriro, nk’ukw ibizira vy’ubuyobe vy’abanyamahanga vyari bimeze, abo Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings16:4 Yatanga ibimazi akosereza imibavu mu bitabo no ku mpinga z’imisozi no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye. 
2Kings16:5 Bukeye Rezini umwami w’i Siriya, na Peka mwene Remaliya umwami w’Abisirayeli, baradūga batera i Yerusalemu; basugereza Ahazi, ariko ntibashobora kumunesha." 
2Kings16:6 Ico gihe Rezini umwami w’i Siriya, akūra Abayuda i Elati arabirukana, Elati asubira kuhagarura i Siriya, maz’ Abasiriya baza i Elati, bagerērayo na bugingo n’ ubu." 
2Kings16:7 Maze Ahazi atuma kuri Tigulati‐pileseri umwami w’i Ashuri, uti N’umusavyi wawe kandi n’umwana wawe; uti None n’udūge, umutabare, umwami w’i Siriya n’umwami w’Abisirayeli baramuteye." 
2Kings16:8 Kandi Ahazi yābīra amafeza n’amazahabu yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ayari mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe, ayarungikira umwami w’i Ashuri kw ishikanwa." 
2Kings16:9 Nuk’ umwami w’i Ashuri aramwemerera, aradūga atera i Damasiko, arahatsinda; abaho abajana ar’ inyagano i Kiri, kandi yica Rezini." 
2Kings16:10 Bukeye umwami Ahazi aja i Damasiko guhūra na Tigulati‐pileseri umwami w’i Ashuri; ashitseyo, abona igicaniro caho. Nuk’ umwami Ahazi arungikira Uriya umuherezi icitegererezo caco n’urugezo rwaco, uko cakozwe kwose." 
2Kings16:11 Nuko Uriya yubaka igicaniro nk’ico, nk’ukw icitegererezo cari kimeze kwose, ico umwami Ahazi yamurungikiye ar’ i Damasiko; uko ni ko Uriya umuherezi yacubatse, kugira ng’ umwami Ahazi, ni yaza avuye i Damasiko, az’ asange cuzuye." 
2Kings16:12 Bukeye umwami araza, avuye i Damasiko, asuzuma ico gicaniro; araheza aja kuri co, aracūrira." 
2Kings16:13 Acoserezakw ikimazi ciwe c’ ukwosa n’ishikanwa ry’amafu, akivyagizakw ishikanwa ryiwe ry’ibiturire, akimijako n’amaraso y’ibimazi vyiwe vy’ishimwe." 
2Kings16:14 Kand’ igicaniro c’umuringa car’ imbere y’Uhoraho, agikūra aho cari kiri imbere y’ingoro y’Uhoraho, hagati y’ico gicaniro ciwe n’iyo ngoro, agitereka i ruhande y’ico gicaniro ciwe ahahera i burārūko." 
2Kings16:15 Maz’ umwami Ahazi abarira Uriya umuherezi, ati Kur’ iki gicaniro kinini abe ari ho uzohora wosereza ikimazi c’ukwoswa co mu gatondo, n’ishikanwa ry’ amafu ryo ku mugoroba, bo n’ ikimazi canje ubganje c’ukwoswa, n’ishikanwa ryanje ry’amafu, hamwe n’ikimazi c’ukwoswa c’igihugu cose, n’ishikanwa ryabo ry’ amafu, n’amashikanwa yabo y’ibiturire, ukimijeko n’amaraso yose y’ikimazi c’ukwoswa, n’amaraso yose y’ibindi bimazi; na co igicaniro c’umuringa kizoba ico nzohora nsigurizako Uhoraho." 
2Kings16:16 Uko ni ko Uriya umuherezi yagenza nk’uk’ umwami Ahazi yamubariye kwose. 
2Kings16:17 Maz’ umwami Ahazi aca imiringa y’utubāte yari ku bitereko, abikūrako n’ibigarigari vyavyo; akūra na ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga ku bishushanyo vy’amapfizi vyacuzwe mu miringa cari gihagazeko, agitereka ku musezero w’ amabuye." 
2Kings16:18 Kand’ urubaraza rusakaye rwubakiwe isabato, rwari rwubatswe ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ikirimba umwami yacamwo kirora inyuma, abikūra ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho kubg’ umwami w’i Ashuri." 
2Kings16:19 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Ahazi, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings16:20 Nuko Ahazi ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Hezekiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings17:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri Ahazi umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni ho Hoseya mwene Ela yima i Samariya mu Bisirayeli; amara imyaka cenda ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings17:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, ariko ntiyanganije n’abandi bami b’Abisirayeli bāmutanguriye." 
2Kings17:3 Bukeye Shalumaneseri umwami w’i Ashuri aradūga, aramutera; Hoseya yemera kuganzwa na we, akāma amuzanira amarari." 
2Kings17:4 Ariko hanyuma umwami w’i Ashuri abona ko Hoseya arimw’ ubugarariji, kuko yari yatumye intumwa gutabaza umwami wa Egiputa yitwa So, kandi ntiyar’ akimuzanira amarari, nk’uko yar’ asanzwe agenza, uk’ umwaka utashe; ni co catumye uwo mwami w’i Ashuri amushira mu nzu y’imbohe akamuta mu munyororo." 
2Kings17:5 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri atera igihugu cose, aradūga aja i Samariya, ahugariza kumara imyaka itatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mu mwaka ugira icenda Hoseya ari ku ngoma, ni ho umwami w’i Ashuri yatsinze i Samariya; araheza ajana Abisirayeli ar’ inyagano, abajana muri Ashuri, abashira i Hala no kuri Habori, uruzi rw’i Gozani, no mu bisagara vy’ Abamedi." 
2Kings17:7 Ivyo vyābaye birtyo kukw Abisirayeli bācumuye k’Uhoraho Imana yabo yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ikabagobotora mu maboko ya Farawo umwami wa Egiputa; hanyuma bagasaba izindi mana," 
2Kings17:8 bakagendera mu migenzo y’amahanga Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere yabo, no mu migenzo abami b’Abisirayeli bābashiriyeho." 
2Kings17:9 Kand’ Abisirayeli bāma bakora ibidatunganye mu mpisho, bagacumura k’Uhoraho Imana yabo, bakiyubakira utunyabugoro aho bāba hose, uhereye ku minara y’abarinzi ugashitsa ku bisagara bizitijwe inzitiro." 
2Kings17:10 Kandi bishingiye inkingi na Ashera ku musozi wose uhagaze, no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye;" 
2Kings17:11 bakosereza imibavu mu tunyabugoro twose, nk’ukw ayo mahanga Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere yabo yagenza; bagakora ibintu vy’ivyaha, bagatera Uhoraho umwikomo." 
2Kings17:12 Bagasaba ibigirwamana, ivyo Uhoraho yari yarabihanikirije, ati Ntimugakore ben’ ivyo."
