2Kings17:13 Yamar’ Uhoraho yama abūrira Abisirayeli n’Abayuda, abicishije mu bo yavugisha bose no muri ba kamenyi bose, ati Ni muhindukire, mureke ingeso zanyu mbi, mwitondere amabgirizwa yanje n’amateka yanje, nk’ ukw ivyagezwe vyose biri, ivyo nageze ba sogokuruza banyu, nkagenda ndabibabarira, ndabicishije mu basavyi banje navugisha." 
2Kings17:14 Ariko banka kwumva; bashinga amazosi, nk’uko ba sekuruza batizera Uhoraho Imana yabo bāyashinga." 
2Kings17:15 Bakēngēra amateka yiwe, n’isezerano yasezeranye na ba sekuruza, n’imbūri yababūriye, bagakurikira ibitagira ikimazi, baca bahinduka ba nta kimazi, bīgāna amahanga abakikije, abo Uhoraho yari yarabihanikirije ngo ntibabīgāne." 
2Kings17:16 Nuko bata amabgirizwa yose y’Uhoraho Imana yabo, bīronkera ibishushanyo bibiri vy’ amamasa bavugutiye mu nkero, bakīronderera Ashera, bagasenga ingabo zose zo kw ijuru, ari zo nyenyeri, bagasaba Bayali," 
2Kings17:17 bagatanga abana babo b’abahungu n’abakobga kw ibimazi ngo boserezwe mu muriro, bakaragura bagapfumura, bakitanga gukora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, bakamutera umwikomo." 
2Kings17:18 Ni co catumye Uhoraho arakira cane Abisirayeli, akabirukana ngo bave imbere yiwe, ntihasigara n’umwe atar’ umuryango w’Abayuda gusa." 
2Kings17:19 Kandi n’Abayuda na bo ntibitondeye amabgirizwa y’Uhoraho Imana yabo, ariko bagendeye mu migenzo Abisirayeli bashizeho." 
2Kings17:20 Nuk’ Uhoraho aheba uruvyaro rwose rwa Isirayeli, abatēza ivyago, abagabura mu maboko y’ababanyaga, kugeza aho yabakomboye bakava imbere yiwe." 
2Kings17:21 Kukw igihe yashikura Abisirayeli, akabakūra ku nzu ya Dawidi, bimitse Yerobowamu mwene Nebati ngw abe umwami wabo. Maze Yerobowamu akevya Abisirayeli ngo bareke gukurikira Uhoraho, abakoresha icaha gikomeye." 
2Kings17:22 Maz’ Abisirayeli bagendera mu vyaha vyose Yerobowamu yakora, ntibābivamwo," 
2Kings17:23 gushitsa ah’ Uhoraho yabakūriye imbere yiwe, nk’uko yari yarabivugiye mu basavyi biwe bose yavugisha. Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāmbukanywe, bakūrwa mu gihugu cabo bajanwa muri Ashuri, gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Kings17:24 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri yimura abantu i Babuloni n’i Kuta n’i Ava n’i Hamati n’i Sefaravayimu, abinjiza mu bisagara vy’i Samariya, mu gishingo c’Abisirayeli; nuko baraza bashikīra i Samariya, baba mu bisagara vyaho." 
2Kings17:25 Ariko bagitangura kuhaba ntibātinya Uhoraho; ni co catumye Uhoraho abatērēra intambge, zikabīcamwo bamwe." 
2Kings17:26 Ni kwo kubarira umwami w’i Ashuri, bati Ba bantu bo mu mahanga wajana, ukabinjiza ibisagara vy’i Samariya, ntibāmenye imigenzo y’Imana y’ ico gihugu; none rero yabatērereye intambge, kandi ziriko zirabamara, kuko batazi imigenzo y’ iyo Mana y’ico gihugu." 
2Kings17:27 Maz’ umwami w’i Ashuri aravuga, ati Ni mujane umwe mu baherezi mwakūyeyo, agende abeyo, az’ abigishe imigenzo y’Imana y’ico gihugu." 
2Kings17:28 Nuk’ umwe mu baherezi bari barambukanywe babakūra i Samariya araza, aba i Beteli, abigisha ingene bakwiye gutinya Uhoraho." 
2Kings17:29 Yamar’ abo mur’ ayo mahanga yose bakomeza kwironderera izabo mana, bazishira mu tunyabugoro two mu bitabo Abasamariya bāri bārubatse, abo mw ihanga ryose uko bāba mu bisagara vyabo ni ko bāgenza." 
2Kings17:30 Abāvuye i Babuloni bigirira ikigirwamana citwa Sukoti‐benoti, abāvuye i Kuta bigirira Nerugali, ab’i Hamati bigirira Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 ab’i Ava bigirira Nibuhazi na Tarutaki, ab’i Sefaravayimu bātanga abana babo ngo baturirwe, babahaye Adurameleki na Anameleki, imana z’i Sefaravayimu nyene." 
2Kings17:32 Ariko n’Uhoraho na we baramusaba, kandi bamwe muri bo bābagira abaherezi bo mu bitabo, bo kubatangira ibimazi mu tunyabugoro two mur’ ivyo bitabo." 
2Kings17:33 Uko ni ko bāsaba Uhoraho, bagatako bagasaba izabo mana, nk’ukw imigenzo y’amahanga bākūwemwo yar’ imeze." 
2Kings17:34 No gushitsa uyu musi wa none baracagenza nk’uko bamye bagenza kera; ntibatinya Uhoraho, ntibitondera amateka cank’ imigenzo cank’ ivyagezwe cank’ amabgirizwa, ivyo Uhoraho yahaye bene Yakobo, uwo yise Isirayeli," 
2Kings17:35 akabasezeranira isezerano, akabihanikiriza, ati Ntimuze musabe izindi mana, canke ngo muzīkubite imbere, canke ngo muzisenge, canke ngo muzihe ibimazi;" 
2Kings17:36 ariko jewe Uhoraho nabakūje mu gihugu ca Egiputa ububasha bganje bginshi n’ukuboko kubanguye, abe ari jewe mwubaha, abe ari jewe mwikubita imbere, abe ari jewe muha ibimazi;" 
2Kings17:37 kand’ amateka n’imigenzo n’ivyagezwe n’amabgirizwa, ivyo nabandikiye, mube ari vyo mwitondera, mubikore gushitsa ibihe vyose; kandi ntimuze mugire izindi mana musaba." 
2Kings17:38 Kand’ isezerano nasezeranye namwe ntimuze muryibagire, kandi ntimuze mwubahe izindi mana;" 
2Kings17:39 ariko jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu abe ari jewe mwubaha; nanje nzobarokora mbakūre mu maboko y’abansi banyu bose. 
2Kings17:40 Yamara ntibaruha bavyumva, ariko bakomeza kugenza nk’uko bamye bagenza kera." 
2Kings17:41 Nukw ab’ ayo mahanga bātinya Uhoraho, bagatako bagasaba ibishushanyo vyabo vy’ibibāzano; n’abana babo n’abuzukuru babo bakomeza kugenza bartyo; uko ba sekuruza bāgenza, na bo ni ko bagenza na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Kings18:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Hoseya mwene Ela, umwami w’Abisirayeli ari ku ngoma, ni ho Hezekiya mwene Ahazi, umwami w’i Buyuda, yima." 
2Kings18:2 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yima, amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’icenda i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma; nyina yitwa Abi, umukobga wa Zekariya." 
2Kings18:3 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ ivyo sekuruza Dawidi yakoze vyose." 
2Kings18:4 Akūrah’ ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, amenagura amabuye bāshinze, atemagura inkingi bāshingiye Ashera; amenagura igishushanyo c’inzoka Mose yacuze mu muringa; kuko gushitsa ico gihe Abisirayeli bācosereza imibavu; bācita Nehushitani." 
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya yizigira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli; kandi mu bami bose b’i Buyuda bāmuherukiye nta wahwanye na we, no mu bāmwitangiye imbere;" 
2Kings18:6 kuko yifatanije n’Uhoraho akaramata, ntākevye ngw areke kumukurikira, arikw akitondera ivyagezwe Uhoraho yageze Mose." 
2Kings18:7 Kand’ Uhoraho yabana na we, akagira ukuboko kwiza aho yaja hose. Bukeye agarariza umwami w’i Ashuri, ntiyaba akimusaba." 
2Kings18:8 Atera Abafilisitiya ukarinda ushitsa i Gaza n’intāra yaho, uhereye ku minara y’abarinzi ugashitsa ku bisagara bizitijwe inzitiro." 
2Kings18:9 Mu mwaka ugira kane umwami Hezekiya ari ku ngoma, ari wo mwaka ugira indwi wo ku ngoma ya Hoseya mwene Ela, umwami w’Abisirayeli, Shalumaneseri umwami w’i Ashuri aradūga, atera i Samariya, arahugariza." 
2Kings18:10 Maze hashize imyaka itatu barahanesha; i Samariya hāneshejwe mu mwaka ugira gatandatu Hezekiya ari ku ngoma, ari wo mwaka ugira icenda wo ku ngoma ya Hoseya umwami w’ Abisirayeli." 
2Kings18:11 Umwami w’i Ashuri araheza ajana Abisirayeli ar’ inyagano, abajana muri Ashuri, abashira i Hala no kuri Habori, uruzi rw’i Gozani, no mu bisagara vy’Abamedi;" 
2Kings18:12 ivyo vyabaye kukw Abisirayeli batumviye Uhoraho Imana yabo, ariko bakava mw isezerano ryiwe, mu vyo Mose umusavyi wiwe yabageze vyose; bakanka kuvyumvira ngo babikore." 
2Kings18:13 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kane umwami Hezekiya ari ku ngoma, Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri yaradūze, atera ibisagara vyose vyubakiwe inzitiro vy’i Buyuda, arabitsinda." 
2Kings18:14 Maze Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda atuma ku mwami w’i Ashuri i Lakishi, ut’ Arazi ko yakoze nabi; uti Non’ arakwisavye, umureke usubire i wawe; ut’ Ivyo umucira vyose azobitanga. Nuk’ umwami w’i Ashuri acira Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda italanto z’ifeza amajana atatu n’italanto z’izahabu mirongwitatu." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya amuha amafeza yose yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ayari mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe." 
2Kings18:16 Mur’ ico gihe Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda yomorora izahabu ku nzugi z’urusengero rw’ Uhoraho n’izo ku nkingi yari yarometseko, aziha umwami w’i Ashuri." 
2Kings18:17 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri atuma Tarutani na Rabusarisi na Rabushake, bava i Lakishi bajanye ingabo nyinshi, ngo baje ku mwami Hezekiya i Yerusalemu. Nuko baradūga baja i Yerusalemu nyene. Bashitseyo bahagarara ku mugende wo ku kidengeri co haruguru, ku nzira yo ku kibuga c’umumesuzi." 
2Kings18:18 Maze bahamagaje umwami, haca haza umuzezwarugo wiwe Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, n’umukarani Shebuna, n’umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba yitwa Yowa mwene Asafu, barenga irembo barabasanganira." 
2Kings18:19 Rabushake arababarira, ati Ni mubarire Hezekiya, mut’ Uku ni k’ umwami ahambaye, ni we mwami w’i Ashuri, agize: ngo Mbeg’ ivyo vyizigiro wizigiye n’ibiki?" 
2Kings18:20 Muti K’uvuze ng’ ufise inama n’inkomezi zo kurwana, ariko n’ amagambo y’impfagusa! Muti Mbeg’ uwo wishimiye ni nde, yatumye umugarariza?" 
2Kings18:21 Mut’ Erega wishimiye ya nkoni y’irenga rivunitse, ni ryo Egiputa, umuntu yoryishimikiza, ryomutobekeranya ikiganza. Mut’ Uko ni ko Farawo umwami wa Egiputa amerera abamwishimiye bose." 
2Kings18:22 Naho mwomubarira ko mwishimiye Uhoraho Imana yanyu: none si yo Hezekiya yakūyeh’ ibitabo vyayo n’ibicaniro vyayo, akabarira Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu, ati Muze musengere imbere y’iki gicaniro i Yerusalemu?" 
2Kings18:23 Muti None rero, enda shinga na shebuja umwami w’i Ashuri; muti Na we Rabushake araguha amafarasi ibihumbi bibiri, namba nawe ubgawe woshobora kuronka abo uyūriza." 
2Kings18:24 Muti None se woshobora ute gukora mu maso y’umugabisha n’umwe wo mu basavyi ba shebuja bo hanyuma y’abandi, mut’ Asangw’ ar’ ukwishimira Abanyegiputa kw ari bo bazoguha imikogote ikwegwa n’ amafarasi n’abo kuyagenderako?" 
2Kings18:25 Muti Mbega yadūze gutera aha hantu no kuharandura, atari kubg’ Uhoraho? Mut’ Ereg’ Uhoraho ni we nyene yamubariye, ati Dūga utere ico gihugu, ukirandure." 
2Kings18:26 Maze Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, na Shebuna na Yowa, bishura Rabushake, bat’ Enda se turakwinginze, utubarire mu Gisiriya kuko tucumva; ariko nta co utubaririra mu Kiyuda mu matwi y’aba bantu bari hejuru ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye." 
2Kings18:27 Ariko Rabushake arabishura, ati Mbeg’ ugira ngo databuja yantumye kuri shobuja namwe gusa kubabgira aya majambo? Ntiyantumye kur’ aba bagabo bicaranye namwe hejuru ku ruzitiro, kugira ngo barīre amavyi yabo hamwe n’ayo basōvye?" 
2Kings18:28 Maze Rabushake arahagarara, avuga n’ijwi rirenga mu rurimi rw’Ikiyuda, ati Ni mwumve ijambo ry’umwami ahambaye, ni we mwami w’i Ashuri." 
2Kings18:29 Uku ni k’umwami agize, ngo Hezekiya ntabahende; ngo Kukw atazoshobora kubakiza ngo ntimukorokere mu maboko yiwe." 
2Kings18:30 Ngo Kandi Hezekiya ntabizigize Uhoraho, ababarira, ng’ Uhoraho ntazobura kubakiza, kandi ng’ Uyu murwa ntuzotangwa ng’ ukorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri." 
2Kings18:31 Ntimwumvire Hezekiya: kuk’ ukw ari k’umwami w’i Ashuri agize, ngo Kunda mwuzure na we, musokoroke muje iy’ ari, umuntu wese ngw abone kurya ku muzabibu wiwe no ku musukoni wiwe, no kunywa ku mazi yo mw ivomo ryiwe," 
2Kings18:32 ngo Gushitsa igihe azozira akabajana mu gihugu gihwanye n’icanyu, igihugu c’ ingano na vino, igihugu c’indya n’inzabibu, igihugu c’amavuta ya clayo n’ubūki, kugira ngo mubone kubaho, ntimupfe; kandi ntimuze mwumvire Hezekiya ni yabahenda, avuga ng’ Uhoraho azobakiza." 
2Kings18:33 Mbega mu mana z’abanyamahanga hari n’imwe yigeze gukiza igihugu cayo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri? 
2Kings18:34 Ngo Mbeg’ imana z’i Hamati n’izo muri Arupadi ziri hehe? Imana z’i Sefaravayimu n’iz’ i Hena n’iz’ i Iva ziri hehe? Ngo Mbega zarakijije Samariya ngo ntihakorokere mu maboko yiwe? 
2Kings18:35 Ngo N’izihe mu mana zose zo mur’ ivyo bihugu zākijije igihugu cazo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko yiwe, ng’Uhoraho na we akize Yerusalemu ngo ntihakorokere mu maboko yiwe?" 
2Kings18:36 Maz’ abantu barihorera, ntibamwishura ijambo na rimwe, kukw ijambo ry’umwami ryari ryavuze, ngo Ntimugire ico mumwishura." 
2Kings18:37 Hanyuma wa muzezwarugo Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, n’umukarani Shebuna, n’ umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba yitwa Yowa mwene Asafu, baza kuri Hezekiya bitantamuriyekw impuzu zabo, bamudondera amagambo ya Rabushake." 
2Kings19:1 Maz’ umwami Hezekiya avyumvise, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, yambara amagunira, yinjira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings19:2 Maz’ atuma Eliyakimu umuzezwarugo, na Shebuna umukarani, n’abakuru bo mu baherezi, bambaye amagunira, k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
2Kings19:2 Maz’ atuma Eliyakimu umuzezwarugo, na Shebuna umukarani, n’abakuru bo mu baherezi, bambaye amagunira, k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
2Kings19:3 Baramubgira, bati Hezekiya aradutumye, ng’ Uyu musi n’ umusi w’umubabaro n’ibihano n’ ugushinyagurirwa, ngo Kukw abana bagomba kuvuka, kandi nta nkomezi zo kubavyara." 
2Kings19:4 Ngo Kumbure Uhoraho Imana yawe yokwumva amagambo yose ya Rabushake, ayo shebuja umwami w’i Ashuri yamutumye gutuka Imana nzima, Uhoraho Imana yawe akamuhana kubg’ ayo magambo yumvise. Ngo Nuko rero, shirak’ usenge, usabire amasigarira agisigaye." 
2Kings19:5 Nukw abantu b’ umwami Hezekiya bashika kuri Yesaya. 
2Kings19:6 Yesaya arababgira, at’ Uku abe ari ko mubgira shobuja, mut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ntutinye ayo magambo wumvise, abo baja b’umwami w’i Ashuri bamurogoseko." 
2Kings19:7 Ngo Rāba azomushiramw’ uwundi mutima, kand’ azokwumva impuha zitume asubira mu gihugu ciwe; kandi ngw Azomwicishiriza inkota mur’ ico gihugu ciwe nyene." 
2Kings19:8 Nuko Rabushake asubira inyuma, asanga umwami w’i Ashuri ateye i Libuna; ajayo kuko yari yumvise ko yavuye i Lakishi." 
2Kings19:9 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri yumvise bavuga Tiruhaka umwami w’i Etiyopiya, bat’ Araje kugutera; yongera gutuma intumwa kuri Hezekiya," 
2Kings19:10 mut’ Uku abe ari ko muzobgira Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, mut’ Iyo Mana wishimiye ntiz’ iguhende, ngw I Yerusalemu ntihazotangwa mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri." 
2Kings19:11 Muti Mbega ntiwumvise ukw abami b’i Ashuri bāgiriye ibihugu vyose, bakabirandura rwose? muti None wewe uzokira?" 
2Kings19:12 Muti Mbeg’ imana z’amahanga, ayo ba sekuru bāranduye, zararokoye ab’i Gozani n’i Harani n’i Resefu n’ Abanyedeni baba i Telasari?" 
2Kings19:13 Mut’ Umwami w’i Hamati ari hehe’ cank’ umwami w’i Arupadi, n’umwami w’umurwa w’i Sefaravayimu, n’uw’ i Hena n’uw’ i Iva?" 
2Kings19:14 Bukeye Hezekiya ashikirizwa ico cete n’izo ntumwa, aragisoma; maz’ aradūga, aja mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho, arakigaranzura, agishira imbere y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings19:15 Nuko Hezekiya asengera imbere y’Uhoraho, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana y’ Abisirayeli, uvyagiye ku bakerubi, ni wewe Mana wenyene y’ibihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi, ni wewe waremye ijuru n’isi." 
2Kings19:16 Tega ugutwi Uhoraho, wumve; tereza inyonga zawe Uhoraho, witegereze; wumve amagambo ya Senakeribu yatumye ino kugutuka wewe Mana nzima." 
2Kings19:17 Uhoraho, n’ivy’ ukuri abami b’i Ashuri bārahoneje ayo mahanga n’ibihugu vyayo," 
2Kings19:18 bātereye imana zabo mu muriro; ariko ntizar’ imana nya mana, zar’ izakozwe n’intoke z’ abantu mu biti no mu mabuye; ni co catumye bazihonnya." 
2Kings19:19 Nuko none, Uhoraho Mana yacu, ndakwinginze udukize, udukūre mu maboko yiwe, kugira ngw ibihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi bamenye kw ari wewe Mana wenyene, ewe Uhoraho." 
2Kings19:20 Maze Yesaya mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngw Ivyo wamutakambiye ku vya Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, yavyumvise." 
2Kings19:20 Maze Yesaya mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngw Ivyo wamutakambiye ku vya Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, yavyumvise." 
2Kings19:21 Ut’ Iri ni ryo jambo Uhoraho yamuvuzeko, at’ Umukobga w’inkumi w’i Siyoni aragukēngereye, agutwengeye mw ijigo; umukobga w’i Yerusalemu akuzungurije umutwe." 
2Kings19:22 Uwo watonganije ukamurogotako ni nde? Ni nde wirahiye akararamango ukamurābana agakēngērwe? Erega ni jewe Uwera wa Isirayeli. 
2Kings19:23 Watumye intumwa zawe kuntuka, jewe Umwami Imana, uravuga, ng’ Udūganye igitero cinshi c’imikogote yawe y’intambara, ushitse mu mpinga z’imisozi, no mu dushōka tw’i Lebanoni; ngo Wiciye ibiti vy’amasederi vyaho birebire, n’ivy’ akajwari vyaho vyiza‐vyiza; ngo Wahanyuragiye ushika mu bgigobeko bgaho hirya cane, no mu biti vyo mw itongo ryaho rimera cane." 
2Kings19:24 Ngo Wimvye amazi mu mahanga, urayanywa; wakamishije inzūzi zo muri Egiputa ubgōro bg’ibirenge vyawe." 
2Kings19:25 Mbega ntiwumvise uko nabigenjeje kera, mbigabiye mu bihe vyashize? None narabishikije, kugira ng’ uhonnye ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro, ubihindure ibirundo vy’amasakamburira." 
2Kings19:26 Ni co catumye abābibamwo baba imburamaboko, bagacika ivutu, bakamāramāra; bagacika nk’ubgatsi bgo ku gahinga, nk’ubgatsi bg’urumerera, nk’ivyatsi vyimejeje ku nzu, nk’ingano zirumvye zikir’ ibironge." 
2Kings19:27 Ariko ndazi imyicarire yawe, n’amaja n’amaza yawe, n’ingene wanshangashiriwe." 
2Kings19:28 None rero kubg’ ubushangashirwe wangiriye, n’uko numvise ivy’ agashamango kawe, nzogutūngīra umurinda wanje mu mazuru, n’umujiginya wanje mu kanwa, ngusubize mu nzira wazananye." 
2Kings19:29 Ut’ Ariko weho Hezekiya, iki ni co kizokubera ikimenyamenya: uyu mwaka muzorya ivyimejeje ubgavyo, mu mwaka ugira kabiri muzorya utunagano twavyo, mu mwaka ugira gatatu muze mubibe, mwimbure, mutere inzabibu, muziryeko." 
2Kings19:30 Kand’ amasigarira arokotse yo mu nzu ya Yuda bazokwongera gushōra imizi hasi, ahahera hejuru bahūrike ivyamye." 
2Kings19:31 Kuko muri Yerusalemu hazosokoroka amasigarira, no ku musozi Siyoni have abārokotse: ishaka ry’Uhoraho rizoshitsa ivyo." 
2Kings19:32 Uti Ni co gitumye Uhoraho avuga ivy’ umwami w’i Ashuri, ati Ntazoruha agera mur’ iki gisagara, canke ngw aharase n’umwampi, canke ngw ahatumbereze n’inkinzo, canke ngw aharunde ikirundo co kwūririrako." 
2Kings19:33 Ut’ Inzira yazananye ni yo nyene izomusubizayo; ntazoruha agera mur’ iki gisagara, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
2Kings19:34 Ngw Azozigama uyu murwa kugira ngw awukize, abikoze kubgiwe no kubg’ umusavyi wiwe Dawidi." 
2Kings19:35 Maze mur’ iryo joro nyene umumarayika w’Uhoraho arasohoka, atera mu nsago z’Abashuri, yicamw’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani na bitanu: abantu bavyutse mu gatondo basanga ingabo zose ar’ imihindigiti y’ imivyimba." 
2Kings19:36 Nuko Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri aca arataha, asubira inyuma, aja kuba i Ninewe." 
2Kings19:37 Umusi ur’ izina, arikw arasenga ari mu ngoro y’ikigirwamana ciwe citwa Nisiroki, Adurameleki na Sharezeri bamwicisha inkota; baca bahungira mu gihugu c’i Ararati. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Esarihadoni asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings20:1 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi aza kuri we, aramubgira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Tunganya ivyo mu rugo rwawe, kuk’ ugira utange, utagikira." 
2Kings20:1 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi aza kuri we, aramubgira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Tunganya ivyo mu rugo rwawe, kuk’ ugira utange, utagikira." 
2Kings20:2 Maze Hezekiya ahindukiriza amaso ku rusika, asenga Uhoraho," 
2Kings20:3 ati Tegēra, Uhoraho we, ni wibuke ingene nagendera mu vy’ukuri imbere yawe n’umutima utunganye, ngakora ivyo ubona kw ari vyiza. Hezekiya ararira cane." 
2Kings20:4 Ariko Yesaya atararēngāna ngw ave mu nyubakwa, ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri we," 
2Kings20:5 riti Subira inyuma, ubarire Hezekiya segaba w’abantu banje, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho, Imana ya sogokuruza Dawidi, agize: uti Ngo Yumvise ugusenga kwawe, abonye n’amosozi yawe; ut’ Eh’ azogukiza; uti Maze ku musi ugira gatatu uzodūga uje mu ngoro yiwe." 
2Kings20:6 Uti Kandi ku misi yawe yongeyekw imyaka cumi n’itanu. Uti Kand’ azokurokorana n’iki gisagara, agukūre mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri; uti Kand’ azozigama iki gisagara kubgiwe, no kubg’ umusavyi wiwe Dawidi." 
2Kings20:7 Maze Yesaya aravuga, ati Muzane intore ibumbabumbge mu nsukoni. Bayizanye bayomeka ku kivyimba, arakira." 
2Kings20:8 Hezekiya abaza Yesaya, at’ Ikimenyamenya kizoba iki, cerekana k’Uhoraho azonkiza, kandi ko nzodūga nkaja mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho ku musi ugira gatatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Yesaya aramwishura, at’ Iki ni co kimenyamenya Uhoraho aguhaye, cemeza yukw azoshitsa ico avuze: uragomba kw igitūtu kija imbere intambuko cumi, canke ko gisubira inyuma intambuko cumi nyene?" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya aramwishura, at’ Ereg’ igitūtu kuja imbere intambuko cumi n’icoroshe; copfuma gisubira inyuma intambuko cumi nyene." 
2Kings20:11 Nuk’ uwo muvugishwa Yesaya atakambira Uhoraho; na we ahēra ah’ igitūtu cari kigeze ku ntambuko z’urugero rwashinzwe na Ahazi, asubiza ico gitūtu inyuma intambuko cumi." 
2Kings20:12 Ico gihe Merodaki‐Baladani mwene Baladani umwami w’i Babuloni arungikira Hezekiya ivyete n’ingemurano, kuko yari yumvise ko yarwaye." 
2Kings20:13 Maz’ abātumwe Hezekiya abākīra neza, abereka hose mu nzu ah’ abīka ibintu vyiwe vy’igiciro, amafeza n’amazahabu n’imibavu n’amavuta y’igiciro kinini, no mu nzu ah’ abīka ivyo kurwanisha, n’ikintu cose co mu vyo atunze cariho. Nta kintu na kimwe co mu ngoro yiwe canke co mu gihugu ciwe cose Hezekiya atāberetse." 
2Kings20:14 Bukeye haza uwavugishwa n’ Imana Yesaya ku mwami Hezekiya, aramubaza, at’ Abo bantu bavuze iki, kandi baje i wawe bavuye hehe? Hezekiya aramwishura, ati Baje bavuye mu gihugu ca kure i Babuloni." 
2Kings20:15 Arongera aramubaza, ati Babonye ibiki mu ngoro yawe? Hezekiya aramwishura, at’ Ibiri mu ngoro yanje vyose bābibonye: nta kintu na kimwe co mu vyo ntunze ntāberetse." 
2Kings20:16 Maze Yesaya abarira Hezekiya, ati Ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
2Kings20:17 Eh’ imisi izoza, ibiri mu ngoro yawe vyose, n’ivyo ba sogokuruza bābītse bigashitsa n’ubu, bizosahurwa bijanwe i Babuloni; nta kintu na kimwe kizosigara, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
2Kings20:18 Kand’ abahungu bawe uzoba wikūriye mu nda wavyaye bazobajana, bagirwe inkone zo kuba mu ngoro y’umwami w’i Babuloni." 
2Kings20:19 Maze Hezekiya yishura Yesaya, at’ Ijambo ry’Uhoraho uvuze ni ryiza. Yongera kuvuga, ati None si ko biri? Kazima hagiye kuba amahoro n’umutekano nkiriho." 
2Kings20:20 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Hezekiya, n’ivy’ ubuhizi bgiwe bgose, n’ingene yimvye ikidengeri, agaca umugende wo kuzana amazi mu gisagara, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings20:21 Maze Hezekiya ahamvya ba sekuruza, umuhungu wiwe Manase asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings21:1 Manase yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’itanu ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Hefusiba. 
2Kings21:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, aja mu bizira vy’ubuyobe vy’abanyamahanga, abo Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings21:3 Yongera gutabisha ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi, ivyo se Hezekiya yari yarasibanganije, yubakira Bayali ibicaniro, abāza igishushanyo ca Ashera, nk’uko Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli yagize; asenga ingabo zose zo kw ijuru, ari zo nyenyeri, arazisaba." 
2Kings21:4 Yubaka n’ibicaniro mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ari ho Uhoraho yari yaravuze, at’ I Yerusalemu ni ho nzoshira izina ryanje." 
2Kings21:5 Kandi yubakira izo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru ibicaniro mu ntangaro no mu nyubakwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho. 
2Kings21:6 Atanga umuhungu wiwe kw ikimazi ngo yoserezwe mu muriro, agapfumuza, agatera amabara, akaja kuraguza abahamagara imizimu, n’ abamenyi; yakora ibibi vyinshi imbere y’Uhoraho, bimutera umwikomo." 
2Kings21:7 Ca gishushanyo ca Ashera yabāje agishinga mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, iyo Uhoraho yari yarabariye Dawidi na Salomo umuhungu wiwe, ati Mur’ iyi ngoro, bo n’i Yerusalemu, ni ho natoranije mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli ko nzohashira izina ryanje ngo rihabe ibihe vyose." 
2Kings21:8 Kand’ ati Sinzosubira guturatuza Abisirayeli ngo bave mu gihugu nahaye ba sekuruza, ni bitondera ivyo nabageze vyose, n’ivyagezwe vyose umusavyi wanje Mose yabageze." 
2Kings21:9 Yamara ntibaruha bavyumva; ariko Manase abakwegera mu bibi kuruta ivyo amahanga yakora, ayo Uhoraho yaranduye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Kings21:10 Bukeye Uhoraho avugira mu basavyi biwe yavugisha," 
2Kings21:11 ati Manase umwami w’i Buyuda ko yakoze ivyo bizira vyose vy’ubuyobe, agakora ibibi kuruta ivyo Abamori bāmubanjirije bākoze vyose, agacumurisha Abayuda ibishushanyo vyiwe;" 
2Kings21:12 ni co gitumye jewe Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli mvuze, nti Ngira ntēze i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda ivyago bikomeye, bitume ūzovyumva wese iminzerere imuvuga mu matwi." 
2Kings21:13 Kand’ umugozi nageresheje i Samariya ni wo nzogeresha i Yerusalemu, mpagereshe na karisho nageresheje inzu ya Ahabu; kandi nzohanagura Yerusalemu, nk’uk’ umuntu ahanagura isahani, agaheza akayubika." 
2Kings21:14 Kandi nzoshiburira hirya amasigarira yo mw ishamvu yanje, mbagabure mu maboko y’abansi babo, bahinduke inyagano n’isahu ku bansi babo bose;" 
2Kings21:15 kuko bākoze ibibi imbere yanje, bakantera umwikomo bakandatsa, uhereye ku musi ba sekuruza bāviriye muri Egiputa gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Kings21:16 Kandi Manase yavishije amaraso menshi y’aberanda, araruha yuzuza Yerusalemu amaraso uhereye ku ruhande rumwe ugashitsa ku rundi; ivyo abigereka ku caha ciwe yakwegeyemw’ Abayuda, ngo bakore ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi." 
2Kings21:17 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Manase, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, n’ivyaha yakoze, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’Abayuda?" 
2Kings21:18 Nuko Manase ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga mu murima wo ku rugo rwiwe, war’ umurima wa Uza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Amoni asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka ibiri ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Meshulemeti umukobga wa Harusi w’i Yotuba. 
2Kings21:20 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’uko se Manase yakora." 
2Kings21:21 Yagendana ingeso zose za se, agasaba ibishushanyo se yasaba, akabisenga." 
2Kings21:22 Ava k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, ntiyagendera mu nzira ziwe." 
2Kings21:23 Bukeye abanyarugo b’ umwami Amoni baramugarariza, bamutsinda mu ngoro yiwe." 
2Kings21:24 Maz’ abantu bo mu gihugu bica abo bantu bose bāgararije umwami Amoni, baraheza bimika Yosiya umuhungu wiwe, bamusubiza ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Kings21:25 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Amoni, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings21:26 Nukw ahambga mu mva yiwe yari yarimbishije muri wa murima war’ uwa Uza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yosiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
2Kings22:1 Yosiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka munani; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitatu n’ umwe ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Yedida, umukobga wa Adaya w’i Bosikati." 
2Kings22:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, agendera mu ngeso nziza zose za sekuruza Dawidi, ntiyatambamira i buryo cank’ i bumoso." 
2Kings22:3 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani umwami Yosiya ari ku ngoma, atuma umukarani Shafani mwene Asaliya, Asaliya wa Meshulamu, ngw aje mu ngoro y’Uhoraho," 
2Kings22:4 ati Dūga uje iyo Hilukiya ari, umuherezi mukuru, umubgire aharūre amahera azanwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ayo abarinzi b’umuryango bamaze kwākīra mu bantu;" 
2Kings22:5 bayahe abashinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, na bo bayahembe abakozi bakora iyo ngoro, kugira ngo basanure aho yahubaguritse," 
2Kings22:6 bayahe ababāji n’ abubatsi n’abubakisha amabuye; ayandi bayagure imbaho n’amabuye abāje vyo gusanura iyo ngoro. 
2Kings22:7 Mugabo, ayo mahera bahawe, ntimuzorinda kuyabasuzumira, kukw ar’ abizigirwa." 
2Kings22:8 Bukeye Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru abarira Shafani umukarani, ati Ntoye igitabo c’ivyagezwe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho. Hilukiya araheza agiha Shafani, aragisoma." 
2Kings22:9 Maz’ uwo mukarani Shafani asubira ku mwami, amudondera uko vyagenze, at’ Abasavyi bawe bābiriye amahera yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, bayashikirije abakoresha ibikorwa vyo kur’ iyo ngoro." 
2Kings22:10 Uwo mukarani Shafani yongera kubarira umwami, ati Kand’ umuherezi Hilukiya andungikanye igitabo. Nuko Shafani agisomera umwami." 
2Kings22:11 Maz’ umwami yumvise amajambo yo mur’ ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe." 
2Kings22:12 Maz’ umwami atuma Hilukiya umuherezi na Ahikamu mwene Shafani na Akibori mwene Mikaya n’uwo mukarani Shafani nyene na Asaya umumenyekana wiwe," 
2Kings22:13 ati Ni mugende munsigurize Uhoraho, twe n’aba bantu n’abandi Bayuda bose, ivy’ amajambo yo mur’ iki gitabo batoye; kuk’ uburake bg’Uhoraho butuziriringiye ari bginshi, kubga ba sogokuruza batumviye amajambo yo mur’ iki gitabo, ngo bakore ivyanditswe muri co vyose twabariwe." 
2Kings22:14 Nuko Hilukiya umuherezi na Ahikamu na Akibori na Shafani na Asaya baragenda, baja k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Hulida muka Shalumu, Shalumu mwene Tikuva umwuzukuru wa Haluhasi, yajejwe ububīko bg’imyambaro, baramusiguza. Kand’ uwo mugore yaba i Yerusalemu mu gice caho ca kabiri." 
2Kings22:15 Arabishura, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngo Murabarira uwo muntu yamubatumyeko," 
2Kings22:16 mut’ Uhoraho agize ngw Azotēza ivyago aha hantu, bo n’abahaba, ngo Nk’uko vyanditswe mu majambo yose yo mur’ ico gitabo wasomye, wewe nyene umwami w’i Buyuda;" 
2Kings22:17 muti Kuko bāmuvuyeko, bakosereza imibavu izindi mana, muti Bakamutēza umwikomo ibikorwa vyose vy’intoke zabo; muti Ni co kizotuma uburake bgiwe bururumba kur’ aha hantu, ntihagire ikibuzimya." 
2Kings22:18 Kandi mubarire uwo mwami w’i Buyuda yabatumye gusiguza Uhoraho, mut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngo Ku vy’ayo majambo wumvise," 
2Kings22:19 ngo Kuko watsinzwe mu mutima wawe, ukicisha bugufi imbere yiwe, igihe wumva ivyo yavuze kur’ aha hantu bo n’abahaba, ingene hazocika imisaka n’ikivume, ukitantamurirakw impuzu zawe, ukaririra imbere yiwe, ngo Na we arakwumvise; ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
2Kings22:20 Ngo Nukw azoguha guhambga hamwe na ba sogokuruza, ushike mu mva yawe amahoro; ngo Kand’ amaso yawe ntazobona ivyo vyago vyose azotēza aha hantu. Nuko baraza, bagarukanira umwami ayo majambo." 
2Kings23:1 Maz’ umwami atuma guhamagaza abakuru bose b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, bakoranira ah’ ari." 
2Kings23:2 Umwami araheza aradūga, aja ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, bo n’abashingantahe b’i Buyuda bose n’ababa i Yerusalemu bose bari kumwe na we, hamwe n’abaherezi n’abavugishwa n’Imana n’ abantu bose, aboroshe n’abahambaye; abasomera amajambo yose yo mur’ ico gitabo c’isezerano bātoye mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings23:3 Maz’ umwami ahagararana n’inkingi, asezeranira imbere y’Uhoraho kw azomukurikira, no kuzokwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’ amabgirizwa yiwe n’ivyo yashinze, no kuzovyitonderesha umutima wiwe wose n’ubugingo bgiwe bgose, no kuzoshitsa amajambo y’iryo sezerano yanditswe mur’ ico gitabo. Maz’ abantu bose na bo baravyisezeranira." 
2Kings23:4 Maz’ umwami abarira Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru, n’abaherezi b’urugero rwa kabiri, n’abarinzi b’imiryango, gusohora mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu vyakorewe Bayali n’ivya Ashera n’ivy’ ingabo zose zo kw ijuru ari zo nyenyeri; abituririza inyuma y’i Yerusalemu, mu mirima yo kuri Kidironi, umunyota wavyo avuga ko bawujana i Beteli." 
2Kings23:5 Yirukana abaherezi b’ ivyo bishushanyo, abo abami b’i Buyuda bashizeho ngo bosereze imibavu mu bitabo vyo mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu bitabo vyo hirya no hino y’i Yerusalemu; akūraho n’abosereza imibavu Bayali, bakayosereza n’izuba n’ukwezi n’uburundo bg’inyenyeri, ari zo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru." 
2Kings23:6 Akūra n’igishushanyo ca Ashera mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, akijana inyuma y’i Yerusalemu ku mugezi Kidironi, agituririra kur’ uyo mugezi Kidironi nyene, aragisyokora, gihinduka ifu, iyo fu ayimijurira ku mva z’abantu ba nyarucari." 
2Kings23:7 Asangangura ivyumba vy’ abagabo bendana vyari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ah’ abagore bājishira Ashera impuzu." 
2Kings23:8 Akūra abaherezi bose mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, ahumanya ibitabo ah’ abo baherezi bāhora bosereza imibavu, uhereye i Geba ugashitsa i Berisheba, asitagura ibiti vyo mu bitabo vyatabge ku marembo, vyari mw ishikiro ry’irembo rya Yosuwa umubgiriza w’igisagara, ahahera i bumoso bg’umuntu iy’ aca mw irembo aja mu gisagara." 
2Kings23:9 Mugabo abo baherezi bo mur’ ivyo bitabo ntibādūga ngo bēgēre igicaniro c’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu, ariko bāsangira imitsima itambiwe n’ ab’i wabo." 
2Kings23:10 Kand’ ahumanya n’i Tofeti mu mwonga wa bene Hinomu, kugira ngo hoye kugira umuntu n’umwe ahatangira umwana wiwe kw ikimazi, ar’ umuhungu cank’ umukobga, ngo yoserezwe Moleki mu muriro." 
2Kings23:11 Ahīnda amafarasi abami b’i Buyuda bari baraterekereje izuba, yaba ahashikirwa ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, hafi y’icumba ca Natani‐meleki w’inkone, mu kirugu; aturira n’ imikogote yari yaraterekerejwe izuba nyene." 
2Kings23:12 Kand’ ibicaniro vyari hejuru ku nzu, ku cumba co hejuru ca Ahazi, ivyo abami b’i Buyuda bagiye bubaka, n’ibicaniro Manase yubatse mu nyubakwa no mu ntangaro vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, na vyo umwami arabisangangura; araheza arabijonjanga, umukungugu wavyo awushiburira mu mugezi Kidironi." 
2Kings23:13 Kand’ ibitabo vyātabge ku mpinga y’umusozi werekeye i Yerusalemu, ahahera i bumanuko h’umusozi w’ibore, ivyo Salomo umwami w’Abisirayeli yatabiye Ashitoreti ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’ Abasidoni, na Kemoshi ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’Abanyamowabu, na Milikomu ca kizira c’ubuyobe c’ Abamoni, umwami arabihumanya." 
2Kings23:14 Amenagura amabuye bāshinze kw inkingi, atemagura n’ibishushanyo vya Ashera; kand’ aho vyahora ahuzuza amagufa y’abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Kand’ igicaniro c’i Beteli, n’ igitabo catabishije Yerobowamu mwene Nebati yakwegeye Abisirayeli mu vyaha, ico gicaniro n’ico gitabo arabisangangura; aturira ibiti vyo mur’ ico gitabo, arabisyokora bihinduka ifu, aturira n’ igishushanyo ca Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Maze Yosiya akebutse, abona imva zari ngaho kur’ uwo musozi; atuma abantu, bazura amagufa mur’ izo mva, ayaturirira kur’ ico gicaniro, aragihumanya, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryari riri, iryo wa muntu w’Imana yavuze, igihe yavuga ivyo ko bizoba." 
2Kings23:17 Maze Yosiya arabaza, ati Kiriya cibutso mbona hariya n’ic’ iki? Abantu bo mur’ ico gisagara baramwishura, bati Kiri ku mva y’umuntu w’Imana yavuye i Buyuda, yavugishijwe ivyo ukoze kur’ iki gicaniro c’aha nyene i Beteli ko bizoba." 
2Kings23:18 Umwami aravuga, ati We ni mumureke; ntihagire ūzura amagufa yiwe. Nukw amagufa yiwe barayareka, bareka n’aya wa muvugishwa yavuye i Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Kand’ utunyabugoro twose two mu bitabo vyo mu bisagara vy’i Samariya, utwo abami b’Abisirayeli bāri bārubatse bakaratsa Uhoraho, Yosiya adukūraho, atugirira nk’uko yagiriye i Beteli kwose." 
2Kings23:20 Yicira ku bicaniro abaherezi bose bāri ngaho, abituririrakw amagufa y’abantu. Araheza arahindukira, asubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Kings23:21 Maz’ umwami abarira abantu bose, ati Ni mugire umusi mukuru w’ivya Pasika y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko vyanditswe mur’ iki gitabo c’isezerano." 
2Kings23:22 Ntihigeze kuba umusi wa Pasika uhwanye n’uyo, uhereye igihe abacamanza bācira imanza Abisirayeli, ugashitsa no mu bihe vyose vy’ abami b’Abisirayeli n’ab’ Abayuda." 
2Kings23:23 Iyo Pasika y’Uhoraho bāyigiriye i Yerusalemu mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani w’umwami Yosiya. 
2Kings23:24 Kand’ abahamagara imizimu n’abamenyi n’ibishushanyo vyitwa terafimu n’ibishushanyo vy’ibigirwamana, n’ibizira vyose vy’ubuyobe vyabonetse mu gihugu c’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, na vyo Yosiya abikūraho, kugira ngw ashitse amajambo y’ivyagezwe yanditswe mu gitabo Hilukiya umuherezi yatoye mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Kings23:25 Kandi nta mwami mu bāmwitangiye imbere yar’ ahwanye na we, yahindukiriye Uhoraho n’umutima wiwe wose n’ubugingo bgiwe bgose n’inkomezi ziwe zose, nk’ukw ivyagezwe vyose vya Mose biri; mbere no mu bāmuherukiye nta n’umwe yahwanye na we." 
2Kings23:26 Ariko na ho nyene Uhoraho ntiyahindukiye ngw areke uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi, kuk’ uburake bgiwe bgari buziriringiye Abayuda kubg’ ivyo Manase yakoze vyose, akamutera umwikomo." 
2Kings23:27 Uhoraho aravuga, ati Nzokūra Abayuda imbere yanje, nk’uko nakūyeh’ Abisirayeli; kandi nzokwihakana ico gisagara c’i Yerusalemu nitoranirije, bo n’iyo ngoro, ari yo nari naravuze, nt’ Izina ryanje ni ho rizoba." 
2Kings23:28 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yosiya, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings23:29 Ku ngoma yiwe Farawo‐neko umwami wa Egiputa aradūga aja gutera umwami w’i Ashuri ku ruzi Efurate; maz’ umwami Yosiya aja kumutega ngw amurwanye; ariko bakirumanira i Megido, Farawo‐neko amutsindaho." 
2Kings23:30 Maz’ abantu biwe bajana umuvyimba wiwe mu mukogote w’intambara, bawukūra i Megido bawujana i Yerusalemu, bamuhamba mu mva yiwe yari yarimbishije. Abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu bahitana Yehowahazi umuhungu wiwe, bamwimikisha amavuta, bamwimika mu gishingo ca se." 
2Kings23:31 Yehowahazi yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itatu; ayimarakw amezi atatu ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Hamutali, umukobga wa Yeremiya w’i Libuna." 
2Kings23:32 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ivyo ba sekuruza bakoze vyose." 
2Kings23:33 Bukeye Farawo‐neko amuta mu ngoyi amubohera i Ribula mu gihugu c’i Hamati, amukūra ku ngoma i Yerusalemu; igihugu ciwe agicira iciru c’italanto ijana z’ifeza n’italanto imwe y’izahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Maze Farawo‐neko yimika Eliyakimu mwene Yosiya nyene, amusubiza ku ngoma ya se, ahindura izina ryiwe, amwita Yehoyakimu. Maz’ akūra Yehowahazi aho yar’ ari, amujana muri Egiputa, agwayo." 
2Kings23:35 Nuko Yehoyakimu aha Farawo ayo mafeza n’amazahabu; mugabo kugira ngw aronke ayo mahera yo gutanga, nk’uko Farawo yageze, yarinze kuyatoza igihugu; ukw aciriye umuntu wese, ni ko yatse igihugu ayo mafeza n’amazahabu, kugira ngw abihe Farawo‐neko." 
2Kings23:36 Kandi Yehoyakimu yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe ar’ i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Zebida, umukobga wa Pedaya w’i Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ ivyo ba sekuruza bakoze vyose." 
2Kings24:1 Ku ngoma ya Yehoyakimu, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni arabatera; Yehoyakimu aramwisaba, amara imyaka itatu aganzwa na we; araheza aramuhinduka, aramugarariza." 
2Kings24:2 Maz’ Uhoraho amutēza ibitero vy’Abakaludaya n’ivy’ Abasiriya n’ivy’ Abanyamowabu n’ivy’ Abamoni, abagomorera i Buyuda ngo baharandure, nk’ukw ijambo ryiwe riri, iryo yavugiye mu basavyi biwe yavugisha." 
2Kings24:3 Ayo yose Abayuda bāyabonye kubg’ icagezwe c’Uhoraho gusa, kugira ngw abakūre imbere yiwe, abahōye ivyaha Manase yakoze vyose," 
2Kings24:4 n’amaraso y’aberanda yavishije; kuko yujuje i Yerusalemu amaraso y’aberanda; nukw ivyo Uhoraho ntiyemera kubiharira. 
2Kings24:5 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoyakimu, n’ivyo yakoze vyose, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Buyuda?" 
2Kings24:6 Nuko Yehoyakimu ahamvya ba sekuruza; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoyakina asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
2Kings24:7 Arik’ umwami wa Egiputa ntiyongeye kuva mu gihugu ciwe, kuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yari yāmunyujije ivyar’ ivyiwe vyose, uhereye ku mugezi wa Egiputa ugashitsa ku ruzi Efurate." 
2Kings24:8 Yehoyakina yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’umunani; ayimarakw amezi atatu i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Nehushita, umukobga wa Elunatani w’i Yerusalemu." 
2Kings24:9 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ivyo se yakoze vyose." 
2Kings24:10 Ico gihe ingabo za Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ziradūga, zitera i Yerusalemu, bugariza ico gisagara." 
2Kings24:11 Bukeye Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni arīyizira ubgiwe, ashika kur’ ico gisagara ingabo ziwe zikicugarije." 
2Kings24:12 Maze Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda ava mu gisagara, bo na nyina n’ abantu biwe n’abo mu nda y’ ingoma n’abamenyekana biwe, aja kwisaba uwo mwami w’i Babuloni, na we aramufata; ico gihe umwami w’i Babuloni yar’ amaze imyaka munani ari ku ngoma." 
2Kings24:13 Asahura ibitunzwe vyose mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, bo n’ivyo mu ngoro y’umwami, amenagura n’ ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu vy’ izahabu vyari mu rusengero rw’ Uhoraho, ivyo Salomo umwami w’Abisirayeli yari yaracurishije, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze." 
2Kings24:14 Ajana ab’i Yerusalemu bose ar’ inyagano, hamwe n’abo mu nda y’ ingoma bose, n’abahizi bose; abāfashwe bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi cumi, hamwe n’ababāji n’abacuzi bose; nta wasigaye mur’ ico gihugu atari ba nyarucari bo hanyuma y’abandi." 
2Kings24:15 Nukw ajana Yehoyakina i Babuloni, ajana n’ umugabekazi, n’abamikazi biwe, n’abamenyekana biwe, n’abaganwa bo mur’ ico gihugu, abakūra i Yerusalemu abajana i Babuloni ar’ inyagano." 
2Kings24:16 Kand’ abantu bose b’abahizi, bashika ibihumbi ndwi, bo n’ababāji n’abacuzi igihumbi, bose b’abanyenkomezi bazi kurwana, bose umwami w’i Babuloni abajana i we i Babuloni ar’ inyagano." 
2Kings24:17 Maz’ umwami w’i Babuloni yimika Mataniya se wabo wa Yehoyakina mu gishingo ciwe, ahindura izina ryiwe amwita Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Zedekiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ umwe; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe i Yerusalemu; nyina yitwa Hamutali umukobga wa Yeremiya w’i Libuna. 
2Kings24:19 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ivyo Yehoyakimu yakoze vyose." 
2Kings24:20 Kukw ivyabaye i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda vyavuye ku burake bg’ Uhoraho, gushitsa ah’ amaramarije kubirukana imbere yiwe. Hanyuma Zedekiya agarariza umwami w’i Babuloni." 
2Kings25:1 Mu mwaka ugira icenda Zedekiya ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kw’icumi, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi nyene, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni araza, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, batera Yerusalemu, basagaza inyuma yaho; bubaka n’ibihome vyo kuhatera hirya no hino." 
2Kings25:2 Nuko bakomeza kwugariza ico gisagara gushitsa ku mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe umwami Zedekiya ari ku ngoma. 
2Kings25:3 Ku musi ugira icenda wo mu kwezi kwa kane, inzara yar’ imaze guhūma mur’ ico gisagara, bituma abantu b’abanyagihugu babura ico barya." 
2Kings25:4 Abakaludaya baraheza basatura uruzitiro rw’ico gisagara, maz’ ingabo zose zihenga mw ijoro zirahunga, ziciye mu kirimba kiri hagati y’inzitiro zibiri, cari hafi y’indimiro y’umwami; kand’ Abakaludaya bāri bakikije igisagara impande zose; nuk’ umwami ajana inzira ica mu kiyaya Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Maz’ ingabo z’Abakaludaya zōma inyuma y’ umwami, zimuhambiriza mu kiyaya c’i Yeriko; ingabo ziwe zose zirasābagira ziramuta." 
2Kings25:6 Maze bafata umwami, baramudūgana, bamuzanira umwami w’i Babuloni, bamumusanza i Ribula; bamucirakw iteka." 
2Kings25:7 Abahungu biwe babamwicira imbere, na we bamunogora amaso, bamwambika umunyororo, bamujana i Babuloni." 
2Kings25:8 Maze mu kwezi kwa gatanu, ku musi wakwo ugira indwi, mur’ uwo mwaka ugira icumi n’icenda umwami Nebukadineza, umwami w’i Babuloni, ari ku ngoma, Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abashibamyi, umuntu w’umwami w’i Babuloni, ashika i Yerusalemu." 
2Kings25:9 Araheza yanda umuriro ingoro y’Uhoraho, n’ingoro y’umwami, n’amazu yose y’i Yerusalemu; mber’ inzu yose ikomeye ayitongoza umuriro." 
2Kings25:10 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abakaludaya zari kumwe n’uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi zisangangura inzitiro z’i Yerusalemu impande zose. 
2Kings25:11 Maz’ amasigarira y’abantu bāri bagisigaye mur’ ico gisagara, n’abāri baragiye kwisaba umwami w’i Babuloni, n’amasigarira y’abafundi, Nebuzaradani uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi abajana ar’ inyagano." 
2Kings25:12 Arikw asiga ba nyarucari bo mur’ ico gihugu, ngo batunganye imizabibu, barime." 
2Kings25:13 Kand’ inkingi z’imiringa zari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ibitereko, na ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga cācuzwe mu miringa cāri mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, Abakaludaya barabijanjagura, bajana bino bimeneke vy’imiringa i Babuloni." 
2Kings25:14 Bajana n’imibindi, n’ivyuma biyora iminyota, n’imakasi, n’ udukombe, n’ibintu vyacuzwe mu miringa vyose bākoresha mu vyo guhereza;" 
2Kings25:15 kandi n’ivyotero n’inzavya na vyo, uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi arabijana, ivyacuzwe mw izahabu ukwavyo, n’ ivyacuzwe mw ifeza ukwavyo." 
2Kings25:16 Ku vya za nkingi zompi, na ca kiyaga, na vya bitereko, ivyo umwami Salomo yari yaracurishirije ingoro y’Uhoraho: imiringa ivyo bintu vyose vyacuzwemwo ntiyagira akagero." 
2Kings25:17 Inkingi imwe‐imwe uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge cumi n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; yarik’ umwashi w’umuringa: uburebure bg’uwo mwashi bgar’ amatambge atatu, kandi kuri wo hārikw ibimeze nk’urusenga n’ibimeze nk’amakomamanga impande zose, vyose vyācuzwe mu miringa; kandi n’inkingi ya kabiri yarikw ibisa n’ivyo, bo n’urusenga." 
2Kings25:18 Nuko wa mukuru w’abashibamyi afata Seraya umuherezi mukuru, na Zefaniya umuherezi wa kabiri, n’abashibama ku rugi ukw ari batatu:" 
2Kings25:19 kandi mu gisagara ahafatira uwaganza ivy’ abahizi b’intambara, n’abashingantahe batanu b’abanyejambo b’umwami, abo yasanze mu gisagara; n’umukarani w’umugabisha w’ingabo yakoranya ingabo zo mur’ ico gihugu; afata n’abagabo mirongwitandatu bo mu banyagihugu yasanze mur’ ico gisagara nyene." 
2Kings25:20 Maze Nebuzaradani, wa mukuru w’abashibamyi, arabajana, abasanza umwami w’i Babuloni i Ribula." 
2Kings25:21 Umwami w’i Babuloni arabazibagura, abatsinda ngaho nyene i Ribula, mu ntāra y’i Hamati. Uko ni kw Abayuda bajanywekw inyagano, bakūrwa mu gihugu cabo." 
2Kings25:22 Abantu basigaye mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, abo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yashigaje, abaha Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, ngw abaganze." 
2Kings25:23 Maz’ abagabisha bose b’ingabo, bo n’ingabo zabo, bumvise yuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yashizeho Gedaliya kuganza igihugu, baza kuri Gedaliya i Misipa. Ni bo aba: Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, na Yohanani mwene Kareya, na Seraya mwene Tanehumeti w’i Netofati, na Yezaniya umwana w’Umunyamayaka, bo n’ingabo zabo." 
2Kings25:24 Maze Gedaliya ababarira abarahira, bo n’ ingabo zabo, ati Ntimuhagarikwe imitima n’abo bantu b’i Bukaludaya; mwibere mu gihugu, musabe umwami w’i Babuloni, kandi bizobaroranira." 
2Kings25:25 Ariko mu kwezi kw’indwi, Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, Netaniya wa Elishama, wo mu nda y’ingoma, azanana n’abantu cumi, baraza, bagurukira kuri Gedaliya baramwica, bica n’Abayuda n’Abakaludaya bāri kumwe na we i Misipa." 
2Kings25:26 Maz’ abantu bose, abakomeye n’aboroshe, n’abagabisha b’ingabo, bakūra hasi baja muri Egiputa, kubgo gutinya Abakaludaya." 
2Kings25:27 Maze mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’indwi Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda ari mu mugozi, mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri, ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri n’indwi, Evili‐merodaki umwami w’i Babuloni abohora Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda, amukūra mw ibohero: hāri mu mwaka yimyemwo." 
2Kings25:28 Amuyāgīsha neza, yubahiriza intebe yiwe kuyirutisha iz’ abandi bami bāri kuri we i Babuloni." 
2Kings25:29 Amunyuranurira impuzu zo mw ibohero amwambika izindi, amuha kwama asangira na we na ntaryo, imisi yose yamaze akiriho." 
2Kings25:30 Kandi ku bimutunga, agererwa ivyo kumutunga n’umwami vy’intasība, ingaburo y’uko bukeye imisi yose yamaze akiriho." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adamu na Seti na Enoshi," 
1Chronicles1:2 na Kenani na Mahalaleli na Yaredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 na Henoki na Metusela na Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 na Nowa na Shemu na Hamu na Yafeti. 
1Chronicles1:5 Aba Yafeti ni Gomeri na Magogi na Madayi na Yavani na Tubalu na Mesheki na Tirasi. 
1Chronicles1:6 Aba Gomeri ni Ashikenazi na Rifati na Togaruma. 
1Chronicles1:7 Aba Yavani ni Elisha na Tarushishi na Kitimu na Dodanimu. 
1Chronicles1:8 Aba Hamu ni Kushi na Misirayimu na Puti na Kanani. 
1Chronicles1:9 Aba Kushi ni Seba na Havila na Sabuta na Rama na Sabuteka. Bene Rama ni Sheba na Dedani. 
1Chronicles1:10 Kandi Kushi yavyaye na Nimurodi: ni we wa mbere yabaye cīhabugabo mw isi. 
1Chronicles1:11 Misirayimu yakomōtsweko n’Abaludi n’Abanami n’Abalehabi n’Abanafutuhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 n’Abapatirusi n’Abakasiluhi (ni bo bākomōtsweko n’Abafilisitiya), kandi yakomōtsweko n’ Abakafutori." 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanani yavyaye imfura yiwe Sidoni, akurikizako Heti:" 
1Chronicles1:14 kandi Kanani ni we yakomōtsweko n’Abayebusi n’Abamori n’Abagirugashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 n’Abahiwi n’Abaruki n’Abasini," 
1Chronicles1:16 n’Abaruvadi n’Abasemari n’Abahamati. 
1Chronicles1:17 Aba Shemu ni Elamu na Ashuri na Arupakisadi na Ludi na Aramu na Uzi na Huli na Geteri na Mesheki. 
1Chronicles1:18 Arupakisadi yavyaye Shela; Shela yavyaye Eberi. 
1Chronicles1:19 Eberi yavyaye abahungu babiri: umwe yitwa Pelegi, kuko mu gihe ciwe ari ho isi yagabanganirijwe; murumuna we yitwa Yokitani." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yokitani yavyaye Alumodadi na Shelefu na Hasarumaweti na Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 na Hadoramu na Uzalu na Dikila," 
1Chronicles1:22 na Ebali na Abimayeli na Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 na Ofiru na Havila na Yobabu; abo bose ni bene Yokitani. 
1Chronicles1:24 Shemu na Arupakisadi na Shela," 
1Chronicles1:25 na Eberi na Pelegi na Reyu," 
1Chronicles1:26 na Serugi na Nahori na Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 na Aburamu, ari we Aburahamu." 
1Chronicles1:28 Bene Aburahamu ni Isaka na Ishimayeli. 
1Chronicles1:29 Uru ni rwo ruvyaro rwabo: imfura ya Ishimayeli ni Nebayoti, hakurikira Kedari na Adibeli na Mibusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 na Mishima na Duma na Masa na Hadadi na Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 na Yeturi na Nafishi na Kedema; abo ni bo bana ba Ishimayeli. 
1Chronicles1:32 Aba ni bo bana Ketura, incoreke ya Aburahamu, yavyaranye na we: avyara Zimurani na Yokishani na Medani na Midiyani na Yishibaki na Shuwa. Bene Yokishani ni Sheba na Dedani." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bene Midiyani ni Efa na Eferi na Hanoki na Abida na Eludaya. Abo bose n’uruvyaro rwa Ketura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Aburahamu yavyaye Isaka. Bene Isaka ni Esau na Isirayeli. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bene Esau ni Elifazi na Ruweli na Yushi na Yalamu na Kora. 
1Chronicles1:36 Bene Elifazi ni Temani na Omari na Sefi na Gatamu na Kenazi na Timuna na Amaleki. 
1Chronicles1:37 Bene Ruweli ni Nahati na Zera na Shama na Miza. 
1Chronicles1:38 Bene Seyiri ni Lotani na Shobali na Sibeyoni na Ana na Dishoni na Etseri na Dishani. 
1Chronicles1:39 Bene Lotani ni Hori na Homamu; kandi mushiki wa Lotani yari Timuna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Bene Shobali ni Aliyani na Manahati na Ebali na Shefi na Onamu. Bene Sibeyoni ni Aya na Ana. 
1Chronicles1:41 Bene Ana ni Dishoni. Bene Dishoni ni Hamurani na Eshibani na Yitirani na Kerani. 
1Chronicles1:42 Bene Etseri ni Biluhani na Zayavani na Yakani. Bene Dishani ni Uzi na Arani. 
1Chronicles1:43 Aba ni bo bami babaye ku ngoma mu gihugu ca Edomu, hatarīma umwami mu Bisirayeli. Bela mwene Beyori; umurwa wiwe witwa Dinihaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bela atanze, Yobabu mwene Zera w’i Bosira asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobabu atanze, Hushamu wo mu gihugu c’Abatemani asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushamu atanze, Hadadi mwene Bedadi, umwe yaneshereza Abamidiyani mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, asubira ku ngoma yiwe; umurwa wiwe witwa Aviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadadi atanze, Samula w’i Masireka asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles1:48 Samula atanze, Sauli w’i Rehoboti ahahera kuri rwa Ruzi, asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles1:49 Sauli atanze, Bayali‐hanani mwene Akibori asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles1:50 Bayali‐hanani atanze, Hadadi asubira ku ngoma yiwe; umurwa wiwe witwa Payi; umwamikazi wiwe yitwa Mehetabeli, umukobga wa Matiredi, Matiredi umukobga wa Mezahabu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadadi na we aratanga. Abakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu ni Timuna na Aliya na Yeteti," 
1Chronicles1:52 na Oholibama na Ela na Pinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 na Kenazi na Temani na Mibusari," 
1Chronicles1:54 na Magidiyeli na Iramu. Abo ni bo bakuru b’imiryango yakomōtse kuri Edomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba ni bo bana ba Isirayeli: Reyubeni na Simeyoni na Lewi na Yuda na Isakari na Zebuloni," 
1Chronicles2:2 na Dani na Yosefu na Benyamini na Nafutali na Gadi na Asheri. 
1Chronicles2:3 Bene Yuda ni Eri na Onani na Shela; abo ukw ari batatu yabavyaranye na Batishuwa Umunyakananikazi. Kandi Eri, imfura ya Yuda, yakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi: Uhoraho araheza aramwica." 
1Chronicles2:4 Maze Yuda avyara Peresi na Zera kuri Tamari, umukazana wiwe. Nukw abahungu ba Yuda bose na bose bāri batanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Bene Peresi ni Hesironi na Hamuli. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bene Zera ni Zimuri na Etani na Hemani na Kalukoli na Dara; bose na bose bāri batanu. 
1Chronicles2:7 Mwene Karumi ni Akani, yateje Abisirayeli amagorwa, igihe yacumura mu vyagizwe inyegu." 
1Chronicles2:8 Mwene Etani ni Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Kand’ abana Hesironi yavyaye ni Yerameyeli na Ramu na Kelubayi. 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu avyara Aminadabu; Aminadabu avyara Nahashoni, umukuru wo mu muryango wa Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahashoni avyara Saluma; Saluma avyara Bowazi. 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowazi avyara Obedi; Obedi avyara Isayi. 
1Chronicles2:13 Isayi avyara Eliyabu, imfura yiwe, uwa kabiri ni Abinadabu, uwa gatatu ni Shimeya," 
1Chronicles2:14 uwa kane ni Netaneli, uwa gatanu ni Radayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 uwa gatandatu ni Osemu, uw’ indwi ni Dawidi;" 
1Chronicles2:16 kandi bashiki babo ni Seruwiya na Abigayili. Abana ba Seruwiya ni Abishayi na Yowabu na Asaheli, ukw ari batatu." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayili avyara Amasa, kandi se wa Amasa yari Yeteri w’Umwishimayeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebu mwene Hesironi avyara abana kuri Azuba umugore wiwe, no kuri Yeriyoti; aba ni bo bana ba Azuba: Yesheri na Shobabu na Aridoni." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba apfuye, Kalebu yābīra Efurata, bavyarana Huri." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huri avyara Uri, Uri avyara Besaleli." 
1Chronicles2:21 Hanyuma Hesironi yābīra umukobga wa Makiri se wa Gileyadi, kandi Hesironi yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitandatu igihe yamurongora; bavyarana Segubu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubu avyara Yayiri; Yayiri ni we yaganza ibisagara mirongwibiri na bitatu mu ntāra y’i Gileyadi. 
1Chronicles2:23 Hanyuma Geshuri na Aramu banyaga aba Yayiri ivyo bisagara, bo n’i Kenati n’udusagara tuhakūkira, vyose na vyose vyar’ ibisagara mirongwitandatu. Abo bose ni bo bandurutse kuri Makiri se wa Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Bukeye Hesironi amaze gupfa, aguye i Kalebu‐efurata, umugore wiwe Abiya inda yasigaranye ayivyaramwo Ashuri se wa Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Bene Yerameyeli imfura ya Hesironi n’aba: uw’ imfura ni Ramu, agakurikirwa na Buna na Oreni na Osemu na Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Kandi Yerameyeli yar’ afise uwundi mugore yitwa Atara; uwo ni we nyina wa Onamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Bene Ramu imfura ya Yerameyeli ni Mayasi na Yamini na Ekeri. 
1Chronicles2:28 Bene Onamu ni Shamayi na Yada; bene Shamayi ni Nadabu na Abishuri. 
1Chronicles2:29 Muka Abishuri yitwa Abihayili: bavyarana Ahubani na Molidi. 
1Chronicles2:30 Bene Nadabu ni Seledi na Apayimu; ariko Seledi apfa ar’ imponnyi. 
1Chronicles2:31 Mwene Apayimu ni Ishi; mwene Ishi ni Sheshani; mwene Sheshani ni Ahulayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Bene Yada murumuna wa Shamayi ni Yeteri na Yonatani; ariko Yeteri apfa ar’ imponnyi. 
1Chronicles2:33 Bene Yonatani ni Peleti na Zaza. Abo bose ni bo bandurutse kuri Yerameyeli. 
1Chronicles2:34 Kandi Sheshani nta muhungu yagira, atar’ abakobga gusa; ariko yar’ afise umugurano ava muri Egiputa yitwa Yaruha;" 
1Chronicles2:35 nuko Sheshani uwo mugurano wiwe amushingira umukobga wiwe, bavyarana Atayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi avyara Natani, Natani avyara Zabadi;" 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabadi avyara Efulali, Efulali avyara Obedi;" 
1Chronicles2:38 Obedi avyara Yehu, Yehu avyara Azariya;" 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya avyara Helesi, Helesi avyara Eleyasa;" 
1Chronicles2:40 Eleyasa avyara Sisimayi, Sisimayi avyara Shalumu;" 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalumu avyara Yekamiya, Yekamiya avyara Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Mwene Kalebu murumuna wa Yerameyeli ni Maresha, kandi ni we mfura yiwe, ni we se wa Zifu; mwene Maresha ni Heburoni." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bene Heburoni ni Kora na Tapuwa na Rekemu na Shema. 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema avyara Rahamu se wa Yorikeyamu; Rekemu na we avyara Shamayi. 
1Chronicles2:45 Mwene Shamayi ni Mayoni; kandi Mayoni ni we se wa Beti‐suri. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kandi Efa, incoreke ya Kalebu, Kalebu amuvyarako Hara na Mosa na Gazezi; Harani avyara Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bene Yahidayi ni Regemu na Yotamu na Geshani na Peleti na Efa na Shafi. 
1Chronicles2:48 Kandi Mayaka, incoreke ya Kalebu, Kalebu amuvyarako Sheberi na Tiruhana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Kandi bavyarana na Shafi se wa Madumana, na Sheva se wa Makubena, bo na se wa Gibeya; kand’ umukobga wa Kalebu yitwa Akisa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Abo bose ni bo bandurutse kuri Kalebu. Bene Huri imfura ya Efurata ni Shobali se wa Kiriyati‐yeyarimu," 
1Chronicles2:51 na Saluma se wa Betelehemu, na Harefu se wa Beti‐gaderi." 
1Chronicles2:52 Kandi Shobali se wa Kiriyati‐yeyarimu yar’ afise abandi bahungu, ni Harowe na Hasi‐hamenuhoti." 
1Chronicles2:53 Imiryango yandurutse kuri Kiriyati‐yeyarimu n’Abanyituri n’Abaputi n’Abashumati n’Abamishurayi; kur’ abo ni ho handurutse Abasorati n’Abanyeshitayoli. 
1Chronicles2:54 Abandurutse kuri Saluma ni Betelehemu n’Abanetofati na Atiroti‐Beti‐Yowabu na Hasi‐hamanahati n’Abasori. 
1Chronicles2:55 Imiryango y’abakarani yaba i Yabeshi, n’Abatirati n’Abashimeyati n’Abasukati. Abo ni bo Banyakeni bākomōtse kuri Hamati, ari we gishitsi c’umuryango wa Rekabu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Aba ni bo bana b’abahungu Dawidi yavyariye i Heburoni: uw’ imfura ni Amunoni, uwo yavyaye kuri Ahinowamu w’i Yezireli; uwa kabiri ni Daniyeli, uwo yavyaye kuri Abigayili w’i Karumeli;" 
1Chronicles3:2 uwa gatatu ni Abusalomu, uwo yavyaye kuri Mayaka, umukobga wa Talumayi umwami w’i Geshuri; uwa kane ni Adoniya, uwo yavyaye kuri Hagita;" 
1Chronicles3:3 uwa gatanu ni Shefatiya, uwo yavyaye kuri Abitali; uwa gatandatu ni Itureyamu, uwo yavyaye ku wundi mugore wiwe yitwa Egila." 
1Chronicles3:4 Abo ukw ari batandatu ni bo yavyariye i Heburoni; kandi yamaze ku ngoma imyaka ndwi n’amezi atandatu ar’ i Heburoni, n’iyindi mirongwitatu n’itatu ar’ i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles3:5 Aba ni bo yavyariye i Yerusalemu: Shimeya na Shobabu na Natani na Salomo, abo ukw ari bane yabavyaye kuri Batishuwa umukobga wa Amiyeli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 avyara na Ibuhari na Elishama na Elifeleti," 
1Chronicles3:7 na Noga na Nefegi na Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 na Elishama na Eliyada na Elifeleti ukw ar icenda. 
1Chronicles3:9 Abo bose bar’ abahungu ba Dawidi, udashizemw’ abo yavyaye ku ncoreke ziwe; kandi bari bafise mushiki wabo Tamari." 
1Chronicles3:10 Umuhungu wa Salomo ni Rehobowamu, uwa Rehobowamu ni Abiya, uwa Abiya ni Asa, uwa Asa ni Yehoshafati;" 
1Chronicles3:11 uwa Yehoshafati ni Yoramu, uwa Yoramu ni Ahaziya, uwa Ahaziya ni Yowasi;" 
1Chronicles3:12 uwa Yowasi ni Amaziya, uwa Amaziya ni Uziya, uwa Uziya ni Yotamu;" 
1Chronicles3:13 uwa Yotamu ni Ahazi, uwa Ahazi ni Hezekiya, uwa Hezekiya ni Manase;" 
1Chronicles3:14 uwa Manase ni Amoni, uwa Amoni ni Yosiya." 
1Chronicles3:15 Bene Yosiya, uw’imfura ni Yohanani, uwa kabiri ni Yehoyakimu, uwa gatatu ni Zedekiya, uwa kane ni Shalumu." 
1Chronicles3:16 Umuhungu wa Yehoyakimu ni Yekoniya, uwa Yekoniya ni Zedekiya." 
1Chronicles3:17 Abo Yekoniya yavyaye ar’ imbohe ni Sheyalutiyeli," 
1Chronicles3:18 na Malikiramu na Pedaya na Shenasari na Yekamiya na Hoshama na Nedabiya. 
1Chronicles3:19 Bene Pedaya ni Zerubabeli na Shimeyi; bene Zerubabeli ni Meshulamu na Hananiya, kandi bari bafise mushiki wabo Shelomiti;" 
1Chronicles3:20 kandi yari yavyaye n’abandi batanu, Hashuba na Oheli na Berekiya na Hasadiya na Yushabu‐hesedi." 
1Chronicles3:21 Mwene Hananiya ni Pelatiya, uwa Pelatiya ni Yeshaya, uwa Yeshaya ni Refaya, uwa Refaya ni Arunani, uwa Arunani ni Obadiya, uwa Obadiya ni Shekaniya;" 
1Chronicles3:22 uwa Shekaniya ni Shemaya; bene Shemaya ni Hatushi na Igali na Bariya na Neyariya na Shafati, ukw ari batandatu;" 
1Chronicles3:23 bene Neyariya ni Eliyowenayi na Hizikiya na Azurikamu, ukw ari batatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Bene Eliyowenayi ni Hodaviya na Eliyashibu na Pelaya na Akubu na Yohanani na Delaya na Anani, ukw ar indwi." 
1Chronicles4:1 Abākomōtse kuri Yuda ni Peresi na Hesironi na Karumi na Huri na Shobali. 
1Chronicles4:2 Reyaya mwene Shobali yavyaye Yahati; Yahati avyara Ahumayi na Lahadi. Iyo ni yo miryango y’Abazorati. 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba ni bo bene Etamu: Yezireli na Ishuma na Idubashi, kandi mushiki wabo yitwa Haseleliponi;" 
1Chronicles4:4 kandi Penuweli yari se wa Gedori, na Ezeri yari se wa Husha. Abo ni bo bākomōtse kuri Huri, imfura ya Efurata se wa Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuri se wa Tekowa yar’ afise abagore babiri, Hela na Nayara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Kuri Nayara avyara Ahuzamu na Heferi na Temeni na Hahashutari. Abo ni bo yavyaranye na Nayara. 
1Chronicles4:7 Kuri Hela avyara Zereti na Isuhari na Etunani. 
1Chronicles4:8 Hakosi avyara Anubu na Sobeba, kandi ni we yamutsweko n’imiryango ya ba Aharuheli mwene Harumu." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabesi yarusha icubahiro bene nyina; kandi nyina yamwise Yabesi, kuko yavuze, ati Namushikanye bingoye." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabesi atakambira Imana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Icompa ukampa umugisha, ukūngura urubibe rwanje, ukuboko kwawe kukagenda kundamira, ukandinda ivyago, singorwe! Nukw Imana imuha ivyo yasavye." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelubu murumuna wa Shuha avyara Mehiri se wa Eshitoni. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni avyara Beti‐rafa na Paseya na Tehina se wa Irunahashi. Abo ni bo bantu ba Reka. 
1Chronicles4:13 Bene Kenazi ni Otiniyeli na Seraya; bene Otiniyeli ni Hatati na Meyonotayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meyonotayi avyara Ofura; Seraya avyara Yowabu se wa Geharashimu; kandi bār’ abafundi. 
1Chronicles4:15 Bene Kalebu mwene Yefune ni Iru na Ela na Nayamu; mwene Ela ni Kenazi. 
1Chronicles4:16 Bene Yehaleleli ni Zifu na Zifa na Tiriya na Asareli. 
1Chronicles4:17 Bene Ezera ni Yeteri na Meredi na Eferi na Yaloni; kand’ aba ni bo bana Bitiya umukobga wa Farawo yavyaranye na Meredi, ari we nyene yamurongoye: avyara Miriyamu na Shamayi na Ishuba na se wa Eshitemowa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Umugore wiwe w’Umuyudakazi avyara Yeredi se wa Gedori, na Heberi se wa Soko, na Yekutiyeli se wa Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Abana ba muka Hodiya, mushiki wa Nahumu, ni se wa Keyila w’i Garumi na se wa Eshitemowa w’i Mayaka." 
1Chronicles4:19 Abana ba muka Hodiya, mushiki wa Nahumu, ni se wa Keyila w’i Garumi na se wa Eshitemowa w’i Mayaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bene Shimoni ni Amunoni na Rina na Beni‐hanani na Tiloni. Bene Ishi ni Zoheti na Beni‐zoheti. 
1Chronicles4:21 Aba ni bo bana ba Shela mwene Yuda: Eri se wa Leka, na Layada se wa Maresha, kandi ni we yakomōtsweko n’imiryango y’abajishi b’impuzu zera derere, bo mu nzu ya Ashibeya," 
1Chronicles4:22 na Yokimu n’abantu b’i Kozeba, na Yowasi na Sarafu, ari bo bātwara i Mowabu, bo na Yashubilehemu; kand’ ayo majambo n’aya kera." 
1Chronicles4:23 Abo ni bo bār’ ababumvyi, baba i Netayimu n’i Gedera; bāba ngaho ku mwami, bamukorera igikorwa." 
1Chronicles4:24 Bene Simeyoni ni Nemuweli na Yamini na Yaribu na Zera na Shauli. 
1Chronicles4:25 Umuhungu wa Shauli ni Shalumu, uwa Shalumu ni Mibusamu, uwa Mibusamu ni Mishuma;" 
1Chronicles4:26 umuhungu wa Mishuma ni Hamuweli, uwa Hamuweli ni Zakuri, uwa Zakuri ni Shimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimeyi yavyaye abahungu cumi na batandatu n’ abakobga batandatu; arikw abo bāvukana ntibāvyaye abana benshi; kand’ umuryango wabo wose ntiwagwiriye nk’uw’ Abayuda. 
1Chronicles4:28 Kandi bāba i Beri‐sheba n’i Molada n’i Hazari‐shuwali," 
1Chronicles4:29 n’i Biluha n’i Esemu n’i Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 n’i Betuweli n’i Horuma n’i Sikulagi," 
1Chronicles4:31 n’i Beti‐marukaboti n’i Hazari‐susimu n’i Beti‐biri n’i Shayarayimu. Ivyo ni vyo vyar’ ibisagara vyabo gushitsa aho Dawidi yīmiye. 
1Chronicles4:32 Utundi dusagara twabo ni Etamu na Ayini na Rimoni na Tokeni na Ashani, twose na twose ni dutanu;" 
1Chronicles4:33 bo n’imihana yabo yose yo hirya no hino y’ivyo bisagara nyene, ukarinda ushitsa i Bayali. Aho ni ho bāba, kandi bari bafise igitabo kidōndōra ba sekuruza." 
1Chronicles4:34 Aya mazina Meshobabu na Yamuleki na Yosha mwene Amaziya," 
1Chronicles4:35 na Yoweli na Yehu mwene Yoshibiya, Yoshibiya mwene Seraya, Seraya mwene Asiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 na Eliyowenayi na Yakoba na Yeshohaya na Asaya na Adiyeli na Yesimiyeli na Benaya; 
1Chronicles4:37 na Ziza mwene Shifi, Shifi mwene Aloni, Aloni mwene Yedaya, Yedaya mwene Shimuri, Shimuri mwene Semaya;" 
1Chronicles4:38 abo uko tubadōnze amazina ni bo bār’ abakuru mu miryango yabo; kand’ amazu ya ba sekuruza yagenda agwira cane. 
1Chronicles4:39 Baja ahashikirwa i Gedori, bagendana uruhande rw’umwonga ruhera i burasirazuba, baronderera imikuku yabo amaragiro." 
1Chronicles4:40 Basanga har’ ubgatsi bgiza butotahaye, kand’ igihugu cari cāgutse, gifise umutēkāno n’amahoro; kukw abābayo ubga mbere bandurutse kuri Hamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Kandi ba bandi banditswe amazina yabo baje ku ngoma ya Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, batera amahema yabo, batera n’Abameyunimu basanzeyo, barabazimiriza rwose gushitsa n’ubu, basubira mu matongo yabo, kuko hār’ amaragiro y’imikuku yabo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kandi mur’ abo ba Simeyoni, bamwe muri bo, abantu amajana atanu, baja gutera umusozi Seyiri, bari kumwe n’abagabisha babo Pelatiya na Neyariya na Refaya na Uziyeli, bene Ishi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Bageseza amasigarira y’Abamaleki bāri bārarokotse, baca babayo gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
1Chronicles5:1 Aba ni bo bākomōtse kuri Reyubeni, imfura ya Isirayeli; ariko naho yar’ imfura, ubukuru bgiwe arabgākwa, kuko yūriye uburiri bga se, akabuhumanya, ubgo bukuru buhabga bene Yosefu, umwana wa Isirayeli nyene; yamara Yosefu ntiyatangurirwako nk’uw’ imfura, iyo bādōnda amazina yabo;" 
1Chronicles5:2 ubukuru bg’imfura bgar’ ubga Yosefu koko, ariko Yuda yar’ akomeye gusumba bene se, kandi kuri we ni ho handurutse segaba." 
1Chronicles5:3 Nukw aba ni bo bana ba Reyubeni imfura ya Isirayeli: Hanoki na Palu na Hesironi na Karumi. 
1Chronicles5:4 Aba ni bo bākomōtse kuri Yoweli: umuhungu wiwe ni Shemaya, uwa Shemaya ni Gogi, uwa Gogi ni Shimeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 uwa Shimeyi ni Mika, uwa Mika ni Reyaya, uwa Reyaya ni Bayali," 
1Chronicles5:6 uwa Bayali ni Beyera; kandi Beyera, Tigulati‐pileseri umwami w’i Ashuri amujana ar’ inyagano; ni we yar’ umukuru wo mu ba Reyubeni." 
1Chronicles5:7 Kandi bene wabo, ukw amazu yabo ari, uko bagiye baharūrwa nk’uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana, umukuru wabo ni Yeyeli, agakurikirwa na Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 na Bela mwene Azazi, Azazi wa Shema, Shema wa Yoweli; abo aho bāba, bāhēra i Aroweri ukarinda ushitsa i Nebo n’i Bayali‐meyoni;" 
1Chronicles5:9 bāhēra n’ahahera i burasirazuba, ukarinda ushitsa ku bugaragwa bugarukira ku ruzi Efurate, kukw amasho yabo yagenda agwirirana mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:10 Maze ku ngoma ya Sauli batera Abahaguri, barabageseza; baraheza binjira ingo zabo mur’ ico gihugu cose ahahera i burasirazuba bg’i Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ab’ uruvyaro rwa Gadi bāri babangikanye na bo, aho bāba, bāhēra mu gihugu c’i Bashani, ukarinda ushitsa i Saleka;" 
1Chronicles5:12 Yoweli ni we yari mukuru muri bo, uwa kabiri ni Shafamu na Yanayi na Shafati aho nyene i Bashani;" 
1Chronicles5:13 n’abandi b’i wabo bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, ni bo aba: Mikayeli na Meshulamu na Sheba na Yorayi na Yakani na Ziya na Eberi, ukw ar’ indwi;" 
1Chronicles5:14 abo bāri bene Abihayili, Abihayili wa Huri, Huri wa Yarowa, Yarowa wa Gileyadi, Gileyadi wa Mikayeli, Mikayeli wa Yeshishayi, Yeshishayi wa Yahudo, Yahudo wa Buzi." 
1Chronicles5:15 Kandi Ahi mwene Abudiyeli, Abudiyeli wa Guni, ni we yari mukuru mu nzu ya ba sekuruza." 
1Chronicles5:16 Abo bāba i Gileyadi, n’i Bashani, no mu bisagara vyaho, n’ahār’ amaragiro hose i Sharoni gushitsa ah’ agarukira." 
1Chronicles5:17 Abo bose bāraharūwe, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagiye rukurikirana; bāharūwe ku ngoma ya Yotamu umwami w’i Buyuda no ku ngoma ya Yerobowamu umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Mu Bareyubeni n’Abagadi n’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase, hārimw’ abantu b’intōre, bar’ abahinga bo gutwara inkinzo n’inkota no kurasana, b’abahinga bazi kurwana; bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bine n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu, bazi kurwana." 
1Chronicles5:19 Bukeye batera Abahaguri na Yeturi na Nafisha na Nodabu; 
1Chronicles5:20 maze batakambiye Imana mur’ iyo ntambara, irabumva kuko bayizigiye, irabatabara, igabura Abahaguri n’ abāri kumwe na bo bose mu maboko yabo;" 
1Chronicles5:21 banyaga amasho yabo, ingamiya ibihumbi mirongwitanu, n’intama ibihumbi amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, n’ indogoba ibihumbi bibiri; bafata mpiri abantu ibihumbi ijana." 
1Chronicles5:22 Benshi muri bo bāguye mur’ iyo ntambara, kuko yarimw’ Imana. Baraheza basubira mu matongo yabo, gushitsa igihe bambukanywe ar’ inyagano." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ab’ igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase bāba mur’ ico gihugu, uhereye i Bashani ugashitsa i Bayali‐herumoni n’i Seniri no ku musozi Herumoni, kandi bāri benshi cane." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba ni bo bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza: Efeli na Ishi na Eliyeli na Azuriyeli na Yeremiya na Hodaviya na Yahudiyeli; bār’ abahizi ba rurangiranwa, kandi bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza." 
1Chronicles5:25 Hanyuma bacumura ku Mana ya ba sekuruza, bagenda nk’ibimaka bahurumbira ibigirwamana vy’amahanga yo mur’ ico gihugu, ayo Imana yaranduye imbere yabo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Hanyuma iyo Mana, ari yo nyene y’Abisirayeli, ibavyukiriza Puli, umwami w’i Ashuri, hanyuma ibavyukiriza Tigulati‐pileseri, umwami w’i Ashuri nyene, abambukana ar’ inyagano, abo Bareyubeni n’Abagadi n’ab’ igihimba c’umuryango wa Manase abajana i Halaha n’i Habori n’i Hara no ku ruzi Gozani, babayo na bugingo n’ubu." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bene Lewi ni Gerushoni na Kohati na Merari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Bene Kohati ni Amuramu na Isihari na Heburoni na Uziyeli. 
1Chronicles6:3 Bene Amuramu ni Aroni na Mose na Miriyamu. Bene Aroni ni Nadabu na Abihu na Eleyazari na Itamari. 
1Chronicles6:4 Eleyazari avyara Finehasi, Finehasi avyara Abishuwa;" 
1Chronicles6:5 Abishuwa avyara Buki, Buki avyara Uzi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 Uzi avyara Zerahiya, Zerahiya avyara Merayoti;" 
1Chronicles6:7 Merayoti avyara Amariya, Amariya avyara Ahitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubu avyara Sadoki, Sadoki avyara Ahimasi;" 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimasi avyara Azariya, Azariya avyara Yohanani;" 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanani avyara Azariya (uwo ni we yakora igikorwa c’ubuherezi mu ngoro Salomo yubatse i Yerusalemu). 
1Chronicles6:11 Azariya avyara Amariya, Amariya avyara Ahitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubu avyara Sadoki, Sadoki avyara Shalumu;" 
1Chronicles6:13 Shalumu avyara Hilukiya, Hilukiya avyara Azariya;" 
1Chronicles6:14 Azariya avyara Seraya, Seraya avyara Yehozadaki;" 
1Chronicles6:15 Yehozadaki yambukanywe ar’ inyagano, igihe Uhoraho yatuma Nebukadineza kujana ab’ i Buyuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu ar’ inyagano." 
1Chronicles6:16 Bene Lewi ni Gerushoni na Kohati na Merari. 
1Chronicles6:17 Aya ni yo mazina ya bene Gerushoni: Libuni na Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:18 Bene Kohati ni Amuramu na Isihari na Heburoni na Uziyeli. 
1Chronicles6:19 Bene Merari ni Mahili na Mushi. Kand’ iyi ni yo miryango y’Abalewi, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
1Chronicles6:20 Aba Gerushoni, umuhungu wiwe ni Libuni, uwa Libuni ni Yahati, uwa Yahati ni Zima," 
1Chronicles6:21 uwa Zima ni Yowa, uwa Yowa ni Ido, uwa Ido ni Zera, uwa Zera ni Yeyaterayi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Aba Kohati, umuhungu wiwe ni Aminadabu, uwa Aminadabu ni Kora, uwa Kora ni Asiri;" 
1Chronicles6:23 uwa Asiri ni Elukana, uwa Elukana ni Ebiyasafu, uwa Ebiyasafu ni Asiri;" 
1Chronicles6:24 uwa Asiri ni Tahati, uwa Tahati ni Uriyeli, uwa Uriyeli ni Uziya, uwa Uziya ni Shauli." 
1Chronicles6:25 Bene Elukana ni Amasayi na Ahimoti; 
1Chronicles6:26 uwa Ahimoti ni Elukana, uwa Elukana ni Zofayi, uwa Zofayi ni Nahati;" 
1Chronicles6:27 uwa Nahati ni Eliyabu, uwa Eliyabu ni Yerohamu, uwa Yerohamu ni Elukana." 
1Chronicles6:28 Bene Samweli, imfura yiwe ni Yoweli, uwa kabiri ni Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Aba Merari, umuhungu wiwe ni Mahili, uwa Mahili ni Libuni, uwa Libuni ni Shimeyi, uwa Shimeyi ni Uza;" 
1Chronicles6:30 uwa Uza ni Shimeya, uwa Shimeya ni Hagiya, uwa Hagiya ni Asaya." 
1Chronicles6:31 Aba ni bo Dawidi yashizeho ngo baganze ivyo kuririmba mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, isandugu y’ Uhoraho imaze kuhahabga uburuhukiro," 
1Chronicles6:32 bagashitsa igikorwa cabo co kuririmba imbere y’ihema, ari ryo hema ry’ibonaniro, gushitsa habonetse ingoro Salomo yubakiye Uhoraho i Yerusalemu; bagakora igikorwa cabo bakūranwa, nk’ukw ibihe vyabo biri." 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba ni bo bākora ico gikorwa, bo n’ abana babo: mu ba Kohati ni Hemani umuririmvyi, mwene Yoweli, Yoweli wa Samweli;" 
1Chronicles6:34 Samweli wa Elukana, Elukana wa Yerohamu, Yerohamu wa Eliyeli, Eliyeli wa Towa;" 
1Chronicles6:35 Towa wa Sufi, Sufi wa Elukana, Elukana wa Mahati, Mahati wa Amasayi;" 
1Chronicles6:36 Amasayi wa Elukana, Elukana wa Yoweli, Yoweli wa Azariya, Azariya wa Zefaniya;" 
1Chronicles6:37 Zefaniya wa Tahati, Tahati wa Asiri, Asiri wa Ebiyasafu, Ebiyasafu wa Kora;" 
1Chronicles6:38 Kora wa Isuhari, Isuhari wa Kohati, Kohati wa Lewi, Lewi wa Isirayeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Hāri na Asafu mugenzi we, yahagarara i buryo bgiwe; Asafu uwo, ni we mwene Berekiya, Berekiya wa Shimeya;" 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimeya wa Mikayeli, Mikayeli wa Bayaseya, Bayaseya wa Malukiya;" 
1Chronicles6:41 Malukiya wa Etuni, Etuni wa Zera, Zera wa Adaya;" 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaya wa Etani, Etani wa Zima, Zima wa Shimeyi;" 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimeyi wa Yahati, Yahati wa Gerushoni, Gerushoni wa Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Kand’ i bumoso bgabo hāri bagenzi babo bo mu ba Merari; Etani mwene Kishi, Kishi wa Abudi, Abudi wa Maluki;" 
1Chronicles6:45 Maluki wa Hashabiya, Hashabiya wa Amaziya, Amaziya wa Hilukiya;" 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilukiya wa Amusi, Amusi wa Bani, Bani wa Shemeri;" 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeri wa Mahili, Mahili wa Mushi, Mushi wa Merari, Merari wa Lewi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kand’ abandi bagenzi babo b’Abalewi bāri bashizweho gukora ibikorwa vyose vy’iryo hema, ari yo ngoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles6:49 Ariko Aroni n’abana biwe, ivyabo kwar’ ukwosa ibimazi ku gicaniro vyoserezwako, no kwosa imibavu ku gicaniro cayo, bagakora ibikorwa vyose vy’Ahēra cane, bagatangira Abisirayeli impongano, vyose babigenjeje nk’uko Mose umusavyi w’Imana yageze." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aba ni bo ba Aroni: umuhungu wiwe ni Eleyazari, uwa Eleyazari ni Finehasi, uwa Finehasi ni Abishuwa;" 
1Chronicles6:51 uwa Abishuwa ni Buki, uwa Buki ni Uzi, uwa Uzi ni Zerahiya;" 
1Chronicles6:52 uwa Zerahiya ni Merayoti, uwa Merayoti ni Amariya, uwa Amariya ni Ahitubu;" 
1Chronicles6:53 uwa Ahitubu ni Sadoki, uwa Sadoki ni Ahimasi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Aha ni ho bāhawe ho kuba, nk’ukw amatongo yabo ari mu ntāra zabo: mu mazu y’Abakohati, aba Aroni ni bo ubupfindo bgatanguye kwerekana;" 
1Chronicles6:55 babaha Heburoni mu ntāra y’Abayuda, n’amaragiro ahakikije;" 
1Chronicles6:56 arikw indimiro zo kur’ ico gisagara, n’ imihana ihakūkira, babiha Kalebu mwene Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Kand’ aba Aroni babaha n’ibisagara vy’ubuhungiro: i Heburoni nyene, n’i Libuna n’amaragiro yaho, n’i Yatiri, n’i Eshitemowa;" 
1Chronicles6:58 n’i Hilene, n’i Debira;" 
1Chronicles6:59 n’i Ashani, n’i Beti‐shemeshi, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye;" 
1Chronicles6:60 kandi ku bisagara vy’umuryango w’Ababenyamini batanga Geba n’i Alemeti n’i Anatoti, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye. Ibisagara vyabo vyose na vyose, guhetūra amazu yabo, vyar’ icumi na bitatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Kand’ abandi bo mu ba Kohati, ibisagara bāhawe n’ubupfindo vyar’ icumi, vyākūwe ku vy’umuryango w’ Abefurayimu no ku vy’uw’ Abadani, no ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase." 
1Chronicles6:62 Aba Gerushoni, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, bahabga ibisagara cumi na bitatu, bikūwe ku vy’ umuryango w’Abisakari no ku vy’ uw’ Abasheri no ku vy’uw’ Abanafutali no ku vy’uw’ Abamanase i Bashani." 
1Chronicles6:63 Aba Merari, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, ibisagara bāhawe n’ubupfindo vyar’ icumi na bibiri, vyākūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abareyubeni no ku vy’uw’ Abagadi no ku vy’uw’ Abazebuloni." 
1Chronicles6:64 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāhaye Abalewi ibisagara, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
1Chronicles6:65 Kandi babahesha ubupfindo ivyo bisagara vyadōnzwe amazina, bikūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abayuda no ku vy’uw’ Abasimeyoni no ku vy’uw’ Ababenyamini." 
1Chronicles6:66 Kand’ amazu amwe y’aba Kohati bari bafise ibisagara mu ntāra yabo bikūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abefurayimu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Babaha n’ibisagara vy’ubuhungiro, babaha Shekemu n’amaragiro yaho mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu nyene, bo n’i Gezeri n’amaragiro yaho," 
1Chronicles6:68 na Yokimeyamu na Beti‐horoni," 
1Chronicles6:69 na Ayaloni na Gatirimoni, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
1Chronicles6:70 Ku vy’igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase babaha Aneri n’amaragiro yaho, na Bileyamu n’amaragiro yaho, ngo bibe ivy’ amazu asigaye y’aba Kohati." 
1Chronicles6:71 Aba Gerushoni bahabga ibisagara bikūwe ku vy’igihimba c’ umuryango w’Abamanase nyene, ni vyo ibi: Golani i Bashani n’ amaragiro yaho, na Ashitaroti n’ amaragiro yaho;" 
1Chronicles6:72 ku vy’umuryango w’Abisakari babaha Kedeshi na Daberati," 
1Chronicles6:73 na Ramoti na Anemu, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye;" 
1Chronicles6:74 ku vy’umuryango w’Abasheri babaha Mashali na Abudoni," 
1Chronicles6:75 na Hukoki na Rehobu, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye;" 
1Chronicles6:76 ku vy’umuryango w’Abanafutali babaha Kedeshi i Galilaya na Hamoni na Kiriyatayimu, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
1Chronicles6:77 Aba Merari basigaye bahabga ibisagara bikūwe ku vy’umuryango w’Abazebuloni, ni vyo ibi: Rimono n’amaragiro yaho, na Tabori n’amaragiro yaho;" 
1Chronicles6:78 kandi hakurya ya Yorodani, ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, aharābana n’i Yeriko, bahabga ibisagara ku vy’ umuryango w’Abareyubeni, ni vyo ibi: Beseri ho mu bugaragwa, na Yahasi," 
1Chronicles6:79 na Kedemoti na Mefati, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye;" 
1Chronicles6:80 ku vy’umuryango w’Abagadi bahabga Ramoti i Gileyadi na Mahanayimu," 
1Chronicles6:81 na Heshiboni na Yazeri, bo n’amaragiro bigendanye." 
1Chronicles7:1 Bene Isakari ni Tola na Puwa na Yashubu na Shimuroni ukw ari bane. 
1Chronicles7:2 Abo kuri Tola ni Uzi na Refaya na Yeriyeli na Yahumayi na Ibusamu na Shemuweli, abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bandurutse kuri Tola; bār’ abahizi mu bihe vyabo; ku ngoma ya Dawidi igitigiri cabo car’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’ amajana atandatu." 
1Chronicles7:3 Mwene Uzi ni Izurahiya; bene Izurahiya ni Mikayeli na Obadiya na Yoweli na Ishiya, bose ukw ari batanu bār’ abakuru." 
1Chronicles7:4 Kandi hamwe na bo, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana, ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza yar’ ari, hār’ imice y’ingabo zizi kurwana ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bitandatu; kuko bari bafise abagore benshi n’ abana benshi b’abahungu." 
1Chronicles7:5 Abandi bagenzi babo bo mu mazu yose y’Abisakari, abantu b’abahizi, bose uko banditswe mu gitabo kibadōndōra, bār’ ibihumbi mirongumunani n’indwi." 
1Chronicles7:6 Bene Benyamini ni Bela na Bekeri na Yediyayeli, ukw ari batatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Abo kuri Bela ni Esiboni na Uzi na Uziyeli na Yerimoti na Iri, ukw ari batanu, abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, kandi bār’ abahizi; uko banditswe mu gitabo kibadōndōra bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’abantu mirongwitatu na bane." 
1Chronicles7:8 Abo kuri Bekeri ni Zemira na Yowasi na Eliyezeri na Eliyowenayi na Omuri na Yeremoti na Abiya na Anatoti na Alemeti; abo bose bandurutse kuri Bekeri. 
1Chronicles7:9 Bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, kandi bār’ abahizi; uko banditswe mu gitabo kibadōndōra, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana, bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri n’amajana abiri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Mwene Yediyayeli ni Biluhani; abo kuri Biluhani ni Yushi na Benyamini na Ehudi na Kenana na Zetani na Tarushishi na Ahishahari. 
1Chronicles7:11 Abo bose bār’ abo kuri Yediyayeli, nk’ukw abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bāri bari, ar’ abantu b’abahizi ibihumbi cumi n’indwi n’amajana abiri, bashobora kuja mu ntambara." 
1Chronicles7:12 Kandi Shupimu na Hupimu bār’ abo kuri Iri, bo na Hushimu wo kuri Aheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Bene Nafutali ni Yakiseli na Guni na Yeseri na Shalumu; abo n’abuzukuru ba Biluha. 
1Chronicles7:14 Bene Manase ni Asiriyeli, uwo yavyaranye n’incoreke yiwe y’ Umunyaramukazi, bavyarana na Makiri se wa Gileyadi;" 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri asaba umugeni kwa Hupimu na Shupimu; murumuna we yitwa Mayaka. Umuhungu wiwe wa kabiri yitwa Selofehadi; Selofehadi yavyaye abakobga basa. 
1Chronicles7:16 Mayaka muka Makiri avyara umwana w’umuhungu, amwita Pereshi; murumuna we yitwa Shereshi; abahungu biwe ni Ulamu na Rakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Mwene Ulamu ni Bedani. Abo ni bo bo kuri Gileyadi, Gileyadi mwene Makiri, Makiri wa Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Hamoleketi mushiki wa Gileyadi avyara Ishihodi na Abiyezeri na Mahula. 
1Chronicles7:19 Bene Shemida ni Ahiyani na Shekemu na Likuhi na Aniyamu. 
1Chronicles7:20 Abo kuri Efurayimu ni Shutela, uwa Shutela ni Beredi, uwa Beredi ni Tahati, uwa Tahati ni Eleyada, uwa Eleyada ni Tahati,"
