1Chronicles7:21 uwa Tahati ni Zabadi, uwa Zabadi ni Shutela. Efurayimu avyara na Ezeri na Eleyada; bicwa n’Abanyegati bāvukiye mur’ ico gihugu, kuko bāri bāramanukanywe no kunyaga inka zabo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Maze Efurayimu se amara imisi myinshi agandaye, bene nyina baza kumugarukirako." 
1Chronicles7:23 Bukeye arārana n’umugore wiwe, asama inda, avyara umwana w’ umuhungu, amwita Beriya, kuko hābaye amagorwa mu rugo rwiwe." 
1Chronicles7:24 Umukobga wiwe yitwa Sheyera; ni we yubatse Beti‐horoni ho hepfo n’aho haruguru, na Uzeni‐sheyera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Uwundi muhungu wiwe ni Refa, uwa Refa ni Reshefu, uwa Reshefu ni Tela, uwa Tela ni Tahani," 
1Chronicles7:26 uwa Tahani ni Ladani, uwa Ladani ni Amihudi, uwa Amihudi ni Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 uwa Elishama ni Nuni, uwa Nuni ni Yosuwa." 
1Chronicles7:28 Amashamvu yabo aho bāba n’i Beteli n’ibisagara bihakūkira; ah’ i burasirazuba n’i Narani, ah’ i burengerazuba bāhēra i Gezeri n’i Shekemu, ukarinda ushitsa i Aza, bo n’ibisagara bigenda bihakūkira;" 
1Chronicles7:29 ugashitsa no ku rubibe rw’Abamanase, i Beti‐sheyani n’i Tanaki n’i Megido n’i Dori, bo n’ibisagara bigenda bihakūkira. Mur’ ivyo bisagara uruvyaro rwa Yosefu mwene Isirayeli ni ho rwāba." 
1Chronicles7:30 Bene Asheri ni Imuna, na Ishiva, na Ishivi, na Beriya, na mushiki wabo Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bene Beriya ni Heberi na Malukiyeli, ni we se wa Biruzayiti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Heberi yavyaye Yafuleti na Shomeri na Hotamu, na mushiki wabo Shuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bene Yafuleti ni Pasaki na Bimuhali na Ashuvati; abo ni bo bār’ abana ba Yafuleti. 
1Chronicles7:34 Bene Shomeri ni Ahi na Rohega na Yehuba na Aramu. 
1Chronicles7:35 Kandi bene Helemu murumuna we ni Sofa na Imuna na Sheleshi na Amali. 
1Chronicles7:36 Bene Sofa ni Suwa na Haruneferi na Shuwali na Beri na Imura; 
1Chronicles7:37 na Beseri na Hodi na Shama na Shilusha na Iturani na Beyera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Bene Yeteri ni Yefune na Pisipa na Ara. 
1Chronicles7:39 Bene Ula ni Ara na Haniyeli na Risiya. 
1Chronicles7:40 Abo bose n’abo kuri Asheri, abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, abantu b’intorwa kandi b’abahizi, aba mbere mu baganwa. Kand’ igitigiri cabo uko canditswe mu gitabo kibadōndōra, bandikiwe kurwana intambara, bar’ ingabo ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitandatu." 
1Chronicles8:1 Benyamini yavyaye Bela, ni we mfura yiwe, uwa kabiri ni Ashubeli, uwa gatatu ni Ahara;" 
1Chronicles8:2 uwa kane ni Noha, uwa gatanu ni Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Abahungu ba Bela ni Adari na Gera na Abihudi," 
1Chronicles8:4 na Abishuwa na Namani na Ahowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 na Gera na Shefufani na Huramu. 
1Chronicles8:6 Aba ni bo bene Ehudi: bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza mu baba i Geba; babajana ar’ inyagano i Manahati; 
1Chronicles8:7 ni bo aba: Namani na Ahiya; kandi Gera ni we yabajanye ar’ inyagano, ni we se wa Uza na Ahihudi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharayimu avyarira abana mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, amaze kwirukana abagore biwe Hushimu na Bayara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Avyarana na Hodeshi umugore wiwe Yobabu na Sibiya na Mesha na Malukamu," 
1Chronicles8:10 na Yusi na Shakiya na Miruma. Abo ni bo bār’ abahungu biwe, kandi bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza." 
1Chronicles8:11 Kand’ abo yavyaye kuri Hushimu ni Abitubu na Elipali. 
1Chronicles8:12 Bene Elipali ni Eberi na Mishamu na Shemedi; Shemedi uwo ni we yubatse Ono na Lodi bo n’ibisagara bihakūkira; 
1Chronicles8:13 Elipali avyara na Beriya na Shema; ni bo bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza mu bāba i Ayaloni, birukanye abāba i Gati," 
1Chronicles8:14 arongera avyara na Ahiyo na Shashaki na Yeremoti. 
1Chronicles8:15 Kandi Zebadiya na Aradi na Ederi," 
1Chronicles8:16 na Mikayeli na Ishipa na Yoha ni bo bene Beriya. 
1Chronicles8:17 Kandi Zebadiya na Meshulamu na Hizuki na Heberi," 
1Chronicles8:18 na Ishimerayi na Izuliya na Yobabu ni bo bene Elipali. 
1Chronicles8:19 Kandi Yakimu na Zikuri na Zabudi," 
1Chronicles8:20 na Eliyenayi na Siletayi na Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 na Adaya na Beraya na Shimurati ni bene Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles8:22 Kandi Ishupani na Eberi na Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 na Abudoni na Zikuri na Hanani," 
1Chronicles8:24 na Hananiya na Elamu na Anitotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 na Ifudeya na Penuweli, ni bo bene Shashaki." 
1Chronicles8:26 Kandi Shamusherayi na Shehariya na Ataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 na Yareshiya na Eliya na Zikuri ni bo bene Yerohamu. 
1Chronicles8:28 Abo ni bo bagiye baba abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana, kandi bāba i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles8:29 Yeyeli se wa Gibeyoni yaba i Gibeyoni nyene; umugore wiwe yitwa Mayaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Imfura yiwe ni Abudoni, agakurikirwa na Suri na Kishi na Bayali na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles8:31 na Gedori na Ahiyo na Zekeri," 
1Chronicles8:32 na Mikuloti ari we se wa Shimeya. Abo na bo bābāna n’abo b’i wabo i Yerusalemu nyene, babangikanye." 
1Chronicles8:33 Kandi Neri avyara Kishi, Kishi avyara Sauli, Sauli avyara Yonatani na Malikishuwa na Abinadabu na Eshibayali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Umuhungu wa Yonatani ni Meribu‐bayali, Meribu‐bayali avyara Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Bene Mika ni Pitoni na Meleki na Tareya na Ahazi. 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi avyara Yehowada; Yehowada avyara Alemeti na Azimaveti na Zimuri; Zimuri avyara Moza. 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza avyara Bineya se wa Rafa; mwene Rafa ni Eleyasa, mwene Eleyasa ni Asela." 
1Chronicles8:38 Kandi Asela yar’ afise abahungu batandatu, amazina yabo n’aya: Azirikamu na Bokeru na Ishimayeli na Sheyariya na Obadiya na Hanani. Abo bose ni bene Asela." 
1Chronicles8:39 Abana ba Esheki murumuna we n’aba: imfura yiwe ni Ulamu, uwa kabiri ni Yeyushi, uwa gatatu ni Elifeleti." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bene Ulamu bār’ abantu b’abahizi bazi kurasa; bāri bafise abahungu benshi n’abuzukuru benshi, bāshika kw ijana na mirongwitanu. Abo bose n’abandurutse kuri Benyamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Nukw Abisirayeli bose bāraharūwe, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagiye rukurikirana, kandi banditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’Abisirayeli. Kand’ Abayuda bājanywe i Babuloni ar’ inyagano, bahōwe ukugabitanya kwabo." 
1Chronicles9:2 Abābanje kugaruka bagasubira mu matongo yabo yo mu bisagara vyabo n’abanyagihugu bo mu Bisirayeli, bo n’abaherezi n’Abalewi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero." 
1Chronicles9:3 Abāgiye kuba i Yerusalemu ni bamwe bo mu Bayuda n’abo mu Babenyamini n’abo mu Befurayimu n’abo mu Bamanase, ni bo aba:" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utayi mwene Amihudi, Amihudi wa Omuri, Omuri wa Imuri, Imuri wa Bani, wo mu ba Peresi mwene Yuda." 
1Chronicles9:5 N’abo mu ba Shiloni, uwa mbere ni Asaya n’abahungu biwe." 
1Chronicles9:6 N’abo muri bene Zera ni Yeweli n’ab’i wabo, amajana atandatu na mirongwicenda." 
1Chronicles9:7 N’ abo mu ba Benyamini, ni Salu mwene Meshulamu, Meshulamu wa Hodaviya, Hodaviya wa Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 bo na Ibuneya mwene Yerohamu, na Ela mwene Uzi, Uzi wa Mikiri, na Meshulamu mwene Shefatiya, Shefatiya wa Ruweli, Ruweli wa Ibuniya," 
1Chronicles9:9 bo n’ab’ i wabo, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana; bose na bose bār’ amajana cenda na mirongwitanu na batandatu. Abo bose bār’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza uko yar’ ari." 
1Chronicles9:10 Kand’ abo mu baherezi ni Yedaya na Yehoyaribu na Yakini," 
1Chronicles9:11 na Azariya mwene Hilukiya, Hilukiya wa Meshulamu, Meshulamu wa Sadoki, Sadoki wa Merayoti, Merayoti wa Ahitubu, umubgiriza w’ingoro y’Imana;" 
1Chronicles9:12 bo na Adaya mwene Yerohamu, Yerohamu wa Pashuri, Pashuri wa Malikiya, bo na Mayasayi mwene Adiyeli, Adiyeli wa Yahuzera, Yahuzera wa Meshulamu, Meshulamu wa Meshilemiti, Meshilemiti wa Imeri;" 
1Chronicles9:13 bo n’abandi bagenzi babo b’abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, igihumbi n’ amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu; abahinga bazi gukora igikorwa co mu ngoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles9:14 Kand’ abo mu Balewi ni Shemaya mwene Hashubu, Hashubu wa Azurikamu, Azurikamu wa Hashabiya, wo mu ba Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 bo na Bakubakari na Hereshi na Galali na Mataniya mwene Mika, Mika wa Zikuri, Zikuri wa Asafu;" 
1Chronicles9:16 bo na Obadiya mwene Shemaya, Shemaya wa Galali, Galali wa Yedutuni, bo na Berekiya mwene Asa, Asa wa Elukana, yaba mu mihana y’ Abanetofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Abashibamyi n’aba: Shalumu na Akubu na Talumoni na Ahimani, bo na bagenzi babo; Shalumu ni we yar’ umukuru." 
1Chronicles9:18 Kera abo bāshibama ku kirimba c’i bgami gihera i burasirazuba, hanyuma bashibamira ingo z’Abalewi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalumu mwene Kore, Kore wa Ebiyasafu wo mu ba Kora, bo na bagenzi biwe bo mu nzu ya ba sekuruza, ari bo bandurutse kuri Kora nyene, ni bo bāri bajejwe igikorwa co gushibama ku rwinjiriro rwa rya hema, nk’uko ba sekuruza bāri bārajejwe ivyo gushibama ahashikirwa ku rugo rw’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi mwene Eleyazari ni we yabaganza mur’ ivyo bihe vya kera; kand’ Uhoraho yabana na we. 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwene Meshelemiya ni we yar’ umukumirizi wo ku muryango w’ ihema ry’ibonaniro. 
1Chronicles9:22 Abo bose abātoranijwe kuba abakumirizi b’ imiryango, bār’ amajana abiri n’ icumi na babiri, kandi bāri bāraharūwe mu mihana yabo, uko banditswe mu gitabo kibadōndōra. Dawidi na Samweli kamenyi ni bo bābajeje ico gikorwa cabo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Nukw abo n’abana babo ni bo bāba kur’ ico gikorwa co kuzigama imiryango y’ingoro y’Uhoraho, ari ryo hema yabamwo, bakāma bakūranwa." 
1Chronicles9:24 Abo bakumirizi bama ku mpande ukw ari zine, i burasirazuba n’i burengerazuba n’i burārūko n’i bumanuko." 
1Chronicles9:25 Kandi bagenzi babo bāri bagezwe ko bakūranwa, bakaza bavuye mu mihana yabo, kumarana na bo imisi ndwi;" 
1Chronicles9:26 arikw abakumirizi bane b’Abalewi b’abakuru bama kur’ ico gikorwa ntibakūrwe, kandi bāri bajejwe utwumba n’ububīko vyo mu ngoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles9:27 Bārāra bakikije iyo ngoro y’Imana, kukw ari bo bājejwe kuyiteramira, no kwama bayikingura uko bukeye." 
1Chronicles9:28 Kandi bamwe muri bo bāri bajejwe ibintu vy’ibikoreshwa; kuko vyāharūrwa iyo vyinjijwe n’iyo bisohowe. 
1Chronicles9:29 Abandi muri bo bāri bajejwe ibintu vy’imbombovu, n’ibikoreshwa vyose vy’ Ahēra, bo n’amafu agogōretse, na vino, n’amavuta ya elayo, n’imibavu, n’ibindi bimoga." 
1Chronicles9:30 Kandi bamwe bo mu bana b’abaherezi ni bo bāvanga ibintu bimoga, bakabitunganya." 
1Chronicles9:31 Umwe mu Balewi yitwa Matitiya, imfura ya Shalumu wo mu ba Kora, ni we yar’ ajejwe ivy’ udutsima dukarangwa." 
1Chronicles9:32 Kandi bamwe muri bagenzi babo b’aba Kohati ni bo bāri bajejwe ivy’ imitsima y’ibiterekerwa, bakāma bayīteguye ukw isabato itashe." 
1Chronicles9:33 Abo ni bo baririmvyi, bār’ abakuru mu mazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abalewi, kandi bāba mur’ utwo twumba two ku rusengero, ata kindi gikorwa bakora, kukw igikorwa cabo bāgikora ku murango no mw ijoro." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bār’ abakuru mu mazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abalewi, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana, abantu b’abashingantahe bakomeye; bāba i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyeli se wa Gibeyoni yaba i Gibeyoni nyene; umugore wiwe yitwa Mayaka. 
1Chronicles9:36 Imfura yiwe ni Abudoni, agakurikirwa na Suri na Kishi na Bayali na Neri na Nadabu," 
1Chronicles9:37 na Gedori na Ahiyo na Zekari na Mikuloti. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikuloti avyara Shimeyamu. Abo na bo bābana n’abo b’i wabo i Yerusalemu, babangikanye." 
1Chronicles9:39 Kandi Neri avyara Kishi, Kishi avyara Sauli, Sauli avyara Yonatani na Malikishuwa na Abinadabu na Eshibayali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Umuhungu wa Yonatani ni Meribu‐bayali; Meribu‐bayali avyara Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bene Mika ni Pitoni na Meliki na Tareya na Ahazi. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi avyara Yara; Yara avyara Alemeti na Azimaveti na Zimuri; Zimuri avyara Moza. 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza avyara Bineya; mwene Bineya ni Refaya, mwene Refaya ni Eleyasa, mwene Eleyasa ni Asela." 
1Chronicles9:44 Kandi Asela yar’ afise abahungu batandatu, amazina yabo n’aya: Azirikamu na Bokeru na Ishimayeli na Sheyariya na Obadiya na Hanani. Abo ni bo bene Asela." 
1Chronicles10:1 Nukw Abafilisitiya batera Abisirayeli, Abisirayeli barabahunga, bahindikirana ku musozi Gilibowa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Abafilisitiya bakinagiza Sauli n’abahungu biwe, bica Yonatani na Abinadabu na Milikishuwa abahungu biwe." 
1Chronicles10:3 Urugamba rusugereza Sauli, abanyamiheto bamushingiriza imyampi, bamurandura umutima." 
1Chronicles10:4 Maze Sauli abarira ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa, ati Sokōra inkota, uyinsogote, zirya ntakebga zoye kunshikīra, ngo zinshinyagurire. Arik’ ūmutwaje ibirwanishwa aranka, kuko yari yagize ubgoba bginshi. Sauli ni kwo gufata iyiwe nkota, ayīsukako." 
1Chronicles10:5 Uno yamutwaza ibirwanishwa abonye ko Sauli apfuye, na we yīsuka kuri rwiwe, arapfa." 
1Chronicles10:6 Uko ni ko Sauli yapfuye, n’abahungu biwe batatu, n’ab’ inzu yiwe bose, bagwa hamwe." 
1Chronicles10:7 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abisirayeli zari mu mwonga zibonye ko bahunze, kandi ko Sauli n’abahungu biwe bapfuye, bata ibisagara vyabo, barahunga; Abafilisitiya baraza, baravyinjira." 
1Chronicles10:8 Bukeye bgaho, Abafilisitiya baje gukoba imivyimba, basanga Sauli n’abahungu biwe barambaraye ku musozi Gilibowa bapfuye." 
1Chronicles10:9 Baramukoba, bajana umutwe wiwe n’ibirwanishwa vyiwe, batuma intumwa mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya iyo kiva kikagera, ngo bakwize inkuru mu bigirwamana vyabo no mu bantu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ibirwanishwa vyiwe babishira mu rusengero rw’ibigirwamana vyabo, umutwe wiwe bawumanika mu ngoro ya Dagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Maz’ ab’i Yabeshi‐gileyadi bose bumvise ivyo Abafilisitiya bagiriye Sauli vyose," 
1Chronicles10:12 abahizi bose barahaguruka, bakūrah’ umuvyimba wa Sauli bo n’iy’ abahungu biwe, bayijana i Yabeshi, bahamba amagufa yabo musi y’igiti c’ umweloni i Yabeshi nyene, baca barisonzesha kumara imisi ndwi." 
1Chronicles10:13 Uko ni ko Sauli yatanze, azize ibicumuro vyiwe yacumuye k’ Uhoraho, kukw atitondeye ijambo ryiwe, kandi kuko yaraguje umuntu azi guhamagara imizimu, ngw amusigurize," 
1Chronicles10:14 ntāsiguze Uhoraho; ni co catumye amwica, ingoma yiwe akayiha Dawidi mwene Isayi." 
1Chronicles11:1 Bukeye Abisirayeli bose bakoranira hamwe i Heburoni, baja kwa Dawidi, baramubarira, bat’ Ehe rāba, tur’ akara kamwe n’ amaraso amwe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kandi mu bihe vya kera, hamwe Sauli yar’ umwami, ni wewe wajana Abisirayeli gutabara, mugatabarukana. Kand’ Uhoraho Imana yawe yarakubgiye kw ari wewe uzoragira abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli, kandi k’uzoba segaba wabo." 
1Chronicles11:3 Uko ni kw abashingantahe bose b’Abisirayeli bāshengereye umwami i Heburoni; nuko Dawidi asezeranira na bo isezerano imbere y’ Uhoraho i Heburoni nyene; bamwimikisha amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri, iryo yavugiye muri Samweli." 
1Chronicles11:4 Maze Dawidi n’Abisirayeli bose baja gutera i Yerusalemu, ari ho i Yebusi, kand’ Abayebusi, ari bo nyene b’inyamo z’ico gihugu, ni ho bāba." 
1Chronicles11:5 Maz’ ab’i Yebusi babarira Dawidi, bati Ntuzopfa ushitse ngaha. Ariko Dawidi atsinda iboma ry’i Siyoni, ari ho hāciye hahinduka umurwa wiwe." 
1Chronicles11:6 Maze Dawidi aravuga, at’ Ūzotanga abandi kunesha Abayebusi ni we azoba umukuru n’umugabisha. Maze Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya aradūga, atanga abandi kubashikīra, aca amugira mukuru." 
1Chronicles11:7 Nuko Dawidi aba mur’ iryo boma, ni co catumye bahīta Umurwa wa Dawidi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Yubaka ico gisagara hirya no hino yawo, uhereye ku ruzitiro rw’i Milo n’impande zose; Yowabu na we asana ibice vyaco vyari bisigaye." 
1Chronicles11:9 Nuko Dawidi arushiriza kuba agahambaye, kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yari kumwe na we." 
1Chronicles11:10 Aba ni bo bāsumba abandi mu bahizi ba Dawidi, bakerekana ubuhizi bgabo kuri we, bagashigikira ingoma yiwe, bagafatanya n’Abisirayeli bose kumwimika, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri, iryo yavuze ku Bisirayeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ngaba abahizi Dawidi yar’ afise, nk’ukw igitigiri cabo kiri. Yashobeyamu Umunyahakimoni, ni we yar’ umukuru wa bamwe batatu; ni we yarāgūriye icumu abantu amajana atatu, abahindikiranya umusi umwe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Uwa kabiri kuri we muri ba bahizi batatu ni Eleyazari mwene Dodo Umwahohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Yari kumwe na Dawidi i Pasi‐damimu, igihe Abafilisitiya bakoraniyeyo babateye, barumanira ku murima wa sayiri; nukw ingabo zihunga Abafilisitiya." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ariko bo bīhagararira muri wa murima, barawurwanira, bica Abafilisitiya; nuk’ Uhoraho atanga intsinzi ikomeye, arabakiza." 
1Chronicles11:15 Umusi ur’ izina batatu bo muri bamwe mirongwitatu b’abahizi baramanuka, baja kuri ca gitandara iyo Dawidi ari, muri rya senga ry’i Adulamu; kand’ ingabo z’Abafilisitiya zari zishagaje ku mwonga Refayimu." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ico gihe Dawidi yari mw isenga, kandi hār’ insago z’Abafilisitiya i Betelehemu." 
1Chronicles11:17 Dawidi yumva akumbuye amazi yaho; aravuga, at’ Icompa nkabona uwompa ku mazi y’iriba ryo kw irembo ry’i Betelehemu, nkayanywa!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Maze bamwe batatu baca mu ngabo z’ Abafilisitiya, bavoma amazi mur’ iryo riba ryo kw irembo ry’i Betelehemu, barayazana, bayaha Dawidi; ariko yanka kuyanywa, ayavyagiza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles11:19 Aravuga, ati Mana yanje, ntibikabeho ko nokora ntyo! Ndābe nnywe amaraso y’aba bantu bahevye amagara yabo? Kuko mu kuyazana bahevye amagara yabo. Ni co catumye yanka kuyanywa. Ivyo ni vyo vyakozwe na ba bandi batatu b’abahizi." 
1Chronicles11:20 Kandi Abishayi murumuna wa Yowabu ni we yar’ umukuru wa bamwe mirongwitatu. Yarāgūriye icumu abantu amajana atatu, arabahindikiranya, aronka izina rya rurangiranwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu." 
1Chronicles11:21 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene, bituma agirwa umukuru wabo. Ariko rero ntiyashikīra ba bandi batatu ba mbere." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kandi na Benaya mwene Yehoyada, umuntu w’umuhizi w’i Kabuseli, na we yari yarakoze ivy’ ubutōre; ni we yishe bene Ariyeli w’i Mowabu; kandi yaramanutse yicira intambge mw isenga, ku musi shelegi yar’ iguye." 
1Chronicles11:23 Yishe n’Umunyegiputa, kandi yar’ umugabo muremure cane, uburebure bgiwe bgar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; uwo Munyegiputa yar’ afise icumu mu minwe, uruti rwaryo rwāngana n’umwaro ujishirwakw impuzu; ariko we amanuka iy’ ari atwaye ubuhiri gusa; amushikura iryo cumu, ararimwicisha." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ivyo ni vyo Benaya mwene Yehoyada yakoze, aronka izina rya rurangiranwa muri ba bahizi mirongwitatu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Yaravugangwa mur’ abo mirongwitatu nyene, ariko ntiyashikīra ba bandi batatu ba mbere. Maze Dawidi amugira umukuru w’abashibamyi biwe." 
1Chronicles11:26 Kand’ abahizi bo mu ngabo ziwe bar’ aba: Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu, na Eluhanani mwene Dodo w’i Betelehemu;" 
1Chronicles11:27 na Shamoti w’i Harori, na Helezi w’i Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:28 na Ira mwene Ikeshi w’i Tekowa, na Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti;" 
1Chronicles11:29 na Sibekayi w’i Hushati, na Ilayi w’i Ahohi;" 
1Chronicles11:30 na Maharayi w’i Netofati, na Heleda mwene Bayana w’i Netofati nyene;" 
1Chronicles11:31 na Itayi mwene Ribayi w’i Gibeya h’Ababenyamini, na Benaya w’i Piratoni;" 
1Chronicles11:32 na Urayi wo ku migezi y’i Gashi, na Abiyeli w’i Arubati;" 
1Chronicles11:33 na Azimaveti w’i Bahurimu, na Eliyaba w’i Shaliboni;" 
1Chronicles11:34 na bene Hashemu w’i Gizoni, na Yonatani mwene Shage w’i Harari;" 
1Chronicles11:35 na Ahiyamu mwene Sakari w’i Harari nyene, na Elifali mwene Uri;" 
1Chronicles11:36 na Heferi w’i Mekerati, na Ahiya w’i Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:37 na Hesiro w’i Karumeli, na Narayi mwene Ezubayi;" 
1Chronicles11:38 na Yoweli murumuna wa Natani, na Mibuhari mwene Hagiri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 na Seleki Umwamoni, na Naharayi w’i Beroti, ari we yatwaza Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ibirwanishwa;" 
1Chronicles11:40 na Ira w’i Ituri, na Garebu w’i Ituri nyene;" 
1Chronicles11:41 na Uriya Umuheti, na Zabadi mwene Ahulayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 na Adina mwene Shiza Umureyubeni, yar’ umukuru mu Bareyubeni, kandi yari n’abantu mirongwitatu bari kuri we;" 
1Chronicles11:43 na Hanani mwene Mayaka, na Yoshafati w’i Mituni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 na Uziya w’i Ashiterati, na Shama na Yeyeli bene Hotamu w’i Aroweri;" 
1Chronicles11:45 na Yediyayeli mwene Shimuri, na murumuna we Yoha w’i Tisi;" 
1Chronicles11:46 na Eliyeli w’i Mahavi na Yeribayi na Yoshaviya bene Elunamu, na Ituma w’Umunyamowabu;" 
1Chronicles11:47 na Eliyeli na Obedi, na Yasiyeli w’i Mezoba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Aba ni bo bagiye kubana na Dawidi i Sikulagi, igihe yar’ acinyegeje Sauli mwene Kishi, kandi bāri muri ba bahizi bāmutabara mu ntambara;" 
1Chronicles12:2 bār’ abanyamiheto, kandi mu kurasa canke mu guteresha ibuye umugozi, bāpfa ukwo bakoresheje, ar’ ukuryo cank’ ukubamfu; bār’ abo mu muryango wa Sauli bo mu Babenyamini." 
1Chronicles12:3 Umukuru yari Ahiyezeri, uwa kabiri kuri we ni Yowasi, kandi bari bene Shemaya w’i Gibeya; na Yeziyeli na Peleti, bene Asumaveti, na Bereka na Yehu w’i Anatoti;" 
1Chronicles12:4 na Ishimaya w’i Gibeyoni, w’umuhizi muri bamwe mirongwitatu, kandi yar’ umukuru muri bo; na Yeremiya na Yahaziyeli na Yohanani, na Yozabadi w’i Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 na Eluzayi na Yerimoti na Beyaliya na Shemariya, na Shefatiya w’i Harufu;" 
1Chronicles12:6 bo na Elukana na Ishiya na Azareli na Yowezeri na Yashobeyamu, bo mu ba Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 bo na Yowela na Zebadiya, bene Yerohamu w’i Gedori." 
1Chronicles12:8 Kandi no mu Bagadi, abīherereje ku ruhande rwa Dawidi, igihe yari mw isenga mu bugaragwa, bār’ abantu b’abahizi, bīze ivyo kurwana, bazi uburyo bgo gutwara inkinzo n’amacumu, bateye ubgoba nk’intambge, biruka nk’ingeregere iyo ziruka ku misozi;" 
1Chronicles12:9 ni bo aba: umukuru ni Ezeri, uwa kabiri ni Obadiya, uwa gatatu ni Eliyabu," 
1Chronicles12:10 uwa kane ni Mishumana, uwa gatanu ni Yeremiya," 
1Chronicles12:11 uwa gatandatu ni Atayi, uw’ indwi ni Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles12:12 uw’ umunani ni Yohanani, uw’ icenda ni Elizabadi," 
1Chronicles12:13 uw’ icumi ni Yeremiya, uw’ icumi na rimwe ni Makubanayi." 
1Chronicles12:14 Abo bantu b’Abagadi bār’ abagabisha b’ingabo; uwo hanyuma y’abandi muri bo yar’ ahwanye n’abantu ijana, umukuru agahwana n’abantu igihumbi." 
1Chronicles12:15 Abo ni bo bājabutse Yorodani mu kwezi kwa mbere, igihe rwari rwamaze iminyika yose; batera abāba mu biyaya vy’i burasirazuba n’i burengerazuba, babirukana bose." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bukeye abo mu Babenyamini n’abo mu Bayuda baza kuri Dawidi aho yari muri rya senga. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dawidi arasohoka, arabasanganira; arababarira, ati Namba muzanywe n’amahoro, muje kuntabara, umutima wanje uzomatana n’iyanyu; na ho namba muje kundaha, ngo mundangire abansi banje, kand’ ata kibi nakoze, Imana ya ba sogokuruza n’ibirābe, iducire urubanza." 
1Chronicles12:18 Maze Mpwemu aca aza kuri Amasayi, umukuru wa ba bandi mirongwitatu, aravuga, ati Tur’ abawe, Dawidi; turi ku ruhande rwawe, wewe mwene Isayi! Amahoro, amahoro abe kuri wewe, abe no ku bagutabara, kukw Imana yawe ari yo igutabara. Nuko Dawidi arabākīra, abagira abagabisha bo kugaba ibitero." 
1Chronicles12:19 Kandi no mu Bamanase har’ abācīkiye Dawidi, igihe yajana n’ Abafilisitiya bagiye gutera Sauli; mugabo ntiyabafasha, kukw abaganwa b’Abafilisitiya, bamaze kuja inama baciye bamurungika, bati Yohava aduta, agaherēra ku ruhande rwa shebuja Sauli, natwe ntituhokore agatwe kacu." 
1Chronicles12:20 Nukw akiri mu nzira asubira i Sikulagi, abo bantu bo mu Bamanase bāciye bamucīkira, ni bo aba: Aduna na Yozabadi na Yediyayeli na Mikayeli na Yozabadi na Elihu na Siletayi, abakuru bo mu mazu y’Abamanase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Batabara Dawidi, barwanya ca gitero c’abanyazi; bose bār’ abahizi, kandi bār’ abagabisha b’ingabo." 
1Chronicles12:22 Nuko, uko bukeye hama haza abantu kuri Dawidi bo kumurwanira, gushitsa aho bāhindutse ingabo nyinshi, zihwanye n’iz’ Imana." 
1Chronicles12:23 Iki ni co gitigiri c’imice y’ingabo zaje gushengerera Dawidi i Heburoni zitwaje ibirwanishwa, ngo zimusubize ku ngoma ya Sauli, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze." 
1Chronicles12:24 Abo mu Bayuda bitwaje inkinzo n’amacumu bār’ ibihumbi bitandatu n’amajana munani biteguye kurwana. 
1Chronicles12:25 Abo mu Basimeyoni, abantu b’abahizi b’abanyentambara, bār’ ibihumbi ndwi n’ijana." 
1Chronicles12:26 Abo mu Balewi bār’ ibihumbi bine n’amajana atandatu; 
1Chronicles12:27 na Yehoyada, umukuru w’ab’ inzu ya Aroni, azanana n’ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana ndwi;" 
1Chronicles12:28 haza na Sadoki, yar’ umusore w’umuhizi, azanana n’abagabisha mirongwibiri na babiri bo mu nzu ya sekuruza." 
1Chronicles12:29 Abo mu Babenyamini b’i wabo wa Sauli bār’ ibihumbi bitatu; kuko gushitsa ico gihe abenshi muri bo bāri bagiherereye ku nzu ya Sauli. 
1Chronicles12:30 Abo mu Befurayimu bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri n’amajana munani, abantu b’abahizi, ba rurangiranwa mu mazu ya ba sekuruza." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ab’ igihimba c’ umuryango wa Manase bār’ ibihumbi cumi n’umunani, kand’ abo bāri bavuzwe amazina ngo baje kwimika Dawidi." 
1Chronicles12:32 Abo mu Bisakari bazi ubgenge bgo kumenya ibihe, bakamenya n’ivyo Abisirayeli bakwiye gukora, bār’ abakuru amajana abiri, bāzananye n’ abandi b’i wabo bāgaba." 
1Chronicles12:33 Abo mu Bazebuloni bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitanu, bashobora kuja mu ntambara, bakamenya uburyo bgo gutondesha urugamba no kurwanisha ibirwanishwa vy’uburyo bgose, bama biteguye gutabara badafise imitima ibiri." 
1Chronicles12:34 Abo mu Banafutali bār’ abagabisha igihumbi, bari kumwe n’abitwaje inkinzo n’amacumu ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’indwi." 
1Chronicles12:35 Abo mu Badani bazi uburyo bgo gutondesha urugamba bār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri n’umunani n’amajana atandatu. 
1Chronicles12:36 Abo mu Basheri bashobora kuja mu ntambara, bakamenya uburyo bgo gutondesha urugamba, bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine." 
1Chronicles12:37 N’abo hakurya ya Yorodani, abo mu Bareyubeni no mu Bagadi no mu gihimba c’ umuryango w’Abamanase, biteguye kurwana bafise ibirwanishwa vy’uburyo bgose, bār’ ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri." 
1Chronicles12:38 Abo banyentambara bose, abantu bazi gutondesha urugamba, ni bo baje i Heburoni bahūje imitima, bazanywe no kwimika Dawidi ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli bose; mbere n’abandi Bisirayeli bose bāri bahūje imitima ngo bimike Dawidi." 
1Chronicles12:39 Nuko bamara gatatu bari ngaho nyene kwa Dawidi, barya, banywa, kuko bagenzi babo bāri babiteguriye." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kandi n’abāba hafi yaho, mber’ ugashitsa n’i Bgisakari n’i Buzebuloni n’i Bunafutali, bazanye ingemurano baziremētse indogoba n’ingamiya n’ inyumbu n’inka, ingemurano z’ amafu, n’uturobe tubumbabumbge mu nsukoni, n’imisoko y’ inzabibu zumye, na vino, n’amavuta ya elayo, n’inka n’intama vyinshi cane; kuko hār’ akanyamuneza mu Bisirayeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 Maze Dawidi aja inama n’ abagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, mbere n’umukuru wese." 
1Chronicles13:2 Dawidi abarira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, ati Ni mwumva mubishimye, kandi namba bivuye k’Uhoraho Imana yacu, dutume hose kuri bagenzi bacu basigaye mu ntāra zose z’i Bgisirayeli, no ku baherezi n’Abalewi bari mu bisagara vyabo bifise amaragiro, kugira ngo bakoranire aho turi;" 
1Chronicles13:3 duheze tuje kugarukana isandugu y’Imana aho turi; kuko tutāyibabaye ku ngoma ya Sauli. 
1Chronicles13:4 Nukw abahakoraniye bose baravyemera, kukw abantu bose bashimye iyo nama." 
1Chronicles13:5 Nuko Dawidi akoranya Abisirayeli bose, uhereye kuri Shihori, uruzi rwa Egiputa, ugashitsa ahafata i Hamati, kugira ngo baje i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu gukūray’ isandugu y’Imana." 
1Chronicles13:6 Nukw adūgana n’Abisirayeli bose, baja i Bayala, ari ho Kiriyati‐yeyarimu h’i Buyuda, kugira ngo bakūrey’ iyo sandugu y’Imana yitirirwa rya Zina, ari ryo ry’Uhoraho yama avyagiye ku bakerubi." 
1Chronicles13:7 Nuko bakūra iyo sandugu y’ Imana kwa Abinadabu, bayishize ku mukogote musha; Uza na Ahiyo bayobora inka zikwega uyo mukogote." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dawidi n’Abisirayeli bose bagenda biyereka biginagura, bar’ imbere y’Imana, baririmba, bavuza inanga n’amakembe n’udushāko tw’ingoma n’ ivyitwa matowazi n’inzumbete." 
1Chronicles13:9 Maze bashitse ku mbuga ya Kidoni, Uza atuma ukuboko ngw asame iyo sandugu, kukw inka zari zitirimutse." 
1Chronicles13:10 Maz’ uburake bg’ Uhoraho buziriringira Uza, aca amutsinda aho nyene, kuko yarāmvuye ukuboko ngw afate iyo sandugu; nukw agwa ngah’ imbere y’Imana." 
1Chronicles13:11 Bibabaza Dawidi k’Uhoraho yahwikiye Uza; aho hantu haca hitwa Peres‐uza, kugeza na bugingo n’ubu." 
1Chronicles13:12 Uwo musi Dawidi aca aterwa ubgoba n’Imana; aravuga, ati Mbega noshobora nte gutahana isandugu y’Imana?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Nuko Dawidi ntiyajana iyo sandugu i we ku murwa wiwe, arikw ayikebereza kwa Obed‐edomu w’Umunyegati." 
1Chronicles13:14 Nukw iyo sandugu y’Imana imara amezi atatu mu nzu kwa Obed‐edomu, kand’ Uhoraho aha umugisha urugo rwa Obed‐edomu n’ivyo yar’ afise vyose." 
1Chronicles14:1 Bukeye Hiramu umwami w’i Tiro atuma intumwa kuri Dawidi, arungika n’ibiti vy’ amasederi n’abubatsi n’ababāji, kugira ngo bamwubakire ingoro." 
1Chronicles14:2 Nuko Dawidi aca atahura yuk’ Uhoraho ari we yamuteretse ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli, kandi k’ubgami bgiwe bushizwe hejuru kubg’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Maze Dawidi yābīrira i Yerusalemu abandi bamikazi, yongera kuvyara abandi bana b’abahungu n’abakobga." 
1Chronicles14:4 Aya ni yo mazina y’abana yavyariye i Yerusalemu: Shamuwa na Shobabu na Natani na Salomo," 
1Chronicles14:5 na Ibuhari na Elishuwa na Elipeleti," 
1Chronicles14:6 na Noga na Nefegi na Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 na Elishama na Beliyada na Elifeleti. 
1Chronicles14:8 Maz’ Abafilisitiya bumvise ko Dawidi yimikishijwe amavuta ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli bose, Abafilisitiya bose baradūga baja kumuhīga. Dawidi avyumvise aja kubatega." 
1Chronicles14:9 Kand’ abo Bafilisitiya bari baje, basagaza ku mwonga Refayimu." 
1Chronicles14:10 Maze Dawidi asiguza Imana, ati Mbega ndūge nje gutera Abafilisitiya? Urabagabura mu maboko yanje? Uhoraho aramwishura, ati Dūga ubatere, kuko nzobagabura mu maboko yawe." 
1Chronicles14:11 Nuko baja i Bayali‐perasimu, Dawidi abanesherezayo; aravuga, at’ Imana yampaye guhomvora abansi banje nk’ukw amazi ahomvora urugomero; ni co catumye bita aho hantu Bayali‐perasimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Abafilisitiya batay’ ibigirwamana vyabo; nuko Dawidi avuga ko babiturira. 
1Chronicles14:13 Bukeye Abafilisitiya basubira gusagaza ubugira kabiri kur’ uwo mwonga nyene. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dawidi yongera gusiguza Imana; maz’ Imana iramwishura, iti Ntudūge ngo mubīsanganize, ariko mubaturuke inyuma, mubaserukire aharābana n’ibiti vyitwa imibaka." 
1Chronicles14:15 Maze ni wumva imirindi y’ingabo ihindira hejuru kur’ iyo mibaka, uce ubatera, kuko jewe Imana nzoba nkwitangiye imbere gutera izo ngabo z’Abafilisitiya." 
1Chronicles14:16 Nuko Dawidi abigenza nk’ukw Imana yamubariye; bakinagiza izo ngabo z’Abafilisitiya uhereye i Gibeyoni ugashitsa i Gezeri. 
1Chronicles14:17 Maz’ inkuru za Dawidi zikwira mu bihugu vyose; Uhoraho atuma amahanga yose amutinya. 
1Chronicles15:1 Bukeye Dawidi yiyubakira amazu ku murwa wiwe, atunganya n’ah’ isandugu y’Imana izoba, ayishingira ihema." 
1Chronicles15:2 Aravuga, ati Ntihaze hagire umuntu wundi arerura isandugu y’Imana atar’ Abalewi, kukw ari bo Uhoraho yatoranije kwama bayirerura, no kumukorera imisi yose." 
1Chronicles15:3 Nuko Dawidi akoraniriza Abisirayeli bose i Yerusalemu, kugira ngo baje kudūgana iyo sandugu y’ Uhoraho, bayishire ahantu hayo yayitunganirije." 
1Chronicles15:4 Dawidi akoranya aba Aroni n’abandi Balewi. 
1Chronicles15:5 Mu ba Kohati, Uriyeli ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bār’ ijana na mirongwibiri;" 
1Chronicles15:6 mu ba Merari, Asaya ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bār’ amajana abiri na mirongwibiri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 mu ba Gerushoni, Yoweli ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bār’ ijana na mirongwitatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 mu ba Elisafani, Shemaya ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bār’ amajana abiri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 mu ba Heburoni, Eliyeli ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bāri mirongumunani;" 
1Chronicles15:10 mu ba Uziyeli, Aminadabu ni we yar’ umukuru, bagenzi be bār’ ijana n’icumi na babiri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Maze Dawidi ahamagaza Sadoki na Abiyatari abaherezi, ahamagaza n’abo mu Balewi, Uriyeli na Asaya na Yoweli na Shemaya na Eliyeli na Aminadabu;" 
1Chronicles15:12 arababarira, ati Ni mwebge bakuru mu mazu ya ba sogokuruza b’Abalewi; nuko ni mwiyeze, mwe na bagenzi banyu, kugira ngo mubone kuja kudūgana isandugu y’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, muyishire aho nayitunganirije;" 
1Chronicles15:13 kuko bga bundi mutāyireruye, ni co catumye Uhoraho Imana yacu aduhwikira, kuko tutayigenjeje nk’uko vyashinzwe." 
1Chronicles15:14 Nukw abo baherezi n’Abalewi bariyeza, kugira ngo babone kudūgana iyo sandugu y’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Bashitseyo, Abalewi barerura iyo sandugu y’ Imana, bashira iminiho yayo ku bitugu, nk’uko Mose yageze, bivuye kw ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles15:16 Maze Dawidi abarira abakuru bo mu Balewi gutora abaririmvyi mu b’i wabo, ngo bazane ivyo kuvuza, amakembe n’inanga n’ivyitwa matowazi, babivuze baririmbana umunezero." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nukw Abalewi batora Hemani mwene Yoweli; no muri bagenzi be batora Asafu mwene Berekiya; no muri bagenzi babo b’aba Merari batora Etani mwene Kushaya; 
1Chronicles15:18 hamwe na bo batora ivyungirizi vya kabiri, Zekariya na Yaziyeli na Shemiramoti na Yehiyeli na Uni na Eliyabu na Benaya na Mayaseya na Matitiya na Elifelehu na Mikuneya, bo n’abo gushibama, Obed‐edomu na Yeyeli." 
1Chronicles15:19 Nukw abo baririmvyi, Hemani na Asafu na Etani, bavuza ivyitwa matowazi vy’imiringa;" 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekariya na Yaziyeli na Shemiramoti na Yehiyeli na Uni na Eliyabu na Mayaseya na Benaya bavugira amakembe mu kajwi karangurutse; 
1Chronicles15:21 Matitiya na Elifelehu na Mikuneya na Obed‐edomu na Yeyeli na Azaziya bavugira inanga z’ijwi ritūza, bakaba ari bo batera indirimbo." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, umukuru w’Abalewi, ni we yaganza ivyo kuririmba; ni we yaririmbisha kuko yar’ umuhinga." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiya na Elukana ni bo bār’ abashibamyi b’iyo sandugu. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebaniya na Yoshafati na Netaneli na Amasayi na Zekariya na Benaya na Eliyezeri abaherezi ni bo bāgenda bavuza inzumbete imbere y’iyo sandugu y’Imana; Obed‐edomu na Yehiya na bo bār’ abashibamyi b’iyo sandugu nyene. 
1Chronicles15:25 Nuko Dawidi n’abakuru b’ Abisirayeli n’abagabisha bagaba ibihumbi baja kudūgana iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bayikūra kwa Obed‐edomu banezerewe." 
1Chronicles15:26 Maze babonye kw Imana ifashije Abalewi bareruye iyo sandugu y’isezerano ryayo, ari we Uhoraho, batanga amamasa ndwi n’amasuguru y’intama ndwi kw ibimazi." 
1Chronicles15:27 Dawidi yari yambaye umwambaro wera derere; kand’ Abalewi bose bāri bareruye iyo sandugu, n’abaririmvyi, na Kenaniya yaganza ivyo kuririmba, na bo bari bambaye bartyo. Kandi Dawidi yari yambaye efodi yera derere." 
1Chronicles15:28 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bose bādūganye isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho basēsereza impundu, bavuza inzamba n’inzumbete n’ivyitwa matowazi, bavuza cane n’amakembe n’inanga." 
1Chronicles15:29 Maz’ iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho igitamaje ku murwa wa Dawidi, Mikali umukobga wa Sauli arungurukira mw idirisha, abona umwami Dawidi yiyereka yiginagura; amugayira mu mutima." 
1Chronicles16:1 Nuko binjiza iyo sandugu y’Imana, bayishira hagati mw ihema Dawidi yari yarayishingiye. Baraheza batangira imbere y’Imana ibimazi vyoswa n’ivy’ ishimwe." 
1Chronicles16:2 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwosa ikimazi, no gutanga ibimazi vy’ishimwe, ahezagira abantu mw izina ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles16:3 Maz’ agaburira abantu bose b’ Abisirayeli, abagabo n’abagore, umwe‐umwe amuha umutsima n’ inkekera y’inyama n’akarobe kabumbabumbge mu nzabibu zumye." 
1Chronicles16:4 Kand’ ashiraho bamwe mu Balewi ngo bashitse igikorwa cabo imbere y’isandugu y’Uhoraho, bibutse abantu ivy’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, bamukengurukire, bamutazire." 
1Chronicles16:5 Abo yashizeho n’ aba: Asafu ni we yari mukuru, agakurikirwa na Zekariya na Yaziyeli na Shemiramoti na Yehiyeli na Matitiya na Eliyabu na Benaya na Obed‐edomu na Yeyeli, bafise amakembe n’inanga; kandi Asafu yar’ afise ivyo avuza vyitwa matowazi," 
1Chronicles16:6 na Benaya na Yahaziyeli abaherezi bari bafise inzumbete, bakāma babivuza imbere y’iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Imana." 
1Chronicles16:7 Kur’ uwo musi Dawidi ni ho yatanguriye gushinga ko Asafu na bagenzi be ari bo baririmba batazira Uhoraho. 
1Chronicles16:8 Ni mushime Uhoraho, mwambaze izina ryiwe; Mumenyekanishe ibikorwa vyiwe mu mahanga." 
1Chronicles16:9 Mumuririmbire, mumuririmbire ishimwe; Muvuge ibikorwa vyiwe vyose bitangaje." 
1Chronicles16:10 Mwirate izina ryiwe ryera, Imitima y’abarondera Uhoraho inezerwe." 
1Chronicles16:11 Murondere Uhoraho n’inkomezi ziwe; Murondere mu nyonga hiwe ibihe bidashira. 
1Chronicles16:12 Mwibuke ibikorwa vyiwe bitangaje yakoze; Ibitangaza vyiwe n’amateka yo mu kanwa kiwe; 
1Chronicles16:13 Yemwe ruvyaro rwa Isirayeli umushumba wiwe, Yemwe bana ba Yakobo, abo yatoranije." 
1Chronicles16:14 Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu; Amatēka yiwe ari mw isi yose. 
1Chronicles16:15 Mwibuke isezerano ryiwe imisi yose, Ijambo yashinze muryibuke uk’ urunganwe rwanyu rugenda rukurikirana gushitsa ibihe igihumbi," 
1Chronicles16:16 Ni ryo sezerano yasezeranye na Aburahamu, Indahiro yarahiye Isaka," 
1Chronicles16:17 Akayongera kuri Yakobo ayitsindagira, ngw ibe icagezwe, Kuri Isirayeli ngw ibe isezerano ry’intahava;" 
1Chronicles16:18 Akavuga, ati Ni wewe nzoha igihugu c’i Kanani, Ngo kibe ishamvu mukubitiwe amabango." 
1Chronicles16:19 Bāri bakir’ abantu b’imparūrwa, Mbere bāri bake cane, kand’ ar’ inyambukīra muri co," 
1Chronicles16:20 Bāyerēra, bava mw ihanga baja mu rindi, Bava ku mwami umwe baja mu bundi bgoko." 
1Chronicles16:21 Ntiyakundira umuntu n’umwe kw abazingirikira, Mbere yahannye abami ababahōra," 
1Chronicles16:22 Ati Ntimukore ku bo narobanuje amavuta, Ntimugire ico mugira abavugishwa nanje." 
1Chronicles16:23 Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, muririmbire Uhoraho, Mumenyekanishe agakiza kiwe uko bukeye." 
1Chronicles16:24 Mwamamaze mu mahanga ubgiza bgiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoze muvyamamaze mu moko yose." 
1Chronicles16:25 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahambaye, abereye gushimwa cane: N’uw’ igitinyiro kuruta ibigirwamana vyose." 
1Chronicles16:26 Kukw ibigirwamana vy’amahanga vyose ar’ ubusa, Arik’ Uhoraho ni we yaremye amajuru." 
1Chronicles16:27 Icubahiro n’ububasha bir’ imbere yiwe, Ubushobozi n’akanyamuneza bir’ ah’ aba." 
1Chronicles16:28 Yemwe miryango y’amahanga, mwaturire Uhoraho, Mwaturire Uhoraho ingen’ afise icubahiro n’inkomezi." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mwaturire Uhoraho ingen’ izina ryiwe ribereye icubahiro; Muze imbere yiwe muzanye ishikanwa. Musenge Uhoraho mwubashe, mushazishije ukwera." 
1Chronicles16:30 Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, muhindire agashitsi imbere yiwe: Isi na yo irashimangiye, ntishobora kunyiganyiga." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ijuru ni rinezerwe, isi n’ihimbarwe, Ni bavuge mu mahanga, bat’ Uhoraho arahangamye." 
1Chronicles16:32 Ikiyaga ni kibomborane bo n’ ibicuzuye, Indimiro n’ibizezemwo ni bivuze impundu;" 
1Chronicles16:33 Ni ho ibiti vyose vyo mw ishamba bizoririmbishwa n’ akanyamuneza imbere y’ Uhoraho, Kukw agira aze gucira abari mw isi imanza." 
1Chronicles16:34 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
1Chronicles16:35 Muvuge, mut’ Udukize, ewe Mana y’agakiza kacu, Udukoranirize hamwe, udukize amahanga, Kugira ngo dushime izina ryawe ryera, Twirate ishimwe ryawe." 
1Chronicles16:36 Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, n’ashemagizwe Nk’uko vyamye uhereye kera hose, ugashitsa ibihe bidashira. Nukw abantu bose baritabiriza, bati Amen; batazira Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles16:37 Maze kur’ iyo sandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ahisiga Asafu na bagenzi be, kugira ngo baze bame bashitsa igikorwa cabo imbere yayo na ntaryo, nk’ukw igikorwa gikwiye gukorwa uko bukeye;" 
1Chronicles16:38 ahasiga na Obed‐edomu na bagenzi be mirongwitandatu n’ umunani; ahasiga na Obed‐edomu mwene Yedutuni na Hosa ngo bayishibamire. 
1Chronicles16:39 Maze Sadoki umuherezi, n’abaherezi bagenzi be, abashira kw ihema ry’Uhoraho riri ku mpinga y’umusozi Gibeyoni," 
1Chronicles16:40 kugira ngo baze bame bosereza Uhoraho ibimazi ku gicaniro co kuvyoserezako, mu gitondo no ku mugoroba ubudasiba, nk’uko vyari vyaranditswe vyose mu vyagezwe Uhoraho yageze Abisirayeli;" 
1Chronicles16:41 kandi hamwe na bo ashiraho Hemani na Yedutuni n’abandi bātowe, bavuzwe amazina, kugira ngo bashimire Uhoraho yukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
1Chronicles16:42 Kandi Hemani na Yedutuni abo bāri n’ inzumbete n’ivyitwa matowazi vyo kuvuza, n’ibindi vyo kuvuza bijana n’indirimbo z’Imana. Kand’ ashiraho bene Yedutuni ngo barinde irembo." 
1Chronicles16:43 Maz’ abantu bose barataha, umuntu wese asubira i we; Dawidi na we asubira i we ngw ahezagire abo mu nzu yiwe." 
1Chronicles17:1 Nuko Dawidi amaze kwinjira ingoro yiwe, abarira ūvugishwa n’Imana Natani, at’ Ehe jewe mba mu nzu yubakishijwe amasederi, na yo isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho iba mw ihema gusa." 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani yishura Dawidi, ati Kora nk’uko wumva ugomba kwose, kukw Imana iri kumwe nawe." 
1Chronicles17:3 Arikw iryo joro nyene ijambo ry’Imana riza kuri Natani," 
1Chronicles17:4 riti Genda ubgire umusavyi wanje Dawidi, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uti Nta nzu uzomwubakira yo kubamwo." 
1Chronicles17:5 Ut’ Erega ntiyigeze kuba mu nzu uhereye igihe yadūganiye Abisirayeli gushitsa n’ubu, uti Yaba mw ihema akimukira mu rindi, yimuka mu rusago akaja mu rundi." 
1Chronicles17:6 Uti Mbeg’ ahantu hose yagiye agendana n’Abisirayeli bose, uti Har’ aho yigeze kubarira umucamanza w’Abisirayeli uw’ ari we wese, uwo yashizeho kuragira abantu biwe, akamubaza, ati N’iki cababujije kumwubakira inzu y’amasederi?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Nuko rero, ukw abe ari k’ubarira umusavyi wanje Dawidi, ut’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, uku ni kw agize, uti Yagukūye mu bgungere, inyuma y’intama, ng’ube segaba w’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli;" 
1Chronicles17:8 uti Kandi yagendana nawe aho waja hose, ut’ Arandura abansi bawe bose imbere yawe; uti Kand’ azoguha izina, nk’ukw abandi bahambaye bo mw isi bayafise." 
1Chronicles17:9 Uti Kand’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli azobagenera ahantu, ahababadike, bahībēre ar’ ahabo bgite, batazohimuka ukundi; uti Kand’ abantu b’ibirara ntibazosubira kubakubagura nk’ubga mbere," 
1Chronicles17:10 nko mu bihe yaha abacamanza kuganza abantu biwe b’ Abisirayeli; uti Kand’ azomara igabo abansi bawe bose. Uti Mber’ Uhoraho arakubariye yukw azokugira igisata. 
1Chronicles17:11 Uti Hanyuma imisi yawe ni yashika, ukaja kwisangira ba sogokuruza, ut’ Azokwimika umwe mu bana bawe, agusubirire mu gishingo, uti Kand’ azokomeza ingoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles17:12 Ut’ Uwo ni we azomwubakira ingoro, uti Kand’ azokomeza intebe yiwe y’ubgami gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles17:13 Ut’ Azomubera se, na we amubere umwana; ut’ Ariko ntazomukūrakw imbabazi ziwe nk’uko yazikūye ku wagutanguriye;" 
1Chronicles17:14 uti Kand’ azomuha kwama ashikamye mu ngoro yiwe no mu bgami bgiwe ibihe vyose; uti Kand’ ingoma yiwe izohora ihangamye ibihe vyose. 
1Chronicles17:15 Maz’ ayo majambo yose n’ ukwo kwerekwa kwose, Natani abidondera Dawidi." 
1Chronicles17:16 Maz’ umwami Dawidi arinjira, yicara imbere y’Uhoraho, aravuga, at’ Uhoraho Mana, mbega jewe n’inda n’indēsho, n’inzu yanje, nar’ iki, kubona wagiye unzigama gushitsa n’ubu?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Kand’ ivyo kuri wewe vyari vyoroshe, Mana; ariko non’ uvuga n’ ivy’ inzu yanje jewe umusavyi wawe, vy’igihe kirekire kir’ imbere, ukandāba nk’aho nd’umuntu w’icubahiro cinshi, Uhoraho Mana." 
1Chronicles17:18 Non’ ikindi jewe Dawidi nokubgira n’iki, ku vy’icubahiro ngiriwe? Kuk’ uranzi, jewe umusavyi wawe." 
1Chronicles17:19 Ewe Uhoraho, ivyo vyose bikomeye wabikoze kubganje jewe umusavyi wawe, nk’uko wavyigombeye mu mutima wawe, kugira ng’ umenyekanishe ivyo bikomeye vyose." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ewe Uhoraho, nta wuhwanye nawe, kandi nta yindi Mana iriho twigeze kwumva atari wewe." 
1Chronicles17:21 Har’ irindi hanga na rimwe mw isi rihwanye n’abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, abo wewe, Mana, wisidukiye ugacungura, ukabagira abawe, kugira ngo wironkere izina rya rurangiranwa, ugakora ibikomeye n’ibiteye ubgoba, ukirukana amahanga imbere y’abantu bawe, abo wacunguye ukabakūra muri Egiputa?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Kukw abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli wabagize abantu bawe wiharije ibihe vyose; kandi nawe, Uhoraho, wababereye Imana." 
1Chronicles17:23 Nuko none, Uhoraho, ijambo uvuze kuri jewe umusavyi wawe no ku nzu yanje ni rikomezwe ibihe vyose, kand’ ushitse ivyo uvuze." 
1Chronicles17:24 Maz’ izina ryawe ni rikomezwe, rishemagizwe gushitsa ibihe bidashira, baze bavuge, bat’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni yo Mana y’Abisirayeli, eka mbere ni yo Mana y’Abisirayeli; kandi n’inzu yanje, jewe umusavyi wawe Dawidi, izokwama itsindaje imbere yawe;" 
1Chronicles17:25 kuk’ umpishuriye, jewe umusavyi wawe, k’uzonyubakira inzu, ewe Mana yanje; ni co gitumye umusavyi wawe ntinyuka gusenga ntya imbere yawe." 
1Chronicles17:26 Kandi none, Uhoraho, ni wewe Mana, kand’ unsezeraniye iryo jambo ryiza, jewe umusavyi wawe." 
1Chronicles17:27 None rero, emera guha umugisha inzu y’umusavyi wawe, kugira ngw ihore ihamye imbere yawe ibihe vyose; kukw ari wewe, Uhoraho, uyihaye umugisha; nukw izokwamana umugisha ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles18:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Dawidi anesha Abafilisitiya, abamara igabo, atsinda i Gati n’ibisagara bihakūkira, arabibanyaga." 
1Chronicles18:2 Maz’ anesha i Mowabu, Abanyamowabu baca baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi, bakāma bamuzanira amarari." 
1Chronicles18:3 Bukeye Dawidi anesha n’ umwami w’i Zoba, Hadadezeri, hafi y’i Hamati, igihe Hadadezeri yaja kugandura igihugu yaganza co ku ruzi Efurate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Dawidi amunyaga imikogote y’intambara igihumbi, n’ingabo zigendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi ndwi, n’izigendesha amaguru ibihumbi mirongwibiri; maz’ amafarasi akwega imikogote ayacagagura ibitsi, arikw asigaza ayakwiranye n’imikogote ijana." 
1Chronicles18:5 Maz’ Abasiriya b’i Damasiko baje gutabara Hadadezeri umwami w’i Zoba, Dawidi abīcamw’ ingabo ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri." 
1Chronicles18:6 Araheza akwiragiza amaboma mu gihugu c’i Siriya gikūkira i Damasiko; nukw Abasiriya baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi, bakāma bamuzanira amarari. Nuk’ Uhoraho yahora aha Dawidi intsinzi aho yaja hose." 
1Chronicles18:7 Kandi Dawidi yari yaranyaze abantu ba Hadadezeri inkinzo z’izahabu bari bafise, azijana i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles18:8 Kandi Dawidi yari yarasahuye imiringa myinshi cane mu bisagara vya Hadadezeri, ic’ i Tibuhati n’ic’ i Kuni; iyo miringa ni yo Salomo yakoresheje ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga, na za nkingi, n’ibindi bintu vy’imbombovu vyakozwe mu miringa nyene." 
1Chronicles18:9 Bukeye Toyu umwami w’i Hamati yumvise ko Dawidi yanesheje ingabo zose za Hadadezeri umwami w’i Zoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 atuma umuhungu wiwe Yoramu ku mwami Dawidi kumuramutsa no kumushima, ko yarwanye na Hadadezeri akamunesha; kuko Hadadezeri yahora arwanya Toyu. Kandi Yoramu yar’ azanye ibintu vy’ amazahabu n’ivy’ amafeza n’ivy’ imiringa vy’uburyo bgose." 
1Chronicles18:11 Na vyo nyene umwami Dawidi avyegurira Uhoraho, hamwe n’amafeza n’amazahabu, ayo yagiye asahura mu mahanga yose, mu Banyedomu no mu Banyamowabu no mu Bamoni no mu Bafilisitiya no mu Bamaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Kandi Abishayi umwana wa Seruwiya atsinda Abanyedomu ibihumbi cumi n’umunani mu Kiyaya c’Umunyu. 
1Chronicles18:13 Nukw akwiragiza amaboma muri Edomu, Abanyedomu bose baca baba abatwarwa ba Dawidi. Nuk’ Uhoraho yahora aha Dawidi intsinzi aho yaja hose." 
1Chronicles18:14 Nuko Dawidi yaganza Abisirayeli bose, agacira abantu biwe bose imanza ziroranye." 
1Chronicles18:15 Kandi Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ ingabo, Yehoshafati mwene Ahiludi ni we yar’ umwanditsi w’ ivyaja biraba;" 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoki mwene Ahitubu na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari ni bo bār’ abaherezi; Shavusha ni we yar’ umukarani; 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya mwene Yehoyada ni we yagabisha Abakereti n’Abapeleti; kandi bene Dawidi bār’ abajenama bakuru b’umwami. 
1Chronicles19:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Nahashi umwami w’Abamoni aratanga; maz’ umuhungu wiwe asubira ku ngoma yiwe. 
1Chronicles19:2 Dawidi avyumvise aravuga, ati Nzogirira neza Hanuni mwene Nahashi, kuko se yangiriye neza. Nuko Dawidi arungika intumwa zo kumugarukirako kuko yabuze se. Abo bantu ba Dawidi baragenda, bashika mu gihugu c’Abamoni, baja kwa Hanuni kumugarukirako." 
1Chronicles19:3 Arikw abaganwa b’Abamoni babarira Hanuni, bati Mbeg’ ugira ngo Dawidi icamuteye kurungika abo kukugarukirako n’uko yari yubashe so? Ntuzi kw abo bantu biwe bazanywe no gukēngūza no gutata iki gihugu ngo bakigeseze?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Nuko Hanuni afata abo bantu ba Dawidi, abamwa ubganwa, akeba impuzu zabo ahereye hagati ku kibuno, araheza arabarungika." 
1Chronicles19:5 Maz’ abandi bantu baragenda babarira Dawidi ukw abo bagabo bāgiriwe. Atuma abo guhūra na bo, kukw abo bagabo bāri batēterewe cane. Umwami abatumako, uti Ni mugume i Yeriko kugeza musubiye kumera ubganwa, muheze muze mubone kugaruka." 
1Chronicles19:6 Maz’ Abamoni babonye ko bateye Dawidi akayigo, Hanuni bo n’Abamoni barungika italanto z’ ifeza igihumbi i Mesopotamiya n’i Aramu‐mayaka n’i Zoba, babaha impēra ngo babahe imikogote y’ intambara n’abagendera ku mafarasi." 
1Chronicles19:7 Nuko babaha imikogote ibihumbi mirongwitatu na bibiri, bahēra n’umwami w’i Mayaka, azana ingabo ziwe; basagaza aharābana n’i Medeba. Abamoni bava mu bisagara vyabo, barakorakorana, baza gutera." 
1Chronicles19:8 Maze Dawidi avyumvise, arekura Yowabu n’ingabo, zose z’abahizi." 
1Chronicles19:9 Nukw Abamoni barasokoroka, batonda urugamba kw irembo ry’ igisagara; abo bami bari baje, na bo baja ukwabo mu gahinga." 
1Chronicles19:10 Maze Yowabu abonye ko batonze urugamba, rumwe imbere urundi inyuma yiwe, atora bamwe bo mu ntōre zose z’Abisirayeli, abatondesha urugamba ruhangana n’Abasiriya." 
1Chronicles19:11 Izindi ngabo zose aziha murumuna we Abishayi ngw azigabishe, na zo zitonda urugamba ruhangana n’Abamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Maze Yowabu aramubarira, at’ Abasiriya ni baramuka bagomba kunnanira, uraza untabare; kandi nawe Abamoni ni baramuka bagomba kukunanira, nanje ndagutabara." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nuko shira ubgoba, turwane kigabo, turwanire ubgoko bgacu n’ibisagara vy’Imana yacu; na we Uhoraho arakora ico ashima." 
1Chronicles19:14 Nuko Yowabu n’ ingabo ziri kumwe na we begereza Abasiriya ngo barumaneko; baca bariruka baramuhunga. 
1Chronicles19:15 Maz’ Abamoni babonye Abasiriya bahunze, na bo bahunga Abishayi murumuna we, bīsuka mu gisagara. Nuko Yowabu asubira i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Bukeye Abasiriya babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abisirayeli, batuma intabaza ku bandi Basiriya bo hakurya y’uruzi Efurate, baraza, Shobaki umugabisha w’ingabo za Hadadezeri abagiye imbere." 
1Chronicles19:17 Maze Dawidi abibariwe, na we akorakoranya Abisirayeli bose, bajabuka Yorodani, abaserukirako, atonda urugamba ngw arwane na bo. Amaze kurutonda, Abasiriya barumana na we." 
1Chronicles19:18 Maz’ Abasiriya bahunga Abisirayeli; Dawidi yica mu Basiriya abagendera mu mikogote ibihumbi ndwi y’intambara, n’ingabo zigendesha amaguru ibihumbi mirongwine, yica na Shobaki umugabisha w’izo ngabo." 
1Chronicles19:19 Maz’ abantu ba Hadadezeri babonye ko baneshejwe n’Abisirayeli, bīsaba Dawidi, bemera kuganzwa na we. Nukw Abasiriya ntibemera gusubira gutabara Abamoni ukundi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Nuk’ umwaka utashe, ku gacikamvura, mu gihe abami bākunda kuja mu ntambara, Yowabu ajana ingabo, aragenda atera igihugu c’Abamoni, ashika n’i Raba, arahaziguza. Ariko Dawidi ubgiwe yisigarira i Yerusalemu. Nuko Yowabu atsinda i Raba, arahasangangura." 
1Chronicles20:2 Maze Dawidi akūra Milikomu igitsibo mu mutwe, asanga kirivye italanto y’izahabu; kandi cāri gihūnzwek’ utubuyenge tw’ igiciro kinini; nuko bacambika Dawidi mu mutwe. Maze mur’ ico gisagara akūramw’ amasahu menshi cane." 
1Chronicles20:3 Asokorora abantu bāri muri co, abashikiriza imisumeno n’ivyuma vy’ibisaganga n’amacabiti. Uko ni ko yagirira ibisagara vyose vy’Abamoni. Nuko Dawidi n’ingabo ziwe zose basubira i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Hanyuma y’ivyo haba intambara yo kurwana n’Abafilisitiya i Gezeri. Sibekayi Umuhushati yica Sipayi, umwe wo mu Barefa: baca barajongoroka." 
1Chronicles20:5 Maze hasubira kuba iyindi ntambara yo kurwana n’Abafilisitiya nyene; Eluhanani mwene Yayiri yica Lahumi murumuna wa Goliyati Umunyegati, uruti rw’icumu ryiwe rwangana n’umwaro ujishirwakw impuzu." 
1Chronicles20:6 Bukeye hongera kuba intambara i Gati, kandi hariy’ umuntu muremure w’ikigambati, intoke ziwe n’amano vyose na vyose vyari mirongwibiri na bine, kuko yar’ afise indegeya ku ntoke no ku mano; kandi na we yar’ umwe wo mu Barefa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Maz’ acokoye Abisirayeli, Yonatani mwene Shimeya, umuhungwabo wa Dawidi, aramwica." 
1Chronicles20:8 Abo bar’ abo mu Barefa b’i Gati; bicwa na Dawidi n’abantu biwe. 
1Chronicles21:1 Bukeye Satani ahagurukira Abisirayeli, asunika Dawidi ngw abaharūre." 
1Chronicles21:2 Maze Dawidi abarira Yowabu n’abagabisha b’ ingabo, ati Ni mugende muharūre Abisirayeli muhereye i Beri‐sheba mugashitsa i Dani, muheze mubingarukanire, kugira ngo mmenye igitigiri cabo." 
1Chronicles21:3 Yowabu aramwishura, at’ Uhoraho n’agwiririkanye abantu biwe, barute uko bari basanzwe bangana ibihetangabo ijana; ariko ga mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, abo bose ntibār’ abantu bawe? None n’iki kiguteye kugomba ikintu nk’ico ga mwami wanje? N’iki gitumye ukwegera Abisirayeli?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Arikw ijambo ry’umwami rinesha irya Yowabu. Nuko Yowabu aragenda, anyuragira mu Bgisirayeli hose, araheza agaruka i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles21:5 Bukeye Yowabu ashikiriza Dawidi igitigiri c’abantu bāharūye: Abisirayeli bose bazi kurwanisha inkota bār’ ibihumbi igihumbi n’ibindi bihumbi ijana; Abayuda na bo bār’ ibihumbi amajana ane na mirongwirindwi, abazi kurwanisha inkota nyene." 
1Chronicles21:6 Arikw Abalewi n’Ababenyamini ntiyabaharūyemwo, kukw ijambo ry’umwami ryari ryamutuntuje." 
1Chronicles21:7 Maz’ ico kintu gitera Imana umwikomo, ni co catumye ihana Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles21:8 Nuko Dawidi abarira Imana, ati Nācumuye cane ku vyo nakoze ivyo; ariko none, ndakwinginze, kūrah’ ibigabitanyo vyanje, jewe umusavyi wawe, kuko nakoze ivy’ ubujuju rwose." 
1Chronicles21:9 Uhoraho abarira Gadi, kamenyi wa Dawidi," 
1Chronicles21:10 ati Genda ubarire Dawidi, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ut’ Agushize imbere ibihano bitatu; uti Hitamwo kimwe muri vyo; ut’ Abe ari co aguhanisha." 
1Chronicles21:11 Nuko Gadi aja kwa Dawidi, aramubarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Hitamw’ ico ugomba;" 
1Chronicles21:12 ar’ imyaka itatu y’ inzara, cank’ amezi atatu yo kugesezwa n’abansi banyu, inkota yabo ikabashikako, cank’ imisi itatu mutewe n’inkota y’Uhoraho, ari yo kīza kizoba giteye mu gihugu, umumarayika w’Uhoraho akagenda ageseza hose mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli. None rero vuga ico nja kwishura Iyantumye." 
1Chronicles21:13 Dawidi yishura Gadi, ati Ndagowe rwose: ni mpfume nkorokera mu maboko y’Uhoraho, kukw imbabazi ziwe ari nyinshi cane; ariko noye gukorokera mu maboko y’ abantu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Nuk’ Uhoraho atērēra Abisirayeli ikīza, hapfa abagabo mu Bisirayeli ibihumbi mirongwirindwi." 
1Chronicles21:15 Imana ituma umumarayika i Yerusalemu ngw ahageseze; maz’ akigira ngw ahageseze, Uhoraho aravyitegereza, arīgarura, abuza ivyo vyago, abarira uwo mumarayika yageseza, ati Birahaye: garukana ukuboko kwawe. Kand’ uwo mumarayika w’ Uhoraho yar’ ahagaze i ruhande y’imbuga ya Orunani Umuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dawidi yunamuye amaso, abona uwo mumarayika w’Uhoraho ahagaze mu kirēre, hagati y’isi n’ijuru, asokōye inkota ayibanguriye Yerusalemu. Maze Dawidi n’abakuru, bambaye amagunira, baca barapfukama, barūnama." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dawidi abarira Imana, ati None si jewe nageze kw abantu baharūrwa? Erega ni jewe nacumuye, ni jewe nakoze nabi; arikw izi ntama zo zakoze iki? Ndakwinginze, Uhoraho Mana yanje, ukuboko kwawe abe ari jewe kurwanya, bo n’inzu ya data; ariko kwoye kurwanya abantu bawe, ngw ikīza abe ari bo gitera." 
1Chronicles21:18 Maz’ uwo mumarayika w’ Uhoraho abarira Gadi ngw abgire Dawidi, adūge yubakire Uhoraho igicaniro ku mbuga ya Orunani Umuyebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Nuko Dawidi yumvise ijambo rya Gadi, iryo yamubariye mw izina ry’Uhoraho, aradūga." 
1Chronicles21:20 Orunani akebutse, abona uwo mumarayika; abahungu biwe ukw ari bane baca barinyegeza. Kandi Orunani yarikw arahūra ingano." 
1Chronicles21:21 Nuko Dawidi aja kwa Orunani; Orunani agize ngw ararāba, abona Dawidi; ava ku mbuga, arenga irembo, akubita inkoro hasi imbere yiwe, aramwunamira." 
1Chronicles21:22 Maze Dawidi abarira Orunani, ati Mpa aha hantu har’ ikibuga, ndahubakire Uhoraho igicaniro; tuhagure igiciro kihamaze, kugira ngw ikīza kive mu bantu." 
1Chronicles21:23 Orunani yishura Dawidi, ati N’uhatware mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, uhagire uk’ ugomba; rāba nguhaye n’ inka kw ibimazi vyo kwosa, n’ibisekuzo zikoresha mubigire inkwi, n’ingano kw ishikanwa ry’amafu; vyose ndabitanze." 
1Chronicles21:24 Umwami Dawidi yishura Orunani, ati Na mba: turabigura, nguhe igiciro bimaze cose; singomba gutwara ivyawe ngw abe ari vyo nshikanira Uhoraho, canke ngo ndamwosereze ibimazi ata co binkeheje." 
1Chronicles21:25 Nuko Dawidi agura ico kibanza na Orunani, amugerera izahabu ku munzane irivye shekeli amajana atandatu." 
1Chronicles21:26 Maze Dawidi ahubakira Uhoraho igicaniro, ahosereza ibimazi, atanga n’ ibimazi vy’ishimwe, yambaza Uhoraho; Uhoraho amwishurisha kurekura umuriro, utibukira kur’ ico gicaniro yosherejekw ibimazi." 
1Chronicles21:27 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira uwo mumarayika, asubiza inkota yiwe mu rwubati." 
1Chronicles21:28 Kuva ico gihe Dawidi ashikanira ibimazi kur’ iyo mbuga ya Orunani Umuyebusi, kuko yabonye k’Uhoraho ari ho yamwishuriye." 
1Chronicles21:29 Kukw ihema ry’Uhoraho Mose yakoreye mu bugaragwa, n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi, vyari ku mpinga y’umusozi Gibeyoni." 
1Chronicles21:30 Ariko Dawidi ntiyubahuka kuja imbere y’ico gicaniro ngw asiguze Imana, kuko yatinya inkota y’umumarayika w’ Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles22:1 Maze Dawidi aravuga, at’ Aha ni ho nzu y’Uhoraho Imana, kand’ iki ni co gicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi vy’Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles22:2 Nuko Dawidi avuga ko bakoranya abāvuye mu mahanga bari mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli, abagira ababāji bo kubāza amabuye yo kwubaka inzu y’Imana." 
1Chronicles22:3 Kandi Dawidi yitegura ivyuma vyinshi vyo gucuramw’ imisumari y’inzugi zo ku marembo, n’ivyo gucuramw’ ivyuma vyo kurumanya ibintu, n’imiringa y’isinzi itogerwa;" 
1Chronicles22:4 n’ibiti vy’amasederi bitoharūrika, kukw Abasidoni n’Abanyetiro bāzana amasederi menshi kwa Dawidi." 
1Chronicles22:5 Dawidi aravuga, at’ Umwana wanje Salomo aracari muto, ntarakura, kand’ ingoro igiye kwubakirwa Uhoraho ikwiye kuba nziza y’agahore, ikavugangwa ikaba rurangiranwa mu bihugu vyose: ni co gituma nkwiye kwitegura ivyayo. Nuko Dawidi yitegura vyinshi cane ataratanga." 
1Chronicles22:6 Maz’ ahamagara umuhungu wiwe Salomo, amubarira kuzokwubakira ingoro Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles22:7 Aramubarira, ati Mwana wanje, nari mbisanganywe mu mutima kuzokwubakira ingoro izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yanje." 
1Chronicles22:8 Arikw ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako, riti Wavishije amaraso menshi, kandi warwanye intambara zihambaye: riti None ntuzokwubakira ingoro izina ryanje, kuko wavishije amaraso menshi kw isi imbere yanje." 
1Chronicles22:9 Riti Rāba uzovyara umwana w’umuhungu, azoba umunyamahoro, riti Kandi nzomuha kuba impore hagati y’abansi biwe bose bamukikije; kukw izina ryiwe azokwitwa Salomo; riti Kandi nzoha Ubgisirayeli amahoro n’umutēkāno ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles22:10 Riti Ni we azokwubakira izina ryanje ingoro; riti Kand’ azoba umwana wanje, nanje nzoba se; riti Kandi nzohamangira intebe yiwe mu Bgisirayeli ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles22:11 None rero mwana wanje, Uhoraho abane nawe; aguhe kugira ikiganza ciza, wubake ingoro y’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, nk’uko yabikuvuzeko." 
1Chronicles22:12 Uhoraho aguhe ubgenge n’ugutahura, kugira ngo ni yagushikiriza Abisirayeli uz’ ubone kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe, Uhoraho Imana yawe." 
1Chronicles22:13 Uko ni k’uzogira ubuhirwe, ni wagira umwete ukitondera amabgirizwa n’amatēka Uhoraho yashingiye Abisirayeli, akabishikiriza Mose. Nuko shikama, ushire amanga, ntutinye kandi nturanduke umutima." 
1Chronicles22:14 Rāba mu bucumukure bganje niteguriye ingoro y’Uhoraho italanto z’izahabu ibihumbi ijana, n’iz’ ifeza ibihumbi igihumbi, niteguye n’imiringa n’ ivyuma bitogerwa, kukw ar’ isinzi; kandi niteguye n’ibiti n’amabuye; nawe uze wiyongererekw ibindi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Kand’ uri n’abakozi benshi cane, ababāji b’amabuye, n’abubatsi, n’ababāji b’ibiti, n’ abahinga b’uburyo bgose bazi gukora igikorwa ic’ ari co cose." 
1Chronicles22:16 Rāba amazahabu n’amafeza n’imiringa n’ivyuma ntibigira uko vyoharūrika. None rero shirako, ukore, kand’ Uhoraho abane nawe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Dawidi abarira n’abaganwa bose b’Abisirayeli ngo baze bafashe umuhungu wiwe Salomo," 
1Chronicles22:18 ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ntiri kumwe namwe? Kandi ntabahaye impore impande zose? Kuko yagabuye ab’ inyamo z’iki gihugu mu maboko yanje, kand’ igihugu kimazwe igabo imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’ abantu biwe." 
1Chronicles22:19 None rero ni mugire umwete wo kurondeza Uhoraho Imana yanyu imitima yanyu yose n’ubugingo bganyu bgose. Muve hasi rero, mushireko mwubake urusengero rw’ Uhoraho Imana, kugira ngw isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, n’ ibintu vyejejwe vy’Imana, muze mubizane, muvyinjize mur’ iyo ngoro izoba yubakiwe izina ry’ Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles23:1 Dawidi amaze gusāza, ageze mu zabukuru, yimika umuhungu wiwe Salomo, ngw abe umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 Maze Dawidi akoranya abaganwa bose b’Abisirayeli, n’abaherezi n’Abalewi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Maze baharūra Abalewi uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwitatu no kuja hejuru, igitigiri cabo uko baharūwe umwe‐umwe bār’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu n’umunani." 
1Chronicles23:4 Aravuga, ati Kur’ abo, ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine baze bashikirizwe igikorwa co ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho; abandi ibihumbi bitandatu baze babe abashingantahe n’ abacamanza;" 
1Chronicles23:5 abandi ibihumbi bine baze babe abashibamyi; n’ abandi ibihumbi bine nyene baze babe abo gutazira Uhoraho, bavuza ibintu nakoresheje vyo kuvuzwa ngo babimutazirishe." 
1Chronicles23:6 Maze Dawidi abacamw’ ibice, akurikiye ukw abahungu ba Lewi bāri bari: aba Gerushoni n’aba Kohati n’aba Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Bene Gerushoni bāri Ladani na Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Bene Ladani, umukuru yari Yehiyeli, agakurikirwa na Zetamu na Yoweli; n’abo ukw ari batatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Bene Shimeyi bāri Shelomoti na Haziyeli na Harani, ukw ari batatu. Abo ni bo bār’ abakuru bo mu mazu ya Ladani." 
1Chronicles23:10 Bene Shimeyi bāri Yahati na Ziza na Yushi na Beriya; abo ukw ari bane bāri bene Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:11 Yahati ni we yar’ umukuru, uwa kabiri yari Ziza; ariko Yushi na Beriya ntibāgira abana benshi, ni co catumye babasokanya, bakabagira inzu imwe." 
1Chronicles23:12 Bene Kohati bāri Amuramu na Isihari na Heburoni na Uziyeli, ukw ari bane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bene Amuramu bāri Aroni na Mose; kandi Aroni yari yarobanuwe kugira ngo yezwe, abe uwera cane, bo n’abahungu biwe, gushitsa ibihe vyose, ngo bame bosereza imibavu imbere y’Uhoraho, bamusukūrire, basabire abantu umugisha mw izina ryiwe ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ariko Mose umuntu w’Imana, abahungu biwe bo bāharūrwa mu muryango wa Lewi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Bene Mose bāri Gerushomu na Eliyezeri. 
1Chronicles23:16 Mu ba Gerushomu, Shebuweli ni we yari mukuru;" 
1Chronicles23:17 muri bene Eliyezeri, Rehabiya ni we yari mukuru; mbere Eliyezeri nta bandi bahungu yagira, ariko Rehabiya yar’ afise benshi cane." 
1Chronicles23:18 Muri bene Isihari, Shelomiti ni we yari mukuru." 
1Chronicles23:19 Muri bene Heburoni, Yeriya ni we yari mukuru, uwa kabiri ni Amariya, uwa gatatu ni Yahaziyeli, uwa kane ni Yekameyamu." 
1Chronicles23:20 Muri bene Uziyeli, Mika ni we yari mukuru, uwa kabiri ni Ishiya." 
1Chronicles23:21 Bene Merari bāri Mahili na Mushi. Bene Mahili bāri Eleyazari na Kishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Eleyazari apfa adasize agahungu, atar’ abakobga gusa; basāzābo bene Kishi barabarongora." 
1Chronicles23:23 Bene Mushi bāri Mahili na Ederi na Yeremoti ukw ari batatu. 
1Chronicles23:24 Abo ni bo bākomōtse kuri Lewi, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari; bābaharūye mu mazina umwe‐umwe bakurikiye ukw ayo mazu ya ba sekuruza ari. Ni bo bāgerewe kuzokora igikorwa co ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru." 
1Chronicles23:25 Kuko Dawidi yari yavuze, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli yahaye abantu biwe impore, kandi kukw azohora aba i Yerusalemu ibihe vyose," 
1Chronicles23:26 Abalewi ntibazosubira kurinda kwikorera ihema n’ibintu vyose vy’ ibikoreshwa vyaryo. 
1Chronicles23:27 Kubg’ ijambo ry’imperuka Dawidi yasize avuze, ni co catumye Abalewi baharūrwa uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru." 
1Chronicles23:28 Igikorwa cabo kwar’ ugufasha aba Aroni mu vyo gukora mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, no mu nyubakwa no mu vyumba, no kwoza ibintu vyose vy’ivyera, n’ ikindi gikorwa ic’ ari co cose co mu ngoro y’Imana;" 
1Chronicles23:29 no gukora ivy’ imitsima y’ibiterekērwa, n’ivy’ amafu agogōretse yo gushikana kw ishikanwa ry’amafu, ar’ ishikanwa ry’udutsima tutambiwe, ar’ iry’ udukaranzwe, ar’ iry’ ifu ivangishijwe amavuta ya elayo, no kugeresha ingero, no kugeresha metero;" 
1Chronicles23:30 no kwama bahagarara mu gatondo bakengurukira Uhoraho bamutazira, no ku mugoroba n’uko," 
1Chronicles23:31 no mu gihe co gutanga ibimazi vyose vyoserezwa Uhoraho, ari ku masabato, ari mu mboneko z’ ukwezi, ari ku misi mikuru yashinzwe, nk’ukw igitigiri c’ivyo bimazi cāshinzwe, bar’ imbere y’ Uhoraho na ntaryo;" 
1Chronicles23:32 no gukora ivyo bājejwe vy’ihema ry’ibonaniro, n’ivy’ Ahēra, n’ivya bene wabo aba Aroni, ngo bashitse igikorwa co mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles24:1 Imice aba Aroni bāgizwemwo n’iyi: bene Aroni bāri Nadabu na Abihu na Eleyazari na Itamari. 
1Chronicles24:2 Ariko Nadabu na Abihu batanze se gupfa, kandi nta bana bāsize; nuko Eleyazari na Itamari ni bo bahawe igikorwa c’ ubuherezi." 
1Chronicles24:3 Dawidi afatanya na Sadoki wo mu bākomōtse kuri Eleyazari na Ahimeleki wo mu bākomōtse kuri Itamari, agabanganya aba Aroni mu mice, nk’ukw ibikorwa bahawe gukora bingana." 
1Chronicles24:4 Mu bākomōtse kuri Eleyazari amazu ya ba sekuruza yari menshi kuruta ayo mu ba Itamari, nuko babashira kubiri ben’ uku: mu ba Eleyazari abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza baba icumi na batandatu, mu ba Itamari baba umunani." 
1Chronicles24:5 Nuko babagabanganisha ubupfindo, ata gusumbanya, kuko, ari mu ba Eleyazari, ari mu ba Itamari, hāgenda habamw’ abakuru bakorera Ahēra, n’abakuru bakorera Imana." 
1Chronicles24:6 Nuko Shemaya umukarani, mwene Netaneli, Umulewi, abandikira imbere y’umwami n’abakuru, n’imbere y’umuherezi Sadoki na Ahimeleki mwene Abiyatari, n’imbere y’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’abaherezi n’ ab’ Abalewi: ubupfindo bgagenda butanisha imbu kwerekana inzu imwe‐imwe mu ba Eleyazari, n’ imwe‐imwe mu ba Itamari, birtyo birtyo." 
1Chronicles24:7 Ubupfindo bga mbere bgerekana Yehoyaribu, ubga kabiri Yedaya;" 
1Chronicles24:8 ubga gatatu Harimu, ubga kane Seyorimu;" 
1Chronicles24:9 ubga gatanu Malukiya, ubga gatandatu Miyamini;" 
1Chronicles24:10 ubg’ indwi Hakosi, ubg’ umunani Abiya;" 
1Chronicles24:11 ubg’ icenda Yeshuwa, ubg’ icumi Shekaniya;" 
1Chronicles24:12 ubg’ icumi na rimwe Eliyashibu, ubg’ icumi na kabiri Yakimu;" 
1Chronicles24:13 ubg’ icumi na gatatu Hupa, ubg’ icumi na kane Yeshebeyabu;" 
1Chronicles24:14 ubg’ icumi na gatanu Biluga, ubg’ icumi na gatandatu Imeri;" 
1Chronicles24:15 ubg’ icumi n’indwi Heziri, ubg’ icumi n’umunani Hapisesi;" 
1Chronicles24:16 ubg’ icumi n’icenda Petahiya, ubga mirongwibiri Yehezekeli;" 
1Chronicles24:17 ubga mirongwibiri na rimwe Yakini, ubga mirongwibiri na kabiri Gamuli;" 
1Chronicles24:18 ubga mirongwibiri na gatatu Delaya, ubga mirongwibiri na kane Mahaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Uko ni kw imbu zabo zākurikirana zo gukora, uko bāgenda baja mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, nk’ukw icagezwe bāhawe na Aroni sekuruza wabo cāshinze, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli yari yaramugeze." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ngaba abakuru bo mu Balewi bandi: mu ba Amuramu ni Shubayeli, mu ba Shubayeli ni Yehodeya;" 
1Chronicles24:21 ku vya Rehebiya, mu bana biwe Ishiya ni we yar’ umukuru;" 
1Chronicles24:22 mu ba Isuhari ni Shelomoti; mu ba Shelomoti ni Yahati; 
1Chronicles24:23 mu ba Heburoni, uwa mbere ni Yeriya, uwa kabiri ni Amariya, uwa gatatu ni Yahaziyeli, uwa kane ni Yekameyamu;" 
1Chronicles24:24 mu ba Uziyeli ni Mika; mu ba Mika ni Shamiri; 
1Chronicles24:25 murumuna wa Mika ni Ishiya; mu ba Ishiya ni Zekariya; 
1Chronicles24:26 bene Merari ni Mahili na Mushi; mu ba Yahaziya ni Beno; 
1Chronicles24:27 mu ba Merari, aba Yahaziya ni Beno na Shohamu na Zakuri na Iburi;" 
1Chronicles24:28 uwa Mahili yari Eleyazari, ariko nta bana b’abahungu yar’ afise;" 
1Chronicles24:29 ku vya Kishi, uwo mu bana biwe ni Yerameyeli;" 
1Chronicles24:30 bene Mushi bāri Mahili na Ederi na Yerimoti. Abo ni bo Balewi, nk’ ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
1Chronicles24:31 Abo na bo bāpfinda ubupfindo nk’ukw ab’ i wabo bo mu ba Aroni bākoze, bapfindira imbere y’umwami Dawidi n’imbere ya Sadoki na Ahimeleki n’imbere y’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’ abaherezi n’Abalewi; ukw abo mu mazu y’umukuru bāpfinda, ni kw abo mu mazu y’umutoya bāpfinda." 
1Chronicles25:1 Maze Dawidi bo n’abagabisha b’ingabo barobanurira ibikorwa bamwe bo mu ba Asafu no mu ba Hemani no mu ba Yedutuni, kugira ngo baririmbe, bavugira inanga n’amakembe n’ivyitwa matowazi; igitigiri c’abakora ico gikorwa, uko bāgenda bakūranwa, bār’ aba:" 
1Chronicles25:2 abo mu ba Asafu ni Zakuri na Yosefu na Netaniya na Asharela, abana ba Asafu nyene, kandi bāgabga na we, yaririmba uk’ umwami amubgirije." 
1Chronicles25:3 Aba Yedutuni, abahungu biwe ni Gedaliya na Seri na Yeshaya, na Shimeyi na Hashabiya na Matitiya, abo ukw ari batandatu; bāgabga na se Yedutuni nyene, yaririmba avugira inanga, akengurukira Uhoraho, amutazira." 
1Chronicles25:4 Aba Hemani, abahungu biwe ni Bukiya na Mataniya na Uziyeli, na Shebuweli na Yerimoti na Hananiya, na Hanani na Eliyata na Gidaliti, na Romamuti‐ezeri na Yoshibekasha na Maloti, na Hotiri na Mahaziyoti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Abo bose bār’ abahungu ba Hemani, kamenyi w’umwami amumenyera ivy’ Imana; kukw Imana yateye Hemani icubahiro, ikamuha abana b’abahungu cumi na bane n’abakobga batatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Abo bose bāgabga na se mu kuririmbira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, bavuza ivyitwa matowazi n’amakembe n’inanga, ngo bashitse igikorwa co mu ngoro y’ Imana; kandi Asafu na Yedutuni na Hemani, umwami ni we yagenda ababgiriza." 
1Chronicles25:7 Nukw igitigiri cabo, hamwe na bagenzi babo bāri bigishijwe kuririmbira Uhoraho, abahinga bose, bār’ amajana abiri na mirongumunani n’umunani." 
1Chronicles25:8 Maze bapfinda ubupfindo, ngo barābe ingene bagiye gukurikirana mu bikorwa, bose bapfinda kumwe, abato n’ abakuze, abigisha n’abigishwa." 
1Chronicles25:9 Ubupfindo bga mbere bgerekana Yosefu kubga Asafu, ubga kabiri bgerekana Gedaliya, we na bagenzi biwe n’abigishwa biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 ubga gatatu bgerekana Zakuri n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 ubga kane bgerekana Isuri n’ abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 ubga gatanu bgerekana Netaniya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 ubga gatandatu bgerekana Bukiya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 ubg’ indwi bgerekana Yesharela n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 ubg’ umunani bgerekana Yeshaya n’ abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 ubg’ icenda bgerekana Mataniya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 ubg’ icumi bgerekana Shimeyi n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 ubg’ icumi na rimwe bgerekana Azareli n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 ubg’ icumi na kabiri bgerekana Hashabiya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 ubg’ icumi na gatatu bgerekana Shubayeli n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 ubg’ icumi na kane bgerekana Matitiya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 ubg’ icumi na gatanu bgerekana Yeremoti n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 ubg’ icumi na gatandatu bgerekana Hananiya n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 ubg’ icumi n’indwi bgerekana Yoshibekasha n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 ubg’ icumi n’umunani bgerekana Hanani n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 ubg’ icumi n’ icenda bgerekana Maloti n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 ubga mirongwibiri bgerekana Eliyata n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 ubga mirongwibiri na rimwe bgerekana Hotiri n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 ubga mirongwibiri na kabiri bgerekana Gidaliti n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 ubga mirongwibiri na gatatu bgerekana Mahaziyoti n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 ubga mirongwibiri na kane bgerekana Romamuti‐ezeri n’abigishwa biwe na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na babiri nyene." 
1Chronicles26:1 Imbu z’abashibamyi n’izi: mu bandurutse kuri Kora hāri Meshelemiya mwene Kore, wo mu ba Asafu." 
1Chronicles26:2 Kandi Meshelemiya yar’ afise abahungu; Zekariya ni we mfura, uwa kabiri ni Yediyayeli, uwa gatatu ni Zebadiya, uwa kane ni Yatiniyeli," 
1Chronicles26:3 uwa gatanu ni Elamu, uwa gatandatu ni Yehohanani, uw’ indwi ni Elihowenayi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Obed‐edomu na we abahungu biwe bār’ aba: Shemaya ni we mfura, uwa kabiri ni Yehozabadi, uwa gatatu ni Yowa, uwa kane ni Sakari, uwa gatanu ni Netaneli," 
1Chronicles26:5 uwa gatandatu ni Amiyeli, uw’ indwi ni Isakari, uw’ umunani ni Peyuletayi; bāri benshi kukw Imana yamuhaye umugisha." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya umuhungu wiwe na we avyara abahungu, ni bo bābaye abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, kuko bār’ abantu b’abahizi." 
1Chronicles26:7 Shemaya uwo, abahungu biwe n’aba: Otuni na Refayeli na Obedi na Elizabadi; kandi bagenzi biwe Elihu na Semakiya na bo bār’ abahizi." 
1Chronicles26:8 Abo bose bār’ abo mu ba Obed‐edomu; abo bo n’abana babo na bagenzi babo bār’ abantu b’inkomezi bashobora ico gikorwa; bose na bose bāri mirongwitandatu na babiri banduruka kuri Obed‐edomu. 
1Chronicles26:9 Kandi Meshelemiya, abahungu biwe na bagenzi biwe na bo bār’ abahizi; bose na bose bār’ icumi n’umunani." 
1Chronicles26:10 Kandi Hosa wo mu ba Merari na we abahungu biwe bār’ aba: Shimuri ni we yar’ umukuru muri bo, kuko nah’ atar’ imfura, ni we se yahaye ubugabo." 
1Chronicles26:11 Uwa kabiri ni Hilukiya, uwa gatatu ni Tebaliya, uwa kane ni Zekariya; abahungu ba Hosa na bagenzi biwe, bose na bose bār’ icumi na batatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Abo bashibamyi, nk’ukw abakuru babo bangana, bāri bafise imbu zabo zo gukora ivyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, nk’uko bagenzi babo bāri bazifise." 
1Chronicles26:13 Maze bapfinda ubupfindo, ngo barābe ikirimba umuntu wese azoshibamako, bose abato n’abakuru nk’ ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ubgo ku gihera i burasirazuba bgerekana Meshelemiya. Maze bapfindira umuhungu wiwe Zekariya; yar’ umujanama w’ ubgenge; ubupfindo bgiwe bgerekana igihera i burārūko. 
1Chronicles26:15 Ubga Obed‐edomu bgerekana igihera i bumanuko, n’abahungu biwe bgerekana ko bashirwa ku bubīko." 
1Chronicles26:16 Ubga Shupimu na Hosa bgerekana igihera i burengerazuba, bo n’ikirimba citwa Shaleketi c’irango riza ridūga rijayo; kwār’ ugushibama habiri, hamwe hatumberanye n’ahandi." 
1Chronicles26:17 Mur’ abo Balewi, batandatu bāshibama ku gihera i burasirazuba, ku gihera i burārūko hāshibama bane imisi yose, no ku gihera i bumanuko bane nyene imisi yose, bo n’abo ku bubīko babiri‐babiri." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kand’ i burengerazuba, ku kirugu hāshibama bane ahahera inyuma kw irango, babiri na bo ku c’imbere mu kirugu." 
1Chronicles26:19 Izo ni zo mbu z’abo bashibamyi bo mu ba Kora no mu ba Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Abandi Balewi bagenzi babo, abājejwe ububīko bgo mu ngoro y’Imana, n’ububīko burimw’ ivyeguriwe Uhoraho, bār’ aba:" 
1Chronicles26:21 abandurutse kuri Ladani, ari bo ba Gerushoni bo kuri Ladani nyene, abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza bandurutse kur’ uyo Ladani w’Umugerushoni, bāri Yehiyeli" 
1Chronicles26:22 n’abana biwe, Zetamu na Yoweli murumuna we; ni bo bājejwe ubgo bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles26:23 Mu ba Amuramu no mu ba Isuhari no mu ba Heburoni no mu ba Uziyeli," 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuweli wo mu ba Gerushomu mwene Mose ni we yabaye umukuru w’ububiko bgose. 
1Chronicles26:25 Ab’i wabo bo kuri Eliyezeri n’aba: umuhungu wiwe ni Rehabiya, uwa Rehabiya ni Yeshaya, uwa Yeshaya ni Yoramu, uwa Yoramu ni Zikuri, uwa Zikuri ni Shelomoti." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomoti uwo, na bagenzi biwe, ni bo bājejwe ububīko bgose burimw’ ivyeguriwe Uhoraho, ivyo umwami Dawidi yātanze, bo n’abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, n’abagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, n’abagabisha b’ingabo zose." 
1Chronicles26:27 Ivyo bākūye mu masahu bāsahuye mu ntambara, babitangakw inyegu ngo bibīkirwe kuzohora bitunganya ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles26:28 Kand’ ivyo Samweli kamenyi, na Sauli mwene Kishi, na Abuneri mwene Neri, na Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya bātanzekw inyegu vyose, mbere ikintu cose umuntu yeguriye Uhoraho, cāgabga na Shelomoti na bagenzi biwe." 
1Chronicles26:29 Mu ba Isuhari, Kenaniya n’ abahungu biwe ni bo bākora ivyerekeye ku vy’igihugu, bakaba abashingantahe n’abacamanza mu Bisirayeli." 
1Chronicles26:30 Mu ba Heburoni, Hashabiya na bagenzi biwe, abantu b’abahizi igihumbi n’amajana ndwi, ni bo bāgaba Abisirayeli bo hakuno ya Yorodani i burengerazuba, ku bikorwa vyose vy’ Uhoraho no ku bikorwa vy’umwami." 
1Chronicles26:31 Kandi Yeriya ni we yar’ umukuru w’aba Heburoni iyo bava bakagera, uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwangana n’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza yangana. Mu mwaka ugira mirongwine Dawidi ari ku ngoma ni ho bābiseranguye, basanga muri bo ko har’ abantu b’abahizi i Yazeri h’i Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Kandi bagenzi biwe bār’ ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana ndwi, abantu b’ abahizi, abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza; ni bo umwami Dawidi yagize ababgiriza ku Bareyubeni n’Abagadi n’ab’ igihimba c’umuryango w’Abamanase, ngo bababgirize mu biherereye ku vy’ Imana no mu biherereye ku vy’i bgami." 
1Chronicles27:1 Ingabo z’Abisirayeli, ukw igitigiri cazo cari kiri, zāgabga n’abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza, n’abagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana; zāri zifise n’abakarani babgiririza umwami mu biherereye ku vy’imbu zabo, uko zāgenda zikūrakūranwa uk’ ukwezi gutashe, kumara amezi yose yo mu mwaka; ku rubu rumwe‐rumwe rwarikw ingabo ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:2 Yashobeyamu mwene Zabudiyeli ni we yagaba ku rubu rwa mbere rwo mu kwezi kwa mbere; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:3 Yar’ uwo mu ba Peresi, kandi ni we yari mukuru w’abagabisha bose b’ingabo bo mur’ ukwo kwezi kwa mbere." 
1Chronicles27:4 Dodayi w’Umwahohi ni we yagaba ku rubu rwo mu kwezi kwa kabiri, kandi Mikuloti yar’ umwe wo mu bagabisha bo kur’ urwo rubu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:5 Benaya mwene Yehoyada umuherezi mukuru ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo agira gatatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatatu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine.
