1Chronicles27:6 Benaya uwo yar’ umwe muri ba bahizi mirongwitatu, kandi yar’ umukuru wabo; kandi Amizabadu umuhungu wiwe, kur’ urwo rubu rwiwe na we yarimwo." 
1Chronicles27:7 Asaheli murumuna wa Yowabu ni we yar’ umugabisha agira kane wo mu kwezi kwa kane; Zebadiya umuhungu wiwe ni we yamusubiriye mu gishingo; ingabo zu ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:8 Shamuhutu Umwisurahi ni we yar’ umugabisha agira gatanu wo mu kwezi kwa gatanu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:9 Ira mwene Ikeshi Umunyatekowa ni we yar’ umugabisha agira gatandatu wo mu kwezi kwa gatandatu; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:10 Helesi Umunyapeloni, wo mu Befurayimu, ni we yar’ umugabisha agira indwi wo mu kwezi kw’indwi; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:11 Sibekayi Umuhushati wo mu ba Zerahi, ni we yar’ umugabisha agira umunani wo mu kwezi kw’umunani; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine." 
1Chronicles27:12 Abiyezeri w’i Anatoti wo mu Babenyamini ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icenda wo mu kwezi kw’icenda; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:13 Maharayi w’i Netofati wo mu ba Zerahi ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi wo mu kwezi kw’icumi; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:14 Benaya w’i Piratoni wo mu Befurayimu ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi na rimwe wo mu kwezi kw’icumi na rimwe; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine. 
1Chronicles27:15 Heludayi w’i Netofati wo mu ba Otiniyeli ni we yar’ umugabisha agira icumi na kabiri wo mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri; ingabo zo ku rubu rwiwe zār’ ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bine nyene. 
1Chronicles27:16 Kand’ abakuru b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli n’aba: mu ba Reyubeni yari Eliyezeri mwene Zikuri; mu ba Simeyoni yari Shefatiya mwene Mayaka; 
1Chronicles27:17 mu ba Lewi yari Hashabiya mwene Kemuweli; mu ba Aroni yari Sadoki; 
1Chronicles27:18 mu ba Yuda yari Elihu, umwe wo mu bavukana na Dawidi; mu ba Isakari yari Omuri mwene Mikayeli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 mu ba Zebuloni yari Ishimaya mwene Obadiya; mu ba Nafutali yari Yeremoti mwene Azuriyeli; 
1Chronicles27:20 mu ba Efurayimu yari Hosheya mwene Azaziya; mu gihimba c’umuryango wa Manase yari Yoweli mwene Pedaya; 
1Chronicles27:21 mu gihimba kindi c’umuryango wa Manase nyene, kiba i Gileyadi, yari Ido mwene Zekariya; mu ba Benyamini yari Yasiyeli mwene Abuneri;" 
1Chronicles27:22 mu ba Dani yari Azareli mwene Yerohamu. Abo ni bo bār’ abakuru b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli. 
1Chronicles27:23 Ariko Dawidi ntiyaharūra abatarashikana imyaka mirongwibiri, kuk’ Uhoraho yavuze yukw azogwiza Abisirayeli, bakangana n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru." 
1Chronicles27:24 Yowabu umwana wa Seruwiya atangura guharūra ariko ntiyarangiza; ukwo guharūrwa kwatumye Abisirayeli barakirwa, ni co catumye igitigiri cabo kitandikwa mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma y’umwami Dawidi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Azimaveti mwene Adiyeli ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ububīko bg’i bgami; Yonatani mwene Uziya ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ibigega biri mu misozi no mu bisagara no mu mihana no mu maboma; 
1Chronicles27:26 Eziri mwene Kelubu ni we yaganza abarimyi bākora mu ndimiro; 
1Chronicles27:27 Shimeyi w’i Rama ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe imirima y’imizabibu; Zabudi w’i Shifimu ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ivy’ inzabibu zamuwe zo gukānyamwo vino; 
1Chronicles27:28 Bayali‐hanani w’i Gederi ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ivy’ imyelayo n’imisukomora yo mu biyaya; Yowasi ni we yar’ umukuru yajejwe ububīko bg’amavuta ya elayo; 
1Chronicles27:29 Shiturayi w’i Sharoni ni we yar’ umutongore w’amasho yar’ i Sharoni nyene; kandi Shafati mwene Adulayi ni we yar’ umutongore w’ amasho yari mu biyaya; 
1Chronicles27:30 Obili w’Umwishimayeli ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’ingamiya; Yedeya w’i Meronoti ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’indogoba; 
1Chronicles27:31 Yazizi Umuhaguri ni we yar’ umubgiriza w’imikuku. Abo bose ni bo bāri bajejwe ivy’ itunga ry’umwami Dawidi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Yonatani se wabo wa Dawidi ni we yar’ umujanama, kandi yar’ umuntu w’umunyabgenge, yari n’umukarani; Yehiyeli mwene Hakimoni ni we yarera abana b’ umwami;" 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitofeli ni we yar’ umujanama w’umwami; Hushayi Umwaruki yar’ umukunzi w’ umwami; 
1Chronicles27:34 Yehoyada mwene Benaya na Abiyatari ni bo bāsubiye mu gishingo ca Ahitofeli; kandi Yowabu ni we yar’ umugabisha w’ingabo z’umwami. 
1Chronicles28:1 Dawidi akoranya abaganwa bose b’Abisirayeli, abaganwa b’imiryango, n’abagabisha b’ingabo zigenda zikūranwa gusasa i bgami, n’abagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, n’abakuru bāri bajejwe itunga n’amasho vyiwe n’abana biwe, n’abantu b’inkone, n’abahizi, mbere n’abantu bose b’intōre; abakoraniriza i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles28:2 Maz’ umwami Dawidi arahaguruka, aravuga, ati Ni muntege amatwi, bagenzi banje kandi bantu banje; nari mbisanganywe mu mutima kuzokwubakira isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho ingoro y’uburuhukiro, ngw iz’ ibēre Imana yacu indava y’ah’ ishira ibirenge; kandi nari niteguye kwubaka." 
1Chronicles28:3 Arikw Imana irambarira, iti Si wewe uzokwubakira izina ryanje ingoro, iti Kuk’ ur’ umunyentambara, wagiye uvisha amaraso." 
1Chronicles28:4 Ariko rer’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ni jewe yarobanuye mu bo mu nzu ya data bose, ngo mbe umwami w’ Abisirayeli ibihe vyose; kuko yatoranije Yuda, ikamugira umukuru; kandi mu muryango wa Yuda igatoranyamwo inzu ya data; kandi mu bahungu biwe ikaba ari jewe yashimye kugira umwami w’Abisirayeli mwese." 
1Chronicles28:5 None mu bahungu banje bose (kandi muzi yuk’ Uhoraho yampaye benshi), yatoranijemw’ umuhungu wanje Salomo kuba ari we azovyagira ku ntebe y’ubgami bg’ Uhoraho, akaganza Abisirayeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Yarambariye, ati Salomo umuhungu wawe ni we azonyubakira ingoro n’urugo rwanje, ati Kuko namutoranije ngw abe umwana wanje, nanje mbe Se." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ati Kandi nzokomeza ingoma yiwe gushitsa ibihe vyose, ni yagira umwete wo kwitondera ivyagezwe vyanje n’amatēka nashinze, nk’ukw ameze ubu." 
1Chronicles28:8 None rero, mbabaririye imbere y’Abisirayeli bose, ari ryo koraniro ry’Uhoraho, n’ Imana yacu iravyumva: mukwiye kwitondera ivyagezwe vyose vy’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mubishirekw imitima, kugira ngo mubone kwamana iki gihugu ciza, muze mukirage n’abana banyu bazovuka hanyuma, ngo kibabere ishamvu ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles28:9 Kandi nawe, mwana wanje Salomo, ukwiye kumenya Imana ya so, uyisabane umutima utunganye kand’ ukunze; kuk’ Uhoraho asuzuma imitima yose, akamenya imigabo yose n’ivyiyumviro vyose. Ni wamurondera uzomubona, ariko ni wamuvako, azoguheba gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
1Chronicles28:10 Nuko rero wirinde; kukw ari wewe Uhoraho yatoye kwubaka ingoro ngw imubere ahēra; nuko kovya, ukore." 
1Chronicles28:11 Maze Dawidi aha umuhungu wiwe Salomo icitegererezo c’urubaraza rw’urusengero, n’ic’ inyubako yarwo, n’ic’ ububīko bgarwo, n’ic’ ivyumba vyarwo vyo hejuru, n’ivyo muri rwo imbere, n’ic’ ikibanza ca wa mutemere wo guhongerako;" 
1Chronicles28:12 n’icitegererezo c’ivyo yiyumviriye vyose ku vy’urugo rw’intangāro n’inyubakwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, no ku vy’utwumba twose tuyikīkūje, no ku vy’ ububīko vyo kur’ iyo ngoro y’Imana, n’ububīko bg’ibintu vyeguriwe Uhoraho;" 
1Chronicles28:13 no ku vy’imbu z’abaherezi n’iz’ Abalewi, n’ibikorwa vyose uko bizokorerwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, no ku vy’ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu bizokoreshwa muri yo;" 
1Chronicles28:14 ivy’ amazahabu, amugereraniriza ukw amazahabu yo kubicurishamwo akwiye kungana, n’uko bikwiye kuzokoreshwa kwose; ivy’ amafeza na vyo, amugereraniriza ukw amafeza yo kubicurishamwo akwiye kungana, n’uko bikwiye kuzokoreshwa kwose;" 
1Chronicles28:15 kand’ amugereraniriza amazahabu yo kuzocurishamw’ ibiterekwakw amatara, bo n’amatara yavyo; igitereko cose n’amatara yaco, amugereraniriza urugero rw’ amazahabu azokoresha; no ku vy’ibitereko vy’ifeza, amugereraniriza amafeza yo kuzocurishamw’ igitereko cose n’amatara yaco, nk’ukw igikorwa c’igitereko cose kiri." 
1Chronicles28:16 Kand’ amugereraniriza urugero rw’ amazahabu yo kuzocurishamw’ ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekerwa, ukw ameza amwe‐amwe ameze; n’ amafeza yo kuzocurishamw’ ameza y’amafeza nyene;" 
1Chronicles28:17 amuha n’ icitegererezo c’ibintu vyo kwōkōza inyama, n’imibehe n’ibikombe, uko bizocurwa mw izahabu iramuye, amugereraniriza n’urugero rw’ amazahabu yo kuzocurishamw’ inzavya zose, n’urw’ amafeza yo kuzocurishamw’ inzavya z’amafeza nyene;" 
1Chronicles28:18 n’urugero rw’izahabu iramuye yo kuzokoramw’ igicaniro co kwoserezakw imibavu; amuha n’icitegererezo c’ umukogote w’izahabu, ari wo bishushanyo vy’abakerubi bashanje amababa bagatera igitūtu isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho." 
1Chronicles28:19 Dawidi aravuga, at’ Ivyo vyose nabimenyeshejwe n’ivyanditswe nahawe, bivuye mu kuboko kw’ Uhoraho, ivyo ni vyo bikwiye gukorwa nk’ukw iki citegererezo cavyo kimeze." 
1Chronicles28:20 Maze Dawidi abarira Salomo umuhungu wiwe, ati Shikama, ushire amanga, ubikore. Ntutinye, nturanduke umutima, kuk’ Uhoraho Imana, ari yo Mana yanje, azoba ari kumwe nawe; ntazoguhemukira, ntazoguta, gushitsa ah’ ibikorwa vyose bizokorwa kur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho bizorangirira." 
1Chronicles28:21 Kand’ ehe rāba, hashinzwe n’imbu z’abaherezi n’ Abalewi z’ibikorwa vyose vy’ingoro y’Imana; kand’ umuntu wese abikunze, kandi w’umuhinga wo gukora igikorwa ic’ ari co cose, azofatanya nawe mur’ ico gikorwa cose; kand’ abashingantahe n’ abantu bose bazohora biteguye kukwumvira rwose." 
1Chronicles29:1 Maz’ umwami Dawidi abarira ikoraniro ryose, at’ Umuhungu wanje Salomo, ari we nyene Imana yatoranije, aracari muto, ntarakura, na co igikorwa ari kinini; kukw iyo ngoro itazoba iy’ abantu, arikw izoba iy’ Uhoraho Imana." 
1Chronicles29:2 Jewe niteguye ivy’ iyo ngoro y’Imana yanje uko nshoboye kwose; narondeye amazahabu yo gukoramw’ ibintu vy’amazahabu nyene, n’amafeza y’ivy’ amafeza nyene, n’imiringa y’ivy’ imiringa, n’ivyuma vy’ibintu vy’ivyuma, n’ibiti vyo gukūramw’ ibintu vy’ibibāzano; niteguye n’utubuyenge twitwa shohamu, n’utundi tubuyenge two kuzorumikwa mw izahabu, n’utundi twitwa puku, n’utundi tujererenze amabara, mbere utubuyenge tw’uburyo bgose tw’igiciro kinini; niteguye n’amabuye yitwa marimari atagira akagero." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kandi rero, kubg’ urukundo nkunze iyo ngoro y’Imana yanje, har’ itunga ryanje nari mfise ry’amazahabu n’amafeza, na vyo ndabihaye iyo ngoro y’Imana yanje, bigereke ku vyo niteguriye iyo ngoro yera vyose;" 
1Chronicles29:4 ntanze amazahabu yavuye i Ofiru italanto ibihumbi bitatu, n’amafeza aramuye italanto ibihumbi ndwi, vyo kwomeka kur’ iyo ngoro imbere;" 
1Chronicles29:5 ayo mazahabu ndayatanze kuzokoramw’ ibintu vy’amazahabu nyene, n’ayo mafeza kuzokoramw’ ivy’ amafeza nyene, kugira ngw abacuzi b’abahinga babikūremw’ ibintu vy’uburyo bgose. None rero ni nde yemeye gutanga ivyiwe agashikanira Uhoraho uyu musi?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Maz’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, n’abaganwa b’imiryango y’Abisirayeli, n’abagabisha bāgaba ibihumbi n’abāgaba amajana, n’ababgiriza bājejwe ivy’ ibikorwa vy’umwami, bashikana n’umutima ukunze;" 
1Chronicles29:7 batanga amazahabu italanto ibihumbi bitanu, n’ayandi y’intete zitwa dariki ibihumbi cumi, n’amafeza italanto ibihumbi cumi nyene, n’imiringa italanto ibihumbi cumi n’ umunani, n’ivyuma italanto ibihumbi ijana, kugira ngo bikoreshwe igikorwa c’iyo ngoro y’Imana." 
1Chronicles29:8 Kand’ abāri bafise utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini baradutanga, badushira mu bubīko bg’ivy’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho, bgāri bujejwe Yehiyeli Umugerushoni." 
1Chronicles29:9 Maz’ abantu bagira akanyamuneza ko gutanga bivuye mu mitima, kuko bashikaniye Uhoraho n’ imitima ishize icīra, babikunze rwose; kand’ umwami Dawidi na we anezerwa akanyamuneza kenshi." 
1Chronicles29:10 Ni co catumye Dawidi ashimira Uhoraho imbere y’ikoraniro ryose, akavuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya sogokuruza wacu Isirayeli, ur’ uwo guhimbazwa ibihe bitazoshira." 
1Chronicles29:11 Uhoraho, ubukuru n’ubushobozi n’icubahiro n’ inganji n’igitinyiro n’ivyawe; kukw ibiri mw ijuru n’ibiri mw isi vyose ar’ ivyawe; ubgami n’ubgawe, ewe Uhoraho, kandi ni wewe ushizwe hejuru ng’ube ūsumba vyose." 
1Chronicles29:12 Ubutunzi n’icubahiro ni wewe vyandurukako, kandi ni wewe uganza vyose; mu kuboko kwawe harimw’ ububasha n’inkomezi; kandi ni wewe ushobora guha bose icubahiro n’inkomezi." 
1Chronicles29:13 None rero, Mana yacu, turagukengurukiye, duhimbaje izina ryawe ry’icubahiro." 
1Chronicles29:14 Ariko jewe n’inda n’indēsho, nar’ iki, twe n’abantu banje, vyotumye dushobora gushikana n’imitima ikunze durtyo? Kuko vyose biva kuri wewe, kand’ ivyawe akaba ari vyo tuguhayeko." 
1Chronicles29:15 Kukw imbere yawe tur’ akavantara n’abātsi b’indaro, nk’uko ba sogokuruza bose bāri bameze; imisi yacu tumara kw isi ihwanye n’igitūtu, kandi nta vyizigiro dufise." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ewe Uhoraho Mana yacu, ibi bintu vyose twiteguye kukwubakishiriza ingoro y’izina ryawe ryera, biva mu kuboko kwawe, kandi vyose n’ivyawe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Kandi Mana yanje, nzi yuk’ usuzuma umutima, kandi k’uhimbarwa n’ubugororotsi. Nanje nshikanye ibi bintu vyose bivuye mu mutima ugororotse. Kand’ ubu ngize akanyamuneza kubona abantu bawe bari hano bagushikanira n’imitima ikunze." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya ba sogokuruza bacu Aburahamu na Isaka na Isirayeli, uze wame ukomeza mu mitima y’abantu bawe iyo migabo n’ivyo vyiyumviro, kandi wame werekeje imitima yabo kuri wewe." 
1Chronicles29:19 Kand’ umuhungu wanje Salomo umuhe kwitondera ivyagezwe vyawe n’ amabgirizwa yawe n’ivyo washinze, kugira ngw avyitondere n’ umutima wose, kand’ akore n’ivyo vyose, yubake n’iyo ngoro niteguye ivyayo." 
1Chronicles29:20 Dawidi araheza abarira iryo koraniro ryose, at’ Enda ni muhimbaze Uhoraho Imana yanyu. Nukw ikoraniro ryose bahimbaza Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, bunamika amaso, bakubita inkoro hasi imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’umwami." 
1Chronicles29:21 Bukeye bgaho bazanira Uhoraho ibimazi, batanga n’ivyo kumwosereza, amapfizi igihumbi, n’amapfizi y’intama igihumbi nyene, n’imyagazi y’intama igihumbi, babitangana n’amashikanwa y’ibiturire ukw agendana na vyo; batanga n’ibindi bimazi vyinshi cane kubg’ Abisirayeli bose." 
1Chronicles29:22 Uwo musi bararya baranywa bar’ imbere y’Uhoraho, bafise akanyamuneza kenshi. Maze bongera kwimika Salomo umuhungu wa Dawidi ubugira kabiri, ngw abe umwami, bamurobanuza amavuta imbere y’Uhoraho ngw abe segaba, na Sadoki ngw abe umuherezi." 
1Chronicles29:23 Nuko Salomo avyagira ku ntebe y’ubgami ishinzwe n’Uhoraho, ar’ umwami mu gishingo ca se Dawidi; agira ikiganza ciza, kand’ Abisirayeli bose baramwumvira." 
1Chronicles29:24 Abaganwa bose n’abantu b’abahizi, bo n’abana bose b’umwami Dawidi, bakomera amashi umwami Salomo." 
1Chronicles29:25 Uhoraho akuza Salomo cane imbere y’Abisirayeli bose, amuha icubahiro c’ubgami kitīgeze kuba ku mwami n’umwe mu bamwītangiye imbere mu Bisirayeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Dawidi mwene Isayi yaganje Abisirayeli bose. 
1Chronicles29:27 Igihe yamaze ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli yar’ imyaka mirongwine, kuko yamaze imyaka ndwi aganziriza i Heburoni, akamara n’iyindi mirongwitatu n’itatu i Yerusalemu." 
1Chronicles29:28 Atanga yīsāziye neza, ageze mu zabukuru, ar’ umutunzi n’umunyacubahiro; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Salomo asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ivyādonzwe ku mwami Dawidi, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, biranditswe mu vyādonzwe na Samweli kamenyi, no mu vyādonzwe na Natani yavugishwa n’Imana, no mu vyādonzwe na Gadi kamenyi," 
1Chronicles29:30 hamwe n’ivyabaye ku ngoma yiwe vyose, n’ivy’ ubuhizi yakoze, n’ ivyabaye kuri we no ku Bisirayeli, no ku bami bose bo mur’ ivyo bihugu." 
2Chronicles1:1 Nuko Salomo mwene Dawidi ashikama ku ngoma yiwe, kand’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe abana na we, amushira hejuru cane." 
2Chronicles1:2 Salomo acūrira amajambo Abisirayeli bose, abagabisha bagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana, n’ abacamanza, n’abaganwa bose b’ Abisirayeli, n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles1:3 Nuko Salomo ajana n’ikoraniro ryose, baja mu gitabo co ku mpinga y’umusozi i Gibeyoni, kukw aho ari ho ihema ry’ibonaniro ry’Imana ryari riri, iryo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yakoreye mu bugaragwa." 
2Chronicles1:4 Arikw isandugu y’Imana Dawidi yari yarayidūganye, ayikūra i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu ayijana aho yayitunganirije; kuko yari yayishingiye ihema i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:5 Arikw igicaniro c’umuringa, cākozwe na Besaleli mwene Uri umwuzukuru wa Huri, cari kikiri ngaho imbere y’ihema ry’Uhoraho; aho ni ho Salomo n’ikoraniro bākunda kuja gusiguriza Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles1:6 Nuko Salomo aradūga aja kur’ ico gicaniro c’umuringa imbere y’Uhoraho, kiri kur’ iryo hema ry’ibonaniro, acoserezakw ibimazi igihumbi." 
2Chronicles1:7 Mur’ iryo joro Imana yiyereka Salomo, iramubarira, iti Nsaba ico ugomba, ndakiguhe." 
2Chronicles1:8 Salomo arayishura, ati Wagiriye neza cane data Dawidi, unsubiza ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles1:9 None rero, Uhoraho Mana, isezerano wasezeraniye data Dawidi ni rishike, kuko wangize umwami w’abantu b’isinzi, bangana n’umukungugu wo kw isi." 
2Chronicles1:10 None rero ndagusavye umpe ubgenge no gutahura, kugira ngo mmenye iyo bija n’iyo biva mur’ aba bantu. None ni nde yoshobora gucira imanza iri hanga ryawe, n’ukuntu ar’ irihambaye?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Imana yishura Salomo, it’ Ivyo kw ari vyo biri mu mutima wawe, ukaba udasavye ubutunzi cank’ ibintu, cank’ icubahiro, canke ng’ usabe kw abakwanka bapfa, canke ng’ usabe kuramba; arik’ ukaba wisabiye ubgenge no gutahura, kugira ng’ umenye gucira abantu imanza, abo nakwimitsemwo ng’ubaganze;" 
2Chronicles1:12 nuk’ ubgenge n’ugutahura urabihawe, kandi nzoguha n’ubutunzi n’ibintu n’icubahiro bitīgeze kugirwa n’umwami n’umwe mu bākwitangiye imbere, kandi no mu bazoguherukira nta wuzogira ibihwanye n’ivyawe." 
2Chronicles1:13 Nuko Salomo ava imbere y’ ihema ry’ibonaniro, ku mpinga y’umusozi Gibeyoni, asubira i Yerusalemu; akomeza kuganza Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 Kandi yironderera imikogote y’intambara n’abo kugendera ku mafarasi; yar’ afise imikogote igihumbi n’amajana ane, n’abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, bamwe abashira mu bisagara bibīkwamw’ imikogote, abandi i we i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Umwami, amafeza n’ amazahabu yararushe abihindura nk’amabuye i Yerusalemu, n’ibiti vy’amasederi bihinduka nk’ivy’ imisukomora vyo mu biyaya mu kuba vyinshi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Kand’ amafarasi Salomo yar’ atunze bāyakūra muri Egiputa; abadandaza b’umwami bayagura ar’ amasho: ubusho bgose igiciro cabgo. 
2Chronicles1:17 Umukogote umwe‐umwe bāwuzana bawukūye muri Egiputa kuri shekeli z’ifeza amajana atandatu, ifarasi kw ijana na mirongwitanu. Kand’ abo bādandariza umwami bāshōrera n’abami bose bo mu Baheti n’abo mu Basiriya." 
2Chronicles2:1 Nuko Salomo agira imigabo yo kwubakira izina ry’Uhoraho ingoro, no kwiyubakira ingoro yiwe ubgiwe." 
2Chronicles2:2 Nukw ashirah’ abantu ibihumbi mirongwirindwi ashinze ivyo kwikorera, n’abandi ibihumbi mirongumunani bāshinzwe kubāza amabuye ku misozi, n’abo kugaba abo bakozi ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana atandatu." 
2Chronicles2:3 Maze Salomo atuma kuri Huramu umwami w’i Tiro, uti Nk’uko wagirira se Dawidi, ukamurungikira ibiti vy’amasederi vyo kwubaka ingoro yiwe, uti Na we abe ari k’umugirira." 
2Chronicles2:4 Uti Non’ agira ngo yubake ingoro y’izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe, ut’ Az’ aheze ayimushikirize, uti Kugira ngo haboneke aho kumwosereza imibavu y’ibintu bimoga, n’aho gutereka imitsima y’ibiterekērwa, n’aho kwosereza ibimazi vyo mu gitondo no ku mugoroba, n’ivyo ku masabato, n’ivyo mu mboneko z’ukwezi n’ivyo ku misi mikuru yashinzwe y’Uhoraho Imana yabo; uti Kukw ivyo ar’ icagezwe c’intahava ku Bisirayeli." 
2Chronicles2:5 Uti Kand’ iyo ngoro agomba kwubaka ni nini; uti Kukw Imana yabo ar’ agakomeye, isumba izindi mana zose." 
2Chronicles2:6 Ut’ Ariko ni nde yoshobora kuyubakira ingoro, uti Kw ijuru, mbere n’ijuru risumba ayandi, itoshobora kurikwirwamwo? Uti None nka we, n’inda n’indēsho, yar’ iki vyotuma ayubakira ingoro, ut’ Atar’ ukurondera aho yoyosereza imibavu gusa?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Uti Nuko none umurungikire umuntu w’umuhinga azi gucura ivy’ amazahabu n’ivy’ amafeza n’ivy’ imiringa n’ivy’ ivyuma, azi no kujisha impuzu mu nyuzi z’amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’iz’ amasufe, azi no guca amagarwe, uti Kugira ngw az’ aze afatanye n’abantu biwe b’abahinga bar’ i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ut’ Abo se Dawidi yasize atoye." 
2Chronicles2:8 Uti Kand’ uz’ umurungikire ibiti vy’ amasederi n’ivy’ akajwari, n’ivya alumugi, vy’i Lebanoni; uti Kukw azi kw abantu bawe ar’ abahinga bo guca ibiti i Lebanoni; uti Kand’ abantu biwe bazofatanya n’abawe;" 
2Chronicles2:9 uti Kugira ngo bamutunganirize ibiti vyinshi cane, uti Kukw iyo ngoro agomba kwubaka izoba nini y’igitangaza." 
2Chronicles2:10 Uti Kand’ abo bantu bawe b’ababāji baca ibiti, azobaha ingero zitwa koro ibihumbi mirongwibiri z’ingano zisekuye, uti N’ingero ibihumbi mirongwibiri za sayiri, uti N’imibindi ya vino ibihumbi mirongwibiri, uti N’imibindi y’ amavuta ya elayo ibihumbi mirongwibiri nyene." 
2Chronicles2:11 Maze Huramu umwami w’i Tiro arungikira Salomo icete co kumwishura, at’ Uhoraho, kubg’ urukundo yakunze abantu biwe, ni co catumye akugira umwami wabo." 
2Chronicles2:12 Huramu agerekako, aravuga, at’ Uhoraho, Imana y’ Abisirayeli, yaremye ijuru n’isi, ahimbazwe, kuko yahaye umwami Dawidi umwana akerebutse, yahawe ubuhanga n’ubgenge, akaba ari we agiye kuzokwubakira Uhoraho ingoro, no kuzokwiyubakira ingoro yiwe ubgiwe." 
2Chronicles2:13 Ati None ndungitse umuntu w’umuhinga yahawe ubgenge, yitwa Huramu‐abi;" 
2Chronicles2:14 nyina avuka mu ba Dani, ariko se yar’ uw’ i Tiro. N’umuhanga azi gucura ivy’ amazahabu n’ivy’ amafeza n’ivy’ imiringa n’ ivy’ ivyuma, azi no kubāza amabuye n’ibiti, no kujisha impuzu z’amashigisha n’iz’ amasufe n’ izera derere n’izisa n’agahama, azi no guca amagarwe y’uburyo bgose, azi no kwigenera ivy’ ubuhinga bg’uburyo bgose. Azofatanya n’abantu bawe b’abahinga, ari bo bahinga nyakwubahwa so Dawidi yasize atoye." 
2Chronicles2:15 None rero za ngano na sayiri n’amavuta ya elayo na vino, ivyo wavuze, nyakwubahwa, uz’ ubiturungikire," 
2Chronicles2:16 natwe tuzohumbira ibiti i Lebanoni, ivy’ uzogomba vyose; tuzobikurungikira tubitēkeye imbambo, tubicishe mu kiyaga bishike i Yopa; nawe uz’ ubidūganishe i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles2:17 Maze Salomo aharūra abāvuye mu mahanga bose bari mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli, nk’uko se Dawidi yari yarabaharūye; baba ibihumbi ijana na mirongwitanu na bitatu n’amajana atandatu." 
2Chronicles2:18 Nukw ashirah’ ibihumbi mirongwirindwi ashinze ivyo kwikorera, n’abandi ibihumbi mirongumunani bāshinzwe kubāza amabuye ku misozi, n’abo kugaba abo bakozi ibihumbi bitatu n’ amajana atandatu, ngo babakoreshe." 
2Chronicles3:1 Maze Salomo atangura kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu ku musozi Moriya, ah’ Uhoraho yiyerekeye se Dawidi, ari ho nyene Dawidi yashinze, ku mbuga ya Orunani Umuyebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Atangura kwubaka ku musi ugira kabiri wo mu kwezi kwa kabiri, mu mwaka ugira kane ari ku ngoma." 
2Chronicles3:3 Uku ni kw amatanguriro yarēha, ayo Salomo yashizeho kugira ngo yubake ingoro y’Imana. Uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, utambitse mu buryo bga kera, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri." 
2Chronicles3:4 Urubaraza rw’ imbere y’iyo ngoro, uburebure bgarwo bg’amakika bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri, nk’uk’ ubgaguke bg’iyo ngoro bgangana; uburebure bgarwo bg’igihagararo bgar’ ijana na mirongwibiri; imbere kuri rwo ahomekakw izahabu iramuye." 
2Chronicles3:5 Igice kinini c’iyo ngoro, imbere ahomekesha imbaho z’akajwari; na zo azomekakw izahabu iramuye, ashushanyakw ibishushanyo vy’ibigazi n’ ivy’ imigufu." 
2Chronicles3:6 Kand’ iyo ngoro ayomekako n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini kugira ngw ishaze; amazahabu yakoresheje yari yavuye i Paravayimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Nukw iyo ngoro ayomekakw izahabu, uhereye ku myaro, no mw irebe, no ku bisika vyayo, no ku nzugi zayo; atakw ashushanya n’ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi ku bisika." 
2Chronicles3:8 Yubaka n’Ahēra Cane; uburebure bgaho bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, kandi bgangana n’ubgaguke bg’iyo ngoro; ubgaguke bgaho bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri nyene. Imbere ahomeka izahabu iramuye; ukuriba kw’ izahabu yahakoresheje kwar’ italanto amajana atandatu." 
2Chronicles3:9 Imisumari yahakoresheje yar’ icuzwe mw izahabu irivye shekeli mirongwitanu. Ivyumba vyo hejuru na vyo avyomekakw izahabu. 
2Chronicles3:10 Abāza ibishushanyo bibiri vy’abakerubi vyo gushira Ahēra Cane, avyomekakw izahabu." 
2Chronicles3:11 Amababa y’abo bakerubi, uburebure bga yose bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri; ibaba ry’umwe ryar’ amatambge atanu, kandi ryaruma ku nzu, irindi baba na ryo ryar’ atanu nyene, kandi ryasomana n’iry’ uwundi mukerubi." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ibaba ry’uwundi mukerubi ryar’ amatambge atanu nyene, kandi ryaruma ku nzu ku rundi ruhande, irindi na ryo nyene ryar’ atanu, ryasomana n’iry’ umukerubi wa mbere." 
2Chronicles3:13 Amababa y’abo bakerubi, uburebure bga yose uko yar’ ashanje, bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri; bari bahagaze ku birenge vyabo, bahanze amaso ku nzu." 
2Chronicles3:14 Igihuzu kihakingīra akijisha mu nyuzi z’amasufe n’iz’ amashigisha n’izisa n’agahama n’izera derere; akijishirakw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi. 
2Chronicles3:15 Arondera inkingi zibiri zo gushinga imbere y’iyo ngoro; uburebure bgazo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitatu n’atanu y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; imyashi yazo, uburebure bg’ umwe‐umwe bgar’ amatambge atanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Acura n’imigufu nk’ iyashizwe Ahēra Cane, ayishira mu mitwe y’izo nkingi; acura n’ ibisa n’amakomamanga, abidombagiza kur’ iyo migufu." 
2Chronicles3:17 Nukw ashinga izo nkingi imbere y’ urusengero, imwe i buryo n’ iyindi i bumoso; iy’ i buryo ayita Yakini, iy’ i bumoso ayita Bowazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Maz’ acurisha igicaniro mu miringa; uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge mirongwibiri y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’ubgaguke bgaco bgari mirongwibiri nyene, uburebure bg’ igihagararo bgar’ amatambge cumi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Maz’ akora igikarabiro citwa ikiyaga, akivugutiye mu nkero, ubgaguke bgaco, uhereye ku rubiga rw’uruhande rumwe ugashitsa ku rundi, bgar’ amatambge cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, bgarangana impande zose; uburebure bgaco bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atanu; urubiga rwaco rwazengukwa n’umugozi w’amatambge mirongwitatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Musi y’urubiga rwaco hari hakīkūjwe n’ibishushanyo vy’uturende, mw itambge rimwe hār’ icumi‐icumi, dukīkūje hirya no hino kur’ ico kiyaga; utwo turende twari dutondeshejwe mu mirongo ibiri, twāvugutiranywe na co kikiri mu nkero." 
2Chronicles4:4 Cari giteretswe ku bishushanyo vy’ amapfizi cumi n’abiri; atatu yarāba i burārūko, yandi atatu yarāba i burengerazuba, yandi atatu yarāba i bumanuko, yandi atatu yarāba i burasirazuba; ico kiyaga cari giteretse kur’ ayo mapfizi, kandi yose yar’ ahānye imigongo." 
2Chronicles4:5 Intimba yaco yangana n’ikiganza c’umuntu, kand’ umunwa waco war’ umeze nk’uw’ igikombe, canke nk’ishurwe ry’irebe; cuzuzwa n’imibindi ibihumbi bitatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Acura n’ibigarigari cumi vyo kurongamwo; bitanu abishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo, bindi bitanu i bumoso; bābirongamw’ inyama z’ibimazi vyo kwosa, ariko ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga car’ ic’ abaherezi co gukarabiramwo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Acura n’ibiterekwakw amatara cumi mw izahabu, nk’ukw ibgirizwa ryavyo riri, abitereka mu rusengero, bitanu mu ruhande rw’i buryo, bindi bitanu mu ruhande rw’i bumoso." 
2Chronicles4:8 Abāza n’ameza cumi, ayatereka mu rusengero, atanu mu ruhande rw’i buryo, yandi atanu mu ruhande rw’i bumoso nyene. Acurisha n’amakarabo ijana mw izahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Yubakisha n’urugo rw’inyubakwa, ari ho hār’ ah’ abaherezi, bo n’urugo rw’intangāro, akoresha n’ inzugi zarwo; izo nzugi zarwo azomekakw imiringa." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga agishira ku ruhande rw’i buryo bg’iyo ngoro, ku mfuruka ihera i burasirazuba n’i bumanuko." 
2Chronicles4:11 Maz’ imibindi n’ivyuma vyo kuyora umunyota n’imibehe Huramu arabikora na vyo. Uko ni ko yanonosoye igikorwa yakorera umwami Salomo c’ingoro y’Imana. 
2Chronicles4:12 Ivyo yakoze vyar’ ibi: za nkingi zompi, na ya myashi yompi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’izo nkingi, n’ibimeze bga nsenga bibiri vyari kuri ya myashi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’ izo nkingi;" 
2Chronicles4:13 na vya bishushanyo vy’amakomamanga amajana ane bitondeshejwe kur’ izo nsenga, imirongo ibiri‐ibiri ku nsenga zompi, uko zari kur’ iyo myashi yompi yiburungushuye yari mu mitwe y’izo nkingi;" 
2Chronicles4:14 akora na vya bitereko, na vya bigarigari vyo gutereka kuri vyo;" 
2Chronicles4:15 na ca kiyaga, na vya bishushanyo vy’amapfizi ukw ar’ icumi na bibiri cari giteretsweko;" 
2Chronicles4:16 na ya mibindi na vya vyuma vyo kuyora umunyota n’ivyo kwāruza inyama; ivyo bintu vyose Huramu‐abi yakoreye umwami Salomo vy’ingoro y’Uhoraho, yabikoze mu miringa y’imyākāka." 
2Chronicles4:17 Umwami yabikoreshereje mu kiyaya ca Yorodani bivugutiwe mu nkero, ahantu hār’ ibumba, hagati y’i Sukoti n’i Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Uko ni ko Salomo yakoze ivyo bintu vyose vy’isinzi; uburemerezi bg’imiringa vyakūwemwo ntibgāmenyekanye. 
2Chronicles4:19 Kandi Salomo acurisha ibintu vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, ni vyo ibi: igicaniro c’izahabu, n’ ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekērwa;" 
2Chronicles4:20 n’ibiterekwakw amatara vyacuzwe mw izahabu iramuye, bo n’ amatara yavyo, kugira ngw aze yame yākira hino y’Ahēra Cane, nk’uko vyashinzwe;" 
2Chronicles4:21 n’ibisa n’amashurwe, n’ayo matara nyene, n’imakasi zayo zo gutunganya urutambi, na vyo vyar’ ivy’ izahabu y’indobānurwa;" 
2Chronicles4:22 n’ imbugita, n’imibehe, n’udukombe, n’udusahani two gushirwak’ umunyota, na vyo nyene vyar’ ivy’ izahabu iramuye; n’amapata y’ inzugi zo haruguru zija Ahēra Cane, n’ay’ inzugi z’ingoro ubgayo, ari rwo rusengero, na yo yar’ ay’ izahabu." 
2Chronicles5:1 Uko ni kw igikorwa cose Salomo yakoreye ingoro y’Uhoraho carangiye. Maze yinjiza ivyo se Dawidi yari yaragize inyegu y’ Uhoraho, amafeza n’amazahabu, n’ibintu vy’ibikoreshwa, abishira mu bubīko bg’ingoro y’Imana." 
2Chronicles5:2 Maze Salomo akoranya abashingantahe b’Abisirayeli n’abakuru b’imiryango bose, ari bo bakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza b’ Abisirayeli, bakoranira i Yerusalemu, kugira ngo badūgane isandugu y’isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bayikūye mu gisagara ca Dawidi, ari ho i Siyoni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Nukw abagabo bose b’Abisirayeli bakoranira i bgami mu kwezi kw’indwi, ngo bagire imisi mikuru." 
2Chronicles5:4 Nukw abakuru bose bo mu Bisirayeli baraza, Abalewi baraheza barerura isandugu." 
2Chronicles5:5 Nuko badūgana iyo sandugu, n’ihema ry’ibonaniro, bo n’ibintu vyera vyari mw ihema vyose; ivyo vyose abaherezi, ari bo Balewi, ni bo bābidūganye." 
2Chronicles5:6 Maz’ umwami Salomo hamwe n’ ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli bāri bakoraniye imbere yiwe bahagaze imbere y’iyo sandugu, batanga intama n’inka kw ibimazi zitoharūrwa canke ngo zimenyekane igitigiri, kuko zar’ isinzi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Maz’ abaherezi binjiza iyo sandugu y’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho, bayishikana ahayo, haruguru mu ngoro, ari ho Hēra Cane, musi y’amababa y’abakerubi;" 
2Chronicles5:8 kukw ivyo bishushanyo vy’abakerubi vyari bishanje amababa hejuru y’ikibanza c’iyo sandugu, bigakīngīra iyo sandugu n’iminiho yayo." 
2Chronicles5:9 Kand’ iyo miniho yayo yari miremire, bigatuma ūhagaze Ahēra, hafi y’ Ahēra Cane, yashobora kubona imitwe yayo, arik’ ūhagaze hanze ntiyayibona; kandi ni ho ikiri no kugeza n’ubu." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mur’ iyo sandugu nta kindi carimwo atari vya bisate bibiri Mose yashiriyemw’ i Horebu, igihe Uhoraho yasezerana isezerano n’Abisirayeli, hamwe bava muri Egiputa." 
2Chronicles5:11 Maz’ abaherezi barasohoka bava Ahēra, kukw abāri baje bose bo mu baherezi bāri biyejeje, ntibarinze kuzanwa n’ukuza mu mbu zabo;" 
2Chronicles5:12 kand’ Abalewi bose b’abaririmvyi, Asafu na Hemani na Yedutuni n’abigishwa babo na bagenzi babo, bāri bahagaze i ruhande y’igicaniro ahahera i burasirazuba, bambaye impuzu zera derere, bavuza ivyitwa matowazi n’amakembe n’inanga, bari kumwe n’abaherezi ijana na mirongwibiri bavuza inzumbete." 
2Chronicles5:13 Nukw abāvuza inzumbete n’ abaririmvyi bahūza amajwi, bakumvikanisha ijwi rihūye batāzīra Uhoraho bamukengurukira, bakavuza ijwi rirengēra izo nzumbete na matowazi n’ibintu bicurarangwa, bagatāzīra Uhoraho, bat’ Uhoraho ni mwiza, kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira; nukw ako kanya igicu c’ igipfungu gica cuzura mu ngoro y’Uhoraho," 
2Chronicles5:14 bituma abaherezi badashobora guhagararayo ngo bahereze kubg’ ico gicu, kuk’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bgari bguzuye mur’ iyo ngoro yiwe." 
2Chronicles6:1 Salomo araheza aravuga, at’ Uhoraho yavuze kw azokwibera mu mwiza w’umuzitanya!" 
2Chronicles6:2 Ariko none ndakwubakiye ingoro yo kubamwo, ahantu uzokwibera ibihe vyose." 
2Chronicles6:3 Maz’ umwami arahindukira, ahezagira ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli; kand’ iryo koraniro ryose ryari rihagaze." 
2Chronicles6:4 Maz’ aravuga, at’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ahimbazwe, yashikije n’ukuboko kwiwe ivyo yavuze n’akanwa kiwe, abarira data Dawidi," 
2Chronicles6:5 yuk’ uhereye igihe yakūriye abantu biwe mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ata gisagara co mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli yigeze gutoranya co kwubakamw’ ingoro ngw izina ryiwe rihabe; canke ngw atoranye umuntu n’umwe ngw abe segaba w’ abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli;" 
2Chronicles6:6 ariko yatoranije Yerusalemu ngw izina ryiwe rihabe, atoranya na Dawidi kugira ngw aganze abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles6:7 Kandi data Dawidi yari yaragabiye mu mutima wiwe kuzokwubakira ingoro izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli. 
2Chronicles6:8 Arik’ Uhoraho abarira data Dawidi, ati Ko war’ ufise imigabo mu mutima wawe yo kwubakira izina ryanje ingoro, wagize neza kuvyiyumvira;" 
2Chronicles6:9 at’ Ariko wewe ntuzokwubaka iyo ngoro, izokwubaka umwana wawe uzokwikūrira mu nda; at’ Uwo ni we azokwubakira izina ryanje ingoro." 
2Chronicles6:10 Non’ Uhoraho ashikije iryo jambo ryiwe yavuze, kuko nsubiye mu gishingo ca data Dawidi, kandi nkaba ndi ku ngoma y’i Bgisirayeli nk’uko yasezeranye, kandi nkaba nujuje iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ni ho nateretse isandugu irimw’ isezerano ry’Uhoraho yasezeranye n’Abisirayeli. 
2Chronicles6:12 Salomo araheza ahagarara imbere y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho, ishengero ryose ry’Abisirayeli rirorēra, agaranzura amaboko;" 
2Chronicles6:13 kandi Salomo yari yashinze ikintu kirekire c’imiringa co guhagararako; uburebure bgaco bg’ umurambararo bgar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgaco bgar’ amatambge atanu nyene, uburebure bg’igihagararo bgar’ amatambge atatu; yari yagishinze mu rugo rw’intangāro hagati; ni ho yar’ ahagaze; nukw araheza apfukama imbere y’ikoraniro ryose ry’Abisirayeli, agaranzura amaboko ayatumbereje mw ijuru," 
2Chronicles6:14 aravuga, at’ Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, nta mana ihwanye nawe mw ijuru canke mw isi; ni wewe wama ushitsa amasezerano, ukagirira imbabazi abasavyi bawe bagendera imbere yawe bitonze n’imitima yabo yose;" 
2Chronicles6:15 kandi washikije ivyo wasezeraniye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi; mber’ ivyo wavugishije akanwa kawe ubishikishije ukuboko kwawe, nk’uko bir’ uyu musi." 
2Chronicles6:16 None rero, Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, komeza ivyo wasezeraniye data umusavyi wawe Dawidi, nk’uko wamubariye kw atazobura uwo guhora ku ngoma y’i Bgisirayeli imbere yawe, abana biwe ni bagenda bitonda mu ngeso zabo, bakagendera mu vyagezwe vyawe nk’uko na we yagendera imbere yawe." 
2Chronicles6:17 None rero, Uhoraho, Mana y’Abisirayeli, ijambo ryawe wabariye umusavyi wawe Dawidi urishitse." 
2Chronicles6:18 Ariko se, n’ivy’ ukuri Imana yoza kubana n’abantu mur’ iyi si? Rāba ijuru, mbere n’ijuru risumba ayandi, ntushobora kurikwirwamwo, nkanswe iyi nzu nubatse!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Arik’ Uhoraho Mana yanje, shira umutima ku gusenga kw’umusavyi wawe no ku kwinginga kwanje, zirikana ugutakamba kwanje n’ugusenga jewe umusavyi wawe nsengeye imbere yawe," 
2Chronicles6:20 kugira ng’ uhoze inyonga zawe kur’ iyi ngoro ku murango no mw ijoro, ni ho wavuze k’uzoshira izina ryawe, kugira ng’ uze wame wumva amasengesho yanje, jewe umusavyi wawe nzogusenga ntumbereye aha hantu." 
2Chronicles6:21 Kand’ uze wame wumva ukwinginga kwanje, jewe umusavyi wawe, n’ukw abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, nko tuzosenga dutumbereye aha hantu; ego me koko, uze wame uvyumva ur’ ah’ uba mw ijuru, kand’ uk’ uzovyumva, uze wame uharira." 
2Chronicles6:22 Umuntu ni yagirira nabi mugenzi we, bakamwaka indahiro, akaza akarahirira imbere y’igicaniro cawe mur’ iyi ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:23 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, ugire ico ukora, ucire abantu bawe imanza, utsindishe uwakoze nabi, bimusubire ku mutwe, ucire umugororotsi urubanza, atsinde nk’uk’ ukuri kwiwe kumeze." 
2Chronicles6:24 Kand’ abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli ni baneshwa n’abansi, bazize ko bagucumuyeko, hanyuma bagahindukira bakātura izina ryawe, bagasenga bakwingingira mur’ iyi ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:25 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, uharire icaha c’ abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ubagarukane mu gihugu wabahānye na ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles6:26 Kand’ ijuru ni ryakingwa, imvura ntikoroke, kuko bāgucumuyeko; ni bāsenga batumbereye aha hantu, bakātura izina ryawe, bagahindukira bakareka icaha cabo, kuko wabahannye," 
2Chronicles6:27 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru, uharire abasavyi bawe icaha cabo, ari bo bantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ubarangire inzira nziza bakwiye kujana, urekurire imvura mu gihugu cawe, ico wahaye abantu bawe kw ishamvu." 
2Chronicles6:28 Inzara ni yatera mu gihugu, cank’ ikīza, canke kurumbisha, cank’ ururyi rw’agahezambuto, cank’ inzige, cank’ inzīkira, cank’ abansi babo ni babatera bakabaziguza mu gisagara cabo ic’ ari co cose; ni haramuka hateye icago ic’ ari co cose, cank’ indwara," 
2Chronicles6:29 hakagira ūsenga akinginga, naho yoba umuntu umwe cank’ abantu bawe bose b’Abisirayeli, umuntu wese ukw azoba yimenyekw indwara yiwe n’umubabaro wiwe, akagaranzura amaboko ayatumbereje iyi ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:30 nuk’ uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, uharire, ugenze umuntu wese nk’ukw ameze, wewe uzi umutima wiwe, kukw ari wewe wenyene uzi imitima y’abantu;" 
2Chronicles6:31 kugira ngo baze bahore bagutinya, bagendere mu nzira zawe imisi yose bazomara bakiriho, mu gihugu wahaye ba sogokuruza bacu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Kandi n’umunyamahanga, atar’ uwo mu bantu bawe b’Abisirayeli, ni yaza avuye mu gihugu ca kure azanywe n’izina ryawe rihambaye, n’ububasha bgawe bukomeye n’ubushobozi bgawe; nuko ni yaza agasenga atumbereye iyi ngoro," 
2Chronicles6:33 uz’ uvyumve uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, uwo munyamahanga umumarire ivyo azoba agutakambiye vyose, bitume amahanga yose yo mw isi amenya izina ryawe, bakwubahe, nk’ukw abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli bakwubaha, kandi bamenye n’iyi ngoro nubatse ko yitwa iy’ izina ryawe." 
2Chronicles6:34 Kand’ abantu bawe ni baramuka bagiye gutera abansi babo ah’ uzoba ubagomoye hose, bakagusenga batumbereye uyu murwa watoranije n’iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:35 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru, ubaroranirize ivyabo." 
2Chronicles6:36 Kandi ni baramuka bagucumuyeko, kukw ata muntu adacumura, ukabarakira, ukabagabura mu maboko y’abansi babo, bakabafata bakabajana mu kindi gihugu, naho hoba hafi canke kure;" 
2Chronicles6:37 maze bakīsubiramwo bari mu gihugu bajanywemw’ ar’ inyagano, bagahindukira, bakagutakambira bari mu gihugu banyagiwemwo, bati Twaracumuye, twaragabitanije, twakoze nabi;" 
2Chronicles6:38 bakakugarukako n’imitima yabo yose n’ ivyiyumviro vyabo vyose, bari mu gihugu banyagiwemwo, aho bābajanye ar’ inyagano, bakagusenga batumbereye igihugu cabo, ico wahaye ba sekuruza, n’uyu murwa watoranije, n’iyi ngoro nubakiye izina ryawe," 
2Chronicles6:39 nuk’ uze wumve ugusenga kwabo n’ ugutakamba kwabo uri mw ijuru ah’ uba, ubaroranirize ivyabo, uharire abantu bawe bagucumuyeko." 
2Chronicles6:40 Nuko Mana yanje, ndakwinginze, tereza inyonga zawe urābe, tega amatwi wumve amasengesho asengerwa aha hantu." 
2Chronicles6:41 None rero, Uhoraho Mana, n’uhaguruke, winjire mu buruhukiro bgawe, wewe ubgawe n’isandugu y’ inkomezi zawe. Abaherezi bawe, Uhoraho Mana, bambare agakiza, n’abakunzi bawe banezererwe ivyiza vyawe." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ewe Uhoraho Mana, ntukimiranye uwo warobanuje amavuta; uze wame wibuka imbabazi wagiriye umusavyi wawe Dawidi." 
2Chronicles7:1 Nuko Salomo arangije gusenga, umuriro utibuka uvuye mw ijuru, utōngōra ibimazi vy’ ukwoswa n’ibindi bimazi; ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzura iyo ngoro." 
2Chronicles7:2 Abaherezi ntibāba bagishobora kwinjira muri yo, kuk’ ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho buyuzuye." 
2Chronicles7:3 Abisirayeli bose babonye ingen’ umuriro utibutse, n’ubgiza bg’Uhoraho ingene bgari kur’ iyo ngoro, bunamika amaso, barūnama bashika hasi ku mabuye ahashashe, barasenga, bakengurukira Uhoraho, bat’ Uhoraho ni mwiza, kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
2Chronicles7:4 Maz’ umwami n’abantu bose bafataniriza hamwe gutangira ibimazi imbere y’Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles7:5 Umwami Salomo atanga inka ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bibiri n’intama ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri kw ibimazi. Uko ni k’umwami n’abantu bose bāshikirije Imana ingoro yayo. 
2Chronicles7:6 Kand’ abaherezi bari bahagaze mu myanya yabo, n’Abalewi na bo bafise ibintu vyo kuvugiriza Uhoraho, ivyo umwami Dawidi yari yarakoresheje vyo gushima Uhoraho, akababgira kubivuza igihe yamuhimbaza, ati Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira; nukw abaherezi bavugiriza inzumbete imbere yabo; Abisirayeli bose na bo barahagarara." 
2Chronicles7:7 Maze Salomo ashinga umwanya wo hagati mu nyubakwa imbere y’ingoro y’Uhoraho, arahēza; aho ni ho yoshereje ibimazi vyo kwoswa, n’ibinure vy’ibimazi vy’ ishimwe, kukw igicaniro c’umuringa yari yaracurishije cari gito, kitokwiwekw ivyo bimazi vyo kwoswa n’ayo mashikanwa y’amafu n’ivyo binure." 
2Chronicles7:8 Uko ni ko Salomo yagize imisi mikuru ico gihe, hamwe n’Abisirayeli bose, kumara imisi ndwi; bār’ ikoraniro rinini cane bavuye mu gihugu cose, uhereye ahafata i Hamati ugashitsa ku mugezi wa Egiputa." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ku musi ugira umunani bagira ikoraniro ry’agahebuza, kuko bari bamaze imisi ndwi mu vyo gushikiriza Imana igicaniro, baraheza basubira kugira iyindi misi mikuru ndwi." 
2Chronicles7:10 Maze ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu wo mu kwezi kw’indwi asēzera abantu, abarungika i wabo; nuko bataha banezerewe, bahimbawe mu mitima yabo kubg’ ivyiza Uhoraho yagiriye Dawidi na Salomo n’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles7:11 Uko ni ko Salomo yarangije kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ ingoro y’ubgami; kand’ ivyo Salomo yari yaragabiye mu mutima wiwe kuzokora ku vy’ingoro y’Uhoraho no ku vy’ingoro yiwe ubgiwe, arabisohoza neza." 
2Chronicles7:12 Hanyuma Uhoraho yiyereka Salomo mw ijoro, aramubarira, ati Numvise ugusenga kwawe, kandi nitoranirije aha hantu ngo habe inzu yo gutangiramw’ ibimazi." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ni naramuka nkinze ijuru, imvura ntigwe, canke ni narekura inzige zikōna mu gihugu, canke ni narekura ikīza kikaja mu bantu banje;" 
2Chronicles7:14 maz’ abantu banje bītirirwa izina ryanje ni bicisha bugufi bagasenga barondera mu nyonga hanje, bagahindukira bakareka ingeso zabo mbi, nuko nanje nzokwumva ndi mw ijuru, mparire ivyaha vyabo, nkize n’ igihugu cabo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Uhereye ubu, nzokwama ntereza inyonga zanje ndābe, ntege amatwi yanje numve amasengesho asengerwa aha hantu." 
2Chronicles7:16 Kuk’ ubu ntoranije iyi ngoro, ndayejeje ngw izina ryanje riyibemw’ ibihe vyose, kandi nzoyamizakw inyonga zanje n’umutima wanje imisi yose." 
2Chronicles7:17 Nuko nawe ni wagendera imbere yanje nk’uko so Dawidi yagenda, ugakora ivyo nakugeze vyose, ukitondera amabgirizwa yanje n’amatēka nashinze," 
2Chronicles7:18 nanje nzotuma ingoma yawe ihangama, nk’uko nasezeraniye so Dawidi, nti Ntuzobura uwo kuganza mu Bisirayeli." 
2Chronicles7:19 Ariko ni mwanta, ntimwitondere ivyagezwe vyanje n’amabgirizwa yanje nabashize imbere, mukaja gusaba izindi mana, mukaba ari zo musenga," 
2Chronicles7:20 nuko nanje nzobarandura, mbakūre mu gihugu nabahaye, kand’ iyi ngoro nejeje kubg’ izina ryanje nzoyishibura imve mu maso, ndayigire iciro ry’imigani n’agashinyaguro mu mahanga yose;" 
2Chronicles7:21 kand’ iyi ngoro, nah’ ar’ agahambaye irtya, ūzoyica i ruhande wese azokwumirwa, avuge, at’ Ariko n’iki catumye Uhoraho agirira artya iki gihugu n’iyi ngoro?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Bazomwishura, bati N’ uko bahevye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, yabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bakaramatana n’izindi mana, bakazisenga, bakaba ari zo basaba; ni co catumye abatēza ivyo vyago vyose." 
2Chronicles8:1 Nuko hashize imyaka mirongwibiri, ari yo Salomo yubakiyemw’ ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ iyiwe ubgiwe," 
2Chronicles8:2 Salomo asanura ibisagara Huramu yari yaramuhaye, abigerēramw’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles8:3 Maze Salomo atera i Hamati‐zoba, arahanesha." 
2Chronicles8:4 Araheza yubaka igisagara c’i Tadumori mu bugaragwa, n’ibisagara vyose vy’ ibigega, ivyo yubatse i Hamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Yubaka n’i Beti‐horoni ho haruguru n’i Beti‐horoni ho hepfo, ibisagara bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, bifise inzugi mu marembo n’ibihindizo." 
2Chronicles8:6 Yubaka n’i Bayalati, n’ibindi bisagara vyose vy’ ibigega vyiwe, n’ibisagara vyose vyo kubīkamw’ imikogote yiwe, n’ivy’ abagendera ku mafarasi biwe, n’amazu yose yagomvye kwubaka i Yerusalemu n’i Lebanoni no mu gihugu cose yaganza." 
2Chronicles8:7 Abantu bose b’amasigarira y’ Abaheti n’Abamori n’Abaferizi n’Abahiwi n’Abayebusi, abatār’ Abisirayeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 abuzukuruza babo bari barasigaye mu gihugu, abo Abisirayeli batāranduye, abo ni bo Salomo yatōjemw’ abo gushinga ibikebere, abahindura abaja na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ariko mu Bisirayeli bo, nta bo yahinduye abaja ngo bamukorere; ariko bār’ ingabo zo kuja mu ntambara, n’ abagabisha bakuru b’ingabo, n’ abagaba abagendera ku mafarasi n’imikogote." 
2Chronicles8:10 Abo ni bo bakoresha bakuru babgiririza Salomo; bose na bose bar’ amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, bābgiriza abantu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Maze Salomo yimura umwamikazi wiwe, umukobga wa Farawo, mu gisagara ca Dawidi, amushira mu ngoro yamwubakiye; kuko yavuze, at’ Umwamikazi wanje ntiyoba mu ngoro ya Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli, kukw ah’ isandugu y’Imana yashitse hose ar’ ahantu hēra." 
2Chronicles8:12 Kandi Salomo yagenda yosereza Uhoraho ibimazi ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho nyene, ico yari yarubatse imbere y’urubaraza," 
2Chronicles8:13 akāma atanga ivyashinzwe na Mose vyatangwa uko bukeye, bo n’ivyo ku masabato n’ivyo mu mboneko z’ukwezi, n’ivyo ku misi mikuru yashinzwe, nk’ukw ikurikirana gatatu‐gatatu mu mwaka, ari yo misi mikuru y’imitsima itambiwe, n’umusi mukuru ukurikira amasabato ndwi, n’imisi mikuru y’insago." 
2Chronicles8:14 Atunganya imbu z’abaherezi uko zākurikirana zo gukora, nk’uko se Dawidi yasize ashinze, n’ivy’ ibikorwa vy’ Abalewi vyo guhimbaza no gufasha abaherezi, nk’ukw ibikorwa vyabo vy’imisi yose vyari biri, n’ ivy’ abashibamyi na bo, nk’ukw imbu zabo zakurikirana ku birimba vyose; kukw ari ko Dawidi, wa muntu w’Imana, yari yasize abishinze." 
2Chronicles8:15 Nta bgirizwa na rimwe bāvako mu yo umwami yasize ageze ku vy’abaherezi n’ Abalewi, canke ku kintu ic’ ari co cose, canke ku vy’ububīko." 
2Chronicles8:16 Uko ni ko Salomo yatunganije ibikorwa vyose, uhereye ku musi yashiriyeh’ itanguriro ry’ingoro y’Uhoraho gushitsa aho yayujurije. Nukw iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho iruzura." 
2Chronicles8:17 Maze Salomo aja i Eziyoni‐geberi n’i Eloti, kw isēsero ry’ ikiyaga mu gihugu c’Abanyedomu." 
2Chronicles8:18 Huramu amurungikira amāto, ayarungikanye abantu biwe, bo n’abazi gusōza bamenyereye ivy’ ikiyaga; baragenda bafatanya n’abantu ba Salomo, baja i Ofiru, bakūray’ amazahabu italanto amajana ane na mirongwitanu, bayazanira umwami Salomo." 
2Chronicles9:1 Umwami w’umugore yaganza i Sheba yumvise ingene Salomo yabaye rurangiranwa, aza azanywe no kumugerageresha ibibazo bigoye; nukw ashika i Yerusalemu agendaniwe n’abantu benshi b’isinzi, afise n’ingamiya zīremētse imibavu n’amazahabu y’itīti, n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini; ashitse kwa Salomo amudondorera ivyari mu mutima wiwe vyose." 
2Chronicles9:2 Nuko Salomo amusobanurira ivyo amubajije vyose; nta kintu na kimwe cāmunaniye kw amusobanurira. 
2Chronicles9:3 Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Sheba abonye ingene Salomo ar’ umunyabgenge, n’ ingoro yubatse ukw imeze," 
2Chronicles9:4 n’ ivyo kurya vyo ku meza yiwe ukuntu vyari, n’abo mu rugo rwiwe uko bīfata, n’abasuku biwe uko bahēreza, n’ukuntu bambaye, bo n’abakevyi biwe bamuhēreza igiturire, n’ukuntu bambaye, n’ ibimazi vyo kwosa yatanga mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, arajorerwa." 
2Chronicles9:5 Abarira umwami, at’ Inkuru numvise ndi mu gihugu canje z’ ibikorwa vyawe n’ubgenge bgawe, zar’ iz’ ukuri." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ariko sinari navyemeye gushitsa nīyiziye, nkavyibonera n’amaso yanje. Ereg’ ivyo bāmbariye vy’ingen’ ufise ubgenge buhebuje ntibishika n’ agace k’ivyo mbonye: ivyawe bisumba uko navyumvise." 
2Chronicles9:7 Hahirwa abantu bawe, hahirwa n’aba bagendanyi bawe bama imbere yawe bakumva ubgenge bgawe!" 
2Chronicles9:8 Uhoraho Imana yawe ahimbazwe, yagushimye akagushira ku ngoma yiwe, ng’ ube umwami, umutwarire. Imana yawe ko yakunze Abisirayeli, ikabakomeza gushitsa ibihe vyose, ni co catumye ikwimika ng’ ube umwami wabo, kugira ng’ uce izibereye n’ iziroranye." 
2Chronicles9:9 Maz’ aha umwami izahabu italanto ijana na mirongwibiri, amuha n’imibavu myinshi y’isinzi, n’utubuyenge tw’ igiciro kinini; ntihongeye kuboneka imibavu isa n’iyo uwo mwami w’i Sheba yahaye umwami Salomo." 
2Chronicles9:10 Kand’ abantu ba Huramu bo n’aba Salomo bāhora bazana amazahabu bayakūye i Ofiru, bāzanana n’ibiti vyitwa alumugi n’ utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini." 
2Chronicles9:11 Ivyo biti vya alumugi umwami ni vyo yabājemw’ ivyuririzo vy’ ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ivy’ ingoro yiwe ubgiwe; yabibājemwo n’ inanga n’amakembe vy’abaririmvyi; ntihāri hārīgeze kuboneka ibiti vya alumugi nk’ivyo mu gihugu c’i Buyuda. 
2Chronicles9:12 Nuk’ umwami Salomo aha uwo mwami w’i Sheba ivyo yagomba vyose n’ico amwatse cose, udashizemw’ ivyo yamushubirije mu nkōko ku vyo yamugemuriye. Bukeye uwo mwami arahaguruka, aragenda, asubira mu gihugu ciwe, bo n’abantu biwe." 
2Chronicles9:13 Amazahabu yaza kwa Salomo mu mwaka mu mwaka, ukuriba kwayo kwashika italanto amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu na zitandatu," 
2Chronicles9:14 udashizekw ayo abahanjuzi n’abadandaza bāzana; kand’ abami bose bo muri Arabiya n’abaganza igihugu bāzanira Salomo amazahabu n’amafeza. 
2Chronicles9:15 Maz’ umwami Salomo acurisha inkinzo nini‐nini amajana abiri mw izahabu, imwe‐imwe yacurwa mw izahabu irivye shekeli amajana atandatu." 
2Chronicles9:16 Acurisha n’inkinzo nto‐nto amajana atatu mw izahabu nyene, imwe‐imwe yacurwa mw izahabu irivye shekeli amajana atatu; umwami azishira muri ya nzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni." 
2Chronicles9:17 Kand’ umwami yibāzishiriza intebe nini y’ubgami mu mahembe y’inzovu, ayomekakw izahabu iramuye;" 
2Chronicles9:18 iyo ntebe yar’ ifise aho kudondagira hatandatu, n’agatebe ko gushirakw ibirenge gacuzwe mw izahabu, gafatanijwe n’iyo ntebe; kand’ impande zompi z’icicaro cayo yar’ ifise aho gushirakw amaboko, n’ibishushanyo bibiri vy’intambge, kimwe gihagaze ku ruhande rumwe, ikindi ku rundi rw’ahashirwa amaboko nyene." 
2Chronicles9:19 Kandi hār’ ibishushanyo vy’intambge cumi na bibiri, bidondagije kimwe‐kimwe impande zompi z’aho kudondagira ukw ari hatandatu; mu bihugu vyose nta ntebe y’ubgami yigeze kubāzwa ihwanye n’iyo." 
2Chronicles9:20 Kand’ ibintu vyose vy’umwami Salomo vyo kunywesha vyar’ ivy’ izahabu, n’ibikoreshwa vyose vyo mur’ iyo nzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira c’i Lebanoni vyar’ ivy’ izahabu iramuye; kuko ku ngoma ya Salomo ifeza ata co bāyiyumvirako." 
2Chronicles9:21 Kuk’ umwami yar’ afise amāto aja i Tarushishi, ajanwa n’abantu ba Huramu; ukw imyaka itatu ishize, ayo māto y’i Tarushishi yagaruka azanye amazahabu n’ amafeza n’amahembe y’inzovu n’ inkima n’ibisīga vyitwa tawusi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Uko ni k’ umwami Salomo yarusha abami bose bo mw isi ubutunzi n’ubgenge. 
2Chronicles9:23 Mu bihugu vyose vyo mw isi hāhora haza abami bagomba kubona Salomo, no kwumva ivyo avugishwa n’ubgenge Imana yashize mu mutima wiwe." 
2Chronicles9:24 Umuntu wese muri bo yaza azanye indamukanyo, ar’ ivyakozwe mu mafeza canke mu mazahabu, ar’ ivyambarwa, ar’ ibirwanishwa, ar’ imibavu, ar’ amafarasi, ar’ inyumbu; ni ko vyagenda uk’ umwaka utashe." 
2Chronicles9:25 Kandi Salomo yar’ afise impongore ibihumbi bine z’amafarasi yakwega imikogote yiwe, n’abantu bagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi cumi na bibiri, bamwe abashira mu bisagara bibīkwamw’ imikogote, abandi i we i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles9:26 Kandi yaganza abami bose, uhereye kuri rwa ruzi Efurate, ugashitsa ku gihugu c’Abafilisitiya, ukagarukira ku rubibe rwa Egiputa." 
2Chronicles9:27 Umwami, amafeza yararushe ayahindura nk’ amabuye i Yerusalemu, n’ibiti vy’amasederi bihinduka nk’ivy’ imisukomora vyo mu biyaya mu kuba vyinshi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Kandi bāzanira Salomo amafarasi bayakūye muri Egiputa no mu bindi bihugu vyose. 
2Chronicles9:29 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Salomo, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, mbega ntivyanditswe mu vyo Natani uwavugishwa n’Imana yadonze, no mu vyo Ahiya w’i Shilo yavugishijwe, no mu vyo Ido kamenyi yabonye kuri Yerobowamu mwene Nebati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Salomo yamaze imyaka mirongwine ari ku ngoma aganza Abisirayeli bose ar’ i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles9:31 Nuko Salomo ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa wa se Dawidi; maz’ umwana wiwe Rehobowamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles10:1 Bukeye Rehobowamu aja i Shekemu, kukw ari ho Abisirayeli bose bari bagiye kumwimikira." 
2Chronicles10:2 Maze Yerobowamu mwene Nebati aravyumva; kandi yari muri Egiputa, iyo yari yarahungiye umwami Salomo; nukw avyumvise arahindukira, ava muri Egiputa." 
2Chronicles10:3 Batuma kumuhamagara; ashitse araza, bo n’ Abisirayeli bose, babarira Rehobowamu," 
2Chronicles10:4 bati So yadutwaje igitugu; none rero, n’utugerurire ibikorwa bibabaza so yadukoresha, utugabanyeko n’iyo ntwaro yadutwaza, natwe tuzogusaba." 
2Chronicles10:5 Arabishura, ati Ni mugende mumare imisi itatu, muze muheze mugaruke mbabarire. Nukw abantu baragenda." 
2Chronicles10:6 Maz’ umwami Rehobowamu aragenda agīsha inama abashingantahe bāri kuri se Salomo akiriho, arababaza, ati Mwongīra inama ki nokwishura abo bantu?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Baramwishura, bati Ni wemera kugirira neza aba bantu, ukabanezereza, ukababarira amajambo meza, nuko na bo bazokwumvira ibihe vyose." 
2Chronicles10:8 Ariko yanka iyo nama abo bashingantahe bamugīriye, aja kugīsha inama imisore yārukanye na we, yari kuri we." 
2Chronicles10:9 Arababaza, at’ Inama yanyu n’inki, twokwishura abo bantu bambariye, ngo ni ndabagabanyeko intwaro data yabatwaza?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Nukw iyo misore iramubarira, it’ Uze wishure abantu bakubariye ngo so yabatwaje igitugu, ariko ngo weho ubagabanyekw iyo ntwaro; uz’ ubabarire, ut’ Uruhererezi rwanje ruruta ubunini ikiyunguyungu ca data!" 
2Chronicles10:11 Ut’ Ariko naho data yabatwaje igitugu, uti Jeho nzorushiriza; uti Data yabakubitisha ibimōko, ut’ Ariko jeho nzobakubitisha sikorupiyo." 
2Chronicles10:12 Nuko ku musi ugira gatatu Yerobowamu n’abantu bose baza ku mwami Rehobowamu, nk’uko yababariye kuzogaruka i we ku musi ugira gatatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Maz’ uwo mwami Rehobowamu yanse inama yagīriwe na ba bashingantahe, abishura abakankamira," 
2Chronicles10:14 ababarira nk’ukw inama ya ya misore iri, ati Data yabatwaje igitugu, ariko jeho nzorushiriza; data yabakubitisha ibimōko, ariko jeho nzobakubitisha sikorupiyo." 
2Chronicles10:15 Nuk’ umwami ntiyemerera abantu; kukw ivyo vyari bivuye ku Mana ari we Uhoraho, kugira ngw ashitse ijambo yari yarabariye Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, aritumye Ahiya w’i Shilo." 
2Chronicles10:16 Maz’ Abisirayeli bose babonye yuk’ umwami yanse kubemerera, baramubarira, bati Dawidi har’ ico tumwegako? Eka nta mugabane dufise kuri mwene Isayi: yemwe Bisirayeli, hogi twitahire, umuntu wese yīgīre i muhira! Nawe Dawidi, urīmenya mwe n’umuryango wawe! Nukw Abisirayeli bose baritahira, basubira i wabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Arikw Abisirayeli baba mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, abo bo Rehobowamu arabaganza." 
2Chronicles10:18 Bukeye umwami Rehobowamu arungika Adoramu, ari we yagaba ivy’ abanyabikebere; Abisirayeli bamutera amabuye, arapfa. Umwami Rehobowamu avyumvise, aca arakwakwanya yūrira mu mukogote wiwe, ahungira i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles10:19 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāgararije inzu ya Dawidi gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu. 
2Chronicles11:1 Ariko Rehobowamu ashitse i Yerusalemu, akoranya umuryango w’Abayuda n’uw’ Ababenyamini, bakorana ar’ ingabo z’ abahizi ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani, ngo baje gutera Abisirayeli, bagarukanire Rehobowamu igihugu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Maz’ ijambo ry’ Uhoraho riza kuri Shemaya umuntu w’Imana," 
2Chronicles11:3 riti Barira Rehobowamu mwene Salomo, umwami w’Abayuda, n’Abisirayeli bose bar’ i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini," 
2Chronicles11:4 ut’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ngo Ntimuze mudūge kurwanya ab’i wanyu; ngo Ni mwitahire, umuntu wese asubire i we; ngo Kukw ivyabaye vyavuye kuri we. Nuko bumvira iryo jambo ry’Uhoraho, baritahira, bareka kuja gutera Yerobowamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Nuko Rehobowamu aba i Yerusalemu, yubaka ibisagara i Buyuda, abiha inzitiro z’amabuye zikomeye." 
2Chronicles11:6 Yubaka Betelehemu na Etamu na Tekowa," 
2Chronicles11:7 na Beti‐suri na Sokoho na Adulamu," 
2Chronicles11:8 na Gati na Maresha na Zifu," 
2Chronicles11:9 na Adorayimu na Lakishi na Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 na Sora na Ayaloni na Heburoni, ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini bikīkūjwe inzitiro." 
2Chronicles11:11 Agumya amaboma, ayashiramw’ abagabisha b’ingabo, abīkamw’ ivyo kurya n’amavuta ya elayo na vino." 
2Chronicles11:12 Mu gisagara cose ahashira inkinzo n’amacumu, akigira igikomeye cane. Nukw akomeza kuganza i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini." 
2Chronicles11:13 Maz’ abaherezi n’Abalewi bāba i Bgisirayeli hose baza kuri we, bavuye mu ntāra zabo zose." 
2Chronicles11:14 Bata amaragiro yabo n’amatongo yabo, baja i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, kuko Yerobowamu n’ abahungu biwe bābirukanye mu buherezi bgabo bgo guhereza Uhoraho;" 
2Chronicles11:15 Yerobowamu akīshirirah’ abandi baherezi bo mu bitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, ngo bahēreze ibisigo vy’amapfizi y’impene n’ibishushanyo vy’ amamasa yacurishije." 
2Chronicles11:16 Maz’ abo Balewi bakurikirwa n’abari bafise umwete wo kurondera Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, bavuye mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli, bacīkira i Yerusalemu ngo babone gushikanira Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza ibimazi." 
2Chronicles11:17 Nuko batera ingoma y’i Buyuda gushikama, na Rehobowamu mwene Salomo na we nyene bamuha gushikama kumara imyaka itatu; kuko mur’ iyo myaka itatu bāgendana ingeso nziza za Dawidi n’iza Salomo." 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobowamu arongora Mahalati umukobga wa Yerimoti, Yerimoti mwene Dawidi; nyina yari Abihayili umukobga wa Eliyabu, Eliyabu mwene Isayi." 
2Chronicles11:19 Bavyarana abana b’abahungu Yushi na Shemariya na Zahamu. 
2Chronicles11:20 Hanyuma y’uwo arongora Mayaka umukobga wa Abusalomu, bavyarana Abiya na Atayi na Ziza na Shelomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Kandi Rehobowamu akundwakaza Mayaka umukobga wa Abusalomu kumurutisha abandi bamikazi biwe bose, n’incoreke yar’ afise zimeze bga bagore; kuko yar’ afise abamikazi cumi n’umunani, n’incoreke mirongwitandatu, avyara abana b’abahungu mirongwibiri n’umunani n’abakobga mirongwitandatu." 
2Chronicles11:22 Maze Rehobowamu asobanura Abiya, uwo yavyaye kuri Mayaka, aba ari we aha ubugabo mu bo bavukana, kukw ari we yagomba kw azoba umwami." 
2Chronicles11:23 Aca mu bgenge, akwiragiza abahungu biwe bose mu ntāra zose z’i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini, ahār’ igisagara hose kizitijwe uruzitiro rw’amabuye; abaha ivyo kurya vyinshi vyo kubatunga; abaronderera n’abagore benshi." 
2Chronicles12:1 Maze Rehobowamu, amaze gushikama ku ngoma yiwe, no kuba ūhambaye, aca areka ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho, akwega n’ Abayuda bose." 
2Chronicles12:2 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu uwo mwami Rehobowamu ari ku ngoma, Shishaki umwami wa Egiputa adūga gutera i Yerusalemu, kuko bācumuye k’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles12:3 Azanana n’ imikogote y’intambara igihumbi n’amajana abiri, n’abagendera ku mafarasi ibihumbi mirongwitandatu, n’ingabo zitoharūrika zivanye na we muri Egiputa: Abalubimu n’Abasukimu n’Abanyetiyopiya." 
2Chronicles12:4 Atsinda ibisagara vy’i Buyuda bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, araruha ashika n’i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles12:5 Maz’ uwavugishwa n’Imana Shemaya aja aho Rehobowamu n’ abaganwa b’i Buyuda bāri bakoraniye i Yerusalemu kubgo gutinya Shishaki, arababarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ko mwamuhevye, ngo Ni co gitumye na we abaheba akabagabura mu maboko ya Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:6 Maz’ abo baganwa b’Abayuda bo n’umwami baca bicisha bugufi, baravuga, bat’ Uhoraho aragororoka, akoze ibikwiye." 
2Chronicles12:7 Uhoraho abonye ko bicishije bugufi, ijambo ryiwe rica riza kuri Shemaya, riti Ko bicishije bugufi, sinzobarandura, ariko nzobakiza haciye akanya; kand’ uburake bganje ntibugisukwa kuri Yerusalemu bikozwe na Shishaki;" 
2Chronicles12:8 mugabo azobaganza, kugira ngo bamenye amasabo yanje n’amasabo y’abandi bami bo mw isi." 
2Chronicles12:9 Nuko Shishaki umwami wa Egiputa ni kwo kudūga agatera i Yerusalemu, asahura ivy’ ubutunzi vyari bibītswe mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho n’ivyo mu ngoro y’ umwami, arabijana vyose, atakw ajana n’inkinzo z’amazahabu Salomo yari yaracurishije." 
2Chronicles12:10 Maz’ umwami Rehobowamu acurisha izindi nkinzo mu miringa zo gusubira mu gishingo cazo, azizēza abakuru b’abashibamyi bāshibama ku gisapfu c’ingoro yiwe." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kand’ uk’ umwami yinjira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, abo bashibamyi bāgenda bazijanye, hanyuma bakazigarukana bakazisubiza mu nzu yabo." 
2Chronicles12:12 Nuko yicishije bugufi, uburake bg’Uhoraho bumuvako, ntiyabarandura rwose; kandi n’i Buyuda vyari bikimeze neza." 
2Chronicles12:13 Nuk’ umwami Rehobowamu ashikama i Yerusalemu, akomeza kuganza; kandi yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwine n’ umwe, ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’indwi ar’ i Yerusalemu nyene, uwo murwa Uhoraho yari yaratoranije mu miryango yose y’ Abisirayeli, ngw ahashire izina ryiwe. Kandi nyina yitwa Nayama Umwamonikazi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Ariko yagenda akora ivy’ ukugabitanya, kukw atāshize umutima ku kurondera Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles12:15 Non’ ivyadonzwe kuri Rehobowamu vyose, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, mbega ntivyanditswe mu vyo Shemaya uwavugishwa n’Imana na Ido kamenyi bādonze, mu vyo kudondōra ba sekuruza? Kandi hāmah’ intambara hagati ya Rehobowamu na Yerobowamu na ntaryo." 
2Chronicles12:16 Nuko Rehobowamu ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Abiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles13:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani Yerobowamu ari ku ngoma, ni ho Abiya yīma i Buyuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Amara imyaka itatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma, kandi nyina yitwa Mikaya umukobga wa Uriyeli w’i Gibeya. Maze habah’ intambara hagati ya Abiya na Yerobowamu." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya aja mu ntambara afise ingabo ibihumbi amajana ane, abantu b’intōre b’abahizi bazi kurwana; Yerobowamu atonda urugamba ahahanganye na we, afise ingabo ibihumbi amajana munani b’intōre nyene b’abahizi." 
2Chronicles13:4 Maze Abiya ahagarara ku musozi Semarayimu wo mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, aravuga, ati Ni muntege amatwi, yewe Yerobowamu, mwe n’Abisirayeli mwese:" 
2Chronicles13:5 mbega ntimwari mukwiye kumenya yuk’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli yahaye Dawidi n’abahungu biwe ubgami, ngo baze baganze Abisirayeli kuzoshitsa ibihe bidashira, abisezeranishije isezerano ritazohinduka?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Ariko Yerobowamu mwene Nebati, umushumba wa Salomo mwene Dawidi, yarahagurutse agarariza shebuja." 
2Chronicles13:7 Maz’ abantu b’imburakimazi kandi b’inshirukanya bakoranira kuri we, baraheza binantaza kuri Rehobowamu mwene Salomo, igihe Rehobowamu yar’ akiri muto, akiri seniryo, adashobora kubahagarara imbere." 
2Chronicles13:8 Non’ ehe muriyumvira ko muzotsinda ubgami bg’Uhoraho buri mu maboko ya bene Dawidi, kuko mur’ amasinzi n’amasinzi, mukaba mufise n’ibishushanyo vy’amamasa vy’izahabu, ivyo Yerobowamu yabacurishirije ngo bibe imana zanyu!" 
2Chronicles13:9 Mbega ntimwirukanye abaherezi b’Uhoraho bo mu ba Aroni, n’Abalewi, mukīronderera abandi baherezi nk’ ukw imigenzo y’amahanga yo mu bindi bihugu imeze? Ereg’ ūpfuye kwihitanira imasa y’umukangara n’amasuguru ndwi y’intama ngw arobanurwe, muca mumwemerera ubuherezi bg’imana zitar’ Imana!" 
2Chronicles13:10 Ariko tweho, Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu, kandi ntitwamuvuyeko; kand’ abaherezi b’ Uhoraho dufise n’abo kuri Aroni, n’Abalewi baracari ku mabango yabo." 
2Chronicles13:11 Bama bosereza Uhoraho ibimazi uko bukeye uko bgije, bakamwosereza n’imibavu itāmirana, bagatondesha n’imitsima y’ ibiterekērwa ku meza yacuzwe mw izahabu iramuye, kand’ uko bgije bakadomeka n’amatara ari ku gitereko cayo c’izahabu; kuko tweho twitondera ivyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho Imana yacu, ariko mweho mwaramuvuyeko." 
2Chronicles13:12 Kand’ ehe rāba, Imana iri kumwe natwe itugiye imbere, kandi n’abaherezi bayo bafise inzumbete z’intabaza, biteguye kuzivuza ngo turwane namwe. Yemwe Bisirayeli, ntimurwanye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza, kuko mutazotsinda." 
2Chronicles13:13 Ariko Yerobowamu yari yarekuye abaja kubaca igico, ngo babaturuke inyuma; nuko bamwe basigara bahanganye n’Abayuda, ababaciye igico babaturuka inyuma." 
2Chronicles13:14 Abayuda bagize bartya babona urugamba rur’ imbere yabo, urundi rur’ inyuma. Batakambira Uhoraho, abaherezi baca bavuza inzumbete," 
2Chronicles13:15 ingabo z’ Abayuda zīha akamo; maz’ izo ngabo zicihaye akamo, Imana ica irwaniriza Yerobowamu n’Abisirayeli bose imbere ya Abiya n’ Abayuda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Abisirayeli bakiriko barahunga Abayuda, Imana ibagabura mu maboko yabo;" 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya n’ingabo ziwe babatikiza agatikizo gakomeye; mu ngabo z’ Abisirayeli z’intorwa hapfamw’ ibihumbi amajana atanu. 
2Chronicles13:18 Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bāmazwe igabo ico gihe, Abayuda bakabanesha, kuko bizigiye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya yōma inyuma ya Yerobowamu, amunyaga ibisagara, ni vyo ibi: Beteli na Yeshana na Efuroni, bo n’ udusagara tugenda tuhakūkira." 
2Chronicles13:20 Mbere Yerobowamu ntiyasubira kuvyura umutwe ku ngoma ya Abiya; hanyuma Uhoraho amutēza indwara, arapfa." 
2Chronicles13:21 Ariko Abiya arushiriza kuba ūhambaye, arongora abamikazi cumi na bane, avyara abana b’abahungu mirongwibiri na babiri n’abakobga cumi na batandatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Abiya, n’ ivy’ ingeso ziwe, n’ivyo yavuze, biranditswe mu gitabo c’uwavugishwa n’Imana Ido co kudonda inkuru." 
2Chronicles14:1 Nuko Abiya ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Asa asubira ku ngoma yiwe. Ku ngoma yiwe igihugu kimara imyaka cumi gifise impore." 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa akora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari vyiza kandi bibereye," 
2Chronicles14:3 kuko yakūyeh’ ibicaniro vyubakiwe ibigirwamana vy’abanyamahanga bo n’ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, amenagura amabuye bāshinze, atemagura inkingi bāshingiye Ashera;" 
2Chronicles14:4 maz’ agera Abayuda ko barondera Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, no kwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa." 
2Chronicles14:5 Kand’ akūra mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda ibitabo bātavye n’ ibishushanyo vy’izuba. Nuko ku ngoma yiwe igihugu kigira impore. 
2Chronicles14:6 Kandi yubaka i Buyuda ibisagara bizitijwe inzitiro z’amabuye, kuko hār’ impore mu gihugu, kandi mur’ iyo myaka nta ntambara yarwanye, kuk’ Uhoraho yar’ amuhaye umutēkāno." 
2Chronicles14:7 Yari yarabariye Abayuda, ati Ni muze twubake ibi bisagara, tuvyubakire inzitiro n’iminara, dushireh’ inzugi mu marembo n’ibihindizo; igihugu kiracar’ icacu, kuko twarondeye Uhoraho Imana yacu; twamurondeye, na we aduhaye kugira umutēkāno impande zose. Nuko barubaka, bigenda neza." 
2Chronicles14:8 Kandi Asa yar’ afise ingabo z’ Abayuda ibihumbi amajana atatu zitwaje inkinzo n’amacumu, n’iz’ Ababenyamini ibihumbi amajana abiri na mirongumunani zitwaje inkinzo kandi b’abarashi; abo bose bār’ abantu b’abahizi." 
2Chronicles14:9 Bukeye Zera Umunyetiyopiya araza arabatera, afise ingabo ibihumbi igihumbi, n’imikogote y’ intambara amajana atatu, ashika i Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Maze Asa aja kumutega, batonda urugamba mu kiyaya Zefata i Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa araheza atakambira Uhoraho Imana yiwe, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, nta mutabazi ariho atari wewe, ashobora gutabara abanyantege nke akabakiza abanyenkomezi; ewe Uhoraho Mana yacu, udutabare, kukw ari wewe twizigiye, kandi tuje mw izina ryawe kurwanya iki gitero kingana girtyo. Ewe Uhoraho, ni wewe Mana yacu: ntuneshwe n’umuntu buntu." 
2Chronicles14:12 Maz’ Uhoraho arwaniriza Abanyetiyopiya imbere ya Asa n’ Abayuda; abo Banyetiyopiya baca barahunga. 
2Chronicles14:13 Maze Asa n’ ingabo ziri kuri we barabakinagiza, babashitsa i Gerari; mu Banyetiyopiya hapfa benshi cane, ntibāba bagishobora kwigarukira, kuko bātikiriye imbere y’Uhoraho n’imbere y’ingabo ziwe. Abayuda bīronkera amasahu menshi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Maze batera ibisagara vyose bihereranye n’i Gerari, kukw abaho Uhoraho yari yābaciye umuhongo. Basahura ivyo bisagara vyose, baharonka amasahu menshi." 
2Chronicles14:15 Batera amahema y’abanyabitungwa, banyaga intama z’ ibitayega n’ingamiya, baraheza basubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Maze Mpwemu w’Imana aza kuri Azariya mwene Odedi; 
2Chronicles15:2 aja gusanganira Asa, aramubarira, ati Ni muntege amatwi, yewe Asa, mwe n’Abayuda n’Ababenyamini mwese: Uhoraho azokomeza kubana namwe ni mwakomeza kubana na we, kandi ni mwamurondera muzomubona; ariko ni mwamuheba na we azobaheba." 
2Chronicles15:3 Erega har’ igihe kirekire Abisirayeli bāmaze batagira Imana nyakuri, batagira abaherezi bo kubigisha, badafise n’ivyagezwe." 
2Chronicles15:4 Ariko bashitsweko n’ ivyago, bahindukirira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, baramurondera, baramubona." 
2Chronicles15:5 Kandi mur’ ico gihe nta mutēkāno wariho ng’ umuntu agire aho yocārūkira, kuko hāba imivurungano myinshi mu bantu bose bāba mur’ ivyo bihugu," 
2Chronicles15:6 bakagenda bavunagurana, ihanga ritera irindi hanga, igisagara gitera ikindi gisagara, kukw Imana yagenda ibavurungisha ivyago vy’uburyo bgose." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ariko mweho mushikame, amaboko yanyu ntadendebukirwe, kukw ibikorwa vyanyu muzobihērwa ingero." 
2Chronicles15:8 Maze Asa yumvise ayo majambo, ayo mwene Odedi yavugishijwe, arema mu mutima, akūrah’ ibizira vy’ubuyobe mu gihugu cose c’i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini, no mu bisagara yihesheje umuheto vyo mu mugamba w’ Abefurayimu; yongera guhagarika igicaniro cār’ imbere y’urubaraza rw’ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles15:9 Bukeye akoranya Abayuda n’Ababenyamini bose, n’abaje kuba muri bo bavuye mu Befurayimu no mu Bamanase no mu Basimeyoni; kuko benshi bamucikiye bavuye i Bgisirayeli, babonye yuk’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe ari kumwe na we." 
2Chronicles15:10 Nuko bakoranira i Yerusalemu mu kwezi kwa gatatu kwo mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatanu Asa ari ku ngoma. 
2Chronicles15:11 Kur’ uwo musi baha Uhoraho ibimazi, inka amajana ndwi n’intama ibihumbi ndwi, babikūye ku minyago bāzanye." 
2Chronicles15:12 Maze basezerana isezerano ryo kuzokwama barondeza Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza imitima yabo yose n’ubugingo bgabo bgose; 
2Chronicles15:13 kandi yuk’ ūtemeye kurondera Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli azokwicwa, ar’ umuto cank’ umukuru, ar’ umugabo cank’ umugore." 
2Chronicles15:14 Nuko barahira Uhoraho n’ijwi rirenga, bashira urwamo hejuru, bavuza inzumbete n’inzamba." 
2Chronicles15:15 Kand’ Abayuda bose iyo ndahiro irabanezereza, kuko bari barahiye bīvuye inyuma, bakarondera Uhoraho n’umwete wabo wose, bakamubona; maz’ Uhoraho abaha kugira umutēkāno impande zose." 
2Chronicles15:16 Kand’ umwami Asa yirukana inakuru Mayaka mu bugabekazi, kuko yabājishije igishushanyo c’ubuyobe ngo kibe Ashera; asitura ubgo buyobe bgiwe, aragisya gihinduka ishingwe, agituririra ku mugezi Kidironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Arikw ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi vy’i Bgisirayeli ntivyākūrwaho; mugabo umutima wa Asa war’ utunganye igihe cose yamaze akiriho. 
2Chronicles15:18 Kandi yinjiza mu ngoro y’ Imana ibintu se yari yaratanze kw inyegu, n’ivyo yatanze kw inyegu na we ubgiwe, amafeza n’amazahabu n’ibintu vy’ibikoreshwa." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ntihasubira kuba iyindi ntambara gushitsa ku mwaka ugira mirongwitatu na gatanu Asa ari ku ngoma. 
2Chronicles16:1 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu na gatandatu Asa ari ku ngoma, Bayasha umwami w’ Abisirayeli atera i Buyuda, yubaka i Rama, ngo yīmīre abaja kwa Asa umwami w’Abayuda, cank’ abavayo." 
2Chronicles16:2 Maze Asa abibonye, yābīra ku mafeza no ku mazahabu yari mu bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho n’ubgo mu ngoro yiwe, ayarungikira Beni‐hadadi umwami w’i Siriya yaba i Damasiko;" 
2Chronicles16:3 amutumako, ut’ Urazi ko mwe na we mufitaniye isezerano, uti Nk’ uko ryamye hagati ya so na se; uti Non’ akurungikiye ifeza n’ izahabu: uti Genda ureke isezerano war’ ufitaniye na Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli, uti Kugira ngw amuvire mu gihugu." 
2Chronicles16:4 Nuko Beni‐hadadi yemerera umwami Asa, agomora abagabisha b’ingabo ziwe ngo baje gutera ibisagara vy’Abisirayeli; nuko batsinda Iyoni n’i Dani n’i Abeli‐mayimu n’ ibisagara vyose vy’ibigega vy’i Bunafutali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Bayasha avyumvise, areka kwubaka i Rama, aheba ivyo yahakorera." 
2Chronicles16:6 Maz’ umwami Asa ahitana Abayuda bose, baja i Rama, bakūray’ amabuye n’ibiti, ivyo Bayasha yarikw arubakisha; maz’ avyubakisha i Geba n’i Misipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ico gihe Hanani kamenyi aza iyo Asa ari, umwami w’i Buyuda, aramubarira, ati Kuko wizigiye umwami w’i Siriya, ntiwizigire Uhoraho Imana yawe, ni co catumye ingabo z’umwami w’i Siriya zigukira." 
2Chronicles16:8 Mbeg’ Abanyetiyopiya n’Abalubimu ntibār’ ingabo nyinshi z’isinzi, zifise imikogote y’intambara n’abagendera ku mafarasi vyinshi cane? Ariko kuko wari wizigiye Uhoraho abagabura mu maboko yawe." 
2Chronicles16:9 Kand’ inyonga z’Uhoraho zinyuranganya mw isi yose hirya no hino, kugira ngo yerekane ububasha bgiwe bgo gutabara abafise imitima imutunganiye. Mu vyo wakoze ivyo, wakoze ivy’ ubupfu; nuk’ uhereye ubu uzohora ubona intambara." 
2Chronicles16:10 Maze Asa ashavurira kamenyi uwo, amushira mw ibohero mu mpatane z’ibiti, kukw iryo jambo ryamuteye kumugirira ubushangashirwe. Ico gihe Asa yagenda acuranguza abantu bamwe‐bamwe." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Asa, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’Abayuda n’ab’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Maz’ ashitse mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’ icenda ari ku ngoma arwara ibirenge, kand’ iyo ndwara imumerera nabi cane; ariko na ho nyene no mu ndwara yiwe ntiyaja kubaza Uhoraho, atar’ ukuja ku bavūzi." 
2Chronicles16:13 Hanyuma Asa ahamvya ba sekuruza, atanga amaze imyaka mirongwine n’umwe ari ku ngoma." 
2Chronicles16:14 Bamuhamba mu mva yiwe yiyimbishirije mu gisagara ca Dawidi, bamurambika ku buriri bguzuye ibintu bitāmirana n’ ibintu bimoga vy’amoko yose, vyinjijwe n’abahinga bābimogoreye; bamwosereza imibavu myinshi cane." 
2Chronicles17:1 Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoshafati asubira ku ngoma yiwe; araheza yīgira agahambaye, arindana n’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Ashira ingabo mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda bizitiriwe inzitiro z’amabuye, akwiragiza amaboma mu gihugu c’i Buyuda no mu bisagara vy’i Bgefurayimu, ivyo se Asa yihesheje umuheto." 
2Chronicles17:3 Uhoraho abana na Yehoshafati, kuko yagendera mu ngeso sekuruza Dawidi yagendeyemwo uhereye ubga mbere, ntaje gusiguza za Bayali," 
2Chronicles17:4 arikw agasiguza Imana ya sekuruza, akagendera mu vyagezwe vyayo, ntāgendere mu ngeso z’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ni co catumye Uhoraho akomeza ingoma yiwe; Abayuda bose bamuzanira imishikīro; agira ubutunzi bginshi n’icubahiro gihambaye. 
2Chronicles17:6 Umutima wiwe ugenda ushira ubgoba mu nzira z’Uhoraho, akūra mu Buyuda ibitabo vyatabge mu mpinga z’imisozi n’inkingi zashingiwe Ashera." 
2Chronicles17:7 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatatu ari ku ngoma arungika abaganwa biwe Beni‐hayili na Obadiya na Zekariya na Netaneli na Mikaya kuja kwigisha mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda; 
2Chronicles17:8 kandi hamwe na bo arungika n’Abalewi, Shemaya na Netaniya na Zebadiya, na Asaheli na Shemiramoti na Yehonatani, na Adoniya na Tobiya na Tobadoniya; kandi hamwe n’abo Balewi arungika n’abaherezi Elishama na Yehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Abo baragenda bigisha i Buyuda, bafise igitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho; bagendagenda mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda bigisha abantu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Maz’ ubgoba buvuye k’Uhoraho bufata abami bo mu bihugu vyose bikikije i Buyuda, ntibāruha bubahuka gutera Yehoshafati." 
2Chronicles17:11 Mbere bamwe bo mu Bafilisitiya bamuzanira ingorore, n’amafeza kw amarari; n’Abarabo na bo bamuzanira imikuku y’ingorore, amapfizi y’intama ibihumbi ndwi n’amajana ndwi, n’amapfizi y’ impene ibihumbi ndwi n’amajana ndwi nyene." 
2Chronicles17:12 Nuko Yehoshafati agenda arushiriza kuba agahambaye; yubaka i Buyuda amaboma n’ibisagara vy’ibigega; 
2Chronicles17:13 yar’ afise vyinshi yabītse mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, kand’ i Yerusalemu yar’ ahafise ingabo z’abantu b’abahizi." 
2Chronicles17:14 Iki ni co gitigiri cabo, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari: mu bāgaba ibihumbi mu Bayuda, uwa mbere yari Aduna, yagaba abantu b’abahizi ibihumbi amajana atatu;" 
2Chronicles17:15 uwamukurikira ni Yehohanani, na we yagaba ibihumbi amajana abiri na mirongumunani," 
2Chronicles17:16 uwakurikira uwo ni Amasiya mwene Zikuri, umuntu yitanze, yiyeguriye Uhoraho; uwo yagaba abahizi ibihumbi amajana abiri." 
2Chronicles17:17 Mu Babenyamini uwa mbere ni Eliyada, umuntu w’umuhizi; yagaba ibihumbi amajana abiri nyene, abantu bitwaje imiheto n’inkinzo;" 
2Chronicles17:18 uwamukurikira ni Yehozabadi, na we yagaba ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani, bitwaje ibirwanishwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 Abo ni bo bāsasa ku mwami, ukūye abo umwami yashize mu bisagara bizitiriwe inzitiro hose mu Buyuda." 
2Chronicles18:1 Nuko Yehoshafati yar’ afise ubutunzi bginshi n’icubahiro gihambaye. Bukeye bashingirana na Ahabu. 
2Chronicles18:2 Hashize imyaka aramanuka aja kuramutsa Ahabu i Samariya. Maze Ahabu abāgira Yehoshafati n’abari kumwe na we intama n’inka nyinshi cane; araheza aramukubakuba ngo batabarane gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi. 
2Chronicles18:3 Nuko Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli abaza Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda, ati Mbega wokwemera kuntabara, ukajana natwe i Ramoti‐gileyadi? Aramwishura, at’ Ego cane, jewe nd’ umwe nawe, n’abantu banje ni bo b’iwawe: nzogutabara mur’ iyo ntambara." 
2Chronicles18:4 Maze Yehoshafati abarira umwami w’Abisirayeli, at’ Enda se banza usiguze ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles18:5 Nuk’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli akoranya ba kamenyi, bār’ abantu amajana ane; arababaza, ati Mbega tuje gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi, canke dusigeho? Baramwishura, bati Dūga uhatere, kuk’ Uhoraho azohagabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi." 
2Chronicles18:6 Ariko Yehoshafati arabaza, ati Mbeg’ uretse aba, nta muntu avugishwa n’Uhoraho yobaho ngo tumusiguze?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Umwami w’Abisirayeli yishura Yehoshafati, ati Haracasigaye umuntu umwe twoshobora kubaza, akadusiguriza Uhoraho; ariko ndamwanka, kukw ata ho avugishwa ivyiza kuri jewe, atar’ ivyago; yitwa Mikaya mwene Imula. Yehoshafati aramubarira, ati Sigaho mugenzi, nta co uvuga urtyo!" 
2Chronicles18:8 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli ahamagara umuntu w’inkone, aramubarira, ati Genda unyaruka uzane Mikaya mwene Imula." 
2Chronicles18:9 Kand’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda bari bavyagiye ku ntebe zabo z’ ubgami, bambaye imyambaro yabo y’ubgami, bari ku nama kw ishikiro ry’ikirimba c’i Samariya; ba kamenyi bose bavugishirizwa imbere yabo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Maze Zedekiya mwene Kenayana yicurishiriza amahembe y’ivyuma, aravuga, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Aya mahembe ni yo uzokwirukanisha Abasiriya gushitsa baherengeteye." 
2Chronicles18:11 N’abandi ba kamenyi bose bavugishwa bartyo, bati Dūga utere i Ramoti‐gileyadi, bizokubera ko, kuk’ Uhoraho azohagabura mu maboko yawe, mugenzi."
