2Chronicles18:12 Maz’ intumwa yari yagiye guhamagara Mikaya iramubarira, it’ Abavugishwa bose bahūrije hamwe gusigurira umwami ivyiza; none rero nawe amajambo yawe n’abe nk’ayabo, uvuge ivyiza." 
2Chronicles18:13 Mikaya aramwishura, ati Ndakurahiye uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, ico Imana imbarira cose ni co nja kuvuga." 
2Chronicles18:14 Nukw arengutse imbere y’umwami, umwami aramubaza, ati Mikaya, tuje gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi, canke dusigeho? Aramwishura, ati Ni mudūge mutere, bizobabera ko, kandi bazogaburwa mu maboko yanyu!" 
2Chronicles18:15 Umwami aramubarira, at’ Aho nakurahirije nzogeza ryari, kugira ngo ntugire ico umbarira kitar’ ic’ ukuri mw izina ry’ Uhoraho?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Aramwishura, ati Mbonye Abisirayeli bose basābagiye ku misozi nk’intama zitagira umwungere; kand’ Uhoraho agize ngo Bariya n’abatagira shebuja; ni basubire i wabo, umuntu wese yīgīre amahoro." 
2Chronicles18:17 Umwami w’Abisirayeli abarira Yehoshafati, ati Sinakubariye kw atogira ivyiza avugishwa kuri jewe, atar’ ibibi?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya arongera, ati None rero ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: mbonye Uhoraho avyagiye ku ntebe yiwe, ingabo zose zo mw ijuru zimuhagaze i buryo n’i bumoso." 
2Chronicles18:19 Maz’ Uhoraho arabaza, ati Ni nde yogenda kwosha Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli, ngw adūge i Ramoti‐gileyadi, agweyo? Nuk’ umwe aravuga, ashira ukwiwe, uwundi ukwiwe." 
2Chronicles18:20 Hanyuma haza impwemu, ihagarara imbere y’ Uhoraho, iravuga, iti Jewe ndamwosha. Uhoraho arayibaza, at’ Uja kumwosha ute?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Na yo iti Ndagenda nihindure impwemu y’ibinyoma mu kanwa ka ba kamenyi biwe bose. Na we arayishura, ati Nuk’ uramwosha, kand’ uzobishobora; genda ugire urtyo." 
2Chronicles18:22 Nuko non’ ehe rāba, Uhoraho ashize impwemu y’ibinyoma mu kanwa k’aba ba kamenyi bawe bose; kand’ akugeneye ivyago." 
2Chronicles18:23 Maze Zedekiya mwene Kenayana yēgēra Mikaya amukubita urushi, aramubaza, at’ Iyo mpwemu y’Uhoraho yaciye hehe mu kuva muri jewe iza kuvugana nawe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya aramwishura, at’ Uzoba urabimenya ku musi uzokwitera haruguru mu mpete winyegeza." 
2Chronicles18:25 Maz’ umwami w’ Abisirayeli aravuga, ati Ni mufate Mikaya, mumushīre Amoni umukuru w’umurwa, na Yowasi umwana wanje," 
2Chronicles18:26 mut’ Umwami agize ng’ Uru rugabo murushire mw ibohero, murugaburire ivyo kurya n’amazi vy’intica ntīkize, uti Kugeza ah’ azotabarukira amahoro." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya aravuga, ati Ni waramuka utabarutse amahoro, Uhoraho azoba atamvugishije. Arongera ati Mwa bantu mwese, muraba muvyumvise!" 
2Chronicles18:28 Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli na Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda baradūga, baja gutera i Ramoti‐gileyadi." 
2Chronicles18:29 Maz’ umwami w’Abisirayeli abarira Yehoshafati, ati Ngiye kwiyoberanya, nje mu rugamba; ariko weho ni wambare imyambaro yawe y’ubgami. Nuk’ umwami w’Abisirayeli ariyoberanya; baraheza baja mu rugamba." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kand’ umwami w’i Siriya yari yabariye abagabisha b’ imikogote yiwe y’intambara, ati Ntimutumbere kurasa abandi, ar’ aboroshe cank’ abahambaye, atar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli wenyene." 
2Chronicles18:31 Nukw abo bagabisha b’imikogote y’intambara babonye Yehoshafati, baravuga, bati Nguriya umwami w’Abisirayeli! Nuko barakebānuka, batumbera we; ariko Yehoshafati atura ubuku, maz’ Uhoraho Imana aramutabara, abatera kumuvako." 
2Chronicles18:32 Maz’ abo bagabisha b’imikogote babonye kw atar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli, barahindukira bareka kumwirukana." 
2Chronicles18:33 Maz’ umuntu umwe wo mu rugamba apfa kurasa, agema umwami w’Abisirayeli ah’ ivyuma bimukingīra bihūrira; aca abarira ūtumbereza umukogote wiwe, ati Hindukiza, unkūre mu rugamba, kuko nkomeretse bibi." 
2Chronicles18:34 Uwo musi intambara irushiriza kuba ihambaye; umwami apfa kwinanata akomeza guhagarara mu mukogote wiwe, ahangana n’Abasiriya gushitsa ku mugoroba; maze nko ku karengazuba aratanga." 
2Chronicles19:1 Bukeye Yehoshafati umwami w’Abayuda atabaruka amahoro, asubira i we i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles19:2 Maze Yehu mwene Hanani kamenyi aja kumusanganira; abaza umwami Yehoshafati, at’ Aho war’ ukwiye gutabara abanyakibi, ugakunda abanka Uhoraho? Kubg’ ivyo wikwegeye uburake bg’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles19:3 Mugabo harih’ ivyiza bimwe bikubonekako, kuko wakūye mu gihugu inkingi zāshingiwe Ashera, ugashira umutima ku kurondera Imana." 
2Chronicles19:4 Nuko Yehoshafati aguma i Yerusalemu. Bukeye asubira kugendagenda mu bantu biwe, ahēra i Beri‐sheba ashitsa mu mugamba w’Abefurayimu, abagarukana k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles19:5 Ashira abacamanza mu gihugu, abakwiragiza mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda bizitiriwe inzitiro iyo biva bikagera." 
2Chronicles19:6 Abgira abo bacamanza, ati Mumenye ivyo mukora, kuko mu guca imanza atar’ abantu mukorera, ariko n’ Uhoraho; kandi ni we ari kumwe namwe mu manza." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ariko mugende mwubaha Uhoraho, mwiyubare mu vyo mukora; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ata kugabitanya kuri muri we, canke gutinya ijunja ry’umuntu, canke kurya ingurire." 
2Chronicles19:8 Maze basubiye i Yerusalemu, Yehoshafati ahashira bamwe mu Balewi n’abaherezi n’abakuru bo mu mazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abisirayeli, ngo babe abo guca imanza mw izina ry’Uhoraho no gutātūra abantu mu vyo bapfa." 
2Chronicles19:9 Maz’ arababgira, ati Muze mugenze murtyo, mwubashe Uhoraho, mur’ abizigirwa, mufise imitima itunganye." 
2Chronicles19:10 Kandi bagenzi banyu baba mu bisagara vyabo, ni babagīsha inama zikoma ku vy’uwishe uwundi, canke ku vyagezwe canke ku mabgirizwa canke ku vyashinzwe canke ku matēka, muze mubereke uko bakwiye kubigenza, kugira ngo ntibaze bacumure k’ Uhoraho, mukīhamagarira uburake, mwe n’abo bagenzi banyu. Nuko muze mugenze murtyo, kugira ngo ntimucumure." 
2Chronicles19:11 Mu manza zose zikoma ku vy’Uhoraho, Amariya umuherezi mukuru ni we azoba kamaramagambo muri mwebge, na zo mu manza zose zikoma ku vy’igihugu, kamaramagambo ni Zebadiya mwene Ishimayeli, umukuru wo mu muryango wa Yuda; kand’ Abalewi bazoba abashingantahe banyu. Nuko ni mukovye, mukore, kand’ Uhoraho az’ abane n’ūca iziroranye." 
2Chronicles20:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Abanyamowabu n’Abamoni hamwe n’ab’i Mayoni bamwe batera Yehoshafati ngo bamurwanye. 
2Chronicles20:2 Maze haza imbūri zibarira Yehoshafati, zit’ Uratewe! Haje ingabo nyinshi z’isinzi zivuye i Siriya hakurya y’ikiyaga; kand’ ubu zigeze i Hasasoni‐tamari (ari ho Eni‐gedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yehoshafati agira ubgoba, aca agira umwete wo kurondera Uhoraho, ashinga umusi wo kwisonzesha mu Buyuda hose." 
2Chronicles20:4 Maz’ Abayuda bose bakoranira hamwe ngo basabe Uhoraho abatabare; nuko bava mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda bazanywe no kurondera Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles20:5 Maze Yehoshafati ahagarara mw ikoraniro ry’Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu aho nyene ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, ahahanganye n’urugo rusha;" 
2Chronicles20:6 arasenga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho, Mana ya ba sogokuruza, none si wewe Mana yo mw ijuru? Kandi si wewe ugaba abami bose b’abanyamahanga? Mu kuboko kwawe harimw’ ububasha n’inkomezi, bituma ata woguhagarara imbere." 
2Chronicles20:7 None ga Mana yacu, si wewe wirukanye abāba mur’ iki gihugu imbere y’abantu bawe b’ Abisirayeli, ukagiha uruvyaro rwa Aburahamu umukunzi wawe ibihe vyose?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Bakakibamwo, bakakikwubakiramw’ ingoro y’izina ryawe, bagasenga," 
2Chronicles20:9 bat’ Ivyago ni vyadutera, ar’ inkota cank’ igihano cank’ ikīza cank’ inzara, tuzoza duhagarare imbere y’iyi ngoro, n’imbere yawe, kukw izina ryawe riri mur’ iyi ngoro, tugutakambire nk’uko tuzoba tumerewe nabi, nawe uzokwumva, udutabare." 
2Chronicles20:10 Nuko none, ehe rāba Abamoni n’Abanyamowabu n’abo ku musozi Seyiri, abo wari warabujije Abisirayeli ngo ntibabatere, hamwe bāva mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bagaca hirya ntibabarandure," 
2Chronicles20:11 none rāba ivyo batwishuye: baje kutwirukana mw ishamvu yawe, iyo waduhaye ngo tuyegukire." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ewe Mana yacu, mbega none ntiwobacirakw itēka? Kukw ata nkomezi dufise zo kurwanya ico gitero kingana girtyo kije kudutera, kandi turabuze ico twokora; ariko ni wewe duhanze amaso." 
2Chronicles20:13 Nukw Abayuda bose bahagarara ngaho imbere y’Uhoraho, bari kumwe n’utwana twabo duto‐duto, n’abagore babo, n’abana babo bakuze." 
2Chronicles20:14 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aza kuri Yahaziyeli mwene Zekariya, Zekariya wa Benaya, Benaya wa Yeyeli, Yeyeli wa Mataniya, Umulewi, umwe wo mu ba Asafu; amuzakw aho yar’ ari hagati mur’ iryo koraniro;" 
2Chronicles20:15 aravuga, ati Ni mutege amatwi, yemwe Bayuda mwese, namwe ababa i Yerusalemu, nawe Mwami Yehoshafati: uku ni k’Uhoraho agize: ati Nta co mutinya, canke ngo muranduke imitima kubg’ ayo masinzi y’ingabo; kukw intambara atar’ iyanyu, ariko n’iy’ Imana." 
2Chronicles20:16 Ejo muze mumanuke mubatege; rāba ubu bariko baradūga akadūgo k’i Sisi, muzobasanga ah’ ikiyaya giherera, aharābana n’ubugaragwa bg’i Yeruweli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Mur’ iyo ntambara ntimuzorinda kurwana, ariko muze mutonde urugamba, mwihagararire gusa, murābe agakiza Uhoraho azobakirisha, yemwe Bayuda namwe b’i Yerusalemu. Ntimuze mutinye, canke ngo muranduke imitima: ejo muze muje kubatega, kuk’ Uhoraho azoba ari kumwe namwe." 
2Chronicles20:18 Maze Yehoshafati yunamika amaso, akubita inkoro hasi, n’ Abayuda bose n’ababa i Yerusalemu barūnama bashika hasi imbere y’Uhoraho, baramusenga." 
2Chronicles20:19 Maz’ Abalewi bo mu ba Kohati n’abo mu ba Kora bava hasi ngo batāzīre Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli, bavuga n’ijwi rirenga cane." 
2Chronicles20:20 Bukeye bgaho barazinduka, bafata inzira ngo baje mu bugaragwa bg’i Tekowa; bagitangura kugenda, Yehoshafati ahagarara ngaho, aravuga, ati Ni muntege amatwi, yemwe Bayuda, namwe ababa i Yerusalemu; mwizere Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mubone gushikama; mwizere n’abavugishwa na we, mubone gutsinda." 
2Chronicles20:21 Nukw amaze kuja inama n’ abantu, ashirahw abo kuririmbira Uhoraho no kumutāzīra, bashazishije ukwera, kugira ngo bagende bītangiye imbere y’ingabo, baririmbe, bati Ni mushime Uhoraho, kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
2Chronicles20:22 Nuko bagitangura kuririmba no gutāzīra, Uhoraho ashirah’ abo guca igico abāri baje gutera i Buyuda, ari bo Bamoni n’ Abanyamowabu n’abāvuye ku musozi Seyiri, baca basubiranamwo." 
2Chronicles20:23 Kukw Abamoni n’ Abanyamowabu baciye bahindukirana abāvuye ku musozi Seyiri, kugira ngo babice, babageseze; nuko bamaze guherengeteza abo Banyaseyiri, bīsubiraniramw’ ubgabo, umuntu wese na mugenzi we bashirako baricana." 
2Chronicles20:24 Hanyuma Abayuda bashitse ku munara wo gushibamako wo mu bugaragwa, bagize ngo bararāba ayo masinzi y’ingabo, basanga n’imirambararo hasi, ata warushe akira n’umwe." 
2Chronicles20:25 Maze Yehoshafati n’ingabo ziwe bagiye ngo bīsahurire isahu, bahasanga ibigenda vy’ibitayega, n’ibintu vyinshi, n’impuzu, n’utugenegene tw’ igiciro; nuko bamaze kubakoba, bibananira kubitwara kuko vyari vyinshi; bamara imisi itatu bīsahurira isahu, kuko vyar’ isinzi." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ku musi ugira kane bakoranira mu kiyaya c’i Beraka, bahashimira Uhoraho; ni co catumye aho hantu hitwa Ikiyaya c’i Beraka gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
2Chronicles20:27 Nuko baratabaruka, Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu bose, Yehoshafati abakāmagiye imbere, basubira i Yerusalemu banezerewe, kuk’ Uhoraho yabahaye kwibonera abansi babo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Nuko bashika i Yerusalemu bavuza amakembe n’ inanga n’inzumbete, bashika ku ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles20:29 Maz’ ubgoba buvuye ku Mana bufata abami bo mu bihugu vyose, bumvise yuk’ Uhoraho yarwanije abansi b’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nukw igihugu ca Yehoshafati kigira impore, kukw Imana yiwe yar’ imuhaye umutēkāno impande zose." 
2Chronicles20:31 Uko ni ko Yehoshafati yaganje i Buyuda; aho yatangura kwima yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’itanu; araheza amara ku ngoma imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Azuba umukobga wa Shiluhi. 
2Chronicles20:32 Kandi yagendera mu ngeso za se Asa; ntiyatirimuka ngw azivemwo, ariko yagenda akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza." 
2Chronicles20:33 Mugabo ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi vyo ntivyākūrwaho; kand’ abantu ntibāribgahereze imitima ku Mana ya ba sekuruza. 
2Chronicles20:34 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoshafati, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’ imperēra, vyanditswe mu vyo Yehu mwene Hanani yadonze, vyashizwe mu gitabo c’abami b’ Abayuda." 
2Chronicles20:35 Hanyuma y’ivyo Yehoshafati umwami w’i Buyuda yifatanya na Ahaziya umwami w’Abisirayeli; Ahaziya uwo yar’ umunyangeso mbi cane. 
2Chronicles20:36 Nukw afatanya na we kubāzisha amāto yo kuja i Tarushishi; babāzira ayo māto i Eziyoni‐geberi. 
2Chronicles20:37 Maze Eliyezeri mwene Dodavahu w’i Maresha abarira Yehoshafati avugishijwe n’Imana, ati Ko wifatanije na Ahaziya, Uhoraho akwiciye ivyo wabājishije. Nukw ayo māto aramenagurika, ntiyaba akija i Tarushishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Maze Yehoshafati ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga hamwe na bo ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoramu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles21:2 Kandi Yehoramu yar’ afise barumuna biwe, abahungu ba Yehoshafati, Azariya na Yehiyeli na Zekariya na Azariyahu na Mikayeli na Shefatiya; abo bose bār’ abahungu ba Yehoshafati, umwami w’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles21:3 Se abaraga ibiragwa bikomeye, amafeza n’amazahabu n’ibindi bintu vy’igiciro, bo n’ibisagara vy’i Buyuda bizitiriwe inzitiro z’amabuye; ariko Yehoramu aba ari we araga ubgami, kukw ari we mfura yiwe." 
2Chronicles21:4 Maze Yehoramu asubiye ku ngoma ya se, amaze kwigira agakomeye, yicisha inkota abo barumuna biwe bose, bo n’abaganwa bamwe‐bamwe b’i Buyuda." 
2Chronicles21:5 Kandi Yehoramu, aho yatangura kwima, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ibiri; araheza amara imyaka munani i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma." 
2Chronicles21:6 Ariko yagendera mu ngeso z’abami b’Abisirayeli, nk’ukw ab’ inzu ya Ahabu bākora, kuko yari yābiriye umukobga wa Ahabu; nukw akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi." 
2Chronicles21:7 Mugabo Uhoraho yanka guhonnya inzu ya Dawidi, kubg’ isezerano yari yasezeranye na Dawidi kw azomuha itara rizokwama ryaka mu ruvyaro rwiwe ibihe vyose." 
2Chronicles21:8 Ku ngoma yiwe ni ho Abanyedomu bāgararije Abayuda, biyimikira uwabo mwami." 
2Chronicles21:9 Maze Yehoramu aca ajabukana n’abagabisha biwe b’ingabo n’imikogote yiwe yose y’intambara; maz’ Abanyedomu bamutaye hagati, ahenga mw ijoro, bo n’abagabisha b’imikogote yiwe, bīcīra inzira mur’ abo Banyedomu." 
2Chronicles21:10 Uko ni kw Abanyedomu bīkūye ku Bayuda gushitsa na bugingo n’ ubu. Ico gihe ab’i Libuna na bo baramugarariza, bamwīkūrako, kuko yar’ aretse Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles21:11 Kandi Yehoramu ataba ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi y’i Buyuda, akwegera ababa i Yerusalemu ngo bahurumbire mu bumaka, azimiza Abayuda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Bukeye aronka icete kivuye k’uwavugishwa n’Imana Eliya, kivuga, ng’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho, Imana ya sogokuruza Dawidi, agize: ngo K’utāgendanye ingeso nziza za so Yehoshafati, canke za Asa umwami w’ Abayuda;" 
2Chronicles21:13 ngw Arik’ ukagendana iz’ abami b’Abisirayeli, ugakwegera Abayuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu ngo bahurumbire mu bumaka, ngo Nk’ukw ab’ inzu ya Ahabu bākoze; ngo Kand’ ukica barumuna bawe, ari bo nyene b’inzu ya so bākurusha ingeso nziza;" 
2Chronicles21:14 ngo Rāba Uhoraho ngw Azotēza abantu bawe ivyago bikomeye, bo n’abana bawe n’ abamikazi bawe n’ivy’ ufise vyose;" 
2Chronicles21:15 ngo Kandi nawe uzorwara indwara ikomeye mu mara, ngo Kand’ izogenda ikura uko bukeye, gushitsa ah’ amara yawe azoruha akavyagira, akuvuye mu nda." 
2Chronicles21:16 Bukeye Uhoraho ahagurukiriza Yehoramu Abafilisitiya bo n’ Abarabo bahereranye n’Abanyetiyopiya; 
2Chronicles21:17 batera i Buyuda, barahadwēbēra, basahura ibintu vyose vyari mu ngoro y’umwami, bajana n’abahungu biwe ar’ inyagano, bo n’abamikazi biwe; ntibamusigarana umwana w’umuhungu n’umwe, atari Yehowahazi umuhererezi wiwe." 
2Chronicles21:18 Hanyuma y’ivyo vyose Uhoraho amutēza indwara mu mara idashobora kuvūrwa. 
2Chronicles21:19 Maz’ igihe kiragera, imyaka ibiri ihise, indwara yiwe ituma amara avyagira, amuva mu nda, apfa yībōnye. Arikw abantu biwe ntibamwosereza imibavu nk’ uko bābigenza kuri ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles21:20 Aho yatangura kwima, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwitatu n’ ibiri, araheza amara imyaka munani i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma; atāmbūra ata wukimugomba. Bamuhamba ku murwa wa Dawidi, ariko si mu mva z’abandi bami." 
2Chronicles22:1 Maz’ ababa i Yerusalemu bimika Ahaziya umuhererezi wiwe ngw asubire ku ngoma yiwe, kuko ca gitero cari kizananye n’ Abarabo mu rugamba cari cishe bakuru biwe bose. Nuko Ahaziya mwene Yehoramu umwami w’ Abayuda aba ari we yima." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya aho yatangura kwima, yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwine n’ ibiri; araheza amara umwaka umwe i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Ataliya, umwuzukuru wa Omuri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Na we yagendera mu ngeso z’ab’ inzu ya Ahabu, kuko nyina yamugīra inama zo gukora ivyaha." 
2Chronicles22:4 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ ukw ab’ inzu ya Ahabu nyene bāgenda bakora, kukw ari bo basigaye ar’ abajanama biwe se amaze gutanga, bakamukwegera mu rupfu." 
2Chronicles22:5 Nuko yemera inama zabo, atabara Yoramu mwene Ahabu umwami w’Abisirayeli, baja gutera Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya i Ramoti‐gileyadi; maz’ Abasiriya bakomeretsa Yoramu." 
2Chronicles22:6 Nukw aratabaruka, aja i Yezireli kugira ngw arwarirey’ izo nguma bāmukomerekereje i Rama, igihe yarwanya Hazayeli umwami w’i Siriya. Bukeye Ahaziya mwene Yehoramu umwami w’i Buyuda, amanuka i Yezireli kurāba Yoramu mwene Ahabu ukw ameze, kuko yar’ arwaye." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kandi Ahaziya kuja kurāba Yoramu vyari bivuye ku Mana, kugira ngw agweyo; kukw ashitseyo yajanye na Yoramu kuja guhūra na Yehu mwene Nimushi, uwo Uhoraho yari yimikishije amavuta, kugira ngw ahenebereze inzu ya Ahabu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Maz’ igihe Yehu yarikw arashitsa itēka ryāciriwe inzu ya Ahabu, asanga abaganwa b’i Buyuda bājeho, n’abahungwabo ba Ahaziya bāmugendako, arabica." 
2Chronicles22:9 Maz’ arondera Ahaziya, bamufatira aho yari yinyegeje i Samariya, bamushīra Yehu, baramwica; baraheza baramuhamba, kuko bāvuga, bati N’ umwuzukuru wa Yehoshafati yarondeza Uhoraho umutima wiwe wose. Maze mu nzu ya Ahaziya ntihāsigaramwo ūshoboye kuganza." 
2Chronicles22:10 Maze Ataliya nyina wa Ahaziya abonye k’umwana wiwe Ahaziya apfuye, arahaguruka ageseza abo mu nda y’ingoma y’i Buyuda bose." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ariko Yehoshabeyati umukobga w’umwami afata Yowasi mwene Ahaziya, amukūra mu bana b’umwami bariko baricwa, amushira mu cumba kibīkwamw’ amariri, hamwe n’umurezi wiwe. Uko ni ko Yehoshabeyati, umukobga w’umwami Yehoramu, muka Yehoyada umuherezi, mushiki wa Ahaziya, yamunyegeje Ataliya, kugira ngo ntamwice." 
2Chronicles22:12 Maz’ amarana na bo imyaka itandatu, anyegejwe mu ngoro y’ Imana; Ataliya na we aba ari we aganza igihugu." 
2Chronicles23:1 Mu mwaka ugira indwi, Yehoyada arashikama, asezerana isezerano n’abagabisha bagaba amajana, ni bo aba: Azariya mwene Yerohamu, na Ishimayeli mwene Yehohanani, na Azariya mwene Obedi, na Mayaseya mwene Adaya, na Elishafati mwene Zikuri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Bagendūra Ubuyuda, bakoranya Abalewi babakūye mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda, hamwe n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abisirayeli, baza i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles23:3 Nukw iryo koraniro ryose risezerana isezerano n’umwami, bari mu ngoro y’Imana. Yehoyada arababarira, at’ Eh’ umwana w’umwami azoganza, bibe nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze ku ruvyaro rwa Dawidi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Kand’ uko mukwiye kubigenza n’uku: aho muzozira kw isabato ku rubu rwanyu, ikigiragatatu canyu c’ abaherezi n’Abalewi kize gishibame ku miryango;" 
2Chronicles23:5 ikindi kigiragatatu kize gishibame ku ngoro y’umwami; ikindi kigiragatatu kize gishibame ku kirimba citwa Yesodi; abandi bantu bose baze babe mu ntangāro y’ingoro y’ Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles23:6 Ariko ntihaze hagire uwinjira mur’ iyo ngoro atar’ abaherezi n’abo mu Balewi baramukiwe gukorerayo; abo bo baze binjire kuko bejejwe; arikw abantu bose baze bitondere ivyo Uhoraho yageze. 
2Chronicles23:7 Abalewi baze bakikize umwami impande zose, umuntu wese afise ibirwanishwa mu ntoke; ūzopfa kwinjira mur’ iyo ngoro, aze yicwe; kandi muze mugume ku mwami uko yinjiye n’ukw asohotse." 
2Chronicles23:8 Nukw Abalewi n’Abayuda bose babigenza nk’uk’ uwo muherezi Yehoyada yageze kwose; umuntu wese azana abo kuja ku mbu zabo kw isabato, bahitana n’abari bazirangije kur’ iyo sabato nyene, kuk’ uwo muherezi Yehoyada atārekuye abāri barangije imbu zabo." 
2Chronicles23:9 Nuk’ uwo muherezi Yehoyada aha abagabisha bagaba amajana amacumu n’inkinzo nto‐nto na nini‐nini vyar’ ivy’ umwami Dawidi, bikabīkwa mu ngoro y’Imana." 
2Chronicles23:10 Nukw atondesha abantu bose kur’ iyo ngoro, uhereye ku ruhande rw’i buryo ugashitsa ku rw’i bumoso, bakīkūza igicaniro n’iyo ngoro ah’ umwami ari, impande zose, umuntu wese afise ibirwanishwa mu ntoke." 
2Chronicles23:11 Maze basohokana uwo mwana w’umwami, bamwambika igitsibo c’ubgami, bamuha n’Ibishinga intahe, bamugira umwami. Yehoyada n’abahungu biwe bamwimikisha amavuta, baravuga, bat’ Umwami n’ ahangame!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Maze Ataliya yumvise urwamo rw’abantu biruka batāzīra umwami, aza ah’ abantu bari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles23:13 Yitegereje abona umwami ahagararanye n’ inkingi mu muryango, n’abagabisha n’abavuza inzumbete bamuhagaze i ruhande, n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu banezerewe bavuza inzumbete; abaririmvyi na bo bāriko baravuza ibintu bivuga, batera indirimbo z’amatāzīrano. Ataliya araheza yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, aravuga, ati N’ umugararizo! N’umugararizo!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Maz’ umuherezi Yehoyada abarira abagabisha bagaba amajana, bashiriweho kugaba ingabo zose, ati Ni mumusohore, mumucishe hagati y’imirongo y’ingabo, kandi ni hagira ūmukurikira ni yicishwe inkota; kuk’ uwo muherezi yar’ avuze, ngo Ntimumutsinde mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles23:15 Nuko baramukīnjūrira, ajana inzira ishika kw irembo ry’amafarasi rija mu rugo rw’umwami; bamwiciraho." 
2Chronicles23:16 Maze Yehoyada ashinga isezerano hagati yiwe n’abantu bose n’umwami, ngo babe abantu b’ Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles23:17 Abantu bose baca bagenda ku ngoro ya Bayali, barayisangangura, bamenagura n’ibicaniro vyayo n’ibishushanyo vyayo, kandi Matani umuherezi wa Bayali bamwicira imbere y’ibicaniro." 
2Chronicles23:18 Maze Yehoyada ashirah’ abateramyi bo guteramira ingoro y’Uhoraho, bakarābga n’abaherezi n’Abalewi, abo Dawidi yashinze ko baba mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ngo bosereze Uhoraho ibimazi, nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose, bavyose banezerewe baririmba, nk’uko Dawidi yabishinze nyene." 
2Chronicles23:19 Ashiraho n’abashibamyi bo ku birimba vy’urugo rw’ ingoro y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo ntihaze hagire umuntu ahumanye ku kintu na kimwe abicamwo." 
2Chronicles23:20 Ajana ba bagabisha bagaba amajana, n’abaganwa, n’abagaba abantu, n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu; basohokana umwami mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, baramumanukana, bajana inzira ica mu kirimba co haruguru, bamushikana mu ngoro i bgami; baraheza bamushira ku ntebe y’ubgami." 
2Chronicles23:21 Maz’ abantu bose bo mu gihugu baranezerwa, haba umutēkāno ku murwa. Uko ni ko bicishije Ataliya inkota." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yowasi yar’ amaze imyaka ndwi igihe yaja ku ngoma; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwine i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Sibiya w’i Beri‐sheba. 
2Chronicles24:2 Yowasi akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza igihe cose Yehoyada umuherezi yabayeho. 
2Chronicles24:3 Yehoyada amuronkera abamikazi babiri, bavyarana abana b’abahungu n’abakobga." 
2Chronicles24:4 Hanyuma y’ivyo Yowasi agira imigabo yo gusanisha ingoro y’ Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles24:5 Akoranya abaherezi n’Abalewi, arababarira, ati Ni mugende muje mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, mukoranye amahera mu Bisirayeli bose yo kuzogenda asanisha ingoro y’Imana yanyu uk’ umwaka utashe; kandi mubigirire umwete wo kubinyarutsa. Arikw abo Balewi ntibābinyarutsa." 
2Chronicles24:6 Bukeye umwami ahamagaza umuherezi mukuru Yehoyada, aramubaza, ati N’iki cakubujije kubgira Abalewi gutoza Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu ikori, iryo Mose umusavyi w’Uhoraho yashingiye ikoraniro ry’Abisirayeli, ngo baritange kubg’ ihema ry’ibonaniro?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Kukw abahungu ba Ataliya, wa mugore mubi, bāri bārahubaguye ingoro y’Imana, kand’ ibintu vyose vyāri vyāragizwe inyegu, vyāri mur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho, babiha za Bayali." 
2Chronicles24:8 Maz’ umwami agera ko babāza isandugu, ngo bayitereke hanze, ku kirimba c’urugo rw’ingoro y’ Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles24:9 Babitāngāza mu Buyuda hose n’i Yerusalemu ngo bazanire Uhoraho ikori, iryo Mose umusavyi w’Imana yashingiye Abisirayeli, igihe bāri mu bugaragwa." 
2Chronicles24:10 Maz’ abaganwa bose n’abantu bose birabanezereza, bararizana, umuntu wese aterera mur’ iyo sandugu, gushitsa barangije." 
2Chronicles24:11 Maz’ Abalewi, iyo babonye ko mur’ iyo sandugu harimw’ amahera menshi, bāca bayizanira ababgiriza b’umwami, maz’ umukarani w’umwami n’umubgiriza n’umuherezi mukuru bakaza, bakayacurānura, iyo sandugu bakayijana, bakayisubiza aho yar’ iri. Uko ni ko bābigenza uko bukeye, bagakoranya amahera menshi cane." 
2Chronicles24:12 Maz’ umwami na Yehoyada bakayaha abāshinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo kur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho; na bo bakarārika abubatsi b’amabuye n’ababāji ngo basane iyo ngoro, bakarārika n’abacuzi b’ivyuma n’ imiringa vyo kuyisana nyene." 
2Chronicles24:13 Nukw abo bakozi barakora, baja imbere mu gikorwa co gusana iyo ngoro y’Imana, basubira kuyihagarika nk’uko yahora, barayikomeza." 
2Chronicles24:14 Bamaze kuyuzuza, bashikiriza umwami na Yehoyada amahera asigaye, na bo bayacurishamwo ivyo gukoresha mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho: ibikoreshwa vy’ubuherezi, n’ivyo gukoresha mu kwosa ibimazi, n’udukombe, n’ibintu vy’ amazahabu n’ivy’ ifeza. Nuko bama bosa ibimazi ubudasība mu ngoro y’Uhoraho igihe cose Yehoyada yamaze akiriho." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ariko Yehoyada aramvye igihe kirekire ashika mu zabukuru, araheza arapfa; yapfuye amaze imyaka ijana na mirongwitatu." 
2Chronicles24:16 Bamuhamba ku murwa wa Dawidi hamwe n’abami, kuko yakoze neza mu Bisirayeli, no ku Mana, no mu vy’ingoro yayo." 
2Chronicles24:17 Hanyuma Yehoyada amaze gupfa, abaganwa b’i Buyuda baraza, bakubita inkoro hasi imbere y’umwami. Maz’ umwami yumviriza ivyabo." 
2Chronicles24:18 Maze baca baheba ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, basaba Ashera n’ ibindi bishushanyo. Uburake bg’ Uhoraho buraheza buza ku Bayuda no ku b’i Yerusalemu kubg’ ico gicumuro cabo." 
2Chronicles24:19 Yamar’ akagenda abarungikira abavugishwa na we bo kubagarukana kuri we, bakāma babāgiriza, ariko bo bakanka kwumva." 
2Chronicles24:20 Maze Mpwemu w’Imana aza kuri Zekariya mwene Yehoyada umuherezi; ahagarara ahataramutse imbere y’abantu, arababarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana agize, ngo N’iki kibateye gucumura ku vyagezwe vyiwe, bikababuza kuroranirwa? Ko mwahevye Uhoraho na we arabahevye." 
2Chronicles24:21 Bamugīra inama, bamwicisha amabuye bivuye ku cagezwe c’umwami, bamutsinda mu nyubakwa yo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles24:22 Uko ni k’umwami Yowasi atibutse ineza Yehoyada se w’uwo Zekariya yamugiriye, akamwicira uwo mwana wiwe nyene. Akirikw arapfa, yaravuze, at’ Uhoraho n’arābe ibi, abihōre." 
2Chronicles24:23 Maz’ uwo mwaka ushize, ingabo z’Abasiriya ziradūga, zitera Yowasi. Bashika i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, bageseza abaganwa bose bo mu gihugu, barabamara, barungikira umwami w’i Damasiko iminyago yose babanyaze." 
2Chronicles24:24 Kand’ izo ngabo z’Abasiriya zaje ar’ igitero gito, arik’ Uhoraho agabura ingabo nyinshi cane z’Abayuda mu maboko yabo, kuko bari bamuhevye, ari we Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza. Nukw Abasiriya bashitsa kuri Yowasi itēka yaciriwe." 
2Chronicles24:25 Hanyuma bahindukiye bamuvuyeko, basize arwaye asinzikaye, abantu bo mu banyarugo biwe bgite baramugarariza, bamutsinda ku kirwa ciwe, arapfa, kubg’ amaraso ya mwene Yehoyada umuherezi yavishije; baraheza bamuhamba ku murwa wa Dawidi, ariko ntibamuhamba mu mva z’ abandi bami." 
2Chronicles24:26 Abāmugararije n’aba: Zabadi umwana wa Shimeyati Umwamonikazi, na Yehozabadi umwana wa Shimuriti Umunyamowabukazi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Nukw ivy’ abahungu biwe, n’imbūri nyinshi yabūriwe, n’ ingene yasanishije ingoro y’Imana, biranditswe mu bidōnda inkuru vyo mu gitabo c’abami. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Amaziya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yaja ku ngoma, amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’icenda i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma; nyina yitwa Yehoyadina w’i Yerusalemu nyene." 
2Chronicles25:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, ariko ntiyabigirana umutima utunganye rwose." 
2Chronicles25:3 Amaze kubona kw ahangamye ku ngoma, yica ba banyarugo bāri barishe umwami se wiwe." 
2Chronicles25:4 Arikw abana babo ntiyabica, abigenza nk’uko vyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyagezwe vya Mose, ivyashinzwe n’Uhoraho ngw Abavyeyi ntibaze bicwe bazize abana babo, kand’ abana ntibaze bicwe bazize abavyeyi: ngw Arik’ umuntu wese az’ azire iciwe caha." 
2Chronicles25:5 Maze Amaziya akoranya Abayuda, abakurikiranya ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, ngo bagabge n’abagaba ibihumbi n’abagaba amajana; abakoranya ar’ Abayuda bose n’Ababenyamini; arabaharūra uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, asanga ar’ ingabo ibihumbi amajana atatu, abantu b’intōre bashobora gutabara mu ntambara, bazi uburyo bgo gutwara amacumu n’ inkinzo." 
2Chronicles25:6 Arārika n’ingabo ibihumbi ijana mu Bisirayeli, abantu b’abahizi, abagerera italanto z’ ifeza ijana." 
2Chronicles25:7 Hanyuma haza umuntu w’Imana kuri we, aramubarira, ati Mwami, izo ngabo z’Abisirayeli ntuzijane, kuk’ Uhoraho atari kumwe n’Abisirayeli, ari bo bano bantu bose b’Abefurayimu." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ariko namba wiyumvira yuko mur’ ubgo buryo ari ho uzoronka intsinzi mu ntambara, Imana izotuma uneshwa n’abansi; ifise ububasha bgo kugutabara n’ubgo gutuma uneshwa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziya yishura uwo muntu w’Imana, at’ Arikw italanto ijana nahaye ingabo z’Abisirayeli, zo twozigira dute? Uwo muntu w’Imana aramwishura, at’ Uhoraho ashobora kuguha ibisumba ivyo kure." 
2Chronicles25:10 Nuko Amaziya asobanura izo ngabo zaje kuri we zivuye i Bgefurayimu, ngo zisubire i wabo; ivyo bibatera kurakira Abayuda uburake bginshi, basubira i wabo bajanye umwikomo mwinshi." 
2Chronicles25:11 Maze Amaziya agumya umutima, ajana ingabo ziwe baja mu Kiyaya c’Umunyu, bica mu Baseyiri abantu ibihumbi cumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Abandi ibihumbi cumi nyene Abayuda babafata mpiri, babajana ku gitandara c’imanga, babatembagarizayo, baravunagurika bose." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ariko za ngabo Amaziya yashubijeyo ngo ntibajane na we, batera ibisagara vy’i Buyuda, bavudutse i Samariya kurinda bashika i Beti‐horoni, bavyicamw’ abantu ibihumbi bitatu, banyaga iminyago myinshi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Hanyuma Amaziya atabarutse, avuye kwica Abanyedomu, azana ibigirwamana vy’abo Baseyiri; arabishinga ngo bibe imana ziwe, arabipfukamira, avyosereza imibavu." 
2Chronicles25:15 Ni co catumye uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira Amaziya, amutumak’ umuntu yavugisha; uno muntu aramubaza, ati N’iki gituma urondera imana zitākijije bene zo ngo zibakūre mu maboko yawe?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Akirikw aramubarira, umwami aramubaza, ati Har’ aho twākwātiye ng’ uje mu bashingantahe banje? Ziba, ntuhave ukubitwa! Nuk’ uwo muvugishwa arahora, arikw aravuga, ati Nzi yukw Imana yagabiye kukwica, ko wakoze ivyo, kandi wanse kwumva inama yanje." 
2Chronicles25:17 Bukeye Amaziya umwami w’ Abayuda aja inama, atuma kuri Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi, Yehowahazi mwene Yehu, umwami w’Abisirayeli, muti N’uze muhangane." 
2Chronicles25:18 Yehowasi umwami w’ Abisirayeli atuma kwishura Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, mut’ Igitovu c’i Lebanoni catumye kw isederi y’i Lebanoni nyene, ut’ Umukobga wawe n’umushingire umuhungu waco. Bukeye igikōko caba i Lebanoni kihahise gikandagira ca gitovu." 
2Chronicles25:19 Nka ko uravuga, ngo Waratsinze Abanyedomu, uraheza wishira hejuru mu mutima wawe, urihayagiza; none rero n’ugume i muhira; n’iki gituma ugomba kwikwegera akaziri, mugapfa mwe n’Abayuda?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Ariko Amaziya ntiyaruha amwumvira; kukw ivyo vyari bivuye ku Mana, kugira ngw ibagabure mu maboko y’abansi babo, kuko bagiye kurondera ibigirwamana vy’Abanyedomu." 
2Chronicles25:21 Nuko Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli ni kwo kudūga, bahanganira na Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda i Beti‐shemeshi h’i Buyuda nyene, bararumana." 
2Chronicles25:22 Maz’ Abayuda baneshwa n’Abisirayeli, umuntu wese ahungira i we." 
2Chronicles25:23 Maze Yehowasi umwami w’Abisirayeli afata mpiri Amaziya umwami w’i Buyuda, mwene Yowasi, Yowasi mwene Ahaziya, amufatira i Beti‐shemeshi nyene; aca aja i Yerusalemu, asangangura uruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye, uhereye kw irembo ry’Abefurayimu ugashitsa kw irembo ryo ku mfuruka, hose har’ amatambge amajana ane y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
2Chronicles25:24 Asahura amazahabu n’amafeza yose, n’ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu bāsanze mu ngoro y’Imana bijejwe Obed‐edomu, n’ivyo bāsanze mu bubīko bgo mu ngoro y’umwami, afata n’ abantu abajana bari mu bugombe, araheza asubira i Samariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Yehowasi mwene Yehowahazi umwami w’Abisirayeli amaze gutanga, Amaziya mwene Yowasi umwami w’i Buyuda amara iyindi myaka cumi n’itanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Amaziya, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, none ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’i Buyuda n’i Bgisirayeli?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Kuva igihe Amaziya arekeye gukurikira Uhoraho baciye bamuvyukiriza umugararizo i Yerusalemu, araheza ahungira i Lakishi; barungika abamukurikirana i Lakishi, bamutsindayo." 
2Chronicles25:28 Umuvyimba wiwe bawuremēka amafarasi, barawuzana bamuhamba hamwe na ba sekuruza ku murwa w’i Buyuda." 
2Chronicles26:1 Nukw abantu bose b’Abayuda bahitana Uziya baramwimika, bamusubiza ku ngoma ya se Amaziya; Uziya yar’ amaze imyaka cumi n’itandatu." 
2Chronicles26:2 Ni we yasanasannye i Eloti, ahagarura i Buyuda, umwami Amaziya amaze guhamvya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles26:3 Nuko Uziya yar’ amaze imyaka cumi n’itandatu igihe yaja ku ngoma, araheza ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’ibiri i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Yekiliya w’i Yerusalemu nyene." 
2Chronicles26:4 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ivyo se Amaziya yakora vyose." 
2Chronicles26:5 Ashira umutima ku kurondera Imana mu gihe cose ca Zekariya, umuntu yamwigishije kwubaha Imana; kand’ uko yakomeje kurondera Uhoraho, Imana yamuhaye umugisha." 
2Chronicles26:6 Bukeye aragenda atera Abafilisitiya, asangangura uruzitiro rw’i Gati n’urw’ i Yabune n’urw’ i Ashidodi; yubaka ibisagara mu ntāra y’i Ashidodi n’ahandi mu gihugu c’Abafilisitiya nyene." 
2Chronicles26:7 Nukw Imana iramufasha, arwanya n’abo Bafilisitiya bo n’Abarabo bāba i Guribayali, bo n’ab’i Mayoni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Kand’ Abamoni bazanira Uziya ingorore; nukw izina ryiwe rirāmāmara, rishika n’ahafata muri Egiputa; kuko yagiye arushiriza kugira ububasha." 
2Chronicles26:9 Kandi Uziya yubaka iminara i Yerusalemu kw irembo ryo ku mfuruka y’uruzitiro rwaho rw’ amabuye, no kw irembo rija ku mwonga, no ku yindi mfuruka y’ uruzitiro nyene; iyo minara arayigumya." 
2Chronicles26:10 Kandi yubaka iminara no mu bugaragwa, yimbisha n’ivyobo vyinshi vyo kubīka amazi, kuko yar’ afise amasho menshi mu gihugu gishashe no mu biyaya; yar’ afise n’abarimyi n’abazi gutunganya imizabibu mu misozi no mu matongo amera cane, kuko yar’ umurimyi." 
2Chronicles26:11 Kandi Uziya yar’ afise ingabo z’abarwanyi, bāja kurwana bīcīye ibitero, nk’ukw ibitigiri vyabo vyashinzwe, uko bāharūwe na Yeyeli umukarani na Mayaseya umwanditsi, bāgabga na Hananiya, umwe mu bagabisha b’umwami." 
2Chronicles26:12 Igitigiri cose c’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sekuruza, abantu b’ abahizi, bar’ ibihumbi bibiri n’ amajana atandatu." 
2Chronicles26:13 Kand’ abo bāgaba ingabo zigishijwe kurwana, ibihumbi amajana atatu n’ ibihumbi ndwi n’amajana atanu, bārwanana ubuhizi bginshi, barwanira umwami ngo ntāneshwe n’abansi." 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya aronderera izo ngabo zose inkinzo n’amacumu, n’inkofero z’ivyuma, n’amakoti y’ivyuma, n’imiheto, n’amabuye atereshwa umugozi." 
2Chronicles26:15 Kand’ i Yerusalemu ahakoreshereza ibintu vy’intambara vyigenewe n’ abahinga, bifise imishibuka irasa imyampi ikavundereza amabuye manini‐manini, vyo gushirwa ku minara no hejuru ku mfuruka z’ uruzitiro. Izina ryiwe riba rurangiranwa, rirāmāmara, kuko yafashijwe bitangaje, gushitsa aho yabereye agahambaye." 
2Chronicles26:16 Arikw amaze kuba agahambaye, yishira hejuru mu mutima wiwe, bituma akora ivyo kugabitanya, acumura k’Uhoraho Imana yiwe; kuko yinjiye mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho ngo yosereze imibavu ku gicaniro ihora yoserezwako." 
2Chronicles26:17 Maze Azariya umuherezi aca arinjira amukurikiye, ari kumwe n’abandi baherezi b’Uhoraho mirongumunani, abantu b’abahizi;" 
2Chronicles26:18 babuza umwami Uziya, baramubarira, bat’ Ewe Uziya, s’igikorwa cawe kwosereza Uhoraho imibavu, n’ic’ abaherezi bo mu ba Aroni bārobanuriwe kwama bayosa. Enda va aha hantu hēra, kuk’ ucumuye, kand’ ivyo nta cubahiro bizoguhesha kivuye k’ Uhoraho Imana." 
2Chronicles26:19 Maze Uziya aca araraka; kandi yar’ afise icotero mu ntoke, agira ngo yose imibavu. Akirakiye abo baherezi, imibembe isēsa mu ruhanga rwiwe, akir’ aho nyene imbere y’ abaherezi mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, i ruhande y’igicaniro coserezwakw imibavu." 
2Chronicles26:20 Maze Azariya umuherezi mukuru n’abandi baherezi bose bagize ngo baramurāba, babona imibembe ishēshe mu ruhanga rwiwe; bakwakwanya kumusunika ngw ahave, na we nyene ubgiwe yihuta gusohoka, kuk’ Uhoraho amuteje indwara." 
2Chronicles26:21 Nuk’ umwami Uziya arinda atanga akir’ umunyamibembe, aba mu nzu ya wenyene kubg’ imibembe yiwe, kukw atemerewe kuza mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; maze Yotamu umwana wiwe ni we yagaba ivyo mu rugo i bgami, agacira abantu bo mu gihugu imanza." 
2Chronicles26:22 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Uziya, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, vyanditswe n’uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:22 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Uziya, uhereye ku ca mbere ugashitsa ku c’imperēra, vyanditswe n’uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Nuko Uziya ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba hamwe na bo; mugabo bamushira ukwiwe mw itongo rihambgamw’ abami, kuko bāvuga kw ar’ umunyamibembe. Maz’ uwo muhungu wiwe Yotamu asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotamu yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu aho yima; amara imyaka cumi n’ itandatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Yerusha, umukobga wa Sadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ ivyo se Uziya yakoze vyose. Mugabo we ntiyinjiye mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho. Arikw abantu bākomeje kwihumanya." 
2Chronicles27:3 Ni we yubatse ikirimba co haruguru ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, yubaka n’ibindi vyinshi ku ruzitiro rw’i Ofeli." 
2Chronicles27:4 Kandi yubaka n’ibisagara mu mugamba w’i Buyuda, n’amaboma n’iminara mu bibira." 
2Chronicles27:5 Arwana n’umwami w’Abamoni; abo Bamoni arabanesha. Nuko mur’ uwo mwaka Abamoni bamugororera italanto z’ifeza ijana, n’ingero zitwa koro ibihumbi cumi z’ingano, n’ingero ibihumbi cumi nyene za sayiri. No mu mwaka wa kabiri n’uwa gatatu bāmuzaniye nk’ivyo nyene." 
2Chronicles27:6 Nuko Yotamu aba ūhambaye, kuko yagenda atunganya ingeso ziwe imbere y’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe." 
2Chronicles27:7 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadōnzwe kuri Yotamu, n’intambara zose yarwanye, n’ivy’ ingeso ziwe, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’ Abisirayeli n’ab’ Abayuda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ itanu aho yaja ku ngoma; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’itandatu i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles27:9 Maze Yotamu ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa wa Dawidi; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Ahazi asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ahazi yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri igihe yima, amara imyaka cumi n’itandatu i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Mugabo ntiyakora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’uko sekuruza Dawidi yakora;" 
2Chronicles28:2 ariko yagendera mu ngeso z’abami b’Abisirayeli, agakoresha ibishushanyo vya za Bayali bivugutiwe mu nkero." 
2Chronicles28:3 Ikigeretseko, yosereza imibavu mu mwonga wa mwene Hinomu, atanga n’abana biwe kw ibimazi ngo boserezwe mu muriro, nk’ ukw ibizira vy’ubuyobe vy’abanyamahanga vyari bimeze, abo Uhoraho yari yarirukanye imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Yatanga ibimazi akosereza imibavu mu bitabo no ku mpinga z’imisozi no musi y’ igiti cose gitotahaye. 
2Chronicles28:5 Kubg’ ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe amugabura mu maboko y’umwami w’i Siriya. Abasiriya baramunesha, bafata mpiri benshi cane mu bantu biwe, babajana i Damasiko ar’ inyagano. Arongera agaburwa mu maboko y’umwami w’Abisirayeli, na we aramunesha, yica benshi cane." 
2Chronicles28:6 Kuk’ uwo mwami Peka mwene Remaliya yishe mu Bayuda ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri ku musi umwe, bose ar’ abantu b’abahizi; inyanduruko n’uko bāri baretse Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles28:7 Kandi Zikuri, umuntu w’umuhizi wo mu Befurayimu, yica Mayaseya umwana w’umwami, na Azurikamu umubgiriza wo mu ngoro i bgami, na Elukana uwa kabiri ku mwami." 
2Chronicles28:8 Nukw Abisirayeli bajana mu b’i wabo abantu ibihumbi amajana abiri ar’ inyagano, b’abagore n’ abahungu n’abakobga, babasahura n’amasahu menshi cane, babijana i Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ariko hāriy’ ūvugishwa n’Uhoraho yitwa Odedi; aragenda aja gusanganira izo ngabo zihindukiye i Samariya, arababarira, at’ Ereg’ icātumye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza agabura Abayuda mu maboko yanyu n’uko yar’ abarakiye, ariko mwebge mwabicanye ishavu ryinshi rishika mw ijuru." 
2Chronicles28:10 None mugabiye kugandura Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu ngo mubagire abagurano n’abaguranokazi; aho mwebge nta bicumuro mufise vyanyu ubganyu mwācumuye k’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu? 
2Chronicles28:11 Enda rero ni munyumve, ni musubizey’ aba bantu b’i wanyu mwanyaze; kuk’ uburake bg’inkazi bg’Uhoraho buri kuri mwebge." 
2Chronicles28:12 Maz’ abaganwa bamwe b’Abefurayimu, Azariya mwene Yohanani, na Berekiya mwene Meshilemoti, na Yehizikiya mwene Shalumu, na Amasa mwene Hadulayi, barahaguruka, babuza abo batabārutse mu ntambara," 
2Chronicles28:13 barababarira, bat’ Abo bantu b’inyagano ntimubazane ngaha; kukw ico mugomba gukora kizoducumuza k’ Uhoraho, congereze ivyaha vyacu n’ibicumuro vyacu; kuko na none twācumuye bikomeye, kandi twebge Abisirayeli dufitiwe uburake bg’inkazi." 
2Chronicles28:14 Nukw izo ngabo zica zisiga abo bantu b’inyagano bo n’amasahu basahuye imbere y’ abo baganwa, n’imbere y’abāhakoraniye bose." 
2Chronicles28:15 Maz’ abo bantu bavuzwe amazina barahaguruka, bābīra abo bantu b’inyagano; abāri bambaye ubusa bose bo muri bo babambika ivyo bakūye mu masahu, babaha impuzu n’ inkweto, barabagaburira, babaha n’ivyo kunywa, babasiga amavuta; abananiwe bose muri bo babashira ku ndogoba, babashikana mu b’i wabo i Yeriko, igisagara c’ibigazi; baraheza basubira i Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ico gihe umwami Ahazi atuma ku mwami w’i Ashuri ngw amutabare," 
2Chronicles28:17 kukw Abanyedomu bāri bongeye gutera i Buyuda, bakahanesha, bakajana abaho ar’ inyagano." 
2Chronicles28:18 Kandi n’Abafilisitiya na bo bāri bateye ibisagara vyo mu kiyaya, n’ivy’ i Buyuda bg’i bumanuko, bafata i Beti‐shemeshi, n’i Ayaloni, n’i Gederoti, n’i Sokoho, n’ibisagara bihakūkira, n’i Timuna n’ibisagara bihakūkira, n’i Gimuzo na ho nyene n’ibisagara bihakūkira; baca barahinjira." 
2Chronicles28:19 Uhoraho yari yacishije Abayuda bugufi, abahōye Ahazi umwami wabo, kuko yakoze ivy’ isoni nke mu Buyuda, agacumura k’Uhoraho bitangaje." 
2Chronicles28:20 Nuko Tigulati‐pileseri umwami w’i Ashuri aza kuri we; ariko mu gishingo co kumuremesha amurandura umutima. 
2Chronicles28:21 Kuko Ahazi yābiriye ibintu bimwe vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, no mu ngoro yiwe ubgiwe, no mu mazu y’ abaganwa, akabishikanira umwami w’i Ashuri; ariko ntivyagira ico bimumarira." 
2Chronicles28:22 Maz’ uwo mwami Ahazi nyene, igihe aburaniwe arushiriza kuja imbere gucumura k’ Uhoraho," 
2Chronicles28:23 kuko yahaye ibimazi imana z’i Damasiko zamunesheje, akavuga, at’ Izo mana z’abami b’i Siriya ko zabafashije, hinge nanje ndazihe ibimazi zintabare. Ariko zāmukwegeye akaziri, bo n’Abisirayeli bose." 
2Chronicles28:24 Nuko Ahazi akoranya ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, arabijanjagura, yugara inzugi z’iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho; yiyubakira ibicaniro ahantu hose h’i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles28:25 No mu gisagara cose c’i Buyuda atabamw’ ibitabo vy’aho kwosereza imibavu izindi mana, atera umwikomo Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles28:26 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri we, n’ivy’ ingeso ziwe zose, uhereye ku vya mbere ugashitsa ku vy’ imperēra, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’Abayuda n’ab’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Nuko Ahazi ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ku murwa w’i Yerusalemu, kuko batāmuhamvye mu mva z’abami b’i Buyuda; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Hezekiya asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya yar’ amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu igihe yima, amara imyaka mirongwibiri n’icenda i Yerusalemu ari ku ngoma. Nyina yitwa Abiya, umukobga wa Zekariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, nk’ ivyo sekuruza Dawidi yakoze vyose." 
2Chronicles29:3 Mu mwaka wa mbere agiye ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa mbere, yugurura inzugi z’ingoro y’Uhoraho, arazisana." 
2Chronicles29:4 Ahamagaza abaherezi n’Abalewi, abakoraniriza mu karusha gahera i burasirazuba," 
2Chronicles29:5 arababarira, ati Ni muntege amatwi, yemwe Balewi; enda ni mwiyeze, mweze n’ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza banyu, mukūre ibihumanya Ahēra Cane." 
2Chronicles29:6 Kuko ba sogokuruza bacu bācumuye, bagakora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yacu abona kw ari bibi, bakamuta, bakarora irya, bagakūra amaso ahantu Uhoraho aba, bakahatera ibitugu." 
2Chronicles29:7 Ikindi, bugaye inzugi zo ku rubaraza, amatara barayazimya, kandi ntibosereza imibavu Imana y’Abisirayeli, canke ngo bosereze ibimazi Ahantu hēra;" 
2Chronicles29:8 ni co catumye uburake bg’Uhoraho buza ku Bayuda no ku b’i Yerusalemu, akabatanga ngo babe akūmiza n’akajoreza, n’abo kuvuzwakw agahwa, nk’uko namwe muvyibonera n’amaso yanyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ereg’ ivyo ni vyo vyatumye ba sogokuruza bacu bicwa n’inkota, kand’ abahungu bacu n’abakobga bacu n’abagore bacu bakaba bārabaye inyagano." 
2Chronicles29:10 None ngabiye mu mutima wanje gusezerana isezerano n’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, kugira ng’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi butuveko." 
2Chronicles29:11 None rero bana banje, mureke kuvyanjanjwako, kukw ari mwebge Uhoraho yatoranije ngo mumuhagarare imbere, mumusukurire, mube abasuku biwe, mwose imibavu." 
2Chronicles29:12 Maz’ Abalewi bava hasi, Mahati mwene Amasayi, na Yoweli mwene Azariya, bo mu ba Kohati; n’abo mu ba Merari, Kishi mwene Abudi, na Azariya mwene Yehaleleli; n’abo mu ba Gerushoni, Yowa mwene Zima, na Edeni mwene Yowa." 
2Chronicles29:13 Abo mu ba Elisafani ni Shimuri na Yeweli; abo mu ba Asafu ni Zekariya na Mataniya; 
2Chronicles29:14 abo mu ba Hemani ni Yehuweli na Shimeyi; abo mu ba Yedutuni ni Shemaya na Uziyeli. 
2Chronicles29:15 Bakoranya bagenzi babo, bariyeza; baraheza barinjira ngo bahumanure iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho, nk’uk’ umwami yageze, kandi nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabgirije." 
2Chronicles29:16 Abaherezi baja haruguru mur’ iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho kugira ngo bahahumanure, ibihumanya vyose basanze mur’ urwo rusengero rwiwe babisohora mu rugo rw’iyo ngoro yiwe. Abalewi baraheza baravyābīra, babijana hirya ku mugezi Kidironi." 
2Chronicles29:17 Kandi bāri bahēreye ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere mu gutangura ivy’ ukweza; ku musi ugira umunani w’ukwo kwezi bashika ku rubaraza rw’Uhoraho; nuko bamara imisi munani beza iyo ngoro y’Uhoraho; maze ku musi ugira icumi na gatandatu w’ ukwo kwezi kwa mbere bararangiza. 
2Chronicles29:18 Baraheza baja i bgami, bashika i kare ah’ umwami Hezekiya ari, baramubarira, bati Tumaze guhumanura ingoro yose y’ Uhoraho, n’igicaniro co kwoserezakw ibimazi bo n’ibintu vyaco vyose, n’ameza y’imitsima y’ibiterekērwa n’ibintu vyayo vyose." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kandi n’ibintu vyose umwami Ahazi yataye mu gucumura kwiwe igihe yari ku ngoma, twabitunganije, turavyeza; none bir’ imbere y’igicaniro c’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles29:20 Bukeye umwami Hezekiya akoroka kare, akoranya abaganwa bo kur’ uwo murwa, aradūga aja ku ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles29:21 Bazana amamasa ndwi, n’amapfizi y’intama ndwi, n’imyagazi y’intama ndwi, n’amapfizi y’impene ndwi nyene, kw ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha, ngo babitangire ubgami n’urusengero n’Abayuda. Abarira abaherezi bene Aroni kubitangira ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles29:22 Nuko bakerera ayo mamasa, abaherezi batega amaraso, bayamija ku gicaniro; bakerera n’ayo mapfizi y’intama, bamija amaraso yayo kur’ ico gicaniro, bakerera n’iyo myagazi y’intama, bamija n’amaraso yayo kur’ ico gicaniro nyene." 
2Chronicles29:23 Maze ya mapfizi y’ impene bayīgiza hafi imbere y’ umwami n’ikoraniro, ngw abe ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha; baraheza bayarambikakw ibiganza." 
2Chronicles29:24 Abaherezi barayakerera, batanga amaraso yayo ku gicaniro kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ngo bahongerere Abayuda bose; kuk’ umwami yavuze kw ikimazi co kwoswa n’ikimazi co gutangirwa ivyaha bitangirwa Abayuda bose." 
2Chronicles29:25 Kand’ ashira Abalewi mu ngoro y’Uhoraho bafise ivyo kuvuza vyitwa matowazi n’amakembe n’inanga, nk’uko vyashinzwe na Dawidi na Gadi kamenyi w’ umwami na Natani yavugishwa n’ Imana, kukw ico cagezwe cari kivuye k’Uhoraho agitumye abo yavugisha." 
2Chronicles29:26 Nukw abo Balewi bahagarara ngaho bafise ivyo kuvuza vyashinzwe na Dawidi, n’ abaherezi na bo bafise inzumbete." 
2Chronicles29:27 Maze Hezekiya avuga kw ikimazi co kwoswa bacosereza ku gicaniro. Nukw ico kimazi bagitanguye kucosa, abaririmba indirimbo y’Uhoraho na bo bashirako, bo n’abavuza inzumbete n’ibindi vyo kuvuza vyashinzwe na Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles29:28 Maz’ ikoraniro ryose rirasenga, abaririmvyi bakaririmba, abavuza inzumbete bakavuza; vyose biba birtyo gushitsa ah’ ikimazi coshejwe kirangiriye." 
2Chronicles29:29 Nukw ivy’ ico kimazi birangiye, umwami n’abari kumwe na we barūnama, barasenga." 
2Chronicles29:30 Kand’ umwami Hezekiya n’abaganwa babarira Abalewi kuririmbira Uhoraho ishimwe mu ndirimbo za Dawidi n’iza Asafu kamenyi; nuko baririmba ishimwe banezerewe, bunamika amaso, barasenga." 
2Chronicles29:31 Maze Hezekiya arababarira, ati None ko mwirobanuriye Uhoraho, mwīgire hafi, muzane ibimazi n’amashikanwa yo gukenguruka mu ngoro y’Uhoraho. Nukw iryo koraniro rizana ibimazi n’amashikanwa yo gukenguruka; n’abāri bafise imitima ikunze bose bazana ibimazi vyo kwosa." 
2Chronicles29:32 Igitigiri c’ibimazi vyo kwoswa ikoraniro ryazanye car’ amapfizi mirongwirindwi n’amapfizi y’intama ijana n’imyagazi y’intama amajana abiri; ivyo vyose vyar’ ivyo kuba ikimazi co kwosereza Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles29:33 Kand’ ibimazi vyejejwe vyar’ amapfizi amajana atandatu n’intama ibihumbi bitatu. 
2Chronicles29:34 Arikw abaherezi baba bake, ntibāshobora kubāga ibimazi vyose vyo kwoswa; ni co catumye bagenzi babo b’ Abalewi babafasha, gushitsa ah’ igikorwa kirangiriye, no gushitsa ah’ abandi baherezi bāri bamaze kwiyeza, kukw Abalewi bārusha abaherezi kugororoka mu mitima yabo bigatuma bakunda kwiyeza." 
2Chronicles29:35 Kand’ ivyo bimazi vyo kwoswa vyari vyinshi cane, hamwe n’ibinure vy’ibimazi vy’ishimwe, n’ amashikanwa y’ibiturire yagendana n’ikimazi cose co kwoswa. Uko ni kw ibikorwa vyo mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho vyatunganijwe." 
2Chronicles29:36 Nuko Hezekiya agira akanyamuneza, bo n’abantu bose, kubg’ ivyo Imana yateguriye abantu, kuko vyakozwe giturumbuka." 
2Chronicles30:1 Bukeye Hezekiya atuma ku Bisirayeli no ku Bayuda bose, yandikira n’ivyete Abefurayimu n’Abamanase, ngo baze kugira umusi mukuru w’ivya Pasika y’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, mu ngoro y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:2 Kuk’ umwami n’abaganwa biwe n’ikoraniro ryose ry’ i Yerusalemu bari bagiye inama yo kugira umusi mukuru w’ivya Pasika mu kwezi kwa kabiri. 
2Chronicles30:3 Ntivyābashobokeye mu gihe gikwiye, kukw igitigiri c’abaherezi biyejeje cāri gito, kand’ abantu batākoraniye i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:4 Nuk’ umwami n’iryo koraniro ryose barabishima; 
2Chronicles30:5 bashinga ko bitāngāzwa mu Bgisirayeli hose, uhereye i Berisheba ugashitsa i Dani, ngo baze i Yerusalemu ku musi mukuru wa Pasika y’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli; kuko batāri bakiza ari benshi nk’uko vyari vyarashinzwe." 
2Chronicles30:6 Nukw intumwa zijana ivyete bivuye ku mwami n’abaganwa biwe, zibikwiza mu Bgisirayeli hose no mu Buyuda, zivuga nk’uk’ umwami yashinze, ziti Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni mugaruke k’Uhoraho Imana ya Aburahamu na Isaka na Isirayeli, kugira ngo na we agaruke kuri mwebge abasigaye barokotse abami b’i Ashuri." 
2Chronicles30:7 Ngo Kandi ntimuse na ba sogokuruza banyu, cank’ abandi b’i wanyu bāgenda bacumura k’Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, bigatuma ibatanga bakagesezwa, nk’uko namwe mubibona." 
2Chronicles30:8 Ngo None rero mweho ntimugamike amazosi nka ba sogokuruza banyu, ariko muyoboke Uhoraho, muze muze mu rusengero rwiwe yejeje gushitsa ibihe vyose, mube abasavyi b’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, kugira ng’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi bubaveko." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ngo Kuko ni mwahindukirira Uhoraho, ab’ i wanyu n’abana banyu bazotera akagongwe abābajanye ar’ inyagano, babarekure bagaruke mur’ iki gihugu; ngo Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu ar’ umunyabuntu kandi n’umunyembabazi, ntazobakūrakw inyonga ziwe ni mwamugarukako." 
2Chronicles30:10 Nukw izo ntumwa ziragenda, zihetura ibisagara vyose vyo mu gihugu c’Abefurayimu n’ic’ Abamanase, zirinda zishika no mu c’ Abazebuloni; ariko barazitwenga cane, barazishinyagurira." 
2Chronicles30:11 Mugabo bamwe bo mu Basheri no mu Bamanase no mu Bazebuloni barīhanūra, baja i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:12 Kandi n’i Buyuda ukuboko kw’ Imana kubaha guhūza umutima, bumvira ico cagezwe c’umwami n’ abaganwa kivuye kw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles30:13 Nuko mu kwezi kwa kabiri hakoranira abantu benshi i Yerusalemu, kugira umusi mukuru w’ imitsima itambiwe, ar’ ikoraniro rinini cane." 
2Chronicles30:14 Bakūra hasi, bakūrah’ ibicaniro vyar’ i Yerusalemu, n’ibicaniro vyose vyo kwoserezakw imibavu, babita mu mugezi Kidironi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Maze ku musi ugira icumi na kane wo mur’ ukwo kwezi kwa kabiri, babāga ivya Pasika; maz’ abaherezi n’Abalewi baramāramāra, baraheza barīyeza, bazana ibimazi vyo kwoswa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles30:16 Bahagarara mu myanya yabo basanganywe, nk’uko vyashinzwe na Mose umuntu w’Imana; abo baherezi bamija amaraso, Abalewi ari bo bayabahēreje;" 
2Chronicles30:17 kuko mur’ iryo koraniro hāri benshi batiyejeje, bituma Abalewi ari bo bagerwa kubāgira umwagazi wa Pasika umuntu wese ahumanye, kugira ngo babēreze Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles30:18 Kukw abantu benshi cane batāri biyejeje, cane‐cane bār’ abo mu Befurayimu no mu Bamanase no mu Bisakari no mu Bazebuloni, bagapfa kurya ivya Pasika uburyo butemewe n’ivyanditswe. Kandi Hezekiya yari yābasengeye," 
2Chronicles30:19 at’ Uhoraho, ari we munyabuntu, n’aharire umuntu wese ashize umutima ku kurondera Imana, ari we Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza, nah’ atejejwe nk’ukw ivyagezwe vy’urusengero rwera biri." 
2Chronicles30:20 Nuk’ Uhoraho yumvira Hezekiya, atunga abantu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Nukw Abisirayeli bāri bakoraniye i Yerusalemu bamara imisi ndwi bari mu misi mikuru y’imitsima itambiwe bafise umunezero mwinshi; kand’ Abalewi n’abaherezi bāhimbaza Uhoraho uko bukeye, bamuririmbira n’amajwi arenga." 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya aremēsha imitima y’Abalewi bose bāgira umwete wo gukorera Uhoraho. Nukw abantu bamara iyo misi ndwi barya ivy’ iyo misi mikuru, batanga ibimazi vy’ishimwe, bakengurukira Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles30:23 Maz’ ikoraniro ryose baja inama yo kwongera kumara iyindi misi mikuru ndwi; nuko bayimara banezerewe. 
2Chronicles30:24 Kuko Hezekiya umwami w’Abayuda yari yahaye iryo koraniro amamasa igihumbi n’intama ibihumbi ndwi vyo gutanga kw ibimazi, abaganwa na bo bariha amamasa igihumbi nyene, n’intama ibihumbi cumi; nukw abaherezi benshi bariyeza." 
2Chronicles30:25 Nukw iryo koraniro ryose ry’Abayuda riranezerwa, bo n’abaherezi n’ Abalewi, n’ikoraniro ryose ryavuye i Bgisirayeli, n’abari baravuye mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli bakaza kuba i Buyuda." 
2Chronicles30:26 Nukw i Yerusalemu haba akanyamuneza kenshi, kuk’ uhereye ku ngoma ya Salomo mwene Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli, hatāri harīgeze kuba ibihwanye n’ivyo i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles30:27 Maz’ abaherezi, ari bo Balewi, barahaguruka, bahezagira abantu; ijwi ryabo ryumvikana ku Mana, ugusenga kwabo gushika ahēra hayo ah’ iba, ari ho mw ijuru." 
2Chronicles31:1 Nukw ivyo vyose bishize, Abisirayeli bose bāri bakoraniye aho, baca baja mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, bamenagura amabuye bāshinze, batemagura inkingi bāshingiye Ashera, basibanganya ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, basangangura n’ibicaniro vy’i Buyuda n’i Bubenyamini, bo n’i Bgefurayimu no mu bg’Abamanase, gushitsa aho babiherengetereje vyose. Abisirayeli bose barahindukira, basubira mu bisagara vyabo, umuntu wese mw ishamvu yiwe." 
2Chronicles31:2 Maze Hezekiya ashinga imbu z’abaherezi n’Abalewi, nk’uko zari zisanzwe, nk’uk’ umuntu wese muri bo yar’ asanzwe akora, ar’ abo gutanga ibimazi vyoswa, ar’ abo gutanga ibimazi vy’ishimwe, ar’ abo guhēreza, ar’ abo gushima, ar’ abo guhimbaza, bahagaze ku birimba vy’urugo rw’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles31:3 Umwami agera n’umugabane w’ivyo azotanga ku vyo atunze, ku vy’ ibimazi vyo kwoswa bizotangwa mu gitondo no ku mugoroba, n’ibimazi vyo kwoswa ku masabato, n’ivyo mu mboneko z’ukwezi, n’ivy’ imisi mikuru yashinzwe, nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vy’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles31:4 Kand’ agera kw abantu bose baba i Yerusalemu batanga ivyashinzwe guhabga abaherezi n’Abalewi, kugira ngo babone kwitwaririka ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles31:5 Nukw ico cagezwe kimaze gutāngāzwa, Abisirayeli bazana vyinshi cane vy’ umushuzo w’ingano na vino n’ amavuta ya elayo n’ubūki n’ ivyeze vyose vyo mu mirima; kandi n’ikigiracumi ca vyose babizana ari vyinshi cane." 
2Chronicles31:6 Kand’ Abisirayeli n’Abayuda, bāba mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, na bo bazana ikigiracumi c’inka n’intama, n’ ikigiracumi c’ibintu vyejejwe bigashikanirwa Uhoraho Imana yabo, ivyo bintu babigira ibirundo." 
2Chronicles31:7 Mu kwezi kwa gatatu ni ho batanguye kurunda ivyo birundo, babirangiza mu kwezi kw’indwi." 
2Chronicles31:8 Maze Hezekiya n’abaganwa baje, bakabona ivyo birundo, baciye bashima Uhoraho n’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles31:9 Maze Hezekiya abaza abaherezi n’Abalewi ivy’ ivyo birundo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azariya umuherezi mukuru, umuntu wo mu nzu ya Sadoki, aramwishura, at’ Uhereye igihe abantu batanguriye kuzana amashikanwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, twagiye tubona ivyo kurya, tugahāga, tugasigaza vyinshi; kuk’ Uhoraho yahaye abantu biwe umugisha, kand’ ibisāgutse ni vyo ibi bingana birtyo." 
2Chronicles31:11 Maze Hezekiya araheza ababarira ko batunganya ivyumba vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; nuko barabitunganya; 
2Chronicles31:12 babishiramw’ ayo mashikanwa n’ivyo bigiracumi, n’ivyo bintu vyagizwe inyegu, babikoze nk’uko bizigiwe; umukuru yabijejwe yari Konaniya Umulewi, agakurikirwa na murumuna we Shimeyi." 
2Chronicles31:13 Yehiyeli na Azaziya na Nahati, na Asaheli na Yerimoti na Yozabadi, na Eliyeli na Isimakiya na Mahati na Benaya, ni bo bār’ ababgiriza bāgabga na Konaniya na murumuna we Shimeyi, nk’uk’ umwami Hezekiya yabishinze, bo na Azariya umubgiriza w’ingoro y’Imana." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kandi Kore, mwene Imuna Umulewi, umukumirizi w’irembo ry’i burasirazuba, ni we yar’ ajejwe amashikanwa bashikaniye Imana bavyigombeye, agatanga imigabane ku mashikanwa y’Uhoraho no ku bintu vyera cane." 
2Chronicles31:15 Mu bisagara vy’abaherezi yar’ afise abizigirwa yagaba, ni bo aba: Edeni na Minyamini na Yeshuwa na Shemaya na Amariya na Shekaniya; yabagaba mu gikorwa cabo co guha imigabane bagenzi babo, uhereye ku bakuru n’abatoya, ukw imbu zabo zagenda zikurikirana;" 
2Chronicles31:16 mugabo ntibayiha abaramukiwe gukora mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ku rubu rwabo, nk’ukw ibikorwa bāgerewe biri uko bukeye, ari bo nyene banditswe mu gitabo kidondora amavuka y’izinamuhungu wese, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka itatu no kuja hejuru." 
2Chronicles31:17 Abaherezi bāgenda bandikwa ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari; Abalewi uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, bakandikwa ukw ibikorwa vyabo n’imbu zabo biri." 
2Chronicles31:18 Kandi handikwa n’ababo bose, uhereye ku bagore babo n’abahungu n’abakobga, bose iyo bava bakagera; kuko bāgenda bayoboka mu gukora ivyera." 
2Chronicles31:19 Kandi kubg’ abaherezi bo mu ba Aroni bāba mu matongo aho bafise amaragiro inyuma y’ibisagara vyabo, mu gisagara cose hār’ abantu bazwi amazina bāshiriweho guha umugabane umuntu wese w’izinamuhungu mur’ abo baherezi n’ abanditswe bose mu Balewi mu gitabo kidondora amavuka yabo." 
2Chronicles31:20 Uko ni ko Hezekiya yakoze mu Buyuda hose; yagenda akora ivyiza n’ibiroranye n’ivy’ ukuri imbere y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe. 
2Chronicles31:21 Mu vyo yakora vyose arondera Imana yiwe, uhereye ku bikorwa vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, no ku vyagezwe no ku mabgirizwa, yabikora abishizek’ umutima wiwe wose, bikamubera ko." 
2Chronicles32:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo vyose, no hanyuma y’ukwo kuyoboka kwa Hezekiya, Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri araza, atera i Buyuda, asagaza inyuma y’ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye, agira ngw azovyihesha umuheto." 
2Chronicles32:2 Maze Hezekiya abonye ko Senakeribu aje agabiye gutera i Yerusalemu," 
2Chronicles32:3 aja inama n’abaganwa biwe n’abashingantahe biwe, kugira ngo bazibire amariba ar’ inyuma y’igisagara; bemera gufatanya na we." 
2Chronicles32:4 Nuko hakorana abantu benshi, bazibira amariba yose, n’ umugezi waca mur’ iyo ntāra; kuko bāvuga, bati Mbeg’ abami b’i Ashuri bokwama baza basanga amazi ari menshi?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Nuko Hezekiya agumya umutima, asanura uruzitiro aho rwari rwarasenyutse hose, arwubakakw iminara, yubaka n’urundi ruzitiro inyuma yarwo, akomeza n’i Milo mu gisagara ca Dawidi; arondeza ibirwanishwa n’inkinzo vyinshi cane." 
2Chronicles32:6 Ashirah’ abagabisha b’ingabo bamenyereye ivy’ intambara kuganza abantu, abakoraniriza hamwe ku nama kw irembo ry’ igisagara, ababarira amajambo yo kubaremēsha," 
2Chronicles32:7 ati Ni mushikame, mushire amanga, ntimutinye, ntimurandurwe imitima n’umwami w’i Ashuri bo na rirya sinzi ry’ ingabo riri kumwe na we; kuk’ Uwo turi kumwe ahambaye kuruta abari kumwe na we." 
2Chronicles32:8 Mu ruhande rwiwe haherereye inkomezi z’ab’ umubiri, ariko mu ruhande rwacu haherereye Uhoraho Imana yacu, ngw adutabare, aturwanire mu ntambara zacu. Maz’ abantu baremēshwa n’ayo majambo ya Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Hanyuma y’ivyo Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, akir’ inyuma y’i Lakishi, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, atuma intumwa i Yerusalemu kuri Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, no ku Bayuda bose bar’ i Yerusalemu;" 
2Chronicles32:10 ziravuga, zit’ Uku ni ko Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri agize, ngo Mbega mwizigiye iki, gituma murorēra kw’i Yerusalemu harinda kwugarizwa?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Ngw Aho Hezekiya s’ukubahenda, kugira ngw abicishe inzara n’inyota? Kw ababarira ng’ Uhoraho Imana yacu izodukiza, ngo ntidukorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri!" 
2Chronicles32:12 Ngo None Hezekiya uwo si we yakūyeh’ ibitabo vyayo n’ ibicaniro vyayo, akabarira Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu, ati Muze musengere imbere y’iki gicaniro conyene, abe ari ho mwosereza imibavu?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Ngo Mbega ntimuzi bo na ba sekuru uko bāgiriye amahanga yose yo mw isi? Ngo Non’ imana z’ayo mahanga yo mur’ ivyo bihugu zarashoboye na gatoya gukiza igihugu cazo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko yiwe? 
2Chronicles32:14 Ngo None mu mana zose z’ amahanga ba sekuru baranduye rwose, n’iyihe yashoboye gukiza abantu bayo ngo ntibakorokere mu maboko yiwe, bitume n’ iyanyu na yo yoshobora kubamukiza?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Ngo None Hezekiya ntabahende, canke ngw abasuke mu buryo ben’ ubgo; ngo Ntimumwemerere; ngo Kukw ata mana n’imwe y’ihanga na rimwe canke y’igihugu ic’ ari co cose yashoboye gukiza abantu bayo ngo ntibakorokere mu maboko yiwe canke mu maboko ya ba sekuru; ngo Kugira ngw iyanyu na yo ishobore kubamukiza." 
2Chronicles32:16 Maz’ izo ntumwa ziwe ziyongeranya gutuka Uhoraho Imana, na Hezekiya umusavyi wayo." 
2Chronicles32:17 Kandi Senakeribu yandika icete co kurogota k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli no kumuvuga nabi, ngo Nk’ukw imana z’amahanga yo mu bihugu zitākijije abantu bazo, ngo ntibakorokere mu maboko yiwe, ngo Ni ko n’Imana ya Hezekiya itazokiza abantu bayo ngo ntibamukorokere mu maboko." 
2Chronicles32:18 Mber’ izo ntumwa zivuga n’ ijwi rirenga mu rurimi rw’Ikiyuda, babibarira abantu b’i Yerusalemu bāri hejuru ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye, ngo babatere ubgoba, babarandure imitima, kugira ngo babone kunesha ico gisagara." 
2Chronicles32:19 Bavuga Imana y’i Yerusalemu nk’ah’ ari co kimwe n’imana z’ amahanga y’isi zakozwe n’intoke z’abantu. 
2Chronicles32:20 Ivyo bituma umwami Hezekiya, n’uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi, basenga, batakambira Iyo mw ijuru." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ivyo bituma umwami Hezekiya, n’uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi, basenga, batakambira Iyo mw ijuru." 
2Chronicles32:21 Nuk’ Uhoraho arungika umumarayika, atikiza abahizi bose n’abakuru n’ abagabisha b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Ashuri, aho bari bashagaje. Nuk’ uwo mwami asubira mu gihugu ciwe amāramāye. Maz’ ashitse mu ngoro y’ikigirwamana ciwe, abo yivyariye bahamwicishiriza inkota." 
2Chronicles32:22 Uko ni k’Uhoraho yakijije Hezekiya n’ababa i Yerusalemu, abakūye mu maboko ya Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, no mu maboko y’abandi bansi bose; nukw abaha impore impande zose." 
2Chronicles32:23 Maze benshi bashikanira Uhoraho amashikanwa i Yerusalemu, kandi na Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda bamuzanira ibintu vy’igiciro kinini, bituma ashirwa hejuru imbere y’amahanga yose, uhereye ico gihe." 
2Chronicles32:24 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Asenga Uhoraho, na we aramwishura, amuha n’ikimenyamenya." 
2Chronicles32:25 Ariko Hezekiya, ubuntu yagiriwe ntiyabumwishura, kuko yaciye yishira hejuru mu mutima; kubg’ ivyo uburake bg’Uhoraho buza kuri we no ku Bayuda no kuri Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles32:26 Ariko Hezekiya yicisha bugufi, yihana ubgo bgibone bgo mu mutima wiwe, ubgiwe n’ababa i Yerusalemu, bituma uburake bg’Uhoraho butabashikīra ku ngoma ya Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Kandi Hezekiya yari n’itunga ryinshi n’icubahiro cinshi; yironderera ububīko bg’amafeza n’ ubg’ amazahabu n’ubg’ utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini n’ubg’ imibavu n’ubg’ inkinzo n’ubg’ ibintu vyiza‐vyiza vy’uburyo bgose. 
2Chronicles32:28 Kandi yubaka n’amazu y’ibigega y’aho kwimburira ingano na vino n’amavuta ya elayo; n’ impongore z’ibitayega vyiwe vy’ uburyo bgose, n’impongore z’ imikuku." 
2Chronicles32:29 Kandi yironkera n’ ibisagara, n’amasinzi y’imikuku n’amasho, kukw Imana yamuhaye ibintu vy’isinzi." 
2Chronicles32:30 Kandi Hezekiya uwo agomera isōko yo haruguru y’amazi y’i Gihoni, akwega umūzi wayo, ayamanukana ku ruhande rw’igisagara ca Dawidi ruhera i burengerazuba. Nuko Hezekiya ivyo yakora vyose bimubera ko." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ariko ku vy’intumwa abaganwa b’i Babuloni bamutumyeko, ngo bamubaze igitangaza cabayeho mu gihugu ciwe, Imana iramureka ngw imugerageze, kugira ngw imenye ivyari mu mutima wiwe vyose." 
2Chronicles32:32 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Hezekiya, n’ivyiza yakoze, vyanditswe mu vyo uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe, no mu gitabo c’abami b’Abayuda n’ab’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles32:32 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Hezekiya, n’ivyiza yakoze, vyanditswe mu vyo uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe, no mu gitabo c’abami b’Abayuda n’ab’ Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Maze Hezekiya ahamvya ba sekuruza, bamuhamba ahadūga haja mu mva z’abuzukuruza ba Dawidi; aho yatanga, Abayuda bose n’ab’i Yerusalemu baza kumuha icubahiro. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Manase asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’ibiri; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitanu n’itanu ar’ i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles33:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, aja mu bizira vy’ubuyobe vy’ abanyamahanga, abo Uhoraho yari yarirukanyei mbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Yongera gutabisha ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi, ivyo se Hezekiya yari yarasibanganije, yubakira za Bayali ibicaniro, abāza igishushanyo ca Ashera, asenga ingabo zose zo kw ijuru, ari zo nyenyeri, arazisaba." 
2Chronicles33:4 Yubaka n’ ibicaniro mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ari ho Uhoraho yari yaravuze, at’ I Yerusalemu ni ho izina ryanje rizoba ibihe vyose." 
2Chronicles33:5 Kandi yubakira izo ngabo zose zo kw ijuru ibicaniro mu ntangaro no mu nyubakwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho. 
2Chronicles33:6 Atanga abana biwe kw ibimazi ngo boswe mu muriro mu mwonga wa mwene Hinomu, agapfumuza, agatera amabara, agakoresha uburozi, akaja kuraguza abahamagara imizimu, n’abamenyi; yakora ibibi vyinshi imbere y’Uhoraho, bimutera umwikomo." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ca gishushanyo c’ikigirwamana yabāje agishinga mu ngoro y’Imana, ari yo ngoro Imana yari yarabariye Dawidi na Salomo umuhungu wiwe, iti Mur’ iyi ngoro, bo n’i Yerusalemu, ni ho natoranije mu miryango yose y’Abisirayeli ko nzohashira izina ryanje ngo rihabe ibihe vyose." 
2Chronicles33:8 Kand’ iti Sinzosubira gukūra Abisirayeli ngo bave mu gihugu nashinze ko kizoba ica ba sekuruza, ni bitondera ivyo nabageze vyose, ari vyo vyagezwe n’ amabgirizwa n’imigenzo nageze mbitumye Mose." 
2Chronicles33:9 Nuko Manase azimiza Abayuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu, bituma bakora nabi gusumvya amahanga Uhoraho yageshereje imbere y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Maz’ Uhoraho abūrira Manase n’abantu biwe, ariko ntibābibabara." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ni co catumye Uhoraho abatēza abagabisha b’ingabo z’umwami w’i Ashuri, bagafata Manase, bakamubohesha ivyuma, bakamushira mu minyororo, bakamujana i Babuloni." 
2Chronicles33:12 Maz’ abonye kw ashitse mu magorwa, yinginga Uhoraho Imana yiwe, yicisha bugufi ashika hasi imbere y’Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles33:13 Maz’ ayisenze, iramwemerera, yumva ukwinginga kwiwe, imusubiza i Yerusalemu mu bgami bgiwe. Nuko Manase aca amenya yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana." 
2Chronicles33:14 Hanyuma y’ivyo yubaka uruzitiro rw’amabuye, ruciye inyuma y’igisagara ca Dawidi, ruca ku ruhande rw’i Gihoni ruhera i burengerazuba mu mwonga, rukarinda rushika kw irembo ryitwa iry’ Amafi; arukīkūza i Ofeli, ararukuza, arugira rurerure cane; kand’ ashira abagabisha b’ingabo mu bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda bizitiriwe inzitiro." 
2Chronicles33:15 Kand’ akūrah’ ibigirwamana vy’amahanga, akūra na ca gishushanyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ibicaniro vyose yari yarubatse ku musozi urikw ingoro y’Uhoraho n’i Yerusalemu, abishiburira inyuma y’igisagara." 
2Chronicles33:16 Maz’ asana igicaniro c’Uhoraho, agitangirakw ibimazi vy’ishimwe n’ivyo gukenguruka, kand’ agera kw Abayuda basaba Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Mugabo abantu bakomeza gutangira ibimazi mu bitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, ariko bakabiha Uhoraho Imana yabo wenyene gusa." 
2Chronicles33:18 Nukw ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Manase, n’ivy’ isengesho yasenze Imana yiwe, n’amajambo ba kamenyi bāmubariye mw izina ry’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, vyanditswe mu bitabo bidonda ivy’ abami b’Abayuda." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kandi n’ivy’ isengesho ryiwe, n’ ingene yemerewe, n’ivy’ ivyaha vyiwe vyose n’ugucumura kwiwe, n’ivy’ ahantu hose yatavye ibitabo, akahashinga inkingi za Ashera n’ibishushanyo bibājwe, ataricisha bugufi, ivyo vyanditswe mu majambo ya Hozayi." 
2Chronicles33:20 Nuko Manase ahamvya ba sekuruza, ahambga mu rugo rwiwe; maz’ umuhungu wiwe Amoni asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ibiri, ayimarakw imyaka ibiri ar’i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles33:22 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’uko se Manase yakora; aha ibimazi ibishushanyo vyose bibājwe, ivyo se Manase yakoresheje, arabisaba." 
2Chronicles33:23 Ntiyicisha bugufi imbere y’ Uhoraho, nk’uko se Manase yicishije bugufi, ariko Amoni uwo agenda arushiriza gucumura." 
2Chronicles33:24 Bukeye abanyarugo biwe baramugarariza, bamutsinda mu ngoro yiwe." 
2Chronicles33:25 Maz’ abantu bo mu gihugu bica abo bantu bose bāgararije umwami Amoni, baraheza bimika Yosiya umuhungu wiwe, bamusubiza ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yosiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka munani; ayimarakw imyaka mirongwitatu n’ umwe ar’i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles34:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari vyiza, agendera mu ngeso nziza za sekuruza Dawidi, ntiyatambamira i buryo cank’ i bumoso." 
2Chronicles34:3 Mu mwaka ugira umunani ari ku ngoma, akir’ umwana, yatanguye kurondera Imana ya sekuruza Dawidi; maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri atangura gutunganya i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ahakūra ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi, n’inkingi bāshingiye Ashera, n’ibishushanyo bibājwe bo n’ivyavugutiwe mu nkero;" 
2Chronicles34:4 basangangura ibicaniro vya za Bayali abahagarikiye, asitaguza n’ inkingi zashingiwe izuba zari zibihanamiye hejuru; amenagura n’inkingi zashingiwe Ashera, n’ ibishushanyo bibājwe n’ivyavugutiwe mu nkero, abigira ishingwe, arimēmēra ku mva z’abābiha ibimazi." 
2Chronicles34:5 Aturirira amagufa y’ abaherezi ku bicaniro vyabo; nukw atunganya i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles34:6 Kandi ni ko yagenjeje no mu bisagara vyabaye amatongo impande zose, ivy’ Abamanase n’ ivy’ Abefurayimu n’ivy’ Abasimeyoni, no kurinda ashitsa no mu vy’i Bunafutali." 
2Chronicles34:7 Asangangura ibicaniro, ajonjanga inkingi zāshingiwe Ashera, n’ibishushanyo bibājwe, abigira ifu; asitagura n’ inkingi zose zāshingiwe izuba mu gihugu cose c’i Bgisirayeli; araheza arahindukira, asubira i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani ari ku ngoma, ahejeje gutunganya igihugu n’urusengero, arungika Shafani mwene Asaliya, na Mayaseya umukuru w’umurwa, na Yowa mwene Yowahazi umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba, ngo baje gusanisha ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yiwe." 
2Chronicles34:9 Bashikīra Hilukiya umuherezi mukuru, bamushikiriza amahera yazanywe mu ngoro y’ Imana, ayo Abalewi b’abakumirizi bari barakoranije mu Bamanase no mu Befurayimu no mu masigarira yose y’Abisirayeli, no mu Bayuda bose no mu Babenyamini no mu baba i Yerusalemu;" 
2Chronicles34:10 bayaha abāshinzwe gukoresha ibikorwa vyo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, na bo bayahemba abakozi bakora iyo ngoro, kugira ngo bayisanure bayikomeze;" 
2Chronicles34:11 bayaha ababāji n’ abubatsi kugira ngo bagure amabuye abājwe n’ibiti vy’imyaro n’ ivy’ ibishoro vyo gusanura inyubako abami b’i Buyuda bononye. 
2Chronicles34:12 Nukw abo bantu bakora ico gikorwa ar’ abizigirwa; abābarāba n’aba: Yahati na Obadiya, Abalewi bo mu ba Merari, na Zekariya na Meshulamu bo mu ba Kohati, ni bo bābakoresha; kand’ abandi Balewi bose b’abahinga bazi ivyo kuvuza," 
2Chronicles34:13 ni bo bāgenda barāba ivy’ abikorezi, bagakoresha n’ abandi bose bakora igikorwa ic’ ari co cose; kand’ Abalewi bamwe bār’ abakarani n’abashingantahe n’abakumirizi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Maze bariko barasohora amahera yazanywe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, Hilukiya umuherezi arenguka ku gitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho, ivyo Mose yazanye." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hilukiya abarira Shafani umukarani, ati Ntoye igitabo c’ivyagezwe mu ngoro y’Uhoraho. Hilukiya araheza agiha Shafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani ajana ico gitabo, agishīra umwami, amudondera uko vyagenze, at’ Ivyo abasavyi bawe bāgezweko vyose, bābikoze;" 
2Chronicles34:17 kandi bābiriye amahera yari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, bayashikirije abakoresha ibikorwa n’abakozi." 
2Chronicles34:18 Uwo mukarani Shafani yongera kubarira umwami, ati Kand’ umuherezi Hilukiya andungikanye igitabo. Nuko Shafani agisomera umwami." 
2Chronicles34:19 Maz’ umwami yumvise amajambo yo mu vyagezwe, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe." 
2Chronicles34:20 Umwami araheza atuma Hilukiya na Ahikamu mwene Shafani na Abudoni mwene Mika n’uwo mukarani Shafani nyene na Asaya umumenyekana wiwe," 
2Chronicles34:21 ati Ni mugende munsigurize Uhoraho, twe n’amasigarira yo mu Bisirayeli no mu Bayuda, ivy’ amajambo yo mur’ ico gitabo batoye; kuk’ uburake bg’Uhoraho budusutsweko ari bginshi, kubga ba sogokuruza batumviye ijambo ry’Uhoraho, ngo bakore ivyanditswe mur’ iki gitabo vyose." 
2Chronicles34:22 Nuko Hilukiya n’abo bandi umwami yatumye, baragenda, baja k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Hulida muka Shalumu, Shalumu mwene Tokihati, umwuzukuru wa Hasira, yajejwe ububīko bg’imyambaro, bamusiguza ivyo. Kand’ uwo mugore yaba i Yerusalemu mu gice caho ca kabiri." 
2Chronicles34:23 Arabishura, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, ngo Murabarira uwo muntu yamubatumyeko," 
2Chronicles34:24 mut’ Uhoraho agize ngw Azotēza ivyago aha hantu, bo n’abahaba, ngo Ni yo mivumo yose yanditswe mur’ ico gitabo bagusomeye, wewe nyene umwami w’i Buyuda;" 
2Chronicles34:25 muti Kuko bāmuvuyeko, bakosereza imibavu izindi mana, muti Bakamutēza umwikomo ibikorwa vyose vy’intoke zabo; muti Ni co kizotuma uburake bgiwe busukwa aha hantu, ntihagire ikibuzimya." 
2Chronicles34:26 Ati Kandi mubarire uwo mwami w’i Buyuda yabatumye gusiguza Uhoraho, mut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli agize, ngo Ku vy’ ayo majambo wumvise," 
2Chronicles34:27 ngo Kuko watsinzwe mu mutima wawe, ukicisha bugufi imbere yiwe, ari yo Mana, igihe wumva amajambo yavuze ku vy’ aha hantu bo n’ abahaba, ng’ Ukicisha bugufi imbere yiwe, ukītantamurirakw impuzu zawe, ukaririra imbere yiwe, ngo Na we arakwumvise; ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
2Chronicles34:28 Ngo Nukw azoguha guhambga hamwe na ba sogokuruza, ushike mu mva yawe amahoro; ngo Kand’ amaso yawe ntazobona ivyo vyago vyose azotēza aha hantu n’abahaba. Nuko baraza, bagarukanira umwami ayo majambo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Maz’ umwami atuma gukoraniriza hamwe abakuru bose b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles34:30 Umwami araheza aradūga, aja ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, bo n’abashingantahe b’i Buyuda bose n’ ababa i Yerusalemu, bo n’abaherezi n’Abalewi n’abantu bose, abahambaye n’aboroshe; abasomera amajambo yose yo mur’ ico gitabo c’isezerano bātoye mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles34:31 Maz’ umwami ahagarara ahantu yamenyereye, asezeranira imbere y’Uhoraho kw azomukurikira, no kuzokwitondera ivyagezwe vyiwe n’amabgirizwa yiwe n’ivyo yashinze, no kuzovyitonderesha umutima wiwe wose n’ubugingo bgiwe bgose, no kuzoshitsa amajambo y’iryo sezerano yanditswe mur’ ico gitabo." 
2Chronicles34:32 Araheza yemeza iryo sezerano ababa i Yerusalemu n’Ababenyamini bose. Nukw ab’i Yerusalemu bashitsa iryo sezerano ry’ Imana, ari yo Mana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles34:33 Maze Yosiya akūra ibizira vyose vy’ubuyobe mu ntāra zose z’Abisirayeli, yemeza abari mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli bose gusaba Uhoraho Imana ya ba sekuruza. Igihe cose yamaze akiriho nta ho bāretse gukurikira Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sekuruza." 
2Chronicles35:1 Bukeye Yosiya agira umusi mukuru wa Pasika y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu. Babāga imyagazi ya Pasika ku musi ugira icumi na kane wo mu kwezi kwa mbere. 
2Chronicles35:2 Ashira abaherezi mu mbu zabo, abatera umwete wo gukora igikorwa co mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles35:3 Kand’ abarira Abalewi berejwe Uhoraho, ari bo bigisha Abisirayeli bose, ati Ni mushire isandugu yera mu ngoro Salomo mwene Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli yubatse; ntimuzosubira kurinda kuyirerura ku bitugu vyanyu ukundi. None rero ni mukorere Uhoraho Imana yanyu, bo n’abantu biwe b’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles35:4 Mwitegure kuja mu mbu zanyu, nk’ukw amazu ya ba sogokuruza ari, nk’uko vyanditswe na Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli na Salomo umuhungu wiwe." 
2Chronicles35:5 Muheze muze muhagarare ahantu hēra, mwiciyemw’ imitigiri ingana n’imigabane y’amazu ya ba sekuruza ya bagenzi banyu batar’ Abalewi, kugira ng’ umugabane wose ugire umutigiri uwākīrira wo mu mazu ya ba sogokuruza, mwebge Abalewi." 
2Chronicles35:6 Muheze mubabāgire ivya Pasika, mwiyeze, abo bagenzi banyu mubibategurire, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri, iryo yatumye Mose." 
2Chronicles35:7 Maze Yosiya aha abantu bose bari ngaho imyagazi y’intama n’iy’ impene yo mu mikuku, yo kuba ibimazi vya Pasika; igitigiri c’iyo myagazi car’ ibihumbi mirongwitatu; abaha n’amapfizi ibihumbi bitatu; ivyo vyose ni vyo umwami yatanze kw itunga ryiwe." 
2Chronicles35:8 Kand’ abaganwa biwe na bo nyene nk’uko bavyigombeye baha abantu ibimazi vyo gutanga, babiha n’abaherezi n’Abalewi. Hilukiya na Zekariya na Yehiyeli, abakuru baganza ivy’ ingoro y’Imana, baha abaherezi ivyo gutanga kw ibimazi vya Pasika, imyagazi ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana atandatu, n’amapfizi amajana atatu."
