2Chronicles35:9 Kandi n’ abakuru b’Abalewi, Konaniya na barumuna biwe Shemaya na Netaneli, bo na Hashabiya na Yeyeli na Yozabadi, baha Abalewi ivyo gutanga kw ibimazi vya Pasika, imyagazi ibihumbi bitanu n’amapfizi amajana atanu." 
2Chronicles35:10 Uko ni ko biteguye ivy’ ico gikorwa; abaherezi bahagarara mu myanya yabo, n’Abalewi bahagarara nk’ukw imbu zabo zikurikirana, nk’uk’ umwami yabishinze." 
2Chronicles35:11 Nuko bakerera imyagazi ya Pasika, abaherezi bamija amaraso bayahawe n’abo Balewi, Abalewi na bo baraheza barabāga." 
2Chronicles35:12 Bakūrah’ imitigiri yo kuba ibimazi vyo kwoswa, bayiha abantu nk’ukw amazu ya ba sekuruza ari, kugira ngo na bo bayīhēre Uhoraho kw ibimazi, nk’ uko vyanditswe mu gitabo ca Mose. N’ayo mapfizi na yo bayagenza bartyo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Baraheza batara inyama z’ivyo bimazi vya Pasika, nk’uko vyashinzwe; bateka n’iz’ ibimazi vyera mu nkono no mu masafuriya no mu tuzīhebe; zihiye bakazijana vuba bakaziha abantu bose." 
2Chronicles35:14 Hanyuma bakitegura ivyabo ubgabo bo n’ivy’ abaherezi, kukw abo baherezi bo mu ba Aroni batātirimuka kubgo kwosa ibimazi n’ibinure, bukarinda bgira; ni co catumye Abalewi bitegura ivyabo ubgabo, bakitegura n’ivy’ abo baherezi bo mu ba Aroni." 
2Chronicles35:15 N’abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu bāri mu myanya yabo nk’uko vyari vyarashinzwe na Dawidi na Asafu na Hemani na Yedutuni kamenyi w’umwami; abakumirizi na bo bāri ku birimba vyose; na bo nyene ntibārinda kuva ku gikorwa cabo, kuko bagenzi babo b’Abalewi bābitegurira ivyabo na bo." 
2Chronicles35:16 Uko ni kw igikorwa cose c’ Uhoraho cātunganijwe kur’ uwo musi, co kugira umusi mukuru wa Pasika no kwosereza ibimazi ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho, nk’uk’ umwami Yosiya yabishinze." 
2Chronicles35:17 Ico gihe nyene Abisirayeli bāri ngaho baja mu vy’uwo musi mukuru wa Pasika, baja no mu vy’iyindi misi mikuru ndwi y’imitsima itambiwe." 
2Chronicles35:18 Ntihīgeze kuba umusi wa Pasika uhwanye n’uyo mu Bisirayeli, uhereye mu gihe c’uwavugishwa n’Imana Samweli; kandi nta wundi mu bami b’Abisirayeli yagize umusi mukuru wa Pasika uhwanye n’uwo Yosiya yagize, bo n’abaherezi n’Abalewi n’Abayuda bose n’ Abisirayeli bāri ngaho, n’ababa i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Iyo Pasika yabaye mu mwaka ugira icumi n’ umunani Yosiya ari ku ngoma. 
2Chronicles35:20 Hanyuma y’ivyo vyose, Yosiya amaze gutunganya urusengero, Neko umwami wa Egiputa aradūga aja gutera Karikemeshi ku ruzi Efurate; maze Yosiya aja kumutega ngw amurwanye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ariko Neko amutumakw intumwa, uti Mupfa iki na we, ga Mwami w’ Abayuda? Ut’ Ubu si wewe ateye, ut’ Arikw ateye inzu bahamana; uti Mber’ Imana imubariye kwihuta; uti Reka gukorakoza Imana iri kumwe na we, uti Ntihave ikwica." 
2Chronicles35:22 Yamara Yosiya ntiyemera guhindukira ngw amureke, arikw ariyoberanya kugira ngw amurwanye, ntiyumvira amajambo ya Neko avuye ku Mana; barumanira mu kiyaya c’i Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Maz’ abarashi barasa umwami Yosiya; abarira abantu biwe, ati Ni munkūre hano, kuko nkomeretse bibi." 
2Chronicles35:24 Nukw abantu biwe bamukūra mu mukogote yarimwo, bamushira mu wa kabiri yar’ afise, bamujana i Yerusalemu; nukw aratanga, bamuhamba mu mva za ba sekuruza. Abayuda bose n’ ab’ i Yerusalemu baramuririra." 
2Chronicles35:25 Na Yeremiya aborogera Yosiya, n’abaririmvyi bose b’abagabo n’abagore iyo bacura intimba bavuga Yosiya kugeza n’ubu; babigira umugenzo mu Bisirayeli; kandi vyanditswe mu majambo y’agacurantimba." 
2Chronicles35:26 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yosiya, n’ivyiza yakoze yitondera ivyanditswe mu vyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho," 
2Chronicles35:27 n’ibikorwa vyiwe vyose uhereye ku ca mbere ukageza ku c’imperēra, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’Abisirayeli n’ab’ Abayuda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu bahitana Yehowahazi umuhungu wa Yosiya, bamwimika mu gishingo ca se i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yehowahazi yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itatu; ayimarakw amezi atatu ar’ i Yerusalemu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Bukeye umwami wa Egiputa amukūra ku ngoma i Yerusalemu; igihugu ciwe agicira iciru c’italanto ijana z’ifeza n’italanto imwe y’izahabu. 
2Chronicles36:4 Uwo mwami wa Egiputa yimika Eliyakimu mukuru we, amugira umwami w’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ahindura izina ryiwe, amwita Yehoyakimu. Neko araheza afata Yehowahazi, amujana muri Egiputa." 
2Chronicles36:5 Kandi Yehoyakimu yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’itanu; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe ar’i Yerusalemu; akora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari bibi. 
2Chronicles36:6 Hanyuma Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni araza aramutera, amuta mu minyororo, amujana i Babuloni." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadineza atakw ajana n’ ibintu vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho i Babuloni, abishira mu rusengero rwiwe i Babuloni nyene." 
2Chronicles36:8 Ibindi vyose vyadonzwe kuri Yehoyakimu, n’ivy’ ibizira vy’ubuyobe yakoze, n’ibindi bibi vyose yagenda abonekako, vyanditswe mu gitabo c’abami b’Abisirayeli n’ab’ Abayuda. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Yehoyakina asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yehoyakina yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka cumi n’umunani; ayimarakw amezi atatu n’imisi cumi i Yerusalemu; na we akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ku gacikamvura umwami Nebukadineza aratuma ngo bamuzane i Babuloni, bo n’ibintu vyiza‐vyiza vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; yimika mukuru we Zedekiya ngw abe umwami w’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedekiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’ umwe; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe i Yerusalemu; 
2Chronicles36:12 na we akora ivyo Uhoraho Imana yiwe abona kw ari bibi; ntiyicisha bugufi imbere y’uwavugishwa n’ Imana Yeremiya, iy’ amubariye ibiva mu kanwa k’Uhoraho." 
2Chronicles36:13 Na we agarariza umwami Nebukadineza, kandi yari yaramurahije Imana; nukw agamika izosi, yikomantaza umutima, ntiyahindukirira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Mbere n’abaherezi bakuru‐bakuru bose bo n’abantu bāgize ivy’ ubuhemu bginshi, bakaja mu vy’ibizira vyose vy’ubuyobe vy’abanyamahanga, bakanduza ingoro y’Uhoraho, iyo Uhoraho ubgiwe yari yarejeje i Yerusalemu." 
2Chronicles36:15 Uhoraho, Imana ya ba sekuruza, akabatumakw intumwa ziwe, akāma azindurwa uko bukeye no kubatuma, kuko yatewe akagongwe n’abantu biwe bo n’ aho hantu yaba." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ariko bagashinyagurira izo ntumwa z’Imana, bagakēngēra amajambo yayo, bagatwenga abo yavugisha, gushitsa ah’uburake bg’Uhoraho bgabaye ku bantu biwe, butagishobora kugarurwa." 
2Chronicles36:17 Nci co catumye abatēza umwami w’Abakaludaya, akicisha imisore yabo inkota, akabatsinda mu rusengero rwabo, ntagirire akagongwe umusore cank’ umwigeme, umutāma cank’ umusāza bukokori; bose akabagabura mu maboko yiwe." 
2Chronicles36:18 Kand’ ibintu vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, ibito‐bito n’ibinini‐binini, bo n’ivy’ ubutunzi vyo mur’ iyo ngoro nyene y’Uhoraho, n’ivy’ ubutunzi vy’umwami n’ivy’ abaganwa biwe, ivyo vyose abijana i Babuloni." 
2Chronicles36:19 Maze baturira n’ ingoro y’Imana, basangangura n’ uruzitiro rw’amabuye rw’i Yerusalemu, baturira n’ingoro zaho zose, bīca n’ivyiza‐vyiza vyaho vyose." 
2Chronicles36:20 Abācitse bagakira inkota, uwo mwami abajana i Babuloni, abagira abaja biwe n’ab’ abahungu biwe, gushitsa igihe Abaperesi bashikiriye ingoma," 
2Chronicles36:21 kwar’ ukugira ngw ijambo Uhoraho yavugiye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya rishike, igihugu gishumbushwe amasabato yaco; igihe cose camaze kikir’ amatongo, cariko kiziririza amasabato yaco, gushitsa kimaze imyaka mirongwirindwi." 
2Chronicles36:22 Hanyuma mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi agiye ku ngoma, Uhoraho akangura umutima wiwe kugira ngw ijambo yavugiye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya ribone gushika. Nuko Kuro uwo mwami w’i Buperesi ashinga ko babitangaza mu gihugu ciwe cose, aranavyandika," 
2Chronicles36:23 ngo Kuro, umwami w’i Buperesi aravuze, at’ Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ijuru yangabiye ibihugu vyose vyo mw isi. Kandi yangeze ngo ndamwubakire ingoro i Yerusalemu mu Buyuda. Non’ umuntu wese muri mwebge wo mu bantu biwe bose, Uhoraho Imana yiwe n’ibane na we, adūge ajeyo." 
Ezra1:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi agiye ku ngoma, Uhoraho akangura umutima wiwe kugira ngw ijambo yavugiye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya ribone gushika. Nuko Kuro uwo mwami w’i Buperesi ashinga ko babitangaza mu gihugu ciwe cose, aranavyandika," 
Ezra1:2 ngo Kuro, umwami w’i Buperesi aravuze, at’ Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ijuru yangabiye ibihugu vyose vyo mw isi. Kandi yangeze ngo ndamwubakire ingoro i Yerusalemu mu Buyuda." 
Ezra1:3 Non’ umuntu wese muri mwebge wo mu bantu biwe bose, Imana yiwe n’ibane na we, adūge i Yerusalemu mu Buyuda, yubake ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli, ari yo Mana iba i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:4 Kand’ ahantu hose hasigaye umuntu w’inyambukīra, abantu baho ni bamufashishe ifeza n’ izahabu n’ibintu n’ibitungano, bamuhe n’amashikanwa bashikanye kubg’ iyo ngoro y’Imana y’i Yerusalemu bivuye ku mitima ikunze." 
Ezra1:5 Nuko, abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abayuda n’ab’ Ababenyamini, bo n’abaherezi n’ Abalewi n’abandi bose Imana yateye umwete, bava hasi kugira ngo baje gusubira kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra1:6 Ababanyi babo bose babaha intererano z’ibintu vy’amafeza n’amazahabu n’ibindi, bo n’ibitungano n’ibintu vy’igiciro kinini, ukūyemw’ ivyo bashikanye vyose bivuye ku mitima ikunze." 
Ezra1:7 Kandi n’umwami Kuro asohora ibintu vy’imbombovu vyakoreshwa mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ivyo Nebukadineza yari yaranyaze i Yerusalemu, akabishira mu kinyabugoro c’imana ziwe;" 
Ezra1:8 izo mbombovu Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi mu kuzisohora atuma Mitiredati umuzezwabintu wiwe, na we aziharūrira imbere ya Sheshibazari umuganwa wo mu Bayuda." 
Ezra1:9 Kand’ igitigiri cavyo ngiki: amasahani y’izahabu mirongwitatu, n’ay’ ifeza igihumbi, n’ imbugita mirongwibiri n’icenda," 
Ezra1:10 n’amabakure y’izahabu mirongwitatu, n’amabakure y’ifeza y’uburyo bga kabiri amajana ane n’icumi, n’ibikoreshwa bindi igihumbi." 
Ezra1:11 Ibintu vy’imbombovu vy’izahabu n’ivy’ ifeza, vyose na vyose vyar’ ibihumbi bitanu n’ amajana ane. Ivyo vyose Sheshibazari yabijanye igihe abantu b’inyagano bāva i Babuloni bagasubira i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra2:1 Aba ni bo bo mur’ ico gihugu Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yari yarajanye i Babuloni nyene ar’ inyagano, bakava mu kinyago bagasubira i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda, umuntu wese agasubira mu gisagara c’i wabo;" 
Ezra2:2 ni bo bāzananye na Zerubabeli na Yosuwa na Nehemiya, na Seraya na Reyelaya na Moridekayi, na Bilishani na Misipari na Bigivayi, na Rehumu na Bayana. Igitigiri c’abagabo bo mu Bisirayeli ngiki:" 
Ezra2:3 abo mu ba Paroshi n’ibihumbi bibiri n’ijana na mirongwirindwi na babiri. 
Ezra2:4 Abo mu ba Shefatiya n’amajana atatu na mirongwirindwi na babiri. 
Ezra2:5 Abo mu ba Ara n’amajana ndwi na mirongwirindwi na batanu. 
Ezra2:6 Abo mu ba Pahati‐mowabu, bandurutse kuri Yosuwa na Yowabu, n’ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana munani n’ icumi na babiri." 
Ezra2:7 Abo mu ba Elamu n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane. 
Ezra2:8 Abo mu ba Zatu n’amajana cenda na mirongwine na batanu. 
Ezra2:9 Abo mu ba Zakayi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu. 
Ezra2:10 Abo mu ba Bani n’amajana atandatu na mirongwine na babiri. 
Ezra2:11 Abo mu ba Bebayi n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Ezra2:12 Abo mu ba Azigadi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na babiri. 
Ezra2:13 Abo mu ba Adonikamu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu na batandatu. 
Ezra2:14 Abo mu ba Bigivayi n’ibihumbi bibiri na mirongwitanu na batandatu. 
Ezra2:15 Abo mu ba Adini n’amajana ane na mirongwitanu na bane. 
Ezra2:16 Abo mu ba Ateri, bo mu muryango wa Hezekiya, ni mirongwicenda n’ umunani." 
Ezra2:17 Abo mu ba Besayi n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Ezra2:18 Abo mu ba Yora n’ijana n’icumi na babiri. 
Ezra2:19 Abo mu ba Hashumu n’amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Ezra2:20 Ab’i Gibari ni mirongwicenda na batanu. 
Ezra2:21 Ab’i Betelehemu n’ijana na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Ezra2:22 Abagabo b’i Netofa ni mirongwitanu na batandatu. 
Ezra2:23 Abagabo b’i Anatoti n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani. 
Ezra2:24 Ab’i Azimaveti ni mirongwine na babiri. 
Ezra2:25 Ab’i Kiriyatarimu n’i Kefira n’i Beroti n’amajana ndwi na mirongwine na batatu. 
Ezra2:26 Ab’i Rama n’i Geba n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umwe. 
Ezra2:27 Abagabo b’i Mikimasi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na babiri. 
Ezra2:28 Abagabo b’i Beteli n’i Hayi n’ amajana abiri na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Ezra2:29 Ab’i Nebo ni mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Ezra2:30 Ab’i Magibishi n’ijana na mirongwitanu na batandatu. 
Ezra2:31 Ab’i Elamu handi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane. 
Ezra2:32 Ab’i Harimu n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri. 
Ezra2:33 Ab’i Lodi n’i Hadidi n’i Ono n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri na batanu. 
Ezra2:34 Ab’i Yeriko n’amajana atatu na mirongwine na batanu. 
Ezra2:35 Ab’i Sena n’ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitatu. 
Ezra2:36 Abaherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Yedaya, bo mu nzu ya Yosuwa, n’amajana cenda na mirongwirindwi na batatu." 
Ezra2:37 Abo mu ba Imeri n’igihumbi na mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Ezra2:38 Abo mu ba Pashuri n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwine n’indwi. 
Ezra2:39 Abo mu ba Harimu n’igihumbi n’icumi n’indwi. 
Ezra2:40 Abalewi n’aba: abo mu ba Yosuwa na Kadimiyeli, ari bo bandurutse kuri Hodaviya, ni mirongwirindwi na bane." 
Ezra2:41 Abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani. 
Ezra2:42 Mu bashibamyi, abo mu ba Shalumu, no mu ba Ateri, no mu ba Talimoni, no mu ba Akubu, no mu ba Hatita, no mu ba Shobayi, bose na bose n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’icenda." 
Ezra2:43 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero n’aba: abo mu ba Siha, no mu ba Hasufa, no mu ba Tabayoti," 
Ezra2:44 no mu ba Kerosi, no mu ba Siyaha, no mu ba Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 no mu ba Lebana, no mu ba Hagaba, no mu ba Akubu," 
Ezra2:46 no mu ba Hagabu, no mu ba Shamulayi, no mu ba Hanani," 
Ezra2:47 no mu ba Gideli, no mu ba Gahari, no mu ba Reyaya," 
Ezra2:48 no mu ba Resini, no mu ba Nekoda, no mu ba Gazamu," 
Ezra2:49 no mu ba Uza, no mu ba Paseya, no mu ba Besayi," 
Ezra2:50 no mu ba Asina, no mu ba Mehunimu, no mu ba Nefisimu," 
Ezra2:51 no mu ba Bakibuki, no mu ba Hakufa, no mu ba Harihuri," 
Ezra2:52 no mu ba Basiluti, no mu ba Mehida, no mu ba Harisha," 
Ezra2:53 no mu ba Barikosi, no mu ba Sisera, no mu ba Tema," 
Ezra2:54 no mu ba Nesiya, no mu ba Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo n’aba: abo mu ba Sotayi, no mu ba Hasofereti, no mu ba Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 no mu ba Yahala, no mu ba Darikoni, no mu ba Gideli," 
Ezra2:57 no mu ba Shefatiya, no mu ba Hatili, no mu ba Pokereti‐hasebayimu, no mu ba Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bose, bo n’abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo, bose na bose bar’ amajana atatu na mirongwicenda na babiri." 
Ezra2:59 Kand’ aba ni bo bādūze bava i Telimela n’i Teliharisha n’i Kerubu n’i Adani n’i Imeri, ariko vyarabananira kwerekana amazu ya ba sekuruza bandurutseko cank’ abo bakomotseko yukw ar’ Abisirayeli vy’ukuri." 
Ezra2:60 Abo mu ba Delaya no mu ba Tobiya no mu ba Nekoda n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Ezra2:61 Abo mu baherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Habaya, no mu ba Hakosi, no mu ba Baruzilayi, umwe yābiriye umugeni mu bakobga ba Baruzilayi w’Umunyagileyadi, agaca yitiranwa na sebukwe," 
Ezra2:62 abo bārondeye amazina yabo mu gitabo kidondora ba sekuruza, ntibayabona, ni co gituma biyumviriwe nk’abahumanye, bagakūrwa mu buherezi." 
Ezra2:63 Umucamateka arababuza ngo ntibarye ku vyera cane, kugeza igihe hazobonekera umuherezi afise Urimu na Tumimu." 
Ezra2:64 Nukw iryo shengero ryose iyo riva rikagera, bose na bose bar’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bibiri n’amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu;" 
Ezra2:65 udashizemw’ abagurano n’abaguranokazi babo, igitigiri cabo bar’ ibihumbi ndwi n’amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’indwi; kandi bari bafise abaririmvyi b’abagabo n’abagore amajana abiri." 
Ezra2:66 Amafarasi yabo yar’ amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu n’atandatu; n’inyumbu zabo zar’ amajana abiri na mirongwine na zitanu; 
Ezra2:67 n’ingamiya zabo zar’ amajana ane na mirongwitatu na zitanu, n’indogoba zabo ibihumbi bitandatu n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri." 
Ezra2:68 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, bāshitse ku kibanza c’ingoro y’ Uhoraho i Yerusalemu, batanga amashikanwa y’iyo ngoro y’Imana bivuye ku mitima, ngo bayihagarike ahantu hayo." 
Ezra2:69 Batanga uko bashoboye, bashira mu bubiko bg’ivyo kwubakisha amahera y’izahabu yitwa dariki ibihumbi mirongwitandatu na kimwe, n’ ifeza, ingero yitwa mina ibihumbi bitanu, n’imyambaro ijana y’abaherezi." 
Ezra2:70 Nukw abaherezi n’ Abalewi n’abantu bamwe baba i Yerusalemu no hafi yaho; abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bibera mu bisagara vyabo, n’abandi Bisirayeli bose mu bisagara vyabo." 
Ezra3:1 Maz’ ukwezi kugira indwi kubonetse, kand’ Abisirayeli bamaze kwibera mu bisagara vyabo, abantu bakoranira i Yerusalemu icarimwe." 
Ezra3:2 Maze Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki ahagararana na bagenzi biwe b’abaherezi na Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na bagenzi biwe, bubaka igicaniro c’ Imana y’Abisirayeli co kwoserezakw ibimazi, nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose umuntu w’Imana." 
Ezra3:3 Ico gicaniro bacubaka aho cahora, kuko bari batewe ubgoba n’abantu bo mur’ ivyo bihugu; bacoserezak’ Uhoraho ibimazi vyo mu gitondo n’ivyo ku mugoroba." 
Ezra3:4 Bagira imisi mikuru y’insago, nk’uko vyanditswe, batanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa vyo ku musi n’ umusi, nk’ukw igitigiri cavyo kiri, uko vyari vyarashinzwe ngo babikurikiranye uko bukeye;" 
Ezra3:5 hanyuma bakomeza gutanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa vy’intasība, n’ivyo mu mboneko z’amezi, n’ivy’ imisi mikuru yose yerejwe Uhoraho, n’ ivyo umuntu wese yagomba gushikanira Uhoraho ishikanwa bivuye ku mutima ukunze." 
Ezra3:6 Guhēra ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kw’indwi ni ho batanguye kwosereza Uhoraho ibimazi, arikw itanguriro ry’urusengero rwiwe ntiryaribgashirweho." 
Ezra3:7 Kandi bagerera abubatsi n’ababaji amahera, ab’i Sidoni n’ab’i Tiro babagerera ivyo kurya n’ibinyobga n’ amavuta, kugira ngo bazane ibiti vy’amasederi, babikūre i Lebanoni babizane ku kiyaga babishikane i Yopa, bakurikiye ibgirizwa ryashinzwe na Kuro Umwami w’i Buperesi." 
Ezra3:8 Nuko mu mwaka ugira kabiri uhereye aho bashikiye ku kibanza c’ingoro y’Imana i Yerusalemu, mu kwezi kwa kabiri, ni ho Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki batanguriye gukora, bafatanije n’abandi bagenzi babo b’abaherezi n’ Abalewi, n’abavuye mu kinyago bose bakaza i Yerusalemu; bashirah’ Abalewi, uhereye ku bamaze imyaka mirongwibiri no kuja hejuru, kugira ngo bahagarikire igikorwa c’ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Ezra3:9 Maze Yosuwa arīnega hamwe n’abahungu biwe na bagenzi biwe, na Kadimiyeli n’abahungu biwe, ari bo bandurutse kuri Yuda, baja gukoresha abakozi bakora igikorwa c’ingoro y’Imana, bafatanije na bene Henadadi n’ abahungu babo n’Abalewi bagenzi babo." 
Ezra3:10 Abubatsi bamaze kwubaka itanguriro ry’urusengero rw’Uhoraho, bashirah’ abaherezi, bambaye impuzu z’ubuherezi nyene, bafise inzumbete, n’Abalewi bo mu ba Asafu, bafise ivyo kuvuza vyitwa matowazi, ngo bahimbaze Uhoraho nk’uko vyagezwe na Dawidi umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
Ezra3:11 Bakaririmba bahāniranwa, bahimbaza Uhoraho bamushima, bat’ Erega ni mwiza, kukw imbabazi agirira Abisirayeli zamah’ ibihe bidashira. Maz’ abantu bose bashira amajwi hejuru, barasemerera batazira Uhoraho, kukw itanguriro ry’ingoro y’Uhoraho rimaze gushirwaho." 
Ezra3:12 Ariko benshi mu baherezi n’Abalewi n’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sekuruza, mber’ abatāma bose bari barabonye ingoro ya mbere, babonye itanguriro ry’iya kabiri rishinzwe imbere yabo, bararira cane baraboroga; arikw abandi benshi bavuza urwamo rw’akanyamuneza;" 
Ezra3:13 kand’ abantu ntibashobora gutandukanya urwamo rw’umunezero n’ urwamo rw’amarira; kukw abantu bayogora n’amajwi arenga, urwamo rwabo rukagera kure." 
Ezra4:1 Maz’ abansi b’Abayuda n’ab’ Ababenyamini bumvise yukw abāvuye mu kinyago bubakira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli urusengero," 
Ezra4:2 baca bēgēra Zerubabeli n’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, barababgira, bat’ Enda dufatanye namwe kwubaka, kuko dusenga Imana yanyu nk’uko namwe muyisenga; kandi twamye tuyishikanira ibimazi uhereye ku ngoma ya Esarihadoni, umwami w’i Ashuri yatudūganye akatuzana ino." 
Ezra4:3 Ariko Zerubabeli na Yosuwa n’abandi bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza b’Abisirayeli barabishura, bati Nta ho duhuriye namwe, vyotuma dufatanya kwubaka ingoro y’Imana yacu, ariko ni twebge twenyene tuzokwubakira Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli iyo ngoro, nk’uko Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi yabitugeze." 
Ezra4:4 Maz’ abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu badendebura amaboko y’Abayuda, bama bababurabuza mu kwubaka." 
Ezra4:5 Baha impēra abo kwigenera inama zo kubabuza gushitsa ivyo bagabiye; bikomeza birtyo igihe cose Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi yamaze ku ngoma, barinda bashitsa no ku ngoma ya Dariyo umwami w’i Buperesi nyene." 
Ezra4:6 Mbere ku ngoma ya Ahasuwerusi, ari ho agishika ku ngoma nyene, bandika ivyo kurega ababa i Buyuda n’ab’ i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra4:7 Kandi no ku ngoma ya Aritazeruzi, Bishilamu na Mitiredati na Tabeyeli na bagenzi babo bandi bandikiye Aritazeruzi umwami w’i Buperesi; ico cete canditswe mu nyuguti z’Abasiriya no mu rurimi rwabo." 
Ezra4:8 Rehumu umujanama na Shimushayi umukarani bandikira uwo mwami Aritazeruzi icete, barega ab’i Yerusalemu mur’ ubu buryo:" 
Ezra4:9 mbere Rehumu uwo mujanama na Shimushayi umukarani bafatanya kucandika na bagenzi babo bandi b’Abadinayi n’Abafarisatiki n’Abataripeli n’ Abafarisiti n’Abarikevi, n’Abanyababuloni n’Abashushanki n’ Abadehayi n’Abelamiti," 
Ezra4:10 n’ ayandi mahanga yose Osinapari umunyacubahiro ahambaye yajabukanye hakuno akabagerēra mu gisagara c’i Samariya, no mu kindi gihugu co hakuno y’ uruzi." 
Ezra4:11 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mur’ ico cete bāmwandikiye, ngo Ku mwami Aritazeruzi, twebge abasavyi bawe bo hakuno y’uruzi turagize bgakeye." 
Ezra4:12 Urazirikanye, Abayuda bāvuye iyo, bakaza bakadusanga i Yerusalemu, ubu bariko barasubira kwubaka ico gisagara kibi c’ikigarariji; bariko baruzuza uruzitiro, basana n’ amatanguriro." 
Ezra4:13 None nyaguhora ku ngoma, umenye yukw iki gisagara ni cubakwa, inzitiro zaco zikuzura, ntibazotanga ikori, cank’ ikibuguro, cank’ ingorore; nukw iherezo ryavyo abami bazokehanirwa." 
Ezra4:14 None rero kuko dutunzwe n’agasōsa kava i bgami, tukoya kuzohava tubona umwami akēngērwa, ni co catumye tugutumako, tukabikumenyesha," 
Ezra4:15 kugira ngo barondere mu gitabo kidonda ivyagenda biba ku ngoma za ba sogokuruza. Nuko uzobisanga mur’ ico gitabo, kand’ uzomenya yukw ico gisagara ar’igisagara cama kigarariza, kikazana ubuhombe ku bami no ku bihugu vyabo, kikāma gitera umugararizo uhereye no mu bihe vya kera; mbere ni vyo vyatumye ico gisagara nyene gisangangurwa." 
Ezra4:16 None rero nyaguhora ku ngoma, turakubūriye yukw ico gisagara ni cubakwa, inzitiro zaco zikuzura, ata mugabane uzoba ukironka hakuno y’uruzi." 
Ezra4:17 Maz’ umwami arungikira inyishu uwo mujanama Rehumu na Shimushayi umukarani na bagenzi babo baba i Samariya no mu bindi bihugu vyo hakurya y’ uruzi, ati N’amahoro. None rero" 
Ezra4:18 ca cete mwaturungikira barakinsomeye, ndagitahura neza." 
Ezra4:19 Nuko nshinga yuko babiserangura; maze basanga ico gisagara mu bihe vya kera caragarariza abami koko, ubugarariji n’ubugāba vyaraboneka muri co." 
Ezra4:20 Kandi ngo Hābamw’ abami bakomeye cane bāganza i Yerusalemu n’ igihugu cose co hakurya y’uruzi, ngo bagatorezwa ikori n’ikibuguro n’ingorore." 
Ezra4:21 Nuko rero ni mushinge icagezwe bareke kwubaka, ico gisagara coye kwubakwa, gushitsa aho jewe nyene nzoryīkūrira mu kanwa." 
Ezra4:22 Kandi mwame mugavye ntimureburure mur’ ivyo, kugira ngw ikibi ntikigwire, abami bagakehanirwa." 
Ezra4:23 Nukw ico cete c’umwami Aritazeruzi kimaze gusomerwa uwo mujanama Rehumu na Shimushayi umukarani na bagenzi babo, baca baja i Yerusalemu, ah’ Abayuda bari, bababuza kwubaka ku bubasha no ku kagōbēro." 
Ezra4:24 Nukw igikorwa c’ingoro y’ Imana ir’i Yerusalemu barakireka, gushitsa mu mwaka ugira kabiri Dariyo umwami w’i Buperesi ari ku ngoma." 
Ezra5:1 Maz’ abavugishwa n’Imana Hagayi na Zekariya mwene Ido bavugishwa mw izina ry’Imana y’Abisirayeli, babarira Abayuda bar’ i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra5:2 Bukeye Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki bakūra hasi, batangura gusubira kwubaka ingoro y’Imana ir’i Yerusalemu, bari kumwe n’ abo bavugishwa n’Imana babafasha." 
Ezra5:3 Mur’ iyo misi nyene Tatenayi icēgēra c’umwami co hakuno y’uruzi, na Shetari‐bozenayi na bagenzi babo, baza aho bari, barababaza, bati Ni nde yabahaye ibgirizwa ryo kwubaka iyi nzu, ngo mwuzuze n’uru ruzitiro?" 
Ezra5:4 Kandi barababaza, bat’ Abantu bubaka iyi nzu ni ba nde?" 
Ezra5:5 Arikw abakuru b’Abayuda, inyonga z’Imana yabo ziguma kuri bo, ntibābabuza kwubaka gushitsa batumye kuri Dariyo, icete c’inyishu kikagaruka." 
Ezra5:6 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mu cete canditswe na Tatenayi, icēgēra c’umwami co hakuno y’ uruzi, na Shetari‐bozenayi, na bagenzi babo b’Abafarisaki baba hakuno y’uruzi, bakakirungikira umwami Dariyo." 
Ezra5:7 Nuko bamurungikira icete canditswe girtya, ngo Ku mwami Dariyo, n’ amahoro neza." 
Ezra5:8 Urazirikanye ga mugenzi, twagiye mu gihugu c’i Buyuda ku nzu y’Imana nkuru yubakishwa amabuye manini‐manini, kand’ itambitswekw ibiti ku nsika zayo; ico gikorwa kirakomeza kuja imbere, bafise amaboko yabakundiye." 
Ezra5:9 None twabajije abo bakuru, tuti Ni nde yabahaye ibgirizwa ryo kwubaka iyi nzu, ngo mwuzuze n’uru ruzitiro?" 
Ezra5:10 Kandi twababajije amazina yabo, kugira ngo tuyakumenyeshe, twandika n’amazina y’abakuru babagaba." 
Ezra5:11 Nuko baratwishura, bati Tur’ abasavyi b’Imana Nyen’ ijuru n’isi, kandi turiko turasubira kwubaka ingoro yari yarubatswe kera, ubu hashize imyaka myinshi, iyo umwami ahambaye w’Abisirayeli yari yarubatse akayuzuza." 
Ezra5:12 Bat’ Ariko hanyuma ba sogokuruza baratsa Imana Nyen’ ijuru, ibatanga mu maboko ya Nebukadineza w’Umukaludaya, umwami w’i Babuloni, ni we yasanganguye iyo ngoro, ajana abantu i Babuloni ar’ inyagano." 
Ezra5:13 Bat’ Ariko mu mwaka wa mbere Kuro umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma, uwo mwami Kuro nyene yashinze ibgirizwa yukw iyi ngoro y’Imana yubakwa." 
Ezra5:14 Bati Mbere n’ibikoreshwa vy’izahabu n’ifeza vyahora mur’ iyo ngoro y’Imana, ivyo Nebukadineza yari yarasahuye muri yo, ari rwo rusengero rwahora hano i Yerusalemu, akabijana mu rusengero rw’i Babuloni, bat’ Umwami Kuro abikūra mur’ urwo rusengero rw’i Babuloni nyene, bishikirizwa umuntu yitwa Sheshibazari, uwo yari yaragize icēgēra ciwe." 
Ezra5:15 Bat’ Aramubgira, at’ Abīra ivyo bintu ubijane ku kibanza c’urusengero rw’i Yerusalemu, iyo nzu y’Imana isubire yubakwe mu kibanza cayo." 
Ezra5:16 Nuko bukeye uwo Sheshibazari araza, yubaka itanguriro ry’iyo nzu y’Imana i Yerusalemu nyene. Nuko rer’ uhereye ico gihe ugashitsa n’ubu iracubakwa, kandi ntiruzura." 
Ezra5:17 None rero nyaguhora ku ngoma, ni wabishima, barondere mu nzu y’ububīko bgawe aho nyene i Babuloni, barābe yuk’ umwami Kuro yoba yarashinze ibgirizwa koko ryo kwubaka iyo nzu y’Imana i Yerusalemu; uheze mugenzi, udutumeko utumenyeshe ic’ ugomba mur’ ivyo." 
Ezra6:1 Maz’ umwami Dariyo avuga ko barondera mu nzu ibīkwamw’ ibitabo vy’ivyabaye, ahabīkwa ibintu vy’igiciro i Babuloni;" 
Ezra6:2 babona umuzingo w’igitabo mu rugo rw’i bgami ahitwa Akimeta, mu gihugu c’i Bumedi; uwo muzingo wari wanditswemw’ ibi, ngw Icibutso:" 
Ezra6:3 mu mwaka wa mbere umwami Kuro ari ku ngoma, uwo mwami Kuro nyene yashinze ibgirizwa ry’ivy’ inzu y’Imana i Yerusalemu, kugira ngw isubire yubakwe, ibe ahantu batangira ibimazi; kand’ amatanguriro yayo bayubake bayakomeze; uburebure bgayo bg’igihagararo bube amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, amakika na yo abe amatambge mirongwitandatu nyene." 
Ezra6:4 Mu kwubaka bakurikiranye imirongo itatu y’amabuye manini‐manini n’umurongo w’ibiti bikiri bishasha; kand’ ibizotangwa kuri yo bize bikūrwe mu ngoro y’umwami. 
Ezra6:5 Kandi n’ibintu vy’imbombovu vyākūwe mur’ iyo nzu y’Imana vy’izahabu n’ifeza, ivyo Nebukadineza yari yaranyaze mu rusengero rw’i Yerusalemu, akabizana i Babuloni, ni bisubizweyo bijanwe mu rusengero rw’i Yerusalemu, ikintu cose gisubire mu kibanza cahoramwo, bishirwe mur’ iyo nzu y’Imana." 
Ezra6:6 None rero, Tatenayi, wewe cēgēra canje co hakurya y’uruzi, nawe Shetari‐bozenayi na bagenzi banyu b’Abafarisaki bo hakurya y’uruzi, ntimuje mur’ ivyo, s’ivyanyu;" 
Ezra6:7 mureke igikorwa c’ iyo nzu y’Imana kije imbere, mureke n’icēgēra canje kigaba Abayuda n’abakuru babo bubake iyo nzu y’Imana mu kibanza cayo." 
Ezra6:8 Kandi nshinze ibgirizwa ry’ ivyo mukwiye gukorera abakuru b’Abayuda mu vyo kwubakisha iyo nzu y’Imana: mugire umwete cane wo guha abo bantu ivyo bazotanga, kugira ngo hoye kuzogira ikibabuza gukora, muvyabiriye ku bintu vyanje, mbere kw ikori ry’ abo hakurya y’uruzi." 
Ezra6:9 Kandi n’ ivyo bazokena nk’amamasa y’ imikangara n’amapfizi y’intama n’ imyagazi y’intama nyene vyo gutangakw ibimazi vyo kwosereza Imana Nyen’ ijuru, n’ingano n’ umunyu na vino n’amavuta, ivyo abaherezi b’i Yerusalemu bazokwāka, baze bame babihabga uko bukeye, ntibasībe," 
Ezra6:10 kugira ngo baze bahore baha Imana Nyen’ ijuru ibimazi vy’umubabge umota neza, kandi bansabire kuramba, jewe umwami n’abahungu banje." 
Ezra6:11 Kandi nshinze itēka, k’umuntu wese azohindura iri bgirizwa, bazositura inkingi mu nzu yiwe, bayishinge bayimumanikeko, kand’ inzu yiwe bayihindure ikirundo c’isakamburira bamuhoye ivyo." 
Ezra6:12 Kand’ Imana yatumye izina ryayo rihaba, iragatsinda umwami wese n’ihanga ryose, abazorenga ibgirizwa ryanje, bakaramvura amaboko yabo, ngo basambure iyo nzu y’Imana i Yerusalemu. Jewe Dariyo nshinze iryo bgirizwa; rize rikorwe rishimikiwe." 
Ezra6:13 Hanyuma Tatenayi icēgēra c’ umwami co hakuno y’uruzi na Shetari‐bozenayi na bagenzi babo bumvise ijambo ry’umwami Dariyo, bagira umwete wo kubishitsa nk’uko yabatumyeko." 
Ezra6:14 Nukw abakuru b’Abayuda bagira ikiganza ciza mu kwubaka, bafashijwe n’ukuvugishwa kwa Hagayi uwavugishwa n’Imana na Zekariya mwene Ido. Barayubaka iruzura, nk’ukw ibgirizwa ry’Imana y’ Abisirayeli ryashinze, kandi no kubg’ icagezwe ca Kuro na Dariyo, na Aritazeruzi umwami w’i Buperesi." 
Ezra6:15 Iyo ngoro yuzura ku musi ugira gatatu w’ukwezi kwa Adari, kwo mu mwaka ugira gatandatu umwami Dariyo ari ku ngoma." 
Ezra6:16 Maz’ Abisirayeli n’abaherezi n’Abalewi, n’abandi bavuye mu kinyago, bagira umusi mukuru wo gushikiriza Imana iyo ngoro yayo banezerewe." 
Ezra6:17 Ico gihe co kuyishikiriza Imana, bātanze amamasa ijana n’amapfizi y’intama amajana abiri n’imyagazi y’intama amajana ane, kandi batangirira Abisirayeli bose amasuguru y’ impene cumi n’abiri, nk’ukw igitigiri c’imiryango y’Abisirayeli kingana, kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha." 
Ezra6:18 Bashirah’ abaherezi ukw imigabane yabo ikurikirana, n’Abalewi baja ku mbu zabo, ngo bakorere Imana i Yerusalemu, nk’uko vyanditswe mu gitabo ca Mose." 
Ezra6:19 Maz’ abavuye mu kinyago barya ivya Pasika ku musi w’icumi na kane w’ukwezi kwa mbere," 
Ezra6:20 kukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bari biyereje hamwe, bose bari batunganye; nuko babāga imyagazi ya Pasika kubg’ abavuye mu kinyago bose no kubg’ abaherezi bagenzi babo, no kubgabo na bo nyene." 
Ezra6:21 Nukw Abisirayeli bari bagarutse bavuye mu kinyago barya ivya Pasika, bo n’abantu bose bari bitandukanije n’ivy’ ubuhumane bgo mu bapagani bo mur’ ico gihugu, bagafatanya n’Abisirayeli gusenga Uhoraho Imana y’ Abisirayeli," 
Ezra6:22 bagira imisi mikuru ndwi y’imitsima itambiwe banezerewe, kuk’ Uhoraho yabanejereje, kand’ agahindurira umutima w’umwami w’i Ashuri kuri bo, ngw abunganire mu gukora igikorwa c’ingoro y’Imana, ari yo Mana y’Abisirayeli." 
Ezra7:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, ku ngoma ya Aritazeruzi umwami w’i Buperesi, haza Ezira mwene Seraya, Seraya wa Azariya, Azariya wa Hilukiya," 
Ezra7:2 Hilukiya wa Shalumu, Shalumu wa Sadoki, Sadoki wa Ahitubu," 
Ezra7:3 Ahitubu wa Amariya, Amariya wa Azariya, Azariya wa Merayoti," 
Ezra7:4 Merayoti wa Zerahiya, Zerahiya wa Uzi, Uzi wa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 Buki wa Abishuwa, Abishuwa wa Finehasi, Finehasi wa Eleyazari, Eleyazari wa Aroni umuherezi mukuru;" 
Ezra7:6 uwo Ezira aradūga ava i Babuloni; kandi yar’ umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe kandi w’umuhanga mu vy’ivyagezwe vya Mose vyatanzwe n’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli. Umwami amuha ivyo yamusavye vyose, abiheshwa n’ikiganza c’ Uhoraho Imana yiwe cari kuri we." 
Ezra7:7 Nuko bamwe mu Bisirayeli badūgana n’abaherezi bamwe n’ Abalewi n’abaririmvyi b’abashibamyi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero; abo baja i Yerusalemu mu mwaka ugira indwi Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma. 
Ezra7:8 Nuko Ezira ashika i Yerusalemu mu kwezi kwa gatanu kwo mu mwaka ugira indwi nyene uwo mwami ari ku ngoma. 
Ezra7:9 Yari yahagurutse ava i Babuloni ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere, maz’ ashika i Yerusalemu ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa gatanu, abihawe n’ikiganza ciza c’Imana cari kuri we;" 
Ezra7:10 kuko Ezira yari yarīnāmūye mu mutima kwitwaririka ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho ngw abishitse, kandi ngo yigishe mu Bisirayeli amabgirizwa n’amatēka." 
Ezra7:11 Aya majambo n’amwe n’ayo mu cete umwami Aritazeruzi yahaye Ezira umuherezi ari we mwanditsi, mbere yar’ umwanditsi azi amajambo y’ivyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho n’ivyo yashingiye Abisirayeli:" 
Ezra7:12 ngo Jewe Aritazeruzi umwami aganza abami, ndakwandikiye Ezira umuherezi, umunyabgenge azi ivyagezwe vy’Imana Nyen’ ijuru: n’amahoro neza?" 
Ezra7:13 None nshinze ibgirizwa ryo kurekura abo mu bantu b’ Abisirayeli bose baba mu bihugu vyanje bīgombera ubgabo kujana nawe i Yerusalemu, bo n’abaherezi babo n’Abalewi." 
Ezra7:14 Kuko jewe umwami n’abajanama banje ukw ar’ indwi, tugutumye ng’ uje kubaza ivy’ i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, nk’ukw ivyagezwe vy’Imana yawe bimeze, ivy’ ufise mu maboko yawe;" 
Ezra7:15 kandi ng’ ugende ujanye amafeza n’amazahabu, ayo jewe umwami n’abajanama banje twashikaniye Imana y’Abisirayeli iba i Yerusalemu," 
Ezra7:16 bo n’amafeza yose n’amazahabu uzosanga mu gihugu c’i Babuloni cose, hamwe n’amashikanwa y’abantu n’ay’ abaherezi, ayo bāshikaniye ingoro y’Imana yabo ir’ i Yerusalemu bivuye ku mitima;" 
Ezra7:17 ni co gituma ayo mahera ukwiye kugira umwete cane wo kuzoyagura amamasa n’ amapfizi y’intama bo n’imyagazi, hamwe n’amashikanwa y’amafu n’ay’ ibiturire agendana na vyo, ukazobitangira ku gicaniro c’ingoro y’Imana yanyu i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:18 Kand’ ibizosāguka kur’ ayo mafeza n’amazahabu, mwe na bagenzi banyu muze mubikoreshe uko mubona bikwiye, mukurikiye ivyo Imana yanyu igomba;" 
Ezra7:19 kand’ ibintu vy’imbombovu uhawe vyo gukoresha mu ngoro y’Imana yawe, uz’ ubishikirize iyo Mana y’i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:20 Kand’ ibintu vyose ingoro y’ Imana yawe izokenera, ivyo uzoba ukwiye gutanga, uz’ uhore ubikūra mu nzu ibīkwamw’ ibintu vyanje." 
Ezra7:21 Kandi jewe umwami Aritazeruzi, mbariye abazezwabintu banje bose bo hakurya y’ uruzi, ku vya Ezira umuherezi, umwanditsi w’ivyagezwe vy’Imana Nyen’ ijuru, yukw ivy’ azobāka vyose bizohora bitanganwa umwete," 
Ezra7:22 bikagarukira kw italanto z’ ifeza ijana, n’ingero zitwa koro z’ingano ijana, n’imibindi ya vino ijana, n’imibindi y’amavuta ijana nyene, n’umunyu utarinze kugerwa." 
Ezra7:23 Ic’ Imana Nyen’ ijuru izokwaka cose kize gihore kigirirwa ingoro yayo bidatevye, kugira ng’ uburake bgayo ntibube ku gihugu canje n’abahungu banje." 
Ezra7:24 Kandi turabamenyesha ivy’ abaherezi n’Abalewi, n’abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi, n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, n’abakozi bo mur’ iyo ngoro y’ Imana bose uko bangana, ko bitemewe ko bākwa ikori cank’ ikibuguro cank’ ingorore." 
Ezra7:25 Kandi nawe Ezira, nk’uk’ ubgenge bg’ Imana buri muri wewe, uz’ utore abashingantahe n’abacamanza bo gucīra imanza abantu bose bo hakurya y’uruzi, abazi ivyagezwe vy’Imana yawe bose; n’ūtabizi muze muhore mubimwigisha." 
Ezra7:26 Maz’ ūtazokwumvira ivyagezwe vy’Imana yawe n’ivyagezwe vyanje umwami, baze bagire umwete wo kumucīra urubanza, ar’ urwo kwicwa, cank’ urwo gucibga, cank’ urwo kunyagwa ivyiwe, cank’ urwo kubohwa." 
Ezra7:27 Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza aragahezagirwa, yashize mu mutima w’umwami imigabo imeze irtyo, yo gushariza ingoro y’Uhoraho ir’ i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra7:28 Kandi ni we yerekanye imbabazi ziwe kuri jewe imbere y’ umwami n’abajanama biwe, n’ imbere y’abaganwa biwe bose bahambaye. Nuko ndemeshwa n’ikiganza c’Uhoraho Imana yanje cari kuri jewe; nca nkoranya abakuru bo mu Bisirayeli ngo tudūgane." 
Ezra8:1 Aba ni bo bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza twādūganye tuva i Babuloni, ku ngoma y’umwami Aritazeruzi, kand’ uku ni kwo ba sekuruza badōndōrwa." 
Ezra8:2 Mu ba Finehasi ni Gerushomu; mu ba Itamari ni Daniyeli; mu ba Dawidi ni Hatushi," 
Ezra8:3 wo muri bene Shekaniya; mu ba Paroshi ni Zekariya, kandi yandikanywe n’ abagabo ijana na mirongwitanu banditswe mu gitabo kidōndōra ba sekuruza." 
Ezra8:4 Mu ba Pahati‐mowabu ni Elihowenayi mwene Zerahiya, kand’ uwo yandikanywe n’abagabo amajana abiri." 
Ezra8:5 Mu ba Shekaniya ni mwene Yahaziyeli, kand’ uwo yandikanywe n’ abagabo amajana atatu." 
Ezra8:6 Mu ba Adini ni Ebedi mwene Yonatani; uwo yandikanywe n’abagabo mirongwitanu. 
Ezra8:7 Mu ba Elamu ni Yeshaya mwene Ataliya, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo mirongwirindwi." 
Ezra8:8 Mu ba Shefatiya ni Zebadiya mwene Mikayeli, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo mirongumunani." 
Ezra8:9 Mu ba Yowabu ni Obadiya mwene Yehiyeli, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo amajana abiri n’icumi n’umunani." 
Ezra8:10 Mu ba Shelomiti ni mwene Yosifiya, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo ijana na mirongwitandatu." 
Ezra8:11 Mu ba Bebayi ni Zekariya mwene Bebayi nyene, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo mirongwibiri n’ umunani." 
Ezra8:12 Mu ba Azigadi ni Yohanani mwene Hakatani, na we yandikanywe n’abagabo ijana n’ icumi." 
Ezra8:13 Mu ba Adonikamu, ari bo baje hanyuma, aya ni yo mazina yabo: Elifeleti na Yeweli na Shemaya, na bo bandikanywe n’ abagabo mirongwitandatu." 
Ezra8:14 Kandi mu ba Bigivayi ni Utayi na Zabudi, na bo bandikanywe n’ abagabo mirongwirindwi." 
Ezra8:15 Nuko mbakoraniriza ku ruzi rusēsera muri Ahava, tuhaca insago, tuhamara imisi itatu. Nitegereje abo bantu n’abaherezi, nsanga nta n’umwe wo mu Balewi ari muri bo." 
Ezra8:16 Maze ntuma kuri Eliyezeri na Ariyeli na Shemaya na Elinatani na Yaribu na Elinatani wundi na Natani na Zekariya na Meshulamu, ari bo bantu b’abashingantahe, bo na Yoyaribu na Elinatani b’abigisha." 
Ezra8:17 Ndaheza ndabatuma kuri Ido w’umushingantahe w’ahītwa i Kasifiya, mbabgira ubutumwa bazomubgira bo na bagenzi biwe babawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’ urusengero, aho bāba i Kasifiya nyene, ngo baturungikire abo guhēreza mu ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Ezra8:18 Maze kubg’ ikiganza ciza c’ Imana yacu cari kuri twebge batuzanira umuntu w’umunyabgenge wo mu bandurutse kuri Mahili, Mahili wa Lewi, Lewi wa Isirayeli; batuzanira na Sherebiya n’abahungu biwe na bagenzi biwe ukw ar’ icumi n’umunani," 
Ezra8:19 na Hashabiya hamwe na Yeshaya wo mu bandurutse kuri Merari, na bagenzi biwe n’abahungu babo ukw ari mirongwibiri," 
Ezra8:20 bo n’abo mu bahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, abandurutse ku bo Dawidi n’abāmutwarira bāri bāratanze ngo bakorere Abalewi, abanyebango amajana abiri na mirongwibiri, bose badōndwa amazina yabo." 
Ezra8:21 Maze ntāngāriza aho nyene kur’ urwo ruzi Ahava ivyo kwisonzesha, kugira ngo twicishe bugufi imbere y’Imana yacu, ngo tuyisabe iduhe kugira urugendo rwiza, twebge n’abana bacu n’ ibintu vyacu vyose." 
Ezra8:22 Kuko vyanteye isoni gusaba umwami umuce w’ingabo n’abagendera ku mafarasi, ngo baze badutabare kwivuna abansi bodutegera mu nzira; kuko twari twabgiye umwami, tut’ Ikiganza c’Imana yacu kiri ku bayitwaririka bose, ngw ibagirire neza; arik’ ububasha bgayo n’uburake birwanya abayireka bose." 
Ezra8:23 Nuko turisonzesha, dusaba Imana tuyinginga, iraheza yemera kutwumvira." 
Ezra8:24 Maze ntora icumi na babiri mu bakuru b’abaherezi, ari bo Sherebiya na Hashabiya, n’abandi cumi muri bagenzi babo." 
Ezra8:25 Maz’ amafeza n’amazahabu n’ ibintu vy’imbombovu mbigera ku munzane babona, ari vyo vyatanzwekw amashikanwa y’ingoro y’ Imana yacu, ivy’ umwami n’ abajanama biwe n’abaganwa biwe n’Abisirayeli bāriho bose bāshikanye." 
Ezra8:26 Nuko ndabigera, ndaheza ndabibazēza, ar’ italanto z’ ifeza amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu, n’ibintu vy’imbombovu bicuzwe mu mafeza italanto ijana, n’italanto z’izahabu ijana nyene;" 
Ezra8:27 n’ibikombe vy’izahabu mirongwibiri biciye amahera yitwa dariki igihumbi, n’ibikoreshwa bibiri vy’imiringa myiza isenwe y’ igiciro kinini nk’ic’ izahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Ndababgira, nti Mwebge mur’ aberejwe Uhoraho, n’ibintu vy’ imbombovu na vyo nyene n’ ivyera, kand’ ayo mafeza n’amazahabu ni yo mashikanwa bashikaniye Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza bivuye ku mitima." 
Ezra8:29 Muvyitwaririke mubizigame, kugeza aho muzobigerera ku munzane imbere y’abakuru b’abaherezi n’Abalewi n’abakuru b’ amazu ya ba sogokuruza b’Abisirayeli, mu vyumba vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra8:30 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bākīra ayo mafeza n’amazahabu n’ibindi bintu uk’ urugero rwavyo rwangana, ngo babijane i Yerusalemu mu ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Ezra8:31 Maze ku musi ugira icumi na kabiri w’ukwezi kwa mbere turahaguruka tuva kur’ urwo ruzi Ahava, ngo tuje i Yerusalemu; ikiganza c’Imana yacu kiba kuri twebge, iradukiza ngo ntitugwe mu maboko y’abansi n’abaturyamiye mu mayira." 
Ezra8:32 Dushitse i Yerusalemu turuhuka imisi itatu. 
Ezra8:33 Maze ku musi ugira kane bagera ku munzane ayo mafeza n’ amazahabu n’ibindi bintu, babigerera mu ngoro y’Imana yacu, babishikiriza Meremoti mwene Uriya umuherezi, ari kumwe na Eleyazari mwene Finehasi, kandi bari bafatanije na Yozabadi mwene Yosuwa na Nowadiya mwene Binuwi, b’Abalewi." 
Ezra8:34 Vyose barabiharūra ukw igitigiri cavyo n’ukuriba kwavyo vyangana. Ico gihe nyene ukuriba kwavyo kwose kurandikwa. 
Ezra8:35 Maz’ abāgarutse bavuye mu kinyago bosereza Imana y’Abisirayeli ibimazi; batanga amamasa cumi n’abiri kw ikimazi c’Abisirayeli bose, n’amapfizi y’ intama mirongwicenda n’atandatu, n’imyagazi y’intama mirongwirindwi n’indwi; batanga n’amasuguru y’impene cumi n’abiri kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; ivyo vyose vyabaye ikimazi coserezwa Uhoraho." 
Ezra8:36 Maz’ amajambo y’ umwami bayashikiriza ivyēgēra vyiwe n’abaganza hakuno y’uruzi, na bo batanga ivyo gufasha abantu bo n’ingoro y’Imana." 
Ezra9:1 Nukw ivyo vyose birangiye, abakuru baraza barambarira, bat’ Abisirayeli n’abaherezi n’ Abalewi ntibitandukanije n’abantu bo mur’ ibi bihugu, ariko bakora ivy’ ubuyobe, ivy’ Abanyakanani n’ivy’ Abaheti n’ivy’ Abaferizi n’ivy’ Abayebusi n’ivy’ Abamoni n’ivy’ Abanyamowabu n’ivy’ Abanyegiputa n’ivy’ Abamori;" 
Ezra9:2 kuk’ ubgabo bābiriye abageni bo muri bo, bakabashingira n’abahungu babo, bigatuma uruvyaro rwera rusukirana n’urw’ abantu bo mur’ ibi bihugu; mber’ abakuru n’abashingantahe ni bo babaye aba mbere mur’ ico gicumuro." 
Ezra9:3 Maze numvise ivyo nitantamurirakw imvune bo n’umutamana, nishikura umushatsi nishikura n’ ubganwa, nicara numiwe." 
Ezra9:4 Maz’ aho ndi hakoranira abahindishwa agashitsi bose n’amajambo y’ Imana y’Abisirayeli, kubg’ igicumuro c’abavuye mu kinyago; nkomeza kwicara numiwe, gushitsa ku gihe co gutanga ikimazi ca ni kera." 
Ezra9:5 Ikimazi ca ni kera kimaze gushikanwa, mva hasi aho nari nicaye ntēterewe, imvune yanje n’ umutamana wanje ar’ ibitabagurike; nca nkubita amavi hasi, nayira amaboko Uhoraho Imana yanje;" 
Ezra9:6 ndavuga, nt’ Ewe Mana yanje, isoni ziriko zirammwa, mu maso hanje hāhīndānye, bimbuza kukwunamurirakw amaso, Mana yanje, kukw ibigabitanyo vyacu bigwiriye, bikaba umurengera, ivyo twakoze biradutsinze, vyarundanye bigera mw ijuru." 
Ezra9:7 Uhereye mu bihe vya ba sogokuruza twamye dukora ibidutsinda vyinshi cane, gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu; kand’ ibigabitanyo vyacu ni vyo vyatumye twe n’abami bacu n’ abaherezi bacu tugaburwa mu maboko y’abami bo mu bindi bihugu, tukagenda twicwa n’ inkota, tukajanwa tur’ imbohe, tukanyagwa utwacu, tukaba ibimāramāre nk’uko bimeze uyu musi." 
Ezra9:8 Ariko noneho mur’ aka kanya gatoya Uhoraho Imana yacu atweretse ikigongwe ciwe, adusigariza amasigarira, adushimangiye nk’umusumari Ahēra hiwe, kugira ngw akeshe amaso yacu, aduhēmbūre buhoro mu bugurano bgacu." 
Ezra9:9 Kuko na none tur’ abagurano; arikw Imana yacu ntiyaduhebeye mu bugurano bgacu, arikw itugirira ikigongwe, yerekana imbabazi kuri twebge imbere y’abami b’i Buperesi, iraduhēmbūra, kugira ngo dusubire twubake ingoro y’Imana yacu, kandi ngo dusane ahasenyutse hayo, ngw iduhe n’uruzitiro rudukikije i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu." 
Ezra9:10 None ga Mana yacu, ivyo ko vyabaye birtyo, twovuga iki kandi? Ko twaretse ivyagezwe vyawe," 
Ezra9:11 ivyo washingiye mu basavyi bawe wavugisha, ukavuga, ut’ Igihugu mugiyemwo ngo mucegukire n’igihugu candujwe n’ibizira vy’amahanga yo mur’ ivyo bihugu, n’ivy’ ubuyobe bakora, bacujuje ubuhumane bgabo hose iyo kiva kikagera;" 
Ezra9:12 kand’ uti Ntimuze mushingirane na bo, ntimuze mwigere mubendeza ivy’ amahoro cank’ ivyiza, kugira ngo mubone kugira inkomezi, murye ivyiza vyo mu gihugu, muzokiraga n’abana banyu kibe inyegu yabo ibihe vyose." 
Ezra9:13 None rero kw ivyo vyose bidushitseko, tukaba dutsinzwe n’ivyo twakoze vyinshi, tuzize ingeso zacu mbi, nawe Mana yacu ukaba utaduhannye igihano cari gikwiranye n’ibigabitanyo vyacu, kuk’ udushigarije amasigarira angana artya," 
Ezra9:14 mbega twongeye kurenga ivyagezwe vyawe, dushingirana n’abanyamahanga bakora ivyo bintu vy’ ubuyobe? Ntuca uturakira kugeza uturanduye, ntihagire amasigarira canke n’uwa kirazira?" 
Ezra9:15 Uhoraho Mana y’Abisirayeli, ni wewe ugororoka; kuko twebge dusigaye tur’ amasigarira, nk’uko bimeze uyu musi; rāba tur’ imbere yawe dutsinzwe n’urubanza; ivyo ni vyo bituma tudashobora guhagarara imbere yawe." 
Ezra10:1 Nuko Ezira agisenga yātura, kand’ arira, yikubise hasi imbere y’ingoro y’Imana, ikoraniro rinini cane ry’Abisirayeli, abagabo n’abagore n’abana, bakoranira ah’ ari; kand’ abantu bararira cane." 
Ezra10:2 Maze Shekaniya mwene Yehiyeli, umwe wo mu bandurutse kuri Elamu, abgira Ezira, ati Twacumuye ku Mana yacu, ko twābiriye abanyamahangakazi bo mu mahanga yo mur’ ibi bihugu; yamara naho bimeze birtyo haracar’ ivyizigiro vy’ukw Abisirayeli bokira." 
Ezra10:3 Nuko rero none dusezerane isezerano n’Imana yacu yuko twirukana abo bagore bose n’ abana bāvyaye, dukurikiye inama yawe mugenzi, n’iy’ abubaha icagezwe c’Imana yacu; kandi bigenzwe nk’ukw ivyagezwe bigera." 
Ezra10:4 Va hasi, kukw ar’ ivyawe, kandi turi kumwe nawe; shira ubgoba, ubikore." 
Ezra10:5 Nuko Ezira aca ava hasi, arahiza abakuru b’ abaherezi n’Abalewi n’Abisirayeli bose, yuko bazobigenza nk’uko bagiye inama. Nuko bararahira." 
Ezra10:6 Maze Ezira arahaguruka ava imbere y’ingoro y’Imana, aja mu cumba ca Yehohanani mwene Eliyashibu; arikw ashitseyo ntiyagira ic’ atamira, nta n’amazi yasomye, kuko yari yababajwe n’ igicumuro c’abāvuye mu kinyago." 
Ezra10:7 Hanyuma batāngāza i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu ngw abavuye mu kinyago bose bakoranire i Yerusalemu; 
Ezra10:8 kandi ngo mu misi itatu, ūtazoba yaje nk’ukw abakuru n’ abashingantahe bahuje inama, azonyagwa ivyiwe vyose, kandi na we ubgiwe agacibga mw ikoraniro ry’ abavuye mu kinyago." 
Ezra10:9 Nuko mur’ iyo misi itatu Abayuda n’Ababenyamini bose bari bamaze gukoranira i Yerusalemu; hāri ku musi ugira mirongwibiri w’ukwezi kw’icenda; abantu bose bagandagaza ku kibuga imbere y’ ingoro y’Imana, bahindishwa agashitsi n’ivyo, kandi n’uko hāri n’ imvura nyinshi." 
Ezra10:10 Maze Ezira umuherezi arahaguruka, arababarira, ati Mwaracumuye, mwābīra abagore b’abanyamahangakazi, mwongerereza Abisirayeli icaha." 
Ezra10:11 None ni mwaturire Uhoraho Imana ya ba sogokuruza ivyo, mukore ivy’ igomba, mwitandukanye n’amahanga yo mu bihugu n’abagore b’abanyamahangakazi." 
Ezra10:12 Nukw ikoraniro ryose bamwishura n’ijwi rirenga, bat’ Ic’ utugezeko ni co twemeye gukora." 
Ezra10:13 Arikw abantu ni benshi, kandi n’igihe c’imvura nyinshi, ntitwoshobora guhagarara hanze. Kand’ ico gikorwa s’ic’ umusi umwe cank’ ibiri, kuko twacumuye cane mur’ ivyo." 
Ezra10:14 None rer’ abakuru bacu ni basigarire iri koraniro ryose; maz’ abo mu bisagara vyacu bose bābiriye abanyamahangakazi, baze bame baza mu bihe bishinzwe, bāzanywe n’abakuru b’ibisagara vyose n’abacamanza bavyo, bashitse igihe uburake bg’Imana yacu bg’inkazi buzotuvirako, ubgo yatugiriye kubg’ ivyo bintu." 
Ezra10:15 Ariko Yonatani mwene Asaheli na Yahazeya mwene Tikuva ni bo bāvuye hasi bahakana iyo nama; kandi bafatanya na Meshulamu na Shabetayi Umulewi. 
Ezra10:16 Nukw abavuye mu kinyago babigenza bartyo. Maze Ezira umuherezi na bamwe bo mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, baratorwa, nk’ukw amazu yabo ari, bose bahamagarwa mu mazina yabo; nuko ku musi wa mbere w’ ukwezi kw’icumi baricara barabisuzuma." 
Ezra10:17 Ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kwa mbere bari barangije ivy’ abantu bose bari barābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi. 
Ezra10:18 Abo mu bana b’abaherezi bābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi ni Mayaseya na Eliyezeri na Yaribu na Gedaliya muri bene Yosuwa, Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki, na bagenzi biwe." 
Ezra10:19 Abo bararahira bakorana mu ntoke yuko birukana abagore babo; kandi batanga impfizi y’ intama kw iciru, kuko batsinzwe n’urubanza." 
Ezra10:20 Muri bene Imeri, ni Hanani na Zebadiya." 
Ezra10:21 Muri bene Harimu, ni Mayaseya na Eliya na Shemaya na Yehiyeli na Uziya." 
Ezra10:22 Muri bene Pashuri, ni Eliyowenayi na Mayaseya na Ishimayeli na Netaneli na Yozabadi na Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Mu Balewi, ni Yozabadi na Shimeyi na Kelaya (ari we Kelita), na Petahiya na Yuda na Eliyezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Mu baririmvyi, ni Eliyashibu; mu bashibamyi, ni Shalumu na Telemu na Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Mu Bisirayeli bandi, abo mu ba Paroshi, ni Ramiya na Iziya na Malikiya na Miyamini na Eleyazari na Malakiya na Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Mu ba Elamu, ni Mataniya na Zekariya na Yehiyeli na Abudi na Yeremoti na Eliya." 
Ezra10:27 Mu ba Zatu, ni Eliyowenayi na Eliyashibu na Mataniya na Yeremoti na Zabadi na Aziza." 
Ezra10:28 Mu ba Bebayi, ni Yehohanani na Hananiya na Zabayi na Atilayi." 
Ezra10:29 Mu ba Bani, ni Meshulamu na Maluki na Adaya na Yashubu na Sheyeli na Yeremoti." 
Ezra10:30 Mu ba Pahati‐mowabu, ni Adina na Kelali na Benaya na Mayaseya na Mataniya na Besaleli na Binuwi na Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Mu ba Harimu, ni Eliyezeri na Ishiya na Malikiya na Shemaya na Simeyoni," 
Ezra10:32 na Benyamini na Maluki na Shemariya. 
Ezra10:33 Mu ba Hashumu, ni Matenayi na Matata na Zabadi na Elifeleti na Yeremayi na Manase na Shimeyi." 
Ezra10:34 Mu ba Bani, ni Mayadayi na Amuramu na Uweli," 
Ezra10:35 na Benaya na Bedeya na Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 na Vaniya na Meremoti na Eliyashibu," 
Ezra10:37 na Mataniya na Matenayi na Yahasu," 
Ezra10:38 na Bani na Binuwi na Shimeyi," 
Ezra10:39 na Shelemiya na Natani na Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 na Makinadebayi na Shashayi na Sharayi," 
Ezra10:41 na Azareli na Shelemiya na Shemariya," 
Ezra10:42 na Shalumu na Amariya na Yosefu. 
Ezra10:43 Mu ba Nebo, ni Yeyeri na Matitiya na Zabadi na Zebina na Ido na Yoweli na Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Abo bose bāri bābiriye abagore b’abanyamahangakazi, mbere bamwe muri bo bāri bamaze kuvyarana abana." 
Nehemiah1:1 Amajambo ya Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya. Mu kwezi kwa Kisilevu, mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri, nari nsanzwe ndi ku murwa i Shushani." 
Nehemiah1:2 Maze Hanani, umwe wo muri bene wacu, araza azananye n’abantu bamwe bavuye i Buyuda. Mbabaza inkuru z’amasigarira y’ Abayuda, abāri barasigaye batajanywe ar’ inyagano, mbabaza n’ inkuru z’i Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Barambgira, bat’ Abāri barasigaye mur’ ico gihugu batājanywe ar’ inyagano bari n’amarushwa menshi n’ibitētērwa, kand’ inzitiro z’ amabuye z’i Yerusalemu zarasenyutse, n’amarembo yaho yarahiye." 
Nehemiah1:4 Nuko mmaze kwumva izo nkuru nca nicara ngaho ndarira, mmara imisi mbabaye nisonzesha, nsengera imbere y’Imana Nyen’ ijuru." 
Nehemiah1:5 Ndavuga, nti Ndakwinginze, ewe Uhoraho, Mana Nyen’ ijuru, Mana nkuru uteye ubgoba, ukagumya isezerano n’ imbabazi ugirira abagukunda bakitondera ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Nehemiah1:6 None tega ugutwi kwawe wumvirize, tereza n’inyonga zawe witegereze, kugira ngo wumve ugusenga kwanje, jewe umusavyi wawe nsengera imbere yawe mur’ iyi misi ku murango no mw ijoro, nkwingingira abasavyi bawe b’ Abisirayeli, nātura ivyaha twebge Abisirayeli twagucumuyeko; mbere twe n’inzu ya data twaracumuye." 
Nehemiah1:7 Eka twaragucumuyeko bikomeye, ntitwitondeye ivyagezwe vyawe n’ivyo washinze n’amabgirizwa yawe, ivyo wageze umusavyi wawe Mose." 
Nehemiah1:8 Ni wibuke ijambo wabariye umusavyi wawe Mose, uti Ni mwandyaruka nzobashwiragiriza mu mahanga;" 
Nehemiah1:9 ut’ Ariko ni mwampindukirira, mukitondera ivyagezwe vyanje mukabishitsa, nah’ abirukanywe bo muri mwebge bazoba bar’ iy’ ijuru riherera, uti Sinobura kubakūrayo nkabēgeranya, nkabazana ha hantu nitoranirije ngw izina ryanje rihabe." 
Nehemiah1:10 None rero, abo ni bo basavyi bawe, kandi n’abantu bawe wacunguje ububasha bgawe bginshi bo n’ukuboko kwawe kw’ inkomezi." 
Nehemiah1:11 Bgirukiro, ndakwinginze, tega ugutwi wumve ugusenga kwanje, jewe umusavyi wawe, wumve n’ugusenga kw’ abasavyi bawe bakunda kwubaha izina ryawe, untabare jewe umusavyi wawe, umpe kugira amahirwe uyu musi, no guhangazwa n’uwo muntu nsavye. Kuko nari nsanzwe nd’ umukevyi mpereza umwami igiturire." 
Nehemiah2:1 Nuko mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri umwami Aritazeruzi ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa Nisani, umusi ur’ izina vino yar’ iteretse imbere y’umwami, maze ndayābira, ndayimuhēreza. Kandi sinaribgagire umubabaro nd’ imbere yiwe." 
Nehemiah2:2 Nuk’ umwami arambaza, ati Mbega k’ubabaye, wiraburaniwe mu maso, kand’ utarwaye? Ivyo ntibiterwa n’ikindi, atar’ umubabaro wo mu mutima. Ndaheza ngira ubgoba bginshi;" 
Nehemiah2:3 ndamwishura, nti Mwami nyaguhora ku ngoma, mbega nobura kwiraburanirwa, igisagara ca ba sogokuruza, aho bāhambge, carabaye amatongo kand’ amarembo yaco yarahiye?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Nuk’ umwami arambaza, ati Non’ ugomba iki? Nca nsenga Imana Nyen’ ijuru." 
Nehemiah2:5 Maze nishura umwami, nti Ni wabishima ga mugenzi, nkagira ubutoni imbere yawe, ico ngusaba n’ukugira ng’ undungike i Buyuda, mu gisagara kirimw’ imva za ba sogokuruza, nsubire ndacubake." 
Nehemiah2:6 Kand’ umwami yar’ avyagiye ngaho ari kumwe n’umwamikazi wiwe; nukw arambaza, at’ Urugendo rwawe ruzoba urw’ imisi ingahe kand’ uzogaruka ryari? Nuk’ umwami yemera kundekura, nanje nca ndamubgira igihe." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ndaheza ndamubarira, nti Ni wabishima ga mugenzi, mpabge ivyete nshīra ivyēgēra vyawe vyo hakurya y’ uruzi, kugira ngo bemere kumpa inzira nshike i Buyuda," 
Nehemiah2:8 bo n’ icete nshira Asafu, umurinzi arinda icibare cawe, kugira ngw ampe ibiti vyo kubāza ibikingi vy’amarembo y’igihome c’abashibamyi co ku ngoro, bo n’ivy’ uruzitiro rw’igisagara n’ivy’ inzu nzobamwo. Nuk’ umwami arabinyemerera, abitewe n’ikiganza ciza c’Imana cari kuri jewe." 
Nehemiah2:9 Maze ngenda njanye n’abagabisha b’ingabo bo n’abagendera ku mafarasi umwami yampaye, nshikīra ivyēgēra vyiwe vyo hakurya y’uruzi, mbahēreza ivyete umwami yandungikanye." 
Nehemiah2:10 Buno Sanibalati Umuhoroni bo na Tobiya Umwamoni w’umugurano bavyumvise, bibamerera nabi cane yuko haje umuntu ababaye Abisirayeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Nuko nshitse i Yerusalemu mmaray’ imisi itatu. 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndaheza mpenga mw ijoro mvyukana n’ abantu bake, kandi sinagize umuntu n’umwe mbgira ivyo Imana yashize mu mutima wanje ngo ndabikorere Yerusalemu; kandi nta mafarasi twajanye atar’ iyo nagenderako." 
Nehemiah2:13 Nukw iryo joro nca mw irembo rija ku mwonga, nkomeza inzira y’isōko y’ikiyoka, nshika no kw irembo bācishamw’ umwavu, ngenda nitegereza inzitiro z’amabuye z’i Yerusalemu ukuntu zāsenyutse, n’amarembo yaho ingene yahiye." 
Nehemiah2:14 Maze nkomeza inzira nshika kw irembo rija kw iriba, nshika no ku kidengeri c’umwami, ariko ntihaboneka inzira ifarasi nagenderako icamwo." 
Nehemiah2:15 Nukw iryo joro nyene nsubira kudūgana akagezi, nkomeza kugenda nitegereza inzitiro, ndaheza ndakevya nsubira guca muri rya rembo rija ku mwonga; nuko ndataha." 
Nehemiah2:16 Arikw abakuru ntibari bazi iyo nagiye cank’ ico nakoze, kandi nta co naribgabarire Abayuda, ar’ abaherezi cank’ abanyacubahiro cank’ abakuru cank’ abandi bose bazokorana nanje ico gikorwa." 
Nehemiah2:17 Maze ndababarira, nti Mbega ntimubona ayo twabonye, ingen’ i Yerusalemu hahindutse imisaka, n’amarembo yaho akaba yarahīye! Enda ni muze dusubire twubake uruzitiro rwaho, kugira ngo twoye kwama tur’ agatwengo." 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndaheza mbiganira ingen’ ikiganza ciza c’Imana yanje cabaye kuri jewe, mbiganira n’amajambo umwami yambgiye; na bo baravuga, bati Ni tuve hasi twubake. Nuko bariyungunganya, bashirako bakora ico gikorwa ciza." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ariko Sanibalati Umuhoroni, na Tobiya Umwamoni w’umugurano, na Geshemu Umwarabo, bavyumvise baradushinyagurira, batubarirana agakengerwe, bat’ Ivyo mukora n’ibiki? Mbega s’ uko mugomba kugarariza umwami?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Nanje ndabishura, nt’ Imana yo mw ijuru ni yo izotuma bikunda, ni co gituma twebge abasavyi bayo dushirako tukubaka; ariko mweho nta mugabane, nta bubasha, nta n’icibutso mufise i Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah3:1 Bukeye Eliyashibu, umuherezi mukuru, hamwe na bagenzi biwe b’abaherezi, bashirako bubaka irembo ry’intama; bararihezagira, bashiraho n’inzugi zaryo; bakomeza kwubaka barinda bashitsa ku munara wa Hameya, na wo barawuhezagira; bavudukaho bashitsa no ku munara wa Hananeli." 
Nehemiah3:2 Maz’ ab’ i Yeriko bahēra aho Eliyashibu yagarukiye, barubaka; bakurikirwa na Zakuri mwene Imuri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Irembo ryitwa iry’ Amafi ryubakwa na bene Hasenaya, barishiramw’ imitambikwa yaryo, baterako n’inzugi zaryo n’ivyuma vyo kuzigumya n’ibihindizo vyazo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Bakurikirwa na Meremoti mwene Uriya, Uriya wa Hakosi, mu kuhasana; na we akurikirwa na Meshulamu mwene Berekiya, Berekiya wa Meshezabeli; na we akurikirwa na Sadoki mwene Bayana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Bakurikirwa n’ab’i Tekowa, arikw abapfasoni bo muri bo ntibarushe bemera gukora igikorwa ca Segaba." 
Nehemiah3:6 Irembo rya kera ryasanwe na Yoyada mwene Paseya na Meshulamu mwene Besodeya; barishiramw’ imitambikwa yaryo, baterako n’inzugi zaryo n’ivyuma vyo kuzigumya n’ibihindizo vyazo." 
Nehemiah3:7 Bakurikirwa na Melatiya w’i Gibeya na Yadoni w’i Meronoti, hamwe n’ab’i Gibeya n’ab’i Misipa bo mu baganzwa n’icēgēra c’ umwami co hakuno y’uruzi." 
Nehemiah3:8 Bakurikirwa na Uziyeli mwene Harihaya, umwe wo mu bacuzi b’izahabu; na we akurikirwa na Hananiya, umwe wo mu bahinga bazi kwinjiza imibavu; nuko basana inzitiro z’i Yerusalemu bashitsa no ku ruzitiro rw’intimba nini." 
Nehemiah3:9 Bakurikirwa na Refaya mwene Huri, umukuru aganza igice kimwe c’intāra y’i Yerusalemu;" 
Nehemiah3:10 akurikirwa na Yedaya mwene Harumafu, asana aherekeye inzu yiwe; na we akurikirwa na Hatushi mwene Hashabuneya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malakiya mwene Harimu, na Hashubu mwene Pahati‐mowabu, basana ikindi gice, bo n’umunara wo ku matanure." 
Nehemiah3:12 Akurikirwa na Shalumu mwene Haloheshi, umukuru aganza ikindi gice c’i Yerusalemu nyene, na we arasana, bo n’abakobga biwe." 
Nehemiah3:13 Irembo rija ku mwonga ryasanwe na Hanuni bo n’abantu b’i Zanowa; bararyubaka, baterako n’inzugi zaryo n’ivyuma vyo kuzigumya n’ibihindizo vyazo, basana uruzitiro rw’amatambge igihumbi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, bageza kw irembo ricishwamw’ umwavu." 
Nehemiah3:14 Iryo rembo ricishwamw’ umwavu ryasanwe na Malakiya mwene Rekabu, umukuru aganza intāra y’i Beti‐hakeremu; araryubaka, aterakw inzugi zaryo n’ ivyuma vyo kuzigumya n’ibihindizo vyazo." 
Nehemiah3:15 Irembo rija kw iriba risanwa na Shalumu mwene Koli‐hoze, umukuru aganza intāra y’i Misipa, araryubaka ararisakara, ariterakw inzugi zaryo, n’ivyuma vyo kuzigumya n’ibihindizo vyazo, yubaka n’uruzitiro rwo ku kidengeri Shela co ku ndimiro y’umwami, kurinda ashitsa ahagenda hadondagirwa hamanuka hava ku gisagara ca Dawidi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Hakurikira Nehemiya mwene Azibuki, umukuru aganza igice c’intāra y’i Beti‐suri, agenda arasana ashitsa aharābana n’imva za Dawidi, no ku kidengeri cāgomewe, arinda ashitsa no ku nzu y’abahizi." 
Nehemiah3:17 Akurikirwa n’Abalewi, Rehumu mwene Bani, na we akurikirwa na Hashabiya, umukuru aganza igice c’ intāra y’i Keyila, asana akorera intāra yiwe." 
Nehemiah3:18 Hakurikira bagenzi babo bava mu kindi gice c’ intāra y’i Keyila nyene, umukuru ni Bavayi mwene Henadadi." 
Nehemiah3:19 Hakurikira umukuru w’i Misipa, ni we Ezeri mwene Yeshuwa, asana igihimba kirābana n’ahadondagirwa hadūga ku nzu y’ ibirwanishwa iri ku mfuruka y’ uruzitiro." 
Nehemiah3:20 Akurikirwa na Baruki mwene Zabayi, asana ikindi gihimba afise umwete, ahereye kur’ iyo mfuruka nyene, arinda ashitsa ku muryango w’inzu ya Eliyashibu umuherezi mukuru." 
Nehemiah3:21 Akurikirwa na Meremoti mwene Uriya, Uriya wa Hakosi, asana ikindi gihimba, ahereye ku muryango w’iyo nzu ya Eliyashibu akageza ah’ iyo nzu nyene igarukira." 
Nehemiah3:22 Akurikirwa n’abaherezi bo mur’ iyo ntāra. 
Nehemiah3:23 Na bo bakurikirwa na Benyamini na Hashubu, basana aharābana n’ inzu yabo; bakurikirwa na Azariya mwene Mayaseya, Mayaseya wa Ananiya, asana ahabangikanye n’inzu yiwe." 
Nehemiah3:24 Akurikirwa na Binuwi mwene Henadadi, asana ikindi gihimba ahereye kur’ iyo nzu ya Azariya ashitsa ah’ uruzitiro rwiheteye, ku mfuruka." 
Nehemiah3:25 Akurikirwa na Palali mwene Uzayi, asana aharābana n’ahihese, ahahera ku munara wometswe ku ngoro y’umwami yo haruguru, ahahereranye n’urugo rw’abateramyi. Na we akurikirwa na Pedaya mwene Paroshi," 
Nehemiah3:26 bo n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bāba muri Ofeli; basana ahahereranye n’irembo ry’amazi ryerekeye i burasirazuba, bo n’ umunara wometseko." 
Nehemiah3:27 Hakurikirakw abantu b’i Tekowa, basana ikindi gihimba kirābana n’ uwo munara munini wometseko nyene, bashitsa ku ruzitiro rw’i Ofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Haruguru y’irembo ry’amafarasi hasanwa n’abaherezi, umuherezi wese asana ahahereranye n’inzu yiwe." 
Nehemiah3:29 Hakurikirako Sadoki mwene Imeri, asana ahahereranye n’inzu yiwe; hakurikira Shemaya mwene Shekaniya, umushibamyi w’irembo rihera i burasirazuba." 
Nehemiah3:30 Akurikirwa na Hananiya mwene Shelemiya, na Hanuni umuhungu agira gatandatu wo muri bene Salafu, basana ikindi gihimba; hakurikira Meshulamu mwene Berekiya, asana ahahereranye n’icumba ciwe." 
Nehemiah3:31 Hakurikira Malikiya, umwe wo mu bacuzi b’izahabu, arasana ashitsa ku nzu y’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, no ku nzu y’abadandaza, aharābana n’ irembo ryitwa Hamifukadi, kugeza ahadūga haja ku mfuruka." 
Nehemiah3:32 Kandi hagati y’ahadūga haja ku mfuruka n’irembo ry’intama hasanwa n’abacuzi b’izahabu hamwe n’abadandaza. 
Nehemiah4:1 Bukeye Sanibalati yumvise ko twubaka urwo ruzitiro rw’ amabuye, araraka arashangashirwa; aca aratunegura twebge Abayuda," 
Nehemiah4:2 avugira imbere ya bagenzi biwe n’imbere y’ingabo z’i Samariya, ati Barya bagoyigoyi b’Abayuda bakora ibiki? Mbega bagomba kwizitirira? Canke bazotanga ibimazi? Mbega bagomba kwubaka ngo buzuze ku musi umwe? None bozīkurura amabuye bayakūra mu bishingwe kandi yarahiye?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Kandi na Tobiya w’Umwamoni yar’ ahagararanye na we, aravuga, ati Ni mubareke bubake! N’imbgebge yosimbira kur’ urwo ruzitiro rw’ amabuye rwoca rusenyuka!" 
Nehemiah4:4 Maze ndasenga, nti Mana yacu, ni wumve ingene dukengerewe; ibitutsi vyabo abe ari bo bisubira ku mitwe; ubatange bajanwe mu mahanga ar’ inyagano." 
Nehemiah4:5 Ntutwikire igicumuro cabo, ntusibanganye icaha cabo ngo kive imbere yawe, kukw ijambo ryabo ar’ akavunamutima ku bubatsi." 
Nehemiah4:6 Nuko dushimikira kwubaka uruzitiro, rwose turaruhwanya, gushitsa rutimbanye; kukw abantu bari bashize umutima kur’ ico gikorwa." 
Nehemiah4:7 Bukeye Sanibalati na Tobiya n’Abarabo n’Abamoni n’Abanyashidodi bumvise yukw igikorwa co gusana uruzitiro rw’i Yerusalemu kija imbere, kandi yukw ibihengeri bitanguye kuzibirwa, bararaka cane," 
Nehemiah4:8 bahiga imihigo bose yuko bazoja gutera i Yerusalemu no kutuburabuza. 
Nehemiah4:9 Ariko twebge dusenga Imana yacu, dushiraho n’abarinzi bo kuharinda ku murango no mw ijoro, ngo tubabuze gutera." 
Nehemiah4:10 Maz’ Abayuda baravuga, bat’ Abikorezi bacitse intege kuko har’ ibishingwe vyinshi; ntitugishoboye kwubaka uruzitiro." 
Nehemiah4:11 Kand’ abarwanizi bacu na bo baravuga, bati Nta co bazomenya canke ngo bagire ico babona, kugeza aho tuzobūbīrira tukabīca, igikorwa cabo kigaca kiburangana." 
Nehemiah4:12 Kand’ Abayuda bāba hafi yabo bama baza kutubūrira bava hirya no hino, mbere bātubūriye ibihetangabo cumi baja baragaruka aho turi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Ni co catumye nshira abantu inyuma y’uruzitiro, mbashira mu myonga n’ahītārūye, ukw imiryango yabo iri, bitwaje inkota n’amacumu n’imiheto." 
Nehemiah4:14 Mbitegereje, mva hasi mbarira abakuru n’abaganza n’abandi bose, nti Ntimubatinye. Mwibuke Umwami Imana, ahambaye ateye ubgoba, murwanire bene wanyu, n’abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu n’abagore banyu n’ingo zanyu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Nukw abansi bacu bumva ko vyamenyekanye muri twebge; Imana ihindura ubusa imigabo yabo, natwe twese dusubira ku ruzitiro, umuntu wese ku gikorwa ciwe." 
Nehemiah4:16 Uhereye ico gihe mu bantu banje, igihimba cakoze ico gikorwa, ikindi gihimba bahagarara bitwaje amacumu n’inkinzo n’ imiheto, bambaye n’amakoti y’ ivyuma; kand’ abaganza bāri bahagaze inyuma y’Abayuda bose." 
Nehemiah4:17 Nukw abubaka uruzitiro n’abikorezi n’ababakorera, umuntu wese yakoresha ukuboko kumwe, ukundi gufashe ikirwanishwa ciwe." 
Nehemiah4:18 N’abubatsi, umuntu wese yakora yambaye inkota kw itako, akubaka artyo. Kand’ uwo kuvuza inzamba yama ar’ i ruhande yanje." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ndaheza mbgira abakuru n’abaganza n’ abandi bose, nt’ Igikorwa cacu ni kinini kigera kure, kandi turasanzaye hose ku ruzitiro, umuntu wese ari kure y’uwundi;" 
Nehemiah4:20 none rero ni mwumva inzamba ivuze, muce mukoranira aho turi ah’ izoba ivugiye hose. Imana yacu ntizobura kuturwanira." 
Nehemiah4:21 Uko ni ko twākora ico gikorwa; umuce umwe wo muri twebge bitwaza amacumu uhereye mu mutwenzi ugashitsa inyenyeri zibonetse. 
Nehemiah4:22 Ico gihe nyene mbarira abantu, nt’ Umuntu wese n’aze arāre i Yerusalemu azananye n’umuntu wiwe, kugira ngo duterame mw ijoro, ku murango dukore." 
Nehemiah4:23 Nuko nanje na bagenzi banje n’abantu banje n’abarinzi bāri kuri jewe, twese twama turāra twambaye, mbere n’ūgiye kuvoma wese yama agenda yitwaje ikirwanishwa ciwe." 
Nehemiah5:1 Bukeye haba ugutaka gukomeye, abantu n’abagore babo bidodombera bene wabo b’Abayuda," 
Nehemiah5:2 bati Twe n’abahungu bacu n’abakobga bacu turi benshi; ni muduhe ibidutunga turye kugira ngo tubeho. 
Nehemiah5:3 Abandi baravuga, bat’ Amatongo yacu n’inzabibu zacu n’amazu yacu tubitangakw ingwati kugira ngo turonke ibidutunga bizodutsindira ikigoyi." 
Nehemiah5:4 Kandi n’abandi baravuga, bati Twagwatirije amatongo n’inzabibu zacu kugira ngo batugurāne amahera y’ikori ry’umwami." 
Nehemiah5:5 Yamara rero, imibiri yacu n’ imwe n’iya bene wacu, kand’ abana bacu ni bamwe n’ababo; kand’ ehe rāba abahungu bacu n’abakobga bacu turiko turabata mu buja. Mbere bamwe bo mu bakobga bacu baramaze kubushikamwo, kandi twabuze uko tugira, kukw amatongo yacu n’inzabibu zacu bimaze kujanwa n’abandi." 
Nehemiah5:6 Numvise ayo majambo n’amaganya yabo nca ndaraka rwose. 
Nehemiah5:7 Mmaze kuvyiyumvirako nca ntonganya abakuru n’abaganza, ndababgira, nti Mbega bene wanyu ko mubāka inyungu ku ngurāne! Ndaheza mpamagara ikoraniro rinini ngo ndababūranye." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ndababgira, nti Twebge uko dushoboye twaracunguye Abayuda bagenzi bacu bāri baraguzwe n’abanyamahanga; ariko mweho bagenzi banyu murabagura, na bo bakīshora ngo tubagure! Baca barihorera babura iryo bavuga." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndongera ndavuga, nt’ Ivyo mukora si vyiza. Mbeg’ ibikwiye s’uko mugenda mwubaha Imana yacu, ntimwitukishe mu bansi bacu b’abanyamahanga?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Na jewe nyene, twe na bene wacu n’ abantu banje, har’ abamaze kutugurānakw amahera n’impeke; non’ enda tubibahebere." 
Nehemiah5:11 Mber’ uyu musi mubasubize amatongo yabo, n’imirima yabo y’imizabibu n’imyelayo, n’amazu yabo; mubasubize na ca gice c’ijana c’amahera n’ic’ impeke n’ica vino n’ic’ amavuta ya elayo, ivyo mwābātse kw inyungu." 
Nehemiah5:12 Na bo baravuga, bati Turabibasubiza, kandi nta co tuzobāka kw inyungu; tuzobigenza nk’uk’ uvuze. Ndaheza mpamagaza abaherezi, ndahiriza abo bantu imbere yabo ko bazobikora nk’uko basezeranye." 
Nehemiah5:13 Maze nkunkumura umutamana wanje, nt’ Umuntu wese atazoshitsa iri jambo, Imana iz’ imukunkumure mu nzu yiwe no mu vyiwe; az’ abe ari kw akunkumurwa, asigare agaragara. Nukw ikoraniro ryose riremera, riti Amen; baraheza bahimbaza Uhoraho. Nukw abantu bagumya iryo sezerano." 
Nehemiah5:14 Kand’ uhereye umusi umwami Aritazeruzi yangize icēgēra ciwe mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, kuva ku mwaka ugira mirongwibiri kugeza ku mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’ibiri ari ku ngoma, ukw ar’ imyaka cumi n’ibiri, ari jewe ari bene wacu, nta ho twigeze dutungwa n’amarari yagerewe icēgēra c’umwami." 
Nehemiah5:15 Arikw abanyitangiye imbere mu gutwarira umwami, bāraruhije abantu, kuko bāgenda babatoza ivyo kurya na vino, hamwe na shekeli z’ifeza mirongwine; mbere n’abasavyi babo bagatwaza abantu amanyama. Ariko jewe sinigeze ngenza ntyo, kuko nubaha Imana." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ariko nagize umwete wo gukora, nubaka urwo ruzitiro; nta tongo na rimwe twaguze, kandi n’abantu banje bose bāma bakoranira kur’ ico gikorwa." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kand’ abantu ijana na mirongwitanu b’Abayuda n’ababaganza bāma baza kurya i wanje, udashizemw’ abaza bavuye mu mahanga adukikije." 
Nehemiah5:18 Ku musi ku musi twābāga inka imwe n’intama zitandatu z’intorwa, bo n’inkoko, kand’ ukw imisi cumi ishize twama tubaha vino z’ubgoko bgose; ariko naho vyangana birtyo nta ho nigeze ntoza amarari yagerewe icēgēra c’umwami, kukw abantu bāri bacumukujwe n’intwaro mbi." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ndaheza ndasenga, nti Mana yanje, ivyo nagiriye aba bantu uz’ ubinzirikaneko, ubinyishure ivyiza." 
Nehemiah6:1 Bukeye babgira Sanibalati na Tobiya na Geshemu Umwarabo n’abandi bansi bacu, yuko nujuje uruzitiro kandi kw ata kirengero kigisigaye, naho ntaribgatere inzugi ku marembo." 
Nehemiah6:2 Nuko Sanibalati na Geshemu baca bantumako ngo ngende duhūrire mu mihana yo mu kiyaya c’i Ono. Arikw ico bāgomba kwar’ ukungirira nabi. 
Nehemiah6:3 Maze mbatumakw intumwa, mut’ Arikw arakora igikorwa gihambaye, ntashobora kuza; muti Ntiyota igikorwa ngo gihagarare, ngw amanuke abasange iyo." 
Nehemiah6:4 Bantumako bartyo ibihetangabo bine, nanje ngenda mbishura kwa kundi nyene." 
Nehemiah6:5 Ubugira gatanu Sanibalati asubira kuntumak’ umuntu wiwe kuno nyene, amurungikana n’ icete kitazinze," 
Nehemiah6:6 canditswemwo ngo Mu mahanga humvikana impuha, kandi na Geshemu aravyemeza, yuko wewe n’Abayuda muri n’imigabo yo kugarariza, kandi kw ari yo nyanduruko yatumye mwubaka uruzitiro, kandi nawe ng’ ugomba kwiyimika." 
Nehemiah6:7 Bitayeko ngo Washizeho ba kamenyi bo kukwāmāmaza i Yerusalemu, ngo Mu Bayuda har’ umwami. Izo nkuru ntibobura kuzibgira umwami: none rero n’ uze tubivugane." 
Nehemiah6:8 Ndaheza ntuma kumwishura, ut’ Ivyo uvuga nta ho vyigeze bibaho, ut’ Ariko ni wewe wavyigeneye gusa." 
Nehemiah6:9 Kuko bose bāgomba kudutera ubgoba, bati Bazohava bacika intege, igikorwa gihere aho. Ariko none Mana, undemeshe." 
Nehemiah6:10 Bukeye ninjira mu nzu ya Shemaya mwene Delaya, Delaya wa Mehetabeli, kand’ uyo yari yiyugaranye; arambarira, at’ Ingo tuje kubonanira mu ngoro y’ Imana, mu rusengero hagati, twugare inzugi, kuko haza kuza abantu bo kukwica: mbere mur’ iri joro nta kabuza barakwica." 
Nehemiah6:11 Nanje ndamwishura, nti Mbeg’ umuntu nkanje nohunga? Kand’ umuntu nkanje yokwinjira mu rusengero ngo yikize? Eka sinjayo!" 
Nehemiah6:12 Maze mvyitegereje mmenya kw atar’ Imana yabimutumye, ariko yaje kubimbgira kuko Tobiya na Sanibalati bāri bāmuhēreye." 
Nehemiah6:13 Bāmuhēreye ngw antere ubgoba, mpeze nemere inama yiwe, mbe ncumuye, na bo ngo baronke urwitwazo rwo kwanda inkuru mbi no kunyambika ibara." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ndaheza ndasenga, nt’ Ewe Mana yanje, uze wibuke Tobiya na Sanibalati kubg’ ivyo bakoze, hamwe na Nowadiya wa mumenyikazi, n’abandi ba kamenyi bashatse kuntera ubgoba." 
Nehemiah6:15 Ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na gatanu w’ukwezi kwa Eluli ni ho twarangije uruzitiro, tumaze imisi mirongwitanu n’ibiri turwubaka." 
Nehemiah6:16 Maz’ abansi bacu bose bavyumvise, bo n’abanyamahanga bose bo ku mpande zacu zose, bagira ubgoba, baratētērwa, kuko bamenye kw ar’ Imana yacu yadushoboje kurangiza igikorwa kingana girtyo." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kandi mur’ iyo misi abakuru b’i Buyuda na Tobiya bandikiranira ivyete vyinshi. 
Nehemiah6:18 Kandi benshi bo mu Bayuda bari bafitaniye amasezerano na we, kuko yar’ umukwe wa Shekaniya mwene Ara, kand’ umuhungu wiwe Yohanani yar’ afise umukobga wa Meshulamu mwene Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Kandi bama bambgira ivyiza kuri we, bakongera bakamubgira amajambo yanje; Tobiya na we akandungikira ivyete vyo kuntera ubgoba." 
Nehemiah7:1 Barangije kwubaka uruzitiro nca nterakw inzugi hose, ntora abashibamyi ndabashiraho, nongera nshirah’ abaririmvyi n’ Abalewi." 
Nehemiah7:2 Ndaheza nzeza igisagara c’i Yerusalemu mwene wacu Hanani, bo na Hananiya umukuru w’iboma y’abashibamyi, kukw ar’ umuntu yizigirwa, yubaha Imana kurusha benshi;" 
Nehemiah7:3 ndababgira, nt’ Amarembo y’i Yerusalemu ntaze yugururwe hataraba ku gasase, kandi ngo bayugarire, inzugi bazishirekw ibihindizo, izuba ritararenga; nti Maze mushireh’ abashibamyi bo mu baba i Yerusalemu, umuntu wese mu gishingo ciwe, aharābana n’inzu yiwe." 
Nehemiah7:4 Kand’ ico gisagara cari kinini kikagera kure, arikw abantu bakibamwo bari bakiri bake, kand’ amazu ntiyaribgubakwe." 
Nehemiah7:5 Imana yanje impa ivyiyumviro vyo gukoranya abakuru n’abaganza n’abantu bose ngo mbandikishe ivy’ akārōnda kabo. Ndondeye mbona igitabo kidonda ivy’ akārōnda k’abābanje kudūga, mbona ko handitswemw’ ibi:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Aba ni bo bantu bo mu gihugu cacu bādūze bava mu kinyago mu bo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yajanye ar’ inyagano, bakagaruka i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda, umuntu wese agasubira mu gisagara c’i wabo;" 
Nehemiah7:7 bāzananye na Zerubabeli na Yosuwa, na Nehemiya na Azariya, na Rayamiya na Nahamani, na Moridekayi na Bilishani, na Misipereti na Bigivayi, na Nehumu na Bayana. Igitigiri c’abagabo bo mu Bisirayeli ngiki:" 
Nehemiah7:8 abo mu ba Paroshi n’ ibihumbi bibiri n’ijana na mirongwirindwi na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:9 Abo mu ba Shefatiya n’amajana atatu na mirongwirindwi na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:10 Abo mu ba Ara n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:11 Abo mu ba Pahati‐mowabu, bandurutse kuri Yosuwa na Yowabu, n’ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana munani n’icumi n’umunani." 
Nehemiah7:12 Abo mu ba Elamu n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane. 
Nehemiah7:13 Abo mu ba Zatu n’amajana munani na mirongwine na batanu. 
Nehemiah7:14 Abo mu ba Zakayi n’amajana ndwi na mirongwitandatu. 
Nehemiah7:15 Abo mu ba Binuwi n’ amajana atandatu na mirongwine n’umunani. 
Nehemiah7:16 Abo mu ba Bebayi n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umunani. 
Nehemiah7:17 Abo mu ba Azigadi n’ibihumbi bibiri n’ amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:18 Abo mu ba Adonikamu n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitandatu n’indwi. 
Nehemiah7:19 Abo mu ba Bigivayi n’ibihumbi bibiri na mirongwitandatu n’indwi. 
Nehemiah7:20 Abo mu ba Adini n’amajana atandatu na mirongwitanu na batanu. 
Nehemiah7:21 Abo mu ba Ateri, bo mu muryango wa Hezekiya, ni mirongwicenda n’umunani." 
Nehemiah7:22 Abo mu ba Hashumu n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri n’ umunani. 
Nehemiah7:23 Abo mu ba Besayi n’amajana atatu na mirongwibiri na bane. 
Nehemiah7:24 Abo mu ba Harifu n’ijana n’icumi na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:25 Ab’i Gibeyoni ni mirongwicenda na batanu. 
Nehemiah7:26 Abagabo b’i Betelehemu n’i Netofa n’ijana na mirongumunani n’umunani. 
Nehemiah7:27 Abagabo b’i Anatoti n’ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani. 
Nehemiah7:28 Abagabo b’i Beti‐azimaveti ni mirongwine na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:29 Abagabo b’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu n’i Kefira n’i Beroti n’amajana ndwi na mirongwine na batatu. 
Nehemiah7:30 Abagabo b’i Rama n’i Geba n’amajana atandatu na mirongwibiri n’umwe. 
Nehemiah7:31 Abagabo b’i Mikimasi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:32 Abagabo b’i Beteli n’i Hayi n’ijana na mirongwibiri na batatu. 
Nehemiah7:33 Abagabo b’i Nebo handi ni mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:34 Ab’i Elamu handi n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwitanu na bane. 
Nehemiah7:35 Ab’i Harimu n’ amajana atatu na mirongwibiri. 
Nehemiah7:36 Ab’i Yeriko n’amajana atatu na mirongwine na batanu. 
Nehemiah7:37 Ab’i Lodi n’i Hadidi n’i Ono n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri n’umwe. 
Nehemiah7:38 Ab’i Sena n’ibihumbi bitatu n’amajana cenda na mirongwitatu. 
Nehemiah7:39 Abaherezi n’aba: abo mu ba Yedaya, bo mu nzu ya Yosuwa, n’amajana cenda na mirongwirindwi na batatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Abo mu ba Imeri n’igihumbi na mirongwitanu na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:41 Abo mu ba Pashuri n’igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwine n’indwi. 
Nehemiah7:42 Abo mu ba Harimu n’igihumbi n’icumi n’indwi. 
Nehemiah7:43 Abalewi n’aba: abo mu ba Yosuwa na Kadimiyeli, ari bo bandurutse kuri Hodeva, ni mirongwirindwi na bane." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abaririmvyi bo mu ba Asafu n’ijana na mirongwine n’umunani. 
Nehemiah7:45 Abashibamyi n’aba: abo mu ba Shalumu, no mu ba Ateri, no mu ba Talimoni, no mu ba Akubu, no mu ba Hatita, no mu ba Shobayi, bose na bose n’ijana na mirongwitatu n’umunani." 
Nehemiah7:46 Abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero n’aba: abo mu ba Siha, no mu ba Hasufa, no mu ba Tabayoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 no mu ba Kerosi, no mu ba Siya, no mu ba Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 no mu ba Lebana, no mu ba Hagaba, no mu ba Salimayi," 
Nehemiah7:49 no mu ba Hanani, no mu ba Gedeli, no mu ba Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 no mu ba Reyaya, no mu ba Resini, no mu ba Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 no mu ba Gazamu, no mu ba Uza, no mu ba Paseya," 
Nehemiah7:52 no mu ba Besayi, no mu ba Mehunimu, no mu ba Nefushesimu," 
Nehemiah7:53 no mu ba Bakibuki, no mu ba Hakufa, no mu ba Harihuri," 
Nehemiah7:54 no mu ba Basiliti, no mu ba Mehida, no mu ba Harisha," 
Nehemiah7:55 no mu ba Barikosi, no mu ba Sisera, no mu ba Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 no mu ba Nesiya, no mu ba Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo n’aba: abo mu ba Sotayi, no mu ba Sofereti, no mu ba Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 no mu ba Yahala, no mu ba Darikoni, no mu ba Gideli," 
Nehemiah7:59 no mu ba Shefatiya, no mu ba Hatili, no mu ba Pokereti‐hasebayimu, no mu ba Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Abahawe iryo bango bose, bo n’abuzukuruza b’abasavyi ba Salomo, bose na bose bār’ amajana atatu na mirongwicenda na babiri." 
Nehemiah7:61 Kand’ aba ni bo bādūze bava i Telimela n’i Teliharisha n’i Kerubu n’i Adoni n’i Imeri, ariko vyarabananira kwerekana amazu ya ba sekuruza bandurutseko cank’ abo bākomōtseko yukw ar’ Abisirayeli vy’ukuri." 
Nehemiah7:62 Abo mu ba Delaya no mu ba Tobiya no mu ba Nekoda n’amajana atandatu na mirongwine na babiri. 
Nehemiah7:63 Abo mu baherezi ni bo aba: abo mu ba Habaya, no mu ba Hakosi, no mu ba Baruzilayi, umwe yābiriye umugeni mu bakobga ba Baruzilayi w’Umunyagileyadi, agaca yitiranwa na sebukwe," 
Nehemiah7:64 abo bārondeye amazina yabo mu gitabo kidōndōra ba sekuruza, ntibayabona, ni co gituma biyumviriwe nk’ abahumanye, bagakūrwa mu buherezi." 
Nehemiah7:65 Umucamatēka arababuza ngo ntibarye ku vyera cane, kugeza igihe hazobonekera umuherezi afise Urimu na Tumimu." 
Nehemiah7:66 Nukw iryo shengero ryose iyo riva rikagera, bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi mirongwine na bibiri n’amajana atatu na mirongwitandatu;" 
Nehemiah7:67 udashizemw’ abagurano n’abaguranokazi babo, igitigiri cabo bār’ ibihumbi ndwi n’ amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’ indwi; kandi bāri bafise abaririmvyi b’abagabo n’abagore amajana abiri na mirongwine na batanu." 
Nehemiah7:68 Amafarasi yabo yār’ amajana ndwi na mirongwitatu n’atandatu; n’inyumbu zabo zār’ amajana abiri na mirongwine na zitanu; 
Nehemiah7:69 n’ingamiya zabo zār’ amajana ane na mirongwitatu na zitanu, n’indogoba zabo ibihumbi bitandatu n’amajana ndwi na mirongwibiri." 
Nehemiah7:70 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza batanze imfashanyo yo gufasha ico gikorwa, n’icēgēra c’umwami na we atanga amahera y’izahabu yitwa dariki igihumbi, n’ibikombe mirongwitanu, n’ imyambaro amajana atanu na mirongwitatu y’abaherezi, babishira mu bubīko."
