Nehemiah7:71 Bamwe mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bashira mu bubiko burimw’ ibikoreshwa, dariki z’izahabu ibihumbi mirongwibiri, n’ifeza irivye ingero yitwa mina ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana abiri." 
Nehemiah7:72 Ivyo abandi bantu batanze bishika kuri dariki z’izahabu ibihumbi mirongwibiri nyene, n’ibihumbi bibiri vya mina z’ifeza, bo n’imyambaro y’abaherezi mirongwitandatu n’ indwi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi n’ abashibamyi n’abaririmvyi n’abantu bamwe, n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, n’abandi Bisirayeli bose, bībēra mu bisagara vyabo; mber’ ukwezi kw’indwi kwabonetse Abisirayeli bamaze kwībēra mu bisagara vyabo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Maz’ abantu bose iyo bava bakagera bakoranira icarimwe ku kibuga kir’ imbere y’irembo ry’ amazi, basaba Ezira, umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe, ngw azane igitabo c’ivyagezwe vya Mose, bimwe Uhoraho yaha Abisirayeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Nuko Ezira umuherezi azana ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe, agishira imbere y’ishengero ry’abagabo n’abagore n’abandi bose bafise ubgenge bgo kwumva. Hari ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi kw’indwi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Ezira agisoma ahagaze yerekeye ico kibuga kir’ imbere y’irembo ry’amazi, agisomera abagabo n’abagore n’ abandi bashoboye kwumva, uhereye mu mutwenzi ugashitsa mu mashōka, kand’ abantu bose bari bateze amatwi bumviriza ivy’ ico gitabo c’ivyagezwe." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezira, uwo munyabgenge w’ivyanditswe, yar’ ahagaze ku mutara w’ibiti, bubakiye ico gikorwa nyene, yar’ ahagararanye na Matitiya na Shema na Anaya na Uriya na Hilukiya na Mayaseya; abo ni bo bār’ i buryo bgiwe; i bumoso bgiwe hāri Pedaya na Mishayeli na Malikiya na Hashumu na Hashibadana na Zekariya na Meshulamu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Nuko Ezira azingurura igitabo abantu bose babona, kuko yar’ ahagaze ahisumbuye; maz’ akikizingurura abantu bose bava hasi." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezira araheza ahimbaza Uhoraho Imana isumba vyose, abantu bose bashira amaboko hejuru, bati Amen, Amen. Baraheza barunama bashika hasi imbere y’Uhoraho, bubika amaso kw isi." 
Nehemiah8:7 Yosuwa na Bani na Sherebiya, na Yamini na Akubu, na Shabetayi na Hodiya na Mayaseya, na Kelita na Azariya na Yozabadi, na Hanani na Pelaya n’ Abalewi, abo ni bo basobanurira abantu ivy’ ivyagezwe, abantu bakaguma aho bari;" 
Nehemiah8:8 babasomera mu gitabo c’ ivyagezwe vy’Imana mu buryo bgumvikana, barabibasobanurira kugira ngo batahure ivyo basomewe." 
Nehemiah8:9 Nehemiya icēgēra c’umwami, na Ezira umuherezi, umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe, n’Abalewi ari bo bigisha abantu, baraheza bababgira bose, bat’ Uyu musi n’ uwo Uhoraho Imana yanyu yejeje, nta co mubabara kandi reka kurira; kukw abantu bose bariko bararira, aho bumviye amajambo y’ ivyagezwe." 
Nehemiah8:10 Maze Nehemiya arababgira, ati Ni mutahe muje kurya inyama zinuze, munywe n’ibisosa, n’abatagira ico bafise mubarungikire, kuk’ uyu musi werejwe Uhoraho; ntimubabare, kuk’ umunezero w’Uhoraho ari zo nkomezi zanyu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Abalewi na bo bahoza abantu bose, bati Ni mwihorere, kuk’ uyu musi ar’ uwera, ntimubabare." 
Nehemiah8:12 Nukw abantu bose baraheza baja kurya no kunywa no kugemuranira no kunezeranwa akanyamuneza kenshi, kuko bari batahuye amajambo basobanuriwe." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ku musi ugira kabiri abakuru b’amyazu ya ba sekuruza bo mu bantu bose, n’abaherezi n’Abalewi, bakoranira kuri Ezira umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe, kugira ngo bashire ayo majambo y’ivyagezwe ku mitima." 
Nehemiah8:14 Baraheza basanga ko mur’ ivyo vyagezwe Uhoraho yahaye Mose handitswe ko mu kwezi kw’indwi Abisirayeli bazokwama bagira imisi mikuru yo kurāra mu nsāgo," 
Nehemiah8:15 kandi ko bazotāngāza ayo majambo mu bisagara vyose no muri Yerusalemu, ngo Ni mugende ku misozi muce amashami y’ibiti vya elayo n’ay’ ibijābija vya elayo nyene, n’ay’ imihadasi n’ay’ ibigazi, n’ay’ ibindi biti vyose bizitanye, kugira ngo muce insāgo nk’uko vyanditswe." 
Nehemiah8:16 Nukw abantu bava hasi baragenda barondera amashami, bīcīra insāgo, hejuru ku nzu zabo, no mu ngo zabo, no mu ntangaro y’ingoro y’Imana, no ku kibuga co kw irembo ry’amazi no ku co kw irembo ry’Abefurayimu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Kand’ ikoraniro ryose ry’abāgarutse bavuye mu kinyago bīcīra insāgo bazirāramwo. Uhereye mu gihe ca Yosuwa mwene Nuni ukageza kur’ uwo musi Abisirayeli ntibaribgigere bagira nk’uko; nuko haba umunezero mwinshi cane. 
Nehemiah8:18 Kandi Ezira abasomera igitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’Imana umusi n’ umusi, uhereye ku musi wa mbere ukageza ku wuheruka. Bāmaze imisi indwi bagira imisi mikuru; ku musi ugira umunani haba ikoraniro ry’agahebuza nk’ukw ivyagezwe bivuga." 
Nehemiah9:1 Maze ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na kane wo mur’ ukwo kwezi, Abisirayeli barakorana, barisonzesha bambaye amagunira, bīrengeje imikungugu ku mitwe." 
Nehemiah9:2 Ab’ uruvyaro rwa Isirayeli bītandukanya n’abanyamahanga bose, barahagarara bātura ivyaha vyabo n’ibicumuro vya ba sekuruza." 
Nehemiah9:3 Bahagarara aho bari, bamara igice ca kane c’umurango basoma igitabo c’ivyagezwe vy’ Uhoraho Imana yabo, ikindi gice ca kane nyene bakimara bātura ivyaha vyabo, basenga Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Maze Yosuwa na Bani na Kadimiyeli na Shebaniya na Buni na Sherebiya na Bani wundi na Kenani bahagarara ahataramutse hubakiwe Abalewi, bashira ijwi hejuru batakambira Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Nukw abo Balewi, Yosuwa na Kadimiyeli na Bani na Hashabuneya na Sherebiya na Hodiya na Shebaniya na Petahiya baca baravuga, bati Ni muve hasi muhimbaze Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nk’uko vyamye uhereye kera hose ugashitsa ibihe bitazoshira. Baraheza bahimbaza izina ryiwe ry’icubahiro, ari ryo rishizwe hejuru gusumba ah’ ugushima kwose n’uguhimbaza kwose bigarukira." 
Nehemiah9:6 Ezira araheza aravuga, ati Ni wewe Uhoraho wenyene nta wundi, ni wewe waremye ijuru, mbere n’amajuru asumba ayandi, n’ ingabo zose zo kuri yo; waremye n’isi n’ibiri kuri yo vyose, n’ibiyaga n’ibiri muri vyo vyose, kandi ni wewe ubibeshaho vyose; ingabo zo kw ijuru ziraguhimbaza." 
Nehemiah9:7 Uhoraho Mana, ni wewe watoye Aburamu, umukūra muri Uri h’i Bukaludaya, umwita izina Aburahamu;" 
Nehemiah9:8 wabonye umutima wiwe kw ar’ uwo kwizigirwa imbere yawe, usezerana na we isezerano ryo kuzoha uruvyaro rwiwe igihugu c’Abanyakanani n’ic’ Abaheti n’ic’ Abamori n’ic’ Abaferizi n’ic’ Abayebusi n’ic’ Abagirugashi; kand’ iryo sezerano wararishikije kuko wama ugororoka." 
Nehemiah9:9 Wabonye ivyago vya ba sogokuruza bacu bari muri Egiputa, wumva ugutakamba kwabo bari ku Kiyaga Gitukura," 
Nehemiah9:10 werekanye ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza kuri Farawo no ku basavyi biwe no ku bantu bose bo mu gihugu ciwe, kuko war’ uzi ko bāgenda babīhayagizako. Uko ni ko wironkeye izina rya rurangiranwa, ari ryo ugifise na bugingo n’ubu." 
Nehemiah9:11 Watandukanije ikiyaga mu maso yabo, na bo bagicamwo nk’ abagenda ku musozi, arikw ababakurikiye babahīga ubakororera i bgina, badobera mu mazi maremare nk’ ibuye." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ubarōngōza inkingi y’igicu ku murango n’ inkingi y’umuriro mw ijoro, kugira ng’ ubamurikire mu nzira bacamwo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Uramanuka uhagarara ku musozi Sinayi, uvugana na bo uri mw ijuru, ubaha amateka agororotse n’ivyagezwe vy’ukuri, n’ivyashinzwe bo n’amabgirizwa vy’agahore." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wabamenyesheje isabato yawe yera, ubashirirah’ amabgirizwa n’ivyashinzwe n’ ivyagezwe, ubitumye umusavyi wawe Mose." 
Nehemiah9:15 Ubaha umutsima uvuye mw ijuru wo kubamara inzara, ubaha n’amazi adudubiza mu gitandara yo kubamara inyota, ubagera kuja kwinjira igihugu warahiye k’uzokibaha." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ariko ba sogokuruza bacu babaye intahetwa, bagamika amazosi, ntibumvira amabgirizwa yawe;" 
Nehemiah9:17 banka kuyumvira, canke ngo bibuke ibitangaza wakoze muri bo; ariko bagamika amazosi yabo, baragarariza, bironderera umugabisha ngo basubire mu buja bāhozemwo. Ariko wewe ur’ Imana ikunda guharira, ur’ inyabuntu, wuzuye imbabazi, uteba kuraka, ugira ikigongwe cinshi; nuko rero ntiwabataye." 
Nehemiah9:18 Mbere naho bicuriye igishushanyo c’ imasa kivugutiwe, bakavuga, bat’ Eh’ imana yanyu yabakuye muri Egiputa! bagakora ivyo kukuratsa bikomeye;" 
Nehemiah9:19 ariko na ho nyene kubg’ imbabazi zawe nyinshi ntiwabataye mu bugaragwa; inkingi y’igicu ntiyabavuye imbere ku murango ibarōngōra mu nzira, cank’ inkingi y’umuriro mw ijoro yo kubamurikira, ngw ibereke inzira bacamwo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wabahaye Mpwemu wawe mwiza wo kubaha ubgenge, ntiwabimye manu yawe yo kurya, ubaha n’amazi yo kubamara inyota." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wabatungiye mu bugaragwa kumara imyaka mirongwine, ntibāgira ico bakena; impuzu zabo ntizabashirirako, ibirenge vyabo ntivyavyimba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wabagabiye ibihugu vy’abami ubaha n’amahanga, ubagabanganya imigabane nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri, begukira igihugu ca Sihoni umwami w’i Heshiboni, n’ igihugu ca Ogi umwami w’i Bashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Wagwije abana babo bangana n’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru, ubashira mu gihugu wabariye ba sekuruza babo ngo bacinjire bacegukire." 
Nehemiah9:24 Nukw abo bana babo baraza binjira ico gihugu baracegukira, nawe unesha imvukira zaho ari bo Banyakanani, ubagabura mu maboko yabo, hamwe n’abami babo n’abantu bo mur’ ico gihugu, kugira ngo babagirire uko bashaka." 
Nehemiah9:25 Batsinda ibisagara bikomeye bifise inzitiro z’amabuye, bashikīra n’intāra zimera cane, binjira n’amazu yuzuye ivyiza vyose, bashikīra n’ ivyobo vyimbiwe kubīka amazi, n’imirima y’imizabibu n’iy’ imyelayo, n’ibindi biti vyama vy’isinzi, bararya barahāga baravyibuha, bidibamira mu vyiza vyose wabahaye." 
Nehemiah9:26 Ariko ntibakwumviye, barakugarariza, bashiburira ivyagezwe vyawe inyuma yabo, bica abavugishwa nawe bāhora babahanura ngo babasubize kuri wewe, bakora ivyo kukuratsa bikomeye." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ni co catumye ubagabura mu maboko y’abansi babo babashira mu vyago. Maze babonye bari mu vyago, ngo bagutakambire ukabumva uri mw ijuru, ukarungika ababatabara, bakabakūra mu maboko y’abansi babo kubg’ imbabazi zawe nyinshi." 
Nehemiah9:28 Yamara ngo babone impore, bagasubira gukorera ibibi imbere yawe, nawe ukongera kubagabura mu maboko y’abansi babo bakabaganza. Mugabo, basubiye kugutakambira ukabumva uri mw ijuru, ukabarokora ibihe n’ibihe kubg’ imbabazi zawe." 
Nehemiah9:29 Wama ubahanura kugira ngo basubire gukurikira ivyagezwe vyawe, ariko bo bakagira ubgibone, ntibumvire ivyagezwe vyawe, bagacumura ku mabgirizwa yawe, kand’ ari yo abeshah’ umuntu iy’ ayitondeye; bagakūtsa ibitugu, bakagamika amazosi, bakanka kwumva." 
Nehemiah9:30 Wamaze imyaka myinshi ubihanganira, watumye Mpwemu wawe kubahanura, avugiye mu bavugishwa bawe, ariko banka kwumva; ni co catumye ubagabura mu maboko y’abanyamahanga bo mu bindi bihugu." 
Nehemiah9:31 Yamara naho bimeze birtyo, imbabazi zawe nyinshi zakubujije kubahonnya rwose, ntiwabata, kuk’ ur’ Imana y’inyabuntu kandi y’imbabazi." 
Nehemiah9:32 None, Mana yacu, Mana nkuru, uhambaye uteye ubgoba, ni wewe ugumya isezerano n’ikigongwe, turakwinginze amagorwa yose twabonye ntuyite ikintu coroshe, ayatubayeko twe n’abami bacu, n’abakuru bacu, n’abaherezi bacu, n’abavugishwa bacu, na ba sogokuruza bacu, eka n’abantu bawe bose, uhereye igihe c’abami b’i Ashuri ugashitsa na bugingo n’ubu." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ariko mur’ ivyo vyose vyatubayeko, weho wama uboneka ugororotse, wama ukora ibiroranye, yamara twebge twakoze ibibi." 
Nehemiah9:34 Abami bacu n’abakuru bacu n’abaherezi bacu na ba sogokuruza bacu ntibitondeye ivyagezwe vyawe, ntibumviye amabgirizwa yawe n’imbūri wababūriye." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ariko mu kuganza kwabo, no mu vyiza vyinshi wabahaye, no mu gihugu kininiya kimera cane wabagabiye, ntibāgukoreye ngo bahindukire bareke ibikorwa vyabo bibi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Rāba none twebge tur’ abaja! Rāba twagizwe abaja mu gihugu wahaye ba sogokuruza ngo bakibemwo, bacimburiremwo, barye ivyiza vyaco vyose." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ereg’ imyimbu myinshi abami waduhaye ngo batuganze kubg’ ivyaha vyacu, ni bo bayimburirwa; badufisek’ ubushobozi bgo kutugirira uko bagomba, ari ku mitumba yacu, ari ku nka zacu; eka turagowe rwose!" 
Nehemiah9:38 Nuko kubg’ ivyo dusezerana isezerano ry’intahava, turaryandika; maz’ abakuru bacu n’Abalewi bacu bo n’abaherezi bacu barishirakw ikimenyetso kidomye mw ishashara." 
Nehemiah10:1 Abāshizekw ikimenyetso n’ aba: icēgēra c’umwami, ari we Nehemiya mwene Hakaliya, na Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 na Seraya na Azariya na Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 na Pashuri na Amariya na Malakiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 na Hatushi na Shebaniya na Maluki," 
Nehemiah10:5 na Harimu na Meremoti na Obadiya," 
Nehemiah10:6 na Daniyeli na Ginetoni ni na Baruki," 
Nehemiah10:7 na Meshulamu na Abiya na Miyamini," 
Nehemiah10:8 na Mahaziya na Biligayi na Shemaya; abo ni bo baherezi. 
Nehemiah10:9 Abalewi n’aba: Yosuwa mwene Azaniya, na Binuwi wo muri bene Henadadi, na Kadimiyeli," 
Nehemiah10:10 na bagenzi babo Shebaniya na Hodiya na Kelita na Pelaya na Hanani," 
Nehemiah10:11 na Mika na Rehobu na Hashabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 na Zakuri na Sherebiya na Shebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:13 na Hodiya na Bani na Beninu. 
Nehemiah10:14 Abakuru‐bakuru bo mu bantu n’aba: Paroshi na Pahati‐Mowabu na Elamu na Zatu na Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 na Buni na Azigadi na Bebayi," 
Nehemiah10:16 na Adoniya na Bigivayi na Adini," 
Nehemiah10:17 na Ateri na Hezekiya na Azuri," 
Nehemiah10:18 na Hodiya na Hashumu na Bezayi," 
Nehemiah10:19 na Harifu na Anatoti na Nebayi," 
Nehemiah10:20 na Magipiyashi na Meshulamu na Heziri," 
Nehemiah10:21 na Meshezabeli na Sadoki na Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:22 na Pelatiya na Hanani na Anaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 na Hosheya na Hananiya na Hashubu," 
Nehemiah10:24 na Haloheshi na Piliha na Shobeka," 
Nehemiah10:25 na Rehumu na Hashabuna na Mayaseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 na Ahiya na Hanani na Anani," 
Nehemiah10:27 na Maluki na Harimu na Bayana. 
Nehemiah10:28 Kandi n’abandi bantu bose, abaherezi n’Abalewi n’abashibamyi n’abaririmvyi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, n’abandi bose bamaze kwitandukanya n’amahanga yo mu bihugu, kugira ngo bitondere ivyagezwe vy’Imana, hamwe n’abagore babo n’abahungu babo n’abakobga babo, umuntu wese aciye ubgenge ashobora kubitahura;" 
Nehemiah10:29 abo bose bafatanya na bagenzi babo b’ abakuru, bararahira barīsiba ko bazohora bagendera mu vyagezwe vy’Imana vyatanzwe na Mose umusavyi wayo, kandi ko bazokwitondera amabgirizwa yose y’Uhoraho Umwami wacu, bakayashitsa, bo n’ivyo yihanikirije n’ivyo yashinze." 
Nehemiah10:30 Bati Kand’ abakobga bacu ntituzobashingira abanyamahanga bo mur’ iki gihugu, n’abahungu bacu ntituzobasabira abageni mu bakobga babo." 
Nehemiah10:31 Kand’ abanyamahanga bo mur’ iki gihugu ni bagira ivyo bashora kw isabato, ar’ ibintu bashoye, ar’ ivyo kurya, ntituzogira ico tugura kw isabato canke ku wundi musi wose wejejwe. Kandi ku mwaka ugira indwi wose, tuzorāza indimiro zose, duheberanire n’imyenda yose." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kandi dushinze gutanga uk’ umwaka utashe ikigiragatatu ca shekeli, bize bikoreshwe mu ngoro y’Imana yacu," 
Nehemiah10:33 kugira ngo haze hame haboneka imitsima y’ibiterekerwa, bo n’amashikanwa y’amafu y’intasība, n’ibimazi vyoswa vy’intasība nyene, n’ivy’ amasabato, n’ivy’ imisi mikuru yashinzwe, haboneke n’ibintu vyera, n’ibimazi vyo gutangirwa ivyaha kw impongano y’Abisirayeli, bo n’ivy’ ibikorwa vyose vyo mu ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Kandi twebge abaherezi n’Abalewi n’ abantu dupfinze ubupfindo ngo tumenye ukw amashikanwa y’ inkwi azohora azanwa mu ngoro y’Imana yacu, ukw amazu ya ba sogokuruza akurikirana ku mbu zacu; uk’ umwaka utashe izo nkwi n’izo gukoma icoto ku gicaniro c’Uhoraho Imana yacu, nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe." 
Nehemiah10:35 Kand’ uk’ umwaka utashe tuzozana mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ivy’ imishuzo yo mu mirima yacu, n’ivy’ imishuzo y’ivyama vyose vyo ku biti vy’amoko yose," 
Nehemiah10:36 kandi tuzozana abahungu bacu b’imfura n’ uburiza bg’ivyo dutunze, ubg’ inka zacu n’ubg’ intama zacu, tubizane mu ngoro y’Imana yacu nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe, tubishikirize abaherezi bakora mu ngoro y’Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah10:37 Tuzohora tuzana ifu yacu y’umushuzo isewe iheretuwe, n’amashikanwa yacu azunguzwa, n’umushuzo w’ ivyama ku biti vy’ubgoko bgose, n’uwa vino n’amavuta, tubishikirize abaherezi, babishingure mu vyumba vyo ku ngoro y’Imana yacu; n’Abalewi tuzobashikiriza ikigiracumi c’ivyeze vyo mu mirima yacu, kukw Abalewi ari bo bākīra ibigiracumi mu bisagara vyacu vyose aho dufise imirima." 
Nehemiah10:38 Kand’ umuherezi wo mu ba Aroni azohora ajana n’Abalewi bagiye kwākīra ibigiracumi vyabo; Abalewi na bo bazokūramw’ ikigiracumi co mur’ ivyo bigiracumi nyene, babizane mu ngoro y’ Imana yacu, babishingure mu vyumba vy’ububīko." 
Nehemiah10:39 Abisirayeli n’Abalewi bazokwama bazana amashikanwa azunguzwa y’ impeke n’aya vino n’ay’ amavuta, bayashingure mu vyumba ah’ imbombovu z’Ahēra zibīkwa, ari ho nyene abaherezi n’abashibamyi n’abaririmvyi barāra. Nta ho tuzohemukira ingoro y’Imana yacu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Abakuru b’abantu ni bo bāba i Yerusalemu; maz’ abandi bantu bose bapfinda ubupfindo kugira ng’ umuntu umwe‐umwe mur’ icumi na we az’ agerēre i Yerusalemu ku murwa wera, abandi basigaye babe mu bindi bisagara." 
Nehemiah11:2 Maz’ abantu bahezagira abandi bose bitanze n’ imitima ikunze kuba i Yerusalemu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Aba ni bo bāgaba intāra bāba i Yerusalemu; ariko mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda umuntu wese yaba kw itongo ryiwe mu gisagara c’i wabo, Abisirayeli bose n’abaherezi, n’Abalewi n’abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero, bo n’ abākomotse ku basavyi ba Salomo." 
Nehemiah11:4 I Yerusalemu hāba bamwe bo mu Bayuda no mu Babenyamini. Mu Bayuda ni Ataya mwene Uziya, Uziya wa Zekariya, Zekariya wa Amariya, Amariya wa Shefatiya, Shefatiya wa Mahalaleli, wo mu bākomotse kuri Peresi;" 
Nehemiah11:5 na Mayaseya mwene Baruki, Baruki wa Kolihoze, Kolihoze wa Hasaya, Hasaya wa Adaya, Adaya wa Yoyaribu, Yoyaribu wa Zekariya Umunyeshiloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Abākomotse kuri Peresi bāba i Yerusalemu, bose na bose bār’ abagabo b’abahizi amajana ane na mirongwitandatu n’umunani." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ababenyamini n’aba: Salu mwene Meshulamu, Meshulamu wa Yohedi, Yohedi wa Pedaya, Pedaya wa Kolaya, Kolaya wa Mayaseya, Mayaseya wa Itiyeli, Itiyeli wa Yeshaya;" 
Nehemiah11:8 hamwe na Gebayi na Salayi, bose na bose bar’ amajana cenda na mirongwibiri n’umunani." 
Nehemiah11:9 Yoweli mwene Zikuri yar’ umukoresha wabo, na Yuda mwene Hasenuwa yar’ uwa kabiri wo mu baganza ico gisagara." 
Nehemiah11:10 Mu baherezi n’aba: Yedaya mwene Yoyaribu, na Yakini," 
Nehemiah11:11 na Seraya mwene Hilukiya, Hilukiya wa Meshulamu, Meshulamu wa Sadoki, Sadoki wa Merayoti, Merayoti wa Ahitubu, umubgiriza w’ingoro y’Imana;" 
Nehemiah11:12 bo na bagenzi babo bakora ibikorwa vyo mur’ iyo ngoro, bose na bose bar’ amajana munani na mirongwibiri na babiri; hari na Adaya mwene Yerohamu, Yerohamu wa Pelaliya, Pelaliya wa Amusi, Amusi wa Zekariya, Zekariya wa Pashuri, Pashuri wa Malakiya," 
Nehemiah11:13 hamwe na bagenzi biwe, ni bo bār’ abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza, bose na bose bār’ amajana abiri na mirongwine na babiri; hari na Amashisayi mwene Asareli, Asareli wa Ahazayi, Ahazayi wa Meshilemoti, Meshilemoti wa Imeri," 
Nehemiah11:14 na bagenzi babo, abagabo b’ abahizi, bose na bose bar’ ijana na mirongwibiri n’umunani. Umukoresha wabo ni Sabudiyeli mwene Hagedolimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Mu Balewi n’aba: Shemaya mwene Hasubu, Hasubu wa Asirikamu, Asirikamu wa Hashabiya, Hashabiya wa Buni," 
Nehemiah11:16 na Shabetayi na Yozabadi, ni bo bākoresha ibikorwa vy’ingoro y’Imana vyo hanze, kandi bar’ abakuru bo mu Balewi." 
Nehemiah11:17 Hari na Mataniya mwene Mika, Mika wa Zabudi, Zabudi wa Asafu, ni we yaterera abaririmba ishimwe mu gihe co gusenga; na Bakibukiya yar’ uwa kabiri muri bagenzi biwe, na Abuda mwene Shamuwa, Shamuwa wa Galali, Galali wa Yedutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 Abalewi bo ku murwa wera bose na bose bar’ amajana abiri na mirongumunani na bane. 
Nehemiah11:19 Abashibamyi, Akubu na Talimoni na bagenzi babo bāshibama ku marembo, bose na bose bar’ ijana na mirongwirindwi na babiri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Abasigaye bo mu Bisirayeli no mu baherezi no mu Balewi bāba mu bindi bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda, umuntu wese mw itongo ryiwe." 
Nehemiah11:21 Arikw abahawe ibango ry’ibikorwa vy’urusengero bāba i Ofeli, kandi Siha na Gishipa ni bo bābaganza." 
Nehemiah11:22 Kand’ umukoresha w’Abalewi i Yerusalemu, ari we yajejwe ibikorwa vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, ni Uzi mwene Bani, Bani wa Hashabiya, Hashabiya wa Mataniya, Mataniya wa Mika wo mu bākomotse kuri Asafu, ari bo baririmvyi." 
Nehemiah11:23 Kuko har’ icagezwe cashinzwe n’ umwami kw abaririmvyi bazohora bahabga ibibatunga ku musi n’ umusi. 
Nehemiah11:24 Petahiya mwene Meshezabeli wo mu bandurutse kuri Zera mwene Yuda ni we yar’ umushikirwa w’amajambo y’abantu bose aza ku mwami. 
Nehemiah11:25 Kandi ku vy’imihana n’amatongo yayo, bamwe bo mu Bayuda bāba i Kiriyati‐Araba no mu bisagara bihakūkira, n’i Diboni no mu bisagara bihakūkira," 
Nehemiah11:26 n’i Yeshuwa n’i Molada n’i Beti‐peleti," 
Nehemiah11:27 n’i Hasari‐shuwali n’i Beri‐sheba no mu bisagara bihakūkira," 
Nehemiah11:28 bāba n’i Sikulagi, n’i Mekona no mu bisagara bihakūkira," 
Nehemiah11:29 n’i Eni‐rimoni n’i Zora n’i Yarimuti," 
Nehemiah11:30 n’i Zanowa n’i Adulamu no mu bisagara bigenda bihakūkira, n’i Lakishi no mu matongo yaho, n’i Azeka no mu bisagara bihakūkira. Uko ni ko bāgerereye uhereye i Beri‐sheba ugashitsa no ku mwonga wa Hinomu." 
Nehemiah11:31 Ababenyamini bāba i Geba n’i Mikimashi n’i Aya, n’i Beteli no mu bisagara bihakūkira," 
Nehemiah11:32 no muri Anatoti n’i Nobu n’i Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 n’i Hasori n’i Rama n’i Gitayimu," 
Nehemiah11:34 n’i Hadidi n’i Seboyimu n’i Nebalati," 
Nehemiah11:35 n’i Lodi n’i Ono ari co kiyaya c’ abanyamyuga. 
Nehemiah11:36 Mu Balewi, imitigiri imwe y’abāhora i Buyuda yagiye kuba i Bubenyamini." 
Nehemiah12:1 Aba ni bo baherezi n’Abalewi bādūganye na Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli na Yosuwa; ni Seraya na Yeremiya na Ezira," 
Nehemiah12:2 na Amariya na Maluki na Hatushi," 
Nehemiah12:3 na Shekaniya na Rehumu na Meremoti," 
Nehemiah12:4 na Ido na Ginetoyi na Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 na Miyamini na Mahadiya na Biliga," 
Nehemiah12:6 na Shemaya na Yoyaribu na Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 na Salu na Amoki na Hilukiya na Yedaya wundi. Abo ni bo bār’ abakuru b’abaherezi na bagenzi babo mu gihe ca Yosuwa. 
Nehemiah12:8 Kand’ Abalewi ni Yosuwa na Binuwi na Kadimiyeli na Sherebiya na Yuda na Mataniya; Mataniya uwo, bo na bagenzi biwe, ni bo baterera abandi indirimbo z’ ishimwe;" 
Nehemiah12:9 kandi bagenzi babo Bakibukiya na Uno bākūranwa na bo, bahāna imbu." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yosuwa yavyaye Yoyakimu, Yoyakimu avyara Eliyashibu, Eliyashibu avyara Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada avyara Yonatani, Yonatani avyara Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Abaherezi bo mu gihe ca Yoyakimu b’abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza n’aba: mu ba Seraya ni Meraya; mu ba Yeremiya ni Hananiya; 
Nehemiah12:13 mu ba Ezira ni Meshulamu; mu ba Amariya ni Yehohanani; 
Nehemiah12:14 mu ba Maluki ni Yonatani; mu ba Shebaniya ni Yosefu; 
Nehemiah12:15 mu ba Harimu ni Adina; mu ba Merayoti ni Helikayi; 
Nehemiah12:16 mu ba Ido ni Zekariya; mu ba Ginetoni ni Meshulamu; 
Nehemiah12:17 mu ba Abiya ni Zikuri; mu ba Minyamini no mu ba Mohadiya ni Pilitayi; 
Nehemiah12:18 mu ba Biliga ni Shamuwa; mu ba Shemaya ni Yehonatani; 
Nehemiah12:19 mu ba Yoyaribu ni Matenayi; mu ba Yedaya ni Uzi; 
Nehemiah12:20 mu ba Salayi ni Kalayi; mu ba Amoki ni Eberi; 
Nehemiah12:21 mu ba Hilukiya ni Hashabiya; mu ba Yedaya ni Netaneli. 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu Balewi, abakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza banditswe mu gihe ca Eliyashibu na Yoyada na Yohanani na Yaduwa; abaherezi na bo banditswe ku ngoma ya Dariyo Umuperesi." 
Nehemiah12:23 Abandurutse kuri Lewi bo mu bakuru b’amazu ya ba sekuruza bari banditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma, kugeza igihe ca Yohanani mwene Eliyashibu." 
Nehemiah12:24 Kand’ abakuru b’ Abalewi ni Hashabiya na Sherebiya na Yosuwa mwene Kadimiyeli na bagenzi babo, bari bashinzwe guhimbaza Imana no kuyishima, bakurikiye ibgirizwa rya Dawidi umuntu w’Imana, bahāna imbu." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mataniya na Bakibukiya na Obadiya na Meshulamu na Talimoni na Akubu bar’ abashibamyi barinda amazu y’ububīko yo ku marembo. 
Nehemiah12:26 Abo ni bo bāriho mu gihe ca Yoyakimu mwene Yosuwa, Yosuwa wa Yehozadaki, no mu gihe ca Nehemiya icēgēra c’umwami, na Ezira umuherezi, ari we munyabgenge w’ivyanditswe." 
Nehemiah12:27 Igihe bāshikiriza Imana uruzitiro rw’i Yerusalemu, bāhamagaye Abalewi aho bāba hose, ngo baze i Yerusalemu ku musi mukuru wo kurushikiriza Imana banezerewe, ngo bashimishe indirimbo bafise n’ivyo kuvuza vyitwa matowazi bo n’amakembe n’inanga." 
Nehemiah12:28 Nukw abaririmvyi barakorana bava mu biyaya bikikije i Yerusalemu no mu mihana y’ Abanetofati," 
Nehemiah12:29 n’i Beti‐gilugali no mu misozi y’i Geba n’i Azimaveti, kukw abaririmvyi bari biyubakiye imigerero impande zose z’i Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Nukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bariyeza, maze beza abantu n’amarembo n’uruzitiro." 
Nehemiah12:31 Maze nuriza abakuru b’Abayuda ngo baje hejuru ku ruzitiro, ndabagabanyamw’ imice ibiri minini ngo bagende barōngōye bahimbaza. Umuce umwe ugenda ku ruzitiro werekeye i buryo, kw irembo bacishamw’ umwavu." 
Nehemiah12:32 Bakurikirwa na Hoshaya n’ igice kimwe c’abakuru b’Abayuda," 
Nehemiah12:33 na Azariya na Ezira na Meshulamu," 
Nehemiah12:34 na Yuda na Benyamini na Shemaya na Yeremiya," 
Nehemiah12:35 n’abahungu b’abaherezi bamwe bafise inzumbete: Zekariya mwene Yonatani, Yonatani wa Shemaya, Shemaya wa Mataniya, Mataniya wa Mikaya, Mikaya wa Zakuri, Zakuri wa Asafu;" 
Nehemiah12:36 na bagenzi biwe Shemaya na Azareli na Milalayi na Gilalayi na Mahayi na Netaneli na Yuda na Hanani, bari bafise ibintu vyo kuvuza vyar’ ivya Dawidi umuntu w’Imana; kandi Ezira umunyabgenge w’ ivyanditswe yar’ abagiye imbere;" 
Nehemiah12:37 baca kw irembo rija kw iriba batumbera imbere yabo, badūgira ahadondagirwa haja mu gisagara ca Dawidi, ah’ uruzitiro rudūgira haruguru y’ingoro yar’ iya Dawidi, bashika kw irembo ry’amazi ryerekeye i burasirazuba." 
Nehemiah12:38 Uwundi muce w’abagenda bahimbaza ugenda kubasanganira, nanje nari mbakurikiye ndi kumwe n’ikindi gice c’abantu; nuko bagenda hejuru ku ruzitiro, haruguru y’umunara w’amatanure, bashika no ku ruzitiro rw’intimba nini." 
Nehemiah12:39 Maze baca haruguru y’irembo ry’Abefurayimu no kw irembo rya kera, no kw irembo ryitwa iry’ Amafi, no ku munara wa Hananeli, no ku wa Hameya, bashika kw irembo ry’intama; nuko bahagarara kw irembo ry’abateramyi." 
Nehemiah12:40 Maz’ iyo mice yompi y’abagenda bahimbaza ija guhagarara mu ngoro y’Imana, nanje nyene twe n’umuce w’abakuru twari kumwe," 
Nehemiah12:41 bo n’abaherezi Eliyakimu na Mayaseya na Minyamini na Mikaya na Eliyowenayi na Zekariya na Hananiya bafise inzumbete; 
Nehemiah12:42 na Mayaseya na Shemaya na Eleyazari na Uzi na Yehohanani na Malakiya na Elamu na Ezeri. Maz’ abaririmvyi baririmba ijwi rirenga, Yezirahiya ni we yabarōngōra." 
Nehemiah12:43 Uwo musi batanga ibimazi vyinshi, baranezerwa kukw Imana yar’ ibateye umunezero mwinshi; kandi n’abagore n’ abana baranezerwa, bituma umunezero ur’i Yerusalemu wumvikana kure." 
Nehemiah12:44 Kur’ uyo musi batoranya abantu bo kuzezwa ivyumba vy’ ububīko vyo kubīkamw’ amashikanwa azunguzwa, n’ay’ umushuzo, n’ay’ ibigiracumi, kugira ngo bayashingure muri vyo, abe imituri y’abaherezi n’Abalewi, nk’ uko vyashinzwe mu vyagezwe, ukw imirima yo mu bisagara yangana, kukw Abayuda banezerejwe n’ukw abaherezi n’Abalewi bari kw ibango ryabo," 
Nehemiah12:45 bagatako bakagenda bahāna imbu mu gukorera Imana yabo no mu kwiyeza. Kand’ abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi ni ko bāgenza, bakurikiye icagezwe ca Dawidi n’ic’ umuhungu wiwe Salomo." 
Nehemiah12:46 Kuko kera mu gihe ca Dawidi na Asafu hārih’ abarōngōzi b’abaririmvyi, hakabaho n’indirimbo zo guhimbaza Imana no kuyishima." 
Nehemiah12:47 Kandi mu gihe ca Zerubabeli na Nehemiya Abisirayeli bātanga imituri y’abaririmvyi n’iy’ abashibamyi, nk’uko vyashinzwe ku musi n’umusi; bakongera bagaha Abalewi ivyejejwe, Abalewi na bo bakabihakw abo kuri Aroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kur’ uwo musi abantu basomerwa igitabo ca Mose, basanga nta Mwamoni cank’ Umunyamowabu yemererwa gushika mw ikoraniro ry’Imana gushitsa ibihe vyose," 
Nehemiah13:2 kuko batāsanganije Abisirayeli umutsima n’amazi, kandi kuko bāhēreye Balamu ngw abavume; mugabo, Imana yacu yahinduye uwo muvumo ucika umugisha." 
Nehemiah13:3 Nukw Abisirayeli bamaze kwumva ivyo vyagezwe, baca bītandukanya n’ ikivange c’abanyamahanga bose bāri muri bo." 
Nehemiah13:4 Arikw ivyo bitarabaho, Eliyashibu umuherezi, ari we yajejwe ivyumba vyo ku ngoro y’Imana yacu, kandi yar’ incuti ya Tobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 yateguriye Tobiya nyene icumba kinini, aho bāhora babīka amashikanwa y’amafu n’imibavu, bakahabīka n’ibintu vy’imbombovu, kandi hābīkwa n’ibigiracumi vy’impeke n’ivya vino n’ivy’ amavuta ya elayo, ari vyo ivyagezwe vyashinze ko bihabga Abalewi n’abaririmvyi n’abashibamyi, hamwe n’amashikanwa azunguzwa yahabga abaherezi." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ariko mur’ ico gihe cose sinar’ i Yerusalemu, kuko nari nagiye i bgami mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu na kabiri Aritazeruzi umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma. Mpamaze imisi, nsaba umwami ngw andekure ngende." 
Nehemiah13:7 Maze nshitse i Yerusalemu mbona ikibi Eliyashibu yakoze, ko yahaye Tobiya icumba mu nyubakwa yo ku ngoro y’Imana." 
Nehemiah13:8 Birambabaza cane, ni co catumye nshibagurira hanze ibintu vyose vya Tobiya vyari mur’ ico cumba," 
Nehemiah13:9 ngera ko bahumanura ico cumba; bamaze kugihumanura nsubizamw’ ibintu vy’imbombovu vy’ingoro y’Imana, hamwe n’amashikanwa y’amafu bo n’imibavu." 
Nehemiah13:10 Hanyuma nsanga yukw Abalewi batakironka imituri bāgerewe, ivyo vyatumye Abalewi n’ abaririmvyi, abākora ibikorwa vy’ ingoro y’Imana, babita, umuntu wese agasubira mw itongo ryiwe." 
Nehemiah13:11 Maze nca ntātira abakuru, nti N’iki catumye ingoro y’Imana irekwa? Ndaheza nkoranya abo Balewi n’abaririmvyi, mbasubiza mu myanya yabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Maz’ Abayuda bose baca bazana ibigiracumi vy’impeke n’ivya vino n’ivy’ amavuta ya elayo, babishingura mu bubīko." 
Nehemiah13:13 Nshirah’ abazezwabintu vyo mu bubīko, ni bo b’aba: Shelemiya umuherezi, na Sadoki umunyabgenge w’ivyanditswe, na Pedaya wo mu Balewi; hakurikirako Hanani mwene Zakuri, Zakuri wa Mataniya, kukw abo bari bazwi kw ar’ abizigirwa; kand’ igikorwa cabo kwar’ ukugaburira bagenzi babo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ndaheza ndasenga, nti Mana yanje, ibi uz’ ubinzirikaneko, ntuz’ uhanagure ibikorwa vy’ urukundo nakoreye ingoro yawe, Mana yanje, n’ivyo nakoze vyo gufasha ibihakorerwa." 
Nehemiah13:15 Mur’ iyo misi mbona bamwe bo mu Bayuda bagana vino kw isabato, n’abandi mbona bimburira mu bigega, abandi baremeka indogoba zabo vino n’inzabibu n’ insukoni n’ibintu vy’uburyo bgose, babizana i Yerusalemu ku musi w’isabato. Mbasanga aho badandariza, ndabahambarira kur’ uwo musi nyene baguriyekw ivyo kurya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Hāri n’abantu bavuye i Tiro baba i Yerusalemu, bama bazana amafi n’ibindi vy’uburyo bgose babigurira Abayuda kw isabato i Yerusalemu." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ndaheza ntātira abakuru bo mu Bayuda, nti N’iki gituma mukora ibibi bisa birtyo mugahumanya isabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Mbega ntimubona kw Imana yacu yaturekuriyekw ivyago, twe n’iki gisagara, kuko ba sogokuruza bacu bākoze bartyo? None namwe murushiriza gukwēgera Abisirayeli uburake, kuko mwama muhumanya isabato." 
Nehemiah13:19 Isabato itaratangura, hagitangura kutabona neza mu marembo y’i Yerusalemu, mvuga ko bugarira amarembo, ntibaze bayugurure isabato idashize. Ndaheza nshira bamwe bo mu bantu banje kurinda amarembo ngo ntihagire umutwaro n’umwe bayacishamwo ku musi w’isabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Maz’ abadandaza n’abagura ibintu vy’ uburyo bgose barāra inyuma y’i Yerusalemu rimwe canke kabiri. 
Nehemiah13:21 Maze ndabahambarira, ndababaza, nt’ Igituma murāra inyuma y’uruzitiro n’iki? Ni mwasubīra nzobafata. Kuva ico gihe ntibāsubiriye kugaruka kw isabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ndaheza mbgira Abalewi ngo biyeze, babone kuza gushibama ku marembo, kugira ngo batume umusi w’isabato uziririzwa. Ndaheza ndasaba, nti Mana yanje, n’ibi na vyo uz’ ubinzirikaneko, umpangaze nk’ukw imbabazi zawe nyinshi zingana." 
Nehemiah13:23 Nuko mur’ ico gihe mbona Abayuda bābiriye abagore bo mu Banyashidodi no mu Bamoni no mu Banyamowabu," 
Nehemiah13:24 kandi ko benshi bo mu bana babo bavuga ikinyashidodi cank’ urundi rurimi rw’ayandi mahanga gusa, ntibashobore kuvuga ikiyuda." 
Nehemiah13:25 Maze ndabahambarira ndabavuma, mbere bamwe ndanabakubita, mbashikura umushatsi, ndaheza mbarahiza Imana, nti Ntimuze mutirimuke ngo musubire gushingira abakobga banyu abahungu babo, canke ngo musabire abahungu banyu abakobga babo, kandi namwe ntimukabābīrire." 
Nehemiah13:26 Mbega Salomo umwami w’ Abisirayeli, we ntiyacumujwe n’ abagore nk’uko nyene? Kandi nta mwami yar’ ahwanye na we yaribgaboneke mu mahanga yose, yakundwa rwose n’Imana yiwe, iramwimika imugira umwami w’ Abisirayeli bose; ariko na we nyene yacumujwe n’abagore b’ abanyamahangakazi nk’ukundi uko." 
Nehemiah13:27 Mbega namwe tubemerere gukora icaha kingana girtyo ngo mwābīre abagore b’abanyamahangakazi, mucumure ku Mana yacu?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Kand’ umwe wo mu bahungu ba Yoyada mwene Eliyashibu, umuherezi mukuru, yar’ umukwe wa Sanibalati w’Umuhoroni; nca ndamwirukana amva i ruhande." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ndaheza ndasaba, nt’ Ewe Mana yanje, ubibuke kuko bāhumanije ubuherezi bo n’isezerano ry’ ubuherezi nyene n’iry’ Abalewi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Uko ni ko nabahumanuye, nkabakūramw’ ikintu cose c’ikinyamahanga, ngashingira abaherezi n’Abalewi imbu zabo, umuntu wese ku gikorwa ciwe;" 
Nehemiah13:31 kandi natunganije n’ivyo kuzana amashikanwa y’inkwi mu bihe vyashinzwe, bo n’ay’ imishuzo. Ndaheza ndasaba, nti Mana yanje, uz’ ubinzirikaneko, ubinyishure ivyiza." 
Esther1:1 Ku ngoma ya Ahasuwerusi, (Ahasuwerusi uyo, ni we yaganza ibihugu ijana na mirongwibiri n’indwi, uhereye i Buhindi ugashitsa Etiyopiya)," 
Esther1:2 ico gihe umwami Ahasuwerusi yar’ ahangamye ku ngoma yiwe ku murwa i Shushani; 
Esther1:3 mu mwaka ugira gatatu ari ku ngoma atumirira amazimano abaganwa biwe bose n’abamenyekana biwe; abahambaye b’i Buperesi n’i Bumedi, na ba segaba n’abaganwa b’ibihugu bakoranira imbere yiwe." 
Esther1:4 Amara imisi myinshi yerekana ubutunzi bg’ ubgami bgiwe bg’icubahiro, n’ igitinyiro c’ubugabe bgiwe bg’ agahebuza; ashitsa imisi ijana na mirongumunani." 
Esther1:5 Nukw iyo misi ishize, umwami atumira abantu bose bari ku murwa i Shushani, abahambaye n’ aboroshe; bamara imisi ndwi mu nyubakwa yo mu rugo rwo ku ngoro y’umwami." 
Esther1:6 Hāri hakinze impuzu zera n’izisa n’akatsi gatoto n’iz’ amasufe, zimanikishijwe imigozi y’ibitambara vyera vyiza n’iy’ inyambarabami, ifashwe n’impeta z’ifeza ku nkingi z’amabuye yitwa marimari; hāri n’imisegamuro yakozwe mw izahabu n’ifeza, iteretse ku musezero wa marimari nyene y’amabara y’ agahama n’ayera n’ay’ umuhondo n’ayirabura." 
Esther1:7 Babahēra ivyo kunywa mu mabakure y’izahabu — kand’ ayo mabakure amwe yasa ukwayo ayandi ukwayo — babaha ku biturire vy’i bgami, nk’ukw ikiganza ciza c’umwami cari kiri." 
Esther1:8 Kandi mur’ ukwo kunywa vyashinzwe ngo ntihagire ūgōbērwa; kuk’ umwami yari yageze abasuku biwe ng’ umuntu wese agire ukw agomba. 
Esther1:9 Kandi n’umwamikazi Vashiti atumirira abagore amazimano mu ngoro y’umwami Ahasuwerusi nyene. 
Esther1:10 Nuko ku musi ugira indwi umutima w’umwami umaze gukankamurwa na vino, abarira Mehumani na Bizita na Haribona na Bigita na Abaguta na Zetari na Karukasi, abo ukw ar’ indwi bār’ inkone zihēreza uwo mwami Ahasuwerusi," 
Esther1:11 ababgira kuzana umwamikazi Vashiti imbere yiwe yambaye igitsibo c’ubgami, kugira ngo yereke amahanga n’abaganwa ubgiza bgiwe, kuko yar’ umunyakaranga." 
Esther1:12 Arik’ umwamikazi Vashiti yanka kuza ngo yemere ijambo ry’umwami ryatumwe izo nkone: bituma umwami ashangashirwa rwose, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa." 
Esther1:13 Maz’ umwami aca abaza abanyabgenge bazi uko vyahora bigenda mu bihe vyashize; (kuk’ ukw ari k’umwami yahora agenza ku bazi ivyagezwe n’imanza bose). 
Esther1:14 Kand’ abār’ akadasohoka ku mwami bāri Karishena na Shetari na Adimata na Tarishishi na Meresi na Marisena na Memukani, abaganwa ndwi b’i Buperesi n’i Bumedi; bār’ abishikira b’umwami, bakaba n’aba mbere mu bgami bgiwe." 
Esther1:15 Arababaza, at’ Umwamikazi Vashiti tumugire dute mu vy’ivyagezwe, kukw atemeye ijambo natumye inkone, jewe umwami Ahasuwerusi?" 
Esther1:16 Maze Memukani arishura, avugira imbere y’umwami n’abo baganwa, at’ Umwamikazi Vashiti ntacumuye ku mwami wenyene, acumuye no ku baganwa bose, no ku mahanga yose ari mu bihugu vyose vy’umwami Ahasuwerusi;" 
Esther1:17 kukw ivyo umwamikazi yakoze ivyo bizokwamamara mu bagore bose, bibatere gukēngēra abagabo babo, ni vyavugwa yuk’ umwami Ahasuwerusi yageze k’umwamikazi Vashiti azanwa imbere yiwe, akanka." 
Esther1:18 Mber’ uyu musi abagore bacu b’i Buperesi n’i Bumedi ni bumva ivyo umwamikazi yakoze, na bo bazoca bagira bartyo abaganwa bose b’umwami. Nuko rero hazobah’ agakēngērwe kenshi n’ishavu." 
Esther1:19 Umwami avyemeye, hoshingwa ibgirizwa ry’umwami, maze rikandikwa mu vyagezwe vy’Abaperesi n’Abamedi, rikoya guhinduka, yuko Vashiti atazokwongera guseruka imbere y’umwami Ahasuwerusi; kandi n’icubahiro ciwe c’ubgamikazi agihe uwundi amurusha kwubaha." 
Esther1:20 Maz’ iteka umwami aribuce ni ryamara kwamamara mu bihugu vyiwe vyose iyo biva bikagera, abagore bose bazoca bubaha abagabo babo, abahambaye n’aboroshe." 
Esther1:21 Iyo nama umwami n’abaganwa barayishima; umwami abigenza nk’ukw inama ya Memukani yar’ iri. 
Esther1:22 Nukw arungika ivyete mu bihugu vyose vy’umwami, igihugu cose ukw inyandiko zaco ziri, n’ ihanga ryose uk’ ururimi rwaryo ruri, ng’umugabo wese yiganze mu rugo rwiwe, kandi ngo bavyamamaze mu ndimi z’abantu biwe uko zingana." 
Esther2:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo, uburake bg’ umwami Ahasuwerusi buhwamye, yibuka ivya Vashiti n’ ivyo yakoze, n’ivyashinzwe kubgiwe." 
Esther2:2 Maz’ abāsukurira umwami baramubgira, bati Mwami, ni bakuronderere abigeme b’ inkumi beza‐beza;" 
Esther2:3 kandi n’ ushireh’ abantu mu bihugu vyawe vyose, mwami, ngo bakoranirize hamwe abigeme bose b’inkumi beza‐beza ku murwa i Shushani, bashirwe mu nzu y’abigeme, babashikirize Hegayi inkone y’umwami, asanzwe arinda abigeme, bahabge ivyo kwisīga ngo bayagayage mu maso." 
Esther2:4 Maz’ umwigeme uzoshima az’ abe umwamikazi mu gishingo ca Vashiti. Nuk’ umwami ashima iyo nama, abigenza artyo." 
Esther2:5 Ku murwa i Shushani hār’ Umuyuda yitwa Moridekayi mwene Yayiri, Yayiri wa Shimeyi, Shimeyi wa Kishi, Umubenyamini." 
Esther2:6 Yari yakūwe i Yerusalemu ar’ inyagano, ajananwa n’abandi banyagano banyaganywe n’umwami w’Abayuda Yekoniya, igihe bānyagwa na Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Esther2:7 Moridekayi yari yareze Hadasa, ari we Esiteri, mwene se wabo, kukw atāgira se na nyina, kand’ uwo mwigeme yari mwiza w’umunyakaranga; maze se na nyina bamaze gupfa, Moridekayi aramujana amurera nk’umwana wiwe." 
Esther2:8 Nukw ibgirizwa ry’umwami n’ icagezwe ciwe bimaze kwamamara, abigeme benshi bagakoranirizwa ku murwa i Shushani, ngo barindwe na Hegayi, Esiteri na we ajanwa i bgami, ahabga Hegayi nyene, yarinda abigeme." 
Esther2:9 Ashima uwo mwigeme, aramutonesha; agira umwete wo kumuha ivyo kwisīga ngw ayagayage mu maso, amuha n’igisa yagerewe, amuha n’abakobga ndwi, atoranije mu rugo rw’umwami: aramwunguruza bo n’abo bakobga, amushira aharusha ahandi kuba heza mur’ iyo nzu y’abigeme." 
Esther2:10 Kandi Esiteri nta ho yigeze aserura ubgoko bgabo ubg’ ari bgo, cank’ umuryango wabo: kuko Moridekayi yari yaramwihanije kutabivuga." 
Esther2:11 Kandi Moridekayi yahora agendagenda uko bukeye inyuma y’urugo rw’inzu y’abigeme, kugira ngw amenye Esiteri uko yaramutse n’ukw ameze." 
Esther2:12 Nuk’ umwigeme wese yashikwako n’urubu rwiwe rwo kujanwa ku mwami Ahasuwerusi, amaze amezi cumi n’abiri akorerwa ivy’ abigeme, nk’uko vyashinzwe, kukw igihe co kwitunganya kwabo ari ko cari kimeze: bāhabga amavuta arimw’ isenga kumara amezi atandatu, yandi mezi atandatu bagahabga ibitāmirana, n’ ivyo abigeme bāgerewe kwisīga ngo bayagayage mu maso." 
Esther2:13 Uko ni k’umwigeme wese yabona kuja ku mwami; kand’ iy’ agira aje mu ngoro y’umwami, ico yagomba cose co mu nzu y’abigeme yaragihabga." 
Esther2:14 Yagenda ku kagoroba, akavayo mu gitondo, akaja mu nzu ya kabiri y’abagore, akarindwa na Shayashigazi inkone y’umwami yarinda incoreke z’ intoni; ntiyongera gusubira ku mwami, shit’ iy’ umwami amushimye, akamuhamagaza amutoboye izina." 
Esther2:15 Nukw igihe ca Esiteri kirashika co kujanwa ku mwami. (Esiteri uwo yari mwene Abihayili, se wabo wa Moridekayi, Moridekayi umwe nyene yamurera nk’ umwana wiwe.) Ico gihe gishitse co kujanwa ku mwami, ntiyagira ico yaka, atar’ ivyo Hegayi yamugereye, ari we nkone y’umwami yarinda abigeme; kandi Esiteri yashimwa n’abāmubona bose." 
Esther2:16 Nuko mu kwezi kw’icumi, ni kwo kwitwa Tebeti, mu mwaka ugira indwi umwami Ahasuwerusi ari ku ngoma, Esiteri ajanwa mu ngoro ku mwami Ahasuwerusi." 
Esther2:17 Nuk’ umwami agomwa Esiteri, amurutisha abamikazi bose, na we arakundwakara, aba intoni mu nyonga ziwe kuruta za nkumi zose; bituma amwambika igitsibo c’ubgami mu mutwe, amugira umwamikazi mu gishingo ca Vashiti." 
Esther2:18 Maz’ umwami atumirira abaganwa biwe bose n’abamenyekana biwe amazimano akomeye; kand’ ayo mazimano yari kubga Esiteri; ibihugu abiharira ikori, agaba ingabire, nk’ukw ikiganza ciza c’umwami cari kiri." 
Esther2:19 Nuko bongeye gukoranya inkumi ubugira kabiri, Moridekayi yari yicaye ku kirimba i bgami." 
Esther2:20 Kandi Esiteri ntiyaribgaserure umuryango wabo cank’ ubgoko bgabo ubg’ ari bgo, nk’uko Moridekayi yari yaramwihanikirije; kuko Esiteri yahora yumvira Moridekayi mu vyo amubarira, nk’uko yamwumvira akimureze." 
Esther2:21 Mur’ iyo misi, Moridekayi yari yicaye ku kirimba i bgami, babiri bo mu nkone z’umwami, Bigitana na Tereshi, bo mu barinda umuryango, barashungumirwa, barondera ingene bokwica umwami Ahasuwerusi." 
Esther2:22 Iyo nama imenywa na Moridekayi; abibarira umwamikazi Esiteri; Esiteri na we abibarira umwami atumwe na Moridekayi. 
Esther2:23 Ivyo babisuzumye, basanze ari ko biri, abo bompi babamanika ku giti; maz’ ivyo vyandikirwa imbere y’umwami mu gitabo kidonda ibigenda biba ku ngoma yiwe." 
Esther3:1 Maze hanyuma y’ivyo umwami Ahasuwerusi akuza Hamani mwene Hamedata, Umwagagi, amushira hejuru, intebe yiwe ayisumbisha iz’ abaganwa bose basabanye." 
Esther3:2 Maz’ abagendanyi b’ umwami bose bāri ku kirimba i bgami bunamira Hamani, bakamwikubita imbere, kuk’ umwami yari yābishinze ngo bamuhe ico cubahiro. Ariko Moridekayi ntiyamwunamira, ntiyamwikubita imbere." 
Esther3:3 Maz’ abagendanyi b’ umwami bāri ku kirimba i bgami, babaza Moridekayi, bati N’iki gituma uca mu cagezwe c’umwami?" 
Esther3:4 Nuko bashishikara kubimubarira uko bukeye, ntiyabumvira; baca babibarira Hamani, ngo barābe ivya Moridekayi uko vyoba, kuko yari yābabariye ngo n’Umuyuda." 
Esther3:5 Nuko Hamani abonye yuko Moridekayi atamwunamiye canke ngw amwikubite imbere, aca arashangashirwa." 
Esther3:6 Arikw abona yuko gufata Moridekayi wenyene ata kimazi, kuko bari bamubgiye ubgoko bga Moridekayi ubg’ ari bgo; ni co catumye Hamani arondera uburyo bgo kugeseza Abayuda bose bāri mu bihugu vyose vy’umwami Ahasuwerusi, ari bo bgoko nyene bga Moridekayi." 
Esther3:7 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri umwami Ahasuwerusi ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa mbere kwitwa Nisani, bapfindira Puri imbere ya Hamani, ari bgo bupfindo, bapfinda umusi uw’ ari wo, n’ukwezi ukw ari kwo, ubupfindo bgerekana ukwezi kw’icumi na kabiri, kwitwa Adari." 
Esther3:8 Nuko Hamani abarira umwami Ahasuwerusi, ati Harih’ ubgoko busābagiye, bukwiragiye mu mahanga yo mu bihugu vyawe vyose; kand’ ivyagezwe vyabo nta ho bihūriye n’ivy’ ayandi mahanga yose, kandi ntibitondera ivyagezwe vyawe, mwami: ni co gituma, mwami, bitabereye gupfa kubarekera ngaho." 
Esther3:9 Nuko mwami, ni wavyemera, hoshingwa iteka, bakaryandika ngo barandurwe; nanje nzotanga italanto z’ifeza ibihumbi cumi, ndazihe abajejwe itunga ryawe, bazishire mu bubīko bgawe, mwami." 
Esther3:10 Nuk’ umwami aca yambura impeta ku rutoke, ayiha Hamani mwene Hamedata Umwagagi, umwansi w’Abayuda." 
Esther3:11 Umwami abarira Hamani, at’ Izo feza zigumirize, na ho ubgo bgoko ushobora kubugira uk’ ugomba." 
Esther3:12 Bukeye ku musi w’icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kwa mbere, bahamagara abakarani b’ umwami, bandika vyose nk’uko Hamani yabishinze, babirungikira ivyēgēra vy’umwami n’abaganza ibihugu vyiwe vyose, n’abaganwa bo mu mahanga yose, igihugu cose ukw inyandiko zaco ziri, n’ihanga ryose uk’ ururimi rwaryo ruri; bavyandika mw izina ry’ umwami Ahasuwerusi, babidomakw ikimenyetso co ku mpeta y’ umwami." 
Esther3:13 Nuko barungika ivyo vyete babiha intumwa zibijana mu bihugu vy’umwami vyose, ngo bageseze Abayuda bose, abakuru n’abato, n’ibibondo n’ abagore, ngo babice, babahonnye ku musi umwe, ni wo musi w’ icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kw’ icumi na kabiri kwitwa Adari, kandi banyage n’ivyabo." 
Esther3:14 Amakopi y’ico cete bayakwiza mu mahanga yose, ngw iryo teka ryamamazwe mu bihugu vyose, kugira ngo bitegurire uwo musi." 
Esther3:15 Nukw izo ntumwa zigenda zihuta, kubgo kwihanikirizwa n’ umwami; iryo teka ryamamara no ku murwa i Shushani. Maz’ umwami na Hamani biyicarira ngo banywe; arikw abo ku murwa i Shushani barumirwa." 
Esther4:1 Nuko Moridekayi amenye ibibaye vyose ivy’ ari vyo, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, yambara igunira, yisūrirakw iminyota, arasohoka aja mu gisagara hagati, aborogesha ijwi rirenga ry’ umubabaro." 
Esther4:2 Arinda ashika n’ inyuma y’ikirimba c’i bgami: kukw ata wemererwa guca mu kirimba c’i bgami yambaye igunira. 
Esther4:3 Kandi mu gihugu cose, ah’ icagezwe c’umwami n’iteka ryiwe bishitse, hāba amaborogo menshi mu Bayuda, no kwisonzesha, n’ amarira, n’ugutaka; kandi benshi bācura imirambararo bari mu magunira no mu minyota." 
Esther4:4 Maz’ incoreke za Esiteri n’ inkone ziwe baraza barabimubarira; umwamikazi arababara cane: arungikira Moridekayi imyambaro yo kumwambika, ngo bamwambure igunira: ariko ntiyavyemera." 
Esther4:5 Nuko Esiteri ahamagaza Hataki, umwe mu nkone z’umwami, uwo umwami yamuhaye ngw amutume, amutuma kuri Moridekayi amwihanikirije, ngw amubaze ibibaye ivy’ ari vyo n’inyanduruko yavyo." 
Esther4:6 Nuko Hataki arasohoka agenda kuri Moridekayi, aho yar’ ari ahantu hiyaguye ku murwa, mw irasukiro ry’ikirimba c’i bgami." 
Esther4:7 Moridekayi amudōndera vyose ivyamubayeko, n’igitigiri c’amahera uko kingana Hamani yasezeranye gutanga ngw aje mu bubīko bg’ umwami, ayatanze kugira ngw ageseze Abayuda." 
Esther4:8 Amuha n’ ikopi y’ivyanditswe vy’iryo teka ryamamajwe i Shushani ryo kubageseza, ngw ayereke Esiteri, abimusobanurire; aheze amwihanikirize ngw aje ku mwami, amwinginge, atakambire ubgoko bgabo kuri we." 
Esther4:9 Nuko Hataki aragaruka, abarira Esiteri amajambo ya Moridekayi." 
Esther4:10 Maze Esiteri avugana na Hataki amurungikana amajambo kuri Moridekayi," 
Esther4:11 at’ Ereg’ abamenyekana b’umwami bose, n’abantu bo mu bihugu vy’umwami, barazi yuk’ umuntu wese, ar’ umugabo cank’ umugore, yosanga umwami mu karusha, adahamagawe, har’ icagezwe kimwe gusa kuri ben’ uwo, n’ukwicwa; shit’ umuntu umwami atunze inkoni y’izahabu y’ubugabe bgiwe: bibaye birtyo, uwo ni we akira. Ariko jeho mmaze imisi mirongwitatu ntararengukishwa n’umwami." 
Esther4:12 Nuko babgira Moridekayi amajambo ya Esiteri. 
Esther4:13 Maze Moridekayi na we arabatuma yishura Esiteri, ati Ntugire ngo ni wewe wenyene uzokira mu Bayuda bose, kuk’ uri mu ngoro y’umwami." 
Esther4:14 Kuko ni wapfa kwiyumya mur’ iki gihe, nta kizobuza Abayuda gutabarwa bakarokoka, ariko bivuye ahandi; ariko weho n’ab’ inzu ya so muzohona. Nta wubizi, kumbure icakwimitse ng’ube umwamikazi n’ ukugira ng’ uz’ useruke mu gihe gisa n’iki!" 
Esther4:15 Maze Esiteri arabatuma yishura Moridekayi," 
Esther4:16 ati Genda ukoranirize hamwe Abayuda bose bar’ i Shushani, mwisonzeshe kubganje, mumare imisi itatu ku murango no mw ijoro mutagira ico murya canke munywa; nanje twe n’incoreke zanje tuzokwisonzesha durtyo nyene, mpeze mbone gushika ah’ umwami ari, nah’ ar’ uguca mu cagezwe: kandi namba ndamukiwe no gupfa, mpfe!" 
Esther4:17 Nuko Moridekayi aragenda, akora vyose nk’uko Esiteri yamugeze." 
Esther5:1 Bukeye ku musi ugira gatatu, Esiteri yambara imyambaro yiwe y’ubgamikazi, aragenda ahagarara mu karusha ko ku ngoro y’umwami, aharābana n’iyo ngoro nyene; kand’ umwami yar’ avyagiye ku ntebe yiwe y’ubgami mu ngoro, atumberanye no mw irebe." 
Esther5:2 Nuk’ umwami abonye umwamikazi Esiteri ahagaze mu karusha, Esiteri agira ubutoni imbere yiwe; umwami atunga Esiteri inkoni y’ izahabu yar’ afise mu minwe. Maze Esiteri aca yīgira hafi, akora ku mutwe w’iyo nkoni." 
Esther5:3 Nuk’ umwami aramubaza, at’ Uragomba iki ga mwamikazi Esiteri? Urasaba iki? Ndakiguha, n’iyo coba igisate c’igihugu canje." 
Esther5:4 Esiteri aramwishura, ati Mwami, ni wavyemera, uyu musi wozanana na Hamani ku giturire mbīteguriye." 
Esther5:5 Nuk’ umwami aravuga, ati Ni munyarukane Hamani, kugira ngo bibe nk’uko Esiteri avuze. Nuk’ umwami na Hamani baja ku giturire Esiteri yiteguye." 
Esther5:6 Bakiri ku giturire ca vino, umwami abaza Esiteri, at’ Ico usaba n’iki, ukagihabga? Urondera iki? N’iyo coba igisate c’igihugu canje uragihabga." 
Esther5:7 Esiteri aramwishura, at’ Ico nsaba kandi ndondera n’iki:" 
Esther5:8 namba ngize ubutoni imbere yawe, mwami, ukemera kumpa ico nsaba, no gushitsa ico ndondera, mwokwongera kuza, mwe na Hamani, ku giturire nzobītegurira; kand’ ejo ico uvuze nzogikora, mwami." 
Esther5:9 Nuk’ uwo musi Hamani asohoka ahimbawe, afise akanyamuneza mu mutima; arikw abonye Moridekayi ku kirimba i bgami, atamuhagurukiye canke ngw amuroresheko n’ijisho, bimutera gushungumirwa cane." 
Esther5:10 Yamara Hamani ariyumanganya, arataha; atuma guhamagara abagenzi, n’umugore wiwe Zereshi." 
Esther5:11 Nuko Hamani abīgānira ukw atunze, n’uko bimuhaye icubahiro, n’ abana biwe ingen’ ari benshi, n’ ingen’ umwami yamushize hejuru muri vyose, kandi ko yamukujije kuruta abaganwa b’umwami n’ abamenyekana biwe." 
Esther5:12 Hamani arongera arababgira, ati Kandi n’umwamikazi Esiteri nta wundi yakundiye kwinjirana n’umwami ku giturire yiteguye atari jewe; mbere n’ubu yantumiye ngo n’ejo nze njane n’umwami." 
Esther5:13 Arikw ivyo vyose nta co bimmariye, nkibona wa Muyuda Moridekayi yicaye ku kirimba i bgami." 
Esther5:14 Nuk’ umugore wiwe Zereshi n’abagenzi biwe bose bamugīra inama, bati Ni bashinge igiti c’intambge mirongwitanu z’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, maz’ ejo uz’ usabe umwami atange Moridekayi bakimumanikeko; uheze ubone kwinjirana n’umwami ku giturire unezerewe. Nuko Hamani ashima iyo nama; aca ashingisha ico giti." 
Esther6:1 Iryo joro nyene umwami abura itiro; aca avuga ko bazana igitabo kidonda ibigenda biba ku ngoma yiwe, nuko bagisomera umwami." 
Esther6:2 Basanga canditswemwo yuko Moridekayi ari we yareze Bigitana na Tereshi, babiri bo mu nkone z’umwami, bo mu bārinda umuryango, yuko bāshaka kwica umwami Ahasuwerusi." 
Esther6:3 Nuk’ umwami arabaza, ati Mbega Moridekayi uwo, har’ ishimwe cank’ icubahiro yahawe kubg’ ivyo? Maz’ abasuku b’umwami bahēreza baramwishura, bati Nta co yahawe." 
Esther6:4 Umwami arabaza, ati Ni nde ari mu rugo? Kand’ aho nyene Hamani yar’ ashitse mu ntangaro mu rugo i bgami, azanywe no gusaba umwami ngw amanike Moridekayi ku giti yamwiteguriye." 
Esther6:5 Abo basuku b’ umwami baramubgira, bati Hamani ni we ahagaze mu rugo. Umwami ati Ni yinjire." 
Esther6:6 Nuko Hamani arinjira. Umwami aramubaza, ati Mbeg’ umuntu jewe umwami nkunze guha icubahiro yokorerwa iki? Nuko Hamani yibaza mu mutima, ati Har’ uwundi umwami yokunda guha icubahiro kuruta jewe?" 
Esther6:7 Maze Hamani abarira umwami, at’ Umuntu umwami akunze guha icubahiro," 
Esther6:8 bozana imyambaro y’ubgami iyo umwami ahora yambara, n’ifarasi umwami agenderako, yambitswe igitsibo c’ubgami." 
Esther6:9 Maz’ iyo myambaro n’iyo farasi bobiha umwe mu baganwa b’umwami asumvya abandi icubahiro, bakayambika uwo muntu umwami akunze guha icubahiro, bakamugendagendesha mu nzira yo mu gisagara ari kur’ iyo farasi, bagasemererera imbere yiwe, bat’ Umuntu umwami akunze guha icubahiro, uku ni kw azohora agirirwa." 
Esther6:10 Nuk’ umwami abgira Hamani, ati Bandanya wābīre imyambaro n’ifarasi nk’uk’ uvuze, ubikore urtyo kuri Moridekayi Umuyuda, yama yicara ku kirimba i bgami: ntihagire na kimwe uhaza mu vyo uvuze vyose." 
Esther6:11 Nuko Hamani yābīra ya myambaro na ya farasi, yambika Moridekayi, amugendagendesha mu nzira yo mu gisagara, asemererera imbere yiwe, at’ Umuntu umwami akunze guha icubahiro, uku ni kw azohora agirirwa." 
Esther6:12 Hanyuma Moridekayi asubira ku kirimba i bgami; ariko Hamani arihuta asubira i we, ababaye kandi yitwikiriye." 
Esther6:13 Maze yigānira Zereshi umugore wiwe n’abagenzi biwe bose, ivyamubayeko vyose. Nukw abahanuzi biwe na Zereshi umugore wiwe baramubarira, bati Moridekayi uwo, k’utanguye gucurangurizwa imbere yiwe, asangw’ ar’ uwo mu ruvyaro rw’ Abayuda, ntuzomushobora, arik’ uzocurangurizwa imbere yiwe nta kabuza!" 
Esther6:14 Bakivugana na we, haza inkone z’umwami, zihuta kujana Hamani ku giturire Esiteri yari yiteguye." 
Esther7:1 Nuk’ umwami na Hamani baza gusangira n’umwamikazi Esiteri. 
Esther7:2 Maze kur’ uwo musi ugira kabiri wo kunywa igiturire ca vino, umwami yongera kubaza Esiteri, at’ Ico usaba n’iki ga mwamikazi Esiteri, ukagihabga? Urondera iki? N’iyo coba igisate c’igihugu canje uragihabga." 
Esther7:3 Maz’ umwamikazi Esiteri aramwishura, ati Namba ngize ubutoni imbere yawe, mugenzi, ukavyemera, mwami, nsabiye agatwe kanje, nsabiye n’ubgoko bgacu;" 
Esther7:4 kuko twe n’ubgoko bgacu twaguzwe, ngo tugesezwe, twicwe, duhone. Iyo tuba twaraguzwe ngo tuje mu buja gusa, nocereje, kuko naho vyodukomereye cane, sinorinze kugora umwami." 
Esther7:5 Maz’ umwami Ahasuwerusi abaza umwamikazi Esiteri, ati Ni nde yubahutse kwīgīra inama nk’iyo, kand’ ari hehe?" 
Esther7:6 Esiteri aramwishura, ati N’umubisha kandi n’umwansi, ni we uyu muyobe Hamani! Maze Hamani acikira ivutu imbere y’umwami n’umwamikazi." 
Esther7:7 Umwami aca ahagurukana uburake, ava ku giturire ca vino, arasohoka aja mu nyubakwa yo ku ngoro; Hamani na we ava hasi ngw asabire agatwe kiwe ku mwamikazi Esiteri; kuko yar’ abonye k’umwami amaramaje kumwica." 
Esther7:8 Maz’ umwami aragaruka, avuye mu nyubakwa yo ku ngoro, yinjira ha handi hār’ igiturire ca vino: asanga Hamani yikubise ku musegamuro Esiteri yariko. Umwami aravuga, ati Mbeg’ agira ngw afatire n’umwamikazi mu ngoro yanje aho mbona? Iryo jambo rikiva mu kanwa k’umwami, Hamani bamupfuka mu maso." 
Esther7:9 Maze Haribona, umwe mu nkone zama hafi y’umwami, aravuga, at’ Ushime mbere kwa Hamani hashinze igiti c’intambge mirongwitanu z’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ico Hamani yagereye Moridekayi, kand’ ari we yavuze ijambo ryākijije umwami. Umwami aravuga, ati Mube ari co mumumanikako." 
Esther7:10 Nuko Hamani bamumanika kur’ ico giti nyene yari yiteguriye Moridekayi. Maz’ uburake bg’umwami burahwama. 
Esther8:1 Kur’ uwo musi nyene umwami Ahasuwerusi agabira umwamikazi Esiteri urugo rwa Hamani umwansi w’Abayuda. Maze Moridekayi aseruka imbere y’umwami; kuko Esiteri yari yavuze ico bapfana. 
Esther8:2 Umwami aca yiyambura impeta, iyo yari yatse Hamani, ayiha Moridekayi. Maze Esiteri ashikiriza Moridekayi urwo rugo rwa Hamani." 
Esther8:3 Hanyuma Esiteri yongera kuvugira imbere y’umwami, yikubita imbere y’inyundo ziwe, amwinginga arira, ngw akūreh’ inama mbi zāgīwe na Hamani Umwagagi, n’imigabo yiwe yari yagabiye kugirira Abayuda." 
Esther8:4 Maz’ umwami atunga Esiteri ya nkoni y’izahabu. Nuko Esiteri ava hasi, ahagarara imbere y’umwami," 
Esther8:5 aravuga, ati Mwami, ni wavyemera, kandi namba ngize ubutoni imbere yawe, ukabona kw ar’ ibibereye, kandi nanje nkaguhimbara, hokwandikwa ivyete vyo gukūra bimwe vy’inama mbi Hamani mwene Hamedata Umwagagi yandikishirije guhonnya Abayuda bari mu bihugu vyawe vyose, mwami." 
Esther8:6 Mbega noshobora nte kwihanganira kurāba ivyago bizoba ku bgoko bgacu? Canke noshobora nte kwihanganira kurorēra umuryango wacu urik’ uragesezwa? 
Esther8:7 Nuk’ umwami Ahasuwerusi yishura umwamikazi Esiteri na Moridekayi Umuyuda, at’ Ehe nagabiye Esiteri urugo rwa Hamani, na we Hamani bamumanitse ku giti, ahōwe kwimbira icobo Abayuda." 
Esther8:8 Nuko namwe ni mwandikire Abayuda, uko mugomba, mubandikire mw izina ryanje, mubidomekw ikimenyetso co ku mpeta yanje; kukw icanditswe cose mw izina ry’umwami, kikadomwakw ikimenyetso co ku mpeta yiwe, nta muntu ashobora kugihindura." 
Esther8:9 Nukw ico gihe abakarani b’ umwami barahamagarwa, hāri ku musi wa mirongwibiri na gatatu w’ukwezi kwa gatatu kwitwa Sivani, bandika ivyo Moridekayi ashinze ku Bayuda vyose, bavyandikira ivyēgēra vy’umwami, n’abaganza ibihugu, n’abaganwa b’ibihugu ijana na mirongwibiri n’indwi, uhereye i Buhindi ugashitsa Etiyopiya, igihugu cose ukw inyandiko zaco ziri, n’ihanga ryose uk’ ururimi rwaryo ruri; bandikira n’Abayuda mu rurimi rwabo ukw inyandiko zabo ziri." 
Esther8:10 Nuko Moridekayi avyandika mw izina ry’umwami Ahasuwerusi, abidomakw ikimenyetso co ku mpeta y’umwami, arungika intumwa zijana ivyo vyete ziri ku mafarasi atebuka, akoreshwa ibikorwa vy’ umwami, yavutse mu ntorwa z’i bgami." 
Esther8:11 Mur’ ivyo vyete umwami yemerera Abayuda bari mu bisagara vyose kwirema inteko ngo bīrwanire, bageseze aboza kubatera bose bo mu moko yose yo mur’ ivyo bihugu, babice, babahonnye, hamwe n’abana babo n’abagore babo, banyage n’ivyabo;" 
Esther8:12 kand’ ivyo bize bikorwe ku musi umwe mu bihugu vyose vy’ umwami Ahasuwerusi, ni wo musi w’icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kw’ icumi na kabiri kwitwa Adari." 
Esther8:13 Amakopi y’ico cete bayakwiza mu mahanga yose, ngw iryo teka ryamamazwe mu bihugu vyose, kugira ng’ uwo musi uz’ usange Abayuda biteguye kwivuna abansi babo." 
Esther8:14 Nukw izo ntumwa ziri kuri ya mafarasi atebuka, akoreshwa ibikorwa vy’umwami, zigenda zihuta, zitewe umwete n’ ukwihanikirizwa n’umwami; ico cagezwe camamara no ku murwa i Shushani." 
Esther8:15 Maze Moridekayi arasohoka, ava imbere y’umwami, yambaye imyambaro y’ubgami y’amasufe n’iyera, n’igitsibo kinini c’izahabu, n’imvune yera nziza y’inyambarabami; nukw abo ku murwa i Shushani basemerera banezerewe." 
Esther8:16 Abayuda na bo gica kireyuka, baranezerwa, barahimbarwa, bagira icubahiro." 
Esther8:17 Maze mu gihugu cose no mu gisagara cose, ah’ icagezwe c’umwami n’ivyo yashinze vyashika, Abayuda baranezerwa, bagahimbarwa, bagatumirana, bakagira umusi mukuru. Maz’ abantu benshi bo mu mahanga yo mur’ ico gihugu batora idini y’Abayuda, kukw Abayuda bāri babateye ubgoba." 
Esther9:1 Nuko mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri kwitwa Adari, ku musi wakwo w’icumi na gatatu, ari wo musi nyene icagezwe c’umwami n’iteka ryiwe vyari bishitse ku ntaho, ni wo musi abansi b’Abayuda bāziga ko babahagarara ku gakanu; ariko birahinduka, Abayuda baba ari bo bahagarara ku gakanu abari babafitiye urwanko." 
Esther9:2 Nukw Abayuda bakoranira mu bisagara vyabo mu bihugu vyose umwami Ahasuwerusi aganza, ngo basomboroze abarondera kubayigiza; kandi nta muntu yashobora kubahagarara imbere, kuko bāri baciye ivutu amahanga yose." 
Esther9:3 Nukw abaganwa bose bo mu bihugu, n’ivyēgēra vy’umwami, n’ abaganza ibihugu, n’abatwarira umwami, batabara Abayuda, kuko Moridekayi yar’ abaciye ivutu." 
Esther9:4 Moridekayi uwo yar’ agahambaye mu rugo rw’umwami, kandi yari rurangiranwa mu bihugu vyose: kuk’ uwo mugabo Moridekayi yarushiriza kuba agahambaye." 
Esther9:5 Nukw Abayuda bicisha inkota abansi babo bose, barabarandura, barabaherengeteza; bagira uko bagomba abari babafitiye urwanko." 
Esther9:6 Ku murwa i Shushani nyene Abayuda bahica abagabo amajana atanu, barabarandura." 
Esther9:7 Bica na Parishanidata na Dalifoni na Asipata," 
Esther9:8 na Porata na Adaliya na Aridata," 
Esther9:9 na Parimashita na Arisayi na Aridayi na Vayizata," 
Esther9:10 abo bose ukw ar’ icumi bishe, bāri bene Hamani umwansi w’Abayuda, mwene Hamedata; ariko ntibākojeje ukuboko kwabo kw isahu." 
Esther9:11 Kur’ uwo musi bamenyesha umwami igitigiri c’abiciwe ku murwa i Shushani. 
Esther9:12 Nuk’ umwami abgira umwamikazi Esiteri, at’ Abayuda bishe abagabo amajana atanu ku murwa i Shushani, barabarandura, bica na bene Hamani ukw ar’ icumi. Mbega none mu bindi bihugu vyanje bakoze ibingana iki? Har’ ico usaba na none ukagihabga? Har’ ikindi urondera kigakorwa?" 
Esther9:13 Esiteri aramwishura, ati Mwami, ni wavyemera, ejo Abayuda bar’ i Shushani borekurwa, bagakora nk’ ukw icagezwe c’uyu musi kibaye; kand’ imivyimba ya bene Hamani ukw ar’ icumi ikamanikwa ku biti." 
Esther9:14 Nuk’ umwami agera ko biba birtyo; iteka ryamamara i Shushani; bamanika na ya mivyimba ya bene Hamani ukw ar’ icumi. 
Esther9:15 Nukw Abayuda bār’ i Shushani bongera kwirema inteko no ku musi w’icumi na kane w’ ukwo kwezi kwitwa Adari, bica abagabo amajana atatu i Shushani; ariko ntibākojeje ukuboko kwabo kw isahu." 
Esther9:16 Kand’ abandi Bayuda bāri mu bihugu umwami aganza birema inteko, barirwanira, bica mu babisha ibihumbi mirongwirindwi na bitanu; baraheza baruhuka abansi babo. Ariko ntibākojeje ukuboko kwabo kw isahu." 
Esther9:17 Uko ni ko vyabaye ku musi w’icumi na gatatu w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari; ku musi w’icumi na kane wakwo bararuhuka, bawugira umusi wo gutumiranako no kunezerwa." 
Esther9:18 Arikw Abayuda bar’ i Shushani birema inteko ku musi wakwo w’icumi na gatatu, no ku w’icumi na kane nyene; maze ku w’icumi na gatanu wakwo bararuhuka, bawugira umusi wo gutumiranako no kunezerwa." 
Esther9:19 Ni co gituma uwo musi w’icumi na kane w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari, Abayuda bo mu misozi, baba mu bisagara bitagira inzitiro, bawugira umusi wo kunezerwa no gutumiranako, n’ umusi mwiza wo kugemuranirako." 
Esther9:20 Maze Moridekayi yandika ivyabaye, Abayuda bose bari mu bihugu vyose umwami Ahasuwerusi aganza, abarungikira ivyete, abari hafi n’abari kure," 
Esther9:21 ashinga ng’ umusi w’icumi na kane n’ uw’ icumi na gatanu w’ukwezi kwitwa Adari, bayigire imisi mikuru, uk’ umwaka utashe;" 
Esther9:22 kuba icibutso c’imisi Abayuda bāruhukiyekw abansi babo, n’ukwezi kwabahindukiye ukw’ umunezero mu gishingo c’umubabaro, bakaronka umusi mwiza mu gishingo c’uwo kugandarako; kand’ ababarira ko bayigira imisi yo gutumiranako no kunezerwa, n’iyo kugemuriranirako no kugabira aboro." 
Esther9:23 Nukw Abayuda bemera kwama babigenza nk’uko babitanguye, kandi nk’uko Moridekayi yabibandikiye;" 
Esther9:24 kuko Hamani umwansi w’Abayuda bose, mwene Hamedata Umwagagi, yari yagabiye kugeseza Abayuda, kandi yari yapfinze Puri, ari bgo bupfindo, ngw abayigize, abahonnye;" 
Esther9:25 ariko bishitse ku mwami, umwami arungika ivyete bivuga yukw iyo migabo mibi Hamani yari yagabiye ku Bayuda imugaruka ku mutwe, kandi yuk’ ubgiwe n’abahungu biwe bamanikwa ku biti." 
Esther9:26 Ni co gituma iyo misi bayita Purimu, bayitiriye Puri. Maze kubg’ amajambo yose yo mur’ ico cete, n’ivyo bīboneye ubgabo, n’ivyababayeko," 
Esther9:27 bituma Abayuda barundura ivy’ iyo misi yompi ko bazoyigira mikuru, uk’ umwaka utashe, mu gihe cayo gishinzwe nk’uko vyari vyanditswe, babicāna amahani ubgabo no ku ruvyaro rwabo, n’abifatanije na bo bose, ngo vyoye kuzoshingūka;" 
Esther9:28 kandi barundura yukw iyo misi ikwiye kwama yibukwa no kugirwa mikuru ukw ibihe vy’urunganwe rwabo bizogenda bikurikirana, mu muryango wose no mu gihugu cose no mu gisagara cose, kandi ngw iyo misi ya Purimu ntize ishingūke mu Bayuda, cank’ icibutso cayo ngo kize kizimangane mu ruvyaro rwabo." 
Esther9:29 Nuk’ umwamikazi Esiteri mwene Abihayili, na Moridekayi Umuyuda, bandika mu bubasha bgose, bashinga ivy’ ico cete ca kabiri c’ivya Purimu." 
Esther9:30 Nukw Abayuda bose bo mu bihugu ijana na mirongwibiri n’indwi, ari vyo bihugu vya Ahasuwerusi, barungikirwa ivyo vyete, birimw’ amajambo y’amahoro n’ay’ ukuri," 
Esther9:31 yo gushinga ivy’ iyo misi ya Purimu mu bihe vyayo vyashinzwe, nk’uko Moridekayi Umuyuda n’umwamikazi Esiteri babigeze, na bo bakavyisezeranira ubgabo no ku ruvyaro rwabo, mu vyo kwisonzesha no mu vyo kuboroga kwabo." 
Esther9:32 Nukw icagezwe ca Esiteri gishinga ivyo vya Purimu; maze vyandikwa mu gitabo. 
Esther10:1 Nuk’ umwami Ahasuwerusi atangisha ikori igihugu cose n’abo mu bizinga vyo mu kiyaga. 
Esther10:2 Kand’ ibikorwa vyose yakoresheje ububasha bgiwe n’ubushobozi bgiwe, bo n’amajambo adondora neza ubukuru bga Moridekayi, uburyo umwami yamushize hejuru, mbega ntivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivyo ku ngoma z’abami b’i Bumedi n’i Buperesi?" 
Esther10:3 Kuk’ uwo Muyuda Moridekayi, uwar’ amurengeye yar’ umwami Ahasuwerusi gusa, kandi yar’ agahambaye mu Bayuda, yashimwa n’ab’i wabo uko bangana; kandi yama yendeza ubgoko bgabo ivyiza, akavuga ibihesha uruvyaro rwabo amahoro." 
Job1:1 Mu gihugu c’i Uzi hār’ umuntu yitwa Yobu; kand’ uwo muntu yar’ umuntu atunganye w’umugororotsi, yubaha Imana, akitandukanya n’ikibi." 
Job1:2 Yar’ afise abahungu ndwi n’abakobga batatu. 
Job1:3 Itunga ryiwe ryar’ intama ibihumbi ndwi, n’ingamiya ibihumbi bitatu, n’inka igihumbi zirima, n’indogoba zivyara amajana atanu, n’abahinda mu rugo benshi cane; nuk’ uwo muntu yar’ ūhambaye gusumba abantu bose b’i burasirazuba." 
Job1:4 Kand’ abahungu biwe bāhora barondera amazimano mu nzu y’ umuntu wese muri bo ku musi ashinze, bagatumira bashiki babo ukw ari batatu ngo baze gusangira na bo." 
Job1:5 Nuk’ ukw imisi y’amazimano yabo yahera, Yobu yabatumako ngw abeze, akavyuka kare mu gatondo, agatanga ibimazi vyoswa bihwanye n’igitigiri ca bose: kuko Yobu yavuga, ati Kumbure abahungu banje bācumuye, barogota ku Mana mu mitima yabo. Uko ni ko Yobu yahora agenza ubudasiba." 
Job1:6 Umusi ur’ izina abana b’Imana baje bashengereye Uhoraho, kandi na Satani yazananye na bo." 
Job1:7 Uhoraho abaza Satani, at’ Uvuye hehe? Satani yishura Uhoraho, ati Mvuye gukwiragira mw isi no kuyigendagendamwo." 
Job1:8 Uhoraho abaza Satani, ati Mbega witegereje umusavyi wanje Yobu, yukw ata wuhwanye na we mw isi, ar’ umuntu atunganye w’umugororotsi, anyubaha, akitandukanya n’ikibi?" 
Job1:9 Maze Satani yishura Uhoraho, ati Mbeg’ ugira ngo Yobu yubahira Imana ubusa?" 
Job1:10 Ntiwamuzitiriye uruzitiro rumukikije, bo n’inzu yiwe, n’ivy’ atunze vyose? Wahezagiye igikorwa c’amaboko yiwe, kand’ itunga ryiwe ryagwiriye mu gihugu." 
Job1:11 Ariko pfa gutuma ukuboko kwawe, wubike ivy’ afise vyose, urābe kw atazokurogotako imbonankubone." 
Job1:12 Uhoraho yishura Satani, at’ Eh’ ivy’ afise vyose biri mu kuboko kwawe; ariko we ku mutumba wiwe ntuz’ umukoreko. Nuko Satani aca arasohoka, ava imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Job1:13 Maz’ umusi ur’ izina, abahungu n’abakobga ba Yobu bāriko barasangira, banywera vino mu nzu ya mukuru wabo," 
Job1:14 haza imbitsi kuri Yobu, it’ Inka zariko zirarima, n’indogoba zarisha i ruhande yazo;" 
Job1:15 maz’ Abasabeya barazinyaze, barazitwaye: mbere n’abungere babaririkishije inkota; ni jewe jenyene ndokotse wo kuza kubikubikira." 
Job1:16 Akibivuga, haza uwundi na we, at’ Umuriro w’Imana watibutse uva mw ijuru, uyigiza intama n’abungere, urabimara; ni jewe jenyene ndokotse wo kuza kubikubikira." 
Job1:17 Akibivuga, haza uwundi na we, at’ Abakaludaya bigize imice itatu, banyaze ingamiya, barazitwaye: mbere n’abungere babaririkishije inkota; ni jewe jenyene ndokotse wo kuza kubikubikira." 
Job1:18 Akibivuga, haza uwundi na we, at’ Abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe bāriko barasangira banywera vino mu nzu ya mukuru wabo," 
Job1:19 nuko haza umuyaga w’ igihuhuta uturutse mu bugaragwa, uhitana imfuruka zine z’inzu; maz’ isidukira kur’ abo bahungu, barapfa; ni jewe jenyene ndokotse wo kuza kubikubikira." 
Job1:20 Maze Yobu ava hasi, yitantamurirak’ umutamana wiwe yimosha inkomvorera, yikubita hasi, arasenga," 
Job1:21 ati Navuye mu nda ya mama nambaye ubusa, kandi nzosubira mu nda y’isi ata co nambaye. Uhoraho ni we yagavye, kand’ Uhoraho ni we agaburuje: izina ry’Uhoraho ni rishemagizwe." 
Job1:22 Mur’ ivyo vyose Yobu ntiyakoze icaha, canke ngw aherereze amafuti ku Mana." 
Job2:1 Uwundi musi abana b’Imana baje bashengereye Uhoraho, na Satani azanana na bo gushengerera Uhoraho." 
Job2:2 Uhoraho abaza Satani, at’ Uvuye hehe? Satani yishura Uhoraho, ati Mvuye gukwiragira mw isi no kuyigendagendamwo." 
Job2:3 Uhoraho abaza Satani, ati Mbega witegereje umusavyi wanje Yobu, yukw ata wuhwanye na we mw isi, ar’ umuntu atunganye w’umugororotsi, anyubaha, akitandukanya n’ikibi? Erega yakomeje ukugororoka kwiwe gushitsa n’ubu, naho wanteye kumugeseza ata co ndamuhōye." 
Job2:4 Maze Satani yishura Uhoraho, at’ Amagara akābga ayandi! Mber’ ivy’ umuntu atunze vyose yobitanga ku magara yiwe." 
Job2:5 Ariko pfa gutuma ukuboko kwawe, utere amagufa yiwe n’umubiri wiwe, urābe kw atazokurogotako imbonankubone." 
Job2:6 Uhoraho yishura Satani, at’ Eh’ ari mu kuboko kwawe; kimwe gusa, uzigurize ubugingo bgiwe." 
Job2:7 Nuko Satani aca arasohoka, ava imbere y’Uhoraho, atēza Yobu ibihute bikomeye uhēreye mu bgōro bg’ikirenge ugashitsa mu gitwariro." 
Job2:8 Nuko yābīra urujo rwo kwiyagarisha; araheza yicara ku gikuburiro c’umunyota. 
Job2:9 Maz’ umugore wiwe aramubaza, ati Mbega n’ubu uracakomeje kwa kugororoka kwawe? Tuka Imana, upfe uveho." 
Job2:10 Arikw aramwishura, at’ Uvuze nk’umwe wo mu bagore b’ibipfapfa. Mbega none twohabga ivyiza bisa mu biganza vy’Imana, tukanka kwākīra n’ibibi na vyo? Mur’ ivyo vyose Yobu ntiyakoresheje icaha akanwa kiwe." 
Job2:11 Nukw abakunzi ba Yobu batatu bumvise ivyo vyago vyose vyamuteye, baraza, umuntu wese muri bo ava i we: Elifazi w’i Temani, na Biludadi w’i Shuhi, na Zofari w’i Nayama; baragana indagano kuja kumugarukirako no kumugandaza." 
Job2:12 Bunamuye amaso bakiri kure ntibaruha bamumenya, baca baraturika bararira; umuntu wese muri bo yitantamurirak’ umutamana wiwe, basūrira umukungugu hejuru y’ imitwe yabo." 
Job2:13 Maze bicarana na we hasi, bamara imisi ndwi ku murango no mw ijoro; ntihāgira ūmubgira ijambo, kubgo kubona umubabaro wiwe kw ari mwinshi cane." 
Job3:1 Hanyuma y’ivyo Yobu yanzika kuvuga, avuma umusi wo kuvuka kwiwe." 
Job3:2 Nuko Yobu aravuga," 
Job3:3 at’ Umusi navukiyeko urakazimangana, Bo na rya joro ryavuzwemwo, ng’ Umwana w’umuhungu atwawe inda!" 
Job3:4 Uwo musi uragacura umwiza; Imana yoye kuwitegereza ir’ iyo hejuru, Kandi n’umuco woye kuwākira." 
Job3:5 Umwiza n’igitūtu c’urupfu biwugire uwavyo, Igicu kiwubarareko: Ivyīrīsha ubgīrakabiri vyose biwutere ubgoba." 
Job3:6 Iryo joro, umwiza w’umuzitanya uricakire: Ntirikanezeranwe n’imisi y’ umwaka; Ntirigaharūrwe mu gitigiri c’amezi." 
Job3:7 Mber’ iryo joro rirakaba ingumba; Ntirikabonekemwo ijwi ry’ umunezero. 
Job3:8 Abazi kuvuma imisi ni barivume, Ni bo bar’ uburyo bgo kuvyutsa Lewiyatani." 
Job3:9 Inyenyeri zo mu gahuru karyo ziragacura umwiza: Ryitege umuco, riwubure, Kandi ntirikabone ugutambika kw’umutwenzi:" 
Job3:10 Kuko ritūgaye inda ya mama, Ngo rihishe amaso yanje umubabaro." 
Job3:11 N’iki catumye ntāpfuye nkiri mu nda? N’iki catumye impwemu zanje zitāheze nkiyivamwo? 
Job3:12 N’iki catumye ibibero binkikira, Canke ngahabga amabere, nkayonka?" 
Job3:13 Iyaba ari ko vyagenze, ubu mba ndyamye nkaba amahoro, Mba nsinziriye; ni ho mba nduhutse." 
Job3:14 Mba ndi kumwe n’abami n’ abajanama bo mw isi, Biyubakiye ahār’ imisaka;" 
Job3:15 Canke mba ndi kumwe n’ abaganwa bāri bafise izahabu, Bakuzuza amazu yabo ifeza;" 
Job3:16 Iyo mba narabaye nk’inda ikorotse igahishwa, simba narabayeho; Canke nk’inzoya zitigeze zibona umuco." 
Job3:17 Iyo ni ho abanyakibi barekera kugorana; Iyo ni ho abārushe baruhukira. 
Job3:18 Iyo ni ho imbohe zībēra amahoro zose hamwe; Ntiziba zicumva ijwi ry’ūbakoresha abahindagiza. 
Job3:19 Uworoshe n’ūhambaye ni ho bari; Umushumba ahafitiye umwidegemvyo kuri shebuja. 
Job3:20 N’iki gituma umunyamubabaro ahabga kubona umuco, N’ūfise akabonge mu mutima agahabga ubugingo?" 
Job3:21 Bifuza urupfu, ntiruze: Barwimba kurusha abimba izahabu zānyegejwe;" 
Job3:22 Iyo barushe bakabona imva Birabahimbara cane, bakanezerwa." 
Job3:23 Mbeg’ umuntu ayobewe inzira, Imana ikamutangatanga, N’iki gituma ahabga kubona umuco?" 
Job3:24 Kuko kuniha kwanje kumbereye ivyo kurya, Kand’ amaborogo yanje asukwa nk’amazi." 
Job3:25 Kukw ico natinya ari co canshitseko, Kand’ icantera ubgoba ari co canjeko." 
Job3:26 Simmerewe neza, simfise amahoro, simfise uburuhukiro; Ariko haza ivyago gusa." 
Job4:1 Maze Elifazi w’i Temani aramubarira," 
Job4:2 ati Mbeg’ uwogerageza kugira ico akubarira, vyokubabaza? Ariko se har’ uwokwama afumbije?" 
Job4:3 Rāba ingene wahora wigisha benshi, Wakomeza amaboko areganutse." 
Job4:4 Amajambo yawe yaramira uwarikw aratemba, Kandi wagumisha amavi aregarega." 
Job4:5 Ariko none ni wewe bishitseko, kand’ urihebuye; Biraguteye, uhagarika umutima." 
Job4:6 Mbeg’ ivyizigiro vyawe s’uko wubaha Imana? Kand’ inzira zawe zigororotse si zo wishimira? 
Job4:7 Ibuka ndakwinginze, ni nde yigeze kugesera atācumuye? Canke har’ ah’ abagororotsi bigeze kurandurwa?" 
Job4:8 Nk’uko ngenda mbibona, abarima ibigabitanyo, Bakabiba amagorwa, ni vyo bazokwimbura." 
Job4:9 Bagesezwa n’impwemu z’ Imana, Bakamarwa n’igihuhuta c’ uburake bgayo." 
Job4:10 Kwivuga kw’intambge, n’ijwi ry’intambge y’inkazi birahezwa, N’imikāka y’imigunza y’intambge iravunagurwa." 
Job4:11 Intambge nah’ ikomeye yicwa no kubura ico ifata, Kand’ ibibgana vy’intambge birasābagira." 
Job4:12 Nuko, har’ ijambo ryanshitseko mu mpisho, Maz’ ugutwi kwanje kwumva utwongoshwa twaryo." 
Job4:13 Nciyumvira ivyiyumviro bivuye mw iravūta ryo mw ijoro, Igihe itiro ryinshi ritwaye abantu," 
Job4:14 Mfatwa n’ubgoba n’agatengo, Bituma amagufa yanje yose atetemera." 
Job4:15 Maz’ impwemu zihita imbere yanje, Ubgoya bgo ku mubiri wanje buramerereza." 
Job4:16 Haca haboneka ikintu gihagaze, ariko sinashobora kwihweza uko casa; Hār’ ishusho imbere y’amaso yanje: Habah’ agacerere, maze numva ijwi rivuga," 
Job4:17 Ngo Mbeg’ umuntu buntu yorusha Imana kugororoka? Mbeg’ umuntu yorusha Umuremyi wiwe gutungana? 
Job4:18 Rāba kw itizigira abasavyi bayo, N’abamarayika bayo kw ibabonakw amafuti," 
Job4:19 None ntivyorushiriza ku baba mu nzu z’ibumba, Amatanguriro yazo akaba mu mukungugu, Bahonyoreka nk’inyenzi?" 
Job4:20 Hagati y’igihe c’igitondo n’ umugoroba baravunagurwa: Bapfa akagīrīre, ntihagire ūbishirak’ umutima." 
Job4:21 Mbeg’ umugozi w’ihema ryabo ntiwabakūwemwo? Bapfa, kand’ ata bgenge." 
Job5:1 Enda takamba: mbega har’ ūzokwishura? Ni nde wo mu bera wotabaza? 
Job5:2 Ereg’ igipfu ni co cicwa n’ umwikomo, N’imburabgenge ni yo yicwa n’ishari." 
Job5:3 Ubganje nabonye igipfu kiriko kirashōra imizi, Ubgo nyene mvuma ahantu kiba." 
Job5:4 Abana biwe bari kure y’ ubuhungiro; Bahonyorerwa mw irembo, Ata wo kubakiza." 
Job5:5 Ivyimburwa vyabo bimarwa n’abashonje, Mbere bajana n’ibimera mu mahwa, Kand’ abafise inyota bifuza ibintu vyabo." 
Job5:6 Kukw amarushwa atava mu mukungugu, Kandi n’ivyago bitamera biva mw ivu." 
Job5:7 Arik’ umuntu avukira amagorwa, Nk’ukw amasase atabura gutarukira mu kirēre." 
Job5:8 Arikw iyaba jewe, mba narambambiye Imana, Iryo mfise mba naryitwaye ku Mana;" 
Job5:9 Ni yo ikora ibihambaye bidaserangurwa, N’ibitangaza bidaharūrika;" 
Job5:10 Ni yo irekurira imvura kw isi, Igakwiza amazi mu ndimiro;" 
Job5:11 Ni yo ishira hejuru abaciye bugufi, N’abari mu mubabaro ibashira mu mahoro." 
Job5:12 Yica imigabo y’ingunge, Kugira ngw amaboko yazo ntāgire ingene yoyishitsa." 
Job5:13 Itegesha abanyabgenge ubugunge bgabo ubgabo, Kand’ inama z’ibidadi irazisāvya." 
Job5:14 Bahūra n’umwiza ari ku murango, Bakabakaba no mu mashōka nko mw ijoro." 
Job5:15 Arikw ikiza umugorwa inkota yo mu kanwa kabo, Mber’ imukiza ukuboko kw’ umunyenkomezi." 
Job5:16 Uko ni k’umworo agira ivyizigiro, Abagabitanya bakazibga akanwa." 
Job5:17 Hahirwa umuntu Imana ihana: Nuko rero ntukagaye igikangiro c’Ūshobora vyose. 
Job5:18 Kukw ari yo ikomeretsa, kand’ ikaba ari yo isomōra; Irakubita, kand’ amaboko yayo akaba ari yo atīmbūra." 
Job5:19 Izokurokora mu vyago bitandatu, Mbere no mu vyago ndwi nta kibi kizogukorako." 
Job5:20 Muri kigoyi izogukiza urupfu, No mu ntambara igukize ubushobozi bg’inkota." 
Job5:21 Uzohishwa intega y’ururimi; Kandi ntuzotinya ubugesera buje. 
Job5:22 Ubugesera n’amapfa uzobitwenga; Kandi ntuzotinya ibikōko vyo mw isi. 
Job5:23 Kuk’ uzosezerana isezerano n’ amabuye yo mu gasozi; Kand’ ibikōko vyo mu gasozi bizokwuzura nawe. 
Job5:24 Kand’ uzomenya yukw ihema ryawe rir’ amahoro: Uzogendura urugo rw’imikuku yawe, usange ata kibuze." 
Job5:25 Kand’ uzomenya yuk’ uruvyaro rwawe ruzogwira, N’abagukomokako bakaba nk’ ivyatsi vyo ku misozi." 
Job5:26 Uzoja mu mva wīsāziye neza, Nk’ikinyankinda bazana igihe kigeze." 
Job5:27 Rāba, ivyo ni vyo twagenzuye, dusanga ari ko biri: Nawe n’uvyumve, wīkūriremw’ ivyokugirira ikimazi." 
Job6:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job6:2 at’ Iyaba umwikomo wanje wāgerwa, N’ivyago vyanje bigashirwa ku munzane!" 
Job6:3 Kuko vyari kuremēra kurusha umusenyi wo ku kiyaga: Ni co catumye nihutira kuvuga. 
Job6:4 Ereg’ imyampi y’Ūshobora vyose yantobekeranije, Ubugingo bganje bganyoye ubumara bgayo: Ibiteye ubgoba vy’Imana bitonze urugamba kundwanya." 
Job6:5 Mbeg’ indogoba y’inyeshamba yokwivuga iri n’ubgatsi? Cank’ inka yokwābira iri n’ ico irisha? 
Job6:6 Mbeg’ ikitaryoshe coribga kitarimw’ umunyu? Canke se, mu murenda w’irigi harimw’ icanga?" 
Job6:7 Umutima wanje wanse kubikorako; Bimmereye nk’ivyo kurya biteye iseseme. 
Job6:8 Icompa nkaronka ico nsaba, Imana ikampa ico nifuza!" 
Job6:9 Imana nyene ikemera kumfyonyora, Igatuma ukuboko kwayo igacacura imigozi inziritse!" 
Job6:10 Aho ho ni ho noba ndonse ikinduhura, Mbere nokwiteraguzwa n’umunezero naho nagize uburibge budatenzura: Kuko ntāhakanye amajambo y’Uwera." 
Job6:11 Mbeg’ inkomezi zanje n’inki ndorereye? Kand’ iherezo ryanje n’iriki nihanganira? 
Job6:12 Non’ inkomezi zanje ni nk’iz’ amabuye? Canke se umubiri wanje ni nk’umuringa? 
Job6:13 Mbega sinsigaye ntafise ikintabara, Ivy’ ugukira kwanje bikajanwa kure yanje?" 
Job6:14 Ūdendebukiwe bikwiye kw atera akagongwe abakunzi biwe, Naho yoba aretse kwubaha Ūshobora vyose." 
Job6:15 Bagenzi banje babaye ba rusukabatungu nko mu mburamazi, Babaye nk’isūri yo mu mburamazi itemba igashira," 
Job6:16 Iciwe iyondoyondo n’urubura, Shelegi ikīhishamwo;" 
Job6:17 Haje agasusuruko, ikazimangana, Ubushuhe bgaza, igakamirikirira ahantu hayo." 
Job6:18 Igugu ry’abari ku rugendo ryājana inkōkoro yaho rirakevya; Badūga mu bugaragwa, bagwayo." 
Job6:19 Igugu ry’ab’ i Tema ryari ribīteze, Ingenzi z’i Sheba zari zibarorereye;" 
Job6:20 Bamāramāzwa n’uko bāri bavyizigiye, Bashitseyo baratētērwa." 
Job6:21 Noneho rero nta co mumaze; Mubonye ibiteye ubgoba, muratinya." 
Job6:22 Mbega har’ aho nigeze kuvuga, nti Ni mugire ico mumpa? Canke nti Ni muntangire impongano mu bintu vyanyu?" 
Job6:23 Canke nti Ni mundokore munkūre mu maboko y’umwansi? Canke nti Ni muncungure munkūre mu maboko y’ abampahaza? 
Job6:24 Ni munyigishe, nanje ni ho ndibuhore: Mummenyeshe ivyo nafuditse ivy’ ari vyo." 
Job6:25 Ereg’ amajambo y’ukuri agira ububasha! Arikw ibihāri vyanyu bimaze iki? 
Job6:26 Mbega muragomba guhinyura amajambo, Ayo uwihevye avuga amera nk’ibitwawe n’umuyaga?" 
Job6:27 Erega mwonapfindira impfuvyi, N’umukunzi wanyu mwomugura." 
Job6:28 Enda kunda munyitegereze: N’ukuri sinobesha mu maso yanyu. 
Job6:29 Ni mwirimbure, ndabinginze, hoye kuba ibifutamye; Mbere ni mwirimbure ukundi gusha, ivyanje n’ibigororotse." 
Job6:30 Mbeg’ ururimi rwanje ruri n’ibifutamye? Akanwa kanje ntikazi gutandukanya ikibi? 
Job7:1 Mbeg’ umuntu akiri mw isi ntaba ari mu ntambara? N’imisi yiwe si nk’iy’ umucangero? 
Job7:2 Nk’uk’ umugurano yifuza igitūtu, N’umucangero akarereka ingero yiwe," 
Job7:3 Ni ko nahawe umugabane w’ amezi y’umwunamo, Kandi nashingiwe amajoro y’umuruho." 
Job7:4 Iyo ndyamye, ndavuga, Nti Buca ryari ngo mvyuke? Ndāra ndagaragurika bukarinda buca." 
Job7:5 Umubiri wanje utwikiriwe n’inyo, utaramyekw ivyomeke vy’umukungugu; Urukoba rwanje ruratarurira, rugasaduka." 
Job7:6 Imisi yanje irihuta kuruta ico umujishi w’impuzu ajishisha, Ishira ata vyizigiro." 
Job7:7 Ibuka se k’ubugingo bganje ar’ umuyaga gusa: Ijisho ryanje ntirigisubira kubona ivyiza ukundi. 
Job7:8 Ijisho ry’uwambona ntirigisubira kundāba; Amaso yawe uzoyanshirako, ariko nzoba ntakiriho." 
Job7:9 Nk’ukw igicu cēyūka kigakamangana, Ni ko n’ūmanuka aja mu kuzimu atazosubira kudūga ukundi." 
Job7:10 Ntazogaruka mu nzu yiwe ukundi, Kand’ aho yaba ntihazoba hakimwibuka ukundi."
