Job7:11 Ni co gitumye ntiyumanganya; Ngira mvuge kubg’ umubabaro w’umutima wanje; Ndiganyira kubg’ akabonge ko mu mushaha wanje. 
Job7:12 Mbega nd’ ikiyaga? Canke se nd’ igikōko co mu kiyaga, K’unshinze abarinzi?" 
Job7:13 Iyo mvuze, nt’ Uburiri bganje buzommara umubabaro, Ikirago canje kizonyorohereza amaganya;" 
Job7:14 Na ho nyene unkangisha inzozi, Ukanca ivutu mu vyo neretswe;" 
Job7:15 Bigatuma umutima wanje uhitamwo gupfuma nnigwa, Mpisemw’ urupfu kuruta kugumana aya magufa yanje." 
Job7:16 Kubaho kwanje ndakuzinutswe; singomba kuramba: Enda se n’umpumekere, kukw imisi yanje ata co imaze." 
Job7:17 Umuntu n’iki, ah’ umukuza, Ukamushirak’ umutima," 
Job7:18 Ukamugendera uko bukeye, Ukāma umugerageza na ntaryo?" 
Job7:19 Uzogeza ryari kutankūrakw ijisho, Ng’ umpumekere, mmire amate?" 
Job7:20 Namba narakoze icaha, wewe nagutwaye iki ga Ngenzuzi y’abantu? N’iki gituma unshinga nk’ uruti rw’icumu utīmba, Bigatuma nirambirwa?" 
Job7:21 Kandi n’iki gituma utamparira igicumuro canje, ng’ unkūrek’ ukugabitanya kwanje? Kuko vuba ngiye kuryama mu mukungugu, Nawe uzondonderana umwete, ariko nzoba ntakiriho." 
Job8:1 Maze Biludadi w’i Shuhi aramwishura," 
Job8:2 at’ Uzogeza ryari kuvuga ben’ ivyo? Kand’ amajambo yo mu kanwa kawe azogeza ryari kuba nk’umuyaga w’igihuhuta? 
Job8:3 Mbeg’ Imana iragoreka urubanza? Īshobora vyose irafutamika izibereye? 
Job8:4 Namb’ abana bawe bāyicumuyeko, Ibatanze mu maboko y’ibibi vyabo." 
Job8:5 Ariko weho, ni waronderana Imana umwete, Ukinginga Īshobora vyose," 
Job8:6 Ni watungana ukagororoka, N’ukuri ntiyobura kwikangurira kugutabara, No gutuma ikibanza c’ubugororotsi bgawe kiroranirwa." 
Job8:7 Kandi nah’ itangura ryawe ryari ritoya, Arikw amaherezo yawe wokwunguka cane." 
Job8:8 Ndakwinginze, baza abo hambere, Shira umutima ku vyo ba sogokuruza bābaririkije:" 
Job8:9 Kuko tweho tur’ ab’ ejo gusa, ata co tuzi, Kand’ imisi tumara mw isi ni nk’igitūtu gusa." 
Job8:10 Mbeg’ abo ntibokwigisha, bakakwīgānira, Bakavuga amajambo bakūye mu mitima yabo?" 
Job8:11 Mbeg’ umubere wokura ahatagira igitēmēka? Cank’ urukangaga rwomera ahatagira amazi? 
Job8:12 Ruyabuze, naho rwoba rukiri rubisi, rudaciwe, Rutanga ibindi vyatsi vyose kwuma." 
Job8:13 Ni kw inzira z’abibagira Imana bose zimera; Kand’ ivyizigiro vy’ūtubaha Imana bizoshira: 
Job8:14 Ukwishima kwiwe kuzosāba, Ivyizigiro vyiwe bimeze nk’ inzu y’igitangurirwa." 
Job8:15 Yokwegamira inzu yiwe, ariko na yo ntiyohagarara: Yoyibangiriza, ntigumeho." 
Job8:16 Atotahara ari ku zuba, Amashami yiwe agasārira mu ndimiro yiwe yose." 
Job8:17 Imizi yiwe isobekerana mu gihongo, Ayishōra i wabo w’amabuye." 
Job8:18 Ni yarandurwa aho yamye, Hazoca hamwihakana, hati Sinigeze kukubona." 
Job8:19 Rāba, uwo ni wo munezero ingeso ziwe zimuhaye! Kandi mw ivu yavuyemwo hazoca hamera abandi." 
Job8:20 Ereg’ Imana ntizota umuntu atācumuye, Kandi ntizoramira inkozi z’ ibibi." 
Job8:21 Akanwa kawe izosubira kukuzuza ibitwengatwenga, N’iminwa yawe izoyuzuza impundu." 
Job8:22 Abakwanka bazokwambikwa isoni, Kand’ ihema ry’inkozi z’ibibi ntirizoba rikibaho ukundi." 
Job9:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job9:2 ati N’ivy’ ukuri nzi kw ari ko biri: Arik’ umuntu yoshobora ate kuba umugororotsi imbere y’Imana? 
Job9:3 Igomvye kumubūranya Ntiyobona iryo kuyishura, haba na rimwe mu gihumbi." 
Job9:4 N’inyabgenge mu mutima, n’inyabushobozi mu nkomezi: Ni nde yayikomantajek’ umutima, akaroranirwa?" 
Job9:5 Yimura ibisozi ntibibimenye, Ikavyubikana uburake bgayo." 
Job9:6 Itigitisha isi, igatirimuka ahantu hayo, Inkingi zayo zikanyiganyiga." 
Job9:7 Ibuza izuba ntirirase, N’inyenyeri ikazitwikira." 
Job9:8 Igaranzura amajuru iri yonyene, Ikagendera ku mikuba y’ ikiyaga." 
Job9:9 Irema inyenyeri zitwa Arukuturo na Oriyoni na Kilimiya, N’ibirēre vy’i bumanuko." 
Job9:10 Ni yo ikora ibihambaye bidaserangurika, Mbere n’ibitangaza bitoharūrika." 
Job9:11 Rāba inca i ruhande sindayibone, Ikīrēngānira sindayimenye." 
Job9:12 Isūmira ico iteye: ni nde yoyikimiranya? Ni nde yoyibaza, at’ Ivyo ugira n’ibiki?" 
Job9:13 Imana ntizokūrah’ uburake bgayo: Ingabo za Bgibone zubama musi yayo. 
Job9:14 None jewe noshobora nte kuyishura, No kuronka amajambo yo kuyibūranya?" 
Job9:15 Naho noba mfise urubanza sinoyishura, Noyisaba imbabazi, kukw ari yo Mucamanza wanje." 
Job9:16 Naho notakamba, ikitaba, Sinokwizigira ko yokwumviriza ivyanje." 
Job9:17 Kukw imvunaguza igihuhuta, Ikanyongeranyakw ibikomere impōye ubusa." 
Job9:18 Ntinkundira guhumeka, Arikw inyuzuza umubabaro." 
Job9:19 Namba tuvuga inkomezi z’ umunyenkomezi, rāba na yo ni yo! Namba tuvuga ivyo kubūrana, ni nde yoyihamagaza?" 
Job9:20 Naho noba mfise urubanza, akanwa kanje nyene ni ko kontsindisha: Naho noba ntunganye, konyagiriza ubugorame." 
Job9:21 Na none ndatunganye! Sincibabaye; Ngaye ukubaho kwanje. 
Job9:22 Vyose ni co kimwe: ni co gituma mvuga, Nt’ Irandurana ūtunganye n’ umunyakibi." 
Job9:23 Icago ni caduka kikica abantu, Ipfa kwitwengera ivyago vy’ abatācumuye." 
Job9:24 Isi itanzwe mu maboko y’ inkozi z’ibibi; Ikinga mu maso h’abacamanza b’isi; Namb’ atari yo, none yoba nde se?" 
Job9:25 Imisi yo kubaho kwanje irihuta kurusha impayamaguru: Irahunga, ariko nta ciza ibona." 
Job9:26 Iridunya nk’ibitebo vy’inkorogoto bisoza, Nk’inkukuma yirasa gufata ico ihīga." 
Job9:27 Iyo mvuze, nti Hinge nirengagize amaganya yanje, Nēyūre mu maso hanje, hace:" 
Job9:28 Na ho nyene nca ntinya imibabaro yanje yose, Nkamenya yuk’ utazoncira urw’ abatācumuye." 
Job9:29 Nzotsindwa: None rero n’iki gituma ntamishwa n’ubusa? 
Job9:30 Naho nokwiyuhagiza shelegi, Ngakaraba isabuni;" 
Job9:31 Na ho nyene womvumbagaza mu muvo, Impuzu zanje zikanzinukwa." 
Job9:32 Ereg’ Imana s’umuntu nkanje, ngo ndayishure, Ngo tujane tuje kubūrana." 
Job9:33 Nta muhūza ariho hagati yacu Wo kudushirakw amaboko twempi ngo twuzure. 
Job9:34 Noneho n’inkūrekw inkoni yayo, Igitinyiro cayo coye kuntera ubgoba." 
Job9:35 Ni ho novuga ndayishize ubgoba; Kuko mu mutima wanje uko ndi atari ko mboneka. 
Job10:1 Umutima wanje urambiwe n’ukubaho; Ngira nziburure amajojwa yanje, Mvugishwe n’akabonge ko mu mutima wanje." 
Job10:2 Mbgire Imana, nti Ntuntsindishe: N’ummenyeshe igituma umbūranya." 
Job10:3 Mbeg’ ubona ari vyiza wewe guhahaza, Ugakēngēra igikorwa c’amaboko yawe, Ukākishiriza umuco imigabo y’abanyakibi?" 
Job10:4 Mbeg’ ufise amaso y’umubiri? Canke se urāba nk’ukw abantu barāba? 
Job10:5 Ah’ imisi yawe ingana n’iy’ umuntu? Canke se imyaka yawe ihwanye n’imisi y’umuntu? 
Job10:6 Bituma ubaririkiriza ibigabitanyo vyanje, Ugasesangura icaha canje," 
Job10:7 Kand’ uzi ko ntarikw igicumuro, Kw ata woshobora kundokora ngw ankūre mu kuboko kwawe?" 
Job10:8 Intoke zawe ni zo zambumvye, Ziranteranya uko ndi wese: yamara non’ uranyishe." 
Job10:9 Ibuka, ndakwinginze, yuko wambumvye nk’ibumba: None se ugira unsubize mu mukungugu?" 
Job10:10 Mbega ntiwansutse nk’amata, Ukamvuza nk’urubu?" 
Job10:11 Wanyambitse urukoba n’ inyama, Undandikanisha amagufa n’ imitsi." 
Job10:12 Wampaye ubugingo, ungirira imbabazi; Kungendera kwawe ni kwo kwanzigamiye umutima." 
Job10:13 Yamara rero wamye uhishije ibindi mu mutima wawe, Kand’ ivyo wagabiye nzi kw ar’ ibi:" 
Job10:14 Iyo nkoze icaha unshinga ijisho, Kandi ntuzomparira ivyo nagabitanije." 
Job10:15 Namba narakoze ibibi, mbonye ibara; Kandi namba nd’ umugororotsi, na ho nyene sinkivyutsa umutwe: Nuzuyemw’ ibitētērwa, nkitegereza umubabaro wanje." 
Job10:16 Kandi n’iyo novyutsa umutwe, woca umpīga nk’intambge; Maz’ ukongera kunyiyereka ur’ akūmiza." 
Job10:17 Usubira kuzana ivyabona vyawe kunyagiriza ukundi gusha; Ukangwizak’ ubushangashirwe bgawe; Ibintera binyungikanako. 
Job10:18 None se n’iki catumye unkūra mu nda ya mama? Mba naracikanye, ntihagire ūnkubita ijisho." 
Job10:19 Mba narabaye nk’ūtigeze kubaho, Bakanterurira mu mva nkiva mu nda ya mama." 
Job10:20 Mbeg’ imisi yanje si mike? Ntabara undeke, Umpumekere, kugira ngo nduhuke gatoya," 
Job10:21 Ntaraja aho ntazogaruka ukundi, Mu gihugu c’umwiza n’ic’ igitūtu c’urupfu," 
Job10:22 Igihugu c’umwiza w’umuzitanya, nk’uk’ umuzimagiza nyene umeze, Ic’ igitūtu c’urupfu, ahatagira umutekano, Ah’ umuco umeze nk’umwiza." 
Job11:1 Maze Zofari w’i Nayama arishura," 
Job11:2 ati Mbeg’ isinzi ry’amajambo ntirikwiye kwishurwa? Ugira ng’umuntu yotsindanishirizwa n’ukw ar’ imvuzi? 
Job11:3 Canke kwihayagiza kwawe gukwiye guhoza abantu? Iy’ utukana nta wuriho yotuma ugira n’udusoni? 
Job11:4 Kuk’ uvuga, ng’ Uk’ uri kwose uragororotse, Kandi ngo Nawe uratunganye mu nyonga zayo." 
Job11:5 Arikw icompa Imana ikavuga, Igateranura akanwa ikakwishura:" 
Job11:6 Ikakwereka amabanga y’ ubgenge, Uko bumeze kw ar’ igitangaza: Ni ho womenya yukw Imana itakugiriye ibihwanye n’ ibigabitanyo vyawe." 
Job11:7 Mbega woshobora kugenzura ibidashikīrwa vy’Imana? Woshobora kumenya Īshobora vyose ukanonosora? 
Job11:8 Biri hejuru nk’ijuru; wogira ute? Bir’ i bgina kuruta i kuzimu; womenya iki? 
Job11:9 Urugero rwavyo rusumba isi uburebure, Rusumba ikiyaga ubgaguke." 
Job11:10 Iyo yiyiziye, igata abantu mu ngoyi, Igakoranya abo kuja mu rubanza, ni nde yoyibuza?" 
Job11:11 Kukw itayobewe abantu b’ imburakimazi, Ibona n’ibigabitanyo itarinze kuvyitegereza." 
Job11:12 Arik’ umuntu we, ubgenge bgiwe n’ubujuju: Mber’ avuka nk’inyana y’ indogoba y’inyeshamba." 
Job11:13 Ariko weho, ni watunganya umutima wawe, Ukaya amaboko imbere yayo;" 
Job11:14 Namba har’ ukugabitanya mu kuboko kwawe ugute kure, Kandi ntukundire ibitagororotse ko biba mu mahema yawe:" 
Job11:15 N’ukuri ni ho uzokwunamura amaso yawe ata gasembga ufise; Mber’ uzokomera, ntuzotinya." 
Job11:16 Kuk’ uzokwibagira umubabaro wawe, Uzowibuka nk’amazi yatemvye;" 
Job11:17 Kand’ ubugingo bgawe buzokwaka kurusha umurango w’amashōka; Naho hoba umwiza, hazomera nk’umuco wo mu gatondo‐tondo." 
Job11:18 Kand’ uzoba amahoro, kuko harih’ ivyizigiro; Mber’ uzokenguza, wiruhukire ata nkomanzi." 
Job11:19 Kand’ uzokwiryamira, ntihagire ūgutera ubgoba; Mbere benshi bazogusaba ng’ ubatonere." 
Job11:20 Arikw amaso y’abanyakibi azokoboka, Ntibazobona aho guhungira; Kand’ ivyifuzo vyabo n’ugupfa." 
Job12:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job12:2 ati N’ukuri umenga ni mwebge bantu muriho mwenyene, Kandi yuk’ umenga ubgenge buzojana namwe!" 
Job12:3 Erega nanje nzi ubgenge, si mwebge gusa, ntimubundusha; Mbega ben’ ivyo har’ ūtabizi?" 
Job12:4 Mpindutse nk’agatwengo kuri bagenzi banje: Nahora ntabaza Imana, ikantabara, Nd’ umugororotsi, nd’ umuntu atunganye, none mpindutse agatwengo." 
Job12:5 Mu mutima w’uwihiririwe habamwo gukēngēra abagowe; Ūnyereye wese aratwengwa. 
Job12:6 Ingo z’abambuzi zigira amahirwe, N’abavyogoroza Imana baba amahoro; Inkomezi zabo ni zo bagize imana yabo." 
Job12:7 Enda baza ibikōko, bizokwigisha; N’inyoni zo mu kirēre, zizokubarira:" 
Job12:8 Cank’ uvugane n’isi, izokwigisha; N’amafi yo mu kiyaga azobikudondera." 
Job12:9 N’ikihe mur’ ivyo vyose kitomenya yuk’ ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho ari kwo kwabikoze? 
Job12:10 Ni we afise mu kuboko kwiwe ubugingo bg’ikintu cose kizima, N’impwemu z’ababaho bose." 
Job12:11 Mbeg’ ugutwi si kwo gutondanuza amajambo, Nk’ukw akanwa kumviriza ivyo kurya?" 
Job12:12 Ubgenge bufiswe n’abatāma, Kand’ ukumenya gufiswe n’ abamaze igihe kirekire." 
Job12:13 Arikw iyo yo ni yo ifise ubgenge n’inkomezi; Ni yo ifise inama no kumenya. 
Job12:14 Rāba, irasambura, ntihasubire kwubakika; Yugarana umuntu, ntihashobore kwuguruka." 
Job12:15 Rāba, yimana amazi, agakama; Vyongeye yayarekura, akūbika isi." 
Job12:16 Ni yo ifise inkomezi n’ubgenge bushitse; Ūgunga n’ūgungwa n’abayo. 
Job12:17 Ishorera abajanama ar’ inyagano, N’abacamanza ibahindura ibipfu." 
Job12:18 Ikenyurura inkindi z’abami, Ikabakenyeza imigozi." 
Job12:19 Ishorera abaherezi ar’ inyagano, Icurikiranya abakomeye." 
Job12:20 Abār’ imvuzi ibahindura ibiragi, Kand’ abashingantahe ibāka ubgenge bgabo." 
Job12:21 Isuka agakēngērwe ku bahambaye, Ikadohora umukanda w’abahizi." 
Job12:22 Iserura ibitamenyekana vyo mu mwiza, Kand’ igitūtu c’urupfu igishira ahabona." 
Job12:23 Igwiza amahanga, kand’ ikayarandura; Ishwiragiza amahanga, kand’ ikayagarukana." 
Job12:24 Abatware b’amoko yo mw isi ibāka ubgenge, Ibayerereza mu bugaragwa ahatagira inzira." 
Job12:25 Bakabakabira mu mwiza ahatagira umuco, Kand’ ibadandabagiranya nk’ imborerwa." 
Job13:1 Rāba, ijisho ryanje ryabonye ivyo vyose; Ugutwi kwanje kwaravyiyumviye, kurabitahura." 
Job13:2 Ivyo muzi nanje ndabizi: Ntimundusha. 
Job13:3 N’ukuri ndagomba kwibaririra Īshobora vyose, Kandi ndifuza kwībūranira ku Mana." 
Job13:4 Ariko mwebge mur’ abarementanya ibinyoma; Mwese mur’ abavūzi b’imburakimazi. 
Job13:5 Icompa mugacereza rwose! Mwobaye mugize ubgenge. 
Job13:6 Noneho ni mwumve urubanza rwanje, Kandi mutegere amatwi kubūrana kw’iminwa yanje." 
Job13:7 Mbeg’ Imana mwoyibūranira mugoreka amajambo, Kandi muyivugira ibinyoma?" 
Job13:8 Mbega muyitinya ku kigohe? Non’ Imana mwoyitsa? 
Job13:9 Aho vyoba vyiza ibaseranguye ikarāba? Canke mwoyihenda nk’uk’ umuntu ahenda uwundi? 
Job13:10 Ntizobura kubahana, Namba murobanura ku cubahiro mu mpisho." 
Job13:11 Mbeg’ icubahiro cayo nticobatera ubgoba, Igitinyiro cayo kikabasūmira?" 
Job13:12 Ya magambo yanyu akomeye ni nk’imigani y’iminyota, Inkinzo zanyu ni nk’inkinzo z’ibibumbano." 
Job13:13 Ni muhore, mumpumekere, mbone kuvuga, Bice aho bigomba." 
Job13:14 Ar’ ugupfa, mpfe, Ar’ uguheba amagara yanje, ndayahebe." 
Job13:15 Ehe rāba, agira anyice: nta co nkirorereye; Yamara nzokwiregura ingeso zanje imbere yayo." 
Job13:16 Ivyo na vyo bizombera agakiza, Kuk’ ūtubaha Imana atoseruka imbere yayo." 
Job13:17 Enda ni mugire umwete wo kwumva amajambo yanje; Ivyo ngira mvuge bishike mu matwi yanyu. 
Job13:18 Rāba mmaze gushinga urubanza rwanje: Ndazi ko nd’ umugororotsi. 
Job13:19 Ni nde yompāririza? Abayeho noca mpora ngahwera. 
Job13:20 Yamara Bgirukiro, ntunga ku bintu bibiri, Ni ho ntokwihisha mu nyonga zawe:" 
Job13:21 Geguza ukuboko kwawe kumveko, Kandi ntuntereshe ubgoba igitinyiro cawe ukundi." 
Job13:22 Ni ho wompamagara, nkakwitaba, Cank’ unyemerere mvuge, abe ari wewe unyishura." 
Job13:23 Ibigabitanyo vyanje n’ivyaha vyanje bingana bite? N’ummenyeshe igicumuro canje n’icaha canje. 
Job13:24 N’iki gituma umpisha mu nyonga hawe, Ukangira umwansi wawe?" 
Job13:25 Mbeg’ ikibabi bubabi gikubebga n’umuyaga, wogitera ubgoba? Wokwiruka inyuma y’ibishingwe vyumye?" 
Job13:26 Kuk’ unyanditsekw ibintu bimbereye umururazi, Kand’ ukansubizakw ibigabitanyo vyo mu busore bganje." 
Job13:27 Kand’ ibirenge vyanje ubishize mu mpatane z’ibiti, Ugenzura imigendere yanje yose; Ushingiye akarimbi ibirenge vyanje:" 
Job13:28 Naho mmeze nk’igiti kibongeye, Nk’impuzu yariwe n’inyenzi." 
Job14:1 Umuntu yavyawe n’umugore Amara imisi mike kand’ adundubiwe n’amagorwa. 
Job14:2 Ashurika bga shurwe, maz’ agacibga; Ahita nk’igitūtu, ntiyamaho." 
Job14:3 Mbega nawe, ūmeze artyo womukanurira ijisho, K’unshize mu rukinja?" 
Job14:4 Ni nde yoshobora gukūra ikintu gitunganye mu canduye? Erega nta wuriho n’umwe. 
Job14:5 Imisi yiwe ko yashinzwe, igitigiri c’amezi yiwe kikaba gifiswe nawe, Ukaba waramushingiye akarimbi adashobora kurēngāna;" 
Job14:6 Umukūrekw ijisho, abone kuruhuka, Anezererwe umusi wiwe nk’ umucangero agodotse." 
Job14:7 Kuko harih’ ivyizigiro vy’ igiti, iyo giciwe, yuko kizokwongera kunaga, Kand’ ibitontomya vyaco ko bitazobura." 
Job14:8 Nah’ umuzi waco usāzira mw ivu, N’igishitsi caco kigahera mu kuzimu," 
Job14:9 Arikw iyo cumvise amazi gica kinaga, Kigashamika nk’igiti kikiri gito." 
Job14:10 Arik’ umuntu we, arapfa, akīgīra maheriheri, Mber’ impwemu z’umuntu zirahera, non’ aba akiri hehe?" 
Job14:11 Nk’ukw amazi yo mu kiyaga akeha, N’umugezi ukagabanuka, ugakamuka;" 
Job14:12 Ni k’umuntu aryama, ntasubire kuvyuka: Gushitsa ah’ ijuru rizoba ritakiriho, ntibazokwigera bikangura, Canke ngo bavyutswe bave mw itiro ryabo." 
Job14:13 Icompa ukampisha i kuzimu, Ukandindira ahihishije, gushitsa ah’ uburake bgawe buzoshirira; Ukanshingira igihe, kand’ ukazonyibuka." 
Job14:14 Umuntu ni yapfa, mbeg’ azosubira kubaho? Nokwihanganiye imisi y’intambara yanje yose, Nkarorēra igihe canje co kurekurwa." 
Job14:15 Wompamagaye nkakwitaba; Wobaye wifuza igikorwa c’ amaboko yawe. 
Job14:16 Yamara non’ uharūra intambuko zanje: Mbega ntushinze ijisho icaha canje? 
Job14:17 Igicumuro canje gitekewe mw isaho irumanijwe n’ishashara, N’ibigabitanyo vyanje ubiboheye hamwe." 
Job14:18 Yamara n’ukuri umusozi uracika, ugaherengetera, N’igitandara kigakūrwa aho cari kiri;" 
Job14:19 Amazi agenda akorogoshora amabuye; Isūri itembana umukungugu wo kw isi: Ni ko nawe ukūrah’ ivyizigiro vy’umuntu. 
Job14:20 Umutsinda buheriheri, akagenda mazimayongo; Uhindura mu maso hiwe ukundi, ukamurungika." 
Job14:21 Abana biwe bahabga icubahiro, ntabimenye; Bacishwa bugufi, ntabice n’ ikanda." 
Job14:22 Arik’ uburibge bg’umubiri wiwe ubgiwe ni bgo yumva gusa, Umutima wiwe uniha uwo gupfa." 
Job15:1 Maze Elifazi w’i Temani arishura," 
Job15:2 ati Mbeg’ umunyabgenge yokwishurana amagambo asunitswe n’impwemu, Umuyaga akaba ari wo yuzuza inda?" 
Job15:3 Mbega yobūranisha amagambo atagira ikimazi, Canke yovuga ibitagira ico bivūra?" 
Job15:4 N’ukuri, kwubaha Imana ugukūyeho, Kand’ ubuzanije no kuyisenga." 
Job15:5 Kukw ibigabitanyo vyawe ari vyo vyigisha akanwa kawe, Nawe wihitiyemw’ ururimi rw’ubugunge." 
Job15:6 Akanwa kawe ubgako ni ko kagutsindisha, si jewe; Mber’ iminwa yawe ni yo ikwagiriza." 
Job15:7 Mbega ni wewe muntu wa mbere yatanguye kuvuka? Canke se wavyawe imisozi itararemwa? 
Job15:8 Mbega wigeze kwumva inama zihishijwe z’Imana? Canke ni wewe wiharije ubgenge? 
Job15:9 Ivy’ uzi tutazi natwe n’ibiki? Ico watahuye tutāmenye n’ iki? 
Job15:10 Turimw’ abameze imvi n’ abatāma bukokori, Baruta so ubukuru iy’ atibona." 
Job15:11 Mbeg’ ukwirura kw’Imana wakwise ubusa, Bo n’amajambo yo kukworohereza?" 
Job15:12 N’iki gituma umutima wawe ukuzimiza, Amaso yawe agahindurira," 
Job15:13 Ugatera umutima wawe kurwanya Imana, Ugatuma akanwa kawe karokomboka amagambo ameze artyo?" 
Job15:14 Umuntu vyoshoboka bite kw aba uwera? Cank’ uwavyawe n’umugore, kw aba umugororotsi?" 
Job15:15 Erega n’abera bayo nta ho ibizigira, Mbere n’ijuru na ryo ntiritunganye mu nyonga zayo," 
Job15:16 Nanswe umuntu agayitse kand’ abihiye, Agotomera ibigabitanyo nk’ amazi!" 
Job15:17 Ngira nkubarire, nawe nyumviriza: Kand’ ivyo nabonye ndabikumenyesha." 
Job15:18 Vyāvuzwe n’abanyabgenge, Bābikūye kuri ba sekuruza, ntibābihisha;" 
Job15:19 Kandi ni bo bonyene bāhawe igihugu, Nta n’umunyamahanga yaca muri bo:" 
Job15:20 Ni vyo ibi, yuk’ umunyakibi ahora aseserewe imisi yiwe yose, Akarinda ashitsa igitigiri c’ imyaka abahahaji bāshingiwe." 
Job15:21 Ijwi ry’ibiteye ubgoba ryama mu matwi yiwe; Akiri mu mahoro umunyazi azomunyaga. 
Job15:22 Ntiyizigira kw azogaruka ngw ave mur’ uwo muzimagiza, Kandi yumva kw inkota ihora imurorereye." 
Job15:23 Ayerēra arondera ivyo kurya, ati Vyoba hehe? Azi k’umusi w’umuzimagiza umwiteze uri hambavu yiwe." 
Job15:24 Amagorwa n’umubabaro bimutera ubgoba; Biramutsinda bimeze nk’ umwami yiteguriye kurwana," 
Job15:25 Kuko yabanguriye Imana ukuboko kwiwe, Akīnantaza kw Īshobora vyose," 
Job15:26 Akayirangirirako afise ubugabo, Yitwaje inkinzo ifise umukondo ukomeye." 
Job15:27 Asenyuka mu maso hiwe, Akagira ibinyonyori ku mafyinga." 
Job15:28 Kandi yagerereye mu bisagara vyabaye amatongo, No mu nzu z’imisaka abantu batakibamwo, Zisigaje gatoya zigacika ibirundo vy’amasakamburira." 
Job15:29 Ntazoba umutunzi, kandi n’ ivyo yar’ atunze ntibizogumaho, Kandi n’ivyo yamuje nta ho bizoregeza ngo bijondajonde hasi." 
Job15:30 Nta ho azova mu mwiza; Urubeya rw’umuriro ruzobabura amashami yiwe, Impwemu ziva mu kanwa k’ Imana zizomukūraho." 
Job15:31 Yoye kwizigira ivy’ ubusa, yihenda; Kukw ibitagira ikimazi ari vyo ngero yiwe." 
Job15:32 Azoyihabga igihe ciwe kitaribgashike, Kand’ ishami ryiwe ntirizotoha." 
Job15:33 Azokenyanywa nk’uk’ umuzabibu ukorora inzabibu zawo zikir’ ibitumbge, Nk’uk’ umwelayo uhungurutsekw amashurwe yawo." 
Job15:34 Kukw igihari c’abatubaha Imana kizogumbaha, Kand’ umuriro uzoyigiza ingo z’abarya ingurire." 
Job15:35 Basama inda z’inabi, bakavyara ibigabitanyo, Mu nda zabo hakuramw’ ubugunge." 
Job16:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job16:2 ati Numvise vyinshi ben’ ivyo: Mwese mur’ abagandazi bagorana. 
Job16:3 Mbeg’ amagambo atwarwa n’umuyaga ntazogira iherezo? Ikigutera kwishura n’iki? 
Job16:4 Erega nanje noshoboye kuvuga nkamwe, Iyaba ari mwebge mwari mumeze nkanje, Nanje noshoboye gukoranya amagambo yo kubanegura, Nkabazunguriza umutwe." 
Job16:5 Nanje nobaremeshesha akanwa kanje, Kwirura kwo gupfa kubomboranya iminwa yanje kwoborohereza." 
Job16:6 Yamara n’iyo ngize ico mvuga, umubabaro wanje ntiworoherwa; Canke niyumanganije, ntugabanuka." 
Job16:7 Ariko noneh’ irambutamitse, Yagesheje abanje bose." 
Job16:8 Yaransūmiye, bihinduka ibinyagiriza: Kunanuka kwanje kwankūriye hasi, kuranyagiriza imbonankubone." 
Job16:9 Yantabaguranye uburake bgayo impōye ubusa; Yandyanirije insya z’amenyo; Īndwanya intungiriye igitsure. 
Job16:10 Baranyasamiye n’akanwa kabo, Bankoze kw itama bantuka; Bankoraniyeko." 
Job16:11 Imana yangabuye mu batayubaha; Intereye mu maboko y’inkozi z’ibibi. 
Job16:12 Nari nibereye mu mahoro, maz’ iramvunagura; Mbere yansūmiye kw izosi, irankenyagura: Kand’ inshinga nk’uruti rw’ icumu." 
Job16:13 Abarashi bayo bantanze irya n’ino, Intobekeranije mu mafyigo ata kagongwe; Ishēshe amara yanje hasi." 
Job16:14 Yiyongeranya kunca ibihengeri, Insūmiye imeze nk’ikigatanya." 
Job16:15 Nibaririyekw amagunira ku mubiri wanje; Ihembe ryanje narishiburiye mu mukungugu. 
Job16:16 Amaso yanje akobowe no kurira, Kand’ igitūtu c’urupfu cubikije ku bigohe vyanje;" 
Job16:17 Nah’ ata muryano wari mu maboko yanje, Kand’ ugusenga kwanje kukaba kwari gutunganye." 
Job16:18 Wa si we, ntutwikire amaraso yanje, Gutakamba kwanje ntikugire aho guhengeshanya." 
Job16:19 Rāba n’ubu Icabona canje kiri mw ijuru, Ūnyineze ar’ iyo hejuru." 
Job16:20 Abakunzi banje barankēngēra, Arikw ijisho ryanje risuka amosozi imbere y’Imana," 
Job16:21 Kugira ngo habeh’ uwitsa ivy’ umuntu ku Mana, Nk’uk’ umuntu avugira mugenzi we!" 
Job16:22 Kukw imyaka mike ni yashira, Nzojana inzira ntazogarukamw’ ukundi." 
Job17:1 Ubugingo bganje buraheze, Imisi yanje irashize, Imva iranyiteze." 
Job17:2 Ereg’ abacokoranyi barankikije, Ijisho ryanje nta kindi ribona atar’ akavyongo kabo." 
Job17:3 Enda se tanga ingwati, unyishinge wewe ubgawe: Uwundi twokorana mu ntoke duhānye isezerano yoba nde?" 
Job17:4 Kuko wahishije ubgenge imitima yabo: Ni co gituma utazobashira hejuru. 
Job17:5 Umuntu ashengerera bagenzi biwe ngo banyagwe, Amaso y’abana biwe azokoboka." 
Job17:6 Ariko yangize iciro ry’imigani mu bantu, Mpindutse uwo gucirwa mu maso." 
Job17:7 Ijisho ryanje rikabiranijwe n’ intuntu, N’ingingo zanje zose zimeze nk’igitūtu." 
Job17:8 Ivyo bizotuma abatunganye bumirwa, N’umuntu atagira igicumuro ngw avuduke arwanye ūtubaha Imana." 
Job17:9 Arik’ umugororotsi azokomerera mu nzira yiwe, N’ūfise amaboko yiziguye azokwama yunguka inkomezi." 
Job17:10 Ariko mweho ni mushireko muje imbere mwese, Na ho nyene nta munyabgenge n’umwe nobona muri mwebge." 
Job17:11 Imisi yanje iraheze, imigabo yanje ipfuye umuhimba, Iyo nari mfise mu mutima wanje." 
Job17:12 Ijoro baryita umurango, Bat’ Umuco uraje; kandi hakir’ umwiza." 
Job17:13 Ko nziga i kuzimu kw ari ho i wanje, Nkaba nshashe uburiri bganje mu mwiza," 
Job17:14 Nkaba mbariye rwa rwobo, nti Ni wewe data, Nkabarira n’inyo, nti Ni wewe mama, kand’ ukaba na mushikanje;" 
Job17:15 Non’ ivyizigiro vyanje biri hehe? Kand’ ivyo vyizigiro vyanje ni nde azoruha abibona? 
Job17:16 Bizomanuka bishike ku bihindizo vy’i kuzimu, Igihe nzoronka uburuhukiro mu mukungugu." 
Job18:1 Maze Biludadi w’i Shuhi arishura," 
Job18:2 ati Muzogeza ryari kurondera amajambo? Ni mwiyumvire, hanyuma tubone kuvuga." 
Job18:3 N’iki gituma tugereranywa n’ibikōko, Tugahinduka nk’abatagira ubgenge mu maso yanyu?" 
Job18:4 Wewe witabagurana uburake bgawe, Mbeg’ isi yohebga kubgawe? Cank’ igitandara cokūrwaho kubgawe?" 
Job18:5 N’ukuri urumuri rw’umunyakibi ruzozima, Kand’ urubeya rw’umuriro wiwe ntiruzokwaka." 
Job18:6 Umuco uzocura umwiza mu nzu yiwe, N’itara rimanitse hejuru yiwe rizozima." 
Job18:7 Intambuko ziwe z’inkomezi zizopfunywa, Imigabo yiwe ubgiwe ni yo izomutsinda hasi." 
Job18:8 Ereg’ ivyiwe birenge ni vyo bimutsinda mu ruriba, Agaca ku gitsiburira." 
Job18:9 Ikigāmo kizomufata igitsintsiri, Umutego uzomucakira." 
Job18:10 Impururu yo kumufata ihishijwe mw ivu, Umushibuka umutegeye mu nzira." 
Job18:11 Azoterwa ubgoba n’ibimukanga irya n’ino, Bizomukinagiza vyōmye ku bitsintsiri vyiwe." 
Job18:12 Inkomezi ziwe zizomarwa n’ inzara, Kand’ ivyago bizoba bibunze i ruhande yiwe." 
Job18:13 Ingingo z’umubiri wiwe zizotsontsomerwa, Mber’ imfura y’urupfu izozitsontsomera." 
Job18:14 Azorandurwa mu rugo rwiwe yishimira, Azokwegerwa imbere y’ umwami w’ibiteye ubgoba." 
Job18:15 Abatar’ abiwe bazokwinjira urugo rwiwe; Amazuku azosukwa ahantu yahora aba. 
Job18:16 Imizi yiwe izokwumira hasi, N’ishami ryiwe rizokabiranira hejuru." 
Job18:17 Kwibukwa kwiwe kuzozimangana mw isi, Kand’ izina ryiwe ntirizokwongera kuvugwa mu nzira." 
Job18:18 Azokwirukanwa ave mu muco, aje mu mwiza; Mber’ azocibga mw isi." 
Job18:19 Ntazogira umuhungu cank’ umwuzukuru mu bgoko bgiwe, Cank’ ūzosigara aho yahora." 
Job18:20 Abazoza inyuma yiwe bazotangarira umusi wiwe, Nk’ukw abāmwitangiye imbere bātewe n’ubgoba." 
Job18:21 N’ukuri aho ni ho i wabo w’ūgabitanya, Kand’ aho ni ho hantu h’ ūtazi Imana." 
Job19:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job19:2 ati Muzogeza hehe kubabaza umutima wanje, Mukamvunaguza amagambo yanyu?" 
Job19:3 Ubu n’ubugira icumi munshinyagurira; Nta n’agasoni mugira ko kungirira nabi. 
Job19:4 Namba naracumuye koko, Igicumuro canje ni jewe kiriko." 
Job19:5 Namba mugomba kunyiratako, No kunyagiririsha ivyago vyanje mubindemēka," 
Job19:6 Mumenye yukw ar’ Imana yubitse urubanza rwanje, Ikanta hagati mu mutego." 
Job19:7 Rāba, ntakishwa n’umuryano, ariko sinumvirwa; Ndatabaza, sincirwe urubereye." 
Job19:8 Inzira yanje yarayishibije ngo sinshobore kuhaca; Kandi yakwiragije umwiza mu nzira zanje. 
Job19:9 Yanyaze icubahiro canje, Inyambura n’igitsibo co mu mutwe wanje." 
Job19:10 Yansanganguye impande zose, ndapfuye; Kand’ ivyizigiro vyanje yabiranduye nk’igiti." 
Job19:11 Yandometseko n’uburake bgayo, Imparūra mu barwanizi bayo." 
Job19:12 Ingabo zayo zaziye icarimwe, zitegura inzira yo kuntera, Zisagaza irya n’ino y’urugo rwanje." 
Job19:13 Yantandukanije n’abo tuvukana, Kandi n’abo twari tuzinanyi baranyihakanye." 
Job19:14 Ab’i wacu bantaye, N’abakunzi banje pfampfe banyibagiye." 
Job19:15 Ababa mu rugo rwanje, n’ incoreke zanje, bangize nk’ umushitsi: Mbaye nk’umunyamahanga mu maso yabo." 
Job19:16 Mpamagara umushumba wanje, ntaruha anyitaba, Naho nomukomera ibobo." 
Job19:17 Umugore wanje azinutswe ubgaku bganje, Nteye ishishi bene mama." 
Job19:18 Mbere n’abana bato barankēngēra; Iyo mvuye hasi bamvuga nabi. 
Job19:19 Abajanama banje baranzinutswe bose, N’abo nakunda bahindukiye kundwanya." 
Job19:20 Amagufa yanje amatanye n’ urukoba n’inyama: Nshigaje gatoya ngapfa. 
Job19:21 Mungirire akagongwe, mungirire akagongwe, yemwe bakunzi banje, Kuk’ ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho kwankozeko." 
Job19:22 N’iki kibatera kundendereza nk’ukw Imana ingize? Uk’umubiri wanje wabaye ntikubahāgije? 
Job19:23 Icompa amajambo yanje akaba yanditswe! Icompa akaba yanditswe mu gitabo! 
Job19:24 Icompa akaba akorogoshowe mu gitandara N’ikaramu y’icuma, n’icuma c’isāsu, akazohoraho!" 
Job19:25 Ariko jewe ubganje nzi yuk’ Umucunguzi wanje ariho, Kandi ko kw iherezo azohagarara kw isi:" 
Job19:26 Kand’ urukoba rwanje ni rwamara kubora, Nzobona Imana mfise umubiri." 
Job19:27 Nzoyībonera ubganje, Amaso yanje azoyitegereza, nta wundi nzorāba. Umushaha wanje udendebuwe n’inkumbu." 
Job19:28 Ko muvuga muti Ngo tumutemvye: Mut’ Inyanduruko y’ivyiwe imubonetseko! 
Job19:29 Ni mutinye inkota: Kuk’ uburake bgihamagarira inkota, Kandi mumenye yuk’ urubanza ruzocibga." 
Job20:1 Maze Zofari w’i Nayama arishura," 
Job20:2 at’ Ivyiyumviro vyanje binteye kwishura, Kuko bindundumiye." 
Job20:3 Numvise ibikangisho binteye isoni, Kand’ umutima wanje w’ ubgenge uranyishuye." 
Job20:4 Mbega ntuzi yuko kuva kera, Uhereye igihe umuntu yashizwe mw isi," 
Job20:5 Ukwihaya kw’abanyakibi kumara igihe gito, No kunezerwa kw’abatubaha Imana ar’ ukw’ akanya isase?" 
Job20:6 Nah’ ubgibone bgiwe bgoshika kw ijuru, Umutwe wiwe ugashika mu bicu," 
Job20:7 Azoshira buheriheri nk’ umwanda umuvuyemwo: Abāhora bamubona bazovuga, bati Mbeg’ ari hehe?" 
Job20:8 Azoguruka nk’inzozi, ntabe akiboneka, Mber’ azokamangana nk’ibiravūswe mw ijoro." 
Job20:9 Ijisho ryahora rimurāba ntirizosubira kumubona ukundi, N’ahantu yaba ngo hongere kumubona." 
Job20:10 Abana biwe bazoja gusaba aboro, Kandi bazoriha ivyo yagunze." 
Job20:11 Inkomezi z’ubusore bgiwe zuzuye mu magufa yiwe, Zizoryamana na we mu mukungugu." 
Job20:12 Nah’ ivyaha bimuryohera mu kanwa, Akabinyegeza mu nkingi z’ ururimi," 
Job20:13 Akanka kubiheba, Akabigumya mu kanwa kiwe," 
Job20:14 Yamar’ ivyo yariye bizomuhinduka bishitse mu nda, Bizohinduka nk’ubumara bg’ imvuvyi muri we." 
Job20:15 Yamize ubutunzi miyonzwa, non’ azobudahwa: Imana izobisevya mu nda yiwe." 
Job20:16 Azonunuza ubumara bg’ imvuvyi; Ururimi rw’inzoka ruzomwica. 
Job20:17 Ntazokwitegereza inzūzi, Ari zo migezi itemba ubūki n’ urubu." 
Job20:18 Inyungu yaronse azozisubiza, ntazozitamirako; Ubutunzi yaronse ntibuzomunezereza." 
Job20:19 Kuko yahahaje aboro, akabīrengagiza; Yinjiye urugo atubatse." 
Job20:20 Umutima wiwe ntuzi guhurarara, Kandi ntazokiza ikintu na kimwe mu vyamuhimbara." 
Job20:21 Nta casigaye atāherengeteje, Ni co gituma ubuhirwe bgiwe butazogumaho." 
Job20:22 Igihe ivyiwe bizoba bimucugaye binengesereye, azofutana; Amagorwa yose azomwizingirako." 
Job20:23 Igihe agira ahāze inda yiwe, Imana izomusukak’ uburake bgayo bg’inkazi, Izobumucuncuburirako akirikw ararya." 
Job20:24 Azogira ngw arahunga ibirwanishwa vy’ivyuma, Arik’ umuheto w’umuringa uzomutobekeranisha umwampi," 
Job20:25 Useruke mu mugongo wiwe: Mber’ uwo mubugita ukayangana uzoseruka utobekeranije indurwe yiwe; Ubgoba buzoba bumufashe. 
Job20:26 Umwiza wose ni wo azobīkirwa ku butunzi: Umuriro utākijwe n’umuntu uzomutongora, Uherengeteze ibizoba bisigaye mu rugo rwiwe." 
Job20:27 Ijuru rizoshira ibigabitanyo vyiwe ahabona, Kand’ isi izomukūrira hasi." 
Job20:28 Inyungu yo mu nzu yiwe izojanwa, Ibintu vyiwe bizotwarwa bisendanishijwe ku musi w’ uburake bgayo." 
Job20:29 Ivyo ni vyo mugabane umunyakibi ahabga n’Imana, Ni yo ngero yagerewe na yo." 
Job21:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job21:2 ati Ni mwitwaririke kwumva ivyo mvuga; Uko ni ko mwommara umubabaro. 
Job21:3 Ni munyihanganire, mvuge nanje, Maze ni naheza kuvuga mukomeze mutwenge." 
Job21:4 Mbeg’ abantu ni bo nganyira? Icotuma nihangana n’iki? 
Job21:5 Ni munyitegereze mwumirwe, Mwifate ku munwa." 
Job21:6 Iyo mvyibutse ngira ubgoba, Umubiri wanje ugafatwa n’ agatengo." 
Job21:7 N’iki gituma abanyakibi babaho, Bakīsāzira, mbere bakarushiriza kugira inkomezi?" 
Job21:8 Uruvyaro rwabo rwāruka barubona, Abana babo bārukira imbere y’amaso yabo." 
Job21:9 Ingo zabo zībēra amahoro ata co zīkanga, Kand’ inkoni y’Imana ntibagerako." 
Job21:10 Impfizi zabo nta ho zihangūra kuvyara; Inka zabo zama zivyara, ntiziramburure." 
Job21:11 Ibibondo vyabo birōngōra imbere yabo nk’umukuku, Kand’ abana babo bama bavyina." 
Job21:12 Baririmbisha udushako tw’ ingoma n’inanga, Bakanezererwa ijwi ry’umwironge." 
Job21:13 Imisi yabo bayimara baroraniwe, Maze bakamanuka i kuzimu banihutse." 
Job21:14 Yamar’ ari bo bābariye Imana, bati Tuve i ruhande, Kuko tutagomba kumenya inzira zawe." 
Job21:15 Bat’ Īshobora vyose n’iki, ngo tuyisabe? Kandi ni twayisenga, bizotumarira iki?" 
Job21:16 Rāba, umugisha wabo si bo bawizigamiye: Inama y’abanyakibi iba kure yanje." 
Job21:17 Mbega har’ aho mubona itara ry’abanyakibi rizima, Ivyago bikabatera, Imana ikabagabanganya imibabaro iri n’uburake," 
Job21:18 Bakaba nk’ibishingwe bitwarwa n’umuyaga, Nk’umuguruka utumurwa n’ igihuhuta?" 
Job21:19 Mbeg’ Imana izohanira abana ibigabitanyo vya se? Eka ni yihanirwe ubgiwe, yibonereko!" 
Job21:20 Ayiwe maso ni yibonere ivyago vyiwe, Kand’ anywe ku burake bg’ Īshobora vyose!" 
Job21:21 Ibizoba ku b’inzu yiwe bazomukurikira mbeg’ azobibabara, Kand’ apfuye akenyutse?" 
Job21:22 Har’ uwokwigisha Imana ubgenge, Kand’ ari yo icira imanza abahambaye?" 
Job21:23 Umwe apfa, agifise inkomezi zishitse, Acidibamiye mu mahoro," 
Job21:24 Ivyansi vyiwe bicuzuye amata, Umusokōro ukiyagagira mu magufa yiwe." 
Job21:25 Uwundi apfana intimba mu mutima, Atigeze kubona ivyiza." 
Job21:26 Bompi baryamana mu mukungugu, Inyo zikaborosa." 
Job21:27 Erega ndazi ivyiyumviro vyanyu, N’imigabo mibi mungīra." 
Job21:28 Kuko muvuga, mut’ Inzu y’ ūhambaye iri hehe? N’urugo abanyavyaha bāhoramwo ruri hehe?" 
Job21:29 Mbega ntimuraruha mubaza abantu b’ingenzi? Ntimwemeye ivyo bashingiye intahe," 
Job21:30 Yukw inkozi y’ikibi ihora irokoka ku musi w’ivyago, Kandi kw ikira ku musi w’ uburake?" 
Job21:31 Ni nde yomwereka ingeso ziwe imbonankubone? Ni nde yomusubiriza mu nkōko ivyo yakoze? 
Job21:32 Yamar’ azoterurirwa mu cobo, Bazorinda imva yiwe." 
Job21:33 Ibisinde vyo mu mwonga bizomworohera, Abantu bose bazomukurikira, Kand’ abāmwitangiye imbere babaye isinzi." 
Job21:34 None rero n’iki gituma munyirurisha ivy’ ubusa? Ibisigaye mu vyo munyishura n’ibinyoma bisa! 
Job22:1 Maze Elifazi w’i Temani arishura," 
Job22:2 ati Mbeg’ umuntu yoshobora kugirira Imana ikimazi? Ushime n’umunyabgenge nta wundi yokigirira shiti kucīgirira ubgiwe. 
Job22:3 Mbeg’ ukugororoka kwawe kurahimbara Īshobora vyose? Canke se gutunganya ingeso zawe har’ ico biyungura? 
Job22:4 Mbeg’ ukuyubaha kwawe ugira ngo ni kwo kwatumye iguhana, Ikagushira mu rubanza?" 
Job22:5 S’ukw ivyaha vyawe bikomeye? Mber’ ibigabitanyo vyawe ntibigira akagero. 
Job22:6 Kuko wanyaze bene wanyu ingwati z’ubusa, Ugakoba impuzu z’abatagira ico bambara." 
Job22:7 Umuntu arushe ntiwamuhaye amazi yo kunywa, Kand’ umushonji wamwimye ivyo kurya." 
Job22:8 Ūhambaye ni we yiganziye igihugu, Ūtinywa mu kigohe akacībēramwo." 
Job22:9 Wirukanye abapfakazi bagenda imvumure, N’amaboko y’impfuvyi aravunagurwa." 
Job22:10 Ni co gituma imitego igukikije, Ubgoba bga giturumbuka buguhagaritse umutima," 
Job22:11 N’umwiza na wo ukagukikiza, ukakubuza kubona, Kand’ amazi menshi akakurengera." 
Job22:12 Mbeg’ Imana ntiri hejuru mw ijuru? Kandi rāba inyenyeri ziri hejuru iyo bigwa, ingene zir’ ahītereye kure!" 
Job22:13 Nawe ukavuga, ngw Imana izi iki? Kand’ uti Yoshobora ite guca imanza iri mu mwiza w’ umuzitanya?" 
Job22:14 Ut’ Ibicu bitwaye intunda birayitwikiriye, biyibuza kubona; Yigendagendera ahihese hejuru kw ijuru." 
Job22:15 Mbeg’ ugomba gukomeza inzira ya kera, Iy’ abanyakibi bājanye?" 
Job22:16 Bācakiwe igihe cabo kitaragera; Itanguriro ryabo ryatemvye nk’umugezi. 
Job22:17 Bakabgira Imana, bati Tuve i ruhande; Bat’ Īshobora vyose yotumarira iki?" 
Job22:18 Yamara yujuje inzu zabo ivyiza: Inama z’abanyakibi zikaba kure yayo. 
Job22:19 Abagororotsi barabibona bakanezerwa, Abatarikw igicumuro barabatwengera mw ijigo," 
Job22:20 Bati N’ukuri abāri badukūriye hasi bararanduwe, N’amasigarira yo muri bo atongowe n’umuriro." 
Job22:21 Enda rero ni wiyuzuze na yo, ubone kuba amahoro: Uko ni k’uzobona amahirwe." 
Job22:22 Ndakwinginze, wemere kwigishwa n’ibiva mu kanwa kayo, Amajambo yayo uyabīke mu mutima wawe." 
Job22:23 Ni wagaruka kw Īshobora vyose, Ugashira ukugabitanya kure y’urugo rwawe, uzokomezwa." 
Job22:24 Rekurira itunga ryawe mu mukungugu, N’izahabu yavuye muri Ofiru uyirekurire mu mabuye yo mu migezi;" 
Job22:25 Maz’ Īshobora vyose izokubera itunga, N’ifeza y’igiciro kinini." 
Job22:26 Ni ho uzonezererwa Īshobora vyose, Ukunamurira amaso yawe ku Mana." 
Job22:27 Uzoyisaba, na yo izokwumva; Kand’ uzoshitsa amasezerano yawe." 
Job22:28 Iy’ ugize ico ugabira, kizokubera uko wagomba, Kand’ umuco uzomurika mu nzira zawe." 
Job22:29 Ni bagutsinda hasi uzovuga, uti Har’ ikimvyutsa; Kand’ uwicisha bugufi Imana izomukiza." 
Job22:30 Mber’ izorokora n’ūrikw igicumuro: N’ukuri uzorokorwa no gutungana kw’amaboko yawe. 
Job23:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job23:2 ati No gushitsa uyu musi amajojwa yanje aharūrwa nk’umugararizo: Uko nkubitwa kuruta uko nniha. 
Job23:3 Iyo mba nari nzi aho noyibona, Kugira ngo nduhe nshike n’ imbere y’intebe yayo!" 
Job23:4 Noyikūrira ku ntango urubanza rwanje, Akanwa kanje nkakuzuzamw’ amajambo y’imibūrano." 
Job23:5 Nkamenya amajambo yonyishura, Ngatahura ico yombarira." 
Job23:6 Mbega yontwarisha ituntu ubushobozi bgayo buhambaye? Oyaye, arikw ivyanje yobishira ku mutima." 
Job23:7 Aho ni ho umugororotsi yobūranira na yo, Īncira urubanza ikancira urutazokwivuguruzwa gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Job23:8 Rāba, nja imbere, ariko si ho iri; Nasubira inyuma, nkayibura;" 
Job23:9 Naja i bubamfu mu gihe ikorera, na ho nyene sinshobore kuyibona; Yihisha ku ruhande rw’i buryo, kugira ngo sindayikubite ijisho." 
Job23:10 Yamara yo irazi inzira ncamwo; Ni yamara kumvugutira nzovamwo mmeze nk’izahabu. 
Job23:11 Ikirenge canje nacometse mu cayo; Inzira yayo narayikomeje, sinakikama." 
Job23:12 Nta ho nasubiye inyuma ngo mve mu vyagezwe yashinze; Nashize umutima ku majambo yo mu kanwa kayo kuruta uko ndawushira ku vyo kurya bintunga. 
Job23:13 Yagiye imigabo: none ni nde yoshobora kuyibuza? Kand’ ico umutima wayo ugomvye ni co ikora. 
Job23:14 Kukw ari yo izonshitsakw ivyo yangereye: Kand’ ifise ibindi vyinshi bimeze nk’ivyo. 
Job23:15 Ni co gituma ndandurwa umutima no kuba imbere yayo; Iyo ndayiyumviriye ndayitinya. 
Job23:16 Kukw Imana ari yo idendebuye umutima wanje, Kand’ Īshobora vyose ikaba ari yo inciye ivutu." 
Job23:17 Ivyo ni vyo binshābije, s’ umwiza, S’uk’ umwiza w’umuzitanya untwikiriye mu maso." 
Job24:1 N’iki gituma Īshobora vyose idashinga ibihe vy’imanza? N’iki gituma abayizi batabona iyo misi? 
Job24:2 Har’ abashingūra akarimbi k’ urubibe, Bakanyaga imikuku ku manyama bakayīragirira." 
Job24:3 Bakinagiza akadogoba k’ impfuvyi, Batwara agaka k’umupfakazi kw ingwati." 
Job24:4 Bashiburira abagorwa hirya y’inzira: Impahazwa zo mu gihugu zikanyegagira hamwe. 
Job24:5 Ehe basokororwa no gukora, banuranura utwo kurya, Bameze nk’indogoba z’inyeshamba zo mu bugaragwa: Mu bugaragwa honyene ni ho bakūrira abana utwo kurya." 
Job24:6 Basigaye batungwa no kwahira ibibabi mu matongo, Bapfa guhumba uducekwa two mu mizabibu y’abanyakibi." 
Job24:7 Ijoro ryose barāra ubutura, ata co bipfutse, Kandi mu mbeho nta co bishirako." 
Job24:8 Bacikirwako n’imvura imanutse ku misozi, Bikinga mu gitandara babuze ubgugamo." 
Job24:9 Har’ abashikura impfuvyi ibere, Bakāka ingwati aboro," 
Job24:10 Bigatuma bagenda gusa, ata co bambaye, Kandi baremēkwa ibinyankinda n’inzara mu nda;" 
Job24:11 Bagakānyūra amavuta muri elayo mu ngo z’abo banyakibi, Bagakānyana inyota mu māto yabo." 
Job24:12 Mu gisagara abantu baraniha, Kand’ imitima y’abakomeretse iratakamba: Yamar’ Imana ntiruha ivyibaza." 
Job24:13 Abo n’abo mu bagarariza umuco, Ntibazi inzira zawo, Canke ngo bazigumemwo." 
Job24:14 Umwicanyi azinduka mu gahuru, akica impahazwa n’ umukene; No mw ijoro amera nk’igisuma." 
Job24:15 Ijisho ry’umusambanyi ritega akagoroba, Akavuga, ati Nta wuribunkubite ijisho: Akipfuka mu maso." 
Job24:16 Mu mwiza bimba amazu: Ku murango bakīrirwa biyugaranye; Ntibazi umuco. 
Job24:17 Bose agatondo‐tondo kabamerera nk’igitūtu c’urupfu, Kuko bamenyereye ubgoba buterwa na co." 
Job24:18 Bahehwa vuba n’amazi; Umugabane wabo uravumwe mu gihugu: Ntibakijana inzira ija mu ruzabibu. 
Job24:19 Ikigatwa n’ubushuhe bikamura amazi ya shelegi; Ni ko n’i kuzimu hakamanganya abakoze ivyaha. 
Job24:20 Inda yamuvyaye izomwibagira; inyo zizomurya ziryoherwe; Ntazokwongera kwibukwa ukundi: Ukugabitanya kuzovunwa nk’ igiti. 
Job24:21 Arya umugore w’ingumba atigeze akana, Kandi nta ho agirira neza umupfakazi." 
Job24:22 Imana yongera abanyenkomezi kuramba kubg’ ubushobozi bgayo, Bagasubira kuzunzuka bāri bihebuye." 
Job24:23 Ibaha kuba amahoro, bakayadibamamwo; Kand’ inyonga zayo izihanze ku nzira zabo." 
Job24:24 Bashirwa hejuru: maze hāshira igihe gito bakaba bīgīriye; Mbere bacishwa bugufi, bagakūrwa mu nzira nk’abandi bose, Bakagenywa nk’uburo." 
Job24:25 N’ubu namb’ atari ko biri, ni nde yompinyuza ko nd’ umubeshi, Agahindura ubusa amajambo yanje?" 
Job25:1 Maze Biludadi w’i Shuhi arishura," 
Job25:2 at’ Inganji n’igitinyiro n’ ivyayo; Kand’ itanga amahoro ahantu hayo iyo hejuru. 
Job25:3 Mbeg’ ingabo zayo zigira igitigiri? Kandi ni nde umuco wayo utarasira? 
Job25:4 None rer’ umuntu yoshobora ate kuba umugororotsi imbere y’Imana? Cank’ uwavyawe n’umugore yoshobora ate kuba ūtunganye? 
Job25:5 Rāba n’ukwezi ntigufise gukayangana, N’inyenyeri ntizitunganye mu nyonga zayo:" 
Job25:6 Nanswe umuntu buntu, kand’ ar’ inyo! N’umwana w’umuntu, kand’ ar’ umusiba!" 
Job26:1 Maze Yobu arishura," 
Job26:2 at’ Ewe kuntu uzi gufasha umunyantegenke! N’ingen’ uzi gukiza uw’ amaboko adendebutse! 
Job26:3 N’ukuntu ugīra inama ūdafise ubgenge, Ukerekana rwose ubgenge ubg’ ari bgo!" 
Job26:4 Ayo magambo ugira ng’ uyabariye nde? Kand’ impwemu ikuvugishije n’iya nde? 
Job26:5 Abāpfuye bahindira agashitsi Musi y’amazi n’ibiyabamwo. 
Job26:6 I kuzimu hambaye ubusa imbere y’Imana, Mu mahonero nta mwambaro hikinzeko." 
Job26:7 Yagaranzuye i burārūko ihashinga ku kirēre, Isi iyenetsa ku busa." 
Job26:8 Itekera amazi mu bicu vyayo vyibungenze, Kandi ntibitoborwa n’uburemerezi bgayo." 
Job26:9 Itwikira intebe yayo, Ikayirenzakw igicu cayo." 
Job26:10 Amazi yayashingiye ingabano, Zishika ah’ umuco n’umwiza bigarukira." 
Job26:11 Inkingi z’ijuru ziradegezwa, Zumizwa no gukankamira kwayo." 
Job26:12 Izīkuruza ikiyaga ububasha bgayo, N’ubgenge bgayo ibutobekeranisha Bgibone." 
Job26:13 Mpwemu wayo yēyūra ijuru, Ukuboko kwayo igusogotesha inzoka y’ubukuba." 
Job26:14 Erega n’ivyo n’ubusunwa gusa bg’inzira zayo: Kandi n’ivyo twumva kuri yo ni nk’utwongorerano dutoya! Non’ imyasano y’ububasha bgayo ni nde yoshobora kuyitahura? 
Job27:1 Maze Yobu yongera kuvuga amajambo yiwe y’ibirāgurāgu," 
Job27:2 ati Ndahiye uguhoraho kw’ Imana, ari yo yandīririye urubanza, Ni yo Īshobora vyose, yagiriye nabi ubugingo bganje," 
Job27:3 Ubugingo bganje bukidundega, Impwemu z’Imana zikiri mu mazuru yanje," 
Job27:4 N’ukuri iminwa yanje ntizovuga ivy’ ukugabitanya, Cank’ ururimi rwanje ngo ruvuge ivy’ ubugunge." 
Job27:5 Ntibikabeho yuko nobemerera ngo muvuze ibiroranye; Kugeza aho nzopfira, sinzokwigera mva ku gutungana kwanje." 
Job27:6 Ukugororoka kwanje ndakubangirije, nta ho nzokurekura, Umutima wanje ntuzokwigera unyagiriza no ku vy’umusi n’umwe mu yanje yose." 
Job27:7 Umwansi wanje n’amere nk’ umunyakibi, Kand’ ūnkūriye hasi n’amere nk’umugabitanyi." 
Job27:8 None se ūtubaha Imana agira ivyizigiro ki, Iy’ Imana imuciye, ikamwaka ubugingo bgiwe?" 
Job27:9 Mbeg’ Imana yokwumva ugutakamba kwiwe, Ivyago iyo bimuteye?" 
Job27:10 Canke se yohimbarwa n’ Īshobora vyose, Akāma atabaza Imana ibihe vyose?" 
Job27:11 Reka ndabigishe ivy’ ububasha bg’Imana; Imigabo y’Īshobora vyose sinoyihisha. 
Job27:12 Rāba mwebge mwese ubganyu mwaravyiboneye; None se n’iki gitumye muba abatagira ico bamaze na mba? 
Job27:13 Eh’ uyu ni wo mugabane umunyakibi aronka ku Mana, Ni yo ngero y’abahahaza, iyo bagererwa n’Īshobora vyose." 
Job27:14 Abana biwe ni bagwira, bazogwirira inkota; N’uruvyaro rwiwe ntibazoronka ivyo kurya bibahāza." 
Job27:15 Amasigarira yo mu biwe azomirwa n’urupfu, Kand’ abapfakazi babo ntibazobaririra." 
Job27:16 Naho yotekeranya amafeza nk’ umukungugu, Akirundaniriza imyambaro nk’ibumba;" 
Job27:17 Ashobora kuyirundanya, arik’ umugororotsi ni we azoyambara; Na ya mafeza, abatācumuye ni bo bazoyagabangana." 
Job27:18 Yiyubakiye inzu nk’iy’ igitangurirwa, Nk’umutara wubatswe n’ umurinzi w’inyoni." 
Job27:19 Yiryamira ar’ umutunzi, bigaciraho; Agize ngw arakanura, agasanga atakiriho." 
Job27:20 Ibiteye ubgoba bimwisukako nk’isūri, Ikirura kimuhitana mw ijoro." 
Job27:21 Umuyaga uturutse i burasirazuba uramutwara, akagīrako; Uramukubeba akava aho yahora." 
Job27:22 Mber’ Imana izomurasa ntimuzigurize, Azokwifuza guhunga ngw ave mu maboko yayo." 
Job27:23 Abantu bazomwitamba ku muvyimba bakubite amashi ku yandi, Bazomwimyoza arikw arava i we." 
Job28:1 N’ukuri har’ inganzo yimbgamw’ ifeza, N’ahantu bakūra izahabu ngo bazivugutire." 
Job28:2 Ubutare bukūrwa mw ivu, N’ibuye barivugutira ngo rivemw’ imiringa." 
Job28:3 Abantu badōbēra mu mwiza bakawurangiza, Bagashika kw iherezo ry’ urubibe rwawo Basesangura amabuye yo mu mwiza w’umuzitanya no mu gitūtu c’urupfu." 
Job28:4 Bimba urwobo rugera kure y’aho abantu baba; Ingenzi zihahita nta co zībaza kuri bo; Bacundeba muri rwo kure y’abantu, bakenena hirya no hino." 
Job28:5 Isi ivamw’ ivyo kurya; Arikw i kuzimu muri yo hazīkururwa nk’aho hazīkuruwe n’umuriro. 
Job28:6 Mu mabuye yaho harih’ ahantu h’utubuyenge twitwa safiro, Hakaba n’ifu y’izahabu." 
Job28:7 Iyo nzira nta gisiga c’amero kiyizi, N’ijisho ry’ikinyakabaka ntiryigeze kuyibona:" 
Job28:8 N’ibikōko vyihayagiza nta ho vyayikandagiyemwo, Cank’ intambge y’inkazi ngw iyihitemwo." 
Job28:9 Baramvura amaboko yabo ku kibuye c’isare; Bubika imisozi bahereye mu mizi yayo. 
Job28:10 Basatagura inzira mu bibuye; Amaso yabo yitegereza ikintu cose c’igiciro kinini. 
Job28:11 Bagomera imigezi ntidonye; Kandi n’icari gihishijwe bakizana ahabona. 
Job28:12 Arik’ ubgenge bgo, buzoboneka hehe? Cank’ ahantu ugutahura kuba ni hehe?" 
Job28:13 Abantu ntibazi igiciro cabgo, Ntibuboneka mw isi y’abariho." 
Job28:14 I bgina haravuga, hati Ntiburi muri jewe; N’ikiyaga kiravuga, kiti Ntibur’ aho ndi." 
Job28:15 Ntiburonkeshwa amazahabu, Kandi n’amafeza ntagerwa ku munzane ngw abe igiciro kibuguze." 
Job28:16 N’amazahabu yavuye muri Ofiru nta ho yohūza uburiba na bgo, Cank’ utubuyenge twitwa shohamu tw’igiciro kinini, haba n’utwitwa safiro." 
Job28:17 Izahabu n’ibirahuri nta ho vyoshobora kugereranywa na bgo; N’ivyacuzwe mw izahabu nziza ntivyobukāba. 
Job28:18 Ivyitwa fezaruka n’ibirahuri ntivyoruha binavugwa, Mber’ igiciro c’ubgenge kirengeye utubuyenge twitwa marijani." 
Job28:19 Ivyitwa pitida vyavuye muri Etiyopiya nta ho vyogereranywa na bgo, Kand’ izahabu iramuye nta ho yohūza uburiba na bgo." 
Job28:20 None rer’ ubgenge bganduruka he? Kand’ ahantu ugutahura kuba ni hehe? 
Job28:21 Ko buhishijwe amaso y’abariho bose, Bukanyegezwa ibiguruka mu kirēre." 
Job28:22 Amahonero n’urupfu biravuga, Biti Twumvise impuha zabgo ku matwi gusa." 
Job28:23 Imana ni yo izi inzira yabgo, Ni yo izi ahantu buba." 
Job28:24 Kuko yitegereza gushitsa ku mpera z’isi, Ikarāba n’ibiri musi y’ijuru vyose." 
Job28:25 Hamwe yagera uburemerezi bg’umuyaga, Ikagera amazi mu rugero," 
Job28:26 Hamwe yashingira imvura icagezwe, N’umuravyo w’inkuba ikawugerera inzira;" 
Job28:27 Ni ho yabgitegerereje, irabuserura; Irabushinga, mber’ irabusuzuma." 
Job28:28 Maz’ ibgira abantu, Iti Rāba kwubaha Uhoraho ni bgo bgenge, Kandi kuva mu vyaha ni kwo gutahura." 
Job29:1 Maze Yobu yongera kuvuga amajambo yiwe y’ibirāgurāgu," 
Job29:2 at’ Icompa nkaba nari mmeze nk’uko nari ndi mu mezi yahise, Nko mu misi Imana yanzigamiramwo;" 
Job29:3 Igihe itara ryayo ryākira hejuru y’umutwe wanje, Umuco wayo ukancisha mu mwiza;" 
Job29:4 Nkaba nk’uko nari mmeze igihe nari nshitse ubukombe, Hamwe inama y’Imana yar’ ikiri mu rugo rwanje;" 
Job29:5 Igihe Īshobora vyose yar’ ikiri kumwe nanje, Abana banje bakinkikije;" 
Job29:6 Ibirenge vyanje bigitonyanga ivuta, Ubgato bgimbge mu gitandara bukinsendanishiriza amavuta ya elayo!" 
Job29:7 Uko nasohoka, nkaja kw irembo ry’igisagara, Ngaterekesha intebe yanje ahiyaguye," 
Job29:8 Imisore yarambona, ikihisha, Abahūmure na bo bakampagurukira bagahagarara;" 
Job29:9 Abaganwa bagacereza, Bakifata ku munwa." 
Job29:10 Ijwi ry’abapfasoni ryarahora, Ururimi rwabo rukamatana n’uruhekenyero." 
Job29:11 Uk’ugutwi kwanyumva kwarampezagira, N’ijisho uko ryambona ryambera igishingantahe:" 
Job29:12 Kuko narokora impahazwa itakamba, Kandi n’impfuvyi itagira gitabara." 
Job29:13 Umugorwa yarampezagira, Kandi nanezereza umutima w’umupfakazi." 
Job29:14 Nambara ukugororoka, kukansagira, Kuroranya kwanje kwari kumbereye nk’umutamana n’ igitsibo." 
Job29:15 Nar’ amaso y’impumyi, Nar’ ibirenge vy’ūcumbagira." 
Job29:16 Nari se w’abakene, Natondanuza urubanza rw’ uwo ntazi." 
Job29:17 Navunagura imibangabanga y’ umugabitanyi, Nkamushikura iminyago mu menyo yiwe." 
Job29:18 Maze naravuga, nti Nzopfira mu rugo rwanje, Nti Nzogwiza imisi yanje ingane n’umusenyi:" 
Job29:19 Nt’ Imizi yanje ishōreye mu mazi, N’ikime gitonda kw ishami ryanje bukarinda buca:" 
Job29:20 Nt’ Ubgiza bganje bgama bgiyubura, N’umuheto wanje uhora ar’ umwerasi mu ntoke zanje." 
Job29:21 Abantu bāhora bantega amatwi, bakitega ico mvuga, Bagacereza, ngo bumve inama yanje." 
Job29:22 Iyo mmaze kuvuga, nta wagira ico asubiza; Amajambo yanje yabatonyangako." 
Job29:23 Kandi bānyitega nk’abiteze imvura, Bakāsama cane, nk’abāsamira imvura y’urushana." 
Job29:24 Narabatwenza bihebuye, Kand’ umukēra wo mu maso hanje ntibāwuhindura ngo hijirwe." 
Job29:25 Nakunda inzira ija aho bari, nkicara nk’umutware, Naba nk’umwami mu ngabo ziwe, Nkaba nk’ūhoza abagandaye." 
Job30:1 Ariko none, abo nduta ubukuru ni bo bampinduye agatwengo, Abo nakēngērera ba se, ntonabēgereje n’imbga ziteramira umukuku w’intama zanje." 
Job30:2 Non’ inkomezi z’amaboko yabo zommarira iki? Kw ar’ utugoyigoyi tutazoshika mu bigero. 
Job30:3 Bazingamitswe n’ugukena n’ inzara, Baguguna imisozi igadutse y’ ubgeranyange." 
Job30:4 Basoroma utuboga tumera mu bisaka, Imizi y’igiti c’umurotemu ni yo bagira utwo kurya." 
Job30:5 Bāciwe mu bantu; Bahabga induru nk’ibisuma. 
Job30:6 Bituma baba mu bikukumushi vyo mu myonga, Mu masenga yo mu misozi no mu bitandara." 
Job30:7 Basigaye bābirira mu bisaka nk’inka; Bīryamira hamwe musi y’ ibisuru. 
Job30:8 N’abana b’ibipfapfa, mbere n’abana ba ba nyarucari; Bābaye ibicibga mu gihugu." 
Job30:9 Maze noneho mpindutse akavyino kabo, Mbere mbaye iciro ry’imigani yabo." 
Job30:10 Baranzinutswe, baranyītāngūye, Ntibashishwa no kuncira amate mu maso." 
Job30:11 Kukw Imana yabanguruye urutsi rw’umuheto wanje, incisha bugufi; Ni co gituma batigarura imbere yanje." 
Job30:12 I buryo bganje hahaguruka imihimbiri, Basunika ibirenge vyanje, Bitegura inzira zo kuntera ngo bandandure." 
Job30:13 Inzira yanje barayonona, Basunikiriza ivyago vyanje, Kandi nta wubabuza." 
Job30:14 Banziye nk’abaciye mu kirengero kinini: Bānsūmiye bagigimba hakiriko harahomvoka. 
Job30:15 Ibiteye ubgoba birampanze, Bakubeba icubahiro canje nk’ umuyaga; Amahirwe yanje akamanganye nk’igicu." 
Job30:16 Maze non’ ubugingo bganje bunshongeyemwo; Imisi y’umubabaro irancakiye. 
Job30:17 Mw ijoro amagufa yanje yantobekeranirijwemwo, Uburibge buranguguna ntibumpumekera." 
Job30:18 Kubg’ inkomezi nyinshi z’ indwara yanje umwambaro wanje urononekaye, Unyumiyeko nk’uk’ umutamana wanje unduma mu rwano." 
Job30:19 Yanshiburiye mu kivurugu c’ ivyondo, Mpindutse nk’umukungugu n’umunyota." 
Job30:20 Ndagutakambira, ntunyishura; Nahagarara, ukandāba utw’ ininga." 
Job30:21 Wampindukiye inkarwe: Ukuboko kwawe kw’inkomezi kurandendereza. 
Job30:22 Unteruza umuyaga, ugatuma njanwa na wo; Unnyukangiye mu kirura." 
Job30:23 Kuko nzi yuk’ uzonshitsa mu rupfu, Ukanshitsa no mu nzu y’ ihūriro ry’abakiriho bose." 
Job30:24 Yamar’ umuntu iyo arikw aratemba ntiyābābiza amaboko? No mu vyago vyiwe ntiyotabaza? 
Job30:25 Mbega sinaririra ūjigirijwe? Umutima wanje ntiwababazwa n’umukene? 
Job30:26 Naziga amahirwe, hakaza ivyago; Naziga umuco, hakaza umwiza." 
Job30:27 Amara yanje aradobangana, nta ho aruhuka; Imisi y’amagorwa inshitseko." 
Job30:28 Ngenda ngandaye ntabona izuba: Mpagarara mw ikoraniro, ngatabaza." 
Job30:29 Ndi mwene wabo w’imbgebge, Ndi mugenzi w’igisīga citwa imbuni." 
Job30:30 Urukoba rwanje rurirabuye, rumvuyeko, N’amagufa yanje ahiye uburimbi." 
Job30:31 Ni co gitumye inanga yanje isigaye ar’ agacurantimba, N’umwironge wanje ugahinduka ijwi ry’abarira." 
Job31:1 Nasezeranye isezerano n’ amaso yanje; None noshobora nte gushira ijisho ku mwigeme? 
Job31:2 Kuk’ umugabane Imana yompa uvuye mw ijuru woba iki? N’inyegu ivuye iyo hejuru Īshobora vyose yompa yoba inki? 
Job31:3 Mbega ntiyoba ubugesera bubīkirwa umugabitanyi, N’ivyago bibīkirwa inkozi z’ ibibi?" 
Job31:4 Mbega yo yo ntiyitegereza inzira zanje, Igaharūra intambuko zanje zose?" 
Job31:5 Asangwa naragendeye mu binyoma, Ikirenge canje kikihutishwa no kuja kugunga," 
Job31:6 Ni ngerwe ku munzane w’ ukuri, Kugira ngw Imana imenye ukugororoka kwanje!" 
Job31:7 Asangw’ ibirenge vyanje vyarakebeje mu nzira, Umutima wanje ugakurikira amaso yanje, Kand’ asangwa har’ agasembga na kamwe kometse ku biganza vyanje:" 
Job31:8 Ndakarima, birye uwundi, Mbere n’imirima yo mu ndimiro yanje irandurwe!" 
Job31:9 Asangw’ umutima wanje warasutswe n’umugore, Nkabunda ku muryango w’ umubanyi wanje:" 
Job31:10 Umugore wanje aragasēra uwundi, Kand’ akindweko n’abandi." 
Job31:11 Kukw ico coba ar’ ishano ritavugwa, Mbere coba ar’ ikibi co guhanirwa mu bacamanza;" 
Job31:12 Coba ar’ umuriro utongora gushitsa uhoneje, Ugaturira imirima yanje yose." 
Job31:13 Asangwa narīrengagije ivy’ umushumba wanje cank’ ivy’ incoreke yanje, Igihe banyitwarako:" 
Job31:14 None nzobikika nte, igihe Imana izokwisidukira? Noyishura iki, igihe ije kumbazaguza?" 
Job31:15 Mbeg’ iyandemeye mu nda ya mama si yo yamuremye na we? Iyatubumbiye mu nda s’ imwe? 
Job31:16 Asangwa narīmye abagorwa ico bifuza, Canke naratumye amaso y’ abapfakazi akoboka;" 
Job31:17 Cank’ asangwa narigunganye ivyo kurya vyanje, Impfuvyi ntibikoreko," 
Job31:18 Kand’ uhereye mu buto bganje ari jewe nayireze ndi nka se, N’umupfakazi ari jewe namuhagarikiye, nkiva mu nda ya mama;" 
Job31:19 Kand’ asangwa har’ uwo nabonye yishwe no kubura ico yambara, Cank’ umukene abuze ico yipfuka," 
Job31:20 Asangw’ urukenyerero rwiwe rutampezagiye, Kand’ atāsusurukijwe n’ubgoya bg’intama zanje;" 
Job31:21 Kand’ asangwa narabanguriye ukuboko impfuvyi, Kubgo kugira aho mpininikiye mu rukinja;" 
Job31:22 Asangwa vyarabaye birtyo, igitugu canje kiragatandukana n’urubeshi, N’ukuboko kwanje gucike gutandukane n’igufa!" 
Job31:23 Kukw ivyago vyovuye ku Mana vyantera ubgoba, Narashishwa kubg’ igitinyiro cayo." 
Job31:24 Asangwa naragize izahabu ivyizigiro vyanje, Nkabarira izahabu nziza, nti Ni wewe nishimiye;" 
Job31:25 Kand’ asangwa nanejerejwe n’uk’ ubutunzi bganje ari bginshi, Kandi yuk’ ukuboko kwanje kwaronse vyinshi;" 
Job31:26 Kand’ asangwa naritegereje izuba igihe ryaka, Cank’ ukwezi kugendera mu bgiza bgakwo," 
Job31:27 Umutima wanje ugasukwa na vyo mu mpisho, Nkabiha ukuboko kwanje:" 
Job31:28 Ivyo na vyo vyoba ar’ ikibi co guhanirwa mu bacamanza, Kuko noba nihakanye Imana iri hejuru." 
Job31:29 Asangwa naranejerejwe n’uk’ ūnyanka ageshejwe, Canke nkitereshwa hejuru n’ ukw ivyago bimushitseko," 
Job31:30 Kand’ ari jewe nari narazitiye akanwa kanje ngo ntigacumure, Ntikamuvume ngo kamwifurize gupfa;" 
Job31:31 Kand’ asangw’ abo mu rugo rwanje batavuga, Bati Ni nde yobona umuntu n’umwe atāhāgijwe n’inyama yagabura?" 
Job31:32 Kandi kw ata mushitsi narāje hanze, Arikw ingenzi nama ndayugururira;" 
Job31:33 Kand’ asangwa naratwikiriye ibicumuro vyanje nka Adamu, Ngahisha ibigabitanyo vyanje mu gikiriza," 
Job31:34 Mbitewe no gutinya ishengero mu kigohe, No gutinya kugawa n’iyindi miryango, Bigatuma nihorera, sindenge n’irembo—" 
Job31:35 Icompa hakagira ūnyumviriza! Ivyo nireguje ndabitereye igikumu: Īshobora vyose n’ inyishure! Kand’ icompa nkabona ibirego vyanditswe n’umwansi wanje! 
Job31:36 N’ukuri novyikorera ku rutugu, Nkavyipfundikako nk’igitsibo." 
Job31:37 Noyimenyesha igitigiri c’intambuko zanje, Noyishikīra nk’uk’ umuganwa ashikīra umwami." 
Job31:38 Asangwa mu bgatsi bganje hatakishwa no kundega, N’ubusize bgaho bukarira;" 
Job31:39 Kand’ asangwa narariye ivyeze vyaho ata co nishuye, Cank’ asangwa narishe nabi bene ho:" 
Job31:40 Asangwa vyarabaye birtyo, amahwa arakamera ahobaye ingano, N’ikigunda ahobaye sayiri. Amajambo ya Yobu agarukiye aho." 
Job32:1 Nukw abo bagabo ukw ari batatu bareka kwishura Yobu, kuko yibona kw ar’ umugororotsi ubgiwe." 
Job32:2 Maz’ uburake bga Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi, wo mu muryango wa Ramu, buraziriringa: buziriringira Yobu, kuko yīgize umugororotsi kurusha Imana." 
Job32:3 Kand’ uburake bgiwe buziriringira na ba bakunzi batatu ba Yobu, kuko batāronse ico bamwishura, yamara bakamuhinyura." 
Job32:4 Ariko Elihu yari yarīndiriye kuvugana na Yobu, kuko bāmuruta ubukuru." 
Job32:5 Maze Elihu abonye yukw abo batatu babuze icobava mu kanwa ngo bamwishure, uburake bgiwe buraziriringa." 
Job32:6 Nuko Elihu mwene Barakeli w’i Buzi aravuga, ati Jewe ndi muto, namwe murakuze cane: Ni co catumye nizitira, sinubahuke kubaserurira ico niyumvira." 
Job32:7 Naravuze, nt’ Abo ha mbere ni bo bakwiye kuvuga, Nt’ Abamaze imyaka myinshi ni bo bakwiye kwigisha ubgenge." 
Job32:8 Ariko har’ impwemu mu bantu, Kand’ ibihumetswe n’Īshobora vyose bibaha gutahura." 
Job32:9 Abakuze si bo banyabgenge bonyene, N’abatāma si bo bamenya imanza gusa." 
Job32:10 Ni co gitumye mvuga, nti Ni muntege amatwi, Nanje mbaserurire ico niyumvira." 
Job32:11 Rāba, narīndiriye amajambo yanyu, Niteze ibiroranye vyova mu kanwa kanyu, Mukirondera ico mwovuga." 
Job32:12 Mbere nababangiye ugutwi, Ariko nta n’umwe muri mwebge yemeje Yobu, Canke ngw amwishure amajambo yiwe." 
Job32:13 Mwiyubare, mwoye kuvuga, muti Ni twebge twaronse ubgenge; Imana ni yo yoshobora kumutsinda, s’umuntu." 
Job32:14 Si jewe yaroreshejekw amajambo yiwe; Nanje sinomwishura amajambo nk’ayanyu. 
Job32:15 Ehe barumiwe, nta co bacishura: Ntibakigira ijambo bavuga." 
Job32:16 Mbega nobuzwa n’ukw ata co bavuga, Kuko bahagaze batakigira ico bishura?" 
Job32:17 Jewe nanje ngira mvuge ivyanje, Ngira nserure ico niyumvira." 
Job32:18 Kukw amajambo anyuzuyemwo, Imbere muri jewe umutima uransunika." 
Job32:19 Inda yanje imeze nka vino itagira isaganirizo, Nk’imikuza y’insāto misha igira ngw iturike." 
Job32:20 Ngira mvuge, kugira ngo ntenzukirwe; Ngira nteranure akanwa, nishure." 
Job32:21 Muntunge, mvuge ntarobanuye abantu ku butoni; Sinogira umuntu n’umwe nohema." 
Job32:22 Kuko ntazi guhemana; Mbikoze, Umuremyi wanje yonkūraho bidatevye." 
Job33:1 Enda rero Yobu, wumve ivyo mvuga, Kand’ utegere amatwi amajambo yanje yose." 
Job33:2 Ehe nteranuye akanwa, Ururimi rwanje ruvugiye mu kanwa kanje." 
Job33:3 Amajambo yanje agira aserure ukugororoka kw’umutima wanje, Kand’ ivyo nzi iminwa yanje irabivuga ata buryarya." 
Job33:4 Mpwemu w’Imana ni we yandemye, Kand’ uguhumeka kw’Īshobora vyose ni kwo kwampaye ubugingo." 
Job33:5 Ni wabishobora unyishure, Amajambo yawe uyatumberanirize imbere yanje, uve hasi uhagarare." 
Job33:6 Rāba mpwanye nawe imbere y’Imana, Nanje n’uko nabumbge mw ibumba." 
Job33:7 Ehe nta gitinyiro mfise co kugutera ubgoba, Cank’ ijunja ng’ untinye." 
Job33:8 N’ukuri wavuze numva, Kandi numvise ivyo amajambo yawe avuga;" 
Job33:9 Ng’ Uratunganye, ngo Nta gicumuro ugira; Ngo Nta rubanza rugutsinze, ngo Nta n’ukugabitanya ugira:" 
Job33:10 Ariko ngw Imana ikuronderakw inyanduruko, Ikakwiyumvira nk’umwansi wayo;" 
Job33:11 Ngw ibirenge vyawe ibishira mu mpatane z’ibiti, Ikitegereza inzira zawe zose." 
Job33:12 Reka nkwishure: mur’ ivyo ntugororotse; Kukw Imana irengeye abantu. 
Job33:13 N’iki gituma uyihāririza? Kukw ata co yirirwa isobanura mu vyayo. 
Job33:14 Kukw Imana, har’ ah’ ivuga mu buryo bumwe, Har’ ah’ ivuga mu bundi, nah’ umuntu atobibabara." 
Job33:15 Mu nzozi, mw iravūta ryo mw ijoro, Igihe itiro ryinshi ritwaye abantu, Bisinziriye ku mariri yabo;" 
Job33:16 Ni ho izibūra amatwi y’abantu, Ikabatēza ubgoba ivyo ibabūrira," 
Job33:17 Kugira ngw igaburuze umuntu imigabo yiwe, Imurinde ubgibone." 
Job33:18 Umutima wiwe iwukiza rwa rwobo, N’ubugingo bgiwe ngo ntibgicwe n’inkota." 
Job33:19 Kandi har’ ah’ ahanwa n’ uburibge ari ku buriri bgiwe, Akagira uburibge budahorerekeza mu magufa yiwe:" 
Job33:20 Bigatuma umutima wiwe uhura ivyo kurya, Akazinukwa ibiryoshe." 
Job33:21 Umubiri wiwe urananuka, ukayongayonga; N’amagufa yiwe atāboneka agasohoka." 
Job33:22 Mber’ umutima wiwe ukaba wēgereye rwa rwobo, N’ubugingo bgiwe bukēgēra intumwa z’urupfu." 
Job33:23 Namba yoba kumwe n’umumarayika, Ari we mushikirwa umwe mu gihumbi, Wo kumenyesha umuntu ukw akwiye kugenza;" 
Job33:24 Ni ho amugirira imbabazi, Ati Murekure, yoye kumanuka ngw aje muri rwa rwobo; Mbonye ikimucungura." 
Job33:25 Umubiri wiwe uzotonyanga itōto kurusha uw’ umwana; Azokwiyubura, abe nko mu misi yo mu buto bgiwe." 
Job33:26 Asenga Imana, na yo ikamuhāngaza, Bituma arāba mu nyonga hayo anezerewe: Kand’ ikagarukanira umuntu ukugororoka kwiwe." 
Job33:27 Aririmbira imbere y’abantu, Ati Naracumuye, ngoreka ibiroranye, Ariko nta co vyammariye." 
Job33:28 Imana yacunguye umutima wanje ngo ntuje muri rwa rwobo, Kand’ ubugingo bganje buzokwitegereza umuco." 
Job33:29 Rāba, ivyo vyose Imana ni yo ibikora, Igenza irtyo umuntu kabiri, mbere n’ubugira gatatu," 
Job33:30 Kugira ngw igarukane umutima wiwe ngo ntuje muri rwa rwobo, Abone kumurikirwa n’umuco w’ubugingo." 
Job33:31 Enda bishirek’ umutima, Yobu we, untege amatwi: Ucereze, nanje mvuge." 
Job33:32 Asangw’ uri n’ico uvuga, unyishure: Vuga, kuko nifuza k’uboneka k’ugororotse." 
Job33:33 Namb’ ata kiriho, untege amatwi: Ucereze, nanje ngucishe ubgenge." 
Job34:1 Maze Elihu yongera kuvuga," 
Job34:2 ati Ni mwumve amajambo yanje, yemwe banyabgenge; Muntege ugutwi, yemwe abafise ubgenge." 
Job34:3 Kuk’ ugutwi kurobanura amajambo Nk’ukw akanwa kumviriza ivyo kurya. 
Job34:4 Twihitiremw’ igitunganye, Twebge ubgacu twimenyere iciza ic’ ari co." 
Job34:5 Kuko Yobu avuga, ngo N’ umugororotsi, Kandi ngw Imana yamurīrīriye urubanza:" 
Job34:6 Ngo Nah’ ari n’urubanza, abarwa nk’umubeshi; Ng’ Uruguma rwiwe ntirukivūrika, ngo Nah’ atarikw igicumuro." 
Job34:7 Mbega ni nde muntu yomera nka Yobu, Agotomera ibirogotano nk’ amazi?" 
Job34:8 Agenda yifatanije n’abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, Kand’ akagendana n’abanyakibi." 
Job34:9 Kuko yavuze, ati Nta co bimariye umuntu Kunezerezwa n’Imana." 
Job34:10 Nuko rero ni munyumvirize, mwebge bantu bazi gutahura: Biragahera kw Imana yokora ivyaha, Īshobora vyose ko yokora ivy’ ukugabitanya." 
Job34:11 Kuk’ umuntu izomusubiriza mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ igikorwa ciwe, Izotuma umuntu wese abona ibihwanye n’ingeso ziwe." 
Job34:12 Eka n’ivy’ ukuri, Imana nta ho yokora icaha, Īshobora vyose nta ho yogoreka imanza." 
Job34:13 Ni nde yayiragije isi? Ni nde yayizigamishije ibiri kuri yo vyose? 
Job34:14 Yokwisubizako Mpwemu wayo, Ikagarukana n’uguhumeka kwayo," 
Job34:15 Ivyaremwe vyose vyohonera rimwe, Abantu na bo bagasubira mu mukungugu." 
Job34:16 None rero namb’ ugize ubgenge, ni wumve ibi: Utegere amatwi amajambo yanje." 
Job34:17 Mbeg’ uwanka guca iziroranye yoshobora kuganza? Mbega wotsindisha Īgororotse ari yo Nyenkomezi? 
Job34:18 None birabereye kubarira umwami, ngo Nta co umaze? Canke kubarira abaganwa, uti Muri babi?" 
Job34:19 None ntibirushirije kuba ibitabereye kubibarira Īdatinya abaganwa ku kigohe, Ntikunde umutunzi kumurutisha umworo, Kuko bose ar’ igikorwa c’ intoke zayo?" 
Job34:20 Bapfa mu kanya isase, no mu gicugu n’uko, Bafatwa n’agatengo bakagenda akagīrīre, N’abahizi bakūrwaho, ata wubakozeko." 
Job34:21 Kukw inyonga zayo ziri ku nzira z’umuntu, Kandi yitegereza urugendo rwiwe rwose." 
Job34:22 Nta mwiza cank’ igitūtu c’ urupfu Ah’ abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya boshobora kwinyegeza. 
Job34:23 Kukw ata gihe Imana yashingiye umuntu Co kurenguka imbere yayo mu manza. 
Job34:24 Ivunagura abahizi mu buryo budaserangurika, Igashira abandi mu gishingo cabo." 
Job34:25 Kukw izi ibikorwa vyabo, Ibacurikiranya mw ijoro, bagafyonyoka." 
Job34:26 Ibakubita nk’abanyakibi nyene, Ibigirira ahibonekeza, abandi barorēra;" 
Job34:27 Kuko bākikamye, bakayiva inyuma, Bakanka gushira umutima ku nzira zayo." 
Job34:28 Bagatuma ugutaka kw’abagorwa kuyishikako, Ikumva ugutaka kw’impahazwa." 
Job34:29 Iy’ itanze impore, ni nde yoyitsindisha? Iy’ itwikiriye mu nyonga hayo, ni nde yoshobora kuyibona? Ukw izigama ihanga ryose, ni kw izigama n’umuntu umwe;" 
Job34:30 Kugira ng’ ūtubaha Imana ntaje ku ngoma, Hoye kugira abatsinda abantu mu mitego." 
Job34:31 Mbega har’ uwabariye Imana, Ati Narahanwe, sinzosubira gucumura;" 
Job34:32 At’ Ico ntabona ukinyigishe: Ati Namba naragabitanije sinzosubīra? 
Job34:33 Mbeg’ ingero yayo uyankishwa n’ukw idakoze ico ugomba? Kukw ari wewe ukwiye guhitamwo, si jewe: Nuko vuga ico uzi." 
Job34:34 Abantu bazi gutahura, Mbere n’umuntu wese w’ umunyabgenge anyumva, bazombgira," 
Job34:35 Bati Yobu avuga ico atazi, Kand’ amagambo yiwe nta bgenge burimwo." 
Job34:36 Icompa Yobu akageragezwa, agashitsa kw iherezo, Kubgo kwishura kwiwe nk’ abanyakibi." 
Job34:37 Kukw agereka ubugarariji ku caha ciwe, Agakubita amashi ku yandi hagati muri twebge, Agasegenyura amagambo yo kurwanya Imana." 
Job35:1 Nuko Elihu akomeza amajambo yiwe," 
Job35:2 ati Mbeg’ ugira ngw ivyo uvuga ni ko, Ugira ng’ ukugororoka kwawe kuruta ukw’ Imana?" 
Job35:3 K’uvuga, ngo Vyokumarira iki? Kandi ng’ Uzoronka inyungu ki, ziruta izo uba warabonye ukoze ivyaha?" 
Job35:4 Jewe ngira nkwishure, Mwe na bagenzi bawe." 
Job35:5 Itegereze mw ijuru urābe; Kand’ urābe iyo hejuru, ingene hagusumba." 
Job35:6 Asangwa warakoze icaha, uyitwaye iki? Kand’ ibicumuro vyawe namba vyaragwiriye, uyigize iki?" 
Job35:7 Asangw’ ur’ umugororotsi, uyihaye iki? Canke se ico ironse mu kuboko kwawe n’iki?" 
Job35:8 Mugabo ibibi vyawe vyobabaza umuntu ameze nkawe; N’ubugororotsi bgawe uwo bgogirira ikimazi n’umwana w’umuntu gusa. 
Job35:9 Batakishwa n’agahahazo kenshi, Batakambishwa no kubabazwa n’amaboko y’abanyenkomezi." 
Job35:10 Ariko nta wuvuga, at’ Imana Umuremyi wanje iri hehe, Kand’ ari yo iduha indirimbo mw ijoro," 
Job35:11 Ikatwigisha gusumba ibikōko vyo mw isi, Ikaduha ubgenge gusumba ibiguruka mu kirēre?" 
Job35:12 Nuko barataka, ariko nta wugira ico abishura, Bitewe n’ubgibone bg’abantu babi." 
Job35:13 Ereg’ Imana ntiyokwumva amagambo y’ubuhuhuta, Īshobora vyose ntiyonayababara." 
Job35:14 None ntirushirije kutumva, iy’ uvuga ngo Ntuyibona, Ng’ Urubanza rwawe rur’ imbere yayo, ng’ Urayirorereye?" 
Job35:15 Ariko noneho, uburake bgayo ko butātumye ihana, Ntinababare cane ivy’ amanyama," 
Job35:16 Ni co catumye Yobu ateranurira akanwa kuvuga amagambo y’ubuhuhuta, Agasegenyura amagambo ata co azi." 
Job36:1 Elihu ashishikara kuja imbere," 
Job36:2 ati Nyihanganira gato, nkwereke; Kuko ngifise bimwe mvuga ku ruhande rw’Imana." 
Job36:3 Ndahēmbēra akenge, naho kava kure, Nature ingen’ Umuremyi wanje agororoka." 
Job36:4 N’ukuri ivyo mvuga s’ibinyoma: Ūfise ubgenge bushitse ari kumwe nawe. 
Job36:5 Rāba, Imana n’inyabushobozi, kandi ntigira uwo ikēngēra n’umwe: N’inyabushobozi mu nkomezi z’ubgenge." 
Job36:6 Ntizigama ubugingo bg’abanyakibi, Impahazwa izicira imanza zibereye." 
Job36:7 Nta ho ikūra inyonga zayo ku bagororotsi, Arikw ibicarika hamwe n’ abami ku ntebe zabo Gushitsa ibihe bidashira, bagashirwa hejuru." 
Job36:8 Kand’ iyo baboheshejwe iminyororo, Bagashirwa mu ngoyi z’umubabaro;" 
Job36:9 Ibamenyesha ibikorwa vyabo, N’ibicumuro vyabo, yuko bābikoreshejwe n’ubgibone." 
Job36:10 Kand’ izibūra amatwi yabo ngo bumve inyigisho, Ikabīhanikiriza ngo bagaruke bave mu bigabitanyo." 
Job36:11 Ni bayumvira, bakayisaba, Bazomara imisi yabo baguwe neza, N’imyaka yabo bahimbawe." 
Job36:12 Ariko ni batayumvira, bazotikizwa n’inkota, Bazopfa batāmenye ubgenge." 
Job36:13 Kand’ abatubaha Imana mu mitima yabo bāmana umwikomo: Iyo ibaboshe ntibaruha bayitakambira. 
Job36:14 Bapfa bakenyutse, Kand’ ubugingo bgabo bugeserana n’abanduye." 
Job36:15 Ikirisha impahazwa uguhahazwa kwazo, Kand’ iziburisha amatwi yazo ukubabazwa kwazo." 
Job36:16 N’ukuri iba yaragukūye mu magorwa, Ikagushira ahantu hāgutse, hatari mu mbombane; Kand’ ibiterekeranijwe ku meza yawe biba vyuzuye ibinure." 
Job36:17 Arik’ urubanza rucirwa abanyavyaha rugushitseko kand’ ugeze: Urubanza rw’ukuri uciriwe ruragushikiriye. 
Job36:18 Wirinde, ishavu ryawe ntirihave rigutera kurogota, Kand’ ubginshi bg’incungu ntibugukebanure." 
Job36:19 Mbeg’ ugutakamba kwawe har’ ico kwokumarira ngo ntubone ivyago, Cank’ ubushobozi bg’inkomezi zawe?" 
Job36:20 Ntukifuze ijoro, Igihe amahanga acibga akava ahantu hayo." 
Job36:21 Witonde, woye gushira umutima ku vy’ukugabitanya: Kuk’ umenga ari vyo wahisemwo bikakurutira kubabazwa." 
Job36:22 Rāba Imana ikora ibihambaye mu bushobozi bgayo: Umwigisha ahwanye na yo ni nde? 
Job36:23 Ni nde yayigereye inzira icamwo? Canke ni nde yohangara kuyibarira, ati Wakoze ibitaroranye?" 
Job36:24 Ibuka gutazira ibikorwa vyayo, Ivyo abantu bahora baririmba." 
Job36:25 Abantu bose bahora babirāba, Umuntu akavyitegereza ari kure yavyo." 
Job36:26 Rāba Imana irahambaye, natwe ntituyizi; Igitigiri c’imyaka yayo ntigiserangurika." 
Job36:27 Kukw idūza udutonyanga tw’ ikiduhu, Ikaduhindura ibicu bikagwisha imvura." 
Job36:28 Ijuru rikayijogotereza, Ikagwa ku bantu benshi." 
Job36:29 Mbega har’ uwoshobora gutahura ingen’ ibicu bikwiragira, Canke ngw atahure imituragaro iva mw ihema ry’ Imana?" 
Job36:30 Ikwiragiza imiravyo impande zayo zose; Kand’ itwikira hasi muri nyina w’ikiyaga. 
Job36:31 Kukw ivyo ari vyo ikoresha mu gucira amateka amahanga, Ikabizanisha ivyo kurya vy’ umurengera." 
Job36:32 Yorosa intoke zayo umuravyo, Ikawubarira kugema ico ishinze." 
Job36:33 Imituragaro y’inkuba imenyekanisha ivyayo, Inka na zo zikumva kw ikirura kije." 
Job37:1 Ivyo bihindisha agashitsi umutima wanje, Ukamvamwo." 
Job37:2 Ni mwumve yemwe, ni mwumvirize ukwivuga kw’ijwi ryayo, N’ukuririkiza kuva mu kanwa kayo." 
Job37:3 Igukwiza musi y’ijuru hose, N’imiravyo yayo ikayishitsa ku mpera z’isi." 
Job37:4 Hanyuma y’ivyo ijwi ryayo rirahinda, Igaturagarisha ijwi ry’icubahiro cayo: Ntirinda kuziganya imiravyo, ijwi ryayo rica ryumvikana." 
Job37:5 Imana ituragarisha ijwi ryayo bitangaje; Ikora ibikomeye tudashobora gutahura. 
Job37:6 Kukw ibarira shelegi, iti Gwa kw isi; Ikabarira n’imvura y’umuvuvu, N’iy’ isegenya, iti Ni mukomere." 
Job37:7 Yugarana abantu bose, Kugira ngw abo yaremye bose babimenye." 
Job37:8 Ico gihe ibikōko binyegera mu bgihisho, Bikaguma mu masenga yavyo." 
Job37:9 Mu birēre vy’i bumanuko hava ikirura, N’imbeho ikava i burārūko." 
Job37:10 Urubura ruzanwa n’impwemu zihumetswe n’Imana, Maz’ amazi adengereye agafatana." 
Job37:11 Mber’ ibicu bitwaye intunda ibiremereza amazi; Ibicu bisanzaza imiravyo yayo. 
Job37:12 Bikuba iserere nk’ukw igomba, Kugira ngo bikore ico ibigeze cose, Biri hejuru y’isi ibakw abantu:" 
Job37:13 Ni yo ibirungika, ari bga nkoni ihanisha igihugu cayo, Cank’ ar’ uguhesha umugisha." 
Job37:14 Umve ibi, yewe Yobu: Hagarara, witegereze ibikorwa vy’Imana bitangaje." 
Job37:15 Mbeg’ urazi ingen’ Imana ibigera, N’ingen’ ibarira umuravyo w’igicu cayo kuravya?" 
Job37:16 Cank’ urazi ingen’ ibicu bishigikiwe? Urazi ibikorwa bitangaje vy’ Iyizi ubgenge bgose? 
Job37:17 Cank’ imyambaro yawe igituma isusuruka, Igihe isi icereje kubg’ umuyaga uva i bumanuko?" 
Job37:18 Mbega woshobora kwaganura ijuru ufatanije na yo, Kandi rikomeye nk’icirore cavugutiwe mu nkero?" 
Job37:19 Enda twigishe ico twoyibarira; Kuko tubuzwa n’umwiza gutunganya amajambo yacu. 
Job37:20 Mbega har’ uwoyibarira ko ngomba kugira ico mvuga? None har’ umuntu yokwifuza kumirwa miyonzwa? 
Job37:21 Kandi n’ubu abantu ntibashobora guhanga amaso umuco ukayanganira mw ijuru, Iy’ umuyaga uhise wēyūye ibicu." 
Job37:22 I burārūko hava ubgiza bukayangana nk’izahabu; Imana yambaye igitinyiro giteye ubgoba. 
Job37:23 Īshobora vyose nta ho twoshobora kuyiserangura: ifise ububasha bunyomoje; Kand’ ica imanza zibereye, igira ukugororoka kwinshi: Nta ho idendereza." 
Job37:24 Ni co gituma abantu bayubaha; Nta ho ishira umutima ku muntu n’umwe yīgize umunyabgenge. 
Job38:1 Maz’ Uhoraho yishurira Yobu mu gashururu," 
Job38:2 at’ Uyo ni nde azimanganya inama Mu magambo atarimw’ ubgenge? 
Job38:3 Enda kenyera magabo! Kuko ngira nkubaze, nawe uheze unyishure." 
Job38:4 Mbega wewe wari hehe, igihe nashirah’ amatanguriro y’ isi? Bivuge, namb’ ufise ubgenge." 
Job38:5 Ni nde yatamvye amatambge yayo, namb’ ubizi? Canke ni nde yayigeresheje umugozi?" 
Job38:6 Ibinogo vy’inkingi zayo vyimbururiwe mu ki? Canke ni nde yashizeh’ ibuye rigumya imfuruka," 
Job38:7 Igihe inyenyeri zo mu gaturuturu zāririmbira hamwe, N’abana b’Imana bose bagasēsereza impundu?" 
Job38:8 Ni nde yugarije ikiyaga inzugi, Igihe cafyiruka nk’ikivuye mu nda?" 
Job38:9 Igihe nagira ibicu imyambaro yaco, Nkakizingirak’ umwiza w’ umuzitanya nk’impuzu y’ uruyoya," 
Job38:10 Nkagishingira akarimbi, Nkagishirirah’ ibihindizo n’ inzugi," 
Job38:11 Nkavuga, nti Garukira aha, ntuharēngāne: Nt’ Aha ni ho imipfunda yawe yīshira hejuru izogarukira?" 
Job38:12 Mbeg’ aho wabereye, har’ aho wigeze kugera ko busambura, Ukarangira umutwenzi ahantu uhēra," 
Job38:13 Ngo na wo ufate imikugiro y’isi, Uyikunkumuremw’ abanyakibi?" 
Job38:14 Isi ica irahinduka, nk’ukw ikibumbano giciye amagarwe kimera; Vyose bikaja ahabona nk’ ivyambaye." 
Job38:15 Kand’ abanyakibi bakwa umuco wabo, N’ukuboko kubanguwe kuravunika." 
Job38:16 Mbega warashitse mu masōko y’ikiyaga? Canke waragendagenze ahigobetse i bgina bgaco? 
Job38:17 Har’ aho weretswe amarembo y’urupfu? Cank’ amarembo y’igitūtu c’ urupfu har’ aho wigeze kuyabona? 
Job38:18 Mbega waratahuye ubgaguke bg’isi? Bivuge, namb’ ubizi vyose." 
Job38:19 Inzira ija i wabo w’umuco iri hehe? N’umwiza na wo ah’ uba ni hehe," 
Job38:20 Kugira ng’ ubisubize aho bihānira imbibe, Kandi ng’ umenye inzira zija ku nzu zavyo?" 
Job38:21 Ereg’ urabizi, kuko wari waravutse ico gihe, N’igitigiri c’imisi yawe kikaba cinshi!" 
Job38:22 Har’ aho wigeze gushika mu bubīko bga shelegi? Cank’ urābona ububīko bg’ urubura," 
Job38:23 Urwo nabīkiye igihe co kuzana amagorwa, Nkarubīkira umusi w’intambara no kurwana?" 
Job38:24 Inzira ijana ah’ ibishwarara vy’umuco bitangurira n’ iyihe? Cank’ inzira ijana ah’ umuyaga w’i burasirazuba uturuka, mu k’usāba kw isi?" 
Job38:25 Ni nde yaciriye isegenya imigende imanukana, Canke yaciriye umuravyo w’ inkuba inzira;" 
Job38:26 Kugira ngw arekurire imvura mu gihugu kitagiramw’ abantu, N’ubugaragwa butarimw’ umuntu n’umwe;" 
Job38:27 Ngw ahēmbūre ahantu h’ uruharabuga hagadutse, Ngw ahameze ubgatsi butotahaye." 
Job38:28 Mbeg’ imvura iri na se? Canke ni nde yavyaye udutonyanga tw’ikime? 
Job38:29 Urubura rwavuye mu nda ya nde? N’urume rw’igikonyozi ruva mw ijuru ni nde yarugīriye ku rwahi? 
Job38:30 Amazi aravura, agacika nk’ ibuye, Amazi yo hejuru y’idamba agafatana." 
Job38:31 Mbega woshobora guhambira hamwe akarundo k’inyenyeri zitwa Kilimiya, Canke kubohora ingoyi z’ izitwa Oriyoni?" 
Job38:32 Woshobora kurōngōra za Mazaroti mu gihe cazo? Canke woyobora izitwa Arukuturo n’abana bazo? 
Job38:33 Mbeg’ urazi ivyagezwe biganza ijuru? Woshobora gushinga uko riganza isi? 
Job38:34 Woshobora gushira ijwi hejuru ngo rishikīre ibicu, Kugira ngw amazi y’isegenya akwitabe?" 
Job38:35 Woshobora gutuma imiravyo, ikagenda, Cank’ ikakwitaba, iti Sabge?" 
Job38:36 Ni nde yashize ubgenge mu mutima w’umuntu? Canke mu mushaha wiwe ni nde yahashize ugutahura? 
Job38:37 Ni nde yogira ubgenge bgomushoboza guharūra ibicu? Canke ni nde yoshobora gucuranura amazi yo mu mibindi yo mw ijuru," 
Job38:38 Igihe umukungugu uhinduka ivyondo, Ibinonko bikamatana hamwe?" 
Job38:39 Mbega woshobora guhīgira ingore y’intambge? Canke wohāza imigunza y’ intambge," 
Job38:40 Igihe ziryamye mu masenga yazo, N’igihe zibunze mw ishamba ziteze ico zifata?" 
Job38:41 Ni nde aronderera igikōna ivyo kurya, Igihe ivyana vyaco bitakambira Imana, Biyererezwa no kubura ico birya?" 
Job39:1 Mbeg’ impene z’ibinyeshamba ziba mu bitandara urazi igihe zivyarira? Canke woshobora kuranga igihe impongokazi zivyarira? 
Job39:2 Woshobora kurīmbūra amezi zimara? Canke se womenya igihe zivyarira? 
Job39:3 Ziritunatuna, zikavyara abana bazo, Ukwērēra kwazo kugashira." 
Job39:4 Abana bazo barashisha, bagakurira mu gahinga; Bahwewe bakīgīra ukwabo, ntibazigarukeko." 
Job39:5 Ni nde yarekuye indogoba z’ ibinyeshamba ngo zigende aho zigomba? Canke ni nde yazizituye ku biziriko? 
Job39:6 Izo nahinduriye ubugaragwa ngo bube inzu yazo, N’igihugu c’umunyu ngo kibe ahantu ziba." 
Job39:7 Zitwenga urwamo rwo mu gisagara, Kandi ntizīgera zumva gukankamirwa n’ūziyoboye." 
Job39:8 Ku misozi ni ho zigendagenda zirisha, Zikarondera udutohera twose tw’ubgatsi." 
Job39:9 Mbeg’ imbogo yokwemera kugukorera? Canke yotahukira ku gicaniro cawe? 
Job39:10 Canke woshobora kuyambika umugozi ngw ikurimire ikivi? Canke se yogenda irakubiturura inyuma yawe mu myonga? 
Job39:11 Mbega woyizigira kukw inkomezi zayo ari nyinshi? Canke woyisigarana igikorwa cawe? 
Job39:12 Woyishimira ko yokwegeranya ivyo wejeje ikabizana i muhira, Ikabirunda ku mbuga yawe?" 
Job39:13 Igisīga citwa imbuni gikungutana amababa yaco kwiteragura; Ariko mbeg’ amababa yaco n’ amoya yaco bigira neza? 
Job39:14 Kuko kirekera amagi yaco hasi, Agashuhira mu mukungugu," 
Job39:15 Kikibagira kw ikirenge coshobora kuyafyonyagura, Canke kw igikōko coshobora kuyakandagira." 
Job39:16 Kirenga ivyana vyaco, nk’ ibitar’ ivyaco; Naho caruhiye ubusa ntikibibabara;" 
Job39:17 Kukw Imana yacimye ubgenge, Ntigihe ingabire yo kumenya." 
Job39:18 Iyo kivudutse ciruka, Gikēngēra ifarasi n’ūyigenderako." 
Job39:19 Mbega ni wewe wahaye ifarasi inkomezi zayo? Canke ni wewe wambitse izosi ryayo umugāra uhungabana? 
Job39:20 Ni wewe wayihaye gusimba nk’inzige? Erega gufuha kw’amanyama kwayo guteye ubgoba. 
Job39:21 Iy’ iri mu kiyaya irakoba, igahimbarwa n’inkomezi zayo; Ikaja gutega ingabo." 
Job39:22 Itwenga ubgoba, ntiranduka umutima, Nta ho ikimirana ngw ihunge inkota." 
Job39:23 Umutana ugenda ujegera kuri yo, Bo n’icumu ry’intēga rikayangana n’agakōbero." 
Job39:24 Amakare yayo n’uburake bituma itemaguza imisozi, Kand’ iyo yumvise ijwi ry’ inzamba ntinatenyenya." 
Job39:25 Uko yumvise inzamba kwose iravuga, iti Ha ha ha ha! Kand’ ihemba intambara ikiri kure, N’uguhinda kw’abagabisha n’ akāyaga." 
Job39:26 Mbeg’ ubgenge bgawe ni bgo butuma agaca kaguruka, Iyo gashānje amababa yako aherekeye i bumanuko?" 
Job39:27 Mbeg’ ibgirizwa ryawe ni ryo rituma ikinyakabaka canikiza hejuru, Canke kikārika icāri caco hejuru kure?" 
Job39:28 Kiba mu bitandara, kikārikaho, No ku karungerunge kavyo, no mu masenga yavyo." 
Job39:29 Kikir’ aho, gituma akajisho kirondera ico cofata; Amaso yaco akakibona kiri kure." 
Job39:30 Ivyana vyaco na vyo binunuza amaraso; Kand’ ah’ imivyimba iri hose, ni ho kija." 
Job40:1 Uhoraho yongera kubaza Yobu," 
Job40:2 ati Mbeg’ umunyempāri yohāririza Īshobora vyose? Ūhāririza Imana, ni yishure!" 
Job40:3 Maze Yobu yishura Uhoraho," 
Job40:4 ati Rāba ndi nta kimazi: nokwishura iki? Nifashe ku munwa. 
Job40:5 Mvuze rimwe, ariko singisubīra; Mbere ni kabiri, arikw aho ni ho ngarukiye." 
Job40:6 Maz’ Uhoraho yishurira Yobu mu gashururu," 
Job40:7 at’ Enda kenyera magabo! Ngira nkubaze, nawe uheze unyishure." 
Job40:8 Mbega woshingūra urwo nashinze? Wompenurirakw ibitari vyo kugira ng’ ubone urubanza? 
Job40:9 Canke se, unganya amaboko n’Imana? Woshobora guturagarisha ijwi nka yo?" 
Job40:10 Enda ni wisakare ubgiza n’ ubukuru, Wambare icubahiro n’igitinyiro!" 
Job40:11 Sendereza uburake bgawe busebereye, Kandi witegereze umwibone wese, umucishe bugufi." 
Job40:12 Witegereze umwibone wese, umusubize hasi, Kand’ ufyonyorere abanyakibi aho bari." 
Job40:13 Ubashire mu mukungugu bose hamwe, Upfukire mu maso habo ahantu hatabona." 
Job40:14 Ni ho nanje nzokwemera Yuk’ ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kwoshobora kugukiza. 
Job40:15 Enda ni witegereze imvubu, iyo naremye nk’uko nakuremye; Irisha ubgatsi nk’inka." 
Job40:16 Ehe rāba, inkomezi zayo ziri mu masohoro yayo, N’ububasha bgayo buri mu mitsi yo mu nda." 
Job40:17 Izungagiza umurizo wayo udadaye nk’igiti c’isederi; Imitsi yo mu matako yayo irasobekeranye. 
Job40:18 Amagufa yayo ameze nk’imiheha y’imiringa; Ingingo zayo zimeze nk’ibihindizo vy’ivyuma. 
Job40:19 Mu vyaremwe n’Imana ni yo gakomeye; Iyayiremye ni yo yonyene yoshobora kuyishikiriza inkota.
