Job40:20 N’ukuri imisozi iyimereza ivyo kurya, Ah’ ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba bikinira." 
Job40:21 Yiryamira musi y’ibiti vy’ intunda, Mu bgihisho bgo mu marenga no mu rufunzo." 
Job40:22 Ibiti vy’intunda biyikwiza igitūtu; Ibiti bimeze i ruhande y’ umugezi birayikikiza. 
Job40:23 Rāba, iy’ uruzi rwigize akagabo ntiruha ihinda agashitsi; Naho Yorodani rwoseberera ikaruhūhira ku munwa, ntibigira ikindi." 
Job40:24 Mbega har’ uwoyifata iri maso, Cank’ akayifatisha urusenga ngw ayitobore izuru?" 
Job41:1 Mbeg’ ingona woshobora kuyirobesha igera? Canke wofatisha ururimi rwayo umugozi? 
Job41:2 Woshobora kuyicisha umugozi w’umuhotora mu zuru? Canke wotoboza umubangabanga wayo uruhindu? 
Job41:3 Mbega yokwisaba mu majambo menshi, Canke yokubarira ikarambarara?" 
Job41:4 Mbega yosezerana nawe, Ng’ uyisabishe ikubere umushumba imisi yose?" 
Job41:5 Woyikinisha nk’ūkinisha inyoni? Mbega woyizirika ngw abanyakigo bagukorera bayikinishe? 
Job41:6 Mbeg’ igihari c’abarovyi coyidandaza? Coyikwiragiza mu bahanjuzi? 
Job41:7 Mbeg’ urusāto rwayo worushingagirakw imyampi y’ ingobe, Cank’ umutwe wayo kw amacumu yica amafi?" 
Job41:8 Pfa kuyishirak’ ukuboko gusa! Uze wame wibuka intambara, ntuze wongere." 
Job41:9 Eh’ ivyizigiro vyo kuyifata nta vyo: Mbeg’ umuntu ntiyogwishwa igihūmura n’ukw ayirāvye gusa? 
Job41:10 Nta wogira ubuhizi bgotuma ahangara kuyikakaza: Nuko rero jewe ni nde yoshobora kumpagarara imbere? 
Job41:11 Ni nde yabanje kugira ico ampa ngo ndamwishure? Ibiri musi y’ijuru vyose iyo riva rikagera n’ivyanje. 
Job41:12 Ingona sinoreka kuvuga amaguru yayo, Cank’ ububasha bg’inkomezi zayo, cank’ ubgiza bg’umutumba wayo." 
Job41:13 Ni nde yoshobora kuyikūrak’ umwambaro w’inyuma? Ni nde yokwishira hagati mu majigo yayo? 
Job41:14 Ni nde yoshobora kuyasamika akanwa? Gutera akōba gukikije amenyo yayo. 
Job41:15 Ibigaragamba vyayo vy’inkomezi ni vyo igenda yishinzako; Bigerekeranye hamwe nk’ ivyamatanijwe rwose. 
Job41:16 Uko kimwe gifatanye n’ikindi Bituma ata muyaga ushobora kubicamwo. 
Job41:17 Biramatanye kimwe ku kindi, Biromekanye uburyo bitoshoboka gutandukanywa." 
Job41:18 Kwasamura kwayo guca ibibatsi; Amaso yayo asa n’ugutambika kw’umutwenzi. 
Job41:19 Mu kanwa kayo havamw’ imuri zaka, Hagatarukamw’ ibisase vy’ umuriro." 
Job41:20 Mu mazuru yayo hapfundukamw’ umwotsi, Nk’uw’ inkono ibiragira cank’ uw’ urukangaga rwaka." 
Job41:21 Impwemu zayo zidomeka amakara, Kandi mu kanwa kayo havamw’ ibirimi vy’umuriro." 
Job41:22 Mw izosi ryayo habamw’ inkomezi; Gutera akōba kwayo kuyihamiriza imbere. 
Job41:23 Inyama zo ku mubiri wayo ziramatanye: Ziyimaseko, ntizishobora gutentema." 
Job41:24 Umutima wayo ukomeye nk’ ibuye: Mber’ ukomeye nk’urusyo. 
Job41:25 Iyo yiburutse abahizi bahinda agashitsi, Ubgoba bukabasarisha." 
Job41:26 N’uworamuka ayirwanishije inkota nta co vyomara: N’iyo ryoba icumu cank’ umugenyuzi cank’ umwampi w’ubukera. 
Job41:27 Ivyuma ibigereranya n’ivyatsi, N’imiringa nk’ibiti bibongeye." 
Job41:28 Umwampi ntushobora gutuma ihunga; Amabuye atewe n’umugozi ayihindukira nk’ibishingwe. 
Job41:29 Ubuhiri ibugereranya n’ibishingwe nyene: Itwenga imivuguvugu y’icumu. 
Job41:30 Mu nda hayo hameze nk’injo zikarishe; Ah’ iciye mu vyondo ihasiga imikuku nk’ahaciye umusekuzo w’amenyo. 
Job41:31 Isebagiza mw idamba nk’ inkono ibiragira, Itagatisha ikiyaga nk’amavuta yo kwīsīga." 
Job41:32 Inyuma yayo ihasiga inzira ikayangana; Womenga mw idamba hasheshe uruyenzi. 
Job41:33 Nta kindi gihwanye na yo kiri kw isi, Yo yaremwe ar’ inshirabgoba." 
Job41:34 Irābana agakēngērwe ibishizwe hejuru vyose; Ni yo mwami w’ibinyabgibone vyose. 
Job42:1 Maze Yobu yishura Uhoraho," 
Job42:2 ati Nzi yuk’ ushobora vyose, Kandi kw ata gishobora kubuza imigabo yawe." 
Job42:3 Uyo ni nde azimanganya inama ata bgenge agira? Erega ni co catumye mvuga ivyo ntatahuye, Nkavuga ibitangaza bindengeye ntazi." 
Job42:4 None ndakwinginze ni wumve, nanje mvuge: Ngira nkubaze, nawe umbarire." 
Job42:5 Nari narumvishije ivyawe ugutwi, Ariko noneh’ ijisho ryanje rirakwiboneye." 
Job42:6 Ni co kinteye kwizinukwa, nkihana Nigaragura mu mukungugu no mu munyota." 
Job42:7 Nuk’ Uhoraho amaze kubgira Yobu ayo majambo, Uhoraho abarira Elifazi w’i Temani, at’ Uburake bganje burakuziriringiye, mwe na bagenzi bawe bompi: kuko mutamvuzekw ibiroranye, nk’uk’ umusavyi wanje Yobu yagize." 
Job42:8 None rero ni mwijanire amashūri ndwi n’impfizi z’intama ndwi, muje ku musavyi wanje Yobu, mwitangire ibimazi vyoswa; kand’ umusavyi wanje Yobu azobasabira, kukw ari we nzokwemera, kugira ngo noye kubagirira nk’uk’ ubupfu bganyu bumeze; kuko mutamvuzekw ibiroranye, nk’uk’ umusavyi wanje Yobu yagize." 
Job42:9 Nuko Elifazi w’i Temani na Biludadi w’i Shuhi na Zofari w’i Nayama baragenda, bagira nk’uk’ Uhoraho yababariye: maz’ Uhoraho yumvira ugusenga kwa Yobu." 
Job42:10 Yobu agisengera bagenzi biwe, Uhoraho amukūrak’ uburushwa bgiwe, amushumbusha ibingana n’ivyo yar’ afise ibihetangabo kabiri." 
Job42:11 Maz’ abo bavukana bose baraza, na bashiki biwe bose, n’abāri bāzinanyi na we bose ubga mbere, basangirira na we mu nzu yiwe; baje kumugarukirako no kumwirura kubg’ ivyago vyose Uhoraho yari yaramutēje; umuntu wese amuha ihera ryitwa kesita n’impeta y’ izahabu." 
Job42:12 Nuk’ Uhoraho aha Yobu umugisha mu gihe c’amaheruka kuruta ica mbere: aronka intama ibihumbi cumi na bine, n’ ingamiya ibihumbi bitandatu, n’ inka zirima ibihumbi bibiri, n’ indogoba zivyara igihumbi." 
Job42:13 Kand’ avyara n’abahungu ndwi n’abakobga batatu. 
Job42:14 Umukobga wa mbere amwita Yemima; uw’ ubuheta amwita Keziya; uwa gatatu amwita Kereni‐hapuki. 
Job42:15 Kandi mu gihugu cose nta bigeme bāri bahwanije akaranga n’ abakobga ba Yobu: nuko se abaraga hamwe na basaza babo. 
Job42:16 Hanyuma yaho, Yobu amara imyaka ijana na mirongwine, abona abana biwe n’abuzukuru biwe, gushitsa no ku buzukururuza." 
Job42:17 Nuko Yobu apfa yīsāziye, ageze mu zabukuru." 
Psalms1:1 Hahirwa umuntu atagendera mu nama z’ababi, Adahagarara mu nzira y’abanyavyaha, Aticarana n’abacokoranyi." 
Psalms1:2 Arikw ibimuhimbara biri mu vyagezwe vy’Uhoraho, Kand’ ivyagezwe vyiwe ni vyo ashirak’ umutima ku murango no mw ijoro." 
Psalms1:3 Azoba nk’igiti gitewe hafi y’ imigezi y’amazi, Cama igihe caco, Ibibabi vyaco ntivyuma: Ic’ azokora cose kizomubera ko." 
Psalms1:4 Ababi ntibamera bartyo: Ariko baba nk’umuguruka utwarwa n’umuyaga. 
Psalms1:5 Ni co gituma ababi batazoshobora guhagarara ku musi w’amateka, Cank’ abanyavyaha mw ikoraniro ry’abagororotsi." 
Psalms1:6 Kuk’ Uhoraho azi inzira y’ abagororotsi, Arikw inzira y’abanyavyaha ijana mu mahonero." 
Psalms2:1 Abanyamahanga n’iki kibateye umuvurungano? N’amoko yagīriye ingingo iki ivy’ ubusa? 
Psalms2:2 Abami bo mw isi baragomoye, N’abakuru bahūrije ingingo hamwe Kurwanya Uhoraho n’Uwo yarobanuje amavuta;" 
Psalms2:3 Bati Ngo ducagagure imvuto bātubohesheje, Dute kure ingoyi bādushizemwo." 
Psalms2:4 Umwe avyagiye mw ijuru azobatwengera mw ijigo: Umwami Imana azobakēngēra. 
Psalms2:5 Maz’ azobabarirana uburake bgiwe, Azobatēza ubgoba uguhambara kwiwe gukomeye," 
Psalms2:6 Ati Ni jewe niyimikiye umwami wanje Kuri Siyoni, umurwa wanje wera." 
Psalms2:7 Ndavuga rya jambo rishinzwe: Uhoraho yarambgiye, at’ Ur’ Ubura bganje, Uyu musi ndakuvyaye." 
Psalms2:8 Nsaba, nzoguha amahanga, az’ abe umwandu wawe, N’impera z’isi zize zibe ishamvu yawe." 
Psalms2:9 Uzobavunaguza inkoni y’icuma, Uzobamenagura nk’ikibumbano." 
Psalms2:10 Noneho rero, mwa bami, ni muce ubgenge, Mwa bacamanza bo mw isi, ni mwemere kugīrwa inama." 
Psalms2:11 Musabe Uhoraho mwubashe, Munezeranwe guhinda agashitsi." 
Psalms2:12 Mugumbire urya Mwana, kugira ngo ntarake, namwe mugahonera mu nzira, Kuk’ uburake bgiwe bgoca buziriringa: Hahirwa abamuhungirako bose." 
Psalms3:1 Uhoraho we, ereg’ abarwanizi banje baragwiriye! Abangararije ni benshi." 
Psalms3:2 Benshi baramvuga, Ngo Nta gakiza afise ku Mana." 
Psalms3:3 Yamara wewe, Uhoraho, ur’ inkinzo inkīngira, Ur’ icubahiro canje, ni wewe ushira hejuru umutwe wanje." 
Psalms3:4 Ijwi ryanje ritakambira Uhoraho, Na we akanyishura ari ku murwa wiwe wera." 
Psalms3:5 Nararyama, ngasinzira, Nkīkangura, kuk’ Uhoraho ari we ampagarikiye." 
Psalms3:6 Sinzotinya abantu ibihumbi vyinshi Vy’abankikije impande zose kugira ngo bantere. 
Psalms3:7 Uhoraho we, haguruka: Mana yanje we, nkiza: Kuko wakubise abansi banje bose mu musaya, Wahongoye amenyo y’ababi." 
Psalms3:8 Agakiza n’ak’ Uhoraho: Umugisha utanga ube ku bantu bawe. 
Psalms4:1 Unyishure uko ngutakambiye, Mana ukugororoka kwanje gukomokako. Wanshize ahagutse, aho nari nshugerejwe: Ngirira imbabazi, wumve ugusenga kwanje." 
Psalms4:2 Mwa bana b’abantu, muzogeza hehe gutitura icubahiro canje? Muzogeza hehe gukunda ibitagira ikimazi no kwitwaririka ivy’ ibinyoma?." 
Psalms4:3 Ariko mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho yirobanuriye umukunzi wiwe, Uhoraho azonyumva uko ndamutakambiye." 
Psalms4:4 Mwiyubare, ntimukore icaha: Mucuragize mu mitima yanyu muri ku mariri, mucereje." 
Psalms4:5 Mutange ibimazi vy’ukugororoka, Muheze mwishimire Uhoraho." 
Psalms4:6 Hariho benshi babaza, bati Ni nde azogira iciza atwereka? Uhoraho, utwakishirize umuco wo mu nyonga hawe." 
Psalms4:7 Ushize akanyamuneza mu mutima wanje, Karuta ako bagira mu gahimbo k’amahonda na vino vyabo." 
Psalms4:8 Nzokwama ndyama nsinzire ata co nicura, Kukw ari wewe wenyene, Uhoraho, umpa kuba amahoro." 
Psalms5:1 Uhoraho, tegera ugutwi amajambo yanje, Ushire umutima ku majojwa yanje." 
Psalms5:2 Bangira ugutwi ijwi ry’ugutakamba kwanje, Mwami wanje, Mana yanje: Kukw ari wewe nsenga." 
Psalms5:3 Uhoraho, mu gitondo uzokwama wumva ijwi ryanje: Mu gitondo nzokwama nerekeza ugusenga kwanje kuri wewe, nderetse." 
Psalms5:4 Kuk’ utar’ Imana y’intambirakibi; Umunyakibi ntazobana nawe. 
Psalms5:5 Abībona ntibazohagarara mu nyonga zawe: Wanka inkozi z’ibibi zose. 
Psalms5:6 Uzohonnya abanyabinyoma: Uhoraho yanka urunuka umwicanyi n’ingunge. 
Psalms5:7 Ariko jeho, ubginshi bg’imbabazi zawe buzonyinjiza mu ngoro yawe, Nzokwikubita hasi nsenge nkwubashe, nerekeye urusengero rwawe rwera." 
Psalms5:8 Uhoraho we, undōngōre mu kugororoka kwawe, kubg’ abandyamiye, Utumbereze inzira yawe imbere y’amaso yanje." 
Psalms5:9 Kukw ata kuri kuri mu kanwa kabo; Imbere muri bo n’imanga, Imihogo yabo n’imva zirangaye, Bahemanisha indimi zabo." 
Psalms5:10 Mana, batsindishe, Iyabo migabo n’ibatemvye, Ubahinde kubg’ ubginshi bg’ ibicumuro vyabo, Kuko bakugararije." 
Psalms5:11 Ni ho abakwishimiye bazonezerwa, Umunezero uzobatera guhora bashira amajwi hejuru, kuk’ ubakīngiye, Kandi n’abakunda izina ryawe bazonezererwa muri wewe." 
Psalms5:12 Kuk’ uzoha umugororotsi umugisha: Uhoraho uzomukikiza imbabazi nk’inkinzo. 
Psalms6:1 Uhoraho we, ntumpanane uburake, Canke ng’ unkubitane ishavu." 
Psalms6:2 Ungirire imbabazi, Uhoraho, kuko nkabiranye: Uhoraho n’unkize, kukw amagufa yanje atetemera." 
Psalms6:3 Umutima wanje na wo uratetemera cane. Nawe, Uhoraho, mbeg’ uzogeza ryari?" 
Psalms6:4 Ewe Uhoraho garuka, utabare umutima wanje, Unkize kubg’ imbabazi zawe." 
Psalms6:5 Kuk’ utazokwibukirwa mu rupfu; Ni nde azogushimira i kuzimu? 
Psalms6:6 Kuniha kurandambiye; Ukw ijoro ryije ntotesha uburiri bganje amosozi, Uburiri bganje ndayabucuncuburirako." 
Psalms6:7 Nahwereye mu kajisho kubg’ intuntu, Ryakabiranijwe n’abarwanizi banje bose." 
Psalms6:8 Mva i ruhande, mwa bakora ibizira mwe, Kuk’ Uhoraho yumvise ijwi ry’amarira yanje." 
Psalms6:9 Uhoraho yumvise ukwinginga kwanje; Uhoraho azokwemera ugusenga kwanje. 
Psalms6:10 Abansi banje bose bazomāramāra, batetemere cane, Bazosubizwa inyuma, bace bamāramāra." 
Psalms7:1 Uhoraho, Mana yanje, ni wewe mpungirako: Nkiza abampīga bose, ntabara." 
Psalms7:2 Uriya ntanshishimure nk’ intambge, Ngw antabagure ata wo kuntabara." 
Psalms7:3 Uhoraho, Mana yanje, namba naragenjeje ntyo, Namba har’ ukugabitanya mu maboko yanje," 
Psalms7:4 Namb’ uwo twabana amahoro namwihōye inabi, Namba naranyaze umwansi wanje ndamuhōye ubusa," 
Psalms7:5 Umwansi n’ampīge, anshikīre, Ego n’ahonyangire ubugingo bganje mw ivu, N’ashire icubahiro canje mu mukungugu." 
Psalms7:6 Uhoraho we, hagurukana uburake bgawe, Wisidukire kurwanya ubushangashirwe bg’abarwanizi banje, Ni wikangurire kuntabara: ni wewe washinze urubanza." 
Psalms7:7 Ishengero ry’amahanga ni rigukoranireko, Nawe uvyagire iyo hejuru." 
Psalms7:8 Uhoraho acira amahanga imanza: Uhoraho, uncire urubanza rukwiranye no kugororoka kwanje, n’ukuri kuri muri jewe." 
Psalms7:9 Ububi bg’abanyakibi ni bushire, arikw abagororotsi ubashigikire: Kukw Imana igororoka ari yo isesa imitima n’imishaha." 
Psalms7:10 Inkinzo yanje ifashwe n’ Imana, Ni yo ikiza abafise imitima itunganye." 
Psalms7:11 Imana n’umucamanza agororoka, Mbere n’Imana ishavura imisi yose." 
Psalms7:12 Umuntu n’atihana izokarisha inkota yayo; Umuheto wayo imaze kuwufora, irashize mu ruge." 
Psalms7:13 Kand’ imaze kumwitegurira ivyo kumwica, Imyampi yayo iyidometsek’ umuriro." 
Psalms7:14 Ehe rāba, uwo we aramukwa ukugabitanya, Mber’ inda yasamye n’ukugira nabi, avyara ibinyoma." 
Psalms7:15 Yimvye icobo arakibirikiza, Agwa mu mugazo yagazuye." 
Psalms7:16 Kugira nabi kwiwe kuzomugaruka ku mutwe, Umuryano wiwe uzogwa mu gahanga kiwe." 
Psalms7:17 Nzoshima Uhoraho nk’uko bibereye ukugororoka kwiwe, Nzoririmba ntazira izina ry’ Uhoraho asumba vyose." 
Psalms8:1 Uhoraho, Mwami wacu, Ereg’ izina ryawe ni ryiza mw isi yose! Washize icubahiro cawe hejuru y’amajuru." 
Psalms8:2 Akanwa k’abana bato n’ abonka wagahaye gushimangira inkomezi zawe, Gutsindisha abansi bawe, Kugira ng’ uzibize umwansi n’umuhōzi." 
Psalms8:3 Iyo nitegereje ijuru ryawe, igikorwa c’intoke zawe, N’ukwezi n’inyenyeri, ivyo waremye;" 
Psalms8:4 Umuntu n’iki ah’ umwibuka, Cank’ umwana w’umuntu ah’ umugendera?" 
Psalms8:5 Hāri hasigaye gato ukamunganya n’Imana, Umwambika ubgiza n’icubahiro nk’igitsibo." 
Psalms8:6 Wamuhaye kuganza ibikorwa vy’amaboko yawe, Wamuhaye gutwara ibintu vyose, ubishira musi y’ibirenge vyiwe:" 
Psalms8:7 Intama zose n’inka, N’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba na vyo," 
Psalms8:8 N’ibiguruka mu kirēre, n’ifi zo mu kiyaga, N’ikintu cose gica mu nzira zo mu biyaga." 
Psalms8:9 Uhoraho, Mwami wacu, Ereg’ izina ryawe ni ryiza mw isi yose!" 
Psalms9:1 Ndashimisha Uhoraho umutima wanje wose, Nderekana ibikorwa vyawe vyose bitangaza." 
Psalms9:2 Ndakunezererwa, nkiginagura; Ndaririmba ishimwe ry’izina ryawe, wewe Usumba vyose." 
Psalms9:3 Kukw abansi banje basubiye inyuma, Baratsitaye, barandukiye imbere yawe." 
Psalms9:4 Wampagarikiye mu manza zanje no mu miburano yanje, Uvyagiye ku ntebe uca imanza zibereye." 
Psalms9:5 Wakankamiye abanyamahanga, wahoneje ababi, Wasibanganije amazina yabo gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms9:6 Abansi barayogeye, hasigaye imisaka ibihe vyose, N’ibisagara vyabo warabikomvomvoye, Mbere no kwibukwa kwabo kwarazimanganye." 
Psalms9:7 Arik’ Uhoraho aravyagira ibihe vyose, Yiteguriye imanza intebe yiwe." 
Psalms9:8 Azocira isi imanza zibereye, Azoshikiriza amahanga imanza z’ukuri." 
Psalms9:9 Kand’ Uhoraho azoba ubuhungiro bg’abadenderezwa, Azoba ubuhungiro mu bihe vy’amagorwa." 
Psalms9:10 Kand’ abazi izina ryawe bazokwizigira, Kuko wewe, Uhoraho, udahemukira abakurondera." 
Psalms9:11 Uhoraho aba i Siyoni mumuririmbire ishimwe; Mukwize mu mahanga ibikorwa vyiwe. 
Psalms9:12 Kuk’ ūhōra amaraso abibuka, Ntiyibagira ugutakamba kw’ abaciye bugufi." 
Psalms9:13 Uhoraho, ngirira ikigongwe; Urābe umubabaro mbabazwa n’abanyanka, Ni wewe undūgana, ukankūra mu marembo y’urupfu," 
Psalms9:14 Kugira ngo nerekanire ishimwe ryawe ryose Mu marembo y’umukobga w’i Siyoni; Kandi nzonezererwa agakiza kawe. 
Psalms9:15 Abanyamahanga barokeye mu cobo biyimbiye, Mu mutego bateze, ni ho icabo kirenge gifatiwe." 
Psalms9:16 Uhoraho yimenyekanishije, yarashikije imanza: Ategesha umunyakibi ibikorwa vy’intoke ziwe nk’ umutego.." 
Psalms9:17 Abanyakibi bazosubizwa i kuzimu, Mbere n’amahanga yose yibagira Imana." 
Psalms9:18 Kuk’ umukene atazokwama yibagirwa, Kand’ ivyizigiro vy’abaciye bugufi bitazohora birashira." 
Psalms9:19 Haguruka, Uhoraho we, abantu boye kuba ari bo bagira inganji; Amahanga n’acirwekw iteka mu nyonga zawe." 
Psalms9:20 Uhoraho, n’ubatere ubgoba; Amahanga yimenye kw ar’ abantu buntu." 
Psalms10:1 N’iki gitumye uhagarara kure, Uhoraho we? N’iki gitumye wihisha mu bihe vy’amarushwa?" 
Psalms10:2 Ubgibone bg’umunyakibi butuma akinagiza umugorwa; N’agwe mu mutego w’imigabo yīgīriye. 
Psalms10:3 Kuk’ umunyakibi yishimagiriza ivyo umutima wiwe wifuza, Kand’ umunyegono yikunkumura Uhoraho, kand’ akamukēngēra." 
Psalms10:4 Umunyakibi kubg’ ubgibone bgiwe aravuga, at’ Eka ntazohōra. Ivyiyumviro vyiwe vyose bihūrira mur’ iri jambo, ngo Nta Mana iriho." 
Psalms10:5 Mu nzira ziwe zose nta co yinona. Amateka yawe ari hejuru cane, arenze ah’ ijisho ryiwe rishika: Abansi biwe bose arabakanira." 
Psalms10:6 Yibgira mu mutima, ati Nta kizonsegenyesha; Kugeza ibihe vyose sinzokwigera mpīndāna." 
Psalms10:7 Akanwa kiwe kuzuye imivumo n’ubugunge n’akadenderezo; Musi y’ururimi rwiwe har’ ukugira nabi n’ukugabitanya. 
Psalms10:8 Yicara mu bibundo vyo mu mihana, Mu biryamo ni ho yicira abatagira igicumuro: Amaso yiwe ayatatisha umurushwa." 
Psalms10:9 Abunda mu kiryamo nk’ukw intambge ibunda mw isenga ryayo, Abundira gucakira umworo: Acakira umworo, akamukwegesha umugozi yamuteze." 
Psalms10:10 Abunda, amase hasi, Abahizi biwe batūra hasi umurushwa." 
Psalms10:11 Yibgira mu mutima, at’ Imana yibagiye: Yipfutse mu nyonga hayo, ntizokwigera ibibona." 
Psalms10:12 Kūra hasi, Uhoraho we; Mana, urāmvure ukuboko kwawe; Ntiwibagire ūciye bugufi." 
Psalms10:13 N’iki gituma umunyakibi akēngēra Imana, Akayibaririra mu mutima, ati Ntuzohōra?" 
Psalms10:14 Warabibonye, kuk’ urāba ukugira nabi n’inzigo, kugira ng’ ubishire mu kuboko kwawe; Umurushwa yegamira wewe wenyene; Ni wewe mutabazi w’impfuvyi." 
Psalms10:15 Vunagura ukuboko kw’umunyakibi, Utōte ububi bg’umubi, gushitsa ah’ utazobumusangana." 
Psalms10:16 Uhoraho ni we Mwami ibihe bitazoshira, Abanyamahanga bārandukiye mu gihugu ciwe." 
Psalms10:17 Uhoraho, wumvise ivyo abaciye bugufi bagomba: Uzokomeza imitima yabo, uzohora ubanze ugutwi," 
Psalms10:18 Kugira ng’ucire urubanza impfuvyi n’abadenderezwa, Umuntu wo mw ivu yoye gusubira gutera ubgoba." 
Psalms11:1 Uhoraho ni we mpungirako. Mubaririra iki umutima wanje, Muti Hungira ku musozi wanyu nk’inyoni?" 
Psalms11:2 Kukw abanyakibi bariko barafora umuheto, Bashira umwampi mu ruge, Kugira ngo barasire mu mwiza abafise imitima itunganye." 
Psalms11:3 Namb’ amatanguriro asambuwe, Ivyo umugororotsi yakoze vyapfuye iki?" 
Psalms11:4 Uhoraho ari mu rusengero rwiwe rwera, Uhoraho, intebe yiwe iri mw ijuru. Acacisha inyonga ziwe abana b’abantu, mu kigohe ciwe harabasuzuma." 
Psalms11:5 Uhoraho asuzuma abagororotsi: Arik’ umunyakibi n’ūkunda umuryano, umutima wiwe urabanka." 
Psalms11:6 Abanyakibi azobarekurirakw amakara yaka n’amazuku; Umuyaga w’indugumba uzoba umugabane mu gikombe cabo. 
Psalms11:7 Kuk’ Uhoraho ar’ umugororotsi, kand’ akunda ivyo kugororoka, Abatunganye bazorāba mu nyonga hiwe." 
Psalms12:1 Uhoraho we, tabara: kukw abakwubaha baheze, Abo kwizigirwa bakennye mu bana b’abantu." 
Psalms12:2 Bose barabeshana, umuntu wese na mugenzi we: Bavugisha iminwa ihemana n’imitima ibiri." 
Psalms12:3 Uhoraho azokūrah’ iminwa yose ihemana, N’ururimi rwihayagiza:" 
Psalms12:4 Abāvuze, bati Tuzotsindisha indimi zacu, Iminwa yacu kw ar’ iyacu: ūtuganza ni nde?" 
Psalms12:5 Kubgo kunyagwa kw’umugorwa, kubgo kwitsa umutima kw’umukene, Ubu nyene ndahaguruka, ni k’Uhoraho agize, Ndashira uwo bakanira ahatagira inkomanzi." 
Psalms12:6 Amajambo y’Uhoraho n’icuma gihiye: Ameze nk’ifeza iramuriye mu ruganda rwo mw isi, Ivugutiwe ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Psalms12:7 Uhoraho, uzotuzigama, Uzodukiza ab’ iki gihe ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms12:8 Abanyakibi bayerera impande zose, Iyo hashizwe hejuru abantu b’imburakimazi mu bana b’abantu." 
Psalms13:1 Uhoraho, uzogeza hehe kwama unyibagira imisi yose? Uzogeza hehe kumpisha mu nyonga hawe?" 
Psalms13:2 Nzogeza hehe kwīgīra inama mu mutima wanje, Mfise umubabaro mu mushaha wanje bukarinda bgira? Umwansi wanje azogeza hehe kumpagarara hejuru?" 
Psalms13:3 Vyitegereze, unyishure, ewe Uhoraho, Mana yanje, Kubitisha akagohe amaso yanje, noye gusinzira itiro ry’urupfu." 
Psalms13:4 Umwansi wanje yoye kuvuga ngo Ndamunesheje: Abarwanizi banje boye kunyitambishwa hejuru n’uko nsegenyeshejwe. 
Psalms13:5 Ariko nizigiye imbabazi zawe; Umutima wanje uzonezererwa agakiza kawe. 
Psalms13:6 Ndaririmbira Uhoraho, Kuko yangiriye neza." 
Psalms14:1 Igipfapfa cibgira mu mutima, ngo Nta Mana iriho. Bārononekaye, bākoze ibikorwa vyo kwankwa urunuka, Nta wukora ivyiza." 
Psalms14:2 Uhoraho acishirīza mu bantu, ari mw ijuru, Kugira ngw arābe ko harimw’ abatāhūra, Barondera Imana." 
Psalms14:3 Barazimiye iyo bava bakagera, bose banduye hamwe, Nta wukora ivyiza, eka nta n’umwe." 
Psalms14:4 Mbeg’ inkozi z’ibibi zose nta bgenge zifise? Ko barya abantu banje nk’ uko barya umutsima, Kandi ntibambaza Uhoraho." 
Psalms14:5 Aho nyene bahagiriye ubgoba bginshi; Kukw Imana iri mu bgoko bg’abagororotsi. 
Psalms14:6 Imigabo y’umugorwa murayitētereza, Arik’ Uhoraho n’ubuhungiro bgiwe." 
Psalms14:7 Icompa agakiza k’Abisirayeli kakaba kaje kava i Siyoni! Uhoraho ni yasubizay’ ubgoko bgiwe bgajanywe ar’ inyagano, Ni ho aba Yakobo bazohimbarwa, Abisirayeli bakanezerwa." 
Psalms15:1 Uhoraho, ni nde azosembera mw ihema ryawe? Ni nde azogerēra ku musozi wawe wera?" 
Psalms15:2 N’ūgendera mu bitunganye, agakora ivy’ ukugororoka, Akavuga ukuri mu mutima wiwe." 
Psalms15:3 Ūtarementanisha ururimi rwiwe, Ntagirire nabi mugenzi we, Ntakaze inkuru y’umubanyi wiwe." 
Psalms15:4 Mu maso yiwe igihumbu kirakēngēretse, Ariko yubaha abatinya Uhoraho; Ico yarahiye naho comugirira nabi, ntiyirahuruza." 
Psalms15:5 Ntagurānira amahera kuzohabga ay’ inyungu, Ntiyemera ingurire yo gutsindisha ūfise urubanza. Ūgenza artyo nta kizomunyiganyiza." 
Psalms16:1 Mana unzigame: kukw ari wewe mpungiyeko. 
Psalms16:2 Nabariye Uhoraho, nti Ni wewe Mwami wanje, Nta mugisha mfise atari wewe." 
Psalms16:3 Abera bo mw isi Ni bo ntōre nnezererwa bonyene. 
Psalms16:4 Amagorwa y’abakāba Uhoraho iyindi mana azogwira, Ibimazi vyazo vy’amaraso sinzobihereza ngo ndabisuke, Kand’ amazina yazo sinzoyavugisha iminwa yanje." 
Psalms16:5 Uhoraho ni we mugabane w’umwandu wanje n’uw’ igikombe canje, Ni wewe ukomeza umugabane wanje." 
Psalms16:6 Ubupfindo bgankubitiye amabango ahantu heza, Ni koko, mfise umwandu mwiza." 
Psalms16:7 Ndahimbaza Uhoraho, umujanama wanje; Ni koko, umushaha wanje umpanūra mu bihe vy’ ijoro." 
Psalms16:8 Nashize Uhoraho imbere yanje imisi yose; Kukw ar’ i buryo bganje sinzonyiganyizwa. 
Psalms16:9 Ni co gituma umutima wanje uhimbarwa, ubgiza bganje bukanezerwa, Kandi n’umubiri wanje uzoba ahatagira inkomanzi." 
Psalms16:10 Kuk’ utazoreka ubugingo bganje ngo buje i kuzimu, Kandi ntuzokundira Uwera wawe ngw az’ abore." 
Psalms16:11 Uzondangira inzira y’ubugingo: Mu nyonga hawe ni ho har’ akanyamuneza kuzuye; Mu kuboko kwawe kw’i buryo hahora ibihimbaye ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms17:1 Uhoraho we, umviriza ivy’ ukuri vyanje, bangira ugutwi ugutakamba kwanje, Tegera ugutwi ugusenga kwanje, kutava mu minwa iryarya." 
Psalms17:2 Urubanza rwanje ni ruve imbere yawe, Inyonga zawe ni zirābe ibibereye." 
Psalms17:3 Wagerageje umutima wanje, wangendeye mw ijoro; Waransuzumye, ntiwambonamw’ imigabo mibi; Akanwa kanje ntigacumura." 
Psalms17:4 Ku ruhande rw’ibikorwa vy’ abantu, jeho kwitondera ijambo ry’iminwa yawe Ni kwo kwampaye kwirinda inzira z’abantu b’ikirara." 
Psalms17:5 Intambuko zanje zishikamye mu nzira zawe, Ibirenge vyanje ntibinyerera." 
Psalms17:6 Ndakwambaje, kuk’ utobura kunyishura, Mana: Ntegera ugutwi, wumve ivyo mvuga." 
Psalms17:7 Erekana imbabazi zawe zitangaza, wewe ukiza abaguhungirako kubg’ abarwanizi babo, Ubakirishije ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo." 
Psalms17:8 Unzigame nk’imbone y’ijisho, Umpishe mu gitūtu c’amababa yawe," 
Psalms17:9 Umpishe abanyakibi bannyaga, Ni bo babisha banje bankikije." 
Psalms17:10 Bugaye imitima yabo kugira ngw ikigongwe nticinjire, Akanwa kabo bakavugisha ubgibone." 
Psalms17:11 None bakikije intambuko zacu, Baduhanze amaso kugira ngo badutūre hasi." 
Psalms17:12 Bameze nk’intambge ifise amero y’ico yofata; Nk’umugunza w’intambge, utegeye mu bibundo." 
Psalms17:13 Uhoraho we, haguruka, Ubahagarare mu ruhanga, ubatūre hasi. Ukize umutima wanje umunyakibi, uwukirishije inkota yawe;" 
Psalms17:14 Uhoraho, uwukize abantu, uwukirishije ukuboko kwawe; Ni bo bantu b’isi, umugabane wabo uri mur’ ubu bugingo. Inda zabo ziragahāga ivyo wababīkiye, Abana babo barakabihāga, Barakabisigariza n’ibibondo vyabo!" 
Psalms17:15 Jeho nzorāba mu nyonga hawe ngororoka, Nikanguye nzonyurwa n’ ishusho yawe." 
Psalms18:1 Ndagukunda, Uhoraho we, ni wewe nkomezi zanje." 
Psalms18:2 Uhoraho n’igitandara canje, n’ubuhungiro bganje, n’ umurokozi wanje, N’Imana yanje, n’igitandara canje gikomeye, ni we nzohungirako; Ni we nkinzo yanje, n’ihembe ry’agakiza kanje, n’umunara wanje wo guhungiramwo." 
Psalms18:3 Ndambaza Uhoraho abereye gushimwa: Ni ho nzokizwa abansi banje. 
Psalms18:4 Ingoyi z’urupfu zaranyizingiriyeko, Isūri zo kurandura zanteye ubgoba." 
Psalms18:5 Ingoyi z’i kuzimu zantaye hagati, Imitego y’urupfu yantanze imbere." 
Psalms18:6 Mu mubabaro wanje nambaje Uhoraho, Natakambiye Imana yanje; Yumva ijwi ryanje iri mu ngoro yayo, Ivyo natakambiye imbere yayo biyishika mu matwi." 
Psalms18:7 Maz’ isi iratigita, ihinda agashitsi, Amatanguriro y’imisozi na yo aranyiganyiga, Atigitishwa n’uburake bgayo." 
Psalms18:8 Umwotsi upfunduka mu mazuru yayo, Umuriro uva mu kanwa kayo, urayigiza, Amakara afatishwa na wo." 
Psalms18:9 Yandaza ijuru, na yo nyene iramanuka, Umwiza w’umuzitanya wari musi y’ibirenge vyayo." 
Psalms18:10 Iguruka ivyagiye ku mukerubi, Mber’ igurukishwa vuba n’ amababa y’umuyaga." 
Psalms18:11 Umwiza iwugira ubgihisho, kuba ihema ryayo riyisāgiriye; Isāgīrwa n’umwiza w’ibicu bibungenze amazi, ibicu bitwaye intunda vyo mw ijuru." 
Psalms18:12 Ubgiza bukayangana bur’ imbere yayo butuma ibicu vyayo bitwaye intunda bikinjura, Hakaba urubura n’amakara yaka." 
Psalms18:13 Kand’ Uhoraho aturagarira mw ijuru, Ūsumba vyose avugisha ijwi ryiwe, Hakaba urubura n’amakara yaka." 
Psalms18:14 Arasa imyampi yiwe, ashwiragiza abansi banje, Arekura imiravyo myinshi, abaca umuhongo." 
Psalms18:15 Maz’ agataka ko musi y’amazi karaboneka, Amatanguriro y’isi aratwikururwa, Bitewe n’uguhana kwawe, Uhoraho, N’ugufūha kw’impwemu ziva mu mazuru yawe." 
Psalms18:16 Atuma ukuboko ari hejuru, aramfata, Andoba mu mazi menshi." 
Psalms18:17 Ankiza umwansi wanje akomeye, N’abanyanka, kuko bandusha inkomezi." 
Psalms18:18 Bari bantanze imbere ku musi w’amagorwa yanje, Arik’ Uhoraho ni we yambereye ubgishimikizo." 
Psalms18:19 Ayankūramwo, anshira ahantu hāgutse: Yandokoye kuko namuhimbaye." 
Psalms18:20 Uhoraho yangereye ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje, Nk’ukw amaboko yanje atanduye, ni ko yangiriye." 
Psalms18:21 Kuko nitondeye inzira z’ Uhoraho, Kandi sinakoze icaha co kureka Imana yanje:" 
Psalms18:22 Kukw amateka yayo yose yar’ imbere yanje, Kand’ ivyagezwe vyayo sinabikūye imbere yanje." 
Psalms18:23 Kandi nabana na yo ntungana, Nirinze ukugabitanya kwanje." 
Psalms18:24 Ni co catumye Uhoraho anyishura ibikwiranye n’ukugororoka kwanje, Ibikwiranye n’ukutandura kw’ amaboko yanje mu nyonga ziwe." 
Psalms18:25 Ku munyembabazi uzokwiyerekana ur’ umunyembabazi; K’ūtunganye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtunganye; 
Psalms18:26 K’ūtanduye uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūtanduye; Ku ntabarirwa uzokwiyerekana ur’ ūdadika. 
Psalms18:27 Kuk’ uzokiza abacishijwe bugufi, Arikw amaso yibona uzoyasubiza hasi." 
Psalms18:28 Ni wewe uzodomeka itara ryanje, Uhoraho, Imana yanje, ni we yākira umwiza wanje." 
Psalms18:29 Kukw ari wewe unshoboza gutera umuce w’ingabo, Kand’ ar’ Imana yanje inshoboza gusimba uruzitiro rw’ amabuye." 
Psalms18:30 Imana yo, inzira yayo iratunganye rwose, Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaravugutiwe: Ni we nkinzo ikīngira abamuhungirako bose." 
Psalms18:31 Ni nde Mana, atar’ Uhoraho? Ni nde Gitandara, atar’ Imana yacu?" 
Psalms18:32 Ni yo Mana inkenyeje inkomezi, Igatunganya inzira yanje." 
Psalms18:33 Ni yo ihindura ibirenge vyanje nk’ivy’ impongokazi, Impagarika ku dutwe tw’imisozi yanje." 
Psalms18:34 Yigisha intoke zanje kurasana, Bituma amaboko yanje afora umuheto w’umuringa." 
Psalms18:35 Kandi wampaye inkinzo, ni yo gakiza kawe, Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kurandamira, Ukwicisha bugufi kwawe kwanshize hejuru." 
Psalms18:36 Intambuko zanje wazāguriye inzira, Ibirenge vyanje ntivyanyereye." 
Psalms18:37 Nakinagije abansi banje, ndabahamvya, Sinatabaruka badaheze." 
Psalms18:38 Narabatobekeranije, ntibabasha kuvyuka, Kandi bāguye musi y’ibirenge vyanje." 
Psalms18:39 Wankenyeje inkomezi ngo ndwane, Abarwanizi banje wabamaze igabo." 
Psalms18:40 Watumye ababisha banje bampa ibitugu, Kugira ngo ndandure abanyanka." 
Psalms18:41 Baratakamvye, ntihagira ūbakiza; Batakambiye Uhoraho, ntiyabishura." 
Psalms18:42 Maze ndabasya, bacika nk’ umukungugu utumurwa n’ umuyaga, Mbata nk’umwavu ku nzira." 
Psalms18:43 Wankijije indwano z’abantu, Wangize ūganza amahanga, Ihanga ntigeze kumenya ryaransavye." 
Psalms18:44 Bumvise inkuru yanje baca baranyoboka, Abanyamahanga baje banyunamira bampema." 
Psalms18:45 Abanyamahanga barakabiranye, Bava mu binyegero vyabo bahinda agashitsi." 
Psalms18:46 Uhoraho yamaho; Igitandara canje gihimbazwe; Imana y’agakiza kanje ishirwe hejuru: 
Psalms18:47 Ni yo Mana impōra, Ikangandūrira amahanga nkayaganza." 
Psalms18:48 Inkiza ababisha banje: Mber’ unshira hejuru y’abampagurukira, Unkiza n’umuntu w’ikirara." 
Psalms18:49 Ni co gituma, Uhoraho, nzogushimira mu mahanga, Ndirimbe ishimwe ry’izina ryawe." 
Psalms18:50 Umwami yimitse amugabira agakiza gakomeye, Agirira imbabazi umwami yimikishije amavuta, Ni Dawidi n’uruvyaro rwiwe ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms19:1 Ijuru ritāngāza icubahiro c’Imana, Itāzānure ryaryo rimenyekanisha igikorwa c’intoke zayo." 
Psalms19:2 Umurango uvugana n’uwundi murango urudaca, Ijoro rimenyesha irindi joro ubgenge." 
Psalms19:3 Nta majambo cank’ ururimi biriho, Ijwi ryavyo ntiryumvikana." 
Psalms19:4 Umugozi ubigera ushika mw isi yose, Bo n’amajambo yavyo ku mpera y’isi. Muri vyo yashingiye izuba ihema," 
Psalms19:5 Rimeze nk’umukwe asohoka ava mu nzu i we, Rinezerwa nk’umunyenkomezi ryiruka mu nzira yaryo." 
Psalms19:6 Riturumbuka riva ku mpera y’ijuru, Rikajana inzira ishika ku yindi mpera yaryo, Nta kintu gihishwa indugumba yaryo." 
Psalms19:7 Ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho biratunganye rwose, bihēmbūra ubugingo, Ivyo Uhoraho yashingiye intahe n’ivyo kwizerwa, biha umutungu ubgenge." 
Psalms19:8 Ivyagezwe Uhoraho yigisha biragororotse, binezereza umutima, Ivyo Uhoraho yageze n’ibitanduye, bihwejesha amaso." 
Psalms19:9 Ukwubaha Uhoraho kuratunganye, kwamah’ ibihe bidashira, Amateka y’Uhoraho n’ay’ ukuri, aragororotse rwose." 
Psalms19:10 N’ivyo kwifuzwa kuruta izahabu, naho zoba izahabu, nyinshi zitarimw’ inkamba: Bisōsa kurusha ubūki, n’umutsāma w’ikigigu utonyanga." 
Psalms19:11 Kandi ni vyo bibūrira umusavyi wawe; Kuvyitondera harimw’ impēra nini. 
Psalms19:12 Ni nde ashobora kwimenyakw amafuti? Ntumparūrekw ivyaha vyanyinyegeje. 
Psalms19:13 Kandi wame uzigama umusavyi wawe sinze nkore ivyaha ibigirankana, Ntibize binganze: ni ho nzobona gutungana rwose, Sinzotsindwa n’urubanza rw’ icaha gikomeye." 
Psalms19:14 Amajambo yo mu kanwa kanje, n’ivyiyumviro vyo mu mutima wanje, bize bishimwe mu nyonga zawe, Uhoraho, gitandara canje, mucunguzi wanje." 
Psalms20:1 Uhoraho akwishure ku musi w’amagorwa, Izina ry’Imana ya Yakobo rigushire hejuru;" 
Psalms20:2 Ikurungikire ugutabarwa kuva ahēra h’urusengero, Iguhe inkomezi ziva i Siyoni." 
Psalms20:3 Yibuke amashikanwa yawe yose, Yākīre ikimazi cawe coshejwe." 
Psalms20:4 Iguhe ico umutima wawe wifuza, Ishitse inama zawe zose." 
Psalms20:5 Tuzovugishwa impundu n’ agakiza kawe, Kandi kubg’ izina ry’Imana yacu tuzokwerekana amabendera yacu. Uhoraho ashitse ivy’ usaba vyose." 
Psalms20:6 None mmenye yuk’ Uhoraho akiza uwo yarobanuje amavuta, Azomwishura, ari mw ijuru ryiwe ryera, Azomwishurisha ubushobozi bukiza bg’ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo." 
Psalms20:7 Bamwe bizigira imikogote, abandi bizigira amafarasi, Ariko tweho tuzokwizigira izina ry’Uhoraho, Imana yacu." 
Psalms20:8 Barunamye, baratemvye; Ariko tweho tuvuye hasi, turēmye." 
Psalms20:9 Uhoraho, kiza umwami: Kand’ utwishure uko tukwambaje." 
Psalms21:1 Uhoraho we! Umwami azonezerezwa n’inkomezi zawe. Ereg’ agakiza kawe azokanezererwa cane! 
Psalms21:2 Wamuhaye ico umutima wiwe wifuza, Ntiwamwimye ico iminwa yiwe yasavye." 
Psalms21:3 Kuk’ umusanganije imigisha y’ivyiza, Wamwambitse igitsibo c’izahabu nziza mu mutwe." 
Psalms21:4 Yagusavye ubugingo, urabumuha, Ni bgo kuramba ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms21:5 Ubgiza bgiwe ni bginshi kubg’ agakiza kawe, Icubahiro n’igitinyiro ubimushizeko." 
Psalms21:6 Umugize icitegererezo c’ihirwe ibihe vyose, Umunejereje akaneza mu nyonga zawe." 
Psalms21:7 Kuk’ umwami yizigira Uhoraho, Kubg’ imbabazi z’Ūsumba vyose ntazosegenyeshwa." 
Psalms21:8 Ukuboko kwawe kuzoserangura ababisha bawe bose; Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kuzoserangura abakwanka. 
Psalms21:9 Uzobahindura nk’itanure ry’ umuriro mu gihe c’uburake bgawe, Uhoraho azobayongobeza mu burake bgiwe, Umuriro uzobatsontsomera." 
Psalms21:10 Nawe uzohonnya imbuto zabo mw isi, N’uruvyaro rwabo mu bana b’abantu." 
Psalms21:11 Kuko bagabiye kukugirira nabi, Bagīye inama badashobora gushitsa." 
Psalms21:12 Uzotuma bagutera ibitugu, Uzoshira mu ruge rwawe utumbereje mu maso habo." 
Psalms21:13 Uhoraho, ni wishire hejuru mu nkomezi zawe: Ni ho tuzoririmba dushima ububasha bgawe." 
Psalms22:1 Mana yanje, Mana yanje, n’iki kikumpebesheje, Ukaba kure ntuntabare, kure y’amajambo yo kuniha kwanje?" 
Psalms22:2 Mana yanje, ntakambira ku murango ntunyishure: Ntakambira no mw ijoro, simpore." 
Psalms22:3 Ariko wewe ur’ uwera, Intebe yawe ikikijwe n’ishimwe rya Isirayeli." 
Psalms22:4 Ba sogokuruza bacu bārakwizigira: Bārakwizigira, nawe ukabakiza." 
Psalms22:5 Bāragutakambira, bagakizwa: Bārakwizigira, ntibamāramāre." 
Psalms22:6 Ariko jeho nd’umusiba, sind’ umuntu: Ndi ruvumwa mu bantu, nkēngērwa na bose." 
Psalms22:7 Abambona bose bantwengera mw ijigo: Bampa ibinoko, banzunguriza imitwe," 
Psalms22:8 Bati Yishize k’Uhoraho, n’ amukize: N’amukize kw amunezererwa." 
Psalms22:9 Ariko ni wewe wankūye mu nda ya mama: Wanyijigije nkiri kw ibere rya mama. 
Psalms22:10 Ni wewe nashiburiweko, uhereye aho navukiye; Ni wewe Mana yanje uhereye aho naviriye mu nda ya mama." 
Psalms22:11 Ntumbe kure, kukw amagorwa ari hafi, Kand’ ata mutabazi." 
Psalms22:12 Impfizi nyinshi zirankikije, Impfizi z’ubukombe z’i Bashani zintaye hagati." 
Psalms22:13 Baranyasamiye n’akanwa kabo, Nk’intambge yaromoye yivuga." 
Psalms22:14 Nsutswe nk’amazi, Amagufa yanje yose aradohotse, Umutima wanje umeze nk’ ishashara, Uyagiye hagati mu mara yanje." 
Psalms22:15 Intege zanje zumye nk’urujo, Ururimi rwanje rufatanye n’ uruhekenyero; Kand’ unshize mu mukungugu w’urupfu." 
Psalms22:16 Kukw imbga zinkikije, Umurwi w’inkozi z’ibibi wantaye hagati; Bantoboye ibiganza n’ibirenge." 
Psalms22:17 Nshobora guharūra amagufa yanje yose; Bandāba bankanuriye amaso. 
Psalms22:18 Bagabura impuzu zanje, Bapfindira umwambaro wanje." 
Psalms22:19 Ariko ntumbe kure, Uhoraho we: Yewe muvunyi wanje, tebuka untabare." 
Psalms22:20 Kiza ubugingo bganje inkota, Ico mfitiye igishika ugikize ububasha bg’imbga." 
Psalms22:21 Nkiza akanwa k’intambge; Waranyishuye, unkūra mu mahembe y’imbogo." 
Psalms22:22 Nzobarira bene Data izina ryawe, Nzogutazirira hagati y’ishengero." 
Psalms22:23 Yemwe abubaha Uhoraho, mumutazire, Yemwe ruvyaro rwa Yakobo mwese, mumuhimbaze, Yemwe ruvyaro rwa Isirayeli mwese, mumutinye." 
Psalms22:24 Kukw atāgaye cank’ atanse urunuka amarushwa y’umurushwa, Kand’ atāmuhishije mu nyonga hiwe: Arikw amutakambiye, yaramwumvise." 
Psalms22:25 Ishimwe ngushimisha mw ikoraniro ryinshi riva kuri wewe: Nzoshitsa amasezerano nagusezeraniye imbere y’abakwubaha. 
Psalms22:26 Abaciye bugufi bazorya bahāge, Abarondera Uhoraho bazomuhimbaza: Imitima yanyu irambe ibihe vyose." 
Psalms22:27 Abo ku mpera zose z’isi bazokwibuka bahindukirire Uhoraho, Amoko yose yo mu mahanga azosengera imbere yawe." 
Psalms22:28 Kuk’ ubgami ar’ ubg’ Uhoraho, Kand’ ari we mugabe w’amahanga." 
Psalms22:29 Abakomeye bo mw isi bose bazorya basenge; Kand’ abamanuka baja mu mukungugu bazokwunama imbere yiwe, N’ūdashobora kwizigamira ubugingo bgiwe ngo ntibupfe." 
Psalms22:30 Uruvyaro ruzomusaba; Abuzukuru bazovuka bazobarirwa ivy’ Umwami Imana. 
Psalms22:31 Bazoza babgire abantu bazovuka Ukugororoka kwiwe, kw ari we yabikoze." 
Psalms23:1 Uhoraho ni we mwungere wanje, sinzokena." 
Psalms23:2 Amvyagiza mu canya c’ubgatsi butotahaye: Andōngōrera i ruhande y’ amazi adasūma: 
Psalms23:3 Aremesha umutima wanje. Anyobora mu nzira zo kugororoka kubg’ izina ryiwe. 
Psalms23:4 Mbere naho noca mu mwonga w’igitūtu c’urupfu Sinzogira ikibi ntinya; kuk’ uri kumwe nanje: Inyobozo yawe n’ubuhiri bgawe ni vyo bimpumuriza. 
Psalms23:5 Untegurira ameza mu maso y’abansi banje; Wansīze amavuta mu mutwe; igikombe canje kirasēsekaye. 
Psalms23:6 N’ukuri ivyiza n’imbabazi bizonyomako imisi yose y’ ukubaho kwanje, Nanje nzoba mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ibihe vyose." 
Psalms24:1 Isi n’iy’ Uhoraho, n’ibiyuzuye, Isi n’abayibamwo." 
Psalms24:2 Kukw ari we yashize amatanguriro yayo ku biyaga, Yayihamangiye ku mazi menshi." 
Psalms24:3 Ni nde azodūga umusozi w’ Uhoraho? Ni nde azohagarara ahēra hiwe? 
Psalms24:4 N’ūfise amaboko akeye n’umutima utanduye, Atigeze kwerekeza umushaha wiwe ku vy’ukubesha, Ntarahire ibinyoma." 
Psalms24:5 Uwo ni we azohabga umugisha n’Uhoraho, N’ukugororoka azoguharūrwako n’Imana y’agakiza kiwe." 
Psalms24:6 Abayirondera ni ben’ uwo muntu, Abarondera mu nyonga hawe, Mana ya Yakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Ni mwīgire birebire, mwa birimba, Musegenye, mwa nzugi z’ ibihe vyose, ngo hāguke, Umwami w’ubgiza ngw ashike." 
Psalms24:8 Uwo Mwami w’ubgiza ni nde? N’Uhoraho afise inkomezi n’ ubutōre, N’Uhoraho afise ubutōre mu ntambara." 
Psalms24:9 Ni mwīgire birebire, mwa birimba, Musegenye, mwa nzugi z’ ibihe vyose, ngo hāguke, Umwami w’ubgiza ngw ashike." 
Psalms24:10 Uwo Mwami w’ubgiza ni nde? Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo Ni we Mwami w’ubgiza. 
Psalms25:1 Uhoraho, ni wewe ncurūrira umutima." 
Psalms25:2 Mana yanje, ni wewe nizigiye, Noye kumāramāra, Abansi banje boye kunyihaya." 
Psalms25:3 Ni koko, abakwiteze nta wuzomāramāra: Abahemuka ata nyanduruko ni bo bazomāramāra." 
Psalms25:4 Uhoraho, nyereka inzira zawe, Nyigisha amarango yawe." 
Psalms25:5 Undōngōre mu kuri kwawe, unyigishe: Kukw ari wewe Mana y’agakiza kanje; Ni wewe nirirwa niteze." 
Psalms25:6 Uhoraho we, ibuka imbabazi zawe no kugira neza kwawe, Kuko vyahozeho, uhereye kera hose." 
Psalms25:7 Ntiwibuke ivyaha vyo mu busore bganje, cank’ ibicumuro vyanje, Nk’ukw imbabazi zawe ziri, abe ari k’unyibuka, Kubgo kugira neza kwawe, Uhoraho." 
Psalms25:8 Uhoraho ni mwiza, aragororotse: Ni co gituma azorangira abanyavyaha inzira." 
Psalms25:9 Abīcisha bugufi azobarōngōra mu vy’ukugororoka, Abīcisha bugufi azobarangira inzira yiwe." 
Psalms25:10 Inzira zose z’Uhoraho n’ imbabazi n’ukuri Ku bitondera isezerano ryiwe n’ibishingantahe vyiwe. 
Psalms25:11 Uhoraho we, kubg’ izina ryawe Umparire ukugabitanya kwanje, kuko gukomeye." 
Psalms25:12 Umuntu yubaha Uhoraho ni nde? Azomurangira inzira akwiye guhitamwo. 
Psalms25:13 Umutima wiwe uzoba amahoro, Uruvyaro rwiwe ruzoragwa isi." 
Psalms25:14 Ibanga ry’Uhoraho rifiswe n’abamwubaha, Azobereka isezerano ryiwe." 
Psalms25:15 Amaso yanje ahora ahanze k’Uhoraho, Kukw azokūra ibirenge vyanje mu mutego." 
Psalms25:16 Umpindukirire, ungirire ikigongwe, Kuko ntagira shinge na rugero, ndagowe." 
Psalms25:17 Imibabaro y’umutima wanje uyiruhure, Nkūra se mu marushwa yanje." 
Psalms25:18 Witegereze umubabaro wanje n’umuruho, Umparire ivyaha vyanje vyose." 
Psalms25:19 Witegereze abansi banje, kukw ari benshi, Kandi banyanka urwanko rw’ inkazi." 
Psalms25:20 Zigama umutima wanje, unkize: Noye kumāramāra, kuko nguhungiyeko." 
Psalms25:21 Ukugororoka n’ugutungana binzigame, Kuko nkwiteze." 
Psalms25:22 Mana, cungura Abisirayeli, Ubakūre mu marushwa yabo yose." 
Psalms26:1 Uhoraho, uncire urubanza, kuk’ ukugororoka kwanje ari kwo ngenderamwo, Kandi nizigira Uhoraho ntakekeranya." 
Psalms26:2 Uhoraho, unsuzume, ungerageze, Sesa umushaha wanje n’umutima wanje." 
Psalms26:3 Kukw imbabazi zawe ziri mu maso yanje, Kandi ngendera mu kuri kwawe." 
Psalms26:4 Sinicarana n’abanyabinyoma, Kandi sinzogendera indyarya." 
Psalms26:5 Nanka ikoraniro ry’inkozi z’ ibibi, Kandi sinzokwicarana n’abanyakibi." 
Psalms26:6 Nzokaraba mu kudacumura, Ni ho nzobona gukikuza igicaniro cawe, Uhoraho;" 
Psalms26:7 Kugira ngo numvikanishe ijwi ry’ishimwe, Mvuge ibikorwa bitangaje vyose wakoze." 
Psalms26:8 Uhoraho, nkunda ah’ inzu yawe igerereye, Ahantu ubgiza bgawe buba." 
Psalms26:9 Nturandurane umutima wanje n’abanyavyaha, Cank’ ubugingo bganje n’ abavisha amaraso." 
Psalms26:10 Amaboko yabo arimw’ umugararizo, Ukuboko kwabo kw’i buryo kwuzuye ingurire." 
Psalms26:11 Ariko jeho ukugororoka kwanje ni kwo nzogenderamwo; Uncungure, ungirire ikigongwe." 
Psalms26:12 Ikirenge canje gihagaze aharinganiye; Nzoshemagiriza Uhoraho mu makoraniro. 
Psalms27:1 Uhoraho ni we muco wanje n’agakiza kanje: nzotinya nde? Uhoraho ni we gihome gikīngira ubugingo bganje, ni nde azonca ivutu?" 
Psalms27:2 Hamwe inkozi z’ibibi zari zinziye ngo zirye inyama zanje, Ni bo barwanizi banje n’ababisha banje, bāratsitaye, baratemba." 
Psalms27:3 Nah’ ingabo zosagaza ngo zintere, Umutima wanje ntiwotinya; Nah’ intambara yovyuka ikandwanya, No muri yo norema." 
Psalms27:4 Ico nsaba Uhoraho ni kimwe, ni co nzohora nitwaririka: N’ukuba mu ngoro y’Uhoraho imisi yose y’ubugingo bganje, Nkarāba ubgiza bg’Uhoraho, nkihweza urusengero rwiwe." 
Psalms27:5 Kuko ku musi w’amagorwa azonzigama akampisha mw ihema ryiwe, Mu bgigobeko bgo mw ihema ryiwe ni ho azompisha; Azonshira hejuru, ampagarike ku gitandara." 
Psalms27:6 N’ubu, umutwe wanje uzoshirwa hejuru y’abansi banje bankikije; Nanje nzotangira ibimazi vy’ umunezero mw ihema ryiwe, Nzoririmba, ego cane nzoririmbira Uhoraho amatazirano." 
Psalms27:7 Uhoraho we, umve gutaka kw’ijwi ryanje, Utek’ ungirire ikigongwe, unyishure." 
Psalms27:8 Wavuze, uti Ni murondere mu nyonga hanje; umutima wanje urakwishuye, Uti Mu nyonga hawe ndaharondera, Uhoraho." 
Psalms27:9 Ntumpishe mu nyonga hawe, Ntiwirukanishe umusavyi wawe uburake. Ni wewe wahoze ur’ umutabazi wanje, Ntunte, ntumpebe, Mana y’ agakiza kanje." 
Psalms27:10 N’iyo data na mama bonta, Uhoraho azonyitorera." 
Psalms27:11 Ndangira inzira yawe, Uhoraho, Undōngōre mu nzira y’umuharuro, Kubg’ abandyamiye." 
Psalms27:12 Ntumpe abarwanizi banje ngo bangirire uko bagomba, Kukw ivyabona vy’ibinyoma binkūriye hasi, n’abafuhagira inzigo." 
Psalms27:13 Mba narihebūye iyo ntizera ko nzobonera ukugira neza kw’Uhoraho Mw isi y’abakiriho. 
Psalms27:14 Ni witege Uhoraho: Rema, umutima wawe uhūmure: Nuko, ni witege Uhoraho." 
Psalms28:1 Uhoraho, ni wewe ntakambira; Gitandara canje, ntiwice amatwi: Kuko wonyihoza Nohinduka nk’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Psalms28:2 Wumvirize ijwi ry’ukwinginga kwanje uko ngutakambiye, Uko ntaritse amaboko, ndayatumbereje ahēra h’urusengero rwawe." 
Psalms28:3 Ntunkwegane n’abanyakibi N’inkozi z’ibibi; Bavugana ivy’ amahoro na bagenzi babo, Ariko mu mitima yabo har’ imanga." 
Psalms28:4 Ubahe ibikwiranye n’ivyo bākoze, ibikwiranye n’ivyo bāgabitanije, Ubahe ibikwiranye n’ibikorwa vy’amaboko yabo: Ubasubirize mu nkōko nk’ uko bibakwiye." 
Psalms28:5 Kuko batababaye ivyo Uhoraho yakoze, Cank’ ibikorwa vy’amaboko yiwe, Azobasangangura, ntazobubaka." 
Psalms28:6 Uhoraho ahimbazwe, Kuko yumviye ijwi ry’ukwinginga kwanje." 
Psalms28:7 Uhoraho ni we nkomezi zanje n’inkinzo yanje, Umutima wanje uhora umwizigira, ngatabarwa: Ni co gituma umutima wanje unezerwa cane, Kandi nzomutazirisha indirimbo yanje." 
Psalms28:8 Uhoraho n’inkomezi z’abantu biwe, Uwo yarobanuje amavuta amubera ubuhungiro bg’ agakiza." 
Psalms28:9 Kiza abantu bawe, uhe ishamvu yawe umugisha: Kand’ ubaragire, wame ubaramira ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms29:1 Mwaturire Uhoraho, yemwe bana b’Imana, Mwaturire Uhoraho kw afise icubahiro n’inkomezi." 
Psalms29:2 Muhe Uhoraho icubahiro kibereye izina ryiwe: Musenge Uhoraho mushajije n’ukwera. 
Psalms29:3 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rihindira hejuru y’amazi: Imana y’icubahiro ihindisha inkuba, Ni we Uhoraho ahindishiriza inkuba hejuru y’amazi menshi." 
Psalms29:4 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rifise inkomezi; Ijwi ry’Uhoraho ryuzuye igitinyiro; 
Psalms29:5 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho risatura ibiti vy’amasederi, Mber’ Uhoraho asatagura amasederi y’i Lebanoni." 
Psalms29:6 Ayakinisha amatavu nk’inyana, I Lebanoni n’i Siriyoni ahakinisha amatavu nk’inyana y’imbogo." 
Psalms29:7 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rishwaza ibirimi vy’umuriro. 
Psalms29:8 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rinyiganyiza ubugaragwa, Uhoraho anyiganyiza ubugaragwa bg’i Kadeshi." 
Psalms29:9 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho riramburuza impongokazi, Kandi rigakōkōra ikibira; Kandi mu rusengero rwiwe vyose bikavuga, bit’ Icubahiro kibe icawe." 
Psalms29:10 Uhoraho yar’ avyagiye hejuru ya wa Mwuzure: Ni koko, Uhoraho avyagiye ahangamye ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms29:11 Uhoraho azoha abantu biwe inkomezi, Uhoraho azoha abantu biwe umugisha w’amahoro." 
Psalms30:1 Uhoraho ndaguhimbaza kuko wankūye hasi, Ntukunde kw abansi banje banyitamba hejuru." 
Psalms30:2 Uhoraho, Mana yanje, Naragutakambiye, urankiza." 
Psalms30:3 Uhoraho, wadūganye ubugingo bganje, ubukūra i kuzimu: Wankijije urupfu, ngo noye kumanuka nkaja muri rwa rwobo." 
Psalms30:4 Muririmbire Uhoraho ishimwe, yemwe bakunzi biwe, Mushime izina ryiwe ryera." 
Psalms30:5 Kuk’ uburake bgiwe ar’ ubg’ akanya isase, Arik’ ubuntu bgiwe bgamah’ igihe cose umuntu akiriho. Ukurira kworārira umuntu mw ijoro, Ariko mu gitondo impundu zikavuga." 
Psalms30:6 Nanje, aho nari nguwe neza, naravuze, Nti Sinzokwigera nsegenyeshwa." 
Psalms30:7 Uhoraho, kubg’ urukundo rwawe war’ ushimangiye umusozi wanje; Wapfutse my nyonga hawe, mpagarika umutima." 
Psalms30:8 Uhoraho naragutakambiye, Kandi ninginze Uhoraho:" 
Psalms30:9 Nti Mbeg’ amaraso yanje azomara iki, ni namanuka nkaja muri rwa rwobo? Non’ umukungugu uzoguhimbaza? Mbeg’ uzokwatura ukuri kwawe?" 
Psalms30:10 Uhoraho we, zirikana ungirire ikigongwe: Uhoraho, mbera umutabazi." 
Psalms30:11 Intimba yanje uyihinduye imvyino, Unkenyuruye amagunira yanje, unkenyeza umunezero," 
Psalms30:12 Kugira ng’umushaha wanje ukuririmbire ishimwe ntucereze. Uhoraho, Mana yanje, nzogushima ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms31:1 Uhoraho, ni wewe mpungirako: sinze nigere mmāramāzwa; Unkize kubg’ ukugororoka kwawe." 
Psalms31:2 Umbangire ugutwi, unyaruke unkize: Umbere igitandara gikomeye, inzu y’igihome yo kunkiza." 
Psalms31:3 Kukw ari wewe gitandara canje n’igihome kinkīngira: Nuko kubg’ izina ryawe unje imbere, undōngōre." 
Psalms31:4 Unkūre mu mutego bantegeye mu mpisho, Kukw ari wewe buhungiro bganje." 
Psalms31:5 Mu kuboko kwawe ni ho nshize ubugingo bganje; Warancunguye Uhoraho, we Mana y’ukuri." 
Psalms31:6 Nanka abashira imitima ku bitagira ikimazi vy’ibinyoma, Ariko jeho nizigira Uhoraho." 
Psalms31:7 Nzokwama nnezerwa mpimbawe n’imbabazi zawe, Kuko wabonye amagorwa yanje; Wamenye imibabaro y’umutima wanje," 
Psalms31:8 Kandi ntiwantanze mu maboko y’umwansi; Washize ibirenge vyanje ahantu hāgutse. 
Psalms31:9 Ngirira ikigongwe Uhoraho we, kuko ngowe: Ijisho ryanje rikabiranijwe n’ intuntu, bo n’ubugingo bganje n’umubiri." 
Psalms31:10 Kukw imisi y’ukubaho kwanje imazwe n’umubabaro, n’imyaka yanje imazwe no kwitsa umutima: Intege zanje ziracitse kubg’ ukugabitanya kwanje, amagufa yanje ashize umunywera." 
Psalms31:11 Mpindutse ruvumwa kubg’ abansi banje bose, Mbere, mpindukiye abo tubana igitutsi gikomeye, n’ abo tuzinanyi mbahindukiye igiteye ubgoba: Abambonye mu nzira barampunga." 
Psalms31:12 Nibagiranye nk’uwapfuye, atacibukwa: Mmeze nk’ikibumbano kimenetse." 
Psalms31:13 Kuko numvise benshi bandementaniriza, Ubgoba kukantera irya n’ino; Hamwe bangīra inama Barondera ingene bonyica." 
Psalms31:14 Ariko jeho, ni wewe nizigiye, Uhoraho, Naravuze, nti Ni wewe Mana yanje." 
Psalms31:15 Ibihe vyanje biri mu kuboko kwawe, Unkize ukuboko kw’abansi banje n’abampama." 
Psalms31:16 Umurikishirize umusavyi wawe mu nyonga hawe, Unkize kubg’ imbabazi zawe." 
Psalms31:17 Uhoraho, sinze nicwe n’isoni, kuko ngutakambiye; Abanyakibi abe ari bo bicwa n’isoni, bajorererwe i kuzimu." 
Psalms31:18 Iminwa ivuga ibinyoma izibge, Ivugana umugororotsi agakēngērwe, N’ubgibone n’akagaye." 
Psalms31:19 Ereg’ ukugira neza kwawe ni kwinshi, ukwo wabīkiye abakwubaha, Ukwo wagiriye abaguhungirako mu maso y’abana b’ abantu!" 
Psalms31:20 Mu bgigobeko bgo mu nyonga zawe ni ho uzobahisha inama mbi z’abantu, Uzobahisha mw ihema gutongana kw’indimi." 
Psalms31:21 Uhoraho ahimbazwe, Kuko yanyerekeye imbabazi ziwe zitangaza mu gisagara kizitijwe ibikomeye." 
Psalms31:22 Jeho navuganye ukwihebura, nti Ndarandutse, nkūwe mu nyonga zawe: Ariko weho wumvise ijwi ry’ ukwinginga kwanje hamwe nagutakambira." 
Psalms31:23 Mukunde Uhoraho, yemwe bakunzi biwe mwese: Uhoraho azigama abizigirwa, Ūkora ivy’ ubgibone abimusubiriza mu nkōko kenshi." 
Psalms31:24 Ni mureme, imitima yanyu ishikame, Yemwe abiteze Uhoraho mwese." 
Psalms32:1 Hahirwa uwahariwe ugucumura kwiwe, icaha ciwe kigatwikirwa." 
Psalms32:2 Hahirwa umuntu Uhoraho adaharūrak’ ukugabitanya, Umutima wiwe ntubemw’ ubugunge." 
Psalms32:3 Ngicereje, amagufa yanje atewe gusāza N’ukuniha kwanje umusi ukīra." 
Psalms32:4 Kuk’ ukuboko kwawe kwandemēra ku murango no mw ijoro, Ukubengagira kwanje kugahinduka nk’ukwuma kwo mu ci." 
Psalms32:5 Nakwemereye icaha canje, sinatwikiriye ukugabitanya kwanje; Naravuze, nti Ndāturira Uhoraho ibicumuro vyanje: Nawe umparira ukugabitanya kw’icaha canje." 
Psalms32:6 Ni co gituma ūkwubaha wese akwiye kugusengera mu gihe wobonerwamwo: N’ukuri, iy’ amazi asendanishije yamaze iminyika, ntazomushikako." 
Psalms32:7 Ni wewe bgihisho bganje, uzondinda amagorwa, Uzonkikiza impundu z’uko ndokotse." 
Psalms32:8 Nzokwigisha nkwereke inzira ucamwo, Nzokugīra inama, ijisho ryanje rizokugumako." 
Psalms32:9 Ntimube nk’ifarasi cank’ inyumbu, bitagira ubgenge, Bikwiye kugira imijiginya y’ ivyuma n’ibitsibo vyo kubifata; Bitabaye birtyo ntivyokwēgēra." 
Psalms32:10 Abanyakibi bazobona imibabaro myinshi: Arik’ uwizigira Uhoraho, imbabazi zizomukikiza irya n’ino." 
Psalms32:11 Yemwe mwa bagororotsi, munezererwe Uhoraho, muhimbarwe: Yemwe abafise imitima itunganye mwese, muvuze impundu y’umunezero." 
Psalms33:1 Munezererwe Uhoraho, yemwe bagororotsi. Gushima kurabereye abatunganye." 
Psalms33:2 Mushimishe Uhoraho ikembe, Mumuririmbire muvuza ishimwe ryiwe mu nanga y’ imirya cumi." 
Psalms33:3 Mumuririmbire indirimbo nsha: Mucurarangishe ubuhinga muyomanze. 
Psalms33:4 Kukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ritunganye, Igikorwa ciwe cose agikorana ukuri." 
Psalms33:5 Akunda kugororoka n’imanza zibereye: Isi yuzuye imbabazi z’Uhoraho. 
Psalms33:6 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ni ryo ryāremye ijuru, Impwemu zo mu kanwa kiwe ni zo zāremye ingabo zose zo kuri ryo." 
Psalms33:7 Yegeranya amazi yo mu kiyaga nk’ikirundo, I bgina ahimburira mu bigega." 
Psalms33:8 Isi yose ni yubahe Uhoraho, Abari mw isi yose bamutinye." 
Psalms33:9 Kuko yavuze, bikaba, Yageze, bikaguma." 
Psalms33:10 Uhoraho ahindura ubusa imigabo y’amahanga, Atuma ivyiyumviro vy’amoko bipfa ubusa." 
Psalms33:11 Imigabo y’Uhoraho ihora ihamye ibihe bidashira, N’ivyiyumviro vyo mu mutima wiwe ibihe vyose." 
Psalms33:12 Hahirwa ihanga rifise Uhoraho kw Imana yaryo, Ubgoko yitoranirije kuba ishamvu yiwe." 
Psalms33:13 Uhoraho yitegereza ari mw ijuru, Arāba abana b’abantu bose." 
Psalms33:14 Avyagiye ku ntebe y’icubahiro, Yitegereza ababa mw isi bose." 
Psalms33:15 Ni we abumba imitima yabo bose, Akitegereza ibikorwa vyabo vyose." 
Psalms33:16 Nta mwami akizwa n’ukw ari n’ingabo nyinshi, Umuhizi ntarokorwa n’inkomezi ziwe nyinshi." 
Psalms33:17 Ifarasi nta kimazi igira co gukiza, Ntizorokoresha umuntu inkomezi zayo nyinshi." 
Psalms33:18 Eh’ ijisho ry’Uhoraho riri ku bamwubaha, Riri ku bīteze imbabazi ziwe:" 
Psalms33:19 Ngw arokore ubugingo bgabo abukize urupfu, Abazigame muri kigoyi babe bazima." 
Psalms33:20 Imitima yacu yiteze Uhoraho; Ni we mutabazi wacu n’inkinzo yacu. 
Psalms33:21 Imitima yacu izomunezererwa, Kuko twishimiye izina ryiwe ryera." 
Psalms33:22 Uhoraho, imbabazi zawe zitubeko, Nk’uko tukwiteze." 
Psalms34:1 Nzokwama mpimbaza Uhoraho ibihe vyose, Ishimwe ryiwe rizoba mu kanwa kanje urudaca." 
Psalms34:2 Uhoraho ni we umutima wanje uzokwirata, Abaciye bugufi bazovyumva, banezerwe." 
Psalms34:3 Ni muhimbazanye nanje Uhoraho, Dushirane hejuru izina ryiwe." 
Psalms34:4 Narondeye Uhoraho, aranyitaba, Ankiza ubgoba nari mfise bgose." 
Psalms34:5 Bamwitegereje, mu maso habo harakemuka, Mu maso habo ntihazokwigera hamāramāra." 
Psalms34:6 Uyu mugorwa yaratakamvye, Uhoraho aramwumva, Amukiza amarushwa yiwe yose." 
Psalms34:7 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho ashagaje impande zose z’ abamwubaha, Akabarokora." 
Psalms34:8 Ni mwumvirizeko, mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho aryoshe: Hahirwa ūmuhungirako." 
Psalms34:9 Ni mwubahe Uhoraho, yemwe abera biwe, Kukw abamwubaha batagira ico bakena." 
Psalms34:10 Imigunza y’intambge ishobora kuburanirwa no gusonza, Arikw abarondera Uhoraho ntibazogira iciza bakena." 
Psalms34:11 Yemwe bana bato, ni muze, munyumve: Ndabigishe kwubaha Uhoraho." 
Psalms34:12 Ni nde agomba ubugingo, Akifuza kuramba, ngw az’ abone ivyiza?" 
Psalms34:13 Uz’ ubuze ururimi rwawe, rwoye kuvuga ikibi, N’iminwa yawe yoye kuvuga ivy’ uguhendana." 
Psalms34:14 Tandukana n’ibibi, ukore ivyiza, Rondera amahoro, uyakurikire, kugira ng’ uyashikīre." 
Psalms34:15 Inyonga z’Uhoraho ziri ku bagororotsi, N’amatwi yiwe ayabangira ugutakamba kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Igitsure c’Uhoraho kiri ku bakora ibibi, Ngw ahenebereze ukwibukwa kwabo mw isi." 
Psalms34:17 Abagororotsi baratakamvye, Uhoraho arabumva, Abakiza amagorwa yabo yose." 
Psalms34:18 Uhoraho aba hafi y’abafise imitima imenetse, Kand’ akiza abafise imitima ijanjaguritse." 
Psalms34:19 Amarushwa y’umugororotsi ni menshi, Arik’ Uhoraho ayamukiza yose." 
Psalms34:20 Azigama amagufa yiwe yose, Nta na rimwe rivunika." 
Psalms34:21 Ibibi bizokwica umunyakibi, Abanka umugororotsi bazocirwakw iteka." 
Psalms34:22 Uhoraho acungura ubugingo bg’abasavyi biwe, Mu bamuhungirako nta n’ umwe azocirwakw iteka." 
Psalms35:1 Uhoraho we, būrana n’abambūranya, Rwana n’abandwanya." 
Psalms35:2 Fata inkinzo nini na ntoya, Uhaguruke kugira ng’ untabare," 
Psalms35:3 Kand’ usohore icumu n’ikimito urwanye abampīga. Ubarire umutima wanje, uti Ni jewe gakiza kawe." 
Psalms35:4 Abarondera ubugingo bganje bamāramāre, batētērwe, Abangīra inama yo kungirira nabi basubizwe inyuma, bicwe n’isoni." 
Psalms35:5 Babe nk’umuguruka utumurwa n’umuyaga, Kand’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho abirukane." 
Psalms35:6 Inzira yabo ibe umwiza n’ ubunyerere, Kand’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho abahīge." 
Psalms35:7 Kuko banteze umutego mu cobo ata nyanduruko, Kandi bimbiye ubugingo bganje ata nyanduruko." 
Psalms35:8 Kugesezwa kubagweko giturumbuka, Kand’ umutego bateze abe ari bo ufata ubgabo: Bawugwemwo, bagesezwe." 
Psalms35:9 Ni ho umutima wanje uzovugiriza impundu Uhoraho, Unezererwe agakiza kiwe." 
Psalms35:10 Amagufa yanje yose azovuga, at’ Uhoraho, ni nde ahwanye nawe? Kuk’ ukiza umugorwa abamurusha inkomezi, Ugakiza umugorwa n’umukene ababambura." 
Psalms35:11 Ivyabona vy’ibinyoma biva hasi, Bakanyagiriza ivyo ntazi, babimbaza." 
Psalms35:12 Nabakoreye ivyiza bansubiza ibibi, Bigahindura umutima wanje nk’imbura." 
Psalms35:13 Ariko jeho, uko bārwara, imyambaro yanje yaba amagunira, Nababarisha ubugingo bganje kwisonzesha, Ngasenga ncuritse umutwe mu gikiriza." 
Psalms35:14 Nkamera nk’ah’ ar’ umukunzi wanje canke mwene mama arwaye, Nkicurikīra nk’ūgandaye, nk’ ūririra nyina." 
Psalms35:15 Ariko jeho ncumbagiye baranezerwa, bakarundana, Abantu b’imburakimazi banteranirako, sinabimenya. Baranshishimura ntibīgarura." 
Psalms35:16 Bandyaniriza insya z’amenyo, Nk’ukw abacokoranyi bavugira ibiteye isoni ah’ abantu bakoraniye mu mazimano." 
Psalms35:17 Mwami, uzogeza hehe kubirāba irarirari? Kiza ubugingo bganje ukugeseza kuri muri bo, Ico mfise rudende gikize intambge." 
Psalms35:18 Nanje nzogushimira mw ishengero rinini, Nzoguhimbariza mu bantu benshi." 
Psalms35:19 Abanyankishwa n’inyanduruko z’ibinyoma boye kunyitamba hejuru, Abanyankira ubusa boye kumvunanira akagohe." 
Psalms35:20 Kuko batavuga ivy’ amahoro: Ariko baja inama yo kurondera amagambo babeshera abībēreye ngaho mu gihugu. 
Psalms35:21 Mbere banyasamiye cane, Baravuga, bati Ha ha ha ha! Ijisho ryacu rirabibonye!" 
Psalms35:22 Nawe warabibonye, Uhoraho; ntucereze: Mwami, ntumbe kure." 
Psalms35:23 Ikakaze, wikangurire kumpereza ivy’ urubanza rwanje, Urubanza rw’ivyanje, Mana yanje, Mwami wanje." 
Psalms35:24 Uhoraho, Mana yanje, umpereze urubanza rukwiranye n’ukugororoka kwawe; Ntibanyitambe hejuru." 
Psalms35:25 Ntibibgire mu mitima yabo, bati Ha ha! Ico ni co twagomba. Ntibavuge, bati Turamuyongobeje." 
Psalms35:26 Abanezerezwa n’uko ngiriwe nabi bicwe n’isoni, bateteranwe: Abanyiratako bambikwe isoni n’ugukēngērwa." 
Psalms35:27 Abanezererwa urubanza rwanje ruroranye bavugishwe impundu n’umunezero, Mbere ni bavuge urudaca, bat’ Uhoraho ahimbazwe, Akunda k’umusavyi wiwe aba amahoro." 
Psalms35:28 Nanje ururimi rwanje ruzovuga ivy’ ukugororoka kwawe, Ruzovuga ishimwe ryawe umusi wīre." 
Psalms36:1 Ubugarariji bg’umunyakibi buvugira mu mutima wiwe: Nta gutinya Imana kuri mu maso yiwe. 
Psalms36:2 Kuko yihema ubgiwe, K’ukugabitanya kwiwe kutazomenyekana ngo kwankwe." 
Psalms36:3 Amagambo yo mu kanwa kiwe n’ukugabitanya n’ubugunge; Yaretse kugira ubgenge no gukora ivyiza. 
Psalms36:4 Yigerera ivy’ ukugabitanya ari ku buriri bgiwe, Yishira mu nzira itari nziza, Ntazinukwa ibibi." 
Psalms36:5 Uhoraho, imbabazi zawe zishika mw ijuru, Ukuri kwawe gushika no mu bicu." 
Psalms36:6 Ukugororoka kwawe guhwanye n’imisozi miremire y’ Imana, Amateka yawe ameze nk’ amazi maremare yo mw idamba. Uhoraho, ni wewe uzigama abantu n’amatungo." 
Psalms36:7 Mana, ereg’ imbabazi zawe n’iz’ igiciro! Abana b’abantu bahungira mu gitūtu c’amababa yawe." 
Psalms36:8 Bazohāzwa rwose n’ibiryoshe vyo mu ngoro yawe, Kand’ uzobashōra ku ruzi rw’umunezero wawe." 
Psalms36:9 Kukw ah’ uri ari ho har’ isōko y’ubugingo: Mu muco wawe ni ho tuzobonera umuco. 
Psalms36:10 Hora ushishikara gusēsekaza imbabazi ku bakuzi, N’ukugororoka kwawe ku batunganye mu mitima." 
Psalms36:11 Ikirenge c’umwibone ntikinzeko, Ukuboko kw’abanyakibi ntikunsohore." 
Psalms36:12 Hariya ni ho inkozi z’ibibi ziguye, Ziratsinzwe hasi, ntizizoshobora kuvyuka." 
Psalms37:1 Ntugahagarikwe umutima n’ inkozi z’ibibi, Kandi ntukagirire ishari abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya." 
Psalms37:2 Kuko bazotemwa vuba nk’ ubgatsi, Bazokwuma nk’ukw imboga zitotahaye zuma." 
Psalms37:3 Wizigire Uhoraho, ukore ivyiza, Guma mu gihugu, ushishikare ivy’ ukuri." 
Psalms37:4 Uhimbarwe n’Uhoraho, Na we azoguha ivyo umutima wawe ugomba." 
Psalms37:5 Ukorere Uhoraho urugendo rwawe rwose, Abe ari we wishimira, na we azobishitsa." 
Psalms37:6 Kand’ azokwerekana ukugororoka kwawe nk’umuco, N’urubanza rwawe ruroranye nk’igihe co mu mashōka." 
Psalms37:7 Uhwekerere imbere y’Uhoraho, umurorēre wihanganye: Ntuhagarikwe umutima n’ ūguwe neza mu rugendo rwiwe, N’umuntu ashitsa imigabo mibi." 
Psalms37:8 Reka ishavu, va mu burake, Ntuhagarike umutima, kukw ico kizana gukora ibibi gusa;" 
Psalms37:9 Kukw inkozi z’ibibi zizorandurwa, Arikw abarorereye Uhoraho bazoragwa igihugu." 
Psalms37:10 Kuko hasigaye igihe gito, umunyakibi ntabeho; Mbere, uzokwitegereza ahiwe, umubure." 
Psalms37:11 Arikw abagwaneza bazoragwa igihugu, Bazonezererwa amahoro y’ umusēsekara." 
Psalms37:12 Umunyakibi aja inama yo kugirira umugororotsi nabi, Kand’ amuryaniriza imisaya." 
Psalms37:13 Umwami Imana azomutwenga, Kukw abona yuk’ umusi wiwe urik’ urashika." 
Psalms37:14 Abanyakibi basokōye inkota, bafoye imiheto, Kugira ngo batūre hasi umugorwa n’umukene, Bice abagenda batunganye." 
Psalms37:15 Inkota yabo ni bo izocumita mu mitima, Imiheto yabo izovunika." 
Psalms37:16 Ibikeya umugororotsi atunze Biruta ibihinda vy’abanyakibi benshi. 
Psalms37:17 Kukw amaboko y’abanyakibi azovunika: Arik’ Uhoraho aramira abagororotsi. 
Psalms37:18 Uhoraho arazi imisi y’abatācumuye, Umwandu wabo uzokwamah’ ibihe vyose." 
Psalms37:19 Ntibazokwicwa n’isoni mu gihe c’ivyago, Mu misi ya kigoyi bazohāzwa." 
Psalms37:20 Arikw abanyakibi bazohona, Kand’ abansi b’Uhoraho bazoshira nk’ubgiza bg’ivyanya, Bazokamangana, bakamangane nk’umwotsi." 
Psalms37:21 Umunyakibi aragurānwa, ntiyishure: Arik’ umugororotsi agira ubuntu, agatanga." 
Psalms37:22 Kukw abahezagirwa n’Uhoraho bazoragwa igihugu; Arikw abavumwa na we bazorandurwa. 
Psalms37:23 Iy’ intambuko z’umuntu zishigikiwe n’Uhoraho, Akanezererwa inzira yiwe," 
Psalms37:24 Naho yotemba, ntazoshika hasi rwose, Kuk’ Uhoraho amuramira mu kuboko kwiwe." 
Psalms37:25 Uhereye nkiri muto, none ndashāje, Ariko sinigeze kubona umugororotsi yahebge, Cank’ uruvyaro rwiwe rusēgerereza ivyo kurya." 
Psalms37:26 Agira ubuntu umusi ukīra, akagurāna abandi; Uruvyaro rwiwe rukagira umugisha." 
Psalms37:27 Tandukana n’ibibi, ukore ivyiza, Ubone kwamaho." 
Psalms37:28 Uhoraho akunda imanza ziroranye, Ntaheba abakunzi biwe. Bazigamwa ibihe vyose; Arik’ uruvyaro rw’abanyakibi ruzorandurwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abagororotsi bazoragwa igihugu, Bakibemw’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms37:30 Akanwa k’umugororotsi kavuga ivy’ ubgenge, N’ururimi rwiwe ruvuga ibiroranye." 
Psalms37:31 Ivyagezwe vy’Imana yiwe biri mu mutima wiwe; Nta ntambuko ziwe zizonyerera. 
Psalms37:32 Umunyakibi agenzura umugororotsi, Akarondera ingene yomwica." 
Psalms37:33 Uhoraho ntazomurekera mu kuboko kwiwe, Kandi ntazomutsindisha mu manza." 
Psalms37:34 Urorēre Uhoraho, ugumye inzira yiwe, Na we azogushira hejuru ng’ uragwe igihugu: Abanyakibi bazorandurwa ubirorēra." 
Psalms37:35 Nabonye umunyakibi afise ububasha buhambaye, Agasaye nk’igiti kiremvye kir’ aho cimejeje." 
Psalms37:36 Maz’ umuntu yarahaciye, asanga ata we, Mbere naramurondeye, ntiyaboneka." 
Psalms37:37 Witegereze ūtunganye rwose, urābe umugororotsi: Kukw amaherezo y’ūmeze artyo ar’ amahoro." 
Psalms37:38 Abacumura bo bazohonera hamwe, Iherezo ry’umunyakibi n’ amahonero." 
Psalms37:39 Arikw agakiza k’abagororotsi kanduruka k’Uhoraho, Ni we buhungiro bgabo mu gihe c’amagorwa." 
Psalms37:40 Kand’ Uhoraho arabatabara, akabarokora, Abarokora mu banyakibi, akabakiza, Kuko bamuhungiyeko." 
Psalms38:1 Uhoraho we, ntumpanane uburake, Canke ng’unkubitane ishavu." 
Psalms38:2 Kukw imyampi yawe inyangāyemwo, Ukuboko kwawe kukannyikiza." 
Psalms38:3 Nta hazima mu mubiri wanje kubg’ ubushangashirwe bgawe; Nta buruhukiro mu magufa yanje kubg’ ivyaha vyanje. 
Psalms38:4 Kukw ivyo nagabitanije bindengeye, Bimeze nk’umutwaro uremereye umvuna." 
Psalms38:5 Inguma zanje ziranuka kandi ziratikimye, Kubg’ ubupfu bganje." 
Psalms38:6 Ndahetamye, ndicurikiriye rwose: Ngenda ngandaye umusi ukīra." 
Psalms38:7 Kukw ikiyunguyungu canje cuzuye umururumbo, Kandi nta hazima mu mubiri wanje." 
Psalms38:8 Ndadendebukiwe, ndajanjaguritse: Nnihishwa n’umubabaro wo mu mutima wanje." 
Psalms38:9 Mwami, ivyo nifuza vyose bir’ imbere yawe, Umuniho wanje ntuwunyegejwe." 
Psalms38:10 Umutima urancamwo, intege zanje ziracika: No kubona kw’amaso yanje na kwo nyene kwamvuyemwo." 
Psalms38:11 Abakunzi banje n’abagenzi banje bandāba utw’ ininga kubg’ icago cambayeko; Incuti zanje zimpagarara kure. 
Psalms38:12 Kand’ abahama ubugingo bganje bantega imitego; Abandonderera ivyago bavuga ivyo kunyigamba, Biyumvira ivy’ ubugunge umusi ukīra." 
Psalms38:13 Ariko jeho mmeze nk’igipfamatwi, simvyumva; Mmeze nk’ikiragi kidateranura akanwa." 
Psalms38:14 Mbere mmeze nk’umuntu atumva, Ata myishurano iri mu kanwa kiwe." 
Psalms38:15 Kukw ari wewe nishimiye, ewe Uhoraho: Ni wewe uzonyishurira, Mwami Mana yanje." 
Psalms38:16 Kuko navuze, nti Boye kunyitamba hejuru: Iy’ ikirenge canje kinyereye, banyirata hejuru." 
Psalms38:17 Kuko ngira ngo ntembe, Kand’ umubabaro wanje ur’ imbere yanje na ntaryo." 
Psalms38:18 Kuko nzokwatura ukugabitanya kwanje, Nzogira umubabaro w’icaha canje." 
Psalms38:19 Arikw abansi banje banyankira ubusa barakomeye, Abanyankishwa n’inyanduruko z’ibinyoma baragwiriye." 
Psalms38:20 Abasubiza ibibi abābakoreye ivyiza Na bo bambereye abarwanizi, kuko nōma inyuma y’iciza." 
Psalms38:21 Uhoraho, ntumpebe: Mana yanje, ntumbe kure." 
Psalms38:22 Tebuka untabare, Mwami, gakiza kanje." 
Psalms39:1 Naravuze, nti Nzokwirindira mu nzira zanje, Noye gucumuza ururimi rwanje. Nzoshira ikirumyo ku munwa wanje Umunyakibi akir’ imbere yanje." 
Psalms39:2 Kutavuga kwangize ikiragi, ndahora; naho vyoba ivyiza sinabivuga; Umubabaro wanje urafururwa." 
Psalms39:3 Umutima wanje uba igitongorero muri jewe; Nciyumvira, umuriro unyakamwo. Maze mvugisha ururimi rwanje," 
Psalms39:4 Nt’ Uhoraho, mmenyesha iherezo ryanje, N’urugezo rw’imisi yanje, uko rureha, Mmenye ko nd’ igikenya." 
Psalms39:5 Erega wahinduye imisi yanje nk’intambge z’intoke; Igihe c’ukubaho kwanje kuri wewe ni nk’ubusa: N’ukuri umuntu wese, naho yivuza, n’impwemu zihumetswe gusa." 
Psalms39:6 N’ukuri umuntu wese agenda nk’icijiji; N’ukuri bahagarikira imitima ubusa: Umuntu arundanya ubutunzi, atazi ūzobutwara." 
Psalms39:7 Mwami, non’ ico ndorereye n’iki? Ni wewe nizigira." 
Psalms39:8 Unkize ibicumuro vyanje vyose: Ntumpindure agatwengo k’ ibipfu. 
Psalms39:9 Naracereje, sinateranura akanwa, Kukw ari wewe wabikoze." 
Psalms39:10 Unkūrekw inkoni yawe: Mmazwe no gukubita kw’ ukuboko kwawe. 
Psalms39:11 Iy’ uhanishije umuntu ibikangiro kubg’ ukugabitanya kwiwe, Umumarak’ ubgiza nk’ukw inyenzi yonona: N’ukuri umuntu wese n’ impwemu zihumetswe gusa." 
Psalms39:12 Umva gusenga kwanje, Uhoraho we, tegera ugutwi ugutakamba kwanje; Ntiwicire amatwi amarira yanje. Kuko nd’ umushitsi kuri wewe, N’inyambukīra nk’uko ba sogokuruza bose bāri bameze." 
Psalms39:13 Unkūrekw igitsure, mbone ingene nsubizwamw’ intege, Ntarava ino, nkaba ntakiriho." 
Psalms40:1 Narorereye Uhoraho nihanganye; Antegera ugutwi, yumva ugutakamba kwanje." 
Psalms40:2 Kand’ ankūra mu rwobo rw’ amahonero no mw ishayo y’ivyondo, Ashira ibirenge vyanje ku rutare, ashigikira intambuko zanje." 
Psalms40:3 Kandi yashize indirimbo nsha mu kanwa kanje, ni yo shimwe ry’Imana yacu: Benshi bazobirāba, batinye, Bizigire Uhoraho." 
Psalms40:4 Hahirwa umuntu ashira ivyizigiro vyiwe k’Uhoraho, Kandi ntahindukirire abībone, cank’ abizimagiriza mu binyoma." 
Psalms40:5 Uhoraho, Mana yanje, ibikorwa bitangaje wakoze ni vyinshi, Bo n’ivyo wiyumvira kutugirira; Nta wogereranywa nawe. Nogomba kubidonda no kubivuga Birenze uko vyoharūrwa." 
Psalms40:6 Ibimazi n’amashikanwa y’ifu ntivyaguhimbaye; Amatwi yanje urayazibūye: Ibimazi vyoshejwe n’ibimazi vy’ivyaha ntiwabigomvye. 
Psalms40:7 Mperako ndavuga, nt’ Ehe ndaje, Mu muzingo w’igitabo ni ko vyanditswe kuri jewe:" 
Psalms40:8 Mpimbawe no gukora ivyo ugomba, Mana yanje; Mber’ ivyagezwe vyawe biri mu mutima wanje." 
Psalms40:9 Namamaje ubutumwa bgiza bg’ukugororoka mw ishengero ryinshi: Sinzobuza iminwa yanje, Uhoraho, urabizi." 
Psalms40:10 Sinnyegeza ukugororoka kwawe mu mutima wanje; Mvuga agakiza kawe, n’ingen’ ur’ uwo kwizigirwa: Imbabazi zawe n’ukuri kwawe simbihisha ishengero ryinshi." 
Psalms40:11 Nawe ntunyime ukugira neza kwawe, ewe Uhoraho: Imbabazi zawe n’ukuri kwawe bize vyame binzigama." 
Psalms40:12 Kukw ivyago vy’isinzi binkikije irya n’ino, Ivyo nagabitanije bimpambije, nkaba ntabasha kubona. Birengeye umushatsi wo ku mutwe wanje; umutima wanje wamvuyemwo." 
Psalms40:13 Uhoraho we, emera kunkiza: Uhoraho, tebuka untabare." 
Psalms40:14 Abashaka kunyica ngo banzimirize Bicwe n’isoni batētērwe: Abanezerezwa n’uko ngiriwe nabi Basubizwe inyuma bakēngērwe. 
Psalms40:15 Abambgira bati Ha ha ha ha! Ibimāramāre bibajoreze. 
Psalms40:16 Abakurondera bose bakunezererwe bahimbarwe, Abakunda agakiza kawe baze bame bavuga, Bat’ Uhoraho arahambaye!" 
Psalms40:17 Ariko jeho nd’ umugorwa, nd’ umukene: Yamar’ Uhoraho arambabara. Ni wewe mutabazi wanje n’ umurokozi wanje: Ntutebe Mana yanje." 
Psalms41:1 Hahirwa ūbabara umurushwa; Uhoraho azomurokora ku musi w’ivyago. 
Psalms41:2 Uhoraho azomuzigama amukize, kand’ azogira amahirwe mw isi: Nta ho azomuha abansi biwe ngo bamugirire uko bagomba." 
Psalms41:3 Uhoraho azomwiyegeka ari ku buriri ahondobereye; Ni wewe umworohereza ibisaswa iy’ arwaye. 
Psalms41:4 Naravuze, nt’ Uhoraho, ungirire ikigongwe: Ukize ubugingo bganje, kuko nagucumuyeko." 
Psalms41:5 Abansi banje bamvugakwibibi, Bat’ Azopfa ryari, ngw izina ryiwe rizimangane?" 
Psalms41:6 Kand’ umwe muri bo iy’ aje kundāba ambarira ivyo kumpema; Umutima wiwe ukīrundanyamw’ inama mbi, Agasohoka, akabivuga." 
Psalms41:7 Abanyanka bose bamvugana mu twongoshwe, Bangīra inama zo kungirira nabi." 
Psalms41:8 Bat’ Indwara y’intakira iramufashe, Noneho kw aryamye ntazovyuka ukundi." 
Psalms41:9 Mber’ umukunzi wanje pfampfe, uwo nizigira, nagaburira, Na we ambanguriye umugere." 
Psalms41:10 Ariko weho, Uhoraho, ungirire ikigongwe, umvyutse, Kugira ngo mbīhōre." 
Psalms41:11 Iki ni co kimmenyesha yuk’ unnezererwa, N’uk’ umwansi wanje atonyitamba hejuru." 
Psalms41:12 Kandi jeho ni wewe unshigikiye mu kugororoka kwanje, Kand’ unshira imbere mu nyonga zawe ibihe vyose." 
Psalms41:13 Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ahimbazwe, Uhereye kera hose, ukageza ibihe vyose, Amen, kandi Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Nk’ukw impongo ihuzagizwa yifuza imigezi, Ni k’umutima wanje uhuzagizwa ukwifuza, Mana." 
Psalms42:2 Umutima wanje ugirira Imana inyota, Imana nzima: Nzoza ryari ngo nseruke mu nyonga z’Imana?" 
Psalms42:3 Amosozi yanje ni yo yambereye ivyo kurya ku murango no mw ijoro, Bakarenza izuba bambaza, bat’ Imana yawe iri hehe?" 
Psalms42:3 Amosozi yanje ni yo yambereye ivyo kurya ku murango no mw ijoro, Bakarenza izuba bambaza, bat’ Imana yawe iri hehe?" 
Psalms42:4 Ibi ndavyibuka, umutima ukantunturira mu nda, Ingene najana n’ishengero, mbajana mu ngoro y’Imana, Tugendana ijwi ry’akanyamuneza n’ishimwe, tur’ ikoraniro rigize umusi mukuru." 
Psalms42:5 Mutima wanje, n’iki gitumye wicurikīra? N’iki gitumye umpagararamwo? Ni wishimire Imana, kuko na none nzosubira kuyihimbariza Agakiza kava mu nyonga hayo." 
Psalms42:6 Mana yanje, umutima wanje uricurikiriye: Ni co gituma nkwibuka ndi mu gihugu ca Yorodani, No ku misozi ya Herumoni, no ku musozi Mizari." 
Psalms42:7 Idamba rihamagara irindi damba, kubgo kubomborana kw’amasūmo yawe: Imipfunda yawe yose n’imikuba yawe yose birandengeye." 
Psalms42:8 Uhoraho angerera imbabazi ziwe ku murango, No mw ijoro indirimbo yiwe yamana nanje, Ni yo nsengesha Imana y’ ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms42:9 Nzobaza Imana, igitandara canje, nti N’iki gitumye unyibagira? N’iki gituma ngenda ngandaye kubg’ agahahazo k’ abansi banje?" 
Psalms42:10 Abansi banje bantuka nk’abanjanjagura amagufa, Bakarenza izuba bambaza, bat’ Imana yawe iri hehe?" 
Psalms42:11 Mutima wanje, n’iki gitumye wicurikīra? N’iki gitumye umpagararamwo? Ni wishimire Imana kuko na none nzosubira kuyihimbaza, Ni yo gakiza ko mu maso hanje, n’Imana yanje." 
Psalms43:1 Mana, uncire urubanza, umbūranire n’ihanga ritagira imbabazi: Unkize ingunge n’ūdambikanya." 
Psalms43:2 Kw ari wewe Mana mpungirako, n’iki catumye unta kure? N’iki gituma ngenda ngandaye kubg’ agahahazo k’abansi banje?" 
Psalms43:3 N’urungike se umuco wawe n’ukuri kwawe, bindōngōre: Biniane ku murwa wawe wera, No mu mahema yawe." 
Psalms43:4 Maze nzoja ku gicaniro c’ Imana, Ku Mana, ni yo munezero uzana ibinezaneza vyanje; Ngutazirishe inanga, Mana, wewe Mana yanje." 
Psalms43:5 Mutima wanje, n’iki gitumye wicurikīra? N’iki gitumye umpagararamwo? Ni wishimire Imana, kuko na none nzosubira kuyihimbaza, Ni yo gakiza ko mu maso hanje, n’Imana yanje." 
Psalms44:1 Mana, twariyumviye n’amatwi yacu, ba sogokuruza bacu batubariye Ibikorwa wakoze mu gihe cabo, mu gihe ca kera." 
Psalms44:2 Wasohoje amahanga ukuboko kwawe, ariko bo urahabagerēra; Wateye amoko amarushwa, uca ugasāza bano." 
Psalms44:3 Kukw atar’ iyabo nkota yabahaye kwegukira igihugu, Kand’ atar’ ukwabo kuboko kwabakijije: Ariko n’ikiganza cawe c’i buryo n’ukuboko kwawe n’ umuco wo mu nyonga hawe, Kuko wabakunze." 
Psalms44:4 Mana, ni wewe Mwami wanje: Gerera agakiza aba Yakobo." 
Psalms44:5 Ni wewe uzoduha kwirenza abansi bacu: Izina ryawe ni ryo rizoduha gusiribanga abadukūriye hasi. 
Psalms44:6 Kuk’ umuheto wanje atari wo nzokwishimira, Kand’ inkota yanje atari yo izonkiza." 
Psalms44:7 Ariko ni wewe wadukijije abansi bacu, Watētereje abatwanka." 
Psalms44:8 Imana ni yo twirata umusi ukīra, Kandi tuzoshima izina ryawe ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms44:9 Ariko noneho wadushiburiye kure, waduteye gukēngērwa, Kandi ntugitabarana n’ingabo zacu." 
Psalms44:10 Watumye abansi bacu badukimiranya, Abatwanka baratwinyagira." 
Psalms44:11 Wadutanze nk’intama z’imbāgwa, Wadushwiragirije mu mahanga." 
Psalms44:12 Ugura abantu bawe ubusa, Kand’ ibiguzi vyabo ntiwabironsemw’ inyungu." 
Psalms44:13 Uduhindura ruvumwa ku babanyi bacu, Agatwengo no gucokorwa ku badukikije." 
Psalms44:14 Watugize iciro ry’imigani mu mahanga, Abo kuzungurizwa imitwe n’ amoko." 
Psalms44:15 Ubugene nkēngeretse bunyama imbere umusi ukīra, Isoni zo mu maso hanje zirantwikiriye," 
Psalms44:16 Kubg’ ijwi ry’ūtongana, agatukana, Kubg’ umwansi n’umuhōzi." 
Psalms44:17 Ivyo vyose vyadushitseko; ariko ntitwakwibagiye, Kandi ntitwavuye mw isezerano ryawe." 
Psalms44:18 Imitima yacu ntiyasubiye inyuma, Intambuko zacu ntizatirimutse ngo zive mu nzira yawe," 
Psalms44:19 Nawe ng’utuvunagurire ahantu h’imbgebge, Ukadutwikiriza igitūtu c’urupfu." 
Psalms44:20 Namba twaribagiye izina ry’ Imana yacu, Canke tukaya amaboko imbere y’iyindi mana," 
Psalms44:21 Mbeg’ Imana ntizobisuzuma? Kukw izi amabanga yo mu mutima. 
Psalms44:22 Mbere twirirwa twicwa bakuduhōra, Twagereranijwe n’intama z’ imbāgwa." 
Psalms44:23 Ibambure Mwami, n’iki kigusinzirije? Vyukuruka, ntudushiburire kure ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms44:24 N’iki gituma upfuka mu nyonga hawe, Ukibagira amarushwa yacu no guhahazwa kwacu?" 
Psalms44:25 Kuk’ ubugingo bgacu bgunamitswe bugashika mu mukungugu, Inda yacu yamatanye n’ivu." 
Psalms44:26 Kūra hasi, udutabare, Uducungure kubg’ imbabazi zawe." 
Psalms45:1 Umutima wanje urabize, usēsekara ivyiza: Ndavuga ivyo nageneye umwami; Ururimi rwanje n’ikaramu y’ umwanditsi w’umuhinga." 
Psalms45:2 Uri n’ubgiza buruta ubg’ abana b’abantu; Igikundiro gisutswe mu minwa yawe: Ni co gitumye Imana iguha umugisha w’ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms45:3 Wa muhizi we, ambara inkota yawe kw itako, Ambara ubgiza bgawe n’icubahiro cawe." 
Psalms45:4 Ugendane icubahiro, ugendera kw ifarasi, utsinde, Urwanire ukuri n’ubugwaneza no kugororoka. Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kukwigishe ibitera ubgoba." 
Psalms45:5 Imyampi yawe irasongoye: Amahanga agwa bukumbi imbere yawe; Imyampi yawe iguye mu mitima y’abansi b’umwami. 
Psalms45:6 Ingoma yawe Mana, ihangamye ibihe bidashira, Icumu ry’ubugabe bgawe n’ icumu ry’ūganza atunganye." 
Psalms45:7 Wakunze ukugororoka, wanka ubugarariji: Ni co catumye Imana, ni yo Mana yawe, Ikurobanuza amavuta y’umunezero ikakurutisha bagenzi bawe." 
Psalms45:8 Impuzu zawe zose zitāmirana isenga n’imbazi na kesiya, Mu ngoro zisharijwe n’amahembe y’inzovu, inanga ziraguhimbaye." 
Psalms45:9 Mu ncoreke zawe z’icubahiro harimw’ abakobga b’abami: I buryo bgawe hahagaze umwamikazi yambaye izahabu yavuye muri Ofiru. 
Psalms45:10 Umve mukobga, wiyumvire, ubange ugutwi; Kandi wibagire ubgoko bganyu n’inzu ya so:" 
Psalms45:11 Ni co kizotuma umwami agomwa igikundiro cawe, Kukw ari we Mwami wawe, nawe umwunamire." 
Psalms45:12 Kand’ umukobga wo muri Tiro azozana ingorore, Kand’ abatunzi bo mu bantu bazogusaba ng’ ubatonere." 
Psalms45:13 Umukobga w’umwami ar’ i kare afise ubgiza bginshi: Impuzu ziwe zijishishijwe inyuzi z’izahabu. 
Psalms45:14 Ahava azanirwa umwami, yambaye impuzu zisharijwe: Abakobga bagenzi biwe bamukurikiye Bahava bazanwa ah’ uri." 
Psalms45:15 Barazananwa umunezero n’ uguhimbarwa, Binjire mu ngoro y’umwami." 
Psalms45:16 Mu gishingo ca ba sogokuruza bawe kizosubiramw’ abana bawe, Ni bo uzoshiraho kuba abaganwa mu gihugu cose." 
Psalms45:17 Nzokwibukiriza izina ryawe ibihe vyose: Ni co gituma amahanga azogushima ibihe bitazoshira. 
Psalms46:1 Imana ni yo buhungiro bgacu n’inkomezi zacu, N’umufasha atabura guseruka mu magorwa." 
Psalms46:2 Ni co gituma tutazotinya, nah’ isi yohinduka, Nah’ imisozi yoshingūrwa ikaja mw idamba ry’ibiyaga;" 
Psalms46:3 Nah’ amazi yavyo yobomborana, agasuriranya, Nah’ imisozi yotigitishwa no kwitera hejuru kwayo." 
Psalms46:4 Harih’ uruzi, amazi yarwo anezereza umurwa w’Imana, Ni wo hēra har’ amahema y’ Isumba vyose." 
Psalms46:5 Imana iri hagati muri wo, ntuzonyiganyizwa; Imana izowutabara mu mutwenzi w’amacāca." 
Psalms46:6 Abanyamahanga bavugije urwamo, ibihugu vy’abami biravuguswe; Ivuze ijwi ryayo, isi irashonga." 
Psalms46:7 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari kumwe natwe, Imana ya Yakobo n’ubuhungiro bgacu." 
Psalms46:8 Ni muze, murābe ibikorwa vy’Uhoraho, Ingene yarekuriye ubugesera mw isi." 
Psalms46:9 Aca intambara gushitsa ku mpera y’isi, Avunagura imiheto, amacumu arayacagagura, Imikogote ikwegwa n’amafarasi ayiturira mu muriro." 
Psalms46:10 Ni mwisigireho, mumenye kw ari jewe Mana; Nzoshirwa hejuru mu mahanga, nzoshirwa hejuru mw isi." 
Psalms46:11 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari kumwe natwe, Imana ya Yakobo n’ubuhungiro bgacu." 
Psalms47:1 Yemwe mahanga yose, ni mukome amashi; Muvugirize Imana impundu zo kunesha." 
Psalms47:2 Kuk’ Uhoraho asumba vyose ateye ubgoba, N’Umwami ahambaye aganza isi yose." 
Psalms47:3 Aduha guhagarara amahanga ku gakanu, Ashira amoko musi y’ibirenge vyacu." 
Psalms47:4 Adutoraniriza umwandu wacu, Ni wo vyirato vya Yakobo, uwo yakunze." 
Psalms47:5 Imana idūze mu mpundu, Uhoraho adūze mu majwi y’ inzamba." 
Psalms47:6 Muririmbire Imana ishimwe, muririmbe ishimwe: Muririmbire Umwami wacu ishimwe, muririmbe ishimwe." 
Psalms47:7 Kukw Imana ar’ Umwami w’ isi yose, Muririmbishe ishimwe ryayo indirimbo ironkeshejwe ubgenge." 
Psalms47:8 Imana irahangamye mu mahanga; Imana iravyagiye ku ntebe yayo yera. 
Psalms47:9 Abaganwa b’amahanga bashengejwe No guhinduka abantu b’Imana ya Aburahamu. Kukw inkinzo z’abo mw isi ar’ iz’ Imana; Ni yo ishizwe hejuru cane. 
Psalms48:1 Uhoraho arahambaye, abereye gushimirwa cane Ku murwa w’Imana yacu, ku musozi wayo wera." 
Psalms48:2 Umusozi Siyoni, uri mu ruhande rw’i burārūko, Igihagararo cawo ni ciza, ni wo binezaneza vy’isi yose, Ni wo murwa w’Umwami ahambaye." 
Psalms48:3 Imana yimenyekanishije mu ngoro zo kuri wo kw ar’ igihome kirekire gikīngira abantu. 
Psalms48:4 Kand’ abami barakorakoranye, Bawurenganira icarimwe," 
Psalms48:5 Barawurāba, baca baratangara, Bacika ivutu, bahunga vuba." 
Psalms48:6 Agatengo kabafatirayo, N’uburibge, nk’ibise vy’umugore aramutswe." 
Psalms48:7 Usāvya amāto y’i Tarushishi, Uyasābishije umuyaga uturutse i burasirazuba." 
Psalms48:8 Nk’uko twumvise, ni ko twabibonye Ku murwa w’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ku murwa w’Imana yacu: Imana izowushimangira ibihe vyose." 
Psalms48:9 Mana, twiyumviriye imbabazi zawe Turi mu rusengero rwawe." 
Psalms48:10 Mana, nk’ukw izina ryawe riri, Ni kw ishimwe ryawe riri, gushitsa ku mpera y’isi; Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kwuzuye ukugororoka." 
Psalms48:11 Umusozi Siyoni unezerwe, Abakobga ba Yuda bahimbarwe Kubg’ imanza ziroranye zawe." 
Psalms48:12 Mugendagende kuri Siyoni, muwukikuze, Muharūre iminara yaho," 
Psalms48:13 Mwitegereze cane inzitiro zaho z’amabuye, Mwiyumvire ingoro zaho: Kugira ngo muze muvyīgānire ab’ igihe kizoza." 
Psalms48:14 Kukw iyi Mana ar’ Imana yacu ibihe bitazoshira, Ni yo izoturōngōra gushitsa ku rupfu." 
Psalms49:1 Yemwe mahanga mwese, ni mwumve ibi; Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, ni mutege amatwi:" 
Psalms49:2 Aboroshe n’abahambaye, Abatunzi n’aboro bose hamwe." 
Psalms49:3 Akanwa kanje kagira kavuge ivy’ ubgenge, Umutima wanje ugira wiyumvire ivy’ ugutahura." 
Psalms49:4 Ndabangira ugutwi umugani, Ubupfindo bganje ndabupfindurisha inanga."
