Psalms49:5 N’iki cotuma ntinya mu misi y’ivyago, Ah’ ukugabitanya kw’abansi banje kunkikije?" 
Psalms49:6 Abishimira ubutunzi bgabo, Bakirata ibihinda vy’ivyo batunze," 
Psalms49:7 Nta n’umwe ashobora gucungura mugenzi we na gatoya, Canke guha Imana incungu yiwe:" 
Psalms49:8 Kukw incungu y’ubugingo bgabo ar’ iy’ igiciro, N’iyo kurekwa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms49:9 Nta womucungura ngw az’ abeho ibihe vyose, Yoye kubona rwa rwobo." 
Psalms49:10 Kukw abona kw abanyabgenge bapfa, Igipfu n’ikijuju bikarandukana, Bagasigarana abandi ubutunzi bgabo." 
Psalms49:11 Imva ni zo zizoba imigerēro yabo y’ibihe bidashira: Ni ho bazoba ibihe vyose, Nah’ amashamvu yabo bāri bāyitiriye amazina yabo." 
Psalms49:12 Yamar’ umuntu ntiyamana icubahiro, Ameze nk’ibikōko bipfa gusa." 
Psalms49:13 Ayo ni yo maherezo y’abiyizigira, N’abahimbarwa n’ivyabo ni yo matahiro." 
Psalms49:14 Bacūrirwa i kuzimu nk’umukuku w’intama, Rupfu azobaragira: Abatunganye bukeye bazobaganza; Ubgiza bgabo i kuzimu hazobuhabga ngo habumare, ntibugire aho kuba." 
Psalms49:15 Arikw Imana yo izocungura ubugingo bganje, ibukūre mu kuboko kw’i kuzimu, Kukw ari yo izonyakīra." 
Psalms49:16 Ntuz’ ugire ubgoba umuntu ni yatunga, Icubahiro c’inzu yiwe kikagwira:" 
Psalms49:17 Kuko ni yahwera atazogira ico ajana, Icubahiro ciwe ntikizomanuka ngo kimukurikire." 
Psalms49:18 Naho yibarira akiriho kw ahiriwe, Kandi naho bashima umuntu yitungiye;" 
Psalms49:19 Azohamvya ba sekuruza Batazobona umuco ukundi. 
Psalms49:20 Umuntu afise icubahiro ntagire n’ubgenge Ameze nk’ibikōko bipfa gusa. 
Psalms50:1 Inyabushobozi, Imana Rurema, Uhoraho aravuze; Ahamagaye isi, uhereye i burasirazuba, ugashitsa aho rirengera." 
Psalms50:2 Kuri Siyoni h’ubgiza buhebuje Ni ho Imana ikayanganiye. 
Psalms50:3 Imana yacu izoza, kandi ntizocereza: Imbere yayo umuriro uzotongora, Izokikizwa irya n’ino n’inkūbi y’umuyaga." 
Psalms50:4 Izohamagara ijuru ryo hejuru N’isi na yo; kugira ngw icire abantu bayo urubanza," 
Psalms50:5 Iti Munkoranirize hano abakunzi banje Bāsezeranye nanje basezeranisha ikimazi. 
Psalms50:6 Ijuru rizoserura ukugororoka kwayo: Kukw Imana ubgayo ari yo mucamanza. 
Psalms50:7 Bantu banje ni mwumve, nanje ndavuga, Wa bgoko bga Isirayeli, ndashinga intahe: Ni jewe ubganje Mana, Imana yawe." 
Psalms50:8 Sinkugayira ibimazi vyawe; Ibimazi vyawe vyoshejwe vyama imbere yanje na ntaryo. 
Psalms50:9 Sinzokwākīra imasa yo mu rugo rwawe, Cank’ amasuguru y’impene zo mu mpongore zawe," 
Psalms50:10 Kukw ibikōko vyose vyo mu kibira ar’ ivyanje, N’inka zo ku misozi y’ibihumbi." 
Psalms50:11 Ndazi inyoni n’ibisīga vyose vyo ku misozi, N’ibikōko vyo ku gahinga n’ ivyanje." 
Psalms50:12 Nogize inzara sinorinze kukubgira, Kukw isi ar’iyanje n’ibiyuzuye." 
Psalms50:13 Mbega nzorya inyama z’amapfizi, Canke nzonywa amaraso y’ impene?" 
Psalms50:14 Uz’ ushikanire Imana ikimazi co gukenguruka; Īsumba vyose uyishitsekw amasezerano yawe. 
Psalms50:15 Uz’ unyambaze ku musi w’ amagorwa, Nzogukiza, nawe uzompesha icubahiro." 
Psalms50:16 Arik’ umunyakibi Imana iramubaza, Iti Wiruhiriza iki kubarira abandi amabgirizwa yanje, Ugashira isezerano ryanje mu kanwa kawe?" 
Psalms50:17 K’ur’ inyankaguhanwa, Ugashiburira amajambo yanje inyuma yawe!" 
Psalms50:18 Iy’ ubonye umusuma, wemeranya na we, Kandi wifatanya n’abasambanyi." 
Psalms50:19 Uhaye ikibi akanwa kawe, Ururimi rwawe rwigenera ubugunge." 
Psalms50:20 Uganama uvuga nabi uwo muvukana, Urementaniriza mwene nyoko bgite." 
Psalms50:21 Ivyo urabikora, nanje ngahora, Ukiyumvira yuko mpwanye nawe rwose: Ariko nzoguhana, mbishire imbere y’amaso yawe, uko bikurikirana." 
Psalms50:22 None rero yemwe abibagira Imana, ni mwiyumvire ibi, Noye kubashishimura, hakabura uwobakiza:" 
Psalms50:23 Umuntu wese anshikanira ikimazi c’ishimwe aba ampesheje icubahiro: Kand’ ūtunganya ingeso ziwe Nzomwereka agakiza k’Imana. 
Psalms51:1 Ngirira ikigongwe Mana, kubg’ imbabazi zawe: Kubg’ isinzi ry’imbabazi zawe usibanganye ibicumuro vyanje." 
Psalms51:2 Unyuhagire rwose ukugabitanya kwanje, Unyoze icaha canje." 
Psalms51:3 Kuko nzi ibicumuro vyanje, Icaha canje cama imbere yanje na ntaryo." 
Psalms51:4 Ni wewe, ni wewe ubgawe, nacumuyeko, Nakoze ikibi mu nyonga zawe: Vyabaye birtyo kugira ng’ uboneke k’ugororotse ni wavuga, Kand’ uboneke k’uroranya ni waca urubanza." 
Psalms51:5 Rāba, nabumbanywe ukugabitanya, Mu vyaha ni ho mama yamvyariye." 
Psalms51:6 Rāba, ugomba ukuri hirya mu mutima, Mu bgigobeko bgawo uzommenyesha ubgenge." 
Psalms51:7 Unyezeshe ezobu, ndera: Unyuhagire ndaba derere kurusha uko shelegi yera." 
Psalms51:8 Unyumvishe umunezero n’ uguhimbarwa, Kugira ngw amagufa wavunnye anezerwe." 
Psalms51:9 Hisha inyonga zawe ivyaha vyanje, Usibanganye ibigabitanyo vyanje vyose." 
Psalms51:10 Mana, undememw’ umutima utunganye: Unsubizemw’ umutima uhamye." 
Psalms51:11 Ntunte kure yo mu nyonga zawe, Ntunkūreko Mpwemu wawe Yera." 
Psalms51:12 Unkomōrere umunezero w’ agakiza kawe; Unshigikirishe umutima ushize icīra. 
Psalms51:13 Ni ho nzokwigisha inzira yawe abacumura, Abanyavyaha baguhindukirire." 
Psalms51:14 Unkize umwenda w’amaraso y’umuntu, Mana, we Mana y’agakiza kanje; Ni ho ururimi rwanje ruzorenza ijwi ruririmba ukugororoka kwawe." 
Psalms51:15 Mwami, teranura iminwa yanje, Ni ho akanwa kanje kazokwamamaza ishimwe ryawe." 
Psalms51:16 N’uk’ utanezererwa ibimazi, mba mbigushikaniye: Ntuhimbarwa n’ibimazi vyoshejwe." 
Psalms51:17 Ibimazi Imana ishikanirwa n’umutima umenetse; Umutima umenetse, ujanjaguwe, Mana, ntuzowukēngēra." 
Psalms51:18 Ugirire neza i Siyoni, nk’uko haguhimbara; Wubake inzitiro z’amabuye z’i Yerusalemu." 
Psalms51:19 Ni ho uzonezerwa n’ibimazi bitunganye, ni vyo bimazi vyoshejwe, n’ibimazi vyoshejwe bidasonōye; Ni ho bazoshikanira amamasa ku gicaniro cawe." 
Psalms52:1 Wa muhizi we, n’iki gitumye wirata inzigo? Imbabazi z’Imana zihorah’ ibihe vyose." 
Psalms52:2 Ururimi rwawe rwigenera kugeseza, Rumeze nk’urupfuhe rukarishe, rukora ivy’ ubugunge." 
Psalms52:3 Ukunda ibibi kubirutisha ivyiza, N’ukubesha kukurutisha kuvuga ukuri." 
Psalms52:4 Wa rurimi rw’ingunge we, Ukunda amagambo yose ayongobeza abantu." 
Psalms52:5 Nawe Imana izogucuranguza gushitsa ibihe vyose, Izokuraha, igushikure mw ihema ryawe, Ikurandurane n’imizi igukūre mw isi y’abariho." 
Psalms52:6 Abagororotsi na bo bazobibona biyubare, Bamutwenge," 
Psalms52:7 Bati Rāba, uyu ni we atāhinduye Imana igihome kimukīngira, Ariko yizigira ibihinda vy’ ivyo atunze, Akiha inkomezi mu bubi bgiwe." 
Psalms52:8 Ariko jeho mmeze nk’igiti ca elayo kiremvye co mu rugo rw’Imana: Nizigira imbabazi z’Imana kugeza ibihe bitazoshira. 
Psalms52:9 Nzogushima ibihe vyose, kukw ari wewe wabikoze: Nzokwitega izina ryawe imbere y’abakunzi bawe, kukw ari ryiza." 
Psalms53:1 Igipfu cibgira mu mutima, ngo Nta Mana iriho. Bārononekaye, bākoze ivy’ ukugabitanya vyo kwankwa urunuka, Nta wukora ivyiza." 
Psalms53:2 Imana icishiriza mu bana b’abantu, iri mw ijuru, Kugira ngw irābe ko harimw’ abatāhūra, Barondera Imana." 
Psalms53:3 Bose bāsubiye inyuma; bose banduye hamwe; Nta wukora ivyiza, eka nta n’umwe." 
Psalms53:4 Mbeg’ inkozi z’ibibi zose nta bgenge zifise? Ko barya abantu banje nk’uko barya umutsima, Kandi ntibambaza Imana." 
Psalms53:5 Aho nyene bahacikiye umuhongo, ata kiwubaciye, Kukw Imana yakwiragije amagufa y’uwashagarije kugutera: Warabatetereje, kukw Imana yabahinyuye." 
Psalms53:6 Icompa agakiza k’Abisirayeli kakaba kaje kava i Siyoni! Imana ni yasubizay’ abantu bayo bājanywe ar’ inyagano, Ni ho aba Yakobo bazovuza impundu, Abisirayeli bakanezerwa." 
Psalms54:1 Mana, nkirisha izina ryawe, Ucishe urubanza rwanje inkomezi zawe." 
Psalms54:2 Mana, umviriza ugusenga kwanje; Tegera ugutwi amajambo yo mu kanwa kanje." 
Psalms54:3 Kukw abanyamahanga bāmpagurukiye, N’abantu b’ibirara barondeye ubugingo bganje, Batāshize Imana imbere yabo." 
Psalms54:4 Eh’ Imana n’umufasha wanje, Umwami ni we aramira ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms54:5 Abansi banje azobasubizakw iyo nabi; Ubahonnye kubg’ ukuri kwawe. 
Psalms54:6 Nzogushikanira ikimazi kivuye imbere mu mutima: Uhoraho, nzoshima izina ryawe kukw ari ryiza;" 
Psalms54:7 Kuk’ Uhoraho yankijije amagorwa yose, Ijisho ryanje rikībonera abansi banje." 
Psalms55:1 Mana, tegera ugutwi ugusenga kwanje; Ntiwihishe ukwinginga kwanje." 
Psalms55:2 Zirikana unyumve, unyishure: Nembembeshwa n’amajojwa yanje, ndaniha;" 
Psalms55:3 Kubg’ ijwi ry’umwansi, Kubg’ agahahazo k’abanyakibi. Kuko bandundakw amagorwa, Bakampīgana inzigo." 
Psalms55:4 Umutima wanje umbabariza cane imbere, Ubgoba bginshi bg’urupfu bunguyeko." 
Psalms55:5 Gutinya n’ukuja mu gatengo binshitseko, Ngwishijwe igihūmura no gucika ivutu." 
Psalms55:6 Ndavuga, nt’ Icompa nkagira amababa nk’inuma! Mba ngurutse, nkaruhuka." 
Psalms55:7 Rāba, mba nyerereye ngashika kure, Nkarāra mu bugaragwa." 
Psalms55:8 Mba mpungiye vuba mu buhungiro, Nkikinga igihuhuta n’inkūbi y’umuyaga." 
Psalms55:9 Mwami, ubayongobeze, uyoberanye indimi zabo: Kuko nabonye umuryano n’ intambara mu gisagara;" 
Psalms55:10 Ku murango no mw ijoro bagendagenda hejuru y’inzitiro z’amabuye zaco; Kandi kugabitanya n’inzigo biri hagati muri co; 
Psalms55:11 Ibibi biri hagati muri co: Agahahazo n’ubugunge ntibiva mu nzira zaco. 
Psalms55:12 S’umwansi yantutse, Vyari kumbera ibitwarika; Cank’ uwanyanka si we yanyishimye hejuru, Mba naramwinyegeje." 
Psalms55:13 Ariko ni wewe, urunganwe rwanje, Uwo twagendana, umukunzi wanje pfampfe." 
Psalms55:14 Twashira hamwe twinovorana, Tukagendagendana n’ishengero mu ngoro y’Imana." 
Psalms55:15 Urupfu rubazeko giturumbuka, Bamanuke baje i kuzimu bakibona, Kuko gukora ivyaha kuri mu ngo zabo no mu mitima yabo." 
Psalms55:16 Jeho nzokwambaza Imana, Uhoraho azonkiza." 
Psalms55:17 Ku mugoroba no mu gitondo no mu mashōka nzokwama niganyira, ncura umuniho, Na we azokwumva ijwi ryanje." 
Psalms55:18 Yacunguye ubugingo bganje ngo bube mu mahoro, kugira ngo ntibanyegēre, Kukw abandwanya ari benshi." 
Psalms55:19 Imana izonyumva, ibacishe bugufi, Ni yo ihora ihangamye uhereye kera hose.. Izocisha bugufi abatigeze bahīndāna, Batubaha Imana." 
Psalms55:20 Wa wundi yarāmvuye amaboko ngw arwanye abābana na we amahoro, Yahumanije isezerano ryiwe." 
Psalms55:21 Akanwa kiwe kanyerera nk’ amavuta, Arik’ umutima wiwe warimw’ intambara gusa; Amagambo yiwe yaremba kurusha amavuta ya elayo, Ariko yar’ inkota zisokowe." 
Psalms55:22 Ukorere Uhoraho umutwaro wawe, na we azokuramira: Ntazokwigera akundira umugororotsi kunyiganyizwa." 
Psalms55:23 Ariko wewe Mana, ba bandi uzobamanukana muri rwa rwobo rw’amahonero; Abicanyi n’ingunge ntibazocagatiza imisi y’ubugingo bgabo; Ariko jeho nzokwama nkwizigira." 
Psalms56:1 Mana, ngirira ikigongwe, kukw abantu bashaka kummira; Biriza umusi bandwanya bampahaza." 
Psalms56:2 Abansi banje biriza umusi bashaka kummira, Kukw abandwananya agakēngērwe ari benshi." 
Psalms56:3 Igihe cose ntinye Nzokwizigira. 
Psalms56:4 Imana izompa gushima ijambo ryayo, Imana ni yo nizigiye, sinzotinya; Non’ abantu boshobora kuntwara iki?" 
Psalms56:5 Biriza umusi bagoreka amajambo yanje, Ivyiyumviro vyabo vyose n’ ivyo kungirira nabi." 
Psalms56:6 Barakorana, bakinyegeza, Bakagenza ibirenge vyanje, Kuko babundiye ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms56:7 Mbeg’ ukugabitanya kwabo kuzobakiza? Mana, uburake bgawe ubutsindishe hasi amahanga." 
Psalms56:8 Uharūra iminihiro yanje: Ushire amosozi yanje mw icupa ryawe; Mbega ntiyanditswe mu gitabo cawe? 
Psalms56:9 Maz’ abansi banje bazosubizwa inyuma ku musi nzotakambako: Ivyo ndabizi, kukw Imana iri mu ruhande rwanje." 
Psalms56:10 Imana izompa gushima ijambo ryayo; Uhoraho azompa gushima ijambo ryiwe. 
Psalms56:11 Imana ni yo nizigiye, sinzotinya; Non’ abantu boshobora kuntwara iki?" 
Psalms56:12 Mana, amasezerano nagusezeraniye ari kuri jewe, Kandi nzogushikanira ibimazi vy’ishimwe." 
Psalms56:13 Kuko wakijije ubugingo bganje urupfu, N’ibirenge vyanje mbega ntiwabikijije gutsitara? Ngo mbone ingene ngendera imbere y’Imana Mu muco w’abakiriho." 
Psalms57:1 Ngirira ikigongwe Mana, ngirira ikigongwe, Kuk’ ubugingo bganje buronka ubuhungiro muri wewe: Mbere no mu gitūtu c’ amababa yawe ni ho ngira mpungire, Gushitsa ah’ ibi vyago birenganira." 
Psalms57:2 Ndatakambira Imana isumba vyose, Ni yo Mana immarira vyose." 
Psalms57:3 Izotuma iri mw ijuru inkize, Ūshaka kummira ni yantuka.. Imana izotuma imbabazi zayo n’ukuri kwayo." 
Psalms57:4 Ubugingo bganje buri hagati y’intambge: Ndyama hagati y’abaka umuriro, Ni bo bana b’abantu, amenyo yabo n’amacumu n’imyampi; Ururimi rwabo n’inkota ikarishe." 
Psalms57:5 Mana, n’ushirwe hejuru y’ amajuru, Icubahiro cawe kibe hejuru y’isi yose." 
Psalms57:6 Bateze ibirenge vyanje umutego; Umutima wanje uricurikiriye. Bimvye icobo imbere yanje: Baba ari bo bakirokeramwo. 
Psalms57:7 Mana, umutima wanje urahamye, umutima wanje urahamye: Ndaririmba, mbere ndaririmba ishimwe." 
Psalms57:8 Ewe bgiza bganje, ni wikangure; kembe n’inanga ni mwikangure: Nanje ubganje nzokwikangura ntange umutwenzi." 
Psalms57:9 Mwami nzogushimira mu moko: Nzokuririmbira ishimwe mu mahanga," 
Psalms57:10 Kukw imbabazi zawe ari nyinshi zishika mw ijuru, Ukuri kwawe gushika no mu bicu." 
Psalms57:11 Mana, n’ushirwe hejuru y’ amajuru, Icubahiro cawe kibe hejuru y’isi yose." 
Psalms58:1 Mbeg’ ugucereza ni kwo mucisha imanza zibereye? Yemwe bana b’abantu, mbega muca imanza zigororotse?" 
Psalms58:2 Oyaye, mugabo mukorera ivyo kugabitanya mu mitima yanyu; Umuryano w’amaboko yanyu ni wo rubanza mucira mu gihugu." 
Psalms58:3 Abanyakibi batandukanywa n’ Imana uhereye ku kuva mu nda za ba nyina: Iyo bavutse baca bizimagiza, bakabesha." 
Psalms58:4 Ubumara bgabo bumeze nk’ ubg’ inzoka: Bameze nk’imamba itumva, yiziba amatwi," 
Psalms58:5 Itumva ijwi ry’abagunzi, Naho bayigundisha ubupfumu." 
Psalms58:6 Mana, ubavune amenyo mu kanwa kabo: Uhoraho, uhongagure amajigo y’iyo migunza y’intambge." 
Psalms58:7 Ni bakamangane nk’amazi ashēshwe; Bakigenekereza imyampi ibe nk’ibishishibano. 
Psalms58:8 Babe nk’igifyera kiyaga kigashira; Babe nk’inda ikorotse, itigeze kubona izuba." 
Psalms58:9 Inkono zanyu zitarumva umuriro w’inkwi z’amahwa, Imana izozikūzah’ agashururu, imbisi n’izifashwe zose." 
Psalms58:10 Umugororotsi azonezerwa ni yabona ukwo guhōra: Azokwogesha ibirenge vyiwe amaraso y’ababi. 
Psalms58:11 Bizotuma abantu bavuga, bati N’ukuri har’ impēra y’ abagororotsi: N’ukuri harih’ Imana icira imanza mw isi." 
Psalms59:1 Mana yanje, unkize abansi banje: Unshire hejuru y’abampagurukiye." 
Psalms59:2 Unkize inkozi z’ibibi, Undinde abavisha amaraso." 
Psalms59:3 Kuko rāba, babundiye ubugingo bganje; Abahizi barankoraniye, Atari kubg’ icanje gicumuro cank’ icanje caha, Uhoraho." 
Psalms59:4 Barirukanga bakitegura, batagira ico bampōra. Vyukuruka unsanganire, uvyitegereze:" 
Psalms59:5 Wewe nyene, Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo, Mana y’ Abisirayeli, Vyuka ugīre amahanga yose, Ntugire abanyabicumuro babi ugirira ikigongwe." 
Psalms59:6 Bataha ku mugoroba bagwangwara nk’imbga, Bakagendura igisagara." 
Psalms59:7 Ehe badudubiza amagambo mabi mu kanwa kabo, Inkota ziri mu minwa yabo: Kuko bibgira, bati Ni nde avyumva?" 
Psalms59:8 Ariko weho Uhoraho, uzobatwenga; Uzokwegurwa n’agashinyo ku mahanga yose." 
Psalms59:9 Ewe nkomezi zanje, nzokwitega: Kukw Imana ari yo gihome kirekire kinkīngira." 
Psalms59:10 Imana mboneramw’ imbabazi izonsanganira, Imana izompa kwibonera abandyamiye." 
Psalms59:11 Ntubice, abantu banje boye kwibagira: Ubasābagirishe ubushobozi bgawe, ubacishe bugufi, Mwami, nkinzo idukīngira." 
Psalms59:12 Amagambo yo mu minwa yabo ni yo gicumuro c’ akanwa kabo, Ubgibone bgabo bubafate nk’ umutego, Bo n’imivumo n’ibinyoma bavuga." 
Psalms59:13 Ubamarane uburake, ubamare, boye kubah’ ukundi; Kugeza ku mpera y’isi Bamenye yukw Imana ari yo iganza aba Yakobo." 
Psalms59:14 Ba bandi baze batahe ku mugoroba, bagwangware nk’imbga, Bagendure igisagara." 
Psalms59:15 Bahunahuna hose barondera inyama; Ni batāhāga bakesha ijoro. 
Psalms59:16 Ariko jeho nzoririmba inkomezi zawe; Mbere mu gitondo nzoririmba imbabazi zawe n’ijwi rirenga: Kuko wambereye igihome kirekire kinkīngira, N’ubuhungiro ku musi w’ amagorwa yanje." 
Psalms59:17 Ewe nkomezi zanje, ni wewe nzoririmbira ishimwe: Kukw Imana ari yo gihome kirekire kinkīngira, n’Imana mboneramw’ imbabazi." 
Psalms60:1 Mana, uradutaye, uradusambuye: Wararatse; n’udusubizemw’ intege." 
Psalms60:2 Watumye igihugu gihinda agashitsi, uragisatagura: Zibira ubunyenyagu bgaco, kuko kinyiganyiga." 
Psalms60:3 Weretse abantu bawe ibigoye, Watunywesheje vino zidandabagiranya." 
Psalms60:4 Wahaye abakwubaha ibendera, Kugira ngo ryerekanwe kubg’ ukuri." 
Psalms60:5 Kirisha ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo, unyishure, Kugira ngw abo ukunda barokorwe." 
Psalms60:6 Imana yatanze indahiro ku kwera kwayo, iti Nzonezerwa, Nzogabura i Shekemu, kandi nzogaburisha amabango umwonga w’i Sukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Gileyadi n’ahanje, umuryango wa Manase n’uwanje; Uwa Efurayimu ni wo ukīngira umutwe wanje; Uwa Yuda ni wo cumu ry’ ubugabe bganje." 
Psalms60:8 I Mowabu ni ho cogero canje, Abanyedomu nzobashiburirakw inkweto, Filisitiya, umvugirize impundu." 
Psalms60:9 Ni nde azonshikana mu gisagara kizitijwe ibikomeye? Ni nde azonshikana muri Edomu? 
Psalms60:10 Si wewe uzonshikanayo ga Mana yadutaye? Si wewe uzonshikanayo ga Mana itajana n’ingabo zacu? 
Psalms60:11 Udutabare umurwanizi, Kuko gutabara kw’abantu ar’ ukw’ ubusa." 
Psalms60:12 Imana izodukoresha ivy’ ubuhizi, Kukw ari yo izosiribanga abarwanizi bacu." 
Psalms61:1 Mana, umva ugutakamba kwanje; Zirikana ugusenga kwanje." 
Psalms61:2 Uhereye ku mpera y’isi nzoguhamagara, uk’ umutima wanje uzodendebukirwa: Unshire ku gitandara kirekire ntokwishitsako." 
Psalms61:3 Kuko wambereye ubuhungiro, N’igihome kirekire kinkīngira umwansi." 
Psalms61:4 Nzoba mw ihema ryawe ibihe bidashira, Nzohungira mu bgihisho bgo mu mababa yawe." 
Psalms61:5 Kuko wewe Mana, wumvise amasezerano yanje: Umpaye umwandu uhabga abubaha izina ryawe." 
Psalms61:6 Umwami uzomwongera iyindi misi, Imyaka yiwe izomara ibihe n’ibindi." 
Psalms61:7 Azokwama ar’ imbere y’ Imana ibihe bidashira: Itegure imbabazi n’ukuri, kugira ngo bimuzigame." 
Psalms61:8 Ni ho nzoririmbira izina ryawe ishimwe ibihe bidashira, Ngo nshitse amasezerano yanje uko bukeye." 
Psalms62:1 Umutima wanje uhwekereye ku Mana yonyene: Ni yo agakiza kanje kandurukako. 
Psalms62:2 Ni yo gitandara canje yonyene n’agakiza kanje, N’igihome kirekire kinkīngira: sinzosegenyeshwa cane." 
Psalms62:3 Muzogeza hehe gutera umuntu, Ngo mumwice mwese, Nk’igisika gihengamye, nk’ uruzitiro rugira rutembe?" 
Psalms62:4 Nta kindi gituma baja inama, atar’ ukugira ngo bamutemvye ngw ave mu bukuru bgiwe; Bahimbarwa n’ibinyoma: Bahezagirisha akanwa, ariko bavumanisha imitima." 
Psalms62:5 Mutima wanje, uhwekere ku Mana yonyene, Kukw ari yo ivyizigiro vyanje vyandurukako." 
Psalms62:6 Ni yo gitandara canje yonyene n’agakiza kanje; N’igihome kirekire kinkīngira, sinzosegenyeshwa." 
Psalms62:7 Imana ni yo irimw’ agakiza kanje n’icubahiro canje: Igitandara c’inkomezi zanje n’ubuhungiro bganje biri mu Mana. 
Psalms62:8 Yemwe bantu, mwame muyizigira ibihe vyose: Musuke ivyo mu mitima yanyu imbere yayo: Imana ni yo itubera ubuhungiro." 
Psalms62:9 N’ukuri abafafara ni nk’impwemu zihumetswe, kand’ abahambaye n’ibinyoma gusa: Ni bashirwa ku munzane, bazoteruka gusa; Bose hamwe bahwahutse kurusha impwemu zihumetswe." 
Psalms62:10 Ntimwishimire agahahazo, Kandi ntimwizigire ubunyazi: Itunga ni ryagwira, ntimuze murishirekw imitima." 
Psalms62:11 Imana yavuze rimwe; Navyumvise kabiri; Ngw Imana ni yo ifise inganji: 
Psalms62:12 Kandi ni wewe Mwami, ufise imbabazi: Kuko wishura umuntu wese ibikwiranye n’ico yakoze." 
Psalms63:1 Mana, ni wewe Mana yanje; nzozinduka nkurondere. Umutima wanje ukugirira inyota, umubiri wanje ukwifuriza Mu gihugu cumye, kiruhijwe, kitagira amazi." 
Psalms63:2 Uko ni ko nagutumberereye ur’ ahēra hawe, Kugira ngo ndābe ubushobozi bgawe n’ubgiza bgawe." 
Psalms63:3 Kukw imbabazi zawe zindutira ubugingo, Iminwa yanje izogushima." 
Psalms63:4 Uko ni ko nzoguhimbaza, nkiriho: Nzotarika amaboko mw izina ryawe." 
Psalms63:5 Umutima wanje uzohāzwa nk’ūriye umusokōro n’ibinure: Akanwa kanje kazogushimisha iminwa inezerewe," 
Psalms63:6 Uko nzokwibuka ndi ku buriri bganje, Nkakwiyumvira mu bihe vy’ amaterama." 
Psalms63:7 Kuko wambereye umufasha, Kandi nzovugiriza impundu mu gitūtu c’amababa yawe." 
Psalms63:8 Umutima wanje ukwōmako: Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kurandamira. 
Psalms63:9 Arikw abashaka kunyica ngo banzimirize Bazoja epfo i kuzimu. 
Psalms63:10 Bazoshirwa mu bubasha bg’ inkota, Bazoba umugabane w’imbgebge." 
Psalms63:11 Arik’ umwami azonezererwa Imana, Ūyirahira wese azokwirata: Kukw akanwa k’ababesha kazozibga." 
Psalms64:1 Mana umva ijwi ryanje mu majojwa yanje, Kiza ubugingo bganje gutinya umwansi." 
Psalms64:2 Nnyegeza inama zo mu mpisho z’abakora nabi, N’imivurungano y’inkozi z’ ibibi:" 
Psalms64:3 Bakubiriye indimi zabo nk’ inkota, Bagenekereje imyampi yabo, ni yo magambo arura:" 
Psalms64:4 Kugira ngo barase ūtunganye bari mu mpisho: Bamurasa giturumbuka ata bgoba. 
Psalms64:5 Biremeshesha imigabo mibi, Baja inama zo gutega imitego mu mpisho; Bakibgira, bati Ni nde azoheza akayibona?" 
Psalms64:6 Barondera inama mbi; bakibgira, bat’ Inama twarondera turayinogeje. Kuk’ ubgenge bg’umuntu n’ umutima wiwe vyigobetse." 
Psalms64:7 Arikw Imana izobarasa, Bazokomeretswa n’umwampi giturumbuka." 
Psalms64:8 Uko ni ko bazotsitazwa, urwabo rurimi bgite ruzobarwanya: Abababona bose bazozunguza imitwe." 
Psalms64:9 Kand’ abantu bose bazotinya; Bamenyekanishe igikorwa c’ Imana, Biyumvirishe ubgenge ivyo yakoze." 
Psalms64:10 Umugororotsi azonezererwa Uhoraho, amwizigire; Kand’ abafise imitima itunganye bose bazovuza impundu." 
Psalms65:1 Mana, i Siyoni bagushimisha agahwekere, Kuri wewe bazoshitsa amasezerano." 
Psalms65:2 Wewe wumva ivyo usabga, Abafise umubiri bose bazoza kuri wewe." 
Psalms65:3 Ukugabitanya kwinshi kurannesheje, Arikw ibicumuro vyacu uzobizimanganya." 
Psalms65:4 Hahirwa umuntu utoranya, ukamwiyegereza, Kugira ngw abe mu nyubakwa zawe: Tuzohāzwa n’ivyiza vyo mu ngoro yawe, Vy’ahēra ho mu rusengero rwawe." 
Psalms65:5 Uzotwishurisha ibiteye ubgoba kubg’ ukugororoka, Mana y’agakiza kacu: Ni wewe vyizigiro vy’abo ku mpera zose z’isi, N’ivy’ abari kure ku kiyaga." 
Psalms65:6 Iyo ni yo ishimangirisha imisozi inkomezi zayo, Ikenyeye ubushobozi." 
Psalms65:7 Izibiza kubomborana kw’ibiyaga, kubomborana kw’imipfunda yavyo, N’imivurungano y’amahanga." 
Psalms65:8 Kand’ ababa ku mpera z’isi batinya ibimenyetso vyawe: Uvugisha impundu iy’ igitondo gituruka n’iy’ umugoroba uturuka. 
Psalms65:9 Ugendera isi, ukayirekurira imvura, Uyitungisha cane; Uruzi rw’Imana rwuzuye amazi; Ni wewe wereza abantu impeke, umaze kuhatunganya urtyo." 
Psalms65:10 Uringaniza amaburi yaho, Urekurira imvura mu myanya yo muri yo, Uhorohesha imvura y’akajogotere; Uha ukumera kwaho umugisha." 
Psalms65:11 Wambika umwaka kugira neza kwawe nk’igitsibo, Mu burari bgawe handagaza umugisha," 
Psalms65:12 Wandagara ku miyonga yo mu bugaragwa: Imisozi igakenyera umunezero. 
Psalms65:13 Imikuku yambaye imiyonga, Imyonga yeramw’ impeke zirayitwikira; Isemerezwa n’umunezero ikaririmba." 
Psalms66:1 Yemwe abari mw isi yose, muvugirize Imana impundu:" 
Psalms66:2 Muririmbe mwerekana icubahiro c’izina ryayo, Muhimbaze ishimwe ryayo." 
Psalms66:3 Mubgire Imana, mut’ Ereg’ ibikorwa vyawe biteye ubgoba! Ubushobozi bgawe bginshi buzotuma abansi bawe bose bakwunamira baguhema." 
Psalms66:4 Abo mw isi yose bazogusenga, Bakuririmbire: Bazoririmbira izina ryawe." 
Psalms66:5 Ni muze murābe ibikorwa vy’Imana, Iteye ubgoba ku vyo igirira abana b’abantu." 
Psalms66:6 Yahinduye ikiyaga ahūmūtse, Kandi baciye mu ruzi n’ ibirenge: Aho ni ho twayinezererewe." 
Psalms66:7 Iganzisha ubushobozi bgayo ibihe bidashira; Inyonga zayo zitegereza amahanga: Abagarariji ntibishire hejuru. 
Psalms66:8 Yemwe mwa mahanga, ni muhimbaze Imana yacu, Mwumvikanishe ijwi ry’ishimwe ryayo." 
Psalms66:9 Izigama ubugingo bgacu ntibupfe, Kandi ntikundira ibirenge vyacu ko bitirimuka." 
Psalms66:10 Kuko Mana wadukwanguye; Watuvugutiye nk’uko bavugutira ifeza. 
Psalms66:11 Watuzanye mu mutego, Waduhekesheje umutwaro uremereye mu mugongo." 
Psalms66:12 Wahaye abantu kuduhonyangisha ku gakanu amafarasi bagenderako, Twaciye mu muriro no mu mazi; Maz’ udukūramwo, udushira ahantu hatūritse." 
Psalms66:13 Ndinjirana ibimazi vyoshejwe mu ngoro yawe, Ndagushitsakw amasezerano yanje," 
Psalms66:14 Amwe yanteranuriye iminwa, Akanwa kanje kakayavuga, hamwe nari mu mubabaro." 
Psalms66:15 Ndagushikanira ibimazi vyoshejwe vy’amatungo avyibushe, N’umubabge w’amapfizi y’ intama; Ndashikana amamasa bo n’ impene." 
Psalms66:16 Yemwe abubaha Imana mwese, ni muze mwumve, Nanje mvuge ivyo yagiriye ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms66:17 Nayitakambishirije akanwa kanje, Ururimi rwanje rwarayihimbaje." 
Psalms66:18 Iyaba nari nshize umutima wanje ku vyo kugabitanya Umwami Imana ntaba yaranyumviye. 
Psalms66:19 Ariko vy’ukuri Imana iranyumviye, Yabangiye ugutwi ijwi ry’ ugusenga kwanje." 
Psalms66:20 Imana ihimbazwe, Itirukanye ugusenga kwanje, kand’ itānkūyekw imbabazi zayo." 
Psalms67:1 Imana itugirire ikigongwe, iduhe umugisha, Itwakishirize mu nyonga hayo." 
Psalms67:2 Kugira ngw inzira yawe imenyekane mw isi, N’agakiza kawe mu mahanga yose." 
Psalms67:3 Mana, amoko agushime, Amoko yose agushime." 
Psalms67:4 Amahanga anezerwe, aririmbishwe n’akanyamuneza: Kuk’ uzocira amoko imanza ziroranye, Kand’ uzorōngōra amahanga mw isi." 
Psalms67:5 Mana, amoko agushime, Amoko yose agushime." 
Psalms67:6 Isi irimbuka ivyimburo vyayo; Imana, ni yo Mana yacu, izoduha umugisha." 
Psalms67:7 Imana izoduha umugisha; Kand’ abo ku mpera zose z’isi bazoyubaha. 
Psalms68:1 Imana ikūre hasi, abansi bayo basābagire, Kand’ abayanka na bo bahunge bave imbere yayo." 
Psalms68:2 Nk’uk’ umwotsi utumuka, abe ari k’ubatumura: Nk’ukw ishashara iyagira i ruhande y’umuriro Abe ari kw abanyakibi barandukira imbere y’Imana." 
Psalms68:3 Arikw abagororotsi ni banezerwe, bavugirize impundu imbere y’Imana: Mbere banezerwe, bagire akanyamuneza." 
Psalms68:4 Ni muririmbire Imana, muririmbire izina ryayo ishimwe: Muharurire umuharuro Imwe ica mu bugaragwa igendera mu mukogote ukwegwa n’ amafarasi; Izina ryayo ni YA; ni muvugirize impundu imbere yayo." 
Psalms68:5 Imana ir’ ahayo hēra Ni se w’impfuvyi, n’umucamanza ahagarikira abapfakazi." 
Psalms68:6 Imana ishira mu ngo abatagira shinge na rugero, Ibohora imbohe, ikaziha kugubga neza: Arikw abagarariji bakaba mu gihugu cumye." 
Psalms68:7 Mana, hamwe waja imbere y’abantu bawe, Hamwe wagenda mu bugaragwa;." 
Psalms68:8 Isi yahinze agashitsi, Amajuru ashongera imbere y’Imana: Sinayi uriya uhindira agashitsi imbere y’Imana, ni yo Mana y’Abisirayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Mana, warekuriye ishamvu yawe imvura y’ubuntu: Wahashubijemw’ intege hamwe hari harushe." 
Psalms68:10 Abantu bawe bayigerereyemwo: Mana witeguriye umugorwa kubgo kugira neza kwawe. 
Psalms68:11 Umwami Imana yaravuze: Abagore bakwiza inkuru baba ingabo nyinshi. 
Psalms68:12 Abami bari kumwe n’ingabo barahunga, barahunga: Umugore asigaye mu rugo ni we agabanganya iminyago." 
Psalms68:13 Mukiryama mu mpongore z’ intama, amababa y’inuma akayanganakw ifeza, N’amoya yayo akayanganakw izahabu y’umuhondo." 
Psalms68:14 Hamwe Īshobora vyose yashwiragiriza abami mu gihugu, Shelegi yarikw iragwa kuri Tsalumoni." 
Psalms68:15 Umusozi w’i Bashani n’umusozi w’Imana, Umusozi w’i Bashani n’umusozi w’udutwe twinshi." 
Psalms68:16 Mwa misozi miremire, n’iki gituma murābana ishari Umusozi Imana yagomwe ngw iwubeko? Mbere, Uhoraho azowubakw ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms68:17 Imikogote y’Imana n’ibihumbi cumi, ibihumi cumi, Mbere n’ibihumbi n’ibihumbi: Umwami Imana ari hagati yayo; Sinayi ur’ ahēra ho mu rusengero." 
Psalms68:18 Uradūze, uja iyo hejuru, ujanye iminyago, Uhērewe ingabire hagati y’ abantu: Mbere uzihērewe hagati y’ abagarariji na bo, kugira ng’ Uhoraho Imana abane na bo." 
Psalms68:19 Umwami ahimbazwe, atwikorerera umutwaro uko bukeye, Ni we Mana itubera agakiza." 
Psalms68:20 Imana itubera Imana y’agakiza, idukiza kenshi; Kand’ Uhoraho, Umwami, ni we ashobora gukūra mu rupfu." 
Psalms68:21 Arikw Imana izomenagura imitwe y’abansi bayo, N’agahanga kamerak’ umushatsi k’umuntu wese ashishikara kugendera mu bimutsindisha." 
Psalms68:22 Umwami Imana yaravuze, ati Nzobagarukana bave i Bashani, Nzobagarukana bave i bgina mu kiyaga:" 
Psalms68:23 Kugira ng’ ushire ikirenge cawe mu maraso, Kandi ngw indimi z’imbga zawe zihabge imitigiri y’ abansi bawe." 
Psalms68:24 Mana, bārāvye ingendo yawe, Ingendo y’Imana yanje, ni yo Mwami wanje, yinjira ahēra." 
Psalms68:25 Abaririmvyi bagiye imbere, abacuraranzi barabakurikira, Hagati y’abigeme bavuza udushako tw’ingoma." 
Psalms68:26 Muhimbarize Imana mu makoraniro, Ni yo Mwami, yemwe abākomotse kw isōko ari yo Isirayeli." 
Psalms68:27 Nguriya umuryango wa Benyamini umuhererezi, ni wo ubagaba, Bo n’abaganwa b’aba Yuda n’ingabo zabo, N’abaganwa b’aba Zebuloni, n’abaganwa b’aba Nafutali." 
Psalms68:28 Imana yawe ikugereye inkomezi, Mana, komeza ivyo wadukoreye;" 
Psalms68:29 Kubg’ urusengero rwawe i Yerusalemu Abami bazokuzanira ingorore. 
Psalms68:30 Enda ni wāmire ca gikōko co mu rufunzo, N’amapfizi menshi n’inyana zo mu mahanga, Gushitsa aho bazogukomera amashi, bakugororere amafeza: Sābagiza amahanga ahimbarwa n’intambara." 
Psalms68:31 Abaganwa bazoza bavuye muri Egiputa, Etiyopiya hazokwihutira kurāmvurira Imana amaboko yaho." 
Psalms68:32 Yemwe bihugu vy’abami bo mw isi, muririmbire Imana; Muririmbire Umwami ishimwe;." 
Psalms68:33 Ni we agendera kw ijuru ryo hejuru y’amajuru yose, ryamyeho uhereye kera hose: Rāba avuga ijwi, ijwi rihambaye." 
Psalms68:34 Mwaturire Imana kw ifise ubushobozi, Ubgiza bgayo buri hejuru y’Abisirayeli, Ubushobozi bgayo buri mu bicu." 
Psalms68:35 Mana, urateye ubgoba ur’ ahēra hawe: Imana y’Abisirayeli ni yo iha abantu bayo inkomezi n’ ubushobozi. Imana ihimbazwe." 
Psalms69:1 Nkiza Mana: Kukw amazi ashitse no ku bugingo bganje. 
Psalms69:2 Ndadobeye mw ishayo imira, idafise aho gushinga ikirenge: Nshitse mu mazi amira, ah’ umukuba undengera." 
Psalms69:3 Kurira kwanje kuranduhije; umuhogo urūmye: Amaso yanje yākobotse nkirorereye Imana yanje. 
Psalms69:4 Abanyankira ubusa baruta umushatsi wo ku mutwe wanje mu bginshi: Abagomba kundandura, banyankishwa n’inyanduruko z’ibinyoma, barahambaye: Ni ho narihishijwe ico ntatwaye." 
Psalms69:5 Mana, ni wewe uzi ubupfu bganje: Ivyaha vyanje ntubinyegejwe." 
Psalms69:6 Mwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, abakurorereye ntibaze bamāramāzwe kubganje: Mana y’Abisirayeli, abakurondera ntibaze batēterezwe kubganje." 
Psalms69:7 Kuko nihanganira ibitutsi bakumpōra; Isoni zitwikiriye mu maso hanje. 
Psalms69:8 Mpindutse akavantara ku bo tuvukana, Na murundi kuri bene mama." 
Psalms69:9 Kukw ishaka ry’inzu yawe rindya; Ibitutsi vy’abagutuka vyaguye kuri jewe. 
Psalms69:10 Aho narira, ngahanisha umutima wanje kwisonzesha, Vyampindukiye ibitutsi." 
Psalms69:11 Aho nagize amagunira kuba imyambaro yanje, Nabahindukiye iciro ry’imigani." 
Psalms69:12 Abicara kw irembo baramvuga; Nd’ indirimbo y’ababorewe. 
Psalms69:13 Ariko jeho, amasengesho yanje ari kuri wewe, Uhoraho: Mana, mu gihe co kwemererwamwo, kubg’ isinzi ry’ imbabazi zawe, Unyishurishe ukuri kw’agakiza kawe." 
Psalms69:14 Unshayure mw ishayo, sindobere: Nkizwe abanyanka, nkizwe n’amazi maremare." 
Psalms69:15 Umukuba ntuntware, Mw idamba ntihammire: Rwa rwobo ntirundumanirizek’ umunwa warwo." 
Psalms69:16 Uhoraho unyishure, kukw imbabazi zawe ari nziza: Unkebuke, nk’uko kugira neza kwawe ari kwinshi." 
Psalms69:17 Kandi ntuhishe umusavyi wawe mu nyonga hawe; Kuko ngowe: unyishure vuba. 
Psalms69:18 Wēgēre ubugingo bganje, ubukize: Uncungure kubg’ abansi banje." 
Psalms69:19 Ni wewe uzi ukuntu ntukwa, n’ukuntu ntēterezwa, n’ ukuntu nkēngērwa: Abarwanizi banje bose bar’ imbere yawe." 
Psalms69:20 Ibitutsi vyammenaguye umutima, ndaremerewe cane: Nareretse ko har’ uwongirira akagongwe, nta wabonetse; N’uko har’ abonyirura, ndabura." 
Psalms69:21 Kandi bāmpaye umururazi kuba ivyo kurya vyanje; Ngize inyota bampa inkarisha ngo ndayinywe. 
Psalms69:22 Ameza yabo ahinduke ururiba imbere yabo: Bakiri mu mahoro, ahinduke umutego." 
Psalms69:23 Amaso yabo n’ahumwe, ntibabone; Wame uhindisha agashitsi ikiyunguyungu cabo." 
Psalms69:24 Ubasukek’ ugushangashirwa kwawe, Uburake bgawe bg’inkazi bubahamvye," 
Psalms69:25 I wabo hasigare imisaka, Kandi ntihakagire ūba mu mahema yabo." 
Psalms69:26 Kuko bahama uwo wakubise; Kandi bongeranya umubabaro w’abo wakomerekeje. 
Psalms69:27 Ibigabitanyo vyabo ubibasubirize mu nkōko: Ntibaze binjire mu vy’ukugororoka kwawe. 
Psalms69:28 Basibanganywe mu gitabo c’ ubugingo, Ntibaze bandikanwe n’abagororotsi." 
Psalms69:29 Ariko jeho nd’umugorwa, ndababaye; Mana, agakiza kawe kanshire hejuru." 
Psalms69:30 Nzotazirisha izina ry’Imana indirimbo: Nzoyihimbarisha ishimwe ry’ ivyo yankoreye. 
Psalms69:31 Ivyo bizohimbara Uhoraho kurusha impfizi, Cank’ imasa ifise amahembe n’inzāra." 
Psalms69:32 Abaciye bugufi bazobirāba banezerwe; Yemwe abarondera Imana, imitima yanyu isubizwemw’ ubugingo." 
Psalms69:33 Kuk’ Uhoraho yumva abakene, Ntakēngēra imbohe ziwe." 
Psalms69:34 Ijuru n’isi ni bimushime, N’ibiyaga n’ibibigendamwo vyose." 
Psalms69:35 Kukw Imana izokiza Siyoni, ikubaka ibisagara vya Yuda; Bazohaba, hababere ishamvu." 
Psalms69:36 Kand’ uruvyaro rw’abasavyi bayo ruzoharagwa; Abakunda izina ryayo bazohagerēra. 
Psalms70:1 Mana, tebuka unkize; Uhoraho, tebuka untabare." 
Psalms70:2 Abashaka kunyica Bicwe n’isoni batētērwe: Abanezerezwa n’uko ngiriwe nabi Basubizwe inyuma bakēngērwe. 
Psalms70:3 Abavuga bati Ha ha ha ha! Basubizwe inyuma bamāramāre. 
Psalms70:4 Abakurondera bose bakunezererwe bahimbarwe, Abakunda agakiza kawe baze bame bavuga, Bat’ Imana irahambaye!" 
Psalms70:5 Ariko jeho nd’ umugorwa, nd’ umukene: Mana, n’unyaruke uze iyo ndi: Ni wewe mutabazi wanje n’ umurokozi wanje; Uhoraho, ntutebe." 
Psalms71:1 Uhoraho, ni wewe mpungirako: Sinze nigere mmāramāzwa." 
Psalms71:2 Unkize kubg’ ukugororoka kwawe, undokore: Umbangire ugutwi, unkize." 
Psalms71:3 Umbere igitandara co kubamwo, aho nzoshobora kwama mpungira: Wangereye kunkiza, Kukw ari wewe gitandara canje n’igihome kinkīngira." 
Psalms71:4 Mana yanje, ngobotora mu kuboko kw’umunyakibi, Ngobotora mu kuboko kw’ umugabitanyi w’ikirara." 
Psalms71:5 Kukw ari wewe vyizigiro vyanje, Mwami Uhoraho: Ni wewe nizera, uhereye mu buto bganje," 
Psalms71:6 Ni wewe wamye unyishigikiriye uhereye mw ivuka ryanje: Ni wewe wankūye mu nda ya mama: Ishimwe ryanje rizokwama kuri wewe. 
Psalms71:7 Mmeze nk’igitangaza kuri benshi: Ariko ni wewe buhungiro bganje bukomeye. 
Psalms71:8 Akanwa kanje kazokwuzura ishimwe ryawe, N’icubahiro cawe umusi wīre." 
Psalms71:9 Ntunte mu gihe c’ubutāma, Ntumpebe mu gihe intege zanje zishize." 
Psalms71:10 Kukw abansi banje bamvuga, Ababundira ubugingo bganje baja inama:" 
Psalms71:11 Bat’ Imana yamuhevye; Mumwirukire, mumufate, kukw atagira uwo kumukiza." 
Psalms71:12 Mana, ntumbe kure: Mana yanje, tebuka untabare." 
Psalms71:13 Abarwanizi b’ubugingo bganje bicwe n’isoni baranduke; Abarondera ingene bongirira nabi bambikwe ibitutsi n’ agakēngērwe. 
Psalms71:14 Ariko jeho nzokwama nizigira ubudasība, Nzokwiyongeranya kugushima." 
Psalms71:15 Akanwa kanje kazovuga inkuru y’ukugororoka kwawe, N’iy’ agakiza kawe umusi wīre: Kuko ntazi igitigiri cavyo." 
Psalms71:16 Nzoza mvuga ibikorwa bihambaye vy’Umwami Uhoraho, Nzovuga ukugororoka kwawe, mber’ ukwawe kwonyene." 
Psalms71:17 Mana, ni wewe wanyigishije, uhereye mu buto bganje, Kugeza n’ubu ndacavuga ibikorwa vyawe bitangaje." 
Psalms71:18 Mana, ntumpebe, kugeza no mu butāma bganje mmeze imvi; Ntarabarira ab’ igihe kizoza amaboko yawe, Ntarabarira abazovuka bose inkomezi zawe." 
Psalms71:19 Mana, ukugororoka kwawe gushika hejuru kure: Ni wewe wakoze ibikomeye, Mana, ni nde ahwanye nawe?" 
Psalms71:20 Ni wewe watweretse amagorwa menshi akomeye, Uzokwongera uturabūre, Uzokwongera udukūre i bgina i kuzimu." 
Psalms71:21 Unyongeranirize ubukuru, Uhindukire, unyirure." 
Psalms71:22 Nanje nzogushimisha ikembe; Mana yanje, nzoshima ukuri kwawe: Ni wewe nzoririmbira ishimwe mvugira inanga, Ewe Wera w’Abisirayeli." 
Psalms71:23 Iminwa yanje izonezerwa cane aho nzokuririmbira ishimwe; N’ubugingo bganje wacunguye buzonezerwa. 
Psalms71:24 Kand’ ururimi rwanje ruzovuga ukugororoka kwawe burinde bgīra: Kukw abarondera kungirira nabi bishwe n’isoni batēterewe. 
Psalms72:1 Mana, uhe umwami uguca imanza kwawe, Uhe umwana w’umwami ukuroranya kwawe." 
Psalms72:2 Azocira abantu bawe iziroranye, N’abagorwa bawe abacire iz’ ukuri." 
Psalms72:3 Kuroranya imanza kuzotuma imisozi miremire N’uturambi bizanira abantu amahoro. 
Psalms72:4 Azocira imanza abagorwa bo mu bantu, Akize abana b’abakene, Avunagure umunyagahahazo." 
Psalms72:5 Bazomwubaha izuba rikiriho, Bo n’ukwezi, gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms72:6 Azomanuka nk’imvura igwa ku vyatsi bitemwe, Nk’imvura y’umuvuvu itosa isi." 
Psalms72:7 Mu misi yiwe abagororotsi bazororanirwa, Kandi hazosēndēra amahoro, gushitsa ah’ ukwezi kuzoviraho." 
Psalms72:8 Azoganza uhereye ku kiyaga ugashitsa ku kiyaga kindi, Kand’ uhereye kuri rwa Ruzi, ugashitsa ku mpera y’isi." 
Psalms72:9 Ababa mu bugaragwa bazomwunamira, Abansi biwe bazorigata umukungugu." 
Psalms72:10 Abami b’i Tarushishi n’abo ku bizinga vyo mu kiyaga bazozana amashikanwa, Abami b’i Sheba n’ab’i Seba bazogorora ingorore." 
Psalms72:11 Mber’ abami bose bazomwikubita imbere, Amahanga yose azomusaba." 
Psalms72:12 Kukw azokiza umukene ah’ azotakambira, N’umugorwa atagira gitabara." 
Psalms72:13 Azogirira akagongwe uworoshe n’umukene, Amagara y’abakene azoyakiza." 
Psalms72:14 Azobacungura, abakize agahahazo n’umuryano; Kand’ amaraso yabo azoba ay’ igiciro mu nyonga ziwe." 
Psalms72:15 Nukw azoramba, kandi bazomukūrira kw izahabu y’i Sheba; Bamusengere urudaca, Bamuhezagire burinde bgīra." 
Psalms72:16 Hazokwera impeke habe agahimbo mu gihugu no ku mpinga z’imisozi; Mw igarura ryavyo bizohungabana nk’ibiti vyo kuri Lebanoni: Abo mu gisagara bazororanirwa batotahare nk’ubgatsi bgo mw isi. 
Psalms72:17 Izina ryiwe rizohorah’ ibihe bidashira, Izina ryiwe rizogira uruvyaro, izuba rikiriho: Abantu bazokwisabira umugisha wo guhwana na we, Amahanga yose azomwita umuhirwe." 
Psalms72:18 Uhoraho Imana, ni yo Mana y’Abisirayeli, ihimbazwe; Ni yo yonyene ikora ibitangaza:" 
Psalms72:19 Izina ryayo ry’icubahiro rihimbazwe ibihe bidashira; Kand’ isi yose yuzure icubahiro cayo; Amen, kandi Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Amasengesho ya Dawidi mwene Isayi ararangiye. 
Psalms73:1 N’ukuri Imana igirira neza Abisirayeli, Abafise imitima itanduye." 
Psalms73:2 Ariko jeho, ibirenge vyanje kāri gato bigatirimuka, Intambuko zanje zari zishigaje gatoya zikanyerera." 
Psalms73:3 Kuko nagirira ishari abībone, Aho nabona abanyakibi baguwe neza." 
Psalms73:4 Kuko badasamba mw ipfa ryabo, Arikw amagara yabo arakomera." 
Psalms73:5 Ntibagira amagorwa nk’abandi, Ntibaterwa n’ivyago nk’abandi." 
Psalms73:6 Ni co gituma ubgibone buba nk’urudede mu mazosi yabo, Umuryano ukabambika nk’ impuzu." 
Psalms73:7 Amaso yabo avanywe i mutwe no kuvyibuha, Bafise ibiruta ivyo umutima wokwifuza." 
Psalms73:8 Baracokora, bakavugishwa ivy’ agahahazo n’ukugabitanya kwabo: Bavuga bīshize hejuru." 
Psalms73:9 Bashize akanwa kabo mw ijuru, Ururimi rwabo ruyerera mw isi yose." 
Psalms73:10 Ni co gituma abantu biwe bagaruka, Bakīrāngūza amazi yuzuye mu gikombe," 
Psalms73:11 Bakavuga, bat’ Imana ibibgirwa n’iki? Īsumba vyose har’ ico izi?" 
Psalms73:12 Ereg’ abo ni bo banyavyaha: Kandi bama bīdibamiye, ubutunzi bgabo buragwira." 
Psalms73:13 N’ukuri nogereje ubusa umutima wanje, Ukudacumura nagukarabiyemw’ ubusa." 
Psalms73:14 Kuko natewe n’ivyago umusi ukīra, Ngahanwa mu gitondo n’ igitondo uko bukeye." 
Psalms73:15 Iyo mba naravuze, nti Reka mvuge ntyo; Mba narahemukiye abana bawe." 
Psalms73:16 Niyumviriye ingene noshobora kubimenya, Biba ibiruhije mu maso yanje." 
Psalms73:17 Gushitsa aho nagīriye ahēra h’Imana, Nkībaza iherezo rya ba bandi." 
Psalms73:18 N’ukuri ubashira ahanyerera; Ubakororera mu mahonero. 
Psalms73:19 Erega bārahonnye mu kanya gato! Ubgoba bg’uburyo bginshi burabamaze. 
Psalms73:20 Nk’ukw inzozi zimeze, iy’ umuntu yikanguye, Ni ko nawe, Mwami, ni wikangura, uzobakēngēra nk’ibiravūswe." 
Psalms73:21 Ah’ umushaha wanje wababara, Ngatēkerwa n’umubabaro mu mutima," 
Psalms73:22 Nar’ ikijuju, nar’ imburabgenge, Namera nk’igikōko imbere yawe." 
Psalms73:23 Yamara rero namana nawe na ntaryo, Umfashe ukuboko kw’i buryo." 
Psalms73:24 Uzondōngōza inama ungīriye, Kandi hanyuma uz’ unyakīrane icubahiro." 
Psalms73:25 Ni nde mfise mw ijuru, atari wewe? Kandi mw isi nta we ngomba, atari wewe." 
Psalms73:26 Umubiri wanje n’umutima wanje bishira umunywera, Arikw Imana ni yo gitandara umutima wanje uhungirako, kandi ni yo mugabane wanje ibihe vyose." 
Psalms73:27 Kukw abakuja kure bazoranduka; Wahoneje abakuretse bose bagacika ibimaka. 
Psalms73:28 Ariko jeho kwēgēra Imana ni kwo kumbereye amahirwe: Umwami Uhoraho ni we ngize ubuhungiro, Kugira ngo namamaze ibikorwa wakoze vyose." 
Psalms74:1 Mana, n’iki catumye uduca tukaba ruhebga? N’iki gituma uburake bgawe bupfunduka nk’umwotsi, ubgo urakira intama zo mu canya cawe?" 
Psalms74:2 Ibuka ikoraniro ryawe waguze kera, Iryo wacunguriye kuba ubgoko bg’ishamvu yawe, Bo n’umusozi Siyoni, aho wagerereye." 
Psalms74:3 Shingūra inyundo zawe, uje mu bitongozi vy’intahava: Abansi bākoreye ahēra ibibi vyose." 
Psalms74:4 Abarwanizi bawe bātontomeye hagati y’aho twakoranira kugusenga: Bāshinze amabendera yabo ngw abe ibimenyetso. 
Psalms74:5 Bameze nk’abantu babanguye incabiti Ngo bace ibiti vy’inzitane. 
Psalms74:6 Non’ ivyabājwe vyaho vyose Barabimenaguza incabiti n’ inyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Bāturiye ahēra hawe: Bāhumanije ubuvyagiro bg’ izina ryawe, barahasangangura rwose." 
Psalms74:8 Bībariye mu mitima yabo, bati Tubageseze rwose; Bāturiye amazu yose yo mu gihugu, yakoranirwamwo gusenga Imana." 
Psalms74:9 Ntitubona ibimenyetso vyacu, Nta wuvugishwa n’Imana akiriho: Kandi nta n’umwe muri twebge azi ah’ ivyo bizogarukira." 
Psalms74:10 Mana, umurwanizi azogeza hehe kudutuka? Mbeg’ umwansi azorogota kw izina ryawe ibihe vyose?" 
Psalms74:11 N’iki gituma upfunya ukuboko, ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo? Gukūre mu gikiriza cawe, ubamare." 
Psalms74:12 Arikw Imana yahoze ar’ Umwami wanje uhereye kera, Ivy’ agakiza ibikorera hagati mw isi." 
Psalms74:13 Ni wewe watandukanishije ikiyaga inkomezi zawe, Wameneye mu mazi imitwe y’ibikōko," 
Psalms74:14 Ni wewe wamenaguye imitwe y’ingona, Warayitanze, iba ivyo kurya vy’ivyo mu bugaragwa." 
Psalms74:15 Ni wewe watoboye isōko n’ umugezi, Wakamije inzūzi zitokamye." 
Psalms74:16 Umurango n’uwawe, kand’ ijoro na ryo n’iryawe: Waremye umuco n’izuba." 
Psalms74:17 Ni wewe washizeh’ imbibe zose z’isi, Waremye ici n’agatasi." 
Psalms74:18 Ibuka ibi: yukw abansi bakwinantajeko, Uhoraho; Ihanga ritagira ubgenge ryarogose kw izina ryawe." 
Psalms74:19 Ntugaburire ibikōko ubugingo bg’inuma yawe: Ntiwibagire ubugingo bg’abagorwa bawe gushitsa ibihe vyose. 
Psalms74:20 Zirikana rya sezerano: Kukw ahantu h’umwiza ho mw isi hagwiriye indāro z’umuryāno. 
Psalms74:21 Impahazwa yoye kugaruka itēterewe: Umugorwa n’umukene ni bashime izina ryawe. 
Psalms74:22 Mana, haguruka wībūranire: Ibuka yukw ikijuju cīriza umusi kigutuka." 
Psalms74:23 Ntiwibagire amajwi y’abarwanizi bawe: Urwamo rw’abaguhagurukira rwama rudūga intumbgejuru. 
Psalms75:1 Mana, turagushima; Turagushima kukw izina ryawe riri hafi. Abantu bakwiza ibikorwa bitangaza wakoze." 
Psalms75:2 Igihe nashinze ni cashika, Nzoca imanza ziroranye." 
Psalms75:3 Iy’ isi inyiganyize, bo n’ abayibako bose, Ni jewe ngumije inkingi zayo." 
Psalms75:4 Mbgira abirata, nti Ntimukirate; N’abanyakibi, nti Ntimukavyure ihembe ryanyu." 
Psalms75:5 Ntimukavyure ihembe ryanyu ngo muritunge kw ijuru, Ntimukavuge mushimantaje amazosi." 
Psalms75:6 Kuko gushirwa hejuru kudaturuka i burasirazuba cank’ i burengerazuba, Canke mu bugaragwa bgo ku misozi." 
Psalms75:7 Arikw Imana ni yo mucamanza: Icisha umwe bugufi, igashira uwundi hejuru." 
Psalms75:8 Kuko mu ntoke z’Uhoraho har’ agakarabo, karimwo vino ibira: Kuzuye vino ituriranije, arayisuka: N’ukuri abanyakibi bo mw isi bazokwīrāngūza urukoma rwayo, barunywe." 
Psalms75:9 Ariko jeho nzokwama mvyamamaza ibihe vyose, Nzoririmbira Imana ya Yakobo ishimwe." 
Psalms75:10 Kand’ amahembe yose y’ abanyakibi nzoyakōndōra; Arikw amahembe y’abagororotsi azoshirwa hejuru. 
Psalms76:1 Mu Bayuda Imana ni rurangiranwa: Mu Bisirayeli izina ryayo rirahambaye. 
Psalms76:2 Kand’ i Salemu ni ho hema ryayo, I Siyoni ni ho buvyagiro bgayo." 
Psalms76:3 Ni ho yavunaguriye imyampi yo mu muheto, N’inkinzo n’inkota n’ibirwanishwa vy’intambara." 
Psalms76:4 Ur’ uw’ icubahiro n’ubgiza bginshi, utabarutse mu misozi yuzuye iminyago." 
Psalms76:5 Abarindutse mu mitima baranyazwe, basinzira ubutikoma, Kandi nta bo mu banyenkomezi bashoboye kwivuna." 
Psalms76:6 Mana ya Yakobo, uguhana kwawe Kwatumye imikogote n’amafarasi ayikwega bisinzirira guhwera." 
Psalms76:7 Wewe, ni wewe nyene uteye ubgoba: Ni nde yoshobora guhagarara mu nyonga zawe umaze kuraka?" 
Psalms76:8 Wumvikanishije amateka uri mw ijuru: Isi yaratinye, iracereza," 
Psalms76:9 Hamwe Imana yahagurutswa no guca amateka, Ngw ikize abaciye bugufi bose bo mw isi." 
Psalms76:10 N’ukuri uburake bg’abantu buzogushimisha, Uburake buzoba busigaye uzobukenyera." 
Psalms76:11 Musezerane isezerano, murishitse k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu: Uwo Nyene gutinywa, abamukikije bose bamuzanire ingorore." 
Psalms76:12 Ni we amara igabo abaganwa, Agatera ubgoba abami bo mw isi." 
Psalms77:1 Ndatakambira Imana n’ijwi ryanje, Ndatakambira Imana n’ijwi ryanje, na yo irantega ugutwi." 
Psalms77:2 Ku musi w’umubabaro wanje narondeye Umwami Imana: Ukuboko kwanje mw ijoro kwararāmvuwe, ntikwatenzura; Umutima wanje wanka kwirurwa." 
Psalms77:3 Nibuka Imana, ngahagarika umutima: Ndiganyira, umutima wanje ukadendebukirwa." 
Psalms77:4 Ufata ibigohe vy’amaso yanje kugira ngo simpumirize: Mpagaritse umutima bituma ntashobora kuvuga. 
Psalms77:5 Niyumviriye imisi ya kera, Imyaka y’ibihe vya kera." 
Psalms77:6 Nibuka indirimbo yanje yo mw ijoro, Nkibaza mu mutima; Umutima wanje ugasesana umwete," 
Psalms77:7 Uti Mbeg’ Umwami azoduca tube ruhebga? Ntazosubira kuduhangaza ukundi? 
Psalms77:8 Mbeg’ imbabazi ziwe zagīriyeko rwose ruhebga? Isezerano ryiwe ryapfaniranye gushitsa ibihe vyose? 
Psalms77:9 Mbeg’ Imana yibagiye kugira neza? Uburake bgayo butumye yugarana imbabazi zayo?. 
Psalms77:10 Maze ndavuga, nt’ Ivyo n’ indwara iri muri jewe: Mbega ko niyumviriye yuk’ ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’ Īsumba vyose guhinduka!" 
Psalms77:11 Nzovuga ibikorwa vy’Uhoraho, Kuko nzokwibuka ibitangaza vyawe vya kera." 
Psalms77:12 Nzokwiyumvira ivyo wakoze vyose, Nshire umutima ku bikomeye wakoze." 
Psalms77:13 Mana, inzira yawe ir’ ahēra; Ni nde mana ihambaye ihwanye n’Imana Rurema?" 
Psalms77:14 Ni wewe Mana ikora ibitangaza: Wamenyekanishije inkomezi zawe mu mahanga. 
Psalms77:15 Wacunguje abantu bawe ukuboko kwawe, Ni bo ruvyaro rwa Yakobo na Yosefu." 
Psalms77:16 Mana, amazi yarakubonye, Amazi yarakubonye, aratinya: I bgina hahinda agashitsi." 
Psalms77:17 Ibicu bisuka amazi, Ijuru rirahinda, Imyampi yawe igenda agashwaro." 
Psalms77:18 Imituragaro y’inkuba yawe yari mu gashururu: Imiravyo ibonesha mw isi, Isi ihinda agashitsi, iratigita." 
Psalms77:19 Inzira yawe yari mu kiyaga, Inzira zawe zari mu mazi agaranzutse, Ibirenge vyawe ntivyari n’ akehe." 
Psalms77:20 Warōngōje abantu bawe nk’ ubusho Ukuboko kwa Mose na Aroni. 
Psalms78:1 Bgoko bganje, ni mutegere ugutwi ukwigisha kwanje: Mubangire amatwi amajambo yo mu kanwa kanje." 
Psalms78:2 Ndateranura akanwa kanje, nce imigani, Ndavuga amajambo apfinze ya kera." 
Psalms78:3 Ivyo twumvise tukamenya, Ivyo ba sogokuruza bātubariye," 
Psalms78:4 Ntituzobihisha abuzukuruza babo, Tuzobgira ab’ igihe kizoza ishimwe ry’Uhoraho, N’inkomezi ziwe n’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoze." 
Psalms78:5 Kuko yashimangiye igishingantahe mu ba Yakobo, Yashizeh’ icagezwe mu Bisirayeli, Ico yageze ba sogokuruza, Ngo baze babibarire abana babo:" 
Psalms78:6 Kugira ngw ab’ igihe kizoza baze babimenye, ni bo bana bazovuka; Ngo na bo baze bahaguruke, babibarire abana babo." 
Psalms78:7 Kugira ngo bizigire Imana, Kandi ntibibagire ivyo Imana yakoze, Ariko ngo bitondere ivyagezwe vyayo." 
Psalms78:8 Boye kuba nka ba sekuruza, Rwa runganwe rw’ibigāba kandi rw’abagarariji, Urunganwe rw’abatitunganiriza imitima, Imitima yabo itayoboka Imana." 
Psalms78:9 Abefurayimu naho bāri bafise ibirwanishwa batwaye imiheto, Bākimiranye ku musi w’intambara;" 
Psalms78:10 Ntibitondeye isezerano ry’ Imana, Banse kugendera mu vyagezwe vyayo;" 
Psalms78:11 Bibagiye ivyo yakoze, N’ibikorwa vyayo bitangaje yaberetse." 
Psalms78:12 Yakoreye ibitangaza mu maso ya ba sekuruza Mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mu gahinga k’i Sowani." 
Psalms78:13 Yasatuye ikiyaga, ibacisha hagati yaco; Ihagarika amazi nk’ikirundo." 
Psalms78:14 Kandi ku murango yabarōngōza igicu, Ijoro ryose ikabarōngōza kubonesha kw’umuriro." 
Psalms78:15 Yasaturiye ibitandara mu bugaragwa, Ibanywesha amazi menshi nk’ ayava i bgina." 
Psalms78:16 Kandi mu gitandara yagikūyemw’ amasōko, Itembesha amazi nk’inzūzi." 
Psalms78:17 Yamara ntibāsība kuyicumurako, Bakagarariza Īsumba vyose bari mu gihugu cumye." 
Psalms78:18 Bagerageresha Imana imitima yabo, Bayigerageresha kwaka ivyo kurya vyo kubamara ipfa." 
Psalms78:19 Bacurika Imana, Bati Mbeg’ Imana ishobora gutunganiriza ameza mu bugaragwa?" 
Psalms78:20 Rāba, yakubise ca gitandara, amazi aradudubiza, Imigezi iratemba; Mbega yoshobora kuduha n’ umutsima? Yoronkera abantu bayo inyama?" 
Psalms78:21 Ni co catumye Uhoraho avyumva, akaraka, Umuriro ukaziriringira aba Yakobo, Uburake bugapfunduka ku Bisirayeli," 
Psalms78:22 Kuko batizeye Imana, Ntibizigire agakiza kayo." 
Psalms78:23 Yamar’ ibarira ibicu vyo hejuru, Yugurura inzugi z’ijuru;" 
Psalms78:24 Ibarekurira manu yo kurya, igwa nk’imvura, Ibaha ku mihūre yo mw ijuru." 
Psalms78:25 Bose barya umutsima w’ abahambaye, Ibarungikira ivyo kurya vyo kubahāza rwose." 
Psalms78:26 Ihuhutisha mw ijuru umuyaga uturutse i burasirazuba, Irōngōza ububasha bgayo umuyaga uturutse i bumanuko." 
Psalms78:27 Kand’ ibarekurira inyama zingana n’umukungugu, N’inyoni ziguruka zingana n’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga:" 
Psalms78:28 Izigwisha hagati y’aho bashagaje, Zikikiza insago zabo." 
Psalms78:29 Nuko bararya, barahīmba; Yabahaye ivyo bifuje." 
Psalms78:30 Bataribgatandukane n’ukwifuza kwabo, Ivyo kurya vyabo bikiri mu kanwa kabo," 
Psalms78:31 Uburake bg’Imana bubakūrira hasi, Bgica abagabo b’abanyenkomezi bo muri bo, Butsinda hasi imisore yo mu Bisirayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Nah’ ivyo vyababayeko, ntibāsība gucumura, Ntibizera ibikorwa vyayo bitangaje." 
Psalms78:33 Bituma irangiza imisi yabo nk’impwemu zihumetswe, N’imyaka yabo iyirangiza mu kanya isase." 
Psalms78:34 Uko yabica, bābaririza ivyayo, Bakagaruka bakazindukira kurondera Imana." 
Psalms78:35 Bakibuka yukw Imana ari yo gitandara cabo, Kandi yukw Imana isumba vyose ari yo mucunguzi wabo." 
Psalms78:36 Ariko bayihemesha akanwa kabo, Bakayibeshesha indimi zabo," 
Psalms78:37 Kukw imitima yabo itāshikamye ngo babane na yo, Kandi batār’ abizigirwa mw isezerano ryayo." 
Psalms78:38 Ariko yo, kuko yuzuye imbabazi, iharira ukugabitanya kwabo, ntibahonnye, Mbere kenshi iroresha irya uburake bgayo, Ntikangure uburake bgayo bgose:" 
Psalms78:39 Kandi yibuka yukw ar’ abantu buntu, N’umuyaga uhita ntugaruke." 
Psalms78:40 Erega ni kenshi bayigaraririza mu bugaragwa, Bayibabariza mu karēre!" 
Psalms78:41 Bakihindukiranya, bakagerageza Imana, Bakaratsa Iyera y’Abisirayeli." 
Psalms78:42 Ntibibuka ukuboko kwayo, Cank’ umusi yabacunguyeko, ikabakiza umurwanizi." 
Psalms78:43 Kandi yuko yashize ibimenyetso vyayo muri Egiputa, N’ibitangaza vyayo mu gahinga k’i Sowani:" 
Psalms78:44 Igahindura inzūzi zabo amaraso, N’imigezi yabo, ntibashobore kugira ico banywa." 
Psalms78:45 Yabarungitsemw’ amasinzi y’ ibibugu, birabarya; N’ibikere, birabageseza." 
Psalms78:46 Kand’ iha inzikira imirima yabo, N’ivyo bāruhiye ibiha inzige." 
Psalms78:47 Yicisha imizabibu yabo urubura, N’ibiti vyabo vy’imishikima ivyicisha igikonyozi." 
Psalms78:48 Itanga inka zabo ngo zicwe n’urubura, N’imikuku yabo ngw ikubitwe n’inkuba." 
Psalms78:49 Ibatera uburake bgayo bg’ inkazi, Uburake, n’ugushangashirwa, n’ivyago, Igitero c’abamarayika b’abaranduzi." 
Psalms78:50 Iharurira uburake bgayo inzira; Ntiyabakiza urupfu, Arikw irabatanga ngo bicwe n’ikīza;" 
Psalms78:51 Yica abana b’imfura bose bo muri Egiputa, Imara ubuzibūra bgo mu mahema ya Hamu." 
Psalms78:52 Arikw abantu bayo bgite ibashorera nk’intama, ibakūrayo, Ibarōngōra mu bugaragwa nk’umukuku." 
Psalms78:53 Ibarōngōra amahoro, bituma badatinya: Arikw ikiyaga kirengera abansi babo." 
Psalms78:54 Kand’ ibajana ku rugabano rw’ahēra hayo, Kur’ uyu musozi, ukuboko kwayo kw’i buryo kwaguze." 
Psalms78:55 Yirukana amahanga imbere yabo, Ibakubitira amabango ahazoba ishamvu yabo, Yinjiza imiryango y’Abisirayeli mu mahema ya bano." 
Psalms78:56 Yamar’ Abisirayeli bagerageza Imana isumba vyose, barayigarariza, Ntibitondera ivyo yashingiye intahe." 
Psalms78:57 Ariko basubira inyuma, bava mw isezerano nka ba sekuruza: Barahusha, nk’umuheto utaye uruvuto." 
Psalms78:58 Kuko bayirakishije ibitabo vyabo bātavye ku mpinga z’imisozi, Bayiteje ifūhe ibishushanyo vyabo vy’ibigirwamana." 
Psalms78:59 Imana ivyumvise, iraraka, Yanka Abisirayeli urunuka." 
Psalms78:60 Bituma iheba umugerēro w’i Shilo, Ni wo hema yashinze hagati y’abantu." 
Psalms78:61 Itanga icubahiro cayo ngo kijanwe kw inyagano, N’ubgiza bgayo ngo buje mu maboko y’umurwanizi." 
Psalms78:62 Kand’ itanga n’abantu bayo ngo bicwe n’inkota, Irakira ishamvu yayo." 
Psalms78:63 Umuriro utongora imisore yabo, Abakobga babo nta ndirimbo y’ubukwe bāri bagifise." 
Psalms78:64 Abaherezi babo bicwa n’ inkota, Abapfakazi babo ntibābaririra." 
Psalms78:65 Maz’ Umwami Imana aribambura, nk’uwar’ asinziriye, Nk’umuhizi asemerezwa cane na vino." 
Psalms78:66 Ikubita abarwanizi bayo, ibasubiza inyuma, Ibahindura ruvumwa rudashira." 
Psalms78:67 Kand’ ihinyura ihema rya Yosefu, Ntiyatoranya umuryango wa Efurayimu;" 
Psalms78:68 Arikw itoranya umuryango wa Yuda, Umusozi Siyoni yakunze." 
Psalms78:69 Yubaka urusengero rwayo rwera rusumba impinga z’ imisozi, Ruguma nk’isi yahamangiye gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms78:70 Kand’ itoranya Dawidi umusavyi wayo, Imukūra mu mpongore z’ intama;" 
Psalms78:71 Imukūra mu gushorera intama zonsa, Kugira ngw aragire aba Yakobo abantu bayo, Abisirayeli ishamvu yayo." 
Psalms78:72 Nukw abaragirisha umutima utunganye, Abashoreza ubuhinga bg’amaboko yiwe." 
Psalms79:1 Mana, abanyamahanga bateye ishamvu yawe; Bahumanije urusengero rwawe rwera, Basanganguye Yerusalemu, hasigaye ar’ ibirundo vy’ amasakamburira." 
Psalms79:2 Imivyimba y’abasavyi bawe bayihaye ibisīga vyo mu kirēre ngw ibe indya zavyo, Inyama z’abakunzi bawe bazihaye ibikōko vyo mw isi." 
Psalms79:3 Amaraso yabo bayavishije impande zose z’i Yerusalemu nk’ūsēsa amazi: Ntihabonetse ūbahamba. 
Psalms79:4 Duhindutse ruvumwa ku babanyi bacu, Agatwengo n’agacokoro ku badukikije." 
Psalms79:5 Uhoraho we, uzogeza hehe kuraka ibihe vyose? Mbeg’ ifuhe ryawe rizokwama ryaka nk’umuriro?" 
Psalms79:6 Suka uburake bgawe ku mahanga atakuzi, No ku bgami bgose butambaza izina ryawe." 
Psalms79:7 Kuko bātsontsomeye aba Yakobo, Bākomvomvoye ingo zabo." 
Psalms79:8 Ntiwibuke ukugabitanya kwa ba sogokuruza ng’ ukuduhōre: Imbabazi zawe zinyaruke kudusanganira, Kuko ducishijwe bugufi cane." 
Psalms79:9 Dutabare Mana y’agakiza kacu, kubg’ icubahiro c’izina ryawe: Uturokore, utwikire ivyaha vyacu kubg’ izina ryawe." 
Psalms79:10 N’iki gituma abanyamahanga bavuga, ngw Imana yabo iri hehe? Ingen’ uhōra amaraso y’ abasavyi bawe yavuye Ni bimenyekane mu banyamahanga imbere yacu." 
Psalms79:11 Kuniha kw’imbohe ni gushike imbere yawe; Nk’ukw inkomezi z’ukuboko kwawe ziri, kiza abagerewe gupfa." 
Psalms79:12 Kand’ ababanyi bacu, ibitutsi bāgututse Mwami Ubibasubirize mu nkōko ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Psalms79:13 Natwe abantu bawe, intama zo mu cibare cawe, Tuzobigushimira ibihe bidashira: Tuzokwerekana ishimwe ryawe gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms80:1 Ewe Mwungere w’Abisirayeli, tega ugutwi, Ni wewe urōngōra aba Yosefu nk’umukuku; Ewe uvyagira ku Bakerubi, kayangana." 
Psalms80:2 Kangura inkomezi zawe imbere y’aba Efurayimu n’aba Benyamini n’aba Manase, Uze kudukiza." 
Psalms80:3 Mana utwigarurire, Umurikishe mu nyonga hawe, natwe turakira." 
Psalms80:4 Uhoraho, Mana Nyen’ ingabo, Uzogeza ryari gupfunduka uburake urakira ugusenga kw’abantu bawe?" 
Psalms80:5 Wabagaburiye amosozi k’ umutsima, Wabahaye amosozi menshi yo kunywa." 
Psalms80:6 Utumye ababanyi bacu baducuranwa; Abansi bacu batunegura bitwengera. 
Psalms80:7 Mana, Nyen’ ingabo, utwigarurire, Umurikishe mu nyonga hawe, natwe turakira." 
Psalms80:8 Wakūye umuzabibu muri Egiputa: Usohora amahanga, urawutera." 
Psalms80:9 Urawurimirira, Na wo ushikana imizi kure, wuzura igihugu." 
Psalms80:10 Imisozi itwikirwa n’igitūtu cawo, N’ibiti vy’amasederi vy’inganzamarumpu biterwa igitūtu n’amashami yawo." 
Psalms80:11 Ushamika amashami, ashika no ku kiyaga, Amasango yawo ashika no kuri rwa ruzi." 
Psalms80:12 N’iki catumye usambura inzitiro zawo, Ngw abahita bose bawamure?" 
Psalms80:13 Ingurube yo mu kibira irawonona, Ibikōko vyo mw ishamba birawona." 
Psalms80:14 Garuka turakwinginze, Mana Nyen’ ingabo: Runguruka uri mw ijuru, ubirābe, ugendere uwo muzabibu," 
Psalms80:15 Zigama ico ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kwateye, N’ishami wikomereje." 
Psalms80:16 Uwo muzabibu waraturiwe, waratemwe; Bahonejwe n’igitsure co mu nyonga hawe." 
Psalms80:17 Ukuboko kwawe kube ku muntu agushiriye mu buryo, Ku mwana w’umuntu wirereye." 
Psalms80:18 Nuko natwe ntituzosubira inyuma ngo tukuveko; Duhēmbūre, natwe turambaza izina ryawe." 
Psalms80:19 Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo, utwigarurire, Umurikishe mu nyonga hawe, natwe turakira." 
Psalms81:1 Muririmbishirize Imana ijwi rirenga, ni yo nkomezi zacu; Muvugirize Imana ya Yakobo impundu." 
Psalms81:2 Shirako muririmbe zaburi, muvuze agashako k’ingoma, Mucurarange inanga nziza n’ ikembe." 
Psalms81:3 Muvuze inzamba ukwezi kubonetse, N’iy’ ukwezi gufashe, ku musi wacu mukuru." 
Psalms81:4 Kukw iry’ ari ryo bgirizwa ryashingiwe Abisirayeli, N’icagezwe n’Imana ya Yakobo." 
Psalms81:5 Yagishinze mu ba Yosefu kuba igishingantahe, Aho yisidukira, ikūriye hasi igihugu ca Egiputa: Ni ho numvitiye ijwi ry’Uwo ntari nzi." 
Psalms81:6 Ati Nakūye umutwaro ku rutugu rwawe, Amaboko yawe yabohowe ku gitebo." 
Psalms81:7 Waratakamvye ugowe, ndakurokora: Nakwishuye nihishije mu nkuba: Nakugeragereje ku mazi y’i Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Bantu banje, ni mwumve, ndabihanikirize, Yemwe bantu ba Isirayeli, icompa mukantega amatwi!" 
Psalms81:9 Ntihakabe ikigirwamana c’ abanyamahanga muri mwebge, Kandi ntimukagire ikigirwamana c’abanyamahanga musenga." 
Psalms81:10 Ni jewe Uhoraho, Imana yanyu, Nabakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa: Asama cane, nanje nduzuza akanwa kanyu." 
Psalms81:11 Arikw abantu banje ntibanyumviye; Abisirayeli baranyikunkumura. 
Psalms81:12 Nanje ndabareka, ngo bakurikire ugukomantara kw’ imitima yabo, Ngo bagendere mu migabo bigeneye." 
Psalms81:13 Icompa abantu banje bakanyumvira, Icompa Abisirayeli bakagendera mu nzira zanje!" 
Psalms81:14 Notsinda abansi babo vuba, Nohindurira ukuboko kwanje ku barwanizi babo." 
Psalms81:15 Abansi b’Uhoraho bakamwunamira bamuhema: Ariko ba bandi bakaramba ibihe vyose. 
Psalms81:16 Nobagaburira ingano zisētse neza: Kandi nobahāza ubūki buvuye mu mugina wo mu gitandara. 
Psalms82:1 Imana ihagaze mw ikombe ryayo; Icira abacamanza urubanza," 
Psalms82:2 Iti Muzogeza hehe kugoreka imanza, No gutinya abanyakibi ku kigohe?." 
Psalms82:3 Mucire imanza umugoyigoyi n’impfuvyi; Mucire impahazwa n’umurushwa imanza zigororotse," 
Psalms82:4 Mutabare umugoyigoyi n’ umukene, Mubakūre mu maboko y’abanyakibi." 
Psalms82:5 Abo mbgiye nta co bazi, nta co batahura, Bagendagenda mu mwiza: Amatanguriro yose y’isi aranyiganyiga." 
Psalms82:6 Ni jewe ubganje navuze, nti Mur’ imana, Mwese mur’ abana b’Īsumba vyose." 
Psalms82:7 Ariko muzopfa nk’abantu, Muzotemba nk’umwe wo mu baganwa." 
Psalms82:8 Haguruka Mana, ucire isi urubanza: Kuk’ uzogira amahanga yose ishamvu yawe." 
Psalms83:1 Mana, reka kwihorera, Mana, ntupfe kunuma, ntiwirengagize:" 
Psalms83:2 Kukw abansi bawe bateye umuvurungano; Abakwanka bavyukije umutwe. 
Psalms83:3 Banogangiriza inama y’ubugunge abantu bawe, Bagīra inama abo wahishije." 
Psalms83:4 Baravuze, bati Ni muze tubarandure, ntibabe bakiba ihanga, Kugira ngw izina ry’Abisirayeli ntiribe ricibukwa ukundi." 
Psalms83:5 Kuko ba bandi bahūje umutima wo kuja inama, Ni wewe bashiriyeh’ amasezerano:" 
Psalms83:6 Ni bo bo mu mahema ya Edomu n’Abishimayeli; Kandi n’Abanyamowabu n’ Abahagiri; 
Psalms83:7 N’Abagebalu n’Abamoni n’ Abamaleki, N’Abafilisitiya n’ababa i Tiro:" 
Psalms83:8 N’Abashuri na bo bafatanije na bo; Batabaye aba Loti. 
Psalms83:9 Ubagire nk’uko wagize Abamidiyani, Nk’uko wagize Sisera na Yabini ku ruzi rwitwa Kishoni:" 
Psalms83:10 Bāyogereye kuri Endori, Bācitse intabire y’imisozi." 
Psalms83:11 Abapfasoni babo ubagire nka Orebu na Zebu; Abaganwa babo bose ubagire nka Zeba na Salumuna: 
Psalms83:12 Kuko bavuze, bati Twinyagire Umurwa w’Imana." 
Psalms83:13 Mana yanje, ubahindure nk’ umukungugu uvugutwa n’ agashururu, Nk’umuguruka utwarwa n’ umuyaga." 
Psalms83:14 Nk’uk’ umuriro uturira ikibira, Nk’ukw imbeya zawo zifata imisozi:" 
Psalms83:15 Abe ari ko ubahīgīsha ikivumbuzi cawe, Ubacishe ivutu ikirura cawe." 
Psalms83:16 Wuzuze mu maso habo isoni, Kugira ngo barondere izina ryawe, Uhoraho;" 
Psalms83:17 Bamāramāre, bahagarike imitima gushitsa ibihe bidashira, Bicwe n’isoni, bayogere:" 
Psalms83:18 Kugira ngo bamenye yuko wewe, uwitwa uhoraho, Kw ari wewe Usumba vyose, ukaganza isi yose." 
Psalms84:1 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ereg’ amahema yawe n’ay’ igikundiro!" 
Psalms84:2 Ubugingo bganje buri n’ umuvuro, mbere budendebuwe no kwifuza inyubakwa z’Uhoraho; Umutima wanje n’umubiri wanje bivugiriza impundu Imana nzima." 
Psalms84:3 Akanyoni kironkeye inzu, Intamba yironkeye icari, ah’ ishira ivyana vyayo, Ni ku bicaniro vyawe, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Mwami wanje, Mana yanje." 
Psalms84:4 Hahirwa ababa mu ngoro yawe, Bama bagushima ubudasība." 
Psalms84:5 Hahirwa umuntu inkomezi ziwe zihagaze muri wewe, Hahirwa abafise mu mitima amarango aja i Siyoni." 
Psalms84:6 Iyo baciye mu mwonga witwa Marira, bawuhindura ahantu h’amariba, Mber’ imvura y’intasuro iwambika imigisha." 
Psalms84:7 Bagenda bunguka inkomezi, Umuntu wese wo muri bo aseruka imbere y’Imana i Siyoni." 
Psalms84:8 Uhoraho, Mana Nyen’ ingabo, umva ugusenga kwanje: Tega ugutwi, Mana ya Yakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Mana, nkinzo yacu, ehe rāba: Witegereze mu maso y’Uwo warobanuje amavuta." 
Psalms84:10 Kuko kumara umusi umwe mu nyubakwa zawe kuruta kumara iyindi igihumbi ahandi. Nopfuma mpagarara ku gisapfu c’ingoro y’Imana yanje, Hako noba mu mahema y’ abanyakibi." 
Psalms84:11 Kuk’ Uhoraho Imana ar’ izuba, ar’ inkinzo; Uhoraho azotanga ubuntu n’ icubahiro: Ntazogira iciza na kimwe yima abagenda batunganye." 
Psalms84:12 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Hahirwa umuntu akwizigira." 
Psalms85:1 Uhoraho, wagiriye igihugu cawe imbabazi; Wagarukanye aba Yakobo bajanywe kw inyagano." 
Psalms85:2 Wahariye ukugabitanya kw’ abantu bawe, Watwikiriye icaha cabo cose." 
Psalms85:3 Wakūyeh’ uburake bgawe bgose, Warigaruye, ureka ubukare bg’uburake bgawe." 
Psalms85:4 Twigarurire, Mana y’agakiza kacu, Kand’ ushire umwikomo wawe utugirira." 
Psalms85:5 Mbeg’ uzoturakira ibihe bidashira? Uzokomeza uburake bgawe ibihe vyose? 
Psalms85:6 Mbega ntuzokwongera kuturabūra, Kugira ngw abantu bawe bakunezererwe?" 
Psalms85:7 Twereke imbabazi zawe, Uhoraho we, Uduhe agakiza kawe." 
Psalms85:8 Hinge numve ivyo Imana, Uhoraho, igira ivuge: Kukw izobgira abantu bayo n’abakunzi bayo ivy’ amahoro; Ariko ntibaze basubire mu bupfu." 
Psalms85:9 N’ukuri agakiza kayo kari hafi y’abayubaha, Kugira ng’ubgiza bgayo bube mu gihugu cacu." 
Psalms85:10 Imbabazi n’ukuri birahūye, Ukugororoka n’amahoro biragumbiranye." 
Psalms85:11 Ukuri kubaye ikironge mw isi, Ukugororoka kwarungurutse kuri mw ijuru." 
Psalms85:12 Kand’ Uhoraho azogaba ivyiza: Igihugu cacu kizokwimbuka ivyimburo vyaco. 
Psalms85:13 Ukugororoka kuzomwitangira imbere, Kandi kuzoca mu makanda y’ibirenge vyiwe." 
Psalms86:1 Uhoraho, ntegera ugutwi, unyishure, Kuko nd’ umugorwa, nd’ umukene." 
Psalms86:2 Zigama ubugingo bganje kuko nd’ umukunzi wawe: Ewe Mana yanje, kiza umusavyi wawe akwizigira." 
Psalms86:3 Ngirira ikigongwe Mwami, Kukw ari wewe ntakambira umusi ukīra." 
Psalms86:4 Nezereza ubugingo bg’umusavyi wawe, Kukw ari wewe Mwami, ncurūrira umutima." 
Psalms86:5 Kuko wewe Mwami, uri mwiza, ugabirije guharira, Kandi wuzuye imbabazi ku bakwambaza bose." 
Psalms86:6 Uhoraho we, tegera ugutwi ugusenga kwanje: Umviriza ijwi ryo kwinginga kwanje." 
Psalms86:7 Ku musi w’amarushwa yanje nzokwambaza, Kuk’ uzonyishura." 
Psalms86:8 Nta gihwanye nawe mu bigirwamana, Mwami; Kandi nta bikorwa biriho bihwanye n’ivyawe." 
Psalms86:9 Mwami, amahanga yose waremye azoza, akwikubite imbere, agusenge: Kandi bazohimbaza izina ryawe," 
Psalms86:10 Kuk’ uhambaye, kand’ ukora ibitangaza: Ni wewe Mana wenyene." 
Psalms86:11 Uhoraho, ndangira inzira yawe; nanje nzogendera mu kuri kwawe; Egeranya umutima wanje kugira ngo wubahe izina ryawe." 
Psalms86:12 Mwami, Mana yanje, nzogushimisha umutima wanje wose; Nzohimbaza izina ryawe ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms86:13 Kukw imbabazi umfitiye ari nyinshi; Kandi wakijije ubugingo bganje ngo ntibuje i bgina i kuzimu. 
Psalms86:14 Mana, abibone barampagurukiye, Igitero c’abantu b’ibirara kirondera kunyica, Kandi ntibagushizek’ umutima." 
Psalms86:15 Ariko wewe Mwami, ur’ Imana yuzuye imbabazi, ur’ inyabuntu, Uteba kuraka, ugira ikigongwe cinshi n’ukuri kwinshi." 
Psalms86:16 Hindukira, ungirire ikigongwe; Uhe umusavyi wawe inkomezi zawe, Ukize umwana w’incoreke yawe." 
Psalms86:17 Unyereke ikimenyetso c’ivyiza, Kugira ngw abanyanka bakirābe bamāramāre; Kuko wewe Uhoraho, untabaye, ukammara umubabaro." 
Psalms87:1 Itanguriro yashizeho riri ku misozi yera. 
Psalms87:2 Uhoraho akunda ibirimba vy’ i Siyoni Kubirutisha ingo zose z’aba Yakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Ivy’ icubahiro bikuvugwako, Ewe murwa w’Imana." 
Psalms87:4 Nzovuga i Rahabu n’i Babuloni, ko biri mu bo tuzinanyi: Ehe Filisitiya na Tiro bo na Etiyopiya; Abo ni ho bāvukiye." 
Psalms87:5 Ni koko, bazovuga ivy’ i Siyoni, bat’ Aba n’aba ni ho bāvukiye. Kand’ Īsumba vyose ubgayo izohashimangira." 
Psalms87:6 Uhoraho ni yandika amahanga, azoharūra, At’ Abo ni ho bāvukiye." 
Psalms87:7 Abaririmvyi bo n’abavyinnyi bazovuga, Bat’ Amasōko yanje yose ari muri wewe." 
Psalms88:1 Uhoraho, Mana y’agakiza kanje, Ntakambira imbere yawe ku murango no mw ijoro." 
Psalms88:2 Ugusenga kwanje ni kuje gushika mu nyonga zawe: N’utegere ugutwi ugutakamba kwanje. 
Psalms88:3 Kuk’ umutima wanje wuzuye imibabaro, Kand’ ubugingo bganje bgēgereye i kuzimu." 
Psalms88:4 Mparūranwa n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo; Mmeze nk’ūtagira gitabara: 
Psalms88:5 Naterewe mu bapfuye, Mmeze nk’abishwe, baryamye mu mva, Abo utacibuka ukundi; Kandi batandukanye n’ukuboko kwawe." 
Psalms88:6 Wanshize mu rwobo rwo hasi, Ahantu h’umwiza i bgina." 
Psalms88:7 Uburake bgawe buranshikamiye, Kandi wambabarishije imipfunda yawe yose." 
Psalms88:8 Washize kure yanje abo tuzinanyi; Wangize uwo kwankwa urunuka kuri bo: Ndugaranywe, sinshobora gusohoka." 
Psalms88:9 Ijisho ryanje rirarotse kubg’ umubabaro: Nama ngutakambira uko bukeye, Uhoraho, Nkakwayira amaboko." 
Psalms88:10 Mbeg’ uzokwereka abapfuye ibitangaza? Abahwereye bazozuka bagushime?. 
Psalms88:11 Mbeg’ imbabazi zawe zizovugirwa mu mva? Canke k’ur’ umwizigirwa bizovugirwa mu mahonero? 
Psalms88:12 Ibitangaza vyawe bizomenyekanira mu mwiza? Cank’ ukugororoka kwawe kuzomenyekanira mu gihugu c’abibagiranye? 
Psalms88:13 Ariko, Uhoraho, ni wewe ntakambira, Kandi mu gitondo ugusenga kwanje kuzogusanganira." 
Psalms88:14 Uhoraho we, n’iki gituma uta ubugingo bganje? N’iki gituma umpisha mu nyonga hawe?" 
Psalms88:15 Nahereye mu buto bganje mbabazwa, ndi mahwera: Mpagarika umutima uko ntewe n’ubgoba bgawe." 
Psalms88:16 Uburake bgawe bg’inkazi burandengeye; Ubgoba unteye burandanduye. 
Psalms88:17 Vyankikije nk’amazi umusi urīra; Vyanzengukiye vyose icarimwe. 
Psalms88:18 Abakunzi banje n’abagenzi banje wabashize kure yanje, N’abo tuzinanyi baroye mu mwiza." 
Psalms89:1 Nzoririmba imbabazi z’ Uhoraho gushitsa ibihe bidashira; Uk’ urunganwe rugenda rukurikira urundi, nzobamenyesha n’akanwa kanje k’ ur’ umwizigirwa." 
Psalms89:2 Kuko navuze, nt’ Imbabazi zizokomezwa ibihe vyose, No mw ijuru ubgaho, uzohashimangira ukwizigirwa kwawe." 
Psalms89:3 Nasezeranye isezerano n’uwo natoranije, Narahiye Dawidi umusavyi wanje," 
Psalms89:4 Nti Nzoshimangira uruvyaro rwawe gushitsa ibihe bidashira; Ingoma yawe nzoyikomeza, gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms89:5 Ijuru rizoshima ibitangaza vyawe Uhoraho; Rizoshimira mw ikoraniro ry’ abera k’ur’ uwo kwizigirwa. 
Psalms89:6 Ni nde wo mw ijuru yogereranywa n’Uhoraho? Ni nde wo mu bana b’Imana ahwanye n’Uhoraho? 
Psalms89:7 Ni we Mana iteye ubgoba bginshi mw ikoraniro ry’ abera, N’iyo gutinywa kurusha abayikikije bose." 
Psalms89:8 Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo, Ni nde munyenkomezi ahwanye nawe, Uhoraho? Kuba umwizigirwa kwawe kuragukikije." 
Psalms89:9 Ni wewe uganza ukwishira hejuru kw’ikiyaga: Iy’ imipfunda yaco ikūye hasi, urayizibiza." 
Psalms89:10 Ni wewe wamenaguye Rahabu, hakamera nk’uwishwe: Abansi bawe wabasābagirishije ukuboko kw’inkomezi zawe." 
Psalms89:11 Ijuru n’iryawe, isi na yo n’ iyawe: Isi n’ibiyuzuye, ni wewe washizeh’ itanguriro ryayo." 
Psalms89:12 I burārūko n’i bumanuko ni wewe waharemye: I Tabora n’i Herumoni hanezererwa izina ryawe. 
Psalms89:13 Ufise ukuboko kw’inkomezi, Ukuboko kwawe kurakomeye, ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo gushizwe hejuru." 
Psalms89:14 Ukugororoka n’imanza zibereye ni vyo ingoma yawe ihagazeko: Imbabazi n’ukuri ni vyo bikwitangira imbere. 
Psalms89:15 Hahirwa ihanga rizi ijwi ry’ impundu: Rigendera mu muco wo mu nyonga hawe, Uhoraho." 
Psalms89:16 Banezererwa izina ryawe umusi ukīra: Kand’ ukugororoka kwawe ni kwo kubashirisha hejuru. 
Psalms89:17 Kuk’ ur’ icubahiro c’inkomezi zabo: Imbabazi zawe ni zo zizoshirisha hejuru ihembe ryacu. 
Psalms89:18 Kukw inkinzo idukīngira ar’ Uhoraho; Umwami wacu n’Uwera w’ Abisirayeli. 
Psalms89:19 Ca gihe wabaririye abakunzi bawe nko mu nzozi, Uti Natabaye umunyenkomezi, Nashize hejuru uwatoranijwe mu bantu." 
Psalms89:20 Nabonye Dawidi umusavyi wanje, Namurobanuje amavuta yanje yera:" 
Psalms89:21 Ikiganza canje kizokwama kibana na we, Ukuboko kwanje kuzomuha inkomezi." 
Psalms89:22 Umwansi wiwe ntazomuzako giturumbuka, Kand’ umunyakibi ntazomuhahaza." 
Psalms89:23 Nanje nzojanjagurira abarwanizi biwe imbere yiwe, Ntsinde hasi abamwanka." 
Psalms89:24 Arikw imbabazi zanje no kuba umwizigirwa kwanje bizobana na we; Kand’ izina ryanje rizoshirisha hejuru ihembe ryiwe. 
Psalms89:25 Nzoshira ikiyaga mu ntoke ziwe, N’inzūzi mu kuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo." 
Psalms89:26 Azontakambira, ati Ni wewe Data, Imana yanje, igitandara c’ agakiza kanje." 
Psalms89:27 Kandi nzomugira imfura yanje, Asumbe abami bo mw isi." 
Psalms89:28 Nzomubīkira imbabazi zanje ibihe bidashira, Isezerano ryanje rizohama kuri we." 
Psalms89:29 Kand’ uruvyaro rwiwe nzoruha kuramba gushitsa ibihe bidashira, Bo n’ingoma yiwe nk’imisi y’ ijuru." 
Psalms89:30 Namb’ abana biwe bazoreka ivyagezwe vyanje, Ntibagendere mu vyo nageze;" 
Psalms89:31 Namba bazorenga ivyo nashinze, Ntibitondere amabgirizwa yanje," 
Psalms89:32 Ni ho nzohanisha ibicumuro vyabo inkoni, No kugabitanya kwabo imiramu." 
Psalms89:33 Ariko sinzomukūrako rwose imbabazi zanje, Sinzoreka kuba umwizigirwa." 
Psalms89:34 Sinzova mw isezerano ryanje, Sinzohindura ijambo ryavuye mu kanwa kanje." 
Psalms89:35 Igihe kimwe narahiye ukwera kwanje; Sinzobesha Dawidi; 
Psalms89:36 Uruvyaro rwiwe ruzoramba gushitsa ibihe bidashira, Ingoma yiwe izohoraho nk’ izuba imbere yanje." 
Psalms89:37 Izoshimangirwa gushitsa ibihe bidashira nk’ukwezi; Mw ijuru har’ icabona co kubishingira intahe co kwizigirwa. 
Psalms89:38 Ariko none washiburiye kure uwo warobanuje amavuta, uramuheba, Waramurakiye." 
Psalms89:39 Wanse urunuka isezerano ry’ umusavyi wawe, Wahumanishije igitsibo ciwe kugiterera hasi." 
Psalms89:40 Wasanganguye inzitiro ziwe zose; Wakomvomvoye ibihome vyiwe. 
Psalms89:41 Abahita bose baramunyaga: Ahindutse agakēngērwe ku babanyi biwe. 
Psalms89:42 Washize hejuru ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’abarwanizi biwe, Wanezereje abansi biwe bose." 
Psalms89:43 Mber’ usubiza inyuma ubugi bg’inkota yiwe, Kandi ntiwamuhaye guhagarara ashikamye mu ntambara." 
Psalms89:44 Watumye ubgiza bgiwe bushira, Watereye hasi ingoma yiwe." 
Psalms89:45 Wagabanije imisi y’ubusore bgiwe, Wamwambitse isoni." 
Psalms89:46 Uhoraho we, uzogeza hehe kwihisha ibihe vyose? Uburake bgawe buzogeza hehe kwaka nk’umuriro?" 
Psalms89:47 Ibuka ingen’ igihe canje ari gito: Ereg’ abana b’abantu bose wabaremeye ubusa! 
Psalms89:48 Ni nde muntu azoramba ntabone urupfu, Agakiza ubugingo bgiwe ukuboko kw’i kuzimu?." 
Psalms89:49 Mwami, imbabazi zawe wahoranye ziri hehe, Izo warahiriye Dawidi mu kwizigirwa kwawe?" 
Psalms89:50 Mwami, ibuka ibitutsi batuka abasavyi bawe, Ingene ntwara mu gikiriza ibitutsi vy’amahanga yose ukw ari menshi;" 
Psalms89:51 Ivyo abansi bawe bādututse, Uhoraho, Ivyo bātutse intambuko z’ uwo warobanuje amavuta." 
Psalms89:52 Uhoraho ahimbazwe ibihe bitazoshira. Amen, kandi Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Mwami, wamye ur’ uburuhukiro bgacu, Uhereye ibihe vyose." 
Psalms90:2 Imisozi itaravuka, Utararamukwa isi n’ibihugu, Uhereye ibihe bidashira, ugashitsa ibihe bidashira, ni wewe Mana." 
Psalms90:3 Uhindura abantu umukungugu, Uvuze, uti Bana b’abantu, musubireyo." 
Psalms90:4 Kukw imyaka igihumbi mu nyonga zawe Imeze nk’umusi w’ejo wahise, Canke nk’igishingo kimwe c’ijoro." 
Psalms90:5 Ubajana nk’ukw isūri itwara, bahwanye n’itiro; Mu gitondo bamera nk’ivyatsi bikura." 
Psalms90:6 Mu gitondo birakura bigashurika; Ku mugoroba bigatemwa, bikūma." 
Psalms90:7 Kuko tumazwe n’uburake bgawe, Uburake bgawe bgaduhagaritse imitima." 
Psalms90:8 Washize ivyo twagabitanije imbere yawe, N’ivyaha vyacu vyo mu mpisho wabishize mu muco uva mu nyonga hawe." 
Psalms90:9 Kukw imisi yacu yose ishize tukiri mu burake bgawe, Imyaka yacu tuyirangiza nk’ ah’ ar’ akanya ko gusuhuza umutima." 
Psalms90:10 Imisi y’imyaka yacu n’imyaka mirongwirindwi, Canke naho, kubg’ intege nyinshi, yoshika kuri mirongumunani, Yamar’ ivyiratwa vyayo n’ ubutame n’umubabaro, Kukw ishira vuba, natwe tukaba tugurutse." 
Psalms90:11 Ni nde azi inkomezi z’uburake bgawe? Akamenya n’ubushangashirwe bgawe, ingene wewe ukwiye kwubahwa?" 
Psalms90:12 Utwigishe guharūra imisi yacu Uburyo butuma dutunga imitima y’ubgenge. 
Psalms90:13 Ewe Uhoraho garuka; uzogeza ryari? Ni wīrīmbūre ku vy’ugirira abasavyi bawe. 
Psalms90:14 Mu gitondo uz’ uduhāze imbabazi zawe; Kugira ngo tuze tunezerwe, duhimbarwe imisi yacu yose." 
Psalms90:15 Utunezereze umunezero ungana n’imisi watubabarijemwo, N’imyaka twabonyemw’ ivyago." 
Psalms90:16 Igikorwa cawe ni ciserure ku basavyi bawe, Bo n’ubgiza bgawe ku bana babo." 
Psalms90:17 Igikundiro c’Uhoraho, Imana yacu, kibe kuri twebge: Kand’ udushimangirire ibikorwa vy’intoke zacu; Mbere, ibikorwa vy’intoke zacu ubishimangire." 
Psalms91:1 Ūba mu bgigobeko bg’Īsumba vyose Azokwama ari mu gitūtu c’ Īshobora vyose. 
Psalms91:2 Ndabgira Uhoraho, nt’ Ur’ ubuhungiro bganje n’igihome kinkīngira, Imana yanje nizigira." 
Psalms91:3 Kukw ari yo izogukiza umutego w’umutezi, N’ikīza gihonnya." 
Psalms91:4 Izokubundikira mu moya yayo, Kand’ uzohungira musi y’ivyubi vyayo; Ukuri kwayo n’inkinzo n’icuma co kwīkīngiriza." 
Psalms91:5 Ntuzotinyishwa n’igiteye ubgoba mw ijoro, Canke n’umwampi urashwe ku murango;" 
Psalms91:6 Canke n’ikīza kigendagendera mu mwiza, Canke n’agatikizo kayogeza mu mashōka." 
Psalms91:7 Abantu igihumbi bazohindikirana i ruhande yawe, N’ibihumbi cumi i buryo bgawe, Ariko ntibizogushikako." 
Psalms91:8 Uzobirābisha amaso yawe gusa, Ubone ingero y’abanyakibi." 
Psalms91:9 Wagize Uhoraho ubuhungiro bgawe, Īsumba vyose wayigize uburuhukiro;" 
Psalms91:10 Nta kibi kizogira ico kikugira, Kandi nta cago kizokwēgēra ihema ryawe." 
Psalms91:11 Kukw azokuragiza abamarayika biwe, Ngo bakuzigame mu nzira zawe zose." 
Psalms91:12 Bazokuramira mu maboko yabo, Woye gutsitara kw ibuye." 
Psalms91:13 Uzokandagira intambge n’ imamba, Uzosiribanga umugunza w’ intambge n’ikiyoka." 
Psalms91:14 Kuko yankunze akaramata, ni co gituma nzomukiza: Nzomushira hejuru, kuko yamenye izina ryanje." 
Psalms91:15 Azonyambaza, nanje ndamwitabe, Nzobana na we mu marushwa, Ndamukize, mmuhe icubahiro." 
Psalms91:16 Nzomuhāza kuramba, Kandi nzomwereka agakiza kanje." 
Psalms92:1 Ni vyiza gushima Uhoraho, No kuririmbira izina ryawe ishimwe, ewe Usumba vyose:" 
Psalms92:2 Kwerekana imbabazi zawe mu gitondo, N’ingen’ ur’ umwizigirwa uko bgīje," 
Psalms92:3 Tuvugira inanga y’imirya cumi n’ikembe, Tukōmānza inanga." 
Psalms92:4 Kuko wewe Uhoraho, wannejereje kubg’ igikorwa cawe wakoze: Nzovugishwa impundu n’ibikorwa vy’intoke zawe." 
Psalms92:5 Ereg’ ibikorwa vyawe birakomeye Uhoraho! Ivyiyumviro vyawe bishika i bgina kure. 
Psalms92:6 Umuntu w’ikijuju ntazi ibi; N’igipfu ntikibitahura: 
Psalms92:7 Iy’ abanyakibi bārutse nk’ ubgatsi, Kand’ inkozi z’ibibi zose iyo zitotahaye, N’ukugira ngo barandurwe gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms92:8 Ariko wewe, Uhoraho, ushizwe hejuru gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms92:9 Eh’ abansi bawe, Uhoraho, Eh’ abansi bawe bazohona: Inkozi z’ibibi zose zizosābagira." 
Psalms92:10 Ariko washize hejuru ihembe ryanje nk’iry’ imbogo, Nsīzwe amavuta masha." 
Psalms92:11 Kand’ ijisho ryanje ryiboneye abansi banje, Amatwi yanje yiyumviye ukw inkozi z’ibibi zimpagurukiye zibaye." 
Psalms92:12 Umugororotsi azototahara nk’ ikigazi, Azoshirwa hejuru nk’igiti c’ isederi c’i Lebanoni." 
Psalms92:13 Abatewe mu rugo rw’Uhoraho Bazototaharira mu nyubakwa z’Imana yacu. 
Psalms92:14 No mu busāza bazoba bacāma; Bazogira ubukame bginshi n’itōto: 
Psalms92:15 Kugira ngo vyerekane yuk’ Uhoraho atunganye; Ni we gitandara canje, atarimwo kugabitanya na gukeya." 
Psalms93:1 Uhoraho arahangamye, avogereye mu cubahiro; Uhoraho aravogereye, akenyeje inkomezi. Noneh’ isi na yo irashimangiye, ntinyiganyizwa." 
Psalms93:2 Ingoma yawe yarahamye uhereye kera, Wamyeho uhereye kera hose." 
Psalms93:3 Uhoraho, inzūzi zishize hejuru, Inzūzi zishize hejuru amajwi yazo: Inzūzi zishira hejuru kubomborana kwazo." 
Psalms93:4 Amajwi y’amazi menshi, Imipfunda ihambaye yo mu kiyaga, Uhoraho ar’ iyo hejuru abirusha inkomezi." 
Psalms93:5 Ivyo washingiye intahe n’ivyo kwizigirwa cane; Uhoraho, ukwera kubereye inzu yawe ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms94:1 Uhoraho, Mana Nyen’ uguhōra, Mana Nyen’ uguhōra, kayangana." 
Psalms94:2 Ewe mucamanza w’abari mw isi, n’uhaguruke: Abibone ubasubirize mu nkōko." 
Psalms94:3 Ewe Uhoraho, abanyakibi bazogeza hehe, Abanyakibi bazogeza hehe kwitera hejuru?" 
Psalms94:4 Bararokomboka, bakavugana amanyama, Inkozi z’ibibi zose zirihaya." 
Psalms94:5 Bamenagura abantu bawe, Uhoraho, Bahahaza ishamvu yawe." 
Psalms94:6 Bica umupfakazi n’inyambukīra, Bica n’impfuvyi." 
Psalms94:7 Bakavuga, bat’ Uhoraho ntaja kubibona, Imana ya Yakobo ntija kubibabara." 
Psalms94:8 Yemwe bijuju vyo mu bantu, ni mwibaze ibi: Mwa bipfu mwe, muzoca ubgenge ryari?" 
Psalms94:9 Iyabaditseh’ ugutwi, yobura kwumva? Iyabumvye ijisho, yobura kubona?" 
Psalms94:10 Imwe ihana ayandi mahanga, yobura guhana, Kand’ ari yo yigisha abantu ubgenge?" 
Psalms94:11 Uhoraho arazi ivyiyumviro vy’abantu Kw ari nk’impwemu zihumetswe gusa. 
Psalms94:12 Ewe Uhoraho, hahirwa umuntu uhana, Ukamwigishisha ivyagezwe vyawe;" 
Psalms94:13 Kugira ng’ umuruhure mu misi y’ivyago, Gushitsa ah’ icobo kizokwimbirwa abanyakibi."
