Psalms94:14 Kuk’ Uhoraho atazota abantu biwe, Kand’ atazoheba ishamvu yiwe," 
Psalms94:15 Kuko guca imanza kuzosubira ku kugororoka, Kand’ abafise imitima itunganye bose ni kwo bazokurikira." 
Psalms94:16 Ni nde azokūra hasi ngw antabare kurwanya abanyavyaha? Ni nde azohagarara akantabara ngo turwanye inkozi z’ibibi? 
Psalms94:17 Iy’ Uhoraho ataba umutabazi wanje, Ubugingo bganje buba bgaciye bugerēra ahantu h’ agacerere." 
Psalms94:18 Nkivuga, nt’ Ikirenge canje kiranyereye; Imbabazi zawe, Uhoraho, zarandamiye." 
Psalms94:19 Iy’ amazinda abaye isinzi muri jewe Ivyo umpumuriza binezereza ubugingo bganje. 
Psalms94:20 Mbeg’ abagoreka imanza bazohūza nawe, Kand’ ari bo bagira ivyagezwe urwitwazo rwo kugira nabi?" 
Psalms94:21 Bakoranira hamwe gutera ubugingo bg’umugororotsi, Bagatsindisha amaraso adafise igicumuro." 
Psalms94:22 Arik’ Uhoraho yambereye igihome kirekire kinkīngira, Imana yanje n’igitandara c’ ubuhungiro bganje." 
Psalms94:23 Kand’ izobagarukanak’ ukugabitanya kwabo, Izobarandura kubg’ icaha cabo, Uhoraho Imana yacu azobarandura." 
Psalms95:1 Ni muze, turirimbire Uhoraho: Tuvugirize impundu igitandara c’agakiza kacu." 
Psalms95:2 Tuje mu nyonga ziwe tumushima, Tumuvugirize impundu n’ indirimbo." 
Psalms95:3 Kuk’ Uhoraho ar’ Imana ihambaye, N’Umwami ahambaye, asumba ibigirwamana vyose." 
Psalms95:4 I kuzimu hari mu kuboko kwiwe; Kand’ impinga z’imisozi miremire na zo n’iziwe. 
Psalms95:5 Ikiyaga n’iciwe, ni we yakiremye: Intoke ziwe ni zo zabumvye i musozi." 
Psalms95:6 Ni muze tumusenge twunamye, Dupfukamire Uhoraho Umuremyi wacu," 
Psalms95:7 Kukw ari we Mana yacu, Natwe tur’ abantu b’icanya ciwe, tur’ intama zo mu kuboko kwiwe. Uyu musi icompa mukumva ijwi ryiwe!" 
Psalms95:8 Ntimukomantaze imitima yanyu, nk’uko mwayikomantarije i Meriba, No kuri wa musi w’i Masa mu bugaragwa," 
Psalms95:9 Hamwe ba sogokuruza banyu bāngerageza, Bakancaca, bakabona igikorwa canje." 
Psalms95:10 Nashavuriye ab’ ico gihe imyaka mirongwine, Ndavuga, nt’ Aba n’abantu bama bazimira mu mitima yabo, Kandi ntibamenya inzira zanje." 
Psalms95:11 Ni co catumye ndahirana uburake, Nti Ntibazoshika mu buruhukiro bganje." 
Psalms96:1 Ni muririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nsha: Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, muririmbire Uhoraho." 
Psalms96:2 Muririmbire Uhoraho, mushemagize izina ryiwe: Mumenyekanishe agakiza kiwe uko bukeye." 
Psalms96:3 Mwamamaze mu mahanga ubgiza bgiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoze muvyamamaze mu moko yose." 
Psalms96:4 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahambaye, abereye gushimwa cane: N’uw’ igitinyiro kuruta ibigirwamana vyose." 
Psalms96:5 Kukw ibigirwamana vyose vy’amahanga ar’ ubusa, Arik’ Uhoraho ni we yaremye amajuru." 
Psalms96:6 Icubahiro n’ububasha bir’ imbere yiwe, Ubushobozi n’igikundiro bir’ ahēra hiwe." 
Psalms96:7 Yemwe miryango y’amahanga, mwaturire Uhoraho, Mwaturire Uhoraho ingen’ afise icubahiro n’inkomezi." 
Psalms96:8 Mwaturire Uhoraho ingen’ izina ryiwe ribereye icubahiro; Muze mu nyubakwa ziwe muzanye ishikanwa. 
Psalms96:9 Musenge Uhoraho mwubashe, mushazishije ukwera: Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, muhindire agashitsi imbere yiwe." 
Psalms96:10 Muvuge mu mahanga, mut’ Uhoraho arahangamye: Isi na yo irashimangiye, ntishobora kunyiganyiga; Azocira amahanga imanza zibereye." 
Psalms96:11 Ijuru ni rinezerwe, isi n’ihimbarwe, Ikiyaga ni kibomborane bo n’ibicuzuye." 
Psalms96:12 Indimiro n’ibizezemwo ni bivuze impundu; Ni ho ibiti vyose vyo mw ishamba bizoririmbishwa n’ akanyamuneza 
Psalms96:13 Imbere y’Uhoraho, kukw agira aze, Agira aze gucira abari mw isi imanza, Azocira abari mw isi imanza zibereye, N’amahanga nk’ukw ar’ umwizigirwa." 
Psalms97:1 Uhoraho arahangamye; isi n’ihimbarwe; Ibizinga vyo mu kiyaga binezerwe uko bingana. 
Psalms97:2 Ibicu n’umwiza biramukikije: Ukugororoka n’imanza zibereye ni vyo ingoma yiwe ihagazeko. 
Psalms97:3 Umuriro umwitangira imbere, Uyigiza abarwanizi biwe impande zose." 
Psalms97:4 Imiravyo yiwe yabonesheje mw isi, Ibihugu birabibona, bihinda agashitsi." 
Psalms97:5 Imisozi iyagira imbere y’ Uhoraho nk’ibishashara, Imbere y’Umwami w’isi yose." 
Psalms97:6 Amajuru atāngāza ukugororoka kwiwe, Amahanga yose yabonye ubgiza bgiwe." 
Psalms97:7 Abasenga ibishushanyo bibājwe, Bakirata ivy’ ubusa, ni bamāramāre: Ibigirwamana vyose biramwunamira." 
Psalms97:8 I Siyoni haravyumvise, haranezerwa, Abakobga b’i Buyuda bahimbarwa N’imanza zawe zibereye, ewe Uhoraho." 
Psalms97:9 Kuko wewe Uhoraho, usumba vyose, ukaba uri hejuru y’isi yose, Ushizwe hejuru cane y’ibigirwamana vyose." 
Psalms97:10 Yemwe abakunda Uhoraho, ni mwanke ibibi; Azigama ubugingo bg’abakunzi biwe, Abarokora mu maboko y’abanyakibi." 
Psalms97:11 Umuco urasira umugororotsi, Bo n’umunezero ku b’imitima itunganye." 
Psalms97:12 Munezererwe Uhoraho, yemwe bagororotsi; Kandi muhimbaze izina ryiwe ryera." 
Psalms98:1 Ni muririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nsha, Kuko yakoze ibitangaza: Ikiganza ciwe c’i buryo n’ ukuboko kwiwe kwera yabizanishije agakiza." 
Psalms98:2 Uhoraho yamenyekanishije agakiza kiwe: Ukugororoka kwiwe yakugaragaje ahabona mu maso y’amahanga. 
Psalms98:3 Yibutse imbabazi ziwe n’ukugororoka kwiwe, ngw abigirire inzu ya Isirayeli: Abo ku mpera z’isi zose babonye agakiza k’Imana yacu." 
Psalms98:4 Yemwe abari mw isi mwese, muvugirize Uhoraho impundu: Turika muririmbishwe n’ umunezero, mbere muririmbe ishimwe." 
Psalms98:5 Muririmbire Uhoraho ishimwe, muvugira inanga; Muvugira inanga, muririmbe indirimbo." 
Psalms98:6 Muvugishirize impundu imbere y’Umwami Uhoraho, Inzumbete n’ijwi ry’inzamba." 
Psalms98:7 Ikiyaga ni kibomborane bo n’ibicuzuye, N’isi n’abayibamwo bose," 
Psalms98:8 Inzūzi ni zikome amashi, Imisozi n’iririmbishirizwe icarimwe n’umunezero," 
Psalms98:9 Imbere y’Uhoraho, kukw agira aze gucira abari mw isi imanza: Azocira abari mw isi imanza zigororotse, N’amahanga izibereye." 
Psalms99:1 Uhoraho arahangamye; amahanga ahinze agashitsi! Avyagiye ku Bakerubi; isi iranyiganyiga! 
Psalms99:2 Uhoraho arahambaye muri Siyoni, Kand’ ari hejuru kure y’amahanga yose." 
Psalms99:3 Ni batazire izina ryiwe rihambaye riteye ubgoba: Ni we yera. 
Psalms99:4 Inkomezi z’umwami n’ugukunda imanza zibereye; Ni wewe ushinga ibiroranye. Imanza zibereye n’izigororotse ni wewe ubikorera mu ba Yakobo. 
Psalms99:5 Ni mushire hejuru Uhoraho Imana yacu, Mwuname mur’ imbere y’ indava yo musi y’ibirenge vyiwe: Ni we yera." 
Psalms99:6 Mose na Aroni bo mu baherezi biwe, Na Samweli wo mu bambaza izina ryiwe, Bārambaza Uhoraho, akabishura." 
Psalms99:7 Yababaririra mu nkingi y’igicu, Bakitondera ivyo yashingiye intahe n’ibgirizwa yabahaye." 
Psalms99:8 Uhoraho, Mana yacu, wahora ubishura: War’ Imana ibaharira, Naho wabahōra ivyo bakora." 
Psalms99:9 Ni mushire hejuru Uhoraho, Imana yacu, Musengere ku murwa wiwe wera: Kuk’ Uhoraho, Imana yacu, ar’ uwera." 
Psalms100:1 Yemwe abari mw isi yose, muvugirize Uhoraho impundu." 
Psalms100:2 Musabe Uhoraho munezerewe: Muze mu nyonga ziwe muririmba. 
Psalms100:3 Mumenye yuk’ Uhoraho ari we Mana: Ni we yaturemye, natwe tur’ abiwe, Tur’ abantu biwe, tur’ intama zo mu canya ciwe." 
Psalms100:4 Mushike mu birimba vyiwe mushima, No mu nyubakwa ziwe muhimbaza; Mumukengurukire, mushemagize izina ryiwe." 
Psalms100:5 Kuk’ Uhoraho ari mwiza, imbabazi ziwe zihorah’ ibihe bidashira, Kand’ ahora ar’ umwizigirwa no gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms101:1 Ndaririmba ntazira imbabazi n’imanza zibereye: Uhoraho, ni wewe ngira ndirimbire ishimwe." 
Psalms101:2 Nzokwitondera kugendera mu nzira itunganye: Uzoza aho ndi ryari? Nzokwama ngendana mu nzu yanje umutima utunganye. 
Psalms101:3 Sinzogira ikibi nshira imbere y’amaso yanje: Nanka igikorwa c’ibigoryi; Ntikizomatana nanje. 
Psalms101:4 Umutima ugoramye uzomvako; Sinzogira ikibi mmenya. 
Psalms101:5 Ūbeshera mugenzi we mu mpisho nzomurandura: Ūgamika, akagira umutima wibona, sinzomwihanganira." 
Psalms101:6 Amaso yanje azoba ku bizigirwa bo mu gihugu, kugira ngo tubane: Ūgendera mu nzira itunganye, ni we azonkorera." 
Psalms101:7 Ūgunga ntazoba mu nzu yanje; Ūbesha ntazocimbatara imbere y’amaso yanje. 
Psalms101:8 Uko bukeye nzohonnya abanyakibi bose bo mu gihugu, Kugira ngo ndandure inkozi z’ibibi zose, ndazimare ku murwa w’Uhoraho." 
Psalms102:1 Zirikana wumve ugusenga kwanje Uhoraho we, Ugutakamba kwanje kugushikeko." 
Psalms102:2 Ntumpishe mu nyonga hawe ku musi w’umubabaro wanje, N’umbangire ugutwi; Ku musi ntakambako, unyishure vuba." 
Psalms102:3 Kukw imisi yanje ishira nk’ umwotsi, Amagufa yanje yaka nk’umuriro." 
Psalms102:4 Umutima wanje ukubiswe nk’ ubgatsi, urakabiranye: Kuko nibagira kurya igisa canje." 
Psalms102:5 Ijwi ry’umuniho wanje ritumye Amagufa yanje amatana n’ inyama zanje. 
Psalms102:6 Mmeze nk’inyanana yo mu bugaragwa, Mpindutse nk’igihuna co mu misaka." 
Psalms102:7 Mba maso, mpindutse Nk’akanyoni kari konyene ku gatwe k’inzu." 
Psalms102:8 Abansi banje barantuka umusi ukīra, Abandandamukiye bahinduye izina ryanje agatukisha." 
Psalms102:9 Kuko ndya umunyota nk’ivyo kurya, Nsukiranya ivyo nnywa n’ amosozi," 
Psalms102:10 Kubg’ ugushangashirwa kwawe n’uburake bgawe Kuko wanteruye, ukanta." 
Psalms102:11 Imisi yanje imeze nk’igitūtu kirehutse: Kandi nkabiranye nk’ubgatsi. 
Psalms102:12 Ariko wewe, Uhoraho, uzohangama ibihe bidashira, Icibutso cawe kizohorah’ ibihe vyose." 
Psalms102:13 Uzohaguruka, ugirire imbabazi i Siyoni: Kukw igihe co kuhagirira ikigongwe gishitse, mber’ igihe cashizweho kirashitse." 
Psalms102:14 Kukw abasavyi bawe bahimbarwa n’amabuye yaho, Umukungugu waho ubateye akagongwe." 
Psalms102:15 Bizotuma amahanga yubaha izina ryawe, Uhoraho, N’abami bose bo mw isi bakubaha icubahiro cawe:" 
Psalms102:16 Kuk’ Uhoraho azoba asubiye kwubaka i Siyoni, Kand’ azoba abonekanye icubahiro c’ubgiza bgiwe:" 
Psalms102:17 Ashize umutima ku gusenga kw’abatagira shinge na rugero, Ntiyakēngereye ugusenga kwabo." 
Psalms102:18 Ivyo bizokwandikirwa ab’ igihe kizoza; Ubgoko buzoremwa buzoshima Uhoraho. 
Psalms102:19 Kukw azoba arungurutse hasi, ari hejuru, ahēra hiwe; Uhoraho arungurutse isi ari mw ijuru:" 
Psalms102:20 Kugira ngo yumve ukuniha kw’imbohe, Abohore abāgerewe gupfa;" 
Psalms102:21 Ngw abantu bamenyekanishe izina ry’Uhoraho i Siyoni, N’ishimwe ryiwe i Yerusalemu," 
Psalms102:22 Amahanga n’ibihugu vy’abami Aho bazoshengerera gusaba Uhoraho. 
Psalms102:23 Yaciriye intege zanje mu nzira; Yagabanije imisi yanje. 
Psalms102:24 Ndavuga, nti Mana yanje, ntunkūreho ngicagatije imisi yanje; Imyaka yawe yamah’ ibihe vyose." 
Psalms102:25 Mbere na mbere washizeh’ itanguriro ry’isi, Kand’ amajuru n’igikorwa c’ intoke zawe." 
Psalms102:26 Ivyo bizoshira, ariko weho uzohoraho, Mber’ ivyo vyose bizosāza nk’impuzu, Uzobikūranya nk’impuzu, bikūranwe n’ibindi;" 
Psalms102:27 Ariko weho ur’ uko wamye, Imyaka y’ukubaho kwawe ntizogira iherezo." 
Psalms102:28 Abana b’abasavyi bawe bazohora batsindaje, Uruvyaro rwabo ruzocimbatarizwa imbere yawe." 
Psalms103:1 Mutima wanje, himbaza Uhoraho: Namwe ibimbamwo vyose, muhimbaze izina ryiwe ryera." 
Psalms103:2 Mutima wanje, himbaza Uhoraho; Ntiwibagire ivyiza yakugiriye vyose." 
Psalms103:3 Ni we aharira ibigabitanyo vyawe vyose, Agakiza indwara zawe zose," 
Psalms103:4 Agacungura ubugingo bgawe ngo ntibuje mu mahonero, Akakwambika imbabazi no kugirirwa neza nk’igitsibo," 
Psalms103:5 Agahāza ubukambge bgawe ivyiza, Agatuma usubira mu busore busha bumeze nk’ubg’ inkukuma." 
Psalms103:6 Uhoraho akora ivy’ ukugororoka, Agacira imanza impahazwa." 
Psalms103:7 Yamenyesheje Mose inzira ziwe, Ibikorwa vyiwe yabimenyesheje Abisirayeli." 
Psalms103:8 Uhoraho yuzuye imbabazi, n’umunyabuntu, Ateba kuraka, agira ikigongwe cinshi;" 
Psalms103:9 Ntazokwama ahana, Ntahorana uburake imisi yose." 
Psalms103:10 Ntiyatugiriye ibihwanye n’ ivyaha vyacu, Ntiyadushubirije mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ibigabitanyo vyacu." 
Psalms103:11 Nk’ukw ijuru ryitanguye isi, Ni kw ikigongwe agirira abamwubaha kingana." 
Psalms103:12 Nk’ukw i burasirazuba hitanguye i burengerazuba, Uko ni ko yashize kure ibicumuro vyacu." 
Psalms103:13 Nk’uko se w’abana abagirira akagongwe, Ni k’Uhoraho akagirira abamwubaha." 
Psalms103:14 Kukw azi iremwa ryacu, Yibuka ko tur’ umukungugu." 
Psalms103:15 Umuntu we, imisi yiwe ni nk’iy’ ivyatsi, Nk’ishurwe ryo ku musozi ni ko yamuza." 
Psalms103:16 Kuk’ umuyaga uricako, rikaba rishize, Ahantu haryo ntiharimenye ukundi." 
Psalms103:17 Arikw imbabazi Uhoraho agirira abamwubaha zahereye kera hose, zikazoshitsa ibihe vyose, Kand’ ukugororoka kwiwe kuzoshitsa no ku buzukururuza babo;" 
Psalms103:18 Ni kw agirira abitondera isezerano ryiwe, Bakibuka ivyagezwe vyiwe bakabikora." 
Psalms103:19 Uhoraho yahamangiye intebe yiwe mw ijuru: Ubgami bgiwe buganza vyose. 
Psalms103:20 Muhimbaze Uhoraho, mwebge bamarayika biwe: Mwebge banyenkomezi nyinshi bashikisha ijambo ryiwe Kubangira ugutwi ijwi ry’ ijambo ryiwe." 
Psalms103:21 Muhimbaze Uhoraho, mwebge ngabo ziwe zose, Yemwe basavyi biwe bakora ibimuhimbara." 
Psalms103:22 Muhimbaze Uhoraho, yemwe bikorwa vyiwe vyose, Mumuhimbarize ahantu hose aganza: Mutima wanje, himbaza Uhoraho." 
Psalms104:1 Mutima wanje, himbaza Uhoraho. Uhoraho, Mana yanje, ur’ ūhambaye cane; Wisakaye igitinyiro n’icubahiro." 
Psalms104:2 Wifubika umuco nk’umwambaro; Ugaranzura ijuru nk’ihema. 
Psalms104:3 Ushinga inkingi z’insenge zawe mu mazi; Uhindura ibicu umukogote ugenderamwo; Ugendera ku mababa y’umuyaga. 
Psalms104:4 Uhindura abamarayika bawe imiyaga, Abasavyi bawe ubahindura umuriro waka." 
Psalms104:5 Washizeh’ amatanguriro y’isi, Ngo yoye kuzonyiganyizwa gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms104:6 Wayoroshe ikiyaga nk’impuzu, Amazi areremba hejuru y’ imisozi miremire." 
Psalms104:7 Ahungishwa no gukankamira kwawe, Yirukishwa no guhinda kw’ inkuba yawe," 
Psalms104:8 Aca ku misozi, amanukana imyonga, Ashika mu kibanza wayagereye." 
Psalms104:9 Wayakubitiye ibango ngo yoye kurirēngāna, Kugira ngo ntagaruke, akarengera isi." 
Psalms104:10 Urungika amariba mu myonga, Imigezi itemba hagati y’ imisozi;" 
Psalms104:11 Ishokwa n’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba, Indogoba z’inyeshamba zishira inyota." 
Psalms104:12 Inyoni n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre biba kur’ iyo migezi, Bijwiragirira mu mashami." 
Psalms104:13 Imisozi uyirekurirakw imvura ivuye ku nsenge zawe, Isi ihāzwa n’ibivuye mu bikorwa vyawe." 
Psalms104:14 Umereza inka ubgatsi, Umeza imboga zo kugaburira abantu, Kugira ng’ ubakūrire umutsima mw ivu," 
Psalms104:15 Na vino inezereza imitima y’abantu, N’amavuta yo kuyagayagisha mu maso habo, Kandi ng’ umutsima uhe imitima y’abantu amagara." 
Psalms104:16 Ibiti vy’Uhoraho birahāga, Ibiti vy’amasederi vy’i Lebanoni yateye;" 
Psalms104:17 Ivyo inyoni n’ibisīga vyārikakw ivyāri: Agasoza gafise inzu yako ku biti vy’akajwari. 
Psalms104:18 Imisozi miremire n’iy’ impene z’inyeshamba, Ibitandara n’ubuhungiro bg’ inkezi." 
Psalms104:19 Washireyeh’ ukwezi kumenyekanisha ibihe: Izuba rirazi iyo rirengera. 
Psalms104:20 Uzana umwiza, hakaba ijoro: Ni ho ibikōko vyose vyo mu kibira bisokoroka bisōbōka." 
Psalms104:21 Imigunza y’intambge iroherana igomba ico yofata; Ku Mana ni ho ironderera ivyo kurya vyayo. 
Psalms104:22 Izuba ryarasa, zikīgīra, Zikaryama mu masenga yazo." 
Psalms104:23 Abantu bagasohoka, bakaja ku bikorwa vyabo, No mu butame bgabo, bakageza ku mugoroba." 
Psalms104:24 Uhoraho we, ereg’ ibikorwa vyawe n’ivy’ uburyo bginshi! Vyose wabikoresheje ubgenge: Isi yuzuye ubutunzi bgawe." 
Psalms104:25 Ehe kiriya kiyaga kinini cāgutse, Kirimw’ ibikwega inda hasi bitoharūrika, Ibikōko bito‐bito na binini‐binini." 
Psalms104:26 Ni ho amāto agendera: Ni ho ingona iba, wayiremye ngo yikinemwo." 
Psalms104:27 Ivyo vyose biguhanga amaso, Kugira ng’ ubigaburire ivyo kurya vyavyo igihe kigeze." 
Psalms104:28 Bitororokanya ivyo ubihaye: Upfumbaturura igipfunsi cawe, bigahāga ivyiza." 
Psalms104:29 Uhisha mu nyonga hawe, bigahinda agashitsi: Ubikūramw’ impwemu, bigaca bipfa, Bikīsubirira mu mukungugu wavyo." 
Psalms104:30 Urungika impwemu yawe, bikaremwa; Uhindura isi, igasubira itōto." 
Psalms104:31 Icubahiro c’Uhoraho ni cameh’ ibihe bidashira; Uhoraho n’anezererwe ibikorwa vyiwe: 
Psalms104:32 Arāba isi, igahinda agashitsi; Akora ku misozi, igafumba umwotsi." 
Psalms104:33 Nzokwama ndirimbira Uhoraho nkiriho, Nzokwama ndirimbira Imana yanje ishimwe ngihumeka." 
Psalms104:34 Ivyo niyumvira biyiryohere: Nanje nzokwama nnezererwa Uhoraho. 
Psalms104:35 Abanyavyaha ni bahone bashire mw isi: Ababi boye kubah’ ukundi. Mutima wanje, himbaza Uhoraho. Haleluya." 
Psalms105:1 Ni mushime Uhoraho, mwambaze izina ryiwe; Mumenyekanishe ibikorwa vyiwe mu mahanga." 
Psalms105:2 Mumuririmbire, mumuririmbire ishimwe; Muvuge ibikorwa vyiwe vyose bitangaje." 
Psalms105:3 Mwirate izina ryiwe ryera, Imitima y’abarondera Uhoraho inezerwe." 
Psalms105:4 Murondere Uhoraho n’inkomezi ziwe; Murondere mu nyonga hiwe ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms105:5 Mwibuke ibikorwa vyiwe bitangaje yakoze, Ibitangaza vyiwe n’amateka yo mu kanwa kiwe," 
Psalms105:6 Yemwe ruvyaro rwa Aburahamu umusavyi wiwe, Yemwe bana ba Yakobo, abo yatoranije." 
Psalms105:7 Uhoraho ni we Mana yacu; Amateka yiwe ari mw isi yose. 
Psalms105:8 Yama yibuka isezerano ryiwe imisi yose; Ijambo yashinze yama aryibuka uk’ urunganwe rugenda rukurikirana gushitsa ibihe igihumbi," 
Psalms105:9 Ni ryo sezerano yasezeranye na Aburahamu, Indahiro yarahiye Isaka," 
Psalms105:10 Akayongera kuri Yakobo ayitsindagira, ngw ibe icagezwe, Kuri Isirayeli ngw ibe isezerano ry’intahava;" 
Psalms105:11 Akavuga, ati Ni wewe nzoha igihugu c’i Kanani, Ngo kibe ishamvu mukubitiwe amabango." 
Psalms105:12 Bāri bakir’ abantu b’imparūrwa, Mbere bāri bake cane, kand’ ar’ inyambukīra muri co," 
Psalms105:13 Bāyerēra, bava mw ihanga baja mu rindi, Bava ku mwami umwe baja mu bundi bgoko." 
Psalms105:14 Ntiyakundira umuntu n’umwe kw abazingirikira, Mbere yahannye abami ababahōra," 
Psalms105:15 Ati Ntimukore ku bo narobanuje amavuta, Ntimugire ico mugira abavugishwa nanje." 
Psalms105:16 Ahamagara amapfa ngw atere mu gihugu; Avuna inkoni yose bishimikije, ni vyo vyo kurya vyabo." 
Psalms105:17 Atuma umuntu wo kubītangira imbere, Ni Yosefu yaguzwe ngw agirwe umuja:" 
Psalms105:18 Bababarisha ibirenge vyiwe iminyororo, Bamushira mu vyuma." 
Psalms105:19 Kugeza ah’ iryavuzwe n’ Uhoraho ryashikiye, Ijambo ryiwe ryaramugerageza." 
Psalms105:20 Umwami yaratumye, baramubohora, Segaba w’amahanga yaramurekuye." 
Psalms105:21 Amuhindura umuzezwarugo wiwe, Amugira segaba kw itunga ryiwe ryose." 
Psalms105:22 Ngw agabe abaganwa biwe ukw agomba, Yigishe abakuru biwe ubgenge." 
Psalms105:23 Kandi Isirayeli aja muri Egiputa, Yakobo agerēra mu gihugu ca Hamu." 
Psalms105:24 Kand’ Uhoraho agwiza abantu biwe cane, Abagira abanyenkomezi kurusha abansi babo." 
Psalms105:25 Ahindura imitima ya bano ngo banke abantu biwe, Bagīra icenge abasavyi biwe." 
Psalms105:26 Atuma Mose umusavyi wiwe, Na Aroni yatoranije." 
Psalms105:27 Bashira hagati muri bo ibimenyetso vyiwe, Bakorera ibitangaza mu gihugu ca Hamu." 
Psalms105:28 Arungika umwiza, burakorana, Na bo ntibārenga amajambo yiwe." 
Psalms105:29 Ahindura amazi yabo amaraso, Yica amafi yabo." 
Psalms105:30 Igihugu cabo kinyagaramw’ ibikere, No mu ngoro z’abami babo." 
Psalms105:31 Avuga ijambo, hatera amasinzi y’ibibugu, N’imibu mu gihugu cabo cose." 
Psalms105:32 Abarungikira urubura mu gishingo c’imvura, N’umuriro ururumba mu gihugu cabo." 
Psalms105:33 Akubita imizabibu yabo n’ insukoni zabo, Avunagura ibiti vyo mu gihugu cabo." 
Psalms105:34 Avuga ijambo, inzige ziratera, N’inzikira zidaharūrika." 
Psalms105:35 Zirya ibimera vyose vyo mu gihugu cabo, Zirya ivyeze mu mirima yabo." 
Psalms105:36 Ageseza abana b’imfura bose bo mu gihugu cabo, Amara ubuzibūra bgabo." 
Psalms105:37 Akūramwo Abisirayeli, bafise amafeza n’amazahabu, Nta munyantege nke yari mu miryango yabo yose." 
Psalms105:38 Babonye bagiye, haba umunezero muri Egiputa, Kuko gutera ubgoba kwabo kwari kubafashe." 
Psalms105:39 Agaranzura igicu co kubatwikira, N’umuriro wo kubamurikira mw ijoro." 
Psalms105:40 Barasaba, azana inkware, Abahimvya umutsima wo mw ijuru." 
Psalms105:41 Atobora igitandara, amazi aradudubiza, Atemba ahantu hagadutse nk’ uruzi." 
Psalms105:42 Kuko yibutse ijambo ryiwe ryera, Na Aburahamu umusavyi wiwe." 
Psalms105:43 Akūray’ abantu biwe banezerewe, Abo yatoranije abakūrayo baririmba." 
Psalms105:44 Abaha ibihugu vy’abanyamahanga, Batwara ivyo abanyamahanga bācumukuriye:" 
Psalms105:45 Aho vyaba birtyo kwar’ ukugira ngo bitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe, Bagendere mu vyo yashinze. Haleluya!" 
Psalms106:1 Haleluya! Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms106:2 Ni nde yoshobora kudondora ibikorwa bikomeye Uhoraho yakoze, Canke kwerekana ishimwe ryiwe ryose?" 
Psalms106:3 Hahirwa abitondera ibitunganye, Hahirwa uwama akora ivyo kugororoka na ntaryo." 
Psalms106:4 Uhoraho, nyibukana imbabazi ugirira abantu bawe; Ungenderanire agakiza kawe:" 
Psalms106:5 Kugira ngo mbone ugutotahara kw’abo watoranije, Mpimbarwe n’umunezero w’ abantu bawe, Niratane n’ishamvu yawe." 
Psalms106:6 Twaracumuye, nka ba sogokuruza, Twaragabitanije, twakoze ivyaha." 
Psalms106:7 Ba sogokuruza ntibātahuye ibitangaza vyawe wakoreye muri Egiputa; Ntibibutse isinzi ry’imbabazi zawe, Ariko bagaraririza ku kiyaga, ni co Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Psalms106:8 Yamara kubg’ izina ryayo irabakiza, Kugira ngw imenyekanishe ubushobozi bgayo bukomeye." 
Psalms106:9 Ikankamira Ikiyaga Gitukura, kirakama: Nukw ibacisha ahār’ i bgina nko mu bugaragwa." 
Psalms106:10 Ibakiza ukuboko kw’umwansi wabo, Irabacungura, ibakūra mu kuboko kw’umurwanizi." 
Psalms106:11 Amazi arengera ababisha babo, Ntihasigara n’umwe." 
Psalms106:12 Maze bizera amajambo yayo; Baririmba ishimwe ryayo. 
Psalms106:13 Ariko bibagira n’ingoga ibikorwa yakoze, Ntibarorēra kw ishitsa imigabo yayo." 
Psalms106:14 Ariko bifuriza cane mu bugaragwa, Bageragereza Imana mu karēre." 
Psalms106:15 Ibaha ico basavye, Arikw imitima yabo iyishiramwo kwonda." 
Psalms106:16 Kandi bagiririra Mose ishari aho bari bashagaje, Na Aroni, uwera w’Uhoraho." 
Psalms106:17 Isi irāsama, imira Datani, Iteranira ku bantu ba Abiramu." 
Psalms106:18 Umuriro udomekwa mw ikoraniro ryabo, Ikirimi cawo kiyigiza abanyakibi." 
Psalms106:19 Bacurira imasa i Horebu, Basenga igishushanyo bāvugutiye mu nkero." 
Psalms106:20 Uko ni ko bākāvye icubahiro cabo Igishushanyo c’impfizi irisha ubgatsi. 
Psalms106:21 Bibagira Imana, Umukiza wabo, Yakoreye ibikomeye muri Egiputa;" 
Psalms106:22 Yakoreye ibitangaza mu gihugu ca Hamu, N’ibiteye ubgoba ku Kiyaga Gitukura." 
Psalms106:23 Bituma ivuga kw izobahonnya, Kand’ iba yarabahoneje, iyaba Mose uwatoranijwe na yo atāhagaze imbere yayo mu gihengeri, Kugira ngw asubize inyuma uburake bgayo, yoye kubahonnya." 
Psalms106:24 Kandi bāgaya igihugu c’ igikundiro, Ntibizera ijambo ryayo:" 
Psalms106:25 Ariko bidodombera mu mahema yabo, Ntibumvira Uhoraho." 
Psalms106:26 Bituma amanika ukuboko, arabarahira Yukw azobatsinda mu bugaragwa," 
Psalms106:27 Kandi kw azotsinda uruvyaro rwabo mu mahanga, Akarushwiragiriza mu bihugu." 
Psalms106:28 Kandi bifatanya na Bayali‐Peyori, Barya ivyaterekerejwe imizimu." 
Psalms106:29 Uko ni ko bāmurakishije ibikorwa vyabo; Ikīza kirabūbīra. 
Psalms106:30 Maze Finehasi ava hasi ashitsa urubanza rwaciwe: Ikīza kirashira. 
Psalms106:31 Abiharūrwako nko kugororoka Uk’ urunganwe rugenda rukurikira urundi gushitsa ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms106:32 Kandi barakiriza Uhoraho ku mazi y’i Meriba, Bituma Mose aterwa ivyago kubgabo:" 
Psalms106:33 Kuko bāgararije Mpwemu w’Uhoraho, Bituma Mose avugisha akanwa kiwe ibitabereye." 
Psalms106:34 Kandi ntibāhonnya amahanga, Nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabageze." 
Psalms106:35 Ariko bivangavanga n’amahanga, Biga ingeso zayo." 
Psalms106:36 Baba abasavyi b’ibigirwamana vyayo, Bibahindukira umutego." 
Psalms106:37 Mbere batanga kw ibimazi abahungu babo n’abakobga babo babaha abadayimoni," 
Psalms106:38 Bavisha amaraso y’aberanda, ni yo maraso y’abahungu babo n’ay’ abakobga babo, Abo batanze kw ibimazi babaha ibigirwamana vy’i Kanani, Igihugu gihumanywa n’amaraso." 
Psalms106:39 Uko ni ko bandujwe n’ ibikorwa vyabo, Bagenda bahurumba nk’ ibimaka mu ngeso zabo." 
Psalms106:40 Bituma uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira abantu biwe, Yanka urunuka ishamvu yiwe." 
Psalms106:41 Abashira mu maboko y’abanyamahanga, Ababanka barabaganza." 
Psalms106:42 Kand’ abansi babo barabahahaza, Bamarwa igabo, baba musi y’ukuboko kwabo." 
Psalms106:43 Yahora abakiza kenshi, Ariko bakamugarariza mu migabo yabo, Bagacishwa bugufi kubg’ ukugabitanya kwabo." 
Psalms106:44 Yamara yashira umutima ku mubabaro wabo, Uko yumvise ugutakamba kwabo:" 
Psalms106:45 Akabibukira isezerano yabasezeraniye, Akagarukana umutima, nk’ ukw isinzi ry’imbabazi ziwe riri." 
Psalms106:46 Agatuma batera akagongwe Abābajanye kw inyagano bose. 
Psalms106:47 Udukize, Uhoraho Mana yacu, Udutororokanye mu mahanga, Kugira ngo dushime izina ryawe ryera, Twirate ishimwe ryawe." 
Psalms106:48 Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, n’ashemagizwe Nk’uko vyamye uhereye kera hose, ugashitsa ibihe bidashira. Kand’ abantu bose ni bavuge, bati Amen. Haleluya!" 
Psalms107:1 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms107:2 Abacunguwe n’Uhoraho ni bavuge bartyo, Abo yacunguye, akabakūra mu kuboko kw’umwansi;" 
Psalms107:3 Akabatororokanya mu bihugu, I burasirazuba n’i burengerazuba, I burārūko no ku kiyaga." 
Psalms107:4 Bāyerereye mu bugaragwa, mu nzira ica mu karēre, Ntibābona igisagara co kubamwo." 
Psalms107:5 Bishwe n’inzara n’inyota, Imitima yabo igwa isari." 
Psalms107:6 Maze batakambira Uhoraho mur’ ayo magorwa yabo, Abakiza amarushwa yabo." 
Psalms107:7 Abarōngōra mu nzira igororotse, Kugira ngo bashike mu gisagara co kugerēramwo." 
Psalms107:8 Abo ni bashimire Uhoraho ukugira neza kwiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoreye abana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:9 Kukw ahāza umutima ufise inyota, N’umutima ushonje awuzuza ivyiza." 
Psalms107:10 Abandi bicara mu mwiza no mu gitūtu c’urupfu, Baboheshejwe umubabaro n’ ivyuma;" 
Psalms107:11 Kuko bāgararije amajambo y’Imana, Bagakēngēra imigabo y’Īsumba vyose." 
Psalms107:12 Kubg’ ivyo ituma imitima yabo icishwa bugufi n’ ubutame, Bagatemba, ntihagire ūbatabara." 
Psalms107:13 Maze batakambira Uhoraho mur’ ayo magorwa yabo, Abakiza amarushwa yabo." 
Psalms107:14 Abakūra mu mwiza no mu gitūtu c’urupfu, Aca iminyororo yabo." 
Psalms107:15 Abo ni bashimire Uhoraho ukugira neza kwiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoreye abana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:16 Kuko yamennye inzugi z’ imiringa, Akavunagura ibihindizo vy’ ivyuma." 
Psalms107:17 Ibijuju bibabarizwa ibicumuro vyavyo N’ukugabitanya kwavyo. 
Psalms107:18 Imitima yabo ihura ivyo kurya vy’imyuga yose; Bakēgēra amarembo y’urupfu. 
Psalms107:19 Maze batakambira Uhoraho mur’ ayo magorwa yabo, Abakiza amarushwa yabo." 
Psalms107:20 Arungika ijambo ryiwe, akabakiza indwara, Akabakiza kuja mu vyobo vyabo." 
Psalms107:21 Abo ni bashimire Uhoraho ukugira neza kwiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoreye abana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Ni batange ibimazi vyo gukenguruka, Bakwize ibikorwa vyiwe mu kuvuza impundu." 
Psalms107:23 Abamanuka baja mu kiyaga bakagendera mu māto, Bakadandariza mu mazi agaranzutse," 
Psalms107:24 Abo babona ibikorwa vy’ Uhoraho, N’ibitangaza vyiwe mw idamba." 
Psalms107:25 Kukw avuga ijambo, akavyura inkūbi y’umuyaga, Ishira hejuru imipfunda yaho." 
Psalms107:26 Baradūga, bakaja nko kw ijuru, Barasubira bagacokera, bakaja nk’i bgina: Imitima yabo ikayagishwa n’ umubabaro." 
Psalms107:27 Bakazungazunga irya n’ino, bakadandabagirana nk’ imborerwa, Ubgenge bgabo bgose bukazimira." 
Psalms107:28 Maze batakambira Uhoraho mur’ ayo magorwa yabo, Abakiza amarushwa yabo." 
Psalms107:29 Inkūbi y’umuyaga ayihindura agahwekere, Bituma imipfunda yaho itekereza." 
Psalms107:30 Maze banezerezwa n’uko habaye agacerere, Agaheza akabashikana mu cambu bagomba." 
Psalms107:31 Abo ni bashimire Uhoraho ukugira neza kwiwe, N’ibikorwa bitangaje yakoreye abana b’abantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Ni bamushemagirize mw ikoraniro ry’abantu, Bamushimire ah’ abakuru bicaye." 
Psalms107:33 Ahindura inzūzi ubugaragwa, N’amasōko ayahindura ahagadutse:" 
Psalms107:34 Igihugu kimera agihindura akarēre k’umunyu, Kubg’ ivyaha vy’abahaba." 
Psalms107:35 Kand’ ahindura ubugaragwa ikidengeri, N’ahagadutse ahahindura amasōko." 
Psalms107:36 Aho ni ho agerēra abashonje, Kugira ngo bubake igisagara co kubamwo," 
Psalms107:37 Babibe imbibe, batere imizabibu, Kugira ngo bironkere ivyeze bikikimvye." 
Psalms107:38 Akabaha umugisha, bakagwira cane, Ntakundira inka zabo ko zikeha." 
Psalms107:39 Kand’ iyo bagerutse, bagahetamishwa No guhahazwa n’amagorwa n’umubabaro," 
Psalms107:40 Asuka agakēngērwe ku bahambaye, Abayerereza mu bigunda bitagira inzira." 
Psalms107:41 Agashira hejuru umukene, amukūye mu marushwa, Akamugwiriza imiryango nk’ umukuku." 
Psalms107:42 Abagororotsi bazobibona banezerwe, Ubugāba bgose bgizibe akanwa." 
Psalms107:43 Ūgira ubgenge wese azoshira umutima kur’ ivyo, Kandi bazokwitegereza imbabazi z’Uhoraho." 
Psalms108:1 Mana, umutima wanje urahamye, Ndaririmba, mbere ndaririmbisha ishimwe ubgiza bganje." 
Psalms108:2 Kembe n’inanga, ni mwikangure; Nanje ubganje nzokwikangura ntange umutwenzi." 
Psalms108:3 Uhoraho nzogushimira mu moko: Nzokuririmbira ishimwe mu mahanga. 
Psalms108:4 Kukw imbabazi zawe ari nyinshi zigera hejuru y’ amajuru; Ukuri kwawe gushika no mu bicu. 
Psalms108:5 Mana, n’ushirwe hejuru y’ amajuru, Icubahiro cawe kibe hejuru y’isi yose." 
Psalms108:6 Kirisha ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo, unyishure, Kugira ngw abo ukunda barokorwe." 
Psalms108:7 Imana yavugiye ahēra hayo, iti Nzogabura Shekemu mvuza impundu, Kandi nzogaburisha amabango umwonga w’i Sukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Gileyadi n’ahanje, umuryango wa Manase n’uwanje; Uwa Efurayimu ni wo ukīngira umutwe wanje; Uwa Yuda ni wo cumu ry’ubugabe bganje." 
Psalms108:9 I Mowabu ni ho cogero canje, Edomu nzohashiburirakw inkweto, I Filisitiya nzohihaya mvuza impundu." 
Psalms108:10 Ni nde azonshikana mu gisagara gikikijwe n’uruzitiro rukomeye? Ni nde azonshikana muri Edomu? 
Psalms108:11 Si wewe uzonshikanayo, ga Mana wadutaye? Si wewe uzonshikanayo, ga Mana utajana n’ingabo zacu?" 
Psalms108:12 Udutabare umurwanizi, Kuko gutabara kw’abantu ar’ ukw’ ubusa." 
Psalms108:13 Imana izodukoresha ivy’ ubuhizi, Kukw ari yo izosiribanga abarwanizi bacu." 
Psalms109:1 Mana mpora mpimbaza, reka kwihoza," 
Psalms109:2 Kukw akanwa k’umunyakibi kanyasamiye, bo n’ak’ ingunge: Bambarije ururimi rw’ibinyoma." 
Psalms109:3 Bankikije amagambo y’urwanko, Bandwanije ata nyanduruko." 
Psalms109:4 Urukundo rwanje barwishuye kuba abarwanizi banje, Ariko jeho nitwariritse gusenga." 
Psalms109:5 Ku neza nabagiriye banyishuye inabi, Ku rukundo banyishuye urwanko." 
Psalms109:6 Umuhe kuganzwa n’umunyakibi, Wa murwanizi ahagarare i buryo bgiwe." 
Psalms109:7 Ni yacirwa urubanza, asohoke rumutsinze: Ugusenga kwiwe gucike icaha." 
Psalms109:8 Imisi yiwe n’ibe mike, Ububgiriza bgiwe busubiremw’ uwundi." 
Psalms109:9 Abana biwe babe impfuvyi, Umugore wiwe abe umupfakazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abana biwe babe inyererezi, basēgerereze; Banuranure utwo kurya kure y’umusaka w’i wabo." 
Psalms109:11 Ūmwishuza az’ akume ivyo yar’ afise vyose, Inyambukīra zinyage ivyo yacumukuriye." 
Psalms109:12 Ntihaze hagire ūba akimugirira agasoni; Ntihaze hagire ūbabara impfuvyi ziwe. 
Psalms109:13 Uruvyaro rwiwe ruze rurandurwe; Mu gihe c’abuzukuru biwe, izina ryiwe rize risibanganywe." 
Psalms109:14 Ukugabitanya kwa ba sekuruza ni kwibukwe n’Uhoraho; Ivyaha vya nyina vyoye gusibanganywa. 
Psalms109:15 Bibe imbere y’Uhoraho ubudasība, Kugira ngw arandure ukwibukwa kwabo, agukūre mw isi." 
Psalms109:16 Kuko wa wundi atāruha yibuka kugira ikigongwe, Ariko yahama umworo n’ umukene, N’ūfise umutima umenetse, ngw abice." 
Psalms109:17 Yakunda kuvuma, kukamusubirako: Kandi ntiyanezererwa guhezagira, kukaba kure yiwe." 
Psalms109:18 Kandi yambara kuvumana nk’umwambaro wiwe, Kumuja mu nda nk’amazi, Kumuja mu magufa nk’amavuta." 
Psalms109:19 Ni kumuhindukire nk’impuzu yambara, N’umukanda ahora akenyeza." 
Psalms109:20 Iyo abe ari yo ngero Uhoraho agerera abarwanizi banje, N’iy’ abavuga nabi ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms109:21 Ariko weho Uhoraho, Mwami, kubg’ izina ryawe unkorere ivyiza, Undokore, kukw imbabazi zawe ari nziza." 
Psalms109:22 Kuko nd’ umworo nkaba umukene, Kand’ umutima wanje ukomerekeye muri jewe." 
Psalms109:23 Nkamanganye nk’igitūtu kirehutse, Nkunkumuwe nk’uruzige." 
Psalms109:24 Amavi yanje adendebuwe no kwisonzesha, Umubiri wanje umazwe inkomezi n’umunanu." 
Psalms109:25 Kandi mpindukiye ba bandi agakēngērwe: Uko bambonye bazunguza imitwe. 
Psalms109:26 Ntabara, Uhoraho Mana yanje; Unkize nk’ukw imbabazi zawe ziri:" 
Psalms109:27 Kugira ngo bamenye yukw ar’ ivyatewe n’ukuboko kwawe, Kw ari wewe, Uhoraho, wabikoze." 
Psalms109:28 Ni bapfe kuvuma, ariko weho umpezagire; Ni bava hasi bazomāramāra, arik’ umusavyi wawe azonezerwa." 
Psalms109:29 Abansi banje ni bambikwe agatēterezo, Bambare isoni zabo nk’umutamana." 
Psalms109:30 Ndashimisha Uhoraho cane akanwa kanje, Mbere nzomushimira hagati mw ishengero." 
Psalms109:31 Kukw azohagarara i buryo bg’umukene, Ngw amukize abacirakw iteka ubugingo bgiwe." 
Psalms110:1 Uhoraho yabariye Umwami wanje, at’ Icara i buryo bganje, Ushitse aho nzohindurira abansi bawe indava y’ibirenge vyawe." 
Psalms110:2 Uhoraho ar’ i Siyoni azoshingiriza kure inkoni y’ ububasha bgawe: Ganza hagati y’abansi bawe. 
Psalms110:3 Abantu bawe bitanga babikunze ku musi ugomora ingabo zawe; Abasore bawe baza ah’ uri nk’ikime, Bashazishije ukwera, bavuye mu nda y’agatondotondo." 
Psalms110:4 Uhoraho ararahiye, ntazokwicuza, At’ Ur’ umuherezi ibihe bidashira Mu buryo bga Melekisedeki." 
Psalms110:5 Umwami Imana ihagaze i buryo bgawe; Izotobekeranya abami ku musi w’uburake bgayo. 
Psalms110:6 Izocira imanza mu mahanga, Ihuzuze imivyimba; Izomenagura imitwe mu bihugu vyinshi." 
Psalms110:7 Umwami azonywa ku mugezi agenda mu nzira: Ni co gituma azoshira umutwe wiwe hejuru. 
Psalms111:1 Haleluya! Nzoshimisha Uhoraho umutima wanje wose Mw ikoraniro ry’abatunganye no mw ishengero ryabo. 
Psalms111:2 Ibikorwa vy’Uhoraho birahambaye, Biseswa n’abo bihimbara bose." 
Psalms111:3 Igikorwa ciwe n’icubahiro n’ ubgiza, Ukugororoka kwiwe kwamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms111:4 Yatumye ibikorwa vyiwe bitangaje vyibukwa, Uhoraho n’umunyabuntu, yuzuye imbabazi." 
Psalms111:5 Yagaburiye abamwubaha: Azokwama yibuka isezerano ryiwe. 
Psalms111:6 Yerekesheje abantu biwe ubushobozi bg’ibikorwa vyiwe Kubaha umwandu w’abanyamahanga. 
Psalms111:7 Ibikorwa vy’intoke ziwe n’ ukuri no kuroranya; Amabgirizwa yiwe yose arahamye. 
Psalms111:8 Arashinzwe gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira, Yakorewe mu kuri no mu kugororoka." 
Psalms111:9 Yarungikiye abantu biwe ugucungurwa, Yageze isezerano ryiwe kuba iry’ ibihe bidashira; Izina ryiwe n’iryera kandi n’iry’ igitinyiro." 
Psalms111:10 Kwubaha Uhoraho n’itanguriro ry’ubgenge, Abakora ivyo bafise ubgenge bushitse: Ishimwe ryiwe ryamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms112:1 Haleluya! Hahirwa uwubaha Uhoraho, Agahimbarwa cane n’ivyagezwe vyiwe." 
Psalms112:2 Uruvyaro rwiwe ruzoba abanyenkomezi mw isi; Umuryango w’abatunganye uzohabga umugisha. 
Psalms112:3 Ubutunzi n’ubukire biri mu rugo rwiwe; Ukugororoka kwiwe kwamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms112:4 Abatunganye umuco ubākirira mu mwiza; Wākira umunyabuntu yuzuye imbabazi kandi w’umugororotsi. 
Psalms112:5 Hahirwa ūgira neza, akagurāna abandi, Agakora ibikorwa vyiwe uburyo butunganye." 
Psalms112:6 Kukw atazokwigera anyiganyizwa; Umugororotsi azokwibukwa ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms112:7 Ntazotinya inkuru mbi; Umutima wiwe urahamye, wizigiye Uhoraho." 
Psalms112:8 Umutima wiwe urahamangiye, ntazotinya, Gushitsa ah’ azokwibonera abansi biwe." 
Psalms112:9 Yatanze isābagire, yahaye abakene, Ukugororoka kwiwe kwamah’ ibihe bidashira. Ihembe ryiwe rizoshirwa hejuru mu cubahiro." 
Psalms112:10 Umunyakibi azobirāba, ababare; Azoryanya insya z’amenyo, ahwere mu kajisho: Ico umunyakibi yifuza kizobura." 
Psalms113:1 Haleluya! Yemwe basavyi b’Uhoraho, ni mushime, Ni mushime izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms113:2 Izina ry’Uhoraho rishemagizwe, Uhereye none ugashitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms113:3 Uhereye iy’ izuba rirasira ugashitsa iyo rirengera Izina ry’Uhoraho rikwiye gushimwa. 
Psalms113:4 Uhoraho ari hejuru y’amahanga yose, Icubahiro ciwe kiri hejuru y’amajuru." 
Psalms113:5 Ni nde ahwanye n’Uhoraho Imana yacu, Afise intebe yiwe hejuru cane," 
Psalms113:6 Akicishiriza bugufi kurāba Ivyo mw ijuru n’ivyo mw isi? 
Psalms113:7 Akūra umugorwa mu mukungugu, Ashira hejuru umukene, amukūye mu mwavu;" 
Psalms113:8 Kugira ngw amwicarikane n’ abahambaye, Abahambaye bo mu bantu biwe." 
Psalms113:9 Uwari yaragumbashe amuha kwubaka urugo, Ari nyina w’abahungu anezerewe. Haleluya!" 
Psalms114:1 Hamwe Abisirayeli bāva muri Egiputa, Hamwe ab’ inzu ya Yakobo bāva mu bantu b’ururimi rudebagura;" 
Psalms114:2 Aba Yuda bahindutse ahēra h’Imana, Abisirayeli bahindutse ubgami bgayo." 
Psalms114:3 Ikiyaga kibibonye kirahunga, Yorodani rusubizwa inyuma." 
Psalms114:4 Imisozi miremire yikina amatavu nk’amapfizi y’intama, N’uturambi nk’imyagazi yazo." 
Psalms114:5 Ubaye iki ga wa kiyaga, k’uhunze? Nawe, Yorodani, k’usubiye inyuma?" 
Psalms114:6 Namwe misozi miremire, ko mwikina amatavu nk’amapfizi y’intama? Namwe turambi, ko mwikina amatavu nk’imyagazi?" 
Psalms114:7 Ewe si, hindira agashitsi imbere y’Umwami, Imbere y’Imana ya Yakobo," 
Psalms114:8 Yahinduye igitandara ikidengeri, Yahinduye isare isōko y’ amazi." 
Psalms115:1 Ntabe ari twebge, Uhoraho, ntabe ari twebge, Arikw izina ryawe abe ari ryo uha icubahiro, Kubg’ imbabazi zawe n’ ukuri kwawe." 
Psalms115:2 N’iki gituma abanyamahanga babaza, Ngw Imana yabo iri hehe?" 
Psalms115:3 Arikw Imana yacu iri mw ijuru, Yakoze ibiyihimbaye vyose." 
Psalms115:4 Ibigirwamana vyabo n’ifeza n’izahabu, N’ibikorwa n’amaboko y’abantu." 
Psalms115:5 Bifise akanwa, ntibivuga, Bifise amaso, ntibibona," 
Psalms115:6 Bifise amatwi, ntivyumva, Bifise amazuru, ntibimoterwa," 
Psalms115:7 Bifise intoke, nta co bikorakora, Bifise ibirenge, ntibigenda, Kandi ntibivugisha imihogo yavyo." 
Psalms115:8 Ababikora bazohwana na vyo, Mbere n’ūvyizigira wese." 
Psalms115:9 Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni mwizigire Uhoraho: Ni we mutabazi wabo n’ inkinzo yabo." 
Psalms115:10 Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Aroni, ni mwizigire Uhoraho: Ni we mutabazi wabo n’ inkinzo yabo." 
Psalms115:11 Yemwe abubaha Uhoraho, ni mwizigire Uhoraho: Ni we mutabazi wabo n’ inkinzo yabo." 
Psalms115:12 Uhoraho aratwibutse; azoduha umugisha; Azoha umugisha ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, Azoha umugisha ab’ inzu ya Aroni," 
Psalms115:13 Azoha umugisha abubaha Uhoraho, Aboroshe n’abahambaye." 
Psalms115:14 Uhoraho abagwize abūhīre, Abagwizanye n’abana banyu." 
Psalms115:15 Muhawe umugisha n’Uhoraho, Yaremye ijuru n’isi." 
Psalms115:16 Amajuru n’amajuru y’Uhoraho, Arikw isi yayihaye abana b’abantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abapfuye ntibahimbaza Uhoraho, Cank’ abamanuka, baja ahantu h’agacerere." 
Psalms115:18 Ariko tweho tuzohora dushemagiza Uhoraho, Uhereye none, ugashitsa ibihe vyose. Haleluya!" 
Psalms116:1 Nkunda Uhoraho, kuko yumvise Ijwi ryanje n’ukwinginga kwanje." 
Psalms116:2 Kuko yanteze ugutwi, Ni co gituma nzokwama ndamwambaza nkiriho." 
Psalms116:3 Ingoyi z’urupfu zaranyizingiriyeko, Uburibge bg’i kuzimu bgaramfashe: Mbona ivyago n’umubabaro." 
Psalms116:4 Maze nambaza izina ry’Uhoraho, Nt’ Uhoraho, ndakwinginze, rokora ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms116:5 Uhoraho n’umunyabuntu, kandi n’umugororotsi: Ek’ Imana yacu n’inyembabazi." 
Psalms116:6 Uhoraho azigama abatungu: Nacishijwe bugufi, arankiza." 
Psalms116:7 Mutima wanje, subira mu buruhukiro bgawe; Kuk’ Uhoraho yakugiriye neza." 
Psalms116:8 Kuk’ Uhoraho, wakijije ubugingo bganje urupfu, Amaso yanje ukayakiza amosozi, N’ibirenge vyanje ukabikiza gutsitara." 
Psalms116:9 Nzogendera mu nyonga z’ Uhoraho Mw isi y’abakiriho. 
Psalms116:10 Nari nizeye, hamwe navuga, Nti Narababajwe cane," 
Psalms116:11 Nkavuga ndandamutse, Nt’ Abantu bose n’abanyabinyoma." 
Psalms116:12 Ivyiza Uhoraho yangiriye vyose Ndabimwishura iki? 
Psalms116:13 Ndābīra igikombe c’agakiza, Nambaze izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms116:14 Uhoraho nzomushitsakw amasezerano yanje, Mbere nzoyashitsa mu maso y’abantu biwe bose." 
Psalms116:15 Urupfu rw’abakunzi biwe N’urw’ igiciro mu nyonga z’Uhoraho. 
Psalms116:16 Uhoraho, n’ukuri nd’ umusavyi wawe; Nd’ umusavyi wawe, umwana w’incoreke yawe. Wankūye mu ngoyi." 
Psalms116:17 Nzogushikanira ikimazi co gukenguruka, Nambaze izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms116:18 Uhoraho nzomushitsakw amasezerano yanje; Mbere nzoyashitsa mu maso y’abantu biwe bose; 
Psalms116:19 Mu nyubakwa zo ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, Hagati muri wewe, Yerusalemu. Haleluya!" 
Psalms117:1 Yemwe banyamahanga mwese, ni mushime Uhoraho; Yemwe mwa moko yose, ni mumuhimbaze," 
Psalms117:2 Kukw imbabazi atugirira ari nyinshi, Kand’ ukuri kw’Uhoraho kwamah’ ibihe bidashira. Haleluya!" 
Psalms118:1 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms118:2 Abisirayeli ni bavuge, Bat’ Imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms118:3 Ab’ inzu ya Aroni ni bavuge, Bat’ Imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms118:4 Abubaha Uhoraho ni bavuge, Bat’ Imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms118:5 Hamwe nari mu mubabaro, nambaje Uhoraho: Uhoraho aranyitaba, anshira ahantu hāgutse." 
Psalms118:6 Uhoraho ari mu ruhande rwanje, sinzotinya: Non’ umuntu yoshobora kungira iki?" 
Psalms118:7 Uhoraho ari mu ruhande rwanje, arantabara: Ni co gituma nzokwibonera abanyanka." 
Psalms118:8 Kugira Uhoraho ubuhungiro kuri n’ikimazi Kuruta kwizigira abantu: 
Psalms118:9 Kugira Uhoraho ubuhungiro kuri n’ikimazi Kuruta kwizigira abahambaye. 
Psalms118:10 Amahanga yose yantanze irya n’ino; Mw izina ry’Uhoraho ndayarandura. 
Psalms118:11 Yantanze irya n’ino, eka mbere yantanze irya n’ino, Mw izina ry’Uhoraho ndayarandura." 
Psalms118:12 Yantanze irya n’ino nk’inzuki, Yahwamye nk’umuriro w’ amahwa, Mw izina ry’Uhoraho ndayarandura." 
Psalms118:13 Nararirijwe cane kugira ngo ntembe: Maz’ Uhoraho arantabara. 
Psalms118:14 Uhoraho ni we nkomezi zanje n’indirimbo yanje; Kandi yahindutse agakiza kanje. 
Psalms118:15 Mu mahema y’abagororotsi har’ ijwi ry’impundu n’iry’ agakiza: Ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’ Uhoraho gukora ivy’ ubuhizi. 
Psalms118:16 Ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’ Uhoraho gushizwe hejuru, Ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’ Uhoraho gukora ivy’ ubuhizi." 
Psalms118:17 Sinzopfa, ariko nzobaho, Namamaze ibikorwa vy’Uhoraho." 
Psalms118:18 Uhoraho yampannye bikomeye, Ariko ntiyangomoreye urupfu." 
Psalms118:19 Njishurira ibirimba vy’ukugororoka, Ndabicemwo, nshime Uhoraho." 
Psalms118:20 Ngiki ca kirimba c’Uhoraho, Abagororotsi ni bo bazogicamwo." 
Psalms118:21 Ndagushima kuko wanyishuye, Ukampindukira agakiza." 
Psalms118:22 Ibuye abubatsi bāgaye Ni ryo ryahindutse irigumya imfuruka. 
Psalms118:23 Ivyo vyavuye k’Uhoraho, Kandi n’igitangaza mu maso yacu." 
Psalms118:24 Uyu ni wo musi Uhoraho yashizeho; Turawunezererwako, tukawuhimbarirwako." 
Psalms118:25 Dukize turakwinginze, ewe Uhoraho: Uhoraho turakwinginze, uduhe kugubga neza." 
Psalms118:26 Hashemezwe ūje mw izina ry’Uhoraho: Tubahezagiriye mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho. 
Psalms118:27 Uhoraho ni we Mana, kandi yaduhaye umuco; Muboheshe ikimazi imigozi, Mukijane ku mahembe y’ igicaniro." 
Psalms118:28 Ni wewe Mana yanje, nzogushima: Ni wewe Mana yanje, nzogushira hejuru." 
Psalms118:29 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms119:1 Hahirwa abagenda batunganye, Bakagendera mu vyagezwe vy’Uhoraho." 
Psalms119:2 Hahirwa abitondera ivyo yihanikirije, Bakamurondeza umutima wose." 
Psalms119:3 Mbere nta c’ukugabitanya bakora, Bagendera mu nzira ziwe." 
Psalms119:4 Washinze amateka yawe Kugira ngo tuyitonderane umwete. 
Psalms119:5 Icompa inzira zanje zigashikama Kugira ngo nitondere ivyo washinze. 
Psalms119:6 Aho nzoshirira umutima ku mabgirizwa yawe yose Ni ho ntazomāramāra. 
Psalms119:7 Nzogushimisha umutima utunganye Ni namara kwiga imanza zawe ziroranye zibereye. 
Psalms119:8 Nzokwitondera ivyo washinze: Ntunte ngo mbe ruhebga. 
Psalms119:9 Umusore azokwezesha inzira yiwe iki? Azoyezesha kuyitondera nk’ ukw ijambo ryawe rivuga. 
Psalms119:10 Nakurondeje umutima wanje wose; Ntukunde ko mpusha ngo mve mu mabgirizwa yawe. 
Psalms119:11 Nabītse ijambo ryawe mu mutima wanje Ngo noye kugucumurako. 
Psalms119:12 Uhoraho, ur’ uwo gushemagizwa: Unyigishe ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:13 Namamaje n’iminwa yanje Imanza zose ziroranye z’ akanwa kawe. 
Psalms119:14 Nanezererewe inzira y’ivyo wihanikirije Nk’uko nnezererwa ubutunzi bgose. 
Psalms119:15 Nzokwiyumvira amateka washinze, Kandi nzoshira umutima ku nzira zawe." 
Psalms119:16 Nzonezererwa ivyo washinze, Sinzokwibagira ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:17 Ugirire neza umusavyi wawe, kugira ngo mbeho, Nanje nzokwitondera ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:18 Hwezesha amaso yanje, Kugira ngo mbone ibitangaza vyo mu vyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:19 Nd’ inyambukīra mw isi: Ntumpishe amabgirizwa yawe. 
Psalms119:20 Umutima wanje umenaguwe n’igihahamizi Ugirira imanza zawe ziroranye ibihe vyose. 
Psalms119:21 Wahannye abibone, ari bo bivume, Bahusha bakava mu mabgirizwa yawe." 
Psalms119:22 Unkūrekw agakēngērwe n’ umugayo; Kuko nitondeye ivyo wihanikirije. 
Psalms119:23 Nah’ abahambaye bicaye bangīra imigabo, Umusavyi wawe niyumvira ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:24 Kand’ ivyo wihanikirije na vyo birampimbara, Ni vyo bajanama banje." 
Psalms119:25 Umutima wanje wamatanye n’umukungugu; N’ungire muzima, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:26 Nakwīgāniye inzira zanje, uranyishura: N’unyigishe ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:27 Untahuze inzira y’amateka washinze, Ni ho nzokwiyumvira ibikorwa vyawe bitangaje." 
Psalms119:28 Umutima wanje ushongeshejwe n’umubabaro: Ndemesha, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:29 Inzira y’ibinyoma n’ibe kure yanje: Umpere ubuntu ivyagezwe vyawe. 
Psalms119:30 Mpisemw’ inzira yo kuba umwizigirwa: Nashize imanza zawe ziroranye imbere yanje. 
Psalms119:31 Namatanye n’ivyo wihanikirije: Uhoraho, ntuntētereze." 
Psalms119:32 Nzogenda niruka mu nzira y’amabgirizwa yawe Ah’ uzokwagurira umutima wanje. 
Psalms119:33 Uhoraho, ndangira inzira y’ ivyo washinze: Nanje nzoyitondera gushitsa kw iherezo." 
Psalms119:34 Umpe gutahura, nanje nzokwitondera ivyagezwe vyawe, Mbere nzovyitondera n’umutima wose." 
Psalms119:35 Uncishe mu nzira y’amabgirizwa yawe, Kukw ari yo ampimbara." 
Psalms119:36 Uhindurire umutima wanje ku vyo wihanikirije, Ariko si ku nyungu mbi." 
Psalms119:37 Ukebukishe amaso yanje, noye kurāba ibitagira ikimazi; Ungirire muzima mu nzira zawe." 
Psalms119:38 Ushimangirire umusavyi wawe ijambo ryawe Ryasezeraniwe abakwubaha. 
Psalms119:39 Unkūrekw agakēngērwe nama ntinya, Kukw imanza zawe ari nziza." 
Psalms119:40 Nahahamiye amateka washinze: Ungire muzima kubg’ ukugororoka kwaw 
Psalms119:41 Imbabazi zawe ni zinshikeko, Uhoraho we, Ni zo gakiza kawe, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe rivuga." 
Psalms119:42 Ni ho nzobona ico nishura ūntutse, Kuko nizigira ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:43 Kandi ntukūre rwose ijambo ry’ukuri mu kanwa kanje: Kuko namye nizigira imanza zawe. 
Psalms119:44 Na ntaryo nzokwama nitondera ivyagezwe vyawe, Ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms119:45 Kandi nzogendana umwidegemvyo, Kuko nama ndondera amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:46 Nzovugira imbere y’abami ivyo wihanikirije, Simmāramāre." 
Psalms119:47 Kandi nzohimbarwa n’amabgirizwa yawe, Kukw ari yo nkunda." 
Psalms119:48 Nzotarikira amaboko amabgirizwa yawe, kukw ari yo nkunda; Kandi nzokwiyumvira ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:49 Wibuke ijambo wasezeraniye umusavyi wawe, Kuko wanyijigije." 
Psalms119:50 Iki ni co kimmara umubabaro mu marushwa yanje, N’ukw ijambo ryawe ryangize muzima." 
Psalms119:51 Abibone bantwengera cane mw ijigo, Ariko simpuba ngo mve mu vyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:52 Uhoraho, mpora nibuka imanza zawe za kera, Nkiremesha." 
Psalms119:53 Ubushangashirwe buramfashe, Mbutewe n’abanyakibi bareka ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:54 Ivyo washinze vyambereye indirimbo Mu nzu y’uburāro bganje. 
Psalms119:55 Uhoraho, nama nibuka izina ryawe mw ijoro, Nkitondera ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:56 Iki ni co nahawe, N’ukwitondera amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:57 Uhoraho ni we mugabane wanje: Navuze yuko nzokwitondera amajambo yawe. 
Psalms119:58 Ngukomeshereje ibobo umutima wanje wose kugira ng’ untunge: Ungirire ikigongwe, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe rivuga." 
Psalms119:59 Ndiyumvira inzira zanje, Ngahindurira ibirenge vyanje ku vyo wihanikirije," 
Psalms119:60 Nkanyaruka, sintebe Kwitondera amabgirizwa yawe." 
Psalms119:61 Imigozi y’abanyakibi yanyizingiriyeko, Ariko sinibagiye ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:62 Mu gicugu nama mvyuka kugira ngo ngushimire Imanza zawe zigororotse. 
Psalms119:63 Ngendana n’abakwubaha bose, N’abitondera amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:64 Uhoraho, isi yuzuye imbabazi zawe: N’unyigishe ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:65 Uhoraho, wagiriye neza umusavyi wawe, Nk’ukw ijambo ryawe rivuga." 
Psalms119:66 N’unyigishe guhitamwo neza no kumenya ubgenge; Kuko nizeye amabgirizwa yawe. 
Psalms119:67 Ntarababazwa narazimira; Ariko noneho nitondera ijambo ryawe. 
Psalms119:68 Uri mwiza, kand’ ugira neza; Unyigishe ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:69 Abibone bandemeye ikinyoma, Ariko jeho nzokwitondera amateka washinze n’umutima wanje wose." 
Psalms119:70 Imitima yabo iyagayaga nk’ ibinure: Ariko jeho mpimbarwa n’ ivyagezwe vyawe. 
Psalms119:71 Kubabazwa kwangiriye ikimazi, Kugira ngo nige ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:72 Ivyagezwe vyo mu kanwa kawe vyambereye Agasumbajana k’amafeza n’ amazahabu. 
Psalms119:73 Intoke zawe ni zo zandemye, ni zo zambumvye: Umpe ubgenge kugira ngo nige amabgirizwa yawe." 
Psalms119:74 Abakwubaha bazondāba banezerwe; Kuko nizigiye ijambo ryawe. 
Psalms119:75 Uhoraho, ndazi yukw imanza zawe ar’ izigororotse, Kandi yuko kuba umunyakuri ari kwo kwaguteye kumbabaza." 
Psalms119:76 Ndakwinginze, imbabazi zawe zimmare umubabaro, Nk’ukw ijambo ryawe riri wasezeraniye umusavyi wawe." 
Psalms119:77 Kugira neza kwawe kunshikeko, kugira ngo mbeho: Kukw ivyagezwe vyawe ari vyo munezero wanje." 
Psalms119:78 Abībone ni bamāramāre, kuko bandementanirije ibinyoma: Ariko jeho nzokwiyumvira amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:79 Abakwubaha bampindukirire, Kugira ngo bamenye ivyo wihanikirije." 
Psalms119:80 Umutima wanje utungane mu vyo washinze, Noye kuzomāramāra." 
Psalms119:81 Umutima wanje udendebuwe no kwifuza agakiza kawe: Ariko nizigira ijambo ryawe. 
Psalms119:82 Amaso yanje akobowe no kwifuza ijambo ryawe, Nkibaza nti Mbeg’ uzommara umubabaro ryari?" 
Psalms119:83 Kuko mpindutse nk’umukuza w’urusato umanitswe ku mwotsi; Ariko sinibagira ivyo washinze. 
Psalms119:84 Mbeg’ imisi y’ubugingo bg’ umusavyi wawe n’ingahe? Abampama uzobacirakw iteka ryari? 
Psalms119:85 Abībone, badakurikira ivyagezwe vyawe, Banyimbiye ivyobo." 
Psalms119:86 Amabgirizwa yawe yose n’ay’ ukwizigirwa: Bampamisha ibinyoma; n’ untabare. 
Psalms119:87 Bari bashigaje gatoya bakandandura mw isi: Ariko sinareka amateka washinze. 
Psalms119:88 Ungire muzima, nk’ukw imbabazi zawe ziri, Kugira ngo nitondere ivyo akanwa kawe kihanikirije." 
Psalms119:89 Ijambo ryawe ryama rihamye mw ijuru Gushitsa ibihe bidashira, Uhoraho." 
Psalms119:90 Ukwizigirwa kwawe kwamaho gushitsa ibihe vyose; Washinze isi, igumaho." 
Psalms119:91 Imanza zawe ni zo zituma uyu musi vyose biriho: Kuko vyose ar’ abasavyi bawe. 
Psalms119:92 Iyaba ivyagezwe vyawe atari vyo munezero wanje Ico gihe mba nararandukiye mu marushwa yanje. 
Psalms119:93 Sinzokwigera nibagira amateka washinze, Kukw ari yo wangirishije muzima." 
Psalms119:94 Nd’ uwawe, nkiza; Kuko nama ndondera amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:95 Abanyakibi banderekeye kundandura: Ariko jeho nzoshira umutima ku vyo wihanikirije. 
Psalms119:96 Nabonye yuk’ uguhingurwa kwose gufise aho kugarukira; Arikw amabgirizwa yawe arāgutse cane. 
Psalms119:97 Ewe kuntu nkunda ivyagezwe vyawe! Ni vyo ndimbūra bukarinda bgīra. 
Psalms119:98 Amabgirizwa yawe atuma ndusha abansi banje ubgenge; Kuko na ntaryo yamana nanje. 
Psalms119:99 Mfise ubgenge buruta ubg’ abigisha banje bose; Kukw ivyo wihanikirije ari vyo ndimbūra. 
Psalms119:100 Ndusha abatāma ubgenge, Kuko nitondeye amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:101 Nabujije ibirenge vyanje inzira mbi yose, Kugira ngo nitondere ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:102 Sinzotirimuka mu manza zawe ziroranye, Kukw ari wewe wanyigishije." 
Psalms119:103 Ewe kuntu amajambo yawe angēngēra mu māgāge! Arusha ubūki gusōsa mu kanwa kanje. 
Psalms119:104 Amateka washinze ni yo andonkesha ubgenge, Ni co gituma nanka inzira z’ibinyoma zose." 
Psalms119:105 Ijambo ryawe n’itara rimurikira ibirenge vyanje, N’umuco umurikira mu nzira yanje." 
Psalms119:106 Nararahiye ndarengwa Yuko nzokwitondera imanza zawe zigororotse. 
Psalms119:107 Ndababazwa cane: Uhoraho, ungire muzima, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:108 Uhoraho ndakwinginze, wemere amashikanwa y’akanwa kanje azanywe n’ urukundo, Kand’ unyigishe imanza zawe ziroranye." 
Psalms119:109 Ubugingo bganje buri ku maregerege imisi yose, Ariko sinibagira ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:110 Abanyakibi banteze umutego; Ariko sinahushije ngo mve mu mateka washinze. 
Psalms119:111 Ivyo wihanikirije navyākiriye ngo bibe umwandu wanje w’ibihe bidashira, Kukw ari vyo kanyamuneza k’umutima wanje." 
Psalms119:112 Nshize umutima wanje ku gushitsa ivyo washinze Ibihe vyose, gushitsa no kw iherezo." 
Psalms119:113 Nanka ab’ imitima ibiri; Arikw ivyagezwe vyawe ndabikunda. 
Psalms119:114 Ni wewe bgihisho bganje n’inkinzo yanje, Nizigira ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:115 Mva i ruhande, mwa nkozi z’ibibi mwe, Kugira ngo nitondere amabgirizwa y’Imana yanje." 
Psalms119:116 Umbere ubgishimikizo, nk’ ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze, kugira ngo mbeho, Noye kuzotēterezwa n’ivyizigiro vyanje." 
Psalms119:117 Undamire, nzoba ndarusimvye, Nze name ntumbera ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:118 Wakēngereye abahushagirika bose bakava mu vyo washinze: Kuk’ ubugunge bgabo ata co bubamariye. 
Psalms119:119 Ukūrah’ abanyakibi bose bo mw isi nk’inkamba ku cuma: Ni co gituma nkunda ivyo wihanikirije. 
Psalms119:120 Umubiri wanje uhindishwa agashitsi no kugutinya; Kandi ntinya imanza zawe. 
Psalms119:121 Nakoze ibigororotse n’ibiroranye: Ntundekerane abampahaza. 
Psalms119:122 Wishinge k’uzogirira neza umusavyi wawe: Abībone ntibaze bampahaze. 
Psalms119:123 Amaso yanje akobowe no kwifuza agakiza kawe, N’ijambo ryawe rigororotse." 
Psalms119:124 Ugirire umusavyi wawe ibihwanye n’imbabazi zawe, Kand’ unyigishe ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:125 Nd’ umusavyi wawe: umpe ubgenge, Kugira ngo mmenye ivyo wihanikirije." 
Psalms119:126 Harageze k’Uhoraho agira ico akora, Kuko bahinduye ubusa ivyagezwe vyiwe." 
Psalms119:127 Ni co gituma nkunda amabgirizwa yawe, Nkayarutisha izahabu, mbere naho yoba izahabu iramuye." 
Psalms119:128 Ni co gituma niyumvira yukw amateka washinze yose atunganye; Kandi nanka inzira yose y’ibinyoma. 
Psalms119:129 Ivyo wihanikirije n’ibitangaza: Ni co gituma umutima wanje uvyitondera. 
Psalms119:130 Guhishurirwa amajambo yawe kuzana umuco, Guha abatungu ubgenge." 
Psalms119:131 Nāsamitse akanwa, ndahuzagizwa, Kuko nifuza amabgirizwa yawe." 
Psalms119:132 Unkebuke, ungirire ikigongwe, Nk’uk’ umenyereye kukigirira abakunda izina ryawe." 
Psalms119:133 Gumiriza intambuko zanje mw ijambo ryawe; Ntihagire ikigabitanyo na kimwe kinganza. 
Psalms119:134 Uncungure, unkūre mu gahahazo k’abantu, Kugira ngo nitondere amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:135 Umurikishirize umusavyi wawe mu nyonga hawe: Unyigishe ivyo washinze. 
Psalms119:136 Amaso yanje asendanisha inzūzi z’amazi, Kuko batitondera ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:137 Ur’ umugororotsi, Uhoraho we, Imanza zawe ziragororotse." 
Psalms119:138 Ivyo wihanikirije wabigeresheje ukugororoka N’ukwizigirwa kw’ukuri. 
Psalms119:139 Ishaka ryanje rirandanduye Kukw abarwanizi banje bibagiye amajambo yawe. 
Psalms119:140 Ijambo ryawe n’icuma kiramuye; Ni co gituma umusavyi wawe arikunda. 
Psalms119:141 Nd’ uwo hasi, ndagayitse, Ariko sinibagira amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:142 Ukugororoka kwawe n’ukugororoka kw’ibihe bidashira: Ivyagezwe vyawe n’ukuri. 
Psalms119:143 Amarushwa n’intuntu biranshitseko: Yamara, amabgirizwa yawe ni yo munezero wanje." 
Psalms119:144 Ivyo wihanikirije n’ivyo kugororoka ibihe bidashira: Umpe ubgenge mbone kubaho. 
Psalms119:145 Ntakambishije umutima wose; unyishure Uhoraho we: Nzokwitondera ivyo washinze. 
Psalms119:146 Ndagutakambiye, nkiza, Kugira ngo nitondere ivyo wihanikirije." 
Psalms119:147 Umutwenzi utaratambika naratakamvye: Amajambo yawe ni yo nizigiye. 
Psalms119:148 Abateramyi batarakūranwa mu bishingo vyabo mba ndi maso, Kugira ngo ndimbūre ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:149 Ni wumve ijwi ryanje, ukw imbabazi zawe zingana: Ungire muzima, Uhoraho we, nk’ukw imanza zawe zashinze." 
Psalms119:150 Abōmekanye n’ukugabitanya barēgereje, Ariko bari kure y’ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:151 Wewe Uhoraho, uri hafi: Amabgirizwa yawe yose n’ ay’ ukuri." 
Psalms119:152 Uhereye kera namenyeshejwe n’ivyo wihanikirije Yuko washizeh’ itanguriro ryavyo kugeza ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms119:153 Shira umutima ku marushwa yanje, undokore; Kuko ntibagira ivyagezwe vyawe." 
Psalms119:154 Umbūranire, uncungure: Ungire muzima, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:155 Agakiza kari kure y’abanyakibi, Kuko batarondera ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:156 Uhoraho, imbabazi zawe zirakomeye, Ungire muzima, nk’ukw imanza zawe zashinze." 
Psalms119:157 Abampīga n’abandwanya ni benshi, Ariko simpuba ngo mve mu vyo wihanikirije." 
Psalms119:158 Nabonye abava mw isezerano, ndashavura: Kuko batitondera ijambo ryawe." 
Psalms119:159 Rāba ingene nkunda amateka washinze: Uhoraho, ungire muzima, nk’ukw imbabazi zawe ziri." 
Psalms119:160 Ijambo ryawe ryose ripoperanirijwe mu kuri; Imanza zawe zigororotse iyo ziva zikagera zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms119:161 Abahambaye bampamiye ubusa; Arik’ umutima wanje wubaha amajambo yawe. 
Psalms119:162 Nnezererwa ijambo ryawe Nk’ūronse inyagano nyinshi. 
Psalms119:163 Nanka ibinyoma, mvyanka urunuka: Arikw ivyagezwe vyawe ndabikunda." 
Psalms119:164 Uko bukeye ngushima ibihetangabo ndwi, Ngushimira imanza zawe zigororotse." 
Psalms119:165 Abakunda ivyagezwe vyawe bagira amahoro menshi; Nta kibatsitaza bafise. 
Psalms119:166 Uhoraho, ndishimiye agakiza kawe, Kandi nkora ivyo amabgirizwa yawe avuga." 
Psalms119:167 Umutima wanje witondeye ivyo wihanikirije, Kandi ndabikunda bihebuje." 
Psalms119:168 Nitondeye amateka washinze n’ivyo wihanikirije: Kukw inzira zanje zose zir’ imbere yawe. 
Psalms119:169 Uhoraho, ugutakamba kwanje ni kwīgire hafi imbere yawe; Umpe ubgenge, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:170 Ukwinginga kwanje ni gushike imbere yawe; Undokore, nk’ukw ijambo ryawe ryavuze." 
Psalms119:171 Iminwa yanje ivuge ishimwe, Kuk’ unyigisha ivyo washinze." 
Psalms119:172 Ururimi rwanje ni ruririmbe ijambo ryawe, Kukw amabgirizwa yawe yose ar’ ay’ ukugororoka." 
Psalms119:173 Ukuboko kwawe kwame kugabirije kuntabara, Kuko natoranije amateka washinze." 
Psalms119:174 Uhoraho, nifuje agakiza kawe, Kand’ ivyagezwe vyawe ni vyo bimpimbara." 
Psalms119:175 Ubugingo bganje ni bubeho, kugira ngo bugushime: Imanza zawe zintabare." 
Psalms119:176 Narahuvye nk’intama izimiye: rondera umusavyi wawe, Kuko ntibagira amabgirizwa yawe." 
Psalms120:1 Mu magorwa yanje natakambiye Uhoraho, Aranyishura." 
Psalms120:2 Uhoraho, kiza ubugingo bganje iminwa ibesha N’ururimi rw’ingunge." 
Psalms120:3 Wa rurimi rw’ingunge we, Azoguha iki, azoguhetera iki?" 
Psalms120:4 N’imyampi isongoye y’abahizi, N’amakara y’igiti c’umurotemu." 
Psalms120:5 Ewe jewe ndagowe, kuko mba i Mesheki nd’ inyambukīra, Nkaba mu mahema y’i Kedari!" 
Psalms120:6 Umutima wanje wahereye kera ubana N’uwanka amahoro. 
Psalms120:7 Jeho ngomba amahoro: Arikw iyo ngize ico mvuga, bo bagomba intambara." 
Psalms121:1 Ndunamurira amaso yanje ku misozi: Ugutabarwa kwanje kuzova hehe? 
Psalms121:2 Ugutabarwa kwanje kuva k’ Uhoraho Yaremye ijuru n’isi. 
Psalms121:3 Ntazokundira ibirenge vyawe ko bitirimuka, Ūkuzigama ntazohunyiza." 
Psalms121:4 Mbere, ūzigama Abisirayeli Ntazohunyiza kandi ntazosinzira." 
Psalms121:5 Uhoraho ni we muzigamyi wawe, Uhoraho ni we gitūtu cawe i buryo bgawe." 
Psalms121:6 Izuba ntirizokwica ku murango, Cank’ ukwezi mw ijoro." 
Psalms121:7 Uhoraho azokurinda ikibi cose; Ni we azozigama ubugingo bgawe. 
Psalms121:8 Uhoraho azokuzigama mu maja no mu maza, Uhereye none, ugashitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms122:1 Naranezerewe hamwe bambgira, Bati Tugende tuje ku ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Psalms122:2 Ibirenge vyacu bihagaze Mu birimba vyawe, ewe Yerusalemu." 
Psalms122:3 Yerusalemu, wubatswe Nk’igisagara c’icomeke:" 
Psalms122:4 Ah’ imiryango ikūkira, ni yo miryango y’Uhoraho, Ngo bibe igishingantahe ku Bisirayeli, Kandi bashime izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms122:5 Kukw ari ho batereka intebe z’imanza, Intebe z’ab’ inzu ya Dawidi." 
Psalms122:6 Ni musabire Yerusalemu amahoro; Abagukunda batōtahare. 
Psalms122:7 Amahoro abe imbere mu nzitiro zawe, Itōto ribe mu ngoro zawe." 
Psalms122:8 Kubga bene Data na bagenzi banje Ndavuga, nt’ Amahoro abe muri wewe." 
Psalms122:9 Kubg’ ingoro y’Uhoraho Imana yacu Nzokwendeza ivyiza. 
Psalms123:1 Kuri wewe ni ho nunamurira amaso, Wewe uvyagiye mw ijuru." 
Psalms123:2 Nk’ukw amaso y’abashumba bayahanga ukuboko kwa shebuja, Kandi nk’ukw amaso y’incoreke iyahanga ukuboko kwa inabuja, Ni kw amaso yacu tuyahanga Uhoraho, Imana yacu, Gushitsa ah’ azotugirira ikigongwe." 
Psalms123:3 Utugirire ikigongwe, Uhoraho we, utugirire ikigongwe, Kuko tuduhiwe cane n’agakēngērwe;" 
Psalms123:4 Imitima yacu iduhiwe cane N’agacokoro k’abidibamiye, N’agakēngērwe k’abībone." 
Psalms124:1 Iyaba Uhoraho atari we yari mu ruhande rwacu, N’abe ari kw Abisirayeli bavuga none;" 
Psalms124:2 Iyaba Uhoraho atari we yari mu ruhande rwacu, Hamwe abantu bādukūrira hasi," 
Psalms124:3 Baba baratuyongobeje tukibona, Hamwe uburake bgabo bgārurumba kuri twebge." 
Psalms124:4 Amazi aba yaraturengeye rwose, Isūri iba yararenze ku bugingo bgacu," 
Psalms124:5 Amazi asūriranya aba yararenze ku bugingo bgacu. 
Psalms124:6 Uhoraho ashemagizwe, Atādutanze ngo tube inyama z’amenyo yabo." 
Psalms124:7 Ubugingo bgacu bukize nk’ ukw inyoni iva mu mutego w’abatezi, Umutego uracitse, natwe tuvamwo turarokoka." 
Psalms124:8 Ugutabarwa kwacu kubonerwa mw izina ry’Uhoraho Yaremye ijuru n’isi. 
Psalms125:1 Abizigiye Uhoraho bameze nk’umusozi Siyoni Udashobora kunyiganyizwa, ariko wama ushimangiye gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms125:2 Nk’ukw imisozi ikikije Yerusalemu Ni k’Uhoraho akikije abantu biwe, Uhereye none, ugashitsa ibihe vyose." 
Psalms125:3 Kukw icumu ry’ubugabe ry’ abanyakibi ritazokwama rishinze mu mugabane w’ abagororotsi; Abagororotsi boye kurāmvurira amaboko ibigabitanyo. 
Psalms125:4 Uhoraho, girira neza abanyenda nziza, Bo n’abatunganye mu mitima." 
Psalms125:5 Arikw abizimagiriza mu nzira zabo zigoramye, Uhoraho azobashorerana n’ inkozi z’ibibi. Amahoro abe mu Bisirayeli." 
Psalms126:1 Hamwe Uhoraho yagarukana ab’i Siyoni bāri bārambukanywe ar’ inyagano Twāri tumeze nk’abarota. 
Psalms126:2 Ico gihe akanwa kacu kāri kuzuye ibitwengatwenga, N’indimi zacu zāri zuzuyemw’ indirimbo: Ico gihe mu mahanga bāvuga, Bat’ Uhoraho yabakoreye ibikomeye." 
Psalms126:3 Ni koko, Uhoraho yadukoreye ibikomeye, Natwe turanezerewe." 
Psalms126:4 Uhoraho, abambukanywe ar’ inyagano utugarukane, Tumere nk’imigezi y’i Negebu." 
Psalms126:5 Ababiba barira bazokwimbura banezerewe. 
Psalms126:6 Nah’ umuntu agenda arira, asohoye imbuto, Azogarukana akanyamuneza, azanye imbambo ziwe z’ ivyimburwa." 
Psalms127:1 Uhoraho iy’ atari we yubaka inzu Abayubaka baba baruhira ubusa. Uhoraho iy’ atari we azigama igisagara Umuteramyi abera maso ubusa. 
Psalms127:2 Bibaruhiriza ubusa kuzinduka kare, mugateba cane kuruhuka, Mukarya umutsima w’ubutame: Uwo akunda abimuhēra mw itiro." 
Psalms127:3 Abana ni bo ngabire Uhoraho agaba, Imbuto zo mu nda ni zo mpēra atanga." 
Psalms127:4 Nk’ukw imyampi yo mu ntoke z’umuhizi iri, Ni kw abana bo mu busore bamera." 
Psalms127:5 Hahirwa ūfise umutana buzuyemwo: Abameze bartyo ntibazotētērwa Ni bagira ico bavuganira n’abansi babo mu marembo. 
Psalms128:1 Hahirwa uwubaha Uhoraho wese, Akagendera mu nzira ziwe." 
Psalms128:2 Ibikorwa vy’amaboko yawe bizogutunga, Uzonezerwa, uzohirwa." 
Psalms128:3 Umugore wawe azoba nk’ umuzabibu wama cane, ari haruguru mu nzu yawe; Abana bawe bazoba nk’utugemwe twa elayo, bakikije ameza yawe." 
Psalms128:4 Uko ni k’umuntu yubaha Uhoraho azohirwa. 
Psalms128:5 Uhoraho azoguha umugisha uva i Siyoni, Nawe uzobona ivyiza biza kuri Yerusalemu, imisi yose uzobaho;" 
Psalms128:6 Mbere, uzobona abuzukuru bawe. Amahoro abe mu Bisirayeli." 
Psalms129:1 Bāmbabaje kenshi, uhereye mu buto bganje, Abe ari kw Abisirayeli bavuga none:" 
Psalms129:2 Bāmbabaje kenshi, uhereye mu buto bganje, Ariko ntibānnesheje." 
Psalms129:3 Abarimyi bārimye ku mugongo wanje: Bāhaciye imikuku miremire. 
Psalms129:4 Uhoraho n’umugororotsi; Yaciye ingoyi abanyakibi bānshizemwo. 
Psalms129:5 Abanka Siyoni bose Ni bamāramāre, basubizwe inyuma." 
Psalms129:6 Babe nk’ivyimejeje ku mazu, Vyuma bitarakura:" 
Psalms129:7 Ivy’ umwimbuzi atazokwuzuza n’ikiganza ciwe, Cank’ ūtekera imbambo atazokwuzuza ico yateze." 
Psalms129:8 Abahita ntibaze bababgire, Ng’ Umugisha w’Uhoraho n’ube kuri mwebge; Canke ngo Tubahezagiye mw izina ry’Uhoraho." 
Psalms130:1 Uhoraho, ndagutakambiye nd’ i bgina:" 
Psalms130:2 Bgirukiro, ni wumve ijwi ryanje; Amatwi yawe uyabangire kwumva Ijwi ryo kwinginga kwanje." 
Psalms130:3 Uhoraho, wokwama wibuka ibigabitanyo, Bgirukiro, ni nde yohava akazohagarara adatsinzwe?" 
Psalms130:4 Ariko guharirwa kubonerwa kuri wewe Kugira ngo wubahwe. 
Psalms130:5 Nditeze Uhoraho, umutima wanje uramwiteze, Kand’ ijambo ryiwe ni ryo nizigiye." 
Psalms130:6 Umutima wanje uriteze Umwami Imana, Urusha ukw abateramyi basūra ko buca: Eka urusha ukw abateramyi basūra ko buca." 
Psalms130:7 Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni mwizigire Uhoraho, Kukw imbabazi zibonerwa k’Uhoraho, Kandi kuri we ni ho habonerwa gucungurwa kwinshi." 
Psalms130:8 Kandi ni we azocungura Abisirayeli, Abakūrekw ivyo bagabitanije vyose." 
Psalms131:1 Uhoraho, umutima wanje ntiwibona, kand’ amaso yanje ntiyishira hejuru; Kandi sinishira mu vyo ntagezwemwo, Canke mu bitangaza bindengeye." 
Psalms131:2 N’ukuri umutima wanje ndawuhwekereje, ndawuhojeje; Nk’uk’ umwana w’umucuko yigwandika kuri nyina, Umutima wanje wigwandika kuri jewe nk’umwana w’ umucuko." 
Psalms131:3 Wa bgoko bg’Abisirayeli, ni wizigire Uhoraho, Uhereye none ugashitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms132:1 Uhoraho, ni wibukire Dawidi amarushwa yiwe yose;" 
Psalms132:2 Ingene yarahiye Uhoraho indahiro, Yasezeraniye Inyenkomezi ya Yakobo," 
Psalms132:3 Ati N’ukuri nkazokwinjira mw ihema ari yo nzu yanje, Nkazokwurira ku buriri bganje," 
Psalms132:4 Nkazokundira amaso yanje gusinzira, Cank’ ibigohe vyanje guhunira," 
Psalms132:5 Ntararonkera Uhoraho ikibanza, Ntararonkera Inyenkomezi ya Yakobo aho kuba." 
Psalms132:6 Twavyumviye muri Efurata, Twabibonye mu gahinga k’i Yayari." 
Psalms132:7 Ni twinjire mw ihema ryayo, Dusengere imbere y’indava y’ibirenge vyayo." 
Psalms132:8 Uhoraho, n’uhaguruke, winjire mu buruhukiro bgawe; Wewe ubgawe n’isandugu y’ inkomezi zawe." 
Psalms132:9 Abaherezi bawe bambare ukugororoka; N’abakunzi bawe bavuze impundu. 
Psalms132:10 Kubga Dawidi umusavyi wawe Ntukimiranye uwo warobanuje amavuta. 
Psalms132:11 Uhoraho yarahiye Dawidi indahiro y’ukuri, Ntazokwirahuruza: Ati Nzoshira ku ngoma yawe uwamutse mu bura bgawe." 
Psalms132:12 Abana bawe ni bitondera isezerano ryanje, N’ivyo nzokwihanikiriza nkabigisha, N’abana babo bazokwama bari ku ngoma yawe ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms132:13 Kuk’ Uhoraho yatoranije Siyoni, Yahagomwe ngw ahabe." 
Psalms132:14 At’ Aha ni ho buruhukiro bganje ibihe bidashira: Aha ni ho nzoba; kuko nahagomwe. 
Psalms132:15 Ivyo kurya vyaho nzobihezagira cane, Nzohāza aboro baho umutsima." 
Psalms132:16 Kand’ abaherezi baho nzobambika agakiza: Abakunzi banje baho bazosēsereza impundu. 
Psalms132:17 Ni ho nzotuma ihembe rya Dawidi rimera, Uwo narobanuje amavuta nkamutegurira itara." 
Psalms132:18 Abansi biwe nzobakorera ibara; Ariko we, igitsibo ciwe kizomukayanganako." 
Psalms133:1 Ewe kuntu ari vyiza kand’ ar’ ivy’ igikundiro Kw abavukana babana nyakubana! 
Psalms133:2 Bimeze nk’amavuta ya elayo y’igiciro kinini yasutswe ku mutwe, Agashororokera mu bganwa, Mu bganwa bga Aroni, Agashororokera ku misozo y’impuzu ziwe." 
Psalms133:3 Kandi bimeze nk’ikime co kuri Herumoni, Gitonda ku misozi y’i Siyoni: Kukw ah’ ari ho Uhoraho yagereye umugisha, Ni wo bugingo bg’ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms134:1 Ni mushemagize Uhoraho, yemwe basavyi b’ Uhoraho mwese, Bakesha ijoro bahagaze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Psalms134:2 Mutarike amaboko yanyu, muyatumbereje ahēra, Mushemagize Uhoraho." 
Psalms134:3 Uhoraho aguhe umugisha uva i Siyoni; Ni we yaremye ijuru n’isi. 
Psalms135:1 Haleluya! Ni mushime izina ry’ Uhoraho; Ni mumushime, yemwe basavyi b’Uhoraho," 
Psalms135:2 Mwebge abahagarara mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, Mu nyubakwa z’ingoro y’ Imana yacu." 
Psalms135:3 Mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza; Muririmbire izina ryiwe ishimwe, kukw ar’ iry’ igikundiro." 
Psalms135:4 Kuk’ Uhoraho yitoranirije Yakobo, Isirayeli yamutoranirije kuba uwiwe bgite." 
Psalms135:5 Kuko nzi yuk’ Uhoraho ahambaye, Kandi yuk’ Umwami wacu asumba ibigirwamana vyose." 
Psalms135:6 Igihimbaye Uhoraho cose ni co akora, Mw ijuru no mw isi, mu kiyaga n’i bgina hose." 
Psalms135:7 Arandisha ibipfungu bikava ku mpera y’isi; Imvura ayiremera imiravyo; Asokorora umuyaga mu bushinguro bgiwe. 
Psalms135:8 Ni we yakubise abana b’ imfura bo muri Egiputa, arabica, Imfura z’abantu bo n’uburiza bg’ibitungano." 
Psalms135:9 Yarungitse ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza hagati yawe, Egiputa, Kuri Farawo no ku basavyi biwe bose." 
Psalms135:10 Ni we yariritse amahanga menshi, Yica abami bahambaye:" 
Psalms135:11 Sihoni, umwami w’Abamori, Na Ogi, umwami w’i Bashani, N’abami b’ibihugu vy’i Kanani bose;" 
Psalms135:12 Agaba ibihugu vyabo ngo bibe umwandu, Umwandu w’Abisirayeli abantu biwe." 
Psalms135:13 Izina ryawe, Uhoraho, ryamah’ ibihe bidashira, Ewe Uhoraho, icibutso cawe kizohorah’ ibihe vyose." 
Psalms135:14 Kuk’ Uhoraho azocira urubanza abantu biwe, Kand’ azokwirimbūra ku vyo agirira abasavyi biwe." 
Psalms135:15 Ibigirwamana vy’abanyamahanga n’ifeza n’izahabu, N’ibikorwa n’amaboko y’abantu." 
Psalms135:16 Bifise akanwa, ntibivuga, Bifise amaso, ntibibona," 
Psalms135:17 Bifise amatwi, ntivyumva, Kandi nta mpwemu ziri mu kanwa kavyo." 
Psalms135:18 Ababikora bazohwana na vyo, Mbere n’ūvyizigira wese." 
Psalms135:19 Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, mushemagize Uhoraho: Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Aroni, mushemagize Uhoraho:" 
Psalms135:20 Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Lewi, mushemagize Uhoraho: Yemwe abubaha Uhoraho, mumushemagize!" 
Psalms135:21 Bashemagirize Uhoraho i Siyoni, Ni we aba i Yerusalemu. Haleluya!" 
Psalms136:1 Ni mushimire Uhoraho yukw ari mwiza: Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms136:2 Ni mushime Imana isumba ivyitwa imana, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:3 Ni mushime Umwami w’ abami, Kukw imbabazi ziwe zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:4 Ni mushime īkora ibitangaza bikomeye yonyene, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:5 Ni mushime iyaremesheje ijuru ubgenge, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:6 Ni mushime iyagaranzuye isi hejuru y’amazi, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:7 Ni mushime iyaremye ibibonesha bikuru, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:8 Yaremye izuba ngo riganze umurango, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:9 Yaremye ukwezi n’inyenyeri ngo biganze ijoro, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:10 Ni mushime iyaririkiye Abanyegiputa abana babo b’ imfura, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:11 Igakūra Abisirayeli hagati yabo, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:12 Ibakūjey’ ikiganza gikomeye n’ukuboko kurāmvuye: Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Psalms136:13 Ni mushime iyatandukanije Ikiyaga Gitukura, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:14 Igacisha Abisirayeli hagati yaco, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:15 Arikw igakunkumurira Farawo n’ingabo ziwe mu Kiyaga Gitukura, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:16 Ni mushime iyarōngōye abantu bayo mu bugaragwa, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:17 Ni mushime iyariritse abami bahambaye, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:18 Ikica abami bābaye ba rurangiranwa, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:19 Yica Sihoni, umwami w’ Abamori, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:20 Yica na Ogi, umwami w’i Bashani, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:21 Igaba ibihugu vyabo ngo bibe umwandu, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:22 Mbere ngo bibe umwandu w’Abisirayeli, abasavyi bayo, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:23 Yaratwibutse aho twāri mu bufafara, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira;" 
Psalms136:24 Idukiza abarwanizi bacu, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:25 Igaburira ibifise imibiri vyose, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms136:26 Ni mushime Imana yo mw ijuru, Kukw imbabazi zayo zamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms137:1 Ku nzūzi z’i Babuloni Ni ho twāhora twicara, mbere tugaturika tukarira, Twibutse i Siyoni." 
Psalms137:2 Ku biti vyaho Ni ho twari tumanitse inanga zacu. 
Psalms137:3 Kukw abātwambukanye tur’ inyagano bātugomberakw indirimbo aho hantu, Abātugaraguza agati bātugombakw akanyamuneza, Bati Ni muturirimbire ku ndirimbo z’i Siyoni." 
Psalms137:4 Mbega tworirimba dute indirimbo y’Uhoraho Turi mu mahanga? 
Psalms137:5 Yerusalemu we, ni nakwibagira, N’ukuboko kwanje kw’i buryo ni kwibagire gukora." 
Psalms137:6 N’ururimi rwanje rumatane no mu māgāge Ni ntakwibuka, Ni ntakunda Yerusalemu Ngo ndaharutishe ibinnezereza vy’agahebuza." 
Psalms137:7 Uhoraho, ibuka Abanyedomu Ivyo bagize wa musi w’i Yerusalemu; Ni bo bavuze, bati Ni muhasangangure, ni muhasangangure, Mushitse no kw itanguriro ryaho." 
Psalms137:8 Ewe wa mukobga Babuloni, wa muranduzi we, Hazohirwa ūzogusubiriza mu nkōko Ibihwanye n’ivyo watugiriye!" 
Psalms137:9 Hazohirwa ūzofata abana bawe bato Akabahonda ku rutare! 
Psalms138:1 Ndagushimisha umutima wose; Ndakuririmbira ishimwe imbere y’ivyitwa imana. 
Psalms138:2 Ndasenga ntumbereye urusengero rwawe rwera, Nshimira izina ryawe imbabazi zawe n’ukuri kwawe: Kuko washize hejuru ijambo ryawe n’izina ryawe Kubirutisha ibindi vyose." 
Psalms138:3 Umusi nagutakambiyeko waranyishuye, Undemeshesha gusubiza intege mu mutima wanje." 
Psalms138:4 Uhoraho, abami bo mw isi bose bazogushima, Kuko bumvise amajambo yo mu kanwa kawe." 
Psalms138:5 Mbere bazoririmba inzira z’ Uhoraho, Kukw icubahiro c’Uhoraho ar’ agahambaye." 
Psalms138:6 Kuko nah’ Uhoraho ahambaye, ashira umutima ku bafafara, Arikw abībone abamenyera kure." 
Psalms138:7 Naho ngendera hagati y’ amarushwa, uzonzigama; Uzorāmvurira ukuboko kwawe kurwanya uburake bg’ abansi banje, Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kuzonkiza." 
Psalms138:8 Ivyanje, Uhoraho ni we azobishitsa: Uhoraho we, imbabazi zawe zamah’ ibihe bidashira; Ntuhebe ibikorwa vy’amaboko yawe." 
Psalms139:1 Uhoraho waransuzumye, urammenya," 
Psalms139:2 Urazi iyicara ryanje n’īva hasi ryanje, Umenyera kure ivyo niyumvira." 
Psalms139:3 Usorongora inzira zanje n’ iryama ryanje, Urazi iminyuro yanje yose." 
Psalms139:4 Kukw ata jambo riza mu rurimi rwanje Wewe Uhoraho utararimenya rwose. 
Psalms139:5 Unkikije inyuma n’imbere, Unshizek’ ukuboko kwawe." 
Psalms139:6 Kumenya ben’ ukwo n’igitangaza ntobasha; Kuransiga, simbasha kugushikīra." 
Psalms139:7 Mbega Mpwemu wawe nomuhungira hehe? Canke nohungira hehe mu nyonga hawe? 
Psalms139:8 Nodūga nkaja mw ijuru, uriyo: Nokwisasira i kuzimu, eh’ uriyo." 
Psalms139:9 Nokwābīra amababa y’umutwenzi, Nkagerēra ku mpera y’ikiyaga;" 
Psalms139:10 Aho na ho ukuboko kwawe kwohandōngōrera, Ukuboko kwawe kw’i buryo kwohamfatira." 
Psalms139:11 Nokwibgira, nti N’ukuri umwiza ugira unyubikizeko, N’umuco unkikije uhinduke ijoro;" 
Psalms139:12 N’umwiza na wo ntugira ico woguhisha, Ariko mw ijoro habona nko ku murango; Umwiza n’umuco kuri wewe ni bimwe." 
Psalms139:13 Kukw ari wewe waremye amafyigo yanje; Wanteranirije mu nda ya mama. 
Psalms139:14 Ndagushimira yuko naremwe uburyo buteye ubgoba butangaje: Ibikorwa vyawe n’ibitangaza; Kand’ ivyo, umutima wanje urabizi neza." 
Psalms139:15 Urukanka rw’umubiri wanje ntiwaruhishwa Hamwe naremerwa mu mpisho, Hamwe naremesherezwa ubgenge i bgina mw isi." 
Psalms139:16 Nkir’ urusoro, inyonga zawe zarambona, Mu gitabo cawe handitswemw’ imisi yanje yose, Yashinzwe hatarabaho n’ umwe." 
Psalms139:17 Erega Mana, ivyiyumviro vyawe n’ivy’ igiciro kuri jewe! Ereg’ igitigiri cavyo ni kinini!" 
Psalms139:18 Nobiharūra, vyoruta umusenyi mu bginshi: Nikangura nkiri kumwe nawe." 
Psalms139:19 Mana, icompa ukica abanyakibi: Mva i ruhande, mwa bagwisha inkumbi mwe." 
Psalms139:20 Bakuvugana icīra bacumura, Abansi bawe bavugira ubusa izina ryawe." 
Psalms139:21 Uhoraho, mbega sinanka abakwanka? Kandi sinshavuzwa n’abagukūriye hasi?" 
Psalms139:22 Mbanka urwanko rwuzuye: Kuri jewe n’abansi. 
Psalms139:23 Mana, nsuzuma, umenye umutima wanje, N’uncace, umenye ivyiyumviro vyanje," 
Psalms139:24 Urābe yuko harih’ inzira y’ibibi yoba iri muri jewe, Undōngōrere mu nzira y’ ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms140:1 Uhoraho, nkiza abanyakibi: Undinde abantu b’ibirara." 
Psalms140:2 Biyumvira ivy’ inzigo mu mitima yabo, Na ntaryo bandurutsa intambara." 
Psalms140:3 Basongoye indimi zabo nk’ inzoka; Ubumara bg’imvuvyi buri mu binyigishi vyabo. 
Psalms140:4 Uhoraho, nkiza amaboko y’ abanyakibi, Undinde abantu b’ibirara: Bagabiye kuraririza ibirenge vyanje." 
Psalms140:5 Abībone banteze umutego n’ igitsiburira; Banteze ururiba i ruhande y’inzira; Banteze ibigāmo. 
Psalms140:6 Nabgiye Uhoraho, nti Ni wewe Mana yanje: Tega ugutwi ijwi ry’ukwinginga kwanje, Uhoraho we." 
Psalms140:7 Uhoraho, Bgirukiro we, nkomezi z’agakiza kanje, Ni wewe ukīngira umutwe wanje ku musi w’intambara." 
Psalms140:8 Uhoraho we, ntiwemerere umunyakibi ivyo yifuza; Ntiwūngānire imigabo yiwe mibi, ngo boye kwishira hejuru." 
Psalms140:9 Ukugira nabi kwo mu kanwa kw’abantaye hagati Ni kubasubire ku mitwe, kubatwikire." 
Psalms140:10 Amakara yaka abagweko, Batābge mu muriro; Bakororerwe mu vyobo birebire, ngo boye gusubira kuvyuka ukundi." 
Psalms140:11 Sakirimikibi ntazokomezwa mu gihugu: Ibibi bizohama umuntu w’ ikirara kugira ngo bimuhenebereze. 
Psalms140:12 Ndazi yuk’ Uhoraho azohagarikira impahazwa mu mibūrano, N’umukene azomuhagarikira mu manza." 
Psalms140:13 N’ukuri abagororotsi bazoshima izina ryawe: Abatunganye bazoba imbere y’inyonga zawe. 
Psalms141:1 Uhoraho, ndagutakambiye: tebuka, uze aho ndi: Utege ugutwi ijwi ryanje, ni nagutakambira." 
Psalms141:2 Ugusenga kwanje gushirwe imbere yawe nk’imibavu, N’amaboko yanje kuyatarika kube nk’ikimazi co ku mugoroba." 
Psalms141:3 Uhoraho, shira umurinzi imbere y’akanwa kanje: Rinda umuryango w’iminwa yanje." 
Psalms141:4 Ntuhindurire umutima wanje ku kibi na kimwe, Ngo mfatanye ibikorwa vyo kugabitanya N’inkozi z’ibibi: Noye gusangira na zo ibigemanije vyazo." 
Psalms141:5 Umugororotsi ankubise, bizoba ar’ ukungirira neza; Ampannye, bizoba ari nko kunsīga amavuta ya elayo mu mutwe: Umutwe wanje woye kuvyanka. Ariko gusenga kwanje gukomeza kurwanya ivyaha vya ba bandi." 
Psalms141:6 Abacamanza babo bazotembagarizwa mu manga, Ni ho abantu bazokwumviriza amajambo yanje, kukw aryoshe." 
Psalms141:7 Nk’uk’ umuntu arima, agaca isemo, Ni kw amagufa yacu asābagiye ku munwa w’i kuzimu." 
Psalms141:8 Uhoraho Bgirukiro, ni wewe mpanze amaso, Ni wewe nizigiye: ntunte ngo mbe ruhebga." 
Psalms141:9 Undinde umutego banteze, N’ibigāmo vy’inkozi z’ibibi." 
Psalms141:10 Abanyakibi abe ari bo bagwa mu rwabo ruriba, Ariko jeho mbisimbe." 
Psalms142:1 Ndatakambishiriza Uhoraho ijwi ryanje: Ijwi ryanje ndaryingingisha Uhoraho.
