Psalms142:2 Ndajojera amaganya yanje imbere yiwe: Amagorwa yanje ndayaserura imbere yiwe. 
Psalms142:3 Iy’ umutima wanje undendebukiyemwo ni wewe umenya iminyuro yanje. Mu nzira ncamwo bantezemw’ umutego. 
Psalms142:4 Itegereze i buryo bganje, urābe ko har’ umuntu ampa ni rwere: Mbuze ubuhungiro; nta muntu ababaye ubugingo bganje." 
Psalms142:5 Ndagutakambira, Uhoraho we, Nkakubgira, nti Ni wewe buhungiro bganje, N’umugabane wanje mw isi y’abakiriho." 
Psalms142:6 Banga ugutwi ugutakamba kwanje, kuko ncishijwe bugufi cane: Unkize abampama, kuko bandusha inkomezi." 
Psalms142:7 Kūra umutima wanje mw ibohero, kugira ngo nshime izina ryawe; Abagororotsi bazonkikiza, Kuk’ uzoba ungiriye neza." 
Psalms143:1 Uhoraho we, ni wumve ugusenga kwanje; tega ugutwi ukwinginga kwanje! Unyishure, kubgo kuba umwizigirwa kwawe, no kubgo kugororoka kwawe." 
Psalms143:2 Kandi ntushire umusavyi wawe mu rukinja, Kukw ata wo mu bariho azotsindira mu nyonga zawe." 
Psalms143:3 Kuk’ umwansi yahize umutima wanje; Akantsinda hasi akansiribanga; Yatumye ngerēra ahantu h’ umwiza nk’abāpfuye kera. 
Psalms143:4 Ni co gitumye umushaha wanje undendebukiramwo, Umutima wanje ukūmirirwa muri jewe." 
Psalms143:5 Nibutse imisi ya kera; Ndimbūra ivyo wakoze vyose: Ngereranya igikorwa c’amaboko yawe. 
Psalms143:6 Nkwayira amaboko; Umushaha wanje ukugirira inyota nk’iy’ igihugu cūmāniwe. 
Psalms143:7 Uhoraho, n’utebuke unyishure; umutima wanje urashiringitira; Ntumpishe mu nyonga hawe; Simmere nk’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Psalms143:8 Mu gitondo unyumvishe imbabazi zawe, Kukw ari wewe nizigira: Ummenyeshe inzira nkwiye gucamwo, Kukw ari wewe ncurūrira umutima." 
Psalms143:9 Uhoraho, nkiza abansi banje: Ni wewe mpungiyeko ng’ umpishe." 
Psalms143:10 Unyigishe gukora ivyo ugomba, kukw ari wewe Mana yanje: Mpwemu wawe mwiza andōngōre mu nzira irashe." 
Psalms143:11 Uhoraho, ungire muzima, kubg’ izina ryawe: Ukūre umutima wanje mu vyago kubg’ ukugororoka kwawe." 
Psalms143:12 Kand’ urandure abansi banje kubg’ imbabazi zawe. Uhonnye abababaza umushaha wanje bose; Kuko nd’ umusavyi wawe. 
Psalms144:1 Uhoraho, igitandara canje, n’ashemagizwe, Yigisha amaboko yanje kurasana, N’intoke zanje kurwana:" 
Psalms144:2 Ni we ndonkeramw’ imbabazi, kandi ni we gihome kinkīngira, Ni we munara wanje muremure, n’umurokozi wanje; Ni we nkinzo yanje n’uwo nizigira; Ni we angandurira abantu banje ngo ndabaganze." 
Psalms144:3 Uhoraho, umuntu n’iki ah’ umumenya? Cank’ umwana w’umuntu ah’ umwiyumvira?" 
Psalms144:4 Umuntu ameze nk’impwemu zihumetswe gusa: Imisi yiwe imeze nk’igitūtu gishira. 
Psalms144:5 Andāza ijuru ryawe, Uhoraho we, nawe wimanukire: Ukore ku misozi, ifumbe umwotsi." 
Psalms144:6 Uravye imiravyo, ubashwiragize; Urase imyampi yawe, ubace ivutu." 
Psalms144:7 Rāmvura ukuboko kwawe uri hejuru, Undohōre, undokore mu mazi menshi, Unkize ukuboko kw’abanyamahanga." 
Psalms144:8 Akanwa kabo kavuga ivyo kubesha, N’ukuboko kwabo kw’i buryo n’ukunyabinyoma." 
Psalms144:9 Mana, ndakuririmbira indirimbo nsha: Ndakuririmbira ishimwe ku nanga y’imirya cumi." 
Psalms144:10 Ni wewe uha abami agakiza: Kiza Dawidi umusavyi wawe inkota yica. 
Psalms144:11 Ndokora, unkūre mu maboko y’abanyamahanga, Akanwa kabo kavuga ivyo kubesha, N’ukuboko kwabo kw’i buryo n’ukunyabinyoma." 
Psalms144:12 Abahungu bacu ni babe nk’ibiti vy’ibitontomya mu kwaruka kwabo, N’abakobga bacu bamere nk’ inkingi zihinguwe nk’uko bashariza ingoro;" 
Psalms144:13 Ngw ibigega vyacu vyuzure, birimw’ ivyimburwa vy’ imyuga yose; Intama zacu zivyarire ibihumbi n’ibihumbi mu vyanya vyacu;" 
Psalms144:14 Ngw inka zacu zidibirize; Ngo hoye kugira abamena, cank’ abasohoka kurwana; Kandi mu mihōra yacu hoye kuvuga induru." 
Psalms144:15 Hahirwa ihanga rimererwa rirtyo: Hahirwa ihanga rifise Uhoraho kw Imana yaryo. 
Psalms145:1 Mana yanje, Mwami wanje, ndagushira hejuru; Nzoshemagiza izina ryawe ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms145:2 Nzokwama ngushemagiza uko bukeye, Nzoshima izina ryawe ibihe bitazoshira." 
Psalms145:3 Uhoraho arahambaye, abereye gushimwa cane: Ubukuru bgiwe ntibushobora guserangurika." 
Psalms145:4 Ab’ urunganwe rumwe bazoshimira ab’ urundi ibikorwa vyawe, Babīgānire ivy’ inkomezi wakoze." 
Psalms145:5 Nzovuga ubgiza bg’igitinyiro c’icubahiro cawe, Nzoririmba ibikorwa bitangaje wakoze." 
Psalms145:6 Abantu bazovuga inkomezi z’ ibikorwa vyawe biteye ubgoba: Nanje nzomenyekanisha ubukuru bgawe. 
Psalms145:7 Bazokwibukiriza ukugira neza kwawe kwinshi, Baririmbe ukugororoka kwawe." 
Psalms145:8 Uhoraho n’umunyabuntu, yuzuye imbabazi, Ateba kuraka, agira ikigongwe cinshi." 
Psalms145:9 Uhoraho agirira neza bose, Imbabazi ziwe ziri ku vyo yaremye vyose." 
Psalms145:10 Uhoraho, ivyo waremye vyose bizogushima: Abakunzi bawe bazogushemagiza." 
Psalms145:11 Bazovuga ubgiza bg’ubgami bgawe, Bandagaze ububasha bgawe," 
Psalms145:12 Kugira ngo bamenyeshe abana b’abantu ivy’ inkomezi wakoze, N’ubgiza bg’igitinyiro c’ ubgami bgawe." 
Psalms145:13 Ubgami bgawe n’ubgami bg’ ibihe bidashira, Ubugabe bgawe buzohangama uk’ urunganwe ruzogenda rukurikira urundi." 
Psalms145:14 Uhoraho aramira abatemba bose, Yēmesha abahetamye bose." 
Psalms145:15 Vyose biguhanga amaso, Nawe ukabigaburira ivyo kurya vyavyo igihe kigeze." 
Psalms145:16 Upfumbaturura igipfunsi cawe, Ugahāza ukwifuza kw’ibiriho vyose." 
Psalms145:17 Uhoraho agororoka mu nzira ziwe zose, N’umunyabuntu mu bikorwa vyiwe vyose." 
Psalms145:18 Uhoraho aba hafi y’abamwambaza bose, Y’abamwambaza mu vy’ukuri bose." 
Psalms145:19 Azoshitsa ivyo abamwubaha bagomba; Kand’ azokwumva ugutakamba kwabo, abakize." 
Psalms145:20 Uhoraho azigama abamukunda bose; Arikw abanyakibi bose azobahonnya. 
Psalms145:21 Akanwa kanje kazovuga ishimwe ry’Uhoraho; Abafise imibiri bose ni bashemagize izina ryiwe ryera ibihe bitazoshira. 
Psalms146:1 Haleluya! Mutima wanje, n’ushime Uhoraho." 
Psalms146:2 Nzokwama nshima Uhoraho nkiriho, Nzokwama ndirimbira Imana yanje ishimwe ngihumeka." 
Psalms146:3 Ntimukishimire abahambaye, Cank’ umwana w’umuntu n’ umwe, ata co yoshobora gukiza." 
Psalms146:4 Impwemu ziwe zimuvamwo, akisubirira mw ivu ryiwe; Uwo musi nyene imigabo yiwe igashira." 
Psalms146:5 Hahirwa ūfise Imana ya Yakobo k’umutabazi wiwe, Akizigira Uhoraho Imana yiwe:" 
Psalms146:6 Ni we yaremye ijuru n’isi, N’ikiyaga n’ibiri muri vyo vyose; Agumya ukuri gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Psalms146:7 Acira imanza impahazwa; Agaburira abashonje ivyo kurya. Uhoraho ni we abohora imbohe; 
Psalms146:8 Uhoraho ni we ahumūra impumyi; Uhoraho ni we yēmesha abahetamye; Uhoraho ni we akunda abagororotsi; 
Psalms146:9 Uhoraho ni we azigama inyambukīra; Ashigikira impfuvyi n’umupfakazi; Arikw inzira y’abanyakibi arayigoreka. 
Psalms146:10 Uhoraho azohora ahangamye uk’ urunganwe ruzogenda rukurikira urundi, Imana yawe, Siyoni, izohora ihangamye ibihe vyose. Haleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Haleluya, Kukw ari vyiza kuririmbira Imana yacu ishimwe; Biraryoshe, kandi gushima kurakwiye!" 
Psalms147:2 Uhoraho ni we yubaka Yerusalemu; Akoraniriza hamwe abāri bārasābagijwe bo mu Bisirayeli. 
Psalms147:3 Akiza abafise imitima imenetse, Apfuka inguma zabo." 
Psalms147:4 Aharūra inyenyeri uko zingana, Zose azita amazina yazo." 
Psalms147:5 Umwami wacu arahambaye, n’umunyenkomezi nyinshi; Ubgenge bgiwe n’akaburarugero." 
Psalms147:6 Uhoraho aramira abaciye bugufi: Acisha abanyakibi bugufi, akabashitsa hasi." 
Psalms147:7 Muririmbire Uhoraho mumukengurukira, Muririmbire Imana yacu ishimwe muvugira inanga." 
Psalms147:8 Yorosa ijuru ibicu, Itegura imvura ngw igwe kw isi, Imeza ubgatsi ku misozi." 
Psalms147:9 Igaburira ibitungano ivyo kurya vyavyo, N’ivyana vy’ibikōna vyayagura." 
Psalms147:10 Inkomezi z’ifarasi si zo ziyihimbara, Amaguru y’umuntu si yo inezererwa." 
Psalms147:11 Uhoraho anezererwa abamwubaha, Anezererwa abitega imbabazi ziwe." 
Psalms147:12 Yerusalemu, n’ushime Uhoraho; Siyoni, n’ushime Imana yawe." 
Psalms147:13 Kuko yakomeje imyugariro y’ ibirimba vyawe; Yahezagiye abana bawe baba muri wewe. 
Psalms147:14 Igihugu cawe agiha impore, Aguhāza ingano zisētse neza." 
Psalms147:15 Arungika icagezwe ciwe mw isi; Ijambo ryiwe ryiruka vuba cane. 
Psalms147:16 Atanga shelegi nk’ubgoya bg’ intama; Asanzaza urume rw’igikonyozi nk’umunyota. 
Psalms147:17 Amija urubura rwiwe nk’ imvunguka: Ni nde yobasha kwihanga imbeho yiwe? 
Psalms147:18 Arungika ijambo ryiwe, akabiyagisha; Ahehereza umuyaga wiwe, amazi agasubira gutemba." 
Psalms147:19 Amenyesha aba Yakobo ijambo ryiwe, Amenyesha Abisirayeli ivyo yashinze, bo n’imanza ziwe." 
Psalms147:20 Nta rindi hanga yagiriye artyo: Mbere n’imanza ziwe ntibāzimenye. Haleluya! 
Psalms148:1 Haleluya! Mw ijuru ni mushime Uhoraho: Ni mumushimire ahasumba ijuru. 
Psalms148:2 Yemwe mwa bamarayika biwe mwese, ni mumushime: Yemwe mwa ngabo ziwe zose, ni mumushime." 
Psalms148:3 Yemwe zuba n’ukwezi, ni mumushime; Yemwe nyenyeri zaka zose, ni mumushime." 
Psalms148:4 Yemwe majuru asumba amajuru, ni mumushime, Nawe mazi yo hejuru y’amajuru." 
Psalms148:5 Ni bishime izina ry’Uhoraho, Kuko yageze bikaremwa," 
Psalms148:6 Kandi yabihamangiye gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira; Yashinze icagezwe c’intahava. 
Psalms148:7 Mw isi ni mushime Uhoraho, Yemwe bifi, namwe i bgina hose;" 
Psalms148:8 Namwe muriro n’urubura na shelegi n’igipfungu; Nawe muyaga w’igihuhuta, ushitsa ijambo ryiwe;" 
Psalms148:9 Namwe bisozi birebire n’uturambi twose; Namwe biti vyama bigatengengera, n’ibiti vy’amasederi vyose;" 
Psalms148:10 Namwe bikōko n’ibitungano vyose; Namwe ibikwega inda hasi n’ ibifise amababa; 
Psalms148:11 Namwe bami bo mw isi n’ amahanga yose; Namwe abahambaye n’abacamanza bose bo mw isi; 
Psalms148:12 Namwe misore n’inkumi; Namwe batāma n’abana: 
Psalms148:13 Ni bishime izina ry’Uhoraho, Kukw izina ryiwe ryonyene ari ryo rishizwe hejuru: Ubukuru bgiwe buri hejuru y’isi n’ijuru." 
Psalms148:14 Kandi yashize hejuru ihembe ry’abantu biwe, Ni ryo shimwe ry’abakunzi biwe bose, Ni bo Bisirayeli, ihanga yiyegereje. Haleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Haleluya! Ni muririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nsha, Muririmbire ishimwe ryiwe mw ikoraniro ry’abakunzi biwe." 
Psalms149:2 Abisirayeli banezererwe Iyabaremye; Abana b’i Siyoni bagirire akaneza Umwami wabo. 
Psalms149:3 Bashimire izina ryiwe mu mvyino: Bamuririmbire ishimwe batamba agashako k’ingoma, bavugira inanga." 
Psalms149:4 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahimbarwa n’ abantu biwe: Azoshariza abaciye bugufi abambike agakiza. 
Psalms149:5 Abakunzi biwe bavugirize impundu mur’ ico cubahiro: Baririmbishwe n’akanyamuneza bari ku mariri yabo. 
Psalms149:6 Ishimwe ryo gushira Imana hejuru ribe mu gahogo kabo, N’inkota ibe mu ntoke zabo," 
Psalms149:7 Yo kwihōresha amahanga, No guhanisha amoko;" 
Psalms149:8 Bakabohesha abami bayo iminyororo, N’abaganwa bayo imirinda:" 
Psalms149:9 Kugira ngo babashitsekw iteka ryanditswe: Ivyo ni vyo bitera icubahiro abakunzi biwe bose. Haleluya! 
Psalms150:1 Haleluya! Mushimire Imana ahēra hayo, Muyishimire no mw itāzānure ry’ubushobozi bgayo!" 
Psalms150:2 Muyishimire ivy’ inkomezi yakoze, Muyishime nk’uko bibereye ubukuru bgayo buhambaye!" 
Psalms150:3 Muyishimishe ijwi ry’inzamba, Muyishimishe ikembe n’inanga;" 
Psalms150:4 Muyishimishe agashako k’ ingoma n’imvyino, Muyishimishe ibifise imirya n’imyironge;" 
Psalms150:5 Muyishimishe kuvuza cane ivyitwa matowazi, Muyishimishe kuvuza matowazi mw ijwi rirēngēra." 
Psalms150:6 Igihumeka cose ni gishime Uhoraho! Haleluya! 
Proverbs1:1 Imigani ya Salomo mwene Dawidi, umwami w’Abisirayeli," 
Proverbs1:2 Yo kumenya ubgenge bo n’ inyigisho; Gutegēra amajambo y’ugutahura; 
Proverbs1:3 Kwigishwa gukora ibiroranye mu bgenge, Mu kugororoka, mu kwitegereza neza no mu gutunganya;" 
Proverbs1:4 No guha imburabgenge kwiguranura, N’umusore kumuha ukumenya no kugira amakenga:" 
Proverbs1:5 Kugira ng’ umunyabgenge yumve, yunguke ubgenge, Kandi ng’ umuntu w’umuhanga ashike ku kwemera inama nziza;" 
Proverbs1:6 No ku gutahura umugani n’ikigereranyo, N’amajambo y’abanyabgenge n’ubupfindo bgabo bapfinda." 
Proverbs1:7 Kwubaha Uhoraho ni kwo tanguriro ry’ukumenya: Arikw ibipfu bikēngēra ubgenge n’inyigisho. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwana wanje, umva inyigisho ya so, Kandi ntute ibgirizwa rya nyoko:" 
Proverbs1:9 Kuko bizokubera umugāra w’ubuntu mu mutwe, N’imigufu mw izosi." 
Proverbs1:10 Mwana wanje, abanyavyaha ni bakwosha Ntukemere." 
Proverbs1:11 Ni bakubgira, bati Ngwino ujane natwe, Turyamire kwica, Dutegere mu mpisho ūtagira igicumuro, ata nyanduruko;" 
Proverbs1:12 Tubayongobeze nk’i kuzimu, bakibona, Ar’ imirava, nk’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo;" 
Proverbs1:13 Tuzoronka ibintu vyose vy’ igiciro kinini, Tuzokwuzuza amazu yacu isahu;" 
Proverbs1:14 Enda fadikanya natwe, Twese tugire umupfuko umwe:" 
Proverbs1:15 Mwana wanje, ntuz’ ugendane na bo mu nzira, Ubuze ikirenge cawe inzira yabo," 
Proverbs1:16 Kukw ibirenge vyabo vyirukira gukora ikibi, Kandi bihutira kuvisha amaraso." 
Proverbs1:17 Kuk’ umutego utegerwa ubusa Ikiguruka cose iyo kibibona. 
Proverbs1:18 Kand’ abo, baryamira kuvisha ayabo maraso, Bategera mu mpisho ubgabo bugingo." 
Proverbs1:19 Uko ni kw inzira zimeze z’ umuntu wese w’ikirara ku nyungu: Inyungu ikūrah’ ubugingo bga ba nyene yo. 
Proverbs1:20 Bgenge arangururira ijwi mu nzira; Ashirira ijwi hejuru ahiyaguye; 
Proverbs1:21 Asemererera ku nama aho bakoranira; Mw ishikiro ku marembo, No mu gisagara, ni hoavugira amajambo yiwe:" 
Proverbs1:22 Ati Yemwe bijuju, muzogeza ryari gukunda ubujuju? N’abacokoranyi guhimbarwa no gucokora? N’ibipfu kugirira urwanko ubgenge?" 
Proverbs1:23 Muhindukire kubgo kwihanikiriza kwanje: Rāba, nzosuka impwemu yanje kuri mwebge, Nzobamenyesha amajambo yanje." 
Proverbs1:24 Ko nabahamagaye, namwe mukanka; Nkabākura, ntihagire ūbibabara;" 
Proverbs1:25 Mukagaya inama zanje zose, Mukanka kwihanikiriza kwanje:" 
Proverbs1:26 Nuko nanje nzobatwengera mw ijigo mu gihe c’ivyago vyanyu; Nzobitamba ku muvyimba, agatengo kabafashe;" 
Proverbs1:27 Agatengo kanyu kabafashe nk’igihuhuta, Ivyago vyanyu bibazingazinze nk’agashururu, Guhagarika umutima n’ubusinzikare bibashikiriye." 
Proverbs1:28 Ni ho bazontakambira, ariko sinzobishura; Bazondondera ubudahumeka, ariko ntibazombona:" 
Proverbs1:29 Nuko kuko bagiriye urwanko ubgenge, Ntibahitemwo kwubaha Uhoraho;" 
Proverbs1:30 Bakanka inama zanje, Bagakēngēra ukwihanikiriza kwanje kwose;" 
Proverbs1:31 Ni co gituma bazorya ku vy’ inzira zabo zāmuje, Bazohāga akazīkira kabo ubgabo." 
Proverbs1:32 Gukomantaza imitima kw’ imburabgenge kuzozica, Kand’ ukugubga neza kw’ibipfu kuzobihonnya." 
Proverbs1:33 Arik’ ūntega ugutwi wese azoba amahoro, Azokwama atekereje ata kibi atinya." 
Proverbs2:1 Mwana wanje, ni wemera amajambo yanje, Ukabīka amabgirizwa yanje muri wewe," 
Proverbs2:2 Bigatuma utega ugutwi ubgenge, Ugashira umutima ku gutahura;" 
Proverbs2:3 Mbere ni wahamagara ubgenge, Ugashira ijwi hejuru uririra ugutahura;" 
Proverbs2:4 Ni waburondera nk’ifeza, Ukabusesangura nk’ūrondera izahabu zanyegejwe;" 
Proverbs2:5 Ni ho uzotahura ukwubaha Uhoraho ukw ari kwo, Ukaronka ukumenya Imana." 
Proverbs2:6 Kuk’ Uhoraho atanga ubgenge, Mu kanwa kiwe havamw’ ukumenya n’ugutahura." 
Proverbs2:7 Abīkira abagororotsi ubgenge buroranye, Ni we nkinzo y’abagenda batunganye." 
Proverbs2:8 Kugira ngw arinde inzira z’ imanza ziroranye, Kand’ azigame urugendo rw’ abayoboke biwe." 
Proverbs2:9 Ni ho uzotahura ubugororotsi n’imanza ziroranye, N’ibitunganye, mbere n’inzira nziza yose." 
Proverbs2:10 Kuk’ ubgenge buzokwinjira mu mutima wawe, Kand’ ukumenya kuzohimbara ubugingo bgawe." 
Proverbs2:11 Amakenga azogushibamira, Ugutahura kuzokuzigama," 
Proverbs2:12 Ngo bigukize inzira y’ikibi, N’abantu badadika," 
Proverbs2:13 Bata inzira zo kugororoka, Ngo bagendere mu nzira z’ umwiza;" 
Proverbs2:14 Banezererwa gukora ikibi, Bahimbarwa n’ibidadi vy’ikibi;" 
Proverbs2:15 Inzira zabo ziragoramanze, N’ingendo zabo n’izinguzingu." 
Proverbs2:16 Kandi ngo bigukize umugore w’icigenze, Mber’ igukize umunyamahangakazi ahemanisha amagambo yiwe," 
Proverbs2:17 Yataye umukunzi wo mu buto bgiwe, Yibagiye isezerano ry’Imana yiwe:" 
Proverbs2:18 Kukw inzu yiwe ihengamiye mu rupfu, Kand’ inzira ziwe zija mu bāpfuye." 
Proverbs2:19 Abaja i we nta ho bagaruka ukundi, Kandi ntibashikīra inzira z’ ubugingo." 
Proverbs2:20 Ni ho uzogendera mu nzira y’abagira neza, Ukitondera inzira z’abagororotsi." 
Proverbs2:21 Kukw abagororotsi bazokwībēra mu gihugu, Kand’ abatunganye bazokwamayo." 
Proverbs2:22 Arikw abanyavyaha bazokomborwa mu gihugu, Kand’ abaguranyi bazorandurwa muri co." 
Proverbs3:1 Mwana wanje, ntuze wibagire ukwigisha kwanje, Arik’ umutima wawe witondere amabgirizwa yanje:" 
Proverbs3:2 Kuko bizokwongerakw imisi myinshi, N’imyaka yo kuramvya ubugingo, n’amahoro." 
Proverbs3:3 Ubuntu n’ukuri ntibikuveko, Ubipfundike mw izosi ryawe, uvyandike ku gisate, ni co mutima wawe:" 
Proverbs3:4 Ni ho uzobona gushimwa, bo n’ubgenge bushitse, Mu maso y’Imana n’abantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Wizigize Uhoraho umutima wawe wose, Kandi ntiwishimikize ubgenge bg’iwawe:" 
Proverbs3:6 Umumenye mu ngendo zawe zose, Na we azogorora inzira zawe." 
Proverbs3:7 Ntukiyite umunyabgenge wewe ubgawe; Utinye Uhoraho, uve mu bibi:" 
Proverbs3:8 Ivyo bizogutera kunonoka mu mubiri, No kugira umusokōro mu magufa yawe." 
Proverbs3:9 Wubahishe Uhoraho ibintu vyawe, Bo n’umushuzo w’ivyeze vyawe vyose." 
Proverbs3:10 Ni ho ibigega vyawe bizokwuzura vyongerekane, Kandi n’amato yawe azosēsekara imitobe." 
Proverbs3:11 Mwana wanje, ntugaye igikāngīro c’Uhoraho, Kandi nturambirwe n’uguhana kwiwe:" 
Proverbs3:12 Kuk’ uwo Uhoraho akunda ari we ahana, Nk’uko se w’umwana nyene ahana umwana wiwe anezererwa." 
Proverbs3:13 Hahirwa umuntu yironkera ubgenge, N’umuntu aronse ugutahura." 
Proverbs3:14 Kukw inyungu zabgo ziruta iz’ ifeza, Kand’ ivyo bgunguka biruta izahabu zitarimw’ inkamba." 
Proverbs3:15 Burusha igiciro utubuyenge twitwa marijani: Kandi mu bihimbara vyose nta kintu gihwanye na bgo. 
Proverbs3:16 Ukuramba kuri mu kuboko kwabgo kw’i buryo, Mu kubamfu kwabgo harimw’ ubutunzi n’icubahiro." 
Proverbs3:17 Amayira yabgo n’amayira y’ igikundiro, Kand’ inzira zabgo zose n’iz’ amahoro." 
Proverbs3:18 Bubera igiti c’ubugingo ababucakira: Hahirwa umuntu wese abgumirako. 
Proverbs3:19 Uhoraho yashirishijeho isi ubgenge; Ugutahura ni kwo yagumishije ijuru. 
Proverbs3:20 Ukumenya kwiwe ni kwo kwatumye amasōko y’i kuzimu atoboka, N’ibipfungu bigatonyanga ikime." 
Proverbs3:21 Mwana wanje, ivyo ntibikave imbere y’amaso yawe: Ugumye ubgenge buroranye n’amakenga;" 
Proverbs3:22 Ni ho bizobera umutima wawe ubugingo, N’izosi ryawe ugushaza." 
Proverbs3:23 Ni ho uzogenda mu nzira yawe ata nkomanzi, Kandi ntuzotsitara ikirenge cawe." 
Proverbs3:24 Ni waryama ntuzogira ubgoba, Mber’ uzoryama, ugire itiro riryoshe." 
Proverbs3:25 Ntuzotinya ubgoba bga giturumbuka, Cank’ ukuzingazingwa kw’ abanyavyaha ni kwashika:" 
Proverbs3:26 Kuk’ Uhoraho azokubera ivyizigiro, Kand’ azorinda ikirenge cawe ngo ntigifatwe." 
Proverbs3:27 Ntukanke kugirira ivyiza ababibereye, Ugifise uburyo bgo kubikora." 
Proverbs3:28 Ntukabgire mugenzawe, uti Genda, uz’ugaruke, Ejo nzoguha; Kand’ ubifise ngaho." 
Proverbs3:29 Ntukīgīre imigabo yo kugirira nabi mugenzawe, Kand’ abana nawe amahoro." 
Proverbs3:30 Ntukarwane n’umuntu ata nyanduruko, Iy’ ata kibi yakugiriye." 
Proverbs3:31 Ntukagirire ishari umuntu w’ikirara, Ntugatore inzira yiwe n’imwe." 
Proverbs3:32 Kukw ikidambidambi n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw abagororotsi bo, asangiye ibanga na bo." 
Proverbs3:33 Umuvumo w’Uhoraho uri mu nzu y’abanyavyaha, Arikw ahezagira ingo z’abagororotsi." 
Proverbs3:34 N’ukuri yitamba ku muvyimba abacokoranyi, Arikw agirira ubuntu abicisha bugufi." 
Proverbs3:35 Abanyabgenge bazoragwa icubahiro, Arikw isoni ni zo zizoba umugabane w’ibipfu." 
Proverbs4:1 Yemwe bana, ni mwumve ukwigisha kwa so, Mushire imitima ku kumenya uburyo bgo gutahura:" 
Proverbs4:2 Kuko mbahaye inyigisho nziza; Ntimukave mw ibgirizwa ryanje. 
Proverbs4:3 Kuko nanje nabereye data umwana nya mwana, Nabungabungwa ndi nk’ikinege mu maso ya mama." 
Proverbs4:4 Kandi data yaranyigishije, arambarira, At’ Umutima wawe ugumye amajambo yanje; Witondere amabgirizwa yanje, ubone kubaho:" 
Proverbs4:5 Wironkere ubgenge, wironkere uburyo bgo gutahura; Ntukibagire, kandi ntugatere ibitugu amajambo y’akanwa kanje:" 
Proverbs4:6 Ubgenge ntukabute, na bgo buzokuzigama, Bukunde, buzokurinda." 
Proverbs4:7 Ikir’ imbere ya vyose n’ubgenge: nuko wironkere ubgenge; Mber’ ivy’ ufise vyose ubihebere ugutahura. 
Proverbs4:8 Bushire hejuru, na bgo buzogukuza: Buzoguhesha icubahiro ni wabugūmbīra." 
Proverbs4:9 Buzokwambika umugāra w’ ubuntu mu mutwe, Buzoguha igitsibo c’ubgiza." 
Proverbs4:10 Mwana wanje, ni wumve, wemere amajambo yanje, Ni ho imyaka y’ukubaho kwawe izoba myinshi." 
Proverbs4:11 Nakwigishije inzira y’ubgenge, Nakurōngōye mu nzira z’ ubugororotsi." 
Proverbs4:12 Ni wagenda, ibirenge vyawe ntibizokwagirwa, Kandi ni wiruka ntuzotsitara." 
Proverbs4:13 Gumya ukwigishwa, ntukurekure; Ukuzigame, kukw ari kwo bugingo bgawe." 
Proverbs4:14 Ntukaje mu nzira y’abanyavyaha, Ntukagendere mu nzira y’ abanyakibi." 
Proverbs4:15 Yizibukire, ntuyicemwo, Kevya, uyirengāne." 
Proverbs4:16 Kuko badasinzira, shiti bakoze ikibi; Kandi n’itiro ryabo riraguruka, iyo batagize uwo bagwisha." 
Proverbs4:17 Kuko barya umutsima uva mu bigabitanyo, Banywa vino iva mu muryano." 
Proverbs4:18 Arikw inzira y’abagororotsi imeze nk’umuco wo mu gatondotondo, Ugenda urushiriza gukayangana gushitsa hakeye rwose." 
Proverbs4:19 Inzira y’abanyavyaha imeze nk’umwiza, Ntibazi ico batsitarako ic’ ari co." 
Proverbs4:20 Mwana wanje, shira umutima ku majambo yanje, Tega ugutwi ukuvuga kwanje;" 
Proverbs4:21 Ntibikave imbere y’amaso yawe, Bizigamire imbere mu mutima wawe." 
Proverbs4:22 Kuko bibera ubugingo ababironka, No kunonoka mu mibiri yabo yose." 
Proverbs4:23 Rinda umutima wawe kurusha uko worinda ikindi cose, Kukw ari ho ubugingo bududubiriza." 
Proverbs4:24 Wīkūrekw akanwa kagoreka, N’iminwa ihushagirika uyishire kure yawe." 
Proverbs4:25 Amaso yawe atumbere imbere, N’ibigohe vyawe vyerekeze imbere yawe." 
Proverbs4:26 Usēne inzira y’ibirenge vyawe, Kand’ ingendo zawe zose zitungane." 
Proverbs4:27 Ntugatambamire i buryo cank’ i bumoso: Ukūre ikirenge cawe mu kibi. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwana wanje, shira umutima ku bgenge bganje; Tega ugutwi uburyo bganje bgo gutahura." 
Proverbs5:2 Kugira ng’ ugumye amakenga, N’iminwa yawe izigame ukumenya." 
Proverbs5:3 Kukw iminwa y’umugore w’ icigenze itonyanga nk’ikigigu c’ubūki, Kand’ akanwa kiwe kanyerera kurusha amavuta ya elayo:" 
Proverbs5:4 Arikw iherezo ryiwe rirura nk’umururazi, Rikarishe nk’ubūgi bg’inkota." 
Proverbs5:5 Ibirenge vyiwe bimanuka mu rupfu; Intambuko ziwe zimushikana i kuzimu; 
Proverbs5:6 Bituma atabona inzira isēnnye y’ubugingo, Ingendo ziwe ziradandabagirana, kandi ntazi iy’ aja." 
Proverbs5:7 None rero bana banje, munyumve, Ntimukave ku majambo y’ akanwa kanje." 
Proverbs5:8 Uz’ umuce kure, Kandi ntiwēgēre umuryango w’inzu yiwe:" 
Proverbs5:9 Woye kwiha abandi, ngo bonone igikundiro cawe, Na ruburakigongwe ntumumarirekw imyaka yawe:" 
Proverbs5:10 Abanyamahanga boye guhāga ivyawe, Kand’ ivyakuruhije vyoye kuja mu nzu y’uwundi;" 
Proverbs5:11 Nawe ukazoboroga kw iherezo ryawe, Ah’ umubiri wawe n’amagara yawe bizoba bishize," 
Proverbs5:12 Ukavuga, ut’ Ewe ngo ndanka guhanūrwa, N’umutima wanje ugakēngēra guhanwa;" 
Proverbs5:13 Sinumvire ijwi ry’abigisha banje, Sintege ugutwi abāmpanūra!" 
Proverbs5:14 Nari nshigaje gatoya ngahetura ibibi vyose Hagati y’ishengero n’ikoraniro. 
Proverbs5:15 Unywe amazi yo mw isōko yawe wiharije, N’amazi atemba yo mw iriba ryawe." 
Proverbs5:16 Mbeg’ imigezi yawe yosābagira hose, N’inzuzi z’amazi zosābagira mu nzira?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ni bibe ivyawe ubgawe, Ntubisangire n’ivyigenze." 
Proverbs5:18 Isōko yawe igire umugisha, Kand’ unezererwe umugore wo mu buto bgawe." 
Proverbs5:19 Nk’impongokazi y’urukundo n’ingeregere y’igikundiro Amabere yiwe akubumbe ibihe vyose; Kandi wame uhimbarwa n’ urukundo rwiwe. 
Proverbs5:20 N’iki cotuma ga mwana wanje, uhimbarwa n’umugore w’icigenze, Ukagwa mu gikiriza c’ūtar’ uwawe?" 
Proverbs5:21 Kukw ingendo z’umuntu zir’ imbere y’inyonga z’Uhoraho, Kand’ asēna inzira ziwe zose." 
Proverbs5:22 Umunyavyaha, ukugabitanya kwiwe bgite ni kwo kuzomufata, Azodunuzwa n’ingoyi z’icaha ciwe." 
Proverbs5:23 Azopfa azize kudahaha, Kubg’ ubupfu bgiwe bukomeye azozimira." 
Proverbs6:1 Mwana wanje, asangwa warabaye ishinga kuri mugenzawe, Cank’ ukarahira kw ari wewe umwishinze," 
Proverbs6:2 Uba utezwe n’amagambo yo mu kanwa kawe, Uba ufashwe n’amagambo yo mu kanwa kawe." 
Proverbs6:3 None rero, mwana wanje, kora urtya, wirokore, Kuk’ ushitse mu kuboko kwa mugenzawe; Bandanya, wicishe bugufi, wisabe mugenzawe ushishikaye." 
Proverbs6:4 Amaso yawe ntuyahe itiro, N’ibigohe ntubihe guhūnyiza." 
Proverbs6:5 Wirokore, nk’ukw ingeregere iva mu kuboko kw’umuhīgi, Kandi nk’ukw inyoni iva mu kuboko kw’umutezi." 
Proverbs6:6 Genda ku kimonyo, wa munyabute; Witegereze ingeso zaco, uce ubgenge:" 
Proverbs6:7 Naho kitagira umucamanza, Cank’ umubgiriza cank’ ūganza," 
Proverbs6:8 Ciziganiriza indya zaco zo mu ci, Kikēgeranya ivyo kurya vyaco mw iyimbura." 
Proverbs6:9 Uzogeza ryari kwiryamira, ga wa munebge we? Uzovyuka ryari ng’ uve mw itiro?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ngo Hinge nce agatiro gakeya, mbe ndisinziriye gatoya, Nisegure ukuboko gatoya niboterere:" 
Proverbs6:11 Uko ni k’ubgoro bgawe buzogushikako nk’umwambuzi, N’ikigoyi kizogushikako nk’ umuntu w’umurwanyi." 
Proverbs6:12 Umuntu w’umugarariji, umuntu w’umugabitanyi, Agendana akanwa kagoreka;" 
Proverbs6:13 Avuniranira akagohe, akeburanisha ibirenge, Yāgana akāra;" 
Proverbs6:14 Ukugoreka kuri mu mutima wiwe, kandi yama yigenera ibibi; Avyura imitongano." 
Proverbs6:15 Ni co gituma ukuranduka kuzomushikako giturumbuka; Azovunagurwa giturumbuka, atagira gitabara." 
Proverbs6:16 Har’ ibintu bitandatu Uhoraho yanka, Mbere n’indwi bimusesema:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amaso y’ubgibone n’ururimi rw’ibinyoma, N’amaboko avisha amaraso y’ aberanda;" 
Proverbs6:18 N’umutima ugera imigabo mibi, N’ibirenge vyihutira kwirukira ikibi;" 
Proverbs6:19 N’icabona c’ibinyoma kivuga ivy’ ubuhūmvyi, N’ūvyura imitongano mu bavukana." 
Proverbs6:20 Mwana wanje, itondere icagezwe ca so, Kandi ntute ibgirizwa rya nyoko:" 
Proverbs6:21 Ubihambirire ku mutima wawe ibihe vyose, Ubipfundike mw izosi ryawe." 
Proverbs6:22 Bizokuja imbere ugenda, Bizoguteramira usinziriye, Bizoyāga nawe wikanguye." 
Proverbs6:23 Kukw icagezwe ar’ itara, kand’ amabgirizwa ar’ umuco; Kand’ uguhana kw’ukwigisha ar’inzira y’ubugingo:" 
Proverbs6:24 Ngo bikurinde umugore w’ umunyakibi, N’uguhemana kw’ururimi rw’ umugore w’icigenze." 
Proverbs6:25 Ntukifuze ubgiza bgiwe mu mutima wawe, Kandi ntagufatishe kubongeka ingohe ziwe." 
Proverbs6:26 Kuko kubga maraya umuntu afūtāna gushitsa asigaye ku kamanyu k’agatsima: Kand’ umusambanyikazi ahīga ubugingo bg’igiciro. 
Proverbs6:27 Har’ umuntu yoshira umuriro mu gikiriza, Impuzu ziwe ntizishe?" 
Proverbs6:28 Canke har’ uwogenda ku makara yaka, Ibirenge vyiwe ntibizigire?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ni ko bimerera uwinjirana umugore wa mugenzi we; Ūmukorako wese ntazobura guhanwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Abantu ntibagaya umwivyi, iyo yibishwa No kumara akaruru kiwe ari n’inzara:" 
Proverbs6:31 Arikw iy’ afashwe ariha ibihetangabo ndwi; Azokwoza urugo rwiwe rwose. 
Proverbs6:32 Ūsambana n’umugore aba igipfamutima; Ūgira artyo aba arondera guhonnya ubugingo bgiwe. 
Proverbs6:33 Azoba yihamagariye inguma no gutītūka; Kand’ ibara azoba yiyambitse ntirizozimangana. 
Proverbs6:34 Kuko gufūha kw’umugabo kurandamura ishavu; Kandi ntazogira akagongwe ku musi wo kwihōra. 
Proverbs6:35 Ntazokwemera icīru na kimwe, Kandi ntazonyurwa naho womuhongera vyinshi." 
Proverbs7:1 Mwana wanje, witondere amajambo yanje, Ubīke amabgirizwa yanje muri wewe." 
Proverbs7:2 Witondere amabgirizwa yanje, ubone kubaho, Rinda ivyagezwe vyanje nk’ imbone y’ijisho." 
Proverbs7:3 Bipfundike ku ntoke zawe, Uvyandike ku gisate, ni co mutima wawe." 
Proverbs7:4 Ubarire ubgenge, ut’ Uri mushikanje; Kand’ ukumenya ukwite incuti:" 
Proverbs7:5 Kugira ngo bikurinde umugore w’icigenze, Mbere bikurinde umugore w’icigenze ahemanisha amagambo yiwe." 
Proverbs7:6 Nari kw idirisha mu nzu yanje, Ndungurukira mu nshingo zaryo;" 
Proverbs7:7 Mbona mu mburabgenge, Nitegereza mu basore, Umusore w’igipfamutima," 
Proverbs7:8 Aca mu nzira hafi y’inkokora y’inzu y’umugore ameze artyo, Anobanga mu nzira ija ku nzu yiwe;" 
Proverbs7:9 Hāri mu kagoroba, bugira bgire, Mu kajoro, buhwibiriye." 
Proverbs7:10 Maz’ uno mugore aramusanganira, Yambaye nka kumwe kwa maraya, afise umutima w’ uburyarya." 
Proverbs7:11 N’inyeruzi, ntahetwa, Ibirenge vyiwe ntibiragama mu nzu;" 
Proverbs7:12 Hamwe aba mu nzira, ahandi akaba ahiyaguye, Abunda ku mahwane yose y’ inzira." 
Proverbs7:13 Afata nya musore aramusoma, Amubarira ata dusoni mu maso," 
Proverbs7:14 Ati Nari nsanzwe nkwiye gutanga ikimazi c’ishimwe: Non’ uyu musi nashikije ivyo nasezeranye. 
Proverbs7:15 Ni co gitumye nza kugusanganira, Nkuronderana umwete, none ndakubonye." 
Proverbs7:16 Nashashe imisego ku buriri bganje, N’impuzu z’amagarwe zajishwe mu nyuzi zo muri Egiputa." 
Proverbs7:17 Namotesheje neza uburiri bganje Isenga n’imbazi na mudarasini. 
Proverbs7:18 Ngwino turāreko buce, Twinezeranishe urukundo." 
Proverbs7:19 Kuk’ umugabo atar’ i muhira, Yamaze urubanza rwa kure." 
Proverbs7:20 Yajanye umupfuko w’amahera; Azogaruka ukwezi gufashe. 
Proverbs7:21 Amuryesharyeshakw akarimi keza, Amukwegesha guhemana kw’ iminwa yiwe." 
Proverbs7:22 Aca amukurikira ubgo nyene, Nk’inka ija kubāgwa, Canke nk’igipfu kijanwa guhanirwa mu munyororo;" 
Proverbs7:23 Gushitsa ah’ umwampi umutobekeranije mu gitigu; Nk’ukw inyoni yisuka mu mutego, Itazi kw igiye gupfa." 
Proverbs7:24 None rero, bana banje, munyumve, Mutege amatwi amajambo y’ akanwa kanje." 
Proverbs7:25 Umutima wawe ntugakebereze mu nzira ziwe, Kandi woye kuzimira ng’ ujane inzira ziwe." 
Proverbs7:26 Kuko yatsinze hasi abakomerekejwe benshi, Mber’ abakomeye bishwe na we n’isinzi." 
Proverbs7:27 Inzu yiwe n’inzira ija i kuzimu, Imanuka irora i wabo w’urupfu." 
Proverbs8:1 Mbega Bgenge ntahamagaye? N’ukumenya ntigushize hejuru ijwi ryakwo? 
Proverbs8:2 Ku gatwe hejuru, i ruhande y’inzira, Mu mayirabiri, ni ho ahagaze." 
Proverbs8:3 I ruhande y’amarembo, mw ishikiro ry’igisagara, Mu bikingi vy’amarembo, ni ho asemererera cane:" 
Proverbs8:4 Ati Ni mwebge mwa bagabo mpamagaye, Kand’ ijwi ryanje rihamagaye abana b’abantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Yemwe mwa mburabgenge, mumenye kwiguranura ic’ ari co, Namwe bijuju, mugire imitima itahura." 
Proverbs8:6 Mwumvirize, kuko ngira mvuge ibikomeye; Guteranura iminwa kwanje kuvamw’ ibibereye." 
Proverbs8:7 Kukw akanwa kanje kagira kavuge ivy’ ukuri, Kand’ ikibi n’umuziro ku minwa yanje." 
Proverbs8:8 Amajambo yose y’akanwa kanje n’ay’ ukugororoka, Kandi muri yo nta kigoramye cank’ ikigoretse." 
Proverbs8:9 Yose arumvikana ku muntu atahura, Kand’ aratumbereye ku bāronse ubgenge." 
Proverbs8:10 Mwākīre inyigisho zanje, si nk’ifeza, Mwākīre n’ukumenya kurusha izahabu z’indobanurwa." 
Proverbs8:11 Kuk’ ubgenge buruta utubuyenge twitwa marijani; Kandi mu bintu bihimbara vyose nta gihwanye na bgo. 
Proverbs8:12 Jewe Bgenge, amakenga nayagize inzu yanje, Nserangura ukumenya n’inama nziza." 
Proverbs8:13 Kwubaha Uhoraho ni kwo kwanka ikibi: Ubgibone n’amanyama n’inzira y’ikibi N’akanwa k’ibidadi, ndavyanka." 
Proverbs8:14 Inama nziza n’iyanje, bo n’ ubgenge bushitse, Ni jewe kumenya, ndi n’inkomezi." 
Proverbs8:15 Ni jewe mpa abami kuganza, N’abacamanza gushinga ibiroranye." 
Proverbs8:16 Ni jewe mpa abaganza kuganza, N’abaganwa, eka mbere n’abacamanza bose bo mw isi." 
Proverbs8:17 Nkunda abankunda, Kand’ abandondera ubudahumeka bazombona." 
Proverbs8:18 Itunga n’icubahiro bir’ i wanje; N’ubutunzi buramba, bo n’ ubugororotsi." 
Proverbs8:19 Imbuto namye zirusha izahabu ubgiza, mbere naho zoba izahabu zitarimw’ inkamba; N’ivyimburwa vyanje biruta ifeza z’indobānurwa." 
Proverbs8:20 Ngendera mu mayira y’ubugororotsi, No hagati mu nzira z’imanza ziroranye:" 
Proverbs8:21 Kugira ngw abankunda ndabahe kuragwa itunga, Kandi kugira ngo nuzuze ibigega vyabo." 
Proverbs8:22 Uhoraho yaranyamanye mw itanguriro ry’inzira ziwe, Ataratangura na kimwe mu bikorwa vyiwe vya kera." 
Proverbs8:23 Nashizweh’ uhereye kera hose, uhereye mbere na mbere, Isi itararemwa." 
Proverbs8:24 I bgina hatarabaho nari naravutse; Amasōko yuzuye amazi atarabaho. 
Proverbs8:25 Imisozi miremire itarashirwaho, Bo n’udusozi, nari naravutse:" 
Proverbs8:26 Itararema isi cank’ indimiro, Cank’ itanguriro ry’umukungugu wo kw isi." 
Proverbs8:27 Igihe yashirah’ ijuru ni ho nari ndi: N’igihe yarihetera hejuru y’i bgina; 
Proverbs8:28 Ijuru igihe yarigumya hejuru iyo, Igihe amasōko y’i bgina yakomera;" 
Proverbs8:29 Igihe yashingira ikiyaga akarimbi, Kugira ngw amazi ntarenge icagezwe cayo; Igihe yashirah’ amatanguriro y’isi:" 
Proverbs8:30 Ico gihe nari kumwe na yo, nd’ umukozi w’umuhanga: Kand’ imisi yose narayihimbara, Nama niginagura imbere yayo;" 
Proverbs8:31 Niginagura mw isi yayo yāgānutse; Mpimbarwa n’abana b’abantu. 
Proverbs8:32 None rero, bana banje, ni munyumve: Kukw abitondera inzira zanje ar’ abahirwe." 
Proverbs8:33 Mwumvirize inyigisho, muce ubgenge, Kandi ntimuze muzanke." 
Proverbs8:34 Hahirwa umuntu anyumviriza, Akāma arerekeye ku myugariro yanje uko bukeye, Agategera ku bishimaryango vyanje." 
Proverbs8:35 Kuk’ ūmbona wese aba abonye ubugingo, Kand’ akazotoneshwa n’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs8:36 Arik’ ūncumuyeko, aba yankirije ubugingo bgiwe nyene: Abanyanka bose bakunda urupfu." 
Proverbs9:1 Bgenge yiyubakiye inzu, Yibāziye inkingi ndwi:" 
Proverbs9:2 Yabāze ingumba ziwe; yaturiranije vino yiwe; Yateguye ameza yiwe. 
Proverbs9:3 Yatumye incoreke ziwe; Asemererera ku gatwe hejuru ko mu gisagara," 
Proverbs9:4 At’ Umuntu wese w’imburabgenge n’aze yinjire hano: Kand’ abarira ibipfamutima," 
Proverbs9:5 Ati Ngwino murye ku mazimano yanje, Munywe kuri vino naturiranije." 
Proverbs9:6 Muve mu bupfu, mubone kubaho; Mugendere mu nzira yo kumenya ubgenge." 
Proverbs9:7 Ūhana umucokoranyi aba yikwegera kumāramāzwa, Kand’ uwihaniza umunyakibi aba yikwegera iceyi." 
Proverbs9:8 Ntiwihanize umucokoranyi, yohava akwanka: Wihanize umunyabgenge, azogukunda." 
Proverbs9:9 Wigishe umunyabgenge, azorushiriza kugira ubgenge: Wigishe umugororotsi, azokwunguka kumenya." 
Proverbs9:10 Ukwubaha Uhoraho ni kwo tanguriro ry’ubgenge, Kand’ ukumenya Uwera ni kwo kumenya ubgenge." 
Proverbs9:11 Kukw imisi yawe izogwira kubganje, N’imyaka y’ukubaho kwawe izokwongerwa." 
Proverbs9:12 Ni wagira ubgenge ni wewe uzoba ubgifitiye; Kandi ni wacokorana ni wewe ubgawe bizobako. 
Proverbs9:13 Gipfu n’umugore w’indegeteranyi, N’imburabgenge, kandi nta co azi." 
Proverbs9:14 Yicara ku muryango w’inzu yiwe, No ku ntebe ku gatwe hejuru ko mu gisagara," 
Proverbs9:15 Ngw ahamagare abahahita, Bagenda baramirije mu nzira zabo," 
Proverbs9:16 At’ Umuntu wese w’imburabgenge n’aze yinjire hano; Kand’ abarira igipfamutima," 
Proverbs9:17 At’ Amazi y’amībano araryoshe, N’indya zirīrwa mu mpisho ziranezereye." 
Proverbs9:18 Ariko wa wundi ntaba azi kw imizimu ari ho iri, Kandi kw abatumire biwe baba i bgina i kuzimu." 
Proverbs10:1 Imigani ya Salomo. Umwana w’ubgenge anezereza se, Arik’ umwana w’igipfu ababaza nyina." 
Proverbs10:2 Itunga rironkeshejwe ubugunge ntirigira ikimazi, Arik’ ubugororotsi bukūra mu rupfu." 
Proverbs10:3 Uhoraho ntazokundira umushaha w’umugororotsi k’ ugira inzara, Arikw akaruru k’abanyavyaha azogasunikira hirya." 
Proverbs10:4 Ukuboko kw’umunebge kwizanira ubgoro, Arik’ ukuboko kw’umunyamwete kuratungisha." 
Proverbs10:5 Ūshwābūra mu ci n’umwana w’ubgenge, Arik’ uwigonera mw iyimbura n’umwana w’agatētereza." 
Proverbs10:6 Imigisha iba ku mutwe w’ umugororotsi, Arik’ umuryano wubikiza ku munwa w’umunyavyaha." 
Proverbs10:7 Kwibuka umugororotsi kurimw’ umugisha, Arikw izina ry’umunyavyaha rizozimangana." 
Proverbs10:8 Ūfise umutima w’ubgenge yemera kubgirizwa, Arik’ ūfise iminwa y’ubuhumbu aratemba." 
Proverbs10:9 Ūgenda agororotse agenda amahoro, Arik’ ūgoramangisha inzira ziwe azomenyekana." 
Proverbs10:10 Ūvuniranira akagohe atera umubabaro, Kand’ ūfise iminwa y’ubuhumbu aratemba." 
Proverbs10:11 Akanwa k’umugororotsi n’ isōko y’ubugingo, Arik’ umuryano wubikiza ku munwa w’umunyavyaha." 
Proverbs10:12 Urwanko ruvyura intonganya, Arik’ urukundo rupfuka ibigabitanyo vyose." 
Proverbs10:13 Mu minwa y’ūzi gutegēra habonekamw’ ubgenge, Arikw inkoni ibīkiwe ibitugu vy’ūtagira umutima." 
Proverbs10:14 Abanyabgenge baziganya ukumenya, Arikw akanwa k’igipfu ni ko buyobe bugira butere." 
Proverbs10:15 Itunga ry’umutunzi rimubera igisagara gikomeye, Arikw ikimara aboro n’ubgoro bgabo." 
Proverbs10:16 Ubutame bg’umugororotsi buzana ubugingo, Arikw inyungu z’umunyakibi zizana icaha." 
Proverbs10:17 Ūshira umutima ku gutozwa indero nziza aba ari mu nzira y’ubugingo, Arik’ uwanka guhanwa aba azimiye." 
Proverbs10:18 Ūpfukapfuka urwanko n’ umunyaminwa y’ibinyoma, Kand’ ūvuga ibirementanyo n’igipfu." 
Proverbs10:19 Mw isinzi ry’amajambo ntihaburamw’ ugucumura, Arik’ uwigarura mu vy’iminwa ivuga n’umunyabgenge." 
Proverbs10:20 Ururimi rw’umugororotsi ni nk’ifeza z’indobānurwa, Arik’ umutima w’umunyakibi ugira ikimazi gike." 
Proverbs10:21 Iminwa y’umugororotsi igaburira benshi, Arikw ibijuju vyicwa no kutagira umutima." 
Proverbs10:22 Umugisha w’Uhoraho uratungisha, Kandi nta mubabaro awuvangamwo." 
Proverbs10:23 Gukora ikibi ni nk’ibihimbaro ku gipfu, Kand’ ubgenge ni ko bumerera umuntu atahura." 
Proverbs10:24 Ico umunyakibi atinya kizomushikako, Arikw ico umugororotsi yifuza azokironka." 
Proverbs10:25 Agashururu kamaze guhita umunyakibi ntaba akiboneka, Arik’ umugororotsi n’ibuye ry’itanguriro ryamaho." 
Proverbs10:26 Nk’ukw inkevya imerera amenyo, kandi nk’ukw imyotsi imerera amaso, Ni k’umunyabute amerera abamutumye." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukwubaha Uhoraho kurarambisha, Arikw imyaka y’abanyakibi izogerurwa." 
Proverbs10:28 Ivyizigiro vy’abagororotsi n’ umunezero, Arikw ivyo abanyakibi bishimiye bizoshira." 
Proverbs10:29 Inzira y’Uhoraho n’igihome gikingira umugororotsi, Ariko n’amahonero ku bakora ivy’ ukugabitanya." 
Proverbs10:30 Umugororotsi nta ho azosegenyeshwa, Arikw abanyakibi ntibazohora mu gihugu." 
Proverbs10:31 Akanwa k’umugororotsi gatengengera ivy’ ubgenge, Arik’ ururimi rudadika ruzocibga." 
Proverbs10:32 Iminwa y’umugororotsi izi ibishimwa, Arikw akanwa k’abanyakibi kavuga ibidadi." 
Proverbs11:1 Umunzane ubesha n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw ikilo c’ukuri kiramuhimbara." 
Proverbs11:2 Ubgibone buje, ni ho haza gutētērwa, Arik’ ubgenge bubana n’ abicishije bugufi." 
Proverbs11:3 Ugutungana kw’abagororotsi kuzobarōngōra, Arik’ ukudambikanya kw’ ingunge kuzozihonnya." 
Proverbs11:4 Itunga ntirigira ikimazi ku musi w’uburake, Arik’ ubugororotsi bukūra mu rupfu." 
Proverbs11:5 Ubugororotsi bg’umuntu atunganye buzogorora inzira yiwe, Arik’ umunyakibi azotsitara ku bubi bgiwe bgite." 
Proverbs11:6 Ubugororotsi bg’abagororotsi buzobakiza, Arikw abakora ivy’ ubugunge bazofatwa n’ukugira nabi kwabo." 
Proverbs11:7 Umuntu w’umunyakibi ni yapfa, ivyo yishimiye bizoshira, Kand’ ivyizigiro vy’abagabitanya birashira." 
Proverbs11:8 Umugororotsi akizwa ivyago, Kand’ umunyakibi agwa mu mpōrero yiwe." 
Proverbs11:9 Umuntu atubaha Imana yicisha mugenzi we akanwa kiwe, Arikw abagororotsi barokorwa kubgo kumenya ubgenge." 
Proverbs11:10 Abagororotsi iyo baguwe neza igisagara kiranezerwa, Kand’ abanyakibi iyo batikiye impundu zirasēsēra." 
Proverbs11:11 Umuhezagiro w’abagororotsi ushira igisagara hejuru, Arikw akanwa k’abanyakibi karagisangangura." 
Proverbs11:12 Ūkēngēra mugenzi we nta mutima agira, Arik’ umuntu azi ubgenge ariyihorerera." 
Proverbs11:13 Ūgendagenda ar’ indanyangu amena ibanga, Arik’ ūri n’umutima wizigirwa agumya ijambo." 
Proverbs11:14 Ahabuze abarōngōra b’ubgenge abantu barahenebera, Ariko mu nama ya benshi habonekamw’ amahoro." 
Proverbs11:15 Uwigize ishinga ku wundi bizomugirira nabi, Arik’ uwanka ivy’ ukwishinga aba amahoro." 
Proverbs11:16 Umugore w’umunyabuntu yamana icubahiro, Kand’ abagabo b’abahambazi bamana itunga." 
Proverbs11:17 Umunyakigongwe agirira neza umutima wiwe ubgiwe, Ariko ruburakigongwe agirira nabi umubiri wiwe ubgiwe." 
Proverbs11:18 Umunyakibi aca ingero y’ibihendo, Arik’ ūbiba ubugororotsi aronka impēra y’ukuri." 
Proverbs11:19 Ubugororotsi bushikana umuntu ku bugingo, Arik’ ūkurikirana ikibi aba yikwegera urupfu." 
Proverbs11:20 Abagoreka mu mitima n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw abatunganya mu nzira baramuhimbara." 
Proverbs11:21 Vy’ukuri, umunyakibi akazobura guhanwa! Arik’ uruvyaro rw’abagororotsi ruzorokorwa." 
Proverbs11:22 Umugore w’akazuru gusa arikw atazi kuroranya, Ameze nk’impeta y’izahabu yambitswe ingurube mu zuru." 
Proverbs11:23 Ivyo abagororotsi bifuza bibazanira ivyiza gusa, Arikw ivyo abanyakibi bishimira bibazanira kurakirwa." 
Proverbs11:24 Umwe atanga isābagire, akarushiriza kwunguka, Uwundi yikumirakw ivyo yar’ akwiye gutanga, bimukwegera ubukene." 
Proverbs11:25 Umutima urekura uzototahara, Kand’ ūvomera abandi azovomerwa na we." 
Proverbs11:26 Uwikumirakw impeke abantu bazomuvuma, Arik’ umuhezagiro uzoba k’ ūzishōra." 
Proverbs11:27 Ūrondera ivyiza inzirabgira aba arondeye gushimwa, Arik’ ūhahamira ikibi kizomugarukako." 
Proverbs11:28 Uwizigira ubutunzi bgiwe azotemba, Arikw abagororotsi bazototahara nk’ikibabi kiremvye." 
Proverbs11:29 Ūtera urugo rwiwe imivurungano azoronka umuyaga kw iragi, Kand’ igipfu kizoba umushumba w’ūfise umutima w’ubgenge." 
Proverbs11:30 Imbuto y’umugororotsi n’igiti c’ubugingo, Kand’ ūfise ubgenge ahindura imitima y’abantu." 
Proverbs11:31 Rāba, umugororotsi azogererwa ibikwiranye na we mw isi: Non’ umunyakibi n’umunyavyaha ntibazorushiriza?" 
Proverbs12:1 Ūkunda gutozwa indero nziza aba akunda ubgenge, Arik’ uwanka guhanwa aba ar’ ikiyingiyingi." 
Proverbs12:2 Umunyangeso nziza atoneshwa n’Uhoraho, Arik’ umuntu w’imigabo y’ ibibi Uhoraho azomucirakw iteka." 
Proverbs12:3 Umuntu ntacimbatazwa n’ ikibi, Arikw imizi y’abagororotsi nta ho izonyiganyizwa." 
Proverbs12:4 Umugore atunganye abera umugabo wiwe igitsibo mu mutwe, Arik’ uw’ agatētereza amubera nk’ikimungu mu magufa." 
Proverbs12:5 Ivyiyumviro vy’abagororotsi biraroranye, Arikw imigabo y’abanyakibi n’ibinyoma." 
Proverbs12:6 Amagambo y’abanyakibi abundira kuvisha amaraso, Arikw akanwa k’abagororotsi bo kazobakiza." 
Proverbs12:7 Abanyakibi baraheneberezwa bagashira, Arikw inzu y’abagororotsi ihagarara ishikamye." 
Proverbs12:8 Umuntu ashimirwa ubgenge bgiwe nk’uko bungana, Arik’ ūfise umutima ugoramye baramugaya." 
Proverbs12:9 Uwishira hejuru akabura utw’ arya Arutwa n’inēra yifitiye uwo itunze. 
Proverbs12:10 Umuntu agororotse ababara igitungwa ciwe, Arik’ umutima w’abanyakibi n’inkazi." 
Proverbs12:11 Ūrima itongo ryiwe azogira indya nyinshi, Arik’ ūkurikira ibitagira ikimazi nta mutima agira." 
Proverbs12:12 Umunyavyaha yifuza icaguye mu mutego w’abanyakibi, Arik’ umuzi w’abagororotsi utuma bama." 
Proverbs12:13 Ibicumuro vy’iminwa y’umuntu w’ikibi bimubera umutego; Arik’ umugororotsi akira ivyago. 
Proverbs12:14 Umuntu azohāga ivyiza, abiheshejwe n’ibivuye mu kanwa kiwe, Kand’ umuntu ahabga ibihwanye n’ibikorwa vy’amaboko yiwe." 
Proverbs12:15 Inzira y’igipfu irabereye mu maso yaco ubgaco, Arik’ ūfise ubgenge yumvira inama agīriwe." 
Proverbs12:16 Ishavu ry’igipfu rica riboneka ako kanya, Arik’ uwitonda iy’atutswe arirengagiza." 
Proverbs12:17 Ūvuga ukuri yerekana ukugororoka, Arikw icabona c’ibinyoma cerekana ubugunge." 
Proverbs12:18 Har’ ūvuga ibisunitswe n’ impwemu bimeze nk’ugucumita kw’inkota, Arik’ ururimi rw’abanyabgenge ruravūra." 
Proverbs12:19 Umunwa w’ukuri uzokomezwa gushitsa ibihe bidashira, Arik’ ururimi rw’ibinyoma n’urw’ akanya gato." 
Proverbs12:20 Ubugunge buri mu mitima y’abaja imigabo y’ikibi, Arikw abaja inama z’amahoro bagira umunezero." 
Proverbs12:21 Nta cago kizoba ku mugororotsi, Arikw abanyakibi buzuye ibibi." 
Proverbs12:22 Iminwa y’ibinyoma n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw abakora ivy’ ukuri ni bo bamuhimbara." 
Proverbs12:23 Uwitonda ahisha ivyo azi, Arik’ umutima w’ibipfu uswaganya ubupfu." 
Proverbs12:24 Ukuboko kw’abanyamwete kuzoganza, Arik’ umunyabute azoshirwa mu buja." 
Proverbs12:25 Amaganya yo mu mutima w’umuntu awutera kwicurikīra, Arikw ijambo ryiza rirawunezereza." 
Proverbs12:26 Umugororotsi arōngōra mugenzi we, Arikw inzira y’abanyakibi irabazimiza." 
Proverbs12:27 Umunyabute ntatara inyama z’ico yahīze, Arikw ikintu c’igiciro ku muntu n’umwete." 
Proverbs12:28 Mu nzira y’ukugororoka har’ ubugingo, Kandi mu ndari yakwo nta rupfu ruhaba." 
Proverbs13:1 Umwana w’ubgenge ashira umutima ku gutozwa indero nziza na se, Arik’ umucōkōranyi ntiyumvira igihano." 
Proverbs13:2 Umuntu azorya ivyiza abiheshejwe n’ibivuye mu kanwa kiwe, Arikw ingunge zifuza kugira amanyama." 
Proverbs13:3 Ūrinda akanwa kiwe azigama ubugingo bgiwe, Arikw ikirofoke kizoranduka." 
Proverbs13:4 Umutima w’umunyabute urifuza, ariko nta co uronka, Arik’ umutima w’abanyamwete uratotahara." 
Proverbs13:5 Umuntu agororotse yanka ibinyoma, Arik’ umuntu w’umunyakibi n’agatētereza kandi n’agaterasoni." 
Proverbs13:6 Ubugororotsi buzigama ūgenda agororotse, Arikw ikibi gitsinda hasi umunyavyaha." 
Proverbs13:7 Har’ uwifata rutunzi ata co afise, Har’ uwifata rworo kand’ afise ibitayega." 
Proverbs13:8 Ico umuntu yicunguza n’ itunga ryiwe, Arik’ umworo ntiyicura imikankamo." 
Proverbs13:9 Umuco w’abagororotsi n’akanyamuneza, Arikw itara ry’abanyakibi rizozimwa." 
Proverbs13:10 Ubgibone butera imitongano gusa, Arik’ ubgenge bubana n’ abemera inama nziza." 
Proverbs13:11 Ubutunzi buronkeshejwe amagambo atagira ikimazi bugenda buyōka, Arik’ ūrundanya yitonze azokwunguka." 
Proverbs13:12 Ivyizigiwe bigateba, bivuna umutima, Arikw icifujwe iyo gishitse, kiba igiti c’ubugingo." 
Proverbs13:13 Umuntu wese akēngēra ijambo yikwegera guhona, Arik’ uwubaha icagezwe azohērwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Ibgirizwa ry’umunyabgenge n’ isōko y’ubugingo, Rikūra mu mitego y’urupfu." 
Proverbs13:15 Gukerebuka kwiza gutera igikundiro, Arikw inzira y’ingunge irababazanya." 
Proverbs13:16 Uwitonda wese akorana ubgenge, Arikw igipfu canda ubupfu bgaco." 
Proverbs13:17 Intumwa mbi igwa mu vyago, Arikw intumwa yizigirwa izana gukira." 
Proverbs13:18 Ubgoro n’ibitētērwa bizoba ku wanka gutozwa indero nziza, Arik’ uwumvira igihano azokwubahwa." 
Proverbs13:19 Icifujwe kigashika kiryohera umutima, Arikw ibipfu, kuri vyo kirazira ko biva mu bibi." 
Proverbs13:20 Gendana n’abanyabgenge, nawe uzogira ubgenge, Arik’ ūcudika n’ibipfu azokomereka." 
Proverbs13:21 Ivyago bikurikirana abanyavyaha, Arikw abagororotsi bazohērwa ivyiza." 
Proverbs13:22 Umunyangeso nziza araga n’ abuzukuru, Arik’ ubutunzi bg’umunyavyaha buba buziganirijwe umugororotsi." 
Proverbs13:23 Har’ indya nyinshi mu ndimiro z’imisito y’aboro, Ariko har’ abo zononekara kubgo kudakora ibiroranye kwabo." 
Proverbs13:24 Ūrinda umwana inkoni aba amwanse, Arik’ ūmukunda amuhana hakiri kare." 
Proverbs13:25 Umugororotsi ararya, umutima ugahāga, Arikw inda z’abanyakibi zamana inzara." 
Proverbs14:1 Umugore wese w’ubgenge yubaka urugo rwiwe, Arik’ uw’ igipfu arusambuza amaboko yiwe ubgiwe." 
Proverbs14:2 Ūgendera mu bugororotsi bgiwe yubaha Uhoraho, Arik’ ūgoramangika inzira ziwe aba amukēngereye." 
Proverbs14:3 Akanwa k’igipfu kamera inkoni yo gukubita ubgibone bgaco, Arikw iminwa y’abanyabgenge irabazigama." 
Proverbs14:4 Ah’ inka zitari ikigega cama gusa, Arik’ ukugwira kw’ibirimwa kuva ku nkomezi z’inka." 
Proverbs14:5 Icabona cizigirwa ntikibesha, Arikw icabona c’ibinyoma kivuga ibinyoma." 
Proverbs14:6 Umucokoranyi arondera ubgenge ntabubone, Arik’ ukumenya kuroroshe ku muntu akerebutse." 
Proverbs14:7 Va imbere y’igipfu, Kukw ata minwa y’ubgenge uzomubonana." 
Proverbs14:8 Ubgenge bg’uwitonda bumumenyesha inzira yiwe, Arik’ ubupfu bg’ibipfu burabihenda." 
Proverbs14:9 Ibipfu bikinisha icaha, Mu bagororotsi har’ ugushimwa." 
Proverbs14:10 Umutima wimenyera uwawo mubabaro, Kand’ umunezero wawo umunyamahanga ntashobora kuwītamwo." 
Proverbs14:11 Inzu y’abanyakibi izoheneberezwa, Arik’ urugo rw’abagororotsi ruzogira umugisha." 
Proverbs14:12 Harih’ inzira umuntu yibgira kw ari nziza, Arikw amaherezo yayo n’ inzira ishikana mu rupfu." 
Proverbs14:13 No mu gutwenga umutima ushobora kubabara, Kand’ iherezo ry’ibitwengo rikaba amaganya." 
Proverbs14:14 Ūsubira inyuma mu mutima wiwe azohāzwa n’inzira ziwe ubgiwe, Umuntu mwiza na we azohāzwa n’ibikorwa vyiwe." 
Proverbs14:15 Imburabgenge yemera ijambo ryose, Arik’ umunyamakenga agenda agavye." 
Proverbs14:16 Umuntu w’ubgenge ariyubara, agahunga ibibi, Arikw igipfu cidudarika, kikiremesha." 
Proverbs14:17 Ikirandamuke gikora ivy’ ubupfu, Kand’ umuntu w’akazīkira baramwanka." 
Proverbs14:18 Imburabgenge ziragwa ubupfu, Arikw abanyamakenga bambikwa ibitsibo vy’ubgenge." 
Proverbs14:19 Ababi bacira bugufi abeza, N’abanyavyaha bicisha bugufi ku marembo y’abagororotsi." 
Proverbs14:20 Umworo arankwa gushitsa no ku mubanyi, Arik’ umutunzi agira abakunzi benshi." 
Proverbs14:21 Ūkēngēra umubanyi aba acumuye, Arik’ ūgirira akagongwe impahazwa aba ahiriwe." 
Proverbs14:22 Abigenera ikibi mbega ntibaba bazimiye? Arikw abigenera iciza, imbabazi n’ukuri bizobazako." 
Proverbs14:23 Ubutame bg’ibikorwa vyose bugira umugwiza, Ariko gupfa kubomboranya amanwa kuzana ubgoro gusa." 
Proverbs14:24 Igitsibo c’abanyabgenge n’ ubutunzi bgabo, Arik’ ubupfu bg’ibipfu n’ ubupfu nyene." 
Proverbs14:25 Icabona c’ukuri kirokora ubugingo bg’abantu, Arik’ ūvuga ibinyoma arabaroha." 
Proverbs14:26 Kwubaha Uhoraho n’icizigiro gikomeye, Kand’ abana biwe bazogira ubuhungiro." 
Proverbs14:27 Kwubaha Uhoraho n’isōko y’ubugingo, Gukūra mu mitego y’urupfu." 
Proverbs14:28 Icubahiro c’umwami giterwa n’ubginshi bg’abantu, Arik’ uguhenebera kwa segaba guterwa no kubura abantu." 
Proverbs14:29 Ūteba kuraka aba ar’ umunyabgenge bginshi, Arikw ikirandamuke cīhaya ubupfu." 
Proverbs14:30 Umutima utekereje ni bgo bugingo bg’umubiri, Arikw ishari ni nk’ikimungu co mu magufa." 
Proverbs14:31 Ūnyikije umugorwa aba agaye Umuremyi wiwe, Arik’ ūgirira ikigongwe agakene, uwo we aba amwubashe." 
Proverbs14:32 Umunyakibi atsindwa hasi n’ugukora nabi kwiwe, Arik’ umugororotsi agira ivyizigiro mu rupfu rwiwe." 
Proverbs14:33 Ubgenge buguma mu mutima w’umuntu azi gutahura, Arikw ikir’ imbere mu nda y’ibipfu gica kimenyekana." 
Proverbs14:34 Ubugororotsi bushira ihanga hejuru, Arikw icaha gitukisha amoko." 
Proverbs14:35 Umwami atonesha umusavyi w’ubgenge, Arik’ uburake bgiwe buba ku muntu akora ibiterasoni." 
Proverbs15:1 Ukwishura kwiyoroheje guhwama uburake, Arikw ijambo ribabaza rivyura ishavu." 
Proverbs15:2 Ururimi rw’abanyabgenge rutonyanga ubgenge bubereye, Arikw akanwa k’ibipfu gasuka ubupfu." 
Proverbs15:3 Inyonga z’Uhoraho zir’ ahantu hose, Zītegereza ababi n’abeza." 
Proverbs15:4 Ururimi rwiza n’igiti c’ubugingo, Arik’ urugoreka n’akavunamutima." 
Proverbs15:5 Igipfu gikēngēra gutozwa indero nziza na se, Arik’ uwumvira igihano arakerebuka." 
Proverbs15:6 Mu nzu y’umugororotsi haba ubutunzi bginshi, Ariko mu nyungu z’umunyakibi habamw’ amagorwa." 
Proverbs15:7 Iminwa y’abanyabgenge ikwiza ubgenge, Arik’ umutima w’ibipfu si k’umeze." 
Proverbs15:8 Ikimazi abanyakibi batanga n’ igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw ahimbarwa n’ugusenga kw’abagororotsi." 
Proverbs15:9 Inzira y’umunyakibi n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw akunda ūkurikira ubugororotsi." 
Proverbs15:10 Har’ igihano gihambaye ku muntu ata inzira, Kand’ uwanka guhanwa azopfa." 
Proverbs15:11 I kuzimu n’amahonero bigaragarira Uhoraho, Non’ imitima y’abana b’abantu ntirushirije kumugaragarira?" 
Proverbs15:12 Umucokoranyi ntakunda igihano, Kandi ntagendera abanyabgenge." 
Proverbs15:13 Umutima unezerewe ukesha mu maso, Arik’ umubabaro wo mu mutima usāvya umushaha." 
Proverbs15:14 Umutima w’ūfise ubgenge urondera kumenya, Arikw akanwa k’ibipfu kandavura ivy’ ubupfu." 
Proverbs15:15 Imisi y’umunyamubabaro ni mibi yose, Arik’ uw’ umutima ukeye yamana ibinoboye." 
Proverbs15:16 Ibike birimwo kwubaha Uhoraho Biruta ubutunzi bginshi burimwo guhagarika umutima. 
Proverbs15:17 Ingaburo y’imboga irimw’ urukundo Iruta inyama z’inka inuze zirimw’ urwanko. 
Proverbs15:18 Umuntu w’inkazi avyura ibihāri, Arik’ ūteba kuraka ahwamika imitongano." 
Proverbs15:19 Inzira y’umunyabute ni nk’ umurombero w’amahwa, Arikw inzira y’abagororotsi n’ umuharuro." 
Proverbs15:20 Umwana w’ubgenge anezereza se, Arik’ umuntu gito akēngēra nyina." 
Proverbs15:21 Ubupfu bunezereza igipfamutima, Arik’ umuntu w’ubgenge atunganya ingendo ziwe." 
Proverbs15:22 Ahatagira inama imigabo irapfa, Ariko mu bajanama benshi irakomera." 
Proverbs15:23 Umuntu anezererwa ukwishura kw’akanwa kiwe, Kand’ ijambo riziye mu gihe kibereye, ewe kuntu ari ryiza!" 
Proverbs15:24 Ku munyabgenge inzira y’ ubugingo idūga irora hejuru, Kugira ngw atandukane n’i kuzimu i bgina." 
Proverbs15:25 Uhoraho asambura inzu y’ umwibone, Arikw akomeza urubibe rw’ umupfakazi." 
Proverbs15:26 Akazīkira n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Arikw amajambo y’igikundiro imbere yiwe ntagira akarohe." 
Proverbs15:27 Umuntu ahahamira inyungu atera imivurungano inzu yiwe, Arik’ uwanka ingurire azoramba." 
Proverbs15:28 Umutima w’umugororotsi witondera ivyo wishura, Arikw akanwa k’abanyakibi gasuka ibibi." 
Proverbs15:29 Uhoraho aba kure y’abanyakibi, Ariko yumva ugusenga kw’ abagororotsi." 
Proverbs15:30 Mu maso hakeye hanezereza umutima, Kand’ inkuru nziza zishira imisokōro mu magufa." 
Proverbs15:31 Ūtega ugutwi ngo yumve uguhanūrwa kumushitsa ku bugingo Azobana n’abanyabgenge. 
Proverbs15:32 Uwanka guhanwa aba akēngereye ubgiwe bugingo, Arik’ uwumvira ivyo ahanūwe aronka ubgenge." 
Proverbs15:33 Ukwubaha Uhoraho kwigisha ubgenge, Kand’ ukwicisha bugufi kwitangira imbere y’ukwubahwa." 
Proverbs16:1 Inama umutima wigeneye n’iy’ umuntu, Arikw ivyo ururimi rwishura biva k’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs16:2 Ingendo zose z’umuntu ziba izitunganye mu maso yiwe ubgiwe, Arik’ Uhoraho agera imishaha ku munzane." 
Proverbs16:3 Uremeke Uhoraho ibikorwa vyawe, Ni ho imigabo yawe izokomera." 
Proverbs16:4 Uhoraho yaremye ikintu cose ngo kigire ico gikora, Mbere n’abanyakibi na bo yabashizeho ngo babone umusi mubi." 
Proverbs16:5 Umuntu wese w’ubgibone mu mutima n’igisesema k’Uhoraho; Vy’ukuri akazobura guhanwa! 
Proverbs16:6 Ibigabitanyo bikūrwaho n’ imbabazi n’ukuri, Kand’ abantu bakūrwa mu bibi no kwubaha Uhoraho." 
Proverbs16:7 Inzira z’umuntu iyo zihimbaye Uhoraho Atuma n’abansi biwe buzura na we. 
Proverbs16:8 Ibike birimw’ ubugororotsi Biruta inyungu nyinshi zirimwo kugabitanya. 
Proverbs16:9 Umutima w’umuntu wigerera inzira yiwe, Arik’ Uhoraho ni we atumbereza ibirenge vyiwe." 
Proverbs16:10 Amajambo y’ubumenyi ari mu minwa y’umwami, Akanwa kiwe nta ho kagoramika imanza." 
Proverbs16:11 Ibigeresho n’iminzane bishitse n’ivy’ Uhoraho, Amabuye yose agera yo mw isaho n’igikorwa ciwe." 
Proverbs16:12 N’ikizira ku bami gukora ikibi, Kukw ingoma ikomezwa n’ ubugororotsi." 
Proverbs16:13 Abami bahimbarwa n’iminwa y’ubugororotsi, Kandi bakunda ūvuga ibiroranye." 
Proverbs16:14 Uburake bg’umwami ni nk’ intumwa zo kugeseza, Arik’ umuntu w’umunyabgenge arabuhwamika." 
Proverbs16:15 Mu nyonga h’umwami iyo hakeye haba ubugingo, Kandi gutonesha kwiwe ni nk’igicu kigwa imvura y’ agatāsi." 
Proverbs16:16 Ewe kuronka ubgenge ukuntu kuruta kuronka izahabu! Mbere guca ubgenge n’ico guhitamwo kuruta ifeza. 
Proverbs16:17 Inzira y’igihamo y’abagororotsi n’ukwitandukanya n’ikibi; Uwirinda mu nzira yiwe akiza ubugingo bgiwe. 
Proverbs16:18 Ubgibone bgitangira imbere y’uguhona, Kand’ umutima wihaya witangira imbere y’ukugwa." 
Proverbs16:19 Kugira umutima wicishije bugufi ugafatanya n’abagorwa Biruta kugabangana iminyago ufatanije n’abibone. 
Proverbs16:20 Ūshira umutima kw ijambo azobona ivyiza, Kand’ uwizigira Uhoraho aba ahiriwe." 
Proverbs16:21 Uw’ ubgenge mu mutima azokwitwa umukerebutsi, Kandi n’iminwa ivuga ibiryoshe yungura ubgenge." 
Proverbs16:22 Ugutahura n’isōko y’ubugingo k’ūgufise, Kand’ igihana ibipfu n’ubupfu bgavyo." 
Proverbs16:23 Umutima w’umunyabgenge wigisha akanwa kiwe, Ukungura ubgenge bg’iminwa yiwe." 
Proverbs16:24 Amajambo aryoshe ni nk’ umutsāma w’ikigigu, Asōsera umutima, anonora amagufa." 
Proverbs16:25 Harih’ inzira umuntu yibgira kw ari nziza, Arikw amaherezo yayo n’inzira ishikana mu rupfu." 
Proverbs16:26 Inda y’ūkora ni yo imukoresha, Kukw akanwa kiwe kamusaba." 
Proverbs16:27 Umuntu w’umugarariji yimba ivyago, Kandi mu minwa yiwe harimw’ umuriro w’inkazi." 
Proverbs16:28 Umuntu w’ikigoryi yandurutsa intonganya, Kand’ ūneguranira mu vyongorerano atandukanya abakundana cane." 
Proverbs16:29 Umuntu w’ikirara yosha mugenzi we, Amujana mu nzira itari nziza." 
Proverbs16:30 Ūteranya amaso ngo yigerere ibigoramye, Agafumbanya iminwa, ni we ashitsa ibibi." 
Proverbs16:31 Imvi ku mutwe n’igitsibo c’ icubahiro, Kiboneka mu nzira y’ubugororotsi." 
Proverbs16:32 Ūteba kuraka aruta umunyenkomezi, Kand’ ūganza umutima wiwe aruta ūnesheje igisagara." 
Proverbs16:33 Utwo bapfindisha baduterera mu mpuzu zo mu gikiriza, Arik’ uko bigenda kwose bigerwa n’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs17:1 Indumange irimw’ amahoro Iruta ibinoboye vyuzuye inzu birimw’ imitongano. 
Proverbs17:2 Umushumba w’ubgenge bazomureresha umwana w’ agatētereza, Kand’ azogira umugabane mu biragwa hamwe na ben’ umwandu." 
Proverbs17:3 Inkono yo mu ruganda iteka ifeza, n’umuriro uvugutira izahabu, Arik’ ūgerageza imitima n’ Uhoraho." 
Proverbs17:4 Inkozi y’ikibi ishira umutima ku minwa y’ibibi, Kand’ umunyabinyoma atega ugutwi ururimi rw’akazīkira." 
Proverbs17:5 Ūcokora umworo aba agaye Umuremyi wiwe, Kand’ ūnezerezwa n’ivyago vy’ uwundi ntazobura guhanwa." 
Proverbs17:6 Abuzukuru ni bo gitsibo c’ abatāma, Kand’ icubahiro c’abana ni ba se." 
Proverbs17:7 Amajambo aroranye kw’atabereye igipfu, Non’ iminwa y’ibinyoma ntirushirije kuba iyitabereye ku mupfa soni?" 
Proverbs17:8 Ingabire ni nk’akabuyenge k’ igiciro kinini mu maso y’ ūyihawe, Ah’ agiye hose agira ukuboko kwiza." 
Proverbs17:9 Ūpfuka igicumuro aba arondera urukundo, Arik’ ūhoza ikintu mu kanwa atandukanya abakundana cane." 
Proverbs17:10 Umuntu afise ubgenge iy’ ahambariwe bimushika kure Kurusha ukw inkoni ijana zishika ku gipfu. 
Proverbs17:11 Umuntu w’umunyakibi arondera ubugarariji gusa, Arik’ umutahe w’imburakigongwe azotumwa kuri we." 
Proverbs17:12 Umuntu yopfuma ahūra n’ igikōko citwa idubu ciciwe ibibgana vyaco, Hakw ahūrira n’igipfu mu bupfu bgaco." 
Proverbs17:13 Uwishura iciza ikibi, Ikibi ntikizoruha kiva ku nzu yiwe." 
Proverbs17:14 Gutangura imitongano ni nko kugomorora amazi, Nuko reka ibirake utarasinda." 
Proverbs17:15 Ūtsindanishiriza umunyakibi, bo n’ūtsindisha umugororotsi Bompi nyene n’igisesema k’ Uhoraho." 
Proverbs17:16 Igipfu bikimariye iki kugira ibiguzi mu ntoke ngo kigure ubgenge, Kandi kitagira umutima?" 
Proverbs17:17 Umukunzi akundana ibihe vyose, Kandi yavukiye kukubera nk’ uwo muvukana mu magorwa." 
Proverbs17:18 Umuntu atagira umutima yishira mu ndahiro, Akigira ishinga imbere ya mugenzi we." 
Proverbs17:19 Ūkunda gutongana aba akunda kugabitanya; Uwubaka ibirimba kw irembo ryiwe aba yikwegeye kugesezwa. 
Proverbs17:20 Ūfise umutima udadika nta ciza abona, Kand’ ūfise ururimi rudambikanya agwa mu vyago." 
Proverbs17:21 Ūvyaye igipfu aba yizaniye intuntu, Kandi se w’ikijuju nta munezero agira." 
Proverbs17:22 Umutima unezerewe n’umuti ukiza, Arik’ umutima usāvye wumisha amagufa." 
Proverbs17:23 Umuntu w’umunyakibi agoborora ingurire mu kwaha Kugira ngw agoreke inzira z’ imanza. 
Proverbs17:24 Ubgenge bur’ imbere y’ūkerebutse, Arikw amaso y’igipfu agenda ajarajara gushitsa ku mpera z’isi." 
Proverbs17:25 Umwana w’igipfu n’umubabaro kuri se, Kandi n’agaterantuntu kuri nyina yamuvyaye." 
Proverbs17:26 Si vyiza gucira igihano umugororotsi, Canke gukubitira abapfasoni ubugororotsi bgabo." 
Proverbs17:27 Ūvuga make aba ar’ ubgenge, Kand’ umugwaneza aba ar’ umuntu afise umutima." 
Proverbs17:28 N’igipfu na co, iyo ciyihorereye, bacita umunyabgenge, Iyo kibumvye iminwa bacita uwitonda." 
Proverbs18:1 Uwigungira ukwiwe aba arondera ivyo yiharije gusa, Kand’ arwanya inama nziza zose." 
Proverbs18:2 Igipfu ntigihimbarwa n’ubgenge, Ariko gihimbarwa no kwiyerekana uko kimeze mu mutima." 
Proverbs18:3 Umunyakibi iy’ aje, ukugayana kuba kuje, Kand’ agatētereza kazanana n’ ibitutsi." 
Proverbs18:4 Amajambo yo mu kanwa k’ umuntu ni nk’amazi y’ibenga, Isōko y’ubgenge ni nk’akūzi gasūma." 
Proverbs18:5 Mu manza si vyiza gutinya umunyakibi ku kigohe, Canke gutsindisha umugororotsi." 
Proverbs18:6 Iminwa y’igipfu ija mu bihāri, Kand’ akanwa kaco kagihamagarira inkoni." 
Proverbs18:7 Akanwa k’igipfu ni kwo kuranduka kwaco, Kand’ iminwa yaco ni yo mutego w’ubugingo bgaco." 
Proverbs18:8 Amagambo y’ūneguranira mu vyongorerano ni nk’ivyo kurya biryoshe, Bimanuka bija epfo mu nda." 
Proverbs18:9 Kand’ ūdeha mu gikorwa ciwe Aba ar’ incuti y’ūtikiza. 
Proverbs18:10 Izina ry’Uhoraho n’umunara ukomeye: Umugororotsi awirukiramwo, akaba amahoro." 
Proverbs18:11 Itunga ry’umutunzi kuri we n’igisagara gikomeye, Uko yiyumvira ni nk’uruzitiro rugera hejuru." 
Proverbs18:12 Uwishira hejuru mu mutima, agatikizo azogasanga imbere, Kand’ ukwicisha bugufi kuzosanga imbere icubahiro." 
Proverbs18:13 Ūwishura atarumva Bimubera ubupfu n’agatētereza. 
Proverbs18:14 Umutima w’umuntu umushigikira mu magara make, Arik’ umutima wihebuye ni nde yoshobora kuwuremesha?" 
Proverbs18:15 Umutima w’umukerebutsi uronka ubgenge, N’ugutwi kw’abanyabgenge na kwo ni co kurondera." 
Proverbs18:16 Ishikanwa ry’umuntu rimuronkera akayira, Rimushitsa imbere y’abahambaye." 
Proverbs18:17 Ūbanza kwitwara, umengo ni we afise urubanza, Arik’ uwo babūrana yaza akamwararaza." 
Proverbs18:18 Ubupfindo bumara ibihāri, Kandi butātūra abakomeye." 
Proverbs18:19 Uwo muvukana iy’ umukomeretseko bigora kumugarura kurusha kunesha igisagara gikomeye, Kand’ ibitāti ben’ ivyo bimeze nk’ibihindizo vyugara inzu y’igihome." 
Proverbs18:20 Inda y’umuntu ihāzwa n’ibivuye mu kanwa kiwe, Kand’ azohāga ukugwira kwo mu minwa yiwe." 
Proverbs18:21 Urupfu n’ubugingo biri mu bubasha bg’ururimi, Kand’ abarukunda bazorya ivyo rwamye." 
Proverbs18:22 Ūronse umugore aba aronse ikintu ciza, Kand’ aba aronse ingabire k’ Uhoraho." 
Proverbs18:23 Umworo akoma ibōbo, Arik’ umutunzi we yishurana ubugabo." 
Proverbs18:24 Ūcuditse na benshi aba yizaniye guhenebera, Ariko har’ umukunzi yimatanya n’umuntu kurusha ūvukana na we." 
Proverbs19:1 Umworo agendera mu gutungana kwiwe Aruta uw’ iminwa idambikanya kandi w’igipfu. 
Proverbs19:2 Ikindi, umutima kutagira ubgenge si vyiza, Kand’ ūgenda yihutagiza ahusha inzira." 
Proverbs19:3 Ubupfu bg’umuntu bugoramika inzira yiwe, Kand’ umutima wiwe ugirira Uhoraho umwikomo." 
Proverbs19:4 Ubutunzi bugwiza abagenzi, Arik’ umworo we, umugenzi yitandukanya na we." 
Proverbs19:5 Icabona c’ibinyoma ntikizobura guhanwa, Kand’ ūvuga ivy’ ubuhūmvyi ntazokira." 
Proverbs19:6 Benshi bashemagiza ūtanga isābagire, Kand’ umuntu wese aba umugenzi w’ūkunda kugaba." 
Proverbs19:7 Umworo we, abavukana na we bose baramwanka: Non’ abagenzi biwe ntibarushiriza kumwiyambura? Akoma ibōbo inyuma yabo, na bo bakīgīra." 
Proverbs19:8 Ūwironkera ubgenge aba akunda ubugingo bgiwe, Kand’ ūzigama ubukerebutsi bgiwe azobona ivyiza." 
Proverbs19:9 Icabona c’ibinyoma ntikizobura guhanwa, Kand’ ūvuga ivy’ ubuhūmvyi azoranduka." 
Proverbs19:10 Kudibama ntikubereye igipfu, Non’ umushumba kuganza abaganwa ntikurushirije kutabera?" 
Proverbs19:11 Kwitonda kw’umuntu kumutera guteba kuraka, Kand’ icubahiro ciwe n’ukwirengagiza ico yacumuweko." 
Proverbs19:12 Uburake bg’umwami ni nk’ ukwivuga kw’intambge, Arikw ineza yiwe ni nk’ikime gihēmbūra ivyatsi." 
Proverbs19:13 Umwana gito n’icago kuri se, Kand’ ugutongana kw’umugore ni nk’amatonyanga adahengeshanya." 
Proverbs19:14 Urugo bo n’itunga umuntu abiragwa n’abavyeyi, Arik’ umugore aciye ubgenge amuhabga n’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs19:15 Ubunebge butera itiro ryinshi, Kand’ umunyabute azogira inzara." 
Proverbs19:16 Uwitondera icagezwe aba azigamye ubugingo bgiwe, Arik’ ūtitwaririka inzira ziwe azopfa." 
Proverbs19:17 Ūgirira akagongwe umugorwa aba agurānye Uhoraho, Kand’ ukugira neza kwiwe azokumwishura." 
Proverbs19:18 Hana umwana wawe igihe c’ ivyizigiro kitararengerana, Ariko ntutwarwe n’ishavu ng’ umwice." 
Proverbs19:19 Umuntu w’ishavu ryinshi azorihōrwa, Kandi naho womutabara uzoba ukwiye gusubīra." 
Proverbs19:20 Wumvire inama, wemere kwigishwa, Kugira ng’ ube umunyabgenge mu bihe vyo hanyuma." 
Proverbs19:21 Mu mutima w’umuntu haba imigabo myinshi, Arikw inama y’Uhoraho ni yo izoguma." 
Proverbs19:22 Ineza y’umuntu ni yo ituma akundwa, Wopfuma uba umworo hak’ uba umubeshi." 
Proverbs19:23 Kwubaha Uhoraho kuzana ubugingo, Kand’ ūmwubaha azorāra ahāze; Ivyago ntibizomutera." 
Proverbs19:24 Ikiremare kirokeza ukuboko mu nkōko, Ntikinagukūreyo ngo kikuzane ku munwa." 
Proverbs19:25 Kubita umucokoranyi, maz’ imburabgenge izokerebuka, Uhanūre ūri n’umutima, na we azotahura ubgenge." 
Proverbs19:26 Ūnyaga se akirukana nyina N’umwana w’agatētereza kandi w’agatukisha. 
Proverbs19:27 Mwana wanje, reka kurinda kwumviriza gutozwa indero nziza, Namb’ ugomba guta amajambo y’ubgenge." 
Proverbs19:28 Icabona c’ikidambidambi gitwengera imanza mw ijigo, Kand’ akanwa k’abanyakibi kamira miyonzwa ibigabitanyo." 
Proverbs19:29 Ibihano vyagerewe abacokoranyi, Kandi n’inkoni zagerewe ibitugu vy’ibipfu." 
Proverbs20:1 Vino ni yo mucokoranyi, ibiboreza ni vyo ruyogoyogo, Kand’ ūbidandabagiranamwo wese ntagira ubgenge." 
Proverbs20:2 Ugushangashirwa kw’umwami ni nk’ukwivuga kw’ intambge, Ūmurakije aba yicishije umutwe." 
Proverbs20:3 Umuntu bimubera icubahiro kwitandukanya n’imitongano, Arikw igipfu cose giterekērwa no gusinda." 
Proverbs20:4 Mu gihe c’imbeho umunebge ntakunda kurima, Ni co gituma mw iyimbura aja gusēgerereza ntagire ico aronka." 
Proverbs20:5 Inama yo mu mutima w’ umuntu ni nk’amazi yo hasi mw ibenga, Arik’ umuntu w’umunyabgenge arayivoma." 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu benshi bakunda kwirata, umuntu wese akirata ukugira neza kwiwe, Non’ umwizigirwa ni nde yomubona?" 
Proverbs20:7 Umugororotsi agendera mu gutungana kwiwe, Hahirwa abana biwe azosiga." 
Proverbs20:8 Umwami avyagiye ku ntebe y’ imanza Agosōza ikibi cose inyonga ziwe. 
Proverbs20:9 Ni nde yoshobora kuvuga, ati Niyogeje umutima, Nihumanuye icaha canje?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ibilo bitangana n’ibigeresho bitangana Vyompi n’igisesema k’Uhoraho. 
Proverbs20:11 Kandi n’umwana amenyekanira ku vyo akora, Kw ingeso ziwe zizotungana zikaba nziza." 
Proverbs20:12 Ugutwi kwumva n’ijisho ribona Uhoraho ni we yabiremye vyompi. 
Proverbs20:13 Ntugakunde kuryāmīra, kugira ng’ ubgoro ntibugutere, Kanura, ni ho uzobona ivyo kurya biguhāgije." 
Proverbs20:14 Nta co kimaze, nta co kimaze! ni k’umuguzi avuga; Arikw amaze kugenda ni ho yishima." 
Proverbs20:15 Izahabu ziriho, n’ubukenuke bg’utubuyenge twitwa marijani, Arikw iminwa y’ubgenge aba ar’ utugenegene tw’igiciro." 
Proverbs20:16 Twara impuzu y’uwishinze uwo atazi, Wake ingwati uwishinze abandi." 
Proverbs20:17 Indya z’ibinyoma ziraryohera umuntu, Ariko hanyuma zikamuhindukira urusekebuye mu kanwa." 
Proverbs20:18 Imigabo yose ikomezwa n’ inama, Kandi mu kuja mu ntambara urōngōrwe n’inama y’ubgenge." 
Proverbs20:19 Ūgendagenda ar’ indanyangu amena amabanga, Nuko ntukifatanye n’ikirofoke." 
Proverbs20:20 Ūvuma se canke nyina Itara ryiwe rizozimirizwa mu mwiza w’umuzitanya. 
Proverbs20:21 Umwandu utoranywe mu maguru masha, Hanyuma nta mugisha ugira." 
Proverbs20:22 Ntukavuge, uti Nzokwihōra ikibi nagiriwe: Ni witege Uhoraho, ni we azogukiza." 
Proverbs20:23 Ibilo bitangana n’igisesema k’Uhoraho, Kand’ umunzane w’ibinyoma si mwiza." 
Proverbs20:24 Urugendo rw’umuntu ruva k’ Uhoraho; Non’ umuntu buntu yotahura inzira yiwe ate? 
Proverbs20:25 N’umutego ku muntu gupfa gutuntumukana ikintu, akavuga, ati N’icera, Maz’ ahejeje kwishira mw isezerano, akībaza." 
Proverbs20:26 Umwami w’ubgenge akebanya abanyakibi, Akabanywagisha ikibando." 
Proverbs20:27 Impwemu yo mu muntu n’ itara ry’Uhoraho, Risesangura hose mu bgigobeko bg’umutima." 
Proverbs20:28 Imbabazi n’ukuri ni vyo bizigama umwami, Kand’ ingoma yiwe ihangamishwa n’imbabazi." 
Proverbs20:29 Ubutōre bg’imisore ni bgo nkomezi zabo, Kand’ icubahiro c’abatāma n’imvi." 
Proverbs20:30 Inkoni ziciye inguma zivūra ikibi, Bo n’imimyore inyengetereye imbere mu mutima." 
Proverbs21:1 Umutima w’umwami uri mu kuboko kw’Uhoraho nk’umugende w’amazi; Awukwegera ah’ agomba hose. 
Proverbs21:2 Inzira yose y’umuntu iba nziza mu maso yiwe ubgiwe, Arik’ Uhoraho agera imitima ku munzane." 
Proverbs21:3 Gukora ivy’ ukugororoka no guca izibereye Ni vyo bihimbara Uhoraho kurusha gutanga ibimazi. 
Proverbs21:4 Ijisho ry’agakēngērwe n’umutima w’ubgibone Bo n’itara ry’abanyakibi n’ icaha. 
Proverbs21:5 Ivyiyumviro vy’umunyamwete bizana ubukenuke gusa, Arik’ umuntu wese ahutagiza bimuzanira ubukene gusa." 
Proverbs21:6 Kuronkesha ubutunzi ururimi rw’ibinyoma Ni nk’umuyaga uhita; ababurondera baba barondeye urupfu. 
Proverbs21:7 Amanyama y’abanyakibi azobavumbura, Kuko banse gukora ibiroranye." 
Proverbs21:8 Inzira y’ūremerewe n’ibigabitanyo iba igoramanze, Arik’ ūtunganye we, igikorwa ciwe kiba kigororotse." 
Proverbs21:9 Wopfuma wībēra hanze, Hak’ ubana n’umugore w’ ingāre mu nzu." 
Proverbs21:10 Umutima w’umunyakibi wifuza ikibi; Amaso yiwe ntagirira imbabazi mugenzi we. 
Proverbs21:11 Umucokoranyi iy’ ahanwe imburabgenge ica ubgenge, Kand’ umunyabgenge iy’ atojwe indero nziza arakerebuka." 
Proverbs21:12 Har’ umugororotsi yitegereza inzu y’umunyakibi, Ari we acuranguriza abanyakibi mu mahonero." 
Proverbs21:13 Uwiziba amatwi umugorwa atakamba, Na we nyene azotakamba ntiyumvirizwe." 
Proverbs21:14 Impēra yo mu kinyegero ihwamika uburake, N’ingurire igoborowe mu kwaha ihwamika ishavu ryinshi." 
Proverbs21:15 Imanza ziroranye zibera umugororotsi umunezero, Arikw abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya zibabera akaranduramutima." 
Proverbs21:16 Umuntu ahusha inzira y’ ubgenge Itahiriro ryiwe ni mw ikoraniro ry’abāpfuye. 
Proverbs21:17 Uwishinga akayāgīriro azocika umukene, Kand’ inkunzi ya vino n’amavuta ntizoba umutunzi." 
Proverbs21:18 Umunyakibi aba incungu y’ umugororotsi, Kand’ igihemu kigwa mu mpōrero y’aberanda." 
Proverbs21:19 Wopfuma uba mu gihugu c’ ubugaragwa, Hak’ ubana n’umugore w’ ingāre yitoraguza." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu rugo rw’umunyabgenge har’ ubutunzi bg’igiciro kinini n’amavuta, Arikw igipfu co, kirabirokagiza." 
Proverbs21:21 Uwitwaririka ivy’ ubugororotsi n’imbabazi Aronka ubugingo n’ubugororotsi n’icubahiro. 
Proverbs21:22 Umunyabgenge yūrira inzitiro z’igisagara c’abahizi, Agasangangura ibikomeye bāri bizigiye." 
Proverbs21:23 Ūrinda akanwa kiwe n’ururimi rwiwe, Umutima wiwe aba awurinze amagorwa." 
Proverbs21:24 Umwibone yihayagiza, izina ryiwe ni Mucokoranyi; Akorana ubugabo bg’ubgibone." 
Proverbs21:25 Ukwifuza kw’umunyabute kuramwica, Kukw amaboko yiwe yanka kuruha." 
Proverbs21:26 Har’ uwifuza afise igihahamizi bukarinda bgira, Arik’ umugororotsi atanga ata kinubge." 
Proverbs21:27 Ikimazi abanyakibi batanga kirasesema: Mbeg’ iy’ akizananye umutima mubi, ntikirushiriza kuba igisesema?" 
Proverbs21:28 Icabona c’ibinyoma kizoranduka, Arik’ umuntu yumva neza azovuga ata kimutēsha." 
Proverbs21:29 Umuntu w’umunyakibi nta dusoni agira mu maso, Arik’ umugororotsi yitondera inzira ziwe." 
Proverbs21:30 Ubgenge cank’ ukumenya Cank’ inama, biba ar’ ubusa imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs21:31 Ifarasi itegurirwa umusi w’ intambara, Arik’ ukunesha kuva k’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs22:1 Kuvugwa neza kuruta kugira ubutunzi bginshi, Kandi kuba rurangwa kuruta kugira ifeza n’izahabu." 
Proverbs22:2 Umutunzi n’umworo barahūra: Uhoraho ni we yabaremye bompi. 
Proverbs22:3 Umunyamakenga iy’ abonye ikibi kije, arīkinga, Arikw imburabgenge zikomeza inzira zikīgabura." 
Proverbs22:4 Ingero z’ukwicisha bugufi bo n’ukwubaha Uhoraho Ni zo butunzi n’icubahiro n’ubugingo. 
Proverbs22:5 Amahwa n’imitego biri mu nzira y’ikigoryi, Arik’ ūrinda ubugingo bgiwe azobica kure." 
Proverbs22:6 Toza umwana indero akwiye kwamana, Azorinda asāza atarayivamwo." 
Proverbs22:7 Umutunzi atwaza aboro amanyama, Kand’ uwariye umwenda aba umushumba w’uwo yawuririye." 
Proverbs22:8 Ūbivye ukugabitanya yimbura ivyago, Kand’ inkoni y’uburake bgiwe izovunika." 
Proverbs22:9 Ūrābana ijisho ry’irinyabuntu azohabga umugisha, Kukw aha umugorwa ku vyo kurya vyiwe." 
Proverbs22:10 Sohora umucokoranyi, imitongano na yo irasohoka, Mber’ ugurtyozanya n’agatētereza bica bishira." 
Proverbs22:11 Ūkunda umutima utanduye, Akagira ubuntu mu minwa yiwe, azoba umutoni w’ umwami." 
Proverbs22:12 Inyonga z’Uhoraho zizigama ūfise ubgenge, Arikw amagambo y’igihemu arayatītūra." 
Proverbs22:13 Umunyabute aravuga, ati Hanze har’ intambge: Nogwa mu nzira." 
Proverbs22:14 Akanwa k’abagore b’ivyigenze n’urusumanyenzi rurerure: Kand’ uwo Uhoraho yazinutswe azorugwamwo. 
Proverbs22:15 Ubupfu buba buhambiriwe ku mutima w’umwana, Arikw inkoni y’uguhana izobgirukanira kure yiwe." 
Proverbs22:16 Ūnyikiza umugorwa aba amugwirije, Kand’ ūgabira umutunzi, aba amukehereje." 
Proverbs22:17 Tega ugutwi, wumvire amajambo y’abanyabgenge, Kand’ ushire umutima ku kumenya kwanje." 
Proverbs22:18 N’ic’ umunezero ni wayabīka muri wewe, Agahora rwose mu kanwa kawe." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndayakumenyesheje uyu musi, wewe ubgawe, Kugira ngw ivyizigiro vyawe bibe k’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs22:20 Mbega sinakwandikiye ivyiza Vyo kukugīra inama n’ivyo kumenya ubgenge," 
Proverbs22:21 Nkakumenyesha neza amajambo y’ukuri, Kugira ng’usubirane inyuma amajambo y’ukuri ku bāgutumye?" 
Proverbs22:22 Ntugasahure umugorwa kubg’ ubugorwa bgiwe, Kandi ntukanyikirize umurushwa mw ikombe." 
Proverbs22:23 Kuk’ Uhoraho azobabūranira, Abābanyaze azobanyaga ubugingo." 
Proverbs22:24 Ntugacudike n’ikirandamuke, Ntukagendane n’ikigārūke:" 
Proverbs22:25 Woye gutora inzira ziwe, Ugatega ubugingo bgawe umutego." 
Proverbs22:26 Ntukabe mu gitigiri c’abishira mu ndahiro, Canke mu c’abigira ishinga y’imyenda:" 
Proverbs22:27 Mbega ntuzi yuko ni wabura ico wishura Bazogutwara n’akariri uryamako? 
Proverbs22:28 Ntugashingūre akarimbi k’ urubibe rwa kera, Ba sogokuruza bashinze." 
Proverbs22:29 Ni wabona umuntu w’umunyamwete mu vyo akora, Ben’ uyo azokorera abami, Ntazokorera ba nyarucari." 
Proverbs23:1 Ni wicara gusangira n’ūganza, Ushinge ijisho uyo ar’ imbere yawe." 
Proverbs23:2 Asangwa ur’ umuntu w’inda ndende Wigarure, nk’ūhirikiwe imbugita kw izosi." 
Proverbs23:3 Ntugire umutima muke mu binoboye vyiwe, Kukw ar’ ivyo kurya vy’ uruhendo." 
Proverbs23:4 Ntiwirushe ng’ ube umutunzi, Reka kuvyigengeterereza." 
Proverbs23:5 Mbega wogumiza ijisho ku kiriko kirarenga? Kuk’ ubutunzi butobura kumera amababa, Nk’inkukuma iguruka itumbereye mw ijuru." 
Proverbs23:6 Ntukarye ivyo kurya vy’ umunyajisho ribi, Ntugire umutima muke mu binoboye vyiwe:" 
Proverbs23:7 Kuk’ uko yiyumvira mu mutima ari kw ameze: Araguhimiriza, ngo N’urye, n’unywe; Arik’ umutima wiwe udafatanije nawe." 
Proverbs23:8 Intore wariye uzoyidahwa, Akayāgo kawe karyoshe kazoba gapfuye ubusa." 
Proverbs23:9 Ntugire ico uvuga ikijuju cumva, Kukw azokēngēra ubgenge bgo mu majambo yawe." 
Proverbs23:10 Ntugashingūre akarimbi k’ urubibe rwa kera, Kandi ntukarye amatongo y’ impfuvyi;" 
Proverbs23:11 Kuk’ umucunguzi wazo ar’ Inyenkomezi, Izobūrana urwazo nawe." 
Proverbs23:12 Shira umutima ku gutozwa indero nziza, N’amatwi yawe ku majambo y’ubgenge." 
Proverbs23:13 Ntureke guhana umwana, Kukw atokwicwa n’uk’ umukubise inkoni." 
Proverbs23:14 Uz’ umukubite inkoni, Ni ho uzokiza ubugingo bgiwe ngo ntibuje i kuzimu." 
Proverbs23:15 Mwana wanje, umutima wawe ni wagira ubgenge Uwanje mutima bgite uzonezerwa," 
Proverbs23:16 Mber’ umushaha wanje uzohimbarwa Iminwa yawe ni yavuga ibiroranye. 
Proverbs23:17 Umutima wawe woye kugirira ishari abanyavyaha, Arik’ ugire ishaka ryo kwubaha Uhoraho burinde bgira." 
Proverbs23:18 Kuko vy’ukuri har’ ukuziga ibizoba, Kand’ ivyo wizigiye ntibizokūrwaho." 
Proverbs23:19 Mwana wanje, wumvirize, ugire ubgenge, Urōngōre umutima wawe mu nzira." 
Proverbs23:20 Ntukabe mu gitigiri c’abanohowe na vino, No mu c’abanyameru y’inyama:" 
Proverbs23:21 Kukw imborerwa n’umunyameru uburuhiro ar’ ugufūtāna, Kand’ itiro rizokwambika umuntu ubucocerwa." 
Proverbs23:22 Wumvire so yakuvyaye, Kandi ntugakēngēre nyoko ashitse mu butāmakazi." 
Proverbs23:23 Gura ukuri, ntugushōre; Bo n’ubgenge n’indero nziza n’ubukerebutsi." 
Proverbs23:24 Se w’umugororotsi azogira akanyamuneza kenshi, N’ūvyaye umwana w’ubgenge azomunezererwa." 
Proverbs23:25 So na nyoko ni banezerwe, Nyoko yakuvyaye n’ahimbarwe." 
Proverbs23:26 Mwana wanje, mpa umutima wawe, Kand’ amaso yawe ahimbarwe n’inzira zanje." 
Proverbs23:27 Kuko maraya ar’ urusumanyenzi rurerure, Kand’ umugore w’icigenze n’urwobo rw’imbōmbāne." 
Proverbs23:28 Mber’ abunda nk’umwambuzi, Atuma abanyabihemu bagwira mu bantu." 
Proverbs23:29 Ni nde agira ngo Yō! Ni nde agira ngw Agwē! Ni nde afise imitongano? Ni nde afise imyidodombo? Ni nde afise inguma ata nyanduruko? Ni nde afise amaso atukuye? 
Proverbs23:30 N’abatavīrīra vino, N’abaja kurondera izituriranije." 
Proverbs23:31 Ntukitegereze vino iy’ itukuye, Iy’ ica ibibatsi mu kirahuri, Igashōka neza:" 
Proverbs23:32 Uburuhiro iryana nk’inzoka, Igakomora nk’imvuvyi." 
Proverbs23:33 Amaso yawe ugahava uyarābisha abagore b’ivyīgenze, Umutima wawe ukavuga ibidadi;" 
Proverbs23:34 Mber’ ugaca umera nk’ūryamye hagati mu kiyaga, Canke nk’ūryamye ku mutwe w’umuringoti wo mu bgato." 
Proverbs23:35 Ukavuga, uti Bārankubise, sinababara, Bāranyegaguye, sinavyumva: Nzokwikangura ryari? Na ho nyene nzosubira kuyirondera." 
Proverbs24:1 Ntukagirire ishari abanyakibi, Kandi ntukifuze kubana na bo:" 
Proverbs24:2 Kuk’ umutima wabo wiyumvira guhonnya, Kand’ iminwa yabo ikavuga ivy’ ukugira nabi." 
Proverbs24:3 Ubgenge ni bgo bgubaka urugo, Kand’ ubukerebutsi ni bgo burukomeza;" 
Proverbs24:4 Guca ubgenge ni kwo kwuzuza inzu zo muri rwo Ubutunzi bgose bg’igiciro kinini kandi bg’igikundiro. 
Proverbs24:5 Umunyabgenge aba uw’ inkomezi, Mber’ umuntu aciye ubgenge yunguka ubushobozi." 
Proverbs24:6 Kuk’ uzoja mu ntambara urōngōwe n’inama y’ubgenge, Kandi mu nama ya benshi habonekamw’ agakiza." 
Proverbs24:7 Ubgenge buri hejuru, busiga igipfu: Ntigikūrak’ umunwa iyo kiri mw ikombe." 
Proverbs24:8 Uwigerera gukora ibibi Abantu bazomwita Kanyengunge. 
Proverbs24:9 Ivyiyumviro vy’igipfu n’ivyaha, Kand’ umucokoranyi n’igisesema ku bandi." 
Proverbs24:10 Ni wadendebukirwa ku musi w’ivyago Inkomezi zawe zizoba zari nke. 
Proverbs24:11 Urokore abo bashorewe bajanwa kwicwa, N’abagenda bacitse intege bajanwa gutikizwa, ntubure kubatabara." 
Proverbs24:12 Ni wavuga, ut’ Erega ntitwari tubizi: Mbeg’ Ūgera imitima ku munzane ntavyiyumvira? Kand’ Ūzigama ubugingo bgawe ntabizi? Mbega ntazokwishura umuntu wese ibikwiranye n’ivyo yakoze?" 
Proverbs24:13 Mwana wanje, uz’ urye ubūki, kukw ari bgiza, N’ikigigu kikuryohera mu kanwa." 
Proverbs24:14 Umenye kw ari k’ubgenge bumerera ubugingo bgawe: Asangwa warabubonye, har’ ukuziga ibizoba, Kand’ ivyo wizigiye ntibizokūrwaho." 
Proverbs24:15 Ewe munyakibi, ntukabunde ku rugo rw’umugororotsi, Ntugasangangure umuhana wiwe;" 
Proverbs24:16 Kuk’ umugororotsi n’iyo yogwa ibihetangabo ndwi, asubira kuvyuka, Arikw abanyakibi bazogwa mu vyago." 
Proverbs24:17 Umwansi wawe ni yagwa ntuz’ unezerwe, Umutima wawe woye guhimbarwa ni yatsitara:" 
Proverbs24:18 Uhoraho yoye guhava abibona, bikaba bibi mu nyonga ziwe, Akaroresha irya uburake yamurakiye." 
Proverbs24:19 Ntugashavuzwe n’ivy’ inkozi z’ibibi, Kandi ntukagirire ishari abanyakibi:" 
Proverbs24:20 Kukw ata kuziga ibizoba kw’umunyakibi; Itara ry’abanyavyaha rizozimwa. 
Proverbs24:21 Mwana wanje, utinye Uhoraho, bo n’umwami, Kandi ntukifatanye n’abagarariji:" 
Proverbs24:22 Kukw ivyago no kugeseza bivuye kur’ abo bompi bizoza giturumbuka, Kandi ni nde yobimenya?" 
Proverbs24:23 N’aya nyene n’amajambo y’ abanyabgenge. Mu manza si vyiza gutinya abantu ku kigohe. 
Proverbs24:24 Ūbarira umutsindwa ng’ Uratsinze, Amoko azomuvuma, amahanga azomwanka urunuka." 
Proverbs24:25 Arikw abamuhana bazogirirwa neza, Umugisha n’amahirwe bizobazako."
