Proverbs24:26 Uwishuye ibiroranye Biba bibaye nk’indamukanyo nziza. 
Proverbs24:27 Tunganya ibikorwa vyawe vyo hanze, Uvyiroranirize mu ndimiro, Hanyuma uz’ ubone kwubaka inzu." 
Proverbs24:28 Ntukāgirize mugenzawe ata nyanduruko, Kandi ntugahendanishe iminwa yawe." 
Proverbs24:29 Ntukavuge, uti Nzomusubiriza mu nkōko; Nzokwishura uyo muntu ibihwanye n’ivyo yakoze." 
Proverbs24:30 Naciye ku ndimiro y’umunebge, No ku ruzabibu rw’umuntu atagira umutima;" 
Proverbs24:31 Nasanze hose huzuyemw’ amahwa, Hose igisuru kirenze hejuru, Uruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye rusambūtse." 
Proverbs24:32 Ndahitegereje ndiyumvira cane, Ndabirāba, biranyigisha." 
Proverbs24:33 Guca agatiro gakeya, kuba urisinziriye gatoya, Kwisegura ukuboko gatoya wiboterere:" 
Proverbs24:34 Uko ni k’ubgoro bgawe buzogushikako nk’umwambuzi, N’ikigoyi kizogushikako nk’ umuntu w’umurwanyi." 
Proverbs25:1 N’iyi nyene n’imigani ya Salomo, iyo abantu ba Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda batoranije." 
Proverbs25:2 Imana guhisha ikintu, n’ icubahiro cayo, Arikw abami bo, guserangura ikintu, ni co cubahiro cabo." 
Proverbs25:3 Nk’ukw ijuru rigera hejuru cane, n’i bgina hakagera kure, Uko ni k’umutima w’abami udaserangurika." 
Proverbs25:4 Kūra inkamba mw ifeza, Ni ho hazovamw’ urwavya rutunganye." 
Proverbs25:5 Kūra abanyakibi imbere y’ umwami, Ni ho ingoma yiwe izohangama mu bugororotsi." 
Proverbs25:6 Ntiwikakishe mu nyonga z’ umwami, Kandi ntukirobeke mu bahambaye:" 
Proverbs25:7 Ivyoba vyiza n’uko bokubarira, bat’ Igira hino imbere, Hako bagusubiza inyuma imbere y’ūganza, Uwo amaso yawe yiboneye." 
Proverbs25:8 Ntukihutire kubūrana, Uburuhiro ntuz’ usange waguye mu rudubi, Mugenzawe amaze kukumāramāza." 
Proverbs25:9 Wītātūre na mugenzawe ubgiwe, Kandi ntumenere ibanga uwundi," 
Proverbs25:10 Ūvyumvise akagutuka, Ukaba wambaye ibara ritakuvako." 
Proverbs25:11 Ijambo rivuzwe mu buryo bubereye Ni nk’amacungwa y’izahabu ari mu tujishano tw’ifeza. 
Proverbs25:12 Ukw impeta y’izahabu imeze, bo n’utugenegene two kwambarwa tw’izahabu nziza, Ni k’umunyabgenge azi guhanura amerera ugutwi kwumva." 
Proverbs25:13 Nk’ukw imbeho ya shelegi imera mu gihe c’iyimbura, Ni ko n’intumwa yizigirwa imerera abayitumye, Kukw ihēmbūra umutima wa ba shebuja." 
Proverbs25:14 Nk’ukw ibicu n’umuyaga bitarimw’ imvura bimeze, Ni k’umuntu ameze yishemagiza ngw aratanga kand’ ar’ ukubesha." 
Proverbs25:15 Gushishikara wiyoroheje vyemeza umucamanza, Kand’ ururimi rwiyoroheje rujanjagura igufa." 
Proverbs25:16 Ni warenguka ku būki, urye ubukumaze akaruru, Woye kubguzuza inda, bukakudaha." 
Proverbs25:17 Ikirenge cawe ntigihore mu nzu kwa mugenzawe, Kugira ngo ntahave akurambirwa, akakwanka." 
Proverbs25:18 Umuntu yāgiriza mugenzi we ibinyoma Ni nk’ubuhiri n’inkota n’ umwampi ukarishe. 
Proverbs25:19 Kwizigira umuntu w’igihemu mu gihe c’amagorwa, Ni nk’iryinyo ricitse, n’ukuguru gukōndōtse." 
Proverbs25:20 Kuvugiriza impundu umuntu atuntuye mu mutima Ni nk’umuntu kwiyambura impuzu mu gihe c’imbeho, n’inkarisha isutswe ku munyu witwa amagadi." 
Proverbs25:21 Umwansi wawe ni yasonza umugaburire, Ni yagira inyota umuhe amazi yo kunywa:" 
Proverbs25:22 Kuk’ uzoba umurunzekw amakara yaka ku mutwe, Kand’ Uhoraho azoguhēra." 
Proverbs25:23 Umuyaga uva i burārūko uzana imvura; Ni ko n’ururimi rurementanya ruzana kwiraburanirwa mu maso. 
Proverbs25:24 Wopfuma wībēra hanze, Hak’ ubana n’umugore w’ ingāre mu nzu." 
Proverbs25:25 Nk’ukw amazi apfutse amerera umutima ufise icākāka, Ni ko n’inkuru nziza zimera, zivuye mu gihugu ca kure." 
Proverbs25:26 Umuntu agororotse agapfa kwemerana ivy’ umunyakibi Ameze nk’isōko itobetse, n’ imbizi y’iyōndoyōndo." 
Proverbs25:27 Si vyiza kurya ubūki bginshi cane: Kandi kwironderera icubahiro s’icubahiro. 
Proverbs25:28 Umuntu atītāngīra mu mutima Ameze nk’igisagara gitewe gisambutse uruzitiro. 
Proverbs26:1 Nk’uko shelegi itabereye mu gihe c’umumero, n’ imvura mu gihe c’iyimbura, Ni ko n’ukwubaha igipfu kutabereye." 
Proverbs26:2 Nk’ukw akanyoni kayerēra, n’ intamba iguruka, Ni ko n’umuvumo w’ubusa ata we wokora." 
Proverbs26:3 Ikimōko n’ic’ ifarasi, n’umujiginya n’uw’ indogoba, Inkoni na yo n’iy’ ibitugu vy’ ibipfu." 
Proverbs26:4 Ntiwishure igipfu amagambo ahwanye n’ubupfu bgaco, Kugira ngo nawe ntibikwandukire." 
Proverbs26:5 Wishure igipfu amagambo akwiranye n’ubupfu bgaco, Kugira ngo nticirate ko gifise ubgenge." 
Proverbs26:6 Ūtumye igipfu Aba yīcīye ibirenge, yihamagariye ubuhombe." 
Proverbs26:7 Amaguru y’ikimuga yama aregarega: Ni k’umugani umera mu kanwa k’ibipfu. 
Proverbs26:8 Guha igipfu icubahiro Ni nko gushiburira akabuyenge k’igiciro kinini ku gihongo c’amabuye. 
Proverbs26:9 Nk’ukw ihwa rihanda mu kiganza c’imborerwa, Ni k’umugani umera mu kanwa k’ibipfu." 
Proverbs26:10 Umuhinga yikorera vyose ubgiwe, Arikw igipfu gipfa gucisha ingero uwihitira wese." 
Proverbs26:11 Nk’ukw imbga isubira ku vy’ idashwe, Ni kw igipfu gisubira ku bupfu bgaco." 
Proverbs26:12 Ni wabona umuntu yirata kw afise ubgenge Umenye kw igipfu copfanirwa ikizigizigi kuruta uyo. 
Proverbs26:13 Umunyabute aravuga, ati Mu nzira har’ intambge, Har’ intambge y’ubukombe mw ibarabara." 
Proverbs26:14 Nk’uk’ urugi ruhindukira ku mapata yarwo, Ni k’umunebge ahindukira ku buriri bgiwe." 
Proverbs26:15 Ikiremare kirokeza ukuboko mu nkōko, Bikagica inkokora kukugarukana ku munwa." 
Proverbs26:16 Umunebge yirata kw afise ubgenge Buruta ubg’ abantu ndwi bazi kwishura ibiroranye. 
Proverbs26:17 Uwihitira agashingwa n’intonganya z’ibitar’ ivyiwe Ameze nk’ūfata imbga ku matwi. 
Proverbs26:18 Nk’uk’ umusazi ashwiragiza ibishirīra N’imyampi vyo kwica," 
Proverbs26:19 Uko ni kw ameze, umuntu ahenda mugenzi we, Maz’ akavuga, at’ Erega najandajanda gusa!" 
Proverbs26:20 Iy’ inkwi zibuze umuriro urazima, Kand’ ahatagira ūneguranira mu vyongorerano imitongano irashira." 
Proverbs26:21 Nk’ukw amakara acana igitōngōrero, n’inkwi zicana umuriro, Ni k’umuntu w’amahane acana intonganya." 
Proverbs26:22 Amagambo y’ūneguranira mu vyongorerano ni nk’ivyo kurya biryoshe, Bimanuka bija epfo mu nda." 
Proverbs26:23 Iminwa ihemana n’umutima mubi Bimeze nk’ikibumbano gikuyengejekw ifeza. 
Proverbs26:24 Uwankana atuma iminwa yiwe ihendana, Kand’ abīka uburyarya imbere muri we." 
Proverbs26:25 Ni yagira imvugo nziza, ntuz’ umwemere, Kuko mu mutima wiwe harimw’ ibizira ndwi." 
Proverbs26:26 Nah’ inzigo yiwe yokwipfukapfukisha ubugunge, Ukugabitanya kwiwe kuzokwerekanirwa imbere y’ ishengero." 
Proverbs26:27 Uwimba icobo azokigwamwo, Kand’ ūtembagaza ikibuye kizomugarukako." 
Proverbs26:28 Ururimi rubesha rwanka abo rwakomerekeje, Kand’ akanwa gahemana kazana uguhona." 
Proverbs27:1 Ntukarāte ivy’ ejo, Kuk’ utazi ivyo umusi uzovyara." 
Proverbs27:2 Wopfuma ushimwa n’uwundi, hak’ ushimwa n’akanwa kawe; Wopfuma ushimwa n’akavantara, hak’ ushimwa n’ iminwa yawe." 
Proverbs27:3 Ibuye rirarivye, umusenyi uraremereye, Arik’ umwikomo w’igipfu urusha vyompi uburemerezi." 
Proverbs27:4 Uburake ni ruburakigongwe, ishavu ritwara nk’umuvo, Ariko ni nde yoshobora kwihanga ishari?" 
Proverbs27:5 Guhanira ahibonekeza Kuruta urukundo rudaseruka. 
Proverbs27:6 Gukubitwa n’umukunzi biba bitewe n’ukuri, Arik’ ugusomagura kw’umwansi buba ar’ uburyarya." 
Proverbs27:7 Umutima uhimvye winenaguza ikigigu c’ubūki, Arik’ umutima ushonje ibirura vyose birawuryohera." 
Proverbs27:8 Nk’ukw inyoni itaye icāri iyerēra, N’umuntu ni kw ameze, iy’ ataye urugo rwiwe akayerēra." 
Proverbs27:9 Ukw amavuta atāmirana n’ ibimota neza binezereza umutima, Ni ko n’uburyohe bg’umukunzi w’umuntu bumeze, buvuye mu nama zo mu mutima." 
Proverbs27:10 Ntugahebe umukunzi wawe ubgawe, n’umukunzi wa so, Kandi ntuje kwa mwene wanyu ku musi uboneyekw amagorwa: Umubanyi wo hafi aruta mwene wanyu ari kure." 
Proverbs27:11 Mwana wanje, uce ubgenge, unezereze umutima wanje, Kugira ngo ngire ico nishura uwontuka." 
Proverbs27:12 Umunyamakenga iy’ abonye ikibi kije, arikinga, Arikw imburabgenge zikomeza inzira zikīgabura." 
Proverbs27:13 Twara impuzu y’uwishinze uwo atazi, Wake ingwati uwishinze umugore w’icigenze." 
Proverbs27:14 Ūzinduka kare agahezagira mugenzi we n’ijwi rirenga, Abiharūrwako nko kumuvuma." 
Proverbs27:15 Amatonyanga adahengeshanya yo ku musi w’imvura nyinshi, N’umugore atongana, vyompi ni kimwe." 
Proverbs27:16 Kumutesha ni nko gutesha umuyaga, Kand’ ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo kuba gufashe umunyererwe." 
Proverbs27:17 Ukw icuma gikarisha ikindi, Ni k’umuntu akarisha mugenzi we." 
Proverbs27:18 Ūbungabunga umusukoni wiwe azorya insukoni zawo, Kand’ ūkorera shebuja neza azohabga icubahiro." 
Proverbs27:19 Nk’ukw amaso arābana n’ ayandi mu mazi, Ni k’umutima w’umuntu urābana n’uwundi mu muntu." 
Proverbs27:20 I kuzimu n’amahonero nta ho bihāga, N’amaso y’abantu nta ho ahāga." 
Proverbs27:21 Inkono yo mu ruganda iteka ifeza, n’umuriro uvugutira izahabu, Umuntu na we agezwa no gushimwa." 
Proverbs27:22 Igipfu naho wogisekurana n’ impeke mw isekuro, ugisekuje umuhini, Ubupfu bgaco ntibgokivako." 
Proverbs27:23 Gira umwete wo kumenya imikuku yawe ukw imeze, No kurāba cane amasho yawe," 
Proverbs27:24 Kukw itunga ridahoraho, Canke mbeg’ ingoma ihorah’ ibihe vyose?" 
Proverbs27:25 Ubgatsi butemwe burakūrwaho, ubundi bukamera, Ivyatsi vyo ku misozi bikegeranywa." 
Proverbs27:26 Imyagazi y’intama izokwambika, Kand’ amasuguru azovamw’ ivyo kugura itongo;" 
Proverbs27:27 Amata y’impene azoguhāzanya n’abo mu rugo rwawe, Kand’ azogutungira abigeme bagukorera." 
Proverbs28:1 Abanyakibi bahunga ata wubirukanye, Arikw abagororotsi bagumya umutima nk’intambge." 
Proverbs28:2 Iyo havyutse umugararizo mu gihugu abakiganza baba benshi, Arikw abantu b’ubgenge bakerebutse batuma impore ihoraho." 
Proverbs28:3 Umuntu w’impabūke guhahaza abagorwa Ni nk’imvura y’isegenya idasigaza indya. 
Proverbs28:4 Abataye ivyagezwe bashima abanyakibi, Arikw abitondera ivyagezwe barabarwanya." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu babi ntibatahura ibiroranye, Arikw abarondera Uhoraho batahura vyose." 
Proverbs28:6 Umworo agendera mu bugororotsi bgiwe Aruta ikigoramange kijana inzira zibiri, nah’ ar’ umutunzi." 
Proverbs28:7 Uwitondera ivyagezwe wese aba ar’umwana w’ubgenge, Arik’ umugenzi w’abakunzi b’ inda atētereza se." 
Proverbs28:8 Ūgwirisha itunga ryiwe inyungu ivuye ku vyo yagurānye, akāka n’ibirenzeko, Aba abirundanirije ūgirira akagongwe abagorwa." 
Proverbs28:9 Uwica ugutwi ngo ntiyumve ivyagezwe, N’ugusenga kwiwe na kwo kuba igisesema." 
Proverbs28:10 Umuntu wese azimiza abagororotsi ngo bajane inzira mbi, Na we nyene azogwa mu rwobo rwiwe ubgiwe: Arikw abatunganye bazoragwa ivyiza." 
Proverbs28:11 Umutunzi yibarira kw afise ubgenge, Arik’ umworo ari n’umutima aramuhinyura." 
Proverbs28:12 Abagororotsi iyo banesheje haba icubahiro cinshi, Arikw abanyakibi iyo bari hejuru abantu barinyegeza." 
Proverbs28:13 Ūpfukapfuka ibigabitanyo vyiwe ntazoronka umugisha, Arik’ ūvyihana akabireka azogirirwa ikigongwe." 
Proverbs28:14 Hahirwa umuntu yama yiyubara; Arik’ uwikomantaza umutima azogwa mu vyago. 
Proverbs28:15 Ūtwaza ituntu abantu b’abafafara Ameze nk’intambge yivuga, n’igikōko citwa idubu yābagizwa n’inzara." 
Proverbs28:16 Umuganwa w’imburabgenge akunda guhahaza cane, Arik’ uwanka inyungu mbi azoramba." 
Proverbs28:17 Umuntu arikw amaraso y’ uwundi Azokwama ahunga arinde ashika i kuzimu; ntihaze hagire ūmubuza. 
Proverbs28:18 Ūgenda atunganye azorokorwa, Arikw ikigoramange kijana inzira zibiri, kikagwa mur’ imwe." 
Proverbs28:19 Ūrima itongo ryiwe azogira indya nyinshi, Arik’ ūkurikira ibitagira ikimazi azorya ubgoro bgiwe." 
Proverbs28:20 Umuntu w’umwizigirwa agira umugisha mwinshi, Arik’ uwihutira kuba umutunzi ntazobura guhanwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Gutinya abantu ku kigohe si vyiza, Kandi si vyiza k’umuntu acumuzwa n’akamanyu k’ umutsima." 
Proverbs28:22 Uw’ ijisho ribi yihutira itunga, Kandi ntamenya yuk’ ubukene buzoteba bukamutera." 
Proverbs28:23 Ūhanūra umuntu, hanyuma azobona ishimwe Kuruta ūhemanisha ururimi." 
Proverbs28:24 Uwiba se canke nyina, akavuga ati Nta gicumuro, Uyo aba ari mugenzi w’ ūgeseza." 
Proverbs28:25 Uwigungirako vyose avyura imitongano, Arik’ uwizigira Uhoraho agira itōto." 
Proverbs28:26 Uwizigira uwiwe mutima aba ar’ igipfu, Arik’ ūgendana ubgenge azorokorwa." 
Proverbs28:27 Ūha umworo ntazokwigera akena, Arik’ ūmwirengagiza azogira imivumo myinshi." 
Proverbs28:28 Abanyakibi iyo bari hejuru abantu barinyegeza, Arikw iyo bahona abagororotsi baragwira." 
Proverbs29:1 Ūhanūrwa kenshi akagamika izosi Azovunagurwa giturumbuka, atagira gitabara." 
Proverbs29:2 Iy’ abagororotsi bagwiriye, abantu baranezerwa, Arikw iy’ umunyakibi aganza, abantu baraniha." 
Proverbs29:3 Ūkunda ubgenge anezereza se, Arik’ uwifatanya na ba maraya yaya ivyiwe." 
Proverbs29:4 Umwami akomeresha igihugu imanza ziroranye, Arik’ ūhongerwa aracūbika." 
Proverbs29:5 Umuntu abgira mugenzi we amagambo y’agahemano Aba amuteze ururiba mu nzira. 
Proverbs29:6 Igicumuro c’umunyakibi kimubera umutego, Arik’ umugororotsi araririmba akanezerwa." 
Proverbs29:7 Umugororotsi ababara urubanza rw’abafafara, Arik’ umunyakibi ararwiyobagiza." 
Proverbs29:8 Abacokoranyi badomeka igisagara umugararizo, Arikw abanyabgenge bahwamika uburake." 
Proverbs29:9 Umunyabgenge iy’ahāririye n’ igipfu, Kiraraka kikītwengera, amahoro akabura." 
Proverbs29:10 Abicanyi banka ūtunganye, Arikw abagororotsi barondera ingene bomukiza." 
Proverbs29:11 Igipfu gihogomboka ivy’ uburake bgaco bgose, Arik’ umunyabgenge we, iyo buje arabutsindagira, akabuhwamika." 
Proverbs29:12 Ūganza, iyo yumvira ibinyoma Abasavyi biwe bose baba ar’ abanyavyaha." 
Proverbs29:13 Umworo n’ūhahaza barahūra: Uhoraho ni we yahaye amaso ya bompi kubona. 
Proverbs29:14 Ingoma y’umwami acira abafafara imanza z’ukuri Izokomezwa gushitsa ibihe bidashira. 
Proverbs29:15 Inkoni n’indero nziza bicisha ubgenge, Arik’ umwana bapfa kurekera aho atētereza nyina." 
Proverbs29:16 Abanyakibi iyo bagwiriye ibicumuro biragwira: Arikw abagororotsi bazokwitegereza uguhenebera kwabo. 
Proverbs29:17 Hana umwana wawe, azokuruhura, Mber’ azonezereza umutima wawe." 
Proverbs29:18 Iyo hatar’ uguhishurirwa, abantu bīgira uko bagomba, Arik’ uwitondera ivyagezwe aba ahiriwe." 
Proverbs29:19 Icohasha umushumba s’amajambo masa: Kuko nah’ ayumva ntabibabara. 
Proverbs29:20 Ni wabona umuntu apfa kuvuga irisunitswe n’ impwemu, Umenye kw igipfu copfanirwa ikizigizigi kuruta uyo." 
Proverbs29:21 Ūreze umushumba akamufyinisha uhereye mu buto bgiwe, Uburuhiro n’ukuzohava yīgira umwana wiwe." 
Proverbs29:22 Umuntu ashungumirwa avyura imitongano, Kand’ umuntu w’inkazi agira ibicumuro vyinshi." 
Proverbs29:23 Ubgibone bg’umuntu buzomusubiza hasi, Arik’ uw’ umutima uciye bugufi azoronka icubahiro." 
Proverbs29:24 Uwifatanya n’igisuma aba yanse ubugingo bgiwe, Iy’ abonye bamurahiza, yanka kumena ibanga." 
Proverbs29:25 Gutinya abantu n’ukwitega umutego, Arik’ uwizigira Uhoraho azoba amahoro." 
Proverbs29:26 Benshi barondera kwitonesha k’ūganza, Arik’ ukuroranirwa kw’umuntu kuva k’Uhoraho." 
Proverbs29:27 Ūdambikanya n’igisesema ku bagororotsi, Kand’ ūgenda atunganye n’ igisesema ku banyakibi." 
Proverbs30:1 Amajambo ya Aguri mwene Yake, y’ivyo yavugishijwe. Umuntu yabariye Itiyeli, Itiyeli bo na Ukali," 
Proverbs30:2 Ati N’ukuri nd’ ikiyingiyingi kurusha umuntu wese, Sinkerebutse nk’umuntu," 
Proverbs30:3 Kandi sinize ubgenge, No kumenya Uwera singufise." 
Proverbs30:4 Ni nde yadūze mw ijuru, akamanuka? Ni nde yakoranirije umuyaga mu bipfunsi vyiwe? Ni nde yatēkeye amazi mu mwambaro wiwe? Ni nde yashimangiye impera zose z’isi? Izina ryiwe ni nde, cank’ izina ry’umwana wiwe, namba worimenya?" 
Proverbs30:5 Ijambo ryose ry’Imana riravugutiwe: Ni yo nkinzo y’abayizigira. 
Proverbs30:6 Ntukūngurire ku majambo yayo, Kugira ngo ntiz’ iguhane, ugahinyuka k’ur’ umubeshi." 
Proverbs30:7 Ngusavye ibintu bibiri ntarahwera, Ntubinyime:" 
Proverbs30:8 Unshire kure y’ibitagira ikimazi, bo n’ibinyoma; Ntumpe ubgoro, ntumpe n’ ubutunzi; Ungaburire ivyo kurya dukwiranye:" 
Proverbs30:9 Sinze mpave mpimba nabi, nkakwihakana, nkavuga nt’ Uhoraho n’iki? Kandi noye kuba mworo, ngahava niba, Ngatukisha izina ry’Imana yanje." 
Proverbs30:10 Ntukarementanirize umushumba kuri shebuja, Kugira ngo ntagende arakuvuma, maz’ ukaba wiyambitse ibara." 
Proverbs30:11 Har’ urunganwe rw’abantu batuka ba se, Ntibahezagire ba nyina." 
Proverbs30:12 Har’ urunganwe rw’abantu bibgira ko batunganye, Ariko ntibuhagiwe imyanda yabo." 
Proverbs30:13 Har’ urunganwe rw’abantu, emwe ingen’ amaso yabo bayashira hejuru! N’ibigohe vyabo bikagira ubgibone!" 
Proverbs30:14 Har’ urunganwe rw’abantu, amenyo yabo ni nk’inkota, n’ibijigo vyabo ni nk’imbugita, Ngo batsontsomere impahazwa bazimare mw isi, n’ aboro babamare mu bantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Umuyoka ufise abakobga babiri, basemerera bati Mpa, mpa. Har’ ibintu bitatu bitīgera bihāga, Mbere ni bine ata ho bivuga, biti Geza aho," 
Proverbs30:16 Ni vyo ibi: i kuzimu, bo n’ inda itavyara, Bo n’isi idahāga amazi, N’umuriro ata ho uvuga, uti Geza aho." 
Proverbs30:17 Ijisho ry’ūcokora se, Kwumvira nyina akabikēngēra, Ibikōna vyo mu mwonga bizorinogora, Ibinyakabaka bizorirya." 
Proverbs30:18 Har’ ibintu bitatu vy’igitangaza bindengeye, Mbere ni bine ntomenya," 
Proverbs30:19 Ni vyo ibi: inzira y’inkukuma mu kirēre, N’inzira y’inzoka ku gitandara, N’inzira y’ubgato hagati mu kiyaga, N’inzira y’umusore ku mwigeme." 
Proverbs30:20 Uko ni kw inzira y’umusambanyikazi imeze: Ararya, akanyuza umunwa mw ivu, Akavuga, ati Nta kibi nakoze." 
Proverbs30:21 Isi ihindishwa agashitsi n’ ibintu bitatu, Mbere ni bine, ivyo idashobora kwihanganira," 
Proverbs30:22 Ni vyo ibi: umushumba iy’ abaye umwami, N’igipfu iyo gihimvye ivyo kurya," 
Proverbs30:23 N’umukobga w’icanke iy’ arongowe, N’incoreke iyo yegukiye ivya inabuja." 
Proverbs30:24 Har’ ibintu bine bito‐bito kw isi, Ariko bifise ubgenge bginshi:" 
Proverbs30:25 Ibimonyo n’ubgoko budafise inkomezi, Yamara vyiziganiriza indya zavyo zo mu ci;" 
Proverbs30:26 Inkezi n’ubgoko bg’ubunyantege nke, Yamara zīronderera inzu zazo mu bitandara;" 
Proverbs30:27 Inzige ntizigira umwami, Yamara zigenda zose zīciye imice;" 
Proverbs30:28 Umuserebanyi ugendesha amaboko yawo, Yamar’ uba mu ngoro z’abami." 
Proverbs30:29 Har’ ibintu bitatu bigenda birashogamanga, Mbere ni bine bigenda birashonyashonya," 
Proverbs30:30 Ni vyo ibi: intambge, kukw ari yo irusha ibikōko vyose inkomezi, Kandi ntivira na kimwe mu nzira;" 
Proverbs30:31 N’ifarasi irikw amatandiko; n’impfizi y’impene; N’umwami, ari we rutarindwa." 
Proverbs30:32 Namba warakoze ivy’ ubupfu ukishira hejuru, Canke waragize ikibi wiyumvira, Ni wifate ku munwa." 
Proverbs30:33 Kuko gutērera amata kurēsa amavuta, No guhotora izuru kuzana amaraso, Ni ko kandi no kuvyura uburake kuzana imitongano." 
Proverbs31:1 Amajambo y’umwami Lemuweli, ayo nyina yavugishijwe, akayamwigisha." 
Proverbs31:2 Nguhanūre ngw iki ga mwana wanje? Nguhanūre ngw iki ga mwana w’ubura bganje? Nguhanūre ngw iki ga mwana w’amasezerano yanje? 
Proverbs31:3 Ntukarekurire inkomezi zawe mu bagore, Cank’ umutima wawe mu bonona abami." 
Proverbs31:4 Ntibibereye abami, Lemuweli we, ntibibereye abami kunywa vino, Cank’ abaganwa gushira umutima ku biboreza:" 
Proverbs31:5 Kuko bonywa bakibagira ivyagezwe, Bakadambikanya urubanza rw’umuntu wese w’umurushwa." 
Proverbs31:6 Ikiboreza ugihe ūri hafi gupfa, Na vino uyihe ūfise akabonge mu mutima:" 
Proverbs31:7 Anywe yibagire ubgoro bgiwe, Ntaze yibuke ukundi imibabaro yiwe." 
Proverbs31:8 Teranura akanwa uvugire ūtazi kuvuga, Būranira bose abatagira shinge na rugero." 
Proverbs31:9 Teranura akanwa, uce izibereye, Ucire imanza impahazwa n’ umugorwa." 
Proverbs31:10 Umugore aroranye ni nde yomuronka? Kukw ar’ uw’ igiciro kurusha utubuyenge twitwa marijani. 
Proverbs31:11 Umutima w’umugabo wiwe wama umwizigira, Kand’ i we ntihabura inyungu." 
Proverbs31:12 Uyo mugore amugirira neza, ntamugirira nabi, Imisi yose y’ukubaho kwiwe." 
Proverbs31:13 Arondera ubgoya bg’intama n’ipampa, Akoresha amaboko yiwe umutima ukunze." 
Proverbs31:14 Ameze nk’amāto y’abadandaza, Ivyo kurya naho vyoba kure abikūrayo." 
Proverbs31:15 Avyuka hakiri mw ijoro, Kand’ abo mu rugo rwabo akabagaburira, Akagerera abakobga biwe ibikorwa vyabo." 
Proverbs31:16 Yitegereza indimiro akayigura, Atēza uruzabibu amaronko ava mu bikorwa vy’amaboko yiwe." 
Proverbs31:17 Akenyera inkomezi, Agakomeza amaboko yiwe." 
Proverbs31:18 Abona kw ibikorwa vyiwe bimugirira ikimazi, Kand’ itara ryiwe mw ijoro ntirizima." 
Proverbs31:19 Afata ikijishisho, Iminwe yiwe igafata agati gahinga inyuzi." 
Proverbs31:20 Aha ikiganza umworo, Aramvurira amaboko umukene." 
Proverbs31:21 Ntatinya ko shelegi igwisha urukanya abo mu rugo rwabo, Kukw abo mu rugo bose bambaye izikomeye zisa n’ agahama." 
Proverbs31:22 Yijishira ivyo kuryamamwo, Yambara impuzu zera nziza n’iz’ amashigisha." 
Proverbs31:23 Umugabo wiwe n’umumenyekana mw ikombe ry’ igisagara, Iyo yicaye hagati mu bakuru b’igihugu." 
Proverbs31:24 Uyo mugore ajisha impuzu zera nziza akazigura, Bo n’imisipi, akayiha ūyimudandariza." 
Proverbs31:25 Inkomezi n’icubahiro ni vyo myambaro yiwe, Kand’ iyo yiyumviriye ivy’ igihe kizoza arītwengera." 
Proverbs31:26 Iy’ ateranuye akanwa avuga ivy’ ubgenge, Icagezwe c’ineza kiri ku rurimi rwiwe." 
Proverbs31:27 Agendeza ingeso z’abo mu rugo rwabo, Kandi ntarya ivyo kurya vy’ ukwamikara." 
Proverbs31:28 Abana biwe bava hasi bakamuhezagira, N’umugabo wiwe na we, akamushemagiza," 
Proverbs31:29 Ati Har’ abagore benshi bakora ivyiza, Ariko weho ubarusha bose." 
Proverbs31:30 Akazuru gusa karahendana, n’ubgiza bgo ku rukoba nta co bumaze, Arik’ umugore yubaha Uhoraho ni we ashimwa." 
Proverbs31:31 Aragahabga ibiva mu maboko yiwe, Kand’ ibikorwa vyiwe ni bimushire hejuru aho bakoraniye mw ikombe ry’ igisagara." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Amajambo y’Umusiguzi, ni we mwene Dawidi, umwami aba i Yerusalemu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 N’ubusa gusa, ni k’Umusiguzi agize; n’ubusa gusa, vyose n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Mbeg’ umuntu aronka inyungu ki mu butame bgiwe bgose ubg’ atamira musi y’izuba? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Urwaruka rumwe ruragenda, rukabisa urundi; isi igahorah’ ibihe vyose." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Izuba na ryo rikarasa, hanyuma rikarenga, rikihutira gusubira ahantu haryo rizorasira." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umuyaga ushira i bumanuko, ugahindura ushira i burārūko; uhindagura akanya kose mu rugendo rwawo, maz’ ugasubira mu gushira irya n’ino kwawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Inzūzi zose zitembera mu kiyaga, yamar’ ikiyaga nticuzura; ahantu inzūzi zija ni ho zama zishishikara." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ibintu vyose vyuzuye uburuhe; n’ubg’ umuntu atovuga: ijisho ntirihāga kurāba, n’ugutwi ntiguhāga kwumva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Icāhozeho ni co kizobaho, kand’ icākozwe ni co kizokorwa: kandi nta kintu gisha kiriho musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Mbega har’ ikintu abantu bavuga, bat’ Ehe rāba, iki ni gisha? Erega kiba carabayeho kera, mu bihe tutaribgabeho." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Ivy’ ibihe vyahise ntibicibukwa, kand’ ivy’ ibihe bizoza ntibizoba bicibukwa n’abazobikurikira." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Jewe Umusiguzi nar’ umwami w’Abisirayeli i Yerusalemu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nashize umutima wanje ku kuronderesha ubgenge no kubuserangurisha ibikorerwa musi y’ ijuru vyose: n’umuruho ugoye, Imana yahaye abana b’abantu ng’ ubaruhishe." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Namaze kubona ibikorwa vyose bikorerwa musi y’izuba; nasanze vyose ar’ ubusa, ar’ uguhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Ikigoramye ntigishobora kugororwa, kand’ igihaze ntigishobora guharūrwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nibgiye mu mutima wanje, nt’ Ehe nironkeye ubgenge bginshi kurusha abanyitangiye imbere bose i Yerusalemu: mber’ umutima wanje wiboneye ubgenge bginshi n’ukumenya." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Kandi nashize umutima wanje ku kumenya ubgenge, no ku kumenya ubujuju n’ubupfu ivy’ ari vyo: na vyo nyene nabonye kw ar’ uguhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Kuko mu bgenge bginshi harimw’ intuntu nyinshi, kand’ ūgwiza ukumenya aba agwije umubabaro." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nibgiye mu mutima wanje, nt’ Enda nkugeragereshe ibinezereza; nuko rer’ uhimbarwe n’ivyiza: kandi rāba n’ivyo na vyo vyabaye ivy’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Navuze ku bitwengo, nti Birasaze, no ku binezereza, nti Bimaze iki?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Niziganguye mu mutima wanje uko nonezeresha umubiri wanje vino, umutima wanje ukindōngōresha ubgenge, n’ingene nokurikira ubupfu, kugira ngo mbone ivyo abana b’abantu bakwiye gukorera musi y’ijuru imisi yose y’ukubaho kwabo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nikoreye ibikorwa bikomeye; niyubakiye amazu; nitereye uruzabibu henshi; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 nironkeye indimiro n’amatongo, nteramw’ ibiti vyama vy’imyuga myinshi:" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 nigomereye amazi ngw avomerwe ingemwe z’ibiti vyatewe; 
Ecclesiastes2:7 niguriye abagurano b’ abagabo n’abakobga, bavyarira abandi mu rugo rwanje; kandi nagize itunga ryinshi ry’amasho n’ imikuku kurusha abāntanguriye bose i Yerusalemu;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 kandi nirundiye ifeza n’izahabu, bo n’itunga riherereye ku bami rivuye mu ntāra zose; nirondereye abaririmvyi b’abagabo n’abakobga, bo n’ibinezereza abana b’abantu, ni vyo ncoreke nyinshi cane." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Nuko nabaye agahambaye, nunguka kurusha abāntanguriye bose i Yerusalemu: kand’ ubgenge bganje bgāgumanye nanje." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ikintu cose amaso yanje yifuza sinakiyima, kandi sinabujije umutima wanje ikinezereza na kimwe, kand’ umutima wanje wanezerezwa n’ubutame bganje bgose; kand’ ivyo bimbera umugabane uvuye mu butame bganje." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Maze nditegereza ibikorwa vyose amaboko yanje yakoze, bo n’ubutame natamye: kandi rāba, vyose vyabaye ubusa no guhahamira umuyaga, kandi nta nyungu iriho musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Maze ndahindukira ngo nitegereze ubgenge n’ubujuju n’ubupfu: non’ umuntu azosubira ku ngoma akurikiye umwami azogenza ate? Azokora icari carakozwe nyene. 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Kandi mbona yuko mu bgenge har’ inyungu kuruta mu bupfu, nk’uko mu muco har’ inyungu kuruta mu mwiza." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Umunyabgenge amaso yiwe aba mu mutwe, arikw igipfu co kigendera mu mwiza: yamara nabonye yukw iherezo rya bompi ari rimwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Maze ndibaza mu mutima wanje, nt’ Iherezo ry’igipfu ni ryo rizoba iherezo ryanje; none se, kumurusha ubgenge vyammariye iki? Maze ndavuga mu mutima wanje, yuko na vyo ar’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ar’ umunyabgenge, ar’ igipfu, nta wuzohora yibukwa ibihe vyose; kuko mu misi izoza bose bazoba bamaze kwibagirana. Ereg’ umunyabgenge apfa nk’ukw igipfu gipfa na co!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nuko nca nanka ubugingo, kukw ibikorwa bikorerwa musi y’izuba vyammereye nabi: kuko vyose ar’ ubusa no guhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Kandi naciye nanka ubutame bganje bgose, ubgo natamiye musi y’izuba: kuko nzoba nkwiye kubisigarana ūzonkurikira." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kandi ni nde yomenya yuk’ uyo azoba umunyabgenge cank’ igipfu? Yamar’ azoganza ivyavuye mu butame bganje bgose ivyo natamiye, nkerekaniramw’ ubgenge musi y’ izuba. Ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Bituma nisubiramwo mpebuza umutima wanje ku vy’ubutame bganje bgose, ivyo natamiye musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Kuk’ umuntu mu butame bgiwe ari n’ubgenge n’ukumenya n’uburyo; yamar’ azobisigarana uwundi atābitamiye, bibe umugabane wiwe. Ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa, kandi n’ibara." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 None se, umuntu akūra iki mu butame bgiwe bgose, no mu mwitwaririko w’umutima wiwe, mu vyo yaruhiyemwo musi y’izuba?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Kukw imisi yiwe yose ar’ imibabaro, kand’ umuruho wiwe ar’ intuntu; mbere no mw ijoro na ho umutima wiwe nturonka akaruhuko. Ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Nta kigirira umuntu ikimazi kurusha kurya no kunywa, no kunezeresha umushaha wiwe ivyiza mu butame bgiwe. Ivyo na vyo nabonye ko biva mu kuboko kw’Imana." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 None ni nde ashobora kurya, canke ni nde ashobora kugira umunezero kurusha jewe?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Kuk’ umuntu ayihimbaye imuha ubgenge no kumenya n’umunezero: arik’ umunyavyaha imuha umuruho, ngw akumakume arundanye, akazobiha ūhimbaye Imana. Ivyo na vyo n’ubusa, no guhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ikintu cose cashingiwe igihe caco, kand’ igikorwa cose musi y’ijuru gifise akanya kaco:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 har’ igihe co kuvuka n’igihe co gupfa; igihe co gutera n’igihe co kurandura ivyatewe; 
Ecclesiastes3:3 igihe co kwica n’igihe co gukiza; igihe co gusambura n’igihe co kwubaka; 
Ecclesiastes3:4 igihe co kurira n’igihe co gutwenga; igihe co kuboroga n’igihe co kuvyina; 
Ecclesiastes3:5 igihe co gushibura amabuye n’igihe co kurunda amabuye; igihe co kugumbirana n’igihe co kwirinda kugumbirana; 
Ecclesiastes3:6 igihe co kurondera n’igihe co gutakaza; igihe co kubungabunga n’igihe co guta; 
Ecclesiastes3:7 igihe co gutabura n’igihe co kubarīra; igihe co gucereza n’ igihe co kuvuga; 
Ecclesiastes3:8 igihe co gukundana n’igihe co kwankana; igihe c’intambara n’igihe c’impore. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Mbeg’ ūkora aronka inyungu ki mu vyamutamije? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Nitegereje umuruho Imana yahaye abana b’ abantu ng’ ubaruhishe. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Ikintu cose yakiremye ari ciza mu gihe caco: kandi yashize ivyiyumviro vy’ibihoraho mu mitima yabo, nah’ umuntu adashobora guserangura igikorwa Imana yakoze uhereye kw itanguriro ugashitsa kw iherezo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Ndazi yukw ata kintu kibagirira ikimazi kuruta kunezerwa no gukora ivyiza imisi yose bakiriho; 
Ecclesiastes3:13 kand’ ikindi, yuk’ ubuntu bg’Imana ar’ uk’ umuntu wese yorya, akanywa, akanezererwa ivyiza mu butame bgiwe bgose." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndazi yukw ico Imana ikora cose kizokwamaho: nta kintu gishobora kwongerwa kuri co, kandi nta kintu gishobora gukūrwa kuri co: Imana ni yo yagikoze, kugira ngw abantu bayubahe." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Ikiriho ni co cāhozeho, kand’ ikizobaho na co cāhozeho: kand’ Imana isubira kugarukana icamaze guhita." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kand’ ikindi nongeye kubona musi y’izuba n’uko mw ikombe ry’imanza har’ ukugabitanya; no mw ikombe ry’ubugororotsi na ho har’ ukugabitanya. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Navuze mu mutima, nt’ Imana izocira imanza umugororotsi n’umunyakibi: kuko kuri yo ari ho har’ igihe c’ikibaho cose n’igikorwa cose." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Navuze mu mutima, nti Bimera birtyo kubg’ abana b’abantu, kugira ngw Imana ibagerageze, no kugira ngo babone ubgabo ko bameze nk’ibikōko gusa." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Kukw iherezo ry’abana b’abantu ari ryo herezo ry’ibikōko; iherezo ni rimwe: nk’uko bapfa ni ko bipfa; mbere vyose bihumeka kumwe, kand’ umuntu nta co asumbije ibikōko: kuko vyose ar’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Vyose bija ahantu hamwe; vyose biva mu mukungugu, kandi vyose bizosubira mu mukungugu nyene." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Impwemu z’umuntu iyo zimuvuyemwo, ni nde yomenya ko zidūga? Cank’ impwemu z’igikōko iyo zikivuyemwo ko zimanuka mu kuzimu?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ni co catumye mbona yukw ata kintu kirenze ibi, umuntu kunezererwa ibikorwa vyiwe; kukw ico ari co mugabane wiwe: none ni nde azomugarukana kurāba ibizobaho hanyuma yiwe?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Nuko ndasubira nitegereza ivy’ agahahazo vyose bikorerwa musi y’izuba: kand’ eh’ amosozi y’abahahazwa ntibaronke ikibīrūra; kand’ ububasha bgari ku ruhande rw’ ababahahaza, ariko bo ntibaronke ikibīrūra." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ni co catumye nshima abahisi bamaze gupfa kurusha abariho bakibona; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 mbere kurusha abo bose nshima ūtigeze kubaho, atigeze kubona amabi akorerwa musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Maze mbona ubutame bgose n’ igikorwa cose c’ubuhinga, yuko kubg’ ivyo umuntu agirirwa ishari na mugenzi we. Ivyo na vyo n’ ubusa, no guhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Igipfu kizinga amaboko, kikīrya inyama." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Urushi rumwe rwuzuye rufatanye n’impore ruruta amashi yuzuye afatanye n’ubutame no guhahamira umuyaga. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Nuko ndasubira nitegereza ubundi busa musi y’izuba. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Har’ umuntu w’inyakamwe, atagira uwundi; mbere ntagira n’umwana cank’ uwo bavukana; yamar’ umuruho wiwe wose ntugira iherezo, kand’ amaso yiwe ntahāga ubutunzi. Aribaza, ati None nduhira nde, nkiyima ivyiza? Ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa, mbere n’umuruho ugoye." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Babiri baruta umwe, kuko baronka impēra kubg’ ubutame bgabo." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Kuk’ umwe ni yatemba mugenzi we azomuvyura: arik’ ūtemvye ari wenyene, adafise ikimuvyura, aba agowe." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kand’ ikindi, babiri iyo baryamanye barasusuruka: arik’ umuntu umwe gusa yosusuruka ate?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Nah’ umuntu yoshobora kunesha umwe, babiri bomunanira, kand’ igitsibo c’imigozi itatu ntigicika vuba." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Umuhungu mworo w’umunyabgenge aruta umwami ashāje akaba igipfu, atacemera guhanūrwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Kuko yavuye mw ibohero ngw abe umwami; mbere yavutse mu bgami bgiwe ari mworo. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nitegereje abariho bose bagendagenda musi y’izuba, mbona bikumiye ku ruhande rwa wa musore umwe yakurikiye umwami ku ngoma, akamusubirira mu gishingo." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Abo bantu bose yaganza, ubginshi bgabo ntibgagira uko bungana: yamar’ abazobaho hanyuma ntibazomunezererwa. N’ ukuri ivyo na vyo n’ubusa, no guhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Urinde ikirenge cawe iy’ uja mu ngoro y’Imana; kuko kwēgēra ngo wumve kuruta gutanga ibimazi kw’ibipfu, kuko batazi ko bakora ibizira." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Akanwa kawe ntikagire ico gatuntumukana, kand’ umutima wawe woye gushushudikanya kw ijambo na rimwe imbere y’Imana; kukw Imana iri mw ijuru, nawe ukaba kw isi: nuko rer’ amajambo yawe abe make." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Kukw inzozi ziterwa n’ibikorwa vyinshi, kand’ ijwi ry’igipfu rimenyekanira ku magambo menshi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ni wasezerana isezerano ku Mana, ntutebe kurishitsa; kukw idahimbarwa n’ibipfu: ushitse ico wasezeranye." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Wopfuma utagira ico usezerana, hak’ usezerana ntushitse." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ntukundire akanwa kawe gucumuza umubiri wawe; kandi ntuz’ uvugire imbere y’umumarayika yuko kwabaye ugucorokwa: non’ Imana irinde kurakishwa n’ijwi ryawe ku ki, no gusangangura igikorwa c’amaboko yawe?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kuko mu nzozi nyinshi harimw’ ubusa, no mu magambo menshi n’uko: ariko weho, wubahe Imana." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ni wabona umworo ahahazwa, kand’ urubanza n’ibiroranye vyicwa ku manyama mu gihugu, ntibize bigutangaze: kukw Iyirusha abakuru ubukuru ivyitegereza, kandi har’ ubukuru bubarengeye." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ikigirira ikimazi igihugu muri vyose, n’umwami kwubahwa mu gihugu." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Inkunzi y’amahera ntizohāzwa n’amahera; bo n’ūkunda ibitayega ntazohāzwa n’inyungu: ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Iy’ ibintu bigwiriye ababirya baragwira: kandi nyenevyo bimumarira iki, atar’ ugupfa kubirābisha amaso?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Agatiro k’umunyabikorwa kararyoha, n’iy’ ariye bike canke vyinshi: ariko gufunereza kw’umutunzi kumubuza gusinzira." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Har’ ikibi gikomeye nabonye musi y’izuba, n’umuntu gutunga itunga rikazomwica:" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 maz’ iryo tunga rikazotikizwa n’ikibi kirikorokeye; kand’ asanzwe yaravyaye, umwana wiwe azoba asigaye ata co afise mu ntoke." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Nk’uko yavuye mu nda ya nyina ari gusa, azogenda artyo nk’uko yaje, adatwaye ikintu na kimwe kivuye mu butame bgiwe yojana mu ntoke." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kand’ iki na co n’ikibi gikomeye, yuk’ uko yaje kwose ari kw azogenda: non’ afise inyungu ki mu buruhe yaruhiye umuyaga?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Imisi yiwe yose arīra mu mwiza, kand’ akagira umubabaro, akagira indwara n’umwikomo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Eh’ ico nabonye kibereye kandi c’igikundiro: n’umuntu kurya akanywa, akanezererwa ivyiza bivuye mu butame bgiwe bgose, ubg’ atamira musi y’izuba, imisi yose y’ukubaho kwiwe, iyo Imana yamuhaye: kukw ivyo ari vyo mugabane wiwe." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kand’ umuntu wese Imana yahaye ubutunzi n’ibintu, ikamuha ubushobozi bgo kubirya, no gukūramw’ umugabane wiwe, no kunezererwa ibivuye mu butame bgiwe: ivyo na vyo n’ingabire y’Imana." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Kukw atazokwibuka cane imisi y’ukubaho kwiwe, kukw Imana imuhaye umunezero mu mutima wiwe." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Har’ ikibi nabonye musi y’izuba kiremereye abantu: 
Ecclesiastes6:2 n’ umuntu Imana yahaye itunga n’ ibintu n’icubahiro, bituma atabura ikintu na kimwe mu vyo umutima wiwe wokwifuje, maz’ Imana ntimuhe kubumbga na vyo, ariko bikazoribga na murundi; ivyo n’ ubusa, kandi n’ibara ribi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Umuntu naho yovyara abana ijana, akaramba imyaka myinshi, imisi y’imyaka yiwe ikaba myinshi, yamar’ umutima wiwe ntuhāzwe n’ivyiza, bitayeko ntahambge: kubganje arutwa n’inda yakorotse," 
Ecclesiastes6:4 kukw iziye ubusa, ikagenda mu mwiza, izina ryayo rikazimanganira mu mwiza;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 bitayeko ikaba itigeze kubona izuba canke kurimenya; iyo iraruhuka kurusha uyo: 
Ecclesiastes6:6 mbere naho yoba yararamvye imyaka ibihumbi bibiri: mbega bose itāhiriro si rimwe? 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Ubutame bgose bg’umuntu buterwa n’inda yiwe, yamara ntashira umuryarya." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Non’ umunyabgenge arusha iki igipfu? Cank’ impahazwa izi kwitunganya imbere y’abariho biyimariye iki? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kubonesha amaso biruta kwangaza umutima: ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa, no guhahamira umuyaga." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Icabayeho cose, izina ryaco caryiswe kera; birazwi umuntu ic’ ari co, kandi yukw adashobora kurwanya Iyimurusha ubushobozi." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Ko har’ ibintu vyinshi bigwiza ibitagira ikimazi, none vyungura umuntu iki?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 None ni nde yomenya ico umuntu akwiye mu kubaho kwiwe, imisi yose y’ ukubaho kwiwe kw’ubusa, amara ari nk’igitūtu? None ni nde yobarira umuntu ibizoba inyuma yiwe musi y’izuba?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Ukuvugwa neza kuruta amavuta atāmirana y’igiciro kinini, kand’ umusi wo gupfa uruta uwo kuvukako." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Ni vyiza kuja mu nzu y’abagandaye kuruta kuja mu nzu y’intumire: kukw ari ryo herezo ry’abantu bose, kand’ ūkiriho abishirak’ umutima." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Umubabaro uruta agatwengo: kuko naho mu maso hoba hijiriwe, umutima womera neza." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Umutima w’abanyabgenge uri mu nzu y’abagandaye, arik’ umutima w’ibipfu uri mu nzu y’ibikino." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Iciza n’ ukwumvira igihano c’umunyabgenge kuruta kwumviriza imvyino z’ibipfu. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Nk’uko guturagurika kw’amahwa kumeze musi y’inkono, ni ko gutwenga kw’igipfu kumeze; ivyo na vyo nyene n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 N’ukuri kugunga guhindura umunyabgenge igipfu, kand’ impēra izimiza ubgenge." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Iherezo ry’ikintu riruta itanguriro ryaco; kand’ uw’ umutima wihangana aruta uw’ umutima w’ubgibone. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ntukihutire kuraka mu mutima: kuk’ uburake bgama mu mushaha w’ibipfu. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ntukavuge, uti Ni ku ki imisi ya kera iruta iy’ ubu? Kuko mur’ ivyo utaba ubajije ivy’ ubgenge." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubgenge bungana n’umwandu mu kuba bgiza: mbere burushiriza kubera bgiza ababona izuba. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Kuk’ ubgenge ar’ ubgugamo, nk’ukw amahera ar’ ubgugamo; arikw inyungu iva mu kumenya n’iyi: n’uk’ ubgenge buzigama ubugingo bga nyenebgo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Itegereze igikorwa c’Imana: none ni nde yoshobora kugorora ico yagoramitse? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Ku musi w’amahoro unezerwe; ku musi w’ amarushwa wiyumvire: Imana yarabibangikanije, kugira ng’ umuntu ntaz’ aserangure ikintu na kimwe kizoba hanyuma yiwe." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ivyo vyose narabibonye mu misi yanje yapfuye ubusa: har’ aho umugororotsi akenyuka kand’ agororotse, kandi har’ aho umunyakibi aramba kand’ akora ibibi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ntube umugororotsi arengeje urugero, kandi ntiwīgire umunyabgenge burengeranye: n’iki cotuma wikwegera kuranduka?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ntube n’umunyavyaha arengeje urugero, kandi ntube igipfu: n’iki cotuma ukenyuka igihe cawe kitarashika?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ivyiza n’uko bimwe ubifata, ibindi na vyo ntubikūrek’ ukuboko: kuk’ uwubaha Imana azokwikiza mur’ ivyo vyose." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubgenge bubera umunyabgenge ububasha kuruta abatware cumi bari mu gisagara. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 N’ukuri nta mugororotsi ariho kw isi akora ivyiza ntacumure. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kand’ ikindi, ntushire umutima ku majambo yose avugwa, ntuhave wumva umushumba wawe agutuka:" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 kuko kenshi na kenshi uzi mu mutima wawe nawe nyene ko watutse abandi. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ivyo vyose nabigerageje mu bgenge; naravuze, nti Nzoba umunyabgenge; ariko bgambaye kure." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Ibiri kure, bikaba i bgina iyo bihera, ni nde yoshobora kubishikīra?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Maze nshira umutima wanje ku kumenya no gusesa no guserangura ubgenge n’ inyanduruko z’ibintu, no kumenya kw icaha ar’ ubupfu, kandi k’ubupfu ar’ ibisazi." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Nsanga ikintu kirusha urupfu kurura: n’umugore umutima wiwe ar’ imitego n’ururiba, amaboko yiwe akaba imvuto: umuntu wese ahimbara Imana azomukira, arik’ umunyavyaha azofatwa na we." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ehe ngiki ico nabonye, ni k’Umusiguzi agize, mmaze kugereranya kimwe n’ikindi ngo mmenye inyanduruko zavyo;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ico umutima wanje ukirondera, sindakibona: nabonye umugabo umwe mu bantu igihumbi, ariko nta mugore nabonye mur’ abo bose." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Eh’ ico nabonye n’iki kimwe gusa, n’ukw Imana yaremye abantu bagororotse; ariko bo birondereye ivyo bigeneye vyinshi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ni nde ameze nk’umunyabgenge? Ni nde azi ukw ikintu gisobanurwa? Ubgenge bg’umuntu buzana umuco mu maso hiwe, bukahakūra iminkanyari." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndakugīriye inama: witondere icagezwe c’umwami, nk’uko wabirahiye Imana." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ntukihute kuva imbere yiwe; ntukibande ku kintu kibi: kuko we akora ic’ agomba cose. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Kukw ijambo ry’umwami riri n’ububasha; kandi ni nde yomubaza, at’ Ico ukora n’igiki?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Umuntu wese yitondera icagezwe ntazogira ikibi abona; kand’ umutima w’umunyabgenge utahura ko hazoba igihe n’imanza: 
Ecclesiastes8:6 kukw ikibaho cose kigira igihe caco n’urubanza rwaco; kukw imibabaro y’umuntu imuvuna: 
Ecclesiastes8:7 kukw atazi ikizobaho; none ni nde yomubarira ingene bizomera? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Nta muntu ariho afise ububasha ku mpwemu ziwe, ngw azīgumirize, kandi nta bubasha agira bgo kubuza umusi w’urupfu; mur’ izo ntambara nta kurekurwa kuriho, kand’ uwihaye ikibi ntikizomukiza." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Ivyo vyose naravyiboneye, nashize umutima ku gikorwa cose gikorerwa musi y’izuba: har’ igihe umuntu umwe agira ububasha ku wundi bgo kumugirira nabi." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Kand’ ikigeretseko nabonye abanyavyaha bahambga, bīgīriye; n’abakoze ibiroranye bīgīra bavuye ahantu hēra, bakibagirana mu gisagara: ivyo na vyo nyene n’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Urubanza rw’igikorwa kibi naho ruciwe, ntiruherahezwa vuba, ni co gituma imitima y’ abana b’abantu ihangara gukora ikibi." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nah’ umunyavyaha yokora ikibi ibihetangabo ijana, akaramba cane, yamara ndazi kw abubaha Imana ari bo bazoba amahoro, abayubaha bari mu nyonga zayo;" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 ariko nta mahoro azoba ku munyakibi, kand’ imisi yiwe ntazoyirambiramwo, imeze nk’igitūtu; kukw atubaha Imana ari mu nyonga zayo." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Harih’ ic’ ubusa gikorerwa kw isi; n’uko har’ abagororotsi bagirirwa ibikwiranye n’igikorwa c’abanyakibi, hakabaho n’abanyakibi bagirirwa ibikwiranye n’igikorwa c’abagororotsi: navuze yukw ivyo na vyo nyene ar’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Maze rero nca nshima ibinezereza, kukw ata ciza umuntu yogira musi y’izuba kirusha iki: kurya no kunywa no kunezerwa; kukw ivyo bizogumana na we mu butame bgiwe imisi yose y’ukubaho kwiwe, iyo Imana yamuhaye musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Mmaze gushira umutima wanje ku kumenya ubgenge no kwitegereza igikorwa gikorerwa kw isi — kuko har’ Uwo amaso yiwe atabona agatiro, ari ku murango canke mw ijoro —" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ni ho nitegereje igikorwa cose c’Imana, yuk’ umuntu adashobora gutahura igikorwa gikorerwa musi y’izuba: kuk’ umuntu naho yokovya ate mu kugiserangura, atoruha agitahura; mbere nah’ umunyabgenge yokwibgira kw akimenye, na we nyene ntazoshobora kugitahura." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ivyo vyose nabishizek’ umutima, kugira ngo mbisese vyose; kandi nabonye yukw abagororotsi n’abanyabgenge bari mu kuboko kw’Imana, bo n’ibikorwa vyabo, n’urukundo n’urwanko; abantu buntu nta co bazi; vyose bir’ imbere yabo." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Vyose bibashikako kumwe bose: iherezo ni rimwe ku mugororotsi no ku munyakibi; ku munyangeso nziza no ku wejejwe no ku wuhumanye; ku muntu atanga ibimazi no ku muntu atabitanga: nk’uk’ umunyangeso nziza ameze, ni k’umunyavyaha ameze; nk’uk’ ūrahira ameze, ni k’ūtinya indahiro ameze." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ubu n’ubuyobe mu bikorerwa musi y’izuba vyose, yukw iherezo rya bose ari rimwe: mbere, mu mitima y’abana b’abantu huzuyemw’ ibibi, kandi bakiriho, ubusazi buba mu mitima yabo, hanyuma bakitāhira mu bapfuye," 
Ecclesiastes9:4 kandi ni nde atazoba muri bo? Abariho bose baba bari n’ivyizigiro: kukw imbga ibona iruta intambge ipfuye. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ereg’ abariho baba bazi ko bazopfa; arikw abapfuye nta co baba bakizi, kandi nta mpēra baba bakibona; kuko kwibukwa kwabo kuba kwaramaze kwibagirana." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Urukundo rwabo n’urwanko rwabo n’ishari ryabo, vyose biba vyarashize: kandi ntibaba bagifise umugabane ku kintu na kimwe gikorerwa musi y’izuba gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ni wīgīre, wīrīre ivyo kurya vyawe unezerewe, winywere vino yawe n’umutima uhimbawe; kukw Imana imaze kwemera ibikorwa vyawe." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Imyambaro yawe ni yame yera, kand’ umutwe wawe ntuz’ ubure gusīgwa amavuta." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Bana umunezero, mwe n’umugore wawe ukunda, imisi yose y’ ukubaho kwawe kw’ubusa, yaguhaye musi y’izuba, ni yo misi yawe yose ipfa ubusa: kukw ivyo ari vyo mugabane wawe wo mur’ ubu bugingo, no mu miruho yawe uruhira musi y’izuba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ikintu cose ukuboko kwawe kwerekeje gukora ugikorane inkomezi zawe; kukw ata gikorwa cank’ inama cank’ ukumenya cank’ ubgenge i kuzimu ah’ urāriye kuja. 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndasubīra, nitegereza musi y’izuba, yuko mu gusiganwa, impayamaguru atari zo zisiga abandi, kandi mu ntambara kw abanyenkomezi atari bo batsinda, kandi n’abanyabgenge kw atari bo baronka indya, kand’ abakerebutse kw atari bo baronka itunga, kand’ abahanga kw atari bo batona; arikw ibihe n’ibiza ku muntu bipfa kubazako bose." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Kukw abantu batazi igihe cabo na mba; nk’ ukw amafi afatwa n’urusenga rw’ ubugesera, kandi nk’ukw inyoni zifatwa n’umutego, uko ni kw abana b’abantu bafatwa n’umutego w’igihe c’ubugesera, kibaguyeko giturumbuka." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kandi nabonye musi y’izuba ubgenge mur’ ubu buryo, kandi bgambereye igikomeye:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 hābaye igisagara gitoya kirimw’ abantu bake; maze haza umwami ahambaye aragitera, arakiziguza, akirundira ibigunguzi binini bigikikije:" 
Ecclesiastes9:15 maze muri co haboneka umworo w’umunyabgenge, arokoza nya gisagara ubgenge bgiwe: yamara ntihaba hakigira umuntu yibuka wa mworo." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Maze ndavuga, nt’ Ubgenge buruta inkomezi: yamara rero, ubgenge bga wa mworo bgarakēngerewe, n’ amajambo yiwe ntibaba bakiyemera." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Amajambo y’abanyabgenge avuzwe buhoro yumvirizwa kurusha gusemerera kw’umuntu w’iremezo ry’ibipfu. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ubgenge buruta ibirwanishwa vy’intambara, arik’ umunyavyaha umwe adabanganya ivyiza vyinshi." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Isāzi zipfuye zituma amavuta yinjijwe n’abahinga babimogoreye anuka umuduhu: ni ko n’ubupfu naho bgoba buke bgonona ubgenge n’icubahiro. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Umutima w’umunyabgenge umuroresha i buryo, arik’ umutima w’igipfu ukiroresha i bufuti." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Mbere kandi, igipfu iyo kigenda mu nzira, ubgenge bgaco burazimira, kikabarira umuntu wese, ng’ Ur’ igipfu!" 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Uburake bg’ūganza ni bgakugurumanira, ntutirimuke ah’ uri; kuko kwiyorosha gutesha ibicumuro bikomeye." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Har’ ikibi nabonye musi y’izuba, umenga n’ifuti ryavuye k’ ūganza:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 ubupfu gushirwa hejuru cane, abapfasoni bakicara mu mwanya w’inyuma." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Nabonye abashumba bagendera ku mafarasi, abaganwa na bo bagendesha amaguru hasi nk’abashumba." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Uwimba icobo azogikorokeramwo, kand’ ūmena urugo inzoka izomukomora." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Uwimba amabuye azomukomeretsa, kand’ ūsatura ibiti bimushira mw irinde." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Incabiti iy’ ipfushe, umuntu ntayikarishe, azoba akwiye kwongerakw inkomezi zo gushimika; arik’ ubgenge bugira ikimazi mu kurōngōra umuntu." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Inzoka iy’ ikomoye itaragotwa, uwari kuyigota nta co aba akimaze." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amajambo yo mu kanwa k’umunyabgenge n’ay’ igikundiro; arik’ umunwa w’igipfu uzogicisha umutwe. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Intango y’amagambo yo mu kanwa kaco n’ubupfu, kand’ iherezo ry’ibivuye mu kanwa kaco n’ibisazi vy’icago." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Kand’ igipfu gihogomboka mu magambo; umuntu ntazi ibizobaho; kand’ ibizobah’ inyuma yiwe yobibgirwa na nde? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Ibikorwa vy’igipfu cose birakiruhisha, kuko kitazi n’ inzira ija i bgami." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Uzobona ibara, wa gihugu, umwami wawe iy’ ar’ umwana, abaganwa bawe bakazindukira kurya." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Uzoba uhiriwe, wa gihugu, umwami wawe iy’ ar’ uwo mu nda y’abami, abaganwa bawe bakarīra mu gihe gikwiye, kugira ngo baronke inkomezi, atar’ ukugira ngo baborerwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ubute butuma inzu igira ibibonde, kand’ ubunebge bg’amaboko butuma inzu iva." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Amazimano azimanirwa gutera akanyamuneza, kandi vino inezereza umushaha: arikw amahera ni bimari vya vyose." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Ntukavume umwami, eka naho vyoba mu vyiyumviro vyawe; kandi ntukavume umutunzi naho woba haruguru mu mpete: kukw inyoni yo mu kirēre izoritwara, kand’ igisīga kizovyandagaza." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Terera ivyo kurya vyawe ku mazi: uzosubira kubibona hahise imisi myinshi. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Uhe umugabane abantu ndwi, mbere na munani; kuk’ utazi icago cotera mw isi." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ibicu iyo vyuzuyemw’ imvura vyisukanurira kw isi; kand’ igiti iyo gihenuka cerekeye i bumanuko, canke cerekeye i burārūko, aho hantu igiti cahenukiye ni ho kiguma." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Ūgendeza umuyaga ntazobiba, kand’ uwitegereza ibicu ntazokwimbura." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Nk’uk’ utazi inzira y’umuyaga iy’ ari yo, kandi nk’uk’ utazi ingen’ amagufa akurira mu nda y’ūtwaye inda, uko ni k’utazi igikorwa c’ Imana Rugira vyose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Biba imbuto zawe mu gitondo, kandi ku mugoroba ntupfunye amaboko: kuk’ utazi ibizokunda, ko vyoba ar’ ibi cank’ ibi, canke ko vyose bizomera neza kumwe." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 N’ukuri, umuco uraryoshe, kand’ amaso kubona izuba bitera umunezero." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Mbere nah’ umuntu yoramba imyaka myinshi ate, ayinezererwe yose; ariko yibuke imisi y’umwiza, kukw izoba myinshi. Ibizoza vyose n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ewe wa musore, nezererwa ubusore bgawe, kand’ umutima wawe ukunezereze mu misi y’ubusore bgawe, kand’ ugendere mu nzira z’umutima wawe, no mu kurāba kw’amaso yawe: ariko wame ubizi yukw Imana izogushira mu rubanza rw’ivyo vyose." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Nuko kūra amaganya mu mutima wawe, kand’ ushire ikibi kure y’umubiri wawe: kuk’ ubuto n’ubusore ar’ ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Kandi wame wibuka Umuremyi wawe mu misi y’ubusore bgawe, imisi mibi itaraza, igihe kitarashika, ah’ uzovuga, uti Nta kikinnezereza;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 izuba n’umuco n’ukwezi n’inyenyeri bitaracura umwiza, kand’ ibicu bitaragaruka imvura imaze guhita;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 ku musi abazigamyi b’inzu bazotetemera, kand’ abanyenkomezi bakabunda, abasya bagasigaho kuko babaye bake, kand’ abarungurukira mu madirisha bagahuma;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 imiryango irāba ku nzira ikugarwa; ijwi ry’urusyo rikōmbōka, umuntu akavyuka mu tunyoni, kand’ abakobga bose b’abaririmvyi bagaca bugufi;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 mber’ abantu bazotinya igishizwe hejuru, ubgoba buzobaterera mu nzira; igiti citwa shakedi kizokwamuza, igihori kizogenda cikwega, kand’ agapiripiri kazotituka: kuk’ umuntu yīgīra i wabo w’intahava, mu nzira hakaba uruja n’uruza rw’ abamuririra:" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 umugozi w’urutsinga rw’ifeza utaracika, urwavya rw’izahabu rutarameneka, umubindi utaramenekera ku mugezi, ikurudumu itarapfira kw iriba;" 
Ecclesiastes12:7 umukungugu ugasubira mw ivu aho wahoze, umushaha ugasubira ku Mana yawutanze." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 N’ubusa gusa, ni k’Umusiguzi agize, vyose n’ubusa." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Vyongeye kandi, Umusiguzi kuko yar’ umunyabgenge yashishikaye kwigisha abantu ubgenge; mbere yakoze irya n’ino, araserangura, aroranya imigani myinshi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Umusiguzi yagerageje kurondera amajambo aryoshe, ni yo yanditswe atunganye, ni yo majambo y’ukuri." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amajambo y’abanyabgenge ni nk’imihunda, kand’ amajambo atororokanijwe ni nk’imambo zishimangiwe, umwungere umwe ari we yayatanze." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ibisigaye, mwana wanje, uhanurwe: kwandika ibitabo vyinshi ntikugira iherezo; kand’ ukwiga cane kuruhisha umubiri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Vyose vyarumviswe: indunduro yavyo n’iyi: Wubahe Imana, witondere ivyagezwe na yo; kukw ivyo ari vyo bibereye rwose umuntu wese." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Kukw Imana izoshira igikorwa cose mu rubanza, bo n’ikintu cose gihishijwe, ari kibi ari ciza." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Indirimbo y’agaheta, ya Salomo." 
SongOfSongs1:2 N’unsomeshe ugusomana kw’ akanwa kawe: Kuk’ urukundo rwawe ari rwiza kurusha vino. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Amavuta yawe aratāmirana cane, Izina ryawe rimeze nk’amavuta asutswe; Ni co gituma inkumi zigukunda." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Mfata nkuje inyuma, twiruke. Umwami yanshikanye i kare: Tuzonezerwa, nawe uzoduhimbara. Tuzokwamamaza urukundo rwawe kurusha uko twokwamamaza vino: Urukundo bagukunda rurakubereye." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndirabura, ariko ndi mwiza, Mwa bakobga b’i Yerusalemu; Mmeze nk’amahema y’i Kedari, Nk’imikingo ya Salomo." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ntimumpange amaso, kuko nirabura, Kukw izuba ari ryo ryanyirabuje. Abahungu ba mama bārandakiye, Banzigamishije imirima y’imizabibu, Arik’ urwanje ruzabibu sinaruzigamye." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Yewe, uwo umutima wanje ukunda, umbarire Ah’ uragira ah’ ari ho, N’ah’ uvyagiza mu mahodoka: None n’iki cotuma ngenda nk’uwitwikiriye mu maso, Nca i ruhande y’imikuku ya bagenzi bawe?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Asangw’ utahazi, yewe urusha abandi bagore akaranga, Jana inzira y’ibitungwa, Uragire imyagazi y’impene yawe i ruhande y’insago z’abungere." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ewe mukunzi wanje, nakugereranije N’ifarasi yo mu zikwega imikogote ya Farawo." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Imisaya yawe itewe gushaza n’ibitsibo vy’umushatsi wawe, N’izosi ryawe rishazishijwe n’utugenegene tw’igiciro kinini." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tuzogutsibira ibitsibo vy’izahabu, Birimw’ intabonwa z’ifeza." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Umwami akivyagiye, ari ku meza yiwe, Amavuta yanje yatanguye gutāmirana." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Umukunzi wanje ammereye nk’itu ry’isenga Riri hagati y’amabere yanje. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Umukunzi wanje ammereye nk’agati kitwa koferu gashuritse udushurwe tw’uturundo Kaba mu nzabibu zo muri Eni‐gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ereg’ uri mwiza, mukunzi wanje, n’ukuri uri mwiza pe; Amaso yawe asa n’inuma." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ereg’ uri mwiza, mukunzi wanje, mber’ urahimbaye; Ikirwa cacu kigaranzuyek’ ubusaswa busha." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Imitambikwa y’ingoro yacu n’ibiti vy’amasederi, Ibishoro vyayo n’imiberoshi." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Nd’ ishurwe rya habaseleti ry’i Sharoni, Ikirungu co mu biyaya." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Nk’ikirungu mu mahwa Ni k’umukunzi wanje ameze mu bandi bakobga. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Nk’igiti c’icungwa mu bindi biti vyo mw ishamba Ni k’umukunzi wanje ameze mu bandi basore. Mpimbarwa no kwicara mu gitūtu ciwe, Amacungwa yiwe aransosera." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yanjanye mu nzu y’amazimano, Ibendera yiwe yari hejuru yanje yar’ iy’ urukundo." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ni mumpēmbūze udutore tw’ inzabibu, mundabūze amacungwa, Kuk’ urukundo runshābije." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Ukuboko kwiwe kw’ukubamfu kuranseguye, Ukuboko kwiwe kw’ukuryo kurampfumbatiye." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndabihanikirije, mwa bakobga b’i Yerusalemu mwe, Nk’uko bagenza ku ngeregere no ku mpongokazi vyo mw ishamba, Ntimunkomere umukunzi, ntimumukangure, Gushitsa ah’ avyigombeye." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ijwi ry’umukunzi wanje! Eh’ araje, Yikina amatavu ku misozi, Akinagira ku turambi." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Umukunzi wanje ameze nk’ ingeregere canke nk’umukangara w’impongo: Eh’ ahagaze inyuma y’inzu yacu, Arungurukira mu madirisha, Yiyerekanira mu nshingo zayo." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Umukunzi wanje aravuga, arambariye, Ati Va hasi, mukunzi wanje, mwiza wanje, ngwino tugende:" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Kuko rāba, urushana rurashize, Imvura iragiye, iracitse;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Amashurwe aratanguye gushurika ku misozi, Igihe co kujwiragira kw’ inyoni kirashitse, Ijwi ry’intunguru rirumvikanye mu gihugu cacu;" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Insukoni z’ibitumbge ziratanguye guhishira ku musukoni wazo, Imizabibu irashuritse, Imota ubumote bgayo bgiza. Va hasi, mukunzi wanje, mwiza wanje, ngwino tugende." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ewe inanuma wanje, uba mu gihoro co mu gitandara no mw isenga ryo ku gatembge, Reka ndābe mu maso hawe, numve n’ijwi ryawe; Kukw ijwi ryawe ari ryiza, n’uburanga bgawe bukaba buhebuje." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Ni mudufatire imbgebge, twa tubgebge duto‐duto twonona imirima y’imizabibu, Kukw imizabibu yacu ishuritse." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Umukunzi wanje n’uwanje nanje nd’uwiwe, Aragira mu birungu." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Garuka, mukunzi wanje, umere nk’ingeregere canke nk’umukangara w’impongo Wo ku misozi y’i Beteri, Igihe ca ni musi kitarashika, ibitūtu vyo ku kirengazuba bitarazimangana." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Mw ijoro ndi ku buriri narondeye umugabo umutima wanje ukunda: Ndamurondera, ndamubura." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndavuga, nti Hinge mvyuke, ngendagende mu gisagara, Mu nzira no mu hiyaguye haho, Ndondere uwo umutima wanje ukunda: Naramurondeye, ndamubura." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Duhūra n’abashibamyi bagendura igisagara: Ndababaza, nti Mbega mwabonye wa wundi umutima wanje ukunda?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Mmaze kubarēngāna gato Mbona uwo umutima wanje ukunda; Ndamufata, nanka kumurekura, Kugeza aho namushikanye mu nzu ya mama, Mu nzu y’uwamvyaye." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndabihanikirije, mwa bakobga b’i Yerusalemu mwe, Nk’uko bagenza ku ngeregere no ku mpongokazi vyo mw ishamba, Ntimunkomere umukunzi, ntimumukangure, Gushitsa ah’ avyigombeye." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Uriya ni nde, adūga avuye mu bugaragwa Ameze nk’umwotsi upfunduka nk’inkingi, Atāmirana isenga n’imibavu, N’ibimota neza vyose vy’ ibidandazwa?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Erega n’inderuzo ya Salomo: Har’ abahizi mirongwitandatu bayikikije, Bo mu bahizi b’Abisirayeli." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Bose bitwaza inkota, kandi n’abahinga bo kurwana: Umuntu wese yambaye inkota kw itako ryiwe, Kubg’ ibiteye ubgoba vyo mw ijoro." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Umwami Salomo yībāzishirije inderuzo y’intebe, Mu biti vy’i Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Inkingi z’icugamo yazicurishije mw ifeza, N’icegamo mw izahabu. Icicaro cayo cakoreshejwe impuzu y’agahama, Imbere hashashwe insobane Yajishanywe urukundo n’abakobga b’i Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Yemwe bakobga b’i Siyoni, ni musohoke murābe umwami Salomo, Afise igitsibo yambitswe na nyina ku musi w’ubukwe bgiwe, Ni wo musi w’umunezero w’umutima wiwe." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ereg’ uri mwiza, mukunzi wanje, n’ukuri uri mwiza pe; Amaso yawe acishirije mu mwitwikiro wawe asa n’ inuma: Umushatsi wawe umeze nk’ umukuku w’impene Zivyagiye ku nkēngēra y’umusozi w’i Gileyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amenyo yawe n’akāmenge nk’umukuku w’intama zākemuwe, Zivuye kwuhagirwa, Zifise amahasa zose, Ata n’imwe muri zo yagumbashe." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iminwa yawe imeze nk’urunyuzi rusa n’agahama, Kand’ akanwa kawe ni keza. Mu misaya yawe hameze nk’igisate c’ikomamanga, Iboneka mu mwitwikiro wawe." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Izosi ryawe rimeze nk’umunara wa Dawidi Wubakiwe kubīkwamw’ ibirwanishwa, Umanitsemw’ inkinzo igihumbi, Inkinzo zose z’abahizi." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabere yawe yompi ameze nk’ivyagazi bibiri vy’amahasa y’ingeregere Birīsha mu birungu. 
SongOfSongs4:6 Hinge nīgīre ku musozi ubakw isenga, No ku gasozi kabakw imibavu, Igihe ca ni musi kitarashika, ibitūtu vyo ku kirengazuba bitarazimangana." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Uri mwiza bihebuje ga mukunzi wanje; Nta gasembga ufise. 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ngwino tuvane i Lebanoni, mugeni wanje, Tuvane i Lebanoni. Manuka uve ku mpinga y’ ahitwa Amana, Uve ku mpinga z’i Seniri n’i Herumoni, Uve ku masenga y’intambge, Uve ku misozi ibamw’ ingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Uhimbaje umutima wanje, mushikanje, mugeni wanje: Uhimbarishije umutima wanje ijisho ryawe, N’umugufu umwe wo mw izosi ryawe." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Ewe kuntu urukundo rwawe ari rwiza, mushikanje, mugeni wanje! Urukundo rwawe ukuntu rundutira vino! Gutāmirana kw’amavuta yawe ukuntu kundutira imibavu y’ubgoko bgose!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Iminwa yawe, mugeni wanje, itonyanga umutsāma: Ubūki n’amata biri musi y’ururimi rwawe; Gutāmirana kw’impuzu zawe kumeze nk’ugutāmirana kw’i Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Ur’ umurima uzitiriwe, mushikanje, mugeni wanje, Ur’ isōko yīmiriwe, iriba rishizwekw ikimenyetso co kuriziririza." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Iminago yo kuri wewe n’umurima w’amakomamanga, wama ivyiza; Urimwo koferu n’uduti twa narada," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Narada na karukoma, Imisigati na mudarasini, n’ibiti vyose vy’imibavu, Isenga n’imbazi n’amoko yose y’ibisosa biruta ibindi." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Ur’ iriba ryo mu mirima, Ur’isōko y’amazi yiburuka, N’imigezi itemba iva i Lebanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Kanguka, wa muyaga uva i burārūko, nawe uw’ i bumanuko, n’uze; Muhūhe ku murima wanje, kugira ng’ ubutāmirane bgaho bukwire hose. Umukunzi wanje n’aze mu murima wiwe, Arye ivyiza vyiwe vyamye muri wo." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndashitse mu murima wanje, mushikanje, mugeni wanje. Nomoroye isenga yanje ku giti, navuvuye imibavu yanje, Nariye ibinyagu vyanje n’ ubūki bganje, Nanyoye vino yanje n’amata yanje. Ni murye, bagenzi, Ni munywe, mbere ni munywe muhimbishwe n’ urukundo." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Nari nsinziriye, arik’ umutima wanje uri maso: Numva ijwi ry’umukunzi wanje aramutsa, Ati Nyugururira, mushikanje, mukunzi wanje, inanuma wanje, mwiza wanje utagira agasembga; Kuk’ umutwe wanje utonzweko n’urume, N’umushatsi wanje utonzweko n’udutonyanga tw’ ijoro." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Nti Ko nambuye umwambaro wanje: nowambara nte? Nkaba niyoze ibirenge: novyanduza nte? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Umukunzi wanje acisha ukuboko mu mwenge w’urugi, Umutima wanje wuzura ikigumbagumba kubgiwe." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndavyuka kwugururira uwo mukunzi wanje; Ibiganza vyanje bitonyangakw isenga, N’intoke zanje zitonyangakw isenga iyaze, Itonyangira ku bihindizo vy’ urugi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Maze nugururira umukunzi wanje; Ariko nsanga uwo mukunzi wanje yīgīriye, yāhise: Umutima wanje ucoberezwa n’ivyo yavuze. Ndamurondera, sinamubona; Ndamuhamagara, ntiyanyitaba." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Duhūra n’abashibamyi bagendura igisagara, Barankubita, barankomeretsa; Abarinzi b’inzitiro z’igisagara bankiza umwitwikiro wanje." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndabihanikirije, mwa bakobga b’i Yerusalemu mwe, ni mwambonera umukunzi wanje, Mumumbgirire yuk’ urukundo runshābije." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Umukunzi wawe mbeg’ arusha iki abakunzi b’abandi, Yewe urusha abandi bagore akaranga? Umukunzi wawe arusha iki abakunzi b’abandi, Igituma utwihanikiriza urtyo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Umukunzi wanje ar’ inzobe y’ikimuri, agenderana amaraso mu maso, N’akarangabgami mu bantu ibihumbi cumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Umutwe wiwe ni nk’izahabu nziza cane, Umushatsi wiwe n’intunda, wirabura nk’igikōna." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amaso yiwe ameze nk’inuma ziri ku migezi, Artyorowe n’amata, kand’ ari mu bibanza vyayo neza." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Mu misaya yiwe hameze nk’ akarima k’imbazi gatāmirana cane, Iminwa yiwe imeze nk’ibirungu, itonyanga isenga iyaze." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Intoke ziwe n’utuyogoyogo tw’izahabu zashizwek’ utubuyenge twitwa tarushishi, Umutumba wiwe umeze nk’ ihembe ry’inzovu ryabājwe, ryadombagijwek’ utwitwa safiro." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Amaguru yiwe ameze nk’ inkingi zabājwe mu mabuye yitwa marimari, zashinzwe mu dutereko tw’izahabu nziza. Ukw ameze asa n’i Lebanoni, ni mwiza bihebuje, nk’ ibiti vy’amasederi." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Akanwa kiwe kavamw’ amajambo aryoshe: mbere wese n’uw’ igikundiro. Uwo ni we mukunzi wanje, ni we mugenzi wanje, Yemwe bakobga b’i Yerusalemu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Umukunzi wawe yaroye hehe, Yewe urusha abandi bagore akaranga? Umukunzi wawe yakebereje hehe, Ngo tumurondere dufatanije nawe?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Umukunzi wanje yamanutse aja mu murima wiwe, mu turima tw’imbazi, Kuragira mu matongo, no guca ibirungu." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Nd’ uw’ umukunzi wanje, umukunzi wanje na we n’uwanje: Aragira mu birungu." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ewe mukunzi wanje, uri mwiza nk’i Tirusa, Uteye igomwe nk’i Yerusalemu, Uteye ubgoba nk’igitero c’ ingabo zigendana amabendera." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Enda se n’unkūrekw amaso yawe, Kuko bindandura umutima. Umushatsi wawe umeze nk’ umukuku w’impene Zivyagiye ku nkēngēra y’i Gileyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amenyo yawe n’akāmenge nk’umukuku w’intama Zivuye kwuhagirwa, Zifise amahasa zose, Ata n’imwe muri zo yagumbashe." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Mu misaya yawe hameze nk’igisate c’ikomamanga, Iboneka mu mwitwikiro wawe." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Har’ abamikazi mirongwitandatu, n’incoreke mirongumunani, N’abigeme batoharūrika." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Ariko inanuma wanje we atagira agasembga, ni we wanje wenyene, N’ikinege kuri nyina; N’umutoni kuri nyina yamuvyaye. Abakobga iyo bamubonye bamwita umuhirwe, Mbere n’abamikazi n’incoreke na bo n’uko, baramutazira." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Uyu ni nde arunguruka ameze nk’umutwenzi utambitse, Ni mwiza nk’ukwezi, Akayangana nk’izuba, Ateye ubgoba nk’igitero c’ ingabo zigendana amabendera?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Naramanutse nja mu murima w’ibiyōba, Ngo ndābe ibironge bitotahaye vyo mu mwonga, Ndābe yuk’ umuzabibu upfunditse, N’amakomamanga kw ashuritse." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ntarabimenya, umutima wanje wanshikanye Mu mikogote ikwegwa n’ amafarasi y’abantu banje b’intōre." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Garuka, garuka, Mushulamukazi we! Garuka, garuka, ngo tukwitegereze. Mugombera iki kwitegereza Umushulamukazi, Nk’uko mwokwitegereza abiyeretsi b’i Mahanayimu?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Ewe kuntu uturenge twawe ari twiza mu nkweto zawe, ga mukobga w’umwami! Amatako yawe ameze nk’ utugenegene tw’utubuyenge Twabājwe n’intoke z’umuhinga." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Umukondo wawe umeze nk’ agakombe kiburungushuye, Kataburamwo vino ituriranije. Iboco ryawe risa n’ikibeya c’ingano Gikikijwe ibirungu." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabere yawe yompi ameze nk’ivyagazi bibiri Vy’amahasa y’ingeregere. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Izosi ryawe rimeze nk’umunara wubakishijwe amahembe y’inzovu; Amaso yawe asa n’ibidengeri vy’i Heshiboni, biri kw irembo ry’i Bati‐Rabimu; Izuru ryawe rimeze nk’umunara w’i Lebanoni, Irābana n’i Damasiko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Umutwe wawe wemye nk’i Karumeli, Umushatsi wo ku mutwe wawe umeze nk’impuzu y’inyambarabami; Umwami n’imbohe y’ibitsibo vyawo vyamuciye agatēte." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ewe kuntu uri mwiza kand’ uteye igomwe, Yewe uwo nkunda ukampimbara!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Uburebure bgawe buri hano ni nk’ikigazi, N’amabere yawe ameze nk’ imisoko yo kuri co." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Naravuze, nti Hinge nūrire ico kigazi, Mfate amashami yaco: Amabere yawe n’abe nk’ inzabibu zo ku muzabibu, Ubgaku bg’impwemu zawe bumote nk’amacungwa;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 N’akanwa kawe kamere nka vino irushirije kuba nziza, Ishōka neza ica mu minwa y’abasinziriye." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Nd’ uw’ umukunzi wanje, Na we ndamuteye igomwe." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ngwino mukunzi wanje, dusohoke tuje ku gahinga, Twake indāro mu mihana." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Tuzinduke mu mirima y’imizabibu, Turābe kw imizabibu ipfunditse, canke kw amashurwe yayo asambuye, N’amakomamanga kw ashuritse; Aho ni ho nzokwerekera urukundo ngufitiye." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Amadudayimu aratāmirana; Kw irembo ryacu har’ ivyamye vy’igiciro vy’imyuga myinshi, bisha bo n’ivya kera, Ivyo nakuziganirije, ewe mukunzi wanje." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Iyaba wari nka musazanje, Yonse amabere ya mama! Ngusanze hanze nokugumbiriye: Ego me, nta n’uwongaya." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Nokujana, nkagushikana mu nzu ya mama, Mu nzu y’uwamvyaye. Nogusomya kuri vino ituriranije, No ku mazi y’amakomamanga yanje." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ukuboko kwawe kw’ukubamfu kwonsegura, Ukuboko kwawe kw’ukuryo kwompfumbatira." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndabihanikirije, mwa bakobga b’i Yerusalemu mwe, Ntimunkomere umukunzi, ntimumukangure, Gushitsa ah’ avyigombeye." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Mbeg’ uriya mugeni ni nde, adūga avuye mu bugaragwa, Yegamiye umukunzi wiwe? Nagukanguye musi y’igiti c’umucungwa; Aho ni ho nyoko ibise vyamufatiye akuvyara, Ni ho uwakuvyaye yafatiwe n’ibise." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Nshira ku mutima wawe nk’ ikimenyetso, mbe nk’ikimenyetso ku kuboko kwawe: Kuk’ urukundo rufise inkomezi nk’urupfu, Ifuhe rinyinyaraye nk’i kuzimu; Ibirimi vyavyo ni nk’ibirimi vy’umuriro, N’urubeya rw’inkazi rw’ Uhoraho." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amazi n’iyo yoba menshi ntiyozimya urukundo, N’inzūzi zuzuye ntizorurenga hejuru. Umuntu yotanga ivy’ afise vyose mu rugo rwiwe, ngw aje kugura urukundo, Yogawa rwose!" 
SongOfSongs8:8 Dufise murumuna wacu mutoya, Atarasonga amabere. None tuzogira dute murumuna wacu Igihe azosabirwa?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Namb’ ameze nk’uruzitiro rw’amabuye Tuzomwubakak’ umutara w’ ifeza. Namb’ ameze nk’umuryango Tuzomukingishiriza imbaho z’amasederi. 
SongOfSongs8:10 Jeho nd’ uruzitiro rw’amabuye, kand’ amabere yanje ni yo minara yarwo: Mu maso y’umugabo wanje mmeze nk’ūronse amahoro." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Salomo yar’ afise uruzabibu i Bayali‐Hamoni; Yarusigaranye abarimyi; Umuntu wese muri bo yagerewe gutanga amahera y’ifeza igihumbi ku nzabibu zarwo. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Urwanje ruzabibu rwo, rur’ imbere yanje: Yewe Salomo, uzohabga ca gihumbi cawe, Kand’ ababungabunga inzabibu zarwo na bo bazohabga amajana abiri." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Yewe uba mu mirima, Abagenzi bateze amatwi ijwi ryawe: N’urinyumvishe nanje." 
SongOfSongs8:14 N’unyaruke, mukunzi wanje, Umere nk’ingeregere canke nk’umukangara w’impongo, Wo ku misozi ibakw imibavu." 
Isaiah1:1 Ivyo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe, ivyo yabonye ku b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ku ngoma ya Uziya no ku ya Yotamu no ku ya Ahazi no ku ya Hezekiya, abami b’i Buyuda." 
Isaiah1:1 Ivyo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe, ivyo yabonye ku b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ku ngoma ya Uziya no ku ya Yotamu no ku ya Ahazi no ku ya Hezekiya, abami b’i Buyuda." 
Isaiah1:2 Ni mwumve, mwa majuru, tega amatwi, wa si we, kuk’ Uhoraho abivuze: ati Narakujije abana, ndabarera, maze barampinduka." 
Isaiah1:3 Inka irazi nyeneyo, n’indogoba irazi ubgato bga shebuja: arikw Abisirayeli bo nta co bazi, abantu banje nta co batahura." 
Isaiah1:4 Ewe wa hanga rikora icaha, ubgoko buremerewe n’ukugabitanya, uruvyaro rw’inkozi z’ibibi, abana b’ivyanke! Barantaye, jewe Uhoraho, barankengēra, jewe Uwera w’Abisirayeli; twārahubanywe, bāsubiye inyuma." 
Isaiah1:5 Mbega n’ubu muracadaramīra ngo mukubitwe, ko mwiyongeranya kugarariza? Umutwe wose urarwaye, umutima wose uradendebukiwe." 
Isaiah1:6 Uhereye mu bgoro bg’ikirenge ugashitsa ku mutwe nta hazima hariho, atar’ inguma n’ibipfupfuri n’imishishagu, bitigeze gukandwa canke gupfukwa canke kubombekeshwa amavuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Igihugu canyu n’amatongo, ibisagara vyanyu vyakomvomvowe n’umuriro, abanyamahanga babaryana igihugu canyu mubona, kandi cacitse amatongo nk’ahakomvomvowe n’abanyamahanga koko." 
Isaiah1:8 Umukobga w’i Siyoni asigaye ameze nk’umutara uri mu ruzabibu, ameze nk’urusago ruri mu ndimiro y’imyungu, ameze nk’igisagara gitawe hagati n’abansi." 
Isaiah1:9 Iyaba Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo atadushigarije amasigarira na makeya, tuba twarabaye nk’i Sodomu, tukamera nk’i Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge abaganza i Sodomu; mutegere amatwi ivyagezwe vy’Imana yacu, mwa bantu b’i Gomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Ibimazi vyanyu vy’isinzi bimmariye iki? ni k’Uhoraho abaza. Ati Mpāze ivyo bimazi vyoshejwe vy’amasuguru y’intama, n’ibinure vy’ibitungwa bivyibushe; kandi simpimbarwa n’amaraso y’amashūri n’ay’ imyagazi y’intama n’ay’ amasuguru y’impene." 
Isaiah1:12 Iyo muje kunshengerera, ni nde aba yābabariye gupfa kunkandagirira mu rugo?" 
Isaiah1:13 Ntimukongere kunshikanira amashikanwa atagira ikimazi: imibavu n’igisesema kuri jewe; imboneko z’amezi n’amasabato no gukoranya ibikorane — eka sinshobora kwihanganira amakoraniro y’agahebuza avanze n’ibigabitanyo! 
Isaiah1:14 Uko muziririza imboneko z’amezi n’imisi mikuru mwashiriweho, umutima wanje urabizinutswe; birangoye, ndambiwe kuvyihanganira." 
Isaiah1:15 Ni mwatega amaboko yanyu nzobahisha mu nyonga hanje; mbere naho mwosenga amasengesho menshi sinzobumviriza: amaboko yanyu yuzuyekw ibitenga vy’amaraso. 
Isaiah1:16 Ni mwiyuhagire, mwitunganye, mukūreh’ ibibi vyo mu bikorwa vyanyu bive mu nyonga zanje; mureke gukora ibibi," 
Isaiah1:17 mwige gukora neza; mushimikire imanza zibereye, mutabare abahahazwa, mucire urubanza impfuvyi, mubūranire abapfakazi." 
Isaiah1:18 Enda ni muze, twītātūre, ni k’Uhoraho agize; nah’ ivyaha vyanyu vyotukura tukutuku, bizokwera derere nka shelegi; naho vyotukura nk’agahama, bizohinduka nk’ubgoya bg’intama y’umwero." 
Isaiah1:19 Ni mwemera mukumvira, muzorya ivyiza vyo mu gihugu." 
Isaiah1:20 Na ho ni mwanka mukagarariza, inkota izobarya: kukw akanwa kanje Uhoraho ari ko kabivuze." 
Isaiah1:21 Eh’ ukuntu umurwa wizigirwa ucitse maraya; ahāhora huzura imanza ziroranye, hakaba i wabo w’ubugororotsi, none hasigaye ar’ ah’ abicanyi." 
Isaiah1:22 Ifeza zawe zihindutse inkamba, vino zawe zihindutse imihwanyo." 
Isaiah1:23 Abakuru bawe n’abagarariji, n’abagenzi b’ibisuma; umuntu wese muri bo akunda ingurire, akurikira guhongerwa; ntibacira urubanza impfuvyi, kand’ imanza z’abapfakazi ntizigera aho bari." 
Isaiah1:24 Ni co gituma Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Inyenkomezi y’Abisirayeli, avuga, at’ Erega nzotururuzwa n’ukwīhōra abarwanizi banje, kand’ abansi banje nzobasubiriza mu nkōko!" 
Isaiah1:25 Nzogufatisha ukuboko kwanje, ngukūremwo rwose inkamba zawe, nkumaremw’ urwevu rwawe rwose." 
Isaiah1:26 Nzosubizah’ abacamanza bawe nk’ubga mbere, n’abajanama bawe nko mu matangura; uheze witwe igisagara c’ubugororotsi, umurwa wizigirwa." 
Isaiah1:27 I Siyoni hazocunguzwa guca iziroranye, abīsubiyemwo baho bazocunguzwa ukugororoka." 
Isaiah1:28 Arikw abacumura n’abanyavyaha bazotikirizwa rimwe, kand’ abataye Uhoraho bazohona." 
Isaiah1:29 Kuko muzomāramāzwa n’ibiti vy’imyeloni mwishimiye, kandi muzokwumizwa n’ibigabiro mwashimye;" 
Isaiah1:30 kuko muzomera nk’umweloni uravye amababi, canke nk’ikigabiro kitagira amazi." 
Isaiah1:31 Umunyenkomezi azohinduka nk’ibisūsūrwa, n’igikorwa ciwe nk’ isase ry’umuriro; vyompi bizohīra hamwe, kandi nta wuzobizimya." 
Isaiah2:1 Ijambo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe ku b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah2:1 Ijambo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe ku b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah2:2 Mu misi y’iherezo umurwa wubatswekw ingoro y’Uhoraho uzogasara ku mpinga z’imisozi, uzoshirwa hejuru y’iyindi mirambi; kand’ amahanga yose azosendanisha aja kuri wo." 
Isaiah2:3 Amoko menshi azojayo, abarirane, ati Ni muze tudūge, tuje ku murwa w’Uhoraho, ku ngoro y’Imana ya Yakobo, kugira ngw itwigishe ivy’ inzira zayo, natwe tuzigenderemwo; kukw i Siyoni ari ho hazova ivyagezwe, n’i Yerusalemu hakava ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah2:4 Azocira imanza amahanga, atātūre amoko menshi; inkota zabo bazozivunjamw’ amasuka, n’amacumu bazoyavunjamw’ inkero; nta hanga rizobangurira irindi hanga inkota, kandi ntibazokwiga kurwana ukundi." 
Isaiah2:5 Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Yakobo, ni muze tugendere mu muco w’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah2:6 Kukw abantu bawe, ari bo nzu ya Yakobo, wabahebeshejwe n’uko buzuyemw’ imigenzo ivuye i burasirazuba, bakaragura nk’Abafilisitiya, kandi bakifatanya n’abana b’abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah2:7 Igihugu cabo na co cuzuye ifeza n’izahabu, kand’ ubutunzi bgabo n’isinzi; igihugu cabo cuzuye n’amafarasi, imikogote yabo n’ibitayega." 
Isaiah2:8 Igihugu cabo cuzuye n’ibigirwamana; basenga ivyakozwe n’amaboko yabo, intoke zabo ubgabo ari zo zabikoze." 
Isaiah2:9 Abantu bazosubizwa hasi, abahambaye bacishwe bugufi; nawe ntuz’ ubaharire." 
Isaiah2:10 Injira mw isenga, wihishe mu mukungugu, uhunge ubukare bg’Uhoraho, n’ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe." 
Isaiah2:11 Kurābana agakēngērwe kw’abantu kuzocishwa bugufi, n’ubgibone bg’abahambaye buzosubizwa hasi, Uhoraho wenyene ni we azoba ashizwe hejuru kur’ uwo musi." 
Isaiah2:12 Kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo afitiye umusi ivyibona vyose n’ivyivuna, n’ivyishira hejuru vyose, kandi bizocishwa bugufi." 
Isaiah2:13 Uwo musi uzoba no ku biti vy’amasederi vy’i Lebanoni vyose birebire vyishira hejuru, no ku vy’imyeloni vy’i Bashani vyose," 
Isaiah2:14 no ku misozi miremire yose, no ku misozi yose yishira hejuru," 
Isaiah2:15 no ku munara wose ushizwe hejuru, no ku ruzitiro rurerure rwose rw’amabuye," 
Isaiah2:16 no ku māto yose y’i Tarushishi, no ku bishushanyo vyose binezereza." 
Isaiah2:17 Kand’ agakēngērwe k’abantu kazosubizwa hasi, n’ubgibone bg’abahambaye buzocishwa bugufi, Uhoraho wenyene ni we azoba ashizwe hejuru kur’ uwo musi." 
Isaiah2:18 Ibigirwamana bizoherengetera rwose. 
Isaiah2:19 Kand’ abantu bazokwinjira mu masenga yo mu bitandara, no mu vyobo vyo mu kuzimu, bahunga ubukare bg’Uhoraho, n’ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe, ah’ azohaguruka gutigitisha isi." 
Isaiah2:20 Kur’ uwo musi umuntu azoshibura ibigirwamana vyiwe vy’ifeza, n’ibigirwamana vyiwe vy’izahabu, ivyo bamucuriye ngw abisenge, abishiburire amafuku n’ubuhungarema;" 
Isaiah2:21 aje mu masenga yo mu bitandara, no mu bihoro vyo mu bitandara nyene, ahunga ubukare bg’Uhoraho, n’ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe, ah’ azohaguruka gutigitisha isi." 
Isaiah2:22 Ni mureke kwishimira abantu, abari n’impwemu gusa mu mazuru yabo: mbega bamaze iki?" 
Isaiah3:1 Rāba Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, anyaze ab’ i Yerusalemu n’Abayuda icishimikizo n’inkoni begamiye, icishimikizo cose, ari co vyo kurya vyabo, n’icishimikizo cose, ari co mazi yabo;" 
Isaiah3:2 hamwe n’umuhizi n’intōre, n’umucamanza n’ūvugishwa n’Imana, n’umupfumu n’umushingantahe," 
Isaiah3:3 n’umugabisha w’ingabo mirongwitanu n’umunyacubahiro, n’umujanama, n’umukozi w’umuhinga, n’umupfumu w’incabanganya." 
Isaiah3:4 Nzobaha abana babe ari bo babatwara, kand’ imicūko ni yo izobaganza." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu bazohahazanya, umuntu wese azohahazwa na mugenzi we, umuntu wese ahahazwe n’umubanyi wiwe: umusore azoshinyaguriza umutāma, n’inkēngērwa izoshinyaguriza umunyacubahiro." 
Isaiah3:6 Ico gihe umuntu azofata uwo bavukana mu rugo rwa se, amubgire, ati Kw ari wewe ufise imyambaro, ba ari wewe utuganza, n’ibi bitongozi abe ari wewe ubitwara." 
Isaiah3:7 Uwo musi na we azosemerera, ati Sinshobora kubasanasana, kukw i wanje ata vyo kurya ngira, ata n’imyambaro: nta co mungira umutware w’abantu." 
Isaiah3:8 I Yerusalemu haradandabagiranye, i Buyuda haratemvye; kuk’ ururimi rwabo n’ibikorwa vyabo ar’ ibigarariza Uhoraho, bakajinyūrira imbere y’inyonga ziwe z’icubahiro." 
Isaiah3:9 Ishusho yo mu maso habo ni yo ibāgiriza; bērura icaha cabo nk’ab’ i Sodomu, ntibagihisha. Ubugingo bgabo buzobona ibara, kukw ari bo bīhamagariye ivyago." 
Isaiah3:10 Mubgire umugororotsi kw azomererwa neza, kukw azotungwa n’ivyo ibikorwa vyiwe vyāmūje." 
Isaiah3:11 Umunyavyaha azobona ibara! Azomererwa nabi, kukw azogererwa ingero y’ivyo amaboko yiwe yakoze." 
Isaiah3:12 Yamar’ abantu banje, abana ni bo babacuranguza, kand’ abagore ni bo babaganza. Yemwe bantu banje, ababarōngōra barabazimiza, kandi bazimanganya inzira mwociyemwo." 
Isaiah3:13 Uhoraho ahagurukijwe no kubūrana, kand’ ahagurukijwe no gucira amahanga imanza." 
Isaiah3:14 Uhoraho azoshira abakuru b’abantu biwe n’abaganwa babo mu rukinja, ati Ni mwebge mwakomvye uruzabibu, ivyo mwanyaze impahazwa biri mu ngo zanyu:" 
Isaiah3:15 mukora ibiki, gusekura abantu banje, mugasya impahazwa? ni k’Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, abaza." 
Isaiah3:16 Bitayeko Uhoraho aravuze, ngw Abakobga b’i Siyoni ko bībona, bakagenda bararitse amazosi n’amaso y’ubgēruzi, bakagenda bīkūmagura, bajegeza amayugi ku maguru:" 
Isaiah3:17 ni co kizotuma Umwami Imana atēza abakobga b’i Siyoni ibihūshi mu bitwariro, Uhoraho agatwikurura ibiteye isoni vyabo." 
Isaiah3:18 Kur’ uwo musi Umwami Imana azobashazūra ugushaza kw’inyerere zabo, n’ibikubi, n’ibihete," 
Isaiah3:19 n’impeta zo ku matwi, n’indinga, n’inkekezo bīshīshira," 
Isaiah3:20 n’ibitsibo, n’imigufu yo ku maguru, n’imisipi, n’udukebano tw’ibitāmirana, n’uduhēko," 
Isaiah3:21 n’impeta zo ku ntoke n’izo ku mazuru," 
Isaiah3:22 n’impuzu zo ku misi mikuru, n’imitamana, n’impuzu zo kurenza hejuru, n’udupfuko," 
Isaiah3:23 n’ivyirore, n’imvune zera, n’ibitambara bīteze mu mutwe, n’ubuyonga." 
Isaiah3:24 Maze mu gishingo c’imbazi hazoba umunūko; mu gishingo c’ikimano c’ubudede hazoba umugozi; mu gishingo c’umushatsi utsivye hazoba inkomvorera; mu gishingo c’impuzu y’igisāga hazoba igunira; n’ibikovukovu mu gishingo c’amarangi.
