Isaiah3:25 Intōre zawe zizokwicwa n’inkota, abahizi bawe bazogwa mu ntambara." 
Isaiah3:26 Amarembo y’i Siyoni azorira aboroge: hazokwicara hasi hasigaye ar’ umuzigirizwa. 
Isaiah4:1 Uwo musi abakobga ndwi bazofata umugabo umwe, bamubgire, bati Tuzokwīrīra ivyo kurya vyacu, tuzokwiyambika impuzu zacu: kimwe gusa, uduhe kukwitirirwa izina ryawe, nawe udutēturure." 
Isaiah4:2 Uwo musi ishami ry’Uhoraho rizoba ryiza rifise icubahiro; ivyo igihugu kizokwama bizoryohera abazoba barokotse bo mu Bisirayeli, bavyirate." 
Isaiah4:3 Maz’ ūzoba asigaye i Siyoni, n’ūzoba asigaye i Yerusalemu, umuntu wese yanditswe mu bakiriho b’i Yerusalemu, azokwitwa uwera," 
Isaiah4:4 Umwami Imana amaze kwuhagira imyanda abakobga b’i Siyoni ayirangije, kand’ amaze gukūra kuri Yerusalemu amaraso y’abantu, ayakūjeh’ impwemu y’amateka n’impwemu yo guturira." 
Isaiah4:5 Kandi hejuru y’inzu yose yo ku musozi Siyoni no ku makoraniro yaho Uhoraho azoharemera igicu n’umwotsi ku murango, no guca ibikēke kw’umuriro waka mw ijoro: kuko hejuru y’ubgiza bgose hazobah’ igitwikira." 
Isaiah4:6 Kandi hazobah’ ihema ku murango ryo gutera igitūtu kubg’ indugumba, ribe n’ubuhungiro n’ubgugamo bg’isegenya n’imvura." 
Isaiah5:1 Hinge ndirimbe ivy’ umukunzi wanje, indirimbo y’uwo nkunda ivuga ivy’ uruzabibu rwiwe. Umukunzi wanje yagize uruzabibu ku musozi umera cane:" 
Isaiah5:2 yari yararurimiriye, akūramw’ amabuye, ateramw’ imizabibu y’ubgoko bgiza, arwubakamw’ umutara hagati, arwimbamwo n’ikinogo, agikora bga bgato: nuko yaziga ko ruzokwama inzabibu, ariko rwama ibijabija vy’inzabibu." 
Isaiah5:3 None rero mwa baba i Yerusalemu, namwe bagabo b’i Buyuda, ndabinginze mudutātūre, twe n’uruzabibu rwanje." 
Isaiah5:4 Ico nari gukorera uruzabibu rwanje ntārukoreye n’igiki? Ko naziga ko ruzokwama inzabibu, n’iki catumye rwama ibijabija vy’inzabibu?" 
Isaiah5:5 None rero reka mbereke ivyo ngira ngirire uruzabibu rwanje: ngira nkūreh’ ururombero rwarwo, maze rwonwe ruvumburwe; kandi nsambure uruzitiro rwarwo, rucibge iyondoyondo;" 
Isaiah5:6 kandi ndaruririke; ntiruzotuturirwa, ntiruzorimirirwa, ariko ruzomeramw’ imikere n’amahwa; kandi nzobuza ibicu vyoye kurugwishakw imvura." 
Isaiah5:7 Kuk’ uruzabibu rw’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari rwo nzu ya Isirayeli, kand’ abagabo b’i Buyuda ari bo muzabibu wamuhimbara; kandi yabazigamw’ imanza zibereye arikw abasangamw’ uguhahaza: yabazigamw’ ubugororotsi arikw abasangamw’ amaborogo." 
Isaiah5:8 Bazobona ibara, abomeka ingo ku zindi bakīkumirakw amatongo, gushitsa hatagira ahasigaye, mukaba ari mwebge mwenyene musigaye mwiganziye hagati mu gihugu!" 
Isaiah5:9 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yavugiye mu matwi yanje, ati N’ukuri ingo nyinshi zizoba imisaka, mbere na nini‐nini nziza zizosigara ata wukizibamwo." 
Isaiah5:10 Kukw imirima cumi y’imizabibu izoreta umubindi umwe, kand’ igisamba cagezwemw’ imbuto kizozana inkōko gusa." 
Isaiah5:11 Bazobona ibara, abazindurwa mu gatondo no kwirukira ibiboreza, bakarāra kw ijoro gushitsa vino ibaboreje!" 
Isaiah5:12 Mw inywa ryabo bagira inanga n’ikembe n’agashako k’ingoma n’umwironge na vino; yamara ntibītegereza igikorwa c’Uhoraho, ntibashira umutima ku gikorwa c’amaboko yiwe." 
Isaiah5:13 Ni co catumye abantu banje bajanwa ar’ inyagano, ata co bigeze bamenya: abanyacubahiro bo muri bo bishwe n’inzara, kand’ ishengero ryabo ryose ryāgatuwe n’inyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Ni co catumye i kuzimu harangara, hāsamitse akanwa kaho birengeje urugero: maz’ abakire b’i Yerusalemu na ba nyarucari baho barokeramwo, bakiri mu gahimbo, bavuza urwamo." 
Isaiah5:15 Abantu bazosubizwa hasi, abahambaye bacishwe bugufi, abībone bacurike amaso hasi:" 
Isaiah5:16 arik’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azoba ashizwe hejuru n’imanza ziroranye, kand’ Imana Yera izokwerekanisha ukwera kwayo ubugororotsi." 
Isaiah5:17 Ico gihe imyagazi y’intama izorisha nk’ah’ ari mu canya cayo, kand’ ivyo mu matongo y’abakire abayerera ni bo bazobirya." 
Isaiah5:18 Bazobona ibara, abīkwegera igihano, bagikwegesheje umugozi w’ibinyoma, bakīkwegera akaziri nk’aho bagakwegesheje ikiyonzoyonzo gikwega umukogote:" 
Isaiah5:19 bakavuga, bati N’anyaruke, atebutse igikorwa ciwe tukirābe: kand’ imigabo y’Uwera w’Abisirayeli ni yīgire hafi ishike, kugira ngo tuyimenye!" 
Isaiah5:20 Bazobona ibara, abīta ikibi iciza, iciza bakacīta ikibi; bagashira umwiza mu gishingo c’umuco, n’umuco mu gishingo c’umwiza; bagashira ibirura mu gishingo c’ibisosa, n’ibisosa mu gishingo c’ibirura!" 
Isaiah5:21 Bazobona ibara, abīyita abanyabgenge ubgabo, bakībgira kw ar’ abahanga!" 
Isaiah5:22 Bazobona ibara, abīgira agakūra mu kunywa vino, bakaba abagabo bo guturiranya ibiboreza;" 
Isaiah5:23 bagatsindanishiriza abanyakibi kubg’ ingurire, ariko bagakūra urubanza ku bagororotsi!" 
Isaiah5:24 Nuko rero, nk’ukw ibirimi vy’umuriro bitongora ibirararara, kandi nk’uk’ ubgatsi bgumye bunyikira mu muriro, ni kw igishitsi cabo kizoba nk’ikibore, n’amashurwe yabo azotumuka nk’umukungugu: kuko bāgaye ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, bagakēngēra ijambo ry’Uwera w’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah5:25 Ni co catumye uburake bg’Uhoraho buziriringira abantu biwe, akababangurira ukuboko, akabakubita, imisozi ikaja mu gatengo, maz’ imivyimba yabo ikamera nk’imyanda hagati mu mayira. Yamara na ho nyene uburake bgiwe ntiburahwama, arik’ ukuboko kwiwe kuracabanguye." 
Isaiah5:26 Kand’ azomanikira amahanga ya kure ibendera, abahamagaze uruhwa ngo bave ku mpera y’isi; na bo bazoza n’ingoga bihuta." 
Isaiah5:27 Muri bo nta wuzoruha canke ngw atsitare, nta wuzohunyiza canke ngw asinzire; n’umukanda bakenyeje ntuzokenyuruka, kandi n’utugozi tw’inkweto zabo ntituzocika;" 
Isaiah5:28 imyampi yabo irasongoye, n’imiheto yabo yose irabanze; inzāra z’amafarasi yabo zizomera nk’isare, n’amakurudumu y’imikogote yabo azogenda nk’agashururu." 
Isaiah5:29 Ukwivuga kwabo kuzoba nk’ukw’ intambge, bazokwivuga nk’imigunza y’intambge: ni koko bazotontoma basahura isahu, bayīnyagira, ata wuriho wo gutabara." 
Isaiah5:30 Kur’ uwo musi bazobabomboranira hejuru nk’ukw ikiyaga kibomborana: kand’ uwokwitegereza ico gihugu yobona har’ umwiza n’ivyago, kand’ umuco uzimanganijwe n’ibicu bihubikije." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu mwaka Umwami Uziya yatanzemwo, nabonye Umwami Imana avyagiye ku ntebe y’ubgami ndende, ashizwe hejuru, impuzu yiwe y’igisāga yuzuye urusengero." 
Isaiah6:2 Abaserafi bari bahagaze hejuru yiwe: umuserafi wese yar’ afise amababa atandatu: abiri yayatwikiriza mu maso, yandi abiri yayatwikiriza ibirenge, yandi abiri yarayagurukisha." 
Isaiah6:3 Babarirana basemerera, bat’ Uwera, Uwera, Uwera, ni we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo: isi yose yuzuye icubahiro ciwe." 
Isaiah6:4 Amatanguriro y’imiryango anyiganyizwa n’ugusemerera kwabo, inzu yuzura umwotsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Maze ndavuga, nti Mbonye ibara, ndapfuye; kuko nd’ umunyaminwa yanduye, kandi mba hagati y’ubgoko bufise iminwa yanduye; kukw amaso yanje abonye Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Isaiah6:6 Maz’ umwe mu baserafi araguruka, aza aho ndi, afise ikara ryaka mu ntoke, yokoje ikimano ku gicaniro;" 
Isaiah6:7 arinkoza ku munwa, arambarira, at’ Ehe, iri rikoze ku minwa yawe; ukugabitanya kwawe ugukūweko, icaha cawe kirahongewe." 
Isaiah6:8 Numva ijwi ry’Umwami Imana rivuga, riti Ndatuma nde, ni nde yotugīra? Maze ndavuga, nti Ndi hano, ba ari jewe utuma." 
Isaiah6:9 Arambarira, ati Genda, ubarire ubgo bgoko, uti Kwumva muzokwama mwumva, ariko ntimubitahure; kurāba muzokwama murāba, ariko ntimuvyihweze." 
Isaiah6:10 Wame ukomantaza umutima w’ubgo bgoko, uhindure amatwi yabo bihurugutwi, uhume amaso yabo; kugira ngo ntibarābīshe amaso, ntibumvishe amatwi, ntibatahurishe imitima, ngo bahindukire bakire." 
Isaiah6:11 Ndamubaza, nti Mwami, n’ugushitsa ryari? Aranyishura, ati N’ugushitsa ah’ ibisagara bizobera imisaka, ata wukibibamwo, n’amazu ata wukiyabamwo, n’igihugu kigahinduka amatongo masa," 
Isaiah6:12 jewe Uhoraho mpejeje gucuranguriza abantu kure, kand’ amatongo akaba menshi mur’ iki gihugu." 
Isaiah6:13 Kandi naho cosigarwamwo n’ikigiracumi co muri bo, na bo bazokwongera batikizwe: nk’ukw ibiti vy’umwela n’umweloni bisigarana igishitsi, bimaze gucibga, ni k’uruvyaro rwera ar’ igishitsi cabo." 
Isaiah7:1 Ku ngoma ya Ahazi mwene Yotamu, Yotamu wa Uziya, umwami w’i Buyuda, Rezini umwami w’i Siriya na Peka mwene Remaliya umwami w’Abisirayeli badūga i Yerusalemu kuhatera, maze harabananira." 
Isaiah7:2 Babūrira umuryango wa Dawidi, bat’ Abasiriya bifatanije n’Abefurayimu. Maz’ umutima wa Ahazi urahungabana, bo n’imitima y’ abantu biwe, nk’ukw ibiti vyo mu kibira bihungabanywa n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah7:3 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira Yesaya, ati Sohoka non’ ubu, uje gusanganira Ahazi, wewe na Sheyari‐yashubu umwana wawe, murahūrira ah’ umugende wo ku kidengeri co haruguru ugarukira, ku nzira yo ku kibuga c’umumesuzi;" 
Isaiah7:4 maz’ umubarire, uti Witonde, ureme; woye gutinya, kandi nturandurwe umutima n’ivyo bishirīra bibiri bifumba, bo n’uburake bg’inkazi bga Rezini n’Abasiriya n’ubga mwene Remaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Abasiriya n’Abefurayimu na mwene Remaliya ko baguhigiye imihigo, bakavuga," 
Isaiah7:6 bati Ni muze tudūge dutere i Buyuda, tubakūre imitima, tuhace icuho, twiyimikire umwami hagati muri co, mwene Tabeli:" 
Isaiah7:7 ut’ Ico ni co gitumye Uhoraho Imana agize, ngw Iyo migabo ntizohama kandi ntizoshika." 
Isaiah7:8 Kukw iremezo ry’i Siriya ari Damasiko, kand’ iremezo ry’i Damasiko ari Rezini; kand’ imyaka mirongwitandatu n’itanu itarashira Abefurayimu bazovungwavungwa, ntibabe bakiba ihanga;" 
Isaiah7:9 kand’ iremezo ry’Abefurayimu ni Samariya, kand’ iremezo ry’i Samariya ni mwene Remaliya. Ariko ni mwanka kwizera, n’ukuri ntimuzoshikama." 
Isaiah7:10 Uhoraho yongera kubarira Ahazi," 
Isaiah7:11 ati Nyaka ikimenyamenya, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, ar’ ic’ i kuzimu cank’ ar’ ico hejuru mw ijuru." 
Isaiah7:12 Ariko Ahazi arishura, ati Sinocaka, kandi sinogerageza Uhoraho." 
Isaiah7:13 Yesaya aramwishura, ati Ni mwumve none rero, wa muryango wa Dawidi; ko kibaye icoroshe kuri mwebge kugora abantu, none mugomba kugora n’Imana yanje na yo?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ni co gitumye Uhoraho ubgiwe ari we agira abīhēre ikimenyamenya: Rāba, inkumi izosama inda, ivyare umwana w’umuhungu, izomwita Imanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Urubu n’ubūki ni vyo bizomutunga, amaze kumenya ubgenge bgo kwanka ibibi agakunda ivyiza." 
Isaiah7:16 Kuk’ uwo mwana ataramenya ubgenge bgo kwanka ibibi no gukunda ivyiza, igihugu c’abo bami bompi wagiriye ubgoba kizocika amatongo." 
Isaiah7:17 Uhoraho azogutēza imisi mibi, wewe n’abantu bawe n’inzu ya so, imisi itigeze kubaho, uhereye umusi Abefurayimu bātandukanye n’Abayuda: ni kwo guterwa n’ umwami w’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah7:18 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohamagaza uruhwa isāzi ziri ku mpera z’inzūzi zo muri Egiputa, n’inzuki zo mu gihugu c’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah7:19 Bizoza, vyose bizokwarara mu biyaya bisigaye ar’ imisaka, no mu masenga yo mu bitandara, no ku mahwa yose, no ku bgatsi hose." 
Isaiah7:20 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azomwa ku mutwe n’ubgoya bgo ku mubiri, abimweshe urupfuhe rutiwe ku mahera, ruba hakurya y’uruzi, ni rwo mwami w’i Ashuri, mbere ruzonatōtōra n’ubganwa." 
Isaiah7:21 Kandi kur’ uwo musi umuntu azoragira agaka k’iriza n’intama zibiri; 
Isaiah7:22 maze kukw amata bikamwa azoba ari menshi, azosamwa n’ urubu: kuk’ urubu n’ubūki bizoba ari vyo bisama umuntu wese azoba asigaye hagati mu gihugu." 
Isaiah7:23 Kandi kur’ uwo musi ahantu hose hāba imizabibu igihumbi yagurwa amahera yitwa shekeli igihumbi, hazoba ah’ imikere n’amahwa." 
Isaiah7:24 Hazoshikay’ abitwaje umuheto n’imyampi, kukw igihugu cose kizoba ar’ imikere n’amahwa." 
Isaiah7:25 Kandi n’imisozi yose yahora irimishwa isuka, ntuzohēgēra kubgo gutinya imikere n’amahwa, ariko hazoba aho kurishwa umwagambo n’inka, no guhonyangwa n’intama." 
Isaiah8:1 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Wābīre igisate kinini, ucandikeko mu nyuguti zisomeka, uti Bīhutira iminyago, bītera mw isahu." 
Isaiah8:2 Nanje nzokwitorera ivyabona vyo kwizigirwa vyo kubishingira intahe, umuherezi yitwa Uriya, na Zekariya mwene Yeberekiya." 
Isaiah8:3 Nuko ndārira umugore w’ūvugishwa, asama inda, avyara umuhungu. Maz’ Uhoraho aca arambarira, ati Mwite Maheri‐shalali‐hashi‐bazi." 
Isaiah8:4 Kuk’ uwo mwana ataramenya ubgenge bgo guhamagara, ati Data, canke Mama, ubutunzi bg’i Damasiko n’ iminyago y’i Samariya bizojanwa kw inyagano n’umwami w’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah8:5 Uhoraho yongera kumbarira," 
Isaiah8:6 at’ Ubu bgoko ko bganse amazi ya Shilowa atemba buhoro, bakanezerezwa na Rezini na mwene Remaliya," 
Isaiah8:7 nuko rero jewe Umwami Imana ngira mbatēze amazi ya rwa ruzi rundi, amazi menshi y’inkomezi, ni yo mwami w’i Ashuri n’icubahiro ciwe cose: azosēsa ku nkombe ziwe zose, adēngēre amasēsero yiwe yose;" 
Isaiah8:8 kand’ azosēndēra ashike i Buyuda: azosendanisha ahahitane, ashike no mw izosi ry’umuntu; kandi gusanza amababa kwiwe kuzokwira igihugu cawe cose, yewe Imanuweli." 
Isaiah8:9 Ni mukorane, mwa mahanga mwe: ariko muzovunagurika; tega amatwi, mwebge mwese bo mu bihugu vya kure: mukenyere, ariko muzovunagurika! Mukenyere, ariko muzovunagurika!" 
Isaiah8:10 Ni muje inama, ariko zizopfa ubusa; ni muje ingingo, ariko ntizoshika, kukw Imana iri kumwe natwe." 
Isaiah8:11 Kuk’ Uhoraho ambariye artya, anshizek’ ukuboko kw’inkomezi, anyihanikiriza ngo singendere mu nzira y’ubu bgoko," 
Isaiah8:12 ati Ntimwite imihigo vya bindi vyose ubgo bgoko bgita imihigo; ntimukagire ubgoba nk’ubgabo, kandi ntimukaranduke imitima." 
Isaiah8:13 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abe ari we mwemera ko yera, abe ari we ababera agahambaye, abe ari we ababera igiteye ubgoba." 
Isaiah8:14 Nukw azobabera ahēra; arikw azobera inzu zompi z’Abisirayeli ibuye ritsitaza n’urutare rugwisha, abere n’ababa i Yerusalemu ururiba n’ umutego." 
Isaiah8:15 Benshi bazoritsitarako, batembe bavunagurike, bazotegwa bafatwe." 
Isaiah8:16 Andika ivyo washingiye intahe, ubimatanishe ishashara, ubihe abigishwa banje babishirek’ umutima." 
Isaiah8:17 Kandi nzokwitega Uhoraho, ari we ahisha ab’ inzu ya Yakobo mu nyonga hiwe, nzokwama ndamwizigira." 
Isaiah8:18 Ehe twe n’abana Uhoraho yampaye tur’ abo kubera Abisirayeli ibimenyamenya n’ibitangaza biva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo aba ku musozi Siyoni. 
Isaiah8:19 Kandi ni bababgira, ngo Ni mubaze abahamagara imizimu, mubaze n’abamenyi bajwigira bongorera: mbeg’ ikibereye abantu ntibāri bakwiye kubaza Imana yabo? Mbeg’ ivy’ abariho vyobazwa abapfuye?" 
Isaiah8:20 Dusubire ku vyagezwe no kuri vya Bishinga intahe! Ni batāvuga ibihwanye na vyo bazoba mu bgirantibuce. 
Isaiah8:21 Bazoca mu gihugu bamerewe nabi cane bashonje: maze ni bafatwa n’inzara bazoshangashirwa, bavume umwami wabo n’ Imana yabo; bazorarama barābe hejuru:" 
Isaiah8:22 bazokwitegereza no kw isi, basange har’ ivyago n’umwiza n’umubabaro ubīriraniyeko: maze bazohindirwa mu mwiza w’umuzitanya." 
Isaiah9:1 Ariko ntibuzosubira kwiriranira ukundi ku wahoze ari mu mubabaro. Mu gihe ca kera yateye agakēngērwe igihugu ca Zebuloni n’igihugu ca Nafutali, ariko mu gihe co hanyuma yagiteye icubahiro, ku nzira ikikiye ikiyaga, hakurya ya Yorodani, i Galilaya h’abanyamahanga." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu bāgendera mu mwiza babonye umuco mwinshi, abāba mu gihugu c’igitūtu c’urupfu ni bo bākiwe n’umuco." 
Isaiah9:3 Wagwije ihanga, wabongeye umunezero, banezererwa imbere yawe, nk’umunezero wo mw iyimbura, nk’uw’ abantu banezerwa bagabanganye iminyago." 
Isaiah9:4 Kukw igiti c’ingōgo bāmuremēka, n’ubuhiri bāmukubita mu butikorwa, n’inkoni y’uwamuhahaza, wabivunaguye nko kuri wa musi w’Abamidiyani." 
Isaiah9:5 Kukw ivyākīngira abafise ibirwanishwa mu ntambara, n’impuzu zivumbagajwe mu maraso, bizoba ivyo gucanwa, bibe inkwi z’umuriro." 
Isaiah9:6 Kuk’ umwana atuvukiye, duhawe umwana w’umuhungu; ubutware buzoba ku bitugu vyiwe: azokwitwa Igitangaza, Umujanama, Imana y’ubushobozi, Data wa twese ahoraho, Umukama w’amahoro." 
Isaiah9:7 Ukugwira kw’ubutware bgiwe n’amahoro ntibizogira iherezo, ku ngoma ya Dawidi no ku bgami bgiwe, bibukomeze, bibushigikize guca imanza zibereye n’ukugororoka, uhereye none ugashitsa ibihe vyose. Umwete w’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo uzoshitsa ivyo." 
Isaiah9:8 Umwami Imana yarungitse ijambo kuri Yakobo, rishika kuri Isirayeli." 
Isaiah9:9 Abantu bose bazobimenya, ni bo Befurayimu n’ababa i Samariya, bavuga bīhayagiza, buzuye ubgibone mu mitima yabo," 
Isaiah9:10 bat’ Amatafari yarasenyutse, ariko tuzokwubakisha amabuye abāje; ibiti vy’imisukomora vyaraciwe, ariko tuzosubizah’ ivy’ amasederi." 
Isaiah9:11 Ico ni co kizotuma Uhoraho abahagurukiriza abansi ba Rezini kubatera, kand’ akabagomorera ababisha babo;" 
Isaiah9:12 Abasiriya bazomuturuka imbere, Abafilisitiya na bo bamuturuke inyuma: bazokwasamira Isirayeli bamutsontsomere. Yamara na ho nyene uburake bg’Uhoraho ntiburahwama, arik’ ukuboko kwiwe kuracabānguye." 
Isaiah9:13 Yamar’ abantu ntibāhindukiriye uwabakubise, kandi ntibārondeye Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Isaiah9:14 Ni co kizotuma Uhoraho azoca Abisirayeli umutwe n’umurizo, ishami ry’ikigazi n’umubere, ku musi umwe." 
Isaiah9:15 Umugabo mukuru w’icubahiro ni we mutwe, kandi kamenyi yigisha ibinyoma ni we murizo." 
Isaiah9:16 Kukw abarōngōra ubu bgoko babuzimiza, kand’ abarōngōwe na bo barahona." 
Isaiah9:17 Ni co gitumye Umwami Imana atazonezererwa imisore yo muri bo, kand’ atazoterwa akagongwe n’impfuvyi zo muri bo n’abapfakazi: kukw abantu bose ar’ abatubaha Imana, bakaba inkozi z’ibibi, kandi n’akanwa kose kakavuga ubupfu. Yamara na ho nyene uburake bg’Uhoraho ntiburahwama, arik’ ukuboko kwiwe kuracabānguye." 
Isaiah9:18 Kukw ibigabitanyo biturira nk’umuriro, utongora imikere n’amahwa, ukadomeka n’ibisaka vyo mw ishamba, bigacika umwotsi wipfundikanya utwaje intunda hejuru." 
Isaiah9:19 Uburake bg’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni bgo butumye igihugu gitongoka: abantu na bo bakamera nk’inkwi z’umuriro; nta wugirira akagongwe mugenzi we. 
Isaiah9:20 Umuntu azosahurira i buryo bgiwe, ariko yame ashonje; azorya n’ivy’ i bumoso, na ho nyene ntahāge: umuntu wese azorya mugenzi we kw inyama." 
Isaiah9:21 Manase azorya Efurayimu, Efurayimu arye Manase; kandi bompi bazokwifatanya gutera Yuda. Yamara na ho nyene uburake bg’Uhoraho ntiburahwama, arik’ ukuboko kwiwe kuracabānguye." 
Isaiah10:1 Bazobona ibara, abashinga ivyagezwe bitabereye, n’abanditsi bandika ibigoramye;" 
Isaiah10:2 kugira ngo bānzure abakene ngo ntibacirwe imanza, bagakūra urubanza ku bagorwa bo mu bantu banje, bagasahura abapfakazi, bakanyaga n’ impfuvyi." 
Isaiah10:3 None muzogira mute umusi muzoshikīrwa, no mw irandura rivudutse kure? Muzohungira kuri nde ngw abatabare? Kandi muzobītsa hehe ubutunzi bganyu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Nta gisigaye atar’ ugucishwa bugufi mu mbohe, canke guhindikiranywa mu bishwe. Yamara na ho nyene uburake bg’Uhoraho ntiburahwama, arik’ ukuboko kwiwe kuracabānguye." 
Isaiah10:5 Uzobona ibara, Ashuri, wa rugāge rw’uburake bganje! Ubushangashirwe bganje ni bgo nkoni witwaje!" 
Isaiah10:6 Nzomutuma gutera ihanga rikora ibizira, kand’ ubgoko ndakiye nzomugera kubunyaga, agigimvye inyagano, abasiribangire hasi nk’ivyondo vyo mu nzira." 
Isaiah10:7 Arikw ivyo si we avyituma ubgiwe, kandi si vyo yiyumvira mu mutima wiwe; arikw ikiri mu mutima wiwe n’uguhonnya, no kumara amahanga atari make." 
Isaiah10:8 Kukw avuga, ati Mbeg’ abagabisha banje bose s’abami?" 
Isaiah10:9 Mbeg’ i Kalino ntihameze nk’i Karikemishi? I Hamati ntihameze nk’i Aripadi, n’i Samariya nk’i Damasiko?" 
Isaiah10:10 Nk’ uk’ ukuboko kwanje kwashitse ku bihugu vy’ibigirwamana vyari bifise ibishushanyo bibājwe kurusha ivy’ i Yerusalemu n’i Samariya," 
Isaiah10:11 none sinzogirira i Yerusalemu n’ibigirwamana vyaho nk’uko nagiriye i Samariya n’ibigirwamana vyaho? 
Isaiah10:12 Nuko jewe Umwami Imana ni namara guheraheza ivyo nzogirira umusozi Siyoni n’i Yerusalemu vyose, nzoca mpana umutima w’ubgibone w’umwami w’i Ashuri, n’ubugabo bgo mu maso hiwe arābana agakēngērwe." 
Isaiah10:13 Kuko yavuze, ati Ni jewe nabikoze kubg’ inkomezi z’ukuboko kwanje no kubg’ ubgenge bganje, kuko nd’umuhanga: nakūyeh’ imbibe z’amahanga, nanyaze ubutunzi bgabo, nashubije hasi abahambaye nk’umuhizi:" 
Isaiah10:14 kand’ ukuboko kwanje kwironkeye ubutunzi bg’ amahanga nk’uwironkeye icāri c’ inyoni, kandi nk’uk’ umuntu atoragura amagi inyoni yahevye, ni ko nanje natoraguye ibihugu vyo mw isi yose; nta wakakaje n’ibaba, nta wakūyek’ umunwa, nta wajwigiriye." 
Isaiah10:15 Mbeg’ incabiti yokwirata k’ūrikw arayisatuza? Cank’ umusumeno wokwihayagiza k’ūrikw arawukereza? Ni nk’ah’ inkoni yozungagiza ūyītwāje, cank’ ikibando coterura ikitar’ igiti!" 
Isaiah10:16 Ni co kizotuma Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, azorungika ubukonyere mu bavyibushe bo muri Ashuri, kandi mu bgiza bgiwe hazodomekwa hashe nk’ ahaturirwa n’umuriro." 
Isaiah10:17 Kand’ umuco w’Abisirayeli uzoba nk’umuriro, kand’ Uwera wabo azoba nk’urubeya: uzoturira utongore amahwa yiwe n’imikere yiwe ku musi umwe." 
Isaiah10:18 Kand’ azoherengeteza ubgiza bg’ikibira ciwe, n’ubg’ indimiro yiwe imera cane, aherengeteze uhereye ku bugingo ugashitsa ku mubiri; bizomera nk’umurwayi yagongoberanye." 
Isaiah10:19 Kand’ amasigarira y’ibiti vyo mu kibira ciwe azoba imparūrwa, nk’ivyo umwana muto yokwandika igitigiri." 
Isaiah10:20 Nuko kur’ uwo musi amasigarira y’Abisirayeli n’abazoba barokotse b’inzu ya Yakobo, bazoba batacisunga uwabakubise, ariko bazokwisunga Uhoraho Uwera w’Abisirayeli mu vy’ukuri." 
Isaiah10:21 Amasigarira azogaruka, ni yo masigarira y’aba Yakobo, bagaruke ku Mana y’ubushobozi." 
Isaiah10:22 Kuk’ ubgoko bganyu, yemwe Bisirayeli, naho bungana n’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga, amasigarira yo kuri bgo ni yo azogaruka gusa; kugeseza kwarashinzwe, kuzoza gusendanishije ukugororoka." 
Isaiah10:23 Kuk’ Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azogeseza bikomeye mu gihugu cose, nk’uko yabigabiye." 
Isaiah10:24 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize: ati Yemwe bantu banje baba i Siyoni, nta co mutinya aba Ashuri, naho bazobakubita inkoni, bakababāngurira ubuhiri, nk’ukw Abanyegiputa bābagiriye." 
Isaiah10:25 Kuko hasigaye igihe gito cane ubushangashirwe n’uburake bganje bigashitswa mu guhona kwabo. 
Isaiah10:26 Nuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azobashongongezakw ikimoko, nka hamwe Abamidiyani bīcirwa ku gitandara ca Orebu: kand’ inkoni yiwe izoba ibānguye hejuru y’ikiyaga, kand’ azoyibāngura nk’uko vyabaye muri Egiputa." 
Isaiah10:27 Kandi kur’ uwo musi imitwaro bābaremēka izobava ku bitugu, n’ingōgo bābambika mu mazosi zizovunwa. Baradūze bavuye i Rimoni;" 
Isaiah10:28 bashitse muri Ayati, baciye i Migironi; i Mikimashi ni ho basize ibintu vyabo vy’intēkera:" 
Isaiah10:29 baserutse hejuru ku kavōvo, barāye i Geba: ab’ i Rama bafashwe n’agatengo, ab’ i Gibeya ho kwa Sauli barahunze!" 
Isaiah10:30 Shira ijwi hejuru utakambe, wa mukobga w’i Galimu! Banga ugutwi, Layisha! Ewe Anatoti uragowe!" 
Isaiah10:31 Ab’ i Madimena bacitse igikuba, ababa i Gebimu bahunganye utwabo!" 
Isaiah10:32 Kur’ uyu musi wa none barataha i Nobu, babānguriye ukuboko umusozi w’umukobga w’i Siyoni, umurambi w’i Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah10:33 Eh’ Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azocisha amashami ububasha bgiwe bg’agaterabgoba: ibirebire bisumba ibindi bizokwicirwa, n’ivyishize hejuru bizorambikwa hasi." 
Isaiah10:34 Kand’ ibisaka vyo mu kibira azobitemesha icuma, n’i Lebanoni hazotsindwa n’uwo muhizi." 
Isaiah11:1 Ku gishitsi ca Isayi hazobaduka agashami, kand’ umunago wanaze mu mizi yiwe uzokwama." 
Isaiah11:2 Mpwemu w’Uhoraho azoba kuri we, impwemu y’ubgenge n’iy’ ugutahura, impwemu yo kuja inama n’iy’ ubushobozi, impwemu y’ukumenya Uhoraho n’iy’ ukumwubaha." 
Isaiah11:3 Ikizomuhimbara n’ukwubaha Uhoraho; ntazocira urubanza ku bipfa kubonekera amaso yiwe, kandi ntazorushinga ku vyo apfa kwumvisha amatwi;" 
Isaiah11:4 arikw azocira aboro imanza zibereye, kand’ azoshinga urw’ abaciye bugufi bo mw isi mu kuri: azokubitisha isi inkoni ivuye mu kanwa kiwe, kand’ abanyakibi azobīcisha impwemu ziva mu minwa yiwe." 
Isaiah11:5 Ubugororotsi buzomubera umukanda mu rukenyerero, mber’ ukwizigirwa kuzomubera umukanda mu mafyinga." 
Isaiah11:6 Ibingira rizobana n’umwagazi w’intama, n’ingwe izoryamana n’umwagazi w’impene, n’inyana n’umugunza w’intambge n’ishūri ishishe bizobana, kand’ umwana mutoya ni we azobishorera." 
Isaiah11:7 Inka izorishanya n’igikōko citwa idubu: izazo zizoryama hamwe, kand’ intambge izorisha ubgatsi nk’inka." 
Isaiah11:8 Umwana yonka azokinira ku mwobo w’imamba, n’umwana acutse azoshira ukuboko ku mwimba w’imvuvyi." 
Isaiah11:9 Hose ku murwa wanje wera ntihazoba hakir’ ibiryana cank’ ivyica; kuko kumenya Uhoraho kuzoba kwuzuye mw isi, nk’ukw amazi abugereye mu kiyaga." 
Isaiah11:10 Maze kur’ uwo musi igishitsi ca Isayi kizoba gihagaritswe no kubera amoko ibendera, ico gishitsi ni co amahanga azobariritsa: kand’ uburuhukiro bgiwe buzogira icubahiro." 
Isaiah11:11 Kandi kur’ uwo musi Umwami Imana azotuma ukuboko ubugira kabiri, kugarukana amasigarira y’abantu biwe, abazoba bagisigaye, abakūre muri Ashuri no muri Egiputa n’i Patirosi n’i Kushi no muri Elamu n’i Shinari n’i Hamati no mu bizinga vyo mu kiyaga." 
Isaiah11:12 Kand’ azoshingira amahanga ibendera, akoranirize hamwe abāri birukanywe bo mu Bisirayeli, akumakumire hamwe Abayuda bagiye isābagire, abakūye ku mfuruka zine z’isi." 
Isaiah11:13 Ishari ry’Abefurayimu na ryo rizoshira, n’urwanko rw’Abayuda ruzokūrwaho: Abefurayimu ntibazoba bakigirira Abayuda ishari, kand’ Abayuda ntibazoba bakigirira Abefurayimu urwanko." 
Isaiah11:14 Bazohwikira Abafilisitiya b’i burengerazuba, babagwe ku gakanu, bazokwifatanya banyage ab’i burasirazuba; bazorāmvura ukuboko bacakire Abanyedomu n’Abanyamowabu; Abamoni bazobayoboka." 
Isaiah11:15 Uhoraho azokamya rwose ikigobe c’ikiyaga ca Egiputa, azozana umuyaga wiwe ururumba, abāngīrire ukuboko rwa Ruzi, arukubite arucemw’ imigezi ndwi, maz’ ajabutse abantu batarinze gukūra inkweto." 
Isaiah11:16 Kandi hazoba inzira y’iroro y’amasigarira y’abantu biwe, abazoba bagisigaye, iva muri Ashuri, nk’iyo Abisirayeli bābonye hamwe bādūga bava mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Isaiah12:1 Kur’ uwo musi uzovuga, ut’ Uhoraho, ndagukengurukiye, kuko naho wandakiye, uburake bgawe burahwamye, nawe uramporahoje." 
Isaiah12:2 Ehe rāba, Imana ni yo gakiza kanje; nzokwama nizigira, sintinye: kuk’ UHORAHO YEHOVA ari we nkomezi zanje n’indirimbo yanje, kandi yacitse agakiza kanje." 
Isaiah12:3 Ni co gituma muzovomana umunezero mu mariba y’agakiza. 
Isaiah12:4 Kandi kur’ uwo musi muzovuga, muti Ni mukengurukire Uhoraho, mwambaze izina ryiwe, mwamamaze ibikorwa vyiwe mu mahanga, mumenyekanishe izina ryiwe ko rishizwe hejuru." 
Isaiah12:5 Muririmbire Uhoraho, kuko yakoze ivyiza bihambaye: ivyo ni vyamamare mw isi yose." 
Isaiah12:6 Semerera, uvuge cane, yewe uba i Siyoni, kuk’ Uwera w’Abisirayeli, ari hagati muri mwebge, ahambaye." 
Isaiah13:1 Imbūri yo kuri Babuloni, iyo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe." 
Isaiah13:1 Imbūri yo kuri Babuloni, iyo Yesaya mwene Amosi yeretswe." 
Isaiah13:2 Ni mushinge ibendera ku musozi muremure w’uruharabuga, shira ijwi hejuru mubahamagare, mubākure, kugira ngo bace mu birimba vy’abaganwa." 
Isaiah13:3 Nahaye icagezwe abo nirobanuriye, mbere nahamagaye abahizi banje, bo n’abanyirahira bampayagiza, kugira ngo bashitse ivyo uburake bganje bgāgabiye." 
Isaiah13:4 Umve ukwo guhinda kw’igugu ku musozi, nk’ukw’ igitero gikomeye! Umve urwo rwamo rw’amahanga y’abami akoraniye hamwe! Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo arikw arakoranya ingabo azitegurira intambara." 
Isaiah13:5 Ziva mu gihugu ca kure, ku mpera y’ijuru; Uhoraho azananye n’ibirwanishwa vy’ugushangashirwa kwiwe, guhonnya igihugu cose." 
Isaiah13:6 Ni muboroge, kuk’ umusi w’Uhoraho uri hafi; uzoza ar’ umusi wo guhonnya uvuye kw Īshobora vyose." 
Isaiah13:7 Ivyo bizotuma amaboko yose adendebuka, n’umutima w’umuntu wese ushonga." 
Isaiah13:8 Bazokwiheba; umubabaro n’uburibge bibafate; bazobabara nk’umugore ari ku nda; bazorābana bumirwe; kandi mu maso habo hazohindurira nk’umuriro. 
Isaiah13:9 Eh’ umusi w’Uhoraho uraje, ni ruburakigongwe uzananye ishavu n’uburake bg’inkazi; ng’uhindure igihugu imisaka, ugeseze abanyavyaha baho ngo bagishiremwo." 
Isaiah13:10 Kukw inyenyeri zo kw ijuru n’uburundo bgazo bitazokwaka, izuba rizocura umwiza rikirasa, n’ukwezi ntikuzobonesha umuco wakwo." 
Isaiah13:11 Kandi nzohana ab’ isi kubg’ ibibi vyabo, n’abanyakibi kubg’ ukugabitanya kwabo; nzomara amanyama abibone, n’ ukwishira hejuru kw’abantu b’ agaterabgoba nzogusubiza hasi." 
Isaiah13:12 Nzotuvya abantu barushe izahabu nziza‐nziza kuba imparūrwa, mber’ abantu bazoba imparūrwa kurusha izahabu ziramuye zivuye muri Ofiru." 
Isaiah13:13 Ni co kizotuma ntigitisha amajuru, kand’ isi na yo izonyiganyiga ive ahayo, kubg’ uburake bganje Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ku musi w’uburake bganje bg’inkazi." 
Isaiah13:14 Maz’ umuntu wese azosubira mu b’i wabo, yiruka nk’ingeregere ihīgwa, canke nk’intama itagira ūyiragiye, umuntu wese ahungire mu gihugu c’i wabo." 
Isaiah13:15 Uwo bazobona wese bazomusogota, kand’ ūzofatwa mpiri wese bazomwicisha inkota." 
Isaiah13:16 Utuyoya twabo na two bazotubamenagurira imbere; amazu yabo azosahurwa, kand’ abagore babo bazobenda ku kagōbēro." 
Isaiah13:17 Rāba nzovyutsa Abamedi ngo babatere; ntibazorāba ifeza, kandi naho zoba izahabu ntibazozibabara." 
Isaiah13:18 Imiheto yabo izokenyagura imisore, kandi ntibazogirira akagongwe inda ikiri mu nda, n’ijisho ryabo ntirizobabarira abana bato." 
Isaiah13:19 Kandi Babuloni, icubahiro c’amahanga y’abami, ubgiza bg’ubgibone bg’Abakaludaya, hazomera nk’uko vyabaye hamwe Imana yakomvomvora i Sodomu n’i Gomora." 
Isaiah13:20 Ntihazokwigera hasubira kweyerwa ngo hubakwe, kand’ uk’ urunganwe rwabo ruzogenda rukurikirana, nta wuzosubira kuhaba. Umwarabo ntazohashinga ihema, kandi n’abungere ntibazohavyagiza imikuku yabo." 
Isaiah13:21 Arikw ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa ni vyo bizohagandagaza: amazu yabo azokwuzura ibihuna; ibisīga vyitwa imbuni na vyo bizohaba, n’ibisigo vy’amapfizi y’impene bizohatēganira." 
Isaiah13:22 Amabingira azotontomera mu bihome vyabo, n’imbgebge mu ngoro z’igikundiro. Igihe caho kigira gishike, kand’ imisi ir’ imbere yaho ntizokwongerwako." 
Isaiah14:1 Kuk’ Uhoraho azogirira akagongwe aba Yakobo, azosubira gutoranya Abisirayeli, abasubize mu gihugu cabo bgite: kand’ abanyamahanga bazokwifatanya na bo, bamatane n’inzu ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Amahanga azobajana abasubize i wabo, maz’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazoyatungira mu gihugu c’Uhoraho, yose bayahindure abaja b’abahungu n’abakobga: kand’ abābajana kw inyagano, na bo bazobajana kw inyagano, kandi bazotwara abābahahaza." 
Isaiah14:3 Maze ku musi Uhoraho azokuruhura umubabaro n’amagorwa n’ibikorwa abaguhindagiza bagukoresha," 
Isaiah14:4 ni ho uzokwitamba ku muvyimba umwami w’i Babuloni, ut’ Eh’ ukuntu umunyagahahazo aherengeteye, n’amanyama yiwe ukuntu aherengeteye!" 
Isaiah14:5 Uhoraho avunnye inkoni y’abanyakibi, ni yo nkoni y’abaganza;" 
Isaiah14:6 bākubita amahanga baratse, bakayashishagura badahumeka, amoko bakayaganzisha amanyama n’akadenderezo ata gitabara." 
Isaiah14:7 Isi yose ironse impore, iratekereje; baraturitse bararirimba." 
Isaiah14:8 Mber’ ibiti vy’akajwari birakwishima hejuru, n’ivy’ amasederi vy’i Lebanoni biravuga, bit’ Uhereye aho watsindiwe hasi nta wasubiye kudūga kutwicira." 
Isaiah14:9 Hasi i kuzimu harashwabadutse kugusanganira; hakanguye abāpfuye kubgawe, ni bo bahambaye bose bo mw isi; havyagurukije abami bose b’amahanga ku ntebe zabo." 
Isaiah14:10 Abo bose bazokubaza, bati Mbega nawe uhindutse umunyantege nke nkatwe? Uhwanye natwe?" 
Isaiah14:11 Icubahiro cawe kimanuwe i kuzimu, bo n’amajwi y’inanga zawe; ugaranzuriwe inyo, kand’ inyo nyene ni zo zikwōrōshe." 
Isaiah14:12 Ewe kuntu ukorotse uvuye kw ijuru, wa nyenyeri yo mu rubungubungu we, wa mwana w’umutwenzi! Ewe ingen’ uciwe ugashika hasi, wewe watsinda amahanga!" 
Isaiah14:13 Wari warībariye mu mutima, uti Nzodūga nje mw ijuru, nkuze ingoma yanje isumbe inyenyeri z’Imana; uti Nzovyagira ku musozi w’ikoraniro mu ruhande rw’ impera y’i burārūko;" 
Isaiah14:14 uti Nzodūga ndenge ah’ ibicu bigarukira; nzoba nk’ Īsumba vyose. 
Isaiah14:15 Yamar’ uzomanurwa, ushike i kuzimu, ushike mu bgigobeko bga rwa rwobo." 
Isaiah14:16 Abazokubona bazoguhanga, bakwitegereze, bati Mbeg’ uyu ni we yahindisha isi agashitsi, agashira ubgami bginshi mu gatengo?" 
Isaiah14:17 Ni we yahindura isi nk’ubugaragwa, agakomvomvora ibisagara vyo muri yo, ntarekure abāfashwe mpiri ngo basubire i wabo?" 
Isaiah14:18 Abami b’amahanga bose uko bangana basinzirira itiro ry’urupfu mu cubahiro, umwami wese mu ngoro yiwe bgite;" 
Isaiah14:19 ariko weho bāgushiburiye kure y’imva yawe nk’inda y’urusoro iteye ishishi, uhagatiwe n’abishwe basogōswe n’inkota, bamanuka baja mu mabuye no muri rwa rwobo; weho umeze nk’umuvyimba basiribanga:" 
Isaiah14:20 ntuzohambanwa na bo kuko wagesheje igihugu cawe, ukica abantu bawe; uruvyaro rw’inkozi z’ibibi nta ho ruzokwigera rwibukwa." 
Isaiah14:21 Ni mwitegure gutōtōra abana biwe kubg’ ukugabitanya kwa ba sekuruza; boye kuvyuka ngo bakevye isi, buzuze isi yose ibisagara." 
Isaiah14:22 Nzobahagurukira, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, kandi nzohonnya amazina n’amasigarira, umwana n’umwuzukuru, muri Babuloni, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah14:23 Kandi nzohahindura i wabo w’ibinyogoto, n’ibidengeri vy’amazi; nzohakubūza imyeyerezo yo kugeseza, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Isaiah14:24 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ararahiye, ati N’ukuri, uko niyumviriye ni ko bizoshika, kand’ uko nagabiye ni ko bizoba:" 
Isaiah14:25 nzovunagurira Abashuri mu gihugu canje, kandi nzobasiribangira mu misozi yanje miremire: ni ho ingōgo yiwe izobavako, n’imitwaro yabakorera ibave ku bitugu." 
Isaiah14:26 Iyo ni yo migabo yagīriwe isi yose, kand’ ukwo ni kwo kuboko kwābānguriwe amahanga yose." 
Isaiah14:27 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo kw ari we yabigabiye, ni nde yobihindura? Kand’ ukuboko kwiwe ko kubānguye, ni nde yogupfunya?" 
Isaiah14:28 Mu mwaka umwami Ahazi yatanzemwo habayeh’ iyi mbūri. 
Isaiah14:29 Yemwe Bufilisitiya bgose, nta co munezerezwa n’ukw inkoni yabakubita ivunitse; kuko mu gishitsi c’inzoka hagiye kuvamw’ imvuvyi, kand’ uruvyaro rwayo ruzoba inzoka iguruka y’ubumara buturira." 
Isaiah14:30 Maz’ abana b’ imfura b’aboro bazogaburirwa, n’ abakene baryame amahoro; kand’ igishitsi cawe nzocicisha kigoyi, n’amasigarira yawe azokwicwa." 
Isaiah14:31 Wa rembo we, boroga! Nawe gisagara, urire! Bufilisitiya we, iy’ uva ukagera hose, urayaze nk’amavuta, kukw i burārūko havuye umwotsi, kandi nta wusigara yikwega mu ngabo ziwe." 
Isaiah14:32 Non’ intumwa z’iryo hanga bazozīshura iki? Bazozīshura, bat’ Uhoraho ni we yashinze Siyoni, kand’ impahazwa zo mu bantu biwe ni ho zizohungira." 
Isaiah15:1 Imbūri yo kuri Mowabu: kuko mw ijoro rimwe ahitwa Ari‐Mowabu hageseye, hakomvomvowe; kuko mw ijoro rimwe ahitwa Kiri‐Mowabu hageseye, hakomvomvowe!" 
Isaiah15:2 Umukobga w’i Diboni aradūze, aja mu bitabo kuririrayo; Abanyamowabu bariko baraborogera i Nebo n’i Medeba: imitwe yabo yose imowe inkomvorera, bo n’ubganwa bgose." 
Isaiah15:3 Bagenda mu nzira zabo bacoceye amagunira; hejuru ku nzu zabo no ku nama umuntu wese araboroga, yiyuha iryosozi." 
Isaiah15:4 I Heshiboni harataka bo n’i Eleyale; mber’ amajwi yabo ashika n’i Yahazi; ni co gituma ingabo z’i Mowabu ziboroga, imitima yabo ikaja mu gatengo." 
Isaiah15:5 Umutima wanje uririra Mowabu; impunzi zaho zahungiye i Sowari n’i Egilati‐shelishiya; ahadūga haja i Luhiti ni ho badūga barira ingenda; no mu nzira ija i Horonayimu ni ho batakira ugutaka kw’ubgihebe. 
Isaiah15:6 Kukw amazi y’i Nimurimu azokama, ubgatsi bgaho buzokwuma, ubgatsi butotahaye bubure, ntihazomera ikintu na kimwe kibisi." 
Isaiah15:7 Ni co kizotuma ibintu bari barīronkeye n’ ivyo bari barabītse babijana ku mugezi w’ibiti vyitwa arabimu. 
Isaiah15:8 Kuk’ ugutaka gukikije ku mbibe z’i Mowabu, amaborogo yaho agashika muri Egulayimu, mber’ ayo maborogo agashika n’i Beri‐elimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Kukw amazi y’i Dimoni yuzuye ibitenga vy’amaraso; kandi nzokwongera guteza i Dimoni ibindi vyago, abacitse b’i Mowabu n’amasigarira y’ico gihugu nzobatēza intambge." 
Isaiah16:1 Abaganza igihugu, ni murungike ingorore z’imyagazi y’intama muzikūye i Sela, muzicishe mu bugaragwa, muzirungike ku musozi w’umukobga w’i Siyoni." 
Isaiah16:2 Kuko nk’ukw inyoni ziyerēra icāri gisambutse, ni kw abakobga b’i Mowabu bazomera ku vyambu vya Arunoni." 
Isaiah16:3 Tugīre inama, uduhanure, ku murango w’amaminangohe utubere igitūtu kimeze nk’ijoro: uhishe abirukanywe, kandi n’inyererezi ntuz’ uzigonyorere." 
Isaiah16:4 Abirukanywe banje ubemere babe i wawe: kand’ ab’ i Mowabu ubabere ubuhungiro ku babanyaga. Umunyagahahazo ni yahindurwa ubusa, ukunyaga kugashira, kand’ abasiribanga abantu bagaherengetera mu gihugu," 
Isaiah16:5 ni ho intebe y’ubgami izoshimangirwa n’imbabazi, kandi hazobah’ ūzoyivyagirako mu kuri, mu nzu ya Dawidi, ar’ umucamanza ashishikara izibereye, akabanguka gukora ivy’ ukugororoka." 
Isaiah16:6 Twumvise ubgībone bg’i Mowabu, ko hībona cane: twumvise n’ukwishira hejuru kwaho n’ubgībone bgaho n’agakēngērwe kaho: arik’ ukwīrārīra kwaho n’ukw’ ubusa." 
Isaiah16:7 Ivyo ni vyo bizotuma Abanyamowabu baborogera Mowabu, umuntu wese azoboroga: muzorizwa n’amarobe y’inzabibu y’i Kiri‐hareseti mwihebuye rwose." 
Isaiah16:8 Kukw imirima y’i Heshiboni iravye, bo n’uruzabibu rw’i Sibuma; abami b’amahanga bāvunaguye amashami yarwo meza‐meza: yar’ ashitse n’i Yazeri, agakakariza mu bugaragwa; amashami yarwo yaragasaye ajabuka n’ikiyaga." 
Isaiah16:9 Kubg’ ivyo nzoririra uruzabibu rw’i Sibuma, nk’ukw ab’ i Yezeri baruririra. Nzogutotesha amosozi yanje, yewe Heshiboni, nawe Eleyale: kukw akarūru k’intambara kavugiye ku vyeze vyawe vyo mu ci no ku vyimburwa vyawe." 
Isaiah16:10 Akanyamuneza n’ibihimbaro bīkūwe mw itongo rimera cane; nta kuririmba kuzoba mu ruzabibu, cank’ ijwi ry’umunezero; nta mukānyi azokānyira vino mu bgato: akayego k’abakānyi ndakajibije." 
Isaiah16:11 Umutima wanje ucurira intimba Mowabu nk’inanga, no mu nda yanje har’ intimba y’i Kiri‐heresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Kand’ Abanyamowabu ni barasuka, bakaja kwigorera mu bitabo, bakaja mu bigabiro ngo basenge, nta co bizobamarira." 
Isaiah16:13 Iryo jambo ni ryo Uhoraho yari yaravuze kuri Mowabu mu bihe vyashize. 
Isaiah16:14 Ariko noneho, Uhoraho avuze, ngw Imyaka itatu itarashira, urīmbūye imyaka nk’iy’ umucangero, icubahiro c’i Mowabu kizokēngērwa bo n’ishengero ryaho ryose rikomeye, kand’ amasigarira azoba ar’ inkehwa rwose, ata co bamaze." 
Isaiah17:1 Imbūri yo kuri Damasiko. Rāba Damasiko hakūweho, ntihacitwa umurwa, hazoba ibirundo vy’amasakamburira." 
Isaiah17:2 Ibisagara vyo muri Aroweri bicitse imisaka; hazoba ah’ imikuku, ni yo izohagandagaza, nta kizoyikanga." 
Isaiah17:3 Ibihome bizoshira muri Efurayimu, n’ubgami bushire i Damasiko, bo n’amasigarira y’i Siriya; bizoba nk’ukw icubahiro c’Abisirayeli cabaye, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Isaiah17:4 Kur’ uwo musi icubahiro ca Yakobo kizokwonda, n’ukuvyibuha kw’umubiri wiwe kuzoshira, ananuke." 
Isaiah17:5 Bizoba nk’uk’ umugenyi yegeranya ingano zeze, agatuma ukuboko agenya imihuruhumbi; mbere bizoba nk’ūrikw arahūmba uduhūmbga mu kiyaya c’i Refayimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Ariko hazosigaramw’ uduhūmbga, nk’ uko dusigara ku giti ca elayo bamaze kukinyiganyiza, hosigarayo elayo tubiri canke dutatu mu bushorishori, cabure tune canke dutanu ku mashami y’inyuma y’igiti cāri kiregeje, ni k’Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, agize." 
Isaiah17:7 Kur’ uwo musi umuntu azotumbera Umuremyi wiwe, kand’ amaso yiwe azoyashira ku Wera w’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Kandi ntazotumbera ibicaniro, ivyo yubatse n’amaboko yiwe, ntazoshira amaso ku vyo intoke ziwe zakoze, canke ku nkingi bashingira Ashera n’izo bashingira izuba." 
Isaiah17:9 Kur’ uwo musi ibisagara vyiwe bikomeye bizoba nk’imisaka isigaye mw ishamba no ku mpinga z’imisozi, aho bātuze bahunga Abisirayeli: hazosigara ar’ amatongo." 
Isaiah17:10 Kuko wibagiye Imana y’agakiza kawe, ntiwibuke igitandara c’inkomezi zawe; ico ni co catumye uteragira interwa zo kwinezereza, ukishingira imizabibu y’ikigirwamana c’akavantara." 
Isaiah17:11 Ku musi wabiteyeko warabizitiriye, bukeye utuma ivyo wateye bishurika: arikw ivyimburwa bizobura ku musi w’umubabaro n’akabonge k’ubgihebe." 
Isaiah17:12 Ewe wa rwamo rw’amahanga menshi abomborana nk’ukubomborana kw’ikiyaga, n’ugusūma kw’amoko asūma nk’ugusūma kw’ amazi asitanisha!" 
Isaiah17:13 Amoko azosūma nk’ugusūma kw’amazi menshi: arikw Imana izoyakankamira, na yo azohungira kure, nk’ ibishingwe vyo ku misozi iyo bijanwa n’umuyaga, nk’ifurufumbi y’ umukungugu ir’ imbere y’igihuhuta." 
Isaiah17:14 Ku mugoroba haba gucika ivutu, maze bugira buce bakaba batakiriho. Uwo ni wo mugabane w’abatunyaga, kandi ni yo ngero y’abatwambura." 
Isaiah18:1 Ewe wa gihugu c’amababa ahinda, kiri hakurya y’inzūzi za Etiyopiya," 
Isaiah18:2 gituma intumwa zica mu kiyaga zigenda ku mazi ku bitebo vy’inkorogoto, kiti Ni mugende mwa ntumwa z’impayamaguru, muje mw ihanga ry’ abantu barebare b’imibiri iyagayaga, ubgoko bgamye butera ubgoba uhereye ubga mbere ugashitsa n’ubu; ihanga rikomeye risiribanga vyose, ryo mu gihugu kigabanijwe n’inzūzi." 
Isaiah18:3 Yemwe ababa mw isi mwese, yemwe abagandagaje mw isi, ni mwabona ibendera imanitswe ku misozi miremire, muze mwiyubare, kand’ inzamba ni yavuga, muze mwumvirize." 
Isaiah18:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho yambariye, ati Nzokwinumira, nitegereze ndi mu buruhukiro bganje, mmere nk’indugumba irimw’ ibikēke iy’ izuba ryatse, mmere nk’igipfungu c’urume mu ndugumba yo mw iyimbura." 
Isaiah18:5 Kukw iyimbura ritaragera, ishurwe rihunguye, uruzabibu rutanguye kubūndūra, udushami tujondajonda azodukereza urukero, n’amashami agasaye azoyaca ayakūreho." 
Isaiah18:6 Bazocurikirana hamwe babe ab’ ibisīga vy’amero vyo ku misozi miremire, n’ibikōko vyo mw isi: ivyo bisīga vy’amero bizobamarakw ici, n’ibikōko vyo mw isi bizobamarakw agatāsi." 
Isaiah18:7 Ico gihe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azoshikanirwa ishikanwa n’ubgo bgoko bg’abantu barebare b’umubiri uyagayaga, ubgoko bgamye butera ubgoba uhereye ubga mbere ugashitsa n’ ubu; ihanga rikomeye risiribanga vyose, ryo mu gihugu kigabanijwe n’inzūzi; iryo shikanwa rizoshikanirwa ahantu h’izina ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ni ho ku musozi Siyoni." 
Isaiah19:1 Imbūri yo kuri Egiputa. Rāba Uhoraho areruwe n’ igicu cihuta, aja muri Egiputa; ibigirwamana vyo muri Egiputa bizohindira agashitsi imbere yiwe, umutima wa Egiputa uzoyagira mu nda." 
Isaiah19:2 Nzoteranya Abanyegiputa bisubiraniremwo: umuntu wese azorwana n’uwo bavukana, umuntu wese arwane n’umubanyi wiwe, igisagara kirwane n’ikindi, ubgami burwane n’ubundi." 
Isaiah19:3 Umutima wa Egiputa uzokamangana, nanje nzokwica imigabo yaho; bazoja gusiguza ibigirwamana n’abavovota n’abahamagara imizimu bo n’abamenyi." 
Isaiah19:4 Abanyegiputa nzobagabura mu kuboko kw’umutware w’imburakigongwe, kand’ umwami w’inkazi azobaganza, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Isaiah19:5 Amazi yo mu ruzi yahora asendanisha nk’ikiyaga azobura, kand’ uruzi ruzogeruka, rukame." 
Isaiah19:6 Inzūzi zizonuka, kand’ amazi y’imigezi yo muri Egiputa azokeha akamirikire: amarenga n’imibere bizokabirana." 
Isaiah19:7 Indimiro zo kuri Nili, zo ku nkombe za Nili, n’ibirimwa vyose vyo kuri Nili bizokwuma, biyoke, ntibibe bikiboneka." 
Isaiah19:8 Kandi n’ abarovyi na bo bazorira, abatera igera muri Nili bose baboroge, n’ abarobesha insenga mur’ ayo mazi bahondobere." 
Isaiah19:9 Kand’ abakora igikorwa co gukūba inyuzi z’uduti twitwa pishita bazomāramāra, bo n’abajisha imyerupe." 
Isaiah19:10 Inkingi za Egiputa zizovunagurika, n’ abacangero bazogira akabonge mu mitima." 
Isaiah19:11 Abaganwa b’i Sowani n’ibipfu rwose; inama z’abajanama ba Farawo b’abanyabgenge zihindutse iz’ ubusa: none muhangara mute kubarira Farawo, muti Nd’ umwana w’umunyabgenge, nd’umwana ava mu bami ba kera?" 
Isaiah19:12 Non’ abanyabgenge bawe bari hehe? Ni bakubarire, bamenye imigabo Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo afitiye Egiputa." 
Isaiah19:13 Abaganwa b’i Sowani bacitse ibipfu, n’abaganwa b’i Nofu barasutswe, ni bo bājimije Egiputa, kand’ ari bo buye rigumya imfuruka ry’amoko yaho." 
Isaiah19:14 Uhoraho yahasutse impwemu y’iserēre, kandi bājimije Egiputa mu bikorwa vyaho vyose, nk’ukw imborerwa idandabagiranira mu vyo idashwe." 
Isaiah19:15 Kandi muri Egiputa nta gikorwa kizohashoboka, ar’ icokorwa n’umutwe cank’ umurizo, ishami ry’ikigazi cank’ umubere." 
Isaiah19:16 Kur’ uwo musi Egiputa hazocika bga bagore: hazohinda agashitsi hatinye, kubg’ ugushongongeza ukuboko kw’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ahashongongereza." 
Isaiah19:17 Kand’ igihugu ca Yuda kizohinduka igiteye ubgoba kuri Egiputa: ūzokibarirwa wese azotinya, kubg’ imigabo Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yagabiye kuri Egiputa." 
Isaiah19:18 Kur’ uwo musi mu gihugu ca Egiputa hazobamw’ ibisagara bitanu bivuga urunyakanani, birahira Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo: kimwe muri vyo kizokwitwa Kiri‐haheresi." 
Isaiah19:19 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba igicaniro cubakiwe Uhoraho mu gihugu ca Egiputa hagati, kand’ inkingi izoshingirwa Uhoraho ku rubibe rwaco." 
Isaiah19:20 Bizoba ikimenyetso n’igishingantahe k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mu gihugu ca Egiputa: kuko bazotakambira Uhoraho kubg’ ababahahaza, na we azobarungikira umukiza n’umuvunyi, azobakiza." 
Isaiah19:21 Kand’ Uhoraho azokwimenyesha Egiputa, n’ Abanyegiputa bazomenya Uhoraho kur’ uwo musi: mbere bazosenga batanga ibimazi bashikana amashikanwa, bazosezeranira Uhoraho isezerano, barishitse." 
Isaiah19:22 Kand’ Uhoraho azokubita Egiputa, ahakubite yongere ahakize: bazogaruka k’Uhoraho, na we azobakundira kumwinginga, kand’ azobakiza." 
Isaiah19:23 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba inzira y’iroro iva muri Egiputa ija muri Ashuri, kand’ Abashuri bazogendera Egiputa, n’Abanyegiputa bagendere Ashuri; kand’ Abanyegiputa n’Abashuri bazosengera hamwe." 
Isaiah19:24 Kur’ uwo musi i Bgisirayeli hazoba aha gatatu kuri Egiputa na Ashuri, ar’ umugisha hagati mw isi:" 
Isaiah19:25 kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ahahaye umugisha, ati Hahirwe Abanyegiputa abantu banje, n’Abashuri igikorwa c’amaboko yanje, n’Abisirayeli ishamvu yanje." 
Isaiah20:1 Umwaka Taritani yatereyemw’ ahitwa Ashidodi, agomowe na Sarigoni umwami w’i Ashuri, akaharwanya akahatsinda," 
Isaiah20:2 ico gihe ni ho Uhoraho yavugiye muri Yesaya mwene Amosi, aramubgira, ati Genda ukenyurure igunira ukenyeye mu nda, ukūre n’inkweto mu birenge vyawe. Abigenza artyo, agenda yambaye ubusa, atagira n’inkweto." 
Isaiah20:2 ico gihe ni ho Uhoraho yavugiye muri Yesaya mwene Amosi, aramubgira, ati Genda ukenyurure igunira ukenyeye mu nda, ukūre n’inkweto mu birenge vyawe. Abigenza artyo, agenda yambaye ubusa, atagira n’inkweto." 
Isaiah20:3 Maz’ Uhoraho aravuga, ati Nk’uk’ umusavyi wanje Yesaya amaze imyaka itatu agenda yambaye ubusa atagira n’inkweto, akabera Egiputa na Etiyopiya ikimenyetso n’imbūri;" 
Isaiah20:4 uko ni k’umwami w’i Ashuri azojana abo muri Egiputa ar’ inyagano, n’abangajwe bo muri Etiyopiya, abato n’abakuru, bazogenda bambaye ubusa batagira n’ inkweto, n’amatako yabo ar’ ubusa, bimāramāze Egiputa." 
Isaiah20:5 Kandi bazokwihebura bamāramāre, kubga Etiyopiya bari bizigiye, no kubga Egiputa birātana." 
Isaiah20:6 Kur’ uwo musi ababa mur’ iki kiyaya c’ikiyaga bazovuga, bat’ Eh’ ivyo twizigira ingene bibaye, tukahaziga ko twohahungiye, bikadutabara ngo dukire umwami w’i Ashuri! None twebge tweho tuzokwikiza dute?" 
Isaiah21:1 Imbūri yo ku bugaragwa buri ku kiyaga. Nk’ukw agashururu ko mu gihugu c’i bumanuko gasuriranya, ni ko biza bivuye mu bugaragwa, mu gihugu giteye ubgoba." 
Isaiah21:2 Ivyerekanywe bikomeye ndabihishurirwa; abaryarukanyi bariko bararyarukana, abanyazi bariko baranyaga. Yemwe b’i Elamu, ni mudūge mutere, namwe Bamedi, mubate hagati! Ukwitsa umutima kwabo kwose ngira nkurangize." 
Isaiah21:3 Ni co gitumye ikiyunguyungu canje cuzuye uburibge, ngafatwa n’ibise nk’ibise vy’umugore ari ku nda; ndaribga bituma ntashobora kwumva, ubgihebe bg’ubgoba butumye ntashobora kubona." 
Isaiah21:4 Umutima wanje urahuzagizwa, mpundagajwe n’ubgoba: ijoro nari nifuje ryampindukiye agatengo." 
Isaiah21:5 Batunganya ameza, bagashirah’ abashibamyi, bakarya bakanywa. Haguruka, mwa baganwa, musīge inkinzo amavuta!" 
Isaiah21:6 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Imana ambariye: ati Genda ushireh’ umushibamyi, az’ avuge ico yabonye." 
Isaiah21:7 Ni yabona umuce w’ingabo, ar’ abagendera ku mafarasi bagenda ari babiri‐babiri, cank’ ar’ abagendera ku ndogoba, cank’ ar’ abagendera ku ngamiya, az’ abange amatwi yumvirize cane." 
Isaiah21:8 Maz’ avuga nk’intambge, ati Mwami, nama nirirwa mpagaze ku munara wo gushibamako, kandi ngakesha ijoro ku rubu rwanje:" 
Isaiah21:9 non’ ehe haje umuce w’ingabo zigendera ku mafarasi bagenda ari babiri‐babiri. Arongera aravuga, ati Babuloni harakomvomvowe, harakomvomvowe; n’ibishushanyo bibājwe vyose vy’ibigirwamana vyaho bihindikiraniye hasi bivunaguritse." 
Isaiah21:10 Ewe wa muhūre wanje, ewe mpeke zo ku mbuga yanje! Ivyo numvise bivuye k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ni vyo mbabariye." 
Isaiah21:11 Imbūri yo kuri Duma. Harih’ ūmpamagara ar’ i Seyiri, ati Yewe mushibamyi, ijoro rigeze hehe? Yewe mushibamyi, ijoro rigeze hehe?" 
Isaiah21:12 Wa mushibamyi aramwishura, ati Bugira buce, kandi bgongere bgire: ni mwagomba kubaza, mubaze; muhindukire muze." 
Isaiah21:13 Imbūri yo kuri Arabiya. Yewe wa gugu ry’Abadedani, mw ishamba ryo muri Arabiya ni ho muzorāra." 
Isaiah21:14 Uwishwe n’inyota bamuzaniye amazi, ababa mu gihugu c’i Tema basanganije izo mpunzi ivyo kurya." 
Isaiah21:15 Kuko bāriko barahunga inkota, inkota zisokōwe, n’imiheto ifoye, n’ivyago vy’intambara." 
Isaiah21:16 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Imana ambariye: at’ Umwaka utarashira, urīmbūye umwaka nk’uw’ umucangero, icubahiro cose c’i Kedari kizoshira;" 
Isaiah21:17 n’amasigarira yo mu gitigiri c’ abarashi b’abahizi b’Abakedari bazoba imparūrwa; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ari we abivuze. 
Isaiah22:1 Imbūri yo ku kiyaya c’ ukwerekwa. Noneh’ ubaye ute, abantu bawe bose ko būriye ku mazu hejuru?" 
Isaiah22:2 Wewe wuzuye urwamo, wa murwa w’imivurungano, wa gisagara cihaya, abishwe bo mu bawe kw atar’ abishwe n’inkota, kandi ntibagwe mu rugamba!" 
Isaiah22:3 Abākuganza bose ko bahungiye hamwe, bagafatanwa imiheto, kand’ abahizi bawe bose bakaba bafatiwe mpiri hamwe, naho bāri bahungiye kure!" 
Isaiah22:4 Kubg’ ivyo ndavuga, nti Ni murābe irya, munkūrekw amaso, mureke ndire nitunturire; ntimwigore ngo muranyirura umubabaro mfitiye ukunyagwa kw’i Yerusalemu umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu;" 
Isaiah22:5 kukw ar’ umusi w’ubgihebure n’ugusiribangwa n’ukuzazanirwa, uvuye ku Mwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, mu kiyaya co kwerekwa; hariho gusangangura inzitiro z’amabuye, n’ amaruru ashika ku misozi miremire." 
Isaiah22:6 Abelamu bapfukūye imitana, Abaramu baje bagendera ku mafarasi, kand’ ab’i Kiri basokoroye inkinzo." 
Isaiah22:7 Maze mu biyaya vyawe vyiza‐vyiza huzuramw’ imikogote, kand’ abagendera ku mafarasi batonda urugamba kw irembo ry’igisagara." 
Isaiah22:8 Agukūrakw igitwikirizo, yewe Yuda, ng’ uve i marwi; maz’ uwo musi ujarajara ibirwanishwa vyo mu nzu yitwa iy’ Ikibira." 
Isaiah22:9 Mubona ibirengero vy’ibizitiriye umurwa wa Dawidi kw ari vyinshi; mugomera amazi yo mu kidengeri co hepfo. 
Isaiah22:10 Muharūra amazu y’i Yerusalemu, amazu muyasambura kugira ngo mukomeze uruzitiro." 
Isaiah22:11 Amazi yo mu kidengeri ca kera muyacira urugomero hagati y’inzitiro zompi: ariko ntimwasubiza ijisho ku wari yarakoze ivyo, kandi ntimwashira umutima ku wabiremye kera cane." 
Isaiah22:12 Kur’ uwo musi Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yahamagariye abantu kwiririra no kwiborogera no kwimosha inkomvorera no gukenyera amagunira: 
Isaiah22:13 yamara bashiraho kwinezereza no guhimbarwa, kubāga inka no kubāga intama, kurya inyama no kunywa vino: bati Ngo twīrīre, twinywere, kukw ejo tuzopfa." 
Isaiah22:14 Maz’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yihishurira mu matwi yanje, arambgira, ati N’ukuri, ivyo bigabitanyo ntimuzopfa muvyogejwe ngo bibaveko, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Isaiah22:15 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize: ati Genda kuri wa mubgiriza Shebuna, ari we muzezwarugo, umubaze," 
Isaiah22:16 ut’ Urakora iki ngaho? uti Kand’ uri kumwe na nde ngaho ko wiyimbiye imva aho nyene? uti Ko wiyimbiye imva ahahera ruguru, ukībāzira ubugaramango mu gitandara!" 
Isaiah22:17 Uti Rāba, Uhoraho azogushiburana inkomezi ugwe kure, wa munyagakēngērwe we, mber’ azokuzingazinga rwose!" 
Isaiah22:18 Uti N’ukuri azokugira itu, akuraririze nk’ umupira, ugwe mu gihugu cāgutse; ut’ Aho ni ho uzogwa, kandi ni ho imikogote yawe y’icubahiro izogangarara, wa gatētereza k’inzu ya shobuja." 
Isaiah22:19 Nzokunyaga ububgiriza bgawe, kand’ uzosubizwa hasi ukūrwe mu bukuru bgawe." 
Isaiah22:20 Kur’ uwo musi nzohamagara umusavyi wanje Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya," 
Isaiah22:21 mmwambike umwambaro wawe, mmukenyeze umukanda wawe, mmushikirize ubutware bgawe; kand’ ababa i Yerusalemu n’ab’ inzu ya Yuda azobabera se." 
Isaiah22:22 Kand’ urupfunguzo rw’inzu ya Dawidi nzorushira ku bitugu vyiwe; kand’ azokwugurura ntihagire uwugara, azokwugara ntihagire uwugurura." 
Isaiah22:23 Nzomushimangira nk’umusumari ahantu hagumye, azobera inzu ya se intebe y’icubahiro." 
Isaiah22:24 Maze bazomusakārakw icubahiro cose c’inzu ya se, bene wabo n’ibiryango‐ryango, akabumbano kose gato, uhereye ku tubumbano tw’utwavya ugashitsa ku tubumbano tw’utubindi." 
Isaiah22:25 Kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, uwo musumari washimangiwe ahantu hagumye uzoshingūka; kand’ uzogazagurwa ukoroke, n’ibiremereye vyari kuri wo bizomenagurika; kuk’ Uhoraho abivuze." 
Isaiah23:1 Imbūri yo kuri Tiro. Boroga, yemwe māto y’i Tarushishi: kukw i Tiro hageseye, bigatuma ata mazu akiriho, ata n’aho gutaha; izo nkuru bazibgiwe zivuye mu gihugu c’i Kupuro." 
Isaiah23:2 Ni mujorerwe, mwa baba mu kizinga co mu kiyaga, mwa badandaza b’i Sidoni, mwahora muca mu kiyaga," 
Isaiah23:3 ku mazi menshi; inyungu zanyu zar’ impeke zivuye kuri Shihori, n’ivyimburwa vyo kuri Nili; mwabaye abadandaza b’amahanga." 
Isaiah23:4 Ewe Sidoni māramāra; kukw ikiyaga kivuze, igihome co ku kiyaga kiravuze, kiti Sinaramutswe, sinavyaye, kandi sinonkeje abahungu, sinareze n’abakobga." 
Isaiah23:5 Inkuru ni yashika muri Egiputa bazobabazwa cane n’izo nkuru zivuye i Tiro. 
Isaiah23:6 Ni mujabuke muje i Tarushishi; muboroge, mwa baba mu kizinga co mu kiyaga." 
Isaiah23:7 Mbeg’ iki ni ca gisagara canyu c’umunezero, camyeh’ uhereye imisi ya kera cane, cagendesha amaguru kure kugerērayo?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ni nde yagabiye kugirira Tiro ivyo, kand’ ar’ igisagara cambika ibitsibo, abadandaza baho bakaba abahambaye, n’abahanjo baho bakaba ar’ abanyacubahiro mw isi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni we yabigabiye, kugira ngw akengereze ubgibone bg’ icubahiro cose, kandi ngw agayishe abanyacubahiro bose bo mw isi." 
Isaiah23:10 Sendanisha mu gihugu cawe nk’uko Nili rusendanisha, wa mukobga w’i Tarushishi, kukw ata kikikubujije." 
Isaiah23:11 Yabānguye ukuboko hejuru y’ikiyaga, anyiganyiza ibihugu vy’abami; Uhoraho agera ivy’ i Kanani ngo bakomvomvore ibihome vyaho." 
Isaiah23:12 Aravuga, ati Ntugisubira kunezerwa, wa nkumi y’i Sidoni yononekaye; va hasi ujabuke uje i Kupuro, kandi n’iyo na ho ntuzoharonka uburuhukiro." 
Isaiah23:13 Ni murābe igihugu c’Abakaludaya: ubgo bgoko ntibukiriho; Abashuri bahahinduye ah’ ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa. Bashinga ivyo būririrako, basambura ingoro zaho; bahaca amatongo." 
Isaiah23:14 Boroga, mwa māto y’i Tarushishi: kukw igihome canyu gisanganguwe." 
Isaiah23:15 Maze kur’ uwo musi i Tiro hazokwibagirana imyaka mirongwirindwi, ihwanye n’imisi umwami umwe yomara ku ngoma; iyo myaka mirongwirindwi ni yashira, ibizoba kuri Tiro bizomera nk’ivyo mu kavyino ka maraya." 
Isaiah23:16 Abira inanga ugendagende mu gisagara, wewe maraya wari waribagiranye; ucurarange neza, uvyine utuvyino twinshi kugira ngo wibukwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Nukw iyo myaka mirongwirindwi ni yashira Uhoraho azogendera i Tiro, hasubire ku mpēra y’ubumaraya bgaho, hasambane n’ibihugu vy’ abami bose bo mw isi." 
Isaiah23:18 Inyungu n’impēra vyaho bizoba ivyera k’Uhoraho; ntibizobīkwa kandi ntibizoshirwa ukwavyo, kukw inyungu zaho zizoba iz’ abahora imbere y’Uhoraho, kugira ngo barye bahāge, baronke n’imyambaro myiza." 
Isaiah24:1 Rāba Uhoraho agira ngw ahindure isi umusaka, ayigire amatongo, ayūbike, asanzaze abayibamwo." 
Isaiah24:2 Maz’ ibizoba ku bantu buntu bizoba no ku muherezi; ibizoba ku mushumba bizoba no kuri shebuja; ibizoba ku mukobga w’umuja bizoba no kuri inabuja; ibizoba ku muguzi bizoba no k’ūshōra; ibizoba k’ūtiza bizoba no k’ūtira; ibizoba k’uwaka inyungu bizoba no k’uwakwa inyungu. 
Isaiah24:3 Isi izohinduka umusaka inyagwe rwose; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we avuze iryo jambo. 
Isaiah24:4 Igihugu kiriganyira, kirakabiranye; isi irahondobereye, irakabiranye, abakuru bo mw isi barahondobereye." 
Isaiah24:5 Kand’ isi ihumanijwe n’abayibamwo; kuko barenze ivyagezwe, bagaca mw ibgirizwa, bakica isezerano ry’ intahava." 
Isaiah24:6 Ni co catumye umuvumo utongora isi, kand’ abayibamwo ni vyo bahōwe: ni co catumye ababa mw isi baturirwa, hagasigara abantu b’imparūrwa." 
Isaiah24:7 Umutobe wa vino uriganyira, uruzabibu rurahondobereye, ab’ umutima w’umunezero bose bazokwitsa umutima." 
Isaiah24:8 Ibinezereza bivuye ku dushako tw’ingoma birashize, urwamo rw’ abanezerewe ruraheze, ugucuraranga kw’inanga kurashize." 
Isaiah24:9 Ntibazonywa vino baririmba, ibiboreza bizobīhira ababinywa." 
Isaiah24:10 Igisagara c’umuvurungano kirasanganguwe, inzu yose irasakiwe, kugira ngo ntihagire uwinjira." 
Isaiah24:11 Baririra mu nzira kuko babuze vino; ahār’ umunezero burīje mazingi, ibinezereza vyo mu gihugu biragiye." 
Isaiah24:12 Mu gisagara hasigaye amatongo, n’ irembo rirasituwe." 
Isaiah24:13 Kuk’ ukw ari ko bizomera mw isi hagati mu mahanga; bizomera nk’iyo banyiganyije igiti ca elayo, canke nk’uduhumbga tw’inzabibu iy’ iyimbura rishize." 
Isaiah24:14 Abo bazoshira amajwi hejuru basemerere, batārīkishwe n’icubahiro c’Uhoraho bari ku kiyaga." 
Isaiah24:15 Nuko ni muhimbarize Uhoraho i burasirazuba, muhimbarize izina ry’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, mu bizinga vyo mu kiyaga." 
Isaiah24:16 Twumvise indirimbo zituruka ku mpera y’isi, zit’ Icubahiro kibe ic’ umugororotsi. Maze nca ndavuga, nti Ndageranywe, ndageranywe! Mbonye ibara! Abaryarukanyi bararyarukanye, mber’ abaryarukanyi bararyarukanye rwose." 
Isaiah24:17 Wewe uba mw isi, ibiteye ubgoba n’urusumanyenzi n’umutego bigushitseko." 
Isaiah24:18 Nuk’ ūhunga induru y’ibiteye ubgoba azogwa mu rusumanyenzi; uwūrira ngw ave mu rusumanyenzi umutego uzomufata: kukw ingomero zo mw ijuru zigomorowe, kand’ amatanguriro y’isi akanyiganyiga." 
Isaiah24:19 Isi iravungaguritse, isi irasataguritse, isi irahuzenze." 
Isaiah24:20 Isi izodandabagirana nk’imborerwa, izonyiganyizwa irya n’ino nk’umutara; igicumuro cayo kizoyiremēra, kand’ izotemba, ntiyongere kuvyuka ukundi." 
Isaiah24:21 Maze kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohana ingabo zo hejuru mw ijuru, n’abami bo hasi mw isi." 
Isaiah24:22 Bazokoranirizwa hamwe, nk’ ukw imbohe zikoranirizwa mu kazu k’i bgina, bugaranirwe mw ibohero; kand’ imisi myinshi ni yashira bazohanwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Ni ho ukwezi kuzomāramāra, izuba ritētērwe; kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azoba ari ku ngoma ku musozi Siyoni ari ho Yerusalemu, agire icubahiro imbere y’abashingantahe biwe." 
Isaiah25:1 Ewe Uhoraho, ni wewe Mana yanje; nzogushira hejuru, ntazire izina ryawe; kuko wakoze ibitangaza, ivyo wagabiye uhereye kera, ur’ uwo kwizigirwa n’uw’ ukuri." 
Isaiah25:2 Kuko wahinduye igisagara ibirundo vy’ amasakamburira, igisagara cubakiwe inzitiro wakigize amatongo, ingoro z’abanyamahanga watumye zitakiba igisagara, ntikizokwongera kwubakwa kugeza ibihe vyose." 
Isaiah25:3 Ni co kizotuma ubgoko bg’ inkomezi bukwubaha, igisagara c’amahanga y’agaterabgoba kizogutinya." 
Isaiah25:4 Kuk’ umugorwa wamubereye igihome, wabereye igihome umukene mu vyago vyiwe, ukababera ubgugamo mu gihuhuta, n’igitūtu mu ndugumba, iy’ inkūbi y’abantu b’ agaterabgoba imeze nk’igihuhuta cisuka ku nzu." 
Isaiah25:5 Nk’ukw indugumba yo mu gihugu kigadutse ikūrwaho, ni k’uzozibiza urwamo rw’abanyamahanga; nk’ukw indugumba ikūrwaho n’igitūtu c’igicu, ni k’uzozibiza ivyivugo vy’abantu b’agaterabgoba." 
Isaiah25:6 Kandi kur’ uyu musozi Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azohategurira amahanga yose amazimano y’inyama zinuze, amazimano ya vino y’umukāka, inyama zinuze zuzuye imisokōro, na vino y’umukāka imiminnye neza." 
Isaiah25:7 Kur’ uyu musozi ni ho azoherengetereza icitwikiro c’ukugandara catwikiriye amoko yose, n’icitwikiro gitwikiriye amahanga yose." 
Isaiah25:8 Urupfu azorumira miyonzwa gushitsa ibihe vyose; kand’ Umwami Uhoraho azohanagura amosozi ku maso ya bose; n’ ubumāramāre bgo ku bantu biwe azobukūra kw isi yose; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we abivuze. 
Isaiah25:9 Nuko kur’ uwo musi bizovugwa, ngw Eh’ iyi ni yo Mana yacu; ni yo twari turorereye, na yo iradukiza: uyu ni we Uhoraho; ni we twari turorereye; duhimbarwe, tunezererwe agakiza kiwe." 
Isaiah25:10 Kuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kuri kur’ uyu musozi, ariko Mowabu hazohonyangirwa ahantu haho, nk’ukw ivyatsi bihonyangirwa mu kiziba c’amaganga." 
Isaiah25:11 Kandi hazosānza amaboko hagati muri co, nk’uk’ uwoga asānza amaboko ngo yoge: arikw azotsindagira hasi ubgibone bgaho, bo n’ubugunge bg’amaboko yaho." 
Isaiah25:12 Kand’ igihome kirekire kigukīngīra c’inzitiro zawe z’amabuye azogisangangura, agitsinde hasi, agishitse mw ivu, mbere no mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah26:1 Kur’ uwo musi iyi ndirimbo izoririmbirwa mu gihugu ca Yuda, ngo Dufise igisagara gikomeye; Imana izoshirah’ agakiza kabe inzitiro n’ibihome bidukīngīra." 
Isaiah26:2 Ni mwugurure amarembo, kugira ngw ihanga rigororoka rikitondera ivy’ ukuri rishike." 
Isaiah26:3 Uzozigama amahoro masa umuntu akwegamikako umutima wiwe, kukw akwizigiye." 
Isaiah26:4 Ni mwizigire Uhoraho ibihe vyose: kuk’ UHORAHO YEHOVA ari we gitandara camah’ ibihe bidashira. 
Isaiah26:5 Kuko yashubije hasi ababa ahantu ho hejuru mu gisagara cishira hejuru; agitsinda hasi, agitsinda hasi akagishitsa mw ivu, mber’ agishitsa no mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah26:6 Ibirenge bizogisiribanga, ni vyo birenge vy’impahazwa, hahonyangwe n’ abakene." 
Isaiah26:7 Inzira y’umugororotsi iratunganye: ni wewe usena inzira y’umugororotsi. 
Isaiah26:8 Mbere mu nzira y’imanza zawe ziroranye, Uhoraho, ni ho twamye tukwitegeye; izina ryawe n’ukuba rurangiranwa kwawe ni vyo imitima yacu ihahamiye." 
Isaiah26:9 Nakwifurishije umutima wanje mw ijoro; mbere nzokurondeza umushaha wanje wose ubudahumeka; kukw iy’ imanza zawe ziroranye ziri mw isi, ababa mw isi biga kugororoka." 
Isaiah26:10 Umunyavyaha naho yogirirwa neza nta ho yokwiga kugororoka; mu gihugu c’ubugororotsi azohakorera ibigabitanyo, kandi ntazoruha yitegereza ubgiza bg’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah26:11 Uhoraho, umanitse ukuboko, yamara ntibabibona; ariko bazobona umwete ugirira abantu, bamāramāre; mber’ umuriro uzorigata abansi bawe." 
Isaiah26:12 Uhoraho, uzoturonsa impore, kukw ivyo dukora vyose ari wewe ubidusohoreza." 
Isaiah26:13 Ewe Uhoraho Mana yacu, abandi bami batari wewe bamye batuganza; arikw izina ryawe ryonyene ni ryo twatura." 
Isaiah26:14 Bo barapfuye, ntibazokwongera kubaho; barahwereye, ntibazozuka: ni co catumye ubahana, ubarandura, ukazimanganya ukwibukwa kwabo kwose." 
Isaiah26:15 Wagwije ihanga, Uhoraho we, wagwije ihanga; urashemagizwa: wunguye imbibe zose z’igihugu." 
Isaiah26:16 Uhoraho, aho baboneye amagorwa ni ho bagushengereye; iy’ uguhana kwawe kubashikiriye basuka amajojwa." 
Isaiah26:17 Nk’uk’ umugore akuriwe amera, iy’ igihe ciwe co kuvyara gishitse, aribga agatakishwa n’ibise vyiwe, uko ni ko twari tumeze imbere yawe, Uhoraho." 
Isaiah26:18 Twari dukuriwe, turaribga, bimera nk’aho twavyaye umuyaga gusa; nta gakiza twazaniye isi, kandi nta bo kuba mw isi bāvutse." 
Isaiah26:19 Abapfuye bawe bazoba bazima; imivyimba y’abantu bawe izozuka. Ni mwikangure, muririmbe, yemwe abaryamye mu mukungugu: kukw ikime cawe kimeze nk’igitonda ku vyatsi, kand’ ivu rizogarura abapfuye." 
Isaiah26:20 Wa bgoko bganje, ngwino winjire mu nzu yawe, wiyugarane, ube urihishije akanya gato, gushitsa ah’ ubushangashirwe buzoshirira." 
Isaiah26:21 Kuk’ Uhoraho arikw arava i we azanywe no guhanira ababa mw isi ukugabitanya kwabo; ivu rizogaragaza ibitenga vy’amaraso yaviriye kuri ryo, kandi ntirizoba rigitwikiriye abishwe bo muri ryo." 
Isaiah27:1 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azohanisha inkota yiwe ikarishe nini ikomeye Lewiyatani ca kiyoka kinyaruka, ni co Lewiyatani ca kiyoka cigonyonzora, kand’ azokwica ca gisato c’amahēro co mu kiyaga." 
Isaiah27:2 Kur’ uwo musi bazovuga, bati Ni muririmbire uruzabibu rwa vino." 
Isaiah27:3 Jewe Uhoraho, ni jewe ndaruzigama; nzohora ndaruvomera akanya kose: nzoruzigama ku murango no mw ijoro, kugira ngo ntihagire ikirwona." 
Isaiah27:4 Nta burake mfise. Iyaba imikere n’ amahwa vyari bimpagurukiye kuntera, nobirwanije nkabiyigiriza hamwe:" 
Isaiah27:5 shiti bokwisunga inkomezi zanje, bakuzura nanje, mbere ni buzure nanje." 
Isaiah27:6 Mu misi izoza Yakobo azoshinga imizi, Isirayeli apfundike, ashurike: azokwama, yuzuze isi yose." 
Isaiah27:7 Mbega yabakubise nk’uko yakubise abābakubita? Canke bishwe nk’uko hāgeseye abo yishe? 
Isaiah27:8 Hamwe wabirukana wabahannye ibitarenze urugero; ku musi w’umuyaga uva i burasirazuba wabavumbuje inkūbi y’umuyaga. 
Isaiah27:9 Ivyo ni vyo bizotuma ukugabitanya kwa Yakobo kuzokwozwa, kumuveko; kand’ imbuto zose zizova mu gukūrwakw icaha ciwe n’izi: n’ukw azohindura amabuye yose y’igicaniro nk’ingwa y’amabuye ihondaguwe, kugira ngw inkingi zari zarashingiwe Ashera n’iz’ izuba ntizize zishingwe ukundi." 
Isaiah27:10 Kukw igisagara cubakiwe inzitiro gisigaye gitēterewe, ar’ ikibanza gihebge, gitawe, kimeze nk’agahinga; ni ho inyana zizorisha, zikaharyama, zikarya amashami yaho." 
Isaiah27:11 Amashami yaho ni yuma azohānyurwa; abagore bazoza bayacane; kukw iryo hanga ar’ iritagira ubgenge; ni co gituma Iyabaremye itazobagirira akagongwe, kand’ Iyababumvye itazobagirira akantu." 
Isaiah27:12 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azosekura akūre impeke ziwe, uhereye kuri rwa ruzi Efurate, ugashitsa kuri wa Mugezi wa Egiputa; maze muzonobagurwa umwe‐umwe, mwebge Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah27:13 Maze kur’ uwo musi inzamba niniya izovuzwa; kandi hazoza abāriko barahona mu gihugu ca Ashuri, n’abirukanywe mu gihugu ca Egiputa; bazosengera Uhoraho ku musozi wera i Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah28:1 Igitsibo c’ubgibone bg’ababorewe b’Abefurayimu kizobona ibara, bo n’ishurwe ry’ ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe rikabiranye, riri ku mutwe w’ikiyaya kimera cane c’abatsindwa na vino, na ryo rizobona ibara." 
Isaiah28:2 Rāba Uhoraho afise umunyenkomezi w’ubushobozi; ni we azobatūra hasi n’inkomezi, nk’akabushungwe k’urubura, nk’ikirura gitikiza, nk’ugusendanisha kw’amazi y’inkomezi ashēshe." 
Isaiah28:3 Igitsibo c’ubgibone bg’ababorewe b’Abefurayimu kizosiribangwa," 
Isaiah28:4 kandi n’ishurwe ry’ubgiza bg’icubahiro ciwe rikabiranye, riri ku mutwe w’ikiyaya kimera cane, na ryo rizomera nk’insukoni y’isega, ici ritarasohora: ūyikubise ijisho, akiyishikana mu ntoke akayiyongobeza ako kanya." 
Isaiah28:5 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azobera abantu biwe b’amasigarira igitsibo c’icubahiro n’umugāra w’ubgiza: 
Isaiah28:6 n’uwicaye aca imanza azomubera umutima uca iziroranye, kand’ azobera inkomezi abasubiza urugamba inyuma y’ amarembo." 
Isaiah28:7 Ariko n’Abayuda na bo baradandabagiranywa na vino, bakubishwa iserere n’ibiboreza; umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’Imana baradandabagiranywa n’ ibiboreza, vino irabamaze, bakubishwa iserere n’ibiboreza; iyo bakiriko barērekwa baradandabagirana, iyo bakiriko baraca imanza barazunguzwa." 
Isaiah28:8 Kukw ameza yose yuzuyekw ibirutsi n’ishishi, ata hantu hasigaye." 
Isaiah28:9 Uyo azokwigisha nde ubgenge? Kand’ azotahuza ubutumwa nde? Mbega n’abacūtse n’abavuye kw ibere? 
Isaiah28:10 Kukw ivyiwe ar’ ibgirizwa ku rindi, ibgirizwa ku rindi, n’umurongo ku wundi, umurongo ku wundi, hamwe tumwe, ahandi utundi." 
Isaiah28:11 Noneho rer’ Uhoraho azovuganira n’ubu bgoko mu kanwa katumvikana no mu rurimi rundi; 
Isaiah28:12 ari bgo yari yarabariye, at’ Uku ni kwo kuruhuka, mureke ūrushe aruhuke; aha ni ho buruhukiro: ariko banka kwumva." 
Isaiah28:13 Ni co gituma kuri bo ijambo ry’Uhoraho rizobabera ibgirizwa ku rindi, ibgirizwa ku rindi, n’umurongo ku wundi, umurongo ku wundi, hamwe tumwe, ahandi utundi; kugira ngo bagende, bagwe bagaramye, bavunagurike, bategwe, bafatwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Nuko rero ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwa bacokoranyi mwe, baganza ubu bgoko bur’ i Yerusalemu!" 
Isaiah28:15 Ko muvuga, muti Twasezeranye isezerano n’ urupfu, kandi twemeranije n’i kuzimu; mut’ Icago ni casendanisha kigahita mu gihugu, muti Ntikizodushikako; muti Kuko twironkeye ubuhungiro mu binyoma, tukaba tunyegeye musi y’ ubugunge:" 
Isaiah28:16 ni co gitumye Umwami Uhoraho avuga, ati Rāba, ndashira i Siyoni ibuye ryo kuba itanguriro, ibuye ryagejejwe, ari ryo ryo kugumya imfuruka, riri n’igiciro, rishikamye cane; kand’ uwizera ntazohutagiza." 
Isaiah28:17 Kand’ imanza ziroranye ni zo nzogira umugozi ugera, n’ubugororotsi nzobugira karisho: urubura ruzovumbura ubgo buhungiro bg’ibinyoma, kand’ amazi azosendanisha aho hantu ho kwinyegeza." 
Isaiah28:18 Maz’ isezerano mwasezeranye n’urupfu rizopfa, kand’ inyemero mwemeranije n’i kuzimu ntizohama; arikw icago ni casendanisha kigahita mu gihugu, ni ho kizobasiribangira hasi." 
Isaiah28:19 Uko kizoba gihita kwose kizobafata; kuko kizokwama gihita uko bukeye, ku murango no mw ijoro, kandi gutahura bga butumwa kuzozana gucika ivutu gusa." 
Isaiah28:20 Kuk’ uburiri ari bugufi umuntu atoshobora kuburamvyako, kand’ ikirago kikaba akaberere umuntu atoshobora kuciyorosa." 
Isaiah28:21 Kuk’ Uhoraho azohaguruka nk’uko yahagurutse ku musozi Perasimu, azoraka nk’uko yarakiye mu kiyaya c’i Gibeyoni; akore igikorwa ciwe, igikorwa ciwe c’igitangaza, ashitse igikorwa ciwe, igikorwa ciwe c’akumiza." 
Isaiah28:22 None rero mureke kuba abacokoranyi, kugira ngw imvuto murimwo ntizirushirize gukanasha; kuko numvise yukw ivyo Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yagabiye ar’ ugutikiza igihugu cose." 
Isaiah28:23 Ni mutege amatwi, mwumve ijwi ryanje; mwumvirize, mwumve amajambo yanje." 
Isaiah28:24 Mbeg’ umurimyi avyiririra kuzobiba, yama avyirira na ntaryo? Mbega yama avyirira agakubita imvyirire na ntaryo?" 
Isaiah28:25 Iy’ amaze kuyikuma ntahava akamija uburo, akabiba izitwa kumino, akabiba ingano mu mirongo, na sayiri akayibiba aho yayitunganirije, akabiba n’izitwa kusemeti ku rubibe rwaho?" 
Isaiah28:26 Kukw Imana yiwe imwereka neza, ikamwigisha." 
Isaiah28:27 Kuk’ uburo budahūzwa imihini ifise ubugi, na kumino ntihūzwa no gutembagazwako ikurudumu y’umukogote; arik’ uburo buhūzwa umuhini, na kumino ihūzwa ikibando." 
Isaiah28:28 Mbeg’ impeke z’umutsima mu gusekura barazimenagura? Ereg’ umuntu ntiyokwama arazihūra: mbere naho yozitembagazako ikurudumu y’umukogote wiwe n’amafarasi yiwe, yirinda kutazimenagura." 
Isaiah28:29 Ivyo na vyo biva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, umujanama w’igitangaza, w’ubgenge bg’agahebuza." 
Isaiah29:1 Ewe Ariyeli, uzobona ibara, Ariyeli, wa murwa Dawidi yashagajeko! Mukurikiranye umwaka n’uwundi, mugire imisi mikuru mu bihe vyayo;" 
Isaiah29:2 maze Ariyeli nzoca mpababaza, hazoba kurira no kuboroga; kand’ aho hazombera nka Ariyeli nyene." 
Isaiah29:3 Nzogusagazako ngutangatange impande zose, nzogukikiza ibihome ngute hagati, nzoguta hagati nkurundire ikirundo c’ivu kigukikije." 
Isaiah29:4 Maz’ uzocishwa bugufi uvugire mw ivu, amajambo yawe azoba asokoroka hasi nk’ayava mu mukungugu; ijwi ryawe rizova mw ivu ryandara nk’iry’ umuzimu, amajambo yawe anywigirire mu mukungugu." 
Isaiah29:5 Arikw ingabo z’abansi bawe zizohava zihinduka nk’umukungugu wiseye, n’ingabo z’agaterabgoba zizohinduka nk’umuguruka utumuka: mber’ ivyo bizobabera birtyo giturumbuka mu kanya gato." 
Isaiah29:6 Hazoba guterwa n’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, kw’imituragaro, n’ugutigita kw’isi, n’ukwasana gukomeye, n’agashururu, n’ikirura, n’imbeya z’umuriro utongora." 
Isaiah29:7 Maz’ ingabo z’amahanga yose arwanya Ariyeli, abaharwananya n’igihome caho bose bakahagora, bazoba nk’inzozi, nk’ivyo umuntu yeretswe mw ijoro nko mu nzozi." 
Isaiah29:8 Nuko bizomera nk’umuntu ashonje arota arikw ararya: ngo yikangure agasanga inda iri gusa; canke nk’ūfise inyota arota arikw aranywa: ngo yikangure agasanga akabiranye, agatuwe n’inyota. Uko ni kw ingabo z’amahanga yose arwanya umusozi Siyoni zizomera." 
Isaiah29:9 Banza muhagarare, mujorerwe; mwihume amaso, muhume; muborerwe mutanyoye vino; mudandabagirane, bitavuye ku biboreza." 
Isaiah29:10 Kuk’ Uhoraho abasutsekw impwemu y’uruhuni, agahuma amaso yanyu, ni yo bavugishwa banyu, agapfuka n’imitwe yanyu, ni yo bamenyi banyu." 
Isaiah29:11 Ukwerekwa kwose kwabahindukiye nk’ amajambo yo mu gitabo kimatanishijwe ishashara, iyo bagihaye umuntu azi gusoma, bat’ Enda se soma iki: akabishura, ati Sinshobora, kuko kimatanijwe;" 
Isaiah29:12 maze bagaha ico gitabo ūtazi gusoma, bat’ Enda se soma iki: akabishura, ati Ko ntazi gusoma." 
Isaiah29:13 Umwami Imana aravuga, at’ Aba bantu ko bahora baza hafi yanje, bazanye akanwa kabo gusa, bakanyubahisha iminwa yabo, arikw imitima yabo bakayishira kure yanje, n’ukunyubaha kwabo kukaba ar’ icagezwe bigishijwe n’abantu." 
Isaiah29:14 Nuko rero ngira nkore igikorwa c’igitangaza mur’ aba bantu, mbere n’igikorwa gitangaje c’akumiza: ubgenge bg’abanyabgenge babo buzoherengetera, n’ ubuhanga bg’abahanga babo buzokamangana." 
Isaiah29:15 Bazobona ibara, abarondera kuzika inama zabo i kuzimu ngo bazihishe Uhoraho, ibikorwa vyabo bikaba mu mwiza, bakavuga, bati Ni nde atubona? kandi bati Ni nde atuzi?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ewe bupfu buri hano! Mbeg’ umubumvyi mumuhwanya n’ibumba, ngw ikintu cabumbge gihakane uwakibumvye, kiti Ntiyambumvye; cank’ ikintu caremwe kigahakana uwakiremye, kiti Nta bgenge agira?" 
Isaiah29:17 Mbega ntihasigaye akanya gato cane, Lebanoni hagacika itongo rimera cane, kand’ itongo ryamera cane rikitwa ishamba?" 
Isaiah29:18 Kur’ uwo musi ibipfamatwi bizokwumva amajambo yo mu gitabo, n’amaso y’impumyi azoca umwiza n’umuzitanya abone." 
Isaiah29:19 Kand’ abaciye bugufi na bo bazogwiza umunezero banezererwa Uhoraho, n’abakene bo mu bantu bazohimbarwa n’Uwera w’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah29:20 Kuk’ umuntu w’agaterabgoba atituwe, n’umucokoranyi aheze, kand’ abatambira kugabitanya bose barahonnye," 
Isaiah29:21 ni bo bacumuza umuntu mw ijambo, bagatega umutego ūhanūrira mw ishikiro ry’igisagara, bakazibiranya umugororotsi n’amagambo y’ubusa." 
Isaiah29:22 None rer’ Uhoraho, ari we yacunguye Aburahamu, uku ni kw avuze ku vy’inzu ya Yakobo, ati Yakobo ntazokwongera gutētērwa, kandi mu maso hiwe ntihazosubira kubgerabgera." 
Isaiah29:23 Arik’ ubgiwe n’abana biwe ni babona ivyo amaboko yanje akorera hagati muri bo, bazokwemera izina ryanje ko ryera; mbere bazokwemera Uwera wa Yakobo ko nera, bahindire agashitsi jewe Imana y’ Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah29:24 Kandi n’abazimira mu mitima bazoca ubgenge, n’abidodomba bazokwemera kwigishwa." 
Isaiah30:1 Abana b’ibigāba bazobona ibara, ni k’Uhoraho agize, bagīsha inama abandi atari jewe, bakifatanya n’abandi atari Mpwemu wanje, kugira ngo bagereke icaha ku kindi;" 
Isaiah30:2 bakava hasi ngo bamanuke muri Egiputa batabajije irivuye mu kanwa kanje; ngo bisunge inkomezi za Farawo, bironkere ubgugamo mu gitūtu ca Egiputa!" 
Isaiah30:3 Nuko rero za nkomezi za Farawo zizobatētereza, na bga bgugamo bgo mu gitūtu ca Egiputa buzobambika ibara." 
Isaiah30:4 Kukw abaganwa biwe bar’ i Sowani, n’intumwa ziwe zishitse i Hanesi." 
Isaiah30:5 Bose bazomāramāra kuko bazosanga ar’ abantu batabasha kubagirira ikimazi, batazobatabara, ata kimazi bafise, atar’ ukubatētereza no kubatukisha." 
Isaiah30:6 Imbūri yo ku bikōko vy’i bumanuko. Baca mu gihugu c’ amagorwa n’umubabaro, ah’ intambge y’ingore n’iy’ ingabo zituruka, hakaba n’imamba n’inzoka z’ubumara buturira ziguruka, baremētse indogoba z’imikangara ivy’ ubutunzi bgabo, bashize n’ivy’ itunga ryabo ku mapfupfu y’ ingamiya, kugira ngo baje kubishikanira abantu batazobagirira ikimazi." 
Isaiah30:7 Kuko gutabara kwa Egiputa ar’ ubusa, ata co kumaze: ni co gituma mpīta Rahabu yiyicariye gusa." 
Isaiah30:8 None rero genda, uvyandike ku gisate imbere yabo, uvyandike no mu gitabo, kugira ngo mu bihe bizoza bibabere igishingantahe c’intahava." 
Isaiah30:9 Kukw ar’ ubgoko bg’ibigāba, abana babesha, abana banka kwumva ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho:" 
Isaiah30:10 babarira abamenyi, bati Ntimutumenyere, bakabgira n’aberekwa ibizoba, bati Ntimutubarire ivyo mweretswe vy’ukuri, ariko mutubarire ivyoroshe, muvugishwe ivy’ ibinyoma;" 
Isaiah30:11 muve mu nzira mukikame, mukūre Uwera w’ Abisirayeli imbere yacu." 
Isaiah30:12 Ni co gitumye Uwera w’Abisirayeli avuga, ati Ko mukēngereye iryo jambo, mukishimira agahahazo n’ ubugoryi, mukaba ari vyo mwishimikiza," 
Isaiah30:13 ni co gituma ukwo kugabitanya kuzobabera nk’uruzitiro rw’amabuye rurerure rwase umugāga, ruminaraye ruri mu gutemba; guhomvoka kwarwo kuzoba giturumbuka mu kanya isase." 
Isaiah30:14 Kand’ azorusāvya nk’ukw ikibumbano gisāba, iyo bakijanjanze ata kibabarwe; mu tunywenywe twaco ntihasigare n’akajo korahura umuriro mu ziko, canke kodaha utuzi mw ivomo." 
Isaiah30:15 Umwami Uhoraho, Uwera w’Abisirayeli, uku ni ko yari yaravuze, ati Mu guhindukira no mu gutēkāna ni ho muzokirira; mu gutekereza no mu vyizigiro ni ho muzoherwa inkomezi; ariko mwebge ntimwabikunze." 
Isaiah30:16 Yamara mwaravuze, mut’ Oya, ariko tuzoguruka ku mafarasi; kandi koko muzoba muhunga; kandi muti Tuzogendera ku y’impayamaguru; ni koko n’abazoba babirukana babakinagiza bazoba ar’ impayamaguru nyene." 
Isaiah30:17 Abantu igihumbi bazokwirukanwa n’akāyaga k’umuntu umwe; akāyaga ka batanu kazotuma muhunga: gushitsa aho muzosigara mumeze nk’igiti kirekire gishinze ku mpinga y’umusozi, canke nk’ibendera ishinze ku gasozi." 
Isaiah30:18 Ni kubg’ ivyo Uhoraho ashamaje kugira ngw abagirire ubuntu, kandi ni kubg’ ivyo azohaguruka kugira ngw abagirire ikigongwe, kuk’ Uhoraho ar’ Imana ica izibereye; hahirwa abashamaje bamwiteze bose." 
Isaiah30:19 Yemwe bantu b’i Siyoni, ababa i Yerusalemu: ntimuzoba mukirira ukundi; ntazobura kubagirira ubuntu ni yumva ijwi ry’ugutakamba kwanyu; acumva azobishura." 
Isaiah30:20 Kandi nah’ Umwami Imana azobagaburira ivyo kurya vy’amagorwa n’amazi y’amarushwa, arikw abigisha banyu ntibazoba bacihisha ukundi: amaso yanyu azobībonera;" 
Isaiah30:21 kandi ni mwakikamira i buryo cank’ i bumoso, amatwi yanyu azokwumva ijambo ribaturutse inyuma rivuga, rit’ Iyi ni yo nzira, mube ari yo mujana." 
Isaiah30:22 Kandi muzotitura ifeza yometse ku bishushanyo vyanyu vy’ibibāzano, n’izahabu yometse ku bishushanyo vyanyu vyavugutiwe mu nkero; muzobishibura rwose nk’ikintu gihumanye, mubibarire, muti Vaho, mugende!" 
Isaiah30:23 Kand’ azorekurira imvura imbuto muzobiba mu ndimiro, kand’ imihure ivuye mu ndimiro izoba inovereye yo gutunga amagara: ico gihe imikuku yanyu izorisha ivyanya binini." 
Isaiah30:24 Inka n’indogoba z’imikangara zirima zizorya ivyo kurya birimw’ umunyu, bigosojwe urutaro n’igitemere." 
Isaiah30:25 Ku gisozi cose gishizwe hejuru no ku musozi wose muremure hazoba amasōko n’imigezi y’amazi, ku musi wo gutōtōra abantu rwose, ah’ iminara izosidukira." 
Isaiah30:26 Kand’ umuco w’ukwezi uzomera nk’uw’ izuba, kand’ umuco w’izuba uzokwongerekanywa ibihetangabo ndwi, ungane n’umuco wo mu misi ndwi, ku musi Uhoraho azopfuka ibikomere vy’abantu biwe, akavūra n’inguma yabakubise." 
Isaiah30:27 Eh’ izina ry’Uhoraho riraza rivuye kure, rirurumbamw’ uburake bgiwe, ripfundukamw’ umwotsi w’intunda: iminwa yiwe yuzuye ubushangashirwe, kand’ ururimi rwiwe rumeze nk’umuriro utongora:" 
Isaiah30:28 impwemu ziwe zimeze nk’umugezi ushēshe ugashika no mw izosi, ngo zigosoze amahanga urutaro rumara umuguruka: kand’ umujiginya uzimiza uzoba mu binyigishi vy’ amahanga." 
Isaiah30:29 Nuko muzogira indirimbo nk’iyo baririmba mw ijoro ku musi mukuru wera; muzogira n’umunezero wo mu mutima nk’uw’ umuntu afise umwironge aja ku musozi w’ Uhoraho, ngw ashikīre Igitandara c’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Kand’ Uhoraho azotuma ijwi ryiwe ry’icubahiro ryumvikana, azokwerekana ugukubita kw’ukuboko kwiwe mu bushangashirwe bg’uburake, no mu rubeya rw’umuriro utongora, no mu gusegenyuka kw’imvura n’ ikirura n’imināna y’urubura." 
Isaiah30:31 Kukw ijwi ry’Uhoraho rizotuma Abashuri bahababuka, abakubitishe urugāge rwiwe." 
Isaiah30:32 Kand’ ikibando bāgerewe uko kimashuye kwose, ico Uhoraho abamashuza, hazovuga udushako tw’ingoma n’ inanga; kand’ azorwana na bo mu ntambara adasībiza ukuboko."
