Isaiah30:33 Kukw ikirundo c’inkwi citeguwe uhereye kera, mbere citeguriwe umwami; Uhoraho yakigize kirekire kandi kinini; ibigikomanije n’umuriro n’ibigiga vyinshi; impwemu z’Uhoraho zimeze nk’ umugezi w’amazuku ni zo zibidometse." 
Isaiah31:1 Bazobona ibara, abamanuka baja muri Egiputa gutabaza, bakishimira amafarasi, bakizigira imikogote ikwegwa n’ amafarasi kukw ari myinshi, bo n’abagendera ku mafarasi kukw ar’ abanyenkomezi nyinshi, ariko ntibashire umutima ku Wera w’Abisirayeli, kandi ntibarondere Uhoraho." 
Isaiah31:2 Ariko rero na we azi ubgenge, azozana ivyago kandi ntazokwivuguruza, arikw azohagurukira inzu y’inkozi z’ibibi, bo n’abatabara abakora ivy’ ukugabitanya." 
Isaiah31:3 Yamara rero Abanyegiputa s’Imana, n’abantu buntu; n’amafarasi yabo s’impwemu, n’ ay’ umubiri gusa: maz’ Uhoraho ni yabāngura ukuboko kwiwe, ūtabaye azotsitara, kandi n’ūtabawe azotemba, bose bahindikirane hamwe." 
Isaiah31:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho ambariye, ati Nk’ukw intambge, cank’ umugunza w’intambge igwangwarira ku co yishe, iy’ abungere benshi batabajwe kurwana na yo, ntikangwe n’amajwi yabo, kandi ntiteshwe n’urwamo rwabo, uko ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azomanurwa no kurwanira ku musozi Siyoni no ku mutumba waho." 
Isaiah31:5 Nk’ukw inyoni zizengerera hejuru y’ivyari vyazo, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azorinda Yerusalemu; azoharinda ahakize, azohaca hejuru aharokore." 
Isaiah31:6 Yemwe Bisirayeli, ni muhindukirire uwo mwagararije ruhebga." 
Isaiah31:7 Maze kur’ uwo musi umuntu wese azoshibura ibigirwamana vyiwe vy’ifeza, n’ibigirwamana vyiwe vy’izahabu, ivyo mwacurishije intoke zanyu kubabera icaha." 
Isaiah31:8 Ni ho Abashuri bazokwicwa n’inkota itar’ iy’ abantu, kand’ inkota itar’ iy’ abantu izobarya: bazohunga iyo nkota, kand’ imisore yabo izohinduka abagurano." 
Isaiah31:9 Igitandara cabo kizokūrwaho no gucika ivutu, kand’ abaganwa babo bazokwihebeshwa n’ibendera, ni k’Uhoraho agize, afise umuriro wiwe i Siyoni, akagira itanure ryiwe i Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah32:1 Rāba, umwami azoganza mu bugororotsi, n’abaganwa bazotwaza imanza ziroranye." 
Isaiah32:2 Kandi mur’ abo, uw’ ari we wese azoba nk’aho kwikinga umuyaga, n’ubgugamo bg’ikirura; azoba nk’ inzūzi z’amazi ahantu hagadutse, kandi nk’igitūtu c’igitandara kinini mu gihugu kiruhisha." 
Isaiah32:3 Amaso y’ababona ntazoba agihwihwisha, kand’ amatwi y’abumva azokwumviriza neza." 
Isaiah32:4 Umutima w’ūhutikiranya uzomenya ubgenge, n’ururimi rw’abagigimiza ruzotobora neza ibirashe." 
Isaiah32:5 Igipfapfa ntibazoba bakimwita umupfasoni, kand’ uwigungirako ntibazoba bakimwita umunyabuntu." 
Isaiah32:6 Kukw igipfapfa kivuga ivy’ ubupfu, umutima wiwe ugakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, ngw akore ibihumanya, avuge ibigoramye k’ Uhoraho, akarekerana ūshonje inzara, n’ūfise inyota akamwima ico anywa." 
Isaiah32:7 Kand’ ibikoreshwa vy’uwigungirako ni bibi: agira akazikira k’ikibi ko kuzikiriza abagorwa n’amagambo y’ibinyoma, naho hoba umukene afise urubanza." 
Isaiah32:8 Arik’ umunyabuntu imigabo yiwe n’ukugira ubuntu, kand’ ukwo kugira ubuntu azogushishikara." 
Isaiah32:9 Yemwe bagore bidibamiye, ni muve hasi, mwumve ijwi ryanje; yemwe bakobga b’ibidage, ni mutegere amatwi amajambo yanje." 
Isaiah32:10 Muzomara imisi irenze umwaka muhagaritse imitima, yemwe mwa bidage mwe, kukw imyengo izobura, kandi nta kwimbura kuzobaho." 
Isaiah32:11 Hinda agashitsi, yemwe bagore bidibamiye; hagarika imitima, yemwe mwa bidage! Mwiyambure impuzu, mwīsige ubusa, mukenyere amagunira mu rukenyerero." 
Isaiah32:12 Bazokwishishitira bababajwe n’amatongo yabanezereza, n’imizabibu yaregeza." 
Isaiah32:13 Mu gihugu c’abantu banje hazomera amahwa n’imikēre; mbere bizomera no ku mazu yose banezererwamwo yo ku murwa w’umunezero; 
Isaiah32:14 kukw ingoro izohebga, umurwa bahora bayebanganako uzoba imisaka; umusozi n’umunara w’abateramyi bizohinduka amasenga gushitsa ibihe bidashira, bizoba aho guhimbara indogoba z’inyeshamba, hazoba ubgatsi bg’imikuku;" 
Isaiah32:15 gushitsa aho Mpwemu azodusukirwako avuye hejuru, ubugaragwa bugacika itongo rimera cane, kand’ itongo ryamera cane rikitwa ishamba." 
Isaiah32:16 Maz’ ukuroranya kuzotsindaza mu bugaragwa, n’ubugororotsi buzoba mw itongo rimera cane." 
Isaiah32:17 Ubugororotsi buzovyara amahoro, kand’ ubugororotsi buzozana ugutekereza n’ivyizigiro gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Isaiah32:18 Kand’ abantu banje bazoba mu ngo z’amahoro, no mu mazu bahabe amarembe, no mu buruhukiro butagira inkomanzi." 
Isaiah32:19 Arik’ urubura ruzotsinda ikibira hasi, igisagara gisangangurwe rwose." 
Isaiah32:20 Murahiriwe, yemwe ababiba mu biyaya vy’ amazi yose, mukarekura inka n’ indogoba kugenda umwagambo." 
Isaiah33:1 Uzobona ibara, wewe unyaga kand’ utānyazwe, uryarukana kandi batākuryarutse! Ni waheza kunyaga, nawe uzonyagwa; kandi ni wamara kuryarukana, bazokuryaruka nawe." 
Isaiah33:2 Ewe Uhoraho, utugirire imbabazi; ni wewe twiteze; utubere amaboko uko bukeye, mber’ utubere agakiza mu gihe c’amagorwa." 
Isaiah33:3 Amoko ahungishijwe n’ijwi ryo guhūrīra; kubgo guhaguruka kwawe amahanga arasābagiye. 
Isaiah33:4 Bazovumbura iminyago mwanyaze nk’ukw inzige zivumbura, bazoyigwako nk’uk’ ubuyige bg’intōteza bugwa." 
Isaiah33:5 Uhoraho ashizwe hejuru nk’uko yibera iyo hejuru: yuzuza i Siyoni ibiroranye n’ubugororotsi. 
Isaiah33:6 Mu bihe vyawe hazobah’ umutēkāno, n’ agakiza k’umurengera, n’ubgenge no kumenya: kwubaha Uhoraho ni bgo butunzi bgawe." 
Isaiah33:7 Ehe, abahizi babo baraborogera hanze; intumwa zo gusaba impore ziriko zirarira cane." 
Isaiah33:8 Inzira z’iroro zirasivye, nta wuhita akiboneka; yishe isezerano, akēngēra ibisagara, kandi ntagira udusoni ku bantu." 
Isaiah33:9 Igihugu kiriganyira, kirahondobereye: Lebanoni haratēterewe, harakabiranye; Sharoni hameze nk’ ubugaragwa; Bashani na Karumeli hakoraguye amababi." 
Isaiah33:10 Uhoraho aravuga, ati Hinge mvyaguruke non’ ubu, non’ ubu ngira mpaguruke, non’ ubu ngira nishire hejuru." 
Isaiah33:11 Muzosama inda y’umuguruka, muvyare ishingwe; impwemu zanyu ni wo muriro uzobatongora." 
Isaiah33:12 Amahanga azoturirwa nk’uko baturira ishwagara; azomera nk’igiteme c’amahwa, kigaturirirwa mu muriro." 
Isaiah33:13 Yemwe abari kure, ni mwumve ivyo nkoze, namwe abari hafi, ni mwemere ubushobozi bganje." 
Isaiah33:14 Abanyavyaha b’i Siyoni baratinye; agatengo gafashe giturumbuka abatubaha Imana. Muri twebge ni nde yoshobora kubana n’umuriro utongora, kandi muri twebge ni nde yoshobora kubana n’ikibengebenge kidahengeshanya?" 
Isaiah33:15 Ūgendera mu bugororotsi akavuga ibitunganye, akagaya inyungu ziva mu gahahazo, agahungisha amaboko ngo ntiyābīre ingurire, akīziba amatwi ngo ntiyumve inama yo kuvisha amaraso, agahumiriza amaso ngo ntarābe ibibi:" 
Isaiah33:16 uwo ni we azoba ahataramutse hejuru, ahantu hiwe ho kwikinga hazoba igihome c’ amabuye; azohabga ivyo kurya bimutunga, kandi n’amazi ntazoyabura." 
Isaiah33:17 Amaso yawe azokwitegereza umwami afise ubgiza bgiwe: azorāba igihugu kigera kure. 
Isaiah33:18 Umutima wawe uzokwibuka ivyatera ubgoba; ukībaza, ut’ Uwaca ibitigiri vy’ ingorore ari hehe? Uwazākīra akarāba ko zishitse ari hehe? Uwaharūra iminara ari hehe?" 
Isaiah33:19 Ntuzoba ukibona ihanga ry’ inkazi, ihanga ry’imvugo igoye udashobora kwumva, riri n’ururimi rw’urunyamahanga udashobora gutahura." 
Isaiah33:20 Ni witegereze i Siyoni, umurwa twagiriramw’ imisi mikuru yacu: amaso yawe azobona i Yerusalemu hasigaye hatsimbataye har’ amahoro, ar’ ihema ritazokūrwaho, imambo zaryo ata ho zizoshingūrwa, ata n’ umugozi waryo uzocika." 
Isaiah33:21 Arik’ Uhoraho azohabana natwe afise icubahiro, azotubera inzūzi zagutse n’imigezi, ah’ ata bgato buzosozwa, ata n’imasuba ihambaye izohaca." 
Isaiah33:22 Kuk’ Uhoraho ari we mucamanza wacu; Uhoraho ni we adushingira ivyagezwe; Uhoraho ni we Mwami wacu: azodukiza. 
Isaiah33:23 Imigozi yawe iradohotse, ntigishobora gukamvya epfo y’ umuringoti, ntigishobora kubamba igihuzu kigendesha ubgato: ico gihe bazogabangana isahu ry’ibitayega, mbere n’abacumbagira bazosahura isahu." 
Isaiah33:24 Kand’ uwaho ntazovuga, ati Ndarwaye: abantu bahaba bazoba bahariwe ukugabitanya kwabo." 
Isaiah34:1 Mwa mahanga, ni mwīgire hafi kugira ngo mwumve; mutege amatwi mwa moko mwe; isi ni yumve, bo n’ibiyuzuye; n’ivu n’ibirimeramwo." 
Isaiah34:2 Kuk’ Uhoraho ashangashiriwe amahanga yose, akaba arakiye ingabo zayo zose, arabagesheje rwose, arabagabuye ngo bicwe." 
Isaiah34:3 Abishwe babo bazoshiburirwa hirya, umunuko w’imivyimba yabo uzoduhuka, imisozi izojegeshwa n’ ibitenga vy’amaraso yabo." 
Isaiah34:4 Ingabo z’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru zose zizokamangana, kand’ amajuru azozingirwa hamwe nk’umuzingo w’igitabo, n’izo ngabo zayo zose zizokabirana, nk’ukw akaragarira kava ku muzabibu, kandi nk’ ukw akaragarira kava ku musukoni." 
Isaiah34:5 Kukw inkota yanje inyoye mw ijuru igahāga; non’ igira igwe ku Banyedomu, no ku bantu navumye, ngw ibahane." 
Isaiah34:6 Inkota y’Uhoraho yuzuyekw amaraso, ihāze ibinure, amaraso y’imyagazi y’intama n’impene, n’ibinure vyo ku mafyigo y’amasuguru y’intama; kuk’ Uhoraho yifitiye ikimazi i Bosira, n’ukugeseza gukomeye mu gihugu ca Edomu." 
Isaiah34:7 Imbogo zizogwa hamwe na vyo, amashūri hamwe n’amapfizi; igihugu cabo kizoborerwa amaraso, n’ivu ry’i wabo rizohāga ibinure." 
Isaiah34:8 Kuk’ uwo musi ari wo wo guhōra kw’ Uhoraho, n’umwaka wo kubasubiriza mu nkōko ku vyo bāgiriye Siyoni." 
Isaiah34:9 Imigezi yaho izohinduka kaburimbi, n’ivu ryaho rizohinduka amazuku; kand’ igihugu caho kizohinduka kaburimbi yaka." 
Isaiah34:10 Ntikizozimwa ku murango no mw ijoro, umwotsi waco uzopfunduka ibihe bidashira; kizohora ar’ amatongo uk’ urunganwe rwabo ruzogenda rukurikirana: kandi nta wuzogicamwo gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Isaiah34:11 Arikw inkongori n’ibinyogoto ni vyo bizocegukira, ibihuna n’ibikona na vyo bizokibamwo; azohageresha umugozi, ni wo bitongozi, na karisho, ni ko gusigara ubusa." 
Isaiah34:12 Bazohamagara abashingantahe b’ico gihugu ngo bimike umwami, ariko nta bazoba bariho; kand’ abaganwa baho bose bazoba bacitse ubusa." 
Isaiah34:13 Ingoro zaho zizomeramw’ amahwa, n’ibihome vyaho bizomeramw’ ibisuru n’ibitovu; hazoba ubgishinzo bg’ imbgebge n’inama y’ibisīga vyitwa imbuni." 
Isaiah34:14 Ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa bizohūrirayo n’amabingira, n’igisigo c’impfizi y’impene kizohamagarana na mugenzi waco, mbere n’ikinyejoro kizohagerēra, kihibonere uburuhukiro." 
Isaiah34:15 Ni ho imvuvyi izokwigirira umwimba, ihatere amagi, ihamenagurire, ikumakumire musi y’igitūtu cayo: mber’ aho ni ho ibinyakabaka bizokoranira, ikigore cose kiri kumwe n’ikigabo caco." 
Isaiah34:16 Ni murondere mu gitabo c’Uhoraho musome: nta na kimwe co mur’ ivyo kizobura, nta kigore kizobura ikigabo caco, kukw akanwa kiwe ari ko kabigeze, kand’ impwemu ziwe akaba ari zo zibikoranije." 
Isaiah34:17 Yabipfindiye ubupfindo, kand’ ukuboko kwiwe ni kwo kwahabigaburiye n’umugozi; bizohegukira gushitsa ibihe vyose, bihabe ukw ibihe bihaye ibindi." 
Isaiah35:1 Ahagadutse n’ubgeranyange hazonezerwa, ubugaragwa buzohimbarwa, bushurike amashurwe nk’aya habaseleti." 
Isaiah35:2 Buzoshurika amashurwe menshi, buhimbaranwe umunezero n’indirimbo; buzohabga ubgiza bg’i Lebanoni, n’ugushaza kw’i Karumeli n’i Sharoni: bazobona ubgiza bg’Uhoraho, ugushaza kw’ Imana yacu." 
Isaiah35:3 Mukomeze amaboko areganutse, mugumishe amavi aregarega." 
Isaiah35:4 Mubgire abahagaritse imitima, muti Rema, nta co mutinya: rāba, Imana yanyu izozanana n’uguhōra, ni kwo kwitura kw’Imana; izoza ibakize." 
Isaiah35:5 Ni ho impumyi zizohumūka, n’ibipfamatwi bizozibūrwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Ico gihe ūcumbagira azosimba nk’ impongo, ururimi rw’ikiragi ruririmbe: kukw amazi azodudubiriza ahagadutse, imigezi itembere mu bugaragwa." 
Isaiah35:7 Kand’ umusenyi uhiye uburimbi uzohinduka ibidengeri, n’ahagataye hazocika amasōko: mu bgishinzo bg’imbgebge, aho zāgandagaza, hazemera ivyatsi n’amarenga n’ imibere." 
Isaiah35:8 Kandi hazobay’ inzira y’iroro, iyo nzira izokwitwa Inzira Yera. Abanduye imitima ntibazoyicamwo, arikw izoba iy’ abantu biwe. Abayicamwo, naho hobamw’ ibijuju, ntibazozimira." 
Isaiah35:9 Nta ntambge izohaba, nta gikōko na kimwe c’inkazi kizoyigeramwo, ntibizoyibonekamwo: arikw abācunguwe ni bo bazoyicamwo." 
Isaiah35:10 Abācunguwe n’ Uhoraho bazogaruka, bashike i Siyoni baririmba; umunezero udashira uzoba ku mitwe yabo: bazobona uguhimbarwa bo n’ umunezero, kand’ umubabaro n’ ugusuhuza umutima bizohunga." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu mwaka ugira icumi na kane umwami Hezekiya ari ku ngoma, Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri yaradūze, atera ibisagara vyose vyubakiwe inzitiro vy’i Buyuda, arabitsinda." 
Isaiah36:2 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri atuma Rabushake ava i Lakishi ajanye ingabo nyinshi, aja i Yerusalemu, ku mwami Hezekiya. Ashitseyo ahagarara ku mugende wo ku kidengeri co haruguru, ku nzira yo ku kibuga c’umumesuzi." 
Isaiah36:3 Maz’ umuzezwarugo Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, n’umukarani Shebuna, n’umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba yitwa Yowa mwene Asafu, barenga irembo baramusanganira." 
Isaiah36:4 Rabushake arababarira, ati Ni mubarire Hezekiya, mut’ Uku ni k’umwami ahambaye, ni we mwami w’i Ashuri, agize: ngo Mbeg’ ivyo vyizigiro wizigiye n’ibiki?" 
Isaiah36:5 Ngw Inama yawe n’ inkomezi zo kurwana, erega n’ amajambo y’impfagusa. Ngo Mbeg’ uwo wishimiye ni nde, yatumye umugarariza?" 
Isaiah36:6 Ngw Erega wishimiye ya nkoni y’ irenga rivunitse, ni ryo Egiputa, umuntu yoryishimikiza ryomutobekeranya ikiganza. Ng’ Uko ni ko Farawo umwami wa Egiputa amerera abamwishimiye bose." 
Isaiah36:7 Naho mwomubarira ko mwishimiye Uhoraho Imana yanyu: none si yo Hezekiya yakūyeh’ ibitabo vyayo n’ibicaniro vyayo, akabarira Abayuda n’ab’ i Yerusalemu, ati Muze musengere imbere y’iki gicaniro?" 
Isaiah36:8 Muti None rero, enda shinga na shebuja umwami w’i Ashuri, muti Na we Rabushake araguha amafarasi ibihumbi bibiri, namba nawe ubgawe woshobora kuronka abo uyūriza." 
Isaiah36:9 Muti None se woshobora ute gukora mu maso y’umugabisha n’umwe wo mu basavyi ba shebuja bo hanyuma y’abandi, mut’ Asangw’ ar’ ukwishimira Abanyegiputa kw ari bo bazoguha imikogote ikwegwa n’ amafarasi n’abo kuyagenderako?" 
Isaiah36:10 Muti Mbega yadūze gutera iki gihugu no kukirandura, atari kubg’ Uhoraho? Mut’ Ereg’ Uhoraho ni we nyene yamubariye, ati Dūga utere ico gihugu, ukirandure." 
Isaiah36:11 Maze Eliyakimu na Shebuna na Yowa bishura Rabushake, bat’ Enda se turakwinginze, utubarire mu Gisiriya, kuko tucumva; ariko nta co utubaririra mu Kiyuda mu matwi y’aba bantu bari hejuru ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye." 
Isaiah36:12 Ariko Rabushake arabishura, ati Mbega mugira ngo databuja yantumye kuri shobuja namwe gusa kubabgira aya majambo? Ntiyantumye kur’ aba bagabo bicaranye namwe hejuru ku ruzitiro, kugira ngo barīre amavyi yabo hamwe n’ayo basōvye?" 
Isaiah36:13 Maze Rabushake arahagarara, avuga n’ijwi rirenga mu rurimi rw’Ikiyuda, ati Ni mwumve amajambo y’umwami ahambaye, ni we mwami w’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah36:14 Uku ni k’umwami agize, ngo Hezekiya ntabahende; ngo Kukw atazoshobora kubakiza." 
Isaiah36:15 Ngo Kandi Hezekiya ntabizigize Uhoraho, ababarira, ng’ Uhoraho ntazobura kubakiza, kandi ng’ Uyu murwa ntuzotangwa ng’ukorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah36:16 Ntimwumvire Hezekiya: kuk’ ukw ari k’umwami w’i Ashuri agize, ngo Kunda mwuzure na we, musokoroke muje iy’ ari, umuntu wese ngw abone kurya ku muzabibu wiwe no ku musukoni wiwe, no kunywa ku mazi yo mw ivomo ryiwe," 
Isaiah36:17 ngo Gushitsa igihe azozira akabajana mu gihugu gihwanye n’icanyu, igihugu c’ingano na vino, igihugu c’indya n’inzabibu." 
Isaiah36:18 Ngo Mwiyubare, Hezekiya ntabahende, avuga ng’ Uhoraho azobakiza. Mbega mu mana z’ abanyamahanga hari n’imwe yigeze gukiza igihugu cayo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri?" 
Isaiah36:19 Ngo Mbeg’ imana z’i Hamati n’izo muri Arupadi ziri hehe? Imana z’i Sefaravayimu ziri hehe? Ngo Mbega zarakijije Samariya ngo ntihakorokere mu maboko yiwe? 
Isaiah36:20 Ngo N’izihe mu mana zose zo mur’ ivyo bihugu zākijije igihugu cazo ngo ntigikorokere mu maboko yiwe, ng’ Uhoraho na we akize Yerusalemu ngo ntihakorokere mu maboko yiwe?" 
Isaiah36:21 Maze barihorera, ntibamwishura ijambo na rimwe, kukw ijambo ry’umwami ryari ryavuze, ngo Ntimugire ico mumwishura." 
Isaiah36:22 Hanyuma wa muzezwarugo Eliyakimu mwene Hilukiya, n’ umukarani Shebuna, n’umwanditsi w’ivyaja biraba yitwa Yowa mwene Asafu, baza kuri Hezekiya bitantamuriyekw impuzu zabo, bamudondera amagambo ya Rabushake." 
Isaiah37:1 Maz’ umwami Hezekiya avyumvise, yitantamurirakw impuzu ziwe, yambara amagunira, yinjira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah37:2 Maz’ atuma Eliyakimu umuzezwarugo, na Shebuna umukarani, n’abakuru bo mu baherezi, bambaye amagunira, k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
Isaiah37:2 Maz’ atuma Eliyakimu umuzezwarugo, na Shebuna umukarani, n’abakuru bo mu baherezi, bambaye amagunira, k’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi." 
Isaiah37:3 Baramubgira, bati Hezekiya aradutumye, ng’ Uyu musi n’umusi w’umubabaro n’ibihano n’ugushinyagurirwa, ngo Kukw abana bagomba kuvuka, kandi nta nkomezi zo kubavyara." 
Isaiah37:4 Ngo Kumbure Uhoraho Imana yawe yokwumva amagambo ya Rabushake, ayo shebuja umwami w’i Ashuri yamutumye gutuka Imana nzima, Uhoraho Imana yawe akamuhana kubg’ ayo magambo yumvise. Ngo Nuko rero, shirak’ usenge, usabire amasigarira agisigaye." 
Isaiah37:5 Nukw abantu b’umwami Hezekiya bashika kuri Yesaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Yesaya arababgira, at’ Uku abe ari ko mubgira shobuja, mut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Ntutinye ayo magambo wumvise, abo baja b’umwami w’i Ashuri bamurogoseko." 
Isaiah37:7 Ngo Rāba, azomushiramw’ uwundi mutima, kand’ azokwumva impuha zitume asubira mu gihugu ciwe; kandi ngw Azomwicishiriza inkota mur’ ico gihugu ciwe nyene." 
Isaiah37:8 Nuko Rabushake asubira inyuma, asanga umwami w’i Ashuri ateye i Libuna; ajayo kuko yari yumvise ko yavuye i Lakishi." 
Isaiah37:9 Bukeye umwami w’i Ashuri yumva bavuga Tiruhaka umwami w’i Etiyopiya, bat’ Araje kugutera. Avyumvise, atuma intumwa kuri Hezekiya," 
Isaiah37:10 mut’ Uku abe ari ko muzobgira Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, mut’ Iyo Mana wishimiye ntiz’ iguhende, ngw I Yerusalemu ntihazotangwa mu maboko y’umwami w’i Ashuri." 
Isaiah37:11 Muti Mbega ntiwumvise ukw abami b’i Ashuri bāgiriye ibihugu vyose, bakabirandura rwose? muti None wewe uzokira?" 
Isaiah37:12 Muti Mbeg’ imana z’amahanga, ayo ba sekuru bāranduye, zarakijije ab’ i Gozani n’i Harani n’i Resefu n’Abanyedeni baba i Telasari?" 
Isaiah37:13 Mut’ Umwami w’i Hamati ari hehe, cank’ umwami w’i Arupadi, n’umwami w’umurwa w’i Sefaravayimu, n’uw’ i Hena n’uw’ i Iva?" 
Isaiah37:14 Bukeye Hezekiya ashikirizwa ico cete n’izo ntumwa, aragisoma; maz’ aradūga, aja mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho, arakigaranzura, agishira imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah37:15 Nuko Hezekiya asenga Uhoraho," 
Isaiah37:16 at’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Mana y’Abisirayeli, uvyagiye ku bakerubi, ni wewe Mana wenyene y’ibihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi, ni wewe waremye ijuru n’isi." 
Isaiah37:17 Tega ugutwi Uhoraho, wumve; tereza inyonga zawe, Uhoraho, witegereze; wumve amagambo yose ya Senakeribu yatumye ino kugutuka wewe Mana nzima." 
Isaiah37:18 Uhoraho, n’ivy’ ukuri abami b’i Ashuri bārahoneje ayo mahanga yose n’ibihugu vyayo," 
Isaiah37:19 bātereye imana zabo mu muriro; ariko ntizar’ imana nya mana, zar’ izakozwe n’intoke z’abantu mu biti no mu mabuye; ni co catumye bazihonnya." 
Isaiah37:20 Nuko none, Uhoraho Mana yacu, udukize, udukūre mu maboko yiwe, kugira ngw ibihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi bamenye kw ari wewe Uhoraho wenyene." 
Isaiah37:21 Maze Yesaya mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, ut’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, agize, ngw Ivyo wamutakambiye ku vya Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, yavyumvise." 
Isaiah37:21 Maze Yesaya mwene Amosi atuma kuri Hezekiya, ut’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, agize, ngw Ivyo wamutakambiye ku vya Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri, yavyumvise." 
Isaiah37:22 Ut’ Iri ni ryo jambo Uhoraho yamuvuzeko, at’ Umukobga w’inkumi w’i Siyoni aragukēngereye, agutwengeye mw ijigo; umukobga w’i Yerusalemu akuzungurije umutwe." 
Isaiah37:23 Uwo watonganije ukamurogotako ni nde? Ni nde wirahiye akararamango ukamurābana agakēngērwe? Erega ni jewe Uwera w’Abisirayeli. 
Isaiah37:24 Watumye abantu bawe kuntuka, jewe Umwami Imana, uravuga, ng’ Udūganye igitero cinshi c’imikogote yawe y’intambara, ushitse mu mpinga z’imisozi, no mu dushōka tw’i Lebanoni; ngo Wiciye ibiti vy’amasederi vyaho birebire, n’ivy’ akajwari vyaho vyiza‐vyiza; ngo Wahanyuragiye ushika ku mpinga yaho hirya cane, no mu biti vyo mw itongo ryaho rimera cane." 
Isaiah37:25 Ngo Wimvye amazi urayanywa; wakamishije inzūzi zo muri Egiputa ubgōro bg’ ibirenge vyawe. 
Isaiah37:26 Mbega ntiwumvise uko nabigenjeje kera, mbigabiye mu bihe vyashize? None narabishikije, kugira ng’ uhonnye ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro, ubihindure ibirundo vy’amasakamburira." 
Isaiah37:27 Ni co catumye abābibamwo baba imburamaboko, bagacika ivutu, bakamāramāra; bagacika nk’ubgatsi bgo ku gahinga, nk’ubgatsi bg’urumerera, nk’ivyatsi vyimejeje ku nzu, nk’ingano zirumvye zikir’ ibironge." 
Isaiah37:28 Ariko ndazi imyicarire yawe, n’ amaja n’amaza yawe, n’ingene wanshangashiriwe." 
Isaiah37:29 None rero kubg’ ubushangashirwe wangiriye, n’uko numvise ivy’ agashamango kawe, nzogutūngīra umurinda wanje mu mazuru, n’umujiginya wanje mu kanwa, ngusubize mu nzira wazananye." 
Isaiah37:30 Ut’ Ariko weho Hezekiya, iki ni co kizokubera ikimenyamenya: uyu mwaka muzorya ivyimejeje ubgavyo, mu mwaka ugira kabiri muzorya utunagano twavyo, mu mwaka ugira gatatu muze mubibe, mwimbure, mutere inzabibu, muziryeko." 
Isaiah37:31 Kand’ amasigarira arokotse yo mu nzu ya Yuda bazokwongera gushōra imizi hasi, ahahera hejuru bahūrike ivyamye." 
Isaiah37:32 Kuko muri Yerusalemu hazosokoroka amasigarira, no ku musozi Siyoni have abārokotse: ishaka ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo rizoshitsa ivyo." 
Isaiah37:33 Uti Ni co gitumye Uhoraho avuga ivy’ umwami w’i Ashuri, ati Ntazoruha agera mur’ iki gisagara, canke ngw aharase n’umwampi, canke ngw ahatumbereze n’inkinzo, canke ngw aharunde ikirundo co kwūririrako." 
Isaiah37:34 Ut’ Inzira yazananye ni yo nyene izomusubizayo; ntazoruha agera mur’ iki gisagara, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah37:35 Ut’ Arik’ Uhoraho ngw Azozigama uyu murwa kugira ngw awukize, abikoze kubgiwe no kubg’ umusavyi wiwe Dawidi." 
Isaiah37:36 Maz’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho arasohoka, atera mu nsago z’Abashuri, yicamw’ ingabo ibihumbi ijana na mirongumunani na bitanu: abantu bavyutse mu gatondo basanga ingabo zose ar’ imihindigiti y’imivyimba." 
Isaiah37:37 Nuko Senakeribu umwami w’i Ashuri aca arataha, asubira inyuma, aja kuba i Ninewe." 
Isaiah37:38 Umusi ur’ izina, arikw arasenga mu ngoro y’ikigirwamana ciwe citwa Nisiroki, Adurameleki na Sharezeri abana biwe bamwicisha inkota; baca bahungira mu gihugu c’i Ararati. Maz’ umuhungu wiwe Esarihadoni asubira ku ngoma yiwe." 
Isaiah38:1 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi aza kuri we, aramubgira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Tunganya ivyo mu rugo rwawe, kuk’ ugira upfe, utagikira." 
Isaiah38:1 Mur’ iyo misi Hezekiya ararwara agera hafi yo gupfa. Bukeye ūvugishwa n’Imana Yesaya mwene Amosi aza kuri we, aramubgira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Tunganya ivyo mu rugo rwawe, kuk’ ugira upfe, utagikira." 
Isaiah38:2 Maze Hezekiya ahindukiriza amaso ku rusika, asenga Uhoraho," 
Isaiah38:3 ati Tegēra, Uhoraho we, ni wibuke ingene nagendera mu vy’ukuri imbere yawe n’umutima utunganye, ngakora ivyo ubona kw ari vyiza. Hezekiya ararira cane." 
Isaiah38:4 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rishika kuri Yesaya," 
Isaiah38:5 riti Genda ubarire Hezekiya, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho, Imana ya sogokuruza Dawidi, agize: uti Ngo yumvise ugusenga kwawe, abonye n’amosozi yawe; ut’ Ehe ku misi yawe yongeyekw imyaka cumi n’itanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Uti Kand’ azokurokorana n’iki gisagara, agukūre mu maboko y’ umwami w’i Ashuri; uti Kand’ azozigama iki gisagara." 
Isaiah38:7 Ut’ Iki ni co kimenyamenya aguhaye, cemeza yukw azoshitsa ico avuze:" 
Isaiah38:8 eh’ agira ngw ahēre ah’ igitūtu kigeze ku ntambuko z’urugero rwashinzwe na Ahazi, agisubizanyeyo n’izuba intambuko cumi. Nukw izuba rigaruka intambuko cumi riva aho ryari rigeze kuri za ntambuko." 
Isaiah38:9 Ibi ni vyo Hezekiya umwami w’Abayuda yanditse, amaze gukira indwara yiwe yari yararwaye." 
Isaiah38:10 Naravuze, nti Ndakenyutse, ngiye guca mu marembo y’i kuzimu: Natswe imyaka yanje yar’ igisigaye." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndavuga, nti Sinzobona Uhoraho, Uhoraho mu gihugu c’abariho: Sinzokwongera kubona umuntu n’umwe wo mu baba mw isi." 
Isaiah38:12 Inzu yanje ikūweho, imvanyweko nk’ukw ihema ry’ umwungere ritaragama. Ubugingo bganje ndabuzinze nk’uk’ ūjisha azinga; agira ancācūre ku mambo: Umusi ugeze kwīra azoba amaze kumpeza." 
Isaiah38:13 Nariyumanganije nshitsa mu gatondo; arikw avunagura amagufa yanje yose nk’ ukw intambge igira: Umusi ugeze kwīra azoba amaze kumpeza. 
Isaiah38:14 Ndanihīra nk’intamba ijwigira, canke nk’inyanana yānāga, Nkaniha nk’inuma iguguza; amaso yanje yaheze hejuru; Uhoraho, ndegeranijwe: nyishinga." 
Isaiah38:15 Novuga ikindi ki kandi? Ni we yavuganye nanje, kandi ni we nyene yabikoze. Nuko nzogenda niyoroheje mu myaka yanje yose, nibuka umubabaro war’ umeze nk’umururazi mu mutima wanje." 
Isaiah38:16 Mwami, ivyo ni vyo bibeshah’ abantu, Kandi mur’ ivyo vyonyene ni ho umutima wanje ubonera ubugingo. Nuko nkiza, umbesheho." 
Isaiah38:17 Ereg’ icatumye ngira umubabaro w’umururazi mwinshi kwar’ ukugira ngo ndonke amahoro; Kand’ urukundo wakunze ubugingo bganje rwātumye ubukiza urwobo rw’ iborero, Kukw ivyaha vyanje vyose wabirengeje inyuma yawe." 
Isaiah38:18 Kukw i kuzimu hadashobora kuguhimbaza, n’urupfu ntirushobora kugutazira, Kand’ abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo ntibashobora kwishimira ukuri kwawe." 
Isaiah38:19 Umuntu muzima, umuntu muzima ni we azoguhimbaza, nk’uko ndiko ndaguhimbaza uyu musi. Umuvyeyi azomenyesha abana biwe ingen’ ur’ uwo kwizigirwa." 
Isaiah38:20 Uhoraho, nkiza, Ni co kizotuma turirimba indirimbo zanje tuvugira inanga Turi mu ngoro y’Uhoraho imisi yose y’ukubaho kwacu." 
Isaiah38:21 Kandi Yesaya yari yaravuze, ati Ni bābīre intore ibumbabumbge mu nsukoni, bayomeke ku kivyimba, kand’ azokira." 
Isaiah38:22 Kandi na Hezekiya yari yarabajije, at’ Ikimenyamenya kizoba iki, cerekana ko nzodūga nkaja mu ngoro y’Uhoraho?" 
Isaiah39:1 Ico gihe Merodaki‐Baladani mwene Baladani umwami w’i Babuloni arungikira Hezekiya ivyete n’ingemurano, kuko yari yumvise ko yarwaye agakira." 
Isaiah39:2 Maz’ abātumwe Hezekiya abākīra neza, abereka mu nzu ah’ abīka ibintu vyiwe vy’igiciro, amafeza n’amazahabu n’imibavu n’amavuta y’igiciro kinini, no mu nzu hose ah’ abīka ivyo kurwanisha, n’ikintu cose co mu vyo atunze cariho. Nta kintu na kimwe co mu ngoro yiwe canke co mu gihugu ciwe cose Hezekiya atāberetse." 
Isaiah39:3 Bukeye haza uwavugishwa n’Imana Yesaya ku mwami Hezekiya, aramubaza, at’ Abo bantu bavuze iki? Kandi baje i wawe bavuye hehe? Hezekiya aramwishura, ati Baje bavuye mu gihugu ca kure i Babuloni." 
Isaiah39:4 Arongera aramubaza, ati Babonye ibiki mu ngoro yawe? Hezekiya aramwishura, at’ Ibiri mu ngoro yanje vyose bābibonye: nta kintu na kimwe co mu vyo ntunze ntāberetse." 
Isaiah39:5 Maze Yesaya abarira Hezekiya, ati Ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Isaiah39:6 Eh’ imisi izoza, ibiri mu ngoro yawe vyose, n’ivyo ba sogokuruza bābītse bigashitsa n’ubu, bizosahurwa bijanwe i Babuloni; nta kintu na kimwe kizosigara, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah39:7 Kand’ abahungu bawe uzoba wīkūriye mu nda wavyaye bazobajana, bagirwe inkone zo kuba mu ngoro y’umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Isaiah39:8 Maze Hezekiya yishura Yesaya, at’ Ijambo ry’Uhoraho uvuze ni ryiza. Yongera kuvuga, ati Kazima hagiye kuba amahoro n’umutēkāno nkiriho." 
Isaiah40:1 Ni muhūmurize abantu banje, ni mubahūmurize, ni kw Imana yanyu igize." 
Isaiah40:2 Muremēshe imitima y’ab’i Yerusalemu, mubabgire musemerera yukw intambara zaho zabangurukanye, k’ umwenda w’igicumuro cabo ushize, kukw ivyaha vyabo vyose babihaniwe kabiri n’ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho." 
Isaiah40:3 Ijwi ry’ūsemerera, ati Ni mutegure inzira y’Uhoraho mu bugaragwa, musenere Imana yacu inzira y’iroro mu bgeranyange." 
Isaiah40:4 Umwonga wose uzokwuzuzwa, n’umusozi wose n’akarambi bizoringanizwa; ahār’ udutumba hazotega, uduhogoro ducike ikiyaya." 
Isaiah40:5 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buzohishurwa, kand’ abafise umubiri bose bazobubonera rimwe, kukw akanwa k’Uhoraho ari ko kabivuze." 
Isaiah40:6 Ijwi ry’ūvuga, ati Semerera. Uwundi ati Nsemerere iki? Ut’ Abafise umubiri bose n’ivyatsi gusa, n’ubgiza bgabo bgose bumeze nk’amashurwe yo ku musozi:" 
Isaiah40:7 ivyatsi birūma, amashurwe agakabirana, kukw impwemu z’Uhoraho zībihūhako: n’ukuri abantu n’ivyatsi gusa." 
Isaiah40:8 Ivyatsi birūma, amashurwe agakabirana, arikw ijambo ry’Imana yacu rizohorah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Isaiah40:9 Yewe ubarira Siyoni ubutumwa bgiza, dūga umusozi muremure; yewe ubarira Yerusalemu ubutumwa bgiza, semerera cane ushimitse; semerera, ntutinye; ubgire ibisagara vy’i Buyuda, ut’ Eh’ Imana yanyu!" 
Isaiah40:10 Eh’ Uhoraho Imana azoza afise ubushobozi, kand’ ukuboko kwiwe kuzomutwarira: rāba, azoza azanye impēra, kand’ inyishu yiwe ir’ imbere yiwe." 
Isaiah40:11 Azoragira umukuku wiwe nk’umwungere, azoterura imyagazi mu maboko, ayitware mu gikiriza, kand’ izonsa azoziyobora buhoro‐buhoro." 
Isaiah40:12 Ni nde yigeze kugera amazi y’ikiyaga ku rushi, akageresha ijuru itambge ry’intoke, akaronka ingero yokwirwamw’ umukungugu wo kw isi, akagera imisozi ku munzane, n’uturambi ku ngero?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ni nde yigeze kurōngōra Mpwemu w’Uhoraho, akamwigisha nk’ah’ ar’ umujanama wiwe?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ni nde Mpwemu yigeze kugīsha inama, kandi ni nde yigeze kumwigisha, akamwigisha kuroranya, akamwigisha ubgenge, akamwereka uburyo bgo gutahura?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ereg’ amahanga ameze nk’ ima ry’amazi riri mu mubindi, agereranywa n’umukungugu ufashe ku munzane; rāba aterura ibizinga vyo mu kiyaga nk’ah’ ar’ akantu gato k’ubusa." 
Isaiah40:16 Kand’ i Lebanoni ntihoboneka inkwi zo gucana zirangije, kandi n’ibikōko vyaho ntivyorangiza kuba ikimazi co kwosa." 
Isaiah40:17 Imbere yiwe amahanga yose ni nk’ubusa; kuri we agereranywa nk’ah’ ari hanyuma y’ubusa, nk’akarēre kagaragara." 
Isaiah40:18 None rer’ Imana mwoyigereranya na nde, canke mwoyishushanya n’ishusho ki?" 
Isaiah40:19 Ikigirwamana, umuhinga arakiyaza, umucuzi w’izahabu akacomekakw izahabu, akagicurira imigufu y’ifeza." 
Isaiah40:20 Ūbaye mworo, atoshoboye ishikanwa ringana rirtyo, yironkera igiti kitazobora, maz’ akironderera umukozi w’umuhinga wo guhagarika ico kigirwamana, ngo kigume." 
Isaiah40:21 Ntimwaribgabimenye? Ntimwaribgavyumve? Ntimwaribgabibarirwe uhereye mbere na mbere? Ntimwaribgabitahure uhereye ah’ itanguriro ry’isi ryashiriweho? 
Isaiah40:22 Iyo ni yo ivyagiye ahihese hejuru y’isi, ababa mw isi bameze nk’uduhori; ni yo igaranzura amajuru nk’impuzu y’agakangayenzi, ikayāgānura nk’ihema ryo kubamwo;" 
Isaiah40:23 ni yo ihindura abaganwa ubusa; ikamanganya abacamanza bo mw isi, bakaba nk’akarēre kagaragara." 
Isaiah40:24 Bābaye bagiteragirwa, bābaye bakibibga, igishitsi cabo cābaye kigishinga imizi hasi, irabahūha, barakabirana, agashururu kabazingazinga nk’ibishingwe." 
Isaiah40:25 None rero mwongereranya na nde twongana? ni k’Uwera abajije. 
Isaiah40:26 Ni mwunamure amaso yanyu murābe hejuru, murābe uwaremye izo nyenyeri uw’ ari we, asohora ingabo zazo mu bitigiri: azihamagara zose mu mazina; kubg’ ububasha bg’ubushobozi bgiwe, no kubg’ inkomezi ziwe nyinshi, nta n’imwe ihara." 
Isaiah40:27 N’iki gituma uvuga, yewe Yakobo, ukiganyira, yewe Isirayeli, ut’ Inzira yanje inyegejwe Uhoraho, kand’ ut’ Ivyanje Imana yanje iravyirengagiza?" 
Isaiah40:28 Ntiwaribgabimenye? Nturavyumva? Uhoraho n’Imana ihoraho, Umuremyi w’impera z’isi; ntadendebukirwa, nta ho aruha; ubgenge bgiwe ntibuserangurika." 
Isaiah40:29 Ni we aha inkomezi abadendebukiwe, kand’ ūtagira intege amwongeramw’ inkomezi." 
Isaiah40:30 Imisore yonadendebukirwa, ikaruha, n’imisore y’imikangara yokwicakw igatemba," 
Isaiah40:31 arikw abīteze Uhoraho bazokwama biyubura mu nkomezi nsha; bazodūgisha amababa nk’ inkukuma, biruke ntibaruhe, bagende ntibadendebukirwe." 
Isaiah41:1 Ni mucereze munyumvirize, yemwe ababa ku kiyaga; amahanga ni yiyubure, asubire mu nkomezi nsha, bīgire hafi; maze bahēreko bavuge: twegerane, tubūrane." 
Isaiah41:2 Ni nde yavyukije ūva i burasirazuba, akāma anesha ukw ashingūye ikirenge? Amugomoreye amahanga, amuha kuganza abami, ayagomorera inkota yiwe iyahindura nk’umukungugu, n’umuheto wiwe uyahindura nk’ibishingwe bikubebga n’umuyaga." 
Isaiah41:3 Arabatōta, agenda aja imbere ata nkomanzi; mber’ ajana inzira ibirenge vyiwe bitigeze gucamwo." 
Isaiah41:4 Ni nde yabikoze akabishitsa, ahamagaye abantu uk’ urunganwe rwabo rwagenda rukurikirana uhereye kw itanguriro? Ni jewe Uhoraho, uwa mbere n’ uw’ iherezo, ni jewe nyene." 
Isaiah41:5 Ababa ku kiyaga barabibonye, baratinya; abo ku mpera z’isi bahinda agashitsi: bīgira hafi, baraza." 
Isaiah41:6 Umuntu wese yafashije umubanyi wiwe, akabarira mugenzi we, ati Gumya umutima." 
Isaiah41:7 Nuk’ umuhinga aremesha umucuzi w’izahabu, ūryohoza inyundo akaremesha ūcurira kw ibuye, akavuga, at’ Ivyuma twabiteranije neza; maz’ akagikomeresha imisumari ngo kigume." 
Isaiah41:8 Ariko weho Isirayeli musavyi wanje, Yakobo uwo natoranije, ruvyaro rwa Aburahamu umukunzi wanje:" 
Isaiah41:9 wewe uwo natoye, nkagukūra ku mpera z’isi, nkaguhamagara ng’uve ku mfuruka zayo, nkakubgira, nt’ Ur’ umusavyi wanje, naragutoranije sinagutaye;" 
Isaiah41:10 ntutinye, kuko ndi kumwe nawe; ntukihebure, kuko nd’ Imana yawe: nzogukomeza, nzogutabara, mbere nzokuramira n’ukuboko kw’i buryo kw’ukugororoka kwanje." 
Isaiah41:11 Eh’ abakurakiye bose bazotētērwa bamāramāre: abagutonganya bazocika ubusa, baranduke." 
Isaiah41:12 Abaguhāririza uzobarondera, ubabure, kand’ abakurwanya bazocika ubusa, bakamangane." 
Isaiah41:13 Kuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe nzogufata ukuboko kw’i buryo, nkubgire, nti Ntutinye, ndagutabara." 
Isaiah41:14 Ntutinye, musiba we Yakobo, namwe nkehwa z’ Abisirayeli; nzogutabara, ni k’ Uhoraho agize; kand’ Uwera w’ Abisirayeli ni we mucunguzi wawe." 
Isaiah41:15 Rāba nzoguhindura igisekuzo gisha, gikarishe gifise amenyo: uzohūragura imisozi uyinoze, uzohindura uturambi nk’ umuguruka." 
Isaiah41:16 Uzobigosora umuyaga ubitumure, agashururu kabishwiragize: nawe uzohimbarwa n’Uhoraho, wirate Uwera w’ Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah41:17 Impahazwa n’ abakene barondera amazi bakayabura, ururimi rwabo rukagwa umwumwa; jewe Uhoraho nzobishura, jewe Imana ya Isirayeli sinzobaheba." 
Isaiah41:18 Nzoziburura inzūzi mu mpinga z’imisozi y’uruharabuga, n’amasōko hagati mu myonga: ubugaragwa nzobuhindura ikidengeri c’amazi, n’igihugu cumye nzogihindura imbizi z’amazi." 
Isaiah41:19 Mu bugaragwa nzohatera ibiti vy’amasederi n’ivy’ imishita n’ivy’ imihadasi n’ivya elayo; kandi mu gahinga nzohashira ibiti vy’akajwari n’ivy’ imitidari n’ivy’ imiteyashuri bikurane; 
Isaiah41:20 kugira ngo barābe, bamenye, bitegereze, batahurire hamwe yuk’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho ari kwo gukoze ivyo, kandi k’Uwera w’Abisirayeli ari we yabiremye." 
Isaiah41:21 Ni muzane imibūrano yanyu, ni k’Uhoraho agize; muserure inyanduruko zanyu zikomeye, ni k’Umwami wa Yakobo agize." 
Isaiah41:22 Ni babiserure, batubarire ibizoba: ni muvuge ivyabayeho ivy’ ari vyo, kugira ngo tuvyiyumvire, tumenye iherezo ryavyo; canke se mutwereke ibizoza." 
Isaiah41:23 Muvuge ibigiye kuzoza hanyuma kugira ngo tumenye ko mur’ imana: mupfe gukora iciza canke gukora ikibi, kugira ngo tukirābe twese, tujorerwe." 
Isaiah41:24 Rāba nta co murimwo, kandi n’igikorwa canyu n’ ubusa: ūbahitamwo aba abaye umuyobe." 
Isaiah41:25 Nahagurukije umuntu avuye i burārūko, kand’ araje; uwambaza izina ryanje avuye i burasirazuba: azokāta abaganza nk’ūkāta urwondo, canke nk’uk’ umubumvyi akāta ibumba." 
Isaiah41:26 Ni nde yabivuze uhereye ubga mbere ngo tubimenye, canke ni nde yabivuze kera kugira ngo tuvuge, tut’ Ivyo n’ivy’ ukuri? N’ukuri koko nta wabivuze, n’ukuri nta wavyerekanye, n’ukuri nta wumvise amajambo yanyu." 
Isaiah41:27 Ni jewe nabanje kubgira Siyoni, nti Ngabo baraje! I Yerusalemu mpatuma intumwa yo kubabgira ubutumwa bgiza." 
Isaiah41:28 Naritegereje, mbona ata wuriho; muri bo ubgabo nta n’ umujanama ariho yoshobora kunyishura n’ijambo na rimwe mbabajije." 
Isaiah41:29 Rāba bose ibikorwa vyabo nta co birimwo kandi n’ubusa gusa: ibishushanyo vyabo vyāvugutiwe mu nkero ni bga muyaga kandi n’ubusa. 
Isaiah42:1 Nguyu umushumba wanje, uwo nama nshigikiye, uwo natoranije, ahimbara umutima wanje: nashize Mpwemu wanje kuri we; azoshikana amateka mu banyamahanga." 
Isaiah42:2 Ntazoyogora, ntazosemerera, kandi ntazokwumvikanisha ijwi mu nzira." 
Isaiah42:3 Ntazohohosha irenga rivunitse, n’urumuri ruyenga ntazoruzimya: azoshikana amateka mu vy’ukuri." 
Isaiah42:4 Ntazodendebukirwa, ntazocika intege, gushitsa ah’ azoshingira amateka mw isi; ababa ku kiyaga bazokwitega ivyagezwe vyiwe." 
Isaiah42:5 Uku ni kw Imana Uhoraho agize, uwaremye amajuru akayāgānura, uwagaranzuye isi n’ivy’ imera, uwahaye abantu bo muri yo guhumeka, kand’ abayigendako akabaha ubugingo:" 
Isaiah42:6 ati Jewe Uhoraho naguhamagaye mu bugororotsi: nzogufata nkuzigame, ngutange ng’ ubere abantu isezerano, n’abanyamahanga ubabere umuco;" 
Isaiah42:7 ng’ uhumūre impumyi, ng’ usohore imbohe mw ibohero, n’abicaye mu mwiza ngo bave mu nzu y’imbohe." 
Isaiah42:8 Jewe nd’Uhoraho, iryo ni ryo zina ryanje; icubahiro canje sinzogiha uwundi, n’ishimwe ryanje sinzoriha ibigirwamana vy’ibibāzano." 
Isaiah42:9 Rāba ivya mbere birashitse, kandi ndabamenyesha n’ibisha; bitaraseruka ndabibabgira." 
Isaiah42:10 Ni muririmbire Uhoraho indirimbo nsha, n’ishimwe ryiwe uhereye ku mpera y’isi; muririmbe yemwe abagenda ku kiyaga, n’ibiri muri co vyose, namwe biyaya vyo kuri co, n’ababibamwo." 
Isaiah42:11 Ubugaragwa n’ibisagara vyabgo ni birangurure ijwi, n’imihana y’Abakedari; ababa i Sela baririmbe, basemerere bari ku mpinga z’imisozi." 
Isaiah42:12 Ivyo ni vyubahe Uhoraho, vyamamaze ishimwe ryiwe mu baba ku kiyaga." 
Isaiah42:13 Uhoraho azoja gutera nk’umuhizi, arwanane ishaka nk’intōre mu ntambara: azobīrahira, mber’ azobīvuga n’ijwi rirenga; abansi biwe azobagirira ibikomeye." 
Isaiah42:14 Eh’ aho nahoreye; naracereje, ndiyumanganya: noneho ndataka cane nk’umugore ari mu bise, nzohezagirika nsēmagiritse." 
Isaiah42:15 Nzotongora imisozi n’uturambi, numishe ivyatsi vyose vyaho; mu nzūzi nzohahindura i musozi, kandi nzokamya ibidengeri." 
Isaiah42:16 Nzozana impumyi mu nzira zitazi, ndazirōngōre mu ndari zitari zizi, nzohindura umwiza ube umuco imbere yazo, n’ahagoramye nzohagorora. Ivyo nzobishitsa, sinzobaheba." 
Isaiah42:17 Arikw abīshimira ibishushanyo vy’ibibāzano bazosubizwa inyuma, bazotētērwa cane, bo n’ababgira ibishushanyo vyāvugutiwe mu nkero, bati Mur’ imana zacu." 
Isaiah42:18 Mwa bipfamatwi ni mwumve; mwa mpumyi ni murābe kugira ngo mwitegereze. 
Isaiah42:19 Ni nde mpumyi atar’ umushumba wanje, canke gipfamatwi nk’intumwa yanje ntuma? Ni nde mpumyi nk’ umugendanyi wanje, kand’ ahumye nk’umushumba wanje, jewe Uhoraho?" 
Isaiah42:20 Abona vyinshi yamara ntiyitegereza; amatwi yiwe arazibūtse, yamara ntiyumva." 
Isaiah42:21 Vyahimbaye Uhoraho kudūza ivyagezwe no kuvyubahiriza, kubg’ ukugororoka kwiwe." 
Isaiah42:22 Aba bantu n’abantu bāsahuwe, bānyazwe inkōkōre; bose bāratezwe, bagwa mu vyobo, kandi babanyegeje mu mabohero; n’abo gucika inyagano, ata wo kubakiza; n’abo gucika inyagano, ata wo kuvuga ati Barekure." 
Isaiah42:23 Ni nde muri mwebge yotegera ugutwi ivyo, agaca uruma akumva ivy’ igihe kizoza?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ni nde yatanze aba Yakobo ngo banyagwe, kand’ Abisirayeli akabaha ababanyaga? Mbega s’Uhoraho, uwo twacumuyeko, kandi ntitwemeye kugendera mu nzira ziwe, ntitwumviye ivyagezwe vyiwe?" 
Isaiah42:25 Ni co catumye aturekurirak’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi n’intambara zikomeye; bikaduturira impande zose, kandi ntitwabimenya, vyaraduturiye yamara ntitwabishirak’ umutima." 
Isaiah43:1 Ariko none, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uwakuremye, yewe Yakobo, kand’ akakubumba, yewe Isirayeli, ati Ntutinye, kuko nagucunguye, naguhamagaye izina, ur’ uwanje." 
Isaiah43:2 Ni waca mu mazi nzoba ndi kumwe nawe, no mu nzūzi ntizizokurengera; ni waca mu muriro ntuzosha, kandi n’urubeya ntiruzokubabura." 
Isaiah43:3 Kuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, Uwera wa Isirayeli, Umukiza wawe. Nagutangiriye Egiputa kw incungu, Etiyopiya na Seba nahahevye kubgawe." 
Isaiah43:4 Kuko wabaye uw’ igiciro kinini mu nyonga zanje, n’umwubahwa, nanje nkagukunda, ni co gitumye nzoheba abantu kubgawe, n’amahanga kubg’ ubugingo bgawe." 
Isaiah43:5 Ntutinye, kuko ndi kumwe nawe; nzozana uruvyaro rwawe ndarukūye i burasirazuba, nzogukoraniriza hamwe ndagukūye i burengerazuba;" 
Isaiah43:6 nzobgira i burārūko, nti Barekure, n’i bumanuko, nti Ntubīmane; zana abahungu banje ubakūye kure, n’abakobga banje ubakūye ku mpera y’isi;" 
Isaiah43:7 n’umuntu wese yitirirwa izina ryanje, uwo naremeye icubahiro canje: naramubumvye, mbere naramuremye." 
Isaiah43:8 Sohora impumyi zifise amaso, n’ibipfamatwi bifise amatwi." 
Isaiah43:9 Amahanga yose n’akoranywe, amoko yose n’ahūrire hamwe: ni nde muri bo yoshobora kubimenyekanisha, akatwereka ivyabayeh’ ubga mbere? Ni bazane ivyabona vyabo batsindishirizwe; canke ni bumve bemere, bati N’ivy’ ukuri." 
Isaiah43:10 Ni mwebge vyabona vyanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize, n’abasavyi banje natoranije, kugira ngo mummenye kandi munyizere, kandi mutahure ko nd’ uwo ndi we: nta mana yigeze kubumbga hirya yanje, kandi nta yizonza mu nyuma." 
Isaiah43:11 Jewe, jewe nyene nd’ Uhoraho; kandi nta wundi Mukiza atari jewe." 
Isaiah43:12 Ni jewe nabitāngāje, ni jewe nakijije, ni jewe nabimenyekanishije, kandi nta yindi mana yariho muri mwebge: ni co gituma ari mwebge vyabona vyanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kandi ni jewe Mana." 
Isaiah43:13 Eka ndi yo, uhereye no ku musi w’itanguriro; kandi nta woshobora kugira ico arokora ngw agikūre mu kuboko kwanje. Jewe ico nkora, ni nde yokibuza?" 
Isaiah43:14 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Umucunguzi wanyu, Uwera w’ Abisirayeli, ati Natumye i Babuloni kubganyu, nzomanura abaho bose ar’ impunzi, ni bo Bakaludaya, mu māto bishimira." 
Isaiah43:15 Ni jewe Uhoraho, Uwera wanyu, Umuremyi wa Isirayeli, Umwami wanyu." 
Isaiah43:16 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we aca inzira mu kiyaga, n’indari mu mazi asuriranya," 
Isaiah43:17 agashikimura imikogote n’amafarasi, ingabo n’abahizi; birambaraye hamwe, ntibizovyuka ukundi; biradegeye, birazimye nk’ urutambi:" 
Isaiah43:18 ati Mwoye kwibuka ivya mbere, kandi ntimwiyumvire ku vya kera." 
Isaiah43:19 Ehe ngira nkore ikintu gisha: ko kigira giseruke ubu, mbega ntimuzokimenya? Nzoca inzira no mu bugaragwa, ntembeshe inzūzi ahagadutse." 
Isaiah43:20 Ibikōko vyo mw ishamba bizonyubaha, bo n’imbgebge n’ibisīga vyitwa imbuni, kuko ntanze amazi mu bugaragwa, ngatembesha inzūzi ahagadutse, kugira ngo nnyweshe abantu banje, bamwe natoranije," 
Isaiah43:21 abantu niremeye kugira ngo bamenyekanishe ishimwe ryanje. 
Isaiah43:22 Ariko rero, Yakobo we, ntiwanyambaje; Isirayeli we, waramparurutse." 
Isaiah43:23 Ntiwanzaniye imyagazi y’ibimazi vyawe vyo kwosa, kandi ntiwanyubahishije ibimazi vyawe. Sinakugoje kunshikanira amashikanwa, sinakuruhishije imibavu." 
Isaiah43:24 Nta vyitwa kanehe imota neza wanguriye amahera, kandi ntiwampāgije ibinure vy’ibimazi vyawe; ariko ni wewe wangoje ivyaha vyawe, mbere wanduhishije ibigabitanyo vyawe." 
Isaiah43:25 Jewe, ni jewe nyene nsibanganya ibicumuro vyawe kubganje nyene, kand’ ivyaha vyawe sinzovyibuka ukundi." 
Isaiah43:26 Nyibutsa, tubūrane; shinga urubanza rwawe, kugira ng’utsindishirizwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Sogokuruza wa mbere yakoze icaha, n’abashikirwa bawe bancumuyeko." 
Isaiah43:28 Ni co kizotuma ntētereza abakuru b’ahēra, kandi Yakobo nzomuhindura ikivume, na Isirayeli igitutsi." 
Isaiah44:1 Yamara noneh’ umve, yewe Yakobo musavyi wanje, yewe Isirayeli uwo natoranije:" 
Isaiah44:2 uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uwakuremye akakubumba uhereye ukiri mu nda, kand’ ari we azogutabara: ati Ntutinye, yewe Yakobo musavyi wanje, yewe Yeshuruni uwo natoranije." 
Isaiah44:3 Kuko nzosuka amazi ku gihugu gifise inyota, n’imigezi kw isi yumye; nzosuka Mpwemu wanje ku ruvyaro rwawe, n’umugisha wanje ku buzukuruza bawe:" 
Isaiah44:4 bazomera hagati mu vyatsi nk’ ibiti bimeze i ruhande y’inzūzi. 
Isaiah44:5 Umwe azovuga, ati Nd’ uw’ Uhoraho, uwundi azokwiyita izina rya Yakobo, uwundi azokwiyandikira n’ukuboko kwiwe kw ar’ uw’ Uhoraho, yiyita izina rya Isirayeli." 
Isaiah44:6 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Umwami wa Isirayeli, ari we Mucunguzi wiwe, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo: ati Nd’ uwa mbere kandi nd’ uw’ iherezo, kandi nta yindi Mana atari jewe." 
Isaiah44:7 Ni nde ahwanye nanje? N’abiserure, abitāngāze, abishire ngaho imbere yanje! Uhereye kera hose ni nde yamenyekanishije ibizoba? Ibigira bize n’ibizobaho ni babivuge!" 
Isaiah44:8 Mwoye gutinya canke guhagarika imitima: kera sinabibabariye nkabiserura? Namwe mur’ ivyabona vyo kunshingira intahe. Har’ iyindi Mana atari jewe? Mbere nta kindi gitandara kiriho: jewe nta co nzi. 
Isaiah44:9 Abaryohora ibishushanyo bibājwe bose n’ubusa; n’ ibintu vyabo vy’igikundiro nta co bizomara, n’ivyabona vyabo ubgavyo nta co bibona, nta co bimenya; kugira ngo bamāramāre." 
Isaiah44:10 Ni nde yaryohoye ikigirwamana, agacura igishushanyo kitagira ico kimaze?" 
Isaiah44:11 Ereg’ abo bafatanije bose bazomāramāra; kand’ abo bahinga n’abantu buntu: bose ni bakoranire hamwe, baze ahabona; bazogira ubgoba, bamāramārire hamwe." 
Isaiah44:12 Umucuzi acura incabiti, akayivugutira mu makara, akayikubitisha inyundo, akayicurisha ukuboko kwiwe kw’ inkomezi: yamara yasonza, agacika intege; atanyoye amazi, agaheza akagwa umwumwa." 
Isaiah44:13 Umubāji arāmvura umugozi ku giti akahacisha ikaramu, akakibāza n’imbāzo, akakigera n’icuma kigera, akakibāza mw ishusho y’umuntu, kikagira akaranga nk’ak’ umuntu, kugira ngo kibe mu nzu." 
Isaiah44:14 Yīcīra ibiti vy’amasederi, akābīra ivy’ imizo n’ivy’ imyeloni, akīhitiramw’ igiti kimwe mu vyo mu kibira. Atera igiti c’umworeni, imvura ikakimeza." 
Isaiah44:15 Hanyuma kikazobera umuntu inkwi zo gucana, azozābīra azōte, mber’ arazicana agacumba umutsima: kand’ akakibāzamw’ ikigirwamana akagisenga, akibāzamw’ igishushanyo akacikubita imbere." 
Isaiah44:16 Igihimba caco agicanisha umuriro, ikindi gihimba kimuhishiriza inyama akarya; agatara izishinze agahāga; mber’ akōta, akavuga, ati Ha ha! nshize imbeho, mbonye umuriro!" 
Isaiah44:17 Maz’ igisigaye akagihindura ikigirwamana, ar’ igishushanyo ciwe yabāje: akacikubita imbere akagisenga, akacambaza, ati Nkiza, kuk’ ur’ imana yanje." 
Isaiah44:18 Nta co bazi, kandi nta co biyumvira, kukw amaso yabo yahumye ngo ntibashobore kubona, n’imitima yabo ngo ntibashobore gutahura." 
Isaiah44:19 Erega nta wibuka, nta wumenya ngw atahure, ngw avuge at’ Igihimba caco nagicanishije umuriro, nacumvye umutsima ku makara yaco, ntarakw inyama ndazirya; mbeg’ igisigaye nogikorakw ikintu nk’ico c’ubuyobe? Mbega nokwikubita imbere y’ingiga y’igiti?" 
Isaiah44:20 Ūshima umunyota gusa, umutima wibesha uba wamujimije, bituma adashobora gukiza ubugingo bgiwe, ngw aruhe yibaza, ati Mbeg’ ico mfise mu kuryo kwanje s’ikinyoma?" 
Isaiah44:21 Wibuke ivyo, yewe Yakobo, yewe Isirayeli, kuk’ ur’ umusavyi wanje. Ni jewe nakubumvye, ur’ umusavyi wanje: yewe Isirayeli sinzokwibagira." 
Isaiah44:22 Neyuye ibicumuro vyawe nk’igicu gitwaye intunda, n’ivyaha vyawe nk’igicu: garuka kuri jewe, kuko nagucunguye." 
Isaiah44:23 Muririmbe, mwa majuru, kuk’ Uhoraho abikoze; wa bgina bg’isi usemerere; ni muturike muririmbe, mwa misozi mwe, nawe kibira, n’igiti cose kirimwo: kuk’ Uhoraho yacunguye Yakobo, kand’ azokwihesha icubahiro muri Isirayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Umucunguzi wawe, uwakubumvye uhereye ukiri mu nda, ati Ni jewe Uhoraho ndema vyose, nāguye ijuru nd’umwe, ngaranzura isi: har’ uwo twari kumwe?" 
Isaiah44:25 Indagu z’abanyabinyoma ndazihindura ubusa, abapfumu nkabatēza ibisazi, nsubiza inyuma abanyabgenge, ubgenge bgabo nkabuhindura ubupfu." 
Isaiah44:26 Nkomeza ijambo ry’umusavyi wanje, ngashitsa inama z’intumwa zanje, mvuga ivya Yerusalemu, nti Hazokwongera gutūrika; n’ivy’ ibisagara vy’i Buyuda, nti Bizokwubakwa, kandi nzovyutsa ahāsenyutse haho." 
Isaiah44:27 Mbarira idamba, nti Kama, kandi nzokamya inzūzi zikujamwo;" 
Isaiah44:28 mvuga ivya Kuro, nti N’umwungere wanje, azoshitsa ivyo ngomba vyose; nkavuga ivya Yerusalemu, nti Hazokwubakwa; nkabarira urusengero, nt’ Itanguriro ryawe rizoshirwaho." 
Isaiah45:1 Ibi ni vyo jewe Uhoraho mbgira uwo narobanuje amavuta, ni we Kuro, uwo mfashe ukuboko kw’i buryo, kugira ngo nsiribange amahanga imbere yiwe, kandi nzokenyurura inkindi z’abami, kugira ngo ndamwugururire inzugi imbere yiwe, kand’ amarembo ntazokwugarirwa:" 
Isaiah45:2 nti Nzoja imbere yawe, kand’ ahar’ uduhogoro nzohasena; nzomenagura inzugi z’imiringa, nzovunagura ibihindizo vy’ivyuma:" 
Isaiah45:3 kandi nzoguha itunga rihishijwe mu mwiza, n’ubutunzi bunyegejwe mu mpisho, kugira ng’ umenye kw ari jewe Uhoraho nguhamagaye mw izina, jewe nyene Imana y’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah45:4 Kubga Yakobo umusavyi wanje, Isirayeli uwo natoranije, nguhamagaye mw izina, nakwise iry’ icubahiro, nah’ utaribgammenye." 
Isaiah45:5 Ni jewe Uhoraho, nta wundi; atari jewe nta yindi Mana iriho. Nzogukenyeza nah’ utigeze kummenya," 
Isaiah45:6 kugira ngo bamenye uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba yukw ata yindi atari jewe: ni jewe Uhoraho, kandi nta wundi." 
Isaiah45:7 Ni jewe nkomoko y’umuco, nd’ umuremyi w’umwiza; nd’ isōko y’impore, nd’umuremyi w’ivyago: ni jewe Uhoraho nkora ivyo vyose." 
Isaiah45:8 Mwa majuru, murekure ukugororoka kuve mw ijuru, n’ikirēre kigucuncubure: isi yasame, itengengerekw agakiza, ikamezanye n’ukugororoka: ni jewe Uhoraho nabiremye." 
Isaiah45:9 Azobona ibara, ūhāririza uwamuremye, kand’ ar’ akajo mu tujo two kw isi! Mbeg’ ibumba ryobaza ūrikw araribumba, riti Har’ ico wobumba? Cank’ igikorwa ukora covuga kw ata maboko ufise?" 
Isaiah45:10 Azobona ibara, ūbaza se, at’ Ubgo wotera inda? akabaza nyina, at’ Ubgo wotwara inda?" 
Isaiah45:11 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Uwera wa Isirayeli, Umuremyi wiwe, ati Mbega murambaza ibizoza? Murangaba ku vy’abahungu banje n’ igikorwa c’amaboko yanje?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ni jewe naremye isi, kandi ndayiremerakw abantu; ni jewe nibambiye amajuru n’amaboko yanje, kand’ ingabo z’inyenyeri zose zo kuri yo ndazigaba." 
Isaiah45:13 Ni jewe mpagurukije Kuro mu bugororotsi, kandi nzororanya inzira ziwe zose; ni we azokwubaka umurwa wanje, kandi ni we azorekura abantu banje bānyazwe, adahongewe cank’ adahērewe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Isaiah45:14 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abakozi ba Egiputa n’abadandaza ba Etiyopiya n’abagabo barebare b’i Sabe bazoza bagukomere amashi, bazoba abawe, bagukurikire, bazoza bari mu minyororo, bakwikubite imbere, bagutakambire, bati N’ukuri Imana iri muri wewe, kandi nta yindi iriho, nta yindi Mana." 
Isaiah45:15 N’ukuri ur’ Imana yihishije, wewe Mana y’ Abisirayeli, Umukiza." 
Isaiah45:16 Bazotētērwa, bamāramāre bose, bazomāramārira hamwe, abakora ibishushanyo vy’ibigirwamana." 
Isaiah45:17 Arikw Abisirayeli bazokizwa n’Uhoraho, abakirishe agakiza kadashira: ntimuzotētērwa, canke ngo mumāramāre, no gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Isaiah45:18 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uwaremye amajuru, ni we Mana; uwabumvye isi akayirema; yarayikomeje, ntiyayiremye ngw ibek’ ubusa gusa, ariko yayibumvye kugira ngw ibekw abantu: ati Ni jewe Uhoraho, kandi nta wundi." 
Isaiah45:19 Sinavugiye mu mpisho, ahantu ho mu gihugu c’umwiza; nta ho nabariye uruvyaro rwa Yakobo, nti Ni mundonderere ubusa. Jewe Uhoraho mvuga ibiroranye, nsigura ivy’ ukuri." 
Isaiah45:20 Ni mukorane, ni muze, mwīgirire hafi hamwe, mwebge abarokotse bo mu mahanga: abīkorera igiti c’ikigirwamana cabo c’ikibāzano, bagasenga imana idashobora gukiza, nta bgenge bagira." 
Isaiah45:21 Ni mubivuge, ni mubizane, mbere ni baje inama hamwe: ni nde yerekanye ivyo uhereye mu bihe vya kera? Ni nde yabimenyekanishije uhereye kera? Si jewe, Uhoraho? Kandi nta yindi Mana atari jewe, Imana igororotse kand’ Umukiza; nta yindi atari jewe." 
Isaiah45:22 Ni muntumbere mukizwe, mwa mpera zose z’isi: kukw ari jewe Mana, ata yindi." 
Isaiah45:23 Ndirahiye, ijambo ry’ukuri rivuye mu kanwa kanje ritazokwirahuruzwa, yukw amavi yose azompfukamira, n’indimi zose zizondahira." 
Isaiah45:24 Uhoraho, muri we honyene ni ho har’ ukugororoka n’inkomezi, ni ko bazomvuga; kuri we ni ho abantu bazoza; kand’ abamurakiye bose bazotētērwa." 
Isaiah45:25 Uhoraho, muri we ni ho uruvyaro rwose rwa Isirayeli ruzotsindanishiririzwa, rukamwirata." 
Isaiah46:1 Beli irarundutse, Nebo irubamye; ibishushanyo vyazo biremētswe ingamiya n’inka; bimwe mwarerura mushogamanga bicitse umutwaro ugenda uravuna inka." 
Isaiah46:2 Izo mana zirubamye zirundukiye hamwe; ntizashoboye kurokora uwo mutwaro, ariko na zo ubgazo zagiye ar’ inyagano." 
Isaiah46:3 Ni munyumve, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Yakobo, mwa masigarira yo mu nzu ya Isirayeli mwese, abo nateruye uhereye mukivuka, nkabaheka mukiva mu nda;" 
Isaiah46:4 nzobageza no mu zabukuru ndi We, muzorinda musēsa imvi nkibaheka: ni jewe naremye, ni jewe nzoheka; mbere nzobaterura, mbarokore." 
Isaiah46:5 None rero mwongereranya na nde twongana? Kandi mwonshushanya na nde twosa? 
Isaiah46:6 Basukanura izahabu mu mupfuko, bagera ifeza ku munzane, bagaha umucuzi w’izahabu ingero, akabicuramw’ imana; bakayīkubita imbere bakayisenga." 
Isaiah46:7 Maze bakayishira ku bitugu bakayirerura, bakayishinga mu kibanza cayo, igahagararaho ntisegenye; mbere nah’ umuntu yoyitakambira, ntiyoshobora kumwishura, canke ngw imukize amagorwa yiwe." 
Isaiah46:8 Ni mwibuke ivyo, muvyiyumvire: mwongere muvyibuke, mwa bagarariji." 
Isaiah46:9 Mwibuke ivyabanje kubaho kera; kukw ari jewe Mana, ata yindi; ni jewe Mana, nta yindi duhwanye." 
Isaiah46:10 Mpēra kw itanguriro nkavuga ivy’ iherezo, ngahēra no mu bihe vya kera nkavuga ibitaraba; nkavuga nt’ Imigabo yanje izohama, kand’ ivyo nzogomba vyose nzobishitsa." 
Isaiah46:11 Nzohamagara igisīga caromoye kive i burasirazuba, ni co muntu afise imigabo yanje, ava mu gihugu ca kure. Narabivuze; no kubishitsa nzobishitsa; narabigabiye, no kubikora nzobikora." 
Isaiah46:12 Ni munyumve, yemwe ab’ imitima ikomantaye, abari kure y’ukugororoka:" 
Isaiah46:13 nīgije hafi ukugororoka kwanje, ntikuzoba kure; n’agakiza kanje ntikazotebagana; kandi nzoshira ako gakiza i Siyoni kubga Isirayeli, ni we cubahiro canje." 
Isaiah47:1 Manuka wicare mu mukungugu, wa nkumi y’i Babuloni; wa mukobga w’Abakaludaya, icara hasi hatari ku ntebe y’ubgami, kuk’ utazokwongera kuvugwa k’udibamye canke ko wāmikaye." 
Isaiah47:2 Fata urusyo usye, utwikurure mu maso hawe; kūra imvune zawe, ukūre impuzu ushitse mu bibero, ujabuke inzūzi." 
Isaiah47:3 Ubgambure bgawe buzotwikururwa, mber’ ibiteye isoni vyawe bizoboneka; nzokwīhōra, kandi sinzogira akagongwe," 
Isaiah47:4 ni k’Umucunguzi wacu agize, izina ryiwe n’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Uwera w’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Icara wumaniwe, wibembeteranye mu mwiza, wa mukobga w’ Abakaludaya we, kuk’ utazokwongera kwitwa Umugabekazi w’ibihugu." 
Isaiah47:6 Nari narakiye abantu banje, mpindura igihumane ishamvu yanje, ndabakugomorera; nawe nta kagongwe wabagiriye, abatāma wabatwaje amanyama birengeje." 
Isaiah47:7 Urīyāga, uti Nzoba umugabekazi ibihe bidashira. Ivyo ntiwarushe ubishirak’ umutima, canke ngo wibuke iherezo ryavyo." 
Isaiah47:8 Nuko rero ni wumve ibi, wewe wihaye ibihimbaro, ukicara ata co winona, ukīyāga mu mutima, uti Ni jewe ndiho, nta wundi atari jewe; sinzosigara nd’ umupfakazi, kandi sinzomenya kubura abana ic’ ari co." 
Isaiah47:9 Arikw ivyo vyompi bizokugwako umusi umwe, kubura abana no gupfakara: bizogushikako uko vyakabaye, nah’ ubupfumu bgawe bgoba bginshi bute, n’ amahezayo yawe akaba isinzi." 
Isaiah47:10 Kuko widibamiye mu bubi bgawe ata co wicura, ukavuga, uti Nta wumbona; ubgenge bgawe n’ukumenya kwawe ni vyo bikujimije; wīyāga mu mutima, uti Ni jewe ndiho, nta wundi atari jewe." 
Isaiah47:11 Ni co kizotuma ivyago bigushikako, ntumenye amahezayo yavyo; ibara rikugweko, ntushobore kuryīkūrako, kand’ ubugesera utazi buzokuzako giturumbuka." 
Isaiah47:12 Nuko hagararana amahezayo yawe, n’ivy’ ubupfumu bgawe uko bingana, ivyo wakobereje uhereye mu buto bgawe: namba kumbure vyogira ico bikumarira, namba kumbure vyogushoboza." 
Isaiah47:13 Wacumukujwe n’abakugīra inama benshi; abaragurisha ijuru, n’abaragurisha inyenyeri, na bamwe bahora bakumenyesha ibigira bikubeko, uk’ ukwezi kubonetse, ni baze bagukize." 
Isaiah47:14 Rāba bazoba nk’ibishingwe, umuriro uzobaturira; ntibazokwikiza inkomezi z’ imbeya zawo; ntuzoba amakara yo kwota, cank’ umuriro wo kwicarako." 
Isaiah47:15 Uko ni ko bizokubera, ivyo wakobereje; abādandaza nawe uhereye mu buto bgawe bazokwīgīra, umuntu wese yīgīre ahiwe; ntihazogira ūgukiza." 
Isaiah48:1 Ni mwumve ibi, yemwe nzu ya Yakobo, abitwa izina rya Isirayeli, bakanduruka mu rura rwa Yuda; abarahira izina ryanje Uhoraho, bakavuga Imana ya Isirayeli, ariko mu bitar’ ivy’ ukuri canke mu vy’ukugororoka." 
Isaiah48:2 Kuko biyita abo ku murwa wera, bakishingikiriza ku Mana ya Isirayeli; Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryanje." 
Isaiah48:3 Kera navuze ibizoba bitaraza; ni koko vyavuye mu kanwa kanje, ndavyerekana: kandi nabikoze giturumbuka, birashika." 
Isaiah48:4 Nari nzi k’udakūrwa kw ijambo, kandi kw izosi ryawe ari nk’umutsi umeze nk’icuma, n’uruhanga rwawe ari nk’umuringa:" 
Isaiah48:5 ni co catumye mbikubarira uhereye kera, bitaraba nkabikwereka; kugira ngo woye kuvuga, uti Ya mana yanje ni yo ibikoze, ni ca gishushanyo canje c’ikibāzano, ni ca gishushanyo canje cavugutiwe mu nkero, ni co cabigeze." 
Isaiah48:6 Waravyumvise, non’ ehe vyitegereze vyose: mbega ntuvyemera? Guhēra ubu ngira mbereke ibisha, vyari bihishijwe, utigeze kumenya." 
Isaiah48:7 Bigizwe ubu nyene, s’ivya kera: kugeza uyu musi ntiwigeze kuvyumva; kugira ngo woye kuvuga, ut’ Erega nari nsanzwe ndabizi." 
Isaiah48:8 N’ukuri koko ntiwaribgavyumve, ntiwaribgabimenye, mber’ uhereye kera ntivyaribgashike mu matwi yawe: kuko nari nzi k’ur’ umuryarukanyi w’agahebuza, kandi wiswe ikigāba uhereye ukiva mu nda." 
Isaiah48:9 Kubg’ izina ryanje reka ntenyenye kukurakira; kubg’ ishimwe ryanje reka nkwihanganire, noye kukurandura." 
Isaiah48:10 Ehe ndakuvugutiye, ariko si nk’ifeza; nkugeragereje mu ruganda rwo kubabazwa." 
Isaiah48:11 Kubganje, mbere kubganje nyene nzobikora; n’iki cotuma izina ryanje rikēngērwa? Kand’ icubahiro canje sinzogiha uwundi." 
Isaiah48:12 N’unyumve, yewe Yakobo, yewe Isirayeli nahamagaye; ndi We. Nd’ uwa mbere kandi nd’ uw’ iherezo." 
Isaiah48:13 Mber’ ukuboko kwanje ni kwo kwashizeh’ itanguriro ry’isi, n’ukuboko kwanje kw’i buryo ni kwo kwabamvye ijuru: iyo mbihamagaye bivira hasi rimwe." 
Isaiah48:14 Mwese ni mukorane mwumve. Ni nde wo muri bo yigeze kuvuga ivyo? Uwo jewe Uhoraho nkunda azogirira Babuloni uko ngomba, kand’ ukuboko kwiwe kuzotera Abakaludaya." 
Isaiah48:15 Ni jewe, jewe nyene nabivuze; mbere naramuhamagaye, ndamuzanye, kand’ urugendo rwiwe ruzogira amahirwe." 
Isaiah48:16 Ni mwīgire hafi mwumve ibi: uhereye mw itanguriro nta ho navugiye mu mpisho; uhereye aho vyabereyeho, nariho: kandi non’ Uhoraho Imana antumanye na Mpwemu wiwe." 
Isaiah48:17 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Umucunguzi wawe, Uwera w’ Abisirayeli agize, ati Ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, nkwigisha ibikugirira ikimazi, nkakurōngōra mu nzira ukwiye gucamwo." 
Isaiah48:18 Iy’ uba warumviye ivyagezwe vyanje, uba waragize amahoro ameze nk’ uruzi, kand’ ukugororoka kwawe kuba kwarabaye nk’imipfunda y’ ikiyaga;" 
Isaiah48:19 kand’ uruvyaro rwawe rwobaye nk’umusenyi, n’abava mu nda yawe bobaye nk’umuhekeheke wawo; izina ryawe ntiryorandutse canke ngo rizimangane imbere yanje." 
Isaiah48:20 Ni muve i Babuloni, muhunge muve mu Bakaludaya, muvuge ibi, mubikwize, muvyamamaze gushitsa ku mpera y’isi, mubivugishe ijwi ry’indirimbo, mut’ Uhoraho acunguye umusavyi wiwe Yakobo." 
Isaiah48:21 Kand’ aho yabarōngōra mu bugaragwa nta ho bishwe n’inyota; yabatembeshereje amazi ava mu gitandara; yasatuye igitandara, amazi arasendanisha." 
Isaiah48:22 Nta mahoro y’abanyavyaha, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah49:1 Ni munyumve, yemwe ababa ku kiyaga; namwe mahanga ya kure, tega amatwi. Uhoraho yampamagaye ntaravuka; nkiri mu nda ya mama yamvuze izina:" 
Isaiah49:2 akanwa kanje yakagize nk’inkota ikarishe, ampisha mu gitūtu c’ukuboko kwiwe; kandi yampinduye umwampi usennye, mu mutana wiwe ni ho anzigamira rwose." 
Isaiah49:3 Kandi yarambariye, ati Ni wewe musavyi wanje, Isirayeli, uwo nzoherwamw’ icubahiro." 
Isaiah49:4 Ariko ndavuga, nti Naruhijwe n’ubusa, inkomezi zanje zapfuye ubusa, nazikoresheje ibitagira ikimazi: yamara rer’ urubanza rwanje ruseguwe n’Uhoraho, kand’ Imana yanje ni yo izompēra." 
Isaiah49:5 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we yambumvye nkiri mu nda ngo mbe umusavyi wiwe, ngo ndamugarukanire Yakobo, Abisirayeli bakoranirizwe kuri we; kuko nd’ umwubahwa mu nyonga z’Uhoraho, kand’ Imana yanje yambereye inkomezi;" 
Isaiah49:6 aravuga, ati Kuba umushumba wanje, ugashira hejuru imiryango ya Yakobo, ukagarukana abarokotse b’Abisirayeli, ivyo ntibihāgije: ariko kandi ndagushizeho ng’ ube umuco wākira amahanga, kugira ngo n’ abo ku mpera y’isi ubashikirize agakiza kanje." 
Isaiah49:7 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, Umucunguzi wa Isirayeli, Uwera wiwe, abgira umwe abantu bakēngēra, uwo ihanga ryanka urunuka, umushumba w’ abaganza, at’ Abami bazobirāba bahaguruke; bo n’abaganwa, bakome amashi; kubg’ Uhoraho umwizigirwa, ni we Wera wa Isirayeli yagutoranije." 
Isaiah49:8 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Mu gihe co kwemererwamwo ndakwishuye, no ku musi wo gukirizwako ndagutabaye; kandi nzogukiza, ngushireho ube isezerano ry’abantu, kugira ng’ usibure igihugu, utume basubizwa mw ishamvu yabo yabaye imisaka." 
Isaiah49:9 Kand’ ubgire imbohe, uti Ni musohoke; n’ abari mu mwiza, uti Ni museruke ahabona. Bazogenda barisha umwagambo ku mayira, kand’ ahār’ uruharabuga hejuru ku misozi hazobabera ivyanya." 
Isaiah49:10 Ntibazokwicwa n’inzara canke n’inyota, kand’ indugumba ntizobahundagaza cank’ izuba: kuk’ uwabagiriye ikigongwe azobaja imbere, akabashikana no ku masōko y’amazi." 
Isaiah49:11 Imisozi yanje yose nzoyihindura inzira, n’amarango yanje nzoyashira hejuru." 
Isaiah49:12 Ehe bamwe bazova kure: eh’ abandi bazova i burārūko n’i burengerazuba, kand’ abandi bazova mu gihugu c’i Sinimu." 
Isaiah49:13 Ririmba, mwa majuru; nezerwa wa si we; turika muririmbe, mwa misozi miremire, kuk’ Uhoraho amaze umubabaro abantu biwe, kand’ atewe akagongwe n’abāhahajwe biwe." 
Isaiah49:14 Ariko Siyoni ho haravuga, hat’ Uhoraho yarampevye, Umwami Imana yaranyibagiye." 
Isaiah49:15 Mbeg’ umugore yokwibagira umwana akiri kw ibere, ngo yoye kugirira akagongwe ubura bgiwe? Ni koko, abo boshobora kwibagira, ariko jeho sinoshobora kukwibagira." 
Isaiah49:16 Ehe ngushushanije mu biganza vyanje; inzitiro zawe ndazihozakw amaso. 
Isaiah49:17 Abana bawe baza bihuta; abāguhoneje n’abāguhinduye amatongo bazokuvamwo bagende. 
Isaiah49:18 Unamura amaso urābe impande zose: ba bandi bose barakoranye, bariko baraza kuri wewe. Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize, uzobīsakara nk’uwambaye utugenegene, uzobakenyera use n’umugeni." 
Isaiah49:19 Kukw amatongo yawe n’ imisaka yawe n’igihugu cawe cāgeshejwe, n’ukuri noneho hazokwagira abazohaba, kand’ abāri baragutsontsomeye bazoba kure." 
Isaiah49:20 Abana wari wānyazwe bazovugira mu matwi yawe, bat’ Aha hantu haratwagiye: segenya turonke aho tuba." 
Isaiah49:21 Maz’ uzokwibaza mu mutima, uti Mbeg’ aba nabavyariwe na nde? Ko nari naranyazwe abana banje, nkaba nd’ imbura n’igicibga n’inyererezi! Ko nari nsigaye nd’ inyakamwe, aba bo bamye hehe?" 
Isaiah49:22 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzorāmvurira amahanga ukuboko kwanje, nshingire amoko ibendera yanje; nuko bazozana abahungu bawe babakikiye mu gikiriza, n’abakobga bawe babateruye ku bitugu." 
Isaiah49:23 Kand’ abami bazokubera ba se babakurerera, n’abamikazi babo bazokubera ba nyina babakwonkereza; bazokwikubita imbere bubamye hasi, barigate umukungugu wo ku birenge vyawe; nawe uzomenya ko nd’ Uhoraho, kand’ abanyiteze ntibazomāramāra." 
Isaiah49:24 Mbeg’ abahizi bonyagwa iminyago, cank’ abagororotsi bajanywekw inyagano borokorwa?" 
Isaiah49:25 Arik’ uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abāfashwe mpiri n’abahizi, na bo bazobanyagwa, kand’ iminyago y’abantu b’agaterabgoba izorokorwa: kukw ari jewe nzokurwanira, nkarwanya ūkurwanya, kandi nzokiza abana bawe." 
Isaiah49:26 Kand’ abaguhahaza nzobagaburira inyama zabo ubgabo, bazoborerwa ayabo maraso nk’ūborewe vino novu; kand’ abantu bose bazomenya ko jewe Uhoraho nd’ Umukiza wawe, n’Umucunguzi wawe, Inyenkomezi ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho abaza, at’ Icete c’uko tuvavanuye na nyoko, ico namwirukanishije, kiri hehe? Cank’ uwo narīriye umwenda ngatanga mwebge ngo mube inyishu, ari hehe? Ereg’ ukugabitanya kwanyu ni kwo kwatumye mutangwa, kand’ ibicumuro vyanyu ni vyo vyirukanishije nyoko." 
Isaiah50:2 Mbeg’ aho naza, n’iki catumye ntagira uwo ndahasanga, ngahamagara, ntihagire uwitaba? Mbeg’ ukuboko kwanje kwabaye kugufi ngo kunanirwe gucungura? Canke se nta bubasha mfise bgo kurokora? Ereg’ iyo nkankamiye ikiyaga ndagikamya, inzūzi ndazihindura ubugaragwa; amafi yari muri zo aranuka, kukw ata mazi ariho, yatikijwe n’inyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Nambika ijuru ukwirabura, ndaryorosa amagunira." 
Isaiah50:4 Umwami Uhoraho ampaye ururimi rw’abigishwa, kugira ngo mmenye uko nosindagirisha ūrushe amajambo; ankangura uko bukeye, akangurira ugutwi kwanje kwumva, nk’ukw abigishwa bumviriza." 
Isaiah50:5 Umwami Uhoraho anziburuye ugutwi, nanje sinabaye ikigāba, canke ngo mpindukire nsubire inyuma." 
Isaiah50:6 Abankubita nabategeye ibitugu, n’imisaya ndayitegera abammomora ubganwa; kandi mu maso hanje sinahakinjishije gutēterezwa no gucirwakw amate." 
Isaiah50:7 Arik’ Umwami Uhoraho arantabara, ni co gituma ntatētērwa: ni co gituma ndinduka, mu maso hanje hakamera nk’ibuye, kandi nzi yuko ntazomāramāra." 
Isaiah50:8 Ūntsindishiriza ari hafi; non’ uwombūranya ni nde? Ngo tuve hasi duhagararane: umubūranyi wanje ni nde? N’aze tubangikane. 
Isaiah50:9 Rāba Umwami Uhoraho ni we azompagarikira; non’ uwontsindisha ni nde? Ereg’ abo bose bazosāza nk’impuzu; inyenzi zizobarya zibamare. 
Isaiah50:10 Ni nde muri mwebge yubaha Uhoraho, akumvira ijwi ry’umushumba wiwe? Ūgendera mu mwiza, adafise umuco, ni yizigire izina ry’Uhoraho, kandi yisunge Imana yiwe." 
Isaiah50:11 Umve mwese abacana umuriro, bakīshira imuri impande zose: ni mugende mumurikiwe n’umuriro wanyu, bo n’imuri mwidomekeye. Ivyo muzoronka mu kuboko kwanje n’ibi: muzoryamana umubabaro." 
Isaiah51:1 Ni munyumve, yemwe abakurikirana ukugororoka, yemwe abarondera Uhoraho: mwitegereze igitandara mwasatuweko, n’inganzo mwimbgemwo." 
Isaiah51:2 Mwitegereze Aburahamu sogokuruza, na Sara yabavyaye; kuko hamwe Aburahamu yar’ akir’ umwe rudende namuhamagaye, nkamuha umugisha, nkamugwiza." 
Isaiah51:3 Kuko jewe Uhoraho namaze Siyoni umubabaro; namaze umubabaro imisaka yaho yose, kand’ ubugaragwa bgaho nabugize nka Edeni, n’ubgeranyange bgaho nabugize nk’itongo ryanje, jewe Uhoraho; hazobonekamw’ umunezero n’uguhimbarwa, bo n’ishimwe n’ijwi ry’inanga." 
Isaiah51:4 Bantu banje, ni munyumvirize; hanga ryanje, muntege ugutwi; kukw icagezwe kizova kuri jewe, kandi nzoshinga amateka yanje ngw abe umuco w’amahanga." 
Isaiah51:5 Ubugororotsi bganje buri hafi, agakiza kanje karaserutse, amaboko yanje azocira amahanga amateka; ababa ku kiyaga bazonyitega, kand’ ukuboko kwanje ni kwo bazokwizigira." 
Isaiah51:6 Ni mwunamurire amaso yanyu mw ijuru, mwitegereze no kw isi hasi: kukw ijuru rizokamangana nk’umwotsi, n’isi izosāza nk’umwambaro, n’abayibako bazopfa nk’isazi: arikw agakiza kanje kazokwamah’ ibihe bidashira, kand’ ukugororoka kwanje ntikuzogira iherezo." 
Isaiah51:7 Yemwe abazi ivy’ ukugororoka, ihanga rifise ivyagezwe vyanje mu mitima yanyu, ni munyumve: ntimugatinye ibitutsi vy’abantu, canke ngo murandurwe imitima n’ ugucokora kwabo." 
Isaiah51:8 Kukw inyenzi zizobarya nk’umwambaro, n’ ifukunyi izobarya nk’ubgoya bg’ intama: arik’ ukugororoka kwanje kuzokwamah’ ibihe bidashira, n’ agakiza kanje uk’ urunganwe ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Isaiah51:9 Ikangure, ikangure, wambare inkomezi, ewe wa kuboko kw’ Uhoraho; ikangure nko mu misi ya kera, nko ku runganwe rw’ibihe vyashize, uko rwagenda rukurikirana. Mbega si wewe wahimbaguye Rahabu, ugasogota ca gisato c’amahēro?" 
Isaiah51:10 Si wewe wakamije ikiyaga, amazi maremare yo mw idamba; ugahindura i bgina bgo mu kiyaga kuba inzira ngw abācunguwe bayicemwo?" 
Isaiah51:11 Nukw abācunguwe n’Uhoraho bazogaruka, bashike i Siyoni baririmba; umunezero utazoshira uzohora ku mitwe yabo; bazoronka umunezero n’uguhimbarwa, kand’ umubabaro no gusuhuza umutima bizohunga vyambuke." 
Isaiah51:12 Ni jewe, ni jewe nyene mbahūmuriza; uri nde utinya umuntu, kand’ azopfa; n’umwana w’ umuntu, kand’ azohinduka nk’ivyatsi?" 
Isaiah51:13 ukibagira Uhoraho Umuremyi wawe, ari we yagaranzuye amajuru, agashirah’ amatanguriro y’isi; maz’ ukīriza umusi utinya uburake bg’ūhahaza, iyo yiteguye guhonnya: non’ uburake bg’ūhahaza buri hehe?" 
Isaiah51:14 Abāfashwe mpiri bakambukanwa bazorekurwa vuba; ntibazopfa ngo baje muri rwa rwobo, kand’ ivyo kurya vyabo ntibizobura." 
Isaiah51:15 Kuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, ntera ikiyaga gusuriranya, imipfunda yaco ikabomborana: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryanje." 
Isaiah51:16 Kandi nshize amajambo yanje mu kanwa kawe, ngutwikirije igitūtu c’ukuboko kwanje, kugira ngo ngaranzure ijuru risha, nshireh’ amatanguriro y’isi nsha, mbarire ab’i Siyoni, nti Mur’ abantu banje." 
Isaiah51:17 Ikangure, ikangure, vyuka uve hasi, ewe Yerusalemu, uwo Uhoraho yasomesheje ku gikombe c’uburake bgiwe; wanyoye ku gakarabo ari ko gikombe c’ukudandabagiranya, uracīrāngūza." 
Isaiah51:18 Mu bana wavyaye bose ntiharih’ uwo kukurōngōra; kandi mu bo wareze bose nta wo kugufata ukuboko. 
Isaiah51:19 Ibi vyompi ko bigushitseko, ni nde azokuririra? Ko haje ibitongozi n’ugusangangurwa, bo n’inzara n’inkota, nokuremesha nte?" 
Isaiah51:20 Abana bawe bararavye, bahindikiranye ku mayirabiri hose, nk’impongo iguye mu mutego; bamazwe n’uburake bg’Uhoraho, ni kwo guhana kw’ Imana yawe." 
Isaiah51:21 None rero ni wumve ibi, wa mpahazwa we, uborewe utanyoye vino:" 
Isaiah51:22 uku ni k’Umwami wawe Uhoraho agize, ari we Mana yawe ibūranira abantu bayo, at’ Ehe nkūye ca gikombe c’ukudandabagiranya mu kuboko kwawe, ni ko ka gakarabo, ari ko gikombe c’uburake bganje; ntuzosubira kukinywak’ ukundi:" 
Isaiah51:23 ngiteretse mu kiganza c’abaguhahaza, c’abākubarira, bat’ Ubika inda, tuguceko; nawe ugatega mu mugongo hawe nko hasi, canke nk’inzira, ngo bahahite." 
Isaiah52:1 Ikangure, ikangure, wambare inkomezi zawe, ewe Siyoni; ambara imyambaro yawe ishajije, ewe Yerusalemu wa murwa wera; kuk’ uhereye none muri wewe hatazoshika ūtākebge cank’ igihumane." 
Isaiah52:2 Haguruka wikunkumure umukungugu, uheze uze wicare ewe Yerusalemu: wibohore imvuto zo mw izosi ryawe, ewe mukobga w’i Siyoni wajanywekw inyagano." 
Isaiah52:3 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, ati Mwaguzwe ubusa: na none muzocungurwa ata mahera." 
Isaiah52:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ubga mbere abantu banje bāramanutse baja muri Egiputa gusuhukirayo: Abashuri babahahaza ata nyanduruko." 
Isaiah52:5 None rero nkora iki hano? ni k’ Uhoraho agize; kw abantu banje bānyazwe ku busa! Ababaganza barayogora, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kandi bīriza umusi batuka izina ryanje." 
Isaiah52:6 Nuko rer’ abantu banje bazomenya izina ryanje; kur’ uwo musi bazomenya kw ari jewe mvuga: mbere ni jewe nyene. 
Isaiah52:7 Ereg’ ibirenge vy’ūzanye inkuru nziza ni vyiza ku misozi, akamamaza ivy’ amahoro, akazana inkuru nziza z’ivyiza, akamamaza ivy’ agakiza, akabarira Siyoni, at’ Imana yawe iri ku ngoma!" 
Isaiah52:8 Ijwi ry’abashibamyi bawe! Bashize hejuru bavugiriza impundu hamwe; bazovyibonera imbonankubone aho Uhoraho azogaruka i Siyoni. 
Isaiah52:9 Ni muturike munezerwe, muririmbire hamwe, yemwe misaka y’i Yerusalemu: kuk’ Uhoraho aremesheje abantu biwe, acunguye Yerusalemu." 
Isaiah52:10 Uhoraho akumye impuzu ku kuboko kwiwe kwera mu maso y’amahanga yose, kand’ impera z’isi zose zizobona agakiza k’Imana yacu." 
Isaiah52:11 Ni mugende, ni mugende, muveyo; ntimugakore ku kintu gihumanya na kimwe; muve hagati yaho; mwitunganye, yemwe abashorezi b’imbombovu z’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah52:12 Kuko mutazovayo mwihuta, canke ngo mugende nk’abahunga: kuk’ Uhoraho azobaja imbere; Imana y’Abisirayeli izobīmiriza." 
Isaiah52:13 Rāba, umushumba wanje azoja imbere, azokuzwa ashirwe hejuru, asumbe abandi." 
Isaiah52:14 Nk’uko benshi yababereye akumiza — kuko mu maso hiwe hononekaye ntihase n’ah’ umuntu, n’ishusho yiwe yononekaye ntise n’iy’ abana b’abantu —" 
Isaiah52:15 uko ni kw azojoreza amahanga menshi; abami bazozibira akanwa kabo imbere yiwe: kuko bazobona ico batābgiwe, n’ico batumvise bazocitegereza." 
Isaiah53:1 Ni nde yemeye inkuru zacu? Kand’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwahishuriwe nde? 
Isaiah53:2 Kuko yakuriye imbere yiwe nk’ikironge, kandi nk’agashami kava mw ivu rigadutse. Ntiyar’ afise ishusho nziza cank’ igikundiro, kand’ aho twamubona ntiyar’ afise ubgiza bgotumye tumwifuza." 
Isaiah53:3 Yarakēngērwa, agahurwa n’abantu; yar’ umunyamibabaro, yar’ azi intimba ic’ ari co; yakēngērwa nk’umuntu abandi bahisha mu maso habo, natwe nta co twamwibajijeko." 
Isaiah53:4 N’ukuri n’izacu ntimba yishizeko, n’iyacu mibabaro yikoreye; ariko tweho twamwiyumviriye nk’ uwakubiswe, nk’uwacumiswe n’ Imana, akicurikirizwa n’akabonge." 
Isaiah53:5 Yamara yacumitiwe ivyacu bicumuro, yajanjaguriwe ivyacu bigabitanyo: igihano kituronkesha amahoro cabaye kuri we, kand’ imishishagu yiwe ni yo idukiza." 
Isaiah53:6 Twese twazimiye nk’intama, twese twagiye isābagire, umuntu wese mu nzira yiwe; Uhoraho amuremēka ukugabitanya kwacu twese." 
Isaiah53:7 Yaracuranguzwa, yamar’ akarendeka, ntiyakūrak’ umunwa; nk’ umwagazi w’intama ujanwa mw ibāgiro, canke nk’ukw intama itekerereza imbere y’abayikemura, ni kw atākūyek’ umunwa." 
Isaiah53:8 Yakūweho no kugirirwa nabi no gutsindishwa; mu bo mu runganwe rwiwe ni nde yabishizek’ umutima ko yakūwe mw isi y’abakiriho? Ibicumuro vy’abantu banje ni vyo yakubitiwe. 
Isaiah53:9 Bāgeze kw ahambga hamwe n’abanyavyaha, asangira imva n’umutunzi mu gupfa kwiwe; nah’ ata kibi yakoze, kand’ ata guhemana kwari mu kanwa kiwe." 
Isaiah53:10 Yamar’ Uhoraho yashimye kumujanjagura, yaramubabaje; ah’ azotanga ubugingo bgiwe kw ikimazi co gukūrah’ ivyaha, azobona uruvyaro rwiwe, azoramba, ivyo Uhoraho agomba bizoshitswa neza n’ukuboko kwiwe." 
Isaiah53:11 Abonye ibiva mu bise vy’ubugingo bgiwe, bizomuhāza; umushumba wanje agororoka azotuma benshi baheshwa ukugororoka no kumumenya; kand’ azokwishirak’ ukugabitanya kwabo." 
Isaiah53:12 Ni co gituma nzomugabanganya umugabane n’ abahambaye, kand’ azogabura iminyago n’abanyenkomezi; kuko yasutse ubugingo bgiwe, akageza ku gupfa, agaharūranwa n’abanyabicumuro: yamar’ ubgiwe yishizekw icaha ca benshi, kand’ asabira abanyabicumuro." 
Isaiah54:1 Ririmba, mugore w’ingumba utigeze kuvyara, turika uririmbe usemerere, wewe utigeze kuramukwa: kukw abana b’intābga ari benshi, baruta abana b’ūfise umugabo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Isaiah54:2 Tāzānura ikibanza c’ihema ryawe, ni bāgure amahema y’ah’ uba; ntugarukize hafi; wungure imigozi yaryo, ushimangire imambo zaryo." 
Isaiah54:3 Kuk’ uzogasara, uje i buryo n’i bumoso; kand’ uruvyaro rwawe ruzoganza amahanga, ruzotuma ibisagara vyabaye imisaka bisubira kugerērwa." 
Isaiah54:4 Nta co utinya, kuk’ utazotētērwa; ntumāramāre, kukw isoni zitazokwica; kuk’ uzokwibagira isoni wagize mu buto bgawe, n’umugayo wo mu bupfakazi bgawe ntuzowibuka ukundi." 
Isaiah54:5 Kuko jewe Umuremyi wawe ari jewe mugabo wawe; Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryanje; Uwera w’Abisirayeli ni jewe Mucunguzi wawe; nzokwitwa Imana y’isi yose. 
Isaiah54:6 Kuko jewe Uhoraho nguhamagaye nk’umugore w’intābga afise intuntu mu mutima, ngucūye nk’umugore wo mu bucance yari yarirukanywe, ni jewe Imana yawe mbivuze." 
Isaiah54:7 Mbaye ndagutaye akanya gato, ariko nzokwiyegereza ngufitiye imbabazi nyinshi." 
Isaiah54:8 Uburake bgāraziririnze, nguhisha inyonga zanje akanya gato, ariko nzokugirira imbabazi z’urukundo rutazoshira, ni jewe Uhoraho Umucunguzi wawe mbivuze." 
Isaiah54:9 Ivyo bimmereye nk’ivy’ umwuzure wo mu gihe ca Nowa; nk’ uko narahiye k’umwuzure wo mu gihe ca Nowa utazokwongera kurengera isi, ni ko n’ubu ndahiye ko ntazokurakira ngo ndagutonganye." 
Isaiah54:10 Kukw imisozi izovaho, n’uturambi tuzokūrwaho, arik’ ubuntu bganje ntibuzokuvako, kandi n’isezerano ry’amahoro nagusezeraniye ntirizokūrwaho, ni jewe Uhoraho nkugirira ikigongwe mbivuze." 
Isaiah54:11 Ewe uhahazwa, ukazungagizwa n’inkūbi y’umuyaga, ntugire ikikuremesha, ehe nzokwubakisha amabuye yitwa simaragido, amatanguriro yawe nzoyubakisha ayitwa safiro." 
Isaiah54:12 Iminara yawe nzoyubakisha amabuye atukura, n’ ibirimba vyawe nzovyubakisha amabuye akayangana, kand’ uruzitiro rwawe rwose nzorwubakisha ay’ igiciro." 
Isaiah54:13 Abana bawe bose bazokwigishwa nanje, jewe Uhoraho, kand’ amahoro abana bawe bazogira azoba menshi." 
Isaiah54:14 Uzoshikamishwa n’ukugororoka; uguhahazwa kuzokuba kure, nta co uzotinya; bo n’ibitera ubgoba, kuko bitazokwēgēra." 
Isaiah54:15 Ni hagira abagutera, si jewe nzoba mbagomoye; abazogutera bose bazohindikirana imbere yawe." 
Isaiah54:16 Ehe ni jewe ndema umucuzi avuguta umuriro w’amakara, agakūramw’ ico kurwanisha kubg’ ubuhanga bgiwe; ariko kandi naremye umuranduzi wo kugeseza na we." 
Isaiah54:17 Nta co kurwanisha bācuriye kukurwanya kizogira ico kimara; kand’ ururimi rwose ruzoguhagurukira kukubūranya, uzorutsinda. Ivyo ni vyo mwandu w’abasavyi banje, jewe Uhoraho, kand’ ukwo ni kwo kugororoka kwabo kwanduruka kuri jewe; ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Isaiah55:1 Yemwe abafise inyota, ni muze ku mazi, kandi n’ūdafise amahera na we n’aze; ni muze mugure, murye: ni mugure vino n’amata, mudatanze amahera cank’ ibiguzi." 
Isaiah55:2 N’iki gituma mutanga amahera kugura ibitar’ ivyo kurya nyakuri? N’iki gituma mukorera ibidahāza? Mugire umwete wo kunyumvira, ni ho muzorya ivyiza, ubugingo bganyu bunezererwe ibishashagira." 
Isaiah55:3 Mutege amatwi, muze kuri jewe; munyumve, ni ho ubugingo bganyu buzobaho; nanje nzosezerana namwe isezerano ritazoshira, ni ryo mbabazi Dawidi yasezeraniwe zitazovaho." 
Isaiah55:4 Rāba, ndamutanze ngw abe icabona co gushingira intahe amahanga, ngw abe n’umukuru na segaba w’amahanga." 
Isaiah55:5 Rāba, uzohamagara ihanga utazi, kandi n’iryari ritakuzi rizokwirukirako, kubg’ Uhoraho Imana yawe, no kubg’ Uwera w’Abisirayeli, kukw azoba aguhaye icubahiro." 
Isaiah55:6 Ni murondere Uhoraho bigishoboka kw abonwa, ni mumwambaze akiri hafi:" 
Isaiah55:7 umunyavyaha n’areke inzira yiwe, ūgabitanya areke ivyiyumviro vyiwe: agaruke k’Uhoraho, na we aramugirira ikigongwe, agaruke ku Mana yacu, kukw ikunda guharira." 
Isaiah55:8 Kukw ivyiyumviro vyanje atari vyo vyiyumviro vyanyu, kand’ inzira zanyu atari zo nzira zanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah55:9 Mbere nk’ukw ijuru ryītāngūye isi, ni kw inzira zanje zītāngūye inzira zanyu, n’ ivyiyumviro vyanje vyītāngūye ivyiyumviro vyanyu." 
Isaiah55:10 Nk’ukw imvura na shelegi bigwa bivuye mw ijuru, ntibisubireyo, ariko bigatosa isi, bigatuma imeza, ikēra, igaha umubivyi imbuto, n’ ūrya ikamuha ivyo kurya;" 
Isaiah55:11 uko ni kw ijambo ryanje riva mu kanwa kanje rizomera: ntirizogaruka ubusa, ariko rizoshitsa ivyo ngomba, rizosozera ico naritumye." 
Isaiah55:12 Muzovayo muri n’umunezero, muzorōngōra amahoro muvayo: imisozi n’uturambi bizoturika biririmbire imbere yanyu, ibiti vyose vyo mw ishamba bizokoma amashi." 
Isaiah55:13 Mu gishingo c’umubambangwe hazomera igiti c’umuberoshi, mu c’umukēre hazomera ic’ umuhadasi: bizozanira Uhoraho izina ry’iritāzīrano, ikimenyetso kitazoshira, kitazokūrwaho." 
Isaiah56:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni mwitondere ibiroranye, mukore ivy’ ukugororoka: kukw agakiza kanje kagira gashike, n’ ukugororoka kwanje kugira guhishurwe." 
Isaiah56:2 Hahirwa umuntu akora ivyo, n’umwana w’umuntu abibangiriza, akaziririza isabato ntayikēngēre, akarinda ukuboko kwiwe ntigukore icaha na kimwe."
