Isaiah56:3 Kand’ umunyamahanga yifatanije n’Uhoraho yoye kuvuga, at’ Uhoraho ntazobura kuntandukanya n’abantu biwe; canke n’inkone yoye kuvuga, it’ Erega nd’ igiti cumye." 
Isaiah56:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho agize ku vy’inkone ziziririza amasabato yiwe, zigahitamw’ ibimunezereza, zikabangiriza isezerano ryiwe," 
Isaiah56:5 ati Nzozishirira icibutso mu ngoro yanje no mu rugo rwanje, ndazihe n’izina riruta kugira abahungu n’abakobga; nzoziha izina ritazoshira, ritazokūrwaho." 
Isaiah56:6 Kandi n’abanyamahanga bīfatanya nanje Uhoraho kugira ngo bankorere, bakunde izina ryanje, babe abasavyi banje, umuntu wese aziririza isabato ntayikēngēre, akabangiriza isezerano ryanje," 
Isaiah56:7 abo na bo nzobashikana ku musozi wanje wera, mbanezereze mu ngoro yanje yo gusengeramwo; ibimazi vyabo vyo kwoswa n’ivyo gukererwa bizokwemerwa ku gicaniro canje: kukw ingoro yanje izokwitwa inzu yo gusengerwamwo n’amahanga yose." 
Isaiah56:8 Umwami Imana, umwe akoraniriza hamwe abāri birukanywe bo mu Bisirayeli, aravuze, ati Nzokwongera kumukoraniriza abandi, ukūye abiwe bāri bamaze gukoranywa." 
Isaiah56:9 Yemwe bikōko mwese vyo mw ishamba, ni muze mutabagure, namwe bikōko vyose vyo mu kibira." 
Isaiah56:10 Abashibamyi biwe n’impumyi, bose nta co bazi; bose ni nk’imbga z’ibiyingiyingi, zitazi gukuga; bararavūta, bararyama, bakunda gusinzira." 
Isaiah56:11 Mbere n’imbga z’ ibigunya, zitigera zihāga; kand’ abo bameze bartyo n’abungere! Nta co bashobora gutahura; bose bījaniye inzira zabo ubgabo, umuntu wese yironderera inyungu impande zose." 
Isaiah56:12 Bati Ni muze mbazanire vino, twinywere inturire duhimbe. N’ejo na ho bizomera nk’uku, bizonarushiriza." 
Isaiah57:1 Umugororotsi arikw araherengetera, kandi nta wubishirak’ umutima; abubaha Imana bariko barakūrwaho, kandi nta wubibabaye. Umugororotsi akūwe mu vyago," 
Isaiah57:2 ashitse mu mahoro; umuntu wese muri bo yagendera mu nzira igororotse ashitse mu buruhukiro bgiwe. 
Isaiah57:3 Ni mwīgire hino, mwa bana b’umurozikazi, mwa ruvyaro rw’ umusambanyi n’umusambanyikazi." 
Isaiah57:4 Uwo mutwenga akāmuhinya ni nde? Uwo muha ibinoko ni nde, mukamucira inyeri? Mbega ntimur’ abana b’ibicumuro, uruvyaro rw’ibinyoma," 
Isaiah57:5 abītera gushuha muri mu biti vy’ imyeloni no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye, mukicira abana mu myonga, no mu bihoro vyo mu bitandara?" 
Isaiah57:6 Mu nguru ziba mu mwonga ni ho har’ umugabane wawe; izo nyene ni zo mugabane wawe; izo ni zo wūhiye ishikanwa ry’ibiturire, ukaziterekēra. Mbeg’ ivyo novyiyumanganya?" 
Isaiah57:7 Ku musozi muremure ni ho wubatse uburiri bgawe; kandi ni ho wadūga, ukaja gutanga ibimazi." 
Isaiah57:8 Kandi washize icibutso cawe inyuma y’inzugi n’ibishimaryango; kuko wampemukiye, ukiyambikira abandi ubusa; wūrira ku buriri bgawe, urabgagura, wemeranya na bo impēra; wanezererewe kuryamana na bo, ubona ubgambure bgabo." 
Isaiah57:9 Washengereye umwami ujanye amavuta atāmirana n’imbazi wagwijije; utuma intumwa zawe kure, urīmanura, urinda ushika i kuzimu." 
Isaiah57:10 Wagenze urugendo runini rurakunaniza, yamara ntiwisubiramwo, uti Nta kimazi; urahava uriyungunganya, ni co catumye utihebura." 
Isaiah57:11 Mbeg’ uwo watinya ukamugirira ubgoba ni nde, bigatuma ubesha, ntunyibuke, ng’ ubishirek’ umutima? Mbega simmaze igihe kinini ncereje, si co catumye utanyubaha?" 
Isaiah57:12 Nzoserura ukugororoka kwawe n’ibikorwa vyawe; ariko ntibizogira ico bigufasha. 
Isaiah57:13 Ni watakamba, vya bigirwamana warundanije birakurokora! Yamara rer’ umuyaga uzobitwara, impwemu zihumetswe gusa zibikūreho vyose: arik’ ūnyizigira ni we azoganza igihugu, kandi ni we azoragwa umusozi wanje wera." 
Isaiah57:14 Kand’ azovuga, ati Ni muharure, ni muharure, mutunganye inzira, mukūre ibitsitaza mu nzira y’abantu banje." 
Isaiah57:15 Kuk’ ukw ari kw Imwe iri hejuru isumba vyose igize, iba ahatazoshira, izina ryayo n’Uwera; iti Mba hejuru ahantu hēra, kandi mbana n’ūfise umutima umenetse wicisha bugufi, kugira ngo mpēmbūre imitima y’abicisha bugufi, mpēmbūre n’abafise imitima imenetse." 
Isaiah57:16 Kuko ntotongana ibihe vyose, kandi sinokwama ndatse: kukw imitima n’ubugingo naremye vyodendebukirirwa imbere yanje." 
Isaiah57:17 Icaha ciwe c’igono ni co candakije ndamukubita, ndihisha, ndaraka: yamar’ ashishikara gukikamira mu nzira ikundwa n’umutima wiwe." 
Isaiah57:18 Inzira ziwe narazibonye, kandi nzomukiza; nzomurōngōra, nzoheruka kumwirurana n’abāmuborogera." 
Isaiah57:19 Ni jewe ndema ishimwe riva mu minwa. Amahoro, amahoro abe k’ūri kure no k’ūri hafi, nanje nzomukiza, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah57:20 Arikw abanyakibi bameze nk’ikiyaga gisuriranya; kuko kidashobora guhwekera, kand’ amazi yaco azīkurura isūri n’imyanda." 
Isaiah57:21 Nta mahoro ku banyakibi, ni kw Imana yanje igize." 
Isaiah58:1 Semerera cane, woye kwigarura; rangurura ijwi ryawe nk’inzamba, ubarire abantu banje ibicumuro vyabo, n’inzu ya Yakobo ivyaha vyabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Mugabo bandondera uko bukeye, banezererwa kumenya inzira zanje; nk’ihanga ryakora ivy’ ukugororoka, ntirireke ivyagezwe vy’ Imana yabo, ni ko bansaba ivyagezwe vyo kugororoka, bakanezererwa kwēgēra Imana." 
Isaiah58:3 Barabaza, bati Mbeg’ igituma twisonzesha, nturuhe ubibona, ni ku ki? Igituma twibabaza, nawe ukavyirengagiza, ni ku ki? Erega mbiterwa n’uko ku musi wanyu wo kwisonzesha mupfa kwikorera ivyanyu, mugakoresha nabi abakozi banyu bose." 
Isaiah58:4 Rāba ico mwisonzeshereza n’amahāne n’ imitongano no gukubitana ibipfunsi vyo kugiriranira nabi; ereg’ ukwisonzesha kwanyu kwo mur’ iyi misi si kwo kwotuma ijwi ryanyu ryumvikana mw ijuru. 
Isaiah58:5 Non’ ukwisonzesha nshima, mugira ngo kumeze gurtyo? Mugira ngo n’umusi wo kwibabarizamwo, no kujondamika umutwe nk’urufunzo, no kwisasira amagunira n’umunyota? Mbeg’ ivyo ni vyo mwita kwisonzesha, n’ umusi jewe Uhoraho nnezererwa?" 
Isaiah58:6 Mbeg’ uku si kwo kwisonzesha nshima? S’ukubohora abantu ingoyi z’ukugiriranira nabi, no guhamburura imigozi abatwazwa igitugu, no kurekura impahazwa ngo zīdegemvye, mukavuna ivy’ ugutwaza igitugu vyose?" 
Isaiah58:7 Mbega s’ugutanga ivyo kurya vyawe ukagaburira abashonje, ukazana aboro birukanywe ukabashira mu nzu yawe? Wabona ūgenda gusa ukamwambika, ntiwirengagize mwene wanyu?" 
Isaiah58:8 Maze rer’ umuco wawe uzoca utambika nk’umutwenzi, amagara yawe asubire atotahare vuba; ukugororoka kwawe kuzokuja imbere, kand’ ubgiza bganje buzoba bukwimirije." 
Isaiah58:9 Maze ni watabaza, jewe Uhoraho nzokwitaba; ni watakamba, nzovuga, nti Ndi hano. Ni wakūra ugutwaza igitugu hagati muri wewe, no gutūngira abandi urutoke, n’ibiyāgo bibi," 
Isaiah58:10 ugahebera umushonji ivyo wari kurya, ugahāza impahazwa: umuco wawe uzorasira mu mwiza, kand’ umwiza wawe uzohinduka nko ku murango w’amashōka;" 
Isaiah58:11 kandi jewe Uhoraho nzokwama nkurōngōra, nzohāza ubugingo bgawe mu gihe c’ikigatwa, nguhe kunonoka mu magufa yawe; kand’ uzomera nk’indimiro ikwegewemw’ umwuzi, kand’ uzoba nk’isōko y’ amazi idakama." 
Isaiah58:12 Kand’ ahār’ imisaka kera hazosubira kwubakwa; bazokwubaka ku matanguriro yariho mu bindi bihe; kand’ uzokwitwa Uwica ibirengero, n’Ūsibūra inzira zija mu ngo." 
Isaiah58:13 Ni wakūra ikirenge cawe, ngo ntukandagire isabato, ukareka gukora ivyo wigombeye ku musi wanje wera, arik’ ukita isabato umusi w’umunezero, mber’ umusi wanje wera ukawita uw’ icubahiro, ukawubaha, ntukore ivyo ugomba ubgawe, ntiwironderere gukora ivyawe, ntiwirirwe mu bijandijandi vy’ubusa," 
Isaiah58:14 nuk’ uzonnezererwa jewe Uhoraho; nanje nzoguha kugenda ujandagira ku mpinga z’ imisozi yo mu gihugu; kandi nzogutungisha ishamvu ya sogokuruza Yakobo: kukw akanwa kanje, jewe Uhoraho, ari ko kabivuze." 
Isaiah59:1 Ehe, ukuboko kw’Uhoraho ntikubaye kugufi ngo kunanirwe gukiza, n’ugutwi kwiwe ntikwapfuye ngo kunanirwe kwumva:" 
Isaiah59:2 arikw ibigabitanyo vyanyu ni vyo vyabatandukanije n’ Imana yanyu, kand’ ivyaha vyanyu ni vyo vyabakīngiriye mu nyonga hayo, bituma yanka no kwumva." 
Isaiah59:3 Kukw amaboko yanyu yandujwe n’amaraso, n’intoke zanyu zandujwe n’ibigabitanyo; iminwa yanyu yama ivuga ibinyoma, n’ururimi rwanyu ruvugira ibibi mu ntamatama." 
Isaiah59:4 Nta witwarira uwundi mu buryo buroranye, nta n’ūbūrana ivy’ ukuri; bizigira ibitagira ikimazi, bakavuga ibinyoma; basama inda z’ ukugira nabi, bakavyara ibigabitanyo." 
Isaiah59:5 Baberagura amagi y’ imvuvyi, bajisha butangurirwa: ūriye amagi yabo agapfa; wamena irigi, hagaturumbukamw’ imamba." 
Isaiah59:6 Ivyo bājishe butangurirwa ntibizovamw’ imyambaro, kandi ntibazoshobora kwipfuka ibikorwa vyabo; ibikorwa vyabo n’ ibikorwa vy’ubugāba, ibikorwa vy’ umuryano biri mu maboko yabo." 
Isaiah59:7 Ibirenge vyabo vyirukira gukora ikibi, kandi bihutira kuvisha amaraso y’abatācumuye; ivyiyumviro vyabo n’ivyiyumviro vy’ubugāba; kugeseza no guhonnya biri mu nzira zabo." 
Isaiah59:8 Inzira y’amahoro ntibayizi; mu ngendo zabo ntihabamw’ ibiroranye: bītoboreye inzira z’ibigoramange; ūzicamwo wese ntamenya amahoro. 
Isaiah59:9 Ni co gituma ibiroranye biri kure yacu, kandi n’ukugororoka ntikudushikīra; twitega umuco tukabona umwiza; twitega ahakemutse tukagenda mu muzitanya." 
Isaiah59:10 Dukabakaba ku nzu nk’impumyi, ni koko dukabakaba nk’abatagira amaso; ku murango w’amashōka dutsitara nko mu kajoro; mu bagikomeye tumeze nk’abapfuye." 
Isaiah59:11 Twese twivuga nk’igikōko citwa idubu, tukaniha nk’inuma iguguza; twitega ibiroranye, ariko nta vyo; twitega agakiza, ariko kakaba kure yacu." 
Isaiah59:12 Kukw ibicumuro vyacu vyagwiriranye imbere yawe, kand’ ivyaha vyacu ari vyo bitwagiriza: kukw ibicumuro vyacu turi kumwe, kandi n’ibigabitanyo vyacu na vyo turabizi;" 
Isaiah59:13 turacumura kandi twihakana Uhoraho, duta inzira tukareka gukurikira Imana yacu, tukavuga ivy’ agahahazo n’ubugarariji; dusama inda y’ ibinyoma, tukabivuga biturutse mu mutima." 
Isaiah59:14 Ibiroranye vyashubijwe inyuma, n’ukugororoka guhagaze kure; kuk’ ukuri kwatemvye mu nzira, kand’ ubgeranda ntibushobora gushika." 
Isaiah59:15 Ni koko, ukuri kurakamanganye; kand’ ūhunze ibibi aba yinyagishije. Uhoraho yarabibonye, biramubabaza, kukw ata biroranye biriho." 
Isaiah59:16 Kand’ abona yukw ata muntu ariho, atangazwa n’ukw ata wo kubahagarikira; ni co catumye ukwiwe kuboko ari kwo yizanishirije agakiza, kand’ ukugororoka kwiwe ni kwo yishimikije." 
Isaiah59:17 Yambara ukugororoka nk’icuma gikīngira igikiriza, no ku mutwe inkofero y’agakiza; yambara impuzu zo guhōra ngo zimubere imyambaro, yiyambika ishaka nk’umutamana." 
Isaiah59:18 Azobasubiriza mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ ivyo bakoze; abarwanizi biwe abasubize uburake, n’abansi biwe abīhōre, kandi n’ababa ku kiyaga azobasubiza inyishu." 
Isaiah59:19 Ni ho bazokwubaha izina ry’Uhoraho, uhereye i burengerazuba, n’icubahiro ciwe uhereye iyo rirasira: kukw azoza nk’uruzi rusēnyerana, rukubebga n’impwemu z’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah59:20 Kand’ umucunguzi azoza i Siyoni, ku bo mu ba Yakobo bateye ibitugu ibicumuro, ni k’ Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah59:21 Nanje ngiri isezerano nsezeranye na bo, ni k’Uhoraho agize: impwemu yanje iri kuri wewe, n’amajambo yanje nshize mu kanwa kawe, ntibizova mu kanwa kawe, canke mu kanwa k’abuzukuru bawe, canke mu kanwa k’abuzukuruza bawe, uhereye none ugashitsa ibihe bidashira, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah60:1 Haguruka ukayangane, kuk’ umuco wawe ushitse, kand’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bukaba bukurasiye." 
Isaiah60:2 Kuko rāba, umwiza uzotwikira isi, umwiza w’umuzitanya uzotwikira amahanga: arik’ Uhoraho azokurasira, kand’ ubgiza bgiwe buzokubonekako." 
Isaiah60:3 Amahanga azoza ku muco wawe, n’abami bazoza ku gukayangana kwawe." 
Isaiah60:4 Unamura amaso yawe weraguze, urābe, bose bakoraniye hamwe baza kuri wewe; abahungu bawe bazoza baturutse kure, n’ abakobga bawe bazoza bateruwe mu kwaha." 
Isaiah60:5 Ni ho uzorāba, mu maso hawe hakeyuka, umutima wawe ukadidagizwa n’umunezero, ukāguka; kukw ibidandazwa vy’ibitayega bica mu kiyaga bizogaruka i wawe, n’ubutunzi bg’ amahanga buzokuzako." 
Isaiah60:6 Isinzi ry’ingamiya rizogutwikira, inyana z’ingamiya z’i Midiyani n’izo muri Efa. Abaturutse i Sheba bose bazoza, bazoba bazanye izahabu n’imibavu, bavuge inkuru nziza z’ishimwe ry’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah60:7 Imikuku yose y’i Kedari izokoranirizwa kuri wewe, amapfizi y’intama y’i Nebayoti azogukorera; azokwūrira igicaniro canje yemerwe, nzokwubahiriza inzu yanje y’icubahiro." 
Isaiah60:8 Aba ni ba nde baguruka nk’igicu, kandi nk’ inuma zisubira mu turyango tw’ ivyari vyazo?" 
Isaiah60:9 N’ababa ku kiyaga banyiteze, amāto y’i Tarushishi ni yo abītangiye imbere, azanye abahungu bawe abakūye kure, bazanye ifeza zabo n’ izahabu kubg’ izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, Uwera w’Abisirayeli, kuko nakwubahirije." 
Isaiah60:10 Abanyamahanga bazokwubaka inzitiro zawe, n’abami babo bazogukorera; kuko nagukubise ndatse, ariko nkugiriye imbabazi ndagutunze." 
Isaiah60:11 Amarembo yawe azokwama yuguruye, ntazokwugarirwa ku murango canke mw ijoro, kugira ngw abantu bakuzanire ubutunzi bg’amahanga, bo n’abami bayo babashoreye." 
Isaiah60:12 Kukw ihanga n’ubgami bitazokwemera kugukorera bizohona; ni koko ayo mahanga azogesezwa rwose. 
Isaiah60:13 Ubgiza bg’i Lebanoni buzokuzako, ibiti vy’amasederi n’ ivy’ imitidari n’ivy’ imiteyashuri bizozira hamwe, kugira ngo bisharize ahēra hanje, kand’ aho nshira ibirenge vyanje nzohubahiriza:" 
Isaiah60:14 abahungu b’abāguhahaza bazoza bakubite inkoro hasi imbere yawe, n’abāgukēngēra bīkubite imbere y’ibirenge vyawe, bakwite Umurwa w’Uhoraho, Siyoni h’Uwera w’Abisirayeli." 
Isaiah60:15 Naho wahebge, ukankwa, ntihabe hakigira ūhita muri wewe, nzoguhindura ubgiza bginshi butazoshira, ube umunezero uk’ urunganwe rwawe ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Isaiah60:16 Kand’ uzokwonka amaberebere y’amahanga, uzokwonka amabere y’abami, kand’ uzomenya yuko jewe, Uhoraho, nd’ Umukiza wawe n’ Umucunguzi wawe, Inyenkomezi ya Yakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Mu gishingo c’imiringa nzozana izahabu, no mu gishingo c’ivyuma nzozana ifeza; nzane imiringa mu gishingo c’ibiti, n’ ivyuma mu gishingo c’amabuye; nzokwimika amahoro abe ari yo akuganza, n’ukugororoka abe ari kwo kugutwara." 
Isaiah60:18 Umuryano ntuzokwumvikana ukundi mu gihugu cawe, bo n’ukugeseza n’ ugutikiza mu ngabano zawe; arikw inzitiro zawe uzozīta Gakiza, n’amarembo yawe uzoyīta Mpundu." 
Isaiah60:19 Izuba si ryo rizoba rikikubera umuco ku murango, cank’ ukwezi ngo kukuboneshereze: ariko jewe Uhoraho ni jewe nzokubera umuco utazoshira, kandi jewe Imana yawe ni jewe nzokubera icubahiro." 
Isaiah60:20 Izuba ryawe ntirizoba rikirenga, kand’ ukwezi kwawe ntikuzoba kugikeha, kuko jewe Uhoraho nzokubera umuco utazoshira, kand’ imisi y’ikigandaro cawe izoba ishize." 
Isaiah60:21 Abantu bawe bazoba abagororotsi bose, bazoba ben’ igihugu bgite gushitsa ibihe vyose; bazoba umuvyaro nitereye, igikorwa c’intoke zanje, kugira ngo bintere icubahiro." 
Isaiah60:22 Inkēngērwa izovamw’ igihumbi, kandi nyarucari azoba ihanga rikomeye. Jewe Uhoraho nzobishitsa n’ingoga, igihe cavyo kigeze." 
Isaiah61:1 Mpwemu w’Umwami Uhoraho ari kuri jewe, kuk’ Uhoraho yandobanuje amavuta ngo mbgire abaciye bugufi ubutumwa bgiza; yantumye gutubika imitima imenetse, no kumenyesha abarindwa ko barekuwe, n’imbohe ko zugururiwe;" 
Isaiah61:2 ngo mmenyeshe abantu umwaka wo kwemererwamwo n’Uhoraho, n’ umusi wo kwīhōra w’Imana yacu; ngo nirure abagandaye bose," 
Isaiah61:3 ngo nshirireh’ abagandaye i Siyoni igitsibo mu gishingo c’umunyota, ndabahe n’amavuta y’akaneza mu gishingo c’ukugandara, n’umwambaro wo guhimbaza mu gishingo c’umutima uhondobereye; kugira ngo baze bitwe ibiti vy’ukugororoka, imyeloni yatewe n’ Uhoraho, ngo bimutere icubahiro." 
Isaiah61:4 Nuko bazokwubaka ahār’ imisaka kera, bahagarike ahāsanganguwe ubga mbere, kandi bazosubira kuvyura ibisagara vyāsenyutse, ivyāmaze ibihe vyinshi ar’ imisaka." 
Isaiah61:5 Abanyamahanga bazohagarara ngaho babaragirire imikuku, kand’ abanyamahanga ni bo bazokora mu mirima yanyu no mu nzabibu zanyu." 
Isaiah61:6 Ariko mweho muzokwitwa abaherezi b’Uhoraho, abantu bazobita abasavyi b’Imana yacu: muzorya itunga ry’abanyamahanga, ivyār’ icubahiro cabo ni mwebge muzovyirata." 
Isaiah61:7 Kubg’ ukumāramāra kwanyu muzoshumbushwa kabiri; mu gishingo co gutētērwa muzonezererwa umugabane wanyu: ni co gituma mu gihugu canyu muzoshumbushwa kabiri, mugire umunezero utazoshira." 
Isaiah61:8 Kuko jewe Uhoraho nkunda ibiroranye, nanka ubgambuzi n’ibigabitanyo; kandi nzobashumbusha ibikwiranye n’ukuri kwanje, nzosezerana namwe isezerano ritazoshira." 
Isaiah61:9 Abazobakomokako bazomenyekana mu mahanga, n’uruvyaro rwanyu mu bandi bantu: abazobabona bose bazobemera yukw ar’ ihanga jewe Uhoraho mpaye umugisha." 
Isaiah61:10 Nzonezererwa cane Uhoraho, umutima wanje uvugirize impundu Imana yanje; kuko yanyambitse imyambaro y’agakiza, akansēsa hejuru umutamana w’ubugororotsi, nk’uk’ umukwe ashazisha igitsibo, kandi nk’uk’ umugeni ashazisha utugenegene twiwe." 
Isaiah61:11 Nk’ukw isi ibaduka ibimeze, n’ indimiro imeza ivyayitewemwo, uko ni k’Umwami Uhoraho azomeza ukugororoka n’ishimwe imbere y’amahanga yose." 
Isaiah62:1 Kubga Siyoni sinzocereza, no kubga Yerusalemu sinzoruhuka, gushitsa ah’ ugutsinda kwaho kuzoserukira nk’umuco, n’ agakiza kaho kakamera nk’itara ryaka." 
Isaiah62:2 Nukw amahanga azobona ugutsinda kwawe, n’abami bose bazobona icubahiro cawe; maz’ uzokwitwa izina risha, wiswe n’akanwa k’Uhoraho." 
Isaiah62:3 Kand’ uzoba igitsibo c’ubgiza mu kuboko kw’Uhoraho, n’umugāra w’ ubgami mu kuboko kw’Imana yawe." 
Isaiah62:4 Ntuzosubira kwitwa Ntabga, n’igihugu cawe ntikizosubira kwitwa Misaka; arik’ uzokwitwa Nkundwakazi, n’igihugu cawe kizokwitwa Uwābiriwe; kuk’ Uhoraho agukundwakaje, kand’ igihugu cawe kizokwābīrwa." 
Isaiah62:5 Nk’uk’ umusore arongora inkumi, ni kw abakubamwo bazokurongora, ewe Yerusalemu; kandi nk’uk’ umukwe anezererwa umugeni, ni kw Imana yawe izokunezererwa." 
Isaiah62:6 Ewe Yerusalemu, nshize abashibamyi hejuru ku nzitiro zawe z’amabuye; nta ho bazocereza ku murango no mw ijoro; yemwe abibutsa Uhoraho ntimukaruhuke," 
Isaiah62:7 kandi na we ntimwemere kw aruhuka, gushitsa ah’ azovyurira Yerusalemu, akahahindura ishimwe mw isi." 
Isaiah62:8 Uhoraho yarahije ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo, ukuboko kw’inkomezi ziwe, ati N’ukuri sinzokwongera guha abansi bawe amasaka yawe ngo bayarye, kand’ abanyamahanga ntibazokunywera vino wacumukuriye;" 
Isaiah62:9 arikw abazoyimbura ni bo bazoyarya, banshime jewe Uhoraho, kand’ abazoyamura ni bo bazoyinywa, mu ntangaro y’ ahēra hanje." 
Isaiah62:10 Ni murenge, ni murenge amarembo; mutunganirize abantu inzira; muharure, muharure inzira y’iroro, muyikūremw’ amabuye; mushingire amoko ibendera." 
Isaiah62:11 Rāba, Uhoraho yabariye abo ku mpera y’isi, ati Ni mubgire umukobga w’i Siyoni, muti Rāba, agakiza kawe karaje; rāba, araje azanye impēra, kand’ inyishu yiwe ir’imbere yiwe." 
Isaiah62:12 Kandi bazobita Ihanga ryera, Abācunguwe n’Uhoraho; kand’ uzokwitwa Ahārondewe, Umurwa utāhebge." 
Isaiah63:1 Uriya ni nde aturutse muri Edomu, i Bosira, yambaye imyambaro y’agahama, yambaye impuzu zikayangana, araramanga ari n’inkomezi nyinshi? Ni jewe mvuga mu bugororotsi, umunyabushobozi bgo gukiza." 
Isaiah63:2 N’iki gitumye impuzu zawe ziba agatuku, n’imyambaro yawe igasa n’iy’ ūganisha ibirenge vino mu bgato?" 
Isaiah63:3 Nīganishije mu bgato nd’umwe; mu bantu bo mu mahanga yose nta n’umwe twari kumwe; n’ukuri nabaganishije ibirenge mu burake bganje, mbanyukuza ubushangashirwe bganje; kand’ amaraso yabo yatarukiye ku myambaro yanje, impuzu zanje zose zirayoberana." 
Isaiah63:4 Kuko nari narashinze mu mutima umusi wo kwīhōra, kand’ umwaka wo gucungura abantu banje urashitse." 
Isaiah63:5 Narēraguje, mbona nta wutabaye; ntangazwa n’ukw ata wo kundwanira; ni co catumye ukwanje kuboko ari kwo nitabarishije, kand’ ubushangashirwe bganje ni bgo bgampagarikiye." 
Isaiah63:6 Nanyukuje amahanga uburake bganje, mbamenaguza ubushangashirwe bganje, mpondoganiriza amaraso yabo kw isi." 
Isaiah63:7 Nzokwamamaza ukugira neza kw’Uhoraho n’ishimwe ryiwe, nk’ ukw ivyo Uhoraho yatugiriye vyose bingana; mvuge n’ivyiza vyinshi yagiriye inzu ya Isirayeli, nk’ukw imbabazi ziwe ziri, kandi nk’uk’ ukugira neza kwiwe kwinshi kungana." 
Isaiah63:8 Kuko yavuze, ati N’ukuri n’abantu banje, abana batogunga; nuko rer’ ababera Umukiza." 
Isaiah63:9 Yababaranye na bo mu mibabaro yabo yose, kand’ umumarayika yama ahagaze mu nyonga ziwe yarabakiza: urukundo rwiwe n’ikigongwe ciwe ni vyo vyamuteye kubacungura; yarabaterura akabaheka imisi yose ya kera." 
Isaiah63:10 Ariko baragarariza, bababaza Mpwemu wiwe yera; bituma ahinduka umwansi wabo, ubgiwe arwana na bo." 
Isaiah63:11 Maz’ abantu biwe bibuka ibihe vya kera n’ivya Mose, bat’ Uwabadūgananye n’umwungere w’intama ziwe abakūye mu kiyaga ari hehe? Uwashize Mpwemu wiwe yera hagati muri bo ari hehe?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ni nde yatumye ukuboko kwiwe kw’ icubahiro kugendera ku ruhande rw’i buryo bga Mose? Ni nde yatandukanije amazi imbere yabo, akīhesha izina ritazoshira?" 
Isaiah63:13 Ni nde yabacishije ahār’ i bgina, nk’ah’ ar’ ifarasi ica mu bugaragwa, ntibatsitare?" 
Isaiah63:14 Nk’ ukw inka zishōka ku mwonga, ni ko Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yabaruhura; uko ni ko warōngōye abantu bawe, kugira ngo wiheshe izina ry’icubahiro." 
Isaiah63:15 Tereza inyonga hasi uri mw ijuru, witegereze ur’ i wawe, ah’ ukwera kwawe n’icubahiro cawe biri: rya shaka ryawe n’ibikorwa vyawe vy’ubushobozi biri hehe? Igishika n’imbabazi umfitiye ko bibujijwe kunshikīra!" 
Isaiah63:16 Kuko wewe uri Data wa twese, naho Aburahamu atatuzi, kandi na Isirayeli ntatwemere: wewe ubgawe, Uhoraho, ni wewe Data; Umucunguzi wacu ni ryo zina ryawe uhereye kera hose." 
Isaiah63:17 Ewe Uhoraho, n’iki gituma utuzimiza inzira zawe, ugakomantaza imitima yacu ntitukwubahe? Garuka kubg’ abasavyi bawe, imiryango y’ishamvu yawe." 
Isaiah63:18 Abantu bawe bera bāhaganje igihe gito gusa; abarwanizi bacu bāsiribanze ahantu hawe hēra. 
Isaiah63:19 Twahindutse nk’abatigeze kuganzwa nawe, nk’abatigeze kwitirirwa izina ryawe." 
Isaiah64:1 Icompa ugasatura ijuru ukamanuka, imisozi igahindira agashitsi imbere yawe," 
Isaiah64:2 bikaba nk’uk’ umuriro ufata inyabara, kandi nk’uk’ umuriro ubiza amazi: kugira ngw izina ryawe rimenyekane mu bansi bawe, amahanga ahindire agashitsi imbere yawe." 
Isaiah64:3 Aho wakora ibiteye ubgoba tutīteze, waramanutse, imisozi ihindira agashitsi imbere yawe." 
Isaiah64:4 Kuk’ uhereye kera hose ata ho abantu bīgeze kwumva, canke ngo bibagwe mu matwi, canke ngo baboneshe amaso iyindi mana igira ico imarira abayīteze atari wewe." 
Isaiah64:5 Usanganira ūnezererwa gukora ivy’ ukugororoka, n’abagendera mu nzira zawe bakwibuka; ariko wararatse, kuko twakoze ivyaha, mbere tubimazemw’ igihe kirekire; mbega, none twoba tugikizwa?" 
Isaiah64:6 Kuko twese twahindutse nk’ibihumane, kand’ ukugororoka kwacu kwose kumeze nk’impuzu yanduye; twese dukabiranye nk’ikibabi, kand’ ibigabitanyo vyacu bidukubeba nk’ umuyaga." 
Isaiah64:7 Kandi nta n’umwe yambaza izina ryawe, nta wuruha yinanata ngo yimatanye nawe; kuko waduhishije mu nyonga hawe, ukaduhebera mu bigabitanyo vyacu." 
Isaiah64:8 Ariko noneho, Uhoraho, uri Data wa twese; tur’ ibumba, nawe ur’ umubumvyi wacu; twese tur’ igikorwa c’ intoke zawe." 
Isaiah64:9 Uhoraho, reka kuraka cane birenze urugero, ntiwame wibuka ibigabitanyo vyacu ibihe vyose; ni witegereze se turakwinginze, twese tur’ abantu bawe." 
Isaiah64:10 Ibisagara vyawe vyera vyacitse ubugaragwa, i Siyoni hacitse ubugaragwa, i Yerusalemu hacitse amatongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Inzu yacu yera nziza, iyo ba sogokuruza bacu bāguhimbarizamwo, yaraturiwe; n’ ibintu vyacu vyose vyāduhimbara vyārononekaye." 
Isaiah64:12 Ewe Uhoraho, mbeg’ uzokwiyumanganya, kandi bimeze birtyo? Upfe kwiyumya, kand’ utubabaje birengeje urugero?" 
Isaiah65:1 Nabaririkijwe n’abatānyibaza; nabonywe n’abatāndondeye; nabariye ihanga ritāmbaje izina ryanje, nt’ Ehe rāba, ndi hano." 
Isaiah65:2 Nirirwa ntegeye amaboko ihanga rigarariza, bagendera mu nzira zitari nziza, bakurikira ivyabo vyiyumviro." 
Isaiah65:3 N’abantu bahora banshinyaguriza imbonankubone, bagatangira ibimazi mu bigabiro, bakosereza imibavu ku bicaniro vyubakishijwe amatafari;" 
Isaiah65:4 bakicara hagati y’imva, bakarāra mu bitabo ahihishije; bakarya inyama z’ingurube, kandi mu nzavya zabo hakabamw’ umufa w’inyama z’ibizira;" 
Isaiah65:5 bakavuga, bati Hagarara ukwawe, ntunyegēre, kuko jewe nkurusha kuba uwejejwe. Ben’ abo bambera umwotsi wo mu mazuru, n’umuriro wīriza umusi waka." 
Isaiah65:6 Eh’ ivyo biranditswe imbere yanje, sinzohora, ariko nzobibasubizako, mbere nzobasubiriza mu nkōko." 
Isaiah65:7 Ibigabitanyo vyanyu ubganyu, ni k’ Uhoraho agize, nzobibasubirizakw icarimwe n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sogokuruza banyu, bosereza imibavu ku misozi, bakantukira ku turambi: ni co gituma nzobasubiriza mu nkōko ibikwiranye n’ ibikorwa vyabo." 
Isaiah65:8 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nk’ukw ihando ry’umuzabibu riboneka ko ririmw’ umutobe, bakavuga, bati Ntuwurandure, kuk’ ugifise ikimazi, uko ni ko nanje nzogira, kubg’ abasavyi banje, noye kubarandura bose." 
Isaiah65:9 Nzokwironkera uruvyaro muri Yakobo, n’ūzoragwa imisozi yanje muri Yuda; abo nitoranirije bazoharagwa, n’abasavyi banje bazohaba." 
Isaiah65:10 Maz’ i Sharoni hazoba icanya c’intama, kand’ ikiyaya c’i Akori kizoba ivyagiro ry’ inka, n’uburuhukiro bg’abantu banje bandondeye." 
Isaiah65:11 Ariko mwebge abantaye jewe Uhoraho, mukibagira umusozi wanje wera, mugatereka Gadi, mugaturiraniriza Meni;" 
Isaiah65:12 nanje nzobashirirah’ inkota, mwese muzokwunamira kwicwa: kukw igihe nahamagara mutitavye, n’igihe navuga mutumvise; ariko mugakora ivyo mbona kw ari bibi, mukitoraniriza ibitannezera." 
Isaiah65:13 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana agize, ati Rāba, abasavyi banje bazorya, ariko mweho muzokwicwa n’inzara; abasavyi banje bazonywa, ariko mweho muzokwicwa n’inyota; abasavyi banje bazonezerwa, ariko mweho muzomāramāra:" 
Isaiah65:14 rāba, abasavyi banje bazoririmbishwa n’ umunezero wo mu mitima, ariko mweho muzorizwa n’intuntu yo mu mitima, muborozwe n’ukw imitima yanyu isābijwe n’umubabaro." 
Isaiah65:15 Kand’ izina ryanyu muzorisigarana abo nitoranirije, barigire umuvumo, bat’ Urakicwa n’Uhoraho Imana! Maz’ abasavyi banje bazokwitwa irindi zina." 
Isaiah65:16 Nuk’ uwo mu gihugu yisabīra umugisha n’awusabe Imana y’ukuri, kand’ uwo mu gihugu arahira, n’arahire Imana y’ukuri; kukw amagorwa ya mbere yibagiranye, agahishwa inyonga zanje." 
Isaiah65:17 Kuko rāba, ndarema ijuru risha n’isi nsha; ivya mbere ntibizokwibukwa, kandi ntibizoruha vyiyumvirwa." 
Isaiah65:18 Ariko munezerwe, muze muhore muhimbawe n’ivyo ndema; kuko rāba, ndema Yerusalemu ngo mpagire umunezero, n’abantu baho ngo ndabagire akanyamuneza." 
Isaiah65:19 Kandi nzohimbarwa n’i Yerusalemu, nnezerwe n’abantu banje: kand’ ijwi ryo kurira ntirizohumvikana ukundi, cank’ ijwi ryo kuboroga." 
Isaiah65:20 Ntihazokwongera kubamw’ abapfa bakir’ inzoya, cank’ umutāma adasozereye imyaka yiwe; kuk’ umwana azopfa amaze imyaka ijana, kand’ ūkenyutse ntashitse ijana azoba yavumwe." 
Isaiah65:21 Bazokwubaka amazu bayīberemwo, kandi bazotera uruzabibu, bīrīre inzabibu zarwo." 
Isaiah65:22 Ntibazokwubaka ngw abandi binjire; ntibazorima ngw abandi babirye: kuko nk’ukw imyaka y’igiti ingana ari kw abantu banje bazoramba, kand’ abo nitoranirije bazoshitsa igihe kirekire banezererwa igikorwa c’amaboko yabo." 
Isaiah65:23 Ntibazoruhira ubusa, kandi ntibazovyara abo kugesezwa, kuko bazoba ar’ uruvyaro jewe Uhoraho nahezagiye, bo n’abazobakomokako." 
Isaiah65:24 Maze batarampamagara nzobitaba, kandi bakivuga nzokwumva." 
Isaiah65:25 Ibingira n’umwagazi w’intama bizorīshanya; intambge izorīsha ubgatsi nk’inka; kand’ umukungugu ni wo uzoba ivyo kurya vy’inzoka. Ntibizoryana canke ngo bigire ico vyica ku musozi wanje wera iy’ uva ukagera, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah66:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ijuru ni ryo ntebe yanje y’ubgami, isi na yo n’indava y’ ibirenge vyanje: muzonyubakira inzu ki, kandi n’ahantu ki hombera uburuhukiro?" 
Isaiah66:2 Kukw ivyo vyose intoke zanje ari zo zabiremye, bikabaho vyose, ni k’ Uhoraho agize; arik’ umuntu w’impahazwa afise umutima umenetse, agahindishwa agashitsi n’ ijambo ryanje, uwo ni we nzohozakw ijisho." 
Isaiah66:3 Ūkerera inka, ahwanye n’uwica umuntu; ūtanga umwagazi w’ intama kw ikimazi, ahwanye n’ ūvuna imbga izosi; ūshikana ishikanwa ry’amafu, ahwanye n’ ūzanye amaraso y’ingurube; uwosa imibavu, ahwanye n’ūhezagira ikigirwamana. N’ukuri koko bitoranirije inzira zabo ubgabo, imitima yabo ihimbarwa n’ ibizira vyabo vy’ubuyobe." 
Isaiah66:4 None nanje nzobatoraniriza amagorwa, mbatēze ibibatera ubgoba; kukw aho nahamagara ata witavye, aho navuga ntibumve, ariko bagakora ivyo mbona kw ari bibi, bagahitamw’ ivyo nanka." 
Isaiah66:5 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, yemwe abahindishwa agashitsi n’ijambo ryiwe: ati Bene wanyu babanka, bakabaca babahoye izina ryanje, bāravuze ng’ Uhoraho n’agaragaze icubahiro ciwe, turābe umunezero wanyu! Ariko bo bazomāramāra." 
Isaiah66:6 Umve urwānāga rwumvikana ku murwa, ruturutse mu rusengero! N’Uhoraho asubiriza abansi biwe mu nkōko." 
Isaiah66:7 Siyoni hatararamukwa haravyara, ibise bitaraza havyara umwana w’umuhungu." 
Isaiah66:8 Ni nde yigeze kwumva ibimeze birtyo? Ni nde yigeze kubona ibisa birtyo? Mbeg’ igihugu covukira umusi umwe? Ihanga ryovyarirwa icarimwe? Ariko Siyoni ho habaye hakiramukwa haca havyara abana. 
Isaiah66:9 Mbega notuma baramukwa, sintume bavyara? ni k’Uhoraho abaza; kw ari jewe ntuma bavyara, nobaboheramw’ inda? ni kw Imana yawe ibaza." 
Isaiah66:10 Munezeranwe n’i Yerusalemu, muhimbarwe kubgaho, yemwe abahakunda mwese; munezeranwe na ho akanyamuneza, yemwe abāharirira mwese:" 
Isaiah66:11 kugira ngo mwonke, muhāge amaberebere y’ibihahūmuriza, mugutanye munezererwe icubahiro caho c’umureto." 
Isaiah66:12 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohasendanishiriza amahoro ameze nk’uruzi, n’ubgiza bg’amahanga bumeze nk’umugezi usebereye; ivyo ni vyo muzokwonka, muzoshirwa mu kwaha, musimbagirizwe ku bibero." 
Isaiah66:13 Nk’uk’ umwana ahūmurizwa na nyina ni ko nzobahūmuriza; kandi muzohūmuririzwa i Yerusalemu. 
Isaiah66:14 Muzobibona, kand’ imitima yanyu izonezerwa, n’amagufa yanyu azototahara nk’ubgatsi bubisi, kand’ ukuboko kw’ Uhoraho kuzomenyekana mu basavyi biwe, kand’ azorakira abansi biwe." 
Isaiah66:15 Kuk’ Uhoraho azozanana n’ umuriro, kand’ imikogote yiwe izoba imeze nk’agashururu; kugira ngo yīmarishe ishavu uburake bg’inkazi, abahanishe imbeya z’ umuriro." 
Isaiah66:16 Kuk’ Uhoraho azocira abantu bose amateka, ayacishe umuriro n’inkota yiwe, kand’ abazokwicwa n’Uhoraho bazoba ari benshi." 
Isaiah66:17 Abiyeza bakiyuhagira kugira ngo baje mu bigabiro barōngōye, abarya inyama z’ ingurube n’iz’ ivyikwega hasi n’ imbeba, abo bose bazoshirira icarimwe, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah66:18 Kuko nzi ibikorwa vyabo n’ ivyiyumviro vyabo. Igihe kigiye kuza nzokoranya amahanga yose n’ab’ indimi zose; bazoza babone ubgiza bganje. 
Isaiah66:19 Kandi nzoshira ikimenyetso muri bo, abarokotse muri bo nzobatuma mu mahanga, i Tarushishi n’i Puli n’i Ludi mu bafozi b’imiheto, n’i Tubali n’i Yavani, mu baba ku kiyaga kure, aho bataribgumve ko ndi rurangiranwa, ntibabone n’icubahiro canje; maze bazokwīgānira amahanga icubahiro canje." 
Isaiah66:20 Nuko bazozana bene wanyu bose babakūye mu mahanga yose kw ishikanwa ryanje Uhoraho, bazoza bagendera ku mafarasi no mu mikogote ikwegwa na yo, no mu nderuzo no ku nyumbu no ku ngamiya, bashike ku musozi wanje wera Yerusalemu, ni k’Uhoraho agize; bizoba nk’ ukw Abisirayeli bahora bazana amashikanwa yabo mu nzu yanje Uhoraho, bayazanye mu bintu bitunganye." 
Isaiah66:21 Kandi nzorobanuramwo bamwe mbagire abaherezi n’Abalewi, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah66:22 Kuko nk’ukw ijuru risha n’isi nsha, ivyo nzorema, bizohorah’ imbere yanje, ni k’ uruvyaro rwawe n’izina ryawe bizohoraho, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah66:23 Igihe kizoza uhereye mu mboneko z’ukwezi ukageza mu mboneko z’ukundi, no guhēra kw isabato ukageza ku yindi, abantu bose bazohora baza gusenga imbere yanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Isaiah66:24 Nuko bazosohoka baje kwitegereza imivyimba y’abangararije; kukw inyo zabo zitazopfa, kandi n’umuriro wabo ntuzime; kandi bazotera abantu bose ishishi." 
Jeremiah1:1 Amajambo ya Yeremiya mwene Hilukiya, wo mu baherezi bāba muri Anatoti mu ntāra ya Benyamini." 
Jeremiah1:2 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri we mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatatu Yosiya mwene Amoni, umwami w’i Buyuda, ari ku ngoma." 
Jeremiah1:3 Kandi ryongera kuza no ku ngoma ya Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya, umwami w’i Buyuda, gushitsa no kw iherezo ry’umwaka ugira icumi na rimwe Zedekiya mwene Yosiya, umwami w’i Buyuda, ari ku ngoma; rishitsa n’igihe ab’ i Yerusalemu bājanywe kw inyagano mu kwezi kwa gatanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Jeremiah1:5 riti Ntarakubumbira mu nda nari ndakuzi, kand’ utarava muri yo nari narakurobanuye; nagushizeho kuba ūvugishwa nanje mu mahanga." 
Jeremiah1:6 Maze ndavuga, nti Yō, erega Mwami Uhoraho, sinzi kuvuga, kuko nkiri muto." 
Jeremiah1:7 Arik’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Nta co uvuga, ngo Ndacari muto; kuk’ uwo nzogutumako wese ari we uzojako, kand’ ico nzokubarira cose akaba ari co ukwiye kuvuga." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ntuz’ ugire ubgoba kubgabo, kuko nzoba ndi kumwe nawe ngo nkurokore, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah1:9 Maz’ Uhoraho arāmvura ukuboko ankora ku munwa; Uhoraho arambarira, at’ Ehe nshize amajambo yanje mu kanwa kawe." 
Jeremiah1:10 Rāba uyu musi ngushizeho kugira ubushobozi ku mahanga no ku bihugu vy’abami, bgo kurandura no gusangangura, guhonnya no gukomvomvora, bo n’ukwubaka no guteragira." 
Jeremiah1:11 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako, rirambaza, rit’ Ubonye iki ga Yeremiya? Ndavuga, nti Mbona ishami ry’umurinzi." 
Jeremiah1:12 Maz’ Uhoraho aranyishura, ati Witegereje neza: kuko ndinda ijambo ryanje kugira ngo ndarishitse." 
Jeremiah1:13 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako ubugira kabiri, rit’ Ubonye iki? Ndavuga, nti Mbona inkono ibiragira; kand’ umuhuro w’imbere werekeye i burārūko." 
Jeremiah1:14 Nuk’ Uhoraho arambarira, at’ I burārūko hazoturuka ivyago bizoza biziye ababa mu gihugu bose." 
Jeremiah1:15 Kuko rāba, nzohamagara imiryango yose yo mu bihugu vy’abami b’i burārūko, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; bazoza, umuntu wese ashinge intebe yiwe y’ubgami mw ishikiro ku marembo y’i Yerusalemu, ahaherereye ku nzitiro zaho zose zihazitiriye, n’ahaherereye ku bisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Nanje nzokwātamīra amateka mbaciriye kubg’ ibibi vyabo vyose bākoze; kuko bāndetse, bakosereza imibavu izindi mana, bagasenga ivyakozwe n’intoke zabo." 
Jeremiah1:17 None rero wewe va hasi ukenyere, ubabgire ivyo nkubarira vyose: ntuhindishwe agashitsi na bo, kugira ngo noye kuzoguhindishiriza agashitsi imbere yabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Kuko rāba, uyu musi nguhinduye igisagara cubakiwe inzitiro, nguhinduye n’inkingi y’icuma n’inzitiro z’imiringa, bitazotsindwa n’igihugu cose, canke n’abami b’i Buyuda, canke n’abaganwa baho, canke n’abaherezi baho, canke n’abantu bo mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bazokurwanya, ariko ntibazokunesha, kuko nzoba ndi kumwe nawe ngo nkurokore, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Jeremiah2:2 riti Genda usemererere mu matwi y’ab’ i Yerusalemu, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nibuka urukundo rwo mu buto bgawe, n’ukuntu wannogera ukir’ umugeni; ukuntu wankurikiye mu bugaragwa, no mu gihugu kitigeze kubibgamw’ imbuto." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isirayeli yar’ uwo nirobanuriye, jewe Uhoraho, yar’ umushuzo mu bikikimvye vyanje. Abazomurya bose bazobakw igicumuro; ivyago bizobazako, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:4 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge nzu ya Yakobo, namwe miryango yose y’inzu ya Isirayeli;" 
Jeremiah2:5 uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati N’ibigabitanyo ki ba sogokuruza banyu bānsanganye, ko bāngiye kure, bagakurikira ibitagira ikimazi, na bo ubgabo bagahinduka imburakimazi?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Ko batārushe bībaza, bat’ Uhoraho ari hehe, yadukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, akaturōngōra mu bugaragwa, no mu gihugu c’ubgeranyange kirimw’ ivyobo, mu gihugu kigadutse c’igitūtu c’urupfu, mu gihugu kidacamw’ abantu, ata muntu n’umwe ahaba?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ushime nabashikanye mu gihugu cama kirumbuka, ngo murye ivyo cera n’ivyiza vyaco; ariko mumaze kucinjira mwāhumanije igihugu canje, muhindura umwandu wanje ikizira." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abaherezi ntibārushe bībaza, bat’ Uhoraho ari hehe? N’abafise ibango ry’ivyagezwe ntibāmmenye; abaragiye igihugu bārancumuyeko, kand’ abo nari kuvugisha basigaye bavugishwa na Bayali, bakurikira ibitagira ikimazi." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ni co gitumye nzokomeza kubūrana namwe, kandi nzobūrana n’abuzukuru banyu, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:10 Enda ni mujabuke ku bizinga vy’i Kitimu, murābe; mutume i Kedari, mwitegereze mushirutse umwete; murābe ko higeze kuboneka ikintu nk’iki." 
Jeremiah2:11 Mbega harih’ ihanga ryigeze gukāba imana zaryo, nah’ atar’ imana nya mana? Arikw abantu banje bo, icubahiro cabo bāgikāvye ibitagira ikimazi." 
Jeremiah2:12 Ni mwumirwe, mwa majuru mwe, muje mu gatengo, mujorerwe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze;" 
Jeremiah2:13 kukw abantu banje bakoze ibibi bibiri: bataye jewe, isōko y’amazi y’ubugingo, bakīyimbira ivyobo vyo kubīka amazi, ivyobo vyatobotsemw’ imishwena, bidashobora kugumamw’ amazi." 
Jeremiah2:14 Mbega Isirayeli n’umuja yaguzwe? Mbega yavukiye mu buja? None n’iki gitumye acika inyama z’ibisīga? 
Jeremiah2:15 Imigunza y’intambge yamwivugiyeko irenza amajwi, yahinduye igihugu ciwe imisaka; ibisagara vyiwe vyaturiwe, bisigaye ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah2:16 Abantu b’i Nofu n’i Tahapanesi bākujonjanze agahanga. 
Jeremiah2:17 Mbega si wewe wavyihamagariye, kuko wataye Uhoraho Imana yawe akikurōngōra mu nzira?" 
Jeremiah2:18 None rero n’iki kikujanye mu nzira ija muri Egiputa, ukaja kunywa amazi ya Shihori? Canke n’iki kikujanye mu nzira ija muri Ashuri, ukaja kunywa amazi ya rwa Ruzi?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Ivyaha vyawe ni vyo bizogukubita, n’ubuhemu bgawe ni bgo buzoguhana: uzomenya rero kand’ uzobona yukw ar’ ikintu c’icago kandi c’umururazi, kunta jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, no kutampa igitinyiro, ni jewe Umwami, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:20 Kuk’ uhereye kera wavunnye ingōgo yawe, ugacagagura imvuto, ukavuga, uti Sinkikugera inyuma! Mbere nta ho utāgiye uryama nka maraya ku musozi wose muremure no musi y’igiti cose gitōtahaye." 
Jeremiah2:21 Yamara nari naguteye ur’ umuzabibu w’ubgoko, ur’ urugemwe rutōretse rwose: none se wabaye ute ko wampindukiye igiti c’umuzabibu w’ikijakija w’icaduka?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Naho wokwiyuhagiza ivyitwa amagadi, ukīyabīrira n’isabuni nyinshi, ukugabitanya kwawe kuzoba ubgome imbere yanje, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:23 Uvuga ute, uti Sinanduye, kand’ uti Sinakurikiye Bayali? Itegereze inzira zawe zo mu mwonga, umenye ico wakoze! Ur’ ingamiya y’iriza y’impehu, igenda iharātwa;" 
Jeremiah2:24 ur’ indogoba y’inyeshamba imenyereye ubugaragwa, ihemba umuyaga igihe igomba kwima; iyo irinze, ni nde yoyigarura? Iziyironderakw isumba zose ntizirinda kwigora; mu kwezi kwayo kugeze zizoyibona." 
Jeremiah2:25 Enda ni wirinde, ibirenge vyawe ntibibure inkweto, n’imihogo yawe ntiyume; ariko waravuze, ut’ Oyaye, n’unyiziguruke; kuko jewe ngomwe imana z’inyamahanga, nkaba ari zo nkurikiye." 
Jeremiah2:26 Nk’ukw igisuma kimāramāra iyo gifashwe, ni ko n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazomāramāra, bo n’abami babo n’abaganwa babo n’abaherezi babo na ba kamenyi babo;" 
Jeremiah2:27 ababgira ikigegene, bati Ni wewe data; bakabgira ibuye, bati Ni wewe wamvyaye: kuko banteye ibitugu, ntibabe bakinshirakw amaso; ariko mu gihe c’ivyago vyabo bazotakamba, bati Haguruka udukize." 
Jeremiah2:28 None se za mana zawe wironkeye ziri hehe? Ni zihaguruke, namba zishobora kugukiza mu gihe c’ivyago vyawe: kuk’ ukw ibisagara vyawe bingana, ewe Buyuda, ari kw imana zawe zingana." 
Jeremiah2:29 N’iki kibagombesha kubūrana nanje? Mwese mwarancumuyeko, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah2:30 Nakubise abo mu gihugu canyu, ariko nigoreye ubusa; banse guhaha; inkota zanyu ubganyu zāriritse ba kamenyi banyu nk’intambge itikiza." 
Jeremiah2:31 Yemwe runganwe rw’iki gihe, ni murābe ijambo ryanje, jewe Uhoraho. Mbeg’ Abisirayeli nababereye ubugaragwa? Canke se nababereye igihugu c’umwiza w’umuzitanya? N’iki gituma abantu banje bavuga, bati Turidohoye: ntitukigomba kukugarukako?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Mbeg’ umwigeme yoshobora kwibagira utugenegene twiwe? Cank’ umugeni yokwibagira umwitwikiro wiwe? Arikw abantu banje bānyibagiye imisi myinshi itoharūrwa. 
Jeremiah2:33 Ewe kuntu ugira amīsīgiranzira kugira ngo bakugomwe! Bitayeko wahavuye wigisha n’abagore b’abanyavyaha ingeso zawe! 
Jeremiah2:34 Mbere no ku mpuzu zawe haboneka amaraso y’abantu b’abakene wishe batagira igicumuro, kand’ utābafashe bamena inzu." 
Jeremiah2:35 Ariko naho bimeze birtyo, uravuga, uti Nta gicumuro ndiko; kand’ uti N’ukuri n’uburake yar’ andakiye bgashize. Rāba nzobūrana nawe, kuk’ uvuga, uti Nta caha nakoze." 
Jeremiah2:36 Ukubagiranira iki guhindura inzira yawe? Egiputa hazogutētereza, nk’uko Ashuri hagutētereje." 
Jeremiah2:37 Na ho nyene uzovayo witwaye impungenge; jewe Uhoraho ko nagaye abo wishimiye, nta co bazokumarira." 
Jeremiah3:1 Baravuga, bat’ Umuntu ni yirukana umugore wiwe bakavana, akābīrwa n’uwundi mugabo, mbeg’ uwo mugabo wiwe yosubira kumugarukana ukundi? Mbega n’igihugu nyene nticoba cononekaye? Nawe wīgize maraya ku būzure batari bake; non’ ugira ngo wongarukako? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije." 
Jeremiah3:2 Unamurira amaso ku mpinga mu ruharabuga, witegereze: mbeg’ aho batāryamanye nawe ni hehe? Wabategeye ku mayira, nk’uk’ Umwarabo ategera mu bugaragwa; wononesheje igihugu ubusambanyi bgawe n’ivyaha vyawe." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ni co gitumye imvura ibuzwa, ntigwe no mu gihe cobaye urushana; yamara na ho nyene wāraritse uruhanga nka maraya, ntiwaruha ugira n’udusoni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Mbe ntiwoca uhēra ubu ukantakambira, uti Muvyeyi wanje, ni wewe wandōngōra mu buto bganje?" 
Jeremiah3:5 uti Mbeg’ uzohorana uburake imisi yose? Uzobgamana gushitsa kw iherezo? Mbega si wewe wavuze ibintu bibi, ugatak’ ukabikora, ukīgira uk’ ugomba?" 
Jeremiah3:6 Kandi ku ngoma y’umwami Yosiya, Uhoraho arambarira, ati Mbega wabonye ico Isirayeli Inamusubiranyuma yakoze? Yadūze umusozi wose muremure, akaja no musi y’igiti cose gitōtahaye, akīhindurirayo maraya." 
Jeremiah3:7 Amaze gukora ivyo vyose, naravuze, nt’ Azongarukako; maze ntiyagaruka; kandi mwene nyina Yuda Inamuryarukanyi arabibona." 
Jeremiah3:8 Mmaze kwirukana Isirayeli Inamusubiranyuma, no kumuha icete c’uko tuvāvānura, ku nyanduruko y’uko yasambanye, na ho nyene mbona mwene nyina Yuda Inamuryarukanyi ata kōba agize: na we n’uko, aragenda yihindura maraya." 
Jeremiah3:9 Maz’ igihugu gica cononekara, kuko Isirayeli yabaye vyenywe mu busambanyi bgiwe, agasambana n’amabuye n’ibigegene." 
Jeremiah3:10 Kandi nah’ ivyo bimeze birtyo, mwene nyina Yuda Inamuryarukanyi ntiyangarutseko n’umutima wose atar’ ukugaruka mu buryarya, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah3:11 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Isirayeli Inamusubiranyuma yiyerekanye kw ar’ umunyakuri kuruta Yuda Inamuryarukanyi." 
Jeremiah3:12 Genda uvuge aya majambo werekeye i burārūko, uti Garuka, yewe Isirayeli Inamusubiranyuma, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze. Sinzokurābana ishavu, kuko nd’ umunyembabazi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi sinzokwamana uburake imisi yose." 
Jeremiah3:13 Pfa kwemera gusa ukugabitanya kwawe, ko wancumuyeko, jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, ugakwiragira irya n’ino ku mana z’inyamahanga musi y’igiti cose gitōtahaye, ntiwumvire ijwi ryanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah3:14 Garuka, mwa bantu basubiye inyuma, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kuko jewe nd’ umugabo wanyu; kandi nzobagarukana i Siyoni, umwe ndamukūye mu gisagara kimwe, babiri mu muryango umwe;" 
Jeremiah3:15 mbahe abungere bameze nk’uk’ umutima wanje ugomba, bazobaragirana ubgenge no gutahura." 
Jeremiah3:16 Maze mur’ iyo misi, ni mwamara kugwira no kurondoka mu gihugu, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ntibazoba bakivuga isandugu y’isezerano ryanje, jewe Uhoraho, kandi ntibazoba bakiyiyumvira canke ngo bayibuke; ntibazoba bakiyikumbura, canke ngo babe bagisubira kubāza iyindi." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ico gihe bazokwita Yerusalemu intebe y’ubgami bganje, jewe Uhoraho, kand’ amahanga yose azokoranirizwa i Yerusalemu mw izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho: ntibazoba bakigendera ukundi mu budadarare bg’imitima yabo mibi." 
Jeremiah3:18 Mur’ iyo misi ab’ inzu ya Yuda bazogendana n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, bazanane bava mu gihugu c’i burārūko, baza mu gihugu nahaye ba sogokuruza banyu k’umwandu." 
Jeremiah3:19 Ariko narībajije, nti Nogushira nte mu bana banje, nkaguha igihugu c’igikundiro, nkaguha umwandu mwiza uruta iy’ ayandi mahanga yose? Nari naravuze, nti Muzonyita umuvyeyi wanyu, kandi ntimuzokebanuka ngo mumve inyuma." 
Jeremiah3:20 Ariko nk’uk’ umugore aryāruka umugabo wiwe akamuta, uko ni ko namwe mwandyārutse, mwebge ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah3:21 Ijwi rirumvikanira ku mpinga mu ruharabuga, ry’ukurira no kwinginga kw’Abisirayeli, kuko bāgoretse inzira yabo, bakanyibagira jewe Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Garuka, mwa bantu basubiye inyuma, nzoharira ugusubira inyuma kwanyu. Ehe tukugarutseko, kukw ari wewe Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah3:23 N’ukuri kwishimira ugutabarwa kuva ku misozi n’ukw’ ubusa, bo n’akarūru ko ku misozi miremire: n’ukuri Uhoraho Imana yacu muri we ni ho har’ agakiza k’Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Arik’ uhereye no mu buto bgacu, ivy’ akamāramāza ni vyo vyāmaze ivyāvuye mu butame bga ba sogokuruza; vyāmaze imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo, n’abahungu babo n’abakobga babo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ni turambarare hasi mu gatētereza kacu, twipfuke ubumāramāre bgacu; kuko twacumuye k’Uhoraho Imana yacu, twe na ba sogokuruza, kuva mu buto bgacu gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi, ntitwumvire Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Namb’ ugomba guhindukira, ewe Isirayeli, ni jewe ukwiye guhindukirira, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi ni wakūrah’ ivyo ukora vy’ubuyobe mu nyonga zanje, nuko nawe ntuzokūrwaho;" 
Jeremiah4:2 kand’ uzorahira uguhoraho kwanje Uhoraho mu vy’ukuri no mu biroranye no mu bugororotsi, maz’ amahanga azohezagiranira muri jewe, kandi ni jewe azokwirata." 
Jeremiah4:3 Uku ni k’Uhoraho abarira abagabo b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu, ati Ni mumene imishike yanyu, mureke kubiba mu mahwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Enda ni mukebge, munyiyegurire jewe Uhoraho, mukūreh’ ukudakebga kwo mu mitima yanyu, mwebge bagabo b’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu; ubushangashirwe bganje bgoye kurabagiza nk’umuriro, bukarurumba ntihagire ūshobora kubuzimya, kubg’ ibibi mukora." 
Jeremiah4:5 Musemererere i Buyuda, mwamamaze i Yerusalemu, muti Mutabarishe inzamba mu gihugu, musemereze ijwi rirenga, muti Ni mwēgerane, duhungire mu bisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro." 
Jeremiah4:6 Mushinge ibendera aherekeye i Siyoni: muhunge mwikize, ntimutebagane: kukw ehe rāba, nzanye ivyago biturutse i burārūko, n’ukugeseza gukomeye." 
Jeremiah4:7 Intambge isokorotse mu gisaka cayo, ni yo mugeseza w’amahanga; ifashe inzira, isokorotse ahantu hayo, kugira ngw itikize igihugu canyu, ibisagara vyanyu ngo bisigare ar’ imisaka, ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah4:8 Kubg’ ivyo mukenyere amagunira, mucure umunihiro, muboroge: kuk’ uburake bganje bg’inkazi, jewe Uhoraho, budasubiye inyuma ngo bubaveko." 
Jeremiah4:9 Maze kur’ uwo musi, umutima w’umwami uzoranduka, n’imitima y’abaganwa, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kand’ abaherezi bazokwumirwa, ba kamenyi batangare." 
Jeremiah4:10 Maze ndavuga, nt’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho! Mbega ko wahenze rwose ubu bgoko n’i Yerusalemu, wavuze ngo Muzoba amahoro: kandi non’ inkota ikaba igeramiye amagara yabo!" 
Jeremiah4:11 Ico gihe hazobarirwa ubu bgoko n’i Yerusalemu, ng’ Umuyaga w’indugumba uturutse mu ruharabuga rwo ku mpinga z’imisozi yo mu bugaragwa uje utōmereye wa mukobga, ari bo bantu banje, kandi ntuzoba nk’uwo gutumura umuguruka cank’ uwo kugosora intete;" 
Jeremiah4:12 arik’ umuyaga uruta ben’ uyo uzovayo ari jewe ndawugomoye: mur’ aka kanya ngira mbacirekw amateka. 
Jeremiah4:13 Eh’ azodūga aze nk’ibicu, n’imikogote yiwe izoza nk’agashururu; amafarasi yiwe azorusha inkukuma kunyaruka. Tubonye ibara! Turageseye!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Ewe Yerusalemu, ni wuhagire umutima wawe ivyaha, kugira ng’ ukizwe. Uzogeza ryari kwama usembereza ivyiyumviro vyawe bibi mu mutima?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Kuko humvikana ubutumwa buturutse i Dani, kandi buturutse no mu misozi ya Efurayimu bubūra ivyago," 
Jeremiah4:16 buti Mubarire amahanga, mubūrire Yerusalemu, yukw abaje gutega ibico bariko baraza, bavuye mu gihugu ca kure, bīrahira ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’amajwi arenga." 
Jeremiah4:17 Bakikije Yerusalemu nk’abarinda ivyona umurima, kuko hangararije, ndabivuze jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah4:18 Ingeso zawe n’ibikorwa vyawe ni vyo bikuzaniye ibimeze birtyo; ivyo ni vyo nyishu y’ububi bgawe; ni koko n’ivy’ umubabaro, kandi bikora no ku mutima wawe." 
Jeremiah4:19 Amara yanje, amara yanje aradobangana! Nseserewe mu mutima wanje; umutima wanje umpagazemwo, sinshobora kwiyumanganya; ewe mutima wanje, ni kuko wumvise ijwi ry’inzamba, n’akarūru k’intambara!" 
Jeremiah4:20 Habūwe ubugesera bugerekeranye n’ubundi; kukw igihugu cose kinyazwe, amahema yanje anyazwe giturumbuka, mber’ ayo nashinze anyazwe mu kanya isase." 
Jeremiah4:21 Nzogeza ryari kubona ibendera, no kwumva ijwi ry’inzamba?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Ereg’ abantu banje n’ibipfu, ntibanzi; n’abana b’ibijuju, nta bgenge bagira: bagira ubgenge bgo gukora ibibi, ariko mu vyo gukora ivyiza nta co bazi." 
Jeremiah4:23 Nararāvye, mbona isi, nsanga ar’ imisaka irik’ ubusa gusa; n’ijuru n’uko, ata n’umuco rigira." 
Jeremiah4:24 Nararāvye, mbona imisozi, nsanga ihinda agashitsi, n’uturambi twose n’uko, turi mu gatengo." 
Jeremiah4:25 Nararāvye, nsanga ata muntu n’umwe ariho, n’inyoni zose zo mu kirēre zarahunze." 
Jeremiah4:26 Nararāvye, nsanga itongo ryamera rihindutse ubugaragwa, n’ibisagara vyaho vyose bisangangukiye imbere y’Uhoraho, n’imbere y’uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Igihugu cose kizoba imisaka; yamara sinzogiherengeteza rwose." 
Jeremiah4:28 Kubg’ ivyo isi izogandara, n’ijuru ryiraburanirwe: kuko mbivuze, kandi mbimaramaje, sinzokwigarura canke ngo nihindukize." 
Jeremiah4:29 Abo mu bisagara vyose bahungishijwe n’urwamo rw’abagendera ku mafarasi n’urw’ abanyamiheto; banyegera mu bisaka, būrira ku bitandara hejuru: igisagara cose gisigara ar’ umurara ata n’umwe akihaba." 
Jeremiah4:30 None weho, ni wanyagwa, uzogira ute? Naho wokwambara impuzu zisa n’agahama, ukīsakara utugenegene tw’izahabu, ukīraba amarangi mu maso, uzoba washarije ubusa: abūzure bawe baragukēngēra, barondera ingene bokwica." 
Jeremiah4:31 Kuko numvise ijwi nk’iry’ umugore aramutswe, ubusinzikare bg’ūrikw aravyara umwana w’uburiza, ijwi ry’umukobga w’i Siyoni ahuzagizwa, ata amaboko, at’ Ewe jewe ndagowe! Umutima wanje ugwiriye igihumura imbere y’abicanyi." 
Jeremiah5:1 Ni mwiruke hirya no hino mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu, murondere mwitegereze, mucakare no mu hiyaguye haho, namba mwobona umuntu yoba umugororotsi arondera ivy’ ukuri, nanje nzohaharira." 
Jeremiah5:2 Naho barahira uguhoraho kw’Uhoraho, n’ukuri barahira ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah5:3 Mbeg’ Uhoraho, inyonga zawe ntizitegereza ivy’ ukuri? Warabakubise, ntibābibabara; warabatūbije, banka guhaha: bākomantaje mu maso habo gusumvya ibuye; banse kugaruka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Maze ndavuga, nt’ Erega n’ukw ari ba nyarucari: n’ibijuju, kuko batazi inzira y’Uhoraho, ntibamenye n’ukuroranya kw’Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Reka nje ku bakuru, mvugane na bo; kuko bo bazi inzira y’Uhoraho, n’ukuroranya kw’Imana yabo. Ariko na bo nyene bāhūrije inama hamwe kuvuna ingōgo no gucagagura imvuto." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ni co gituma intambge yo mu kibira izobica, n’ibingira rigendagenda uko buhwibiriye rizobasahura, n’ingwe izotegera ku bisagara vyabo, maz’ ūbisokorokamwo wese atabagurwe; kuk’ ukugabitanya kwabo ari kwinshi, n’ugusubira inyuma kwabo kukaba kurenze urugero." 
Jeremiah5:7 Mbega noshobora nte kuguharira? Abana bawe barantaye, bīrahira izitar’ imana; mpejeje kubagaburira bagahāga, bāciye basambana, barema inteko i wabo w’abasambanyikazi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Bameze nk’impfizi z’amafarasi ahimvye yiruka irya n’ino, umuntu wese akaroherana, arondera umugore wa mugenzi we." 
Jeremiah5:9 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni k’Uhoraho abaza; mbeg’ ivyo umutima wanje ntuzobihōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo? 
Jeremiah5:10 Ni mwūrire ku nzitiro zaho, muhonnye; yamara ntimuherengeteze rwose: mukūreh’ amashami yaho, kukw atar’ ay’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah5:11 Kukw inzu ya Isirayeli n’inzu ya Yuda zandyarutse rwose, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bīhakanye Uhoraho, ngo Nta we; kandi ngo Nta vyago bizotuzako, nta n’inkota tuzobona cank’ amapfa;" 
Jeremiah5:13 ngw Ivy’ abavugishwa n’Imana n’ibitwarwa n’umuyaga, kand’ ijambo ryayo ntiriri muri bo: ngw Ivyo babūra birakaba ari bo bigarukako." 
Jeremiah5:14 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana Nyen’ ingabo, ati Ko bavuga ben’ ayo magambo, ehe ngira mpindure amajambo yanje umuriro mu kanwa kawe, ubu bgoko na bgo ndabuhindure inkwi, ubatongore." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ehe ngira mbazanire ihanga rivuye kure, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; n’ihanga rihambaye, n’ihanga ryamyeho kera, n’ihanga rivuga ururimi mutazi, mutoshobora no kwumva ico rivuga." 
Jeremiah5:16 Umutana wabo ni nk’imva irangaye, bose n’abantu b’abahizi." 
Jeremiah5:17 Bazorya ivyimburwa vyanyu n’ivyo kurya vyanyu, ivyo abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu boriye; bazorya imikuku yanyu n’amasho yanyu; bazorya imizabibu yanyu n’imisukoni yanyu; kand’ ibisagara vyanyu vyubakiwe inzitiro, ivyo mwishimira, bazobisanganguza inkota." 
Jeremiah5:18 Yamara no mur’ iyo misi na ho sinzobaherengeteza rwose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah5:19 Maz’ igihe bazobaza, bati Mbeg’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ivyo vyose yabidukoreye ku ki? nawe ni ho uzobabarira, uti Nk’uko mwataye Imana, mugakorerera imana z’inyamahanga mu gihugu canyu, uko ni ko muzokorerera abanyamahanga mu gihugu kitar’ icanyu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Mutāngāze ibi ku b’inzu ya Yakobo, muvyamamaze i Buyuda," 
Jeremiah5:21 mut’ Enda ni mwumve ibi, mwa bantu b’ibipfu, batagira umutima, bafise amaso ntibabone, bafise n’amatwi ntibumve:" 
Jeremiah5:22 muti Mbega nta n’ukuruha mumutinya? ni k’Uhoraho abajije; muti Nta guhindira agashitsi imbere yiwe, kand’ ari we yashinze umusenyi ng’ ubere ikiyaga akarimbi, ni co cagezwe kizokwamaho, ngo ntikikarēngāne? Mbere nah’ imipfunda yaco yosuriranya, ntiyowutsinda; naho yobomborana, ntiyowurēngāna." 
Jeremiah5:23 Yamar’ ubu bgoko bgo bufise umutima ugarariza, ugābagāba; bāragararije, baracika." 
Jeremiah5:24 Nta ho bīvuganya mu mitima, bat’ Enda twubahe Uhoraho Imana yacu, ni yo iduha imvura y’agatāsi n’iy’ urushana, nk’ukw ibihe bihaye ibindi; ni yo itugerera amayinga yashinzwe yo kwimburiramwo." 
Jeremiah5:25 Mut’ Ibigabitanyo vyanyu ni vyo bibujije ivyo, kand’ ivyaha vyanyu ni vyo bibīmishije ivyiza." 
Jeremiah5:26 Muti Kuko mu bantu biwe habonekamw’ abantu b’abanyakibi: baratega nk’ukw abatezi b’inyoni batega; batega umutego, bagafata abantu." 
Jeremiah5:27 Nk’ukw igisamba cokwuzuzwa izo nyoni, ni kw amazu yabo yuzuyemw’ ibigungano: ni co catumye bacika abahambaye, bakaba abatunzi." 
Jeremiah5:28 Bacitse ibisēme, barayagayaga; bakora ibibi vy’akarenzarugero: ntibabūrana impfuvyi mu manza ngo zibone kuroranirwa; kand’ urubanza rw’aboro ntibaruca." 
Jeremiah5:29 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; mbeg’ umutima wanje ntuzohōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo? 
Jeremiah5:30 Habonetse ikintu c’akumiza giteye ubgoba mu gihugu: 
Jeremiah5:31 ba kamenyi bavuga ibinyoma, kandi n’abaherezi, uko baganza kwose bagukūra kuri bo; kand’ abantu banje ni co bakunda: mbega none muzokora iki kw iherezo ryavyo?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Muhunge mwikize, mwebge Babenyamini, muve hagati muri Yerusalemu; muvugirize inzamba i Tekowa, kand’ i Beti‐hakeremu muhashire inderetsi yo gutabaza; kukw ivyago bisēsetse i burārūko, n’ukugeseza gukomeye." 
Jeremiah6:2 Umukobga w’i Siyoni mwiza yāmikaye, nzomurandura." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abungere bazomūzira, bari n’imikuku yabo; bazoshinga amahema yabo, bamushagaje irya n’ino; bazomurisha, umuntu wese ah’ aherereye:" 
Jeremiah6:4 bati Mutonde urugamba tumurwanye; ni mukūre hasi tudūge ku murango w’amaminangohe. Bat’ Ewe turagowe, kuk’ umusi ukuze, kand’ ibitūtu vy’ubgīra bikaba bimaze ibihugu!" 
Jeremiah6:5 Bati Ni mukūre hasi, tudūge mw ijoro, dusangangure ingoro ziwe." 
Jeremiah6:6 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ni mwicire ibiti, murundire Yerusalemu ikigunguzi co kwūririrako: ico gisagara gikwiye kūzirwa; nta kindi kiri muri co atar’ agahahazo." 
Jeremiah6:7 Nk’ukw iriba ridudubiza amazi yaryo, uko ni ko kidudubiza ibibi vyaco: humvikana umuryano n’ubunyazi muri co; ububabare n’inguma vyama imbere yanje na ntaryo." 
Jeremiah6:8 Kunda wigishwe, Yerusalemu, umutima wanje woye guhubanwa nawe; noye kuzohava nguhindura amatongo, igihugu kitakirimw’ umuntu." 
Jeremiah6:9 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Bazohūmba bamaririkanye amasigarira y’Abisirayeli, nk’uko bahūmba umuzabibu: subira uje uratuma ukuboko nk’uwamurira inzabibu mu bisamba." 
Jeremiah6:10 Nobarira nde ngw ambere icabona, kugira ngo bumve? Ereg’ amatwi yabo arazivye, ntibashobora kwumva: ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryahindutse agatukisha kuri bo; ntibakirinezererwa." 
Jeremiah6:11 Ni co gituma nuzuye ubushangashirwe bg’Uhoraho: bingoye kubuzina; burekurire ku bana bari mu nzira, no ku misore ah’iganamye: kuk’ umugabo azonyaganwa n’umugore wiwe, n’umutāma azonyaganwa n’ūgeze mu zabukuru." 
Jeremiah6:12 Ingo zabo zizogabirwa abandi, bo n’amatongo yabo n’abagore babo: kuko nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje ku baba mu gihugu, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah6:13 Kuk’ uhereye kuri nyarucari muri bo ugashitsa no k’ūhambaye, umuntu wese yifuza inyungu mbi; kand’ uhereye kuri ba kamenyi ugashitsa no ku baherezi, umuntu wese aragunga." 
Jeremiah6:14 Bāvūye igikomere c’abantu banje imirenzako, bavuga, bati N’amahoro, n’amahoro; kand’ ata mahoro ariho." 
Jeremiah6:15 Mbega har’ isoni bāgize, bamaze gukora ibizira? Eka nta dusoni na mba, nta n’ukumāramāra. Ni co gituma bazotembana n’abari ku mutembo; igihe nzobāzira bazogwaho, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah6:16 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Muhagarare mu mayira, mwitegereze, mubaze inzira za kera, inzira nziza iy’ ari yo, abe ari yo mujana, maze muzoronka uburuhukiro bg’imitima yanyu: ariko bo baravuga, bat’ Eka ntituyijana." 
Jeremiah6:17 Nabashiriyeh’ abashibamyi, nti Ni mwumvirize ijwi ry’inzamba; ariko bo baravuga, bat’ Eka ntituryumviriza." 
Jeremiah6:18 None rero mwa mahanga, ni mwumve ibigira bibabeko; ubimenye, wa koraniro ry’amoko;" 
Jeremiah6:19 ni wumve, wa si we, ehe ngira nzane ivyago kur’ ubu bgoko, vyandurutse mu vyiyumviro vyabo, kuko batumviye amajambo yanje, kand’ ivyagezwe vyanje bakaba bārabikēngereye." 
Jeremiah6:20 Bimaze iki kunkūrira ibintu bimoga i Sheba, na kanehe imota neza ivuye mu gihugu ca kure? Ibimazi vyanyu vyoswa simbishima, kand’ ivyo mukerera ntibimpimbara." 
Jeremiah6:21 None rero ni mwumve ivyo mvuze jewe Uhoraho: Ehe ngira nshire ibitsitaza imbere y’ubu bgoko: abavyeyi n’abana babo bazobitsitarirakw icarimwe; ababanyi na bagenzi babo bazoranduka. 
Jeremiah6:22 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Eh’ ubgoko buraje buvuye mu gihugu c’i burārūko; ihanga rikomeye rizovyutswa rive ku mpera y’isi." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bābiriye imiheto n’amacumu; ni ba ruburakigongwe, nta mbabazi bagira; ijwi ryabo ribomborana nk’ikiyaga, kandi bagendera ku mafarasi; bāzira mu rugamba icarimwe, nk’umuntu umwe, kugira ngo bagutere, ewe mukobga w’i Siyoni." 
Jeremiah6:24 Twumvise inkuru zavyo, amaboko yacu arareganuka: uburibge buradufashe, nk’ibise vy’umugore aramutswe." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ntimuruhe musohoka mu mirima, canke ngo mufate inzira: kuko hariy’ inkota y’umwansi, n’ibiteye ubgoba irya n’ino." 
Jeremiah6:26 Ewe Yerusalemu, wa mukobga ari bo bantu banje, kenyera amagunira, wikumbagaze mu minyota: vuza induru nk’ūyivugiriza umwana wiwe w’ikinege, uborogane akabonge kenshi; kuk’ umugeseza agira adushikeko giturumbuka." 
Jeremiah6:27 Nguhinduye nk’uruganda n’umucuzi hagati mu bantu banje; kugira ng’ umenye ingeso zabo uzigerageze. 
Jeremiah6:28 Bose n’abagarariji bitovugwa, bagenda barementanya; bameze nk’imiringa n’ivyuma; bose bakora ivy’ ubugunge." 
Jeremiah6:29 Imivuba ivugutana inkomezi, umuriro ugakūrah’ inkamba: bashishikarira ubusa kuvuguta, kukw abanyakibi batākūwemwo." 
Jeremiah6:30 Abantu bazobīta ifeza z’ibihonwa, kuk’ Uhoraho abashibuye." 
Jeremiah7:1 Ijambo rivuye k’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah7:2 riti Hagarara mu kirimba kirora ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, uhatāngārize iri jambo, uti Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge mwese b’i Buyuda, abaca mur’ ibi birimba ngo musenge Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah7:3 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Mutunganye ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu, nanje nzobabesha aha hantu." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ntimwizigire amagambo y’ibinyoma, avuga ngo Nguru urusengero rw’Uhoraho, nguru urusengero rw’Uhoraho, nguru urusengero rw’Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah7:5 Erega ni mwatunganya ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu, ni mwaca imanza ziri hagati y’umuntu na mugenzi we," 
Jeremiah7:6 ni mudahahaza ingenzi cank’ impfuvyi cank’ umupfakazi, ntimuvishirize amaraso y’ūtācumuye aha hantu, ntimugendanire izindi mana, bikababera icago:" 
Jeremiah7:7 nuko nanje nzobabesha aha hantu, mu gihugu nahaye ba sogokuruza, uhereye ubga mbere ugashitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah7:8 Mbega ko mwizigiye amagambo y’ibinyoma adafise ikimazi! 
Jeremiah7:9 Mbega birashoboka ko mwiba, mukica, mugasambana, mukarahira ibinyoma, mukosereza Bayali imibavu, mukagendanira izindi mana mutigeze kumenya," 
Jeremiah7:10 maze mukaza mugahagarara imbere yanje mur’ iyi ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje, mukavuga, muti Turakijijwe: mwaheza mugakora ivyo bizira vyose?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Non’ iyi ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje, mbeg’ ihindutse nk’isenga ry’abambuzi mu maso yanyu? Erega jewe ni jewe ubganje navyiboneye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah7:12 Enda ni mugende ha hantu hanje i Shilo, aho natanguye gushira izina ryanje ngo rihabe, mwitegereze ivyo nahagiriye kubg’ ivyaha vy’abantu banje b’Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Kandi none, ko mwakoze ivyo bikorwa vyose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nkaba nari naravuganye namwe nzinduwe no kubabgira, ariko ntimwumve, nkabahamagara ariko ntimwitabe;" 
Jeremiah7:14 nuko rero, nk’uko nagiriye i Shilo, ni ko nzogirira iyi ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje, iyo mwizigira, ni ho hantu nabahaye, mwe na ba sogokuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah7:15 Kandi nzobahinda mbirukane mu nyonga zanje, nk’uko nahinze bene wanyu bose, ni bo ruvyaro rwose rwa Efurayimu." 
Jeremiah7:16 None rero nta co usengera ubu bgoko, ntubītwarire canke ng’ubasengere, kandi ntubanyingingire: kuko ntazokwumva." 
Jeremiah7:17 Mbega ntubona ivyo bakora mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Abana batoragura udukwi, ba se bagacana umuriro, abagore bagacumba, ngo bahakurire imitsima umwamikazi wo mw ijuru, kandi ngo basukire ibiturire izindi mana, ngo bantere ishavu." 
Jeremiah7:19 Mbega ni jewe baritera gusa? Si bo baryitera, ngo bibazanire ukumāramāra? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije." 
Jeremiah7:20 Nuko rero, uku ni ko mbivuze, jewe Umwami Uhoraho, nt’ Eh’ uburake bganje n’ubushangashirwe bganje bizosukwa aha hantu, uhereye ku bantu no ku bitungwa no ku biti vyo ku misozi no ku bimera vyo mu mirima; buzotongora, nta kizobuzimya." 
Jeremiah7:21 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Ibimazi vyanyu vyo kwoswa, enda ni mubirundanye hamwe n’ivyo gukererwa, mwīrīre inyama!" 
Jeremiah7:22 Kukw ata co nabariye ba sogokuruza banyu, canke ngo ngire ico mbabgira ku musi nabakūriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ku vyo kwosa ibimazi canke kubikerera:" 
Jeremiah7:23 arikw ijambo nabageze ryar’ iri: nababgiye, nti Ni mwumvire ijwi ryanje, maze nanje nzoba Imana yanyu, namwe muzoba abantu banje; mugendere mu vyo mbagera vyose, kugira ngo bibagendere neza." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ariko ntibāvyumvira, kandi ntibātega ugutwi kwabo, ariko bāgendera mu migabo yabo, no mu bukomantare bg’imitima yabo mibi, kandi bāsubira inyuma, ntibāja imbere." 
Jeremiah7:25 Uhereye umusi ba sogokuruza banyu bāviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa ugashitsa no kur’ uyu musi, nabatumyekw abasavyi banje bose, ari bo mvugisha, nama nzindurwa uko bukeye no kubatuma:" 
Jeremiah7:26 ariko na ho nyene ntibānyumvira, canke ngo batege ugutwi kwabo, ariko bagamika amazosi yabo; bagatako bagakora ibibi birengeye ivya ba sekuruza." 
Jeremiah7:27 Nawe naho wobabgira ayo majambo yose ntibazokwumva; kandi naho wobahamagara ntibazokwitaba. 
Jeremiah7:28 Ubabgire, ut’ Ubu ni bgo bgoko butumviye Uhoraho Imana yabo, ntibemere kwigishwa: ukuri kurapfuye, kurazimiriye mu kanwa kabo." 
Jeremiah7:29 Ni wiharangure umushatsi, ewe Yerusalemu, uwushibure; uheze uturike uborogere ku mpinga mu ruharabuga; kuk’ Uhoraho yaciye ab’ uru runganwe yarakiye, akabaheba." 
Jeremiah7:30 Kuk’ uruvyaro rwa Yuda bakoze ibibi mu nyonga zanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; bashize ibintu vyabo vy’ubuyobe mu ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje, ngo bayihumanye." 
Jeremiah7:31 Batavye ibitabo i Tofeti, ahahanamiye umwonga wa mwene Hinomu, ngo bahosereze abahungu babo n’abakobga babo mu muriro, babatanze kw ibimazi; ar’ ikintu ntābageze, kitigeze no kuza mu mutima wanje." 
Jeremiah7:32 None rer’ umve, imisi igira ize, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ntihazoba hacitwa Tofeti, canke ngo hitwe Umwonga wa mwene Hinomu; ariko hazokwitwa Umwonga w’ Imihindigiti, kuko bazohamba i Tofeti gushitsa aho batazoba bagishigaje n’akanya k’aho bahamba." 
Jeremiah7:33 Kand’ imivyimba y’ubu bgoko izoba inyama z’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre, n’iz’ ibikōko vyo kw isi, ata wo kuvyirukana ariho." 
Jeremiah7:34 Maze mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu nzohaca ijwi ry’ibitwengo n’iry’ umunezero, bo n’ijwi ry’umukwe n’iry’ umugeni: kukw igihugu kizoba gicitse amatongo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Ico gihe, ni k’Uhoraho agize, bazozura amagufa y’abami b’Abayuda, n’ay’ abaganwa babo, n’ay’ abaherezi, n’aya ba kamenyi, n’ay’ ababa i Yerusalemu, bayakūre mu mva zabo:" 
Jeremiah8:2 bazoyanikira musi y’izuba n’ukwezi n’ingabo zose z’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru, ivyo bākunda bakabisaba bakabigendanira bakabishishikarira bakabisenga: ntazosubira kwegeranywa ngw ahambge, arikw azoba nk’intabire yometse ku misozi." 
Jeremiah8:3 Kand’ amasigarira yose azoba asigaye kur’ uyu muryango mubi azohitamw’ urupfu kuruta kubaho, ni bo bazoba basigaye ahantu hose aho nzoba narabirukaniye, ni jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mbivuze." 
Jeremiah8:4 Kand’ ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho abaza, ati Mbeg’ abantu iyo batemvye ntibasubira kuvyuka? Cank’ umuntu iy’ ahuvye inzira ntasubira kugaruka?" 
Jeremiah8:5 None rero n’iki cashubije inyuma aba bantu b’i Yerusalemu, bagasubira inyuma akagīrīre? Bakobereza ubugunge, bakanka kugaruka." 
Jeremiah8:6 Narateze ugutwi ndumviriza, ariko nta ho bavuga ukuri: nta muntu yihannye ibibi vyiwe, ngo yibaze, ati Mbeg’ ico nakoze n’igiki? Umuntu wese apfa guhuruduka, akajana inzira yiwe, ameze nk’ifarasi igenda akabushungwe yirukira mu ntambara." 
Jeremiah8:7 Mber’ igisīga sarumfune co mu kirēre kizi ibihe vyaco cāgerewe, kand’ intunguru n’intamba n’inyanāna bimenya ibihe vyavyo vyo kuziramwo; arikw abantu banje bo ntibazi ibgirizwa ryanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah8:8 Muvugira iki, muti Tur’ abanyabgenge, kandi mut’ Ivyagezwe vy’Uhoraho bibana natwe? Ereg’ abanditsi banyu bandikishije ikaramu y’ibinyoma, banditse ibitar’ ivy’ ukuri." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abanyabgenge baratēterewe, barajorewe, bafashwe mpiri: erega n’uko bāgaye ijambo ryanje Uhoraho; mbeg’ ubgenge buri muri bo n’ubuki?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ni co gitumye abagore babo nzobaha abandi, n’amatongo yabo nkazoyaha abandi bakayegukira: kuk’ umuntu wese, uhereye kuri nyarucari muri bo ugashitsa no k’ūhambaye wo muri bo, yifuza inyungu mbi: kand’ uhereye kuri ba kamenyi ugashitsa no ku baherezi, umuntu wese aragunga." 
Jeremiah8:11 Kandi bāvūye imirenzako igikomere ca wa mukobga ari bo bantu banje, bavuga, bati N’amahoro, n’amahoro; kand’ ata mahoro ariho." 
Jeremiah8:12 Mbega har’ isoni bāgize, bamaze gukora ibizira? Eka nta dusoni na mba, nta n’ukumāramāra. Ni co gituma bazotembana n’abari ku mutembo; igihe nzobazira bazogwaho, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah8:13 Nzobanzura rwose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze: nta nzabibu zizoba zikiba ku muzabibu, cank’ insukoni ku musukoni, n’ibibabi bizokabirana; kand’ ibintu nabahaye bizobavako." 
Jeremiah8:14 Mbega none n’iki kikitwicaritse? Enda ni mwegerane, tuje mu bisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro, twumireyo; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu atwumije, aduhaye amazi y’ubumara ngo tuyanywe, kuko twacumuye k’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah8:15 Twiteze amahoro, ariko nta vyiza vyaje; twiteze igihe co kuvūrwa, ariko habah’ ibiteye ubgoba." 
Jeremiah8:16 Gufuhagira kw’amafarasi yiwe kwumvikana i Dani; igihugu cose gihindishwa agashitsi no kwumva kuroherana kw’amafarasi yiwe y’intambara; kuko baje, kandi bākegese igihugu n’ibiri muri co vyose, bo n’igisagara n’ababa muri co bose." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ehe ngira ndungike inzoka z’imvuvyi muri mwebge, zitazoshobora kugundwa, ariko zizobakomora, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah8:18 Icompa nkabona uko nomarwa umubabaro! Umutima wanje undendebukiyemwo. 
Jeremiah8:19 Umve, ijwi ry’ugutakamba kw’umukobga, ari we bgoko bgacu, rituruka hirya no hino mu gihugu, riti Mbeg’ Uhoraho ntakiba i Siyoni? Mbeg’ Umwami waho si ho akiri? Mbega na bo n’iki catumye bandakisha ibishushanyo vyabo bibājwe, n’ ivy’ imburakimazi vy’ivyaduka?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Bat’ Igihe c’iyimbura kirashize, ici rirahise, natwe ntituragakira." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ereg’ ikibabaje wa mukobga ari bo bgoko bgacu, nanje kirambabaje: ndiraburaniwe, mfashwe n’agatengo." 
Jeremiah8:22 Mbeg’ i Gileyadi ntihariy’ umuti wo gusomōra? Nta muvūzi abayo? None n’iki cabujije uruguma rwa wa mukobga ari bo bgoko bgacu ko rukira? 
Jeremiah9:1 Icompa umutwe wanje ukuzuramw’ amazi, amaso yanje akaba isōko y’amosozi, kugira ngo name ndira ku murango no mw ijoro, ndirira abishwe ba wa mukobga, ari bo bgoko bgacu!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Icompa nkaja mu bugaragwa mu ndāro y’abahita, kugira ngo nte ubgoko bgacu, ndabuvemwo! Kuko bose ar’ abasambanyi, bakaba umuhari w’abagabo baryarukana." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bafora ururimi rwabo nk’umuheto, kugira ngo barekure ibinyoma; bācitse abahambaye mu gihugu, ariko batabiheshejwe n’ukuri: kuko bava mu bibi bakaja mu bindi, kandi ntibammenye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah9:4 Mwiyubarane, umuntu wese yiyubare umubanyi wiwe, kandi ntihagire uwo muri mwebge yizigira mugenzi we: kuk’ umuntu wese agendanira ubugunge mugenzi we, kand’ umubanyi w’umuntu wese agenda amurementaniriza." 
Jeremiah9:5 Kand’ umuntu wese ahenda umubanyi wiwe, ntibavugane ukuri: bātoje ururimi rwabo kuvuga ibinyoma; bīgōza gukora ivy’ ukugabitanya." 
Jeremiah9:6 Ereg’ ah’ uba ni hagati mu binyoma; ibinyoma ni vyo bibankisha kummenya, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah9:7 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Ehe nzobavugutira, mbagerageze; ikindi nogirira wa mukobga ari bo bantu banje n’iki?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Ururimi rwabo n’umwampi wica; ruvuga ibinyoma; umuntu wese avugana n’umubanyi wiwe ivy’ amahoro mu kanwa kiwe, ariko mu mutima wiwe aba amuryamiye." 
Jeremiah9:9 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma nisidukira? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; mbeg’ umutima wanje ntuzobihōra ubgoko bumeze burtyo? 
Jeremiah9:10 Ngira ndirire imisozi ndayiborogere, ncurire akanihiro amātsi yo mu biyaya, kuko haturiwe, ata wukihaca, kand’ ata wucumva kwābagirana kw’amasho; inyoni zo mu kirēre bo n’ibikōko birahunze, biragiye." 
Jeremiah9:11 Kand’ i Yerusalemu nzohahindura ibirundo vy’amasakamburira, n’i wabo w’imbgebge; kandi n’ibisagara vy’i Buyuda nzobihindura amatongo, ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ni nde munyabgenge yotahura ivyo? Kandi ni nde yabibariwe n’akanwa kanje, jewe Uhoraho, kugira ngw avyamamaze? N’iki gitumye igihugu cononekara kigasha uburimbi nk’ubugaragwa, ntihabe hakigira ūhaca?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Maz’ Uhoraho aravuga, ati Ko bātaye ivyagezwe vyanje nabashize imbere, ntibanyumvire, canke ngo babigenderemwo," 
Jeremiah9:14 ariko bakagendera mu budadarare bg’imitima yabo, bagakurikira Bayali, nk’uko ba sekuruza bābigishije:" 
Jeremiah9:15 nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Rāba, aba bantu nzobagaburira ivy’ umururazi, mbahe amazi y’ubumara ngo bayanywe." 
Jeremiah9:16 Kandi nzobasābagiriza mu mahanga batigeze kumenya canke ba sekuruza babo: kandi nzorungika inkota ndayibakurikize gushitsa mbamaze. 
Jeremiah9:17 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Mwitegereze ivyo, muhamagare abagore bazi kuvuza induru, mutume ku bagore babizi cane, kugira ngo baze:" 
Jeremiah9:18 banyaruke, batangure kuborogera ivyacu, kugira ngw amaso yacu acundugute amosozi, amazi yisuke ava mu bigohe vyacu." 
Jeremiah9:19 Kukw ijwi ry’amaborogo yumvikana i Siyoni, rit’ Ewe kuntu tugeseye! Turatēterewe cane, kuko twirukanywe mu gihugu cacu, kandi bāsanganguye amazu yacu." 
Jeremiah9:20 Yemwe bagore, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, amatwi yanyu yumvirize ijambo ryo mu kanwa kiwe; mwigishe abakobga banyu kuboroga, umugore wese yigishe mugenzi we gucura akanihiro." 
Jeremiah9:21 Kuk’ urupfu rwūriye rugaca mu madirisha yacu, rukinjira n’i bukuru bgacu; rukaririka abana bari hanze, n’abasore bari mu mayira." 
Jeremiah9:22 Vuga, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Imivyimba y’abantu izokwandagara nk’amase ku gasozi, izogwa nk’isasira inyuma y’umwimbuzi, ata wo kuyegeranya." 
Jeremiah9:23 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Umunyabgenge yoye kwirata ubgenge bgiwe, cank’ umunyenkomezi ngo yirate inkomezi ziwe, cank’ umutunzi ngo yirate ubutunzi bgiwe;" 
Jeremiah9:24 arik’ uwirata, ni yirate ibi, ko yammenye, akantahura, yuko nd’ Uhoraho nkunda kugira imbabazi no guca iziroranye n’izigororotse mw isi: kukw ivyo ari vyo bimpimbara, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah9:25 Eh’ imisi igira ize, ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo mpane abākebge ariko batākebge nyakuri;" 
Jeremiah9:26 ni bo Banyegiputa n’Abayuda n’Abanyedomu n’umuryango w’Abamoni n’Abanyamowabu, bose abica amasoso, n’ababa mu bugaragwa; kukw amahanga yose ar’ intakebga, kand’ umuryango wose w’Abisirayeli n’intakebga mu mitima." 
Jeremiah10:1 Ni mwumve ijambo Uhoraho ababgira, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli:" 
Jeremiah10:2 uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ntimukige ingeso z’amahanga, ntimugahagarikwe imitima n’ivyitwa imbitsi ziboneka mw ijuru, kukw ari zo zihagarika amahanga imitima." 
Jeremiah10:3 Kukw imigenzo y’amahanga ar’ iy’ ubusa: baca igiti co mu kibira, amaboko y’umuhumbizi akagitunganisha incabiti." 
Jeremiah10:4 Bagisakara ifeza n’izahabu; bakagikomeresha imisumari n’inyundo, ngo coye kunyiganyiga." 
Jeremiah10:5 Ben’ ivyo bishushanyo bisa n’ibikanganyoni bishinzwe mu mirima, bitazi kuvuga: bikwiye guterurwa kuko bidashobora kwijana. Ntimukabitinye; kuko bidashobora gukora ikibi, canke ngo bibashe gukora iciza." 
Jeremiah10:6 Nta gihwanye nawe, Uhoraho, kuk’ uhambaye, kand’ izina ryawe rikaba irihambaye kubg’ ububasha bgawe." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ni nde atogutinya ga Mwami w’amahanga? kuko bikubereye; kuko mu banyabgenge bose bo mu mahanga, uko bāgatsindaje kwose nk’abami, ata wuhwanye nawe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ariko bose uko bangana n’ibiyingiyingi n’ibipfu; ukwigisha kw’igishushanyo guhwanye n’igiti buti. 
Jeremiah10:9 Bakoresha ifeza zātabatabge zavuye i Tarushishi, n’izahabu zavuye i Ufazi, ibikorwa vy’umuhinga, n’ivy’ amaboko y’umucuzi w’izahabu; bavyambika impuzu z’amasufe n’iz’ inyambarabami; vyose n’ibikorwa vy’abahinga." 
Jeremiah10:10 Arik’ Uhoraho ni we Mana y’ukuri; ni we Mana nzima, n’Umwami yamaho ibihe bidashira: uburake bgiwe buhindisha isi agashitsi, kand’ amahanga ntashobora kwihanganira ubushangashirwe bgiwe." 
Jeremiah10:11 Uk’ ukwiye kubabgira n’uku: ut’ Imana zitāremye ijuru n’isi, izo ni zo zizoherengetezwa mw isi no musi y’ijuru." 
Jeremiah10:12 Rurema ni yo yaremesheje isi ubushobozi bgayo, ikayihamangirisha ubgenge bgayo, ikagaranzuza ijuru ukumenya kwayo;" 
Jeremiah10:13 iy’ ishize ijwi hejuru haba gusūma kw’amazi yo hejuru; irandisha ibipfungu bikava ku mpera y’isi; iremera imvura imiravyo, kand’ isokorora umuyaga mu bubīko bgayo." 
Jeremiah10:14 Non’ umuntu wese kw ar’ ikiyingiyingi ata bgenge agira! Umucuzi w’izahabu wese azotēterezwa n’igishushanyo ciwe yasaruye, kukw igishushanyo ciwe yavugutiye mu nkero ar’ ic’ ibinyoma, kandi nta mpwemu ziba muri vyo." 
Jeremiah10:15 N’ivy’ ubusa gusa, n’igikorwa c’uruhendo; igihe cabo co kūzirwa bizoherengetezwa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Arik’ Umugabane w’ aba Yakobo we si kw ameze, kukw ari we Muremyi wa vyose; kand’ Abisirayeli ni bo muryango yagize ishamvu yiwe: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryiwe." 
Jeremiah10:17 Andūra utuntu twawe, wewe wugarijwe impande zose." 
Jeremiah10:18 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Eh’ ababa mu gihugu iki gihe nzobashiburira kure, nzobababaza kugira ngo bibonereko." 
Jeremiah10:19 Ewe jewe ndagowe, ndatonekaye! Uruguma rwanje rurambabaje: maze ndavuga, nt’ Ereg’ aya n’amagorwa nyene, nkwiye gupfa kuyihanganira." 
Jeremiah10:20 Ihema ryanje rirononekaye, imigozi yose iracitse; abana banje bamvuyeko, ntibakiriho: nta wugisigaye wo kwagura ihema ryanje, ngw abambe ibihuzu vyaryo." 
Jeremiah10:21 Kukw abungere bācitse ibiyingiyingi, ntibagīsha Uhoraho inama: ni co cababujije kumererwa neza, kand’ imikuku yabo yose yarasābagiye." 
Jeremiah10:22 Umve ijwi ry’impuha, ngw imivurungano ikomeye iraje, ivuye mu gihugu c’i burārūko, kugira ngw ibisagara vy’i Buyuda bigirwe imisaka, habe i wabo w’imbgebge." 
Jeremiah10:23 Uhoraho, nzi yukw inzira umuntu yogenderamwo atari we ashobora kuyigaba; ntibiri mu muntu agenda kwitunganiriza intambuko ziwe." 
Jeremiah10:24 Uhoraho, umpane, ariko bitarenze urugero: ntumpanane ishavu, ng’ uhave unzimiriza." 
Jeremiah10:25 Rekurira uburake bgawe ku mahanga atakuzi, no ku miryango itambaza izina ryawe, kuko bātsontsomeye aba Yakobo, mbere barabatsontsomeye barabaherengeteza, bākomvomvoye aho bāba." 
Jeremiah11:1 Ijambo rivuye k’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah11:2 riti Ni mwumve amajambo y’iri sezerano, muvugane n’abagabo b’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah11:3 ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, at’ Aravumwe umugabo atumva amajambo y’iri sezerano," 
Jeremiah11:4 iryo nihanikirije ba sogokuruza ku musi nabakūriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, muri rya tanure rivugutira ivyuma, nti Ni munyumvire, mukore vyose ivyo mbagera: uko ni ko muzoba abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yanyu;" 
Jeremiah11:5 kugira ngo mbone gushitsa indahiro narahiye ba sogokuruza, yuko nzobaha igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, nk’uko bimeze uyu musi. Nuko ndishura, nti Amen, Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah11:6 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Tāngāza aya majambo yose mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu, uti Ni mwumve amajambo y’iri sezerano, muyitondere." 
Jeremiah11:7 Kuko nihanikirije rwose ba sogokuruza banyu, mpereye umusi nabakūriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa ngashitsa no kur’ uyu musi, nzinduka mbihanikiriza, mvuga nti Ni munyumvire." 
Jeremiah11:8 Yamara ntibānyumvira, canke ngo batege amatwi, ariko bāgendera mu budadarare bg’imitima yabo mibi: ni co catumye mbashitsakw ivyo nababūriye vyose vyo mur’ iryo sezerano, iryo nabageze kwitondera, ntibaryitondere." 
Jeremiah11:9 Uhoraho arambarira, ati Har’ inama yagīwe mu bagabo b’i Buyuda no mu baba i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah11:10 Bahindukiriye ibigabitanyo vya ba sekuruza bāhora banka kwumva amajambo yanje; bakurikiye izindi mana ngw abe ari zo basaba: ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli n’ab’ inzu ya Yuda bishe isezerano ryanje nasezeranye na ba sekuruza. 
Jeremiah11:11 Nuko rero nzobazanakw ivyago batazoshobora gukira, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; bazontakambira, ariko sinzobumva." 
Jeremiah11:12 Maz’ ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu bazogenda gutakambira imana bāhora bosereza imibavu: ariko ntizizobakiza na gatoya mu gihe c’ivyago vyabo. 
Jeremiah11:13 Kuk’ ukw ibisagara vyawe bingana, ewe Buyuda, ari kw izo mana zawe zingana: kandi nk’ukw inzira zo muri Yerusalemu zingana ni ko mwagiye mushirah’ ibicaniro mubishiriyeho bga buyobe bganyu, ni vyo bicaniro vyo kwoserezakw imibavu Bayali." 
Jeremiah11:14 None rero ntusengere ubu bgoko, ntubītwarire canke ng’ ubasabire; kuko ntazobumva igihe bazontakambira babonye ivyago vyabo."
