Jeremiah11:15 Mbeg’ inkundwakazi yanje igikora iki mu nzu yanje, ko yakoze ibiteye isoni? Mbeg’ amasezerano yawe n’inyama z’ibimazi ugira ngo vyogukiza? Canke ben’ ivyo ugira ngo vyokurokora?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Jewe Uhoraho nari nakwise igiti ca elayo kiremvye giteye igomwe, kirikw imyelayo myiza: noneho naragituriye, har’ urwamo rw’ akarūru kenshi, kand’ amashami yaco arahimbaguritse." 
Jeremiah11:17 Kuko jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo nari narakubaditse, ari jewe nyene nkugeneye ivyago, kubg’ ibibi vyakozwe n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli n’ab’ inzu ya Yuda, ivyo bakoze vyo kundatsa, mu kwosereza Bayali imibavu." 
Jeremiah11:18 Maz’ Uhoraho, urabimmenyesha, ndabimenya: uca unyereka ibikorwa vyabo." 
Jeremiah11:19 Ariko nari mmeze nk’umwagazi w’intama w’ikirīga ujanwa kubāgwa; sinari nzi yuko bampigiye imihigo, bat’ Enda turandurane igiti n’ivyo camye, tumukūre mw isi y’abakiriho, kugira ngw izina ryiwe ntiribe ricibukwa ukundi." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ariko, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, wewe uca iziroranye, ukagerageza imishaha n’imitima, umpe kwibonera ingen’ ubīhōra: kukw ari wewe nitwayeko." 
Jeremiah11:21 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize ku vy’abagabo bo muri Anatoti barondera kukwica, bati Ntuz’ ugire ico uvuga mw izina ry’Uhoraho, twoye kuzokwica:" 
Jeremiah11:22 uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize rero, at’ Ehe nzobāzira: imisore yabo izokwicwa n’inkota; abahungu babo n’abakobga babo bazokwicwa n’inzara;" 
Jeremiah11:23 ntihazoba hakiri n’amasigarira muri bo, kuko nzozana ivyago ku bagabo bo muri Anatoti, ni wo mwaka wo kūzirwa kwabo." 
Jeremiah12:1 Ewe Uhoraho, iyo nkubūranije uboneka k’ugororotse; yamara na ho nyene nogomvye ko dusiguzanya: mbeg’ igituma abanyakibi bagenda bagubga neza mu kubaho kwabo n’iki? N’iki gituma abaryarukanyi bose bidibamira ngaho?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Warababaditse, mbere bashinga imizi; barakura, mbere no kwama barāma: uhora hafi mu kanwa kabo, arik’ ukaba kure y’imishaha yabo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ariko wewe, Uhoraho, uranzi; urambona, ugerageza umutima wanje ng’ urābe uk’ ukumereye: ubakwegere kubāgwa nk’intama, ubategurire umusi wo kubāgirwako." 
Jeremiah12:4 Igihugu kizogeza ryari kuboroga, n’ivyatsi vyo mu ntāra yose gukabirana? Kubg’ ibibi vy’abakibamwo ibikōko n’inyoni bikimazwemwo: kuko bavuga, bat’ Ivy’ iherezo ryacu nta ho azobibona." 
Jeremiah12:5 Ko wirukanye n’abiruka ku maguru bakakuruhisha, none woshobora ute gusiganwa n’amafarasi? Namb’ ugira amahoro gusa igihugu gitēkānye, non’ uzomera ute Yorodani rwigize akagabo?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Kuko na bene wanyu n’inzu ya so ari bo nyene bakuryarutse; ni bo nyene bakuvuza induru inyuma: nawe ntuz’ ubemerere, naho bokubarira amajambo meza." 
Jeremiah12:7 Nahevye inzu yanje, nataye ishamvu yanje; narekuriye inkundwakazi y’umutima wanje mu maboko y’abansi." 
Jeremiah12:8 Ishamvu yanje yampindukiye nk’intambge yo mu kibira: irantontomeye, ni co gitumye ndayanka." 
Jeremiah12:9 Mbeg’ ishamvu yanje ntiyampindukiye nk’ igisīga c’amabara y’uruyoberane? Mbeg’ ibindi bisīga ntivyagikonganije impande zose? Ni mugende mukoranye ibikōko vyo mw ishamba vyose, mubizane bikākagure." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abungere benshi bāhanyaguye uruzabibu rwanje, bāsiribanze umugabane wanje, umugabane wanje w’igikundiro bāwuciye ubugaragwa bg’ibitongozi." 
Jeremiah12:11 Bāhagize amatongo; haramborogera, kuko habaye ibitongozi; igihugu cose n’amatongo, kukw ata wigeze kubishirak’ umutima." 
Jeremiah12:12 Abanyazi baserutse ku mpinga zose mu ruharabuga: kukw inkota y’Uhoraho iriritse, uhereye ku mpera y’igihugu ugashitsa ku yindi: nta muntu n’umwe afise amahoro." 
Jeremiah12:13 Bābivye ingano, bimbura amahwa: bārīgōye, ntivyagira ico bibamarira; muzomāramāzwa n’ivyo mwejeje, kubg’ uburake bg’inkazi bg’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah12:14 Uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, ku vy’ababanyi banje bose babi, bīhaye ku manyama ishamvu neguriye abantu banje b’Abisirayeli, nt’ Ehe nzobashika mbakūre mu gihugu cabo, kand’ inzu ya Yuda nzoyibashikura." 
Jeremiah12:15 Hanyuma mmaze kubashika nzohindukira mbagirire ikigongwe; kandi nzobagarukana, umuntu wese asubire mw ishamvu yiwe, umuntu wese asubire mu gihugu cabo." 
Jeremiah12:16 Maze ni bigana umwete ingeso z’abantu banje, bakarahira izina ryanje, ni kwo guhoraho kwanje Uhoraho, nk’uko nyene bāri bārigishije abantu banje kurahira Bayali; ni ho bazokomezwa hagati y’abantu banje." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ariko ni banka kwumva, ubgoko buzokwanka nzoburandura; ndaburandure ndabuhonnye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah13:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho yambariye, ati Genda wigurire umukanda w’impuzu yera, uwukenyeze, ntuwukoze mu mazi." 
Jeremiah13:2 Nuko ngura umukanda nk’ukw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryambariye, ndawukenyeza." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ijambo ry’ Uhoraho rinzako ubugira kabiri," 
Jeremiah13:4 riti Jana wa mukanda wagura, umwe ukenyeye, uve hasi uje kuri Efurate, uwunyegezeyo mu mugāga wo mu gitandara." 
Jeremiah13:5 Nuko ndagenda, ndawuhisha i ruhande ya Efurate, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yangeze." 
Jeremiah13:6 Hanyuma hahise imisi myinshi, Uhoraho arambarira, ati Va hasi, uje kuri Efurate, ukūreyo wa mukanda, umwe nakubarira kunyegezayo." 
Jeremiah13:7 Nuko ndagenda nja kuri Efurate, ndaseregeta nkūra wa mukanda ahantu nari narawunyegeje: nsanga wa mukanda warononekaye, ata co ukimaze." 
Jeremiah13:8 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Jeremiah13:9 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Uko ni ko nzokwonona amanyama y’ Ubuyuda n’amanyama akomeye y’i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Aba bantu b’abanyakibi, uko bākanse kwumva amajambo yanje, bakagendera mu budadarare bg’imitima yabo, bagakurikira izindi mana ngw abe ari zo basaba, bazisenge, bazomera nk’uyu mukanda utakigira ico umaze." 
Jeremiah13:11 Nk’uk’ umukanda uramata ubura bg’ umuntu, uko ni ko nari naratumye inzu yose ya Isirayeli indamatako, bo n’inzu yose ya Yuda, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kugira ngo bambere ubgoko niharije, bampeshe izina ry’iritazirano, n’icubahiro n’ubgiza: ariko banka kwumva." 
Jeremiah13:12 None rer’ ubabgire iri jambo, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Umubindi wose uzokwuzuzwa vino. Na bo bazokwishura, bat’ Ugira ngo ntitwari tubizi yuk’ umubindi wose uzokwuzuzwa vino?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ni ho uzoca ubabgira, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe ngira nuzuze ababa mur’ iki gihugu bose ubudandahirwe, uhereye ku bami uko bakūranwa ku ngoma ya Dawidi, no ku baherezi, no kuri ba kamenyi, no ku baba i Yerusalemu bose." 
Jeremiah13:14 Nzobasekanisha nk’impfizi z’intama, umwe n’uwundi, abana na ba se, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze: nta kagongwe nzogira, cank’ impuhwe, cank’ imbabazi, ngo bimbuze kubageseza." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ni mwumve, mutege amatwi: nta co mugira ubgibone; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we avuze." 
Jeremiah13:16 Muheshe Uhoraho Imana yanyu icubahiro, atarazana umwiza, ibirenge vyanyu bitaratsitarira ku misozi icuze umwiza; namwe muciteze umuco akawuhindura igitūtu c’urupfu, akawugira umwiza w’umuzitanya." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ariko ni mwanka kuvyumva, umutima wanje uzoririra mu mpisho, urizwe n’ubgibone bganyu; amaso yanje azorira cane, acundugute amosozi, kuk’ umukuku w’intama z’Uhoraho unyazwe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Barira umwami n’umugabekazi, uti Ni mwicishe bugufi, mwicare hasi, kukw ibitsibo vyanyu bishajije mwambaye mu mutwe biriko birakoroka." 
Jeremiah13:19 Ibisagara vy’i bumanuko birugarijwe, nta wugicārūka: Abayuda bajanywe kw inyagano bose, ntihasigara n’uwa kirazira." 
Jeremiah13:20 Ni wunamure amaso, urābe abaje baturutse i burārūko: mbeg’ umukuku wahawe uri hehe, wa mukuku wawe mwiza?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Abo wironkeyekw abagenzi ni yabashira hejuru yawe ngo bakuganze, uzovuga iki, kand’ ari wewe wabiyigishirije? Mbeg’ umubabaro ntuzogufata nk’uw’ umugore ari ku nda?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Kandi ni wibaza mu mutima, uti N’iki gitumye mbonye aya? Umurengera w’ibigabitanyo vyawe ni wo watumye impuzu zawe zigukūrwako, ibitsintsiri vyawe bigasigara ar’ inkobe." 
Jeremiah13:23 Mbeg’ Umunyetiyopiya yoshobora guhindura urukoba rw’umubiri wiwe, cank’ ingwe yokwihindura amabara yayo? Ivyo bishobotse, namwe mwoshobora gukora ivyiza, mwebge abāmogoreye gukora ibibi." 
Jeremiah13:24 Nuko rero nzobashwiragiza, nk’ibishingwe bitwawe n’umuyaga wo mu bugaragwa." 
Jeremiah13:25 Ivyo ni vyo bizokubako, ni wo mugabane nkugereye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kuko wanyibagiye ukizigira ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah13:26 Nuko rero nanje nzogukūrakw impuzu, mfate ku musozo ndenze ku mutwe wawe, ubgambure bgawe buboneke." 
Jeremiah13:27 Nabonye ibizira vyawe, ni bgo busambanyi bgawe, n’ukuroherana kwawe, ni bgo bushakanyi bg’ubusambanyi bgawe, ku misozi no ku gahinga. Uzobona ibara, ewe Yerusalemu! Ko wanse kwezwa: mbeg’ uzogeza ryari?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya rivuga ivy’ uruzuba. 
Jeremiah14:2 I Buyuda haraboroga, amarembo yaho arihebuye, bicara hasi biraburaniwe; gutaka kw’i Yerusalemu kugiye hejuru." 
Jeremiah14:3 Abashingantahe babo barungika abana kuvoma, bashika ku mariba, basanga ata mazi; bagaruka imibindi yabo iri gusa: baramāramāra baratētērwa, bitwikira mu mutwe." 
Jeremiah14:4 Kubg’ isi yāse imigāga, kukw ata mvura igikoroka mu gihugu, abarimyi baramāramāra, bitwikira mu mutwe." 
Jeremiah14:5 Mber’ impongokazi yo mw ishamba iravyara, ita umwana wayo, kukw ata bgatsi." 
Jeremiah14:6 Indogoba z’inyeshamba zihagarara ku mpinga mu ruharabuga, zisama umuyaga nk’ imbgebge; amaso yazo ahwerezwa no kubura ubgatsi." 
Jeremiah14:7 Nah’ ibigabitanyo vyacu bitwagiriza, gira ico ukora kubg’ izina ryawe, Uhoraho we: kuko gusubira inyuma kwacu ari kwinshi, kandi twagucumuyeko." 
Jeremiah14:8 Wewe vyizigiro vy’Abisirayeli, umukiza wabo mu gihe c’ivyago, n’iki cotuma utubako nk’umuntu w’akavantara ari mu gihugu, canke nk’impirahisi yaka indāro y’ijoro rimwe?" 
Jeremiah14:9 N’iki cotuma uba nk’ umuntu atamāriwe, nk’umuhizi ayobewe gukiza? Yamara wewe Uhoraho, uri hagati muri twebge, kandi twitiriwe izina ryawe: ntuduhebe." 
Jeremiah14:10 Uku ni k’Uhoraho abarira ubu bgoko, at’ Ivyo bakunda n’ ukuyerera; ntibābujije ibirenge vyabo: ni co gituma Uhoraho atabemera; n’ubu yibuka ibigabitanyo vyabo, kand’ arabagīriye kubg’ ivyaha vyabo." 
Jeremiah14:11 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Nta co usabira ubu bgoko kugirirwa neza." 
Jeremiah14:12 Iyo bisonzesha sinzoruha numva ugutakamba kwabo; iyo bosa ikimazi, bazanye n’ishikanwa ry’ifu, sinzobākīrira: ariko nzobaranduza inkota n’inzara n’ikīza." 
Jeremiah14:13 Maze ndavuga, nti Yō! Erega Mwami Uhoraho, ba kamenyi bababgira, ngo nta ho bazobona inkota cank’ inzara, ariko ng’ uzobaha kugirira aha hantu amahoro y’ukuri." 
Jeremiah14:14 Uhoraho aranyishura, at’ Abo ba kamenyi bavuga ibinyoma mw izina ryanje: sinabatumye, nta co nabageze, nta co nababariye: babarotorera ivyo beretswe vy’ibinyoma, n’ indagu, n’ibitagira ikimazi, n’ ubuhuhuta bgo mu mitima yabo." 
Jeremiah14:15 None rero, uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, ku vya ba kamenyi bavuga mw izina ryanje, kandi ntābatumye, yamara bakavuga ngw Inkota n’inzara ntibizoba mur’ iki gihugu: mber’ inkota n’ inzara ni vyo bizorandura abo ba kamenyi." 
Jeremiah14:16 Kandi n’abo bantu baragurira bazoshiburirwa hanze mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu bishwe n’inzara n’inkota; kandi ntibazogira uwo kubahamba, bo ubgabo, cank’ abagore babo, cank’ abahungu babo, cank’ abakobga babo: kuko nzobasubizakw ibibi vyabo." 
Jeremiah14:17 Ubabgire rer’ iri jambo, ut’ Amaso yanje acunduguta amosozi ku murango no mw ijoro adahengeshanya; kuk’ umukobga w’inkumi, ari we bgoko bgacu, avunitse, ari n’imvune nini, ari n’uruguma rubi rwose." 
Jeremiah14:18 Iyo nsohotse nkaja ku gahinga, nsanga abariritswe n’inkota; nashika mu gisagara, ngasanga abazingamitswe n’inzara! Kuko ba kamenyi n’abaherezi bagendagenda mu gihugu ata co bazi." 
Jeremiah14:19 Mbega waciye Yuda ruhebga? Umutima wawe wanse Siyoni urunuka? N’iki gitumye udukubita, tukabura ikituvūra? Twari twiteze amahoro, ariko nta vyiza twabonye; twari twiteze igihe co kuvūrirwamwo, ariko tubona ibitugwisha igihūmura!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Ewe Uhoraho, twemeye ibibi vyacu, n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sogokuruza, kuko twagucumuyeko." 
Jeremiah14:21 Kubg’ izina ryawe ntutwanke urunuka; ntutītūze ingoma y’icubahiro cawe: n’utwibuke, ntiwice isezerano wasezeranye natwe." 
Jeremiah14:22 Mu bigirwamana vy’imburakimazi vy’ amahanga har’ ivyoshobora kurekura imvura? Cank’ ijuru ubgaryo ryoshobora kurekura iy’ umurindi? Mbeg’ ūbishobora si wewe Uhoraho Mana yacu? Ni co gituma tukwitega; kukw ari wewe waremye ivyo vyose. 
Jeremiah15:1 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Naho Mose na Samweli bohagarara imbere yanje, umutima wanje ntiwohangaza ubu bgoko: bahinde, bave mu nyonga zanje, bagende." 
Jeremiah15:2 Maze ni bakubaza, bati Tuje hehe? ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abagerewe gupfa, baje mu rupfu; abagerewe inkota baje ku nkota; abagerewe kigoyi baje muri kigoyi; abagerewe gufatwa mpiri bafatwe mpiri." 
Jeremiah15:3 Kandi ndabagereye ivyago bine, ni k’ Uhoraho agize: inkota yo kwica, n’imbga zo gutabagura, n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre n’ibikōko vyo kw isi vyo gutsontsomera no gutikiza." 
Jeremiah15:4 Kandi nzobagira akabarore mu bihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi, kubga Manase mwene Hezekiya, umwami w’i Buyuda, kubg’ ivyo yakoreye i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah15:5 Ni nde azokugirira akagongwe, ewe Yerusalemu? Ni nde azokuririra? Ni nde azokikama ngw abaze udukuru twawe?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Warantaye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, wasubiye inyuma; ni co gitumye nagushōreyek’ ukuboko nkaguhonnya; kwigarura kurandambiye." 
Jeremiah15:7 Nabagosoje urutaro ku marembo y’igihugu; nabakūyekw ibibondo, mponnya abantu banje: ariko ntibāhindukira ngo bave mu nzira zabo mbi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Abapfakazi babo baragwiriye kurusha umusenyi wo ku kiyaga imbere yanje: nabagomoreye abanyazi ku murango w’amashōka, ngomoreye nyina w’abahungu; namusutseko giturumbuka umubabaro n’ ibiteye ubgoba." 
Jeremiah15:9 Umugore yavyaye ndwi arahondobereye, aregutse; izuba ryiwe ryacokeye hakiri ku murango; aratēterewe, aramāramāye; amasigarira yabo nzoyagaburira inkota imbere y’ abansi babo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah15:10 Erega mama, mbonye ibara, kuko wamvyaye nd’ umutēzi w’ intambara, nd’ umutēzi w’amahane mw isi yose! Nta we nagurāniye kuzohabga ay’ inyungu, kandi nta bāngurānye ngo nze mbahe ay’ inyungu: arik’ umuntu wese muri bo aramvuma." 
Jeremiah15:11 Uhoraho arambarira, ati N’ukuri nzogukomeza umere neza; n’ukuri nzotuma abansi bagukomera ibōbo mu gihe c’ivyago no mu gihe c’amagorwa." 
Jeremiah15:12 Mbega har’ uwoshobora kuvuna icuma, kand’ ar’ icuma kivuye i burārūko, bo n’umuringa?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ibintu vyawe n’itunga ryawe nzobigomorera binyagwe ata biguzi, kubg’ ivyaha vyawe vyose, bihereye ku mbibe zawe zose." 
Jeremiah15:14 Kandi nzotuma bijanwa n’abansi bawe mu gihugu utazi: kuk’ umuriro ucanywe kubg’ uburake bganje, uzobatongora." 
Jeremiah15:15 Ewe Uhoraho, ivyo urabizi: nyibuka, ungendere, umpōre abandendereza; ntunkūreho, kubg’ ukwihangana kwawe: menya kw ari kubgawe ntukwa." 
Jeremiah15:16 Amajambo yawe yarabonetse, ndayarya; kand’ amajambo yawe yambereye akanyamuneza n’ibihimbaro vy’umutima wanje: kuko nitiriwe izina ryawe, Uhoraho Mana Nyen’ ingabo." 
Jeremiah15:17 Sinicaranye n’abaremye akarwi bitwengera, bihimbarirwa: nicaye ukwanje jenyene kubg’ ukuboko kwawe; kuko wanyujuje umwikomo." 
Jeremiah15:18 N’iki gituma uburibge bganje bgamaho, n’igisebe canje kikaba ikitavūrika, kikanka gukira? Mbega wombera nk’uruzi ruhendana, nk’amazi akamye?" 
Jeremiah15:19 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni wahindukira nzokugarukana, ubone guhagarara imbere yanje; kandi ni warobanura ivy’ ingirakimazi ukabikūra mu vy’imburakimazi, uzoba nk’akanwa kanje: abandi baze baguhindukirire, ariko weho ntuz’ ubahindukirire." 
Jeremiah15:20 Kandi mur’ ubu bgoko nzoguhindura uruzitiro rukomeye rw’imiringa; bazokurwanya, ariko ntibazokunesha, kuko nzoba ndi kumwe nawe ngo ngukize, nkurokore, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah15:21 Nzokurokora ngukūre mu maboko y’ abanyakibi, kandi nzogucungura ngukūre mu maboko y’abantu b’agaterabgoba." 
Jeremiah16:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzak’ ukundi gusha," 
Jeremiah16:2 riti Ntukābīre umugore, canke ng’ uvyarire abahungu n’abakobga aha hantu." 
Jeremiah16:3 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize ku vy’abahungu n’abakobga bavukira aha hantu, no ku vya ba nyina bābatwaye inda no ku vya ba se bābavyariye mur’ iki gihugu:" 
Jeremiah16:4 ati Bazopfa rubi: ntibazoborogerwa, ntibazohambga; bazoba nk’intabire yometse ku misozi: bazoba bamazwe n’inkota n’inzara; kand’ imivyimba yabo izoba inyama z’ibisiga vyo mu kirēre n’ibikōko vyo kw isi." 
Jeremiah16:5 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nturuhe winjira mu nzu y’abagandaye, ntuje kubaborogera canke kubaririra; kuko nkūye amahoro yanje kur’ ubu bgoko, bo n’imbabazi no kugirirwa neza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah16:6 Abakuru n’abato bazopfira mur’ iki gihugu: ntibazohambga, kand’ abantu ntibazobaborogera, canke ngo bikebagure, canke ngo babīmwēre ibimwerere:" 
Jeremiah16:7 kandi nta bazosangira ibiryazagu vyabo; abābuze se canke nyina ntibazobazanira ikarabo ryo kubibagiza umubabaro. 
Jeremiah16:8 Kandi ntuze winjire mu nzu y’amazimano ngo wicarane na bo, usangire na bo." 
Jeremiah16:9 Kuk’ ukw ari ko ngize, jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, nti Rāba aha hantu nzohaca ijwi ry’ibitwengo n’iry’ umunezero, bo n’ijwi ry’umukwe n’iry’ umugeni, mbikore mukibona mukiriho." 
Jeremiah16:10 Maze ni wamenyesha ubu bgoko ayo majambo yose, bazokubaza, bati N’iki gitumye Uhoraho atugenera ivyo vyago vyose bikomeye birtyo? Mbeg’ ukugabitanya kwacu n’iki? Cank’ icaha twakoze k’Uhoraho Imana yacu n’iki?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Uz’ uce ubabgira, uti N’uko ba sogokuruza banyu bāmutaye, ni k’Uhoraho agize, bakagendanira izindi mana, bakazisaba bakazisenga, na we bakamuta, ntibitondere ivyagezwe vyiwe;" 
Jeremiah16:12 kandi namwe mwakoze ibibi kurusha ba sogokuruza, kukw ehe rāba, umuntu wese muri mwebge agendera mu budadarare bg’umutima wiwe mubi, bigatuma mutamwumvira:" 
Jeremiah16:13 nuko rero ngw Azobirukana abakūre mur’ iki gihugu, muje mu gihugu mutigeze kumenya, mwebge canke ba sogokuruza banyu; muzohasabira izindi mana ku murango no mw ijoro; ngo Kukw atazobahangaza na gatoya." 
Jeremiah16:14 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Imisi izoza ntibazoba bakirahira uguhoraho kwanje jewe Uhoraho ko nakūye Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa," 
Jeremiah16:15 ariko bazorahira uguhoraho kwanje jewe Uhoraho ko nakūye Abisirayeli mu gihugu c’i burārūko, no mu bihugu vyose aho nzoba narabirukaniye: kandi nzobagarukana mu gihugu cabo nahaye ba sekuruza." 
Jeremiah16:16 Ehe nzotuma ku barovyi benshi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, bazobaroba; hanyuma nzotuma ku bahīgi benshi, na bo bazobahiga ku gisozi cose no ku karambi kose no mu vyobo vyo mu bitandara." 
Jeremiah16:17 Kukw inyonga zanje ziri ku nzira zabo zose: ntizinyegejwe ngo sinzibone, kand’ ibigabitanyo vyabo ntibihishijwe inyonga zanje." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ariko nzobanza kubahōra ibigabitanyo vyabo n’ivyaha vyabo ibihetangabo kabiri, kuko bāndurishije igihugu canje imivyimba y’ibimazi vyabo biteye ishishi, bakuzuza ishamvu yanje bga buyobe bgabo." 
Jeremiah16:19 Ewe Uhoraho, nkomezi zanje, gihome canje, buhungiro bganje ku musi w’amagorwa, amahanga azoza kuri wewe avuye mw isi yose iy’ iva ikagera, bavuge, bati Ba sogokuruza bacu nta kindi bārazwe atar’ ibinyoma n’ivy’ ubusa n’ibitagira ikimazi." 
Jeremiah16:20 Mbega kare ho har’ uwokwironkera izitwa imana, kandi zitari zo?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Kubg’ ivyo nzobatahuza, iri rimwe gusa nzobatahuza inganji yanje n’ubushobozi bganje; kandi bazomenya izina ryanje ko nd’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah17:1 Icaha ca Yuda candikishijwe ikaramu y’icuma, n’ akabuye gasongoye kitwa alimasi: canditswe ku bisate, ari vyo mitima yabo, canditswe no ku mahembe y’ibicaniro vyabo;" 
Jeremiah17:2 abana babo bibuka ibicaniro vyabo, n’ibigirwamana vyabo vya Ashera vyashinzwe i ruhande y’ibiti bitotahaye ku misozi miremire." 
Jeremiah17:3 Ewe musozi wanje wibonekeza mu gihugu, ibintu vyawe n’itunga ryawe ryose nzobigomorera binyagwe, bo n’ibitabo vyawe vyatabge ku mpinga z’imisozi, kubg’ ivyaha, bihereye ku mbibe zawe zose." 
Jeremiah17:4 Kandi nawe uzohomba ishamvu yawe naguhaye, ari wewe uvyihamagariye; nzotuma ukorera abansi bawe uri mu gihugu utazi, kuko mwadometse umuriro w’uburake bganje uzokwaka gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Jeremiah17:5 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Aravumwe umuntu yishimira abantu, akizigira inkomezi z’abari n’umubiri, umutima wiwe ukava k’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah17:6 Azoba nk’agasaka k’inkōkōre mu bugaragwa, kandi ntazobona ivyiza bimujeko; arikw azoba ahagadutse ahantu h’ ubgeranyange, igihugu c’umunyu kitabamw’ abantu." 
Jeremiah17:7 Arahiriwe umuntu yizigira Uhoraho, Uhoraho akaba ivyizigiro vyiwe." 
Jeremiah17:8 Kukw azoba nk’igiti gitewe i ruhande y’amazi, gishōrera imizi yaco i ruhande y’uruzi, kitumva izuba iyo ryatse, ariko kikāmana itōto; ntikizorinda kwiganyira mu mwaka w’uruzuba, kandi ntikizoharuruka kwama." 
Jeremiah17:9 Umutima uribesha kuruta ibindi vyose, urwaye indwara itavūrwa: ni nde yowumenya?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Ni jewe Uhoraho nsesa umutima, nkagerageza umushaha, kugira ngo ngerere umuntu wese ibikwiranye n’ingeso ziwe, n’ibikwiranye n’ivy’ ibikorwa vyiwe vyeze." 
Jeremiah17:11 Nk’ukw inkware ibundikira amagi itātaye, umuntu yironkera itunga mu buryo bubi ni kw amera: agicagatije imisi yo kubaho kwiwe rizomuvako, kw iherezo ryiwe azoboneka kw ar’ igipfu." 
Jeremiah17:12 Ahantu h’ahēra hacu ni ho ntebe y’icubahiro, ishizwe hejuru uhereye mbere na mbere." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ewe Uhoraho, vyizigiro vy’Abisirayeli, abagutaye bose bazorimarima; abakuvako bazokwandikwa mu mukungugu gusa, kuko bataye Uhoraho, ari we sōko y’amazi y’ ubugingo." 
Jeremiah17:14 Mvūra, Uhoraho we, nanje ndakira; undokore, nanje ndarokoka: kukw ari wewe shimwe ryanje." 
Jeremiah17:15 Erega barambaza, bat’ Ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri hehe? Ni rishike turābe!" 
Jeremiah17:16 Ariko jewe ubganje sinanse kuba umwungere nk’uk’ ugomba; sinifuje wa musi w’ivyago, nawe urabizi: ico navugishije akanwa cose car’ imbere yawe." 
Jeremiah17:17 Ntumbere ikinca ivutu: ni wewe buhungiro bganje ku musi w’ivyago. 
Jeremiah17:18 Abampīga ni bamāramāre, ariko jeho noye kumāramāra; ni bacike ivutu, ariko jeho noye kuricika: ubashitseko wa musi w’ivyago, ubageseze umurengera." 
Jeremiah17:19 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Genda uhagarare mu kirimba gihitamw’ abantu bose, ari co abami b’Abayuda bahora bacamw’ amaja n’amaza, uhagarare no ku birimba bindi vyose vy’i Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah17:20 ubabgire, uti Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge bami b’i Buyuda na Buyuda bgose, n’ababa i Yerusalemu mwese, abaca mur’ ibi birimba;" 
Jeremiah17:21 uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni mwirinde, ntimukagire ico mwiremēka na kimwe ku musi w’isabato, canke ngo mugicishe mu birimba vy’i Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah17:22 kandi ntimukagire icikorerwa musohokana mu nzu zanyu ku musi w’isabato, kandi ntimugire igikorwa na kimwe muwukorako: ariko muziririze umusi w’isabato, nk’uko nageze ba sogokuruza;" 
Jeremiah17:23 yamara bo ntibānyumvira, canke ngo batege amatwi, ariko bāgamika amazosi ngo boye kwumva, canke ngo bemere kwigishwa." 
Jeremiah17:24 None rero mweho ni mwanyumvirana umwete, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, mukareka gucisha icikorerwa na kimwe mu birimba vy’iki gisagara ku musi w’isabato, ariko mukaziririza umusi w’isabato, ntimugire igikorwa na kimwe muwukorako;" 
Jeremiah17:25 ni ho mu birimba vy’iki gisagara hazoca abami n’abaganwa uko bakūranwa ku ngoma ya Dawidi, bagendera mu mikogote no ku mafarasi, bo ubgabo n’ abaganwa babo, n’abagabo b’i Buyuda, n’ababa i Yerusalemu: kand’ iki gisagara kizokwamah’ ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah17:26 Kandi bazoza bavuye mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, no mu bihugu bikikije i Yerusalemu, no mu gihugu c’Ababenyamini, no mu misozi iciye bugufi, na ruguru mu mugamba, no mu gihugu c’i bumanuko, bazana ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ivyo gukererwa n’ivyo gushikana, n’imibavu, bazana n’ivy’ ishimwe, babizana mu ngoro yanje jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ariko ni mutanyumvira ngo muziririze umusi w’isabato, ngo mwoye kugira ico mwiremēka mugicana mu birimba vy’i Yerusalemu ku musi w’isabato, nuko nzodomeka umuriro mu birimba vyaho, uzotongora ingoro z’i Yerusalemu, kandi ntibazoruha bawuzimya." 
Jeremiah18:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rija kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah18:2 riti Va hasi, umanuke uje ku nzu y’umubumvyi, aho ni ho nzokwumvishiriza amajambo yanje." 
Jeremiah18:3 Nuko ndamanuka, nja ku nzu y’umubumvyi, nsanga arikw arabumbira ku rujo." 
Jeremiah18:4 Maz’ ikintu yarikw arabumba cononekarira mu ntoke z’uwo mubumvyi, nuko yongera kukibumbamw’ ikindi ukundi gusha, kimeze nk’ukw agomba." 
Jeremiah18:5 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Jeremiah18:6 riti Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, mbega jewe sinoshobora kubagira nk’uyu mubumvyi? ni k’Uhoraho abaza. Rāba nk’ukw ibumba riri mu kuboko kw’umubumvyi, namwe ni ko muri mu kuboko kwanje, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Jeremiah18:7 Igihe kimwe novuga ku vy’ihanga no ku vy’ ubgami ku vyo kuzorirandura no kuzorisangangura no kuzorihonnya: 
Jeremiah18:8 maz’ iryo hanga navuzeko ryohindukira rikareka ibibi vyaryo, nanje nzokwigarura ndeke ibibi nari namaramaje kuzobakorera." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ikindi gihe novuga ku vy’ihanga no ku vy’ubgami, ku vyo kuzoryubaka no kuzoritēragira:" 
Jeremiah18:10 maze ni ryakora ibibi mu nyonga zanje, ntiryumvire ijwi ryanje, nuko nanje nzogarwa, ndeke ivyiza nari namaramaje kuzobagirira neza." 
Jeremiah18:11 Nuko rer’ ubarire abagabo b’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe mbagereye ikibi, nīgīriye imigabo y’ivyo nzobagirira: enda ni mugaruke, umuntu wese ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, mutunganye inzira zanyu n’ ingeso zanyu." 
Jeremiah18:12 Ariko bo baravuga, bati N’utwiziguruke, kuko twebge tugomba gukurikira imigabo yacu ubgacu, kand’ umuntu wese muri twebge agomba gukora nk’uk’ ubudadarare bg’umutima wiwe mubi bumeze." 
Jeremiah18:13 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Enda ni mubaze mu mahanga ko hoba har’ uwumvise ibimeze birtyo; inkumi, ni yo Bisirayeli, yakoze ibibi vy’ubuyobe." 
Jeremiah18:14 Mbega shelegi y’i Lebanoni yoreka kugwa kuri vya bitandara vyaho vyibonekeza mu gihugu? Cank’ amazi yayo atimvye atemba ava kure yokamuka? 
Jeremiah18:15 Yamar’ abantu banje baranyibagiye, boshereje imibavu ibitagira ikimazi; vyatumye batsitara mu nzira zabo, ni zo nzira za kera, ngo bajane inzira zikikamye, inzira zitanoze," 
Jeremiah18:16 bituma bahindura igihugu cabo akajoreza, n’ico kuvuzwakw agahwa ubudasība; umuntu wese azohaca azojorerwa, azunguze umutwe." 
Jeremiah18:17 Nzobasābagiza imbere y’abansi nk’ūbasābagirishije umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba; nzobatera ibitugu, mbime mu nyonga hanje, ku musi bazobonerakw ibara." 
Jeremiah18:18 Maze baravuga, bat’ Enda ni muze, duhigire imihigo Yeremiya; kukw ahar’ umuherezi hatobura n’ivyagezwe, kand’ ahar’ umunyabgenge ntihobura n’inama, kand’ ahar’ ūvugishwa n’ Imana ntihobura ijambo ryayo. Enda ni muze, tumukubitishe intega y’ururimi, ntidushire umutima ku magambo yiwe, mwo na rimwe." 
Jeremiah18:19 Nshirak’ umutima weho Uhoraho, wumvirize ijwi ry’abandwanya." 
Jeremiah18:20 Mbeg’ iciza cokwishurwa ikibi? Ko banyimbiye icobo! Ibuka ingene nahagaze imbere yawe kugira ngo mbavugire neza, kugira ng’ uburake bgawe bubaveko!" 
Jeremiah18:21 Kubg’ ivyo tanga abana babo ubahe inzara, ubagaburire ubugi bg’inkota; abagore babo ni babure abana babo, bateko bapfakare; abagabo babo ni bicwe n’urupfu, imisore yabo ni yicwe n’inkota yo mu ntambara." 
Jeremiah18:22 Induru ni zumvikane mu ngo zabo, igihe uzobashikanakw igitero giturumbuka, kuko banyimbiye icobo, bagatega ibirenge vyanje imitego." 
Jeremiah18:23 Yamara wewe, Uhoraho, urazi imihigo bampigiye yose yo kunyica; ntuharire igicumuro cabo, ntusibanganye icaha cabo ngo kive mu nyonga zawe: ariko batsindwe imbere yawe; abe ari k’ubagirira mu gihe c’uburake bgawe." 
Jeremiah19:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho yagize, ati Genda ugure ikarabo ku mubumvyi, uheze ujane abashingantahe bo mur’ ubu bgoko, n’ abakuru b’abaherezi," 
Jeremiah19:2 ugende ushike mu mwonga wa mwene Hinomu, aherekeye mw ishikiro ry’irembo ry’ababumvyi, uhavugire amajambo nkubarira:" 
Jeremiah19:3 uti Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge bami b’i Buyuda, namwe ababa i Yerusalemu; uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Ehe nzozana ivyago aha hantu, kand’ ūzovyumva wese iminzerere izomuvuga mu matwi." 
Jeremiah19:4 Kuko bāntaye, bagahumanya aha hantu, bakahoserereza imibavu izindi mana batigeze kumenya, bo na ba sekuruza n’abami b’i Buyuda; bakuzuza aha hantu ibitenga vy’ amaraso y’abatācumuye;" 
Jeremiah19:5 bagataba ibitabo vya Bayali, ngo bahosereze abahungu babo mu muriro, babe ibimazi vyosherejwe Bayali; ar’ ikintu ntābageze, ntāvuze, kitigeze no kuza mu mutima wanje." 
Jeremiah19:6 Nuko rero, umve, imisi igira ize, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, aha hantu ntihazoba hacitwa Tofeti, canke ngo hitwe Umwonga wa mwene Hinomu; ariko hazokwitwa Umwonga w’Imihindigiti." 
Jeremiah19:7 Kandi nzohindurira ubusa aha hantu inama z’i Buyuda n’iz’ i Yerusalemu; nzobahindikiranya n’inkota imbere y’abansi babo, bicwe n’amaboko y’ababahīga: kand’ imivyimba yabo nzoyigabura ibe inyama z’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre, n’iz’ ibikōko vyo kw isi." 
Jeremiah19:8 Nzohindura iki gisagara akajoreza, n’ico kuvuzwakw agahwa; umuntu wese azohaca azojorerwa, avuze agahwa kubg’ ivyago vyaho vyose." 
Jeremiah19:9 Nzotuma barya abahungu babo n’abakobga babo, umuntu wese aryekw inyama mugenzi we, kubgo kwugarizwa no gusugerezwa, basugerejwe n’abansi babo n’ababahīga ngo babice." 
Jeremiah19:10 Uheze usābirize iryo karabo imbere y’abo bantu mwajanye," 
Jeremiah19:11 ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Uko ni ko nzosāvya ubu bgoko n’iki gisagara, nk’uk’ umuntu asāvya ikibumbano, kidashobora kwungwa ukundi: uti Maze bazohamba i Tofeti gushitsa aho batazoba bagishigaje n’akanya k’aho bahamba." 
Jeremiah19:12 Uko ni ko nzogirira aha hantu, bo n’abahaba, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, mpindure iki gisagara kibe nk’i Tofeti:" 
Jeremiah19:13 ingo z’i Yerusalemu n’ingoro z’abami b’i Buyuda zizoba ibihumane, zimere nk’aha hantu i Tofeti, mbere n’amazu yose būriyeko hejuru ngo bosereze imibavu inyenyeri zose, ari zo ngabo zo kw ijuru, bagasukira ibiturire izindi mana." 
Jeremiah19:14 Nuko Yeremiya aragaruka avuye i Tofeti, ah’ Uhoraho yari yamutumye kuvuga imbūri; maz’ ahagarara mu rugo rw’ingoro y’ Uhoraho, abarira abantu bose," 
Jeremiah19:15 at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Ehe nzozana kur’ iki gisagara, no ku bindi bisagara vyose vyo hafi yaco, ivyago vyose nakigeneye, kuko bāgamitse amazosi yabo, bakanka kwumva amajambo yanje." 
Jeremiah20:1 Nuko Pashuri mwene Imeri umuherezi, yar’ umubgiriza mukuru wo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, yumvise Yeremiya avuze izo mbūri," 
Jeremiah20:2 aca aramukubita, amushira mu mpatane z’ibiti vyari ku kirimba gihera haruguru citwa ica Benyamini, kirora ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah20:3 Bukeye Pashuri akūra Yeremiya mur’ izo mpatane. Maze Yeremiya aramubgira, at’ Uhoraho ntiyakwise Pashuri, ariko yakwise Magori‐misabibu." 
Jeremiah20:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nzotuma wikanga, ukange na bagenzi bawe bose; bazohindikiranywa n’inkota z’abansi babo, nawe amaso yawe azovyibonera. Nzotanga Ubuyuda bgose mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni, kand’ azobajana ar’ inyagano i Babuloni, kand’ azobicisha inkota." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ikigeretseko nzotanga itunga ryose ry’iki gisagara, n’ivyar’ inyungu zaco, n’ivy’ igiciro vyaco vyose, mbere n’ibitayega vyose vy’abami b’i Buyuda, mbitange mu maboko y’abansi babo bazoba babanyaze, babafashe, babajanye i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah20:6 Kandi nawe, Pashuri, mwe n’abo mu rugo rwawe bose, muzojanwa kw inyagano: kand’ uzoshika i Babuloni, ni yo uzogwa, ni yo uzohambga, mwe na bagenzi bawe bose, abo warotoreye ivy’ ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah20:7 Ewe Uhoraho, waranyoheje ndoha, wandushije inkomezi, uranjaniranya: mpindutse agatwengo kurenza umusi, umuntu wese arancokora." 
Jeremiah20:8 Kukw iyo mvuze, mvugira hejuru; mvugira hejuru, nti Har’ umuryano n’ubunyazi! Mber’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryampinduye agatukisha n’agatwengo kurenza umusi." 
Jeremiah20:9 Iyo mvuze, nti Sinzosubira kumuvuga, canke ngo ngire ico mvuga mw izina ryiwe, haca haba nk’umuriro uyingana mu mutima wanje, uhīshije uburimbi amagufa yanje, bikangora kwiyumanganya, nkaba ntobishobora." 
Jeremiah20:10 Kuko numvise benshi bandementaniriza, ubgoba bukantera irya n’ino. Abakunzi banje pfampfe bose, ni bo barereka ko notsitara, bavuga, bati Mumurege, natwe tumurege, kumbure yogwa mu mutego, natwe tukamunesha, tukamwīhōra." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ariko noneh’ Uhoraho ari kumwe nanje nk’umunyenkomezi n’uw’ igitinyiro; ni co kizotuma abampama batsitara, ntibaneshe: bazorimarima rwose kuko batākoze ivy’ ubgenge, bagire ibitētērwa bitazobavako, bitazoruha vyibagirana." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ariko wewe, Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, wewe ugerageza abagororotsi, ukitegereza imishaha n’imitima, umpe kwibonera ingen’ ubīhōra, kukw ari wewe nitwayeko." 
Jeremiah20:13 Muririmbire Uhoraho, muhimbaze Uhoraho: kuko yarokoye ubugingo bg’umukene, akabukūra mu maboko y’inkozi z’ibibi." 
Jeremiah20:14 Umusi navukiyeko uravumwe! Umusi mama yamvyariyeko ntube ucitwa uw’ amahirwe. 
Jeremiah20:15 Aravumwe umuntu yazaniye inkuru data, at’ Uvyaye umwana w’umuhungu; bikamunezereza cane." 
Jeremiah20:16 Uwo muntu n’abe nka vya bisagara Uhoraho yasanganguye, ata kagongwe: ni yumve amaborogo mu gatondotondo, n’ akarūru ku murango;" 
Jeremiah20:17 kukw atānyishe nkiri mu nda ya mama; ni ko mama yombereye imva, akazokwama akuriwe." 
Jeremiah20:18 N’iki cankūye mu nda, ngo nze mbone ubutame n’umubabaro, imisi yanje nkayimara mu bitētērwa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho, igihe umwami Zedekiya yamutumako Pashuri mwene Malakiya na Zefaniya mwene Mayaseya umuherezi," 
Jeremiah21:2 muti Basigurize Uhoraho; kuko Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ateye: kumbure Uhoraho yotugirira nk’ukw ibikorwa vyiwe vyose vy’igitangaza bimeze, agatuma asubira inyuma akatureka." 
Jeremiah21:3 Maze Yeremiya arabishura, at’ Uku abe ari ko mubarira Zedekiya:" 
Jeremiah21:4 mut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Ehe nzobakubiranya hamwe n’ibirwanishwa biri mu maboko yanyu, ivyo murwanisha umwami w’i Babuloni n’Abakaludaya babugarije, muriko murabarwanisha inyuma y’inzitiro z’iki gisagara, mbakoranirize hamwe hagati muri co." 
Jeremiah21:5 Kandi nanje ubganje nzobarwanya, mbarwanishe ukuboko kubānguye n’ukuboko kw’inkomezi, ndi n’ishavu n’ubushangashirwe n’uburake bg’inkazi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Kandi nzokubita ababa mur’ iki gisagara, abantu n’ibitungwa: bazokwicwa n’ikīza gikomeye." 
Jeremiah21:7 Kandi hanyuma y’ivyo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzogabura Zedekiya umwami w’Abayuda, n’ abasavyi biwe, n’abantu bazoba bagisigaye mur’ iki gisagara, batishwe n’ikīza n’inkota n’inzara, mbashire mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, no mu maboko y’abansi babo, no mu maboko y’abarondera kubica: azobicisha ubugi bg’inkota; ntazobagirira impuhwe cank’ akagongwe cank’ imbabazi." 
Jeremiah21:8 Maz’ aba bantu ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba mbashize imbere inzira y’ubugingo n’inzira y’urupfu." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ūguma mur’ iki gisagara azokwicwa n’inkota n’inzara n’ikīza: arik’ ūsokoroka muri co, akīsaba Abakaludaya babugarije, azobaho, kand’ azoba akijije amagara yiwe." 
Jeremiah21:10 Kuko ntungiriye igitsure iki gisagara ngo nkizanekw amagorwa, sinkizanekw amahirwe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kizotangwa mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni, kand’ azogitongoza umuriro." 
Jeremiah21:11 Kandi ku vy’inzu y’umwami w’i Buyuda, ni mwumve ijambo ry’ Uhoraho:" 
Jeremiah21:12 Ewe nzu ya Dawidi, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni muce imanza ziroranye uko bukeye, mukize ūnyazwe mumukūre mu kuboko kw’ūmuhahaza, uburake bganje bgoye kurabagiza nk’umuriro, bukarurumba ntihagire ūshobora kubuzimya, kubg’ ibibi mukora." 
Jeremiah21:13 Rāba nzohigūra nawe, wewe gisagara cubatswe ku mushasha, ku gitandara co mu kiyaya, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; yemwe abavuga, muti Ni nde yorinduka kumanuka ngw adutere? Canke ni nde yoshika mu ngo zacu?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Nzobahana nk’ukw ibikorwa vyanyu vyamuje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi nzodomeka umuriro mu kibira caho uzotongora ibiri hirya no hino yaho vyose." 
Jeremiah22:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Manuka uje ku ngoro y’ umwami w’i Buyuda, uhavugire iri jambo," 
Jeremiah22:2 uti Ni wumve ijambo ry’ Uhoraho, yewe mwami w’i Buyuda, uri ku ngoma ya Dawidi, wewe n’abasavyi bawe, n’abaca mur’ aya marembo." 
Jeremiah22:3 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni muce imanza ziroranye n’izigororotse, mukize ūnyazwe, mumukūre mu kuboko kw’ ūmuhahaza; ntimugirire nabi canke ngo muhahaze ingenzi n’ impfuvyi n’umupfakazi, canke ngo muvishirize aha hantu amaraso y’ abatācumuye." 
Jeremiah22:4 Kuko ni mwagenza murtyo koko, ni ho mu birimba vy’iki gisagara hazoca abami uko bakūranwa ku ngoma ya Dawidi, bagendera mu mikogote no ku mafarasi, umwami wese n’ abasavyi biwe n’abantu biwe." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ariko ni mwanka kwumva ayo majambo, iyi ngoro izocika umusaka, ndirahiye ubganje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah22:6 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, ku vy’ingoro y’umwami w’i Buyuda, ati War’ umbereye nka Gileyadi, canke nk’ agatwe ka Lebanoni: n’ukuri nzoguhindura ubugaragwa, ube nk’ ibisagara bitakirimw’ umuntu." 
Jeremiah22:7 Kandi nzogutegurira abo kugusangangura, umuntu wese muri bo afise ibirwanishwa; bazohimbagura inkingi zawe z’amasederi meza, baziterere mu muriro." 
Jeremiah22:8 Kand’ amahanga menshi azoca i ruhande y’iki gisagara, bazobazanya, bati N’iki catumye Uhoraho agirira artyo iki gisagara gihambaye?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Maze bazobishura, bati Ni kuko bātaye isezerano bāsezeranye n’Uhoraho Imana yabo, bagasenga izindi mana bakazisaba." 
Jeremiah22:10 Ntimukaririre uwamaze gupfa, canke ngo mumuborogere: ariko muririre uwagiye mazimayongo, kukw atazoba akigaruka ukundi, canke ngw asubire kubona igihugu yavukiyemwo." 
Jeremiah22:11 Kuko ku vya Shalumu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda, yasubiye ku ngoma ya se Yosiya, yavuye aha hantu akagenda mazimayongo: ntazosubira kugaruka ino ukundi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze;" 
Jeremiah22:12 arikw iyo bāmushorereye ar’ inyagano ni yo azogwa, kandi ntazosubira kubona iki gihugu ukundi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Azobona ibara uwubakisha inzu yiwe mu biva mu kugabitanya, akayitegurisha ibigungano; agakoresha mugenzi we ku kagōbēro, ntamuhe ingero yiwe;" 
Jeremiah22:14 akavuga, ati Hinge niyubakire inzu nini n’ivyumba vyagutse, akayicamw’ amadirisha; akayishiramw’ insenge z’amasederi, akazisīga irangi ritukura." 
Jeremiah22:15 Mbeg’ ubeshejwe ku ngoma n’uk’ urushije abandi kwubakisha amasederi? Mbega so ntiyabonye gufungura no kwuhira? Yamara we yaciye iziroranye n’izibereye; maze yibereye amahoro. 
Jeremiah22:16 Yaciriye urubanza umworo n’umukene; maze hakaba amahoro. Mbeg’ ivyo si kwo kummenya kw’ukuri? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije. 
Jeremiah22:17 Ariko weho amaso yawe n’umutima wawe nta handi bitumbereye atar’ ukwifuza inyungu mbi, no kuvisha amaraso y’abatācumuye, no guhahaza, n’umuryano." 
Jeremiah22:18 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize ku vya Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda, ati Ntibazomuborogera, bat’ Ewe musazanje! Ewe mwana wa mama! Ntibazomuborogera, bat’ Ewe mwami wanje! Ewe cubahiro ciwe!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Azotabga nk’uko bata indogoba, bamukweze bamushiburiye inyuma y’ibirimba vy’i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah22:20 Dūga i Lebanoni, utake; shira ijwi hejuru ur’ i Bashani; taka uhagaze ahitwa Abarimu; kukw abūzure bawe bose bageseye." 
Jeremiah22:21 Navuganye nawe igihe war’ umerewe neza, arik’ uravuga, uti Sinduha ndavyumva. Iyo ni yo ngeso yawe uhereye mu buto bgawe, yo kutanyumvira." 
Jeremiah22:22 Umuyaga ni wo uzoragira abungere bākuragira bose, kand’ abūzure bawe bazoja mu mugozi: bibaye birtyo ntuzobura gutētērwa no kumāramāra kubg’ ibibi vyawe vyose." 
Jeremiah22:23 Ewe uba kuri Lebanoni, ukārika icāri cawe mu masederi, es’ ukuntu uzoba uteye akagongwe igihe ibise bizoba bigufashe, nk’umubabaro w’umugore aramutswe!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, yuko naho wewe Koniya mwene Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda woba impeta y’ikimenyetso ku kuboko kwanje kw’i buryo, na ho nyene nogushikura nkagukūraho;" 
Jeremiah22:25 kandi nzokugabura mu maboko y’abarondera kukwica, no mu maboko y’abo utinya, mbere no mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, no mu maboko y’Abakaludaya." 
Jeremiah22:26 Kandi nzogushiburana na nyoko yakuvyaye, mbashiburire mu kindi gihugu, aho mutāvukiye; aho ni ho muzogwa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Arikw igihugu imitima yabo yifuza kugarukamwo, ntibazokigarukamwo na mba." 
Jeremiah22:28 Mbeg’ uyu Koniya n’urwavya rukēngērwa rusāvye? N’urwavya rudahimbaye? N’iki catumye bashiburwa, bashiburirwa mu gihugu batazi?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Ewe wa gihugu we, wa gihugu we, wa gihugu we, ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni mwandike uyu muntu kw abaye incike, umuntu atazopfa aroraniwe: kukw ata wo mu ruvyaro rwiwe azororanirwa, ngw asubire ku ngoma ya Dawidi, canke ngw az’ asubire kuganza i Buyuda." 
Jeremiah23:1 Bazobona ibara, abungere batikiza intama zo mu canya canje, bakazishwiragiza! ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:2 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ku vyo ageneye abungere baragira abantu biwe: ati Mwashwiragije umukuku wanje, murawirukana, ntimwawurāba; nuko rero nanje nzobāzira, mbazanekw ivyago bihwanye n’ ukugira nabi kwanyu, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:3 Kandi nzokoraniriza hamwe amasigarira y’ umukuku wanje, ndazikūre mu bihugu vyose aho nazirukaniye, ndazigarukane ukundi gusha mu mpongore zazo; zizorondoka zigwire." 
Jeremiah23:4 Kandi nzoshira abungere kuri zo, baziragire: ntizizoba zikigira ubgoba ukundi, canke ngo zihagarike imitima, kandi ntihazotākara n’imwe muri zo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:5 Rāba imisi izoza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzonagisha kuri Dawidi uwitwa Shami w’umugororotsi, kand’ azoganza nk’ umwami, agire ikiganza ciza, ace iziroranye n’izibereye mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mu gihe ciwe Abayuda bazokizwa, Abisirayeli bibere amahoro: kand’ iri ni ryo zina azokwitwa, ng’ Uhoraho ni we kugororoka kwacu." 
Jeremiah23:7 Nuko rero, mu misi izoza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ntibazoba bakirahira uguhoraho kwanje, jewe Uhoraho, ko nakūye Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa," 
Jeremiah23:8 ariko bazorahira uguhoraho kwanje Uhoraho, ko nakūye uruvyaro rw’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli mu gihugu c’i burārūko, nkabarōngōra, nkabakūra mu bihugu vyose aho nzoba narabirukaniye; kandi bazokwibera mu gihugu cabo bgite." 
Jeremiah23:9 Ku vya ba kamenyi. Umutima wanje unsābiye mu nda, amagufa yanje yose aratetemera; mmeze nk’imborerwa, nk’umuntu yaneshejwe na vino, kubg’ Uhoraho n’amajambo yiwe yera." 
Jeremiah23:10 Kukw igihugu cuzuye abasambanyi; kubg’ umuvumo igihugu kiragandaye; imyīmīro yo ku mirāmbi irumye; ingeso zabo ni mbi, ububasha bgabo ni bubi." 
Jeremiah23:11 Kuko ba kamenyi n’abaherezi ar’ ibihumane; mbere no mu ngoro yanje nabonye ivyaha vyabo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:12 Ni co gitumye inzira yabo izobabera nk’ahanyerera mu mwiza: bazokwirukanwa bahagwe, kuko nzobazanakw ivyago, ni wo mwaka wo kūzirwa kwabo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:13 Nabonye ubupfu bga ba kamenyi i Samariya; bāvugishijwe na Bayali, bakazimiza abantu banje b’Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah23:14 Mbonye ubuyobe muri ba kamenyi b’i Yerusalemu: barasambana, bagendera mu binyoma, baremesha inkozi z’ibibi, bigatuma ata wigarura ngw ave mu bibi vyiwe: bose bampindukiye nk’i Sodomu, n’ababayo bampindukiye nk’i Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize ku vya ba kamenyi: at’ Ehe rāba, nzobagaburira ivy’ umururazi, nzobanywesha amazi y’ubumara: kukw ibihumanya vyasāvye igihugu cose, biturutse kuri ba kamenyi b’i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah23:16 Nuk’ uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ntimwumvirize amagambo abo ba kamenyi bababarira; babigisha ibitagira ikimazi; barotora ivyo beretswe bivuye mu mitima yabo ubgabo, bitavuye mu kanwa kanje Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah23:17 Ntibahengeshanya kubarira abakēngēra ijambo ryanje, bat’ Uhoraho yavuze ngo Muzoba amahoro; kand’ umuntu wese agendera mu budadarare bg’umutima wiwe, baramubgira, bati Nta cago kizobazako." 
Jeremiah23:18 Ni nde yabaye mu nama yanje, jewe Uhoraho, canke ngw amenye ijambo ryanje, aryumve? Ni nde yategereye ijambo ryanje akaryumva?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Rāba ikirura canje, jewe Uhoraho, ni bgo burake bganje, kirahinze, mbere n’ikirura c’imvugusi: kizorindimukira ku mitwe y’abanyavyaha." 
Jeremiah23:20 Uburake bganje jewe Uhoraho ntibuzokebanuka kugeza aho nzoba nshikije ivy’ umutima wanje wagabiye, mbiheraheje: mu misi yo hanyuma muzobitahura rwose." 
Jeremiah23:21 Erega si jewe natumye abo ba kamenyi, yamara bārirukanze; jewe nta co navuganye na bo, yamara baravugishwa." 
Jeremiah23:22 Iyaba bārabaye mu nama yanje baba bātumye abantu banje bumva amajambo yanje, kandi baba bārabahindukije bakava mu nzira yabo mbi, no mu bikorwa vyabo bibi." 
Jeremiah23:23 Mbega nd’ Imana igarukira hafi gusa? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; sind’ Imana ishika kure na ho? 
Jeremiah23:24 Har’ uwoshobora kwinyegeza ahantu hihishije ngo nanje sindamubone? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije. Mbega sinkwiye ijuru n’isi? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije. 
Jeremiah23:25 Numvise ivyo ba kamenyi bavuga, barotora ibinyoma mw izina ryanje; bati Narose, narose." 
Jeremiah23:26 Ivyo bizogeza ryari kuba mu mitima ya ba kamenyi barotora ibinyoma, ni bo bavugishwa n’ubugunge bgo mu mitima yabo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Bibgira ko bokwibagiza abantu banje izina ryanje, babibagirisha inzozi zabo barotora, izo umuntu wese arotorera mugenzi we, nk’ uko ba sekuruza babo bibagijwe izina ryanje na Bayali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Kamenyi ni yagira ico yarose, n’akirotore; kand’ ūfise ijambo ryanje n’ avuge iryo jambo adacishije i ruhande. Mbeg’ umuguruka uhwanye ute n’ingano? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije." 
Jeremiah23:29 Mbeg’ ijambo ryanje si nk’umuriro? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije; canke si nk’inyundo imenagura igitandara? 
Jeremiah23:30 Nuko rer’ ehe rāba, abo ba kamenyi tuzohigūra twe na bo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, abība amajambo yanje, umuntu wese akayība uwundi." 
Jeremiah23:31 Rāba, nzohigūra n’abo ba kamenyi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ababishira mu kanwa kabo, ngo ni ko nabivuze." 
Jeremiah23:32 Rāba, nzohigūra n’abarotora inzozi z’ibinyoma, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, bakazisigura, bakazimirisha abantu banje ibinyoma vyabo n’ukwihayagiza kwabo kw’ ubusa: yamara jewe nta ho nabatumye, nta co nabageze; kandi nta co bazomarira ubu bgoko na gatoya, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah23:33 Kand’ aba bantu canke kamenyi cank’ umuherezi, ni hagira ūkubaza, at’ Imbūri y’Uhoraho ivuga iki? uz’ umwishure, ut’ Ugize ngw imbūri n’iki? N’ukw agira ngw abate, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kandi kamenyi cank’ umuherezi cank’ uwo mu bantu ni hagira ūpfa kuvuga ivy’ imbūri yanje jewe Uhoraho, uwo muntu nzomuhana, bo n’abo mu nzu yiwe." 
Jeremiah23:35 Uku az’ abe ari k’umuntu wese abaza umubanyi wiwe, abaze na mugenzi we, ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho yishuye iki? Kand’ ati Mbeg’ Uhoraho yavuze iki?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Imbūri y’Uhoraho ntimuze muyivuge ukundi: kukw ijambo ry’umuntu wese ari ryo rizomubera imbūri; erega mwagoretse amajambo y’Imana nzima, ni yo y’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Uz’ ubaze ūvugishwa, uti Mbeg’ Uhoraho yakwishuye iki? Cank’ ut’ Uhoraho yavuze iki?" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ariko ni mwavuga ivy’ imbūri y’Uhoraho, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ko muvuga iryo jambo ry’imbūri yanje Uhoraho, nanje nkaba nabatumyeko ndabibabuza, nti Ntimukavuge ivy’ imbūri yanje, jewe Uhoraho;" 
Jeremiah23:39 nuko rero nzobībagira rwose, nzobashiburana n’igisagara nabahānye na ba sogokuruza, ngo mumve imbere;" 
Jeremiah23:40 kandi nzobazanira umuvumo utazovaho, ibitētērwa bitazoshira, bitazoruha vyibagirana." 
Jeremiah24:1 Uhoraho aranyereka, mbona ibisimbo bibiri vy’insukoni biteretse imbere y’urusengero rw’ Uhoraho, igihe Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yar’ amaze kujana Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu, umwami w’i Buyuda, kw inyagano, bo n’abaganwa b’i Buyuda n’ababāji n’abacuzi, abakūra i Yerusalemu abashikana i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah24:2 Igisimbo kimwe carimw’ insukoni nziza cane, zimeze nk’insukoni z’isega: ikindi gisimbo carimw’ insukoni ziboze rwose, zitoshoboka kuribga kubgo kubora." 
Jeremiah24:3 Maz’ Uhoraho arambaza, at’ Ubonye iki ga Yeremiya? Ndamwishura, nti Mbonye insukoni; inziza ni nziza cane, iziboze ziraboze cane, zitoshoboka kuribga kubgo kubora." 
Jeremiah24:4 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Jeremiah24:5 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Nk’uk’ umuntu yokwerekeza umutima kur’ izi nsukoni nziza, ni ko nzowerekeza ku Bayuda, kugira ngo mbagirire neza, abo narungitse ar’ inyagano, ngo bave aha hantu baje mu gihugu c’Abakaludaya." 
Jeremiah24:6 Kuko nzobashirakw ijisho kugira ngo mbagirire neza, kandi nzosubira kubagarukana mur’ iki gihugu: nzobubaka, sinzobasambura; nzobatēragira, sinzobarandura." 
Jeremiah24:7 Kandi nzobaha umutima wo kummenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho: bazoba abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yabo, kuko bazongarukanak’ umutima wabo wose." 
Jeremiah24:8 Kandi nk’uko bata insukoni ziboze, zidashoboka kuribga kubgo kubora, ni ko nzota Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, n’abaganwa biwe, n’amasigarira y’i Yerusalemu asigaye mur’ iki gihugu, n’abāgiye kuba mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze;" 
Jeremiah24:9 mbere nzobatanga batererekanywe irya n’ino mu bihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi, ngo mbagirire nabi; bazoba igitutsi n’iciro ry’imigani n’agatwengo n’ ibivume, ahantu hose aho nzobirukanira." 
Jeremiah24:10 Kandi nzorungika inkota n’inzara n’ikīza muri bo, gushitsa aho bazoba baherengeteye mu gihugu nabahānye na ba sekuruza." 
Jeremiah25:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya ku vy’abantu bose b’i Buyuda mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya, umwami w’i Buyuda, ari ku ngoma; ni wo war’ umwaka wa mbere wa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni wo kuba ku ngoma." 
Jeremiah25:2 Iryo ni ryo Yeremiya uwavugishwa n’Imana yabariye abantu bose b’i Buyuda, n’ababa i Yerusalemu bose," 
Jeremiah25:3 at’ Uhereye mu mwaka ugira icumi na gatatu wa Yosiya mwene Amoni, umwami w’i Buyuda, gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi, iyo myaka ukw ari mirongwibiri n’itatu, ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryama rinzako, nanje nkaribabgira, nkāma nzindurwa no kubabarira, namwe ntimwumve." 
Jeremiah25:4 Kand’ Uhoraho yabatumyekw abasavyi biwe bose abo yavugisha, yama azindurwa no kubatuma, namwe ntimwumve, canke ngo mutege amatwi ngo mwumvirize;" 
Jeremiah25:5 at’ Enda ni mugaruke, umuntu wese ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, muve mu bubi bg’ibikorwa vyanyu, ni ho muzokwibera mu gihugu Uhoraho yabahānye na ba sogokuruza, uhereye kera ugashitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Jeremiah25:6 Kandi ntimugakurikire izindi mana ngo muzisabe, muzisenge; ntimukamurakishe ibikorwa vy’intoke zanyu: na we ntazogira ivyago abatēza." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ariko mwebge ntimwanyumviye, ni k’ Uhoraho agize, atar’ ukundakisha ibikorwa vy’intoke zanyu, mukikwegera ivyago." 
Jeremiah25:8 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ko mutumviye amajambo yanje," 
Jeremiah25:9 nzotuma kugomora imiryango yose y’i burārūko, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kandi nzotuma no kuri Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, umusavyi wanje, mbazane ngo barwanye iki gihugu n’abakibamwo, barwanye n’aya mahanga yose agikikije; kandi nzobageseza rwose, mbahindure akajoreza, n’abo kuvuzwakw agahwa, n’iciro ry’imigani ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ikindi, nzobakūramw’ ijwi ry’ibitwengo n’iry’ umunezero, n’ijwi ry’umukwe n’iry’ umugeni, n’ukuvuga kw’urusyo n’ukubonesha kw’itara." 
Jeremiah25:11 Kand’ iki gihugu cose kizoba amatongo n’akajoreza; kand’ ayo mahanga azokorera umwami w’i Babuloni imyaka mirongwirindwi. 
Jeremiah25:12 Hanyuma y’ivyo, iyo myaka mirongwirindwi ishize, nzohana umwami w’i Babuloni bo n’iryo hanga, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, mbahōre ukugabitanya kwabo; nzohana n’igihugu c’Abakaludaya, ngihindure amatongo gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Jeremiah25:13 Kandi nzoshitsa kur’ ico gihugu amajambo yanje yose y’ivyo nakigeneye, ni vyo vyanditswe mur’ iki gitabo uko bingana, ivyo navugishije Yeremiya mbigeneye amahanga yose." 
Jeremiah25:14 Kandi na bo ubgabo amahanga menshi n’abami bahambaye bazobahindura abaja; kandi nzoba mbashubirije mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ivyo bākoze, n’ibihwanye n’ ibikorwa vy’amaboko yabo." 
Jeremiah25:15 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho ambariye, ari we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Enda abīra mu kuboko kwanje iki gikombe ca vino y’uburake bganje, ukiramize amahanga yose ngutumyeko, bakinywe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bazokinywa badandabagirane, bazimire ubgenge, kubg’ inkota nzorungika muri bo." 
Jeremiah25:17 Nuko nābīra igikombe mu kuboko kw’ Uhoraho, ndakiramiza amahanga yose Uhoraho yantumyeko;" 
Jeremiah25:18 ni yo aya: Yerusalemu n’ibisagara vy’i Buyuda n’abami baho n’abaganwa baho, ngo hacike imisaka n’akajoreza n’aho kuvuzwakw agahwa n’ikivume, nk’uko nyene bimeze uyu musi;" 
Jeremiah25:19 nkiramiza Farawo, umwami wa Egiputa n’ abasavyi biwe n’abaganwa biwe n’ abantu biwe bose;" 
Jeremiah25:20 bo n’amahanga yose y’ikivange, n’abami bose bo mu gihugu ca Uzi, n’abami bose bo mu gihugu c’i Bufilisitiya, n’i Ashikeloni n’i Gaza n’i Ekuroni, n’amasigarira yo muri Ashidodi," 
Jeremiah25:21 n’i Edomu n’i Mowabu n’ab’ umuryango wa Amoni," 
Jeremiah25:22 nkiramiza n’abami bose b’i Tiro n’abami bose b’i Sidoni, n’ abami b’ikizinga co hirya mu kiyaga," 
Jeremiah25:23 n’i Dedani n’i Tema n’i Buzi; n’abica amasoso bose; 
Jeremiah25:24 n’ abami bose b’i Arabiya, n’abami bose b’amahanga y’ikivange baba mu bugaragwa," 
Jeremiah25:25 n’abami bose b’i Zimuri, n’abami bose b’i Elamu, n’abami bose b’Abamedi," 
Jeremiah25:26 n’abami bose b’i burārūko, abari kure n’abari hafi, bose hamwe; n’ibihugu vyose vy’abami bo mw isi, aho biri hose mw isi; kand’ umwami w’i Sheshaki ni we azobaherukira kunywa." 
Jeremiah25:27 Kand’ uz’ ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ni munywe, muborerwe, mudahwe, mwubameho, ntimuze musubire kuvyuka ukundi, kubg’ inkota nzorungika muri mwebge." 
Jeremiah25:28 Maze ni baramuka banse kwābīra igikombe mu kuboko kwawe ngo banywe, uz’ uheze ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ntimugenda mutakinyoye:" 
Jeremiah25:29 ko ntanguriye ku gisagara citiriwe izina ryanje kuhazana ivyago, none mwebge mwobura guhanwa? Eka ntimuzobura guhanwa na mba: kuko nzohamagara inkota ngw ize ku baba kw isi bose, ni jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mbivuze." 
Jeremiah25:30 Nuko rero, ubabūrire ayo majambo yose, ubabgire, ut’ Uhoraho azokwivuga ari mw ijuru, avuge n’ijwi rirenga ar’ ahiwe hēra; umukuku wiwe azowutontomera; azovuza akāmo, nk’ak’ abakānya inzabibu, akavugirije ababa kw isi bose." 
Jeremiah25:31 Ijwi ryavyo rizoshika no ku mpera y’isi; kuk’ Uhoraho afitaniye imibūrano n’amahanga, azobūrana n’abariho bose; kand’ abanyavyaha azobagaburira inkota, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah25:32 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Eh’ ivyago bizosimba‐simba biva kw ihanga bija ku rindi, kand’ ikirura gihambaye kizozingazinga kivuye ku mpera z’isi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Abishwe n’Uhoraho bazohēra ku mpera y’isi bashike ku yindi, ntibazoririrwa, canke ngo begeranywe, canke ngo bahambge; bazoba nk’intabire yometse ku misozi." 
Jeremiah25:34 Muboroge, mwa bungere, murire; mwitembagaze mu minyota, yemwe ba kizigenza mu mukuku: kukw igihe co kubāgwa kwanyu gishitse rwose; nzobasāvya, mukoroke nk’ikarabo riteye igomwe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Abungere ntibazobona inzira yo guhunga, canke ba kizigenza mu mukuku ngo babone ingene bacika." 
Jeremiah25:36 Umve ijwi ry’ ukurira kw’abungere, n’iry’ ukuboroga kwa ba kizigenza mu mukuku! Kuk’ Uhoraho yakomvoje ubgatsi bgazo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Impongore zār’ amahoro zisigaye zumaniwe, kubg’ uburake bg’inkazi bg’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah25:38 Yahevye ahiwe nk’ukw intambge iheba ikibundo cayo; kukw igihugu cabo gihindutse akajoreza kubg’ ubukare bg’inkota itwaza igitugu, no kubg’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi." 
Jeremiah26:1 Mu matangura yo kuba ku ngoma kwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’Abayuda, haza iri jambo rivuye k’ Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah26:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Hagarara mu nyubakwa y’ingoro yanje Uhoraho, ubarire ab’ibisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda baza gusenga mu ngoro yanje, amajambo yose nkubarira yo kubabgira: ntusige na rimwe." 
Jeremiah26:3 Kumbure bohava bumva, umuntu wese agahindukira akareka inzira yiwe mbi, ngo nanje mbone kwigarura, ndeke ibibi mmaramaje kubakorera kubg’ ibibi vy’ibikorwa vyabo." 
Jeremiah26:4 Kand’ ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni mwanka kumutega amatwi, ngo mugendere mu vyagezwe vyiwe yabashize imbere," 
Jeremiah26:5 ngo mwumvire amajambo y’ abasavyi biwe avugisha, abo abatumako, mber’ akāma azindurwa no kubatuma, mukanka kubumvira," 
Jeremiah26:6 ngo Ni ho azohindura iyi ngoro kuba nk’i Shilo, kandi n’iki gisagara ngw Azogihindura ikivume ku mahanga yose yo mw isi." 
Jeremiah26:7 Maz’ abaherezi na ba kamenyi n’ abantu bose bumva Yeremiya avugira ayo majambo yose mu ngoro y’Uhoraho. 
Jeremiah26:8 Nuko Yeremiya aheraheje kuvuga vyose Uhoraho yamugeze kubarira abantu bose, abaherezi n’abo ba kamenyi n’ abantu bose baramufata, bati Ntugenda udapfuye." 
Jeremiah26:9 N’iki kikuvugisha mw izina ry’Uhoraho ngw Iyi ngoro izomera nk’i Shilo, ngo N’iki gisagara kizoba amatongo, ata wukikibamwo? Nukw abantu bose bakoranira kuri Yeremiya mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah26:10 Maz’ abaganwa b’i Buyuda bumvise ivyo, baradūga bavuye mu ngoro i bgami, baja ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho; bicara mw ishikiro ku kirimba gisha c’urugo rw’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah26:11 Maz’ abaherezi na ba kamenyi babarira abaganwa n’abantu bose, bat’ Uyu muntu akwiye gupfa; kukw ataze ibibi kur’ iki gisagara, nk’uko mwiyumviye n’amatwi yanyu." 
Jeremiah26:12 Maze Yeremiya abarira abaganwa bose n’abantu bose, at’ Uhoraho ni we yantumye kubūrira kur’ iyi ngoro no kur’ iki gisagara amajambo yose mwumvise." 
Jeremiah26:13 None rero mutunganye ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu, mwumvire Uhoraho Imana yanyu; maz’ Uhoraho azokwigarura areke ibibi yar’ abageneye." 
Jeremiah26:14 Ariko jeho ndi mu maboko yanyu: mungire nk’uko mubona ko bikwiye kandi bibereye mu maso yanyu. 
Jeremiah26:15 Kimwe gusa, mumenye rwose ni mwanyica, ko muzoba mwizanyekw amaraso y’ ūtācumye, azoba kuri mwebge ubganyu no kur’ iki gisagara no ku bakibamwo: kuko vy’ukuri Uhoraho ni we yabantumyeko kuvugira ayo majambo yose mu matwi yanyu." 
Jeremiah26:16 Maz’ abaganwa n’abantu bose babarira abaherezi n’abo ba kamenyi, bat’ Uyu muntu ntakwiye gupfa, kukw atubariye mw izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah26:17 Maze hava hasi bamwe bo mu bashingantahe b’igihugu, babarira ikoraniro ryose ry’abantu," 
Jeremiah26:18 bati Mika w’i Moresheti yavugishwa n’Imana ku ngoma ya Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda; kandi yabariye abantu bose b’i Buyuda, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Siyoni hazosīzwa hahinduke nk’ubusīze, Yerusalemu hazohinduka ibirundo vy’ amasakamburira, n’umurwa wubatswekw iyi ngoro uzohinduka nk’ikibira kiri ku mpinga z’imisozi." 
Jeremiah26:19 Mbega Hezekiya umwami w’i Buyuda n’Abayuda bose mugira ngo bāramwishe? Hezekiya ntiyaciye atinya Uhoraho, akamukomera ibobo, Uhoraho na we akīgarura akareka ivyago yari yabageneye? Twogira ico tumugira twoba dukwegeye ubugingo bgacu ivyago bihambaye." 
Jeremiah26:20 Kandi hāri n’uwundi yavugishwa mw izina ry’Uhoraho, ni Uriya mwene Shemaya w’i Kiriyati‐yeyarimu; uyo yavugishijwe n’ Imana ku bizoba kur’ iki gisagara no kur’ iki gihugu bihwanye n’amajambo yose ya Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Maz’ umwami Yehoyakimu n’intōre ziwe zose n’abaganwa bose, bumvise amajambo yiwe, umwami ashaka kumwica; ariko Uriya avyumvise, agira ubgoba, arahunga, aja muri Egiputa;" 
Jeremiah26:22 nuk’ umwami Yehoyakimu atuma abantu muri Egiputa, ni bo Elunatani mwene Akabori n’abandi bagabo bamwe bajanye na we muri Egiputa;" 
Jeremiah26:23 bakwega Uriya bamukūra muri Egiputa, bamuzanira umwami Yehoyakimu: amwicisha inkota, ashiburira umuvyimba wiwe mu mva z’ abantu ba nyarucari." 
Jeremiah26:24 Ariko Ahikamu mwene Shafani atabara Yeremiya, ngo ntātabge mu maboko y’abantu ngo bamwice." 
Jeremiah27:1 Mu matangura yo kuba ku ngoma kwa Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’Abayuda, haza iri jambo kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah27:2 riti Rondera imvuto n’ingōgo, bimwe uvyiyambike mw izosi," 
Jeremiah27:3 ibindi ubirungikire umwami w’i Edomu, n’umwami w’i Mowabu, n’ umwami w’Abamoni, n’umwami w’i Tiro, n’umwami w’i Sidoni, ubirungikane intumwa zaje i Yerusalemu zitumwe kuri Zedekiya, umwami w’i Buyuda;" 
Jeremiah27:4 ubatume amajambo bashīra ba shebuja, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Uku abe ari ko mubarira ba shobuja," 
Jeremiah27:5 mut’ Uhoraho agize ngo Ni jewe naremye isi, n’abantu n’ibikōko biri kw isi, mbiremesha ubushobozi bganje bginshi n’ukuboko kwanje kurāmvuye; kand’ ivyo mbigabira uwo ngomba." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kandi non’ ibi bihugu vyose mbishize mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, umusavyi wanje; ndamuhaye n’ibikōko vyo ku misozi kumukorera." 
Jeremiah27:7 Kand’ amahanga yose azomusaba, asabe n’umwana wiwe n’umwuzukuru wiwe, gushitsa igihe co kūzirwa kw’igihugu ciwe kigeze; ni ho amahanga menshi n’abami bahambaye bazomuhindura umuja na we." 
Jeremiah27:8 Maz’ ihanga ryose cank’ igihugu c’ umwami wese, ni habah’ abatemera gusaba Nebukadineza, uyo mwami w’i Babuloni, canke ngo bemere kugondera izosi ingōgo yiwe, iryo hanga nzorihana, ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ndarihanishe inkota n’inzara n’ikīza, gushitsa aho nzoba mperaheje kubaranduza ukuboko kwiwe." 
Jeremiah27:9 None rero mwebge, ntimuruhe mwumvira ba kamenyi banyu, cank’ abapfumu banyu, cank’ inzozi zanyu, cank’ abamenyi banyu, cank’ abarozi banyu, bababarira, bati Ntimuzoruha musaba umwami w’i Babuloni:" 
Jeremiah27:10 kuko babaragurira ibinyoma, kugira ngo mwambukanwe kure y’igihugu canyu, no kugira ngo nanje ndakibirukanemwo, muhone." 
Jeremiah27:11 Arikw ihanga rizogondera izosi umwami w’i Babuloni, rikamusaba, iryo nzoryemerera kuguma mu gihugu cabo bgite, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; bazokirima, bakibemwo." 
Jeremiah27:12 Nuko mbarira Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda nk’ukw ayo majambo yose ameze, nti Ni mugondere izosi ingōgo y’umwami w’i Babuloni, mumusabe, musabe n’abantu biwe, mubone kubaho." 
Jeremiah27:13 Mugombera iki gupfa, wewe n’abantu bawe, ngo mwicishwe inkota n’inzara n’ikīza, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze kw ihanga ritazokwemera gusaba umwami w’i Babuloni?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Ntimuruhe mwumvira amagambo ya ba kamenyi bababarira, bati Ntimuzoruha musaba umwami w’i Babuloni: kuko babaragurira ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah27:15 Kuk’ Uhoraho avuze kw atari we yabatumye, ariko bavuga ibinyoma mw izina ryiwe; kugira ngw abirukane, muhone, mwe n’ abo ba kamenyi babaragurira." 
Jeremiah27:16 Kandi mbarira n’abaherezi n’ ubgo bgoko bgose, nt’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ntimuruhe mwumvira amagambo y’abo ba kamenyi banyu babaragurira, bat’ Ibintu vy’imbombovu vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho bizohava bigarukanwa bive i Babuloni: kuko babaragurira ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah27:17 Ntimuruhe mubumvira: musabe umwami w’i Babuloni, mubone kubaho: n’iki cotuma iki gisagara gihinduka amatongo?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Namb’ ar’ abavugishwa n’Imana, kandi namb’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riri muri bo, ni bashireko binginge Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ngw ibintu vy’imbombovu bisigaye mu ngoro y’Uhoraho no mu ngoro y’umwami w’i Buyuda, n’i Yerusalemu, bireke kujanwa i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah27:19 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize ku vy’inkingi, no ku vya ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga, no ku vy’ibitereko, no ku vy’ibisigaye vy’imbombovu bigisigaye mur’ iki gisagara," 
Jeremiah27:20 ivyo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni atātwaye, igihe yajana Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda ar’ inyagano, amukūye i Yerusalemu amujanye i Babuloni, bo n’abaganwa bose b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah27:21 n’ukuri uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana ya Isirayeli, ku vy’ibintu vy’imbombovu bisigaye mu ngoro y’Uhoraho no mu ngoro y’umwami w’i Buyuda, n’i Yerusalemu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 ati Bizojanwa i Babuloni, bibeyo, gushitsa umusi azobagendera, akabidūgana, akabisubiza aha hantu; ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah28:1 Maze mur’ uyo mwaka nyene, mu matangura yo kuba ku ngoma kwa Zedekiya, umwami w’i Buyuda, ni wo mwaka wa kane, mu kwezi kwa gatanu, Hananiya mwene Azuri, kamenyi w’i Gibeyoni, ambaririra mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, imbere y’abaherezi n’abantu bose," 
Jeremiah28:2 at’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Mvunnye ingōgo mwambitswe n’ umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah28:3 Hasigaye imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye nkagarukana aha hantu ivy’ imbombovu vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho vyose, ivyo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yasahuye aha hantu, akabijana i Babuloni;" 
Jeremiah28:4 kandi nzogarukana aha hantu Yekoniya mwene Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda, bo n’abānyazwe bose b’i Buyuda bāgiye i Babuloni, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kuko nzovuna ingōgo mwambitswe n’umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah28:5 Maze Yeremiya ūvugishwa n’Imana yishurira Hananiya kamenyi imbere y’abaherezi n’imbere y’abantu bose bāri bahagaze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; 
Jeremiah28:6 Yeremiya ūvugishwa n’Imana aravuga, at’ Amen! Uhoraho n’ akore nk’uko! Uhoraho n’ashitse amajambo yawe uvugishijwe, agarukane ivy’ imbombovu vyo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’abo bose bānyazwe, abakūre i Babuloni abazane aha hantu!" 
Jeremiah28:7 Yamara rero ni wumve iri jambo mvugira mu matwi yawe, no mu matwi y’abantu bose:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Abavugishwa n’Imana ba kera bānyitangiye imbere bakakwitangira imbere nawe, bāvugishijwe ivy’ intambara n’ivy’ ivyago n’ivy’ ikīza bizotera ibihugu vyinshi n’ibihugu vy’ abami bahambaye." 
Jeremiah28:9 Ūvugishwa akavuga ivy’ amahoro, ijambo ry’ uwo muvugishwa ni ryashika, ni ho uyo muvugishwa azomenyekana yuk’ Uhoraho yamutumye koko." 
Jeremiah28:10 Maze Hananiya uwo kamenyi akūra iyo ngōgo mw izosi ry’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya, arayivuna." 
Jeremiah28:11 Hananiya avugira imbere y’abantu bose, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Imyaka ibiri yiramvuriye itarashira, uko ni ko nzovuna ingōgo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yambitse ku mazosi y’amahanga yose. Nuko Yeremiya uwo muvugishwa aca arīgīra." 
Jeremiah28:12 Maz’ ijambo ry’ Uhoraho riza kur’ uwo muvugishwa Yeremiya, Hananiya kamenyi amaze kuvuna iyo ngōgo yari kw izosi ryiwe," 
Jeremiah28:13 riti Genda ubarire Hananiya, ut’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, at’ Uvunnye ingōgo z’ibiti, arik’ ushubije iz’ ivyuma mu gishingo cazo." 
Jeremiah28:14 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Nambitse ingōgo z’ivyuma ku mazosi y’aya mahanga yose, kugira ngo basabe Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni: kandi bazomusaba; kandi namuhaye ibikōko vyo ku misozi na vyo." 
Jeremiah28:15 Nuk’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya aca abarira Hananiya kamenyi, ati Ni wumve, Hananiya: Uhoraho ntiyagutumye, ariko wizigiza ubu bgoko ivy’ ibinyoma." 
Jeremiah28:16 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba ndagukūye kw isi: uyu mwaka urawupfamwo, kuko wavuze ivyo kungarariza jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah28:17 Nuko Hananiya kamenyi apfa mur’ uyo mwaka nyene mu kwezi kw’indwi. 
Jeremiah29:1 Aya ni yo majambo y’icete ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yarungitse ar’ i Yerusalemu, akirungikira abāsigaye b’abashingantahe mu bambukanywe, n’ abaherezi n’abavugishwa n’abantu bose Nebukadineza yambukanye abakūye i Yerusalemu abajana i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah29:2 Ico gihe umwami Yekoniya n’umugabekazi n’abantu b’inkone n’abaganwa b’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu n’ababāji n’abacuzi, bāri bamaze kuvanwa i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah29:3 Akirungikana Elasa mwene Shafani na Gemariya mwene Hilukiya, abo Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda atumye i Babuloni kuri Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, cāri canditse," 
Jeremiah29:4 ng’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, abarira abānyazwe bose, abo yambukanishije ngo bakūrwe i Yerusalemu bajanwe i Babuloni," 
Jeremiah29:5 ati Ni mwiyubakire amazu, muyabemwo; mwirimire amatongo murye ibiyezemwo;" 
Jeremiah29:6 mwiyabīrire abagore, muvyare abahungu n’abakobga; musabire abahungu banyu abageni, mushingire abakobga banyu, kugira ngo na bo bavyare abahungu n’abakobga; murondokereyo, ntimube inkehwa." 
Jeremiah29:7 Mwifurize amahoro igisagara, ico natumye mwambukanirwamwo, mugisengere Uhoraho: kuko kibaye amahoro namwe muzoba amahoro." 
Jeremiah29:8 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ba kamenyi banyu baba muri mwebge n’abapfumu banyu ntibabahende, kandi ntimukumvire inzozi babarotera." 
Jeremiah29:9 Kuko babaragurira ibinyoma mw izina ryanje, nanje ntābatumye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah29:10 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Imyaka mirongwirindwi ni yarangira mur’ i Babuloni, nzobagendera, mbashitsekw ijambo ryanje ryiza, mbagarukane aha hantu." 
Jeremiah29:11 Kuko nzi ivyiyumviro mbiyumvirako, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kw ar’ ivyiyumviro vy’amahoro, atar’ ivy’ ivyago, kugira ngo mbahe ivyizigiro vyo mw iherezo ryanyu." 
Jeremiah29:12 Kandi muzonyambaza, muzoza munsenge, nanje nzobumva." 
Jeremiah29:13 Muzondondera kandi muzombona, ni mwandondeza umutima wanyu wose." 
Jeremiah29:14 Nanje nzobabonekera, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ntume muhindukira, muve mu kinyago, kandi nzobakoranya mbakūye mu mahanga yose n’ahantu hose aho nabirukaniye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi nzobagarukana ahantu nabakūye igihe nabambukanisha." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ko muvuga, mut’ Uhoraho yaduhagurukirije abavugishwa na we i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah29:16 Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize ku vy’umwami ari ku ngoma ya Dawidi, no ku vy’ abantu bose baba mur’ iki gisagara, ni bo bene wanyu mutājanye igihe mwambukanwa;" 
Jeremiah29:17 uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Rāba nzorungika inkota n’ inzara n’ikīza muri bo, mbahindure nk’insukoni ziteye ishishi, zidashoboka kuribga kubgo kubora." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nzobirukanisha inkota n’inzara n’ikīza, mbatange batererekanywe irya n’ino mu bihugu vy’abami bose bo mw isi, ngo babe ibivume n’akajoreza n’ abo kuvuzwakw agahwa n’igitutsi mu mahanga yose aho nabirukaniye;" 
Jeremiah29:19 kuko batumviye amajambo yanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ayo natumye abasavyi banje mvugisha, nama nzindurwa no kubatuma, ariko ntibaruha bumva, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah29:20 None rero ni mwumve ijambo ryanje, jewe Uhoraho, mwebge mwese abambukanywe, abo narungitse ngo muve i Yerusalemu muje i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah29:21 Uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ku vya Ahabu mwene Kolaya no ku vya Zedekiya mwene Mayaseya, babaragurira ibinyoma mw izina ryanje, nt’ Ehe nzobatanga mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, na we azobicira imbere y’ amaso yanyu;" 
Jeremiah29:22 kandi bazohinduka umuvumo wo kuvumana w’abambukanywe bose b’i Buyuda bar’ i Babuloni, ng’ Uhoraho arakakugira nka Zedekiya na Ahabu, abo umwami w’i Babuloni yataze ku muriro babona;" 
Jeremiah29:23 kuko bākoze ivy’ ubupfu mu Bgisirayeli, bagasambana n’abagore ba bagenzi babo, bakavuga amagambo y’ibinyoma mw izina ryanje, ayo ntābageze; jewe ubganje ndabizi, kandi nd’icabona, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah29:24 Kandi ku vya Shemaya w’i Nehelamu uvuge," 
Jeremiah29:25 ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ko warungitse ivyete mw izina ryawe, ukabirungikira ababa i Yerusalemu bose, na Zefaniya mwene Mayaseya umuherezi, n’abaherezi bose," 
Jeremiah29:26 ukavuga, ut’ Uhoraho ko yaguhinduye umuherezi mu gishingo c’umuherezi Yehoyada, namwe kugira ngo mube ababgiriza mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ngo mubuze umuntu wese w’ umusazi yīgira ūvugishwa n’Imana, ngo mumushire mu mpatane z’ibiti no mu minyororo;" 
Jeremiah29:27 none rero n’iki cakubujije guhana Yeremiya w’i Anatoti, yīgira ūvugishwa n’Imana ngo yabatumweko?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Kw adutumakw amajambo i Babuloni, avuga, ngo Turacasigaje igihe kirekire tur’ inyagano: ngo Ni twiyubakire amazu, tuyabemwo; ngo Ni twirimire amatongo turye ibiyezemwo." 
Jeremiah29:29 Maze Zefaniya umuherezi asoma ico cete ūvugishwa n’ Imana Yeremiya yumva. 
Jeremiah29:30 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah29:31 riti Tuma ku bājanywe kw inyagano bose, ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize ku vya Shemaya w’i Nehelamu, ati Kw ababariye amagambo, nanje ntāmutumye, akabizigiza ibinyoma," 
Jeremiah29:32 nuko rero, uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Rāba, nzohana Shemaya w’i Nehelamu n’ uruvyaro rwiwe; ntazosigarana n’ umwe mu biwe azoba mur’ ubu bgoko, na we ntazoruha abona ivyiza nzogirira abantu banje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze: kuko yavuze ivy’ ukungarariza jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah30:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah30:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Wandike mu gitabo amajambo yose nakubariye." 
Jeremiah30:3 Kukw imisi izoza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzotuma abantu banje b’Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bahindukira, bave mu ngoyi zabo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi nzotuma bagaruka mu gihugu nahaye ba sekuruza, baciganzire." 
Jeremiah30:4 Aya ni yo majambo Uhoraho yavuze ku Bisirayeli n’Abayuda: 
Jeremiah30:5 at’ Uku ni ko mbivuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Twumvise ijwi ry’ abari mu gatengo no mu bgoba, atar’ iry’ abari mu mahoro." 
Jeremiah30:6 Banza mubaze, murābe ko hogira umugabo aja ku nda ngw avyare: none n’iki gitumye mbona umugabo wese yifashe ku mafyinga nk’umugore aramutswe, mu maso ha bose hagahindurira?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Ew’ amagorwa ari hano! Kuk’ uwo musi uhambaye, nta wuhwanye na wo: n’igihe c’umubabaro wa ba Yakobo; yamara bazogikizwa." 
Jeremiah30:8 Maze kur’ uwo musi, ni jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mbivuze, nzovuna ingōgo bambitswe, ndayikūre kw izosi ryabo, ncagagure imvuto baboheshejwe; kandi ntibazoba bakijakarira amahanga:" 
Jeremiah30:9 ariko bazosaba jewe, Uhoraho Imana yabo, na Dawidi umwami wabo, uwo nzobahagurukiriza." 
Jeremiah30:10 None rero ntutinye, ewe Yakobo musavyi wanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize; nturanduke umutima, ewe Isirayeli: kuko rāba nzogukiza ngukūre kure, uruvyaro rwawe ndarukūre mu gihugu rwajanywemwo ar’ inyagano; Yakobo azogaruka, kand’ azoba amahoro ata nkomanzi, kandi nta wuzomutera ubgoba." 
Jeremiah30:11 Kuko ndi kumwe nawe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kugira ngo ngukize; kuko nzoherengeteza amahanga yose, ayo nagushwiragirijemwo: ariko weho sinzoguherengeteza; mugabo nzogubana ibigeze, sinzokureka ntaguhannye." 
Jeremiah30:12 Kuk’ ukw ari ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nt’ Igikomere cawe ntikivūrika, n’igisebe cawe n’ ikigoye." 
Jeremiah30:13 Nta wo kukwitsa ariho, kugira ng’ upfukwe igikomere: nta n’imiti ufise yo kukuvūra." 
Jeremiah30:14 Abūzure bawe bose barakwibagiye; ntibakikubabaye; kuko ngukomerekeje nk’ūkomerekejwe n’umwansi, ngukubise bga ruburakigongwe; ni kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyawe vyinshi, kukw ivyaha vyawe vyari vyiyongeranije." 
Jeremiah30:15 Non’ igikomere cawe kikuririza iki? K’uburibge bgawe butavūrika; ni kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyawe vyinshi, kukw ivyaha vyawe vyari vyiyongeranije, ivyo ni vyo vyatumye nkugira ntyo." 
Jeremiah30:16 Yamar’ abo bose bakurya na bo bazoribga; abarwanizi bawe bose, umuntu wese muri bo, bazojanwa ar’ inyagano; abākugize umunyagwa na bo bazonyagwa, abākunyaga bose nzobagira inyagano." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ariko nzosubira kugukomeza, nzogukiza ibikomere vyawe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kuko bakwise uwirukanywe, bati Ni Siyoni, hatagifise ūkihababara." 
Jeremiah30:18 Uku ni ko ndabivuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Rāba nzotuma abo mu mahema ya Yakobo bahindukira, bave mu ngoyi zabo, ngirire ikigongwe amazu yabo; kand’ igisagara kizokwubakwa mu bitongozi vyaho, n’ ingoro isubire kumera nk’uko yahora." 
Jeremiah30:19 Muri vyo hazoba gushima, n’ijwi ry’abanezerewe: kandi nzobagwiza, ntibazoba bake; nzobaha icubahiro, ntibazoba abo hasi." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abana babo bazomera nk’uko bār’ ubga mbere, kand’ ikoraniro ryabo rizokomezwa imbere yanje, nanje nzohana abābahahaza bose." 
Jeremiah30:21 Umwami wabo azoba uwo muri bo bgite, ūbaganza akomoke hagati muri bo: nanje nzomwiyegereza, kand’ azonshikīra: kuko ni nde yohangara kunshikīra? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije." 
Jeremiah30:22 Kandi muzoba abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yanyu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Rāba ikirura c’Uhoraho, ni bgo burake bgiwe, kirahinze, mbere n’ikirura c’inkubebe: kizorindimukira ku mitwe y’abanyavyaha." 
Jeremiah30:24 Uburake bg’inkazi bg’Uhoraho ntibuzohwama kugeza ah’ azoba ashikije ivyo umutima wiwe wagabiye, abiheraheje: mu misi yo hanyuma muzobitahura." 
Jeremiah31:1 Ico gihe, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzoba Imana y’imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli, na bo bazoba abantu banje." 
Jeremiah31:2 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abantu bāsigajwe n’inkota ni bo bāgiriwe ubuntu mu bugaragwa, ni bo Bisirayeli, abo nagiye mpa kuruhuka." 
Jeremiah31:3 Uhoraho yanyiyeretse kera, ati N’ukuri naragukunze urukundo rudashira; ni co gituma nkwiyegerezanya imbabazi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Nzosubira kukwubaka, nawe uzoba wubakitse, ewe nkumi, ni yo Bgisirayeli: uzosubira gushazisha udushako twawe tw’ingoma, usohoke uvyinane n’abanezerewe." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uzosubira gutera inzabibu ku misozi y’i Samariya: abarimyi bazozitera, bazīyereze." 
Jeremiah31:6 Kuko hazoza umusi abama bagavye ku misozi ya Efurayimu bazosemerera, bati Ni muve hasi tudūge i Siyoni, dushengerere Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho agize, ati Muririmbane umunezero kubga Yakobo, musemerere kubg’ umukuru w’amahanga: mwamamaze mushima, mut’ Uhoraho, kiza abantu bawe, ni bo masigarira y’Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah31:8 Ehe nzobazana mbakūye mu gihugu c’i burārūko, mbakoranirize hamwe mbakūye ku mpera z’ isi; kandi bazozanana n’impumyi n’ūcumbagira, n’umugore akuriwe hamwe n’ūramutswe: bazogaruka ino ar’ ishengero rinini." 
Jeremiah31:9 Bazoza barira, kandi nzobarōngōra banyinginga, nzobacisha i ruhande y’inzūzi zuzuye, mu nzira igororotse aho batazotsitara; kuko Isirayeli namubereye se, Efurayimu n’imfura yanje." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwa mahanga, muvyamamaze mu bizinga vya kure mu kiyaga: muvuge, mut’ Uwashwiragije Abisirayeli ni we azobatororokanya, abazigame, nk’uk’ umwungere agirira umukuku wiwe." 
Jeremiah31:11 Kuk’ Uhoraho yagobotoye aba Yakobo, yabacunguye abakūra mu kuboko kw’uwabarusha inkomezi." 
Jeremiah31:12 Bazoza baririmbire ku mpinga y’i Siyoni, bazohondogana bose hamwe, baja ku vyiza vy’Uhoraho, ni vyo ngano na vino n’amavuta n’imyagazi y’imikuku n’inyana z’amasho. Imitima yabo izomera nk’indimiro ikwegewemw’ umwuzi; nta ho bazogira umubabaro ukundi." 
Jeremiah31:13 Ni ho inkumi izonezerezwa n’ imvyino, n’abasore n’abatāma bose hamwe: kukw ikigandaro cabo nzogihindura umunezero, nzobīrūra, mbanezereze mbakūye mu mubabaro wabo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Imitima y’ abaherezi nzoyihāza ibinure, kand’ abantu banje bazohāzwa n’ ivyiza vyanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah31:15 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Induru yumvikana i Rama, amaborogo n’amarira menshi: Rakeli aririra abana biwe, yanka kwīrūrwa umubabaro w’abana, kuko batakiriho." 
Jeremiah31:16 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Buza ijwi ryawe ryoye kurira, n’amaso yawe yoye gukorora amosozi, kukw ibikorwa vyawe bizokwishurwa, ni k’Uhoraho agize; kandi bazosubira kugaruka bavuye mu gihugu c’abansi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Kandi hazoba ivyizigiro vyo mw iherezo ryawe, ni k’Uhoraho agize; abana bawe bazosubira kugaruka mu gihugu cabo bgite." 
Jeremiah31:18 N’ukuri numvise Efurayimu yiganyira, ati Warankubise, ndakubitika, mmera nk’inyana itamenyereye ingōgo: mpindukiza mbone guhindukira, kuko wewe ur’ Uhoraho Imana yanje." 
Jeremiah31:19 N’ ukuri mmaze guhindukizwa narihannye; bimaze kunyigisha narishishitiye: nagize isoni, mbere ndatētērwa, kukw ibiteye isoni vyo mu buto bganje vyansubiyeko." 
Jeremiah31:20 Mbega Efurayimu n’umwana wanje nkunda koko? N’umwana ateye igomwe? Kuk’ uko ndamukankamiye nama ndamwibukana igishika; ni co gituma ndamuhagarikira umutima: sinzobura kumugirira ikigongwe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah31:21 Wishingire ibimenyetso bikurangira inzira, wironkere ibiti vy’ivyapa: shira umutima ku nzira y’iroro, imwe wajana ukijayo: hindukira, ewe nkumi, ruvyaro rwa Isirayeli, hindukira ugaruke mur’ ibi bisagara vyawe." 
Jeremiah31:22 Uzogeza ryari kwāngāra irya n’ino, ewe mukobga wasubiye inyuma? Kuk’ Uhoraho yaremye ikintu gisha mw isi, k’umugore azozigama umugabo."
