Jeremiah31:23 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Bazosubira ukundi gusha kuvugira aya majambo mu gihugu c’i Buyuda no mu bisagara vyaho, ni nasubira kubagarukana mbakūye mu kinyago, bat’ Uhoraho n’aguhezagire, wewe i wabo w’ubugororotsi, wewe musozi wera." 
Jeremiah31:24 Maz’ ab’ i Buyuda n’ibisagara vyaho vyose bazohasāsagara; bo n’abarimyi n’abaragiye imikuku. 
Jeremiah31:25 Kuko nashubije intege mu mutima urushe, n’umutima udendebukiwe nkawuhēmbūra." 
Jeremiah31:26 Bishitse aho ndikangura, nsanga itiro ryari rindyoheye." 
Jeremiah31:27 Eh’ imisi izoza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzobiba imbibe, ni yo nzu ya Isirayeli n’inzu ya Yuda, ndayibibemw’ imbuto, ari zo bantu n’ibitungwa." 
Jeremiah31:28 Maz’ ico gihe, nk’uko nabahozakw igitsure ngo mbarandure, mbahomvore, mbasangangure, mbahonnye, mbababaze, ni ko nzobahozakw ijisho ngo mbubake mbatēragire, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah31:29 Mur’ iyo misi ntibazoba bakivuga, ngo Ba se barya inzabibu z’ibitumbge, amenyo y’abana akajiginyurwa." 
Jeremiah31:30 Arik’ umuntu wese azopfa azize ivyiwe bigabitanyo nyene: ūriye inzabibu z’ibitumbge, ayiwe menyo nyene ni yo azojiginyurwa." 
Jeremiah31:31 Eh’ imisi igira ize, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, aho nzosezerana isezerano risha n’umuryango wa Isirayeli n’umuryango wa Yuda:" 
Jeremiah31:32 ridahwanye n’isezerano nasezeranye na ba sekuruza, ku musi nabafata ukuboko nkabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa; kand’ iryo sezerano nyene bāraryishe, naho nari shebuja, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah31:33 Arikw iri ni ryo sezerano nzosezerana n’umuryango w’Abisirayeli hanyuma y’ iyo misi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; nzoshira ivyagezwe vyanje imbere muri bo, no mu mitima yabo ni ho nzovyandika; nanje nzobabera Imana, na bo bazoba abantu banje." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kandi ntibazoba bacigishanya, ng’ umuntu wese yigishe mugenzi we, canke ngo yigishe uwo bavukana, ati Menya Uhoraho; kuko bose bazonyimenyera, uhereye kuri nyarucari ugashitsa k’ūhambaye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kuko nzoharira ukugabitanya kwabo, kand’ icaha cabo sinzocibuka ukundi." 
Jeremiah31:35 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uwatanze izuba ngo ribe umuco w’ umurango, akagera ukwezi n’ inyenyeri ngo vyake mw ijoro, ni we azīkurura ikiyaga ngw imipfunda yaco ibomborane: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryiwe:" 
Jeremiah31:36 at’ Ivyo nageze ivyo ni vyava mu nyonga zanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ni ho uruvyaro rwa Isirayeli na rwo ruzoreka kuba ihanga mu nyonga zanje ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah31:37 Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, at’ Ijuru ryogerwa, amatanguriro y’isi agaserangurwa, ni ho nanje noca uruvyaro rwose rwa Isirayeli, mbahōye ivyo bakoze vyose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah31:38 Eh’ imisi izoza, ni k’Uhoraho agize, ca gisagara kizokwubakirwa Uhoraho, uhereye ku munara wa Hananeli, ugashitsa no kw irembo ryo ku mfuruka y’uruzitiro." 
Jeremiah31:39 Kand’ umugozi bazogeresha uzovuduka aho hantu ugororwe ushike ku gatumba k’i Garebu, maz’ uzozenguka ushike i Gowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Kand’ umwonga wose uhambgamw’ imivyimba ugatābgamwo n’umunyota, n’indimiro zose ukarinda ushitsa ku mugezi Kidironi, ugashitsa no ku mfuruka y’irembo ry’amafarasi aherekeye i burasirazuba, hose hazoba ahēra h’ Uhoraho; ntihazokwongera guhomvorwa ngo hasangangurwe gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah32:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho mu mwaka ugira icumi Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, ni wo wagira icumi n’umunani Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma." 
Jeremiah32:2 Maz’ ico gihe ingabo z’uwo mwami w’i Babuloni zari zugarije i Yerusalemu: kand’ uwavugishwa n’ Imana Yeremiya yari yabohewe mu rugo rw’ibohero rwari rubangikanye n’ingoro y’umwami w’i Buyuda. 
Jeremiah32:3 Kuko Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda yari yamuboshe, ati N’iki gituma uvuga ng’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba nzotanga iki gisagara mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni, kand’ azohatsinda?" 
Jeremiah32:4 Uti Na Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda ntazokira amaboko y’Abakaludaya, arik’ uti Ntazobura gutangwa mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni, uti Bazokwivuganira barābana imbonankubone;" 
Jeremiah32:5 uti Kand’ azoshumika Zedekiya amujane i Babuloni, ngw Azobayo gushitsa aho nzomugendera, ngo Ni k’Uhoraho agize; ngo Naho mworwanya Abakaludaya ntimuzotsinda?" 
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremiya aravuga, at’ Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Jeremiah32:7 riti Hanameli mwene so wanyu Shalumu, agira aze kuri wewe, akubgire, ati Ni wigurire ishamvu yanje iri Anatoti: kukw ari wewe wo kuyicungura." 
Jeremiah32:8 Nuko Hanameli mwene wacu aza kuri jewe aho ndi mu rugo rw’ibohero, nk’ukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, arambarira, ati Ndakwinginze, gura ishamvu yanje iri Anatoti, ho mu ntāra ya Benyamini: kuko na kare yar’ iyawe, kandi ni wewe wo kuyicungura: non’ uyigurire. Ni ho naciye mmenya yukw iryo jambo ar’ iry’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah32:9 Nuko ngura na Hanameli mwene wacu iyo shamvu iri Anatoti, ndamugerera ifeza ku munzane, ziba shekeli cumi n’indwi." 
Jeremiah32:10 Nandika icete c’uko tuguze, nkiyagirizakw ishashara ndomamw’ ikimenyetso, mpamagara ivyabona, ndamugerera za feza ku munzane." 
Jeremiah32:11 Nuko nābīra ico cete c’uko tuguze, ikidomwekw ikimenyetso nk’ukw ivyagezwe n’imigenzo biri, bo n’ikindi kitamatanijwe," 
Jeremiah32:12 maz’ ico cete c’uko tuguze ngihēra Baruki mwene Neriya wa Mahaseya imbere ya Hanameli mwene wacu, n’imbere y’ivyabona vyari vyanditse amazina yabo kur’ ico cete c’uko tuguze, n’imbere y’Abayuda bose bari bicaye mu rugo rw’ibohero." 
Jeremiah32:13 Nihanikiririza Baruki imbere yabo," 
Jeremiah32:14 nt’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Jana ibi vyete, iki cete c’uko tuguze kimatanishijwe ishashara, bo n’iki kitamatanijwe, ubibīke mw ikarabo, kugira ngo bize bimare igihe kinini." 
Jeremiah32:15 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Amazu n’amatongo n’imirima y’imizabibu bizokwongera kugurwa mur’ iki gihugu." 
Jeremiah32:16 Nuko mpejeje gushīra Baruki mwene Neriya ico cete c’uko naguze, nca nsenga Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah32:17 nt’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho! Erega ni wewe waremye ijuru n’isi, ubiremesha ubushobozi bgawe buhambaye, n’ukuboko kwawe kurāmvuye: nta kintu na kimwe kikunanira." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ni wewe ugirira imbabazi ibihumbi n’ibihumbi, ibigabitanyo vya ba se ubihōra n’abana babo babasubiriye mu gishingo: ni wewe ūhambaye, Imana y’ubushobozi, y’izina ryitwa Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo:" 
Jeremiah32:19 ur’ umujanama ahambaye, ur’ umunyenkomezi mu bikorwa; inyonga zawe zītegereza ingeso zose z’abana b’abantu, kugira ng’ ugerere umuntu wese ibikwiranye n’ ingeso ziwe, n’ibikwiranye n’ivy’ ibikorwa vyiwe vyamuje." 
Jeremiah32:20 Ni wewe washizeh’ ibimenyetso n’ ibitangaza mu gihugu ca Egiputa, gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi, mu Bisirayeli no mu bandi bantu, ukīronkera izina rya rurangiranwa, nk’uko rimeze n’uyu musi;" 
Jeremiah32:21 ugakūza abantu bawe b’Abisirayeli mu gihugu ca Egiputa ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza, n’ukuboko gukomeye kandi kurāmvuye, n’ibiteye ubgoba bginshi;" 
Jeremiah32:22 ukabaha iki gihugu, ico warahiye ba sekuruza babo kuzobaha, ar’ igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki;" 
Jeremiah32:23 baracinjira barakiganza; yamara banka kukwumvira, no kugendera mu vyagezwe vyawe; ntibakora na kimwe mu vyo wabageze vyose gukora: ico ni co catumye ubatēza ivyo vyago vyose." 
Jeremiah32:24 Eh’ ibirundo barundiye kwūririrako ngo baneshe igisagara birashitse: igisagara gitanzwe mu maboko y’Abakaludaya bagiteye, kubg’ inkota n’inzara n’ikīza. Ivyo wavuze birashitse, nawe urik’ uravyibonera." 
Jeremiah32:25 Yamara Mwami Uhoraho, wambariye ngo nigurire itongo amahera, ngo ni mpamagare ivyabona, kand’ iki gisagara gitanzwe mu maboko y’ Abakaludaya!" 
Jeremiah32:26 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah32:27 rit’ Ehe nd’ Uhoraho, Imana y’abariho bose: mbega har’ ikintu na kimwe kinnanira?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzotanga iki gisagara mu maboko y’Abakaludaya, no mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza, umwami w’i Babuloni, kand’ azogitsinda;" 
Jeremiah32:29 n’Abakaludaya bateye iki gisagara, bazogishikamwo bagiturire bagitongore, bo n’amazu būriyeko hejuru ngo bosereze imibavu Bayali, bagasukira ibiturire izindi mana, kugira ngo bantere ishavu." 
Jeremiah32:30 Kukw Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bākoze ibibi gusa mu nyonga zanje uhereye mu buto bgabo, kuko ku Bisirayeli ata kindi atar’ ukuntera ishavu, barinteresha ibikorwa vy’amaboko yabo, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah32:31 Kukw iki gisagara, guhēra ku musi bācubakiye gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi, cabaye ico kuntera ishavu n’ubushangashirwe, bituma ngira ngikūre mu nyonga zanje;" 
Jeremiah32:32 kubg’ ibibi vyose Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bakoze kugira ngo bantere ishavu, bo n’abami babo n’abaganwa babo n’abaherezi babo, na ba kamenyi babo n’abagabo b’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Banteye ibitugu mu gishingo co kuntumbera, naho nabahanūra nkāma nzindurwa no kubahanūra, yamara ntibanyumviye ngo babishire ku mutima." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ariko bāshize ibizira vyabo vy’ ubuyobe mu ngoro yanje yitirirwa izina ryanje ngo bayihumanye. 
Jeremiah32:35 Kandi bātabiye ibitabo Bayali, ni vyo biri mu mwonga wa mwene Hinomu, bagatanga abana babo b’abahungu n’abakobga kw ibimazi ngo boserezwe Moleki; ar’ ikintu ntābageze, kitigeze no kuza mu mutima wanje, ko bokora ivyo bizira, bagacumuza Abayuda." 
Jeremiah32:36 None rero, uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ku vy’iki gisagara, ico muvuga ngo Gitanzwe mu kuboko kw’ umwami w’i Babuloni kubg’ inkota n’inzara n’ikīza:" 
Jeremiah32:37 nti Rāba nzobakoranya, mbakūre mu bihugu vyose aho nzoba narabirukaniye mfise ishavu n’ubushangashirwe n’ uburake bg’inkazi; kandi nzokwongera kubagarukana aha hantu, ndababesheh’ amahoro:" 
Jeremiah32:38 kandi bazoba abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Nzobaha umutima umwe no kujana inzira imwe, kugira ngo bahore banyubaha gushitsa ibihe vyose; ngo bahave baroranirwe, bo n’ abana babo bazoba babasubiriye mu gishingo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Kandi nzosezerana na bo isezerano ritazoshira, yuko ntazorora irya ngo mbahebe, ndeke kubagirira neza; kandi mu mitima yabo nzohashira kunyubaha, na bo boye kumvako." 
Jeremiah32:41 Mbere nzobanezererwa mbagirire neza, kandi nzobatēragira mur’ iki gihugu vy’ukuri, bivuye mu mutima wanje wose no mu mushaha wanje wose." 
Jeremiah32:42 Kuk’ ukw ari ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Nk’uko nazaniye ubu bgoko ibi vyago vyose bikomeye, uko ni ko nzobazanakw ivyiza vyose nabasezeraniye." 
Jeremiah32:43 Kand’ amatongo azogurwa mur’ iki gihugu, ico muririra, ngo Kirakomvomvowe, ata muntu agisigayemwo cank’ igitungwa; ngo Gitanzwe mu maboko y’Abakaludaya." 
Jeremiah32:44 Abantu bazokwigurira amatongo amahera, bandike ivyete vy’uko baguze, babimatanishe ishashara bayidomemw’ ikimenyetso, bahamagare ivyabona; bizoba birtyo mu gihugu ca Benyamini, n’ahantu hahereranye n’i Yerusalemu, no mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, no mu bisagara vyo mu mugamba waho, no mu bisagara vyo mu gihugu giciye bugufi, no mu bisagara vy’i bumanuko: kuko nzotuma bahindukira bave mu kinyago, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah33:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kuza kuri Yeremiya ubugira kabiri, acugaraniwe mu rugo rw’ibohero," 
Jeremiah33:2 rit’ Uhoraho abikora, Uhoraho abirema akabikomeza, Uhoraho ni ryo zina ryiwe, uku ni kw agize," 
Jeremiah33:3 ati Mpamagara, nanje ndakwitaba, nkwereke ibihambaye n’ivyikinze, ivy’ utaribgamenye." 
Jeremiah33:4 Kuk’ ukw ari ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ku vy’amazu yo mur’ iki gisagara, no ku vy’ingoro z’umwami w’i Buyuda, vyasambuwe ngo bavyubakishe aho kwikingiriza ngo barwanye abitwaje inkota būrira ku birundo kubatera," 
Jeremiah33:5 ni bo Bakaludaya bazokwuzuza ayo mazu imivyimba y’abantu nicishije uburake bganje n’ubushangashirwe bganje, kuko bātumye mpisha mu nyonga hanje iki gisagara kubg’ ivyaha vyabo vyose;" 
Jeremiah33:6 nti Rāba nzohazanira gukira no kuvūrwa, kandi nzobavūra; nzobahishurira amahoro bo n’ukuri vy’isinzi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Kandi nzotuma Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bahindukira bave mu kinyago, nzosubira mbubake nk’uko vyari bir’ ubga mbere." 
Jeremiah33:8 Nzobōza ibigabitanyo vyabo vyose, ivyo bangabitanijeko; nzobaharira ibigabitanyo vyabo vyose bangabitanijeko n’ivyo bancumuyeko." 
Jeremiah33:9 Kand’ iki gisagara kizombera izina ry’umunezero, kimbere n’ishimwe n’icubahiro imbere y’amahanga yose yo mw isi, abazokwumva ivyiza vyose nabakoreye; bazotinya bahinde agashitsi kubg’ ivyiza vyose n’ amahoro yose ndahahaye." 
Jeremiah33:10 Uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nt’ Aha hantu aho muririra, ngo Harakomvomvowe, ata muntu agisigayeho cank’ igitungwa, ngo No mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda n’ uko, no mu miharuro y’i Yerusalemu, ngo Hasigaye ar’ imisaka, ata n’umuntu ata n’ūkihaba ata n’igitungwa;" 
Jeremiah33:11 aha hantu nyene hazosubira kwumvikana ijwi ry’umunezero n’iryo guhimbarwa, n’ijwi ry’umukwe n’iry’ umugeni, n’ijwi ry’abavuga, bati Ni mushime Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, kuk’ Uhoraho ari mwiza, kukw imbabazi ziwe zamaho ibihe bidashira; n’iry’ abazanye ibimazi vy’ishimwe mu ngoro yanje Uhoraho. Kuko nzotuma iki gihugu kiva mu kinyago, kikamera nk’ ubga mbere, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah33:12 Kand’ uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, nt’ Aha hantu hakomvomvowe ata muntu agisigayeho cank’ igitungwa, no mu bisagara vyaho vyose ar’ uko, hazosubira kuboneka amarāro y’abungere bavyagiza imikuku yabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Imikuku izosubira gutaha itonze imirongo mu bisagara vyo mu mugamba waho, no mu bisagara vyo mu bihugu biciye bugufi, no mu bisagara vy’i bumanuko, no mu gihugu ca Benyamini n’ahantu hahereranye n’i Yerusalemu, no mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda, bayiharūre, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah33:14 Eh’ imisi izoza, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzoshitsa rya jambo ryiza navuze ku nzu ya Isirayeli no ku nzu ya Yuda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ico gihe nzoshamikisha kuri Dawidi uwitwa Shami w’umugororotsi; azoca iziroranye n’izigororotse mu gihugu. 
Jeremiah33:16 Mur’ iyo misi Abayuda bazokira, i Yerusalemu hazoba amahoro: kand’ iri ni ryo zina hazokwitwa, ng’ Uhoraho ni we kugororoka kwacu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Kuk’ ukw ari ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Dawidi ntazokwigera abura uwo kuzokwama ku ngoma yiwe, aganza ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Jeremiah33:18 N’abaherezi b’Abalewi n’uko, ntibazokwigera babura uwo kuzokwama ahagarara imbere yanje ngw atange ibimazi avyose, ngo yose n’ibishikanywe, no kwama akerera ibimazi." 
Jeremiah33:19 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah33:20 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Namba mwoshobora guhindura isezerano ryanje ryashinze umurango k’ubaho, n’isezerano ryanje ryashinze ijoro ko ribaho, ng’ umurango n’ijoro ntibikūranwe mu bihe vyavyo;" 
Jeremiah33:21 ni ho n’isezerano ryanje nasezeranye na Dawidi umusavyi wanje ryohindurwa, akabura umwana wo kumusubirira ku ngoma; bo n’iryo nasezeranye n’ Abalewi, abaherezi banje bankorera." 
Jeremiah33:22 Nk’ukw ingabo zose z’inyenyeri zo kw ijuru zitoharūrika, n’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga utogereka, ni ko nzogwiza uruvyaro rwa Dawidi umusavyi wanje, n’urw’ Abalewi bankorera." 
Jeremiah33:23 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah33:24 riti Mbega ntiwiyumviriye ivyo aba bantu bavuga, ngw Imiryango yompi Uhoraho yatoranije yayicīye? Uko ni ko bakēngēra abantu banje, kuko bagira ngo ntibakir’ ihanga." 
Jeremiah33:25 Uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Namb’ isezerano ryanje ryāshinze umurango n’ijoro ritāhamye, namba ntāshinze ivyagezwe vy’ijuru n’isi," 
Jeremiah33:26 nuko rero nzoca n’uruvyaro rwa Yakobo, n’urwa Dawidi umusavyi wanje, ngo noye gutora mu ruvyaro rwiwe abo kuganza uruvyaro rwa Aburahamu na Isaka na Yakobo; kuko nzotuma bahindukira bakava mu kinyago, kandi nzobagirira imbabazi." 
Jeremiah34:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho, igihe Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni n’ingabo ziwe zose n’abami bo mw isi yose yaganzwa na we, n’ amahanga yose, bāriko bararwana n’i Yerusalemu n’ibisagara vyaho vyose," 
Jeremiah34:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Genda ubarire Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, umubgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngw Eh’ azotanga iki gisagara mu kuboko kw’ umwami w’i Babuloni, na we azogitongoza umuriro:" 
Jeremiah34:3 nawe ubgawe ntuzomukira, ntuzobura gufatwa ng’ utangwe mu kuboko kwiwe; uzomwibonera imbonankubone, na we muzokwivuganira; kand’ uzoja i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah34:4 Uti Yamara ni wumve ijambo ryiwe Uhoraho, ewe Zedekiya mwami w’i Buyuda: ut’ Uku ni kw avuze ku vyawe, ati Ntuzokwicwa n’inkota," 
Jeremiah34:5 arik’ uzokwipfira bupfe; nk’ uko boshereje imibavu ba sogokuruza, abami bākwitangiye imbere, ni ko bazoyikwosereza nawe; bazokuborogera, bati Yewe mwami wacu! uti Kukw ari we avuze iryo jambo, uti Ni kw agize." 
Jeremiah34:6 Nuk’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya abarira Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda ayo majambo yose ar’ i Yerusalemu," 
Jeremiah34:7 igihe ingabo z’umwami w’i Babuloni zāriko zirarwana n’i Yerusalemu n’ibisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda vyari bigisigaye, n’i Lakishi n’i Azeka; kukw ivyo ari vyo vyari bigisigaye mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda bikizitiriwe inzitiro." 
Jeremiah34:8 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho, igihe umwami Zedekiya yar’ amaze gusezerana isezerano n’abantu bose b’i Yerusalemu, ryo gutanga umwidegemvyo;" 
Jeremiah34:9 kugira ng’ umuntu wese arekure umuja wiwe, ar’ uwitwa umuhungu, cank’ umukobga, ar’ Umuheburayo cank’ Umuheburayokazi abe uwidegemvya; kugira ngo hoye kuba ūbagaba, ar’ Umuyuda ngw agabe mugenzi we." 
Jeremiah34:10 Nukw abaganwa bose n’ abantu bose baramwumvira, abāri basezeranye iryo sezerano ry’uk’ umuntu wese akwiye kurekura umuja wiwe, ar’ uwitwa umuhungu cank’ umukobga, abe uwidegemvya, ngo hoye kuba ūkibagaba; baramwumvira, barabarekura;" 
Jeremiah34:11 ariko hanyuma barihindukiza, bagarukana abo baja b’abahungu n’abakobga, abo bāri barekuye ngo babe abidegemvya, babasubiza mu buja ukw ar’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ico ni co catumye ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah34:13 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’ Abisirayeli, ati Nasezeranye isezerano na ba sogokuruza, umusi nabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa, no mu nzu y’ubuja," 
Jeremiah34:14 nt’ Ukw imyaka ndwi igiye gushira, umuntu wese az’ arekure mugenzi we w’Umuheburayo, uwo yaguze akamukorera imyaka ndwi, amurekure amuveko, abe uwidegemvya: yamara ba sogokuruza ntibānyumvira, canke ngo bantege ugutwi." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ariko mweho mwari mwigaruye, mukora igitunganye mu nyonga zanje, mutanga umwidegemvyo, umuntu wese arekura mugenzi we; kandi mwari musezeraniye isezerano imbere yanje mu ngoro yitirirwa izina ryanje;" 
Jeremiah34:16 maze murihindukiza, mutukisha izina ryanje, umuntu wese agarukana umuja wiwe ar’ umuhungu cank’ umukobga, abo mwari mwarekuye ngo babe abidegemvya uko bagomba; mubasubiza mu buja ukw ar’ abahungu n’abakobga." 
Jeremiah34:17 Nuko rero, uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, nti Ntimwanyumviye, ngo mutange umwidegemvyo, ng’ umuntu wese arekure mwene wabo, umuntu wese arekure mugenzi we: nuko rero nanje ntanze umwidegemvyo kuri mwebge, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, w’inkota n’ikīza n’inzara; kandi nzotuma mutererekanywa irya n’ino mu bihugu vy’ abami bose bo mw isi." 
Jeremiah34:18 Kandi nzotanga abantu bāciye mw isezerano ryanje, ntibashitse amajambo y’isezerano bāsezeraniye imbere yanje, hamwe bāhimburamwo kubiri imasa, bagaca hagati y’ibihimba vyayo;" 
Jeremiah34:19 ni bo baganwa b’i Buyuda n’abaganwa b’i Yerusalemu n’inkone n’abaherezi n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu, abāciye hagati ya vya bihimba vy’iyo masa:" 
Jeremiah34:20 nzobatanga mu maboko y’abansi babo, no mu maboko y’ababahiga ngo babice, kand’ imivyimba yabo izoba inyama z’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre n’iz’ ibikōko vyo kw isi." 
Jeremiah34:21 Kandi Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda n’abaganwa biwe nzobatanga mu maboko y’abansi babo, no mu maboko y’ababahīga ngo babice, no mu maboko y’ingabo z’umwami w’i Babuloni zari zabaretse zikabavako." 
Jeremiah34:22 Rāba nzobigera, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, mbagarukane kur’ iki gisagara; kandi bazokirwanya bagitsinde, bagitongoze umuriro: kand’ ibisagara vy’i Buyuda nzobigira imisaka, ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah35:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho mu gihe ca Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya, umwami w’i Buyuda," 
Jeremiah35:2 riti Genda ku b’inzu ya Rekabu, uvugane na bo, ubinjize mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, ubashikane muri kimwe mu vyumba vyubatswe kuri yo, ubahe vino banywe." 
Jeremiah35:3 Nuko njana Yazaniya mwene Yeremiya, Yeremiya wa Habaziniya, n’abo bavukana, n’abana biwe bose, n’ab’ inzu ya Rekabu bose," 
Jeremiah35:4 mbinjiza mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu cumba ca bene Hanani, Hanani wa Igidaliya umuntu w’Imana, gihereranye n’icumba c’abaganwa, cari hejuru y’icumba ca Mayaseya mwene Shalumu umushibamyi wo ku muryango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ntereka imibindi yuzuye vino, bo n’amakarabo, imbere y’ab’ inzu ya Rekabu, ndababgira, nti Ngiyo vino ni munywe." 
Jeremiah35:6 Na bo baravuga, bati Nta vino tunywa: kuko Yonadabu mwene Rekabu sogokuruza wacu yatwihanikirije, ati Ntimuze mwigere munywa vino, mwebge cank’ abana banyu," 
Jeremiah35:7 canke ngo muze mwigere mwubaka inzu, canke ngo murime, canke ngo mutere uruzabibu canke ngo hagire ūzorwitirirwa; at’ Arikw imisi muzomara yose muze mube mu mahema, kugira ngo mubone kuramba mu gihugu mubamwo." 
Jeremiah35:8 Kandi twumviye Yonadabu mwene Rekabu sogokuruza mu vyo yatuziririje vyose, kutanywa vino imisi tuzomaraho yose, twebge n’abagore bacu n’abahungu bacu n’abakobga bacu;" 
Jeremiah35:9 no kutubaka amazu yo kubamwo, no kutagira uruzabibu cank’ itongo cank’ imbuto zo gutera;" 
Jeremiah35:10 ariko twibereye mu mahema, twumvira iragi rya vyose Yonadabu sogokuruza yadusigaranye." 
Jeremiah35:11 Maze rero, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ateye iki gihugu, turavugana, tuti Ngo tuje i Yerusalemu, duhunge ingabo z’Abakaludaya, duhunge n’ingabo z’Abasiriya; ni kwo kuba i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah35:12 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah35:13 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Genda ubarire abagabo b’i Buyuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu, uti Mbega ntimworuha mwemera indero yanje ngo mwumvire amajambo yanje? ni jewe Uhoraho mbibajije." 
Jeremiah35:14 Amajambo ya Yonadabu mwene Rekabu, ayo yihanikirije abana biwe ngo ntibanywe vino, barayashitsa, no gushitsa kur’ uyu musi nta yo banywa, kuko bumviye iragi rya sekuruza; ariko jeho navuganye namwe, nama nzindurwa no kubabarira, namwe ntimwanyumvira." 
Jeremiah35:15 Kandi nabatumyekw abasavyi banje bose abo navugisha, nama nzindurwa no kubatuma, nt’ Enda ni mugaruke, umuntu wese ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, mutunganye ibikorwa vyanyu, mwoye gukurikira izindi mana ngo muzigendanire; nti Ni ho muzobona kwibera mu gihugu nabahaye, mwe na ba sogokuruza: ariko ntimwateze ugutwi, canke ngo munyumvire." 
Jeremiah35:16 Bene Yonadabu wa Rekabu ko bāshikije iragi rya sekuruza yabasigaranye, arik’ ubu bgoko bgo ntibgānyumviye;" 
Jeremiah35:17 nuko rero, uku ni ko mvuze, jewe Uhoraho, Imana Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, nt’ Ehe nzozana ku Bayuda no ku baba i Yerusalemu bose ivyago vyose nabageneye, kuko nababūriye bakanka kwumva, nkabahamagara bakanka kwitaba." 
Jeremiah35:18 Nuko Yeremiya abarira ab’ inzu ya Rekabu, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ko mwumviye iragi rya sogokuruza Yonadabu, mukitondera amabgirizwa yiwe yose, mukagenza nk’uko yababariye muri vyose;" 
Jeremiah35:19 nuko rero, uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Yonadabu mwene Rekabu ntazokwigera abura uwo kuzokwama ahagarara imbere yanje gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, haza iri jambo kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah36:2 rit’ Abīra umuzingo w’igitabo, wandikemw’ amajambo yose nakubariye abūrira Abisirayeli n’Abayuda n’amahanga yose, utanguye umusi nakubaririye, uhereye ku ngoma ya Yosiya, ugashitsa no kur’ uyu musi." 
Jeremiah36:3 Kumbure ab’ inzu ya Yuda bokwumva ivyago vyose nageneye kubatēza, bagahindukira, umuntu wese akava mu nzira yiwe mbi, kugira ngo mbone guharira ukugabitanya kwabo n’icaha cabo." 
Jeremiah36:4 Nuko Yeremiya ahamagara Baruki mwene Neriya; maze Baruki yandika amajambo yose y’ Uhoraho mu muzingo w’igitabo, ayakūye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya, ukw ayamubgiye." 
Jeremiah36:5 Nuko Yeremiya abarira Baruki, ati Jewe ndabujijwe kuja mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho:" 
Jeremiah36:6 nuko rero wewe genda usome mur’ uwo muzingo amajambo y’Uhoraho wanditse ukūye mu kanwa kanje, uyasomere abantu mu ngoro y’Uhoraho ku musi wo kwisonzesha: uyasomere n’Abayuda bose baza bavuye mu bisagara vyabo." 
Jeremiah36:7 Kumbure bokwitwara k’Uhoraho, bagahindukira, umuntu wese akareka inzira yiwe mbi: kuk’ uburake n’ubushangashirwe, ivyo Uhoraho yabūye kur’ ubu bgoko, ar’ ibihambaye." 
Jeremiah36:8 Nuko Baruki mwene Neriya akora vyose nk’uk’ ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yamubariye, asoma mur’ ico gitabo amajambo y’Uhoraho ahagaze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah36:9 Maze mu mwaka ugira gatanu Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kw’icenda, abantu bose b’i Yerusalemu n’abantu bose bavuye mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda baja i Yerusalemu, bashinga umusi wo kwisonzeshereza imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah36:10 Nuko Baruki asoma muri ca gitabo amajambo ya Yeremiya ahagaze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, mu cumba ca Gemariya mwene Shafani umukarani, cari mu kigo ahahera haruguru, mw ishikiro ry’ikirimba gisha kija ku ngoro y’Uhoraho, ayasomera abantu bose." 
Jeremiah36:11 Maze Mikaya mwene Gemariya, Gemariya wa Shafani, yumvise mur’ ico gitabo amajambo yose y’Uhoraho," 
Jeremiah36:12 aramanuka aja mu ngoro y’umwami, ashika mu cumba c’umukarani: ahasanga abaganwa bose bicaye, ni bo aba: Elishama umukarani, na Delaya mwene Shemaya, na Elunatani mwene Akabori, na Gemariya mwene Shafani, na Zedekiya mwene Hananiya, n’ abandi baganwa bose." 
Jeremiah36:13 Nuko Mikaya abatondera amajambo yose yumvise, igihe Baruki yasomera abantu ico gitabo." 
Jeremiah36:14 Nukw abo baganwa bose batuma Yehudi mwene Netaniya, Netaniya wa Shelemiya, Shelemiya wa Kushi, kuri Baruki, bat’ Abīra uwo muzingo w’igitabo wasomeye abantu, uwuzane. Nuko Baruki mwene Neriya yābīra uwo muzingo, aja iyo bari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Baramubgira, bat’ Enda icara, uwudusomere. Nuko Baruki arawubasomera." 
Jeremiah36:16 Nuko bumvise amajambo yose, beraguzanya bafise ubgoba, babarira Baruki, bati Ntitwobura kubarira umwami ayo majambo yose." 
Jeremiah36:17 Babaza Baruki, bati Tubarire, mbeg’ ayo majambo yose wayanditse ute? Wayakūye mu kanwa kiwe?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Nuko Baruki arabishura, ati Yambarira ayo majambo yose n’ akanwa kiwe, nanje nkayandikisha wino mur’ iki gitabo." 
Jeremiah36:19 Maz’ abo baganwa babarira Baruki, bati Genda winyegeze, mwe na Yeremiya; ntihagire umuntu n’ umwe amenya aho muri." 
Jeremiah36:20 Baja ah’ umwami ari mw irebe, basize uwo muzingo mu cumba ca Elishama umukarani; umwami bamudondera ayo majambo yose." 
Jeremiah36:21 Nuk’ umwami atuma Yehudi kuzana uwo muzingo: awuzana awukūye mu cumba ca Elishama umukarani. Nuko Yehudi awusomera umwami n’abaganwa bose bāri bahagaze i ruhande yiwe. 
Jeremiah36:22 Kand’ umwami yar’ avyagiye mu ngoro yabamwo mu gihe c’ imbeho; hāri mu kwezi kw’icenda. Imbere yiwe hār’ umuriro mu coto. 
Jeremiah36:23 Nuko Yehudi amaze gusoma impapuro zitatu canke zine, umwami awucagaguza imbugita, awuterera mu muriro wari mu coto, gushitsa ah’ umuzingo wose watemukiye mu muriro wo mu coto." 
Jeremiah36:24 Kandi nta bgoba bāgira, ngo bitantamurireko n’impuzu zabo, ar’ umwami canke n’umwe wo mu basavyi biwe bumvise ayo majambo yose." 
Jeremiah36:25 Yamara Elunatani na Delaya na Gemariya bari binginze umwami ngo ntaturire uwo muzingo: yanka kubumva. 
Jeremiah36:26 Maz’ umwami abarira Yerameyeli umwana w’umwami na Seraya mwene Aziriyeli, na Shelemiya mwene Abudeli ngo bafate Baruki umukarani n’uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya: arik’ Uhoraho arabahisha." 
Jeremiah36:27 Hanyuma ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya, umwami amaze guturira wa muzingo warimwo ya majambo Baruki yari yanditse, ayakūye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah36:28 riti Subira wābīre uwundi muzingo, uwandikemw’ amajambo yose nk’aya mbere yari mu muzingo wa mbere, uwo Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda yaturiye." 
Jeremiah36:29 Kandi ku vya Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Waturiye uwo muzingo, uvuga ngo N’iki kiwukwandikishije ut’ Umwami w’i Babuloni ntazobura kuza ngw ahonnye iki gihugu, akimaremw’ abantu n’ibitungwa?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ku vya Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda, ati Ntazokwigera agira n’umwe wo gusubira ku ngoma ya Dawidi; umuvyimba wiwe uzotererwa hanze ng’ ube mu ndugumba yo ku murango no mu gikonyozi co mw ijoro." 
Jeremiah36:31 Kandi nzomuhanana n’uruvyaro rwiwe n’abasavyi biwe, mbahōye ukugabitanya kwabo; nshitse kuri bo, bo n’ababa i Yerusalemu n’abagabo b’i Buyuda, ivyago vyose nabageneye, kuko banse kwumva." 
Jeremiah36:32 Nuko Yeremiya yābīra uwundi muzingo, awuha Baruki umukarani mwene Neriya, awandikamw’ amajambo yose ayakūra mu kanwa ka Yeremiya, yari muri ca gitabo Yehoyakimu umwami w’i Buyuda yaturiye: kandi hongerwakw ayandi majambo menshi asa na yo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedekiya mwene Yosiya aja ku ngoma mu gishingo ca Koniya mwene Yehoyakimu, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ari we amwimitse mu gihugu c’i Buyuda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Ariko ntiyumvira amajambo y’Uhoraho ayo yavugisha Yeremiya, ubgiwe cank’ abasavyi biwe cank’ abantu bo mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah37:3 Maz’ umwami Zedekiya atuma Yehukali mwene Shelemiya na Zefaniya mwene Mayaseya umuherezi kuri Yeremiya uwavugishwa n’Imana, ati N’udusengere k’Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Kandi Yeremiya yar’ acigendagendera mu bandi bantu, kuko bataribgamushire mw ibohero." 
Jeremiah37:5 Kand’ ingabo za Farawo zari zije zivuye muri Egiputa: maz’ Abakaludaya bari bugarije i Yerusalemu bumvise inkuru zavyo, bata i Yerusalemu barakimirana." 
Jeremiah37:6 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kur’ uwo yavugisha Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah37:7 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’ Abisirayeli, at’ Uku abe ari ko mubarira umwami w’i Buyuda yabantumyeko kunsiguza, muti Rāba ingabo za Farawo zije kubatabara zizosubira muri Egiputa mu gihugu cabo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kand’ Abakaludaya bazogaruka, batere iki gisagara; bazogitsinda bagitongoze umuriro." 
Jeremiah37:9 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ntimwihende, mut’ Abakaludaya bazotuvako nta kabuza: kuko batazobavako." 
Jeremiah37:10 Kuko naho mwotikiza ingabo zose z’Abakaludaya babarwanya, hagasigaramw’ abakomeretse basa, na ho nyene bova hasi, umuntu wese aho yar’ ari mw ihema ryiwe, bagatongoza iki gisagara umuriro." 
Jeremiah37:11 Nukw ingabo z’Abakaludaya zimaze gukimirana zitaye i Yerusalemu kubgo kugirira ubgoba ingabo za Farawo," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yeremiya asokoroka i Yerusalemu ngw aje mu ntāra ya Benyamini, gushikiririzway’ umugabane wiwe hagati mu bantu." 
Jeremiah37:13 Agishika mw irembo ryitwa irya Benyamini, umukuru w’ abashibamyi yitwa Iriya mwene Shelemiya, Shelemiya wa Hananiya, ni ho yar’ ahagaze: afata uwo muvugishwa Yeremiya, at’ Uroye kwisaba Abakaludaya." 
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya ati S’ivy’ ukuri; singiye kwisaba Abakaludaya. Ariko yanka kuvyumva: nuko Iriya afata Yeremiya, amushīra abaganwa." 
Jeremiah37:15 Abaganwa bashavurira Yeremiya, baramukubita, bamushira mw ibohero mu nzu ya Yonatani umukarani, kuko bāri bayigize ibohero." 
Jeremiah37:16 Nuko Yeremiya amaze gushika mw ibohero, mu kazu ko mu kuzimu, ahamaze imisi myinshi," 
Jeremiah37:17 umwami Zedekiya atuma kumuzana; nuk’ umwami amubariza mu mpisho mu ngoro yiwe, ati Mbega nta jambo ryoba rivuye k’Uhoraho? Yeremiya ati Ririho; at’ Uzotangwa mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah37:18 Ikindi, Yeremiya abaza umwami Zedekiya, ati Mbega nagucumuyekw iki, cank’ abantu bawe, cank’ ubu bgoko, ko mwanshize mw ibohero?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Ba kamenyi banyu bābabarira, ng’ Umwami w’i Babuloni ntazobatera canke ngw atere iki gihugu, bari hehe?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Non’ urazirikanye, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, tegēra ivyo ngusavye ndakwinginze; ntunsubize mu nzu ya Yonatani umukarani, simpfireyo." 
Jeremiah37:21 Nuk’ umwami Zedekiya aravuga, bashira Yeremiya mu rugo rw’ibohero, bamugaburira umutsima uko bukeye, bawuguriye ku nzira y’abacumvyi, gushitsa ah’ imitsima yose yahebūriwe mu gisagara. Nuko Yeremiya aguma ngaho mu rugo rw’ibohero." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatiya mwene Matani, na Gedaliya mwene Pashuri, na Yukali mwene Shelemiya, na Pashuri mwene Malakiya, bumva amajambo Yeremiya abarira abantu bose," 
Jeremiah38:2 ng’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ūguma mur’ iki gisagara azokwicwa n’inkota n’inzara n’ ikīza: arik’ ūsokoroka muri co, akaja ku Bakaludaya, azobaho, kand’ azoba akijije amagara yiwe, abeho." 
Jeremiah38:3 At’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Iki gisagara ntikizobura gutangwa mu maboko y’ ingabo z’umwami w’i Babuloni, na we azogitsinda." 
Jeremiah38:4 Maz’ abaganwa babgira umwami, bat’ Uyu muntu akwiye gupfa: kukw adendebura amaboko y’abahizi bagisigaye mur’ iki gisagara n’ay’ abantu bose, ababarira amajambo asa artyo: kuk’ uyu mugabo atifuriza amahoro ubu bgoko, atar’ ivyago." 
Jeremiah38:5 Nuk’ umwami Zedekiya at’ Eh’ ari mu maboko yanyu: kuko jewe umwami ntoshobora gukora ikintu na kimwe co kubabuza. 
Jeremiah38:6 Maze bafata Yeremiya, bamushira mu cobo cimbiwe kubīka amazi ca Malakiya umwana w’ umwami, cari mu rugo rw’ibohero: bamwururukirizayo n’imigozi. Mur’ ico cobo nta mazi yarimwo, atar’ ikivurugu c’ivyondo: kandi Yeremiya adibira muri nya vyondo." 
Jeremiah38:7 Maze Ebedumeleki, Umunyetiyopiya w’inkone, yasukūra mu ngoro y’ umwami, yumva ko bashize Yeremiya mur’ ico cobo; ico gihe umwami yar’ avyagiye ku kirimba citwa ica Benyamini." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebedumeleki asohoka mu ngoro i bgami, abarira umwami," 
Jeremiah38:9 ati Mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma, abo bantu bakoze nabi muri vyose bagiriye Yeremiya umuvugishwa, uwo batereye mu cobo; kand’ ari mu gupfira aho hantu ari, kubg’ inzara; kukw ata mutsima ugisigaye mu gisagara." 
Jeremiah38:10 Maz’ umwami abarira Ebedumeleki Umunyetiyopiya, ati Kūra hano abagabo mirongwitatu, ubajane, ukūre uwo muvugishwa Yeremiya mur’ ico cobo, ntagweyo." 
Jeremiah38:11 Nuko Ebedumeleki ajana abo bagabo, yinjira mu ngoro y’umwami, aja musi y’ubushinguro, akūray’ impuzu z’imikūra n’ibishambara, abirungikisha imigozi mu cobo abiha Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah38:12 Maze Ebedumeleki Umunyetiyopiya abarira Yeremiya, at’ Enda shira izo mpuzu z’imikūra n’ibishambara mu maha imbere y’imigozi. Yeremiya agira kuno." 
Jeremiah38:13 Nuko bakwegesha Yeremiya imigozi, bamukūra mur’ ico cobo; Yeremiya aguma mu rugo rw’ibohero." 
Jeremiah38:14 Maz’ umwami Zedekiya aratuma, bamuzanira Yeremiya umuvugishwa, bamumusanza imbere mw irebe rya gatatu ryo mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho: maz’ umwami abarira Yeremiya, ati Har’ ico nkubaza: ntugire ico umpisha." 
Jeremiah38:15 Maze Yeremiya abarira Zedekiya, ati Ni nakikubarira, wobura kunyica? Kandi ni nakugīra inama, na ho nyene ntiwonyumva." 
Jeremiah38:16 Nuk’ umwami Zedekiya arahirira Yeremiya mu mpisho, ati Nk’uk’ Uhoraho ahoraho, ari we yandemeye uyu mutima, sinkwica, kandi singutanga mu maboko y’abo bantu barondera kukwica." 
Jeremiah38:17 Maze Yeremiya abarira Zedekiya, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ni wagenda ukīsaba abaganwa b’umwami w’i Babuloni, uzokwikiza, kand’ iki gisagara ntikizotongozwa umuriro; nawe uzobona kubaho, n’abo mu nzu yawe." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ariko n’utemera kwīsaba abaganwa b’umwami w’i Babuloni, iki gisagara kizotangwa mu maboko y’Abakaludaya, kandi bazogitongoza umuriro, nawe ntuzokwikiza ng’ uve mu maboko yabo." 
Jeremiah38:19 Maz’ umwami Zedekiya yishura Yeremiya, ati Ntinya Abayuda bāmaze kwisaba Abakaludaya, kuko bobampa bakanshinyagurira." 
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya aramwishura, ati Ntibazobaguha. Ndakwinginze, wumvire Uhoraho mur’ ivyo nkubariye: ni ho uzomererwa neza, ukikiza." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ariko ni wanka kugenda, iri ni ryo jambo Uhoraho yanyeretse:" 
Jeremiah38:22 ati Rāba abagore bose basigaye mu rugo rw’umwami w’i Buyuda, bazokūrwayo bahabge abaganwa b’umwami w’i Babuloni, kand’ abo bagore bazovuga, bat’ Abakunzi bawe pfampfe bāraguhenze, uja na rwo: arikw ibirenge vyawe bimaze gushaya mu kivurugu c’ivyondo, barakimirana." 
Jeremiah38:23 Kandi bazosohora abamikazi bawe bose n’abana bawe babahe Abakaludaya: nawe ntuzokwikiza ng’ uve mu maboko yabo, arik’ uzofatwa n’ukuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni: kandi ni wewe uzoba uzaniye iki gisagara gutongozwa umuriro." 
Jeremiah38:24 Maze Zedekiya abarira Yeremiya, ati Ntihakagire umuntu agira ico amenya kur’ ayo majambo; ni ho utopfa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Arikw abaganwa ni baramuka bumvise ko twavuganye, bakaza bakakubarira, bati Twīgānire ivyo wabariye umwami, ntuduhishe, natwe ntitukwica, bati Tubgire n’ivyo umwami yakwishuye:" 
Jeremiah38:26 uz’ ubabgire, uti Nari kwinginga umwami ngo yoye kunsubiza mu nzu kwa Yonatani, ngo ngweyo." 
Jeremiah38:27 Maz’ abaganwa bose baza kuri Yeremiya, barabimubaza: na we abishura amajambo yose nk’uk’ umwami yamubariye. Baca baramureka, barīgīra, kukw ayo majambo yabaye akabanga." 
Jeremiah38:28 Nuko Yeremiya aba mu rugo rw’ibohero, gushitsa umusi Yerusalemu hatsinzwe." 
Jeremiah39:1 Nuko Yerusalemu haratsindwa. Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, n’ingabo ziwe zose, yaje gutera Yerusalemu arahugariza, mu mwaka ugira icenda Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kw’icumi;" 
Jeremiah39:2 maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe Zedekiya ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa kane, ku musi wakwo w’icenda, basatura uruzitiro rw’ico gisagara." 
Jeremiah39:3 Hatsinzwe, abaganwa bose b’umwami w’i Babuloni baraza basagaza mu kirimba co hagati, ni bo aba: Nerugali‐sharezeri, na Samugari‐nebo, na Sarusekimu, na Rabu‐sarisi, na Nerugali‐sharezeri, na Rabu‐magu, bo n’abandi baganwa bose b’umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah39:4 Maze Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda n’ingabo zose bababonye, barahunga, bahenga mw ijoro bava mu gisagara, baciye mu ndimiro y’umwami no mu kirimba kiri hagati y’inzitiro zibiri: umwami ajana inzira ica mu kiyaya Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Maz’ ingabo z’Abakaludaya zibōma inyuma, zihambiriza Zedekiya mu kiyaya c’i Yeriko: bamaze kumufata, baramudūgana, bamuzanira Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni bamumusanza i Ribula mu ntāra y’i Hamati: amucirakw iteka." 
Jeremiah39:6 Nuk’ uwo mwami w’i Babuloni yicira abahungu ba Zedekiya imbere y’amaso yiwe nyene i Ribula; kand’ uwo mwami w’i Babuloni yica n’abaganwa bose b’i Buyuda. 
Jeremiah39:7 Ikigeretseko anogora amaso Zedekiya, amwambika umunyororo kugira ngo bamujane i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah39:8 Abakaludaya banda umuriro ingoro y’umwami n’ amazu y’abantu, basangangura n’ inzitiro zikikije i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah39:9 Maze Nebuzaradani, umukuru w’abashibamyi, ajana i Babuloni amasigarira y’abantu bāri bagisigaye mu gisagara, n’abāri bāragiye kumwisaba, n’amasigarira y’abantu bāri bagisigaye, abajana ar’ inyagano." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ariko Nebuzaradani uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi, asiga mu gihugu c’i Buyuda abantu ba nyarucari batagira ico batunze, abaha imirima y’inzabibu n’amatongo ico gihe." 
Jeremiah39:11 Maze Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni agera Nebuzaradani uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi ku vya Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah39:12 ati Mujane, umuzigame neza, ntugire ico umugira; kand’ ukw azogomba abe ari k’uzomugirira." 
Jeremiah39:13 Nuko Nebuzaradani uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi aratuma, bo na Nebushazabani na Rabu‐sarisi na Nerugali‐sharezeri na Rabu‐magu, n’abakuru bose b’umwami w’i Babuloni," 
Jeremiah39:14 baratuma, bakūra Yeremiya mu rugo rw’ibohero, bamuha Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, ngw amujane i we: nuko yibera ngaho mu bandi bantu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Kand’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryari ryaje kuri Yeremiya, igihe yar’ acugaraniwe mu rugo rw’ ibohero," 
Jeremiah39:16 riti Genda ubarire Ebedumeleki Umunyetiyopiya, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Rāba ngira nshitse kur’ iki gisagara ayo nakivuzeko y’ivyago, atar’ ay’ ivyiza; kandi bizoshika uvyibonera kuri nya musi." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ariko weho nzokurokora kur’ uwo musi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze: kandi ntuzotangwa mu maboko y’abo utinya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Kuko ntazobura kugukiza; ntuzokwicwa n’inkota, arikw amagara yawe uzoba uyakijije, kuko wanyizigiye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah40:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya rivuye k’Uhoraho, Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abashibamyi amaze kumubohorera i Rama, iyo yari yaramujanye ari mu munyororo, hamwe n’imbohe zose zavuye i Yerusalemu, izo bājana i Babuloni ar’ inyagano." 
Jeremiah40:2 Nuk’ uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi akūramwo Yeremiya, aramubarira, at’ Uhoraho Imana yawe yari yarageneye ivyago aha hantu:" 
Jeremiah40:3 kand’ Uhoraho arabishikanye, agize nk’ uko yavuze; ko mwacumuye k’ Uhoraho, ntimumwumvire, ivyo ni vyo vyatumye ivyo bibashikako." 
Jeremiah40:4 Kandi non’ uyu musi ndakubohoye iminyororo iri ku maboko yawe. Ni washima kujana nanje i Babuloni, n’uze, nanje nzokugirira neza; ariko n’udashima kujana nanje i Babuloni, usigeho: eh’ igihugu cose kir’ imbere yawe; aho wumva ushima ko hakubereye kujayo, abe ari ho uja." 
Jeremiah40:5 Agitebaganye kumwishura, aramubgira, ati Subirayo, uje kuri Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, umwe umwami w’i Babuloni yashizeho kuganza ibisagara vy’i Buyuda, wibanire na we hagati mu bandi bantu: cank’ aho wumva ko hakubereye kugenda hose, abe ari ho uja. Nuko wa mukuru w’abashibamyi amuha impamba n’ingabire, aramurekura." 
Jeremiah40:6 Nuko Yeremiya aja kuri Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu i Mizipa, yibanira na we hagati mu bandi bantu bari barasigaye mu gihugu." 
Jeremiah40:7 Nukw abagabisha bose b’ingabo bari bakwiragiye mu misozi, bo n’ingabo zabo, bumvise yuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yashizeho Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu kuganza igihugu, kandi ko yamuragije abagabo n’abagore n’abana, n’abo muri ba nyarucari batambukanywe kw inyagano i Babuloni;" 
Jeremiah40:8 baza kuri Gedaliya i Mizipa. Ni bo aba: Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, na Yohanani na Yonatani bene Kareya, na Seraya mwene Tanehumeti, na bene Efayi w’i Netofati, na Yezaniya umwana w’Umunyamayakati, bo n’ingabo zabo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Maze Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, ababarira abarahira, bo n’ingabo zabo, ati Ntimutinye gusaba Abakaludaya: mwibere mu gihugu, musabe umwami w’i Babuloni, kandi bizobaroranira." 
Jeremiah40:10 Nanje rāba ngerereye i Mizipa, kugira ngo nshikirweko n’Abakaludaya mu vyo bazombarira vyose, ni baza ino: ariko mweho, mwamure inzabibu za vino n’ivyo ibiti vyama na elayo z’amavuta, mubishire mu mibindi yanyu, mwibere mu bisagara vyanyu mwegukiye." 
Jeremiah40:11 N’ Abayuda bose n’uko, abār’ i Mowabu no mu Bamoni no muri Edomu, n’abāri mu bihugu vyose, bumvise yuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yaretse amasigarira yo mu Bayuda, kandi ko yashizeho Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, kubaganza," 
Jeremiah40:12 nukw Abayuda bose baragaruka, bavuye ahantu hose aho bari barirukaniwe, bashika mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, baza kuri Gedaliya i Mizipa, bamura inzabibu za vino n’ivyo ibiti vyama vyinshi cane." 
Jeremiah40:13 Maze Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abagabisha bose b’ingabo bāri bakwiragiye mu misozi, baza kuri Gedaliya i Mizipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 baramubgira, bati Mbeg’ urazi yuko Bayalisi umwami w’Abamoni yatumye Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya kukwica? Ariko Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu ntiyavyemera." 
Jeremiah40:15 Maze Yohanani mwene Kareya abaririra Gedaliya mu mpisho i Mizipa, ati Ndekura ndakwinginze, nje kwica Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya; nta muntu azobimenya: mbega yokwicira iki, Abayuda bose batororokaniye kuri wewe bagasubira gusanzara, amasigarira y’i Buyuda agahona?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Ariko Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu abarira Yohanani mwene Kareya, ati Ntuz’ ukore ikintu kimeze girtyo: kuk’ ubeshera Ishimayeli." 
Jeremiah41:1 Maze mu kwezi kw’indwi, Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, Netaniya wa Elishama, wo mu nda y’ingoma, ari we umwe mu babgiriza bakuru b’umwami, azanana n’abantu cumi, aja kuri Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu i Mizipa; nuko basangirira na we aho nyene i Mizipa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Maze Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya avana hasi n’abo bagabo cumi bāri kumwe na we, bacumita inkota Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, baramwica, kand’ ari we umwami w’i Babuloni yashizeho kuganza igihugu." 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimayeli yica kandi n’ Abayuda bāri kumwe na Gedaliya i Mizipa, bo n’abasoda b’Abakaludaya bāri basanzweyo." 
Jeremiah41:4 Bukeye ku musi ugira kabiri amaze kwica Gedaliya, kand’ ata wurabimenya," 
Jeremiah41:5 haza bamwe bavuye i Shekemu n’i Shilo n’i Samariya, abagabo mirongumunani, bāri bimosheje ubganwa bgabo inkomvorera, bitantamuriyekw impuzu zabo, bikebaguye ku mibiri, bazanye amashikanwa n’imibavu mu minwe, ngo babizane mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah41:6 Nuko Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya ava i Mizipa ngw aje kubasanganira, agenda arira ingenda: abasanganiye, arababarira, ati Ni muze kuri Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu." 
Jeremiah41:7 Nuko bamaze gushika hagati mu gisagara, Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya arabica, afatanije n’abagabo bāri kumwe na we, abashiburira mu cobo co kubīka amazi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ariko haboneka abagabo cumi muri bo bīsaba Ishimayeli, bati Ntutwice, kuko dufise ivyo twaziganije, twānyegeje mu misozi, ingano na sayiri n’amavuta ya elayo n’ubūki. Nukw arigarura, ntiyabicana na bagenzi babo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Nukw ico cobo Ishimayeli yashiburiyemw’ imivyimba yose y’abo yishe, ikahasanga uwa Gedaliya, ni co cari cimbishije umwami Asa kubgo gutinya Bayasha umwami w’Abisirayeli. Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya acuzuza abishwe." 
Jeremiah41:10 Maze Ishimayeli ajana kw inyagano amasigarira yose y’abantu bār’ i Mizipa, ni bo bakobga b’umwami n’abantu bose bāri bagisigaye i Mizipa, abo Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abashibamyi yari yaragije Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu. Nuko Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya abajana kw inyagano, avayo ngw aje mu Bamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Maze Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abagabisha bose b’ingabo bāri kumwe na we, bumvise ivyo bibi vyose Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya yakoze," 
Jeremiah41:12 bajana n’ ingabo zose, baja kurwanya Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, bamusanga hafi y’ikidengeri kinini c’i Gibeyoni." 
Jeremiah41:13 Nukw abantu bose bāri kumwe na Ishimayeli babonye Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abagabisha b’ingabo bose bāri kumwe na we, baranezerwa." 
Jeremiah41:14 Nukw abantu bose Ishimayeli yarajanye kw inyagano abakūye i Mizipa, barahindukira, baherēra kuri Yohanani mwene Kareya." 
Jeremiah41:15 Ariko Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, bo n’abagabo munani, bacikana Yohanani, baja mu Bamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Nuko Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abagabisha b’ingabo bose bāri kumwe na we, ajana amasigarira y’abantu yari yatse Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya, yarakūye i Mizipa amaze kwica Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, abagabo n’abagore n’abana n’ inkone, abagarukaniye i Gibeyoni," 
Jeremiah41:17 baragenda baba barifashije i Geruti‐Cimuhamu hahereranye n’i Betelehemu, ngo baje muri Egiputa," 
Jeremiah41:18 kubg’ Abakaludaya: kuko bābatinya, kuko Ishimayeli mwene Netaniya yari yishe Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, uwo umwami w’i Babuloni yari yarashizeho kuganza igihugu." 
Jeremiah42:1 Maz’ abagabisha b’ingabo bose, na Yohanani mwene Kareya, na Yezaniya mwene Hoshaya, n’abantu bose uhereye ku boroshe ugashitsa ku bahambaye," 
Jeremiah42:2 bēgēra uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya, bati Turakwinginze, emera ico tugusaba, udusengere k’Uhoraho Imana yawe, twebge aya masigarira twese; kuko dusigaye turi bake twahora turi benshi, nk’uko nawe utwibonera:" 
Jeremiah42:3 kugira ng’ Uhoraho Imana yawe atwereke uko dukwiye kugenza n’ico dukwiye gukora. 
Jeremiah42:4 Nuk’ uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya arabishura, at’ Ego ndumvise; ngiye kubasengera k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu nk’uko muvuze: maz’ ico Uhoraho azonyishura cose nzokibabarira; sinzogira ico mbahisha." 
Jeremiah42:5 Bishura Yeremiya, bat’ Uhoraho n’atubere icabona c’ ukuri c’ukwizigirwa, ni tutākora nk’ukw ijambo ryose rimeze, iryo Uhoraho Imana yawe azokudutumako." 
Jeremiah42:6 Ar’ ivyiza ar’ ibibi, ntituzobura kwumvira Uhoraho Imana yacu, uwo tugutumyeko; kugira ngo tuze tubone kuroranirwa ni twumvira Uhoraho Imana yacu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Nukw imisi cumi ihise, ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Ahamagara Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abagabisha b’ingabo bose bāri kumwe na we, n’abantu bose uhereye ku boroshe ugashitsa ku bahambaye," 
Jeremiah42:9 arababarira, at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, uwo mwantumyeko kumushikiriza ivyo mwasavye:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ati Ni mwakomeza kuguma mur’ iki gihugu, azobubaka, ntazobasambura; azobatēragira, ntazobarandura: ngo Kuko yigaruye mu vyago yabateje." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ngo Reka gutinya umwami w’i Babuloni, uwo mutinya uwo; ntimumutinye, ni k’Uhoraho agize; ngo Kukw ari kumwe namwe ngw abakize, abarokore abakūre mu kuboko kwiwe." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ngw Azobaha kumutera akagongwe, kugira ngw abagirire imbabazi, abasubize mu gihugu canyu bgite." 
Jeremiah42:13 Ngw Ariko ni mwavuga, muti Ntitukigomba kuba mur’ iki gihugu; bigatuma mutamwumvira, ari we Uhoraho Imana yanyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 mukavuga, mut’ Oya, ariko tugomba kuja mu gihugu ca Egiputa, aho tutazobona intambara, canke ngo twumve ijwi ry’inzamba, canke ngo tubure indya; abe ari ho tuba:" 
Jeremiah42:15 none rero gira mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge amasigarira y’i Buyuda: uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Ni mwerekeza amaso rwose muri Egiputa, ngw abe ari yo muja kuba;" 
Jeremiah42:16 nukw inkota mutinya izobahamvyayo, mu gihugu ca Egiputa, n’inzara mutinya izobakurikirana no muri Egiputa; kandi ni yo muzogwa." 
Jeremiah42:17 Ni ko bizomerera abantu bose berekeza amaso kuja muri Egiputa ngo babeyo; bazokwicwa n’inkota n’inzara n’ikīza; ngo Kandi nta n’umwe muri bo azosigara canke ngo yikize ivyago azobatēza. 
Jeremiah42:18 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ngo Nk’uk’ uburake bgiwe n’ubushangashirwe bgiwe vyasutswe ku baba i Yerusalemu, ni k’ubushangashirwe bgiwe buzosukwa kuri mwebge ni mwaja muri Egiputa; ngo Muzoba igitutsi n’ akajoreza n’ikivume n’iciro ry’ imigani: ngo Kandi ntimuzosubira kubona aha hantu." 
Jeremiah42:19 Uhoraho yavuze kuri mwebge, mwa masigarira y’i Buyuda, ngo Ntimukaje muri Egiputa: mumenye mudakekeranya yuko mbibashingiye intahe uyu musi." 
Jeremiah42:20 Erega mwāhenze imitima yanyu ubganyu, kuko mwantumye k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ngo Ni mbasengere k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ngw Ivyo Uhoraho Imana yanyu azovuga vyose ngo Ndabibabarire, ngo Namwe muzobikora:" 
Jeremiah42:21 non’ uyu musi ndabibabariye, ariko mwebge ntimwumviye Uhoraho Imana yanyu mu kintu na kimwe mu vyo yabantumyeko." 
Jeremiah42:22 None rero ni mumenye mudakekeranya yuko muzokwicirwa n’inkota n’ inzara n’ikīza, aho hantu aho mwifuza kuja kuba." 
Jeremiah43:1 Maze Yeremiya ahejeje kubarira abantu bose amajambo yose y’Uhoraho Imana yabo, ayo Uhoraho Imana yabo yamubatumyeko, ni yo ya majambo yose," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwene Hoshaya, na Yohanani mwene Kareya, n’abagabo b’abibone bose, babarira Yeremiya, bat’ Uvuze ibinyoma: Uhoraho Imana yacu ntiyagutumye kuvuga, ngo Ntituje muri Egiputa kubayo;" 
Jeremiah43:3 ariko Baruki mwene Neriya ni we akuduteranijeko, kugira ngo dutangwe mu maboko y’Abakaludaya, ngo batwice, canke batujane i Babuloni tur’ inyagano." 
Jeremiah43:4 Nuko Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abagabisha b’ ingabo bose, n’abantu bose, ntibumvira Uhoraho, ngo babe mu gihugu c’i Buyuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ariko Yohanani mwene Kareya n’abagabisha b’ingabo bose, bajana amasigarira yose y’Abayuda, abāri bagarutse kuba mu gihugu c’i Buyuda bavuye mu mahanga yose aho bāri barirukaniwe;" 
Jeremiah43:6 abagabo n’abagore n’abana, n’abakobga b’ umwami, n’umuntu wese Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abashibamyi yari yararagije Gedaliya mwene Ahikamu, Ahikamu wa Shafani, bo n’ūvugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya, na Baruki mwene Neriya;" 
Jeremiah43:7 baja mu gihugu ca Egiputa, kuko batumviye Uhoraho: nuko bashika i Tahapanesi." 
Jeremiah43:8 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Yeremiya i Tahapanesi," 
Jeremiah43:9 rit’ Abīra amabuye manini, uyahishe mw ivu musi y’amatafari ari mw ishikiro ry’irebe ry’ingoro ya Farawo i Tahapanesi, abagabo b’ Abayuda barorēra;" 
Jeremiah43:10 ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ngw Eh’ azotuma kuzana Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni umusavyi wiwe, na we azotereka intebe yiwe y’ubgami kur’ aya mabuye mpishije; kand’ azoshinga ihema ryiwe ry’ubgami kuri yo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Kand’ azoza atere igihugu ca Egiputa; abagerewe kwicwa bazoja kwicwa, abagerewe umugozi bazoja mu mugozi, abagerewe inkota bazoja ku nkota." 
Jeremiah43:12 Kand’ azokwanda umuriro amazu y’ibigirwamana vy’Abanyegiputa; azoyaturira, abijane kw inyagano: kand’ azokwirenza igihugu ca Egiputa nk’uk’ umwungere yirenza umutamana wiwe; kand’ azovayo ar’ amahoro." 
Jeremiah43:13 Kand’ azohomvagura inkingi ziri mu rusengero rw’izuba, ruri mu gihugu ca Egiputa; kand’ amazu y’ibigirwamana vy’Abanyegiputa azoyatongoza umuriro." 
Jeremiah44:1 Ijambo ryaje kuri Yeremiya ku vy’ Abayuda bose bāba mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bāba i Migidoli, n’i Tahapanesi ni Nofu no mu ntāra y’i Patirosi," 
Jeremiah44:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Mwabonye ivyago vyose nateje i Yerusalemu, n’ibisagara vyose vy’i Buyuda; kandi none rāba, uyu musi hasigaye ar’ imisaka, ata muntu akihaba;" 
Jeremiah44:3 kubg’ ivyaha vyabo bākoze ngo banshavuze, kuko boshereje imibavu izindi mana bakazisaba, izo batigeze bamenya, bo ubgabo, canke mwebge, canke ba sogokuruza banyu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Yamara nabatumyekw abasavyi banje bose, ni bo bavugishwa nanje, nama nzindurwa no kubatuma, nti Ntimugakore ico kizira c’ubuyobe nanka urunuka." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ariko na ho nyene ntibāvyumva, canke ngo batege ugutwi kwabo, ngo bahindukire bareke ibibi vyabo, ntibosereze imibavu izindi mana." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ni co catumye ubushangashirwe bganje n’uburake bganje bisukwa bikadomekwa mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu; none har’ imisaka n’amatongo, nk’uko bir’ uyu musi." 
Jeremiah44:7 Nuko rer’ uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana Nyen’ ingabo, Imana y’Abisirayeli, ati N’iki gituma mukora ikibi kingana girtyo, mugacumurira ubugingo bganyu, mukamarisha mu Bayuda umugabo n’umugore, umwana n’ uwonka, ntimugire ico musigaza?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Kandi n’iki gituma mundakisha ibikorwa vy’amaboko yanyu, mu kwosereza imibavu izindi mana mu gihugu ca Egiputa, aho mwaroye kuba, bikabakwegera guherengetezwa, mugahinduka ibivume n’iciro ry’imigani mu mahanga yose yo mw isi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Mbega mwibagiye ivyaha vya ba sogokuruza banyu, n’ivyaha vy’abami b’i Buyuda, n’ivyaha vy’abamikazi babo, n’ivyaha vyanyu ubganyu, n’ivyaha vy’abagore banyu, ivyo bākoreye mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ntibarīcīsha bugufi gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi, ntibaratinya, ntibaragendera mu vyagezwe vyanje, canke mu mabgirizwa yanje, ivyo nashize imbere yanyu n’imbere ya ba sogokuruza." 
Jeremiah44:11 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Ehe rāba, mbatungiriye igitsure ngo mbazanekw ivyago, ngo mperengeteze i Buyuda hose." 
Jeremiah44:12 Kandi nzofata amasigarira y’i Buyuda, aberekeje amaso kuja mu gihugu ca Egiputa ngo babeyo, bazotikizwa bose; kandi mur’ ico gihugu ca Egiputa nyene ni yo bazogwa. Bazoririkwa n’inkota n’inzara; kandi bazopfa, uhereye ku woroshe ugashitsa k’ūhambaye, bishwe n’ inkota n’inzara; kandi bazoba igitutsi n’akajoreza n’ibivume n’ iciro ry’imigani." 
Jeremiah44:13 Kuko nzohana ababa mu gihugu ca Egiputa nk’uko nahannye i Yerusalemu, mbahanishe inkota n’inzara n’ikīza," 
Jeremiah44:14 ngo mu masigarira y’i Buyuda, abāgiye mu gihugu ca Egiputa kubayo, hoye kugira ūzocika cank’ ūzosigara bagasubira mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, aho bifuza kuzosubira kubayo: kukw ata wuzosubirayo atar’ abazocika." 
Jeremiah44:15 Maz’ abagabo bose bāri bazi yukw abagore babo bosereza imibavu izindi mana, bo n’abagore bose bahagararanye aho, ar’ ishengero rinini, ni bo bantu bose bagiye kuba mu gihugu ca Egiputa i Patirosi, bishura Yeremiya," 
Jeremiah44:16 bati Ku vy’ijambo utubariye mw izina ry’Uhoraho ntitukwumvira. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ariko ntituzobura gushitsa ijambo ryose rivuye mu kanwa kacu, ngo twosereze imibavu umwamikazi wo mw ijuru, tumusukire n’ibiturire, nk’uko twahora dukora, twe na ba sogokuruza n’abami bacu n’abaganwa bacu, mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu: kukw ico gihe twagira indya nyinshi, tukibera amahoro, nta vyago twabona." 
Jeremiah44:18 Arik’ uhereye igihe twarekeye kwosereza imibavu umwamikazi wo mw ijuru, no kumusukira ibiturire, ni ho twaciye duhīndāna, tukamarwa n’inkota n’inzara." 
Jeremiah44:19 Kandi hamwe twosereza imibavu umwamikazi wo mw ijuru, tukamusukira ibiturire, ugira ngo twamucumbiye imitsima y’ibiterekerwa tumusukira n’ibiturire, abagabo bacu batabizi?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Maze Yeremiya abarira abantu bose, abagabo n’abagore, ni bo abo bose bāmwishuye bartyo," 
Jeremiah44:21 at’ Imibavu mwoshereje mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda no mu nzira z’i Yerusalemu, mwe na ba sogokuruza n’abami banyu n’abaganwa banyu n’abantu bo mu gihugu, mbeg’ Uhoraho ntiyayibutse, ntivyinjiye mu mutima wiwe?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Bigatuma Uhoraho atagishobora kuvyihanganira, kubg’ ibibi vy’ibikorwa vyanyu, no kubg’ ibizira vy’ ubuyobe mwakoze; ivyo ni vyo vyatumye igihugu canyu gihinduka imisaka n’akajoreza n’ikivume, ata wukikibamwo, nk’uko bimeze n’ uyu musi." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ko mwosheje imibavu, mugacumura k’Uhoraho, ntimwumvire Uhoraho, ngo mugendere mu vyagezwe vyiwe, no mu vyo yashinze no mu vyo yihanikirije, ivyo ni vyo vyatumye ibi vyago bibashikako, nk’uko bimeze n’uyu musi." 
Jeremiah44:24 Vyongeye Yeremiya abarira abantu bose, n’abo bagore bose, ati Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge mwese Abayuda muri mu gihugu ca Egiputa:" 
Jeremiah44:25 uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Mwebge n’abagore banyu mwavugishije akanwa kanyu, mubishikisha amaboko yanyu, muti Ntituzobura gushitsa amasezerano twasezeranye yo kwosereza imibavu umwamikazi wo mw ijuru, no kumusukira ibiturire: enda rero ni mukomeze amasezerano yanyu! Enda ayo masezerano yanyu muyashitse!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Nuko rero ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, mwebge mwese Abayuda muri mu gihugu ca Egiputa: at’ Ehe rāba, ndahiye izina ryanje rihambaye, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, yukw izina ryanje ritazosubira kuvugwa n’akanwa k’umuntu n’umwe wo mu Bayuda bari mu gihugu cose ca Egiputa, ngo bavuge bati Nk’ uk’ Umwami Uhoraho ahoraho." 
Jeremiah44:27 Rāba mbahozakw igitsure, ngo mbazanekw ivyago atar’ ivyiza; kand’ abagabo bose b’Abayuda bari mu gihugu ca Egiputa bazoririkwa n’inkota n’inzara, gushitsa baherengeteye." 
Jeremiah44:28 Kand’ abazokira inkota bagasubira mu gihugu c’i Buyuda bavuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, bazoba ar’ imparūrwa; kand’ amasigarira yose y’i Buyuda, abāgiye mu gihugu ca Egiputa kubayo, bazomenya ijambo rihamye iry’ ari ryo, kw ar’ iryanje cank’ iryabo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Kand’ iki ni co kimenyamenya canyu, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kizobamenyesha yuko nzobahanira aha hantu, ngo mumenye yukw amajambo yanje atazobura guhama ngw abazanire ivyago:" 
Jeremiah44:30 uku ni ko ngize, jewe Uhoraho, nti Nzotanga Farawo‐Hofura umwami wa Egiputa mu maboko y’abansi biwe, no mu maboko y’abarondera kumwica, nk’uko natanze Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni umwansi wiwe, yarondera kumwica." 
Jeremiah45:1 Ijambo uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yabariye Baruki mwene Neriya, igihe yandika ya majambo mu gitabo, ayakūye mu kanwa ka Yeremiya, mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma," 
Jeremiah45:2 at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho akubariye, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, wewe Baruki:" 
Jeremiah45:3 ati Wavuze, uti Mbonye ibara, kuk’ Uhoraho yongereje intuntu ku mubabaro wanje! Kuniha kurandambiye, simbona akaruhuko." 
Jeremiah45:4 Uku abe ari k’umubarira, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo Rāba, ico yubatse azogisambura, kand’ ico yatēragiye azokirandura: azokora artyo mu gihugu cose." 
Jeremiah45:5 Ngo Mbega nawe wironderera ubukuru? Ntuburondere. Kuko rāba, ngw Azozana ivyago ku bafise umubiri bose, ni k’Uhoraho agize; ariko weho ngw Azoguha gukirira ah’ uzoba ugiye hose." 
Jeremiah46:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yeremiya uwavugishwa na we ku vy’amahanga. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ku vya Egiputa: amajambo yo ku vy’ingabo za Farawo‐Neko umwami wa Egiputa, zari ku nkengera y’uruzi Efurate i Karukemeshi, izo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yanesheje mu mwaka ugira kane Yehoyakimu mwene Yosiya umwami w’i Buyuda ari ku ngoma." 
Jeremiah46:3 Mutegure inkinzo nto‐nto na nini‐nini, mutonde urugamba murwane." 
Jeremiah46:4 Mushire amatandiko ku mafarasi, muheze mwūrire, mwebge abayagenderako, mutonde mwambaye inkofero z’ivyuma; murtyorore amacumu, mwambare ivyuma vyo gukīngira imibiri." 
Jeremiah46:5 N’iki gitumye bacika ivutu bagakimirana? Abahizi babo batsinzwe hasi, barahunga baratemesha, batarinze no gukebuka: haba ibibateye ubgoba irya n’ino, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah46:6 Ntihagira impayamaguru icīka, cank’ umuhizi ngo hagire uwikiza; i burārūko ku nkengera y’uruzi Efurate ni ho batsitaye baratemba." 
Jeremiah46:7 Uyu ni nde asendanisha nka Nili, amazi yiwe agatera imipfunda nk’inzūzi?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ni Egiputa hasendanisha nka Nili, n’amazi yaho atera imipfunda nk’inzūzi: havuga, hati Hinge nsendanishe, ndenge isi yose; nze ngeseze ibisagara n’ ababibamwo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Mudūge, mwa mafarasi, mugende akabushungwe, mwa mikogote! Abahizi ni barumikeko, ni bo Banyetiyopiya n’ Abaputi batwara inkinzo, n’Abaludimu batwara imiheto bazi kuyifora." 
Jeremiah46:10 Kuk’ uwo musi ar’ uw’ Umwami, ni we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ar’ umusi wo kwīhōrako, kugira ngo yīhōre abarwanizi biwe: inkota izorya ihāge, izonywa amaraso yabo ihīmbe: kuk’ Umwami, ari we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, acumitira ibimazi mu gihugu c’i burārūko ku nkengera y’uruzi Efurate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Dūga upfe kwizenza i Gileyadi, wābīrey’ umuti, wewe mukobga w’inkumi ari we Egiputa: nta kimazi kunywa imiti myinshi: nta wo kuzogukiza uriho." 
Jeremiah46:12 Amahanga yumvise ibitētērwa vyawe, isi yuzuye amaborogo yawe: kuk’ umuhizi atsitaye ku wundi, bompi bagatemba hamwe." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ijambo Uhoraho yabariye Yeremiya ūvugishwa na we, ry’ ingene Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni azoza gutera igihugu ca Egiputa." 
Jeremiah46:14 Muvugire muri Egiputa, muvyamamaze i Migidoli, muvyamamaze n’i Nofu n’i Tahapanesi, muti Mutonde, mwitegure, kukw inkota yariritse impande zose zigukikije." 
Jeremiah46:15 N’iki gituma abahizi bawe bahunga? Ntibāshinze ikirenge, kuk’ Uhoraho yabirukanye." 
Jeremiah46:16 Yatumye benshi batsitara, mbere bātsitaranyeko: bati Ngo tuvyuke twisubirire mu b’i wacu, no mu gihugu twavukiyemwo, duhunge inkota iririka." 
Jeremiah46:17 Aho hantu ni ho basemerereye, bati Farawo umwami wa Egiputa n’ukureremesha akarūru gusa! Yazangazanze mu gihe cashinzwe." 
Jeremiah46:18 Nk’uko ndiho, ni k’Umwami agize, ari we yitwa Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, n’ukuri nk’uko Tabora umeze ku yindi misozi, kandi nk’ uko Karumeli umeze ku kiyaga, ni k’ūgiye kuza azoza ameze." 
Jeremiah46:19 Ewe wa mukobga wibereye muri Egiputa, witegure kujanwa kw inyagano; kukw i Nofu hazohinduka amatongo, hazotongorwa, hasigare ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah46:20 Egiputa n’inka y’iriza iteye igomwe rwose; ariko haje ikibugu kivuye i burārūko, kirashitse." 
Jeremiah46:21 Kand’ ingabo zaho z’abacangero ziri hagati yaho, zimeze nk’inyana zo mu ruhongore: kuko na zo zakimiranye, zahungiye icarimwe, ntizashinga ikirenge: kuk’ umusi w’ ivyago vyabo ubashitseko, ni co gihe co kūzirwa kwabo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Akariri kabo kazokwumvikana nk’ ugukakamba kw’inzoka; kuko bazobāzira bari n’ingabo, babatere bari n’amacabiti, nk’abaje kwicira ibiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Bazokwicira ikibira caho, ni k’Uhoraho agize, naho kizitanye gite; kuko barusha inzige ubginshi, kandi badaharūrika." 
Jeremiah46:24 Umukobga, ni we Egiputa, azokorwa n’isoni; azotangwa mu maboko y’abantu b’i burārūko." 
Jeremiah46:25 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, aravuga, ati Nzohana Amona ikigirwamana c’ ahitwa No, na Farawo na Egiputa n’imana zaho n’abami baho; mbere Farawo nzomuhanana n’abamwizigira." 
Jeremiah46:26 Nzobatanga mu maboko y’abashaka kubica, no mu kuboko kwa Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, no mu maboko y’ abasavyi biwe; ariko hanyuma y’ivyo muri Egiputa hazosubira kubamw’ abantu, nk’uko hamye mu misi ya kera, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ariko weho ntutinye, ewe Yakobo musavyi wanje, nturanduke umutima, ewe Isirayeli: kuko rāba nzogukiza ngukūre kure, uruvyaro rwawe ndarukūre mu gihugu rwajanywemwo ar’ inyagano; Yakobo azogaruka, kand’ azokwibera amahoro ata nkomanzi, kandi nta wuzomutera ubgoba." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ntutinye, ewe Yakobo musavyi wanje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kuko ndi kumwe nawe: kuko nzoherengeteza amahanga yose, ayo nagushwiragirijemwo: ariko weho sinzoguherengeteza; mugabo nzoguhana ibigeze, sinzokureka ntaguhannye." 
Jeremiah47:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yeremiya ūvugishwa n’ Imana ku vy’Abafilisitiya, Farawo ataratera i Gaza." 
Jeremiah47:2 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Eh’ amazi azodudubiza avuye i burārūko ahinduke uruzi rudengereye, ruzodengera rurenge ku gihugu no ku birimwo vyose, rurenge ku gisagara no ku bakibamwo bose: abantu bazotaka, n’ ababa mu gihugu bose bazoboroga." 
Jeremiah47:3 Bumvise kudida imigere kw’amafarasi yiwe ahambaye, n’ukugenda akabushungwe kw’ imikogote yiwe, n’uguhinda kw’ amakurudumu, bituma abavyeyi batanakebuka ngo barābe abana babo kubgo gucika inkokora;" 
Jeremiah47:4 kuk’ umusi ugira uze wo kuzonyagwako kw’Abafilisitiya bose, wo kuzorandura umutabazi wese azoba agisigaye muri Tiro n’i Sidoni: kuk’ Uhoraho azonyaga Abafilisitiya, n’amasigarira yo ku kizinga co mu kiyaga citwa Kafutori." 
Jeremiah47:5 I Gaza hasigaye ar’ uruharabuga; Ashikeloni harakomvomvowe, bo n’amasigarira yo mu kiyaya caho: uzokwikebagura ushitse ryari?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Weho wa nkota y’Uhoraho, uzogeza ryari kutaruhuka? Enda ni wisubize mu rwubati rwawe, utekereze, ugume hamwe." 
Jeremiah47:7 Yamara se woruhuka ute, kand’ Uhoraho ari we yagutumye? Yayigeze kurwanya Ashikeloni n’abo kw isēsero ry’ikiyaga." 
Jeremiah48:1 Ku vya Mowabu. Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli: at’ I Nebo habonye ibara! Kuko hakomvomvowe: i Kiriyatayimu haratēterewe, haratsinzwe: i Misigabu haratēterewe, harasanganguwe." 
Jeremiah48:2 Icubahiro c’i Mowabu kiraheze; bahahigiye imihigo bar’ i Heshiboni, bat’ Enda ni muze tuhageseze, ntihabe hakiba ihanga. Nawe Madumeni, uzozibizwa; inkota izogukurikirana." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ijwi ry’amaborogo rituruka i Horonayimu: har’ ukunyaga n’ ugutikiza gukomeye. 
Jeremiah48:4 I Mowabu haratikiye; abana baho bumvikanisha urwānāga. 
Jeremiah48:5 Kuko bazodūga ku kadūgo k’i Luhiti barira ingenda badahengeshanya; ku kamanuko k’i Horonayimu bumvise umunihiro w’umuborogo w’ abagesezwa. 
Jeremiah48:6 Muhunge, mwunzūre amagara, mube nk’agasaka k’inkōkōre mu bugaragwa." 
Jeremiah48:7 Ko wishimiye ibikorwa vyawe n’ubutunzi bgawe, nawe nyene uzotsindwa: kand’ ikigirwamana Kemoshi kizojanwa ar’ inyagano, bo n’abaherezi baco n’abaganwa baco." 
Jeremiah48:8 Kand’ umunyazi azoshika ku gisagara cose, nta gisagara na kimwe kizomukira: ababa mu mwonga bazohona, n’ababa mu kiyaya bazogesezwa, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yabivuze." 
Jeremiah48:9 Muhe Mowabu amababa, kugira ngo haguruke hīgīre: ibisagara vyaho bizocika amatongo, ata wukiriho wo kuhaba." 
Jeremiah48:10 Aravumwe uwanjanjwa ku gikorwa c’Uhoraho; aravumwe ūbuza inkota yiwe kuvisha amaraso. 
Jeremiah48:11 Mowabu hamye hidibamiye uhereye mu buto bgaho, hireretse ku mvūzo, ntihāsukanuwe ngo have mu mubindi haje mu wundi, ntihājanywe kw inyagano; ni co gituma uburyohe bgaho bukiri muri ho, n’ubumote bgaho ntibutītūke." 
Jeremiah48:12 Nuko rāba, imisi igira ize, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzoharungikira abacuranguza, bazohacuranguza, barangūze imibindi yaho, bamenagure amakarabo yaho." 
Jeremiah48:13 Abanyamowabu bazomāramāzwa na Kemoshi, nk’ ukw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bāmāramājwe n’ivy’ i Beteli bāri bishimiye." 
Jeremiah48:14 Muvuga ngw iki ngo Mur’ abahizi, kandi ngo Mur’ intōre zo kuja mu ntambara?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mowabu hacitse imisaka, badūze gutera ibisagara vyaho, kand’ imisore yaho y’intōre imanutse gukekagurwa, ni k’Umwami agize, yitwa Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Jeremiah48:16 Ukugesezwa kw’i Mowabu kuri hafi gushika, ivyago vyaho bije akabushungwe." 
Jeremiah48:17 Mwebge abahakikije mwese muharirire, namwe mwese abazi izina ryaho, muvuge, mut’ Es’ ukuntu ubuhiri bukomeye buvunitse, ya nkoni ishajije!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Yewe wa mukobga uba i Diboni, manuka uve mu cubahiro cawe, wicare ahagadutse; kuk’ umunyazi w’i Mowabu adūze kukurwanya, yasanganguye ibihome vyawe bikomeye." 
Jeremiah48:19 Ewe uba i Aroweri, hagarara i ruhande y’ inzira, wirābire indore: baza umugabo ahunze n’umugore yiyunzūra, uti Bibaye bite?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Mowabu haratēterewe; kuko hasanganguwe; muboroge, murire; muvuge inkuru kuri Arunoni kw i Mowabu hageseye." 
Jeremiah48:21 Iteka haciriweko rishitse mu ntāra yo hasi mu kiyaya, no kuri Holoni, no kuri Yahaza, no kuri Mefata," 
Jeremiah48:22 no kuri Diboni, no kuri Nebo, no kuri Beti‐dibulatayimu," 
Jeremiah48:23 no kuri Kiriyatayimu, no kuri Beti‐gamuli, no kuri Beti‐meyoni," 
Jeremiah48:24 no kuri Keriyoti, no kuri Bosira, no ku bisagara vyose vyo mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, ibiri kure n’ibiri hafi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Ihembe ry’i Mowabu rirakondowe, n’ukuboko kwaho kuravunitse, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah48:26 Muhaboreze, kuko hinantaje k’ Uhoraho; nuko Mowabu hazokwivurunga mu bidashwe vyaho, hacike agatwengo." 
Jeremiah48:27 None Isirayeli ntiwamugize agatwengo? Mbega yabonetsek’ ubusuma? Kuk’ uk’ umuvuga kwose uzunza umutwe. 
Jeremiah48:28 Yemwe ababa i Mowabu, ni muve mu bisagara, muje kuba mu masenga; mube nk’ inuma yārika icāri cayo mu mbavu z’umuryango w’isenga." 
Jeremiah48:29 Twumvise ivy’ ubgibone bg’i Mowabu, yuko hafise ubgibone bginshi; ivy’ ukwishira hejuru kwaho, n’ivy’ ubgibone bgaho, n’ivy’ amanyama yaho, n’ivy’ ukwigira hanini kwo mu mutima waho." 
Jeremiah48:30 Nzi uburake bgaho, ni k’Uhoraho agize, yukw ata co bumaze; ukwihayagiza kwaho nta co kwakoze." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ni co kizotuma mborogera Mowabu; mbere nzotakira i Mowabu hose: bazovugiriza amarūru abagabo b’i Kiri‐heresi. 
Jeremiah48:32 Ewe ruzabibu rw’ i Sibuma, nzokuririra kurusha kurira kw’i Yazeri; amashami yawe aca hejuru y’ikiyaga, agashika no ku kiyaga c’i Yazeri: umunyazi afashe ku vyo weze no ku vyo wimbuweko vya vino." 
Jeremiah48:33 Umunezero n’uguhimbarwa bikūweho, bikūwe mu ndimiro imera no mu gihugu c’i Mowabu; natumye vino ibura mu mato akanyirwamwo: nta wuzoganisha ibirenge n’akāmo k’umunezero: akāmo kazobaho kazoba ar’ ak’ intambara, ntikazoba ar’ ak’ umunezero." 
Jeremiah48:34 Gutaka kw’i Heshiboni kwumvikana gushitsa n’i Eleyale; mber’ amajwi yabo ashika n’i Yahazi, kand’ ahēra i Sowari agashitsa n’i Horonayimu bo n’i Egilati‐shelishiya: kuko n’amazi y’i Nimurimu azocika iyondoyondo." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ikigeretseko nzoherengeteza i Mowabu ūtangira ikimazi mu gitabo, n’uwosereza imibavu imana ziwe, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah48:36 Ni co gitumye Mowabu umutima wanje uhacurira intimba mu mwironge, abagabo b’i Kiri‐heresi ubacurira intimba mu mwironge: kukw ivy’ ibitayega hāronse bihonnye." 
Jeremiah48:37 Kukw imitwe yabo yose imowe inkomvorera, n’ ubganwa bgose bumowe; ku maboko yose har’ ibikebagure, no mu rukenyerero hose hakenyeye amagunira." 
Jeremiah48:38 Hejuru ku nzu zose z’i Mowabu no mu nzira zaho, hose hose har’ amaborogo: kuko nasābije Mowabu nk’urujo rudashimwa, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah48:39 Ewe kuntu hasābijwe! Ewe kuntu baboroga! Ewe kuntu ab’ i Mowabu baroye irya bomotse batēterewe! Uko ni ko Mowabu hazohinduka agatwengo n’akumiza ku bahakikije bose. 
Jeremiah48:40 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Eh’ umwansi azoza aguruka nk’inkukuma, azosanza amababa i Mowabu." 
Jeremiah48:41 I Keriyoti haratsinzwe, ibihome bineshejwe giturumbuka; kur’ uwo musi imitima y’abahizi b’i Mowabu izomera nk’umutima w’ umugore ari mu bise." 
Jeremiah48:42 Kandi Mowabu hazogesezwa ngo ntihabe hakiba ihanga, kuko hinantaje k’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah48:43 Wewe uba i Mowabu, ibiteye ubgoba n’urusumanyenzi n’umutego bigushitseko, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ūhunga ibiteye ubgoba azogwa mu rusumanyenzi; uwūrira ngw ave mu rusumanyenzi umutego uzomufata: kukw i Mowabu nzohashitsako umwaka wo kūzirwa kwabo, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah48:45 Abāhunze basigaye ata nkomezi mu gitūtu c’i Heshiboni: arik’ umuriro uturutse i Heshiboni, urubeya ruturutse hagati y’i Sihoni, rutongoye impande z’i Mowabu, n’igitwariro c’abanyamuvurungano." 
Jeremiah48:46 Ubonye ibara, Mowabu! Abantu ba Kemoshi baragowe! Kukw abahungu bawe bajanywe ar’ inyagano, n’abakobga bawe mu ngoyi." 
Jeremiah48:47 Yamara nzotuma ab’i Mowabu bahindukira bave mu kinyago mu misi yo hanyuma, ni k’Uhoraho agize. Ivy’ iteka Mowabu haciriwe bigarukiye aho." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ku vy’Abamoni. Uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ati Mbega Isirayeli nta bahungu afise? Nta samuragwa agira? None n’iki gituma ikigirwamana Malukamu ari co cegukiye Gadi, n’abantu baco baba mu bisagara vyaho?" 
Jeremiah49:2 None rero, ehe rāba imisi igira ize, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzokwumvikanisha akarūru k’intambara i Raba h’Abamoni; kandi hazohinduka ibirundo vy’amasakamburira, n’ abakobga baho bazoyigizwa n’ umuriro: ni ho Isirayeli azokwiguranura, akegukira abāmwegukiye, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah49:3 Boroga, Heshiboni we, kuko Hayi hanyazwe; murire, mwa bakobga b’i Raba, mukenyere amagunira: mwivugirize amarūru, mwiruke mujarajare hirya no hino mu nzitiro; kuko Malukamu kizojanwa ar’ inyagano, bo n’abaherezi baco n’abaganwa baco." 
Jeremiah49:4 N’iki gitumye wirata imyonga? Umwonga wawe uratwarwa, ewe mukobga usubiye inyuma, wishimiye ubutunzi bgawe, uti Ni nde azonshikīra?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ehe nzogushitsakw ibiteye ubgoba, ni k’Umwami agize, ni we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, biturutse mu bagukikije bose; muzokwirukanwa, umuntu wese atūmūke, kandi ntihazoboneka uwo gukoraniriza hamwe abazimiye." 
Jeremiah49:6 Ariko hanyuma nzotuma Abamoni bahindukira bave mu kinyago, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ku vya Edomu. Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Mbeg’ ubgenge nta bukiriho i Temani? Mbeg’ inama yabuze mu bahanga? Mbeg’ ubgenge bgabo bgakamanganye?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Muhunge, musubire inyuma, muje kuba ahigobetse, yemwe ababa i Dedani; kuko nzoshitsa ivyago kuri Esau, mu gihe nzomūzira." 
Jeremiah49:9 Abamura inzabibu bogushikako, mbega hari n’uduhumbga tw’ inzabibu bogusigariza? Cank’ ibisuma vyogutahako mw ijoro ntivyokwoza uko bishaka?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Ni ko nanje Esau namusize amēnya, natwikuruye ahinyegeje hiwe ngo ntāshobore kwinyegeza: uruvyaro rwiwe n’abo bavukana n’ababanyi biwe barageseye, na we ubgiwe ntakiriho." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siga abana bawe b’ impfuvyi, nzobazigama mbabesheho; abapfakazi bawe ni banyizigire." 
Jeremiah49:12 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abāri batabereye kunywa kur’ ico gikombe ko batazobura kukinywa, none weho uzogenda udahanwe na gatoya? Eka ntuzogenda udahanwe, arik’ uzonywa nta kabuza." 
Jeremiah49:13 Kuko nirahiye ubganje, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, yukw i Bosira hazohinduka akajoreza n’igitutsi n’ ibitongozi n’ikivume; kand’ ibisagara vyaho vyose bizoba ibitongozi gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah49:14 Numvise inkuru zivuye k’ Uhoraho, kandi har’ intumwa itumwe ku mahanga, ngo Mwikoranye muhatere, muhaguruke muje mu ntambara." 
Jeremiah49:15 Kuko rāba, nakugize ritoya ku yandi mahanga, n’inkēngērwa mu bantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Gutera ubgoba kwawe n’ubgibone bgo mu mutima wawe vyaraguhenze, wewe uba mu bihoro vyo mu bitandara, wihase ku mpinga y’ umusozi: naho wokwārika icāri cawe hejuru iyo bigwa nk’inkukuma, nzokumanura ngukūreyo, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah49:17 Kandi Edomu hazohinduka akajoreza: ūzohaca wese azojorerwa, azovuza agahwa kubg’ ivyago vyaho vyose." 
Jeremiah49:18 Nk’ukw i Sodomu n’i Gomora vyabaye, igihe hākomvomvorwa, bo n’ibisagara bihereranye na ho, ni kw ata muntu azobayo, canke ngo hagire umwana w’umuntu azoba akihaba, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah49:19 Eh’ azodūga nk’intambge ivuye kuri Yorodani iyo rwigize akagabo, ngw atere ahantu h’itsitsi hakomeye: ariko nzotuma ahahunga giturumbuka, kand’ uwo nzotoranya ni we nzoshinga ngw ahaganze: none ni nde ahwanye nanje? Kandi ni nde azonshingira igihe? Kandi ni nde mwungere yohangara guhagarara imbere yanje?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Nuko rero ni mwumve inama Uhoraho yarunduye kuri Edomu, n’imigabo yagabiye y’ivyo azogirira ababa i Temani: ati N’ukuri bazobakwega nk’imyagazi yo mu mukuku; n’ukuri azobagesezanya n’aho baba." 
Jeremiah49:21 Isi ihindishwa agashitsi no kwumva ugusenyerana kwabo; amarūru yabo yumvikana gushitsa ku Kiyaga Gitukura. 
Jeremiah49:22 Eh’ azodūga aguruke nk’inkukuma, asānze amababa i Bosira: kand’ umutima w’abahizi b’i Edomu kur’ uwo musi uzohinduka nk’umutima w’ umugore ari ku bise." 
Jeremiah49:23 Ivy’ i Damasiko. I Hamati haratēterewe, bo n’i Arupadi; kuko humvise inkuru mbi, harashonga: ku kiyaga hahagaritse umutima, ntihashobora gutēkāna." 
Jeremiah49:24 I Damasiko haradendebukiwe, harakimiranye ngo hiruke, hafashwe n’agatengo: uburibge n’ umubabaro vyahafashe nk’umugore aramutswe." 
Jeremiah49:25 Mbega n’ iki catumye igisagara c’ishimwe kitāzigurijwe, ca gisagara cannezereza?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ni co gitumye imisore yaho izohindikirana mu nzira zaho, n’abahizi bose bazozibizwa kur’ uwo musi, ni jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mbivuze." 
Jeremiah49:27 Nzokwanda umuriro uruzitiro rw’i Damasiko, kand’ uzotongora ingoro za Beni‐hadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 Ivy’ i Kedari, n’ivy’ ibihugu vy’abami b’i Hazori, ivyo Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yahavuye atsinda. Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ni muhaguruke mudūge i Kedari, munyage abantu b’i burasirazuba." 
Jeremiah49:29 Bazonyaga amahema yabo n’ imikuku yabo, bazokwinyagira impuzu z’imikingo yabo n’ivy’ imbombovu vyabo vyose n’ingamiya zabo: kandi bazobabarira basemerera, bati Har’ ibiteye ubgoba irya n’ino." 
Jeremiah49:30 Muhunge, mukwiragire kure, muje kuba ahigobetse, yemwe ababa i Hazori, ni k’Uhoraho agize; kuko Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yabahigiye imihigo, yarunduye imigabo y’ivy’ azobagirira." 
Jeremiah49:31 Ni muhaguruke mudūge, muje kw ihanga ryidibamiye, ryibereye aho ata co ryinona, ritagira imyugariro cank’ ibihindizo, ryibera aho ukwaryo, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ingamiya zabo zizoba iminyago, n’isinzi ry’ibitungwa vyabo rizoba inyagano: kandi nzoshwiragiriza mu birēre vyose abīca amasoso; nzobazanakw ivyago biturutse impande zose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah49:33 Kand’ i Hazori hazoba i wabo w’imbgebge, n’ibitongozi vy’ibihe bidashira: nta muntu azobayo, cank’ umwana w’umuntu azoba akihaba." 
Jeremiah49:34 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yeremiya uwavugishwa na we, ku vya Elamu, igihe Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda yar’ agiye ku ngoma," 
Jeremiah49:35 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Ehe nzovuna umuheto w’i Elamu, ni wo binunu vy’ubuhizi bgaho." 
Jeremiah49:36 Kandi nzohuruza kuri Elamu imiyaga ine iturutse ku mpande zine z’ijuru, mbashwiragirize mur’ ivyo birēre vyose; abirukanywe b’i Elamu nta hanga batazoshikamwo." 
Jeremiah49:37 Nzotera Abelamu agatengo imbere y’abansi babo, n’imbere y’abarondera kubica: kandi nzobazanakw ivyago, ni vyo burake bganje bg’inkazi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze; kandi nzorungika inkota ibakurikirane, gushitsa mbamaze." 
Jeremiah49:38 Nzoshinga intebe yanje y’ubgami i Elamu, kandi nzohagesereza umwami n’ abaganwa baho, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah49:39 Yamara mu misi yo hanyuma nzotuma Abelamu bahindukira bave mu kinyago, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ijambo Uhoraho yavuze ku vy’i Babuloni, no ku vy’igihugu c’Abakaludaya, arivugishije Yeremiya." 
Jeremiah50:2 Mubitāngāze mu mahanga, muvyamamaze, mushinge ibendera; muvyamamaze, ntimubihishe, mut’ I Babuloni haratsinzwe, ikigirwamana Beli kiratēterewe, Merodaki kiravunaguritse; ibishushanyo vyaho biratēterewe, ibigirwamana vyaho biravunaguritse."
