Jeremiah50:3 Kukw i burārūko hazoturuka ihanga rije kuhatera, rizohindura igihugu caho amatongo, kandi nta wuzoba akihaba; abantu bo n’ibitungwa bizohunga bigende." 
Jeremiah50:4 Kuko mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ico gihe, ni k’Uhoraho agize, Abisirayeli bazoza, bazananye n’ Abayuda; bazogenda barira ingenda, barondera Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Bazobaza ivy’ i Siyoni bahērekeje amaso, bat’ Enda ni muze mwifatanye n’Uhoraho musezerane isezerano ritazoshira ritazokwibagirana." 
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu banje bābaye intama zizimiye; abungere babo bārabajimije, bābahubirije ku misozi: bāva ku musozi baja ku wundi, bibagiye uburuhukiro bgabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Abābabonye bose bāgiye babatsontsomera; abarwanizi babo bāvuze, bati Nta caha dukoze, kuko bācumuye k’Uhoraho, ari we i wabo w’ubugororotsi, k’Uhoraho, ari we vyizigiro vya ba sekuruza." 
Jeremiah50:8 Muhunge muve hagati y’i Babuloni, muve mu gihugu c’ Abakaludaya, mube ba kizigenza nk’impfizi z’impene mu mukuku." 
Jeremiah50:9 Kuko rāba, nzoyagamvya ikoraniro ry’amahanga ahambaye aturutse i burārūko, ngw adūge atere i Babuloni: kandi bazotonda urugamba kuharwanya; bazohatsinda bahereye kur’ urwo ruhande: imyampi yabo izoba nk’iy’ umuhizi w’umuhanga: nta wuzogwa hasi." 
Jeremiah50:10 I Bukaludaya hazohinduka isahu: abahasahura bose bazohāga, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah50:11 Kuko vyabanezereye, bikabahimbara, mwebge abanyaga ishamvu yanje; kuko mwikirigita nk’inka y’iriza yo mu magarama, mukaroherana nk’amafarasi y’inkomezi;" 
Jeremiah50:12 nuko rero nyoko azogira ibitētērwa vyinshi, uwabavyaye azomāramāra: rāba, azosigara ar’ uw’ inyuma y’ayandi mahanga, abe ubugaragwa, igihugu kigadutse, n’ubgeranyange." 
Jeremiah50:13 Kubg’ uburake bg’ Uhoraho ntihazosubira kugerērwa, ariko hazohebga rwose: umuntu wese azohita kuri Babuloni azojorerwa, azovuza agahwa kubg’ ivyago vyaho vyose." 
Jeremiah50:14 Mwebge mwese abarashi, mutondere urugamba Babuloni irya n’ino; muharase, ntimuzigurize imyampi: kuko hācumuye k’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah50:15 Muhīrahire mur’ irya n’ino; hazokoma amashi, ibihome bihakingiye bizotemba, inzitiro zaho zisangangurwe: kukw ar’ uguhōra kw’ Uhoraho; namwe muhīhōre; nk’ uko hakoze abe ari ko muhasubiriza mu nkōko." 
Jeremiah50:16 Murandure i Babuloni umubivyi, bo n’ūtemesha umuhoro mu gihe c’iyimbura. Kubgo gutinya inkota iririka, bazohunga, umuntu wese asubire mu bgoko bgabo, umuntu wese asubire mu gihugu cabo." 
Jeremiah50:17 Abisirayeli n’intama zisābagiye; intambge zarabasanzaje: umwami w’i Ashuri ni we yabanje kubarotsa, ubuheruka Nebukadineza uyo, umwami w’i Babuloni, yabajanjaguye amagufa." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, ati Rāba nzohana umwami w’i Babuloni n’igihugu ciwe, nk’uko nahannye umwami w’i Ashuri." 
Jeremiah50:19 Kandi nzogarukana Abisirayeli mu canya cabo, na bo bazorīsha i Karumeli n’i Bashani, bafore amabondo bari ku misozi y’i Efurayimu n’i Gileyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ico gihe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ibigabitanyo vy’Abisirayeli bizoronderwa, bibure; n’ivyaha vy’Abayuda na vyo ntibizoboneka: kuko nzoharira abo nashigaje kuba amasigarira." 
Jeremiah50:21 Dūga utere igihugu c’i Meratayimu, uhatere, utere n’ababa i Pekodi: ubakurikirane, ubice, ubatotore rwose, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ubagirire nk’ivyo nkubariye vyose." 
Jeremiah50:22 Akarūru k’ intambara kari mu gihugu, bo n’ ak’ ukugeseza gukomeye." 
Jeremiah50:23 Ewe kuntu ya nyundo yar’ igeramiye isi yose ivunitse, imenaguritse! Ewe kuntu i Babuloni hahindutse ibitongozi hagati mu mahanga!" 
Jeremiah50:24 Naguteze umutego, nawe uca urafatwa ata co winona, ewe Babuloni: wararushe uraboneka, utak’ urafatwa, kuko warwanije Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah50:25 Uhoraho yuguruye ububīko bg’ibirwanishwa vyiwe, asohoye ibirwanishwa vy’ubushangashirwe bgiwe: kuk’ Umwami, ari we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, afise igikorwa co gukora mu gihugu c’ Abakaludaya." 
Jeremiah50:26 Ni muze muhatere, muturutse impande zose, mwugurure ibigega vyaho: muhace nk’ibirundo vy’amasakamburira, muhatotore rwose, ntihagire ikihasigara." 
Jeremiah50:27 Ni mwice amakombe yaho yose; n’amanuke aje kubāgwa. Babonye ibara! Kuk’ umusi wabo washitse, ni wo gihe co kūzirwa kwabo." 
Jeremiah50:28 Ni mwumve ingene bahunga, bacika bava mu gihugu c’i Babuloni, ngo bamamaze i Siyoni uguhōra kw’Uhoraho Imana yacu, uguhōra yahōye urusengero rwiwe!" 
Jeremiah50:29 Ni muhamagare abarashi bakoranire kurwanya Babuloni, abazi gufora imiheto bose; musagaze hirya no hino yaho; ntihagire uwaho acika: muhīhōre ibikwiranye n’ibikorwa vyaho, muhasubirize mu nkōko ibikwiranye n’ivyo hākoze; kuko hinantaje k’Uhoraho, k’Uwera w’ Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ni co gitumye imisore yaho izohindikirana mu nzira zaho, n’abahizi bose bazozibizwa kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah50:31 Ehe tuzohigūra twe nawe, wa munyabgibone we, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo mbivuze; kuk’ umusi wawe ushitse, ni wo gihe nkūziye." 
Jeremiah50:32 Umunyabgibone azotsitara atembe, ntihagire ūmuvyutsa: kandi nzokwanda umuriro ibisagara vyiwe, uzotongora abamukikije bose." 
Jeremiah50:33 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Abisirayeli n’Abayuda bāhaharijwe hamwe; ababajanye kw inyagano bārabagumije, banse kubarekura." 
Jeremiah50:34 Arik’ Umucunguzi wabo arakomeye: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryiwe; azobītsa mu manza zabo, kugira ngw ahe isi kuruhuka, arikw atere ababa i Babuloni imitima ihagaze." 
Jeremiah50:35 Inkota iri ku Bakaludaya, ni k’Uhoraho agize, no ku baba i Babuloni, no ku baganwa baho, no ku banyabgenge baho." 
Jeremiah50:36 Inkota iri ku birata, kandi bazoyinga; inkota iri ku bahizi baho, kandi bazoranduka imitima." 
Jeremiah50:37 Inkota iri ku mafarasi yabo, no ku mikogote yabo, no ku b’ikivange c’amoko bari hagati muri ho, kandi bazohinduka nk’ abagore; inkota iri ku butunzi bgaho, kandi bazobunyagwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Ikigatwa kizoba ku mazi yaho, kand’ azogaduka; kukw ar’ igihugu c’ibishushanyo bibājwe, bāciwe ntema n’ibigirwamana." 
Jeremiah50:39 Ni co kizotuma ibikōko vyo mu bugaragwa bizobanayo n’amabingira, n’ibisīga vyitwa imbuni na vyo bizohaba: ntihazosubira kugerērwa gushitsa ibihe vyose, kandi nta wuzoba akihaba uk’ urunganwe rwabo ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Jeremiah50:40 Nk’uko vyabaye hamwe Imana yakomvomvora i Sodomu n’i Gomora, bo n’ibisagara bihereranye na ho, ni kw ata muntu azobayo, canke ngo hagire umwana w’umuntu azoba akihaba, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Jeremiah50:41 Eh’ ubgoko buraje buvuye i burārūko; ihanga rikomeye n’ abami benshi bazovyutswa bave ku mpera y’isi. 
Jeremiah50:42 Bābiriye imiheto n’amacumu; ni ba ruburakigongwe, nta mbabazi bagira; ijwi ryabo ribomborana nk’ikiyaga, kandi bagendera ku mafarasi; bāzira mu rugamba icarimwe, nk’ umuntu umwe, kugira ngo bagutere, ewe mukobga Babuloni." 
Jeremiah50:43 Umwami w’i Babuloni yumvise inkuru zavyo, amaboko yiwe arareganuka: uburibge buramufashe, nk’ibise vy’umugore aramutswe." 
Jeremiah50:44 Eh’ azodūga nk’intambge ivuye kuri Yorodani iyo rwigize akagabo, ngw atere ahantu h’itsitsi hakomeye: ariko nzotuma bahunga bahave giturumbuka, kand’ uwo nzotoranya ni we nzoshinga ngw ahaganze: none ni nde ahwanye nanje? Kandi ni nde azonshingira igihe? Kandi ni nde mwungere yohangara guhagarara imbere yanje?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Nuko rero ni mwumve inama Uhoraho yarunduye kuri Babuloni, n’imigabo yagabiye y’ ivyo azogirira igihugu c’Abakaludaya: ati N’ukuri bazobakwega nk’imyagazi yo mu mukuku; n’ ukuri azobagesezanya n’aho baba." 
Jeremiah50:46 Isi ihindishwa agashitsi no kwumva gutsindwa kw’i Babuloni: amarūru yaho yumvikana mu mahanga. 
Jeremiah51:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzovyutsa igihuhuta c’umuyaga kigeseza, ngitēze i Babuloni n’ababa i Lebu‐kamayi." 
Jeremiah51:2 Kandi nzorungika i Babuloni abagosozi bazohagosora, kand’ igihugu caho bazogicacura, gisēswe: kuko ku musi w’ivyago bazohakikiza impande zose." 
Jeremiah51:3 Umurashi ntaz’ aruhe afora umuheto wiwe, n’uwambaye ivyuma bimukīngira ntaz’ aruhe yirwanira. Ntimuzigurize imisore yaho; mutotore rwose ingabo zaho zose." 
Jeremiah51:4 Bazokwicwa bahindikirane aho nyene i Bukaludaya, batobekeranirizwe mu nzira zaho." 
Jeremiah51:5 Kukw Abisirayeli atar’ intābga, cank’ Abayuda, ku Mana yabo, ni we Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, nah’ igihugu cabo cuzuye ivyo bācumuye k’Uwera w’Abisirayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Ni muhunge muve hagati muri Babuloni, umuntu wese yunzūre amagara yiwe; ntimuranduranwe na ho, muzira ibigabitanyo vyaho, kukw ar’ igihe c’uguhōra kw’Uhoraho, agira ahasubirize mu nkōko." 
Jeremiah51:7 Babuloni cār’ igikombe c’izahabu mu kuboko kw’Uhoraho, cāboreje isi yose: amahanga yanyoye kuri vino yaco, ni co catumye azimira ubgenge." 
Jeremiah51:8 I Babuloni harakomvomvowe giturumbuka, harageseye: muhaborogere; mwābīre umuti wo kuvūra uburibge bgaho, namba kumbure hokira." 
Jeremiah51:9 Twagerageje kuvūra Babuloni, ariko ntihakize: reka tuhahebe, umuntu wese ni yisubirire mu gihugu cabo: kukw iteka haciriweko rishitse no kw ijuru, rigiye hejuru gushitsa no mu bicu." 
Jeremiah51:10 Uhoraho yerekanye ukugororoka kwacu; enda ni muze twamamaze i Siyoni igikorwa c’Uhoraho Imana yacu. 
Jeremiah51:11 Mukarishe imyampi, mubangirize inkinzo: Uhoraho yagayambije imitima y’abami b’Abamedi; kukw imigabo yagīriye i Babuloni n’ukuhageseza: kukw ar’ uguhōra kw’Uhoraho, uguhōra yahōye urusengero rwiwe." 
Jeremiah51:12 Mushinge ibendera mwerekeye inzitiro z’i Babuloni, mugwize abashibamyi, mushireh’ abateramyi, mugere abaja kuhaca ibico: kuk’ Uhoraho yahagīriye imigabo, agashitsa ivyo yavuze ku baba i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah51:13 Ewe uba ku materaniro y’amazi menshi, ukaba mu bihinda vy’ubutunzi, umuhero wawe urashitse, ipfa ryo kudahāga kwawe riraherewe." 
Jeremiah51:14 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yirahiye ubgiwe, ati N’ukuri i wawe nzohuzuza abansi bagutere nk’inzige: bazokureremesherezakw akarūru." 
Jeremiah51:15 Rurema ni yo yaremesheje isi ubushobozi bgayo, ikayihamangirisha ubgenge bgayo, ikagaranzuza ijuru ukumenya kwayo:" 
Jeremiah51:16 iy’ ishize ijwi hejuru haba gusūma kw’ amazi yo hejuru; irandisha ibipfungu bikava ku mpera y’isi; iremera imvura imiravyo, kand’ isokorora umuyaga mu bubīko bgayo." 
Jeremiah51:17 Non’ umuntu wese kw ar’ ikiyingiyingi ata bgenge agira! Umucuzi w’izahabu wese azotēterezwa n’igishushanyo ciwe yasaruye, kukw igishushanyo ciwe yavugutiye mu nkero ar’ ic’ ibinyoma, kandi nta mpwemu ziba muri vyo." 
Jeremiah51:18 N’ivy’ ubusa gusa, n’igikorwa c’uruhendo; igihe cabo co kūzirwa bizoherengetezwa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Arik’ umugabane wa Yakobo we si kw ameze, kukw ari we Muremyi wa vyose; kandi Isirayeli ni we muryango yagize ishamvu yiwe: Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ni ryo zina ryiwe." 
Jeremiah51:20 Ni wewe nyundo yanje, n’ ibirwanishwa vyanje: ni wewe nzomenaguza amahanga; ni wewe nzogeseresha abami b’ibihugu;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ni wewe nzomenaguza ifarasi n’ūyigenderako; 
Jeremiah51:22 ni wewe nzomenaguza umukogote n’ūwugenderamwo; ni wewe nzomenaguza umugabo n’umugore; ni wewe nzomenaguza umutāma n’umusore; ni wewe nzomenaguza umuhungu n’umukobga; 
Jeremiah51:23 ni wewe nzomenaguza umwungere n’umukuku wiwe; ni wewe nzomenaguza umurimyi n’inka arimisha; ni wewe nzomenaguza abagabisha n’abaganza. 
Jeremiah51:24 Kand’ ab’ i Babuloni, bo n’ababa i Bukaludaya bose, nzobasubiriza mu nkōko ibibi vyabo vyose bākoreye i Siyoni mubona, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah51:25 Ehe tuzohigūra twe nawe, wa musozi ugeseza we, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, wagesheje isi yose: nzokubangurirak’ ukuboko kwanje, ngucuranguze ngukūre ku rutare, nguhindure umusozi uhiye inkomvorera." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ntibazoba bakigukūrako n’ibuye ryo kugumya imfuruka, cank’ ibuye ry’itanguriro; arik’ uzoba ibitongozi gushitsa ibihe bidashira, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah51:27 Mushinge ibendera mu gihugu, muvuze inzamba zitabaza mu mahanga, mwiteguze amahanga arwane na ho, mukoranirize hamwe abami b’i Ararati n’i Mini n’i Ashikenazi kuharwanya; mushinge umugabisha wo kuhagomorera; mudūze amafarasi nk’inzige zishinze urwoya." 
Jeremiah51:28 Mwiteguze amahanga kurwana na ho, bo n’abami b’i Bumedi, n’abagabisha baho, n’ abaganza baho bose, n’ibihugu vyose biganzwa na ho." 
Jeremiah51:29 Isi ihinze agashitsi, irasambagirika: kukw imigabo Uhoraho yagīriye i Babuloni igihamye, ngw ahindure igihugu c’i Babuloni ibitongozi, ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah51:30 Abahizi b’i Babuloni bahevye kurwana, bigungiye mu bihome vyabo, ubutōre bgabo buraheze, bacitse bga bagore: amazu yaho yanzwe umuriro; ibihindizo vyaho biravunaguritse." 
Jeremiah51:31 Intabaza imwe izohūra n’iyindi, n’intumwa imwe ihūre n’iyindi, ngo bamenyeshe umwami w’i Babuloni yukw igisagara ciwe gitsinzwe impande zose:" 
Jeremiah51:32 kandi ko bazitiye ivyambu giturumbuka, baturiye n’ urufunzo, kandi kw abahizi bacitse ivutu." 
Jeremiah51:33 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we Mana y’Abisirayeli, at’ Umukobga ari we Babuloni ameze nk’imbuga iy’ ikubita rigeze; hasigaye igihe gito igihe co kwimburwa kikahashikako." 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yaramfyonderanije, arandotsa, angira urwavya rusigaye ubusa, yaranyongobeje nk’igisato c’amahēro, yagemereje inda yiwe ivyar’ ivyiza vyanje; yaranyirukanye." 
Jeremiah51:35 Ivyo nagiriwe nabi bikaba no ku mubiri wanje ni bisubire kuri Babuloni, ni k’ ūzoba ar’ i Siyoni azovuga; amaraso yanje arakora ababa i Bukaludaya, ni ko Yerusalemu hazovuga." 
Jeremiah51:36 None rero, uku ni k’ Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzokwitsa mu manza zawe, ndaguhōre; nzokamya ikiyaga caho, n’isōko yaho nzoyimīmūra." 
Jeremiah51:37 Kand’ i Babuloni hazocika ibirundo vy’amasakamburira, n’i wabo w’imbgebge, n’akajoreza, n’ico kuvuzwakw agahwa, ata wukihaba." 
Jeremiah51:38 Bazokwivuga nk’imigunza y’intambge bose icarimwe, bagwangware nk’ ivyana vy’intambge." 
Jeremiah51:39 Bamaze kuborerwa nzobategurira amazimano, kandi nzobaboreza kugira ngo banezerwe, basinzire itiro ry’intashira, batazokwikangura ukundi, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah51:40 Nzobamanukana nk’ imyagazi y’intama ija kubāgwa, nk’amapfizi y’intama n’ay’ impene." 
Jeremiah51:41 Ewe kuntu i Sheshaki hatsinzwe! Ahār’ ibihimbaro vy’isi yose ukuntu hazirimukiwe! Ewe kuntu i Babuloni hahindutse ibitongozi hagati mu yandi mahanga! 
Jeremiah51:42 Ikiyaga kiradūze kīziye i Babuloni: harengewe n’isinzi ry’ imipfunda yaco. 
Jeremiah51:43 Ibisagara vyaho bihindutse ibitongozi, igihugu cumye c’ubugaragwa, igihugu ata muntu akikibamwo, ata n’umuntu akigihitamwo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Kandi nzohanira ca kigirwamana Beli i Babuloni, nzokijiginyura mu menyo ivyo catsontsomeye; kand’ amahanga ntazosubira gusendanisha aja kuri co: mber’ uruzitiro rw’i Babuloni ruzotemba." 
Jeremiah51:45 Yemwe bantu banje, ni muve hagati muri ho, mwikize mwese uburake bganje bg’inkazi, jewe Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah51:46 Imitima yanyu ntidendebukirwe, ntimuterwe ubgoba n’impuha zumvikana mu gihugu; kukw impuha zizoza mu mwaka umwe, maze mu wundi mwaka hakaza izindi, umuryano ukaba mu gihugu, abaganza bakarwanya abandi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Nuko rero, rāba imisi igira ize, nzohana ibishushanyo bibājwe vy’i Babuloni, igihugu caho cose kizotētērwa; abishwe baho bose bazohindikirana hagati muri ho." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ni ho ijuru n’isi n’ibirimwo vyose bizoririmbishwa n’umunezero wo kwitamba kuri Babuloni; kukw abanyazi bazohāzira bavuye i burārūko, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah51:49 Nk’uko Babuloni hāhindikiranije abishwe b’Abisirayeli, ni kw i Babuloni hazohindikirana abishwe b’igihugu caho." 
Jeremiah51:50 Yemwe abakize inkota, mugende, ntimuhagarare; munyibuke, jewe Uhoraho, mukiri kure, i Yerusalemu hagaruke mu mitima yanyu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Turatēterewe, kuko twumvise ibitutsi; mu maso hacu haje ibimāramāre: kukw abanyamahanga binjiye mu myanya yera yo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Jeremiah51:52 Nuko rero, rāba imisi igira ize, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, nzohana ibishushanyo bibājwe vyaho; kandi mu gihugu caho cose abakomeretse bazocura umuniho." 
Jeremiah51:53 Naho Babuloni hodūga hagashika kw ijuru, kandi nah’ ibihome vyaho birebire vyoba uruhatane, na ho nyene abanyazi bohashika bavuye kuri jewe, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Jeremiah51:54 Ijwi ry’amarūru riturutse i Babuloni, n’iry’ ukugesera gukomeye riturutse mu gihugu c’Abakaludaya!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Kuk’ Uhoraho ahoneje i Babuloni, ajibije amajwi yaho ahūrīra; kukw imipfunda y’abanyazi ibomborana nk’amazi menshi, urwamo rw’ijwi ryabo rwumvikana;" 
Jeremiah51:56 mber’ abanyazi barahashitse, bashitse i Babuloni nyene, abahizi baho barafashwe, imiheto yabo iravunaguritse. Kuk’ Uhoraho ar’ Imana yīhōra, ntazobura kwīhōra." 
Jeremiah51:57 Kandi nzoboreza abaganwa baho n’abanyabgenge baho, bo n’abagabisha baho, n’abahaganza n’abahizi baho; bazosinzira itiro ry’intashira, ntibikangure ukundi, ni jewe Umwami mbivuze, izina ryanje nd’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Jeremiah51:58 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Inzitiro zagutse z’i Babuloni zizosangangurwa rwose, n’amarembo yaho maremare atongozwe umuriro; kand’ amahanga azoba yar’ atamijwe n’ubusa, n’amoko azoba yar’ aruhijwe n’ibizoja mu muriro." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ivyo uwavugishwa n’Imana Yeremiya yageze Seraya mwene Neriya, Neriya wa Mahaseya, igihe yajana na Zedekiya umwami w’i Buyuda, aja i Babuloni, mu mwaka ugira kane wo kuba ku ngoma kwiwe. Kandi Seraya yar’ umukuru w’abagaranzurira umwami." 
Jeremiah51:60 Nuko Yeremiya yari yanditse mu gitabo ivyago vyose bizotera i Babuloni, ni vyo ayo majambo yose yanditswe avuga ivya Babuloni." 
Jeremiah51:61 Maze Yeremiya abarira Seraya, ati Ni washika i Babuloni, ntubure gusoma aya majambo yose," 
Jeremiah51:62 kand’ ut’ Ewe Uhoraho, wavuze ku vy’aha hantu k’uzohahonnya, ngo ntihaze hagire ūzoba akihaba, ar’ umuntu cank’ igitungwa, ariko ko hazoba ibitongozi gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Jeremiah51:63 Urangije rero gusoma iki gitabo, uz’ uheze ugihambirane n’ibuye, ugiterere hagati mu ruzi Efurate:" 
Jeremiah51:64 kand’ uz’ uvuge, ut’ Uku ni ko Babuloni hazodobera, ntihasubire kwiburuka ukundi, kubg’ ivyago Uhoraho azohatēza: kandi bazoba badendebukiwe. Amajambo ya Yeremiya agarukiye aho." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedekiya yagiye ku ngoma amaze imyaka mirongwibiri n’umwe; ayimarakw imyaka cumi n’umwe i Yerusalemu. Nyina yitwa Hamutali, umukobga wa Yeremiya w’i Libuna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Akora ivyo Uhoraho abona kw ari bibi, nk’ivyo Yehoyakimu yakoze vyose." 
Jeremiah52:3 Kukw ivyabaye i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda vyavuye ku burake bg’Uhoraho, gushitsa ah’ amaramarije kubirukana imbere yiwe. Hanyuma Zedekiya agarariza umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah52:4 Mu mwaka ugira icenda Zedekiya ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kw’icumi, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi nyene, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni araza, bo n’ingabo ziwe zose, batera Yerusalemu, basagaza inyuma yaho; bubaka n’ ibihome vyo kuhatera hirya no hino." 
Jeremiah52:5 Nuko bakomeza kwugariza ico gisagara gushitsa ku mwaka ugira icumi na rimwe umwami Zedekiya ari ku ngoma. 
Jeremiah52:6 Mu kwezi kwa kane, ku musi wakwo ugira icenda, inzara yar’ imaze guhūma mur’ ico gisagara, bituma abantu b’abanyagihugu babura ico barya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Abakaludaya baraheza basatura uruzitiro rw’ ico gisagara; maz’ ingabo zose zirahunga, zihenga mw ijoro ziva mu gisagara, ziciye mu kirimba kiri hagati y’inzitiro zibiri cari hafi y’indimiro y’umwami; kand’ Abakaludaya bāri bakikije igisagara impande zose; nuko zijana inzira ica mu kiyaya Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Maz’ ingabo z’Abakaludaya zōma inyuma y’umwami Zedekiya, zimuhambiriza mu kiyaya c’i Yeriko: ingabo ziwe zirasābagira ziramuta." 
Jeremiah52:9 Maze bafata umwami, baramudūgana, bamuzanira umwami w’i Babuloni bamumusanza i Ribula, mu ntāra y’i Hamati: amucirakw iteka." 
Jeremiah52:10 Nuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni yicira abahungu ba Zedekiya imbere y’amaso yiwe nyene; yicira n’ abaganwa bose b’i Buyuda i Ribula. 
Jeremiah52:11 Anogora amaso Zedekiya; maz’ uwo mwami w’i Babuloni amwambika umunyororo, amujana i Babuloni, amushira mw ibohero, arinda ashitsa umusi yapfiriye." 
Jeremiah52:12 Maze mu kwezi kwa gatanu, ku musi wakwo ugira icumi, mur’ uwo mwaka ugira icumi n’icenda umwami Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma, Nebuzaradani umukuru w’abashibamyi, yahora ahagarara imbere y’umwami w’i Babuloni, yinjira i Yerusalemu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Araheza yanda umuriro ingoro y’Uhoraho n’ingoro y’ umwami, n’amazu yose y’i Yerusalemu, mber’ amazu yose y’ abahambaye ayatongoza umuriro." 
Jeremiah52:14 Maz’ ingabo zose z’Abakaludaya zari kumwe n’uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi, zisangangura inzitiro zose z’i Yerusalemu impande zose." 
Jeremiah52:15 Maze Nebuzaradani, uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi, ajana bamwe bo muri ba nyarucari ar’ inyagano, bo n’amasigarira y’ abantu bāri bagisigaye mur’ ico gisagara, n’abāri baragiye kwisaba umwami w’i Babuloni, n’amasigarira y’abafundi." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ariko Nebuzaradani, uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi, asiga abandi bo muri ba nyarucari bo mur’ ico gihugu ngo batunganye imizabibu, barime." 
Jeremiah52:17 Kand’ inkingi z’imiringa zari mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, n’ibitereko, na ca gikarabiro citwa ikiyaga cācuzwe mu miringa cāri mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, Abakaludaya barabijanjagura, bajana bino bimeneke vyose vy’imiringa i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah52:18 Bajana n’imibindi, n’ ivyuma biyōra umunyota, n’imakasi, n’inzavya, n’udukombe, n’ ibintu vyacuzwe mu miringa vyose bākoresha mu vyo guhēreza;" 
Jeremiah52:19 kandi n’ibikombe, n’ivyotero, n’inzavya, n’imibindi, n’ibiterekwakw amatara, n’udukombe, n’ ubgavya, uwo mukuru w’abashibamyi arabijana, ivyacuzwe mw izahabu ukwavyo, n’ivyacuzwe mw ifeza ukwavyo." 
Jeremiah52:20 Ku vya za nkingi zompi, na ca kiyaga, na vya bishushanyo vy’amapfizi cumi n’ abiri bicuzwe mu miringa vyari biteretsweko ca kiyaga, na vya bitereko, ivyo umwami Salomo yari yaracurishirije ingoro y’Uhoraho: imiringa ivyo bintu vyose vyacuzwemwo ntiyagira akagero." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ku vy’inkingi, inkingi imweimwe uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge cumi n’umunani y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; ubunini bgo mu nda yayo bgagerwa n’umugozi w’amatambge cumi n’abiri; intimba yayo yagerwa n’intoke zine: imbere yar’ umuheha." 
Jeremiah52:22 Yarik’ umwashi w’umuringa; uburebure bg’umwashi umwe‐umwe bgar’ amatambge atanu, kandi ku mwashi hārikw ibimeze nk’urusenga n’ibimeze nk’ amakomamanga impande zose, vyose vyācuzwe mu miringa: kandi n’inkingi ya kabiri yarikw ibisa n’ivyo, bo n’amakomamanga." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ibisa n’amakomamanga vyari mirongwicenda na bitandatu ku mpande zine; amakomamanga yose na yose yar’ ijana kur’ urwo rusenga hirya no hino. 
Jeremiah52:24 Nuko wa mukuru w’abashibamyi afata Seraya umuherezi mukuru, na Zefaniya umuherezi wa kabiri, n’abashibama ku rugi ukw ari batatu:" 
Jeremiah52:25 kandi mu gisagara ahafatira uwaganza ivy’ abahizi b’ intambara, n’abashingantahe ndwi b’abanyejambo b’umwami, abo yasanze mu gisagara; n’umukarani w’umugabisha w’ingabo yakoranya ingabo zo mur’ ico gihugu; afata n’abagabo mirongwitandatu bo mu banyagihugu yasanze hagati mur’ ico gisagara nyene." 
Jeremiah52:26 Maze Nebuzaradani, wa mukuru w’abashibamyi, arabajana, abasanza umwami w’i Babuloni i Ribula." 
Jeremiah52:27 Umwami w’i Babuloni arabazibagura, abatsinda ngaho nyene i Ribula, mu ntāra y’i Hamati. Uko ni kw Abayuda bajanywe kw inyagano, bakūrwa mu gihugu cabo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Aba ni bo bantu Nebukadineza yajanye ar’ inyagano: mu mwaka w’indwi yajanye Abayuda ibihumbi bitatu na mirongwibiri na batatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 mu mwaka ugira icumi n’umunani Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma, yajanye ab’ inyagano amajana munani na mirongwitatu na babiri, abakūye i Yerusalemu;" 
Jeremiah52:30 mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatatu Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma, Nebuzaradani umukuru w’ abashibamyi yajanye ab’ inyagano b’Abayuda abantu amajana ndwi na mirongwine na batanu: abantu bose na bose bār’ ibihumbi bine n’amajana atandatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Maze mu mwaka ugira mirongwitatu n’indwi Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda ari mu mugozi, mu kwezi kw’icumi na kabiri, ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri na gatanu, Evili‐merodaki umwami w’i Babuloni abohora Yehoyakina umwami w’i Buyuda, amukūra mw ibohero: hāri mu mwaka yimyemwo." 
Jeremiah52:32 Amuyāgīsha neza, yubahiriza intebe yiwe kuyirutisha iz’ abandi bami bāri kuri we i Babuloni." 
Jeremiah52:33 Amunyuranurira impuzu zo mw ibohero amwambika izindi, amuha kwama asangira na we na ntaryo, imisi yose yamaze akiriho." 
Jeremiah52:34 Kandi ku bimutunga, agererwa ivyo kumutunga n’umwami w’i Babuloni vy’intasība, ingaburo y’uko bukeye imisi yose yamaze akiriho, gushitsa ku musi yapfiriye." 
Lamentations1:1 Ewe kuntu igisagara cari cuzuye abantu gisigaye cicaye ubusa! Ukuntu cahindutse nk’umupfakazi! Icar’ agakomeye mu mahanga, kikaba umwamikazi mu ntāra, Ukuntu gisigaye gishikanira abandi!" 
Lamentations1:2 Kirāra kirarira mw ijoro, amosozi agacunduguta ku matama; Mu bakunzi baho bose ntihafise uwo kuhirura: Abagenzi baho bose bāraharyarutse, Bahindutse abansi baho." 
Lamentations1:3 Abayuda bajanywe ar’ inyagano, bitewe n’agahahazo no kuja mu buja bukomeye; Baba mu banyamahanga, ntibahabona uburuhukiro: Ababadendereza bose bābahambirije ahantu h’inkōnywa." 
Lamentations1:4 Inzira z’i Siyoni ziraboroga, kukw ata wukiruha aza mu misi mikuru yashinzwe; Amarembo yaho yose arasivye, abaherezi baho baraniha: Inkumi zaho zifise umubabaro, na ho ubgaho hari n’ intuntu." 
Lamentations1:5 Abarwanizi baho bahagiye hejuru, abansi baho bararoraniwe; Kuk’ Uhoraho yahababaje ahahōye ibicumuro vyaho vy’isinzi: Abana baho bashorewe ar’ inyagano imbere y’abarwanizi." 
Lamentations1:6 Icubahiro cose c’umukobga ari we Siyoni camuvuyeko: Abaganwa baho bahindutse nk’impongo zibuze ubgatsi, Bānyavūse batagifise intege imbere y’ababirukana." 
Lamentations1:7 Mu gihe c’umubabaro waho n’ivyago, Yerusalemu hibutse Ibihimbaro vyaho vyose hāhoranye uhereye kuva kera. Hamwe abantu baho bākorokeye mu maboko y’umurwanizi, ntihabone ūhatabara, Abarwanizi bārahabona, bakahatwengera mw ijigo ko habaye imisaka." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerusalemu hakoze ivyaha birengereje; ni co catumye hahinduka nk’ikintu giteye iseseme: Abāhora bahubaha bose basigaye bahakēngēra, kuko babonye ubgambure bgaho: N’ukuri haraniha, hakarora irya." 
Lamentations1:9 Ibiteye isoni vyaho vyashitse no ku myambaro yaho; ntihāri hārībajije ivy’ amaherezo yaho; Ni co catumye hacishwa bugufi bitangaje; ntihagira ūhahūmuriza. Uhoraho we, itegereze umubabaro wanje; kuk’ umwansi yishize hejuru." 
Lamentations1:10 Umurwanizi yashingirije ukuboko kwiwe ibintu vyaho vyose bihimbara: Kandi hitegereje ingen’ abanyamahanga binjiye ahantu haho hēra, Abo wari warahakaniye ko badakwiye kwinjira mw ikoraniro ryawe." 
Lamentations1:11 Abantu baho bose baraniha, bayerera utwo kurya; Ibintu vyabo vyābahimbara bābitanze ku two kurya ngo basame amagara yabo: Uhoraho we, rāba witegereze: nahindutse ikigawa." 
Lamentations1:12 Yemwe mwese abīhitira, mbega nta co murushe muvyibazako? Enda ni mwitegereze, murābe ko hoba umubabaro uhwanye n’uyu wanje wanshitseko, Uwo Uhoraho yambabarishije ku musi w’uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi." 
Lamentations1:13 Yarungitse umuriro mu magufa yanje uvuye iyo hejuru, urayayigiza: Yateze ibirenge vyanje umutego, ansubiza inyuma; Yangize inkōkōre, anca intege umusi urīra." 
Lamentations1:14 Ukuboko kwiwe kwamboheyekw ingōgo y’ibicumuro vyanje; Vyarasobekeranye, binshika mw izosi; yacobogoje inkomezi zanje: Umwami Imana yangabuye mu maboko y’abo ntashoboye kurindana na bo." 
Lamentations1:15 Umwami Imana yatītūye abahizi banje bose bāba i wanje; Yarungitse abaza kungirirak’ umusi mukuru ngo bafyonyagure imisore yanje: Umwami Imana yahonyanze umukobga w’inkumi w’i Buyuda, nk’ūganira vino mu bgato." 
Lamentations1:16 Ivyo ni vyo bindiza; amaso yanje, amaso yanje yisuka amosozi; Kuk’ uwompūmurije akandemesha umutima ambaye kure: Abana banje barapfapfanye, kuk’ umwansi yanyigamvye." 
Lamentations1:17 Siyoni hata amaboko, ntihabona uwohahūmuriza; Uhoraho yashinze ivya Yakobo, kw abamukikije bose bamubera abarwanizi: Yerusalemu habamereye nk’ ikintu giteye iseseme hagati muri bo." 
Lamentations1:18 Uhoraho aragororotse, ariko jeho nagararije ivyagezwe vyiwe: Ni mwumve ndabinginze, mwebge mwa mahanga yose, mwitegereze umubabaro wanje: Abakobga banje n’abahungu banje bagiye ar’ inyagano." 
Lamentations1:19 Natabaje abūzure banje, ariko barampemukira: Abaherezi banje n’abashingantahe banje bahwerereye mu gisagara, Bakiriko barayerera utwo kurya two gusama amagara yabo." 
Lamentations1:20 Uhoraho we, ni witegereze, kuko ndi mu magorwa; amara yanje aradobangana; Umutima wanje urandida mu nda; kuko nagararije birengereje: Hanze inkota iraririka, no mu nzu na ho har’ urupfu." 
Lamentations1:21 Ni wumve ingene nniha; nta wo kumpūmuriza ngira; Abansi banje bose bumvise ivyago mbonye; baranezerwa kukw ari wewe wabikoze: Uzotuma umusi washinze ushika, na bo bamere nkanje." 
Lamentations1:22 Ububi bgabo bgose ni bushike imbere yawe; Ubagirire nk’uko wangiriye umpōra ibicumuro vyanje vyose: Kuko kuniha kwanje ari kwinshi, kand’ umutima wanje ukaba udendebutse." 
Lamentations2:1 Ewe kuntu Umwami Imana yaratse, akūbikiza igicu ku mukobga w’i Siyoni! Yatsinze hasi ubgiza bg’ Abisirayeli abuhanuye kw ijuru, Kandi ntiyibutse indava y’ ibirenge vyiwe kur’ uwo musi w’uburake bgiwe." 
Lamentations2:2 Umwami Imana asanganguye amazu yose ya Yakobo ata kagongwe; Yahenuranye uburake ibihome vy’umukobga w’i Buyuda; Arabitsinda gushitsa hasi: Abami n’abaganwa babo yabahinduye ibihumane. 
Lamentations2:3 Kubg’ uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi yakondoye ihembe ryose ry’Abisirayeli; Yapfunye ukuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo imbere y’abansi: Kandi yaturiye Yakobo, amumerera nk’umuriro w’ikibengebenge utongora impande zose." 
Lamentations2:4 Yamufōreye umuheto nk’ umwansi, yahagaze abanguye ukuboko kw’i buryo nk’umurwanizi, Yishe abanyagikundiro bose: Yasutse ubushangashirwe bgiwe mw ihema ry’umukobga w’i Siyoni nk’umuriro." 
Lamentations2:5 Umwami Imana yahindukiye i Bgisirayeli nk’umwansi, arahayongobeza; Yayongobeje ingoro zaho zose, yasanganguye ibihome vyaho: Yongerekanije akabonge n’ ugucura intimba vy’umukobga w’i Buyuda." 
Lamentations2:6 Yashikuye ihema ryiwe nk’ ah’ ar’ umutara wo mu murima; Yasanganguye ahantu hiwe h’ikoraniro: Uhoraho yatumye imisi mikuru n’amasabato vyibagirana i Siyoni, Kand’ ubushangashirwe bgiwe bg’inkazi bgatumye atītūra umwami n’umuherezi wese." 
Lamentations2:7 Umwami Imana yashibuye igicaniro ciwe, yazinutswe ahēra hiwe, Yagabuye mu maboko y’ abansi ibigo vy’ingoro z’i Siyoni: Bāyogoreye mu ngoro y’ Uhoraho, nko ku musi mukuru washinzwe." 
Lamentations2:8 Uhoraho yagabiye gusangangura uruzitiro rw’umukobga w’i Siyoni: Yahageresheje umugozi, ntararuha apfunya ukuboko ngw areke guhonnya; Yateye igihome n’uruzitiro kuboroga; vyiheburiye hamwe." 
Lamentations2:9 Amarembo yaho anyikiye mu kuzimu; ibihindizo vyaho yaravyononye, arabivunagura: Umwami waho n’abaganwa baho bari mu mahanga; nta vyagezwe bikiriho: Mber’ abavugishwa n’Uhoraho ntibakigira ivyo beretswe na we." 
Lamentations2:10 Abashingantahe b’umukobga w’i Siyoni bicaye hasi, baguye mu gahwi; Biyoreye imikungugu ku mitwe; bakenyeye amagunira; Abakobga b’i Yerusalemu bajondamitse imitwe hasi." 
Lamentations2:11 Amaso yanje yakobowe n’ amosozi, amara yanje aradobangana, Umutima wanje usanzariye hasi kubgo kugesezwa kw’ umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu; Kukw abana bato n’abonka barabiraniye mu nzira zo mu gisagara." 
Lamentations2:12 Babaza ba nyina, bati Nta duheke na vino vyobaho? Bagaca barabiranira mu nzira zo mu gisagara nk’abakomeretse, Imitima yabo igahondoberera mu bikiriza vya ba nyina." 
Lamentations2:13 Nokubarira iki? Nokugereranya n’iki, ga mukobga Yerusalemu we? Noguhwanya n’iki kugira ngo nguhūmurize ga nkumi Siyoni we? Kuk’ uruguma rwawe ari runini nk’ikiyaga: ni nde yoshobora kukuvūra?" 
Lamentations2:14 Ba kamenyi bawe bākurotoreye ivy’ ubusa n’ivy’ ubupfu; Kandi ntibāguseruriye ibigabitanyo vyawe, ngo ntuje mu kinyago: Ariko bākurotoreye imbūri z’ubusa, n’ibikuzanira gucibga." 
Lamentations2:15 Abahita bose bakwitamba ku muvyimba bakubita amashi ku yandi; Bakavuza agahwa, bakazunguriza imitwe umukobga w’i Yerusalemu, Bati Mbeg’ iki ni ca gisagara abantu bāhora batazira, ngo Ni Nyamwiza w’agahore, ngo Ni Munezero w’isi yose?" 
Lamentations2:16 Abansi bawe bose barakwasamiye cane, Bavuza agahwa, bagahekenya imisaya, bati Twarahayongobeje; Bati N’ukuri uyu ni wo musi twari twiteze; none turawushitseko, turawiboneye." 
Lamentations2:17 Uhoraho yakoze ico yagabiye; Yashikije ijambo ryiwe yashinze mu misi ya kera; Yagukubise hasi ata kagongwe; Yahaye umwansi kukwitamba hejuru, Yashize hejuru ihembe ry’ abarwanizi bawe." 
Lamentations2:18 Umutima w’ab’ i Yerusalemu watakambiye Uhoraho; Bat’ Ewe wa ruzitiro rw’umukobga w’i Siyoni, reka amosozi asendanishe nk’ uruzi ku murango no mw ijoro; Nturuhe uruhuka na gatoya; imbone y’ijisho ryawe ntitenzekanye." 
Lamentations2:19 Va hasi uboroge mw ijoro, uhereye igihe amaterama atanguye; Usuke umutima wawe nk’ amazi imbere y’Umwami Imana: Tega ibiganza umusabire ubugingo bg’abana bawe, Barambitswe n’inzara mu mayirabiri yose." 
Lamentations2:20 Uhoraho we, rāba witegereze uwo wagiriye ivyo! Mbeg’ abagore borya abo bāvyaye, utwana bākuyakuya mu maboko yabo? Mbeg’ umuherezi n’ūvugishwa n’Imana bokwicirwa ahantu hēra h’Umwami Imana?" 
Lamentations2:21 Umusore n’umutāma barambaraye hasi mu nzira; Abigeme banje n’imisore yanje bahindikiranijwe n’ inkota; Wabatikije ku musi w’uburake bgawe; warabariritse ata kagongwe. 
Lamentations2:22 Wampamagariye ibinteye ubgoba irya n’ino, nk’uko wahamagara ikoraniro ku musi mukuru washinzwe, Kandi nta warokotse canke ngw asigare kur’ uwo musi w’uburake bg’Uhoraho; Abo nakuyakuya nkabarera, umwansi wanje yarabampēkūye." 
Lamentations3:1 Nd’ umuntu yabonye umubabaro uzanywe n’inkoni y’uburake bgayo. 
Lamentations3:2 Yaranjanye ancisha mu mwiza, atari mu muco." 
Lamentations3:3 N’ukuri yashishikaye kumbangurira ukuboko vuba na vuba burinda bgira. 
Lamentations3:4 Yasāzishije inyama zanje n’ urukoba rwanje; yavunaguye amagufa yanje. 
Lamentations3:5 Yaranziguje, ankikiza indurwe n’umubabaro." 
Lamentations3:6 Yangerereye ahantu h’umwiza nk’abapfuye kera. 
Lamentations3:7 Yankubakuvye impande zose ngo sincārūke; yatumye umunyororo wanje undemēra. 
Lamentations3:8 Mber’ iyo ndamutakambiye ndamutabaza, ugusenga kwanje akwugaranira hanze." 
Lamentations3:9 Yajibije inzira zanje ibibuye bibājwe; yagoretse inzira zanje. 
Lamentations3:10 Ammereye nk’igikōko citwa idubu kibundiye kwica, nk’ intambge itegeye mu bibundo." 
Lamentations3:11 Yakikamitse inzira zanje, kandi yarantabaguye; yangize inkōkōre." 
Lamentations3:12 Yamfōreyek’ umuheto, anshinga nk’uruti rw’icumu, antimbisha imyampi yiwe." 
Lamentations3:13 Imyampi yo mu mutana wiwe ayintobekeranije mu mafyigo. 
Lamentations3:14 Nahindutse ak’ amenyo mu bgoko bgacu bgose, n’ akavyino kabo umusi ukīra." 
Lamentations3:15 Yanyujuje ibamba, ampāza umururazi." 
Lamentations3:16 Amenyo yanje yayahongoje urusekebuye, yanyubitse mu munyota." 
Lamentations3:17 Kand’ ubugingo bganje bgatandukanijwe n’amahoro, ukuroranirwa narakwibagiye." 
Lamentations3:18 Maze ndavuga, nt’ Inkomezi zanje zirashize, n’ivyizigiro nari mfise k’Uhoraho na vyo biraheze." 
Lamentations3:19 Ibuka umubabaro wanje n’ intuntu yanje, umururazi n’ indurwe." 
Lamentations3:20 Umutima wanje wama uvyibuka, ugenda wicurikiriye muri jewe." 
Lamentations3:21 Ibi ni vyo nibuka, bikantera ivyizigiro:" 
Lamentations3:22 N’ukw imbabazi z’Uhoraho ari zo zatumye tudaherengetezwa, kukw ikigongwe ciwe kidahera:" 
Lamentations3:23 Cama ari gisha uko bukeye; ingen’ ar’ umwizigirwa bīratangaje. 
Lamentations3:24 Uhoraho ni we mugabane wanje, ni k’umutima wanje wama uvuga; ni co gituma nzohora mmwizigira." 
Lamentations3:25 Uhoraho agirira neza abamwiteze, n’imitima imurondera." 
Lamentations3:26 Ni vyiza k’umuntu yizigira, akitega agakiza k’Uhoraho atekereje." 
Lamentations3:27 Ni vyiza k’umuntu amenyerezwa ingōgo yo kuganzwa akiri muto. 
Lamentations3:28 Ni yicare wenyene, acereze, kukw ar’ Uhoraho yayimwambitse." 
Lamentations3:29 N’ashikane umunwa wiwe mu mukungugu, namba kumbure harih’ ivyizigiro." 
Lamentations3:30 N’ategere umusaya ūmukubita; bamuhāze ibitutsi. 
Lamentations3:31 Kuk’ Umwami Imana ata ho azota umuntu ruhebga. 
Lamentations3:32 Naho yomubabaza, arikw azomugirira ikigongwe, nk’ ukw isinzi ry’imbabazi ziwe riri." 
Lamentations3:33 Kukw atababaza abantu abigomba, canke kubatera intuntu." 
Lamentations3:34 Gusiribanga imbohe zose zo mw isi," 
Lamentations3:35 Canke kugoreka urubanza rw’ umuntu mu nyonga z’Īsumba vyose," 
Lamentations3:36 Canke kurya urubanza rw’ umuntu, Umwami Imana ntabishima." 
Lamentations3:37 Ni nde yovuga ikintu, kikaboneka, kand’ Umwami Imana atari we yabigeze?" 
Lamentations3:38 Mbega mu kanwa k’Īsumba vyose ntihavamw’ ivyago n’ivyiza? 
Lamentations3:39 Umuntu akiriho, iy’ ahaniwe ivyaha vyiwe, yokwidogera iki?" 
Lamentations3:40 Enda ni dusesangure ingeso zacu, tuzisuzume, tugaruke k’Uhoraho." 
Lamentations3:41 Ducurūrire imitima yacu Imana yo mw ijuru, tuyitarikiye amaboko," 
Lamentations3:42 Tuti Twaracumuye, turagarariza; ntiwaduharira." 
Lamentations3:43 Wadutwikiriye uburake, uradutōta; waratwishe, nta mbabazi watugirira." 
Lamentations3:44 Witwikiriye igicu, kugira ng’ ugusenga kwacu ntikumenēre ngo kugushikīre." 
Lamentations3:45 Waduhinduye nk’udukokorwa n’umwavu hagati y’amahanga. 
Lamentations3:46 Abansi bacu bose baratwasamiye. 
Lamentations3:47 Ibiteye ubgoba n’urusumanyenzi bidushitseko, bo n’ ubugesera no kuranduka." 
Lamentations3:48 Amaso yanje atemberanamw’ inzūzi z’amosozi, kubgo kuririra ukuranduka kw’ umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu." 
Lamentations3:49 Amaso yanje aracunduguta, ntasigaho, ntahengeshanya," 
Lamentations3:50 Gushitsa igihe Uhoraho azokwitegereza, akarāba hasi ari mw ijuru." 
Lamentations3:51 Amaso yanje aransābije kubgo kuririra abakobga bose bo mu gisagara cacu. 
Lamentations3:52 Abanyankira ubusa bampīze cane nk’inyoni," 
Lamentations3:53 Batsinze ubugingo bganje mw ibohero i bgina, banyubikakw ibuye." 
Lamentations3:54 Amazi yarandenze ku mutwe; maze ndavuga, nti Ndapfuye." 
Lamentations3:55 Natakambiye izina ryawe, ewe Uhoraho, nd’ i bgina kure mw ibohero." 
Lamentations3:56 Wumva ijwi ryanje; ntukinge ugutwi kwawe ngo ntiwumve kuniha kwanje n’ugutaka kwanje. 
Lamentations3:57 Umusi nagutakambira waranyegereye; uravuga, uti Nta co utinya." 
Lamentations3:58 Mwami, wabūranye urubanza rw’umutima wanje; wacunguye ubugingo bganje." 
Lamentations3:59 Uhoraho, wabonye ukuntu ngiriwe nabi: n’uncire urubanza." 
Lamentations3:60 Wabonye guhōra kwabo kwose n’imigabo bangīra yose. 
Lamentations3:61 Wumvise ibitutsi vyabo, Uhoraho we, n’imigabo bangīra yose," 
Lamentations3:62 N’amagambo y’abahagurutswa no kuntera, n’inama zabo zose bangīra umusi ukīra." 
Lamentations3:63 Ni witegereze iyicara ryabo n’īva hasi ryabo: mbaye akavyino kabo. 
Lamentations3:64 Uhoraho we, uzobasubiriza mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ibikorwa vy’amaboko yabo." 
Lamentations3:65 Uzobaha umutima ukomantaye, umuvumo wawe ushike kuri bo." 
Lamentations3:66 Uzobirukana uri n’uburake, uzobaherengeteza musi y’ ijuru ryawe, ewe Uhoraho." 
Lamentations4:1 Ewe kuntu izahabu yafyirifyitiye! Ukuntu izahabu nziza yahindutse ukundi! Amabuye y’ahēra h’urusengero yasābagijwe mu mayirabiri yose. 
Lamentations4:2 Abahungu b’igikundiro b’i Siyoni, abāri bameze nk’ izahabu nziza, Ewe kuntu bagereranywa n’ imibindi y’imibumbano, igikorwa c’amaboko y’umubumvyi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Imbgebge zo ziha ivyana vyazo amabgabga, zikavyonsa; Umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu we agira icīra, nk’ibisīga vyo mu bugaragwa vyitwa imbuni." 
Lamentations4:4 Ururimi rw’umwana yonka rufatanye n’uruhekenyero, ruguye ubukagashi: Abana bato basaba utwo kurya, ariko nta wubaha." 
Lamentations4:5 Abāri bamenyereye gufungura ibigemānije basigaye bagwira isari mu nzira; Abārerewe mu mpuzu z’ inyambarabami basigaye barambarara ku macukiro. 
Lamentations4:6 Kukw ibigabitanyo vy’umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu bikomeye gusumba icaha c’i Sodomu, Ari ho hākomvomvowe mu kanya isase, ata kuboko kuhakozeko." 
Lamentations4:7 Abaganwa biwe bāhora bakayangana kurusha shelegi, bakarusha n’amata kwera, Imibiri yabo yabonerana kurusha utubuyenge twitwa marijani, bāri basēnnye nk’ utwitwa safiro." 
Lamentations4:8 Noneho mu maso habo hasigaye harusha imivyiro kwirabura; ntibakimenyekana mu nzira: Urukoba rwabo rumatanye n’ amagufa; rwārūmye nk’igiti. 
Lamentations4:9 Abicwa n’inkota ni bo bapfa rwiza kuruta abicwa n’ inzara; Kukw abo bo bagenda bashirira hejuru, bakicwa no kubura utwo bokweza mu mirima." 
Lamentations4:10 Abagore bāri bafise ikigongwe basigaye bafata abana bīvyariye, bakabateka, Bakaba ivyo kurya vyabo, igihe umukobga w’ubgoko bgacu yagesezwa." 
Lamentations4:11 Uhoraho yashikije ubushangashirwe bgiwe, yarekuye uburake bgiwe bg’inkazi; Kandi yadometse umuriro muri Siyoni, utongora n’ amatanguriro yaho." 
Lamentations4:12 Abami bo mw isi, bo n’ababa kw isi bose, nta ho bokwemeye Kw abarwanizi n’abansi bofyutse mu marembo y’i Yerusalemu." 
Lamentations4:13 Vyatewe n’ivyaha vya ba kamenyi baho, n’ibigabitanyo vy’abaherezi baho, Bāvishirije amaraso y’abagororotsi hagati muri ho." 
Lamentations4:14 Badandabagirana mu nzira zaho nk’impumyi, bihumanishije amaraso, Bituma abantu batagishobora gukora ku myambaro yabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Barabahāniranwa, bati Ni mwīgireyo, mwa bihumane mwe! Ni mwīgireyo, ni mwīgireyo, ntimugire ico mukorako! Igihe bāhunga bayerera, abantu bo mu mahanga baravuga, bati Ntibabe bakiba hano." 
Lamentations4:16 Igitsure c’Uhoraho carabashwiragije; ntagisubira kubashirak’ umutima: Na bo ntibubashe abaherezi, ntibāsoneye abatāma." 
Lamentations4:17 Amaso yacu yakobowe no kurereka ugutabarwa kwacu, kand’ ata co bitumariye: Mu kurereka kwacu twiteze ihanga ridashobora gukiza." 
Lamentations4:18 Baraturyamiye, bituma tudashobora guca mu nzira zacu: Iherezo ryacu riri hafi, imisi yacu irashize; ni koko iherezo ryacu rirashitse." 
Lamentations4:19 Abaduhīga barusha inkukuma zo mu kirēre kunyaruka: Badukinagiza ku misozi miremire, bakaducira ibico mu bugaragwa." 
Lamentations4:20 Uwar’ atubereye nk’impwemu duhumeka, uwari yararobanujwe amavuta n’Uhoraho, yakorokeye mu vyobo vyabo, Kand’ ari we twari twishimiye, ngo mu gitūtu ciwe ni ho tuzoba, uko turi hagati mu mahanga." 
Lamentations4:21 Ni winezererwe, uhimbarwe, ewe mukobga, Edomu we, wibereye mu gihugu c’i Uzi! Nawe igikombe kizodōbēra kiruhe kigushikeko; uzoborerwa, ute agahuzu." 
Lamentations4:22 Igihano c’ukugabitanya kwawe kirarangiye, weho mukobga, Siyoni we; Ntazokwongera kukujana kure ur’ inyagano: Ariko wewe mukobga, Edomu we, azoguhanira ibigabitanyo vyawe; Azogaragaza ivyaha vyawe." 
Lamentations5:1 Uhoraho we, ibuka ivyatubayeko: Itegereze urābe ukuntu dutukwa." 
Lamentations5:2 Ishamvu yacu yegukiwe n’ abanyamahanga, N’amazu yacu yegukiwe n’ab’ akavantara," 
Lamentations5:3 Tur’ impfuvyi ntitukigira ba data, Ba mama bameze nk’abapfakazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Tunywa amazi tuyaguze; Inkwi tuzironka ku biguzi. 
Lamentations5:5 Abaduhīga batuguye ku gakanu: Turarushe, ntitugira akito ko kuruhuka." 
Lamentations5:6 Twakomeye amashi Abanyegiputa, N’Abashuri kugira ngo turonke utwo kurya two kwisama." 
Lamentations5:7 Ba data bakoze ivyaha, kandi ntibakiriho; Natwe twasubiweko n’ibigabitanyo vyabo." 
Lamentations5:8 Abagurano ni bo basigaye batuganza: Nta wuriho wo kuturokora ngw atugobotore mu maboko yabo. 
Lamentations5:9 Ivyo kurya tubironka duhevye amagara, Kubg’ inkota itegeye mu bugaragwa." 
Lamentations5:10 Urukoba rwacu rusigaye rwirabura nk’inkono, Bitewe n’umuriro w’inzara." 
Lamentations5:11 Bafata abagore bo muri Siyoni ku kagōbēro, N’inkumi zo mu bisagara vy’i Buyuda." 
Lamentations5:12 Abaganwa bāmanitswe babasungaje ukuboko kumwe: N’abatāma ntibābagirira udusoni. 
Lamentations5:13 Imisore isigaye ikorerwa insyo, N’abana banyikizwa n’imbambo z’inkwi." 
Lamentations5:14 Abatāma bāhevye kwicara ku nama, N’imisore ntikiruha icuraranga." 
Lamentations5:15 Umunezero wo mu mitima yacu urashize; Imvyino zacu zahindutse amaborogo. 
Lamentations5:16 Ibitsibo vyo ku mitwe yacu birakorotse: Tubonye ibara, kuko twakoze ivyaha." 
Lamentations5:17 Ni co gituma imitima yacu ihondobera, Ivyo ni vyo bituma duhwera mu kajisho;" 
Lamentations5:18 Bitewe n’uk’ umusozi Siyoni ucitse amatongo: Imbgebge zisigaye zihatambatamba. 
Lamentations5:19 Weho, Uhoraho, wamah’ ibihe bidashira; Intebe yawe ihoraho uk’ urunganwe rugenda rukurikirana." 
Lamentations5:20 N’iki catumye utwibagira ibihe vyose, Kand’ ukaduheba kumara igihe kirekire kingana girtyo?" 
Lamentations5:21 N’utwigarukanire, Uhoraho we, natwe turakugarukira; Dukomōrere imisi yacu nk’ iyo twahoranye ubga mbere," 
Lamentations5:22 Shiti waradutaye ruhebga, Ukaturakira birenze urugero." 
Ezekiel1:1 Mu mwaka wa mirongwitatu, mu kwezi kwa kane, ku musi ugira gatanu w’ukwo kwezi, nari kumwe n’abājanywe ar’ inyagano turi ku ruzi Kebari; ijuru riruguruka, maze mbona ivyo neretswe bivuye ku Mana." 
Ezekiel1:2 Kur’ uwo musi ugira gatanu w’ukwo kwezi, hāri mu mwaka ugira gatanu umwami Yehoyakina yambukanywe ar’ inyagano," 
Ezekiel1:3 ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryanjeko jewe umuherezi Ezekiyeli mwene Buzi, ndi mu gihugu c’Abakaludaya ku ruzi Kebari; kand’ aho hantu nyene ni ho ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwaziye kuri jewe." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ngize ntya, mbona umuyaga w’ikirura uje uturutse i burārūko, igicu kininiya kirabagizamw’ umuriro, gikikijwe n’ibibatsi bituruka hagati muri wo, biboneka nk’ umuringa w’umujumbu, bituruka hagati mur’ uwo muriro." 
Ezekiel1:5 Kandi muri wo hagati havamw’ ishusho y’ibinyabugingo bine. Kand’ uku ni ko vyasa: vyari bifise ishusho y’umuntu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Kimwe‐kimwe cari gifise mu maso hane, kandi kimwe‐kimwe nyene cari gifise amababa ane." 
Ezekiel1:7 Kand’ ibirenge vyavyo vyar’ inambi; mu bgōro bg’ ibirenge vyavyo hari hameze nk’ imbere mu nzāra z’inyana: kandi vyakayangana nk’umuringa w’ umwakaka. 
Ezekiel1:8 Kandi vyari bifise amaboko nk’ay’ umuntu musi y’amababa yavyo mu mpande zavyo ukw ari zine; ivyo ukw ari bine, uku ni ko mu maso havyo n’ amababa yavyo vyari bimeze:" 
Ezekiel1:9 amababa yavyo yar’ asomanye; nta ho vyahindukira iyo bigenda; vyose vyagenda bibanze. 
Ezekiel1:10 Mu maso havyo uko hāsa, vyari bifise mu maso nk’ah’ umuntu; kand’ ukw ari bine, vyari bifise mu maso nk’ah’ intambge mu ruhande rw’i buryo; kand’ ukw ari bine, vyari bifise mu maso nk’ah’ inka mu ruhande rw’i bumoso; kand’ ukw ari bine, vyari bifise mu maso nk’ ah’ inkukuma." 
Ezekiel1:11 Kandi mu maso havyo n’amababa yavyo vyari bihānye inta ahahera hejuru; amababa abiri ya kimwe‐kimwe yasomana n’ay’ ikindi, yandi abiri agatwikira umubiri waco." 
Ezekiel1:12 Kandi vyose vyagenda bibanze; aho Mpwemu yerekeje ni ho vyaja; nta ho vyahindukira iyo bigenda. 
Ezekiel1:13 Kandi ku vy’ishusho y’ivyo binyabugingo uko yar’ imeze, vyasa n’amakara y’umuriro yaka, kandi vyasa n’imuri; uwo muriro waca hirya no hino hagati y’ivyo binyabugingo: uwo muriro wakayangana cane, kandi muri wo havamw’ imiravyo." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ivyo binyabugingo vyariruka bigakimirana, bisa n’imiravyo irabagiza." 
Ezekiel1:15 Nuko ncitegereza ivyo binyabugingo, mbona amakurudumu ahagaze hasi, imwe‐imwe i ruhande y’ivyo binyabugingo, imbere mu maso yavyo ukw ari bine." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ayo makurudumu, ishusho yayo n’ uburyo yakozwe vyari bimeze nk’ akabuyenge kitwa tarushishi; kandi yose ukw ar’ ane yarasa: ishusho yayo n’uburyo yakozwe, vyasa n’ah’ umenga n’ikurudumu isobekeranye n’iyindi." 
Ezekiel1:17 Iy’ agiye, yagenda yerekeye mu mpande zayo ukw ari zine: nta ho yahindukira iy’ agenda." 
Ezekiel1:18 Ahihese hayo hāshika hejuru biteye ubgoba; kandi yose ukw ar’ ane, ahihese hayo hāri huzuyekw amaso impande zose." 
Ezekiel1:19 Kand’ ivyo binyabugingo iyo bigiye, ya makurudumu yagendera i ruhande yavyo: kand’ iy’ ivyo binyabugingo biteruwe ngo bive kw isi, na ya makurudumu yaraterurwa." 
Ezekiel1:20 Aho Mpwemu yerekeje hose ni ho vyaja, ari ho nyene Mpwemu yerekeje kugenda: ya makurudumu akagenda ateruwe i ruhande yavyo, kukw impwemu y’ikinyabugingo cose yari mu makurudumu." 
Ezekiel1:21 Iyo bigiye na yo yaragenda; vyahagarara agahagarara; vyaterurwa ngo bive kw isi, na ya makurudumu agaterurwa i ruhande yavyo, kukw impwemu y’ ikinyabugingo cose yari mu makurudumu." 
Ezekiel1:22 Hejuru y’imitwe y’ ivyo binyabugingo hār’ ikimeze nk’itāzānure ry’ijuru, gisa n’urubona ruca mu jisho, kibamvye hejuru y’imitwe yavyo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Kandi musi y’iryo tāzānure, amababa yavyo yaranambikiriye, rimwe ryerekeye irindi: kimwe‐kimwe cari gifise abiri atwikiriye umubiri." 
Ezekiel1:24 Kand’ iyo bigiye, numva guhinda kw’amababa yavyo, ni nko guhinda kw’amazi menshi, nk’ ijwi ry’Īshobora vyose, nk’uguhinda kw’ingabo: iyo bihagaze vyabumba amababa yavyo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kandi hirya y’itāzānure ry’ijuru ryo hejuru y’imitwe yavyo hār’ ijwi: nuko vyarahagarara bikabumba amababa yavyo. 
Ezekiel1:26 Hirya y’iryo tāzānure ryo hejuru y’imitwe yavyo hār’ igisa n’intebe y’ubgami imeze nk’akabuyenge kitwa safiro; kandi hejuru kur’ ico kintu casa n’intebe y’ubgami hār’ igisa n’umuntu. 
Ezekiel1:27 Uhereye ahobaye mu rukenyerero rwiwe ugasubiza ahahera haruguru, mbona ibiboneka nk’ umuringa w’umujumbu, n’igisa n’ umuriro umuziguje impande zose; kand’ uhereye ahobaye mu rukenyerero rwiwe ugasubiza ahahera hepfo, mbona umenga har’ ibisa n’umuriro, kand’ ibibatsi vyamukikiza hirya no hino." 
Ezekiel1:28 Nk’uk’ umunywamazi wo ku gicu usa ku musi w’imvura, ni k’ugukayangana kwari kumukikije hirya no hino kwasa. Ivyo vyari bimeze nk’ibisa n’ubgiza bg’Uhoraho. Mbibonye, nikubita hasi nubamye, numva ijwi ry’ūvuga." 
Ezekiel2:1 Arambarira, ati Mwana w’ umuntu, vyuka uhagarare n’ ibirenge vyawe, mbone kugira ico nkubarira." 
Ezekiel2:2 Akivugana nanje Mpwemu anyinjiramwo, ampagarika n’ibirenge vyanje; maze numva uyo avugana nanje." 
Ezekiel2:3 Arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, ngutumye ku Bisirayeli, kw ihanga ry’abagarariji bāngararije. Bāncumuyeko, bo na ba sekuruza, gushitsa no kur’ uyu musi nyene." 
Ezekiel2:4 N’abana b’inshinyaguza b’imitima ikomantaye: abo ni bo ngutumyeko. Uz’ ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel2:5 Na bo bazokwumva canke batazokwumva, (kukw ar’ inzu y’ abagarariji), ariko rero bazomenya yuk’ ūvugishwa n’Imana yabaye muri bo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Kandi nawe, mwana w’umuntu, ntuz’ ubatinye, ntuz’ utinye n’amagambo yabo, n’iyo woba mu mikere no mu mahwa, ukabana na za sikorupiyo: ntuz’ utinye amagambo yabo, canke ng’urandurwe umutima n’igitsure cabo, nah’ ar’ inzu y’abagarariji." 
Ezekiel2:7 Nuk’ uz’ ubabarire amajambo yanje, bovyumva batovyumva; kukw ar’ abagarariji." 
Ezekiel2:8 Ariko weho, mwana w’umuntu, ni wumve ico nkubgira; ntube umugarariji nk’ iyo nzu y’abagarariji: asamika akanwa kawe, maz’ ico nguha ukirye." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ngize ntya, mbona ukuboko kuramvuye kuza iyo ndi; maze mbona gufise umuzingo w’ igitabo;" 
Ezekiel2:10 akizingururira imbere yanje: kandi cari canditswe imbere n’inyuma; canditswemw’ intimba n’amaborogo n’amahano. 
Ezekiel3:1 Nukw arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, ico ubonye ukirye; urye uwo muzingo, uheze ugende, ubarire inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Nuko nasamika akanwa, angaburira uwo muzingo." 
Ezekiel3:3 Arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, hāza inda yawe, n’amara yawe uyuzuze uyu muzingo nguhaye. Nuko ndawurya; mu kanwa unsosera nk’ubūki." 
Ezekiel3:4 Maz’ arambgira, ati Genda, ushikīre ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ubabarire amajambo yanje." 
Ezekiel3:5 Kuko ntagutumye kw ihanga ry’abavuga imvugo itumvikana n’ururimi rugoye, ariko ni ku b’inzu ya Isirayeli;" 
Ezekiel3:6 si ku mahanga menshi avuga imvugo zitumvikana n’indimi zigoye, abo mudashobora kwumvikana mu majambo. N’ukuri, iyaba ari bo ngutumyeko, bo bokwumviye." 
Ezekiel3:7 Arikw inzu ya Isirayeli ntizokwumvira, kuko nanje banse kunyumvira: kukw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bose mu ruhanga rwabo ar’abanyakadāda, bikomantaje imitima." 
Ezekiel3:8 Ehe mpinduye mu maso hawe ngo hakomere hahangare mu maso habo, n’uruhanga rwawe ngo rukomere ruhangare impanga zabo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Uruhanga rwawe ndaruhaye gukomera nk’intosho rurushe isare: ntuz’ ubatinye canke ng’ urandurwe umutima n’igitsure cabo, nah’ ar’ inzu y’abagarariji." 
Ezekiel3:10 Maz’ arongera arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, amajambo yanje yose nzogenda nkubarira uz’ uyākīre mu mutima wawe, uyumvishe n’amatwi yawe." 
Ezekiel3:11 Uheze ugende, ushikīre abo mu bgoko bganyu b’abanyagano, uvugane na bo ubabgire, bovyumva, batovyumva, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel3:12 Maze Mpwemu aranterura, numva inyuma yanje ijwi rihinda cane, rivuga, ng’ Ubgiza bg’ Uhoraho bushemagirizwe ahantu hiwe." 
Ezekiel3:13 Kandi numva uguhinda kw’amababa ya vya binyabugingo yagenda arakomanako, n’uguhinda kwa ya makurudumu yar’ i ruhande yavyo, mbere kwar’ uguhinda kw’ugusūma gukomeye." 
Ezekiel3:14 Nuko Mpwemu aranterura, aranjana; ngenda nshavuye, nitonganya; arik’ ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwari kunshikamiye." 
Ezekiel3:15 Maze nshikīra ba banyagano i Telabibu, bāba ku ruzi Kebari, nshika aho hantu bāba; mpamara imisi ndwi numiwe nicaye hagati yabo." 
Ezekiel3:16 Nukw iyo misi ndwi ishize, ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel3:17 riti Mwana w’umuntu, nkugize umushibamyi w’inzu ya Isirayeli; nuko wumve ijambo riva mu kanwa kanje, ubammenyeshereze ivyo mbabūrira." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ni nabgira umunyakibi, nti Ntuzobura gupfa: nawe ugaheza ntumubūrire, canke ng’ ugire ico uvuga co kubūrira umunyakibi ngw ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, ng’ ukize ubugingo bgiwe, uwo munyakibi azopfira mu bigabitanyo vyiwe; arikw amaraso yiwe nzoyakuronderako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Ariko ni wabūrira umunyakibi, ntahindukire ngw areke ibibi vyiwe, canke ngw ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, azopfira mu bigabitanyo vyiwe; ariko weho uzoba urokoye ubugingo bgawe." 
Ezekiel3:20 Ikindi, umugororotsi ni yahindukira akareka ubugororotsi bgiwe, agakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, nanje ngashira igitsitaza imbere yiwe, azopfa: kuk’ utāmubūriye, azopfira mu caha ciwe; kand’ ibikorwa vyiwe bigororotse yakoze ntazobiharūrwako, arikw amaraso yiwe nzoyakuronderako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Yamara ni wabūrira umugororotsi, uwo mugororotsi ngo yoye gukora icaha, na we ntagikore nyene, ntazobura kubaho, kuko yemeye kubūrirwa; kandi nawe uzoba urokoye ubugingo bgawe." 
Ezekiel3:22 Aho hantu nyene ni ho ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwanziyeko; arambarira, ati Va hasi, uje mu kiyaya, iyo ni ho nja kubonanira nawe." 
Ezekiel3:23 Nca mva hasi nja mu kiyaya; mbona ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buhahagaraye, bumeze nk’ubgiza naboneye ku ruzi Kebari: maze nikubita hasi nubamye." 
Ezekiel3:24 Nuko Mpwemu anyinjiramwo, ampagarika n’ibirenge vyanje; avugana nanje, arambarira, ati Genda wiyugaranire mu nzu yawe." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ariko rero, mwana w’umuntu, bazoguta mu migozi, bayikuboheshe, nawe ntuzobona uk’ usohoka ng’ uje muri bo." 
Ezekiel3:26 Nzotuma ururimi rwawe rufatana n’uruhekenyero, ugobge ururimi, woye kubabera imbūri; kukw ar’inzu y’ abagarariji." 
Ezekiel3:27 Arikw igihe nzovugana nawe, nzogobotora akanwa kawe, nawe uz’ uheze ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ng’ Ūgomba kwumva ni yumve, ūtabigomba n’areke: kukw ar’ inzu y’abagarariji." 
Ezekiel4:1 Nuko nawe, mwana w’umuntu, wiyabīrire itafari, urirambike imbere yawe, urishushanyekw igisagara, ari co Yerusalemu:" 
Ezekiel4:2 maz’ ukiziguze, wubake ibihome vyo kuhatera, ukirundire ibigunguzi vyo kwūririrako, ugisagazeko n’ insago, ugikikizeko hirya no hino ibiti vy’imigogo vyo kugihomvora." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kandi wiyabīrire umubehe w’ icuma, uwukike ng’ukubere uruzitiro rw’icuma hagati yawe n’ igisagara: ugishinge ijisho ngo kiziguzwe, wewe ubgawe ukiziguze. Ivyo bizoba ikimenyamenya c’inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Utek’ uryamire urubavu rwawe rw’i bumoso, ururemeke ibigabitanyo vy’inzu ya Isirayeli: ukw igitigiri c’imisi uzoruryamira kingana, ni k’uzokwishirakw ibigabitanyo vyabo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Kuk’ ukw imyaka yo guhanirwa ibigabitanyo vyabo ingana, nguciriye igitigiri c’ imisi kingana na yo, n’imisi amajana atatu na mirongwicenda: uko ni k’uzokwishirakw ibigabitanyo vy’inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Maz’ urangije ivyo, uz’ uheze uryamire urubavu rw’i buryo, wishirekw ibigabitanyo vy’inzu ya Yuda: nguciriye imisi mirongwine, umusi‐umusi uhwana n’umwaka." 
Ezekiel4:7 Kand’ uz’ ushinge ijisho kuri Yerusalemu hajigujwe, ukumye impuzu ku kuboko kwawe; uhabūrire ibizoba." 
Ezekiel4:8 Kandi rāba, ngushize mu ngoyi, nta ho uzohindukirira urundi rubavu, gushitsa ah’ imisi yo kuhaziguza kwawe izoba irangiye." 
Ezekiel4:9 Kandi wironderere ingano na sayiri n’ibiharage n’inkōre n’amasaka n’uburo, maz’ ubishire mu nkono imwe, ubicemw’ uturobe tw’udutsima; nk’ukw igitigiri c’imisi kiri uzoryamira urubavu, ukw ar’ amajana atatu na mirongwicenda, ivyo ni vyo bizogutunga." 
Ezekiel4:10 Kand’ ivyo kurya vyawe uze wame ubirya ku rugero, ari rwo shekeli mirongwibiri mu musi mu musi: uzokwama urya rimwe ku musi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Kandi n’ amazi uzokwama uyanywa ku rugero, ari rwo gihimba ca gatandatu c’ingero yitwa hini: na yo uzokwama uyanywa rimwe ku musi." 
Ezekiel4:12 Uzokwama ubirya nk’ udutsima twa sayiri, kand’ uzokwama uducaniriza amavyi y’ abantu imbere yabo." 
Ezekiel4:13 Kand’ Uhoraho aravuga, at’ Uko ni kw Abisirayeli bazorīra ivyo kurya vyabo vyandavuye mu mahanga nzobashwiragirizamwo." 
Ezekiel4:14 Maze ndavuga, nti Yo! Ewe Mwami Uhoraho! Erega kuva aho nakabereye nta ho nigeze mpumana: kuk’ uhereye mu buto bganje ugashitsa n’ubu ata ho nigeze kurya icipfiriye, cank’ icātabaguwe n’ igikōko; kandi nta ho inyama zihumanye zigeze kuja mu kanwa kanje." 
Ezekiel4:15 Maz’ arambarira, ati Rāba, nguhaye ibisheshe vy’amase y’inka mu gishingo c’amavyi y’ abantu: ivyo ni vyo uzocaniriza ukora utwo dutsima twawe." 
Ezekiel4:16 Arongera arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, ehe ngira mvune inkoni ab’ i Yerusalemu bishimikije, ari wo mutsima; kandi bazosigara barya umutsima ku rugero, bahagaritse umutima; n’amazi bazoyanywa ku rugero bihebuye:" 
Ezekiel4:17 uko ni ko bazokena ivyo kurya n’amazi, bazazanirwe iyo bava bakagera, bashire umunywera kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 Nuko mwana w’umuntu, wiyabīrire inkota y’ubuhwe, uyābīre bga rupfuhe, uyicīshe ku mutwe wawe no ku bganwa bgawe: uheze wiyabīrire umunzane wo kugeresha, ugabanye iyo mishatsi wimoye." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ikigira gatatu cayo uz’ ugituririre hagati mu gisagara, igihe imisi yo gutabga hagati kwaho izoba ihereye; ikindi kigira gatatu cayo ugicagagurize inkota hirya no hino yaho; kand’ ikindi kigira gatatu cayo ukirekurire mu muyaga ng’ugishwiragize, nanje nzosokora inkota icirukane." 
Ezekiel5:3 Kand’ iyo mishatsi uz’ uyigabanyeko mukeya, uwutekere mu mutwe w’impuzu yawe." 
Ezekiel5:4 Kandi kur’ uwo nyene uwukūrekw akandi gakeya, ugaterere mu muriro, ugaturire; aho ni ho hazova umuriro uzoshika ku nzu yose ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe ngaha i Yerusalemu, aho natabitse hagati y’amahanga n’ibihugu bihakikije!" 
Ezekiel5:6 Ariko hāgararije amabgirizwa yanje, hakora ibibi kurusha abanyamahanga; hāgararije ivyagezwe vyanje kurusha ibihugu bihakikije; bāshibuye amabgirizwa yanje, n’ ivyagezwe vyanje ntibābigenderamwo." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nuko rero, uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kuko mur’ abanyamivurungano kurusha amahanga abakikije, kandi mukaba mutāgendeye mu vyagezwe vyanje, ntimwitondere n’amabgirizwa yanje, canke ngo mukore n’ivyo amabgirizwa y’amahanga abakikije yashinze:" 
Ezekiel5:8 nuko rero, uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba jewe ubganje nyene nzohigūra nawe: kandi nzocira amateka hagati muri wewe, amahanga abirorēra." 
Ezekiel5:9 Kandi nzokorera muri wewe ico ntigeze gukora, mbere ntazokwongera gukora ukundi, nguhōye ibizira vyawe vyose." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ni co gituma ba se b’abana bazobarīra hagati muri wewe, n’ abana bazorya ba se; kandi nzocira amateka muri wewe, n’amasigarira yawe yose nzoyashwiragiriza mu birēre vyose." 
Ezekiel5:11 Ni co gituma ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, kuko wahumanishije ahēra hanje ibintu vyawe vyankwa urunuka, n’ibizira vyawe vyose, ni co gituma nanje ntazobura kugutūvya; ijisho ryanje ntirizogira ico riziguriza, kandi nta n’akagongwe nzogira." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ikigira gatatu cawe kizokwicwa n’ikīza, na kigoyi kizobamarira hagati muri wewe; ikindi kigira gatatu kizoririkirwa n’inkota impande zawe zose; n’ikindi kigira gatatu nzogishwiragiriza mu birēre vyose, kandi nzosokōra inkota ibirukane." 
Ezekiel5:13 Uko ni ko nzoba nimaze ishavu, n’ubushangashirwe nabagiriye nzoba ndabutuye, kandi nzoba nshizwe: nuko bazomenya yuko jewe, Uhoraho, nabivuganye agatsi, ni naheza kwimara uburake mbafitiye." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kand’ ikindi nzoguhindura umusaka n’igitutsi mu mahanga agukikije, no mu maso y’abahita bose." 
Ezekiel5:15 Maz’ uzoba igitutsi n’agatwengo n’akabarore n’akajoreza mu mahanga agukikije, ni nagucirakw iteka mfise uburake n’ubushangashirwe, nguhambariranye ishavu: ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze;" 
Ezekiel5:16 kandi nkabarasa imyampi mibi ya kigoyi yo kubageseza, iyo nzorungika kubatikiza; kandi nzobagwizamw’ amapfa, mvune inkoni yanyu mwishimikije, ni wo mutsima;" 
Ezekiel5:17 kandi nzobatēza kigoyi n’ibikōko vy’inkazi, bikugire nyakamara; ikīza n’ibitenga vy’amaraso bizoca muri wewe, kandi nzogutērēra inkota: ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Ezekiel6:1 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel6:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe imisozi y’i Bgisirayeli, uyibūrire," 
Ezekiel6:3 uti Yemwe misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Umwami Uhoraho: Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abgira imisozi n’uturambi, imigezi n’ imyonga, at’ Ehe jewe ubganje nyene nzobatērēra inkota, nkomvomvore ibitabo vyanyu vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi." 
Ezekiel6:4 Kand’ ibicaniro vyanyu bizosigara bitamāriwe, n’ibishushanyo vyanyu vy’izuba bizomenagurwa: kand’ abishwe banyu nzobashiburira hasi imbere y’ibigirwamana vyanyu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Nzorambika imivyimba y’Abisirayeli imbere y’ibigirwamana vyabo; kand’ amagufa yanyu nzoyatāgaguza impande zose z’ibicaniro vyanyu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Aho muba hose ibisagara bizogesezwa, n’ibitabo bitamārirwe, kugira ngw ibicaniro vyanyu bisangangurwe, bitamārirwe, n’ibigirwamana vyanyu bimenagurwe, biherengetezwe, n’ ibishushanyo vyanyu vy’izuba bicibge bitsindwe hasi, n’ibikorwa vyanyu bizimangane." 
Ezekiel6:7 Kand’ abishwe bazohindikirana hagati muri mwebge, namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel6:8 Yamara nzosiga amasigarira, kuko muzogira bamwe bacika bagakira inkota, bakaja mu banyamahanga, igihe muzosābagirizwa mu bihugu." 
Ezekiel6:9 Kand’ abazoba baracitse bo muri mwebge bazonyibuka bari mu mahanga, aho bazoba barajanywe ar’ inyagano, bamenye ingene nashābijwe n’imitima yabo yabaye ibimaka ikamvako, kandi ko nashābijwe n’amaso yabo y’ubumaka bagenda banyuririza ku bigirwamana vyabo: baheze biyanke urunuka kubg’ ibibi bakoze n’ ibizira vyabo vyose." 
Ezekiel6:10 Kandi bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho: simbivugiye ubusa ko nzobatēza ivyo vyago. 
Ezekiel6:11 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kubita amashi ku yandi, dida ikirenge hasi, uvuge uti Yō! Ewe bizira bibi vyose inzu ya Isirayeli yakoze! Kuko bazoririkwa n’inkota n’inzara n’ikīza." 
Ezekiel6:12 Ūri kure azokwicwa n’ikīza, ūri hafi azokwicwa n’inkota; kandi n’ ūsigaye asāgirijwe azokwicwa n’ inzara: uko ni ko nzokwimara uburake mbafitiye." 
Ezekiel6:13 Maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, igihe imihindigiti yabo izoba irambaraye hagati y’ibigirwamana vyabo impande zose z’ibicaniro vyabo, ku gasozi kose gahagaze, no ku dutwe twose tw’imisozi miremire, no musi y’igiti cose gitotahaye, no musi y’igiti cose c’umweloni gihūritse, aho bāshikanirira ibigirwamana vyabo vyose ibizana imibabge imota neza." 
Ezekiel6:14 Kandi nzobabangurirak’ ukuboko kwanje, mpindure igihugu imisaka n’amatongo, uhereye mu bugaragwa burābana n’i Dibula, n’aho baba hose iyo hava hakagera: na bo bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel7:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel7:2 riti Nawe, mwana w’umuntu, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abarira igihugu c’Abisirayeli, at’ Umuhero! Umuhero ushitse mu mpande zine z’igihugu!" 
Ezekiel7:3 Noneh’ umuhero ugushitseko, ngira nguteze uburake bganje, ngucire urubanza ruhwanye n’ ingeso zawe; kand’ ibizira vyawe vyose nzobigusubiza ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel7:4 Ijisho ryanje ntirizokuziguriza, kandi nta n’akagongwe nzogira: arikw ingeso zawe nzozigusubiza ku mutwe, kand’ ibizira vyawe bizokubonekako: ni ho uzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel7:5 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Icago, icago c’ubugesera! Ehe kiraje!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Umuhero urashitse, umuhero urashitse, urakuvundurukiye: eh’ uraje!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Igihano cawe kiragushitseko, wewe wibera mu gihugu we! Igihe kirashitse, umusi uri hafi; n’ umusi wo kuvuza akarūru mu misozi, atar’ uwo kuvuza impundu." 
Ezekiel7:8 Non’ ubu mpava nkurekurirak’ ubushangashirwe bganje, ngushitsek’ uburake bganje, ngucire urubanza ruhwanye n’ingeso zawe: kand’ ibizira vyawe vyose nzobigusubiza ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel7:9 Ijisho ryanje ntirizoziguriza, kandi nta n’akagongwe nzogira: ariko nzogusubiza ku mutwe ibihwanye n’ingeso zawe, kand’ ibizira vyawe bizokubonekako; ni ho uzomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho, ari jewe mpana." 
Ezekiel7:10 Ehe wa musi, nguyu uraje: igihano cawe kirashitse; inkoni yabaye umusozo, ubgibone buratutuje." 
Ezekiel7:11 Umuryano urisumbuye ucitse inkoni yo guhana ikibi; nta masigarira yo muri bo, haba no mu masinzi yabo, haba no mw itunga ryabo; nta n’ubukuru bukiba muri bo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Igihe kirashitse, umusi uri hafi: umuguzi areke kunezerwa, n’ūguzweko areke kuganya; kuk’ uburake bushitse ku masinzi yabo yose." 
Ezekiel7:13 Kuk’ ūguzweko atazosubira ku vyo yaguze, naho boba bakiriho: kukw ivyerekanywe vyerekana ku masinzi yabo yose, kw ata wuzosubirayo; kandi nta wuzokwitungira amagara mu kugabitanya kwiwe." 
Ezekiel7:14 Batabarishije inzamba, batunganije vyose, ariko nta n’umwe yagiye mu ntambara: kuk’ uburake bganje buri ku masinzi yabo yose." 
Ezekiel7:15 Inyuma har’ inkota, imbere har’ ikīza n’inzara: ūzoba ari ku musozi azokwicishwa inkota; ūzoba ari mu gisagara inzara n’ikīza bizomuyongobeza." 
Ezekiel7:16 Arikw abacitse bo muri bo bazocika bakire, bazoba ku misozi bameze nk’inuma zo mu myonga, bose bazoba bacura intimba, umuntu wese kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyiwe." 
Ezekiel7:17 Amaboko yose azodendebuka, n’amavi yose azoregarega acike nk’ amazi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Kandi bazokenyera amagunira, ubgoba bubatwikire, kandi mu maso ha bose hazogira ibitētērwa, no ku mitwe ya bose hazoba inkomvorera." 
Ezekiel7:19 Bazoshiburira amafeza yabo mu nzira, n’amazahabu yabo azobabera nk’igihumane; amafeza n’amazahabu vyabo ntibizoshobora kubarokora ku musi w’uburake bg’Uhoraho; ntibizohāza imitima yabo, canke ngo bihāze inda zabo: kuko vyababereye igitsitaza co kubagwisha mu bigabitanyo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ubgiza bg’ivyari bibasharije bgabateye ubgibone: babicuzemw’ ibishushanyo vy’ibizira vyabo n’ ibigirwamana vy’ubuyobe; ni co gitumye mbihindura igihumane kuri bo. 
Ezekiel7:21 Kandi nzobigabura mu maboko y’abanyamahanga ngo bibe iminyago, no ku banyakibi bo mu gihugu ngo bibe isahu, kandi bazobihumanya." 
Ezekiel7:22 Nzobakūrakw amaso yanje ndore irya, ba bandi na bo bazohumanya ubgiherēro bganje, abambuzi bazohinjira bahahumanye." 
Ezekiel7:23 Itegure iminyororo! Kukw igihugu cuzuye ubgicanyi, n’igisagara cuzuye umuryano." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ni co gituma ngira nshikimure ihanga rirushije ayandi kuba ribi, begukire amazu yabo; kandi nzotuma ubgibone bg’abahizi buherengetera; n’ahantu habo hēra hazohumanywa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Ubugesera buraje! Bazorondera amahoro, bayabure." 
Ezekiel7:26 Ivyago bizogerekerana n’ibindi, n’impuha zigerekerane n’izindi; bazoja kuronderera k’ūvugishwa n’Imana ko yoba har’ ico yeretswe; kukw ivyagezwe bizobura ku muherezi, n’inama zibure ku bo hambere." 
Ezekiel7:27 Umwami azocura akanihiro, n’umuganwa ubujonjogore bumufate, amaboko y’abantu bo mu gihugu ahinde agashitsi: nanje nzobagirira nk’ukw ingeso zabo zimeze, mbacire urubanza rukwiranye na bo; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel8:1 Nuko mu mwaka wa gatandatu, mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, ku musi ugira gatanu w’ukwo kwezi, nari nicaye mu nzu yanje, n’ abakuru b’i Buyuda bicaye imbere yanje: maz’ ukuboko kw’Umwami Uhoraho kunsūmirira hano nyene." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ngize ntya, mbona nk’ūfise ishusho isa n’umuriro; kand’ uhereye ahobaye mu rukenyerero rwiwe ugasubiza ahahera hepfo, yar’ umuriro: uhereye ahobaye mu rukenyerero rwiwe ugasubiza ahahera haruguru, hāsa n’ibica ibibatsi, biboneka nk’umuringa w’ umujumbu." 
Ezekiel8:3 Maz’ aramvura igisa n’ukuboko, afata umushatsi wo ku mutwe wanje; maze Mpwemu aranterura, ancisha hagati y’ ijuru n’isi mur’ ukwo kwerekwa n’Imana, mbona anjana i Yerusalemu, anshikana ku rugi rw’ikirimba c’inyubakwa kirābana n’i burārūko, ahār’ intebe y’igishushanyo c’ikēba, gikēba Imana." 
Ezekiel8:4 Kandi rāba, ubgiza bg’Imana y’Abisirayeli ni ho bgāri buri, nk’uko nari narabgerekewe mu kiyaya." 
Ezekiel8:5 Maz’ arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, enda ni wunamure amaso yawe urābe ahahera i burārūko. Nuko nunamura amaso, ndāba ahahera i burārūko, mbona ca gishushanyo c’ikēba kiri mw irasukiro ry’ikirimba c’igicaniro, ku ruhande rw’i burārūko rwaco." 
Ezekiel8:6 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mwana w’ umuntu, mbeg’ ubonye ivyo bakora? Ubonye n’ibizira bikomeye, ivyo ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bakorera hano vyanteye kwīgira kure y’ ahēra hanje? Arik’ uhava wongera kubona ibindi bizira bikomeye." 
Ezekiel8:7 Nukw anshikana ku rugi rw’ inyubakwa; maze nitegereje, mbona umwenge ku nzu." 
Ezekiel8:8 Maz’ arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, imba aho nyene ku nzu. Nuko mmaze kwimba, mbona urugi." 
Ezekiel8:9 Nukw arambarira, at’ Injira, urābe ibizira bibi bakorera hano hantu." 
Ezekiel8:10 Nuko ndinjira nditegereza; mbona amoko yose y’ibikwega inda hasi, n’ay’ ibikōko bizira, n’ibigirwamana vyose vy’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, bishushanijwe ku nzu impande zose." 
Ezekiel8:11 Kand’ imbere yavyo hāri hahagaze abantu mirongwirindwi bo mu bakuru b’ inzu ya Isirayeli; no hagati yabo hāri hahagaze Yazaniya mwene Shafani; kand’ umuntu wese yar’ afise icotero ciwe mu minwe, hagapfunduka imyotsi itāmirana y’ imibavu." 
Ezekiel8:12 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mwana w’umuntu, mbeg’ ubonye ivyo abakuru b’inzu ya Isirayeli bakorera mu mwiza, umuntu wese mu gafuruka kiwe k’ibishushanyo? Kuko bavuga ng’ Uhoraho ntatubona; kandi ng’ Uhoraho yahevye igihugu." 
Ezekiel8:13 Arongera arambgira, at’ Uhava wongera kubona ibindi bizira bikomeye bakora." 
Ezekiel8:14 Maz’ anshikana ku rugi rw’ ikirimba co ku ngoro y’Uhoraho carābana n’i burārūko; maze mbona abagore bicaye baborogera ikigirwamana Tamuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mbeg’ ivyo urabibonye, ga mwana w’umuntu? Uhava wongera kubona ibizira bikomeye biruta ivyo." 
Ezekiel8:16 Nukw anshikana mu nyubakwa y’imbere yo ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho; maze mbona ku rugi rw’urusengero rw’Uhoraho, hagati y’umuryango n’igicaniro, abantu bashika nko kuri mirongwibiri na batanu, bateye ibitugu urusengero rw’Uhoraho, berekeje amaso i burasirazuba, kandi bāriko barasenga izuba, batumbereye iyo rirasira." 
Ezekiel8:17 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mbeg’ ivyo urabibonye ga mwana w’umuntu? Mbeg’ ab’ inzu ya Yuda kibabereye ikibangutse gukora ivyo bizira bakorera hano hantu? Kukw igihugu bacujuje umuryano, bakongeranya kwihindagura ngo bandatse: mbere bagashira udushami ku mazuru yabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ni co gituma nanje nzobakorera ivy’ uburake; ijisho ryanje ntirizogira ico riziguriza, kandi nta n’akagongwe nzogira: naho bazontakambira mu matwi, bashize amajwi hejuru, sinzobumviriza." 
Ezekiel9:1 Maz’ asemererera mu matwi yanje n’ijwi rirenga, at’ Abafise ubushobozi ku gisagara ni mubīgize hafi, umuntu wese afise ikirwanishwa c’icicanyi mu kuboko kwiwe." 
Ezekiel9:2 Nuko haza abantu batandatu baciye mu nzira yo mu kirimba co haruguru cārābana n’i burārūko, umuntu wese afise ikirwanishwa c’icicanyi mu kuboko kwiwe; kandi hagati muri bo har’ umuntu yambaye impuzu zera, afise agahembe karimwo wino yo kwandikisha, akambaye kw itako. Nuko baraza, bahagarara i ruhande y’igicaniro c’umuringa." 
Ezekiel9:3 Kand’ ubgiza bg’Imana y’Abisirayeli bgari buvuye ku mukerubi aho bgahora, bushika mw itangaza ry’ irebe ry’ingoro: maz’ ihamagara uwo muntu yari yambaye impuzu zera, afise ka gahembe karimwo wino yo kwandikisha, akambaye kw itako." 
Ezekiel9:4 Nuk’ Uhoraho aramubgira, ati Genda unyuragire hagati mu gisagara, muri Yerusalemu, ushire ikimenyetso mu ruhanga rw’abantu banihishwa n’ ibizira vyose bikorerwa hagati muri co, bikabariza." 
Ezekiel9:5 Ba bandi ababgira numva, ati Ni mugende muce mu gisagara mumukurikiye, muririke: ijisho ryanyu ntirigire uwo riziguriza, ntihagire n’uwo mugirira akagongwe:" 
Ezekiel9:6 mwice mutikize umutāma n’umusore n’ umwigeme n’abana bato n’ abagore: ariko ntihagire umuntu n’umwe mwēgēra mu barikw ico kimenyetso; kandi muhēre ku rusengero rwanje rwera. Baca bahēra kuri ba bakuru bār’ imbere y’ingoro. 
Ezekiel9:7 Kand’ arababgira, ati Ni muhumanye iyi ngoro, mwuzuze inyubakwa imivyimba: hogi ni mugende. Nuko baragenda, batikiza abo mu gisagara." 
Ezekiel9:8 Maze bakiriko barabatikiza, nanje nsigaye jenyene, nikubita hasi nubamye, ndaboroga, nti Yō! nti Yewe Mwami Uhoraho! nti Mbeg’ ugira ugeseze amasigarira yose yar’ asigaye ku Bisirayeli, urekuriye uburake bgawe kuri Yerusalemu?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Maz’ arambarira, at’ Ibigabitanyo vy’inzu ya Isirayeli n’iya Yuda birarengeranye rwose, kand’ igihugu cuzuye ibitenga vy’amaraso, n’igisagara cuzuye kugoreka imanza: kuko bavuga, bat’ Uhoraho yāhevye igihugu, bati Kand’ Uhoraho nta co abona." 
Ezekiel9:10 Ati Nanje rero, ijisho ryanje ntirizogira ico riziguriza, nta n’akagongwe nzogira, arikw ingeso zabo nzozibasubiza ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel9:11 Maze mbona wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera, afise ka gahembe karimwo wino akambaye kw itako, agarukanye inkuru, ati Nakoze ivyo wantumye." 
Ezekiel10:1 Maze ngize ntya mbona mw itāzānure ry’ijuru ryo hejuru y’imitwe ya ba bakerubi, haboneka igisa n’ibuye ryitwa safiro, kimeze nk’igisa n’intebe y’ubgami." 
Ezekiel10:2 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera, ati Genda uce hagati ya ya makurudumu yizinguriza, musi y’umukerubi, wuzuze amashi yawe yompi amakara yaka, uyakūye hagati y’abakerubi, uyakwiragize hejuru y’igisagara. Nukw ahaca mbona." 
Ezekiel10:3 Kandi ba bakerubi bāri bahagaze i buryo bg’ ingoro igihe wa muntu yahaca; maz’ igipfungu cuzura mu nyubakwa y’imbere. 
Ezekiel10:4 Nuk’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buradūga buva ku mukerubi, buhagarara imbere y’ irebe ry’ingoro; maz’ ingoro yuzura igipfungu, inyubakwa na yo yuzura ugukayangana kw’ubgiza bg’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kand’ uguhinda kw’amababa y’abakerubi kwarumvikana kugashika no mu ntangaro, kumeze nk’ijwi ry’ Īshobora vyose iy’ ivuze." 
Ezekiel10:6 Nukw imaze kubarira wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera, it’ Abīra umuriro uwukūye hagati ya ya makurudumu yizinguriza, no hagati y’abakerubi, araheza arahaca, ahagarara i ruhande y’ikurudumu." 
Ezekiel10:7 Maz’ umukerubi umwe atuma ukuboko hagati ya ba bakerubi, ku muriro wari hagati yabo, awābīrako, awushira mu mashi y’uwo yambaye impuzu zera; arawābīra, aragenda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Kandi musi y’amababa ya ba bakerubi hāboneka ibisa n’amaboko y’umuntu. 
Ezekiel10:9 Nuko ngize ntya, mbona amakurudumu ane i ruhande y’abakerubi, ikurudumu imwe ir’ i ruhande y’umukerubi umwe, iyindi ir’ i ruhande y’uwundi, birtyo birtyo: kand’ ayo makurudumu ishusho yayo yar’ imeze nk’ akabuyenge kitwa tarushishi." 
Ezekiel10:10 Kand’ uko yasa, yose ukw ar’ ane yar’ afise ishusho imwe, nk’ ah’ umenga n’ikurudumu isobekeranye n’iyindi." 
Ezekiel10:11 Iy’ agiye, yashobora kugenda ah’ agomvye mu mpande zose ukw ari zine: nta ho yahindukira iy’ agenda, arikw ahantu umutwe utumbereye ni ho yajana: nta ho yahindukira iy’ agenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Kand’ imibiri yabo yose, no mu migongo yabo, n’ amaboko yabo, n’amababa yabo, bo na ya makurudumu, ni yo ya makurudumu nyene yabo ukw ari bane, vyari vyuzuyekw amaso impande zose." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kand’ ayo makurudumu yitwa Nyawizinguriza: yiswe artyo numva. 
Ezekiel10:14 Kand’ umwe‐umwe yar’ afise mu maso hane: mu maso ha mbere hāri mu maso h’umukerubi, mu maso ha kabiri hāri mu maso h’ umuntu, mu maso ha gatatu hāri mu maso h’intambge, kandi mu maso ha kane hāri mu maso h’ inkukuma." 
Ezekiel10:15 Maz’ abo bakerubi bādūga intumbgejuru; abo ni bo vya binyabugingo nari naraboneye ku ruzi Kebari. 
Ezekiel10:16 Kand’ abo bakerubi iyo bagiye, ya makurudumu yagendera i ruhande yabo: kand’ iy’ abakerubi bateruye amababa ngo badūge bave kw isi, na ya makurudumu ntiyakebanuka ngw abave i ruhande." 
Ezekiel10:17 Iyo bahagaze na yo yarahagarara; bādūga intumbgejuru akadūgana na bo: kukw impwemu y’ikinyabugingo cose yari muri yo. 
Ezekiel10:18 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buragenda buva imbere y’irebe ry’ingoro, buhagarara hejuru y’abakerubi." 
Ezekiel10:19 Maz’ abakerubi baterura amababa yabo, baradūga bava kw isi mvyibonera aho bāgenda, na ya makurudumu yabagendera i ruhande: maze bahagarara ku rugi rw’ikirimba co ku ngoro y’Uhoraho kirābana n’i burasirazuba; kand’ ubgiza bg’Imana y’Abisirayeli bgari hejuru yabo." 
Ezekiel10:20 Abo ni bo vya binyabugingo nari narabonye biri musi y’Imana y’Abisirayeli ku ruzi Kebari; ndaheza mmenya kw ari bo bakerubi. 
Ezekiel10:21 Umwe‐umwe yar’ afise mu maso hane, kand’ umwe‐umwe yar’ afise amababa ane; kandi hār’ ibisa n’ amaboko y’umuntu musi y’amababa yavyo." 
Ezekiel10:22 Kand’ ishusho yo mu maso habo uko yar’ iri n’imwe nyene n’iyo naboneye ku ruzi Kebari, n’uko bāsa ni kumwe, mbere ni bo nyene; bose bāgenda babanze." 
Ezekiel11:1 Maze Mpwemu yongera kunterura, anjana ku kirimba c’i burasirazuba co ku ngoro y’ Uhoraho kirābana n’i burasirazuba: mbona abantu mirongwibiri na batanu bari ku rugi rwo ku kirimba; kandi hagati muri bo mbona Yazaniya mwene Azuri, na Pelatiya mwene Benaya, abaganwa b’iryo hanga." 
Ezekiel11:2 Maz’ arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, abo ni ba bantu bīgīra imigabo y’ivyo kugabitanya, bakagīra abo mur’ iki gisagara inama z’ibibi;" 
Ezekiel11:3 bakavuga, bat’ Ereg’ igihe ntikiragera: enda ni twiyubakire amazu; bat’ Iki gisagara n’inkono, natwe tur’ inyama ziri muri yo." 
Ezekiel11:4 Nuko rer’ ubabūrire, mwana w’umuntu, ubabūrire." 
Ezekiel11:5 Maze Mpwemu w’Uhoraho aramanuka, anzako, arambarira, ati Vuga, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize: at’ Ivyo ni vyo mwavuze, yemwe ab’inzu ya Isirayeli; kuko nzi ivyo mwiyumvira." 
Ezekiel11:6 Mwahindikiranije abo mwishe mur’ iki gisagara, mwujuje inzira zaho imihindigiti." 
Ezekiel11:7 Nuko rer’ uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Imihindigiti y’abo mwishe, mukayirunda hagati muri co, abo ni zo nyama, iki gisagara na co n’inkono: ariko namwe muzogikūrwamwo." 
Ezekiel11:8 Inkota ni yo mwatinye, nanje inkota ni yo nzobatērēra nyene, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel11:9 Nzokibakūramwo, mbagabure mu maboko y’abanyamahanga, mbacirekw iteka." 
Ezekiel11:10 Muzoririkwa n’inkota; nzobacira urubanza ndi mu rugabano rw’i Bgisirayeli: namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho. 
Ezekiel11:11 Iki gisagara ntikizobabera inkono, kandi namwe ntimuzoba inyama ziri muri yo; nzobacira urubanza ndi mu rugabano rw’i Bgisirayeli;" 
Ezekiel11:12 namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho: kuko mutāgendeye mu mabgirizwa yanje, ntimushitse n’ amateka yanje, ariko mwakurikiye ivyagezwe vy’amahanga abakikije." 
Ezekiel11:13 Maze ndabibabūriye, Pelatiya mwene Benaya aca arahwera. Nanje nca nikubita hasi nubamye, ntera ijwi hejuru, nti Yō! nti Yewe Mwami Uhoraho! nti Mbeg’ ugira uherengeteze rwose amasigarira y’ Abisirayeli?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel11:15 riti Mwana w’umuntu, bene wanyu, bene wanyu nyene, abo mu muryango wawe, bo n’inzu yose ya Isirayeli iy’ iva ikagera, ni bamwe bābariwe n’ababa i Yerusalemu, bati Ni mwīgire kure y’ Uhoraho: tweho iki gihugu ni co twahawe kw ishamvu." 
Ezekiel11:16 Nuko rer’ uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nah’ abo nabangarije kure mu banyamahanga, kandi naho nabasābagirije mu bindi bihugu, ariko nzomara igihe mbabereye umwanya wera mu bihugu bagiyemwo." 
Ezekiel11:17 Nuko rer’ uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzobakoranya mbakūre mu mahanga, kandi mbakoranirize hamwe mbakūye mu bihugu aho mwari mwarasābagirijwe, maze mbahe igihugu c’i Bgisirayeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Nuko bazojayo, bahakūre ibintu vyaho vyose nanka urunuka, n’ibizira vyaho vyose."
