Ezekiel11:19 Nanje nzobaha umutima umwe, mbashiremw’ impwemu nsha; nzokūra umutima ukomeye nk’ibuye mu mibiri yabo, mbahe umutima woroshe nk’inyama;" 
Ezekiel11:20 ngo babone kugendera mu vyagezwe vyanje, no kwitondera amabgirizwa yanje ngo babishitse: maze bazoba ihanga ryanje, nanje nzoba Imana yabo." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ariko ku vy’abo bafise imitima ihuramye ku bigirwamana vyabo nanka urunuka n’ibizira vyabo, izo ngeso zabo nzozibasubiza ku mitwe, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel11:22 Maze ba bakerubi baterura amababa yabo, na ya makurudumu yar’ i ruhande yabo; kand’ ubgiza bg’Imana y’Abisirayeli bgari hejuru yabo." 
Ezekiel11:23 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho buradūga buva ku murwa hagati, buhagarara ku musozi ur’ i ruhande y’umurwa ahahera i burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel11:24 Maze Mpwemu aranterura, mbona ansubiza i Bukaludaya ku bajanywe ar’ inyagano, ndi mur’ ukwo kwerekwa neretswe na Mpwemu w’Imana. Maz’ ukwo kwerekwa nabonye guca kumvako." 
Ezekiel11:25 Mperako mbarira abājanywe ar’ inyagano ivyo Uhoraho yanyeretse vyose. 
Ezekiel12:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel12:2 riti Mwana w’ umuntu, uba hagati mu b’inzu y’ abagarariji, bafise amaso yo kubona ariko ntibabona, bafise amatwi yo kwumva ariko ntibumva; kukw ar’ inzu y’abagarariji." 
Ezekiel12:3 Nuko rero wewe mwana w’ umuntu, ni witegure ibintu vyo ku nzira, uheze ujonjore ku murango bakubona; ujonjore uve i wawe uje ahandi bakubona: kumbure vyobatera kwibaza, nah’ ar’ inzu y’abagarariji." 
Ezekiel12:4 Usohore ibintu vyawe ku murango bakubona, nk’ ibijonjoranwa: nawe ubgawe uhenge mu kagoroba usohoke bakubona, nk’ukw abantu bāmbukanywe bagenda." 
Ezekiel12:5 Uheze wimbe utobore uruzitiro bakubona, uhacane ivyo bintu." 
Ezekiel12:6 Ubishire ku rutugu bakubona, ubijane bumaze kwira; witwikire mu maso ngo ntubone igihugu: kuko nagushizeho kubera akarorero inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel12:7 Nuko ndabigenza nk’uko nabariwe: ibintu vyanje ndabisohora ku murango, ari nk’ibintu vyo ku nzira, maze mpenga mu kagoroba, ubganje nyene ndimba n’ amaboko yanje, ntobora uruzitiro; mbihacana bumaze kwira, mbishira ku rutugu babona." 
Ezekiel12:8 Bukeye mu gitondo ijambo ry’ Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel12:9 riti Mwana w’umuntu, mbeg’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ya nzu y’abagarariji, ntibakubajije ngw Ivyo ukora n’ibiki?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Ubishure, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Izi mbūri zibūrira segaba ar’ i Yerusalemu, n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bose babayo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Uvuge uti Mbabereye akarorero: uko nagenjeje ni ko bazogirirwa; bazokwambukanwa bajanwe ar’ inyagano. 
Ezekiel12:12 Kandi segaba ari muri bo azokwikorera ku rutugu mw ijoro, asohoke: bazokwimba batobore uruzitiro ngo bahacane ibintu; na we azokwitwikira mu maso, ngo ntaz’ abone igihugu." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kandi nzomutega ururiba rwanje, afatwe n’umutego wanje; nzomujana i Babuloni mu gihugu c’Abakaludaya; kandi ntazohabona nah’ ari ho azogwa." 
Ezekiel12:14 Kand’ abamushagajeko bose bo kumutabara, n’imitwe y’ingabo ziwe zose, nzobashwiragiriza mu birēre vyose, kandi nzosokora inkota ibirukane." 
Ezekiel12:15 Maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho, igihe nzobasābagiriza mu mahanga, nkabashwiragiriza mu bihugu." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ariko nzosiga bake muri bo mbakize inkota n’inzara n’ikīza, kugira ngo baze bāturire ibizira bākoze vyose mu mahanga aho bazoba bāraroye; kandi bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel12:17 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel12:18 riti Mwana w’umuntu, uz’ urye ivyo kurya vyawe uhinda agashitsi, kand’ uz’ unywe amazi yawe uri mu gatengo uhagaritse umutima;" 
Ezekiel12:19 kand’ ubarire abantu bo mu gihugu, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize ku vy’ abar’ i Yerusalemu no mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, ati Bazorya ivyo kurya vyabo bahagaritse imitima, banywe amazi yabo bumiwe, kukw igihugu kizohinduka imisaka, ivyaho bigasahurwa vyose, bazize umuryano w’abakibamwo bose." 
Ezekiel12:20 Kand’ ibisagara vyuzuyemw’ abantu bizocika ibitongozi, igihugu na co gihinduke imisaka; namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel12:21 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel12:22 riti Mwana w’umuntu, uyu mugani n’uw’ iki, muca mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, ngw Imisi iratevye, kandi ng’ Ukwerekwa kwose kurabuze?" 
Ezekiel12:23 None rer’ ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzotuma uwo mugani uzimangana, ntibongere kuwuca mu Bisirayeli nk’umugani; arik’ ubabgire, ut’ Imisi irēgereje, n’ivyerekanywe vyose bigira bishike." 
Ezekiel12:24 Nta kwerekwa kw’ ibinyoma cank’ indagu y’akabirya bizokwongera kuba mu nzu ya Isirayeli. 
Ezekiel12:25 Kuko jewe nd’Uhoraho: nzovuga, kand’ ijambo nzovuga rizoshika; ntirizokwongera kurekerwa mu rutendeko: kuko mu gihe canyu, mwebge ab’ inzu y’abagarariji, nzovuga kandi nshitse ico navuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel12:26 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel12:27 riti Mwana w’umuntu, ereg’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli baravuga, ngw Ivyo weretswe bizoshika imisi yigiyeyo, kandi ng’ubūra ivy’ ibihe bikiri kure." 
Ezekiel12:28 Nuko rer’ ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Amajambo yanje yose nta na rimwe rizosubira kurekerwa mu rutendeko, arikw ijambo nzovuga rizoshika, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel13:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, būrira ba kamenyi bo mu Bisirayeli, ubūrire abagenda bavugishwa n’ibiva mu mitima yabo ubgabo, ubabarire, uti Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho:" 
Ezekiel13:3 uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Bazobona ibara, abo ba kamenyi b’ibipfu, bakurikira ivyiyumviro vyabo ubgabo, kand’ ata co beretswe!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Yemwe Bisirayeli, ba kamenyi banyu bameze nk’imbgebge zo mu bitongozi!" 
Ezekiel13:5 Ntimwarushe mudūga ngo muje mu birengero vyo ku rugo rw’inzu ya Isirayeli, canke ngo mubizibire, kugira ngo babone ingene bashikama mu ntambara ku musi w’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:6 Abavuga ngo Ni k’Uhoraho agize, kand’ Uhoraho atābatumye; beretswe ubusa bo n’indagu z’ibinyoma, kandi bizigiza abantu kw ijambo ryabo rizoshika." 
Ezekiel13:7 Mbega ntimwarose inzozi z’ubusa, n’indagu mwavuze s’ibinyoma, ko muvuga ngo Ni k’ Uhoraho agize, na we ata co yavuze?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Nuko rer’ uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngo Ko mwavuze ibitagira ikimazi, mukerekwa ibinyoma, ngw Ehe muzohigūra na we, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ngo Kand’ ukuboko kwiwe kuzorwanya abo ba kamenyi berekwa ibitagira ikimazi, bakaragura ibinyoma: ngo Nta ho bazoba mu nama y’abantu biwe na mba, canke ngo bandikwe mu gitabo c’amazina c’inzu ya Isirayeli, canke ngo bashike mu gihugu c’Abisirayeli; ngo Kandi muzomenya kw ari we Mwami Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ngw Ivyo bizoba kuko bama bazimiza abantu biwe, bavuga ngo N’amahoro; kand’ ata mahoro ariho; ngo Kand’ iyo hagize uwubaka urusika, baruhomakw ingwa." 
Ezekiel13:11 Barira abaruhomakw ingwa yuko ruzohomvoka: hazogwa imvura y’ isegenya; namwe mwa mināna y’urubura, muzogwa; maz’ umuyaga w’ikirura urusiture." 
Ezekiel13:12 Non’ urwo rusika ni rwahomvoka, mbega ntimuzobazwa, ngw Iryo homa mwāruhomye ryagiye hehe?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Nuko rero, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho mbivuze, nti Mbere nzorusituza umuyaga w’ikirura nshangashiwe; hazogwa imvura y’isegenya izanywe n’uburake bganje, kand’ ubushangashirwe bganje buzotuma imināna y’urubura irukombora." 
Ezekiel13:14 Uko ni ko nzohomvora urusika mwahomesheje ingwa, ndarusenyurire hasi, bitume itanguriro ryarwo rigaragazwa: nuko ruzohomvoka, namwe muherengeterezwe hagati muri rwo; ni ho muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:15 Uko ni ko nzoshitsa uburake bganje ku rusika no ku bāruhomesheje ingwa; kandi nzobabgira, nt’ Urusika ntirukiriho, cank’ abāruhomye," 
Ezekiel13:16 ari bo ba bandi ba kamenyi bo mu Bisirayeli bavuga ivy’ i Yerusalemu, bakaharotera inzozi z’amahoro, kand’ ata mahoro ariho, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Ezekiel13:17 Nuko nawe, mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho abakobga b’ ubgoko bganyu, bavuga ibiva mu mitima yabo ubgabo; ubabūrire," 
Ezekiel13:18 ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngo Bazobona ibara, abagore bapfundika ibiheko mu ngingo z’amaboko yose, bakabarīra imyitwikiro yo ku mitwe y’abantu, ukw ikirēho c’umuntu wese kiri, uti Kugira ngo babone ingene bafata abantu! Uti Mbega mwofata abantu biwe, namwe mukīkiza?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Uti Mwamutītūje mu bantu biwe ngo mwironkere ingemu z’ amashi ya sayiri n’ubumanyagu bg’imitsima, uti Kugira ngo mwice abantu batāri bakwiye gupfa, mukize abatāri bakwiye kubaho, uti Mu buryo mubesha abantu biwe bakunda kwumviriza ibinyoma." 
Ezekiel13:20 Uti Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngw Ehe azohigūra n’ivyo biheko vyanyu, ivyo mutegesha abantu nk’ abatega inyoni; ut’ Azobibashikura ku maboko; uti Maz’ agobōtore abo bantu mwateze ngo bīgīre, nk’ūgobotora inyoni." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ngo N’iyo myitwikiro yanyu azoyitabagura, uti Maze ngw akize abantu biwe, abakūre mu maboko yanyu, ngo Kandi nta ho bazokwongera kuba mu maboko yanyu nk’abāfashwe; uti Nuko muzomenya yukw ari we Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ut’ Ibinyoma vyanyu ko mwabibabarishije umutima w’umugororotsi uwo jewe ntābabaje, mukaremesha umunyakibi kugira ngo ntāhindukire ngw ave mu nzira yiwe mbi, ngw akire;" 
Ezekiel13:23 uti Ni co gituma mutazokwongera kwerekwa ibitagira ikimazi, canke kugira indagu muragura; uti Kand’ azokiza abantu biwe, abakūre mu maboko yanyu: uti Nuko muzomenya yukw ari we Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel14:1 Maze bamwe bo mu bakuru b’Abisirayeli baza aho ndi, bicara imbere yanje." 
Ezekiel14:2 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel14:3 riti Mwana w’umuntu, abo bantu bakimagije ibigirwamana vyabo mu mitima, kandi bashize imbere yabo igitsitaza kibatsinda mu bigabitanyo vyabo: none noshobora nte kw abo bogira ico bansiguza na kimwe?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Nuko rero vugana na bo, ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Isirayeli akimagiza ibigirwamana vyiwe mu mutima, agashira imbere yiwe igitsitaza kimutsinda mu bigabitanyo vyiwe, maz’ akaza gusiguza ūvugishwa nanje; jewe Uhoraho nzomwishura ibihwanye n’isinzi ry’ibigirwamana vyiwe," 
Ezekiel14:5 kugira ngw ab’inzu ya Isirayeli mbafatane ibiri mu mitima yabo, kuko bose twahubanywe kubg’ ibigirwamana vyabo." 
Ezekiel14:6 Nuko rero barira inzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ni mugaruke, mutere ibitugu ibigirwamana vyanyu, mukūre amaso yanyu ku bizira vyanyu vyose." 
Ezekiel14:7 Kuk’ umuntu wese wo mu nzu ya Isirayeli, canke wo mu banyamahanga aba muri bo, yitandukanya nanje, agakimagiza ibigirwamana vyiwe mu mutima, agashira imbere yiwe igitsitaza kimutsinda mu bigabitanyo vyiwe, maz’ akaza k’ūvugishwa nanje ngw amunsigurize; jewe Uhoraho nzomwiyishurira ubganje:" 
Ezekiel14:8 nzotungīra igitsure uwo muntu, ndamuhindure akajoreza n’ikimenyetso n’iciro ry’imigani, kandi nzomurandura mmukūre hagati mu bantu banje; nuko muzomenya ko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel14:9 Kandi kamenyi ni yasukwa akagira ijambo avuga, ni jewe Uhoraho nzoba ndamusutse, kandi nzomushingiriza ukuboko kwanje, ndamurandure ndamukūre hagati mu bantu banje b’Abisirayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Kandi bazogibgako n’ ibigabitanyo vyabo: ibigabitanyo vya kamenyi bizohwana n’ivy’ ūje kumusiguza ijambo; 
Ezekiel14:11 kugira ngw ab’inzu ya Isirayeli ntibongere kwāngāra ngo bamveko, canke ngo bongere kwihumanisha ibicumuro vyabo vyose; ariko baze babe abantu banje, nanje mbe Imana yabo, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel14:12 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel14:13 riti Mwana w’umuntu, igihugu ni cakora icaha kikancumurako, nanje nkagishingiriza ukuboko kwanje, nkavuna inkoni yaco cishimikije, ni yo mutsima waco, nkakirekuriramw’ inzara, nkakiranduramw’ abantu n’ibitungano," 
Ezekiel14:14 naho coba kirimwo Nowa na Daniyeli na Yobu, abo ukw ari batatu, ukugororoka kwabo kwokiza ayabo magara gusa, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel14:15 Kandi ni natērēra igihugu ibikōko vy’inkazi, bikagisivya kigahinduka amatongo, ntihabe hakigira umuntu agicamwo kubg’ ivyo bikōko," 
Ezekiel14:16 naho coba kirimw’ abo bantu batatu, ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nta we borokora, ar’ abahungu babo cank’ abakobga babo; ni bo borokoka gusa, arikw igihugu co coba amatongo." 
Ezekiel14:17 Cank’ ico gihugu ni nagitērēra inkota, nkavuga, nti Wa nkota we, genda unyuragire mu gihugu, kugira ngo nkiranduremw’ abantu n’ibitungano," 
Ezekiel14:18 naho coba kirimw’ abo bantu batatu, ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nta we borokora, ar’ abahungu babo cank’ abakobga babo; ni bo borokoka gusa." 
Ezekiel14:19 Cank’ ico gihugu ni nagitērēra ikīza, nkakirekuriramw’ ubushangashirwe bganje busēsa ibitenga vy’ amaraso, nkakiranduramw’ abantu n’ibitungano," 
Ezekiel14:20 naho coba kirimwo Nowa na Daniyeli na Yobu, ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, nta we borokora, ar’ umuhungu wabo cank’ umukobga wabo; atar’ ayabo magara gusa bokiza, kubg’ ukugororoka kwabo." 
Ezekiel14:21 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Mbega ntibizorushiriza kuba birtyo kuri Yerusalemu, igihe nzoharekurira ivyo bihano bihambaye ukw ari bine, ni vyo nkota n’inzara n’ibikōko vy’inkazi n’ ikīza, kugira ngo ndaharandure abantu n’ibitungano?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Ariko rero hazosigara amasigarira azokūrwayo, y’abahungu n’abakobga; ehe bazoza iyo muri, namwe muzobona ingeso zabo n’ibikorwa vyabo; kandi muzoshira umwikomo w’ivyago vyose nzoba narateje i Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel14:23 Nuko bazobamara umwikomo, ni mwabona ingeso zabo n’ibikorwa vyabo; ni ho muzomenya yukw ivyo nahakoreye vyose ntabitewe n’ubusa, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel15:1 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel15:2 riti Mwana w’ umuntu, igiti c’umuzabibu, ico kirusha ikindi giti cose n’iki, cank’ ishami ryaco rirusha iki ibindi biti vyo mu kibira?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Har’ igiti co kubāza cobonekamwo ngo kigire ico gikora? Har’ abogicak’ urumambo rwo kumanikakw ikintu? 
Ezekiel15:4 Erega n’ico gutererwa mu muriro nk’inkwi: umuriro uragitongora epfo na ruguru, no hagati yaco hagasha: none coba kigifise ikimazi ku gikorwa na kimwe?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Rāba, kikir’ umurava nta co covuyemwo cokoreshwa, nkanswe ubu, umuriro umaze kugitongora, kigasha, har’ ico coba kikivamwo cokoreshwa?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nk’ukw igiti c’umuzabibu kimeze mu bindi biti vyo mu kibira, ico natanze kuba inkwi z’umuriro, uko ni ko nzotanga ababa i Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel15:7 Kandi nzobatungīra igitsure; bazova mu muriro basubire mu wundi ubatongore; kandi namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, abo ni nabatungīra igitsure." 
Ezekiel15:8 Kand’ igihugu nzogihindura amatongo, kuko bācumuye, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel16:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel16:2 riti Mwana w’ umuntu, menyesha Yerusalemu ibizira vyaho," 
Ezekiel16:3 uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abarira Yerusalemu, at’ Amāmo yawe n’ amavuka yawe ur’ uwo mu gihugu c’i Kanani; so yar’ Umwamori, nyoko yar’ Umuhetikazi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Mu mavuka yawe umusi wavutseko uruzogi rwawe ntirwagabiwe, ntiwarushe wuhagirwa amazi ng’ utungane; nta wakwiritse mu munyu na mba, canke ngw agushire mu twahi." 
Ezekiel16:5 Nta wagushizekw akajisho ngw akugirire akagongwe, kugira ngw agire ico agukorera mur’ ivyo, ngw akugirire ikibabarwe; ariko washiburiwe mu gahinga umusi wavutseko, kuko war’ uteye ishishi." 
Ezekiel16:6 Maze nguserutseko, mbona ingen’ ukumbagara mu bisanza vy’amaraso, ndakubarira, nti Nah’ uri mu maraso yawe, ndaguteretse, baho! Mbere narakubariye, nti Nah’ uri mu maraso yawe, ndaguteretse, baho!" 
Ezekiel16:7 Nakugwije nk’urumerēra rwo mw itongo, uragwira, urakura, ushika kuba umunyakaranga keza; amabere yawe arahagarara, n’ umushatsi wawe urakura; ariko wari gusa ugenda amēnya." 
Ezekiel16:8 Maze ndaguserukako, ndakwitegereza, mbona yuk’ ushitse mu gihe uteye igomwe; maze ngutērerak’ umwambaro wanje, nambika ubgambure bgawe; mbere narakurahiye, nsezerana nawe isezerano, ucika uwanje, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ndaheza nkwuhagiza amazi, mbere nkwuhagira amaraso yawe rwose, ngusīga amavuta." 
Ezekiel16:10 Kandi nkwambika impuzu zijererenze amabara, nkwambika inkweto zo mu nsāto z’ibikōko vyitwa tahashi, ngukenyeza umukenyero wera derere, ngutwikira ihariri." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ngusakarak’ utugenegene, nkwambika imiringa ku maboko n’umugufu mw izosi." 
Ezekiel16:12 Nkwambika impeta ku zuru no ku matwi, n’igitsibo ciza mu mutwe." 
Ezekiel16:13 Uko ni ko wasakawe izahabu n’ifeza; kand’ imyambaro yawe yar’ impuzu zera derere n’amahariri, n’ izijererenze amabara; wama urya ivy’ ifu isētse neza, n’ubūki, n’ amavuta; kandi wari n’akaranga bihebuje, uraroranirwa ushitsa no ku kwamikara." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ucika rurangiranwa mu mahanga kubg’ ubgiza bgawe, kuko bgagizwe agahore n’icubahiro canje nagushizeko, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel16:15 Ariko wishimiye ubgo bgiza bgawe, wihindura maraya, ubitewe n’uko wabaye rurangiranwa, ugasambana n’ūhise wese, ukaba uwiwe." 
Ezekiel16:16 Kandi wābīra mu myambaro yawe, ukīshingira ibitabo ku mpinga z’imisozi, ukabishariza ivy’ amabara atar’ amwe, maz’ ukabisambaniramwo: nta bimeze nk’ivyo vyigeze kubaho, nta n’ ibizokwongera kuboneka." 
Ezekiel16:17 Kandi wābiriye utugenegene twawe twiza tw’amazahabu yanje n’amafeza yanje, utwo naguhaye, utwicuriramw’ ibishushanyo vy’abagabo, maz’ usambana na vyo;" 
Ezekiel16:18 kandi wābīra imyambaro yawe ijererenze amabara urayivyambika; maz’ ubiterekereza amavuta yanje ya elayo n’imibavu yanje. 
Ezekiel16:19 Mbere n’ivyo kurya vyanje naguhaye, ivy’ ifu isētse neza n’amavuta ya elayo n’ubūki, ivyo nakugaburira, warabibiterekereje ngo bibibere umubabge umota neza; uko ni ko vyagenze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel16:20 Ikigeretseko, wābiriye abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe, abo wamvyariye, ubatanga kw ibimazi ngo bibarye. Mbeg’ ubumaka bgawe ubgita ikintu coroshe," 
Ezekiel16:21 ko wungikanya ukica n’abana banje, ukabatanga, ukabibosereza mu muriro nk’ ibimazi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Mbega mur’ ivyo bizira vyawe vyose n’ubumaka bgawe, ntiwarushe wibuka imisi yo mu buyoya bgawe, igihe wari gusa ur’amēnya, ukumbagara mu bisanza vy’amaraso?" 
Ezekiel16:23 (Ereg’ ubonye ibara, ubonye ibara! ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize.) Ukūye n’ivyo bibi vyawe vyose," 
Ezekiel16:24 wiyubakiye akanyabugoro ahibonekeza, ukītabira ibitabo mu nzira zose." 
Ezekiel16:25 Wītabiye ibitabo mu mayirabiri yose, ubgiza bgawe ubugira igihumane, witega ūhise wese, ugwiza ubumaka bgawe." 
Ezekiel16:26 Kandi wasambanye n’ Abanyegiputa b’ababanyi bawe b’ amasekanya; ugwiza ubumaka bgawe ng’ untere ishavu. 
Ezekiel16:27 Nuko rero, ehe rāba, ngushingirije ukuboko kwanje, ntuvye ingaburo yawe, nkugabure mu bakwanka ngo bakugire uko bagomba, ni bo bakobga b’Abafilisitiya, bāmāramājwe n’ubgēruzi bgawe." 
Ezekiel16:28 Kandi wigize maraya ku Bashuri, kuk’ ur’ intashirwa; mbere wigize maraya kuri bo, yamara na ho nyene ntiwashirwa." 
Ezekiel16:29 Ikigeretseko wagwije ubusambanyi bgawe mu gihugu c’i Kanani, gushitsa n’i Bukaludaya; yamara na ho nyene ntivyatuma ushirwa." 
Ezekiel16:30 Ewe kuntu umutima wawe uhuha, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize; k’ukora ivyo vyose, ar’ ivyokorwa n’umugore w’igishegu w’umusambanyikazi;" 
Ezekiel16:31 ko wiyubakiye akanyabugoro ahibonekeza mu mayirabiri yose, ugataba ibitabo vyawe ku nzira zose; mbere ntiwabaye nka maraya, kuk’ utārinda no guhērwa." 
Ezekiel16:32 Ewe wa mugore usambana kand’ ufise uwawe! Ukemerera impirahisi mu gishingo c’umugabo wawe! 
Ezekiel16:33 Ba maraya bose bāhora bahērwa: ariko weho, ni wewe uhēra abūzure bawe bose, ukabagurira, kugira ngo baze iy’uri baturutse impande zose ngo basambane nawe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ubumaraya bgawe bunyuranije n’ubg’ abandi bagore, kukw ata wugukurikirana ngo musambane: ariko wewe, k’uhēra ntuhērwe, unyuranije n’abandi." 
Ezekiel16:35 Nuko rero, wewe maraya, ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ imyanda yawe ibaye agasumbirije, n’ibiteye isoni vyawe bitwikuruwe n’ubumaka bgawe n’abūzure bawe, kandi kubg’ ibigirwamana vyose vy’ ibizira vyawe, no kubg’ amaraso y’abana bawe wabishikaniye," 
Ezekiel16:37 nuko rāba, nzokoraniriza abūzure bawe bose hamwe, ari bo bāguhimbara, bo n’abo wagomwa bose, hamwe n’abo wanka bose, nzobaguteranirizako baguturuke impande zose, maze ntwikurure ibiteye isoni vyawe, kugira ngo babibone vyose." 
Ezekiel16:38 Kandi nzogucira urubanza ruhwanye n’urwo bacira abagore b’abasambanyikazi n’abagore bavisha amaraso; ishavu n’ifuhe ngufitiye nzotuma bikuvisha amaraso nawe. 
Ezekiel16:39 Kandi nzokugabura mu maboko yabo, na bo bazosambura ka kanyabugoro kar’ ahibonekeza, basangangure na vya bitabo vyawe; bazogukoba n’imyambaro yawe, bakwake na twa tugenegene twawe twiza: maze bagusige uri gusa ur’amēnya." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ikindi bazokugomorera igitero, kigutere amabuye, bagusogoteshe inkota zabo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Amazu yawe bazoyatongoza umuriro, bagushitsekw iteka uciriweko, abagore benshi babirorēra; nanje nzozimiriza ugusambana kwawe, kandi ntuzokwongera gutanga impēra yakwo ukundi." 
Ezekiel16:42 Uko ni ko nzoba ntuye ubushangashirwe ngufitiye, n’ifuhe ryanje nkugirira rizoba rikuvuyeko; nanje kizoba giciye, nzoba ntakiratse." 
Ezekiel16:43 Kuk’ utibutse imisi yo mu buto bgawe, arik’ ukantera ishavu kubg’ ivyo vyose; nuko rero, ehe ngira ngusubize ku mutwe ingeso zawe, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize: kandi ntuzoba ukigereka ubgo bushakanyi ku bizira vyawe vyose." 
Ezekiel16:44 Eh’ ūca imigani wese azogucak’ uyu mugani, ngo Nyina n’ umukobga n’iz’ imina." 
Ezekiel16:45 Ur’ umwana wa nyoko, yabihiwe n’ umugabo wiwe n’abana biwe; uvukana na bene nyoko, babihiwe n’abagabo babo n’abana babo: nyoko yar’ Umuhetikazi, so yar’ Umwamori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukurwawe ni Samariya, aherereye i bumoso bgawe, bo n’abakobga biwe; murumunawe aherereye i buryo bgawe ni we Sodomu n’abakobga biwe." 
Ezekiel16:47 Yamara ntiwagendeye mu ngeso zabo gusa, canke ng’ ukurikire ibizira vyabo; ariko wabifashe nk’ivyoroshe, ubarusha kwihumanya mu ngeso zawe zose." 
Ezekiel16:48 Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, yuko Sodomu murumunawe n’abakobga biwe batākoze nkawe n’abakobga bawe." 
Ezekiel16:49 Rāba, ibi ni vyo bigabitanyo vya murumunawe Sodomu: kugira ubgibone, n’ukwibera mu gahimbo k’indya, n’ ugutsindaza ata co yinona; ivyo ni vyo vyari muri we no mu bakobga biwe; kandi ntiyatabaye impahazwa n’umukene." 
Ezekiel16:50 Bābaye abībone, kandi bākorera ibizira imbere yanje: nuko mbibonye mbakūraho." 
Ezekiel16:51 Mbere na Samariya ntiyakoze ivyaha bingana n’ igihimba c’ivyo wakoze; ariko weho wagwije ibizira kubarusha, ibizira vyawe vyose wakoze bituma ivya bene nyoko bitanībazwako." 
Ezekiel16:52 Nawe ukorwe n’isoni, kuko wari wahinyuye bene nyoko; kubg’ ivyaha vyawe wakoze birusha ivyabo kuba bibi, bakurushije kuba abagororotsi: mber’ umāramāre, kand’ ukorwe n’isoni, kuko watumye bene nyoko batiyumvirwako ko bākoze nabi." 
Ezekiel16:53 Nanje nzotuma bahindukira bave mu ngoyi zabo, ni bo Sodomu n’ abakobga biwe bari mu ngoyi, na Samariya n’abakobga biwe bari mu ngoyi, bo n’abawe b’imbohe bari mu ngoyi hagati muri bo;" 
Ezekiel16:54 kugira ng’ ukorwe n’isoni wewe ubgawe, umāramāzwe n’ivyo wakoze vyose, kuko wabaremesheje." 
Ezekiel16:55 Kandi bene nyoko, Sodomu n’ abakobga biwe, bazokwongera kumera nk’uko bamye, na Samariya n’abakobga biwe, na bo bazokwongera kumera nk’uko bāmye, nawe n’abakobga bawe muzokwongera kumera nk’uko mwamye." 
Ezekiel16:56 Murumunawe Sodomu ntiwarushe umucisha no mu kanwa mu gihe c’ubgibone bgawe," 
Ezekiel16:57 ububi bgawe butaraseruka, nk’uko vyabaye mu gihe co gutēterezwa n’abakobga b’i Siriya n’abahakikije bose, bo n’abakobga b’Abafilisitiya bagushinyagurira impande zose." 
Ezekiel16:58 Ubushakanyi bgawe n’ibizira vyawe vyaragukoze, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel16:59 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzokugirira nk’uko nawe wagize, wakēngereye indahiro wica isezerano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Yamara nzokwibuka isezerano nasezeranye nawe mu gihe c’ubuto bgawe, kandi nzogushirirah’ isezerano ry’ibihe bidashira." 
Ezekiel16:61 Nawe ni ho uzoca wibuka ingeso zawe, ukamāramāra, ah’ uzokwākīrira bene nyoko, bakuru bawe na barumuna bawe; kandi nzobaguha bakubere abakobga, ariko si kubg’ isezerano ryawe." 
Ezekiel16:62 Nuko nzogushirirah’ isezerano ryanje, maz’ uzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho:" 
Ezekiel16:63 kugira ng’ ubone kwibuka, utētērwe, ntukūreko n’umunwa, kubg’ isoni uzoba ufise, ni naheza kuguharira ivyo wakoze vyose, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel17:1 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel17:2 riti Mwana w’ umuntu, sōkōranya, ucire inzu ya Isirayeli umugani," 
Ezekiel17:3 ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Inkukuma niniya, y’amababa manini n’amoya maremare, ifise ivyoya vyinshi vy’amabara atar’ amwe, yaje i Lebanoni, ica agatwetwe k’igiti citwa isederi," 
Ezekiel17:4 mber’ ikinusakw agatwetwe ko mu bushorishori, ikajana mu gihugu c’ ubudandaza, ikarambika mu gisagara c’abahanjuzi." 
Ezekiel17:5 Yābīra kamwe mu mbuto zo mu gihugu, igatera ahantu hamera cane; ikabadika i ruhande y’amazi menshi, igashinga nk’igiti c’umusafusafu." 
Ezekiel17:6 Karakura, kaba umuzabibu urandagira uciye hasi, amashami yawo yerekera kuri ya nkukuma, imizi na yo ishōra musi yayo: nuko kaba umuzabibu, ushamika amashami, uzakw imisagaba." 
Ezekiel17:7 Hāri n’iyindi nkukuma niniya, ifise amababa manini n’ivyoya vyinshi: maz’ uwo muzabibu werekeza imizi kuri yo, uyitumberezako n’amashami, uri mu ntabire aho watewe, kugira ngw iwuvomere." 
Ezekiel17:8 Watewe heza hafi y’ amazi menshi, kugira ng’ ushamike amashami, wame, ube umuzabibu mwiza." 
Ezekiel17:9 Enda vuga, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abaza, ngo Mbeg’ uzototahara? Ya nkukuma ya mbere mbega ntizowurandura imizi, ikawuhanyagurakw inzabibu, kugira ngo wume, n’ibibabi biremvye ngo bikabirane? Mbere kuwusiturana n’ imizi yawo ntivyonanirana, canke ngo birinde gukoranya ingabo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Waratewe koko, ariko mbeg’ uzototahara? Umuyaga w’i burasirazuba ni wawushikako ntuzoca wuma mbega? Uzokwumira mu ntabire aho wakuriye." 
Ezekiel17:11 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel17:12 rit’ Enda barira iyo nzu y’abagarariji, uti Mbega ntimuzi ingen’ ivyo bisobanurwa? Ubabgire, uti Rāba, umwami w’i Babuloni yaje i Yerusalemu, ata mu maboko umwami waho n’abaganwa biwe, abajana i we i Babuloni;" 
Ezekiel17:13 atoranya uwo mu nda y’ ingoma, ashirah’ isezerano na we, amwaka indahiro; kand’ ajana n’ abahambaye bo mu gihugu," 
Ezekiel17:14 kugira ng’ubgami bucishwe bugufi, bgoye kuja hejuru, ariko buhagarikwe no kuguma mw isezerano ryiwe." 
Ezekiel17:15 Yamar’ aramugarariza, atuma intumwa ziwe muri Egiputa, gusaba ngo bamuhe amafarasi n’ingabo nyinshi. Mbeg’ ūkora ibisa birtyo azororanirwa, canke se arokoke? Yokwica isezerano kand’ akarokoka?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize: ku murwa nyene w’umwami yamwimitse, uwo yarahiye indahiro, akayihindura ubusa, akica n’isezerano ryiwe, aho ni ho nyene azogwa, ari hafi yiwe i Babuloni." 
Ezekiel17:17 Kandi Farawo, n’ingabo ziwe zihambaye n’ibitero vyinshi, nta co azomumarira mur’ iyo ntambara, igihe bazorunda ibigunguzi vyo kwūririrako, bakubaka ibihome, kugira ngo bageseze abantu benshi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Kukw iyo ndahiro yarahiye yayihinduje ubusa kwica isezerano; mbere yari yaramanitse ukuboko arahira, kandi none yakoze ivyo vyose: eka ntazorokoka." 
Ezekiel17:19 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje: indahiro yanje yahinduye ubusa, n’isezerano ryanje yishe, nzobimusubiza ku mutwe." 
Ezekiel17:20 Kandi nzomutega ururiba rwanje, afatwe n’umutego wanje, ndamujane i Babuloni, abe ari ho ndamushirira mu rukinja kubg’ ibicumuro yancumuyeko." 
Ezekiel17:21 Kand’ impunzi zo mu ngabo ziwe zose zizohindikiranywa n’inkota, na bo abasigaye bazoshwiragirizwa mu birēre vyose: kandi muzomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho nabivuze." 
Ezekiel17:22 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nanje nzoca agatwetwe ko hejuru ku giti c’isederi, ndagatere; mbere nkinusekw agatwetwe koroshe ko mu bushorishori, ngatere ku mpinga y’umusozi muremure ahibonekeza:" 
Ezekiel17:23 ku musozi muremure w’i Bgisirayeli ni ho nzogatera; na ko kazoshamika amashami, kame imbuto, kabe igiti c’isederi ciza; kand’ inyoni n’ ibisīga vyose vy’amoko yose bizokwibera musi yaco; mu gitūtu c’amashami yaco ni ho bizoba." 
Ezekiel17:24 Maz’ ibiti vyose vyo mw ishamba bizomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho nacishije bugufi igiti kirekire, nshira hejuru igiti kigufi, numishije igiti gitotahaye, ntotahaza igiti cumye: jewe Uhoraho narabivuze, ndabishitsa." 
Ezekiel18:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel18:2 riti N’iki gituma mucira uyu mugani mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, ngo Ba se barya inzabibu z’ibitumbge, amenyo y’abana akajiginyurwa?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ntimuzokwongera kuronka inyanduruko yo guca uwo mugani mu Bisirayeli." 
Ezekiel18:4 Eh’ abantu bose n’ abanje; nk’uk’ umwana ar’ uwanje, ni ko na se ar’ uwanje: umuntu akora icaha ni we azopfa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Arik’ umuntu namb, ar’ umugororotsi, agakora ibitunganye n’ ibikwiye," 
Ezekiel18:6 akaba atārīriye mu bitabo ku misozi, ntiyunamurire amaso ibigirwamana vy’inzu ya Isirayeli, kand’ akaba atononnye umugore wa mugenzi we, akaba atēgereye umugore mu gihe ari mu miziro;" 
Ezekiel18:7 atāgize uwo agunga, arikw akaba yarashubije ingwati nyeneyo; atāgize uwo anyaga ku gahahazo, arikw akaba yaragaburiye ūshonje, akambika impuzu uwambaye ubusa;" 
Ezekiel18:8 akaba atāgurāniye kuzohabga ay’ inyungu, canke ngo yake ibirenzeko na bikeya, arikw agatinyisha ukuboko kwiwe ivyaha, agaca ururoranye ku muntu na mugenzi we," 
Ezekiel18:9 akagendera mu vyagezwe vyanje, akitondera amabgirizwa yanje ngw akore ivy’ ukuri; ben’ uyo aba ar’ umugororotsi, ntazobura kubaho, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel18:10 Arikw avyaye umwana akaba umwambuzi, akaba n’umwicanyi, akagira ico akora muri ben’ ivyo," 
Ezekiel18:11 ntagire ico akora co mu vyari bikwiye, arikw akarīra mu bitabo ku misozi, akonona umugore wa mugenzi we," 
Ezekiel18:12 akagunga impahazwa n’umukene, akanyaga ku gahahazo, akima ingwati nyeneyo, akunamurira amaso ibigirwamana, kand’ agakora ibizira," 
Ezekiel18:13 akagurānira kuzohabga ay’ inyungu, akāka ibirenzeko: ben’ uyo mbega yobaho? Eka ntiyobaho: ko yoba yarakoze ivyo bizira vyose, ntiyobura gupfa; kand’ amaraso yiwe azoba kuri we." 
Ezekiel18:14 Nuko rero n’uyo na we yovyara umwana, akitegereza ivyaha vyose vya se yakoze, agatinya, ntakore ibisa na vyo," 
Ezekiel18:15 kand’ akaba atārīriye mu bitabo ku misozi, ntiyunamurire amaso ibigirwamana vy’inzu ya Isirayeli, ntiyonone umugore wa mugenzi we," 
Ezekiel18:16 ntāgire uwo agunga, ntāgire uwo yaka ingwati, ntānyage ku gahahazo, arikw akaba yaragaburiye ūshonje, akambika impuzu uwambaye ubusa," 
Ezekiel18:17 agatinyisha ukuboko kwiwe ngo ntigufyonderanye impahazwa, akaba atāgurāniye kuzohabga ay’ inyungu, ntiyake ibirenzeko, arikw agashitsa amabgirizwa yanje, akagendera mu vyagezwe vyanje: uyo ntazopfa azira ibigabitanyo vya se, mbere ntazobura kubaho." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ariko se wiwe, kuko yahahaza cane, akanyaga mugenzi we ku gahahazo, agakora ibitaroranye mu bgoko bgabo, uyo ni we azopfa azize ibigabitanyo vyiwe." 
Ezekiel18:19 Yamara muravuga ng’ Umwana n’iki kimubujije kuzira ibigabitanyo vya se? Ereg’ umwana ni yakora ibitunganye n’ibikwiye, akitondera ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, akabishitsa, ntazobura kubaho." 
Ezekiel18:20 Umuntu akora icaha ni we azopfa: umwana ntazozira ibigabitanyo vya se, na se ntazozira ibigabitanyo vy’umwana wiwe; ubugororotsi bg’umugororotsi azobuharūrwako, ivyaha vy’umunyavyaha azobiharūrwako." 
Ezekiel18:21 Arik’ umunyavyaha ni yahindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe vyose yakora, akitondera ivyagezwe vyanje vyose, agakora ibitunganye n’ibikwiye, n’ukuri azobaho, ntazopfa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Ibicumuro vyiwe vyose yacumuye nta na kimwe kizokwibukwa ngo gishirwe kuri we; azobeshwaho n’uko yakoze ivy’ ukugororoka. 
Ezekiel18:23 Mbega mugira ngo mpimbarwa n’uk’ umunyavyaha apfa? ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho abaza; ikimpimbara s’uko yohindukira akava mu ngeso ziwe akabaho? 
Ezekiel18:24 Arik’ umugororotsi ni yahindukira akava mu bugororotsi bgiwe, agakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, akīgāna ibizira vyose umunyakibi akora, mbega yobaho? Mu bikorwa vy’ubugororotsi vyose yakoze, nta na kimwe kizokwibukwa: ubuhemu bgiwe yagize, n’ivyaha vyiwe yakoze, ni vyo azopfa azize." 
Ezekiel18:25 Yamara muravuga, mut’ Inzira y’Umwami Imana ntiroranye. Enda ni mwumve, mwa b’inzu ya Isirayeli: mbega mugira ngw inzira yanje ni yo itaroranye? Non’ izanyu nzira si zo zitaroranye?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Umugororotsi ni yahindukira akava mu bugororotsi bgiwe, agakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, azopfa abizize; ibigabitanyo vyiwe yakoze ni vyo azopfa azize." 
Ezekiel18:27 Ariko kandi, umunyavyaha ni yahindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe yakora, agakora ibitunganye n’ ibikwiye, azokiza ubugingo bgiwe urupfu." 
Ezekiel18:28 Kuko yīrīmbūye agahindukira akava mu bicumuro vyiwe vyose yakoze, n’ukuri azobaho, ntazopfa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Yamar’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli baravuga, ngw Inzira y’Umwami Imana ntiroranye. Mwa b’inzu ya Isirayeli, mbega mugira ngw inzira yanje ni yo itaroranye? Non’ izanyu nzira si zo zitaroranye?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Ni co gituma, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ngira mbacire urubanza, umuntu wese nk’ukw inzira ziwe zimeze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize. Ni mugaruke, muhindukire muve mu bicumuro vyanyu vyose, ibigabitanyo vyoye kubazanira kugesezwa." 
Ezekiel18:31 Ni mute kure ibicumuro vyanyu vyose mwacumuye, mwironkere umutima musha n’impwemu nsha: n’iki gituma mugomba gupfa, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Erega simpimbarwa n’ urupfu rw’ūpfuye, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize: nuko ni muhindukire, mubeho." 
Ezekiel19:1 Ikindi, cura intimba uririre inda y’ingoma y’Abisirayeli," 
Ezekiel19:2 uti Nyoko yar’ iki? Yar’ intambge y’ingore: yigaramangira mu zindi ntambge, ikonkereza ibibunda vyayo hagati mu migunza y’ intambge." 
Ezekiel19:3 Kimwe mur’ ivyo bibunda vyayo ikireze, kiba umugunza w’intambge: nuko yiga guhīga, iromagira n’abantu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Maz’ amahanga yumva ivyayo, ikorokera mu cobo ayo mahanga yayimbiye: bayikwegesha ingōgo z’ivyuma, bayijana mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel19:5 Maze nyina ibonye kw iyirorereye iyihebuye, ica yābīra ikindi co mu bibunda vyayo, igihindura umugunza w’intambge." 
Ezekiel19:6 Nuko kigendagenda mu zindi ntambge, kiba umugunza w’intambge; yiga guhīga, iromagira n’abantu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Maz’ isangangura ingoro zabo, itikiza ibisagara vyabo; igihugu cononekarana n’ibirimwo vyose, kubgo kwumva ukwivuga kwayo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Maz’ amahanga arayitera baturutse mu bihugu impande zose; bayita mu ruriba rwabo, ikorokera mu cobo bayimbiye." 
Ezekiel19:9 Bayishikana mu mpatane bayikwegesheje ingōgo z’ivyuma, bayishīra umwami w’i Babuloni; bayishira mu maboma, kugira ngw ijwi ryayo ntirize risubire kwumvikana ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Nyoko yar’ ameze nk’umuzabibu, nk’uko nawe umeze, nk’ umuzabibu watewe hafi y’amazi, wama cane, ukagira amashami menshi, kubgo kuba ku mazi abugereye." 
Ezekiel19:11 Kandi warikw ishami rinoze ryagizwe inkoni y’umwami y’ubugabe, yar’ inungereye hejuru hagati mu mashami yitwaye intunda, yaribonekeza hejuru n’udushorishori twayo twinshi." 
Ezekiel19:12 Arik’ uwo muzabibu waranduranywe uburake, utsindwa hasi, maz’ umuyaga uva i burasirazuba wumisha inzabibu zawo; rya shami ryawo rinoze rirahanyurwa rirakabirana, umuriro urariturira." 
Ezekiel19:13 Noneho watewe mu bugaragwa, mu gihugu cumye kigataye." 
Ezekiel19:14 Kand’ umuriro wavuye muri rya shami, uturira ayandi mashami yawo, n’inzabibu zawo, bituma ata shami rinoze ryo kuvamw’ inkoni y’ubugabe yo kuganzisha iwusigarako. Ayo majambo n’ay’ agacurantimba, kand’ azohora acurishwa intimba." 
Ezekiel20:1 Nuko mu mwaka w’indwi, mu kwezi kwa gatanu, ku musi ugira icumi w’ukwo kwezi, haza bamwe bo mu bakuru b’ Abisirayeli gusiguza Uhoraho, bicara imbere yanje." 
Ezekiel20:2 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel20:3 riti Mwana w’umuntu, vuga, ubarire abakuru b’Abisirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngo Mbega mwazanywe no kugira ico munsiguza? Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho mbivuze, nta co nzosiguzwa namwe." 
Ezekiel20:4 Mbega ntiwobacira urubanza, ga mwana w’umuntu, ntiwobacira urubanza? Bamenyeshe ibizira vya ba sekuruza." 
Ezekiel20:5 Ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngo Ku musi natoranijeko Isirayeli, nkamanika ukuboko ndahiye uruvyaro rw’inzu ya Yakobo, nkabiyerekera mu gihugu ca Egiputa, igihe namanika ukuboko mbarahira, nti Nd’Uhoraho Imana yanyu;" 
Ezekiel20:6 ni kur’ uwo musi nyene namanitse ukuboko mbarahira ko nzobakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa nkabajana mu gihugu nabatoreye, igihugu gitemba amata n’ubūki, igihugu c’agaheta mu bihugu vyose." 
Ezekiel20:7 Ndaheza ndababgira, nt’ Umuntu wese n’ate kure ibizira yamizakw ijisho, mwoye kwihumanisha ibigirwamana vyo muri Egiputa; ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ariko barangararije, banka kunyumvira; nta n’umwe yataye ibizira yamizakw ijisho, kandi ntibāhevye ibigirwamana vyo muri Egiputa. Maze nca mvuga ko nzobasukak’ uburake bganje, nkabīmarirakw ishavu mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ariko narwaniye izina ryanje, ngo ntirikēngēreke mu maso y’amahanga barimwo, ari yo nyene ubgayo nabiyerekeye imbere, igihe nabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel20:10 Nuko mbakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa mbajana mu bugaragwa. 
Ezekiel20:11 Maze mbaha amabgirizwa yanje, mbamenyesha n’ ivyagezwe vyanje, ari vyo bibeshah’ ūvyitondeye." 
Ezekiel20:12 Ikigeretseko, mbaha n’amasabato yanje, ngw abe ikimenyetso hagati yanje na bo, kugira ngo bamenye yukw ari jewe Uhoraho mbeza." 
Ezekiel20:13 Arikw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bārangararije bari mu bugaragwa: ntibāgendera mu mabgirizwa yanje, ariko bāgaye ivyagezwe vyanje, kand’ ari vyo bibeshah’ ūvyitondeye; kandi n’amasabato yanje bārayaziruye rwose. Nuko rero nca mmaramaza ko ngiye kubasukak’ uburake bganje bari mu bugaragwa, mbaherengeteze." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ariko narwaniye izina ryanje, ngo ntirikēngēreke mu maso y’ amahanga, ari yo nyene yar’ abahanze amaso igihe nabakūrayo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Yamara kandi namanitse ukuboko, ndabarahirira mu bugaragwa yuko ntazobashitsa mu gihugu nabahaye, kimwe gitemba amata n’ ubūki, igihugu c’agaheta mu bihugu vyose," 
Ezekiel20:16 mbitewe n’uko bāgaye ivyagezwe vyanje, ntibagendere mu mabgirizwa yanje, bagakēngēra n’amasabato yanje, kukw imitima yabo yakurikira ibigirwamana vyabo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Yamar’ ijisho ryanje rirabaziguriza sinabahonnya, sinabaherengetereza rwose mu bugaragwa." 
Ezekiel20:18 Maze nabaririye abana babo mu bugaragwa, nti Ntimukagendere mu mabgirizwa ya ba so, kandi ntimukitondere ivyagezwe vyabo, canke ngo mwihumanishe ibigirwamana vyabo." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu: ni mugendere mu mabgirizwa yanje, mukomeze ivyagezwe vyanje muvyitondere," 
Ezekiel20:20 mweze amasabato yanje, abe ikimenyetso hagati yanje namwe, kugira ngo mumenye yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Arikw abana babo na bo bārangararije; ntibāgendera mu mabgirizwa yanje, ntibakomeza ivyagezwe vyanje ngo bavyitondere, kand’ ari vyo bibeshah’ ūvyitondeye; bāzirūye amasabato yanje; nuko rero nca mvuga ko ngiye kubasukak’ uburake bganje, nkabīmarirakw ishavu mu bugaragwa." 
Ezekiel20:22 Yamara nagaruye ukuboko kwanje, ndwanira izina ryanje ngo ntirikēngēreke mu maso y’amahanga, ari yo nyene yabahanze amaso igihe nabakūrayo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Nongeye kumanika ukuboko, ndabarahirira mu bugaragwa yuko nzobasanzaza mu mahanga, nkabashwiragiriza mu bihugu," 
Ezekiel20:24 kuko batāshikije ivyagezwe vyanje, ariko bakagaya n’amabgirizwa yanje, bakazirūra amasabato yanje, amaso yabo bakayahanga ibigirwamana vya ba sekuruza." 
Ezekiel20:25 Nuko mbaha amabgirizwa ataroranye, n’ivyagezwe bitababeshaho;" 
Ezekiel20:26 kandi mbahumanisha amashikanwa yabo ubgabo, kuko bātanze imfura zabo zose kw ibimazi ngo zoswe mu muriro, kugira ngo ndabajonjogoze, baruhe bamenye yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel20:27 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, vuga ubgire ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ikindi, ba sogokuruza bandogoseko mu buhemu bgabo;" 
Ezekiel20:28 kuko, mmaze kubashitsa mu gihugu, ico narahiye mmanitse ukuboko ko nzobaha, uko babonye umusozi wose muremure n’igiti cose gitotahaye, baciye bahatangira ibimazi vyabo, baba ari ho bashikanira ishikanwa ryabo ryo kundatsa; ni ho batangiye ibizana imibabge imota neza, bakahasukira amashikanwa yabo y’ibiturire." 
Ezekiel20:29 Maze ndababaza, nt’ Inyanduruko y’ivyo bitabo mujamwo n’ inki? Ni co catumye izina ryavyo ryitwa Ibitabo vyo ku mpinga z’imisozi gushitsa na bugingo n’ ubu." 
Ezekiel20:30 Nuko rero bgira ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abaza, ngo Mbega ntimwihumanya nk’uko ba sogokuruza bāgize, mukagenda muhurumbira ibizira vyabo nk’ibimaka?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Kand’ iyo mushikana amashikanwa, mugatanga abana banyu kw ibimazi ngo boswe mu muriro, ntimuba mwihumanishije ivyo bigirwamana vyanyu vyose, gushitsa na bugingo n’ubu? None noshobora nte ko mwogira ico munsiguza, ga mwebge ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli? Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nkazogira ico nsiguzwa namwe." 
Ezekiel20:32 Kandi ko muvuga ngo Muzomera nk’ayandi mahanga, mube nk’imiryango yo mu bindi bihugu, mukorere ibigirwamana vy’ibiti n’ amabuye: mu vyo mwibgira mu mitima nta na kimwe kizoshika." 
Ezekiel20:33 Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, n’ ukuri ngira mbe Umwami wanyu, mbaganzishe ukuboko gukomeye kandi kubanguye, n’uburake busukumbuka." 
Ezekiel20:34 Kandi nzobakūra mu mahanga, mbakoranirize hamwe mbakūje mu bihugu mwasanzariyemwo ukuboko gukomeye kandi kubanguye, n’uburake busukumbuka;" 
Ezekiel20:35 maze mbajane mu bugaragwa bg’abanyamahanga, ni ho nzobabūraniriza duhanganye amaso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nk’uko nabūranije ba sogokuruza banyu mu bugaragwa bgo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, ni ko nzobabūranya namwe, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel20:37 Kandi nzobaharūza inkoni mugenda mutonze umurongo, mbashire mu mugozi ni ryo sezerano;" 
Ezekiel20:38 kandi nzokūra muri mwebge abagarariji n’abancumuyeko, mbakūre mu gihugu barimwo, ariko ntibazoshika mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli: nuko muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel20:39 Namwe, mwebge ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Hogi ni mugende, umuntu wese n’asabe ibigirwamana vyiwe! Ariko hanyuma muzonyumvira, kand’ izina ryanje ryera ntimuzoba mukirihumanisha amashikanwa yanyu n’ibigirwamana vyanyu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Kuko ku musozi wanje wera, ari wo musozi muremure w’i Bgisirayeli, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ari ho ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bose, n’abari mu gihugu bose bazoza kunsaba: aho ni ho nzobākīrira neza, ni ho nzobatumira amashikanwa, n’umushuzo w’imperezwa zanyu, n’ ibintu vyanyu vyose vyejejwe." 
Ezekiel20:41 Nzobākīra nk’imibabge imota neza, aho nzobakūrira mu banyamahanga, nkabakoraniriza hamwe mbakūye mu bihugu mwasanzariyemwo; kandi nzokwiyerekanira muri mwebge imbere y’abanyamahanga ko nd’ Uwera." 
Ezekiel20:42 Namwe muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, igihe nzobashitsa mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, ico narahiye ba sogokuruza mmanitse ukuboko ko nzobaha." 
Ezekiel20:43 Aho ni ho muzokwibukira ingeso zanyu n’ibikorwa vyanyu vyose, ivyo mwihumanishije; nuko muzokwiyanka kubg’ ivyaha vyanyu vyose mwakoze." 
Ezekiel20:44 Kandi muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, ni namara kugira ico mbakorera kubg’ izina ryanje, kidahwanye n’ingeso zanyu mbi, cank’ ibikorwa vyanyu bihumanye, mwebge ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel20:45 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel20:46 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe i bumanuko, utumey’ ijambo ryawe, ubūrire ikibira co mu kiyaya c’i bumanuko," 
Ezekiel20:47 ubgire ico kibira caho, uti Ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngw Ehe ngira nkudomekek’ umuriro kand’ uzotongora igiti kibisi cose co muri wewe, n’igiti cumye cose: ibirimi vy’ibibengebenge vyawo ntibizohwamikwa, mu maso h’abantu bose hazobabuka uhereye i bumanuko ukageza i burārūko." 
Ezekiel20:48 Maz’ abafise umubiri bose bazobona kw ari jewe Uhoraho nawudometse: kandi ntuzohwamikwa. 
Ezekiel20:49 Maze ndavuga, nti Yō! Ewe Mwami Uhoraho! Erega baramvuga, ngo Mbeg’ uyo si gacamigani?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel21:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe i Yerusalemu, utume ijambo ryawe ahēra h’ urusengero, ubūrire igihugu c’i Bgisirayeli;" 
Ezekiel21:3 ico gihugu ukibarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize: ngw Ehe nzohigūra namwe, kandi ngira nsokōre inkota yanje mu rwubati rwayo, ndirike abagororotsi n’abanyakibi muri wewe." 
Ezekiel21:4 Nuko rero, kuko ngira ndirike abagororotsi n’abanyakibi muri wewe, ni co gituma inkota yanje igira ive mu rwubati rwayo itere abafise umubiri bose, uhereye i bumanuko ugashitsa i burārūko:" 
Ezekiel21:5 maz’ abafise umubiri bose bazomenya yuko jewe, Uhoraho, nasokoye inkota yanje mu rwubati rwayo; ntizosubira muri rwo ukundi." 
Ezekiel21:6 Nukw enda niha, ewe mwana w’umuntu, unihire imbere yabo kubg’ umutima usāvye no kubg’ intuntu nyinshi." 
Ezekiel21:7 Maze ni bakubaza, ngw Igituma uniha n’ iki? uz’ ubabgire, uti Mbitewe n’ inkuru mbi y’ibigira bize; umutima wose uzohababuka, amaboko yose adendebuke; umushaha wose uzocika ivutu, n’amavi yose aregarege acike nk’amazi: ehe biraje, bigira bishireko, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel21:8 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel21:9 riti Mwana w’umuntu, vuga ubūre, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ngo ni mvuge, nt’ Inkota, inkota, irakarihijwe kand’ irartyorowe;" 
Ezekiel21:10 yakarihijwe kugira ngw iririke; yartyorowe kugira ngw ibe nk’umuravyo: none twoja aho, tukitwengera? Inkoni y’umwana wanje igaya izindi zakūwe mu giti cose." 
Ezekiel21:11 Iyo nkota yatanzwe ngw irtyororwe ngw ibone gukoreshwa: iyo nkota yakarihijwe, mbere yartyorowe, kugira ngw ishirwe mu kuboko kw’ūririka." 
Ezekiel21:12 Turikisha uboroge, mwana w’umuntu, kukw ibanguriwe abantu banje, ibanguriwe abaganwa bose b’Abisirayeli: bagerewe inkota hamwe n’abantu banje: shirako wishishitire." 
Ezekiel21:13 Kukw amateka aciwe: kandi namb’ iyo nkoni yagayana itakiriho, vyomera bite? ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abaza." 
Ezekiel21:14 Nuko rero weho, mwana w’umuntu, ubūre, ukubite amashi ku yandi: inkota n’ikubite kabiri, mbere n’ubugira gatatu, ni yo nkota ikomeretsa akagīrīre: inkota yakomerekeje ūhambaye akagīrīre, ni yo yinjiye no mu mazu yabo." 
Ezekiel21:15 Kand’ iyo nkota iteye ubgoba nayibanguye ku marembo yabo yose, kugira ngw imitima yabo iyagire mu nda, n’ ugutsitara kwabo kwongerekane. Yō! Imeze nk’umuravyo, yasongorewe kuririka." 
Ezekiel21:16 Wa nkota we, ikazanure, utere i buryo; itegure, utere i bubamfu, aho werekeye hose!" 
Ezekiel21:17 Nanje n’uko nzokubita amashi ku yandi, kandi nzokwimara ishavu: ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Ezekiel21:18 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel21:19 rit’ Ikindi kandi, mwana w’umuntu, toborera inzira zibiri inkota y’umwami w’i Babuloni ngw ibone kuza; zompi zizova mu gihugu kimwe: uheze ushireh’ icapa, ugishire ah’ inzira ija ku murwa ishamikiye." 
Ezekiel21:20 Utoborere inzira iyo nkota ngw ije ahitwa i Raba h’ubgoko bg’Abamoni, n’iyindi ngw ije i Buyuda i Yerusalemu hazitijwe inzitiro z’ amabuye." 
Ezekiel21:21 Kuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni ahagaze mu mayirabiri, ah’ izo nzira zompi zishamikiye, kugira ngw araguze: azungagiza imyampi, akaraguza ibigirwamana vyitwa terafimu, agasuzuma igitigu." 
Ezekiel21:22 Mu kuboko kwiwe kw’i buryo ni ho haranze i Yerusalemu, ngw ahomvoze inzitiro zaho ibiti vy’imigogo, yasamire abazoharirikirwa, ashire hejuru avuze akarūru, ahomvoze amarembo ibiti vy’ imigogo, akirundire ibigunguzi vyo kwūririrako, yubake n’ibihome vyo kuhatera." 
Ezekiel21:23 Arikw ab’i Yerusalemu bo bazovyita nk’indagu z’ ibinyoma, kubg’ indahiro bābarahiye: arikw azokwibuka ibigabitanyo vyabo, kandi ni vyo bizotuma bafatwa." 
Ezekiel21:24 Nuko rer’ uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko mwatumye ibigabitanyo vyanyu vyibukwa, ibicumuro vyanyu bigatwikururwa, bigatuma ivyaha vyanyu biserukira mu bikorwa vyanyu vyose, kandi ko mwibutswe, muzofatwa ukuboko." 
Ezekiel21:25 Nawe, wa munyakibi wakomerekejwe akagīrīre, wa mwami w’Abisirayeli, washitsweko n’umusi wawe, igihe giherahereza ibigabitanyo vyawe;" 
Ezekiel21:26 uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kūra umugāra, wiyambure igitsibo; ntibizosubira kumera nk’ uko vyari bisanzwe. Icāri hasi kizoshirwa hejuru, kand’ icāri hejuru kizosubizwa hasi." 
Ezekiel21:27 Amatongo, amatongo, nzobigira amatongo masa: kandi ni ko bizokwama, gushitsa igihe nyenevyo azozira; nanje nzobimuha." 
Ezekiel21:28 Nawe, mwana w’umuntu, vuga ubūre, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize ku vy’ubgoko bg’ Abamoni, no ku vy’igitutsi cabgo; maz’ uvuge, ut’ Inkota, inkota irasokowe, yartyororewe kuririka, kugira ngw imaririkanye, ibe nk’ umuravyo:" 
Ezekiel21:29 bākuroteye inzozi z’ubusa, n’indagu z’ibinyoma, ngo ni wewe uzoyibangurira ku mazosi y’abanyakibi bākomerekejwe akagīrīre, abo umusi wabo washitseko, mu gihe giherahereza ibigabitanyo vyabo." 
Ezekiel21:30 Yisubize mu rwubati rwayo. Ahantu waremewe, mu gihugu wavukiyemwo, aho ni ho nzogucirira urubanza." 
Ezekiel21:31 Kandi nzokurekurirak’ ubushangashirwe bganje, nkwakirizek’ umuriro w’ uburake bganje, nkugabure mu maboko y’abantu bameze nk’ibikōko, bazi guhonnya." 
Ezekiel21:32 Uzoba inkwi z’umuriro; n’amaraso yawe azodēngēra hagati mu gihugu; kandi ntuzosubira kwibukwa ukundi: kuko jewe Uhoraho mbivuze. 
Ezekiel22:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel22:2 riti Nawe, mwana w’umuntu, mbega ntiwogicira urubanza, ntiwogicira urubanza, ca gisagara kivisha amaraso? Nuk’ ukimenyeshe ibizira vyaco vyose." 
Ezekiel22:3 Kand’ uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ewe wa gisagara kivishiriza amaraso hagati muri co kugira ngw igihe caco gishike, kikīronderera ibigirwamana ngo ciyanduze!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Wikwegeye gucirwakw iteka kubg’ amaraso wavishije, kandi wiyandurishije ibigirwamana wirondereye; ni wewe wateye kw igihe cawe kigushikako, mber’ ushitse ku ntozo y’imyaka yawe: kubg’ ivyo nguhinduye igitutsi mu mahanga, n’agatwengo mu bihugu vyose." 
Ezekiel22:5 Abari hafi yawe n’abari kure yawe bazogucokora, wewe uw’ izina ryanduye, wuzuyemw’ imivurungano." 
Ezekiel22:6 Rāba abaganwa b’Abisirayeli baba muri wewe uko bangana bakoresha ububasha bgabo kuvisha amaraso. 
Ezekiel22:7 Ababa muri wewe bakēngēra ba se na ba nyina; muri wewe ni ho bahahariza umuntu w’akavantara; muri wewe ni ho barīra impfuvyi n’ abapfakazi. 
Ezekiel22:8 Watītūye ivyera vyanje, uzirūra n’amasabato yanje." 
Ezekiel22:9 Muri wewe haba abarementaniriza abandi ngo babicishe; muri wewe haba abarīra mu bitabo ku misozi; hagati muri wewe bāhakoreye ivy’ ubushakanyi. 
Ezekiel22:10 Muri wewe bonona baka se; muri wewe bafata abagore bari mu miziro. 
Ezekiel22:11 Umuntu akorana ibizira n’ umugore w’umubanyi wiwe; uwundi yononesha ubushakanyi umukazana wiwe; uwundi wo muri wewe afata mushiki we basangiye se. 
Ezekiel22:12 Muri wewe bābīra ingurire yo kuvisha amaraso; waka ay’ inyungu ku ngurāne, ukāka n’ ibirenzeko, uronka inyungu kuri bagenzi bawe ku gahotoro, ariko jewe waranyibagiye; ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel22:13 Nuko rero, ehe rāba, kubg’ inyungu z’ubugunge waronse, no kubg’ amaraso yaviriye muri wewe, bitumye nkubita amashi ku yandi." 
Ezekiel22:14 Mbeg’ umutima wawe uzoshobora kwihangana, cank’ amaboko yawe azokomera, mu misi nzobikubaza? ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kandi nzobikora." 
Ezekiel22:15 Nzogushwiragiriza mu mahanga, ngusābagirize mu bihugu; kandi nzokumaramw’ ubuhumane bgawe." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ni wewe ubgawe uzoba wariyandurije imbere y’amahanga; maz’ uzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho. 
Ezekiel22:17 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel22:18 riti Mwana w’umuntu, inzu ya Isirayeli yampindukiye nk’ inkamba: bose ni nk’imiringa n’ amabati n’ivyuma n’amasāsu, biri hagati mu ziko ryo mu ruganda; bahindutse nk’inkamba z’ifeza." 
Ezekiel22:19 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Mwese ko mwahindutse nk’inkamba, nuko rāba, ngiye kubakoraniriza muri Yerusalemu hagati." 
Ezekiel22:20 Nk’uko bakoraniriza ifeza n’imiringa n’ivyuma n’amasāsu n’amabati hagati mu ziko, bakabivugutira n’umuriro ngo bishonge, uko ni ko namwe nzobakoraniriza hamwe mfise uburake n’ubushangashirwe, mbarambikeho mbashongeshe." 
Ezekiel22:21 Mbere nzobakoraniriza hamwe, mbavugutire n’umuriro w’uburake bganje, mushongere hagati muri Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nk’ukw ifeza ishongera hagati mu ziko, ni ko namwe muzoshongera hagati muri ho; kandi muzomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho nabarekuriyek’ ubushangashirwe bganje." 
Ezekiel22:23 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel22:24 riti Mwana w’umuntu, ico gihugu ukibgire, ut’ Ur’ igihugu kidatunganye, kitazoronka imvura ku musi w’uburake." 
Ezekiel22:25 Abaganwa baho bagīriye inama y’ubugarariji hagati muri ho, nk’ukw intambge itabagura ico ihīze: batsontsomeye abantu; banyaze ubutunzi n’ivy’ igiciro; bapfakaje benshi hagati muri ho." 
Ezekiel22:26 Abaherezi baho bishe ivyagezwe vyanje ku manyama, bazirūye ivyera vyanje: ntibashize itandukaniro hagati y’ivyera n’ibitar’ ivyera, canke ngo bamenyeshe abantu uko bakwiye gutandukanya ibihumanye n’ibidahumanye, kandi n’amasabato yanje barayirengagije; nuko nsigaye nkēngēretse muri bo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Abaganwa baho bameze nk’amabingira atabagura ico ahīze; bavisha amaraso, bagahonnya abantu, ngo bironkere inyungu." 
Ezekiel22:28 Na ba kamenyi baho babahomeshereje ingwa, berekwa ubusa, babaragurira ibinyoma, bat’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, kand’ Uhoraho ata co yavuze." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu b’abanyagihugu barahahaza bakambura; mbere bakagirira nabi umugorwa n’umukene, bakadendereza umuntu w’akavantara." 
Ezekiel22:30 Kandi narondeye umuntu muri bo yosana uruzitiro, agahagarara imbere yanje mu kirengero ahagarariye igihugu, ngo noye kugihonnya; ariko nta n’umwe nabonye." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ni co catumye mbarekurirak’ ubushangashirwe bganje, nkabamarisha umuriro w’uburake bganje: ingeso zabo nazibashubije ku mitwe, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel23:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel23:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, habayeh’ abagore babiri basangiye nyina:" 
Ezekiel23:3 maze basambanira muri Egiputa; bahēreye gusambana bakir’ inkumi; aho ni ho amabere yabo yakabakabiwe, amabere yabo yo mu bukumi bakayakorakora." 
Ezekiel23:4 Amazina yabo, umukuru yitwa Ohola, na murumuna we yitwa Oholiba: hanyuma ndabābīra, bacika abanje, bavyara abahungu n’abakobga. Ayo mazina yabo, Ohola ni we Samariya, na we Oholiba ni Yerusalemu." 
Ezekiel23:5 Maze, Ohola amaze kuba uwanje, acika maraya; kandi yagomwa abūzure biwe, ni bo Bashuri, ababanyi biwe;" 
Ezekiel23:6 bose bār’ imisore iteye igomwe, bār’ abagabisha n’ abatware, bambaye impuzu z’ amasufe, bagendera ku mafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:7 Nukw abahurumbira nk’ikimaka, ni bo ntōre zose zo muri Ashuri, yiyanduza k’uwo yagomba wese no ku bigirwamana vyabo vyose." 
Ezekiel23:8 Kandi ntiyaretse ubumaka bgiwe yagize uhereye ari muri Egiputa; kuko mu buto bgiwe bāryamanye na we, bagakorakora ku mabere yo mu bukumi bgiwe, kandi bakamugwizak’ ubusambanyi bgabo." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ni co catumye ndamutanga mu maboko y’abūzure biwe, mu maboko y’Abashuri, abo yagomwa." 
Ezekiel23:10 Nukw abo batwikurura ibiteye isoni vyiwe; batwara abahungu biwe n’abakobga biwe, na we ubgiwe bamwicisha inkota: nuko kuko bāmuciriyekw iteka, ahinduka akābarore mu bagore." 
Ezekiel23:11 Nuko murumuna we Oholiba abona ivyo, yamar’ amurusha kwihumanya mu kugenda agomwa kwiwe, ubumaka bgiwe buruta ubga mukuru we." 
Ezekiel23:12 Yagomwa Abashuri ni bo babanyi biwe, bār’ abagabisha n’abatware, bāri bambaye ibishajije rwose, bagendera ku mafarasi, bose ar’ imisore iteye igomwe." 
Ezekiel23:13 Nuko mbona ko yononekaye, kandi ko bompi barondetse mu nzira imwe." 
Ezekiel23:14 Mbere agwiza ubumaka bgiwe; kuko yitegereje abagabo bashushanijwe ku rusika, ibishushanyo vy’Abakaludaya bishushanijwe mw ibara ry’agahama," 
Ezekiel23:15 bakenyeje imikanda mu rukenyerero, bīteze ibitambara vy’amabara bitendera mu mitwe yabo, bose baboneka kw ar’ abo mu nda y’ingoma, basa n’ab’i Babuloni h’i Bukaludaya, igihugu c’amavuka yabo." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ako kanya abakubise amaso, aca arabagomwa, abatumakw intumwa i Bukaludaya." 
Ezekiel23:17 Maz’ ab’i Babuloni baraza, bamusanga ku buriri yabengukirwako, bamwononesha ubusambanyi bgabo, mbere ahumanywa na bo; hanyuma umutima wiwe urabazinukwa." 
Ezekiel23:18 Uko ni ko yagaragaje ubusambanyi bgiwe, agatwikurura ibiteye isoni vyiwe: nanje umutima wanje uca uramuzinukwa na we, nk’uko wazinutswe mukuru we." 
Ezekiel23:19 Yamara yakomeje kugwiza ubumaka bgiwe, yibuka imisi yo mu buto bgiwe, igihe yīgira maraya mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel23:20 Agomwa abasambanyi baho, bafise umubiri umeze nk’uw’ indogoba, bagashuha nk’ amafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:21 Uko ni ko wibukirije ubushakanyi bgo mu buto bgawe, igihe Abanyegiputa bakabakaba amabere yawe, bagakorakora ku mabere yo mu bukumi bgawe." 
Ezekiel23:22 Nuko rero, yewe Oholiba, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba, ngiye kukuvyukiriza ba būzure bawe, abo umutima wawe wazinutswe, mbazane kugutera baguturutse impande zose:" 
Ezekiel23:23 ni bo b’i Babuloni, n’Abakaludaya bose, n’ab’i Pekodi n’i Showa n’i Kowa, bo n’abo muri Ashuri bose; imisore iteye igomwe, abagabisha n’abatware bose, n’abaganwa n’ abantu ba rurangiranwa, bose bagendera ku mafarasi." 
Ezekiel23:24 Nuko bazogutera bafise ibirwanishwa, n’imikogote y’intambara n’iyitwara ibintu, n’isinzi ry’amahanga; bazotonda urugamba bakurwanye, bagutangatanze impande zose, bafise inkinzo nto‐nto na nini‐nini n’inkofero z’ivyuma: kandi nzoshira imanza mu maboko yabo, bagucire urubanza, nk’ukw imanza zabo ziri." 
Ezekiel23:25 Nzokurekurirakw ifuhe ryanje, na bo bazoguhanana inzigo; bazoguca amazuru n’ amatwi, kand’ amasigarira yawe azoririkwa n’inkota; bazotwara abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe, maz’ amasigarira yawe azotikizwa n’umuriro." 
Ezekiel23:26 Bazogukoba n’imyambaro yawe, bakwake n’utugenegene twawe twiza." 
Ezekiel23:27 Uko ni ko nzozimiriza ubushakanyi bgawe, n’ubumaka bgawe wakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, woye no kuzosubira kubunamurirakw amaso canke no kuzokwibuka Egiputa ukundi." 
Ezekiel23:28 Kuk’ ukw ari k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba ngira nkugabure mu maboko y’ abo wanka, mu maboko y’abo umutima wawe wazinutswe;" 
Ezekiel23:29 na bo bazoguhanana urwanko, bakunyage ivyo waruhiye vyose, bagusige amēnya wambaye ubusa; kand’ ubgambure bg’ubumaka bgawe buzogaragazwa, ubushakanyi bgawe n’ubumaka bgawe vyompi." 
Ezekiel23:30 Ivyo ni vyo uzogirirwa, kukw amahanga wayahurumbiye nk’ikimaka, ukanduzwa n’ibigirwamana vyayo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Watoye inzira ya mukurwawe, ni co gituma igikombe ciwe ngira ndagishire mu kuboko kwawe." 
Ezekiel23:32 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Uzonywera ku gikombe ca mukurwawe, ni kirekire kandi ni kinini; uzoba agatwengo n’agashinyo: kand’ ico gikombe n’akamaramwaga." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uzokwuzura ububorerwe n’ umubabaro, kukw ar’ igikombe c’ akajoreza gitera ibitongozi, ni co gikombe ca mukurwawe Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Uzokinywerako, ucīrāngūze, uhekenye n’ibibarara vyaco, witabagure ku mabere; kukw ari jewe mbivuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel23:35 None rero, uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko wanyibagiye, ukanshiburira inyuma yawe, ubushakanyi bgawe n’ ubumaka bgawe ni wewe biriko." 
Ezekiel23:36 Uhoraho yongera kumbarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, Ohola na Oholiba mbega ntiwobacira urubanza? Bamenyeshe rero ibizira vyabo." 
Ezekiel23:37 Kuko basambanye, kand’ amaraso bavishije ari ku ntoke zabo; basambanye n’ibigirwamana vyabo; kandi n’abahungu babo bamvyariye babatanze kw ibimazi ngo boswe mu muriro, babashikaniye ivyo bigirwamana ngo bibarye." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ikigeretseko bankoreye n’ikindi: kur’ uwo musi nyene bahumanije ahēra hanje, kandi bazirūye n’amasabato yanje." 
Ezekiel23:39 Kuko bamaze kwica abana babo, babashikaniye ibigirwamana vyabo, kur’ uwo musi nyene baca baza ahēra hanje kuhahumanya: mber’ uko ni ko bakoze mu ngoro yanje." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ubabgire, ut’ Ikigeretseko, mwatumye ku bagabo ba kure; na bo batumwekw intumwa baraza; muriyuhagira ngo mubarābikire, mwiraba amarangi mu maso, mwisakara utugenegene twanyu," 
Ezekiel23:41 mwicara ku musegamuro mutimbitse, har’ ameza agemetse imbere yawo, muyaterekakw imibavu yanje n’amavuta yanje ya elayo." 
Ezekiel23:42 Maz’ urwamo rw’ishengero ryidibamiye rwahōga aho muri; kandi hamwe n’abantu ba nyarucari hazanywe n’ababorewe bavuye mu bugaragwa; babambika mwempi imiringa ku maboko, n’ibitsibo vyiza mu mitwe." 
Ezekiel23:43 Maze mvuga ivy’ uwo asāziye mu busambanyi, nti N’ubu nyene bagiye kumusambanya, na we asambane na bo." 
Ezekiel23:44 Bītera i we nk’abītera kwa maraya: uko ni ko bīteye kwa Ohola no kwa Oholiba, ba bashakanyikazi." 
Ezekiel23:45 Kand’ abagororotsi ni bo bazobacira urubanza ruberanye n’abasambanyikazi, kandi ruberanye n’abagore b’abicanyi; kukw ar’ abasambanyikazi koko, kand’ amaraso bavishije ari ku ntoke zabo." 
Ezekiel23:46 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzobavyukiriza igitero, mbatange bateragiranwe hirya no hino kandi basahurwe." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ico gitero kizobicisha amabuye, kibahindikiranishe inkota; cice n’abahungu babo n’abakobga babo, giturire n’amazu yabo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Uko ni ko nzoca ubushakanyi mu gihugu, kugira ngw abagore bose bigishwe kudatora ubushakanyi bganyu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Kandi bazobasubiriza mu nkōko ibikwiranye n’ubushakanyi bganyu, mugibgeko n’ivyaha vy’uko mwagize ibigirwamana; kandi muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Umwami Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel24:1 Nuko, mu mwaka w’icenda, mu kwezi kw’icumi, ku musi ugira icumi w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel24:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, wandike umusi, ni wo uyu musi nyene: kuk’ umwami w’i Babuloni ashitse hafi y’i Yerusalemu kur’ uyu musi nyene." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ab’ inzu y’ abagarariji ubacire umugani, ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Tereka, tereka inkono ku ziko, utek’ usukemwo n’amazi:" 
Ezekiel24:4 wegeranye inkekera z’inyama uzishiremwo, mber’ igikenye cose ciza‐ciza, ukuguru n’ ukuboko; uyuzuze n’amagufa meza‐meza," 
Ezekiel24:5 uzikūye kuri nziza cane yo mu mukuku; ukomānye inkwi musi, zishe rwose; mbere kugira ngw amagufa arimwo yidohore." 
Ezekiel24:6 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kizobona ibara, ca gisagara kivisha amaraso, ni co ya nkono irimw’ ingese, ingese zayo zanse kuyivamwo! Zose uzārure imwe‐imwe, utarinze kurobanura." 
Ezekiel24:7 Kukw amaraso yaco ari hagati muri co; cayashize ku rutare rugaragara; nticayasutse mw ivu, ngw atwikirwe n’umukungugu." 
Ezekiel24:8 Nanje, kugira ngo biserure uburake bganje bgo kwīhōra, nasutse ayaco maraso ku rutare rugaragara nyene, ngo yoye gutwikirwa." 
Ezekiel24:9 Nuko rero, uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kizobona ibara, ca gisagara kivisha amaraso! Nanje ikirundo c’inkwi ngira nkigire kinini." 
Ezekiel24:10 Komānya inkwi, domeka umuriro, uhīshe inyama neza, utume umufa ufatana, amagufa azigire." 
Ezekiel24:11 Uheze uyitereke ku makara y’umuriro iri gusa, kugira ngw ishuhe cane, umuringa yacuzwemwo uhindurire, imyanda yayo iyiyagiremwo, ngw ingese zayo ziherengetezwe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Erega n’ukuruhira ubusa gusa! Ingese zayo zihambaye ntiziyivamwo; ingese zayo ntizikūrwako n’umuriro. 
Ezekiel24:13 Mu myanda yawe harimw’ ubushakanyi; kuko nagutunganije, ntutungane, nta ho uzokwongera gutunganywa ng’uvekw imyanda yawe, gushitsa aho nzoba nkwimazekw ishavu ryanje." 
Ezekiel24:14 Ni jewe, Uhoraho, mbivuze: bizoshika, kand’ ari jewe mbikoze; sinzokwigarura, canke ngo ngire ico nziguriza, canke ngo nicuze; nk’ukw ingeso zawe ziri, kandi nk’ ukw ibikorwa vyawe biri, ni ko bazogucira urubanza, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel24:15 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel24:16 riti Mwana w’umuntu, rāba, ngira nkwake ico wamizakw amaso, bije giturumbuka: ntuz’ uboroge canke ng’ urire, kand’ amosozi yawe ntācundugute." 
Ezekiel24:17 Kuniha kwawe kuraba amapfiranda; ntuz’ ugandarire ūpfuye, wizingire igitambara cawe mu mutwe, wambare inkweto zawe, ntiwipfuke ku munwa, kandi nturye ibiryazagu." 
Ezekiel24:18 Nuko mu gitondo mbibarira abantu, maze ku mugoroba umugore wanje arapfa; bukeye ngenza nk’uko nabariwe." 
Ezekiel24:19 Maz’ abantu barambaza, bati Mbega ntiwotubarira ico ivyo bintu bidutaze, bitumye ukora urtyo?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Nuko ndababarira, nt’ Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel24:21 riti Bgira ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ngo Ngira mpumanye ahantu hanje hēra, aho mwishimira yukw ari ho bubasha bganyu, mukahamizakw amaso, imitima yanyu ikahagirira igishika; kand’ abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu mwasizeyo bazoririkwa n’ inkota." 
Ezekiel24:22 Namwe muzogira nk’ uko mmeze: ntimuzoruha mwipfuka ku munwa, canke ngo murye ibiryazagu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ibitambara vyanyu bizoba biri mu mitwe yanyu, n’inkweto muzoba muzambaye: ntimuzoboroga canke ngo murire; ariko muzoshira umunywera kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyanyu, mucurire umunihiro hamwe." 
Ezekiel24:24 Uko ni ko Ezekiyeli azobabera ikimenyetso: ukw akoze kwose namwe ni ko muzokora: igihe ivyo bizoba, muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Umwami Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel24:25 Nawe, mwana w’umuntu, kur’ uwo musi, aho nzobakūrirakw icari kibabereye ububasha, ni co munezero w’icubahiro cabo, ico bāmizakw amaso, ico bashirakw imitima, ngikūrane n’abahungu babo n’abakobga babo," 
Ezekiel24:26 kur’ uwo musi impunzi izoza kuri wewe ibikubarire. 
Ezekiel24:27 Kur’ uwo musi akanwa kawe kazogobodokera iyo mpunzi, maz’ uzoca uvuga, ntuzokwongera kugobga ururimi: uko ni k’uzobabera ikimenyetso; na bo bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel25:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel25:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe ubgoko bg’ Abamoni, ubabūrire;" 
Ezekiel25:3 ubarire ubgo bgoko bg’Abamoni, uti Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Umwami Uhoraho, ng’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko wagize ngw Awa! ukītamba hejuru y’ahēra hanje igihe hāhumanywa, ukītamba no ku gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli mu gihe cāba amatongo, no ku b’inzu ya Yuda igihe bambukanwa ar’ inyagano;" 
Ezekiel25:4 nuko rero ngira nkugabure mu baba i burasirazuba, bakwegukire; bazogusagazamwo, bīshikire buzu; bazokurīra imirima, bakunywere n’ amata." 
Ezekiel25:5 Kand’ ahitwa i Raba nzohahindura ibirāro vy’ingamiya, n’igihugu c’Abamoni kibe ubugaramango bg’imikuku: nuko muzomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel25:6 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko wakomye amashi, ukavuza imihamirizo, ukītamba hejuru y’igihugu c’i Bgisirayeli n’ akagaye kose ko mu mutima wawe;" 
Ezekiel25:7 nuko rero, nkubānguriyek’ ukuboko kwanje, ngira nkugabure ng’ ube inyagano y’abanyamahanga; nzokurandura ngukūre mu mahanga, nguherengeteze mu bihugu, nkugeseze; maz’ uzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel25:8 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Abanyamowabu n’ab’i Seyiri ko bavuga, bat’ Ereg’ inzu ya Yuda ihwanye n’iz’ ayandi mahanga yose;" 
Ezekiel25:9 nuko rero, mu gihugu c’i Mowabu, aharābana n’ibisagara vyaho, uhereye ku bisagara biri ku mbibe zaho, ari vyo biteye igihugu icubahiro, ni vyo Beti‐Yeshimoti n’i Bayali‐Meyoni n’i Kiriyatayimu, ngira mpace ikirengero," 
Ezekiel25:10 ngicire ab’i burasirazuba, ngo babone ingene batera Abamoni, kandi nzobatanga ngo babegukire, kugira ng’ ubgoko bg’ Abamoni bgoye kwongera kwibukwa mu mahanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Kandi nzoshitsa iteka nciriye kuri Mowabu, maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel25:12 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Abanyedomu ko bagiriye inzu ya Yuda nabi babīhōra, bagacumura cane, mbere bakabīhōra;" 
Ezekiel25:13 nuko rero, uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje ku Banyedomu, mbaranduremw’ abantu n’ibitungano; kandi nzohahindura amatongo uhereye i Temani, baririkwe n’inkota gushitsa n’i Dedani." 
Ezekiel25:14 Abanyedomu nzobīhōra ntumye abantu banje b’ Abisirayeli; bazogirira Abanyedomu nk’uk’ uburake n’inzigo mbafitiye biri: maze bazomenya ukwīhōra kwanje ic’ ari co, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel25:15 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Abafilisitiya ko bakoze ivy’ ukwīhōra, bakīhōrana akagaye kavuye mu mutima, ngo bageseze bari n’akazika kadashira;" 
Ezekiel25:16 nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje ku Bafilisitiya, ndandure n’Abakereti, ngeseze n’amasigarira yo mu kiyaya c’ikiyaga." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nzobīhōra bihambaye, mbahanane ubushangashirwe; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho, igihe nzoba mbīhōye." 
Ezekiel26:1 Mu mwaka w’icumi na rimwe, ku musi wa mbere w’ukwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel26:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, Tiro ko havuze hitamba kuri Yerusalemu ngw Awa! ngw Icār’ umwugariro w’amahanga kirahomvotse! ngo Biransenyukiyeko, ngiye gutunga, co ko gicitse imisaka;" 
Ezekiel26:3 nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzohigūra nawe, ewe Tiro; nzokuvyukiriza amahanga menshi, nk’ukw ikiyaga kivyutsa imipfunda yaco." 
Ezekiel26:4 Na bo bazosangangura inzitiro z’i Tiro, bahomvore iminara yaho: nanje umukungugu waho nzowukukumba, mpahindure urutare rugaragara." 
Ezekiel26:5 Hazosigara ar’ aho kwanikira insenga hagati mu kiyaga; ni jewe mbivuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize; hazoba inyagano y’amahanga." 
Ezekiel26:6 Kandi n’abakobga baho bari mu misozi bazoririkwa n’inkota: maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho. 
Ezekiel26:7 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba, ngira ngomorere i Tiro Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni, umwami w’abami; azoza aturutse i burārūko, afise amafarasi n’imikogote ikwegwa na yo, n’abagendera ku mafarasi, n’ingabo z’abantu benshi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Abakobga bawe bari mu misozi azobaririkisha inkota: kand’ azokwubaka ibihome vyo kugutera, akurundire ibigunguzi vyo kwuririrako, kand’ azokugwako yitwaje inkinzo." 
Ezekiel26:9 Inzitiro zawe z’amabuye azozihirikakw ibiti vy’ imigogo vyo kuzihomvora, n’iminara yawe abihomvoze incabiti ziwe." 
Ezekiel26:10 Kandi kukw amafarasi yiwe ari menshi, umukungugu azosūra uzokuyoberanya: inzitiro zawe zizonyiganyizwa n’akariri k’abagendera ku mafarasi, n’ak’ imikogote itwara ibintu n’ak’ imikogote y’intambara, igihe azofyuka mu marembo yawe, nk’ukw abantu bitera mu gisagara giciwe ikirengero." 
Ezekiel26:11 Azotakangisha inzira zawe zose inzāra z’amafarasi yiwe: abantu bawe azobaririkisha inkota, kand’ inkingi zanditswekw ivy’ ubutōre bgawe zizotsindwa hasi." 
Ezekiel26:12 Ubutunzi bgawe bazobugira inyagano, basahure n’ibidandazwa vyawe; kandi bazosangangura inzitiro zawe z’ amabuye, bahomvagure n’amazu yawe ahimbaye; maz’ amabuye n’ibiti n’umukungugu vy’amasakamburira yawe bazobishiburira mu kiyaga." 
Ezekiel26:13 Kandi nzozibiza ijwi ry’indirimbo zawe, kand’ ukuvuga kw’inanga zawe ntikuzosubira kwumvikana ukundi." 
Ezekiel26:14 Kandi nzoguhindura urutare rugaragara: uzosigara ur’ aho kwanikira insenga; ntuzosubira kwubakwa ukundi: kuko jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel26:15 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abaza Tiro, ati Mbeg’ ababa ku kiyaga ntibazoshirwa mu gatengo no kwumva ugusenyerana kwawe, igihe abakomeretse bazoba baniha, habaye gusasikwa hagati muri wewe?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ni ho abaganwa bose bo ku kiyaga bazokwikūra ku ntebe zabo, biyambure imvune zabo, bīkūreko n’imyambaro yabo ijererenze amabara: baje mu gatengo, bicare hasi, bahinde agashitsi badahengeshanya, bumijwe nawe." 
Ezekiel26:17 Kandi bazocura intimba bakuririra, bakubgire, bat’ Ewe kuntu ugeseye, wewe wahora ubābgamwo n’abagenda uruja n’uruza mu kiyaga, war’ igisagara rurangiranwa, kandi war’ agakomeye ku kiyaga, mwe n’abākubamwo, abāhora bateye ubgoba ababa ku kiyaga nyene!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Noneh’ ababa kuri co bazohinda agashitsi ku musi w’ugusenyerana kwawe; mber’ ibizinga vyo mu kiyaga bizohagarikwa umutima n’uk’ uherengeteye. 
Ezekiel26:19 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Igihe nzoguhindura igisagara gicitse amatongo, ukamera nk’ibisagara vyaherengeteyemw’ abantu; igihe nzokurenzakw ikiyaga, amazi menshi akakurengako," 
Ezekiel26:20 ni ho nzokumanurana n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo, usangey’ abāgiye kera, nkugerēre i kuzimu, ahantu hāhebge uhereye kera, hamwe n’ abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo, kugira ngo ntiwongere kubābgamwo; kand’ icubahiro nzogikomeza mw isi y’abakiriho." 
Ezekiel26:21 Nzokugira agaterabgoba, kandi ntuzosubira kubah’ ukundi: naho bazokurondera, ntuzokwigera usubira kuboneka, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel27:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel27:2 riti Nawe, mwana w’umuntu, cura intimba uririre Tiro;" 
Ezekiel27:3 ubarire Tiro, uti Yewe uba mw ishikiro ku kiyaga, ukaba n’umudandaza ugurira amahanga aba hirya no hino ku kiyaga, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Yewe Tiro, waravuze, uti Ndi mwiza vy’agahore!" 
Ezekiel27:4 Mw idamba ry’ikiyaga ni ho hākubereye urubibe; abākubaje nk’ubgato bāsozereye ubgiza bgawe. 
Ezekiel27:5 Imbaho zawe zose bāzibāje mu miberoshi ivuye i Seniri; bākūye amasederi i Lebanoni bayakubāziramw’ umuringoti. 
Ezekiel27:6 Mu biti vy’imyeloni vy’i Bashani ni vyo bākubāziyemw’ ingafe; intebe zawe bāzibāje mu mbaho z’imiteyashuri zākūwe mu bizinga vyo mu kiyaga vyitwa i Kitimu, bazishazishije kuzidombagizak’ utubaru tw’amahembe y’inzovu." 
Ezekiel27:7 Igihuzu cawe c’ubgato gikozwe mu mpuzu zera derere zijererenze amabara zivuye muri Egiputa, kugira ngo kikubere ibendera; amasufe n’amashigisha vyavuye mu Banyelishahu baba ku kiyaga ni vyo vyakubereye icugamo." 
Ezekiel27:8 Ababa i Sidoni no muri Aruvadi ni bo bār’ abasoza bawe: abanyabgenge bawe baba muri wewe, ewe Tiro, ni bo bāgutumbereza nk’ubgato." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abashingantahe b’i Gebali n’abanyabgenge baho bāri muri wewe bahoma imiguma yawe: amato yose yo mu kiyaga n’abasoza bayo vyāri muri wewe, bakudandariza ibidandazwa vyawe." 
Ezekiel27:10 Ab’i Buperesi n’ab’i Ludi n’ab’i Puti bāri mu ngabo zawe, ar’ abahizi bawe: bāmanika muri wewe inkinzo n’ inkofero z’intambara, bakerekana ubgiza bgawe." 
Ezekiel27:11 Abagabo bo muri Aruvadi bāri kumwe n’ ingabo zawe impande zose ku nzitiro zawe z’amabuye, n’Abagamadimu bāri mu minara yawe: bāmanika inkinzo zabo ku nzitiro zawe impande zose, bagashitsa ubgiza bgawe." 
Ezekiel27:12 Ab’i Tarushishi bādandaza nawe kubg’ ibitayega vy’ubutunzi bgawe bg’uburyo bginshi; amafeza n’ivyuma n’amabati n’amasāsu ni vyo bākāba ivyawe. 
Ezekiel27:13 Ab’i Yavani n’ab’i Tubali n’ab’i Mesheki na bo bādandaza nawe: bāshōra abagurano n’imbombovu z’ivyakozwe mu miringa bakabikāba ivyawe. 
Ezekiel27:14 Ab’ inzu ya Togaruma bākāba ivyawe amafarasi n’amafarasi y’intambara n’inyumbu. 
Ezekiel27:15 Abantu b’i Dedani na bo bādandaza nawe: ibidandazwa vy’ababa hirya no hino ku kiyaga vyari mu maboko yawe; kandi bākuzanira amahembe y’inzovu n’imbaho z’ibiti vyitwa imipingo ngo bakābe nawe. 
Ezekiel27:16 N’ab’i Siriya bādandaza nawe kubg’ ibitayega vy’ibintu vyavuye mu buhinga bgawe: bākāba ivyawe utubuyenge twitwa nofekina, n’impuzu z’amashigisha, n’izijererenze amabara, n’izera derere, n’utubuyenge twitwa fezaruka n’utwitwa marijani." 
Ezekiel27:17 N’ab’i Buyuda bo n’abo mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli bādandaza nawe: bākāba ivyawe ingano ziva i Miniti, n’ibishashara, n’ubūki, n’amavuta ya elayo, n’ umuti wo gusomōra." 
Ezekiel27:18 N’ab’i Damasiko na bo bādandaza nawe ibitayega vy’ibintu vyavuye mu buhinga bgawe, kubg’ ibitayega vy’ubutunzi bgawe bg’uburyo bginshi; bāshōra vino ziva i Heluboni n’ubgoya bg’intama bgera." 
Ezekiel27:19 Ab’i Vedani n’ab’i Yavani bākāba ivyawe inyuzi; ivyuma birtyorowe, n’ibimota neza vyitwa kesiya, n’imisigati, vyari mu bidandazwa vyawe." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ab’i Dedani bar’ abadandaji bawe b’impuzu z’ igiciro kinini zo kwicarwako ku mafarasi. 
Ezekiel27:21 Abo muri Arabiya n’abaganwa bose b’i Kedari bār’ abadandaji bawe wiganziye; bākudandariza imyagazi y’intama n’ amapfizi yazo n’impene. 
Ezekiel27:22 Abadandaji b’i Sheba n’i Rama bār’ abadandaji bawe; bākāba ivyawe imibavu irusha iyindi yose kwinjira, n’utubuyenge twose tw’igiciro kinini n’izahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Ab’i Harani n’ab’i Kanehe n’abo muri Edeni n’abadandaji b’i Sheba no muri Ashuri n’i Kilumadi bār’ abadandaji bawe. 
Ezekiel27:24 Abo ni bo badandaji bawe bāshōra ibintu vy’ intōrwa, imitamana y’amasufe ijererenze amabara, n’amasandugu yabājwe mu masederi arimw’ imyambaro y’igiciro kinini, atekejwe ibitsibo vy’imigozi; ivyo vyari mu bidandazwa vyawe." 
Ezekiel27:25 Amato y’i Tarushishi yaseha ibidandazwa vyawe: nuk’ uranengesera, ugira uburemerezi uri hagati mw idamba." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abasoza bawe bagushikanye mu mazi menshi: umuyaga uvuye i burasirazuba ugusābiriza mw idamba mu kiyaga. 
Ezekiel27:27 Ubutunzi bgawe, n’ ibishōrano vyawe, n’ibidandazwa vyawe, n’abasoza bawe, n’abagutumbereza nk’ubgato, n’abahomyi bawe b’imiguma, n’abakudandariza ibidandazwa vyawe, n’abahizi bawe bose bari muri wewe, mbere n’abanyabgato bawe bose bari hagati muri wewe, bizodobera mw idamba mu kiyaga ku musi wo kugesezwa kwawe." 
Ezekiel27:28 Imihana izohindishwa agashitsi n’urwamo rw’akāyaga k’abatumbereza bawe. 
Ezekiel27:29 N’abakoresha ingafe bose n’ abasoza n’abatumbereza ubgato bose bo mu kiyaga bazokwururuka bave mu mato yabo, bahagarare i musozi;" 
Ezekiel27:30 bazorenza amajwi bakuririra, baboroge cane, biyorere imikungugu ku mitwe, bikumbagaze mu minyota:" 
Ezekiel27:31 kandi bazokwimosha inkomvorera kubgawe, bakenyere amagunira, bakuririre batuntuye mu mitima baboroga cane." 
Ezekiel27:32 Mu maborogo yabo bazogucurira intimba, bajoje, bati Ni hehe hahwanye n’i Tiro, hakamera nk’iki gisagara kidobejwe hagati mu kiyaga?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Hamwe ibishōrano vyawe vyahora biza bivuye mu kiyaga, wahāza amahanga menshi; watungisha abami bo mw isi ibitayega vy’ubutunzi bgawe n’ivy’ ibidandazwa vyawe." 
Ezekiel27:34 Igihe ikiyaga cagusāvya, ukadobera i bgina mu mazi, ibidandazwa vyawe n’abanyabgato bawe bose vyadoberanye nawe." 
Ezekiel27:35 Ababa ku kiyaga bose baragutangariye, n’abami babo bafashwe n’ubgoba bginshi, mu nyonga habo harasuherewe." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abadandaza bo mu mahanga bakuvuzakw agahwa; wahindutse agaterabgoba, kandi ntuzosubira kubah’ ukundi." 
Ezekiel28:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel28:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, barira segaba w’i Tiro, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Umutima wawe ko wishize hejuru, kand’ ukavuga, ng’ ur’ Imana, ng’ uvyagiye ku ntebe y’Imana hagati mu kiyaga; yamar’ ur’ umuntu buntu, ntur’ Imana, naho mu mutima wawe wigereranya na yo;" 
Ezekiel28:3 ni ko ga! Urusha Daniyeli ubgenge, nta gihishijwe uyoberwa!" 
Ezekiel28:4 Ubgenge bgawe no kumenya kwawe vyaguhesheje ubutunzi, vyatumye urunda izahabu n’ifeza mu bubīko bgawe;" 
Ezekiel28:5 ubgenge bgawe bginshi n’ubudandaza bgawe vyatumye ugwiza ubutunzi, maz’ ubgo butunzi bgawe bgateye umutima wawe kwishira hejuru." 
Ezekiel28:6 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko wagereranije umutima wawe n’umutima w’Imana," 
Ezekiel28:7 nuko nanje ngira ngutēze abantu b’akavantara b’agaterabgoba bo mu mahanga, basokore inkota zabo ngo barwanye ubgiza bg’ubgenge bgawe, bafutanye igitinyiro cawe." 
Ezekiel28:8 Bazokumanura bakurokeze muri rwa rwobo; kand’ uzopfa urupfu rw’ abaguye mw idamba mu kiyaga. 
Ezekiel28:9 Mbeg’ uzosubira kuvugira imbere y’ūkwica ng’ ur’ Imana? Ushima uzoba ur’ umuntu buntu, ntuzoba ur’ Imana, ushitse mu maboko y’ ūgusogota!" 
Ezekiel28:10 Uzopfa urupfu rw’abatākebge wishwe n’amaboko y’abanyamahanga; kukw ari jewe mbivuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel28:11 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel28:12 riti Mwana w’umuntu, cura intimba uririre umwami w’i Tiro, umubgire, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ni wewe war’ akaminuza ka vyose, wuzuye ubgenge, ukaba mwiza vy’agahore." 
Ezekiel28:13 Wari muri Edeni, mw itongo ry’Imana; wisakayek’ utubuyenge twose tw’igiciro kinini, twitwa odemu na pitida na yahalomu na tarushishi na shohamu na yasipi na safiro na nofekina na bareketi, bo n’izahabu: ubuhanga bgo kubāza udushako tw’ingoma n’imyironge bgar’ i wawe; vyari vyarateguwe umusi waremwako." 
Ezekiel28:14 War’ umukerubi usīzwe amavuta, ushānje amababa: kandi nagushizeho, uba ku musozi wera w’Imana; wacuragiza hagati y’ amabuye yaka umuriro." 
Ezekiel28:15 War’ agahore mu ngeso zawe zose uhereye umusi waremeweko, gushitsa igihe ibigabitanyo vyakubonetseko."
