Ezekiel28:16 Ibitayega vy’ibidandazwa vyawe vyatumye wuzura umuryano, maz’ uracumura: ni co catumye nguhinda nk’igihumane, nkagukūra ku musozi w’Imana; narakugesheje, yewe mukerubi ushānje amababa, ngukūra hagati ya ya mabuye yaka umuriro." 
Ezekiel28:17 Ubgiza bgawe ni bgo bgateye umutima wawe kwishira hejuru, igitinyiro cawe ni co cononnye ubgenge bgawe; ngutsinze hasi, nkurambitse imbere y’abami ng’ubabere akabarore." 
Ezekiel28:18 Kubg’ isinzi ry’ ibicumuro vyawe n’ubugunge bg’ ukudandaza kwawe, wahumanije ahēra hawe; ni co catumye ntuma umuriro uvuye muri wewe ukuyigiza, nkakugira umunyota urunze hasi imbere y’abo wabereye akabarore." 
Ezekiel28:19 Abakuzi bose bo mu mahanga bazogutangarira: wahindutse agaterabgoba, kandi ntuzosubira kubah’ ukundi." 
Ezekiel28:20 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel28:21 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe i Sidoni, uhabūrire," 
Ezekiel28:22 ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzohigūra nawe, ewe Sidoni, nzoshirwa hejuru hagati muri wewe: maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho, igihe nzoba nshikije iteka mpaciriyeko, nkiyerekana muri bo ko nd’ Uwera." 
Ezekiel28:23 Kuko nzoharekurira ikīza, nkuzuza ibitenga vy’amaraso mu nzira zaho; kand’ abakomeretse bazogwa hagati muri ho, bishwe n’inkota ihateye impande zose; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel28:24 Kand’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli ntibazokwongera kugira umukere ubahanda, cank’ umubambangwe ubasāsāta mu babakikije bose, bāhora babagirira nabi; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Umwami Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel28:25 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Igihe nzoba mpejeje gukoranya ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, mbakūye mu mahanga aho bāri barasābagiriye, nkiyerekana muri bo ko nd’ Uwera imbere y’abanyamahanga, ni ho bazoshinga ibande mu gihugu cabo, ico nahaye umusavyi wanje Yakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Bazohashinga ibande ata nkomanzi; mbere bazokwubaka amazu, batere n’inzabibu, bibere ngaho ata nkomanzi, igihe nzoba nshikije iteka nciriye ku babagirira nabi babakikije bose; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo." 
Ezekiel29:1 Mu mwaka w’icumi, mu kwezi kw’icumi, ku musi ugira icumi na kabiri w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel29:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, umubūrire, ubūrire na Egiputa hose:" 
Ezekiel29:3 uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ewe Farawo mwami wa Egiputa, wa ngona ihambaye, yigaramangira hagati y’inzūzi zayo, wagize ng’ Uruzi rwawe n’urwawe bgite, kandi ngo Ni wewe warwiremeye ubgawe." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ehe ngira nshire igera mu mibangabanga yawe, ntume amafi yo mu nzūzi zawe amatana n’ibigaragamba vyawe; kandi nzokuroba ngukūre mu nzūzi zawe, n’amafi yose yo mu nzūzi zawe amatanye n’ibigaragamba vyawe." 
Ezekiel29:5 Kandi nzogushiburira mu bugaragwa, mwe n’amafi yose yo mu nzūzi zawe: uzogwa mu gahinga ka sabaderi; ntuzoruha unobga canke ngo wēgeranywe; naragutanze ng’ ube ivyo kurya vy’ibikōko vyo kw isi n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre." 
Ezekiel29:6 Maz’ ababa muri Egiputa bose bazomenya yuko nd’Uhoraho; kuko wabereye inzu ya Isirayeli inkoni y’ irenga. 
Ezekiel29:7 Igihe bakwifadikiza mu kuboko waravunitse, utobekeranya ibitugu vyabo vyose: ngo bakwishimikize urakenyuka, utuma imikinya yabo yose itetera." 
Ezekiel29:8 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe ngira ngutērēre inkota, nkuranduremw’ abantu n’ ibitungano." 
Ezekiel29:9 Kand’ igihugu ca Egiputa kizohinduka amatongo n’ imisaka: maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho. Ko wavuze ng’ Uruzi n’urwawe, ngo Ni wewe waruremye;" 
Ezekiel29:10 nuko rero, rāba, tuzohigūra, mwe n’inzūzi zawe, kand’ igihugu ca Egiputa nzogihindura imisaka vyeruye n’ amatongo, uhereye ku munara w’i Sevene ugashitsa ku rubibe rwo muri Etiyopiya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Nta kirenge c’umuntu kizoba kikihahita, cank’ urwara rw’igitungwa, kandi hazomara imyaka mirongwine ata kikihaba." 
Ezekiel29:12 Kandi nzohindura igihugu ca Egiputa amatongo hagati y’ibindi bihugu vyacitse amatongo, n’ibisagara vyaho biharūwe mu bindi bisagara vyacitse imisaka, bizoba amatongo kumara imyaka mirongwine: kand’ Abanyegiputa nzobasābagiriza mu yandi mahanga, mbashwiragirize mu bindi bihugu." 
Ezekiel29:13 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Imyaka mirongwine ni yashira, nzokoranya Abanyegiputa mbakūre mu mahanga iyo bāsābagirijwe;" 
Ezekiel29:14 kandi nzotuma Abanyegiputa bahindukira, bave mu ngoyi zabo, mbasubize mu gihugu c’i Patirosi, ari co c’amāmo yabo; maze bazohagirira ubgami bg’inkēngērwa." 
Ezekiel29:15 Buzoba ubgami bukēngēretse hanyuma y’ubundi bgose, kandi nta ho bazokwongera kwishira hejuru ku yandi mahanga: nzobahindura inkehwa, kugira ngo ntibaze basubire kuganza ayandi mahanga ukundi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Kandi ntibazokwongera kubera ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli ivyizigiro, ngo batume ibigabitanyo vyibukwa vy’igihe bābīsunga: maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Umwami Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel29:17 Maze mu mwaka wa mirongwibiri n’indwi mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wa mbere w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel29:18 riti Mwana w’umuntu, Nebukadineza, umwami w’i Babuloni, yakoresheje ingabo ziwe igikorwa gikomeye aho yatera i Tiro: imitwe yazo yose yatobotse ubuhanza, no ku rutugu hose haramyoka: yamara nta ngororano yabonye, cank’ ingabo ziwe, mu vy’i Tiro, kubg’ igikorwa gikomeye yakoze, aho yahatera." 
Ezekiel29:19 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Eh’ igihugu ca Egiputa ngira nkigomorere Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni; azojana abantu baho b’isinzi ar’ inyagano, ajane n’iminyago yaho n’ isahu yaho; ivyo bizoba ingororano z’ingabo ziwe." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamuhaye igihugu ca Egiputa kw ingororano c’ivyo yankoreye, kukw ari jewe bākoreye, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel29:21 Kur’ uwo musi nzomereza ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli ihembe; nawe nzoguha guteranurira akanwa hagati muri bo; maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho. 
Ezekiel30:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel30:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, vuga ubūre, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ni muboroge, muti Yō! Ewe wa musi wo kuzobona ibara!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Koko uwo musi uri hafi, mber’ umusi w’Uhoraho uri hafi, n’umusi wo gufurangana; igihe c’abanyamahanga kizoba kigeze." 
Ezekiel30:4 Inkota izorekurirwa kuri Egiputa, ubusinzikare buzoba muri Etiyopiya, igihe abariritswe bazohindikirana muri Egiputa; bazokūrah’ abantu baho b’isinzi, kand’ amatanguriro yaho azohomvagurwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 Etiyopiya n’i Puti n’i Ludi, n’amahanga yose y’ikivange, n’i Kubi, n’abo mu gihugu gifatanije na bo, bazogwa hamwe bariritswe n’inkota." 
Ezekiel30:6 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Abahagarikiye Egiputa na bo bazogwa, kand’ ubgibone buterwa n’ ububasha bgaho buzocishwa bugufi; bazogwa bariritswe n’inkota, uhereye i Migidoli ugashitsa i Sevene, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel30:7 Bazosigara mu matongo hagati y’ibindi bihugu vyacitse amatongo, n’ibisagara vyaho bizoharūrwa hagati y’ibindi bisagara vyacitse imisaka." 
Ezekiel30:8 Maze bazomenya yuko nd’Uhoraho, igihe nzoba mmaze kwanda umuriro Egiputa, abatabazi babo bahonnye." 
Ezekiel30:9 Kur’ uwo musi intumwa zizova imbere yanje zigende mu māto, ngo zibe agacavutu ku Banyetiyopiya bībera ngaho ata co binona: hazoba kwembemba muri bo, nk’ ukwabaye ku musi wo muri Egiputa; kand’ ehe biraje." 
Ezekiel30:10 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ikindi, nzoherengeteza isinzi ry’abantu bo muri Egiputa, mbikoresheje ukuboko kwa Nebukadineza, umwami w’i Babuloni." 
Ezekiel30:11 We n’abantu biwe b’agaterabgoba bo mu mahanga, bazozanwa no kugeseza igihugu; bazosokōrera inkota zabo Egiputa, buzuze igihugu imivyimba." 
Ezekiel30:12 Inzūzi nzozikamya, igihugu nkigabure mu maboko y’abantu b’abanyakibi; kand’ igihugu n’ibirimwo vyose nzogihindura amatongo nkoresheje amaboko y’abantu b’akavantara: ni jewe, Uhoraho, mbivuze." 
Ezekiel30:13 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati N’ibigirwamana na vyo nzobihonnya, kandi nzoherengeteza ibishushanyo muri Nofu; nta muganwa azosubira kuboneka mu gihugu ca Egiputa; kandi nzoshira ibiteye ubgoba mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel30:14 I Patirosi nzohahindura amatongo, nande umuriro i Sowani, kandi nzoshitsa amateka nciriye ku hitwa No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Nzorekurira uburake bganje kuri Sini, ari co gihome ca Egiputa; kand’ abantu b’isinzi bo muri No nzobarandura." 
Ezekiel30:16 Na Egiputa nzohanda umuriro; muri Sini hazoba kwembemba kwinshi, no muri No hazosangangurwa; kand’ i Nofu hazotsindwa n’abansi ku murango w’amaminangohe." 
Ezekiel30:17 Imisore yo muri Aveni n’iy’ i Pibeseti izoririkwa n’inkota: kand’ abo mur’ ivyo bisagara bazojanwa ar’ inyagano. 
Ezekiel30:18 I Tahapanesi hazoba ubgirakabiri, igihe nzohavunagurira ingōgo Egiputa hahatwarisha igitugu, n’ubgibone buterwa n’ ububasha bgaho buzoshirira aho nyene; igicu kizohubikiza, kand’ abakobga baho bazojanwa ar’ inyagano." 
Ezekiel30:19 Uko ni ko nzoshitsa amateka nciriye Egiputa; maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho. 
Ezekiel30:20 Nuko mu mwaka w’icumi na rimwe, mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi ugira indwi w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel30:21 riti Mwana w’umuntu, navunnye ukuboko kwa Farawo, umwami wa Egiputa; ntikwarushe gutubikwa canke ngo gusomōzwe imiti, ntikwanashizwekw igitambara co kugutubika ngo gukire, kubone kuzofata inkota." 
Ezekiel30:22 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohigūra na Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, kandi nzomuvuna amaboko yompi, ukugikomeye bo n’ukwari kwavunitse; kandi nzotuma inkota yari mu kuboko kwiwe imwiyaka ikoroke." 
Ezekiel30:23 Abanyegiputa nzobasābagiriza mu mahanga, mbashwiragirize mu bihugu." 
Ezekiel30:24 Maz’ amaboko y’ umwami w’i Babuloni nzoyakomeza, inkota yanje ndayishire mu kuboko kwiwe; arikw amaboko ya Farawo nzoyavuna, kand’ azonihira imbere yiwe umuniho nk’uw’ ūkomeretse uruguma rw’intakira." 
Ezekiel30:25 Nuko nzokomeza amaboko y’ umwami w’i Babuloni, arikw aya Farawo azodendebuka; maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho, igihe nzoshira inkota yanje mu kuboko kw’umwami w’i Babuloni, na we akayibāngurira ku gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Ezekiel30:26 Kand’ Abanyegiputa nzobasābagiriza mu mahanga, mbashwiragirize mu bihugu; maze bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel31:1 Maze mu mwaka w’icumi na rimwe, mu kwezi kwa gatatu, ku musi wa mbere w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel31:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, barira Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, n’ ishengero ryiwe, uti Ni nde munganya kuba agahambaye?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Ehe rāba, Umwashuri yari nk’igiti c’isederi c’i Lebanoni c’amashami meza, c’igitūtu kinini, kandi c’ inganzamarumpu, ubushorishori bgaco bgashika mu bicu." 
Ezekiel31:4 Catungwa n’amazi, amazi menshi yaragikuza: inzūzi zatembera irya n’ino y’aho catewe, zikarekurira imigende yazo ku biti vyose vyo mu gahinga." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ni co catumye uburebure bgaco bushirwa hejuru y’ibiti vyose vyo mu gahinga; n’ amasango yaco agatagarara, n’ amashami yaco agashibuka kubgo kugira amazi menshi ayakuza." 
Ezekiel31:6 N’ibiguruka vyose vyo mu kirēre bikārika mu mashami yaco; n’ ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba bikavyarira ivyana vyavyo musi y’amashami yaco, n’amahanga yose ahambaye akibera mu gitūtu caco." 
Ezekiel31:7 Uko ni ko cabaye ciza mu kuba agahambaye, no mu gushibuka kw’amashami yaco: kukw imizi yaco yar’ ishōreye mu mazi menshi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Amasederi yandi yo mw itongo ry’Imana nta yashobora kucababa; n’imiberoshi ntiyaruha ingana n’ amasango yaco, cank’ imyarumoni ngw ihwane n’amashami yaco; kandi nta giti co mw itongo ry’ Imana cari gihwanije na co ubgiza." 
Ezekiel31:9 Nakigize ciza kubg’ isinzi ry’amashami yaco, bitume ibiti vyose vyo muri Edeni, vyari mw itongo ry’Imana, bikigirira ishari." 
Ezekiel31:10 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko cabaye kirekire, ubushorishori bgaco bugashika mu bicu, kand’ uburebure bgaco bugatuma umutima waco wishira hejuru:" 
Ezekiel31:11 nuko rero nzokigabura mu kuboko kw’umuhizi wo mu mahanga; azokigira ukw agomba; nacirukanye ngihōye ivyaha vyaco. 
Ezekiel31:12 Kand’ abantu b’akavantara b’agaterabgoba bo mu mahanga baragiciye, bagisiga ngaho: amashami yaco asanzara ku misozi no mu myonga yose, n’ amasango yaco avunagurikira ku migende y’amazi yose yo mu gihugu; kand’ amahanga yose yo mw isi ava mu gitūtu caco agisiga ngaho." 
Ezekiel31:13 Ibiguruka vyose vyo mu kirēre bizohundara kuri co aho cahomvagurikiye, n’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba bizokwibera ku mashami yaco:" 
Ezekiel31:14 kugira ngo hoye kugira igiti na kimwe co ku nkengēra y’amazi cishira hejuru kubg’ uburebure bgaco ubgaco, canke ngo gitume ubushorishori bgaco bushika mu bicu, canke ngo hagire ibihambaye vyo muri vyo bihagarara vyishimiye uburebure bgavyo, ari vyo vyose bitungwa n’amazi: kuko vyose vyatanzwe ngo bipfe, bije i bgina i kuzimu, bifadikanijwe n’abantu buntu, n’ abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Ezekiel31:15 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Umusi camanuka kija i kuzimu, nageze ko kiborogerwa; natumye mw idamba hitwikira kubgaco, mbuza inzūzi zaho gutemba, n’amazi menshi arahagarikwa; ntuma i Lebanoni hakigandarira, ibiti vyose vyo mu gahinga bigakabirana kubgaco." 
Ezekiel31:16 Natumye amahanga ashirwa mu gatengo no kwumva ugusenyerana kwaco, igihe nagishiburira i kuzimu hamwe n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo; maz’ ibiti vyose vyo muri Edeni, n’ivyateretswe bisumba ibindi ubgiza vy’i Lebanoni, mber’ ibitungwa n’amazi vyose, bimarirwa umubabaro aho bir’ i kuzimu." 
Ezekiel31:17 Na vyo bimanukana na co i kuzimu, bihamvya abāriritswe n’inkota; mbere ni bo bari bakibereye ububasha, bakāma bibera mu gitūtu caco hagati mu mahanga." 
Ezekiel31:18 Mu biti vyo muri Edeni n’ ikihe munganya kugira icubahiro no kuba agahambaye? Yamar’ uzomanukanwa hamwe n’ibiti vyo muri Edeni ushike i kuzimu: uzoryama hagati mu batākebge, hamwe n’abāriritswe n’inkota. Uwo ni we Farawo n’ishengero ryiwe ryose, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel32:1 Maze mu mwaka w’icumi na kabiri, mu kwezi kw’ icumi na kabiri, ku musi wa mbere w’ukwo kwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel32:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, cura intimba uririre Farawo umwami wa Egiputa, umubgire, uti War’ ūhwanye n’umugunza w’ intambge yo mu mahanga; yamar’ umeze nk’ingona iri mu kiyaga; widimbagura mu nzūzi zawe, amazi uyatobesha ibirenge, uca iyondoyondo inzūzi zabo." 
Ezekiel32:3 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nzoguhwikiza urusenga rwanje, ndi kumwe n’igitero c’abanyamahanga benshi; kandi bazogukwegesha urusenga rwanje." 
Ezekiel32:4 Kandi nzogusiga ngaho i musozi, ngushiburire mu gahinga ka sabaderi, kandi nzotuma ibiguruka vyose vyo mu kirēre biguhundarako, n’ ibikōko vyo kw isi yose nzobihāza inyama zawe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Mbere nzokwiragiza inyama zawe ku misozi, n’ imyonga ndayuzuze ubutumbazi bgawe." 
Ezekiel32:6 Kand’ igihugu ugenda wogamwo nzogitotesha amaraso yawe gushitsa no ku misozi miremire; n’ibihoro vy’imigezi bizokwuzura wewe. 
Ezekiel32:7 Igihe nzokudorongeza, nzotwikira ijuru, n’ inyenyeri ntume zicura umwiza; izuba nzoritwikiriza igicu, kand’ ukwezi ntikuzoba kucaka umuco wakwo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Imuri zose zaka kw ijuru nzotuma zicura umwiza hejuru yawe, igihugu cawe ncubikizek’ umwiza, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel32:9 Nzotuma imitima y’amahanga menshi ihagarara igihe nzokwiza ivy’ ukugesera kwawe mu mahanga, gushitsa no mu bihugu utigeze kumenya." 
Ezekiel32:10 Mbere nzotuma amoko menshi agutangarira, kand’ abami babo bazofatwa n’ubgoba bginshi kubgawe, igihe nzorabagiriza inkota yanje imbere yabo; bazohinda agashitsi urudaca, umuntu wese aririre amagara yiwe, ku musi wo kugesezwa kwawe." 
Ezekiel32:11 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Inkota y’umwami w’i Babuloni izogushikako." 
Ezekiel32:12 Nzotuma ishengero ryawe riririkwa n’inkota z’ abahizi; abo bose ni bo b’agaterabgoba bo mu mahanga. Ubgibone bga Egiputa bazobuhindura ubusa, n’ishengero ryaho ryose rizohona." 
Ezekiel32:13 Kandi nzohonnya ibitungwa vyaho vyose bir’ i ruhande y’amazi menshi; kandi nta kirenge c’umuntu kizokwongera kuyatoba, n’inzāra z’ibitungwa ntizizoba zikiyatoba." 
Ezekiel32:14 Ni ho nzotuma amazi yaho atonganuka, ntume n’inzūzi zaho zitemba nk’ amavuta ya elayo, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel32:15 Igihe nzohindura igihugu ca Egiputa amatongo n’imisaka, igihugu kitakirimw’ ivyahora bicuzuye, nishe abākibamwo bose, ni ho bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel32:16 Ako ni ko gacurantimba bazocura; abakobga b’amahanga bazocura intimba bartyo: ni ko bazocurira intimba Egiputa n’ishengero ryaho ryose, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel32:17 Maze mur’ uwo mwaka w’ icumi na kabiri nyene, ku musi ugira icumi na gatanu w’ukwezi, ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel32:18 riti Mwana w’umuntu, borogera ishengero ryo muri Egiputa, urikororane n’abakobga b’amahanga ya rurangiranwa, gushitsa i bgina i kuzimu, hamwe n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:19 Uti Ni nde urusha ubgiza? Manuka uryamikwe mu batākebge. 
Ezekiel32:20 Bazohindikirana hagati y’abicishijwe inkota: Egiputa hāgaburiwe inkota: ni muhakwegane n’ishengero ryaho ryose. 
Ezekiel32:21 Abanyenkomezi bo mu bahizi bazovugana na bo bar’ epfo iyo i kuzimu, hamwe n’ abāhatabara; bat’ Abatākebge bāramanutse, barambaraye badakoma, bicishijwe inkota." 
Ezekiel32:22 Uwa Ashuri ni yo ari, bo n’ ingabo ziwe zose; imva z’abiwe ziramukikije; bose n’abishwe, bahindikiranijwe n’inkota." 
Ezekiel32:23 Imva zabo ziri mu bgigobeko bga rwa rwobo, kand’ ingabo ziwe zikikije imva yiwe: bose n’abishwe, bahindikiranijwe n’inkota, kand’ ari bo bār’ agaterabgoba mw isi y’ abariho." 
Ezekiel32:24 Uwa Elamu ni yo ari, bo n’ ishengero ryiwe ryose rikikije imva yiwe: bose n’abishwe, bahindikiranijwe n’inkota, bamanutse batākebge baja i bgina i kuzimu, kand’ ari bo bār’ agaterabgoba mw isi y’abariho, bajanye ibitētērwa vyabo hamwe n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:25 Bāmwubakiye uburiri hagati y’abishwe ari kumwe n’ishengero ryiwe ryose; imva z’abiwe ziramukikije; abo bose n’abatākebge, bahindikiranijwe n’inkota; kuko bār’ agaterabgoba mw isi y’abariho, kandi bājanye ibitētērwa vyabo hamwe n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo: yashizwe hagati y’abishwe." 
Ezekiel32:26 Uw’ i Mesheki n’uw’ i Tubali ni yo bari, bo n’ishengero ryabo ryose; imva z’ababo zirabakikije; bose n’abatākebge, bahindikiranijwe n’inkota, kuko bār’ agaterabgoba mw isi y’abariho." 
Ezekiel32:27 Kandi ntibaryamye hamwe n’abahizi bāhindikiranye bo mu batākebge, bāmanukanye i kuzimu n’ibirwanishwa vyabo vy’intambara, bīseguye inkota zabo, ibigabitanyo vyabo biri ku magufa yabo; kuko bār’ agaterabgoba ku bahizi mw isi y’abariho." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nawe nyene uzovunagurirwa hagati y’abatākebge, uryame hamwe n’abahindikiranijwe n’inkota." 
Ezekiel32:29 Uwa Edomu ni yo ari, n’abami baho n’abaganwa baho bose, bārambitswe hamwe n’abahindikiranijwe n’inkota naho bār’ abahizi; bāryamye hamwe n’abatākebge, bo n’abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:30 Abaganwa b’i burārūko ni yo bari bose, n’ab’i Sidoni bose, bāmanukanye n’abishwe; bāratēterewe, naho bār’ agaterabgoba kubg’ ubuhizi bgabo; barambaraye batākebge hamwe n’ abahindikiranijwe n’inkota, bajanye ibitētērwa vyabo hamwe n’ abamanuka baja muri rwa rwobo." 
Ezekiel32:31 Farawo azobibona, ashire umubabaro w’ishengero ryiwe ryose: Farawo ubgiwe nyene n’ ingabo ziwe zose, bāhindikiranijwe n’inkota, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel32:32 Kuko nashize ivy’ agaterabgoba kiwe mw isi y’abariho; na we azorambikwa hagati y’abatākebge, hamwe n’abahindikiranijwe n’inkota, Farawo ubgiwe n’ ishengero ryiwe ryose, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel33:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel33:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, uvugane n’ab’ ubgoko bganyu, ubabgire, uti Ni yatērēra igihugu inkota, abantu bo mu gihugu bakīrobanurira umuntu muri bo, bakamushiraho kubabera inderetsi:" 
Ezekiel33:3 uyo yobona inkota ije iteye igihugu, akavuza inzamba ngw abūrire abantu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 nuk’ uwokwumva ijwi ry’inzamba wese, agakina ku mbūri, inkota ikaza, ikamugahura, amaraso yiwe azoba ku mutwe wiwe ubgiwe." 
Ezekiel33:5 Yumvise ijwi ry’inzamba, ariko yakinnye ku mbūri; amaraso yiwe azoba kuri we; arikw iyaba yarumviye imbūri yokijije amagara yiwe." 
Ezekiel33:6 Arikw iyo nderetsi ni yabona inkota ije, ntivuze inzamba, abantu ngo babūrirwe, inkota ikaza ikagira uwo igahura muri bo; uwo azoba agahuriwe mu bigabitanyo vyiwe, arikw amaraso yiwe nzoyarondera kur’ iyo nderetsi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Ni ko nawe, mwana w’umuntu, nagushizeho kubera ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli inderetsi; nuko wumve ijambo riva mu kanwa kanje, ubanshikiririze imbūri." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ni nabarira umunyavyaha, nt’ Ewe wa munyavyaha, ntuzobura gupfa; nawe ntugire ico uvuga co kubūrira umunyavyaha ngw ave mu ngeso ziwe: uwo munyavyaha azopfira mu bigabitanyo vyiwe, arikw amaraso yiwe ni wewe nzoyaronderako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Yamara ni wabūrira umunyavyaha ivy’ ingeso ziwe, ngw ahindukire azivemwo, na we ntāhindukire ngw azivemwo; azopfira mu bigabitanyo vyiwe, ariko weho uzoba ukijije ubugingo bgawe." 
Ezekiel33:10 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, ubarire ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, uti Musigaye muvuga, mut’ Ibicumuro vyacu n’ivyaha vyacu biri ku mitwe yacu, kandi duhondobereye muri vyo: none twoshobora dute kubaho?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Ubabgire, uti Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, simpimbarwa n’uk’ umunyavyaha apfa, atar’ uko yohindukira, akava mu ngeso ziwe, akabaho: enda ni muhindukire, mugaruke muve mu ngeso zanyu mbi; n’iki gituma mugomba gupfa, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, barira ab’ ubgoko bganyu, ut’ Ubugororotsi bg’umugororotsi ntibuzomukiza ku musi w’ibicumuro vyiwe, n’ivyaha vy’umunyavyaha ntibizomwicisha ku musi azohindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe; yamar’ umugororotsi ntazoshobora kubeshwaho na bgo ku musi azocumurako." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ni nabgira umugororotsi kw azobaho, akishimira ubugororotsi bgiwe, maz’ agakora ivy’ ukugabitanya; mu bikorwa vy’ubugororotsi bgiwe nta na kimwe kizokwibukwa, arikw ibigabitanyo vyiwe yakoze ni vyo azopfa azize." 
Ezekiel33:14 Ikindi kandi, ni nabgira umunyavyaha, nti Ntuzobura gupfa, arikw agahindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe, agakora ibitunganye n’ibikwiye," 
Ezekiel33:15 uwo munyavyaha agasubiza ingwati nyeneyo, akagarukana ivyo yambuye, akagendera mu vyagezwe bihesha ubugingo, ntagire ivy’ ukugabitanya akora, n’ukuri azobaho, ntazopfa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Mu vyaha vyiwe vyose yakoze, nta na kimwe kizokwibukwa kuri we: kukw asigaye akora ibitunganye n’ibikwiye; ntazobura kubaho." 
Ezekiel33:17 Yamar’ ab’ ubgoko bganyu baravuga, ngw Inzira y’ Umwami Imana ntiroranye: erega bo ni bo inzira zabo zitaroranye." 
Ezekiel33:18 Umugororotsi ni yahindukira akava mu bugororotsi bgiwe, agakora ivy’ ukugabitanya, azopfa ari vyo azize." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kand’ umunyavyaha ni yahindukira akava mu vyaha vyiwe, agakora ibitunganye n’ ibikwiye, azobeshwaho na vyo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Yamara muravuga, mut’ Inzira y’Umwami Imana ntiroranye. Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ngira mbacire urubanza, umuntu wese nk’ukw inzira ziwe zimeze." 
Ezekiel33:21 Maze mu mwaka ugira icumi na kabiri uhereye aho twambukaniwe tur’ inyagano, mu kwezi kw’ icumi, ku musi ugira gatanu w’ ukwo kwezi, haza umuntu acitse avuye i Yerusalemu, aranshikīra, at’ Igisagara caratsinzwe." 
Ezekiel33:22 Ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwari kwarāye kunjeko ku mugoroba, iyo mpunzi itaraza; kandi yar’ agobotoye akanwa kanje uyo atarashika aho ndi bukeye mu gitondo; nukw akanwa kanje karagobodoka, ururimi ntirwari rukigobge." 
Ezekiel33:23 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Ezekiel33:24 riti Mwana w’umuntu, abasigaye baba mu matongo yo mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli baravuga, ngo Aburahamu yar’ umwe, ariko yahawe igihugu kw ishamvu; nkanswe tweho turi benshi, natwe turagihabga kuba ishamvu yacu." 
Ezekiel33:25 Nuko rero, ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko murya inyama zitavuyemw’ amaraso, mukunamurira amaso ibigirwamana vyanyu, mukavisha amaraso: none mugira ngo mwohabga igihugu kw ishamvu?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Ko mwishimiye inkota zanyu, mugakora ibizira, umuntu wese akonona muka mugenzi we: none mugira ngo mwohabga igihugu kw ishamvu?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Ukw abe ari k’ uzobabgira, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, abasigaye mur’ ayo matongo ntibazobura guhindikiranywa n’inkota, n’ūri ku misozi nzomugabura mu bikōko bimurotse, kand’ abari mu bihome no mu masenga bazokwicwa n’ikīza." 
Ezekiel33:28 Kand’ igihugu nzogihindura imisaka n’akajoreza, ubgibone buterwa n’ububasha bgaho buzoherengetera; kand’ imisozi y’i Bgisirayeli izosigara ar’ imisaka, bitume ata wuzoba akihaca." 
Ezekiel33:29 Maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho, igihe nzoba mmaze guhindura igihugu imisaka n’akajoreza, mbahōye ibizira vyabo vyose bākoze." 
Ezekiel33:30 Kandi nawe, mwana w’umuntu, ab’ ubgoko bganyu bayāgira ivyawe ku nzitiro no mu miryango y’amazu, umwe avugana n’uwundi, umuntu wese na mugenzi we, bat’ Enda ni muze, tuje kwumva ijambo rivuye k’Uhoraho iry’ ari ryo." 
Ezekiel33:31 Maze baza kuri wewe nk’ ukw abantu basanzwe baza, bakicara imbere yawe nk’ah’ ar’ abantu banje, bakumviriza amajambo yawe, ariko ntibayakore: kuko berekanisha akanwa kabo urukundo rwinshi, yamar’ imitima yabo ikurikira ukwiyungukira kwabo." 
Ezekiel33:32 Kandi rāba, ubamerera nk’ indirimbo nziza cane y’ūfise ijwi ryiza, akaba ar’ umucuraranzi w’umuhinga: kuko bumviriza amajambo yawe, ariko ntibayakore." 
Ezekiel33:33 Arikw igihe vya bindi bizoshikira, (kand’ ehe biraje!) ni ho bazomenya yuk’ ūvugishwa n’ Imana yamye muri bo." 
Ezekiel34:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel34:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, būrira abungere baragira Abisirayeli, ubabūrire, ubgire abo bungere, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Bazobona ibara, abungere b’Abisirayeli bīragira ubgabo! Mbeg’ abungere ntibāri bakwiye kuragira intama?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Ut’ Ariko mweho muzirya ibinure, mukambara ubgoya bgazo, mukabāga izinuze; ariko ntimuragira intama." 
Ezekiel34:4 Īdakomeye ntimwayisindagije, n’īrwaye ntimwayivūye, n’īvunitse ntimwayunze, n’iyirukanywe ntimwayigarukanye, canke ngo murondere iyazimiye; ariko mwazitwaje igitugu n’amanyama." 
Ezekiel34:5 Nuko zirasābagira kukw ata mwungere; zihinduka ivyo kurya vy’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba, zirasābagira." 
Ezekiel34:6 Intama zanje zayerereye ku misozi yose, no ku gasozi kose karekare; mber’ intama zanje zāsābagiriye mw isi yose; kandi nta warushe azirondera canke ngw azibariritse." 
Ezekiel34:7 Nuko rero, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, yemwe mwa bungere:" 
Ezekiel34:8 ngo Ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, n’ ukuri intama zanje ko zahindutse inyagano, zikaba ivyo kurya vy’ ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba, kubgo kutagira umwungere, kand’ abungere banje ntibarondere intama zanje, ariko bakīragira ubgabo, ntibaragire intama zanje;" 
Ezekiel34:9 nuko rero, ni mwumve ijambo ry’ Uhoraho, yemwe mwa bungere:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba abo bungere tuzohigūra twe na bo; kand’ intama zanje nzozibaronderako, ndababuze gusubira kuziragira; kand’ abo bungere ntibazoba baciragira ukundi; nzokiza intama zanje amenyo yabo, zoye kuba inyama zabo." 
Ezekiel34:11 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba jewe, jewe ubganje, ndīgīriye kurondera intama zanje, ndazibariritse." 
Ezekiel34:12 Nk’ uk’ umwungere abariritsa umukuku wiwe mu gihe ari mu ntama ziwe zāsābagiriye kure, ni ko nanje nzobariritsa intama zanje; nzozikiza ndazikūre ahantu hose zāsābagiriye ku musi wo gufurangana w’ubgirakabiri." 
Ezekiel34:13 Kandi nzozizana ndazikūye mu mahanga, ndazikoranirize hamwe ndazikūye mu bihugu, nzozizana ndazishikane mu gihugu cazo bgite; nzoziragira ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, i ruhande y’imigende y’amazi, n’ ahantu hose har’ abantu mu gihugu." 
Ezekiel34:14 Nzoziragira mu canya ciza, kandi mu mpinga z’imisozi miremire y’i Bgisirayeli ni ho zizogira umugutu; aho ni ho zizovyagira, ziri mu mugutu mwiza, zirishe mu canya c’ubgatsi buremvye ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ni jewe ubganje nzokwiragirira intama zanje, ndazivyagize, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel34:16 Nzorondera iyazimiye, ngarukane iyahuvye, nunge īvunitse, nsindagize īrwaye, izivyibushe n’izikomeye ndazibogeke; zose nzoziragira mu buryo buroranye." 
Ezekiel34:17 Kandi nawe, mukuku wanje, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba, ngira nce urubanza hagati y’ibitungwa n’ibindi, hagati y’impfizi z’intama n’iz’ impene." 
Ezekiel34:18 Mbega muvyita icoroshe, iyo murishije umugutu mwiza, uwo mwāri mushigaje mukawutakangisha inzāra? Cank’ iyo mushōtse amazi y’umusarara, ayo mwāri mushigaje mukayaca iyondoyondo?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Maz’ intama zanje zo, zisigaye zirya ivy’ inzāra zanyu zātakanze, zigashōka ay’ inzāra zanyu zāciye iyondoyondo." 
Ezekiel34:20 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho azibariye, at’ Ehe jewe, jewe nyene, ngira nce urubanza hagati y’ibitungwa bivyibushe n’ ibindi binanutse." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ko muzisitisha imbavu n’ibitugu, izirwaye zose mukazisunikisha amahembe yanyu, gushitsa muzisanzarije kure;" 
Ezekiel34:22 ni co gituma ngira nkize umukuku wanje ngo ntube ukiba inyagano ukundi; kandi nce urubanza hagati y’ibitungwa n’ibindi. 
Ezekiel34:23 Nzoziha umwungere umwe, na we azoziragira, ni we musavyi wanje Dawidi; azoziragira, abe umwungere wazo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nanje Uhoraho, nzoba Imana yazo, n’ umusavyi wanje Dawidi azoba segaba muri zo; ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Ezekiel34:25 Kandi nzosezerana na zo isezerano ry’amahoro, kandi nzoherengeteza ibikōko vy’inkazi mu gihugu: maze zizokwibera amahoro mu gahinga, zīryamire mu mashamba." 
Ezekiel34:26 Nzoziha umugisha hamwe n’uturambi duherereye ku musozi wanje; kandi nzorekura imvura mu gihe cayo; hazogwa imvura ihesha umugisha. 
Ezekiel34:27 Maz’ igiti co mw ishamba kizokwama, isi yimbuke ivyimburo vyayo; na zo zizokwibera amahoro mu gihugu cazo; kandi zizomenya yuko jewe nd’Uhoraho, igihe nzoba mmaze kuvuna ibiti vy’ingōgo zambitswe, no kuzirokora mu maboko y’abāzihinduye abaja." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ntizizokwongera kuba inyagano z’abanyamahanga ukundi, cank’ ibikōko vyo kw isi ngo bizirotse; ariko zizokwibera amahoro, ata kiziteye ubgoba." 
Ezekiel34:29 Nzozimereza umuyigwe w’agahagarika, kandi ntizizosubira kumarwa n’inzara mu gihugu, canke gutēterezwa n’abanyamahanga ukundi." 
Ezekiel34:30 Maze zizomenya yuko jewe Uhoraho Imana yazo ndi kumwe na zo, kandi yukw ar’ abantu banje, ari bo ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel34:31 Kandi namwe ntama zanje, mwa ntama z’icibare canje, mur’ abantu, nanje nd’ Imana yanyu, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel35:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel35:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe umusozi Seyiri, uwubūrire," 
Ezekiel35:3 uwubarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ewe wa musozi Seyiri, kandi ngira nkubangurirek’ ukuboko, nguhindure amatongo n’akajoreza." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ibisagara vyawe nzobigira imisaka, nawe usigare ur’ amatongo; maz’ uzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ko wāmanye inyankane idahangūra, ukagomorera inkota Abisirayeli ku musi baboneyekw ivyago, mu gihe giherahereza ibigabitanyo vyabo;" 
Ezekiel35:6 nuko rero ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ndakugereye ibitenga vy’amaraso, kand’ amaraso azogukurikirana: k’utanse ibitenga vy’amaraso, nuko rer’ amaraso azogukurikirana." 
Ezekiel35:7 Uko ni k’umusozi Seyiri nzowuhindura akajoreza n’amatongo; kandi nzowuherengetezak’ uwahaca amaja n’amaza. 
Ezekiel35:8 Kandi nzokwuzuza imisozi yaho abahindikiranijwe baho: abāriritswe n’inkota bazogwa ku misozi yawe, no mu myonga yawe, no mu migende yawe yose y’amazi." 
Ezekiel35:9 Nzoguhindura amatongo ibihe bidashira, kand’ ibisagara vyawe ntibizosubira kugira ababibamwo: maze muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ko wagize ngw Ayo mahanga ukw ar’ abiri n’ivyo bihugu ukw ari bibiri bizoba ivyawe, ngo Ni mwe muzovyiganzira; nanje Uhoraho ari yo nari:" 
Ezekiel35:11 nuko rero ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nzogenza nk’uk’ uburake bgawe buri, bo n’ishari werekanye mu kubanka; kandi nzokwimenyekanisha muri bo, igihe nzogucirakw iteka." 
Ezekiel35:12 Nuk’ uzomenya yuko jewe, Uhoraho, numvise ibitutsi vyawe vyose watutse imisozi y’i Bgisirayeli, uti Hahindutse amatongo, turahahawe ngo tuharye." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kandi mwanyihayagijeko n’akanwa kanyu, mumpundakw amagambo yanyu: na vyo nyene naravyumvise." 
Ezekiel35:14 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Igihe isi yose izoba inezerewe, weho nzoguhindura amatongo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Nk’uko witamvye hejuru y’ishamvu y’inzu ya Isirayeli kukw icitse amatongo, uko ni ko nzokugirira: nawe uzoba amatongo, ewe wa musozi Seyiri, na Edomu hose iyo hava hakagera. Maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel36:1 Nuko mwana w’umuntu, menyesha imisozi y’i Bgisirayeli ibizoba, uti Yemwe mwa misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel36:2 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Umwansi ko yabashinyaguriye, ngw Awa! ngo Ya misozi miremire yamyeho kera izoba iyacu twiganziye:" 
Ezekiel36:3 nuko rero, shirak’ ubivuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati N’ukuri ko babagize amatongo, bakabayongobeza babaturutse impande zose, mukaba inyegu ayandi mahanga yegukiye, mugatorwakw ikineguro n’akanwa k’imvuzi, mugahinduka agatwengo ku bantu;" 
Ezekiel36:4 nuko rero, yemwe misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Umwami Uhoraho: Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abarira imisozi n’uturambi, n’imigende y’amazi n’imyonga, n’ahasigaye ar’ amatongo n’ibisagara vyacitse imisaka, bigahinduka inyagano n’ agatwengo ku masigarira y’amahanga abikikije;" 
Ezekiel36:5 mbere, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati N’ukuri mvuganye ifuhe rimeze nk’umuriro ku vy’ayandi mahanga no ku vy’Abanyedomu bose bīhaye igihugu canje kw inyegu, bari n’ umunezero wuzuye imitima, n’ akagaye kose ko mu mushaha, ngo bagitange gisahurwe." 
Ezekiel36:6 Kubg’ ivyo, vuga ibizoba ku gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, ubgire imisozi n’uturambi, n’imigende y’amazi n’ imyonga, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba, mvuganye ifuhe n’uburake, kuko mwamāramājwe n’amahanga:" 
Ezekiel36:7 ni co gitumye mbimanikiye ukuboko nkarahira, ni jewe Umwami Uhoraho mbivuze, nti N’ukuri, ayo mahanga nyene abakikije, na yo azomāramāzwa." 
Ezekiel36:8 Ariko mweho, yemwe misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, muzohūrika amashami yanyu, mutengengere ivyo gutunga abantu banje b’Abisirayeli; kuko bagira baze." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ehe mpagaze mu ruhande rwanyu, ngira mbahindukirire, kandi muzorimwa mubibgeko." 
Ezekiel36:10 Kandi nzobagwizakw abantu, ni bo nzu ya Isirayeli yose iyo bava bakagera; kand’ ibisagara bizogerērwamwo, n’amatongo azokwubakwa." 
Ezekiel36:11 Nzobagwizakw abantu n’amatungo, bigwire birondoke: nzotuma musagazwako, mumere nk’ uko mwari mumeze ubga mbere; kandi nzobagirira neza kuruta uko nabagirira ubga mbere: maze muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel36:12 Mbere nzotuma abantu bagendagenda kuri mwebge, ni bo bantu banje b’Abisirayeli; namwe muzoba ishamvu yabo, mubabere umwandu, kandi nta ho muzosubira kubīcira abana ukundi." 
Ezekiel36:13 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ko bababarira, bat’ Ur’ igihugu kimiragura abantu, kigatuma ihanga rikibamwo riba imbura;" 
Ezekiel36:14 ni co gituma utazokwongera kumiragura abantu ukundi, canke gutuma ihanga rikubamwo ryongera kuba imbura, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel36:15 Kandi sinzokundira agashinyaguro k’abanyamahanga ko wongera kwumva kakugarutseko, cank’ ibitutsi vy’amoko ko bisubira kukuzako, kand’ ihanga rikubamwo ntuzosubira kuritsitaza ukundi, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel36:16 Kand’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel36:17 riti Mwana w’umuntu, ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli igihe bāba mu gihugu cabo, bācononesha ingeso zabo n’ibikorwa vyabo: ingeso zabo imbere yanje zambereye nk’umugore ari mu miziro." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ni co catumye mbasendanishak’ uburake bganje mbahōye amaraso bāsendanishije mu gihugu, n’uko bācononesheje ibigirwamana vyabo;" 
Ezekiel36:19 maze mbasābagiriza mu mahanga, bashwiragirira mu bihugu: nabaciriye urubanza ruhwanye n’ingeso zabo n’ibikorwa vyabo." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kandi bamaze gushika mu mahanga bāgiyemwo, bātukishije izina ryanje ryera; kukw abantu bābavuga, ngw Aba n’abantu b’Uhoraho, kandi ngo Bavuye mu gihugu ciwe." 
Ezekiel36:21 Ariko natinyiriye izina ryanje ryera, iryo ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli batukishije mu mahanga bagiyemwo." 
Ezekiel36:22 Nuko rero, barira ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ibi simbikora kubganyu, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ariko ni kubg’ izina ryanje ryera, iryo mwatukishije mu mahanga mwagiyemwo." 
Ezekiel36:23 Kandi nzokwubahiriza izina ryanje rikuru ryatukishijwe mu mahanga, iryo mwatukishije hagati muri yo; nukw amahanga azomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, igihe nzokwiyerekanira muri mwebge imbere yayo ko nd’ Uwera, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel36:24 Kuko nzobakūra mu mahanga, mbakoranirize hamwe mbakūye mu bihugu vyose, mbajane mu gihugu canyu bgite." 
Ezekiel36:25 Kandi nzobamijakw amazi meza, mushire imvyiro: nzoboza imyanda yanyu yose, n’ibigirwamana vyanyu vyose." 
Ezekiel36:26 Kandi nzobaha umutima musha, mbashiremw’ impwemu nsha; nzokūra umutima ukomeye nk’ibuye mu mibiri yanyu, mbahe umutima woroshe nk’ inyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Kandi nzobashiramwo Mpwemu wanje, ndabagendeshereze mu vyagezwe vyanje, namwe muzokwitondera amabgirizwa yanje, muyashitse." 
Ezekiel36:28 Kandi muzokwibera mu gihugu nahaye ba sogokuruza, mube abantu banje, nanje mbe Imana yanyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Kandi nzobakiza ibibanduza vyose, mbahurumbirize ingano ndazikikimvye, kandi sinzobatēza inzara." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nzokikimvya ivyama ku biti biribga, n’uburumbuke mu mirima, kugira ngo mwoye gusubira kuba igitutsi mu mahanga c’uko muhoramw’ inzara." 
Ezekiel36:31 Ni ho muzokwibukira ingeso zanyu mbi, n’ibikorwa vyanyu bitari vyiza; kandi muzokwiyanka urunuka, kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyanyu n’ibizira mwakoze." 
Ezekiel36:32 Ivyo simbikora kubganyu, mubimenye, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize; mutēterezwe, mumāramāzwe n’ ingeso zanyu, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel36:33 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Umusi nzoboza ibigabitanyo vyanyu vyose nzotuma ibisagara bigerērwamwo, n’ amatongo yubakwe." 
Ezekiel36:34 Kand’ igihugu cār’ imisaka kizorimwa, naho cābonekera abāhaca bose ar’ imisaka." 
Ezekiel36:35 Bazovuga, bat’ Iki gihugu cahoze ar’ imisaka gihindutse nka rya tongo ryari muri Edeni; kand’ ibisagara vyari bicitse amatongo n’imisaka bigasanganguka, none bikikijwe inzitiro, bibamw’ abantu." 
Ezekiel36:36 Maz’ amahanga azoba akibakikije azomenya yukw ari jewe Uhoraho nubatse ahāri hārasenyutse, ngateragira imbuto ahāri hārasivye: ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kandi nzobishitsa." 
Ezekiel36:37 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazosubira kunsigūza ivyo, kugira ngo mbibakorere: nzobagwiriza abantu nk’umukuku." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ibisagara vyari vyarahomvotse bizokwuzuramw’ abantu nk’imikuku, bameze nk’imikuku y’ibimazi vyo gutangirwa i Yerusalemu mu misi mikuru yashinzwe: maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel37:1 Ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwanjeko, ansohokana ndi muri Mpwemu wiwe, anshira hagati mu kiyaya cuzuye amagufa," 
Ezekiel37:2 ancisha irya n’ino yayo: maze mbona ari menshi cane mur’ ico kiyaya; kandi yari yumye rwose. 
Ezekiel37:3 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mwana w’umuntu, mbeg’ aya magufa yoshobora kuba mazima? Ndishura, nti Mwami Uhoraho, ni wewe wobimenya." 
Ezekiel37:4 Arongera arambarira, ati Vugira kur’ aya magufa, uyabarire, uti Yemwe mwa magufa yumye, ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel37:5 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho abarira aya magufa, at’ Ehe ngira nshire impwemu muri mwebge, nuko muraba bazima." 
Ezekiel37:6 Kandi ngira mbashirekw imitsi, mbazanekw inyama, mbarenzek’ urukoba, mbashiremw’ impwemu, nuko muraba bazima; kandi muramenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel37:7 Nuko nca mvuga nk’uko mbariwe: maze nkiriko ndavuga, haba umuturagaro, mbona isi itigita, amagufa arafatana, igufa na rigenzi ryaryo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ngize ntya mbona arikw imitsi, maz’ inyama ziyazako, urukoba ruzirengako, ariko nta mpwemu zaribgajemwo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Maz’ arambarira, ati Vugira ku muyaga, vuga, mwana w’umuntu, ubarire umuyaga, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Ngwino muve ku miyaga ine, mwa mpwemu, muhumekere kur’ abo bishwe, babe bazima." 
Ezekiel37:10 Nuko nca mvuga nk’ukw ambariye, impwemu zibinjiramwo, baba bazima, baravyuka barahagarara, ar’ ingabo nyinshi cane." 
Ezekiel37:11 Nukw arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, ayo magufa ni wo muryango wose wa Isirayeli: ehe baravuga, bat’ Amagufa yacu arūmye, n’ivyizigiro vyacu birabuze, turashize rwose." 
Ezekiel37:12 None vuga, ubabarire, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe, nzorangaza imva zanyu, mbadūze muve mu mva zanyu, mwa bantu banje; kandi nzobashikana mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Nuko muzomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, igihe nzoba ndangaje imva zanyu, nkabadūza mukava muri zo, mwa bantu banje." 
Ezekiel37:14 Kandi nzobashiramwo Mpwemu wanje, mube bazima, mbashire mu gihugu canyu bgite, maze muzomenya kw ari jewe Uhoraho nabivuze kandi ndabishikije, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel37:15 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Ezekiel37:16 rit’ Ewe mwana w’ umuntu, abīra inkoni, uyandikeko, uti N’iya Yuda n’Abisirayeli bīherereje kuri we: wābīre n’iyindi nkoni, uyandikeko, uti N’iya Yosefu, inkoni ya Efurayimu, n’inzu yose y’Abisirayeli bīherereje kuri we:" 
Ezekiel37:17 uheze uzungikanyemw’ inkoni imwe, kugira ngo zihinduke imwe mu kuboko kwawe." 
Ezekiel37:18 Maz’ abantu b’ubgoko bganyu ni bakubaza, bati Mbega ntiwodusobanurira ivyo uko bigenze?" 
Ezekiel37:19 uz’ ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba ngira nābīre inkoni ya Yosefu, iri mu kuboko kwa Efurayimu, n’ imiryango y’Abisirayeli bīherereje kuri we; maze mbungikanye n’ inkoni ya Yuda, mbagire inkoni imwe, ngo babe umwe mu kuboko kwanje." 
Ezekiel37:20 Kand’ inkoni wanditseko zize zibe mu kuboko kwawe mu maso yabo. 
Ezekiel37:21 Maz’ ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba ngira nkūre Abisirayeli mu mahanga bāgiyemwo, mbakoranirize hamwe mbakūye mu mpande zose, mbashikane mu gihugu cabo bgite;" 
Ezekiel37:22 mbagire ihanga rimwe mu gihugu, ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli; kand’ umwami umwe ni we azoba umwami wabo bose. Ntibazokwongera kuba amahanga abiri ukundi, canke ngo bagabanywemw’ ubgami bubiri ukundi." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ntibazokwongera kwihumanisha ibigirwamana ukundi, cank’ ibizira vyabo, cank’ ibicumuro vyabo vyose; ariko nzobarokora mbakūre ahantu bibera bākoreye ivyaha, mbatunganye: uko ni ko bazoba abantu banje, nanje mbe Imana yabo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Kand’ umusavyi wanje Dawidi azoba umwami wabo, bose bazogira umwungere umwe; kandi bazogendera mu vyagezwe vyanje, bitondere amabgirizwa yanje, bayashitse." 
Ezekiel37:25 Bazoba mu gihugu nahaye umusavyi wanje Yakobo, aho ba sekuruza bāba: ni ho bazoba, bo n’abana babo n’abuzukuru babo, ibihe bidashira. Kandi Dawidi umusavyi wanje azoba umwami wabo gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Ezekiel37:26 Kand’ ikigeretseko, nzosezerana na bo isezerano ry’amahoro, ribabere isezerano ritazoshira. Nzohabegurira ndabagwize, kand’ ahēra hanje nzohashinga hagati yabo gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Ezekiel37:27 Ihema ryanje na ryo rizoba kumwe na bo; nanje nzoba Imana yabo, na bo bazoba abantu banje." 
Ezekiel37:28 Maz’ amahanga azomenya yukw ari jewe Uhoraho nēza Abisirayeli, igihe ahēra hanje hazoba hagati muri bo gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Ezekiel38:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryanjeko," 
Ezekiel38:2 riti Mwana w’umuntu, tungīra ijisho ryawe Gogi wo mu gihugu c’i Magogi, umwami w’i Roshi n’i Mesheki n’i Tubali, umubūrire," 
Ezekiel38:3 ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ewe Gogi, mwami w’i Roshi n’i Mesheki n’i Tubali:" 
Ezekiel38:4 nzogukimiranya, nshire igera mu mibangabanga yawe, ngukwegane n’ingabo zawe zose, n’amafarasi n’abayagenderako, bose bambaye ivyuma vyo kwīkīngiriza, ar’ igitero kinini citwaje inkinzo nto‐nto na nini‐nini, bose bafashe inkota:" 
Ezekiel38:5 ab’ i Buperesi n’abo muri Etiyopiya n’ab’ i Puti bazoba bari kumwe na bo, bose bari n’inkinzo n’inkofero z’ivyuma;" 
Ezekiel38:6 na Gomeri n’ingabo ziwe zose, n’ab’ inzu ya Togaruma baba ahahera i burārūko, n’ingabo zabo zose: mbere bazoba ar’ amahanga menshi ari kumwe nawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Kenyera witegure, mwe n’ibitero vyawe vyose bikoraniye ah’ uri, ubabere umugabisha." 
Ezekiel38:8 Hahise imisi myinshi uzovyutswa: mu myaka y’iherezo uzoza mu gihugu cābogowe gikūwekw inkota, kirimw’ ubgoko bgakoranirijwe hamwe bavuye mu mahanga menshi, bari ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli yahoze ar’ amatongo; bākūwe mu mahanga, biberaho ata co binona, bose uko bangana." 
Ezekiel38:9 Nuk’ uzodūga, uje nk’ikirura, uzoba nk’igipfungu cubikije mu gihugu, mwe n’ingabo zawe zose, n’amahanga menshi muri kumwe." 
Ezekiel38:10 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Uwo musi ni washika, hazoza ivyiyumviro mu mutima wawe, wīgīre imigabo y’ibibi:" 
Ezekiel38:11 maz’ uzovuga, uti Hinge ndūge ntere igihugu c’imihana itubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye, ngīre abibereye impore ata co binona, bose uko bangana baba ahatubakiwe inzitiro, ata n’imyugariro cank’ amarembo bagira;" 
Ezekiel38:12 kugira ng’ uhasahure, uhanyage iminyago, ubangurire ukuboko kwawe ahāhoze ar’ imisaka hagasubira kubamw’ abantu, no ku bgoko bgākoranirijwe hamwe buvuye mu mahanga, bāmaze kwironkera amatungo n’ibintu, bakibera hagati mw isi." 
Ezekiel38:13 Ab’i Sheba n’ab’i Dedani n’abadandaza b’i Tarushishi n’abahambaye nk’ imigunza y’intambge baho bose, bazokubaza, bati Mbeg’ uzanywe no gusahura? Wakoranije ico gitero cawe kunyaga iminyago, no gutwara ifeza n’izahabu, no kwishorerera amasho no gutwara ibintu, no kunyaga iminyago myinshi?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, būrira Gogi, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Kur’ uwo musi, igihe abantu banje b’Abisirayeli bazoba bibereye impore, mbega ntuzobimenya?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Ico gihe uzoza uvuye i wawe ahahera i burārūko, mwe n’amahanga menshi muzananye, bose bagendera ku mafarasi, ar’ igitero kinini n’ingabo nyinshi;" 
Ezekiel38:16 maz’ uzotera abantu banje b’Abisirayeli, umeze nk’ igipfungu cubikije mu gihugu: maze mu misi y’iherezo nzokugomora utere igihugu canje, kugira ngw amahanga az’ amenye ico ndi co, igihe nzokwiyerekanira kuri wewe imbere yabo ko nd’ Uwera, ewe Gogi!" 
Ezekiel38:17 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Mbega si wewe navuze mu bihe vya kera, mvugiye mu basavyi banje b’Abisirayeli navugisha, bābūye imyaka myinshi mur’ ico gihe, yukw ari wewe nzorungika kubatera?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Kur’ uwo musi, igihe Gogi azotera igihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, uburake bganje buzompfunduka mu mazuru, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel38:19 Kuko navuganye ifuhe n’ uburake bgaka umuriro, nti N’ ukuri, kur’ uwo musi hazoba ugutigita gukomeye mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli;" 
Ezekiel38:20 bitume amafi yo mu kiyaga, n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre, n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, n’ivyikwega vyose vyikwega hasi, n’abantu bose bari kw isi, bihindira agashitsi imbere yanje, n’imisozi yubikwe, n’ahantu h’agatembge hasiduke, n’inzitiro zose zisenyukire hasi." 
Ezekiel38:21 Nzohamagaza inkota yo kumurwaniriza ku misozi yanje yose, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize: inkota y’umuntu wese azoyirwanisha mugenzi we." 
Ezekiel38:22 Nzomushitsakw iteka namuciriyeko, ndamuhanishe ikīza no kuvishwa amaraso; kandi we n’ingabo ziwe n’ amahanga menshi ari kumwe na we, nzobarekurirakw imvura y’ isegenya, n’imināna y’urubura, n’ umuriro n’amazuku." 
Ezekiel38:23 Uko ni ko nzogaragaza icubahiro canje, niyerekane ko nd’ Uwera, kandi nzokwimenyekanisha mu maso y’ amahanga menshi; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel39:1 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, ubūrire Gogi, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ewe Gogi, wa mwami w’i Roshi n’i Mesheki n’i Tubali:" 
Ezekiel39:2 nzoguhindukiza ngushorere, nkudūgane uvuye ahahera i burārūko, ngushikane ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli;" 
Ezekiel39:3 kand’ umuheto wawe ufashe mu kubamfu nzowukubita ukoroke, n’ imyampi yawe ufashe mu kuryo ndayikororere hasi." 
Ezekiel39:4 Muzogwa ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, mwe n’ ingabo zawe zose, n’amahanga ari kumwe nawe: nzokugaburira ibisīga vy’amero vy’amoko yose, n’ ibikōko vyo mw ishamba ngo bikugabure." 
Ezekiel39:5 Uzogwa mu gahinga ka sabaderi, kukw ari jewe mbivuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel39:6 Kandi nzokwanda umuriro Magogi, n’abibera ku kiyaga ata co binona; maze bazomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel39:7 Izina ryanje ryera nzorimenyekanisha hagati mu bantu banje b’Abisirayeli; kandi sinzokunda kw izina ryanje ryongera guhumanywa ukundi: maz’ amahanga azomenya yuko jewe nd’ Uhoraho, Uwera wo mu Bisirayeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Ehe biraje, kandi bigiye gushika: uwo ni wo wa musi navuze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel39:9 Ni ho ababa mu bisagara vy’i Bgisirayeli bazosokoroka, ivyo birwanishwa babigire inkwi z’umuriro, bacane inkinzo nto‐nto na nini‐nini, n’imiheto n’imyampi, n’amacumu y’inzunga n’amatabura, babigire inkwi z’ umuriro kumara imyaka ndwi:" 
Ezekiel39:10 bitume batakirinda kuja gusenya ku misozi, canke kugira izo basatura mu kibira; kukw ivyo birwanishwa ari vyo bazogira inkwi z’umuriro: kandi bazosahura abābasahuye, banyage abābanyaze, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel39:11 Kur’ uwo musi nzoha Gogi aho guhambga mu Bgisirayeli, mu kiyaya co ku nzira y’abahita, ku ruhande rw’ikiyaga rw’i burasirazuba, bitume abahita babura aho baca; aho ni ho bazohamba Gogi n’isinzi ryiwe ryose: maze bazocita Ikiyaya c’isinzi rya Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazomara amezi ndwi babahamba, kugira ngo bahumanure igihugu." 
Ezekiel39:13 Mber’ abantu bose bo mu gihugu bazobahamba; bizobaha kuvugangwa ku musi nzoba nshizwe hejuru, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel39:14 Kandi bazotora abantu bo kwama bakora ico gikorwa; bazogendagenda mu gihugu bahamba imivyimba yasigaye ku gasozi, bafashwa n’abahita, kugira ngo bagihumanure. Ayo mezi ndwi ni yashira, bazotangura gukubāza, barondera uwoba yar’ asigaye;" 
Ezekiel39:15 kand’ abahita mu gihugu ni bahaca, hakagira ūbona igufa ry’ umuntu, az’ arishingekw ikimenyetso, gushitsa ah’abahamvyi bazorihamba mur’ ico kiyaya c’isinzi rya Gogi." 
Ezekiel39:16 Kandi hazobah’ igisagara kizokwitwa Hamona. Uko ni ko bazohumanura igihugu. 
Ezekiel39:17 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Barira ibisīga vy’amoko yose, n’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba, uti Ni mukoranire hamwe, muze; mwikoranirize hamwe muvuye impande zose, muze ku kimazi canje mbacumitiye, ikimazi gihambaye ku misozi y’i Bgisirayeli, kugira ngo murye inyama, munywe amaraso." 
Ezekiel39:18 Muzorya inyama z’abahambaye, munywe amaraso y’abaganwa bo mw isi, n’ay’ impfizi z’intama, n’ay’ imyagazi, n’ay’ impene, n’ay’ ibimasa, vyose ar’ ibivyibushe vy’i Bashani." 
Ezekiel39:19 Kandi muzorya ibinure muhāge, munywe amaraso muborerwe, vy’ibimazi mbacumitiye." 
Ezekiel39:20 Muzohāgira ku meza yanje, muhāgijwe n’amafarasi aheka abantu n’ayakwega imikogote, n’abahizi, n’ingabo zose z’intambara, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ubgiza bganje nzobushira hagati mu mahanga; kand’ amahanga yose azobona iteka nashikije, n’ukuboko kwanje nabashōreyeko." 
Ezekiel39:22 Uko ni kw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bazomenya yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo, uhereye uwo musi no mu bihe bizokurikiraho." 
Ezekiel39:23 Kand’ amahanga azomenya yukw ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bājanywekw inyagano bahōwe ibigabitanyo vyabo; kuko bāncumuyeko, bigatuma mbahisha mu nyonga hanje; nuko rero nabagabuye mu maboko y’ abarwanizi babo, bose baririkwa n’inkota." 
Ezekiel39:24 Nabashubirije mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ukwandura kwabo n’ibihwanye n’ibigabitanyo vyabo; mbahisha mu nyonga hanje. 
Ezekiel39:25 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Noneho, ngira ngarukane aba Yakobo, mbakūre mu ngoyi zabo, ngirire imbabazi ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bose, kandi mfuhire izina ryanje ryera." 
Ezekiel39:26 Bazokwibagira ibitētērwa vyabo, n’ ubuhemu bgabo bgose bāmpemukiye, ni bamara kwibera mu gihugu cabo, ata co binona, ata kibateye ubgoba," 
Ezekiel39:27 mmaze kubagarukana mbakūye mu mahanga, mbakoranirije hamwe mbakūye mu bihugu vy’abansi babo, niyerekaniye kuri bo imbere y’amahanga menshi ko nd’ Uwera." 
Ezekiel39:28 Maze bazomenyeshwa yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yabo, n’uko natumye bajanwa mu mahanga ar’ inyagano, ngatako nkabakoraniriza hamwe mu gihugu cabo bgite; kandi sinzosubira kugira n’umwe muri bo nsigayo," 
Ezekiel39:29 canke ngo nongere kubahisha mu nyonga hanje; kuko nzoba nasutse Mpwemu wanje ku nzu ya Isirayeli, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel40:1 Mu mwaka ugira mirongwibiri na gatanu uhereye aho twambukaniwe tur’ inyagano, kw itanguriro ry’umwaka, ku musi w’ icumi w’ukwezi, hashize imyaka cumi n’ine igisagara gitsinzwe, kur’ uwo musi nyene, ukuboko kw’Uhoraho kwanjeko, maz’ anjanayo." 
Ezekiel40:2 Mur’ ukwo kwerekwa n’Imana, mbona anjanye mu gihugu c’i Bgisirayeli, antereka ku musozi muremure cane, urikw icubatswe nk’igisagara aherekeye i bumanuko." 
Ezekiel40:3 Nukw anshikanaho, ngize ntya mbona umuntu ahagaze ku kirimba, afise umugozi w’ubugwegwe mu ntoke, n’irenga ry’ikigeresho." 
Ezekiel40:4 Maz’ uwo muntu arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, urakanura manini, wumvishe amatwi yawe, ushire umutima ku vyo ngira nkwereke vyose; kukw icatumye uzanwa hano kwar’ ukugira ngo mbikwereke: ivyo ubona vyose ubimenyeshe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel40:5 Mbona urugo rw’amabuye rukikije ingoro impande zose; kandi wa muntu yari n’irenga ry’ ikigeresho mu ntoke; uburebure bgaryo bgār’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, itambge ryose rirenzekw itambge ry’intoke; nukw agera intimba y’urwo rugo, iba irenga rimwe, n’uburebure bg’igihagararo buba irenga rimwe nyene." 
Ezekiel40:6 Nukw aza ku kirimba cerekeye i burasirazuba, adondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye yaho; agera ishikiro ry’ikirimba, ubgaguke bgaho buba irenga rimwe." 
Ezekiel40:7 Icumba cose c’abashibamyi, uburebure bgaco buba irenga rimwe, n’ubgaguke bgaco buba irenga rimwe nyene; hagati y’ ivyo vyumba hāri haciye amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; no mw ishikiro ry’ikirimba ryo ku rubaraza rwaco, aherekeye ku ngoro, haba irenga rimwe." 
Ezekiel40:8 Agera n’urubaraza rw’ikirimba rurābana n’ingoro, ruba irenga rimwe." 
Ezekiel40:9 Maz’ agera amakika y’urwo rubaraza rw’ikirimba, ruba amatambge munani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; agera n’ibishimaryango vyaho, biba amatambge abiri; kand’ urwo rubaraza rw’ ikirimba rwar’ aherekeye ku ngoro." 
Ezekiel40:10 Ivyumba bigendanye ico kirirīsi c’ikirimba cerekeye i burasirazuba vyāri bitatu ku ruhande rumwe, n’ibindi bitatu ku rundi; vyose ukw ari bitatu‐bitatu vyāri cabugerwe; n’ibishimaryango impande zompi vyāri cabugerwe." 
Ezekiel40:11 Agera ubgaguke bgo hagati y’ibirimba, buba amatambge cumi; kand’ uburebure bg’ikirimba buba amatambge cumi n’atatu;" 
Ezekiel40:12 imirēre yaca imbere y’ivyo vyumba yar’ iy’ itambge rimwe ku ruhande rumwe, n’iyindi mirēre yar’ iy’ itambge rimwe ku rundi; n’ivyo vyumba nyene vyār’ amatambge atandatu y’amakika n’ayandi atandatu y’amadūga." 
Ezekiel40:13 Maz’ agera ico kirimba, ahereye hejuru ku cumba kimwe agashitsa ku kindi: ubgaguke buba amatambge mirongwibiri n’atanu, uk’ umuryango urābana n’uwundi." 
Ezekiel40:14 Aharūra amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ ibishimaryango; kand’ urugo rwagarukira kur’ ivyo bishimaryango, imbere y’ikirimba." 
Ezekiel40:15 Uhereye inyuma mw ishikiro ry’ikirimba ugashitsa ku rubaraza rw’ikirimba rw’imbere yar’ amatambge mirongwitanu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Kandi hār’ amadirisha atugururwa kur’ ivyo vyumba, no ku bishimaryango n’uko, aharābana n’imbere mu kirimba impande zose, n’urubaraza nyene; amadirisha yar’ impande zose z’ imbere; kandi ku gishimaryango cose hāri hashushanijwekw ibigazi." 
Ezekiel40:17 Maz’ anshikana mu rugo rwo mu ntangaro; mbona ivyumba n’ umusezero w’amabuye ujanye urugo impande zose: hār’ ivyumba mirongwitatu kur’ uwo musezero. 
Ezekiel40:18 Mu mpande z’ibirimba ni ho uwo musezero wagendera, uringaniye n’ikirirīsi c’ikirimba cose, ni wo musezero wo mu ntangaro." 
Ezekiel40:19 Maz’ agera uburebure ahereye imbere y’ikirimba c’intangaro, ashitsa mw ishikiro ry’ikirimba c’ inyubakwa, haba amatambge hamwe ijana ahandi ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, i burasirazuba n’i burārūko." 
Ezekiel40:20 Agera uburebure bg’ikirirīsi c’ikirimba c’intangaro kirābana n’i burārūko, agera n’ ubgaguke bgaco." 
Ezekiel40:21 Ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco vyāri bitatu ku ruhande rumwe n’ibindi bitatu ku rundi; n’ibishimaryango vyaco n’urubaraza rwaco vyāri cabugerwe n’ivy’ ikirimba ca mbere: ikirirīsi caco kiba amatambge mirongwitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’ubgaguke buba mirongwibiri n’atanu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Amadirisha yo kuri co n’amabaraza yaco, n’ ibigazi bishushanijwe kuri co, vyāri cabugerwe n’ivy’ ikirimba kirābana n’i burasirazuba; abāhashika bādondagira ku ngazi y’ amabuye y’intambuko ndwi; kand’ amabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera imbere." 
Ezekiel40:23 Inyubakwa yar’ ifise ikirimba kirābana n’ico kirimba c’intangaro aherekeye i burārūko, kandi n’ibirimba vyerekeye i burasirazuba ni ko vyari bimeze; maz’ agera ahereye ku kirimba kimwe agashika ku kindi, biba amatambge ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Ezekiel40:24 Maz’ anjana aherekeye i bumanuko; ngize ntya mbona har’ ikirimba kirābana n’i bumanuko; agera ibishimaryango vyaco n’ amabaraza yaco, nk’ukw amatambge ya mbere yangana." 
Ezekiel40:25 Kandi kuri co hārikw amadirisha bo no ku mabaraza yaco impande zose, nka ya madirisha ya mbere: uburebure bg’ikirirīsi caco buba amatambge mirongwitanu, n’ubgaguke bgaco buba mirongwibiri n’ atanu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko ndwi; kand’ amabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera imbere: kandi cāri gishushanijwekw ibigazi, kimwe ku ruhande rumwe ikindi ku rundi, ku bishimaryango vyaco." 
Ezekiel40:27 Kandi hāri n’ikirimba kija mu nyubakwa ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko: maz’ agera ahereye kur’ ico kirimba agashika ku kindi, biba amatambge ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Ezekiel40:28 Maz’ anshikana mu nyubakwa ancishije mur’ ico kirimba c’ ahahera i bumanuko: arakigera, gihwana n’ukw amatambge ya mbere angana;" 
Ezekiel40:29 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco, n’ ibishimaryango vyaco, n’amabaraza yaco, bihwana n’ukw amatambge ya mbere angana: kandi kuri co hārikw amadirisha bo no ku mabaraza yaco impande zose: uburebure bg’ikirirīsi caco buba amatambge mirongwitanu, n’ubgaguke bgaco buba mirongwibiri n’ atanu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kandi hār’ amabaraza ahakikije, uburebure bgayo bgār’ amatambge mirongwibiri n’atanu, ubgaguke bgayo bgār’ atanu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ayo mabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera mu ntangaro; ku bishimaryango vyaco hari hashushanijwekw ibigazi: kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani. 
Ezekiel40:32 Maz’ anshikana mu nyubakwa ahahera i burasirazuba: agera ikirimba caho, gihwana n’ukw amatambge ya mbere angana;" 
Ezekiel40:33 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco, n’ibishimaryango vyaco, n’amabaraza yaco, bihwana n’ukw amatambge ya mbere angana: kandi kuri co hārikw amadirisha bo no ku mabaraza yaco impande zose: uburebure bg’ ikirirīsi caco buba amatambge mirongwitanu, n’ubgaguke bgaco buba mirongwibiri n’atanu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Amabaraza yaco yar’ ahahera mu ntangaro; ku bishimaryango vyaco hāri hashushanijwekw ibigazi ku ruhande rumwe no ku rundi; kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani. 
Ezekiel40:35 Maz’ anshikana ku kirimba c’ahahera i burārūko; arakigera, gihwana n’ukw amatambge ya mbere angana;" 
Ezekiel40:36 agera n’ivyumba bigendanye ikirirīsi caco, n’ ibishimaryango vyaco, n’amabaraza yaco, kandi kuri co hārikw amadirisha impande zose: uburebure bg’ikirirīsi caco buba amatambge mirongwitanu, n’ubgaguke bgaco buba mirongwibiri n’atanu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ibishimaryango vyaco vyār’ ahahera mu ntangaro; kur’ ivyo bishimaryango hāri hashushanijwekw ibigazi ku ruhande rumwe no ku rundi; kuhashika kwār’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye y’intambuko munani. 
Ezekiel40:38 Kandi hār’ akumba gafise umuryango urābana n’ibishimaryango vy’ico kirimba; aho ni ho bāronga ibimazi vyo kwoswa. 
Ezekiel40:39 No ku rubaraza rw’ikirimba hār’ ameza abiri ku ruhande rumwe, n’ ayandi abiri ku rundi, yo kubāgirakw ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ibimazi bitangirwa ivyaha n’ibimazi bitangirwa ibicumuro." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ku ruhande rw’inyuma, mw ishikiro aho badūgira mu kirimba kirābana n’i burārūko, hār’ ameza abiri, no ku rundi ruhande aharābana n’urubaraza rwo ku kirimba, hār’ ayandi abiri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Ku ruhande rumwe hār’ ameza ane, no ku rundi yandi ane, aho nyene ku kirimba; ayo meza ukw ar’ umunani bāyabāgirakw ibimazi." 
Ezekiel40:42 Kandi hāri n’ameza ane y’ibimazi vyo kwoswa, yubakishijwe amabuye abājwe; uburebure bgayo bgār’ itambge rimwe n’igihimba ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’ubgaguke bgayo rimwe n’igihimba nyene, n’igihagararo cayo cār’ itambge rimwe: aho ni ho bāfasha ibikoreshwa vyo kubāgisha ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ ibindi bimazi." 
Ezekiel40:43 Hāri n’imambo zinegagiye ku nzu imbere impande zose; uburebure bgazo bgar’ itambge rimwe ry’intoke; kandi ku meza hār’ inyama zo guhēreza. 
Ezekiel40:44 Hepfo y’ikirimba c’inyubakwa hār’ ivyumba vy’abaririmvyi imbere mu nyubakwa, i ruhande y’ ikirimba c’ahahera i burārūko, birābana n’i bumanuko; kimwe cār’ i ruhande y’ikirimba c’ahahera i burasirazuba, kirābana n’i burārūko." 
Ezekiel40:45 Maz’ arambarira, at’ Iki cumba kirābana n’i bumanuko n’ic’ abaherezi bājejwe ingoro." 
Ezekiel40:46 Kand’ icumba kirābana n’i burārūko n’ic’ abaherezi bājejwe igicaniro: ari bo bene Sadoki, ni bo bo mu ruvyaro rwa Lewi bēgēra Uhoraho ngo bamukorere." 
Ezekiel40:47 Nukw agera inyubakwa, uburebure buba amatambge ijana y’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’ ubgaguke buba amatambge ijana nyene, ingana impande zose ukw ari zine; kand’ igicaniro cār’ imbere y’ingoro." 
Ezekiel40:48 Maz’ anshikana ku rubaraza rw’ingoro, agera ibisapfu vyompi vyo ku rubaraza, biba amatambge atanu ku ruhande rumwe n’ayandi atanu ku rundi: n’amakika y’ivyo bisapfu aba atatu ku ruhande rumwe n’ayandi atatu ku rundi." 
Ezekiel40:49 Uburebure bg’urubaraza bgār’ amatambge mirongwibiri, n’ubgaguke bgar’ icumi na rimwe; kuhashika kwar’ ukudondagira ku ngazi y’amabuye; kandi hār’ inkingi imbere y’ivyo bisapfu, imwe ku ruhande rumwe, iyindi ku rundi." 
Ezekiel41:1 Maz’ anjana ku rusengero, agera ibisapfu vyarwo, ubgaguke bgavyo buba amatambge atandatu ku ruhande rumwe, ayandi atandatu ku rundi, y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, nk’uk’ ubgaguke bg’ihema bgāri buri." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ubgaguke bgo mw irebe buba amatambge cumi; kand’ impande z’irebe, rumwe ruba amatambge atanu, urundi ruba atanu nyene; maz’ agera uburebure bgarwo bg’ umurambararo, buba amatambge mirongwine, n’ubgaguke buba mirongwibiri." 
Ezekiel41:3 Maz’ adwēbēra imbere, agera ibisapfu vyaho vyompi, biba amatambge abiri, no mw irebe haba amatambge atandatu, n’ubgaguke bgo ku mpande z’irebe, buba amatambge ndwi‐ndwi." 
Ezekiel41:4 Agera n’uburebure bgaho bg’ umurambararo, buba amatambge mirongwibiri, n’ubgaguke buba mirongwibiri nyene, aharābana n’ahēra h’urusengero: maz’ arambarira, at’ Aha n’Ahēra Cane." 
Ezekiel41:5 Maz’ agera intimba y’inzu, iba amatambge atandatu; n’ubgaguke bg’akumba kose kometseko mu mbavu buba amatambge ane, twāri dukikije ku nzu impande zose." 
Ezekiel41:6 Kand’ utwo twumba two mu mbavu twāri mu mirongo itatu, umwe ugeretse ku wundi; mu murongo mu murongo hār’ utwumba mirongwitatu; imbaho zatwo zari zinjiye mu gisika, uko twubatswe inyuma ku ngoro impande zose; zari zifashe ahaniguye ku gisika c’ingoro ubgayo, ariko zitinjiyemwo." 
Ezekiel41:7 Utwo twumba two mu mbavu twagenda turutana uko tudūze dukikije ingoro, kukw aho haniguye hakikije ingoro, na ho hāgenda harutana uko hadūze, bigatuma igisika c’ingoro ubgayo kigenda gikeha uko kidūze; kand’ uwūrira mu kumba ko hejuru avuye mu ko hasi yaca mu ko hagati." 
Ezekiel41:8 Mbona yukw iyo ngoro yari n’ itanguriro rirerire impande zose; amatanguriro y’utwumba two mu mbavu yar’ irenga rimwe ry’ amatambge atandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora n’ayandi atandatu y’intoke. 
Ezekiel41:9 Intimba y’ igisika cubakiwe utwo twumba two mu mbavu, ahahera hanze, yar’ amatambge atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; maz’ ahasigaye hār’ ahākebewe utwo twumba two mu mbavu two ku ngoro." 
Ezekiel41:10 Kandi guhera kur’ utwo twumba hār’ umwanya w’amatambge mirongwibiri ukikuje ingoro impande zose. 
Ezekiel41:11 Imiryango y’utwo twumba two mu mbavu yari yerekeye ha handi hāsigaye; umuryango umwe wari werekeye i burārūko, uwundi i bumanuko: kand’ aho hāsigaye, ubgaguke bgaho bgār’ amatambge atanu impande zose." 
Ezekiel41:12 Kandi hār’ inzu yar’ imbere y’ uwo mwanya uciye hagati, ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwirindwi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, intimba y’iyo nzu yar’ amatambge atanu‐atanu impande zose, n’uburebure bgayo bgar’ amatambge mirongwicenda." 
Ezekiel41:13 Nukw agera uburebure bg’ umurambararo bg’ingoro buba amatambge ijana; agera n’uwo mwanya uciye hagati bo na ya nzu n’intimba yayo, uburebure bgavyo buba amatambge ijana nyene;" 
Ezekiel41:14 agera n’ubgaguke bg’imbere y’ urusengero bo na wa mwanya uciye hagati aharābana n’i burasirazuba, na vyo biba amatambge ijana." 
Ezekiel41:15 Agera n’uburebure bg’ umurambararo bga ya nzu irābana na wa mwanya uciye hagati inyuma y’ingoro, bo n’amabaraza yo ku mpande zompi, biba amatambge ijana nyene. Imbere mu rusengero, n’amabaraza y’inyubakwa," 
Ezekiel41:16 no mw irebe, n’amadirisha atugururwa, n’amabaraza aciye impande zose za twa twumba turi mu mirongo itatu igerekeranye, aharābana n’irebe, hāri haranze imbaho impande zose, uhereye hasi ugashika ku madirisha, kand’ ayo madirisha nyene yarimw’ inshingo;" 
Ezekiel41:17 no gushitsa hejuru y’irebe, n’ahitereye imbere mu ngoro, bo n’inyuma, bo n’inzu impande zose imbere n’ inyuma, vyose vyāri ku rugero." 
Ezekiel41:18 Kandi vyāri bisharijwekw ibishushanyo vy’abakerubi n’ibigazi; hagati y’umukerubi n’uwundi hāri harobetse ikigazi; kand’ umukerubi wese yar’ afise mu maso habiri," 
Ezekiel41:19 ahasa n’ah’ umuntu harābana n’ikigazi ku ruhande rumwe, n’ahasa n’ah’ umugunza w’intambge harābana n’ikindi kigazi ku rundi ruhande. Uko ni ko vyashushanijwe guheza inzu yose impande zose." 
Ezekiel41:20 Uhereye hasi ugashitsa hejuru y’irebe hari hashushanijwekw abakerubi n’ibigazi; uko ni ko vyashushanijwe guheza urusengero rwose. 
Ezekiel41:21 Ibisapfu vy’urusengero vyangana impande zose; kand’ uruhande rw’imbere rw’Ahēra Cane rwāsa kumwe n’urusengero. 
Ezekiel41:22 Igicaniro car’ ikibazano; uburebure bg’igihagararo bgaco bgar’ amatambge atatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’uburebure bg’ amakika bgar’ amatambge abiri; inkokora zaco no mu ntebe haco n’imbavu zaco, hose car’ ikibazano: maz’ arambarira, at’ Aya ni yo meza ar’ imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel41:23 Kand’ urusengero n’Ahēra Cane vyari bifise amarebe abiri; 
Ezekiel41:24 amarebe yompi yar’ afise inzugi zibiri zisomana; irebe rimwe ryagira inzugi zibiri, irindi zindi zibiri." 
Ezekiel41:25 Kand’ izo nzugi z’urusengero zāri zishushanijwekw abakerubi n’ibigazi, nk’uko vyari bishushanijwe ku nzu; kandi ku rubaraza ahahera inyuma hāri haranze imbaho z’intimba nini." 
Ezekiel41:26 Kandi hār’ amadirisha atugururwa n’ibigazi bishushanijwe ku rubaraza hirya no hino mu mpande zarwo; utwumba two mu mbavu z’ingoro, bo n’imbaho, uko ni ko vyari bimeze." 
Ezekiel42:1 Maz’ ankūrayo, anshikana mu ntangaro, aherekeye i burārūko; anyinjiza mu nzu irimw’ ivyumba irābana na wa mwanya uciye hagati, irābana n’ingoro, ahahera i burārūko." 
Ezekiel42:2 Uruhande rwarimw’ urugi rw’aharābana n’i burārūko, uburebure bgaho bg’ amakika bgar’ amatambge ijana y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke na bgo bgar’ amatambge mirongwitanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Iyo nzu yari n’ amabaraza agerekeranye mu mirongo itatu, arābana n’ah’ amatambge mirongwibiri ho mu nyubakwa, kand’ arābana na wa musezero w’amabuye wo mu ntangaro." 
Ezekiel42:4 Imbere y’iyo nzu irimw’ ivyumba hār’ inzira, ubgaguke bgayo bgar’ amatambge cumi, hāri n’akayira k’itambge rimwe; kand’ imiryango y’ivyo vyumba yarāba i burārūko." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ivyumba vyo hejuru vyarutwa n’ivyo hasi bo n’ivyo hagati mur’ iyo nzu, kuko vyakehejwe n’amabaraza yavyo." 
Ezekiel42:6 Kuko vyubatswe mu mirongo itatu igerekeranye, ariko bidafise inkingi nk’izo mu rugo: bituma ivyumba vyo hejuru biba impfunda kurenza ivyo hasi n’ivyo hagati." 
Ezekiel42:7 Igisika c’ahahera inyuma y’inzu irimw’ ivyumba kirābana no mu ntangaro imbere y’ibindi vyumba, uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge mirongwitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Ezekiel42:8 Kuko vya vyumba birāba mu ntangaro, uburebure bgavyo bgār’ amatambge mirongwitanu; arik’ ubg’ ibir’ imbere y’urusengero vyo bgar’ amatambge ijana." 
Ezekiel42:9 Musi y’ivyo vyumba hār’ icanzo, ahahera i burasirazuba, cācibgamwo n’abajayo bava mu ntangaro." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mu ntimba y’urugo rw’amabuye rw’inyubakwa ahahera i burasirazuba, na ho hār’ ivyumba, vyar’ imbere y’umwanya uciye hagati, imbere y’ingoro." 
Ezekiel42:11 Inzira yaca imbere yavyo yasa n’iyaca imbere y’ivyumba vy’ aherekeye i burārūko; ivyo hino n’ ivyo hirya vyose vyari cabugerwe mu burebure no mu bgaguke, n’ imiryango yavyo yose na yo yar’ uburyo bumwe, n’inzugi zavyo ni nk’uko." 
Ezekiel42:12 Inzugi z’ivyumba vy’aherekeye i bumanuko na zo ni ko zari zimeze. Ku mutwe w’ inzira, ari yo nzira yo mu nyubakwa irābana n’i burasirazuba, hār’ icanzo, cācibgamwo n’abajayo." 
Ezekiel42:13 Maz’ arambarira, at’ Ivyumba vy’ahahera i burārūko n’ivy’ ahahera i bumanuko bihereranye na wa mwanya uciye hagati, ivyo n’ ivyumba vyera, ah’ ibintu vyera cane bizorīrwa n’abaherezi bahora bēgēra Uhoraho; aho ni ho bazotereka ivyera cane, n’ishikanwa ry’ifu, n’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, n’ikimazi gitangirwa ibicumuro; kukw ar’ ahantu hēra." 
Ezekiel42:14 Abaherezi iyo binjiye ahēra, ntibaze baveyo ngo baje mu ntangaro, badasizey’ imyambaro yabo y’ubuherezi, kukw ar’ iyera; ariko bambare iyindi myambaro, babone kwegerana n’abantu." 
Ezekiel42:15 Nukw arangije kugera imbere mu ngoro, ancisha mu kirimba kirāba i burasirazuba, agera urugo impande zose." 
Ezekiel42:16 Agera ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba, ageresheje irenga ry’ikigeresho, ruba amatambge amajana atanu y’irenga kur’ urwo ruhande rwose." 
Ezekiel42:17 Maz’ agera ku ruhande rw’i burārūko, ruba amatambge amajana atanu y’iryo renga ry’ikigeresho kur’ urwo ruhande rwose." 
Ezekiel42:18 Agera uruhande rw’i bumanuko, ruba amatambge amajana atanu y’iryo renga ry’ikigeresho." 
Ezekiel42:19 Maz’ ahindukirira mu ruhande rw’i burengerazuba, ahageresha iryo renga ry’ikigeresho, ruba amatambge amajana atanu nyene." 
Ezekiel42:20 Uko ni ko yageze izo mpande ukw ari zine: urugo rwari ruhakikuje impande zose, uburebure bgarwo bgar’ amatambge amajana atanu, n’ubgaguke bgarwo yandi majana atanu nyene; urwo rugo rwar’ urwo gutandukanya ahēra n’ahatar’ ahēra." 
Ezekiel43:1 Maze hanyuma anjana ku kirimba, ni co kirimba c’ ahahera i burasirazuba:" 
Ezekiel43:2 ngize ntya mbona ubgiza bg’Imana y’ Abisirayeli buje buturutse mu nzira y’i burasirazuba. Ijwi ryayo ryari rimeze nk’ugusūma kw’ amazi menshi; isi ikayanganishwa n’ubgiza bgayo. 
Ezekiel43:3 Ivyo neretswe vyari bimeze nk’ivyo neretswe igihe nazanwa no guhonnya igisagara; ivyo neretswe vyari bimeze nk’ivyo nerekewe ku ruzi Kebari; maze nikubita hasi nubamye. 
Ezekiel43:4 Maz’ ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bginjira mu ngoro buciye mu kirimba gihera i burasirazuba. 
Ezekiel43:5 Mpwemu aranterura, anshikana mu nyubakwa; ngize ntya, mbona ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzuye ingoro." 
Ezekiel43:6 Maze numva ūmbarira ari mu ngoro; nuk’ umuntu aca ampagarara i ruhande. 
Ezekiel43:7 Arambgira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, aha hantu n’ah’ intebe yanje y’ubgami, n’ ahantu ibirenge vyanje bizohora bishinze, ni ho nzobana n’Abisirayeli ndi hagati muri bo gushitsa ibihe bidashira: kand’ ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli ntibazokwongera kwanduza izina ryanje ryera ukundi, bo ubgabo, cank’ abami babo, ngo baryandurishe ubumaka bgabo, cank’ imivyimba y’abami babo iri mu ntatemwa zabo," 
Ezekiel43:8 kuko begereje irebe ryabo hambavu y’irebe ryanje, n’igisapfu cabo hambavu y’igisapfu canje, hagati yanje na bo hagaca urugo gusa; bakandurisha izina ryanje ryera ibizira vyabo bākora: ni co catumye mbayogeza mfise uburake." 
Ezekiel43:9 Noneho ni bankūre imbere ubgo bumaka bgabo, n’imivyimba y’abami babo, babinshire kure, mbone kuba hagati muri bo gushitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Ezekiel43:10 Nuko rero, mwana w’umuntu, uze wereke ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli iyi ngoro, kugira ngo bamāramāzwe n’ibigabitanyo vyabo; bayigere nk’ukw ikigereranyo cayo kimeze." 
Ezekiel43:11 Maze ni bamāramāzwa n’ivyo bākoze vyose, ubamenyeshe iyo ngoro ukw isa, n’ imyubakire yayo ukw imeze, no mw isohokero ry’irebe ryayo no mu rwinjiriro rwayo, n’ukw imeze hose, n’amabgirizwa yayo yose, n’ukw isa hose, n’ivyagezwe vyayo vyose; uvyandikire imbere yabo, kugira ngo bame bibuka ukw isa yose, n’amabgirizwa yayo yose, kugira ngo bayitondere." 
Ezekiel43:12 Iki ni co cagezwe c’iyo ngoro: mw itāba ry’uwo murwa, ah’ urugabano rwayo ruyikīkūje hose rugarukira, hazoba hēra cane. Eh’ ico ni co cagezwe c’ingoro." 
Ezekiel43:13 Kand’ aya az’ abe ari yo matambge y’igicaniro, y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora (itambge ryose rize rirenzekw itambge ry’intoke): intebe yaco, uburebure bg’igihagararo bube itambge rimwe, no mw iniguriro ryayo aho rigera, bube itambge rimwe nyene; n’ umubuga wayo uyikikuje ube uw’ itambge rimwe ry’intoke; uko ni kw intebe y’igicaniro ikwiye kumera." 
Ezekiel43:14 Guhera ku ntebe hasi gushitsa ku ntera y’ahahera hepfo, habe amatambge abiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, no mw iniguriro ry’iyo ntera aho rigera, habe itambge rimwe; kandi guhera kur’ iyo ntera ngufi ugashitsa ku ntera ndende habe amatambge ane, no mw iniguriro ry’iyo ntera aho rigera, habe itambge rimwe." 
Ezekiel43:15 N’ ahahera hejuru ku gicaniro habe amatambge ane; kandi hejuru ku gicaniro ahacanwa nyene haze hashingwe amahembe ane. 
Ezekiel43:16 Aho gucanwa, uburebure bg’amakika bgaho bube amatambge cumi n’ abiri, n’ubgaguke bube icumi n’ abiri nyene, impande zose ukw ari zine zingane." 
Ezekiel43:17 Kand’ intera gihagazeko, uburebure bgayo bg’ amakika bube amatambge cumi n’ane, n’ubgaguke bube icumi n’ane nyene, impande zose ukw ari zine zingane; umubuga wayo uyikikuje ugende ar’ igihimba c’itambge ry’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, no mw iniguriro aho rigera rigende ar’ itambge rimwe impande zose. Ingazi yaco iherēre i burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel43:18 Maz’ arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Aya ni yo mabgirizwa y’igicaniro bazoshitsa umusi bazocubaka, kugira ngo bacoserezekw ibimazi, bakimijekw amaraso." 
Ezekiel43:19 Abaherezi b’ Abalewi, bo mu ruvyaro rwa Sadoki, ari bo bampora hafi ngo bankorere, uz’ ubahe imasa y’umukangara, ibe ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel43:20 Uze wābīre ku maraso yaco, uyashire ku mahembe ukw ar’ ane y’igicaniro, no ku nkokora z’intera yaco ukw ari zine, no ku mubuga uyikikuje impande zose: uko ni k’uzogihumanura, ukagitangira impongano." 
Ezekiel43:21 Kand’ uze wābīre iyo masa y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, bagituririre ahāshinzwe mu gikebere c’iyo ngoro, inyuma y’ahēra." 
Ezekiel43:22 Maze ku musi ugira kabiri uz’ utange isuguru y’impene itagira agasembga kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; bayihumanuze igicaniro nk’uko bāgihumanurishije ya masa. 
Ezekiel43:23 Ni waheza kugihumanura, uz’ utange imasa y’umukangara itagira agasembga, n’isuguru y’intama itagira agasembga ikūwe mu mukuku." 
Ezekiel43:24 Uheze uvyigize hafi imbere y’Uhoraho, abaherezi babimemerek’ umunyu, babitangekw ibimazi vyoserezwa Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel43:25 Uko bukeye kumara imisi ndwi, uze wame ugera isuguru y’impene yo kuba ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha; kandi baze bame bagera imasa y’ umukangara n’isuguru y’intama ikūwe mu mukuku, bitagira agasembga." 
Ezekiel43:26 Baze bamare imisi ndwi batangira igicaniro impongano, bagihumanure; uko ni ko bazokirobanura." 
Ezekiel43:27 Maze ni barangiza iyo misi, uhereye umusi ugira umunani, abaherezi baze bahereko babatangire ibimazi vyanyu ku gicaniro, ari vyo bimazi vyo kwoswa n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe; nanje nzobākīrira, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel44:1 Maz’ arangarukana anshikana ku kirimba c’ahēra, kir’ inyuma kirābana n’i burasirazuba, ariko cari kijishe." 
Ezekiel44:2 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, at’ Iki kirimba kize came kijishe, ntikize kijishurwe, canke ngo hagire umuntu n’ umwe agicamwo, kuko jewe Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli ari jewe nagiciyemwo; ni co gituma kizohora kijishe." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ariko segaba we, ni we azohavyagira ngw ahafungurire ivy’ ibimazi imbere yanje, jewe Uhoraho, kukw ari we segaba; az’ ashikeyo aciye mu rubaraza rw’ikirimba, kandi ni yavayo az’ ajane iyo nzira nyene." 
Ezekiel44:4 Maz’ anshikana imbere y’ingoro ancishije mu kirimba kirābana n’i burārūko; maze ngize ntya mbona ubgiza bg’Uhoraho bguzuye ingoro y’Uhoraho: nca nikubita hasi nubamye. 
Ezekiel44:5 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Mwana w’umuntu, shirak’ umutima, ukanure manini, utege amatwi, ivyo ngira nkubarire vyose vy’amabgirizwa yose y’ingoro y’Uhoraho, n’ivyagezwe vyayo vyose; ushire umutima ku rwinjiriro rw’iyo ngoro, no kw isohokero ryose ry’ ahēra." 
Ezekiel44:6 Uz’ ubgire ba bagarariji, ari bo nzu ya Isirayeli, ut’ Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ibizira vyanyu vyose mwakoze birahāgije," 
Ezekiel44:7 ko mwinjije abanyamahanga batākebge mu mitima no ku mibiri ngo babe ahēra hanje, ngo bahumanye ingoro yanje, igihe mutanga ivyo kurya vyanje vy’ ibinure n’amaraso, maze bakica isezerano ryanje, bakongereza ku bizira vyanyu vyose." 
Ezekiel44:8 Kandi ntimwarinze ivyera vyanje mwajejwe, arikw ahēra hanje mwahajeje abandi mu gishingo canyu." 
Ezekiel44:9 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Nta munyamahanga atakebge mu mutima no ku mubiri, azokwinjira ahēra hanje, w’umunyamahanga wese ari mu Bisirayeli." 
Ezekiel44:10 Mbere n’Abalewi bāngiye kure, igihe Abisirayeli bāzimira, bakanta bagakurikira ibigirwamana vyabo, na bo bazogibgako n’ibigabitanyo vyabo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Bazosigara ar’ ibikomaguzi ahēra hanje, bashibama ku birimba biherereye ku ngoro, bakore n’ibikorwa vyo mu ngoro: bazobāgira abantu buntu ibimazi vyo kwoswa n’ibindi bimazi, bahagarare imbere yabo babakorera." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ko bābakoreye bar’ imbere y’ibigirwamana vyabo, bakabera ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli igitsitaza co kubacumuza, ni co catumye mmanika ukuboko mbarahira yuko bazogibgako n’ibigabitanyo vyabo, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ntibazonyegēra ngo bankorere igikorwa c’ubuherezi, canke ngo bagire ico bēgēra mu bintu vyanje vyera, mu bintu vyanje vyera cane; ariko bazofatwa n’ibitētērwa vy’ibizira bakoze." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nzobahindura abo kuzezwa ingoro, mbahe gukora ibikorwa vyaho vyose, bakore n’ikintu cose kihakorwa." 
Ezekiel44:15 Arikw abaherezi b’Abalewi, bene Sadoki, bāsigaye bitondera ivyo bājejwe vy’ahēra hanje igihe Abisirayeli bāzimira bakanta, abo bo bazonyegēra kugira ngo bankorere; bazohagarara imbere yanje bampēreza ibinure n’amaraso, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize:" 
Ezekiel44:16 bazokwinjira ahēra hanje, bēgēre ameza yanje, kugira ngo bankorere, bazigame ivyo nabajeje." 
Ezekiel44:17 Kandi ni baza baciye mu birimba vy’ inyubakwa, baze bāze bambaye imyambaro yera; ntibaze bagire ico bambara c’ubgoya igihe bakorera ku birimba vy’inyubakwa no mu ngoro." 
Ezekiel44:18 Baze bambare ibitambara vyera mu mitwe, bakenyere amabutura yera; ntihakagire ico bazokenyera cobatera kubira ivyuya." 
Ezekiel44:19 Kandi ni basohoka bagashika mu ntangaro, ngo bēgēre abantu bariyo, baze babanze biyambure imyambaro iyo bambara bahereza, bayibīke mu vyumba vyera; maze bambare iyindi myambaro kugira ngo boye kwezesha abantu imyambaro yabo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Kandi ntibakimoshe inkomvorera, canke ngo batereke umushatsi muremure, baze bīkatishe gusa." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ntihakagire uwo mu baherezi anywa vino igihe bagira baje mu nyubakwa. 
Ezekiel44:22 Kandi ntibaze bacūre abapfakazi, canke ngo bābīre uwirukanywe: ariko baze basabe inkumi zo mu ruvyaro rw’inzu ya Isirayeli, canke se baze bacūre umupfakazi yapfakaye mu baherezi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Baze bigishe abantu banje gutandukanya ivyera n’ibitar’ ivyera, babamenyeshe itandukaniro ry’ibihumanye n’ibidahumanye."
