Ezekiel44:24 Mu mibūrano baze babe ari bo baca imanza; nk’ukw ivyagezwe vyanje bibgiriza, abe ari ko bazica; kandi baze bitondere ivyagezwe vyanje n’amabgirizwa yanje mu misi mikuru yanje yose yashinzwe; kandi baziririze n’amasabato yanje." 
Ezekiel44:25 Ntibakēgēre umuvyimba w’umuntu n’umwe kugira ngo ntibīhumanye; nta bandi bokwihumanisha shit’ abaye se canke nyina, cank’ umuhungu wiwe cank’ umukobga wiwe, canke mukuru we canke murumuna we, canke mushiki we atarābīrwa." 
Ezekiel44:26 Maze ni yamara guhumanurwa bamuharūrire imisi ndwi. 
Ezekiel44:27 Umusi azosubira gushika ahēra, agashika mu nyubakwa, akaja ahēra ngw ahereze, az’ atange ikimazi co kubgiwe gitangirwa ivyaha, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel44:28 Kandi ntihaze hagire uwundi mugabane bagira: umugabane wabo ni jewe; ntimuze mubahe ishamvu mu Bisirayeli: ishamvu yabo ni jewe. 
Ezekiel44:29 Baze barye kw ishikanwa ry’amafu, no ku kimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, no ku kimazi c’impongano; kand’ ikintu cose kirobanurirwa Imana mu Bisirayeli kize kibe icabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Indobanurwa z’imishuzo yose y’ivyimburwa vyose, bo n’ishikanwa mushikana ry’ikintu cose, bize bibe ivy’ abaherezi: kandi muze mucire umuherezi kw ifu yanyu y’umushuzo isewe iheretuwe, kugira ngw amazu yanyu ahoremw’ umugisha." 
Ezekiel44:31 Abaherezi ntibakagire icipfiriye na kimwe bazorya, cank’ ikirangara, ar’ ico mu biguruka canke mu bitungwa." 
Ezekiel45:1 Maze, igihe muzogaburisha igihugu ubupfindo, ngo kibabere ishamvu, muze mukūrire Uhoraho umugabane kw ishikanwa, ube umugabane wera ukūwe ku gihugu; uburebure bgawo buze bube irenga ingero ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, n’amakika yawo abe ibihumbi cumi; uzoba uwera no gushitsa ku mbibe zawo impande zose." 
Ezekiel45:2 Kuri wo muze mukūre ikibanza c’ahēra, uburebure bgaco buze bube irenga ingero amajana atanu, n’amakika yaco abe amajana atanu nyene, mu mpande zose ukw ari zine hangane; kandi habe imparure ihakīkūje ibe iy’ amatambge mirongwitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora." 
Ezekiel45:3 Uru ni rwo rugezo uzogera: uburebure bube irenga ingero ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, n’amakika abe ibihumbi cumi: aho haze habe ahēra, ari ho hēra cane." 
Ezekiel45:4 Uzoba umugabane wera ukūwe ku gihugu; hazoba ah’ abaherezi, baherereza ahēra, abēgēra Uhoraho ngo bamuhereze; hazoba ah’ amazu yabo, habe n’ ahantu hēra h’ahēra nyene." 
Ezekiel45:5 Abalewi baherereza mu ngoro, aho bazohabga, uburebure bgaho buze bube ingero ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, amakika abe ibihumbi cumi, habe ishamvu yabo, baze bahagire ivyumba vyabo mirongwibiri." 
Ezekiel45:6 Kandi muze murobanure ishamvu y’igisagara, iz’ ibe amakika ingero mirongwitanu, uburebure bube ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, haze habangikane na wa mugabane wera w’ ishikanwa; haze habe ah’ inzu yose ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel45:7 Kand’ ahazoba aha segaba haze habe mu mpande zompi za wa mugabane wera w’ ishikanwa bo n’ishamvu y’igisagara, habangikane n’uwo mugabane wera w’ishikanwa nyene bo n’iyo shamvu y’igisagara, mu ruhande rwerekeye i burengerazuba, no mu ruhande rwerekeye i burasirazuba; uburebure bgaho burehe n’ubg’ umugabane umwe mu yigabanganijwe mu gihugu, uhereye ku rubibe rw’i burengerazuba ugashitsa ku rubibe rw’i burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel45:8 Aho hazomubera ishamvu hagati mu Bisirayeli mur’ ico gihugu; kandi ba segaba banje ntibazokwongera guhahaza abantu banje; ariko bazogabanganiriza igihugu ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, nk’ukw imiryango yabo iri." 
Ezekiel45:9 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Birahāgije, yemwe ba segaba b’Abisirayeli: ni mureke umuryano no kunyaga, ni muce imanza zibereye n’iziroranye; mukūre ku bantu banje akadenderezo mubadendereza, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel45:10 Mugire umunzane w’ukuri, n’ingero yitwa efa y’ukuri, n’ingero yitwa batu y’ ukuri." 
Ezekiel45:11 Efa na batu bibe urugero rumwe, kugira ngo batu ibemwo kimwe c’icumi c’ingero yitwa homeru, na efa ibemwo kimwe c’icumi ca homeru nyene; urugezo rwavyo rugerwe kuri homeru." 
Ezekiel45:12 Shekeli ikābe gera mirongwibiri; shekeli zitanu zibe zitanu nyene, na shekeli cumi zibe icumi nyene; shekeli mirongwitanu na zo zikābe mina." 
Ezekiel45:13 Iri ni ryo shikanwa muzoshikana: mu ngano muze mutange kimwe ca gatandatu co muri efa, mukigabanije kuri homeru imwe; muri sayiri muze mutange kimwe ca gatandatu co muri efa nyene, mukigabanije kuri homeru;" 
Ezekiel45:14 urugero rw’amavuta rushinzwe muzotanga rwo muri batu igera amavuta, ruze rube kimwe c’icumi co muri batu, mukigabanije kuri koru, ari yo ijamwo batu cumi, ar’ urugero rumwe na homeru: kuko homeru imwe ijamwo batu cumi nyene;" 
Ezekiel45:15 mutange n’umwagazi w’intama umwe‐umwe ukūwe mu mukuku w’amajana abiri‐abiri, mu mikuku y’imiryango y’Abisirayeli; ivyo vyose bize bibe ishikanwa ry’ amafu, n’ikimazi co kwoswa, n’ ibimazi vy’ishimwe, kugira ngo batangirwe impongano, ni k’ Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel45:16 Abantu bose bo mu gihugu bazozanira segaba w’Abisirayeli iryo shikanwa. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ariko segaba az’ abe ari we atanga ibimazi vyo kwoswa, n’amashikanwa y’amafu, n’amashikanwa y’ibiturire, mu misi mikuru no mu mboneko z’ukwezi no ku masabato, no mu misi mikuru yose yashingiwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli: az’ atange ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, n’ishikanwa ry’ amafu, n’ibimazi vyo kwoswa, n’ibimazi vy’ishimwe, kugira ngw atangire impongano inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, uze wābīre imasa y’umukangara idafise agasembga; uheze uz’ uhumanure ahēra." 
Ezekiel45:19 Umuherezi aze yābīre ku maraso y’ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, ayasīge ku bisapfu vy’ ingoro, no ku mfuruka zine z’ intera y’igicaniro, no ku bikingi vy’ikirimba c’inyubakwa." 
Ezekiel45:20 Kand’ abe ari k’uzohora ugenza nyene, ku musi w’indwi w’ukwezi kwose, ku vyo ugirira uwazimiye wese bo n’imburabgenge: uko ni ko muzotangira ingoro impongano." 
Ezekiel45:21 Mu kwezi kwa mbere, ku musi wakwo w’icumi na kane, muze mugire Pasika, iz’ ibe imisi mikuru gushitsa indwi; baze barye imitsima itambiwe." 
Ezekiel45:22 Kandi kur’ uwo musi segaba az’ atange imasa kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, co kubgiwe no kubg’ igihugu cose." 
Ezekiel45:23 Mur’ iyo misi mikuru ukw ar’ indwi az’ atange ibimazi vyo kwosereza Uhoraho, amamasa ndwi‐ndwi n’impfizi z’intama ndwi‐ndwi bitagira agasembga, ku musi wose ukw ar’ indwi; n’impfizi z’impene kw ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha imwe‐imwe uko bukeye." 
Ezekiel45:24 Kand’ az’ ashikane ishikanwa ry’amafu, ku masa yose hajekw ingero imwe yitwa efa, no ku mpfizi y’intama hajeko efa imwe nyene; no kuri efa yose y’ifu hajekw ingero yitwa hini y’ amavuta." 
Ezekiel45:25 Mu kwezi kw’indwi, ku musi wakwo w’icumi na gatanu, mu misi mikuru yakwo, abe ari kw azogenza kumara imisi ndwi; abigenze nk’uko yagenjeje ivy’ ikimazi gitangirwa ivyaha, n’ivy’ ikimazi co kwoswa, n’ivy’ ishikanwa ry’amafu, n’ivy’ amavuta." 
Ezekiel46:1 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Ikirimba c’inyubakwa kirābana n’i burasirazuba kize came kijishwe mu misi y’ ibikorwa ukw ar’ itandatu; ariko ku musi w’isabato kijishurwe, bo no ku musi ukwezi kubonetseko." 
Ezekiel46:2 Segaba az’ ashikeyo aciye mu rubaraza rw’ikirimba ruhera inyuma, maz’ ahagarare i ruhande y’ igikingi c’ikirimba; abaherezi baze bamutangire ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa n’ibimazi vyiwe vy’ishimwe, maz’ asengere mw ishikiro ry’ico kirimba, aheze aveyo; arikw ico kirimba ntikize kijishwe gushitsa ku mugoroba." 
Ezekiel46:3 Kand’ abantu bo mu gihugu baze bahore basengera imbere y’Uhoraho bar’ inyuma y’ico kirimba ku masabato no mu mboneko z’ukwezi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Ibimazi vyo kwoswa segaba azohora atanga k’Uhoraho ku musi w’isabato bize bibe imyagazi y’intama itandatu itagira agasembga, n’ impfizi y’intama imwe itagira agasembga nyene;" 
Ezekiel46:5 kand’ ishikanwa ry’ifu rigerekwa kur’ iyo mpfizi y’ intama rize ribe ingero yitwa efa, n’irigerekwa ku myagazi y’intama az’ atange ibimushobokeye, no kuri efa yose y’ifu hajekw amavuta, ingero yitwa hini." 
Ezekiel46:6 Kandi ku musi ukwezi kubonetseko, haze hatangwe imasa y’umukangara itagira agasembga, n’imyagazi y’ intama itandatu n’impfizi y’intama; bibe ibitagira agasembga." 
Ezekiel46:7 Kand’ az’ ashikane ishikanwa ry’ifu, ku masa hajekw ingero imwe yitwa efa, no ku mpfizi y’ intama hajeko efa imwe nyene, no ku myagazi y’intama hajekw ibimushobokeye, kandi kuri efa yose y’ifu hajekw amavuta, ingero yitwa hini." 
Ezekiel46:8 Kandi segaba iy’ ashikayo, ace mu rubaraza rw’ikirimba, maz’ ahindukiye ajane iyo nzira nyene." 
Ezekiel46:9 Arikw abantu iyo baje imbere y’ Uhoraho mu misi mikuru ishinzwe, ūzoza aciye mu kirimba giherereye i burārūko aje gusenga, ni yavayo az’ ace mu kirimba giherereye i bumanuko; kand’ ūzoza aciye mu kirimba giherereye i bumanuko, ni yavayo az’ ace mu kirimba giherereye i burārūko: ntaz’ ahindukire mu kirimba yazananye, ariko ni yavayo akomeze atumbere imbere yiwe." 
Ezekiel46:10 Kandi segaba iy’ ashikayo, agende hagati yabo, bavuyeyo bavireyo rimwe." 
Ezekiel46:11 Mu misi mikuru no mu yindi misi mikuru ishinzwe, ishikanwa ry’ifu rize ribe efa imwe igeretswe ku masa yose, na efa imwe nyene igeretswe ku mpfizi y’intama yose, n’irigerekwa ku myagazi y’intama az’ atange ibimushobokeye, no kuri efa yose y’ifu hajekw amavuta, ingero yitwa hini." 
Ezekiel46:12 Kandi segaba, igihe azotanga ikimazi avyigombeye, ar’ ikimazi co kwoswa cank’ ar’ ibimazi vy’ishimwe, abitanze k’Uhoraho avyigombeye, haze hagire ūmujishurira ikirimba kirābana n’i burasirazuba, atange ikimazi ciwe co kwoswa n’ibimazi vyiwe vy’ishimwe, nk’ukw asanzwe abikora ku musi w’isabato, aheze agende; amaze kugenda hagire ūjisha ico kirimba." 
Ezekiel46:13 Kandi nawe uz’ utange uko bukeye umwagazi w’intama umaze umwaka umwe, kand’ utagira agasembga, kuba ikimazi co kwosereza Uhoraho: uze wame uwutanga mu gatondo mu gatondo uko bukeye." 
Ezekiel46:14 Kand’ uze wame uwugerekakw ishikanwa ry’ifu mu gatondo uko bukeye nyene, ribe ikigira gatandatu ca efa y’ifu igogōretse, n’ikigira gatatu ca hini y’ amavuta, yo kuvanga n’iyo fu; ribe ishikanwa ry’ifu k’Uhoraho ry’intahava, icagezwe c’ibihe vyose." 
Ezekiel46:15 Ukw abe ari ko bazotanga umwagazi w’intama, bo n’ishikanwa ry’ifu n’amavuta, mu gatondo mu gatondo uko bukeye, kuba ikimazi co kwoswa c’intahava." 
Ezekiel46:16 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Segaba ni yagira aho akebera umwe mu bana biwe, hazoba ishamvu yiwe, hazotoranwa n’abana biwe; hazoba inyegu yabo kukw ar’ ishamvu." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ariko ni yaramuka akebeye umwe mu basavyi biwe kw ishamvu yiwe, hazoba ahiwe gushitsa kuri wa mwaka w’umwidegemvyo; ico gihe haze hasubizwe segaba; arikw ishamvu azoba yahaye abana biwe izoba iyabo bgite." 
Ezekiel46:18 Yamara segaba ntakanyage amashamvu y’abantu, ngw abasohore mu mashamvu yabo; ariko ni yakebera abana biwe ishamvu, ayikūre ku ho yiganziye ubgiwe, ngw abantu banje boye kuzosābagizwa, ngo hagire umuntu akūrwa mw ishamvu yiwe." 
Ezekiel46:19 Maz’ ancisha mu canzo kibangikanye n’ikirimba, anshikana ku vyumba vyera vy’abaherezi, birābana n’i burārūko: kandi har’ ahantu ahahera inyuma yavyo herekeye i burengerazuba." 
Ezekiel46:20 Arambarira, at’ Aha ni ho abaherezi bazoteka ibimazi vy’impongano n’ibimazi bitangirwa ivyaha, kandi ni ho bazokaranga amashikanwa y’amafu; kugira ngo boye kubijana mu ntangaro, bakavyezesha abantu." 
Ezekiel46:21 Maz’ anjana mu ntangaro, angenduza imfuruka zine z’urugo; nsanga izo mfuruka zose z’urugo zubatswek’ utunyubakwa." 
Ezekiel46:22 Ukw imfuruka z’urugo ari zine, hāri harumitsekw akanyubakwa; uburebure bgatwo bgār’ amatambge mirongwine y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, amakika yar’ amatambge mirongwitatu: utunyubakwa two mu mfuruka ukw ari tune twār’ urugero rumwe." 
Ezekiel46:23 Muri two ukw ari tune, hārimw’ imirongo y’amatafari itugendanye, yubatswemw’ amaziko impande zose." 
Ezekiel46:24 Maz’ arambarira, at’ Utu n’ utuzu two gutekamwo, ah’ abasuku bo mu ngoro bazoteka ibimazi abantu bazanye." 
Ezekiel47:1 Nukw angarukana ku muryango w’ingoro; ngize ntya, mbona har’ amazi yiburuka ava musi y’urwinjiriro rw’irebe ry’ingoro, atembera i burasirazuba, kukw ingoro yari yerekeye i burasirazuba nyene; nukw ayo mazi yatemba, ava i buryo bg’ ingoro, aca i ruhande y’igicaniro, ahahera i bumanuko." 
Ezekiel47:2 Maz’ andengana ikirimba cerekeye i burārūko, ancisha mu nzira igendanye urugo inyuma, anshikana ku kirimba c’inyuma kirābana n’i burasirazuba. Ngize ntya, mbona amazi asokoroka ku ruhande rwaco rw’i buryo." 
Ezekiel47:3 Maz’ uwo muntu avuye aho arikw aragenda yerekeye i burasirazuba, yar’ afise umugozi mu ntoke; awugeresha amatambge igihumbi ahwanye n’ay’ ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora; maz’ anjabutsa ayo mazi, amazi andenga ibirenge." 
Ezekiel47:4 Arongera agera amatambge igihumbi, anjabutsa ayo mazi, amazi angera mu mavi. Arongera agera igihumbi, arayanjabutsa, amazi angera mu rukenyerero." 
Ezekiel47:5 Hanyuma agera ikindi gihumbi, aba uruzi ntashobora kujabuka: kukw amazi yari yuzuye, yar’ asigaye ar’ ayo kujabukwa n’uwoga, uruzi ntirwari rukijabukwa igihagararo." 
Ezekiel47:6 Maz’ arambaza, ati Mwana w’umuntu, mbeg’ ivyo urabibonye? Maz’ arangarukana, tujana inkombe y’uruzi." 
Ezekiel47:7 Nkiriko ndagenda, ngize ntya mbona ku nkombe y’uruzi har’ ibiti vyinshi cane hakurya no hakuno." 
Ezekiel47:8 Maz’ arambarira, at’ Aya mazi atembera i burasirazuba, azomanuka mu kiyaya Araba, arinde ashika mu kiyaga c’umunyu; ni yashika mur’ ico kiyaga, azokiza amazi yo muri co." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kand’ ah’ urwo ruzi ruzoshika hose ikintu cose kizima gikunda kunyogomba mu mazi kizobona uko kibaho; kandi hazobamwo n’isinzi ry’amafi ryinshi kukw ayo mazi ashitseyo, kand’ amazi yo mu kiyaga azokira, ikintu cose kizima kibone uko kibaho ah’ urwo ruzi ruzoshika hose." 
Ezekiel47:10 Kand’ abarovyi bazohagarara ku nkombe zaco; uhereye kuri Eni‐gedi ugashitsa kuri Enegulayimu hazoba aho gutera insenga; hazobamw’ amafi y’uburyo bginshi, nk’amafi yo mu kiyaga kinini, kand’ azoba ari menshi cane." 
Ezekiel47:11 Arikw ivyondo n’ibishanga vyo ku nkengēra yaco ntibizokira, bizoheberwa umunyu." 
Ezekiel47:12 Kandi ku nkombe z’urwo ruzi, hakurya no hakuno, hazomera igiti cose cama ibiribga; ibibabi vyavyo nta ho bizokabirana, kandi n’ivyo vyama nta ho bizobura: bizohora vyera bijana n’ukwezi uko gutashe, kukw amazi abitunga ava ahēra h’urusengero: ivyo vyama bizoba ivyo kurya, n’ibibabi vyavyo bizoba umuti wo kuvūra." 
Ezekiel47:13 Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Uru ni rwo rugabano muzogabanirakw igihugu, ngo kibere ishamvu imiryango y’Abisirayeli ukw ar’ icumi n’ibiri: Yosefu azotwara imigabane ibiri." 
Ezekiel47:14 Kandi namwe muzocegukira, umuntu wese aringanire n’uwundi; ari co gihugu namanitse ukuboko ndahira ba sogokuruza ko nzokibaha; ico gihugu nyene muzocegukira kibabere ishamvu." 
Ezekiel47:15 Nuk’ uru ni rwo ruzoba urugabano rw’igihugu: urubibe rw’i burārūko n’uguhēra ku kiyaga kinini, ugaca i Hetiloni, ugashitsa ahafata i Zedadi," 
Ezekiel47:16 n’i Hamati, n’i Berota, n’i Siburayimu ho hagati y’urugabano rw’i Damasiko n’urugabano rw’i Hamati, n’i Hazeri‐hatikoni hahera ku rugabano rw’i Hawurani." 
Ezekiel47:17 Nuko rer’ urugabano ruzovuduka ku kiyaga ruce i Hazari‐Enoni ho ku rugabano rw’i Damasiko, ruce ahahera i burārūko h’urugabano rw’ i Hamati. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’i burārūko." 
Ezekiel47:18 Urubibe rw’i burasirazuba ruzoba Yorodani, hagati y’i Hawurani n’i Damasiko n’i Gileyadi n’igihugu c’i Bgisirayeli; muze mugere muhereye ku rugabano rw’i burārūko mushitse ku kiyaga c’i burasirazuba. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’i burasirazuba." 
Ezekiel47:19 Urubibe rw’i bumanuko ruzojana i bumanuko nyene, ruvudutse i Tamari ugashitsa ku mazi y’i Meribati‐kadeshi, ugashitsa no ku ruzi rwa Egiputa, ugashitsa no ku kiyaga kinini. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’i bumanuko rujana i bumanuko." 
Ezekiel47:20 Urubibe rw’i burengerazuba ruzoba ikiyaga kinini, ruvudutse mu rugabano rw’i bumanuko rugashika ahafata i Hamati. Urwo ni rwo rubibe rw’i burengerazuba." 
Ezekiel47:21 Uko ni ko muzogabura iki gihugu, ukw imiryango y’Abisirayeli ingana." 
Ezekiel47:22 Kandi muze mukigaburishe ubupfindo ngo kibabere ishamvu, mwebge n’abanyamahanga baba muri mwebge, bakavyarira abana muri mwebge; muze mubaharūre nk’aho bavyawe n’Abisirayeli; bazotwara ishamvu hamwe namwe mu miryango y’Abisirayeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Kand’ umuryango umunyamahanga azoba arimwo, az’ abe ari ho ahabga ishamvu yiwe, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel48:1 Nukw aya ni yo mazina y’ imiryango: uhereye ahahera i burārūko, ukajana inzira y’i Hetiloni, ugashika ahafata i Hamati, ugaca i Hazari‐Enoni ku rugabano rw’i Damasiko ahahera i burārūko habangikanye n’i Hamati; uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Dani." 
Ezekiel48:2 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Dani, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Asheri." 
Ezekiel48:3 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Asheri, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Nafutali." 
Ezekiel48:4 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Nafutali, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Manase." 
Ezekiel48:5 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Manase, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Efurayimu." 
Ezekiel48:6 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Efurayimu, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Reyubeni." 
Ezekiel48:7 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Reyubeni, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Yuda." 
Ezekiel48:8 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Yuda, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba wa mugabane w’ishikanwa muzoshikana; ubgaguke bgawo buzoba amatambge ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’uburebure bgawo buzongana n’iyindi migabane, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa burengerazuba: kand’ ahēra hazoja hagati muri ho." 
Ezekiel48:9 Uwo mugabane muzoshikanira Uhoraho, uburebure bgawo buzoba amatambge ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, n’ubgaguke ibihumbi cumi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Nuk’ uwo mugabane wera uzoba uw’ abaherezi; uruhande rwawo rurābana n’i burārūko, uburebure bgarwo buzoba amatambge y’ukuboko nyene ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, n’aharābana n’i burengerazuba ubgaguke buzoba amatambge ibihumbi cumi, n’aharābana n’i burasirazuba ubgaguke buzoba ibihumbi cumi nyene, n’aharābana n’i bumanuko uburebure bgaho buzoba ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu: maz’ ahēra h’Uhoraho hazoja hagati muri ho." 
Ezekiel48:11 Uzoba uw’ abaherezi bejejwe bo muri bene Sadoki, bāsigaye bitondera ivyo nabajeje, ntibazimire igihe Abisirayeli bāzimira, nk’ukw Abalewi bāzimiye." 
Ezekiel48:12 Uzobabera ishamvu ikūwe ku mugabane washikanywe usatuwe ku gihugu, ishamvu yera cane ijanye ku rugabano rw’Abalewi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Abalewi na bo bazogira umugabane ugendanye ku rugabano rw’abaherezi, uburebure bgawo buzoba amatambge ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’ubgaguke ibihumbi cumi; uburebure bgose buzoba amatambge ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, n’ubgaguke ibihumbi cumi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Kandi ntibaze bagire aho bagura kuri wo, canke ngo bahakābe, kand’ uwo mugabane mwiza w’igihugu ntuz’ uhabge abandi, kukw ar’ uwera, urobanuriwe Uhoraho." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ikirēre c’amatambge ibihumbi bitanu casigaye ku bgaguke bgaho, kibangikanye na vya bihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu, kizoba ic’ abantu, aho kwubakwa igisagara, habe aho kuba hakikujwe n’imparure, igisagara kibe hagati muri yo." 
Ezekiel48:16 Izi ni zo ngero zaco: uruhande rw’i burārūko ruzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, uruhande rw’i bumanuko ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu, uruhande rw’i burasirazuba ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu, n’ uruhande rw’i burengerazuba ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene." 
Ezekiel48:17 Kand’ ico gisagara kize kigire imparure: aharābana n’i burārūko habe amatambge amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, aharābana n’i bumanuko amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, n’aharābana n’i burasirazuba amajana abiri na mirongwitanu, n’aharābana n’i burengerazuba amajana abiri na mirongwitanu nyene." 
Ezekiel48:18 Maz’ ahasigaye hahereranye n’uburebure bg’umugabane wera w’ishikanwa, uruhande rwaho rurābana n’i burasirazuba ruzoba amatambge ibihumbi cumi y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, n’uruhande rwaho rurābana n’i burengerazuba ruzoba ibihumbi cumi nyene: hazoba hahereranye n’umugabane wera w’ishikanwa; kand’ ibiharimwa bizoba ivyo gutunga abakora mu gisagara." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ababa mu gisagara bo mu miryango yose y’ Abisirayeli, ni bo bazoharima." 
Ezekiel48:20 Umugabane w’ishikanwa wose na wose uzoba amakika ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu n’uburebure ibihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu nyene: umugabane wera w’ishikanwa muze muwushikane ungana impande zose ukw ari zine, hakora n’ishamvu y’igisagara." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ahasigaye ho mu mpande zompi z’umugabane wera w’ishikanwa bo n’ishamvu y’igisagara, haze habe aha segaba; ahahereranye na vya bihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu vyo ku rubibe rw’ umugabane wera w’ishikanwa rwerekeye i burasirazuba, n’ahahereranye na vya bihumbi mirongwibiri na bitanu vyo ku rubibe rwerekeye i burengerazuba, hajanye kur’ iyo migabane yindi, hazoba aha segaba. Nuk’ uwo mugabane wera w’ishikanwa bo n’ahēra h’ingoro, bizoca hagati y’aha segaba." 
Ezekiel48:22 Nuk’ uhereye kw ishamvu y’Abalewi ugashitsa kw ishamvu y’igisagara, ari ho nyene haciye hagati y’aha segaba, kuva ku rugabano rwa Yuda ugashitsa ku rugabano rwa Benyamini, hazoba aha segaba." 
Ezekiel48:23 Nuko ku vy’imiryango isigaye: uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Benyamini. 
Ezekiel48:24 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Benyamini, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Simeyoni." 
Ezekiel48:25 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Simeyoni, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Isakari." 
Ezekiel48:26 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Isakari, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Zebuloni." 
Ezekiel48:27 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Zebuloni, uhereye i burasirazuba ugashitsa i burengerazuba hazoba umugabane wa Gadi." 
Ezekiel48:28 Kand’ ujanye ku rugabano rwa Gadi, ku rubibe rw’i bumanuko rurābana n’i bumanuko, urugabano ruzovuduka i Tamari, ruce ku mazi y’i Meribati‐Kadeshi, rujane uruzi rwa Egiputa, rushike ku kiyaga kinini." 
Ezekiel48:29 Ico ni co gihugu muzogaburira imiryango y’Abisirayeli ngo bacegukire, mukigaburishije ubupfindo, kand’ iyo ni yo migabane yabo umwe‐umwe, ni Uhoraho agize." 
Ezekiel48:30 Aya ni yo azoba amarembo y’ igisagara; ku ruhande rw’i burārūko uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora: 
Ezekiel48:31 kand’ amarembo y’igisagara azokwitiranywa n’amazina y’imiryango y’Abisirayeli; ahahera i burārūko amarembo azoba atatu: rimwe rizoba irembo rya Reyubeni, irindi ribe irya Yuda, irindi ribe irya Lewi." 
Ezekiel48:32 Ku ruhande rw’i burasirazuba uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene, amarembo na yo azoba atatu: rimwe rizoba irembo rya Yosefu, irindi ribe irya Benyamini, irindi ribe irya Dani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ku ruhande rw’i bumanuko uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene, amarembo na yo azoba atatu: rimwe rizoba irembo rya Simeyoni, irindi ribe irya Isakari, irindi ribe irya Zebuloni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Ku ruhande rw’i burengerazuba uburebure buzoba amatambge ibihumbi bine n’amajana atanu nyene, hamwe n’amarembo yaho ukw ar’ atatu: rimwe rizoba irembo rya Gadi, irindi ribe irya Asheri, irindi ribe irya Nafutali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Kuhakikuza n’amatambge ibihumbi cumi n’umunani y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora: kand’ uhereye uwo musi izina ry’ico gisagara rizokwitwa ng’ Uhoraho ni ho aba. 
Daniel1:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Yehoyakimu umwami w’Abayuda ari ku ngoma, Nebukadineza umwami w’i Babuloni yaje gutera i Yerusalemu, arahakikiza." 
Daniel1:2 Umwami Imana agabura Yehoyakimu umwami w’Abayuda mu maboko yiwe, bo n’ibintu vy’imbombovu bimwe vyo mu ngoro y’Imana, abijana mu gihugu c’i Shinari mu nzu y’imana yiwe; ashira ivyo bintu mu nzu y’ ububiko bg’iyo mana." 
Daniel1:3 Nuk’ umwami abarira Ashipenazi, umukuru w’inkone ziwe, kuzana bamwe bo mu Bisirayeli bo mu nda y’ingoma, n’abo mu bapfasoni," 
Daniel1:4 b’imisore batagira agasembga, ariko b’indanga, bar’ uburyo mu vy’ubgenge bgose, b’abahanga mu vyo kumenya, b’insorongozi mu vy’ubgenge, kandi babereye gukora i bgami; kugira ngw abigishe inyandiko y’Abakaludaya n’ururimi rwabo." 
Daniel1:5 Nuk’ umwami agera ingaburo bahabga imisi yose ivuye ku vy’ umwami afūngura, no ku giturire yuhira, kandi ko bagaburirwa imyaka itatu; ngo ni yashira babone gukorera umwami." 
Daniel1:6 Nuko muri bo, mu bo mu muryango wa Yuda, hāri Daniyeli na Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya." 
Daniel1:7 Nuk’ uwo mukuru w’inkone abīta ayandi mazina: Daniyeli amwita Beluteshaza, Hananiya amwita Shaduraka, Mishayeli amwita Meshaki, Azariya amwita Abedunego." 
Daniel1:8 Maze Daniyeli agira imigabo mu mutima kutazokwihumanisha ivyo kurya vy’umwami, cank’ igiturire yuhira: ni co catumye yinginga uwo mukuru w’inkone, kugira ngo ntiyihumanye." 
Daniel1:9 Nukw Imana ituma Daniyeli akundwa n’umukuru w’inkone, amutera imbabazi." 
Daniel1:10 Maz’ uwo mukuru w’inkone abgira Daniyeli, ati Ndatinya umwami segaba, yabagereye ingaburo z’ivyo murya n’ivyo munywa; vyomera bite ababonye mwonze mu maso mudasa n’abandi basore b’urunganwe rwanyu? Muzoba muncishije umutwe ku mwami." 
Daniel1:11 Nuko Daniyeli aca yinginga umubgiriza, uwo wa mukuru w’inkone yashizeho kurāba ivya Daniyeli na Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya," 
Daniel1:12 ati Ndakwinginze utugerageze twebge abasavyi bawe imisi cumi, baduhe indya z’insoromano, abe ari zo turya, n’amazi yo kunywa;" 
Daniel1:13 uheze uze witegereze mu maso hacu no mu maso h’abasore barya ku vyo kurya vy’umwami; maz’ uk’ uzobona bimeze, abe ari k’uzotugenza, twebge abasavyi bawe." 
Daniel1:14 Nukw abemerera iryo jambo, abagerageza imisi cumi." 
Daniel1:15 Iyo misi cumi ishize, asanga mu maso habo ari heza kandi bayagayaga ku mubiri kurusha abandi basore bose bārya ku vyo kurya vy’umwami." 
Daniel1:16 Nuk’ uwo mubgiriza aca abakūra kuri vya vyo kurya bāshingiwe, no ku giturire bāri bakwiye kunywa, abaha indya z’insoromano." 
Daniel1:17 Maz’ abo basore ukw ari bane Imana ibaha gukerebuka no kuba uburyo mu vyo bigishwa vyose no mu bgenge; kandi Daniyeli yari n’ubgenge bgo gutahura ivyerekanwa vyose bo n’inzozi. 
Daniel1:18 Nukw iyo misi igeze umwami yari yarashinze ko babazana, umukuru w’inkone abashikana imbere ya Nebukadineza." 
Daniel1:19 Nuk’ umwami aganira na bo, ariko muri bose ntihābonetse ūhwanye na Daniyeli na Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya: ni co catumye bagirwa abo gukorera umwami." 
Daniel1:20 Mw ijambo ryose ry’ubgenge no kumenya, ico umwami yababaza, yasanga barusha abanyamarēba n’abapfumu bose bo mu gihugu ciwe cose ibihetangabo cumi." 
Daniel1:21 Nuko Daniyeli aguma ngaho, gushitsa ku mwaka wa mbere umwami Kuro ari ku ngoma." 
Daniel2:1 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri Nebukadineza ari ku ngoma, yarose inzozi; nukw ahagarika umutima, itiro ryiwe riraguruka." 
Daniel2:2 Umwami aca ahamagaza abanyamarēba n’abapfumu n’abarozi n’Abakaludaya, ngo bamubarire inzozi ziwe. Nuko bararenguka, bahagarara imbere y’umwami." 
Daniel2:3 Umwami arababgira, ati Narose inzozi, mpagaritse umutima wo kuzimenya." 
Daniel2:4 Maz’ Abakaludaya bishura umwami mu rurimi rw’igisiriya, bati Mugenzi nyaguhoraho, uturotorere izo nzozi, twebge abasavyi bawe, duheze tukumenyeshe uko zisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:5 Nuk’ umwami yishura Abakaludaya, ati Vyamvuyeko: kandi ni mutammenyesha izo nzozi n’ingene zisobanurwa, muzohimbagurwa, kand’ ingo zanyu zizosigara ar’ amatongo." 
Daniel2:6 Ariko ni mwadondōra izo nzozi n’ingene zisobanurwa, nzobagabira, mbatasure, mbahe icubahiro cinshi: nuko rero ni mundondōrere izo nzozi n’ingene zisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:7 Bamwishura ubugira kabiri, bati Mwami n’uturotorere izo nzozi, twebge abasavyi bawe, natwe duheze tukumenyeshe uko zisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:8 Umwami arabishura, ati Ndumva rwose ko mushaka kwīcīra inzira, kuko mubonye ko vyamvuyeko." 
Daniel2:9 Ariko ni mutammenyesha izo nzozi, igihano muzohanwa ni kimwe; kuko mwagiye ingingo yo kumbarira amagambo y’ibinyoma n’ubuhumvyi, ngw ejo buzocana ayandi. Nuko rero ni mumbgire izo nzozi, mpeze mmenye ko mushobora no kuzinsobanurira." 
Daniel2:10 Maz’ Abakaludaya bishura umwami, bati Mwami, nta muntu n’umwe wo kw isi yoshobora kukumenyesha iryo jambo; kukw ata mwami cank’ umuganwa cank’ umutware yigeze gusobanuza umunyamarēba n’umwe cank’ umupfumu cank’ Umukaludaya ben’ iryo jambo." 
Daniel2:11 Ico utugobererako kiragoye, kandi nta wundi ariho yoshobora kucerekana imbere yawe, mwami, atar’ imana, na zo ntizibana n’abafise umubiri." 
Daniel2:12 Ivyo bitera umwami kuraka, arashangashirwa rwose, agera ko bageseza abanyabgenge b’i Babuloni bose." 
Daniel2:13 Nuko birashingwa ngw abanyabgenge ni bicwe; baja kurondera Daniyeli na bagenzi biwe ngo bicwe. 
Daniel2:14 Maze Daniyeli abgirana Ariyoki umukuru w’abashibamyi b’umwami ubgenge n’ukwitonda; ni we yari yagomowe kwica abanyabgenge b’i Babuloni. 
Daniel2:15 Abaza Ariyoki umushibamyi w’umwami, at’ Igituma habaye icagezwe c’ikibiriraho kivuye ku mwami n’iki? Nuko Ariyoki abimenyesha Daniyeli ivy’ ari vyo." 
Daniel2:16 Maze Daniyeli arinjira, asaba umwami ngw amuhe igihe az’ aze kumumenyesha uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:17 Nuko Daniyeli aja i we, abimenyesha bagenzi biwe, Hananiya na Mishayeli na Azariya," 
Daniel2:18 kugira ngo basabe Imana yo mw ijuru, ibagirire imbabazi, ibamenyeshe ayo mabanga, kugira ngo Daniyeli na bagenzi biwe ntibagesezanywe n’abandi banyabgenge b’i Babuloni." 
Daniel2:19 Nuko Daniyeli ahishurirwa ayo mabanga, avyerekwa nko mu nzozi mw ijoro. Maze Daniyeli atazira Imana yo mw ijuru." 
Daniel2:20 Daniyeli aravuga, at’ Izina ry’Imana riragahimbazwa ibihe bitazoshira, kuk’ ubgenge n’ubushobozi ar’ ivyayo:" 
Daniel2:21 ni yo ikūranya imyanya n’ibihe; ni yo ikūra abami ikimika abandi; ni yo iha abanyabgenge ubgenge, n’abakerebutse ikabaha kumenya;" 
Daniel2:22 ni yo ihishura ivy’ amabanga y’iyo bihera; ni yo izi ibiri mu mwiza, kand’ umuco ubana na yo." 
Daniel2:23 Ndagukengurukiye, ndaguhimbaza, wewe Mana ya ba sogokuruza, umpaye ubgenge n’ubushobozi, ummenyesheje ivyo twagusavye: kuk’ utumenyesheje ivyo umwami agomba." 
Daniel2:24 Nuko Daniyeli yinjira kwa Ariyoki, uwo umwami yari yageze kugeseza abanyabgenge b’i Babuloni; aramubgira, ati Ntugeseze abanyabgenge b’i Babuloni: enda nshikiriza umwami, ndamumenyeshe uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:25 Nuko Ariyoki aca yinjirana Daniyeli amushikiriza umwami, aramubgira, ati Mbonye umuntu wo mu banyagano b’Abayuda, arakumenyesha ukw izo nzozi zisobanurwa, mugenzi." 
Daniel2:26 Umwami abaza Daniyeli, ari we Beluteshaza, ati Mbeg’ urashobora kummenyesha inzozi narose, n’ingene zisobanurwa?" 
Daniel2:27 Daniyeli yishura umwami, at’ Ibanga wasobanuza nta banyabgenge boshobora kurikumenyesha mwami, cank’ abapfumu cank’ abanyamarēba cank’ abamenyi;" 
Daniel2:28 ariko mw ijuru har’ Imana ihishura amabanga, kandi ni yo yakumenyesheje ibizobaho mu bihe bizoza, mugenzi. Inzozi zawe n’ivyo werekewe mu mutwe uri ku kirwa vyar’ ibi:" 
Daniel2:29 nukw ivyawe, mugenzi, ivyiyumviro vyaje uri ku kirwa, vy’ibizoba mu gihe kizoza: Īhishura amabanga ni yo ikumenyesheje ibizoba." 
Daniel2:30 Ariko jewe ubganje, iryo banga sinarimenyeshejwe n’uko mfise ubgenge kuruta umuntu wese mu bakiriho; ariko n’ukugira ng’ umenyeshwe uko bisobanurwa, utahure n’ivyiyumviro vyo mu mutima wawe, mugenzi." 
Daniel2:31 Nuko mugenzi, wabonye igishushanyo kinini; ico gishushanyo gihambaye, gikayangana birenze urugero, cari gihagaze imbere yawe; kand’ ishusho yaco yar’ iteye ubgoba." 
Daniel2:32 Ico gishushanyo, umutwe waco war’ izahabu nziza, kand’ igikiriza n’amaboko vyar’ ifeza, inda n’ibibero vyar’ imiringa," 
Daniel2:33 amaguru yar’ ivyuma, ibirenge vyar’ ikivange c’ivyuma n’ibumba." 
Daniel2:34 Nawe uravyitegereza, ushitsa ah’ ibuye ryaziye, ridasituwe n’amaboko, ryikubita ku birenge vy’ivyuma n’ibumba vy’ico gishushanyo, rirabimenagura." 
Daniel2:35 Nukw icuma n’ibumba n’umuringa n’ifeza n’izahabu bica bimenagurikira rimwe, bicika nk’umuguruka wo ku mbuga basekurirako mu ci; umuyaga urabitumura, maz’ aho vyahora ntihaba hakiboneka: maz’ iryo buye ryikubise kur’ ico gishushanyo ricika umusozi munini, ryuzura isi yose." 
Daniel2:36 Nuko, inzozi n’izo; kandi turakumenyesha mwami ingene zisobanurwa." 
Daniel2:37 Nuko mugenzi, wewe ur’ umwami aganza abami; Imana yo mw ijuru yaguhaye ubgami n’ububasha n’inganji n’icubahiro;" 
Daniel2:38 kand’ ah’ abantu baba hose yaguhaye n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, n’ibiguruka vyo mu kirēre, ibishira mu kuboko kwawe, iguha kubiganza vyose. Nuko rer’ uwo mutwe w’izahabu ni wewe." 
Daniel2:39 Kandi mu nyuma zawe hazovyuka ubundi bgami butanganya n’ubgawe gukomera; hanyuma hazovyuka ubundi bgami bga gatatu, buzoganza isi yose." 
Daniel2:40 Arik’ ubgami bga kane buzokomera nk’icuma: kukw ivyuma ari vyo bimenagura ibintu vyose, bikabijanjagura; kandi nk’ukw ivyuma bifyonyora ivyo vyose, ni k’ubgo bgami buzomenagura bukajanjagura burtyo." 
Daniel2:41 Kandi nk’uko wabonye ibirenge n’amano ar’ ikivange c’ibumba n’ivyuma, ni k’ubgo bgami buzoba ubgami butandukanye; muri bgo hazoba inkomezi nk’iz’ ivyuma, nk’uko wabonye ivyuma bivanze n’ibumba." 
Daniel2:42 Kandi nk’ukw amano yar’ ikivange c’ivyuma n’ibumba, ni k’ubgo bgami buzomera: igice kimwe kizokomera, ikindi kibe urujo." 
Daniel2:43 Kandi nk’uko wabonye ivyuma bivanze n’ibumba, ni ko bazokwābīrana n’abandi bantu: ariko ntibazofatana, nk’ukw ivyuma bitavangika n’ibumba." 
Daniel2:44 Nuko ku ngoma z’abo bami, Imana yo mw ijuru izohagurutsa ubundi bgami butazokwigera buhangūra, kand’ ingoma y’inganji yabgo nta ho izonyagwa n’irindi hanga; ariko buzomara bukomvomvore ubgami bgose bg’abo bami; yamara bgo buzohangama gushitsa ibihe vyose." 
Daniel2:45 Uko wabonye ibuye ryasituwe ku musozi ata maboko arisituye, rikamenagura ivyuma n’imiringa n’ibumba n’ifeza n’izahabu, nuko mugenzi, Imana ihambaye yakumenyesheje ibizoba mu gihe kizoza; kand’ izo nzozi n’iz’ ukuri, insobanuro yazo ntizohinduka." 
Daniel2:46 Maz’ umwami Nebukadineza aca yikubita hasi, apfukamira Daniyeli, avuga ko bamucumitira ikimazi bakamwosereza imibavu." 
Daniel2:47 Nuk’ umwami abgira Daniyeli, ati N’ukuri Imana yanyu ni yo Mana nya mana, ni yo Shebuja w’abami, kandi ni yo ihishura amabanga, kuk’ ushoboye guhishura iryo banga." 
Daniel2:48 Maz’ umwami akuza Daniyeli, amuha ingabire nyinshi zikomeye, amuha igihugu muri Babuloni, no kuba umukuru w’abaganza abanyabgenge bose b’i Babuloni." 
Daniel2:49 Maze Daniyeli asaba umwami ngo Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego bamutwarire mur’ ico gihugu c’i Babuloni; ariko Daniyeli aguma i bgami. 
Daniel3:1 Umwami Nebukadineza yakoze igishushanyo mw izahabu, uburebure bgaco bgar’ amatambge mirongwitandatu y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgaco bgar’ amatambge atandatu: agihagarika mu kiyaya c’i Dura, mu ntāra y’i Babuloni." 
Daniel3:2 Nuk’ umwami Nebukadineza atuma gukoranya ivyēgēra vyiwe n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama bakuru, n’abazezwabintu n’abacamanza n’abashingantahe n’abatware bose bo mur’ ivyo bihugu, ngo baze guhezagira ico gishushanyo umwami Nebukadineza yari yahagaritse." 
Daniel3:3 Nukw ivyēgēra vy’umwami n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama bakuru n’abazezwabintu n’abacamanza n’abashingantahe n’abatware bose bo mur’ izo ntāra bakoranywa no guhezagira ico gishushanyo umwami Nebukadineza yari yāhagaritse. Nuko bahagarara imbere y’ico gishushanyo yāhagaritse. 
Daniel3:4 Umusiguzi asemerera n’ijwi rirenga, ati Yemwe moko n’amahanga n’abavuga indimi zitari zimwe, ngibi ivyo mugezwe:" 
Daniel3:5 ngo Ni mwumva amajwi y’inzamba n’imyironge n’inanga n’amakembe n’imiduri n’ivyitwa sumponya n’ibindi vy’ubgoko bgose bivuzwa, muce mwikubita hasi musenge iki gishushanyo c’izahabu umwami Nebukadineza yahagaritse;" 
Daniel3:6 arik’ umuntu wese atikubita hasi ngw asenge, mur’ ako kanya aca atererwa mw itanure ry’umuriro uhinda." 
Daniel3:7 Maz’ abantu bose bumvise amajwi y’inzamba n’imyironge n’inanga n’amakembe n’imiduri n’ibindi vy’ubgoko bgose bivuga, amoko n’amahanga n’abavuga indimi zitari zimwe bose, ako kanya baca bikubita hasi basenga ico gishushanyo c’izahabu umwami Nebukadineza yari yāhagaritse." 
Daniel3:8 Maz’ uwo mwanya Abakaludaya bamwe bīgira hafi barega Abayuda. 
Daniel3:9 Babgira umwami Nebukadineza, bati Mugenzi nyaguhoraho:" 
Daniel3:10 washizeh’ icagezwe, mugenzi, kivuga ng’ Umuntu wese ni yumva amajwi y’inzamba n’imyironge n’inanga n’amakembe n’imiduri na sumponya n’ibindi vy’ubgoko bgose bivuzwa, ace yikubita hasi asenge ico gishushanyo c’izahabu;" 
Daniel3:11 kandi ng’ Umuntu wese atikubita hasi ngw asenge, atererwe mw itanure ry’umuriro uhinda." 
Daniel3:12 Nuko rero harih’ Abayuda bamwe wahaye gutwara mu gihugu c’i Babuloni, ni Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego: abo bagabo, mugenzi, ntibaruha bakubara, ntibasaba imana zawe, kandi ntibasenze ca gishushanyo c’izahabu wahagaritse." 
Daniel3:13 Nuko Nebukadineza araraka, arashungumirwa, avuga ko bafata Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego. Nuko babazana imbere y’umwami." 
Daniel3:14 Nebukadineza atangura kubabaza, ati Mbega Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego, mwabigize ibigirankana kudasaba imana zanje no kudasenga ico gishushanyo c’izahabu nahagaritse?" 
Daniel3:15 Nuko noneho ni mwumva amajwi y’inzamba n’imyironge n’inanga n’amakembe n’imiduri na sumponya n’ibindi vy’ubgoko bgose bivuga, mukemera kwikubita hasi mugasenga igishushanyo nakoze, bizoba ari vyiza; ariko ni mutagisenga, muca mutererwa mw itanure ry’umuriro uhinda; mbeg’ imana yobakiza mu maboko yanje yoba iyihe?" 
Daniel3:16 Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego bishura umwami Nebukadineza, bati Ntiturinda kugira ico tukwishura kur’ iryo jambo." 
Daniel3:17 Asangw’ ari ko bimeze, Imana yacu dusavye ishobora kudukiza mur’ iryo tanure ry’umuriro uhinda; kandi ntiyobura kudukiza mu kuboko kwawe, mugenzi." 
Daniel3:18 Ariko naho bitoba birtyo, umenye mugenzi, ko tutosaba imana zawe, canke ngo dusenge ico gishushanyo c’izahabu wahagaritse." 
Daniel3:19 Maze Nebukadineza uburake buca buramusaza, mu nyonga hiwe harahindurira, atera igitsure Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego: agera ko bakomanya itanure ngo rirushe uko ryahora ryaka ibihetangabo ndwi." 
Daniel3:20 Nukw abarira abahizi bamwe bo mu ngabo ziwe kuboha Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego, ngo babaterere mur’ iryo tanure ry’umuriro uhinda." 
Daniel3:21 Nuko baboha abo bagabo, uko bākambaye imyinjiro n’amakanzu n’imitamana n’izindi mpuzu bambaye, babaterera hagati mur’ iryo tanure ry’umuriro uhinda." 
Daniel3:22 Maze kukw icagezwe c’umwami car’ ikibiriraho, kand’ itanure ryar’ ikibengebenge rwose, bituma ibirimi vy’ uwo muriro vyica abo bagabo bāri bateruye Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego." 
Daniel3:23 Nukw abo bagabo batatu, Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego, bagwa hagati mw itanure ry’umuriro uhinda, uko bākaboshwe." 
Daniel3:24 Maz’ umwami Nebukadineza asimbga n’umutima, ahaguruka n’ingoga; abaza abajanama biwe, ati Mbega harya ntitwatereye mu muriro abantu batatu baboshwe? Bishura umwami, bati Koko n’ abo, mugenzi." 
Daniel3:25 Arababarira, at’ Erega ndabona abantu bane babohoye, bagendagenda mu muriro hagati, kandi nta co babaye; kand’ ishusho y’uwa kane isa n’iy’ umwana w’imana." 
Daniel3:26 Maze Nebukadineza yīgira ku muryango w’iryo tanure ry’umuriro uhinda, ashira ijwi hejuru, ati Yemwe Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego, mwa basavyi b’Imana isumba vyose, ni musohoke, muze hano. Nuko Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego baca barasohoka bava hagati mu muriro." 
Daniel3:27 Maz’ ivyēgēra vy’umwami n’abaganwa n’abagabisha n’abajanama b’umwami bakoranye bitegereza abo bagabo, basanga umuriro utāshoboye kugira ico ubagira ku mibiri yabo, kandi n’umushatsi wo ku mitwe yabo utābabutse, n’imyinjiro yabo ata co yabaye, haba n’akarangu k’umuriro bonukako." 
Daniel3:28 Nebukadineza aravuga, at’ Imana ya Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego iragahimbazwa, ni yo yarungitse umumarayika wayo, igakiza abasavyi bayo bayizigiye, kukw ijambo ryanje baricishije ukundi, bagaheba amagara yabo, kugira ngo ntibagire iyindi mana n’imwe basaba canke basenga, atar’ Imana yabo." 
Daniel3:29 Ni co gitumye nshinga icagezwe, yuk’ umuntu wese wo mu bgoko bgose cank’ ihanga canke wo mu bavuga indimi zitari zimwe, azovuga nabi Imana ya Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego, azohimbagurwa, kand’ urugo rwiwe ruzosigara ar’ itongo; kukw ata yindi mana iriho ishobora gukiza ben’ ubu buryo." 
Daniel3:30 Maz’ umwami ashira hejuru Shaduraka na Meshaki na Abedunego mu gihugu c’i Babuloni. 
Daniel4:1 Jewe umwami Nebukadineza ndabandikiye, moko n’amahanga n’abavuga indimi zitari zimwe mwese, muri kw isi yose: amahoro agwire muri mwebge." 
Daniel4:2 Mbonye kw ari vyiza guserura ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza Imana isumba vyose yankoreye. 
Daniel4:3 Es’ ukuntu ibimenyetso vyayo ar’ ibikomeye, n’ibitangaza vyayo ar’ ibihambaye! Ubgami bgayo n’ ubgami butazoshira, kand’ ingoma yayo izohangama ukw ibihe bikūranwa." 
Daniel4:4 Jewe Nebukadineza nari ngaho ngazagaza mu nzu yanje, ndibamye mu nzu y’ubgami." 
Daniel4:5 Ndota inzozi zintera ubgoba; ivyiyumviro nagize ndi ku kirwa, bo n’ivyo nerekewe mu mutwe bimpagarika umutima;" 
Daniel4:6 kubg’ ivyo mpamagaza abanyabgenge bose b’i Babuloni, kugira ngo bammenyeshe izo nzozi uko zisobanurwa." 
Daniel4:7 Abanyamarēba n’abapfumu n’Abakaludaya n’abamenyi bararenguka: mbarotorera izo nzozi, ariko ntibāmmenyesha uko zisobanurwa." 
Daniel4:8 Arik’ ubuheruka hinjira Daniyeli, ari we Beluteshaza nk’uko yitiriwe izina ry’imana yanje, ni we arimw’ impwemu z’imana zera; ndamurotorera inzozi zanje," 
Daniel4:9 nti Yewe Beluteshaza, umukuru w’abanyamarēba, ko nzi kw impwemu z’imana zera ziba muri wewe, kandi kw ata banga rikunanira, enda mbarira ivyo neretswe mu nzozi zanje ivy’ ari vyo, n’uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel4:10 Ivyo nerekewe mu mutwe ndi ku kirwa n’ibi: Nagize ntya, mbona igiti c’inganzamarumpu gitabamye mw isi hagati." 
Daniel4:11 Ico giti kirakura, kirakomera, ubushorishori bgaco bushika kw ijuru, kibonwa n’abo ku mpera y’isi yose." 
Daniel4:12 Ibibabi vyaco vyari vyiza, kandi cari gitengengeye ibiribga vyinshi, kikabakw ivyo guhāza ibiriho vyose; ibikōko vyo mw ishamba vyugama mu gitūtu caco, ibiguruka mu kirēre vyārika mu mashami yaco, kand’ ivyari n’ubugingo vyose vyatungwa na co." 
Daniel4:13 Maze mu vyo nerekewe mu mutwe ndi ku kirwa, ngize ntya mbona umushibamyi kandi yar’ uwera amanuka ava mw ijuru," 
Daniel4:14 asemerera n’ijwi rirenga, ati Ni wīcire ico giti, ugikokore amashami, ugihungurure amababi, usābagize ivyo camye: ibikōko bikive musi, kandi n’ibiguruka bive mu mashami yaco." 
Daniel4:15 Arikw igishitsi ukirekerane n’imizi yaco mu kuzimu, ugihambirize ivyuma n’imiringa, gisigare mu vyatsi bitoto vyo ku musozi; kandi kize gitondweko n’urume ruva mu kirēre, kirishanye n’ibikōko ivyatsi bimeze kw isi;" 
Daniel4:16 kand’ umutima waco ntube ukiba uw’ umuntu, ariko gihabge umutima w’igikōko; ibihe ndwi bigikūranirweko." 
Daniel4:17 Urwo rubanza rwaciwe n’abashibamyi, ari rwo nyene rwashinzwe n’ijambo ry’abera, kugira ngw abakiriho bamenye kw Īsumba vyose ari yo iganza ubgami bg’abantu, kandi kw ibugabira uwo igomba wese, ikabgimikamwo nyarucari hanyuma ya bose." 
Daniel4:18 Izo nzozi ni jewe umwami Nebukadineza nazirose; nuko rero Beluteshaza, enda vuga uko zisobanurwa, kw abanyabgenge bose bo mu gihugu canje badashoboye kummenyesha uko zisobanurwa; ariko weho urabishobora, kukw impwemu z’imana zera ziri muri wewe." 
Daniel4:19 Nuko Daniyeli, ari we Beluteshaza, amara akanya yumiwe, ivyiyumviro vyiwe bimuhagaritse umutima. Umwami yongera kumubgira, ati Yewe Beluteshaza, izo nzozi n’uko zisobanurwa nta co biguhagarika umutima. Beluteshaza aramwishura, at’ Izo nzozi zirakaba ku bansi bawe, mwami wanje, n’uko zisobanurwa kurakaba ku barwanizi bawe." 
Daniel4:20 Ico giti wabonye gikura kigakomera, ubushorishori bgaco bugashika kw ijuru, kikabonwa n’abo ku mpera y’isi yose," 
Daniel4:21 kand’ ibibabi vyaco vyari vyiza, kikaba cari gitengengeye ibiribga vyinshi, kandi kikabakw ivyo guhāza ibiriho vyose, kand’ ibikōko vyo mw ishamba bikugama musi yaco, ibiguruka mu kirēre bikārika mu mashami yaco;" 
Daniel4:22 ico giti ni wewe, mugenzi; warakuze, urakomera, kuk’ ubukuru bgawe bgakuze bugashika kw ijuru, n’inganji yawe igashika ku mpera y’isi." 
Daniel4:23 Kandi mwami, nk’uko wabonye umushibamyi kandi yar’ uwera amanuka ava mw ijuru, ati Ni wīcire ico giti ugicagagure, arikw igishitsi ukirekerane n’imizi yaco mu kuzimu, ugihambirize ivyuma n’ imiringa, gisigare mu vyatsi bitoto vyo ku musozi, kize gitondweko n’urume ruva mu kirēre, kirishanye n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, gushitsa ibihe ndwi bigikūranirwako:" 
Daniel4:24 nuko, uku ni ko bisobanurwa, mugenzi, kandi n’ icagezwe c’Īsumba vyose kigushitseko, mwami wanje nyen’ ingoma:" 
Daniel4:25 ng’ Uzokwirukanwa mu bantu, ubane n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, uzorisha nk’inka, uzotondwako n’urume ruva mu kirēre, kand’ ibihe ndwi bizogukūranirwako ukimeze urtyo; gushitsa ah’ uzomenyera kw Īsumba vyose ari yo iganza ubgami bg’ abantu, ikabugabira uwo igomba wese." 
Daniel4:26 Kandi nk’uko bāgeze kw igishitsi n’imizi vy’ico giti birekerwaho, ni k’ubgami bgawe buzogumaho ar’ ubgawe, gushitsa umaze kumenya kw ijuru ari ryo riganza." 
Daniel4:27 None mugenzi, wemere inama nkugīra; reka ivyaha vyawe ukore ibigororotse, kand’ ureke ibigabitanyo vyawe ugirire akagongwe impahazwa; kugira ngo kumbure kuroranirwa kwawe kube kuramaze kabiri." 
Daniel4:28 Nukw ivyo vyose bishika ku mwami Nebukadineza. 
Daniel4:29 Hashize amezi cumi n’abiri yarikw aranobanga mu rugo rwiwe i Babuloni. 
Daniel4:30 Umwami aravuga, ati Mbeg’ aha si Babuloni hahambaye aho niyubakiye ngo habe umurwa wanje niberako, mpubakishije inkomezi z’ububasha bganje, ngo hatere igitinyiro canje icubahiro?" 
Daniel4:31 Iryo jambo umwami akirikūra mu kanwa, haza ijwi rivuye mw ijuru, riti Yewe mwami Nebukadineza, ni wewe ubarirwa; ubgami ubukūwemwo." 
Daniel4:32 Urirukanywe mu bantu, ubane n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba; uzorisha nk’inka, kand’ ibihe ndwi bizogukūranirwako ukimeze urtyo; gushitsa ah’ uzomenyera kw Īsumba vyose ari yo iganza ubgami bg’abantu, ikabugabira uwo igomba wese." 
Daniel4:33 Maz’ ako kanya iryo jambo riba kuri Nebukadineza: yirukanwa mu bantu, asigara arisha nk’inka, umubiri wiwe utondwako n’urume ruva mu kirēre, gushitsa ah’ umushatsi wiwe wabereye ikigunda nk’amoya y’inkukuma, n’inzāra ziwe zihinduka nk’iz’ ibisīga." 
Daniel4:34 Igihe cashinzwe kirangiye, jewe Nebukadineza nunamurira amaso yanje mw ijuru, akenge karagaruka, nca mpimbaza Īsumba vyose, kandi nshima Ībaho ibihe bitazoshira, ndayubaha; kukw ingoma yayo ar’ ingoma itazohangūra, kand’ ubgami bgayo buzohangama ukw ibihe bikūranwa." 
Daniel4:35 Kand’ ababa kw isi bose ibagereranya n’ubusa, kand’ ikora ukw igomba mu ngabo zo mw ijuru, no mu baba kw isi; kandi nta wushobora kubuza ukuboko kwayo, canke kuyibaza, at’ Ukora iki?" 
Daniel4:36 Nuk’ uwo mwanya ubgenge bganje buragaruka, ubgiza bg’ubgami bganje n’igitinyiro canje, n’ugukayangana kw’ ivy’ icubahiro canje bingarukako. Maz’ abajanama banje n’abaganwa banje bansubizak’ umutima; ndaheza ntsimbatazwa mu bgami bganje, nongerwa ububasha buhambaye." 
Daniel4:37 Noneho jewe Nebukadineza nshima Umwami wo mw ijuru, ndamutazira, ndamwubaha; kukw ibikorwa vyiwe vyose ar’ ivy’ ukuri, kand’ inzira ziwe ar’ iziroranye; arikw abagendera mu bgibone ashobora kubacisha bugufi." 
Daniel5:1 Umwami Belushaza arondeza amazimano menshi, atumira abaganwa biwe igihumbi, na we yuhira igiturire ar’ imbere yabo." 
Daniel5:2 Maze Belushaza ahimvye igiturire, ahamagaza ibintu vy’imbombovu vy’izahabu n’ifeza, ivyo se Nebukadineza yari yaranyaze mu rusengero rw’i Yerusalemu, kugira ng’ umwami n’abaganwa biwe n’abamikazi biwe n’incoreke ziwe z’intoni babinyweremwo." 
Daniel5:3 Nuko bazana ivyo bintu vy’izahabu vyari vyaranyazwe mu rusengero mu ngoro y’Imana i Yerusalemu; maz’ umwami n’abaganwa biwe n’abamikazi biwe n’ incoreke ziwe z’intoni babinyweramwo: 
Daniel5:4 banywa ibiturire, bahimbaza imana z’izahabu n’iz’ ifeza n’iz’ imiringa n’iz’ ivyuma n’iz’ ibiti n’iz’ amabuye." 
Daniel5:5 Buno nyene haboneka intoke z’umuntu zandika ku gihome c’igisika mu ngoro y’umwami, ahahanganye n’igiteretswekw amatara; umwami abona ico gihimba c’igikonjo candika." 
Daniel5:6 Maze mu nyonga h’ umwami harahindurira, ivyiyumviro vyiwe bimuhagarika umutima; ingingo z’amatako yiwe ziradohoka, amavi arakomangana." 
Daniel5:7 Umwami ahamagara n’ijwi rirenga ngo bamuzanire abapfumu n’Abakaludaya n’abamenyi. Umwami abarira abo banyabgenge b’i Babuloni, at’ Ūshobora gusoma iyo nyandiko, akambarira ukw isobanurwa, arambikwa impuzu z’inyambarabami, n’umugufu w’ izahabu mw izosi, kand’ azoba uwa gatatu mu bakuru baganza igihugu." 
Daniel5:8 Maz’ abanyabgenge bose b’umwami baca barinjira: ariko birabananira gusoma iyo nyandiko, no kumenyesha umwami ukw isobanurwa." 
Daniel5:9 Maz’ umwami Belushaza aranduka umutima, mu nyonga hiwe harahindurira, abaganwa biwe bagwa igihumura." 
Daniel5:10 Maz’ umugabekazi, yumvise amajambo y’umwami n’abaganwa biwe, yinjira mu nzu y’amazimano, aravuga, ati Mugenzi nyaguhoraho, nta co uhagarika umutima, ngo mu nyonga hawe hahindurire:" 
Daniel5:11 kuko mu gihugu cawe har’ umuntu arimw’ impwemu z’imana zera. Kandi ku ngoma ya so umuco no gutahura n’ubgenge buhwanye n’ubgenge bg’izo mana vyabonetse muri we. Kandi so umwami Nebukadineza, umwami so yakuvyaye, yamugize umukuru w’abanyamarēba n’abapfumu n’Abakaludaya n’abamenyi;" 
Daniel5:12 kuko mur’ uwo muntu Daniyeli uwo umwami yise Beluteshaza, hābonetsemw’ ubgenge bg’agahebuza no kumenya no gutahura no gusobanura inzozi no kumenya amajambo ahiritswe, yabaye gasobanuzi k’ibisobanye. Enda rero, ni bahamagare Daniyeli, na we aravuga uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel5:13 Nuko Daniyeli bamurengukana imbere y’umwami. Umwami abaza Daniyeli, ati Mbega ni wewe Daniyeli wo mu banyagano b’Abayuda, umwami data yanyaze i Buyuda?" 
Daniel5:14 Numvise bakuvuga ngw impwemu z’imana ziri muri wewe, kandi ng’ umuco no gutahura n’ubgenge bg’agahebuza bikubonekamwo." 
Daniel5:15 Kandi bari bamaze kunzanira abanyabgenge b’abapfumu kugira ngo bansomere iyo nyandiko, bammenyeshe ukw isobanurwa; ariko ntibashoboye kuvuga uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel5:16 Ariko numvise weho k’ushobora gusobanura ibintu, kandi k’uri gasobanuzi k’ibisobanye: nuko rero ni washobora kunsomera iyo nyandiko, no kummenyesha ukw isobanurwa, urambikwa impuzu z’inyambarabami, n’umugufu w’izahabu mw izosi, kand’ uzoba uwa gatatu mu bakuru baganza igihugu." 
Daniel5:17 Daniyeli yishura umwami, at’ Ingabire zawe n’uzigumirize, kand’ impēra zawe uzihe uwundi. Ariko ndasomera umwami iyo nyandiko, ndamumenyeshe ukw isobanurwa." 
Daniel5:18 Zirikana mugenzi, Imana isumba vyose yahaye so Nebukadineza ubgami n’ubukuru n’ubgiza n’igitinyiro." 
Daniel5:19 Kandi kubg’ ubukuru yamuhaye, amoko yose n’amahanga n’abavuga indimi zitari zimwe bāhindira agashitsi imbere yiwe, bakamutinya; yica uwo agomvye kwica, agakiza uwo agomvye gukiza; yashira hejuru uwo agomvye, agacisha bugufi uwo agomvye." 
Daniel5:20 Ariko yishize hejuru, yikomantaje umutima bimuteye gukoresha ubugabo, ataramurwa ku ngoma, kandi bamwāka icubahiro ciwe." 
Daniel5:21 Nuko yirukanwa mu bantu, umutima wiwe uhindurwa nk’uw’ ibikōko, aba hamwe n’indogoba z’inyeshamba, arisha nk’inka, kand’ umubiri wiwe utondwako n’urume ruva mu kirēre; gushitsa aho yamenyeye kw Īsumba vyose ari yo iganza ubgami bg’abantu, ikabgimikamw’ uwo igomba wese." 
Daniel5:22 Ariko nawe, Belushaza, umwana wiwe, ntiwicishije bugufi mu mutima wawe, naho war’ uzi ivyo vyose;" 
Daniel5:23 ariko winantaje ku Mwami Nyen’ ijuru, uzanirwa ibintu vyo mu ngoro yiwe, kugira ngo wewe n’abaganwa bawe n’ abamikazi bawe n’incoreke zawe z’intoni mubinyweremw’ ibiturire; maz’ uhimbaza imana z’ ifeza n’iz’ izahabu n’iz’ imiringa n’iz’ ivyuma n’iz’ ibiti n’iz’ amabuye, zidashobora kubona canke kwumva canke kumenya; arikw Imana Rurema ifise impwemu zawe mu kuboko kwayo, ari yo igaba inzira zawe zose, ntiwayihaye icubahiro." 
Daniel5:24 Maz’ ico gihimba c’igikonjo kirarungikwa, kivuye kuri yo, iyo nyandiko irandikwa." 
Daniel5:25 Kand’ inyandiko yanditswe n’iyi: Mene, Mene, Tekel, Ufarsin." 
Daniel5:26 Kand’ ukw ivyo bisobanurwa n’uku: Mene, risobanurwa ngw Imana iharūye imyaka umaze uri ku ngoma, iyishizekw iherezo." 
Daniel5:27 Tekel, risobanurwa ngo Wagezwe ku munzane, basanga ntushitse." 
Daniel5:28 Peres, risobanurwa ng’ Ubgami bgawe buragabanganywe, buhawe Abamedi n’ Abaperesi." 
Daniel5:29 Maze Belushaza agera ko bambika Daniyeli impuzu z’inyambarabami, n’umugufu w’izahabu mw izosi, kandi ko bamamaza kw azoba uwa gatatu mu bakuru baganza igihugu." 
Daniel5:30 Maze mur’ iryo joro nyene Belushaza umwami w’i Bukaludaya aricwa. 
Daniel5:31 Ubgo bgami buhabga Dariyo Umumedi, yar’ amaze imyaka nka mirongwitandatu n’ibiri y’amavuka." 
Daniel6:1 Maze Dariyo abona kw ari vyiza kugabanganya igihugu abaganwa ijana na mirongwibiri, ngo bakwire igihugu cose." 
Daniel6:2 Kand’ ashira hejuru yabo abakuru batatu bo kubaganza, umwe muri bo yari Daniyeli; kwar’ ukugira ngw abo baganwa babashikirize ivyo bātoje, ng’ umwami ntagire ico ahomba." 
Daniel6:3 Maze Daniyeli aba agakomeye kuruta abandi bakuru n’abaganwa, kuko yarimw’ ubgenge bg’agahebuza; mber’ umwami yiyumvira kumwegurira kuganza igihugu cose." 
Daniel6:4 Maze ba bakuru n’abaganwa baherako barondera urwitwazo rw’ ico borega Daniyeli ku vy’igihugu; ariko bamuburak’ urwitwazo na rumwe cank’ igitiriganye; kuko yar’ umwizigirwa, ntabonekekw amafuti cank’ igitiriganye na kimwe." 
Daniel6:5 Bukeye abo bagabo baravugana, bati Nta rwitwazo tuzoronka kuri Daniyeli, shiti tururonse mu vy’ivyagezwe vy’Imana yiwe." 
Daniel6:6 Nukw abo bakuru n’ abaganwa bakondorera ku mwami Dariyo, baramubgira, bati Mwami nyaguhoraho;" 
Daniel6:7 abakuru bose b’igihugu, n’ivyēgēra vyawe, n’ abaganwa n’abacamanza n’abagabisha, bagiye inama ngo hashingwe icagezwe cawe, no gushirah’ icihanikirizo gihambaye, ngo kumara imisi mirongwitatu umuntu wese azogira imana n’imwe asaba, cank’ umuntu n’umwe, atari wewe, mugenzi, az’ atererwe mu rwobo rw’intambge." 
Daniel6:8 Nuko rero, mugenzi, shinga ico cihanikirizo, wisinye ku candiko caco, kugira ngo coye kuzohindurwa, nk’ukw ivyagezwe vy’Abamedi n’Abaperesi bidahinduka." 
Daniel6:9 Nuk’ umwami Dariyo asinya ku candiko c’ico cihanikirizo. 
Daniel6:10 Maze Daniyeli amenye kw ico candiko casinyweko, aja i we; kand’ amadirisha y’inzu yiwe yerekeye i Yerusalemu yama yuguruye; akomeza gupfukama gatatu‐gatatu ku musi, asenga Imana yiwe ayikengurukira, nk’uko yar’ asanzwe abigenza." 
Daniel6:11 Bukeye ba bagabo barakondora, basanga Daniyeli asenga Imana yiwe, ayinginga." 
Daniel6:12 Baraza bavugira imbere y’umwami ivya ca cihanikirizo ciwe, bati Mbega ntiwasinye ku cihanikirizo washinze, yuko kumara imisi mirongwitatu umuntu wese azogira imana n’imwe asaba cank’ umuntu n’umwe, atari wewe, mugenzi, azotererwa mu rwobo rw’intambge? Umwami arabishura, ati Narabishinze koko, nk’ukw ivyagezwe vy’Abamedi n’ Abaperesi bishingwa ntibihinduke." 
Daniel6:13 Baca bishura umwami, bat’ Ariko Daniyeli we wo mu banyagano b’Abayuda, ntaruha akubara, mugenzi, canke ca cihanikirizo wasinyeko, arikw asenga gatatu‐gatatu ku musi." 
Daniel6:14 Maz’ umwami yumvise iryo jambo biramutuntuza, ashira umutima kuri Daniyeli kugira ngw amukize; yihambirira ku vyo kurokora Daniyeli gushitsa izuba rirenze." 
Daniel6:15 Ba bagabo bongera gukondorera ku mwami, baramubgira, bati Mugenzi, umenye kw ar’icagezwe c’ Abamedi n’Abaperesi ngo nta cagezwe cank’ ibgirizwa umwami yashinze vyohinduka." 
Daniel6:16 Nuk’ umwami apfa kubigera, bazana Daniyeli, bamuterera mu rwobo rw’intambge. Maz’ umwami abgira Daniyeli, at’ Imana yawe wama ukorera iragukiza." 
Daniel6:17 Maze bazana ikibuye, bacubika ku munwa w’urwobo, bagihomakw ishashara, ayidomamw’ ikimenyetso ciwe bgite, n’ikimenyetso c’ abaganwa biwe, kugira ngo ntihagire igihindurwa mu vya Daniyeli." 
Daniel6:18 Nuk’ umwami asubira mu ngoro yiwe, akesha ijoro adafūnguye, ata n’ivyo kumunezereza bamuzanira; ntiyaruha agoheka." 
Daniel6:19 Ijoro rikeye mu mutwenzi umwami aravyukuruka, agenda yihuta aja kuri rwa rwobo rw’intambge." 
Daniel6:20 Ashitse hafi ya rwa rwobo Daniyeli yarimwo, ahamagara n’ijwi ry’umubabaro, abaza Daniyeli, ati Yewe Daniyeli musavyi w’Imana nzima, mbeg’ Imana yawe ukorera na ntaryo yashoboye kugukiza izo ntambge?" 
Daniel6:21 Maze Daniyeli yishura umwami, ati Mugenzi nyaguhoraho," 
Daniel6:22 Imana yanje yarungitse umumarayika wayo, azibira iminwa y’intambge, nta co zankozeko; kuko nabonetse imbere yayo ntagira igicumuro, kandi nawe, mugenzi, nta kibi nakugiriye." 
Daniel6:23 Maz’ umwami aca aranezerwa cane, avuga ko bakūra Daniyeli muri rwa rwobo. Nuko Daniyeli akūrwa mu rwobo, nta n’agakwabu kabonetse kuri we, kuko yari yizigiye Imana yiwe." 
Daniel6:24 Maz’ umwami avuga ko bazana ba bagabo bāreze Daniyeli; babaterera muri rwa rwobo rw’intambge, bo n’abana babo n’abagore babo; zibasamira mu kirēre zibajanjagurana n’amagufa yabo, batarushe bashika no hasi mu rwobo." 
Daniel6:25 Nuk’ umwami Dariyo yandikira amoko yose n’amahanga n’ abavuga indimi zitari zimwe baba mw isi yose, at’ Amahoro agwire muri mwebge!" 
Daniel6:26 Nshinze icagezwe ngo mu bgami bganje iyo buva bukagera, abantu bahindire agashitsi imbere y’Imana ya Daniyeli, bayubahe: kukw iyo ari yo Mana nzima, ihora ihangamye ibihe vyose; ubgami bgayo ntibuzokwigera buhangūra, kand’ ingoma yayo izoshika no kw iherezo." 
Daniel6:27 Ni yo irokora igakiza, ikora ibimenyetso n’ibitangaza mw ijuru no mw isi, kandi ni yo yakūye Daniyeli mu menyo y’intambge." 
Daniel6:28 Nuko ku ngoma ya Dariyo no ku ngoma ya Kuro Umuperesi, Daniyeli agira ikiganza ciza." 
Daniel7:1 Mu mwaka wa mbere Belushaza umwami w’i Babuloni ari ku ngoma, Daniyeli yarose inzozi, abona ivyo yerekewe mu mutwe, ari ku buriri bgiwe. Maze yandika ivyo yarose, arobanuramw’ ingingo zavyo zikomeye." 
Daniel7:2 Nuko Daniyeli aravuga, ati Mu vyo neretswe mw ijoro, nagize ntya, mbona imiyaga ine yo mu kirēre isenyeranira ku kiyaga kinini." 
Daniel7:3 Mur’ ico kiyaga hiburukamw’ ibikōko binini bine bidasangiye ubgoko. 
Daniel7:4 Ica mbere casa n’intambge, kandi cari gifise amababa nk’ay’ inkukuma; ndacitegereza, gushitsa ah’ ivyubi vyaco bihanyuwe, gikūrwa hasi, gihagarikwa ku maguru, cēma nk’umuntu, kandi gihabga umutima nk’uw’ umuntu." 
Daniel7:5 Ndongera mbona ikindi gikōko ca kabiri gisa n’icitwa idubu; cari gihengarariye uruhande rumwe, cari gifashe amagufa atatu y’ imbavu mu kanwa, mu mihāha yaco. Barakibgira, bati Va hasi urye inyama nyinshi." 
Daniel7:6 Hanyuma y’ivyo mbona ikindi gikōko gisa n’ingwe; mu mbavu zaco cari gifise amababa ane, nk’ay’ igisīga; kand’ ico gikōko cari gifise imitwe ine; gihabga inganji." 
Daniel7:7 Hanyuma y’ivyo, mu vyo neretswe mw ijoro ngira ntya mbona igikōko ca kane, giteye ubgoba c’ubuyobe, kandi c’inkomezi nyinshi; cari gifise imihāha minini y’ivyuma; kiratabagura, kirajanjanga; ibisigaye kibisiribangisha amajanja yaco. Cari gifise itandukaniro n’ ibindi bikōko vyose vyacitangiye imbere; kandi cari gifise amahembe cumi." 
Daniel7:8 Nitegereje ayo mahembe, mbona muri yo hameze akandi gahembe gatoya. Imbere yako hakūrwa amahembe atatu mu yar’ asanzwe. Maz’ ako gahembe nkabonakw amaso asa n’ay’ umuntu, n’akanwa kavuga ibihambaye." 
Daniel7:9 Nkomeza kwitegereza, bakiriko barashirah’ intebe z’ubgami; maze haza Uwa mbere na mbere, aravyagira. Imyambaro yiwe yera nka shelegi kand’ umushatsi wiwe wasa n’ubgoya bg’intama yera derere; intebe y’ubgami bgiwe yari nk’ibirimi vy’umuriro, kand’ amakurudumu yayo yari nk’umuriro waka." 
Daniel7:10 Uruzi rw’ umuriro rwiburuka ruva imbere yiwe; ibihumbi n’ibihumbi baramukorera, kand’ amasinzi n’amasinzi bari bahagaze imbere yiwe. Imanza zirashingwa, ibitabo birazingururwa." 
Daniel7:11 Naritegereje ico gihe kubg’ ijwi rya ya magambo yo kwihayagiza ka gahembe kāvuga; nkiriko nditegereza, ca gikōko kiricwa, umuvyimba waco uraherengetera, utābga mu muriro urayigira." 
Daniel7:12 Kandi na vya bikōko bindi, inganji yavyo birayakwa: ariko vyongerwa ukubaho gushitsa igihe kinaka." 
Daniel7:13 Kandi mu vyo neretswe mw ijoro, nagize ntya mbona haje uwusa n’Umwana w’umuntu, azananye n’ibicu vyo kw ijuru, aza kuri wa Wundi wa mbere na mbere, baramumushikiriza." 
Daniel7:14 Aca ahabga inganji n’icubahiro n’ubgami, kugira ngw amoko yose n’amahanga n’abavuga indimi zitari zimwe bamusabe: ingoma yiwe n’ingoma itazovaho, kand’ ubgami bgiwe n’ubgami butazohangura." 
Daniel7:15 Maze jewe Daniyeli, umutima untunturiramwo, uhagarikwa n’ ivyo nabonye nerekewe mu mutwe." 
Daniel7:16 Nuko nēgēra umwe mu bari bahagazeho, ndamwinginga ngw ambarire ivy’ ukuri vyo mur’ ivyo vyose; arabimbgira, ammenyesha uko bisobanurwa." 
Daniel7:17 At’ Ivyo bikōko binini ukw ari bine, ni bo bami bane bazokwaduka bazukurutse mw isi." 
Daniel7:18 Arikw abera b’Īsumba vyose bazohabga ubgo bgami, kand’ ubgo bgami bazobgegukira buhore ar’ ubgabo gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Daniel7:19 Maze nca nifuza kumenya ivy’ ukuri vy’igikōko ca kane cari gifise itandukaniro na vya bindi vyose, kigatera ubgoba butavugwa, gifise imihāha y’ivyuma n’ ivyāra vy’imiringa, cātabagura kikajanjanga, ibisigaye kikabisiribangisha amajanja yaco." 
Daniel7:20 Kandi nifuza kumenya ivya ya mahembe cumi yari mu mutwe waco, n’ivya rya rindi ryamera, rigatembagaza ya yandi atatu, ni ryo rya hembe ryari rifise amaso, n’akanwa kihayagiza, ryaboneka kw ari rinini kurusha ayandi magenzi yaryo." 
Daniel7:21 Maze nitegereje mbona iryo hembe rirwanya abera, rirabanesha," 
Daniel7:22 gushitsa Uwa mbere na mbere aje, atsindishiriza abera b’Īsumba vyose; nukw igihe kirashika, abera begukira ubgami." 
Daniel7:23 Maze wa wundi arambarira, at’ Ico gikōko ca kane kizoba ubgami bga kane kw isi, kandi buzoba bufise itandukaniro n’ubundi bgami bgose, buzotabagura isi yose, buyisiribange, buyijanjange." 
Daniel7:24 Kandi ku vy’ayo mahembe cumi, mur’ ubgo bgami hazokwadukamw’ abami cumi; maze mu nyuma zabo hazoza uwundi mwami; ariko we azogira itandukaniro n’aba mbere, kand’ azonesha abami batatu." 
Daniel7:25 Īsumba vyose azoyivugakw amajambo y’agatītūro, kand’ azocobogoza abera b’Īsumba vyose. Azoja imigabo yo guhindura ibihe n’ivyagezwe; kandi bazorekerwa mu maboko yiwe kugeza ah’ igihe n’ibihe n’igice c’igihe bizoshirira." 
Daniel7:26 Arikw imanza zizoshingwa, bamwake ingoma yiwe, bayikombore, bayihenebereze, gushitsa ku muhero." 
Daniel7:27 Kand’ ubgami n’inganji n’ubukuru bg’ubgami bgose buri musi y’ijuru hose bizogabirwa ubgoko bg’abera b’ Īsumba vyose; ubgami bgayo n’ubgami buzokwamaho, kand’ abami bose bazoyikorera bayumvire." 
Daniel7:28 Ayo majambo agarukiye aho. Ariko jewe Daniyeli ivyiyumviro vyanje bimpagarika umutima, mu maso hanje harahindurira; arikw ayo majambo ndayabīka mu mutima wanje." 
Daniel8:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu umwami Belushaza ari ku ngoma, jewe Daniyeli mbona ivyo neretswe bikurikira ivya mbere." 
Daniel8:2 Mbona ivyo neretswe nko mu nzozi, maze mvyitegereje mbona ndi ku murwa i Shushani, mu ntāra yo muri Elamu; ndāvye ivyo neretswe mbona ndi ku ruzi Ulayi." 
Daniel8:3 Nunamuye amaso mbona impfizi y’intama ifise amahembe abiri, ihagaze hakuno y’uruzi: kand’ ayo mahembe ukw ar’ abiri yari maremare, ariko rimwe ryasumba irindi, kand’ irirerire ni ryo ryaheruka kumera." 
Daniel8:4 Mbona iyo mpfizi y’intama igenda itwariranya, yerekeye i burengerazuba n’i burārūko n’i bumanuko; ntihāgira igikōko gihangara kuyihagarara imbere, ntihāboneka ūshobora kugira ico ayikiza; ariko yakora uko yigombeye, ikīgira agahambaye." 
Daniel8:5 Nkivyitegereza, mbona haje impfizi y’impene ivuye i burengerazuba, ica mw isi yose, igenda idakoza amaguru hasi; kand’ iyo mpene yar’ ifise ihembe ry’ akarangabgami hagati y’amaso yayo." 
Daniel8:6 Iza kuri ya mpfizi y’intama y’amahembe abiri, nari nabonye ihagaze ku ruzi, irayivumbukira iri n’inkomezi zitewe n’inzigo nyinshi." 
Daniel8:7 Mbona yēgereye iyo mpfizi y’intama, irayishamira, irayisekura, iyivuna ayo mahembe yompi; kand’ iyo mpfizi y’intama ntiyagira inkomezi zo kuyihagarara imbere, arikw iyo mpene iyikubita hasi, irayisiribanga; kand’ iyo mpfizi y’intama ntihāboneka ūshobora kuyikiza ya mpfizi y’impene." 
Daniel8:8 Maz’ iyo mpfizi y’impene yīgira agahambaye bihebuje; imaze kugira ubushobozi, iryo hembe rihambaye rirakondoka; maze mu kibanza caryo hamera ayandi mahembe ane y’akarangabgami, yerekeye ibirēre bine vy’ijuru." 
Daniel8:9 Kuri rimwe mur’ ayo, hashamika agahembe gatoya, karakura, kaba rinini cane, ryerekera i bumanuko n’i burasirazuba no mu gihugu c’ubgiza." 
Daniel8:10 Rihinduka rinini ryagamba no mu ngabo zo mw ijuru, mber’ ingabo zimwe n’inyenyeri zimwe ribishiburira hasi, rirabisiribanga." 
Daniel8:11 Nuko ryīgira agahambaye, mbere ryiringaniza n’umugabisha w’izo ngabo, rimunyaga ikimazi co kwoswa gihora gitangwa uko bukeye, inyubako z’ahēra hiwe zirasangangurwa." 
Daniel8:12 Izo ngabo bo n’ico kimazi gihora gitangwa, bigaburwa mu maboko yaryo kubg’ igicumuro. Ivy’ ukuri ribishiburira hasi, maze rikora ivyo ryigombeye, riratunganirwa." 
Daniel8:13 Maze numva uwera avuga; kand’ uwundi mu bera abaza umwe yabanje kuvuga, ati Bizogeza ryari ivyerekanywe vy’ikimazi cahora gitangwa, n’ivy’ igicumuro kizanye ubugesera, gitumye ahantu hēra n’ingabo bitangwa bigasiribangwa?" 
Daniel8:14 Aranyishura, ati Buzokwira buce imisi ibihumbi bibiri n’amajana atatu; ni ho ahantu hēra hazobona guhumanuka." 
Daniel8:15 Nuko jewe ubganje Daniyeli mmaze kubona ivyo neretswe, ndondera uko nobitahura; mbona ikimpagaze imbere gifise ishusho nk’iy’ umuntu." 
Daniel8:16 Maze numva ijwi ry’umuntu riturutse hagati mu ruzi Ulayi, rihamagara, riti Yewe Gaburiyeli, tahuza uwo muntu ivyo yeretswe." 
Daniel8:17 Nuko yēgēra aho nari mpagaze; anshikiriye ncika ivutu, nikubita hasi nubamye; maz’ arambarira, at’ Umve, yewe mwana w’umuntu, ivyo weretswe n’ivy’ igihe c’iherezo." 
Daniel8:18 Akirikw aravugana nanje, nzimira ubgenge, ncurika umutwe hasi; maz’ ankorako, aramvyura." 
Daniel8:19 Arambgira, at’ Umve ngira nkumenyeshe ibizoba mu gihe c’uburake bgo kw iherezo; kukw ar’ ivy’ igihe c’iherezo cashinzwe." 
Daniel8:20 Impfizi y’intama y’amahembe abiri wabonye ni bo bami b’Abamedi n’Abaperesi. 
Daniel8:21 Impfizi y’impene y’ibisambi ni we mwami w’i Bugiriki; kand’ ihembe rinini ryari hagati y’amaso yayo ni we mwami wabo wa mbere. 
Daniel8:22 Kandi nk’uko ryakondotse, mu kibanza caryo hakamera ayandi ane, uko ni ko hazoba ubgami bune bukomoka mur’ ubgo bgoko, ariko ntibuzonganya ububasha n’ ubg’ uwa mbere." 
Daniel8:23 Igihe ingoma yabo igira ihere, abanyabicumuro bamaze kugwira, hazovyuka umwami w’umujinya, azi guhirikana." 
Daniel8:24 Ububasha bgiwe buzoba bukomeye, ariko ntibuzoba ar’ ububasha bgiwe ubgiwe. Azogeseza bitangaje, akore ivyo yigombeye, atunganirwe; azogeseza abahambaye bo n’ubgoko bg’abera." 
Daniel8:25 Akenge kiwe kazotuma ivy’ ubugunge birorana; azokwīgira agahambaye mu mutima wiwe, ageseze benshi ata co binona; mber’ azohaguruka kurwanya Umwami w’abami; arikw azovunagurika, ata wumukozeko." 
Daniel8:26 Kand’ ivyerekanywe vy’ubgira bugaca vy’iyo misi vyavuzwe, n’ivy’ ukuri; arik’ ugumize ivyo weretswe muri ntibate, kukw ar’ ibizoba hahise igihe kirekire." 
Daniel8:27 Maze jewe Daniyeli nca ncika intege, mmara imisi ndwaye. Hanyuma mva hasi, nkora ibikorwa vy’umwami; ntangazwa n’ivyo neretswe, kandi nta wobitahura." 
Daniel9:1 Mu mwaka Dariyo mwene Ahasuwerusi wo mu ruvyaro rw’Abamedi yimyemwo, yimitswe kuba umwami w’igihugu c’Abakaludaya," 
Daniel9:2 mur’ uwo mwaka wa mbere ari ku ngoma, jewe Daniyeli namenyeshejwe n’ibitabo igitigiri c’imyaka Yerusalemu hazomara ar’ imisaka, kw ar’ imyaka mirongwirindwi, ari yo nyene ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavuze, arivugishije Yeremiya." 
Daniel9:3 Mpanga amaso Umwami Imana, kugira ngo niyegurire gusenga no gutakamba, nisonzesha, nambaye amagunira, nīsīze umunyota." 
Daniel9:4 Nsenga Uhoraho Imana yanje, ndātura, nti Bgirukiro Mana nkuru y’igitinyiro, wewe wama ushitsa isezerano, ukagirira imbabazi abagukunda bakitondera ivyagezwe vyawe:" 
Daniel9:5 twaracumuye, twaragabitanije, twakoze nabi, twaragararije, twaratambamye tuva ku mateka washinze no ku vyo wageze." 
Daniel9:6 Ntitwumviye abasavyi bawe, ari bo bavugishwa nawe, bāvuga mw izina ryawe babarira abami bacu n’abaganwa bacu na ba sogokuruza bacu n’abantu bose bo mu gihugu." 
Daniel9:7 Bgirukiro, ukugororoka n’ukwawe, ariko tweho mu maso hacu hasigaye hamāramāzwa n’isoni, nk’uko bimeze mur’ iyi misi ku bagabo b’i Buyuda, no ku baba i Yerusalemu, no ku Bisirayeli bose, abari hafi n’abari kure, basanzaye mu bihugu vyose wabirukaniyemwo, kuko bagusohoye." 
Daniel9:8 Bgirukiro, tweho mu maso hacu, twe n’abami bacu n’abaganwa bacu na ba sogokuruza bacu hasigaye hamāramāzwa n’isoni, kuko twagucumuyeko." 
Daniel9:9 Umwami Imana yacu ni we afise imbabazi no guharira ivyaha, naho twamugararije," 
Daniel9:10 ntitwumvire Uhoraho Imana yacu, ngo tugendere mu vyagezwe na we yadushize imbere, abirungikanye abasavyi biwe, ari bo bavugishwa na we." 
Daniel9:11 Ni koko, Abisirayeli iyo bava bakagera bacumuye ku vyagezwe nawe, baratambama ngo ntibumve ijwi ryawe; ni co catumye dusukwamw’ umuvumo, bo n’indahiro vyari vyaranditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose umusavyi w’Imana, kuko twayicumuyeko." 
Daniel9:12 Maz’ ishitsa amajambo yayo yatuvuzeko twe n’abacamanza bacu bātuganza, aho yaduteza ivyago vy’ ubugesera; kuko musi y’ijuru hose ata higeze kugirirwa nk’uko Yerusalemu hāgiriwe." 
Daniel9:13 Ivyo vyago vyose vyadushitseko nk’uko vyanditswe mu vyagezwe vya Mose; yamara nta ho twinginze Uhoraho Imana yacu ngw idutunge, canke ngo tureke n’ibigabitanyo vyacu, ngo tumenye ivy’ ukuri kwayo." 
Daniel9:14 Ni co catumye Uhoraho ashira umutima kur’ ivyo vyago, akabiduteza; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yacu ari yo igororoka mu bikorwa vyayo vyose ikora; ariko twebge ntitwumviye ijwi ryayo." 
Daniel9:15 Kandi ga Bgirukiro Mana yacu, wewe wakūje abantu bawe mu gihugu ca Egiputa ukuboko gukomeye, ukīgira rurangiranwa nk’ uko bikimeze n’uyu musi; tweho twaracumuye, twakoze nabi." 
Daniel9:16 Bgirukiro, ndakwinginze, kubg’ ukugororoka kwawe kwose, kūra uburake bgawe bg’inkazi ku murwa wawe Yerusalemu umusozi wawe wera; kuko kubg’ ivyaha vyacu n’ibigabitanyo vya ba sogokuruza bacu, Yerusalemu n’abantu bawe vyahindutse agatukisha ku badukikije bose." 
Daniel9:17 None rero, Mana yacu, umve se ugusenga kw’umusavyi wawe n’ugutakamba kwiwe, kandi kubgawe Mwami umurikishirize mu nyonga hawe ahēra hawe habaye imisaka." 
Daniel9:18 Ewe Mana yanje, banga ugutwi kwawe wumve, ni wihwezeshe inyonga zawe witegereze ubugesera bgaduteye, n’umurwa witirirwa izina ryawe, kukw ivyo tugutakambiye, tutabigushize imbere twishingikirije ku bugororotsi bgacu, ariko ni kubg’ imbabazi zawe nyinshi." 
Daniel9:19 Bgirukiro wumve; Bgirukiro uharire; Bgirukiro utege ugutwi ugire ico wokora, ntutebe; bibe kubgawe, Mana yanje, kuk’ umurwa wawe n’abantu bawe vyitirirwa izina ryawe." 
Daniel9:20 Nuko nkivuga, nsenga nātura icaha canje n’ic’ ubgoko bgacu bg’Abisirayeli, kandi ngitakambira Uhoraho Imana yanje umusozi wayo wera;" 
Daniel9:21 nkiriko ndavuga nsenga, wa mugabo Gaburiyeli nabonye mu vyo nabanje kwerekwa, aratumwa aguruka n’ingoga, anyegēra nko mu gihe co gutanga ikimazi ca ni kera." 
Daniel9:22 Ambgira antahuza, ati Daniyeli, ubu nzanywe no kukwungura ubgenge." 
Daniel9:23 Ugitangura gutakamba hacuwe ijambo, kandi nzanywe no kurikubarira, kuk’ ur’ umukundwa cane; nukw iryo jambo uryiyumvire cane, utahure n’ivyo weretswe." 
Daniel9:24 Amayinga mirongwirindwi agerewe ubgoko bganyu n’igisagara canyu cera, kugira ngw ibicumuro bishire n’ivyaha birangizwe, n’ibigabitanyo bitangirwe impongano, hazanwe ukugororoka kutazoshira, ivyo weretswe n’ivyavugishijwe n’Imana ngo bimatanishwe ishashara idomwemw’ ikimenyetso, ahēra cane harobanuzwe amavuta." 
Daniel9:25 Nuk’ umenye, utahure, yuk’ uhereye igihe icagezwe kizoshingirwa co kuvyura no kwubaka Yerusalemu gushitsa kuri Mesiya Segaba, hazocah’ amayinga ndwi; maze habeh’ ayandi mayinga mirongwitandatu n’abiri, hasubire kwubakwa, basubizeh’ imiharuro n’ imigende; mbere bizoba bikorwa mu bihe bigoye." 
Daniel9:26 Maz’ ayo mayinga ukw ari mirongwitandatu n’abiri ni yashira, Mesiya azokūrwaho, kandi nta wuzomusubirira mu gishingo. Maze segaba wundi azoza, abantu biwe bazosangangura igisagara n’ahantu hēra; arikw iherezo ryiwe azotembanwa n’umuvo; kand’ intambara zizorinda zishitsa no kw iherezo; ubugesera bgashinzwe ko buzotera." 
Daniel9:27 Kand’ azosezerana na benshi isezerano rikomeye kumara iyinga rimwe: ni ryagera hagati azokūrah’ ibimazi n’amashikanwa; ūgeseza azoza kw ibaba ry’ibizira; maz’ ubuyobe buzosukwa kur’ uyo ageseza, gushitsa ku muhero washinzwe." 
Daniel10:1 Mu mwaka ugira gatatu Kuro umwami w’i Buperesi ari ku ngoma, Daniyeli ari we Beluteshaza, har’ ico yeretswe, kand’ ico kintu car’ ic’ ukuri, ni co ntambara zikomeye; atahura ivy’ ari vyo, kand’ ivyo yeretswe arabisobanukirwa." 
Daniel10:2 Mur’ iyo misi jewe Daniyeli namaze amayinga atatu yiramvuriye ntuntuye. 
Daniel10:3 Nta binōbōye narya, nta nyama canke vino vyangera no mu kanwa kandi sinaruha nīsīga amavuta, gushitsa ah’ ayo mayinga ukw ar’ atatu yose ashiriye." 
Daniel10:4 Maze ku musi ugira mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwezi kwa mbere, nari ku nkombe y’uruzi runini rwitwa Hidekeli." 
Daniel10:5 Nunamuye amaso mbona umuntu yambaye impuzu zera, akenyeje izahabu nziza zavuye muri Ufazi." 
Daniel10:6 Kand’ umubiri wiwe wasa n’akabuyenge kitwa tarushishi, mu maso hiwe hasa n’umuravyo, amaso yiwe yasa n’imuri z’umuriro, amaboko yiwe n’ibirenge vyiwe vyasa n’umuringa w’umwakaka, kand’ ijwi ry’amajambo yiwe ryari rimeze nk’iry’ ishengero ry’abantu." 
Daniel10:7 Ni jewe Daniyeli gusa nabonye ivyo vyerekanywe, yamar’ abantu twari kumwe ntibabibonye, ariko bafatwa n’agatengo gakomeye, barahunga barihisha." 
Daniel10:8 Nuko jeho nsigaraho nd’umwe, mbona ivyo vyerekanywe bihambaye, maze sinasigarana inkomezi na nkeya, mu maso hanje harahīndāna, ndadendebukirwa." 
Daniel10:9 Yamara numva ijwi ry’amajambo yiwe; nkiryumva, nzimira ubgenge, ndubama, ncurika umutwe hasi." 
Daniel10:10 Nuko haza ukuboko kunkorako, bituma mpfukamika amavi n’ibiganza njugumira." 
Daniel10:11 Arambgira, ati Daniyeli, muntu w’ umukundwa cane, utahure amajambo ngira nkubgire, va hasi uhagarare, kuk’ ubu ngutumweko. Amaze kumbgira iryo jambo, mpagarara mpinda agashitsi." 
Daniel10:12 Maz’ arambgira, ati Nta co utinya, Daniyeli; kuk’ uhereye umusi washiriye umutima ku gutahura, no kwicisha bugufi imbere y’Imana yawe, amajambo yawe yarumviswe; kand’ ayo majambo yawe nyene ni yo anzanye." 
Daniel10:13 Ariko segaba w’ ubgami bg’i Buperesi yamaze imisi mirongwibiri n’umwe andwanya. Hanyuma Mikayeli, umwe wo mu bagabisha bahambaye, aza kuntabara; nsigarayo mu bami b’i Buperesi." 
Daniel10:14 Nuko none nzanywe no kugutahuza ibizoba ku bgoko bganyu mu misi y’iherezo; kukw ivyo weretswe ar’ ibizoba hahise igihe kirekire. 
Daniel10:15 Ambgiye ayo majambo, ncurika umutwe, mba ikiyingiyingi." 
Daniel10:16 Maze haza ūfise ishusho nk’iy’ abana b’abantu, akora ku munwa wanje; nca nteranura akanwa, ndavuga mbarira uwar’ ampagaze imbere, nti Databuja, ivyo neretswe vyatumye nsinzikazwa n’umubabaro, ndadendebukiwe." 
Daniel10:17 Mbega nkanje, umusavyi wawe, noshobora nte kuvugana nawe, databuja? Ko jewe ata magara ngisigaranye, numva mpwereye." 
Daniel10:18 Uwasa n’umuntu yongera kunkorako, ansubizamw’ intege." 
Daniel10:19 Arambgira, at’ Ewe muntu w’umukundwa cane, nta co utinya: mpore, mpore, gira amahoro! Akibimbgira, nca ndaremerana, ndavuga, nti Databuja n’uvuge, kuk’ unsubijemw’ intege." 
Daniel10:20 Arambaza, at’ Urazi ikinzanye kuri wewe? Ubu ngira nsubireyo kurwanya segaba w’i Buperesi; kandi ni natabaruka, segaba w’i Bugiriki azoca aza." 
Daniel10:21 Ariko ndakubarira ivyanditswe mu gitabo c’ivy’ ukuri: kandi nta wuriho wo kuntabara kubarwanya atari Mikayeli umugabisha wanyu. 
Daniel11:1 Kandi nanje, mu mwaka wa mbere Dariyo w’Umumedi ari ku ngoma, nakūwe hasi no kumufasha no kumuremēsha." 
Daniel11:2 Nuko none ngira nkwereke ivy’ ukuri. Haracasigaye abandi bami batatu bazokwima i Buperesi; arik’ uwa kane azorusha abandi bose ubutunzi bginshi: uwo ni yamara kuba umunyabushobozi kubg’ ubutunzi bgiwe, azogomora ingabo zose ngw atere ubgami bg’i Bugiriki." 
Daniel11:3 Maz’ umwami ahambaye azohaguruka, azoganzisha ububasha bginshi, akore uko yigombeye." 
Daniel11:4 Ni yamara guhaguruka, ubgami bgiwe buzosatagurwa, bugabanywemwo bune nk’uko butumbereye ibirēre bine vy’ijuru, kandi ntibuzosubirwamwo n’uruvyaro rwiwe, canke ngo buganzishwe ububasha nk’uko yabuganzisha; kuk’ ubgami bgiwe buzoshingurwa, buhabge abandi atari mur’ abo." 
Daniel11:5 Nuk’ umwami w’i bumanuko azoba ūkomeye; arik’ umwe wo mu baganwa biwe azomurusha ububasha, agire inganji; kand’ inganji yiwe izoba ihambaye cane." 
Daniel11:6 Hashize imyaka bazokwuzura, kuk’ umukobga w’umwami w’i bumanuko azoja kwābīrwa ku mwami w’i burārūko, ngo bibuzuze; arik’ ubushobozi bg’uwo mukobga buzoyongayonga, kand’ uwo mwami na we ntazohangama, cank’ ububasha bgiwe; arik’ uwo mukobga azotanganwa n’abamuzanye n’umuvyeyi wiwe, n’uwamushigikira ico gihe." 
Daniel11:7 Ariko mu ngundu zo ku gishitsi c’i wabo hazovyuka ūzosubira ku ngoma ya se, azoja mu ngabo, atere amaboma y’ umwami w’i burārūko ayinjire, abaho abagire ukw agomba, agire intsinzi;" 
Daniel11:8 kand’ ibigirwamana vyabo na vyo, n’ibishushanyo vyavugutiwe, n’ibintu vyabo vyiza‐vyiza vy’imbombovu vy’ifeza n’ivy’ izahabu, azobinyaga abijane muri Egiputa; maz’ azomara imyaka aretse umwami w’i burārūko." 
Daniel11:9 Hanyuma uwo mwami na we azotera igihugu c’umwami w’i bumanuko, maz’ asubire mu gihugu ciwe." 
Daniel11:10 Hanyuma abana biwe bazovyura intambara, bakoranye isinzi ry’ingabo nyinshi; zizotera zisendanishe, zidwēbēre mu gihugu, maze zizokebanuka zirwana, kugeza no kw iboma y’umwami w’i bumanuko." 
Daniel11:11 Maz’ umwami w’i bumanuko azoshungumirwa, azorekuka arwane n’umwami w’i burārūko; azogomora ingabo nyinshi, maz’ ingabo z’umwami w’i burārūko zizogwa mu maboko y’umwami w’i bumanuko." 
Daniel11:12 Amaze kujana izo ngabo kw inyagano, azokwikakisha mu mutima; ariko nah’ azoba ahindikiranije ingabo ibihumbi n’ibihumbi, ntazoba anesheje rwose;" 
Daniel11:13 kuk’ umwami w’i burārūko azogaruka, akagomora ingabo ziruta iza mbere; hashize imyaka azozana ingabo nyinshi n’isanduruma y’intekera." 
Daniel11:14 Ico gihe benshi bazokūrira hasi umwami w’i bumanuko, kand’ abantu b’ibirara bo mu bgoko bganyu bazogumuka bashitse ivyerekanywe mu nzozi, ariko bazohenuka." 
Daniel11:15 Nuk’ umwami w’i burārūko azoza, atere ibisagara bikikijwe n’inzitiro z’amabuye zikomeye, abirundire ibigunguzi vyo kwūririrako, abineshe; arikw ingabo z’uw’ i bumanuko, bo n’intōre ziwe, ntizizomushobora; ntihazoboneka inkomezi zo kumushobora." 
Daniel11:16 Arik’ ūzoba amuteye azogira nk’uko yigombeye, kandi nta wuzomuhagarara mu ruhanga; nukw azohagarara mu gihugu c’ubgiza, ukuboko kwiwe kurimwo kugeseza." 
Daniel11:17 Hanyuma azoja imigabo yo gusidukana n’ingabo z’igihugu ciwe cose; arikw azokwihanura, yiyuzuze n’uwo mwami w’i bumanuko, amushingire umukobga wiwe kugira ngw amuhondobereze: arikw iyo migabo ntizohagarara, ntizomubera ko." 
Daniel11:18 Hanyuma y’ivyo azohindukiza amaso, atere ibizinga vyo mu kiyaga, aneshe vyinshi; arik’ umugabisha umwe azozibiza agakēngērwe yateye, mber’ azokamusubiza ku mutwe." 
Daniel11:19 Maz’ azohindukiza amaso yerekeze mu maboma yo mu gihugu ciwe bgite; arikw azotsitara, ahenuke, ntaboneke ukundi." 
Daniel11:20 Bukeye hazovyuka uwundi mu gishingo ciwe, azorungika umutozakori mu gihugu kirushirije kuba ciza co mu bgami bgiwe; ariko mu misi mike azokenyurwa, ata mitongano cank’ intambara." 
Daniel11:21 Bukeye mu gishingo ciwe hazovyuka umuntu w’inkēngērwa, atāhawe icubahiro c’ubgami; arikw azoza mu gihe c’impore, yironkeshereze ubgami ubuhemanyi." 
Daniel11:22 Maz’ ingabo zizoba zisebereye nk’uruzi zizotembanwa n’umuvo imbere yiwe, zihomvagurike; mbere n’ umukuru w’isezerano na we n’ uko."
