Daniel11:23 Kandi hagize umuntu yifatanya na we, azoca mu bugunge, kukw azodūga akaba ūhambaye, nah’ azoba afise abantu bake." 
Daniel11:24 Mu gihe c’impore azotera intambara aharusha ahandi kumera mu gihugu; azokora ivyo ba sekuru na ba sekuruza batigeze gukora; azogabanganya abantu amasahu n’iminyago n’itunga; mber’ azomara igihe gitoya yīgīriye imigabo yo gutera amaboma akomeye. 
Daniel11:25 Maz’ azokwiyungunganya mu bubasha bgiwe n’ ubugabo, azogomora ingabo nyinshi atere umwami w’i bumanuko; kand’ umwami w’i bumanuko azokwitabara mu ntambara, afise ingabo nyinshi cane z’ubuhizi; ariko ntazomuhagarara mu mutwe, kuko bazomuryaruka." 
Daniel11:26 Mber’ abazoba barya ku binōbōye vyiwe ni bo bazomufyonyora; ingabo ziwe zizotembanwa n’umuvo, benshi muri bo bahindikirane." 
Daniel11:27 Abo bami bompi imitima yabo izoba iyo gukora ikibi; bazovugana ibinyoma bari ku meza amwe: arikw ivyabo ntibizororana, kukw iherezo rizoza mu gihe cashinzwe." 
Daniel11:28 Nukw azosubirana mu gihugu ciwe ibintu vyinshi; kand’ umutima wiwe uzoba wanse isezerano ryera, azokora nk’uko yigombeye, maz’ asubire mu gihugu ciwe." 
Daniel11:29 Nuko mu gihe cashinzwe azosubira kuja gutera i bumanuko; arikw ico gihe co hanyuma ntikizomera nk’ica mbere. 
Daniel11:30 Kukw amāto y’i Kitimu azomutera, azotuma atinyirira amagara, asubire inyuma; azoshungumirirwa isezerano ryera, akore nk’uko yigombeye; mber’ azosubirayo, ashire umutima ku bātaye isezerano ryera." 
Daniel11:31 Azogomora ingabo ziwe, zihumanye ahēra n’iboma yaho, bakūreh’ ikimazi co kwoswa gihora gitangwa uko bukeye, bahashinge ikizira c’ubuyobe kizana ubugesera." 
Daniel11:32 Abakora ibibi vyo kurwanya isezerano azobazimirisha akarimi keza; arikw abantu bazi Imana yabo bazoshikama bakore ibikomeye. 
Daniel11:33 Kand’ abari n’ubgenge bo mu bantu bazokwigisha benshi; ariko bazokwicwa n’inkota n’umuriro no gushumikwa no kuba inyagano kumara igihe. 
Daniel11:34 Ni bakorokera mur’ ivyo vyago, bazofashwa buhoro: ariko benshi bazokwifatanya na bo mu buryarya." 
Daniel11:35 Kandi bamwe mur’ abo banyabgenge bazokwicwa, kuzoba ar’ ukubavugutira no kubakūramw’ inkamba no kubeza, gushitsa ku gihe c’iherezo, kukw iryo herezo rikirindiriye igihe cashinzwe." 
Daniel11:36 Nuk’ uwo mwami azokora uko yigombeye, yishire hejuru, yīgire agahambaye gasumba icitwa imana cose, kand’ azovuga ibitangaza vyo kurogota ku Mana nya mana, azororanirwa gushitsa ah’ uburake buzoshikira; kukw icashinzwe kitazobura gushika." 
Daniel11:37 Kandi ntazobabara imana za ba sekuruza, cank’ imana isengwa n’abagore, cank’ iyindi mana yose; kukw azokwishira hejuru gusumba zose." 
Daniel11:38 Ariko mu gishingo cazo azokwubaha imana y’amaboma; mber’ imana ba sekuruza batigeze kumenya azoyubahisha kuyishikanira izahabu n’ifeza n’utubuyenge tw’igiciro kinini n’ibintu vy’igikundiro. 
Daniel11:39 Kand’ azonesha amaboma arusha ayandi gukomera, afashijwe n’iyo mana y’akavantara; abazomuninahaza bose azobongeraniriza icubahiro, abahe gutwara abantu benshi, kand’ azobasaturira ibihugu kw ingabire." 
Daniel11:40 Maze mu gihe c’ iherezo umwami w’i bumanuko azomutera, kand’ umwami w’i burārūko azoja kumutega ameze nk’ agashururu, azanye imikogote n’abagendera ku mafarasi n’amāto menshi; azotera ibihugu, asendanishe, abihitane." 
Daniel11:41 Azoshika no mu gihugu c’ubgiza; henshi hazotikizwa, arikw abazokira amaboko yiwe n’Abanyedomu n’Abanyamowabu n’igihimba gikomeye c’ Abamoni." 
Daniel11:42 Nukw azoshingiriza ukuboko ibihugu bitari bimwe, kandi n’igihugu ca Egiputa ntikizokira." 
Daniel11:43 Azoganza itunga ry’izahabu n’ifeza n’ibintu vyose vy’igiciro vyo muri Egiputa; Abalibuwa n’Abanyetiyopiya bazomukakako. 
Daniel11:44 Arikw inkuru zivuye i burasirazuba n’i burārūko zizomuhagarika umutima, azovayo afise uburake bginshi, ajanywe no kugeseza no gutikiza benshi." 
Daniel11:45 Azoshinga amahema yiwe y’ ubgami hagati y’ikiyaga n’umusozi wera w’ubgiza; yamar’ ageze ku musi w’iherezo ryiwe nta wuzomutabara. 
Daniel12:1 Maz’ ico gihe Mikayeli azohaguruka, ni we mugabisha ahagarikiye ubgoko bganyu; kandi hazoba igihe c’umubabaro utigeze kubaho, uhereye igihe amahanga yabereyeho, ukageza ico gihe. Arikw ico gihe umuntu wese wo mu bgoko bganyu azoboneka ko yanditswe mu gitabo azorokoka." 
Daniel12:2 Kandi benshi bo mu bazoba basinziriye mw ivu hasi bazokwikangura, bamwe bikangurire ubugingo budashira, abandi bikangurire ubumāramāre n’ibitētērwa bitazoshira." 
Daniel12:3 Kand’ abāgize ubgenge bazokayangana nk’ugukayangana kwo mw itāzānure ry’ijuru, n’abashikanye benshi ku bugororotsi bazokwaka nk’inyenyeri ibihe bitazoshira." 
Daniel12:4 Nuko rero wewe Daniyeli, gumiza ayo majambo muri ntibate, umatanishe ishashara igitabo cavyo udomemw’ ikimenyetso, gushitsa igihe c’iherezo; ni ho benshi bazoserangura muri co, kand’ ubgenge buzogwira." 
Daniel12:5 Maze jewe Daniyeli nditegereza, mbona abandi babiri bahagaze, umwe ku nkombe yo hakuno y’uruzi, uwundi ku yo hakurya." 
Daniel12:6 Umwe abaza wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera, yari hejuru y’amazi y’urwo ruzi, at’ Ivyo bitangaza bizoshitsa ryari?" 
Daniel12:7 Mbona wa muntu yambaye impuzu zera, yari hejuru y’amazi y’urwo ruzi, amanika ukuboko kw’i buryo n’ukw’ i bumoso, ayatunga mw ijuru; numva arahira Ībaho ibihe bitazoshira, yuko bizomara igihe n’ibihe n’igice c’igihe; kand’ ati Ni bamara guca ubgoko bgera ubunywenywe, ivyo vyose bizoba bishize." 
Daniel12:8 Ndavyumva, ariko sinabitahura; nca ndabaza, nti Databuja, ikizoherukira ibindi mur’ ivyo n’ikihe?" 
Daniel12:9 Aranyishura, at’ Igīre, Daniyeli; kukw ayo majambo ar’ akabanga, amatanishijwe ishashara idomyemw’ ikimenyetso, gushitsa igihe c’iherezo." 
Daniel12:10 Benshi bazotunganywa, bezwe, bavugutirwe; arikw abanyakibi bazoshishikara gukora ikibi, kandi nta n’umwe mu banyakibi azobitahura; arikw abāgize ubgenge bazobitahura." 
Daniel12:11 Ikimazi co kwoswa gihora gitangwa uko bukeye uhereye igihe kizokūrirwaho, bagashinga ca kizira c’ubuyobe cazanye ubugesera, hazocah’ imisi igihumbi n’amajana abiri na mirongwicenda." 
Daniel12:12 Hahirwa uzorīndīra, agashitsa ku misi igihumbi n’amajana atatu na mirongwitatu n’itanu." 
Daniel12:13 Nuko ni wīgīre, urīndīre iherezo; kuk’ uzoruhuka, kand’ uzohagarara mu mugabane wawe, kw iherezo ry’iyo misi." 
Hosea1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Hoseya mwene Beyeri, ku ngoma ya Uziya no ku ya Yotamu no ku ya Ahazi no ku ya Hezekiya, abami b’i Buyuda, hāri no ku ngoma ya Yerobowamu mwene Yehowasi, umwami w’Abisirayeli." 
Hosea1:2 Igihe Uhoraho yatangura kuvugisha Hoseya ubga mbere, aramubarira, ati Genda, wābīre umugore maraya afise abana b’abasambanano: kukw iki gihugu cagize ubumaka bukomeye bgo kureka Uhoraho." 
Hosea1:3 Nukw aragenda, yābīra Gomeri mwene Dibulayimu; asama inda, avyara umuhungu." 
Hosea1:4 Maz’ Uhoraho aramubarira, at’ Izina ryiwe n’umwite Yezireli; kuko hasigaye igihe gito ngahōra ab’ inzu ya Yehu amaraso yaviriye i Yezireli, kandi nzohenebereza ingoma y’inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Hosea1:5 Maze kur’ uwo musi nzovunagurira umuheto wa Isirayeli mu kiyaya c’i Yezireli. 
Hosea1:6 Nukw arongera asama inda, avyara umukobga. Uhoraho yongera kumubarira, at’ Izina ryiwe n’umwite Ntambabazi, kuko ntazosubira kugirira imbabazi inzu ya Isirayeli, ngo ndabaharire na gatoya." 
Hosea1:7 Ariko nzogirira ikigongwe inzu ya Yuda, mbakize jewe Uhoraho Imana yabo; kandi sinzobakirisha umuheto, cank’ inkota, cank’ intambara, cank’ amafarasi, cank’ abayagenderako." 
Hosea1:8 Nukw acukije Ntambabazi, arongera asama inda, avyara umuhungu." 
Hosea1:9 Uhoraho aravuga, at’ Izina ryiwe n’umwite Sabantubanje: kuko mutar’ abantu banje, nanje sinzoba Imana yanyu." 
Hosea1:10 Yamar’ amaherezo, igitigiri c’Abisirayeli kizongana nk’umusenyi wo ku kiyaga, udashobora kugerwa ku ngero canke guharūrika. Kand’ ahantu bābgiriwe, ngo Ntimur’ abantu banje, ni ho nyene bazobgirirwa, ngo Mur’ abana b’Imana nzima." 
Hosea1:11 Kand’ Abayuda n’Abisirayeli bazokoranira hamwe, bitoranirize segaba umwe, badūge bave mu gihugu; kuk’ uwo musi w’i Yezireli uzoba uhambaye." 
Hosea2:1 Mwite barumuna banyu, Bantubanje, na bashiki banyu, ba Inambabazi." 
Hosea2:2 Ni mwībūranire na nyoko, ni mwībūranire; kukw atar’ umugore wanje, nanje sind’ umugabo wiwe: n’akūre ubushegabo bgiwe mu maso hiwe, n’ubumaka bgiwe abukūre hagati y’amabere yiwe;" 
Hosea2:3 kugira ngo sinze ndamusige amēnya, akamera nk’umusi yavutseko, nkamuhindura nk’ubugaragwa, nkamusiga ngaho ameze nk’ ubgeranyange, nkamwicisha inyota." 
Hosea2:4 Mbere sinzogirira abana biwe imbabazi, kukw ar’ abana b’abasambanano," 
Hosea2:5 nyina akaba yarīhinduye maraya, uwabavyaye akaba yarakoze ibiteye isoni: kuko yavuze, ati Ndikurikirira abūzure banje, bampa ivyo ndya n’ivyo nnywa, bakampa ubgoya bg’intama n’ipampa, bo n’amavuta n’ibinyobga." 
Hosea2:6 Ni co gituma ngira nsākize amahwa inzira yiwe, ndamuzitirire uruzitiro rwo kumubuza, ngo yoye kubona ah’ aca." 
Hosea2:7 Azokwirukira abūzure biwe, ariko ntabahamvye, azobarondera, ariko ntababone. Ni ho azovuga, ati Hinge nsubire ku mugabo wanje wa mbere, kuk’ ubga mbere nari mmerewe neza kuruta ubu." 
Hosea2:8 Erega ntiyamenye kw ari jewe namuha za ngano na vino n’amavuta, nkamusenyurirakw ifeza n’izahabu, ivyo bākoreshereje Bayali." 
Hosea2:9 Ni co gituma nzosubira ku ngano zanje mu gihe zokweze, no kuri vino yanje mu gihe yoganiwe, kandi nzomushikura bga bgoya bganje bg’intama n’ipampa yanje, vyari kumumara ubgambure bgiwe." 
Hosea2:10 Noneho ngira ngaragarize ibiteye isoni vyiwe imbere y’abūzure biwe, kandi nta n’umwe azomurokora ngw amunkūre mu maboko." 
Hosea2:11 Nzomucakw ibitwengo, n’imisi mikuru yaziririza, bo n’ imboneko z’amezi n’amasabato n’ imisi mikuru yose yashinzwe." 
Hosea2:12 Kandi nzoririka imizabibu yiwe n’imisukoni yiwe, ivyo yahora avuga, at’ Izi n’impēra zanje nahawe n’abūzure banje. Nukw ivyo ngira ndabihindure ishamba, vyōnwe n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba." 
Hosea2:13 Nzomuhōra imisi yamaze yosereza za Bayali imibavu, yisakaye impeta n’utugenegene, agakurikira abūzure biwe, nanje jeho akanyibagira, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Hosea2:14 Nuko rero, ehe ngira ndamukwēgēre, mmushikane mu bugaragwa, ndamuremeshe." 
Hosea2:15 Nzohamukomōrera imizabibu yiwe, ndamuhe ca kiyaya c’i Akori ngo kimubere irembo ry’ivyizigiro: na we azoharirimbira, nko mu gihe c’ubuto bgiwe, nko mu gihe yadūga, avuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Hosea2:16 Kandi kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho agize, uzonyita umugabo wawe, ntuzoba ukinyita shobuja." 
Hosea2:17 Kuko nzokūra mu kanwa kiwe amazina ya za Bayali, kandi n’amazina yazo ntazokwongera kwibukwa ukundi." 
Hosea2:18 Maze kur’ uwo musi nzosezerana isezerano n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba, n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre, n’ivyikwega hasi, kubganyu: kandi nzoca umuheto n’inkota n’intambara bibavire mu gihugu, ntume baryama amahoro." 
Hosea2:19 Kandi nzokwikwerera ube uwanje ibihe bidashira; mbere nzokwikwerera mu bugororotsi no mu kuroranya no mu kugira neza no mu mbabazi. 
Hosea2:20 Ni koko nzokwikwerera mu kuba umwizigirwa: nawe uzommenya jewe Uhoraho. 
Hosea2:21 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzokwitaba ijuru, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, na ryo ryitabe isi," 
Hosea2:22 isi na yo yitabe ingano na vino n’amavuta, na vyo vyitabe Yezireli." 
Hosea2:23 Ni jewe nzomwibibira mu gihugu; kandi Ntambabazi nzomugirira imbabazi, mbarire Sabantubanje, nti Mur’ abantu banje; na bo bazovuga, bat’ Ur’ Imana yacu." 
Hosea3:1 Maz’ Uhoraho arambarira, ati Subira ugende, ukunde wa mugore akundwa n’umwūzure wiwe, kandi w’umusambanyikazi, nk’uk’ Uhoraho nkunda Abisirayeli, naho bo bāhindukiriye izindi mana, bagakunda uturobe tubumbabumbge mu nzabibu zumye." 
Hosea3:2 Nuko ndamutangakw intete z’ifeza cumi na zitanu, n’ingero yitwa homeru ya sayiri imwe n’igice." 
Hosea3:3 Maze ndamubarira, nt’ Uzomara imisi myinshi undorereye; ntuz’ uje mu busambanyi, ntuz’ uje ku wundi mugabo wese: nanje nzokumerera ntyo." 
Hosea3:4 Kukw Abisirayeli bazomara imisi myinshi ata mwami, ata n’ūganza, ata n’ikimazi batanga, ata n’inkingi y’ikigirwamana, ata n’umwambaro witwa efodi cank’ ibigirwamana vyitwa terafimu:" 
Hosea3:5 maz’ amaherezo Abisirayeli bazogaruka, barondere Uhoraho Imana yabo, na Dawidi umwami wabo; bazoba mu gatengo baje k’Uhoraho no ku migisha yiwe mu misi y’iherezo." 
Hosea4:1 Ni mwumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho, yemwe Bisirayeli: ereg’ Uhoraho afitaniye imibūrano na ben’ igihugu, kukw ata kuyoboka kuri mu gihugu, cank’ imbabazi, cank’ ukumenya Imana." 
Hosea4:2 Nta kindi kiriho, atar’ ukurahira n’ukubesha n’ukwica n’ukwiba n’ugusambana, no kumena amazu, n’ amaraso ahōrwa ayandi." 
Hosea4:3 Ni co gituma igihugu kirira, abakibamwo bagahondobera, bo n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba n’ibisīga vyo mu kirēre; mbere n’amafi yo mu kiyaga na yo agakamangana." 
Hosea4:4 Ariko nta muntu abirwanya, nta wubihana: kuk’ ubgoko bgawe ata co batandukanyeko n’abaherezi baho." 
Hosea4:5 Uzotsitara ku murango, umuvugishwa na we atsitarane nawe mw ijoro: kandi nzokwica nyoko." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu banje baranduwe no kutagira ubgenge: wewe ko wataye ubgenge, nuko nanje nzoguta, ntuzoba ukiba umuherezi wanje; ko wibagiye ivyagezwe vyanje, Imana yawe, nanje nzokwibagira abana bawe." 
Hosea4:7 Uko bākomeje kugwira, ni ko bārushirije kuncumurako; icubahiro cabo nzogihindura ibitētērwa." 
Hosea4:8 Ivyaha vy’abantu banje ni vyo vyo kurya vyabo; bashira imitima ku bigabitanyo vyabo. 
Hosea4:9 Nuko nk’uko bimeze ku banyagihugu, ni ko bizomera ku baherezi: nzobahana kubg’ ingeso zabo, mbasubirize mu nkōko ivy’ ibikorwa vyabo." 
Hosea4:10 Maze bazorya ntibahāge, basambane ntibagwire: kuko bampemukiye, jewe Uhoraho." 
Hosea4:11 Ubusambanyi na vino n’umubira wayo bimara ubgenge. 
Hosea4:12 Abantu banje bagisha inama igiti gusa, kand’ inkoni yabo ni yo ibaragurira; impwemu y’ubumaka yarabajimije, bagenda ata co barenga, bātaye Imana yabo." 
Hosea4:13 Bacumitira ibimazi ku mpinga z’imisozi, bakosereza imibavu ku turambi, musi y’ibiti vy’imyeloni n’ivy’ imilebeni n’ivy’ imyela, kuko bigira ibitūtu vyiza; ni co gituma abakobga banyu bīgira ba maraya, n’abakazana banyu bagasambana." 
Hosea4:14 Sinzohana abakobga banyu ni bīgira ba maraya, cank’ abakazana banyu ni basambana; kukw abagabo ubgabo bīhererana n’abasambanyikazi, bagatanga ibimazi bafatanije na ba maraya; nuk’ ubgoko butagira ubgenge buzoheneberezwa." 
Hosea4:15 Ewe Isirayeli, naho wīgize maraya, ntucumuze Yuda; kandi ntimukaje i Gilugali, canke ngo mudūge i Betaveni, canke ngo murahire uguhoraho kwanje Uhoraho." 
Hosea4:16 Isirayeli yabaye ikiganda nk’ inka y’ishashi y’ikiganda: non’ Uhoraho yobaragira nk’umwagazi w’intama ahantu h’amaramvya? 
Hosea4:17 Efurayimu yifatanije n’ibigirwamana: n’umureke! 
Hosea4:18 Ibinyobga vyabo vyacitse umururazi: basambana ubudahumeka; abatware babo bakunda ibiteye isoni birenze urugero. 
Hosea4:19 Igihuhuta cabatwaye mu mababa yaco; kandi bazomāramāzwa n’ibimazi vyabo. 
Hosea5:1 Ni mwumve ibi, yemwe baherezi, kandi mwumvirize namwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, mutege amatwi yemwe ab’ inzu y’umwami, kuk’ urubanza ari mwebge rutsinze; kuko mwabereye i Misipa umutego, mukabera i Tabora ururiba rutezwe." 
Hosea5:2 Abagarariji biyongeranije cane kwica: ariko nzobahana bose. 
Hosea5:3 Efurayimu ndamuzi, kandi Isirayeli na we ntanyihishije: erega wakoze ivy’ ubusambanyi, ewe Efurayimu, Isirayeli na we yarihumanije." 
Hosea5:4 Ibikorwa vyabo ntibizobakundira kugaruka ku Mana yabo: kukw impwemu y’ubumaka iri muri bo, kandi ntibazi Uhoraho." 
Hosea5:5 Ubgibone bga Isirayeli ni bgo bumwagiriza imbonankubone: ni co kizotuma Isirayeli na Efurayimu bazotemba mu bigabitanyo vyabo, kandi na Yuda bazotemba hamwe." 
Hosea5:6 Bazojana imikuku yabo n’amasho yabo baja kurondera Uhoraho, ariko ntibazomubona! Azoba yitandukanije na bo." 
Hosea5:7 Bāryarutse Uhoraho, kuko bāvyaye abana b’ibivyarwa; erega mu kwezi kumwe bazotikizanywa n’imirima yabo." 
Hosea5:8 Muvugirize inzamba i Gibeya, n’urumbete i Rama: muvugirize akarūru i Betaveni; ngah’ inyuma yawe, Benyamini!" 
Hosea5:9 Efurayimu azosigara ar’ imbura ku musi wo guhanwa: namenyesheje imiryango y’Abisirayeli ibitazobura kubaho. 
Hosea5:10 Abaganwa b’i Buyuda bahwanye n’abashingūra akarimbi k’urubibe: nzobasukak’ uburake bganje nk’amazi. 
Hosea5:11 Efurayimu arahahajwe, avungavunzwe n’iteka aciriweko, kuko yahurumbiye inyuma y’ibinyoma." 
Hosea5:12 Ni co gituma mmereye Efurayimu nk’ inyenzi ku mpuzu, n’inzu ya Yuda nk’ibungwe." 
Hosea5:13 Igihe Efurayimu yabonye indwara yiwe, na Yuda abonye uruguma rwiwe, ni ho Efurayimu yagiye muri Ashuri, agatuma ku mwami Yarebu; yamara ntazoshobora kubakiza, canke ngw avūre uruguma rwabo." 
Hosea5:14 Kuko nzomerera Efurayimu nk’intambge, n’inzu ya Yuda nk’ umugunza w’intambge: jewe, jewe nyene nzotabagura, nīgīre; nzogenda nsēngēse, kandi nta wuzonyaka." 
Hosea5:15 Nzogenda nisubirire i wanje, kugeza aho bazokwemerera igicumuro cabo, bakarondera mu nyonga hanje: babonye ivyago bazoca bandonderana umwete." 
Hosea6:1 Enda ni muze, dusubire k’Uhoraho, kukw ari we yadutabaguye kandi ni we azotuvūra; ni we yadukubise kandi ni we azodusomōra." 
Hosea6:2 Imisi ibiri ishize azoduhēmbūra: ku musi ugira gatatu azoduhagurutsa, tube bazima imbere yiwe." 
Hosea6:3 Enda tumenye Uhoraho, tugire umwete wo kumumenya; nk’uk’ umutwenzi ata cowubuza kuza, ni ko na we azoza: azotuzako nk’imvura, nk’ imvura y’umutasuro inyosheje hasi." 
Hosea6:4 Ewe Efurayimu, mbega nkugire nte? Nawe nyene Yuda, ndakugire nte? Kuk’ urukundo munkunda rumeze nk’igipfungu co mu gatondo‐tondo, kandi nk’ urume ruta mu kanya gato." 
Hosea6:5 Ni co gituma nzobatemagurisha abavugishwa nanje; nzobicisha amajambo yo mu kanwa kanje; kand’ imanza mbaciriye zizokwira hose nk’umuco. 
Hosea6:6 Ereg’ imbabazi ni zo ngomba, s’ibimazi, n’ukummenya jewe Imana, kuruta ibimazi vyoshejwe." 
Hosea6:7 Ariko bo, bishe isezerano nka Adamu: aho ni ho bāndyarukiye." 
Hosea6:8 Gileyadi n’igisagara c’inkozi z’ibibi, cayoberanijwe n’amaraso." 
Hosea6:9 Nk’ukw ibitero vy’abambuzi biryamira umuntu, ni k’umurongo w’abaherezi wicira abantu mu nzira ija i Shekemu: bakora ivy’ ubugesera." 
Hosea6:10 Mu nzu ya Isirayeli nahabonye ikintu c’ubuyobe: aho ni ho habonekeye ubusambanyi muri Efurayimu, ni ho Isirayeli yahumaniye." 
Hosea6:11 Kandi nawe, Yuda, urindirijwe igihe c’iyimbura, igihe nzogarukana abantu banje bajanywe ar’ inyagano." 
Hosea7:1 Igihe nagomba gukiza Abisirayeli, haciye haseruka ibigabitanyo vy’Abefurayimu, bo n’ivyaha vy’i Samariya; kuko bakora ivy’ ibinyoma: abasuma barāra baramena amazu, igitero c’abambuzi kikamburira hanze." 
Hosea7:2 Kandi mu mitima yabo ntibiyumvira yuko nibuka ivyaha vyabo vyose; noneh’ ibikorwa vyabo bibataye hagati, kandi biri mu nyonga zanje." 
Hosea7:3 Umwami bamuteresha umunezero ivyaha vyabo, n’abaganwa bawubateresha ubuhemu bgabo." 
Hosea7:4 Bose n’abasambanyi; bameze nk’iziko umucumvyi acanyemwo; areka gufurūra umuriro, iy’ amaze guhwanya ifu gushitsa ah’ iribututumbire." 
Hosea7:5 Abaganwa bārwaye kuborerwa vino ku musi mukuru w’umwami wabo, na we nyene yaya amaboko hamwe n’abacokoranyi." 
Hosea7:6 Kuko bahindura imitima yabo nk’iziko, iyo baryamiye abantu: uburake bgabo barabuvumbika bugakesha ijoro; bukeye bukagurumana nk’ umuriro." 
Hosea7:7 Bose bashushe nk’ iziko, batsontsomera abacamanza babo; abami babo bose barahindikiranye; nta n’umwe muri bo antakambira." 
Hosea7:8 Efurayimu yivanga n’ayandi mahanga; Efurayimu ameze nk’ umukate utagaraguwe, uzigiye uruhande rumwe." 
Hosea7:9 Abanyamahanga bamumaze inkomezi, ariko ntabizi; mbere yadombagije n’ imvi, ariko ntabizi." 
Hosea7:10 Ubgibone bg’Abisirayeli ni bgo bubāgiriza imbonankubone: yamara ntibararuha bangarukako, jewe Uhoraho Imana yabo, canke ngw ivyo vyose bitume bandondera." 
Hosea7:11 Efurayimu ni nk’inuma y’ikizēze, itagira ubgenge: batakambira Egiputa, bakaja no muri Ashuri." 
Hosea7:12 Bakigenda, nzobatega ururiba rwanje; nzobakororera hasi nk’ ibisīga vyo mu kirēre: nzobakubita, nk’uko mw ikoraniro ryabo bābibūriwe." 
Hosea7:13 Bazobona ibara, kuko bāgiye bāngāra bakamvako! Bazotikizwa, kuko bāncumuyeko! Naho nagomba kubacungura, ariko bo bāhavuye bandemera ibinyoma!" 
Hosea7:14 Ntibantakambiye bivuye ku mutima, ariko baborogera ku mariri yabo: ikibakoraniriza hamwe n’indya na vino, ariko jeho barangarariza;" 
Hosea7:15 naho namenyereje amaboko yabo nkayakomeza, ariko bangīra inama z’ibibi." 
Hosea7:16 Barahindukira, ariko si kuri jewe Ūsumba vyose; bameze nk’ umuheto utaye uruvuto. Abaganwa babo bazohindikiranywa n’inkota, bazize ukurandamuka kw’ururimi rwabo: ico ni co kizotuma baba agatwengo mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Hosea8:1 Shira inzamba ku munwa! Araje nk’inkukuma, gutera ingoro yanje, jewe Uhoraho! Kuko bishe isezerano ryanje, bagacumura ku vyagezwe vyanje." 
Hosea8:2 Bazontakambira, bati Mana yacu, twebge Abisirayeli turakuzi." 
Hosea8:3 Ereg’ Abisirayeli bataye ivyiza: umwansi azobakinagiza. 
Hosea8:4 Biyimikiye abami ntabibageze; bitoranirije abaganwa nanje ntabizi: bikoreye ibigirwamana mu mafeza yabo no mu mazahabu yabo, bihamagarira guherengetezwa." 
Hosea8:5 Nzinutswe imasa yawe y’ikigirwamana, ewe Samariya! Uburake bganje burabaziriringiye: bazogeza ryari kwanka kwihumanura?" 
Hosea8:6 Kukw ico kigirwamana candurutse ku Bisirayeli, umukozi ni we yagikoze: ereg’ ico s’Imana nya mana: mber’ iyo masa y’i Samariya izovunagurwa." 
Hosea8:7 Ko bābivye umuyaga bazokwimbura agashururu: nta n’agahundo bazoronka; ikizomera ntikizohunda impeke; n’icohunda, coyongobezwa n’abanyamahanga." 
Hosea8:8 Abisirayeli barayongobejwe: ubu bari mu mahanga bameze nk’urwavya rudahimbaye. 
Hosea8:9 Kuko bādūze, bakaja muri Ashuri, nk’ indogoba y’inyeshamba yīgunze ukwayo: Efurayimu yironkeshereje abūzure impēra." 
Hosea8:10 Mbere naho batanga impēra mu mahanga, sinzobura kubakoranya; kandi bazotangura gukeha kubg’ umutwaro umwami ari hejuru y’abaganwa azogenda abaremēka." 
Hosea8:11 Efurayimu ko yakwiragije ibicaniro vyo gukora ivyaha, ivyo bicaniro bizomubera ivyaha nyene." 
Hosea8:12 Naho nomwandikira ivyagezwe vyanje nkabigira isinzi, yovyita nk’ikintu c’icaduka." 
Hosea8:13 Ku vy’ ibimazi banshikanira, batanga inyama z’ibimazi, bakazīrīra; ariko jewe Uhoraho simbākīrira: mbere nzokwibuka ibigabitanyo vyabo, mbahanire ivyaha vyabo; bazosubira muri Egiputa." 
Hosea8:14 Kuko Isirayeli yibagiye Umuremyi wiwe, kandi yiyubakiye utunyabugoro; kandi na Yuda yakwiragije ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro; ariko nzorekurira umuriro ku bisagara vyiwe, utōngōre n’ibihome vyavyo." 
Hosea9:1 Sigaho kunezerwa, ewe Isirayeli, nk’ukw abanyamahanga bīnezererewe; kuko wīgize maraya, ukava ku Mana yawe, wakunze impēra z’ubumaraya ku mbuga zose zanikira impeke." 
Hosea9:2 Ivyuzuye ku mbuga no mu māto ntibizobatunga, kandi vino y’umubira izobashirako." 
Hosea9:3 Ntibazoguma mu gihugu c’Uhoraho; ariko Efurayimu azosubira muri Egiputa, bazorīra ivyo kurya bihumanye muri Ashuri." 
Hosea9:4 Ntibazosukira Uhoraho ibiturire vya vino, kand’ ibimazi vyabo ntibizomuhimbara: ivyo kurya vyabo bizobabera nk’ibiryazagu vy’abagandaye; abazobiryako bose bazoba bahumanye; kukw ivyo kurya vyabo bizoba ivyo kubīmarira ipfa gusa, ntibizokwinjira mu ngoro y’Uhoraho." 
Hosea9:5 Mbega muzogira mute, ku musi mukuru washinzwe, no ku musi w’ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho?" 
Hosea9:6 Ehe rāba bahunze kugesezwa, yamara Egiputa hazobarundarunda, bazohambga i Mofu; ibintu vyabo vy’amafeza vyabahimbara bizorengwako n’ibisuru; n’amahwa azomera mu ngo zabo." 
Hosea9:7 Imisi yo kuzirwa kwabo irashitse, imisi yo gusubirizwa mu nkōko irashitse; Abisirayeli bazobimenya; ūvugishwa n’Imana yabaye igipfu, ūvugishwa na Mpwemu yāsaze, basarishijwe n’isinzi ry’ibigabitanyo vyawe, n’uk’ ubgansi ari bginshi." 
Hosea9:8 Efurayimu n’umushibamyi yīmīra Imana yanje: arik’ ūvugishwa n’Imana we, umutego w’abatezi b’inyoni uri mu nzira ziwe zose, n’urwanko rumutanga mu ngoro y’Imana yiwe." 
Hosea9:9 Bīhumanije birengereje: izokwibuka ibigabitanyo vyabo, izobahanira ivyaha vyabo, nk’uko vyabaye mu gihe c’i Gibeya." 
Hosea9:10 Igihe nabona Abisirayeli, bari bameze nk’inzabibu ziri mu bugaragwa; ba sogokuruza nababonye bameze nk’insukoni z’isega zo ku musukoni ugitangura kwama: ariko bāgiye kuri Bayali y’i Peyori, bīyegurira ako gatētereza, bahinduka umuziro nk’ico nyene bakunze." 
Hosea9:11 Abefurayimu na bo nyene, ubgiza bgabo buzoguruka nk’inyoni: nta wuzovyara, nta wuzogira inda, canke ngw ayisame." 
Hosea9:12 Naho borera abana babo, nzobabahēkūra, ntihaze hagire umuntu asigara: mbere bazobona ibara igihe nzoba mbataye!" 
Hosea9:13 Abana ba Efurayimu, nk’uko nababonye, bagerewe kuba iminyago: mbere Efurayimu, ubgiwe azosokorora abana biwe abahe umwicanyi." 
Hosea9:14 Uhoraho, n’ubahe — mbe wobaha iki? N’ubahe gukorokesha inda, n’amabere agadutse!" 
Hosea9:15 Ibigabitanyo vyabo vyose vyagaragariye i Gilugali; ni ho nabazinukiwe; kubg’ ibigabitanyo vy’ivyo bakoze nzobirukana mu nzu yanje; sinzoba nkibakunda ukundi: abaganwa babo bose n’ abagarariji. 
Hosea9:16 Abefurayimu baciwe musi, imizi yabo irūmye, nta co bazokwama; mbere naho bovyara, nzotikiza uruvyaro bakunda rwo mu nda zabo." 
Hosea9:17 Imana yanje izobata kure, kuko batayumviye; kandi bazoba inyererezi mu mahanga." 
Hosea10:1 Abisirayeli bār’ umuzabibu utotahaye, wama inzabibu zawo; ukw ivyo bamye vyabaye vyinshi, ni ko bagiye bagwiza ibicaniro vyabo vy’ibigirwamana; kand’ ukw igihugu cabo cagiye imbere, ni ko bagiye bashariza inkingi z’ibigirwamana." 
Hosea10:2 Bagira imitima ibiri: noneho babonetsek’ urubanza rubatsinze. Imana izosangangura vya bicaniro vyabo, isitagure za nkingi zabo." 
Hosea10:3 N’ukuri bazohava bavuga, bati Nta mwami tugira: kuko tutubashe Uhoraho; kare ho umwami yotumariye iki?" 
Hosea10:4 Bavuga amagambo atagira ikimazi, bakarahira ibinyoma mu gusezerana amasezerano; ni co gituma amateka azobaduka nk’uk’ ururamba rubaduka mu busīze bgo mu ndimiro." 
Hosea10:5 Ababa i Samariya bazocika ivutu kubg’ inyana z’ibigirwamana z’i Betaveni, kukw abantu baho bazoziborogera, bo n’abaherezi bazo bāhora bazinezererwa, baborogere ubgiza bgazo, kuko bgashize." 
Hosea10:6 Zizojanwa muri Ashuri kw ingorore z’umwami Yarebu: Abefurayimu bazotētērwa, Abisirayeli bamāramāzwe n’imigabo yabo." 
Hosea10:7 Ivy’ i Samariya, umwami waho akamirikiye nk’ifuro ryo ku mazi." 
Hosea10:8 Ibitabo vyatabge muri Aveni, ari vyo gicumuro c’Abisirayeli, na vyo bizosangangurwa; amahwa n’ibitovu bizomera ku bicaniro vyabo; maze bazobarira imisozi, bati Ni mudupfuke; n’imirambi, bati Ni mutugweko." 
Hosea10:9 Yemwe Bisirayeli, mwacumuye uhereye igihe c’i Gibeya: aho ni ho bahagaze bashikamye, kugira ngw intambara iteye abagabitanya ntibashikeko i Gibeya." 
Hosea10:10 Nzobahana uko ngomba: kand’ amahanga azokoranira kubarwanya, igihe bazoba baboshwe kubg’ ibicumuro vyabo vyompi." 
Hosea10:11 Efurayimu ni nk’inka y’ishashi yigishijwe, ikunda gusekura ingano; ariko nzomwambika ingōgo mw izosi ryiwe ryiza: kandi nzoshira kuri Efurayimu ūmwicarako; Yuda azorima, Yakobo akubite imvyirire." 
Hosea10:12 Mubibe mugendereye ukugororoka, mubone kwimbura nk’ukw imbabazi ziri; mumene imishike yanyu; kukw igihe kigeze co kurondera Uhoraho, gushitsa ah’ azozira, akabarekurira imvura y’ubugororotsi." 
Hosea10:13 Mwarimye ivyaha, mwimbura ibigabitanyo; mwariye ivyamye ku binyoma: kuko mwishimiye imigabo yanyu, n’isinzi ry’abahizi banyu." 
Hosea10:14 Ni co gituma hazoba imivurungano mu bgoko bganyu, kand’ ibihome vyanyu vyose bizosangangurwa, nk’uko Shalumani yasanganguye Beti‐Arubeli ku musi w’intambara, ah’ umuvyeyi yavunaguranwa n’abana biwe." 
Hosea10:15 Ivyo ni vyo Beteli hazobahamagarira kubg’ ibigabitanyo vyanyu bikomeye: mu mutwenzi umwami w’Abisirayeli azoba amaze gufyerengetezwa rwose. 
Hosea11:1 Isirayeli uhereye akir’ umwana naramukunda, maze mpamagara uwo mwana wanje ngw ave muri Egiputa." 
Hosea11:2 Arik’ ukw abo navugisha bāshishikara kubahamagara, ni ko bārushiriza kubaja kure, bagatanga ibimazi kuri Bayali, bakosereza imibavu ibishushanyo bibājwe." 
Hosea11:3 Ariko ni jewe nigishije Abefurayimu gutambuka; nabashize mu kwāha; ariko ntibamenye kw ari jewe nabakijije. 
Hosea11:4 Nabakwegesheje imigozi y’umuntu, imigozi y’ibitsibo vy’urukundo; kandi nabamereye nk’ababakūra ingōgo mu mibangabanga yabo, nterekeranya ivyo kurya imbere yabo." 
Hosea11:5 Ntibazosubira mu gihugu ca Egiputa, yamar’ Umwashuri ni we azoba umwami wabo, kuko banse kungarukako." 
Hosea11:6 Inkota izogwa ku bisagara vyabo, izohimbagura imyugariro yabo, iyiherengeteze, bazize imigabo yabo." 
Hosea11:7 Abantu banje bamogoreye gusubira inyuma ngo bamveko; naho bobahamagarira kwerekeza amaso kw Īsumba vyose, ariko nta n’umwe yokwemera kuyishira hejuru." 
Hosea11:8 Noshobora nte kuguheba ga Efurayimu? Noshobora nte kugutanga ga Isirayeli? Noshobora nte kukugirira nk’i Adima? Noshobora nte kuguhindura nk’i Seboyimu? Umutima wanje ubuze uburagamo muri jewe, n’imbabazi zanje zose zirakongerejwe." 
Hosea11:9 Sinzogenza nk’uk’ uburake bganje bg’inkazi buri, sinzohindukiranwa no kugeseza Efurayimu: kuko jewe nd’Imana, ntar’ umuntu; nd’ Uwera ari hagati muri wewe: sinzoza ndi n’uburake." 
Hosea11:10 Bazogenda bankurikira jewe Uhoraho, nivuga nk’intambge: mbere nzokwivuga, maz’ abana bazoza bahinda agashitsi, bavuye i burengerazuba." 
Hosea11:11 Bazoza bavuye muri Egiputa bahinda agashitsi nk’inyoni, no muri Ashuri bameze nk’inuma, kandi nzobabesha mu mazu yabo, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Hosea11:12 Efurayimu ankikije ibinyoma, n’ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli bankikije ubugunge; ariko Yuda we aracatwarira Imana, aracar’ umwizigirwa k’Uwera." 
Hosea12:1 Efurayimu atunzwe n’umuyaga, kand’ akurikira umuyaga uva i burasirazuba: ntahengeshanya kugwiza ibinyoma n’ubugunge. Basezerana isezerano n’abo muri Ashuri, maz’ amavuta agahonera muri Egiputa." 
Hosea12:2 Uhoraho afise imibūrano no kuri Yuda, kand’ azohana Yakobo ibihwanye n’ingeso ziwe; azomusubiriza mu nkōko ibihwanye n’ivyo yakoze." 
Hosea12:3 Yafashe igitsintsiri ca mukuru we bakiva mu nda ya nyina; kand’ amaze gukura yahotoranye n’Imana: 
Hosea12:4 mbere yahotoranye n’umumarayika, aramunesha; ararira, aramwinginga; i Beteli ni ho yayīboneye, kand’ aho ni ho yavuganiye na we," 
Hosea12:5 Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo, Uhoraho ni ryo zina ryiwe." 
Hosea12:6 Nuko rero, hindukirira Imana yawe: gumya imbabazi n’ibiroranye, kandi wame urorēra Imana yawe udahengeshanya." 
Hosea12:7 Efurayimu n’Umunyakanani, umunzane w’ibinyoma uri mu kuboko kwiwe: akunda guhendana." 
Hosea12:8 Efurayimu aravuga, ati N’ukuri nd’umukire, nironkeye ubutunzi: mu bucurumbe bganje bgose ntibazombonakw ikibi na kimwe cokwitwa icaha." 
Hosea12:9 Ariko ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe, uhereye igihe waviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa; nzokwongera gutuma usubira kuba mu mahema, nk’uko vyari bimeze mu misi mikuru yashinzwe." 
Hosea12:10 Navuganye n’abo navugisha, nagwije ivyo nerekanye; naciye imigani, ncishije mu bo navugisha." 
Hosea12:11 Mbeg’ i Gileyadi ntihar’ ibigabitanyo? Eka rwose n’abatagira ikimazi! I Gilugali bacumita amapfizi kw ibimazi: mber’ ibicaniro vyabo bimeze nk’ibihongo vyo mu busīze bgo mu ndimiro. 
Hosea12:12 Yakobo yahungiye i Padan‐Aramu, Isirayeli aca ingero umugeni, mber’ araragira kugira ngw aronke umugeni." 
Hosea12:13 Uhoraho yadūganye Abisirayeli abakūra muri Egiputa, abakūjey’ uwavugishwa na we, kand’ uwavugishwa na we ni we yabazigama." 
Hosea12:14 Efurayimu yarakije Uhoraho bikomeye, ni co gituma amaraso yiwe ari we azokora, kand’ Umwami wiwe azomusubiriza mu nkōko umuvumo yavumanye." 
Hosea13:1 Efurayimu iy’ avuze hose, hāba guhinda agashitsi; yigize agahambaye mu Bisirayeli; arikw igihe yacumuye kubga Bayali, yaciye apfa." 
Hosea13:2 Noneho bagenda barushiriza gukora ivyaha, kandi bikoreye ibishushanyo mu mafeza yabo babivugutiye mu nkero, ni vyo bigirwamana bīgeneye mu bgenge bgabo, vyose ar’ ibikorwa vy’abahanga; bavuga ivyavyo, bati Ni babicumitire ibimazi! Abagabo bagasoma ayo mamasa y’ibigirwamana." 
Hosea13:3 Ni co gituma bazoba nk’igipfungu co mu gatondo‐tondo, kandi nk’urume ruta mu kanya gato, babe nk’ umuguruka utwawe n’agashururu, kandi nk’umwotsi ufumba uva mu ziko." 
Hosea13:4 Yamara ni jewe Uhoraho Imana yawe uhereye igihe waviriye mu gihugu ca Egiputa; nta yindi mana n’imwe mwari muzi atari jewe, kandi nta wundi Mukiza atari jewe." 
Hosea13:5 Nakumenye igihe wari mu bugaragwa, mu gihugu c’ikigatwa cinshi." 
Hosea13:6 Ukw imyimiro yabo yar’ iri, ni ko bāhāga; bārahāga, maz’ imitima yabo ikīshira hejuru, bituma bānyibagira." 
Hosea13:7 Ni co catumye mbamerera nk’intambge, kandi nkabategera ku nzira nk’ingwe." 
Hosea13:8 Nzobasimbirako mmeze nk’igikōko citwa idubu gisahuwe ivyana vyaco, nzotabagura urubambanda rwōrōshe imitima yabo: aho ni ho nzobatsontsomerera nk’intambge; ibikōko vy’inkazi bizobaromagira." 
Hosea13:9 Erega n’ukwihamagarira guhona, ewe Isirayeli, k’unyikunkumuye, wikunkumuye umutabazi wawe!" 
Hosea13:10 Mbeg’ umwami wawe ari hehe, ngw agukize mu bisagara vyawe vyose? N’abashingantahe bawe bari hehe, abo wasavye ngo baguhe umwami n’abaganwa?" 
Hosea13:11 Naguhaye umwami mfise umwikomo, maze ndamukunyaga ndatse." 
Hosea13:12 Ibigabitanyo vya Efurayimu bitekagiwe hamwe; icaha ciwe kirabītswe. 
Hosea13:13 Azofatwa n’ibise nk’ivy’ umugore aramutswe: n’umwana w’imburabgenge; kukw igihe co kuvuka kigeze, ntava mu menshi ngw avuke." 
Hosea13:14 Nzobacungura mbakūre mu bubasha bg’i kuzimu; nzobagōmbōra mbakūre mu rupfu: wa rupfu we, ikīza watera kiri hehe? Wa kuzimu we, kwa guhonnya kwawe kuri hehe? Arik’ ukwihana kwabo guhishijwe inyonga zanje." 
Hosea13:15 Naho yorondoka muri bene se, umuyaga uturutse i burasirazuba uzoza, ni wo muyaga w’Uhoraho udūga uvuye mu bugaragwa; isōko yiwe izokamuka, iriba ryiwe rigaduke: azonyagwa itunga ry’ibintu vyiwe vyose vy’imbombovu bihimbaye." 
Hosea13:16 Samariya hazogibgako n’ibigabitanyo vyaho, kuko bāgararije Imana yabo: bazoririkwa n’inkota: abana babo b’inzoya bazomenagurirwa hasi, kand’ abagore babo bakuriwe bazofomozwa." 
Hosea14:1 Ewe Isirayeli we, garuka k’Uhoraho Imana yawe; kuko wagwishijwe n’ibigabitanyo vyawe." 
Hosea14:2 Mujane amajambo yo kwisaba mugaruke k’Uhoraho; mumwinginge, muti N’uduharire ibigabitanyo vyose, uduhangaze: muti Mu gishingo c’amapfizi tuzogushikanira ibimazi vy’iminwa yacu." 
Hosea14:3 Mut’ Abashuri si bo bazodukiza; muti Ntituzosimbira ku mafarasi; muti Kandi nta ho tuzokwongera kubarira ivyakozwe n’intoke zacu, ngo Mur’ imana zacu; muti Kuko kuri wewe ari ho impfuvyi zigirirwa imbabazi." 
Hosea14:4 Nzoharira ugusubira inyuma kwabo, nzobakunda urukundo rutagira akagero: kuk’ uburake bganje busubiye inyuma bubavuyeko." 
Hosea14:5 Isirayeli nzomubera nk’ ikime, na we azoshurika nk’ikirungu, ashōre imizi nk’ibiti vy’i Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:6 Amashami yiwe azogasara, ubgiza bgiwe buse n’igiti c’umwelayo, n’ugutāmirana kwiwe kumere nk’ibiti vy’i Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Ababa mu gitūtu ciwe bazogaruka; bazobaduka nk’ingano, bashurike nk’umuzabibu: ugutāmirana kwabo kuzomera nka vino y’i Lebanoni." 
Hosea14:8 Efurayimu azovuga, ati Turacahūriye hehe n’ibigirwamana? Naramwishuye, kandi nzomushirak’ umutima. Mmeze nk’igiti c’akajwari gitotahaye: imbuto zawe ni jewe zandurukako." 
Hosea14:9 Ni nde azi ubgenge? N’atahure ivyo! Ni nde w’umuhanga? N’abimenye! Kukw inzira z’ Uhoraho ar’ iziroranye, kand’ abagororotsi ni bo bazozigendamwo; arikw abacumura bazozigwamwo." 
Joel1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yoweli mwene Petuweli. 
Joel1:2 Ati Ni mwumve ibi, yemwe batāma, kandi mutege amatwi, namwe ababa mu gihugu mwese! Mbega har’ ibimeze nk’ibi vyigeze kubaho mu bihe vyanyu, canke mu bihe vya ba sogokuruza?" 
Joel1:3 Mubidondere abana banyu, na bo baze babidondere abana babo, abana babo na bo baze babidondere abuzukuruza." 
Joel1:4 Imiranga y’inzige zikegeta yariwe n’izāraraye; imiranga y’izāraraye yariwe n’izitaragurika; imiranga y’izitaragurika yariwe n’iziyigiza. 
Joel1:5 Ni mwikangure, yemwe mborerwa, murire; namwe abakāmīra vino, muboroge, muririre vino ziryoshe, kuko zikūwe mu kanwa kanyu." 
Joel1:6 Kukw ihanga rikomeye kandi ry’isinzi riteye igihugu canje; amenyo yabo ni nk’imikāka y’intambge, kandi bafise amajigo nk’ay’ intambge y’ingore." 
Joel1:7 Bononye umuzabibu wanje, kand’ umusukoni wanje barawuvunnye, barawushishuye rwose, bawutsinda hasi; amashami yawo asigaye ar’ igihororo c’imitonore." 
Joel1:8 Boroga nk’inkumi ikenyeye amagunira iririra uwar’ ayikoye. 
Joel1:9 Amafu y’amashikanwa n’ibiturire vyabuze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho; abaherezi, ari bo basuku b’Uhoraho, basigaye baganya." 
Joel1:10 Imirima irononekaye, n’igihugu kiraganya; kukw amasaka yononekaye, na vino z’umubira zikamye akagīrīre, kand’ amavuta ya elayo na yo aherengeteye." 
Joel1:11 Ni mujorerwe, yemwe barimyi, namwe abarimyi b’uruzabibu, ni muboroge, muririre ingano na sayiri; kukw ivyimburwa vyo mu ndimiro bibuze." 
Joel1:12 Umuzabibu urakabiranye, umusukoni urahondobereye; umukomamanga bo n’ikigazi n’umucungwa, mbere n’ibiti vyose vyo mu ndimiro birakabiranye: kuk’ umunezero uherengeteye mu bantu." 
Joel1:13 Yemwe baherezi, mukenyere amagunira, murire; namwe abasukūra ku gicaniro, ni muboroge; enda ni muze mukēshe ijoro mwubaraye, mwambaye amagunira, yemwe basuku b’Imana yanje: kukw ishikanwa ry’ifu n’ibiturire vyimanywe ngo ntibize mu ngoro y’Imana yanyu." 
Joel1:14 Mushinge igihe co kwisonzesha, mutāngāze hose habe ikoraniro ry’agahebuza; mwa bashingantahe, ni mukoranye ababa mu gihugu bose, baze mu ngoro y’Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mutakambire Uhoraho." 
Joel1:15 Ewe wa musi mubi! Kuk’ umusi w’Uhoraho uri hafi; uzoza ar’ umusi wo guhonnya uvuye kw Īshobora vyose. 
Joel1:16 Mbeg’ ivyo kurya ntivyavumbuwe twirorērera? Mbere n’umunezero n’ibihimbaro ntivyakūwe mu ngoro y’Imana yacu? 
Joel1:17 Imbuto zumiye mu masīze; ibigega birasivye, n’ivya nyamugari birasambuwe; kukw amasaka arumbiranye." 
Joel1:18 Ewe kuntu amatungo yābagirana! Amasho y’inka aragangaraye, kukw ahebuye ubgatsi; mbere n’imikuku y’intama iragowe." 
Joel1:19 Ewe Uhoraho, ni wewe ntakambiye: kuk’ umuriro waturiye ubgatsi bgo mu bgeranyange, kand’ ibirimi vyawo vyaturiye ibiti vyose vyo ku misozi." 
Joel1:20 Mbere n’ibikōko vyo mw ishamba bihuzagirika ari wewe bitumbereye: kukw imigezi yakamye, kand’ umuriro waturiye ubgatsi bgo mu bgeranyange." 
Joel2:1 Ni muvugirize inzamba i Siyoni, muvugirize induru ku musozi wanje wera; ababa mu gihugu bose bahinde agashitsi: kuko wa musi w’Uhoraho uje, ushitse hafi;" 
Joel2:2 n’umusi w’umwiza n’umuzimagiza, n’umusi w’ibicu n’ibipfungu; nk’uk’ umutwenzi utambikira ku misozi, ni kw ihanga rihambaye kandi rikomeye ritumbutse. Ntihigeze kuboneka irimeze nka ryo, kandi no hanyuma nta rizobaho nk’iryo, uhereye none, ukageza kw iherezo ry’ibihe." 
Joel2:3 Umuriro ugenda urayigiza imbere yabo, kand’ inyuma yabo hasigara harāka ibirimi vyawo: imbere yabo igihugu kimeze nka rya tongo ryo muri Edeni, na ho inyuma yabo hasigara ar’ ubugaragwa bg’ibitongozi; eka nta wuzobakira." 
Joel2:4 Ishusho yabo isa n’iy’ amafarasi; kandi biruka nk’ abagendera ku mafarasi. 
Joel2:5 Kwiginagura kwabo, wumva umengo n’uguhinda kw’imikogote y’intambara ikwegwa n’amafarasi ku mpinga z’imisozi, kand’ umengo n’uguhinda kw’imbeya z’umuriro zitōngōra ibirararara; bameze nk’ ingabo z’inkomezi zitonze urugamba mu ntambara." 
Joel2:6 Kuza kwabo guca amahanga ivutu, yose arajonjogora mu maso." 
Joel2:7 Bīrasa nk’abahizi; būrira inzitiro z’amabuye nk’abagabo b’abarwanyi; umuntu wese aramiriza imbere yiwe, nta wizanguza." 
Joel2:8 Nta wuca ku wundi, umuntu wese aramiriza ah’atumbereye; bīroha mu macumu, nta kibahagarika." 
Joel2:9 Batera igisagara, bakarengera inzitiro z’ amabuye biruka, bakūrira amazu bakayītera imbere, bagaca mu madirisha nk’ibisuma." 
Joel2:10 Imbere yabo isi iratigita, n’ijuru rigahinda agashitsi; izuba rigacura umwiza bo n’ukwezi, kandi n’inyenyeri zigaca zireka kwaka." 
Joel2:11 Maz’ Uhoraho akarangurura ijwi imbere y’ igitero ciwe, kukw ingabo ziwe zihambaye cane; ereg’ uwo yama ashitsa ijambo ryiwe n’uw’ ubushobozi! Kuk’ umusi w’Uhoraho ar’ ūhambaye kand’ uteye ubgoba cane: ni nde yoshobora kuwihanganira?" 
Joel2:12 Enda naho bigeze iyo, ni k’ Uhoraho agize, ni mungarukeko n’imitima yanyu yose, mwisonzesha, murira, muboroga;" 
Joel2:13 imitima yanyu abe ari yo mutabura, ariko s’impuzu zanyu, kandi mugaruke k’Uhoraho Imana yanyu: kukw ar’ inyabuntu, yuzuye imbabazi, iteba kuraka, igira ikigongwe cinshi, kandi yigarura ngo ntizane ikibi." 
Joel2:14 Nta wubizi: kumbure yohindukira, ikīgarura, ikabasigarana umuhezagiro, ni wo mafu y’amashikanwa n’ibiturire vyo gushikanira Uhoraho Imana yanyu." 
Joel2:15 Ni muvugirize inzamba i Siyoni, mushinge igihe co kwisonzesha, mutāngāze hose, habe ikoraniro ry’agahebuza," 
Joel2:16 mukoranye abantu, mweze ikoraniro, mwegeranye abatāma, mukoranye abana n’abakiri kw ibere; umukwe n’asohoke mu nzu yiwe, n’umugeni n’ave mu nkinga." 
Joel2:17 Abaherezi, ari bo basuku b’ Uhoraho, ni baririre hagati y’ikirimba c’inyubakwa n’igicaniro, bavuge, bati Hangaza abantu bawe, ewe Uhoraho, ntutange ishamvu yawe ngw ibe agatukisha, cank’ amahanga ngw ayiganze; n’iki kibavugisha mu mahanga, ngw Imana yabo iri hehe?" 
Joel2:18 Maz’ Uhoraho agirira ishaka igihugu ciwe, agirira ikigongwe abantu biwe." 
Joel2:19 Uhoraho yishura abantu biwe, at’ Ehe ngira mbarungikire amasaka na vino n’amavuta ya elayo, maze muzota akabi: kandi sinzosubira kubahindura agatukisha mu mahanga." 
Joel2:20 Ariko ba bansi b’i burārūko nzobabashira kure, ndabahindire mu gihugu c’ikigatwa c’akāhebge, ab’ imbere mbasuke mu kiyaga c’i burasirazuba, ab’ inyuma mu c’i burengerazuba; kand’ umunuko wabo uzoduhuka, bo n’agacūku k’ibore ryabo na ko n’uko, kuko bākoze ibihambaye." 
Joel2:21 Ewe gihugu, nta co utinya, nezerwa, uhimbarwe, kuk’ Uhoraho yakoze ibihambaye." 
Joel2:22 Namwe bikōko vyo mw ishamba, nta co mutinya; kuk’ ubgatsi bgo mu bgeranyange bgongeye kumera, n’ibiti bisubiye kwama, n’imisukoni bo n’imizabibu bitengengeye." 
Joel2:23 Noneho ni munezerwe, yemwe bantu b’i Siyoni, munezererwe Uhoraho Imana yanyu: kukw ibahaye imvura y’agatāsi ku rugero rukwiye, kukw ibarekuriye imvura, ikabaha iy’ agatāsi n’iy’ urushana nk’ubga mbere." 
Joel2:24 Imbuga zizokwuzurakw ingano, n’amāto azobōgabōga vino n’amavuta ya elayo." 
Joel2:25 Kandi nzobashumbusha iyo myaka mwamaze inzige zisanganguye ivyanyu, zimwe zāraraye n’izitaragurika n’iziyigiza n’izikegeta, ni zo za ngabo zanje nabagomoreye ngo zibatere." 
Joel2:26 Kandi muzorya, mute akabi, muhimbaze izina ryanje, jewe Uhoraho Imana yanyu, nabakoreye ibitangaza: kand’ abantu banje ntibazokwongera kumāramāra." 
Joel2:27 Nuko muzomenya yuko ndi hagati mu Bisirayeli, kandi ko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, ata yindi iriho; n’ukuri abantu banje ntibazokwongera kumāramāra." 
Joel2:28 Hanyuma y’ivyo nzosuka Mpwemu wanje ku bari n’umubiri bose; abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu bazovugishwa nanje, n’abatāma banyu bazorota inzozi, n’imisore yanyu izobona ivyo yeretswe." 
Joel2:29 Kandi n’abagurano banje b’abahungu n’abakobga mur’ iyo misi nzobasukako Mpwemu wanje. 
Joel2:30 Nzoshira utwumiza mw ijuru no mw isi: amaraso n’umuriro no gupfūndūka kw’umwotsi. 
Joel2:31 Izuba rizocura umwiza, n’ukwezi guhinduke amaraso, hataraza uwo musi mukuru uteye ubgoba w’Uhoraho." 
Joel2:32 Kand’ umuntu wese azokwambaza izina ry’Uhoraho azokizwa: kuko ku musozi Siyoni n’i Yerusalemu hazoba agakiza, nk’uk’ Uhoraho yavuze, kandi mu masigarira hazobamw’ abo Uhoraho azoba ahamagaye." 
Joel3:1 Ehe rāba, mur’ iyo misi no mur’ ivyo bihe, aho nzosubira kugarukanira ab’i Buyuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu mbakūye mu ngoyi," 
Joel3:2 nzokoraniriza hamwe amahanga yose, mbamanukane mu kiyaya ca Yehoshafati; ni ho nzobavuganiriza, mbūrana abantu banje, ni bo shamvu yanje Abisirayeli, abo bāsābagirije mu mahanga, bakīgaburira igihugu canje." 
Joel3:3 Kandi bāgabanganishije abantu banje ubupfindo, umuhungu bakamutanga kw impēra ya maraya, n’ umukobga bakamugura vino ngo bīnywere." 
Joel3:4 Mbega twapfuye iki, ga yemwe ab’i Tiro n’i Sidoni, namwe ababa mu ntāra zose z’i Bufilisitiya? None har’ ico munyīhōra? Erega namba mugomba kunyīhōra, ukwo kwīhōra kwanyu nzonyarutsa vuba kukubasubiza ku mitwe." 
Joel3:5 Ko mwāsahuye amafeza yanje n’amazahabu yanje, ibintu vyanje vyiza vy’igikundiro mukabijana mu nsengero zanyu z’ibigirwamana;" 
Joel3:6 kand’ abantu b’i Buyuda n’ab’i Yerusalemu ko mwābaguze n’Abagiriki, kugira ngo mubakūreho, baje kure y’igihugu cabo:" 
Joel3:7 ehe nanje nzobavyutsa, mbakūre ahantu iyo mwābaguriye, kandi kwa kunyīhōra kwanyu nzokubasubiza ku mitwe." 
Joel3:8 Namwe abahungu banyu n’abakobga banyu nzobagura n’ab’i Buyuda, na bo bazobagura n’abantu b’i Sheba, ihanga rya kure: kukw ari jewe Uhoraho mbivuze." 
Joel3:9 Enda ni mwāmāmaze ibi mu mahanga, muti Ni mugabishe, mugomore abahizi, ingabo zose ni zīgire hafi, zidūge." 
Joel3:10 Amasuka yanyu muyavunjavunje, muyacuremw’ inkota, n’inkero zanyu muzivunjavunje, muzicuremw’ amacumu: kand’ umunyantege nke ni yivuge kw ar’ umuhizi." 
Joel3:11 Ni munyaruke muze, yemwe mahanga mwese yo hirya no hino, mukoranire hamwe: nawe Uhoraho, n’ugomore abahizi bawe bamanuke!" 
Joel3:12 Amahanga ni yikangure, adūge, aje mu kiyaya ca Yehoshafati: kukw ari ho nzovyagira, ngacira amatēka amahanga yose yo hirya no hino." 
Joel3:13 Ni musohore imihoro, kukw iyimbura rigeze! Ni muze mugane, kuk’ ubgato bguzuye, kand’ amāto akaba abōgabōga; kukw ibibi vyabo ari vyinshi." 
Joel3:14 Ewe masinzi n’amasinzi ari mu kiyaya kizorundurirwamw’ imanza! Kuk’ umusi w’ Uhoraho uri hafi, ah’ imanza zizorundurirwa mu kiyaya!" 
Joel3:15 Izuba rizocura umwiza, bo n’ukwezi, kandi n’inyenyeri zizoca zireka kwaka." 
Joel3:16 Maz’ Uhoraho azokwivugira i Siyoni, arangurure ijwi ar’ i Yerusalemu; ijuru n’isi bizotigita: arik’ Uhoraho azobera abantu biwe ubuhungiro, Abisirayeli ababere igihome co kubakingira." 
Joel3:17 Aho ni ho muzomenyera yuko nd’ Uhoraho Imana yanyu, mpangamye i Siyoni ku musozi wanje wera; ico gihe i Yerusalemu hazoba ahēra, kandi nta bantu b’akavantara bazosubira kuhahita ukundi." 
Joel3:18 Maze kur’ uwo musi, imisozi izojējēta vino ziryoshe, n’uturambi dutembe amata, kand’ imigezi yose y’i Buyuda izosendanisha amazi; kand’ isōko izotoboka iva mu ngoro y’Uhoraho, inyoshe ikiyaya c’i Shitimu." 
Joel3:19 Egiputa hazocika amatongo, na Edomu hazohinduka ubugaragwa bg’uruharabuga, bazize inabi bagiriye Abayuda, kuko mu bihugu vyabo bahavishirije amaraso y’abatācumuye." 
Joel3:20 Arikw i Buyuda hazokwamaho gushitsa ibihe bidashira, bo n’i Yerusalemu uk’ urunganwe ruzogenda rukurikirana." 
Joel3:21 Kandi nzohōra amaraso yabo ntaribgahōre: kuko jewe Uhoraho mpangamye i Siyoni. 
Amos1:1 Amajambo ya Amosi wo mu bungere b’i Tekowa, y’ivyo yeretswe ku Bisirayeli ku ngoma ya Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda, no ku ngoma ya Yerobowamu mwene Yehowasi, umwami w’Abisirayeli, avyeretswe, hashira imyaka ibiri kwa gutigita kw’isi kuraza." 
Amos1:2 Nuko yaravuze, at’ Uhoraho azokwivugira i Siyoni, arangurure ijwi ar’ i Yerusalemu; maz’ amaragiro y’abungere azosigara aganya, no ku gatwe k’i Karumeli hazokwuma." 
Amos1:3 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’i Damasiko, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bāhūraguje i Gileyadi ibibando vy’ivyuma:" 
Amos1:4 nuko nzokwanda umuriro inzu ya Hazayeli, utongore ingoro za Beni‐hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Kandi nzovunagura ibihindizo vy’i Damasiko, mpenebereze ababa mu kiyaya c’i Aveni, bo n’uwitwaje icumu ry’ubugabe w’i Beti‐Edeni; kand’ ihanga ry’i Siriya rizokwambukanwa i Kiri ar’ inyagano, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos1:6 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’i Gaza, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bajanye ihanga ryose ar’ inyagano, bakabashora ku Banyedomu:" 
Amos1:7 nuko nzokwanda umuriro uruzitiro rw’i Gaza, utongore ingoro zaho;" 
Amos1:8 kandi nzohenebereza ababa muri Ashidodi, bo n’uwitwaje icumu ry’ubugabe muri Ashikeloni; kandi nzotuma ukuboko kwanje ntere Ekuroni, maz’ amasigarira y’Abafilisitiya azohona, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Amos1:9 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’i Tiro, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bajanye ihanga ryose ar’ inyagano, bakabashora ku Banyedomu, ntibibuke isezerano ry’ umuvukano." 
Amos1:10 Nuko nzokwanda umuriro uruzitiro rw’i Tiro, utongore ingoro zaho." 
Amos1:11 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’i Edomu, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko yakinagije mwene nyina n’inkota, akamiriranya icitwa imbabazi cose, uburake bgiwe ntibuhengeshanye kurandamurana, akabīka akazīka ibihe vyose." 
Amos1:12 Nuko nzokwanda umuriro i Temani, utongore ingoro z’i Bosira." 
Amos1:13 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’Abamoni, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bāfomoje inda abagore b’i Gileyadi, kugira ngo barye imbibe zabo, bāgukirwe." 
Amos1:14 Nuko nzokwanda umuriro uruzitiro rw’i Raba, utongore ingoro zaho, har’ akāyaga ku musi w’intambara, bo n’ikirura ku musi w’agashururu." 
Amos1:15 Umwami wabo azokwambukanwa ar’ inyagano, hamwe n’abaganwa biwe, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos2:1 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’i Mowabu, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko baturiye amagufa y’umwami w’Abanyedomu, bayahindura nk’ishwagara." 
Amos2:2 Nuko nzokwanda umuriro i Mowabu, utongore ingoro z’i Keriyoti; kandi Mowabu hazopfa har’ amaruru n’urwamo n’inzamba zivuga." 
Amos2:3 Kandi nzohahenebereza ūhaganza, ndamwicane n’abaganwa baho bose, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos2:4 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’Abayuda, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bātītūye ivyagezwe vyanje, jewe Uhoraho, ntibitondere amabgirizwa yanje, kand’ ibigirwamana vyabo vy’ibinyoma vyarabajimije, ari vyo ba sekuruza babo nyene bākurikira." 
Amos2:5 Nuko nzokwanda umuriro i Buyuda, utongore ingoro z’i Yerusalemu." 
Amos2:6 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Kubg’ ibicumuro bitatu vy’Abisirayeli, mbere ni bine, sinzovyirengagiza; kuko bāguze umugororotsi amahera, n’umukene bakamugura inkweto." 
Amos2:7 Basiribangira imitwe ya ba nyarucari mu mukungugu wo hasi, bakagoreka inzira z’abicisha bugufi; umwana na se binjirana umwigeme umwe, bagatukisha izina ryanje ryera." 
Amos2:8 Bīryāmira i ruhande y’igicaniro cose ku mpuzu z’inkizurano, kandi mu ngoro y’Imana yabo bakahanywera vino baciriye abantu kw iciru." 
Amos2:9 Yamar’ ari jewe naranduye Abamori imbere yabo, uburebure bgabo bgari bumeze nk’ubg’ amasederi, kandi bari bakomeye nk’ibiti vy’imyeloni; ariko nahenebereje ivyo bamye mpereye hejuru, n’imizi yabo, mpereye hasi." 
Amos2:10 Yamara mweho nabadūganye mbakuye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mbarōngōra mu bugaragwa imyaka mirongwine, kugira ngo mwegukire igihugu c’Abamori nyene." 
Amos2:11 Kandi mu bana banyu natoyemw’ abo nzovugisha, no mu misore yanyu abo kuba Abanaziri. Mbega si ko vyābaye, ga yemwe Bisirayeli? ni k’Uhoraho abaza." 
Amos2:12 Ariko mwebge mwāhaye Abanaziri vino ngo bayinywe, mutako mubuza abo mvugisha, muti Ntimukavugishwe." 
Amos2:13 Umve, ngira mbashikamire aho muri, nk’uk’ umukogote wuzuye ibinyankinda ushikamira hasi." 
Amos2:14 Ūbangutse azobura ukw ahunga, n’umuhizi nta co ubuhizi bgiwe buzomumarira, n’intōre ntizoruha yikiza;" 
Amos2:15 uw’ umuheto ntazoshobora guhagarara, n’impayamaguru ntizoshobora kwikiza, cank’ ūgendera kw ifarasi:" 
Amos2:16 kandi n’uwar’ inshirabinya mu bahizi kur’ uwo musi azohunga yambaye ubusa, ni k’ Uhoraho agize." 
Amos3:1 Ni mwumve iri jambo Uhoraho abavuzeko, yemwe Bisirayeli, arivuze ku muryango wose yadūganye, awukūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa," 
Amos3:2 ati Ni mwebge gusa twamenyanye mu miryango yose yo mw isi: ni co gituma nzobahanira ibigabitanyo vyanyu vyose. 
Amos3:3 Mbega babiri bojana bataraganye? 
Amos3:4 Cank’ intambge yokwivugira mu kibira ata co yishe? Umugunza w’intambge wotontomera mw isenga ryawo ata co wafashe? 
Amos3:5 Cank’ inyoni yogwa mu mutego uri hasi, kand’ udatezwe? Umutego woshibuka ata co ufashe?" 
Amos3:6 Cank’ inzamba yovugirizwa mu gisagara, abantu ntibakanguke? Canke har’ icago cotera igisagara, Uhoraho atakirekuye?" 
Amos3:7 Ereg’ Umwami Uhoraho ntazogira ico akora, atabanje kwibira akabanga abasavyi biwe avugisha." 
Amos3:8 Intambge irīvuze, none ni nde atotinya? Umwami Uhoraho aravuze, none ni nde atovugishwa?" 
Amos3:9 Ni mwāmāmaze ibi mu ngoro zo muri Ashidodi, no mu ngoro zo mu gihugu ca Egiputa, muti Ni mukoranire ku misozi y’i Samariya, murābe imivurungano iriyo ukw ingana, n’ukuntu huzuye agahahazo!" 
Amos3:10 Kuko batazi gukora ibitunganye, ni k’Uhoraho agize, birundaniriza umuryano n’ubgambuzi mu ngoro zabo." 
Amos3:11 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ati Hazoza abansi, bazota igihugu hagati; bazocobogoza ubuhizi bgawe, ingoro zawe zisahurwe." 
Amos3:12 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Nk’uk’ umwungere yaka intambge amaguru abiri cank’ igice c’ugutwi mu kanwa kayo, ni ko n’Abisirayeli bazorokorwa, bībereye i Samariya bīdibamiye ku misezero, no ku misego y’amahariri ku buriri." 
Amos3:13 Ni mwumve, mwagirize inzu ya Yakobo, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, ni we Mana Nyen’ ingabo." 
Amos3:14 Kuk’ umusi nzohanakw Abisirayeli ibigabitanyo vyabo, nzohana n’ibicaniro vy’i Beteli; kand’ amahembe y’igicaniro azocibga atsindwe hasi." 
Amos3:15 Nzosangangura inzu yo kubamwo mu gihe c’ imbeho hamwe n’iyo kubamwo mu gihe c’ubushuhe; kand’ amazu asharijwe n’amahembe y’inzovu azokomvomvorwa, amazu menshi azohenebēra, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:1 Ni mwumve iri jambo, yemwe mwa mahogazi y’i Bashani, muba ku musozi Samariya, yemwe abahahaza abagorwa, mukavungavunga abakene, mukabarira abanega banyu, muti Ni muzane tunywe!" 
Amos4:2 Umwami Uhoraho arahiye ukwera kwiwe, ati Rāba, imisi izobūbīra, bazobatwarisha ivyuma vy’ingobe, n’amasigarira yanyu bazoyatwarisha amagera aroba." 
Amos4:3 Bazobacisha mu vyuho, umugore wese aramirije imbere yiwe; bazobashiburira mw iboma, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:4 Enda ni mwiyizire i Beteli, mucumure, n’i Gilugali, mwirundanirize ibicumuro! Ego me ni mwizanire ibimazi vyanyu uko bukeye, mutange n’ibigiracumi vyanyu ukw imisi itatu ishize!" 
Amos4:5 Mutange imitsima yambiwe kw ibimazi vyo gukenguruka, n’ivyo mutanga muvyigombeye ni muvyāmāmaze, mubikwize! Kukw ivyo ari vyo bibahimbara, yemwe Bisirayeli, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:6 Nanje nabahaye kuba ubgūmakanwa mu bisagara vyanyu vyose, no kubura ivyo kurya mu ngo zanyu zose; na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’ Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:7 Ikindi nabimye imvura, mukiyigomba amezi atatu ngo mubone kwimbura; narekuriye imvura mu gisagara kimwe, mu kindi ndayibuza: hamwe ikahagwa, ahandi ntihagwe, hakūma." 
Amos4:8 Nukw abo mu bisagara bibiri canke bitatu bakanyavūtira mu gisagara kimwe kunywa amazi, ntibashire inyota: na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’ Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:9 Nabateje kurumvya bo n’ururyi: isinzi ry’ imirima yanyu yakegeswe n’inzige, bo n’inzabibu zanyu, n’imisukoni yanyu, na elayo zanyu: na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:10 Nabateje ikīza nk’icateye muri Egiputa: imisore yanyu nayicishije inkota, nnyaga amafarasi yanyu; natumye umunuko ur’ aho mushagaje ubinjira mu mazuru: na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’ Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:11 Nasanganguye ibisagara bimwe vyanyu nko mu gihe jewe Imana nahenebereza Sodomu na Gomora, muba nk’ igishirīra cokowe mu muriro: na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos4:12 Nuko rero nzokugira ntyo nyene, ewe Isirayeli; kandi ko nzokugira ntyo, itegure guhwana n’Imana yawe, Isirayeli we." 
Amos4:13 Rāba, Umwe yabumvye imisozi, akarema n’umuyaga, akamenyesha umuntu ivyo yiyumvira, agahindura umutwenzi ukaba umwiza, kand’ agatambagira ku mpinga z’imisozi yo mw isi: izina ryiwe yitwa Uhoraho, Imana Nyen’ ingabo." 
Amos5:1 Ni mwumve iri jambo ry’agacurantimba mbavuzeko, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli:" 
Amos5:2 Inkumi, ari yo Bisirayeli, iguye bukumbi; ntizokwongera kuvyuka ukundi! Irambaraye ngaho mu gihugu c’i wabo, kandi nta wo kuyivyura ariho!" 
Amos5:3 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, at’ Igisagara catabaramw’ igihumbi hazotabaruka ijana, n’icatabaramw’ ijana hazotabaruka icumi mu b’inzu ya Isirayeli." 
Amos5:4 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho abariye inzu ya Isirayeli, at’ Abe ari jewe musiguza, kugira ngo mubone kubaho:" 
Amos5:5 ariko ntimukabarize i Beteli, canke ngo muje i Gilugali, canke ngo mushike i Beri‐sheba: kukw ab’i Gilugali bazokwambukanwa ar’ inyagano, n’i Beteli hazotītūka." 
Amos5:6 Jewe Uhoraho abe ari jewe musiguza, kugira ngo mubone kubaho; noye kuzosūmira inzu ya Yosefu nk’ umuriro, nkayitongora, i Beteli hataribuboneke uwo kuyizimya." 
Amos5:7 Yemwe abahindura imanza zigacika umururazi, ukugororoka mukagushiburira hasi," 
Amos5:8 Umwe yaremye inyenyeri zitwa Kilimiya na Oriyoni abe ari we mubaza; ni we ahindura igitūtu c’urupfu kigacika agatondo, n’umurango akawuhindura umwiza w’ijoro; ni we ahamagara amazi yo mu kiyaga, akayasendanisha kw isi; Uhoraho ni ryo zina ryiwe;" 
Amos5:9 ni we atuma agatikizo gasūmira abanyenkomezi, kagashika no ku bihome bikomeye." 
Amos5:10 Banka ūhanūrira mw ishikiro ry’igisagara, bakazinukwa ūvuga ivy’ ukuri." 
Amos5:11 Nuko rero, ko mwasiribanze umurushwa, mukamutoza utugano twiwe; amazu mwiyubakishirije amabuye abajwe, ntimuzoyabamwo; imirima myiza y’imizabibu mwateye, ntimuzonywa vino zayo." 
Amos5:12 Kuko nzi ibicumuro vyanyu ingen’ ari vyinshi, n’ivyaha vyanyu ingen’ ar’ ibikomeye, yemwe abahahaza umugororotsi, mukarya ingurire, mukazibiranya abakene mu manza muri mw ishikiro ry’igisagara." 
Amos5:13 Ni co gituma umunyamakenga apfa kwinumira mu gihe nk’ico, kukw ar’ igihe kibi." 
Amos5:14 Ivyiza abe ari vyo mushishikara, ariko s’ibibi, kugira ngo mubone kubaho: ni ho Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo azobana namwe, nk’uko mwavyibgira." 
Amos5:15 Mwanke ibibi, mukunde ivyiza, mukomeze imanza zibereye mw ishikiro ry’igisagara: kumbure Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo azohangaza amasigarira ya Yosefu." 
Amos5:16 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo agize, ari we Mwami, ati Hazoba amaborogo mu nzira zose z’ibihamo, kandi mu mayira yose bazovuga, bati N’ubuyobe, n’ubuyobe! Bazohamagara n’abarimyi ngo barire, n’abazi gucura intimba ngo baboroge." 
Amos5:17 No mu mirima yose y’imizabibu hazoba amaborogo: kuko nzoba nciye hagati muri mwebge, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos5:18 Muzobona ibara, yemwe abifuza umusi w’Uhoraho! Mbeg’ uwo musi w’Uhoraho muwugombera iki? Erega n’umwiza s’umuco!" 
Amos5:19 Erega ni nk’ah’ umuntu yohunga intambge agahūra n’idubu, canke yokwinjira mu nzu agashinga ukuboko ku rusika, inzoka ikamukomora." 
Amos5:20 Mbeg’ umusi w’Uhoraho ntuzoba umwiza? Mugira ng’uzoba umuco? Mber’ uzoba umwiza w’umuzitanya, utagira n’agaseso." 
Amos5:21 Nzinutswe imisi mikuru yanyu, ndayigaye, kandi simpimbawe na gatoya n’amakoraniro yanyu y’agahebuza." 
Amos5:22 Mbere naho mwonshikanira ibimazi vyoswa n’amashikanwa y’amafu, sinzovyemera; kand’ ibimasa vyanyu binuze muzanakw ibimazi vy’ ishimwe, sinzobishirako n’ijisho." 
Amos5:23 Nkūra urwamo rw’indirimbo zanyu mu matwi, kuko ntagomba kwumva guhibongoza kw’inanga zanyu." 
Amos5:24 Arikw imanza ziroranye, reka zisendanishe nk’amazi, n’ukugororoka gusendanishe nk’ uruzi rudahōka." 
Amos5:25 Mbega mwaranzaniye ibimazi n’amashikanwa mu bugaragwa ya myaka ukw ari mirongwine, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli?" 
Amos5:26 Nuko rero muzorerura Sikuti umwami wanyu, na Kiyuni, inyenyeri yanyu y’ikigirwamana, ari vyo bishushanyo mwironkeye ubganyu." 
Amos5:27 Ni co kizotuma mbambukanisha mur’ inyagano hirya y’i Damasiko, ni jewe Uhoraho mbivuze, kand’ izina ryanje nd’ Imana Nyen’ ingabo." 
Amos6:1 Bazobona ibara, abīdibamiye i Siyoni, n’abībēra ku musozi Samariya ata co bīnona, ba rurangiranwa bo mw ihanga rirengeye ayandi, abo inzu ya Isirayeli yisunga!" 
Amos6:2 Enda ni mugende, mushike i Kaline murābe; muvuyeyo muje i Hamati, ca gisagara gikomeye; muheze mumanuke muje i Gati mu Bafilisitiya: mbeg’ ivyo bisagara har’ ico birusha ino mur’ ubu bgami bgompi? Cank’ igihugu cabo kiruta icanyu mu bunini?" 
Amos6:3 Yemwe ko mushira kure umusi mubi, mukīgiza hafi intebe y’umuryano!" 
Amos6:4 Bīryāmira ku mariri yakozwe mu mahembe y’inzovu, bakīshanyangira ku misezero yabo, bakīrīra amasuguru y’intama bakūye mu mukuku, n’amashūri anuze;" 
Amos6:5 bavugira inanga mu bijandajando, bakībāzira ivyo kuvuza, nka Dawidi;" 
Amos6:6 bakanywesha vino ivyato, bakīsīga amavuta yinjiye; ariko ntibaruha bababazwa n’amazigirizwa y’aba Yosefu." 
Amos6:7 Nuko ni co gituma bazogenda ar’ aba mbere mu bambukanwa ar’ inyagano, kand’ ibinezaneza vy’abīshanyangira ku misezero bizoshira," 
Amos6:8 ni k’Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo agize. Umwami Uhoraho arirahiye, ati Nanka urunuka ubgibone bg’aba Yakobo, nzinutswe n’ingoro zabo; ni co gituma nzogabura igisagara n’ibirimwo vyose." 
Amos6:9 Naho mu nzu imwe hosigaramw’ abantu cumi, bazopfa." 
Amos6:10 Umuntu ni yaza guterura umuvyimba wa mwene wabo ngw awuturire, agakūra ico kiziga mu nzu, azobaza ūri haruguru mu nzu, ati Har’ ūgisigaye muri kumwe? na we azomwishura, ati Na mba; maz’ uno amubgire, at’ Iyihorerere, kuko tudashobora kuvuga izina ry’Uhoraho!" 
Amos6:11 Kukw ehe rāba, Uhoraho aragera, bikaba: inzu nini igacikamw’ ibihengeri, n’inzu ntoya igacika ubunywenywe." 
Amos6:12 Mbeg’ amafarasi yokwiruka ku rutare? Canke har’ uwoharimisha inka? Ariko mweho imanza ziroranye mwāzihinduye ibamba, n’imbuto z’ukugororoka mwāzihinduye umururazi," 
Amos6:13 yemwe abahimbarwa n’ikintu kitagira ikimazi, mukavuga, ngo Mbeg’ inkomezi zacu si zo zāduhaye ububasha?" 
Amos6:14 Arikw ehe rāba, nzobahagurukiriza ihanga, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni k’Uhoraho Imana Nyen’ ingabo agize; kandi rizobatunatuna, uhereye ahafata i Hamati ugashitsa ku kagezi gaca mu kiyaya Araba." 
Amos7:1 Ibi ni vyo Umwami Uhoraho yanyeretse: ehe rāba, yarikw arazana inzige, ibirīra bigitanguye kumera; kand’ ivyo birīra n’ivyāmeze ah’ umwami ahejeje gutemesha." 
Amos7:2 Nuko zimaze kurya ubgatsi bgo mu gihugu, mperako ndavuga, nt’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho, enda se n’ubahangaze ndakwinginze! Mbeg’ aba Yakobo bokira bate, n’ukuntu ar’ inkehwa?" 
Amos7:3 Nuk’ Uhoraho aca arīgarura, ati Ntibikibayeho; ni k’Uhoraho yavuze." 
Amos7:4 Ibi ni vyo Umwami Uhoraho yanyeretse: ehe rāba, Umwami Uhoraho yahamagaye umuriro ngw awucishe amateka; ufyeta i bgina hahambaye, kandi wagira utōngōre n’igihugu." 
Amos7:5 Maze mperako ndavuga, nt’ Ewe Mwami Uhoraho, enda se n’urekereho ndakwinginze! Mbeg’ aba Yakobo bokira bate, n’ukuntu ar’ inkehwa?" 
Amos7:6 Nuk’ Uhoraho aca arīgarura, ati N’ivyo nyene ntibikibayeho; ni k’Umwami Uhoraho yavuze." 
Amos7:7 Ibi ni vyo yanyeretse: ehe rāba, Umwami Imana yar’ ahagaze i ruhande y’uruzitiro rw’ amabuye rwubakishijwe karisho, afise karisho mu ntoke." 
Amos7:8 Maz’ Uhoraho arambaza, at’ Ubonye iki ga Amosi? Nti Mbonye karisho. Nuk’ Umwami aravuga, ati Rāba, ngira ndekurire karisho hagati mu bantu banje b’Abisirayeli; kandi sinzosubira kwirengagiza ivyabo ukundi:" 
Amos7:9 kand’ ibitabo aba Isaka bātavye ku mpinga z’imisozi bizosigara bitamāriwe, n’ahantu hēra h’Abisirayeli hazosangangurwa; kandi nzohagurukira inzu ya Yerobowamu nitwaje inkota." 
Amos7:10 Maze Amaziya umuherezi w’i Beteli atuma kuri Yerobowamu umwami w’Abisirayeli, uti Amosi yagutereye abantu umugararizo mu b’inzu ya Isirayeli: igihugu nta ho cotorana itiro amagambo yiwe n’ukw angana." 
Amos7:11 Kuko Amosi avuga, ngo Yerobowamu azokwicishwa inkota, kandi ngw Abisirayeli ntibazobura kwambukanwa ar’ inyagano bakūwe mu gihugu cabo." 
Amos7:12 Kandi Amaziya atakw abgira Amosi, at’ Ewe kamenyi, enda genda uhungire mu gihugu c’i Buyuda, abe ari ho urīra utwawe, kand’ abe ari ho uvugishirizwa:" 
Amos7:13 ariko ntusubire kuvugishirizwa i Beteli ukundi, kukw ari ho har’ ikigabiro c’umwami, bo n’ihorezo ry’igihugu." 
Amos7:14 Maze Amosi yishura Amaziya, ati Sinigeze kuba ūvugishwa n’Imana, canke ngo mbe umwigishwa w’uwo yavugisha, ariko nari nibereye umwungere, nkaba n’umurimyi w’ibiti vy’imisukomora." 
Amos7:15 Maz’ Uhoraho yankūye mu mukuku ndagiye, arambarira, ati Genda ubarire abantu banje b’Abisirayeli." 
Amos7:16 Nuko rero nawe nyene ni wumve ijambo ry’Uhoraho: k’uvuze ngo singire ico mvugishwa ku Bisirayeli, canke ngo singire ijambo nzana ku nzu ya Isaka:" 
Amos7:17 nuko rer’ uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, at’ Umugore wawe azocika maraya mu gisagara, kand’ abahungu bawe n’abakobga bawe bazokwicishwa inkōta, n’itongo ryawe rizogabuzwa umugozi: nawe ubgawe uzogwa mu gihugu cāhumānye, kand’ Abisirayeli ntibazobura kwambukanwa ar’ inyagano bakūwe mu gihugu cabo." 
Amos8:1 Ibi ni vyo Umwami Uhoraho yanyeretse: ngize ntya, mbona igisimbo c’amatunda ahīshiye." 
Amos8:2 Maz’ arambaza, at’ Ubonye iki ga Amosi? Nti Mbonye igisimbo c’amatunda ahīshiye. Maz’ Uhoraho arambgira, at’ Amateka y’abantu banje b’Abisirayeli arahīshishijwe; kandi sinzosubira kwirengagiza ivyabo ukundi." 
Amos8:3 Kur’ uwo musi indirimbo zo mu ngoro zizohinduka umuborogo, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize; imivyimba izoba myinshi: ahantu hose bazoyishiburira hanze mu gacerere." 
Amos8:4 Ni mwumve ibi, yemwe abagomba gusiribanga abakene, no kumara impahazwa zo mu gihugu," 
Amos8:5 mukavuga, muti Mbeg’ imboneko z’ukwezi zizoshira ryari, ngo tubone kwishōrera amahonda, cank’ isabato, ngo tubone gutundurura ingano ngo tugure, ngo dutūvye ingero yitwa efa, tugwize shekeli, duhendanishe iminzane y’ibinyoma;" 
Amos8:6 ngo dushōre ifeza twigurire abarushwa, dushōre n’inkweto twigurire abakene, ngo dushōre n’ibihumbga vy’ ingano?" 
Amos8:7 Uhoraho arahiye ubgiza bga Yakobo, ati N’ukuri nkazokwigera nibagira ivyo bākoze, haba na kimwe!" 
Amos8:8 Mbeg’ ivyo ntibizotuma igihugu gihinda agashitsi, abari muri co bose bagacura umuborogo? Kizoteragurwa rwose nk’uko rwa Ruzi rwiteragura; gisimbagurike, gisubire gihwāmīre nka rwa Ruzi rwo muri Egiputa." 
Amos8:9 Maze kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nzorengesha izuba mu mashōka, nzane ubgirakabiri kw isi hakiri ku murango." 
Amos8:10 Imisi mikuru yanyu nzoyihindura umuborogo, n’indirimbo zanyu zose zicike agacurantimba; kandi bose nzobakenyeza amagunira, imitwe yose imobge inkomvorera; kandi nzobatera umuborogo nk’uwo baborogera umwana w’umuhungu w’ ikinege, amaherezo yavyo abe umusi w’akabonge." 
Amos8:11 Eh’ imisi izoza, ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize, nzotēza inzara mu gihugu, ntizoba ar’ inzara y’ivyo kurya cank’ inyota y’amazi, arikw izoba ar’ iyo kwumva amajambo yanje, jewe Uhoraho." 
Amos8:12 Kandi bazonyavuta bakubite ku kiyaga baje ku kindi; bazojarajara bakubite n’i burārūko baje n’i burasirazuba, kugira ngo barondere ijambo ry’Uhoraho, yamara ntibazoribona." 
Amos8:13 Kur’ uwo musi inkumi nziza‐nziza bo n’abasore bazorabikwa n’inyota. 
Amos8:14 Abarahira ubuyobe bg’i Samariya, bati Nk’ ukw imana yawe ihoraho, ewe Dani; kandi bati Nk’uko bga bgirukiro bgawe bur’ aho, ewe Beri‐sheba: na bo nyene bazogwaho, ntibasubire kuvyuka ukundi." 
Amos9:1 Nabonye Umwami Imana ahagaze i ruhande y’igicaniro, aravuga, ati Kubita imyashi y’inkingi, amatanguriro y’imiryango anyiganyige: uyibamenagurire ku mitwe yabo bose; kand’ ūzosigara muri bo wese nzomwicisha inkota: nta n’umwe muri bo azoshobora guhunga, nta n’umwe muri bo azokwikiza." 
Amos9:2 Naho bokwiyimbira bakaja i kuzimu, na ho ukuboko kwanje kwobakūrayo; naho bokwūrira bakaja mw ijuru, na ho nyene nzobamanurayo." 
Amos9:3 Kandi naho bokwinyegeza ku mpinga ya Karumeli, na ho nzobarondera mbanyegurureyo; canke naho bokwihisha inyonga zanje i bgina mu kiyaga, aho na ho nzogomora inzoka ibakomorereyo." 
Amos9:4 Kandi naho bokwambukanwa n’abansi babo ar’ inyagano, aho na ho nzohabagomorera inkota, ibamare: kandi nzobatungīra igitsure co kubazanira ivyago ariko s’amahirwe." 
Amos9:5 Kuk’ Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari we akora ku gihugu, kigaca gishonga, abakibamwo bose bagacura umuborogo; kigateragurwa rwose nk’uko rwa Ruzi rwiteragura, kigasubira kigahwāmīra nka rwa Ruzi rwo muri Egiputa;" 
Amos9:6 kandi ni we yiyubakira ingoro mw ijuru, agahetera ijuru ryiwe kw isi; ni we ahamagara amazi yo mu kiyaga akayasuka kw isi; Uhoraho ni ryo zina ryiwe." 
Amos9:7 Mbega ntimumbereye nk’Abanyetiyopiya, ga mwa Bisirayeli mwe? ni k’Uhoraho abaza. Mbega si jewe nadūganye Abisirayeli mbakūye mu gihugu ca Egiputa, n’Abafilisitiya nkabakūra i Kafutori, n’Abasiriya nkabakūra i Kiri?" 
Amos9:8 Eh’ Umwami Uhoraho atungiriye igitsūre ubgami bukora ivyaha, ati Nzoburandura mw isi; mugabo sinzorandura inzu ya Yakobo rwose, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Amos9:9 Kuko rāba nzobishinga, ngosorere ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli mu moko yose, nk’ibigosozwa urutaro, ariko nta gatete na kamwe kazokorokera hasi." 
Amos9:10 Abanyavyaha bose bo mu bantu banje bazokwicwa n’inkota, kand’ ari bo bavuga, bat’ Ivyago ntibizoduhamvya canke ngo duhūrire imbere." 
Amos9:11 Kur’ uwo musi nzovyura urusago rwa Dawidi rwatemvye, nzibire ibihengeri vyarwo; nongere nsanasane ahāshize harwo, ndarwubake rumere nk’uko rwahoze kera;" 
Amos9:12 kugira ngo begukire amasigarira y’Abanyedomu, n’amahanga yose yitirirwa izina ryanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kand’ akora ivyo." 
Amos9:13 Eh’ imisi izoza, ni k’Uhoraho agize, umurimyi azogerekerana n’umwimbuzi, n’umukānyi w’inzabibu agerekerane n’ūbiba imbuto; kand’ imisozi izojējēta vino ziryoshe, n’uturambi twose tuzisendanishe." 
Amos9:14 Kandi nzogarukana abantu banje b’Abisirayeli bājanywe ar’ inyagano, bongere kwubaka ibisagara vyāsenyutse, babibemwo; bazotera imirima y’imizabibu, binywere vino yayo; bazorima indimiro bīrīre ivyeze muri zo." 
Amos9:15 Kandi nzobateragira mu gihugu cabo, ntibazosubira kurandurwa mu gihugu cabo nabahaye, ni k’Uhoraho Imana yawe igize." 
Obadiah1:1 Ivyo Obadiya yeretswe. Uku ni k’Umwami Uhoraho agize ku vy’Abanyedomu. Twumvise inkuru zivuye k’Uhoraho, kandi har’ intumwa itumwe ku mahanga, ngo Ni muhaguruke, natwe nyene dukūre hasi, tubatere, tuje mu ntambara." 
Obadiah1:2 Rāba, nakugize ritoya ku yandi mahanga: uba inkengerwa rwose." 
Obadiah1:3 Ubgibone bgo mu mutima wawe bgaraguhenze, wewe uba mu bitandara vyacitsemw’ ibihoro, ukīvyagirira hejuru iyo bigwa; wewe uvugira mu mutima wawe, uti Ni nde yonkororera hasi?" 
Obadiah1:4 Naho wodūga intumbgejuru nk’inkukuma, kandi naho wokwārika icāri cawe hagati y’inyenyeri, nzogukorora ngukūreyo, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Obadiah1:5 Ewe kuntu ugeseye! Ibisuma vyokūzira, cank’ abambuzi mw ijoro, mbega ntibogusahura kugeza bīhāgije gusa? Cank’ abāmūzi b’inzabibu boza kuri wewe, mbega ntibosigaza uduhūmbga tw’inzabibu?" 
Obadiah1:6 Ewe kuntu ivya Esau bisesanguwe! Itunga ryiwe ryari rinyegejwe ukuntu risokorowe! 
Obadiah1:7 Abo mwari mwifatanije bose bāragusohoye, bagushitsa no ku rubibe: abo mwari mwuzuye baragusutse, none barakunesheje; abo wagaburira bāguteze umutego: ariko ntiwabimenye." 
Obadiah1:8 Mbega kur’ uwo musi sinzorandura abanyabgenge bo muri Edomu, ngaherengeteza amakenga ku musozi wa Esau? ni k’Uhoraho abaza." 
Obadiah1:9 Ewe Temani, abahizi bawe bazogwa igihumura, bitume abantu bose iyo bava bakagera baririkwa, bashire ku musozi wa Esau." 
Obadiah1:10 Kubg’ inabi wagiriye mwene nyoko Yakobo uzomāramāra, uzorandurwa uheneberezwe." 
Obadiah1:11 Kuri wa musi wari wihagarariye urāba utw’ ininga, umusi ab’ akavantara bāsahura ibintu vyiwe, abanyamahanga bakamūzira mu marembo, bagapfindira i Yerusalemu, nawe wari nk’uwo muri bo." 
Obadiah1:12 Yamara ntiwar’ ukwiye kurāba utw’ ininga umusi wa mwene nyoko ugeze, ku musi yashikiweko n’ivyago; umusi Abayuda bagesezwa, ntivyari bikwiye kukunezereza; ntiwari gutwengera mw ijigo ku musi w’amazigirizwa yabo." 
Obadiah1:13 Abantu banje ntiwari kubāzira mw irembo, umusi baboneyekw amagorwa; mbere ntiwari kwirābira utw’ ininga agahahazo barimwo, umusi baboneyekw amagorwa; kandi ntiwari gusahura ibintu vyabo, umusi baboneyekw amagorwa." 
Obadiah1:14 Ntiwar’ ukwiye guhagarara mu mayirabiri ng’ utikize ababo bacitse, kandi ntiwari gutanga amasigarira yabo ku musi w’amazigirizwa yabo." 
Obadiah1:15 Kuk’ umusi w’Uhoraho uri hafi, uziye amahanga yose: uko wagize ni k’uzogirirwa; ivyo wakoze bizogusubira ku mutwe." 
Obadiah1:16 Kand’ uko mwanywereye ku musozi wanje wera, uko ni kw amahanga yose azokwama anywa na ntaryo; mbere bazonywa bagotomere, bamere nk’abatakiriho." 
Obadiah1:17 Ariko ku musozi Siyoni hazoba ubukiriro, kandi hazoba hēra; ab’ inzu ya Yakobo bazokwiganzira ivyabo." 
Obadiah1:18 Kand’ ab’ inzu ya Yakobo bazoba umuriro, n’ab’ inzu ya Yosefu babe imbeya zawo, n’ab’ inzu ya Esau babe nk’ibishingwe, babaturire, babatongōre; nta wuzosigara mu b’ inzu ya Esau; kuk’ Uhoraho ari we abivuze." 
Obadiah1:19 Kand’ ab’ i bumanuko bazokwegukira umusozi wa Esau; n’ababa mu kiyaya begukire i Bufilisitiya; bazokwegukira igihugu ca Efurayimu, n’igihugu c’i Samariya: kand’ i Gileyadi hazoba aha Benyamini." 
Obadiah1:20 Kand’ abo mur’ izo ngabo z’Abisirayeli bāgiye mu Banyakanani ar’ inyagano, bazokwegukira igihugu gushitsa i Zarefati: n’ ab’ i Yerusalemu bājanywe ar’ inyagano, bar’ i Sefaradi, bazokwegukira ibisagara vy’i bumanuko." 
Obadiah1:21 Kand’ abatabazi bazodūga ku musozi Siyoni, ngo bacire urubanza umusozi wa Esau; kand’ ubgami buzoba ubg’ Uhoraho." 
Jonah1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Yona mwene Amitayi, riramubgira," 
Jonah1:2 riti Va hasi uje i Ninewe, ca gisagara kinini, ukibūrire; kukw ivyaha vy’abaho vyarundanye, bigashika imbere yanje." 
Jonah1:3 Ariko Yona ava hasi ngw ahungire Uhoraho i Tarushishi, ave mu nyonga ziwe. Amanuka i Yopa, abona ubgato buja i Tarushishi: atanga ikibuguro, atambukira muri bgo, ngw ajane n’abagiye i Tarushishi, ave mu nyonga z’Uhoraho." 
Jonah1:4 Maz’ Uhoraho asuka umuyaga ukomeye mu kiyaga; haba igihuhuta c’inkomezi mu kiyaga, ubgato bushaka kumeneka." 
Jonah1:5 Abasoza baratinya, umuntu wese yambaza imana yiwe; baterera mu kiyaga ibintu vyari mu bgato ngo baburemurure. Ariko Yona we yari yamanutse mu gafuruka ko mu bgato gahera epfo, yigaramiye yisinziriye." 
Jonah1:6 Nuk’ umukuru w’ubgato aja ah’ ari, aramubaza, ati Wabaye ute ga wa gikazatiro we? Vyuka wambaze Imana yawe; kumbure Imana yodusubizak’ umutima, ntidupfe." 
Jonah1:7 Bose baravugana, bati Ni muze dupfinde, tumenye ūtumye duterwa ibi vyago uw’ari we. Nuko barapfinda, ubupfindo bgerekana Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Baca baramubaza, bat’ Enda utubarire ūtumye duterwa ibi vyago; ukora igikorwa ki? ur’ uwa hehe? ur’ uwo mu kihe gihugu? ur’ ubgoko ki?" 
Jonah1:9 Arabishura, ati Nd’ Umuheburayo, nubaha Uhoraho, Imana Nyen’ ijuru, yaremye ikiyaga n’i musozi." 
Jonah1:10 Maz’ abo bantu bafatwa n’ubgoba bginshi, baramubaza, bat’ Ivyo ukoze ibi n’ibiki? Kukw abo bantu bāri bamenye kw ahunze Uhoraho, kuko yari yabibabgiye." 
Jonah1:11 Baramubaza, bati Tukugire dute, ngw ikiyaga kitureke, kibe agahwekere? Kukw ikiyaga ciyongeranya gusuriranya." 
Jonah1:12 Arabishura, ati Ni munterure, munte mu kiyaga, ni ho ikiyaga cobabera agahwekere; kuko nzi yukw iki gihuhuta c’inkomezi kibahōra jewe." 
Jonah1:13 Arikw abo bantu barushiriza gusoza ngo bagaruke hakuno i musozi, ntibābishobora, kukw ikiyaga ciyongeranya gusuriranya, kirabananira." 
Jonah1:14 Ni co catumye batakambira Uhoraho, bati Turakwinginze, ewe Uhoraho, twoye gupfa tuzira ubugingo bg’uyu muntu, kandi ntuduharūrekw amaraso y’ūdafise igicumuro, kuko wewe, Uhoraho, ukoze ico ugomvye." 
Jonah1:15 Nuko baterura Yona, bamuta mu kiyaga; ikiyaga kireka gusuriranya." 
Jonah1:16 Maz’ abo bantu baca batinya Uhoraho bihebuje; bamuha ikimazi, bamusezeranira amasezerano." 
Jonah1:17 Uhoraho agera urufi runini ngo rumire Yona. Maze Yona amara mu nda y’urufi imisi itatu n’amajoro atatu. 
Jonah2:1 Maze Yona asengera Uhoraho Imana yiwe mu nda y’urufi," 
Jonah2:2 ati Natakambiye Uhoraho kubg’ ivyago nagize, aranyishura; Nambaje ndi mu nda y’i kuzimu, wumva ijwi ryanje." 
Jonah2:3 Kuko wantereye i bgina, muri nyina mu kiyaga; umwuzure wantaye hagati; Imipfunda yawe yose n’imikuba yawe yose vyarandengeye." 
Jonah2:4 Ndavuga, nti Nciwe mu nyonga zawe; Ariko nzokwongera gutumbera urusengero rwawe rwera." 
Jonah2:5 Amazi yanciye irya n’ino, ashika no ku bugingo bganje: I bgina harankikije; ibirandaranda vyo mu mazi vyanyizingiriye mu mutwe." 
Jonah2:6 Ndamanuka nja mu mizi y’imisozi; Isi n’ibihindizo vyayo vyanyugaranye ibihe bidashira: Arik’ Uhoraho Mana yanje, wakūye ubugingo bganje muri rwa rwobo." 
Jonah2:7 Ah’ umutima wanje wiheburira muri jewe, nibutse Uhoraho, Ugusenga kwanje kwagushitseko mu rusengero rwawe rwera." 
Jonah2:8 Aberekeza umutima ku bitagira ikimazi vy’ibinyoma Baba bataye guharirwa. 
Jonah2:9 Ariko jeho nzogushikanira ikimazi nsēsereza impundu, Kandi nzoshitsa ivyo nasezeranye. Agakiza kava k’Uhoraho." 
Jonah2:10 Maz’ Uhoraho abarira urwo rufi, rudahwa Yona i musozi." 
Jonah3:1 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rija kuri Yona ubugira kabiri, riramubarira," 
Jonah3:2 riti Va hasi uje i Ninewe, ca gisagara kinini, ukibūrire imbūri nzokubgira." 
Jonah3:3 Nuko Yona ava hasi aja i Ninewe, nk’ ukw ijambo ry’ Uhoraho rivuze. Kandi Ninewe car’ igisagara kinini c’agahebuza, kugikikuza rwar’ urugendo rw’ imisi itatu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona atangura kuja mu gisagara agenda urugendo rw’umusi umwe; arasemerera, ati Hasigaye imisi mirongwine, Ninewe hagakomvomvorwa." 
Jonah3:5 Maz’ abantu b’i Ninewe bemera Imana, bashinga ngo habeho kwisonzesha, baca bambara amagunira, uhereye k’ūhambaye ugashitsa kuri nyarucari hanyuma y’abandi." 
Jonah3:6 Inkuru zishika ku mwami w’i Ninewe, ahaguruka ku ntebe yiwe yiyambura imyambaro yiwe, yambara igunira, yicara mu munyota." 
Jonah3:7 Agera ko bamamaza i Ninewe icagezwe ciwe n’ic’ abaganwa biwe, ngo Ntihagire umuntu agira ico atamira, n’ibitunzwe n’uko, vy’amasho n’imikuku, ntihagire ico birya cank’ amazi binywa;" 
Jonah3:8 arikw abantu ni bambare amagunira, n’ibitunzwe babiyapfuke, baheze bambaze Imana bakobeje, kandi bahindukire, umuntu wese areke inzira yiwe mbi, bareke n’umuryano uri muri bo." 
Jonah3:9 Nta wubizi: kumbure Imana yohindukira, ikīgarura, ikareka uburake bgayo bg’inkazi, ntiduhone." 
Jonah3:10 Maz’ Imana ibona ibikorwa vyabo, ingene bahindukiye, bakareka inzira yabo mbi; nukw Imana irīgarura ngo ntibatēze ivyago yari yabagereye, ntiyabibatēza." 
Jonah4:1 Arikw ivyo bishavuza Yona cane, araraka." 
Jonah4:2 Asenga Uhoraho, ati Mbega, Uhoraho, si co navuze nkiri mu gihugu cacu? Ni co catuma nshōka mpungira i Tarushishi; kuko namenye k’ur’ Imana y’inyabuntu, yuzuye imbabazi, iteba kuraka, igira ikigongwe cinshi, kandi yigarura ngo ntizane ikibi." 
Jonah4:3 None rero, Uhoraho, ndakwinginze, pfuma unyica, kuko gupfa kundutiye kubaho." 
Jonah4:4 Uhoraho aramubaza, ati Mbega k’uratse urtyo, ugize neza?" 
Jonah4:5 Nuko Yona ava mur’ ico gisagara, yicara ku ruhande rwaco rw’i burasirazuba; aba ari ho aca agasago, yicara muri ko mu gatūtu, yiteze kurāba amaherezo yaco." 
Jonah4:6 Maz’ Uhoraho Imana ameza ikibonobono, gitagarara hejuru y’ aho Yona ari, kugira ngo kimubere igitūtu ku mutwe, kimworohereze amagorwa yarimwo. Maze Yona agira umunezero mwinshi kubg’ ico kibonobono." 
Jonah4:7 Arikw Imana igera igikogoshi ngo kirye ico kibonobono; buca cākabiranye. 
Jonah4:8 Maz’ izuba rirashe, Imana igera umuyaga w’indugumba, ng’ uve i burasirazuba; izuba rinaga Yona mu mutwe, bituma ahinduka urusogosogo, yisabira gupfa, ati Gupfa vyondutira kubaho." 
Jonah4:9 Maz’ Imana ibaza Yona, iti Mbega k’urakijwe urtyo n’ ico kibonobono, ugize neza? Arayishura, ati Ngize neza kugira uburake, mbere bgonyica." 
Jonah4:10 Uhoraho aramubaza, ati K’ ugiriye ikibabarwe ico kibonobono, utākoreye kand’ utāmejeje, cameze ijoro rimwe, ku rindi kikūma," 
Jonah4:11 none jewe sinari nkwiye kugirira ikibabarwe Ninewe, ico gisagara kinini, kirimw’ abantu ibihumbi ijana na mirongwibiri basāga, batazi gutandukanya ukuryo n’ukumoso; hakabamwo n’ibitunzwe vyinshi?" 
Micah1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Mika w’i Moresheti, ku ngoma ya Yotamu no ku ya Ahazi no ku ya Hezekiya, abami b’i Buyuda, amajambo y’ivyo yeretswe kuri Samariya n’i Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:2 Ni mwumve, mwa moko yose mwe; tega amatwi nawe wa si, n’ibiri muri wewe vyose! Umwami Uhoraho n’abe icagiriza canyu, Umwami ari mu rusengero rwiwe rwera." 
Micah1:3 Kukw ehe rāba, Uhoraho ahagurutse ava i we, agira amanuke, atambagire ku mpinga z’imisozi yo mw isi." 
Micah1:4 Imisozi izoshongera musi yiwe, n’imyonga isaduke, bibe nk’ishashara ir’ imbere y’umuriro, canke nk’amazi arindimuka ku gatembge." 
Micah1:5 Ivyo vyose vyatewe n’igicumuro ca Yakobo, n’ivyaha vy’inzu ya Isirayeli. Non’ igicumuro ca Yakobo n’iki? Mbega s’i Samariya? Kand’ ibitabo vyatabge i Buyuda n’ibiki? S’i Yerusalemu?"
