Micah1:6 Ni co gituma igisagara c’i Samariya nzogihindura nk’ikigūngūzi c’amabuye co mu ndimiro, habe aho gutera imizabibu; kand’ amabuye yaho nzoyahondoganiriza mu mwonga, n’amatanguriro y’amazu yaho nzoyaserura ahabona." 
Micah1:7 Ibishushanyo vyaho vyose bibajwe bizojanjagurwa bicike ubunywenywe, n’impēra zaho zose z’ivy’ isoni nke zizoturirwa n’umuriro, kand’ ibigirwamana vyaho vyose nzobihonnya; kuko habirundanije ar’ impēra z’ubumaraya, kandi bizosubira kuba impēra nyene za maraya wundi." 
Micah1:8 Kubg’ ivyo nzorira mboroge, ngende nambaye ubusa, ata n’ inkweto: nzorira nk’imbgebge, mboroge nk’ igisīga citwa imbuni." 
Micah1:9 Kuk’ uruguma rwaho rutazovūrika: mbere rwashitse n’i Buyuda; rushika kw irembo ry’ abantu banje, mbere rurinda rushika n’i Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:10 Ntimukabikerukirize i Gati, ntimuzirukanye ngo murire; i Beti‐Leyafura abe ari ho mwikumbagariza mu mukungugu." 
Micah1:11 Enda vayo wambaye ubusa utēterewe, wewe uba i Shafiri; ūba i Zanani ntaruha asokoroka; i Beti‐Ezeli hazorandurwa, hakūrwe ku matanguriro yaho." 
Micah1:12 Ūba i Maroti yiteganye ivyiza umutima uhagaze: kukw ivyago vyamanutse bivuye k’Uhoraho, bigashika kw irembo ry’i Yerusalemu." 
Micah1:13 Yemwe ababa i Lakishi, muhambīrire umukogote kw ifarasi inyaruka: ni mwebge mwabanje gucumuza umukobga w’i Siyoni; kukw ibicumuro vy’Abisirayeli vyabonetse kuri mwebge." 
Micah1:14 Ni co gituma uzoha Moresheti‐Gati ivyo gucancabura: amazu ya Akizibu azoyangārira abami b’Abisirayeli. 
Micah1:15 Namwe muba i Maresha nzobarungikira ūzobanesha; ubgiza bg’ Abisirayeli buzoshika no muri Adulamu. 
Micah1:16 Imoshe inkomvorera, wiharanguze, kubg’ abana bawe wakunda; ongeranya ubuhanza bgawe, bube nk’ubg’ ikinyakabaka; kuko wabasahuwe, bakajanwa ar’ inyagano." 
Micah2:1 Bazobona ibara, abīgerera ivyo kugabitanya, bakīgīra inama zo gukora ibibi bari ku mariri yabo; bgāca bakabikora, kuko bibashobokeye!" 
Micah2:2 Bifuza amatongo bakayanyaga, n’amazu bakayikumirako; bagahahaza umuntu n’abo mu nzu yiwe, mber’ umuntu bamuhahazanya n’ishamvu yiwe." 
Micah2:3 Nuko rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Rāba, ivyo nanje nigereye n’icago nzotēza uyu muryango; kandi ntimuzocigobotora mu mazosi, canke ngo mugende muraritse agatwe; kuko kizoba ar’ igihe kibi." 
Micah2:4 Uwo musi muzoba iciro ry’imigani, mucure intimba, muti Biracitse! Turageseye! Umugabane w’ubgoko bgacu yawuhaye abandi, arawutunyaze! Amatongo yacu yayagabanganije abanyazi!" 
Micah2:5 Ni co gituma mw ikoraniro ry’Uhoraho utazobona uwo kugeresha ishamvu umugozi. 
Micah2:6 Bavuga, ngo Ntimukavugishwe! Bati Ntihaze hagire abavugishwa ben’ ivyo! Yamar’ ibimāramāza ntibizovaho." 
Micah2:7 Yemwe ab’ inzu ya Yakobo, vyoshoboka kuvugwa, ngo Mbega Mpwemu w’Uhoraho yoba ikirandamuke? Ugira ngw ivyo yobikora? Mbeg’ amajambo yanje ntafitiye ikimazi ūgenda atunganye?" 
Micah2:8 Ariko mur’ ibi bihe abantu banje mumpagurukiye nk’abansi: abagenda ata co bīnona, batagomba intambara, mubakiza imitamana basēsa hejuru y’izindi." 
Micah2:9 Abagore bo mu bantu banje mubirukana mu mazu yabo bakunda; abana babo bato icubahiro nabahaye mwakibakūyeko gushitsa ibihe bidashira. 
Micah2:10 Ni muhaguruke, mugende; kukw aha atar’ uburuhukiro bganyu, kubg’ ibihumanya bizana gutikira kw’agahebuza." 
Micah2:11 Ereg’ umuntu agendana impwemu y’ ikinyoma, akabesha, ati Nkuboneye vino n’ibinyobga; ni we yoba umuvugishwa kur’ ubu bgoko!" 
Micah2:12 Ewe Yakobo! Sinzobura gukoraniriza abawe bose hamwe, kandi sinzobura kwegeranya amasigarira y’Abisirayeli; nzobakumakumira hamwe nk’intama z’i Bosira; bazohūrīra nk’umukuku uri mwinshi mu canya cawo." 
Micah2:13 Ūgenda arabacīra inzira yadūze imbere yabo: baramennye, baca mw irembo, barifyuka inyuma: umwami wabo yabagiye imbere, Uhoraho ni we yabarōngōra." 
Micah3:1 Maze ndavuga, nti Ni mwumve se ndabinginze, yemwe bakuru bo mu ba Yakobo, namwe abaganza bo mu b’inzu ya Isirayeli: mbega si mwebge mwari mukwiye kumenya imanza ziroranye?" 
Micah3:2 Yemwe abanka ivyiza mugakunda ibibi; abantu banje mukaborosorako urukoba rwabo, mugaharura inyama ku magufa yabo;" 
Micah3:3 kandi mukarya inyama z’abantu banje, mukababāgak’ urukoba, mukabajanjagura amagufa, mukabatimbagura nk’izo gushira mu nzīhebe, nk’inyama zo gushira mu nkono!" 
Micah3:4 Maze namwe har’ igihe muzotakambira Uhoraho, ntabishure, mber’ azobahisha mu nyonga hiwe ico gihe, nk’uko namwe mwagize nabi mu vyo mwakoze." 
Micah3:5 Ku vy’abavugishwa bazimiza abantu banje, bagasemerera, bati N’amahoro, iyo bagize ico babugunyīra, arik’ ūtagize ico ashira mu kanwa kabo bitegura kumurwanya; ibi ni vyo Uhoraho avuga kuri bo," 
Micah3:6 ati Kubg’ ivyo hazobabera ijoro, mwoye kugira ico mwerekwa, kandi hazobabera umwiza, mwoye kugira ico muragura; kand’ izuba rizodoberera kur’ abo bavugishwa, buzobazingirakw ināni ku murango." 
Micah3:7 Abamenyi bazotētērwa, n’abapfumu bamāramāre; mbere bose bazojorerwa, kukw ata co bishuwe kivuye ku Mana." 
Micah3:8 Ariko jeho nuzuye ubushobozi n’ ukuroranya n’inkomezi, mbihawe na Mpwemu w’Uhoraho, kugira ngo mmenyeshe Yakobo igicumuro ciwe, Isirayeli ndamumenyeshe icaha ciwe." 
Micah3:9 Ni mwumve se ndabinginze, yemwe bakuru bo mu b’inzu ya Yakobo, namwe abaganza bo mu b’inzu ya Isirayeli, mwebge abazinukwa imanza ziroranye, mukagoreka ivyari bibereye vyose;" 
Micah3:10 abubakisha Siyoni amaraso muvishije, n’i Yerusalemu mukahubakisha ibigabitanyo!" 
Micah3:11 Abakuru baho baca imanza kubg’ ingurire, n’abaherezi baho bigishiriza ingero, n’abavugishwa baho baragurira kubona ingemu: yamara bisunga Uhoraho, bakavuga, bati Mbeg’ Uhoraho ntari muri twebge? bat’ Erega nta cago kizodushikako." 
Micah3:12 Nuko ni co gituma Siyoni hazohinduka ubusīze kubganyu, n’i Yerusalemu hahinduke ibirundo vy’amasakamburira, n’umurwa wubatswekw iyi ngoro uhinduke nk’ ikibira kiri ku mpinga y’umusozi." 
Micah4:1 Mu misi y’iherezo umurwa wubatswekw ingoro y’Uhoraho uzotsimbatara ku mpinga y’umusozi, ushirwe hejuru y’ iyindi mirambi; kand’ amoko azosendanisha aja kuri wo." 
Micah4:2 Amahanga menshi azojayo, abarirane, ati Ni muze tudūge, tuje ku murwa w’Uhoraho, mk ngoro y’Imana ya Yakobo, kugira ngw itwigishe ivy’ inzira zayo, natwe tuzigenderemwo; kukw i Siyoni ari ho hazova ivyagezwe, n’i Yerusalemu hakava ijambo ry’Uhoraho." 
Micah4:3 Azocira imanza amoko menshi, ahane amahanga akomeye ya kure; inkota zabo bazozivunjavunja bazicuremw’ amasuka, n’amacumu bazoyavunjavunja bayakūremw’ inkero; nta hanga rizobangurira irindi hanga inkota, kandi ntibazokwiga kurwana ukundi." 
Micah4:4 Arik’ umuntu wese azokwībēra musi y’umuzabibu wiwe no musi y’umusukoni wiwe; kandi nta wuzobakanga: kukw akanwa k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari ko kabivuze. 
Micah4:5 Kukw ayandi mahanga yose azogenda, ihanga ryose rigendere mw izina ry’imana yaryo, ariko tweho tuzogendera mw izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yacu gushitsa ibihe bitazoshira." 
Micah4:6 Kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzokoraniriza hamwe abacumbagira, nkumakume abasanzaye, n’abo nababaje;" 
Micah4:7 kand’ abacumbagira nzobasigazaho babe amasigarira, n’abari baraciwe mbahindure ihanga rikomeye; maze jewe Uhoraho nzobaganza ndi ku murwa Siyoni, uhereye aho ugashitsa ibihe bidashira." 
Micah4:8 Nawe, mutara wo kurābirak’ umukuku, umusozi w’umukobga w’i Siyoni, ya nganji izoza kuri wewe: imwe ya mbere izokugarukako, bga bgami bg’umukobga w’i Yerusalemu." 
Micah4:9 None se n’iki gituma uvuza induru? Mbega nta mwami ari muri wewe? Canke se umujanama wawe yapfuye, kw ibise bigufashe nk’umugore aramutswe?" 
Micah4:10 Ribga, unihe, ewe mukobga w’i Siyoni, nk’umugore aramutswe; kuk’ ugira ng’ uve mu gisagara, ube mu gahinga, mber’ uzoruha ushike n’i Babuloni: iyo ni ho uzorokorerwa; iyo ni ho Uhoraho azogucungurira, agukūre mu maboko y’abansi bawe." 
Micah4:11 Ubu amahanga menshi akoraniye kugutera, aravuga, ati Siyoni ni hahumanywe, amaso yacu avyibonere!" 
Micah4:12 Ariko ntibazi ivyiyumviro vy’Uhoraho, canke ngo batahure imigabo yiwe, yuko yabakoranirije hamwe nk’imikama irunze ku mbuga." 
Micah4:13 Va hasi uhūre, ewe mukobga w’i Siyoni! Kukw ihembe ryawe nzorihindura icuma, n’inzāra zo ku binono vyawe nzozihindura imiringa; kand’ uzojonjanga amahanga menshi; iminyago wabanyaze uzoyigira inyegu y’Uhoraho, n’ibintu vyabo ubigire inyegu ya Nyen’ isi yose." 
Micah5:1 Rinda ushikame, wa boma we! Kuko badutanze irya n’ino: umucamanza w’Abisirayeli bazomukubita inkoni kw itama." 
Micah5:2 Ariko wewe, Betelehemu Efurata, nah’ ur’ inkehwa mu bihumbi vy’i Buyuda, muri wewe hazomviramw’ ūzoba segaba mu Bisirayeli; amamo yiwe yahereye kera hose, ibihe n’ibindi." 
Micah5:3 Ni co gituma azobagabura mu bansi, gushitsa ah’ ūramutswe azovyarira: ni ho amasigarira yo mu bavukana na we azogaruka mu Bisirayeli." 
Micah5:4 Azohagarara, aragire umukuku wiwe mu nkomezi z’Uhoraho, no mu cubahiro c’ izina ry’Uhoraho Imana yiwe: kandi bazokwībērah’ umugaramango; kukw ico gihe ubukuru bgiwe buzoshika ku mpera z’isi." 
Micah5:5 Kand’ uwo muntu azoba amahoro yacu. Umwashuri ni yaza mu gihugu cacu, akadusiribangira ingoro, tuzomugomorera abungere ndwi, n’abaganwa munani." 
Micah5:6 Kand’ igihugu ca Ashuri bazokiririkisha inkota, bo n’igihugu ca Nimurodi uhereye ku mbibe zaco. Nukw azodukiza Umwashuri, ni yaza mu gihugu cacu, akadukandagirira mu rubibe." 
Micah5:7 Kand’ amasigarira ya Yakobo azoba mu moko menshi ababere nk’ikime kivuye k’Uhoraho, nk’urume rutonze ku bgatsi, bitororēra umuntu, canke ngo bitenyenyere abantu." 
Micah5:8 Kand’ amasigarira ya Yakobo azoba mu mahanga no mu moko menshi nk’intambge iri mu bikōko vyo mu kibira, canke nk’umugunza wayo uri mu mikuku y’intama: iyo uziciyemwo, urazinyukanyuka, ukazitabagura, ata wo kuzikiza." 
Micah5:9 Ukuboko kwawe n’ukubangurire abarwanizi bawe, kand’ abansi bawe bose ni barandurwe." 
Micah5:10 Maz’ ico gihe, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzorandura muri wewe amafarasi, mvungavunge imikogote yawe y’intambara;" 
Micah5:11 kandi nzorandura ibisagara vyo mu gihugu cawe, mpomvagurire hasi amaboma yawe yose;" 
Micah5:12 nzoshikura ubupfumu mu kuboko kwawe, kandi ntuzoba ukigira abaragura." 
Micah5:13 Nzorandura muri wewe ibishushanyo vyawe bibājwe, n’ibigirwamana vyawe vy’ inkingi; ntuzokwongera gusenga ivyakozwe n’amaboko yawe." 
Micah5:14 Kandi nzoshingūra muri wewe ibitabo vyawe watabiye Ashera, mponnye ibisagara vyawe." 
Micah5:15 Kandi nzokwīhōra amahanga atumvira, nsuguriwe, ndatse." 
Micah6:1 Enda ni mwumve ico Uhoraho avuga, ati Va hasi, ubūranire imbere y’imisozi, uturambi ni twumve ijwi ryawe." 
Micah6:2 Yemwe misozi, namwe matanguriro y’isi yahamye, ni mwumve ukubūrana kw’Uhoraho; kuk’ Uhoraho afitaniye imibūrano n’abantu biwe, kand’ agira abūrane n’Abisirayeli." 
Micah6:3 Yemwe bantu banje, nabakoreye iki? Canke nabagoje iki? Ni mukimbarire." 
Micah6:4 Ko nabadūganye nkabakūra mu gihugu ca Egiputa, nkabacungura nkabakūra mu nzu y’ubuja, nkarungika Mose na Aroni na Miriyamu kugira ngo babarōngōre." 
Micah6:5 Yemwe bantu banje, enda ni mwibuke imigabo Balaki umwami w’i Mowabu yīgīriye, n’ico Balamu mwene Beyori yamwishuye; mwibuke n’ivyabaye uhereye i Shitimu ukageza i Gilugali, kugira ngo mumenye ivy’ ubugororotsi nakoze, jewe Uhoraho." 
Micah6:6 Mbega norengukana iki imbere y’Uhoraho, nkūnama imbere y’ Imana isumba vyose? None nomurenguka imbere njanye ibimazi vyoshejwe, n’inyana zimaze umwaka?" 
Micah6:7 Mbeg’ Uhoraho yohimbarwa n’amapfizi y’intama ibihumbi, cank’ inzūzi z’amavuta ya elayo ibihumbi cumi? Notanga imfura yanje ku gicumuro canje, imbuto y’umubiri wanje nkayitanga ku caha c’umutima wanje?" 
Micah6:8 Ko yakweretse iciza ic’ ari co, ga yewe muntu: mbega har’ ikindi Uhoraho akugombako, atar’ ugukora ibiroranye, no gukunda kugira imbabazi, no kugendana n’Imana yawe wicishije bugufi?" 
Micah6:9 Ijwi ry’Uhoraho rirasemerera, ribarira igisagara — kand’ umunyabgenge azokwubaha izina ryiwe — riti Ni wumve wa hanga we, nawe koraniro ryo mu gisagara!" 
Micah6:10 Mbega nokwirengagiza itunga ryandurutse mu vyaha riri mu mazu y’abanyakibi, cank’ ingero zitūvya, zivumwa?" 
Micah6:11 Abafise umunzane ubesha, n’isaho irimw’ ibigeresho bihendana, mbega nobīta abatunganye?" 
Micah6:12 Kukw abatunzi baho buzuye umuryano, n’abahaba bavuga ibinyoma, indimi zo mu kanwa kabo zirahendana." 
Micah6:13 Ni co gituma nzogukubita nkagusāvya, nkugeseze nguhōye ivyaha vyawe." 
Micah6:14 Uzorya ntuhage, uhorane ikigoyi mu nda; ivyo uzonyuruza ntuzobikiza, kandi n’ivyo wokijije nzobigaburira inkota." 
Micah6:15 Uzobiba, ariko ntuzokwimbura; uzokānya elayo, ariko ntuzokwisīga amavuta yayo; ukānye n’imizabibu, ariko ntuzonywa vino yayo." 
Micah6:16 Kukw amabgirizwa ya Omuri acitonderwa, bo n’ivyakozwe n’inzu ya Ahabu vyose, mugakomeza kugendera mu nama zabo; ni co gituma nguhindura umusaka, n’abakubamwo bakaba abo kuvuzwakw agahwa; kandi muzogībgako n’igitutsi batuka abantu banje." 
Micah7:1 Mbonye ibara! Kuko mmeze nk’igihe c’iyerūra ry’amatunda yo mu ci, nk’uduhūmbga two mu ruzabibu: ata n’agahando ko kurya; umutima wanje wifuza agasukoni k’isega." 
Micah7:2 Abubaha Imana baraherengeteye mw isi, kandi mu bantu nta n’umwe atunganye: bose babundira kuvisha amaraso, umuntu wese ahīga mugenzi we ngw amute mu ruriba." 
Micah7:3 Amaboko yabo yamogoreye gukora ibibi; umuganwa ari n’ivyo yāka, umucamanza aca ingurire, ūhambaye yenyaguza ivyifuzo bibi vyo mu mutima wiwe: uko ni ko babijishira hamwe." 
Micah7:4 Ūrusha abandi kumera neza ameze nk’umukere, kand’ ūbaye ūrusha abandi kugororoka n’insobane kurusha uruzitiro rw’amahwa: umusi wavuzwe n’abashibamyi bawe urashitse, ari wo wo guhanwa kwawe; kandi muzogwa mu gahundwe." 
Micah7:5 Ntimukizigire umukunzi, ntimukishimire incuti; ufate n’akanwa kawe no ku mugore wawe mupfumbatirana." 
Micah7:6 Kuk’ umuhungu akēngēra se, umukobga agahagurukira nyina, umukazana agahagurukira inabukwe; kand’ abansi b’umuntu bakaba abo mu rugo rwiwe." 
Micah7:7 Ariko jeho nzohanga amaso Uhoraho; nzokwitega Imana y’ agakiza kanje: Imana yanje izonyumva. 
Micah7:8 Ewe mwansi wanje, nta co unyitamba hejuru! Ni natemba nzovyuka, ni nicara mu mwiza Uhoraho azombera umuco." 
Micah7:9 Nzokwihanganira ubushangashirwe bg’Uhoraho, kuko namugararije, gushitsa ah’ azombūranira, akantsindira. Azonsohokana anshikane mu muco, nanje nzokwitegereza ukugororoka kwiwe." 
Micah7:10 Maz’ umwansi wanje azobirāba, yicwe n’isoni, uwahora ambgira, at’ Uhoraho Imana yawe iri hehe? Amaso yanje azomwibonera, igihe azosiribangwa nk’ ivyondo vyo mu nzira." 
Micah7:11 Umusi wo gusubira kwubaka inzitiro zawe uraje! Kur’ uwo musi urugabano rwawe ruzokwigizwayo, rushirwe kure." 
Micah7:12 Kur’ uwo musi bazoza kuri wewe bavuye muri Ashuri no mu bisagara vyo muri Egiputa, uhereye muri Egiputa ugashitsa kuri rwa Ruzi, uhereye ku kiyaga ugashitsa ku kindi, uhereye ku musozi ugashitsa ku wundi." 
Micah7:13 Yamar’ isi izohinduka umusaka, kubg’ abayibako, bahōwe ivy’ ibikorwa vyabo vyāmuje." 
Micah7:14 Ragiza abantu bawe inyobozo yawe, ari bo mukuku wawe wīzīziye, bībēra ukwabo mu kibira co hagati kuri Karumeli: barishe i Bashani n’i Gileyadi, nko mu gihe ca kera." 
Micah7:15 Nzokwereka ibitangaza, nk’ivyo mu gihe wava mu gihugu ca Egiputa." 
Micah7:16 Amahanga azobibona amāramāre, nah’ ubushobozi bgayo bgari bginshi; bīfate ku munwa, amatwi yabo azibe." 
Micah7:17 Bazorigata umukungugu nk’inzoka, basokoroke mu binyegero vyabo nk’ivyikwega hasi, bahinda agashitsi; bazoza k’Uhoraho Imana yacu batinya, bafise ubgoba." 
Micah7:18 N’iyihe Mana ihwanye nawe, iharira ibigabitanyo, ikīrengagiza igicumuro c’amasigarira y’abo yīzīziye? Ntuhorana uburake imisi yose, kuk’ uhimbarwa no kugira imbabazi." 
Micah7:19 Uzoduhindukirira utugirire ikigongwe; uzosiribangira ibigabitanyo vyacu musi y’ ibirenge vyawe: kand’ uzoterera ivyaha vyacu vyose i bgina mu kiyaga. 
Micah7:20 Ukuri kwawe uzogushitsa kuri Yakobo, n’ikigongwe kuri Aburahamu, ari vyo nyene warahiye ba sogokuruza uhereye mu bihe vya kera." 
Nahum1:1 Imbūri yo kuri Ninewe. Igitabo c’ivyo Nahumu Umwelekoshi yeretswe. 
Nahum1:2 Uhoraho n’Imana ifūha kandi ni we ahōra; Uhoraho arahōra kandi yuzuye uburake; Uhoraho yihōra abarwanizi biwe, kand’ abansi biwe ababīkira uburake." 
Nahum1:3 Uhoraho ateba kuraka, kand’ afise ububasha bginshi, ntatsindanishiriza na gatoya abo gutsindwa; inzira y’Uhoraho ica mu gashururu no mu kirura, kand’ ibicu ni wo mukungugu utumurwa n’ibirenge vyiwe." 
Nahum1:4 Akankamira ikiyaga akagikamya, agakamya n’ inzūzi zose; Bashani na Karumeli harahondobereye, n’amashurwe y’i Lebanoni arahondobereye." 
Nahum1:5 Imisozi ishizwe mu gatengo na we, n’uturambi turashonze; isi isebagizwa imbere yiwe, isi n’abayibako bose." 
Nahum1:6 Ni nde yoshobora guhagarara imbere y’ ubushangashirwe bgiwe? Kandi ni nde yoshobora kwihanganira uburake bgiwe bukaze? Uburake bgiwe busukwa nk’umuriro, kandi ni we amenagura ibitandara." 
Nahum1:7 Uhoraho ni mwiza, n’ubuhungiro bgo ku musi w’amagorwa; kand’ arazi abamwizigira." 
Nahum1:8 Arikw abarwanizi biwe azotuma batwarwa n’uruzi rusendanisha, kand’ abansi biwe azobakinagiza abashitse mu mwiza." 
Nahum1:9 Ivyo muja imigabo k’Uhoraho n’ibiki? Azobageseza rwose: ubgo buyobe ntibuzorinda guhaguruka ubugira kabiri. 
Nahum1:10 Kuko naho bomera nk’amahwa azitanye, canke bagahindurwa iveve n’inyobga, bazotōngōrwa rwose nk’ibirararara vyumye." 
Nahum1:11 Muri wewe haturutse uwagiye imigabo mibi k’Uhoraho, aja inama y’ibibi." 
Nahum1:12 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Naho bogira inkomezi nyinshi, bagatako bakaba benshi, bazogesezwa, n’uyo na we azokamangana. Ariko weho naho nakubabaje, sinzosubira kukubabaza ukundi." 
Nahum1:13 Mber’ ubu ngira mvune ingōgo yiwe ikuveko, mvutagure n’imvuto zikuboshe." 
Nahum1:14 Kand’ Uhoraho yarashinze ivyawe, ngo Nta bandi b’izina ryawe bazosubira gutoha; nzohenebereza igishushanyo cabājwe n’igishushanyo cavugutiwe mu nkero mu nzu y’ibigirwamana vyawe; nzokwimbira icobo co kuguhambamwo, kuk’ ugayitse." 
Nahum1:15 Rāba ku misozi ibirenge vy’ ūzanye inkuru nziza, akāmāmaza ivy’ amahoro! Buyuda we, ni witondere imisi mikuru yawe, ushitse amasezerano yawe: kuk’ umunyakibi atazosubira guca hagati muri wewe: arahenebereye rwose." 
Nahum2:1 Ūjonjanga arakudūgiye: mera magabo ku ruzitiro rw’amabuye, shibama mu nzira, kenyera zigume, iyungunganye uk’ ushoboye kwose!" 
Nahum2:2 Kuk’ Uhoraho agarukanye icubahiro c’aba Yakobo, nk’icubahiro c’Abisirayeli; kukw abasahuzi babasahuye, bagahanyagura amashami y’imizabibu yabo." 
Nahum2:3 Inkinzo z’abahizi biwe ziratukura, intōre ziwe zambaye iz’ agahama: ivyuma vy’imikogote yiwe y’intambara birakayangana ku musi wo kwitegura kwiwe, amacumu arikw aranyugutwa." 
Nahum2:4 Imikogote y’intambara igenda akābushūngwe mu mayira, igenda iranyuranwa mu nzira z’ibihamo; uyibonye wogira ngo n’imuri, yidunya nk’umuravyo." 
Nahum2:5 Ahamagara abahizi biwe, ariko bagenda baratsitara; bihutira kuja ku ruzitiro rwaho rw’amabuye, kandi bakitegura kwirwanira." 
Nahum2:6 Imigomero y’inzūzi iragomorowe, n’ingoro y’umwami irasenyeranye." 
Nahum2:7 Umwamikazi yambitswe ubusa, ajanywe ar’ inyagano; incoreke ziwe zicura intimba nk’ inuma, zikagenda zirīshishitira." 
Nahum2:8 Ninewe hameze nk’ikidengeri c’amazi gisenzwe: barasemerera, bati Hagarara, hagarara! ariko ntihagira ūhindukira." 
Nahum2:9 Ni musahure amafeza, musahure n’amazahabu, kukw itunga ririho ritimirije gushira, bo n’isinzi ry’ ibintu vyose vy’imbombovu bihimbaye." 
Nahum2:10 Hasigaye ubusa, barahogeje, bahasize ar’ umusaka; umutima wahavuyemwo, amavi arakomangana, ukwihebura kuhaciye umugongo, mu maso ha bose harajonjogoye." 
Nahum2:11 Urwobo rw’intambge rwabaye iki, n’irīro ry’imigunza, ah’ intambge n’ingore yayo n’ivyana vyazo vyatahukira, ata co vyicura?" 
Nahum2:12 Ereg’ intambge yahora itabagura ivyo guhimvya ivyana vyayo, ikanigira ingore zayo, ikuzuza amasenga yayo ivyo yishe, n’ivyobo vyayo ivyo yasahuye." 
Nahum2:13 Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, kandi nzoturira imikogote yawe y’intambara, itūmūke, kand’ inkota izoririka imigunza yawe y’intambge; nzokūrah’ ugusahura kwawe kw isi, kand’ ijwi ry’ intumwa zawe ntirizokwongera kwumvikana ukundi." 
Nahum3:1 Igisagara kivisha amaraso kirakabona ibara! Cuzuye ibinyoma n’isahu; nta ho gisība kunyaga. 
Nahum3:2 Humvikana inyobozo, n’uguhinda kw’amakurudumu abomborana, n’imirindi y’amafarasi agenda yiginagura, n’uguhinda kw’imikogote y’intambara isimbagurika;" 
Nahum3:3 uwisuka mu rugamba ari kw ifarasi, inkota ziravya indimi, amacumu aca ibibatsi, abishwe n’indiri, har’ ibirundo vy’imirambararo, imivyimba ntiyoharūrika, ingabo zitsitara ku mivyimba yabo!" 
Nahum3:4 Ivyo vyose vyatewe n’ubusambanyi burenze urugero bga maraya ateye igomwe, umurozikazi w’umuhanga, aresha amahanga kubg’ ubusambanyi bgiwe, n’imiryango kubg’ uburozi bgiwe." 
Nahum3:5 Ehe nzohigūra nawe, ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize; nzogukūrakw impuzu, mfate ku musozo ndenze ku mutwe wawe, nereke amahanga ubgambure bgawe, n’ibihugu ndavyereke ibiteye isoni vyawe," 
Nahum3:6 ngutere ivyatsi, nguhindure agashinyo, nkugire akabarore." 
Nahum3:7 Nukw abazokurāba bose bazoguhunga, bati Ninewe harageseye! Ni nde azoharirira? Nokūra hehe abo kukwirura?" 
Nahum3:8 Mbega har’ ico urusha No‐Amona, hāba hagati y’inzūzi, amazi akahubakira nk’urugo, kand’ ikiyaga kikahahindukira uruzitiro?" 
Nahum3:9 Isinzi ry’Abanyetiyopiya n’ Abanyegiputa ni bo bār’ inkomezi zaho; Abaputi n’Abalubimu bār’ abatabazi baho. 
Nahum3:10 Ariko hāranyazwe, hajanwa ar’ inyagano; n’ibibondo vyaho vyāhondaguriwe mu mayirabiri yose: n’abanyacubahiro baho bābagabanganishije ubupfindo, n’abahambaye baho bābabohesheje iminyororo." 
Nahum3:11 Nawe n’uko, uzoborerwa, uje kwinyegeza; kand’ uzokwironderera ubuhungiro kubg’ abansi." 
Nahum3:12 Amaboma yawe yose azoba nk’ibiti vy’imisukoni, birikw insukoni z’isega: iyo binyiganyigijwe zigahungurukira mu kanwa k’ umuryi." 
Nahum3:13 Eh’ abantu bawe bari muri wewe bameze bga bagore; amarembo y’igihugu cawe yugururiwe abansi bawe: umuriro watōngōye imyugariro yawe. 
Nahum3:14 Enda ni wivomere amazi azomara igihe uzoba wugarijwe; amaboma yawe n’uyakomeze; ja mw ibumba, ukāte urwondo; fata iforoma ry’amatafari." 
Nahum3:15 Aho ni houmuriro uzogutōngōrera; uzotikizwa n’inkota, ikurye nk’ukw intoteza zirya. Enda ni wigwize nk’intoteza, n’ugwire nk’inzige!" 
Nahum3:16 Abadandaza bawe wabagwijije kurusha inyenyeri zo kw ijuru; bameze nk’inzige zizingurura amababa yazo, zikigurukira!" 
Nahum3:17 Abagaba bawe bameze nk’inzige, n’ abagabisha bawe bameze nk’intoteza zāraraye ku mirombero mu kabeho k’umugoroba, maz’ izuba ryarasa zikigurukira, kandi nta wuba akimenya aho zaroye." 
Nahum3:18 Ewe kuntu abungere bawe bisinziriye, ga mwami wa Ashuri; abanyacubahiro bawe bakiruhukira! Abantu bawe bāsābagiriye ku misozi, kandi nta wo kubegeranya." 
Nahum3:19 Uruguma rwawe nta kōyōkwe rugira; igikomere cawe ntikizokira: abumvise inkuru zawe bose bakubita amashi ku yandi; mbega ni nde utāhora ugirira nabi? 
Habakkuk1:1 Imbūri uwavugishwa n’Imana Habakuki yeretswe. 
Habakkuk1:2 Uhoraho we, nzogeza ryari kugutakambira, ntunyumve? Kandi nkuborogera kubg’ umuryano uriho, nawe ntuwunkize?" 
Habakkuk1:3 N’iki gituma unyereka ibigabitanyo, ukitegereza ivy’ inzigo? Kuk’ ubugesera n’umuryano bir’ imbere yanje, hakaba n’imitongano, kandi havyutse n’ibihāri." 
Habakkuk1:4 Ni co gituma amabgirizwa asigaye yāfōrorotse, akaba ata manza ziroranye zikiboneka na mba: kuk’ umunyakibi atangatanze umugororotsi irya n’ino, bigatuma imanza ziboneka zigoramye." 
Habakkuk1:5 Enda ni murābe mu mahanga, muvyitegereze; mutangare, mwumirwe: kuko mu gihe canyu ngira nkore igikorwa mutokwemera naho mwokibarirwa." 
Habakkuk1:6 Kukw ehe rāba, ngira nkakamure Abakaludaya, rya hanga ry’inkazi kandi ry’inkuba, bagenda batera isi iyo iva ikagera, bakikeberezako ingo zitar’ izabo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Abo n’ibirara vy’inkazi, kandi bateye ubgoba: uguhana no gutikiza ni bo bivako." 
Habakkuk1:8 Amafarasi yabo arusha ingwe ubukuba, kand’ arusha ubukazi amabingira agenda ijoro: abagendera ku mafarasi yabo baza bihaya: mber’ abagendera ku mafarasi yabo baza bavuye kure; baguruka nk’inkukuma yihutira ico irotsa." 
Habakkuk1:9 Bose bazanwa n’umuryano; amaso yabo bayahangana igihababu imbere yabo; bakumakuma imbohe nk’ umusenyi. 
Habakkuk1:10 Mbere bacōkōra abami, bagatwenga abaganwa, ibihome vyose barabitwenga gusa, kuko babirundira ibigūngūzi vy’ ivu vyo kwuririrako, bakabinesha." 
Habakkuk1:11 Bagaheza bagahita nk’umuyaga, bagakomeza inzira, ar’ abanyabicumuro; kand’ inkomezi zabo bāzigize imana yabo." 
Habakkuk1:12 Mbega ntiwamyeho uhereye kera hose, Uhoraho Mana yanje, Uwera wanje? Ntituzopfa. Uhoraho, wabashizeho ng’ ubacishe amateka; Gitandara we, wabashiriyeho guhana." 
Habakkuk1:13 Wewe w’inyonga zitunganye zitorāba ikibi, kand’ utoshobora kwitegereza ivy’ inzigo, n’iki gituma none witegereza abaryarukanyi, ukiyihorerera igihe umunyakibi arotsa umuntu amurusha ubugororotsi;" 
Habakkuk1:14 ugahwanya abantu n’amafi yo mu kiyaga, canke n’ivyikwega hasi, bitagira ikibiganza?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Bose babarobesha igera, bakabafatisha urusenga rwabo, bakabegeraniriza mu mukwabu wabo; ni co gituma banezerwa bagahimbarwa." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ni co gituma urusenga rwabo baruha ikimazi, n’ umukwabu wabo bakawosereza imibavu; kukw ari vyo bibahesheje kwidibamira, bigatuma ivyo kurya vyabo bigwira." 
Habakkuk1:17 Mbega none bazohora bacurānura urusenga rwabo, bakāma bica amahanga ata kagongwe?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Nzohagarara nshibamye, nje ku munara wo gushibamako, nkenguze ndābe ico aribumbarire, n’ico ndibumwishure, ku vy’ amaganya yanje." 
Habakkuk2:2 Maz’ Uhoraho aranyishura, at’ Andika ivyo weretswe, uvyandike ku bisate mu nyuguti zisomeka, kugira ng’ ūbisoma anyarutse." 
Habakkuk2:3 Kukw ivyerekanywe bifise igihe vyashingiwe, kandi vyihutira kugishikako, ntibizobesha; naho vyotebagana, ubirorēre, kuko bitazobura kuza, ntibizoteba." 
Habakkuk2:4 Rāba, umutima wiwe urīkakishije, ntutunganye: arik’ umugororotsi azobeshwaho n’ukwizera kwiwe." 
Habakkuk2:5 Kand’ ikindi, abo bantu n’imborerwa, n’abantu bihayagiza, bataragama i wabo; baromoye nk’i kuzimu, bameze nk’urupfu, ntibahāga; ariko biyegeranirizakw amahanga yose, bakikumakumirakw amoko yose." 
Habakkuk2:6 Mbeg’ abo bose ntibazobīvuga, bakabacakw akagani bakīkiriza, bati Bazobona ibara, abakuma ibitar’ ivyabo, bagatako bakīremēka amasahu! Mbega bazogeza ryari?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Mbeg’ abazobarya ntibazobūbīra giturumbuka, n’abazobajegenyura ntibazokwikangura, namwe mugacika inyagano zabo?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Ko mwanyaze amahanga menshi, namwe amasigarira yose y’amoko azobanyaga, abahōye amaraso y’ abantu, n’umuryano igihugu cabonye, bo n’ibisagara n’ababibamwo bose." 
Habakkuk2:9 Azobona ibara, ūronderera inzu yiwe inyungu mbi, kugira ngo yiyarikire icāri ciwe hejuru iyo bigwa, ngw abone gukira ukuboko kw’umunyakibi!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Inzu yawe wayihamagariye gutētērwa, kuko wagesheje amoko menshi, ugacumuza ubugingo bgawe." 
Habakkuk2:11 Kukw ibuye ryo mu yubatse inzu rizosemerera, kand’ umutambikwa wo mu vyayimanitse uzoryishura." 
Habakkuk2:12 Azobona ibara, uwubakisha igisagara amaraso yavishije, akaninaharisha igisagara ibigabitanyo!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Mbega ntibiva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo kw amoko atamishwa n’ibizoturirwa n’umuriro, amahanga akiruhiriza ubusa?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Kuko kumenya icubahiro c’ Uhoraho kuzoba kwuzuye mw isi, nk’ukw amazi abugereye mu kiyaga." 
Habakkuk2:15 Azobona ibara, ūha mugenzi we ibinyobga, na wewe umwongerakw ibituriranije, ukamuboreza, kugira ngo wirābire ubgambure bgiwe!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Utumbaraye ibitētērwa mu gishingo c’icubahiro: enda nywa nawe, wisige ubusa! Igikombe kiri mu kuboko kw’i buryo kw’Uhoraho kizoruha kigushikeko nawe, kand’ ivy’ isoni biteye ishishi bizoba ku cubahiro cawe." 
Habakkuk2:17 Kuk’ umuryano wabaye i Lebanoni uzokwubikizako, n’ukugesera kw’ibikōko kuzogutera ubgoba, uhōwe amaraso y’ abantu, n’umuryano igihugu cabonye, bo n’ibisagara n’ababibamwo bose." 
Habakkuk2:18 Igishushanyo kibājwe kimaze iki, vyotuma umubāji akibāza, cank’ igishushanyo kivugutiwe mu nkero kiragura ibinyoma, vyotuma uwakivugutiye acizigira, akironkera ibigirwamana vy’ibiragi?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Azobona ibara, ūbgira igiti, ati Ni wikangure! akabarira n’ ibuye ry’ikiragi, ati Haguruka! Mbeg’ ivyo vyoragura? Erega vyayagirijwekw izahabu n’ifeza, arikw imbere nta mpwemu bigira na mba." 
Habakkuk2:20 Yamar’ Uhoraho we, ari mu rusengero rwiwe rwera: isi yose n’ihwēkērere imbere yiwe." 
Habakkuk3:1 Isengesho ry’uwavugishwa n’ Imana Habakuki, ryaririmbishwa mw ijwi ryitwa Shigiyonoti." 
Habakkuk3:2 Uhoraho, numvise inkuru zawe, nabonye igikorwa cawe: Ewe Uhoraho, hēmbūra ico gikorwa cawe hagati mur’ iyi myaka, Hagati mur’ iyi myaka ukimenyekanishe; Mu burake wame wibuka kugira akagongwe." 
Habakkuk3:3 Imana yaje ivuye i Temani, Uwera yaje ku musozi Parani.. Ubgiza bgiwe bgakwiye ijuru, Kand’ isi yuzuye ishimwe ryiwe." 
Habakkuk3:4 Gukayangana kwiwe kwari nk’umuco, Ibishwārara vy’umuco vyava mu kuboko kwiwe, Aho ni ho yatwikirira ububasha bgiwe." 
Habakkuk3:5 Ikīza camugendera imbere, Na Kizimire akamuja inyuma." 
Habakkuk3:6 Arahagarara, agera ubunini bg’isi; Arāba igitsure, amahanga agahinda agashitsi; Imisozi y’intahava irasanzara, Uturambi tw’inyame turanyika; Ajana inzira ziwe za kera." 
Habakkuk3:7 Nabonye amahema y’i Kushani ari n’umubabaro, N’ibihuzu vy’amahema yo mu gihugu c’i Midiyani bihinda agashitsi." 
Habakkuk3:8 Mbeg’ Uhoraho, inzūzi ni zo warakiye? Cank’ uburake bgawe bgari ku nzūzi? Ikiyaga ni co wagiriye uburake mbega, Vyotumye ugendera ku mafarasi yawe, No mu mikogote yawe y’intsinzi?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Watekuruye umuheto wawe, Ushira imyampi mu ruge.. Wasatuje isi inzūzi." 
Habakkuk3:10 Imisozi yarakubonye, irasambagirika; Amazi arahondogana: I bgina humvikanisha ijwi ryaho, Hatarika amaboko yaho." 
Habakkuk3:11 Izuba n’ukwezi vyigumiye i wavyo, Kubg’ imyampi yawe yagiye ibishwārara, N’ugukayangana kw’icumu ryawe rica ibibatsi." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wogoze igihugu ushangashiwe, Wasiribanze amahanga uri n’uburake." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wasidukanywe no kuzanira abantu bawe agakiza, No kuzanira agakiza uwo warobanuje amavuta. Wasābije agatwe k’inzu y’ umunyakibi, Urayisangangura ushitsa no mu rukerēro." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wasogotesheje umugabisha w’ ingabo ziwe ibimīto vyawe; Baje kudushwiragiza bameze nk’agashururu; Umengo vyarabahimbara kuyongobeza umugorwa mu mpisho. 
Habakkuk3:15 Ikiyaga wagisiribangishije amafarasi yawe, Bo n’umukuba w’amazi menshi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndavyumvise, amara yanje aradobangana, Iminwa yanje iradegezwa kubg’ iryo iwi; Ikimungu cinjira mu magufa yanje, mpindira agashitsi aho ndi; Nkwiye guhangana n’umusi w’amagorwa nduhutse, Igihe abansi bazotēza ubgoko bgacu ibitero." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nah’ umusukoni utoshurika, Canke n’imizabibu ngw igire ico yama, N’icimburo c’imyelayo kikabura, N’imirima ntiyere indya na mba, N’umukuku ugahenebera mu ruhongore, Ntihabe hakigira n’inka mu rugo:" 
Habakkuk3:18 Na ho nyene jewe nzonezererwa Uhoraho, Mpimbarwe n’Imana y’agakiza kanje." 
Habakkuk3:19 Uhoraho, Umwami, ni we nkomezi zanje; Ni we ahindura ibirenge vyanje nk’ivy’ impongokazi, Kand’ azompa gutambagira ku dutwe tw’imisozi yanje. Vyahawe umukuru w’abaririmvyi: bavugira inanga zanje." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Zefaniya mwene Kushi, Kushi mwene Gedaliya, Gedaliya mwene Amariya, Amariya mwene Hezekiya, ku ngoma ya Yosiya mwene Amoni, umwami w’i Buyuda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Nzokwanzura rwose ibintu vyose biri kw isi, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zephaniah1:3 Nzokwanzura abantu n’amatungo, nzokwanzura ibiguruka mu kirēre n’amafi yo mu kiyaga, n’abanyakibi nzobatega urutsiburira; eka nzorandura abantu bose kw isi, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zephaniah1:4 Nzobangurira ukuboko kwanje Abayuda n’ababa i Yerusalemu bose; nzorandura amasigarira ya Bayali aho hantu, n’izina ry’ibishegu hamwe n’abaherezi;" 
Zephaniah1:5 n’abasenga inyenyeri, ari zo ngabo zo kw ijuru, būriye hejuru ku mazu; n’abasenga bandahira jewe Uhoraho bagatako bakarahira na Milikomu;" 
Zephaniah1:6 n’ abasubiye inyuma bakareka kunkurikira jewe Uhoraho; n’abatigeze kundondera, canke ngo bagire ico bansiguza." 
Zephaniah1:7 N’uhwekerere imbere y’Umwami Uhoraho: kuk’ umusi w’ Uhoraho uri hafi; Uhoraho yiteguye ikimazi, kandi yejeje abatumire biwe." 
Zephaniah1:8 Maze kur’ uwo musi w’ikimazi canje jewe Uhoraho, nzohana abaganwa n’abana b’umwami, n’abambaye imyambaro y’inyamahanga." 
Zephaniah1:9 Kur’ uwo musi nzohana abasimba urwinjiriro rw’urusengero bose, bakuzuza inzu ya shebuja umuryano n’uruhendo." 
Zephaniah1:10 Maze kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho agize, hazokwumvikana induru kw irembo ryitwa iry’ Amafi, n’umuborogo mu gice c’igisagara ca kabiri, n’ugusenyerana gukomeye kuzokwumvikana mu misozi." 
Zephaniah1:11 Ni muboroge, yemwe ababa i Makiteshi, kukw abantu bose b’i Kanani bageseye, n’abagera ifeza ku munzane baranduwe." 
Zephaniah1:12 Maz’ ico gihe, muri Yerusalemu nzohaseranguza imuri, mpane abantu bīrāye nka vino yireretse ku mvūzo, bibgira mu mitima yabo, bat’ Ari ciza ari kibi, Uhoraho nta co azokora." 
Zephaniah1:13 Itunga ryabo rizocika isahu, n’amazu yabo ahinduke imisaka: mbere bazokwubaka amazu, ntibayabemwo, batere n’imizabibu, ntibanywe vino yayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Umusi uhambaye w’Uhoraho uri hafi; uri hafi kand’ urihuta; umusi w’Uhoraho, guhinda kwawo kurumvikana; umuhizi araborogana intuntu." 
Zephaniah1:15 Uwo musi n’umusi w’uburake, n’umusi w’ amagorwa n’amarushwa, n’umusi w’ibitongozi n’imisaka, n’umusi w’umwiza n’ubuzinze ināni, n’ umusi w’ibicu n’umwiza w’umuzitanya," 
Zephaniah1:16 n’umusi wo kwumva inzamba n’akaruru k’abirukira ibisagara vyubakiwe inzitiro z’amabuye n’iminara miremire. 
Zephaniah1:17 Nzotēza ivyago abantu, bitume bagenda nk’impumyi, kuko bancumuyeko jewe Uhoraho; kand’ amaraso yabo azosēswa nk’umukungugu, n’imibiri yabo nk’ibishēshe." 
Zephaniah1:18 Nta feza zabo nta n’izahabu bizoshobora kubakiza ku musi w’uburake bg’Uhoraho; arikw isi yose izomarwa n’umuriro w’ifūhe ryiwe: kukw ababa kw isi bose azobaherengeteza rwose giturumbuka. 
Zephaniah2:1 Ni mukoranire hamwe, mbere ni mukorane, yewe hanga ritagira isoni;" 
Zephaniah2:2 mutaratūmūrirwa kure nk’umuguruka, kand’ uburake bg’Uhoraho bg’inkazi butarabashikako, mbere wa musi w’ uburake bg’Uhoraho utarabashikīra." 
Zephaniah2:3 Murondere Uhoraho, yemwe bagwaneza mwese bo kw isi, bashitsa amabgirizwa yiwe: murondere ubugororotsi, bo n’ukwicisha bugufi; kumbure muzokinjishwa ku musi w’uburake bg’ Uhoraho." 
Zephaniah2:4 Gaza hazohebga, Ashikeloni hahinduke imisaka: abo muri Ashidodi bazokwirukanwa ku murango w’amashōka, na Ekuroni hazorandurwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Bazobona ibara, ababa mu biyaya vyo ku kiyaga, ihanga ry’Abakereti! Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rirakujinjibuye, ewe Kanani, wa gihugu c’Abafilisitiya; azoguhonnya, ntihagire n’ umwe asigara akubamwo." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ibiyaya vyo ku kiyaga bizosigara ar’ uburagiro gusa, har’ ibirāro vy’abungere n’impongore z’imikuku." 
Zephaniah2:7 Kand’ ivyo biyaya bizoba ivy’ amasigarira y’inzu ya Yuda; ni ho bazoragira; bgije biryamire mu mazu yo muri Ashikeloni; kuk’ Uhoraho Imana yabo azobagendera, ngw agarukane abajanywe ar’ inyagano." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ati Numvise ibitutsi vya Mowabu, n’ugucokorana kw’Abamoni, bācokoye abantu banje, bakarya urubibe rwabo bihayagiza." 
Zephaniah2:9 Nuko rero, ndahiye ukubaho kwanje, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, Imana y’Abisirayeli, n’ukuri Mowabu hazoba nk’i Sodomu, n’Abamoni nk’i Gomora, ah’ igisuru ciganziye, habe iyengo ry’imyunyu, hahinduke amatongo ibihe bidashira: amasigarira y’abantu banje azobatera abasahure, mber’ abarokotse bo mw ihanga ryanje bazobatwara." 
Zephaniah2:10 Ivyo ni vyo bazosubirizwa mu nkōko kubg’ ubgibone bgabo, kuko bātuka abantu b’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, bakabihayagizako." 
Zephaniah2:11 Uhoraho azobabera agaterabgoba: kukw azocobogoza ibigirwamana vyose vyo kw isi; maz’ abantu bazomwunamira, umuntu wese ah’ ari, mbere n’ibizinga vyose vyo mu kiyaga vy’abanyamahanga." 
Zephaniah2:12 Namwe Banyetiyopiya n’uko, muzokwicwa n’inkota y’Uhoraho." 
Zephaniah2:13 Kand’ azobangurira ukuboko kwiwe i burārūko, ageseze Ashuri; Ninewe ahahindure amatongo, hume nk’ikigatwa." 
Zephaniah2:14 Amasho azokwigaramangira hagati muri ho, n’ibikōko vyose vyo mw ishamba: inkongori n’ibinyogoto bizokwībēra ku bisapfu vy’amazu yaho: amajwi yavyo azokwumvikanira mu madirisha; mu rwinjiriro rw’imiryango yaho hazoba amasakamburira, kuko yasitaguye amagarwe y’imbaho z’amasederi." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ico ni ca gisagara cihaya, cahora cicaye ata co cinona, kikīyāgira mu mutima, kiti Ni jewe ndiho, nta wundi atari jewe! Ewe kuntu gicitse amatongo, n’ubugaramango bg’ibikōko! Umuntu wese azohaca azohavuzakw agahwa, ahadōdekw agatoke." 
Zephaniah3:1 Uzobona ibara, urya murwa wagararije, wanduye, kand’ uhahaza!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Ntiwumviye ijwi riwubarira, ntiwemeye guhanūrwa, ntiwizigiye Uhoraho, ntiwiyegereje Imana yawo." 
Zephaniah3:3 Abaganwa bo muri wo ni nk’intambge zīvuga; abacamanza bawo ni nk’amabingira agenda ijoro, atagira ico arāza na mba." 
Zephaniah3:4 Abavugishwa bawo n’ibihuruduka kandi n’abaryarukanyi; abaherezi bawo bahumanije ahēra, kandi bishe ivyagezwe ku manyama." 
Zephaniah3:5 Arik’ Uhoraho ari hagati muri wo aragororotse, ntazokora ivyo kugabitanya; uko bukeye aserura ahibonekeza imanza ziwe ziroranye, ntatenzekanya: arikw ikigoryi nta dusoni kigira." 
Zephaniah3:6 Naranduye amahanga, iminara yabo isigaye ar’ imisaka; nashibije inzira zabo, bituma ata wukihahita; ibisagara vyabo birasanganguwe, bituma hatakibonekay’ umuntu, kand’ ata wukihaba na mba." 
Zephaniah3:7 Nari nibgiye, nti N’ukuri uzontinya, uzokwemera guhanūrwa, ngw inzu zawe zoye gusangangurwa, nk’uko nari mmaze kubishinga vyose: ariko bama bazindukanwa no kwonona ibikorwa vyabo vyose." 
Zephaniah3:8 Nuko rero, ni mundorēre, ni k’Uhoraho agize, gushitsa ku musi nzohaguruka nja kunyaga: kuko nagabiye gukoraniriza amahanga hamwe, negeranye ibihugu, ngo mbasukek’ ubushangashirwe bganje, ni bgo burake bganje bgose bg’inkazi: kukw isi yose izotongōrwa n’umuriro w’ifūhe ryanje." 
Zephaniah3:9 Kukw ico gihe nzohindura amoko bagire ururimi rutunganye, kugira ngo bose babone kwambaza izina ryanje jewe Uhoraho, bankorere bahuje inama." 
Zephaniah3:10 Abasavyi banje, ari bo bana banje bāsābagiye, bazonzanira ingorore, bavuye hakurya y’inzūzi zo muri Etiyopiya." 
Zephaniah3:11 Kur’ uwo musi ntuzokwongera gutēterezwa n’ibikorwa vyawe vyose, ivyo wagenda uncumurako: kukw ico gihe nzoba ngukūyemw’ abihayagiza bībona, kandi nawe ntuzokwongera kwishira hejuru ku musozi wanje wera." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ariko nzogusigamw’ abaciye bugufi na ba nyarucari, abo ni bo bazokwizigira izina ryanje jewe Uhoraho." 
Zephaniah3:13 Amasigarira y’Abisirayeli ntibazokora ivyo kugabitanya, canke ngo bavuge ibinyoma, kandi nta rurimi rw’ubugunge ruzoboneka mu kanwa kabo: bazorisha bagaramange, ata wubateye ubgoba." 
Zephaniah3:14 Ririmba, wa mukobga w’i Siyoni; semerera, yemwe Bisirayeli; nezerwa uhimbarwe n’ umutima wawe wose, yewe mukobga w’i Yerusalemu." 
Zephaniah3:15 Uhoraho yagukūyekw imanza yari yāguciriye, yirukaniye kure umwansi wawe. Umwami w’Abisirayeli, ari we Uhoraho, ari hagati muri wewe; ntuzoba ukibona ivyago ukundi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Kur’ uwo musi Yerusalemu hazobarirwa, ngo Ntutinye: nawe Siyoni, amaboko yawe ntadendebuke." 
Zephaniah3:17 Uhoraho Imana yawe ari hagati muri wewe n’umuhizi ashobora gukiza: azokunezererwa n’akanyamuneza, ahwekerere mu rukundo rwiwe; azokunezererwa avuza impundu," 
Zephaniah3:18 nko ku musi mukuru washinzwe. Nzogukūrakw ivyago, ntuz’ usubire gutētērwa ukundi." 
Zephaniah3:19 Ehe rāba, ico gihe abāguhahaza bose nzobibabaza; kandi nzokiza abacumbagira, n’abirukanywe ndabakoranirize hamwe; kand’ abāri n’ibitētērwa kw isi yose nzobahindura ishimwe n’izina rya rurangiranwa." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ico gihe nzobacūra i muhira, mber’ ico gihe nzobakoraniriza hamwe: kuko nzobahindura ishimwe n’izina rya rurangiranwa mu moko yose yo kw isi, igihe nzogarukana abanyu bajanywe ar’ inyagano muvyibonera, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Haggai1:1 Mu mwaka ugira kabiri umwami Dariyo ari ku ngoma, mu kwezi kwa gatandatu, ku musi wakwo wa mbere, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavugiye muri Hagayi uwavugishwa na we, ritumwe kuri Zerubabeli icēgēra c’uwo mwami i Buyuda, mwene Sheyalitiyeli, no kuri Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru, mwene Yehozadaki," 
Haggai1:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Iri hanga rivuga ngw Igihe ntikiragera, igihe co kwongera kwubaka ingoro y’Uhoraho." 
Haggai1:3 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho rivugira muri Hagayi uwavugishwa na we," 
Haggai1:4 riti Mbeg’ iki n’igihe kibereye c’uko mwebge mwokwibera mu mazu yanyu ajererenze amagarwe, na yo iyi ngoro igihomvaguritse?" 
Haggai1:5 None rero, uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ni mwitegereze uko mumeze!" 
Haggai1:6 Mubiba vyinshi, mukimbura bike; kurya murarya, ariko ntimushira inzara; kunywa muranywa, ariko ntimushira inyota; kwambara murambara, ariko ntimushira imbeho; kand’ ūca amahera ayacira mu mupfuko utobotse." 
Haggai1:7 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ni mwitegereze uko mumeze!" 
Haggai1:8 Enda ni mudūge mu mugamba muzane ibiti, mwubake iyo ngoro; nanje nzoyinezererwa, bimpeshe icubahiro, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Haggai1:9 Mwaziga vyinshi, mugize murtya musanga ni bike; kandi n’iyo mubizanye i muhira ndabitūvya. Biva ku ki? ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abajije. Biva ku ngoro yanje irekewe ngaho igihomvaguritse, namwe mweho umuntu wese agakobereza inzu yiwe ubgiwe." 
Haggai1:10 Ni co gituma ata n’akame ijuru rikibarekurira, n’isi ikabima ivyimburo vyayo." 
Haggai1:11 Kandi nahamagaye uruzuba ngo rwice isi n’imisozi, rukūreho n’impeke na vino, n’amavuta ya elayo, rwice n’ibimera mu ndimiro, n’abantu, n’amasho, n’ibikorwa vyose bikoreshwa amaboko." 
Haggai1:12 Maze Zerubabeli mwene Sheyalitiyeli, na Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru mwene Yehozadaki, hamwe n’amasigarira yose yo mur’ iryo hanga, bumvira ijwi ry’ Uhoraho Imana yabo, n’amajambo ya Hagayi uwo yavugisha, nk’uk’ Uhoraho Imana yabo yamutumye; kand’ abantu baterwa n’ubgoba imbere y’Uhoraho." 
Haggai1:13 Maze Hagayi, intumwa y’Uhoraho, abgira abantu ubutumwa batumweko n’Uhoraho, at’ Uhoraho agize ngw Ari kumwe namwe." 
Haggai1:14 Maz’ Uhoraho akangura umutima wa Zerubabeli yaganza i Buyuda, mwene Sheyalitiyeli, n’umutima wa Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru, mwene Yehozadaki, n’imitima y’amasigarira yose y’iryo hanga; baraza batangura gukora ku ngoro y’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo Imana yabo," 
Haggai1:15 hāri ku musi wa mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwezi kwa gatandatu, mu mwaka ugira kabiri umwami Dariyo ari ku ngoma." 
Haggai2:1 Mu kwezi kw’indwi, ku musi wakwo wa mirongwibiri na rimwe, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavugiye muri Hagayi uwavugishwa na we," 
Haggai2:2 rit’ Enda barira Zerubabeli umwe atwara i Buyuda, mwene Sheyalitiyeli, na Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru, mwene Yehozadaki, n’amasigarira y’iri hanga," 
Haggai2:3 uti Mbega ni nde agisigaye muri mwebge yoba yarabonye ubgiza iyi ngoro yahoranye ubga mbere? Ubu ho muyibona mute? Ubu si nk’ubusa mu maso yanyu? 
Haggai2:4 Yamara noneho rema, ewe Zerubabeli, ni k’Uhoraho agize; nawe nyene rema, ewe Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru, mwene Yehozadaki; kandi namwe bantu bo mu gihugu mwese, ni mureme, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kandi mushireko mukore, kuko ndi kumwe namwe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize," 
Haggai2:5 nk’ukw ijambo ryanje riri nabasezeraniye igihe mwava muri Egiputa, kandi Mpwemu wanje akaba muri mwebge: nuko ntimutinye." 
Haggai2:6 Hasigaye rimwe, maze mu gihe gitoya ngatigitisha ijuru n’isi n’ikiyaga n’i musozi;" 
Haggai2:7 kandi nzohindisha amahanga yose agashitsi, kand’ ivy’ igiciro vyo mu mahanga yose bizoza, nanje nzokwuzuza iyi ngoro ubgiza, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Haggai2:8 Amafeza n’ayanje, n’amazahabu nyene n’ayanje, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Haggai2:9 Ubgiza bgo hanyuma buzoba kur’ iyi ngoro buzorusha ubga mbere, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, kand’ aha hantu nzohaha amahoro, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Haggai2:10 Ku musi wa mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwezi kw’icenda, mu mwaka ugira kabiri Dariyo ari ku ngoma, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryavugiye muri Hagayi uwavugishwa na we," 
Haggai2:11 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Enda baza abaherezi ku vy’ ivyagezwe," 
Haggai2:12 ut’ Umuntu yojana inyama z’ikimazi zejejwe mu mutwe w’impuzu yiwe, maz’ agakoza uwo mutwe w’impuzu ku mutsima canke mu mufa canke muri vino canke mu mavuta ya elayo canke ku co kurya cose, mbega vyoca biba ivyera? Abaherezi barishura, bati Na mba!" 
Haggai2:13 Maze Hagayi arababaza, at’ Umuntu yahumanijwe n’ukw akoze ku muvyimba, yokora kuri kimwe mur’ ivyo, coba gihumanye? Abaherezi barishura, bati Coba gihumanye." 
Haggai2:14 Maze Hagayi aca arabishura, at’ Aba bantu ni ko bameze, kand’ iri hanga ni ko rimbereye, ni k’Uhoraho agize; kand’ ikintu cose bakoresha amaboko yabo ni ko kimeze: mber’ ikintu cose banshikanirira aho hantu kirahumanye." 
Haggai2:15 Nuko none, ndabinginze, ni mwitegereze ivyabaye gushitsa uyu musi, ibuye ritaragerekwa ku rindi ku rusengero rw’Uhoraho:" 
Haggai2:16 ico gihe cose, uwaja ku kirundo c’ impeke c’ingero mirongwibiri yasangamw’ icumi gusa; n’uwaja ku bgato bga vino ngw akūremw’ inzato mirongwitanu yasangamwo mirongwibiri gusa." 
Haggai2:17 Nabateje kurumvya n’ururyi n’urubura ku vyo mwakoresheje amaboko yanyu vyose: na ho nyene ntimwangarukako, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Haggai2:18 Nuko ndabinginze, ni mwitegereze ivyabaye gushitsa uyu musi, gushitsa umusi wa mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwezi kw’icenda, mwitegereze n’ivyabaye uhereye umusi itanguriro ry’urusengero rw’ Uhoraho ryashirwaho." 
Haggai2:19 Mbega har’ imbuto zikiri mu bigega? Mbere n’umuzabibu n’umusukoni n’umukomamanga n’umwelayo ntibikiruha vyama; arik’ uhereye iri zuba nzobaha umugisha. 
Haggai2:20 Nukw ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Hagayi ubugira kabiri, kur’ uyo musi wa mirongwibiri na kane w’ukwo kwezi," 
Haggai2:21 riti Barira Zerubabeli, umwe atwara i Buyuda, uti Nzotigitisha ijuru n’isi:" 
Haggai2:22 kandi nzokwubika ingoma z’abami, mpenebereze ububasha bg’ubgami bg’amahanga; nzokwubika imikogote y’intambara n’abayigenderamwo, kand’ amafarasi azogwaho, bo n’abayagenderako, umuntu wese agwe yishwe n’inkota ya mugenzi we." 
Haggai2:23 Kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, nzogusobanura, ewe Zerubabeli musavyi wanje, mwene Sheyalitiyeli, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nguhindure impeta nzohora ndomesha ikimenyetso: kuko nagutoranije, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Zechariah1:1 Mu kwezi kw’umunani mu mwaka ugira kabiri Dariyo ari ku ngoma, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Zekariya mwene Berekiya, Berekiya mwene Ido, yar’ ūvugishwa n’Imana," 
Zechariah1:2 rit’ Uhoraho yarakiye cane ba sogokuruza banyu. 
Zechariah1:3 Kubg’ ivyo uz’ ubabgire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ni mungarukeko, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, nanje nzobagarukako, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Zechariah1:4 Mureke kuba nka ba sogokuruza banyu, abo navugisha kera bābabarira basemerera, bat’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Enda ni muhindukire muve mu ngeso zanyu mbi no mu bikorwa vyanyu bibi; maze ntibumva, nanje ntibanyumvira, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zechariah1:5 Ba sogokuruza banyu bari hehe? Cank’ abo navugishije mbega bokwamyeh’ ibihe vyose? 
Zechariah1:6 Arikw amajambo yanje n’ivyagezwe vyanje nageze abasavyi banje navugisha, mbega ntivyashitse kuri ba sogokuruza? Maze bīsubiramwo, baravuga, bati Nk’uk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yagabiye kw azotugirira, ngw atwishure ibihwanye n’ingeso zacu n’ivyo twakoze, ni ko yadukoreye." 
Zechariah1:7 Ku musi wa mirongwibiri na kane wo mu kwezi kw’icumi na rimwe, ni kwo kwezi kwitwa Shebati, mu mwaka ugira kabiri Dariyo ari ku ngoma, ijambo ry’ Uhoraho ryaje kuri Zekariya mwene Berekiya, Berekiya mwene Ido, yar’ ūvugishwa n’Imana;" 
Zechariah1:8 Zekariya aravuga, ati Mw ijoro nagize ntya, mbona umuntu agendera kw ifarasi y’akagajo, ahagaze hagati y’ibiti vy’imihadasi vyo mu gasōko; kand’ inyuma yiwe hār’ amafarasi y’utugajo n’ay’ utunyomvyi n’ay’ ibitare." 
Zechariah1:9 Maze ndabaza, nti Mugenzi, ibi n’ibiki? Umumarayika twavugana aranyishura, ati Ndakubarira ivy’ ari vyo." 
Zechariah1:10 Maze wa wundi yar’ ahagaze hagati y’imihadasi aravuga, at’ Abo n’abo Uhoraho yatumye kugendagenda mw isi yose." 
Zechariah1:11 Bishura umumarayika w’Uhoraho yar’ ahagaze hagati y’imihadasi, bati Tugendagenze mw isi, kandi rāba, isi yose iratekereje, ifise impore." 
Zechariah1:12 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho araheza aravuga, at’ Ewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, uzogeza ryari kutagirira Yerusalemu ikigongwe, n’ibisagara vy’i Buyuda, ivyo warakiye iyi myaka yose ukw ari mirongwirindwi?" 
Zechariah1:13 Umumarayika twavugana, Uhoraho amwishura amajambo meza amara umubabaro." 
Zechariah1:14 Nuk’ umumarayika twavugana arambarira, ati Semerera uvuge, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Mfūhiye i Yerusalemu n’i Siyoni ifūhe ryinshi." 
Zechariah1:15 Kandi nshavuriye cane amahanga yidibamiye, kuko Yerusalemu nari mpashavuriye buhoro, maze bo bakahasonga." 
Zechariah1:16 Ni co gituma Uhoraho avuga, ati Ngarukiye Yerusalemu nzanye imbabazi; ingoro yanje izohubakwa, ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize: i Yerusalemu hazogereshwa umugozi." 
Zechariah1:17 Subira usemerere, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ngw Ibisagara vyanje bizokwongera kubōgabōga ivyiza; Uhoraho azokwongera kumara i Siyoni umubabaro, kand’ azokwongera kwirobanurira Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:18 Maze nunamuye amaso mbona amahembe ane. 
Zechariah1:19 Mbaza umumarayika twavugana, nt’ Ivyo n’ibiki? Aranyishura, at’ Ayo ni yo mahembe yasābagije Abayuda n’Abisirayeli n’ab’i Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah1:20 Maz’ Uhoraho anyereka abacuzi bane. 
Zechariah1:21 Ndamubaza, nt’ Abo bazanywe no gukora iki? Aranyishura, at’ Ayo mahembe ni yo yasābagije Abayuda, ntihāgira n’umwe avyura umutwe; non’ abo bazanywe no kuyaca ivutu, no gutsinda hasi amahembe y’amahanga, yashize hejuru amahembe yayo ngw arwanye igihugu c’i Buyuda, abasābagize." 
Zechariah2:1 Maze nunamuye amaso mbona umuntu afise mu minwe umugozi wo kugera. 
Zechariah2:2 Ndamubaza, nt’ Uroye hehe? Arambarira, ati Ngiye kugera Yerusalemu, ngo ndābe amakika n’amadūga vyaho uko bireha." 
Zechariah2:3 Maz’ umumarayika twavugana yīgira imbere, umumarayika wundi aza kumusanganira:" 
Zechariah2:4 aramubarira, at’ Irukanga, ubgire uwo musore, ut’ I Yerusalemu hazosubira gusagaza abantu nk’ibisagara bitazitiriwe, kukw abantu n’amasho bizohaba ari vyinshi." 
Zechariah2:5 Kukw ari jewe nzohabera uruzitiro rw’umuriro ruhakikije, ni k’Uhoraho agize, kandi nzohabera ubgiza ndi hagati mu mugoma." 
Zechariah2:6 Yemwe! Yemwe! Ni muhunge muve mu gihugu c’i burārūko, ni k’Uhoraho agize; kuko nk’ukw ibirēre bine vy’ijuru vyītangūranye, ari ko nabasābagije, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zechariah2:7 Yewe Siyoni ubana n’umukobga w’i Babuloni, cika uhunge!" 
Zechariah2:8 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ni we yantumye kumuhesha icubahiro mu mahanga yabanyaze; at’ Ūbakorako aba akoze ku mbone y’ijisho ryiwe." 
Zechariah2:9 Ehe nzoyabangurirak’ ukuboko kwanje, kand’ azohinduka inyagano z’abāyashumbiye: ni ho muzomenya yuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari we yantumye." 
Zechariah2:10 Ririmba unezerwe, yewe mukobga w’i Siyoni: rāba ndaje ngo ngerēre hagati muri wewe, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zechariah2:11 Kur’ uwo musi amahanga menshi azokwifatanya n’ Uhoraho, bacike abantu banje; nanje nzogerēra hagati muri wewe, nawe uzomenya yuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yakuntumyeko." 
Zechariah2:12 Maz’ Uhoraho azohindura i Buyuda habe ishamvu yiwe yo mu gihugu cera, kand’ azokwongera kwirobanurira Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah2:13 Ni muhwekerere imbere y’ Uhoraho, yemwe abafise umubiri mwese, kukw avyukurutse i we, ahēra hiwe." 
Zechariah3:1 Maz’ anyereka Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru ahagaze imbere y’umumarayika w’Uhoraho, na Satani ahagaze i buryo bgiwe ngw amurege." 
Zechariah3:2 Umumarayika w’ Uhoraho abarira Satani, at’ Ewe Satani, Uhoraho aguhane: Uhoraho yirobanuriye Yerusalemu aguhane: mbeg’ uyo s’igishirīra cōkōwe mu muriro?" 
Zechariah3:3 Kandi Yosuwa yari yambaye impuzu z’ubuhoma, ahagaze imbere y’ uwo mumarayika." 
Zechariah3:4 Uwo mumarayika araheza abarira abamuhagaze imbere, ati Ni mumwambure izo mpuzu z’ubuhoma. Maz’ abarira Yosuwa, ati Rāba ngukūyek’ ukugabitanya kwawe, kandi ngira nkwambike imyambaro ishajije." 
Zechariah3:5 Ndasaba, nti Ni bamwambike igitambara ciza mu mutwe. Nuko bamwambika igitambara ciza mu mutwe, bamwambika n’imyambaro, umumarayika w’Uhoraho ahagazeho." 
Zechariah3:6 Umumarayika w’Uhoraho yihanikiriza Yosuwa," 
Zechariah3:7 at’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Ni wagendera mu nzira zanje, ukitondera ivyo nakujeje, nawe uzogaba ivyo mu ngoro yanje, urinde n’urugo rwanje, kandi nzoguha ubgishikira hagati mur’ aba bahagaze hano." 
Zechariah3:8 Umve none, yewe Yosuwa umuherezi mukuru, mwe na bagenzi bawe bicara imbere yawe; kukw abo ar’ abantu bo kwerekana ibizoba: kuko rāba, nzozana umushumba wanje Shami." 
Zechariah3:9 Ehe rāba ibuye nshize imbere ya Yosuwa: kur’ iryo buye rimwe harikw amaso ndwi; ehe nzoricakw amagarwe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize; kand’ ukugabitanya kw’ico gihugu nzogukūrah’ umusi umwe." 
Zechariah3:10 Kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, muzotumiranira, musi y’umuzabibu no musi y’umusukoni, umuntu wese na mugenzi we." 
Zechariah4:1 Maz’ umumarayika twavugana aragaruka, arankangura, nk’ uk’ umuntu akangurwa ava mw itiro:" 
Zechariah4:2 arambaza, at’ Ubona iki? Ndamwishura, nti Mbona igiterekwakw amatara, cose gicuzwe mw izahabu, umubehe waco ur’ ahahera hejuru, ushamitsekw amatara ndwi; kand’ ayo matara ari hejuru kuri wo, rimwe‐rimwe rifise umuheha, yose ukw ar’ indwi." 
Zechariah4:3 Kand’ impande zompi har’ ibiti vy’imyelayo bibiri, kimwe i buryo bga wa mubehe, ikindi i bumoso." 
Zechariah4:4 Nuko mbaza umumarayika twavugana, nti Mbeg’ ivyo bisobanurwa bite ga mugenzi?" 
Zechariah4:5 Maz’ umumarayika twavugana arambaza, ati Mbeg’ ivyo ntuzi uko bisobanurwa? Ndamwishura, nt’ Oyaye mugenzi." 
Zechariah4:6 Aranyishura, ati Ngiri ijambo Uhoraho atumye kuri Zerubabeli, ati Si kubg’ inkomezi, si kubg’ ubushobozi, ariko ni kubga Mpwemu wanje, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Zechariah4:7 Wa musozi munini we, ur’ iki? Uzocikira ikiyaya imbere ya Zerubabeli; azozana ibuye ryo gusōzēra kwubaka, basēsereza impundu, bat’ Ubuntu, ubuntu bube kuri ryo!" 
Zechariah4:8 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryongera kunzako," 
Zechariah4:9 rit’ Amaboko ya Zerubabeli ni yo yashizeh’ itanguriro ry’iyi nzu, kand’ amaboko yiwe ni yo azoyisōzēra; ni ho muzomenya yuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari we yabantumyeko." 
Zechariah4:10 Mbega har’ uwogaya ibikir’ umugero ku musi w’intangamarāra? Bazonezerwa babonye karisho mu ntoke za Zerubabeli. Ya yandi ndwi ni zo nyonga z’Uhoraho, zinyuranganya mw isi yose hirya no hino." 
Zechariah4:11 Maze ndamubaza, nt’ Irya myelayo ukw ar’ ibiri, umwe ur’ i buryo bg’igiterekwakw amatara, uwundi ukaba i bumoso, isobanurwa ite?" 
Zechariah4:12 Nongera kumubaza ubugira kabiri, nt’ Arya mashami abiri y’imyelayo, ar’ impande zompi z’imibirikira y’izahabu ukw ar’ ibiri, akīkāmūramw’ amavuta asa n’izahabu, asobanurwa ate?" 
Zechariah4:13 Arambaza, at’ Arya ntuzi ukw asobanurwa? Ndamwishura, nt’ Oyaye, mugenzi." 
Zechariah4:14 Arambarira, at’ Arya ni bamwe babiri bārobanujwe amavuta, bama bahagaze hafi ya Nyen’ isi yose." 
Zechariah5:1 Nuko nongera kwunamura amaso, mbona umuzingo w’ igitabo uguruka." 
Zechariah5:2 Arambaza, at’ Ubona iki? Ndamwishura, nti Mbona umuzingo w’igitabo uguruka: uburebure bgawo n’amatambge mirongwibiri y’ukuboko uciriye mu nkokora, ubgaguke bgawo n’amatambge cumi." 
Zechariah5:3 Arambarira, at’ Uwo n’umuvumo urekuwe ng’ ukwire isi yose: igihe uwiba wese yīrāye kirahāgije, kandi n’igihe ūrahira wese yīrāye kirahāgije." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndawurekuye, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, winjire mu nzu y’umusuma no mu nzu y’ūrahira izina ryanje ibinyoma; uzoguma hagati mu nzu y’ūmeze artyo, uyitikizanye n’ibiti n’amabuye biyubatse." 
Zechariah5:5 Maz’ umumarayika twavugana yīgira imbere, arambarira, at’ Unamura amaso, urābe kirya kije ic’ ari co." 
Zechariah5:6 Ndabaza, nti Mbega n’igiki? Arambarira, ati Kirya n’ingero yitwa efa ije. Kand’ at’ Ivyo ni vyo bigabitanyo vyabo mu gihugu cose." 
Zechariah5:7 Maze ngize ntya, mbona umupfundikizo wacuzwe mw isāsu upfundururwa, mbona umugore yicaye muri efa imbere." 
Zechariah5:8 At’ Uyu ni we Bugarariji; maz’ amunyikiriza muri efa imbere, akubitirako ca cuma c’isāsu ku munwa wayo." 
Zechariah5:9 Maze nunamuye amaso, mbona abagore babiri baje, bakubebga n’umuyaga mu mababa yabo; kandi bāri bafise amababa nk’ay’ agasōza; baterura iyo efa, bayicana mu kirēre hagati y’isi n’ijuru." 
Zechariah5:10 Mbaza umumarayika twavugana, nt’ Irya efa bariya bayijanye hehe?" 
Zechariah5:11 Aranyishura, ati Bagiye kumwubakira inzu mu gihugu c’i Shinari; ni yuzura, azoshirwa iyo, ahantu hiwe." 
Zechariah6:1 Nuko nongera kwunamura amaso, mbona imikogote ine iturutse hagati y’imisozi ibiri; kand’ iyo misozi yar’ imiringa." 
Zechariah6:2 Umukogote wa mbere wakwegwa n’amafarasi y’utugajo; uwa kabiri wakwegwa n’amafarasi y’ imifyiri; 
Zechariah6:3 uwa gatatu wakwegwa n’amafarasi y’ibitare; uwa kane wakwegwa n’amafarasi y’ibibamba mu tugajo. 
Zechariah6:4 Nuko mbaza umumarayika twavugana, nt’ Ivyo bisobanurwa bite ga mugenzi?" 
Zechariah6:5 Umumarayika aranyishura, at’ Ivyo n’imiyaga ine yo mw ijuru, ivuye gushengerera Nyen’ isi yose." 
Zechariah6:6 Umukogote ukwegwa n’amafarasi y’imifyiri ugiye mu gihugu c’i burārūko, ay’ ibitare arayakurikiye; ay’ ibibamba na yo agiye mu gihugu c’i bumanuko." 
Zechariah6:7 Ay’ utugajo araza, asaba kugendagenda mw isi yose; aravuga, ati Nuko ni mugende, mugendagende mw isi yose nyene. Nukw agendagenda mw isi yose." 
Zechariah6:8 Maz’ arampamagara, arambarira, ati Rāba, ariya agiye mu gihugu c’i burārūko yaruhuye umutima wanje ku vy’ico gihugu c’i burārūko." 
Zechariah6:9 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho rinzako," 
Zechariah6:10 rit’ Uze wākīrire amashikanwa abājanywe kw inyagano, ni bo Heludayi na Tobiya na Yedaya; uwo musi nyene uz’ uje kwa Yosiya mwene Zefaniya, ni ho bazoba bari, bavuye i Babuloni;" 
Zechariah6:11 wākīre ifeza n’izahabu, ubigiremw’ ibitsibo, uvyambike umuherezi mukuru, Yosuwa mwene Yehozadaki, mu mutwe," 
Zechariah6:12 umubarire, ut’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Eh’ umuntu yitwa Shami, azoshamika ahantu hiwe, kand’ azokwubaka urusengero rw’Uhoraho." 
Zechariah6:13 Koko ni we azokwubaka urusengero rw’Uhoraho, azogira icubahiro, kand’ azovyagira ku ntebe, aganze; kur’ iyo ntebe azohabera n’umuherezi; kandi bompi bazohuza inama zizana amahoro." 
Zechariah6:14 Kand’ ivyo bitsibo bizobera Helemu na Tobiya na Yedaya na Heni mwene Zefaniya icibutso mu rusengero rw’Uhoraho. 
Zechariah6:15 Kand’ abazoba bari kure bazoza bubake urusengero rw’Uhoraho; ni ho muzomenya yuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ari we yabantumyeko. Ivyo bizoshika ni mwagira umwete wo kwumvira ijwi ry’Uhoraho Imana yanyu. 
Zechariah7:1 Mu mwaka ugira kane Dariyo ari ku ngoma, ijambo ry’Uhoraho ryaje kuri Zekariya ku musi wa kane w’ukwezi kw’icenda kwitwa Kisilevu." 
Zechariah7:2 Nukw ab’i Beteli bāri batumye Shareseri na Regemu‐Meleki n’abantu babo, ngo binginge Uhoraho abahangaze," 
Zechariah7:3 kandi ngo babonane n’abaherezi bo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo n’abavugishwa n’Imana, bababaze, bati Mbega dukwiye kwama turira mu kwezi kwa gatanu, twigungiye ukwacu, nk’uko twabigenza mur’ iyo myaka yose ukw ingana?" 
Zechariah7:4 Maz’ ijambo ry’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo rinzako," 
Zechariah7:5 riti Barira abantu bose bo mu gihugu, bo n’abaherezi, uti Hamwe mwahora mwisonzesha mukaboroga mu kwezi kwa gatanu no mu kw’indwi mur’ iyi myaka yose ukw ari mirongwirindwi, mbega ni jewe ubganje mwagiye mwisonzeshereza?" 
Zechariah7:6 Kand’ iyo murya cank’ iyo munywa, mbega si mwebge mwīrīra ubganyu, mukīnywera ubganyu?" 
Zechariah7:7 Mbega ntimwari mukwiye kwumva amajambo Uhoraho yavugiye mu bāvugishwa na we ba kera, hamwe Yerusalemu hāri hagitūritse, hakir’ amahoro, bo n’ibisagara vyaho bihakikije, kand’ igihugu c’i bumanuko no mu biyaya na vyo bigitūritse?" 
Zechariah7:8 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho riza kuri Zekariya," 
Zechariah7:9 rit’ Uku ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yagize, ati Ni muce imanza ziroranye, umuntu wese agirire mugenzi we imbabazi n’ikigongwe." 
Zechariah7:10 Kandi mureke kurya abapfakazi n’impfuvyi n’ingenzi na ba nyarucari; ntihagire n’umwe muri mwebge yīgīra imigabo mu mutima wiwe yo kugirira nabi mugenzi we. 
Zechariah7:11 Ariko banka kwumva, bantera ibitugu, bīziba amatwi ngo boye kwumva." 
Zechariah7:12 Mbere bīkomantaje imitima imera nk’isare, ngo boye kwumva ivyagezwe n’amajambo Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo yarungitse muri Mpwemu wiwe, ayavugira mu bavugishwa na we ba kera; ni co catumye uburake buhambaye buva k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Zechariah7:13 Kandi nk’uko nahamagaye bakica amatwi, ni ko na bo bazohamagara nanje nkica amatwi, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize;" 
Zechariah7:14 ariko nzobasābagirisha agashururu, baje mu mahanga yose batīgeze kumenya. Uko ni kw igihugu kizosigara ar’ amatongo bakivuyemwo; ntihagire umuntu n’umwe aba akihaca cank’ agisubirayo: kukw igihugu c’igikundiro bāri bagihinduye amatongo." 
Zechariah8:1 Ijambo ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo rinzako," 
Zechariah8:2 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Mfūhiye i Siyoni ifūhe ryinshi, mpafūhiye mfise uburake bginshi." 
Zechariah8:3 Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, ati Ngarutse i Siyoni, ngerēre hagati y’i Yerusalemu; kandi Yerusalemu hazokwitwa Umurwa w’Umwizigirwa; kand’ umusozi w’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo uzokwitwa Umusozi wera." 
Zechariah8:4 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Hazoba igihe abatāma n’abatāmakazi bazokwongera kwiganamira ku bibuga vy’i Yerusalemu, umuntu wese azoba yishimikiza ikibando kubgo kwisāzira cane." 
Zechariah8:5 Kandi ku murwa hazoba huzuye abahungu n’abakobga bakinira ku bibuga vyo kuri wo. 
Zechariah8:6 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Naho vyobera igikomeye amasigarira y’ubu bgoko azoba akiriho mur’ iyo misi, mbega nanje vyombera igikomeye? ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abaza." 
Zechariah8:7 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Rāba, nzokiza abantu banje, mbakūre mu gihugu c’i burasirazuba no mu c’i burengerazuba," 
Zechariah8:8 nzobazana basagaze hagati muri Yerusalemu; bazoba abantu banje, nanje nzoba Imana yabo mu kuri no mu bugororotsi." 
Zechariah8:9 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Amaboko yanyu n’akomere, yemwe abumva mur’ iyi misi amajambo yavuzwe n’abavugishwa nanje bārih’ umusi itanguriro ryashirwaho ry’ingoro yanje, jewe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, ni rwo rusengero, kugira ngo rwubakwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Kukw iyo misi itarashika ata ngero zāboneka z’ibikorwa vy’umuntu canke z’ivy’ inka zirima, kandi nta mahoro k’ūwinjira n’ūsohoka kubg’ abarwanizi; kuko nateranije abantu bose, umuntu wese nkamuteranya na mugenzi we." 
Zechariah8:11 Ariko noneh’ amasigarira y’ubu bgoko sinzoyagirira nk’uko nabagiriye mu bihe vyashize, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Zechariah8:12 Kuko nzobiba amahoro; umuzabibu uzokwama inzabibu zawo, isi yimbuke ivyimburo vyayo, ikirēre kizane ikime caco; ivyo vyose nzobiha amasigarira y’ubu bgoko k’umwandu." 
Zechariah8:13 Nuko, nk’uko mwari mu mahanga murik’ umuvumo, yemwe ab’ inzu ya Yuda, namwe ab’ inzu ya Isirayeli, ni ko nzobakiza, mubek’ umuhezagiro; ntimutinye, arikw amaboko yanyu n’akomere." 
Zechariah8:14 Kuk’ ukw ari k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Nk’uko nagabiye kubagirira nabi, hamwe ba sogokuruza banyu bāndatsa, sinigarure, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize," 
Zechariah8:15 ni ko no mur’ iyi misi ngabiye kugirira neza Yerusalemu n’inzu ya Yuda: nuko ntimutinye. 
Zechariah8:16 Ivyo mukwiye gukora n’ibi: Umuntu wese avugane ivy’ ukuri na mugenzi we, muce imanza ziroranye z’amahoro muri mu rukinja mu marembo yanyu:" 
Zechariah8:17 ntihakagire n’umwe muri mwebge yīgīra imigabo mu mutima wiwe yo kugirira nabi mugenzi we: kukw ivyo vyose ari vyo nanka, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zechariah8:18 Maz’ ijambo ry’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo rinzako," 
Zechariah8:19 rit’ Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, at’ Ukwisonzesha kwo mu kwezi kwa kane, n’ukwo mu kwa gatanu n’ukwo mu kw’indwi n’ukwo mu kw’icumi, kuzocikira inzu ya Yuda umunezero no guhimbarwa n’imisi mikuru y’akanyamuneza: nuko rero mukunde ukuri n’amahoro." 
Zechariah8:20 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Hazoza amahanga azananye n’ababa mu bisagara vyinshi;" 
Zechariah8:21 kand’ ababa mu gisagara kimwe bazoja mu kindi, bavuge bati Ni muze twihute tuje gusaba Uhoraho umugisha, dusiguze Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo; natwe turajana." 
Zechariah8:22 N’ukuri koko abantu benshi n’amahanga akomeye bazoza gusiguza Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo i Yerusalemu, no kumusaba umugisha." 
Zechariah8:23 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Mur’ iyo misi abantu cumi bazova mu mahanga y’indimi zidahwanye, bafate umutwe w’impuzu y’Umuyuda, bamubgire, bati Turajana, kuko twumvise yukw Imana iri kumwe namwe." 
Zechariah9:1 Imbūri y’ijambo ry’Uhoraho yo ku gihugu c’i Haduraki, izoshinga ibande i Damasiko: kukw abantu bose, n’imiryango yose y’Abisirayeli, bahanze amaso Uhoraho;" 
Zechariah9:2 irishinge n’i Hamati hahereranye na ho, bo n’i Tiro n’i Sidoni, nah’ ar’ abanyabgenge bginshi." 
Zechariah9:3 I Tiro biyubakiye igihome, bīrundira amafeza nk’umukungugu, bo n’amazahabu y’indobanurwa nk’ivyondo vyo mu nzira." 
Zechariah9:4 Yamar’ Umwami Imana azobakomvora, azoshiburira ububasha bgaho mu kiyaga, hatōngōrwe n’umuriro." 
Zechariah9:5 Ababa muri Ashikeloni bazobirāba batinye, n’ababa i Gaza na bo, bazoja mu kajembegete; kand’ ababa muri Ekuroni ivyo bari bishimiye bizobatītūkana; kand’ i Gaza bazobura umwami, no muri Ashikeloni abantu bazohashira." 
Zechariah9:6 Ikivyarwa ni co kizogazagaza muri Ashidodi, kand’ Abafilisitiya nzobamara amanyama." 
Zechariah9:7 Umufilisitiya nzomuhanagura amaraso mu kanwa, ndamukūre n’ibizira mu menyo; na we azoba indokorano ku Mana yacu, abe nk’umutware w’i Buyuda, kand’ uwo muri Ekuroni azoba nk’Umuyebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ingoro yanje nzoyisagaza impande zose, ndayibuze igitero, kugira ngo ntihagire ūhaca aja irya cank’ agaruka, kugira ng’ uwabatwaza ituntu ntiyongere kubaca hagati: kuko noneho mvyiboneye n’amaso yanje." 
Zechariah9:9 Nezerwa cane, wa mukobga w’i Siyoni we! Sēsereza impundu, wa mukobga w’i Yerusalemu we! Rāba, umwami wawe aje kuri wewe, n’umugororotsi, kand’ ari n’inganji; yicishije bugufi, agendera ku ndogoba, mbere ni ku mukangara, inyana y’indogoba." 
Zechariah9:10 Muri Efurayimu nzohaca imikogote, n’i Yerusalemu nzohaca amafarasi, kand’ imiheto y’intambara izocibga. Uyo azobgira amahanga ivy’ amahoro, kand’ ubgami bgiwe buzohēra ku kiyaga bushike ku kindi, buhēre no kuri rwa Ruzi bushike ku mpera y’isi." 
Zechariah9:11 Kandi nawe, kubg’ amaraso yashinze isezerano rya twe nawe, nanje nkubohoreye imbohe, ndazikūra mu rwobo rutagira amazi." 
Zechariah9:12 Ni muhindukirire igihome gikomeye, mwa mbohe ziri n’ivyizigiro: no kur’ uyu musi ndababgira ukuri yuko nzobashumbusha ibihetangabo kabiri." 
Zechariah9:13 Kuko mfoye Buyuda nk’umuheto, Efurayimu ndamushize mu ruge; kand’ abana bawe, Siyoni we, nzobateranya n’abana bawe Bugiriki we; nzoguhindura nk’inkota y’umuhizi." 
Zechariah9:14 Kand’ Uhoraho azoserukira hejuru yabo, umwampi wiwe wirase nk’umuravyo, kand’ Umwami Uhoraho azovuza inzamba, aje mu gihuhuta c’i bumanuko." 
Zechariah9:15 Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo azobakīranira; bazoyogeza, basiribange amabuye atewe n’umugozi; bazoromozwa n’amaraso basāmūke nk’ababorewe vino: bazokwuzura amaraso nk’ inzavya, bahinduke nk’inkokora z’igicaniro." 
Zechariah9:16 Maz’ uwo musi Uhoraho Imana yabo azobakiza nk’umukuku, ni wo bantu biwe; kuko bazoba nk’utubuyenge two ku gitsibo, dukayanganira hejuru y’igihugu ciwe." 
Zechariah9:17 Ewe ineza yiwe ukuntu ari nyinshi, n’ubgiza bgiwe ukuntu ari bginshi! Ingano zizotera abasore itōto, n’umutobe wa vino utotahaze abigeme." 
Zechariah10:1 Uhoraho abe ari we musaba imvura ngw igwe mu gihe c’itasura, muyisabe Uhoraho arema imiravyo; na we azobaha imvura y’umuvuvu, umuntu wese amumereze imirima." 
Zechariah10:2 Kukw ibigirwamana vyitwa terafimu bivuga ubusa, n’abapfumu bakaragura ibinyoma; bavōvōta inzozi z’ibihumbagurano, bakaremeshereza abantu ubusa: ni co gituma abantu bazimira nk’intama, bakagorwa, kuko batagira umwungere." 
Zechariah10:3 Uburake bganje buziriringiye abungere, kandi nzohana impfizi z’impene: kuk’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo aje kugendera umukuku wiwe, ni wo nzu ya Yuda, kand’ azobahindura nk’ifarasi yiwe nziza yo mu ntambara." 
Zechariah10:4 Muri Yuda hazokomōka ibuye rigumya imfuruka, muri we hazokomōka urumambo rugumya ihema; muri we hazokomōka umuheto w’intambara, kandi hamwe n’ivyo muri we hazokomōka umugabisha w’ ingabo wese." 
Zechariah10:5 Abo bazomera nk’abahizi mu rugamba, basiribangira abansi babo mu vyondo vyo mu nzira; bazorwana, kuk’ Uhoraho ari kumwe na bo: kand’ abagendera ku mafarasi bazomāramāra." 
Zechariah10:6 Kandi nzokomeza inzu ya Yuda, nkize n’inzu ya Yosefu; nzobagarukana, kuko mbagiriye ikigongwe; bazomera nk’aho ntigeze kubaca, kuko jewe nd’Uhoraho Imana yabo, kandi nzobumva." 
Zechariah10:7 Kand’ Abefurayimu bazomera nk’umuhizi, imitima yabo igire akaneza nk’agatewe na vino; mber’ abana babo bazobirāba bagire akaneza, imitima yabo izonezererwa Uhoraho." 
Zechariah10:8 Nzobahamagaza uruhwa mbakoranye, kuko nabacunguye; kandi bazogwira nk’uko bamye bagwira." 
Zechariah10:9 Nzobabiba mu mahanga, kandi bazonyibuka bari mu bihugu vya kure; bazorera abana babo, kandi bazogaruka." 
Zechariah10:10 Nzokwongera mbatārūre no mu gihugu ca Egiputa, mbakoranye mbakūre muri Ashuri: maze mbashitse mu gihugu c’i Gileyadi n’i Lebanoni: mbere ntibazohakwirwa." 
Zechariah10:11 Azoca mu kiyaga kigoye, akubite imipfunda yo mu kiyaga, kand’ uruzi rwa Nili muri nyina hose hazokama: ubgibone bga Ashuri buzocishwa bugufi, n’icumu ry’ umwami wa Egiputa rizovaho." 
Zechariah10:12 Nzobaha gukomezwa nanje Uhoraho, na bo bazogendagendera mw izina ryanje, ni k’Uhoraho agize." 
Zechariah11:1 Ugurura inzugi zawe, Lebanoni, umuriro uturire ibiti vyawe vy’amasederi." 
Zechariah11:2 Vuza induru, wa giti c’umuberoshi, kukw isederi ihenutse, kand’ ibiti vyiza‐vyiza bikaba vyononekaye. Ni muvuze induru, mwa biti vy’ imyeloni vy’i Bashani, kukw ikibira kitāmenwa gihindikiranye." 
Zechariah11:3 Umve induru z’abungere, kukw icubahiro cabo catītūtse. Umve imigunza y’intambge yivuga, kuk’ ukuberwa kwa Yorodani kwononekaye." 
Zechariah11:4 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Imana yanje agize, ati Ragira umukuku w’imbāgwa:" 
Zechariah11:5 abazihanjuye ni bo bazicumita, bakibgira ko badacumuye, n’abazishōye bakavuga, bat’ Uhoraho ashimwe, kuko mbaye umutunzi; kand’ abungere bazo na bo nta kagongwe zibatera." 
Zechariah11:6 Kuko ntazosubira guterwa akagongwe n’ababa mur’ iki gihugu, ni k’Uhoraho agize; ariko nzobagabura, umuntu wese ndamute mu kuboko kw’uwamuragira, no mu kuboko kw’umwami wiwe; abo bazorya igihugu, kandi sinzobarokora ngo mbakūre mu maboko yabo." 
Zechariah11:7 Nuko nca ndagira umukuku w’imbāgwa, mbere zar’ intama z’imyaku. Maze nābīra inkoni zibiri, imwe ndayita Buntu, iyindi ndayita Yungiro; nuko ndagira umukuku." 
Zechariah11:8 Mu kwezi kumwe ngeseza ba bungere batatu; kuk’ umutima wanje war’ ubarambiwe, kandi n’iyabo yari yanzinutswe." 
Zechariah11:9 Maze ndavuga, nti Namwe sinkibaragira; ūpfa n’apfe, ūranduka n’arunduke, amasigarira n’aryane." 
Zechariah11:10 Maze nābīra ya nkoni yanje Buntu, ndayivunamwo kubiri, kugira ngo nice isezerano nasezeranye n’amahanga yose." 
Zechariah11:11 Uwo musi iravunika; maz’ intama z’imyaku zanyumvira zica zimenya yukw iryo jambo ar’ iry’ Uhoraho. 
Zechariah11:12 Ndababarira, nti Namba mubona kw ari vyiza, ni mumpe ingero yanje; bitabaye vyiza, musigeho. Nuko bangerera intete mirongwitatu z’ifeza kw ingero." 
Zechariah11:13 Uhoraho arambgira, ati Terera umubumvyi ako kaminuza k’igiciro banciriye! Nuko nābīra za ntete z’ifeza mirongwitatu, ndazijana nziterera umubumvyi mu nzu y’Uhoraho." 
Zechariah11:14 Maz’ inkoni yanje ya kabiri yitwa Yungiro nca ndayivunamwo kubiri, kugira ngo nice umuvukano w’Abayuda n’ Abisirayeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Nuk’ Uhoraho arambgira, ati Subira wābīre ibiragizwa vy’ umwungere mubi." 
Zechariah11:16 Kuko rāba, nzohagurutsa umwungere mu gihugu, atazobabara izizimiye, kandi ntazorondera izāsābagiye, n’ izivunitse ntazozunga, canke ngw aragire izigihagaze; arikw azorya inyama z’izivyibushe, mber’ azoguguna n’inzāra zazo." 
Zechariah11:17 Azobona ibara, uwo mwungere w’imburakimazi ata umukuku! Inkota izomukubita ku kuboko, no ku jisho ry’i buryo: ukuboko kwiwe kuzonyunyuka rwose, kand’ ijisho ryiwe ry’i buryo rizohuma agahenebere." 
Zechariah12:1 Imbūri y’ijambo ry’Uhoraho yo ku Bisirayeli. Uku ni k’Uhoraho agize, uwāgānuye amajuru agashirah’ itanguriro ry’isi, akarema impwemu yo mu muntu," 
Zechariah12:2 at’ Ehe nzohindura Yerusalemu igikombe co kudandabagiranya amahanga yose ahakikije, igihe bazoba bateye Abayuda, bugarije Yerusalemu." 
Zechariah12:3 Uwo musi nzohindura Yerusalemu ibuye riremēra amahanga yose, abazoryikorera bose bazokomereka bibi; kand’ amahanga yose yo mw isi azokoranywa no kuharwanya." 
Zechariah12:4 Kur’ uwo musi, ni k’Uhoraho agize, nzogwisha igihūmura ifarasi yose, kand’ ūri kuri yo nzomutēza ibisazi. Nzosubiza amaso ku nzu ya Yuda, kand’ ifarasi yose y’amahanga nzoyitēza uruhumyi." 
Zechariah12:5 Abatware b’ Abayuda bazokwibgira mu mitima, bat’ Ababa muri Yerusalemu ni bo nkomezi zacu, kuko bafise Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo kw Imana yabo." 
Zechariah12:6 Kur’ uwo musi abatware b’Abayuda nzobahindura nk’urujo rurik’ umuriro rushirwa mu nkwi, canke nk’urumuri rwaka rushizwe mu mikama y’ingano; bazotōngōra amahanga yose abakikije i buryo n’i bumoso; kandi Yerusalemu hazokwongera kwubakwa aho hāhoze, ni ho i Yerusalemu nyene." 
Zechariah12:7 Kand’ Uhoraho azobanza gukiza amahema y’Abayuda, kugira ngw ishimwe ry’inzu ya Dawidi n’ishimwe ry’ababa i Yerusalemu ryoye gushirwa hejuru gusumba iry’ Abayuda." 
Zechariah12:8 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azokīranira ababa i Yerusalemu; umunyantege nke wo muri bo kur’ uwo musi azomera nka Dawidi; kand’ inzu ya Dawidi izomera nk’Imana, nk’ umumarayika w’Uhoraho ar’ imbere yabo." 
Zechariah12:9 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzokwitwaririka kugeseza amahanga yose yaje gutera i Yerusalemu. 
Zechariah12:10 Kandi nzosuka ku nzu ya Dawidi no ku baba i Yerusalemu impwemu y’ubuntu n’iyo gusenga; kandi bazokwitegereza uwo bācumise; bazomuborogera nk’ ūborogera umwana wiwe w’ikinege, bamurware akabonge nk’ūkarwazwa n’imfura yiwe." 
Zechariah12:11 Kur’ uwo musi hazoba umuborogo ukomeye i Yerusalemu, nka ya maborogo yabaye i Hadadi‐rimoni mu kiyaya c’i Megidoni." 
Zechariah12:12 Kand’ igihugu kizoboroga, umuryango wose ukwawo; umuryango w’inzu ya Dawidi ukwawo, n’abagore babo ukwabo; umuryango w’inzu ya Natani ukwawo, n’abagore babo ukwabo;" 
Zechariah12:13 umuryango w’inzu ya Lewi ukwawo, n’abagore babo ukwabo; umuryango w’Abashimeyi ukwawo, n’abagore babo ukwabo;" 
Zechariah12:14 n’iyindi miryango yose isigaye, umuryango wose ukwawo, n’abagore babo ukwabo." 
Zechariah13:1 Kur’ uwo musi ab’inzu ya Dawidi n’ababa i Yerusalemu bazotoborerwa imbizi yo kubōza ivyaha n’ibihumane. 
Zechariah13:2 Kandi kur’ uwo musi nzoherengeteza amazina y’ibigirwamana mu gihugu, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, vyoye kuzokwibukwa ukundi; kandi ba kamenyi nzobamaririkanya mu gihugu bo n’impwemu zihumanye." 
Zechariah13:3 Maze ni haramuka habonetse uwīgira ngw aravugishijwe, se na nyina bāmwivyariye bazomubgira, bati Ntugenda udapfuye, kuk’ uvuga ibinyoma mw izina ry’Uhoraho: maze se na nyina bāmwivyariye bazomutobekeranya akibivuga." 
Zechariah13:4 Nuko kur’ uwo musi abīgira abavugishwa n’Imana bazogira isoni z’ivyo bārose, umuntu wese muri bo akirikw arabivuga; kandi ntibazoba bacambara insāto zo guhumbagura:" 
Zechariah13:5 arik’ umuntu wese azovuga, ati Sind’ ūvugishwa n’Imana; jewe nd’umurimyi, kuko nagizwe umukozi uhereye mu buto bganje." 
Zechariah13:6 Kandi bamubajije, bat’ Izo nguma zo mu biganza vyawe n’iz’ iki? Na we azokwishura, ati N’izo nakomerekeye mu nzu y’abakunzi banje." 
Zechariah13:7 Ikangure, wa nkota we, urwanye umwungere wanje, urwanye umuntu mugenzanje, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize; kubita umwungere, intama zisanzare; kandi n’imyagazi nzoyihindurirak’ ukuboko kwanje." 
Zechariah13:8 Mur’ ico gihugu cose, ni k’Uhoraho agize, ibice bibiri vyo muri co bizorandurwa bipfe, arikw ica gatatu kizosigazwaho." 
Zechariah13:9 Kand’ ico gice ca gatatu nzobacisha mu muriro wo mu ruganda, mbakūremw’ inkamba nk’uko bazikūra mw ifeza, mbageragereshe kubavugutira, nk’uko bagerageza izahabu: bazokwambaza izina ryanje, nanje nzobumva; nzovuga, nt’ Abo n’abantu banje, na bo bazovuga, bat’ Uhoraho ni we Mana yanje." 
Zechariah14:1 Eh’ umusi uraje, umusi w’ Uhoraho, aho bazogabanganira iminyago yawe hagati muri wewe." 
Zechariah14:2 Kuko nzoba nkoranije amahanga yose ngw atere i Yerusalemu; umurwa uzotsindwa, amazu asahurwe, bafate abagore babende ku kagōbēro; igihimba c’abo ku murwa bazojanwa ar’ inyagano, arikw amasigarira ntazokūrwa kur’ uwo murwa." 
Zechariah14:3 Maz’ Uhoraho azokwisidukira, arwane n’ayo mahanga, nk’uko yahora arwana mu ntambara." 
Zechariah14:4 Kur’ uwo musi azohagarika ibirenge ku musozi Elayono werekeye i Yerusalemu ahahera i burasirazuba; uwo musozi Elayono uzotemukamwo kubiri uhereye aherekeye i burasirazuba ugashitsa aherekeye i burengerazuba; uzocikamw’ uruhomoka runini cane; igihimba c’uwo musozi kizokwikumira i burārūko, ikindi cikumire i bumanuko." 
Zechariah14:5 Muzohunga muce mu ruhomoka rwo mu misozi yanje; kuk’ uruhomoka rwo mur’ iyo misozi ruzoshika no kuri Azeli: mbere muzohunga nk’uko mwāhunze hamwe isi yatigita ku ngoma ya Uziya umwami w’i Buyuda; maz’ Uhoraho Imana yanje azoza azananye n’abera bose. 
Zechariah14:6 Kur’ uwo musi ntihazoba har’ umuco utamanzuye, ntihazoba n’ ikibūnda:" 
Zechariah14:7 arik’ uzoba umusi umwe rudende uzwi n’Uhoraho, atar’ umurango ntube n’ijoro; ariko hageze mu kagoroba hazoba umuco." 
Zechariah14:8 Kandi kur’ uwo musi amazi y’ubugingo azova i Yerusalemu; amazi amwe azotembera mu kiyaga c’i burasirazuba, ayandi mu kiyaga c’i burengerazuba. Bizoba birtyo mu ci no mu mvura." 
Zechariah14:9 Kand’ Uhoraho azoba Umwami aganza isi yose; kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azomenyekana kw ar’ umwe gusa, n’izina ryiwe kw ari rimwe gusa." 
Zechariah14:10 Igihugu cose kizohinduka ikiyaya, uhereye i Geba ugashitsa i Rimoni ahahera i bumanuko bg’ i Yerusalemu: kandi Yerusalemu hazoshirwa hejuru habe aho hāhoze, uhereye kw irembo ry’igisagara ryitwa irya Benyamini, ugashitsa ah’ irembo rya mbere ryāhoze, ugashitsa no kw irembo ryo ku nkokora, kand’ uhereye ku munara w’amabuye wa Hananeli ugashitsa ku māto yimbge hasi baganiramwo vino z’i bgami." 
Zechariah14:11 Maz’ abantu bazohagerēra, kandi nta muvumo uzoba ukiriho; ariko Yerusalemu hazokwibēra amahoro." 
Zechariah14:12 Iki ni co cago Uhoraho azotēza amahanga yose azoba ateye Yerusalemu: inyama z’imibiri yabo zizobatikimirako bagihagaze, n’amaso yabo aborere mu nkombe zayo, n’indimi zabo ziborere mu kanwa kabo." 
Zechariah14:13 Kur’ uwo musi Uhoraho azobaca umuhongo w’akaburarugero; maz’ umuntu wese asūmire ukuboko mugenzi we, abangure ukuboko arwane na mugenzi we." 
Zechariah14:14 Kand’ Abayuda bar’ i Yerusalemu bazorwana, maz’ ubutunzi bg’amahanga yose ahakikije buzorundanirizwa hamwe, amazahabu n’amafeza n’imyambaro, vyinshi vy’ itīti." 
Zechariah14:15 Kand’ ico cago nyene kizoba ku mafarasi no ku nyumbu no ku ngamiya no ku ndogoba no ku bindi bitungwa vyos bizoba aho bashagaje. 
Zechariah14:16 Maz’ umuntu wese wo mu masigarira yo mu mahanga yose yateye i Yerusalemu azodūga uk’ umwaka utashe gusenga Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo no kumara imisi mikuru y’insago. 
Zechariah14:17 Arik’ umuntu wese wo mu miryango yose yo kw isi atazodūga ngw aje i Yerusalemu gusenga Umwami Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo, i wabo ntihazokoroka imvura;" 
Zechariah14:18 kandi n’ihanga rya Egiputa ni ritadūga ngo rize, rizoterwa n’icago Uhoraho azoteza amahanga atadūga kumara imisi mikuru y’insago." 
Zechariah14:19 Ico kizoba igihano Egiputa hazohanwa, n’amahanga yose atadūga kumara imisi mikuru y’insago." 
Zechariah14:20 Kur’ uwo musi ku nzogera z’amafarasi hazoba handitswe ngo yerejwe uhoraho. Kand’ inkono zo mu ngoro y’Uhoraho zizomera nk’inzavya z’imbere y’igicaniro.
