Zechariah14:21 Mber’ inkono yose ir’ i Yerusalemu n’i Buyuda izoba yerejwe Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo; maz’ abatanga ibimazi bose bazoza kuzābīra, bazitekemw’ inyama. Kur’ uwo musi nta Munyakanani azoba akigera mu ngoro y’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Malachi1:1 Imbūri y’ijambo ry’Uhoraho yo ku Bisirayeli, yatumwe Malaki." 
Malachi1:2 Narabakunze, ni k’Uhoraho agize. Yamara muravuga, muti Wadukunze mu biki? Mbega Esau ntiyari mukuru wa Yakobo? ni k’Uhoraho abaza; ariko rero nakunze Yakobo," 
Malachi1:3 Esau na we naramwanse, mpindura imisozi yiwe amatongo, ishamvu yiwe ndayiha imbgebge zo mu bugaragwa." 
Malachi1:4 Naho Edomu yavuga, ati Dutsinzwe hasi, ariko tuzosubira kwubaka ahāsanganguwe; uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Bazokwubaka, ariko nanje nzosambura. Abantu bazobīta intāra y’ibigabitanyo, babīte n’ubgoko Uhoraho yama arakiye ibihe bidashira." 
Malachi1:5 Kand’ amaso yanyu azovyibonera, namwe muvuge, mut’ Uhoraho arahambaye no hirya y’urugabano rw’i Bgisirayeli." 
Malachi1:6 Umwana arubaha se, n’umushumba akubaha shebuja; non’ asangwa ndi So, kunyubaha kwanyu kuri hehe? Cank’ asangwa ndi Shobuja, igitinyiro canje kiri hehe ga yemwe baherezi bakēngēra izina ryanje? ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ababaza. Yamara muravuga, mut’ Izina ryawe twarikēngereye dute?" 
Malachi1:7 Ni kuko mwashikanye ivyo kurya bihumanye ku gicaniro canje. Maze mukavuga, muti Twaguhumanishije iki? Ni kuko mwavuze yukw ameza y’Uhoraho ar’ igikēngēretse." 
Malachi1:8 Ereg’ iyo mutanze impumyi kw ikimazi, mugira ngo Nta co biriko! N’iyo mutanze iyicumbagira n’iyirwaye, na ho nyene ngo Nta co biriko! Genda uyishikanire icēgēra c’umwami: mbeg’ ubgo yogushimira, canke yokwemera n’uko mubonana? ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abaza." 
Malachi1:9 Enda rero, ni mwinginge Imana idutunge, itugirire ikigongwe, kukw ivyo vyabaye kubganyu: mbega nyene, hari n’umwe muri mwebge yokwemerera ko babonana? ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo abaza." 
Malachi1:10 Icompa hakagira n’umwe muri mwebge yugara inzugi, ngo mureke gucanira ubusa ku gicaniro canje! Simbanezererwa na gatoya, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, kandi sinzokwemera ishikanwa munshikaniye." 
Malachi1:11 Kuk’ uhereye iy’ izuba rirasira ugashitsa iyo rirengera izina ryanje rirahambaye mu banyamahanga; kand’ ahantu hose barosereza izina ryanje imibavu, baranshikanira amashikanwa atunganye, kukw izina ryanje rihambaye mu banyamahanga, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi1:12 Ariko mweho murarihumanya, kuko muvuga, mut’ Ameza y’Uhoraho aranduye, kandi n’ivyo aduhēra kuri yo vy’ivyo kurya n’ibikēngēretse." 
Malachi1:13 Ikindi muvuga, mut’ Ewe miruho turimwo! kandi muravyimyoza, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize; kandi muzana ico munyaze, n’igicumbagira n’ikirwaye: uko ni ko muzana amashikanwa. Mbega ben’ ayo mashikanwa noyemera? ni k’Uhoraho abaza." 
Malachi1:14 Arik’ umuntu w’ingunge aravumwe, afise isukurume mu mukuku wiwe yasezeranye kuyishikana, maz’ agashikanira Umwami Imana iyifise agasembga; kuko nd’Umwami ahambaye, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, kand’ izina ryanje riteye ubgoba mu banyamahanga." 
Malachi2:1 Nuko rero mwa baherezi mwe, iri bgirizwa ni mwebge ndaribgirije." 
Malachi2:2 Ni mwanka kwumva, mukanka kurishirak’ umutima, ntimuheshe izina ryanje icubahiro, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, nzobavuma wa muvumo, n’imigisha yanyu nzoyivuma; mbere mmaze no kuyivuma, kuko mutarishizek’ umutima." 
Malachi2:3 Rāba nzovuma imbuto zanyu, ari mwebge mubinteye, kandi nzobasīga mu maso amayezi y’ibimazi vyanyu; muzoyoranwa na yo." 
Malachi2:4 Ni ho muzomenyera kw ari jewe nabarungikiye iryo bgirizwa, kugira ngw isezerano nasezeranye na Lewi rimugumeko, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi2:5 Isezerano nasezeranye na we ryar’ iry’ ubugingo n’amahoro; nabimuhaye ngw anyubahe: maz’ aranyubaha, ahindishwa agashitsi n’izina ryanje." 
Malachi2:6 Icagezwe c’ukuri caba mu kanwa kiwe, kandi mu minwa yiwe nta bigoramye vyahumvikana; yagendana nanje mu mahoro no mu bugororotsi, yahindura benshi bakareka ibigabitanyo." 
Malachi2:7 Kukw akanwa k’umuherezi gakwiye kuzigama ubgenge, kandi mu kanwa kiwe ni ho bakwiye kubariza ivyagezwe: kukw ari we ntumwa y’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo." 
Malachi2:8 Ariko mweho mwarakebeje muta inzira; mutsitaje benshi mu vy’ivyagezwe; mwononye isezerano rya Lewi, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi2:9 Nanje ni co gitumye mbahindura inkēngērwa, nkabacisha bugufi imbere y’abantu bose, kuko mutakomeje inzira zanje, ariko mukarobanura abantu ku cubahiro mu vy’ivyagezwe." 
Malachi2:10 Mbega twese ntidusangiye Data? Imana yaturemye s’imwe? None n’iki gituma turyarukana, umuntu wese aryaruka mwene wabo, tukica isezerano ryasezeraniwe ba sogokuruza?" 
Malachi2:11 Yuda araryaruka, kandi bakora ibizira mu Bisirayeli n’i Yerusalemu; kuko Yuda ahumanije ahēra Uhoraho akunda, yābiriye umukobga w’imana y’inyamahanga." 
Malachi2:12 Ūkora ben’ ivyo, Uhoraho azomurandura mu mahema ya Yakobo, ar’ umuteramyi, ar’ uwitaba, ar’ ūshikanira Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo ishikanwa." 
Malachi2:13 Kand’ ikigeretseko mukora, mutotesha igicaniro c’Uhoraho amosozi, mwīriza, musuhuza imitima, bigatuma atanakibabaye amashikanwa yanyu, ngw ayākīre ayemeye." 
Malachi2:14 Yamara muravuga, muti Ni ku ki? Ni kuk’ Uhoraho yabaye icabona canyu, mwe n’umugore wawe wo mu bucance, uwo waryarutse, nah’ ar’ umugenzi wawe, akaba n’umugore w’isezerano." 
Malachi2:15 Nta wokoze ben’ ivyo, Mpwemu akiri muri we. Ūmufise bimumerera bite? Yifuza kugira uruvyaro ruzokwubaha Imana. Nuko rero mwirinde mu mitima yanyu, ntihagire ūryaruka umugore wiwe wo mu bucance." 
Malachi2:16 Kuko nanka ivyo kwahukana, ni k’Uhoraho Imana y’Abisirayeli agize, nanka n’ūtwikira umwambaro wiwe umuryano, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize; nuko rero mwirinde mu mitima yanyu, mwoye kuryarukana." 
Malachi2:17 Uhoraho mwaramurambiye n’amagambo yanyu; yamara muravuga, muti Twamurambiye dute? Ni kuko muvuga yuk’ umuntu wese akora ivyaha ari mwiza imbere y’Uhoraho, ngo Kand’ aramuhimbara; canke ngw Imana ica imanza iri hehe?" 
Malachi3:1 Umve ngira ntume integuza yanje, indoranirize inzira imbere yanje: kand’ Umwami murondera azoshika giturumbuka mu rusengero rwiwe, ari we ntumwa y’isezerano munezererwa, eh’ araje, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi3:2 Ariko ni nde azoshobora kwihanganira umusi w’ukuza kwiwe, kandi ni nde azoshobora guhagarara ah’ azoserukira? Kukw ameze nk’umuriro uvugutira ubutare, kandi nk’isabuni y’abamesuzi." 
Malachi3:3 Kand’ azovyagira nk’ uwicaye avugutira ifeza akayimaramw’ inkamba: kand’ abahungu ba Lewi azobamaramw’ inkamba, abatunganye nk’uko batunganya izahabu n’ifeza; maze bazoshikanira Uhoraho amashikanwa mu bugororotsi." 
Malachi3:4 Ni ho amashikanwa y’i Buyuda n’i Yerusalemu azohimbara Uhoraho, nk’uko vyamuhimbara mu misi ya kera no mu myaka yahise." 
Malachi3:5 Kandi nzobēgēra nce amateka; nzokwihutira kwagiriza abarozi, n’abasambanyi, n’abarahira ibinyoma, n’ abagunga umucangero ingero yiwe, n’abanyikiza umupfakazi n’impfuvyi, bakagirira nabi inyambukīra, nanje ntibanyubahe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi3:6 Kuko jewe Uhoraho ata ho mpinduka; ni co gituma, mwebge bana ba Yakobo, mutāmazwe rwose." 
Malachi3:7 Uhereye mu bihe vya ba sogokuruza muhora mukevya mugata amabgirizwa yanje, ntimuyitondere. Ni mungarukeko, nanje nzobagarukako, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize. Yamara muravuga, muti Twogaruka mu buryo ki?" 
Malachi3:8 Mbeg’ umuntu yogunga Imana? Ariko mwebge mwarangunze. Yamara muravuga, muti Twakugunze ibiki? Mwangunze ikigiracumi n’amashikanwa." 
Malachi3:9 Wa muvumo murawuvumwe: kukw ihanga ryose uko mungana mwangunze. 
Malachi3:10 Muzane mu bubīko ikigiracumi gishitse, kugira ngw inzu yanje ibemw’ ivyo kurya; enda ni mubingeragereshe, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, murābe ko ntazobagomororera ingomero zo mw ijuru, nkabacuncuburira umugisha, mukabura aho muwukwiza." 
Malachi3:11 Nzokankamira ururyi kubganyu, ntirwonone imirima yo mu ndimiro zanyu; kandi n’umuzabibu wo mu ndimiro zanyu ntuzorūmba, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi3:12 Kand’ amahanga yose azobīta abanyehirwe: kuko muzoba igihugu c’igikundiro, ni k’ Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi3:13 Amagambo mwamvuze yar’ akomeye, ni k’Uhoraho agize. Yamara muravuga, muti Twakuvuze ibiki?" 
Malachi3:14 Mwavuze ngo Gukorera Imana nta kimazi; kandi muti Vyatwunguye iki ko twitondeye ivyo yashinze, tukagendera imbere y’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo twiraburaniwe?" 
Malachi3:15 Noneh’ abībone ni bo twita abanyehirwe, mber’ abakora ibibi bagirwa abakomeye; ushime bagerageza Imana bagakira." 
Malachi3:16 Nukw abubaha Uhoraho baragānīra; Uhoraho atega amatwi arumviriza; maz’ igitabo candikirwa imbere yiwe c’icibutso c’abubaha Uhoraho bakiyumvira izina ryiwe. 
Malachi3:17 Uku ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, ati Bazoba abanje ku musi nzoshinga, babe abo niharije ubganje; kandi nzobagirira ikigongwe, nk’uk’ umuntu akigirira umwana wiwe amukorera." 
Malachi3:18 Aho ni ho muzosubira kumenya yuko har’ itandukaniro ry’umugororotsi n’umunyakibi, ry’ūkorera Imana n’ūtayikorera." 
Malachi4:1 Ehe rāba, umusi uraje, waka nk’itanure; abībone bose n’inkozi z’ibibi zose bazoba ibishingwe; kand’ uwo musi ugira uze uzobatōngōra, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize, nta n’agashitsi cank’ agashami uzobasigarana." 
Malachi4:2 Ariko mweho abubaha izina ryanje izuba ry’ubugororotsi rizobarasira, rifise ugukiza mu mababa yaryo. Maze muzosohoka mukina amatavu nk’inyana zivuye mu ruhongore." 
Malachi4:3 Kandi muzosiribanga abanyakibi; bazoba umunyota musi y’ibirenge vyanyu ku musi nzoshinga, ni k’Uhoraho Nyen’ ingabo agize." 
Malachi4:4 Ni mwibuke ivyagezwe vy’ umusavyi wanje Mose, amabgirizwa n’ivyashinzwe, ivyo namugereye i Horebu kuba ivyo kuganza Abisirayeli bose." 
Malachi4:5 Umve nzobarungikira Eliya uwavugishwa nanje, uwo musi w’Uhoraho uhambaye kand’ uteye ubgoba utarashika." 
Malachi4:6 Uwo ni we gisāngānya azosāngānya imitima ya ba se n’iy’ abana; kugira ngo noye kuzoza ngatera isi umuvumo. 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mwene Matatiya, Matatiya mwene Amosi, Amosi mwene Nahumu, Nahumu mwene Esili, Esili mwene Nagayi," 
Luke3:25 Yosefu mwene Matatiya, Matatiya mwene Amosi, Amosi mwene Nahumu, Nahumu mwene Esili, Esili mwene Nagayi,"
